Genesis1:1 Ore apa te nkiterunoto, neitaa Enkai keper o enkop." 
Genesis1:2 Ore apa enkop nemeeta shoto, nemetii toki naa enaimin natii oriong o enguton, ore Enkiyang'et e Nkai nelo tioriong inkariak." 
Genesis1:3 Nejo Enkai; inchoo metijing'a ewang'an, nejing ewang'an." 
Genesis1:4 Nedol Enkai ajo ai sidai ewang'an. Nerishu Enkai ewang'an aitung'uaa enaimin. 
Genesis1:5 Neipot Enkai ewang'an ajo endama, neipot enaimin ajo enkewarie. Neaku eetae enteipa o entadekenya enkolong e dukuya." 
Genesis1:6 Nejo Enkai: “Inchoo metaa ketii o loing'ang'e erishata oo nkariak, naa inchoo metirisha inkariak o nkariak.”" 
Genesis1:7 Neitayu Enkai oloing'ang'e nerish inkariak natii abori oloing'ang'e o nkariak naatii shumata oloing'ang'e, neaku nejia." 
Genesis1:8 Neipot Enkai oloing'ang'e ajo Keper. Neaku teipa neaku tadekenya enkolong e are. 
Genesis1:9 Nejo Enkai: “Inchoo inkariak natii abori e keper eiturrurrokino pooki nebo, naa inchoo enkop natoyio eibalayu.” Neaku neija." 
Genesis1:10 Neipot Enkai enkop natoiyio ajo Enkop, ore inkariak naaiturrurro tenebo neipot ajo inaaiposha. Nedol Enkai ajo aisidai." 
Genesis1:11 Nejo Enkai: “Inchoo enkop metoiu inkaitubulu, inkaitubulu naaiu ilanterera, o lkeek loo lng'anayio ooiu ilanterera too mpukunot enye te enkop.” Neaku neija." 
Genesis1:12 Neiu enkop inkaitubulu enyena, o nkaitubulu naaiu ilanterera te risioroto oo mpukunot enye, o lkeek ooiu ilng'anayio too lanterera lenye anaa empukunoto enye. Nedol Enkai ajo ai sidai." 
Genesis1:13 Metaa eetae enteipa neetae entadekenya enkolong e uni. 
Genesis1:14 Nejo Enkai “inchoo metaa keetae iwang'aritin to loing'ang'e le keper peyie erishu endama te nkewarie, neaku sii ilooitodolu ilmonek too nkatitin oo nkolong'i o larin." 
Genesis1:15 Inchoo sii metaa ketii iwang'aritin oloing'ang'e le keper peyie eisho ewang'an enkop.” Neaku neija. 
Genesis1:16 Neitayu Enkai iwang'aritin are sapuki, ore ina wang'an sapuk neitore endama, ore ewang'an kiti neitore enkewarie. Neitayu sii ilakir." 
Genesis1:17 Nepik ninche oloing'ang'e le keper peyie eisho ewang'an enkop neitore endama o enkewarie. 
Genesis1:18 Nerishu sii ewang'an tiatua enaimin, nedol Enkai ajo aisidai." 
Genesis1:19 Neaku teipa neaku tadekenya enkolong e ong'uan. 
Genesis1:20 Nejo Enkai, “Inchoo metijing'a nkariak ntokitin naaishu, inchoo sii imotonyi meshomo to loing'ang'e le keper aaingat enkop.”" 
Genesis1:21 Metaa eitaa Enkai ing'uesi sapuki oo naaiposha o ntokitin naaishu pooki, o naaiserpepiari naatii atua enaiposha too mpukunot enye, o pooki motonyi terisioroto oo mpukunot enye, nedol Enkai ajo aisidai." 
Genesis1:22 Nemayian Enkai ninche ejo, “Entoisho niponariri aaiput inkariak oo naaiposha, naa nchoo sii imotonyi o loing'ang'e metubula te enkop.”" 
Genesis1:23 Neaku teipa neaku tadekenya enkolong e imiet. 
Genesis1:24 Nejo Enkai, “Inchoo enkop meyau ing'uesi naaishu te risioroto oo mpukunot enye; inkishu o ng'uesi naaiserpepiari te nkop o ng'uesi e nkop te risioroto oo mpukunot enye.” Neaku neija." 
Genesis1:25 Neitayu Enkai ing'uesi e nkop te risioroto oo mpukunot enye o nkishu te risioroto oo mpukunot enye, o pooki toki naiserpepiari te nkop te risioroto empukunoto enye. Nedol Enkai ajo aisidai." 
Genesis1:26 Nejo Enkai; “Emaitobira tung'ani te nkitanyaanyukoto ang onyaanyukie iyiook, nikincho ninche meitoria isinkir le naiposha, o motonyi oloing'ang'e, o nkishu, o enkop pooki o pooki toki naiserpepiari te nkop.”" 
Genesis1:27 Metaa eitayio Enkai oltung'ani te nkitanyaanyukoto enye makewan. Te nkitanyaanyukoto Enkai eitayio ninye ninche, olee o eng'oruoi." 
Genesis1:28 Nemayian Enkai ninche, nejoki “Entoisho entoponari emputa enkop nintorere. Entoria sii isinkir le naiposha o motony o loing'ang'e, o pooki toki ake ninye naishu naiseuseu te nkop.”" 
Genesis1:29 Nejo Enkai: “Ng'ura, aaishoo iyie pooki aitubului naiu ilanterera natii oriong enkop, o pooki shani oota ilanterera too ilng'anayio lenyena intaa endaa." 
Genesis1:30 O pooki ng'ues e nkop, o pooki motonyi o loing'ang'e, o pooki toki naiserpepiari te nkop, o pooki toki naata enkiyang'et e nkishui aaishoo enkaitubului pooki nanyori peyie intaa endaa.” Neaku neija." 
Genesis1:31 Nedol Enkai pooki toki naitobirua ajo aisidai katukul. Neaku teipa neaku tadekenya enkolong e ile. 
Genesis2:1 Metaa eidipaki keper o enkop o lorora pooki lenye. 
Genesis2:2 Ore te nkolong e naapishana eidipa Enkai ina siaai enye nataasa neeng'iyeng'a te nkolong e naapishana te siaai enye pooki nataasa. 
Genesis2:3 Metaa etamayiana Enkai enkolong e naapishana neitisiny, amu teina olong apa eeng'iyeng'e Enkai te siaai enye pooki nataasa enkitobirare." 
Genesis2:4 Kuna ninche iishoritin e keper o enkop ina kata pee eitobiri. Ore te nkolong apa naitobirua Olaitoriani Enkai enkop o keper," 
Genesis2:5 eton meetae hoo ilkeek te nkop anaa nkaitubulu naabulu tiong'ota eton eitu eisho Olaitoriani enkop menoto enchan, nemeetae sii apa oltung'ani otur enkop." 
Genesis2:6 Kake enkinuku ake nadumunye te nkop aitashal oriong e nkop, pooki." 
Genesis2:7 Neitoki Olaitoriani Enkai aitobiru oltung'ani te nterit enkop. Nekutaki inkumeishin enyena entooma e nkishui, neaku oltung'ani oloota enkishui." 
Genesis2:8 Neun Olaitoriani Enkai enkurma, te Eden te nkalo oloosaen. Nepik ilo tung'ani oitobira atua." 
Genesis2:9 Neitubulu te nkop Olaitoriani Enkai ilkeek pooki oitiship inkonyek naa sidain sii te ndaa. Euno sii apa olchani le nkishui te mpolos enkurma. Netii sii olchani le eng'eno, oo supati, o ntorrok." 
Genesis2:10 Eturuke sii olkeju oing'uaa Eden opik enkurma enkare. Neoro ilo keju teine aaku ilkejek oong'uan. 
Genesis2:11 Ore enkarna olkeju le dukuya naa keji Pishon, naa ninye ilo oruko aman enkop pooki e Hafila, ine netii sahabu." 
Genesis2:12 Naa ore saabu eina kop aisidai. Etii isoito oimerlel te sidano. 
Genesis2:13 Ore olkeju li are naa Gihon; naa ninye oshi oman enkop pooki e Kush. 
Genesis2:14 Ore olkeju li okuni naa Tigris, nerukokino enkalo oloosaen te Asiria. Ore olkeju liong'uan naa Frati." 
Genesis2:15 Neya Olaitoriani Enkai ilo tung'ani apik ninye enkurma e Eden peyie etur neramat sii. 
Genesis2:16 Neitanap Olaitoriani Enkai oltung'ani ajoki, “Ore pooki shani otii atua enkurma indim ainosa," 
Genesis2:17 kake ore olchani le ng'eno oo supati o ntorrok minya ake, amu ore kenya enkolong ninya, meeta inchere pee miye.”" 
Genesis2:18 Nejo Olaitoriani Enkai, “Meishiaakino neton olee aa ninye ake, ekaitaiki enkaretoni naishaakino ninye.”" 
Genesis2:19 Metaa neitayu Olaitoriani Enkai pooki ng'ues e ong'ota o motonyi pooki oloing'ang'e neyau ninche enetii oltung'ani, pee edol eneiko teneisho ninche nkarn; naa ore enkarna ake ninye naba anaa enaishoo pooki toki neaku ina." 
Genesis2:20 Neisho ilo tung'ani inkarn inkishu pooki, o nena motonyi oloing'ange o pooki ng'ues e ong'ata; kake ore ilo tung'ani eitu etumi enkaretoni naishaakino ninye." 
Genesis2:21 Metaa etipika Olaitoriani Enkai injo naairoshi ilo tung'ani meirurayu. Ore eirura, neitayu olarasi obo lenye nenuk ine wueji too nkiri." 
Genesis2:22 Ore ilo arasi oitayio Olaitoriani Enkai te ilo tung'ani neitaa enkitok, nerikoki ninye ilo tung'ani." 
Genesis2:23 Nejo ilo tung'ani, “Esipa ele taata oloito loo loik laainei, naa eoroti osesen lai. Ekeipoti ninye aajo enkitok amu eitayioki ninye tiatua olee.”" 
Genesis2:24 Metaa eorore olee menye o ng'otonye, neibung'are enkitok enye neaku pokira are osesen obo." 
Genesis2:25 Ore apa ilo tungani o enkitok enye meeta apa entoki naishopito nemedol enkurruna. 
Genesis3:1 Ore apa olasurai naa aing'en oleng alang ing'uesi pooki naaitobira Olaitoriani Enkai. Neikilikuan ninye enkitok ajoki, “Eji ketejo doi Enkai, ‘Eminya pooki ng'anayio lo lchani otii ena kurma?’ ”" 
Genesis3:2 Nejoki enkitok olasurai, “Aikiindim iyiook aainosa ilng'anayio pooki loo lkeek le nkurma," 
Genesis3:3 kake etejo Enkai, ‘Eminya ilo ng'anayioi leilo shani otii empolos enkurma, nimishoroo hoo ninye arashu iyeye.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Kake etiaka olasurai enkitok, “Miyeye ntae;" 
Genesis3:5 amu eyiolo Enkai ajo ore tininosinoso ninye nebolo inkonyek inyi, nitiuu anaa Enkai, niyiolouu isupati o ntorrok.”" 
Genesis3:6 Ore peyie edol enkitok ilo shani ajo sidai te ndaa, naa olchani sii oitiship inkonyek, naa olchani sii onguarrayu oiteng'en oltung'ani neitayu olng'anayioi lenyena neinos; neisho sii olpayian lenye embata, neinos ninye." 
Genesis3:7 Ore inkonyek e pokira nebolo, neyiolou ina kata aajo meishopo. Nerip mbenek olng'aboli aitaa nkilani." 
Genesis3:8 Nening ninche oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai elo te nkurma eiropija enkolong. Ore olpayian o enkitok enye neisudori peyie medol Enkai tiatua ilkeek le nkurma. 
Genesis3:9 Kake eipoto Olaitoriani Enkai ilo tungani nejoki ninye: “Kaji itii iyie?” 
Genesis3:10 Neng'amaa ajoki, “Atoning'o oltoilo lino te nkurma, naureishoyu amu atoduaa ajo maishopo naipirri aisudori.”" 
Genesis3:11 Nejoki Enkai, “Aing'ae likitiaaka minchopo? Inosa o lng'anayioi lo lchani laitanapa apa intae ajoki eminya?”" 
Genesis3:12 Nejo ilo tung'ani, “Ore ina kitok apa nikinchoo metaa tenebo nanu, ninye naaishoo olng'anayioi lo lchani, mainosa.”" 
Genesis3:13 Ina pee ejoki Olaitoriani Enkai enkitok, “Kaa bae ena nitaasa?” Nejo enkitok, “Olasurai laateleja nanya.”" 
Genesis3:14 Nejoki Olaitoriani Enkai olasurai, “Ore amu itaasa ena, kitediaaki iyie aaitulus too nkishu pooki o ng'uesi pooki entim, keaku iserpepiari te nkop, naa enterit ninye endaa ino, too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui ino." 
Genesis3:15 Ekapik olomang'ati erishata ino o enkitok. Neijia sii etiu erishata e ishoi ino o eishoi enye. Ekepurd ninye elukunya ino, ore iyie niony entutunyo enye.”" 
Genesis3:16 Nejoki ninye enkitok, “Kaaponiki nanu emion te ishoi ino, te mion sapuk iiu inkera. Ore iyieunot inono pooki keaku ino lpayian lino, neaku sii ninye likintore iyie.”" 
Genesis3:17 Nejoki ninye Adam, “Ore amu itoning'o oltoilo le nkitok ino, ninosa, ilo ng'anayioi lo lchani laaitanapa ajoki ‘Minya,’ etediaki enkop tenkaraki iyie, ekeaku enenkinyinyiret ake inya te nkishui ino pooki." 
Genesis3:18 Kebulu ilkiku o ntulele te nkurma, neaku inya nena aitubulu oo nkurman." 
Genesis3:19 Te nkinyinyiret inya endaa, ometaba anaa nirrinyokino enterit, amu teine apa kintobiruaki. Ira enterit naa enterit irrinyokino.”" 
Genesis3:20 Neisho ilo tung'ani enkitok enye enkarna ajo Hawa amu ninye ng'otonye oo looishu pooki. 
Genesis3:21 Neitobiraki Olaitoriani Enkai Adam o enkitok enye nkilani oo ndapan, neishopoki ninche." 
Genesis3:22 Nejo Olaitoriani Enkai, “Ng'ura, etotiwuo oltung'ani anaa obo lang etayiolo isidain o ntorrok; ore tena kata, neidim ninye aitorioki enkaina enye olchani le nkishui ainosa, neishu ninye intarasi.”" 
Genesis3:23 Metaa eitayio Olaitoriani Enkai ninye te nkurma e Eden peyie epuo aatur enkop apa naitobirunyeki ninche. 
Genesis3:24 Nearaa ninye ilo tung'ani. Ore te nkalo oloo saen e Eden, etipika ninye olmalaika, o lalem oyupuyup oman pooki alo peyie errip enkoitoi olchani le nkishui." 
Genesis4:1 Neyiolou Adam enkitok enye, neiroshiu neiu Kain ejo: “Anoto olee te retoto o Laitoriani.”" 
Genesis4:2 Neitoki aiu olalashe lenye Abel. Ore apa Abel naa olairritani loo ntare, ore Kain naa olaturoni le nkop." 
Genesis4:3 Ore etulusoyie enkata, neyaki Kain Olaitoriani enkishoroto oo lng'anayio lenyena le nkop." 
Genesis4:4 Neyau sii ninye Abel ilkikaunot loo ntare enyena naapir. Neng'amaa Olaitoriani Abel tenebo enkishooroto enye. 
Genesis4:5 Kake eitu eng'amaa Kain tenebo enkishooroto enye. Negoro Kain nesot enkomom oleng. 
Genesis4:6 Nejoki Olaitoriani Kain, “Ainyoo peyie itagore naa ainyoo peyie isot enkomom?" 
Genesis4:7 Amaa tiniaas isupati aimiking'amari? Naa teneitu ias isupati kigira ing'ok aarresh te nkutuk enkaji, naa iyie eyieu neibung kake eishiaakino nimir ninye.”" 
Genesis4:8 Nejoki Kain olalashe lenye Abel, “Maape ong'ata.” Ore peyie ebaiki ong'ata nedumakino Kain olalashe lenye Abel aar metua." 
Genesis4:9 Nejoki Olaitoriani Kain, “Koree olalashe lino Abel?” Nejo, “Mayiolo, ainanu oshi olairritani lo la lashe lai?”" 
Genesis4:10 Nejoki Olaitoriani, “Kaa bae ena nitaasa?” Aagira oltoilo lo sarge lo lalashe lino aishiraki te nkop." 
Genesis4:11 Ore taata iyie kitediaaki te nkop, ina natabolo enkutuk enye ang'amaa osarge lo lalashe lino te nkaina ino." 
Genesis4:12 Tinitur enkop, nemeiu ninye ae toki. Iyaku olaisikani olimana te nkop." 
Genesis4:13 Nejoki Kain Olaitoriani, “Aisapuk enkitamioto ai alang enaidimu." 
Genesis4:14 Ng'urai amu kitaarayie nanu ena olong aitung'uaa enkop, nikintalam sii enkomom ino peyie madol, naaku ololo te nkop metaa ore oltung'ani laatum naar nanu matua.”" 
Genesis4:15 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Aime neijia etiu.” Ore oltung'ani oar Kain metua, neitamei ninye kat naapishana. Nepik Olaitoriani olmishire Kain peyie ore oloinepu ninye nemear metua." 
Genesis4:16 Neing'uaa Kain enkomom o Laitoriani, nelo amany enkop e Nod natii oloo saen e Eden." 
Genesis4:17 Neyiolou Kain enkitok enye, nenutayu neiu Enok, neshet enkanasa, neipot ina anasa ajo Enok anaa enkarna o layioni lenye." 
Genesis4:18 Neikini Enok Irad, neiu Irad Mehujael, neiu Mehujael Metushael neiu Metushael Lamek," 
Genesis4:19 Neyam Lamek inkituaak are. Ore enkarna e nabo naa keji Ada, neji enkarna enkae Sila." 
Genesis4:20 Neiu Ada Yabal laa ninye apa menye le lelo ootoni too lng'oborri neramat sii inkishu. 
Genesis4:21 Neji enkarna o lalashe lenye Yubal, laa ninye menye le lelo oosh ilwululi loo usin o ndulen." 
Genesis4:22 Neiu Sila Tubalkain, laa ninye olkunoni oidong'u inkinantani too suyan, o sekenke. Neji enkanashe e Tubalkain Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Nejoki Lamek inkituaak enyena, “Ada o Sila, entoning oltoilo lai; intae nakituaak e Lamek enining'o enajo nanu: Ataara oltung'ani metua laatipika olbae, laa olbarnoti laatoosho nanu." 
Genesis4:24 “Tenaa keitalaki elap Kain kat naapishana, nesipa ajo ore Lamek naa katitin ntomoni naapishana kat naapishana.”" 
Genesis4:25 Neyiolou Adam enkitok enye aigil, neiu enkayioni neipot enkarna enye ajo Seti, amu etejo, “Aanyaaka Enkai apikaki nanu ae kerai najing ewueji e Abel amu etaara Kain ninye metua.”" 
Genesis4:26 Neitokini aaiki Seti olayioni, neipoti enkarna enye aajo Enosh. Ore ina kata eiterutua iltung'ana aaipot enkarna Olaitoriani." 
Genesis5:1 Ore ena buku naa ene ishoi e Adam. Ore peyie eitayu Enkai oltung'ani, eitayio ninye te nkitanyaanyukoto enye makewan." 
Genesis5:2 Eitayio ninye olee o eng'oruoi nemayian ninche neipot ninche ajo, tung'ani peyie eitobiru." 
Genesis5:3 Ore peyie eishu Adam ilarin iip nabo o tomoni uni, neaku ninye menye lo layioni laa ninye kewan enyaanyukie, neipot ninye ajo Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Ore inkolong'i e Adam anaa peyie eaku menye le Seti naa ilarin iip isiet. Neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie. 
Genesis5:5 Metaa ore inkolong'i pooki e Adam naa ilarin iip naaudo o tomoni uni, neye ninye." 
Genesis5:6 Eishua Seti ilarin iip nabo o imiet, neaku menye le Enosh." 
Genesis5:7 Nebik seti anaa peyie eini Enosh ilarin iip isiet o naapishana, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis5:8 Metaa ore inkolong'i pooki e Seti naa ilarin iip naaudo o tomon aare, neye ninye." 
Genesis5:9 Ore peyie ebik Enosh ilarin intomoni naaudo, neaku menye le Kanan." 
Genesis5:10 Nebik Enosh eidipaki aatoiu Kanan ilarin iip isiet o tomon o imiet, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie," 
Genesis5:11 metaa ore inkolong'i pooki e Enosh naa ilarin iip naaudo o imiet, neye ninye." 
Genesis5:12 Ore peyie ebik Kenan ilarin intomoni naapishana, neaku menye le Mahalel," 
Genesis5:13 nebik Kenan etoiwuoki Mahalel ilarin iip isiet o artam, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis5:14 Neaku inkolong'i pooki e Kenan ilarin iip naaudo o tomon, neye ninye." 
Genesis5:15 Ore peyie eishu Mahalel ilarin ntomoni ile o imiet, neaku menye le Yared." 
Genesis5:16 Nebik Mahalel etoiwuoki Yared ilarin iip isiet o tomoni uni, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis5:17 Metaa ore inkolong'i pooki e Mahalel naa ilarin iip isiet o ntomoni naaudo oimiet, neye ninye." 
Genesis5:18 Ore peyie eishu Yared ilarin iip o ntomoni ile oare, neaku menye Enok." 
Genesis5:19 Nebik Yared etoiwuoki Enok ilarin iip isiet, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis5:20 Metaa ore inkolong'i pooki e Yared naa ilarin iip naaudo o ntomoni ile oare, neye ninye." 
Genesis5:21 Ore peyie eishu Enok ilarin ntomoni ile o imiet, neaku menye le Metusela." 
Genesis5:22 Eiriamariyie Enok Enkai eidipaki aatoiu Metusela ilarin iip uni, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis5:23 Metaa ore inkolong'i e Enok naa ilarin iip uni o ntomoni ile o imiet. 
Genesis5:24 Nelo Enok tenebo Enkai, nelai ninye amu ewa Enkai ninye." 
Genesis5:25 Ore peyie eishu Metusela ilarin iip o ntomoni isiet o naapishana, neaku menye le Lamek." 
Genesis5:26 Nebik Metusela etoiwuoki Lamek ilarin iip naapishana o ntomoni isiet oare, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis5:27 Metaa ore inkolong'i pooki e Metusela naa ilarin iip naaudo o ntomoni ile o naaudo neye ninye. 
Genesis5:28 Ore peyie eishu Lamek ilarin iip o ntomoni isiet oare, neiu olayioni," 
Genesis5:29 neipot enkarna enye ajo Noa ejo: “Ore tiatua enkop natediaa Olaitoriani, ele ninye oyooki ayaki iyiook enkilejilej too siaaitin ang o too nyamalaritin oo nkaik ang.”" 
Genesis5:30 Nebik Lamek etoiwuoki Noa ilarin iip imiet o ntomoni naaudo o imiet, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis5:31 Metaa ore inkolong'i pooki e Lamek naa iip naapishana o ntomoni naapishana o naapishana, neye ninye." 
Genesis5:32 Ore etaa Noa oloo larin iip imiet, neaku menye le Shem, o Ham, o Shafet." 
Genesis6:1 Ore peyie eiteru iltung'ana aaponari tioriong enkop, netoikioki ninche intoyie," 
Genesis6:2 nedol ilayiok le Nkai intoyie oo ltung'ana ajo aisidain, neyaki ate inkituaak anaa enagelu tenena, anaa enayieu." 
Genesis6:3 Nejo Olaitoriani: “Meitoki enkiyanget ai amany tung'ani ntarasi, amu ore ninye naa osesen. Keaku inkolong'i enyena ilarin iip nabo o tikitam.”" 
Genesis6:4 Etii sii apa Ilnefilim enkop te nena olong'i, ore peyie epuonu ilayiok le Nkai aajing'aki aayiolou intoyie oo ltung'ana, neiki ninche inkera. Naa kulo apa iltung'ana magil liopa laa aiyiolot oleng." 
Genesis6:5 Nedol Olaitoriani enkarrueisho e tung'ani ajo etaa sapuk te nkop oleng, naa ore emusunoto endamunoto enye pooki e atua oltau naa entorroni ake eponaa." 
Genesis6:6 Neinosu Olaitoriani enkaraki naitobira oltung'ani te nkop, netum osina sapuk." 
Genesis6:7 Nejo Olaitoriani: “Kajutu tioriong enkop oltung'ani laitobira, tung'ani tenebo eng'ues, o pooki toki naiserpepiari, o motonyi o loing'ang'e, amu aanyaaka ainosu ajo ainyoo apa peyie aitobirua ninche.”" 
Genesis6:8 Kake enoto Noa omom too nkonyek o Laitoriani. 
Genesis6:9 Kuna ninche iishoritin e Noa. Ore apa Noa naa oltung'ani oitashe too sipat, nemeeta entioto to lporror lenye: eiriamariyie Noa Enkai." 
Genesis6:10 Eeta sii apa Noa ilayiok o kuni, Shem, o Ham o Yafet." 
Genesis6:11 Etarruoyie apa enkop oleng too nkonyek e Enkai, neiputa ninye o larrabal." 
Genesis6:12 Nedol Enkai enkop ajo etarruoyie oleng. Amu ore iseseni pooki neitarruoitie inkoitoi enye te nkop. 
Genesis6:13 Nejoki Enkai Noa, “Atumuta to ltau ajo kaiting'ie pooki sesen, amu eiputa enkop o larrabal tenkaraki ninche, ng'ura kaidaikie nanu ninche o enkop." 
Genesis6:14 “Intaiki kewan esafina olchani le Gofer, nipik ilgilat atua esafina, nimur atua o oriong te nkoronko." 
Genesis6:15 Naa inji ayieu ninkunu. Ore enkadori e safina naa intemat e nkaina iip uni, ore elalai naa intemat e nkaina onom, ore enkilepata eiteru te kop naa intemat e nkaina tomoni uni." 
Genesis6:16 Ntushura sii esafina, ning'uaa erishata e ntemata nabo e nkaina, pee eyau ewang'an. Nipik sii kutuk aji e matua. Nipik atua iorot oo nkajijik e abori, e empolos, o neshumata." 
Genesis6:17 Amu ng'ura kayau olairrag loo nkariak shumata enkop, peyie eishu iseseni pooki oota enkiyang'et enkishui, napuku tiabori keper. Ore pooki toki natii enkop naa keye." 
Genesis6:18 Kake kaitasheyie olning'o lo sotua lai o iyie, naa aijing iyie e safina, iyie o layiok linono, o enkitok ino, o nkituaak oo layiok linono tenebo iyie." 
Genesis6:19 O pooki toki naishu e pooki sesen, iyau maare e pooki pukunoto atua e safina. Niramat ninche peyie meye; naa ore pooki naa oloing'oni ake o elipong." 
Genesis6:20 Enoo motonyi te risioroto oo mpukunot enye enoo ng'uesi te risioroto oo mpukunot enye, enoo naaiserpepiari te risioroto e mpukunoto enye. Ejing maare anaa impukunot enye enitii, peyie iramat meye." 
Genesis6:21 Ore sii, ayieu niya atua e safina indaiki oo mpukunot pooki tushuma. Naa keaku endaa ino o ninche.”" 
Genesis6:22 Neas Noa ena; etaasa nena pooki naaitanapa Enkai ninye. 
Genesis7:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Noa: “Tijing'a iyie o enkaji ino pooki atua e safina, amu atoduaa ajo ira oltung'ani oitashe too sipat te dukuya nanu tena ishoi." 
Genesis7:2 Iwa ing'uesi maare naapishana nemeeta entioto, oloing'oni ake o elipong. Iwa sii ing'uesi maare naapishana naata intiot, oloing'oni ake o elipong." 
Genesis7:3 Niya sii imotonyi oloing'ang'e maare naapishana, oloing'oni ake o elipong peyie eitubulaa impukunot enye tioriong enkop." 
Genesis7:4 Amu ore teneishunye inkolong'i naapishana, kairriu enchan shumata enkop too nkolong'i artam o nkewaritin artam. Metaa ore pooki toki naitobira, kajutu tioriong enkop.”" 
Genesis7:5 Neas Noa nena pooki naitanapa Olaitoriani ninye. 
Genesis7:6 Ore apa Noa ina kata naa oloo larin iip ile te moruao, peyie elotu olairrag le nkare shumata enkop." 
Genesis7:7 Neaku ore Noa tenebo ilayiok lenyena o enkitok enye, o nkituaak oo layiok lenyena tenebo ninye, nejing e safina aailany olairrag le nkare." 
Genesis7:8 Ore ing'uesi pooki nemeeta ntiyiot o ng'uesi pooki naata ntiyot, o motonyi, o pooki toki naiserpepiari te nkop," 
Genesis7:9 maare maare, aa oloing'oni ake o elipong, etijing'a atua e safina tenebo Noa anaa enaitanapa Enkai Noa." 
Genesis7:10 Ore peyie eishunye inkolong'i naapishana, neiput olairrag sapuk le nkare shumata enkop." 
Genesis7:11 Ore to lari le iip ile le nkishui e Noa, to lapa li are enkolong e tomon o naapishana olapa, nedanya inkonyek oo nkariak naagut aaruko, nebolo sii ilusien e keper." 
Genesis7:12 Neshaiki enchan e shumata enkop inkolong'i artam o nkewaritin artam. 
Genesis7:13 Te ina olong ake etijing'a Noa, o Shem, o Ham, o Yafet ilayiok le Noa, o enkitok e Noa, o nkituaak uni oo layiok lenyena atua esafina." 
Genesis7:14 Ninche o pooki ng'ues te risioroto oo mpukunot enye, onkishu pooki te risioroto oo mpukunot enye, o pooki toki naiserpepiari te nkop te risioroto oo mpukunot enye, o motonyi pooki te risioroto oo mpukunot enye, o pooki motonyi e pooki pukunoto." 
Genesis7:15 Nejing pooki atua e safina tenebo Noa, maare maare oo seseni pooki oota enkishui." 
Genesis7:16 Ore nena naatijinga, oloing'oni o elipong e pooki toki naata osesen, nejing atua, anaa enaitanapa Enkai Noa. Neikenoo Olaitoriani ninye tiatua." 
Genesis7:17 Nebik olairrag le nkare tioriong enkop nkolong'i artam, neponari enkare o metudumu aing'atie enkop ailepie e safina." 
Genesis7:18 Neponari enkare oleng neiput enkop, nepor esafina shumata nkariak." 
Genesis7:19 Neponari enkare oleng te nkop, ometaa ore ildoinyo pooki adoru ootii abori keper neimisieki." 
Genesis7:20 Neitemoo enkare ildoinyo pooki metaa eng'uton ntemat e nkaina tomon o imiet. 
Genesis7:21 Neye pooki toki naata osesen naloolo te shumata enkop. Imotonyi, o nkishu, o ng'uesi, o pooki toki naishu te nkop, o pooki tung'ani," 
Genesis7:22 o pooki toki natii enkop natoyio naata enkiyang'et e enkishui, neye pooki." 
Genesis7:23 Etujutuoki pooki toki naishu natii enkoriong enkop, aa tung'ani, o ng'uesi, o pooki toki naiserpepiari, o motonyi oloing'ang'e, etujutuo ninye pooki te nkop. Noa ake etung'uayioki tenebo ilooboitare tiatua e safina." 
Genesis7:24 Nebik inkariak tioriong enkop inkolong'i iip o onom. 
Genesis8:1 Kake etadamua Enkai Noa o ng'uesi pooki, o nkishu pooki naaboitare ninye te safina. Neisho Enkai osiwuo meima shumata enkop, nengoroo enkare," 
Genesis8:2 neiken sii inkonyek oo nkariak e ng'uton o lusien e keper. Neguarra enchan e keper. 
Genesis8:3 Neiteru enkare te nkop ang'oroo. Ore te nkiting'oto enkolong, e iip o onom, etong'oroyie enkare aaku kiti," 
Genesis8:4 ore to lapa liopishana, te nkolong e tomon o naapishana o lapa, nedou esafina airrag te nchumata o ldoinyo le Ararat." 
Genesis8:5 Nengoroo inkariak o metabaiki olapa le tomon. Ore peyie ebau enkiting'oto o lapa le tomon, te nkolong e dukuya olapa, nelioyu inchumat oo ldoinyo." 
Genesis8:6 Ore peyie eishunye inkolong'i artam, nebol Noa elusie eina safina naitobirua apa." 
Genesis8:7 Neirriwaa ninye olkurruk, neloolo to loing'ang'e ometoito nkariak eishunye enkare." 
Genesis8:8 Neitoki airriwaa enturkulu meing'urai tenaa keishunye inkariak ti oriong enkop. 
Genesis8:9 Kake eitu etum eneroro, nerrinyokino ninye atua e safina, amu eton etii inkariak oriong enkop pooki. Neitorioo ninye enkaina enye aibung ninye neyau ninye atua e safina ine netii;" 
Genesis8:10 Neitoki aanyu kulie olong'i naapishana, neitoki aigil airriwaa enturkulu aitupuku te safina." 
Genesis8:11 Nerrinyunye enturkulu teipa naa ng'ura eeta embeneyioi nashal te nkutuk enye naitayio to lchani lo loirien. Neyiolou ina kata Noa ajo eishunye enkare te nkop. 
Genesis8:12 Neitoki Noa aanyu kulie olong'i naapishana, neirriwaa enturkulu kake eitu eigil arrinyokino ninye." 
Genesis8:13 Ore to lari le iip ile o obo, to lapa le dukuya enkolong e dukuya o lapa, eishunye inkariak tioriong enkop neiwuang'ie Noa enkikenet e Safina, naa ng'ura, nedol ajo etoyio oriong enkop." 
Genesis8:14 Ore to lapa li are te nkolong e tikitam o naapishana o lapa, netoyio apa enkop." 
Genesis8:15 Neirorie Enkai Noa ajoki," 
Genesis8:16 “Tupuku te safina, iyie o enkitok ino, o layiok linono, o nkituaak oo layiok linono, mpungo shomo," 
Genesis8:17 toshoru tenebo iyie pooki toki naishu natii tenebo iyie e pooki sesen, imotonyi, o ng'uesi, o pooki toki naiserpepiari te nkop, peyie etum aatoisho aatubul aaiputa enkop.”" 
Genesis8:18 Neipung Noa alo, o layiok lenyena, o enkitok enye, o nkituaak oo layiok lenyena." 
Genesis8:19 Ore pooki ng'ues, o pooki toki naiserpepiari, o pooki motonyi o pooki toki nalo tioriong enkop nepuku pooki anaa impukunot enye aaing'uaa e Safina nepuo." 
Genesis8:20 Ina peyie eshetaki Noa Olaitoriani ewueji olasar, neya pooki ng'ues nemeeta entioto, o pooki motonyi, nemeeta entioto, neitaki Enkai olasar opejori te nchumata olperere lo lasar." 
Genesis8:21 Ore peyie eing'uaya Olaitoriani esong'ouna narropil, nejo Olaitoriani toltau lenye; “Maitoki aekata adek enkop tenkaraki oltung'ani, amu ore endamunoto oltau lo ltung'ani eiteru te keraisho naa intorrok, nemaitoki aekata aidakie pooki toki naishu anaa enataasa." 
Genesis8:22 Ore eton eetae enkop, meishunye enkata eunore o enkata enkisampuare oo ndaiki, o enkirobi o enkirowuaj, olodalu, oloirujuruj, o endama o enkewarie.”" 
Genesis9:1 Nemayian Enkai Noa o layiok lenyena, nejoki ninche: “Entoisho entubul entoponari, emputa enkop." 
Genesis9:2 Keureyuni intae neponari sii oloputukunyi te pooki ng'ues natii enkop, o pooki motonyi oloing'ang'e o pooki toki naiserpepiari te nkop, o pooki sinkirri le naiposha, keaku inkaik inyi etii." 
Genesis9:3 Ore pooki toki naishu nalo keaku endaa te intae anaa enaishoo intae endiati nanyori, aaishoo intae pooki toki." 
Genesis9:4 Minyanya ake inkiri naata enkishui enye, aa inchere osarge lenye." 
Genesis9:5 Amu ore to sarge le nkishui naa kaitalaku te nkitalukunoto; kaitalaku nanu te pooki ng'ues o te tung'ani; ore te pooki alashe lo ltung'ani naitalaku te nkishui oltung'ani. 
Genesis9:6 Ore oloba anaa oloibukoo osarge lo ltung'ani, naa oltung'ani oibukoo osarge lenye, amu eitayio Enkai oltung'ani te nkitanyaanyukoto enye makewan." 
Genesis9:7 Ore intae, entubul entoponari entaa kumok emputa enkop.”" 
Genesis9:8 Nejoki Enkai Noa o te nebo ilayiok lenyena ooboitare: 
Genesis9:9 “Ing'ura ajo, kaitasheyie osotua lo lning'o o iyie o tenebo eishoi nikisuju," 
Genesis9:10 o pooki toki naishu nikiboitare, o imotonyi, o inkishu, o pooki ng'ues enkop nikiboitare, o pooki ake ninye natupukuo tiatua e safina." 
Genesis9:11 Naa kaitasheyie osotua lai o ntae, laa inchere maitoki aekata amut iseseni pooki to loirrag le nkare, nemeitoki aekata enkop amuta te nkare.”" 
Genesis9:12 Nejo Enkai: “Ele ninye olmonekie lo sotua lo lning'o laitayu te rishata ai intae, o pooki toki naishu natii tenebo intae o too lporori oosuju." 
Genesis9:13 Atipika olokirrai lai atua enkatampoi naa keaku olmonekie lo sotua lai o enkop. 
Genesis9:14 Teneyau inkatampo te shumata enkop, nedoli olokirrai te nkatampoi," 
Genesis9:15 Naa kadamu nanu osotua lolning'o lai otii erishata ai o intae, o pooki toki naishu e pooki sesen, nemeitoki aekata nkariak aaku olairrag sapuk omut iseseni pooki." 
Genesis9:16 Ore etii olokirrai atua inkatampo, naa kaing'or ninye nadamu osotua lai lo lning'o ntarasi otii erishata Enkai o pooki toki naishu natii oriong enkop.”" 
Genesis9:17 Nejoki Enkai Noa: “Ele ninye olmonekie lo sotua laitasheyie te rishata ai o pooki sesen otii oriong enkop.” 
Genesis9:18 Metaa ore ilayiok le Noa ootupukutuo te safina naa Shem, o Ham, o Yafet. Naa Ham apa menye le Kanaan." 
Genesis9:19 Ore kulo pokira okuni naa ilayiok le Noa, naa ninche ooibulaitie enkop pooki." 
Genesis9:20 Noa apa olaturoni le dukuya le nkop etuuno ninye enkurma oo sabibu. 
Genesis9:21 Neok Noa enaisho oo lsabibu nemera oleng neirrag to lng'obor lenye meishopo. 
Genesis9:22 Nedol Ham laa ninye menye le Kanaan emasipaisho e menye. Neliki ilalashera lenyena aare te boo. 
Genesis9:23 Ina peyie eyau Shem o Yafet olkila eiteleikino iloilila lenye, nepuo te siadi, neitoip emasipaisho e Papaai lenye; ore inkomomi enye neingorie dikae, neitu ninche edol emasipaisho e papaai lenye." 
Genesis9:24 Ore peyie einyototo Noa te merai e naisho, neyiolou enaitaasa olayioni lenye oti ninye," 
Genesis9:25 nejo ninye, “Metedeki Kanaan, keaku ninye orrindik loo rrindiki too ilalashera lenyena.”" 
Genesis9:26 Nejo ake sii: “Metamayiana Olaitoriani Enkai ai Shem, naa inchoo Kanaan metaa orrindik lenye." 
Genesis9:27 Meitubulu Enkai Yafet naa inchoo metotona to lng'obor le Shem, neaku Kanaan osinka lenye.”" 
Genesis9:28 Ore peyie eishunye olairrag le nkare, enyaaka Noa abik ilarin iip uni o onom." 
Genesis9:29 Ore inkolong'i pooki e Noa naa ilarin iip naaudo o onom neye ninye. 
Genesis10:1 Kuna iishoritin oo layiok le Noa, Shem, o Ham o Yafet, netoikioki ninche ilayiok te siadi olairrag le nkare." 
Genesis10:2 Ore ilayiok le Yafet naa kulo: Gomer, o Madai, o Yafan, o Tubal, o Mishek, o Tiras." 
Genesis10:3 Ore ilayiok le Gomer naa Askenas, o Rifat, o Togarma," 
Genesis10:4 ore ilayiok le Yafan naa Elisha, o Tarshish, o Kitim, o Dodaim." 
Genesis10:5 Te kulo etegelari iltungana loo lkirinen le naiposha aaidapashari. Ore kulo naa ilayiok le Yafet too nkuapi enye, oltung'ani ake o enkutuk enye, too lmareita lenye tiatua iloshon lenye." 
Genesis10:6 Ore ilayiok le Ham naa Kush, o Misri, o Put, o Kanaan." 
Genesis10:7 Ore ilayiok le Kush naa Seba, o Hafila, o Sabta, o Raama, o Sabteka. Ore ilayiok le Raama naa Sheba, o Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 Neiu Kush Nimrod laa ninye apa otang'asa aaku oltung'ani magilani te nkop. 
Genesis10:9 Ore apa Nimrod naa olang'oroni magilani te dukuya Olaitoriani. Ore enkaraki ina etejoki, “Olotiu anaa Nimrod olang'oroni magilani te dukuya Olaitoriani.”" 
Genesis10:10 Ore enkiterunoto enkitoo enye naa Babel, o Erek, o Akad, o Kalneh o lelo pooki ootii enkop e Shinar." 
Genesis10:11 Nepuku teina kop alo Asiria neshet Ninawi o Rehobosuira, o Kala;" 
Genesis10:12 o Rasen te rishata e Ninawi o Kala, aa ninye enkanasa kitok." 
Genesis10:13 Neaku Misri menye le Ludi o Anami, o Lehabi, o Naftuhi." 
Genesis10:14 O Patrusi, o Kasluhi, (laa ninye eing'uaa Ilfilisti) o Kafitori." 
Genesis10:15 Neaku Kanaan menye le Sidon ilo kikau lenye, o Het," 
Genesis10:16 o Lyebusi o Lamori, o Lgirgashi," 
Genesis10:17 o Lhifi, o Larki, Olsini," 
Genesis10:18 o Larfadi o Lsemari, o Lhamat; ore te siadi neidapasha ilmarei le Kanaan too nkuapi." 
Genesis10:19 Ore olpolosie le Kanaan edumunye te Sidon te nkalo e Gerar, ometabaiki Gasa, te nkalo e Sodom o Gomorra o Adma, o Siboiim ometabaiki Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Kulo ninche ilayiok loo loshon lenye. 
Genesis10:21 Naa Shem sii menye loo nkera pooki e Eber, olalashe botor le Yafet, etoikioki sii ninye nkera." 
Genesis10:22 Ore ilayiok le Shem naa, Elam, o Ashur, o Arpakashad, o Lud, o Aram." 
Genesis10:23 Ore ilayiok le Aram naa Usi, o Hul, o Geter, o Mash." 
Genesis10:24 Neaku Arpakashad menye le shela, neaku Shela menye le Eber." 
Genesis10:25 Neikini Eber ilayiok oare, nejo obo enkarna Peleg, amu too nkolong'i enyena etoore enkop. Neji olalashe lenye Yokitan." 
Genesis10:26 Neaku Yokitan menye Almodad, o Shelaf, o Hasarmafet o Yara, o" 
Genesis10:27 Hadoran, o Usal, o Dikla," 
Genesis10:28 o Obal, o Abimael, o Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 o Ofir, o Hafila o Yobab; ore lelo pooki naa ilayiok le Yokitan." 
Genesis10:30 Ore emanyisho enye epuku aing'uaa Mesha te nkalo e Sefar o metabaiki enkop oo ldoinyo te nkilepunoto enkolong. 
Genesis10:31 Kulo ilayiok le Shem to lmarei lenye, o too nkutukie enye, o too nkuapi enye, o too loshon lenye." 
Genesis10:32 Kulo ninche ilmarei loo layiok le Noa, te risioroto oo ishoritin enye, too loshon lenye. Naa te kulo eidapashakinote iloshon oriong enkop eidipa atulusoi oloirrag le nkare." 
Genesis11:1 Ore apa enkop pooki naa enkutuk nabo eeta o rorei kuti. 
Genesis11:2 Neaku ore peyie eidurru iltung'ana aaing'uaa oloosaen netum enkop naisiasha te nkop e Shinar, neitaa ine emanyisho enye." 
Genesis11:3 Nejokino ninche maate, “Wootu emaitayu Ilmatofali le sarng'ab nikipej te nkima oleng.” Neshetishore ilmatofali te rishata oo soito o lami te rishata osinyai oshula o enturoto." 
Genesis11:4 Ina pee ejo: “Wootu emateshetaki ate enkanasa naata oltalet olo abaiki keper, nikintaiki ate enkarna peyie mikindapashakino ineelakua ti oriong enkop pooki.”" 
Genesis11:5 Nedou Olaitoriani aing'or ina anasa o ilo talet otesheta inkera oo ltung'ana. 
Genesis11:6 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Ng'ura, olorere obo ninche, neiro pooki enkutuk nabo, naa ena enkiterunoto oo siaaitin naas. Naa ore pooki nayieu neas metii engoloto te ninche." 
Genesis11:7 Wootu, emaape aadoyio aitarruoo enkutuk enye, peyie meitoki aaning'uno maate te nkiroroto.”" 
Genesis11:8 Metaa eidapashaka Olaitoriani ninche oriong enkop pooki teine, nepal enchetata e nkanasa." 
Genesis11:9 Enkaraki eina peyie etejoki enkarna enye Babel, amu teine apa etomilo Olaitoriani enkutuk enkop pooki, naa teine eidapashaka Olaitoriani ninche oriong enkop pooki." 
Genesis11:10 Kulo ile ishoi e Shem. Ore peyie eaku Shem oloo larin iip nabo, etaa ninye menye le Arpakashad ilarin aare anaa neishunye oloirrag le nkare," 
Genesis11:11 enyaaka Shem abik ilarin iip imiet eidipaki aatoiu Arpakashad, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis11:12 Ore peyie eishu Arpakashad ilarin tomoni uni o miet, neaku menye le Shela." 
Genesis11:13 Enyaaka Arpakashad abik ilarin iip ong'uan o okuni eidipaki aatoiu Shela, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis11:14 Ore peyie eishu Shela ilarin tomoni uni, etaa ninye menye le Eber." 
Genesis11:15 Enyaaka Shela abik ilarin iip ong'uan o okuni eidipaki aatoiu Eber, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis11:16 Ore peyie eishu Eber ilarin tomoni uni oong'uan, etaa ninye menye le Peleg." 
Genesis11:17 Enyaaka Eber abik ilarin iip ong'uan o tomoni uni eidipaki aatoiu Peleg, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis11:18 Ore peyie eishu Peleg ilarin tomoni uni, etaa ninye menye le Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Enyaaka Peleg abik ilarin iip are o naaudo eidipaki aatoiu Reu, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis11:20 Ore peyie eishu Reu ilarin tomoni uni o aare, etaa ninye menye le Serug." 
Genesis11:21 Enyaaka Reu abik ilarin iip are o opishana eidipaki aatoiu Serug, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis11:22 Ore peyie eishu Serug ilarin tomoni uni, etaa menye le Nahor." 
Genesis11:23 Enyaaka Serug abik ilarin iip are eidipaki aatoiu Nahor, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis11:24 Ore peyie eishu Nahor ilarin tikitam ooudo, etaa ninye menye le Terah." 
Genesis11:25 Enyaaka Nahor abik ilarin iip o tomon o ooudo eidipaki aatoiu Terah, neeta apa kulikae ayiok o ntoyie." 
Genesis11:26 Ore peyie eishu Tera ilarin ntomoni naapishana etaa ninye menye le Abram, o Nahor o Haran." 
Genesis11:27 Naa kulo ile ishoi e Tera. Ore apa Tera naa menye le Abram, o Nahor, o Haran. Ore apa Haran naa menye le Lot." 
Genesis11:28 Nesiooyo Haran aye te dukuya Papaai lenye Tera teina kop natoiyeki ninye e Uri oo Ilkaldayo. 
Genesis11:29 Neyam Abram o Nahor inkituaak, neji enkitok e Abram Sarai, neji ene Nahor Milka, entito e Haran aa menye Milka o Iska." 
Genesis11:30 Ore apa Sarai naa koolupi amu meeta apa enkerai. 
Genesis11:31 Nerik Tera Abram olayioni lenye, o Lot olayioni le Haran olayioni lo layioni lenye, o Sarai, enkitok olayioni lenye Abram, nepuku aing'uaa pooki Uri oo Lkaldayo aapuo enkop e Kanaan. Ore peyie ebau Haran, eetuo aitaa ine emanyisho." 
Genesis11:32 Ore inkolong'i e Tera naa ilarin iip are o imiet neye ninye te Haran. 
Genesis12:1 “Nejoki Olaitoriani Abram, ‘Tupuku shomo tung'uai enkop ino o ltung'ana linono le sotua, o enkaji e papaai lino, shomo enkop naautaki." 
Genesis12:2 Naa kaaitainye iyie olosho sapuk, naa kaamayian iyie, naitaa enkarna ino kitok metaa iyaku emayianata." 
Genesis12:3 Ekamayian lelo likimayian ore ilo likidek naa kadek. Te iyie emayian ilmarei pooki le nkop ate.’ ” 
Genesis12:4 Neaku eshomo apa Abram anaa enatiaaka Olaitoriani ninye, neiriamariyie Lot ninye, eshomo Abram aing'uaa Haran aa oloo larin ntomoni naapishana o imiet." 
Genesis12:5 Nerik Abram enkitok enye Sarai, o Lot olayioni lo lalashe lenye, o masaa pooki enye naatasotutuo, o ltung'ana oonoto te Haran, nepuku aapuo enkop e Kanaan. Ore peyie ebau enkop e Kanaan," 
Genesis12:6 nedung Abram atua enkop o meshomo ewueji e Shekem o metabaiki eor e More. Ore ina rishata naa Lkanaan oomanya ina kop. 
Genesis12:7 Neipang'aki Olaitoriani Abram nejoki, “Ekaisho eishoi ino ena kop.” Metaa eteshetaka Abram Enkai teine olperere lo lasar ilo Aitoriani oipang'aka ninye." 
Genesis12:8 Neidur teine nelo oldoinyo le nkalo oloo saen e Betel, neun olng'obor lenye. Etii Betel enkalo e Moikuape, netii Ai oloo saen. Neshetaki teine olaitoriani olperere lo lasar neipot ninye enkarna o Laitoriani." 
Genesis12:9 Neitoki Abram aidur teine neito alo enkalo e Negeb. 
Genesis12:10 Netii apa enkop olameyu oleng. Nedou Abram alotu enkop e Misiri, aparan, amu etagolo olameyu asapuku te nkop." 
Genesis12:11 Ore pee eaku kebau Misiri, nejoki Sarai enkitok enye, “Ayiolo ajo aira enkitok sidai te neing'ori," 
Genesis12:12 naa tinikidol Ilmisiri, naa kejo, enkitok ele tung'ani ena. Naa kaar nanu matua nikincho iyie inchu." 
Genesis12:13 Tejo ira enkanashe ai peyie atum eseriani te nkaraki iyie, netum enkorrok ai atumunyana te iyie.”" 
Genesis12:14 Ore peyie ejing Abram Misiri, nedol Ilmisiri aajo aisidai ina kitok oleng." 
Genesis12:15 Nedol ilkituaak le Farao ninye, nepejoo te Farao, neriki ninye enkaji e Farao." 
Genesis12:16 Ore te nkaraki Sarai, eitaasaki Abram isupati, metaa keeta intare, olmong'i, o nkishu, o sirkon, o laisiaayiak, o nkaisiaayiak, osirkon lipong'a o ntamesin." 
Genesis12:17 Kake eitamio Olaitoriani Farao o enkaji enye to lmeitai kitok te nkaraki Sarai enkitok e Abram. 
Genesis12:18 Neipot Farao Abram ajoki, “Kainyoo ena nikintaasa nanu? Ainyoo peyie eitu kiliki ajoki enkitok ino ninye?" 
Genesis12:19 Ainyoo iyie pee itejo, enkanashe ai ninye,” metaa aawa ninye ayam aitaa enkitok ai? Ore naa iyie, nena enkitok ino toriko enchom." 
Genesis12:20 Neishoru Farao inkitanapat aisho iltung'ana te karaki Abram; neisho ninye meshomo, tenebo enkitok enye, o pooki toki naata." 
Genesis13:1 Metaa eilepa Abram alo aing'uaa Misiri, ninye o enkitok enye, o pooki toki naata, tenebo Lot aapuo enkop e Negeb." 
Genesis13:2 Naa karsis oleng Abram too nkishu o te nkosholai, o te sahabu." 
Genesis13:3 Neidur ninye aing'uaa Negeb ometabaiki Betel ewueji apa netii olng'obor lenye te nkiterunoto aa erishata Betel o Ai. 
Genesis13:4 Ewueji apa netang'asa aitobirie olperere lo lasar. Neipot Abram teine enkarna o Laitoriani. 
Genesis13:5 Ore sii ninye Lot oiriamunore Abram eboitare ninye neeta sii ninye inkishu, o ntare, olng'oborri," 
Genesis13:6 metaa meishaa enkop pokira aare te nemanya, amu aikumok imasaa e pookira." 
Genesis13:7 Nejing enchankar ilchekuti loo nkishu e Abram olchekuti loo nkishu e Lot. Ore apa ina kata, eton emanya Ilkanaan o Lperisi enkop." 
Genesis13:8 Nejoki Abram Lot, “Meishiaakino sii ake nejing erishata ang, enchankar, anaa ejing erishata oo lchekuti linono o lchekuti laainei amu aikira emudong." 
Genesis13:9 Aimetii enkop pooki dukuya iyie? Toorori te nanu. Teniito iyie enkaina e kedienye, naito ene tatene naa tiniito iyie ene tatene, naito nanu ene kedienye.”" 
Genesis13:10 Neraposhu Lot inkonyek enyena, nedol ajo ore oyerata le Yordan keeta inkariak te pooki wueji, anaa enkurma o Laitoriani, anaa enkop e Misiri te nkalo e Soar, ina kata eton eitu eidaikie Olaitoriani Sodom o Gomorra." 
Genesis13:11 Metaa negelaki Lot kewan oyerata pooki le Yordan, nelo ninye oloo saen. Neoro o Abram teine." 
Genesis13:12 Nemany Abram e nkop e Kanaan, nemany Lot inkanas natii inkanas o Yarata, neidurrie olng'obor lenye ometabaiki Sodom." 
Genesis13:13 Ore apa iltung'ana le Sodom naa kaarruok, naa ilaingokok oleng te dukuya o Laitoriani." 
Genesis13:14 Nejoki Olaitoriani Abram, eidipa atoorori Lot ainguaa ninye, “Taraposhu inkonyek inono ing'ura aiteru teine nitii, moikuape, o kopikop o loo saen o oloo ntoluo." 
Genesis13:15 Ore ina kop pooki nidolita, naa kaaisho iyie tenebo eishoi ino ntarasi." 
Genesis13:16 Kaitaba eishoi ino anaa enterit enkop; metaa te neidimayu meikena oltung'ani enterit enkop, neidimayu sii meikeni eishoi ino." 
Genesis13:17 Tudumunye, shomo tudungo eneba enkadori o endapasho enkop, amu aaishoo iyie.”" 
Genesis13:18 Neaku eidurrie Abram olng'obor lenye nelotu abik too lkeek oonyaanyukie ilngabolo le Mamre otii Hebron. Ore teine Neshetaki Olaitoriani olperere lo lasar. 
Genesis14:1 Ore too nkolong'i e Amrefel olaiguanani le Shina, Ariok olaiguanani le Elisar, Kedorloamer olaiguanani le Elam, o Tidal olaiguanani le Gooim," 
Genesis14:2 eipirutua kulo aiguanak olarrabal aarare Bera olaiguanani le Sodom, o Birsha olaiguanani le Gomora, o Shinab olaiguanani le Adma. O Shemeber olaiguanani le Sibooiim, olaiguanani le Bela (aa ninye Soar.)" 
Genesis14:3 Neitushulu kulo pooki enjore aitaa nabo to erata le Siddim (aa taa enaiposha e munyan). 
Genesis14:4 Neisiaai Kederlaomer ilarin tomon aare, ore to lari le tomon oo kuni neiser ninche." 
Genesis14:5 Ore to lari le tomon oo ng'uan nelotu Kederlaomer, o laiguanak otii tenebo ninye aar Ilrefai te Ashterot-Karnaim, o Susim te Ham, o Emin te Sharekiriatiam." 
Genesis14:6 Olhori to ldoinyo lenye le Seir, ometabaiki Elparan olpolosie liong'ota." 
Genesis14:7 Neshukunye aapuo En-mishapat (aa ninye Kadesh) near enkop pooki oo Lmaleki, near sii Ilamori lelo oomanya Hasason tamar." 
Genesis14:8 Ore olaiguanani le Sodom o laiguanani le Adma, o Seboiim o Bela (aa ninye Soar), neipang aapuo aajing olarrabal to erata le sidim" 
Genesis14:9 aashetaki tenebo Kederlaomer olaiguanani le Elam, olaiguanani Tidal le Gooim, o Amrefel olaiguanani le Shina, o Ariok olaiguanani le Elisar. Ilaiguanak oong'uan egilunore ilaiguanak imiet." 
Genesis14:10 Nebore o erata le Siddim ingumot naaturuno enturoto. Ore eilanyisho ilaiguanak le Sodom o Gomora, etusulakinote kulikae nena gumot, ore olkulikae nesaru oldoinyo." 
Genesis14:11 Metaa ewaita ilmang'ati imasaa e Sodom o Gomorra, o ndaiki enye pooki nepuo." 
Genesis14:12 Ewaita sii ninye Lot, olayioni lo lalashe le Abram omanya Sodom tenebo imasaa enyena nepuo." 
Genesis14:13 Ore obo oilanyishe, eewuo ainosaki Abram Olheburaniai omanya ina kata embata oo lkeek oonyanyukie ilng'abolo te Mamre o Lamori, olalashe le Eshkol o Aner, laa ilootoning'ore ninche Abram." 
Genesis14:14 Ore peyie ening Abram inchere ewaki oltung'ani lenye le mudong eararoto, nerik iltung'ana ooyiolo olarrabal laa iinot le nkaji enye, iltung'ana oora esiana iip uni o tomon oisiet, nelo asujaa ninche ometabaiki Dan." 
Genesis14:15 Neor ninye iltimito lenyena agilunore ninche kewarie. Etii sii ninye o ilaisiaayiak lenyena olarrabal, metaa ore ninye tenebo ilaisiaayiak lenyena, etudumutua ninche nemiraa ometabaiki Hoba natii moikuape e Dameski." 
Genesis14:16 Nerrinyu ninye imasaa pooki naawaki tenebo sii oltung'ani lenye le mudong Lot, omasaa enyena, o nkituaak o ltung'ana." 
Genesis14:17 Ore peyie eidip atushukunye eisulie olarrabal le Kedorloamer tenebo ilaiguanak ooboitare, etupukuo olaiguanani le Sodom alo anang'are to erata le Shafe, (aa ninye o erata lo laiguanani.)" 
Genesis14:18 Neyau Melkisedek olaiguanani le Salem e mukate o enaisho oo sabibu: ore apa ninye naa Olapolosani le Nkai natii shumata aisul. 
Genesis14:19 Nemayian ninye ejo; “Metamayiana Enkai natii shumata aisul Abram, ilo oitobira shumata o enkop." 
Genesis14:20 Metamayiana Enkai natii shumata aisul, ilo otipika ilmang'ati linono inkaik inono.” Neisho Abram ninye ematua e tomon e pooki toki." 
Genesis14:21 Nejoki olaiguanani le Sodom Abram, “Inchooki olorere ake, ore imasaa niya aitaa ininono.”" 
Genesis14:22 Kake etiaka Abram olaiguanani le Sodom, “Ainosa olmumai to Laitoriani Enkai natii shumata aisul, oitobira shumata o enkop," 
Genesis14:23 inchere maya hoo pito ebaiki enkeene enamuke, anaa toki ino pooki, peyie mijo ake aitaa nanu Abram karsis." 
Genesis14:24 Meeta toki naya nanu meteleku entoki nainosa ilbarnot laainei, o ematua oo ltung'ana laaturubare, aa Aner, o Eshkol, o Mamre erubata enye.”" 
Genesis15:1 Ore tesiadi e kuna baa, eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Abram te nduaata ejo, “Miureishoyu Abram, ara nanu elong'o ino, kesapuku oleng enkishooroto nikinchori iyie.”" 
Genesis15:2 Kake etejo Abram, “Olaitoriani Enkai, ainyoo doi kincho, adolita ajo eloito enkishon dukuya maata enkerai, ore olajung'oni le nkaji ai naa Eliesa le Dameski?”" 
Genesis15:3 Neitoki ake ajo Abram, “Ng'urai, esipa eitu kincho nanu eishoi, ore osinka otoiwuoki te nkaji ai ninye oyooki aaku olajung'oni lai.”" 
Genesis15:4 Ng'ura, neirorie Olaitoriani ninye ajo, “Ore ele tung'ani meaku olajung'oni lino, olayioni loo nkiri inono ninye likijung.”" 
Genesis15:5 Neipang'unye ninye boo nejoki, “Ng'ura sii iyie keper, ninken ilakir tenaa aindim atipika esiana.” Neitoki ake ajoki, “Metaa neijia ebayu eishoi ino.”" 
Genesis15:6 Neiruk ninye Olaitoriani, neikenakini ninye aajo oloitashe too sipat." 
Genesis15:7 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Ara Olaitoriani likintayio te Uri oo lkadayo peyie aaisho iyie ena kop intaa enino.”" 
Genesis15:8 Kake etejo Abram, “Oi Olaitoriani Enkai, kaji aiko tenayiolou ajo keaku enaai?”" 
Genesis15:9 Nejoki Enkai ninye, “Iyakaki entawuo oo larin okuni, o enkine oo larin okuni, o lmeregesh loo larin okuni, o enturkulu, o enkuoo e nturkulu.”" 
Genesis15:10 Neyaki Abram ninye kuna tokitin pooki nesash ninche maare neiteleiki enkiperrati nabo aishiaakinye enkae; kake eitu edung nena motonyi asash. 
Genesis15:11 Ore pee edoiki ilkurragoso nena popoki, neiture Abram aitalamaa." 
Genesis15:12 Ore etaa kedoyio enkolong, netir injo naairoshi Abram; naa ing'ura, etijinga oloputukunyi kitok le naimin kitok shumata ninye." 
Genesis15:13 Nejoki Olaitoriani Abram, “Tayiolo miata olng'ash ajo keaku eishoi ino ilomon te nkop neme enenye, neaku sii irrindiki teine, naa keibookini enkop too larin iip ong'uan;" 
Genesis15:14 kake kayau endungokinoto enkiguana olosho pooki oisiaaita, ore tesiadi, nepuku ninche teina kop etudupote." 
Genesis15:15 Ore iyie, ilo enetii iloo papaai lino to sotua, aikinukari itaa olpayian kitok oitobirakine enkirragata." 
Genesis15:16 Naa keshukunye ninche ene te ishoi e ong'uan, amu eton eitu elulung'ayu ing'ok oo Lamori.”" 
Genesis15:17 Ore peyie edoyio enkolong etomisimiso enkop, ng'ura, nelioyu emoti napuru, o lang'at le nkima elo te rishata e nena sashat." 
Genesis15:18 Ore teina olong, eitobira Olaitoriani osotua o Abram ejoki, “Ore iishoritin inono ekaisho ena kop, eiteru to lkeju le Misiri o metabaiki olkeju sapuk ilo keju le Frati," 
Genesis15:19 enkop oo Lkanaan, o Lkeniti, o Lkenisi, o Lkadmoni," 
Genesis15:20 o Lhiti, O Lperisi, o lrafai" 
Genesis15:21 o Lamori, o Lkanaani, o Lgirgashi, o Lyebusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Ore Sarai enkitok e Abram eitu eiki Abram inkera. Neeta apa enkaisiaayiani e Misiri naji enkarna enye Haga. 
Genesis16:2 Nejoki Sarai Abram, “Ng'ura sii ake, aatudung'o Olaitoriani eishoi, shomo enetii enkaisiaayiani ai, amu ebaiki natum inkera te ninye.” Neiruk Abram oltoilo le Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Metaa ore eishua Abram ilarin tomon te nkop e Kanaan, ore Sarai enkitok e Abram, neya Haga ina aisiaayiani enye oo Lmisiri, neisho Abram olpayian lenye meitaa enkitok enye." 
Genesis16:4 Nelo Abram enetii Haga, neiroshiu. Ore peyie edol enkaisiaayiani ajo eiroshiwuo, nemenu Sarai." 
Genesis16:5 Nejoki Sarai Abram, “Inchoo ntorrok naaitaasitae meetu shumata iyie. Aaishoo iyie enkaisiaayiani ai ntamuata nkaik ore peyie edol ajo eiroshiwuo naamenu nanu. Inchoo Olaitoriani eiguanare erishata ai o enino!”" 
Genesis16:6 Kake etiaka Abram Sarai, “Ng'ura, etii enkaisiaayiani ino inkaik inono, intaasa anaa enidol eishiaakino te iyie.” Neisomit Sarai ninye aisilisil o meisikie aitung'uaa kewan." 
Genesis16:7 Neinepu olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninye tembata enchorro enkare ti ong'ata. Etii ina shorro enkoitoi nalo Shur. 
Genesis16:8 Nejoki ninye, “Haga enkaisiaayiani e Sarai, kaji iyie ing'uaa naa kaji iloito?” Nejo Haga, “Kaisikita ailany ina naaitore ai naji Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Nejoki olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninye, “Torrinyokinoyu Sarai nilo ayanyit ninye.”" 
Genesis16:10 Neitoki olmalaika lo Laitoriani ajoki ninye, “Ekaponaa oleng eishoi ino metaa meikenayu te nkumoi.”" 
Genesis16:11 Nejoki olmalaika ninye, “Ng'ura ajo inuta, naa iiu enkayioni, nimpot enkarna enye ajo Ishmael, amu etoning'o Enkai osina lino.”" 
Genesis16:12 Naa keaku ninye osikiria le ntim tiatua iltung'ana, keaku ore enkaina enye ear pooki tung'ani, ore inkaik e pooki tung'ani keaku kearr ninye. Naa keibayu ninye ilalashera lenyena." 
Genesis16:13 Metaa neipot enkarna Olaitoriani oirorie ninye ejo, “Ira iyie Enkai nadolita,” amu etejo, “Esipa doi katoduaa Enkai naton aishu aidipa atoduaa ninye.”" 
Genesis16:14 Ore enkaraki eina eishooki ina shorro enkarna aajo Beerlahairoi, netii ninye erishata e Kadesh o Bered." 
Genesis16:15 Neiki Haga Abram enkayioni, neipot Abram enkarna enkayioni enye natoikio Haga ajo Ishmael." 
Genesis16:16 Ore apa Abram naa oloo larin ntomoni isiet o ile pee eiki Haga ninye Ishmael. 
Genesis17:1 Ore pee eaku Abram oloo larin intomoni naaudo o naaudo neipang'aki ninye Olaitoriani nejoki, “Ara nanu Enkai magilani, shomo te dukuya nanu miata entioto," 
Genesis17:2 naa kaitobir osotua lai te rishata ai o iyie, naa kaaponaa oleng.”" 
Genesis17:3 Nebatata Abram te nkomom enye, neirorie Enkai ninye ajoki," 
Genesis17:4 “Ing'ura etii osotua lai tenebo iyie, naa iyaku menye loo loshon kumok." 
Genesis17:5 Mikintokini aajo enkarna Abram, kake keaku aikiji enkarna ino Abraham amu aaitaa iyie menye loo lororani too loshon." 
Genesis17:6 Naa kaapon oleng, naa kaitayu iloshon tiatua iyie, naa kepuku ilaiguanak tiatua iyie." 
Genesis17:7 Naa kaitasheyie nanu osotua lai te rishata ai o iyie o eishoi ino indipa iyie atulusoi tiatua iishoritin enye olning'o lo sotua lai loo ntarasi. Naa kaaku Enkai te iyie o tenebo eishoi ino nikisuju. 
Genesis17:8 Naa kaaisho iyie tenebo eishoi ino nikisuju enkop nitaayie omon, enkop pooki e Kanaan metaa enino oo ntarasi naa kaaku Enkai enye.”" 
Genesis17:9 Neitoki Enkai ajoki Abraham, “Ore iyie imbung'a olning'o lai, lo sotua iyie o eishoi ino too iishoritin pooki naapuonu te siadi iyie." 
Genesis17:10 Osotua lai ele, limbung iyie, te rishata ai o iyie o eishoi nikisuju iyie: ore pooki lee tiatua intae, naa kemurati." 
Genesis17:11 Kemurati intae isuaten oo seseni linyi, naa keaku ina olmonekie lo sotua te rishata ai o ntae." 
Genesis17:12 Ore pooki ng'ae oitabayie inkolong'i isiet naa kemurati, pooki lee tiatua iishoritin pooki, oloba anaa olotoiwuoki te nkaji ino, anaa oloinyanguaki too mpisai inono te pooki omoni leme oinoti linyi." 
Genesis17:13 Ore ilo oino te nkaji ino oilo oinyanguno too mpesai, nemurati pokira. Metaa etii osotua lai atua iseseni linyi anaa osotua loo ntarasi" 
Genesis17:14 Ore pooki lee lememurata esuate o sesen lenye, nedung'ori aaiwuang'ie tiatua iltung'ana lenyena amu etigila osotua lai.”" 
Genesis17:15 Nejoki Enkai Abraham, “Ore Sarai enkitok ino, mintoki aipot ninye ajo Sarai, kake keaku keji enkarna enye Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Naa kamayian nanu ninye, ore sii naa kaaisho iyie enkayioni te ninye. Naa kamayian nanu ninye neaku ninye ng'otonye oo loshon, kepukunye ninye ilaiguanak loo loreren.”" 
Genesis17:17 Nebatata Abraham te nkomom enye nekueni eirorie kewan ejo; “Keikini enkerai olpayian kitok oitabayie ilarin iip nabo? Keidim Sara naitabayie ilarin ntomoni naudo atoiu enkerai?” 
Genesis17:18 Nejoki Abraham Enkai, “Oi eishiaakino nincho Ishmael metotona te dukuya iyie.”" 
Genesis17:19 Nejo Enkai, “A'a, esipa eikiiki enkitok ino Sara enkayioni, naa impot enkarna enye ajo Isaak, naa kaitasheyie osotua lai o ninye, metaa osotua loo ntarasi o too iishoritin naapuonu te siadi ninye." 
Genesis17:20 Ore Ishmael, aatoning'o iyie, ng'ura, kamayian nanu ninye naitubulaa naponaa oleng. Naa keaku ninye menye ilaiguanak tomon aare, naa kaitaa ninye olosho sapuk." 
Genesis17:21 Kake kaitasheyie nanu osotua lai te Isaak, aikiiki Sara iyie tena rishata, telde ari olotu.”" 
Genesis17:22 Ore peyie eidip airorie ninye, nelo Enkai aing'uaa Abraham." 
Genesis17:23 Neya Abraham olayioni lenye o tenebo irrindiki pooki ootoiwuoki te nkaji enye anaa iloinyang'uaki too mpisai enyena o pooki lee otii atua ilewa le nkaji e Abraham, nemurat pooki isuaten oo seseni lenye ina olong, anaa enaitanapa Enkai ninye." 
Genesis17:24 Ore apa Abraham naa oloo larin intomoni naudo o naudo ina kata peyie emurati esuate osesen lenye. 
Genesis17:25 Ore Ishmael olayioni lenye naa oloo larin tomon oo kuni peyie emurati esuate osesen lenye. 
Genesis17:26 Ore teina olong ake nemurati Abraham tenebo olayioni lenye Ishmael. 
Genesis17:27 O lelo lewa pooki le nkaji enye, inot le nkaji enye, o lelo ooinyang'uaki too mpesai too lomon, nemurati pooki tenebo ninye." 
Genesis18:1 Neipang'aki Olaitoriani ninye te mbata oo lkeek oo nyaanyukie lng'abolo te Mamre, etonita te kutukaji olng'obor lenye eirowua enkolong." 
Genesis18:2 Neraposhu inkonyek enyena neing'orisho, naa ng'ura, eitashe iltung'ana okuni te dukuya ninye. Ore pee edol ninche, nepuku akuetu tiatua olng'obor anang'are ninche, neirrugo ninye abaiki enkop ejo:" 
Genesis18:3 “Olaitoriani lai, tenanoto omom too nkonyek inono, migiroo ake osinka lino." 
Genesis18:4 Inchoo eyauni enkiti are peyie intukuyieyie inkejek inyi, niyeng'iyeng'ang'a te ntonata olchani." 
Genesis18:5 Naa kayau enkiti daa peyie intokiki aagolu nindimidimi aashom itagolo amu iimutua enetii osinka linyi.” Nejo ninche, “Taasa anaa enitejo.”" 
Genesis18:6 Neisarrisar Abraham alo atua olng'obor enetii Sara, nejoki ninye, “Isiosionie imboreitin uni e ntapa napuyiapuy nimpurj aitobir imukateni.”" 
Genesis18:7 Neipirri Abraham alo enetii inkishu enyena, nereu olashe onana sidai, neisho olaisiaayiani lenye, meisiosiono aitobir." 
Genesis18:8 Neyau eng'orno, o kule, o ilo ashe onana oitobira airragie te dukuya ninche. Neitashe te mbata ninche te ntonata olchani einosita endaa." 
Genesis18:9 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Koree doi Sara enkitok ino?” Neng'amaaa ajoki," 
Genesis18:10 “Etii atua olng'obor.” Nejoki Olaitoriani, “Meeta duoo inchere peyie maarrinyokino iyie te nkata olorujuruj, ore Sara enkitok ino, keaku anaata enkayioni ina kata.” Ore eiro einining'isho ake Sara te nkutuk olng'obor ti oriong e Abraham." 
Genesis18:11 Etaa apa moruak oleng ina kata Abraham o Sara, etaa kituaak oleng, metaa meekure duoo ninye eidim Sara atoiu enkerai." 
Genesis18:12 Nekweni Sara makewan ejo: “Aidipa ataa moruo, netamorua sii ninye olpayian lai, katum nanu murruna?”" 
Genesis18:13 Nejoki Olaitoriani Abraham, “Ainyoo doi peyie etakuenia Sara nejo, ‘Kesipa hoo doi ajo kaiu enkerai, nataa taata moruo?’" 
Genesis18:14 Keetae entoki nagol to Laitoriani? Ore te nkata nageluno kaashukokino te nkata oloirujuruj, naa ketum Sara enkayioni.”" 
Genesis18:15 Kake etomikio Sara ajo, “Eitu nanu akueni,” amu etureishe. Kake etiaka, ninye “A-a esipa itakuenia iyie.”" 
Genesis18:16 Neinyototo lelo tung'ana te ine neing'or enkalo e Sodom neiriamariyie Abraham ninche aitarioo. 
Genesis18:17 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Kaisudorie Abraham embae netaa kaas," 
Genesis18:18 amaa adolita ajo ore Abraham naa keaku olosho kitok magilani, ore iloshon pooki le nkop kemayian ate te ninye?" 
Genesis18:19 A'a, amu ategelua ninye peyie atum aitanapa nkera enyena olmarei lenye osuju ninye meibung'a orrekie lo Laitoriani eas isupati o sipat, peyie etum Olaitoriani ayaki Abraham imbaa naaisiligie ninye.”" 
Genesis18:20 Metaa nejoki Olaitoriani, “Ore amu etaa olkiyioi sapuk te nkaraki Sodom o Gomora, netaa torrok oleng ing'ok tiatua" 
Genesis18:21 e kadoyio alo aing'or tenaa ketaasa te risioroto olkiyioi oewuo enatii, naa tenemeneijia, nayiolou.”" 
Genesis18:22 Neibelekenya iltung'ana te ine, nepuo aaitoriokino enkalo e Sodom. Kake eitirring'e Abraham aitashe te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Genesis18:23 Nenyiku Abraham nejo, “Amaa doi aindaikie isupati tenebo iltorrok?" 
Genesis18:24 Amaa naaji te netii iltung'ana onom supati atua ina anasa, indim aidakie ewueji pooki nimipalie lelo supati onom otii atua?" 
Genesis18:25 Metalakuana ena bae te iyie pee mias ena bae, aar metuata isupati o ltorrok, eji metaa kenyaanyuk osupat o ltorrono! Metalakuana ina bae te iyie! Amaa ilo oiguanare enkop pooki aimeas esipata?”" 
Genesis18:26 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Tenatum tiatua Sodom iltung'ana onom ooitashe too sipat, naa kapal enkanasa pooki te nkaraki ninche.”" 
Genesis18:27 Newal Abraham ajo, “Ing'ura ajo, ayaua kewan peyie airorie Olaitoriani, nara nanu enterit o nkuruon." 
Genesis18:28 Amaa sa teneng'oru imiet te onom le lelo ooitashe too sipat, indaikie enkanasa pooki enkaraki natong'oro imiet.” Nejo Olaitoriani, “Maidaikie ninye tenainepu artam o miet te ine.”" 
Genesis18:29 Neitoki ake airorie ninye ejo, “Oo tenaa artam etumi te ine?” Neng'amaaa ajoki, “Ore enkaraki lelo artam, maas ina.”" 
Genesis18:30 Neitoki Abraham ajo, “Oi mincho Olaitoriani egoro naa kairo. Oo tenaa tomoni oni etumi te ine?” Newal ninye, “Maas nanu ina tenatum tomoni uni te ine.”" 
Genesis18:31 Nejo Abraham, “Ing'ura ajo ayaua kewan airorie Olaitoriani. Oo tenaa tikitam etumi te ine?” Newaliki ninye ajoki, “Ore tenkaraki lelo tikitam maidaikie ninye.”" 
Genesis18:32 Neitoki Abraham ajo, “Oi mincho Olaitoriani egoro, naa kairo ena ae nabo ake. Oo tenetumi tomon te ine.” Newaliki ninye ajoki, “Ore enkaraki e lelo tomon maidaikie nanu ninye.”" 
Genesis18:33 Nelo Olaitoriani aing'uaa ine, eidipa airorie Abraham. Nerrinyo Abraham alo ewueji enye." 
Genesis19:1 Nepuonu ilmalaika oare Sodom teipa, ore Lot egira apa aton te kishomi e Sodom. Ore peyie edol Lot ninche, neinyototo alo anang'are, neirrugo aitabaiki e nkomom enye enkop," 
Genesis19:2 nejo, “Ilkituaak laainei embelekenyunye atasayia intae entijing enkaji osinka linyi, erraga, nintukuku inkejek inyi, nidumunyenye tadekenya aayok aapuo.” Nejo ninche, “A'a, aikiirrag enkoitoi nalala.”" 
Genesis19:3 Kake etasayia Lot ninche oleng, o meibelekenyakinoto enkaji enye, neitaiki ninche osirua, nepejoki ninche imukateni neitu eisuisheki neinos ninche." 
Genesis19:4 Ore eton eitu eirura ninche eetuo iltung'ana le nkanasa e Sodom ilooti o lbotoro olorere pooki o metabaiki olobayie aaman enkaji," 
Genesis19:5 neipot Lot ejoki, “Koree iltung'ana ooetuo enitii ena kewarie? Intupuku ninche enikitii peyie kitum aatayiolo ninche.”" 
Genesis19:6 Neipang'aki Lot ninche teboo, nerrinyoki enkikenet enkaji." 
Genesis19:7 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Atasayia intae ilalashera laainei emiaas entorroni naba inji." 
Genesis19:8 Eng'ura, aata intoyie are nemeyiolo olee, entasho matorikoki intae peyie ipuopuo aitaas eniyieuu ore kulo tung'ana emintaas ae amu eetuo aajing oloip le nkaji ai.”" 
Genesis19:9 Kake etiakita ninche ninye, “Wuang'a iyie,” nejo sii, “Eewuo ele tung'ani aa olomoni naa ninye olotu aiguanare iyiook! Etaa kintaas iyie entorroni nalang enikintaas ninche.” Nerrumokino pooki aairony Lot, nenyikaki enkaji peyie egil kutuk aji." 
Genesis19:10 Kake eitaituo lelo tung'ana inkaik neyietaki Lot atua enkaji natii neiken kutuk aji. 
Genesis19:11 Neosh te modoki lelo tung'ana otii boo e kutuk aji e ina ilooti o lbotoro metaa eitanaura ate eirrapurrapu enetii kutuk aji. 
Genesis19:12 Nejoki lelo tung'ana Lot, “Ae yata kulikae tung'ana tene?” Aa ilaputak linono, o ntoyie, anaa tung'ani ake ninye liata te nkanasa, intupuku ninche tiatua ene wueji." 
Genesis19:13 Amu etinyikua peyie kindaikie ene wueji, amu etasapuka olkiyioi lenye te dukuya Enkai, neirriwua iyiook Olaitoriani maidaikie." 
Genesis19:14 Neipang Lot alo airorie ilaputak ooyam intoyie enyena, nejoki “Enyoito entupuku tene wueji, amu etinyikua peyie eidakie Olaitoriani enkanasa.” Kake etotiuo ninye too laputak anaa oltung'ani oiguranie ninche." 
Genesis19:15 Ore enasirie neisiosionie ilmalaika Lot ejoki, “Inyo toriko enkitok ino o ntoyie inono pokira are naatii ene, pee mindaaya te nkitamioto ena anasa.”" 
Genesis19:16 Kake etotona ailitilito, ometaba anaa neibung lelo tung'ana enkaina enye o enkitok enye, o ntoyie enyena pokira are. Ore tenkaraki olng'ur le Nkai te ninye, eyautua ninye auluo enkanasa." 
Genesis19:17 Ore peyie eitupuku ninche ninye, etiakita, “Isikie enkishui ino, niminang ake silig, nimintashe ake te dikae to yarata isikaki indoinyo pee mindaaya.”" 
Genesis19:18 Nejo Lot, “Oi mme neijia Olaitoriani lai." 
Genesis19:19 Ing'ura ajo enoto osinka lino omom too nkonyek inono, nitoponayie olng'ur lino te nanu anaa pee intajeu enkishon ai, kake maidim aisikaki indoinyo eitu aainepu enkidaata naye nanu." 
Genesis19:20 Ing'ura enda anasa nataana naa kiti sii, nchooki makuetiki ine aime kiti ninye? Naa keitajeuni enkishui ai.”" 
Genesis19:21 Nejoki ninye, “Ing'ura ajo aatonyorrikia sii ina bae, metaa maidaikie ina anasa nitejo." 
Genesis19:22 Tasioi isikaki ine, amu maas ae o tabai ine.” Enkaraki ina peyie etejoki enkarna eina anasa Soar." 
Genesis19:23 Eilepua enkolong ina kata nabau Lot Soar," 
Genesis19:24 neitashaiki Olaitoriani Sodom o Gomorra isoito o oyupuyup o oishu o enkima, eing'uaa Olaitoriani eimu keper." 
Genesis19:25 Nemut ninye nena anas, o erata pooki o pooki omanya inkanas, o pooki toki nabulu e nkop." 
Genesis19:26 Kake etanang'a enkitok e Lot silig esujita ninye, neaku ninye eng'ape e Munyan." 
Genesis19:27 Neinyototo Abraham tadekenya alo ewueji neitasheyie te dukuya Olaitoriani. 
Genesis19:28 Neing'or ninye enkalo e Sodom o Gomorra o enkalo enkop pooki o yerata, naa ng'ura, upe eilepita empuruo eina kop anaa empuruo olkokuet." 
Genesis19:29 Metaa ina apa emutata oo nkanas natii oerata. Etadamua Enkai Abraham neirriwaa Lot aitung'uaa atua ineemuti, anaa peyie emut inkanas naamanya Lot." 
Genesis19:30 Nepuku Lot aing'uaa Soar, amany ildoinyo tenebo ntoyie enyena pokira are amu ekeure apa atotona te Soar, metaa etamanya enkapune tenebo ntoyie enyena pokira are." 
Genesis19:31 Nejoki entito botor enkanashe “Etamorua papa, nemetii oltung'ani te nkop oboitare iyiook to rrekie le kiyama." 
Genesis19:32 Wou, maitemera papa enaisho oo sabibu peyie kisiap ninye nikintudupaki ninye eishoi.”" 
Genesis19:33 Neitemer menye te naisho oo sabibu ina kewarie, nejing entito botor aisiap menye, neitu eyiolou Lot enkata naisiapa ninye o enkata natupukuo aing'uaa." 
Genesis19:34 Ore peyie eaku enkolong e are, nejoki entito botor enkiti, “Ing'ura ajo aisiapa ng'ole papa; manyaaki aisho ninye enaisho ena kewarie, nilo sii iyie aisiap peyie kitum aaitudupai eishoi e papa lang.”" 
Genesis19:35 Neitemer menye te naisho oo sabibu ina kewarie nasuju, nedumunye entito kiti aisiap menye, neitu eyiolou Lot enkata naisiapa ninye o enkata natudumunye." 
Genesis19:36 Metaa nenutayu isilan pokira are e Lot te menye. 
Genesis19:37 Ore entito botor etoiwuo enkayioni neipot enkarna enye ajo Moab, naa ninye menye lo Lmoabu ometabaiki ena olong." 
Genesis19:38 Neiu sii ninye enkiti enkayioni, neipot enkarna enye ajo Ben-ammi, naa ninye menye loo Lamoni o metabaiki ena olong." 
Genesis20:1 Neidur Abraham te ine alo enkalo enkop e Negeb, nemany erishata e Kadesh o Shur nelo sii Gerar." 
Genesis20:2 Etejo Abraham tialo Sara enkitok enye, “Enkanashe ai ninye.” Ore olaiguanani Abimelek le Gerar, eirriwayie enkutuk meyauni Sara aayaki." 
Genesis20:3 Kake eewuo Enkai kewarie enetii Abimelek te nkidetidet, nejoki, “Ing'ura ira iyie oltung'ani otua tenkaraki ina kitok niwa, amu ore ninye naa enkitok e likae tung'ani.”" 
Genesis20:4 Ore eton eitu elo Abimelek anyikaki ninye, etejo, “Olaitoriani, oar metuata iltung'ana loo sipat?" 
Genesis20:5 Keitu aajoki ninye makewan, ‘Enkanashe ai ninye?’ Netejo sii ninye enkitok, ‘Olalashe lai ninye.’ Metaa e supatisho oltau o sidano ataasie ena.”" 
Genesis20:6 Nejoki Enkai ninye teina kidetidet, “Ee ekayiolo ajo itaasa ena te supatisho oltau lino, kake nanu laaibooyie peyie mikintaas eng'oki, metaa eitu aaisho iyie iseyie ninye." 
Genesis20:7 Ore tena kata ayieu nirrinyoki olpayian enkitok enye, amu ore ninye naa oloiboni le Nkai, naa aikiomonoki ninye peyie nipok. Kake Naa tinimirrinyu iyie ninye, tayiolo ajo meeta inchere peyie miye, iyie o pooki toki ino.”" 
Genesis20:8 Neinyototo Abimelek tadekenya enasirie, neipotu ilaisiaayiak lenyena pooki neinosaki ninche kuna baa pooki, neureishoyu iltung'ana oleng." 
Genesis20:9 Neipotu Abimelek Abraham, nejoki ninye, “Kaa bae ena nintaasa iyiook? Naa kaa ng'oki aaitaasa nanu iyie eji metaa kiyaka iyie nanu o enkitoria ai eng'oki sapuk? Kintaasa nanu imbaa nemeishaakino neasi.”" 
Genesis20:10 Nejoki Abimelek Abraham, “Ainyoo endamunoto niata peyie itaasa ena bae?”" 
Genesis20:11 Nejo Abraham, “Ataasa amu atadamua ajo, metii ene euriata e Nkai katukul, naa kaari enkaraki enkitok ai." 
Genesis20:12 Ore sii enkae, ekesipa doi tenajo enkanashe ai amu ore ninye, naa entito e papaai lai neme entito e yieyio lai, netaa enkitok ai." 
Genesis20:13 Ore apa peyie aaisho Enkai maidurra te nkaji e papa, naatiaaka ninye, ‘Ena embae nikintaas nanu, ore pooki wueji nikijing', tejo tialo nanu, olalashe lai ninye.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Neitayu Abimelek intare, o lmong'i o lewa o ng'oruo irrindiki, neisho pooki Abraham nerrinyoki ninye enkitok enye Sara." 
Genesis20:15 Nejo, Abimelek, “Ore enkop ai pooki, etii dukuya ino tamanya pooki neba anaa eninyor.”" 
Genesis20:16 Nejoki Sara, “Ing'ura aishoo olalashe lino inkoshola enkalifu nabo, naaku ine nkitoipoto ino too nkonyek e lelo pooki likiboitare, ore te dukuya lelo pooki neaku aikinkenakini esipata.”" 
Genesis20:17 Neomon Abraham Enkai, neishiunye Enkai Abimelek tenebo enkitok enye ng'oruo rrindiki metaa etoiwutuo inkera." 
Genesis20:18 Amu eteena apa Olaitoriani ng'ueseti enkaji pooki e Abimelek tenkaraki Sara enkitok e Abraham. 
Genesis21:1 Nemutan Olaitoriani Sara anaa apa enatejo, neitaas ninye anaa enaisiligie." 
Genesis21:2 Nenutayu Sara neiki Abraham enkayioni te nkata e moruao enye, te nkata erishata natiaka ninye Enkai." 
Genesis21:3 Neipot Abraham enkarna enkayioni enye natoikio ninye Sara ajo Isaak. 
Genesis21:4 Nemurat Abraham enkayioni enye Isaak etaa oloo nkolong'i isiet, te inoto, anaa enaitanapa Enkai ninye." 
Genesis21:5 Etaa Abraham oloo larin iip peyie eikini ninye enkayioni enye Isaak. 
Genesis21:6 Nejo Sara, “Aaitobiraka nanu Enkai enkuenia; ore pooki ng'ae oning, naa kaakueniyie nanu.”" 
Genesis21:7 Nejo ninye, “Aing'ae aikata oidima atiaaki Abraham inchere keitanak Sara inkera? Ore ake eyia, natoikio ninye enkayioni te nkata emoruao enye.”" 
Genesis21:8 Nebulu ina kerai, neoruni ilki, neitobir Abraham osirua sapuk ina olong naoruni Isaak ilki." 
Genesis21:9 Nedol Sara enkayioni e Hagar olmisiri, natoikio ninye Abraham eiguran o enkayioni enye Isaak." 
Genesis21:10 Nejoki ninye Abraham, “Taarai impang'ie ena kitok rrindik tenebo enkayioni enye, amu meaku enkayioni ena kitok rrindik olajung'oni tenebo olayioni lai Isaak.”" 
Genesis21:11 Neaku torrono oleng ina bae te dukuya Abraham te nkaraki enkayioni enye. 
Genesis21:12 Kake etiaka Enkai Abraham, “Mincho kintagor ororei le nkerai o tenkaraki enkitok ino rrindik, ore pooki nikijoki Sara, taasa ina. Amu Isaak eipotieki eishoi ino." 
Genesis21:13 Naa kaitayu sii olosho tiatua enkayioni enkitok rrindik, amu ole ishoi ino sii ninye.”" 
Genesis21:14 Neinyototo Abraham tadekenya enasirie, neya endaa o lbene lolchoni le nkare; neisho Hagar meiteleiki oloililai lenye tenebo ina kerai neisho ninche meshomo. Nedumunye alo nelimana ti ong'ota e Beer-sheba." 
Genesis21:15 Ore peyie emita enkare natii olbene lolchoni neing'uaa enkerai te ntonata osanag. 
Genesis21:16 Nelo aing'uaa aton tenelamita te wueji neba anaa engororoto e mbae. Amu etejo, “Mincho aduaaki keeya enkerai ai.” Ore eton tenelamita ninye, neilepie enkerai oltoilo aishir." 
Genesis21:17 Nening Enkai oltoilo leina ayioni, neipot olmalaika le Nkai Hagar eing'uaa keper nejoki ninye, “Ainyoo nikigira aitanyamal iyie Hagar? Miureishoyu, amu etoning'o Enkai oltoilo le nkishirata leina ayioni te ine netii." 
Genesis21:18 Inyo tudumu enkerai imbung'a tukurraki nkaik inono, amu kaitaa ninye olosho kitok.”" 
Genesis21:19 Nebol Enkai inkonyek e Haga nedol enchorro enkare, nelo aiput ilo bene lenye lo lchoni enkare neisho ina ayioni metooko." 
Genesis21:20 Netii Enkai tenebo enkayioni nebulu ninye nebik tiong'ota, neaku olang'oroni padan le nkawuo." 
Genesis21:21 Nebik tiong'ata e paran, neyamaki ng'otonye enkitok naitung'uaa enkop e Misiri." 
Genesis21:22 Ore apa ina kata, etiaakita Abimelek tenebo Fiko aa olkitok le njore, Abraham," 
Genesis21:23 “Etii Enkai tenebo iyie too siaaitin pooki nias, ore naa taata, ayieu ninos olmumai te nanu ajo te Nkai mikintaas emonkoi, anaa intaas enkerai ai, anaa intaas eishoi ai. Kake ore anaa ina supatisho naaitaasa, ninye sii nanu intaasaki te ina kop nitaayie omoni.”" 
Genesis21:24 Nejo Abraham, “Kanya olmumai.”" 
Genesis21:25 Neing'unyung'unyaki Abraham Abimelek tenkaraki enchorro natoorutuo isinkan le Abimelek. 
Genesis21:26 Nejo Abimelek, “Mayiolo ajo aing'ae otaasa ena bae, eitu sii kiliki, neitu aekata aning ometabaiki ena olong.”" 
Genesis21:27 Neyau Abraham nkerra o lmong'i neisho ninche Abimelek, neitayu pokira olning'o." 
Genesis21:28 Negelu Abraham isupeni naapishana e kerra too ntare meitasho oopeny. 
Genesis21:29 Nejoki Abimeleki Abraham, “Ainyoo eitodolu kuna supeni naapishana e kerra nitegelua meitasho oopeny.”" 
Genesis21:30 Nejo, “Ore kuna supeni naapishana e kerra ining'amaa too nkaik aainei metaa iyaku iyie olchakeni lai inchere atuturo ena shorro.”" 
Genesis21:31 Ore te nkaraki ina, neji ine Beer-sheba, amu te ine einosa pokira oare olmumai." 
Genesis21:32 Metaa eitaituo ninche olning'o te Beer-sheba. Nerrinyo Abimelek tenebo Fiko olkitok lenye le njore enkop oo Lfilisti. 
Genesis21:33 Neun Abraham enchani nanyaanyukie oloilei te Beer-sheba, neipot ninye te ine enkarna o Laitoriani, Enkai oo ntarasi." 
Genesis21:34 Nebik Abraham te nkop oo Lfilisti inkolong'i kumok. 
Genesis22:1 Ore etulusoitie kuna baa etetema Enkai Abraham ejoki ninye, “Abraham” nejo ninye, “Nele nanu.”" 
Genesis22:2 Nejoki, “Toriko olayioni lino Isaak ilo laa ninye ake iata, ilo linyor, nipuopuo enkop e Moria, nintayu ninye te ine metaa olasar o pejori te nchumata o ldoinyo obo laaliki.”" 
Genesis22:3 Metaa einyo Abraham tadekenya enasirie neirot osikiria lenye, nerik ilbarnot lenyena oare tenebo enkayioni enye Isaak. Nedung'u ilkeek ooinokie olasar opejori, nedumunye alo ewueji netiaka ninye Enkai." 
Genesis22:4 Ore te nkolong e uni, neraposhu Abraham inkonyek nedol ewueji nelakua." 
Genesis22:5 Nejoki Abraham ilbarnot lenyena, “Entotoni tene tenebo ele sikiria pee alo nanu o enkayioni idie aaseremisho peyie kintoki aashukunye.”" 
Genesis22:6 Neya Abraham ilkeek ooinokieki olasar opejori, neiteleiki oloililai le Isaak enkayioni enye. Nenap te nkaina enye enkima o enkalem. Nepuo pokira are aairiamari." 
Genesis22:7 Nejoki Isaak papaai lenye Abraham, “Papaai!” Nejo Abraham “Nele nanu enkayioni ai.” Nejo Isaak, “Ing'ura ajo kiata enkima o lkeek paa koree doi olkuo le ker likintainye olasar opejori?”" 
Genesis22:8 Nejo Abraham, “Ekeisho Enkai kewan olkuo le ker lolasar o pejori enkayioni ai.” Kaae nepuo pokira are aairiamari." 
Genesis22:9 Ore peyie ebau ewueji natuutaka Enkai ninye, neshetu Abraham olperere lo lasar te ine neirragie ilkeek aitobiraki, neen Isaak enkayioni enye, neirragie ninye te wueji o lasar te nchumata oo lkeek." 
Genesis22:10 Neitorioo Abraham enkaina enye nedumu enkalem nayieng'ie enkayioni enye. 
Genesis22:11 Kake eipoto ninye olmalaika lo Laitoriani eing'uaa keper ejoki, “Abraham! Abraham!” Nejo ninye, “Nele nanu.”" 
Genesis22:12 Nejo, olmalaika, “Minteleiki enkaina ino enkayioni anaa intaas ninye ae, amu atayiolo taata ajo iure Enkai amu atoduaa ajo eitu kimitiki enkayioni ino ina naa ninye ake iata.”" 
Genesis22:13 Neraposhu Abraham inkonyek enyena aing'orisho nedol te siadi ninye olmeregesh otaasha entim imowuarak enyena, nelo Abraham aya ilo meregesh, neitayu ninye aitaa olasar opejori te rishata e nkayioni enye." 
Genesis22:14 Neipot Abraham ine wueji ajo, “Eneishorunye Olaitoriani.” Naa ina arna eeta ine o taata, ore to ldoinyo lo Laitoriani keishoruni." 
Genesis22:15 Neitoki olmalaika lo Laitoriani aipot Abraham enkata e are eing'uaa shumata. 
Genesis22:16 Nejo, “Ainosa nanu olmumai te nkewan ai ejo Olaitoriani, ore amu itaasa ena neitu imit enkayioni ino aa ninye ake iata," 
Genesis22:17 ekaamayian iyie oleng', naa kaponaa eishoi ino metotiwuo anaa ilakir le keper netiu sii anaa osinyai le nkiyopata enaiposha. Ore eishoi ino neaku e nenye kishomi oo lmang'ati lenye." 
Genesis22:18 Naa tiatua eishoi ino emayian iloshon le nkop pooki ate, amu itoning'o oltoilo lai.”" 
Genesis22:19 Nerrinyokino Abraham ilbarnot lenyena, nedumunye pooki aapuo Beer-sheba. Nebik Abraham te Beer-sheba." 
Genesis22:20 Neaku ore ti oriong kuna baa, etiakaki Abraham, “Ing'ura sii ajo, etoikio Milka olalashe lino Nahor inkera." 
Genesis22:21 Usi ilo kikau lenye, o Obus olalashe lenye, o Kemuel menye le Aram." 
Genesis22:22 Keseed, o Haso, o Pildash, o Yidlaf o Betuel.”" 
Genesis22:23 Neaku Betuel menye le Rebeka. Lelo pokira isiet etoikio Milka olalashe le Abraham Nahor. 
Genesis22:24 Ore ake sii, ore ina apiani naji enkarna enye Reuma, etoiwuo Teba, o Gaham, o Tahash, o Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Eishua apa Sara ilarin iip o tikitam o naapishana, lelo apa larin le nkishui e Sara." 
Genesis23:2 Neye Sara te Keriath-arba (aa ninye Hebron), te nkop e Kanaan. Nelotu Abraham aishiraki to sina Sara, neishir oleng." 
Genesis23:3 Neinyototo Abraham te dukuya ina tang'atang'a enye, nejoki lelo Hiti," 
Genesis23:4 “Ara olomoni o lalotoni tiatua intae, enchooki ewueji tiatua intae metaa ewueji enkurare pee atum atuturoi entang'atang'a ai aiwuang'ie too nkonyek aainei.”" 
Genesis23:5 Newaliki Ilhiti Abraham aajoki," 
Genesis23:6 “Toning'o iyiook olkitok lai, ira iyie olkitok magilani tiatua iyiook. Tuturoi entang'atang'a ino te nkurare naba anaa enigelu too nkuraren ang', meetae hoo obo lang Likimitiki enkurare enye anaa kimitiki iturorie entang'atang'a ino.”" 
Genesis23:7 Neinyototo Abraham neirrugo te dukuya lelo Hiti oopeny enkop. 
Genesis23:8 Nejoki ninche, “Tiniyieuu nanukaa entang'atang'a ai aiwuang'ie too nkonyek aainei, entoning enajo, entoomonokoki te Efron olayioni le Sohar," 
Genesis23:9 peyie aaisho enkapune e Makpela naata to lpijata lo lokeri lenye. Inchoo maaishoo te nkinyang'a enye pooki idolitata metaa ewueji ai oo nkuraren.” 
Genesis23:10 Neton sii apa ninye Efron tiatua Lhiti. Newaliki Efron ilo Hiti Abraham ening'ito ilhiti o pooki oim kishomi e nkanasa, ajo:" 
Genesis23:11 “A-a, olkitok lai, toning'o enajo, ekaisho olokeri tenebo enkapune natii atua, te dukuya ilayiok pooki lo lorere lai, aaishoo iyie tunukarie entang'atang'a ino.”" 
Genesis23:12 Neirugo Abraham te dukuya olorere le ina kop. 
Genesis23:13 Nejoki Efron ening'ito olorere le ina kop, “Kake tenaa aikining', aatasayia inchooki matalaa iropiani olokeri, tang'amai elaata te nanu peyie atum atuturoi entang'atang'a ai te ine.”" 
Genesis23:14 Newaliki Efron Abraham ajoki," 
Genesis23:15 “Olkitok lai, toning'oki: amaa eoroti e nkop neimu shekeli iip ong'uan e nkosholai, ainyoo ina te rishata ai o iyie? Tuturoi entang'atang'a ino.”" 
Genesis23:16 Nening'okino Abraham o Efron ina laata. Neikenaki Abraham Efron inkoshola naaipotuo ening'ito Lhiti, shekeli iip ong'uan e nkosholai anaa enkinyiang'a oo lamirak." 
Genesis23:17 Metaa ore olokeri le Efron otii Makpela natii oloosaen le Mamre olokeri oota enkapune tiatua o lkeek ootii olokeri, enkop pooki," 
Genesis23:18 eishooki Abraham metaa enenye te dukuya Ilhiti, o lelo pooki ooim enkishomi ejing enkanasa." 
Genesis23:19 Ore peyie eidipayu ina neturoo Abraham Sara enkitok enye te nkapune olokeri le Makpela natii oloo saen le Mamre (aa ninye Hebron) te nkop oo Lkanaan. 
Genesis23:20 Ore olokeri tenebo enkapune natii atua eishooitie Lhiti aaisho Abraham metaa ewueji e nkurare oo ltung'ana lenyena. 
Genesis24:1 Etaa apa Abraham olpayian kitok otobikoyie ilarin kumok oleng', netamayiana Olaitoriani Abraham te pooki toki." 
Genesis24:2 Nejoki Abraham osinka lenye otobiko oleng te nkaji laa ninye oitasheiki imasaa enyena pooki, “Tipika enkaina ino abori enkupes ai," 
Genesis24:3 naa kaainosie iyie olmumai to Laitoriani, te Nkai e keper o enkop, inchere miyamaki olayioni lai enkitok too ntoyie oo Lkanaan laa ninche amanya atua." 
Genesis24:4 Kake ilo enkop ai olgelata lai, nirikoki olayioni lai Isaak enkitok.”" 
Genesis24:5 Nejoki olaisiaayiani ninye, “Eidimayu metanya enkitok aasuju alotu ena kop, karik olayioni lino arriny ina kop apa ning'uaa?”" 
Genesis24:6 Nejoki Abraham ninye, “Toduaa ake mirriny olayioni lai ine." 
Genesis24:7 Ore Olaitoriani Enkai e keper laaitayio nanu te nkaji e papaai lai o te nkop apa naatoinyieki, laairorie naainosie olmumai aajoki, ‘Iishoritin inono aisho ena kop.’ Ekeirriwaa olmalaika lenye te dukuya iyie, naa ilo iyie arikoki olayioni lai entito te ine." 
Genesis24:8 Naa tenemeyieu enkitok nikisuju iyie, nimikintoki olmumai lai aibung': kake mirrinyoki ake olayioni lai ine.”" 
Genesis24:9 Metaa nepik osinka enkaina enye abori enkupes e Abraham olkitok lenye, nenya olmumai tenkaraki ina bae." 
Genesis24:10 Nereu osinka intamesin tomon olkitok lenye nelo eya nkishorot kumok oo mpukunot pooki to lkitok lenye nedumunye alo Mesopotamia, enkanasa e Nahor." 
Genesis24:11 Neitigil intamesin kung tiauluo enkanasa te mbata enchorro etaa teipa erishata napuonu inkituaak aaoku enkare. 
Genesis24:12 Nejo ninye, “Oi o Laitoriani Enkai o lkitok lai Abraham, inchooki ena olong dupoto aatoomono iyie, nintodolu enyorrata ino nauno to olkitok lai Abraham." 
Genesis24:13 Ng'ura, aitashe nanu te mbata enchorro e nkare, ore intoyie oo ltung'ana lena anasa egira aapuku aaipang'u aoku enkare." 
Genesis24:14 Inchoo metaa ore entito najoki, aatoomono intadou emoti ino matooko enkare, naajoki tooko, naa kaokoki sii intamesin inono inchoo metaa ninye itegelaka osinka lino Isaak. Teina ayiolou ajo intodolua enyorrata nauno to olkitok lai.”" 
Genesis24:15 Ore eton eitu eishu inkirorot, nemaniki Rabeka entito e Betuel olayioni le Milka, enkitok e Nahor olalashe le Abraham elotu eeta emoti to loililai lenye." 
Genesis24:16 Naa entito sidai oleng tiong'u, eselenkei neitu aikata eyiolou olee, nedoiki enchorro, neigany emoti enye, neilepu." 
Genesis24:17 Nekuet osinka anang'are ninye nejoki, “Aatoomono inchooki enkiti are naok te moti ino.”"
