Genesis24:18 Nejo ninye, “Tooko olkitok lai”, “nesiokisioki aitadou emoti te nkaina enye neisho ninye metooko." 
Genesis24:19 Ore peyie eidip aishoo ninye metooko, etiaka, Ekaokoki sii intamesin inono o metaba anaa neraposho.”" 
Genesis24:20 Metaa eijililiaka emoti enye empeut neipirri arrinyo enchorro aoku omeitaraposho intamesin enyena pooki. 
Genesis24:21 Neing'or osinka ninye aitirring'a meiro, ajurru tenaa keitudupo Olaitoriani elutunoto enye anaa keitu." 
Genesis24:22 Ore peyie eidip intamesin aatookisho, eitayio oltung'ani olgisoi le sahabu laa eoroti nabo e shekel enkiroishi, o lkataarri aare loo nkaik enyena oimu enkiroishi enye shekeli tomon e sahabu." 
Genesis24:23 Nejo, “Aatasayia tolikioki ajo ira entito e ng'ae? Ketii olgilata likirrag enkaji e papaai lino?”" 
Genesis24:24 Nejoki ninye ninye, “Ara entito e Betuel olayioni le Milka otoikio Nahor.”" 
Genesis24:25 Neitoki ajoki, “Kiata sii pokira olkujita o lgilat ooirragi.”" 
Genesis24:26 Neirrug oltung'ani elukunya aserem Olaitoriani. 
Genesis24:27 Nejo: “Meisisi Olaitoriani Enkai olkitok lai Abraham, leitu eing'uaa enyorrata enye nauno o enchunet enye to Laitoriani lai. Ore nanu, aatorikuo Olaitoriani te nkoitoi arikoki enkaji oo lalashera lo lkitok lai.”" 
Genesis24:28 Neipirri ina tito aliki enkaji e ng'otonye kuna baa. 
Genesis24:29 Eeta apa Rebeka olalashe oji enkarna enye Laban. Nepuku Laban akuet alo enetii ilo tung'ani te nchorro. 
Genesis24:30 Ore peyie edol olgisoi o lkataarri otii inkaik e nkanashe, nening'u sii irorei le Rebeka enkanashe enye oojo, “Neija aatiaaka oltung'ani,” eshomo enetii oltung'ani; nenyorriki eitashe tembata oo ntamesin te nchorro." 
Genesis24:31 Nejoki, “Tijing'u, olomayiana lo Laitoriani, ainyoo peyie intashe tiauluo: naidipa aitobira enkaji o ewueji oo ntamesin.”" 
Genesis24:32 Metaa etijing'ua ilo tung'ani atua aji, nelaku Laban ilolan too ntamesin, neisho ninye ninche endaa oo ntamesin. Neisho sii ninye enkare naisujie inkejek enyena o tenebo lelo oiriamunore." 
Genesis24:33 Neirragakinyeki ninye endaa meinosa, kake etejo ninye; “Manya endaa o metaba anaa nairo ororei laayawua.” Nejoki Laban ninye, “Iroro.”" 
Genesis24:34 Metaa etejo ninye, “Ara nanu osinka le Abraham! Netamayiana Olaitoriani olkitok lai oleng, neitaa ninye karsis:" 
Genesis24:35 eishoo ninye inkishu, o ntare, inkoshola o sahabu, o sinkan, o nkaisiaayiak, o ntamesin o sirkon." 
Genesis24:36 Ore Sara, enkitok olkitok lai etoikio ninye enkayioni etaa moruo. Ore nena masaa pooki neishoo olayioni lenye." 
Genesis24:37 Aainosie olkitok lai olmumai ajoki, ‘Milo iyie ayamaki olayioni lai enkitok too ntoyie oo Lkanaan lena kop naamanya." 
Genesis24:38 Kake shomo enkaji e papa lai, o ltung'ana lang torikoki olayioni lai enkitok.’" 
Genesis24:39 Najoki nanu olkitok lai, ‘Eidimayu metanya enkitok aasuju nanu.’" 
Genesis24:40 Kake aatiaaka ninye nanu, ‘Ore Olaitoriani lalo te dukuya ninye naa keirriu olmalaika lenye tenebo iyie neitumunyan enkoitoi ino, nirikoki enkitok olayioni lai too ltung'ana lang le nkaji e papa." 
Genesis24:41 Niking'uaa ina kata olmumai tinilo enetii iltung'ana laainei. Naa tinikimitiki ninche ninye, nimikintoki aibung iyie olmumai lai.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Nalotu duoo nanu e nchorro najo, ‘Oi Olaitoriani Enkai olkitok lai Abraham, tenaa aitumunyana tena kata enkoitoi naim aitorioo," 
Genesis24:43 ing'ura aitashe nanu te mbata enchorro e nkare, inchoo entito nalotu aoku enkare naa tenajoki, “Aatoomono inchooki te moti ino; enkiti are naok." 
Genesis24:44 Naajoki nanu, Tooko naa kaokoki sii intamesin inono,” inchoo metaa ninye enkitok nategeleka Olaitoriani olayioni lo olkitok lai.’" 
Genesis24:45 “Ore sii ake eitu aishu enkiroroto oltau lai, ng'ura, nelotu Rebeka enapita emoti e nkare to loililai, nedoiki enchorro aoku enkare. Najoki ninye, ‘Aatoomono inchooki matooko.’" 
Genesis24:46 Nesioki aitadou emoti enye to loililai lenye nejo; ‘Tooko, naa kaisho sii ninche ntamesin inono.’ Neaku atooko nanu neisho sii nena tamesin enkare." 
Genesis24:47 Naitoki aikilikuan ninye ajoki: ‘Ira entito e ng'ae?’ Nejo, ‘Entito e Betuel olayioni le Nahor otoikio ninye Milka.’ Napik olgisoi enkume enye olkataarri inkaik enyena." 
Genesis24:48 Nairrug elukunya aserem Olaitoriani, naisis Olaitoriani Enkai o lkitok lai Abraham, ilo laatorikoyie te nkoitoi nasipa matoriko entito o lalashe lo lkitok lai arikoki olayioni lenye." 
Genesis24:49 Ore naa taata, tenaa aiyasiasa esupatisho o esipata to lkitok lai entolikioki nanu, naa tinimiasiasa entolikioki nanu peyie atum aibelekenyakinoyu enkaina e tatene arashu kedienye.”" 
Genesis24:50 Newal Laban o Betuel aajo, “Ore ena bae naa Olaitoriani eing'uaa. Mikindiim aatiaaki iyie entorrono anaa esidai." 
Genesis24:51 Ing'ura neina Rebeka natii dukuya iyie, toriko ninye shomo metaa ninye enkitok olayioni lo lkitok lino anaa enairoro Olaitoriani.”" 
Genesis24:52 Ore peyie ening olaisiaayiani le Abraham irorei lenye neirrugo abaiki enkop te dukuya Olaitoriani. 
Genesis24:53 Neyau ilo aisiaayiani intokitin naagol enkinyiang'a o enkosholai o sahabu o nkilani neisho ninche Rebeka. Eishoo sii ninye olalashe lenye tenebo ng'otonye intokitin naagol enkinyang'a. 
Genesis24:54 Ore ninye o lelo tung'ana apa ootii tenebo ninye, nedaa neokisho, neirrag ine. Ore pee einyototo ninche tadekenya, nejo ninye, “Entushukoki enetii olkitok lai.”" 
Genesis24:55 Nejo olalashe tenebo ng'otonye, “Enchoo entito eng'as aton tenebo iyiook inkuti olong'i, anaa napaji inkolong'i tomon, ore peyie eishunye neidim ashomo.”" 
Genesis24:56 Kake etiaka ninye ninche, “Mikintokiki ailitilit, anaa enaidipa Olaitoriani aitumunyana enkoitoi ai, enchooki mashomo enetii olkitok lai.”" 
Genesis24:57 Nejo ninche; “Aikimpot entito aaikilikuan enajo.” 
Genesis24:58 Neipot ninche Rebeka, nejoki ninye, “Amaa airiamariyie ele tung'ani?” Newal ajo, “Ekalo.”" 
Genesis24:59 Neaku eishoo ninche Rebeka enkanashe enye meshomo tenebo enkaisiaayiani enye, o sinka le Abraham tenebo iltung'ana lenyena." 
Genesis24:60 Nemayian ninche Rebeka ejoki: “Enkanashe ang taa iyie ng'otonye oo nkalifuni, oo nkalifuni tomon, naa inchoo metujung'o eishoi ino kishomi elelo ooiba ninche.”" 
Genesis24:61 Nedumunye Rebeka tenebo inkaisiaayiak enyena, neked ntamesin neirukurukore ilo tung'ani, neaku etoriko ilo aisiayani Rabeka, nelo enkop enye." 
Genesis24:62 Eewuo apa Isaak ina kata eing'uaa Beer-lahai-roi nelotu abik te Negeb. 
Genesis24:63 Nepuku Isaak alo ong'ata adamisho teipa, neraposhu inkonyek enyena, ngura nedol intamesin naapuonu." 
Genesis24:64 Neraposhu Rebeka inkonyek enyena nedol Isaak, ore peyie edol ninye nedou te ntames," 
Genesis24:65 nejoki ilo aisiaayiani, “Kalo tung'ani lido olotu ti ong'ota anang'are iyiook?” Nejoki ilo aisiaayiani, “Olkitok lai.” Neitayu enkarasha aitoip kewan." 
Genesis24:66 Neinosaki ilo aisiaayiani Isaak imbaa pooki naataasate. 
Genesis24:67 Nerik Isaak ninye atua olng'obor. Neya Rebeka neaku ninye enkitok enye, nenyorru ninye. Neaku eitagoloki apa Isaak te nkeeya e ng'otonye." 
Genesis25:1 Neyam Abraham ae kitok naji enkarna enye Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Neiki ninye Simran, o Yokshan, o Medan, o Midian, o Ishbak, o Shua," 
Genesis25:3 ore apa Tokshan naa ninye menye le Sheba, o Dedon. Ore ilayiok le Dedan, naa Asshurim, o Letushim, o Leumim." 
Genesis25:4 Ore ilayiok le Midian naa Epa, o Eper, o Hanok o Abida, o Eldaa. Ore apa kulo naa nkera e ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Neisho Abraham pooki toki naata Isaak. 
Genesis25:6 Kake eishoo Abraham ilayiok loo nkapiak enyena inkishorot, ore eton eishu, neidurrie ninche aitung'uaa olayioni lenye Isaak meshomo enkop oloosaen." 
Genesis25:7 Kuna inkolong'i oo larin le nkishui e Abraham, ilarin iip o ntomoni naapishana o imiet," 
Genesis25:8 neye Abraham etaa olpayian kitok etamorua amitunye, nepiki ninye eneiturrurrorre olorere lenye." 
Genesis25:9 Nenukaa ninye ilayiok lenyena Isaak o Ishmael te nkapune e Makpela te nkurma e Efron olayioni le Soha loo Lhiti. 
Genesis25:10 To loo saen le Mamre, te nkurma nainyiang'ua apa Abraham too Lhiti. Metaa te ine apa etunukayioki Abraham tenebo enkitok enye Sara." 
Genesis25:11 Ore peyie eidip Abraham atua, etamayiana Enkai Isaak olayioni lenye. Nebik Isaak te Beelarahoi." 
Genesis25:12 Kulo ninche ile ishoi e Ishmael olayioni le Abraham otoikio ninye Hagar e Misiri naa enkaisiaayiani apa e Sara. 
Genesis25:13 Kuna ninche nkarn oo layiok le Ishmael anaa enaikunakino te inoto enye: Nebaiot aa ninye olkikau le Ishmael o Kedar, o Adbeel, o Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 Mishma, o Duma, o Masa," 
Genesis25:15 o Hadad, o Tema, o Yetur, o Napish, o Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Ishmael naa kuna inkarn enye, too nkangitie enye o too lngoborri lenye. Ilkituaak tomon o are anaa iloshon lenye." 
Genesis25:17 (Kulo ninche ilarin le nkishui e Ishmael ilarin iip o tomoni uni o naapishana, neitianya aye, neiturrurrokino ninye olorere lenye.)" 
Genesis25:18 Nemany ebaiki Hafila o meshomo Shur, natii enkalo o loosaen le Misiri te nkalo e Asiria. Etamanya apa ninye enetalakinore olikae orere pooki lenye." 
Genesis25:19 Kulo ninche ile ishoi e Isaak olayioni le Abraham: ore apa Abraham naa ninye menye le Isaak. 
Genesis25:20 Ore apa Isaak naa oloo larin artam peyie eyam enkitok enye Rebeka, ina tito e Betuel le Aramean te Padan-aram, ina anashe e Laban le Aramean." 
Genesis25:21 Neomon Isaak Olaitoriani tenkaraki enkitok enye, amu koolupi apa ninye, newal Enkai enkomono enye, neiroshiu Rebeka enkitok enye." 
Genesis25:22 Nepupung'a nkera tiatua enkoshoke enye, nejo ninye, “Amaa tenaa inji etiu, ainyoo doi peyie aishu? Nelo ninye aikilikuan Olaitoriani ina bae.”" 
Genesis25:23 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Etii iloshon aare atua enkoshoke ino, naa ore lelo tung'ana pookira liiu, naa ekeori; ekegolu obo aalang olikae, ore olbotor naa keisiaai oloti.”" 
Genesis25:24 Ore peyie ebau inkolong'i enyena peyie ejing aji, ng'ura! Eeta ilmao te nkoshoke enye." 
Genesis25:25 Ore olotang'asunye naa kenyokie, naa keju osesen lenye pooki anaa ilpapit le nkila, neipot ninye aajo enkarna Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Neitoki olalashe lenye asuju, ore enkaina enye eibung'ita entutunyo e Esau, neipot ninye aajo Yakobo ore apa Isaak naa oloo larin ntomoni ile peyie eiki Rebeka ninye lelo mao." 
Genesis25:27 Ore peyie ebulu lelo ayiok, neaku Esau olang'oroni padan naa oltung'ani sii liong'ota. Ore Yakobo, naa oltung'ani obor ogira aton too lng'oborri." 
Genesis25:28 Kenyor apa Isaak Esau tenkaraki nkiri oo ng'uesi naayaki ninye. Ore Rebeka nenyor Yakobo. 
Genesis25:29 Ore nabo olong egira Yakobo ayier imotori oo nkaitubulu enkurma enye, nebau Esau eing'uaa ong'ota neeta esumash oleng." 
Genesis25:30 Nejoki Esau Yakobo; “Etaa kaye te sumash, inchooki mainosa ina toki nayiera natii emoti. Ore enkaraki ina, neji enkarna enye Edom.”" 
Genesis25:31 Newaliki Yakobo ninye ajoki “Tang'asa timirakaki esipata e kikauisho ino.” 
Genesis25:32 Nejo Esau, “Etaa kaye, kenenyoo tipat naata esipata e kikausho te nanu?”" 
Genesis25:33 Nejoki Yakobo, “Tang'asa inosakaki olmumai.” Neinos ninye olmumai, nemiraki ninye Yakobo esipata enye e kikausho." 
Genesis25:34 Neaku neisho Yakobo Esau emukate tenebo nena motori, nenya neok sii, neinyototo alo. Neaku etemenayie Esau esipata enye e kikausho." 
Genesis26:1 Enyaaka olameyu ajing enkop leme olapa ameyu le nkata e Abraham. Nelo Isaak Gera enetii Abimelek olaiguanani loo Lfilisti. 
Genesis26:2 Neipang'aki Olaitoriani ninye ejoki, “Midoyio alo Misiri, totona tamanya enkop naaliki." 
Genesis26:3 Indurrudurra tena kop, naa kaaku nanu tenebo iyie, naa kaamayian, amu iyie tenebo iishoritin inono aisho kuna kuapi pooki, naitabaya olmumai lainosie papaai lino Abraham." 
Genesis26:4 Kaponaa eishoi ino metotiwuo anaa ilakir le nkeper, naisho eishoi ino ena kop pooki naa te ishoi ino emayian iloshon le nkop pooki ate." 
Genesis26:5 Ore amu etoning'o Abraham oltoilo lai, neibung enkikoo ai, o nkitanapat aainei pooki.”" 
Genesis26:6 Neaku etamanya apa Isaak Gera. 
Genesis26:7 Ore peyie eikilikuan ilewa leine imbaa naipirta enkitok enye, etejo ninye “Enkanashe ai ninye.” Amu eturia ninye ejo, “Enkitok ai” edamu ajo, “keidim ilewa leine ataar ninye metua tenkaraki Rebeka,” amu aisidai ninye oleng te nidol." 
Genesis26:8 Ore peyie ebik ninye teine enkata naado eturumishe te lusie Abimelek olaiguanani loo Lfilisti, nedol Isaak eirrapirap Rebeka enkitok enye." 
Genesis26:9 Metaa eipoto Abimelek Isaak nejoki, “Nyorriki ime enkitok ino, kaji inkuna peyie itejo ‘Enkanashe ai ninye’?” Nejoki Isaak ninye, “Amu atadamua ajo, ‘peyie maye tenkaraki ninye,’ ”" 
Genesis26:10 Nejo Abimelek, “Ainyoo ena nintaasa iyiook? Eidim obo loo ltung'ana ashomo enetii enkitok ino, nipik iyiook entaboi te sunkureisho.”" 
Genesis26:11 Metaa eikoo Abimelek iltung'ana pooki ejoki, “Ore pooki ng'ae oiseyie ele tung'ani anaa enkitok enye naa keari metua.”" 
Genesis26:12 Neunisho Isaak teina kop ilo ari, netum enkisampuare iip nabore. Nemayian Olaitoriani ninye." 
Genesis26:13 Neaku apa ilo tung'ani karsis neponari imasaa oleng oleng, ometaa tetia." 
Genesis26:14 Eeta apa ntare kumok o luaat oo nkishu, olmarei sapuk ometaa etoduakita Ilfilisti olom." 
Genesis26:15 Nenuk Ilfilisti nchorroi pooki te nterit apa naatuturo ilaisiaayiak le menye aa Abraham. 
Genesis26:16 Nejoki Abimelek Isaak, “Shomo tung'uai iyiook, amu ira magilani aleng iyiook.”" 
Genesis26:17 Neaku eidurra apa Isaak teine, nelo apik olng'obor lenye o erata le Gera nebik teine." 
Genesis26:18 Neitoki Isaak atur nena shorroi oonkariak naatuturoki apa too nkolong'i e Papaai lenye, Abraham, amu etapalaitie Ilfilisti ninche peyie eye Abraham. Neisho sii inkarn apa naishoo menye." 
Genesis26:19 Kake ore peyie eidip ilaisiaayiak le Isaak aatuturisho te yarrata netum teine enchorro e nkare naijirrijirru," 
Genesis26:20 neishankarrarre ilchekuti le Gera ilchekuti le Isaak ejoki, “Enaang ena are.” Neaku eipoto ina shorro enkare ajo Esek, amu eishankarrarre ninche ninye." 
Genesis26:21 Neitoki ninche aatur ae shorro, neitoki ake aishankarrarre ninye teina aaigil neaku eipoto enkarna enye ajo Sitina." 
Genesis26:22 Neidur teine atur ae shorro, neitu ejing enchankar ina, neaku eipoto enkarna eina Rehobot ejo, “Ore tena kata eitaikia iyiook Olaitoriani ewueji nelala, naa aikibul te nkop.”" 
Genesis26:23 Nepuku teine ailep alo Beer-sheba. 
Genesis26:24 Neipang'aki Olaitoriani ninye ina kewarie nejoki, “Ara nanu Enkai e Abraham papaai lino, miureishoyu amu atii tenebo iyie, naa kaamayian iyie naitubul eishoi ino tenkaraki osinka lai Abraham.”" 
Genesis26:25 Neaku etesheta olperere lo lasar teine neipot enkarna Olaitoriani, neun olng'obor lenye teine, Netur ilaisiaayiak le Isaak enchorro enkare teine." 
Genesis26:26 Neitoki adumunye Abimelek alo enetii ninye eing'uaa Gera tenebo Ahusa olautaroni lenye tenebo Fikol olkitok lenye le njore," 
Genesis26:27 nejoki Isaak ninche, “Ainyoo peyie ietuo enatii nadolita ajo aikimbaba intae nanu, nikitaaraitie aitung'uaa ate?”" 
Genesis26:28 Nejo ninche, “Kidolita metii olng'ash aajo etii Olaitoriani tenebo iyie metaa kitejo, inchoo maitayu olmumai terishata ino o iyiook naa maitayu sii olning'o o iyie," 
Genesis26:29 inchere mintaas iyiook intorrok anaa eneitu kiseyie iyie neitu kintaas iyie entorroni meteleku eseriani ake nikincho iyie shomo te seriani. Ira taata iyie olomayiana lo Laitoriani.” 
Genesis26:30 Metaa eitobiraka ninye ninche osirua, nedaa neokisho." 
Genesis26:31 Ore peyie ekenyu, enyeito ninche enasirie aainos pooki olmumai, neisho Isaak ninche meshomo, nepuo aaing'uaa ninye to sotua." 
Genesis26:32 Ore ake teina olong eetuo ilaisiaayiak le Isaak aaliki ninye enchorro e nkare natuturo ejoki ninye," 
Genesis26:33 “Kinotito enkare.” Neisho enkarna ine aajo shiba, metaa ore enkarna eina anasa naa keji Beer-sheba o metabaiki ena olong." 
Genesis26:34 Ore peyie eaku Esau oloo larin artam, eyama Yudit entito e Beeri loo Lhiti tenebo Basemat entito e Elon oo Lhiti." 
Genesis26:35 Nepik emion enkishui e Isaak o Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Ore apa peyie eaku Isaak moruo oleng metaa eiliilaitie inkonyek metaa meekure edolisho neipotu Esau olkikau lenye, nejoki ninye, “Enkerai ai” neng'amaa menye ajoki, “Nele nanu.”" 
Genesis27:2 Nejoki ninye ing'ura, atamorua nemayiolo enkolong naye." 
Genesis27:3 Tudumu imasaa inono, emootian ino tenebo enkawuo ino, nilo ong'ota pee kilo ang'oroki eng'ues." 
Genesis27:4 Nikintobiraki endaa namelok, anaa enoshi nanyor, nikiyaki mainosa peyie aatum atamayiana eton eitu aye." 
Genesis27:5 Ore apa Rebeka, einining'ito Isaak olayioni lenye Esau. Metaa ore peyie edumunye Esau alo ong'ata ang'or eng'ues, nayau" 
Genesis27:6 nejoki Rebeka olayioni lenye Yakobo “Atoning'o papaai lino eirorie olalashe lino Esau ejoki," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Iyakaki eng'ues nikilotu aitobiraki endaa sidai. Natum ainosa naamayian iyie te dukuya Olaitoriani eton eitu aye.’ 
Genesis27:8 Ore naa tena kata olayioni lai, toning'o ororei lai anaa enaaitanap ajoki." 
Genesis27:9 Shomo intare, niking'uraki ilbalelon aare sidain, peyie aitobirie endaa namelok sidai naaijo enoshi nanyor papaai lino." 
Genesis27:10 Niyaki ninye papaai lino meinosa peyie kitum atamayiana eton eitu eye.” 
Genesis27:11 Kake etiaka Yakobo Rebeka ng'otonye, “Ng'ura ajo ore Esau olalashe lai naa oltung'ani oju, nara nanu oltung'ani osipa." 
Genesis27:12 Eidimayu naairrapirrap papa nanu, natiu nanu anaa oltung'ani olej ninye, nayaki kewan oldeket ajo emayianata aing'oru.”" 
Genesis27:13 Nejoki ng'otonye ninye, “Inchoo oldeket lino elotu shumata nanu enkerai ai, toning'o ake iyie ororei lai nikilo aing'uraki ilbalelon.”" 
Genesis27:14 Metaa eshomo ayau ninche ayaki ng'otonye, neitobir ng'otonye endaa sidai namelok naaijo enoshi nanyor." 
Genesis27:15 Neishopoki Rebeka inkilani sidan e Esau olkikau lenye, naata tiaji, olayioni lenye oti Yakobo, neripaki indapan oo lbalelon inkaik enyena tenebo emurt enye nasipa. Neisho ninye endaa sidai namelok tenebo emukate naitobira olayioni lenye Yakobo." 
Genesis27:16 Ore nena dapan oo lbalelon nepik inkaik enyena o ine wueji nesipa te murt enye; 
Genesis27:17 neisho ninye endaa sidai namelok tenebo emukate naitobiraka epik inkaik o layioni lenye Yakobo. 
Genesis27:18 Metaa eshomo ninye ajingaki menye nejoki, “Papa”. Neng'amaa ajoki, “Nele nanu, ira ng'ae enkerai ai?”" 
Genesis27:19 Nejoki Yakobo menye, “Nanu doi Esau olkikau lino. Aidipa ataasa anaa enikitiaka. Inyo totona inosa inkiri oo ng'uesi aainei peyie kitum atamayiana.”" 
Genesis27:20 Kake etiaka Isaak olayioni lenye, “Kaji doi inkuna peyie itasioko taata atum olayioni lai?” Newal ajoki, “Amu aaishoo Olaitoriani Enkai ina dupoto.”" 
Genesis27:21 Ina pee ejoki Isaak Yakobo, “Wou tinyiku, peyie atum airrapirrapa ajur enkerai ai, matayiolo katukul metii olng'ash ajo ira olayioni lai Esau anaa aimira.”" 
Genesis27:22 Neaku neigutaki Yakobo Isaak papaai lenye. Neirrapirrap ninye nejo, “Ore oltoilo naa oltoilo le Yakobo, kake ore inkaik naa ine Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Neitu eyiolou ninye amu ore inkaik enyena naa keju anaa ino lalashe lenye Esau, neaku etamayiana ninye." 
Genesis27:24 Nejo ninye, “Aira hoo doi olayioni lai Esau?” Newal ajo, “Ekara.”" 
Genesis27:25 Ina peyie ejo, “Iyakaki nanu peyie atum ainosa inkiri oo ng'uesi o layioni lai naatum atamayiana.” Neaku eyaua ninye ayaki ninye, nenya ninye; neyaki ninye enaisho oo sabibu neok ninye." 
Genesis27:26 Ina peyie ejoki Isaak olayioni lenye, “wou tinyikakaki tung'ututaki olayioni lai.”" 
Genesis27:27 Metaa etinyikua ninye neng'utut ninye neing'uaya olng'usil too nkilani enyena, nemayian ninye ejo, “Ing'ura olng'usil lo layioni lai otiu anaa olng'usil liong'ata otamayiana Olaitoriani." 
Genesis27:28 Mikinchoo Enkai enkolielio e keper, tenebo empiron e nkop, tenebo enkisampuare sapuk o enaisho oo sabibu." 
Genesis27:29 Inchoo kisiaai iyie iloreren, nikigilaki kung iyie iloshon. Taa olkitok too lalashera linono, naa inchoo ilayiok le ng'utunyi kirrugokino iyie. Metedeki pooki ng'ae likidek, nemayiani pooki ng'ae likimayian iyie!”" 
Genesis27:30 Ore ake enaidipie Isaak atamayiana Yakobo, ore ake enaipangie Yakobo aing'uaa ine netii Isaak Papaai lenye, nejingu olalashe lenye Esau eing'uaa engorore." 
Genesis27:31 Neitobir sii ninye endaa sidai namelok, neyau ayaki papaai lenye. Nejoki menye “Inchoo papa lai edumunye aton ainos inkiri e ng'ues pee kitum atamayiana.”" 
Genesis27:32 Neng'amaa papaai lenye Isaak ajoki ninye, “Ira doi ng'ae?” Newal ajoki, “Nanu doi olayioni lino, olkikau lino Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Netum Isaak olokirikiri sapuk le ng'oro nejo ninye; “Aing'ae doi naaji otang'oro eng'ues naayaki nanu, nainosa pooki eton eitu ibau, naidipa atamayiana ninye? Nesipa Ee, naa kemayiana ninye.”" 
Genesis27:34 Ore peyie ening Esau irorei le papaai lenye neishir abuaku to ltoilo sapuk o te mion, nejoki papaai lenye, “Oi tamayianaki sii nanu, nchooki sii nanu emayianata ino, papaai lai!”" 
Genesis27:35 Kake etiaka, “Eewuo olalashe lino to losek, neewa emayianata ino.”" 
Genesis27:36 Nejo Esau, “Aime keji doi te sipata etejoki enkarna enye Yakobo? Naaeseka ninye nanu kuna katitin are. Ewa apa ninye esipata ai e kikausho, naa ng'ura ake ajo enyaaka tena kata aya emayianata ai.” Ina peyie ejoki “Keitu hoo ninye kilekaki nanu emayianata?”" 
Genesis27:37 Newaliki Isaak Esau ejo, “Ing'ura ajo aitaa ninye olkitok lino, naa ore ilalashera lenyena, aishoo ninye meitaa isinkan, naa too lpaek tenebo enaisho oo sabibu aitotio ninye. Kaa naa taata aaitaas enkerai ai?”" 
Genesis27:38 Nejoki Esau papaai lenye, “Ke mayianata nabo duoo ake iata papaai lai? Oi tamayianaki sii nanu, nchooki sii nanu emayianata ino, papaai lai!” Neilepie Esau oltoilo lenye neishir." 
Genesis27:39 Newaliki Isaak papaai lenye ajoki, “ng'ura, iyaku ololamita empiron enkop te manyisho ino, niaku sii ololamita enkoliolio e keper e shumata." 
Genesis27:40 Keaku olalem lino ninye inchuyie, niaku oloisiaai olalashe lino, naa tinigelunye te nkitoria enye, nigil enchata oo lmong'i natii emurt ino.”" 
Genesis27:41 Ore ina kata, neibayu Esau Yakobo enkaraki emayianata natamayiana papaai lenye ninye. Nejo Esau to ltau lenye. “Etabautua inkolong'i naishiraki papaai, ore peyie eishunye natum ataara metua olalashe lai Yakobo.”" 
Genesis27:42 Kake ore irorei le Esau ilo ayioni lenye botor etolikioki Rebeka; metaa eirriwayie Rebeka lkiliku meipoti ilo ayioni lenye oti, Yakobo nejoki ninye, “Ingura, ore olalashe lino Esau, eitagolito kewan oshoke pee kitum atara tua." 
Genesis27:43 Metaa ore tena kata enkerai ai toning'o oltoilo lai tudumunye isikaki enetii Laban olalashe lai otii Haran," 
Genesis27:44 niton tenebo ninye te nkiti rishata, ometaba anaa neyagaa engoro napi olalashe lino;" 
Genesis27:45 o metaba anaa nerrinyo engoro olalashe lino. Nerikino enintaasa ninye, naa kairriu olkilikuai mikitorikuni te ine. Ainyoo peyie aiturraa intae pookira te keeya te nkolong nabo?”" 
Genesis27:46 Ina peyie ejoki Rebeka Isaak, “Enaure enkishui ai tenkaraki kuna kituaak oo Lhiti. Teneyam sii ninye Yakobo nabo o nkituaak oo Lhiti naaijo kuna, nabo oo nkituaak ena kop, kainyoo tipat enkishui te nanu?”" 
Genesis28:1 Neitoki Isaak aipot Yakobo, nemayian ninye, neitanap ejoki, “Mayieu niyam hoo nabo oo nkituaak oo Lkanaan." 
Genesis28:2 Inyo tudumunye shomo Padan-aram enkaji e Betuel laa ninye otoiwuo yeyioo lino, niyau aitaa enkitok teine entito nabo e Laban olalashe yieyioo lino." 
Genesis28:3 Mikitamayiana Enkai Magilani, nikintubul aponaa, metaa iaku olorere kumok too ltung'ana." 
Genesis28:4 Mikinchoo ninye iyie emayianata e Abraham o tenebo eishoi ino, niaku oloya enkop nitaa iyie omoni naishoo Enkai Abraham!”" 
Genesis28:5 Neisho Isaak Yakobo meshomo. Nelo Padan-aram enetii Laban olayioni le Betuel le Aram, naa olalashe le Rebeka ng'otonye Yakobo o tenebo Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Etodua apa Esau ajo etamayiana Isaak Yakobo neisho ninye meshomo Padan-aram meing'oru enkitok teine netamayiana sii neitanap ejoki, “Mayieu niyam enkitok hoo nabo oo Lkanaan,”" 
Genesis28:7 netoning'o Yakobo menye o yieyio lenye nelo Padan-aram. 
Genesis28:8 Metaa ore peyie edol Esau ajo eitu eitiship nena kituaak oo Lkanaan papaai lenye Isaak; 
Genesis28:9 nelo Esau enetii Ishmael, neyam aitaa enkitok, aponaa te nena kituaak naata, Mahalat entito e Ishmael, olayioni le Abraham; enkanashe e Naboiot." 
Genesis28:10 Neing'uaa Yakobo Beer-sheba alo enkalo e Haran. 
Genesis28:11 Nelotu ewueji neje neirrag ine ina kewarie, amu etadoyie enkolong nedumu osoit obo teine airishunye elukunya enye neirrag teine airura." 
Genesis28:12 Ore eirura, netum enkidetidet naitodolu olkedet ororita enkop ore enchumata enye nebaiki keper, naa ng'ura! Ilmalaika le Nkai oodou neilep te ilo kedet!" 
Genesis28:13 Naa ng'ura eitashe Olaitoriani te nchumata ninye, nejo ninye, “Ara nanu Olaitoriani, Enkai e Abraham papaai lino, nara sii Enkai e Isaak, naa ore ena kop naa ninye irragie, ekaaisho nanu iyie tenebo o eishoi ino." 
Genesis28:14 Naa kebayu eishoi ino anaa enterit enkop naa aiponari aibulaa aidapashakino enkop te nkalo o loontoluo, o tenkalo o loosaen, o te nkalo e moikuape o te nkalo e kopikop; naa te iyie tenebo eishoi ino emayian iloshon le nkop pooki ate." 
Genesis28:15 Ing'ura atii nanu te nebo iyie naa kaarrip iyie te pooki wueji naba anaa enilo, naaitoki arrinyu ena kop, amu maaing'uaa nanu iyie o metaba anaa naas ina naatolikio.”" 
Genesis28:16 Neinyototo Yakobo too njo enyena nejo, “Esipa etii Olaitoriani ene wueji, neitu duoo ayiolou.”" 
Genesis28:17 Neureishoyu oleng nejo, “Kebaa eitureisho ene wueji! Meeta duoo inchere paa dikae ene wueji neme enkaji e Nkai, naa enkishomi (enkiimata najing'ieki) keper, ena.”" 
Genesis28:18 Neaku einyo Yakobo tadekenya enasirie, neya oladuo soit oirishunye elukunya enye neitasheyie aitaa eng'ape nebukoki eilata shumata ninye." 
Genesis28:19 Neipot enkarna eine wueji ajo Betel, kake keji apa enkarna e ina anasa Lus te dukuya." 
Genesis28:20 Neinos Yakobo olmumai ejo, “Tenaa keaku Enkai tenebo nanu, naarrip nanu tena lototo, naaisho sii endaa nanya o nkilani naishop" 
Genesis28:21 metaa anyaaka arrinyunye enkaji e papa lai te seriani, naa keaku Olaitoriani Enkai ai." 
Genesis28:22 Ore ele soit laitasheyie aitaa eng'ape, naa keaku enkaji Enkai, ore pooki nikincho nanu naa kaaisho iyie ematua e tomon.”" 
Genesis29:1 Nedumunye Yakobo aibung enkoitoi alo, nebau enkop oo ltung'ana oomanya oloosaen." 
Genesis29:2 Ore eing'orisho, etoduaa enchorro ti ong'ata, ore ake sii, etodua iluaat uni oo nkishu o nkerrai eirrag te mbata eina shorro amu teina shorro eokokinyieki enkare naok. Netii osoit sapuk enkutuk enchorro." 
Genesis29:3 Naa tenereuni nkerrai pooki meirraga teine, neibeleleng'oo ilchekuti ilo soit te nkutuk enchorro peyie etum aishoo ntare enye enkare. Ore ake peyie eidip aaitooko pooki, neitoki aapising enchoro teilo soit aapik enkutuk enchorro." 
Genesis29:4 Nejoki Yakobo ninche, “Ilalashera laainei, kaji doi ing'uaa?” Nejo ninche, “King'uaa Haran.”" 
Genesis29:5 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Amaa iyiololo Laban olayioni le Nahor?” Nejo ninche, “Aikiyiolo ninye.”" 
Genesis29:6 Nejoki Yakobo ninche “Aisupat ninye?” Neng'amaa aajo, “Ee aisupat, naa ore entito enye Raheli elotu ereuta ntare!” Nejo Yakobo," 
Genesis29:7 “Ing'ura, eton aa enaipirie enkolong, eton menkata naiturrurri nkerrai aaokoki enkare peyie etum aashom aatadaata.”" 
Genesis29:8 Kake etejo, “Mikintook omeiturrurroto nkerrai pooki tenebo, nikimbeleleng'oo osoit te nkutuk e nchorro nikitum aaitooko inkerrai.”" 
Genesis29:9 Ore eton eirorie ninche, nebau Raheli ereuta ntare e papaai lenye aa ninye nairritita." 
Genesis29:10 Ore peyie edol Yakobo Raheli entito e Laban olalashe ng'otonye tenebo nkerrai e Laban olalashe ng'otonye nelo Yakobo aibeleleng'oo osoit te nkutuk enchorro, neitook inkerrai e Laban, olalashe ng'otonye." 
Genesis29:11 Neng'utut Yakobo Raheli eishir abuaku te nchipai. 
Genesis29:12 Neliki Yakobo Raheli ajoki ole sotua, naa olayioni le Rebeka. Neipirri Raheli ang alo aliki menye." 
Genesis29:13 Ore peyie ening Laban ilomon le Yakobo olayioni le nkanashe, neipirri alo anang'are ninye, neitamuat ninye inkaik neng'utut neriku ninye enkaji enye. Neliki Yakobo Laban kuna baa pooki," 
Genesis29:14 neaku etiaka Laban ninye, “Esipa tukul ajo ira oloito lai nira sii osesen lai!” Neton aboitare ninye olapa." 
Genesis29:15 Neitoki Laban ajoki Yakobo, “Ore amu ira ole sotua, aikisiaai iyie nanu pesho? Tolikioki ajo ainyoo elaata niyieu naalaaki?”" 
Genesis29:16 Eeta apa Laban ntoyie are, neji entito botor Lea neji entito kiti Raheli." 
Genesis29:17 Aitorrok apa nkonyek e Lea ore Raheli naa aisidai neikishiaan. 
Genesis29:18 Nenyorru Yakobo Raheli, o metejo “Ekaaisiaai iyie ilarin oopishana tenkaraki Raheli ina tito ino kiti.”" 
Genesis29:19 Nejo Laban, “Enaikash te naaisho iyie alang te naisho ninye likae lee; totona tenebo nanu.”" 
Genesis29:20 Neaku eisiaayia apa Yakobo ninye ilarin oopishana tenkaraki Raheli, netiu lelo arin anaa inkolong'i kuti tenkaraki enyorrata sapuk naata te ninye." 
Genesis29:21 Neitoki Yakobo ajoki Laban, “Inchooki nanu enkitok ai peyie alo ayiolou ninye, amu aitabayie enkata ai.”" 
Genesis29:22 Neiturrurru Laban iltung'ana pooki leine, neitayu osirua" 
Genesis29:23 kake ore teipa ewa entito enye Leah ayaki ninye Yakobo; neboitare Yakobo ninye ina kewarie. 
Genesis29:24 (Eishooyie Laban enkaisiaayiani enye Silpa, aisho Lea entito enye metaa enkaisiaayiani enye.)" 
Genesis29:25 Ore peyie ekenyu, ng'ura, Leah ngole eishooki Yakobo, Nejoki Yakobo Laban, “Ainyoo ena nikintaasa nanu? Aime enaji Raheli doi apa aaisiayie? Ainyoo naa peyie kiteleja iyie nanu?”" 
Genesis29:26 Neng'amaa Laban ejo, “Measi oshi neijia te nkop ang, aaishooyo entito kiti eton eitu eishoori enkikau." 
Genesis29:27 Iishu e wiki ena, naa aikintoki aaisho iyie enkae tinikisiaai kulikae arin oopishana.”" 
Genesis29:28 Neas Jakobo ina, neishu ewiki enye; neaku neishoo Laban ninye Raheli ina tito enye meitaa enkitok." 
Genesis29:29 (Eishooyie Laban enkaisiaayiani enye Bilha, aisho Raheli entito enye metaa enkaisiaayiani enye.)" 
Genesis29:30 Neaku enyaaka sii Yakobo alo ayiolou Raheli nenyorru Raheli oleng aitalang enanyor Lea neisiaai Laban kulikae arin oopishana. 
Genesis29:31 Ore peyie edol Olaitoriani ajo keibai Lea, nebol eng'uset enye, kake ore apa Raheli naa koolupi." 
Genesis29:32 Nenutayu Lea neiu enkayioni neipot ninye enkarna ajo Ruben, amu etejo, “Enkaraki natoduaa Olaitoriani enkisilisiloto ai, nesipa taata ajo ekaanyoru olpayian lai.”" 
Genesis29:33 Neitoki ake anutayu, neiu enkayioni, nejo, “Enkaraki natoningo Olaitoriani ajo kaaibai naaisho ena ayioni aigil.” Neipot enkarna enye ajo Simon." 
Genesis29:34 Neitoki ake anutayu neiu enkayioni nejo, “Ore taata naa kaibung'are olpayian lai, amu atoikio ninye ilayiok okuni.” Ina peyie eipot enkarna enye ajo Lawi." 
Genesis29:35 Neitoki anutayu neiu enkayioni nejo “Ore taata naa kaisis Olaitoriani,” metaa eipoto ninye enkarna ajo Yuda, ina pee edung eishoi." 
Genesis30:1 Ore peyie edol Raheli ajo eitu eiki Yakobo inkera, netum olom te nkanashe enye oleng, nejoki ninye Yakobo, “Nchooki nanu nkera ashu aye!”" 
Genesis30:2 Negorokino Yakobo Raheli nejoki ninye, “Katii nanu ewueji Enkai nikitomitikio eishoi enguset ino?”" 
Genesis30:3 Ina peyie ejo Raheli, “Neina enkaisiaayiani ai Bilha; shomo enetii peyie aaiki nanu nkera.”" 
Genesis30:4 Metaa eishoo ninye Yakobo enkaisiaayiani enye Bilha meitaa enkitok. Nelo Yakobo ayiolou ninye. 
Genesis30:5 Neiroshiu Bilhah neiki Yakobo olayioni. 
Genesis30:6 Ina peyie ejo Raheli, “Aatudungoko Enkai enkiguana, netoning'o sii oltoilo lai naaisho nanu enkayioni.” Neaku eipoto enkarna enye ajo Dan." 
Genesis30:7 Neitoki errindik e Raheli anutayu neiki Yakobo olayioni le are. 
Genesis30:8 Ina peyie ejo Raheli, “Te nkesha nagol atigilunore enkanashe ai natimirishe;” neipot enkarna enye ajo Naftali." 
Genesis30:9 Ore peyie edol Lea ajo etudunge meekure eisho, neisho sii ninye enkaisiaayiani enye Silpa Yakobo meitaa enkitok." 
Genesis30:10 Neiki ina rrindik e Lea naji Silpa Yakobo olayioni. 
Genesis30:11 Nejo Lea, “Atumunyana!” Metaa eishoo enkarna enye ajo Gad." 
Genesis30:12 Neigil ake errindik e Lea naji Silpa aiki Yakobo ae ayioni e are. 
Genesis30:13 Ina pee ejo Lea, “Ashipa nanu! Amu kaaipot nanu inkituaak aajo nashipa.” Ina pee eipot enkarna enye ajo Asheri." 
Genesis30:14 Ore too nkolong'i enkisampuare e nkano eshomo Ruben olokeri neinepu nkaitubulu naaji tunkuja tiongota, neyaki ng'otonye Lea. Ina peyie ejoki Raheli Lea “Inchooki aatasayia embata oonkaitubulu e tukuja e nkayioni ino.”" 
Genesis30:15 Kake etiaka Lea ninye, “Ijo doi kembae kiti tinikioru olpayian lai? Iyieu sii nintoki aya tunkuja olayioni lai?” Nejo Raheli, “Inchoo naa meirraga enitii ena kewarie te nkaraki tunkuja olayioni lino.”" 
Genesis30:16 Ore peyie eshukunye Yakobo tiong'ata teipa, eshomo Lea anang'are ninye nejoki ninye, “Meeta inchere peyie mikilotu taata ayiolou, amu ainyiang'ua iyie te tunkuja olayioni lai.” Metaa etaboitare ninye ina kewarie." 
Genesis30:17 Nening Enkai Lea, nenutayu neiki Yakobo olayioni le imiet." 
Genesis30:18 Nejo Lea, “Aishoo Enkai elaakinoto ai amu aishooyie errindik ai aisho olpayian lai;” neipot enkarna ajo Isachar." 
Genesis30:19 Neitoki Lea anutayu, neiki Yakobo enkayioni e ile," 
Genesis30:20 ina peyie ejo Lea, “Aaishoo Olaitoriani enkishoroto sapuk; ekaayanyitu taata olpayian lai, amu atoikio ninye ilayiok ile;” neipot enkarna enye Sebulon." 
Genesis30:21 Neitoki ake te siadi aiu entito neipot enkarna enye ajo Dina. 
Genesis30:22 Neitoki Enkai adamu Raheli, nening Enkai ninye nebol eng'uset." 
Genesis30:23 Nenutayu neiu enkayioni nejo, “Eiwuangie Enkai esulare ai,”" 
Genesis30:24 neipot enkarna enye ajo Yosef ejo, “Maatoponiki Olaitoriani ae ayioni.”" 
Genesis30:25 Ore peyie eiki Raheli Yakobo Yosef, etiaaka ninye Laban, “Inchooki nanu mashomo, pee atum ashomo enkang ai o enkop ai." 
Genesis30:26 Inchooki inkituaak aainei tenebo nkera aainei nena naisiaayua te iyie nikincho mashomo amu iyiolo esiaai naataasaka.” 
Genesis30:27 Kake etiaka Laban ninye, “Tenaa aikincho matejo ena, atayiolo te limunoto olaitumusumusoni inchere aatamayiana Olaitoriani tenkaraki iyie." 
Genesis30:28 Tolimu elaakinoto ino naa kaishoru.” 
Genesis30:29 Nejoki Yakobo ninye, “Iyiolo iyie openy enaikuna tenaaisiaai, niyiolo sii eneikuna inkishu inono peyie eponari te nanu." 
Genesis30:30 Amu aikuti apa imasaa inono enalotunye, netoponari aaku kumok, nikitamayiana iyie Olaitoriani te pooki wueji naibelekenyakine. Paa amaa kanu kenya nanu agolie olmarei lai makewan?”" 
Genesis30:31 Nejo Laban, “Ainyoo iyieu naaisho?” Nejo Yakobo, “Meeta entoki nikinchoo tini kintaas ena, ekaitoki ake aaku oloirrita naramat aing'or intare inono." 
Genesis30:32 “Nchooki matijing'a atua intare inono ena olong aitayu tiatua pooki ker naata oltipoto anaa nairimo o pooki kuo le ker orok, tenebo pooki kine oirimo tiatua inkineji; neaku nena elaakinoto ai." 
Genesis30:33 Metaa esipata ai ninye naawalaki te siadi, tinilotu aing'or elaakinoto ai te iyie. Ore pooki nemeeta oltipoto nemeirrimo sii tiatua inkineji, nerok sii tiatua lkuoo le kerra metaa tenelo netumi te nanu, neikenari aajo kepurruno.”" 
Genesis30:34 Nejo Laban, “Aisidai! Inchoo etiu anaa enitejo.”" 
Genesis30:35 Kake ore ina olong, eitayio Laban iloroi pooki o otipo neirrimo tenebo inkineji pooki netipo neirrimo pooki ake ninye naata eneibor, o pooki sitima lo ker orok, neisho ilayiok lenyena metaramata." 
Genesis30:36 Nelo Laban alamari elakuani oo nkolong'i uni elototo terishata enye o Yakobo; neirrita Yakobo kulie tare pooki e Laban. 
Genesis30:37 Neitayu Yakobo ing'usidin naashal too lkeek oonyaanyukie olporokuai, o seki o siteti nekinyu nkopit e oriong te nena keek metaa kelio ing'udisin eibor." 
Genesis30:38 Nepik nena ngudisin naatikinya te dukuya ntare too mpeuti aa taa, ine neokishoreki, ine nepuonu ntare aaokie enkare. Amu kesesh etonie ilmeregeshi anaa iloroi intare teine." 
Genesis30:39 Neraposhoyu intare te dukuya nena ngudisin metaa etoiwutuo ilbalelon oo rasha, o loo tipo, o loonkererin." 
Genesis30:40 Negelaa Yakobo isitiman, neing'orie inkomomi oo ntare enkalo natii inaarasha tenebo inaarook pooki naatii tiatua intare e Laban; neitalamaa inenyena, neitu eitushulaki ine Laban." 
Genesis30:41 Ore enkata pooki natonie ilmeregeshi anaa iloroi intare biot, neirragie Yakobo ing'udisin too mpeuti te dukuya ninche peyie etum aatotonie intare te nena ng'udisin," 
Genesis30:42 kake ore nena sasin too ntare, eitu eirragie ing'udisin teine; metaa ore nena sasin neaku ine Laban ore inaapir neaku ine Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Metaa etaa Yakobo karsis oleng, netum intare luaat kumok, o nkaisiaayiak o ilaisiaayiak o intamesin o sirkon." 
Genesis31:1 Etoning'o apa Yakobo ilayiok le Laban ejo, “Ewa Yakobo pooki apa naara ine papa lang; ore sii te nena pooki apa naara ine papa lang, nenoto ninye ena arsisisho.”" 
Genesis31:2 Nedol Yakobo ajo meekure enyor Laban ninye anaa apa te dukuya. 
Genesis31:3 Ina peyie ejoki Olaitoriani Yakobo, “Torrinyoyu enkop oo loo papaai lino, tushukokinoyu iltung'ana linono naa kaaku nanu tenebo iyie.”" 
Genesis31:4 Neirriwaa Yakobo olkilikuai aipotu Raheli tenebo Lea meetu ina ong'ata natii ntare enyena," 
Genesis31:5 nejoki ninche, “Adolita taata ajo meekure aanyor papaai linyi anaa apa. Kake etii Enkai e papaai lai tenebo nanu." 
Genesis31:6 Iyiololo aajo aisiaaiyia papaai linyi te ngolon ai pooki; 
Genesis31:7 ore ake eyia, aateleja papaai linyi aibelekeny olekoisiaayio lai katitin tomon, kake eitu eisho Enkai ninye maaitamio." 
Genesis31:8 Ore pee ejo, ‘Ore pooki naatipo naa keaku olekoisiaayio lino,’ ina pee eiu intare pooki inaata iltipot; naa tenejo, ninye, ‘Naata nkererin naaku olekoisiaayio lino,’ neiu intare pooki naata nkererin." 
Genesis31:9 Metaa neijia eikuna Enkai aya inkishu e papaai linyi naaisho ninche nanu. 
Genesis31:10 Ore te nkata nadumu iloroi anaa ilmaregeshi intare, atejo araposhu inkonyek aainei nadol te nkidetidet inchere ore iloroi pooki oo oodumu intare naa iloota nkererin o iltipot nerasha neirrimo." 
Genesis31:11 Ina peyie aajoki olmalaika le Nkai te nkidetidet, ‘Yakobo,’ nang'amaa ajo, ‘Nele nanu!’" 
Genesis31:12 Nejo ninye, ‘Taraposhu inkonyek inono ing'orisho, ore inkineji pooki naaitigiran tiaatua intare naa keeta nkererin, neeta iltipot nerasha; amu atoduaa nena pooki nikintaasa Laban iyie." 
Genesis31:13 Ara nanu Enkai e Betel, ine wueji apa nintisinyie eng'ape abukoki e ilata nikinosaki sii olmumai. Ore tena kata inyo shomo tung'uai ena kop nirrinyo alo enkop apa nikitoinyieki.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Ina pee ewalaki Raheli o Lea aajoki ninye, “Ketii ae rubata arashu enjung'ore natung'ueikiaki iyiook te nkaji e papa lang?" 
Genesis31:15 Amaa taata iyiook emeitaa iyiook ilomon? Amu etimira iyiook, netaasishore impisai naaishoruaki te nkaraki iyiook." 
Genesis31:16 Ore nena masaa pooki naawa Enkai aitung'uaa papaai lang eishoo metaa inkunaang o nkera ang, ore tena kata, ore pooki nikijoki Enkai iyie, taasa.”" 
Genesis31:17 Neinyototo Yakobo neitaked ilayiok lenyena o nkituaak enyena intamesin," 
Genesis31:18 nereu ninye aidurrie inkishu enyena pooki, tenebo imasaa enyena pooki naanoto, inkishu enyena naanoto te Padan-aram, pee epuo enkop e Kanaan enetii papaai lenye Isaak." 
Genesis31:19 Eshomo apa Laban adung ilpapit loo nkerra enyena, ore Raheli nepurroo inkaitin enkaji e papaai lenye." 
Genesis31:20 Neluaya Yakobo eitu eliki Laban le Aram, ajoki ekeisikita alo." 
Genesis31:21 Neisik ninye o nena masaa pooki naata, neinyototo alang olkeju le Frati, neitoriokino oldoinyo le Gilead." 
Genesis31:22 Ore peyie elikini Laban te enkolong e uni inchere eisika Yakobo," 
Genesis31:23 nerik iltung'ana lenyena le sotua, nepuo aasuj ninye inkolong'i naapishana esuj aigutaki ninye oleng toldoinyo le Gilead." 
Genesis31:24 Kake eewuo Enkai enetii Laban le Aram te nkidetidet kewarie nejoki ninye, “Toduaa ake kewan mijoki Yakobo ororei hoo obo sidai arashu oltorrono.”" 
Genesis31:25 Neinepu Laban Yakobo. Ore ina kata eidipa Yakobo atuuno olng'obor lenye te nkop ooldoinyo, ore Laban, o ltungana lenyena le sotua, etuuno ilng'oborri too ldoinyo le Gilead." 
Genesis31:26 Nejoki Laban Yakobo, “Kaa ena nikintaasa peyie kilotu alej aiko nji, niya intoyie aainei anaa iyarunot o lalem?" 
Genesis31:27 Ainyoo peyie isika apurrorri, nikilej nanu, neitu kiliki nanu, metaa anaata aaishoo iyie shomo te nchipai o too sinkolioitin, o te ntampuri o to lwulul loo usin?" 
Genesis31:28 Naa kainyoo peyie eitu kincho matung'ututa ilayiok laainei o ntoyie aainei aisho olesere? Itaasa tukul ene emodai. 
Genesis31:29 Ekaata engolon naitameyie kake aairorie Enkai e papaai lino ena kewarie aajoki, ‘Toduaa kewan ake mijoki Yakobo ororei hoo obo sidai arashu oltorrono.’" 
Genesis31:30 Ore taata ishomo aidur enkaraki niyieu oleng to ltau enkaji e papaai lino, kake ainyoo peyie itupurroyie inkaitin aainei?”" 
Genesis31:31 Newaliki Yakobo Laban ajoki, “Amu atureishe, atadamua ajo aikindim atooru intoyie inono te ngolon." 
Genesis31:32 Ore ake ninye oltung'ani litum eeta inkaitin inono nemeitoki abik eishu. Ore te dukuya iltung'ana lang le sotua imbalunye entoki ino pooki naata pee iya.” Eitu eyiolou Yakobo ajo Raheli ninye natupurroyie nena aitin. 
Genesis31:33 Metaa etijing'a Laban olng'obor le Yakobo, neitoki alo olng'obor le, Lea neitoki oloo nkaisiaayiak enyena pokira, neitu etum ninche katukul. Nepuku aing'uaa olng'obor le Lea, nejing olng'obor le Raheli." 
Genesis31:34 Ore ina kata earr Laban ilng'oborri naa Raheli apa naawa inkaitin enkaji e Papaai lenye nepik abori olorika otonieki te ntames, netonie ninche. Near Laban olng'obor pooki, kake eitu etum ninche." 
Genesis31:35 Nejoki Raheli Papaai, lenye, “Mincho olkitok lai egoro amu maidim aitasho te dukuya iyie, amu kaata empukunoto oo nkituaak.” Metaa etuturuo aing'oru oleng neitu etum inkaitin enkaji enye tukul." 
Genesis31:36 Neaku etagore Yakobo oleng oleng metaa keitarriki Laban; nejoki Yakobo Laban, “Ainyoo doi enkitarruorroto ai? Ainyoo eng'oki ai pee kitusujua te ngoro sapuk?" 
Genesis31:37 Ore hoo nitijing'a aisiamput intokitin aainei, ainyoo inoto tiatua naara imasaa nkaji ino? Iyau irragie tene te dukuya iltung'ana laaine le sotua o te dukuya iltung'ana linono le sotua pee etum aatirrish iyiook pokira." 
Genesis31:38 Kitaboitate tenebo iyie kulo arin tikitam; netiu aikata eibiru isupeni e kerra inono anaa inkineji inono, neitu ainos ilmeregeshi loo ntare inono." 
Genesis31:39 Ore nena naanya ing'uesi etim eitu ayaki, nanu onoto enyamali makewan; anaa aiyieu pooki too nkaik aainei; anaa enapurrorri dama anaa kewarie." 
Genesis31:40 Metaa neijia apa atiu aanya enkolong naa neijia etiu enkewarie, nemeekure apa atumoki aimula nkonyek airurayu." 
Genesis31:41 Ore te kulo arin tikitam natotona te nkaji ino; naataasaka esiaai ilarin tomon oong'uan te nkaraki intoyie inono pokira are, naataasaka esiaai ilarin ile too ntare inono, nimbelekenya olekoisiaayio lai katitin tomon." 
Genesis31:42 Tenaa aime Enkai duoo e papaai lai Enkai e Abraham tenebo olturiaki le Isaak ootii enkalo ai, esipa katukul inchere anaata kinchoo mashomo too nkaik naarook. Etoduaa Enkai osina lai tenebo esiaai oo nkaik aainei, nikisikong ng'ole kewarie.”" 
Genesis31:43 Ina peyie ewalu Laban ajoki Yakobo, “Ore kuna toyie naa inaainei, ore kuna kera naa inaainei, ore kuna tare naa inaainei, naa ore pooki nidolita naa inaainei. Kake kaa naa aitaas kuna toyie aainei ena olong arashu inkera enye naatoiutuo ninche? Wou taata maitayu olning'o terishata ai o iyie;" 
Genesis31:44 ore iyie o nanu; naa inchoo metijing'a shakeni erishata ang.” 
Genesis31:45 Ina peyie eyau Yakobo osoit, neitasheyie aitaa eng'ape." 
Genesis31:46 Nejoki Yakobo iltung'ana lenyena le sotua, “Entasotu isoito,” neyau pooki isoito neitayu osototi; neinos endaa te mbata e ilo sototi loo soito." 
Genesis31:47 Neipot Laban ine ajo Yegarsahaduta: nejo ninye Yakobo ajo Gilead. 
Genesis31:48 Nejo Laban, “Ore ele sototi loo soito naa shakeni terishata ino o nanu tena olong.”" 
Genesis31:49 Metaa eipoto ine ajo Gilead, ore engape nejo Mispa, ketejo, “Inchoo meing'ura Olaitoriani erishata ai o enino, tinikipuo aalama," 
Genesis31:50 Tinintanyamal intoyie aainei, anaa tiniyam kulie kituaak neme intoyie aainei, ore hoo nemetii likae lee ine oyiolo, tadamu, ajo, Enkai ninye shakeni terishata ai o iyie.”" 
Genesis31:51 Ina peyie ejoki Laban Yakobo, “Ing ura ele sototi loo soito tenebo eng'ape naitasheyie ena olong te dukuya iyie o nanu." 
Genesis31:52 Ore ele sototi naa shakeni naa neijia etiu eng'ape, inchere migiru ele sototi loo soito, nimilang'u sii iyie ele sototi loo soito kilang'aki, neijia eitiu eng'ape kilotu aitame nanu." 
Genesis31:53 Ore Enkai e Abraham, oe Nkai e Nahor oe Nkai oo papaai lenye inchoo metirisha iyiook.” Ina peyie einos Yakobo olmumai te uriata e papaai lenye, Isaak." 
Genesis31:54 Neitayu Yakobo olasar to ldoinyo neipoti iltung'ana lenyena le sotua meinosa endaa, nenya endaa netoni enkewarie pooki te ilo doinyo." 
Genesis31:55 Ore tadekenya enasirie, einyo Laban ayooki ang'utut inoo nkakuyiaa enyena tenebo intoyie enyena nemayian ninche; nerrinyo alo enkang enye." 
Genesis32:1 Nedumunye Yakobo alo arrinyo enkop enye, nenang'are ilmalaika le Nkai ninye." 
Genesis32:2 Ore peyie edol Yakobo ninche, etejo, “Enjore e Nkai ena!” Neipot enkarna eine ajo Mahanaim." 
Genesis32:3 Neirriwaa Yakobo ilkiliku meituruko aapuo enetii olalashe lenye Esau te nkop e Seir, natii enkop e Edom," 
Genesis32:4 neitaarriyian ninche ejoki, “Inji intae enchom entiaaki olkitok lai Esau inji ejo olaisiaayiani lino Yakobo, ‘Ataboitare Laban o taata," 
Genesis32:5 naata ilmong'i, o sirkon, o ntare o laisiaayiak lewa, o nkaisiaayiak ng'oruo nairriwua olkilikuai aliki olkitok lai, pee atum anoto omom too nkonyek inono.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Nerrinyunye lelo kiliku enetii Yakobo nejoki, “Kitabaikitia olalashe lino Esau, naa elotu ninye peyie kinang'are iyie nerikito ilewa iip ong'uan.”" 
Genesis32:7 Neureishoyu Yakobo oleng oleng netum enkiputukuny, oleng, Neor lelo tung'ana apa ooboitare, neor inkishu o ntamesin, neitainye pooki ntukusi are edamu ejo," 
Genesis32:8 “Tenelotu Esau aidaikie entukus nabo, neaku ore entukus natelekua neidim aisika.”" 
Genesis32:9 Nejo Yakobo, “Na Ai Enkai e papa lai Abraham naa Enkai e papa lai Isaak, Lo Aitoriani, ilo apa laatiaaka nanu, ‘Torrinyoyu shomo enkop ino enetii olorere lino le sotua, naa kaitaas iyie esidai,’" 
Genesis32:10 maaishaakino nanu katukul ina nyorrata ino nauno, tenebo ina kisiligata nintodua iyie osinka lino, amu te ng'udi ai ake atalang'a ele keju le Yordan; nataa taata iltimito oare." 
Genesis32:11 Tokorduaki nanu, aatoomono iyie, te nkaina olalashe lai, te nkaina e Esau, amu kaure nanu ninye melotu ake aar iyiook pooki matuata, nkera o noo ngotonye." 
Genesis32:12 Kake itejo, ‘Ekaaitaas iyie esidai, naisho eishoi ino metaba anaa osinyai le naiposha, nemeikenayu te nkumoi.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Metaa eirraga ine ina kewarie, neitayu te nena naata ninye enkishooroto naisho olalashe lenye Esau." 
Genesis32:14 Inkineji iip are, o oloroi tikitam, o supeni e kerra iip are tenebo ilmeregeshi tikitam," 
Genesis32:15 Intamesin naalepo tomoni uni o nkurrarrun enye o nkishu artam tenebo iloing'ok tomon, o sirkon lipong'a tikitam, o lamuyeishi tomon." 
Genesis32:16 Neitarasaa kuna too nkaik oo laisiaayiak lenyena, meeta ake ineitu erewi te luaata enye maate, ejoki sinkan lenyena, “Enchom enturuko ninchosho metaa ketii erishata eluaata ake o eluaata.”" 
Genesis32:17 Neitaarriyian olorikito pooki ajoki, “Ore te nenang'are intae Esau olalashe lai, nikinkilikuan ajoki, ‘Ira iyie oleng'ae? Kaji iloito? Naa einkuneng'ae kuna nireutata?’" 
Genesis32:18 Naa ijoki ninye, ‘Ino sinka lino Yakobo naa enkishooroto nairriwaka olkitok lai Esau; ore ake sii, elotu ninye te siadi ang.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Neitaarriyian ake sii ilo liare o ilo liokuni o lelo pooki ooreuta nena masaa ejoki, “Entiaaki Esau ina bae tininang'arere, ninye." 
Genesis32:20 Naa ijokiki intae, ‘Ore ake elotu osinka lino Yakobo te siadi.’ ” Amu etadamua ajo, “Kaidim aitoborro ninye too nkishorot naashomo te dukuya nanu, ore esuju ina naidim atoduaa enkomom enye; ebaiki naaidim atang'amai nanu.”" 
Genesis32:21 Metaa neitogirori ninye enkishooroto ore ina kewarie eirraga ninye olng'obor. 
Genesis32:22 Ore ake ina kewarie nedumunye ninye arik inkituaak enyena pokira are, o nkaisiaayiak enyena pokira are tenebo inkera enyena tomon oobo nelang te lang'ata e Yabok." 
Genesis32:23 Neya ninche aitalang enkare, tenebo pooki toki naba anaa enaata," 
Genesis32:24 neing'uari Yakobo aa ninye ake; ore ina kewarie etii oltung'ani otupupungare enkewarie pooki o metamanai e sirua. 
Genesis32:25 Ore peyie edol ilo tung'ani ajo eitu eidimu Yakobo, neibung emorloo enkupes; nepuku enkupes e Yakobo terubata oloudo ina kata epupung'are ilo tung'ani." 
Genesis32:26 Ina peyie ejo oltung'ani, “Inchooki mashomo, amu ekenyua.” Kake etiaka Yakobo, “Maaisho hoo ilo o metaba anaa nikimayian.”" 
Genesis32:27 Nejoki ninye, “Aikiji ng'ae enkarna?” Nejo, “Yakobo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Ina peyie ejoki “Mikintokini aekata aajo Yakobo, kake Israel, amu itekeshare Enkai tenebo iltung'ana nisulie.”" 
Genesis32:29 Neitoki Yakobo aikilikuan ninye ajoki, “Tolikioki aatasayia enkarna ino.” Kake etiaaka, “Ainyoo doi peyie inkilikuanu enkarna ai?” Nemayian ninye teine." 
Genesis32:30 Neipot enkarna ine wueji ajo Peniel ejoito, “Amu kitoduaate o Enkai too nkomomi, ore ake eyia neton aishu.”" 
Genesis32:31 Neilepaki enkolong egiroo Penuel, neitong'ojinari te nkaraki enkupes enye." 
Genesis32:32 Ore enkaraki ina ebaiki ina olong; meinos Isiraeli emorloo o loudo; naatii enkong'u oloudo, tenkaraki naibung'a apa ninye enkong'u oloudo le Yakobo o emorloo enye." 
Genesis33:1 Neraposhu Yakobo inkonyek enyena aing'orisho, ng'ura, elotu Esau nerikito iltung'ana iip ong'uan. Metaa etooro inkera aoriki Lea o Raheli o nkaisiaayiak enyena." 
Genesis33:2 Nepik inkaisiaayiak tenebo inkera enye dukuya, ore Lea o nkera enyena, o Raheli o Yosef nepuonu te siadi," 
Genesis33:3 ore ninye makewan neituruk te dukuya ninche, neirrugo abaiki enkop katitin naapishana, o metaba anaa nenyiku olalashe lenye." 
Genesis33:4 Kake ekuetua Esau alo anang'are ninye, neng'utut ninye, nebatatakino emurt enye ang'utut, neishir pokira." 
Genesis33:5 Ore peyie eraposhu Esau nkonyek enyena, etodua inkituaak o nkera, nejo ninye, “Kakua kuna nikiboitare?” Nejo Yakobo, “Inkera naaishoo Enkai to lng'ur osinka lino.”" 
Genesis33:6 Neitoki nena aisiaayiak aanyiku, ninche tenebo inkera enye, neirrugo aabaiki enkop;" 
Genesis33:7 neitoki Lea tenebo inkera enyena aabau aanyiku neirrugo aabaiki enkop; ore te bayie e pooki nenyiku Yosef o Raheli, neirrugokino aabaiki enkop." 
Genesis33:8 Nejo Esau, “Ainyoo eutu ele orora pooki lainepua?” Newal Yakobo ajo, “Pee atum omom te dukuya nkonyek olkitok lai.”" 
Genesis33:9 Kake etejo Esau, “Ekaata inaabaiki, olalashe lai; intaa pooki niata ininono.”" 
Genesis33:10 Nejo Yakobo, “A'a, aatasayia, tenaa kanoto omom too nkonyek inono, neaku tang'amai naa enkishoroto ai too nkaik aainei; amu esipa tenajo ore enduaata natoduaa enkomom ino netiu anaa enduaata natoduaa enkomom e Nkai amu te nyorrata natiu neijia kitang'amua nanu." 
Genesis33:11 Tang'amai, aatasayia ina kishoroto ai nikiyakaki iyie, amu aaing'urrie Enkai oleng, naa kaata sii inaabaiki.” Ina peyie earaki ninye meewa, neya ninye." 
Genesis33:12 Neitoki Esau ajo, “Emaibung'a enkoitoi aapuo, naa kaituruk te dukuya iyie.”" 
Genesis33:13 Kake etiaka Yakobo ninye, “Eyiolo olkitok lai ajo ore kuna ng'aturran naa kenana, naa nanu ogolie intare o nkishu tenebo ilasho lenye, naa te nerewi oleng enkolong nabo, naa keye imasaa pooki." 
Genesis33:14 Inchoo olkitok lai egiroo osinka lenye, pee ariku ninche maakutiti te risioroto e lototo oo nkishu naatii dukuya nanu o te risioroto e lototo oo inkera, omatabau enetii olkitok lai te Seir.”" 
Genesis33:15 Neaku etejo Esau, “Inchooki maatung'ueiki embata oo ltung'ana laainei laata tene.” Kake etejo, “Meeta tipat ning'uarie. Ayieu ake duoo natum omom te dukuya enkomom ino olkitok lai.”" 
Genesis33:16 Metaa etorrinye Esau ina olong alo Seir. 
Genesis33:17 Kake eshomo Yakobo Sukot, neshetaki kewan enkaji neitayu ninye ilngoborri loo nkishu enyena, metaa keji enkarna e ine wueji Sukot!" 
Genesis33:18 Nelotu Yakobo te Seriani o metabaiki enkanasa naji Shekem, natii ina kop e Kanaan einguaa Padan-aram, neun ilngoborri te mbata enkanasa." 
Genesis33:19 Neinyang'u too layiok le Hamor, aa papaai le Shekem too mpisai iip nabo e seshati enkop naa ninye etuunie ilngoborri lenyena." 
Genesis33:20 Neshetu teine olperere lo lasar nedung'oki enkarna ine ajo El-Elohe Israel. 
Genesis34:1 Nedumunye Dina entito e Lea natoikio ninye Yakobo alo aparan inkituaak eina kop; 
Genesis34:2 ore peyie edol Shekem olayioni le Hamor le Hifi ilo kitok leina kop, neibung ninye te ng'olon aikony nesul ninye." 
Genesis34:3 Neng'uar ninye Dina oleng to ltau lenye ina tito e Yakobo; nenyorru ninye ina tito, neirorie ninye too rorei oobor." 
Genesis34:4 Metaa eshomo Shekem airorie papai lenye Hamor ajoki: “Ing'urakaki ena tito maitaa enkitok.” 
Genesis34:5 Nening apa Yakobo ajo einyala shekem entito enye Dina; netii apa ilayiok lenyena nkishu ti ong'ota, negira Yakobo eitu ejo ae o metaba anaa nepuonu ninche." 
Genesis34:6 Nelotu Hamor menye le Shekem enetii Yakobo airorie ninye. 
Genesis34:7 Nejing'u ilayiok le Yakobo eing'uaa ong'ota peyie ening ilo omoni; negoro ninche oleng pee ening ina bae amu etaasa Shekem ina nayaua esulare atua Israel aikony entito e Yakobo, amu ore embae neeijo ena nemeishaakino neasi." 
Genesis34:8 Kake eirorie Hamor ninche ejoki, “Etayiewua naleng oltau lo layioni lai Shekem entito ino; aatasayia, enchoo ninye meyama." 
Genesis34:9 Emayamata maate, enchoo iyiook intoyie inyi; niyaya sii intae intoyie ang." 
Genesis34:10 Nikishula aaku elatia, ore enkop neaku kebolokino intae, entamany nikintawal imasaa nitumutumu imasaa kumok.”" 
Genesis34:11 Nejoki ake sii ninye Shekem menye ina tito tenebo ilalashera lenyena, “Nchooki manoto omom te dukuya inkonyek inyi, naa ore pooki nikijokiki intae naa kaishoru." 
Genesis34:12 Inkilikuanu te nanu imasaa pooki naaba anaa niyieu too nkishorot, naa kaishoru te risioroto eina nikijokiki nanu, kake intabai ake ena naata to ltau, inchooki ake ninye nanu ena tito metaa enkitok ai.”" 
Genesis34:13 Newaliki ilayiok le Yakobo Shekem tenebo papaai lenye Hamor te nkeleekisho enkaraki nainyala enkanashe enye Dina. 
Genesis34:14 Etiakita ninche ninche, “Mikiindim iyiook aataas ena bae, aaisho enkanashe ang oltung'ani lememurata, amu keaku ina esulare te iyiook." 
Genesis34:15 Pooki ake pee kinyorraa tiniasiasa ena: Tiniakuku ake anaa iyiook ore pooki lee linyi nemurati. 
Genesis34:16 Ina peyie kinyorraa aaisho intae intoyie ang, nikiya sii iyiook intoyie inyi, nikiparana tenebo aaku olorere obo." 
Genesis34:17 Naa tinimining'ining'i iyiook ninchosho metumurati intae, neaku aikiya entito ang', nikipuo aaidur.”" 
Genesis34:18 Neitiship irorei lenye Hamor olayioni lenye Shekem. 
Genesis34:19 Neaku eitu eitoki ilo barnoti aitumutiki ina bae, amu etonyorra ninye ina tito e Yakobo. Naa ninye apa enyorri oleng aaitulus to lmarei pooki." 
Genesis34:20 Metaa eshomo Hamor tenebo olayioni lenye Shekem kishomi enkanasa enye neirorie ilewa le nkanasa enye ejoki," 
Genesis34:21 “Ore kulo tung'ana naa iltung'ana supati, enchoo etoni tena kop nikimirakino intokitin, amu ing'ura ekelala enkop oleng te ninche, emayama intoyie enye nikincho sii ninche meyama intoyie ang." 
Genesis34:22 Tena bae ake eidim kulo tung'ana aatonyorrai aatotoni tiatua iyiook, nikiaku olorere obo: pee emurati pooki lee tiatua iyiook anaa pee emurata ninche." 
Genesis34:23 Aimeaku inkishu enye, o ntokitin enye o ng'uesi enye pooki inkunaang? Ematonyorrai ake duoo ina nayieu, naa kemany ninche atua iyiook.”" 
Genesis34:24 Ore lelo pooki oimutua kishomi enkanasa enye, etonyorraitie nena pooki naatejo Hamor o Shekem metaa etumurataki pooki lee, o pooki ooimutua kishomi eina anasa." 
Genesis34:25 Ore te nkolong e uni, aa enamuratieki neton emueyiaa, nedumunye ilayiok aare le Yakobo, Simon o Lawi oong'arie kina Dina, neya ilalema lenye aarasaki e nkanasa meyiolo, near lelo lewa pooki metuata." 
Genesis34:26 Near Hamor metua tenebo olayioni lenye Shekem to lalem neitayu Dina aitung'uaa enkaji e Shekem, nepuo aaing'uaa." 
Genesis34:27 Nedoiki ilayiok le Yakobo aar enkanasa, near iltung'ana metuata neya ntokitin te nkanasa amu einyalaki enkanashe enye." 
Genesis34:28 Neya intare enye o nkishu enye o sirkon lenye o pooki toki ake ninye natii atua enkanasa o naatii nkurman. 
Genesis34:29 Neya pooki toki naata tipat, o nkera enye pooki tenebo inkituaak enye, o pooki toki natii atua inkajijik neibung aaisardakie ninche." 
Genesis34:30 Ina peyie ejoki Yakobo Simon o Lawi, “Kiyakita nanu enyamali amu kintong'ueita nanu tiatua olorere lena kop, too Ilkanaani o Ilperesi; aikuti iltungana laainei, naa tenelo neibung'a aaitoriokino aarare nanu, naa kaamuti nanu tenebo enkaji ai pooki.”" 
Genesis34:31 Kake etejo ninche, “Keishaakino ninye neitaa enkanashe ang e mulayoi?”" 
Genesis35:1 Nejoki Enkai Yakobo, “Tudumunye ilepa shomo Betel, nilo amany ine; nintobir teine olperere lo lasar, aitaiki Enkai ina nikimpang'aka ina kata apa peyie ilo ailany olalashe lino Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Metaa etiaka Yakobo Enkaji enye o lelo pooki apa ootii tenebo ninye, “Ewuangie kulie aitin oo loreren naatii atua intae, nintisinyinyi ate, nimbelekenyenye inkilani inyi;" 
Genesis35:3 ematudumunye aailep aapuo Betel, peyie atum aitayu teine olperere lo lasar aitaiki Enkai ina naatawalikia nanu te nkata osina, naataboitare te pooki wueji nashomo.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ina peyie eisho Yakobo nena aitin oo loreren pooki naata, tenebo ilgiso ootii inkiyiaa enye; neisudoo Yakobo nena pooki te ntonata olchani onyaanyukie olngaboli otii embata Shekem." 
Genesis35:5 Ore eidur ninche nedoiki enkuretisho naing'uaa Enkai inkanas naamanita ninche, metaa eitu esujaa ninche ilayiok le Yakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Nelotu Yakobo Lus (aa ninye Betel), aa ninye natii enkop e Kanaan, ore ninye tenebo olorere pooki oboitare," 
Genesis35:7 neshet olperere lo lasar teine, nejo ine wueji El-betel, amu ine apa eibalakinye Enkai kewan ninye ina kata naisik alo aing'uaa olalashe lenye." 
Genesis35:8 Neye Debora enkaisiaayiani, teine nenukari te ntonata olchani onyaanyuuki olng'aboli tiabori Betel, metaa etejoki enkarna e ine Al'lonbakut." 
Genesis35:9 Neitoki ake Enkai aipang'aki Yakobo aigil, ina kata pee elotu aing'uaa Padan-aram, nemayian ninye." 
Genesis35:10 Nejoki Enkai ninye, “Aikiji enkarna ino Yakobo; meitokini aajo enkarna ino Yakobo, kake keji Israel, enkarna ino.” Metaa eipotoki enkarna enye aajo Israel." 
Genesis35:11 Nejoki Enkai ninye, “Ara Enkai magilani; entoisho entoponari, epuku te iyie olorere o lorora loo loreren, nepuku ilaiguanak te iyie." 
Genesis35:12 Ore ina kop apa naishoo Abraham o Isaak naa kaaisho iyie, naa kaisho ina kop eishoi ino nikisuju.”" 
Genesis35:13 Nelo Enkai aig'uaa ninye teine neirorie ninche. 
Genesis35:14 Neitasheyie Yakobo eng'ape teine apa neirorie Enkai o ninye eng'ape osoit; nebukoki olasar opikuni enchumata enye, nebukoki eilata shumata enye." 
Genesis35:15 Metaa eishoo enkarna ine wueji neirorie Enkai ajo Betel. 
Genesis35:16 Neitoki ninche aaidur aapuo te Betel; ore eton elakuaniki Efrat, nesaisayu Raheli, near enkop oleng." 
Genesis35:17 Ore eitanyamal emion oleng', etiaka enkaitoyioni ninye, “Miureishoyu amu itum ae ayioni.”" 
Genesis35:18 Ore ena kata edung'o tau (amu etua), neipot enkarna enye ajo Benoni; kake eipoto menye enkarna enye ajo Benchamen." 
Genesis35:19 Metaa etua Raheli, nenukari te nkoitoi epuoi Efrat, (aa ninye Betlehem)," 
Genesis35:20 neitasheyie Yakobo eng'ape te nchumata enkurare e Raheli; naa eng'ape ina enkurare e Raheli, netii ina ng'ape o taata." 
Genesis35:21 Neidur Israel alo, neun olng'obor lenye te dukuya oltalet le Eder." 
Genesis35:22 Ore emanya Israel ina kop, nejing'aki Ruben aboitare Bilhah ina apiani e papaai lenye nening Israel ina bae." 
Genesis35:23 Nera ina kata ilayiok le Yakobo tomon aare. Ore ilayiok le Lea naa: Ruben, (olkikau le Yakobo), o Simion, o Lawi, o Yuda, o Isaakar o Sebulon." 
Genesis35:24 Ore ilayiok le Raheli naa: Yosef o Benchamen. 
Genesis35:25 Ore ilayiok le Bilhah enkaisiaayiani e Raheli naa: Dan o Naftali. 
Genesis35:26 Ore ilayiok le Silpa enkaisiaayiani e Lea naa Gad o Asheri. Kulo apa ilayiok le Yakobo ootoikioki ninye te Padan-aram. 
Genesis35:27 Nelotu Yakobo enetii Isaak papaai lenye te wueji neji Mamre, aashu Kiriat-tarba (aa ninye taa eji Hebron), ine apa etamanya Abraham o Isaak." 
Genesis35:28 Etabaitie ina kata inkolong'i e Isaak ilarin iip o ntomoni isiet. 
Genesis35:29 Neye ninye, nelo eneiturrurrorre iltung'ana lenyena apa ootuata, etaa oltung'ani moruo oiputakinote nkolong'i, ore ilayiok lenyena Esau o Yakobo nenukaa ninye." 
Genesis36:1 Kulo ninche ile ishoi e Esau (aa ninye Edom)," 
Genesis36:2 etasayia Esau inkituaak enyena too lkanaani; Ada entito e Elon oo Lhiti, o Oholibama entito e Akna olayioni le Sibeon loo Lhifi," 
Genesis36:3 o Basemat entito e Ishmael enkanashe e Nebaiot. 
Genesis36:4 Neiki Adah Esau, Elifas; neiu Basemat Reul;" 
Genesis36:5 neiu Oholibama Yeush o Yalam o Kora. Kulo ninche Ilayiok le Esau ootoikioki ninye te nkop e Kanaan. 
Genesis36:6 Neya Esau inkituaak enyena o layiok lenyena, o ntoyie enyena o ltung'ana pooki lo lmarei lenye, o nkishu enyena, o ng'uesi pooki enyena, o ntokitin enyena pooki e tipat naanoto te nkop e Kanaan; nelo enkop nalakua alam olalashe lenye Yakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Amu ore imasaa enye naa aikumok apa oleng nemeidim aatamany nebo; ore enkop apa naidurrakita ninche meekure eishaa tenkaraki enkumoi oo nkishu enye. 
Genesis36:8 Metaa eshomo Esau amany enkop oo ldoinyo e Seir. Esau aa ninye Edom. 
Genesis36:9 Kulo ninche ile ishoi e Esau menye loo le Edom teina kop ooldoinyo e Seir. 
Genesis36:10 Kuna ninche inkarn oo layiok le Esau: Elifas olayioni le Ada enkitok e Esau, Reul olayioni le Basement enkitok e Esau," 
Genesis36:11 ore ilayiok le Elisfas naa Teman, o Omar, o Sefo, o Gatam o Kenas" 
Genesis36:12 (ore apa Timna naa enkapiani e Elifas, olayioni le Esau; neiki Elidas Amalek.) Kulo ilayiok le Ada, enkitok e Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Reul: Nahat, o Sera, o Shamma, o Misa, kulo ninche ilayiok le Basemat, enkitok e Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Oholibama entito e Ana olayioni le Sibeon, enkitok e Esau: Etoikio ninche Esau Yeush, o Yalam o Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Kulo ilarikok loo layiok le Esau. Ilayiok le Elifas olkikau le Esau: ilarikok ooji Teman, o Omar, o Sefo," 
Genesis36:16 o Kenas, o Kora, o Gatam o Amalek; kulo ilarikok le Elifas te nkop e Edom; Naa ilayiok le Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Reul olayioni le Esau; ore ilarikok naa Natan, o Sera, o Shama, o Misa; kulo ninche ilarikok le Reul te nkop e Edom; naa ninche ilayiok le Basement, enkitok e Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Oholibama, enkitok e Esau: ilarikok le Yeush, o Yalam o Kora; lelo ilarikok ootoikioki Oholibama entito e Ana, enkitok e Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Esau (aa ninye Edom) naa kulo ilarikok lenye. 
Genesis36:20 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Seir loo le Hori iloopeny enkop: Lotan, o Shobal, o Sibeon, o Ana," 
Genesis36:21 o Dishon, o Eser, o Sisham; kulo apa ilarikok lo Lhori ilayiok le Seir te nkop e Edom." 
Genesis36:22 Ore apa ilayiok le Lotan naa Hori, o Heman; ore apa enkanashe e Lotan naa Timna." 
Genesis36:23 Kulo ilayiok le Shobal: Alfan, o Manahat, o Ebal, o Shefo o Onom." 
Genesis36:24 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Sibeon: Ayia, o Ana, Ana apa ilo onoto inchorroi nairowua tiong'ota, eirrita isirkon le Sibeon papaai lenye." 
Genesis36:25 Kuna ninche inkera e Ana, Dishon o Oholibama entito e Ana." 
Genesis36:26 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Dishon: Hemdan, o Eshban, o Itran o Keran." 
Genesis36:27 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Eser; o Bilham, o Saafan o Akan." 
Genesis36:28 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Dishan: Usi o Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Kulo ninche ilarikok le Hori: ore lelo arikok naa Lotan, o Shobal, o Sibeon o Ana," 
Genesis36:30 o Dishon, o Eser, o Dishan: kulo ninche ilarikok le Hori te risioroto oo ilgilat lenye te nkop e Seir." 
Genesis36:31 Kulo ninche ilaiguanak apa oitoreisho te nkop e Edom, eton eitu etumi hoo likae aiguanani oitoreisho too Siraeli." 
Genesis36:32 Eitoria Bela olayioni le Beori enkop e Edom, neji enkarna enkanasa enye Dinhaban." 
Genesis36:33 Neye Bela, neitoreisho Yobab olayioni le sera le Bosra te rishata enye." 
Genesis36:34 Neye Yobab neitoreisho Husham le nkop e Ltemani te rishata enye. 
Genesis36:35 Neye Husham neitoreisho Hadad olayioni le Bedad, laa ninye apa otimira ile Midian te nkop e Moab te rishata enye, neji enkarna e nkanasa enye Afiti." 
Genesis36:36 Neye Hadad, neitoreisho Samla le Masreka te rishata enye." 
Genesis36:37 Neye Samla, neitoreisho Shaul le Rehobot to lkeju le Frati te rishata enye." 
Genesis36:38 Neye Shaul, neitoreisho Baalhanan olayioni le Akbor te rishata enye." 
Genesis36:39 Neye Baalhanan olayioni le Akbor neitoreisho Hadar te rishata enye, ore enkarna e nkanasa enye neji Pau; neji apa enkarna enkitok enye Mehetabel, ina tito e Matred, entito e Mesahab." 
Genesis36:40 Kuna ninche inkarn oo larikok Le Esau, te risioroto oo ilmareita lenye o manyishoritin enye anaa enatiu inkarn enye; ore ilarikok naa Timna, o Alifa o Yelet," 
Genesis36:41 o Oholibama, o Ela, o Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 o Kenas, o Tenan, o Mibsar," 
Genesis36:43 o Magdiel, o Imran. Kulo ninche ilarikok le Edom (aa ninye eji Esau, menye le Edom), te risioroto oo manyishoritin enye teina kop nataa enenye." 
Genesis37:1 Nebik Yakobo teina kop apa naidurraka papaai lenyena te ina kop e Kanaan. 
Genesis37:2 Ena enkatini o lmarei le Yakobo. Ore aa oloo larin tomon oopishana Yosef, neirritita apa intare tenebo ilalashera lenyena; ore apa aa enkayioni ninye netii apa tenebo ilayiok le Bilha o Silpa nena kituaak e Papaai lenye, neyaki Yosef papaai lenye ilomon torrok ooipirta ilalashera lenyena." 
Genesis37:3 Kenyor apa Israel Yosef oleng aitalang inkera enyena pooki, amu etoikioki ninye etaa kitok oleng, neitobiraki ninye olkila oodo loo inkaik adoru." 
Genesis37:4 Ore peyie edol ilalashera lenyena aajo kenyor menye ninye aitalang ilalashera lenyena pooki, neibayu ninche ninye oleng, neaku meyieu neirorie ninye te supatisho." 
Genesis37:5 Netum Yosef enkidetidet, ore peyie eliki ilalashera lenyena neibayu ninche ninye oleng'." 
Genesis37:6 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Entoning ena kidetidet naidetidetua." 
Genesis37:7 Ng'ura, kigira iyiook aaen irridat le enkano tiatua enkurma naa ng'ura, ore orridati lai etudumunye aitashe, aitoriori naa ng'ura, ore irridat linyi pooki eetuo pooki aiturrurrokino aaman ninye, neirrugokino pooki orridati lai.”" 
Genesis37:8 Nejoki ilalashera lenyena ninye, “Kesipa iyaku oloitore iyiook? Arashu iyaku oloota enkitoo te iyiook pooki?” Neaku eibaitie ninche ninye oleng too nkidetidetat enyena o too rorei lenyena." 
Genesis37:9 Neitoki ake atum ae kidetidet, neliki ilalashera lenyena nejo, “Ng'ura anyaaka aidetidet ae kidetidet; naa ng'ura, ore enkolong o lapa o lakir tomon oobo neaku kaapuonu aairrugokino.”" 
Genesis37:10 Kake ore ake peyie eliki menye neliki sii ilalashera eisikong'a menye nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo doi ena kidetidet nindetidetu? Metaa kaalotu nanu tenebo yieyioo lino o lalashera linono aairrugo aabaiki enkop te dukuya iyie?”" 
Genesis37:11 Netum ilalashera lenyena olom te nkaraki ninye, kake etushuma menye ina kiroroto to ltau." 
Genesis37:12 Nedumunye ilalashera lenyena aapuo airrita intare e menye te mbata e Shekem. 
Genesis37:13 Nejoki Israel Yosef, “Aimegira ilalashera linono aairrita intare te Shekem? Wou maairriwai enetii ninche.” Nejoki Yosef ninye, “Nele nanu.” Ina peyie ejoki ninye," 
Genesis37:14 “Shomo tena kata taleenoi tenaa keserian ilalashera linono, o ntare, nikintoki ayaki olomoni.” Neaku eirriwayie ninye to erata le Hebron, nelo Shekem." 
Genesis37:15 Neinepu oltung'ani ninye egira alilita too nkong'at; neikilikuan ilo tung'ani ninye ajoki, “Ainyoo doi ing'oru?”" 
Genesis37:16 Nejo ninye, “Agira aing'oru ilalashera laainei, tolikioki sii ake aatasayia, kaji doi etii aairritayie intare.”" 
Genesis37:17 Nejoki ilo tung'ani, “Eshomo aaidurraki dikae, amu atoning'o ninche ejo, ‘Maape Dotan.’ ” Metaa eshomo Yosef asujaa ilalashera lenyena, netum ninche te Dotan." 
Genesis37:18 Nedolu ninche ninye elakua ore eton eitu elotu anyikaki ninche, neinos ninche enkiguana peyie ear ninye metua." 
Genesis37:19 Nejokino maate, “Nelido oloshi aidetidetani olotu." 
Genesis37:20 Wootu taata, emataar ninye metua nikinang'aki ninye engumoto nabo te kuna, nikipuo aajo eng'ues entim ninye nainosa ninye, nikianyu aadol enaaku inkidetidetat enyena.”" 
Genesis37:21 Kake ore peyie ening Ruben ina, neitajeu ninye too nkaik enye nejoki, “Mikiar ninye metua.”" 
Genesis37:22 Nejoki Ruben ninche, “Emimbukoo osarge; entanang'aki ninye atua ena gumoto tene tiong'ota, kake eminteleiki ninye enkaina aar metua,” peyie etum aitajeu ninye aitung'ai enkaina enye, arrinyoki ninye papaai lenye." 
Genesis37:23 Metaa ore peyie elotu Yosef enetii ilalashera lenyena, neng'as aaoru ninye olkila lenye, ilo kila oodo oota inkaik adoru oishopito;" 
Genesis37:24 neya ninye aanang'aki eng'umoto, ore ina gumoto nemetii toki, metii enkare atua." 
Genesis37:25 Netoni ninche te nkop aanya endaa, nejo mataraposhu nkonyek enye nedol encholiek oolamirak le Ishmael epuonu aaing'uaa Gilead, ereuta intamesin enye, enapita neeta intokitin naaji ubani, o Seu, o emanoo etii enkoitoi edoyio aapuo Misiri." 
Genesis37:26 Ina peyie ejoki Yuda ilalashera lenyena, “Ainyoo taa doi kitum tinikiar olalashe lang metua, nikituroo osarge lenye?" 
Genesis37:27 Wootu, ematimir ninye aamiraki kulo tungana le Ishmael, nimikincho inkaik ang ebaiki ninye, amu olalashe lang ninye, olo sarge lang.” Nenyorraa ilalashera ina natejo." 
Genesis37:28 Ore peyie epuonu ilbiasharani le Midian aaim ine: neyietu Yosef aaitayu te ng'umoto, nemiraki ninye lelo tungana le Ishmael te shekeli tikitam e nkosholai; neya ninche Yosef Misiri." 
Genesis37:29 Ore pee eshukunye Ruben enaduoo gumoto nedol ajo meekure etii ine, nepolos inkilani enyena tosina sapuk," 
Genesis37:30 nerrinyo enetii ilalashera lenyena nejoki: “Metii enkayioni ine kaji taata alo nanu?” 
Genesis37:31 Neya olkila le Yosef, neyieng enkine, neitadoiki ilo kila osarge." 
Genesis37:32 Neirriwaa ilo kila adoru inkaik meyakini menye, nejo, “Nele olkila likinotito, ng'ura sii iyie tujurru tenaa kolkila lo layioni lino anaa aimeninye.”" 
Genesis37:33 Neyiolou nabo kata ninye, nejo, “Olkila lo layioni lai; einosa eng'ues entim ninye; maing'ash tukul ajo etumuta Yosef ing'uesi.”" 
Genesis37:34 Nepolos Yakobo inkilani enyena to sina nerreten olkuniyia te mpolos enye. Neishiraki olayioni lenye inkolong'i kumok. 
Genesis37:35 Neinyototo ilayiok pooki lenyena tenebo intoyie enyena pooki aaibung ninye aitagol; kake etanya ninye tukul eitagoli, nejo, “A-a ekalo abori enemeneng'a enetii olayioni lai, aishirita.” Metaa eishiraka menye ninye oleng." 
Genesis37:36 Ore ina rishata eidipa Ilmidian aatimir ninye te Misiri aamiraki Potifa, obo loo laitoriak le Farao, aa ninye olkitok loo larripok le wueji netii Farao." 
Genesis38:1 Ore te nena olong'i, etadoyie Yuda alo aing'uaa ilalashera nelo aitaa elatia oltung'ani obo le Adullam oji enkarna enye Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Ore etii ine nedol Yuda entito e likae tung'ani loo Lkanaan neji enkarna enye Shua; neyam ninye nelo aboitare. 
Genesis38:3 Neiroshiu neiu enkayioni, nedung'oki ninye enkarna ajo Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Neitoki ake anutayu neiu enkayioni, nedungoki ninye enkarna enye ajo Onan." 
Genesis38:5 Neitoki ake aigil aiu enkayioni, neisho ng'otonye enkarna enye ajo Shela. Naa Kesib apa etii peyie eiu Shela." 
Genesis38:6 Neyamaki Yuda olayioni lenye kikau Eri enkitok, naji enkarna enye Tamar." 
Genesis38:7 Kake ore apa ilo kikau lenye oji Eri, naa oltung'ani apa arruoni oleng te dukuya Olaitoriani; near Olaitoriani ninye metua." 
Genesis38:8 Ina peyie ejoki Yuda Onan, “Shomo tijing'aki ina kitok oliai o lalashe lino tayiolo ninye, pee etum olalashe lino nkera te iyie.”" 
Genesis38:9 Kake eyiolo Onan ajo ore inkera naaiu nemeaku inenyena, neaku ore ake peyie elo ayiolou enkitok olalashe lenye, nebukoki enkare e le waisho enkop pee meisho ake inkera olalashe lenye." 
Genesis38:10 Ore ina nataasa, eitu katukul eitiship Olaitoriani, near sii ninye metua." 
Genesis38:11 Ina peyie ejoki Yuda Tamar ina kitok o layioni lenye. “Totona ira enkoliai te nkaji e papaai lino, o metaba anaa nebulu olayioni lai Shela.” Amu etureishe ajo keidim sii ninye atua anaa ilalashera lenyena. Metaa eshomo Tamar enkaji e menye." 
Genesis38:12 Ore etulusoyie enkiti rishata neye enkitok e Yuda, entito e Shua. Ore peyie eitagoli Yuda, nelo ninye tenebo olchore lenye Hira le Adulam ewueji neji Timna, ewueji negirae aabarnie intare enyena." 
Genesis38:13 Ore peyie elikini Tamar aajoki, “Ekeloito olaputani lino Timna abarn intare enyena.”" 
Genesis38:14 Neitayu to sesen lenye inkilani enyena e nkoliai, nepika enkarasha aitoipie elukunya enye peyie medoli enkomom, nelotu aton te kishomi e Enaim, natii enkoitoi nalala nalo Timna; amu etodua ajo etubulua Shela, neitu eishori ninye meyama." 
Genesis38:15 Ore peyie edol Yuda ninye, nedamu ninye ejo inoshi kituaak naibor onyek, amu eitoipo ninye enkomom enye." 
Genesis38:16 Nelo ninye enetii te mbata enkoitoi nalala nejoki ninye, “Wou inchooki maatayiolo,” amu eitu eyiolou ninye ajo entito olayioni lenye. Nejo ninye, “Ainyoo naa kincho peyie kitum atayiolo?”" 
Genesis38:17 Newal ajo, “Ekaairriwaki olkuoo too ntare aainei.” Nejo Tamar, “Amaa aikincho entoki ino naibung naarreshunye o terewakaki ilo kuo?”" 
Genesis38:18 Nejo, “Ainyoo iyieu naaisho?” Newal ajo, “Inchooki olgisoi lino o enkeene ino, o ina ng'udi ino nimbung'ita te nkaina ino.” Neaku eishooyie ninye ninche nelo ayiolou ninye neiroshiu ninye." 
Genesis38:19 Neinyototo alo; neitayu enkarasha te nkomom neishop inkilani enyena e nkolia. 
Genesis38:20 Ore peyie eirriu Yuda olkuoo eyau olchore lenye le Adullam, peyie etum enaduoo kitok aishoru intokitin naata e Yuda nelotu alau ninye te naduoo wueji." 
Genesis38:21 Neikilikuan ninye iltung'ana ootii ine ajoki, “Koree ake enkitok mulayoi natii naaji embata enkoitoi nalala e Naim aton?” Nejo ninche, “Meetae emulayoi natii ene.”" 
Genesis38:22 Neaku etushukokine Yuda nejoki, “Eitu alo atum, netejo sii iltung'ana le ine, ‘Metii emulayoi natii ine.’ ”" 
Genesis38:23 Newal Yuda ajo, “Inchoo ninye eya nena tokitin aitaa inenyena, peyie mekueniyieki ake iyiook; idol ajo airriwaka ele kuo, neitu ilo ainepu ninye.”" 
Genesis38:24 Ore peyie eishunye ilapaitin okuni, nelikini Yuda aajoki, “Ore Tamar enkitok o layioni lino, etaa emulayoi, ore ake sii eiroishi te nkerai e mulayaisho.” Nejo Yuda, “Entoriku entupuku boo peyie kipuo aapejoo ninye.”" 
Genesis38:25 Ore eitupukuni boo, neirriwaa olkilikuai airriwaki olaputani lenye ejo, “Olopeny kuna tokitin anotie enkerai.” Nejo, “Ing'ura tujurru, aatasayia, ainkuneng'ae, kuna tokitin o lgisoi, o enkeene, o eng'udi.”" 
Genesis38:26 Nenyorraa Yuda ninche nejo, “Aisinyati ninye peyie aalang, anaa keitu apa aitabaya ororei lai aisho ninye olayioni lai Shela meyama.” Neitu eitoki aikata ayiolou ninye." 
Genesis38:27 Ore peyie ebau enkata najing aji neiu ilmao te ishoi. 
Genesis38:28 Ore earita enkop, neitayu obo enkaina aitupuku neng'amaa enkaitoiyioni neeniki ina aina enkopito pile, ejoito, “Ele otang'asunye.”" 
Genesis38:29 Kake ore erriny enkaina enye, ng'ura, nepuku olalashe, nejo enkaitoiyioni, “Metaa inji doi inkununye tinipuku!” Nedungokini ninye enkarna enye aajo Peres." 
Genesis38:30 Ore te siadi nepuku olalashe lenye eeta enaduoo opito pile eenikino enkaina enye; neipoti enkarna enye aajo Serah. 
Genesis39:1 Ewaki apa ina kata Yosef Misiri, ore Potifa laa obo loo lkituaak le Farao, olkitok le rripore, naa olmisiri sii, einyiang'ua Potifa ninye too ltung'ana le Ishmael laa ninche ooyautua ninye ina kop." 
Genesis39:2 Etii apa Olaitoriani tenebo Yosef, neaku oltung'ani otudupe oleng', netii enkaji olkitok lenye ilo Misiri," 
Genesis39:3 nedol olkitok lenye ajo etii Olaitoriani tenebo ninye, ore pooki naata neisho Olaitoriani metubula too nkaik enyena." 
Genesis39:4 Metaa enoto Yosef omom too nkonyek enyena, neisho ninye metaa oloitasheikinoni le nkaji enye pooki neaku ninye oitore pooki toki naata." 
Genesis39:5 Ore ebaiki ina kata neitaa ninye olaitasheikinoni le nkaji enye o pooki toki naata etamayiana Olaitoriani enkaji e ilo Misiri tenkaraki Yosef, ore emayianata Enkai nejing pooki toki naata, tiaji o te nkurma." 
Genesis39:6 Metaa etungueikia apa pooki naata metaa Yosef oitasheiki; neaku ore eeta ninye, eitu eitoki anyamaliki ae toki meteleku endaa ake nanya ninye. Ore apa Yosef naa oltung'ani sidai te nking'urata." 
Genesis39:7 Ore etulusoyie enkata, nekurraki enkitok olkitok lenye inkonyek enyena ang'uar Yosef, nejoki, “Irraga tenebo nanu.”" 
Genesis39:8 Kake etanya ninye nejoki enkitok olkitok lenye, “Ing'ura, ore atii ene meekure enyamalaki olkitok lai ae toki tena aji, netipika pooki toki naata atua enkaina ai;" 
Genesis39:9 Meekure aa kitok tena aji pee aalang nanu; nemeeta hoo ae toki naatirishie nanu meteleku iyie ake, amu ira iyie enkitok enye; kaji taa pasa aiko peyie aas enkarrueisho naba inji, naas eng'oki te dukuya Enkai?”" 
Genesis39:10 Ore hoo duoo ninye neirorie Yosef anaake neitu ening Yosef ninye, peyie eirrag tenebo ninye, arashu eisiritore ninye." 
Genesis39:11 Kake ore nabo olong', eshomo Yosef atua enkaji aas esiaai enye nemeetae likae lee otii atua aji," 
Genesis39:12 neibung enkila enye ejoki, “Irraga tenebo nanu.” Kake etung'uayie ninye enkila enye te nkaina enye, neilanyisho aisik aipang te nkaji." 
Genesis39:13 Ore peyie edol ina kitok ajo etung'uayie enkila enye te nkaina enye eibung'ita, neisik alo aing'uaa enkaji," 
Genesis39:14 neipot ilewa le nkaji enye nejoki ninche, “Eng'ura, eyaka ninye iyiook Iheburaniai meeu amor iyiook; aaewuo ajing'aki ajo aboitare, naishir oleng to ltoilo sapuk;" 
Genesis39:15 ore peyie ening ajo ailepie oltoilo lai aishir oleng', neing'uaa enkila enye te nkaina ai neilanyisho aipirri aipung boo.”" 
Genesis39:16 Neirragie ninye ina kila enye tembata enye o meeu olkitok lenye ang'. 
Genesis39:17 Neliki ninye ina bae ake ajoki, “Ore ilo sinka loo Lhebrania, ilo liyaua atua iyiook, aaewuo ajing'aki amor;" 
Genesis39:18 kake ore ake peyie ailepie oltoilo lai aishir, neing'uaa enkila enye aata neilanyisho aisik apuku te nkaji.”" 
Genesis39:19 Ore peyie ening olkitok lenye lelo rorei o oiroro enkitok enye, “Neijia aaikuna osinka lino.” Neiyupuyup engoro enye." 
Genesis39:20 Neya olkitok le Yosef ninye apik korokoroni, ine wueji nepiki ilmapuusuni lo laiguanani. Nepiki ninye korokoroni." 
Genesis39:21 Kake etii apa Olaitoriani tenebo Yosef neitodol ninye enyorrata nauno, neisho ninye omom too nkonyek olaitasheikinoni le korokoroni." 
Genesis39:22 Ore ilo aitasheikinoni, nepik Yosef aitaa ninye oitasheiki lelo pooki ooikenoro te korokoroni neaku ore pooki naasi naa ninye oas." 
Genesis39:23 Ore ilo kitok le korokoroni eitu eitoki aitanyamaluo te pooki toki natipika inkaik e Yosef, amu etii Olaitoriani tenebo ninye; neaku ore pooki nataasa, neisho Olaitoriani meitobirari." 
Genesis40:1 Ore etulusoyie enkata, neyooki olaitasheikinoni le naisho oo sabibu lo laiguanani le Misiri tenebo olapejoni loo mukateni o laiguanani, aaitagor olkitok lenye ilo aiguanani le Misiri." 
Genesis40:2 Negoro Farao te nkaraki lelo aitasheikinok lenyena pokira, olaitasheikimoni kitok le naisho oo sabibu tenebo olapejoni kitok loo mukateni." 
Genesis40:3 Nepik ninche enkaji narripieki iltung'ana arruok natii enkaji olkitok le rripore, teina korokoroni naikenorieki Yosef." 
Genesis40:4 Ore ilo kitok le rripore neitanap Yosef meing'ura, neisaiai ninche. Netoni inkolong'i naaikash teina aji oo larruok." 
Genesis40:5 Ore enkewarie nabo, eidetideta pokira, olaitasheikinoni kitok le naisho oo sabibu tenebo olapejoni loo mukateni lo lkitok le Misiri, eikenoro te Korokoroni. Meeta ake oleitu eidetidet enkidetidet enye, nemeeta ake enkidetidet nemeeta enautu."
