Genesis40:6 Ore peyie eyooki Yosef ninche enasirie, nedol ninche, nenyorriki ajo kenyamal oleng pokira." 
Genesis40:7 Neaku eikilikuana ilaitasheikinok le Farao ootii tenebo te nkaji naenishoreki te enkaji olkitok lenye ajoki, “Ainyoo doi anaaijo kesoto taata intae inkomomi?”" 
Genesis40:8 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Kindetideta duo, nemeeta hoo oltung'ani oidim aibelekenyaki iyiook atoliki aibalakinye.” Nejoki Yosef ninche, “Amaa doi enkibelekenyata aime ene Nkai? Entolikioki atasayia intae.”" 
Genesis40:9 Ore ilo aitasheikinoni kitok le naisho oo sabibu, neliki Yosef enkidetidet enye nejoki ninye, “Ore te nkidetidet ai etii duoo o sabibu dukuya nanu," 
Genesis40:10 ore te nchumata eilo sabibu, etii ilng'osil okuni; ore ake peyie eitapuku, nelioyu esidano enye, neku enkimarrati aaku osabibu." 
Genesis40:11 Netii duoo enkikompe e Farao enkaina ai, naitayu ilng'anayio loo sabibu, naironyaki enkare enye ina kikompe, napik ina kikompe e Farao inkaik e Farao.”" 
Genesis40:12 Ina peyie ejoki Yosef ninye, “Ena enkibelekenyata ena kidetidet: ore ilng'osil okuni naa inkolong'i uni," 
Genesis40:13 ore too nkolong'i uni naa aikidumu Farao endukuya ino nikinyaaki esiaai ino, neaku aipikaki Farao enkaina enye enkikompe enye anaa apake te dukuya aa olaitasheikinoni le naisho oo sabibu." 
Genesis40:14 Kake tadamuaki tenilo nitum eseriani, nikintaas sii nanu esupatisho peyie kimbalie sii nanu te dukuya Farao, pee kintayu nanu tena aji." 
Genesis40:15 Amu kesipa tukul ajo kapurruno te nkop oo Lhebrania; ore sii tene natii maata enataasa peyie aatipikaki atua ewueji e korokoroni.” 
Genesis40:16 Ore peyie edol olapejoni loo mukateni ajo ore enkibelekenyata naibelekenya Yosef ajo ekening'unoyu, etiaka sii ninye Yosef “Aidetideta sii nanu, etii nkikapuni uni oo mukateni elukunya ai," 
Genesis40:17 ore enkikapu natii shumata inkulie netii indaiki oo mpukunot pooki naapejuno e Farao, neinosita imotonyi nena daiki naatii enkikapu natii endukuya ai.”" 
Genesis40:18 Newal Yosef ajoki, “Ena enkibelekenyata enye: Ore inkikapuni uni naa inkolong'i uni;" 
Genesis40:19 ore too nkolong'i uni, naa kedumu Farao endukuya ino nikintung'uaa iyie! Nikilili iyie to lchani, ore imotonyi naa keinos inkiri osesen lino.”" 
Genesis40:20 Ore te nkolong e uni, aa enkolong apa natoinyieki Farao, neitaiki ilaisiaayiak lenyena pooki o sirua nedumu endukuya olaitookoni kitok tenebo endukuya olayierani kitok tiatua ilaisiaayiak lenyena." 
Genesis40:21 Neshukoki olaitasheikinoni kitok le naisho oo sabibu, nepik enkikompe inkaik e Farao," 
Genesis40:22 kake eililio ilo apejoni kitok loo mukateni, anaa enatolikio apa Yosef ninche." 
Genesis40:23 Ore ake eyia, eitu edamu ilo kitok le naisho oo sabibu Yosef, etorikine ninye." 
Genesis41:1 Ore peyie eishunye ilarin oare oolulung'a, neidetidet Farao enkidetidet natoduaa kewan eitashe te mbata olkeju le Nail." 
Genesis41:2 Naa ng'ura etupukutuo aailepu to lkeju le Nail inkishu naapishana sidain naapir, nenya ilo alaa otii embata olkeju." 
Genesis41:3 Naa ng'ura, eetuo kulie kishu naapishana sasin, naaikinyoot aailepu to lkeju le Nail aasuju ninche, neitashe te mbata oo nkulie te nkiyopata olkeju le Nail." 
Genesis41:4 Ore nena kishu sasin naaikinyoot, einosa nena kishu sidain naapir. Neputunye Farao te nkidetidet." 
Genesis41:5 Neitoki airora neitoki aidetidet eniare; naa ng'ura, ilkiyiaa oopishana loo lpaek oopir naa sidain ebulu to lpaeki obo." 
Genesis41:6 Ng'ura ore ake peyie eitalioo inkiyiaa pokira naapishana, neitoki kulie kiyiaa naapishana aaliooyu naa sasin naaitoiyito enkijape naing'uaa enkalo oloosaen." 
Genesis41:7 Ore lelo kiyiaa sasin le ntapa etoijoitie ilkiyiaa oopishana sidain oopir. Neputunye Farao, naa ng'ura enkidetidet duoo ake ina." 
Genesis41:8 Metaa ore peyie ekenyu etanyamala oleng to oltau lenye; neirriwaa olkilikuai meipoti ilasakutok o ltung'ana le Misiri o olang'eni pooki; neliki Farao ninche ina kidetidet enye pooki, neitu etumi obo te ninche oidim aibelekenya ina kidetidet aliki Farao." 
Genesis41:9 Nejoki olaitasheikinoni kitok le naisho oo sabibu e Farao, “Atadamua taata inkitarruorrot aainei." 
Genesis41:10 Ore apa peyie egorokino Farao ilaisiaayiak lenyena, naapik nanu tenebo olapejoni kitok loomukateni enkaji narripieki iltung'ana arruok natii enkaji olkitok le rripore," 
Genesis41:11 nikindetidet pokira ina kewarie, ore iyiook pokira meeta oleitu eidetidet enkidetidet enye naata e utunoto enye." 
Genesis41:12 Netii apa oloti barnoti loo Lhebrania oboitare iyiook teine, olaisiaayiani lo lkitok le rripore, ore peyie kiliki ninye nena kidetidetat eibelekenyaka iyiook ninche, eisho ake enkipirta enkidetidet pooki ng'ae anaa enatiu enkidetidet enye." 
Genesis41:13 Naa ore peyie eliki iyiook, nelotu aaku ina natolimuo, naashukokini esiaai ai, ore olapejoni kitok loo mukateni nepuoi aailili.”" 
Genesis41:14 Neirriwaa Farao olkilikuai meipoti Yosef, neyauni ninye aaitasieku aaitung'uaa korokoroni ore peyie eidip atabarnoyu neibelekeny sii inkilani enyena nelotu atua aitashe te dukuya Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Nejoki Farao Yosef, “Anoto det enkidetidet, nemeetae likae tung'ani laaidim aibelekenyaki ninye, natoning'o eji ore peyie ining enkidetidet naa indim aibelekenya.”" 
Genesis41:16 Newaliki Yosef ajoki, “Ime, nanu etii ewalata keisho Enkai Farao ewalata sidai naitiship.”" 
Genesis41:17 Ina peyie ejoki Farao Yosef, “Ng'ura, ore te nkidetdet ai, aitashe apa te nkiyopata olkeju le Nail," 
Genesis41:18 nepuonu inkishu naapishana naapir naa sidain aailepu to lkeju le Nail, nedaa aadaa tiatua olalaa," 
Genesis41:19 nepuonu kulie kishu naapishana enetii, naa ore ninche naa sasin neikinyoot ineitu aikata adol te nkop e Misiri." 
Genesis41:20 Ore nena kishu sasin naaikinyoot, neinos nena kishu e dukuya naapishana" 
Genesis41:21 kake ore peyie eidip ainosa ninche, meetae hoo obo otayiolo ajo einosa ninche, meetae hoo obo otayiolo ajo einosa ninche inkulie amu eton ake emueyiaa naa sasin anaa enatiu te nkiterunoto. Ina peyie aputunye." 
Genesis41:22 Anyaaka ake sii te nkidetidet ai adol ilkiyiaa oopishana oobulu to lpaeki, obo oobore naa sidain." 
Genesis41:23 Ore kulie kiyiaa naapishana, netoito, naa sasin, neitoi olkutati lo loo saen." 
Genesis41:24 Etubulakita ninche, ore lelo kiyiaa sasin lo lpaek etoijoitie lelo kiyiaa oopishana sidan. Natolikio nanu nena kidetidetat ilasakutok kake metii hoo obo laaidima atoliki ina kidetidet.”" 
Genesis41:25 Ina peyie ejoki Yosef Farao, “Ore enkidetidet e Farao naa nabo; eitoduaa Enkai Farao enataa kejo pee eas." 
Genesis41:26 Ore inkishu naapishana sidain naapir, naa ilarin oopishana, ore ilkiyaa oopishana sidain naa ilarin oopishana; ore enkidetidet naa nabo." 
Genesis41:27 Ore inkishu sasin naaikinyoot naapishana, naaetuo aasuju ninche naa ilarin oopishana, ore ilkiyiaa lemeeta toki oopishana ooitoyio olkutati lo loo saen naa ilarin lo lameyu oopishana." 
Genesis41:28 Eketiu anaa enatiaaka Farao, eitoduaa Enkai Farao enataa kejo pee eas." 
Genesis41:29 Kepuonu ilarin oopishana ootumieki endaa sapuk te nkop pooki e Misiri," 
Genesis41:30 kake ore ake peyie eishunye lelo arin, nepuonu ilarin oopishana lo lameyu sapuk, ore lelo arin pooki le ndaa sapuk nerikinisho te nkop pooki e Misiri, nemut olameyu ena kop," 
Genesis41:31 neaku meitokini ninye aadamu enapa naatae sapuk te nkaraki ilo ameyu osuju, amu ekeaku torrono oleng'." 
Genesis41:32 Ore nkigilata enkidetidet e Farao, eitodolu inchere ore ina siaai naa Enkai natipika, naa keyau Enkai aitaa te nkata nemelakua." 
Genesis41:33 Inchoo naa tena kata Farao egelu oltung'ani oisiligayu neeta sii eng'eno neisho ninye meitasheiki enkop e Misiri. 
Genesis41:34 Shomo dukuya tegelu ilaitashekinok tena kop niya e matua e imiet e pooki daa naiu enkop e Misiri te kulo arin oopishana le ndaa sapuk. 
Genesis41:35 Nincho ninche metasoto endaa pooki e kulo arin sidain oopuonu, neiteng'eli ilpaek tiabori enkitoria e Farao pee eaku endaa too nkanas, nincho ninche meiteng'ela." 
Genesis41:36 Ekeaku ina daa enashumi te nkaraki enkop te lelo arin oopishana lo lameyu oopuonu ena kop e Misiri, pee meidak enkop teina rishata o lameyu.”" 
Genesis41:37 Ore ina bae naa sidai apa oleng te Farao o too laisiaayiak lenyena pooki. 
Genesis41:38 Nejoki Farao ilaisiaayiak lenyena, “Aikindim aanoto oltung'ani laijo ele, otii enkiyang'et e Nkai atua ninye?”" 
Genesis41:39 Ina peyie ejoki Farao Yosef, “Ore amu kintoduaa Enkai kuna pooki, meetae likae arriyia naa ng'en laijo iyie;" 
Genesis41:40 iyaku olaitasheiki enkaji ai ore iltung'ana laainei pooki ekeaku ilooning ina nintanap; meteleku tolorika le nkitoo ake aaku nanu kitok te iyie.” 
Genesis41:41 Nejoki Farao Yosef, “Ng'ura ajo aaitasheyie iyie ing'ura enkop pooki e Misiri.”" 
Genesis41:42 Neitayu Farao olgisoi lenye lo lmishire te nkaina enye, nepik enkaina e Yosef; neishopoki ninye ilkilani le kitani napuyiapuy, nepik olpisiai le saabu emurt enye," 
Genesis41:43 neisho ninye meshomo ekedito engarri enye e are oo mbartan, neishir ninche te dukuya ninye ejo, “Entigil kung!” Neijia eikuna apik ninye meitasheiki ina kop pooki e Misiri." 
Genesis41:44 Ore ake sii, etiaka Farao Yosef, “Ekara Farao, naa ore teneitu inchoru orusa, meetae oltung'ani odumu enkaina anaa enkeju te nkop pooki e Misiri.”" 
Genesis41:45 Neisho Farao Yosef enkarna oo Lmisiri ajo Safenatapanea; neisho ninye meyama Asenat, ina tito e Potifera olapolosani le Oni. Metaa eshomo Yosef enkop e Misiri." 
Genesis41:46 Oloo larin tomoni uni apa Yosef peyie ejing enkisiaayiare e Farao olaiguanani le Misiri. Nelo Yosef aing'uaa Farao, nelo aman enkop pooki e Misiri." 
Genesis41:47 Ore te lelo arin oopishana lo lari sapuk, enoto enkop eishoi sapuk," 
Genesis41:48 neiturrurru indaiki pooki oo larin oopishana eton eetae endaa sapuk te nkop e Misiri, neshum endaa pooki too nkanas, etushuma te pooki anasa ina daa naing'uaa nkurman naamanita." 
Genesis41:49 Neshum Yosef entapa te nkumoi naba anaa osinyai le naiposha, o metaa meekure eyiolo eneba ndaiki te nkumoi amu aimeekure etemayu." 
Genesis41:50 Ore eton eitu elotu olari lo lameyu, eeta Yosef ina rishata ilayiok aare, ootoikio Asenata entito e Potifera olapolosani le Oni." 
Genesis41:51 Nedung'oki Yosef ilo kikau lenye enkarna ajo Manase, amu etejo, “Aishoo Enkai maatorikinoto ingolikinot aainei pooki, o enkaji e papaai lai pooki.”" 
Genesis41:52 Neipot enkarna oliare ajo Efraim, “Amu aitaa Enkai olotubula tena kop enyamali ai.”" 
Genesis41:53 Nebau enkiting'oto oo larin oopishana le nkumoi; 
Genesis41:54 neiteru ilarin oopishana lo lameyu aabau, anaa enatejo apa Yosef. Neaku olameyu sapuk too nkuapi pooki; kake ore te nkop pooki e Misiri, netii endaa ina rishata." 
Genesis41:55 Ore peyie eishunye indaiki te nkop e Misiri to lorere, neishiraki olorere Farao meishoo endaa; nejoki Farao iltung'ana pooki le Misiri, “Enchom enetii Yosef; ore pooki najoki intae, entaas.”" 
Genesis41:56 Metaa ore peyie eibulu olameyu ina kop pooki, nebol Yosef inkajijik naashumishoreki, nemiraki ninye Ilmisiri, amu etaa torrono olameyu oleng te nkop e Misiri." 
Genesis41:57 Ore ake sii, eetuo iloreren pooki le nkop Misiri enetii Yosef aainyiang'u ilpaek, amu aitorrono apa olameyu te nkop pooki nalulung'a." 
Genesis42:1 Ore peyie ening Yakobo ajo keetae entapa te Misiri, etiaka ilayiok lenyena, “Ainyoo doi peyie itonini aaing'ura maate tene?”" 
Genesis42:2 Nejo, “Ng'ura, atoning'o ajo keetae ilpaek te Misiri; enchom ina kop enyang'u ilpaek einyiang'aki iyiook teine, peyie kibikoo eitu kiye.”" 
Genesis42:3 Metaa eshomo ilalashera le Yosef tomon aainyiang'u ilpaek te Misiri. 
Genesis42:4 Kake eitu eirriwaa Yakobo Benchamen, olalashe le Yosef tenebo ilalashera lenyena, amu keure ajo ketum enyamali." 
Genesis42:5 Neaku eetuo apa ilayiok le Israel aainyiang'isho anaa olikae orere oetuo, amu etijing'a apa olameyu enkop e Kanaan." 
Genesis42:6 Ore apa ina kata naa Yosef olbalusui leina kop naa ninye enkorrok apa omiraki ilpaek olorere pooki le nkop. Nepuonu ilalashera le Yosef, neirrugo ninche te dukuya ninye aaitabaiki inkomomi enye enkop." 
Genesis42:7 Nedol Yosef ilalashera lenyena, neyiolou ninye ninche, kake eitaasa ninye ninche anaa lomon neirorie ninche te nkisikong'ata ejoki, “Kaji doi ing'uaa?” Nejo ninche, “Enkop e Kanaan king'uaa kietuo ainyiang'u endaa.”" 
Genesis42:8 Metaa etayiolo Yosef ilalashera lenyena, kake eitu eyiolou ninche ninye." 
Genesis42:9 Nedamu Yosef inapa kidetidetat naaidetideta naipirta ninche; nejoki ninche, “Irara ilaikitalak, iyietuo aajur enchalan oo itung'ana lena kop.”" 
Genesis42:10 Nejoki ninche ninye, “A-a olkitok lang, kake kietuo ainyiang'u endaa, ina pee eetuo isinkan linono." 
Genesis42:11 Aikira pooki ilayiok lo lpayian obo, nikira iltung'ana ooisiligayu, ore isinkan linono neme ilaikitalak.”" 
Genesis42:12 Nejoki ninche, “A-a, iyetuo aajur enchalan oo ltung'ana lena kop.”" 
Genesis42:13 Nejo ninche, “Ore iyiook isinkan linono, kira ilalashera tomon aare, ilayiok lo lpayian obo te nkop e Kanaan; naa ng'ura, ore oloti te iyiook eboitare ena olong papaai lang, ore obo nemeekure eetae.”" 
Genesis42:14 Kake etiaka Yosef ninche, “Etiu taa anaa enatiaaka intae inchere irara ilaikitalak." 
Genesis42:15 Ore tenkaraki ina naa ketemi intae; ore te nkishui e Farao, mipuopuo aing'uaa ene wueji ometaba anaa nelotu olalashe linyi oti ene." 
Genesis42:16 Erriwai obo linyi olo ayau olalashe linyi, ore intae nianyunyu te Korokoroni pee etumi aatujur irorei linyi, tenaa ketii esipata atua intae, arashu anaa te nkishui e Farao, esipa irara ilaikitalak.”" 
Genesis42:17 Nepik pooki tenebo Korokoroni too nkolong'i uni. 
Genesis42:18 Ore te nkolong e uni nejoki Yosef ninche, “Entaas ena peyie inchushu, amu kaure Enkai:" 
Genesis42:19 tenaa irara iltung'ana loo sipat, enchoo olalashe linyi obo eing'uari eikenoro teine neikenorieki intae, nepuo ilkulikae aaya entapa tenkaraki olameyu loo lmareita linyi," 
Genesis42:20 nikiyakiki olalashe linyi, oti; pee etumi aatonyorrai irorei linyi, nimiyeye.” Neas ninche ina." 
Genesis42:21 Nejokino maate, “Ore taa te sipata einepua iyiook entorroni o lapa alashe lang, amu kitoduaa enyamali oltau lenye, ina kata peyie esai iyiook neitu kinining ninye katukul, neaku ena pee eewuoena nyamali atua iyiook.”" 
Genesis42:22 Newal Ruben ajo, “Ekeitu apa ajoki intae emintaas entorrono enkayioni? Neitu kinining'ining'i. Metaa ore taata etabawua naa elaata osarge lenye.”" 
Genesis42:23 Eitu ninche eyiolou aajo etoning'o Yosef irorei lenye pooki, amu etii apa olaibelekenyani erishata enye." 
Genesis42:24 Nepuku ninye aing'uaa ninche alo aishir; neshukunye airorie ninche. Neitayu ninye Simon tiatua ninche neen ninye te dukuya ninche. 
Genesis42:25 Neiitanapisho Yosef meiputi ilbenia lenye te ntapa, neshukokini pooki bene impisai nayautua ninche, neishori sii endaa nainosaa te nkoitoi. Neitaasi ninche ina." 
Genesis42:26 Neirot isirkon lenye too lpaek nedumunye aapuo. 
Genesis42:27 Ore pee ejo obo lenye abol olbene lenye pee eisho osikiria lenye endaa te wueji neirraga, etodua impisai enyena te nkutuk olbene lenyena;" 
Genesis42:28 nejoki ilalashera lenye; “Aatushukokoki nanu impisai aainei, noona naatii enkutuk olbene lai!” Ore ake pee ening ina neikirikira tolkirutoto nerrinyokino maate ejokino, “Kaa bae ena naitaasa iyiook Enkai?”" 
Genesis42:29 Ore pee epuonu enetii Yakobo; papaai lenye, te nkop e Kanaan, neliki nena pooki naanoto ninche, ejoki," 
Genesis42:30 “Ore ilo tung'ani, ilo kitok leina kop, eirorie iyiook te nkisikong'ata, neiko iyiook anaa aikira ilaikitalak leina kop." 
Genesis42:31 Kake kitiakita ninye, ‘Aikira iltung'ana ooisiligayu, mikira ilaikitalak;" 
Genesis42:32 kira iyiook ilalashera tomon aare, ilayiok le papa lang; nemeekure eishu obo lang, ore oloti neboitare ena olong papaai te nkop e Kanaan.’" 
Genesis42:33 Ina peyie ejo ilo tung'ani, ilo kitok leina kop ajoki iyiook, ‘Tena ayiolou ajo irara iltung'ana asipak; entunguai olalashe linyi obo entung'ueikiaki, niyaya ilpaek aayaki olorere tenkaraki olameyu lo lmareita linyi, nipuopuo aarrinyo." 
Genesis42:34 Entorikokoki, olalashe linyi oti, pee atum atayiolo ajo mirara ilaikitalak kake iltung'ana ooisiligayu, naa kalaaki intae olalashe linyi, nindimidimi aataar biashara tena kop.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Ore eitayu ntokitin too lbenia lenye, ng'ura, meeta ake oltung'ani lemeeta orridati loo mpisai enyena to lbene; ore pee edol ninche tenebo menye irridat loo mpisai, neirut oleng." 
Genesis42:36 Nejoki Yakobo papaai lenye ninche, “Kinchirie intae to sina sapuk aaiturrarrie inkera aainei: Meekure eetae Yosef, nemeekure eetae Simon, ore tena kata naa intokiki aaya Benchamen, ore kuna pooki naa inaanoto nanu.”" 
Genesis42:37 Ina pee ejoki Reuben menye, “Taara ilayiok laainei aare metuata tenemayau ninye ashuku enitii; tipika ninye inkaik aainei naa kashuku ninye enitii.”" 
Genesis42:38 Kake etejo, “Melo olayioni lai airiamarie intae, amu etua olalashe lenye, naa ninye ake taata etung'uayioki. Tenelo netum bata te nkoitoi ina kata ipuopuo, ataa nanu oltung'ani kitok oibor lukuya, ore osina likiyakiki nanu naa kaar nanu matua.”" 
Genesis43:1 Etaa apa olameyu sapuk oleng te nkop. 
Genesis43:2 Ore pee emut ina tapa nayautua te Misiri, nejoki papaai lenye ninche, “Enyaaki enchom, enyang'aki iyiook enkiti daa.”" 
Genesis43:3 Kake etiaka Yuda ninye, “Eitanapa apa iyiook ilo tung'ani ejoki iyiook, ‘Midolidolo enkomom ai, arashu tenaa ketii olalashe linyi tenebo intae.’" 
Genesis43:4 Tinirriwaa olalashe lang tenebo iyiook, naa aikipuo ainyang'aki iyie endaa teine," 
Genesis43:5 kake tinimirriwaa ninye nimikipuo ine, amu etiaka apa iyiook, ilo tung'ani, ‘Midolidolo enkomom ai tukul, arashu tinirikitoto ake olalashe linyi.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Nejo Israel, “Ainyoo doi pee kinkuna inji aitamuoi aaliki ilo tung'ani aajoki iatata likae alashe?”" 
Genesis43:7 Newal aajo, “Ore ilo tung'ani, eikilikuanishore iyiook te nkarriyiano aikilikuanu imbaa naaipirta iyiook olmarei lang ejoki iyiook, ‘Keton eishu papaai linyi? Iyatata likae alashe?’ Ore nena nikitiakita naa iwalat e nena kikilikuanat; ijo duoo aikinteiki aajo kejoki iyiook, ‘Eayau olalashe linyi ene?’ ”" 
Genesis43:8 Nejoki Yuda Israel, Papaai lenye, “Inchoo enkayioni elo tenebo nanu, nikidumunye aapuo, pee kinchu eitu kiye, iyiook o iyie o tenebo inkera ang." 
Genesis43:9 Aitayio enkishui ai tenkaraki ninye metaa te nanu ing'oru ninye. Teneitu ashuku ninye enitii naitasheyie ninye te dukuya iyie, neaku entorroni ai intarasi." 
Genesis43:10 Amu teneitu taa doi apa kimutie anaata taata kindipa aashom ine katitin are nikishukunye.” 
Genesis43:11 Nejoki papaai lenye Israel ninche, “Tenaa neijia etiu, entaas ena: ewaita embata oo lnganayio gelunot lena kop too lbenia linyi, niyakiki ilo tung'ani enkishooroto, enkiti ilata narropil, o enkiti aisho, o emanoo, o enkorropil, o lng'anayio lo lchani onyaanyukie oseki." 
Genesis43:12 Niyiaya impisai kat are ipuopuo, nirrinyirrinyi inapa pisai naatushukokoki intae too nkutukie oo lbenia linyi; amu ebaiki apa naa keitu edoli." 
Genesis43:13 Entorik sii ninye olalashe linyi nidumunyenye aapuo, nishukokinono enetii ilo tung'ani;" 
Genesis43:14 meishoo intae Enkai Magilani olng'ur te dukuya ilo tung'ani, pee etum aishoo intae entushuku olikae alashe linyi o Benchamen. Tenaa apa kaiturraa inkera aainei, inchoo aiturraa.”" 
Genesis43:15 Neaku ewaita iltung'ana inkishorot, neya irridat maare loo mpisai tenebo ninche tenebo Benchamen; nedumunye aadoyio aapuo enkop e Misiri neitashe te dukuya Yosef." 
Genesis43:16 Ore pee edol Yosef Benchamen tenebo ninche, nejoki ilo aitasheikinoni le nkaji enye, “Toriku lelo tung'ana atua aji niyieng'aki, amu keinos ninche taata endaa tenebo nanu teneipir enkolong.”" 
Genesis43:17 Neas ilo sinka anaa enaitanapa Yosef ninye, nerik lelo tung'ana enkaji e Yosef." 
Genesis43:18 Neureishoi iltung'ana amu eyauaki ninche enkaji e Yosef, nejo, “Enkaraki taa inapa pisai naatipikaki ilbenia lang te nkata e dukuya, ina pee etum anoto enaitaas iyiook nebaiki iyiook aitaa iyiook irrindiki neibung isirkon lang.”" 
Genesis43:19 Metaa eshomo ninche enetii olaitasheikinoni le nkaji e Yosef, neirorie ninye te kutuk e nkaji ejo," 
Genesis43:20 “Oi olkitok lang, kietuo apa enkata e dukuya ainyiang'u endaa;" 
Genesis43:21 ore kipuo te nkoitoi, ore ewueji nikirraga nikibol ilbenia lang, nemeeta olbene hoo obo lemetii irridat loo mpisai enkutuk olbene lenye, eba ake impisai anaa apake; neaku kitorrinyutuo pooki," 
Genesis43:22 nikiyautua sii too nkaik ang kulie pisai nikinosie endaa. Mikiyiolo aajo aing'ae otorrinyoko impisai ang ilbenia lang.” 
Genesis43:23 Nejoki olaitasheikinoni ninche, “Entotoni miatata enkuretisho; ore Enkai inyi o Enkai oo loo papaai linyi ninye natipika ilo shumati atua ilbenia linyi apikaki intae; atang'amayie impisai inyi.” Neriku ninye Simon enetii ninche." 
Genesis43:24 Ore pee eriku ilo tung'ani lelo tung'ana atua enkaji e Yosef, neishoo ninche enkare, neisuja inkejek enye, neidipa sii aishoo isirkon lenye olkujita onya." 
Genesis43:25 Nerretena aanyu elotunoto e Yosef enaipirie enkolong, amu etoning'o aajo kenya endaa tenebo teine." 
Genesis43:26 Ore pee elotu Yosef ang', eyautua atua enkaji enye inkishorot naata, neirrugokino ninche ninye aabaiki enkop." 
Genesis43:27 Neikilikuan ninye ninche ilomon le seriani ejo, “Aisupat papaai linyi, ilo apa payian kitok liimakiita? Keton eishu?”" 
Genesis43:28 Nejo ninche, “Ore osinka lino, papaai lang naa aisupat neton eishu.” Neirrug ilukuny enye te dukuya ninye te nkanyit sapuk." 
Genesis43:29 Nedumu inkonyek enyena nedol olalashe lenye Benchamen, olayioni le ng'otonye nejo, “Kele doi olalashe linyi oti ilo apa likitolikitio? Miking'urrie iyie Enkai enkayioni ai!”" 
Genesis43:30 Neisarrisar Yosef amu etayiewua oltau lenye olalashe lenye te nkirimo sapuk, nelo aing'oru ewueji nelo aishirie. Nejing atua olgilata, nelo aishir teine." 
Genesis43:31 Ore pee eidip aishira, neituku enkomom enye nepuku; neitagol kewan nejo, “Enchoo endaa eyauni.”" 
Genesis43:32 Neng'asi aaisho ninye eton openy, neitokini aisho ninche etoni oopeny, ore Ilmisiri ootoni oopeny neishori sii ninche aa ninche ake, amu ebaiki nemeng'ar Ilmisiri endaa tenebo Ilhebrania, amu entoki ina naa enturuj too Lmisiri." 
Genesis43:33 Netoni pooki te dukuya ninye anaa enaikunari te mbotoro eiteru to lbotor te inoto ometabaiki oloti te inoto anaa kitisho enye; neing'or iltung'ana ate te nking'asia sapuk. 
Genesis43:34 Neyakini pooki endaa naing'uaa emesa e Yosef, kake ore ene Benchamen naa katitin imiet te sapuko elusoo too nkulie. Metaa etookishote ninche neshipa tenebo ninye." 
Genesis44:1 Ina pee eitanap olaitasheikinoni lenye le nkaji enye ajoki, “Imputa ilbenia le lelo tung'ana endaa, tipika enaba anaa enaidim ake ninche aatanap, nipik impisai e pooki tungani enkutuk olbene lenye." 
Genesis44:2 Nipik enkikompe ai ina kikompe enkosholai enkutuk olbene lo loti tenebo impisai enyena naainosie ilpaek.” 
Genesis44:3 Neas anaa enaitanapa Yosef ninye. Ore ake pee ekenyu, neishori iltung'ana epuo aareu isirkon lenye." 
Genesis44:4 Ore ake pee epuo aalamari penyo aalam enkanasa, nejoki Yosef olaitasheikinoni le nkaji, enye, “Inyo, tusuja lelo tung'ana, ore ake pee inepu, tiaaki ninche, ‘Ainyoo pee itushukutuo entorrono te sidai? Ainyo pee itupurroitie enkikompe ai enkosholai?" 
Genesis44:5 Aime ena kikompe oshi eokishore olkitok lai, naa te ninye eibonisho? Itaasa entorroni teina nitaasa.’ ”" 
Genesis44:6 Ore ake pee einepu ninche, neirorie ninche lelo rorei." 
Genesis44:7 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Ainyoo pee eiro olkitok lang irorei laijo kulo? Metalama isinkan linono ina aaku keidim aataas embae naijo ina!" 
Genesis44:8 Ing'ura, ore inapa pisai nikinotito too nkutukie oo lbenia lang, kitushukutuo aashukoki iyie king'ua enkop e Kanaan; kaji naa kinko siake tinikipurroo enkosholai arashu sahabu te nkaji olkitok lino?" 
Genesis44:9 Inchoo ake obo lang too sinkan linono otumi eeta, enchoo eye, nikiaku sii iyiook pooki irrindiki lo lkitok lang.”" 
Genesis44:10 Nejo ninye, “Enchoo naa eaku anaa enitejo; ore ake olotumi eeta neaku orrindik lai, ore ilkulikae linyi pooki neaku meeta entioto.”" 
Genesis44:11 Nesioki pooki ng'ae aitadou olbene lenye enkop, nebol pooki tung'ani olbene lenye." 
Genesis44:12 Neing'oru te pooki eiteru to lbotor neitabayie to loti; netumi enkikompe to lbene le Benchamen. 
Genesis44:13 Nepolos pooki inkilani enye, neirot pooki ng'ae esikiria enye, nerrinyo aapuo enkanasa." 
Genesis44:14 Ore pee elotu Yuda o lalashera lenyena enkaji e Yosef, eton ake etii Yosef ine; nebatata te dukuya ninye aabatatakino enkop." 
Genesis44:15 Nejoki Yosef ninche, “Kaa bae ena nikintaasa? Aimiyiololo aajo ore oltung'ani laijo nanu naa kaidim aibonisho?”" 
Genesis44:16 Nejo Yuda, “Kaa taa kijoki olkitok lang? Ainyoo taa kiro aajo? Anaa kaji kinko tinikilaku ate? Enoto Enkai entorroni oo sinkan linono; ng'ura, kira iyiook irrindiki lo lkitok lang, iyiook pooki ometabaiki lido duoo linotie enkikompe.”" 
Genesis44:17 Kake etejo, “Meidimayu te nanu mataasa ina! Oltung'ani ake onotieki enkikompe ninye ake oaku orrindik lai; kake ore intae, enchom te seriani enetii papaai linyi.”" 
Genesis44:18 Ina pee elo Yuda enetii ninye nejoki, “Oi olkitok lang, inchoo osinka lino eiro, aatasayia, kaliki ororei enkiok o lkitok lai, nimincho engoro ino eyupuyup to sinka lino; amu itiu doi iyie anaa Farao enkorrok." 
Genesis44:19 Eikilikuana apa olkitok lai isinkan lenyena ajoki, ‘Iyatata papaai linyi anaa likae alashe?’" 
Genesis44:20 Nikiwal apa aajoki olkitok lang, ‘Kiata papa, naa olpayian kitok oleng, nikiata sii olalashe lang, oti olotioiwuoki te moruao enye, netua apa olalashe lenye, neaku ninye ake etung'uayioki too nkera e ng'otonye; naa kenyor menye ninye oleng.’" 
Genesis44:21 Nintoki ajoki isinkan linono, ‘Eyau ninye ene natii, pee adol ninye too nkonyek aainei.’" 
Genesis44:22 Nikijoki olkitok lang, ‘Meidim enkayioni atung'uai menye, amu tenelo aing'uaa menye, naa keye menye.’" 
Genesis44:23 Ina pee ijoki isinkan linono, ‘Pooki ake pee intokiki aadol enkomom ai, tenelotu olalashe linyi oti tenebo intae.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Ore pee kirrinyo enetii osinka lino, aa papa, nikiliki irorei lo lkitok lang." 
Genesis44:25 Ore pee ejo papaai lang, ‘Enchom enyaaki enyang'aki iyiook enkiti daa;’" 
Genesis44:26 nikijo, ‘Mikipuo katukul. Tenaa keiriamariyie iyiook olalashe lang oti naa aikipuo; amu mikindim katukul aatodol enkomom eilo tung'ani arashu ake kiata olalashe lang oti tenebo iyiook.’" 
Genesis44:27 Ina pee ejoki iyiook osinka lino papaai lang, ‘Iyiololo apa aajo aatoikio enkitok ai ilayiok oare;" 
Genesis44:28 ore obo naatung'uayie nanu, ina pee ajo, esipa etumutaki apa aaitaa ndung'udung'ot, neitu aekata aitoki adol ninye." 
Genesis44:29 Tinintokiki sii taata aaya ele aaitung'uaa nanu nelo netum enyamali e nkitamioto niyauu ilpapit laainei ooibor to sina enemeneng'a.’ 
Genesis44:30 Ore naa taata, ore tenalotu enetii osinka lino papaai lang, nemetii enkayioni tenebo iyiook, neaku ore enkishui enye neibung'are ena ayioni," 
Genesis44:31 ore pee edol ajo metii enkayioni tenebo iyiook, neye ninye, neyau isinkan linono ilpapit ooibor lo sinka lino papaai lang to sina enemeneng'a." 
Genesis44:32 Amu etaa osinka lino oloitasheiki enkishui enkayioni, te papaai lang ejoki. ‘Teneitu ashuku ninye enitii, naaku oloota entorroni te dukuya papaai te nkishui ai pooki,’" 
Genesis44:33 metaa, ore naa taata, inchoo osinka lino, aatasayia, ejing erishata enkayioni aaku orrindik lo lkitok lai; nincho enkayioni eshuko tenebo ilalashera." 
Genesis44:34 Amu kaji naa aikunari tenarrinyokino papaai lai marikito enkayioni? Ekaure doi ninye ajo atoduaa intorrok naajing'aki papaai lai.” 
Genesis45:1 Neaku meekure eidim Yosef aibooi kewan te dukuya lelo pooki ooitashe te dukuya ninye; neishir ejo, “Enchoo pooki ng'ae otii ene aaipung aing'uaa.” Metaa meetae hoo oltung'ani obo otii ine ina kata eibalakinye Yosef kewan ilalashera lenyena." 
Genesis45:2 Nebuaku aishir ometoning'o Ilmisiri ninye, nening sii enkaji pooki e Farao." 
Genesis45:3 Nejoki Yosef ilalashera lenyena, “Ekara doi Yosef; keton eishu papaai?” Kake eitu eidim ilalashera lenyena aatawaliki ninye, amu eiputukunyo oleng te dukuya ninye." 
Genesis45:4 Ina pee ejoki Yosef ilalashera lenyena, “Wootu entinyiku enatii atasayia intae.” Nepuonu aanyiku. Nejoki ninye, “Ekara olalashe linyi Yosef, ilo apa litimirakita enkop e Misiri." 
Genesis45:5 Naa ore naa taata emiureishoyu, anaa igororo maate, te nkaraki nikitimirakita apa ena kop; amu Enkai apa naaiturukunye nanu maeu aitopok enkishui." 
Genesis45:6 Amu etijing'a olameyu enkop te kulo arin pokira aare; neton aa kepuonu kulikae arin imiet laa metumi enturore anaa enkisampuare. 
Genesis45:7 Naairriu apa Enkai ene pee aituruku te ntae, pee alotu aitajeu ilekunot te nkop naitasheyie tenkaraki intae pee meye ilkumok." 
Genesis45:8 Metaa mme intae apa likirriutua ene kake Enkai; naaeuo aaitaa menye le Farao, naaku olkitok le nkaji enye pooki o loitore e nkop pooki e Misiri." 
Genesis45:9 “Entasiooi esarisara enchom enetii papaai nijokiki ninye, ‘Inji ejo olayioni lino Yosef, aitaa Enkai olkitok le nkop pooki e Misiri; wou ene natii, mayieu nimutie." 
Genesis45:10 Ilotu amany enkop e Goshen nikilotu anyikaki iyie tenebo inkera inono o nkera oo nkera inono, o ntare inono, o nkishu inono, o pooki toki niata." 
Genesis45:11 Ore itii ine naaisho pooki toki niyieu, amu eton eetae kulikae arin imiet leton epuonu lo lameyu; pee mikiya iyie osina o lmarei lino pooki o pooki toki niata.’" 
Genesis45:12 “Idolitata too nkonyek inyi, nedolita nkonyek o lalashe lai Benchamen inchere enkutuk ai nairorie intae." 
Genesis45:13 Enchom entoliki papaai esikar pooki naata tene te Misiri, o pooki toki nitodua tene. Entasiooi eyau papaai ene.”" 
Genesis45:14 Ina pee emuataki inkaik olalashe lenye Benchamen aishiraki; neishirakino pokira. 
Genesis45:15 Neng'utut ilalashera lenyena pooki neishiraki ninye ninche; ore pee eidip ina neiteru ilalashera aairorie ninye. 
Genesis45:16 Ore pee ening'i olomoni te nkaji e Farao, eji, “Eetuo ilalashera le Yosef,” neitiship ina Farao o ilaisiaayiak lenyena." 
Genesis45:17 Nejoki Farao Yosef, “Tiaki ilalashera linono, entaas ena ‘Eroto isirkon linyi nipuopuo aarrinyo enkop e Kanaan;" 
Genesis45:18 nirikuku papaai linyi o pooki tung'ani loo lmareita linyi, nipuonunu enatii, naa kaisho nanu intae enkop naisul ena kop e Misiri te sidano, naa ainyanya empiron ena kop.’" 
Genesis45:19 Intanapa ake sii ninche tiaki, ‘Entaas ena: entereu ingarrin tena kop e Misiri pee enapunyeki inkera inyi o nkituaak inyi, niyauu papaai linyi nipuonunu." 
Genesis45:20 Niminkenaa aajo kitung'uaitie imasaa ang e tipat teine amu ore inaaisul enkop pooki e Misiri naa inkuninyi.’ ” 
Genesis45:21 Neas ilayiok le Israel ina; neisho Yosef ninche ingarrin te risioroto eina naitanapishe Farao, neisho sii ninche endaa nainosaa epuo te nkoitoi o epuonu." 
Genesis45:22 Meeta ake sii oleitu eisho te pooki lenye inkilani ng'ejuko kake eishoo Benchamen shekeli iip uni e nkosholai o nkilani imiet ng'ejuko. 
Genesis45:23 Ore papaai lenye, neirriwaki kuna; isirkon tomon naairoto too ntokitin sidain e Misiri, o lipong'a tomon oo sirkon naanapita entapa, o imukateni, o ntokitin naanya papaai lenye te nkoitoi." 
Genesis45:24 Ina pee eisho ilalashera meshomo, ejoki ninche, “Mayieu ake ninchankarrarra te nkoitoi.”" 
Genesis45:25 Metaa etudumunye aapuo aaing'uaa Misiri nebau Kanaan enetii papaai lenye, Yakobo." 
Genesis45:26 Neliki ninye lelo omon, ejoki, “Eton doi ake eishu Yosef, naa ninye oitore enkop pooki e Misiri!” Neiterre Yakobo, amu eitu eiruk ninye ninche." 
Genesis45:27 Kake ore pee eliki ninche irorei pooki le Yosef, lelo apa ootiaka ninye ninche, ore ake sii pee edol ingarrin naaetuo pee enap ninye neitoki oltau le Yakobo papaai lenye apok;" 
Genesis45:28 nejo Israel eidipe eton doi eishu olayioni lai Yosef; ekalo adol ninye eton eitu aye. 
Genesis46:1 Metaa etudumunye Yakobo alo o pooki toki naata, nepuonu Beer-sheba, neitayu ilasarri aaitaiki Enkai e papaai lenye Isaak." 
Genesis46:2 Neirorie Enkai Israel too nkitoduat e kewarie nejoki ninye, “Yakobo, Yakobo,” nejo ninye, “Nele nanu.”" 
Genesis46:3 Ina pee ejoki, “Ara nanu Enkai, Enkai e papaai lino; miureishoyu ilo Misiri; amu kaalo aitaa olosho sapuk teine." 
Genesis46:4 Ekaairiamariyie iyie Misiri, naa kaaitoki ashuku ene, neaku inkaik e Yosef ilo airurare.”" 
Genesis46:5 Ina pee epuku Yakobo aing'uaa Beer-sheba, nenap ilayiok le Israel Yakobo papaai lenye, o nkera enye, o nkituaak enye too ngarrin naairriwua Farao metanapa ninye." 
Genesis46:6 Eterewa sii inkishu enye o masaa enye, naanoto te nkop e Kanaan, nepuonu enkop e Misiri, Yakobo o eishoi enye pooki," 
Genesis46:7 ilayiok lenyena, o layiok loo layiok lenyena tenebo ninye, o ntoyie enyena, o ntoyie oo layiok lenyena, o eishoi enye pooki eyaua ninye pooki tenebo ninye Misiri." 
Genesis46:8 Kuna ninche inkarn e ishoi e Israel, naaetuo atua Misiri, Yakobo o layiok lenyena, Ruben, olkikau le Yakobo." 
Genesis46:9 Ore ilayiok le Ruben, naa: Hanok, o Palu, o Hesron, o Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Ore ilayiok le Simon naa: Yemuel, o Yamin, o Ohal, o Yakin, o Sohar o Saul, aa layiok le nkitok oo Lkanaani." 
Genesis46:11 Ore ilayiok le Lawi naa: Gershon, o Kohat, o Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Ore ilayiok le Yuda naa: Eri, o Onan, o Shela, o Peres, o Sera (kake ore Eri o Onan netuata te nkop e Kanaan): ore ilayiok le Peres naa: Hesron, o Hamul." 
Genesis46:13 Ore ilayiok le Isaakar naa: Tola, o Pufa, o Yob, o Shimron." 
Genesis46:14 Ore ilayiok le Sebulon naa: Sered, o Elon o Yahaleel" 
Genesis46:15 (kulo apa ilayiok le Lea ootoikio ninye Yakobo te Padan-aram, tenebo entito enye Dina; neaku pooki ilayiok o ntoyie enyena iltung'ana tomoni uni o kuni)." 
Genesis46:16 Ore ilayiok le Gad naa: Sifion, o Haggi, o Shuni, o Esbon, o Eri, o Arod, o Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Ore ilayiok le Asheri naa: Imna, o Ishfa, o Ishfi, o Beria, tenebo Sera enkanashe enye. Ore ilayiok le Beria naa: Heber o Malkiel" 
Genesis46:18 (kulo ninche ilayiok le Silpa oishoo Laban Lea entito enye; neaku kulo etoikio Yakobo - iltung'ana tomon o ile). 
Genesis46:19 Ore ilayiok le Raheli, enkitok e Yakobo naa: Yosef o Benchamen." 
Genesis46:20 Neikini Yosef te nkop e Misiri Manaseh o Efraim, laa ninche etoikio Asenat entito e Potifera olapolosani le Oni." 
Genesis46:21 Ore ilayiok le Benchamen naa: Bela, o Becher, o Ashbel, o Gera, o Naaman, o Ehi o Rosh, o Mupin, o Huppin o Ard" 
Genesis46:22 (kulo ninche ilayiok le Raheli ootoikioki Yakobo - iltung'ana tomon oong'uan pooki.) 
Genesis46:23 Ore ilayiok le Dan naa: Hushim. 
Genesis46:24 Ore ilayiok le Naftali naa: Yahseel, o Guni, o Yeser, o Shilem," 
Genesis46:25 (kulo ninche ilayiok le Bilha, ooishoo Laban Raheli entito enye, neaku kulo ninye etoikio Yakobo - iltung'ana oopishana pooki.)" 
Genesis46:26 Ore iltung'ana pooki le Yakobo ooetuo atua Misiri, laa ile ishoi enye enkorrok, nemeikenaro ilayiok loo nkituaak oo layiok lenyena naa iltung'ana intomoni ile o ile pooki;" 
Genesis46:27 o layiok aare le Yosef ootoikioki ninye te Misiri; neaku ore olorere pooki le nkaji e Yakobo oetuo atua Misiri naa iltung'ana intomoni naapishana. 
Genesis46:28 Neirriwaa ninye Yuda meituruko alo enetii Yosef ajoki ninye menotore ninye te Goshen; nepuonu ninche enkop e Goshen. 
Genesis46:29 Neirot Yosef engarri enye oo mbartan nelo anang'are papaai lenye Israel te Goshen; nekuetik Yosef papaai lenye nemuataki inkaik enyena emurt, aishir te murt enye te nkata naado." 
Genesis46:30 Nejoki Israel Yosef, “Etaa taa nchooki matua amu aatoduaa enkomom nayiolo ajo eton ake inchu.”" 
Genesis46:31 Nejoki Yosef ilalashera lenyena o enkaji e menye pooki; “Ekalo ainosaki Farao, naa kajoki ninye, ‘Ore ilalashera laainei o enkaji e papa pooki, otii apa enkop e Kanaan, eetuo enatii." 
Genesis46:32 Ore lelo tung'ana naa ilairritak, amu ilaramatak loo nkishu, neyautua intare enye, o nkishu enye o pooki toki naata.’" 
Genesis46:33 Ore teneipot intae nejoki intae: ‘Ainyoo esaiai inyi niasiasa?’ 
Genesis46:34 Enchom entejo, ore isinkan linono naa ilaramatak loo nkishu eiteru te keraisho o metabaiki ena kata, iyiook tenebo iloo papa lang; pee itumutumu aatamany enkop e Goshen; Amu ore pooki aramatani loo ntare naa olminong too Lmisiri.”" 
Genesis47:1 Metaa eshomo Yosef ajing'aki Farao te nkaji, nejoki: “Ore papaai lai o lalashera laainei, tenebo intare enye o nkishu enye o pooki toki naata, eetuo aaing'uaa enkop e Kanaan. Netii taata ninche ina kop e Goshen.”" 
Genesis47:2 Neriku too lalashera lenyena ltung'ana imiet arikoki Farao. 
Genesis47:3 Nejoki Farao ilalashera lenyena. “Ainyoo oshi esaiai inyi niasiasa?” Nejoki ninche Farao, “Ore isinkan linono naa ilaramatak, anaa enatiu apa iloo papa lang.”" 
Genesis47:4 Nejoki ninche Farao, “Kietuo iyiook aamany ena kop, amu meeta indaat oo ntare isinkan linono, amu etaa olameyu sapuk te nkop e Kanaan; naa ore taata, kiomon iyie inchoo isinkan linono emany enkop e Goshen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Ina pee ejoki Farao Yosef, “Eewuo papaai lino o lalashera enitii." 
Genesis47:6 Neina enkop e Misiri natii dukuya iyie, intamanya papaai lino o lalashera linono ine wueji sidai aisul tena kop, inchoo emany enkop e Goshen naa tiniyiolo iltung'ana airritak supati te ninche tipika ninche meitasheiki inkishu aainei.”" 
Genesis47:7 Ina peyie eitijing'u Yosef Yakobo papaai lenye neitoton te dukuya Farao, nemayian Yakobo Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Nejoki Farao Yakobo, “Kaja inkolong'i oo larin le nkishui ino.”" 
Genesis47:9 Nejoki Yakobo Farao, “Ore inkolong'i oo larin laainei lenkidurrudur ai naa ilarin iip o tomoni uni; kuti naa torrok inkolong'i oo larin le nkishui ai, neitu ebaiki inkolong'i oo larin le nkishui oo loo papa too nkolong'i enkidurrudur enye.”" 
Genesis47:10 Nemayian Yakobo Farao nepuku alo aing'uaa Farao. 
Genesis47:11 Neaku eitamanya Yosef ilalashera lenyena, neisho ninye ninche enkop metaa enenye te Misiri, ewueji neisul te ina kop e Rameses, anaa enaitanapishe Farao." 
Genesis47:12 Neisho Yosef papaai lenye, tenebo ilalashera lenyena, o lmarei lenye pooki endaa, terisioroto esiana ooltung'ana lenye." 
Genesis47:13 Etaa meekure apa eetae endaa teina kop pooki; amu etasapuka olameyu oleng', metaa etaa enkop e Misiri o enkop e Kanaan enaisumash te nkaraki olameyu." 
Genesis47:14 Nesotu Yosef impisai pooki naanotoki te nkop e Misiri o te nkop e Kanaan, te ntapa nainyiang'utua; neyau Yosef nena pisai aya enkaji e Farao." 
Genesis47:15 Neaku ore pee emiri aaishu impisai pooki te nkop e Misiri o te nkop e Kanaan, eetuo Ilmisiri pooki enetii Yosef nejoki ninye, “Inchoo iyiook endaa; ainyoo pee kiye te dukuya nkonyek inyi?" 
Genesis47:16 Amu kiishutua impisai ang'.” Newal Yosef ajo, “Enchoru inkishu inyi, naa kaisho intae endaa awalunye nkishu inyi tenetaa eishunye impisai inyi.”" 
Genesis47:17 Metaa nerewaki inkishu enye Yosef; neisho Yosef ninche endaa awalunye imbartan enye, o intare, o nkishu, o sirkon: neisho ninye ninche endaa awalunye nkishu enye pooki teilo ari." 
Genesis47:18 Ore pee eishunye ilo ari, neitoki aapuonu to likae ari nejoki ninye, “Mikisudorie ate olkitok lang inchere eishunye impisai ang pooki, ore iluaat oo nkishu naa ino lkitok lang; metii ae toki natung'uayioki te dukuya olkitok lang meteleku iseseni lang ake o enkop ang'." 
Genesis47:19 Ainyoo pee kiye te dukuya inkonyek inono, iyiook tenebo enkop ang'? Inyang'u iyiook tenebo enkop ang te ndaa; ore iyiook tenebo enkop ang nikiaku irrindiki le Farao; nincho iyiook ilanterera pee kinchu nimikiye, neaku ena kop pooki mitil.”" 
Genesis47:20 Metaa einyiang'ua Yosef enkop pooki e Misiri ainyang'aki Farao, amu etimira Ilmisiri inkurman enye amu ketarasua olameyu oleng te ninche. Neaku enkop pooki ene Farao;" 
Genesis47:21 ore iltung'ana neaku, irrindiki pooki eiteru te nkiting'oto nabo e Misiri o metabaiki enkae kiting'oto." 
Genesis47:22 Enkop ake oo lapolosak eitu einyang'u; amu keeta apa ilapolosak emborei enye nauno naing'uaaa Farao, neishunyie ina borei enye naishoo Farao ninche; metaa eitu ninche emir enkop enye." 
Genesis47:23 Ina pee ejoki Yosef iltung'ana, “Ing'ura ainyiang'ua intae ena olong tenebo enkop inyi aitaa ene Farao. Ore naa, noolo ilanterera linyi, naa entuun enkop." 
Genesis47:24 Ore te nkata e nkisampuare ninchosho ematua e imiet Farao, ore ematua e ong'uan neaku inkuninyi ilanterera le nkop, neaku sii endaa inyi o lmarei linyi, o ndaiki naanya inkera inyi.”" 
Genesis47:25 Nejo ninche, “Intajeuo enkishui ang; inchoo eitiship ena olkitok lang', aikiaaku iyiook irrindiki le Farao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Metaa eitobirua Yosef nkiguanat naaipirta enkop e Misiri, neitashe nena kiguanat o taata, inchere etum Farao ematua e imiet; enkop ake oo lapolosak neitu eaku ene Farao." 
Genesis47:27 Metaa etamanya Israel Enkop e Misiri ina kop e Goshen; netum imasaa kumok teine, neisho oleng nebul te nkumoi." 
Genesis47:28 Neton Yakobo te nkop e Misiri ilarin tomon o oopishana; metaa ore inkolong'i oo larin le nkishui e Yakobo naa iip o artam oopishana. 
Genesis47:29 Ore pee enyiku inkolong'i pee eaku enkata nairura Israel, eipoto olayioni lenye Yosef nejoki ninye, “Tenetaa taata anoto omom too nkonyek inono, tipika enkaina ino abori enkupes ai nikisiligie ajo aikintaas nanu enkanyit o esipata." 
Genesis47:30 Mayieu nikinukaa nanu te Misiri, kake tunukayioki nanu tiatua inkuraren oo loo papa; tanapaki nanu intung'uayioki Misiri nikilo aturoo nanu te wueji enye neturorie olorere.” Newal ninye ajo, “Ekaas anaa enitejo.”" 
Genesis47:31 Nejo, “Inosa olmumai te nanu.” Neinos ninye olmumai. Ina pee eirrug Israel endukuya enye te ndukuya e ndapash enye." 
Genesis48:1 Ore pee elusoo nena, nelikini Yosef aajoki, “Ing'ura kemuoi papaai lino;” metaa etoriko ninye ilayiok lenyena aare, Manase o Efraim." 
Genesis48:2 Nelikini Yakobo aajoki:, “Eewuo olayioni lino Yosef enitii;” neitagoluo Israel nenyok ainyototo aton te ndapash." 
Genesis48:3 Nejoki Yakobo Yosef, “Aaipang'aka Enkai magilani nanu te Lus te nkop e Kanaan naamayian nanu," 
Genesis48:4 naajoki nanu, ‘Ng'ura kaaisho iyie tubula, naa kaaponaa iyie, naaitaa iyie olorora loo ltung'ana kumok, naa kaisho ena kop eishoi ino nikisuju metaa enenye intarasi.’" 
Genesis48:5 “Ore ilayiok linono pokira aare likitoikioki te nkop e Misiri eton eitu alotu enitii tene te Misiri; naa ilaainei; Efraim o Manase eaku ilaanei anaa paa ilaainei Ruben o Simon. 
Genesis48:6 Ore eishoi nitum tesiadi ninche naa keaku ilinono; naa keipotieki ninche enkarna oo lalashera te njung'ore enye. 
Genesis48:7 Amu ore apa pee alotu te Padan-aram aainepua osina etua Raheli te nkop e Kanaan te nkoitoi, eton elakua elototo pee ebau Efrat. Naturoo ninye teine te nkotoi alotito Efrat (aa ninye Betlehem).”" 
Genesis48:8 Ore pee edol Israel ilayiok le Yosef, etejo “Kakua doi kulo?”" 
Genesis48:9 Nejoki Yosef papaai lenye, “Ilayiok laainei ninche, lelo apa laaishoo Enkai tene.” Nejo Israel, “Toriku ninche ene natii, aatasayia pee atum atamayiana ninche.”" 
Genesis48:10 Ore ina kata, eiliilaitie nkonyek e Israel te moruao, metaa meidim ninye atisipu. Neaku eyaua Yosef ninche aitinyiaki ninye; neng'utut ninche neitamuat inkaik enyena." 
Genesis48:11 Nejoki Israel Yosef, “Majo apa kaaitoki adol enkomom ino; naa ng'ura, aaishoo Enkai matoduaa sii inkera inono.”" 
Genesis48:12 Metaa eiwuangie Yosef ninche too nkung enyena, neirrugo ninye makewan abaiki enkop." 
Genesis48:13 Nerik Yosef ninche pokira, etii Efraim enkaina enye e tatene eitorioki enkaina e kedienye e Israel, netii Manase enkaina enye e kedienye eitorioki ninye enkaina e tatene e Israel, neriku ninche aitinyikaki ninye." 
Genesis48:14 Neitorioo Israel enkaina enye e tatene neiteleiki ninye endukuya e Efraim, laa ninye oloti, ore enkaina enye e kedienye eiteleikia endukuya e Manase, eitapaash inkaik, amu ore Manase naa ninye olbotor." 
Genesis48:15 Nemayian ninye Yosef ejo; “Ore ina Ai naisiaayia iloo Papa te dukuya enye, Abraham o Isaak, ina Ai naatorikoyie te nkishui ai pooki o metabaiki ena olong," 
Genesis48:16 Ilo malaika laaitajeuo nanu te pooki torroni, tamayiana kuna ayiok; Naa te ninche inchoo enkarna ai meipoti, tenebo enkarna oo loo papa Abraham o Isaak; Naa inchoo ninche ebulu aaku ilororani tiatua ena kop pooki.”" 
Genesis48:17 Ore pee edol Yosef ajo eiteleikia menye enkaina e tatene shumata endukuya e Efraim neitu eitiship ninye, nedumu enkaina e menye aitayu aitung'uaa endukuya e Efraim apik ene Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Nejoki Yosef papaai lenye, “Ime neijia etiu papaai, amu ore ilo naa ninye olkikau; tipika enkaina ino e tatene shumata endukuya enye.”" 
Genesis48:19 Kake etanya menye tukul nejo, “Ekayiolo olayioni lai, ekayiolo; ekeaku sii ninye kitok; kake ore ake eyia, ekeaku olalashe lenye oti kitok te ninye, ore eishoi enye naa keaku olorere kumok.”" 
Genesis48:20 Metaa etamayiana ninye ninche ina olong ejoki, “Te iyie elo Israel aibalie imayianat ejo, ‘Mikintotiwuo Enkai anaa Efraim o Manase;’ ” neaku neija eikuna aitojool Efraim Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Ina pee ejoki Israel Yosef, “Ng'ura, etataana enkata pee aye, kake keaku Enkai tenebo iyie, naa aikintoki ayau iyie ina kop o loo papaai lino." 
Genesis48:22 Ore ake sii aaishoo iyie neitu aisho ilalashera linono Shekem enkiyopata o ldoinyo, ine wueji nepir naawa too nkaik oo Lamori to lalem lai o te nkawuo ai.”" 
Genesis49:1 Ina peyie eipotu Yakobo ilayiok lenyena nejoki, “Enturrurroto tenebo, pee atum atoliki intae imbaa naatiu too nkolong'i naapuonu." 
Genesis49:2 Enturrurroto entoning, intae ilayiok le Yakobo, nining'ining'i Israel papaai linyi." 
Genesis49:3 Ruben, ira iyie olkikau lai, engolon ai, naa olng'anayioi le dukuya lai le ngolon ai. Oloituruk lo lwuasa naa oloituruk te ngolon." 
Genesis49:4 Olemeitirring'a anaa enkare, miaku iyie ololus te pooki, amu itijing'aka endapash e papaai lino; ina peyie isarkionie ninye ishomo endapash ai ainyal." 
Genesis49:5 Ore Simion o Lawi naa ilalashera, ore imasaa enye olarrabal naa ilalema lenye." 
Genesis49:6 Oi oltau lai, milotu ake enkiguana enye; Oi lotau lai, mintaa ninche encholiek. Amu te ngoro enye ear iltung'ana metuata, naa to lwuasa lenye etudung'o errishet o lkiteng." 
Genesis49:7 Metedeki engoro enye, amu kepi ninye; o engoro enye napi, amu ketolo! Ekaor ninche tiatua Yakobo, naidapash ninche tiatua Israel." 
Genesis49:8 Yuda, aikisis iyie ilalashera linono; Neibung inkaik inono imurto oo lmang'ati linono; ore ilayiok le papaai lino naa keirrugo te dukuya iyie." 
Genesis49:9 Ore Yuda naa ketiu anaa olkuoo lo lng'atuny; olotu eing'uaa engorore, enkerai ai ilepa iyie Itadowuo iyie anaa olng'atuny aibung, Anaa elipong olng'atuny, aing'ae oitieu atuputu ninye," 
Genesis49:10 Meing'uaa eng'udi e nkitoria enkaji e Yuda, arashu orinka le nkitoria empolos oo nkejek enyena, ometaba anaa nebaiki ninye olopeny, neaku enenye enkanyit oo iltung'ana pooki." 
Genesis49:11 Neeniki osikiria lenye olchani lo sabibu, ore olkurrarru lenye neeniki ilo sabibu gelunoti, Neisuj ninye inkilani enyena te naisho oo sabibu, neisuj inkilani enyena too lng'anayio oonyokie anaa osarge." 
Genesis49:12 Ekedoru inkonyek enyena te naisho oo sabibu, Neibor ilala lenyena te okoto e kule," 
Genesis49:13 Ore Sebulon naa kemany embata enaiposha, naa keaku ewueji neitasheyie imelin, Ore olpolosie lenye netii Sidon." 
Genesis49:14 Ore Isaakar naa osikiria ogol, neirrag te rishata oo muatat oo ntare;" 
Genesis49:15 Etoduaa ajo ore eneyeng'iyeng'areki naa aisidai, naa ekeitishipisho enkop, metaa eirruguo oloililae lenye anap, neaku orrindik te siaai naarakini." 
Genesis49:16 Ekeiguanare Dan iltung'ana lenyena, anaa obo loo loshon le Israel." 
Genesis49:17 Keaku Dan olasurai te nkoitoi, enturbubua te nkoitoi, ina naony intutuny oo mbartan, ometusulu ilo okedito embarta." 
Genesis49:18 Ekaanyu enjeunoto ino, iyie Olaitoriani." 
Genesis49:19 Kerasaki ilapurrok Gad, kake eibelekenyakino ninye ninche amir ninche." 
Genesis49:20 Ore enkop e Asheri naa keiu endaa sapuk, Naa keitayu ninye endaa nanya olkitok." 
Genesis49:21 Ore Naftali naa enkolii naipirri etalaayioki, neitayu ororei sidai." 
Genesis49:22 Ore Yosef naa olng'osila oiu ilng'anayio, olng'osila loo lng'anayio te nkong'u enkare; eibulaa ilng'osil lenyena esuntai." 
Genesis49:23 Earare ilang'orok loo mbaa ninye te ng'olon, neng'or ninye, neitagor ninye oleng;" 
Genesis49:24 Nemeing'unung'unieki hoo enkawuo enye, neitaariyiani inkaik enyena, inkaik Olmagilani le Yakobo (Te nkarna e ilo Shekut, Endapidapoi e Israel)" 
Genesis49:25 Te Nkai e papaai lino laa ninye likiret iyie, Te Nkai Magilani laa ninye likimayian iyie, Too mayianat e keper e shumata. Imayianat oo neegut nairrag tiabori, imayianat oo lki o ene ng'uset." 
Genesis49:26 Ore Imayianat e papaai lino naa Magil aalus too mayianat oo ldoinyo loo ntarasi, Ore nena tokitin sidain naaing'uaa ndoinyo oo ntarasi; metotonie ninche endukuya e Yosef, o emaupe eilo apa otoorori too lalashera lenyena." 
Genesis49:27 Ore Benchamen, naa osuyiani otang'arase, neyooki enasirie aar eng'ues, ore teipa neor iyarunot.”" 
Genesis49:28 Ore kulo pooki naa iloshon tomon oare le Israel; naa ina apa eitanapa menye pooki emayian ninye ninche, emayianaki pooki ng'ae emayianata naishiaakino ninye." 
Genesis49:29 Ina pee eitanap ninye ninche ejoki ninche, “Ore amu ekalo enetii iltung'ana lainei te keeya; etunukayioki tenebo iloo papa te nkapune natii enkurma e Efron le Hiti." 
Genesis49:30 Ina apune natii enkurma e Makpela, oloo saen le Mamre te nkop e Kanaan, nainyiang'ua apa Abraham tenebo ina kurma e Efron lo Lhiti aitaa enenye nanukarie iltung'ana lenyena." 
Genesis49:31 Teine apa etunukaitie ninche Abraham o Sara enkitok enye naa te ninye sii etunukayioki Isaak o Rebeka enkitok enye; naa teine sii atunukayie Lea. 
Genesis49:32 Ore ina kurma tenebo ina apune natii atua neinyang'uaki apa too Lhiti.” 
Genesis49:33 Ore pee eidip Yakobo aitanapa ilayiok lenyena, nerriny inkejek enyena endapash, neirurayie ina. Nepiki ninye eneiturrurrorre olorere lenye pooki." 
Genesis50:1 Ina pee ebatatakino Yosef enkomom e menye neishiraki ninye, neng'utut ninye." 
Genesis50:2 Neitanap Yosef isinkan lenyena lelo kitarrini meitobira osesen le papaai lenye pee mengueyu. Metaa eitobira ilkitarrini osesen le Israel pee mengueyu. 
Genesis50:3 Ewa enkielata inoshi ake olong'i artam naasieki ina siaai e nkitobirata o sesen. Neishiraki Ilmisiri ninye too nkolong'i ntomoni naapishana. 
Genesis50:4 Ore pee eishunye inkolong'i naaishirakinyeki ninye, neirorie Yosef olmarei pooki le Farao ejoki, “Ore taata tenanoto omom too nkonyek inyi eroro, atasayia intae entiaki Farao," 
Genesis50:5 aainosie apa papa olmumai aajoki, ‘Etaa kaye: te nkurare ai natuturoko kewan te nkop e Kanaan, ninye kinukarierie nanu.’ Metaa ore naa taata nchooki nanu mashomo atasayia ntae, pee alo anukaa papa, pee aitoki ashukunye.”" 
Genesis50:6 Newal Farao ajo, “Shomo, tunukai papaai lino anaa apa enikinosie olmumai.”" 
Genesis50:7 Metaa eshomo Yosef anukaa papaai lenye, neiriamarie ninye isinkan pooki le Farao, o lpayiani lo lmarei lenye pooki tenebo ilpayiani pooki le nkop e Misiri." 
Genesis50:8 Tenebo enkaji pooki e menye, o Yosef, o lalashera lenyena, o lmarei pooki le papaai lenye, nkera enye ake etung'uayioki o ntare, o nkishu te nkop e Goshen." 
Genesis50:9 Metaa eshomo tenebo ninye ingarrin oo mbartan o lakedok loo mbartan; metaa olorora kitok apa oleng. 
Genesis50:10 Ore pee ebau olkurroto oidong'ishoreki te wueji neji Atad natii oloo saen le Yordan, neishir teine olkiyioi sapuk le nkishirita o sina; neitobiraki Yosef enkishirata e papaai lenye too nkolong'i naapishana." 
Genesis50:11 Ore pee edol Ilkanaani aa ninche iloopeny ina kop enkishirata to lkurroto ooidongishoreki le Atad, nejo ninche, “Ore ena kishirata naa eno sina kitok too Lmisiri.” Metaa eishooki apa ine wueji enkarna aajo Abel-Misraim; naa dukuya e Yordan etii." 
Genesis50:12 Ina apa eitaasa ilayiok lenyena menye anaa enaitanapa ninche; 
Genesis50:13 amu etanapa apa ilayiok lenyena ninye aaya enkop e Kanaan, nenukaa ninye te nkapune natii enkurma e Makpela, natii oloo saen le Mamre, nainyiang'ua apa Abraham tenebo enkurma e Efron lo Lhiti, metaa ewueji enye oo nkuraren." 
Genesis50:14 Ore pee eidip atunukai papaai lenye, neshuko Yosef alo Misiri tenebo ilalashera lenyena o lelo pooki oiriamariyie ninye epuo aanukaa papaai lenye." 
Genesis50:15 Ore peyie edol ilalashera le Yosef aajo etua papaai lenye nejo ninche, “Ebaiki taa neibayu iyiook Yosef neitalak iyiook enapa lap nikintaasa iyiook ninye.”" 
Genesis50:16 Metaa eirriwaitie ninche olkilikuai aairriwaki Yosef ejoki, “Eishorua apa papaai lino ena kitanapata eton eitu eye ejo," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Entiaki Yosef, tapalaki, aatasayia enkitarruorroto oo lalashera linono o engoki enye, amu kintaasa ninche iyie entorroni.’ Ore naa taata, kisai iyie, tapalaki inkitadiaat oo sinkan le Nkai e papaai lino.” Neishir Yosef pee eirorie ninche ninye." 
Genesis50:18 Nepuonu ilalashera nebatata te dukuya ninye nejoki, “Ng'ura, aikira iyiook isinkan linono.”" 
Genesis50:19 Kake etiaka Yosef ninche, “Emiureishoyu, katii nanu ewueji e Nkai?" 
Genesis50:20 Ore te intae, naa entorroni apa kiyiewuakiki; kake eitaa ninye Enkai esidai, pee etum aitopuaa iltung'ana kumok anaa enatiu ena olong." 
Genesis50:21 Metaa emiureishoyu; kaisho intae eretoto tenebo o nkera inyi.” Neijia eikuna aitisipaki ninche neitagol ninche. 
Genesis50:22 Metaa etotona Yosef te Misiri, ninye tenebo olmarei le papaai lenye; nebik Yosef ilarin iip o tomon." 
Genesis50:23 Einepua Yosef adol eishoi o layioni lenye Efraim e uni, etodua sii inkera e Makir olayioni le Manase naatoikioki olmarei le Yosef." 
Genesis50:24 Nejoki Yosef ilalashera lenyena, “Etaa kaye, kake kelotu Enkai amutan intae, nelotu aitayu intae aitung'uaa ena kop arik intae enkop nainosakinye Abraham olmumai, o Isaak o Yakobo.”" 
Genesis50:25 Nenya Yosef olmumai too layiok le Israel ejoki, “Kemutan intae Enkai, naa entanap iloik lainei entung'uai ena kop.”" 
Genesis50:26 Metaa eirure Yosef, aa oloo larin iip o tomon te moruao; neitobir ninche osesen lenye pee mengueyu, nepiki osesen lenye osanduku te Misiri." 
Exodus1:1 Kuna inkarn oo layiok le Yakobo ooetuo apa Misiri te nebo ninye, oltung'ani ake o lmarei lenye:" 
Exodus1:2 Ruben o Simion o Lawi o Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Isakar o Sebulon o Benchamen," 
Exodus1:4 Dan o Naftali, Gad o Asheri." 
Exodus1:5 Ore eishoi pooki e Yakobo naa iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana; netii Yosef apa laa obo lenye ina kata Misiri. 
Exodus1:6 Neye Yosef o lalashera lenyena pooki, o ina ishoi pooki." 
Exodus1:7 Kake ore apa eishoi e Israel naa kebul oleng neponari aaku kumok; neponari ninche neaku olosho ogol; neaku ore ina kop ninche oobore. 
Exodus1:8 Neitokini aaput likae aiguanani te Misiri lemeyiolo Yosef. 
Exodus1:9 Nejoki ninye iltung'ana lenyena, “Ng'ura, eikumok oleng iltung'ana loo Siraeli, negol oleng te iyiook." 
Exodus1:10 Wootu, maing'uraki ninche olosek, pee mebul ake, pee te nelo ake nikitum olarrabal, neibung'are ilmang'ati lang neing'ar iyook paa keisik te nkop.”" 
Exodus1:11 Neaku kepik ilaitasheikinok ooitasheiki ninche pee eisilisil ninche te sinkaisho nagol; neshetaki Farao nkanas naashumishoreki naaji Pisom o Ramases. 
Exodus1:12 Kake ore anaa enaibookini ninche enkop, neponari neidapashakino enkop. Nejing iltung'ana le Misiri enkuretisho too ltung'ana loo Siraeli." 
Exodus1:13 Neaku eisho ninche iltung'ana loo Siraeli meisiaaisho to sina sapuk. 
Exodus1:14 Nepik enkishui enye emion te sinkaisho nagol, te nturoto o too soito, o too mpukunot pooki e siaai ti ong'ata; ore too siaitin enye pooki neisho ninche meisiaaisho te sinkaisho nagol." 
Exodus1:15 Neitoki ilo aiguanani le Misiri ajoki inkaitoyiok oo Lhebrania, aa keji nabo Shifra neji enkae Pua," 
Exodus1:16 “Ti nintoishosho nkituaak oo Lhebrania nidolidolo ina kata eisho, tenaa enkayioni niariara ninye metua; kake tenaa entito enchoo eton eishu.”" 
Exodus1:17 Kake keure apa nena aitoyiok Enkai, neitu eas anaa enaitanapa ninche olaiguanani le Misiri, kake eishoo inkayiok etoni eishu." 
Exodus1:18 Metaa eipoto olaiguanani le Misiri nena aitoyiok, nejoki ninche, “Kainyoo pee itaasa ena, ninchosho nkayiok eishu?”" 
Exodus1:19 Nejoki nena aitoyiok Farao, “Enkaraki nemetiu nkituaak oo Lhebrania anaa nkituaak oo Lmisiri; amu kegol nkituaak oo Lhebrania oishuaa, naa keisho eton eitu ebau enkaitoyioni.”" 
Exodus1:20 Neitaas Enkai esidai nena aitoyiok; neponari iltung'ana aagolu neaku kumok oleng. 
Exodus1:21 Ore enkaraki naure nena aitoyiok Enkai neisho ninche ilmareita. 
Exodus1:22 Neitoki Farao aitanap iltung'ana lenyena pooki ajo, “Ore pooki ayioni naini too Lhebrania ninang'akiki olkeju oji Nail, kake enchoo intoyie eishu.”" 
Exodus2:1 Nelo oltung'ani obo le nkaji e Lawi ayam entito e Lawi. 
Exodus2:2 Nenutayu ina kitok neiu enkayioni, ore ake pee edol ajo enkerai sidai, neisudoo ninye ilapaitin okuni." 
Exodus2:3 Ore ake pee eaku meekure eisudoroyu, neshetaki ninye enkikapu naitobiraki too seyia nemur te ntoki naji laam; nepik ninye enkerai atua paa kepik ina kikapu atua iseyia te mbata o lkeju." 
Exodus2:4 Neitashe enkanashe enye te nelakua, pee eyiolou enaitaasi ninye." 
Exodus2:5 Ore ina kata ake nelotu entito e Farao adou aisuja to lkeju, nepuonu nkaisiaayiak enyena te mbata o lkeju; nedol ninye enkikapu ti atua iseyia, neirriwaa enkaisiaayiani enye meyau." 
Exodus2:6 Ore ake pee ebol nedol enkerai, dol, eishirita ina looyo. Neing'urrie ninye nejo, “Enoo nkera oo Lhebrania ena.”" 
Exodus2:7 Nejoki enkanashe eina looyo enye entito e Farao, “Aalo aipotoki enkaibung'ani too nkituaak oo Lhebrania pee kintubulaki ena kerai?”" 
Exodus2:8 Nejoki entito e Farao ninye, “Shomo.” Nelo entito aipotu ng'otonye ina kerai." 
Exodus2:9 Nejoki entito e Farao ninye, “Iwa ina kerai, pee kintubulaki nanu, naa kaaisho nanu olekoisiaayio lino.” Neya ina kitok enkerai aitubulu." 
Exodus2:10 Nebulu ina kerai, neyau ninye ayaki entito e Farao, neaku ninye olayioni lenye, neipot enkarna enye ajo Musa, amu etejo, “Te nkaraki naitayio ninye ti atua ina are.”" 
Exodus2:11 Ore nabo olong, etubulua Musa, neipang alo enetii iltung'ana lenyena nedol enkiroishi e siaai nagol naasita. Neitoki adol Olmisiri earita Iheburaniai, obo loo ltung'ana lenyena." 
Exodus2:12 Neing'oring'orisho, ore ake pee edol ajo melio oltung'ani hoo obo, near ninye ilo Misiri metua nenukaa ti atua osinyai." 
Exodus2:13 Ore pee eitoki aipang likae kekun, ng'ura Ilhebrania aare oopupung'a; nejoki ninye ilo tung'ani oitarruoyie, “Kainyoo pee iar oltung'ani lo lorere lino?”" 
Exodus2:14 Nejoki ninye, “Kaing'ae likintaa iyie olkitok o larishani te iyiook? Ijo pee kiar nanu matua anaa enitaara Olmisiri metua?” Neirut Musa, nejo, “Esipa etayioloki ena bae.”" 
Exodus2:15 Ore pee ening Farao ina, neing'oru pee ear Musa metua. Kake eisika Musa ailany Farao, nebik te nkop e Midian neton te mbata e nchorro." 
Exodus2:16 Etii apa olapolosani le Midian oota isilan naapishana, nepuonu aaoku enkare neiput impeuti pee eitook ntare e menye." 
Exodus2:17 Nepuonu ilairritak loontare aaraa ninche, kake eitasho Musa aretu ninche, neitook ntare enye." 
Exodus2:18 Ore ake pee epuonu ninche enetii menye lenye Reul, nejoki ninye ninche, “Kaji taata eikununo pee ietuo aasieku?”" 
Exodus2:19 Nejo ninche, “Olmisiri oitajeuo iyiook too nkaik oo lchekuti o metooku ninye enkare neitook ntare.”" 
Exodus2:20 Nejoki ninye nena silan enyena, “Paa kaji etii ninye? Kainyoo pee itung'uaitie ilo tung'ani? Empoto ninye pee elotu ainos endaa.”" 
Exodus2:21 Nenyorraa Musa aton te nebo ilo tung'ani, neisho ninye Musa entito enye naji Sipora." 
Exodus2:22 Neiki ninye enkayioni, nejo ninye enkarna enye Gershom, amu etejo ninye, “Ara olomoni te nkop neme enaai.”" 
Exodus2:23 Ore etulusoitie ilarin ooikash, neye ilo aiguanani le Misiri. Neton ake eisomita iltung'ana loo Siraeli te sinkaisho enye, neyietu aaishiru eretoto; ore ilo kiyioi lenye le sinkaisho neilep enetii Enkai." 
Exodus2:24 Nening Enkai ilo somit lenye, nedamu Enkai olning'o lenye lo sotua o Abraham o Isaak, o tenebo Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Nedol Enkai iltungana le Israel, neyiolou Enkai empukunoto enye." 
Exodus3:1 Eing'orita apa Musa ntare o laputani lenye oji Yesro, laa olapolosani le Midian, nerikoo eluaata enye aipirie enkalo o loontoluo le Midian, nelotu ewueji neji Horeb ilo doinyo le Nkai." 
Exodus3:2 Neipang'aki ninye olmalaika le Nkai to lng'ejep le nkima opuku te mpolos o sanag, neing'or, naa ng'ura, eyupuyupito osanag, neitu emut enkima." 
Exodus3:3 Nejo Musa, “Ekaibelekenya aing'or ena pukunoto e nking'asia kitok, inchere kainyoo pee eitu enya enkima ilo sanag.”" 
Exodus3:4 Ore ake pee edol Olaitoriani ajo eibelekenye aing'or, neipot Enkai ninye ti atua empolos o sanag, nejo, “Musa, Musa!” Nejo ninye, “Nele nanu.”" 
Exodus3:5 Neitoki ninye ajoki, “Milotu anyiku, intayu inamuka inono too nkejek inono, amu ore ine wueji nintasheyie naa ewueji nesinya.”" 
Exodus3:6 Neitoki ajo, “Ara nanu Enkai e papa lino, Enkai e Abraham, Enkai e Isak o Enkai e Yakobo.” Neisudoo Musa enkomom enye amu keure aing'ura Enkai." 
Exodus3:7 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajo, “Atoduaa osomit loo ltung'ana laainei ootii Misiri, natoning'o olkiyioi lenye te nkaraki ilaitasheikinok lenye; ayiolo olosilisili lenye," 
Exodus3:8 naewuo nanu adou pee aitajeu ninche metupuku aing'uaa enkaina oo ltung'ana le Misiri, nayau ailepunye ninche metupuku aing'uaa ina kop nepuonu enkop sidai nalala naruko inaishi o kule, aapuo ewueji oo Lkanaani, o Lhiti, Ilamori, Ilperesi, Ilhifi o Lyebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Ore taata, ng'ura eewuo olkiyioi loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli enatii, natodua enkibookinoto e nkop naibookito iltung'ana le Misiri ninche." 
Exodus3:10 Wou, amu kaairriwaa nanu iyie enetii Farao, pee itum ashomo aitayu iltung'ana laainei, lelo ayiok loo Siraeli, metupuku aing'uaa Misiri.”" 
Exodus3:11 Kake etiaaka Musa Enkai, “Kara nanu ng'ae olo enetii Farao, nayau ilayiok loo Siraeli aaitung'uaa Misiri?”" 
Exodus3:12 Nejo ninye, “Ekaaku te nebo iyie, naa ena nalo aaku olmonekie te iyie, nchere aairriwayie: ore ake pee indip aitupuku iltung'ana aitung'uai Misiri naa ipuonunu aaisiaai Enkai tele doinyo.”" 
Exodus3:13 Neitoki Musa ajoki Enkai, “Amaa te nalotu enetii iltung'ana loo Siraeli najoki ninche ‘Aairriwua nanu Enkai oo loo papaai linyi maeu enitii ntae’; naaikilikuan ninche aajoki, ‘Keji ng'ae enkarna enye?’ Kaa ajoki ninche?”" 
Exodus3:14 Nejoki Enkai Musa, “ARA NANU ILO ORA.” Neitoki ajo, “Tiaaki ena iltung'ana loo Siraeli, ‘ARA NANU laairriwua nanu enitii.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Neitoki Enkai ajoki Musa, “Tiaaki ena iltung'ana loo Siraeli, ‘Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi, Enkai e Abraham, Enkai e Isaak o Enkai e Yakobo naairriwua nanu enitii’ ena enkarna ai ntarasi, naa ninye aadamunye iishoritin pooki." 
Exodus3:16 Shomo inturrurro ilpayiani loo Siraeli te nebo, nijoki ninche, Aaipang'aka nanu Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi Enkai e Abraham, o ene Isaak, o ene Yakobo, ejo, Atisipua intae o ina naitaasaki intae te Misiri;" 
Exodus3:17 naa kamut nchere kayau intae ailepunye aaitung'uaa osina le Misiri, aapuonu enkop o Lkanaani, Ilhiti, Ilamori, Ilperesi, Ilhifi te nebo o Lyebusi, enkop naruko kule o naishi.”" 
Exodus3:18 Naa kenyoraa ninche ina nijoki; nilo iyie o lpayiani loo Siraeli enetii olaiguanani le Misiri nijokiki ninye, Enotore iyiook Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Lhebrania; ore taata nikiomon iyie, nchoo iyiook maape nkolong'i uni ong'ata, pee kitum aatopolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai ang." 
Exodus3:19 Ayiolo ajo meisho ntae olaiguanani le Misiri ipuopuo meteleku ake te nkaraki enkaina naata enkidimata naas ti atua ninye; ore te siadi ina niyaya karsisisho e Misiri. 
Exodus3:20 Metaa kaitorioo nanu enkaina ai aosh Misiri too mbaa pooki e nkingasia nalo nanu aas teine, ore te siadi ina naa kaisho intae enchom." 
Exodus3:21 “Naa kaisho nanu kulo tungana omom too nkonyek oo Lmisiri, naa ore tenipuopuo, nimipuopuo too nkaik naarook." 
Exodus3:22 Kake ore pooki kitok neomon ene latia enye, oina naboitare tiaji, imasaa e nkosholai o sahabu, o nkilani, nipik ninche ilayiok linono o ntoyie inono, ore teina niyaya karsisisho e Misiri.”" 
Exodus4:1 Neitoki Musa awalu, nejo, “Ng'ura, maairuk ninche nanu aashu ening enajoki, amu kejo ninche, ‘Eitu kimpang'aki iyie Olaitoriani.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Kainyoo ina nimbung'ita te nkaina?” Nejoki ninye, “Eng'udi.”" 
Exodus4:3 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Tanang'aki enkop.” Nenang'aki enkop, neaku ina ng'udi olasurai; neipirri Musa ailany." 
Exodus4:4 Kake etiaaka Olaitoriani Musa, “Ntorioi enkaina ino mbung'a olkidong'oe.” [Neitorioo enkaina enye neibung, neitoki aaku eng'udi te nkaina enye]." 
Exodus4:5 “Pee etum aairuko nchere Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo menye, Enkai e Abraham, Enkai e Isaak o Enkai e Yakobo nikimpang'aka iyie.”" 
Exodus4:6 Neitoki ajoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Tipika enkaina ino olgoo lino.” Nepik ninye enkaina enye olgoo lenye; ore pee eitayu, ng'ura, etijing'a enkaina enye enkeeya oo lbolot, neibor anaa enturoto." 
Exodus4:7 Neitoki Enkai ajo, “Nyaaki tipika enkaina ino atua olgoo lino.” Neitoki ninye apik enkaina enye atua olgoo lenye; ore ake pee eitayu, ng'ura eitotiwuoki anaa osesen lenye pooki." 
Exodus4:8 Nejo Enkai, “Naa ti nimikiruk ninche, arashu te nemenyorraa enkitoduaata e dukuya, neidim ninche aairuko ina kitoduaata e are." 
Exodus4:9 Ore pe meiruk ninche ebaiki nena kitoduaat pokira arashu ening enijoki, niya iyie enkare to lkeju le Nail nilo abukoki enkop natoyio; ore ina are nilo aya to lkeju le Nail naa keaku osarge ti oriong enkop natoyio.”" 
Exodus4:10 Kake etiaaka Musa Olaitoriani, “Olaitoriani lai, mara nanu oltung'ani arriyia te nkiguana, arashu ebaiki ena kata pee irorie osinka lino; kake kaimalees te nkiroroto na kaasha sii olng'ejep.”" 
Exodus4:11 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki ninye, “Kaing'ae oitobira enkutuk e tung'ani oitiming'an te nkiroroto o te ning'oto, aashu oitodolisho aashu aitamodok? Aime nanu, Olaitoriani ake?" 
Exodus4:12 Shomo naa taata, naa kaaku nanu te nebo enkutuk ino naaitayiolo enijo.”" 
Exodus4:13 Kake etiaka ninye, “Oi, Olaitoriani lai, aatoomono, irriwai likae tung'ani.”" 
Exodus4:14 Neyupuyup engoro e Nkai te nkaraki Musa neitoki ajo, “Aimetii Aron ilo alashe lino loo Lawi? Ayiolo ajo keidim airoro aituana naa ng'ura, elotu ninye pee kinang'are, naa ore pee kidol ninye neshipayu to ltau lenye." 
Exodus4:15 Nirorie iyie ninye nipik irorei enkutuk enye, naa kaitaarriyian nanu enkutuk ino o enkutuk enye naaitayiolo iyie eniaas." 
Exodus4:16 Keirorie ninye iltung'ana te rishata ino, neaku ninye enkutuk te iyie, nitiu te ninye anaa Enkai." 
Exodus4:17 Naa iya te nkaina ino ena ng'udi, naa ninye iasie nkitoduaat.”" 
Exodus4:18 Nerrinyo Musa alo ashuko enetii Yesero olaputani lenye, nejoki ninye, “Aatoomono, nchooki nanu mashomo ashuko, pee ashukokino iltung'ana lang ootii Misiri pee adol tenaa keton eishu.” Nejoki Yesero Musa, “Shomo te seriani.”" 
Exodus4:19 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa te Midian, “Shomo tushukoyu Misiri; amu ore iltung'ana pooki apa ooing'oru enkishui ino netuata.”" 
Exodus4:20 Nedumu Musa enkitok enye o layiok lenyena nepik osikiria, nelo ashuko enkop e Misiri; naa ore te nkaina enye neya Musa eng'udi e Nkai." 
Exodus4:21 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ore irrinyo alo Misiri, toduaa nchere itaasa te dukuya Farao nena pooki enking'asia natipika nanu engolon ina kake kaitagol nanu oltau lenye, pee meisho ninye iltung'ana meshomo." 
Exodus4:22 Naa ilo ajoki Farao, Etejo Olaitoriani inchere, ore Israel naa olkikau lai," 
Exodus4:23 naajoki naa iyie, Nchoo olayioni lai elo pee aatum aisiaayia nanu. Ti nimitiki ninye elo naar nanu ilo kikau lino metua.”" 
Exodus4:24 Ore te ine wueji neirraga te nkoitoi nenang'are Olaitoriani ninye nejo aar ninye metua. 
Exodus4:25 Neitayu Sipora olmurunya nedung'u isuaaten oo layiok lenyena amurat paa keelie nkejek e Musa, nejo," 
Exodus4:26 “Esipa ira olayamisho lo sarge te nkaraki emuratare.” 
Exodus4:27 Nejoki Olaitoriani Aron, “Shomo ong'ata tanang'are Musa.” Nelo ninye nenang'are ninye to ldoinyo le Nkai neng'utut ninye." 
Exodus4:28 Neliki Musa Aron irorei pooki lo Laitoriani laa ninche eirriunye ninye, o nkitoduaat pooki naaitanapa ninye metaasa." 
Exodus4:29 Nelo Musa o Aron aaiturrur te nebo ilpayiani loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli. 
Exodus4:30 Neliki Aron ninche irorei pooki ootiaaka Olaitoriani Musa, neas nkitoduaat te dukuya iltung'ana." 
Exodus4:31 Neiruk iltung'ana; ore ake pee ening nchere etumutana Olaitoriani iltung'ana loo Siraeli netoduaa osina lenye, neirrug ninche ilukuny enye aaserem." 
Exodus5:1 Ore te siadi ina nelo Musa o Aron enetii Farao nejoki, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli, ‘Nchoo iltung'ana laainei epuo, pee aatum aaitaiki osirua ti ong'ata.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Kake etejo Farao, “Kaing'ae Olaitoriani, laidim nanu atoning'o oltoilo lenye naisho Isiraeli epuo.”" 
Exodus5:3 Nejo ninche, “Enotore iyiook Enkai oo Lhebrania; nchoo iyiook maape, kitoomono iyie, maape elototo oo nkolong'i uni ti ong'ata pee kipolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai, mear ake iyiook to lmeitai aashu to lalem.”" 
Exodus5:4 Nejoki ninche olaiguanani le Misiri, “Musa o Aron, kainyoo pee iyaya iltung'ana aaitung'uaa esiaai enye? Entorrinyoto enchom isiaaitin inyi.”" 
Exodus5:5 Neitoki Farao ajo, “Ng'ura, ajo aikumok taata kulo tung'ana tena kop niyeng'iyeng'ie iyie ninche too siaitin enye!”" 
Exodus5:6 Ore te ina olong ake neitanap Farao ilaitasheikinok le siaai o lkituaak le siai," 
Exodus5:7 “Mintokiki ae kata aaisho iltung'ana olkujita oitayunye ilmatofali anaa oshi eninkoko; enchoo ninche epuo aasotu olkujita maate. 
Exodus5:8 Ore esiana oo lmatofali apa naitayu enchoo eaku lelo ake, emintong'oriki ninche, amu aiturua ninche; neaku keishir, ‘Nchoo iyiook maape aaitaiki Enkai ang olasar.’" 
Exodus5:9 Nchoo esiaai nagol oleng eiteeki iltung'ana, pee etum aataasisho nemeitoki aainining lelo rorei le lejare.”" 
Exodus5:10 Neaku eshomo lelo aitasheikinok o ilkituaak le siaai nejoki iltung'ana, “Ejo Farao nji, ‘Maisho nanu ntae olkujita." 
Exodus5:11 Enchom maate, eyau olkujita linyi te wueji neba anaa enitumiemie; kake ore esiaai meitong'ori hoo ninye peno.’ ”" 
Exodus5:12 Neidapashakino iltung'ana enkop pooki e Misiri aasotu suut aaitaa olkujita. 
Exodus5:13 Netem apa lelo aitasheikinok aarrumoki ninche esiaai, ejoki, “Entabai esiaai inyi, e anaake, anaa apa eetae olkujita.”" 
Exodus5:14 Ore ilkituaak loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, laa ninche etipika ilaitasheikinok le Farao meitasheiki ninche, neari, neikilikuani aajoki, “Kainyoo pee eitu iasiasa esiaai inyi aaitobir ilmatofali taata anaa apa?”" 
Exodus5:15 Nepuonu lelo kituaak loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli aaishiraki Farao, “Kainyoo pee intaas iyiook, isinkan linono, ena?" 
Exodus5:16 Meetae olkujita ooishooki isinkan linono, ore ake eyia, nejoki ninche iyiook, ‘Entobira ilmatofali!’ Naa ng'ura earitae isinkan linono, kake ore enkitarruoroto netii atua iltung'ana linono ake.”" 
Exodus5:17 Nejo ninye, “Irara turua, irara turua, neaku ijojo, ‘Nchoo iyiook maape aapolosaki Olaitoriani.’" 
Exodus5:18 Enchom taata, naa entaasisho; amu meetae olkujita oishori intae, ore ake eyia, niyauu enoshi ake siana oo lmatofali.”" 
Exodus5:19 Nedol ilkituaak loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli aajo etii ninche erishata torrono, ina kata pee ejo ninche, “Meitong'ori hoo ninye peno esiana oo lmatofali linyi lintayuyu anaake.”" 
Exodus5:20 Netumore ninche Musa o Aron, eanyita apa ninche, epuku aaing'ua enetii Farao." 
Exodus5:21 Nejoki ninche, “Nchoo eing'or ntae Olaitoriani neiguanare, amu intaa ntae iyiook ilarruok te dukuya Farao o laisiaayiak lenyena, nitipika olalem enkaina enye pee ear iyiook matuata.”" 
Exodus5:22 Neitoki Musa aibelekenyakino Olaitoriani nejo, “Olaitoriani, kainyoo pee kintasima airriu nanu?" 
Exodus5:23 Amu ore anaa nalotu enetii Farao airo te nkarna ino, neitaasa ninye ntorrok kulo tung'ana, neitu iyie intajeu iltung'ana linono tukul.”" 
Exodus6:1 Kake etiaka Olaitoriani Musa, “Idol taata iyie ina naitaas Farao; amu te nkaina nagol eisho ninche meshomo, ee te nkaina nagol earaa ninche meshomo aaing'uaa enkop enye.”" 
Exodus6:2 Neitoki Enkai ajoki Musa, “Ara Olaitoriani." 
Exodus6:3 Aipang'aka apa Abraham, o Isaak, o Yakobo anaa Enkai Magilani, kake ore te nkarna ai naji Olaitoriani eitu aitayiolo ninche." 
Exodus6:4 Aitobirua sii osotua lai o ninche, pee aisho ninche enkop e Kanaan, enkop apa natobikie aa lomon." 
Exodus6:5 Ore ake eyia natoning'o osina loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli ooitaa Lmisiri isinkan natadamua naa ilo ning'o lai. 
Exodus6:6 Tiaaki naa iltung'ana loo Siraeli, ‘Ara nanu Olaitoriani, naa kayau nanu ntae aitung'uaa esinkaisho enye, naa kalaku nanu ntae te nkaina naitoriori o too nkiasin sapuki e nkiguana." 
Exodus6:7 Naya nanu ntae aitaa iltung'ana laainei, naaku nanu Enkai inyi, naa iyiolouu ntae aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, naa ninye nayaua ntae aitung'uaa abori ilolan le sinkaisho oo Lmisiri." 
Exodus6:8 Naa kayau nanu ntae atua enkop apa nainosa olmumai ajo kaisho Abraham, o Isaak, o Yakobo; kaisho nanu ntae metaa eninyi enkorrok. Ara nanu Olaitoriani.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Neliki Musa iltung'ana loo Siraeli nena, kake eitu ninche ening Musa nkaraki iltauja lenye oitingo osiligi te sinkaisho enye eng'ogong'i." 
Exodus6:10 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Exodus6:11 “Shomo tijing'aki Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, tiaaki meishoo iltung'ana loo Siraeli meipang'a aapuo te nkop enye.”" 
Exodus6:12 Nejoki Musa Olaitoriani, “Ng'ura, eitu ninche aaning nanu iltung'ana loo Siraeli; kaji naa eiko te naaning nanu Farao, nara oltung'ani leme arriyia te nkiroroto?”" 
Exodus6:13 Kake eirorie Olaitoriani Musa o Aron, neisho ninche enkitanapata nayaki iltung'ana loo Siraeli o Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, pee eriku iltung'ana loo Siraeli aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri." 
Exodus6:14 Kuna ninche lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye: ilayiok le Ruben, olkikau le Israel; Hanok, Palu, Hesron, o Karmi, kulo ninche ilmareita le Ruben." 
Exodus6:15 Ilayiok le Simion: Yemuel, Yamin, Ohad, Yakin, Sohar, o Shaul, olayioni le nkitok oo Lkanaani; kulo ninche ilmareita le Simion." 
Exodus6:16 Kuna ninche nkarn oo layiok le Lawi te risioroto oo ishoritin enye: Gershon, Kohas, o Merari, ore larin le nkishui e Lawi naa ilarin iip o tomoni uni o oopishana." 
Exodus6:17 Ilayiok le Geshom: Libni o Shimei, too lmareita lenye." 
Exodus6:18 Ilayiok le Kohas: Amram, Ishar, Hebron o Usiel, era ilarin le nkishui e Kohas iip o tomoni uni o okuni." 
Exodus6:19 Ilayiok le Merari: Mahali o Mushi. Kulo ninche ilmareita loo le Lawi te risioroto oo ishoritin enye. 
Exodus6:20 Ewa Amram Yokobet ayam enkanashe e menye neiki ninye Aron o Musa, era ilarin le nkishui e Amram iip o tomoni uni o oopishana." 
Exodus6:21 Ilayiok le Ishar: Kora, Nefeg o Sichri." 
Exodus6:22 O layiok le Usiel: Mishael, Elsafan o Sisri." 
Exodus6:23 Neya Aron ayam Elisheba, entito e Aminadab naa enkanashe e Nashon; neiki ninye Nadab o Abihu o Eliesa te nebo Isamar." 
Exodus6:24 Ore ilayiok le Kora naa Alir o Elkana te nebo Abiasaf; kulo ninche ilmareita loo Lkorati. 
Exodus6:25 Neya Eliesa, olayioni le Aron, ayam entito nabo oo ntoyie e Putiel; neiki ninye Finihas. Kuna ninche lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye oo Lawi too lmareita lenye." 
Exodus6:26 Kulo lelo, Aron o Musa, laa ninche etiaka Olaitoriani, “Entayu iltung'ana loo Siraeli metupuku aaing'uaa enkop e Misiri too lororani lenye.”" 
Exodus6:27 Ninche apa ooirorie Farao olaiguanani le Misiri eimaki enkitayunoto oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli metung'uai Misiri, kulo lelo Musa o Aron." 
Exodus6:28 Ore te ina olong neirorie Olaitoriani Musa te nkop e Misiri," 
Exodus6:29 nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ara nanu Olaitoriani; tiaaki Farao olaiguanani le Misiri nena pooki naatiaka.”" 
Exodus6:30 Nejoki Musa Olaitoriani, “Ng'ura, ara nanu oleme arriyia te nkiroroto, kaji naa eiko Farao te naaning?”" 
Exodus7:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Toduaaki maaitotiu anaa Enkai te Farao neaku Aron olalashe lino oloiboni lino." 
Exodus7:2 Ilo iyie airo nena pooki naaitanapa; ore Aron olalashe lino nejoki Farao meishoo iltung'ana loo Siraeli meshomo aaing'uaa enkop enye. 
Exodus7:3 Kake kaitagol oltau le Farao, naa ore hoo tenaponaa nkitoduaat aainei o mbaa e nking'asia te nkop e Misiri," 
Exodus7:4 mikining iyie Farao; naitoki nanu aiteleiki enkaina ai shumata Misiri naitayu olorora lai, iltung'ana laainei lelo ayiok loo Siraeli, metupuku aaing'uaa Misiri too nkiasin sapuki e nkiguana." 
Exodus7:5 Neyiolou Ilmisiri aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani te naitorioo enkaina ai te shumata Misiri naitayu iltung'ana loo Siraeli metupuku ti atua ninche.” 
Exodus7:6 Neas Musa o Aron ina, neas anaa enaitanapa ninche Olaitoriani." 
Exodus7:7 Ore Musa naa oloo larin ntomoni isiet ore Aron naa oloo larin ntomoni isiet o okuni ina kata pee eirorie ninche Farao. 
Exodus7:8 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Exodus7:9 “Enchoo ake pee ejoki ntae Farao, ‘Entisipa ate te asata o lbulabuli,’ nijoki Aron, ‘Tudumu ina ng'udi ino tanang'aki enkop te dukuya Farao, pee etum ataa olasurai.’ ”" 
Exodus7:10 Nelo Musa o Aron enetii Farao neas anaa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani; nenang'aki Aron ina ng'udi enye enkop te dukuya Farao o sinkan lenyena, neaku ina ng'udi olasurai." 
Exodus7:11 Neipot Farao ilang'eni lenyena o lasakutok; ore sii ninche, lelo ang'eni le tung'ana le Misiri, neas ina te sakutore enye." 
Exodus7:12 Amu etanang'aka pooki tung'ani eng'udi enye enkop, neaku ilasuriaa. Kake etoijoyie eng'udi e Aron ing'udisin enye." 
Exodus7:13 Neton ake eitagoloki oltau le Farao, nemening ninye ninche anaa enatejo Olaitoriani." 
Exodus7:14 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Eitagoloki oltau le Farao, pee meisho ninye iltung'ana meshomo." 
Exodus7:15 Shomo enetii Farao tadekenya, ina kata elo enkare; taanyu ninye te ngilata o lkeju niya iyie te nkaina ino ina ng'udi apa naibelekenya aaku olasurai." 
Exodus7:16 Nijoki iyie ninye, ‘Airriwua nanu Olaitoriani enitii, Enkai o Lhebrania ejo, Nchoo iltung'ana laainei epuo, pee aatum aaisiaayia ti ong'ata; naa ng'ura, eton ake eitu iruk." 
Exodus7:17 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Tena iyie iyiolou ajo ara nanu Olaitoriani: ng'ura, ekaosh nanu enkare natii atua olkeju le Nail tena ng'udi naata te nkaina ai, naa keibelekenya aaku osarge." 
Exodus7:18 Neye isinkir ootii atua olkeju le Nail neng'ueyu ilo keju le Nail.’” 
Exodus7:19 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Tiaaki Aron, ‘Tudumu eng'udi ino nintorioo enkaina ino ti oriong nkariak e Misiri, ti oriong ilkejek lenye, o erat lenye, o mugurri enye o lchorroi lenye, pooki loo nkariak, pee etum aataa osarge, neaku osarge te nkop pooki e Misiri too oketa oo nkeek o too oketa oo soito.’ ”" 
Exodus7:20 Neas Musa o Aron anaa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani; ore te dukuya Farao o te dukuya ilaisiaayiak lenyena, neilepie ninye eng'udi neosh ina are apa natii atua olkeju le Nail; ore ina are pooki apa natii atua olkeju le Nail newala ina are pooki apa natii atua olkeju le Nail aaku osarge." 
Exodus7:21 Neye isinkir ootii atua olkeju le Nail; neng'ueyu olkeju le Nail o metaa meidim Ilmisiri aatook enkare naing'uaa olkeju le Nail; neaku osarge te nkop pooki e Misiri. 
Exodus7:22 Kake etaasa sii ninche ilasakutok le Misiri ina te sakutore enye; neton ake egol oltau le Farao, nemening ninye ninche anaa enatejo Olaitoriani." 
Exodus7:23 Neibelekenya Farao nelo atua enkaji enye, neitu duoo ninye epik ena oltau ashilaa." 
Exodus7:24 Netur Ilmisiri pooki mbat o lkeju le Nail aaing'oru enkare naok, amu meidim aatook enkare e ilo keju le Nail." 
Exodus7:25 Nelusoo nkolong'i naapishana anaa pee eosh Olaitoriani olkeju le Nail. 
Exodus8:1 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Shomo tijing'aki Farao nijoki ninye, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Nchoo iltung'ana laainei epuo peyie aatum aaisiaayia." 
Exodus8:2 Kake ti niany iyie incho ninche epuo, ng'ura naar enkop ino pooki too ntuaan." 
Exodus8:3 Neboreyu olkeju le Nail te nena tuaan naapuonu tiatua enkaji ino, o atua olgilata lino oirragi o enchumata endapash ino, o atua nkajijik oo laisiaayiak linono o noo ltung'ana linono, o ine wueji neyierishoreki o ngirran inono naaipurjishoreki." 
Exodus8:4 Eikipuonu nena tuaan aaked iyie, o ltung'ana linono o sinkan linono.’”" 
Exodus8:5 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Tiaaki Aron, ‘Ntorioi enkaina ino o eng'udi ino te shumata oo lkejek, o te shumata oo erat, o te shumata oo lturot, nchoo ntuaan meetu enkop e Misiri!’ ”" 
Exodus8:6 Neitorioo Aron enkaina enye tioriong nkariak e Misiri, neilepu ntuaan neiput enkop e Misiri." 
Exodus8:7 Neas ilasakutok anaa ina te sakutore enye, neyau ntuaan oriong enkop e Misiri."
