Exodus8:8 Neitoki Farao aipot Musa o Aron nejoki, “Entoomon Olaitoriani meiwuang'ie ntuaan maatung'uai nanu o ltung'ana laainei; naa kaisho nanu iltung'ana epuo aapolosaki Olaitoriani.”" 
Exodus8:9 Nejoki Musa Farao, “Tiaakaki ake duoo iyie anaa eniyieu, kanu iyieu naaomonoki, o laisiaayiak linono o ltung'ana linono, peyie emuti ntuaan te iyie, o too nkajijik inono metaa olkeju le Nail ake etii.”" 
Exodus8:10 Nejoki ninye, “Taisere.” Nejo Musa, “Metotiwuo anaa ina nitejo, peyie iyiolouu aajo metii likae onyaanyukie Olaitoriani Enkai ang." 
Exodus8:11 Eikipuo ntuaan aaing'uaa iyie o nkajijik inono o laisiaayiak linono o ltung'ana linono; neaku to lkeju ake le Nail eing'uari.” 
Exodus8:12 Neipang Musa o Aron aapuo aaing'uaa Farao, neishiraki Musa Olaitoriani te nkaraki ntuaan, anaa enatoning'okinote o Farao." 
Exodus8:13 Neas Olaitoriani te risioroto ororei le Musa, neye ntuaan too nkajijik o too ndung'orot o too nkong'at." 
Exodus8:14 Neiturrur ninche too olchalai neing'usilu enkop. 
Exodus8:15 Kake ore ake peyie edol Farao ajo eikasha enkop, neitagol oltau lenye, nemening ninye; anaa enatejo Olaitoriani." 
Exodus8:16 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Tiaaki Aron, ‘Ntorioi eng'udi ino toosho enterit e nkop, peyie eaku enkojong'ani te nkop pooki e Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus8:17 Neiko ninche neijia; neitorioo Aron enkaina enye o eng'udi enye neosh enterit e nkop, nelotu enkojong'ani ajing'aki tung'ani o eng'ues; neaku enterit pooki e nkop enkojong'ani te nkop pooki e Misiri." 
Exodus8:18 Netem ilang'eni le tung'ana te ng'eno enye aayau enkojong'ani eitu eidim. Neaku keetae enkojong'ani te pooki tung'ani o te pooki ng'ues. 
Exodus8:19 Nejoki ilang'eni le tung'ana Farao, “Olkimojino le Nkai ele.” Kake eitogoloki oltau le Farao neaku mening ninche; anaa enatejo apa Olaitoriani." 
Exodus8:20 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Tayooki inyo tadekenya taanyu Farao elotu enetii enkare, nijoki ninye, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Nchoo iltung'ana laainei epuo peyie aatum aaisiaayia nanu." 
Exodus8:21 Naa, ti nimincho iltung'ana laainei epuo, ng'ura, naaitame airriwaki iyie emus oo lojong'a o laisiaayiak linono, o ltung'ana linono, o atua nkajijik inono, neiput inkajijik oo le Misiri emus oo lojong'a, o ina kop naitasheyie ninche." 
Exodus8:22 Kake ore te ina olong naoru enkop e Goshen, naa ninye etonie iltung'ana laainei, metaa mejing emus oo lojong'a ine, peyie iyiolou nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani otii empolos e nkop." 
Exodus8:23 Metaa kaoru nanu ltung'ana laainei o ltung'ana linono. Taisere eaku ele monekie.’” 
Exodus8:24 Neiko neijia Olaitoriani; nelotu emus kitok oo lojong'a atua enkaji e Farao o atua nkajijik oo laisiaayiak lenyena; ore atua enkop pooki e Misiri nerruoyo enkop te nkaraki oo lojong'a. 
Exodus8:25 Neitoki Farao aipot Musa o Aron nejoki, “Enchom, entopolosaki Enkai inyi tiatua ena kop.”" 
Exodus8:26 Kake etiaaka Musa, “Meishiaakino ti nikiaas ina; amu eikipolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai ang ilasarri ooitagor Ilmisiri. Amaa ti nikipolos ilasarri ooitagor Ilmisiri te dukuya nkonyek enye, aimear iyiook too soito?" 
Exodus8:27 Eikipuo elototo oo nkolong'i uni ti ong'ata peyie kipolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai anaa enaitanap iyiook.” 
Exodus8:28 Nejo Farao, “Ekaisho intae enchom peyie ipolosakiki Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ti ong'ata; kake mipuopuo aalamari oleng. Entoomonokoki.”" 
Exodus8:29 Neitoki Musa ajoki, “Ng'ura, kaaipang alo aing'uaa naa kaaomonoki to Laitoriani peyie elo emus oo lojong'a aing'uaa Farao, neing'uaa ilaisiaayiak lenyena, neing'uaa iltung'ana lenyena taisere; enyor ake nemeitoki Farao alej iyiook, amitiki iltung'ana meshomo aapolosaki Olaitoriani.”" 
Exodus8:30 Nelo Musa aing'uaa Farao, neomon Olaitoriani." 
Exodus8:31 Neas Olaitoriani anaa enaikilikuanua Musa, neiwuang'ie ina mus oo lojong'a te Farao, o too laisiaayiak lenyena o too ltung'ana lenyena; eitu eing'uari obo." 
Exodus8:32 Kake eitagolo ake sii Farao oltau lenye tena kata, neitu eisho iltung'ana meshomo." 
Exodus9:1 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Shomo tijing'aki Farao, nijoki ninye, Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Lhebrania, ‘Nchoo iltung'ana laainei epuo, peyie aatum aaisiaayia." 
Exodus9:2 Amu ti niany iyie incho ninche epuo niton aibok ninche," 
Exodus9:3 ng'ura, nedoiki intae enkaina o Laitoriani olmeitai torrono nkishu inyi naatii ong'ata, mbartan, isirkon, ntamesin, iluaat oo nkishu o luaat oo ntare." 
Exodus9:4 Nerish Olaitoriani nkishu oo Siraeli o nkishu e Misiri, metaa meye hoo toki te nena pooki naara inoo ltung'ana loo Siraeli." 
Exodus9:5 Nedung'u Olaitoriani enkata, ejo Taaisere eas Olaitoriani ena bae ti atua ena kop.’”" 
Exodus9:6 Ore ake peyie ekenyu neas Olaitoriani ena bae; neye nkishu pooki oo Lmisiri, kake ore nkishu oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli eitu ninye eye nabo." 
Exodus9:7 Neirriwaa Farao olkilikuai, naa ng'ura, eitu ninye eye hoo nabo oo nkishu oo Siraeli. Kake eitagoloki oltau le Farao, neitu ninye eisho iltung'ana meshomo." 
Exodus9:8 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron, “Entayutu mboreitin oo nkaik oo nkurruon to lkokuet, ninchosho Musa metanang'aki shumata te dukuya Farao." 
Exodus9:9 Naa keaku enterit napuyiapui te nkop pooki e Misiri, neaku iltuduta ooiwotiota aaku mpaldakani te tung'ani o te ng'ues te nkop pooki e Misiri.”" 
Exodus9:10 Neitayu ninche nkurruon to lkokuet, neitashe te dukuya Farao, nenang'aa Musa aipirie shumata, neaku iltuduta ooiwotiota aaku mpaldakani torrok te tung'ani o te ng'ues." 
Exodus9:11 Neitu eidimu lelo ang'eni le tung'ana oitasheito te dukuya Musa te nkaraki iltuduta, amu etijing'a iltuduta lelo ang'eni le tung'ana loo Lmisiri pooki." 
Exodus9:12 Kake eitagolo Olaitoriani oltau le Farao, neitu ninye ening ninche anaa enairorie Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus9:13 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Tayooki inyo tadekenya shomo ntasho te dukuya Farao nijoki ninye, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Lhebrania, Nchoo iltung'ana laainei epuo, peyie aatum aaisiaayia nanu." 
Exodus9:14 Amu ore ena kata naa kairriwaki ilmeita laainei pooki meetu oltau lino, o laisiaayiak linono peyie itum atayiolo ajo metii likae laanyaanyukie te nkop pooki." 
Exodus9:15 Amu ore taata anaata atudumua enkaina ai naaosh iyie o ltung'ana linono to lmeitai naa anaata kiwuang'ieki aaitung'uaa enkop. 
Exodus9:16 Kake te nkaraki ena aatapala inchu, peyie aaitodol iyie engolon ai peyie eibalunyeki enkarna ai te nkop pooki." 
Exodus9:17 Eton ake ijukaa kewan too ltung'ana laainei, nimincho ninche meshomo." 
Exodus9:18 Ng'ura ore taisere tena saa naitasha enchan oo soito neitu ae kata etumi te Misiri ebaiki apa peyie eiteruni o metabaiki taata. 
Exodus9:19 Ore naa taata irriwai ilkiliku meitushuri nkishu o pooki toki niatata too lng'oborri; amu kelotu enchan oo soito ashaiki pooki tung'ani o eng'ues pooki natii ong'ata nemeitokini aayau ang, naa keye.’”" 
Exodus9:20 Ore ilo oure ororei lo Laitoriani ti atua ilaisiaayiak le Farao neisikie isinkan lenyena o nkishu aaya atua nkajijik; 
Exodus9:21 kake ore ilo leitu eshilaa ororei lo Laitoriani neing'uaa isinkan lenyena o nkishu enyena ti ong'ata. 
Exodus9:22 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ntorioi enkaina ino ing'orie shumata, peyie ejing enchan oo soito enkop pooki e Misiri.”" 
Exodus9:23 Neitorioo Musa eng'udi enye aing'orie keper; neirriu Olaitoriani enkikurrukur o enchan oo soito, nedou enkima alotu enkop. Neitasha Olaitoriani enchan oo soito te nkop e Misiri." 
Exodus9:24 Netii enchan oo soito o enkima naimerlelita ti atua enchan oo soito, enchan oo soito sapuk oleng, neitu ae kata ejing enkop e Misiri ebaiki apa pee eaku olosho." 
Exodus9:25 Near enchan oo soito pooki toki natii ong'ata te nkop pooki e Misiri, aa tung'ani o eng'ues; near enchan oo soito pooki aitubului e ong'ata, negil pooki shani li ong'ata." 
Exodus9:26 Ti atua enkop e Goshen ake, ine apa netii iltung'ana loo Siraeli metii enchan oo soito." 
Exodus9:27 Neirriwaa Farao iltung'ana, neipot Musa o Aron, nejoki ninche, “Ataasa nanu ing'ok tena rishata; Olaitoriani ninye olasipani ore nanu o ltung'ana laainei nikira ilenkarrueisho." 
Exodus9:28 Entoomon Olaitoriani, amu eidipa iyiook ena kikurrukur o ena shan oo soito; ekaisho ntae enchom, nimintokiki aabik.”" 
Exodus9:29 Nejoki Musa ninye, “Ore ake peyie alo auluo ena ang, naitorioki Olaitoriani nkaik aainei, negira enkikurrukur nemeitoki atii enchan oo soito peyie itum atayiolo ajo eno Laitoriani enkop." 
Exodus9:30 Kake ore iyie o laisiaayiak linono ayiolo nanu ajo eton ake miurere Olaitoriani Enkai.” 
Exodus9:31 (Eitarruoyioki enkaitubului naji enkatani o shairi, amu eo apa shairi neitapuka enkatani." 
Exodus9:32 Kake eitu eitarruorri enkano amu eimutie te mbulunoto.) 
Exodus9:33 Neing'uaa Musa Farao alo auluo ina ang, neitorioki Olaitoriani nkaik enyena, neishunye enkikurrukur o enchan o soito neitu eitoki ashaiki oriong enkop." 
Exodus9:34 Ore ake peyie edol Farao ajo eishunye enchan, o enchan oo soito o enkikurrukur neigil aas eng'oki, neitagol oltau lenye, ninye o laisiaayiak lenyena." 
Exodus9:35 Neaku eitagoloki oltau le Farao neitu eisho iltung'ana loo Siraeli meshomo; anaa enairoro Olaitoriani aimunye Musa. 
Exodus10:1 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Tijing'aki Farao; amu aitagolo oltau lenye o oltau loo laisiaayiak lenyena, peyie atum aitoduaai kuna kitoduaat aainei enking'asia nataasa ti atua ninche," 
Exodus10:2 peyie itum aitoning'o olayioni lino o layioni lo layioni lino enaikuna peyie aitomod Ilmisiri too nkitoduaat aainei enking'asia nataasa ti atua ninche; peyie iyiolouu nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani.” 
Exodus10:3 Nelo Musa o Aron atua ine netii Farao, nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Lhebrania, ‘Iany kenya o anu intobor kewan te dukuya nanu? Nchoo iltung'ana laainei epuo, peyie aatum aaisiaayia nanu." 
Exodus10:4 Amu ti nimitiki iltung'ana laainei epuo, ng'ura, ore taisere nayau olmaati atua enkop ino," 
Exodus10:5 naa keitoip oriong e nkop, metaa metii hoo ng'ae oidim atoduaa enkop; nenya ina nikitelekakaki te nchan oo soito, naa kenya pooki shani lino onyori obulu ti ong'ata," 
Exodus10:6 naa keiput nkajijik inono, o nkajijik oo laisiaayiak linono pooki o noo Lmisiri pooki; te nkoitoi neitu ae kata edol iloo papaai lino o loo nkakuyiaa lino, ebaiki apa peyie epuonu oriong e nkopo taata.’ ” Neibelekenya ninye neipang aing'uaa Farao." 
Exodus10:7 Nejoki ilaisiaayiak le Farao ninye, “Keaku kenya ele tung'ani orreshet te iyiook o anu? Enchoo kulo tung'ana epuo, peyie etum aaisiaayia Olaitoriani Enkai enye; keton ake midol ajo eitarruoyioki Misiri?”" 
Exodus10:8 Neshukuni Musa o Aron meetu enetii Farao; nejoki ninye ninche, “Enchom esiaayia Olaitoriani Enkai inyi; kake kakua oopuo?”" 
Exodus10:9 Nejo Musa, “Eikipuo iyiook o elelero ang o enkitoo ang; eikipuo iyiook o layiok lang o ntoyie ang o nkerrai ang o nchoo ang amu meeta inchere mikintaiki Olaitoriani osirua.”" 
Exodus10:10 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Metaa Olaitoriani te nebo ntae tenaa kaisho ae kata ntae o ng'aturan inyi enchom! Ng'ura ajo iatata nkitobirat torrok too ndamunot inyi." 
Exodus10:11 A-a! Enchom ilewa ake, esiaayia Olaitoriani, amu ina iyieuu.” Nerumori ninche aaitung'uaa ine netii Farao." 
Exodus10:12 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Ntorioi enkaina ino ti oriong e nkop e Misiri te nkaraki olmaati, peyie elotu oriong e nkop e Misiri, nenya pooki aitubului te nkop, pooki toki natung'uayie enchan oo soito.”" 
Exodus10:13 Neitorioo Musa eng'udi enye ti oriong e nkop e Misiri, neyau Olaitoriani olkutati le nkilepunoto e nkolong ina kop endama pooki o ina kewarie pooki; ore ake peyie ekenyu eyaua duoo olkutati lenkilepunoto e nkolong olmaati." 
Exodus10:14 Nelotu olmaati oriong e nkop pooki e Misiri, neton te nkop pooki e Misiri, emus sapuk oleng o lmaati neitu ae kata etumi nemeitokini ae kata aatum." 
Exodus10:15 Amu eitoipo oriong e nkop pooki, neaku eitomisimisoki enkop, nenya ninche pooki aitubului te nkop o pooki ng'anayioi loo lkeek otelekua enchan oo soito; eitu eleku hoo toki nabo nanyori, mme olchani neme enkaitubului e ong'ata, te nkop pooki e Misiri." 
Exodus10:16 Neitoki Farao aipot Musa o Aron te naipuk, nejo “Ataasa eng'oki to Laitoriani Enkai inyi o te ntae." 
Exodus10:17 Ore naa taata entapalakaki eng'oki ai, atoomono ntae, ena kata ake, nikiomonokiki to Laitoriani Enkai inyi peyie eiwuang'ie ake ninye ena keeya te nanu.”" 
Exodus10:18 Neipang alo aing'uaa Farao neomon Olaitoriani. 
Exodus10:19 Neibelekeny Olaitoriani olkutati te ndoyioroto e nkolong laa ninye otudumua Olmaati neya arrumoki atua Enaiposha Nanyokie; eitu ninye eing'uari olmaati obo te nkop pooki e Misiri. 
Exodus10:20 Kake eitagolo Olaitoriani oltau le Farao, neitu ninye eisho nkera oo Isiraeli epuo." 
Exodus10:21 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Ntorioi enkaina ino ing'orie keper peyie ejing enaimin enkop e Misiri, enaimin narok ong'u.”" 
Exodus10:22 Neitorioo Musa enkaina enye aing'orie keper nejing enaimin sapuk atua enkop e Misiri nkolong'i uni; 
Exodus10:23 neitu ninche eduaa maate neitu edumunye hoo ng'ae te wueji enye too nkolong'i uni; kake eeta iltung'ana loo Siraeli pooki ewang'an te ine nemanya ninche. 
Exodus10:24 Neitoki Farao aipot Musa nejo, “Enchom esiayia Olaitoriani; eidim sii nkera inyi aashom te nebo intae; enchoo ake metaa nkerrai inyi o nchoo inyi eing'uari.”" 
Exodus10:25 Kake etejo Musa, “Meeta nchere peyie mincho iyiook maitayu ilasarri o nkishorot naapejori, peyie kipolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai ang." 
Exodus10:26 Ekepuo sii nkishu ang te nebo iyiook; meing'uari ninye oloisotoo, amu eikiya ninche peyie kipuo aaisiai Olaitoriani Enkai ang, nimikiyiolo aajo kainyoo kisiaayie Olaitoriani o metaba anaa nikibaya ine.”" 
Exodus10:27 Kake eitagolo Olaitoriani Farao oltau, nemeisho ninche meshomo." 
Exodus10:28 Nejoki Farao ninye, “Shomo tung'uayioki, toduaa kewan miking'il ae kata adol enkomom ai; amu ore akenya enkolong nidol enkomom ai niye.”" 
Exodus10:29 Nejo Musa, “Anaa enitejo! Maigil adol enkomom ino.”" 
Exodus11:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Eng'or olmeitai obo layaki Farao o Misiri; ore te siadi naa keisho ntae enchom, te neisho ntae enchom naa kearaa ntae enchom katukul." 
Exodus11:2 Iroro naa taata metoning'o iltung'ana, peyie eomonu, pooki lee to lelatia enye, o pooki kitok ene latia enye ilgiso le nkosholai o sahabu.”" 
Exodus11:3 Neisho Olaitoriani omom iltung'ana too nkonyek oo Lmisiri. Ore sii ele tung'ani oji Musa naa eikitok apa oleng te nkop e Misiri te dukuya ilaisiaayiak le Farao o te dukuya iltung'ana. 
Exodus11:4 Nejo Musa, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ore te nkalo empolos e nkewarie naa Kaloolo ti atua enkop e Misiri." 
Exodus11:5 Ore ilkikaunot pooki ti atua enkop e Misiri naa keye, ebaiki ilo kikau le Farao otonita to lorika lenye le nkitoo o metabaiki olkikau le ina sinka natii oriong ine neidong'ieki, enkurma, lkikaunot pooki loo nkishu." 
Exodus11:6 Naa keaku olkiyioi sapuk ti atua enkop pooki e Misiri, leitu ae kata eaku nemeitoki ae kata aaku." 
Exodus11:7 Kake ore te pooki ng'ae too ltung'ana loo Siraeli aa oltung'ani aashu ing'uesi, mebuaaki ninye oldia ninche; peyie itumutumu aatayiolo nchere keor arishu Olaitoriani Ilmisiri o Siraeli." 
Exodus11:8 Ore kulo aisiaayiak linono pooki naa kedou aapuonu enatii, naairrugokino nanu ejo, ‘Tupuku iyie, o ltung'ana pooki likisujita iyie.’ Ore te siadi ina napuku nanu.” Neipang ninye aing'uaa Farao te ngoro sapuk." 
Exodus11:9 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Mikining Farao iyie; peyie eponari nena enking'asia aainei ti atua enkop e Misiri.”" 
Exodus11:10 Neas Musa o Aron kuna pooki e nking'asia te dukuya Farao. Neitagol Olaitoriani oltau le Farao, neitu ninye eisho iltung'ana loo Siraeli meshomo aaipang te nkop enye." 
Exodus12:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron tiatua enkop e Misiri," 
Exodus12:2 “Keaku ele apa te ntae enkiterunoto oo lapaitin; ekeaku olapa le dukuya lo lari te ntae. 
Exodus12:3 Entiaaki olturrur pooki loo Siraeli nchere ore te nkolong e tomon ele apa naa keitayu ake pooki tung'ani olkuoo le ker te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye olkuoo le ker ake te nkaji; 
Exodus12:4 naa tenaa eikiti oleng enkaji to lkuo le ker, ore ake oltung'ani o lelatia enye otashare enkaji enye neitayu te risioroto esiana oo ltung'ana; anaa enaidim ake oltung'ani ainosa nintayuyu olkuo le ker obo." 
Exodus12:5 Ore ilo kuo le ker linyi enchoo metaa meeta entioto, ositima lo lari obo, nintayuyu ti atua nkerra arashu ti atua nkineji;" 
Exodus12:6 nintaanyunyu ometabaiki enkolong e tomon o ong'uan ele apa, ina kata nayieng'ie eumata pooki o lturrur loo Siraeli ilkuoo lenye le kerra teipa." 
Exodus12:7 Neitayu ninche embata o sarge, nepik ntaloishin pokira are e kutuk aji o emolinka e kutuk aji enena ajijik naainosie ilkuoo le kerra." 
Exodus12:8 Nenya ninche nkiri ina kewarie, naatapejoki; te nebo imukateni neitu eisuijieki nenya sii mbenek naadua." 
Exodus12:9 Eminya ake te nena ejon arashu eitokitokieki te nkare, kake epejo endukuya enye te nebo loilelek lenyena o enkoshoke enye." 
Exodus12:10 Nimilekuku ake ae toki enye o mekenyu, ore pooki toki naton o mekenyu nipejoo." 
Exodus12:11 Naa tena oitoi inyanya; eena ntae impolosi, etii namuka nkejek inyi netii ng'udisin inyi nkaik inyi; ninyanya te naipuk. Eng'iroroto ena o Laitoriani." 
Exodus12:12 Amu kaim atua enkop e Misiri ina kewarie, naar metuata ilkikaunot pooki ti atua enkop e Misiri nadung'oki nanu enkiguana. Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Exodus12:13 Keaku ilo sarge olmonekie te ntae, too nkajijik nitii; naa te nadol osarge nagiroo ntae, nemetii olmeitai ojing ntae peyie emut ntae te naar enkop e Misiri." 
Exodus12:14 “Keaku ena olong te ntae enitumutumu aadamu, nimbung'ubung'u aitaa osirua to Laitoriani; ore ti atua ishoritin inyi pooki embung'a anaa enkitanapata oo ntarasi." 
Exodus12:15 “Enosa imukateni neitu eisuijieki nkolong'i naapishana; ore te nkolong e dukuya niwuang'ieng'ie enkisuijo aaitayu too nkajijik inyi, amu te nenya oltung'ani emukate naisuijo, ebaiki enkolong edukuya o metabaiki enkolong e naapishana nekepari ilo tung'ani aaitung'uaa Isiraeli." 
Exodus12:16 Ore te nkolong e dukuya entuum olturrur osinya; meetae esiaai naitayuni te nena olong'i; kake ina nanya pooki ng'ae ake ntobiriri. 
Exodus12:17 Ning'oring'oro osirua loo mukateni neitu eisuijieki, amu te ina olong apa aitayio ilororani linyi aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri: metaa embung'a ena olong ti atua iishoritin inyi pooki, anaa enkitanapata oo ntarasi." 
Exodus12:18 Ore to lapa le dukuya te nkolong e tomon o ong'uan o lapa te nkalo e nteipa, ninyanya imukateni neitu eisuijieki ninkoko neijia o metabaiki enkolong e tikitam o obo o lapa te nkalo e nteipa." 
Exodus12:19 Ore too nkolong'i naapishana enchoo metaa metumi enkisuijo too nkajijik inyi; amu te nenya oltung'ani emukate naisuijo, nekepari ilo tung'ani aitung'uaa olturrur loo Siraeli, enyor naa oldokunoti arashu oino teina kop." 
Exodus12:20 Minyanya pooki toki naisuijo; ore too manyishoritin inyi pooki enosa imukateni neitu eisuijieki.” 
Exodus12:21 Neipot Musa ilpayiani pooki loo Siraeli, nejoki ninche, “Entegelaki ate ilkuoo le kerra te risioroto oo lmareita linyi, niyieng'iyieng'e ilo kuoo le ker le ng'iroroto." 
Exodus12:22 Nintayuyu orridati le nkaitubului naji hisopu nilopilopiepie ilo sarge otii eng'irra, paa ieliele emolink'a oo ntaloishin pokira are te ilo sarge otii eng'ira; nemetii hoo obo linyi oipang aim kutuk aji e nkaji enye o mekenyu." 
Exodus12:23 Amu kegiroo Olaitoriani alo aar metuata Ilmisiri; naa ore te nedol osarge te molinka o too ntaloishin pokira e kutuk aji negiroo Olaitoriani kutuk aji nemeisho ilo arani metijing'u nkajijik inyi peyie ear ntae entuata. 
Exodus12:24 Embung'a ele kerreti anaa enkitanapata te ntae o too nkera inyi ntarasi. 
Exodus12:25 Ore kenya ake peyie ipuonunu enkop naisho ntae Olaitoriani, anaa enatejo, nimbung'ubung'u ena kisiaayiare." 
Exodus12:26 Ore ake peyie kijoki nkera inono, ‘Kene nyoo ena kisiaayiare?’" 
Exodus12:27 Tejo iyie, ‘Olasar lo Laitoriani le Pasaka, amu etogiroyie apa nkajijik oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli te Misiri apa peyie ear Lmisiri kake etapala nkajijik ang.’ ” Neirrug iltung'ana ilukuny enyeneserem." 
Exodus12:28 Nepuo iltung'ana loo Siraeli aas ina; anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa o Aron neiko neijia. 
Exodus12:29 Ore te mpolos e nkewarie near metuata Olaitoriani ilkikaunot pooki te nkop e Misiri, ebaiki ilo kikau le Farao oton to lorika lenye le nkitoo o metabaiki olkikau le ilo o ena te nkaji naenishoreki, o ilkikaunot pooki loo nkishu." 
Exodus12:30 Neinyototo Farao kewarie, ninye, o laisiaayiak lenyena pooki o Ilmisiri pooki; netii apa olkiyioi sapuk Misiri amu metii apa enkaji neitu eye oltung'ani obo." 
Exodus12:31 Neipot ninye Musa o Aron te nkewarie, nejo, “Enyeito, enchom entung'uai iltung'ana laainei, intae o ltung'ana loo Siraeli; enchom esiayia Olaitoriani, anaa apa enitejo." 
Exodus12:32 Ewaita nkerrai inyi o nchoo inyi anaa enitejo, enchom naa entamayianaki sii nanu.”" 
Exodus12:33 Neipukie Ilmisiri iltung'ana, peyie earaa ninche metupuku aaing'uaa enkop te nkisarrisar amu etejo, “Kituata pooki.”" 
Exodus12:34 Neya iltung'ana enkurma enye eton eitu eisuijiek, o ngirran naaipurjishoreki neimulumulari too nkilani enye nenap too loilila." 
Exodus12:35 Netaasa sii iltung'ana loo Siraeli anaa enatiaaka Musa, amu etoomonutuo ilgiso loo Lmisiri le nkosholai o le sahabu, o nkilani;" 
Exodus12:36 neishoo Olaitoriani iltung'ana omom te dukuya Ilmisiri metaa eishoo nena naatoomunutuo. Nedupore Isiraeli Ilmisiri. 
Exodus12:37 Nepuo iltung'ana loo Siraeli te Rameses o metabaiki Sukot, ilewa oobaya nkalifuni ile too nkejek, metii nkituaak o nkera." 
Exodus12:38 Nelo sii olorora oshula te nebo ninche, o nkishu kumok oleng; o nkerrai o nchoo." 
Exodus12:39 Nepej ninche imukateni neitu eisuijieki enapa kurma nayautua aaitung'uaa Misiri neitu eishori metotoni, neitu sii eitobiraki ate endaa." 
Exodus12:40 Ore enkata natotona iltung'ana loo Siraeli te Misiri naa ilarin iip ong'uan o tomoni uni. 
Exodus12:41 Ore te siadi ilarin iip ong'uan o tomoni uni, te ina olong kewan, neipang aapuo ilororani pooki lo Laitoriani aaing'uaa Misiri." 
Exodus12:42 Enkewarie apa netagolie Olaitoriani ninche, aitupuku ninche te nkop e Misiri; metaa ore ena kewarie naa enkewarie naing'ori to Laitoriani iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli ti atua iishoritin enye pooki." 
Exodus12:43 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron, “Ena enkitanapata o sirua le Ng'iroroto: meetae oltung'ani omoni oinos ilo sirua." 
Exodus12:44 Kake ore pooki rrindik oinyiang'uaki too mpisai neidim ainosa te neidipi aatumurat ninye. 
Exodus12:45 Meinos olamutanani arashu olaisiaayiani oigeroki. 
Exodus12:46 Te nkaji nabo einos; minosinoso ake hoo ae kiring'o aaipang'unye ti aji; nimigiligili ake oloito lenye. 
Exodus12:47 Nchoo eibung ena olturrur pooki loo Siraeli. 
Exodus12:48 Naa te nelotu oltung'ani omoni aton te nebo ntae neyieu neitaiki Olaitoriani osirua le ng'iroroto, nchoo metumurati ilewa lenyena pooki. Kake meetae oltung'ani le memurata onya." 
Exodus12:49 Enkitanapata nabo ake eetae to inoti o to ltung'ani omoni oton ti atua intae.” 
Exodus12:50 Neiko neijia iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa o Aron, neas ninche." 
Exodus12:51 Ore te ina olong ake neitayu Olaitoriani iltung'ana loo Siraeli aaitung'uaa enkop e Misiri too lororani lenye. 
Exodus13:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ntisinyakaki nanu ilkikaunot pooki;" 
Exodus13:2 ore pooki toki naitera abol enkoshoke ti atua Siraeli te tung'ani o te ng'ues naa enaai.” 
Exodus13:3 Nejoki Musa iltung'ana, “Entadamu ena olong; naa ninye apa itupukunye aaing'uaa Misiri, aaing'uaa enkaji e sinkaisho, amu te ngolon e nkaina eitayio ntae Olaitoriani aaitung'uaa ene wueji; meinosi emukate naisuijieki." 
Exodus13:4 Ipuopuo intae ena olong to lapa le Abibu. 
Exodus13:5 Ore ake te neyau intae Olaitoriani atua enkop oo Lkanaani, o Ilhiti, o Ilamori, o Ilhifi o Lyebusi, apa nainosa olmumai too loo papaai linyi pee eisho intae enkop naruko kule o enaisho, nimbung'ubung'u ena kisiaayiare tele apa." 
Exodus13:6 Too nkolong'i naapishana, enosa imukateni neitu eisuijieki, ore te nkolong e naapishana neaku osirua to Laitoriani." 
Exodus13:7 Imukateni neitu eisuijieki einosi too nkolong'i naapishana; medoli emukate naisuijieki te ntae, nemedoli emukate naisuijieki te nkop inyi." 
Exodus13:8 Nijoki akenya olayioni lino te ina olong ‘Enkaraki e ina naaitaasa nanu Olaitoriani apa pee apuku aing'uaa Misiri.’ 
Exodus13:9 Naa ketiu te iyie anaa enkitoduaata te nkaina ino netiu anaa endamunoto te rishata oo nkonyek inono, pee etum enkitanapata o Laitoriani atijing'a enkutuk ino; amu te nkaina nagol kiyaua iyie Olaitoriani aitung'uaa Misiri." 
Exodus13:10 Metaa imbung naa ena kitanapata te nkata enye nageluno te pooki ari. 
Exodus13:11 “Ore akenya ti nikiyau Olaitoriani enkop oo Lkanaani, anaa enainosa olmumai te iyie o too loo papaai linyi, naa eikincho iyie." 
Exodus13:12 Ninteng'el iyie te nkaraki Olaitoriani nena pooki naatang'asa aabol enkoshoke. Ore ilkikaunot pooki loo nkishu inono oora ilbung'aiko, neaku ilo Laitoriani." 
Exodus13:13 Ore olkurrarru pooki le sikiria ong'asi aaiu, nelakuni to sitima le ker, naa te nimilaku iyie ninye niburukush emurt enye. Ore olkikau pooki loo layiok linyi nilaku." 
Exodus13:14 Ore te nkata nalotu te nikinkilikuan olayioni lino, ajoki, ‘Kainyoo doi eutu ena?’ Nijoki iyie ninye, ‘Te ngolon e nkaina eyaua iyiook Olaitoriani aitupuku te Misiri, aitung'uaa enkaji e sinkaisho." 
Exodus13:15 Amu ore apa pee eany Farao te ngolong'u eisho iyiook maape near Olaitoriani ilkikaunot pooki te nkop e Misiri, olkikau le tung'ani o le nkiteng. Metaa kapolosaki Olaitoriani ilbung'aiko pooki ootang'asa aabol enkoshoke; kake ore ilkikaunot pooki loo layiok laainei nawalu.’" 
Exodus13:16 Naa keaku olmishire te nkaina ino arashu te rishata oo nkonyek inono, amu te nkaina nagol eyaua iyiook Olaitoriani aitung'uaa Misiri.”" 
Exodus13:17 Ore apa pee eisho Farao iltung'ana meshomo, neitu erikoo Olaitoriani ninche aimie nkoitoi e nkop oo Lfilisti, hoo naa ina apa nataana; amu etejo, “Mayieu neibelekenya iltung'ana te nedol olarrabal, neshuko aapuo Misiri.”" 
Exodus13:18 Kake etorikoyie Enkai iltung'ana aitamanaa te nkoitoi o lpurkel aing'orie Enaiposha Nanyokie. Neilepu iltung'ana loo Siraeli aaipang'u te nkop e Misiri eterretenate to larrabal. 
Exodus13:19 Neya Musa iloik lo sesen le Yosef te nebo ninye, amu eitayio apa Yosef enkutuk neinos olmumai too ltung'ana loo Siraeli, ejo, “Kemutan intae Enkai; naa eiyaya intae iloik laainei te nebo intae aaitung'uaa Misiri.”" 
Exodus13:20 Nedumunye ninche te Sukot neitayu ilng'oborri te Esam, te bayie o lpurkel." 
Exodus13:21 Nelo Olaitoriani dukuya ninche dama te nkatampoi naikununo anaa eng'ape pee erikoo ninche te nkoitoi, ore te nkewarie naa te nkima naikununo anaa eng'ape pee eitawang'aki ninche, pee etum aashom dama o kewarie." 
Exodus13:22 Ore ina atampoi neikununo anaa eng'ape te ndama o enkima naikununo anaa eng'ape te nkewarie neitu eiwuang te dukuya iltung'ana. 
Exodus14:1 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Exodus14:2 “Tiaaki iltung'ana loo Siraeli metushukoto siadi aapik ilng'oborri dukuya e Pi-ha-hirot, erishata e Migdol o enaiposha, dukuya e Baal-sefon; enteshet ilng'oborri empirakinye embata e naiposha." 
Exodus14:3 Amu ejo ninye Farao ti alo iltung'ana loo Siraeli, ‘Eibookoki ninche atua ina kop eibooyie ninche olpurkel.’" 
Exodus14:4 Naa kaitagol nanu oltau le Farao, naa kesujaa ninche natum enkisisa te Farao o te njore enye pooki; naa keyiolou Ilmisiri aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.” Neiko ninche neijia." 
Exodus14:5 Ore ake pee elikini olaiguanani le Misiri aajoki eisika iltung'ana, neibelekenya endamunoto e Farao o enoo laisiaayiak lenyena ti alo iltung'ana, nejo ninche, “Kainyoo ena nikitaasa nchere kinchoo Siraeli meshomo meekure esiaai iyiook?”" 
Exodus14:6 Neitobir ninye engarri enye oo mbartan nedumu enjore enye," 
Exodus14:7 neya ingarrin oo mbartan naageluno iip ile o kulie garrin oo mbartan e Misiri ekedito ilkituaak ninche pooki. 
Exodus14:8 Neitagol Olaitoriani oltau le Farao olaiguanani le Misiri nesujaa ninye iltung'ana loo Siraeli ooisula aapuku te ng'olong'u. 
Exodus14:9 Nesujaa Ilmisiri ninche, mbartan pooki e Farao, o ngarrin oo mbartan o lakedok loo mbartan o enjore enye, neinepu ninche too lng'oborri te mbata e naiposha, te mbata e Pi-ha-hirot, te dukuya e Baal-sefon." 
Exodus14:10 Ore ake pee enyiku Farao, neraposhu iltung'ana loo Siraeli nkonyek enye, naa ng'ura, epuonu Ilmisiri te siadi ninche; neureishoyu oleng. Neishiraki iltung'ana loo Siraeli Olaitoriani;" 
Exodus14:11 nejoki ninche Musa, “Kenkaraki nemetii nkuraren Misiri pee iyaua iyiook matuata to lpurkel? Kainyoo intaasa iyiook iyaua iyiook aitung'uaa Misiri?" 
Exodus14:12 Aime ena apa kitiaakita iyie te Misiri, ‘Tapala iyiook naa nchoo maisiaayia Ilmisiri?’ Amu enaikash apa te iyiook ti nikisiai Ilmisiri alang ti nikiye to lpurkel.”" 
Exodus14:13 Nejoki Musa iltung'ana, “Emiureishoyu, entasheito tukul, metii olng'ash pee idolidolo enjeunoto o Laitoriani, naitobiraki ninye ntae taata; amu ore kulo Misiri idolitata taata, mintokiki ae kata aadol." 
Exodus14:14 Kemitu intae Olaitoriani, metaa entirring'ata.”" 
Exodus14:15 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Kainyoo pee kinchiraki nanu? Tiaaki iltung'ana loo Siraeli meshomo dukuya." 
Exodus14:16 Tudumu ilepie eng'udi ino, nintorioo enkaina ino te shumata enaiposha tooro, pee etum iltung'ana loo Siraeli aashom te nkop natoyio te mpolos e naiposha." 
Exodus14:17 Naa kaitagol iltauja loo Lmisiri pee epuo atua aasujaa ninche, naa katum enkitoo te Farao o te njore enye pooki, too ngarrin oo mbartan oo too lakedok loo mbartan." 
Exodus14:18 Neyiolou Ilmisiri aajo, ara nanu Olaitoriani, te naidip nanu anoto enkitoo te Farao, too ngarrin oo mbartan o too lakedok loo mbartan.”" 
Exodus14:19 Neitoki olmalaika le Nkai apa orikito te dukuya e njore oo Siraeli aiwuang'a nelo siadi ninche; ore ina atampoi naikununo anaa eng'ape neiwuang'a te dukuya ninche neitashe te siadi ninche. 
Exodus14:20 Alotu te rishata e njore e Misiri o enjore oo Siraeli. Netii ina atampoi o enaimin; nelusoo enkewarie meetae enaewuo anyikaki enkae enkewarie pooki. 
Exodus14:21 Neitorioo Musa enkaina enye te shumata enaiposha; nereu Olaitoriani enaiposha siadi to siwuo ogol le nkilepunoto e nkolong e nkewarie pooki, neitaa enaiposha enkop natoyio, neoro nkariak." 
Exodus14:22 Nepuo iltung'ana loo Siraeli ti atua empolos e naiposha aaim enkop natoyio, etaa nkariak esuntai te ninche te nkaina e tatene o te kedienye." 
Exodus14:23 Nesujaa Ilmisiri, nepuo atua emirta ninche nepuo empolos e naiposha, mbartan pooki e Farao, ngarrin oo mbartan enyena, o lakedok lenyena loo mbartan." 
Exodus14:24 Ore tadekenya enasirie neing'or Olaitoriani ti atua ina kima naikununo anaa eng'ape o ina atampoi enjore o Lmisiri neisirng'ang'ie enjore oo Lmisiri," 
Exodus14:25 aun nkejek oo ngarrin enye metupurpurrito te lototo; nejo Ilmisiri, “Emaisika te dukuya Siraeli; amu kemitu ninche Olaitoriani aing'arraki Ilmisiri.”" 
Exodus14:26 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Ntorioi enkaina ino te shumata enaiposha, pee eshukunye enkare shumata Ilmisiri, o shumata ingarrin enye oo mbartan o shumata ilakedok lenye loo mbartan.”" 
Exodus14:27 Neitorioo Musa enkaina enye te shumata enaiposha, neshukunye enaiposha enoshi ake kirragata enye emanaa enkakenya; nejo Ilmisiri maisika aailany enkare kake eibooko ninche Olaitoriani empolos enaiposha." 
Exodus14:28 Neshukunye inkariak neimisie ingarrin oo mbartan, o lakedok loo mbartan o ina jore pooki e Farao, natusujaka ninche atua enaiposha; eitu ninye eleku obo lenye." 
Exodus14:29 Kake eshomo iltung'ana loo Siraeli te nkop natoyio te mpolos e naiposha, etaa nkariak esuntai te ninche te nkaina enye e tatene o te kedienye." 
Exodus14:30 Neiko neijia Olaitoriani aitajeu Isiraeli ina olong too nkaik oo Lmisiri; nedol Isiraeli Ilmisiri etuata te mbata e naiposha. 
Exodus14:31 Nedol Isiraeli esiaai sapuk naitaasa Olaitoriani Ilmisiri, neureyu iltung'ana Olaitoriani; neiruk ninche Olaitoriani o olaisiaayiani lenye Musa." 
Exodus15:1 Neranyaki Musa o ltung'ana loo Siraeli Olaitoriani ele sinkolio ejo, “Karanyaki nanu Olaitoriani, amu etimirishe oleng; ore embarta o lakedoni lenye etanang'aka atua enaiposha." 
Exodus15:2 Olaitoriani engolon ai naa osinkolio lai, netaa sii enjeunoto ai; Enkai ai ena naa kaisis ninye, Enkai e papa lai, naa karrep ninye." 
Exodus15:3 Ore Olaitoriani naa oltung'ani lo larrabal; keji enkarna enye Olaitoriani. 
Exodus15:4 Etanang'aka ingarrin oo mbartan e Farao o enjore enye atua enaiposha; ore ilkituaak lenyena gelunot eimiso te Enaiposha Nanyokie. 
Exodus15:5 Eimulumulaitie ninche inkariak; nepuo ninche aadoiki atua eng'uton anaa osoit. 
Exodus15:6 Ore enkaina e tatene o Laitoriani, keitoreisho te ngolon, ore enkaina e tatene o Laitoriani, kegiligili olmang'atinta." 
Exodus15:7 Ore te ngolon e nkitoo ino, nimir lelo liking'orunore; irriwaa engoro ino neyupuyupoki ninche anaa olkujita." 
Exodus15:8 Ore te nkutata oo nkumeishin inono neiturrurro nkariak, neitashe inkariak aarupa, netoyu enegut ti atua enaiposha." 
Exodus15:9 Etejo olmang'atinta, ‘Ekasujaa, ekainepu; naor nanu iyarunot enye naya pooki toki nayieu; nashutu nanu olalem lai, near enkaina ai ninche metuata.’" 
Exodus15:10 Itukuta te nkijape ino, neitemoo ninche enaiposha; neimis anaa osoit ti atua inkariak kituaak." 
Exodus15:11 Kaing'ae likinyaanyukie, iyie Olaitoriani, ti atua inkaitin? Kaing'ae otiu anaa iyie, kitok te sinyatisho, Olourei too nkiaasin e nkitoo, oas isapuki e nking'asia." 
Exodus15:12 Intorioyie iyie enkaina ino e tatene, neijoo ninche enkop." 
Exodus15:13 Te nyorrata ino osotua itoriko lelo tung'ana litokordua, ituutayie iyie te ngolon ino meshomo emanyisho ino sinyati." 
Exodus15:14 Etoning'o iloreren, neikirikira ninche; eibung'a emion lelo ootoni te Filistia." 
Exodus15:15 Eiputukunyo ilaiguanak le Edom; eibung'a ilarikok le Moabu olokirikiri; Etalepori to lkirutoto lelo pooki oomanya Kanaan. 
Exodus15:16 Nejing ninche olkirutoto o enkuretisho; te nkaraki enkitoo e nkaina ino, eitirring'ate ninche anaa osoit, o metaba anaa nelusoo iltung'ana linono, Olaitoriani, o metaba anaa nelusoo lelo apa linyiang'ua." 
Exodus15:17 Intijing'u iyie ninche atua, niun ninche te nchumata o ldoinyo lino, ine wueji, Olaitoriani, nintobira te nkaraki emanyisho ino, ine nesinya, Olaitoriani, nintobira iyie te nkaina ino." 
Exodus15:18 Ekeitoreisho Olaitoriani ntarasi o ntarasi.” 
Exodus15:19 Amu ore apa pee epuo mbartan e Farao o ngarrin enyena oo mbartan o lakedok lenyena loo mbartan atua enaiposha, neyau Olaitoriani ashuku inkariak e naiposha shumata ninche; kake eshomo iltung'ana loo Siraeli te nkop natoyio te mpolos e naiposha." 
Exodus15:20 Neitoki Miriam, ina oiboni, anashe e Aron, adumu entampuri te nkaina enye; neipang inkituaak pooki aasuj ninye too ntampurini eipidipid aaranyisho." 
Exodus15:21 Neranyaki Miriam ninche ejo: “Entaranyaki Olaitoriani amu etimirishe te nkitoo; ore embarta o ilo okedito netanang'aka ninye atua enaiposha.” 
Exodus15:22 Nerikoo Musa Isiraeli dukuya aaing'uaa Enaiposha Nanyokie, nepuo olpurkel le Shuri; nepuo nkolong'i uni to lpurkel neitu etum enkare." 
Exodus15:23 Ore ake pee epuonu Mara, neitu eidim aatook enkare e Mara amu kedua, neaku etejoki ine Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Neing'unyung'unyaki iltung'ana Musa, ejo, “Kainyoo kiok?”" 
Exodus15:25 Neishiraki ninye Olaitoriani; neitodol ninye Olaitoriani olchani, nenang'aki atua enkare nemelonu enkare. Neisho ninche Olaitoriani nkitanapat teine naatum aaishuyie, netem ninche te ine ejo," 
Exodus15:26 “Tinining'ining'i intae oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi, niasiasa ina sidai too nkonyek enyena, nining'ining'i nkitanapat enyena nimbung'ubung'u pooki, nemapik hoo nabo oo nkeyaitin ntae apa natipika Ilmisiri; amu ara nanu Olaitoriani oishiunye intae.”" 
Exodus15:27 Neitoki ninche aapuonu Elim, ine apa netii nchorroi tomon o are e nkare, o ltuka ntomoni naapishana, neitayu ilng'oborri te ine te mbata e nkare." 
Exodus16:1 Nedumunye ninche aapuo aaing'uaa Elim, nepuonu olturrur pooki loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli olpurkel le Sini, otii erishata e Elim o Sinai, te nkolong e tomon o imiet o lapa li are eidipa aashom te nkop e Misiri." 
Exodus16:2 Neing'unyung'unyaki olturrur pooki loo ltung'ana le Misiri Musa o Aron te ilo purkel," 
Exodus16:3 nejoki ninche, “Enaikash apa tenaa eikituata te nkaina o Laitoriani te nkop e Misiri, ina kata apa kitoni te mbata oo motio oo nkiri nikinya imukateni aaraposho; amu impang'unye intae iyiook aayau ele purkel, aar ena umata pooki te sumash.”" 
Exodus16:4 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Ng'ura, ekashau imukateni naaing'uaa shumata te nkaraki intae; naa keipang'u iltung'ana aaiturrurru endaa naidip ina olong, pee atem ninche tenaa keibung nkitanapat aainei anaa emeibung'." 
Exodus16:5 Ore te nkolong e ile eitobir nena naayau atua aji naa keaku katitin are eiturrur anaake.” 
Exodus16:6 Nejoki Musa o Aron iltung'ana pooki loo siraeli, “Ore teipa niyiolouu aajo Olaitoriani apa oyaua intae aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri;" 
Exodus16:7 ore tadekenya nidolidolo enkitoo o Laitoriani amu etoning'o ninye inking'unyung'unyat inyi ing'unyung'unyakiki Olaitoriani. Amu eikira iyiook nyoo pee ing'unyung'unyakiki iyiook?” 
Exodus16:8 Nejo Musa, “Te neisho intae Olaitoriani teipa inkiri ninosinoso neisho intae tadekenya imukateni aiputaki, amu etoning'o Olaitoriani inking'unyung'unyakinot inyi ning'unyung'unyakita ninye. Eikira iyook nyoo? Ore enking'unyung'uny inyi neme enaang kake eno Laitoriani.”" 
Exodus16:9 Nejoki Musa Aron, “Tiaaki olturrur pooki loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, ‘Entinyiku wootu dukuya Olaitoriani, amu etoning'o ninye inking'unyung'unyat inyi.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Ore anaa enairorie Aron olturrur pooki loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, neing'or enkalo o lpurkel, ng'ura, neliooyu enkitoo o Laitoriani te nkatampoi." 
Exodus16:11 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Exodus16:12 “Atoning'o inking'unyung'unyat oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli; tiaaki ninche, ‘Ore te nteipa ninosinoso inkiri, ore tadekenya neiputakini intae imukateni, ee iyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Ore teipa nepuonu nkurlen neiput lelo ng'oborri; ore tadekenya neirrag enkolioolio aman lelo ng'oborri. 
Exodus16:14 Ore ake pee edumunye enkolioolio te nkop netii enkoriong e ilo purkel entoki naibor, napurupurana natii oriong enkop, (naikununo anaa soito le nchan)." 
Exodus16:15 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana loo Siraeli nejokino maate, “Kainyoo ena?” Amu meyiolo apa ninche aajo kainyoo ina. Nejoki Musa ninche, “Emukate naa ninye eishoo Olaitoriani intae enosa." 
Exodus16:16 Ena eitanapishe Olaitoriani: ‘Entasotu, pooki tung'ani te ntae, anaa enaidim ainosa; ewaita emborei emoti naji omer, te risioroto e siana oo ltung'ana naba anaa enaata ake oltung'ani to lng'obor lenye.’ ”" 
Exodus16:17 Neas ina iltung'ana loo Siraeli, nesotu ilkulikae nkumok, nesotu kulikae nkuti." 
Exodus16:18 Kake ore ake pee etem te mborei e ina moti naji omer, ore ilo apa otasotuo nkumok nemeeta entoki natelekua, ore ilo otasotuo nkuti netaraposhe; etasotuo ake oltung'ani enaba anaa enaidim ainosa." 
Exodus16:19 Nejoki Musa ninche, “Emincho oltung'ani eshum o mekenyu.”" 
Exodus16:20 Kake eitu ninche ening Musa; etelekutua embata o mekenyiki neiu ilkuru neng'ueyu; negorokino Musa ninche. 
Exodus16:21 Nesotu ninche anaake tadekenya, oltung'ani ake anaa enaidim ainosa, kake ore ake pee eirowuaju enkolong neshola." 
Exodus16:22 Ore te nkolong e ile nesotu imukateni katitin are oo noshi ake, iyierat are ake oltung'ani; ore ake pee epuonu ilarikok pooki lo lturrur aaliki Musa," 
Exodus16:23 nejoki ninye ninche, “Ena eitanapishe Olaitoriani: ‘Enkolong e nkiyeng'iyeng taisere, sabato sinyati o Laitoriani; entapej ina nipejipeje niyieriyiere ina niyieriyiere; ore ina pooki naleku nirragiegie o mekenyu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:24 Neirragie ninche o metaba anaa nekenyu, anaa enatasayiaka Musa ninche, neitu eng'uoyu neitu ejing ilkuru." 
Exodus16:25 Nejo Musa “Enosa taata, amu ore taata naa sabato o Laitoriani, mitumutumu taata ti ong'ata." 
Exodus16:26 Too nkolong'i ile isotutu; kake ore te nkolong e naapishana aa ene sabato nemetii hoo toki.” 
Exodus16:27 Ore te nkolong e naapishana nepuo kulikae tung'ana aasotu neitu etum hoo toki. 
Exodus16:28 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Ianyianya akenya imbungubungu nkitanapat o nkirorot aainei o anu?" 
Exodus16:29 Toduaa! Eishoo intae Olaitoriani sabato, metaa ore te nkolong e ile neisho intae imukateni oo nkolong'i are; totona pooki tung'ani te ntae te wueji enye, emincho oltung'ani eipang alo te wueji enye te nkolong e naapishana.”" 
Exodus16:30 Neyeng'iyeng'a iltung'ana te nkolong e naapishana. 
Exodus16:31 Nejo enkaji oo Siraeli enkarna e ina daa mana; neikununo anaa ilanterera ooibor, netiu emeloni enye anaa enoo nkaukau naaitobiraki te naisho." 
Exodus16:32 Nejo Musa, “Ena eitanapishe Olaitoriani: ‘Enchoo emborei e moti oo nkulukuok naji omer eshumi ti atua iishoritin inyi pooki, pee etum aatodol ina mukate naitotiyie nanu intae to lpurkel, inakata apa pee aitupuku intae aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus16:33 Nejoki Musa Aron, “Tudumu eng'irra tipika emborei e omer e mana atua nirragie te dukuya o Laitoriani, neshumi tiatua iishoritin inyi.”" 
Exodus16:34 Anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa, neiko neijia Aron airragie te dukuya Enchakenisho, metushumi." 
Exodus16:35 Neinos iltung'ana loo Siraeli mana ilarin artam, o metaba anaa nepuonu olpolosie le nkop e Kanaan." 
Exodus16:36 (Ore omer naa erubata e tomon e efa.) 
Exodus17:1 Nepuo olturrur pooki loo Siraeli to lpurkel le Sini too lkirragarien, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani, neitayu ilng'oborri te Refidim; kake metii apa enkare naok iltung'ana." 
Exodus17:2 Neilepilepaki iltung'ana Musa, nejo, “Nchoo iyiook enkare nikiok.” Nejoki Musa ninche, “Kainyoo pee kilepilepakiki nanu? Kainyoo pee itemiteme Olaitoriani?”" 
Exodus17:3 Kake etotiro iltung'ana enkure oleng, neing'unyung'unyaki iltung'ana Musa, nejo, “Kainyoo apa pee iyaua iyiook aaitung'uaa Misiri, nilotu aar iyiook matuata o nkera ang o nkishu ang te nkure?”" 
Exodus17:4 Neishiraki Musa Olaitoriani nejo, “Kaa aitaas kulo tung'ana? Etaa ninche kejo pee aanang too soito.”" 
Exodus17:5 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Togiroi iltung'ana te dukuya, nishoroo te nebo iyie embata oo lpayiani loo Siraeli; niya te nkaina ino ina ng'udi apa nitooshie olkeju le Nail, nilo." 
Exodus17:6 Ng'ura kalo nanu aitashe te dukuya iyie te idie te nchumata e ndapidapoi te Horeb, niosh iyie ina dapidapoi, naa kepuku enkare ti atua ninye, pee etum iltung'ana aatook.” Neas Musa ina te dukuya ilpayiani loo Siraeli." 
Exodus17:7 Nejo ninye enkarna eine wueji Masa o Meriba, te nkaraki enkilepilep oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, o enkaraki natetema ninche Olaitoriani ejo. “Ketii Olaitoriani te nebo iyiook arashu metii?”" 
Exodus17:8 Neitoki Amalek alotu nearare Isiraeli te Refidim. 
Exodus17:9 Nejoki Musa Yoshua, “Tegelaki iyiook ilewa, nimpang'ipang'a aapuo, entaarata o Amalek; ore taisere naitashe nanu te nchumata e ndoinyo aata ina ng'udi e Nkai te nkaina ai.”" 
Exodus17:10 Neas Yoshua enatiaaka Musa, nearare Amalek; nelo Musa o Aron o Huri enchumata e ndoinyo." 
Exodus17:11 Ore ake te neilepie Musa enkaina, nemirisho Isiraeli, ore ake te neitadou enkaina enye, nemirisho Ilmaleki." 
Exodus17:12 Kake etanaurate inkaik e Musa, neyau ninche osoit nepik abori ninye, netonie ninye nedumu Aron o Huri inkaik enyena aailepie, obo ake te nchoto nabo o likae ti ae shoto; metaa keitirring'a eitoriori inkaik enyena o metadoi enkolong." 
Exodus17:13 Nemir Yoshua aitadoyio Ilmaleki o ltung'ana lenyena neshurt te nepi o lalem. 
Exodus17:14 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ing'ero ena te mbuku metaa endamunoto niliki Yoshua ajoki ekamut nanu aimisie endamunoto oo Ilmaleki aiwuang'ie ti abori keper.”" 
Exodus17:15 Neshetu Musa olperere lo lasar nejo enkarna enye, Olaitoriani ninye enanka ai" 
Exodus17:16 ejo, “Einosa Olaitoriani olmumai nchere kearare ninye Ilmaleki ebaiki eishoi o eishoi.”" 
Exodus18:1 Nening Yesero, ilo apolosani le Midian, olaputani le Musa, nena pooki naaitaasa Enkai Musa o Siraeli iltung'ana lenyena, eneikunuwua Olaitoriani eitayu Isiraeli aitung'uaa Misiri." 
Exodus18:2 Nelotu ninye enetii Musa, neshoru te nebo ninye Sipora, enkitok e Musa natung'uayioki apa te siadi," 
Exodus18:3 o Gerishom o Eliesa, ilayiok lenyena pokira oare. (Etejo Musa, “Ataa apa olomoni te nkop oo le eiking'a neaku etejo olayioni obo Gerishom.”)" 
Exodus18:4 Ore enkarna o likae naa Eliesa. (Amu etejo, “Enkai apa e papa lai ereretoto ai, naaitajeu nanu to lalem le Farao.”)" 
Exodus18:5 Nelotu Yesero, olaputani le Musa, o layiok lenyena o enkitok enye enetii Musa to lpurkel te ine apa netipika ilng'oborri to ldoinyo." 
Exodus18:6 Ore ake pee ejoki oltung'ani obo Musa, “Elotu olaputani lino, Yesero, enitii tenebo enkitok ino o layiok lenyena pokira oare,”" 
Exodus18:7 neipang Musa alo anang'are olaputani lenye, neirrugokino neng'utut ninye; neikilikuana maate ilomon lenye nejing ninche atua olng'obor." 
Exodus18:8 Neliki Musa olaputani lenye nena pooki naaitaasa Olaitoriani Farao o Ilmisiri te nkaraki Isiraeli, o sinaitin oogol pooki ooetuo shumata ninche te nkoitoi." 
Exodus18:9 Neng'idayu Yesero te pooki sidai naitaasa Olaitoriani Isiraeli, te ina nayaua ninche aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lmisiri." 
Exodus18:10 Nejo Yesero, “Meisisi Olaitoriani, laa ninye oitajeu intae aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lmisiri neitung'uaa enkaina e Farao." 
Exodus18:11 Ayiolo taata ajo eikitok Olaitoriani alang nkaitin pooki, amu eyaua iltung'ana aitung'uaa abori enkaina oo Lmisiri ina kata apa eisikong ninche.”" 
Exodus18:12 Neitayu Yesero, olaputani le Musa, enkishoroto olasar opejori o nkishorot naapolosakini Enkai, nelotu Aron te nebo ilpayiani pooki loo Siraeli aanya endaa te nebo olaputani le Musa te dukuya Enkai." 
Exodus18:13 Ore ake pee ekenyu neton Musa arish iltung'ana, neitashe iltung'ana aaman Musa ebaiki tadekenya o metaa teipa." 
Exodus18:14 Ore ake pee edol olaputani le Musa nena pooki naasita te nkaraki iltung'ana, nejo, “Kainyoo ena niasita te nkaraki iltung'ana? Kainyoo pee iton openy, nikintashe aaman iltung'ana pooki ebaiki tadekenya o metaa teipa?”" 
Exodus18:15 Nejoki Musa olaputani lenye, “Enkaraki napuonu iltung'ana enatii aaikilikuan mbaa e Nkai;" 
Exodus18:16 ore te neeta enchankar, nepuonu enatii narish nanu oltung'ani o ilo le latia enye, naitayiolo nanu ninche nkitanapat e Nkai o nena naatejo ninye.”" 
Exodus18:17 Nejoki olaputani le Musa ninye, “Ore ena niasita ne me sidai." 
Exodus18:18 Ore iyie o ltung'ana liboitare iariara ate, amu keiroishi ena te iyie; nimindim ataasa openy." 
Exodus18:19 Toning'o naa enaajoki amu kaaikok, naa, keaku Enkai te nebo iyie! Taa itii dukuya Enkai;" 
Exodus18:20 ninteng'en ninche nkitanapat o naatejo, nintayiolo ninche enkoitoi napuoyie o enaishiaakino neas." 
Exodus18:21 Ore ake tegelu iltung'ana oata enkidimata too ltung'ana pooki, lelo ooure Enkai, iltung'ana ooisiligayu neiba eropare; nipik kulo payiani shumata iltung'ana aitaa ilarikok loo nkalifuni, loo maa iip, loo moo onom o loo maa tomon." 
Exodus18:22 Nincho ninche meiguenare iltung'ana nkatitin pooki; ore pooki bae sapuk neyau enitii kake ore embae kiti nedung oopeny, pee eleleku te iyie nenap sii ninche olola te nebo iyie." 
Exodus18:23 Te nias ena, anaa enikirikoo Enkai, naa ina kata ibikoo, nepuo sii kulo tung'ana pooki ewueji enye te seriani.”" 
Exodus18:24 Nening Musa enkikoo o laputani lenye neas nena pooki naatejo ninye. 
Exodus18:25 Negelu Musa iltung'ana oata enkidimata ti atua Siraeli pooki, neitaa ninche ilukuny oo ltung'ana, ilaitoriak loo nkalifuni, loo maa iip, loo moo onom o loo maa tomon." 
Exodus18:26 Neiguenare ninche iltung'ana nkatitin pooki; ore ilomon oogol neyaki ninche Musa, kake ore embae pooki kiti nedung oopeny." 
Exodus18:27 Neisho Musa olaputani lenye meshomo, neibung ninye enkoitoi alo enkop enye." 
Exodus19:1 Ore te nkolong e dukuya olapa li okuni anaa pee epuo iltung'ana loo Siraeli te nkop e Misiri, ore ina olong nepuonu olpurkel le Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Ore pee edumunye te Refidim aapuonu olpurkel le Sinai neitayu ilng'oborri to lpurkel; ore te ine nepik Isiraeli ilng'oborri dukuya o ldoinyo. 
Exodus19:3 Neked Musa alo enetii Enkai, neipot ninye Olaitoriani to ldoinyo, ejo, “Ena iyie ilo ajoki enkaji e Yakobo, niliki iltung'ana loo Siraeli: ajoki," 
Exodus19:4 Itoduaa intae enaikuna Ilmisiri, ina natanapa nanu intae too naipuko o lkurragos nayaki intae kewan ai." 
Exodus19:5 Ore naa taata tinining'ining'i oltoilo lai nimbung'ubung'u nkitanapat o sotua lai, niaakuku iltung'ana laainei tukul ti atua iltung'ana pooki; amu ore enkop pooki naa enaai," 
Exodus19:6 naa iakuku intae te nanu enkitoria oo lapolosak o losho osinya. Kulo ninche irorei lilo ajoki nkera e Israel.” 
Exodus19:7 Nelotu Musa neipot lelo payiani loo ltung'ana, neibalie te dukuya ninche kulo rorei pooki ooitanapa Olaitoriani ninye." 
Exodus19:8 Newal iltung'ana pooki te nebo nejo, “Ore nena pooki naatejo Olaitoriani eikiaas.” Nelikioo Musa irorei loo ltung'ana to Laitoriani." 
Exodus19:9 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ng'ura, kalotu nanu te nkatampoi nairrusha, pee etum iltung'ana aatoning te naairorie iyie, pee kitum sii aairuko ntarasi.” Neitoki Musa aliki Olaitoriani irorei loo ltung'ana." 
Exodus19:10 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Shomo enetii iltung'ana nintisiny ninche taata o taisere, nincho ninche meisuja inkilani enye," 
Exodus19:11 nerretena te nkolong e uni; amu ore te nkolong e uni nelotu Olaitoriani adou enchumata o ldoinyo le Sinai metoduaa iltung'ana. 
Exodus19:12 Nipikaki iltung'ana olpolosie aitamanaa, ijo, ‘Entodol ake mipuopuo shumata o ldoinyo arashu iseyieyie olpolosie lenye; ore pooki ng'ae ororo oldoinyo neari metua." 
Exodus19:13 Nemeetae enkaina naiseyie ninye kake kenang'i too soito arashu eng'ori, aa eng'ues arashu oltung'ani, melo ninye eishu.’ Ore pee eru entarumpeta ayiataa, naa keilepu ninche aapuonu oldoinyo.”" 
Exodus19:14 Nedou Musa to ldoinyo alotu enetii iltung'ana, neitisiny ninye iltung'ana neisuj ninche inkilani enye." 
Exodus19:15 Nejoki ninye iltung'ana, “Enterretenata te nkolong e uni, nimipuopuo aanyikaki nkituaak.”" 
Exodus19:16 Ore takedenya te nkolong e uni, netii ndarat o nkiwuang'at, o enkatampoi nairrusha e nchumata oldoinyio, o endarata sapuk e ntarumpeta, o metaa einkirikirate iltung'ana pooki ootii ilng'oborri." 
Exodus19:17 Neyau Musa iltung'ana aitung'uaa ilng'oborri meetu aatumore Enkai; neitashe ninche te ntonata o ldoinyo. 
Exodus19:18 Neimulumul oldoinyo le Sinai empuruo, amu etadoikio Olaitoriani enchumata enye te nkima, neilep empuruo enye anaa empuruo o lkokuet, neikirikira oldoinyo pooki oleng." 
Exodus19:19 Naa ore anaa enadaru embuakunoto e ntarumpeta aponari, neiro Musa, newaliki ninye Enkai te ndarata." 
Exodus19:20 Nelotu Olaitoriani adoiki oldoinyo le Sinai, entopij o ldoinyo; neipot Olaitoriani Musa meshomo entopij o ldoinyo, neilep Musa alo." 
Exodus19:21 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Tadoi shomo inkoo iltung'ana, melang'u ake olpolosie memuta ake ilkumok lenye." 
Exodus19:22 Nchoo sii lelo apolosak oonyikaki Olaitoriani eitisiny ate, pee maitame ake ninche.”" 
Exodus19:23 Nejoki Musa Olaitoriani, “Mepuonu iltung'ana aailepu oldoinyo le Sinai; amu iyie enkorrok ino oitanapa iyiook, ajo, ‘Entayu ilpolosien to ldoinyo, nintisinyinyi ninye.’ ”" 
Exodus19:24 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye “Tadoi shomo pee ilepu ayau Aron te nebo iyie; kake mincho ilapolosak o ltung'ana elang'u olpolosie aailepu enetii Olaitoriani menang'are ake Olaitoriani ninche.” 
Exodus19:25 Nelo Musa adoyio enetii iltung'ana neliki ninche. 
Exodus20:1 Neiro Olaitoriani kulo rorei pooki ajo," 
Exodus20:2 “Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo likiyau aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, aitung'uaa enkaji e sinkaisho." 
Exodus20:3 Miaata ake kulie aitin te dukuya nanu. 
Exodus20:4 Mintobiraki kewan enkitanyaanyukoto nagueta, arashu ae nanyaanyukie ae toki te shumata te keper arashu enatii abori enkop, arashu enatii atua tiabori enkop." 
Exodus20:5 Mirrugokino ninche arashu isiaai ninche; amu ore nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino ara Enkai olom, naitusuj nkera nkitarruorrot oo loo menye o metabaiki eishoi e uni o eni ong'uan e lelo laaiba nanu," 
Exodus20:6 kake kaitodolu enyorrata nauno too nkalifuni e lelo laanyor nanu neibung nkitanapat aainei. 
Exodus20:7 “Mimpot aasishore enkarna o Laitoriani Enkai ino pesho amu meikenaa Olaitoriani ajo meeta enkitarruoroto ilo oipot enkarna enye pesho. 
Exodus20:8 “Tadamu enkolong e Sabato, inchoo eaku sinyati." 
Exodus20:9 Too nkolong'i ile taasisho, nias isiaaitin inono pooki;" 
Exodus20:10 kake ore te nkolong e naapishana naa sabato to Laitoriani Enkai ino; ore te ina olong nimiaas hoo ae siaai, iyie arashu olayioni lino, arashu entito ino, o sinka lino lee, arashu esinka ino, arashu inkishu inono, arashu olomoni otii atua enkang ino." 
Exodus20:11 Amu too nkolong'i ile eitobira Olaitoriani shumata o enkop, o enaiposha, o nena pooki naatii atua ninche, neyeng'iyeng'a te nkolong e naapishana. Metaa etamayiana Olaitoriani enkolong e naapishana neitaa sinyati." 
Exodus20:12 “Iyanyita minyi o ng'utunyi pee eaku inkolong'i inono kumok te ina kop nikincho Olaitoriani Enkai ino. 
Exodus20:13 “Miar metua. 
Exodus20:14 “Miloloito. 
Exodus20:15 “Mipurrisho. 
Exodus20:16 “Minteeniki ilo le latia ino elejare. 
Exodus20:17 “Ming'uar enkaji e ilo le latia ino; ming'uar enkitok e ilo le latia ino, arashu osinka lenye, arashu esinka enye, arashu olkiteng lenye, arashu osikiria lenye, arashu hoo ae toki ole latia ino.”" 
Exodus20:18 Ore ake pee ening iltung'ana pooki ndarat nedol inkiwuang'at, o embuakunoto e ntarumpeta o empuruo to ldoinyo, neirut iltung'ana neikirikira, nelamari aaitashe tenelakua." 
Exodus20:19 Nejoki ninche Musa, “Irorie iyie iyiook, amu eikining; kake nchoo metaa mme Enkai nairorie iyiook, mikiye ake.”" 
Exodus20:20 Nejoki Musa iltung'ana, “Emiureshoyu, amu keewuo ake Enkai atem intae, pee aa ore euriata enye nelotu dukuya nkonyek inyi, pee miasiasa ake ing'ok.”" 
Exodus20:21 Nelamari iltung'ana aaitashe te nelakua, etaa kenyikaki Musa ina aimin nairrusha te ine netii Enkai." 
Exodus20:22 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ena tiaaki iltung'ana loo Siraeli: ‘Itoduaakita ntae ate nchere airorie nanu intae atii keper." 
Exodus20:23 Mintayuyu nkaitin e nkosholai pee eaku te nebo nanu, nimintaikiki sii ate nkaitin e sahabu." 
Exodus20:24 Olperere le nkulupuoni ninye kintaikiki nanu nikipolosakiki te nchumata enye ilasarri linyi oo pejori o lasarri linyi le seriani; enker inyi o lkiteng linyi. Ore pooki wueji nagelu metadamunyeki enkarna ai naa kalotu enitii namayian intae. 
Exodus20:25 Naa ti nikintaikiki intae nanu olperere lo lasar loo soito, mishetutu too soito oogueta, amu ti niguetiguete te ntolu nisarkionienie." 
Exodus20:26 Nimikedikede too nkedeta olperere lai lo lasar, pee mimbalayuyu nchere michopopo.’" 
Exodus21:1 “Kuna ninche nkitanapat nipik dukuya ninche. 
Exodus21:2 Ti ninyiang'u orrindik loo Lhebrania, neasisho ninye ilarin ile, ore to lari liopishana neipang ninye alo elakuno, nemelak toki." 
Exodus21:3 Tenaa keewuo apa aa ninye ake, nelo ninye aa ninye ake; te neewuo apa eyamishe nelo enkitok enye te nebo ninye." 
Exodus21:4 Te neishoo apa olkitok lenye enkitok neiki ninye ilayiok arashu ntoyie, neaku enkitok o nkera enyena ino lkitok lenye nelo ninye openy." 
Exodus21:5 Kake te neibalunye orrindik ajo, ‘Kanyor olkitok lai, o enkitok ai, o nkera aainei; malo nanu alakunoyu,’" 
Exodus21:6 neyau olkitok lenye enetii Enkai, neyau ninye kutuk aji arashu ntaloishin e kutuk aji neud olkitok lenye enkiok enye to ltidu; neisiaai ninye te nkishui pooki." 
Exodus21:7 “Te nemir oltung'ani entito enye aitaa errindik nemelo ae kata anaa enapuo irrindiki lewa. 
Exodus21:8 Te nemeitiship olkitok lenye, laa ninye otisiraka kewan, neisho ninye meinyiang'uni ninye, meeta ninye esipata namirakinye iltung'ana loo loreren amu etonyorra apa ninye te sunkureisho." 
Exodus21:9 Te nesiraki oltung'ani olayioni lenye entito rrindik neiko ninye anaa entito enye. 
Exodus21:10 Te neyamaki kewan enkitok e are nemeitong'or endaa enye, o nkilani enyena o enjung'ore e ina kitok botor." 
Exodus21:11 Naa te nemeitaas olee ninye kuna pokira uni, nelo ninye aing'uaa ninye pesho, metii elaata oo mpisai." 
Exodus21:12 “Ore pooki ng'ae oosh oltung'ani near metua, neari metua." 
Exodus21:13 Kake te neitu eirrag arreshu ninye, kake Enkai ake natorikoyie metabatatakinoyu inkaik enyena, naa kegelaki intae ewueji naa ninye eisikaki." 
Exodus21:14 Kake te neotiki oltung'ani aitirraki olikae pee ear metua, ewaita intae ninye aaitung'uaa olperere lai pee eye." 
Exodus21:15 “Ore pooki ng'ae oosh menye arashu ng'otonye neari metua. 
Exodus21:16 “Ore pooki ng'ae opurroo oltung'ani, pee emir arashu etumi ninye ti atua imasaa enyena, neari metua." 
Exodus21:17 “Ore pooki ng'ae odek menye arashu ng'otonye neari metua. 
Exodus21:18 “Te neishankarra iltung'ana neosh obo olikae to soit arashu te nkaina neitu eye oltung'ani eirraga te rruat," 
Exodus21:19 ore pee edumunye ilo nelo te ntirma, ore ilo otoosho ninye nelakuni; kake elak ina kata naiturrayie neing'or ninye o meishiu alaari." 
Exodus21:20 “Te nedumu oltung'ani eng'udi neosh orrindik lenye, aa olee arashu enkitok, neye orrindik te ine, neitamei ilo tung'ani." 
Exodus21:21 Kake te neitu eye orrindik te nkolong nabo arashu too nkolong'i are, nemeitamei amu ore orrindik naa impisai enyena." 
Exodus21:22 “Te neara iltung'ana nepik entuaa olbae o metapololoyu, nemetii ae torroni natusuja, ore ilo otipika ninye olbae neitalaki te risioroto e nkitalakunoto naitalak ninye olpayian le ina kitok; nelak anaa enanyorraa iladung'ok le nkiguana." 
Exodus21:23 Te nesuju ae torroni neitalakuni enkishui te nkishui," 
Exodus21:24 enkong'u te nkong'u, olalae to lalae, enkaina te nkaina, enkeju te nkeju," 
Exodus21:25 enkinosata e nkima te nkinosata e nkima, olbae to lbae, olkordata to lkordata." 
Exodus21:26 “Te neosh oltung'ani enkong'u o rrindik lenye, olee arashu enkitok, neitarruoo, neisho ninye ilo rrindik meshomo te nkaraki enkong'u." 
Exodus21:27 Te neitayu olalae lo rrindik lenye, olee arashu enkitok, nelo ilo rrindik te nkaraki olalae." 
Exodus21:28 “Te near olkiteng oltung'ani lee arashu enkitok metua, neari ilo kiteng too soito metua; nemenyae inkiri enyena; ore olopeny ilo kiteng nelakuni." 
Exodus21:29 Kake te netamoo ilo kiteng ear iltung'ana, neikooki olopeny neany ening, near ilo kiteng metua olee arashu enkitok, neari ilo kiteng too soito metua, neari sii olopeny metua." 
Exodus21:30 Naa te neigeroki metawalu enkishui enye nelak ninye meitajeu enkishui enye esiana pooki naba anaa enatudung'okoki. 
Exodus21:31 Te near olkiteng olayioni le likae tung'ani arashu entito, neiguanareki olopeny te risioroto ena kitanapata nabo." 
Exodus21:32 “Te near olkiteng orrindik metua, olee arashu enkitok, neisho olopeny olkitok le ilo rrindiki shekeli tomoni uni e nkosholai. Neari ilo kiteng too soito metua." 
Exodus21:33 “Te neing'uaa oltung'ani engumoto menuka arashu te netur oltung'ani engumoto nemenuk, nedoiki olkiteng arashu osikiria atua," 
Exodus21:34 neitobir olopeny ina gumoto neisho impisai olopeny o lkiteng o sikiria neaku ina natua enenye. 
Exodus21:35 “Te near olkiteng le likae tung'ani olkiteng le likae metua nemir ninche ilo kiteng oishu neor impisai enyena. Neor sii ina ng'ues natua. 
Exodus21:36 Naa te neyioloi aajo etamoo oshi ilo kiteng earisho neitu eing'or olopeny, nelak ninye olkiteng to lkiteng neaku ina ng'ues natua enenye." 
Exodus22:1 “Te nepurroo oltung'ani olkiteng arashu enker, neyieng arashu emir, nelak ninye ilmong'i imiet to lkiteng obo, o nkerra ong'uan te nker nabo." 
Exodus22:2 Meeta nchere melak ninye ina toki natupurroyie. Te nemeeta ninye toki, nemiri ninye anaa orrindik, pee elak ina natupurroyie." 
Exodus22:3 Te netumi ina ng'ues natupurroyie ninye ti atua imasaa enyena, aa enkiteng, osikiria arashu enker nelak ninye are te nabo." 
Exodus22:4 Te neibung'i olapurroni egilita enkaji kewarie neari metua; ore ilo otaara ninye metua nemeeta iloikop. Kake tenaa dama ekenyua neeta ninye iloikop. 
Exodus22:5 “Te neisho oltung'ani inkishu edaa te nkurma anaa te nkurma oo sabibu anaa epalaa enkiteng meshomo ainos enkurma e likae tung'ani meeta nchere pee meitalakuni teina naisul naing'uaa enkurma enye oo sabibu. 
Exodus22:6 Te nenya enkima enkop, neibung ilkiku o metaa ore enkanasa nateenaki arashu enkano naitashe arashu enkurma nabulu einosa enkima, ore ilo oinua enkima nelak pooki." 
Exodus22:7 “Te neisho oltung'ani ole latia enye impisai arashu ntokitin metushuma, nepurrorri te nkaji enye, ore te netumi olapurroni, nelak ninye katitin are." 
Exodus22:8 Te neitu etumi olapurroni, ore ilo openy e nkaji nelotu ataaniki Enkai, aitodolu tenaa ketipika ninye enkaina enye atua intokitin ole latia enye arashu eitu epik." 
Exodus22:9 “Ore olomoni pooki opong'oreki, tenaa te nkaraki olkiteng anaa, enkaraki osikiria, anaa enkaraki enker, anaa enkaraki nkilani, arashu pooki toki naimina najoyie oltung'ani, ‘Ninye ena’, neyauni enchankar oo nkaloli pokira dukuya Enkai; ore ilo odung'oki Enkai enkiguana nelaaki katitin are ilo le latia enye." 
Exodus22:10 “Te neisho oltung'ani ole latia enye osikiria arashu olkiteng, arashu enker, arashu ae ng'ues pooki meing'ura, neye, arashu etum olbae, arashu eyae, eitu eduaaya hoo ng'ae," 
Exodus22:11 neaku olmumai to Laitoriani erishata enye pokira pee edoli tenaa ketipika ninye enkaina enye atua imasaa e ilo le latia enye. Nenyorraa olopeny olmumai nemeitalaku enyamu. 
Exodus22:12 Naa tenaa ketupurroyioki too nkaik enyena, nelaaki naa ninye olopeny." 
Exodus22:13 Tenaa ing'uesi e ntim naatara nchoo ninye eyau shakenisho; nemelak ninye enyamu te ina nataara ing'uesi e ntim. 
Exodus22:14 “Te neisilenoo oltung'ani ae toki to le latia enye, netum olbae arashu eye metii olopeny, nelak enyamu pooki." 
Exodus22:15 Naa te netii olopeny te nebo ina kiteng nemelak. Tenaa entoki apa naisilenuoki aasishore nelakieki enatoning'oteki. 
Exodus22:16 “Te neirorie oltung'ani entito neitu eyami, neboitare ninye, neishoru ninye ntokitin e nkaputi te nkaraki ninye, neitaa ninye enkitok enye." 
Exodus22:17 Te neany menye eisho ninye meyama, nelaaki impisai naarisiore ine nkiyama oo ntoyie neitu ae kata eyiolou olee." 
Exodus22:18 “Taara metua enkasakutoni. 
Exodus22:19 “Ore pooki ng'ae ololoitore eng'ues neari metua. 
Exodus22:20 “Ore pooki ng'ae opolosaki kulie aitin neme Olaitoriani ake neitarruorri tukul. 
Exodus22:21 “Eminyal olomoni arashu imbooki ninye enkop, amu irara sii apa intae ilomon te nkop e Misiri." 
Exodus22:22 Minosie osina enkoliai arashu enkerai okishi. 
Exodus22:23 Naa ti ninosie ninche osina naaishiraki ninche nanu, naa kaning nanu olkiyioi lenye," 
Exodus22:24 neyupuyup engoro ai, naar nanu intae to lalem, neaku inkituaak inyi inkolia, neaku inkera inyi okishin." 
Exodus22:25 “Ti nisilenoki impisai obo loo ltung'ana laainei otii atua intae ora aisinani, mitiu te ninye anaa oloitalaku esile niming'oru dupoto te ninye." 
Exodus22:26 Te nelo niya olkila le ilo le latia ino pee intalakunye esile tushukoki ninye eitu edoyio enkolong," 
Exodus22:27 amu ninye ake eitoipore, ninye enkitoipet to sesen lenye; kainyoo naa eitoipore? Naa te naaishiraki ninye nanu, naning amu kara oloata olng'ur." 
Exodus22:28 “Misukeny Enkai nimidek olarikoni loo ltung'ana linono. 
Exodus22:29 “Mimutie te nkishorunoto e nkiputakinoto e nkisampuare ino o te mborei nadooyo e naisho oo sabibu. “Ore olkikau loo layiok linono nikincho nanu. 
Exodus22:30 Ninko sii neijia too lmong'i o too ntare; nchoo eboitare ng'otonye too nkolong'i naapishana; ore te nkolong' e naapishana nikincho nanu. 
Exodus22:31 “Iakuku intae iltung'ana ooitisinyaki te nkaraki nanu; metaa eminyanya inkiri oo ng'uesi naatara lowuarak, enchoo ildiein." 
Exodus23:1 “Mintayuyu intae ilomon le lejare. Mimbung'arere oltung'ani torrono aaitayu enchakenisho e lejare. 
Exodus23:2 Mirubarere esiamo aas intorrok, nimintayuyu shakenisho te nkiguana aarubare esiamo pee inturraa esipata." 
Exodus23:3 Nimintodolu olkep to ltung'ani aisinani te nkiguana enye. 
Exodus23:4 “Ti ninang'arere enkiteng arashu osikiria lo lmanga'tinta lino eimina tushukoki ninye. 
Exodus23:5 Ti nidol osikiria li obo likimba etepetikia olola enkop, nimilo aing'uaa, taretoki ninye metudumu olola." 
Exodus23:6 “Mintapong'oo esipata naipirakinore ilo aisinani te nkiguana enye. 
Exodus23:7 Talama enkitang'oroto e lejare, nimiar metua ole meeta entioto o lasipani, amu maikenaki nanu esipata olarruoni." 
Exodus23:8 Niming'amu entoki e ropare, amu ore eropare naa keitamodok ilkituaak neinyal erishata e lelo loo sipat." 
Exodus23:9 “Misoruru olomoni, iyiololo oltau lo lomoni, amu irara apa intae ilomon te nkop e Misiri." 
Exodus23:10 “Too larin ile entuun nisampumpu nkurman inyi; 
Exodus23:11 kake ore to lari li opishana nipalipala nimisampumpu hoo ae toki nabulu. Pee enya ilaisinak le lelo tung'ana linyi; ore inaaleku nenya ing'uesi e ntim. Ninkoko neijia too sabibu linyi o too lng'anayio linyi. 
Exodus23:12 “Entaas esiaai inyi too nkolong'i ile, kake ore te nkolong e naapishana niyeng'iyeng'a pee etum olkiteng lino o sikiria lino enkiyeng'iyengata, negolu olayioni le rrindik ino o ilo dokunoti." 
Exodus23:13 Embung'a nena pooki natiaaka intae, nimimpotipoto ake nkarn e kulie aitin arashu minchosho metoning'i eimu nkutukie inyi." 
Exodus23:14 “Katitin uni to lari kintobiraki nanu osirua. 
Exodus23:15 Imbung'a osirua loo mukateni neitu eisuijieki, anaa apa enaaitanapa, ninya imukateni neitu eisuijieki too nkolong'i naapishana te nkolong natudung'oki olapa le Abibu amu te ninye apa itupukutuo aaing'uaa Misiri. Meetae oltung'ani olotu dukuya nanu too nkaik naarook." 
Exodus23:16 Imbung'a osirua le nkisampuare, oo lng'anayio le dukuya le siaai ino, te nena nintera aun ti atua enkurma, imbung'a osirua le nkiturrurrorre te nkiting'oto o lari, ti ninturrur te nkurma lelo ng'anayio le siaai ino." 
Exodus23:17 Katitin uni to lari epuonu ilewa linyi pooki dukuya o Laitoriani Enkai. 
Exodus23:18 “Mintayu osarge lo lasar lai te nebo imukateni naaisuijieki arashu inchosho eilata o sirua lai eirrag o mekenyu. 
Exodus23:19 “Ore ilng'anayio ooituruku le lelo le dukuya le nkop ino iyau enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai ino. Miyierie, olkuoo kule e ng'otonye." 
Exodus23:20 “Ng'ura, airriwaa olmalaika dukuya iyie, pee kirrip iyie te nkoitoi, nikiyau iyie ewueji naidipa aitobira." 
Exodus23:21 Toning'o ninye nias enajo, migolong'aki ninye, amu mikipalaki ninye enkitarruoroto ino; amu etii enkarna ai atua ninye." 
Exodus23:22 “Kake ti nining asipu oltoilo lenye nias nena pooki najo, naaku nanu olmang'atinta loo lmang'ati linono nagilunore lelo likigilunore iyie." 
Exodus23:23 “Te nelo olmalaika lai dukuya intae, neyau intae atua Ilamori, o Ilhiti, o Ilperesi, o Ilkanaani, o Ilhifi, o Ilyebusi, te najutu nanu ninche, (aishu)," 
Exodus23:24 nimirrugokino iyie inkaitin enye, arashu aisiaai ninche, arashu aas anaa enaishiaakino isiaatin enye, kake tusulai ninche tukul nibel ing'apeta enye metaa mbelat." 
Exodus23:25 Olaitoriani Enkai ino isiayia, naa kamayian nanu emukate ino o enkare ino; naiwuang'ie emueyian ti atua intae." 
Exodus23:26 Ore te nkop ino nemetii enkitok naibiru arashu enkolupi. Kaaisho nanu iyie enkishui naado. 
Exodus23:27 Kairriu nanu olkirutoto lai meshomo te dukuya ntae napik enkiuyiaui iltung'ana pooki likiarare naisho ilmang'ati linono pooki mikimbelekenyata aailany. 
Exodus23:28 Kapik nanu ilmang'ati linono enkuretisho, naaraa Ilhifi, o Ilkanaani o Ilhiti mikishomo aaing'uaa." 
Exodus23:29 Maaraa nanu ninche meshomo te dukuya iyie to lari obo, pee meaku ake enkop ailitani neponari ilowuarak le ntim nikintanyamal." 
Exodus23:30 Maakutiti maa kutiti aaraa ninche meshomo te dukuya iyie, metaba anaa niponari nimbung enkop." 
Exodus23:31 Napik nanu olpolosie lino ebaiki Enaiposha Nanyokie o metabaiki enaiposha oo Lfilisti, o ebaiki olpurkel o metabaiki olkeju le Frati; amu kayau lelo oomanya enkop apik enkaina ino, niaraa iyie ninche te dukuya iyie." 
Exodus23:32 Mining'ore aitayunye osotua ninche arashu te nebo nkaitin enye. 
Exodus23:33 Metoni ninche te nkop ino, pee mikipik ake easata oo ng'ok ti alo nanu; amu ti nisiaai nkaitin enye meeta nchere pee meaku ina orreshet te iyie.”" 
Exodus24:1 Nejoki ninye Musa, “Ilepu wou enetii Olaitoriani, iyie o Aron, o Nadabu, o Abihu o lpayiani ntomoni naapishana loo Siraeli, enteserem te nelakua." 
Exodus24:2 Musa ake olotu ataaniki Olaitoriani, kake mepuonu ilkulikae aanyiku, nemeilepu iltung'ana te nebo ninye.”" 
Exodus24:3 Nelotu Musa, neliki iltung'ana irorei pooki lo Laitoriani o nkitanapat pooki; newalu iltung'ana pooki to ltoilo obo nejo, “Ore irorei pooki ooiroro Olaitoriani naa eikiaas.”" 
Exodus24:4 Neiger Musa irorei pooki lo Laitoriani. Nedumunye ayooki tadekenya neshet olperere lo lasar te ntonata o ldoinyo, o ng'apeta tomon o are aitorisioki iloshon tomon o are loo Siraeli." 
Exodus24:5 Neirriwaa ilbarnot loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, ooitaituo nkishorot oo ilasarri oopejori nepolosaki Olaitoriani nkishorot, ilasarri le seriani oo lmong'i." 
Exodus24:6 Nedumu Musa olpisiai lo sarge nepik ingirran, ore olikae pisiai lo sarge nebukoki olperere." 
Exodus24:7 Neitoki adumu embuku osotua neisomaki iltung'ana metoning'o; nejo ninche, “Ore nena pooki naatejo Olaitoriani naa eikiaas, naa eikining'ishoyu iyiook.”" 
Exodus24:8 Nedumu Musa osarge neisuaaki iltung'ana nejo, “Eng'ura osarge lo sotua oitobira Olaitoriani o ntae te risioroto e kulo rorei pooki.”" 
Exodus24:9 Neitoki Musa o Aron, o Nadabu o Abihu o lpayiani ntomoni naapishana loo Siraeli aailep," 
Exodus24:10 nedol ninche Enkai oo Siraeli, netii abori nkejek enyena entoki neeijo oltiren oitobiraki too soito sidain, ooikununo anaa keper te mua." 
Exodus24:11 Neitu ninye eiteleiki enkaina enye lelo arikok loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli; nedol ninche Enkai, neokisho nedaa." 
Exodus24:12 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ilepu wou enatii to ldoinyo, nianyisho te ine; naa kaaisho nanu isoito dapashi, te nebo nkitanapat, naigero nanu te nkaraki enkiteng'enare enye.”" 
Exodus24:13 Nedumunye Musa te nebo osinka lenye Yoshua, neilep Musa alo atua oldoinyo le Nkai." 
Exodus24:14 Nejoki ninye ilpayiani, “Entaanyu iyiook tene o metaba anaa nikintoki aapuonu enitii, naa ng'ura, etii Aron o Huri te nebo intae; ore pooki ng'ae oata enyamali nchoo elo enetii ninche.”" 
Exodus24:15 Neilep Musa alo oldoinyo, neitoip enkatampoi oldoinyo," 
Exodus24:16 neton enkitoo e Nkai to ldoinyo le Sinai neitoip enkatampoi inkolong'i ile; ore te nkolong e naapishana neipot ninye Musa ti atua ina atampoi. 
Exodus24:17 Ore eloito e nkitoo o Laitoriani neikununo anaa enkima nayupuyup te nchumata o ldoinyo te dukuya iltung'ana loo Siraeli. 
Exodus24:18 Nejing Musa atua enkatampoi neilepaki oldoinyo. Netii apa Musa oldoinyo nkolong'i artam o nkewaritin artam. 
Exodus25:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Exodus25:2 “Irorie iltung'ana loo Siraeli, pee aaitaiki enkishoroto. Tang'amu enkishoroto te rishata ai te pooki tung'ani otonyorra aishoru to lpela, ning'amu iyie enkishoroto te nkaraki nanu." 
Exodus25:3 Naa ena enkishoroto ning'amu te ninche: sahabu, o enkosholai, o suyai," 
Exodus25:4 nkarash pusi o sinteti, o naanyokie, o katani napuyiapui o lpapit loo nkineji," 
Exodus25:5 ndapan naanota oo lmeregeshi, o ndapan oo nkineji, imbaoi oo lera," 
Exodus25:6 eilata oo ltaai, o enkorropil o te ilata naaputishoreki o te rropili o lbani," 
Exodus25:7 o soito barrikon ooji oniks o lkulikae soito oopiki olkila lo lapolosani kitok o ina bene enye o lgoo. 
Exodus25:8 Nchoo ninche aaitobiraki nanu ewueji nesinya, pee atum atotona ti atua ninche." 
Exodus25:9 Anaa nena pooki naaitodol iyie naaipirta olchetei to lng'obor lo Laitoriani o masaa enyena pooki, neaku intobir aiko neijia." 
Exodus25:10 “Naa keitobir ninche osanduku too nkeek o lerai; intemat are o lpisiai enkadoro, entemata nabo o lpisiai endapasho, naa entemata nabo o lpisiai enkilepata." 
Exodus25:11 Nimur ninye te sahabu nasila, nintoip oriong o atua, nipik enkamanaa e sahabu aitaman ninye." 
Exodus25:12 Nipik ilgiso oong'uan le sahabu oonapieki, nipik ninche nkejek enyena pokira ong'uan, ilgiso oare te nchoto enye nabo, o lgiso oare te nkae shoto enye." 
Exodus25:13 Nintayu ing'apeta oo nkeek o lchani oji olerai, nimur ninche te sahabu." 
Exodus25:14 Nipik nena bokishi atua lelo giso too mbat o sanduku pee enapieki ilo sanduku. 
Exodus25:15 Netoni nena keek, ti atua lelo giso too mbat o sanduku pee enapieki ilo sanduku; nemeitayuni aaitung'uaa ninye." 
Exodus25:16 Nipik atua osanduku ina shakenisho naaishoo nanu iyie. 
Exodus25:17 Nintoki aitayu olorika lo lng'ur le sahabu nasila; laa intemat are o lpisiai enkadoro naa entemata nabo o lpisiai endapasho. 
Exodus25:18 Nipik ilmalaika oare ooji ilkerubi le sahabu; te nkidong'ore intobir ninche, too nkaloli pokira are e ilo orika lo lng'ur." 
Exodus25:19 Intayu olkerubi obo te nkalo nabo nintayu olikae te nkae shoto; te ntoki nabo intobira lelo kerubi o ilo orika lo lng'ur too nkaloli enyena pokira are. 
Exodus25:20 Nelak lelo kerubi inaipuko enye aaitushur olorika lo lng'ur too naipuko enye, neipira nkomomi enye eing'orita lkerubi ilo sanduku." 
Exodus25:21 Naa eipik ilo orika lo lng'ur enchumata o sanduku; ore atua ilo sanduku nipik ina shakenisho naaisho nanu. 
Exodus25:22 Te ine nanu aalotu atumore, naa te shumata olorika lo lng'ur o te rishata e lelo kerubi ootii enchumata o sanduku le nchakenisho, aairorie nanu iyie ti alo nena pooki naaisho nanu iyie too nkitanapat te nkaraki itung'ana loo Siraeli." 
Exodus25:23 “Naa ntobira emesa oo nkeek olerai ntemat are enkadoro, naa entemata nabo endapasho, naa entemata nabo o lpisiai enkilepata." 
Exodus25:24 Imulumula te sahabu nasila nipik enkamanaa e sahabu. 
Exodus25:25 Nipik aitaman enkamanaa e ntemata e ndapasho endap 
Exodus25:26 naa ntobiraki ilgiso oo ng'uan le sahabu nieniki lelo giso ilpijat pokira oong'uan too nkejek enyena pokira ong'uan. 
Exodus25:27 Neirrag lelo giso te mbata e nkamanaa pee eimieki nena bokishi naanapieki emesa. 
Exodus25:28 Nintayuyu mbokishi o lerai nimur te sahabu naa kuna enapieki emesa. 
Exodus25:29 Naa intobir isaanini enyena e nkorropil o masaa enyena naapikunyeki olasar opikuni te sahabu nasila ntobir ninche. 
Exodus25:30 Nipik emukate e Nkitaduaaroto emesa dukuya nanu anaake. 
Exodus25:31 “Naa intobir enkitashet e sahabu nasila napiki iltaai. Ore entonata o empolos enye neitobiri te siaai e nkidong'ore; ore nkikompeni enyena, o neeigululu enyena, o ntapuka enyena neitaae pooki nabo o enkitashet." 
Exodus25:32 Nepiki ilng'osil ile ooiipang too nkaloli enyena, ilng'osil okuni te nkibung'et te nkalo nabo o lng'osil okuni te nkibung'et te nkae alo enye;" 
Exodus25:33 netii ake nkikompeni uni naikunuaki anaa intapuka o lgulului, eeta ake nabo eneigululu o entapukai, to lng'osila obo, o nkikompeni uni naikunuaki anaa ntapuka o lgulului, meetae ake ene meeta eneigululu o entapukai, to likae ng'osila, netiu neijia pokira ile ooipang'u te ina kibung'et." 
Exodus25:34 Ore te nkitashet kewan netii inkikompeni ong'uan naikunuaki anaa ilgululu, eeta ineigululu o ntapuka," 
Exodus25:35 netii ake eneigululu nabo abori ilng'osil oare o oiriamari te lelo ngosil ile le ina kitashet. 
Exodus25:36 Ore nena kiyiaa enye oo ntapuka o lng'osil lenye neitaa entoki nabo o ninye; neaku pooki entoki nabo e siaai naidong'uoki te sahabu nasila. 
Exodus25:37 Nintaiki iltaai oopishana, nepiki iltaai pee eitawang'aki dukuya enye." 
Exodus25:38 Ore intokitin naarieki iltaai o neeiteleikini naa ile sahabu nasila. 
Exodus25:39 Te ntalanta nabo e sahabu eitobiri te nebo kuna masaa pooki. 
Exodus25:40 Ning'or nchere, intobira te nkitanyaanyukoto enye, apa nikintoduaaki to ldoinyo." 
Exodus26:1 “Ore ake tenebo nena intobira, olng'obor le Nkai too lkarash le katani napuyiapui tomon, pusi, o lmorijo o lpilei, neripakini ilkerubi te nkarriayiano oleng." 
Exodus26:2 Ore enkadoro, e pooki karasha nchoo eaku intemat tikitam o isiet enkadoro, ore endapasho e pooki karasha naa intemat ong'uan endapasho. Nerisioroyu ilkarash pooki." 
Exodus26:3 Nchoo eripi ilkarash imiet aaibung'ie te nebo, neitokini aarip aaibung'ie ilkarash imiet te nebo." 
Exodus26:4 Intayu ilgoso le nkopito pusi loo nkarash te matua e oriong e lelo karash te ntukus e dukuya. Nintoki ake aiko neijia, aitayu ilkiintani pusi loo nkarash te matua e oriong e ina tukus e are." 
Exodus26:5 Ilkiintani onom intayu te ntukus nabo oo lkarash, nintoki aitayu ilkiintani onom te matua e oriong e ina tukus e are oo lkarash; ore lelo goso nchoo eipira." 
Exodus26:6 Intayu ilala onom le sahabu oololo paa ninche intutumie entukus oo lkarash o enkae pee eaku enkaji e Nkai entoki nabo. 
Exodus26:7 “Intobira sii nkilani oo lpapit loo nkineji naaitushur olng'obor; ntobira nkilani tomon o obo. 
Exodus26:8 Ore enkadoro e pooki kila naa intemat tomoni uni enkadoro naa intemat ong'uan e ndapasho; ore nena kilani pokira tomon o obo nerisioroyu. 
Exodus26:9 Nintutum ilkarash imiet te nebo, o nkilani ile te nebo, ore enkila e ile nipud te shumata te mbata e njing'et o lng'obor." 
Exodus26:10 Nintayu ilkiintani onom te matua e nkila ti oriong e ntukus nabo, o lkiintani onom te matua e oriong e ntukus e are e nkila." 
Exodus26:11 “Nintayu iltidii ooriwuo lo suyai onom, nipik lelo tidii atua lelo kiintani nintutum olng'obor te nebo metaa entoki nabo." 
Exodus26:12 Ore ina shoto naleku too lkarash o lng'obor, ilo pisiai lo lkarasha, neisiong'a ti oriong o lng'obor." 
Exodus26:13 Ore ina matua naleku te nchoto nabo, o ematua naleku te nkae shoto, te nkadoro oo nkilani o lng'obor." 
Exodus26:14 Neisiong'a too mbat o lng'obor enkikenet oo ndapan naanota oo lmeregeshi o noo nkineji. 
Exodus26:15 “Ntobira intorioi irubat oo sunta o lng'obor too nkeek o lerai. 
Exodus26:16 Ore ake erubata e suntai naa intemat tomon enkadoro o entemata nabo o lpisiai e ndapasho. 
Exodus26:17 Netii ake erubata nabo ilng'amat oare pee etumi aairuburubie te nebo; ninko neijia too rubat pooki 
Exodus26:18 ntobira nkeek o lng'obor, irubat tikitam e nkosholai te nkalo e kopikop." 
Exodus26:19 Nkitotoneta artam e nkosholai ti abori nena rubat tikitam oo sunta, nkitotoneta are ti abori erubata nabo too lng'amat lenyena pokira oare, o nkitotoneta are te rubata nabo too lng'amat lenyenapokira oare." 
Exodus26:20 Ore te nchoto e are o lng'obor, te nkalo e moikuape irubat tikitam oo sunta." 
Exodus26:21 O nkitotoneta enye tikitam e nkosholai, nkitotoneta are ti abori erubata nabo o nkitotoneta are ti abori enkae rubata." 
Exodus26:22 Ore ti oriong o lng'obor te nkalo o loo ntoluo nintayu irubat ile oo sunta. 
Exodus26:23 Nintayu irubat are too lpijat lo lng'obor ti oriong; 
Exodus26:24 nepaasha ninche te kop kake nchoo eibung'a te shumata, to lgisoi le dukuya, netiu inji te pokira are; neitayu ilpijat pokira are." 
Exodus26:25 Naa keaku irubat isiet, tenebo nkitotoneta enye e nkosholai, nkitotoneta tomon o ile, o nkitotoneta are tiabori erubata nabo, o nkitotoneta are tiabori enkae rubata." 
Exodus26:26 “Nintayu iloom lo lerai, imiet too rubat e nkalo nabo olng'obor," 
Exodus26:27 o loom imiet too rubat enkae alo o lng'obor, o loom imiet too rubat o lng'bor te nkalo e oriong te nkalo o loo ntoluo." 
Exodus26:28 Ore ilo loomi le mpolos oitorit nena rubat neng'ung'ur ebaiki enkiting'oto o metabaiki enkiting'oto. 
Exodus26:29 Nimulumul irubat te sahabu, nintayu ilgiso lenye le sahabu pee eibung iloom, nimur iloom te sahabu." 
Exodus26:30 Nishetu olng'obor te nkitanyaanyukoto apa anaa enikintoduaaki to ldoinyo. 
Exodus26:31 “Nintobir oliaatua too ntokitin pusi o sinteti o mpilei o nkarash e katani napuiyiapui. Neitobir te siaai e nkarriayiano neripakini ilkerubi. 
Exodus26:32 Neisiong ninche too ng'apeta o lerai nemur te sahabu, neeta ilala oo lolo le sahabu, too nkitotoneta ong'uan e nkosholai." 
Exodus26:33 Niik oliatua te lelo ala oo lolo, niyau osanduku le nchakenisho atua oliaatua; nikirishaki ilo liaatua ewueji sinyati o ine nesinya oleng." 
Exodus26:34 Nipik ilo orika lo lng'ur shumata ilo sanduku le nchakenisho ine wueji nesinya oleng. 
Exodus26:35 Nipik ina mesa oriong o liaatua, nipik enkitashet o ltaa enkalo e kopikop o lng'obor neipirakinore emesa; nipik emesa enkalo e moikuape." 
Exodus26:36 “Ore kutuk aji o lng'obor nintayu olkarasha pus o olmorijoi, o lpile, oitobiruno te kitani napuyiapui napiyaya, neikodi to ltidu."
