Exodus26:37 Nintaiki lelo karash ing'apeta imiet o lerai nimur te sahabu, ore ilala lenye oololo naa ile sahabu nintaiki nkitotoneta imiet o suyai." 
Exodus27:1 “Ntobira olperere too nkeek o lerai intemat imiet enkadoro naa intemat imiet endapasho; nerisioro olperere too nkaloli pooki. Ore enkilepata enye naa intemat uni. 
Exodus27:2 Nipik imowuarak lelo pijat lenyena pokira oong'uan; neaku nena mowuarak entoki nabo o ninye. Nimur to suyai. 
Exodus27:3 Nintayu imotioo enyena naaiwouo nkuruon, o ilkijikoni o ngirran o ntokitin naaitobirieki enkima; ore ntokitin enyena pooki naasishoreki nintobir to suyai." 
Exodus27:4 Nintaiki sii ngesherreta naashetuno to suyai; ore nena ngesherreta nipik ilgiso oong'uan lo suyai ilpijat lenyena pokira oong'uan. 
Exodus27:5 Tipika ina ng'esherrie abori emanaroto o lperere pee eitorit ina ng'esherrie o lperere ti abori. 
Exodus27:6 Nintayu imbokishi o lperere, imbokishi o lerai nimur ninche to suyai;" 
Exodus27:7 nepiki nena bokishi aaimie lelo giso metaa ketii imbokishi nchot pokira o lperere te nenapi. 
Exodus27:8 Intobira too nkeek, nintugum anaa apa enikintoduaaki to ldoinyo, neitobirunye atiu neijia." 
Exodus27:9 “Intobira endung'oroto olng'obor le Nkai. Ore te nkalo e kopikop nepiki endung'oroto olkarasha oisiong'a sidai oshetuno too usin naapiyaya loo intemat iip enkadoro te nkalo nabo. 
Exodus27:10 Ore ing'apeta enye naa tikitam, ore nkitotoneta enye naa tikitam, lo suyai, kake ore ilala oololo loo ng'apeta, o olgoso lenye naa ine nkosholai." 
Exodus27:11 Neijia sii etiu enkadoro enye te nkalo e moikuape, tipika nkisiong'at oo ilkarash loo ntemat iip. Nera ing'apeta enye tikitam nera nkitotoneta enye tikitam naa ino suyai, kake ore lelo ala oololo loo lgoso lenye naa ile nkosholai." 
Exodus27:12 Ore te nkalo e ndoyioroto e nkolong tipika ilkarash onom te nkadoro o ng'apeta tomon o nkitotoneta tomon. 
Exodus27:13 Ore endapasho e ndung'oroto te nkalo najing'ieki te nkilepunoto e nkolong naa intemat onom. 
Exodus27:14 Ore ilkarash te nkalo nabo e kishomi naa intemat tomon o imiet, o ng'apeta uni o nkitotoneta uni." 
Exodus27:15 Ore te nkae shoto naa intemat tomon o imiet, o ng'apeta uni o nkitotoneta uni." 
Exodus27:16 Ore enkishomi e ndung'oroto nipik aitolok olkarasha loo ntemat tikitam te nkadoro oata emua pus o emorijoi o empile nashetuno te nkarasha sidai napuyiapui. Neikodoki te ripare o ltidu; nepiki ing'apeta ong'uan o nkitotoneta ong'uan. 
Exodus27:17 Ore ing'apeta pooki naamanita endung'oroto neitutumi te nkeene e nkosholai, ore lala lenye oololo naa ile nkosholai, ore nkitotoneta enye naa ino suyai." 
Exodus27:18 Ore enkadoro e ndung'oroto naa intemat imiet. Netii ilkarash ooluaa sidain oopuyiapui o nkitotoneta o suyai. 
Exodus27:19 Ore imasaa pooki e ilo ng'obor e pooki siaai, o ncheito enyena pooki endung'oroto naa ino suyai." 
Exodus27:20 “Nintanap iltung'ana loo Siraeli pee kiyaki ninche eilata naironyuno nasila oo loirienito te nkaraki ewang'an, pee eiki oltaa meiyupuyupo enkata pooki." 
Exodus27:21 Ore te ilo ng'obor o tumoreki, ti oriong ilo liatua otii dukuya enchakenisho, neitobir Aron o layiok lenyena ebaiki teipa o metabaiki tadekenya te dukuya Olaitoriani. Neaku enkitanapata ntarasi naibung'i ti atua iishoritin enye iltung'ana loo Siraeli." 
Exodus28:1 “Niyau iyie aitinyiku Aron, olalashe lino, o layiok lenyena te nebo ninye, laa ninche ti atua iltung'ana loo Siraeli laaisiaai anaa ilapolosak. Aron o layiok lenyena, Nadab o Abihu o Eliesa o Isamar." 
Exodus28:2 Nintaiki Aron olalashe lino ilkilani oosinya, te nkitoo o te sidano." 
Exodus28:3 Nirorie lelo pooki oata enkidimata, lelo laishoo eng'eno, pee eitobir ilkilani le Aron, pee eitisinyi te mpolosare ai." 
Exodus28:4 Kuna inkilani naaitobir ninche, enkila o lgoo, enkila dorrop, olkila oado, enkila e oriong naikodo o enkarasha e lukunya, o enkimeita; neitobir ninche nkilani naasinya te nkaraki Aron olalashe lino o layiok lenyena pee aaisiaai ninche anaa ilapolosak." 
Exodus28:5 “Neng'amu ninche sahabu o nkarash pusi o morijo o mpilei o enkatani napuyiapui napiyaya. 
Exodus28:6 Neitobir ninche enkila dorrop te sahabu, too usin pusi, o too morijo, o too mpilei o te katani napuyiapui napiyaya te nkarriayiano." 
Exodus28:7 Neeta inkeenta are ooronyi too lpijat lenyena pee eitutumieki te nebo. 
Exodus28:8 O enkimeita naitobiruno te nkarriyiano te nena tokitin, pee eenieki; te sahabu o too usin pusi o sinteti o naanyokie, o naaibor sidain." 
Exodus28:9 Niya isoito are barrikon naaji oniks niguetaki asiraki ninche nkarn oo layiok le Israel," 
Exodus28:10 nkarn enye ile to soit obo, ore nkulie ile naaleku ning'eroki olikae soit, too inot enye." 
Exodus28:11 Anaa enkarriyiano olaguetani omishir isoito, neijia sii iyie inkuna eng'uetakinoto e lelo soito oare nkarn oo layiok le Israel; nipik nena nitaguetua te sahabu." 
Exodus28:12 Nipik lelo soito pooki inkaloli ooronyi le ina kila dorrop, pee eaku isoito oodamunyeki ilayiok le Israel; nenap Aron inkarn enye te dukuya o Laitoriani too ronyi lenyena pee edamuni." 
Exodus28:13 Nipik nkikodot are e sahabu. 
Exodus28:14 O lpisia oare le sahabu nasila, ooirina anaa empito nipik nimbung'ie ina sahabu naikodore enkila." 
Exodus28:15 “Nintobir sii ina kila o lgoo e nkiguana, te nkarriyiano, anaa ina kila dorrop, te sahabu, o too usin pusi o morijo o mpilei o kitani napuyiapui napiyaya." 
Exodus28:16 Nerisioroyu nkaloli pooki, netasha, entemata e ndap enkadoro o entemata e ndap endapasho." 
Exodus28:17 Nipik ilkererin oong'uan loo soito, olkereri lo ltotoi barrikoi, oltotoi onyori o oltotoi onyokie oleng oaku olkereri le dukuya." 
Exodus28:18 Ore olkereri li are naa oltotoi sintet, oltotoi pus oata iltiil o ltotoi sidai oji almasi;" 
Exodus28:19 ore olkereri li okuni naa oltotoi pile, oltotoi owang oji agat, o ltotoi pile oji ametist" 
Exodus28:20 ore olkereri li ong'uan naa oltotoi oji beril, oltotoi oji oniks oltotoi pus oji Jaspa. Neitobir te nkikodo e sahabu." 
Exodus28:21 Nepik isoito tomon o are o nkarn enye anaa inkarn oo layiok le Israel. Netiu ninche anaa olmishire, meetae ake olemeguetuno enkarna enye, too loshon tomon aare." 
Exodus28:22 Nintobiraki ina kila o lgoo ilpisia ooipila anaa impi, le sahabu nasila;" 
Exodus28:23 nintobiraki ina kila o lgoo ilgiso oare le sahabu nipik lelo giso oare ilpijat pokira oare le mbene o lgoo. 
Exodus28:24 Nipik lelo pisia aare le sahabu ooipila atua lelo giso ootii ile mowuarak le mbene o lgoo. 
Exodus28:25 Ore ineeiting'ie lelo pisia oare ooipila nimbung'ie lelo kererin oare le nkikodo e sahabu, nimbung'ie te nkalo e dukuya te nena keenta e nkila dorrop naatii ironyi." 
Exodus28:26 Nintoki aitayu ilgiso aare le sahabu nimbungie lelo lemowuarak aare le nkila to lgoo te nkalo e atua te mbata e ina kila dorrop. 
Exodus28:27 Nintoki aitayu ilgiso aare le sahabu, nimbung'ie ninche te nkalo e dukuya ti abori nena keenta are e nkila dorrop natii ironyi, te nchumata ina kimeita e nkila dorrop naripuno te nkarriyiano." 
Exodus28:28 Neitutum ninche ina kila o lgoo too lgiso lenyena o lgisoi le ina kila dorrop te nkeene pus, pee eirrag te ina kimeita e nkila dorrop naripuno te nkarriyiano, pee melolong'u ina kila o lgoo teina kila dorrop." 
Exodus28:29 “Nenap ninye Aron inkarn oo layiok le Israel te ina kila o lgoo e nkiguana, to ltau lenye, te nelo ninye atua ine wueji nesinya, pee edamuni ninche anaake te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Exodus28:30 Ore ina kila o lgoo e nkiguana tipika Urimu o Sumimu, pee eaku ketii ninche oltau le Aron, te nebo ninye enkata nilo dukuya Olaitoriani. Neaku kenapita ninye Aron enkiguana oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli to ltau lenye te dukuya Olaitoriani anaake." 
Exodus28:31 “Nintayu iyie olkila li oriong pus muj le ina kila dorrop. 
Exodus28:32 Nipik ilo kila enaudoto naimieki endukuya; ore ina audoto neitamani eripata anaa enaudoto e nkila pee mepolosa. 
Exodus28:33 Ore eripata enye ti abori tiripaki ilonyek le usi pus, o empile o enanyokie aitaman, o ntualan e sahabu erishata enye," 
Exodus28:34 entuala e sahabu o long'u, nemanaa te ripata e abori olkila." 
Exodus28:35 Neishop Aron ele kila te neisiaaisho anaa olapolosani. Ore enkorui enye nening'i te nelo atua ine wueji sinyati dukuya Olaitoriani, o te neipang'u boo, pee meye." 
Exodus28:36 “Nintayu enchili e sahabu nasila niguetaki oriong enye, anaa isirat lo lmishire, ‘Sinyati to Laitoriani.’" 
Exodus28:37 Nieniki ina arasha narridieki endukuya te nkeene pus; tipika enkalo e dukuya e ina arasha narridieki endukuya. 
Exodus28:38 Neishop Aron te nkomom enye, neya ninye Aron enkorrok enye pooki torroni naitayuni to lasar osinya, oyanyit iltung'ana loo Siraeli anaa nkishorot enye naasinya. Neton ina masaai anaake te nkomom enye, pee eng'amari nena kishorot te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Exodus28:39 “Niripu olkila te siaai tenkarriyiano te nkarasha sidai napuyiapui, nintayu ina arasha narridieki endukuya te nkarasha sidai napuyiapui, nintayu enkimeita aikodu to ltidu." 
Exodus28:40 “Ore ilayiok le Aron nintaiki ilkilani, o nkimeitani o imaupen. Nintayu ninche te nkitoo o te nkishiaa." 
Exodus28:41 Ninchopoki lelo kilani Aron olalashe lino, te nebo ilayiok lenyena, nibukoki eilata aput ninche, nikinteng'elaki peyie aatum aaisiaayia anaa ilapolosak." 
Exodus28:42 Nintaiki nkilani e atua te nkarasha sidai pee eitoip emasipaisho enye; nkilani naabaiki mpolosi nebaiki nkupesir; 
Exodus28:43 neishop Aron o layiok lenyena te nepuonu aanyikaki olperere lo lasar aaisiaisho te wueji sinyati, meyaki ake ate entorroni meye. Naa keaku ena enkitanapata nauno te ninye o too ishoritin enyena te siadi ninye." 
Exodus29:1 “Nji nkuna te nintisiny ninche, pee aatum aaisiaya anaa ilapolosak. Iwa oloing'oni obo oti o lmeregeshi aare le meeta entioto," 
Exodus29:2 o mukateni neitu eisuijieki o mukateni naamelok neitu eisuijieki naatipikaki eilata, o nkaukau o mukateni neitu eisuijieki naaelieki eilata. Te nkano sidai napuyiapui intayu ninche." 
Exodus29:3 Nepik atua entutua nabo, niyau ninche teina tutua, niyau ilo oing'oni o lelo meregeshi pokira oare." 
Exodus29:4 Niyau Aron o layiok lenyena kutuk aji o lng'obor le ntumo, nintuku ninche te nkare." 
Exodus29:5 Nintayu nkilani ninchopoki Aron enkila e oriong o enkila dorrop, o enkila o lgoo nien empolos te ina kimeita naripuno te nkarriyano e ina kila dorrop." 
Exodus29:6 Ninchopoki enkarasha narridieki endukuya enye. Nipik ilo marisian osinya enchumata e ina arasha. 
Exodus29:7 Niyau ina ilata naputishoreki, nibukoki endukuya enye aput ninye." 
Exodus29:8 Nintoki ayau ilayiok lenyena, ninchopoki ninche inkilani," 
Exodus29:9 nien impolosi enye too nkimeitani, ninchopoki imaupen; neaku enenye empolosare te nkitanapata nauno. Inji nkuna iput Aron o layiok lenyena apik esiaai sinyati." 
Exodus29:10 “Nintoki ayau oloing'oni dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo. Neiteleiki Aron o layiok lenyena inkaik enye endukuya e ilo oing'oni," 
Exodus29:11 niar ilo oing'oni metua te dukuya Olaitoriani te kutuk aji o lng'obor le ntumo. 
Exodus29:12 Niya embata o sarge lo loing'oni nipik imowuarak olperere lo lasar to lkimojino lino; ore olikae sarge mbukoi ti abori olperere lo lasar. 
Exodus29:13 Niya ina kurriny pooki naimulumul imonyit o lkina le monyua, o lairakuj pokira aare eeta enkurriny enye, nipej ninche ten chumata olperere." 
Exodus29:14 Kake ore nkiri o loing'oni, o lchoni lenye, o emodiei enye, nipejoo ninche te nkima tialuo ina ang oo lng'oborri; olasar ninye te nkaraki ing'ok." 
Exodus29:15 “Nintoiki aitayu obo loo lmeregeshi, neiteleiki Aron o layiok lenyena inkaik enye endukuya e ilo meregesh," 
Exodus29:16 niyieng ilo meregesh, nisuaaya osarge lenye te mbata o lperere lo lasar aitaman." 
Exodus29:17 Nintoki adung'udung ilo meregesh, metaa nkutiti kiri, nintuku enkoshoke enye o loilelek nipik ninche te nebo irubat enyena o endukuya enye," 
Exodus29:18 nipejoo olmeregesh pooki te nchumata o lperere lo lasar; olasar opejori te nkima ninye to Laitoriani, esong'ouna naitishipisho, o lasar le nkima to Laitoriani." 
Exodus29:19 “Nintoki aitayu olikae meregesh, neiteleiki Aron o layiok lenyena inkaik enye endukuya o lmeregesh," 
Exodus29:20 niyieng ilo meregesh, niya embata o sarge nipik esegerua e nkiok e tatene e Aron o segeruani oo nkiyiaa e tatene oo layiok lenyena, o lmogirrani loo nkaik enye e tatene, o lmogirrani loo nkejek enye e tatene ore ilo sarge otashare olperere lo lasar nisuaaya aitaman." 
Exodus29:21 Nisuaaya olikai sarge otii enchumata o lperere lo lasar o ina ilata naputishoreki nisuaaki Aron, o lkilani lenyena, o layiok lenyena o lkilani loo layiok lenyena te nebo ninye. Ore ninye o lkilani lenyena nesinyayu, o layiok lenyena, o lkilani loo layiok lenyena te nebo ninye." 
Exodus29:22 “Nintoki sii aitayu eilata o lmeregesh, o eilata o lkidong'oe o enkurriny e nkoshoke, o lkina le monyua o lairakuj pokira are eeta enkurriny enye o emuro e tatene (amu olmeregesh oputishoreki opikieki Aron o layiok lenyena esiaai sinyati)," 
Exodus29:23 nintayu ti atua ntutuan oo mukateni neitu eisuijieki natii dukuya Olaitoriani, emukate nabo namelok natii o enkaukau nabo eilata," 
Exodus29:24 o emukate nipik kuna pooki nkaik e Aron, o nkaik oo layiok lenyena, niyukuyuk iyie ninche metaa olasar oyukuyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Exodus29:25 Nintoki iyie aitayu too nkaik enye, nipejoo to lperere lo lasar metoponai olasar opejori, pee eaku esong'ouna naitishipisho te dukuya Olaitoriani; olasar le nkima to Laitoriani." 
Exodus29:26 “Nintayu oloikulu le ilo meregesh otuputieki Aron aapik esiaai sinyati, niyuk pee eaku olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani; neaku erubata ino." 
Exodus29:27 Nintisiny oloikulu lo lasar oyuki, o ena muro aa ninye erubata o lapolosani, nayukoki, naa ninye eishoruaki teilo meregesh oputishoreki amu te nkaraki Aron o te nkaraki layiok lenyena." 
Exodus29:28 Naa keaku ninche ine Aron o noo layiok lenyena, erubata enye naisho ninche iltung'ana loo Siraeli anaake, too lasarri lenye le seriani; neaku olasar lenye to Laitoriani." 
Exodus29:29 “Ore lelo kilani sinyat le Aron naa keaku iloo layiok lenyena oosuju ninye, pee ebukokini eilata eishopito, neputi ninche eishopito." 
Exodus29:30 Ore ilo ayioni oaku olapolosani erishata enye neishop ninche inkolong'i naapishana, tenelotu atua olng'obor le ntumo aisiaaisho te wueji sinyati." 
Exodus29:31 “Niya ilo meregesh oputishoreki niyier nkiri enyena te wueji sinyati. 
Exodus29:32 Nenya Aron o layiok lenyena nkiri e ilo meregesh o mukateni naatii atua ltutuan te kutuk aji o lng'obor le ntumo. 
Exodus29:33 Nenya ninche nena tokitin naaitobirieki to lning'o lo sotua, pee epikieki ninche esiaai sinyati, neitisinyi, kake menya oltung'ani le boo, amu eisinyat ninche." 
Exodus29:34 Kake te neleku ae kirring'o naputishoreki arashu emukate o mekenyu, nipejoo iyie te nkima ina natelekua, meinosi ninye, amu eisinyati." 
Exodus29:35 “Nintaas ina Aron o layiok lenyena, te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapa; too nkolong'i naapishana ipik ninche ina siaai sinyati." 
Exodus29:36 Ore ake te nkolong nintayu, nipolos oloing'oni pee eaku olasar loo ng'ok lo lning'o lo sotua. Nintayu sii olasar loo ng'ok te nkaraki olperere lo lasar, ti nintayu olning'o lo sotua te ninye, nibukoki ninye eilata, aitisiny." 
Exodus29:37 Too nkolong'i naapishana intayu olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki olperere lo lasar, nintisiny, neaku ilo perere lo lasar sinyati oleng; ore pooki toki naiseyie olperere lo lasar nesinyayu." 
Exodus29:38 “Naa ele olasar lintayu te nchumata o lperere lo lasar, ilkuoo oare le kerra lo lari obo, anaake te nkolong." 
Exodus29:39 Topolosa olkuoo obo le ker tadekenya, ore olikae kuo le ker nipolos teipa." 
Exodus29:40 Ore te nebo ilo kuoo le ker le dukuya irrantilini aare le nkano nasila naipurjare, emborei o ltulet leilata sidai, o emborei o ltulet le naisho oo sabibu pee eaku olasar." 
Exodus29:41 Ore olikae kuo le ker topolosa teipa ninko anaa ilo le tadekenya, nintayu te nebo ninye olasar le nkurma naidong'o, o lasar opikuni. Olasar le nkima ele to Laitoriani, neitishipisho esong'ouna enye." 
Exodus29:42 Keaku ninye olasar opeji anaake tiatua iishoritin inyi te kutuk aji o lng'obor le ntumo, te dukuya Olaitoriani, te ine natumore nanu intae, pee airorie nanu intae te ine." 
Exodus29:43 Te ine atumore iltung'ana loo Siraeli, neitisiny enkitoo ai ine." 
Exodus29:44 Naitisiny nanu ilo ng'obor le ntumo o lperere lo lasar; naitisiny sii Aron o layiok lenyena, pee aaisiaai ninche anaa ilapolosak." 
Exodus29:45 Namany nanu atua ltungana le Israel, naaku Enkai enye." 
Exodus29:46 Neyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai enye, oyaua ninche aaitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, pee atum nanu atotona ti atua ninche. Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai enye." 
Exodus30:1 “Intobira olperere lo lasar pee ipejorie enkorropil enchumata enye. Too nkeek o lerai intobira. 
Exodus30:2 Entemata nabo enkadoro naa entemata nabo endapasho. Nerisioroyu nkaloli pooki, naa intemat are enkilepata; ore mowuarak enyena naa entoki nabo o lperere." 
Exodus30:3 Tumura te sahabu nasila enkoriong enye o matuan o mouarak enyena. Nipik enkamanaa e sahabu aitaman. 
Exodus30:4 Nintobiraki ilgiso oare le sahabu, ti abori enkamanaa, too nkaloli enyena pokira are, pee eibung nena bokishi naa ninche enapieki." 
Exodus30:5 Nintayu imbokishi o lerai nimur ninche te sahabu. 
Exodus30:6 Nipik ninye dukuya ilo liatua otii embata o sanduku le nchakenisho, otii dukuya olorika lo lng'ur, te nchumata shakenisho, te ine natumore nanu ntae." 
Exodus30:7 Nepej Aron enkorropil naisonkoyo oleng te nchumata enye, anaake tadekenya te neitobir iltaai nepej." 
Exodus30:8 Naa ore te neinok Aron iltaai teipa nepej, enkorropil oo nkolong'i pooki te dukuya Olaitoriani ti atua iishoritin inyi pooki." 
Exodus30:9 Mintayuyu ake enkorropil nemesinya te nchumata te ine, arashu olasar opejori, arashu olasar le nkurma naidong'o nimibukokiki olasar opikuni." 
Exodus30:10 Neitobir Aron olning'o lo sotua too mowuarak enyena kata nabo to lari; teilo sarge lo lasar loo ng'ok lo lning'o lo sotua eitobir ninye olning'o lo sotua nabo kata to lari ti atua iishoritin inyi pooki. Kesinya oleng to Laitoriani.” 
Exodus30:11 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Exodus30:12 “Teninkenikene ltung'ana loo Siraeli, aayiolou esiana neishoru ake pooki ng'ae elakunoto te nkaraki enkorrok enye to Laitoriani te ninken iyie ninche, pee mejing ake olmeitai atua ninche te ninken iyie ninche." 
Exodus30:13 Ore pooki ng'ae oikenayioki te nkikenare neishoru ena: olpisiai loo mpisai naaji shekeli te risioroto e shekeli eine wueji sinyati. Neitayu olpisiai le shekeli anaa olasar to Laitoriani. 
Exodus30:14 Ore pooki ng'ae oikenayioki te nkikena, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, neishoru olasar to Laitoriani." 
Exodus30:15 Meishoru olkarsis inkumok nemeishoru olaisinani inkuti, to lpisiai le shekeli, te ninchoru olasar lo Laitoriani aitaiyu olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki kewan ino." 
Exodus30:16 Niya iyie impisai o lning'o lo sotua too ltung'ana loo Siraeli, nigelu aitaa ine nkisiaayiare o lng'obor le ntumo, pee eyau iltung'ana loo Siraeli metadamuni te dukuya Olaitoriani, pee intobiribiri olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki intae maate.”" 
Exodus30:17 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Exodus30:18 “Intobira olmoti lo suyai oitukuoreki; ore eneitotonieki enye naa eno suyai, pee eitukuoreki. Nipik erishata o lng'obor le ntumo o lperere lo lasar, nipik enkare atua," 
Exodus30:19 pee aa ninye eitukuyie Aron o layiok lenyena inkaik enye o nkejek enye. 
Exodus30:20 Te nepuo atua olng'obor le ntumo, arashu te nepuonu embata o lperere lo lasar aaisiaisho, aapejoki Olaitoriani olasar te nkima, neitukuo ninche te nkare, meye ake." 
Exodus30:21 Neituku ninche inkaik enye o nkejek enye, meye ake. Neaku ena enkitanapata ntarasi te ninche, o te ninye o too ishoritin enyena ti atua ishoritin enye pooki.”" 
Exodus30:22 Ore tenebo nena neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Exodus30:23 “Ntayu isonkoyoni sidain oleng; shekeli iip imiet e manoo, naruko, o lpisiai le nena loo nkabobok o sinantei naarropil oleng, aa taa shekeli iip are o onom," 
Exodus30:24 o shekeli iip imiet o sinantei oojuno, te risioroto e ntemata e wueji sinyati, o eilata oo loirienito mboreitin imiet e mpirbil." 
Exodus30:25 Nintayu iyie te kuna eilata nasinya naputishoreki. 
Exodus30:26 Nibukoki aitisiny ilo ng'obor le ntumo o ilo sanduku le nchakenisho," 
Exodus30:27 o emesa o ntokitin enyena pooki, o enkitashet oo ltaai o ntokitin enyena pooki, o lperere le nkorropil," 
Exodus30:28 o lperere lo lasar opejorieki ilasarri tenebo ntokitin enyena, o eng'irra naitukuoreki o enkitotonet enye." 
Exodus30:29 Nintisiny iyie ninche pee etum aataa sinyat tukul. Ore pooki naiseyie ninye neaku sinyati. 
Exodus30:30 Nibukoki Aron o layiok lenyena aitisiny ninche, pee aatum aaisiaayia anaa ilapolosak." 
Exodus30:31 Nijoki iyie iltung'ana loo Siraeli, ‘Keaku ena eilata ai sinyati naputishoreki ti atua ishoritin inyi." 
Exodus30:32 Nemebukokini iseseni ake le pooki ng'ae, nimintayu ae nanyaanyukie te nkitobirunoto; kesinya ninye, naa keton esinya te iyie." 
Exodus30:33 Ore pooki tung'ani oitobira aitushulu ae nanyaanyukie, arashu pooki ng'ae opik ae te ninye oltung'ani le boo neiwuang'ieki ti atua iltung'ana lenyena.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Intayu intokitin naarropil, naaji natafi, o shekeli o kelbena; o ntokitin naarropil te nebo olbani osila nerisioroyu pooki." 
Exodus30:35 Intobira enkorropil naitushulaki te nkarriyiano, olaitobirani loo sonkoyoni natipikaki emunyan aasil neitisinyi;" 
Exodus30:36 nindong iyie embata enye kiti oleng, nipik embata enye dukuya enchakenisho tiatua ilo ng'obor le ntumo te ine naatumore nanu iyie; neaku ninye te iyie sinyati oleng." 
Exodus30:37 Ore enkorropil nintayu te risioroto e enkitushulata enye, nimintayu te nkaraki intae maate, keaku ninye te ntae sinyati to Laitoriani." 
Exodus30:38 Ore pooki ng'ae oitayu ae nanyaanyukie pee easishore anaa esonkoyo neiwuang'ieki ti atua iltung'ana lenyena.” 
Exodus31:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Exodus31:2 “Ng'ura, aipoto nanu te nkarna e Besalel olayioni le Uri, olayioni le Huri, lo losho le Yuda:" 
Exodus31:3 naiputa nanu ninye Enkiyang'et e Nkai, te nkidimata o te nkalamasisho, o te ng'eno o te nkarriyiano pooki." 
Exodus31:4 Pee eipiru mbaa e nkarriyiano, neasisho te sahabu, o te nkosholai o to suyai," 
Exodus31:5 te ndung'oto oo soito oopiki iwuejitin, o te nguetata oo nkeek, te siaai e nkarriyiano pooki." 
Exodus31:6 Naa ng'ura, ategelua nanu te nebo ninye Oholiab olayioni le Ahisamak, lo losho le Dan; naishoo nanu iltung'ana pooki oodupa enkidimata, pee etum aaitobira nena pooki naaitanapa nanu iyie:" 
Exodus31:7 ilo ng'obor le ntumo, o ilo sanduku le nchakenisho, o ilo orika lo lng'ur otii enchumata enye, o masaa pooki e ilo ng'obor," 
Exodus31:8 emesa o ntokitin enyena, o ina kitashet o ltaa e sahabu nasila te nebo ntokitin enyena pooki, olperere le nkorropil," 
Exodus31:9 o ilo perere lo lasar opejori te nebo ntokitin, enyena pooki, o lmoti oitukuoreki o eneitotonieki enye," 
Exodus31:10 o lelo kilani ootiripuaki aaikod le Aron olapolosani, o lkilani loo layiok lenyena, te nkisiaayiare enye anaa ilapolosak," 
Exodus31:11 o ina ilata naputishoreki o enkorropil naisonkoyo e ine wueji sinyati. Anaa nena pooki naaitanapa iyie. Neas ninche.” 
Exodus31:12 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Exodus31:13 “Tiaaki iltung'ana loo Siraeli ‘Embung'a Sabatoni aainei amu olmonekie ele te rishata ai o ntae ti atua iishoritin inyi pooki, pee itumutumu aatayiolo nchere, nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny intae." 
Exodus31:14 Embung'a sabato amu eisinyati te ntae; ore pooki ng'ae oisarkionie neari metua; ore oltung'ani oasisho te ina olong neiwuang'ieki ninye ti atua iltung'ana lenyena. 
Exodus31:15 Too nkolong'i ile easi esiaai kake ore enkolong e naapishana naa sabato e nkiyeng'iyeng naitisinyi, sinyati to Laitoriani; ore oltung'ani oas pooki siaai te nkolong e sabato neari metua." 
Exodus31:16 Metaa keibung iltung'ana loo Siraeli sabato, neing'or sabato ti atua iishoritin enye pooki, anaa osotua loo ntarasi." 
Exodus31:17 Olmonekie ele intarasi te rishata ai o ltung'ana loo Siraeli nchere too nkolong'i ile eitobira Olaitoriani keper o enkop; ore te nkolong e naapishana neidip esiaai neyeng'iyeng'a.’ ” 
Exodus31:18 Neisho ninye Musa, ina kata pee eidip airorie te nchumata o ldoinyo le Sinai nena baoi are e nchakenisho, imbaoi o soit, naaigero tolkimojino le Nkai." 
Exodus32:1 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana aajo eimutie Musa eitu elotu adou to ldoinyo, neiturrurro iltung'ana aasotokino Aron, nejoki ninye, “Inyo, intaiki iyiook nkaitin naapuo te dukuya iyiook, amu ore ele Musa, ele tung'ani laa ninye oyaua iyiook ailepunye aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, mikiyiolo iyiook enataase te ninye.”" 
Exodus32:2 Nejoki Aron ninche, “Entayutu lelo giso le sahabu ootii nkiyiaa oo nkituaak inyi, o ilayiok linyi, o ntoyie inyi, nikiyakiki nanu.”" 
Exodus32:3 Neitayu iltung'ana pooki ilgiso le sahabu ootii nkiyiaa enye, neyaki ninche Aron." 
Exodus32:4 Neng'amu ninye ina sahabu too nkaik enye, neitobir te ntoki naguetishoreki, neitayu olashe le sahabu natosholaki; nejo ninche, “Kuna ninche nkaitin inyi, intae Isiraeli, naayautua aailepunye aaitung'uaa enkop e Misiri!”" 
Exodus32:5 Ore ake pee edol Aron ena, neshetu ninye olperere lo laser te dukuya ninye; neitubulaa Aron ajo, “Ore taisere naa keaku osirua lo Laitoriani.”" 
Exodus32:6 Neinyototo ninche aayooki taisere, neitayu ilasarri oopejori, neyau ilasarri le seriani; netoni iltung'ana aadaa neokisho, neinyototo aaiguran." 
Exodus32:7 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Tadoi shomo; amu ore iltung'ana linono, laa ninche apa iyaua ailepunye aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, neinyala ate aagil nkitanapat," 
Exodus32:8 neibelekenyate aapaashaa aasioki aaing'uaa enkoitoi apa naa ninye aitanapa ninche; eitaikitia ate olashe oitobiruaki te sahabu nashola, neteserema ninche ninye neitaiki ninye olasar, nejo, ‘Kuna ninche nkaitin inyi intae Isiraeli, naa ninche naayautua intae aailepunye aaitung'uaa enkop e Misiri.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Atoduaa kulo tung'ana, naa ng'ura, iltung'ana oosho murto" 
Exodus32:10 ore naa tung'uayioki nanu, pee etum engoro ayupuyupo neirowuaju te ninche amu aidim aidaikie ninche, kake ore te iyie naitayu olorere kitok.”" 
Exodus32:11 Kake etasayia Musa Olaitoriani Enkai enye nejo, “Olaitoriani, kainyoo pee eyupuyup engoro ino airowuaju te nkaraki iltung'ana linono laa ninche apa iyaua aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri te ngolon sapuk o te nkaina e nkidimata?" 
Exodus32:12 Kainyoo pee ejo Ilmisiri, e ntorroni apake eyiaraki ninche, pee eitupukuo alotu aar metuata too ldoinyo, nemut ninche aiwuang'ie ti oriong e nkop? Mbelekenyayu tapala engoro ino napi, nirridutena torroni te nkaraki iltung'ana linono." 
Exodus32:13 “Tadamu Abraham, o Isaak, o Isirael, isinkan linono, laa te ninche inosa olmumai te kewan ino, nijoki iyie ninche, ‘Kaponaa nanu eishoi ino anaa ilakir le shumata; ore ena kop pooki natonyorra aishoru, naa kaisho nanu eishoi ino nejung ninche ntarasi.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Neirridu Olaitoriani ina torroni natadamua aitaas iltung'ana lenyena. 
Exodus32:15 Neibelekenya Musa, nelo adoyio to ldoinyo eeta mbaoi are e nchakenisho too nkaik enyena, mbaoi naaigero too nkaloli pokira are; eigero te nkalo nabo neigero te nkae alo." 
Exodus32:16 Ore nena soito dapashi naa esiaai e Nkai, ore ilkigerot naa ilkigerot le Nkai ootaguetakaki oriong nena soito dapashi." 
Exodus32:17 Ore ake pee ening Yoshua ololepilepi loo ltung'ana ebuakita, nejoki ninye Musa, “Etii ololepilepi lo larrabal atua enkang oo lng'oborri.”" 
Exodus32:18 Nejo, “Mme oltoilo le mbuakunoto e nkisulata arashu oltoilo le nkishirata e mirata, kake oltoilo le ranyare ilo laning'ito.”" 
Exodus32:19 Ore ake enyiku aataaniki ilng'oborri nedol ilo ashe o sinkolio, neyupuyup engoro e Musa airowuaju nenang'aa ninye nena baoi too nkaik enyena, nebel ninche te ntonata o ldoinyo." 
Exodus32:20 Neya ninye ilo ashe oitobirutua ninche, nepejoo ninye te nkima, neidong aitaa empunyua, neidapashaki oriong enkare, neitook iltung'ana loo Siraeli ina are." 
Exodus32:21 Nejoki Musa Aron, “Kainyoo kintaasa kulo tung'ana pee iyaua eng'oki sapuk shumata ninche?”" 
Exodus32:22 Nejo Aron, “Mincho engoro o lkitok lai eyupuyup airowuaju; iyiolo iyie kulo tung'ana nchere eiulokinote entorroni." 
Exodus32:23 Amu aatiaakita ninche nanu, ‘Ntobiraki iyiook nkaitin, naapuo te dukuya iyiook; amu ore ele Musa, ilo tung'ani oyaua iyiook ailepunye aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, mikiyiolo iyiook enatotiwuo te ninye.’" 
Exodus32:24 Najoki nanu ninche, ‘Enchoo pooki ng'ae oota sahabu eitayu,’ naaisho ninche nanu, nanang'aki nanu atua enkima, nepukunye ine ele ashe.”" 
Exodus32:25 Ore ake pee edol Musa ajo meekure eitoriayu iltung'ana (etapalayie Aron metaa meitoriayu, aitukurru ninche ti atua ilmang'ati lenye)," 
Exodus32:26 neitoki Musa aitashe te nkishomi e ina ang oo lng'oborri, nejo, “Kaing'ae ole nkalo o Laitoriani? Wou enatii.” Neiturrurro ilayiok le Lawi maate te ine netii ninye." 
Exodus32:27 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, ‘Teena pooki ng'ae olalem te mpolos enye, nilo aman enkang oo lng'oborri pooki ebaiki kishomi o enkae kishomi ning'l ake ashukunye, taara pooki tung'ani olalashe lenye, o lencholuek enye olelatia enye.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Neas ilayiok le Lawi te risioroto ororei le Musa; nebatata ina olong iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni uni. 
Exodus32:29 Nejo Musa, “Ore taata nituputo ate te nkisiayiare o Laitoriani, pooki ng'ae te nkinyiang'a o layioni lenye o eno lalashe lenye, pee eisho ninye Enkai ntae emayianata ena olong taata.”" 
Exodus32:30 Ore taisere nejoki Musa iltung'ana, “Itaasa intae eng'oki sapuk. Ore taata naa kailep alo enetii Olaitoariani; amu ebaiki naitobir olningo lo sotua te nkaraki ing'ok inyi.”" 
Exodus32:31 Neaku enyaaka Musa ashuko alo enetii Olaitoriani nejo, “Wooi etaasa kulo tung'ana eng'oki torrono oleng; eitayutuo nkaitin te sahabu neserem ninche." 
Exodus32:32 Tapalaki sii ake ninche eng'oki enye; naa ti nimipalaki, tujutoki aatasayia ti atua ina buku ino apa niking'erie.”" 
Exodus32:33 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ore pooki ng'ae otaasa eng'oki te nanu, ninye ajut enkarna enye ti atua embuku ai." 
Exodus32:34 Kake shomo taata toriko iltung'ana ine wueji apa naatiaaka; ng'ura, kelo olmalaika lai te dukuya iyie. Ore ake eyia, ore ina olong nabau nanu naitame ing'ok enye te shumata ninche.”" 
Exodus32:35 Neirriwaki Olaitoriani olmeitai iltung'ana, enkaraki naitayutuo ilo ashe oitayio Aron." 
Exodus33:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Entudumunye enchom, intae o lelo tung'ana apa liyaua ailepunye aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, meshomo ina kop apa naa ninye ainosie olmumai pee aisho Abraham, o Isaak o Yakobo, ajoki ‘Eishoi inyi aisho ninye.’" 
Exodus33:2 Naa kairriwaa nanu olmalaika dukuya intae, naaraa nanu meshomo Ilkanaani, Ilamori, o Ilhiti, o Lperesi, Lhifi o Lyebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Elepa enchom ina kop naruko kule o naishi; kake malo nanu ti atua intae, maidaikie ake intae te nkoitoi, amu irara iltung'ana oosho murto.”" 
Exodus33:4 Ore ake pee ening iltung'ana kulo onom torrok, neishir, nemetii oltung'ani oonyaaka apika imasaa enyena." 
Exodus33:5 Amu etiaaka Olaitoriani Musa, “Tiaaki iltung'ana loo Siraeli, ‘Irara iltung'ana oosho murto; te nalo nanu te nkata nabo ti atua intae, naidaikie intae. Ore naa taata entayutu imasaa inyi entung'uai ate, pee ayiolou enaitaas intae.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Metaa netupurro iltung'ana loo Siraeli ate too masaa enye, ebaiki oldoinyo le Horeb neito idia alo dukuya." 
Exodus33:7 Naa kesesh apa eya Musa olng'obor nelo aun aitaman ina ang oo lng'oborri, nejo ninye olng'obor le ntumo. Ore pooki ng'ae oing'oru Olaitoriani neipang alo ilo ng'obor le ntumo otii auluo ina ang oo lng'oborri." 
Exodus33:8 Ore ake enkata naipang Musa alo olng'obor, neinyototo iltung'ana pooki aaitashe, neitashe ake oltung'ani te kutukaji o lng'obor lenye, neduaaya Musa ometaba anaa nejing atua ilo ng'obor." 
Exodus33:9 Naa ore ake pee ejing Musa olng'obor, neirorie Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Naa ore ake pee edol iltung'ana pooki ina ng'ape e nkatampoi eitashe te nkutuk o lng'obor, neinyototo iltung'ana pooki aaitashe aaserem, oltung'ani ake te kutuk aji o lng'obor lenye." 
Exodus33:11 Neirorie Olaitoriani Musa eing'ura too nkomomi anaa oltung'ani te neirorie olchore lenye. Ore pee eitoki Musa ashuko alo atua ina ang oo lng'oborri, ore osinka lenye Yoshua olayioni le Nuni, ilo barnoti neitu elo aing'uaa ilo ng'obor." 
Exodus33:12 Nejoki Musa Olaitoriani, “Ng'ura ajo kitiaaka nanu, ‘Toriku kulo tung'ana ilepunye,’ kake eitu kincho nanu matayiolo ajo kaing'ae irriwaa te nebo nanu. Ninyaaka ajo, ‘Kaayiolo nanu iyie enkarna, ninoto sii kirotetisho too nkonyek aainei.’" 
Exodus33:13 Ore naa taata, aatoomono, tenaa kanoto kirotetisho too nkonyek inono, ntoduaaki taata nanu inkoitoi inono, pee aatum nanu atayiolo iyie natum kirotetisho too nkonyek inono. Tadamu sii ajo ore ele osho naa iltung'ana linono.”" 
Exodus33:14 Nejo ninye, “Kalo nanu te nebo intae, naa kaisho nanu intae enkiyeng'iyeng.”" 
Exodus33:15 Nejoki Musa Enkai, “Ti nimilo iyie te nebo iyiook, miya iyiook aituang'uaa ene." 
Exodus33:16 Amu kaji naa eikoni pee eyiolouni aajo anoto kirotetisho too nkonyek inono, nanu o ltung'ana linono? Aime ti nilo iyie te nebo iyiook, pee kimbalayu iyiook, nanu o ltung'ana linono too ltung'ana pooki ootii oriong enkop?”" 
Exodus33:17 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ore nena baa nitejo naa kaas; amu inoto kirotetisho too nkonyek aainei, naa kaayiolo nanu iyie enkarna.”" 
Exodus33:18 Nejo Musa, “Aatoomono nanu iyie ntoduaaki enkitoo ino.”" 
Exodus33:19 Nejoki ninye, “Kaisho nanu enkishiaa ai pooki meshomo te dukuya iyie, naibalunye te dukuya iyie enkarna ai, ‘Olaitoriani’; naipirisie nanu ilo laipirisie naing'urrie ilo laing'urrie.”" 
Exodus33:20 Nejo ninye, “Kake mindim iyie atoduaa enkomom ai; amu meetae oltung'ani odol enkomom ai neishu.”" 
Exodus33:21 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajo, “Ng'ura, etii ewueji te mbata nanu naa ninye intasheyie te shumata e ndapidapoi;" 
Exodus33:22 naa ore ina kata kigiroo enkitoo ai naapik iyie olbaata le ina dapidapoi, naaimulumul nanu iyie te nkaina ino o metaba anaa nalusoo," 
Exodus33:23 naitoki nanu aya enkaina ai, nikidol iyie nanu enkoriong ai, kake medoli enkomom ai.”" 
Exodus34:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Tagueta isoito are dapashi naanyaanyukie inapa e dukuya, pee aiger nanu te nena soito dapashi irorei ootii nena soito dapashi e dukuya, apa nitebela." 
Exodus34:2 Tanapayu tadekenya, nilepu tadekenya alotu oldoinyo le Sinai, niyau kewan enatii te ine te nchumata o ldoinyo." 
Exodus34:3 Meetae oltung'ani oilepu alotu te nebo iyie, naa nchoo metaa meetae oltung'ani odoli too doinyo pooki; nchoo eaku medaa nkishu o nkerrai te dukuya ilo doinyo.”" 
Exodus34:4 Neguetu Musa mbaoi dapashi are oo soito naanyaanyukie inapa e dukuya, nedumunye ayooki tadekenya neilep alo enchumata o ldoinyo le Sinai, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye, neya te nkaina enye nena soito naagueta dapashi." 
Exodus34:5 Nedou Olaitoriani te nkatampoi neitashe te nebo ninye te ine neibalunye enkarna o Laitoriani. 
Exodus34:6 Neim Olaitoriani dukuya Musa nejo, “Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani, Enkai o lng'ur o empiris nemesioki agoro, nebore enyorrata nauno enkisiligata" 
Exodus34:7 neibung enyorrata nauno too ltung'ana iip tomon, epalaki entorroni, o enkitarruoroto o eng'oki, kake mme oloikenaki oltung'ana loo ng'ok esipata tukul, naasujaki nkera ing'ok oo loo menye, o nkera oo nkera enye, o metabaiki eishoi e uni o eni ong'uan.”" 
Exodus34:8 Neirrug Musa endukuya enye asioki metabaiki enkop, neserem." 
Exodus34:9 Nejo ninye, “Tenaa taata kanoto kirotetisho too nkonyek inono, Olaitoriani, nchoo Olaitoriani, aatomono iyie, shomo ti atua iyiook, hoo nikira iltung'ana oosho murto, nipalaki iyiook entorroni ang o ing'ok ang, niya iyiook mataa enjung'ore ino.”" 
Exodus34:10 Nejo ninye, “Ng'ura, kaitayu nanu osotua. Ore te dukuya iltung'ana linono pooki naas nanu ine nking'asia, neitu ae kata easi ti atua enkop pooki arashu ti ae kop; ore lelo tung'ana litii iyie atua ninche nedol esiaai o Laitoriani; amu entoki naitureisho aitaas intae." 
Exodus34:11 “Imbung'a ina naaitanap iyie ena olong. Ng'ura, kaaraa nanu aipang'ie te dukuya intae Ilamori, Ilkanaani, Ilhiti, Ilperesi o Ilhifi, o Lyebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Toduaa ake kewan mintayu ake osotua o lelo oomanya enkop pooki nilo, meaku ake orreshet ti atua intae." 
Exodus34:13 Tusulaki enkop ilperereni loo lasarri lenye, nigil ing'apeta enye, nidung auroki enkop nena kitanyaanyukot naaji Asherim." 
Exodus34:14 (Amu miserem iyie ae Ai, amu ara Olaitoriani laa ore enkarna enye naa Olom, naa Enkai oo lom)." 
Exodus34:15 Mintayu ake olning'o lelo oomanya enkop, amu te neas enkiborra oo nkonyek erubare nkaitin enye, nepolosaki ilasarri nkaitin enye, nikintoomon iyie obo lenye, nidaa iyie te ilo asar lenye," 
Exodus34:16 niya iyie intoyie enye ayamaki ilayiok linono, neas intoyie enkiborra oo nkonyek esujaa nkaitin enye neitasuroki ilayiok linono enkibor oo nkonyek esujaa nkaitin enye." 
Exodus34:17 “Mintobiraki kewan nkaitin oo ntokitin naatosholaki neidong'i. 
Exodus34:18 “Mbung'a osirua loo mukateni neitu eisuijieki. Too nkolong'i naapishana inosa mukateni neitu eisuijieki, anaa enaaitanapa, te ina kata nategeluaki to lapa le Abibu; amu teilo apa apa iewuo aipang'u aing'uaa Misiri." 
Exodus34:19 Ore pooki natabolo enkoshoke e ng'otonye naa enaai, ilewa linono pooki, olbung'aiko loo nkishu, o lkikaunot pooki loo nkishu o loo nkerra." 
Exodus34:20 Ore olkikau lo sikiria niwalu to lkuoo le ker, arashu ti nimiwalu nigil emurt enye. Ore ilkikaunot pooki loo layiok linono niwalu akordu nemetii hoo obo olotu dukuya nanu meeta toki." 
Exodus34:21 “Too nkolong'i ile taasisho, kake ore te nkolong e naapishana niyeng'iyeng'a; ore te nkata e nkiremore o te nkisampuare niyeng'iyeng'a." 
Exodus34:22 Ning'or aibung osirua loo wikii, olng'anayio le dukuya le nkisampuare e nkano, osirua lenkiturrurrorre te siadi ari." 
Exodus34:23 Katitin uni to lari eliooyu ilewa linono pooki te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai, Enkai oo Siraeli." 
Exodus34:24 Amu kanang'aa nanu aiturraa iloreren te dukuya ntae; naitalala nanu ilpolosien linyi; nemetii oltung'ani ong'uar enkop inyi, ti nilepu alo alioyu te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino katitin uni tolari." 
Exodus34:25 “Mintayu ake osarge lo lasar lai te nebo entoki naisuijo, nimincho sii olasar lo sirua le Ngiroroto eirrag o mekenyu." 
Exodus34:26 Ore lelo ng'anayio le dukuya ooituruku too lng'anayio le dukuya le nkop ino niyau atua enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai ino. Nimiyierie olkuoo kule e ng'otonye.” 
Exodus34:27 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ing'ero kulo rorei; te risioroto e kulo rorei aitayio osotua te nebo iyie o te nebo Isiraeli.”" 
Exodus34:28 Netii apa ninye ine te nebo Olaitoriani nkolong'i artam o nkewaritin artam, neitu enya emukate arashu eok enkare. Neiger ninye te nena soito dapashi irorei lo sotua, nena kitanapat tomon." 
Exodus34:29 Ore pee edou Musa to ldoinyo le Sinai, eeta mbaoi are dapashi e nchakenisho te nkaina enye elotu adou aing'uaa oldoinyo, neitu eyiolou Musa ajo etawang'a enkomom enye te nkaraki natigire airo te nebo Enkai." 
Exodus34:30 Ore ake pee edol Aron o ltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli Musa, ng'ura, kewang enkomom enye, neureyu ninche epuonu aanyikaki ninye." 
Exodus34:31 Kake eipotuo Musa ninche; neshukokino ninye Aron o larikok pooki lo lorere, neiro Musa te nebo ninche." 
Exodus34:32 Ore te siadi nepuonu aanyiku iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli, neisho ninye ninche te nkitanapata nena pooki naairoro Olaitoriani te nebo ninye to ldoinyo le Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Ore ake pee eidip Musa airorie ninche neitoip enkomom enye te nkarasha. 
Exodus34:34 Kake ore ake tenelo Musa dukuya Olaitoriani airo te nebo ninye, neiwuang'ie ina arasha naitoipie enkomom, o metaba anaa nelotu boo; naa ore te nelotu boo neliki iltung'ana loo Siraeli ina naitanapaki ninye," 
Exodus34:35 nedol iltung'ana loo Siraeli enkomom e Musa, neitoki Musa aitoip enkomom enye ometaba anaa nelo atua airo tenebo ninye." 
Exodus35:1 Neiturrurru Musa olorere pooki loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli nejoki ninche, “Kuna ninche ntokitin naaitanapa intae Olaitoriani entaas." 
Exodus35:2 Too nkolong'i ile easi esiaai inyi, kake ore te nkolong e naapishana nitumutumu sabato sinyati e nkiyeng'iyeng to Laitoriani; ore pooki ng'ae oas esiaai te ina olong neari metua." 
Exodus35:3 Minokinoko enkima too nkajijik inyi te nkolong e sabato.” 
Exodus35:4 Nejoki Musa olturrur pooki loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, “Ena toki ninye eitanapishe Olaitoriani." 
Exodus35:5 Eyautu ti atua ntae enkishoroto eyaki Olaitoriani; ore pooki ng'ae oata oltau le leng'on nchoo ninye eyaki Olaitoriani enkishooroto; sahabu, o enkosholai o suyai;" 
Exodus35:6 o iusin pusi, o morijo o mpilei o katani napuyiapui napiyaya; o lpapit loo nkineji," 
Exodus35:7 o ndapan naanota oo lmeregeshi o noo nkineji, o nkeek o lerai," 
Exodus35:8 o eilata oo ltaai, isonkoyoni te ina ilata naputishoreki, o te nkorropil naisonkoyo," 
Exodus35:9 oltoto barrikon, o ltoto pee epiki enkila dorrop o embene o lgoo." 
Exodus35:10 “Ninchosho pooki tung'ani oata enkidimata ti atua intae meetu aitobir nena pooki naaitanapishe Olaitoriani: olng'obor le Nkai," 
Exodus35:11 olng'obor lenye o entoki naitushurieki o enkitushurata enye, o lala oo lolo lenyena, o rubat enyena, o loom lenyena, ing'apeta enyena o neeitotonieki enyena;" 
Exodus35:12 ilo sanduku o nkeek enyena, ilo orika lo lng'ur o ilo liatua lenye," 
Exodus35:13 o ina mesa o mbokishi enyena o masaa enyena pooki, o ina mukate naitoduari;" 
Exodus35:14 nena kitasheta oo ltaai sii te nkaraki ewang'an te nebo imasaa enyena o ltaai lenyena, o eilata o ltaa;" 
Exodus35:15 olperere le nkorropil te nebo mbokishi enyena, o ina ilata naputishoreki o ina orropil naisonkoyo o ilo odung'oro le kutuk aji te kutuk aji o lng'obor le Nkai;" 
Exodus35:16 ilo perere lo lasar opejori te nebo ina ng'esherrie enye o suyai, imbokishi enyena o ntokitin enyena pooki oilo moti oitukuoreki o eneitotonieki enye;" 
Exodus35:17 o nena kisiong'at endung'oroto, ing'apeta enyena o neeitotonieki enyena o ilo odung'oroto le kishomi e ndung'oroto;" 
Exodus35:18 nena sheito e nkaji e Nkai o nena sheito o olodung'oro, o nkeenta enye;" 
Exodus35:19 nena kilani naaripuno aaitobiruno te nkaraki enkisiaayiare te wueji sinyati, lelo kilani oosinya le Aron ilo apolosani, o lelo kilani loo layiok lenyena, te nkisiayiare enye anaa ilapolosak.”" 
Exodus35:20 Nepuo olorere pooki loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli te ine netii Musa. 
Exodus35:21 Nepuonu ninche, ore pooki ng'ae otudumua oltau lenye, o pooki otuputuo oltau lenye, neyau enkishoroto o Laitoriani pee easishoreki te ilo ng'obor le ntumo, o te nkisiayiare enye pooki, o te lelo kilani oosinya." 
Exodus35:22 Nepuonu ninche, ilewa o nkituaak; ore pooki oora ilo ltau le yieunoto neyau ilgameta, o lmiintoni, o lgiso, o mankek (isaen loo murto) o lkataarri, o ntokitin oo mpukunot pooki e sahabu eiteng'elaki ake pooki tung'ani Olaitoriani enkishoroto e sahabu Olaitoriani." 
Exodus35:23 Ore pooki tung'ani oinepuaki eeta iusin pusi arashu morijo, arashu mpilei arashu katani napuyiapui napiyaya, arashu ilpapit loo nkineji arashu ndapan naanota oo lmeregeshi arashu inoo nkineji, neyau ninche." 
Exodus35:24 Ore pooki ng'ae oidim aitayu enkishoroto e nkosholai arashu osuyai neyau anaa enkishoroto o Laitoriani; ore pooki tung'ani oinepuni eeta enchata o lerai naata tipat te siaai, neyau ninye." 
Exodus35:25 Ore nkituaak pooki naata enkidimata napiyayisho too nkaik enye, neyau nena naapiyaya, too usin pusi, o morijo o mpilei o te katani sidai napuyiapui;" 
Exodus35:26 ore nena kituaak pooki naatudumutua iltauja lenye te nkarriyiano nepiyai ilpapit loo nkineji. 
Exodus35:27 Neyau ilarikok iltoto barrikon ooji oniks o soito pee epiki, te nkaraki enkila dorrop o ina bene o lgoo," 
Exodus35:28 o sonkoyoni o eilata te nkaraki ewang'an, o ina ilata naputishoreki, o enkorropil naisonkoyo." 
Exodus35:29 Ore ilewa pooki o nkituaak, lelo tung'ana loo Siraeli, ootupututuo iltauja lenye eyau pooki toki te nkaraki ina siaai naitanapishe Olaitoriani te Musa metaasi neyau nkishorot enye olpela aaisho o Laitoriani." 
Exodus35:30 Nejoki Musa iltung'ana loo Siraeli, “Eng'ura, eipoto Olaitoriani te nkarna Besalel olayioni le Uri, olayioni le Huri lo losho le Yuda;" 
Exodus35:31 neiputa Enkai ninye te nkiyang'et e Nkai, te nkidimata, o te nkalamasisho, o te ng'eno, o te nkarriyiano." 
Exodus35:32 Pee eipiru nkitobirat e nkarriyiano, neasisho te sahabu o te nkosholai o to suyai," 
Exodus35:33 te ndung'oto oo soito oopiki o te ng'uetata oo nkeek, te siaai e nkarriyiano pooki." 
Exodus35:34 Nchoo ninye enkidimata enye naiteng'enishore, ninye te nebo o Oholiab olayioni le Ahisamak lo losho le Dan." 
Exodus35:35 Eiputa ninye ninche te nkidimata metaasa empukunoto e siaai pooki naas laguetak loo soito, o ilasirak, o laripak loo usin pusi, o morijo o mpilei, o katani naapuyiapui napiyaya arashu ilashetak, te pooki pukunoto o laisiaayiani arashu olaipirunoni arriyia." 
Exodus36:1 “Ore Besalel o Oholiab o pooki tung'ani oota enkidimata, o enkalamasisho oishoo Olaitoriani metayiolo eneiko te neas pooki siaai e nchetare e ine wueji sinyati, neas te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapishe Olaitoriani.”" 
Exodus36:2 Neipot Musa Besalel o Oholiab o pooki tung'ani oota enkidimata otipika Olaitoriani enkarriyiano o pooki ng'ae odumu oltau lenye meeu aas esiaai; 
Exodus36:3 neng'amu ninche te Musa nena kishorunot pooki o lpela naayautua iltung'ana loo Siraeli pee easieki esiaai e ine wueji sinyati. Neitoki ake ninche aayaki ninye nkishorot olpela pooki akenya," 
Exodus36:4 o metaba anaa nepuonu lelo tung'ana pooki oata enkidimata apa oasita esiaai e mpukunoto pooki te ine wueji sinyati, oltung'ani ake te ina siaai apa naasita," 
Exodus36:5 nejoki Musa, “Ekeyau iltung'ana ntokitin kumok oleng naalusoo te asata e ina siaai apa naitanapa iyiook Olaitoriani mataas.”" 
Exodus36:6 Neishoru Musa enkitanapata, neitubulari olomoni ti atua ina ang oo lng'oborri, aajo “Mincho olee arashu enkitok eitoki aas ae toki ti alo nkishorot e ine wueji sinyati.” Neiboori iltung'ana pee meitoki aayau." 
Exodus36:7 Amu ore ntokitin naata ninche naa keidip neasieki esiaai pooki, neleku." 
Exodus36:8 Ore lelo tung'ana pooki oata enkidimata ti atua lelo oasisho neitobir enkaji e Nkai too lkarash tomon; neitayu te katani napuyiapui napiyaya o too usin pusi, o morijo o mpilei, o lkerubi oitayioki te nkarriyiano." 
Exodus36:9 Ore enkadoro o lkarasha obo naa intemat tikitam o isiet, ore endapasho naa intemat ong'uan; nerisio ilkarash pooki te nkadoro." 
Exodus36:10 Neitutum ninye ilkarash imiet te nebo ore ilkulikae karash imiet neitutum te nebo. 
Exodus36:11 Neitayu ilidat oo lgoso pusi te manaroto e nkalo e oriong o lkarasha te ina tukus e dukuya; neitoki aiko neijia, neitayu ninche, te manaroto e oriong oo lkarash te ina tukus e dukuya; neitoki aiko neijia, neitayu ninche, te manaroto e oriong o lkarasha te ina tukus e are;" 
Exodus36:12 neitayu ninye ilidat oolgoso onom to lkarasha obo, neitoki aitayu ilidat oo lgoso onom te manaroto o lkarasha le ina tukus e are; ore nena lidat oo lgoso naa keipirakino maate." 
Exodus36:13 Neitoki ninye aitayu ilala oo lolo onom le sahabu, neitutumie lelo karash te nebo te lelo gameta; metaa ore ina aji e Nkai naa nabo." 
Exodus36:14 Neitoki ninye aitayu ilkarash loo lpapit loo nkineji te nkaraki olng'obor meitushura enkaji e Nkai; neitayu ninye ilkarash tomon o obo. 
Exodus36:15 Ore ake enkadoro e pooki karasha naa intemat tomoni uni, naa ore ake endapasho e pooki karasha naa intemat ong'uan; ore lelo karash tomon o obo nerisio." 
Exodus36:16 Neitutum ninye ilkarash imiet maate, o lkarash ile maate." 
Exodus36:17 Neitayu ilidat oolgoso onom te manaroto e nkalo e oriong olkarasha le ntukus nabo, olgoso onom te manaroto olikae eitutum ilkarash." 
Exodus36:18 Neitoki ninye aitayu ilala oololo onom lo suyai pee eitutumie olng'obor te nebo pee etum ataa entoki nabo tukul. 
Exodus36:19 Neitaiki ninye ilo ng'obor eneitushurieki too ndapan naanota oo lmeregeshi, o ndapan oo nkineji." 
Exodus36:20 Neitoki ninye, aitobir irubat oo sunta naaitashe eilo ng'obor le Nkai too nkeek o lerai." 
Exodus36:21 Intemat tomon apa enkadoro e rubata nabo naa entemata nabo o lpisiai endapasho e rubata. 
Exodus36:22 Neeta pooki rubata ilng'amat are, ooiruburubieki te nebo; neas ninye ena too rubat oosunta pooki e ilo ng'obor le Nkai." 
Exodus36:23 Neitayu ninye irubat e ilo ng'obor le Nkai aikunu nji; irubat tikitam te nkalo e kopikop," 
Exodus36:24 neitobir ninye nkitotoneta artam e nkosholai ti abori nena rubat tikitam, nkitotoneta are ti abori erubata nabo too lng'amat lenyena aare, o nkitotoneta are ti abori olikae liatua too rubat enyena pokira are." 
Exodus36:25 Ore te nchoto e are e ilo ng'obor le Nkai, te nkalo e moikuape, neitayu ninye irubat tikitam" 
Exodus36:26 o nkitotoneta enye artam e nkosholai are ti abori erubata nabo o nkitotoneta are ti abori enkae rubata. 
Exodus36:27 Ore tioriong e ilo ng'obor le Nkai te nkalo o loontoluo neitobir irubat ile. 
Exodus36:28 Neitobir ninye irubat are too lpijat lo ng'obor le Nkai tioriong. 
Exodus36:29 Naa kerisha apa ti abori kake eibung'a te shumata, to lgisoi le dukuya; neitayu ninye pokira are aikunu inji, too lpijat pokira aare." 
Exodus36:30 Era apa irubat isiet te nebo nkitotoneta enye e nkosholai nkitotoneta, tomon o ile, ore tiabori erubata nabo, naa nkitotoneta are." 
Exodus36:31 Neitayu ninye iloom lo lerai, iloom imiet too rubat te nkalo nabo e ilo ng'obor le Nkai," 
Exodus36:32 o loom imiet te nkae shoto e ilo ng'obor le Nkai, o loom imiet too rubat e ilo ng'obor le Nkai tioriong te nkalo o loontoluo." 
Exodus36:33 Neitayu ninye oloomi le polos pee eimieki ebaiki enkalo nabo o metabaiki enkae aitorit alo irubat. 
Exodus36:34 Nemur ninye nena rubat te sahabu, neitayu ilgiso lenye le sahabu too laibung'ak le lelo loom, nemur lelo loom te sahabu." 
Exodus36:35 Neitayu ninye oliatua lolkarasha loo usin pusi, o morijo, o mpilei, o katani napuyiapui napiyaya; o lkerubi ooitobiruaki te nkarriyiano." 
Exodus36:36 Ore te nkaraki ninye neitayu ing'apeta ong'uan o lerai nemuraa ninche te sahabu; ore ilala oololo lenye naa ile sahabu neiteleiki ninche nkitotoneta ong'uan e nkosholai. 
Exodus36:37 Neitayu sii olkarasha le kutukaji te nkaraki kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor, too nkarash naaripuno too usin pusi, o morijo, o mpilei o enkatani napuyiapui napiyaya, naikodo te siaai o ltidu;" 
Exodus36:38 o ng'apeta enyena pokira imiet te nebo ilala lenyena oololo, nemuraa enchumata enye o nkeek enye te sahabu, kake ore nkitotoneta enye pokira imiet naa ino suyai." 
Exodus37:1 Neitayu Besalel osanduku loo nkeek o lerai, intemat are o lpisiai enkadoro, naa entemata nabo o lpisiai endapasho enye, naa entemata nabo o lpisiai enkilepata enye." 
Exodus37:2 Nemur ninye te sahabu nasila atua o oriong nepik enkamanaa e sahabu aitaman. 
Exodus37:3 Neitayu ilgiso oong'uan oonapieki le sahabu neibung'ie ninche lelo pijat lenyena pokira oong'uan, etii ake ilgiso aare enkalo nabo netii ilgiso aare enkae alo." 
Exodus37:4 Neitayu imbokishi naanapieki o lerai, nemur ninche te sahabu," 
Exodus37:5 nepik mbokishi lelo giso te pooki shoto e ilo sanduku pee enapieki ilo sanduku. 
Exodus37:6 Neitayu ninye olorika lo lng'ur le sahabu nasila, intemat are o lpisiai enkadoro enye naa entemata nabo o lpisiai endapasho enye." 
Exodus37:7 Neitoki ninye aitayu ilkerubi aare ooidong'uno te sahabu, neitayu ninche too matuan pokira are e ilo orika lo lng'ur," 
Exodus37:8 nepik olkerubi bayie nabo, nepik olikae kerubi enkae bayie; te ntoki nabo o ilo orika lo lng'ur eitobira ninye lelo kerubi too matuan enyena pokira are." 
Exodus37:9 Nelak lelo kerubi inaipuko enye aaitorioo, neitoip ilo orika lo lng'ur too naipuko enye eing'ura inkomomi enye maate, neing'or inkomomi e lelo kerubi ilo orika lo lng'ur." 
Exodus37:10 Neitoki sii aitayu emesa too nkeek o lerai; intemat are enkadoro, naa entemata nabo endapasho, naa entemata nabo o lpisiai enkilepata;" 
Exodus37:11 neimulumul ninye te sahabu nasinya, nepik enkamanaa e sahabu aitaman." 
Exodus37:12 Nepik aitaman erubata naba anaa endap e nkaina te ndapasho nepik enkamanaa e sahabu ina rubata. 
Exodus37:13 Neitayu ninye ilgiso oong'uan le sahabu neeniki lelo giso lelo pijat pokira oong'uan too nkejek enyena. 
Exodus37:14 Netaaniki lelo giso ina rubata, ilooibung mbokishi naanapie ina mesa." 
Exodus37:15 Neitayu ninye imbokishi oo nkeek o lerai pee enapieki ina mesa, nemuraa ninche te sahabu." 
Exodus37:16 Neitoki aitayu ntokitin e sahabu nasila naa ninche epiki enchumata emesa o isaanini enyena, o ngirran o enkorropil, o lbakulini o siang'aun naapikunyeki olasar obukuni." 
Exodus37:17 Neitoki sii aitayu enkitashet o ltaa e sahabu nasila. Ore enkitotonata enye o empolos enkitashet neitayuni te siaai e nkidong'ore; ore inkikompeni enyena, o rubat enyena, o ntapuka enyena naaentoki nabo." 
Exodus37:18 Netii apa ilng'osil ile ooipang'u too murten enyena, neipang'u ilng'osil okuni le ina kibung'et o ltaa te nkae alo enye." 
Exodus37:19 Netii nkikompeni uni naaitayioki aaikunu anaa ilgululu, meetae ake ene meeta endukuya e entapukai, o lng'osila o nkikompeni uni naaitayioki aaikunu anaa ilgululu, meetae ake ene meeta endukuyao entapukai to likae ng'osila; nepuo lelo ng'osil pokira ile aaipang te ina kitashet o ltaa." 
Exodus37:20 Ore te ina kibung'et o ltaa kewan, netii nkikompeni naaitayioki aaikunu anaa ilgululu lo lchani onyaanyukie oseki, te nebo ilukuny enye o ntapuka enye," 
Exodus37:21 netii ake elukunya e rubata nabo te nebo ninye ti abori ilng'osil oare ooiriamari te lelo ng'osil ile oipang'u te ninye. 
Exodus37:22 Ore lukuny enye o lng'osil lenye naa entoki nabo; ore pooki umata naa entoki nabo e siaai enkidong'ore e sahabu nasila. 
Exodus37:23 Neitoki ninye aitayu iltaai lenyena oopishana, o ntokitin naarieki iltaai lenye o ngirran dapashi enyena e sahabu nasila." 
Exodus37:24 Neitobir ninye te nebo ntokitin enyena pooki te ntalanta e sahabu nasila. 
Exodus37:25 Neitayu olperere lo lasar le nkorropil too nkeek o lerai; ore enkadoro enye naa entemata nabo naa entemata nabo endapasho, naa kerisioro apa, naa intemat are enkilepata; ore apa imouarak enyena naa entoki nabo o ninye." 
Exodus37:26 Nemur ninye te sahabu nasila, enchumata enye, o matuan enyena aitaman, o mowuarak enyena; neitoki aitayu enkamanaa e sahabu aitaman," 
Exodus37:27 neitoki aitayu ilgiso aare le sahabu apik ti abori enkamanaa, too nkaloli enyena naaipirakino, pee eibung nena bokishi naanapieki." 
Exodus37:28 Neitayu ninye imbokishi o lerai nemuraa ninche te sahabu. 
Exodus37:29 Neitayu sii ninye eilata nasinya naputishoreki enkorropil naisonkoyo naaitushula olaitobirani loo sonkoyoni. 
Exodus38:1 Neitayu ninye olperere lo lasar opejori too nkeek o lerai; naa intemat imiet apa enkadoro enye naa intemat imiet endapasho, naa kerisioro apa, naa intemat uni enkilepata." 
Exodus38:2 Neitaiki ninye imowuarak too lpijat lenyena pokira oong'uan; ore nena mowuarak enyena naa entoki nabo o ninye, nemur ninye to suyai." 
Exodus38:3 Neitayu ninye ntokitin pooki o lperere lo lasar, imotioo, o inkisureta, o ngirran, o nkurteta o nena kiyuketa e nkima; ore nena tokitin enyena pooki neitobiru ninye to suyai." 
Exodus38:4 Neitaiki ninye ilo perere lo lasar eng'esherrie, naitobiruno to suyai ti abori elutoroto enye, aitoritie olperere lo lasar ti abori." 
Exodus38:5 Nepik ninye ilgiso oong'uan ilpijat pokira oong'uan o lpijat le ina ng'esherrie o suyai pee eibung nena ong'uan oo lpijat le ina ng'esherrie o suyai pee eibung nena bokishi; 
Exodus38:6 neitobir ninye too imbokishi oo nkeek o lerai, nemur ninche to suyai." 
Exodus38:7 Neimie ninye nena bokishi atua lelo giso too murten e ilo perere lo lasar, pee enapieki ninche; neitobir too mbaoi aitugum." 
Exodus38:8 Neitayu ninye olmoti lo suyai oitukuoreki o ina kitotonet enye o suyai, naitayioki too nking'ureta e nena kituaak apa naaisiaaisho te kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Exodus38:9 Neitayu ninye endung'oroto, te nkalo e kopikop, ore nena kisiong'at e ndung'oroto naa katani napuyiapui napiyaya;" 
Exodus38:10 nera ing'apeta enye tikitam naa tikitam nena kitotoneta o suyai, kake ore ilala oo lolo le nena ng'apeta o nena keek enye naa ine enkosholai." 
Exodus38:11 Ore te nkalo e moikuape naa intemat iip naa tikitam ing'apeta enye; ore nkitotoneta enye naa tikitam, o suyai, kake ore ilala oo lolo loo ng'apeta, ore irubat enyena naa ine nkosholai." 
Exodus38:12 Ore te nkalo o loontoluo netii ilkarash oo isiong'a loo ntemat onom, o ng'apeta enye o neeitotonieki tomon; o neegum tomon ore iyasheta loo ng'apeta o rubat enye naa ene nkosholai." 
Exodus38:13 Ore te dukuya te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong, naa intemat onom." 
Exodus38:14 Ore ilkarash ooisiong'a te ntaloishi nabo e kishomi naa intemat tomon o imiet, o ng'apeta uni o nkitotoneta uni." 
Exodus38:15 Ore, e nkae matua; tena aina o tenda aina te mbata e kishomi e ndung'oroto netii ilkarash ooisiong'a loo ntemat tomon o imiet te nebo ing'apeta uni o nkitotoneta uni." 
Exodus38:16 Ore lelo karash pooki ooisiong'a oomanita le ndung'oroto naa ile nkatani napuyiapui napiyaya. 
Exodus38:17 Ore ntoneta oo ng'apeta naa ino suyai, kake ore ilala oo lolo loo ng'apeta o rubat enye naa ine nkosholai; ore enkimulumulata oo lukuny enye naa te nkosholai ake sii; ore ing'apeta pooki e ilopaashe neiruburubaki te nkosholai." 
Exodus38:18 Ore olkarasha le kishomi le ndung'oroto neikoduno te siaai o ltidu te usi pus o emorijoi o empile o enkatani napuyiapui napiyaya intemat tikitam enkadoro naa intemat imiet endapasho eilep, enyaanyukie ilkarash ooisiong'a le ina dung'oroto." 
Exodus38:19 Ore ing'apeta enye naa ong'uan; ore nkitotoneta enye pokira ong'uan naa suyai, o lala o lolo lenye le nkosholai, o emurata oo lukuny enye o rubat enye e nkosholai." 
Exodus38:20 Ore ncheito pooki e ilo ng'obor le Nkai o ne ina dung'oroto naamanaa naa ino suyai. 
Exodus38:21 Ena esiana oo ntokitin e ilo ng'obor le Nkai, ilo ng'obor le nchakenisho, anaa enaikenaki te ina kitanapata e Musa, te nkisiayiare oo Lawi ti abori erubaroto e Isamar olayioni le Aron ilo apolosani." 
Exodus38:22 Besalel olayioni le Uri olayioni le Huri lo losho le Yuda, oitobira nena pooki naaitanapa Enkai Musa;" 
Exodus38:23 ore te nebo ninye netii Oholiab olayioni le Ahisamak lo losho le Dan, olaitobirunoni o laipirunoni naa olaikodoni too usin pusi, o morijo o mpilei o katani napuyiapui napiyaya." 
Exodus38:24 Ore ina sahabu apa nataasishoreki te siaai, te nchetare pooki e wueji sinyati teina sahabu naishorutua iltung'ana, naa talanta tikitam ooudo o shekeli iip naapishana o tomoni uni te risioroto eshekeli e wueji sinyati." 
Exodus38:25 Ore enkosholai naing'uaa olorere pooki apa ooikenaki, naa talanta iip nabo o imiet, te risioroto e shekeli e wueji sinyati." 
Exodus38:26 Beka nabo te lukunya, aa taa (olpisiai le shekeli te risioroto e wueji sinyati) te pooki ng'ae apa oikenaki, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, too ltung'ana iip ile, o nkalifuni uni, o iip imiet oonom." 
Exodus38:27 Ore ntalantani iip e nkosholai naa inaaitobirieki apa nkitotoneta e wueji sinyati, o nkitotoneta e ilo karasha le ndung'oroto nera iip too ntalantani iip e ntalanta ake te nkitotonet." 
Exodus38:28 Ore too shekeli enkalifu o iip naapishana o ntomoni naapishana o imiet neitobir ilala oo lolo te nkaraki ing'apeta nemur ilukuny enye neitobiraki ninche irubat. 
Exodus38:29 Ore ilo suyai apa oishoruaki naa ntalantani ntomoni naapishana, o shekeli nkalifuni are o iip ong'uan;" 
Exodus38:30 naa ninche eitobirie ninye nkitotoneta te nkaraki kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo, olperere lo lasar lo suyai o eng'esherrie o suyai te nkaraki ninye o ntokitin pooki e ilo perere lo lasar;" 
Exodus38:31 o nkitotoneta naamanita ina dung'oroto o nkitotoneta e kishomi e ina dung'oroto, o ncheito pooki o lng'obor le Nkai, o ncheito pooki naamanaa te dung'oroto." 
Exodus39:1 Ore too usin pusi o morijo o mpilei neitobir ninche te nkarriyiano ilkilani sidain, pee eisiaaishoreki te wueji sinyati; neitobir ninche lelo kilani oosinya te nkaraki Aron; anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Neitobir ninye enkila dorrop e sahabu, too usin pusi o morijo o mpilei, o katani napuyiapui napiyaya." 
Exodus39:3 Neidong ninche sahabu aaitadapash neboru nkorin ronkeni pee easishoreki aaitobirie ina arasha sidai, o nena tokitin pusi o morijo o mpilei, o katani napuyiapui napiyaya te nkarriyiano." 
Exodus39:4 Neitobir te nkaraki ina kila dorrop irubat oo ronyi, neitutumieki ninye ilcholo lenyena pokira are." 
Exodus39:5 Ore ina kimeita narripuno te nkarriyiano neenieki ninye, pee eibung ninye, naa te nena tokitin eripuno o te ina arriyiano, te sahabu o usin pusi o morijo o mpilei, o katani napuyiapui napiyaya nashetuno anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Neirragie isoito barrikon ooji oniks neikodi te sahabu, nepiki te nkarriyiano te nebo nkarn oo layiok le Isirael." 
Exodus39:7 Nepik ninye ninche imatuan pokira are oo ronyi le ina kila dorrop, pee eaku soito oodamishoreki te nkaraki ilayiok le Isirael; anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Neitobir ninye enkila o lgoo te siaai e nkarriyiano, anaa ina kila dorrop te sahabu o usin pusi o morijo o mpilei, o katani napuyiapui napiyaya." 
Exodus39:9 Nerisioro apa nkaloli pooki; ore apa ina kila o lgoo naa katitin are, entemata e ndap enkadoro naa entemata e ndap endapasho katitin are." 
Exodus39:10 Nepik atua ilkererin oong'uan loo soito. Olkereri loo ltoto barrikon, o oltoto sikitok, oltoto oonyori, olkereri le dukuya." 
Exodus39:11 Ore olkereri liaare naa iltoto oonyori, iltoto pusi ooitiil o ltoto sidain ooji almasi;" 
Exodus39:12 ore olkereri li okuni naa iltoto pilei, osoit oji agate iltoto oowang o ltoto sinteti;" 
Exodus39:13 ore olkereri li ong'uan naa iltoto oonyori, o iltoto barrikon, ooji oniks o ltoto pusi; neripakino apa kuna te sahabu." 
Exodus39:14 Kulo apa iltoto tomon aare o nkarn enye anaa nkarn oo layiok le Israel; netiu apa anaa ilmishiren, meeta ake olemeguetakino enkarna enye, too loshon pokira tomon aare." 
Exodus39:15 Neitobir ninche te ina kila o lgoo ilpisia oo ooipila oikununo anaa nkeenta, le sahabu nasila;" 
Exodus39:16 nepik ilkererin aare le sahabu o lgiso aare le sahabu, nepik ilgiso ilpijat pokira aare le ina kila olgoo;" 
Exodus39:17 nepik ninche nena keenta are e sahabu atua lelo giso pokira aare ootii ilpijat pokira aare le ina kila o lgoo. 
Exodus39:18 Ore nkiting'ot pokira are e nena keenta neibung'ieki lelo kererin pokira aare; neiko neijia aaibung'ie te nkalo e dukuya ooronyi le ina kila dorrop. 
Exodus39:19 Neitoki ninche aaitobir ilgiso aare le sahabu, nepik ninche ilcholo pokira aare le ina kila o lgoo te nkalo enye e atua te mbata e ina kila dorrop." 
Exodus39:20 Neitayu ninche ilgiso aare le sahabu, neibung'ie te nkalo e dukuya ti abori ironyi pokira aare le ina kila dorrop." 
Exodus39:21 Neitutum ina kila o lgoo too lgiso lenyena o lelo giso le nkila dorrop te nkeene pus, metaa kepetita ina kimeita narripuno te nkarriyiano ina kila dorrop, pee melolong'u ake te ina kila dorrop; anaa apa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Neitoki sii aitobir olkila oodo li atua ina kila dorrop laa eipus emua; 
Exodus39:23 ore ine neimieki endukuya te ilo kila oodo neikununo anaa enenkila, neeta erripata namanaa pee mepolosa." 
Exodus39:24 Ore erripata e abori e ilo kila oodo neripakini ilonyek oopurupurana too usin pusi, o morijo ompilei o katani napuyiapui napiyaya." 
Exodus39:25 Neitoki sii aitobir ntualan e sahabu nasila, nepik nena tualan errishata oo lonyek oopurupurana te ina manaroto e abori erripata o lkila;" 
Exodus39:26 entuala o long'u, o entuala o long'u emanaa te ripata e abori olkila te nkaraki enkisiaayiare; anaa apa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Neitoki sii aaitobir Ilkilani li oriong te nkarasha napiyaya te nkaraki Aron o layiok lenyena," 
Exodus39:28 o ina arasha naenieki endukuya naitobiruno te katani napuyiapui te nkarasha naripuno sidai, o maupen e katani napuyiapui o nena kilani e atua e katani napuyiapui;" 
Exodus39:29 o enkimeita e katani napuyiapui napiyaya naripa too usin pusi, o morijo, o mpilei naikodo te siaai o ltidu; anaa apa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Neitoki ninche aaitobir enchili e sahabu nasila e ilo marisian sinyati nesiraki ninye enkarna anaa enkarna nataguetakaki to lmishire, “Sinyati to Laitoriani.”" 
Exodus39:31 Neeniki ninche ninye te nkeene pus, aakurraki shumata ina arasha naeniki endukuya; anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Neidipayu esiaai pooki e ilo ng'obor le Nkai; o ilo ng'obor le ntumo, netaasa iltung'ana loo Siraeli anaa nena pooki naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa; neaku etaasa ninche." 
Exodus39:33 Neyau ninche ilo ng'obor enetii Musa, ilo ng'obor o ntokitin enyena pooki, o lala lenyena oo lolo, o rubat oo isunta enyena, o loom lenyena, o ng'apeta enyena, o nkitotoneta enyena;" 
Exodus39:34 nena dapan naanota oo lmeregeshi o noo nkineji naaitushurieki o lkarash lo liatua oodung'ieki; 
Exodus39:35 o sanduku le nchakenisho o nkeek enyena, o lorika lo lng'ur;" 
Exodus39:36 o emesa te nebo imasaa enyena pooki, o emukate e nkitoduaroto;" 
Exodus39:37 o enkibung'et oo ltaai le sahabu nasila o ltaai lenyena te nebo ntukusi oo ltaai o ntokitin enye pooki, o eilata oo ltaai;" 
Exodus39:38 olperere lo lasar le sahabu, o eilata naputishoreki o enkorropil naisonkoyo o lkarasha oisiong'a le kutuk aji o lng'obor," 
Exodus39:39 ilo perere lo lasar lo suyai o eng'esherrie enye o suyai, o mbokishi o ntokitin enyena pooki; o ilo moti oitukuoreki o enkitotonet enye;" 
Exodus39:40 lelo karash ooisiong'a le ndung'oroto o ng'apeta enyena, o nkitotoneta enyena, o lkarash le kishomi e ndung'oroto, o inkeenta enyena o ncheito enyena; o masaa pooki te nkisiayiare e ilo ng'obor le Nkai; o ilo ng'obor le ntumo;" 
Exodus39:41 lelo kilani ooitobiruno te nkisiayiare e wueji sinyati; lelo kilani oosinya le Aron olapolosani, o Ilkilani loo layiok lenyena pee easisho anaa ilapolosak." 
Exodus39:42 Anaa nena pooki apa naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa esiaai pooki, naa ng'ura, etaasa ninche; anaa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani, neaku etaasa ninche ina. Nemayian Musa ninche." 
Exodus40:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Exodus40:2 “Ore te nkolong e dukuya o lapa le dukuya tesheta iyie olng'obor le Nkai o ilo ng'obor le ntumo. 
Exodus40:3 Nipik atua ilo sanduku le nchakenisho, nidung'oo ilo sanduku to lkarasha loliaatua." 
Exodus40:4 Nintijing'u emesa, nipik ntokitin enyena aitobiraki; niyau nkitasheta oo ltaai nipik iltaai lenyena." 
Exodus40:5 Nipik olperere lo lasar le sahabu o enkorropil dukuya ilo sanduku le nchakenisho, nintoki apik enkarasha e kutuk aji o lng'obor le Nkai." 
Exodus40:6 Nipik olperere lo lasar opejori dukuya kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le Nkai ilo ng'obor le ntumo," 
Exodus40:7 nipik ilo moti oitukuoreki erishata e ilo ng'obor le ntumo o lperere lo lasar, nipik enkare." 
Exodus40:8 Nintoki apik endung'oroto aitaman, niik olkarasha le kishomi e ndung'oroto." 
Exodus40:9 Nintoki aitayu eilata naputishoreki, nibukoki ilo ng'obor le Nkai o pooki toki natii atua, nintisiny ninye o masaa enyena pooki; naa keaku ninye sinyati." 
Exodus40:10 Nintoki sii abukoki eilata olperere lo lasar opejori o ntokitin enyena pooki, nintisiny ilo perere naa kesinyayu ilo perere oleng." 
Exodus40:11 Nintoki sii abukoki eilata ilo moti oitukuoreki o eneitotonieki, nintisiny ninye." 
Exodus40:12 Nintoki ariku Aron o layiok lenyena kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo, nintuku ninche te nkare." 
Exodus40:13 Ninchopoki Aron ilkilani oosinya, nibukoki ninye eilata aput, nikinteng'elaki ninye, peyie aatum aisiaya anaa olapolosani." 
Exodus40:14 Niriku sii ilayiok lenyena ninchopoki ninche ilkilani," 
Exodus40:15 nibukoki ninche eilata aput, anaa enituputo menye lenye pee aatum aaisiaayia anaa ilapolosak; ore ina putoto embukokinoto enye e ilata neng'amari ninche metaa ilapolosak nkatitin pooki ti atua iishoritin enye pooki.”" 
Exodus40:16 Neiko neijia Musa; te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye, neaku etaasa ninye." 
Exodus40:17 Ore to lapa le dukuya to lari li aare, te nkolong e dukuya o lapa, neitasheyieki olng'obor le Nkai." 
Exodus40:18 Neshet Musa olng'obor le manyisho e Nkai; neirragie nkitotoneta enyena, nepik irubat oo sunta enyena, nepik imbokishi enyena, neun ing'apeta enyena;" 
Exodus40:19 neisalaash olkarasha te shumata o lng'obor le Nkai neitushur o lng'obor shumata ninye, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus40:20 Neya ninye ina shakenisho nepik atua osanduku, nepik nkeek ilo sanduku nepik ilo orika lo lng'ur enchumata e ilo sanduku;" 
Exodus40:21 neitoki ayau ninche osanduku atua ilo ng'obor le Nkai, nepik ilkarash le ndung'oroto nedung'oo ilo sanduku le nchakenisho; anaa apa enaitanapa Olaitoariani Musa." 
Exodus40:22 Nepik ninye emesa atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, te nkalo e moikuape e ilo ng'obor le Nkai, ti oriong ilo karasha lo liatua," 
Exodus40:23 nepik emukate aitobiraki te nchumata enye te dukuya Olaitoriani; anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa. 
Exodus40:24 Nepik ninye nkitasheta oo ltaai atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, enkipirakinoto eina mesa te nkalo e kopikop e ilo ng'obor le Nkai." 
Exodus40:25 Nepik iltaai te dukuya Olaitoriani; anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa. 
Exodus40:26 Nepik ninye olperere lo lasar le sahabu atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo te dukuya ilo karasha lo liatua," 
Exodus40:27 nepej te ine enkorropil naisonkoyo tenchumta enye anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa. 
Exodus40:28 Nepik ilkarash oodung'oo kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le manyisho e Nkai. 
Exodus40:29 Nepik ninye olperere lo lasar opejori kutuk aji eilo ng'obor le Nkai oilo ng'obor le ntumo, neitayu te nchumata enye olasar opejori o lasar le nkurma naidong'o; anaa apa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus40:30 Nepik ninye ilo moti oitukuoreki erishata e ilo ng'obor le ntumo o lperere lo lasar, nepik enkare naitukuoreki;" 
Exodus40:31 naa ninye eisujie Musa o Aron o layiok lenyena nkaik enye o nkejek enye; 
Exodus40:32 te nepuo ninche atua olng'obor le ntumo naa te neetaniki ninche olperere lo lasar, neitukuo; anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Exodus40:33 Neitasheyie ninye endung'oroto aitaman ilo ng'obor le Nkai o lperere lo lasar nepik ninye olkarasha te kishomi e ina dung'oroto. Neaku eidipa Musa esiai. 
Exodus40:34 Neitoki enkatampoi aitoip ilo ng'obor le ntumo, neiput enkitoo o Laitoriani ina aji e Nkai." 
Exodus40:35 Neitu eidim Musa atijing'a atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, amu etobikie enkatampoi shumata ninye, neiput enkitoo o Laitoriani ilo ng'obor." 
Exodus40:36 Ore tiatua ilotot enye pooki, enkata ake nayae ina atampoi aaiwuang'ie teilo ng'obor, nepuo iltung'ana loo Siraeli dukuya;" 
Exodus40:37 kake teneitu eyae ina atampoi aailepie, neitu ninche epuo, ometabau ina olong nayae aailepie." 
Exodus40:38 Amu ore tiatua ilolot enye pooki netii enkatampoi o Laitoriani shumata ilo ng'obor dama, netii enkima atua ninye kewarie, te dukuya ina aji pooki e Israel." 
Leviticus1:1 Neipotu Olaitoriani Musa, neirorie ninye teilo ng'obor le ntumo, ejo," 
Leviticus1:2 “Irorie iltung'ana loo Siraeli nijoki ninche, teneishoru ake oltung'ani te intae olasar aisho Olaitoriani, niyauu ilasarri linyi loo nkishu aashu iloo ntare." 
Leviticus1:3 “Tenaa ore olasar lenye naa olasar opejori oing'uaa eluaata oo nkishu, neyau ninye olbung'ae lemeeta entioto, neishooyo ninye te kutuk aji olng'obor le ntumo, pee etum ninye ataa keng'amaroyu te dukuya Olaitoriani;" 
Leviticus1:4 neiteleiki ninye enkaina enye endukuya eilo asar opejori, naa keng'amari te nkaraki ninye pee eitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye." 
Leviticus1:5 Neyieng ninye oloing'oni te dukuya o Laitoriani; ore lelo ayiok le Aron lelo apolosak neyau osarge, neisuaaya ilo sarge aaitaman ilo perere lo lasar ootii kutuk aji eilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Leviticus1:6 Neyieng ninye ilo asar opejori nedung'udung aitaa rubat," 
Leviticus1:7 ore ilayiok le Aron ilo apolosani neinok enkima tenchumata olperere lo lasar 
Leviticus1:8 nepik ilkeek aaitobiraki enkima; ore lelo ayiok le Aron apolosak nepik nena rubat enkima elukunya, o eilata aaitobiraki te nchumata lelo keek ootii enkima te nchumata olperere lo lasar;" 
Leviticus1:9 kake ore ore sorri e nkoshoke o loilelek lenyena neituku ninye te nkare. Nepejoo olapolosani pooki te nchumata olperere lo lasar, anaa olasar opejori, olasar le mpejoroto te nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus1:10 “Tenaa ore enkishorunoto enye o lasar opejori naa eluaata oo ntare eing'uaa nkerra aashu nkineji, naa keishoru ninye ositima lemeeta entioto;" 
Leviticus1:11 neyieng ninye te nkalo e moikuape olperere lo lasar te dukuya Olaitoriani, ore ilayiok le Aron lelo apolosak neisuaaya osarge lenye aaitaman ilo perere lo lasar." 
Leviticus1:12 Nedung'udung aaitaa rubat tenebo endukuya enye o eilata, neirragie olapolosani ninche aitobiraki aiteleiki lelo keek ootii enkima te nchumata olperere lo lasar;" 
Leviticus1:13 kake ore sorri e nkayaitie o loilelek neituku ninye te nkare. Ore ilo apolosani neitayu olasar pooki, nepejoo ninye to lperere lo lasar, olasar ninye opejori, olasar le mpejoroto te nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus1:14 “Tenaa ore olasar lenye to Laitoriani naa olasar opejori loo motonyi, neyau ninye olasar lenye loo nturkuluoni aashu ntukurluoni kutiti." 
Leviticus1:15 Neyau olapolosani olperere lo lasar; ore osarge lenye neibukori te mbata olperere lo lasar; 
Leviticus1:16 naa keitayu ninye enkoshoke enye tenebo nkopir nenang'aki embata olperere lo lasar te nkalo o loosaen ewueji oo nkuruon; 
Leviticus1:17 nepolos ninye ina motonyi too naipuko enyena kake meor aitaa are. Nepejoo olapolosani te nchumata olperere lo lasar, te nchumata e lelo keek ootii enkima; olasar opejori ninye, olasar le nkima esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus2:1 “Teneyau ake oltung'ani enkishorunoto e ntapa napuyiapui anaa olasar to Laitoriani, naa keaku ina kishorunoto enye olasar le ntapa sidai; nebukoki ninye eilata ina tapa, nepik olbani oriong ninye," 
Leviticus2:2 neyaki ilayiok le Aron lelo apolosak. Neitayu ninye teina tapa napuyiapui emborei e nkaina eina tapa o eilata tenebo olbani pooki; nepejoo olapolosani ena metaa endamunoto te nchumata olperere lo lasar, olasar le nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus2:3 Ore entapa natelekua neaku ene Aron o layiok lenyena. Ninye erubata nasinya aisul too lasarri oopejokini te nkima Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus2:4 “Teniyau iyie enkishorunoto e ntapa natapejoki to ljiko opising'a, aaitaa olasar, naa keaku imukateni neitu eisuishieki, e ntapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata, napuyiapui" 
Leviticus2:5 naa tenaa ore enkishorunoto ino naa olasar le ntapa nateyiaraki te nkarae, nchoo eaku ole ntapa sidai neitu eisuishieki, naipurjaki te eilata;" 
Leviticus2:6 tebela ntaa imbelibelat nibukoki eilata oriong enye; olasar le ntapa ninye. 
Leviticus2:7 Naa tenaa ore enkishorunoto ino naa olasar le ntapa nateyiaraki te moti eitobiruni te ntapa sidai o eilata. 
Leviticus2:8 Naa iyau iyie ina kishorunoto e ntapa naitobiraki te kuna tokitin ayaki Olaitoriani; ore ake pee eitarasakini olapolosani, neyau ninye ilo perere lo lasar." 
Leviticus2:9 Neya olapolosani teina kishoroto entapa ina rubata endamunoto nepejoo ena rubata te nchumata olperere lo lasar, olasar le nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus2:10 Ore entoki natelekua teilo asar le ntapa neaku ene Aron o layiok lenyena; erubata naa ninye nasinya aisul o lasar opejokini te nkima Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus2:11 “Meetae enkishoroto e ntapa nayakini Olaitoriani naitobiruni te ntoki naisuisho, amu mipejokiki Olaitoriani te nkima entoki naisuisho aashu pooki aisho anaa olasar le nkima." 
Leviticus2:12 Ore anaa enkishorunoto oo lng'anayio le dukuya indimidimi intae aayaki ninche Olaitoriani, kake meishoori ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar aaitaa esong'ouna narropil." 
Leviticus2:13 Tipika nena kishorot inono pooki e ntapa emunyan, nimincho ake eaku metii emunyan o lning'o lo osotua lino o Enkai ino o lasar lino le ntapa; ore too nkishorot inono pooki nchooi emunyan." 
Leviticus2:14 “Teninchooyo iyie enkishoroto e ntapa oo lng'anayio le dukuya aisho Olaitoriani, ninchooyo iyie anaa olasar le ntapa loo lng'anayio le dukuya, ina tapa naidong'oki naing'uaa lukuny e ntapa naatisilaki te nkima." 
Leviticus2:15 Nibukoki iyie eilata oriong ninye, ninteleiki olbani oriong enye, olasar le ntapa ninye." 
Leviticus2:16 Nepejoo olapolosani anaa entoki nadamuni eoroti eina tapa naidong'oki o eilata tenebo olbani pooki; olasar opejokini te nkima Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus3:1 “Tenaa ore enkishoroto o ltung'ani naa olasar le seriani, neishooyo ninye enkiteng te luata, olbung'ae aashu entawuo, nchoo eishooyo ina nemeeta entioto te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus3:2 Neiteleiki ninye enkaina enye endukuya eilo asar lenye neyieng ninye te kutuk aji eilo ng'obor le ntumo; ore lelo ayiok le Aron, lelo apolosak neisuaaki ilo osarge ilo perere lo lasar aaitaman." 
Leviticus3:3 Ore teilo asar le seriani oishoruaki, anaa enkishoroto naishori te nkima Olaitoriani, neishooyo ninye enkurriny pooki naimulumulita enkoshoke o enkurriny pooki e nkoshoke." 
Leviticus3:4 O lairakuj pokira oare tenebo ina kurriny naimulumulita ninche oilo kina le moinyua oya ninye tenebo ilairakuj. 
Leviticus3:5 Nepejoo ilayiok le Aron te nchumata olperere lo lasar ti oriong ilo asar opejori, otii enchumata oo nkeek te nkima, olasar le mpejoroto te nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus3:6 “Tenaa ore enkishoroto enye o lasar le seriani oishori Olaitoriani naa enkiteng naing'ua eluaata olbung'ae aashu entauo neishoru enemeeta entioto. 
Leviticus3:7 Teneishoru ninye olkuoo le ker aitaa olasar lenye, neishoru ninye te dukuya Olaitoriani," 
Leviticus3:8 eiteleiki enkaina enye endukuya eilo asar lenye, neyieng ninye te dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo; ore lelo ayiok le Aron neisuaaki osarge ilo perere lo lasar aaitaman." 
Leviticus3:9 Ore teilo asar le seriani anaa enkishoroto napejokini te nkima Olaitoriani, neishooyo ninye eilata enye, eilata o lkidong'oe, aitabaiki oloito le nkoriong oina kurriny naimulumulita enkoshoke, o enkurriny pooki e nkoshoke," 
Leviticus3:10 o lairakuj pokira oare oina kurriny naimulumulita ninche, oilo kina le monyua neya ninye tenebo ilairakuj." 
Leviticus3:11 Nepejoo olapolosani ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar anaa endaa naishoruaki tialo enkima aaisho Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus3:12 “Tenaa ore enkishoroto enye naa enkine, nchoo eishoru ninye te dukuya Olaitoriani," 
Leviticus3:13 neiteleiki enkaina enye endukuya enye neyieng ninye te dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo, ore lelo ayiok le Aron neisuaaki osarge olperere lo lasar aaitaman." 
Leviticus3:14 Netum taa aishooi te ninye, anaa olasar lenye oishori te nkima Olaitoriani, ina kurriny naimulumulita enkoshoke o enkurriny pooki enkoshoke," 
Leviticus3:15 o lairakuj pokira oare tenebo ina kurriny enye, oilo kina le monyua oya ninye tenebo ilairakuj." 
Leviticus3:16 Nepejoo olapolosani ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar anaa endaa naishoori te nkima metaa esong'ouna narropil. Ore enkurriny pooki naa eno Laitoriani. 
Leviticus3:17 Keaku ena enkitanapata e anaake tiatua iishoritin inyi pooki, tiatua imanyishoritin inyi pooki, nchere minyanya intae enkurriny aashu osarge.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus4:2 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel, teneas oltung'ani ingok eitu eotiki tiae nabo oo mbaa naaitanapishe Olaitoriani pee measi, neas nabo te ninche," 
Leviticus4:3 tenaa olapolosani otubukokoki eilata aaput oas eng'oki, ayau entorroni shumata iltung'ana, nchoo ninye eitayu tenkaraki ina ng'oki nataasa oloti oing'oni lemeeta entioto aisho Olaitoriani metaaolasar le ng'oki." 
Leviticus4:4 Neyau ninye ilo oing'oni kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo dukuya Olaitoriani, neiteleiki enkaina enye endukuya eilo oing'oni, neyieng ilo oing'oni te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus4:5 Ore ilo apolosani otubukokoki eilata aaput neya embata osarge leilo oing'oni atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo; 
Leviticus4:6 neitadoiki olapolosani olkimojino lenye atua ilo sarge neisuaaki embata osarge katitin naapishana dukuya Olaitoriani te dukuya ilo karasha le wueji sinyati.
