Leviticus4:7 Nepik ilo apolosani embata eilo sarge imowuarak ol perere lo lasar naatii enkorropil te dukuya Olaitoriani, apa otii atua olng'obor le ntumo. Ore ilo likae sarge lo loing'oni neibukoo te ntonata olperere opejorieki olasar otii kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Leviticus4:8 Ore enkurriny pooki eilo oing'oni lo lasar le ng'oki neitayu ninye, ina kurriny naimulumul isorri e nkoshoke o ina kurriny pooki e nkoshoke," 
Leviticus4:9 o lairakuj lenyena pokira oare tenebo enkurriny enye oilo kina le moinyua oya ninye tenebo ilairakuj 
Leviticus4:10 (anaa ake enayae to lkiteng lo lasar le seriani), nepejoo olapolosani tenchumata olperere lo lasar opejori." 
Leviticus4:11 Kake ore olchoni leilo oing'oni o nkiri enyena tenebo endukuya enye, o loilelek lenyena, o sorri enyena e nkoshoke o moyok enyena" 
Leviticus4:12 nenap ninye oloing'oni pooki auluo ewueji nemeiduruk ine neibukorieki nkuruon, nepejoo ninye te nkima oo lkeek; ore te ine wueji neibukorieki nkuruon." 
Leviticus4:13 “Teneas olturrur pooki loo Siraeli eng'oki eitu eotiki ore ina toki naisudoro too nkonyek eumata, neas ninche nabo oo mbaa naaitanapishe Olaitoriani pee measi neaku ilooitarruoitie;" 
Leviticus4:14 ore ake teneyiolouni ina ng'oki nataasa ninche, neitayu ina umata oloti oing'oni metaa olasar le ng'oki, neyauni ninye dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo," 
Leviticus4:15 ore ilpayiani leilo turrur neiteleiki nkaik enye endukuya eilo oing'oni te dukuya Olaitoriani, neyieng'i ilo oing'oni te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus4:16 Neyau taa ilo apolosani otubukokoki eilata aaput embata o sarge leilo oing'oni atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo. 
Leviticus4:17 Neitadoiki olapolosani olkimojino lenye atua ilo sarge neisuaaki katitin naapishana dukuya Olaitoriani tioriong olkarasha le wueji sinyati. 
Leviticus4:18 Nepik ninye embata o sarge enchumata oo mowuarak eilo perere lo lasar otiii atua olng'obor le ntumo dukuya Olaitoriani; ore olikae sarge neibukoo te ntonata eilo perere lo lasar opejori otii kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo. 
Leviticus4:19 Ore enkurriny enye pooki neitayu ninye nepejoo te nchumata olperere lo lasar. 
Leviticus4:20 Ina ninye eitaas ilo oing'oni; anaa enaitaasa ilo oing'oni lo lasar le ng'oki, neijia sii eiko tele. Neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninche, naa kepalakini ninche." 
Leviticus4:21 Nenap ninye ilo oing'oni auluo ilng'oborri nepejoo anaa enatapejoyie oloing'oni le dukuya; o lasar le ng'oki te nkaraki eumata. 
Leviticus4:22 “Teneas oloitoreisho eng'oki, neas eitu eotiki ae nabo oo mbaa pooki naaitanapishe Olaitoriani Enkai enye pee measi, neaku oloitarruoyie," 
Leviticus4:23 ore pee eitayioloi ninye ina ng'oki nataasa, neyau ninye anaa olasar lenye enkine, ositima lemeeta entioto," 
Leviticus4:24 neiteleiki ninye enkaina enye endukuya eina kine, neyieng ninye te wueji neyieng'ieki lelo asarri oopejori te dukuya Olaitoriani; olasar le ng'oki ninye." 
Leviticus4:25 Neya olapolosani embata eilo sarge lo lasar le ng'oki to lkimojino lenye nepik imowuarak olperere lo lasar opejorieki lasarri, neibukoo olikae sarge te ntonata olperere lo lasar opejorieki lasarri." 
Leviticus4:26 Ore enkurriny enye pooki nepejoo te nchumata o lperere lo lasar, anaa enkurriny olasar loo nkishorot e seriani; neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye too ng'ok enyena, naa kepalakini ninye." 
Leviticus4:27 “Teneas oltung'ani ake duoo eng'oki eitu eotiki aas ae nabo oo mbaa naaitanapishe Olaitoriani pee measi, neaku oloitarruoyie," 
Leviticus4:28 ore ake pee eitayioloi ninye ina ng'oki nataasa neyau ninye aitaa enkishoroto enye enkine, esupen nemeeta entioto, te nkaraki ina ng'oki nataasa." 
Leviticus4:29 Neiteleiki ninye enkaina enye endukuya eina kine o lasar le ng'oki, neyieng ilo asar le ng'oki te wueji neyieng'ieki ilasarri oopejori." 
Leviticus4:30 Neya olapolosani embata eilo sarge lenye to lkimojino lenye nepik nchumat oo mowuarak eilo perere lo lasar opejorieki ilasarri, neibukoo olikae sarge te ntonata eilo perere lo lasar." 
Leviticus4:31 Neitayu enkurriny enye pooki, anaa enaitayuni ina kurriny to lasar le seriani, nepejoo olapolosani te nchumata olperere lo lasar metaa esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani; neitayu olapolosani olning'o lo sotua tenkaraki ninye, naa kepalakini ninye." 
Leviticus4:32 “Teneyau ninye olkuoo le ker metaa enkishoroto enye o lasar le ng'oki, nchoo ninye eyau esupen nemeeta entioto," 
Leviticus4:33 neiteleiki enkaina enye, endukuya eilo asar le ng'oki neyieng ninye aitaa olasar opejori." 
Leviticus4:34 Neya olapolosani embata o sarge leilo asar le ng'oki to lkimojino lenye nepik nchumat oo mowuarak eilo perere lo lasar opejorieki ilasarri, neibukoo olikae sarge lenye te ntonata olperere lo lasar." 
Leviticus4:35 Ore enkurriny enye pooki neitayuni anaa enaitayuni enkurriny o lker lo lasar le seriani, nepejoo olapolosani te nchumata olperere lo lasar, apejoki Olaitoriani te nkima te nchumata ine wueji oo nkishorot; neitayu olapolosani olasar olning'o lo sotuat enkaraki ina ng'oki nataasa ninye, naa kepalakini ninye." 
Leviticus5:1 “Tenelo neas oltung'ani ake ninye eng'oki eipotuoki enkiguana meitayu shakenisho hoo naa olchakeni ninye, ore tenetoduaa ninye aashu tenetayiolo ina bae, ore ake etiu neijia nemelimu, nenap ninye eng'oki e ntorroni enye." 
Leviticus5:2 Aashu tenelo neiseyie ake ninye oltung'ani entoki nemesinya, aa empopok e ng'ues nemesinya aashu empopok e nkiteng nemesinya aashu empopok oo ntokitin nemesinya naa embae naisudoro ena te ninye, neaku ninye ole mesinya, neaku ninye oloitarruoyie." 
Leviticus5:3 Aashu tenelo neiseyie ninye mbaa nemesinya oo ltung'ana e pooki pukunoto laa te ninye eaku olemesinya, ore ina bae neisudoro te ninye, ore ake pee elotu ayiolou ina bae neaku ninye oloitarruoyie." 
Leviticus5:4 Aashu tenelo neiro oltung'ani te nkutuk enye ainos olmumai pee eas entorroni aashu eas esidai olmumai ake duoo ninye oinos iltung'ana, naa tenaa embae ena naisudoro te ninye, ore ake pee elotu ayiolou neaku ninye te pooki e kuna oloitarruoyie." 
Leviticus5:5 Tenaa oloitarruoyie oltung'ani tiae nabo e kuna, neibalunye ninye ina ng'oki nataasa," 
Leviticus5:6 naa keyaki ninye nkishorot enyena e nkitarruorroto Olaitoriani teina ng'oki nataasa, esupen naing'ua eluaata oo ntare, olker aashu enkine pee eaku olasar le ng'oki, neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye teina ng'oki nataasa." 
Leviticus5:7 “Kake tenemeeta ninye olker, neyau naa, anaa enkishoroto enye te nkitarruorroto nataasa to Laitoriani, teina ng'oki nataasa ninye, nturkuluoni are anaa nturkuluoni are kutiti, nabo naaku olasar le ng'oki o enkae naaku olasar opejori." 
Leviticus5:8 Neyau ninye ninche enetii olapolosani, laa ninye ong'as aishooyo ina o lasar le ng'oki; neburukush ninye endukuya enye te murt enye kake medung'oo" 
Leviticus5:9 neisuaaki ninye embata o sarge leilo asar le ng'oki embata olperer lo lasar, ore olikae sarge nebukoki ninye e ntonata o lperere lo lasar; olasar le ng'oki ninye." 
Leviticus5:10 Neitoki ninye aishooyo eniare metaa olasar opejori terisioroto oo nkitanapat; neitobiru olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye teina ng'oki nataasa ninye, naa kepalakini ninye." 
Leviticus5:11 “Kake tenemeeta ninye nturkuluoni are, aashu nturkuluoni are kutiti, neyau naa, anaa enkishoroto enye teina ng'oki nataasa ninye, ematua e tomon e efa e ntapa napuyiapui metaa enkishoroto te nkaraki eng'oki, nemepik ninye eilata shumata ina tapa, nemepik olbani shumata enye, amu olasar ninye le ng'oki." 
Leviticus5:12 Neyau ninye enetii olapolosani, neitayu ilo apolosani emborei enkaina eina tapa metaa erubata nadamuni nepejoo ina to lperere lo lasar, apejoki Olaitoriani teine neishoorieki ilasarri oopejori; olasar le ng'oki ninye." 
Leviticus5:13 Neijia eiko olapolosani aitobiraki ninye olasar olning'o lo sotua teina ng'oki nataasa ninye tiae nabo e kuna baa naa kepalakini ninye. Ore enaleku neaku eno lapolosani anaa enkishoroto e ntapa.” 
Leviticus5:14 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus5:15 “Tenelo neas oltung'ani ake ninye embae naainyal enkirukoto, neas eng'oki eitu eotiki, te pooki toki e nena sinyat o Laitoriani nchoo eyau ninye, neyau anaa enkishoroto enye o lasar lenkitarruorroto to Laitoriani, olmeregesh lemeeta entioto aitayu tiatua eluaata, nidung'oki iyie enkinyiang'a te shekeli e nkosholai terisioroto e shekeli e wueji sinyati; olasar le nkitarruorroto ninye." 
Leviticus5:16 Nelak sii ninye ina apa naitarruoyie tialo ina bae sinyati, neponiki e rubata eimiet ina, neisho olapolosani; neitobiraki olapolosani ninye olning'o lo sotua teilo meregesh lo lasar le nkitarruorroto, naa kepalakini ninye." 
Leviticus5:17 “Tenelo neas ing'ok oltung'ani aas nabo oo mbaa naaitanapishe Olaitoriani pee measi, hoo duoo ninye nemeyiolo, ore ake eyia netaa ninye oloitarruoyie naa kenap ninye enkitarruorroto enye." 
Leviticus5:18 Neyau ninye enetii olapolosani olmeregesh lemeeta entioto aitayu te luata enye, nitudung'oko iyie enkinyiang'a nchere keishiakino enkinyiang'a e laata o lasar le nkitarruorroto, neitobir olapolosani olasar lo lning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye teina kitadiata nataasa ninye eitu eotiki; naa kepalakini ninye." 
Leviticus5:19 Olasar le nkitarruorroto ilo; eitarruoyie ninye te dukuya, Olaitoriani.”" 
Leviticus6:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus6:2 “Tenelo ake neas oltung'ani eng'oki, neas embae naainyal enkirukoto tialo Olaitoriani, alej ole latia enye too mpisai naashumi aashu te embae natoning'okinoteki aashu aikonyaa, aashu aitorogony ole latia enye" 
Leviticus6:3 aashu adumu entoki naimina nelejishore ainos olmumai te lejare, tiae nabo oo mbaa naas iltung'ana netaasa eng'oki teina." 
Leviticus6:4 Teneaku etaasa oltung'ani eng'oki neaku oloitarruoyie nerrinyu ninye ina toki nawa te nkikonyare, aashu ina nanoto te nkitorogonyata, aashu ina naishooki ninye meiteng'ela, aashu ina toki apa naimina natudumua ninye," 
Leviticus6:5 aashu ae toki ake ninye nainosie ninye olmumai te lejare; nerrinyu ninye elulung'a neponiki erubata e imiet, neisho ilo ora olopeny, teina olong o lasar le nkitarruorroto enye." 
Leviticus6:6 Naa keyaki ninye olapolosani olasar lenye le nkitarruorroto, aisho Olaitoriani olmeregesh lemeeta entioto aitayu tiatua eluaata enye, litudung'oko iyie enkinyiang'a nchere keiririkino olasar le nkitarruorroto;" 
Leviticus6:7 neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye te dukuya Olaitoriani, naa kepalakini ninye te pooki bae naba anaa enataasa oltung'ani neaku oloitarruoyie.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus6:9 “Ntanapa Aron o layiok lenyena, tiaaki, Ena enkitanapata o lasar opejori. Ore ilo asar opejori neton te nchumata oo ng'esherreta o lperere lo lasar enkewarie pooki o mekenyu, ore enkima olperere lo lasar neishori metobiko ayupuyup te nchumata enye." 
Leviticus6:10 Neishop olapolosani olkila lenye le kitani napuyiapui neishop enkila e atua e kitani napuyiapui, neitayu taa nena kuruon eilo asar otumuta enkima etapejoyioki to lperere lo lasar, nepik ninche embata olperere lo lasar." 
Leviticus6:11 Neitoki aitayu nena kilani naaishopito neishop kulie kilani, nenap nena kuruon aya auluo ilng'oborri ewueji nemeiduruk." 
Leviticus6:12 Ore ina kima olperere lo lasar nepali meyupuyupo, meishori metua, nepik olapolosani ilkeek e nkima ine anaake tadekenya, neirragie ilo asar opejori aiteleiki aitobiraki, nepejoo te nchumata enye enkurriny eilo asar le seriani." 
Leviticus6:13 Neishori enkima meyupuyupo te shumata olperere lo lasar nkatitin pooki, meishori metua." 
Leviticus6:14 “Ena enkitanapata o lasar le ntapa. Ilayiok le Aron ooishooyo te dukuya Olaitoriani, te dukuya ilo perere lo lasar." 
Leviticus6:15 Neitayu obo emborei enkaina eina tapa napuyiapui o lasar le ntapa tenebo eilata o lbani pooki otii enchumata eina tapa o lasar, nepejoo ena metaa erubata nadamuni tenchumata olperere lo lasar, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus6:16 Ore enkae pooki neinos Aron o layiok lenyena; nenyae ninye eitu eisuishieki tiatua ewueji sinyati; tiatua olgoriet leilo ng'obor le ntumo neinos ninche. 
Leviticus6:17 Nemepeji ninye tenebo entoki naisuisho. Aishoo nanu ninche metaa erubata to lasar lai opejori te nkima, entoki ena nasinya oleng naikununo anaa olasar le ng'oki o lasar le nkitarruorroto." 
Leviticus6:18 Eidim pooki lee too layiok le Aron ainosa ninye, anaa enaibalunyeki ntarasi tiatua iishoritin inyi pooki, tialo ilasarri lo Laitoriani oopejori te nkima; ore oloba anaa oloiseyie ninche neaku sinyati.”" 
Leviticus6:19 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus6:20 “Ele ninye olasar oisho Aron o layiok lenyena Olaitoriani teina olong nabukokini ninye eilata aaput: ematua e tomon e efa e ntapa napuyiapui metaa olasar le ntapa li anaake, olpisiai lenye tadekenya o likae pisiai teipa." 
Leviticus6:21 Neitobiruni te eilata teina girra nayierishoreki, niyau iyie eipurjaki aaitobiraki, too rubat naatapejoki anaa olasar le ntapa, ninchooyo anaa esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus6:22 Ore ilo apolosani tiatua ilayiok le Aron, laa ninye etubukokoki eilata aaput pee etonie olorika lenye, neitarasaki ninye Olaitoriani anaa apa enaibalunyeki ntarasi; nepejori pooki." 
Leviticus6:23 Ore pooki asar le ntapa lo lapolosani nepejori pooki nemeinosi ninye.” 
Leviticus6:24 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus6:25 “Tiaki Aron o layiok lenyena, ena enkitanapata o lasar le ng'oki. Ore te wueji neteyieng'ieki olasar opejori, neyieng'i ilo asar le ng'oki te dukuya Olaitoriani; naa kesinya ninye oleng." 
Leviticus6:26 Ore ilo apolosani oishooyo olasar te nkaraki eng'oki nenya ninye; nenya ninye tiatua ine wueji sinyati, tiatua olgoriet lo lng'obor le ntumo." 
Leviticus6:27 Ore pooki toki naiseyie nkiri eilo asar neaku sinyati; naa tenelo neisuaakino osarge lenye olkila, nintuku iyie ilo sarge tiatua ewueji sinyati." 
Leviticus6:28 Ore ina moti oo nkulupuok nateyierieki nkiri nerrarri; kake tenaa emoti osuyai eteyierieki neiutuuti ina, neitukui te nkare." 
Leviticus6:29 Neidim pooki lee tiatua ilapolosak ainosa, entoki nasinya ena oleng." 
Leviticus6:30 Kake meetae olasar le ng'oki onyae nkiri eyauaki osarge lenye atua olng'obor le ntumo pee eitobiri olning'o lo sotua tiatua ine wueji sinyati, kepejori ninye te nkima.”" 
Leviticus7:1 Ena ninye enkitanapata o lasar le nkitarruorroto. Eisinyati ninye oleng; 
Leviticus7:2 ore teine wueji neyieng'ieki ilasarri oopejori teine eyieng' ninche olasar le nkitarruorroto, ore osarge lenye neisuaakini enchumata olperere lo lasar aaitaman." 
Leviticus7:3 Ore enkurriny enye pooki neishoori, ina eilata olkidong'oe, oina kurriny pooki naimulumulita enkoshoke," 
Leviticus7:4 o lairakuj pokira oare oina kurriny naimulumulita ninche, oilo kina lemoinyua oya ninye tenebo ilairakuj;" 
Leviticus7:5 nepejoo olapolosani ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar anaa nkishorot naapejokini te nkima Olaitoriani; olasar le nkitarruorroto ninye. 
Leviticus7:6 Eidim pooki lee tiatua ilapolosak ainosa, nenyae tiatua ewueji sinyati, eisinyati ninye oleng." 
Leviticus7:7 Ore olasar le nkitarruroroto, neikununo anaa olasar le ng'oki, nabo enkitanapata e pokira; ore ilo apolosani oitayu olning'o lo sotua te ninye neya ninye." 
Leviticus7:8 Neya ilo apolosani oitayu olasar opejori lo ltung'ani ake ninye olchoni leilo asar opejori oitayio ninye. 
Leviticus7:9 Ore pooki kishoroto e ntapa natapejoki tiatua ewueji napejishoreki o pooki toki naitobiraki te ngirra aashu teneyierishoreki naa eneilo apolosani oitarasayie aishooyo. 
Leviticus7:10 Ore pooki kishoroto e ntapa, naipurjakaki teilata aashu enatoyio, neaku enoo layiok pooki le Aron, neishori pooki aaitorisioki." 
Leviticus7:11 “Naa ena enkitanapata o lasar le seriani oidim oltung'ani aishoo Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus7:12 Teneishooyo ninye te nashe, neishooyo ninye imukateni neitu eisuishieki naaipurjaki te ilata, o nkaukau neitu eisuishieki o emukate e ntapa naelieki eilata napuyiapui naaipurjaki te eilata aaitobiraki." 
Leviticus7:13 Ore tenebo ilo asar lenye le seriani le nkishoroto e nashe neyau ninye enkishoroto enye tenebo imukateni naaisuishieki. 
Leviticus7:14 Ore te kuna neishooyo ninye emukate nabo te pooki kishoroto, anaa enkishoroto to Laitoriani, neaku ena kishoroto eneilo apolosani oisuaki ilo sarge lo lasar le seriani." 
Leviticus7:15 Ore nkiri eilo asar lenye le seriani le nkishoroto e nashe nenyae teina olong olasar lenye; meisho ninye ae eleku o mekenyu. 
Leviticus7:16 Kake tenaa ore olasar le nkishoroto enye naa enkitabaroto aashu enkishoroto olpela neinosi teina olong naishorua ninye olasar lenye, ore taisere entoki natelekua neinosi," 
Leviticus7:17 kake ore entoki naleku too nkiri eilo asar te nkolong e uni nepejori te nkima. 
Leviticus7:18 Teneinosi pooki toki oo nkiri eilo asar lenye le seriani te nkolong e uni, ore ilo oishorua ilo asar nemeng'amuni, nemeikenakini ninye ilo asar; neaku ilo asar olminong ore ilo oinos nenap ninye enkitarruorroto enye." 
Leviticus7:19 “Ore nkiri naaiseyie pooki toki nemesinya nemeinosi; nepejori te nkima. Ore lelo pooki lemeiduruk neidim aainosa nkiri," 
Leviticus7:20 kake ore ilo tung'ani onya nkiri eilo asar lo Laitoriani le seriani eata ninye olduruk, nedung'ori ilo tung'ani aaitung'uaa iltung'ana lenyena." 
Leviticus7:21 Naa teneiseyie oltung'ani ake ninye entoki naiduruk nemesinya, tenaa olduruk te tung'ani aashu eng'ues nemesinya aashu ae toki naiduruk o lminong paa keitoki ainos nkiri olasar lo Laitoriani le seriani, neiwuang'ieki ilo tung'ani tiatua iltung'ana lenyena.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus7:23 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel, minyanya intae eilata, olkiteng, aashu enker, aashu enkine." 
Leviticus7:24 Ore eilata e ng'ues natua openy, o eilata eina natara ilowuarak, neidimi aataasishore tiae oitoi, kake meeta nchere pee inosa intae." 
Leviticus7:25 Amu ore pooki tung'ani oinos eilata e ng'ues naa ninye eishorieki Olaitoriani olasar te nkima neiwuang'ieki too ltung'ana lenyena. 
Leviticus7:26 Niminosinoso sii osarge tukul, aa olemotonyi aashu aa oleng'ues, te pooki wueji nimanyimanya." 
Leviticus7:27 Ore oloba anaa oloinos pooki sarge, neiwuang'ieki ilo tung'ani too ltung'ana lenyena.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus7:29 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel, ore ilo oishoru olasar le seriani loo nkishorot enyena aisho Olaitoriani neyaki ninye ina kishoroto enye Olaitoriani; teilo asar loo nkishorunot enyena e seriani." 
Leviticus7:30 Neyau ninye too nkaik enyena makewan nena kishorunot naapejorieki te nkima olasar lo laitoriani; neyau ninye ina ilata tenebo oloikulu, pee etumi aayuko ilo oikulu olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus7:31 Nepejoo olapolosani eilata te nchumata olperere lo lasar, kake ore oloikulu neaku ole Aron o layiok lenyena." 
Leviticus7:32 Ore emuro e tatene nincho olapolosani anaa enkishoroto naing'uaa olasar lino loo nkishorot inono e seriani. 
Leviticus7:33 Ore ilo tiatua ilayiok le Aron oishooyo osarge lo lasar le seriani o eilata neishori emuro enkalo e tatene metaa erubata enye. 
Leviticus7:34 Amu ore ilo oikulu oyuki oina muro naishoori aawa nanu too ltung'ana loo Siraeli, aitayu tiatua ilasarri lenye loo nkishorot e seriani, naisho nanu ninche Aron ilo apolosani o layiok lenyena, anaa erubata e anaake naitayu iltung'ana le Israel." 
Leviticus7:35 Ena ninye erubata e Aron o layiok lenyena naing'ua nena kishorot naapejorieki te nkima olasar lo laitoriani, naiteng'elakaki ninche ina olong apa naitarasayioki ninche pee eisiaisho anaa lapolosak lo Laitoriani;" 
Leviticus7:36 eitanapishe Olaitoriani ena pee eishori ninche iltung'ana le Israel, ina olong apa natubukokoki ninche eilata aaput; erubata enye anaake tiatua iishoritin enye pooki.”" 
Leviticus7:37 Ena ninye enkitanapata o lasar opejori, olasar le ntapa, olasar le ng'oki, o lasar le nkitarruorroto, o le nkitisinyata o lasarri le seriani," 
Leviticus7:38 apa naitanapa Olaitoriani Musa te nchumata oldoinyo le Sinai, ina olong apa naitanapa ninye iltung'ana le Israel pee eyaki nkishorot enye Olaitoriani to lpurkel le Sinai." 
Leviticus8:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus8:2 “Toriko Aron o layiok lenyena tenebo ninye, neya lkilani o eilata naputishoreki o loing'oni lo lasar le ng'oki, olmeregeshi oare, o enkikapu oo mukateni neitu eisuishieki;" 
Leviticus8:3 ninturrur eumata pooki te kutukaji olng'obor le ntumo.” Neas Musa anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye. 
Leviticus8:4 Neiturrurri eumata te kutukaji olng'obor le ntumo. 
Leviticus8:5 Nejoki Musa ilo turrur “Embae ena naitanapishe Olaitoriani metaasi.” 
Leviticus8:6 Neriku Musa Aron o layiok lenyena neituku ninche te nkare. 
Leviticus8:7 Neishopoki ninye olkila lioriong nerreten ninye te nkimeita, neitoki aishopoki ninye enkila sapuk, neishopoki tioriong enkila dorrop neen teina keene naripuno te nkarriyiano eina kila dorrop aeniki ninye." 
Leviticus8:8 Nepik ninye enkila olgoo ore ina kila olgoo nepik Urim o Tumim. 
Leviticus8:9 Nepik ninye enkarasha endukuya enye, ore ina arasha te nkalo enkomom nepik enkishili e sahabu, ina ilo marisian sinyati le nkitoo anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Leviticus8:10 Ina pee eya Musa ina ilata naputishoreki neitisiny ilo ng'obor le Nkai o pooki toki natii atua, neitisiny ninche." 
Leviticus8:11 Neisuaaki ninye embata eina ilata enchumata olperere lo lasar katitin naapishana, nebukoki ilo perere lo lasar tenebo imasaa enyena pooki, o lmoti oitukuoreki o enkitotonet enye, pee eitisiny ninche." 
Leviticus8:12 Nebukoki embata eina ilata naputishoreki endukuya e Aron neput ninye neitisiny ninye. 
Leviticus8:13 Neyau Musa lelo ayiok le Aron, neishopoki ninche ilkilani nerreten ninche too nkimeitani nkoishuaa nepik ninche imaupen, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Leviticus8:14 Neitoki ayau ilo oing'oni lo lasar le ng'oki; ore Aron o layiok lenyena neiteleiki nkaik enye endukuya eilo oing'oni lo lasar le ng'oki. 
Leviticus8:15 Neyieng Musa ninye, neitayu osarge, ore to lkimojino lenye nepik enchumata oo mowuarak eilo perere lo lasar aitaman, neitisiny ilo perere lo lasar, neibukoo ilo likae sarge te ntonata olpererelo lasar, neitisiny ninye, pee eitobiru olning'o lo sotua tenkaraki ninye." 
Leviticus8:16 Neitayu ninye enkurriny pooki enkoshoke olkina le moinyua o lairrakuj pokira oare tenebo enkurriny enye, nepejoo Musa ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar." 
Leviticus8:17 Kake ore ilo oing'oni, o lchoni lenye, o nkiri enyena, o modiok enyena nepejoo ninye te nkima tiauluo ilng'oborri, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Leviticus8:18 Neitoki ninye aitarasaa ilo meregesh lo lasar opejori neiteleiki Aron o layiok lenyena nkaik enye endukuya eilo meregesh. 
Leviticus8:19 Neyieng Musa ninye, neisuaaki osarge enchumata eilo perere lo lasar aitaman." 
Leviticus8:20 Ore ake pee edung'i ilo meregesh aarishirish, nepejoo Musa endukuya o nena rubat o enkurriny." 
Leviticus8:21 Ore ake pee eitukui isorri e nkoshoke o loilelek te nkare, nepejoo Musa olmeregesh pooki to lperere lo lasar, anaa olasar opejori, esong'ouna narropil, olasar opejokini te nkima Olaitoriani, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Leviticus8:22 Neitoki aitarasaa olmeregesh liare, ilo meregesh le nkiteleikinoto oo nkaik; neiteleiki Aron o layiok lenyena nkaik enye endukuya eilo meregesh." 
Leviticus8:23 Neyieng Musa ninye, neitayu embata eilo sarge lenye nepik enkitipet enkiok e Aron e tatene o lmogirra le nkaina enye e tatene o le nkeju enye e tatene." 
Leviticus8:24 Neyauni ilayiok le Aron, nepik Musa oloti sarge nkitipeti oo nkiyiaa enye e tatene, o lmogirrani loo nkaik enye e tatene olmogirrani lenye le tene; neitoki Musa aisuaki osarge olperere lo lasar aitaman." 
Leviticus8:25 Neitoki aitayu enkurriny o eilata olkidong'oe, oina kurriny pooki e nkoshoke, olkina le monyua, o lairakuj pokira oare o enkurriny enye, o emuro e tatene;" 
Leviticus8:26 ore teina kikapu oo mukateni neitu eisuishieki natii dukuya Olaitoriani neitayu ninye emukate nabo neitu eisuishieki, ore emukate nabo tenebo eilata, o enkaukau nabo neitatashaki ninche ina ilata oina muro e tatene;" 
Leviticus8:27 nepik ninye kuna pooki nkaik e Aron o nkaik oo layiok lenyena, neyuk ninche anaa olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus8:28 Neitoki Musa aya ninche too nkaik enye, nepejoo ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar tenebo nena kishorunot naapejori; anaa olasar le nkiteleikinoto oo nkaik, esong'ouna narropil, olasar opejokini te nkima Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus8:29 Neya Musa oloikulu neyuk ninye anaa olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani; erubata apa e Musa ena to lmeregesh lo lasar le nkiteleikinoto oo nkaik, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Leviticus8:30 Neitoki Musa aya embata eina ilata naputishoreki o embata eilo sarge otii enchumata olperere lo lasar, neisuaaki Aron o lkilani lenyena, o layiok lenyena sii o lkilani loo layiok lenyena, neaku eitisinya ninye Aron o lkilani lenyena, o layiok lenyena o lkilani loo layiok lenyena, tenebo ninye." 
Leviticus8:31 Nejoki Musa Aron o layiok lenyena, “Enteyier nena kiri te kutukaji o lng'obor le ntumo ninosinoso teine o nena mukateni naatii atua ina kikapu oo nkishorot enkiteleikinoto oo nkaik, anaa enaitanapishe nanu, ajo, Aron o layiok lenyena ooinos nena;" 
Leviticus8:32 ore entoki naleku too nkiri o too mukateni nipejoo te nkima. 
Leviticus8:33 Nimipuopuo intae aaipang te kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo too nkolong'i naapishana, o metaba anaa neishunye nkolong'i enkiteleikinoto oo nkaik, amu nkolong'i naapishana ine nkiteleikinoto oo nkaik te iyie." 
Leviticus8:34 Anaa enataase taata, eitanapishe Olaitoriani metaasi pee eitobiri olning'o lo osotua te nkaraki intae." 
Leviticus8:35 Ore te kutukaji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo entobik teine dama o kewarie too nkolong'i naapishana, intabayaya nena naaitanapishe Olaitoriani, pee miyeye ake; amu nena nanu aaitanapaki.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Neas Aron o layiok lenyena nena tokitin pooki naaitanapishe Olaitoriani aimunye Musa. 
Leviticus9:1 Ore te nkolong e isiet neipotu Musa Aron o layiok lenyena o lpayiani le Israel," 
Leviticus9:2 nejoki ninye Aron, “Iwa iyie oloti oing'oni intayunye olasar le ng'oki o lmeregesh ntayunye olasar opejori, ore te pokira meetae oloota entioto, nintarasaa ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus9:3 Nijoki iltung'ana le Israel, ‘Ewaita ositima le kine, oaku olasar le ng'oki, o lashe o sitima le ker, naa ilo lari obo pooki nemetii oloata entioto, pee eaku olasar opejori" 
Leviticus9:4 o lkiteng o lmeregesh metaa olasar le seriani, pee ipolososo intae te dukuya Olaitoriani o enkishoroto e ntapa naipurja te ilata, amu ore taata keipang'aki intae Olaitoriani.’ ”" 
Leviticus9:5 Neyau ninche nena naaitanapishe Musa dukuya olng'obor le ntumo, neigutu olturrur pooki anyiku neitashe te dukuya o Laitoriani." 
Leviticus9:6 Nejo Musa, “Ena bae eitanapa intae Olaitoriani pee iasiasa; naa keipang'aki intae enkitoo o Laitoriani.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Neitoki Musa ajoki Aron, “Tinyikaki olperere lo lasar, nintayu olasar lino le ng'oki ino o lasar lino opejori, nintobir olning'o le sotua te nkorrok ino o too ltung'ana; niyau enkishooroto e kulo tung'ana nintayu olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninche; anaa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Nenyikaki Aron ilo perere lo lasar, neyieng ilo ashe lo lasar le ng'oki, te nkaraki enkorrok enye." 
Leviticus9:9 Neitarasaki ilayiok le Aron ninye osarge, neitadoiki ninye olkimojino lenye atua osarge nepik osarge nena mowuarak o lperere lo lasar, nebukoki ilo sarge entonata o lperere lo lasar;" 
Leviticus9:10 kake ore enkurriny o lairakuj o lkina le monyua o ilo asar le ng'oki etapejoyie ninye te nchumata olperere lo lasar, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Ore nkiri o lchoni nepejoo ninye te nkima tiauluo ilng'oborri. 
Leviticus9:12 Neyieng ninye ilo asar opejori; neyaki ilayiok le Aron ninye osarge, neisuaaki ninye enchumata olperere lo lasar aitaman." 
Leviticus9:13 Neyaki ninche ninye ilo asar opejori eitaaki rubat, o endukuya; nepejoo ninye ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar." 
Leviticus9:14 Neituku ninye isorri e nkoshoke o loilelek nepejoo ninche tenebo ilo asar opejori te nchumata olperere lo lasar. 
Leviticus9:15 Neitoki aitarasaa nkishorot oo ltung'ana, neya ina kine o lasar le ng'oki te nkaraki iltung'ana, neyieng ninye, neishooyo ninye te nkaraki eng'oki anaa ilo asar le dukuya le ng'oki." 
Leviticus9:16 Neitarasaa ninye ilo asar opejori, neishooyo ninye te risioroto e nkitanapata." 
Leviticus9:17 Neitoki aitarasaa ilo asar le ntapa, neiput nkaik enyena, nepejoo te nchumata olperere lo lasar, aitatashaki ilo asar opejori le nkakenya." 
Leviticus9:18 Nepolos sii olkiteng o lmeregesh, ilo asar le seriani te nkaraki iltung'ana neyaki ilayiok le Aron ninye osarge neisuaaki enchumata olperere lo lasar aitaman," 
Leviticus9:19 ore enkurriny eilo kiteng o eno lmeregesh, o eilata o lkidong'oe leilo meregesh, oina kurriny naimulumul isorri enkoshoke, o lairakuj, o lkina le moinyua;" 
Leviticus9:20 neiteleiki ninche ina kurriny enchumata oo luikuluaa, nepejoo ninye ina kurriny te nchumata olperere lo lasar," 
Leviticus9:21 kake ore lelo oikuluaa o emuro e tatene eyuko Aron anaa olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani; anaa enaitanapishe Musa. 
Leviticus9:22 Neilepie Aron nkaik enyena aipirie iltung'ana nemayian ninche; nelotu ninye adou teine neishoorieki ilo asar opejori le ng'oki o lasar le seriani. 
Leviticus9:23 Nepuo Musa o Aron atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo ore ake pee eipang'u ninche aapuonu boo nemayian ninche iltung'ana, neliooyu enkitoo o Laitoriani too ltung'ana pooki." 
Leviticus9:24 Nelotu enkima naing'uaa dukuya Olaitoriani nemut ilo asar opejori oina kurriny natii shumata olperere lo lasar; ore ake pee edol iltung'ana pooki ina, nebuaku ninche nebatata too nkomomi enye." 
Leviticus10:1 Ore apa Nadab o Abihu, lelo ayiok le Aron, meetae ake oleitu eyau emoti enye e nkima, nepik enkima atua, nepik enkorropil atua, neishooyo ninche enkima nemesinya te dukuya Olaitoriani, amu eitu eitanap Olaitoriani ninche meishooi." 
Leviticus10:2 Nelotu enkima eing'uaa dukuya Olaitoriani nemut ninche, neye ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus10:3 Nejoki Musa Aron, “Ena bae etejo Olaitoriani, ‘kaitoduaaya nanu kewan nchere kara sinyati tiatua lekua laataaniki nanu, ore te dukuya iltung'ana pooki naaisisi nanu.’ ” Negira Aron." 
Leviticus10:4 Neipotu Musa Mishael o Elisafan, ilayiok le Usiel olenkapu le Aron, nejoki ninche, “Entinyiku, entanap ilalashera linyi ewuang'ie tiatua ewueji sinyati ewaita auluo ilng'oborri.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Nenyiku ninche, nenap ninche too lkilani lenye aaya auluo ilng'oborri anaa enatejo Musa." 
Leviticus10:6 Neitoki Musa ajoki Aron o Eliesa o Itamar, lelo ayiok lenyena, “Emincho ake olpapita loo lukuny inyi eisiong'a, nimipolososo ilkilani linyi, pee miyeye ake, pee melotu engoro shumata ele turrur pooki; kake ore lelo alashera linyi, ina aji pooki e Israel neidim aaishira teina kinosata enkima nainuaa Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus10:7 Nimipuopuo intae boo aaipang te kutukaji ele ng'obor le ntumo, pee miyeye ake; amu ore eilata o Laitoriani naputishoreki netii shumata intae.” Neas ninche te risioroto o rorei le Musa." 
Leviticus10:8 Neitoki Olaitoriani airorie Aron, ajoki," 
Leviticus10:9 “Miok ake enaisho aashu ae toki naoki napi, iyie aashu lelo ayiok linono ootii tenebo iyie, tenilo atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, pee miyeye ake; keaku ena enkitanapata ntarasi tiatua iishoritin inyi pooki." 
Leviticus10:10 Pee itumutumu aaitirishu enasinya o enemesinya, e nemeiduruk o enaiduruk;" 
Leviticus10:11 ninteng'ening'ene intae iltung'ana le Israel nena kitanapat pooki naairoro Olaitoriani aimunye Musa.” 
Leviticus10:12 Nejoki Musa Aron o Eliesa o Itamar, lelo ayiok lenyena ootelekutua, “Entayu ilo asar le ntapa otelekua te lelo asarri oopejokini te nkima Olaitoriani, ninosinoso meisuisho te mbata olperere lo lasar, amu eisinyati oleng," 
Leviticus10:13 ninosinoso intae te wueji sinyati, amu erubata ino o erubata oo layiok linono te nena kishorot naapejokini te nkima Olaitoriani; amu ina nanu aaitanapaki." 
Leviticus10:14 Kake ore ilo oikulu oyukoki oina muro naishoruaki indimidimi aainosa te pooki wueji nemeiduruk, iyie o layiok linono o ntoyie inono tenebo iyie, amu eishoruaki ninche anaa erubata ino o erubata oo layiok linono te lelo asarri le seriani loo ltung'ana le Israel." 
Leviticus10:15 Ore ina muro naishoruaki oilo oikulu oyuki keyau ninche tenebo lelo asarri e nkima oina kurriny, pee eyuki anaa olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani, naa olino o loo layiok linono tenebo iyie anaa erubata inyi ntarasi, anaa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Neikilikuanua apa Musa ajurru ina kine o lasar le ng'oki, naa ng'ura etapejoyioki! Negorokino apa ninye Eliesa o Itamar, lelo ayiok le Aron apa ootelekutua, ejo" 
Leviticus10:17 “Kainyoo intae pee eitu inosinoso olasar le ng'oki tiatua ewueji sinyati naa entoki nasinya ninye oleng nikinchooki apa iyie pee itum atanapa entorroni ele turrur pee intobir olning'o lo sotua tenkaraki ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani? 
Leviticus10:18 Ng'ura, eitu eyauni osarge lenye atua ewueji sinyati esipa eishaakino ninosa iyie tiatua e wueji sinyati, anaa enaitanapishe nanu.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Nejoki Aron Musa, “Ng'ura, eishooitie taata ninche olasar lenye le ng'oki o lasar lenye opejori te dukuya Olaitoriani, ore ake eyia aatadoikito nanu mbaa naaikununo nji! Amaa naaji tenaa kainosa nanu olasar le ng'oki taata, kanaata eaku keng'amaroyu te dukuya Olaitoriani?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Ore ake pee ening Musa ina neshipa. 
Leviticus11:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Leviticus11:2 “Entiaki iltung'ana le Israel, Kuna ntokitin naaishu nindimidimi intae aainosa tiatua ing'uesi pooki naatii oriong enkop." 
Leviticus11:3 Ore pooki toki nasasha loisotok neinyaku eng'amurai, tiatua ing'uesi indimidimi aainosa." 
Leviticus11:4 Ore ake eyia ore tiatua nena naainyaku ingamura aashu esasha iloisotok niminosinoso kuna: entames amu keinyaku ninye eng'amurai kake mesasha loisotok, mesinya te intae." 
Leviticus11:5 O enkijujur, amu keinyaku ninye eng'amurai kake mesasha iloisotok, mesinya te intae." 
Leviticus11:6 Ore enkitejo, amu keinyaku ninye eng'amurai kake mesasha ninye iloisotok, mesinya te ntae." 
Leviticus11:7 Olbitir amu kesasha ninye iloisotok kake meinyaku eng'amurai, mesinya te ntae." 
Leviticus11:8 Ore nkiri enye minosinoso ake, ore mpopoki enye miseyieyie ake; mesinya ninche te intae." 
Leviticus11:9 “Ndimidimi intae aainosa kuna, e pooki e nena naatii atua nkariak, ore pooki toki natii atua nkariak naata lopir o lpala aa atua enaiposha etii aashu ilkejek ndimidimi intae aainosa." 
Leviticus11:10 Kake ore pooki toki natii inaaiposha aashu atua ilkejek nemeeta lopir, aashu ilpala, te nena naapuo tiatua nkariak o nena naaishu naatii atua nkariak naa olminong te intae." 
Leviticus11:11 Nchoo eaku ninche olminong te intae, ore nkiri enye niminosinoso, ore mpopoki enye niminyikakiki. Nchoo eaku olminong te intae." 
Leviticus11:12 Ore pooki toki natii atua nkariak naa entoki nemeeta lopir o lpala naa olminong te intae. 
Leviticus11:13 “Naa kuna naaku olminong tialo imotonyi, nemeinosi ninche, amu olminong ninche: olkurragos o lmotonyi loo lmurran, o lmotonyi sapuk le nkare," 
Leviticus11:14 o enkolepo, o lenkalem te risioroto oo mpukunot enye," 
Leviticus11:15 o pooki kurruk te risioroto oo mpukunot enyena," 
Leviticus11:16 o esidai, olmuntut, olmagiro, o entilalu terisioroto oo mpukunot enyena," 
Leviticus11:17 o emotonyi oo nkiyiaa o enagor kewan, o enaibalasho." 
Leviticus11:18 Olkupelia, o enaadokutuk o enkinyankik, o entirriid, o encharab" 
Leviticus11:19 o entilagos o emotoroki o mpukunot enyena, o lembae nabo, o enagor kewan." 
Leviticus11:20 “Ore ntokitin pooki naata inaipuko naapuo too nkejek ong'uan naa olminong te intae. 
Leviticus11:21 Ore etiu neijia, ore tiatua nena nyaun naata nkopir naapuo too nkejek moo ng'uan indimidimi intae aainosa nena naata ndapi too nkejek enye, naa ninche epuoyie te nkop." 
Leviticus11:22 Ore te ninche nindimidimi aainosa olmaati te risioroto oo mpukunot enye, o entiantianyi o mpukunot enyena, o entaboi o mpukunot enyena o entargeeti o mpukunot enyena," 
Leviticus11:23 kake ore nkulie nyaun pooki naata nkopir, neeta nkejek moo ng'uan naa olminong te ntae." 
Leviticus11:24 “Naa te kuna iakuku intae ilo lduruk, ore pooki ng'ae oiseyie mpopoki enye neiduruku ninye o metaa teipa," 
Leviticus11:25 ore pooki ng'ae ake ninye onap ae rubata oo mpopoki nelo aituku ilkilani lenyena neton ninye eiduruk o metaa teipa. 
Leviticus11:26 Ore pooki ng'ues naiperra loisotok kake meeta loisotok oare, aashu meinyaku eng'amurai naa enturuj te intae, ore pooki ng'ae oiseyie ninche neiduruku." 
Leviticus11:27 Ore pooki naapuo too ndapi, tiatua nena ng'uesi oo nkejek moo ng'uan naa olduruk te ntae; ore oloba anaa oloiseyie empopok enye neiduruku ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus11:28 Ore ilo onap empopok enye nelo aituku ilkilani lenyena, neaku oloiduruk o metaa teipa; keiduruk ninche te ntae." 
Leviticus11:29 “Naa kuna naara olduruk te intae tiatua nena tokitin naaikurtutari tioriong enkop: olmaima, enderoni, olmokua te risioroto oo mpukunot enyena," 
Leviticus11:30 olmokua, olmaima, olpur, ologilalem, o tanki." 
Leviticus11:31 Kuna naaiduruk te intae tiatua nena naaikurtutari; ore ilo oba anaa oloiseyie ninche teneye neton eiduruk o metaa teipa. 
Leviticus11:32 Naa ore pooki toki nadoiki ninche etuata neaku enaiduruk, oi aa enchata, aashu enkila aashu olchoni, aashu olbene; pooki masaai ake ninye naasishoreki te pooki pukunoto; meeta nchere meitadoikini atua enkare, neton ninye aa olminong o metaa teipa; neitoki taa asidanu." 
Leviticus11:33 Naa tenedoiki ake ninye nabo enye atua entoki naitobiruaki too nkulukuok ore ina toki pooki natii atua neaku eiduruk, ore ina moti oo nkulukuok entadany ninye." 
Leviticus11:34 Ore pooki daa natii atua naidimi aainosa, netubukokine enkare neaku keiduruk; ore entoki pooki naidimi aatook too masaa naijo kuna neaku keiduruk." 
Leviticus11:35 Ore pooki toki naba anaa enadoiki erubata ake ninye oo mpopoki enye neaku keiduruk, aa enepejishoreki aashu eneyierishoreki, nchoo ebeli aaitaa mbelibelat; keiduruk ninche naa keaku olduruk teintae." 
Leviticus11:36 Ore ake etiu neijia ina ong'u enkare aashu eng'umoto natii enkare naa eisidai; kake ore ake teneshoroo mpopoki enye neaku keiduruk. 
Leviticus11:37 Naa tenedoiki ake ninye erubata oo mpopoki enye ilanterera oopuoi aaun, ore lelo anterera naa aisidain ake;" 
Leviticus11:38 kake teneshuma olantererai tiatua enkare, nedoiki ake ninye pooki rubata enchumata e nena popoki e ilo antererai neaku keiduruk te intae." 
Leviticus11:39 “Naa teneye ake ninye eng'ues nabo e nena nindimidimi aainosa, ore ilo oiseyie empopok enye neaku oloiduruk o metaa teipa," 
Leviticus11:40 ore ilo onya nkiri enyena nelo aituku ilkilani lenyena neaku oloiduruk o metaa teipa. Ore sii ilo onap empopok nelo aituku ilkilani lenyena, neaku oloiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus11:41 “Ore pooki toki naikurtutari ti oriong enkop naa keiduruk; meinosi ninye. 
Leviticus11:42 Ore entoki naba anaa enalo te nkoshoke enye aashu pooki nalo too nkejek ong'uan aashu pooki toki naata nkejek kumok, nena tokitin pooki naaikurtutari ti oriong enkop, eminya ake, amu olminong ninche." 
Leviticus11:43 Emintaa ake ate olminong te pooki toki naikurtutari; nimindurukiekie ate te ninche, pee miakuku ake ilolminong." 
Leviticus11:44 Amu ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, entisinya naa ate, pee iakuku sinyat amu kara nanu sinyati. Emindurukie ake ate tiae toki naikurtutari neiserpepiari ti oriong enkop." 
Leviticus11:45 Amu ara nanu Olaitoriani ilo apa oitayio intae aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, pee aaku Enkai inyi, entaa naa sinyat, amu kara nanu sinyati.”" 
Leviticus11:46 Ena ninye enkitanapata naipirta pooki ng'ues o entaritiki o pooki toki naishu nalo tiatua nkariak o pooki toki naishu naikurtutari ti oriong enkop," 
Leviticus11:47 pee erishu nena naara inaaiduruk o nena nemeiduruk o nena ng'uesi naaishu naaidimi aainosa o nena ng'uesi naaishu nemeidimi aainosa. 
Leviticus12:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus12:2 Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel, tenenutayu enkitok, neiu enkayioni, neaku ninye enaiduruk too nkolong'i naapishana anaa te rishata enye o lapa, neiduruku ninye." 
Leviticus12:3 Ore te nkolong e isiet nemurati ina ayioni. 
Leviticus12:4 Neitoki ninye abik nkolong'i tomoni uni oo kuni teilo sarge lenye le nkitisinyata; nemeishori ninye meiseyie entoki sinyati aashu elotu atua enkaji Enkai o metaba anaa neishunye nkolong'i enyena enkitisinyata. 
Leviticus12:5 Kake teneiu ninye entito, nebik ninye nkolong'i tomon oo ng'uan anaa te rishata enye olapa, nebik ninye teilo sarge lenye lenkitisinyata nkolong'i ntomoni ile o ile." 
Leviticus12:6 “Ore pee eishunye nkolong'i enyena enkitisinyata aa to layioni aashu te ntito, neyaki ninye olapolosani te kutukaji olng'obor le ntumo olkuoo le ker lo lari obo oaku olasar opejori, o enturkuluo kiti aashu nturkuluoni naaku olasar le ng'oki." 
Leviticus12:7 Neishooyo olapolosani te dukuya Olaitoriani neitobir olning'o lo osotua te nkaraki ninye, nesinyayu ninye teina rukunoto osarge lenye. Ena ninye enkitanapata tialo ina naiu enkerai aa enkayioni aashu entito." 
Leviticus12:8 Naa tenemeidim ninye anoto olkuoo le ker, neya ninye nturkuluoni are aashu nturkuluoni are kutiti, nabo te nkaraki olasar opejori o enkae te nkaraki olasar le ng'oki. Neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye, nesinyayu ninye.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Leviticus13:2 “Teneeta oltung'ani enetukurrunye to sesen lenye aashu oltudutai aashu olpepedoi, neibelekenya aaku enkeeya oo lbolot to lchoni lo sesen lenye, neyakini ninye Aron olapolosani aashu obo loo layiok lenyena lelo apolosak." 
Leviticus13:3 Nejur ilo apolosani ine netii olpepedoi olchoni to sesen lenye, naa teneibelekenyate ilpapit leine wueji netii olpepedoi lenye, aaiborru, nelioyu ina muoyian etugumo to sesen lenye, naa enkeeya oo lbolot ina, ore pee eidip olapolosani atujurro ninye, neibalunye ninye ajo oloiduruk." 
Leviticus13:4 Kake teneibor ilo pepedoi otii olchoni lo sesen lenye, nelioo ajo eitu eturoyu alang olchoni, neitu eibelekenya olpapita leine eitu eturoyu alang olchoni, neitu eibelekenya olpapita leine aiborru, neikenoo olapolosani ilo tamuoyiai nkolong'i naapishana," 
Leviticus13:5 neitoki olapolosani ajur ninye te nkolong e naapishana. Naa tenetujurro too nkonyek enyena ina muoyian, neitu eitoki ina muoyian aponari to lchoni neitoki olapolosani aikenoo ninye kulie olong'i naapishana." 
Leviticus13:6 Neitoki olapolosani ajur ninye te nkolong e naapishana naa tenetunukunye ilo pepedoi neitu eitoki ina keeya adaari to lchoni, neibalunye olapolosani ajo meiduruk ninye; olpepedoi ake, neituku ninye ilkilani lenyena nesidanu." 
Leviticus13:7 Kake tenetadaari ilo pepedoi to lchoni lo sesen, ina kata eidipa aitoduaai kewan to lapolosani te nkitukuoto enye; neigil ninye alotu dukuya olapolosani;" 
Leviticus13:8 nejur olapolosani ninye, naa tenetubulayie ilo pepedoi to lchoni lo sesen lenye, netum olapolosani aibalunye nchere keiduruk enkeeya oo lbolot." 
Leviticus13:9 “Teneidimu oltung'ani enkeeya oo lbolot, neyakini ninye olapolosani." 
Leviticus13:10 Nejur olapolosani ninye, naa tenetii enetukurrunye neibor olchoni lo sesen lenye, neibelekenyate ilpapit leine aaiborru, niewotiote ine wueji" 
Leviticus13:11 naa enkeeya oo lbolot torrono natijing'a olchoni lo sesen lenye, neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo keiduruk. Neikenoo olapolosani ninye aiwuang'ie to lorere amu keiduruk ninye." 
Leviticus13:12 Naa teneipang'u ina keeya oo lbolot to lchoni lo sesen lenye, metaa eibulua enkeeya oo lbolot olchoni pooki lo sesen leilo tung'ani omuoi ebaiki endukuya o metabaiki nkejek, anaa enadol olapolosani" 
Leviticus13:13 nejur olapolosani ninye, naa teneibulua ina keeya oo lbolot osesen lenye, pooki neibalunye ninye ajo eisidai meiduruk teina muoyian; eibelekenye pooki aiborru, metaa meiduruk ninye." 
Leviticus13:14 Kake tenelioyu ineewotiotate te ninye, neaku ninye oloiduruk." 
Leviticus13:15 Nejur olapolosani ine neiwotiote, neibalunye ninye ajo keiduruk, ore ewueji neiwotiote to sesen naa keiduruk; amu enkeeya oo lbolot." 
Leviticus13:16 Kake teneitoki ine neiwotiote aibelekenya neiborru, nelotu ninye enetii olapolosani," 
Leviticus13:17 nejur olapolosani ninye, ore ake pee eibelekenya ina keeya aiborru, neibalunye olapolosani ilo tung'ani omuoi ajo meiduruk; eisidai ninye." 
Leviticus13:18 “Naa tenetii oltudutai osesen lo ltung'ani, neishiu" 
Leviticus13:19 ore ine wueji apa oltudutai nejing ewueji naibor neteijia aashu ewueji oo ltipot ooibor o loo nyokie, nepuoi aaitodol olapolosani;" 
Leviticus13:20 ore olapolosani nejur ine, naa teneliooyu egut alang olchoni lo sesen ore ilpapit leine neibelekenyate aaiborru neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo olo lduruk, enkeeya oo lbolot ninye nayopua ilo tudutai." 
Leviticus13:21 Kake tenejur olapolosani ine, ore ilpapit leine neitu eiborru neitu egutu alang olchoni lo sesen kake etunukunye neikenoo olapolosani ninye aiwuang'ie to lorere nkolong'i naapishana;" 
Leviticus13:22 naa tenedaari to lchoni lo sesen, netum taa olapolosani aibalunye ninye nchere oloiduruk; etijing'a ninye enkeeya oo olbolot." 
Leviticus13:23 Kake tenetoni lelo tipot te wueji nebo nemeponari naa enkiporoi ake oltudutai, neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo meiduruk." 
Leviticus13:24 “Naa teneeta osesen ewueji neinosa enkima to lchoni lenye, ore ine wueji neinosa enkima neaku oltipoti, onyokie aashu oloibor," 
Leviticus13:25 nejur olapolosani ine, ore pee eibelekenyate ilpapit leine aaiborru netugumo ine alang olchoni lo sesen, naa enkeeya o lbolot, ninye nayopua ina kinosata enkima, neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo olo lduruk; enkeeya oo lbolot ena." 
Leviticus13:26 Kake tenejur olapolosani ine ore ilpapit leine neitu eiborru neitu egutu alang osesen, kake etunukunye, neikenoo olapolosani ninye aiwuang'ie nkolong'i naapishana." 
Leviticus13:27 Nelotu olapolosani ajur ninye te nkolong e naapishana; naa teneibulayie to lchoni lo sesen lenye, neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo oloiduruk naa keeta, enkeeya oo lbolot." 
Leviticus13:28 Kake teneton ilo tipoti te wueji nebo nemeibulaa to sesen, kake etunukunye kake enetejia ake teina kinosata enkima neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo meeta entioto; amu enkiporoi enkima ake." 
Leviticus13:29 “Naa teneeta olee anaa enkitok enkeeya te ndukuya anaa to lboony. 
Leviticus13:30 Nejur olapolosani ine; ore pee elioyu ine egut alang olchoni lo sesen lenye, ore ilpapit leine naa eisikitok naa nelamilama, neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo olduruk; amu olpepedoi ilo, enkeeya oo lbolot e ndukuya aashu enolboony." 
Leviticus13:31 Naa tenejur olapolosani ina muoyian e mion, nelioyu ajo megut alang olchoni lo sesen, nemetii ilpapit oorook ine, netum taa olapolosani aikenoi ilo tung'ani oota olpepedoi nkolong'i naapishana," 
Leviticus13:32 ore te nkolong e naapishana nejur olapolosani ina keeya; naa teneitu eibulaa ilo pepedoi nemetii ilpapit sikitok, nemelio ilo pepedoi etugumo alang olchoni lo sesen," 
Leviticus13:33 netum taa ilo tung'ani atabarno kewan kake mebarn ilo pepedoi; neitoki olapolosani aikenoo ilo tung'ani oata olpepedoi kulie olong'i naapishana 
Leviticus13:34 ore te nkolong e naapishana neitoki olapolosani ajur ilo pepedoi, naa teneitu eibulaa ilo pepedoi to sesen nelioyu ajo megut alang olchoni lo sesen neibalunye olapolosani ajo meiduruk; neituku ninye ilkilani lenyena, nesidanu." 
Leviticus13:35 Kake teneibulayie ilo pepedoi osesen eidipaki aaisuja ninye," 
Leviticus13:36 neitoki olapolosani ajur ninye, ore ake pee eibulayie ilo pepedoi osesen lenye, nemeeta tipat pee eitoki olapolosani aing'oru ilpapit sikitok; amu keiduruk ninye" 
Leviticus13:37 kake tenetujurruoki ilo pepedoi too nkonyek enyena, netubulakitia ilpapit oorook neishiuo ilo pepedoi, meeta ninye entioto, neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo meiduruk ninye." 
Leviticus13:38 “Teneeta olee aashu enkitok iltipot to lchoni lo sesen lenye, iltipot ooibor," 
Leviticus13:39 nelo olapolosani ajur, ore lelo tipot lo lchoni lo sesen lenye nemeibor oleng, naa ilgeet ootijing'a osesen lenye; meeta ninye olduruk." 
Leviticus13:40 “Teneishunye ilpapit aapuku te ndukuya oltung'ani, naa endukuya ake natukurre, kake meeta ninye olduruk." 
Leviticus13:41 Naa teneishunye ilpapit lo ltung'ani te nkalo enkomom enye o nkushu, naa endukuya ake natukurre te nkalo enkomom, kake meeta ninye olduruk." 
Leviticus13:42 Kake tenetii ina kurroto e ndukuya aashu ina kurroto enkalo enkomom oloti pepedoi onyokie neibor, naa enkeeya oo lbolot natijing'a enkurroto enye e ndukuya aashu ina kurroto enye enkalo enkomom." 
Leviticus13:43 Nelotu naa olapolosani ajur ninye naa tenenyokie neibor ine neteijia tenkurrunoto enye e ndukuya anaa te nelio etiu anaa empukunoto enkeeya oo lbolot to lchoni lo sesen," 
Leviticus13:44 naa oltung'ani oata enkeeya oo lbolot ninye, neata ninye olduruk; neibalunye olapolosani ninye ajo olo lduruk endukuya etii ina keeya enye." 
Leviticus13:45 “Ore ilo tung'ani oata enkeeya oo lbolot nchoo eishop nkilani naapolosa neisho ilpapit le ndukuya enye eisiong'a, neimulumul ninye enkutuk enye ajo, ‘Olo lduruk olo lduruk.’" 
Leviticus13:46 Nebik ninye aa oltung'ani oata olduruk enkata pooki naba anaa enaata ina keeya; neaku ninye olaata entioto; neton ninye openy te wueji enye tiauluo ilng'borri. 
Leviticus13:47 “Tenejing olduruk le nkeeya oo lbolot atua olkila, aa olkila loo ntare aashu olkila le kitani," 
Leviticus13:48 tenaa oloripuno too usin anaa oloo nkarash naapuyiapui, anaa oloo lpapit loo ntare, anaa oloo ndapan, anaa ole pooki toki naitobiruaki too ndapan, anaa ole pooki toki naripuno too ndapan" 
Leviticus13:49 naa tenelioyu naa enkeeya oo lbolot enyori anaa enyokie to lkila, aa taa olkila oripuno too usin, anaa oloo ntokitin naapuyiapui, anaa oloo lpapit loo ntare, anaa oloo ndapan, anaa ole pooki toki naitobiraki too ndapan, naa enkeeya oo lbolot naa kepuoi aaitodol olapolosani." 
Leviticus13:50 Nelo olapolosani ajur ina keeya, neikenoo ina naata enkeeya nkolong'i naapishana;" 
Leviticus13:51 neitoki taa alo ajur ina keeya te nkolong e naapishana. Teneibulayie enkeeya ilo kila, oripuno anaa oloo ntokitin naapuyiapui, anaa oloo ndapan, o endapana naasishoreki keiduruk ninye." 
Leviticus13:52 Naa kelo ninye apejoo ilo kila, aa oloripuno too usin, arashu oloo ntokitin naapiyaya, anaa oloo lpapit loo ntare anaa ole kitani napuyiapui, anaa pooki toki oo ndapan, amu enkeeya torrono ina, naa kepejori te nkima." 
Leviticus13:53 “Naa tenejur olapolosani, neitu eitoki ina keeya adaari teilo kila oripuno anaa o too ntokitin naapiyaya, anaa oloripuno anaa pooki toki oo ndapan," 
Leviticus13:54 netum naa olapolosani aitanapisho meitukui ina toki natijing'a enkeeya neikenoo ninye nkulie olong'i naapishana; 
Leviticus13:55 neitoki olapolosani ajur ina toki natijing'a enkeeya ina kata eidipaki aaitukuo. Naa teneitu eibelekenya emua e ilo tipoti le nkeeya, hoo neitu eibulaa ina keeya, naa olduruk; nipejoo iyie ninye te nkima, aa enkalo e oriong etii ilo tipoti le nkeeya oo lbolot aashu ene dukuya." 
Leviticus13:56 “Kake tenejur olapolosani, nedol ajo eimisiloyie ilo tipoti eidipaki aaitukuo, netum naa ninye aigeru ilo tipoti aitayu teilo kila, aashu te ndapana, aashu teina naripuno aashu teina oo ntokitin naapiyaya." 
Leviticus13:57 Naa teneigil aliooyu to lkila, oripuno too usin, anaa oloo ntokitin naapiyaya, anaa naaripuno o pooki toki oo ndapan, naa kegira adaari. Nilo apejoo te nkima ina natii enkeeya." 
Leviticus13:58 Kake ore ilo kila, oripuno too usin, anaa too ntokitin naapiyaya anaa pooki toki oo ndapan nemeekure etii oltipoti le nkeeya indipa intae aaitukuo, neitokini aaigil aaituku, kat are nesidanu taa.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Ena ninye enkitanapata e nkeeya oo lbolot to lkila loo lpapit loo nkerra aashu le kitani, aa oloripuno aashu oloo ntokitin naapiyaya, aashu enaripuno aashu ae toki oo ndapan, pee eutu tenaa keeta olduruk aashu tenaa meeta olduruk." 
Leviticus14:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus14:2 “Ena naaku enkitanapata tialo ilo oata enkeeya oo lbolot teina olong enkitukuoto enye; keyakini ninye olapolosani," 
Leviticus14:3 neipang olapolosani alo auluo ilng'oborri nelo ilo apolosani ajur ninye. Ore ake pee eishiwuo ina keeya oo lbolot teilo oata enkeeya oo lbolot," 
Leviticus14:4 neitanap olapolosani ninche mewaita te nkaraki ninye ilo oituku imotonyi are sidain nemeiduruk naaishu o nkeek oo ntarakua o enkarasha nanyokie o hisopo; 
Leviticus14:5 neitanap olapolosani ninche meteyiang'a nabo e nena motonyi tiatua emoti oo nkulukuok te nkare naruko. 
Leviticus14:6 Neya ninye ina motonyi naishu tenebo nkeek oo ntarakua oina arasha nanyokie o hisopo, neitadoiki ninche oina motonyi naishu atua ilo sarge leina motonyi nateyieng'aki te shumata ina are naruko" 
Leviticus14:7 neisuaaki ilo oitisinyi teina keeya oo lbolot katitin naapishana; netum taa aibalunye ninye nchere meiduruk, neing'ueiki ina motonyi naishu aisho meshomo te nkisiajata." 
Leviticus14:8 Ore ilo oitisiny neituku ninye ilkilani lenyena, nebarn endukuya enye pooki, neituku kewan te nkare, nesidanu ninye, ore tesiadi ina nelotu ninye atua ang, kake keton teboo olng'obor lenye nkolong'i naapishana. Ore te nkolong e naapishana nebarn pooki te ndukuya." 
Leviticus14:9 Nebarn ninye olmunyei lenye, olpapit loo nkonyek o lpapit lenyena pooki. Neitoki aituku ilkilani lenyena, neituku osesen lenye te nkare, neaku ninye olemeiduruk." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ore te nkolong e isiet neya ninye isitiman oare le kerra lemeeta entioto o esupen nabo e ker olari obo nemeeta entioto, o lasar le ntapa imatuan uni e tomon e efa, entapa napuyiapui naipurjakaki eilata, o ltulet obo le ilata." 
Leviticus14:11 Ore ilo apolosani oituku ninye nepik ilo tung'ani oitukui o kuna tokitin dukuya Olaitoriani, te kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Leviticus14:12 Neya olapolosani obo le lelo sitiman le kerra, nepolos ninye metaa olasar le ngoki tenebo ilo tulet le ilata, neyuk ninche anaa olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani," 
Leviticus14:13 neyieng ninye ilo kuo le ker te wueji neyieng'ieki olasar le ngoki, o lasar opejori, te wueji sinyati, te nkaraki olasar le nkitarruorroto, ore olasar le ngoki, naa eneilo apolosani, kesinya ninye oleng." 
Leviticus14:14 “Neya olapolosani embata eilo sarge lo lasar le nkitarruorroto, nepik olapolosani enchumata enkitipet e nkiok e tatene eilo oitukui, o enchumata olmogirra le nkaina enye e tatene, o le nkeju enye e tatene." 
Leviticus14:15 Neitoki olapolosani aya embata eilata natii oltulet nebukoki endap enye e nkaina e kedienye 
Leviticus14:16 neitadoiki olkimojino lenye le tatene atua ina ilata natii endap enkaina enye e kedienye neisuaaya embata eina ilata to lkimojino lenye katitin naapishana te dukuya Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus14:17 Ore embata eina ilata naleku te nkaina enye nepik olapolosani enchumata enkitipet e nkiok e tatene eilo oitukui, o enchumata olmogirra lenye le nkaina e tatene, o le nkeju enye e tatene, shumata ilo sarge lo lasar le nkitarruorroto;" 
Leviticus14:18 ore ina ae ilata natii enkaina o lapolosani nepik ninye endukuya eilo oitisinyi. Neitobir taa olapolosani o lasar olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye te dukuya Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus14:19 Neishooyo olapolosani olasar le ngoki, aitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ilo oitisinyi te nkaraki enkiduruk enye. Ore te siadi neitoki ayieng olasar opejori," 
Leviticus14:20 neishooyo olapolosani ilo asar opejori, o lasar le ntapa te nchumata olperere lo lasar. Neijia eiko olapolosani aitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye, neaku ninye olemeiduruk." 
Leviticus14:21 “Kake tenaa aisinani ninye nemeidim anoto ntokitin kumok, neya naa ositima obo le ker pee eaku olasar le nkitarruorroto oyuki, pee eitobiri olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye, o ematua e tomon e efa e ntapa napuyiapui naipurja te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa, o oltulet le ilata." 
Leviticus14:22 O nturkuluoni are sii aashu nturkuluoni kutiti are, anaa enaidim ninye anoto; ore nabo naa olasar le ngoki ore enkae naa olasar opejori." 
Leviticus14:23 Ore te nkolong e isiet neyau ninye ninche te nkaraki enkitukuoto enye ine netii olapolosani, kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo, dukuya Olaitoriani;" 
Leviticus14:24 neya olapolosani ilo kuo le ker lo lasar le nkitarruorroto, o ilo tulet le ilata, neyuk olapolosani ninche metaa olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus14:25 Neitoki ninye ayieng ilo kuo le ker lo lasar le nkitarruorroto, neya olapolosani embata osarge leilo asar le nkitarruorroto, nepik enchumata enkitipet e nkiok e tatene eilo oitukui, o enchumata olmogirra le nkaina enye e tatene, o lmogirra le nkeju enye e tatene." 
Leviticus14:26 Nebukoki olapolosani embata eilata endap enkaina enye e kedienye; 
Leviticus14:27 neisuaki to lkimojino lenye le tatene embata eina ilata natii endap enkaina enye e kedienye katitin naapishana te dukuya Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus14:28 Nepik olapolosani embata eina ilata natii enkaina enye enchumata enkitipet enkiok e tatene eilo oitisinyi, olmogirra le nkaina enye e tatene, o le nkeju enye e tatene, teine wueji duoo netipikieki osarge lo lasar le nkitarruorroto;" 
Leviticus14:29 ore ina ae ilata naleku te nkaina olapolosani nepik ninye endukuya eilo oitisinyi, pee eitobiraki ninye olning'o lo sotua te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus14:30 Neishooyo ninye olasar loo nturkuluoni aashu nturkuluoni kutiti anaa ake duoo enaidim aishooi," 
Leviticus14:31 nabo te nkaraki olasar le ngoki o enkae te nkaraki olasar opejori tenebo olasar le ntapa, neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te dukuya Olaitoriani tenkaraki ilo oitukui." 
Leviticus14:32 Ena ninye enkitanapata te nkaraki ilo oata enkeeya oo lbolot, lemeidim ninye anoto olasar le nkitukuoto enye.”" 
Leviticus14:33 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Leviticus14:34 “Tenipuonunu kenya ina kop e Kanaan naisho nanu intae metaa eninyi, tenapik nanu enkeeya oo lbolot atua enkaji tiatua ina kop inyi," 
Leviticus14:35 ore ilo openy enkaji nelotu ajoki olapolosani, ‘Etii enkeeya nemayiolo atua enkaji ai.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Neitanapisho olapolosani ajo meitayuni ntokitin naatii ina aji eton eitu elo olapolosani ajurru ina keeya, pee meibalunyeki nena pooki naatii atua ina aji aajo keiduruk; ore te siadi neitoki olapolosani alo atua adol ina aji." 
Leviticus14:37 Nelo ninye ajurru ina keeya, naa tenetii enkeeya isunta eina aji etii iltipot oo nyori o loonyokie, naa tenelioo aa eijo kegut aalang esuntai," 
Leviticus14:38 neipang olapolosani teina aji alo kutukaji, neiken ina aji nkolong'i naapishana." 
Leviticus14:39 Neitoki olapolosani alotu te nkolong e naapishana, aing'uraa, ore pee eidapashakine enkeeya isunta eina aji," 
Leviticus14:40 netum taa olapolosani aitanapisho meitayuni lelo soito ootii enkeeya nenang'akini ninche atua ewueji neiduruk tiatua enkanasa; 
Leviticus14:41 neisho ninye iliatuani leina aji meiutuuti nkaloli pooki, ore ina punyua nayutuutuni nepuoi aaibukoo te wueji neiduruk tiauluo enkanasa;" 
Leviticus14:42 neitokini taa aayau kulikae soito nepiki erishata e lekua soito, neyau ninye ae turoto nemurie enkaji." 
Leviticus14:43 “Teneitoki ina keeya aigil ajing ina aji, eidipa ninye aitayu isoito neyutuuto ina aji neitoki amur le nturoto," 
Leviticus14:44 nelo olapolosani aing'uraa, naa teneibulua ina keeya ina aji, naa enkeeya oo lbolot torrono natijing'a atua ina aji keiduruk ninye." 
Leviticus14:45 Naa keuroo ninye ina aji, o soito lenyena o mbaoi enyena o ina turoto pooki e nkaji, nenap ninye ninche auluo enkanasa aya ewueji neiduruk." 
Leviticus14:46 Ore sii oltung'ani ojing ina aji eton eikeno neaku ninye oloiduruk ometaa teipa; 
Leviticus14:47 ore ilo oirrag tiatua ina aji neituku ilkilani lenyena, ore oloinos endaa tiatua ina o aji neituku ilkilani lenyena." 
Leviticus14:48 “Kake tenelotu olapolosani ajurrisho, neitu eibulu ina keeya ina aji ina kata eidipaki aatumur te nturoto, neibalunye olapolosani ina aji ajo meiduruk, amu eishiunyeki ina keeya." 
Leviticus14:49 Ore te nkipooto eina aji neya ninye nturkuluoni are kutiti, tenebo nkeek oltarakuai o enkarasha nanyokie o hisopo," 
Leviticus14:50 neyieng emotonyi tiatua emoti oo nkulupuok te shumata enkare naruko," 
Leviticus14:51 neitoki aya nena keek oltarakuai o hisopo oina arasha nanyokie tenebo ina motonyi naishu. Neitadoiki ninche atua ilo sarge le motonyi nateyieng'aki tiatua enkare naruko, neisuaki enkaji katitin naapishana." 
Leviticus14:52 Neipok ina aji teilo sarge le motonyi, o te nkare naruko o teina motonyi naishu, o too nkeek oo ntarakua, o te hisopo oina arasha nanyokie." 
Leviticus14:53 Neitoki taa aisho ina motonyi naishu meipang'a alo tiatua ina anasa alo ong'ota, neaku keitobir ninye olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ina aji naa kesidanu ninye aaku meiduruk.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Ena ninye enkitanapata tialo pooki keeya oo lbolot, o to lpepedoi," 
Leviticus14:55 te nkeeya oo lbolot natii enkila aashu atua aji," 
Leviticus14:56 te wueji netejia aashu teneiwotiote aashu oltipoti 
Leviticus14:57 pee etumi aaitodolu enkata naiduruk o enkata nemeiduruk. Ena ninye enkitanapata te nkaraki enkeeya oo lbolot. 
Leviticus15:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Leviticus15:2 “Entiaki iltung'ana le Israel, teneeta ake ninye oltung'ani osupetai to sesen, ore erukoto eilo supetai lenye naa keiduruk." 
Leviticus15:3 Naa ena ninye enkitanapata enkiduruk enye teilo supetai oruko: teneruko ilo supetai lenye aashu tenetudung'e, naa enkiduruk ake te ninye." 
Leviticus15:4 Ore pooki dapash nairrag ilo tung'ani oata osupetai neiduruku ore pooki toki natonie ninye neiduruku. 
Leviticus15:5 Ore pooki ng'ae oiseiyie endapash enye neituku ilkilani lenyena, neituku kewan te nkare, neaku ninye oloiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:6 Ore pooki ng'ae otonie pooki toki natotonie ilo oata erukoto, neituku ilkilani lenyena neituku kewan te nkare, neaku ninye oloiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:7 Ore pooki ng'ae oiseyie osesen leilo tung'ani oata osupetai neituku ilkilani lenyena neituku kewan te nkare neton eiduruk o metaa teipa. 
Leviticus15:8 Naa tenenotaki ilo oata osupetai oltung'ani lemeiduruk, nelo ninye aituku ilkilani lenyena neituku kewan te nkare neton ninye eiduruk o metaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:9 Ore pooki toki natonieki te mbarta tenetonie ilo oata osupetai neiduruku. 
Leviticus15:10 Ore oloba anaa oloiseyie pooki toki natii abori ninye neiduruku o metaa teipa, ore ilo onap entoki neijo ina nelo aituku ilkilani lenyena neituku kewan te nkare neton ninye eiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:11 Ore pooki ng'ae oiseyie ilo tung'ani oata osupetai eitu eng'as aisuj nkaik enyena te nkare nelo aituku ilkilani lenyena, neituku kewan te nkare, neton ninye eiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:12 Ore ngirran naaitobiruaki too nkulupuok naaiseyie ilo oata osupetai nepuoi aabel; ore engirra pooki naguetuno te nchata neisuji te nkare. 
Leviticus15:13 “Ore ilo oata osupetai teneitukui te nkaraki ilo supetai lenye, netum taa aikenaki kewan nkolong'i naapishana enkitukuoto, neituku ilkilani lenyena, nelo aituku osesen lenye te nkare naruko neaku taa olemeiduruk." 
Leviticus15:14 Ore te nkolong e isiet neyau ninye nturkuluoni are aashu nturkuluoni are kutiti, nelotu dukuya Olaitoriani te kutukaji ilo ng'obor le ntumo, neisho ninche olapolosani;" 
Leviticus15:15 neishooyo olapolosani ninche, nabo te nkaraki olasar le ngoki o enkae te nkaraki olasar opejori; neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye te dukuya Olaitoriani te nkaraki ilo supetai lenye." 
Leviticus15:16 “Naa teneitayu olee enkare e lewaisho to sesen lenye, nelo ninye aituku osesen lenye pooki te nkare neton ninye eiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:17 Ore pooki kila o pooki shoni oitashala enkare e lewaisho neitukui te nkare, neton ninye eiduruk o metaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:18 Teneboitare olee enkitok nepuku enkare e lewaisho, nepuo pokira aaituku ate te nkare, netoni ninche eiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:19 “Teneitayu enkitok osarge, aa empukunoto e oshiaake to sesen lenye, neton ninye te nkiduruk enye nkolong'i naapishana ore oloba anaa oloiseyie ninye neiduruku ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:20 Ore pooki toki napetaa ninye te nena olong'i enyena e nkiduruk neiduruku; ore sii pooki toki natonie ninye naa keiduruku. 
Leviticus15:21 Ore oloba anaa oloiseyie endapash enye nelo aituku ilkilani lenyena, neituku kewan te nkare, neton ninye eiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:22 Ore oloba anaa oloiseyie pooki toki natonie ninye neituku ilkilani lenyena, neituku kewan te nkare, neton eiduruk ometaa teipa;" 
Leviticus15:23 ore duoo ninye tenaa endapash aashu pooki toki natonie, teneiseyie neiduruku ninye ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:24 Naa teneboitare oltung'ani ninye, nejing olduruk leina kitok ninye, neaku ninye oloiduruk nkolong'i naapishana; ore pooki dapash nairrag ninye neiduruku." 
Leviticus15:25 “Teneitayu enkitok osarge too nkolong'i kumok, neme te nkata enye enkiduruk, teneeta erukoto naitogiroo inoshi olong'i e nkiduruk enye, neton ninye tiatua enkiduruk; anaa ake too nkolong'i enyena enkiduruk, keiduruku ninye." 
Leviticus15:26 Ore endapash pooki nairrag ninye too nkolong'i pooki o sarge, netiu te ninye anaa endapash enkiduruk; ore pooki toki natonie ninye neiduruku, anaa ake tenkiduruk e nena olong'i enyena osarge." 
Leviticus15:27 Ore oloba anaa oloiseyie kuna tokitin neiduruku ninye, neituku ilkilani lenyena, neituku kewan te nkare neton ninye eiduruk ometaa teipa." 
Leviticus15:28 Kake teneitukui ninye te rukoto enye, neikenaki ninye kewan enye nkolong'i naapishana, ore tesiadi ina neaku ninye meiduruk." 
Leviticus15:29 Ore te nkolong e isiet neyau ninye nturkuluoni are aashu nturkuluoni are kutiti, neyaki ninche olapolosani, te kutukaji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Leviticus15:30 Neishooyo olapolosani nabo te nkaraki olasar le ngoki o enkae te nkaraki olasar opejori; neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye te dukuya Olaitoriani te nkaraki ilo sarge lenye le nkiduruk. 
Leviticus15:31 “Nejia enkuna entooru iltung'ana le Israel metung'uai enkiduruk enye, pee meye ake tiatua enkiduruk enye neisarkionie olng'obor lai sinyati otii atua ninche.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Ena ninye enkitanapata eilo oata osupetai o ilo oitayu enkare e lewaisho to sesen lenye netum enkiduruk teina. 
Leviticus15:33 O teina sii namuoi te nkiduruk enye; aa taa, te pooki ng'ae, olee aashu enkitok, naata osupetai, o to lee oboitare ina kitok naiduruk." 
Leviticus16:1 Neirorie Olaitoriani Musa, eidipa lelo ayiok pokira oare le Aron aatuata, ina kata apa pee enyiku ninche aapuonu dukuya Olaitoriani neye;" 
Leviticus16:2 nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Tiaaki Aron ilo alashe lino pee melotu nkatitin pooki atua ine wueji sinyati tiatua ilo karasha, dukuya ilo orika lo lng'ur otii shumata osanduku, pee meye ake; amu kaliooyu nanu teina atampoi natii shumata ilo orika lo lng'ur." 
Leviticus16:3 Kake nji eikununye Aron tenelotu atua ine wueji sinyati nelotu eata oloti oing'oni lo lasar le ngoki o lmeregesh lo lasar opejori. 
Leviticus16:4 Neishop ninye ilo kila osinya le kitani, neishop ninye nkilani e atua e kitani to sesen lenye, nerretena te nkimeita e kitani, neishop enkopiyia e kitani, kuna ninche nkilani naasinya. Neituku ninye osesen lenye te nkare paa keishop taa." 
Leviticus16:5 Neya ninye teilo turrur loo ltung'ana le Israel isitiman oare le kineji te nkaraki olasar le ngoki, o lmeregesh obo te nkaraki olasar opejori." 
Leviticus16:6 “Neitayu Aron oloing'oni metaa olasar le ngoki te nkaraki kewan enye, neitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki kewan enye o enkaji enye." 
Leviticus16:7 Neitoki ninye aitayu nkineji are, nepik ninche dukuya Olaitoriani te kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo;" 
Leviticus16:8 neoshoki Aron enkukuo nena kineji pokira are, aoshoki enkukuo te nkaraki Olaitoriani o te nkaraki Asasel." 
Leviticus16:9 Neitarasaki Aron ina kine natadoikio enkukuo te nkaraki Olaitoriani, neishooyo ninye metaa olasar le ngoki;" 
Leviticus16:10 kake ore ina kine natooshokoki enkukuo te nkaraki Asasel nepuo aaitarasaki eishu te dukuya Olaitoriani pee eitobiri olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye, pee etumi aaishoo meshomo adung ong'ata alo Asasel." 
Leviticus16:11 “Neitarasaa Aron ilo oing'oni metaa olasar le ngoki te nkaraki kewan enye o enkaji enye; nelo ninye ayieng ilo oing'oni metaa olasar lenye makewan. 
Leviticus16:12 Neitoki aya olmoti obore nkuk naaishu naaing'uaa olperere lo lasar te dukuya Olaitoriani, o mboreitin are enkaina enkorropil naidongoki aarrar; neyau ninye atua lelo karash lo lng'obor" 
Leviticus16:13 nepik ina orropil enkima te dukuya Olaitoriani, pee etum enkatampoi eina puruo aimulumula ilo orika lolng'ur otii enchumata e wueji enchakenisho pee meye ake;" 
Leviticus16:14 neya ninye embata o sarge leilo oing'oni, neisuaaya to lkimojino lenye te dukuya eilo orika lo lng'ur, otii dukuya e ilo orika lo lng'ur neisuaaki ninye ilo sarge to lkimojino lenye katitin naapishana." 
Leviticus16:15 “Neitoki ninye ayieng ina kine o lasar le ngoki te nkaraki iltung'ana neyau osarge lenye atua lelo karash oodung'oro le wueji sinyati, neitaas ilo sarge anaa enaitaasa ilo sarge lo loing'oni, aisuaki enchumata eilo orika lo lng'ur o dukuya ilo orika lo lng'ur." 
Leviticus16:16 Neiko ninye neijia aitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ine wueji sinyati, te nkaraki enkiduruk oo ltung'ana le Israel, o te nkaraki nkitapong'ot enye, o ngok enye pooki; neiko sii neijia te nkaraki ilo ng'obor le ntumo, otii tenebo ninche empolos oo lduruki lenye." 
Leviticus16:17 Nemetii oltung'ani hoo obo atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, ina kata ejing olapolosani atua alo aitobir olning'o lo sotua tiatua ine wueji sinyati ometaba anaa neipang'u ninye alotu boo neidipa aitobira olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki kewan enye o enkaji enye oeumata pooki oo Siraeli." 
Leviticus16:18 Neitoki ninye aipang'u alo ilo perere lo lasar otii dukuya Olaitoriani neitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye, neya ninye embata eilo sarge lo loing'oni o ilo sarge le nkine, nepik nena mowuarak o lperere lo lasar aitaman." 
Leviticus16:19 Neisuaaya embata o sarge te nchumata eye to lkimojino lenye katitin naapishana, neituku ninye neitisiny teina tioto oo ltung'ana le Israel." 
Leviticus16:20 “Ore ake pee eidip aitobira olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ine wueji sinyati o ilo ng'obor le ntumo o lperere lo lasar, neitarasaa ninye ina kine naishu;" 
Leviticus16:21 neiteleiki Aron nkaik enyena pokira are endukuya eina kine naishu, neibalunye te shumata ninye nkitarruorot pooki oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, o nkitapong'ot enye pooki, ing'ok enye pooki; nepik ninye ninche enchumata e ndukuya eina kine, neisho ninye meshomo ong'ata te nkaina oltung'ani oidipaki aaibalie." 
Leviticus16:22 Nenap ina kine nkitarruorot enye pooki alo enkop nememanya; neisho ninye ina kine meshomo ti ong'ota. 
Leviticus16:23 “Neitoki Aron alotu atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, neitayu ninye lelo kilani le kitani apa ooishopo ina kata pee elo ewueji sinyati, neing'uaa ninche teine;" 
Leviticus16:24 neituku ninye osesen lenye te nkare teine wueji sinyati, neitoki aishop lelo kilani lenyena, neipang'u alotu neishooyo ilo asar lenye opejori o ilo asar opejori te nkaraki iltung'ana, neitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki kewan enye o te nkaraki iltung'ana." 
Leviticus16:25 Ore ina kurriny o lasar le ngoki nepejoo ninye te nchumata olperere lo lasar. 
Leviticus16:26 Ore elo alaaya ina kine meshomo Asasel neituku ilkilani lenyena neituku osesen lenye te nkare, ore te siadi ena neidim aeu atua enkang oo ng'oborri." 
Leviticus16:27 Ore ilo oing'oni lo lasar le ngoki o ina kine o lasar le ngoki apa ooyawuaki o sargeta lenye pee eitainyeki olning'o lo sotua tiatua ine wueji sinyati, nenapi aaitupuku aayau auluo ilng'oborri; ore endapana olchoni o nkiri enye o moyok enye nepejori te nkima." 
Leviticus16:28 Ore ilo opejoo ninche nelo aituku ilkilani lenyena neituku osesen lenye te nkare ore te siadi ena neidim ninye aeu atua ilng'oborri. 
Leviticus16:29 “Naa keaku ena enkitanapata te intae ntarasi nchere ore to lapa liopishana, te nkolong e tomon o lapa nieniene ate aapukoo, nimiasiasa esiaai, aa oinoti aashu oldokunoti oewuo aton tiatua intae;" 
Leviticus16:30 amu tena olong epuoi aaitobiraki intae, olning'o lo sotua tialo ing'ok inyi pooki naa keitisinyi intae te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus16:31 Enkolong e sabato ina e nkiyeng'iyeng te intae, naa intanyamalala ate aaen ate aaitupukoo ate; enkitanapata ena ntarasi." 
Leviticus16:32 Ore ilo apolosani otubukokoki eilata aaput neitisinyaki metaa olapolosani te rishata e papaai lenye nelo aitobir olning'o lo sotua eishopito lelo kilani oosinya le kitani; 
Leviticus16:33 neitobir ninye olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ina aji e Enkai, neitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki olng'obor le ntumo o te nkaraki olperere lo lasar, neitobir ninye olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ilapolosak o te nkaraki iltung'ana pooki leina umata." 
Leviticus16:34 Naa keaku ena enkitanapata oo ntarasi te intae; nchere keidimi aitobiraki iltung'ana le Israel olning'o lo sotua kata nabo to lari te nkaraki ing'ok enye pooki.” Neas Musa anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye. 
Leviticus17:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus17:2 “Tiaaki Aron o layiok lenyena, o iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli, Ena bae eitanapishe Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus17:3 Teneyieng ake ninye oltung'ani le nkaji e Israel olkiteng aashu olker aashu enkine tiatua enkang oo lng'oborri aashu eyieng tiauluo," 
Leviticus17:4 nemeyau ninye kutukaji eilo ng'bor le ntumo, pee eishooyo anaa enkishooroto to Laitoriani te dukuya ilo ng'obor lo Laitoriani, neikenakini ilo tung'ani aajo eata entioto o sarge; eibukoyie ninye osarge; neyae ilo tung'ani aaiwuang'ie tiatua iltung'ana lenyena." 
Leviticus17:5 Ore ena naa te nkaraki pee etum iltung'ana le Israel aayau lelo asarri lenye aayieng ti ong'ata, pee etum aayaki ninche Olaitoriani, ine netii olapolosani te kutukaji ilo ng'obor le ntumo, neyieng ninche anaa lasarri loo nkishorot e seriani to Laitoriani;" 
Leviticus17:6 nelo olapolosani aisuaki osarge enchumata o lperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani te kutukaji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo, nepejoo enkurriny metaa esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus17:7 Metaa meigil aekata ninche aayiang'aki ilasarri lenye loo loiriruani, laa ninye etololoitore. Keaku ena enkitanapata ntarasi te nkaraki ninche tiatua iishoreitin enye pooki." 
Leviticus17:8 “Naa tiaaki iyie ninche, ore pooki tung'ani le nkaji e Israel aashu o le lelo tung'ana omon oo etuo aatoni tiatua ninche oishorua olasar opejori," 
Leviticus17:9 nemeyau kutukaji olng'obor le ntumo, pee epolosaki ninye Olaitoriani; ore ilo tung'ani neiwuang'ieki tiatua iltung'ana lenyena." 
Leviticus17:10 “Ore pooki tung'ani le nkaji e Israel aashu o le lelo tung'ana omon ootoni tiatua ninche, te nenya osarge, naing'orie nanu enkomom ai te ngoro ilo tung'ani oinosa osarge, naiwuang'ie ninye tiatua iltung'ana lenyena." 
Leviticus17:11 Amu ore enkishui oo nkiri naa atua osarge etii, naishooyie nanu te nkaraki intae te nchumata olperere lo lasar pee eitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki iltauja linyi; amu osarge oitobir olning'o lo sotua, te nkaraki e nkishui." 
Leviticus17:12 Neaku atiaaka nanu iltung'ana le Israel, Meetae oltung'ani tiatua intae oinos osarge, nemeinos ilo tung'ani omoni oton tiatua intae osarge." 
Leviticus17:13 Ore sii pooki tung'ani too ltung'ana le Israel aashu lelo omon ootii atua ninche olo arresh aibung eng'ues aashu emotonyi pee etumi aainosa neibukoo osarge lenye neitemoo too nkulukuok. 
Leviticus17:14 “Amu ore enkishui e pooki toki naishu naa osarge lenye etii. Neaku atiaaka nanu iltung'ana le Israel, Eminos ake osarge li ae toki ake ninye pooki, amu ore enkishui e pooki toki naishu naa osarge lenye etii; ore pooki ng'ae oinos osarge neiwuang'ieki ninye." 
Leviticus17:15 Ore pooki tung'ani oinos entoki natua openy aashu enataara louarak te ntim, aa oinoti aashu olomoni oidurrua, nelo ninye aituku ilkilani lenyena, neisuj osesen lenye te nkare, neton ninye eata olduruk o metaa teipa, netum taa atisidana." 
Leviticus17:16 Kake tenemeituku ninye ilkilani lenyena anaa eituku ososen lenye nenap ninye entorroni enye.” 
Leviticus18:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus18:2 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel, Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Leviticus18:3 Miasiasa anaa enaasita ninche te nkop e Misiri, teine apa nemanya intae, nimiasiasa anaa enaasi te nkop e Kanaan teine nayaita nanu intae nimipuopuo intae too nkiguanat enye." 
Leviticus18:4 Entaas intae nkiguanat aainei nimbung'ubung'u nkitanapat aainei nipuoyieyie ninche. Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Leviticus18:5 Embung'a naa nkitanapat aainei o nkiguanat aainei, naa teneas oltung'ani neton eishu: Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus18:6 “Metii oltung'ani te intae onyikaki o likae lenye le sotua auru ilkilani aitalioo emasipaisho enye. Ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus18:7 Mioru ake papaai lino ilkilani aitaa olmasipai amu emasipaisho e ng'utunyi ina. Ng'utunyi ina nimilo naa aitalioo emasipaisho enye. 
Leviticus18:8 Milo aitalioo emasipaisho e nkitok e papaai lino; amu emasipaisho e papaai lino ina. 
Leviticus18:9 Mintalioo emasipaisho e nkanashe ino, ning'arie menye aashu ina tito e ng'utunyi aa einoti eang aashu enayawuaki." 
Leviticus18:10 Nimintalioo emasipaisho entito o layioni lino aashu ene ntito e ntito ino amu ore emasipaisho enye naa emasipaisho ino makewan. 
Leviticus18:11 Mintalioo emasipaisho e ntito ning'arie menye, ina naino te papaai lino, amu enkanashe ino ninye." 
Leviticus18:12 Mintalioo emasipaisho e nkanashe e papaai lino amu eno lmarei le papaai lino ninye. 
Leviticus18:13 Mintalioo emasipaisho enkanashe e ng'utunyi amu eno lmarei le yieyioo lino ninye. 
Leviticus18:14 Mintalioo emasipaisho o lalashe papaai lino, aa taa minyikaki enkitok enye; amu nkapu ino ninye." 
Leviticus18:15 Mintalioo emasipaisho e nkitok o layioni lino, amu entito ino ninye, mintalioo emasipaisho enye." 
Leviticus18:16 Mintalioo emasipaisho e nkitok o lalashe lino, amu emasipaisho o lalashe lino." 
Leviticus18:17 Mintalioo emasipaisho e nkitok tenebo entito enye, nimiya entito o layioni lenye aashu entito e ntioto enye aitalioo emasipaisho enye; nkanashera inono ninche, entorroni ina." 
Leviticus18:18 Nimiya enkanashe enkitok ino ayam eton eishu enkanashe enye. 
Leviticus18:19 “Milo enetii enkitok aboitare eton etii erishata enye o lapa. 
Leviticus18:20 Nimiboitare enkitok olelatia ino apik kewan entioto te ninye. 
Leviticus18:21 Minchooyo ae nabo oo nkera inono meitarasari to lasar le nkima aaisho enkitanyaanyukoto e nkai e Molek aisarkionie enkarna e Nkai ino; Ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus18:22 Miboitare ake olee aitaa enkitok; entaboi ina. 
Leviticus18:23 Nimiboitare ake eng'ues pooki aisarkionie kewan te ninye, nemeisho enkitok kewan eng'ues metaboitare, entaboi ina." 
Leviticus18:24 “Emisarkionie ate tiae nabo e kuna baa, amu te kuna pooki eisarkionie ate lelo oshon pooki laaraa nanu te dukuya intae." 
Leviticus18:25 Neaku enkop enaisarkionieki, neaku aitamio nanu enkitarruorroto enye, nelopu enkop lelo oomanya." 
Leviticus18:26 Kake embung'a intae nkitanapat aainei o nkiguanat aainei nimiasiasa ae nabo e kuna tabo, aa oinoti aashu ilo dokunoti oidurrua alotu atua intae." 
Leviticus18:27 (Amu ore kuna baa o lminong pooki etaasa apa iltung'ana lena kop, lelo apa ootii dukuya intae, neaku eisarkionieki enkop);" 
Leviticus18:28 pee melopu ake intae enkop, tenisarkionienie, anaa apa enatolopua ilo osho otii dukuya intae." 
Leviticus18:29 Amu ore oloba anaa oloas nabo e kuna baa olminong, ore lelo tung'ana oas neiwuang'ieki too ltung'ana lenye." 
Leviticus18:30 Metaa embung'a enkitanapata ai nimiasiasa aikata ae nabo e kuna tabo oo lkuaki apa ootaasaki te dukuya intae, nimisarkionienie ate te ninche: ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus19:2 “Tiaaki olturrur pooki loo ltung'ana le Israel, iakuku intae sinyat; amu ore nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi naa kara sinyati." 
Leviticus19:3 Nchoo eyanyit pooki ng'ae te intae ng'otonye o menye, nimbung'ubung'u sabatoni aainei: Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Leviticus19:4 Emimbelekenyakino nkitanyaanyukot aashu intobirakiki ate nkaitin oo ntokitin naasholuno: Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Leviticus19:5 “Tenintarasaa olasar loo nkishorot e seriani aaisho Olaitoriani, entarasai intae pee etumi aatang'amai intae."
