Leviticus19:6 Neinosi ina olong ake nintarasaitie, aashu taisere, ore pooki toki naleku ometaa enkolong e uni nepuoi aapejoo te nkima." 
Leviticus19:7 Teneinosi ninye penyo te nkolong e uni, naa olminong; meitokini aang'amaa," 
Leviticus19:8 ore pooki ng'ae oinos nenap entorroni enye, enkaraki naisarkionie ninye entoki sinyati o Laitoriani; ore ilo tung'ani neiwuang'ieki too ltung'ana lenye." 
Leviticus19:9 “Tenisampu enkurma nituturo te nkop ino, nimisampu aitabaiki ineebayie nimishuko alo agilu lelo ng'osil ootung'uayioki." 
Leviticus19:10 Miishu ilng'anayio to sabibu lino, nimisotu lelo ootusulari to sabibu lino. Tung'uai ninche te nkaraki ilaisinak o tenkaraki olomoni. Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Leviticus19:11 “Mipurrisho, nimiasisho te sunkureisho, nemilej oltung'ani olikae." 
Leviticus19:12 Niminosinoso ilmuma te nkarna ai te sunkureisho, pee misarkionienie enkarna e Nkai inyi. Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus19:13 “Mintorogony o lelatia ino aashu ipur ninye. Mincho olmushaara lo sinka lino eirrag te nkaji ino enkewarie pooki o mekenyu. 
Leviticus19:14 Midek oltung'ani ming'ani nimipikaki oltung'ani modooni entoki narror, kake turia Enkai ino. Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus19:15 “Mipik enyorrakinoto endung'oto enkiguana, mipik olkep olaisinani nimiureyu ilo kitok, kake te sipata tudung'oki enkiguana olelatia ino." 
Leviticus19:16 Milo iyie idie o idie anaa olaitang'oroni tiatua iltung'ana linono, nimintashe iyie aitang'or enkishui o lelatia ino: Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus19:17 “Mimbayu olalashe lino tiatua oltau lino kake entoning'oto pee minap ake eng'oki te nkaraki ninye. 
Leviticus19:18 Mintalaku ake elap aashu iata enkiba tiatua oltau tialo ilayiok loo ltung'ana linyi, kake tonyorra olelatia ino anaa kewan ino. Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus19:19 “Embung'a nkitanapat aainei, miputokiki nkishu inyi iloing'ok loo mpukunot naapaasha, nimiun tiatua enkurma ino mpukunot are oo lanterera niminchop olkila oripa too mpukunot are oo nkarash." 
Leviticus19:20 “Teneboitare olee enkitok nara errindik natisira, likae lee neton eitu elakuni aashu eishoori ae toki, nejurri ina bae, neari ninche metuata, enkaraki naa errindik ina kitok." 
Leviticus19:21 Kake keyau ilo lee enkishoroto o lasar le nkitarruorroto ayaki Olaitoriani, kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo, neyau ninye olmeregesh metaa olasar le nkitarruoroto." 
Leviticus19:22 Neitoki olapolosani aitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye teilo meregesh lo lasar le nkitarruorroto te dukuya Olaitoriani te nkaraki ina ng'oki nataasa ninye; ore ina ng'oki nataasa ninye nepalakini. 
Leviticus19:23 “Tenipuopuo kenya aajing ina kop niunuunu mpukunot pooki oo lkeek te nkaraki endaa, niyiolouu lelo ng'anayio lenye aajo etomitikioki intae ilarin okuni, minosinoso ninche." 
Leviticus19:24 Ore to lari liong'uan nesinyayu ilng'anayio lenye pooki, enkishoroto enkisisa to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus19:25 Kake ore to lari le imiet nindimidimi aainosa ilng'anayio lenye, pee etum aaishoo intae emponaroto sapuk. Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Leviticus19:26 “Minosinoso pooki toki natii osarge atua. Emimbonishorere nimisiaishore ntaleng'o. 
Leviticus19:27 Emintamanaa endung'oto oo lpapit loo lmowuarak loo lukuny inyi nimibarnibarna mbat oo lmunyo linyi. 
Leviticus19:28 Eming'am iseseni linyi te nkaraki iloo tuata aashu imishiriri ate: Ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus19:29 “Misarkionie entito ino aisho metaa emulayoi, meiput ake enkop entorroni e nkiborra oo nkonyek neaku enkop enabore esuujisho." 
Leviticus19:30 Embung'a sabatoni aainei niyanyititi enkaji ai Sinyati. Ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus19:31 “Emipuopuo aaikilikuanishore iltungana ooirorie loiriruani loo lootuata aashu lasakutok. Emipuopuo aaing'oru ninche, aaisarkionie ate te ninche: Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Leviticus19:32 “Tudumunye iyie te dukuya lelo ooibor lukuny, iyanyita oltung'ani moruo naa turia Enkai ino. Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus19:33 “Teneidurru oltung'ani omoni alotu amany enkop ino mintaas ninye entorrono. 
Leviticus19:34 Ore ilo omoni likindurraka naa keyooki atiu anaa oinoti tiatua intae, naa tonyorra naa ninye anaa kewan. Amu irara sii apa intae ilomon te nkop e Misiri: Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Leviticus19:35 “Mias entorrono te ndung'oto e nkiguana, te ntemata enkadoro aashu te nkineneng enkiroishi aashu te nkumoi." 
Leviticus19:36 Ng'oru ntemeta nemetii elejare o entemata e nkiroishi nemetii elejare, o soito le nkiroishi leme le lejare efa nairirikino o hini nairirikino. Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, oyawua intae aitupuku te nkop e Misiri." 
Leviticus19:37 Embung'a naa nkiguanat aainei pooki o nkitanapat aainei pooki niasiasa ninche. Ara nanu Olaitoriani.” 
Leviticus20:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus20:2 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel ore pooki tung'ani loo ltung'ana le Israel aashu o le lelo omon ooidurrakita aamany atua Israel, oishooyo nabo oo nkera enyena aaisho Molek neari metua; ore iltung'ana lena kop near ninye too soito." 
Leviticus20:3 Nanu kewan oibelekenyakino aipirakinore ilo tung'ani naiwuang'ie nanu ninye tiatua iltung'ana lenyena, enkaraki naishooyie nabo oo nkera enyena aisho Molek, nepik enkaji ai entioto neisarkionie enkarna ai sinyati." 
Leviticus20:4 Naa teneisudoo iltung'ana leina kop ilo tung'ani ina kata eishooyo nabo oo nkera enyena aisho Molek, neany ear ninye metua," 
Leviticus20:5 naibelekenyakino nanu aarare ilo tung'ani naarare olmarei lenye, naitayu nanu ninche aiwuang'ie tiatua iltung'ana lenye, ninye o lelo pooki oosujita ninye te nkiborra oo nkonyek e sujata e Molek." 
Leviticus20:6 “Teneibelekenyakino oltung'ani ltung'ana oirorie iloiriruani o lasakutok, aiborrie onyek te ninche, naibelekenyakino nanu ilo tung'ani aarare naitayu nanu ninye aiwuang'ie tiatua iltung'ana lenye." 
Leviticus20:7 Entisinya naa ate niakuku sinyat, amu ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Leviticus20:8 Embung'a nkiguanat aainei, niasiasa ninche, Ara nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny intae." 
Leviticus20:9 Amu ore pooki ng'ae odek menye aashu ng'otonye neari metua; etedia ninye menye aashu ng'otonye, neaku ore osarge lenye shumata ninye etii." 
Leviticus20:10 “Teneloloito oltung'ani te nkitok o lelatia enye, ore pokira olee o enkitok natololoitare neari metuata." 
Leviticus20:11 Ore ilo tung'ani oboitare te loloito enkitok e papaai lenye netaboluo nkilani e papaai lenye, ore ninche pokira are neari metuata, ore osarge lenye neaku shumata ninche etii." 
Leviticus20:12 Ore olee oboitare enkitok o layioni lenye, neari pokira are metuata; etaasa ninche embae busus, ore osarge lenye neaku shumata ninche." 
Leviticus20:13 Teneboitare olee olikae lee anaa enkitok, ore ninche pokira netaasa olminong, naa keari ninche metuata, ore osarge lenye neaku shumata ninche." 
Leviticus20:14 Teneyam oltung'ani entito o ng'otonye tenebo, naa entorroni ina, naa kepejori ninche te nkima, ilo lee o nena kituaak, pee meitoki esuujisho atii atua intae." 
Leviticus20:15 Teneboitare oltung'ani eng'ues aloloitore, neari ninye metua, ore ina ng'ues neari metua." 
Leviticus20:16 Teneing'oru enkitok eng'ues aboitare te loloito neari ina kitok metua ore ina ng'ues neari ninye metua ore osarge lenye neaku shumata ninche etii. 
Leviticus20:17 “Teneyam oltung'ani enkanashe enye, ina nang'arie menye, aashu enkanashe nangarie kina, nelo ninye aboitare nedol olee emasipaisho enye nedol entito emasipaisho olee naa embae e sulare ina, naa keiwuang'ieki ninche te dukuya nkera olorere lenye; etaboluo ninye nkilani enkanashe enye, naa kenap ninye entorroni enye." 
Leviticus20:18 Teneboitare olee enkitok eata emuoyian enye, nebolu nkilani enyena, netusula ninye erukunoto enye, neitalioo ninye erukunoto osarge lenye; ore ninche pokira are naa keiwuang'ieki tiatua iltung'ana lenye." 
Leviticus20:19 Mintalioo ake emasipaisho enkanashe yieyioo lino aashu ene nkanashe papaai lino, amu ore ina naa nkilani itooruo oltung'ani le sotua lo lmarei; naa kenap ninche entorroni enye." 
Leviticus20:20 Teneboitare oltung'ani enkitok olenkapu lenye, naa kenap ninche eng'oki enye, neye eitu etum nkera." 
Leviticus20:21 Teneya oltung'ani enkitok olalashe lenye naa embae nemesinya ina netaboluo ninye nkilani olalashe lenye nemetum ninche nkera. 
Leviticus20:22 “Embung'a naa nkitanapat aainei pooki o nkiguanat aainei pooki, niasiasa ninche paa ore ina kop nariku nanu intae entamany nemelopu intae aitayu." 
Leviticus20:23 Nimipuopuo aasujaa olkerreti leilo orere laaraa nanu te dukuya intae, amu etaasa apa ninche kuna baa pooki naibayie nanu ninche." 
Leviticus20:24 Kake atiaaka nanu intae, ‘Ijung'ujung'u intae enkop enye, naa kaisho nanu intae metaa eninyi, ina kop naruko kule o naishi.’ Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, otirishua intae aitung'uaa loreren." 
Leviticus20:25 Enoto naa entirishu eng'ues nasinyari o enemesinyari, o te motonyi nasinyari o enemesinyari, emindurukie naa ate te ng'ues aashu emotonyi aashu tiae toki naikurtutari te nkop, apa natorishie nanu intae nchere mesinyari." 
Leviticus20:26 Entaa intae sinyat te nkaraki nanu; amu ore nanu Olaitoriani naa kara sinyati natirishua intae aitung'uaa iloreren, pee itumutumu aataa ilkulainei." 
Leviticus20:27 “Ore olee aashu enkitok nairorie oltung'ani otua aashu esakutisho neari metua, neari ninche too soito, ore osarge lenye neaku shumata ninche etii.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Irorie ilapolosak, lelo ayiok le Aron nijoki ninche meetae olenye oisarkionie kewan to ltung'ani otua tiatua iltung'ana lenye," 
Leviticus21:2 meteleku ake to ltung'ani le sotua lo lmarei, aa ng'otonye, aa papaai lenye aa, olayioni lenye, aa entito enye, aa o lalashe lenye," 
Leviticus21:3 aashu eselenkei nemeyiolo olee enye neitu eyami naa ninye enyikare amu meeta olmoruo; ore teina neidim ninye aisarkionie kewan. 
Leviticus21:4 Nemepik kewan olduruk tenaa kitok tiatua iltung'ana lenyena, metaa keidurukie kewan." 
Leviticus21:5 Nemipik nkurrot ilukuny enye nemebarn mbat oo lmunyo lenye aashu edung'udung iseseni lenye. 
Leviticus21:6 Keaku ninche sinyat te nkaraki Enkai enye, nemeisarkionie enkarna e Nkai enye, keitarasaa ninche ilasarri te nkima aaitarasaki Olaitoriani, ina mukate e Nkai enye; metaa keaku ninche sinyat." 
Leviticus21:7 Nemeyam ninche emulayoi, aashu enkitok naisarkionieki, aashu enkitok natung'uayie olmoruo lenye, amu ore olapolosani naa eisinyati te nkaraki Enkai enye." 
Leviticus21:8 Intisinya ninye, amu keitarasaa ninye emukate e Nkai ino; keaku ninye sinyati te iyie, amu ore nanu Olaitoriani ilo likintisiny, ara sinyati." 
Leviticus21:9 Ore entito e pooki apolosani teneisarkionie kewan neiborrie onyek naa papaai lenye eisarkionie nepejori ninye te nkima. 
Leviticus21:10 “Ore olapolosani ora kitok tiatua ilalashera lenyena, otubukokoki endukuya enye eilata aaput neitisinyaki meishopo ilkilani nemeisho olpapita le ndukuya enye meisiong'ayu aashu epolos ilkilani lenyena." 
Leviticus21:11 Nemelo ninye ayiaya osesen lo ltung'ani otua, aashu epik kewan entioto te papaai lenye aashu te ng'otonye;" 
Leviticus21:12 nemeipang ninye alo tiatua ewueji sinyati, aashu eisarkionie ewueji sinyati e Nkai enye; amu ore ina kitisinyata e mbukokinoto e ilata naputishoreki e Nkai enye netii shumata ninye: Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus21:13 Naa keyam ninye eselenkei nemeyiolo olee aitaa enkitok. 
Leviticus21:14 Ore enkoliai, aashu enatung'uayie olmoruo lenye aashu enaisarkionieki aashu emulayoi ore kuna meeyam ninye; kake nchoo ninye eyam eselenkei nemeyiolo olee o lorere lenye;" 
Leviticus21:15 pee meisarkionie ake eishoi tiatua olorere lenye; amu ara nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny ninye.” 
Leviticus21:16 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Leviticus21:17 “Tiaaki Aron, meetae hoo obo tiatua eishoi ino too ishooritin enye pooki oata entioto oidim atinyiku aitarasai emukate e Enkai enye." 
Leviticus21:18 Amu meetae oltung'ani oata entioto oidim atinyiku, oltung'ani modooni aashu olmaima o ltung'ani tarrush aashu olemelulung'a osesen." 
Leviticus21:19 Aashu oltung'ani ogila enkeju aashu ologila enkaina," 
Leviticus21:20 anaa oloruja enkoriong, anaa olkorriot lemebulu, anaa oloata oltialei anaa oloata ilpepedo, anaa oloata ilbolot to sesen lenye anaa oloidong'oki aaitaa osunash," 
Leviticus21:21 meetae oltung'ani le ishoi e Aron ilo apolosani oata eleyiata oidim atinyiku aitarasai nkishorot o Laitoriani naapejori te nkima, ore amu keeta naa eleyiata menyiku ninye alotu aitarasaa emukate e Nkai enye." 
Leviticus21:22 Ekeidim ninye ainosa emukate e Nkai enye eine wueji sinyati aisul o enoo ntokitin sinyat," 
Leviticus21:23 kake melotu ninye ataaniki olkarasha lo lodung'oro le wueji sinyati aashu ataaniki olperere lo lasar, amu keata ninye eleyiata, pee melotu ninye aisarkionie iwuejitin aainei sinyat; amu ara nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny ninche.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Kuna etiaaka Musa Aron o layiok lenyena o ltung'ana pooki le Israel. 
Leviticus22:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus22:2 “Tiaaki Aron o layiok lenyena metalama nena tokitin naasinya oo ltung'ana le Israel naaishoo ninche nanu, pee meisarkionie enkarna ai sinyati: Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus22:3 Tiaaki ninche, ‘Ore pooki ng'ae tiatua iishoritin inyi pooki, too lporori linyi pooki, tenenyikaki nena tokitin sinyat, naaitisinyakitia iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani, eata kereek, ore ilo tung'ani neiwuang'ieki aaitung'uaa ine natii: Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus22:4 Meetae hoo obo le ishoi e Aron oata enkeeya oo lbolot, aashu eruko nkimek oidim ainosa nena tokitin sinyat ometaba anaa neaku bioto. Ore pooki ng'ae oiseyie entoki nemesinya aibung empopok aashu oltung'ani opuku enkare e lewaisho," 
Leviticus22:5 anaa oloba anaa oloiseyie entoki naikurtutari naidim aidurukie ninye, aashu oltung'ani oidim aitasuroki enkiduruk, naba ake duoo ninye anaa enaata," 
Leviticus22:6 ore ilo tung'ani oiseyie mbaa naaikununo neijia neaku ninye oloiduruk ometaa teipa nemeinos nena tokitin sinyat meteleku ake teneituku osesen lenye te nkare. 
Leviticus22:7 Ore ake pee edoyio enkolong nemeitoki ninye aiduruk; ore te siadi neidim ninye ainosa nena tokitin sinyat, amu kuna ninche ndaiki enyena." 
Leviticus22:8 Ore entoki natua openy, aashu enainosa ng'uesi entim meinos ninye, apik kewan olduruk te ninche: Ara nanu Olaitoriani!’" 
Leviticus22:9 Nchoo naa ninche eibung nkitanapat aainei, pee menap ing'ok te nkaraki ninye, neye ninche teine neisarkionie nkitanapat aainei: Ara nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny ninche." 
Leviticus22:10 “Meinos olomoni ina toki sinyati, ore olomoni lo lapolosani aashu osinka lo lmushaara nemeinos ina toki sinyati." 
Leviticus22:11 Kake teneinyang'u olapolosani orrindik too mpisai aitaa emasaai enye makewan, neidim ilo rrindik ainosa ina toki; ore lelo ootoiwuoki tiatua enkaji enye neidim aainosa ina daa enye." 
Leviticus22:12 Teneyam oltung'ani leeiking'a entito o lapolosani nemeinos ina tito nena kishorot oo ntokitin sinyat. 
Leviticus22:13 Kake tenaa enkoliai ina tito olapolosani aashu etung'uayie olmoruo lenye, nemeeta nkera, neshukunye alotu enkang e menye, anaa apake te keraisho, neidim ninye ainosa ina daa e menye; ore ake eyia meetae oltung'ani leeiking'a oidim ainosa ina daa." 
Leviticus22:14 Naa teneinos oltung'ani ina toki sinyati meyiolo ajo endaa sinyati neponiki ninye ematua e imiet e tomon oo ntokitin enyena alak, neisho ina toki sinyati olapolosani." 
Leviticus22:15 Meisarkionie ilapolosak nena tokitin sinyat oo ltung'ana le Israel, naaitarasaki ninche Olaitoriani," 
Leviticus22:16 aaitarasaki ninche metanapa enkitarruoroto o enkitadiata, te nkinosata e nena tokitin enye sinyat, amu ara nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny ninche.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Leviticus22:18 “Tiaaki Aron o layiok lenyena o ltung'ana pooki le Israel, Teneitayu ake oltung'ani le nkaji e Siraeli aashu oloeuo amanyisho tiatua Israel olasar lenye, tenaa entoki olmumai lenye aashu tenaa enkishorunoto to ltau lo lpela naitarasakini Olaitoriani anaa olasar opejori," 
Leviticus22:19 pooki ake pee eng'amaroyu naa tenaa olbung'ae lemeeta entioto aa oloo nkishu aashu oo loo nkerra aashu o loo nkineji. 
Leviticus22:20 Kake emipolos ake entoki naata entioto, amu meng'amaroyu ina tialo intae." 
Leviticus22:21 Naa tenepolos ake ninye oltung'ani olasar le seriani apolosaki Olaitoriani, pee eitabaya olmumai aashu tenaa olasar lo lpela, oing'uaa eluaata oo nkishu aashu eluaata oo ntare, naa pooki ake pee eng'amaroyu naa tenaa bayaroti nemetii entioto atua ninye." 
Leviticus22:22 Ore ng'uesi modook aashu ng'ojinia maiman, anaa nemelulung'a seseni anaa enaruko nkimek, anaa enaata olpepedoi, emipolosaki Olaitoriani nena ng'uesi aashu intaikinyenye ilasarri oopejokini te nkima Olaitoriani te nchumata olperere lo lasar." 
Leviticus22:23 Ore oloing'oni aashu ositima le ker oata erubata osesen lenye naado aashu endorrop nindimidimi intae aitaa olasar lo lpela, kake ore to lasar le nkitabaroto olmumai menyorrarri." 
Leviticus22:24 Ore pooki ng'ues natokurdaki ilterege lenyena aashu eidong'oki, aashu etopolosaki aashu etegelemaki mipolosakiki Olaitoriani aashu intaunyenye ilasarri tiatua enkop inyi;" 
Leviticus22:25 nimintobiriri anaa endaa e Nkai inyi pooki ake ninye ng'ues nayaua oltungani omoni. Amu keeta ninche ntiot tenkaraki melulunga ninche nemeng'amaroyu tialo intae.” 
Leviticus22:26 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus22:27 “Teneini olbung'ae aashu ositima le ker aashu ole kine, neton ninye nkolong'i naapishana tenebo ng'otonye, ore te nkolong e isiet neaku keng'amaroyu anaa olasar opejokini te nkima Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus22:28 Naa tenaa duoo enkiteng ng'otonye aashu enker nimiyieng ninye tenebo olashe o ngotonye aashu olkuo o ngotonye te nkolong nabo. 
Leviticus22:29 Naa tenipolos olasar le nkishoroto e nashe apolosaki Olaitoriani nipolos naa pee etum ataa keng'amaroyu. 
Leviticus22:30 Neinosi ninye teina olong ake, nimileku ae toki mekenyiki: Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus22:31 “Metaa embung'a nkitanapat aainei niasiasa ninche: Ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus22:32 Nimisarkionienie ake enkarna ai sinyati, kake kaayanyituni nanu tiatua iltung'ana le Israel: Ara nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny intae," 
Leviticus22:33 apa oyawua intae aitupuku te nkop e Misiri pee aaku Enkai inyi: Ara nanu Olaitoriani.” 
Leviticus23:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus23:2 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel ore lelo siruai gelunot lo Laitoriani, lilimunyenye aaibalunye nchere iumat sinyat lelo siruai laainei kulo ninche isiruai gelunot naa ninche kulo." 
Leviticus23:3 Nkolong'i ile easi esiai; kake ore te nkolong e naapishana naa enkolong e sabato naitirring'ae aayeng'iyeng'a, eumata sinyati, miasiasa intae esiaai ina olong. Sabato ina to Laitoriani tiatua imanyishoreitin inyi pooki." 
Leviticus23:4 Kulo ninche lelo siruai oogeluno to Laitoriani, nena umat naasinya, naa ninche ipuopuo aalimu aaibalunye too nkatitin enye naategelakaki ninche." 
Leviticus23:5 “Ore to lapa le dukuya te nkolong e tomon oo ng'uan o lapa, teipa, naa pasaka o Laitoriani." 
Leviticus23:6 Naa ore te nkolong e tomon o imiet eilo apa ake naa osirua loo mukateni neitu eisuishieki to Laitoriani, ninosinoso intae imukateni neitu eisuishieki nkolong'i naapishana." 
Leviticus23:7 Ore te nkolong e dukuya nintayuyu eumata sinyati, nimiasiasa esiaai nagol." 
Leviticus23:8 Kake intarasaa ilasarri te nkima aaitarasaki Olaitoriani nkolong'i naapishana; ore te nkolong e naapishana naa eumata sinyati, nimiasiasa esiaai nagol.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus23:10 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel tenipuonunu kenya atua ina kop naisho nanu intae nisampumpu ilng'anayio lenyena, eyaki intae irridat loo lng'anayio le dukuya le nkisampuare olapolosani;" 
Leviticus23:11 nelo ninye ayuk ilo rridati te dukuya Olaitoriani, pee itumutumu aanoto eng'amaroto, ore pee ekenyu etulusoyie sabato neyuk olapolosani ilo rridati." 
Leviticus23:12 Naa ore ina olong niyukuyuku ilo rridati, nipolososo olkuo leker lo lari obo lemeeta entioto anaa olasar opejokini Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus23:13 Ore ilo asar le ntapa opudakini naa rubat are e tomon e efa e ntapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata, pee eitayunyeki olasar opejokini te nkima Olaitoriani, esong'ouna narropil o lasar le ntoki naoki tenebo ninye naa enaisho oo sabibu erubata e ong'uan etomon ninye." 
Leviticus23:14 Niminosinoso intae imukateni aashu ilpaek ootoito aashu ilooshal ometabau ina olong, ometaba anaa niyauu ilasarri le Nkai inyi; enkitanapata ena oo ntarasi tiatua iishoritin inyi too manyishoritin inyi pooki." 
Leviticus23:15 “Ninkenikene intae ebaiki ina akenya etulusoyie sabato, ebaiki ina akenya apa niyautua orridati lo lasar oyuki wikii naapishana naalulung'a," 
Leviticus23:16 aaikenu nkolong'i onom ometabaiki ina akenya nasuju sabato e naapishana; nitumutumu taa aaitarasaki olasar leina tapa ng'ejuk Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus23:17 Niyauu intae tiatua imanyishoritin inyi imukateni are pee eyuki, naaitobirunyeki irubat are tiatua e tomon e Efa, naa ine ntapa napuyiapui, naa kepeji ninche tenebo enkisuijoi, anaa ilng'anayio le dukuya ooishori Olaitoriani." 
Leviticus23:18 Nintarasaa intae tenebo nena mukateni ilkuoo le kerra oopishana lo lari obo lemeeta ntioot, o loti oing'oni obo, olmeregeshi oare, neaku ninche olasar opejokini te nkima Olaitoriani tenebo olasar lenye le ntapa o lasarri lenye ooki, anaa olasar opejori, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus23:19 Nipolososo ositima obo le kine metaa olasar le ng'oki, o lkuoo oare le kerra lo lari obo anaa lasarri le seriani." 
Leviticus23:20 Neyuk olapolosani ninche tenebo ina mukate oo lng'anayio le dukuya anaa olasar oyuki te dukuya o Laitoriani, tenebo lelo kuoo oare le kerra; neaku ninche sinyat to Laitoriani tenkaraki olapolosani." 
Leviticus23:21 Nilimu aibalunye ina olong nintayuyu eumata sinyati, nimiasiasa esiaai nagol enkitanapata ena ntarasi tiatua imanyishoreitin inyi pooki, tiatua iishoritin inyi." 
Leviticus23:22 “Naa tenisampumpu intae nkurman inyi nimisampumpu aaitabaiki nkiting'ot, nimisotisoto ina kurma nitudung'o te nkisampuare entung'uai ninche te nkaraki olaisinani o lomoni: Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus23:24 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel, ore to lapa liopishana te nkolong e dukuya o lapa, nimbung'ubung'u enkolong naeng'ieng'ae aaitirring'a, endamunoto nalimuni aaibalunye te oshoto oo ntarumpetani, eumata sinyati." 
Leviticus23:25 Nimiasiasa esiaai nagol nintarasakiki Olaitoriani olasar opejori te nkima.” 
Leviticus23:26 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus23:27 “Ore te nkolong e tomon eilo apa liopishana naa enkolong o lning'o lo sotua naa keaku te intae enkata e umata sinyati, naa ieniene ate aaitupukoo nintarasakiki Olaitoriani olasar opejori tenkima." 
Leviticus23:28 Nimiaasiasa esiaai teina olong; amu enkolong o lning'o lo sotua, pee eitobiri olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki intae te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Leviticus23:29 Amu ore oltung'ani lemeen kewan aitupukoo teina olong neitayuni aaiwuang'ie too ltung'ana lenyena. 
Leviticus23:30 Ore oloba anaa oloas esiaai teina olong, ore ilo tung'ani naidaikie aiwuang'ie tiatua iltung'ana lenyena." 
Leviticus23:31 Miasiasa intae esiai: Keaku ina enkitanapata ntarasi tiatua iishoritin too manyishoritin inyi pooki. 
Leviticus23:32 Keaku te intae enkolong naeng'ieng'ae aaitirring'a nieniene ate aaitupukoo. Ore te nkolong e naaudo o lapa eiteru teipa, eiteru te nteipa ometabaiki teipa imbung'ubung'u intae sabato inyi.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus23:34 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel, ore te nkolong e tomon o imiet ele apa liopishana o too nkolong'i naapishana naa osirua loo lng'oborri lo Laitoriani." 
Leviticus23:35 Ore te nkolong e dukuya naa keaku eumata sinyati, miasiasa intae esiaai nagol." 
Leviticus23:36 Nkolong'i naapishana intarasaa intae ilasarri oopejori te nkima aaisho Olaitoriani, ore te nkolong e isiet nimbung'ubung'u eumata sinyati nintarasakiki olasar opejori te nkima Olaitoriani, eumata e seremare ina. Miasiasa intae esiai nagol." 
Leviticus23:37 “Kulo ninche isiruai oogeluno lo Laitoriani, laa ninche ilimumu aaibalunye anaa iumat naasinya naaitarasakinyeki Olaitoriani ilasarri te nkima, ilasarri ooki olasar ake te nkolong enye naishiaakino." 
Leviticus23:38 Tenebo nena sabatoni o Laitoriani o tenebo nkishorot inyi o tenebo lelo muma linyi pooki o tenebo nena kishorot inyi pooki o lpela ninchosho intae Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus23:39 “Ore te nkolong e tomon o imiet o lapa liopishana, indipa intae aaiturrurro ilng'anayio le nkop, nipuopuo intae aaibung osirua lo Laitoriani nkolong'i naapishana, neaku enkolong e naapishana enaeng'iyeng'ae aaitirring'a neaku sii enkolong e isiet enaeng'iyeng'ae aaitirring'a." 
Leviticus23:40 Nintayuyu intae te nkolong e dukuya ilng'anayio le lelo keek sidain, o ilng'osil loo ltuka, o ilng'osil lo lchani olit, ning'idayuyu te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi nkolong'i naapishana." 
Leviticus23:41 Nimbung'ubung'u intae anaa osirua lo Laitoriani nkolong'i naapishana tiatua olari; enkitanapata ena oo ntarasi tiatua iishoritin inyi pooki; mbung'ubung'u intae ina to lapa liopishana. 
Leviticus23:42 Nitonini too lng'oborri nkolong'i naapishana; ore lelo pooki ooikino Israel netoni too lng'oborri," 
Leviticus23:43 pee etum iishoritin inyi aatayiolo nchere aishoo nanu iltung'ana le Israel metotoni too lng'oborri ina kata apa ayau ninche aipang'unye te nkop e Misiri: Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi.” 
Leviticus23:44 Neiko neijia Musa aibalakinye iltung'ana le Israel isiruai oogeluno to Laitoriani. 
Leviticus24:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus24:2 “Ntanapa iltung'ana le Israel pee kiyaki iyie eilata nasila oo loirienito te nkaraki oltaa, pee eton oltaa eyupuyup anaake." 
Leviticus24:3 Ore tioriong ilo karasha le nchakenisho tiatua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, nepik Aron ine aitobiraki ebaiki teipa ometaa tadekenya dukuya Olaitoriani anaake; keaku ena enkitanapata ntarasi tiatua iishoritin inyi pooki." 
Leviticus24:4 Kepik ninye iltaai aitobiraki aiteleiki lelo iketa loo ltaai le sahabu nasila te dukuya Olaitoriani anaake. 
Leviticus24:5 “Niya iyie entapa napuyiapui nipej imukateni tomon oare eina tapa; naa irubat are e tomon e Efa ake emukate. 
Leviticus24:6 Nirragie ninche aitatash maare, neaku ile etatashaki te nchumata eina misa e sahabu nasila." 
Leviticus24:7 Nipik iyie olbani osila tenebo ake olkereri, pee etum atupudare ina mukate anaa erubata nadamuni napuoi aaisho Olaitoriani te nkima." 
Leviticus24:8 Ore te pooki olong e sabato neirragie Aron aitobiraki te dukuya Olaitoriani anaake terishata oo ltung'ana le Israel anaa olning'o lo sotua ntarasi. 
Leviticus24:9 Naa keaku te nkaraki Aron o layiok lenyena, neinos ninche tiatua ine wueji sinyati, amu ore te ninye naa erubata sinyati oleng naing'uaa nena kishorot naapejokini te nkima Olaitoriani, embae nadamuni anaake.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Ore apa olayioni le nkitok oo Siraeli laa o le Misiri menye, nelo ninye tenebo iltung'ana le Israel; ore ilo ayioni le nkitok e oo Siraeli o ltung'ani le Israel neitarrikino tiatua enkang oo lng'oborri." 
Leviticus24:11 Ore ilo ayioni le nkitok oo Siraeli nemor ina Arna nedek. Neyau ninche ninye enetii Musa. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Shelomit, entito e Dibri, oloshole Dan." 
Leviticus24:12 Neikenoo ninche ninye ometaba anaa neibalakinyeki ninche yieuna o laitoriani. 
Leviticus24:13 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus24:14 “Empang'unye tiatua enkang oo lng'oborri ilo otedekishe; naa nchoo lelo pooki ootoning'o ninye eiteleiki nkaik enye endukuya enye, naa nchoo eumata pooki ear ninye too soito." 
Leviticus24:15 Naa entiaaki lelo tung'ana le Israel, ore ilo pooki odek Enkai enye nenap eng'oki enye." 
Leviticus24:16 Ore ilo omor enkarna o Laitoriani neari metua. Near ninye olturrur pooki too soito, ilo omoni o ilo inoti. Tenemor ninye ina Arna neari metua." 
Leviticus24:17 Ore ilo oar oltung'ani metua, neari metua." 
Leviticus24:18 Ore ilo oar eng'ues metua, nelak enkishui ake o te nkishui." 
Leviticus24:19 Tenepik oltung'ani ole latia enye olbae, ore anaa enataasa keitaasi sii ninye," 
Leviticus24:20 engilata o loito te ng'ilata oloito, enkong'u te nkong'u, o lalae to lalae, anaa enaitaasa ninye olikae neija sii ninye eitaasi." 
Leviticus24:21 Ore ilo oar eng'ues metua nelak ore ilo oar oltung'ani metua neari sii ninye metua. 
Leviticus24:22 Embung'a intae enkitanapata nabo to lomoni o to inoti; amu ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi.” 
Leviticus24:23 Neaku eirorie apa Musa iltung'ana le Israel, neyaki ninche ninye ilo otedekishe te nkang oo lng'oborri, nenang ninche ninye too soito. Neiko neijia iltung'ana le Israel anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa te nchumata oldoinyo le Sinai," 
Leviticus25:2 “Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel, tenipuonunu kenya ina kop naisho intae, neibung ina kop sabato te nkaraki Olaitoriani," 
Leviticus25:3 ilarin ile intae iunuunu nkurman inyi, naa ilarin ile intobiriri ilng'anayio linyi, nisotisoto ilng'anayio lenye;" 
Leviticus25:4 kake ore to lari liopishana neaku sabato naeng'ieng'are ina meturo, sabato to Laitoriani; miunuunu intae nkurman inyi aashu intobiriri ilng'anayio linyi." 
Leviticus25:5 Ore ina nabulu openy tiatua enkisampuare inyi nimintayuyu aaya, ore isabibu leilo shani leitu eitobiri nimisotisoto intae; keaku olari oengieng'ae aaitirring'a te nkaraki ina kop." 
Leviticus25:6 Ore ina sabato ena kop naa keisho intae endaa intae maate, o rrindiki linyi loo lewa o loo ng'oruo o sinkan lo lmushaara oilo omoni oton tenebo iyie;" 
Leviticus25:7 o nkishu inono sii o nena ng'uesi naatii atua enkop ino, ore pooki naaiu enkop naa keaku endaa." 
Leviticus25:8 “Naa einken iyie iwikii naapishana oo larin, katitin naapishana ilarin oopishana, peyie aa ore nena katitin naapishana o nena wikii naapishana oo larin neaku ilarin artam ooudo." 
Leviticus25:9 Nintoki taa airriwaa oltung'ani meshomo enkop pooki aosh entarumpeta aitadar te nkolong e tomon o lari liopishana; ore teina olong o lning'o lo sotua niosh entarumpeta aitadar tiatua enkop ino pooki. 
Leviticus25:10 Nintisinyinyi olari lionom nilimumu aaibalunye elakunoto tiatua ina kop pooki aaliki lelo pooki oomanya; naa keaku osirua te intae, ina kata errinyokino ake oltung'ani te ntae ntokitin enyena o lmarei lenye." 
Leviticus25:11 Ore teilo ari lionom naa keaku osirua te intae, ore teina nimiunishosho aashu isampumpu ina nabulu openy, aashu isotutu ilng'anayio loo sabibu leitu eitobiri." 
Leviticus25:12 Amu osirua naa; keaku sinyati te intae, ninosinoso intae nena naabulu too nkurman." 
Leviticus25:13 “Ore tiatua ele ari lo sirua nerrinyo ake oltung'ani te intae alo enetii imasaa enyena. 
Leviticus25:14 Naa tenimiraki ole latia ino aashu teninyang'u to le latia ino, niminyalakinono maate." 
Leviticus25:15 Ore anaa eneba ilarin te siadi ilo sirua neijia eba enkinyiang'a teilo lelatia ino, naa terisioroto oo larin loo ndaiki kimiraki ninye." 
Leviticus25:16 Tenaa kumok ilarin niponaa iyie enkinyang'a, naa tenaa kuti ilarin nintaa kiti enkinyiang'a, amu esiana oo larin ninye kimirakinye iyie." 
Leviticus25:17 Eminyala intae maate kake entureita Enkai inyi; amu ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Leviticus25:18 “Neaku embung'a intae nkitanapat aainei nimbung'ubung'u nkiguanat aainei niasiasa ninche; pee itonini tiatua ina kop te seriani. 
Leviticus25:19 Keiu ina kop ilng'anayio lenyena, ninosinoso intae aaraposho nitonini tiatua ninye te seriani." 
Leviticus25:20 Naa tenijojo intae, Kainyoo kinya teilo ari liopishana, tenimikiun aashu kinturrur enkurma ang?”" 
Leviticus25:21 Kairriwaki nanu emayianata ai shumata intae to lari le ile pee etum atoiu ilng'anayio too larin okuni. 
Leviticus25:22 Ore iunishosho to lari le isiet ninosinoso endaa musana; ometabau olari lioudo olotunye endaa enye, inosinoso endaa musana." 
Leviticus25:23 Memiri enkop te nkinyang'a e katukul, amu enaai enkop; amu irara intae ilomon ooidurrakita tenebo nanu." 
Leviticus25:24 Naa ore tiatua ina pooki nitii entipik enkinyang'a e lakunoto. 
Leviticus25:25 “Teneaku aisinani olalashe lino, nemir embata oo masaa enyena, ore ilo alashe onyikare nelotu akordu ina natimira olalashe lenye." 
Leviticus25:26 Tenemeeta oltung'ani olikae okordu ina, kake neitoki ninye adupoyu netum ntokitin naakordunye," 
Leviticus25:27 nchoo ninye eiken ilarin ebaiki ina kata apa pee emir neitoki ninye alak aitulus teilo tung'ani apa otimiraka, nerrinyokino taa ayau atua imasaa enyena." 
Leviticus25:28 Kake tenemeeta ninye ntokitin naaidip naarrinyokinye kewan enye, neaku naa ore apa ina natimira neton too nkaik eilo apa oinyang'ua ometabau olari le Yubilii, ore te Yubilii nelaari ninye nerrinyokino ninye imasaa enyena." 
Leviticus25:29 “Tenemir oltung'ani enkaji enye namanya, natii atua enkanasa nasheta, isunta neidim ninye aitalaku tiatua olari olulung'a eidipaki aatimir; to lari olulung'a elo ninye atum esipata nakordunye." 
Leviticus25:30 Naa teneitu ekorduni tiaatua olari olulung'a, ore ina aji natii atua ina anasa nasheta sunta neitisipi katukul aajo enetii apa ilo oinyang'ua, tiatua iishoritin enyena pooki; nemepuoi aarriny tolari le Yubili." 
Leviticus25:31 Kake ore nkajijik e nena ang'itie kutiti nemeeta isunta naamanita ninche neitanyaanyukieki inkurman enkop; keidimi aatokordu, naa kepuoi aarriny to lari le Yubilii." 
Leviticus25:32 Ore ake eyia nena anas oo Lawi nena ajijik naatii atua nkanas enye keidim ile lawi aatokordu pooki kata. 
Leviticus25:33 Naa tenetii obo Lawi lemeasishore esipata enye enkordunoto, ore apa ina aji natimiraki tiatua enkanasa enye nerrinyuni to lari le Yubilii; amu ore nena ajijik naatii atua nkanas oo Lawi naa imasaa enye tiatua ltung'ana le Israel." 
Leviticus25:34 Kake ore nkurman e nena nemeidimi aatimir amu imasaa enye nena ntarasi. 
Leviticus25:35 “Naa teneaku olalashe lino aisinani, neaku meidim ataretu kewan tenebo iyie, tareto iyie ninye, anaa olomoni anaa olamutanani likiewuo ashulare." 
Leviticus25:36 Ming'orunye ninye dupoto aashu ing'orunye toki, kake turia Enkai ino; pee etum olalashe lino atotona te mbata iyie." 
Leviticus25:37 Misilenoki iyie ninye mpisai inono te mponikinoto nimincho iyie ninye endaa ino aing'oru dupoto. 
Leviticus25:38 Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo likiyawua iyie aitupuku te nkop e Misiri pee kincho iyie enkop e Kanaan; neaku ninye Enkai ino." 
Leviticus25:39 “Naa teneaku olalashe lino aisinani te mbata iyie, nikimiraki iyie kewan enye, mincho iyie ninye mikisiaayia anaa orrindik." 
Leviticus25:40 Keaku ninye tenebo iyie olaisiaayiani lolmushaara o anaa sii olomoni. Eikisiaai ninye iyie ometabau olari le Yubilii; 
Leviticus25:41 nikitum taa ashomo atung'uai, ninye o nkera enyena naatii tenebo ninye, neshuko alo enetii olmarei lenye, neshuko alo enetii imasaa o loo menye." 
Leviticus25:42 Amu isinkan lainei ninche, apa layaua nanu aitupuku te nkop e Misiri; mepuoi aamir ninche anaa rrindiki." 
Leviticus25:43 Milo iyie aitore ninye te nkisikong'ata kake turia Enkai ino. 
Leviticus25:44 Ore tialo ilewa aashu ing'oruo rrindiki linono ooba anaa iliaata indim iyie ainyiang'u ilewa aashu ing'oruo rrindiki tiatua lelo oshon likimanita iyie. 
Leviticus25:45 Indim sii te lelo omon likindurrakita iyie o te lelo mareita lenye ootii tenebo iyie, te lelo ootoiwuoki tiatua enkop ino; neaku ninche imasaa inono." 
Leviticus25:46 Ninguekiki ilayiok linyi te siadi intae, pee ejung aaitaa imasaa enye intarasi; ndimidimi intae aaitaa ninche irrindiki, kake ore te shumata ilalashera linyi lelo tung'ana le Israel mintorere, oltung'ani ake olikae tenkisikong'ata." 
Leviticus25:47 “Tenelo neaku olomoni aashu ilo oidurrua karsis, ore olalashe lino otashare neaku aisinani nemiraki kewan ilo omoni aashu ilo oidurrua otii tenebo iyie, aashu obo lo lmarei leilo tung'ani omoni," 
Leviticus25:48 ore eidipaki aatimir ninye neidimi aatokordu ninye; keidim obo loo lalashera lenyena atalaku ninye. 
Leviticus25:49 Aashu olenkapu lenye aashu enkerai olenkapu lenye, neidim atalaku ninye, aashu oltung'ani le sotua onyikare oleng ora ololmarei lenye neidim atalaku ninye; aashu tenekarsisu neidim atalaku kewan." 
Leviticus25:50 Neiken ninye tenebo ilo apa oyawua ninye ebaiki ilo ari apa otimirakinye kewan ninye ometabau olari le Yubilii, ore enkinyang'a e lakunoto enye neaku te risioroto oo larin. Ore apa enkata natii ninye tenebo ilo ora olopeny neikenari anaa enkata olaisiaayiani lolmushaara." 
Leviticus25:51 Naa teneton etii ilarin kumok, ore te risioroto enye nerriny alak ninche teina kinyang'a apa natalaaki te nkaraki ninye, enkinyang'a e lakunoto enye." 
Leviticus25:52 Naa teneng'or ilkuti arin pee ebau olari le Yubilii, neikenakino ninche, ore te risioroto oo larin le nkisiayiare oong'or te ninye nelak ninye mpisai te nkaraki elakunoto enye." 
Leviticus25:53 Ore anaa osinka lo lmushaara to lari ake o to lari neijia ninye etiu tenebo ilo; nemeitore ninye ninye te nkisikong'ata te dukuya iyie. 
Leviticus25:54 Naa teneitu elakuni ninye te kuna oitoi; nepuoi naa aalaaya ninye to lari le Yubilii, ninye o nkera enyena naatii tenebo ninye." 
Leviticus25:55 Amu ore te nanu iltung'ana le Israel naa isinkan, isinkan laainei ninche layaua nanu aitupuku te nkop e Misiri: Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Leviticus26:1 “Emintobirakiki intae ate nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nimishetishete nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin naaguetuno aashu e ng'ape, nimintasheyieyie intae osoit le nkitanyaanyukoto tiatua enkop inyi, pee irrugokinono ninche; amu ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Leviticus26:2 Embung'a intae isabatoni aainei niyanyititi emanyisho ai sinyati. Ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Leviticus26:3 “Tinipuopuo intae too nkiguanat aainei nimbung'ubung'u nkitanapat aainei, niaasiasa ninche," 
Leviticus26:4 naisho nanu intae enchan inyi too rishat enye, netum enkop atoisho ore ilkeek le nkurma neiu ilng'anayio lenye." 
Leviticus26:5 Ore esototo oo nkurman inyi nebik ometabau enkata nasotuni isabibu, nebik isabibu ometabau enkata e unore. Ninosinoso intae emukate inyi aaraposho nibikibiki tiatua enkop inyi te seriani." 
Leviticus26:6 Naa kaishoru nanu eseriani tiatua ena kop; naa irurara intae nemeetae oltung'ani oiture intae; naiwuang'ie nanu ing'uesi torrok tena kop, nemeitoki olalem atii enkop inyi." 
Leviticus26:7 Naa imirimiri intae ilmang'ati linyi, naa kebatata ninche te dukuya intae to lalem." 
Leviticus26:8 Imiet linyi oopuo aamir iip, ore iip linyi nepuo aamir nkalifuni tomon; ore ilmang'ati linyi naa kepuo aabatata te dukuya intae to lalem." 
Leviticus26:9 Naa kaing'or nanu intae naisho intae entoisho napon intae, naitadedeyie nanu osotua lai o intae." 
Leviticus26:10 Naa inosinoso intae endaa musana apa nitushuma, nintokiki aaiwuang'ie ina musana pee itumutumu enipikipiki eng'ejuk." 
Leviticus26:11 Naa kaitobir nanu emanyisho ai tiatua intae, nemeibelekenya oltau lai aibayu intae." 
Leviticus26:12 Naa kalo nanu tiatua intae naaku Enkai inyi, niakuku intae iltung'ana laainei." 
Leviticus26:13 Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, ilo apa oyawua intae aitupuku te nkop e Misiri, pee mintokiki aaku irrindiki lenye, natigila nanu isekenke e rrindikisho enye, naisho intae enchom ntorioriri." 
Leviticus26:14 “Kake tenimikining'ining'i intae nanu, nimiasiasa kuna kitanapat pooki." 
Leviticus26:15 Tenianyianya intae nkiguanat aainei, naa teneibeyu oltau linyi nkikoot aainei, metaa miasiasa intae nkitanapat aainei, pooki, kake igiligili intae osotua lai," 
Leviticus26:16 naitaas nanu intae ena: Nayau nanu shumata intae entaboi naluam intae, enkeeya nemeishiuni, o lkirobi, oitarruo nkonyek neitemen enkishui inyi. Naa keaku tempesho iunuunu ilanterera linyi, amu keinos ninche ilmang'ati linyi," 
Leviticus26:17 kaipirakinore nanu intae aarare, naa keari intae te dukuya ilmang'ati linyi, ore lekua ooiba intae naa kepuo aaitore intae, naa ilanyishosho intae meetae oltung'ani omirta intae." 
Leviticus26:18 Naa ore etii kuna pooki nimikining'ining'i intae naitame intae aitulus katitin naapishana te nkaraki ing'ok inyi, nagil nanu olwuasa le ngolon inyi," 
Leviticus26:19 naa kagil nanu olwuasa le ngolon inyi, naitaa nanu oloing'ang'e linyi metotiwuo anaa esekenkei naitotiu enkop inyi anaa osuyai." 
Leviticus26:20 Neaku pesho enkisiaayiare e ngolon inyi, amu meitoki enkop inyi aiu entoki naponari, ore ilkeek leina kop nemeitoki aaiu ilng'anayio lenye." 
Leviticus26:21 “Naa tenikipaasharere intae nanu, nimikining'ining'i nanu, nayau nanu shumata intae ilmeita kumok, aitulus katitin naapishana anaa enkumoi oo ng'ok inyi." 
Leviticus26:22 Naisho nanu ing'uesi e ntim meetu atua intae, naa ninche naapuonu aapur intae aaya nkera inyi, neinyal nchoo inyi, neitaa intae kuti, pee eitoliyioi nkoitoi inyi." 
Leviticus26:23 “Naa tenimikishukokinono intae nanu tena kitamioto, kake aikipuopuo aapaashare nanu," 
Leviticus26:24 napaashare sii nanu intae, naosh nanu makewan intae aitulus katitin naapishana te nkaraki ing'ok inyi." 
Leviticus26:25 Naa kayau nanu olalem shumata intae, pee atum aitalaku elap te nkaraki ilo sotua, naa teninturrurrorro intae tiatua inkanas inyi, naa kairriu nanu olmeitai atua intae naa keyai intae aapik atua nkaik oo lmang'ati linyi." 
Leviticus26:26 Ore ina kata tenagil nanu ewueji inyi nepejunyeki imukateni, neaku tomon nkituaak naapeju imukateni inyi te wueji nebo, naa keyau ninche imukateni inyi te ntemata e nkiroishi, ninosinoso intae, nimiraposhosho." 
Leviticus26:27 “Naa tenimikining'ining'i nanu etii kuna pooki, kake ipuopuo torrekie laapaashare nanu," 
Leviticus26:28 nalo sii nanu apaashare ntae te ngoro napi, naitame nanu intae makewan katitin naapishana te nkaraki ing'ok inyi." 
Leviticus26:29 Inosinoso intae inkiri oo layiok linyi, ninosinoso inkiri oo ntoyie inyi." 
Leviticus26:30 Naa kaidaikie nanu iwuejitin inyi e shumata nasulaki e nkop ilperereni linyi loo lasarri le nkorropil, nanang'aki mpopoki inyi nchumat enena kitanyaanyukot inyi nemeishu; neibelekenya oltau lai aibayu intae." 
Leviticus26:31 Naitaa nanu nkanas inyi ilmuateni naitomijoon nkajijik inyi sinyat, nemaitoki nanu aing'uaya isonkoyoni inyi naarropil." 
Leviticus26:32 Naitoliyio nanu ina kop, pee etum lelo mang'ati linyi ootii atua aaing'asiakinoto." 
Leviticus26:33 Naa kaidapashaki nanu intae iloshon, nashutu nanu olalem te siadi intae neaku enkop inyi ololiyiote, neaku nkanas inyi ilmuateni." 
Leviticus26:34 “Neshipakino taa ina kop isabatoni enyena ina kata aa mijooni, ina kata iyie itii enkop oo lmang'ati linono; netum taa enkop ayeng'iyeng'ayu neshipakino isabatoni enyena." 
Leviticus26:35 Ore teina rishata pooki nairrag ninye aa mijooni neyeng'iyeng'a ina kop, tenkiyeng'iyeng'ata apa nemeeta isabatoni inyi emanya intae ina kop." 
Leviticus26:36 Ore lelo linyi ooleku napik enkuretisho atua iltauja lenye teina kop oo lmang'ati lenye; ore embeneyio nakutita osiuo neisikie ninche, naa keisik aailanyisho anaa ilooilany olalem, naa kepuo ninche memirta toki." 
Leviticus26:37 Naa kerrorro ninche aarrorrokino ake oltung'ani olikae, anaa oltung'ani oilany olalem, hoo nememirta ninche toki, nemintoki aata engolon nintasheyie te dukuya ilmang'ati linono." 
Leviticus26:38 Naa ilo iyie aidaaya tenebo iloreren ore ina kop oo lmang'ati linono nikinos iyie. 
Leviticus26:39 Ore lelo linyi tiatua enkop oo lmang'ati linyi nengoroo enkishui enye te nkaraki ing'ok enye ore sii te nkaraki ing'ok oo loo menye nengoroo e nkishui enye anaa ninche. 
Leviticus26:40 Kake teneirridu ninche ntorrok enye o ntorrok oo loo menye teina suujisho naaitaasa ninche nanu, o teina sii naashomo ninche aapaashare nanu" 
Leviticus26:41 omashomo nanu apaashare ninche nayau nanu ninche atua enkop oo lmang'ati lenye; teneitobor naa lelo tauja lenye lememurata neibelekenya teina torroni enye; 
Leviticus26:42 natum naa atadamu osotua lai o Yakobo nadamu nanu osotua lai o Isaak o sotua lai o Abraham, nadamu nanu ina kop." 
Leviticus26:43 Kake keing'ua ninche ina kop neshipakino ninye isabatoni enyena ina kata eirrag aa mijooni metii ninche; naa keibelekenya ninche teina torroni, enkaraki apa natemenaitie nkitanapat aainei, neibayu iltauja lenye nkiguanat aainei." 
Leviticus26:44 Ore ake eyia te nena pooki, ina kata etii ninche atua enkop oo lmang'ati lenye nemamenaa nanu ninche, nemaibayu nanu ninche ometaa kaidaikie nanu ninche katukul nagil osotua o ninche, amu ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai enye;" 
Leviticus26:45 kake ore te nkaraki ninche kadamu osotua o loo nkakuyiaa lenye apa layaua nanu ninche aitupuku te nkop e Misiri too nkonyek oo loshon, pee atum nanu ataa Enkai enye; Ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Kuna ninche nkiguanat o nkikoot o nkitanapat naaitobira Olaitoriani te rishata enye o ltung'ana le Israel te nchumata oldoinyo le Sinai aimunye Musa. 
Leviticus27:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Leviticus27:2 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel, tenenya oltung'ani olmumai o ltung'ani te nkaraki Olaitoriani te ntemata ino," 
Leviticus27:3 ore naa entemata e nkinyiang'a ino olee ebaiki ilarin tikitam omeitabaiki ilarin ntomoni ile naa keaku shekeli onom e nkosholai, te risioroto eina shekeli e wueji sinyati." 
Leviticus27:4 Naa tenaa eng'oruoi ilo tung'ani neaku entemata ino shekeli tomoni uni. 
Leviticus27:5 Naa tenaa ilarin imiet oltung'ani neilep o metabaiki ilarin tikitam, ore entemata ino to lee naa shekeli tikitam, ore te ng'oruoi naa shekeli tomon." 
Leviticus27:6 Naa tenaa olapa obo embotoro oltung'ani neilep o metabaiki ilarin imiet ore entemata ino to lee naa keaku shekeli imiet e nkosholai, ore te ng'oruoi naa keaku shekeli uni e nkosholai." 
Leviticus27:7 Naa tenaa ilarin ntomoni ile oltung'ani neilep neaku ore entemata e nkinyiang'a ino tialo olee naa keaku shekeli tomon o imiet, ore te ng'oruoi naa keaku shekeli tomon." 
Leviticus27:8 Naa tenaa aisinani oltung'ani oleng meidim atalaa enkiririkinoto ino neyau ninye ilo tung'ani dukuya olapolosani netem olapolosani ninye; te risioroto eilo tung'ani apa oinosie olmumai. 
Leviticus27:9 “Naa tenaa eng'ues naaku entoki napolosi, napolosakini Olaitoriani, ore pooki toki naikununo neijia napolosaki ake ninye oltung'ani Olaitoriani naa kesinya." 
Leviticus27:10 Mewalie ninye ae toki aashu eibelekenyie ninye, esidai te ntorrono, aashu entorrono te sidai; naa teneitobir ninye ae kibelekenyata e ng'ues o eng'ues, neaku naa ore pokira ina o idia naibelekenyaki neaku sinyati." 
Leviticus27:11 Naa tenaa eng'ues nemesinya anaa enemeishoori anaa olasar to Laitoriani neyau naa ilo tung'ani ina ng'ues dukuya olapolosani," 
Leviticus27:12 nepik olapolosani ina ng'ues entemata e nkinyiang'a tenaa eisidai aashu tenaa torrono; anaa enitem iyie olapolosani ninye, neaku neijia etiu enkinyiang'a." 
Leviticus27:13 Kake teneyieu ninye nekordu ninye neponaa e rubata e imiet e tomon entemata e nkinyiang'a. 
Leviticus27:14 “Teneitayu oltung'ani enkaji enye metaa sinyati to Laitoriani, nelo olapolosani atem tenaa aisidai aashu torrono; ore anaa enatem olapolosani naa neijia etiu enkinyiang'a." 
Leviticus27:15 Naa teneyieu ilo oishoo Olaitoriani ina aji nekordu enkaji enye, nelo ninye aponaa erubata e imiet e tomon entemata e nkinyiang'a too mpisai neaku taa enkaji enenye." 
Leviticus27:16 “Naa teneiteng'elaki oltung'ani Olaitoriani ometua e nkurma enye naa enenye te njung'ore ore entemata ino e nkinyiang'a naa te risioroto e unoto enye. Ore omeri nabo (mpilbil ile kutiti) e shairi neaku shekeli onom oo ropiyiani, enkosholai." 
Leviticus27:17 Naa teneiteng'el ninye aitisinyaki Olaitoriani enkurma enye ebaiki olari le Yubilii, neaku anaa ina temata ino e nkinyiang'a nalulung'a." 
Leviticus27:18 Kake teneiteng'elaki ninye Olaitoriani enkurma enye te siadi Yubilii neikenaki taa olapolosani esiana oo mpisai te risioroto oo larin oong'or ometabau olari le Yubilii, neiwuang'ieki taa erubata teina kikenata ino." 
Leviticus27:19 Naa teneyieu ilo oiteng'ela enkurma nekordu, neponaa naa erubata e imiet e tomon oo mpisai, neaku taa enenye." 
Leviticus27:20 Kake tenemeyieu ninye nekordu ina kurma, aashu tenetimiraka ninye ina kurma likae tung'ani nemeitokini aaigil aakordu;" 
Leviticus27:21 kake ore ina kurma tenelakuni to lari le Yubilii, neaku sinyati to Laitoriani, ore anaa enkurma naishoruno, keaku olapolosani ninye olopeny." 
Leviticus27:22 Teneiteng'elaki ninye Olaitoriani enkurma nainyiang'ua ina apa neme enenye natujung'o," 
Leviticus27:23 netum naa olapolosani aikena entemata enye e nkinyiang'a ometabaiki olari le Yubilii, nelo taa ilo tung'ani aishooyo esiana e nkinyiang'a te ina olong anaa entoki sinyati to laitoriani." 
Leviticus27:24 Ore to lari le Yubilii nerrinyokino ina kurma ilo apa oinyang'unyeki, aa enenye apa ina kop natujung'o." 
Leviticus27:25 Ore pooki temata e nkinyiang'a naa te risioroto e shekeli e wueji sinyati, ore ngerrai tikitam naa shekeli nabo." 
Leviticus27:26 Kake ore olkikaunot loo ng'uesi naa ilo Laitoriani, meetae oltung'ani oidim aiteng'ela; aa olkiteng aashu enker, ino Laitoriani." 
Leviticus27:27 Naa tenaa eng'ues nemesinya, neinyiang'u naa ninye te ntemata ino e nkinyiang'a, neponiki erubata e imiet, naa teneitu ekorduni nemiri te ntemata ino e nkinyiang'a." 
Leviticus27:28 “Kake meetae entoki naiteng'elaki, ina naiteng'elaki oltung'ani Olaitoriani, e pooki toki ake ninye naata, aa oltung'ani aashu eng'ues, aashu enkurma enye natujung'o, naidimi aatimir aashu aatokordu; ore pooki toki naiteng'elakaki naa eisinyati oleng to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus27:29 Meetae hoo ng'ae oiteng'elaki, oidimi aaidaikie tukul tiatua iltung'ana oidimi aatokordu keari ake metua." 
Leviticus27:30 “Ore pooki matua e tomon e nkop, aa lanterera le nkop aashu ilng'anayio loo lkeek naa ilo Laitoriani; kesinya ninche to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus27:31 Teneyieu oltung'ani nekordu ae nabo e matua enye e tomon oo nkishorot enyena nelo naa ninye aponaa ematua e imiet e tomon. 
Leviticus27:32 Ore ematua pooki e tomon oo nkishu aashu inoo nkerrai, ore eng'ues pooki e tomon e nena pooki naaim abori eng'udi olchekut, naa keaku sinyati to Laitoriani." 
Leviticus27:33 Meikilikuanu oltung'ani tenaa eisidai aashu torrono, aashu ewalu ninye; tenelo newalu ninye, neaku ore pokira ina natawalunyeki o ina natawaluaki neaku sinyati, nemekorduni ninye.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Kuna ninche nkitanapat naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel to ldoinyo le Sinai. 
Numbers1:1 Eirorie apa Olaitoriani Musa tiong'ata e Sinai, ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, te nkolong e dukuya o lapa li are, to lari li are ina kata eidipa aaipang'u te nkop e Misiri" 
Numbers1:2 nejoki, “Nkena esiana e umata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel, anaa ilmareita, o anaa nkajijik oo loo menye, nkajijik te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, pooki lee, pooki lukunya o lee," 
Numbers1:3 ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki ti atua Israel ooidim aashom enjore enkena intae o Aron ninche, anaa ilturrurri." 
Numbers1:4 Neaku te nebo intae oltung'ani ake te pooki osho ore ake ilo tung'ani naa ninye endukuya e nkaji oo loo menye. 
Numbers1:5 Naa kuna nkarn e lelo tung'ana oopuonu aaku te nebo intae. Neing'uaa olosho le Ruben Elisur olayioni le Shedeur; 
Numbers1:6 neing'uaa olosho le Simion Shelumiel olayioni le Shurishadi; 
Numbers1:7 neing'uaa olosho le Yuda Nahashon olayioni le Aminadab; 
Numbers1:8 neing'uaa olosho le Isaakar Natanel olayioni le Saur; 
Numbers1:9 neing'uaa olosho le Sebulon Eliab olayioni le Helon; 
Numbers1:10 ore too layiok le Yosef o te Efraim, naa Elishama olayioni le Amihud;" 
Numbers1:11 neing'uaa olosho le Manase Gamaliel olayioni le Pedasur; 
Numbers1:12 neing'uaa olosho le Benchamen Abidan olayioni le Gideon; neing'uaa olosho le Dan Ahieser olayioni le Amishadai; 
Numbers1:13 neing'uaa olosho le Asheri, Pagiel olayioni le Oharan;" 
Numbers1:14 neing'uaa olosho le Gad Eliasaf olayioni le Deuel; 
Numbers1:15 neing'uaa olosho le Naftali Ahira olayioni le Enan.” 
Numbers1:16 Kulo apa lelo ootegeluaki to lturrur, lelo arikok loo loshon lenye, aa ninche ilukuny oo loshon le Israel." 
Numbers1:17 Nerik Musa o Aron kulo tung'ana ootegeluaki; 
Numbers1:18 ore te nkolong e dukuya o lapa li are, neiturrur ninche eumata pooki te nebo, neiger ninche ate anaa ilmareita, anaa nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto oo nkarn ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, ilukuny pooki" 
Numbers1:19 anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa. Neaku eikena apa ninye ninche ti ong'ata e Sinai. 
Numbers1:20 Ore iltung'ana le Ruben ilo kikau le Israel, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, o lukuny pooki, o pooki lee ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, lelo pooki ooidim aashom enjore:" 
Numbers1:21 ore esiana o losho le Ruben naa nkalifuni artam o ile o iip imiet. 
Numbers1:22 Ore too ltung'ana le Simeon, iishoritin enye, too lmareita, lenye too nkajijik oo loo menye, lelo apa lenye ooikenaki, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ilukuny pooki, pooki lee ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, lelo pooki ooidim aashom enjore:" 
Numbers1:23 nera apa esiana o losho le Simeon nkalifuni onom o oudo o iip uni. 
Numbers1:24 Ore too ltung'ana le Gad, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, lelo pooki ooidim aashom enjore:" 
Numbers1:25 nera esiana o losho le Gad nkalifuni artam o imiet o iip ile o onom. 
Numbers1:26 Ore too ltung'ana le Yuda, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep" 
Numbers1:27 nera esiana o losho le Yuda nkalifuni ntomoni naapishana oo ong'uan o iip ile. 
Numbers1:28 Ore too ltung'ana le Isaakar, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep; pooki tung'ani oidim ashomo enjore:" 
Numbers1:29 nera esiana o losho le Isaakar nkalifuni onom oong'uan o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers1:30 Ore too ltung'ana le Sebulon, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki tung'ani oidim ashomo enjore:" 
Numbers1:31 nera esiana o losho le Sebulon nkalifuni onom o oopishana o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers1:32 Ore iltung'ana le Yosef aa taa iltung'ana le Efraim, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki tung'ani ake ninye oidim ashomo enjore:" 
Numbers1:33 nera esiana o losho le Efraim nkalifuni artam o iip imiet. 
Numbers1:34 Ore too ltung'ana le Manase, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki tung'ani ake ninye oidim ashomo enjore:" 
Numbers1:35 nera esiana o losho le Manase nkalifuni tomoni uni o are o iip are. 
Numbers1:36 Ore too ltung'ana le Benchamen, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki tung'ani oidim ashomo enjore:" 
Numbers1:37 nera esiana o losho le Benchamen nkalifuni tomoni uni o imiet o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers1:38 Ore too ltung'ana le Dan, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki tung'ani oidim ashomo enjore:" 
Numbers1:39 nera esiana o losho le Dan nkalifuni ntomoni ile o are o iip naapishana. 
Numbers1:40 Ore too ltung'ana le Asheri, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki tung'ani oidim ashomo enjore:" 
Numbers1:41 nera esiana o losho le Asheri nkalifuni artam o obo o iip imiet. 
Numbers1:42 Ore too ltung'ana le Naftali, iishoritin enye, too lmareita lenye, too nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki tung'ani oidim ashomo enjore:" 
Numbers1:43 nera esiana o losho le Naftali nkalifuni onom o okuni o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers1:44 Kulo apa lelo laa ninche eikenaki, laa ninche eikena Musa o Aron te retoto oo lpayiani le Israel, iltung'ana tomon o are, ore ake oltung'ani netii te rishata e nkaji e papaai lenye." 
Numbers1:45 Neaku ore esiana pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel, too nkajijik oo loo menye, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, pooki ng'ae ooidim ashomo enjore te Israel" 
Numbers1:46 ore apa esiana enye pooki naa nkalifuni iip ile o okuni o iip imiet o onom. 
Numbers1:47 Kake eitu apa eikenari ile Lawi aaitusuj iloshon loo loomenye te nebo ninche. 
Numbers1:48 Amu etiaka Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers1:49 “Olosho le Lawi ake ninye minken, nimisir ninche aiken te nebo iltung'ana le Israel;" 
Numbers1:50 kake tegelu ile Lawi meitasheiki olng'obor le nchakenisho neitasheiki nena masaa enyena, neitasheiki nena tokitin pooki eine; nenap ninche ilo ng'obor o ntokitin enyena, neisiai ninye, neitaman ilo ng'obor emanyisho." 
Numbers1:51 Naa ore te nkata naidurrieki ilo ng'obor, naa te nepuoi aaun, naa ile Lawi ooun. Naa tenenyiku likae tung'ani, neari ninye metua." 
Numbers1:52 Nchoo iltung'ana le Israel eun ilng'oborri lenye anaa ilturrurri, o ltung'ani ake to lng'obor lenye makewan, oltung'ani ake te rishata enye makewan;" 
Numbers1:53 kake ore ile Lawi neitaman ilng'oborri lenye ilo ng'obor le nchakenisho, pee metumi ake embae naitagorisho ti alo eumata oo ltung'ana le Israel; naa ile Lawi ooitasheiki ilo ng'obor le nchakenisho.”" 
Numbers1:54 Neijia apa eikuna iltung'ana le Israel; etaasa apa ninche te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa. 
Numbers2:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Numbers2:2 “Nchoo iltung'ana le Israel emanyisho tembata e nanka enye, to lmonekie loo nkajijik oo loo menye, nchoo eun ilng'oborri aaipirie ilo ng'obor le ntumo te pooki shoto." 
Numbers2:3 Ore lelo oomanyisho te nkalo o loo saen - te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong naa keaku enanka o lng'obor le Yuda too lturrurri lenye, aa ore olarikoni lo lturrur le Yuda naa Nahashon olayioni le Aminadab;" 
Numbers2:4 ore esiana o lorora anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni ntomoni naapishana o ong'uan o iip ile. 
Numbers2:5 Ore lelo ooitoki aaun ilng'oborri aatashare ninye naa olosho le Isaakar, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Isaakar naa Natanel olayioni le Suar," 
Numbers2:6 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni onom o ong'uan o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers2:7 Nesuju olosho le Sebulon, naa Eliab olayioni le Helon olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Sebulon," 
Numbers2:8 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni onom o opishana o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers2:9 Ore esiana nalulung'a e lelo ng'oborri le Yuda, too lturrurri lenye naa nkalifuni iip nabo o ntomoni isiet o ile o iip ong'uan. Ninche oong'as aapuo." 
Numbers2:10 “Ore te nkalo e kopikop naa enanka oo lng'oborri le Ruben too lturrurri lenye, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Ruben naa Elisur olayioni le Shedeur," 
Numbers2:11 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni artam o ile o iip imiet. 
Numbers2:12 Ore lelo ooun ilng'oborri aasujaki ninche naa olosho le Simeon, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Simeon naa Shelumiel olayioni le Surishadai" 
Numbers2:13 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni onom o oudo o iip uni. 
Numbers2:14 Nesujaki olosho le Gad, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Gad naa Elisaf olayioni le Reuel," 
Numbers2:15 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni artam o imiet o iip ile o onom. 
Numbers2:16 Ore esiana pooki oo lng'oborri le Ruben, too lturrurri lenye naa nkalifuni iip o onom o obo o iip ong'uan o onom. Ninche oaku ili are." 
Numbers2:17 “Neitokini aaitusuj olng'obor le ntumo, nepiki ilo ng'obor loo Lawi empolos oo lng'oborri; ore anaa enamanyisho ninche nchoo eiko neijia, aapik ake olng'obor erishata enye, enanka ake o enanka." 
Numbers2:18 “Ore te nkalo o loo ntoluo naa enanka oo lng'oborri le Efraim, too lturrurri lenye, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Efraim naa Elishama olayioni le Amihud," 
Numbers2:19 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni artam o iip imiet. 
Numbers2:20 Ore olosujaki ninche naa olosho le Manase, ore olarikoni loo ltungana le Manase naa Gamaliel olayioni le Pedasur," 
Numbers2:21 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni tomoni uni o are o iip are. 
Numbers2:22 Neitoki asuju olosho le Benchamen, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Benchamen naa Abidan olayioni le Gideon," 
Numbers2:23 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni tomoni uni o imiet o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers2:24 Ore esiana pooki oo lng'oborri le Efraim, too lturrurri lenye naa nkalifuni iip nabo o ntomoni isiet o iip nabo. Ninche oaku ili okuni." 
Numbers2:25 “Ore te nkalo e moikuape naa enkereri oo lng'oborri le Dan too lturrurri lenye, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Dan naa Ahi-eser olayioni le Amishadai," 
Numbers2:26 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni ntomoni ile o are o iip naapishana. 
Numbers2:27 Ore lelo oosujaki ninche too lng'oborri naa olosho le Asheri, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Asheri naa Pagiel olayioni le Okran," 
Numbers2:28 ore esiana o lorora lenye naa nkalifuni artam o obo o iip imiet. 
Numbers2:29 Neitoki asuju olosho le Naftali, ore olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Naftali naa Ahira olayioni le Enan," 
Numbers2:30 ore esiana o lorora lenye anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni onom o okuni o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers2:31 Ore esiana pooki oo lng'oborri le Dan naa nkalifuni iip nabo o onom o opishana o iip ile. Ninche oobayie anaa too nankan.” 
Numbers2:32 Kulo ninche iltung'ana le Israel anaa enaikenaki too nkajijik oo loo menye; ore lelo pooki apa ootii ilng'oborri ooikenaki too lturrurri lenye naa nkalifuni iip ile o okuni o iip imiet o onom. 
Numbers2:33 Kake eitu apa eikeni ile Lawi te nebo iltung'ana le Israel, anaa apa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers2:34 Neijia apa eikuna iltung'ana le Israel. Ore te risioroto e ina pooki naitanapa Olaitoriani Musa, neiko ninche neijia aaun ilng'oborri too nkererin, oltung'ani ake to lmarei lenye te risiorotoe nkaji e papaai lenye." 
Numbers3:1 Kuna ninche iishoritin e Aron o Musa teina kata pee eirorie Olaitoriani Musa to ldoinyo le Sinai. 
Numbers3:2 Kuna ninche nkarn oo layiok le Aron: Nadab olkikau, o Abihu, o Eleasar o Itamar;" 
Numbers3:3 kuna ninche nkarn oo layiok le Aron, lelo apolosak ootubukokoki eilata aaput, laa ninche etegelua pee eisiaisho anaa lapolosak." 
Numbers3:4 Kake ore Nadab o Abihu netuata te dukuya Olaitoriani ina kata apa pee eishoru olasar le nkima nemesinya te dukuya Olaitoriani ti ong'ata e Sinai; nemeeta apa ninche nkera. Neaku Eliesa o Itamar apa ooisiaishote anaa lapolosak te nkata e nkishui e Aron papaai lenye. 
Numbers3:5 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers3:6 “Toriku olosho le Lawi ntinyiku, nipik ninche dukuya Aron ilo apolosani, pee etum ninche aaisiaayia ninye." 
Numbers3:7 Nchoo ninche eitabaya enkisiaayiare te ninye o to lturrur pooki te dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo, anaa enaisiaisho ninche ti atua olng'obor le Nkai;" 
Numbers3:8 nchoo ninche eitaisheiki imasaa pooki e ilo ng'obor le ntumo, nejing enkisiaayiare te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel anaa te neisiaaisho ninche to lng'obor." 
Numbers3:9 Ninchooyo iyie ile Lawi aisho Aron o layiok lenyena; eishooki ninche ninye tukul ti atua iltung'ana le Israel. 
Numbers3:10 Nigelu iyie Aron o layiok lenyena, nejing ninche esiai enye e mpolosare; kake te nelotu likae tung'ani anyiku neari metua.”" 
Numbers3:11 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers3:12 “Ng'ura, aitayu nanu ile Lawi aitung'uaa atua iltung'ana le Israel te rishata e pooki kikau too ltung'ana le Israel. Keaku ore ile Lawi naa ilaainei," 
Numbers3:13 amu ore ilkikaunot pooki naa ilaainei; ore apa ina olong natara nanu metuata ilkikaunot pooki te nkop e Misiri, aitisinyaka nanu kewan ilkikaunot pooki tiatua Israel aa olayioni le tung'ani o le eng'ues; keaku ninche ilaainei: Ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Numbers3:14 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa ti ong'ata e Sinai," 
Numbers3:15 “Nkena ilayiok le Lawi, anaa too nkajijik oo loo menye o too lmareita; ore pooki lee lo lapa obo neilep nkenai.”" 
Numbers3:16 Neaku eikena apa Musa ninche te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani, anaa enaitanapaki." 
Numbers3:17 Naa kulo apa ilayiok le Lawi anaa too nkarn enye: Gershon o Kohat o Merari. 
Numbers3:18 Naa kuna ninche nkarn oo layiok le Gershon too lmareita lenye: Libni o Shimei. 
Numbers3:19 Ore ilayiok le Kohat anaa too lmareita lenye naa: Amram, o Ishar, o Hebron o Usiel." 
Numbers3:20 Ore ilayiok le Merari anaa too lmareita lenye naa; Mahili o Mushi. Kulo ninche ilmareita loo lawi anaa too nkajijik oo loo menye. 
Numbers3:21 Ore apa ile Gershon naa olmarei le Libni o lmarei le Shimei; kulo apa ilmareita loo le Gershon. 
Numbers3:22 Ore esiana enye te risioroto e nkikena oo lewa pooki ebaiki olapa obo neilep naa nkalifuni naapishana o iip imiet. 
Numbers3:23 Ore ilmareita loo le Gershon neun ilng'oborri ti oriong olng'obor le Nkai te nkalo o loo ntoluo," 
Numbers3:24 te nebo Eliasaaf, olayioni le Lael aa ninye endukuya e nkaji oo loo menye too le Gershon." 
Numbers3:25 Ore apa enkitanapata oo layiok le Gershon te ilo ng'obor le ntumo, naa pee eing'or ilo ng'obor le Nkai, olng'obor kewan o enkimulumulata enye o enkikenet e kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo o neeikishoreki to lgoriet," 
Numbers3:26 o enkikenet o lgoriet, ilo omanita olng'obor le Nkai o lperere lo lasar, o nkeenta enyena, o enkisiaayiare pooki naipirta kuna." 
Numbers3:27 Ore too le Kohat naa olmarei loo le Amram, olmarei loo le Ishart, o lmarei loo le Hebron, o lmarei loo le Usiel; kulo ninche ilmareita loo le Kohat." 
Numbers3:28 Ore esiana oo lewa pooki ebaiki olapa obo neilep naa nkalifuni isiet o iip ile, lelo ooisiaisho te wueji sinyati." 
Numbers3:29 Ore ilmareita loo layiok le Kohat neun ilng'oborri lenye te nkalo e kopikop o lng'obor le Nkai," 
Numbers3:30 te nebo Elisafan olayioni le Usiel, aa ninye endukuya te nkaji oo loo menye too lmareita loo le Kohat." 
Numbers3:31 Ore enaitanapaki ninche naa pee eing'or osanduku, o emesa, o iketa oo iltaai o lpereren loo lasarri nena masaa e wueji sinyati naa ninche eisiaishore ilapolosak, o lkarasha lo lodung'oro o enkisiaayiare pooki naipirta kuna baa." 
Numbers3:32 Ore Eliesa olayioni le Aron ilo apolosani neaku ninye olkitok loo larikok loo Lawi neitasheiki lelo aitasheikinok le wueji sinyati. 
Numbers3:33 Ore too ile Merari naa olmarei loo le Mahili o lmarei loo le Mushi: kulo ninche ilmareita le Merari. 
Numbers3:34 Ore esiana enye te risioroto e nkikena oo lewa ebaiki olapa obo neilep naa nkalifuni ile o iip are. 
Numbers3:35 Ore endukuya e nkaji oo loo menye lo lmarei le Merari naa Suriel olayioni le Abihail; neun ninche ilng'oborri lenye te nkalo e moikuape o lng'obor le Nkai. 
Numbers3:36 Ore esiaai nategeluaki aaitanap ilayiok le Merari naa irubat oo sunta e ilo ng'obor le Nkai, inkeek, o ng'apeta, o nkitotoneta oo ng'apeta o ntokitin naaidikidikore; enkisiaayiare pooki naipirta kuna baa;" 
Numbers3:37 te nebo sii nena ng'apeta o lgoriet naamanaa, o nkitotoneta enye, o ncheito enye o nkeenta." 
Numbers3:38 Ore ilooun olng'obor lenye te dukuya olng'obor le Nkai te nkalo o loo saen, te dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong naa Musa o Aron o layiok lenyena, eitaisheiki mbaa pooki e seremare teine wueji sinyati o pooki naasi, te nkarakii ltung'ana le Israel; naa ore ake oltung'ani onyiku neari metua." 
Numbers3:39 Ore lelo pooki apa ooikenaki too le Lawi, laa ninche apa eikena Musa o Aron te nkitanapata o Laitoriani, anaa too lmareita, ore ilewa pooki ebaiki olapa obo neilep naa nkalifuni tikitam o are." 
Numbers3:40 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa, “Nkena lewa kikaunot pooki loo ltung'ana le Israel, ebaiki olapa obo neilep, niya esiana enye anaa too nkarn." 
Numbers3:41 Nincho ile Lawi metaa ilaainei - Ara nanu Olaitoriani, te rishata oo lkikaunot pooki loo ltung'ana le Israel, nkishu oo le Lawi te rishata oo lkikaunot pooki loo nkishu oo ltung'ana le Israel.”" 
Numbers3:42 Neaku eikena apa Musa ilkikaunot pooki ti atua iltung'ana le Israel, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye." 
Numbers3:43 Neiken ilkikaunot pooki lewa, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn, ore ebaiki olapa obo neilep anaa enaikenaki naa nkalifuni tikitam oare o iip are o ntomoni naapishana o okuni." 
Numbers3:44 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers3:45 “Iwa ile Lawi te rishata oo lkikaunot pooki ti atua iltung'ana le Israel, o nkishu oo le Lawi te rishata oo nkishu enye; neaku Ilawi ilaainei: Ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Numbers3:46 Ore te nkordunoto e lelo kikaunot iip are o ntomoni naapishana o kuni le lelo kikaunot loo ltung'ana le Israel, ootulusoitie aagiroo esiana oo le Lawi," 
Numbers3:47 ntayu shekeli imiet ake te pooki tungani, neitorisiokini shekeli e wueji sinyati; ina shekeli gera tikitam" 
Numbers3:48 nincho nena pisai e lelo ootuluso esiana enye, oolootalakuaki, nincho Aron o layiok lenyena.”" 
Numbers3:49 Neaku ewa apa Musa nena pisai oo ltung'ana ootuluso, ootalakutua ile Lawi ootalakuaki." 
Numbers3:50 Ore too lkikaunot loo ltung'ana le Israel neya iropiyiani, shekeli enkalifu nabo o iip uni o ntomoni ile o imiet, naaitorisiokoki shekeli e wueji sinyati;" 
Numbers3:51 neisho Musa nena pisai e lakunoto Aron o layiok lenyena te risioroto ororei lo Laitoriani, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers4:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Numbers4:2 “Nkena esiana oo layiok le Kohat, tirishu ti atua ilayiok le Lawi, anaa too lmareita lenye o too nkajijik oo loo menye," 
Numbers4:3 ebaiki ilarin tomoni uni o metabaiki ilarin onom, lelo pooki ooidim aatijing enkisiaayiare, pee easisho ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers4:4 Ena ninye enkisiaayiare oo layiok le Kohat ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo: nena tokitin naasinya oleng. 
Numbers4:5 Te nedotuni ilng'oborri, nejing Aron o layiok lenyena atua olng'obor aaitayu olkarasha lo lodung'oro, neimulumul ilo sanduku le nchakenisho te ninye;" 
Numbers4:6 neitoki aapik shumata ninye enkimulumulet endapana e nkine, neisalaashaki shumata ina kila pus alak, neitokini aapik nkeek enyena." 
Numbers4:7 Ore enchumata e ina mesa o e mukate e nkitoduaroto neisalaashaki ninche enkila pus, neiteleiki shumata ninye, isaanini, o masaa e nkorropil, o ngirran, onoosi te nkaraki ilo asar ooki; ore sii nena mukateni e anaake netii shumata ina mesa;" 
Numbers4:8 neitoki aaisalaashaki shumata ninche enkarasha sintet, neitoki aaimulumulaki shumata endapana e nkine, nepik nkeek enyena." 
Numbers4:9 Neitoki ninche aaya enkarasha pus, neimulumul ina kitashet o ltaa te nkaraki ewang'an, te nebo iltaai lenyena, o lkinoketa o ngirran enye, o masaa pooki e ilata naapikieki:" 
Numbers4:10 nepik ninche te nebo imasaa enyena pooki neimulumuli te ndapana e nkine nepiki ninye shumata nkeek enyena naanapieki. 
Numbers4:11 Ore shumata ilo perere lo lasar oitobiruno te sahabu neisalaashaki enkarasha pus, neimulumul shumata ninye te ndapana e nkine, neitokini aapik nkeek enyena;" 
Numbers4:12 neitoki ninche aaya nena masaa pooki e nkisiayiare naasishoreki ti atua ine wueji sinyati; nepik ninche atua enkila pus, neitoki aaimulumul ninche te ndapana e nkine, neiteleiki ninche nkeek enyena naanapieki." 
Numbers4:13 Neitoki ninche aaitayu nkuruon to lperere lo lasar, neisalaashaki ninche enkarasha sintet;" 
Numbers4:14 neiteleiki shumata ninye nena masaa pooki o lperere lo lasar, naa ninche easishoreki te nkisiayiare te ine, o motioo e nkima o njipeta, o lkurteta, o ngirran, nena masaa pooki o lperere lo lasar; neisalaashaki shumata ninche nena endapana e nkine, neisuroki nkeek enyena." 
Numbers4:15 Naa ore ake pee eidip Aron o layiok lenyena aaimulumula ine wueji sinyati o nena masaa pooki e wueji sinyati, ina kata edumuni ilng'oborri, neitoki ilayiok le Kohat aapuonu aanap kuna, kake meibung ninche nena tokitin sinyat, pee meye ake. Kuna ninche intokitin e ilo ng'obor le ntumo naa ninche enap ilayiok le Kohat." 
Numbers4:16 “Ore Eliesa olayioni le Aron ilo apolosani neitasheiki eilata oo ltaai, o enkorropil, ilo asar le ntapa li anaake, o ina ilata naputishoreki o enkitasheikinoto pooki eilo ng'obor le Nkai o nena pooki naatii atua, o ine wueji sinyati o masaa enyena.”" 
Numbers4:17 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Numbers4:18 “Mincho olosho loo lmareita le Kohat eimisieki aaiwuang'ie too le Lawi; 
Numbers4:19 kake entaasa ninche ena pee etum ninche aatopok nemeye te nepuonu aanyikaki nena tokitin naasinya aaisul: nchoo elo Aron o layiok lenyena atua olng'obor negelaki ake oltung'ani esiai enye o lola lenye," 
Numbers4:20 kake mejing ninche atua aapuo aaing'or nena tokitin naasinya hoo te nkata ninye nabo, pee meye ake.”" 
Numbers4:21 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers4:22 “Nkena sii esiana oo layiok le Gershon, too lmareita lenye o too nkajijik oo loo menye;" 
Numbers4:23 ebaiki larin tomoni uni o metabaiki ilarin onom, nkena ninche, lelo pooki ooidim aatijing enkisiaayiare, pee easisho ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers4:24 Ena ninye enkisiaayiare oo lmareita loo le Gershon, te nkisiayare o te napata oo lolan:" 
Numbers4:25 kenap ninche ilkarash lo lng'obor le Nkai, o lng'obor le ntumo te nebo enkimulumulet enye, o enkimulumulet e ndapana e nkine natii shumata ninye, o enkikenet e kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo," 
Numbers4:26 o nkisiong'at o lgoriet, o enkikenet e ine nejing'ieki olgos lo lgoriet omanita ine wueji sinyati o lperere lo lasar, o nkeenta enyena, o masaa pooki e nkisiayiare; naa keas ninche nena pooki naaishiakinore ninche neas." 
Numbers4:27 Ore esiaai pooki oo layiok loo le Gershon naa Aron o layiok lenyena ooitasheiki te ina pooki napuo ninche aanap. 
Numbers4:28 Ena ninye enkisiaayiare oo lmareita loo layiok le Gershon ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, ore esiaai enye naa keaku abori enkitasheikinoto e Itamar olayioni le Aron ilo apolosani." 
Numbers4:29 “Ore ti alo ilayiok le Merari nkena ninche anaa too lmareita lenye, o too nkajijik oo loo menye;" 
Numbers4:30 ebaiki ilarin tomoni uni neilep o metabaiki ilarin onom. Nkena ninche pooki ng'ae ake ninye oidim enkisiaayiare, pee eas esiaai ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers4:31 Naa ena apa eitanapaki ninche metaasa, anaa esiaai enye pooki ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo; nena rubat oo sunta o lng'obor le Nkai, te nebo nkeek enyena, ing'apeta o nkitotoneta," 
Numbers4:32 o ng'apeta e ilo goriet omanita te nebo nkitotoneta, o ncheito, o nkeenta te nebo imasaa enyena pooki o ntelon enyena pooki. Nioriki aipotoki nena masaa naaishiakino ninche nenap." 
Numbers4:33 Ena ninye enkisiaayiare oolmareita loo layiok le Merari, ninye enkisiaayiare enye nalulung'a ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo ti abori enkitasheikinoto e Itamar olayioni le Aron ilo apolosani.”" 
Numbers4:34 Neitoki Musa o Aron o larikok lo lturrur aaiken ilayiok le Kohat, anaa too lmareita lenye o too nkajijik oo loo menye," 
Numbers4:35 ebaiki ilarin tomoni uni, pooki ng'ae ake ninye oidima enkisiaayiare, pee eas esiaai ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers4:36 Ore esiana enye anaa too lmareita lenye naa nkalifuni are o iip naapishana o onom. 
Numbers4:37 Ena apa ninye esiana oo lmareita loo le Kohat, lelo pooki ooisiaisho ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, laa ninche eikena Musa o Aron te risioroto e nkitanapata naitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers4:38 Ore esiana oo layiok le Gershon, anaa too lmareita lenye, o too nkajijik oo loo menye," 
Numbers4:39 ebaiki ilarin tomoni uni o metabaiki ilarin onom, pooki ng'ae oidim atijing'a enkisiaayiare aisiaaisho ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers4:40 Ore esiana enye anaa too lmareita lenye o too nkajijik oo loo menye naa nkalifuni are o iip ile o tomoni uni. 
Numbers4:41 Ena ninye esiana oo lmareita loo layiok le Gershon, lelo pooki apa ooisiaisho ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, laa ninche eikena Musa o Aron te risioroto e nkitanapata o Laitoriani." 
Numbers4:42 Ore esiana oo lmareita loo layiok le Merari, anaa too lmareita lenye o too nkajijik oo loo menye," 
Numbers4:43 ebaiki ilarin tomoni uni o metabaiki ilarin onom, pooki ng'ae ake ninye oidim atijing'a enkisiaayiare, pee eas esiai ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo" 
Numbers4:44 ore esiana enye anaa too lmareita naa nkalifuni uni o iip are. 
Numbers4:45 Kulo ninche lelo apa ooikenaki too lmareita loo layiok le Merari, ooikena Musa o Aron te risioroto e nkitanapata naitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers4:46 Ore lelo pooki ooikenaki too le Lawi, laa ninche eikena Musa o Aron o Larikok le Israel, anaa too lmareita lenye o too nkajijik oo loo menye," 
Numbers4:47 ebaiki ilarin tomoni uni neilep ometabaiki ilarin onom, pooki ng'ae ake ninye oidim atijing'a enkisiaayiare neasisho anap ilolan ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo," 
Numbers4:48 ore lelo lenye ooikenaki naa nkalifuni isiet o iip imiet o ntomoni isiet. 
Numbers4:49 Ore te risioroto e nkitanapata o Laitoriani naimua Musa negeluni ninche, oltung'ani ake te siaai enye e nkisiayiare aashu te napare; kaae neiken ninye ninche aiko neijia, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers5:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers5:2 “Ntanapa iltung'ana le Israel pee eipang'unye ti atua ilng'oborri pooki ng'ae ake ninye oata enkeeya oolbolot, o pooki ng'ae oata olbae loo nkimek, o pooki ng'ae lemesinya oiseyie oltung'ani otua;" 
Numbers5:3 impang'ie pokira, olee o eng'oruoi. Tipika ninche auluo ilng'oborri, pee meisarkionie ilng'oborri lenye, laa empolos enye ninye emanyisho ai.”" 
Numbers5:4 Neas ina iltung'ana le Israel, neipang'ie ninche too lng'oborri meshomo auluo; ore anaa enatiaka Olaitoriani Musa, ina etaasa iltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers5:5 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers5:6 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel Te neas olee aashu enkitok pooki engoki ake ninye naas iltung'ana aagil enkirukoto to Laitoriani, neaku ilo tung'ani olarruoni" 
Numbers5:7 nelimu ninye aibalunye ina ngoki nataasa, neitobir ninye elaata nalulung'a te ina kitarruoroto enye, aponaa erubata e imiet te ina, neisho ilo laa ninye einyala." 
Numbers5:8 Kake te nemeeta oltung'ani iltung'ana lenye ooidimi aatalaaki teina kitarruoroto, ore ina laakinoto neaku eno Laitoriani te nkaraki olapolosani neponikini ilo ker lo lningo lo sotua laa ninye eitobirakinyeki ninye olning'o lo sotua." 
Numbers5:9 Ore nkishorot pooki, o ntokitin pooki naasinya oo ltung'ana le Israel, nena naayaki ninche ilo apolosani neaku inenyena;" 
Numbers5:10 o ntokitin naasinya e pooki tung'ani ake ninye neaku inolapolosani; ore pooki toki naba anaa enaisho oltung'ani olapolosani neaku eneye.” 
Numbers5:11 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers5:12 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel te nelo nepong'ori enkitok e likae moruo ake ninye, neas emarmalisho ti alo ninye," 
Numbers5:13 te nelo neboitare olee ninye, neisudori ina bae too nkonyek o lmoruo lenye, neaku mejurrunoyu hoo neinosie kewan olduruk, nemeetae olchakeni oishakenoki ninye, amu eitu eibung'akini ina bae;" 
Numbers5:14 naa te nelotu oltau lo lom shumata ninye, netum olom ti alo ina kitok enye natipika kewan olduruk; aashu te nelotu oltau lo lom shumata ninye, netum ninye olom ti alo ina kitok enye hoo neitu ninye enosie kewan olduruk." 
Numbers5:15 Nchoo naa eriku ilo lee ina kitok enye enetii olapolosani, neyau enkishoroto naipirta ina kitok, erubata e tomon e efa e ntapa napuyiapui; nemebukoki ninye eilata shumata ina tapa nemepik enkorropil, amu olasar le ntapa lo lom ilo. Olasar le ntapa le ndamunoto, odamunyeki entorroni." 
Numbers5:16 “Neyau olapolosani ina kitok aitinyiku, nepik ninye dukuya Olaitoriani," 
Numbers5:17 neitoki olapolosani ayau enkare nasinya te moti oo nkulupuok, neya enkiti terit to ltiren le ina aji e Nkai nepik atua ina are." 
Numbers5:18 Nepik ilo apolosani ina kitok dukuya Olaitoriani, nelak ilpapit le ndukuya enye, nepik nkaik enyena ina tapa o lasar le ndamunoto, aa ninye o lasar le ntapa lo lom. Ore te nkaina enye neibung olapolosani ina are e nduaran naa ninye nayau oldeket." 
Numbers5:19 Neinosie taa olapolosani ina kitok olmumai, ejo, ‘Te nemeetae olee litaboitare, naa te neitu iyie imbelekenya aibelekenyakino olduruk, eton itii abori enkitoria o lmoruo lino, talakunoyu iyie tena are nadua nayau oldeket." 
Numbers5:20 Kake ti nitapong'ori iyie hoo nitii abori enkitoria o lmoruo lino, naa ti ninosie kewan olduruk neaku kitaboitare likae lee leme olmoruo lino,’" 
Numbers5:21 (nchoo naa olapolosani einosie ina kitok olmumai lo ldeket, nejoki ina kitok), ‘Kintaa iyie o Laitoriani oldeket o lmumai ti atua iltung'ana linono, ti nikincho Olaitoriani meibibiari enkupes ino neiteijia osesen lino;"
