Numbers5:22 metaa ore ena are nayau enduaran, nchoo elo atua enkoshoke ino, neiteijia osesen lino neibibiaa enkupes ino.’ Nejo ina kitok, ‘Esai, Esai.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Neitoki olapolosani aiger kulo deketa ti atua embuku, nejut ninche te ina are e nduaran," 
Numbers5:24 neitook ninye ina kitok ina are e nduaran nayau oldeket ore ina are nayau oldeket nelo atua ninye nepik ninye emion kitok. 
Numbers5:25 Neitoki olapolosani aya ilo asar le ntapa otii enkaina e ina kitok, neyuk ilo asar le ntapa te dukuya Olaitoriani neitoki ayau enchumata o lperere lo lasar." 
Numbers5:26 Neitoki olapolosani aya emborei e nkaina e ilo asar le ntapa anaa erubata enye nadamuni, nepej ninye te nchumata o lperere lo lasar; ore te siadi neitoki aitook ina kitok enkare." 
Numbers5:27 Ore ake pee eidip aitooko ina kitok enkare, te nelo ninye neaku einosie kewan olduruk neas emarmalisho ti alo olmoruo lenye, ore ina are nayau oldeket nejing atua ninye nepik emion kitok, nejeyu osesen lenye neibibiari enkupes enye, neaku ina kitok oldeket ti atua iltung'ana lenyena." 
Numbers5:28 Kake te neitu einosie ina kitok kewan olduruk metaa meeta ninye entioto, nelakunoyu ninye naa keiu nkera." 
Numbers5:29 “Ena ninye enkitanapata too mbaa naatii olom, te nelo enkitok natii abori enkitoria o lmoruo lenye aimalimal neinosie kewan olduruk." 
Numbers5:30 Aashu te nelotu oltau lo lom shumata oltung'ani netum ninye olom ti alo enkitok enye; nepik ninye ina kitok dukuya Olaitoriani, nedungoki olapolosani enkiguana tena kitanapata pooki." 
Numbers5:31 Nchoo olee eton meeta entioto kake ore enkitok keitalaki entorroni enye.” 
Numbers6:1 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers6:2 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel, te nelo nenya oltung'ani olmumai, olee aashu enkitok, te dukuya Olaitoriani, pee eaku osinyati to Laitoriani, neiteng'elaki kewan o Laitoriani," 
Numbers6:3 nchoo eiteng'el kewan te naisho oo sabibu o te naisho napi, meok ninye ae toki naironyuaki too sabibu aashu enaisho napi; nemeinos isabibu ooshal aashu ilootoito." 
Numbers6:4 Ore te nena nkolong'i pooki e nkiteng'elata enye nemeinos ninye ae toki naitobiruaki too sabibu o metabaiki ninye ilanterera lenyena aashu nkabobok enyena. 
Numbers6:5 “Ore nkolong'i pooki e ilo mumai lenye le nkiteng'elata meiseyie olmurunya endukuya enye; o metaba anaa neishunye ina kata apa naiteng'elaka ninye kewan Olaitoriani. Keaku ninye sinyati; keisho ninye iyenat oo lpapit lenyena metoodorito. 
Numbers6:6 “Ore te nena olong'i pooki naaiteng'elaki ninye kewan Olaitoriani nemenyikaki olmeneng'ani. 
Numbers6:7 Aa olayioni le menye aashu olayioni le ng'otonye, aashu olo lalashe aashu enkanashe, te neye ninche. Kepik ninye kewan eleyiata; enkaraki natii enkiteng'elata naiteng'elaka kewan Olaitoriani shumata endukuya enye." 
Numbers6:8 Ore too nkolong'i pooki naaiteng'elaka ninye kewan Olaitoriani naa kesinya ninye to Laitoriani. 
Numbers6:9 “Naa te neye oltung'ani nabo kata etashare ninye, nepik eleyiata ina dukuya enye naiteng'elakaki Olaitoriani, nelo ninye abarn endukuya enye te nkolong e nkitukuo; te nkolong e naapishana elo ninye abarn." 
Numbers6:10 Ore te nkolong e isiet, neyau ninye nturkuluoni are aashu ntaritik are ayaki olapolosani te kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo," 
Numbers6:11 nepolos olapolosani nabo te nkaraki olasar loo ngok, nepolos enkae te nkaraki olasar opejori, neitobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninye, enkaraki nataasa ninye engoki aiseyie ilo meneng'ani. Neitisiny ninye endukuya enye ina olong ake," 
Numbers6:12 neitengelaki kewan Olaitoriani too nkolong'i enyena e nkiteng'elata, neyau olkuo le ker sitima lo lari obo te nkaraki olasar le nkitarruoroto; kake ore enaduoo kata e dukuya neaku pesho, amu ore enkiteng'elata enye neidurukieki." 
Numbers6:13 “Naa ena enkitanapata e ilo lo lmumai, te nelulung'ayu enkata enye e nkiteng'elata: neyauni ninye kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers6:14 Neitarasaki ninye enkishoroto enye Olaitoriani, olkuo obo le ker sitima lemeeta entioto te nkaraki olasar opejori, o esupen nabo e ker o lari obo nemeeta entioto naaku olasar loo ngok, o lmeregesh obo lemeeta entioto oaku olasar le seriani," 
Numbers6:15 o enkikapu oo mukateni neitu eisuijieki, o mukateni e ntapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata, o mukateni naapejo naaelieki eilata, o lasar lenye le ntapa o lasar lenye ooki." 
Numbers6:16 Neitarasaa olapolosani ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani, neitayu olasar lenye le ngoki o lasar lenye opejori." 
Numbers6:17 Neitayu ninye olmeregesh metaa olasar le seriani to Laitoriani, tenebo enkikapu oo mukateni neitu eisuijieki, neyau sii olapolosani olasar le ntapa o lasar ooki." 
Numbers6:18 Ore ilo lo lmumai nebarn ina dukuya enye naitisinyaki te kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo, neya ninye lelo papit le ndukuya enye naitisinyaki nelo apik enkima ti abori ilo asar le seriani." 
Numbers6:19 Neitayu olapolosani orony le ilo meregesh eidipaki aaitokitokie, neitayu emukate nabo neitu eisuishieki ti atua enkikapu o emukate nabo napejo neitu eisuishieki nepik ninche aiteleiki nkaik e ilo lo lmumai. Ore ake pee eidip ninye atabarnoi ilpapit le nkitisinyata enye," 
Numbers6:20 neyuk olapolosani ninche metaa olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani, neaku kuna daiki erubata nasinya to lapolosani te nebo oloikulu oyoki o ina muro naishoruaki; ore te siadi ina neidim ilo lo lmumai atooko enaisho oo sabibu." 
Numbers6:21 “Ena ninye enkitanapata eilo oinos olmumai. Ore olasar lenye oishori Olaitoriani neitorisiokini olmumai lenye anaa oloinos olmumai te nebo pooki toki ake ninye naba anaa enaata ninye te risioroto e ilo mumai oinos ninye, neiko ninye nejia te risioroto e nkitanapata e nkiteng'elata enye olmumai eitisinyaki kewan Olaitoriani.”" 
Numbers6:22 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Tiaki Aron o layiok lenyena," 
Numbers6:23 Nji enkuna ti nimayianana iltung'ana le Israel entejo," 
Numbers6:24 Mikitamayiana Olaitoriani nikigolie: 
Numbers6:25 Mikintawang'aki Olaitoriani enkomom enye, niking'urrie:" 
Numbers6:26 Mikinchoo Olaitoriani omom, nikincho seriani." 
Numbers6:27 “Naa nchoo ninche metipika enkarna ai shumata lelo tung'ana le Israel pee amayian nanu ninche.” 
Numbers7:1 Ore apa te ina olong pee eidip Musa atuuno olng'obor le Nkai, nebukoki eilata neitisiny ninye te nebo imasaa enyena nebukoki eilata neitisiny olperere lo lasar, te nebo imasaa pooki," 
Numbers7:2 ore larikok le Israel, ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye ilarikok loo loshon otii shumata lelo apa ooikenaki," 
Numbers7:3 neishoru neyau nkishorot enye dukuya Olaitoriani, ngarrin ile naaimulumula, o lmong'i tomon o are, ore ake engarri netii larikok oare ore ake olarikoni neeta olkiteng, nepolos ninche te dukuya ilo ng'obor le Nkai." 
Numbers7:4 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers7:5 “Tang'amai kuna naaing'uaa ninche, pee etumi aataasishore ninche, pee etumi aataasishore ninche te nkisiayiare e ilo ng'obor le ntumo, nincho ninche lelo le Lawi, oltung'ani ake te risioroto e nkisiayiare enye.”" 
Numbers7:6 Neaku etang'amayie apa Musa nena garrin o lelo mong'i neisho ninye ile Lawi. 
Numbers7:7 Ore ngarrin are o lmong'i oong'uan neisho ilayiok le Gershon te risioroto e nkisiayiare enye. 
Numbers7:8 Ore ngarrin ong'uan o lmong'i isiet neisho ilayiok le Merari, te risioroto e nkisiayiare enye erikoo Itamar olayioni le Aron ilo apolosani." 
Numbers7:9 Kake ore too layiok le Kohat neitu eishori ninche toki, enkaraki naitanapaki apa ninche meing'ura nena tokitin naasinya naanapi too loilila." 
Numbers7:10 Ore larikok neishooyo lasarri te nkaraki enkitisinyata o lperere lo lasar te ina olong apa natubukokoki eilata aaitisiny, neishooyo lelo arikok ilasarri lenye te dukuya olperere lo lasar." 
Numbers7:11 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Keishori ninche ilasarri lenye, olarikoni ake te nkolong enye, te nkaraki enkitisinyata o lperere lo lasar.”" 
Numbers7:12 Ore apa ilo otang'asa aitayu olasar lenye te nkolon e dukuya naa Nashon olayioni le Aminadab, lo losho le Yuda;" 
Numbers7:13 ore olasar lenye naa esaani e nkosholai naa shekeli iip nabo o tomoni uni enkiroishi enye, o engirra nabo e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, ebore pokira are entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata aaitaa olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:14 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon nabore enkorropil," 
Numbers7:15 o loing'oni obo oti, o lmeregesh obo, o lkuo obo le ker sitima le ker lo lari obo te nkaraki olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:16 olkine obo oaku olasar loo ngok. 
Numbers7:17 Naa ore to lasar loo nkishorot le seriani, naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o lkineji imiet o lkerra imiet lo lari obo. Ele apa olasar le Nashon olayioni le Aminadab." 
Numbers7:18 Ore te nkolong e are neitayu olasar Natanel olayioni le Suar, ilo arikoni le Isaakar;" 
Numbers7:19 neitayu ninye to lasar lenye e saani nabo e nkosholai naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip o tomoni uni, o engirra nabo e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira entapa napuyiapui naipurja te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa." 
Numbers7:20 O enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli nabore enkorropil; 
Numbers7:21 o loing'oni obo oti, o lmeregesh obo, o lker obo lo lari obo oaku olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:22 olkine obo oaku olasar loo ngok; 
Numbers7:23 ore to lasar le seriani naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o lkineji imiet, o sitiman le kerra imiet lo lari obo. Ele ninye olasar le Natanel olayioni le Suar." 
Numbers7:24 Ore te nkolong e uni naa Eliabu olayioni le Helon, ilo arikoni loo ltung'ana le Sebulon:" 
Numbers7:25 ore olasar lenye naa esaani nabo e nkosholai, naa shekeli iip nabo o tomoni uni e nkosholai, naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip nabo o tomoni uni, o eng'irra nabo e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai nebore pokira are entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata metaa olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:26 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon nabore enkorropil; 
Numbers7:27 o loing'oni obo oti, o lmeregesh obo, ositima le ker lo lari obo, oaku olasar opejori," 
Numbers7:28 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ngoki," 
Numbers7:29 naa ore to lasar le seriani naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, isitiman imiet le kineji o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Eliab olayioni le Helon." 
Numbers7:30 Ore te nkolong e ong'uan naa Elisuri olayioni le Shedeur, olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Ruben." 
Numbers7:31 Ore olasar lenye naa esaani nabo enkosholai naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip nabo o tomoni uni, o eng'irra nabo e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai nebore pokira entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:32 o enkijiko e sahabu e shekeli tomon, nabore nkorropil;" 
Numbers7:33 o loti oing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitima le ker lo lari obo oaku olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:34 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki; 
Numbers7:35 ore to lasar le seriani, naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o sitiman imiet le kineji, o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele ninye olasar le Elisuri olayioni le Shedeur." 
Numbers7:36 Ore te nkolong e imiet naa Shelumiel olayioni le Surishadai, olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Simeon:" 
Numbers7:37 ore olasar lenye naa esaani nabo enkosholai, naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip nabo o tomoni uni, o eng'irra nabo e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira are entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:38 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon, nabore enkorropil," 
Numbers7:39 o loti oing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitima obo le ker lo lari obo te nkaraki olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:40 o sitima obo le kine te nkaraki olasar le ngoki; 
Numbers7:41 ore to lasar le seriani naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o sitiman le kineji imiet, o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Shelumiel olayioni le Surishadai." 
Numbers7:42 Ore te nkolong e ile naa Eliasaf olayioni le Deuel olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Gad: 
Numbers7:43 ore olasar lenye naa esaani nabo e nkosholai, ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip nabo o tomoni uni, o engirra nabo e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:44 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon nabore enkorropil; 
Numbers7:45 o loti oing'oni obo o lmeregesh obo, o sitima obo le ker lo lari obo oaku olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:46 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ngoki; 
Numbers7:47 ore olasar le seriani naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o sitiman imiet le kineji, o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Eliasaf olayioni le Deuel." 
Numbers7:48 Ore te nkolong e naapishana naa Elishama olayioni le Amihud ninye olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Efraim: 
Numbers7:49 ore olasar lenye naa esaani nabo e nkosholai naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip nabo o tomoni uni; o eng'irra nabo e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira are entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:50 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon nabore enkorropil; 
Numbers7:51 o loti oing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitima obo le ker lo lari obo oaku olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:52 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ngoki; 
Numbers7:53 ore olasar le seriani naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o sitiman imiet le kineji, o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Elishama olayioni le Amihud." 
Numbers7:54 Ore te nkolong e isiet naa Gamaliel olayioni le Pedasur, ninye olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Manase:" 
Numbers7:55 ore olasar lenye naa esaani nabo e nkosholai, naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip nabo o tomoni uni, o eng'irra nabo e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:56 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon, nabore enkorropil;" 
Numbers7:57 o loti oing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitima obo le ker lo lari obo, oaku olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:58 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ngoki; 
Numbers7:59 ore olasar le seriani naa, ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o sitiman imiet le kineji, o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Gamaliel olayioni le Pedasur." 
Numbers7:60 Ore te nkolong e naaudo naa Abidan olayioni le Gideon olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Benchamen: 
Numbers7:61 ore olasar lenye naa esaani e nkosholai naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:62 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon nabore enkorropil; 
Numbers7:63 o loti oing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitima obo le ker lo lari obo, oaku olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:64 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ngoki; 
Numbers7:65 ore olasar le seriani naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o sitiman imiet le kineji, o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Abidan olayioni le Gideon." 
Numbers7:66 Ore te nkolong e tomon naa Ahieser olayioni le Amishadai ninye olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Dan: 
Numbers7:67 ore olasar lenye, naa esaani nabo e nkosholai, naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip o tomoni uni, o eng'irra e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira entapa napuyiapui naipurja te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:68 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon nabore enkorropil," 
Numbers7:69 o loti oing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitima obo le ker lo lari obo, oaku olasar opejori," 
Numbers7:70 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar loo ngok," 
Numbers7:71 ore olasar le seriani naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o lkineji imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Ahieser olayioni le Amishadai." 
Numbers7:72 Ore te nkolong e tomon o obo naa Pagiel olayioni le Okran, ninye olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Asheri:" 
Numbers7:73 ore olasar lenye naa esaani nabo e nkosholai, naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli ntomoni naapishana te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira are entapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:74 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon nabore enkorropil; 
Numbers7:75 o loti oing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitima obo le ker lo lari obo, oaku olasar opejori;" 
Numbers7:76 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ngoki; 
Numbers7:77 ore olasar le seriani naa ilmong'i oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o sitiman imiet le kineji, o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Pagiel olayioni le Okran." 
Numbers7:78 Ore te nkolong e tomon o are naa Ahira olayioni le Enan, ninye olarikoni loo ltung'ana le Naftali:" 
Numbers7:79 ore olasar lenye naa esaani nabo e nkosholai, naa ore enkiroishi enye naa shekeli iip o tomoni uni, o eng'irra nabo e nkosholai e shekeli ntomoni naapishana, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai, nebore pokira are entapa napuyiapui naipurja te ilata pee eaku olasar le ntapa;" 
Numbers7:80 o enkijiko nabo e sahabu e shekeli tomon nabore enkorropil; 
Numbers7:81 o loti oing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitima obo le ker lo lari obo oaku olasar opejori," 
Numbers7:82 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar loo ngok; 
Numbers7:83 ore olasar le seriani naa, ilmong'i, oare, o lmeregeshi imiet, o sitiman imiet le kineji o sitiman imiet le kerra lo lari obo. Ele apa ninye olasar le Ahira olayioni le Enan." 
Numbers7:84 Ele apa olasar le nkitisinyata te nkaraki olperere lo lasar, te ina olong apa natubukokoki eilata aaitisiny, oing'uaa ilarikok le Israel: isaanini tomon o are e nkosholai, o ngirran tomon o are e nkosholai, o nkijikoni tomon o are e sahabu," 
Numbers7:85 ore ake esaani e nkosholai nabo te ninche naa shekeli ntomoni naapishana, ore enkosholai pooki e kuna masaa naa shekeli nkalifuni are o iip ong'uan te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai," 
Numbers7:86 ore nena kijikoni tomon o are e sahabu naabore enkorropil, eeta ake nabo enkiroishi e shekeli tomon, te risioroto e shekeli e nkaji e Nkai ore sahabu pooki e nena kijikoni naa shekeli iip o tikitam." 
Numbers7:87 Ore nkishu pooki o lasar opejori naa iloingok tomon o are, o lmeregeshi tomon oare, o sitiman tomon o are le kerra lo lari obo te nebo olasar lenye le ntapa; o sitiman tomon o are le kineji lo lasar le ngoki." 
Numbers7:88 Ore nkishu pooki o lasar le seriani naa iloingok tikitam o ng'uan, o lmeregeshi ntomoni ile, o sitiman le kineji ntomoni ile, ore sitiman le kerra lo lari obo naa ntomoni ile. Ele apa ninye olasar le nkitisinyata lo lperere lo lasar eidipaki aatubukoki eilata aaitisinya." 
Numbers7:89 Ore apa pee elo Musa atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo airorie Olaitoriani, nening ninye oltoilo eirorie ninye eing'uaa shumata ilo orika lo lng'ur apa otii shumata osanduku le nchakenisho, eimu erishata e lelo kerubi pokira oare; neirorie ninye." 
Numbers8:1 Neitoki apa Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers8:2 “Tiaki Aron, ti nindip atipika iltaai nkitasheta, ore lelo taai oopishana neitawang'isho te dukuya ina kitashet oo ltaai.”" 
Numbers8:3 Neiko neijia Aron; nepik ninye iltaai lenyena meitawang'a dukuya ina kitashet oo ltaai, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers8:4 Naa ena apa enkitobirunoto e ilo iket lo ltaa, naa sahabu naidongoki ebaiki entonata enye o metabaiki ntapuka enyena esiaai e nkidong'ore, te risioroto e ilo rrekie otuutaka Olaitoriani Musa. Neaku eitobirua ninye ilo iket." 
Numbers8:5 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers8:6 “Toriko ile Lawi intung'uai iltung'ana le Israel, nintuku ninche." 
Numbers8:7 Naa neijia nkuna ninche, ntukuo ninche, isuaaki ninche enkare enkitisinyata, nebarn ninche iseseni lenye, neituku nkilani enye, neitisiny ate." 
Numbers8:8 Nchoo ninche eya oloti oing'oni o lasar lenye le ntapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata, nintoki aya likae oti oing'oni oaku olasar le ngoki." 
Numbers8:9 Niyau iyie lelo le Lawi meetu dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo, ninturrur ina umata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers8:10 Ore ake pee iyau lelo le Lawi dukuya Olaitoriani, ore iltung'ana le Israel, neiteleiki nkaik enye lelo le Lawi." 
Numbers8:11 Neishooyo Aron ile Lawi te dukuya Olaitoriani pee eaku olasar oyuki oing'uaa iltung'ana le Israel pee eaku enenye enkisiaayiare o Laitoriani. 
Numbers8:12 Neitoki lelo Lawi aaiteleiki nkaik enye ilukuny e lelo oing'ok; nipolos iyie obo pee eaku olasar le ngoki ore olikae neaku olasar opejori oishori Olaitoriani, pee eitobir osotua lo lning lo Laitoriani too le Lawi." 
Numbers8:13 Nchoo iyie ile Lawi meetu abori Aron o layiok lenyena, pee eishooyo ninche anaa olasar oyuki to Laitoriani." 
Numbers8:14 “Neijia nkuna nteng'ela ile Lawi ntung'uai atua iltung'ana le Israel, neaku ile Lawi ilaainei." 
Numbers8:15 Ore te siadi ine nepuo ile Lawi atua aaisiaisho ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, te nindip iyie aitukuo ninche ninchooyo ninche anaa olasar oyuki." 
Numbers8:16 Amu aaishooki nanu ninche tukul iltung'ana le Israel; te rishata oo lkikaunot pooki le Israel, ore ilkikaunot pooki loo ltung'ana le Israel aawa nanu makewan ninche." 
Numbers8:17 Amu ore ilkikaunot pooki loo ltung'ana le Israel naa laainei, o lo ltung'ani o le ng'ues; ore apa teina olong nataara nanu metuata ilkikaunot pooki te nkop e Misiri aitisinyaka nanu ninche kewan," 
Numbers8:18 naawa nanu ile Lawi te rishata oo lkikaunot pooki ti atua iltung'ana le Israel. 
Numbers8:19 Naishooyie nanu ile Lawi anaa enkishoroto aisho Aron o layiok lenyena, aitung'uaa iltung'ana le Israel, pee eas enkisiaayiare te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, neitobir osotua lo lningo te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel, pee mejing ake olmeitai atua iltung'ana le Israel te nelo nenyikaki iltung'ana le Israel enkaji e Nkai.”" 
Numbers8:20 Ina apa eitaasa Musa o Aron o lturrur pooki loo ltung'ana le Israel ile Lawi; ore te risioroto e ina pooki naitanapa Olaitoriani Musa too naaipirta ile Lawi neitaas ninche iltung'ana le Israel ina. 
Numbers8:21 Neitisiny ile Lawi ate aalam ingok, neituku nkilani enye; neishooyo Aron ninche anaa olasar oyuki te dukuya Olaitoriani, neitobir Aron osotua lo lningo te nkaraki ninche eituku ninche." 
Numbers8:22 Ore te siadi ina nepuo ile Lawi atua aas enkisiaayiare enye ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, aasisho ti abori Aron o layiok lenyena. Ore anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa too naaipirta ile Lawi ina ninye eitaasa ninche." 
Numbers8:23 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers8:24 “Kuna baa naaishiakino too le Lawi: ore ebaiki ilarin tikitam o imiet neilep kepuo ninche aas enkisiaayiare ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo; 
Numbers8:25 naa ore ebaiki ilarin onom neing'uaa ninche enkisiaayiare nemeitoki aaisiaaisho," 
Numbers8:26 kake keisiaai ilalashera lenye tiatua olng'obor le ntumo, neibung iutarot, kake meisiaaisho ninche. Nji iyie ilo aaitaas ile Lawi arishaki isiaaitin enye." 
Numbers9:1 Neirorie Olaitoriani Musa tiong'ata e Sinai, to lapa le dukuya lo lari liare eidipa aatupuku te nkop e Misiri, ejo, tejo" 
Numbers9:2 “Nchoo iltung'ana le Israel eibung Pasaka te rishata enye nategeluaki. 
Numbers9:3 Ore te nkolong e tomon oo ng'uan ele apa, teipa, nimbung'ubung'u te nkata enye nategeluaki te risioroto oo nkikoot pooki, o nkiguanat pooki ipuopuo intae aaibung.”" 
Numbers9:4 Neaku etiaka Musa iltung'ana le Israel pee eibung pasaka. 
Numbers9:5 Neibung ninche pasaka to lapa le dukuya, te nkolong e tomon oo ng'uan o lapa, teipa, tiongota e Sinai; te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa, neas iltung'ana le Israel ina." 
Numbers9:6 Netii apa ilkuti tung'ana lemesinya ooiseyie osesen lo ltung'ani otua, neaku meidim ninche aaibung'a sabato teina olong; nepuonu ninche dukuya Musa o Aron teina olong." 
Numbers9:7 Nejoki lelo tung'ana ninche, “Kira iyiook ilo oiduruk amu kiseyie osesen lo ltung'ani otua; kainyoo pee etekepayioki iyiook eitu kinchooyo olasar lo Laitoriani te nkata nategeluaki tiatua iltung'ana le Israel?”" 
Numbers9:8 Nejoki Musa ninche, “Entasho, pee atum atoning'o enaitanapisho Olaitoriani tialo intae.”" 
Numbers9:9 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers9:10 Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel, “Teneiduruk ake ninye oltung'ani tiatua intae, anaa olayioni le ishoi inyi, eiseyie oltung'ani otua, ana elakua te lototo enye apa nashomo, naa keibung ake pasaka." 
Numbers9:11 Ore to lapa liare, te nkolong e tomon oo ng'uan naa keibung; keinos ninche tenebo imukateni neitu eisuishieki, o mbenek naadua." 
Numbers9:12 Nemeleku ninche toki o mekenyu, nemegil oloito lenye; te risioroto oo nkikoot pooki e pasaka eibung ninche." 
Numbers9:13 Kake ore ilo tung'ani oiduruk nemetii elototo, kake nekepari aany eibung pasaka, ore ilo tung'ani neiwuang'ieki too ltung'ana lenyena amu eitu eishoru olasar lo Laitoriani te rishata enye nageluno; nenap ilo tung'ani engoki enye." 
Numbers9:14 Naa tenelotu oltung'ani omoni amanyisho tiatua intae, neibung pasaka to Laitoriani, te risioroto oo nkikoot e pasaka, nea naa ninye ina. Enkikoo nabo intae ipupuo aata, to lomoni o to inoti.”" 
Numbers9:15 Ore apa ina olong natuunoki olng'obor le Nkai, neimulumul enkatampoi ilo ng'obor le Nkai, ilo ng'obor le nchakenisho; ore teipa netii ina atampoi shumata ilo ng'obor nelioo eikununo anaa enkima o mekenyu." 
Numbers9:16 Netiu neijia anaake, neimulumul enkatampoi ilo ng'obor dama, o elioto e nkima te nkewarie." 
Numbers9:17 Naa ore ake te neiwuang'ieki ina atampoi te nchumata e ilo ng'obor, ore te siadi ina nedumunye iltung'ana loo Siraeli aaidur; naa ore ake ewueji nedoiki ina atampoi neun iltung'ana loo Siraeli ilng'oborri teine." 
Numbers9:18 Naa te nkitanapata o Laitoriani edumunye iltung'ana loo Siraeli aaidur, naa te nkitanapata o Laitoriani sii eun ninche ilng'oborri; ore te nkata naba anaa enabik enkatampoi te nchumata ilo ng'obor le Nkai, nebik ninche too lng'oborri." 
Numbers9:19 Ore duoo ninye tenaa nkolong'i kumok ebik enkatampoi te nchumata e ilo ng'obor le Nkai, neibung iltung'ana loo Siraeli enkitanapata o Laitoriani, nemedumunye ninche aaidur." 
Numbers9:20 Ore apa kulie katitin na nkuti olong'i ake etii ina atampoi shumata ilo ng'obor le Nkai, naa ore te risioroto e nkitanapata o Laitoriani nebik ninche too lng'oborri ore ake te risioroto e nkitanapata o Laitoriani nedumunye ninche aaidur." 
Numbers9:21 Ore ake sii apa kulie katitin etotona enkatampoi ebaiki teipa o mekenyu; naa ore ake pee edumuni aailepie enkatampoi tadekenya, nedumunye ninche aaidur aashu te netobiko enkolong nabo o enkewarie, ore ake pee eiwuang'ieki ina atampoi nedumunye ninche aaidur." 
Numbers9:22 Tenaa nkolong'i are apa aashu olapa, aashu enkata naado, etobiko ina atampoi te nchumata ilo ng'obor le Nkai, neton te ine, nebik iltung'ana loo Siraeli too lng'oborri, nemedumunye aaidur" 
Numbers9:23 kake te neyae aailepie, nedumunye ninche aaidur. Te nkitanapata o Laitoriani eun ninche ilng'oborri, naa te nkitanapata o Laitoriani edumunye ninche aapuo; eibung'a apa ninche enkitanapata o Laitoriani, ina kitanapata o Laitoriani naimu Musa." 
Numbers10:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers10:2 “Ntobira ntarumpetani are e nkosholai te nkarriyiano ndong'u ninche, neaku ninche impotunye eumata, naa ninche egilieki ilng'oborri." 
Numbers10:3 Naa te nekuti pokira are, neiturrurrunye eumata pooki aapuonu enitii te kutukaji ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers10:4 Kake tenaa nabo ake etukutaki, naa ilarikok, nena lukuny oo loshon loo Siraeli, likinturrurrokino." 
Numbers10:5 Naa ti niosh abuaku ore lelo ng'oborri ootii enkalo o loo saen nedumunye," 
Numbers10:6 ore pee intoki aosh abuaku e niare, ore lelo ng'oborri ootii enkalo e kopikop nedumunye aaidur. Embuakunoto eoshi enkata naba anaa enadumunye ninche." 
Numbers10:7 Kake tenaa eumata eiturrurri te nebo, nikut, kake mipik embuakunoto." 
Numbers10:8 Ore lelo ayiok le Aron, lelo apolosak, nekut ntarumpetani. Ore eoshoto oo ntarumpetani naa keaku te intae enkitanapata e anaake tiatua iishoritin inyi pooki." 
Numbers10:9 Naa tenipuopuo enjore te nkop inyi aagilunore ilo mang'atinta linyi oibooki intae enkop, nitumokiki taa aaitadara ntarumpetani, pee edamuni intae te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, neitajeuni intae too lmang'ati linyi." 
Numbers10:10 Ore sii too nkatitin e ng'ida - too siruai linyi lo lapa ng'ejuk o te kulikae siruai te sayiata e Nkai - tukuta nena tarumpetani ina kata intarasaa ilasarri linyi oopejori o lasarri linyi le seriani pee atum taa atareto intae: Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino.” 
Numbers10:11 Ore to lari li are, to lapa li are te nkolong e tikitam o lapa nedumuni enkatampoi aailepie aaitung'uaa shumata ilo ng'obor le Nkai le nchakenisho," 
Numbers10:12 nedumunye iltung'ana loo Siraeli anaa ntukusi aaidur aaing'uaa ongata e Sinai; nelo ina atampoi airrag tiongota e Paran. 
Numbers10:13 Nedumunye ninche aaidur te nkata e dukuya te nkitanapata o Laitoriani naimua Musa. 
Numbers10:14 Ilng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Yuda etang'asaki aaun too ntukusi enye, naa Nashon olayioni le Aminadab olarikoni lenye." 
Numbers10:15 Ore apa olarikoni lo losho loo ltung'ana le Isaakar naa Natanel olayioni le Suar. 
Numbers10:16 Ore apa olarikoni lo losho loo ltung'ana le Sebulon naa Eliab olayioni le Helon. 
Numbers10:17 Naa ore apa te nedotuni olng'obor le ntumo, naa ilayiok le Gershon o layiok le Merari laa ninche apa oonap ilo ng'obor le Nkai, nedumunye aaidur." 
Numbers10:18 Neitoki asuj olturrur loo lng'oborri le Ruben too ntukusi enye, ore olarikoni lenye naa Elisuri olayioni le Shedeur." 
Numbers10:19 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo ltung'ana le Simeon naa Shelumiel olayioni le Surishadai. 
Numbers10:20 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo ltung'ana le Gad naa Eliasaf olayioni le Deuel. 
Numbers10:21 Neitoki ile Kohat aadumunye aaidur, enapita nena tokitin naasinya, neitasheyie ilo ng'obor le Nkai eton eitu ebau ninche." 
Numbers10:22 Neitoki entukus oo lng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Efraim adumunye too lturrurri lenye; ore olarikoni lenye naa Elishama olayioni le Amihud. 
Numbers10:23 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo ltung'ana le Manase naa Gamaliel olayioni le Pedasur. 
Numbers10:24 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo ltung'ana le Benchamen naa Abidan olayioni le Gideon. 
Numbers10:25 Neitoki enkereri oo lng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Dan aa ninche ootii siadi ilng'oborri pooki, aadumunye too lturrurri lenye; ore olarikoni lo lorora lenye naa Ahieser olayioni le Amishadai." 
Numbers10:26 Ore olarikoni lo lorora loo ltung'ana lo losho le Asheri naa Pagiel olayioni le Okran. 
Numbers10:27 Ore olarikoni lo lorora loo ltung'ana le Naftali naa Ahira olayioni le Enan. 
Numbers10:28 Ena apa empukunoto e lototo oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli te risioroto oo lororani lenye, te nedumunye aaidur." 
Numbers10:29 Nejoki Musa Hobab olayioni le Ruel ilo Midiani, aputani le Musa, “Eikidumunye iyiook aapuo ine wueji natejo Olaitoriani, ‘Kaisho nanu intae’ wootu te nebo iyiook, amu eikintaas iyiook intae esidai; amu eisiligie Olaitoriani Isiraeli embae sidai.”" 
Numbers10:30 Kake etiaka apa ninye, “Malo nanu; kaorori nanu alo enkop ai makewan o lorere lai.”" 
Numbers10:31 Neitoki ninye ajoki, “Aatoomono, ming'uaa iyiook, amu iyiolo enikipuo aaiko kiun ilng'oborri ti ong'ata naa eilo iyie aaku nkonyek te iyiook." 
Numbers10:32 Naa ti nilo iyie te nebo iyiook, ore pooki toki sidai naba anaa enaitaas iyiook Olaitoriani, nikintaas iyiook iyie ina ake.”" 
Numbers10:33 Neaku etudumunye apa ninche aapuo to ldoinyo le Nkai elototo oo nkolong'i uni; ore ilo sanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani nelo te dukuya ninche te ina lototo oo nkolong'i uni, pee etum aing'uraki ninche ewueji nepuo aayeng'iyeng'are." 
Numbers10:34 Netii apa enkatampoi o Laitoriani shumata ninche dama enkata ake naba anaa enadumunye ninche aaidur too lng'oborri. 
Numbers10:35 Naa ore ake enkata naba anaa enadumuni ilo sanduku aaya, nejo Musa, “Tudumunye, iyie Olaitoriani, naa nchoo ilmang'ati linono eisardak naa nchoo lelo likimba iyie eilanyisho te dukuya iyie.”" 
Numbers10:36 Naa ore ake pee eirragieki, nejo ninye, “Torrinyokinoyu iyie Olaitoriani nkalifuni iip tomon oo Siraeli.”" 
Numbers11:1 Neing'unyung'unyaki iltung'ana Olaitoriani te nkaraki enyamali enye; ore ake pee ening Olaitoriani ina neyupuyup engoro enye, nepej engoro o Laitoriani atua ninche, neinos kulie wuejitin e lelo ng'oborri." 
Numbers11:2 Neitoki iltung'ana aaishiraki Musa, neomon Musa Olaitoriani neye ina kima." 
Numbers11:3 Neaku keji apa enkarna ene wueji Tabera enkaraki natapejo enkima o Laitoriani atua ninche. 
Numbers11:4 Ore apa iltung'ana loo loreren ootii atua ninche netum kuuru oleng, neitoki sii iltung'ana loo Siraeli aaishir nejo, “Oi napaji kitum nkiri nikinos!" 
Numbers11:5 Eikidamu isinkir apa likinos te Misiri pesho, o nkaitubulu naaijo ilmalenken, o kitunkuu o mbenek naainosi, o kulie tokitin kumok;" 
Numbers11:6 kake ore taata eishunye engolon ang, nemeetae hoo ae toki meteleku ake ena manna king'or.”" 
Numbers11:7 Ore apa ina manna neikununo anaa ilanterera, kutiti; ore elioto enye naa eisikitok neibor." 
Numbers11:8 Nemanimanaa apa iltung'ana aapuo aasotu, neidong too soito ooyutuutishoreki aashu eidongito te nkidong'et neitokitokie too motioo, neitayunye imukateni; ore enkishamu enye neikununo anaa enoo mukateni naayiera te ilata." 
Numbers11:9 Te nedoiki enkoileelio ilng'oborri kewarie neitadou manna. 
Numbers11:10 Nening Musa iltung'ana eyietu aaishir too lmareita lenye, oltung'ani ake te kutukaji o lng'obor lenye; neyupuyup airowuaju engoro o Laitoriani oleng, neisinanuo Musa." 
Numbers11:11 Nejoki Musa Olaitoriani, “Kainyoo iye pee intaasa entorroni osinka lino? Naa kainyoo nanu pee eitu atum omon too nkonyek inono, neaku kinteleikia nanu olola le kulo tung'ana pooki?" 
Numbers11:12 Katoiuo nanu te nutai kulo tung'ana pooki? Kai nanu otoiuo ninche, metaa eikijoki iyie nanu, ‘Tanapa to lgoo lino, anaa enanap enkaibung'ani enkerai nanakita, aya ina kop ninosie iyie olmumai pee incho loo menye?’" 
Numbers11:13 Kaji nanu atumie nkiri naisho kulo tung'ana pooki? Amu keyietu ninche aaishir te dukuya nanu nejo, ‘Nchoo iyiook nkiri, pee kitum aainosa.’" 
Numbers11:14 Maidim nanu atanapa kulo tung'ana openy, keiroishi ele ola oleng te nanu." 
Numbers11:15 Tenaa kena kintaas nanu taaraki matua nabo kata, te nanoto omom too nkonyek inono, pee madol nanu entorroni ai.”" 
Numbers11:16 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Nturrurrokoki nanu iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana loo ilpayiani le Israel, lelo liyiolo iyie ajo ilpayiani lo lorere o larikok loo ltung'ana, nincho ninche meitasho te ine te nebo iyie." 
Numbers11:17 Naa kadou nanu alotu airorie intae te ine. Naa kaya nanu embata e ina kiyang'et natii shumata iyie napik shumata ninche; naa kenap ninche ilo ola le kulo tung'ana te nebo iyie, pee mintoki iyie anap openy." 
Numbers11:18 Nijoki iyie iltung'ana, ‘Entisinya ate taisere ninosinoso nkiri; amu nchira intae too nkiyiaa o Laitoriani, ijojo, “Kaing'ae naisho iyiook nkiri nikinya? Amu eikash apa kitii Misiri.” Ore naa keisho intae Olaitoriani nkiri, naa inosinoso intae." 
Numbers11:19 Minosinoso intae enkolong nabo, aashu nkolong'i are, aashu nkolong'i imiet, aashu nkolong'i tomon, aashu nkolong'i tikitam," 
Numbers11:20 kake olapa olulung'a, o metaba anaa neimu intae nkumeishin, nirikaka, enkaraki nitanyaita intae Olaitoriani otii te nebo intae, ninchirishiri te dukuya ninye, ijojo, Kainyoo iyiook pee kitupukutuo te nkop e Misiri?’”" 
Numbers11:21 Kake etejo Musa, “Ore kulo tung'ana latii nanu atua oobaya nkalifuni iip ile oopuo too nkejek; eji nijo iyie, ‘Kaisho nanu nkiri, pee etum aainosa olapa olulung'a!’" 
Numbers11:22 Ke nkishu o nkerrai eyieng'i te nkaraki ninche, pee eitaraposhi ninche? Arashu keisinkir pooki le naiposha eiturrurruni te nkaraki ninche, pee eitaraposhi ninche?”" 
Numbers11:23 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Keitodorropaki enkaina o Laitoriani? Ore taata idol iyie tenaa kesipayu ororei lai te iyie aashu mesipayu.”" 
Numbers11:24 Neaku eipang'a apa Musa alo ajoki iltung'ana ilomon lo Laitoriani; neiturrur ninye iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana loo lpayiani loo ltung'ana, neitaman ninche olng'obor." 
Numbers11:25 Nelotu Olaitoriani te nkatampoi airorie ninye, neya embata e ina kiyang'et natii shumata ninye nepik shumata lelo payiani ntomoni naapishana; ore pee eirrag ina kiyang'et te shumata ninche, neibonisho ninche. Kake eitu eitoki aaiko neijia." 
Numbers11:26 Neing'uari apa iltung'ana oare too lng'oborri, neji obo Eldad ore o likae neji Medad, netonie enkiyang'et ninche; neaku ninche te nebo lelo ooigeroki kake eitu ninche eipang aapuo ilo ng'obor, neaku eibonishote ninche ti atua ilo ng'obor." 
Numbers11:27 Nekuet olbarnoti obo alo ajoki Musa, “Eibonisho Eldad o Medad to lng'obor.”" 
Numbers11:28 Ore Yoshua olayioni le Nuni, ilo aisiaayiani le Musa, obo le lelo tung'ana oogeluno, nejo, “Olkitok lai Musa, tomitiki ninche.”" 
Numbers11:29 Kake etiaka Musa ninye, “Iata iyie olom te nkaraki nanu? Oo napaji tenaa ore iltung'ana pooki lo Laitoriani, naa loibonok, naaji te nepik Olaitoriani enkiyang'et enye shumata ninche.”" 
Numbers11:30 Nerrinyo Musa o lpayiani le Israel aapuo ilng'oborri. 
Numbers11:31 Nedumunye olkutati oing'uaa Olaitoriani, neyau nkurleen aitung'uaa enkalo e naiposha, neisho ninche edou te mbata oo lng'oborri, eneba anaa elototo e nkolong nabo tena shoto o elototo e nkolong nabo te nkae shoto, te manaroto oo lng'oborri, naa eneba anaa intemat are e nkaina eirrag ti oriong enkop." 
Numbers11:32 Nedumunye iltung'ana ina olong pooki, o enkewarie pooki, o ina olong pooki natusujua nesotu nkurleen, ore olotasotuo nkuti naa nkikapuni tomon, neisalaashaki ninche ate aaitaman ilng'oborri." 
Numbers11:33 Ore ina kata eton etii nena kiri irishat oo lala lenye eton eitu einos aamut, neyupuyupoki engoro o Laitoriani iltung'ana, near Olaitoriani olorere to lmeitai kitok." 
Numbers11:34 Neaku etejoki apa enkarna e ine wueji Kibrot-hatafa. Enkaraki naa te ine apa etunukayioki lelo tung'ana lo lorok. 
Numbers11:35 Nedumunye iltung'ana te Kibrot-hatafa nepuo Haserot nebik ninche te Haserot. 
Numbers12:1 Etukurra Miriam o Aron Musa te nkaraki ina kitok oo Lkushi nayama, amu entito oo Lkushi apa eyamua;" 
Numbers12:2 nejo ninche, “Ke Musa aa ninye ake eirorie Olaitoriani? Keitu sii ninye eirorie iyiook?” Nening Olaitoriani ina." 
Numbers12:3 Ore apa ilo tung'ani oji Musa naa oltung'ani obor oleng alang iltung'ana pooki ootii oriong enkop. 
Numbers12:4 Ore nabo kata nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron o Miriam, “Entupuku wootu, intae pokira uni atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo.” Neipang'u pokira uni aapuonu." 
Numbers12:5 Nedou Olaitoriani alotu kop te ng'ape neitashe te kutukaji o lng'obor, neipot Aron o Miriam, nepuonu pokira are dukuya." 
Numbers12:6 Nejoki ninye, “Entoning irorei laainei: Tenaa ketii oloiboni atua intae, ore nanu Olaitoriani makewan naitayiolo kewan ai ninye te nduata nairorie ninye te nkidetidet." 
Numbers12:7 Mme neijia to sinka lai Musa; ninye eishooki enkaji ai pooki. 
Numbers12:8 Ore ninye kairorie nanu kiwalikino too nkutukie, te nkibalakinoto, neme te nkiroroto misil; naa keing'or ninye eneikununo Olaitoriani. Kainyoo naa pee miurere intae aatukur ilo sinka lai Musa?”" 
Numbers12:9 Neyupuyup engoro o Laitoriani ti alo ninche, nelo aing'uaa;" 
Numbers12:10 ore ake pee eiwuang ina atampoi te shumata ilo ng'obor, ng'ura, nejing Miriam enkeeya oo lbolot naibor anaa enturoto. Neibelekenya Aron aing'or Miriam, naa ng'ura, etijing'a ninye enkeeya oo lbolot." 
Numbers12:11 Nejoki Aron Musa, “Oi lo kitok lai, mintame iyiook amu kitaasa iyiook te modai, nikitaasa eng'oki." 
Numbers12:12 Mincho ninye etiu anaa enatua, naidaa nkiri o sesen apa pee eiu ng'otonye.”" 
Numbers12:13 Neishiraki Musa Olaitoriani, ejo, “Nchiunye ninye, Na Ai, aatasayia.”" 
Numbers12:14 Kake etiaka Olaitoriani Musa, “Amaa naaji tenaa ketonotaka menye miriam enkomom enye, aimekurru ninye nkolong'i naapishana? Nchoo ninye eikenori ti auluo ilng'oborri nkolong'i naapishana, ore te siadi ina neidimi aanyaaki aaitijing'u.”" 
Numbers12:15 Neaku eikenoyioki apa Miriam ti auluo ilng'oborri nkolong'i naapishana, neitu edumunye iltung'ana aapuo o metaba anaa neitokini aaitijing'u Miriam." 
Numbers12:16 Ore te siadi ina nedumunye iltung'ana aapuo te Haserot nepuo aaun ilng'oborri ti ong'ata e Paran. 
Numbers13:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Irriwai iltung'ana meshomo aaikitalan ina kop e Kanaan, naisho nanu iltung'ana loo Siraeli;" 
Numbers13:2 ore ake te pooki osho loo loo menye irriwai oltung'ani, ore ake oltung'ani naa olarikoni ti atua ninche.”" 
Numbers13:3 Neaku eirriwayie apa Musa ninche ti ong'ata e Paran, te risioroto e nkitanapata o Laitoriani, o lelo tung'ana pooki aa lukuny oo ltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers13:4 Naa kuna apa nkarn enye: Ore to losho le Ruben naa Shamua olayioni le Sakuri; 
Numbers13:5 ore to losho le Simeon naa Shafat olayioni le Hor; 
Numbers13:6 ore to losho le Yuda, naa Kalebu olayioni le Yefune;" 
Numbers13:7 ore to losho le Isaakar naa Igal olayioni le Yosef; 
Numbers13:8 ore to losho le Efraim naa Hoshea olayioni le Nuni; 
Numbers13:9 ore to losho le Benchamen, naa Palti olayioni le Rafu," 
Numbers13:10 ore to losho le Sebulon, naa Gadiel olayioni le Sodi;" 
Numbers13:11 ore to losho le Yosef aa taa to losho olayioni le Manase, naa Gad olayioni le Susi;" 
Numbers13:12 ore to losho le Dan naa Amiel olayioni le Gemali; 
Numbers13:13 ore to losho le Asheri naa Setur olayioni le Mikael; 
Numbers13:14 ore to losho le Naftali na Nahabi olayioni le Fopsi; 
Numbers13:15 ore to losho le Gad naa Geuel olayioni le Maki. 
Numbers13:16 Kuna apa nkarn e lelo tung'ana ooirriwayie Musa meshomo aaikitalan ina kop. Neisho apa Musa Hoshea olayioni le Nuni enkarna, nejo Yoshua." 
Numbers13:17 Neirriwaa apa Musa ninche meshomo aaikitalan ina kop e Kanaan, nejoki ninche, “Elepa enchom Negeb te idie, nilepilepe aapuo ina kop oo ldoinyo," 
Numbers13:18 nidolidolo aajo kaji eikununo ina kop, tenaa kegol iltung'ana oomanya aashu tenaa keshal," 
Numbers13:19 aashu tenaa ae kuti anaa aikumok o aashu sii tenaa eisidai ina kop namanya ninche anaa torrono, o aashu sii tenaa ore nena anas naamanya ninche naa ilng'oborri tenaa isempewueti," 
Numbers13:20 o nchere eikarsis enkop tenaa kaaisinani, ketii ilkeek anaa metii. Entagoluoto, niyauu embata oo lng'anayio le ina kop.” Ore apa ina kata naa erishata oo sabibu le dukuya ooto." 
Numbers13:21 Neaku etudumunye apa ninche aapuo aaikitalan enkop ebaiki ong'ata e Sin o metabaiki Rehob; embata e nejing'ieki Hamat; 
Numbers13:22 nepuo apa ninche Negeb, neitoki aapuonu Hebron; o Ahiman, o Sheshai, o Talmai, ore apa lelo le ishoi e Anak naa ine etii. (Eteshetaki apa Hebron ilarin oopishana te dukuya Soan te Misiri.)" 
Numbers13:23 Neitoki ninche aapuonu oerata le Eshkol, nedung'u ninche te ine olng'osila otii enkimarrimarrati nabo oo sabibu, nenap iltung'ana oare te nchata; eyautua sii ilng'anayio ooji kukumanka o lng'abolo." 
Numbers13:24 Keji apa ine wueji oerata le Eshkol, te nkaraki ina kimarrimarrati natudung'utuo iltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers13:25 Ore te siadi nkolong'i artam neshukunye ninche eing'uaa ina kitalanare e ina kop. 
Numbers13:26 Nepuonu ninche enetii Musa o Aron o ina umata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel ti ong'ata e Paran, te Kadesh; neyaki ninche olomoni o ina umata pooki, neitodol ninche ilng'anayio le ina kop." 
Numbers13:27 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Kitabaitie iyiook ina kop apa nirriwayie iyiook; keruko kule o naishi, naa kulo ilng'anayio lenyena." 
Numbers13:28 Kake ore eyia kegol iltung'ana oomanya ina kop, naa kesheta nkanas enye nelala oleng; ore te nebo ina kitoduaa eishoi e Anak te ine." 
Numbers13:29 Ore Ilmaleki nemanya enkop e Negeb, ore ile Hiti o Iyebusi o le Amori nemanya ina kop oo ndoinyo, netii ile Kanaan embata e naiposha, olkeju le Yordan.”" 
Numbers13:30 Kake eitigira apa Kalebu olorere te dukuya Musa, nejo ninye “Mailepa iyiook aapuo nabo kata, pee kipuo aamany, amu eikindim iyiook aaibung'a ina kop.”" 
Numbers13:31 Ore apa lelo tung'ana ooshomo te nebo ninye nejo, “Mikindim iyiook aashom aairisha ilo orere; amu kegol ninche aalang iyiook.”" 
Numbers13:32 Neaku eyakitia apa ninche iltung'ana le Israel olomoni torrono le ina kop nashomo aaikitalan, ejo, “Ore ina kop nikishomo iyiook aaikitalan naa enkop nainos lelo oomanya, ore lelo tung'ana pooki likitoduaa te ina kop naa adoru naa iltung'ana sapuki oleng." 
Numbers13:33 Ore teine nikitoduaa ile Nefilim, (lelo ayiok le Anak apa ooing'uaa Nefilim,) nikitiu iyiook anaa ntargeet, neijia iyiook kitotiutuo te ninche.”" 
Numbers14:1 Neyietu ina umata pooki aishir, neishir iltung'ana ina kewarie." 
Numbers14:2 Ore iltung'ana pooki le Israel neing'unyung'unyaki Musa o Aron; nejoki ina umata pooki ninche, “Aimeikash apa tenaa ekituata te nkop e Misiri arashu tenaa eikituata tena ong'ata!" 
Numbers14:3 Kainyoo pee eyaua iyiook Olaitoriani ena kop, pee kipuonu aabatata to lalem? Ore nkituaak ang o nkera ang naa keaku inaari metuata; aimeikash naaji te iyiook te nikirrinyo aapuo Misiri?”" 
Numbers14:4 Nejokino ninche maate, “Mategelu iyiook olarikoni pee kirrinyo aapuo Misiri.”" 
Numbers14:5 Neitoki Musa o Aron aabatata too nkomomi te dukuya ina umata e ilo turrur loo ltung'ana le Israel. 
Numbers14:6 Ore Yoshua olayioni le Nuni o Kalebu olayioni le Yefune apa ootii te nebo lelo ooshomo aaikitalan enkop, nepolos ilkilani lenye," 
Numbers14:7 nejoki ina umata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel, “Ore ina kop nikishomo iyiook aaikitalan naa enkop sidai oleng." 
Numbers14:8 Tenaa keshipakino iyiook Olaitoriani, naa keyau iyiook atua ena kop neisho iyiook, ena kop naruko kule o naishi." 
Numbers14:9 Emigolong'aki ake duoo intae Olaitoriani; nimiureyuyu lelo tung'ana le ina kop, amu emukate ninche te iyiook; eiwuang'ie olchurie lenye aaitung'uaa ninche netii Olaitoriani te nebo iyiook; emiureyu ninche.”" 
Numbers14:10 Kake etejo olturrur pooki pee enang ninche too soito. Nelioyu enkitoo o Laitoriani to lng'obor le ntumo too ltung'ana pooki le Israel. 
Numbers14:11 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Kaamenu akenya kulo tung'ana o anu? Ketoni ninche eitu aairuk nanu o anu, aasita kuna kitoduaat pooki nataasa nanu ti atua ninche?" 
Numbers14:12 Kaosh nanu ninche to lmeitai nemaitujung ninche, naa kaitayu nanu te iyie olosho kitok naa magilani alang ninche.”" 
Numbers14:13 Kake etiaka Musa Olaitoriani, “Ekening naa ile Misiri ina, amu intubulua iyie ele orere te ngolon ino aitung'uaa ile Misiri," 
Numbers14:14 naa kepuo ninche aaliki kulo oomanya ena kop. Etoning'o apa ninche nchere, ore iyie Olaitoriani itii atua ele orere; amu ore iyie Olaitoriani nitoduare ninche too nkonyek, neitashe enkatampoi ino te shumata ninche nilo iyie te dukuya ninche, te ng'ape e nkatampoi dama o te ng'ape e nkima kewarie." 
Numbers14:15 Ore taata te niar ele orere metuata anaa oltung'ani obo, ore apa lelo oshon ootoning'o enkaisisa ino nejo," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Enkaraki nemeidim Olaitoriani ayau ele orere atua ina kop nainosie olmumai pee eisho ninche, neaku etara ninche metuata ti ong'ata.’" 
Numbers14:17 Ore naa taata, aatoomono nanu, nchoo engolon o Laitoriani eaku kitok anaa apa enisiligie ninche, ijo," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Mesioki Olaitoriani agoro, neton ninye te nyorrata nauno, nepalaki iltung'ana te ntorroni o te ngolon e nkong'u, kake meeta ninye nchere pee eiwuang'ie eng'oki eitu eitabaiki entorroni oo loo menye shumata nkera enye, shumata e ishoi e uni o shumata eishoi e ong'uan.’" 
Numbers14:19 Tapalaki entorroni e tung'ana, aatoomono nanu iyie, te risioroto e nkitoo e nyorrata ino, o te risioroto e mpalikinoto ino nitapalaka iyie ele orere, ebaiki apa te Misiri o taata.”" 
Numbers14:20 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajo, “Atapalaka nanu ninche te risioroto o rorei lino;" 
Numbers14:21 kake esipa ore anaa enaishu nanu, o anaa sii enabore enkop pooki enkitoo enkisisa o Laitoriani," 
Numbers14:22 meetae obo le kulo tung'ana ootoduaa enkitoo enkisisa ai o nkitoduaat aainei nataasa te Misiri o tiongota ore ake sii atetema kuna katitin tomon, neitu ening oltoilo lai" 
Numbers14:23 olo adol ina kop apa nainosie nanu olmumai pee aisho loo menye; nemeetae obo le lelo laatemenaitie nanu olo adol ina kop. 
Numbers14:24 Kake ore osinka lai Kalebu, enkaraki naata ninye oltau opaashaa naatusuja ninye nanu tukul, kayau nanu ninye atua ina kop apa nashomo," 
Numbers14:25 ore eishoi enye naa kepuo aaya ina kop. Ore taata amu emanya Ilmaleki o le Kanaan iyerat, tayooki mbelekenyayu shomo ong'ata aim enkoitoi Enaiposha Nanyokie.”" 
Numbers14:26 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa o Aron," 
Numbers14:27 “Kaaing'unyung'unyaki akenya ena umata torrono o anu? Atoning'o nanu enking'unyung'uny oo ltung'ana le Israel aaing'unyung'unyaki nanu. 
Numbers14:28 Tiaaki ninche, ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani ojo, ‘Ore ina nitejo intae too nkiyiaa aainei kaitaas nanu intae." 
Numbers14:29 Ore mpopoki inyi kepuo aairragaa tena ong'ata, ore te siana inyi pooki ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, le lelo laaing'unyung'unyakitia nanu," 
Numbers14:30 meetae obo olo atua ina kop apa nainosie olmumai nchere kaisho intae entamany, meteleku ake Kalebu olayioni le Yefune o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni." 
Numbers14:31 Kake ore nena kera inyi apa nitejo kearari kaitijing nanu ina kop, naa kepuo ninche aayiolou ina kop apa nitemenaitie." 
Numbers14:32 Kake ore intae keiput mpopoki inyi ena ong'ata. 
Numbers14:33 Naa keaku nkera inyi ilchekuti loo ntare to lpurkel ilarin artam netum ninche osina te nkaraki nimisiligayuyu o metaba anaa neirrag mpopoki olobayie linyi tiongata. 
Numbers14:34 Te risioroto e siana oo nkolong'i apa nikinkitalana enkop, nkolong'i artam, te nkolong ake to lari, inapinapa intae entorroni inyi, ilarin artam, naa ipuopuo intae aayiolou engoro ai.’" 
Numbers14:35 Nanu, Olaitoriani oiroro; esipa ena nanu ayooki aitaas ele turrur torrono pooki laaiturrurrokine nanu: ore tena ongota naa kepuonu ninche enkiting'oto enye tukul, naa te ine epuo aaye.”" 
Numbers14:36 Ore lelo tung'ana apa ooirriwayie Musa meikitalana ina kop, lelo apa ootushukunye neisho olturrur meing'unyung'unyaki ninye neyau olkilikuai torrono ina kop," 
Numbers14:37 lelo tung'ana apa ooyautua olkilikuai torrono le ina kop, neye ninche to lmeitai te dukuya o Laitoriani." 
Numbers14:38 Kake ore Yoshua olayioni le Nuni o Kalebu olayioni le Yefune neitu eye, te nebo lelo tung'ana apa ooshomo aaikitalan enkop." 
Numbers14:39 Nejoki Musa kulo rorei iltung'ana pooki le Israel neishir iltung'ana eisinanuo oleng. 
Numbers14:40 Neyooki ninche aainyototo tadekenya oleng nepuo eneika e ina kop oo ldoinyo ejo, “Ng'ura kitii iyiook ene, eikilep iyiook aapuo ine wueji apa neisiligie Olaitoriani iyiook; amu kitaasa iyiook eng'oki.”" 
Numbers14:41 Kake etejo Musa, “Kainyoo naa taata pee igolong'akiki intae enkitanapata o Laitoriani, amu melo dukuya intae?" 
Numbers14:42 Milepilepe intae aapuo, pee meari intae aairragie te dukuya ilmang'ati linyi, amu metii Olaitoriani te nebo intae." 
Numbers14:43 Amu ore te idie netii Ilmaleki o le Kanaan dukuya intae, naa ipuopuo intae aabatata to lalem, enkaraki nimbelekenyate intae aaing'uaa esujata o Laitoriani, meitoki Olaitoriani atii te nebo intae.”" 
Numbers14:44 Kake eshomo ake duoo ninche eneika te ina kop oo ldoinyo, hoo neitu eipang osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani, o Musa aaing'uaa ilng'oborri." 
Numbers14:45 Neitoki Ilmaleki o Lkanaan apa oomanya ina kop oo ldoinyo aadou aapuonu, nemir ninche, nesujaa ninche, o metabaiki Horma." 
Numbers15:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel," 
Numbers15:2 Ti nipuonunu akenya ina kop nipuopuo aamany," 
Numbers15:3 ina naisho nanu intae, ninchosho Olaitoriani nkishorot naaing'uaa eluata oo nkishu, aashu enoo ntare, olasar le nkima aashu olasar opejori, aashu olasar ake duo, pee intabayaya ilo mumai aashu olasar lo lpela, aashu too lasarri linyi ootegeluaki pee intobirakiki esong'ouna narropil Olaitoriani," 
Numbers15:4 ore naa ilo oyau nkishorot enyena neisho sii Olaitoriani olasar le ntapa le matua e tomon e ntapa napuyiapui eipurjaki te rubata e ong'uan e ilata," 
Numbers15:5 o enaisho te nkaraki olasar ooki, ore erubata e ong'uan nintobir te nebo olasar opejori, aashu te nkaraki olasar, to lkuo ake le ker." 
Numbers15:6 Aashu ore to lmeregesh nintobir to lasar le ntapa intemat are e matua e tomon e efa e ntapa napuyiapui naipurja too mboreitin uni e ilata," 
Numbers15:7 naa ore to lasar ooki nintayu mboreitin uni e naisho pee eaku olng'usil orropil to Laitoriani. 
Numbers15:8 Naa ti nintobir oloing'oni pee eaku olasar opejori, aashu olasar, pee intabaya olmumai, aashu olasar le seriani to Laitoriani," 
Numbers15:9 neitayu ake oltung'ani te nebo ilo oing'oni olasar le ntapa loo mboreitin uni e matua e tomon e efa entapa napuyiapui, naipurjaki te ilata naitorit empirbil." 
Numbers15:10 Ninchooyo to lasar ooki empirbil naitorit e naisho oo sabibu pee eaku olasar le nkima, olng'usil orropil to Laitoriani." 
Numbers15:11 Neijia epuoi aaiko te pooki oing'oni aashu to lmeregesh, aashu te pooki sitima le ker aashu to le kine," 
Numbers15:12 ore te risioroto e ina siana nintobiriri, naa neijia enkuna te pooki ng'ae te risioroto e siana enye." 
Numbers15:13 Ore lelo pooki inot linyi nchoo eas kuna baa tena oitoi, aaishooyo olasar le nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani." 
Numbers15:14 Naa te neewuo oltung'ani leiking'a amanyisho te nebo intae, aashu te netii likae tung'ani atua intae too ishoritin inyi, neyieu ninye neishoru olasar opejori, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani, nchoo ninye eas anaa eniasiasa." 
Numbers15:15 Amu ore te umata naa keaku enkitanapata nabo ake, te intae o to lomoni otii te nebo intae, enkitanapata nabikoo ti atua iishoritin inyi pooki, ore anaa enitiuu naa neijia etiu ilo omoni te dukuya o Laitoriani." 
Numbers15:16 Keaku enkitanapata nabo o enkikoo nabo te iyie o te ilo omoni omanyisho te nebo intae.” 
Numbers15:17 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers15:18 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel, te nipuonunu atua ina kop nayau nanu intae," 
Numbers15:19 naa ore ake pee inosinoso endaa e ina kop, nintarasakiki Olaitoriani enkishoroto." 
Numbers15:20 Ore ina tapa inyi e nkiterata ninchooyoyo emukate naaku olasar; ore anaa olasar oing'uaa osoit oituutishoreki, ninchooyoyo." 
Numbers15:21 Ore ilo asar linyi le ntapa enkiterata enchorie Olaitoriani olasar tiatua iishoritin inyi pooki. 
Numbers15:22 “Kake ti ntarruoo nimimbung'ubung'u kuna kitanapat naairoro Olaitoriani aimunye Musa," 
Numbers15:23 ebaiki ina olong apa naishorua Olaitoriani nkitanapat neito dukuya ti atua iishoritin inyi pooki," 
Numbers15:24 kake te neitadiaki te nkaraki meyiolo eumata neitayu naa ina umata pooki oloti oing'oni oaku olasar opejori, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani, te nebo olasar lenye le ntapa o lasar lenye ooki te risioroto e nkitanapata, o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki." 
Numbers15:25 Neitobir olapolosani olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ina umata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel, naa kepalakini ninye, amu enkitapong'oto apake, neyautua ninche olasar lenye, ilo asar le nkima oishori Olaitoriani, neyau ilo asar lenye le ng'oki dukuya Olaitoriani, te nkaraki ina kitarruoroto enye." 
Numbers15:26 Ore ina umata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel naa kepalakini o ilo omoni otii te nebo ninche, amu etijing'a apa ilo orere pooki ina kitarruoroto." 
Numbers15:27 “Te neas oltung'ani eng'oki eitu eotiki, neitayu ninye esupen e kine o lari obo naaku olasar le ng'oki." 
Numbers15:28 Neitobir olopolosani osotua lo lning'o te dukuya o Laitoriani te nkaraki ilo tung'ani otaasa enkitarruoroto, teneas ninye eng'oki eitu eotiki, naa kepalakini ninye." 
Numbers15:29 Nchoo eaku enkitanapata nabo iata te ilo oas pooki toki eitu eotiki, o te ilo ora oinoti le Israel o te ilo omoni otamanyishe ti atua intae." 
Numbers15:30 Kake ore ilo tung'ani oas pooki toki te otikinoto, aa oinoti aasho olomoni neinyala Olaitoriani, ore ilo tung'ani naa keiwuang'ieki aaitung'uaa iltung'ana lenye." 
Numbers15:31 Enkaraki natemenayie ninye ororei lo Laitoriani, netigila enkitanapata enye, ore ilo tung'ani keiwuang'ieki tukul, ore eng'oki enye naa keaku shumata ninye.”" 
Numbers15:32 Ore apa eton etii iltung'ana le Israel olpurkel netum ninche oltung'ani osotu ilkeek te nkolong' e sabato. 
Numbers15:33 Ore apa lelo oonoto ninye esotu ilkeek, neyau ninye enetii Musa o Aron, o ilo turrur pooki." 
Numbers15:34 Neikenori ninye, amu eitu apa eibalunyeki enaitaasi ninye." 
Numbers15:35 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Keari ilo tung'ani metua; naa kenang' ilo turrur pooki ninye too soito o metua ti auluo ilng'oborri.”" 
Numbers15:36 Neyau ilo turrur pooki ninye auluo nenang' ninye o metua too soito, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers15:38 “Irorie iltung'ana le Israel nintanap ninche pee epik ilkisialisal ilcholo loo lkilani lenye ti atua iishoritin enye pooki ore ake olkisialisialati le pooki sholoi enkeene pus; 
Numbers15:39 naa keaku te iyie olkisialisialati oing'or nedamuni nkitanapat pooki o Laitoriani, pee easi ninche, mme pee isujaa oltau lino makewan o nkonyek inono makewan." 
Numbers15:40 Neaku entadamu niasiasa nkitanapat aainei pooki niakuku sinyat to Laitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Numbers15:41 Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, ilo apa likintayio iyie aitupuku te nkop e Misiri, pee aaku Enkai inyi. Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi.”" 
Numbers16:1 Ore apa Kora olayioni le Ishar, olayioni le Kohat olayioni le Lawi, o Datan o Abiram ilayiok le Eliabu, o Oni olayioni le Pelet, olayioni le Ruben," 
Numbers16:2 neya iltung'ana, nedumunye ninche te dukuya Musa, te nebo esiana oo ltung'ana le Israel iltung'ana iip are o onom arikok le ilo turrur ootegeluaki te ina umata, iltung'ana yiolot oleng;" 
Numbers16:3 neiturrurro ninche maate te nebo aarare Musa o Aron, nejoki ninche, “Ishomo intae aalus! Amu ore ele turrur pooki kesinya, pooki ng'ae lenye, netii Olaitoriani atua ninche; kainyoo naa pee ilepiepie intae ate aaitulus te umata o Laitoriani?”" 
Numbers16:4 Ore ake pee ening' Musa ena, nebatata ninye te nkomom enye;" 
Numbers16:5 nejoki ninye Kora o ina sholiek enye pooki, “Ore tadekenya keyooki Olaitoriani aitodolu ajo kalo olenye, naa kalo osinya, neisho meeu anyikaki ninye, ore ilo olo ninye agelu naa keisho meeu anyikaki ninye." 
Numbers16:6 Taasa iyie ena, ewaita eng'irra e nkima, Kora o encholiek enye pooki," 
Numbers16:7 entipik enkima atua ninche nipikipiki enkorropil shumata ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani taisere, ore ilo tung'ani oyooki Olaitoriani agelu neaku ilo sinyati. Ishomo aaitulus ilayiok le Lawi!”" 
Numbers16:8 Nejoki Musa Kora, “Entoning' taata, intae ilayiok le Lawi!" 
Numbers16:9 Kentoki kiti ena te intae nchere etegelayie intae Enkai oo Siraeli aitung'uaa olturrur le Israel, pee eitataaniki intae kewan, pee iasiasa enkisiaayiare te ilo ng'obor lo Laitoriani, nintasheshe te dukuya olturrur aaisiaai ninche;" 
Numbers16:10 amaa amu kiyaua ninye aitinyikaki kewan, o lalashera linono lelo ayiok le Lawi te nebo iyie, ing'oruru sii intae empolosare?" 
Numbers16:11 Ore naa meitiship Olaitoriani ena nchere ore iyie o encholiek ino pooki inturrurrote te nebo; Kainyoo pee ing'unyung'unyakiki Aron?” 
Numbers16:12 Neirriwaa Musa olkilikuai aipotu Datan o Abiram lelo ayiok le Eliab; nejo ninche, “Mikipuonu iyiook." 
Numbers16:13 Kembae kiti ena nchere iyaua iyiook ailepunye te ina kop naruko kule o naishi pee ilotu aar iyiook matuata tiong'ota, pee itumoki sii aitaa kewan kitok te shumata iyiook?" 
Numbers16:14 Ore ninye eitu iyie iyau iyiook ina kop naruko kule o naishi, neitu incho iyiook enjung'ore e nkop o nkurman oo lng'anayio. Ikurtu iyie nkonyek e kulo tung'ana? Mikipuonu iyiook.”" 
Numbers16:15 Negoro apa Musa oleng', nejoki Olaitoriani, “Mishilaa iyie olasar lenye. Eitu ninye nanu aya osikiria lenye neitu ainyal obo lenye.”" 
Numbers16:16 Nejoki Musa Kora, “Wou taisere dukuya Olaitoriani, iyie o encholiek ino, o Aron." 
Numbers16:17 Naa inchoo ake oltung'ani eya eng'irra enye oo nkuk o lasar, nepik enkorropil shumata ninye, neyau ake pooki ng'ae te intae dukuya Olaitoriani eng'irra enye, ngirran iip are o onom; ore sii iyie o Aron neyau ake oltung'ani eng'irra enye.”" 
Numbers16:18 Neaku ewa apa oltung'ani ake eng'irra enye, nepik nkimaitie atua neiteleiki enkorropil shumata, neitashe te kutuk aji ilo ng'obor le ntumo te nebo Musa o Aron." 
Numbers16:19 Neitoki Kora aiturrur ilo turrur pooki aipirakinye ninche kutukaji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo. Neliooyu enkitoo enkisisa o Laitoriani teina umata pooki. 
Numbers16:20 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa o Aron," 
Numbers16:21 “Entoor ate ewuang'a tena umata, pee atum nanu aidaikie ninche nabo kata.”" 
Numbers16:22 Nebatata ninche too nkomomi enye, nejo, “Na Ai, na Ai ooltauja le pooki naishu, keas oltung'ani obo eng'oki nigorokino eumata pooki?”" 
Numbers16:23 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers16:24 “Tiaki ena umata, ‘Ewuang'a tena manyisho e Kora o Datan o Abiram.’ ”" 
Numbers16:25 Neitoki Musa adumunye alo enetii Datan o Abiram; nesujaa ilpayiani le Israel ninye. 
Numbers16:26 Nejoki ninye ina umata, “Ewuang'a, atoomono intae enchom, entung'uai ilng'oborri le kulo tung'ana arruok, nimimbung'ubung'u hoo ae toki enye pooki pee memuti ake intae tenebo nena ng'ok enye pooki.”" 
Numbers16:27 Neaku eipang'a apa ninche aaing'uaa emanyisho e Kora, o Datan o Abiram; neipang'u Datan o Abiram nepuonu aaitashe te kutukaji oo lng'oborri lenye, te nebo nkituaak enye, o layiok lenye, o nkera enye kutiti." 
Numbers16:28 Nejo Musa “Tena taa iyiolouu nchere Olaitoriani laairriua mataasa kuna siaitin pooki neme te nkaraki kewan ai. 
Numbers16:29 Te neye kulo tung'ana enkeeya e oshiake oo ltung'ana pooki aashu te neinepu entaboi oo ltung'ana pooki, neaku naa eitu aairriu Olaitoriani." 
Numbers16:30 Kake te neitobiru Olaitoriani entoki ng'ejuk, nebol enkop enkutuk enye, neijoo ninche tenebo imasaa enye pooki aapuo enemeneng'a aishu, niyiolouu taa nchere Olaitoriani etemenaitie kulo tung'ana.”" 
Numbers16:31 Ore enaidipie airoro kulo rorei pooki ore enkop ti abori ninche neiperra; nebol enkop enkutuk enye 
Numbers16:32 neijoo ninche, o lmareita lenye, o lelo tung'ana pooki le Kora o masaa enye." 
Numbers16:33 Neaku ore ninche o nena pooki naara nkunenye nedoyio eishu aapuo enemeneng'a neikeno enkop te shumata ninche, neidak ninche te mpolos e ina umata." 
Numbers16:34 Ore lelo Siraeli pooki oomanita ninche, neisik to lkiyioi lenye, amu etejo ninche, “Eji pee meijoo iyiook enkop.”" 
Numbers16:35 Nedou enkima naing'uaa Olaitoriani, nemut lelo tung'ana iip are o onom apa oopejito enkorropil." 
Numbers16:36 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers16:37 “Tiaki Eliesa olayioni le Aron ilo apolosani, pee eitayu nena girran naapejieki enkorropil te nkima; neitalamaa enkima neidapashaa. Amu kesinya ninche." 
Numbers16:38 Ore nena girran e kulo tung'ana ootaasa eng'oki aainosie enkishui enye, nchoo ninche eidong'unyeki ngirran naaiteleikini olasar, amu eishorutua apa ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani; metaa kesinya ninche. Neaku kepuo ninche aaku enkitanyaanyukoto too ltung'ana le Israel.”" 
Numbers16:39 Neaku ewa apa Eliesa ilo apolosani nena girran o suyai, apa naaishorutua lelo ootapejoyioki, neidong'i aaitaa entoki naimulumulieki olperere lo lasar," 
Numbers16:40 pee eaku enkitadamunoto too ltung'ana le Israel pee metii hoo obo leme olapolosani, leme olayioni le ishoi e Aron, onyiku alotu apej enkorropil te dukuya Olaitoriani, metiu ake anaa Kora o encholiek enye - anaa apa enatiaka Olaitoriani Eliesa aimunye Musa." 
Numbers16:41 Ore pee ekenyu neing'unyung'unyaki eumata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel Musa o Aron, ejo, “Itaara intae metuata iltung'ana lo Laitoriani.”" 
Numbers16:42 Ore ake pee eiturrurrokino ina umata Musa o Aron, neibelekenya ninche aaing'or olng'obor le ntumo; naa ng'ura, neimulumul enkatampoi ilo ng'obor, neliooyu enkitoo enkisisa o Laitoriani." 
Numbers16:43 Nelotu Musa o Aron dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo," 
Numbers16:44 nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers16:45 “Enchom entung'uai atua umata, pee atum nanu aidaikie ninche nabo kata.” Nerriaa ninche too nkomomi." 
Numbers16:46 Nejoki Musa Aron, “Ntayu engirra ino e nkorropil, nipik enkima atua naing'uaa olperere lo lasar, nipik enkorropil shumata ninye, ninap aitasioyo ine netii eumata, nintobir olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninche; amu etupukuo engoro naing'uaa Olaitoriani, neiterua alotu o olmeitai.”" 
Numbers16:47 Kaae neyau Aron anaa enatiaka Musa nekuet alo empolos eumata naa ng'ura, eidipa aiteru olmeitai ti atua iltung'ana; neinok ninye enkorropil, neitobir olning'o lo sotua o ltung'ana." 
Numbers16:48 Neitashe ninye te rishata oo loo tuata o looishu; neishieki olmeitai. 
Numbers16:49 Ore apa lelo ootuata to lmeitai naa nkalifuni tomon oong'uan o iip naapishana, metii lekua ootuata te siaai e Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Nerrinyokino Aron Musa te kutuk aji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo, ina kata pee eish olmeitai." 
Numbers17:1 Neirorie Olaitoriani Musa nejoki," 
Numbers17:2 “Irorie iltung'ana le Israel, niyau te ninche ing'udisin, nabo ake te nkaji oo loo menye, niyau too larikok pooki te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye, ing'udisin tomon oare. Ng'ero ake enkarna o ltung'ani te ng'udi enye" 
Numbers17:3 ninger enkarna e Aron te ng'udi e Lawi. Amu keaku keetae eng'udi nabo te ndukuya e pooki aji oo loo menye. 
Numbers17:4 Shomo tipika ninche atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, dukuya ina shakenisho, teine naalotu atumore." 
Numbers17:5 Ore eng'udi e ilo lagelu nejing nkaitubulu naisho taa meisha te nanu ina king'unyung'uny oo ltung'ana le Israel niking'unyung'unyaki ninche iyie.” 
Numbers17:6 Neirorie Musa iltung'ana le Israel neisho lelo arikok lenye pooki ninye ing'udisin, nabo ake to larikoni, ore te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye, ng'udisin tomon oare, ore eng'udi e Aron naa nabo e nena ng'udisin enye." 
Numbers17:7 Nepik Musa nena ng'udisin dukuya Olaitoriani ti atua ilo ng'obor le nchakenisho. 
Numbers17:8 Ore pee ekenyu nelo Musa atua ilo ng'obor le nchakenisho; naa ng'ura, ore eng'udi e Aron te nkaji e Lawi etijing'a nkaitubulu nejing ilng'osil neitapuku, neiu ilng'anayio ooto." 
Numbers17:9 Neyau Musa nena ng'udisin pooki aitung'uaa dukuya Olaitoriani, ayau dukuya iltung'ana pooki le Israel; neing'or neya ake oltung'ani eng'udi enye." 
Numbers17:10 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Torrinyoki eng'udi e Aron dukuya enchakenisho, pee eshumi aitaa enkitoduata too loogolong'u, pee itum aishie ina king'unyung'uny enye naaing'unyung'unyaki ninche nanu, pee meye ake.”" 
Numbers17:11 Ina etaasa Musa. Ore anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani neas ninye ina. 
Numbers17:12 Nejoki iltung'ana le Israel Musa, “Ng'ura, eikindaaya iyiook, kiisha iyiook, kiisha iyiook pooki." 
Numbers17:13 Ore pooki ng'ae olotu anyikaki olng'obor lo Laitoriani neye. Eikindaaya iyiook pooki?” 
Numbers18:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Aron, “Ore iyie o layiok linono, o enkaji e papaai lino te nebo iyie, iyaya intae entorroni ti alo ine wueji sinyati; ore iyie o layiok linono niyaya entorroni ti alo empolosare." 
Numbers18:2 Naa ore te nebo iyie toshoru sii ilalashera linono, ilo osho le Lawi, ilo osho le papaai lino, pee kitum ninche aatushulare, nikisiaai iyie ina kata itii iyie o layiok linono dukuya ilo ng'obor le nchakenisho." 
Numbers18:3 Eikisiaai ninche iyie neas enkisiaayiare pooki e ilo ng'obor; kake menyikaki ninche nena masaa e ine wueji sinyati aashu enyiku aapuonu olperere lo lasar, meye ake ninche aashu iye iyie." 
Numbers18:4 Nchoo kishulare ninche, nejing'u atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, te ina kisiaayiare pooki e ilo ng'obor; nemeetae likae tung'ani hoo obo likilotu anyikaki." 
Numbers18:5 Nijing iyie enkisiaayiare e ine wueji sinyati o enkisiaayiare o lperere lo lasar pee meitoki alotu engoro shumata iltung'ana le Israel. 
Numbers18:6 Naa ng'ura, aawa nanu ilalashera linono lelo le Lawi aitung'uaa atua iltung'ana le Israel, enkishoroto ninche te iyie, naaishooki Olaitoriani, pee eas enkisiaayiare e ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers18:7 Ore iyie o layiok linono te nebo iyie nijing'ijing'i empolosare te pooki naipirta olperere lo lasar o ina natii atua olodung'oro; nisiaisho iyie. Aaishoo nanu empolosare ino metaa enkishoroto, ore pooki ng'ae olotu anyiku neari metua.”" 
Numbers18:8 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Aron naa, “Ng'ura, aaishoo nanu iyie pooki toki naba anaa enatushumaki too nkishorot naaitakiaiki nanu, o nena tokitin pooki naaitisinyaki oo ltung'ana le Israel; aaisho nanu iyie ninche metaa erubata oo layiok linono metaa erubata enye e anaake." 
Numbers18:9 Keaku enino ina nasinya aisul naiteng'elaki neitu epejori te nkima; ore pooki kishoroto enye o lasar, o pooki asar lenye le ng'oki laaisho ninche nanu naa keaku kesinya oleng te iyie o too layiok linono." 
Numbers18:10 Te wueji nesinya oleng inosa iyie ina naa kesinya ina te iyie. 
Numbers18:11 Enino sii ena, ilo asar loo nkishorunot enye, ore lelo asarri pooki ooyuki loo ltung'ana le Israel; aaishoo nanu iyie ninche, o layiok linono o ntoyie inono te nebo iyie, metaa erubata ino e anaake. Ore pooki ng'ae le meeta entioto otii atua enkaji ino neidim ainosa." 
Numbers18:12 Ore ina ilata sidai aisul, o ina aisho pooki sidai o entapa, lelo ng'anayio le dukuya ooisho ninche Olaitoriani, aaishoo nanu iyie." 
Numbers18:13 Ore lelo ng'anayio oong'as ooku te pooki natii atua ina kop, ooyaki ninche Olaitoriani, naa keaku ilkulinyi; ore pooki ng'ae lemeeta entioto otii atua enkaji ino neidim ainosa." 
Numbers18:14 Ore pooki naiteng'elakaki Olaitoriani ti atua Siraeli naa keaku eninyi. 
Numbers18:15 Ore pooki kikau aa olayioni le tung'ani aashu olayioni le ng'ues, ilo oishori Olaitoriani naa keaku olinyi, ore ake eyia olkikau le tung'ani tokordu ainyiang'u, ore olkikau pooki le ng'ues lemesinya inyang'u tokordu." 
Numbers18:16 Ore enkinyiang'a e nkordunoto enye (aa te mbotoro o lapa obo ikordu ninche) tipika shekeli imiet e nkosholai, te risioroto e shekeli e ine wueji sinyati." 
Numbers18:17 Kake ore olkikau le nkiteng, aashu olkikau le nker aashu olkikau le nkine, mikordu ainyiang'u; kesinya ninche. Isuaaki osarge lenye shumata olperere lo lasar, nipejoo eilata enye metaa olasar opejori te nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani;" 
Numbers18:18 kake ore nkiri enye naa keaku nkuninyi, anaa ilo oikulu oyukoki o anaa ina muro enkalo e tatene naara ininono." 
Numbers18:19 Ore nena tokitin pooki naasinya naaisho iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani, aaishoo nanu iyie, o layiok linono o ntoyie inono naatii te nebo iyie, metaa erubata e anaake. O sotua le munyan ele ntarasi te dukuya Olaitoriani, te iyie o te ishoi ino natii te nebo iyie.”" 
Numbers18:20 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Aron, “Miata iyie enjung'ore ti atua enkop enye, nimiata erubata ti atua ninche; ara nanu erubata ino nara enjung'ore ino tiatua iltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers18:21 “Ore ile Lawi aishoo nanu ninche pooki ematua e tomon ti atua Siraeli metaa enjung'ore enye, pee eaku ole rrinyore te ina kisiaayiare enye naisiaisho, ore ina kisiaayiare enye netii atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers18:22 Ore naa ebaiki taata mepuonu iltung'ana le Israel aanyikaki ilo ng'obor le ntumo, menap ake ng'ok neye." 
Numbers18:23 Kake lelo le Lawi oas enkisiaayiare o ilo ng'obor le ntumo, naa kenap ninche ina ng'oki enye; keaku ena enkitanapata nadamuni ti atua iishoritin inyi pooki; ore ti atua iltung'ana le Israel meeta ninche enjung'ore." 
Numbers18:24 Amu ore ina rubata e tomon oo ltung'ana le Israel naitarasaki ninche Olaitoriani anaa olasar, aishoo nanu ile Lawi metaa enjung'ore; metaa atejo nanu ti alo ninche nchere metum enjung'ore ti atua iltung'ana loo siraeli.”" 
Numbers18:25 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers18:26 “Ore ake sii, shomo tiaaki ile Lawi, ‘Ti niyaya too ltung'ana le Israel ina matua e tomon naishoo nanu intae te ninche pee eaku enjung'ore inyi nintokiki naa sii intae aaitayu olasar te ina aaisho Olaitoriani, ematua e tomon napukunye ematua e tomon." 
Numbers18:27 Naa keikenari ilo asar linyi anaa entapa o soit oituutishoreki aashu anaa enaisho naing'uaa enkironyet. 
Numbers18:28 Neaku intarasakiki sii intae Olaitoriani olasar oing'uaa nena matuan inyi e tomon, ning'amumu too ltung'ana le Israel. Naa ore te nena ninchosho ilo asar lo Laitoriani Aron ilo apolosani." 
Numbers18:29 Ore ti atua nena kishorot inyi pooki, entarasai pooki kishoroto naipirakinore Olaitoriani, ina naisul pooki, ninchooyoyo ina naisul pooki.’" 
Numbers18:30 Metaa tiaaki iyie ninche, ‘Ti nindipidipi aaishooi ilo asar, ina naisul, ore ina naleku neikenakini ile Lawi anaa entoki naing'uaa olkurroto oidong'ishoreki anaa entoki naingua enkironyet oo sabibu;" 
Numbers18:31 nindim iyie ainosa te pooki wueji, iyie o enkaji ino, amu enkishoroto ino te nkaraki enkisiaayiare ino ti atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers18:32 Niminap iyie eng'oki te nkinosata e ina, indipa iyie aishooi enaisul kake emisarkionie nena tokitin naasinya oo ltung'ana le Israel, pee miyeye ake.’ ”" 
Numbers19:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron," 
Numbers19:2 “Ena enkitanapata naitanapishe Olaitoriani. Tiaaki iltung'ana le Israel pee kiyaki enkashe nanyokie nemeeta eleyiata nemeeta entioto neitu ae kata eenikini enchata emurt. 
Numbers19:3 Nilo aisho ina ashe Eliesa olapolosani, neipang'ieki ninye aaya auluo nepuoi aayieng te dukuya ninye." 
Numbers19:4 Ore Eliesa olapolosani neya embata o sarge le ina ashe to lkimojino lenye, neisuaki embata e ilo sarge dukuya e ilo ng'obor le ntumo katitin naapishana." 
Numbers19:5 Ore ina ashe nepejori, te dukuya ninye, nepejori olchoni lenye, o nkiri enyena, o sarge lenye nepejori sii imoyok enyena;" 
Numbers19:6 neya olapolosani nkeek o ltarakwai o mbenek e hisopo, o enkarasha nanyokie nenang'aki empolos eine nepejorieki ina ashe." 
Numbers19:7 Ore te siadi ina, neituku olapolosani ilkilani lenyena nebukoki kewan enkare, netum taa atijing'a ilng'oborri; kake keton ninye mesinya o metaa teipa." 
Numbers19:8 Ore ilo opejoo ina ashe neituku ilkilani lenyena te nkare neituku osesen lenye te nkare, neton ninye mesinya o metaa teipa." 
Numbers19:9 Ore oltung'ani osinya nesotu nkuruon e ina ashe nelo apik auluo ilngoborri e ewueji nemetii olduruk; neshumi ninche te nkaraki eumata oo ltung'ana le Israel te nkaraki enkare naitisinyishoreki, te nkitukuoroto oo ng'ok." 
Numbers19:10 Ore ilo oiturrur nkuruon e ina ashe neituku ilkarash lenyena neton ninye mesinya o metaa teipa. Naa keaku ena te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel o te nkaraki ilo omoni otamanyishe ti atua ninche, enkitanapata ena oo nkatitin pooki." 
Numbers19:11 “Ore ilo oiseyie olmeneng'ani le likae tung'ani ake ninye, nesarkionu nkolong'i naapishana." 
Numbers19:12 Nchoo ninye eituku kewan te nkare te nkolong e uni o te nkolong e naapishana, pee etum taa atisinyayu; kake te nemeituku ninye kewan te nkolong e uni o te nkolong e naapishana, nemesinyayu ninye." 
Numbers19:13 Ore pooki ng'ae oiseyie olmeneng'ani, ilo sesen ake ninye lo ltung'ani otua, nemeituku kewan, neiduruku olng'obor lo Laitoriani, ore ilo tung'ani nedung'ori aaiwuang'ie ti atua Israel; enkaraki neitu eisuakini enkare enkitisinyata shumata ninye, keaku ninye mesinya eton olduruk lenye te shumata ninye." 
Numbers19:14 “Ena ninye enkitanapata te neye oltung'ani ti atua olng'obor: ore pooki ng'ae ojing'u atua olng'obor, o pooki ng'ae otii atua olng'obor neaku olemesinya nkolong'i naapishana." 
Numbers19:15 Ore pooki toki nang'a nemepising'a neiduruku. 
Numbers19:16 Ore pooki ng'ae ti ong'ata oiseyie ilo otasesekuanaki to lalem, aashu olmeneng'ani, aashu oloito lo ltung'ani, aashu enkurare neaku olemesinya nkolong'i naapishana." 
Numbers19:17 Ore te ilo lemesinya nchoo eyae embata oo nkuruon e ilo asar otapejoyioki loo ng'ok, o enkare naruko napiki empirbil;" 
Numbers19:18 nelotu taa oltung'ani osinya aitayu mbenek e nchani naji hisopo, neitadoiki atua ina are, neisuaki shumata ilo ng'obor, o shumata imasaa pooki ilorikan o shumata lelo tung'ana ootii ine, o shumata ilo oiseyie oloito, aashu olotasesekuanaki, aashu olotua, aashu enkurare;" 
Numbers19:19 ore ilo tung'ani osinya neisuaki ilo tung'ani lemesinya te nkolong e uni o te nkolong e naapishana, ore te nkolong e naapishana neitisiny ninye, neituku ninye ilkilani lenyena neituku kewan te nkare, ore pee eaku teipa nesinyayu ninye." 
Numbers19:20 “Kake ore ilo tung'ani lemesinya nemeituku kewan, nedung'ori ilo tung'ani aitung'uaa atua eumata, enkaraki naidurukie ewueji sinyati o Laitoriani; enkaraki neitu ebukokini enkare e enkitisinyata shumata ninye, mesinya ninye." 
Numbers19:21 Naa keaku enkitanapata oo nkatitin pooki te ninche. Ore ilo oisuaaya ina are naitisinyishoreki neituku ilkilani lenyena neaku mesinya o metaa teipa. 
Numbers19:22 Ore entoki pooki naba anaa enaiseyie oltung'ani lemesinya neaku enemesinya; ore pooki ng'ae oiseyie ina neaku oltung'ani le mesinya o metaa teipa.” 
Numbers20:1 Ore iltung'ana le Israel, ina umata pooki, nepuonu ina ong'ata e Sin, to lapa le dukuya, netoni lelo tung'ana te Kadesh; neye Miriam te ine, nenukari ninye te ine." 
Numbers20:2 Nemetii apa enkare naok ina umata; neiturrurro ninche maate aarare Musa nearare Aron. 
Numbers20:3 Neishankarrare lelo tung'ana Musa, nejoki, “Enaikash apa tenaa eikituata ina kata apa pee eye ilalashera lang te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Numbers20:4 Kainyoo iyie pee iyaua ena umata o Laitoriani atua ena ongata, pee kipuonu aaye tene, iyiook o nkishu ang." 
Numbers20:5 Naa kainyoo pee ilepunye iyiook aitupuku te Misiri, ayau iyiook ene wueji torrono? Mme ewueji ene e nkurma, aashu ilng'abolo aashu isabibu aashu ilng'anayio ooji kukumanka; nemetii enkare naoki.”" 
Numbers20:6 Nelo Musa o Aron aaing'uaa ine netii eumata aapuo kutukaji eilo ng'obor le ntumo, nebatata too nkomomi enye. Neliooyu enkitoo o Laitoriani te ninche," 
Numbers20:7 nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers20:8 “Iwa ina ng'udi, nilo aiturrur ina umata, iyie o Aron ilo alashe lino, nijoki ina dapidapoi te dukuya nkonyek enye meishoru enkare; neaku iyau iyie enkare naing'uaa atua endapidapoi te nkaraki ninche; nincho metooko ina umata o nkishu enye.”" 
Numbers20:9 Neya Musa ina ng'udi te dukuya Olaitoriani, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye." 
Numbers20:10 Neiturrur Musa o Aron ina umata te nebo te dukuya ina dapidapoi nejoki ninche, “Entoning taata, intae iloogolongu; Aikiyaki iyiook intae enkare naing'uaa ena dapidapoi?”" 
Numbers20:11 Neilepie Musa enkaina enye aosh ina dapidapoi te ina ng'udi enye katitin are; nerukunye enkare te nkumoi, neok ina umata, o nkishu enye." 
Numbers20:12 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron, “Ore enkaraki neitu intae kirukuruku nanu, pee kintisinyinyi nanu too nkonyek e kulo tung'ana le Israel, miyauu naa ena umata aaitijing atua ina kop naishoo ninche.”" 
Numbers20:13 Nkariak e Meriba kuna, naa te ine eishankarrare iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani, neitodolu ninye esinyatisho enye te ninche." 
Numbers20:14 Eirriwayie apa Musa ilkiliku te Kadesh meshomo enetii olaiguanani le Edom, nejoki, “Nji ejo olalashe linyi Israel: iyiolo iyie enyamali pooki nikinoto iyiook:" 
Numbers20:15 ena kata apa pee epuo loo papa Misiri nikibik iyiook te Misiri enkata naado; ore lelo le Misiri neitaas iyiook entorroni o loo papa; 
Numbers20:16 ore ake pee kinchiraki Olaitoriani, nening ninye oltoilo lang, neirriwaki iyiook olmalaika oilepunye iyiook aitupuku te Misiri, naa noolo iyiook ootii Kadesh, enkanasa natii olpolosie le nkop ino." 
Numbers20:17 Nchoo naa taata iyiook maima atua enkop ino. Mikiimaa iyiook inkurman aashu ilokerin loo sabibu, nimikiok enkare to lchorro; enkoitoi nalala o laiguanani kiim. Mikimbelekenya iyiook aaim enkalo e tatene aashu enkalo e kedienye, o metaba anaa nikimpang ti atua enkop ino.”" 
Numbers20:18 Kake etiaka apa Edom ninye, “Miim iyie enkop ai, maalotu ake aarare to lalem.”" 
Numbers20:19 Nejoki iltung'ana le Israel ninye, “Eikipuo iyiook aaim enkoitoi nalala; naa ti nikiok iyiook enkare ino, nanu o nkishu aainei, nalak nanu; nchooki ake duoo maimai too nkejek, metii ae toki.”" 
Numbers20:20 Kake etejo apa ninye, “Mipuopuo intae aaim.” Nelotu Edom aarare ninche eeta iltung'ana kumok, o enjore nagol." 
Numbers20:21 Neaku etanya apa Edom eisho Isirael enkoitoi naaim te nkop enye, nerrinyo Isiraeli aaing'uaa ninye." 
Numbers20:22 Nepuo ninche aaing'uaa Kadesh, ore lelo tung'ana le Israel ina umata pooki, nepuonu oldoinyo le Hor." 
Numbers20:23 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Aron to ldoinyo le Hor, to lpolosie le nkop e Edom,"
