Numbers20:24 “Kelo Aron eneiturrurrore iltung'ana lenyena apa ootuata; amu mejing ninye atua ina kop naishoo nanu iltung'ana le Israel, amu etogolong'aka apa enkitanapata ai too nkariak e Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Iwa Aron o Eliesa olayioni lenye niyau ninche enchumata oldoinyo le Hor; 
Numbers20:26 nioru Aron ikilani lenyena ninchopoki Eliesa olayioni lenye; nelo Aron eneiturrurrokino iltung'ana lenyena, naa keye ninye te ine.”" 
Numbers20:27 Neas Musa anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani, neilep ninche aapuo enchumata oldoinyo le Hor eing'orita ina umata pooki." 
Numbers20:28 Neitayu Musa lelo kilani le Aron, neishopoki Eliesa olayioni lenye; neye Aron te ine te nchumata o ldoinyo. Neitoki Musa o Eliesa aadou te ilo doinyo." 
Numbers20:29 Ore ake pee edol ina umata pooki aajo etua Aron neishiraki enkaji pooki e Israel Aron nkolong'i tomoni uni. 
Numbers21:1 Ore ake pee ening ilo Kanaani aiguanani le Arad apa omanya Negeb, nchere eletu Israel aaimu enkoitoi e Afarim, nearare ninye Israel, neibung kulikae lenye araya." 
Numbers21:2 Neinos Israel olmumai to Laitoriani, nejo, “Ti ninchoru iyie ele orere apik enkaina ai, nalo naa nanu aidaikie nkanas enye tukul.”" 
Numbers21:3 Nening Olaitoriani oltoilo le Israel, neishooyo lelo le Kanaan; neidaikie Siraeli ninche o nkanas enye. Neaku keji ene wueji Horma." 
Numbers21:4 Nedumunye to ldoinyo le Hor neim enkoitoi Enaiposha Nanyokie, aapuo aamanaa te nkop e Edom; nesi iltung'ana te nkoitoi." 
Numbers21:5 Neiro ninche mbaa torrok ti alo Enkai o Musa. Neing'unyung'uny ninche ejo, “Kainyoo pee iyaua iyiook aitupuku te nkop e Misiri maetu aaye tene tiong'ota? Amu metii endaa nemetii enkare, neitirika iyiook ena daa nemeeta tipat.”" 
Numbers21:6 Neirriu Olaitoriani ilasuriaa oopi atua iltung'ana, neony ninche iltung'ana, o metaa etuata iltung'ana kumok le Israel." 
Numbers21:7 Nepuonu iltung'ana enetii Musa, nejoki, “Kitaasa iyiook eng'oki, amu kiroro iyiook mbaa torrok ti alo Olaitoriani o tialo iyie; toomono Olaitoriani pee eiwuang'ie ninye ilasuriaa te iyiook.” Neaku etoomonoko Musa iltung'ana." 
Numbers21:8 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ntobira olasurai opi nipik shumata eng'ape; ore ake pooki ng'ae oonyi, te neing'or ninye, nepok.”" 
Numbers21:9 Neaku eitobirua Musa olasurai lo suyai nepik shumata e ng'ape; naa te nelo neony olasurai likae tung'ani, neing'or ninye ilo asurai lo suyai nepok." 
Numbers21:10 Nedumunye iltung'ana le Israel nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Obot. 
Numbers21:11 Neitoki aadumunye te Obot nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Iye-abarim, te ilo purkel oipirare Moab, te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong." 
Numbers21:12 Nedumunye te ine aapuo, neun ilng'oborri to erata le Sared." 
Numbers21:13 Nedumunye te ine aapuo neun ilng'oborri te nkae shoto e Arnon, naa ninye natii ina ongata, olo abaiki olpolosie loo le Amori; amu ore apa Anon naa ninye olpolosie le Moab, te rishata e Moab o le Amori." 
Numbers21:14 Neaku etejoki apa te mbuku oo njorin o Laitoriani, “Waheb te Sufa, o erat le Arnon," 
Numbers21:15 o lelo ooshong'ishong le lelo erat oopuo aabaya entonata e Ari, nepuo o meikobo olpolosie le Moab.”" 
Numbers21:16 Nepuo te ine o metabaiki Beeri, aa taa, olchorro apa laa ninye etiakinye Olaitoriani Musa, “Nturrurro iltung'ana te nebo, pee aisho nanu enkare.”" 
Numbers21:17 Nerany apa Israel ele sinkolio: “Turukunye, na shorro! - Entaranyaki ninye -" 
Numbers21:18 ena shorro apa natuturo ilkituaak, natoota ilooyanyiti loo ltung'ana, too rinkan lenye le nkitoo o too ng'udisin enye.” Neitoki aadumunye to lpurkel nepuo Matana." 
Numbers21:19 Nedumunye te Matana nepuo Nahaliel, nedumunye te Nahaliel nepuo Bamot," 
Numbers21:20 nedumunye te Bamot nepuo ilo erata otii enkop e Moab, enchumata e Pisga, ine nerumaki kop o lpurkel." 
Numbers21:21 Neitoki Israel airriwaki Sihon ilkiliku, ilo aiguanani le Amori, ejo," 
Numbers21:22 “Nchooki nanu maima atua enkop ino; mikimbelekenya iyiook aapuo olokeri aashu enkurma oo sabibu mikiok iyiook enkare enchorro; eikipuo iyiook aaim ina oitoi nalala o laiguanani, o metaba anaa nikimpang ti atua enkop ino.”" 
Numbers21:23 Kake etanya Sihon eisho Israel meima atua enkop enye. Neiturrur ninye iltung'ana lenyena pooki te nebo, neipang alo aarare Israel to lpurkel, nebau Yahas, nearare Israel." 
Numbers21:24 Nesesekuan Israel ninye te nepi o lalem, neya enkop enye ebaiki Arnon o metabaiki Yabok, o meshomo abaiki ile Amori; amu Yaser apa olpolosie loo le Amori." 
Numbers21:25 Neya Israel nena anas pooki, nemany Israel nena anas pooki oo le Amori, te Heshbon, o nkang'itie enyena pooki kutiti." 
Numbers21:26 Amu Heshbon apa enkanasa e Sihon ilo aiguanani loo le Amori, laa ninye otaarare olaiguanani le dukuya le Moab, neya enkop pooki aitung'uaa ninye, o metabaiki Arnon." 
Numbers21:27 Neaku kejo ilaranyak loo nkatinin, “Wootu Heshbon, nchoo esheti ninye, nchoo enkanasa e Sihon metesheti aaitagol." 
Numbers21:28 Amu eipang'ua enkima te Heshbon, eipang'ua olng'ejep le nkima te nkanasa e Sihon, Eidaikie Ari e Moab, o lkituaak loo neeika e Arnon." 
Numbers21:29 Oi iyie, Moab! Ndaaitie lo tung'ana le Kemosh! Eitaa ninye ilayiok lenyena ilaisikak, neitaa ntoyie enyena iyararot, o laiguanani le Amori, oji Sihon." 
Numbers21:30 Eidaa eishoi enye te Heshbon, o metabaiki Dibon, kindaikie iyiook o metaba anaa nebaiki enkima Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Nemany apa Israel enkop oo le Amori. 
Numbers21:32 Neirriwaa Musa iltung'ana meshomo aaikitalan Yaser; neya ninche nkang'itie enye kutiti, neiwuang'ie lelo apa le Amori oomanya ine." 
Numbers21:33 Neitoki ninche aaibelekenya neilep aaim enkoitoi e Bashan; ore Oog olaiguanani le Bashan nelotu aarare ninche, ninye o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, pee epuo aaitayu olarrabal te Edrei." 
Numbers21:34 Kake etiaka Olaitoriani Musa, “Miureyu iyie ninye; amu aishorua nanu ninye apik atua nkaik inono, o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, o enkop enye; naa ilo iyie aitaas ninye anaa enintaasa Sihon olaiguanani le Amori, apa omanya Heshbon.”" 
Numbers21:35 Neaku etasesekuana apa ninche ninye, o layiok lenyena, o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, o metaba anaa neaku meetae obo ataa olaishirani otelekua te ninye; neya ninche ina kop aaitaa enenye." 
Numbers22:1 Neitoki iltung'ana le Israel aadumunye, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te ina kop naisiaja e Moab, te lido kekun le Yordan te mbata Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Netodua apa Balak olayioni le Sipor nena pooki naaitaasa Isiraeli ile Amori. 
Numbers22:3 Neirut oleng Moab te nkaraki iltung'ana, amu eikumok apa oleng; eidimua apa Moab enkuretisho eure iltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers22:4 Nejoki Moab lelo payiani le Midian, “Kemeju taata ele orora pooki toki namanita iyiook, anaa enameju olkiteng nkujit e ong'ata.” Neaku ore apa Balak olayioni le Sipor, laa ninye apa olaiguanani le Moab te ina kata," 
Numbers22:5 neirriwaki Balak ilkiliku Balaam olayioni le Beor te Peter, apa aa ninye nataaniki Olkeju, ti atua enkop e Amawa pee eipotu ninye, ajoki, “Ng'ura, eileputua olorere te Misiri; oitoipo oriong olchoni le nkop, naaetuo aatalakinore te manyisho." 
Numbers22:6 Wou naa taata, tediaa kulo tung'ana enkaraki nanu, amu eimagil ninche te nanu; abaiki namir nanu ninche naidurrie nanu ninche tena kop; amu ayiolo nanu ajo ore ilo limayian iyie nemayiana ore ilo lidek netediaki.”" 
Numbers22:7 Nepuo ilpayiani le Moab o lpayiani le Midian eibung'ita mpisai naalakieki enaibon too nkaik enye; nepuonu ninche enetii Balaam, neisho ninye olkilikuai le Balak." 
Numbers22:8 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Erraga ene ena kewarie, amu kayaki nanu intae olomoni anaa enaairorie nanu Olaitoriani;” neaku etotoni apa lelo kituaak le Moab te nebo Balaam." 
Numbers22:9 Nelotu Enkai enetii Balaam nejoki, “Kakua tung'ana kulo ootii te nebo iyie?”" 
Numbers22:10 Nejoki Balaam Enkai, “Balak olayioni le Sipor, olaiguanani le Moab ninye laairriwaka ejo," 
Numbers22:11 ‘Ng'ura eileputua olorere te Misiri neiput oriong olchoni le nkop; wou naa taata tediaa te nkaraki nanu; abaiki naarare nanu ninche naidurrie ninche.’ ” 
Numbers22:12 Nejoki Enkai Balam, “Milo iyie te nebo ninche; midek iyie kulo tung'ana, amu kemayiana ninche.”" 
Numbers22:13 Neinyototo Balam tadekenya, nejoki lelo kituaak le Balak, “Enchom enkop inyi, amu etanya Olaitoriani alo te nebo intae.”" 
Numbers22:14 Neaku etudumunye lelo kituaak le Moab nepuo enetii Balak, nejoki. “Etanya Balaam elotu te nebo iyiook.”" 
Numbers22:15 Neigil ake Balak airriwaa ilkituaak, iltung'ana kumok neyanyit alang lelo le dukuya." 
Numbers22:16 Nepuonu ninche enetii Balaam nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Balak olayioni le Sipor: ‘Mincho kimbooyo ae toki eitu ilotu enatii;" 
Numbers22:17 amu esipa kaaisho nanu iyie enkanyit kitok, ore entoki pooki naba anaa enikijoki iyie naa kaas; wou tediaa ele orere te nkaraki nanu.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Kake etawala apa Balaam ajoki lelo sinkan le Balak, “Ore hoo naaji ninye tenaa kaaisho Balak enkaji enye ebore enkosholai o sahabu, maidim nanu ashomo atogiroi enkitanapata o Laitoriani Enkai ai, aitodorropu aasho aitulus." 
Numbers22:19 Atoomono naa intae, enyaaki erraga ene ena kewarie, pee atum atayiolo enaaitoki Olaitoriani ajoki nanu.”" 
Numbers22:20 Nelotu Enkai enetii Balaam kewarie nejoki ninye, “Tenaa eikietuo lelo tung'ana aaipot iyie, inyo, shomo te nebo ninche; kake ina ake naajoki iyie, ninye taasa.”" 
Numbers22:21 Neaku etudumunye apa Balaam tadekenya, neirot esikiria enye, nelo te nebo lelo kituaak le Moab." 
Numbers22:22 Kake eyupuyupo engoro e Nkai te nkaraki nashomo ninye; nelo olmalaika lo Laitoriani aitashe te nkoitoi anaa olmangatinta lenye. Nekedito apa Balaam osikiria, netii isinkan lenyena oare te nebo ninye." 
Numbers22:23 Nedol ilo sikiria olmalaika lo Laitoriani eitashe te nkoitoi eeta enchutati olalem te nkaina enye; neibelekenya ina sikiria apaash enkoitoi, nelo ong'ata; neosh Balaam ina sikiria aboiniki enkoitoi." 
Numbers22:24 Neitoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani alo aitashe to lgos le nkoitoi napirik, terishata oo sabibu, netii ake esuntai pooki shoto." 
Numbers22:25 Ore ake pee edol ina sikiria ilo malaika lo Laitoriani, nelo arepaa esuntai, nepudaki enkeju e Balaam esuntai; neitoki ninye aosh." 
Numbers22:26 Neitoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani aigut alo dukuya, nelo aitashe te wueji ronkai te nkoitoi, nemetii ewueji neibelekenyakino te nkalo e tatene aashu te nkalo e kedienye." 
Numbers22:27 Ore ake pee edol ina sikiria olmalaika lo Laitoriani, neirrag te nkop ti abori Balaam; neyupuyup engoro e Balaam, neosh ninye ina sikiria te ng'udi enye." 
Numbers22:28 Nebol Olaitoriani enkutuk e ina sikiria, nejoki ninye Balaam, “Kainyoo nanu aaitaasa iyie, pee kitoosho iyie nanu katitin uni?”" 
Numbers22:29 Nejoki Balaam ina sikiria, “Enkaraki nikigira iyie aiguranie nanu. Enyor napaji naa kaata olalem, pee aatum atara iyie tua.”" 
Numbers22:30 Nejoki ina sikiria Balaam, “Emara nanu esikiria ino, naa ninye intakedo te nkishui ino pooki o metabaiki ena olong? Katamoo nanu aaitaas iyie ena?” Nejoki Balaam, “A-a.”" 
Numbers22:31 Nebol Olaitoriani nkonyek e Balaam, nedol ninye ilo malaika lo Laitoriani eitashe te nkoitoi eeta enchutati o lalem te nkaina enye; neirrug Balaam endukuya enye, nebatata te nkomom." 
Numbers22:32 Nejoki olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninye, “Kainyoo iyie pee itoosho esikiria ino kuna katitin uni? Ng'ura, aewuo nanu pee aaibooyo amu ore enkoitoi ino naa kepaashare enkoitoi ai;" 
Numbers22:33 naatoduaa nanu ena sikiria, naaibelekenya apaash nanu kuna katitin pokira uni. Te neme kaaibelekenye ninye apaash, esipa, anaata aatara iyie tua napal ninye eishu.”" 
Numbers22:34 Neitoki Balaam ajoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani, “Ataasa nanu eng'oki, amu eitu nanu ayiolou ajo itii enkoitoi pee kimbooyo nanu. Ore naa taata, tenaa embae torrono ena too nkonyek inono, karrinyo nanu alo.”" 
Numbers22:35 Nejoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani Balaam, “Shomo iyie te nebo kulo tung'ana; kake ilo rorei ake laaliki ninye shomo iroro.” Neaku eshomo apa Balaam te nebo lelo kituaak le Balak." 
Numbers22:36 Ore ake pee ening Balak nchere eewuo Balaam, neipang ninye alo anang'are ninye te nkanasa e Moab, te ilo polosie oitayu olkeju te Arnon, te ilo polosie kewan." 
Numbers22:37 Nejoki Balak Balaam, “Keitu nanu airriu ilkiliku pee kimpoti iyie? Kainyoo pee eitu iyie ilotu enatii? Eimaaidim nanu ayanyita iyie?” Nejoki Balaam Balak, “Oi, aewuo nanu enitii?" 
Numbers22:38 Keton nanu aata ae golon nairorie ai toki? Ilo rorei opik Enkai enkutuk ai, ninye nanu airo.”" 
Numbers22:39 Nelo Balaam te nebo Balak, nepuonu Kariat-husot." 
Numbers22:40 Nepolos Balak ilmong'i o ntare, neyaki Balaam o lelo kituaak ootii te nebo ninye." 
Numbers22:41 Ore pee ekenyu nerik Balak Balaam o metabaiki Bamotbaal; ore te ine nedol ninye emurte nataaniki oo ltung'ana. 
Numbers23:1 Neitoki Balaam ajoki Balak, “Teshetakaki nanu ilperereni oopishana lo lasar tene, nikincho nanu iloing'ok oopishana o lmeregeshi oopishana.”" 
Numbers23:2 Neas Balak anaa ina natejo Balaam; ore Balak o Balaam neishoru ake to lperere lo lasar oloing'oni o lmeregesh. 
Numbers23:3 Neitoki Balaam ajoki Balak, “Ntasho te mbata o lasar lino opejori, mashomo nanu, eidimayu naalotu nanu Olaitoriani atumore; naa ore pooki naba anaa enaaitodol nanu naaliki iyie.” Neilep ninye alo ewueji neisiaja neika." 
Numbers23:4 Netumore Enkai Balaam; nejoki Balaam ninye, “Aitobira ilperereni lo lasar oopishana, naishorua nanu te nchumata e pooki perere, oloing'oni o lmeregesh.”" 
Numbers23:5 Nepik Olaitoriani ororei enkutuk e Balaam, nejoki ninye, “Torrinyoyu iyie shomo enetii Balak, naa nji shomo tiaki.”" 
Numbers23:6 Nerrinyo ninye alo enetii ninye, naa ng'ura, eitashe ninye te nebo ilkituaak pooki le Moab te mbata e ilo asar lenye opejori." 
Numbers23:7 Neraposhoki Balaam ajo, “Te Aram aaipoto nanu Balak, ilo aiguanani le Moab oing'uaa ildoinyio lo loo saen: ‘Wou tediaa Yakobo enkaraki nanu, naa wou ilepilepaki Israel!’" 
Numbers23:8 Kaji nanu aiko te nadek ilo leitu edek Enkai? Kaji nanu aiko te nailepilepaki ilo leitu eilepilepaki Enkai? 
Numbers23:9 Amu ore too nchumat oo ldoinyo nadol nanu ninye, te nchumata oo ndoinyo aing'or nanu ninye; ng'ura, olorere ninche ootoni o openy, nemeitushulaki ninche ate kulikae oreren!" 
Numbers23:10 Kaing'ae naidim aikena nkera e Yakobo naaba anaa enterit, aashu ematua e ong'uan e Israel? Ntasho matua nanu keeya o ltung'ani supat, naa nchoo enkiting'oto ai etiu anaa enenye!”" 
Numbers23:11 Nejoki Balak Balaam, “Kainyoo ena nikintaasa iyie nanu? Aayawua iyie pee ilotu adek ilmang'ati laainei, naa ng'ura, meeta ae nitaasa eitamayiana ake.”" 
Numbers23:12 Newal ninye ajo, “Eimaning nanu nairo ina natipika Olaitoriani atua enkutuk ai?”" 
Numbers23:13 Nejoki Balak ninye, “Wou te nebo nanu maape dikai wueji, nindimie iyie atodolie ninche; idol iyie emurte nabayie te ninche, kake midol ninche pooki; pee itum iyie atediaa ninche enkaraki nanu te ine.”" 
Numbers23:14 Nerik ninye ong'ata e Sifim, o meitabaiki enchumata e Pisga, neshet ilperereni oopishana lo lasar neishoru ake oloing'oni o lmeregesh to lperere ake pooki lo lasar." 
Numbers23:15 Nejoki Balaam Balak, “Ntasho tene te mbata o lasar lino opejori, mashomo atumore Olaitoriani te idie.”" 
Numbers23:16 Netumore Olaitoriani Balaam, nepik ororei enkutuk enye, nejo ninye, “Torrinyokinoyu Balak, naa nji shomo tiaki.”" 
Numbers23:17 Nelo enetii ninye, naa ng'ura, eitashe ninye te mbata o lasar lenye opejori, o lkituaak le Moab te nebo ninye. Nejoki Balak ninye, “Kainyoo etejo Olaitoriani?”" 
Numbers23:18 Neitoki Balaam araposhoki, nejo, “Inyo, Balak, toning'o; toning'oki nanu ara Sipor:" 
Numbers23:19 Mme oltung'ani Enkai, eji metaa kelejisho, aashu enkerai e tung'ani eji metaa keirridu. Amaa, keiro ninye nemeitabaya? Aashu kelimu ninye nemeas?" 
Numbers23:20 Ng'ura, atang'amua nanu enkitanapata pee amayianisho; etamayianishe ninye, nemalak nanu." 
Numbers23:21 Eitu ninye eing'or olbuket le Yakobo; neitu ninye edol entorroni te Israel. Etii Olaitoriani Enkai enye te nebo ninche, ore embuakunoto o laiguanani netii te nebo ninche." 
Numbers23:22 Eyawua Enkai ninche aitung'uaa Misiri, netiu apa ninche anaa loata imouarak olosokuan." 
Numbers23:23 Meetae eushei ti alo Yakobo, metii esakut ti alo Israel; kepuoi taata aajo ti alo Yakobo o Israel, ‘Kaa etaasa Enkai!’" 
Numbers23:24 Ng'ura, ele orere! Eilepa anaa elipong o lng'atuny, edumunye anaa olng'atuny odumunye; nemeirrag ninye o metaba anaa neinos ina ng'ues narreshito, neok osarge le ina natasesekuanaki.”" 
Numbers23:25 Nejoki Balak Balaam, “Midek ninche katukul, nimimayian ninche katukul.”" 
Numbers23:26 Kake etawalikia Balaam Balak ajoki, “Keitu nanu aajoki iyie inchere, ‘Ore pooki naajoki Olaitoriani, naa ina ake aas?’ ”" 
Numbers23:27 Nejoki Balak Balaam, “Wou taata maatoriko nanu dikai wueji; amu ebaiki neitiship ine Enkai pee idek iyie ninche te nkaraki nanu.”" 
Numbers23:28 Nerik Balak Balaam enchumata o ldoinyo le Peor ine netalita olpurkel. 
Numbers23:29 Nejoki Balaam Balak, “Teshetakaki nanu tene ilperereni oopishana lo lasar, nikincho nanu tene iloing'ok oopishana o lmeregeshi oopishana.”" 
Numbers23:30 Neas Balak anaa enatiaka Balaam, neishooyo ninye oloing'oni o lmeregesh te pooki perere lo lasar." 
Numbers24:1 Ore ake pee edol Balaam nchere keitiship Olaitoriani te nemayian ninye Israel, neitu ninye elo, anaa te kulie katitin, aing'oru ntaleng'o, kake eipirie ninye enkomom enye olpurkel." 
Numbers24:2 Neshumu Balaam nkonyek enyena, nedol Israel etii ilng'oborri, anaa loshon. Nelotu Enkiyang'et e Nkai shumata ninye," 
Numbers24:3 neraposhoki ninye, nejo, “Irorei le Balaam olayioni le Beor, irorei le ilo tung'ani otaboloki nkong'u enye," 
Numbers24:4 irorei le ilo oning irorei le Nkai, ilo odol enduata o Laidimani, otabatate, kake meimulumul nkonyek enyena:" 
Numbers24:5 kebaa enkishiaa oo lng'oborri linono, iyie Yakobo, o emanyisho ino, iyie Israel!" 
Numbers24:6 Eikununo anaa ierat oopuo eniado, anaa nkurman naatii embata e wuaso, enyaanyukie o sugoroi otuno Olaitoriani, eikununo anaa iltarakua ootii embata e nkare." 
Numbers24:7 Kedooyo enkare too ltooi lenyena, ore olantererai lenye neaku nkariak kumok etii, ore olaiguanani lenye naa ninye olusoo alang Agag, ore enkitoo enye naa kebul." 
Numbers24:8 Eyawua Enkai ninye aitupuku te Misiri; netiu ninye anaa oloata mouarak o losokuan, kelo ninye aijoo lelo oshon mang'ati lenyena, negil iloik lenye aitaa mbelibelat, neng'or ninche too mbaa enyena." 
Numbers24:9 Eirraga ninye anaa olng'atuny, naa amaa, amu eikununo anaa elipong o lng'atuny, aing'ae olo ainyeyie ninye? Emayiana pooki ng'ae likimayian iyie, nediaa pooki ng'ae likidek iyie.”" 
Numbers24:10 Neyupuyup engoro e Balak ti alo Balaam, neosh ninye nkaik, neitoki Balak ajoki Balaam, “Aaipotuo nanu iyie pee ilotu adek ilmang'ati laainei, naa ng'ura, itamayiana iyie ninche kuna katitin pokira uni." 
Numbers24:11 Ore naa taata isika shomo ewueji ino; atejo apa nanu, ‘Kaanyanyit iyie,’ kake kimboo Olaitoriani amitiki enkanyit.”" 
Numbers24:12 Nejoki Balaam Balak, “Keitu apa nanu ajoki lelo kiliku linono likirriwaka nanu," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Tenaa napaji ninye kaaisho Balak enkaji enye ebore enkosholai o sahabu, nemaidim ake ashomo atapaasha ororei lo Laitoriani, aas esidai aashu entorrono te yieunoto ai makewan, ore ina najo Olaitoriani naa ina nanu airo?’" 
Numbers24:14 “Ore naa, ng'ura, kalo nanu enetii iltung'ana laainei; wou, pee aaliki nanu enepuo kulo tung'ana aaitaas iltung'ana linyi, too nkolong'i e siadi.”" 
Numbers24:15 Neitoki ninye araposhoki, nejo, “Irorei le Balaam olayioni le Beor, irorei lo ltung'ani otaboloki enkong'u enye," 
Numbers24:16 irorei le ilo oning irorei le Nkai, neyiolo eng'eno e Ilo otii shumata Aisul ilo odol enduata o Laidimani, ilo obatata, kake eitu eimulumul nkonyek enyena." 
Numbers24:17 Adolita nanu ninye, kake mme tena kata; adolita ninye, kake mme taana; eipang'ua olakira ti atua Yakobo, naa keilepu eng'udi enkitoo te Israel; kedany ninye olpura le nkomom le Moab. Negiligil ilayiok pooki le Sheti." 
Numbers24:18 Kepuoi aaya Edom, ore Seir, ilmang'ati lenyena naa kepuoi aaya, eitobirari ninye Israel aisulu," 
Numbers24:19 Te Yakobo easisho engolon e nkitoo, ore lelo aishirak too nkanas neidaikieki!”" 
Numbers24:20 Neitoki ninye aing'or Amalek, neraposhoki ajo, “Amalek apa olayioni le dukuya loo loshon, kake ore te siadi naa keidaikieki.”" 
Numbers24:21 Neitoki aing'or ile Kain, neraposhoki, nejo, “Kegol neserian ina manyisho ino, ore enkaji netipikaki enchumata endapidapoi;" 
Numbers24:22 Kake ore ake eyia, keidaikieki Kain. Kenkata kenya nabaa kiyaita Ashur aaraya?”" 
Numbers24:23 Neitoki araposhoki ajo, “Amaa, kaing'ae kenya elekuni te neas Enkai ena?" 
Numbers24:24 Kake kepuonu imelin naaing'uaa Kitim, naa kepuonu aaisilisil Ashur o Eber; kake kelo ake sii ninye aidak.”" 
Numbers24:25 Neitoki Balaam adumunye nelo ewueji enye; nelo sii Balak te nkoitoi enye. 
Numbers25:1 Ore apa ina kata emanya Israel Shitim neiteru iltung'ana aaiborrie onyek too ntoyie e Moab. 
Numbers25:2 Ore kuna ng'oruo neitoomon iltung'ana too lasarri loo nkaitin enye, neinos iltung'ana, neirrugokino inkaitin enye." 
Numbers25:3 Neaku eteenikia Israel kewan Baal e Peor. Neyupuyup engoro o Laitoriani ti alo Israel; 
Numbers25:4 nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Iwa lelo arikok pooki loo ltung'ana, ililio ninche to ldalati te dukuya Olaitoriani, pee etum ina goro napi o Laitoriani atapaasha Israel.”" 
Numbers25:5 Nejoki Musa lelo arishak le Israel, “Nchoo ake pooki ng'ae te intae esesekuan oltung'ani lenye oteenikia kewan esinkaisho e Baal e Peor.”" 
Numbers25:6 Ng'ura, ore oltung'ani obo loo ltung'ana le Israel, nelotu ayau enkitok e Midian atua olmarei lenye, too nkonyek e Musa o too nkonyek e ina umata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel ina kata apa eishirita ninche te kutukaji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
Numbers25:7 Ore ake pee edol Finehas olayioni le Eliesa, ilo ayioni le Aron olapolosani, nedumunye ninye alo aing'uaa ilo turrur, nedumu empere te nkaina enye" 
Numbers25:8 nelo asujaa ilo tung'ani le Israel o meshomo olgilata li atua, nerem pokira are, ilo tung'ani le Israel o ina kitok, aipang'ie empere to sesen lenye. Ina taa pee eiwuang'ieki olmeitai too ltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers25:9 Ore ake eyia, lelo apa ootuata to lmeitai naa nkalifuni tikitam o ong'uan." 
Numbers25:10 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers25:11 “Ore Finehas, olayioni le Eliesa, olayioni le Aron olapolosani, neiwuang'ie engoro ai too laiguanani nchere eeta ninye olom lai ti atua ninche, metaa eitu nanu amut iltung'ana le Israel to lom lai." 
Numbers25:12 Metaa tejo, ‘Ng'ura, kaisho nanu ninye osotua lai le seriani;" 
Numbers25:13 naa keaku te ninye o te ishoi enye, te siadi ninye, ilo ning'o lo sotua le mpolosare e anaake, enkaraki naata ninye olom te nkaraki Enkai enye, neitobira olning'o lo sotua too ltung'ana le Israel!’ ”" 
Numbers25:14 Ore apa enkarna e ilo tung'ani le Israel otasesekuanaki te nebo enkitok e Midian, naa Simri olayioni le Salu, laa endukuya enkaji oo loo menye le nkaji oo le Simeon." 
Numbers25:15 Ore apa enkarna e ina kitok e Midian natasesekuanaki naa Kosbi entito e Suri, naa ninye apa endukuya o lorere le nkaji oo loo e menye te Midian." 
Numbers25:16 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers25:17 “Ntanyamala ile Midian, niosh aar ninche;" 
Numbers25:18 amu kintanyamala ninche iyie te nkeleekisho enye, amu ninye etelejie intae te ina bae e Peor, o te ina bae e Kosbi, ina tito o lkitok le Midian, ina anashe enye apa nataraki metua te nkolong o lmeitai te mbae e Peor.”" 
Numbers26:1 Ore etulusoyie ilo meitai nejoki Olaitoriani Musa o Eliesa olayioni le Aron olapolosani," 
Numbers26:2 “Enkena ina umata pooki, oo ltung'ana le Israel, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, too nkajijik oo loo menye, pooki ti atua Siraeli ooidim aashom enjore.”" 
Numbers26:3 Ore Musa o Eliesa ilo apolosani neirorie ninche too nkisiajat e Moab te mbata o lkeju le Yordan te Yeriko, ejo," 
Numbers26:4 “Enkena iltung'ana, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep,” anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa. Ore lelo tung'ana le Israel ooetuo aaipang'u te nkop e Misiri, naa:" 
Numbers26:5 Ruben ilo kikau le Israel; ilayiok le Ruben, ile Hanok, ilo marei loo le Hanok; le Palu, olmarei loo le Palu;" 
Numbers26:6 ile Hesron, olmarei loo le Hesron; ile Karmi, olmarei loo le Karmi." 
Numbers26:7 Kulo ninche ilmareita loo le Ruben; ore esiana enye naa nkalifuni artam o okuni o iip naapishana o tomoni uni. 
Numbers26:8 Ore ilayiok le Palu naa: Eliab. 
Numbers26:9 Ore ilayiok le Eliab naa: Nemuel, Datan o Abiram. Kulo apa, Datan o Abiram etegeluaki te umata, ootekeshare Musa o Aron to lturrur le Kora, ina kata apa pee ekeshare ninche Olaitoriani," 
Numbers26:10 neng'a enkop enkutuk enye neijoo ninche te nebo Kora, ore ake eye ilo turrur, ore ake pee emut enkima iltung'ana iip are o onom, neaku ninche enkikoo." 
Numbers26:11 Ore ake etiu ina, eitu eye ilayiok le Kora." 
Numbers26:12 Ilayiok le Simeon te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Nemuel, olmarei loo le Nemuel; ile Yamin, olmarei loo le Yamin, ile Yakin, olmarei loo le Yakin;" 
Numbers26:13 ile Sera, olmarei loo le Sera; ile Shaul, olmarei loo le Shaul." 
Numbers26:14 Kulo ninche ilmareita loo le Simeon, nkalifuni tikitam o are o iip o are." 
Numbers26:15 Ilayiok le Gad to risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Sefon, oo lmarei loo le Sefon, ile Hagi, olmarei loo le Hagi, ile Shuni, olmarei loo le Shuni;" 
Numbers26:16 ile Osini, olmarei loo le Osini, ile Eri, olmarei loo le Eri;" 
Numbers26:17 ile Arod, olmarei loo le Arod; ile Areli, olmarei loo le Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Kulo ninche ilmareita loo layiok le Gad, te risioroto e siana enye, nkalifuni artam o iip imiet." 
Numbers26:19 Ore ilayiok le Yuda naa Eri o Onan; netuata apa Eri o Onan te nkop e Kanaan. 
Numbers26:20 Ore ilayiok le Yuda te risioroto oo lmareita lenye naa: ile Shela, olmarei loo le Shela; ile Peres, olmarei loo le Peres, ile Sera, olmarei loo le Sera." 
Numbers26:21 Ore ilayiok le Peres naa: ile Hesron, olmarei loo le Hesron; ile Hamul, olmarei loo le Hamul." 
Numbers26:22 Kulo apa ninche ilmareita le Yuda te risioroto e siana enye, nkalifuni ntomoni naapishana o ile o iip imiet." 
Numbers26:23 Ilayiok le Isaakar te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Tola, olmarei loo le Tola; ile Puni, olmarei loo le Puni;" 
Numbers26:24 ile Yashub, olmarei loo le Yashub; ile Shimron, olmarei loo le Shimron." 
Numbers26:25 Kulo apa ninche ilmareita le Isaakar te risioroto e siana enye, nkalifuni ntomoni ile o ong'uan o iip uni." 
Numbers26:26 Ilayiok le Sebulon te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Sered, olmarei loo le Sered, ile Elon, olmarei loo le Elon; ile Yaleel, olmarei loo le Yaleel." 
Numbers26:27 Kulo ninche ilmareita loo le Sebulon te risioroto e siana enye, nkalifuni ntomoni ile o iip imiet." 
Numbers26:28 Ilayiok le Yosef te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: Manase o Efraim. 
Numbers26:29 Ilayiok le Manase: ile Makir, olmarei loo le Makir, naa Makir apa ninye menye le Gilead. Ile Gilead, olmarei loo le Gilead." 
Numbers26:30 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Gilead: Ileseri; ile Heler, olmarei loo le Heler, ile Helek o lmarei loo le Helek," 
Numbers26:31 ile Asiriel, olmarei loo le Asiriel; o le Shekem, olmarei loo le Shekem," 
Numbers26:32 o le Shemida, olmarei loo le Shemida; o le Heper, olmarei loo le Heper." 
Numbers26:33 Ore apa Selofehad olayioni le Heper meeta ilayiok, kake keeta ntoyie; ore nkarn oo ntoyie e Selofehad naa Mahala, o Noa, o Hogla, O Milka, o Tirsa." 
Numbers26:34 Kulo ninche ilmareita loo le Manase, ore esiana enye naa nkalifuni onom o oare o iip naapishana." 
Numbers26:35 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Efraim te risioroto oo lmareita lenye; ile Shutela, olmarei loo le Shutela; ile Bekeri, olmarei loo le Bekeri; ile Tahani; olmarei loo le Tahani." 
Numbers26:36 Naa kulo ninche ilayiok le Shutela; ile Erani, olmarei loo le Erani." 
Numbers26:37 Kulo ninche ilmareita loo layiok le Efraim te risioroto e siana enye, nkalifuni tomoni uni oare o iip imiet. Kulo ninche ilayiok le Yosef te risioroto oo lmareita lenye." 
Numbers26:38 Ilayiok le Benchamen te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Bela; ile Ashebel, olmarei loo le Ashbel; ile Ahiram, olmareita loo le Ahiram;" 
Numbers26:39 ile Shefufam, olmarei loo le Shefufam; ile Hufam, olmareita loo le Hufam." 
Numbers26:40 Ore apa ilayiok le Bela naa Ardi o Naaman: ile Ardi, olmareita loo le Ardi; ile Naaman, olmarei loo le Naaman." 
Numbers26:41 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Benchamen te risioroto oo lmareita lenye; ore esiana enye naa nkalifuni artam o imiet o iip ile. 
Numbers26:42 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Dan te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Shuham, olmarei loo le Shuham. Kulo ninche ilmareita le Dan te risioroto oo lmareita lenye." 
Numbers26:43 Ore ilmareita pooki loo le Shuham, te risioroto e siana enye, naa nkalifuni ntomoni ile o ong'uan o iip ong'uan." 
Numbers26:44 Ilayiok le Asheri te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Imna, olmarei loo le Imna; ile Ishfi; olmarei loo le Ishfi; ile Beria, olmarei loo le Beria." 
Numbers26:45 Ilayiok le Beria: ile Heberi, olmarei loo le Heberi; ile Malkiel, olmarei loo le Malkiel." 
Numbers26:46 Ore enkarna e ntito e Asheri naa Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Kulo ninche ilmareita loo layiok le Asheri te risioroto e siana enye nkalifuni onom o okuni o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers26:48 Ilayiok le Naftali te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Yaseel, olmarei loo le Yaseel; ile Guni, olmarei loo le Guni;" 
Numbers26:49 ile Yeser, olmarei loo le Yeser; ile Shilem, olmarei loo le Shilem." 
Numbers26:50 Kulo ninche ilmareita le Naftali te risioroto oo lmareita lenye; ore esiana enye naa nkalifuni artam o imiet o iip ong'uan. 
Numbers26:51 Ena apa esiana oo ltung'ana le Israel, nkalifuni iip ile o obo o iip naapishana o tomoni uni." 
Numbers26:52 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa; 
Numbers26:53 “Keorikini kulo tung'ana enkop pee eaku enjung'ore, te risioroto e siana oo nkarn." 
Numbers26:54 Ore olosho sapuk nchoo enjung'ore sapuk, ore olosho oti nchoo enjung'ore kiti; ore pooki osho neishori ake enjung'ore enye te risioroto e siana enye." 
Numbers26:55 Kake keoshokini ina kop enkukuo; te risioroto oo nkarn oo loshon loo loo menye enjung ninche. 
Numbers26:56 Keori ina jung'ore enye te risioroto e nkukuo to losho sapuk o to loti.” 
Numbers26:57 Kulo ninche ile Lawi anaa enaikenaki te risioroto oo lmareita lenye: ile Gershon, olmarei loo le Gershon; ile Kohat, olmarei loo le Kohat; ile Merari, olmarei loo le Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Kulo ninche ilmareita le Lawi: olmarei loo le Libni, olmarei loo le Hebron, olmarei loo le Mala, olmarei loo le Mushi, olmarei loo le Kora. Naa Kohat apa menye le Amram." 
Numbers26:59 Ore apa enkitok e Amram naa keji Yokebed, entito e Lawi, apa natoikioki Lawi te Misiri; neiki ninye Amram Aron o Musa o Miriam enkanashe enye." 
Numbers26:60 Ore to lmarei le Aron neini Nadab, o Abihu, o Eliesa o Itamar." 
Numbers26:61 Kake etua apa Nadab o Abihu ina kata apa pee eitarasaki enkima nemesinya Olaitoriani. 
Numbers26:62 Ore apa lelo ooikenaki te ninche naa nkalifuni tikitam o okuni, pooki lee lo lari obo neilep; amu eitu apa eikeni ninche te nebo iltung'ana le Israel, amu meetae apa enjung'ore naishooki ninche te nebo iltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers26:63 Kulo apa ninche lelo ooikena Musa o Eliesa ilo apolosani, laa ninche esiana oo ltung'ana le Israel too nkisiajat e Moab te mbata olkeju le Yordan te Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Kake ore ti atua kulo metii hoo oltung'ani oikena Musa aashu Aron ilo apolosani, apa oikena iltung'ana le Israel ti ong'ata e Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Amu etiaka Olaitoriani ninche, “Kepuo ninche aaye tiong'ota.” Eitu apa eleku oltung'ani te ninche, Kaleb ake olayioni le Yefune o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Neitoki aanyiku nena toyie e Selofehad olayioni le Hefer, olayioni le Gilead, olayioni le Makir, olayioni le Manase, olayioni le Yosef. Ore apa nkarn e nena toyie enyena naa: Mahala, o Noa, o Hogla, o Milka, o Tirsa." 
Numbers27:2 Neitashe ninche te dukuya Musa o Eliesa ilo apolosani, o te dukuya lelo arikok o ina umata, te kutukaji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo, ejo," 
Numbers27:3 “Etua apa papa lang tiong'ota; metii apa ninye ina umata, e lelo ooiturrurrote aapaashare Olaitoriani te ncholuek e Kora, kake etua te nkaraki eng'oki enye makewan; nemeeta apa layiok." 
Numbers27:4 Kainyoo naa pee eiwuang'ieki enkarna e papa lang to lmarei lenye, enkaraki nemeeta olayioni? Nchoo iyiook erubata ti atua ilalashera le papa.”" 
Numbers27:5 Neyau Musa ilo omoni lenye dukuya Olaitoriani. 
Numbers27:6 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers27:7 “Etisipa nena toyie e Selofehad; nchoo ninche erubata e njung'ore ti atua ilalashera le menye, nincho ina jung'ore e menye lenye meshomo aaku enenye," 
Numbers27:8 Nijoki iyie iltung'ana le Israel, ‘Te neye oltung'ani, nemeeta olayioni, nincho enjung'ore enye meshomo aaku ene ntito enye." 
Numbers27:9 Naa te nemeeta entito, nincho enjung'ore enye eaku enoo lalashera lenyena." 
Numbers27:10 Naa te nemeeta lalashera, nincho naa enjung'ore enye ilalashera le menye." 
Numbers27:11 Naa te nemeeta menye lalashera nincho naa enjung'ore enye oltung'ani lenye, laa ninye onyikare olmarei lenye, pee eya ninye. Naa keaku ena too ltung'ana le Israel enkitanapata o enkikoo, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ilepa shomo enchumata ele doinyo le Abarim, pee idol ena kop naishoo nanu iltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers27:13 Naa ore ake pee indip atoduaa ninye, nintoki sii iyie alo eneiturrure iltung'ana linono apa ootuata anaa apa enashomo olalashe lino Aron," 
Numbers27:14 enkaraki nitogolong'aka ororei lai ti ong'ata e Sin, ina kata apa eing'unyung'uny eumata maayanyit aaitisiny nanu te nena ariak apa naatii dukuya nkonyek enye. (Nkariak kuna e Meriba e Kadesh tiong'ata e Sin.)" 
Numbers27:15 Nejoki Musa Olaitoriani," 
Numbers27:16 Nchoo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo nkiyang'eta e pooki naaishu, egelu oltung'ani oitasheiki ena umata," 
Numbers27:17 oipang alo dukuya ninche, nejing'u alotu te dukuya ninche, orikoo ninche aipang'ie neriku ninche aitijing'u; pee metiu eumata o Laitoriani anaa nkerra nemeeta olchekut.”" 
Numbers27:18 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Iwa Yoshua olayioni le Nuni, ilo tung'ani otii enkiyang'et atua ninye, ninteleiki nkaik shumata ninye;" 
Numbers27:19 nchoo ninye meitasho te dukuya Eliesa ilo apolosani o ina umata pooki, nintanap aisho enkitoo te dukuya ninche." 
Numbers27:20 Nchopoki ninye embata e nkitoria ino, pee etum eumata pooki oo ltung'ana le Israel aatoning." 
Numbers27:21 Naa keitashe ninye te dukuya Eliesa ilo apolosani, laa ninye oikilikuanisho te nkaraki ninye, te nkiguana e Urim te dukuya Olaitoriani; to rorei lenye eipang ninche aapuo naa to rorei lenye ninche ejin'u atua, ninye o ltung'ana pooki le Israel ootii te nebo ninye, ina umata pooki.”" 
Numbers27:22 Neas Musa anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani; neya ninye Yoshua neitasheyie ninye te dukuya Eliesa ilo apolosani, o ina umata pooki," 
Numbers27:23 neiteleiki ninye nkaik enyena shumata ninye, neitanap ninye aisho enkitoo anaa enatuutua Olaitoriani aimunye Musa." 
Numbers28:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers28:2 “Ntanapa iltung'ana le Israel, tiaaki ninche, ‘Ore olasar lai, endaa ai too lasarri laainei le nkima, esong'ouna ai narropil, embung'a pee kintarasakiki nanu te rishata enye.’" 
Numbers28:3 Naa tiaaki iyie ninche, Olasar le nkima ele linchosho intae Olaitoriani: isitiman oare le kerra lo lari obo, lemeeta entibili, anaake, pee eaku olasar loo nkolong'i pooki." 
Numbers28:4 Ore olkuo obo nipolososo tadekenya, ore olikae kuo nipolososo teipa;" 
Numbers28:5 ore ematua e tomon e efa e ntapa napuyiapui nintayuyu pee eaku olasar le ntapa, naipurjaki te matua e ong'uan e hini e ilata naidong'oki." 
Numbers28:6 Olasar ele opejori anaake, apa oitanapishoteki to ldoinyo le Sinai, te nkaraki esong'ouna narropil, olasar le nkima oishori Olaitoriani." 
Numbers28:7 Ore olasar ooki naa erubata nabo e ong'uan e hini to sitima ake obo; te ine wueji sinyati shomo tipika ilo asar ooki oirrusha nchoo Olaitoriani. 
Numbers28:8 Ore olikae kuoo shomo topolosa teipa, anaa ilo asar le ntapa le tadekenya, o anaa ilo asar ooki, shomo nchooi anaa olasar le nkima, esong'ouna nerropil te nkaraki Olaitoriani." 
Numbers28:9 “Ore te nkolong e sabato naa isitiman oare le kerra lo lari obo lemeeta entioto, o ematua e are e tomon e Efa e ntapa napuyiapui pee eaku olasar le ntapa, eipurjaki te ilata o ilo asar lenye ooki:" 
Numbers28:10 ele ninye olasar opejori le pooki olong e sabato, te nebo ilo asar opejori le anaake o ilo asar ooki." 
Numbers28:11 “Ore too nkiterunot oo lapaitin linyi ninchooyoyo olasar opejori aaisho Olaitoriani: iloing'ok oare ooti, o lmeregesh obo, o sitiman oopishana le kerra lo lari obo lemeeta entioto;" 
Numbers28:12 o matuan uni e tomon e efa e ntapa napuyiapui pee eaku olasar le ntapa, naipurjaki te ilata, te pooki oing'oni, o matuan are e tomon e ntapa napuyiapui naipurja te ilata to lmeregesh obo;" 
Numbers28:13 o ematua nabo e tomon e ntapa napuyiapui naipurjaki te ilata anaa olasar le ntapa to lkuoo ake obo le ker; pee eaku olasar opejori le song'ouna narropil; olasar le nkima oishori Olaitoriani. 
Numbers28:14 Ore olasar lenye ooki naa keaku olpisiai le hini le naisho oo sabibu to loing'oni ake obo o entemata e uni e hini to lmeregesh, naa entemata e uni e ong'uan e hini to lkuoo le ker; ele ninye olasar opejori te pooki apa too lapaitin pooki lo lari" 
Numbers28:15 o sitima obo sii le kine te nkaraki olasar le ng'oki oishori Olaitoriani; keitayuni ninye te nebo ilo asar opejori le anaake o ilo asar lenye ooki. 
Numbers28:16 “Ore te nkolong e tomon o ong'uan olapa le dukuya naa pasaka o Laitoriani. 
Numbers28:17 Naa ore te nkolong e tomon o imiet ele apa naa o sirua; nkolong'i naapishana einosi imukateni neitu eisuishieki. 
Numbers28:18 Ore te nkolong e dukuya naa keaku eumata sinyati: mias esiaai e sinkaisho," 
Numbers28:19 kake enchooi olasar le nkima, olasar opejori te nkaraki Olaitoriani: iloing'ok oare ooti, olmeregesh obo, o sitiman oopishana le kerra lo lari obo; toduaa nchere meeta entioto;" 
Numbers28:20 o lasarri sii lenye le ntapa napuyiapui naipurja te ilata; imatuan uni e efa te tomon nchooi to loingoni obo, o matuan are e tomon to lmeregesh;" 
Numbers28:21 nchooi ematua nabo e tomon te pooki meregesh le lelo oopishana; 
Numbers28:22 o sitima obo le kine pee eaku olasar le ng'oki pee eitayunyeki olning'o lo sotua tenkaraki iyie. 
Numbers28:23 Nchooi iyie kuna te nebo olasar opejori le tadekenya, laa olasar le mpejoroto le anaake." 
Numbers28:24 Naa te ina oitoi ake inchooi anaake, too nkolong'i naapishana, ina daa o lasar opejori te nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani; keitarasari ninye te nebo ilo asar le anaake o ilo asar lenye ooki." 
Numbers28:25 Naa ore te nkolong e naapishana nimbung'ubung'u eumata nasinya; nimiasiasa esiaai nagol. 
Numbers28:26 “Ore te nkolong oo lng'anayio le dukuya, ti ninchooyo iyie olasar le ntapa te nkaraki entapa ng'ejuk naishori Olaitoriani, te ilo sirua linyi loo wikii, ninturrurrorro aaibung eumata sinyati; nimiasiasa esiaai nagol," 
Numbers28:27 kake entarasai olasar opejori, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani: iloing'ok oare ooti, o lmeregesh obo, isitiman oopishana le kerra lo lari obo;" 
Numbers28:28 o lasar le ntapa napuyiapui, naipurja te ilata, o matuan uni e tomon e efa to loing'oni ake obo, o matuan are e tomon e efa to lmeregesh," 
Numbers28:29 o ematua nabo e tomon te pooki ake ninye sitima le ker le lelo oopishana; 
Numbers28:30 te nebo o sitima obo le kine, pee eitobir osotua lo lning'o te nkaraki intae." 
Numbers28:31 Ore te nebo ilo asar opejori le anaake, o lasar lenye le ntapa, ntarasai iyie ninche te nebo o ilo asar lenye ooki. Todua nchere meeta ninche entioto." 
Numbers29:1 “Ore te nkolong e dukuya o lapa liopishana, enturrurroto embung'a eumata nasinya; miasiasa esiaai nagol. Enkolong ina te intae nioshiosho imouarak," 
Numbers29:2 ninchooyoyo olasar opejori, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani; oloing'oni obo oti, o lmeregesh obo, o sitiman oopishana le kerra lo lari obo lemeeta entioto;" 
Numbers29:3 o lasar sii lenye le ntapa napuyiapui, naipurjaki te ilata, o ematua e uni e tomon e efa to loing'oni ake, ematua e are e tomon to lmeregesh," 
Numbers29:4 o ematua nabo e tomon to sitima ake le ker le lelo oopishana; 
Numbers29:5 te nebo ositima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki, pee eitobir osotua lo lning'o te nkaraki intae;" 
Numbers29:6 nepudare ilo asar opejori lo lapa ng'ejuk, olasar lenye le ntapa, o ilo asar opejori le anaake, o lasar lenye le ntapa, o lasar lenye ooki, te risioroto e ina kitanapa enye, esong'ouna narropil, olasar le nkima oishori Olaitoriani." 
Numbers29:7 “Ore te nkolong e tomon ele apa li opishana, ninturrurrorro intae aaibung eumata sinyati, nieniene ate, nimiasiasa esiai," 
Numbers29:8 kake entarasai olasar opejori aaisho Olaitoriani, esong'uona narropil: oloing'oni obo oti, olmeregesh obo, o sitiman oopishana le kerra lo lari obo; nchoo eaku meeta ntiot;" 
Numbers29:9 o lasarri lenye le ntapa napuyiapui naipurja te ilata, o matuan uni e tomon e efa, to loing'oni obo, o matuan are e tomon to lmeregesh obo," 
Numbers29:10 e ematua nabo e tomon te pooki sitima le ker le lelo oopishana: 
Numbers29:11 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki, te nebo ilo asar lenye le leilo sotua lo lning'o o ilo asar le anaake opejori, o ilo asar lenye le ntapa, o lasarri lenye ooki." 
Numbers29:12 “Ore te nkolong e tomon o imiet o lapa li opishana, ninturrurrorro aaibung eumata nasinya; miasiasa esiaai nagol embung'a osirua lo Laitoriani nkolong'i naapishana;" 
Numbers29:13 ninchooyoyo olasar opejori, ilo asar le nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani, iloing'ok tomon o okuni, o lmeregeshi oare, o sitiman tomon o ong'uan le kerra lo lari obo; naa lelo lemeeta ntiot;" 
Numbers29:14 o lasari lenye le ntapa napuyiapui naipurja te ilata, o matuan uni e tomon e efa ti obo ake le lelo oing'ok tomon o okuni, o matuan are e tomon to lmeregesh ake obo te lelo pokira are," 
Numbers29:15 o ematua nabo e tomon te pooki sitima le lelo sitiman le kerra tomon o ong'uan; 
Numbers29:16 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki, epudare ilo asar le anaake, o lasar lenye le ntapa o lasarri lenye ooki." 
Numbers29:17 “Ore te nkolong e are entopolos iloing'ok tomon o are ooti, o lmeregeshi oare, o sitiman tomon o ong'uan lo lari obo lemeeta ntiot," 
Numbers29:18 te nebo olasar le ntapa o lasar ooki te lelo oing'ok, o loo lmeregeshi, o loo sitiman le kerra, te nkikenata te risioroto e nkitanapata;" 
Numbers29:19 o sitima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki, epudare ilo asar opejori li anaake, o lasar lenye le ntapa, o lasarri lenye ooki." 
Numbers29:20 “Ore te nkolong e uni naa iloing'ok tomon o obo, o lmeregeshi oare, o sitiman le kerra tomon o ong'uan lo lari obo lemeeta ntiot," 
Numbers29:21 te nebo olasar le ntapa o lasarri ooki te lelo oing'ok, o loo lmeregeshi, o loo sitiman le kerra, te nkikenata te risioroto e nkitanapata." 
Numbers29:22 Te nebo sii ositima obo le kine to lasar le ng'oki, epudare ilo asar opejori le anaake o lasar lenye le ntapa o lasar lenye ooki." 
Numbers29:23 “Ore te nkolong e ong'uan naa iloing'ok tomon, o lmeregeshi oare, o sitiman tomon o ong'uan le kerra lo lari obo lemeeta entioto," 
Numbers29:24 te nebo ilo asar le ntapa o lasarri ooki, te lelo oing'ok, o lelo meregeshi, o te lelo sitiman le kerra, te nkikenata te risioroto e nkitanapata;" 
Numbers29:25 te nebo ositima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki, epudare ilo asar opejori le anaake, o lasar lenye le ntapa o lasar lenye ooki." 
Numbers29:26 “Ore te nkolong e imiet naa iloing'ok ooudo, o lmeregeshi oare, o sitiman le kerra tomon o ong'uan lo lari obo lemeeta entioto," 
Numbers29:27 te nebo ilo asar le ntapa o lelo asarri ooki te lelo oing'ok o te lelo meregeshi, o lelo sitiman le kerra, te nkikenata te risioroto e nkitanapata;" 
Numbers29:28 te nebo sii ositima obo le kine to lasar le ng'oki; epudare ilo asar opejori le anaake o ilo asar lenye le ntapa o ilo asar lenye ooki. 
Numbers29:29 “Ore te nkolong e ile naa iloing'ok isiet, o lmeregeshi oare, o sitiman tomon o ong'uan le kerra lo lari obo lemeeta ntiot," 
Numbers29:30 te nebo ilo asar le ntapa o lasarri ooki te lelo oing'ok, o too lmeregeshi, o te lelo sitiman le kerra, te nkikenata te risioroto e nkitanapata;" 
Numbers29:31 te nebo sii ositima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki, epudare ilo asar opejori le anaake, ilo asar lenye le ntapa o lelo asarri lenye ooki." 
Numbers29:32 “Ore te nkolong e naapishana naa iloing'ok oopishana, o lmeregeshi oare, o sitiman tomon o ong'uan lo lari obo lemeeta ntiot," 
Numbers29:33 te nebo olasar le ntapa o lasar ooki, te lelo oing'ok o lelo meregeshi o lelo sitiman le kerra, te nkikenata te risioroto e nkitanapata;" 
Numbers29:34 te nebo sii ositima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki, epudare ilo asar opejori le anaake, ilo asar lenye le ntapa o ilo asar lenye ooki." 
Numbers29:35 “Ore te nkolong e isiet embung'a eumata nasinya: miasiasa esiaai nagol," 
Numbers29:36 kake enchooi olasar opejori, ilo asar le nkima, esong'ouna narropil to Laitoriani; aapolos oloing'oni obo, o lmeregesh obo, o sitiman oopishana le kerra lo lari obo lemeeta entioto," 
Numbers29:37 o lasar le ntapa o lasarri ooki, to loing'oni ake, o to lmeregesh, o te lelo sitiman le kerra, te nkikenare te risioroto e nkitanapata;" 
Numbers29:38 te nebo sii ositima obo le kine oaku olasar le ng'oki, epudare ilo asar opejori le anaake o ilo asar lenye le ntapa o ilo asar lenye ooki." 
Numbers29:39 “Kuna ninche ntarasakiki Olaitoriani te lelo siruai linyi oogeluno, te nebo lelo asarri linosie olmumai, o lasarri linyi le yieunoto, te nkaraki lelo asarri linyi oopejori, o lasarri linyi le ntapa, o lasarri linyi ooki, o lasarri linyi le seriani.”" 
Numbers29:40 Neliki Musa iltung'ana le Israel pooki toki anaa ake enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye. 
Numbers30:1 Nejoki Musa ilukuny oo loshon loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, “Ena ninye eitanapishe Olaitoriani." 
Numbers30:2 Te neinos oltung'ani olmumai te nkaraki Olaitoriani, aashu te neinos olmumai pee een kewan te mbae natejo, nchoo ninye eaku olemeitupuk olomoni lenye; nchoo ninye eas te risioroto e ina pooki naimua enkutuk enye." 
Numbers30:3 Aashu te neinos enkitok olmumai te nkaraki Olaitoriani, neen kewan enye te ina bae natejo, ina kata eton etii enkaji e papaai lenye, te kitisho enye," 
Numbers30:4 nening menye ilo mumai lenye, o ina natejo ninye, nateenie ninye kewan, nemejoki ninye ae, ore ilo mumai lenye pooki neunoyu. Ore pooki natejo ninye aen kewan neunoyu." 
Numbers30:5 Kake te neany menye enyorraa ilo mumai ina olong apa pee ening, nemeitoki atii olmumai te ninye, nemetii eenata e kewan nauno, naa kepalaki Olaitoriani ninye te nkaraki naa menye otomitikio ninye." 
Numbers30:6 Naa te neyama olmoruo, ina kata eton etii eenata eilo mumai lenye, aashu nena kirorot e nkutuk enye naateenie ninye kewan," 
Numbers30:7 nening olmoruo lenye ina, neitu ejoki ae ina kata pee ening, ore naa ilo mumai lenye naa keuno, ore nena baa enyena naateenie kewan naa keunoyu." 
Numbers30:8 Kake ore te ina olong apa natoning'o olmoruo lenye, neany ninye enyorraa, neitaa naa parmetii ilo mumai lenye apa oinosa, o nena kirorot e nkutuk enye, apa naa ninche eteenie kewan. Naa kepalaki Olaitoriani ninye." 
Numbers30:9 Kake ore pooki mumai le nkoliai, aashu le nkitok natung'uayie olmoruo lenye, ore ake ninye entoki nateenie kewan, naa keitalakuni te ninye." 
Numbers30:10 Naa te neinos ninye olmumai ti atua enkaji olpayian lenye e, aashu een kewan enye to lmumai," 
Numbers30:11 nening olpayian lenye ina, neitu ejoki ninye ae, neitu erishie ninye; ore ilo mumai lenye pooki naa keunoyu, ore enkiroroto ake pooki nateenie ninye kewan naa keunoyu." 
Numbers30:12 Kake te neitaa olmoruo lenye parmetii neitaa pesho ina olong apa pee ening, neaku naa, ore embae pooki naimu enkutuk enye naipirta olmumai lenye aashu naipirta ina enata e kewan nemelo aunoyu; eitaa olmoruo lenye pesho, naa kepalaki Olaitoriani ninye." 
Numbers30:13 Ore olmumai pooki, o enata olmumai nainosie oltung'ani kewan osina, keidim olmoruo lenye atuuno, aashu eidim aitaa parmetii." 
Numbers30:14 Kake te nemejoki olmoruo lenye ae te nkolong ake ninye, neitubulaa naa ilo mumai le nkitok enye, o nena pooki naatejo ninye aenie kewan, nena naatii shumata ninye; eitubula ninye ninche enkaraki neitu ejoki ae ina olong apa naning nena baa." 
Numbers30:15 Kake te neitaa nena baa pesho neitaa parmetii eidipa ninye atoning'o, nenap naa ninye eng'oki e nkitok enye.”" 
Numbers30:16 Kuna ninche nkitanapat naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa, naaipirta olee o enkitok enye, olpayian o entito enye, te lelero enye, eton etii enkaji e papaai lenye." 
Numbers31:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers31:2 “Ntalaku elap oo ltung'ana le Israel too ltungana le Midian; ore te siadi ina naa ilo iyie eneiturrorrore iltung'ana linono apa ootuata aye.” 
Numbers31:3 Nejoki Musa olorere, “Enterreten iltung'ana tiatua intae oopuo enjore pee etum aashom aataarare iltungana le Midian, pee eitalaku elap o Laitoriani te Midian." 
Numbers31:4 Irriwai enkalifu ake to losho pooki le Israel pee epuo enjore.” 
Numbers31:5 Neaku oishoruaki apa kulo, ooing'uaa lelo oora nkalifuni le Israel, oing'uaa ake enkalifu nabo olosho obo, nenapa lelo oora nkalifuni tomon o are aapuo enjore." 
Numbers31:6 Neirriwaa Musa ninche meshomo enjore eing'uaa ake enkalifu nabo olosho obo, te nebo Finehas olayioni le Eliesa ilo apolosani, tenebo nena masaa eine wueji sinyati, neeta te nkaina enye entarumpeta naosh." 
Numbers31:7 Nearare ninche iltung'ana le Midian anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa, near metua olee ake ninye pooki." 
Numbers31:8 Near metuata ilaiguanak le Midian te nebo lelo kulikae ootasesekuanaki, Efi, o Rekem, o Surian, o Hur, o Reba lelo aiguanak imiet te Midian neitoki sii aasesekuan Balaam olayioni le Beor to lalem." 
Numbers31:9 Ore lelo tung'ana le Israel neraya nena kituaak e Midian o nkera enye; neraya sii nkishu enye pooki, o nkerrai o ntokitin enye pooki." 
Numbers31:10 Ore nkanas enye pooki too wuejitin neemanya o lng'oborri lenye pooki, nepejoo te nkima," 
Numbers31:11 neya nena pooki naatarutua, aa iltung'ana o nkishu." 
Numbers31:12 Neyau lelo o yarunot o masaa naaruno enetii Musa, o Eliesa ilo apolosani, o ina umata oo ltung'ana le Israel, te lelo ng'oborri ootii enkisiajata e Moab te mbata o lkeju le Yordan te netaaniki Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Ore Musa o Eliesa ilo apolosani, o lelo arikok pooki le leina umata, neipung aapuo aanang'are ina jore ti auluo." 
Numbers31:14 Netagorokine apa Musa lelo kituaak le njore, lelo arikok loo nkalifuni o lelo arikok loo maa iip, ooetuo eing'ua enjore." 
Numbers31:15 Nejoki Musa ninche, “Itapala intae nkituaak pooki eishu?" 
Numbers31:16 Ng'ura, kuna apa naaishoo iltung'ana le Israel, te nkiteng'enare e Balaam metogolong'aki Olaitoriani, te ina bae e Peor, neaku eewuo olmeitai atua eumata o Laitoriani." 
Numbers31:17 Ore naa taata entaar pooki lee ti atua nena kera kutiti metua, niariara pooki ng'oruoi nataboitare olee metua." 
Numbers31:18 Kake ore nena silan pooki kutiti neitu ai kata eboitare olee entapal eishu metaa nkuninyi. 
Numbers31:19 Nchoo etoni ti auluo nkolong'i naapishana; pooki ng'ae ake ninye linyi otasesekuana oltung'ani, o pooki ng'ae oiseyie olmeneng'ani, entisinya ate o lelo yarunot linyi te nkolong e uni o te nkolong e naapishana." 
Numbers31:20 Entisinya enkila ake pooki o pooki toki o lchoni, o pooki toki naitobiraki too lpapit loo nkineji, o pooki toki naguetuno te nchata.”" 
Numbers31:21 Nejoki Eliesa ilo apolosani lelo tung'ana ooshomo enjore: “Ena ninye enkikoo e ina kitanapata naitanapa Olaitoriani Musa: 
Numbers31:22 sahabu ake o enkosholai o suyai o esekenkei o empirbil o ntokitin naaikununo neijia," 
Numbers31:23 Ore pooki toki nemeinos enkima, niimiemie atua enkima naa kesinyayu ninye asidanu. Ore ake etiu neijia, keitukui sii te nkare e nkitisinyata, ore pooki toki nemepikayu enkima, niimiemie atua enkima." 
Numbers31:24 Entukuo ilkilani linyi te nkolong e naapishana, niakuku taa sidain; ore te siadi ina nipuonunu taa atua ilng'oborri.”" 
Numbers31:25 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers31:26 “Nkena nena tokitin naa taaruaki, aa iltung'ana o aa nchoo, iyie o Eliesa ilo apolosani o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye e ina umata;" 
Numbers31:27 nior nena naataaruaki katitin are, aoriki lelo morran apa ooshomo enjore o e umata pooki." 
Numbers31:28 Neitalaki iltungana le njore o Laitoriani kodi naing'uaa lelo tung'ana le njore ooshomo enjore, obo ake ti atua iip imiet, too ltung'ana o too lmong'i, o too sirkon, o too nkerrai;" 
Numbers31:29 intayu olpisiai lenye nincho Eliesa ilo apolosani pee eaku olasar to Laitoriani. 
Numbers31:30 Ore to lpisiai loo Siraeli loo ltung'ana, le nena tokitin ntayu nabo ti atua onom ake ninye, too ltung'ana, o too lmong'i, o sirkon, o too nkerrai, o too nchoo pooki, ninchosho ninche ile Lawi laa ninche ooing'or olng'obor lo Laitoriani.”" 
Numbers31:31 Neas Musa o Eliesa ilo apolosani anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa. 
Numbers31:32 Ore apa nena yarunot naatelekutua naawaita lelo tung'ana le njore naa nkerra nkalifuni iip ile o ntomoni naapishana o imiet," 
Numbers31:33 o nkishu nkalifuni ntomoni naapishana o are," 
Numbers31:34 isirkon nkalifuni ntomoni ile o obo," 
Numbers31:35 o ltung'ana nkalifuni tomoni uni o are, o nkituaak neitu ai kata eboitare olee." 
Numbers31:36 Ore ilo pisiai leina rubata e le lelo apa ooshomo enjore, ore esiana enye naa nkerra nkalifuni iip uni o tomoni uni o opishana o iip imiet," 
Numbers31:37 ore elaakinoto o Laitoriani naa nkerra iip ile o ntomoni naapishana o imiet. 
Numbers31:38 Ore nkishu naa nkalifuni tomoni uni oile, ore te kuna naa ntomoni naapishana oare elaakinoto o Laitoriani." 
Numbers31:39 Ore isirkon naa nkalifuni tomoni uni o iip imiet, ore te kuna naa ntomoni ile o obo elaakinoto o Laitoriani." 
Numbers31:40 Ore iltung'ana naa nkalifuni tomon o ile, ore erubat o Laitoriani naa iltung'ana tomoni uni o are." 
Numbers31:41 Neishooyo Musa ina laakinoto, naa ninye olasar to Laitoriani, neisho Eliesa ilo apolosani, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers31:42 Ore inaaing'uaa ilo pisiai te nkalo oo ltung'ana le Israel apa naategelayie Musa aitung'uaa ine lelo tung'ana apa ooshomo enjore 
Numbers31:43 ore apa olpisiai le nena teina umata naa nkerra nkalifuni iip uni o tomoni uni o opishana o iip imiet," 
Numbers31:44 o nkishu nkalifuni tomoni uni o ile," 
Numbers31:45 o sirkon nkalifuni tomoni uni o iip imiet," 
Numbers31:46 o ltung'ana nkalifuni tomon o ile. 
Numbers31:47 Ore inaaing'uaa ilo pisiai loo ltung'ana le Israel neya Musa nabo te pooki onom, aa too ltung'ana o too nchoo, neisho ninche lelo le Lawi ooing'or olng'obor lo Laitoriani; anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Numbers31:48 Neitoki lelo kituaak ooitasheiki nkalifuni e njore o lelo arikok loo nkalifuni o lairikok le lelo maa iip aapuonu aanyikaki Musa," 
Numbers31:49 nejoki ninche Musa, “Eikena isinkan linono lelo tung'ana le njore ootii abori erikore ang, nemetii oltung'ani oiwuang'a te yiook." 
Numbers31:50 Nikiyautua iyiook olasar lo Laitoriani, entoki ake ninye nanoto oltung'ani, ntokitin e sahabu, ilkataarri o mankek, o ilgiso, o sakankarri, o saen, pee kipuonu aaitobiraki ate osotua lo lning'o te dukuya Olaitoriani.”" 
Numbers31:51 Ore Musa o Eliesa ilo apolosani neng'amaa te ninche ina sahabu pooki apa naitaaki imasaa. 
Numbers31:52 Ore ina sahabu pooki oo nkishorot naishoo ninche Olaitoriani, eing'uaa lelo arikok le lelo oora nkalifuni le njore, o lelo le maa iip naa shekeli nkalifuni tomon o ile o iip naapishana o onom." 
Numbers31:53 (Ore apa lelo tung'ana le njore newaita nena naatarutua ewa ake oltung'ani nkunenyena.) 
Numbers31:54 Ore Musa o Eliesa ilo apolosani neng'amaa ina sahabu te lelo arikok le njore loo nkalifuni, o loo maa iip neyau atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, pee eaku entoki nadamuni too ltung'ana le Israel te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Numbers32:1 Ore apa ilayiok le Ruben o layiok le Gad na keeta nkishu kumok oleng, nedol ninche enkop e Yaser o enkop e Gilead, naa ng'ura, kenyor apa ine wueji nkishu." 
Numbers32:2 Neaku eetuo apa lelo ayiok le Gad o lelo ayiok le Ruben aajoki Musa o Eliesa ilo apolosani o lelo arikok le umata," 
Numbers32:3 “Atorat, o Dibon, o Yaser, o Nimra, o Heshbon, o Eliele, o Sebam, o Nebo, o Beon," 
Numbers32:4 ore ena kop natara Olaitoriani te dukuya eumata e Israel, naa enkop nanyor nkishu, neeta isinkan linono nkishu.”" 
Numbers32:5 Nejo ninche, “Tenaa eikinoto iyiook omon too nkonyek inono, nchoo naa isinkan linono meishori ena kop meitaa enenye; mintalang iyiook olkeju le Yordan.”" 
Numbers32:6 Kake etiaka Musa lelo ayiok le Gad o lelo ayiok le Ruben, “Kepuo ilalashera linyi enjore itonini intae tene?" 
Numbers32:7 Kainyoo pee intashalishala iltauja loo ltung'ana le Israel, aamitiki elang aapuo ina kop apa naishoo Olaitoriani ninche?" 
Numbers32:8 Ina apa etaasa loo papaai linyi ina kata pee airriwaa nanu ninche te Kadesh-Barnea meshomo aadol ina kop. 
Numbers32:9 Amu ore apa pee epuo ninche oerata le Eshkol nepuo aadol ina kop, neitashal iltauja loo ltung'ana le Israel aamitiki epuo ina kop apa naishoo Olaitoriani ninche." 
Numbers32:10 Neyupuyup apa engoro o Laitoriani te ina olong, neinos ninye olmumai ejo," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Esipa meetae hoo obo le lelo tung'ana apa ooileputua aapuonu te Misiri, ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep olo adol ina kop apa nainosie olmumai pee aisho Abraham, o Isaak o Yakobo, enkaraki neitu ninche aaunokino aasuj nanu;" 
Numbers32:12 meteleku ake Kalebu olayioni le Yefune ilo loo Lkenise o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni amu etusuja ninche Olaitoriani katukul.’ 
Numbers32:13 Neyupuyup engoro o Laitoriani ti alo Siraeli, neisho ninche metilimanata ti ong'ata ilarin artam, o metaba anaa neishunye ilo porror apa pooki otaasa entorroni te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Numbers32:14 Naa ng'ura, itubulua ajing erishata oo loo minyi, entipat oo ltung'ana aing'okok, pee iponaa oleng ina goro o Laitoriani napi ti alo Siraeli!" 
Numbers32:15 Amu ti nimbelekenyanya aany isujusuju ninye, naa keigil ninye apalaa ninche ti ong'ata, nendaikiekie intae kulo tung'ana pooki.”" 
Numbers32:16 Neitoki ninche aanyikaki ninye nejoki, “Eikishetu iyiook imuatat tene te nkaraki nkerrai ang, o nkanas te nkaraki nkera ang," 
Numbers32:17 kake eikidumu iyiook iruparen, nikinapa aapuo dukuya iltung'ana le Israel o metaba anaa nikintabau ninche ewueji enye; ore nkera ang kutiti netoni too nkanas naasheta sunta te nkaraki lelo oomanya ina kop." 
Numbers32:18 Mikirrinyunye iyiook aapuonu nkang'itie ang o metaba anaa nejung oltung'ani ake pooki le Israel enjung'ore enye. 
Numbers32:19 Amu mikijung iyiook te nebo ninche lido kekun le Yordan neito idia alo; amu ore enjung'ore ang neeuo ena shoto e Yordan neito enkalo oloosaen.” 
Numbers32:20 Neaku etiaaka apa Musa ninche, “Ti niasiasa intae ena, tenaa eidumumu intae iruparen aapuo enjore te dukuya Olaitoriani," 
Numbers32:21 ore ake pooki tung'ani linyi oata ruparen nelang olkeju le Yordan alo te dukuya Olaitoriani, o metaba anaa nearaa ilmang'ati lenyena aiwuang'ie te dukuya ninye," 
Numbers32:22 neisulieki ina kop te dukuya Olaitoriani; ore naa te siadi ina nindimidimi aatorrinyoto, nimintokiki aatakinore to Laitoriani o te Israel; ore ena kop naa keaku eninyi te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Numbers32:23 Kake ti nimiasiasa ina, ng'ura, nitaasa naa eng'oki to Laitoriani; naa entayiolo nchere meeta nchere, esipa meinepu intae ina ng'oki inyi." 
Numbers32:24 Enteshetu nkanas te nkaraki nkera inyi kutiti, o muatat te nkaraki nkerrai inyi; niasiasa ina nisiligishore.”" 
Numbers32:25 Ore ilayiok le Gad o lelo ayiok le Ruben nejoki Musa, “Keas isinkan linono anaa enaitanapisho olkitok lai." 
Numbers32:26 Ore nkera ang kutiti, o nkituaak ang, o ntare ang o nkishu ang pooki, kebik te idie too nkanas e Gilead;" 
Numbers32:27 kake kegiroo isinkan linono aapuo, pooki tung'ani ake otanape alo enjore, nelo enjore te dukuya Olaitoriani, anaa enaitanapisho olkitok lai.”" 
Numbers32:28 Neisho Musa enkitanapata naipirta ninche Eliesa ilo apolosani, o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni, o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, oo loshon loo ltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers32:29 Nejoki Musa ninche, “Te nelang ile Gad o ile Ruben, pooki ng'ae otanape alo enjore te dukuya o Laitoriani, nelang te nebo intae olkeju le Yordan neisulieki ina kop to dukuya intae, ninchosho taa ninche enkop e Gilead metaa enenye;" 
Numbers32:30 kake te nemelang ninche te nebo intae; etanapate, nepuo naa aatum enkop te nebo intae te nkop e Kanaan.”" 
Numbers32:31 Newal lelo le Gad o lelo le Ruben aajo, “Ore anaa enatiaka Olaitoriani isinkan linono, ina kipuo aas." 
Numbers32:32 Eikilang iyiook olkeju le Yordan kitanapate te dukuya Olaitoriani aapuo enkop e Kanaan, ore ina jung'ore ang niking'uaa te lido kekun le Yordan.”" 
Numbers32:33 Neisho Musa ninche, lelo le Gad o lelo ayiok le Ruben o lpisiai lo losho le Manase, olayioni le Yosef, enkitoria e Sihon olaiguanani le Amori, o enkitoria e Oog olaiguanani le Bashan, ina kop o nkanas enyena te nebo ilpolosien lenye, nkanas e ina kop ti atua enkop pooki." 
Numbers32:34 Neshet lelo le Gad Dibon, o Atorat, o Aroen" 
Numbers32:35 o Atrot-shofan, o Yaser o Yogebeha," 
Numbers32:36 Bet-nimra o Bet-haran, nkanas naasheta sunta, o muatat oo nkerrai." 
Numbers32:37 Ore ile Ruben neshet Heshbon, o Eleale, o Kiriataim," 
Numbers32:38 o Nebo, o Baal-meon (eibelekenyaki nkarn enye), o Sibma, neisho ninche kulie arn nena anas naatesheta ninche." 
Numbers32:39 Ore ilayiok le Makir o layiok le Manase nepuo Gilead neya aaitaa enenye. 
Numbers32:40 Neisho Musa Makir olayioni le Manase Gilead, nemany ninye ine." 
Numbers32:41 Ore Yair olayioni le Manase nelo aya nkang'itie enye neisho ninche enkarna ajo Hafot-yair. 
Numbers32:42 Nelo Noba aya Kenat o nkang'itie enye neisho ninye enkarna ajo Noba, aipotie kewan." 
Numbers33:1 Kulo apa ilkirragarien loo ltung'ana le Israel, ina kata apa pee eipung aapuo aaing'uaa enkop e Misiri, too lororani lenye erikito Musa o Aron." 
Numbers33:2 Neiger Musa nkiterunot e lototo enye, anaa ilkirragarien pooki wueji ake ninye, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani; naa kulo apa ilkirragarien lenye te risioroto oo wuejitin neetang'asa aaimaa." 
Numbers33:3 Etudumunye ninche te Ramases to lapa le dukuya, te nkolong e tomon o imiet o lapa; te ina olong nasuju pasaka, neipung iltung'ana le Israel aapuo eishuro te dukuya ile Misiri pooki," 
Numbers33:4 ina kata enukaa ile Misiri ilkikaunot lenye pooki ootara Olaitoriani ti atua ninche; ore nkaitin enye nedung'oki Olaitoriani enkiguana. 
Numbers33:5 Neaku etudumunye apa iltung'ana le Israel te Ramases, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Sukot." 
Numbers33:6 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Sukot nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Efam, natii embata e ong'ota." 
Numbers33:7 Neitoki aadumunye te Etam neibelekenya aarrinyo Pi-ha-hirot, aa ninye natii enkalo oloo saen le Baal-sefon; nepuo ninche aaun ilng'oborri te netaaniki Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te neipirare Hahirot neim empolos e naiposha nepuo olpurkel, nepuo elototo oo nkolong'i uni tiongata e Etam, neun ilng'oborri te Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Mara nepuonu Elim; ore apa te Elim netii nchorroi tomon o are oo nkariak o ltuka ntomoni naapishana, neun ninche ilng'oborri te ine." 
Numbers33:10 Neitoki aadumunye te Elim noun ilng'oborri te mbata Enaiposha Nanyokie. 
Numbers33:11 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te mbata Enaiposha Nanyokie neun ilng'oborri tiongata e Sin. 
Numbers33:12 Neitoki aadumunye tiongata e Sin neun ilng'oborri te Dofka. 
Numbers33:13 Nedumunye ninche te Dofka nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Alush. 
Numbers33:14 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Alush nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Refidim, te ine apa nemetii enkare naok iltung'ana." 
Numbers33:15 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Refidim nepuo aaun ilng'oborri tiong'ata e Sinai. 
Numbers33:16 Neitoki ninche aadumunye tiongata e Sinai, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Kibrot-hatafa." 
Numbers33:17 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Kibrot-hatafa nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Heserot. 
Numbers33:18 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Heserot, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Ritma." 
Numbers33:19 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Ritma nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Rimon-peres. 
Numbers33:20 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Rimon-peres, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Libna." 
Numbers33:21 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Libna nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Risa. 
Numbers33:22 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Risa nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Kehelata. 
Numbers33:23 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Kehelata nepuo aaun ilng'oborri to ldoinyo le Shefer. 
Numbers33:24 Neitoki ninche aadumunye to doinyo le Shefer nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Harada. 
Numbers33:25 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Harada nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Makelot. 
Numbers33:26 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Makelot nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Tahat. 
Numbers33:27 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Tahat nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Tera. 
Numbers33:28 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Tera nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Mitka. 
Numbers33:29 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Mitka nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Hashmona 
Numbers33:30 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Hashmona nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Moserot. 
Numbers33:31 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Moserot, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Bene-yakan." 
Numbers33:32 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Bene-Yakan, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Hor-hagidgad." 
Numbers33:33 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Hor-hagidgad, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Yotbata." 
Numbers33:34 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Yotbata, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Abrona." 
Numbers33:35 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Abrona nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Esion-geber. 
Numbers33:36 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Esion-geber nepuo aaun ilng'oborri tiong'ata e Sin (aa taa Kadesh ina). 
Numbers33:37 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Kadesh nepuo aaun ilng'oborri to ldoinyo le Hor, to lkirene le nkop e Edom." 
Numbers33:38 Ore Aron ilo apolosani neilep alo enchumata o ldoinyo le Hor anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani, nelo aye te ine, to lari li artam eidipa iltung'ana le Israel aatupuku te nkop e Misiri, te nkolong e dukuya o lapa le imiet." 
Numbers33:39 Naa oloo larin iip o tikitam o okuni apa Aron ina kata pee eye to ldoinyo le Hor. 
Numbers33:40 Ore ilo Kanaani, olaiguanani le Arad, apa omanya Negeb te nkop e Kanaan, nening ina lotunoto oo ltung'ana le Israel." 
Numbers33:41 Neitoki ninche aadumunye to ldoinyo le Hor nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Salmona. 
Numbers33:42 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Salmona, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Punon." 
Numbers33:43 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Punon, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Obot." 
Numbers33:44 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Obot nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Iye-abarim te nkop oo le Moab. 
Numbers33:45 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Iyim, nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Dibon-gad." 
Numbers33:46 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Dibon-gad nepuo aaun ilng'oborri te Almon-diblataim. 
Numbers33:47 Neitoki ninche aadumunye te Almon-diblataim nepuo aaun ilng'oborri too ldoinyo le Abarim, te nkipirakinoto e Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Neitoki ninche aadumunye too ldoinyo le Abarim nepuo aaun ilng'oborri too nkisiajat e Moab te mbata e Yordan eipirare Yeriko. 
Numbers33:49 Neun ninche ilng'oborri te mbata e Yordan ebaiki Bet-Yeshimot o metabaiki Abel-shitim too nkisiajat e Moab. 
Numbers33:50 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa te nena kisiajat e Moab te mbata e Yordan eipirare Yeriko," 
Numbers33:51 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel, Ti nilang'ilang'a Yordan aapuo enkop e Kanaan," 
Numbers33:52 nipuopuo naa aaraa lelo pooki oomanya ina kop aaiwuang'ie te dukuya intae nindaikiekie nena kitanyaanyukot enye oo soito, nindaikiekie nena kitanyaanyukot enye naaipurjuno, nigiligili nene wuejitin neeika naaitainyeki lasarri pooki;" 
Numbers33:53 niyaya ina kop aaitaa eninyi nimanyimanya, amu aishoo nanu intae ina kop pee iyaya." 
Numbers33:54 Ijung'ujung'u intae ina kop te oshoto e nkukuo te risioroto oo lmareita linyi; ore olosho kitok neishori enjung'ore kitok, ore olosho oti neishori enjung'ore kiti; anaa ake enadoiki enkukuo oltung'ani, neaku ina enenye; nijung'ujung'u te risioroto oo loshon loo loo papaai linyi." 
Numbers33:55 Kake ti nimiaraa lelo oomaaya ina kop aaiwang'ie te dukuya intae ore lelo lilekuku netiu anaa iltidii too nkonyek inyi o lkiku too matuan inyi, naa kepuo ninche aaitanyamal intae te ina kop nipuopuo aamany." 
Numbers33:56 Naa kalo nanu aitaas intae ina duoo natadamua pee aitaas ninche.” 
Numbers34:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers34:2 “Ntanapa iltung'ana le Israel tiaaki ninche, Ti nipuopuo aajing enkop e Kanaan, (ena kop nalo aaku enjungore inyi, ina kop e Kanaan ebaiki e enebaiki)," 
Numbers34:3 ore enkalo inyi e kopikop naa keaku ebaiki ongata e Sin amanaa tolkirine le Edom, naa ore olpolosie linyi te nkalo e kopikop naa ebaiki enkiting'oto Enaiposha e Munyan te nkalo o loosaen;" 
Numbers34:4 nelo olpolosie linyi neirrugo aing'or kopikop e nkilepunoto tenkalo e Akrabim, nedung alo Sin, ore enkiting'oto enye naa keaku kopikop e Kadesh-Bar nea; neitoki adoyio alo o metabai Hasar-adari, negiroo alo Asmon;" 
Numbers34:5 neitoki olpolosie aibelekenya te Asmon o meshomo Ereyiet e Misiri, ore enkitingoto enye naa te naiposha." 
Numbers34:6 “Ore to lpolosie lo loontoluo nchoo eaku Enaiposha Kitok o lo manaa lenye; ele ninye eaku olpolosie lino lo loontoluo. 
Numbers34:7 “Ele olo aaku olpolosie lino le moikuape: ore ebaiki Enaiposha Kitok, entipik olpolosie linyi o metabaiki oldoinyo le Hor;" 
Numbers34:8 ore ebaiki oldoinyo le Hor entipik olpolosie o metabaiki enkutuk e Hamat, ore enkiting'oto e ilo polosie nelo aaku Sedad" 
Numbers34:9 neitoki ilo polosie alo abaya Sifron, ore enkiting'oto enye nelo aaku Hasar-enan ele ninye; olo aaku olpolosie linyi le moikuape." 
Numbers34:10 “Entobira ilpolosien linyi lo loo saen ebaiki Hasar-enan o metabaiki Shefam; 
Numbers34:11 nedoyio ilo polosie alo ebaiki te Shefam o metabaiki Ribla te nkalo o loo saen le Aim; nedoyio ilo polosie alo o metabaiki olmanie le naiposha e Kineret te nkalo oloosaen; 
Numbers34:12 nedoyio ilo polosie alo olkeju le Yordan, ore enkiting'oto enye nelo aaku Enaiposha e Munyan. Ena ninye nalo aaku enkop inyi emanita ilpolosien pooki.”" 
Numbers34:13 Neitanap Musa iltung'ana le Israel ejo, “Ena kop intae ipuopuo aajung te oshoto e nkukuo, naa ninye eitanapishe Olaitoriani pee eisho iloshon ooudo o lpisiai lo losho;" 
Numbers34:14 amu ore olosho loo layiok le Ruben too nkajijik oo loo menye, o losho loo le Gad too nkajijik oo loo menye, netang'amutua enjung'ore enye, o lpisiai sii lo losho le Manase;" 
Numbers34:15 ore lelo oshon pokira oare o ilo pisiai lo losho netang'amutua enjung'ore enye te lido kekun lo lkeju le Yordan, etalita Yeriko, te nkalo o loosaen, te neilepunye enkolong.”" 
Numbers34:16 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa," 
Numbers34:17 “Kuna ninche nkarn oo ltung'ana e lelo tung'ana oopuo aadung'oki intae enkop naaku enjung'ore inyi: Eliesa ilo apolosani o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni. 
Numbers34:18 Iwa ake olarikoni obo te pooki osho, pee epuo aaor enkop naaku enjung'ore." 
Numbers34:19 Kuna ninche nkarn e lelo tung'ana: ore olosho le Yuda, naa Kalebu olayioni le Yefune." 
Numbers34:20 Ore olo losho loo layiok le Simeon naa Shemuel olayioni le Amihud. 
Numbers34:21 Ore olo losho loo layiok le Benchamen naa Elida olayioni le Kislon. 
Numbers34:22 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo layiok le Dan naa Buki olayioni le Yogli. 
Numbers34:23 Ore oloo layiok le Yosef: lo losho lo layiok le Manase, ore olarikoni naa Haniel olayioni le Efod." 
Numbers34:24 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo layiok le Efraim, naa Kemuel olayioni le Shiftan." 
Numbers34:25 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo layiok le Sebulon, naa Elisafan olayioni le Parnak." 
Numbers34:26 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo layiok le Isaakar naa Paltiel olayioni le Asaan. 
Numbers34:27 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo layiok le Asheri naa Ahihud olayioni le Shelomi. 
Numbers34:28 Ore olarikoni lo losho loo layiok le Naftali naa Padehel olayioni le Amihud. 
Numbers34:29 Kulo ninche lelo lewa apa ooitanapa Olaitoriani metooriki ina jung'ore iltung'ana le Israel te nkop e Kanaan.” 
Numbers35:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa too nkisiajat e Moab, te mbata o lkeyu le Yordan, etalita Yeriko," 
Numbers35:2 “Ntanapa iltung'ana le Israel, nchere pee eisho ile Lawi enjung'ore naaku enenye, nkanas naapuo aamany; nincho sii lelo le Lawi ndaat oo nchoo naamanita nena anas." 
Numbers35:3 Ore nena anas naa nkunenye naamany ore nena daat oo nchoo naa inoo nkishu enye o masaa enye o enoo ng'uesi enye. 
Numbers35:4 Ore nena daat oo nchoo e nena anas nipuopuo intae aaisho ile Lawi, nchoo ebaiki esuntai e nkanasa neito idia alo nelo iroruat iip ong'uan o onom too nkaloli pooki." 
Numbers35:5 Entetem auluo enkanasa, ore te nkalo o loo saen naa iroruat nkalifuni are, ore te nkalo e kopikop naa iroruat nkalifuni are, ore te nkalo o loo ntoluo naa iroruat nkalifuni are, ore enkalo e moikuape naa iroruat nkalifuni are, niaku ina anasa naitorit, keaku ena enenye, nairritishore too nkanas enye." 
Numbers35:6 Ore nena anas nilo iyie aisho ile Lawi naa nena anas naasaruni naa ninche nchosho oltung'ani oitayu loikop metasaru, ore te nebo nena ipuopuo intae aaishooyo nkanas artam o are." 
Numbers35:7 Ore nena anas pooki nipuopuo intae aaisho ile Lawi naa artam o isiet te nebo ndaat enye oo nchoo. 
Numbers35:8 Naa ore te nena anas nipuopuo intae aaishooyo naaing'uaa imasaa oo ltung'ana le Israel, ore to losho kitok niyaya nkumok, ore to losho oti niyaya nkuti; olosho ake te risioroto e njung'ore natujung'o ninye, neisho ake nkanas enyena ile Lawi.”" 
Numbers35:9 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Musa," 
Numbers35:10 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel, te nipuopuo aalang olkeju le Yordan aapuo enkop e Kanaan," 
Numbers35:11 nigelulu naa nkanas naaku nkanas naasaruni te nkaraki intae, pee etum pooki ng'ae oitayu loikop, oar oltung'ani metua eitu eotiki atasaru." 
Numbers35:12 Ore nena anas naa keaku te intae inaasaruni te nkaraki ilo oitalaku elap, pee meari ilo otasesekuanishe metua o metaba anaa neitashe te dukuya eumata omeiguanareki." 
Numbers35:13 Ore nena anas ninchooyoyo naa nena anas inyi ile naasaruni. 
Numbers35:14 Enchoru nkanas uni te lido kekun lo lkeju le Yordan, o nkanas uni te nkop e Kanaan naaku nkanas naasaruni." 
Numbers35:15 Ore kuna anas pokira ile naa keaku inaasaru iltung'ana le Israel, o ilo omoni o ilo otamanyishe ti atua ninche, pee etum pooki ng'ae oitayu loikop, oar oltung'ani metua te eitu eotiki atasaru." 
Numbers35:16 “Kake te neosh ninye olikae to sekenkei, neaku etua ilo, naa oloo loikop ninye; ore ilo oitayio loikop naa keari metua." 
Numbers35:17 Naa te nenang ninye olikae to soit oata te nkaina neaku etua ilo tung'ani, naa oloo loikop ninye; ore oltung'ani oitayu loikop naa keari metua." 
Numbers35:18 Aashu te neosh ninye olikae te nchata naibung'ita te nkaina, naidim ataara oltung'ani metua neaku etua ilo, netaa ninye oloo loikop; ore oltung'ani oitayu loikop neari ninye metua." 
Numbers35:19 Ore ilo oitalaku osarge ninye makewan oar ilo aitayio iloikop metua; te nenang'are ninye near ninye metua. 
Numbers35:20 Naa tenerem ninye tenkaraki enkiba, anaa eipony ninye, aashu etarresho ninye, neaku etua," 
Numbers35:21 aashu ore te mang'atisho neosh ninye te nkaina enye, neaku etua ilo, ore naa ilo otooshishe neari ninye metua; oloo loikop ninye; ore ilo oitalaku osarge near ilo oitayio loikop metua, te nenang'are ninye." 
Numbers35:22 “Kake tenetaremo ninye nabo kata to lbuket metii mang'atisho, aashu enang ninye ti ae toki eitu eresh aanyu," 
Numbers35:23 anaa easishore osoit oidim atara oltung'ani metua, neaku etua ilo tung'ani, hoo duoo neme olmang'atinta lenye, nemeyieuaki duoo entorroni," 
Numbers35:24 nerish naa ina umata ilo oitayio loikop o ilo oitalaku osarge te risioroto e kuna kikoot. 
Numbers35:25 Ore ina umata nekordu ilo oitayio loikop te nkaina e ilo oitalaku osarge, ore ina umata nepik ninye atua ina anasa enye nasaruni, naa ninye elo aisikaki, nelo ninye aton te ine o metaba anaa neye ilo apolosani kitok apa otubukokoki eilata nasinya aaput." 
Numbers35:26 Kake te nelo ilo tung'ani oitayio loikop, te nkata ake ninye pooki agiroo ilpolosien le ina anasa enye nasaruni, apa naa ninye eisikaka," 
Numbers35:27 ore ilo oitalaku osarge neinepu ninye ti oriong ilpolosien le ina anasa enye nasaruni, near ilo oitalaku osarge ilo oitayio loikop, nemeeta entioto o sarge." 
Numbers35:28 Amu meeta nchere meton ilo tung'ani ti atua ina anasa enye nasaruni o metabau keeya o lapolosani kitok; kake ore te siadi enkeeya o lapolosani kitok neidim ilo tung'ani atorrinyoyu ashomo enkop enye. 
Numbers35:29 “Ore kuna baa naa keaku enkitanapata o endung'oto e nkiguana te intae, too iishoritin inyi pooki o ti atua imanyishoreitin inyi pooki." 
Numbers35:30 Te near oltung'ani ake olikae metua, ore ilo oitayio loikop neari metua te nchakenisho oo lchakenini; kake meetae oltung'ani oari metua te nchakenisho olchakeni obo." 
Numbers35:31 Ore ake eyia, eming'amaa ntokitin e lakunoto e nkishui e ilo oitayio loikop, oata enkitarruoroto e keeya; kake keari ninye metua." 
Numbers35:32 Niming'amaa entoki e lakunoto e ilo oisikaka enkanasa enye nasaruni, pee etum ninye atorrinyoyu alo aton te ina kop te dukuya keeya o lapolosani kitok." 
Numbers35:33 Emisarkionie naa ena kop nitii; amu keisarkionie osarge enkop, nemeetae entoki naitobiri naidim aipoo, amu ore ilo sarge otubukokine enkop, meteleku ake osarge le ilo oibukoyie." 
Numbers35:34 Emisarkionie naa ena kop nimanyanya naa ninye sii nanu atii atua; amu ore nanu Olaitoriani namanya atua iltung'ana le Israel.” 
Numbers36:1 Ore lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, oo lmareita loo layiok le Gilead, olayioni le Makir, olayioni le Manase o loo nkajijik oo loo menye oo layiok le Yosef, nepuonu aanyiku neiro te dukuya Musa o te dukuya larikok, nena lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye oo ltung'ana le Israel," 
Numbers36:2 nejo ninche, “Eitanapa apa Olaitoriani olkitok lai pee eishooyo enkop anaa enjung'ore te oshoto e nkukuo aisho iltung'ana le Israel, neitanapaki apa olkitok lai o Laitoriani pee eisho enjung'ore e Selofehad olalashe lang ntoyie enyena." 
Numbers36:3 Kake tenaa keyama ninche obo ake ninye loo layiok le kulie oshon loo ltung'ana le Israel ore naa enjung'ore enye neyae aaitung'uaa enjung'ore oo loo papa, neponikini ina jung'ore e ilo osho ora olenye; neaku keiwuang'ieki te oshoto enkukuo e ina jung'ore ang." 
Numbers36:4 Naa te nebau ilo sirua loo ltung'ana le Israel odamunyeki ilarin onom, neitokini aaponaa enjung'ore enye aaponiki ilo osho ora olenye; ore enjung'ore enye neyai aaitung'uaa enjung'ore olosho loo loopapa.”" 
Numbers36:5 Neitanap Musa iltung'ana le Israel te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani, ejo, “Etisipa olosho loo layiok le Yosef." 
Numbers36:6 Ena ninye eitanapisho Olaitoriani ti alo nena toyie e Selofehad, ‘Nchoo ninche meyama oloba anaa oladol aajo sidai, kake nchoo ake duoo eyami ti atua ilmarei lo losho loo loo menye." 
Numbers36:7 Ore enjung'ore oo ltung'ana le Israel nemeibelekenyi to losho obo aaya olikae osho, amu ore pooki ng'ae too ltung'ana le Israel neibung'are enjung'ore o losho loo loo menye." 
Numbers36:8 Naa ore entito pooki ake naata enjung'ore te pooki ake ninye osho loo ltung'ana le Israel naa kelo aaku enkitok e obo lo losho lolmarei le menye, pee aa ore pooki ng'ae too ltung'ana le Israel netum anoto enjung'ore oo loomenye." 
Numbers36:9 Metaa meetae enjung'ore naibelekenyi aaitung'uaa olosho obo aaya olikae; amu ore ake pooki osho loo tung'ana le Israel neibung'are enjung'ore enye.’ ” 
Numbers36:10 Ore nena toyie e Selofehad neas anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa; 
Numbers36:11 amu ore Mahalal, o Tirsa, o Hogla, o Mika o Noa, nena toyie e Selofehad neyama layiok loo lalashera le menye." 
Numbers36:12 Eyamaki apa ninche too lmareita loo layiok le Manase olayioni le Yosef, ore enjung'ore enye neton to losho lo lmarei le papaai lenye." 
Numbers36:13 Kuna ninche nkitanapat o nkiguanat apa naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel, too nkisiajat e Moab, te mbata olkeju le Yordan etalita Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Kulo ninche irorei apa ooirorie Musa iltung'ana le Israel pooki te lido kekun lo lkeju le Yordan ti ong'ata, te Araba te nkipirakinoto e Sufu, te rishata e Paran o Tofel, o Laban, o Heserot o Disahab." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Nkolong'i tomon oobo elototo ebaiki Horeb te nkoitoi o ldoinyo le Seir o metabaiki Kadesh-Barnea,"
