Deuteronomy1:3 ore to lari le artam, te nkolong e dukuya olapa le tomon oobo, neirorie Musa iltung'ana le Israel te risioroto e nena pooki naaishoo ninye Olaitoriani aitanap ninche." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Ina kata eidipa ninye atimira Sihon olaiguanani loo Lamori apa omanya Heshbon o Oog olaiguanani le Bashan apa omanya Ashtarot o Edrei. 
Deuteronomy1:5 Ore te lido kekun lo lkeju le Yordan, te nkop e Moab, neinosu Musa ena kitanapata, ejo," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Etiaaka apa iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang te Horeb, ‘Itobiko intae oleng tele doinyo;" 
Deuteronomy1:7 embelekenyunye enteru elototo inyi, nipuopuo ina kop oo ldoinyo e Amori, ole latia enye pooki te Araba, teina kop oo ldoinyo o te nkop nashong'ishong, o Negeb, o lomanaa le naiposha, ina kop ooLkanaan, o Lebanon o metabaiki ilo keju kitok, ilo keju le Frati." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ng'ura airragie nanu enkop te dukuya intae. Enchom intae ewaita ina kop apa nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai too loo papaai linyi te Abraham, te Isaak o te Yakobo, pee eisho ninche o eishoi enye tesiadi ninche.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Ore apa teina kata atiaaka intae, ‘Maidim nanu openy atanapa intae," 
Deuteronomy1:10 etopona intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, naa ng'ura, ibaba intae ena olong anaa ilakir le shumata te nkumoi." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Meitaa intae Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo papaai linyi katitin enkalifu te nkumoi alang enibaba. Nemayian intae, anaa enaisiligie intae!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Kaji nanu aiko openy te nanap enkiroishi o lola linyi, o loo larrabali linyi?’" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Entegelu iltung'ana ng'eni, oodamisho neeta eyiolounoto, te risioroto oo loshon linyi, pee agelu nanu ninche metaa ilaitasheikinok linyi." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Nikitawalikitia intae, aajo, ‘Ore ina bae nitejo naa eisidai te nikiaas iyiook.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Neaku aawa apa nanu lelo arikok loo loshon linyi, lelo tung'ana ng'eni arriyiak, naitaa ninche ilarikok linyi, ilaitasheikinok loo nkalifuni o ilaitasheikinok loo maa iip, o ilaitasheikinok loo maa-onom, o laitasheikinok loo maa tomon ilkituaak tiatua iloshon linyi pooki." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Naitanap apa nanu ilarishak linyi te ina kata, ajoki ‘Entoning nkiguanat oo lalashera linyi entirish ninche, nidung'udung'u enkiguana te sipata te rishata o ltung'ani o lalashe lenye, aashu ilo likae otii te nebo ninye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Nimiatata olkep te ndung'okinoto e nkiguana; entoning oltung'ani oti o lkitok, tenkitorisiokinoto; miureyu enkomom o ltung'ani amu ore endung'okinoto enkiguana naa ene Nkai, ore ilo rorei ogol te iyie niyau enatii nanu, naa kaning nanu,’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 naitanapa apa nanu intae teina kata nena tokitin pooki naaishiakino niasiasa. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Kitudumunye apa iyiook te Horeb, nikipuo aaim ina ong'ata sapuk nagol nitoduaa, kiimita ina oitoi eina kop oo ldoinyo nalo Amori, anaa enaitanapa iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang; nikipuonu Kadesh-Barnea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Naitoki nanu ajoki intae, ‘Itabautua intae enkop oo ldoinyo e Amori, apa naishoo iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Ng'ura eirragie Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ena kop te dukuya intae; elepa enchom, ewaita anaa apa enatiaka intae Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo papaai linyi; miureishoyuyu niming'aing'aiyiayia.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Nikipuonunu intae pooki aanyikaki nanu, nijojo, ‘Emairriwai iltung'ana meituruko te iyiook aajur enkop, neyaki iyiook olomoni le nkoitoi nikiim o nena anas nikipuo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Etalie apa ina bae aa sidai te nanu, nagelu nanu iltung'ana tomon oare te intae, oltung'ani obo ake to losho;" 
Deuteronomy1:24 neibelekenya ninche neilep aapuo ina kop oo ndoinyo, nebau oerata le Eshkol neikitalan." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Neyau ninche too nkaik enye embata oo lng'anayio leina kop neitadou aayaki iyiook, neitoki aayaki iyiook olkilikuai, nejo, ‘Enkop sidai ina naishoo iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Ore ake eyia eitu intae ipuopuo, kake itogolong'akita enkitanapata o Laitoriani Enkai inyi;" 
Deuteronomy1:27 Ning'unyung'unyunyu tiatua ilng'oborri linyi, nijojo ‘Enkaraki naiba iyiook Olaitoriani pee eitupukuo iyiook te nkop e Misiri, pee elotu apik iyiook atua nkaik oo Lamoni, pee eidaikie iyiook." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Kainyoo iyiook kiilep aapuo aaing'oru? Eitalepoitie ilalashera lang iltauja lang, ejo, “Eisapuki lelo tung'ana naa adoru aalang iyiook; eikituaak nena anas naashetuno aabaiki shumata; ore sii kitoduaa ilayiok le Anakim teine.”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Naitoki nanu ajoki intae, eming'aeng'ai aashu iureyuyu ninche." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Ore Olaitoriani Enkai inyi oshi laa ninye orikoo intae, ninye makewan olo aarisho amitu intae, anaa apa enaitaasa ninye intae te Misiri te dukuya nkonyek inyi," 
Deuteronomy1:31 o tiong'ata teine apa netodolie Olaitoriani Enkai inyi enap intae, anaa enanap oltung'ani enkerai enye teina oitoi apa pooki niima o metaba anaa nipuonunu ene wueji." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ore ake etii ele rorei eitu, intae irukuruku Olaitoriani Enkai inyi," 
Deuteronomy1:33 laa ninye apa oshomo dukuya intae te nkoitoi pee eing'uraki intae ewueji niunienie ilng'oborri linyi, nerikoo intae te nkima kewarie, pee eitodol intae enkoitoi niimiimi, nerikoo intae te nkatampoi te ndama." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Nening Olaitoriani lelo rorei linyi, negoro, neinos ninye olmumai ejo," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Medol ninye oltung'ani obo le ilo porror torrono, ina kop apa nainosie olmumai nchere kaisho loo papaai linyi," 
Deuteronomy1:36 meteleku ake Kaleb olayioni le Yefune; kelo ninye adol, ninye ake o nkera enyena alo nanu aisho ina kop metororua ninye too nkejek enyena, enkaraki nairukurukore ninye tukul Olaitoriani!’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Aatagorokine sii nanu, Olaitoriani te nkaraki intae, nejo, ‘Milo sii iyie ajing atua ine," 
Deuteronomy1:38 Yoshua olayioni le Nuni, ilo oitashe te dukuya iyie, ninye olo ajing; ntagolo ninye oshoke, amu ninye olo aidimie Israel metujung'o ina kop." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Ore nena kera inyi nitejo intae keidaikieki o nkera inono, nena nemeyiolo taata ninche esidai o entorrono, kepuo ninche atua ine, naa kaisho nanu ninche ina kop, naa keya ninche aaitaa enenye." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kake ore iyie, mbelekenyayu, shomo ong'ata mpira enkalo Enaiposha Nanyokie.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Nikintokiki intae aawalaki nanu nijojo, ‘Kitasa eng'oki to Laitoriani, eikilep iyiook aapuo olarrabal, anaa enaitanapa iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang.’ Nerretena ake pooki tung'ani too masaa enyena olarrabal, ejo tenaa kelelek eilepakini ina kop oo ndoinyo." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Tiaaki ninche, Emilep aapuo olarrabal amu matii nanu atua intae, pee memiri ake intae te dukuya ilmang'ati linyi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Neaku airorie nanu intae nianyianya intae ining'ining'i; kake itogolong'akita enkitanapata o Laitoriani, ore to lwuasa linyi nilepilepe aapuo ina kop oo ldoinyo." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ore lelo tung'ana le Amori oomanya ina kop oo ldoinyo nepuonu aarare intae, nemir intae anaa enamirisho ilotorok, near intae aairragie te Seir, o metabaiki Horma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Nirrinyunyenye intae aapuonu aaishir te dukuya Olaitoriani; kake eitu ening Olaitoriani oltoilo linyi neitu eisho intae enkiok. 
Deuteronomy1:46 Neaku itobiko intae te Kadesh nkolong'i kumok, te nena olong'i apa nitobiko intae teine." 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Nikintoki aaibelekenya nikipuo ong'ata, enkalo Enaiposha Nanyokie, anaa apa enaatiaka Olaitoriani; ore too nkolong'i kumok nikipuo aamanaa te Seir." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Naaitoki Olaitoriani ajoki nanu," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Itamanaitie intae te le doinyo te nkata naado; embelekenyata enchom enkalo e moikuape. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Naa ntanapa lelo tung'ana letaa ijojo pee iimiimi olpolosie loo lalashera linyi, lelo ayiok le Esau, oomanya Seir; keureishoyu ninche te nkaraki intae metaa eng'ura ate oleng;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 emiarare ninche, amu maisho nanu intae hoo enkop enye, a-a hoo ninye eneba endap e nkeju amu aishoo nanu Esau oldoinyo le Seir metaa olenye." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Ipuopuo intae aainyiang'u endaa te ninche too mpisai, pee itumutumu aainosa, naa einyang'ung'u sii enkare te ninche too mpisai, pee itumutumu aatook." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Amu etamayiana intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi te siaai pooki oo nkaik inyi; eyiolo ninye enkiimata inyi ena ong'ata sapuk; ore te kulo arin artam etaa Olaitoriani Enkai inyi tenebo intae; eitu eng'oriki intae toki.’ 
Deuteronomy2:8 Neaku kishomo apa iyiook, nikigiroo ilalashera lang lelo ayiok le Esau, oomanya Seir, nikigiroo enkoitoi e Araba ebaiki Elat o Esiong'eber. “Nikimbelekenya aaing'or enkalo olpurkel le Moab." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Mintanyamal iltung'ana le Moab aashu intayunye ninche olarrabal, amu maisho nanu intae erubata ninye nabo enkop enye metaa eninyi, amu aishoo nanu Ari ilayiok le Lutu meitaa enenye.’" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Iltung'ana le Emim apa oomanya ine. 
Deuteronomy2:11 Olosho kitok naa kumok naa adoru anaa iltung'ana le Anaki; neishooki sii ninche enkarna anaa ile Anak naji Refaim, kake keipot iltung'ana le Moab ninche aajo Emim." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Emanya sii apa ile Hori Seir, kake etaraitie ilayiok le Esau ninche, neidaikie ninche te dukuya ninche, nemanyisho ninche te rishata enye; anaa apa enaikuna Israel teina kop enye, apa naishoo ninche Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Entudumunye naa taata, nipuopuo aalang olkeju le Seredi. Neaku kishomo iyiook aalang olkeju le Seredi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Ore enkata ebaiki pee kipuo iyiook te Kadesh-Barnea omatalang olkeju le Seredi naa ilarin tomoni uni o isiet, o metaba anaa neaku ore olporror pooki, aa taa lelo tung'ana lo larrabal neidaaya ninche too lng'oborri, anaa apa enainosie Olaitoriani ninche olmumai." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Amu esipa enkaina o Laitoriani apa naarare ninche, pee eidaikie ninche te lelo ng'oborri, o metaba anaa neidak ninche." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Neaku ore ake pee eidak lelo tung'ana pooki to larrabal neye ninche tiatua olorere," 
Deuteronomy2:17 naajoki nanu Olaitoriani," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Ore ena olong ilo iyie adung olpolosie le Moab te Ari; 
Deuteronomy2:19 Ore ake pee itaaniki enkop oo layiok le Amon, nimintanyamal ninche aashu iarare ninche, amu maaisho nanu iyie erubata ninye nabo enkop oo layiok le Amon metaa enino, amu aishoo nanu layiok le Lutu meitaa enenye.’" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Ore sii ine naa keyioloi nchere enkop e Refaim; Refaim apa emanya ine, kake kejo ile Amoni ninche Samsumim," 
Deuteronomy2:21 olorere kitok naa kumok, naa adoru anaa ile Anakim, kake eidakie Olaitoriani ninche te dukuya ninche, neoruni ninche ina kop nemanyi te rishata enye:" 
Deuteronomy2:22 anaa apa enaitaasa ninye ilayiok le Esau oomanya Seir ina kata apa pee eidaikie ninye ile Hori te dukuya ninche, neoruni enkop enye nemanyi te rishata enye o tene." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ore ile Afim, lelo oomanya nkang'itie kutiti ometabaiki Gasa, ore lelo le Kaftorim apa ooing'ua Kafta neidaikie ninche nemany enkop enye te rishata enye.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Entudumunye enteru elototo inyi, nipuopuo lido kekun o erata le Arnon, ng'ura, aishorua nanu apik atua enkaina ino Sihon ilo Amori, aiguanani le Heshbon, o enkop enye; nteru iwa niarare ninye to larrabal." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Ore ena olong kaiteru nanu apik enkiputukuny olkirutoto te nkaraki iyie shumata kulo ootii abori pooki, pee epuo ninche aaning ilomon likimpirta iyie neikirikira neirut te nkaraki iyie." 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Nairriwaa apa nanu ilkiliku teina ong'ata e Kedemot airriwaki Sihon olaiguanani le Heshbon, too rorei le seriani, ajoki," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Nchooki nanu maimai atua enkop ino; enkoitoi ake aim nanu, nemaiwuang nanu alo enkaina e tatene aashu ene kedienye." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Eikimiraki iyie nanu endaa too mpisai, pee atum ainosa, nikincho nanu enkare too ropiyiani, pee atum atooko; nchooki ake duoo iyie enaimaa too nkejek," 
Deuteronomy2:29 anaa apa enaitaasa nanu ilayiok le Esau oomanya Seir o Lmoabu oomanya Ari, o metaba anaa nalang alo lido kekun le Yordan ajing atua ina kop naishoo iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Kake eitu eisho iyiook Sihon olaiguanani le Heshbon matogiroi ninye, amu eitagolo Olaitoriani Enkai inyi oltau lenye pee etum ninye aishoru atipika enkaina inyi anaa ena olong." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Ng'ura, aiterua nanu aisho intae Sihon o enkop enye; enteru ewaita, pee itumutumu aatamany ena kop.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Nelotu Sihon aarare iyiook, ninye o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, neitayu olarrabal te Yahas." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Neishoru Olaitoriani Enkai ang ninye, nikimir iyiook ninye, o layiok lenyena, o ltung'ana lenyena pooki." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Nikimbung iyiook nkanas enyena teina kata nikindaikie tukul pooki anasa, ilewa, o nkituaak, o nkera; meetae hoo obo otung'uayioki eishu." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Nkishu kiwaita aaraya tenebo iyarunot e nena anas nikimbung'a. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Ore ebaiki Aroer naa ninye natii embata o erata le Arnon, o ebaiki ina anasa natii oerata ometabaiki Gilead meetae enkanasa nalusoo te iyiook; eishorua Olaitoriani Enkai ang pooki apik atua nkaik ang." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Ina kop pooki ake oo layiok le Amon eitu inyikakiki, aa taa, inkiyopat o lkeju le Yaboko o nkanas eina kop oo ldoinyo, o pooki wueji neitanapa iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang ajoki emipuo." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Nikintoki iyiook aaibelekenya nikipuo aaim enkoitoi e Bashan; neipang'u Oog ilo aiguanani le Bashan alotu aarare iyiook, ninye o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, nearare iyiook te Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Kake aatiaka nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Miureyu ninye; amu aishorua nanu ninye, o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, o enkop enye apik atua enkaina ino, naa ilo iyie aitaas ninye anaa enintaasa Sihon ilo aiguanani le Amori, apa omanya Heshbon.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Neaku eishorua sii Olaitoriani Enkai ang apik atua enkaina ang Oog, ilo aiguanani le Bashan, o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, nikiosh iyiook ninye o metaba anaa neaku meeta ninye olaishirani otelekakaki ninye." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Nikiya iyiook nena anas enyena pooki teina kata meetae hoo enkanasa neitu iyiook kiya te ninche - nkanas ntomoni ile, enkop pooki e Argob, ina kitoria e Oog tiatua Bashan." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Ore kuna pooki naa nkanas apa naasheta isunta adoru, o nchomito oo sekenke, ore tenebo nena netii nkang'itie kutiti kumok oleng nemesheta sunta." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Nikindaikie iyiook ninche katukul anaa apa enikinkuna Sihon, ilo aiguanani le Heshbon, aaidaikie pooki anasa, ilewa, o nkituaak o nkera." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kake ore nkishu pooki o nena masaa naatii nkang'itie kiwaita aaraya. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Neaku kiwaita iyiook ina kop teina kata too nkaik e lelo aiguanak oare le Amori ootii lido kekun le Yordan, ebaiki oerata le Arnon o metabaiki oldoinyo le Hermon." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Kejo apa lelo le Sidon oldoinyo le Hermon Sirioni, nejo ile Amori Senir)." 
Deuteronomy3:10 Ore nena anas pooki eina kop naiperere Gilead pooki o Bashan pooki, ebaiki Saleka o Adrei, nkanas e nkitoria e Oog tiatua Bashan." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Amu Oog ake ilo aiguanani le Bashan etung'ueikiaki olpisiai le Refaim, ng'ura, ore endapash enye naa ene sekenkei; aimetii ninye atua Raba o lelo Amoni? Ore enkadoro enye naa ntemat naaudo ore endapasho naa ntemat ong'uan te ntemata e nkaina o ltung'ani." 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Ore apa pee kiya iyiook ina kop teina kata, naisho nanu ile Ruben o le Gad ina kop eiteru te Aroer, natii olkirine lo oerata le Afnon, o lpisiai oitorit ina kop oo ldoinyo e Gilead tenebo nkanas enyena;" 
Deuteronomy3:13 ore ina ae kop pooki e Gilead o Bashan pooki, ina kitoria e Oog, aa taa, ina kop pooki e Argob aishoo nanu olpisiai oitorit Manase. Ore ina Bashan pooki naa keji enkop e Refaim." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Ore Yair ilo le Manase neya ina kop pooki e Argob, aa taa Bashan, o metabaiki olpolosie loo Lgeshuri - oloo Lmakaati neipotie nena ang'itie kutiti kewan ajo, Hofot-Yair, anaa enatiu o taata." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ore Hakir naisho nanu Gilead," 
Deuteronomy3:16 ore ile Ruben o le Gad naishoo nanu ina kop ebaiki Gilead o metabaiki oerata le Arnon, tenebo empolos o erata metaa olpolosie o metabaiki olkeju le Yabok, ilo polosie loo Lamori;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 o Araban sii tenebo Yordan pee eaku olpolosie, ebaiki Kineret o metabaiki enaiposha e Araba, ina aiposha naisukut, tiabori lelo jurumi le Pisga te nkalo o loo saen." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Naitanap apa nanu intae teina kata, ajoki, ‘Eishoo intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ena kop pee eaku eninyi; ore lelo lewa linyi ootanapate keeim ninche ene eeta ruparen te dukuya ilalashera linyi, lelo tung'ana le Israel." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Kake ore nkituaak inyi, o nkera inyi kutiti, o nkishu inyi (ayiolo nanu ajo iatata nkishu kumok) netoni ninche te nena anas naishoo nanu intae," 
Deuteronomy3:20 ometaba anaa neisho Olaitoriani enkiyeng'iyeng ilalashera linyi, anaa enaishoo intae, nemany sii ninche ina kop naisho Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ninche te lido kekun le Yordan; nitumutumu taa aatorrinyoto, oltung'ani ake, ashomo ine wueji enye naishoo nanu intae.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Naitanapa apa nanu Yoshua ina kata ajoki, Etoduaa nkonyek inono nena pooki naataasa Olaitoriani Enkai ino te kulo aiguanak pokira oare; neijia elo aiko Olaitoriani too nkitoriat pooki nilo iyie aimaa," 
Deuteronomy3:22 miureyu ninche amu Olaitoriani Enkai ino oarisho te nkaraki iyie.” 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Nasai nanu Olaitoriani ina kata, ajoki," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Olaitoriani Enkai, nterua iyie aitodol osinka lino enkitoo ino o emagilanisho e nkaina ino; amu kaa ai naatae te keper aashu te nkop naaidim ataasa siaaitin naaijo kuna o nkiaasin magil naaijo ininono?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Nchooki nanu matalang'a alo, aatoomono, pee alo adol ina kop sidai te lido kekun le Yordan, idia kop sidai oo ldoinyo, o Lebanon!’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kake aatagorokine apa nanu Olaitoriani te nkaraki intae, neitu ninye aaning nanu; naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Tabaiki iyie ine; mikingil iyie airorie nanu tialo ena bae." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Ilepa shomo enchumata e Pisga; nishumu inkonyek inono aing'or enkalo oloo ntoluo, naa ng'ura etii ina kop nkonyek inono, amu milo iyie alang ele keju le Yordan." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kake ntanapa Yoshua, nintagol ninye oshoke nintipij ninye, amu kelang ninye aimu te dukuya kulo tung'ana, naa kelo ninye aitujung ninche ina nilo iyie adol.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Neaku kitobiko apa iyiook tiatua ilo erata otalakinore Betpeor. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Ore naa taata iyie, Israel, toning'o nkitanapat o kuna kikoot naiteng'en nanu intae, niasiasa ninche, pee itumutumu aatopok nipuopuo aaya ina kop naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo papaai linyi." 
Deuteronomy4:2 “Miponaa ororei teina kitanapata naishoo nanu intae, nimiwuang'ieng'ie; pee itumutumu aaibung'a nena kitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai inyi naitanapa nanu intae." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Etoduaa nkonyek inyi ina nataasa Olaitoriani te Baal-peor; amu eidaikie Olaitoriani Enkai inyi aishie tiatua intae lelo tung'ana pooki ootusujaitie ina kitanyaanyukoto e nkai e Peor. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Kake ore intae ooibung'a aakurraki nkitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai inyi, ninchushu pooki ena olong." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Eng'ura, aiteng'ena nanu intae nkikoot, anaa enaaitanapa Olaitoriani Enkai ai, nchere pee ipuopuo aas teina kop nipuopuo aaya." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Embung'a ninche niasiasa; amu kelo ina aaku eng'eno inyi o eyiolounoto inyi te dukuya iltung'ana, laa, tenening ninche kuna kikoot pooki, nejo, ‘Esipa ore ele osho kitok naa oloo ltung'ana ng'eni.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Amu kalo osho kitok oata enkai nataaniki anaa enataana Olaitoriani Enkai ang te iyiook, enkata pooki naba anaa enikimpot ninye?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Naa kalo likae osho kitok oata nkikoot o nkiguanat naasipa anaa ena kitanapata nairragie nanu te dukuya intae ena olong? 
Deuteronomy4:9 “Tagolie ake kewan, ning'or oltau lino oleng, pee mikirikino ake nena tokitin naatoduaa nkonyek inono, pee milo alamari to ltau lino too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui ino; ntayiolo ninche nkera inono, o nkera oo nkera inono" 
Deuteronomy4:10 eninkuna apa ina olong pee intashe te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino te Horeb, pee aajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Inturrurrokoki nanu kulo tung'ana, pee aitoning nanu ninche irorei laainei, pee aayiolou ninche naaureyu nanu nkolong'i pooki naaishu ninche tioriong enkop, netum sii aaiteng'ena nkera enye nena baa.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Nietuo apa intae aanyiku nintasheshe te ntonata o ldoinyo, ina kata eyupuyup ilo doinyo te nkima nebaiki olng'ejep keper, neimulumul enkatampoi kitok o empuruo." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Neirorie intae Olaitoriani tiatua empolos eina kima; nining'ining'i oltoilo loo rorei lenyena, kake eitu idolidolo ilo oiro; oltoilo ake itoning'o." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Neibalakinye ninye intae olning'o lenye lo sotua, ilo oitanapa intae pee iasiasa, aa taa, nena kitanapat tomon, neiger ninye ninche too mbelat oo soito naagueta." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Naaitanap nanu Olaitoriani ina kata pee aiteng'en intae nena kikoot o nkiguanat, pee itumutumu aataas ninche teina kop nipuopuo aaya." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Ore enkaraki ina, entujurroto maate. Amu eitu apa idolidolo ilo oiroro teina olong nairorie intae Olaitoriani te Horeb te mpolos enkima," 
Deuteronomy4:16 entodol ate minyalinyala ate aaitobiru nkitanyaanyukot naagueta, te nkaraki intae maate, te mpukunoto e ae toki, te mpukunoto olee aashu e ng'oruoi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 te mpukunoto e ae ng'ues ake ninye natii oriong enkop, te mpukunoto e ae motonyi ake ninye nakuet to loing'ang'e," 
Deuteronomy4:18 te mpukunoto e ae toki ake ninye naiserpepiari te nkop, te mpukunoto osinkirri ake ninye otii atua enkare tiabori enkop." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Naa entodol ate mishumumu ake nkonyek inyi aaing'or shumata, ore ake pee idolidolo enkolong, o lapa o lakir, ilo orora pooki le shumata, neiyiatari intae nipuopuo aaserem ninche nisiayiayia ninche, nena tokitin naatoorikia Olaitoriani Enkai ino iltung'ana pooki ootii abori shumata pooki." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Kake kintayio iyie Olaitoriani, nikintupuku aitung'uaa olkokuet le sekenkei oyupuyup, aitupuku te Misiri, pee iaku olorere lenye kewan, anaa enatiu taata." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Ore etiu neijia, aatagorokine apa nanu Olaitoriani te nkaraki intae, neinos ninye olmumai nchere malang nanu Yordan, o nchere sii, malo nanu ajing ina kop sidai naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi pee ijung'ujung'u." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Amu meeta nchere maye nanu tena kop, meeta nchere kashomo nanu lido kekun le Yordan kake ilang'ilang'a intae aapuo aaya ina kop sidai." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Eng'ura ate, merikino ake intae olning'o lo sotua lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi, apa oitobira ninye tenebo intae, nimintobiruru enkitanyaanyukoto nagueta e ae ake ninye pukunoto natomitikio intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai inyi naa enkima nanyaisho, Enkai olom." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Te nitum nkera o nkera oo nkera inono, nimoruau teina kop, tenipong'ori aitobiru enkitanyaanyukoto nagueta te mpukunoto ake ninye ae toki, ore te asata eina bae torrono te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino, aitagor ninye," 
Deuteronomy4:26 kaipotu nanu keper o enkop pee kinchakenoki iyie ena olong, nchere ipuopuo nabo kata aaidaaya nipuopuo aaye te lido kekun le Yordan; mipuopuo intae aabik teina kop, kake keidaikieki intae." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Naa kelo Olaitoriani aidapashaki intae iloreren, niakuku kuti tiatua lelo oshon ooreu intae Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Ore teine nipuopuo aaisiaai nkaitin oo nkeek o noo soito, ina siaai oo nkaik e tung'ana, ina nemedolisho, nemening'isho nemenya endaa, nemeing'uaya toki." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kake ore teine ning'oruru Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, naa eitumutumu intae ninye, tenililitutu aaing'oru ninye too ltauja linyi pooki o te nkishui inyi pooki." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Tenijing'ijing'i intae atua osina, nepuonu kuna baa pooki shumata intae too nkolong'i e siadi, nirrinyokinono intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, nining'ining'i oltoilo lenye," 
Deuteronomy4:31 amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai inyi naa Enkai olng'ur; meitiak ninye intae neidaikie intae nemerikino ninye ilo ning'o lo sotua loo loo papaai linyi apa oinosie olmumai tialo ninche ntarasi. 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Nkilikuanisho taata tialo nena olong'i naatulusoitie, nena apa e dukuya te iyie, ebaiki ina olong apa naitayu Enkai oltung'ani apik oriong enkop, ninkilikuanisho ebaiki eluboto nabo e keper o metabaiki enkae, tenaa ketaase aekata embae kitok naikununo nji aashu tenaa ketoning'oki aekata." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Ketii apa aekata iltung'ana oo toning'o oltoilo le Nkai eiro te mpolos enkima, anaa enitoning'o intae neton ake inchushu?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Tenaa keetae aekata enkai nashomo ayaki kewan olosho aitung'uaa empolos e likae osho, too ntemat, o too nkitoduaat, o too mbaa enking'asia o to larrabal te nkaina magilani o te nkaina naitoriori, o too ntabo sapuki, te risioroto e nena pooki naataasa Olaitoriani Enkai inyi te nkaraki intae te Misiri te dukuya nkonyek inyi?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ore te intae, neitodoluaki apa, pee itumutumu aatayiolo nchere, Olaitoriani ninye Enkai, metii likae oponieki ninye," 
Deuteronomy4:36 te shumata eishoo ninye intae entoning oltoilo lenye, pee etum aiteng'ena intae, ore te nkop neisho intae entodol ina kima enye kitok, nining'ining'i intae irorei lenyena epuku te mpolos eina kima." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Ore enkaraki natonyorra apa ninye iloo papaai linyi negelu eishoi enye te siadi ninche, neitayu intae aitupuku te nkop e Misiri, te ngolon enye kitok, etii ninye tenebo intae." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Nearaa ninche te dukuya intae iloshon kituaak naa magil aalanag intae maate pee etum aisho intae ina kop enye metaa enjung'ore inyi anaa enatiu taata; 
Deuteronomy4:39 entayiolo naa taata, ena olong nipikipiki iltauja linyi nchere, Olaitoriani ninye Enkai te shumata o tiabori enkop; meetae likae." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Metaa embung'a nkikoot enyena o nkitanapat enyena, nena naitanapa nanu intae ena olong, pee iserianunu intae o nkera inyi te siadi intae, nitumokiki aaitoodoro nkolong'i inyi teina kop naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ntarasi.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Neiteng'el Musa nkanas uni te nkalo o loo saen lido kekun le Yordan," 
Deuteronomy4:42 pee etum aisikaki oltung'ani oitayu loikop, ilo oar metua o lelatia enye te sesekuan, meatakinore mang'atisho too nkolong'i naatulusoitie, neaku tenesaru ninye nabo e kuna anas neidim aitajeu enkishui enye." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Beser tiatua ina kop naitoriori too ltung'ana le Ruben, o Ramoti tiatua Gilead too ltung'ana le Gad, o Galan tiatua Bashan too ltung'ana le Manase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ena enkitanapata nairragie Musa te dukuya nkera oo Siraeli; 
Deuteronomy4:45 kuna ninche enchakenisho, o nkikoot o nkitanapat naa ninche eirorie Musa nkera oo Siraeli ina kata apa eipang'u aapuku te nkop e Misiri," 
Deuteronomy4:46 te lido kekun le Yordan teilo erata oipirakinore Bet-peor, tiatua enkop e Sihon olaiguanani le Amori, apa omanya Heshbon laa ninye etimira Musa o nkera e Israel ina kata apa pee eipang'u ninche te Misiri." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Neya ninche ina kop enye o enkop e Oog olaiguanani le Bashan, o lelo aiguanak oare le Amori, apa oomanya enkalo o loo saen te idia alo Yordan;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 ebaiki Aroer, aa ninye naigaraki oerata le Arnon ometabaiki oldoinyo le Sirion (aa taa Hermon)" 
Deuteronomy4:49 tenebo ina Araba pooki te nkalo o loo saen le Yordan o metabaiki enaiposha e Araba, tiabori nena kishong'ishong'at e Pisga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Neiturrurru Musa iltung'ana pooki le Israel, nejoki ninche, “Entoning intae Israel nkikoot o kuna kitanapat nairo nanu too nkiyiaa inyi ena olong, niyiolouu intae ning'oring'oro ate pee iasiasa." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Eitobirua apa Olaitoriani Enkai ang olning'o lo sotua o iyiook te Horeb. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Mme apa loo papa eitobirie Olaitoriani Enkai ang ele ning'o lo sotua, kake iyiook, kulo pooki ootii ene ooishu ena olong." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Eirorie intae Olaitoriani nchororo nkomomi to ldoinyo, te mpolos eina kima," 
Deuteronomy5:5 ina kata aitashe nanu te rishata Olaitoriani o intae teina kata, pee eibalakinye intae ororei lo Laitoriani; amu itureishote apa te nkaraki ina kima, neitu ilepilepe aapuo enchumata oldoinyo. Nejo ninye:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 “‘Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo likiyaua iyie aitupuku te nkop e Misiri, aitupuku te nkaji e sinkaisho." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “‘Miata kulie aitin neme nanu. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “‘Mintobiraki kewan enkitanyaanyukoto e nkai nagueta, aashu empukunoto e ae toki natii shumata aashu enatii abori enkop, aashu ina natii atua enkare tiabori enkop;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 mirrugokino ninche nimiserem ninche; amu ore nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino naa kara Enkai olom, naitusuj nkera ing'ok oo loo menye o metabaiki eishoi e uni o eniong'uan e lelo laaiba nanu," 
Deuteronomy5:10 kake kaitodolu enyorrata too nkalifuni e lelo laanyor neibung nkitanapat aainei. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Mimpot enkarna o Laitoriani Enkai ino te nkiguran: amu meikenaa Olaitoriani ajo eitu eitarruoo ilo oipot enkarna enye te nkiguran. 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Mbung'a enkolong e Sabato, pee intisiny, anaa enikintanapa Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Too nkolong'i ile taasisho, nias esiai ino pooki;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 kake ore enkolong e naapishana naa sabato to Laitoriani Enkai ino; ore teina olong mias hoo ae siai, iyie aashu olayioni lino, aashu entito ino, aashu olaisiaayiani lino, aashu enkaisiaayiani ino, aashu olkiteng lino, aashu osikiria, lino aashu ae ake ninye nabo oo nkishu inono, aashu olomoni otii atua enkaji ino, pee etum aeng'iyeng'ayu olaisiaayiani lino lee o enkaisiaayiani ino tenebo iyie." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Tadamu nchere ira apa osinka te nkop e Misiri, nikintupuku Olaitoriani Enkai ino teine te nkaina enye magilani naitoriori; metaa kintanapa iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino pee imbung enkolong e Sabato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Iyanyita papaai lino o ng'utunyi, anaa enaaitanapa nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, pee itum ataseriana, nitum atoponai nkolong'i inono, teina kop naaisho nanu iyie." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Miar metua 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘Miloloito," 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘Nimipurrisho. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘Niminteeniki ilo le latia ino elejare. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘Niming'uar enkitok eilo le latia ino; niming'uar enkaji eilo le latia ino, aashu enkurma enye, aashu olaisiaayiani lenye aashu enkaisiaayiani enye, aashu olkiteng lenye, aashu osikiria lenye, aashu pooki toki ake ninye eilo le latia ino.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Kulo rorei eirorie intae Olaitoriani te umata inyi pooki to ldoinyo eimunye empolos e nkima, o enkatampoi o enaimin kitok, to ltoilo kitok; neitu ninye eitoki aponaa toki. Neiger ninye kulo rorei too soito naagueta, naaisho ninye nanu." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Ore ake pee ining'ining'i ilo toilo epuku te mpolos eina aimin, ina kata eyupuyupito oldoinyo te nkima, nikipuonunu intae aanyikaki, ilukuny pooki oo loshon linyi, olpayiani linyi;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 nijojo intae, ‘Ng'ura, eitoduaa iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang enkisisa enye o enkitoo, nikitoning'o iyiook oltoilo lenye epuku te mpolos enkima; kitoduaa iyiook ena olong Enkai eirorie iltung'ana neton ake eishu lelo tung'ana." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Amaa naa taata kainyoo iyiook pee kiye? Amu kemut iyiook ena kima kitok; tenikintoki iyiook aaning oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ang, nikiye." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Amu kaing'ae too looishu pooki oata osesen, otoning'o oltoilo le Nkai naishu eiro eimu empolos e nkima, anaa enikitoning'o iyiook, neton ake kinchu." 
Deuteronomy5:27 Enchom entinyikakaki pee ining'ining'i nena pooki naajo Olaitoriani Enkai ang; nilikiki iyiook nena pooki naaliki intae Olaitoriani Enkai ang; amu eikining iyiook nikiaas.’ 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Nening Olaitoriani irorei linyi ina kata apa pee kirorierie nanu; naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Atoning'o nanu irorei le kulo tung'ana likitiakitia ninche; eiroro ninche te sipata nena pooki naatejo." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Oi oshi tenaa keeta ena damunoto anaa ena olong nkolong'i pooki, pee aaureyu nanu neibung nkitanapat aainei pooki, pee etum ninche aataseriana tenebo nkera enye ntarasi." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Shomo tiaaki ninche, “Entorrinyokinoto ilng'oborri linyi.”" 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kake ore iyie, intasho tene te mbata nanu, pee aaliki nkitanapat pooki, o nkikoot o nkiguanat nilo aiteng'en ninche, pee epuo ninche aas teina kop nalo nanu aisho ninche.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Shomo naa toduaa kewan pee ias anaa enikintanapa Olaitoriani Enkai ino; nimimbelekenya alo enkalo e tatene aashu ene kedienye. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Shomo teina oitoi pooki nikintanapa Olaitoriani Enkai ino, pee itum atopuaa, nitum sii ataseriana, nitumutumu aatobikoi tiatua ina kop naisho intae Olaitoriani.”" 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ena enkitanapata, o enkikoo o nkiguanat naaitanapa nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi pee aiteng'en intae, pee itumutumu aataas teina kop nipuopuo aaya;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 pee itum aturia Olaitoriani Enkai ino, iyie o layioni lino o layiok loo layiok linono, nimbung'ubung'u kuna kikoot pooki, o nkitanapat enyena, naitanap nanu intae, too nkolong'i pooki enkishui inyi; pee etumi aatoponai nkolong'i inyi." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Toning'o naa, iyie Israel ning'or kewan pee iyau kuna kitanapat; pee itum ataseriana, nitum sii atoponari oleng, anaa apa enaisiligie intae Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi tiatua ina kop naruko naishi o kule." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Toning'o iyie Israel: ore Olaitoriani Enkai ang naa Olaitoriani obo; 
Deuteronomy6:5 tonyorra Olaitoriani Enkai ino to ltau lino pooki, o te nkishui ino pooki, o te nkidimata ino pooki." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ore kulo rorei laaitanap nanu iyie ena olong nchoo ejing oltau lino; 
Deuteronomy6:7 nilo iyie aunoki aiteng'en nkera inono, niimaki kulo omon teniton tiatua enkaji ino, o tenilo te nkoitoi, o tenirrag, o tenidumunye." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Niyeniki ninche enkaina ino metaa olmonekie, netiu ninche anaa nkishiliaa te rishata oo nkonyek inyi." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Nisir ninche too mbokishi e kutukaji e nkaji ino o too ntaloishin e kishomi. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Ore kenya ake pee kiyau Olaitoriani Enkai ino atua ina kop apa nainosie olmumai too loo papaai linyi te Abraham, o te Isaak, o te Yakobo, pee eisho intae nkanas sapuki naa sidain neitu ishetishete," 
Deuteronomy6:11 o nkajijik naabore ntokitin pooki sidain neitu intae mputuputu, o lchorroi ooturo leitu intae ituruturu, o nkurman oo sabibu o noo loirienito leitu intae iunuunu, naa tenidaa intae aaraposho," 
Deuteronomy6:12 ning'oring'oro naa ate merikino ake intae Olaitoriani, ilo laa ninye oitupukuo intae aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, aitung'uaa enkaji e sinkaisho." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Shomo turia Olaitoriani Enkai ino; shomo isiayia ninye, ninos olmumai te nkarna enye." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Milo ake asujaa kulie aitin, nena aitin e lelo tung'ana likimanita iyie." 
Deuteronomy6:15 Amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai ino ilo otii empolos inyi naa Enkai olom; pee meyupuyup ake engoro Olaitoriani Enkai ino tialo yie, nikindaikie ninye aiwuang'ie tioriong enkop." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Nimitem Olaitoriani Enkai ino, anaa enitetema ninye te Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Mbung'a tukurraki nkitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai ino o shakenisho enye, o nkikoot enyena apa nikintanapa ninye." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Naa ias iyie esidai naishiakino too nkonyek o Laitoriani, pee itum ataseriana, nitum sii ashomo aawa ina kop sidai apa nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai pee eisho iloo papaai linyi" 
Deuteronomy6:19 nchere kerrumoo ninye aipang'ie ilmang'ati linyi te dukuya intae, anaa enaisiligishore Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Ore akenya tinikinkilikuan olayioni lino te nkata nalotu ajoki, ‘Kainyoo eutu ena shakenisho, o kuna kikoot o nkitanapat, o nkiguanat nikintanapa iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ang?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Nitum taa atiaki olayioni lino, ‘Eikira apa irrindiki le Farao te Misiri; neyau iyiook Olaitoriani aitupuku te Misiri te nkaina magilani;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 neitodolu Olaitoriani nkitoduaat o mbaa enking'asia, mbaa sapuki naaitureisho tialo Misiri o tialo Farao o enkaji enye pooki, nikidol too nkonyek ang;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 neyau ninye iyiook aitupuku teine, pee etum aitijing'u iyiook neisho iyiook ina kop apa nainosie ninye olmumai pee eisho loo papa." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Neitanapa iyiook Olaitoriani pee kiaas kuna kikoot pooki, pee kiureyu Olaitoriani Enkai ang, te nkaraki eseriani ang maate e anaake, pee etum ninye atagolie iyiook metaa eikinchu anaa enikitiu ena olong." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Naa kelo ena aaku esipata te iyiook, teniking'or aabaraki pee kiaas ena kitanapata pooki te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ang anaa enaitanapa ninye iyiook.’" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Teneyau akenya intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi atua ina kop nijing'itata aapuo aaya, neiwuang'ie ninye lelo oreren ootii dukuya intae, Ilhiti, o Ilgashi, o Ilamori, o Ilkanaani, o Ilperesi o Ilhafi, o Lyebusi, lelo oshon pokira oopishana kituaak naa magil aalang intae," 
Deuteronomy7:2 naa teneishoru ninche Olaitoriani apik nkaik inyi, nimirimiri intae ninche, nitumutumu taa aaidaikie ninche katukul; emipuo ake aaitobir olning'o o ninche, nimintodolulu olng'ur te ninche." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Nimiyamama intae o ninche aaisho intoyie inyi ilayiok lenye aashu aayamaki ntoyie enye ilayiok linyi. 
Deuteronomy7:4 Amu keidim ninche aaibelekenya ilayiok linyi maaitoki aairukurukore nanu, pee eisiaai kulie aitin enye; netum engoro o Laitoriani ayupuyupo tialo intae, naa keidim ninye aidaikie intae nabo kata." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Kake nji intae entaasa ninche: enchom entigil ilperereni lenye loo lasarri nintaa ing'apeta enye mbelibelat, nitururu aadotu ina kitanyaanyukoto enye e nkai naji Asherim aapejoo te nkima nena kitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin naaguetuno." 
Deuteronomy7:6 “Amu irara intae olorere oitisinyakaki Olaitoriani Enkai inyi; etegelua intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi pee iakuku olorere lenye makewan, negelu intae tiatua lelo oreren pooki ootii oriong enkop." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Mme apa enkaraki nirara intae kumok aalang ilkulikae tung'ana pee etipika Olaitoriani enyorrata enye shumata intae negelu intae, amu intae apa kuti aalang iloreren pooki;" 
Deuteronomy7:8 kake enkaraki nanyor intae Olaitoriani; neibung'ita ninye ilo mumai apa oinosie loo papaai linyi, ina pee eyaua intae Olaitoriani aipang'unye te nkaina magilani, nekordu intae Olaitoriani aitupuku te nkaji e sinkaisho, aitung'uaa enkaina e Farao ilo aiguanani le Misiri." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Tayiolo naa nchere, Olaitoriani Enkai ino ninye Enkai, ina Ai naisiligayu naibung olning'o o enyorrata nauno te lelo oonyor ninye neibung nkitanapat enyena, ometabaiki iishoritin enkalifu," 
Deuteronomy7:10 neitalaku te lelo ooiba ninye, eidaikie ninche; meshololo te lelo ooiba ninye, keitalaku te ninye teine ake." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Eng'ura naa pee iasiasa ina kitanapata, o nena kikoot, o nkiguanat naitanapa nanu intae ena olong." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Ore enkaraki nitoning'o intae kuna kiguanat, nimbung'ubung'u niasiasa ninche, keibung Olaitoriani Enkai inyi tenebo intae ilo ning'o oina nyorrata nauno apa nainosie olmumai too loo papaai linyi nchere keibung." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Kenyorru ninye intae, nemayian intae, nepon intae, kemayian sii lelo ng'anayio lo sesen lino o lelo ng'anayio le nkop ino, enkurma ino, o enaisho oo sabibu ino, o eilata ino, nepon nkishu inono o ntare inono teina kop apa nainosie olmumai too loo papaai linyi pee eisho intae." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Kemayian intae aaitulus too loreren pooki; meitokini aata olee aashu eng'oruoi olupi tiatua intae, aashu tiatua nchoo inyi." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Naa kelo Olaitoriani aiwuang'ie tiatua intae emuoyian pooki nemeetae hoo nabo te nena muoyiaritin torrok e Misiri niyiololo, nalotu shumata intae kake keiteleiki ninye shumata lelo pooki ooiba intae." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Naa ipuopuo intae aaidaikie lelo oreren pooki ooisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, melo hoo enkong'u inyi aing'urrie ninche, nimilo iyie aisiaai nkaitin enye, amu kelo ina aaku orreshet te intae." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Tenijo iyie to ltau lino, ‘Eikituaak kulo oshon aalang iyiook, kaji nanu aiko tenaiwuang'ie ninche?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Milo iyie aureyu ninche, kake shomo tadamu ina apa naitaasa Olaitoriani Enkai ino Farao o Misiri pooki," 
Deuteronomy7:19 nena baa sapuki nitoduaa iyie too nkonyek inono, nena kitoduaat o nena enking'asia, ina aina magilani, oina aina naitoriori naa ninye kintupukunye Olaitoriani Enkai ino; naa neijia elo Olaitoriani Enkai ino aiko te lelo oreren pooki liure." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Keirriu sii Olaitoriani Enkai inyi olmeitai atua ninche, ometaba anaa ore ninye lelo ooleku eisudori eure intae neidak." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Mimputukuny te nkaraki ninche; amu etii Olaitoriani Enkai inyi empolos inyi, ina Ai kitok naitureisho." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Keiwuang'ie Olaitoriani Enkai inyi kulo oshon te dukuya iyie aa kutiti; mindaikie iyie ninche pooki nabo kata, pee mikirasaki ake ing'uesi entim." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Kake eikintarasaki iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino ninche, nepik ninche olmilo o metaba anaa neidak." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Neishoru ninye ilaiguanak lenye apik nkaik inyi, nimisie iyie enkarna enye aiwuang'ie te nkop; meetae hoo oltung'ani obo likindim ashomo aipirakinore, o metaba anaa nindaikie ninche." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Ore nena kitanyaanyukot enye naaguetuno oo nkaitin enye shomo tapejoi te nkima; ming'uar ina osholai anaa ina sahabu napetokino ninche, nimiyaya intae maate, mijing'ijing'i ake orreshet; amu oldeket ina to Laitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Nimiyauu nkajijik inyi ina toki nara olminong, miakuku ake oldeket anaa ninye, mbai tukul nilam amu entoki nadiaa." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Ore kuna kitanapat naitanapa nanu intae ena olong enchom entisipu entaas, pee itumutumu aatopok niponariri, nipuopuo aaya ina kop nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai pee eisho loo papaai linyi." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Nidamumu ina oitoi pooki natorikunye intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi te kulo arin artam tiong'ata, pee etum ninye aitoborro intae, netem intae, pee etum atayiolo ina natii iltauja linyi, tenaa imbung'ubung'u," 
Deuteronomy8:3 neitobor ninye intae, neisho intae esumash, neitoti intae te Mana, apa nimiyiololo intae, nemeyiolo sii apa loo papaai linyi; pee etum ninye aitayiolo intae nchere, meishu oltung'ani te nkaraki endaa ake, kake keishu oltung'ani te nkaraki pooki toki naing'uaa enkutuk o Laitoriani." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Eitu apa epolosa nkilani inyi, neitu ejeyu nkejek inyi, te kulo arin artam." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Tayiolo naa to ltau lino nchere, ore anaa enaitame oltung'ani enkerai enye aikintame sii ninye iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Metaa shomo mbung'a nkitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai ino, alo too nkoitoi enyena niureyu ninye." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Amu eikiyau iyie Olaitoriani Enkai atua enkop sidai, enkop oo nong'ot naatii nkariak, neetii nchorroi oo nkonyek, naarukunye too erat o too ldoinyo," 
Deuteronomy8:8 enkop e nkano o entapa, enkop oo sabibu o lng'abolo, o lng'anayio, enkop oo loirienito o enaisho," 
Deuteronomy8:9 ina enkop nilo iyie aadaare nimintoki aekata aisumashu, nimilaunye toki, ina kop naa ore isoito lenyena naa sekenke, ore too ldoinyo linono nilo aturu osuyai." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Nilo iyie adaa araposho, nisis Olaitoriani Enkai ino teina kop sidai nikinchoo ninye iyie." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Toduaa naa ake mikirikino Olaitoriani Enkai ino, nipal eitu imbung nena kitanapat enyena, o nkikoot enyena o nkiguanat enyena naaitanap nanu iyie ena olong." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Pee tenilo nidaa araposho, nishet nkajijik sidain nimany," 
Deuteronomy8:13 ore teneponari nkishu inono o ntare, neponari nkoshola inono o sahabu, ore nena pooki niata neponari," 
Deuteronomy8:14 nedumunye taa oltau lino, nikirikino Olaitoriani Enkai ino, laa ninye likiyaua aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, aitupuku te nkaji e sinkaisho," 
Deuteronomy8:15 laa ninye likitorikoyie aimie ilo purkel kitok, ilo otii lasuriaa torrok o nkolupani oina kop natoyio nemetii enkare, laa ninye likiyaka iyie enkare aimunye e ndapidapoi nagol." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Naa ninye likintotio iyie tiong'ata teina mana apa nemeyiolo loo papaai linyi; pee kitum aitoborro nikitem iyie, pee kitum ninye aitaasa esidai te siadi." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Toduaa kewan, pee mijo ake to ltau lino, ‘Engolon ai o enkidimata e nkaina ai anotie nanu kuna masaa!’" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Tadamu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, amu ninye likincho iyie engolon niakunye karsis; pee etum aitudupa ilo mumai apa oinosie loo papaai linyi, anaa enatiu ena olong." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Naa tenikirikino Olaitoriani Enkai ino, nilo arubare kulie aitin nisiaai ninche niserem ninche, kaaunoki nanu aikok ena olong nchere ilo ake aidak." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Anaa lelo oshon ooishoo Olaitoriani mediaa te dukuya nkonyek inono, enkaraki nimiyieu iyie nining oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Toning'o iyie Israel, ilo taata iyie alang Yordan, pee ilo aiwuang'ie nimany lelo oshon kituaak naa magil te intae, nena anas naateshetaki aaitabaiki shumata," 
Deuteronomy9:2 lelo tung'ana oogol naa adoru, lelo ayiok le Anakim, liyiololo intae, nitoning'o intae nijojo, ‘Kaing'ae naidim aitasheikinore ilayiok le Anak?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Tayiolo naa ena olong nchere ore ilo oloito te dukuya intae anaa enkima nanyaisho naa Olaitoriani Enkai inyi; keidaikie ninche neishie ninche te dukuya intae; metaa ipuopuo intae aamiraa ninche, nimutumutu ninche nabo kata, anaa enaisiligie Olaitorianiintae." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Milo ake ajo to ltau lino, teneidip Olaitoriani aturrumoi ninche te dukuya intae, ‘Tenkaraki esupatisho ai peyie aayawua nanu Olaitoriani maawa ena kop,’ amu enkaraki entorroni e kulo oshon pee eturrumoyie Olaitoriani ninche te dukuya intae." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Mme te nkaraki esupatisho ino aashu emborron oltau lino pee ilo iyie aya ina kop enye; kake te nkaraki entorroni e kulo oshon pee earaa Olaitoriani ninche aipang'ie te dukuya intae, pee etum ninye atudupa ilo rorei apa oinosie Olaitoriani olmumai too loopapaai linyi, Abraham, o Isaak o Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 “Tayiolo naa nchere, mikinchorita iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino ena kop sidai te nkaraki esupatisho; amu ira iyie olorere ogolong'u." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Tadamu nimincho kirikino ina apa nintagoro Olaitoriani Enkai ino to lpurkel; ebaiki ina olong apa nitupukuo iyie te nkop e Misiri ometaba anaa nilotu ene wueji, igolong'aki oshiake Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Ore ninye apa to ldoinyo le Horeb nintagoro intae Olaitoriani, negorokino intae Olaitoriani oleng eyieu eidaikie intae." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ore apa nena soito naagueta, nena soito dapashi o lning'o lo sotua apa naaitobira Olaitoriani tenebo intae, natobiko nanu to ldoinyo nkolong'i artam o nkewarieitin artam; neitu nanu anya endaa anaa aok enkare." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Naaisho nanu Olaitoriani nena soito are naagueta naaigeroki to lkimojino le Nkai, neigerokino ninche lelo rorei pooki apa ooirorie Olaitoriani intae to ldoinyo aimunye empolos enkima teina olong apa eumata." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ore te siadi nena olong'i artam o nkewarieitin artam naaisho nanu Olaitoriani nena soito pokira are naagueta, nena soito olning'o lo sotua." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Naaitoki nanu Olaitoriani ajoki, ‘Tudumunye, shomo tadoi tasiooi tung'uai ene; amu ore iltung'ana linono apa liyaua aitung'uaa Misiri netaasa entorroni; eibelekenyate ninche aasioki aapaash ina oitoi apa naitanapa ninche; eitobirakitia ninche ate enkitanyaanyukoto naasholuno.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Naaitoki nanu Olaitoriani ajoki, ‘Atoduaa nanu kulo tung'ana, naa ng'ura iltung'ana oogolong'u ninche;" 
Deuteronomy9:14 tapalaki nanu, pee atumoki aidaikie, naiwuang'ie nanu enkarna enye te nkop, naitayu nanu te iyie olosho magilani naa kitok alang ninche.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 Neaku aibelekenye apa nanu nadou to ldoinyo, naa keyupuyup apa ilo doinyo te nkima; ore nena soito are naagueta olning'o lo sotua netii nkaik ainei." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Naing'orisho nanu, naa ng'ura, itaasa intae eng'oki tialo Olaitoriani Enkai inyi; intobirakitia ate olashe osholuno; itasiokitio intae aaibelekenya aaing'uaa ina oitoi naitanapa intae Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Neaku aibung'a apa nanu nena soito pokira are naagueta, narrar nanu ninche te dukuya nkonyek inyi." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Nairrabalakino nanu enkop te dukuya Olaitoriani anaa apake, nkolong'i artam o nkewarieitin artam; neitu ainos endaa aashu aok enkare, te nkaraki ina ng'oki pooki nitaasa, aas ina bae torrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani, aaitagor ninye." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Amu kaure apa nanu engoro oina pijan apa naata Olaitoriani tialo intae, ometaa kejo aidaikie intae. Kake aatoning'o ake sii Olaitoriani ina kata." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Netagorokine sii apa Olaitoriani Aron ometaa kejo aidaikie ninye; naomonoki sii apa ninye Aron ina kata. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Naitoki nanu adumu ina ng'oki torrono, ilo ashe apa lintobira napejoo te nkima nabelibel ninye, ayutuyut ometotiuo anaa empunyua; nanang'aki nanu ina punyua enye ina reyiet nadou to ldoinyo." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Ore sii apa te Tabera, o te Masa o te Kibrotafa intagoro intae Olaitoriani," 
Deuteronomy9:23 naa ore apa pee eirriwaa intae Olaitoriani Kadesh-Barnea, ejo, ‘Elepa enchom embung'a ina kop naishoo nanu intae’ nitogolong'akita intae enkitanapata o Laitoriani Enkai inyi, neitu intae irukuruku ninye aashu ining'ining'i oltoilo lenye." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Itaa intae iloogolong'aki Olaitoriani ebaiki ina olong natayiolo intae. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Neaku airrabalakine nanu enkop te dukuya Olaitoriani te kuna olong'i artam e nkewarieitin artam, naatejo Olaitoriani keidaikie intae." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Naomon nanu Olaitoriani najo, ‘Olaitoriani Enkai, Ooi mindaikie iltung'ana linono o enjung'ore ino, laa iyie otokordua te nkitoo ino, naa iyie oitupukuo te nkop e Misiri te nkaina magilani." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Tadamu isinkan linono, Abraham o Isaak o Yakobo; mishilaa engolon enkong'u ele orere, aashu ntorrok enye, aashu eng'oki enye," 
Deuteronomy9:28 mejo ake ina kop nintupukunye iyiook, “Enkaraki apa nemeidim Olaitoriani ayau ninche atua ina kop apa naisiligie ninche, naa ore enkaraki naibayie ninye ninche eitupukuo ninche pee elotu aar ninche tiong'ata.”" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Amu iltung'ana linono ninche naa enjung'ore ino ninche, laa iyie oitupukuo ninche te ngolon ino kitok o te nkaina ino naitoriori.’" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Ore apa teina kata naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Tagueta mbaoi are o soit naatiu anaa inapa e dukuya, nilepu alotu enatii to ldoinyo, nintobir osanduku loo nkeek." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Naa kaiger nanu te nena soito dapashi irorei ootii nena soito e dukuya nitebela, nipik iyie ninche atua osanduku.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 Neaku aitobira apa nanu osanduku too nkeek, naguetu mbaoi are o soit naatiu anaa ine dukuya, nailep alo oldoinyo aata nena soito pokira te nkaina ai." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Neiger ninye te nena soito, anaa apa ine dukuya, nena kitanapat tomon apa naairorie intae Olaitoriani to ldoinyo eimunye empolos enkima teina olong apa eumata; naaisho nanu Olaitoriani nena soito." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Naibelekenya nanu nadou to ldoinyo, napik nena soito atua ilo sanduku laitobira; naa ine taata etii, anaa enaaitanapa nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 Nepuo iltung'ana le Israel te Beerot Beneyaakan ometabaiki Mosera. Neye Aron teine naa teine etunukayioki; Neisiaisho olayioni lenye Eliesa anaa olapolosani te rishata enye. 
Deuteronomy10:7 Nedumunye teine nepuo Gadugoda, nedumunye te Gadugoda nepuo Yotbata, enkop oo nchorroi oo nkariak." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ore apa teina kata neiteng'el Olaitoriani olosho le Lawi pee enap ilo sanduku lo lning'o lo sotua le Nkai, neitashe te dukuya Olaitoriani aaisiaai ninye nemayianisho te nkarna enye o taata." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Metaa meeta Lawi erubata e njung'ore tiatua ilalashera lenyena; Olaitoriani ninye enjung'ore enye, anaa enatiaka Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ninye." 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Naton nanu to ldoinyo anaa apa te nkata e dukuya, nkolong'i artam o nkewarieitin artam, naatoning'o sii apa Olaitoriani ina kata; neany Olaitoriani eidaikie intae." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Tudumunye, shomo te lototo ino tijing'a dukuya iltung'ana, pee etum ninche aashum aaibung'a ina kop, apa nainosie olmumai too loo menye pee aisho ninche.’" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Amaa taata Israel, kainyoo eyieu Olaitoriani Enkai ino te iyie, neme teniureyu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, nilo too nkoitoi enyena pooki, ninyorru ninye, nisiaai Olaitoriani Enkai ino to ltau lino pooki o te nkishui ino pooki." 
Deuteronomy10:13 Nimbung nena kitanapat o nkiguanat o Laitoriani naaitanapa nanu iyie ena olong te nkaraki eseriani ino. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Ng'ura eno Laitoriani keper nalakua aisul, o enkop o pooki toki natii atua;" 
Deuteronomy10:15 kake ore eyia, etonyorra Olaitoriani to ltau lenye loo papaai linyi negelu ninye eishoi enye te siadi ninche, aitulus too loreren pooki, anaa enatiu ena olong." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Entumurat naa isuaten oo ltauja linyi, nimintokiki aagolong'u." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai ino naa Enkai oo nkaitin naa Olaitoriani loo laitoriak. Ina Ai kitok magilani naitureisho, nemeeta olkep nemeropayu." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Keiguanare ninye te sipata olokishi o enkoliai, nenyor ninye ilo omoni, neisho ninye endaa o nkilani." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Tonyorra naa ilo ora omoni; amu irara sii apa intae omon te nkop e Misiri. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Shomo turia Olaitoriani Enkai ino, shomo isiayia ninye nimbung'are ninye, naa te nkarna enye inosinoso olmumai." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ninye enkisisa inyi, ninye Enkai inyi, ina nataasa kuna baa kituaak naaitureisho naatoduaa nkonyek inyi." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Eshomo apa iloo papaai linyi Misiri aa iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana; ore taata neitotiuo intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi anaa ilakir le shumata te nkumoi. 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Shomo naa tonyorra Olaitoriani Enkai ino, nimbung enkitanapata enye, o nkikoot enyena o nkiguanat enyena, o nkitanapat enyena anaake." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Naa entadamu ena olong (nchere, mme nkera inyi nanu airorie neitu eyiolou aashu edol) entadamu nkitamiot o Laitoriani Enkai inyi, enkitoo enye, o enkaina enye magilani o enkaina enye naitoriori." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Nena kitoduaat enyena o nkiaasin enyena apa naaitaasa ninye te Misiri, Farao olaiguanani le Misiri; o enkop enye pooki," 
Deuteronomy11:4 oina apa naitaasa ninye enjore e Misiri, nena bartan enye o nena garrin enye oo mbartan; ina naikuna ninye pee eitaya ninche enkare Enaiposha Nanyokie ina kata esujita ninche intae, ina naikuna Olaitoriani pee eidaikie ninche o taata;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 oina naitaasa intae ti ong'ata ometaba anaa nipuonunu ene wueji 
Deuteronomy11:6 oina naitaasa ninye Datan o Abiram lelo ayiok le Aliab, olayioni le Ruben, ina natabolo enkop enkutuk neijoo ninche tenebo ilmareita lenye, o lng'oborri lenye, o pooki toki naishu apa nasujita ninche, te mpolos e Israel pooki;" 
Deuteronomy11:7 Amu etoduaa nkonyek inyi ina siaai pooki kitok o Laitoriani nataasa. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Enchom naa embung'a kuna kitanapat pooki naitanapa nanu intae ena olong, pee itumutumu aatagol, nipuopuo aaya ina kop nilang'akiki aapuo aaya," 
Deuteronomy11:9 nibikoo sii teina kop nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai too loo papaai linyi pee eisho ninche o eishoi enye, ina kop naruko kule o enaisho." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Amu ore ine nijing'itata aaya nemetiu anaa enkop e Misiri ning'uaa, ina kop nituunie intae ilanterera linyi nipikipiki enkare too nkejek inyi, anaa olchampa loo mpogai;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 kake ore ina kop nilang'itata aapuo aaya naa enkop oo ldoinyo o nong'ot ine neshaiki ninche enchan naing'uaa keper," 
Deuteronomy11:12 enkop ina nagolie Olaitoriani te nkaraki intae; eing'orita nkonyek o Laitoriani Enkai ino shumata ninye anaake, ebaiki enkiterunoto o lari o metabaiki enkiting'oto o lari." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Naa tenimbung'ubung'u intae kuna kitanapat aainei naitanap nanu intae ena olong, aanyorru Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, nisiayiayia ninye too ltauja linyi pooki o te nkishui inyi pooki," 
Deuteronomy11:14 naa keishoru ninye enchan te nkop inyi too nkatitin enyena, ina shan oltumurel naituruku oina shan oo nkokua, pee itumutumu aaiturrurro tiatua enkurma inyi o sabibu linyi o eilata inyi." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Naa keishoru ninye nkujit te nkop inyi te nkaraki nkishu inyi, nidaa intae aaraposho." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Entodol ate emileja too ltauja linyi, nimbelekenyanya aaisiaai kulie aitin niserememe ninche," 
Deuteronomy11:17 ore engoro o Laitoriani neyupuyup tialo intae, neiken ninye shumata, ometaa meetae enchan, nemeiu enkop ilng'anayio, nindaayaya nabo kata aaishunye teina kop naisho intae Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Entushum naa kulo rorei laainei too ltauja linyi, o te nkishui inyi; nieniene ninche metaa olmonekie too nkaik inyi, netiu ninche anaa enkishili too nkomomi inyi." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Ninteng'ening'ene ninche nkera inyi, niimakiki ninche itonini too nkajijik inyi o ipuopuo te nkoitoi, o irurara o itonini." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Ningerigere ninche too molinkaishi oo nkutukie oo nkajijik inyi o too nchomito inyi. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Pee etumi aatopon inkolong'i inono o nkolong'i oo nkera inono teina kop apa nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai too loo papaai linyi pee eisho ninche, anaa enatii keper shumata enkop." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Amu tenigolie kewan aas ena kitanapata naaitanap nanu iyie taasa, anyorru Olaitoriani Enkai ino, nilo too nkoitoi enyena pooki, nimbung'are ninye," 
Deuteronomy11:23 nearaa Olaitoriani kulo oshon pooki ootii dukuya ino, niyaya iloshon kituaak naa magil aalang intae." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Ore pooki wueji neroro nkejek inyi naa keaku eninyi; ore enkop inyi naa keiteru ebaiki ong'ata o Lebanon o ebaiki olkeju le Frati o metabaiki enaiposha enkalo oloo ntoluo. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Meetae oltung'ani likiindim ashomo airisha; kelo Olaitoriani opik enkuretisho te nkaraki intae o loputukunyi te nkaraki intae shumata ina kop pooki niimiimi, anaa enaisiligie ninye intae." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Ng'ura kapik nanu dukuya intae ena olong emayianata o ldeket: 
Deuteronomy11:27 emayianata tenimbung'ubung'u nena kitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai inyi, naitanapa apa nanu intae ena olong," 
Deuteronomy11:28 oldeket, tenimibung'ubung'u intae nena kitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai inyi, nimbelekenyanya aaing'uaa ina oitoi naitanapa nanu intae ena olong, nipuopuo aasujaa kulie aitin apa neitu intae iyiolouu." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Naa teneyau intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi atua ina kop nijing'itata aapuo aaya, enchom entamayianisho to ldoinyo le Gerisim nidekishosho to ldoinyo le Ebal." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Aimetii ninche lido kekun le Yordan, enkalo o loo ntoluo enkoitoi dapash endoyioroto enkolong, tiatua enkop oo Lkanaani apa laa ninche emanya Araba, eipirakinore Gilgal embata oo lkeek le More?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Amu ipuopuo intae aalang Yordan, nipuopuo aaya ina kop naisho intae Olaitoriani; naa tenindipidipi aawaita nimanyimanya," 
Deuteronomy11:32 enchom entodol ate entabaraki pee iasiasa nena kikoot pooki o nkiguanat naitanapa nanu intae ena olong. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Kuna ninche nkikoot o nkiguanat nilo iyie aing'or te ina kop nikichoo iyie Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi pee iya, too nkolong'i pooki ninchu tioriong enkop." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Shomo tukul indaikie nena wuejitin pooki apa neeisiayie nkaitin enye lelo oshon litimira nkaitin enye, too nchumat oo ldoinyo o too nchumat oo ndoinyo kutiti o tiabori pooki shani onyori;" 
Deuteronomy12:3 tusulai ilpereren lenye loo lasarri; nintaa irrarrat ing'apeta enye, nipejoo Asherim enye te nkima; nisulaki iyie enkop nena kitanyaanyukot enye naaitaa nkaitin, nindaikiekie enkarna enye aaishie teine wueji." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Milo iyie aiko neijia to Laitoriani Enkai ino," 
Deuteronomy12:5 kake ilo iyie aing'oru ine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino tiatua iloshon linyi pooki pee ipikipiki enkarna enye nintaa ine emanyisho enye; neijia eikenari," 
Deuteronomy12:6 naa neijia enkuna eyau ilasarri linyi oopejori o nkishorot inyi, e matua e tomon, o lasarri ooitarasari, o lasarri to lmumai, o nkishorot o lpela, o lkikaunot linyi loo nkishu o loo ntare;" 
Deuteronomy12:7 ore teine nipuopuo aadaa te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, nipuopuo aang'ida, intae olmareita linyi, teina pooki nipuopuo aas aa te ninye emayian intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Miasiasa intae terisioroto e kuna pooki nikiaasita iyiook tene taata, easita ake pooki tung'ani enaba anaa enaishiakino too nkonyek enyena makewan," 
Deuteronomy12:9 amu eton intae eitu ipuonunu ina kiyeng'iyeng'ata oina jung'ore naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kake tenilang'ilang'a intae aapuo lido kekun le Yordan, nitonini teina kop naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi entujung, naa teneisho ninye intae enkiyeng'iyeng te lelo mang'ati linyi pooki oomanita intae, metaa itonini te seriani," 
Deuteronomy12:11 ore teine wueji nelo agelu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, pee epik enkarna enye metobiko teine, ine eyau nena pooki naitanap intae; ilasarri linyi oopejori o nkishorot inyi, o ematua inyi e tomon o nena kishorot nintarasaa, o nena kishorot ninosie olmumai pee inchosho Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Ning'idayuyu intae te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, o layiok linyi o ntoyie inyi o sinkan lewa, o sinkan inyi ng'oruo, o lawi ootii atua nkang'itie inyi, enkaraki nemeeta ninye erubata aashu enjung'ore tiatua intae." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Toduaa naa pee mintayu olasar lino opejori te pooki wueji nidol; 
Deuteronomy12:14 kake teine negelu Olaitoriani ti obo loo loshon, linyi, teine iyie shomo intayu ilasarri linyi oopejori naa teine shomo taasa kuna pooki, naaitanap iyie." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Ore tenebo nena, indimidimi aateyieng eng'ues ninosinoso tiatua nkang'itie inyi, anaa eniyieuu, te risioroto e mayianata o laitoriani Enkai inyi naishoo ninye intae; ore ilo osinyari, o lemesinyari keidim ainosa, anaa naaji enkoilii anaa empanas;" 
Deuteronomy12:16 osarge ake miinos; tubukoki ninye enkop anaa enkare. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Mindimidimi aainosa tiatua nkang'itie ina rubata O Laitoriani e ntapa inyi aashu enoo sabibu aashu eneilata, aashu iloo ntare, aashu pooki ake ninye asar linchorutua te nkinosata olmumai, aashu lelo asarri linyi le nyorrata, aashu lelo asarri lintarasaa," 
Deuteronomy12:18 kake indimidimi intae aainosa te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, teine wueji nelo Olaitoriani Enkai ino agelu, ninos iyie o layioni lino o entito ino, o sinka lino lee o esinka ino ng'oruoi, oilo tung'ani loo Lawi otii atua nkang'itie inyi, nilo iyie ang'ida te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino teina pooki nilo aas." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Toduaa naa kewan minturraa ilo tung'ani loo Lawi otii atua te nkata pooki naba anaa enitii atua enkop ino. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Teneponaa Olaitoriani Enkai ino enkop ino, anaa enikisiligie ninye, nijo iyie, ‘Kainos nanu nkiri,’ amu itang'uarra nkiri, indim ainosa nkiri naaba anaa iniyieu." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Tenaa kelakua ine wueji nategelua Olaitoriani Enkai ino pee epik enkarna enye nindim naa ateyiang'a enkiteng ino nabo aashu ina ker ino nabo nikinchoo iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino, anaa enaaitanapa nanu iyie; nindim iyie ainosa tiatua nkang'itie inyi anaa eniyieu." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Ore anaa enainosi enkoilii o empanas, neaku indim sii iyie ainosa; ore ilo osinyari olemesinyari neidim ainosa." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Tayiolo ntisipa pee minos osarge, amu ore osarge naa enkishui, niminos iyie enkishui tenebo nkiri." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Minos iyie osarge, naa tubukoki enkop anaa enkare." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Minos iyie osarge pee eitobirari mbaa inono pooki o noo nkera inono itulusoyie. Tenias iyie esidai too nkonyek o Laitoriani. 
Deuteronomy12:26 Kake ore nena tokitin sinyat naatabaitie te iyie, o lasarri linono, shomo iyie iwa, nilo ine wueji negelu Olaitoriani," 
Deuteronomy12:27 nilo aitayu lelo asarri linono oopejori, nkiri o sarge, te nchumata olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ino; ore ilo sarge loo lasarri linono nepuoi aabukoki enchumata olperere lo lasar lo laitoriani Enkai ino, kake indim ainosa nkiri." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Toduaa kewan pee imbung kulo rorei pooki laaitanapa nanu pee iserianu iyie o nkera inono itulusoyie ntarasi, te nias iyie ina sidai neishiakino too nkonyek o Laitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Tenelo akenya neiwuang'ie Olaitoriani Enkai inyi te dukuya intae lelo oshon lipuopuo intae aaya enkop enye, niwuang'ieng'ie intae ninche nimanyimanya enkop enye," 
Deuteronomy12:30 entodol ate mijing'ijing'i ake orreshet aasujaa ninche, eidipaki aaidaikie ninche te dukuya nkonyek inyi, niminkilikuanunu nkaitin enye, ijojo, ‘Kaji apa eiko kulo oshon teneisiai nkaitin enye? - Pee aiko sii nanu neijia!’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Mias iyie ina to Laitoriani Enkai ino; amu ore pooki toki nara olminong naiba Olaitoriani eitaasa apa ninche nkaitin enye; amu kepejoo doi ninye ilayiok o ntoyie enye te nkima aapejoki nkaitin enye. 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Ore ina toki ake ninye pooki naaitanapa nanu tisipu pee ias; miponiki iyie toki aashu intong'or toki. 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Tenedumunye oloiboni tiatua intae, aashu olaidetidetani loo nkidetidetat, neisho intae enkitoduaata aashu embae e nking'asia," 
Deuteronomy13:2 nelotu ina kitoduaata aashu ina bae e nking'asia natiaka ninye intae aaku, naa tenejo ninye, ‘Maape iyiook aasujaa kulie aitin apa neitu intae iyiolouu, naa maisiaayia iyiook ninche,’" 
Deuteronomy13:3 nimining'ining'i intae lelo rorei leilo oiboni aashu ilo aidetidetani loo nkidetidetat; amu ketem, intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, pee eyiolou tenaa inyorrinyorro intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi to ltauja linyi pooki o te nkishui inyi pooki" 
Deuteronomy13:4 shomo iyie tudumunye tusujai Olaitoriani Enkai ino niureyu ninye, nimbung nkitanapat enyena nining oltoilo lenye, nisiai ninye nimbung'are ninye." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kake ore ilo oiboni aashu ilo aidetidetani loo nkidetidetat neari metua, amu eiteng'enishe ninye engolong'akinoto tialo Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo laa ninye likiyaua iyie aitupuku tiatua enkop e Misiri, nikikordu ninye iyie aitung'uaa enkaji esinkaisho, pee kitum aitung'uai ina oitoi nikintanapa Olaitoriani Enkai ino pee iim. Neaku iwuang'ie iyie entorroni te mpolos inyi" 
Deuteronomy13:6 tenikiliki alej aitapong'oo olalashe lino ling'arie kina, aashu olayioni lino, aashu entito ino, aashu ina kitok ino ninyor, aashu ilo shore lino linyor anaa kewan ino, ejo, ‘Maape iyiook aaisiaai kulie aitin; neitu aekata iyiolouu intae aashu iloo papaai linyi,’" 
Deuteronomy13:7 ore embata e nena aitin e lelo tung'ana oo manita intae, etaaniki intae aashu elamita intae, ebaiki eluboto nabo enkop o metabaiki enkae luboto," 
Deuteronomy13:8 misujaa iyie ninye nimimbung ninye, nimincho meing'urrie ninye, nimipal iyie ninye nimimitu iyie ninye" 
Deuteronomy13:9 kake taara iyie ninye metua inchoo eaku enkaina ino naituruk near ninye metua, ore te siadi naa nkaik oo ltung'ana pooki." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Tanang'a iyie ninye too soito metua, enkaraki niking'orua ninye aitapong'oo to Laitoriani Enkai ino, laa ninye likiyaua aitupuku te nkop e Misiri aitupuku tiatua enkaji e sinkaisho." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Pee ening Iltung'ana pooki le Israel, neureishoyu, nemeigil aekata aas entorroni naikununo nji tiatua intae." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Tenining iyie te nabo e nena anas nikincho iyie Olaitoriani Enkai tobikie teine," 
Deuteronomy13:13 nchere eshomo kulikae tung'ana le pesho tiatua intae neitapong'oitie lelo oomanya ina anasa, ejo, ‘Maape iyiook aaisiaai kulie aitin,’ neitu apa iyiolouu," 
Deuteronomy13:14 nitumokiki taa aaikilikuanu nikililitu aaitirrishaki; naa ng'ura tenaa kesipa neibale nchere etaasaki ena toki nadiaa tiatua intae. 
Deuteronomy13:15 Niariara naa aamut lelo oomanya ina anasa to lalem, nindaikiekie katukul lelo pooki ootii atua o nchoorei enyena, te nepi olalem." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Nisotisoto nena masaa pooki aapik empolos e boo nipejoo ina anasa o nena yarunot enyena pooki te nkima, anaa olasar olulung'a opejokini Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, neaku osototi ntarasi, meigili aekata aashet ina anasa," 
Deuteronomy13:17 mintinyikaki ake enkaina ino nena tokitin nemenyikakini pee etum Olaitoriani aibelekenyayu teina goro enye napi, neisho intae olng'ur neitanana oshoke tialo intae, anaa apa enainosie ninye olmumai too loo papaai linyi." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Tenining'ining'i intae oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi, aaibung nena kitanapat pooki naitanap nanu intae ena olong, niasiasa ina sidai naishiakino too nkonyek o Laitoriani Enkai inyi.”" 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Irara intae nkera o Laitoriani Enkai inyi; midung'udung'u ate nimibarnibarna nkomomi inyi teninchirakiki ilmeneng'a, ootuata." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Amu irara intae iltung'ana oosinya to laitoriani Enkai inyi netegelua intae Olaitoriani pee iakuku olorere lenye makewan, agelu intae te lelo tung'ana pooki ootii oriong enkop." 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Minosinoso intae pooki toki ake ninye nadiaa. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Kuna ng'uesi indimidimi aainosa: olkiteng, enker o enkine," 
Deuteronomy14:5 o empanas, o entarakuet, o olkondi, enkine oo soito, aashu osirua, o eng'ues nanyaanyukie olkibulekeny o enker-oo ldoinyo." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Ore pooki ng'ues narisha loisotok anaa neiperra iloisotok kat are, neinyaku ng'amura tiatua ng'uesi indim ainosa." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ore ake eyia te nena naainyiaku ng'amura aashu nemerisha loisotok minos: entames, enkitejo, o e suni, amu keinyaku ninche ing'amura kake merisha loisotok, naa olminong ina te intae." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Ore olbitir enkaraki narisha iloisotok kake meinyaku ng'amura, naa olminong te intae. Eminosinoso intae nkiri enye ore mpopong'i enye emiseyie." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Ore nena pooki naatii atua enkare indimidimi aainosa; ore mpukunot pooki oo sinkir indimidimi aainosa. Ore pooki toki naata naipuko neeta ilpala nindimidimi aainosa. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Ore pooki nemeeta inaipuko anaa ilpala niminosinoso, mesinya nena te ntae." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Indimidimi aainosa imotonyi pooki sidain," 
Deuteronomy14:12 kake mindimidimi ainosa kuna, olkurragos, olmotonyi loo lmurran o mpukunot oo sidan," 
Deuteronomy14:13 olkurruk o olkupelia o mpukunot enye pooki; 
Deuteronomy14:14 o lkurruk o mpukunot e pooki toki naata naipuko o mpukunot enyena pooki," 
Deuteronomy14:15 o esidai o lmuntut o motonyi e naiposha, o lenkalem, o mpukunot enye pooki." 
Deuteronomy14:16 O enkiti motonyi oo nkiyiaa, o emotonyi oo nkiyiaa sapuk, o emotoroki e nkare" 
Deuteronomy14:17 o enkakaya, osakeri, o lmagero," 
Deuteronomy14:18 o entilagos, o empukunoto e motoroki o lanke, o enagor kewan." 
Deuteronomy14:19 O ntokitin pooki naapuo too naipuko naa olminong te intae, meidimi aainosa ninche." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Ore nena tokitin pooki naasinyari naapuo too naipuko indimidimi aainosa. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Minosinoso pooki toki ake ninye naye openy. Indimidimi intae aaishoo oltung'ani omoni ootii atua nkang'itie inyi, pee einos ninche, aashu indimidimi aatimiraki oltung'ani loo loreren; amu intae iltung'ana oosinya to Laitoriani Enkai inyi. “Miyierie olkuoo kule e ng'otonye." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Ntayu erubata e lelo anterera linono ooing'uaa enkurma to lari ake ninye pooki. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Ore te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino, teine wueji negelu ninye, pee eitamany enkarna enye, nilo iyie ainos ina rubata e nkurma ino; o enoo sabibu linono, o eneilata ino, o enoo lkikaunot loo nkishu inono o ntare; pee iyiolou iyie aturia OlaitorianiEnkai ino anaake." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Naa tenaa keado enkoitoi te iyie, neaku mindim ayau ina rubata tenikimayian Olaitoriani Enkai ino te nkaraki kelakua oleng te iyie ine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino pee epik enkarna enye ine," 
Deuteronomy14:25 mbelekenya naa metaa mpisai, nieniki nena pisai enkaina ino, nilo ine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino," 
Deuteronomy14:26 ninyang'unye nena pisai entoki pooki naba anaa eniyieu, olkiteng aashu enker, enaisho oo sabibu aashu enaisho napi, entoki ake ninye naba anaa eniyieu; nilo iyie ainos teine te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino ning'ida, iyie o lmarei lino." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Niminturaa iyie ilo tung'ani loo Lawi otii atua nkang'itie inyi, amu meeta ninye erubata aashu enjung'ore tenebo iyie." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “Ore te nkiting'oto, e pooki ari liokuni nkatitin pooki niyauu intae ematua ina rubata pooki e tomon enkisampuare inyi to lari obo, aairragie aashum too nkang'itie inyi;" 
Deuteronomy14:29 ore Olawi, enkaraki nemeeta ninye erubata aashu enjung'ore tenebo iyie, oilo omoni, o lokishi, o enkoliai natii atua nkang'itie inyi, nepuonu aainos neraposho; pee kitum Olaitoriani Enkai ino atamayiana teina siaai pooki oo nkaik inono nias." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Ore te nkiting'oto ake ninye oo larin oopishana nichooyoyo empalakino. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Naa nji eikununo ina palakino; ore pooki tung'ani oisilenishe nepalaa ina naisilenoko ole latia enye; meitalaku ninye to le latia enye, o to lalashe lenye, enkaraki naibalunyeki empalakinoto o Laitoriani." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Ore ilo leeiking'a indim iyie aitalaa; kake ore entoki ino naba anaa enaisilenoyie olalashe lino tapalaki. 
Deuteronomy15:4 Kake mepuoi aata oltung'ani aisinani tiatua intae amu kelo Olaitoriani amayian intae teina kop naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi pee iyaya neaku enjung'ore inyi. 
Deuteronomy15:5 Tenining'ining'i ake duoo intae oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi, ning'oring'oro pee iasiasa ena kitanapata pooki naitanapa nanu intae ena olong." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Amu kelo Olaitoriani amayian intae anaa enaisiligie intae, naa ipuopuo intae aaisilenoki iloshon kake misilenunu intae; naa eipuopuo aaitore iloshon kumok, kake meitore ninche intae." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Tenetii atua intae oltung'ani aisinani, obo loo lalashera linyi, atua ake ninye nabo oo nkang'itie inyi tiatua ina kop inyi naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, milo iyie aitagol oltau lino aashu inunuk enkaina ino tialo ilo alashe lino aisinani." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Kake talaa enkaina ino tialo ninye, nisilenoki ninye enaidip enkolat enye, te mpukunoto enye ake ninye pooki." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Toduaa kewan mejing ake endamunoto e pesho oltau lino, nilo ajo, ‘Ore olari liopishana, olari le mpalakino netinyikua,’ neing'ode enkong'u ino ilo alashe lino aisinani, nimincho iyie ninye toki, neishiraki ninye Olaitoriani te nkaraki iyie, naa keaku eng'oki te iyie." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Nchoo ninye katukul nimincho oltau lino enyamalu te nincho iyie ninye, amu ore enkaraki ena eikimayian iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino te siaai ino pooki o teina pooki nias." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Amu ore oltung'ani aisinani melai aekata te nkop; neaku aaitanapa iyie talaa enkaina ino to lalashe lino, teilo oata enkolat o teilo aisinani otii enkop inyi." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Tenikimirakini olalashe lino, loo Lhebrania, olee ashu enkitok oo Lhebrania, nchoo kisiai ninye iyie ilarin ile ore to lari liopishana, nchoo ninye meshomo." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Naa tenincho ninye meshomo mincho ninye meshomo too nkaik naarook; 
Deuteronomy15:14 ntanapa ninye tabaraki too ntare inono, te wueji neidong'ishoreki, o te neironyishoreki, ore anaa enikitamayiana Olaitoriani Enkai ino, nchoo iyie ninye." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Tadamu iyie nchere ira apa orrindik te nkop e Misiri, nikinyang'u Olaitoriani Enkai ino alaku neaku, kaaitanap nanu iyie ena olong." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Kake tenikijoki ninye, ‘Maalo nanu aing'uaa’, te nkaraki nikinyor ninye iyie o lmarei lino, amu eitumurrua te iyie," 
Deuteronomy15:17 kaae niyau oltidu niud enkiok enye aipang'ie apudaki enkikenet e kutukaji, naa keaku ninye osinka lino ntarasi. Ore ina aisiaayiani ino ng'oruoi ninko neijia." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Midol anaa entoki nagol tenilaaya ninye meshomo; amu to lpisiai le laakinoto olaisiaayiani kisiayia ninye ilarin ile. Neaku eikimayian iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino teina pooki nias. 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Ore lelo kikaunot pooki sitiman o lbung'aiko ooini too nkishu inono o too nkerrai, intisinyaki Olaitoriani Enkai ino; mintaas esiai lelo kikaunot loo nkishu inono nimibarn lelo kikaunot loo ntare inono." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Inosa iyie o lmarei lino, te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino to lari ake ninye pooki teine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Kake teneeta entioto, tenaa maima aashu modooni aashu ae tioto torrono nimipolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Inosa iyie tiatua nkang'itie inyi; ore ilo osinyari olemesinyari neidim ainosa anaa ake duoo enainosi entarakuet aashu esuni. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Osarge lenye ake minos; tubukoki enkop anaa enkare. 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Mbung'a olapa le Abibu nimbung Sabato o Laitoriani Enkai ino; amu to lapa le Abibu apa kintayio Olaitoriani Enkai ino aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri kewarie. 
Deuteronomy16:2 Nipolosaki iyie olasar le pasaka Olaitoriani Enkai ino, too ntare aashu too nkishu, teine wueji negelu Olaitoriani pee eitamany enkarna enye ine." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Mipudaki iyie imukateni naaisuishieki, nkolong'i naapishana iyie inosa tenebo imukateni neitu eisuishieki ina mukate o sina - amu itupukutuo apa intae te nkop e Misiri te nkisikata e nkisarrisar - pee itumutumu aatayiolo too nkolong'i pooki enkishui inyi ina olong apa nitupukutuo aaing'uaa enkop e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Emincho edoli emukate naisuishieki tiatua enkop inyi too nkolong'i naapishana; niminchosho nena kiri o lasar le teipa teina olong e dukuya ekenyiki. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Mindimidimi aatopolos olasar le pasaka tiatua pooki ake ninye ang inyi naisho intae Olaitoriani; 
Deuteronomy16:6 kake teine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi pee eitamany enkarna enye ine, teine iyie shomo intayu olasar le pasaka, teipa edoyio enkolong, teina kata apa nitupukutuo aaing'uaa Misiri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Niyier aitokitokie ninos teine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino; ore tadekenya nimbelekenyanya aapuo ilng'oborri linyi. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Ore too nkolong'i ile ninosinoso imukateni neitu eisuishieki ore te nkolong e naapishana naa keaku eneumata o Laitoriani Enkai inyi; miasiasa esiai teina olong. 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Nteru nkena iwikii naapishana; ntera nkenu nena wikii naapishana ebaiki ina kata nisampu ina kurma ina nauno. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Nintoki aibung ina wiki oo wikii to Laitoriani Enkai, too nkishorot o lpela naaing'uaa enkaina ino, ninchooyo iyie anaa enikitamayiana Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Ning'ida iyie te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino, o sinka lino lee o esinka ino ng'oruoi, oilo tung'ani loo Lawi otii atua nkang'itie inono, o lomoni, o lokishi, o enkoliai natii atua intae, teine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, pee eitamany enkarna enye ine." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Tadamu nchere ira orrindik te Misiri ning'or pee imbung kuna kitanapat. 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Imbung'a osirua loo lng'oborri nkolong'i naapishana, ina kata itasoto enkurma ino te wueji neidong'ishoreki o te wueji ino neironyishoreki;" 
Deuteronomy16:14 ning'ida iyie to sirua lino; iyie o layioni lino o entito ino, o sinka lino o esinka ino, o ilo tung'ani loo Lawi, o lomoni, o Lokishi, o enkoliai natii atua nkang'itie inyi." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Too nkolong'i naapishana iyie mbung'a osirua lo Laitoriani Enkai ino, teine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino; amu eikimayian Olaitoriani Enkai ino te pooki nintayu o te siaai pooki oo nkaik inono, pee itumoki ating'idayu tukul." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Katitin uni to lari nepuonu ilewa linyi pooki dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi teine wueji negelu ninye; teilo sirua loo mukateni neitu eisuishieki, o to sirua loo wikii o to sirua loo lng'oborri. Mepuonu ninche dukuya Olaitoriani too nkaik naarook;" 
Deuteronomy16:17 nchoo ake oltung'ani pooki eishooyo anaa enaidim, te risioroto emayianata o Laitoriani Enkai ino nikinchoo ninye iyie." 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Tegelu ilarishak o lkituaak too nkang'itie inyi pooki nikincho iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino, te risioroto oo loshon linyi; neiguanaki ninche iltung'ana te sipata." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Mimbelekeny iyie esipata, mintodolu iyie olkep, ming'amu ntokitin e ropare, amu keitamodok eropare nkonyek o ltung'ani ng'en. Neibelekeny olkuaak lo lasipani." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Esipata ake, esipata ake tusuja, pee itum atopuaa nijing ina kop nikincho iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Miun ake ninye likae shani metaa enkitanyaanyukoto enkai naji Ashera te mbata olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ino nilo iyie aitobir. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Mipikipiki intae eng'ape naiba Olaitoriani Enkai ino. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Mipolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai ino olkiteng aashu enker naata, entioto, aashu entibili ake ninye; amu olminong ilo to Laitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Tenetumi tiatua intae, tiatua ae nabo oo nkang'itie inyi naaishoo intae Olaitoriani Enkai ino olee aashu enkitok naas entorroni te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino, agil olning'o lenye lo sotua," 
Deuteronomy17:3 nelo ninye aisiaai kulie aitin neserem ninche, aashu enkolong aashu olapa aashu ae ake ninye o lorora le shumata, apa natanya nanu," 
Deuteronomy17:4 nikilikini iyie, nining iyie; ninkilikuanu taa aitisip, naa tenesipa nchere etaasaki olminong oikununo nji te Israel,"
