Deuteronomy17:5 niyau auluo ino ilo lee aashu ina kitok nataasa ena bae torrono, ninang toosoito ilo lee aashu enkitok ometua." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Te nchakenisho oo lchakenini oare aashu ilchakenini okuni eari ilo oye metua; meari oltung'ani metua te nchakenisho oltung'ani obo. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Enkaina e lelo shakenini naiter aar ninye metua, ore adake near enkaina oo ltung'ana pooki. Metaa ewuang'ie entorroni tiatua intae." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Tenelotu enkiguana nayieu erishare tialo iloikop o loikop, imasaa o masaa, aashu eoshoto o eoshoto, o enkiguana ake ninye pooki nagolu nayieu erishare oleng te iyie tiatua nkang'itie inono, tudumunye shomo ine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino," 
Deuteronomy17:9 nintarasaki ilapolosak le Lawi, oilo arishani otii olorika nena olong'i nkilikuanishore ninche, amu eikimbalakinye ninche endung'oto enkiguana." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Nilo taa aas anaa enikimbalakinye ninche teine wueji negelu Olaitoriani; ning'or pee ias nena pooki nikiutaki ninche; 
Deuteronomy17:11 ore te risioroto eina dung'oto enkiguana nalimu ninche, nena shomo taasa; mimbelekenya teina dung'oto enkiguana nikimbalakinye ninche, alo enkalo e tatene aashu enkalo e kedienye." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Ore ilo tung'ani oas to lwuasa, lemening olapolosani oitashe aisiaisho teine te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino, aashu olarishani nchoo eari ilo tung'ani metua; pee itum aiwuang'ie entorroni tiatua Israel." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Nening iltung'ana pooki neureishoyu nemeitoki aas to lwuasa. 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Tenilotu akenya ina kop nikincho Olaitoriani Enkai ino, niya aitaa enino, nimany ninye, nintoki ajo, ‘Kapik olaiguanani shumata nanu, anaa kulo oshon pooki laamanita;’" 
Deuteronomy17:15 indim iyie tukul atipika ilo aiguanani shumata iyie ogelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino. Obo loo lalashera linono indim ategelu metaa olaiguanani te shumata intae; mipikipiki oltung'ani loo loreren shumata intae leme olalashe linyi. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Nchoo olaiguanani eaku meitaa mbartan enyena kumok, nemeisho iltung'ana metorrinyoto aapuo Misiri ejo pee etum atopona mbartan enyena, amu kitiaka iyie Olaitoriani, ‘Mingil aekata aim ina oitoi.’" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Nemeponiki sii kewan nkituaak, pee meibelekenya ake oltau lenye; nemeponiki sii kewan oleng enkosholai o sahabu." 
Deuteronomy17:18 “Naa teneton ninye to lorika lenye le nkitoo, neigeroki kewan tiatua embuku ena kitanapata, teina naitore ilapolosak le Lawi," 
Deuteronomy17:19 neaku ina kitanapata tenebo ninye, neisum ninye nkolong'i pooki enkishui enye, pee eyiolou aturia Olaitoriani Enkai enye, te nkibung'ata oo rorei pooki lena kitanapata, o kuna kiguanat, neas ninche;" 
Deuteronomy17:20 pee medumunye oltau lenye arupayu alang ilalashera lenyena, nemeibelekenya apaash ena kitanapata, alo enkalo e tatene aashu enkalo e kedienye; pee etum ninye atobikoi te nkitoria enye, ninye onkera enyena tiatua Israel." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Ore lelo apolosak le Lawi, aa taa olosho pooki loo Lawi, meeta ninche erubata aashu enjung'ore tenebo Israel; lelo asarri oopejokini Olaitoriani te nkima einos ninche, o erubata enye." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Meeta ninche enjung'ore tenebo ilalashera lenye; Olaitoriani ninye enjung'ore enye, anaa apa enaisiligie ninche." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Naa keaku ena erubata oo lapolosak naing'uaa iltung'ana, neing'uaa nena kishorunot o lasar, aa olkiteng aashu enker, nchoo eisho ninche olapolosani orony o sederi pokira are o enkaya." 
Deuteronomy18:4 O lng'anayio le dukuya le ntapa ino, o le naisho ino oo sabibu o le ilata ino, o lpapit le nkiterata oobarnuni te nker ino, nchoo ninye." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Amu etegelua Olaitoriani Enkai ino ninye tiatua loshon linyi pooki, pee eitashe neisiaisho te nkarna o Laitoriani, ninye o layiok lenyena ntarasi." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Naa tenelotu oltung'ani loo Lawi nkang'itie inyi eing'uaa Israel pooki, ine nemanya, naa keidim ninye aeu teneyieu, ine wueji negelu Olaitoriani," 
Deuteronomy18:7 netum taa aisiaaisho te nkarna o Laitoriani Enkai enye, anaa ilkulikae tung'ana loo Lawi ooitashe aaisiaisho teine te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Nchoo eitorisi irubat enye naainos, neng'amu erubata naing'uaa olmarei lenye." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Tenilotu akenya ina kop nikincho Olaitoriani Enkai ino, milo ake aitamok kewan esujata e nena tabo o olminong le lelo oshon." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Mincho ake etumi tiatua intae obo opejoo olayioni lenye aashu entito enye anaa olasar, o pooki ng'ae owosh isoito, anaa aibonisho, anaa amusoni, anaa olasakutoni," 
Deuteronomy18:11 aashu oloo rasheta aashu olaenani, aashu olasakutoni, aashu oloirorie ilmeneng'a." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Amu ore ilo oba anaa oloas kuna baa naa olminong to Laitoriani; naa ore enkaraki kuna baa olminong nearaa nena tabo Olaitoriani Enkai inyi aipang'ie te dukuya intae. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Entaa ilemeeta entioto te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Amu ore kulo oshon letaa ilo aiwuang'ie naa kening lelo ooibonisho te ntorroni o oloomusu; kake ore iyie eitu kinyorraki Olaitoriani Enkai ino taasa ina. 
Deuteronomy18:15 “Keputoki intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi oloiboni leeijo nanu tiatua intae, tiatua ilalashera linyi, ilo intae entoning" 
Deuteronomy18:16 Anaa apa enitang'uarra to Laitoriani te Horeb teina olong e umata, ina kata apa pee ijo, ‘Mincho nanu aitoki aning oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ai, aashu aigil adol ena kima kitok, maye ake.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Eiroro ninche aaitobiraki nena pooki naatejo ninche." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Kaputoki nanu ninche oloiboni leeijo iyie tiatua ilalashera lenye; napik nanu irorei laainei atua enkutuk enye, neirorie ninye ninche nena pooki naitanap ninye." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ore ilo pooki lemening irorei laainei ooiroro ninye te nkarna ai, naitalaku nanu makewan te ninye." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Kake ore ilo oiboni omusu airo irorei te nkarna ai leitu nanu aitanap ninye meiroro, aashu ilo oiro te nkarna e kulie aitin, ore ilo oiboni keye ake.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Naa tenijo iyie to ltau lino, ‘Kaji iyiook kinko pee kiyiolou ororei leitu eiro Olaitoriani?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Teneiro oloiboni te nkarna o Laitoriani, tenemelotu ilo rorei asipayu aashu aaku, ore ilo rorei mme Olaitoriani oiroro; oloiboni ake oiroro to lwuasa, nemiureyuyu intae ninye." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Teneiwuang'ie Olaitoriani Enkai ino lelo oreren likilo iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino aisho enkop enye, niwuang'ie iyie ninche, nimany nkanas enye o nkajijik enye," 
Deuteronomy19:2 nteng'ela iyie nkanas uni te nkaraki ntae teina kop nikincho iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino metaa enino. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Ntobira nkoitoi nior aitaa irubat uni ina kop nikinchoo iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino metaa enino, pee etum pooki tung'ani oitayu loikop akuetiki." 
Deuteronomy19:4 “Ena ninye naishoruno teilo oar olikae te sesekuan, tenesaru ninye ine neidim aitopuaa enkishui enye. Tenear oltung'ani olelatia enye eitu eotiki meatakinore" 
Deuteronomy19:5 anaa naaji tenelo oltung'ani entim tenebo olelatia enye adung'u ilkeek, neyuk te nkaina enye entolu adung'u olchata, neshurtunye endukuya e ntolu near ilo le latia enye metua, eidim ninye atasaru nabo e kuna anas neitajeu enkishui enye;" 
Deuteronomy19:6 meinepu ake ilo tung'ani oitalaku elap o sarge etagore near ninye, hoo nemeishiakino ilo tung'ani keeya, amu meatakinore duoo ilo le latia enye." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Metaa kaaitanap iyie, nteng'ela nkanas uni." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Naa tenikiponiki Olaitoriani Enkai ino enkop, anaa apa enainosa ninye olmumai too loo papaai linyi, neisho ninye intae ina kop pooki apa naisiligie loo papaai linyi" 
Deuteronomy19:9 tening'oru aibung nena kitanapat pooki, naaitanap nanu iyie ena olong, pee ing'oru Olaitoriani Enkai ino nilo anaake too nkoitoi enyena - niponaa naa kulie anas uni te kuna uni," 
Deuteronomy19:10 meibukori ake osarge lemeeta entioto tiatua ina kop ino nikincho iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino metaa enjung'ore ino, nelotu oldeket le ntorroni e nkibukoroto o sarge shumata ino." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Kake teneiba ake ninye oltung'ani olelatia enye, neirrag arreshu ninye, neibung ninye, nesesekuan ninye neaku etua, nekuetiki ilo tung'ani nabo e kuna anas," 
Deuteronomy19:12 nchoo ilpayiani leina anasa eirriwaa olkilikuai meyauni ninye teine, neitarasakini ninye ilo oata e lap osarge, pee etum ninye atua." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Mincho enkong'u ino meing'urrie ninye, kake iwuang'ie ena torroni e nkibukoroto osarge tiatua Israel, pee itum ataseriana." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Ore teina jung'ore nilo aibung teina kop nikincho Olaitoriani Enkai ino metaa enino, miwuang'ie olpolosie lo le latia ino, apa otipika iltung'ana le dukuya." 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Meidip olchakeni obo to ltung'ani le ntorroni ake ninye pooki, aashu tiae ake ninye kitapong'oto naitapong'o ninye. Too lchakenini oare ake aashu okuni eidimi aaitisipa endung'oto enkiguana." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Tenedumunye olchakeni le nkeleekisho aitang'or likae tung'ani te nkitarruoroto," 
Deuteronomy19:17 nepuonu nena aloli naaitarrikinote dukuya Olaitoriani, dukuya ilapolosak o larishak laa ninche ootii lorikan te nena olong'i;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 neikilikuanishore ilarishak aabaraki naa tenaa olelejare ilo shakeni, neitang'oro olalashe lenye te lejare," 
Deuteronomy19:19 nintaasiasa ninye ina duoo nayieu ninye neitaas olalashe lenye, pee itum aaibooi entorroni te mpolos inyi," 
Deuteronomy19:20 Nening lelo kulikae, neureyu, nemeigil aekata entorroni natiu nji tiatua intae." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Mincho enkong'u meing'urrie ninye; kelo aaku enkishui te nkishui, enkong'u te nkong'u, olalae to lalae, enkaina te nkaina, enkeju te nkeju." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Tenimpang iyie alo olarrabal aarare ilmang'ati linono, nidol mbartan o ngarrin oo mbartan o enjore kitok alang enino, miureyu iyie ninche; amu etii Olaitoriani Enkai ino tenebo iyie, ilo apa likintayuo iyie te nkop e Misiri." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Naa tenilo iyie aigutaki olarrabal, nelotu olapolosani dukuya airorie iltung'ana," 
Deuteronomy20:3 nejoki ninche, ‘Toning'o iyie Israel, tinyikai iyie ena olong ng'utaki olarrabal taarare ilmang'ati linono: mincho oltau lino elepori; miureishoyu niming'aeng'ae, aashu mputukuny te nkaraki ninche;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 amu Olaitoriani Enkai ino ilo olo te dukuya iyie, pee kilo amitu too lmang'ati linono, nikincho iyie timirisho.’" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Neitoki lelo kituaak aairorie iltung'ana ejo, ‘Kalo tung'ani tene otesheta enkaji ng'ejuk neton eitu eitisiny? Nchoo ninye errinyo alo enkaji enye, melo ake aye to larrabal nelotu likae tung'ani aitisiny." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Naa kalo tung'ani tene otuuno isabibu neton eitu eitumurru ilng'anayio lenyena? Nchoo ninye errinyo alo enkaji enye, melo ake aye to larrabal nelotu likae tung'ani aitumurru ilng'anayio lenyena." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Naa kalo tung'ani tene otasayia entito neton eitu eyam? Nchoo ninye errinyo alo enkaji enye melo ake aye to larrabal neya likae tung'ani ina tito.’ 
Deuteronomy20:8 Neitoki lelo kituaak aairorie iltung'ana nejoki kalo tung'ani tene otureishe netalepori? Nchoo ninye errinyo alo enkaji enye melepori ake iltauja loo ltung'ana lenyena anaa olenye? 
Deuteronomy20:9 Ore ake pee eidip lelo kituaak aairorie iltung'ana, neitokini aagelu ilarikok le njore metijing'a dukuya iltung'ana." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Tenilotu iyie ataaniki enkanasa aarare, tang'asa nchoo ninche erishata eseriani." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Naa tenaa eseriani ewalata enye, nikibolu ninye, ore lelo tung'ana pooki ootumi tiatua ninye neas esiai nagol nikisai iyie." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Kake tenemeitobir ninche eseriani tenebo iyie, kake olarrabal kintayunye, nimuatu iyie ninye;" 
Deuteronomy20:13 naa ore teneishoru Olaitoriani Enkai ino apik atua enkaina ino niar ilewa lenyena pooki to lalem. 
Deuteronomy20:14 Kake ore nkituaak o nkera kutiti o nkishu o pooki toki natii atua ina anasa nena masaa pooki naaibung'aki niyaya anaa entoki nitaraitie nishipakino iyie nena nitarayie too lmang'ati linono, naa Olaitoriani Enkai ino likinchoo iyie." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Neijia shomo nkuna te nena anas pooki naalakua oleng te iyie, te nena neme nkanas e kulo oshon tene." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Kake ore tiatua nkanas e kulo tung'ana nikincho iyie metaa enjung'ore ming'uaa hoo toki eishu. 
Deuteronomy20:17 Kake shomo ndaikie ninche tukul, Ilhiti o Lamori, o Lkanaani, o Lperisi, olhafi, o Lyebusi, anaa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani Enkai ino;" 
Deuteronomy20:18 pee meiteng'en ake ninche intae entaas olminong lenye otaasa te nkisiayiare oo nkaitin enye, niasiasa eng'oki to Laitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Teniman amuat iyie enkanasa te nkata naado. Nintayunye ninye olarrabal pee iya, mindaikie iyie ilkeek lenyena aiteleiki entolu shumata ninche; amu ndimidimi aainosa ninche kake midung'udung'u ninche aauroo. Ketaa ilkeek tiong'ata iltung'ana metaa imanimana intae aamuat?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Lelo keek ake liyiololo aajo ilkeek leme le ndaa indimidimi aaidaikie nidung'udung'u aauroo pee itumutumu aateshetunyie isempewueti teina anasa naitayunye intae olarrabal, ometaba anaa nebatata." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Tenelo netumi teina kop naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi metaa eninyi, oltung'ani otaraki metua, eirrag tiong'ata, nemeyioloi aajo kaing'ae natara ninye," 
Deuteronomy21:2 nepuonu naa ilpayiani linyi o larishak linyi, netem erishata e nena anas naamanita ilo otasesekuanaki" 
Deuteronomy21:3 neya enkashe neitu aekata eitaasi esiai, neitu aekata epiki enchata emurt." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Neyau lelo payiani leina anasa ina ashe aaitadou oerata onang'ari enkare, leitu aekata eturi aashu euni, negili emurt eina ashe teine to erata." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Ore lapolosak lelo ayiok le Lawi nepuonu dukuya, amu etegelua Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ninche pee eisiaai ninye nemayianisho te nkarna o Laitoriani, naa ore to rorei lenye ore pooki shankar o pooki oshoto neitobiri." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Ore lelo payiani pooki leina anasa nataaniki ilo tung'ani otasesekuanaki neituku nkaik enye te nchumata eina ashe natigilaki emurt to erata; 
Deuteronomy21:7 neishakenoki ninche aajo, ‘Eitu eibukoo nkaik ang ele sarge, neitu edol nkonyek ang ele sarge, neitu edol nkonyek ang eibukori." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Tapalaki Olaitoriani iltung'ana linono Israel, linyang'ua iyie, nimipik entorroni o sarge lemeeta entioto atua iltung'ana linono Israel; kake nchoo ena torroni o sarge metapalakini ninche.’" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Neaku inji nkuna teniwuang'ie entorroni o sarge tiatua intae, tenias enaishiakino too nkonyek o Laitoriani." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Tenilo iyie olarrabal aarare ilmang'ati linono, neishoru Olaitoriani Enkai ino ninche apik nkaik inono, nimbung iyie ninche araya," 
Deuteronomy21:11 nidol tiatua ninche lelo yarunot enkitok sidai, ning'uar iyie ninye, niya iyie aitaa enkitok ino," 
Deuteronomy21:12 niyau naa iyie ang arik enkaji ino, nebarn ninye endukuya nedung iloisotok." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Neitoki ninye aitayu ilkilani lenyena ooishopito pee eyaruni neton tiatua enkaji ino neishiraki menye o ng'otonye olapa olulung'a; ore te siadi naa indim ashomo atayiolo ninye, niaku olpayian lenye neaku ninye enkitok ino." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Naa teneitu ishipakino ninye, nincho meshomo eneyieu; kake mimir ninye too mpisai, minko ninye anaa errindik, amu indipa atayiolo ninye." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Teneeta oltung'ani nkituaak are, enkirotet o entinki, netoikitio ninche ninye nkera, ina kirotet o entinki; naa tenaa ore olkikau naa oleina tinki," 
Deuteronomy21:16 ore kenya teina olong naor ninye imasaa enyena aitujung ilayiok lenyena nemeiko ninye olayioni le nkirotet anaa olkikau aitulus to layioni le ntinki, laa ninye olkikau," 
Deuteronomy21:17 kake kelo ninye aitulus olkikau lenye ilo ayioni le ntinki, neisho ninye ninye erubata napuda te nena pooki naata ninye, amu ninye enkiterunoto engolon enye; enenye esipata e kikausho." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Teneeta oltung'ani olayioni ogolong'u marmali, lemening menye aashu ng'otonye, naa, ore hoo near ninche ninye, mening ninye ninche," 
Deuteronomy21:19 nchoo eibung menye o ng'otonye neyaki ninye ilpayiani leina anasa te kishomi eine wueji nemanya ninye," 
Deuteronomy21:20 nejoki ninche lelo payiani leina anasa enye, ‘Ore ele ayioni lang kegolong'u naa marmali, mening iyiook, olalotoni naa olamerani.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Ore lelo tung'ana pooki leina anasa nenang ninye too soito ometua; pee itum aaipooi entorroni tiatua intae; nening Israel pooki neureishoyu. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Naa teneas oltung'ani embae torrono naishiakino neye, nepiki ninye olchani aailili." 
Deuteronomy21:23 Nemeton osesen lenye enkewarie pooki te nchumata olchani; kake tunukai ninye ina olong ake, amu ore oltung'ani oililioki naa kediaa te Nkai; misarkionie ina kop ino nikinchoo Olaitoriani Enkaiino metaa enjung'ore." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Tiniduaaya olkiteng lo lalashe lino aashu enker enye elo aimin nimipal ake eitu ilo ashuku; terewaki ninche olalashe lino. 
Deuteronomy22:2 Naa tenimitaaniki aashu tenimiyiolo iyie ninye, tereu enkang ino, ning'or ninche ometaba anaa nelotu olalashe lino aing'oru; nitumoki taa aishoo ninye." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Naa neijia sii nkuna osikiria lenye; mincho elo naa neijia inkuna to lkila lenye; naa neijia sii inkuna te pooki toki naimin oo lalashera linono, naimin nitum iyie; mimbooyo eretoto ino." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Midol osikiria lo lalashe lino aashu olkiteng etabatate te mbata enkoitoi nimbooyo eretoto ino te ninche; taretoki ninye metudumu ninche menyaaki aitashe. 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Mepika enkitok enkishopo olee nemepika olee enkishopo e nkitok, amu ore oloba anaa oloas kuna baa naa olminong to Laitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Tenelo nitum enkaji e ntaritiki te pooki ake ninye shani aashu te nkop etii nkera aashu ilmosor, nepetita ng'otonye ninche, nena kera aashu lelo mosor, miya iyie ng'otonye tenebo nkera;" 
Deuteronomy22:7 nchoo ng'otonye elo kake indim aawa nkera; pee iserianu, nitum sii atobikoi." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Tenishet enkaji ng'ejuk tipika ntamanai iloom pee miyau ake entorroni osarge shumata enkaji ino, tenesulunye ake ninye oltung'ani." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Miun tiatua enkurma ino oo sabibu mpukunot are oo lanterera meiwuang'ieki ake ilng'anayio lenyena, lelo ng'anayio lituuno o lelo ootubulakitia." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Miturishore iyie olkiteng o sikiria te nkata nabo. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Minchop iyie enkila nashula ilpapit oopuyiapui o kitani. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Tiripaki kewan iltelelia too lcholo pokira oong'uan leilo kila lino linchop. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Teneyam oltung'ani enkitok nelo ayiolou neitoki asukeny ninye," 
Deuteronomy22:14 neitagor ninye te nkoitoi e sulare, neyau enkarna torrono shumata ninye, ejo, ‘Aawa nanu ena kitok ore ake pee alo aboitare neitu atum te ninye olmonekie oitodolu ajo eselenkei’," 
Deuteronomy22:15 ore menye ina kitok o ng'otonye neipang'unye aayau boo lelo monek le titoisho, enetii ilpayiani leina anasa tialuo," 
Deuteronomy22:16 nejoki ninye menye leina kitok lelo payiani, ‘Aishoo nanu entito ai ele tung'ani meyama, neibayie ninye;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 naa ng'ura eitobira ninye enkitang'oroto e sulare tialo ninye, ejo, “Eitu nanu atum te ntito ino olmonekie oitodolu ajo eselenkei!” Naa noolo ilmonek le ntito ai le titoisho. Neisalaash nincheilo kila te dukuya lelo payiani leina anasa.’" 
Deuteronomy22:18 Neibung lelo payiani leina anasa ilo lee nepuo aar aaitame," 
Deuteronomy22:19 neitalaki ninye shekeli iip e nkosholai, neisho ninye menye ina kitok, enkaraki nayawua entorroni shumata ina tito nemeyama e Israel; naa keaku ninye enkitok enye; meidim ninye aiwuang'ie ina kitok too nkolong'i pooki enkishui enye." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Kake tenesipa ina bae, nchere eitu etumi olmonek ooitodolu aajo mme eselenkei ina kitok," 
Deuteronomy22:21 neipang'unyeki naa ina kitok aayau kutukaji enkaji e menye, ore lelo lewa leina anasa enye nenang ninye too soito o metua, enkaraki nayawua ninye esulare atua Israel aiborrie onyek tiatua enkaji e menye; neaku impooitie entorroni aaiwuang'ie tiatua Israel." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Teneinepuni olee eshomo enetii enkitok e likae lee neari pokira are metuata. Ilo lee oshomo enetii ina kitok o ina kitok, neaku impooitie entorroni tiatua ate." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Tenetii entito natisiraki nenang'are olee ninye tiatua enkanasa neyiolou ninye," 
Deuteronomy22:24 iyau ninche pokira aipang'unye auluo ina anasa, ninang ninche too soito o metuata, ina kitok tenkaraki neitu eishir metomituni hoo netii atua enkanasa, o ilo lee enkaraki nainyala enkitok olelatia enye; neaku iwuang'ie entorroni tiatua intae." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Kake teneinepu olee enkitok natasayiaki tiong'ata nemir ilo lee ninye neyiolou, naa ilo lee ake otayiolo oye." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Kake ore ina kitok meitaasi ae; ore tialo ina kitok metii entorroni nairirikino keeya, amu ore ena kiguana nenyaanyukie enoltung'ani orasaki nesesekuan ilo lelatia enye." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Ore enkaraki nainepua ninye ti ong'ota, naa ore hoo neishira ina kitok nasayia metomituni metii oltung'ani omitu ninye." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Teneinepu olee eselenkei nemesayia neibung ninye, neyiolou ninye neirrashi," 
Deuteronomy22:29 ore ilo lee otayiolo ninye neisho menye ina tito shekeli onom e nkosholai, neyam ninye, enkaraki nainyala ninye; meidim ninye ataarai ninye too nkolong'i pooki enkishui enye." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Meya oltung'ani enkitok e menye aashu obolu ilkilani leina nara enkitok e menye. 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Ore ilo lee pooki oidongoki aashu ilo otudung'ori elewaisho nemejing atua eumata o Laitoriani. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Meetae olotaluno ojing atua eumata o Laitoriani; ometabaiki eishoi e tomon meetae obo leishoi enye olo ajing ina umata Olaitoriani. 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Meetae oltung'ani Olamoni aashu ole Moab olo ajing eumata o Laitoriani ore ninye ebaiki eishoi e tomon meetae obo lenye olo ajing atua eumata o Laitoriani ntarasi; 
Deuteronomy23:4 enkaraki neitu apa ninche kintanang'are iyie enkare o endaa te nkoitoi, ina kata apa pee ipuku aing'uaa Misiri, o enkaraki nayautua Baalam olayioni le Beor aaitung'uaa Petor e Mesopotamia meeu adek intae." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Ore ake eyia mening Olaitoriani Enkai ino Balaam; kake eibelekenya Olaitoriani Enkai ino ilo deket metaa emayianata te iyie, amu eikinyor iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Ming'orunye ninche eseriani aashu karsisisho too nkolong'i inono pooki intarasi. 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Mimenaa ilo tung'ani le Edom amu olalashe lino; nimimenaa oltung'ani le Misiri amu ira apa iyie olomoni te nkop enye. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Ore nena kera eishoi e uni naaikini ninche neidim aatijing eumata Olaitoriani. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Tenilo iyie aarare ilmang'ati linono nijing atua ilng'oborri lenye, nigolie naa kewan te pooki toki torrono." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Tenetii atua intae oltung'ani lemesinya te nkaraki enataase te ninye kewarie, nchoo naa eipang ninye alo auluo, mejing'u ninye atua ilng'oborri;" 
Deuteronomy23:11 kake teneaku enteipa, neituku kewan te nkare, ore pee edoyio enkolong neidim ninye atijing'u atua ilng'oborri." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Ntobira ewueji tiauluo nepuoyieki ntonat," 
Deuteronomy23:13 tanapa sii enchata napi tenebo iyie; peyie tenilo atonie enkop, niturunye engumoto, nintoki anukaa nena kik inono." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Amu eloolo Olaitoriani Enkai ino te mpolos oo lng'oborri linyi, pee eitajeu intae neirragie ilmang'ati linyi te dukuya intae, metaa nchoo ilng'oborri linyi esinyayu pee medol ake ninye entoki suuji tiatua intae, neibelekenya aing'uaa intae." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Mincho ake olkitok ilo rrindik lenye apa oisika aing'uaa ninye nelotu enetii; 
Deuteronomy23:16 nchoo ninye eton tenebo iyie, tiatua intae, teine wueji negelu ninye tiatua nabo oo nkang'itie inyi, teine neitiship ninye oleng; nimimbooki ninye enkop." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Meetae olayioni le Israel olo aiborrie onyek tiatua enkaji Enkai, nemeetae entito e Israel nalo aiborrie onyek tiatua enkaji Enkai." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Miyau mpisai elaakinoto e mulayoi, anaa elaakinoto oldia atua enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai ino, alakie olmumai ake ninye pooki amu ore kuna pokira naa olminong to Laitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Misilenoki iyie te dupoto olalashe lino, te dupoto oo mpisai, aashu te dupoto e ndaa aashu te dupoto e pooki toki ake ninye." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Ore to ltung'ani leiking'a indim iyie aisilenoki te dupoto kake ore to lalashe lino misilenoki te dupoto; pee kitum Olaitoriani Enkai ino atamayiana teina pooki nilo aas teina kop niloito aya. 
Deuteronomy23:21 Teninos olmumai to Laitoriani Enkai ino, miyiata te laata, amu keikilikuanu tukul Olaitoriani Enkai ino te iyie, naa keaku eng'oki teyie." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Kake tenilam enkinosata o lmumai, nemeitoki aaku eng'oki te iyie." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Ing'ura pee intabaya ina naimua enkutuk ino, amu te yieuna ino inosie olmumai Olaitoriani Enkai ino teina nisiligishore te nkutuk ino." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Tenilo atua enkurma oo lng'anayio eilo tung'ani le latia ino, nindim ainosa ataraposhoyu ilng'anayio, ilooba anaa liyieu, kake mipik ake hoo obo olbene lino." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Tenilo iyie atua enkurma eilo tung'ani le latia ino, indim atigilu e ntapa te nkaina ino, kake midung te nkalem ina kurma oltung'ani le latia ino naitashe." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Teneya oltung'ani enkitok ayam, nelo neaku eitu etum omom too nkonyek enyena te nkaraki natoduaa ninye embae suuji te ninye, neigeroki ilo moruo ninye empalai eoro nepik enkaina enye, nearaa ninye aitung'uaa enkaji enye, nelo ina kitok te nkaji enye," 
Deuteronomy24:2 tenelo ninye aaku enkitok e likae moruo," 
Deuteronomy24:3 ore ilo likae nemenu ninye neigeroki empalai eoro nepik enkaina enye nearaa ninye te nkaji enye, tenelo neye ilo moruo le siadi apa oowa ninye aitaa enkitok enye," 
Deuteronomy24:4 ore ilo moruo apa le dukuya otaarayie ninye meshomo, nemeidim anyaaki aawa ninye ayama eidipaki aatipik olduruk. Amu olminong ilo te dukuya Olaitoriani, nemeishiakino teniyauu entorroni shumata ena kop naisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi entujung." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Ore enayamishore oltung'ani, nemeishiakino ninye nelo enjore aashu ae siai; nchoo ninye eton tiang olari obo, pee eshipa tenebo oina kitok enye nayama." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Meetae oltung'ani oen osoit oidong'ishoreki liabori aashu le shumata; amu keaku enkishui e teena. 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Teneibungi oltung'ani etupurroyie obo loo lalashera lenyena, lelo tung'ana le Israel, naa tenelo aiko ninye anaa orrindik aashu emir ninye, neari ilo apurroni metua; pee itum aiwuang'ie entorroni te mpolos inyi." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Ing'ura tenikijing enkeeya oo lbolot, toduaa pee, ias terisioroto e nena pooki nikiutaki lelo apolosak loo Lawi; anaa apa enaitanapa nanu ninche, ina taasa." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Tadamu ina apa naitaasa Olaitoriani Miriam ina kata te nkoitoi ipuonunu aaing'uaa Misiri. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Tenisilenoki olelatia ino entoki ake ninye e ae pukunoto, milo iyie enkaji enye aya entoki nalak esile." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Ntasho iyie tiaulou, ore ilo tung'ani lisilenoki, nikiyaki ninye entoki alak ina sile." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Naa tenaa oltung'ani aisinani, nimirrag iyie iata ina toki enye nalakie esile." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Tenedoyio enkolong nirrinyoki iyie ina toki enye nalakie esile, pee etum ninye airraga eeta olkila lenye nikimayian ninye iyie, naa keaku ina esupatisho te iyie te dukuya o Laitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Mimbooki enkop olaisiaayiani aisinani oigeroki aa obo loo lalashera linono aashu aa obo loo lomon ootii enkop inyi, atua nkang'itie inyi;" 
Deuteronomy24:15 nchoo ninye olmushaara lenye te nkolong naishiaakino, eton eitu edoyio enkolong amu oltung'ani aisinani ninye ina eisiliga oltau lenye; pee mikinchiraki ake to Laitoriani, neaku eng'oki te iyie." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Meari ilpayiani metuata te nkaraki nkera enye, nemeari nkera metuata te nkaraki iloo menye; oltung'ani ake neari metua te nkaraki eng'oki enye makewan." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Mimbelekeny esipata teilo tung'ani omoni, aashu teilo okishi aashu iya olkila le nkoliai te enata e sile;" 
Deuteronomy24:18 kake tadamu nchere ira apa iyie orrindik te Misiri nikikordu iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino ainyiang'u teine; metaa kaaitanap nanu iyie taasa ena. 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Teninturrur enkurma ino aisampu, nikirikino ilkuti ng'osil loo lukuny tiatua enkurma mirrinyo alo ayau; nchoo eaku oleilo tung'ani omoni, o lokishi, o enkoliai; pee kitum Olaitoriani Enkai ino atamayiana te siaai pooki oo nkaik inono." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Tenirrarru ilng'anayio linono, ming'il arrarru aishu; nchoo eaku ileilo tung'ani omoni, o lokishi, o enkoliai." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Tenisotu isabibu linono ming'il asotu nchoo eaku ileilo tung'ani omoni, o lokishi o enkoliai." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Tadamu nchere ira apa iyie orrindik tiatua enkop e Misiri; metaa kaaitanap nanu iyie taasa ena. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Teneishankarra iltung'ana, nepuonu kotini, nedung ilarishak enkiguana te ninche, nepali ilo asipani neiguanareki ilo arruoni," 
Deuteronomy25:2 tenelo neaku eoshoto naishiakino ilo tung'ani, neisho oladung'oni le nkiguana ilo tung'ani meirraga te nkop neari te dukuya ninye ioshot naairirikino enkitarruoroto enye." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Amu eidimi aishoo ninye ioshot artam kake meitulusi; amu tenelo likae tung'ani aponiki ninye ioshot naalang kuna, netemenayioki naa ilo alashe lino too nkonyek inono." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Mien olkiteng enkutuk eidong'ito entapa. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Tenetoni ilalashera tenebo, neye obo lenye meeta olayioni, ore ina kitok eilo otua, meyami teboo ilo marei oltung'ani leeiking'a; ore olalashe olmoruo lenye nchoo elo ayiolou, neya ninye aitaa enkitok enye, neitaas ninye enaishiakino neitaas enkitok olalashe lenye." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ore olayioni ong'as aiu neya enkarna eilo alashe lenye otua, pee meiwuang'ieki enkarna enye tiatua Israel." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Naa tenemeyieu ilo lee neyam enkitok o lalashe lenye, nelo ina kitok o lalashe lenye auluo enetii ilpayiani, nejoki, ‘Etanya olalashe lo lmoruo lai eun enkarna o lalashe lenye te Israel; meas ninye esiaai o lalashe lenye te nanu.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Ore lelo payiani leina anasa enye, neipotu ninye, neirorie ninye: naa teneuno, ejo, ‘Mayieu nanu naya ninye’," 
Deuteronomy25:9 nelo naa ina kitok o lalashe lenye enetii ninye teine netii lelo payiani, neitayu enamuke enye te nkeju enye, nenotaki enkomom enye; newaliki ajoki, ‘Ena emookini aaitaas olee le meshet enkaji o lalashe lenye.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Ore enkarna enkaji enye kemookini aajo te Israel, enkaji e ilo oitayioki enamuke te nkeju enye." 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Teneara ilewa maate, nelotu enkitok e obo amitu olmoruo teilo oarita ninye, neitorioo enkaina enye aibung elewaisho," 
Deuteronomy25:12 tudung'oi enkaina enye; ming'urrie ninye. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Mipik olbene lino mpukunot are oo soito ootemieki enkiroishi, o sapuk o enkiti." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Mipik enkaji ino mpukunot are e ntemeta enalala o enkiti. 
Deuteronomy25:15 Entemet nabore nesipa ninye taasishore naa entemet nalulung'a ninye taasishore; pee etum nkolong'i inono aatoponari teina kop nikincho Olaitoriani Enkai ino. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Amu ore lelo pooki oas mbaa naijo kuna, lelo pooki oasisho te lejare naa entoki olminong to Laitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Tadamu ina apa nikintaasa Amaleki te nkoitoi, ina kata ipuonunu aaing'uaa Misiri," 
Deuteronomy25:18 ina kata apa pee kirasaki te nkoitoi inaure nitashala, nedung'oo to lkidong'oe linyi lelo pooki apa ooyietunye te siadi intae; neitu ninye eureyu Enkai." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Metaa tenikincho Olaitoriani Enkai ino enkiyeng'iyeng too lmang'ati linono pooki likimanita, tiatua ina kop nikincho iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino metaa enjung'ore ino niya; nilo aiwuang'ie Amaleki tioriong enkop; mincho ake kirikino." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Tenilotu akenya ina kop nikincho Olaitoriani Enkai ino tujung'o niya iyie ina kop, nimany," 
Deuteronomy26:2 iwa embata e lelo ng'anayio le dukuya le nkop, lelo lisampua teina kop nikinchoo iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino, nipik iyie ninche enkikapu, nilo iyie ine wueji negelu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, pee eitamany enkarna enye ine." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Nilo iyie enetii ilo apolosani oasisho teina kata, nijoki ninye, ‘Aibalie nanu ena olong to Laitoriani nchere, atabaua atua ina kop apa nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai too loo papa pee eisho iyiook.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Neya olapolosani enkikapu too nkaik inono neirragie te dukuya olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ino. 
Deuteronomy26:5 “Niwalu iyie te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ajo ‘Oltung'ani le Aramea alotoni apa papa, nedoyio ninye alo Misiri nebik teine, naa eikuti apa ninche, nebul teine neaku olosho, ogol, magilani naakitok." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Neisorutuo apa iyiook iltung'ana le Misiri, neisomit iyiook, neiteleiki shumata iyiook rrindikisho nagol." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Nikinchiraki iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo papa nening Olaitoriani oltoilo lang, nedol enkitamioto ang, o eyekenyata ang, o enkitorogonyata ang;" 
Deuteronomy26:8 eyaua iyiook Olaitoriani aitupuku te Misiri te nkaina magilani o te nkaina naitoriori, o te nkiputukuny kitok o too nkitoduaat o mbaa enking'asia" 
Deuteronomy26:9 neyau ninye iyiook atua ene wueji neisho iyiook ena kop, enkop naruko naishi o kule." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Naa ng'ura, ayaua taata nanu ilng'anayio le dukuya lena kop, naa iyie Olaitoriani likinchoo nanu.’ Niragie te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino; niserem te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino;" 
Deuteronomy26:11 ning'idayu iyie te nena pooki supati nikinchoo iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino o lmarei lino, iyie o Lawi o ilo tung'ani omoni otii atua intae." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Ore tenindip aitayu e matua pooki e tomon oo nkishorunot inono enkisampuare to lari liokuni, aa ninye olari oitayunyeki e matua e tomon eishori Olawi, o lomoni, o lokishi, o enkoliai pee etum ninche aainosa tiatua nkang'itie inyi neraposho," 
Deuteronomy26:13 nitum taa atejo te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ‘Aiwuang'ie nanu ina rubata nasinya tiatua enkaji ai, naidipa aishoo Olawi, o Lomoni, o Lokishi o enkoliai, te risioroto eina kitanapata pooki nikintanapa iyie nanu; eitu nanu agil nabo oo nkitanapat inono neitu aarikino nabo;" 
Deuteronomy26:14 eitu nanu ainos ae nabo e matua e tomon ina kata aishirita to sina; aashu aiwuang'ie nabo enye ina kata aata olminong, aashu aisho ae nabo ilootuata; atoning'o nanu oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkaiai, ataasa nanu te risioroto e nena pooki nikintanapa nanu." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Ng'ura itii emanyisho ino sinyati, itii shumata, nimayian iltung'ana linono Israel oena kop ninchoo iyie iyiook, anaa apa eninosie olmumai too loo papa, enkop naruko naishi o kule.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Ore ena olong kintanapa iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino pee ias kuna kitanapat o nkikoot; toduaa naa pee ias ninche to ltau lino pooki o te nkishui ino pooki. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Ndipa iyie aibalunye ena olong tialo Olaitoriani nchere ninye Enkai ino, naa ilo iyie too nkoitoi enyena, o nkitanapat enyena, o nkikoot enyena naa eilo aning oltoilo lenye;" 
Deuteronomy26:18 neibalunye Olaitoriani ena olong tialo iyie nchere ira olorere lenye makewan, anaa apa enaisiligie intae, naa imbung'ubung'u intae nkitanapat enyena," 
Deuteronomy26:19 pee etum ninye ailepie intae te shumata lelo oshon pooki ooitobira, te nkisisa, o to lning'o o te nkanyit naa iakuku sii olorere osinya to Laitoriani Enkai inyi anaa enairoro ninye.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Ore Musa o lpayiani le Israel neitanap olorere ejo, “Embung'a kuna kitanapat pooki naitanap nanu intae ena olong," 
Deuteronomy27:2 naa ore akenya ina olong nilang'ilang'a olkeju le Yordan aapuo ina kop naisho Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, intae, nintasheyieyie isoito sapuki nimurumuru ninche te nturoto;" 
Deuteronomy27:3 ninger te shumata ninche lelo rorei lena kitanapata, tenindip atalang'a ashomo ina kop, nikincho iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ina kop naruko naishi o kule, anaa apa enaisiligie intae Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Naa ore ake pee indipidipi aatalang olkeju le Yordan, nintasheyieyie kulo soito laa ninche nanu aitanapa intae ena olong te nchumata oldoinyo le Ebal, nimurumuru ninche te nturoto." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Ore teine nishetu olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ino, olperere lo lasar loo soito, neminteleiki ninche esekenkei." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Nishetu olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ino too soito le megueta; ninchooyo olasar opejori te nchumata enye, aitaiki Olaitoriani Enkai ino;" 
Deuteronomy27:7 nipolos olasar le seriani, ninos iyie teine, ning'ida te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Ninger te nchumata e lelo soito lelo rorei pooki lena kitanapata meibalata.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Nejoki Musa o lelo apolosak le Lawi Israel pooki, “Entigirata entoning, intae Israel: ore ena Olong itaa intae olorere lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Toning'o naa oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ino, mbung'a kuna kitanapat enyena o nkiguanat enyena naaitanapa nanu iyie ena olong.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 neitoki Musa airorie ilo orere ina olong ake, ejo," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Tenindipidipi aatalang olkeju le Yordan nchoo kulo eitashe to ldoinyo le Gerisim, pee emayian olorere. Simion, o Lawi, o Yuda, o Isaakar, o Yosef, o Benchamen." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Naa nchoo kulo eitashe te nchumata oldoinyo le Ebal teina siai: Ruben, o Gad, o Asheri, o Sebulon, o Dan, o Naftali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Neibalunye Ilawi too ltung'ana pooki le Israel to ltoilo sapuk aajo. 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Etediaki iltung'ana ooitobiru enkitanyaanyukoto nagueta aashu enamuruni, olminong to Laitoriani, entoki naaitobiruni too nkaik o ltung'ani arriyia, neirragieki aaisudoo.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo, ‘Esai.’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Etediaki ilo lemeyanyit menye aashu ng'otonye.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo, ‘Esai.’" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Etediaki ilo oiwuang'ie olpolosie leilo le latia enye.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo ‘Esai.’ 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Etediaki ilo oitapong'oo oltung'ani modooni te nkoitoi.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo, ‘Esai.’" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Etediaki ilo oibelekeny esipata tialo oltung'ani omoni, o lokishi, o enkoliai.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo, ‘Esai.’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Etediaki ilo oboitare enkitok e menye enkaraki eiwuang'ie ninye ilkilani leina nara ene papaai lenye.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo, ‘Esai.’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Etediaki olololoitore empukunoto ake ninye eng'ues.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo ‘Esai.’ 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Etediaki ilo oboitare enkanashe enye, aa entito e menye aashu enang'arie kina.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo, ‘Esai.’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Etediaki ilo oboitare enkaputani.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo ‘Esai.’ 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Etediaki ilo oar metua olelatia enye.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo ‘Esai.’ 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Etediaki ilo oropi metaara metua oltung'ani lemeeta entioto.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo ‘Esai.’ 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Etediaki ilo le meitabaya irorei lena kitanapata aas ninche.’ Newal iltung'ana pooki aajo ‘Esai.’ 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Naa tenining iyie oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ino, aing'or pee ias nena kitanapat pooki naaitanapa nanu iyie ena olong, nikilepie ninye iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino aitulusoo tenining iyie too loreren pooki le nkop." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Ore kuna mayianat pooki naa kepuonu shumata iyie, nedooyo tenining oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai." 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Eikimayian iyie tiatua enkanasa, nikimayiani iyie tiong'ata." 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Kemayiani ilng'anayio lo sesen lino, o lng'anayio le nkop ino, o lng'anayio loo nkishu inono, oina ponunoto oo nkerrai inyi." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Kemayiani olbene lino oina tapa ino naipurjaki. 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Eikimayiani iyie ijing'u o impang auluo. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Keisho Olaitoriani lelo mang'ati linono likidumakino, iyie metimirari ninche te dukuya iyie; eikipuonu ninche aadumakino eimu enkoitoi nabo neisik te dukuya iyie eim, nkoitoi naapishana." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Keirriu Olaitoriani imayianat shumata ino tiatua ilchumat linono o leina pooki nias iyie; nikimayian iyie teina kop nikincho Olaitoriani Enkai ino. 
Deuteronomy28:9 Keitubul intae Olaitoriani pee iakuku iltung'ana sinyat te nkaraki kewan enye, anaa apa enainosa olmumai te intae, tenimbung'ubung'u nkitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai inyi, nipuopuo too nkoitoi enyena." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Ore iltung'ana le nkop pooki nedol nchere eipotoki intae te nkarna o Laitoriani; naa keureyu ninche intae. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Naa eikincho iyie Olaitoriani tudupoyu te karsisisho o too lng'anayio lo sesen lino o too lng'anayio loo nkishu inono, o too lng'anayio le nkop ino tiatua ina kop nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai too loo papaai lino pee kincho iyie." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Eikiboloki iyie Olaitoriani olchumati lenye le shumata, pee eishoru enchan tenkop ino too rishat enyena, nemayian esiai oo nkaik inono; neaku isilenoki iyie nkuapi kumok kake misilenu iyie." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Naa eikintaa iyie Olaitoriani endukuya, mme olkidong'oe, naa eilepu ake alotu shumata, nimidoyio; tenimbung nena kitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai ino, naaitanap nanu iyie ena olong, ing'ura pee ias ninche," 
Deuteronomy28:14 nimimbelekenya tiobo le kulo rorei laaitanap nanu iyie ena olong, alo enkalo e tatene aashu ene kedienye, alo asujaa kulie aitin aisiaai ninche." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Kake tenimining iyie oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ino aashu teniming'or pee ias nkitanapat enyena pooki o nkikoot enyena naaitanap nanu iyie ena olong, ore kulo deketa pooki nepuonu shumata iyie." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Kideki iyie te nkanasa nikideki tiong'ata. 
Deuteronomy28:17 Etediaki enkikapu ino netediaki ina toki ino naipurjishoreki," 
Deuteronomy28:18 Etediaki ilng'anayio lo sesen lino o lng'anayio le nkop ino, oina ponaroto oo nkishu inono, o lelelo loo ntare inono." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Kitediaki iyie tenijing'u, nikitediaki tenimpung." 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Kepik Olaitoriani shumata iyie ildeketa, o lmilo, osina tenena pooki nilo iyie aas, ometaba anaa nikindaikieki nindaaya asioki, te nkaraki entorroni oo nkiaasin inono, enkaraki nikitung'uayie iyie nanu." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Keisho Olaitoriani olmeitai mikindikidikore ometaba anaa nikimut aishu teina kop niloito aya. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Eikiosh iyie Olaitoriani te njipai o lgoo, o to lkirobi o te ng'ion o te nkiyupuyup enkima o to lameyu, o too oshot o too mpaldakani, nikisuj iyie kulo meita, o metaba anaa nindaaya." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ore te keper te shumata endukuya ino neaku osuyai ore enkop tiabori iyie neaku esekenkei. 
Deuteronomy28:24 Keitaa Olaitoriani enchan eina kop ino empunyua o enterit, nikidoiki iyie te shumata ometaba anaa nikindaikieki." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Eikincho iyie Olaitoriani mikitimira ilmang'ati linono, nimimpang iyie alo aim enkoitoi nabo alo aarare ninche, nisikisiki aaim nkoitoi naapishana te dukuya ninche; naa ipuopuo intae aaku entaboi e nking'asia too nkitoriat pooki enkop." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Ore mpopong'i inyi neaku endaa too ntaritik oloing'ang'e o too lowuarak lentim; nemeitokini aata hoo obo oiture ninche meshomo. 
Deuteronomy28:27 Eikiosh iyie Olaitoriani too ltuduta le Misiri oo too mpaldakani o too lpepedo o te ng'ion nemeishiunoyu. 
Deuteronomy28:28 Eikiosh iyie Olaitoriani to loirirua o te modoki o te miloi oo ndamunot; 
Deuteronomy28:29 naa ilo iyie irrapirrapisho dama, anaa enairrapirrapisho oltung'ani modooni te naimin, nimidupoyu iyie too nkoitoi inono; naa keaku eikintorogonyi nikipurri anaake, nemetumi hoo obo likiretu iyie." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Isai iyie enkitok, nelotu likae lee ayiolou; nishetu enkaji kake mimany, niun enkurma oo sabibu kake minos isabibu lenye." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Keyieng'i olkiteng lino te dukuya inkonyek inono, niminos iyie nkiri enyena; ore osikiria neisimari aaya te dukuya enkomom ino, nimikirrinyokini iyie; ore nkerra inono neishori ilmang'ati linono, nemetii hoo obo likiretu iyie." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Ore ilayiok linono o ntoyie inono naa keishori likae orere, eing'orita nkonyek inono, omeiliilai eyieu ninche endama pooki; nemetii engolon enkaina ino pee eibooyo ina." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Ilo osho limiyiolo iyie olotu ainos lelo ng'anayio le nkop ino o le siaai ino pooki, naa iaku ake oloibookini enkop o loinyali anaake," 
Deuteronomy28:34 ometaba anaa nikijing oloirirua teina nadol nkonyek inono. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Eikiosh Olaitoriani nkung o lorroki too ltuduta torrok lemikindimi aaishiunye, ebaiki endap enkeju ino ometabaiki enerang'irang te ndukuya ino." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Eikiyaki iyie Olaitoriani, oilo aiguanani litipika shumata ino ilo osho leitu aekata iyiolou neitu eyiolou loo papaai linyi, ore teine nisiai kulie aitin oo nkeek o noo soito." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Naa ilo iyie aaku entoki naimakini, endung'et e rashe, o entoki naimakini tiatua iloreren pooki teine nereu intae Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Iya iyie ilanterera kumok aun te nkurma, naa ilkuti ake ilo aisampu tiatua; amu kelotu olmaati nemut ninche." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Iun iyie nkurman oo sabibu nintobir ninche, kake miok iyie enaisho enye, niminturrur ilng'anayio amu kelo ainos olkurto tiatua enkop inyi pooki." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Ilo iyie atum iloirienito tiatua enkop ino pooki, kake miyelare eilata enye, amu kerrarrunye ilng'anayio lenye." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Iiu iyie ilayiok o ntoyie, kake meaku ninche nkuninono, amu keyae ninche aaraya." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Ore ilkeek linono pooki o lng'anayio le nkop ino naa keaku ilo lmaati. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Ore ilo tung'ani omoni otii atua intae naa keilepieki meeu shumata iyie oleng nidou iyie alotu abori oleng. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Eikisilenoki ninye kake misilenoki iyie ninye; keaku ninye endukuya niaku iyie olkidong'oe. 
Deuteronomy28:45 Ore kulo deketa pooki naa kepuonu shumata iyie nikisuj nikigiroo iyie, ometaba anaa nikindaikieki, enkaraki neitu ining oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ino, aibung nkitanapat enyena, o nkikoot enyena apa nikintanapa ninye iyie." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Kepuonu ninche shumata iyie anaa enkitoduaata o enking'asia, o shumata eishoi ino ntarasi." 
Deuteronomy28:47 “Ore enkaraki neitu iyie isiai Olaitoriani Enkai ino te ng'ida o te nchipai o ltau lino, te nkaraki enkumoi oo masaa," 
Deuteronomy28:48 ore naa ilo iyie aisiaai lelo mang'ati linono likirriwaki Olaitoriani mikietu aar, te sumash o te nkure, te masipaisho o te yieunoto oo ntokitin pooki; naa kepik ninye enapet e sekenkei emurt ino ometaba anaa nikindaikie ninye." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Eikirriwaki iyie Olaitoriani olosho likilotu aarare eing'uaa enelakua, eing'uaa eneiting'ie enkop, olosho oneneng anaa olmotonyi olo ti ai, ilo osho limiyiolo iyie enkutuk enye." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Olosho ogogong le meshilaa likae tung'ani moruo nemeing'urrie oloti," 
Deuteronomy28:51 naa kepuo aainos ilasho loo nkishu inono o lng'anayio le nkop ino, ometaba anaa nikindaikieki ilo osho sii limikilekaki iyie entapa aashu enaisho oo sabibu aashu eilata aashu emponaroto oo nkishu inono aashu ilkuoo loo ntare inono ometaba anaa nikindaikie ninche." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Eikimuat ninche aaman too nkang'itie inono pooki, ometaba anaa neurori nena sunta inono adoru naagol apa nisiliga tiatua enkop ino pooki, nikimuat ninche aaman too nkang'itie inono pooki, tiatua enkop ino pooki apa nikinchoo Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Naa ilo iyie ainos eishoi o sesen lino makewan, nkiri oo layiok linono o ntoyie, nena nikinchoo Olaitoriani Enkai ino, teina nikimani aamuat, o to sina likipik ilmang'ati linono." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Ore ilo lee bioto oitubuluaki te supatisho te ntae keroku oshoke tialo olalashe lenye, o te nkitok enye o teilo pisiai otelekua loo nkera enyena;" 
Deuteronomy28:55 ometaa meisho ninye nabo nena kiri oo nkera enyena naainosita ninye, amu meetae entoki natelekakaki ninye, teina namani aamuat o teilo sina oisomit intae ilmang'ati linyi tiatua nkang'itie inono pooki." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Ore ina kitok bioto neitubuluaki te supatisho, neitu aekata eroro enkop eji amu eisikarre negogong'u ninye tialo olmoruo lenye, o te nkayioni enye o te ntito enye." 
Deuteronomy28:57 Ore ina mudong naimua erishata oo nkejek enyena, o nkera enyena naatoiwuo ninye, neisudoo pee errinyokino ainos, amu kaa naa easi teina namani aamuat enkang o to sina likisomit iyie ilmang'ati linono too nkang'itie inono." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Teniming'or iyie pee ias kulo rorei pooki lena kitanapata ooigero tena buku pee itum aturia ena arna kitok naitureisho, o Laitoriani Enkai ino," 
Deuteronomy28:59 nikirriwaki iyie Olaitoriani o eishoi ino ilmeita le nking'asia, ilmeita torrok oobik, o emuoyian torrono nabik." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Naa eikintoki ninye airriwaki iyie imuoyiaritin pooki e Misiri, nena apa niure; naa eikisuj ninche." 
Deuteronomy28:61 O pooki muoyian sii o pooki meitai le meigero tena buku oo nkitanapat, eikirriwaki iyie Olaitoriani ometaba anaa nindaaya." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Ore hoo nibaba apa anaa osinyai le naiposha te nkumoi iakuku kuti; enkaraki neitu ining'ining'i oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Deuteronomy28:63 Naa ore apa anaa enikitonyorra Olaitoriani aitaas esidai nikintubul neijia eiko Olaitoriani eyau enkidaaroto o mutai shumata iyie; nikiwuang'ieki iyie teina kop nijing'ita alo aya. 
Deuteronomy28:64 Neidapash intae Olaitoriani tiatua iloreren pooki ebaiki eluboto nabo enkop ometabaiki enkae. Ore teine nilo aisiaai kulie aitin, oo nkeek o noo soito apa neitu aekata iyiolou neitu eyiolou loo papaai linyi." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Ore tiatua lelo oshon nimitum enkiyagata nimitum eneitasheyie nkejek inono, kake eikilo iyie aisho Olaitoriani teine oltau oikirikira, o nkonyek naailiilaa, o ltau olepori." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Neisiong'a enkishui ino te dukuya iyie ore dama o kewarie iaku ole batisho nimiata osiligi le nkishui, nemeidim aitadedeyie osiligi le nkishui ino." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ore te dukuya tadekenya nijo iyie, ‘Oi naaji tenaa teipa!’ Ore teipa nijo iyie, ‘Oi naaji tenaa tadekenya’ te nkaraki ina batisho naure oltau lino, o nena baa naadol nkonyek inono." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Naa eikirrinyu iyie Olaitoriani too melin ayau Misiri, elototo naisiligishoreki nchere ming'il aekata alo; ore teine ninyoraa aaishooyo ate meinyang'ai intae ilmang'ati linyi anaa rrindiki lewa o ng'oruo, kake meetae oltung'ani oinyang'u intae.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Kulo ninche irorei leilo ning'o lo sotua oitanapa Olaitoriani Musa pee eitobir oltung'ana le Israel te nkop e Moab, tenebo ilo ning'o lo sotua apa oitobira ninye tenebo ninche te nkop e Horeb." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Neipotu Musa iltung'ana pooki le Israel nejoki ninche, “Itoduaa intae ina pooki nataasa Olaitoriani too nkonyek inyi te nkop e Misiri, ina naitaasa Farao o sinkan lenyena pooki o enkop enye pooki," 
Deuteronomy29:3 nena temat sapuki nitoduaa too nkonyek inyi, nena kitoduaat o nena baa sapuki enking'asia;" 
Deuteronomy29:4 kake ore ebaiki ena olong eitu eisho intae Olaitoriani eng'eno niyiolounyenye, aashu nkonyek nidolielie aashu nkiyiaa nining'ieng'ie." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Atorikoyie nanu intae ilarin artam tiong'ata neitu emuta ilkilani linyi linchopitoto neitu emutari inamuka too nkejek inyi," 
Deuteronomy29:6 eitu intae inosinoso imukateni neitu intae iokioko enaisho aashu enaitemerisho; pee itumutumu aatayiolo nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Deuteronomy29:7 Ore apa pee ipuonunu intae ene wueji, neetuo aarare intae, Shilo olaiguanani le Heshbon o Oog ilo aiguanani le Bashan, kake kitimira iyiook ninche;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 nikiya iyiook enkop enye, nikincho metaa enjung'ore too ltung'ana le Reuben, o le Gad, o lpisiai loo ltung'ana le Manase." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Metaa eng'ura naa pee imbung'ubung'u irorei lele ning'o lo sotua, pee itumutumu aatubul te nena pooki niasiasa." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Ntasheshe taata intae ena olong te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, ilkituaak loo loshon linyi, o lpayiani linyi, o larikok linyi, o lewa pooki le Israel," 
Deuteronomy29:11 o nkera inyi, o nkituaak inyi, o lomon ootii atua ilng'oborri linyi, oilo obarn ilpapit loo nkerra o ilo likiokoki enkare," 
Deuteronomy29:12 pee itum atijing'a ilo ning'o le nkinosata o lmumai lo Laitoriani Enkai ino, oitobir Olaitoriani Enkai ino tenebo iyie ena olong;" 
Deuteronomy29:13 pee etum ninye aitubula intae ena olong anaa iltung'ana lenyena, pee etum sii ninye ataa Enkai inyi, anaa apa enaisiligie intae, anaa sii apa enainosa ninye olmumai too loo papaai linyi, te Abraham, o te Isaak o te Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Neme te intae ake aitobir ele ning'o lo lmumai," 
Deuteronomy29:15 kake tenebo sii ilo lemetii ene tenebo iyiook ena olong tenebo ilo oitashe tenebo iyiook ena olong te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ang. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Iyiololo apa intae kimanya enkop e Misiri, oina kata kipuonu aaimu empolos e lelo oshon apa likitopolosutua;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 nitoduaa intae nena tokitin enye naaitagorisho, nena kitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin nkeek o noo soito, o nenkosholai o ne sahabu, apa naatii atua ninche." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Entodol naa melo ake oltung'ani tiatua intae, olee aashu enkitok aashu olmarei aashu olosho, oibelekeny oltau lenye ena olong aing'uaa Olaitoriani Enkai ang alo aisiaai nkaitin e kulo oshon; mejing ake atua intae entonai naata esayiet o lng'anayio losotua oodua." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ilo tung'ani laa tenening kulo rorei lele ning'o lo lmumai, nemayian kewan to ltau, ejo, ‘Kaserianu nanu hoo tenaa kalo te ngolon oltau lai.’ Ore ena naa keidim ataa keyau enkidaata e ntoki nashal o enatoyio." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Mepalaki ninye Olaitoriani, kake ore engoro o Laitoriani o lom lenye naa keidim atupuru teilo tung'ani, ore ildeketa ooigero tiatua ena buku netonie ninye, neiwuang'ie Olaitoriani enkarna enye tiabori keper." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Nekepu Olaitoriani ninye tiatua iloshon pooki le Israel te ntorroni, te risioroto oo ldeketa pooki lele ning'o lo sotua ooigero tiatua ena buku oo nkitanapat." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Ore too ishoritin naapuonu, ore nkera inyi naabulu te siadi intae, o ltung'ani olotu eing'uaa enkop nalakua, nejo, ina kata tenedol ioshot eina kop, o nena muoyiaritin naaitamuoyia Olaitoriani" 
Deuteronomy29:23 ina kop pooki naitaa Olaitoriani enkima o emunyan, o enkop natumuta enkima nemeunishoreki nemebulaki toki; ina kop nemebulaki nkujit, ewueji netaaraki aaiko anaa Sodom o Gomora, o Adam, o Seboim, nena apa naatanang'ayie Olaitoriani te ngoro enye napi." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Ee keyooki iloshon pooki aajo, ‘Kainyoo pee eitaas Olaitoriani ena kop nji. Kainyoo eutu ena kirouaj e ngoro enye kitok?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Neitoki iltung'ana aajo, ‘Enkaraki natung'uaitie ninche olning'o lo sotua lo Laitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye, apa oitobira ninye tenebo ninche ina kata apa pee eitupuku ninche te nkop e Misiri," 
Deuteronomy29:26 nepuo ninche aaisiai kulie aitin neserem ninche, nkaitin apa neitu eyiolou ninche neitu egelaki Olaitoriani ninche;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 neaku einuakaki engoro o Laitoriani tenkaraki ena kop, neyau shumata ninye ildeketa pooki ooigero tena buku;" 
Deuteronomy29:28 nedotu Olaitoriani ninche aitung'uaa enkop enye te ngoro o te mpijan o te ngoro sapuk, nenang'aki ninche atua ae kop, anaa enatiu ena olong.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Ore nena tokitin naaisudoro naa ino Laitoriani Enkai ang; kake ore nena naaibalunyeki naa nkunaang o noo nkera ang ntarasi, pee kitum aataas irorei pooki lena kitanapata." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Naa tenepuonu kuna tokitin pooki shumata iyie, emayianata o ldeket, kuna nairragie nanu te dukuya iyie nidamu iyie ninche tiatua lelo oshon likiterewa Olaitoriani Enkai ino," 
Deuteronomy30:2 nirrinyokino Olaitoriani Enkai ino, iyie o nkera inono, nining oltoilo lenye te kuna pooki naaitanap nanu iyie ena olong, to ltau lino pooki o te nkishui ino, iyie o nkera inono, nining oltoilo lenye te kuna pooki naaitanap nanu iyie ena olong, to ltau lino pooki o te nkishui ino pooki," 
Deuteronomy30:3 nikitum naa Olaitoriani Enkai ino aing'urrie iyie, niking'il aiturrur iyie aitung'uaa lelo oreren pooki apa likindapashaka Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Tenaa duoo ninye shumata keper oleng apa kindapashakaki naa teine kirrinyu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, naa teine king'amu ninye iyie;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 nikiyau iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino atua ina kop apa oo loo papaai linyi, pee itum aitaa enino; nikintubul ninye iyie niakuku kumok aalang iloo papaai linyi." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Nemurat Olaitoriani Enkai ino oltau lino o ltau le ishoi ino, pee itum atonyorra Olaitoriani Enkai ino to ltau lino pooki o te nkishui ino pooki; pee itum atopuaa." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Nepik Olaitoriani Enkai ino kulo deketa pooki shumata ilmang'ati linono o lelo apa likisilisilo. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Ning'il iyie aning irorei lo Laitoriani nimbung nena kitanapat enyena pooki naaitanap nanu iyie ena olong. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Eikincho iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino tubula oleng, te siaai oo nkaik inono, o too lng'anayio lo sesen lino, o too lng'anayio loo nkishu inono, o too lng'anayio le nkop ino; amu keitoki Olaitoriani ashipakino pee kintubul iyie, anaa apa enatishipakine loo papaai lino." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Tenining iyie oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ino, aibung nkitanapat enyena o nkikoot enyena naaigero tena buku oo nkitanapat, tenirrinyokino iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino to ltau lino pooki o te nkishui ino pooki." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Amu ore ena kitanapata naitanap nanu intae ena olong megol oleng te intae, nemelakua." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Mme shumata etii, metaa ijo, ‘Kalo ailep alo shumata te nkaraki iyiook, pee eyaki iyiook, pee kitum iyiook aatoning nikiaas." 
Deuteronomy30:13 Neme lido kekun le naiposha etii, metaa ijo iyie, kalo olo alang enaiposha te nkaraki iyiook, pee elo ayaki iyiook, pee kitum aatoning nikiaas?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Kake eikitaaniki iyie ele rorei oleng; enkutuk ino etii o atua oltau lino, pee itum ataasa." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Ng'ura airragie nanu ena olong te dukuya iyie puaan o mbaa sidain, keeya o entorroni." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Tenining iyie kuna kitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai ino naaitanap nanu ena olong, anyorru Olaitoriani Enkai ino, alo too nkoitoi enyena, nimbung nkitanapat enyena o nkikoot o nkiguanat nitum taa atopuaa nibul, nikimayian Olaitoriani Enkai ino tiatua ina kop nijing'ita alo aya." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Kake teneibelekenya oltau lino niany ining, nikiyae shomo teserema kulie aitin nisiaai ninche," 
Deuteronomy30:18 kaaibalakinye nanu iyie ena olong nchere, ilo aidaaya; milo abik tiatua ina kop nilang'aki to lkeju le Yordan alo aya." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Kaipotu nanu keper o enkop nikinchakenoki iyie ena olong, nchere airragie nanu te dukuya iyie puaan o keeya, emayianata o ldeket, ore naa tegelu puaan, pee itum iyie o eishoi ino atobikoi," 
Deuteronomy30:20 ninyorru Olaitoriani Enkai ino, nining oltoilo lenye, nisuj ninye; amu enkishui ina te iyie o emponaroto oo nkolong'i, pee itum atobiko tiatua ina kop apa nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai too loo papaai linyi, te Abraham, o te Isaak, o te Yakobo pee eisho ninche.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Nelo Musa dukuya airorie Israel pooki kulo rorei," 
Deuteronomy31:2 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Ara taata nanu oloo larin iip o tikitam ena olong; meekure aidim aipang'a arashu atijing'u. Aatiaka nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Milo iyie alang ele keju le Yordan.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Olaitoriani Enkai ino makewan likilo arikoo; kelo ninye aidaikie kulo oshon ootii dukuya iyie pee itum aiwuang'ie ninche, nelo Yoshua arikoo intae te dukuya, anaa enatejo Olaitoriani." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Naa keitaas Olaitoriani ninche anaa enaitaasa Sihon o Oog, lelo aiguanak le Amori, o enkop enye, ina kata apa pee eidaikie ninche." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Naa keishoru Olaitoriani ninche aisho intae, nipuopuo intae aaitaas ninche te risioroto ena kitanapata pooki naitanap nanu intae." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Entagoluoto nintagololo oishuaa, miureishoyuyu nimimputukunyunyu te nkaraki ninche, amu Olaitoriani Enkai ino ilo olo te dukuya iyie; mikintiak ninye nimiking'uaa.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Neipotu Musa Yoshua, nejoki ninye te dukuya Israel pooki, “Tonyua nintagol oshoke; amu ilo iyie o ele orere atua ina kop apa nainosie Olaitoriani olmumai too loo menye pee eisho ninche; naa iyie olo aisho ninche." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Olaitoriani ninye olo te dukuya iyie; keaku ninye tenebo iyie; mikintiak ninye aashu king'uaa; miureishoyu nimishalu.” 
Deuteronomy31:9 Neiger Musa ena kitanapata neisho ilapolosak lelo ayiok le Lawi, apa ootanapa osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani, o lpayiani pooki le Israel." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Neitanapa Musa ninche ejo, “Ore ake te nkiting'oto e pooki arin oopishana, teina kata nategeluaki pee epalakinoi isilen, to sirua loo lng'oborri," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ina kata epuonu Israel pooki aalioyu te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ino, teine wueji negelu ninye, nilo aisum ena kitanapata te dukuya Israel pooki metoning'o." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Nturrurro iltung'ana ilewa o nkituaak o elelero, oilo tung'ani omoni otii atua nkang'itie inyi, pee etum ninche aatayiolo neureyu Olaitoriani Enkai, neing'or pee eas lelo rorei pooki loo nkitanapat," 
Deuteronomy31:13 paa ore nena kera enye nemeyiolo ena kitanapata, netum aatoning, neyiolou aatureita Olaitoriani Enkai, te nkata naba anaa eninchu teina kop nilo alang'aki te lido kekun le Yordan alo aya.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ng'ura etupunyutua nkolong'i pee iye iyie; mpotu Yoshua, nipuonunu atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo, pee atum aitanapa ninye.”" 
Deuteronomy31:15 Nelo Musa o Yoshua atua ilo ng'obor le ng'ape e nkatampoi, ore ina ng'ape e nkatampoi neitashe te mbata e kutukaji eilo ng'obor." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa, “Ng'ura etataana enkata niye iyie, nirura tenebo iloo papaai linyi; naa kedumunye ele orere te nkibor oo nkonyek nesuj kulie aitin ng'ejuko ena kop napuo ninche aashulare ninche, naa kaapuo ninche aaing'uaa nanu negil ilo ning'o lai lo sotua apa laitobira o ninche." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Netum taa engoro ai ayupuyupo tialo ninche teina olong, naing'uaa nanu ninche naisudoo enkomom ai teine, nemuti ninche; nepuonu ntorrok kumok o nyamalitin shumata ninche, ometaa kejo ninche teina olong, ‘Aimeetuo kuna torrok shumata iyiook enkaraki nemetii Enkai ang atua iyiook?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Naa kaisudoo nanu enkomom ai katukul ina olong te nkaraki ina torroni nataasa ninche, amu eibelekenyakinote ninche kulie aitin." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Ore naa taata ngero ele sinkolio, ninteng'en ninye iltung'ana le Israel; tipika ninye atua nkutukie enye, pee etum ele sinkolio ataa shakeni te nanu tialo iltung'ana le Israel." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Amu ore aidipa nanu ayau ninche atua ina kop naruko naishi o kule, apa nainosie olmumai pee aisho loo menye, netadaate ninche neraposho nepiru, naa keibelekenyakino ninche kulie aitin neisiaai ninche, naamenaa ninche nanu negil olning'o lai." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Naa tenelo akenya nepuonu ntorrok kumok o nyamalitin shumata ninche, nerany ninche ele sinkolio metaa shakeni (amu merikinisho ilo sinkolio too nkutukie oo nkera enye); amu ayiolo nanu nena kipirakinot naaitobirita ninche, apa eton eitu ayau ninche atua ina kop apa nainosie olmumai pee aisho ninche.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Neaku eigero apa Musa ilo sinkolio ina olong ake, neiteng'en ninye iltung'ana le Israel." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Neitanap Olaitoriani Yoshua olayioni le Nuni nejoki, “Tonyuaa nintagol oshoke; amu eilo iyie ayau nkera e Israel atua ina kop apa nainosie olmumai pee aisho ninche. Kaaku nanu tenebo iyie.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Ore ake pee eidip Musa aigero irorei lena kitanapata tiatua embuku, omeitabaiki enkiting'oto," 
Deuteronomy31:25 neitanap Musa lelo tung'ana loo Lawi apa oonap osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani ejoki," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Ewaita ena buku oo nkitanapat, nipikipiki embata eilo sanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi, pee etum ninye ataa teine shakenisho tialo intae." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Amu ayiolo nanu enkiseroto o engolon enkong'u inyi; ng'ura, ena olong itogolong'akita intae Olaitoriani; kebaa naa kenya engolong'akinoto te siadi keeya ai!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Enturrurrokoki nanu ilpayiani pooki loo loshon linyi, o larikok linyi pee atumoki airoro kulo rorei too nkiyiaa enye naipotu shumata o enkop meishakenoki ninche." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Amu ayiolo nanu ajo ore te siadi keeya ai meeta nchere miasiasa entorroni, nimbelekenyanya aapaash ina oitoi apa naitanapa nanu intae; naa ore too nkolong'i naapuonu nejing intae entorroni, enkaraki naa eiyookiki intae aas entorroni te dukuya Olaitoriani, aaitagor ninye tialo esiai oo nkaik inyi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Neitoki taa Musa airo irorei leilo sinkolio ometaba anaa neishakino nkiyiaa eina umata e Israel: 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Toning'o iyie shumata, amu kairo nanu; nchoo enkop ening irorei le nkutuk ai." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Metadou nkiteng'enat aainei edou anaa enchan, nchoo enkiroroto ai etiu anaa enkoileelio, anaa enchan nashaiki nkujit naanyori, o anaa enkirujuruj nashaiki mbenek." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Amu kaibalunye nanu enkarna o Laitoriani. Enchoo enkitoo Enkai ang!” 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Endapidapoi ninye, nelulung'a esiai enye amu kesipa nkoitoi pooki enyena. Enkai naisiligayu nemeeta entioto, Kesipa neitoriori ninye." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Etaasa ninche entorroni tialo ninye, meekure ninche aa nkera enyena tenkaraki olminong lenye; eishoi ninche nagolong'u netapong'ori ninche." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Kena intae ilaakiki Olaitoriani, loorere omoda lemedamisho? Aime papaai linyi, ninye ilo oitobira intae, laa ninye oitobirua intae neitubul intae?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Tadamu nkolong'i e opa, tadamu ilarin loo ishoritin kumok; nkilikuana papaai lino, amu aikintodol, ninkilikuan ilpayiani linyi, amu aikiliki ninche iyie." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Ore apa pee eisho ilo otii shumata aisul iloshon njung'oreitin enye, ore apa pee eorrior iltung'ana, nepik ninye ilpolosien loo loreren te risioroto esiana oo nkera e Nkai." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Amu ore erubata o Laitoriani naa iltung'ana lenyena Yakobo ninye erubata enye najung.” 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Enoto apa ninye to lpurkel ti ong'ata te nkop natoyio; neman ninye, neing'or ninye, negolie ninye anaa esoit enkong'u enye." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Anaa olkurragos oitobir enkaji enye, negolie nkera enyena, nelak inaipuko enyena aibung ninche, too naipuko enyena." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Olaitoriani apa otorikoyie ninye openy, nemeetae apa ae ai omoni tenebo ninye." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Neisho Olaitoriani ninye meima iwuejitin neeika enkop, neinos ninche ilng'anayio le nkop neisho ninye meibibiu olkenkei te ndapidapoi, o eilata te ndapidapoi." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Ing'orn oo nkishu o kule oo ntare, tenebo iila oo lkuo le kerra o lmeregeshi, iluat oo nchoo e Bashan o nkineji, o enkano sidai aisul ore to sarge loo sabibu niokioko enaisho.”" 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Kake etopiro Yeshurun, neroisho too nkejek; itopiro iyie nisapuku, nisipayu; neitoki ninye aing'uaa Enkai naa ninye naitobirua ninye, nesukeny endapidapoi e njeunoto enye." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Nedumaki ninche ninye olom te kulie aitin; ore too mbaa bususi neitagor ninche ninye. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Nepolosaki ninche iloiriruani, leme nkaitin, nena aitin neitu aekata eyiolou ninche nena aitin naaetuo det, neitu aekata ninye eidetidetu loo papaai linyi." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Neitu ishilaa ina dapidapoi natoiuo intae nerikino intae ina Ai natoiuo intae.” 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Etoduaa Olaitoriani ina neiturraa ninche, te nkaraki ina naitagoro ninye ilayiok lenyena o ntoyie enyena." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Nejo ninye, ‘Kaisudoo nanu enkomom ai te ninche,’ pee adol enebaya ninche amu eishoi marmali ninche, nkera nemeisiligayu." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Aatudumakitia ninche olom teina neme enkai aaitagoro ninche nanu too nkitanyaanyukot enye. Neaku kadumaki nanu ninche olom te lelo leme iltung'ana, kaitagor nanu ninche teilo osho omoda." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Amu eyupuyupieki enkima te ngoro ai, naa keyupuyup ometabaiki enguton e nemeneng'a, nemut enkop o nena naabulu neinok too lbakunot loo ldoinyo.”" 
Deuteronomy32:23 “‘Nasotoki nanu intorrok shumata ninche nang'orie nanu ninche mbaa aainei o maishaki; 
Deuteronomy32:24 kemenayu ninche to lameyu, nemut ninche enkolong napejisho, o nkeeyaitin torrok, nairriwaki nanu ninche ilala loo lowuarak meinosa ninche." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ore te wueji neisiaja near ninche olalem ore tiatua aji neaku neidaikie ilbarnot o selenken, enkerai nanakita tenebo olmoruo oibor elukunya." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Anaata naaji atejo, Kaidapash ninche meshomo oleng, kaisho nanu ninche metaa meitokini aadamu tiatua iltung'ana." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Teneme naaji ilmang'ati lenye medamu ake embae nemesipa pee melo ake nejo, Enkaina ang natimirishe, mme Olaitoriani oyaua ena pooki.’”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Amu olosho ninche lemeeta kiguana nemetii eyiolounoto atua ninche. 
Deuteronomy32:29 Tenaa aing'eni apa ninche, anaata etayioloito ena, anaata etumusutuo enkiting'oto enye!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Kaji eiko oltung'ani obo tenemir enkalifu, naa kaji eiko oare tenedumu nkalifuni tomon mekueta, teneme Endapidapoi enye natimira ninche, netapalayie ninche Olaitoriani?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Amu metiu Endapidapoi enye anaa Endapidapoi ang, keishakenoki doi ninye ilmang'ati lang ina." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Amu ore eishoi enye naa osabibu le Sodom epukunye, o nkurman e Gomora; ore isabibu lenye naa isabibu le sayiet, ore inkimarrimarrat enye naa kedua." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Ore enaisho enye oo sabibu naa esayiet oo lasuriaa, esayiet torrono e nturbubua.”" 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Keitu eshumi kuna tenkaraki nanu, nemishirakini olchumati lai?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Enaai elap naa kaitalaku, teneideketari enkeju enye amu etataana enkolong enkidaata enye; naa kelotu keeya enye asioki." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Amu keilepunye Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena neing'urrie isinkan lenyena, tenedol ninye ajo eishunye engolon enye, neitu elakuni hoo obo, oloena aashu ololakuno." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Paa keitoki taa ajo, ‘Koree nkaitin enye, ina dapidapoi nashomo ninche aasaru.’" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Ina nainosa ineepir oo lasarri lenye neok enaisho oo lasarri lenye ooki? Nchoo ninche edumunye pee kiretu iyie, nchoo ninche mikitomitu iyie!”" 
Deuteronomy32:39 “‘Toduaa naa taata nchere, nanu, ee nanu, ninye ilo nemeetae ae ai napudare, kaar nanu matua naitopiu; kapik nanu olbae naishiunye; nemeetae hoo ng'ae oidim atokordu te nkaina ai." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Amu kadumu nanu enkarna ai aitabaiki keper, nainos olmumai, anaa enaishu nanu ntarasi." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Tenaii nanu olalem lai neibung enkaina ai enkiguana naitalaku nanu too lmang'ati laainei, naitalaku nanu te lelo laaiba nanu." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Kaitemer nanu mbaa aainei te naisho nemut olalem lai ninche tenebo lelo ootaraki o loo ena, te nena lukuny oo lpapit adoru loo lmang'ati.’”" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Esisa iltung'ana lenyena, lo oreren amu keitalaku ninye osarge loo sinkan lenyena, neitalaku elap too lmang'ati lenyena neitobir olkipoket te nkop oo ltung'ana lenyena.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Nelotu Musa airo kulo rorei pooki lele sinkolio aitoning iltung'ana, ninye o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Ore ake pee eidip Musa airoro kulo rorei pooki te Israel pooki," 
Deuteronomy32:46 nejoki ninye ninche, “Embung'a too ltauja kulo rorei laliki intae ena olong, pee itumutumu aaitanapa ninche nkera inyi, pee etum ninche aaing'ura neas irorei pooki lena kitanapata." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Amu mme rorei le pesho kulo te intae, kake enkishui inyi, ore enkaraki ina, ipuopuo aabikoo teina kop nilang'akiki te lido kekun le Yordan nipuopuo aaya.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Nejoki Olaitoriani Musa ina kata," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Takedo ele doinyo le Abarim, oldoinyo le Nebo, otii enkop e Moab, oipirakinore Yeriko; ning'or ina kop e Kanaan naisho nanu iltung'ana le Israel meitaa enenye;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 nilo iyie aye teilo doinyo liked enchumata, nikinturrurrokini iltung'ana linono, anaa apa enatua Aron olalashe lino to ldoinyo le Hori neiturrurrokini iltung'ana lenyena:" 
Deuteronomy32:51 enkaraki apa neitu intae kirukuruku nanu tiatua iltung'ana le Israel too nkariak e Moribat-Kardesh, to lpurkel le Sin; enkaraki neitu intae kiyanyitutu aaitaa sinyati te mpolos oo ltung'ana le Israel." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Amu idol iyie ina kop te dukuya iyie kake milo iyie ine, atua ina kop naishoo nanu iltung'ana le Israel.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ena ninye ina mayianata apa e Musa ilo tung'ani le Nkai natamayiana nkera e Israel eton eitu eye. 
Deuteronomy33:2 Nejo ninye, “Eewuo Olaitoriani eing'uaa Sinai, neilepie iyiook anaa enkolong te Seir, newang'u to ldoinyo le Paran, nelotu ninye eing'uaa nkalifuni iip tomon oo sinyat, eeta enkima nayupuyup te nkaina enye." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Ee kenyor ninye iltung'ana lenyena ore apa lelo pooki ooiteng'elakaki ninye netii atua enkaina enye; nesujaa ninche orrekie lenye, neng'amu eutaroto te iyie," 
Deuteronomy33:4 ore apa pee eitanap iyiook Musa enkitanapata, metaa enjung'ore to lturrur le Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Neaku Olaitoriani olaiguanani le Yoshurun, ina kata apa pee etumo ilkituaak loo ltung'ana iloshon pooki le Israel tenebo." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Nchoo Ruben eishu, mincho eye, nimincho iltung'ana lenyena eaku kuti.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Nejo ninye ena tialo Yuda, “Toning'o Olaitoriani, oltoilo le Yuda, niyau ninye aitijing'u enetii iltung'ana lenyena, tomitu iyie too nkaik inono, niaku eretoto too lmang'ati lenyena.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ore too le Lawi nejo, “Nchoo Lawi Tumimu ino nincho Urimu ino ilo osinya ilo apa litetema te Masa ninchankarrare ninye too nkariak e Meriba;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 ilo apa otejo tialo menye o ng'otonye ‘Mashilaa nanu ninche’; eiturrayie ninye ilalashera lenyena, nepalaa nkera enyena, amu eibung'a ninche ororei lino neibung olning'o lino." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Keiteng'en ninche Yakobo nkiguanat inono; neiteng'en Israel nkitanapat inono kepik ninche enkorropil dukuya iyie o lasar opejori enchumata olperere lino lo lasar. 
Deuteronomy33:11 Olaitoriani, tamayiana imasaa enyena, ning'amaa esiai oo nkaik enyena; tarrarra mpolosi oo lmang'ati lenyena, e lelo ooiba ninye, pee meigil aadumunye." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ore te Benchamen nejo ninye, Olkirotet lo Laitoriani keton ninye te seriani te ninye; Keimulumul ninye endama pooki, neitaa ninye erishata oo ronyi lenyena emanyisho enye.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ore tialo Yosef nejo ninye, “Metamayiana Olaitoriani enkop enye, too ntokitin enyena supati e shumata, o too naatii ineegut olodo le nkop," 
Deuteronomy33:14 too lng'anayio sidain le nkolong o te nena kumok oo lapaitin," 
Deuteronomy33:15 o te nena sidain naaimu lelo doinyo oina borei naing'uaa nena doinyo musan oo ntarasi 
Deuteronomy33:16 tenebo nena kishorot sidain enkop o enkiputakinoto enye, o enyorrata eilo apa otii osanag, meetu kuna shumata endukuya e Yosef o enerang'irang te lukunya eilo ora olkitok tiatua ilalashera lenyena." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Ore oloing'oni lenye kikau neeta engolon, ore mowuarak enyena naa imowuarak o larro, naa ninche errumorie iloreren, nerumoo pooki omeitabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop; ore lelo naa lelo oora nkalifuni iip tomon le Efraim, ore kulo naa lelo oara nkalifuni le Manase.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ore tialo Sebulon nejo ninye, “Ting'idayu iyie Sebulon, te nimpang auluo, ning'idayu Isaakar tiatua ilng'obori linono." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Keipotu ninche iloreren meetu ilo doinyo lenye; ore teine neitayu ilasarri lenye; sidain amu keaku ninche enkarsisisho oo naaiposha, o nena masaa naaisudoro o sinyai.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ore tialo Gad nejo ninye, “Metamayiana ilo oitalala Gad! Etiu Gad anaa olng'atuny, kepolos ninye enkaina, o enerang'irang te ndukuya." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Etegelaka ninye kewan ewueji neisul te nkop, amu teine apa eiteng'elaki erubata oloitoreisho; nelo ninye enetii ilkituaak loo ltung'ana, nedung'oki Israel enkiguana, o nena kiguanat naasipa o Laitoriani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ore tialo Dan nejo ninye, “Ore Dan naa enkerai o lng'atuny, ina naipidito te Bashan.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ore tialo Naftali nejo ninye “Oo Naftali, ndipakine ntokitin supati, nikimputa esupatisho o Laitoriani iwa enaiposha o kopikop.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ore tialo Asheri nejo ninye, “Metamayiani aaitulus too layiok, nchoo ninye etum omom too lalashera lenyena, naa nchoo eitadoiki enkeju enye eilata." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Metaa nchomito inono ine sekenkei neponari engolon ino anaa nkolong'i inono. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Meetae likae onyaanyukie Enkai, iyie, Yeshurun, ilo olo te keper pee kilotu aret, neimu nkatampo te nkitoo enye." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Ina Ai oo ntarasi ninye emanyisho ino ore abori iyie netii nkaik oo ntarasi naa kerewaa ninye olmang'atinta te dukuya iyie, nejo, Ndaikie." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Neaku etobiko apa Israel te seriani, te nchorro e Yakobo ake, teina kop e ntapa o enaisho oo sabibu ee, keper enye naitadou enkoileelio." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Imayiana iyie Israel, Oo Israel! Kaing'ae likinyaanyukie, olorere oitajeu Olaitoriani, ina long'o e retoto inyi, o lalem le nkisulata inyi! Kepuonu ilmang'ati linyi aasai intae naa ipuopuo intae aaituny iwuejitin enye e shumata.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Neilep Musa teina kisiajata e Moab alo oldoinyo le Nebo, enchumata e Pisga, aa ninye naipirakinore Yeriko. Neitodol Olaitoriani ninye ina kop pooki, Gilead ometabaiki Dan," 
Deuteronomy34:2 o Naftali pooki ina kop e Efraim, o Manase, o enkop pooki e Yuda ometabaiki enaiposha o loo ntoluo," 
Deuteronomy34:3 e Negeb o enkisiajata, aa taa ilo erata le Yeriko ina anasa oo ltuka ometabaiki Soar." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki ninye, “Ena kop apa ina nainosie olmumai o Abraham, o Isaak o Yakobo, nchere, ‘Kalo nanu aisho eishoi enye!’ Aaishoo nanu iyie toduaa too nkonyek inono, kake milo iyie ine.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Neaku etua apa Musa osinka le Nkai teine te nkop e Moab, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani," 
Deuteronomy34:6 nenukaa Olaitoriani ninye to erata te nkop e Moab eipirakinore Bet-peor; kake meetae oltung'ani oyiolo enkurare enye otaata. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Oloo larin iip o tikitam apa Musa pee eye; neitu eiliilaa nkonyek enyena aashu neitu engoroo engolon enye. 
Deuteronomy34:8 Neishiraki iltung'ana le Israel Musa too nkisiajat e Moab nkolong'i e nkishirakinoto o sina tenkaraki Musa. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ore Yoshua olayioni le Nuni nebore oltau le ng'eno nagut, amu eiteleikia apa Musa nkaik enyena shumata ninye; neaku etoning'o iltung'ana le Israel ninye; neas ninche anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Neitu aekata edumunye te Israel oloiboni le Nkai laaijo Musa, laa keyiolore Olaitoriani too nkomomi," 
Deuteronomy34:11 meetae likae laaijo ninye too nkitoduaat o too nenking'asia naaishoo Olaitoriani ninye metaasa te nkop e Misiri, te Farao o too sinkan lenyena pooki o te nkop enye pooki." 
Deuteronomy34:12 O teina golon pooki magilani o nena kiaasin kituaak naaitureisho naataasa Musa te dukuya Israel pooki. 
Joshua1:1 Ore te siadi keeya e Musa ilo sinka lo Laitoriani, nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua olayioni le Nuni ilo sinka le Musa," 
Joshua1:2 “Etua Musa osinka lai; ore naa taata tudumunye, shomo talang'a Yordan, iyie o kulo tung'ana pooki, enchom atua ina kop naishorita nanu ninche, iltung'ana le Israel." 
Joshua1:3 Ore pooki wueji neroro iroruat oo nkejek inyi aishoo nanu intae, anaa apa enaisiligie nanu Musa." 
Joshua1:4 Ebaiki olpurkel o ena Lebanon o metabaiki olkeju kitok, ilo keju le Frati, enkop pooki oo Lhiti o metabaiki enaiposha kitok te nkalo e ndoyioroto e nkolong, naa keaku enkop inyi." 
Joshua1:5 Meetae oltung'ani likindim aitasheikinore too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui ino. Ore apa anaa enatii nanu te nebo Musa, neijia aiko kaaku nanu te nebo iyie; maaitiak nanu iyie nemaaing'uaa nanu iyie." 
Joshua1:6 Tonyuaa nintagoluo amu iyie oidimie kulo metujung'o ina kop nainosie nanu olmumai too loo menye pee aisho ninche. 
Joshua1:7 Tonyuaa ake duoo iyie nintagoluo oleng, ning'or pee ias te risioroto e nena kitanapat pooki apa nikintanapa Musa osinka lai; mimbelekenya apaash alo enkaina e tatene aashu ene kedienye, pee itum aisula te pooki wueji neba anaa enilo." 
Joshua1:8 Ore ena buku oo nkitanapat mincho epuku te nkutuk ino, kake mbirribirra mbaa enyena dama o kewarie, pee itum atujurru ataasa te risioroto e nena pooki naaigero ti atua ninye; amu ina kata ake ebul enkoitoi ino, naa ina kata itum enkisulata sidai." 
Joshua1:9 Keitu nanu aaitanap iyie? Tonyuaa nintagoluo; miureishoyu, niming'aeng'ae, amu etii Olaitoriani Enkai ino te nebo iyie te pooki wueji nilo.”" 
Joshua1:10 Neitoki Yoshua aitanap ilkituaak loo ltung'ana ejo," 
Joshua1:11 “Eima atua enkang oo lng'oborri, nintanapapa olorere, ‘Entobira ndaiki inyi; amu ore te rishata oo nkolong'i uni naa ilang'ilang'a intae Yordan, pee ipuopuo aaibung ina kop apa naishoo intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi pee iyaya.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Ore ti alo ile Ruben, o le Gad, o olpisiai lo losho le Manase nejoki Yoshua,"
