Joshua1:13 “Entadamu ororei apa oitanapa intae Musa osinka lo Laitoriani, ejo, ‘Ore Olaitoriani Enkai inyi naa keisho intae ewueji e nkiyeng'iyeng, naa keisho ninye intae ena kop.’" 
Joshua1:14 Ore nkituaak inyi, o nkera inyi, o nkishu inyi naa ketoni ti atua ina kop apa naishoo intae Musa te lido kekun le Yordan; kake ore iltung'ana pooki oogol ti atua intae nepuo etanapate te dukuya ilalashera linyi neretu ninche," 
Joshua1:15 o metaba anaa neisho Olaitoriani enkiyeng'iyeng ilalashera linyi o intae sii, neya sii ninche ina kop naisho ninche Olaitoriani Enkai inyi; nitumutumu taa aatushukokinoto enkop inyi, niyaya ninye, ina kop apa naishoo intae Musa osinka lo Laitoriani te lido kekun Yordan te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong.”" 
Joshua1:16 Newaliki ninche Yoshua ejo, “Ore nena pooki nintanapa iyiook naa eikiaas, ore eneba anaa enirriwaa iyiook naa eikipuo." 
Joshua1:17 Ore apa anaa enikitoning'o Musa too mbaa pooki, neijia sii kinko aaning iyie; metaa ake duoo ninye Olaitoriani Enkai ino te nebo iyie, anaa apa enatii te nebo Musa!" 
Joshua1:18 Ore oloba anaa olikipaash aany enkitanapata ino negolong'aki irorei linono, enaba anaa enintanap ninye naa keari metua. Tonyuaa ake duoo iyie nintagoluo.”" 
Joshua2:1 Neirriwaa Yoshua olayioni le Nuni te nkisudoroto iltung'ana oare te Shitumu metaa ilaikitalak, ejo, “Enchom, eng'ura enkop, neisul Yeriko.” Nepuo ninche, nepuonu enkaji e mulayoi apa naji enkarna enye Rahabu, neirrag ninche ine." 
Joshua2:2 Netolikioki apa olaiguanani le Yeriko aajoki, “Ng'ura, etii kulikae tung'ana le Israel ooetuo ene duoo kewarie pee ejur enkop.”" 
Joshua2:3 Neirriwaa ilo aiguanani le Yeriko iltung'ana enkaji e Rahabu, ejo, “Ntayu lelo tung'ana ooetuo enkaji ino, lelo ootijing'a enkaji ino; amu enkop pooki eetuo ninche aajur.”" 
Joshua2:4 Kake ewa apa ina kitok lelo tung'ana pokira oare aisudoo; nejo ninye, “Esipa eetuo iltung'ana enatii nanu, kake mayiolo nanu ajo kaji eing'uaa ninche;" 
Joshua2:5 ore ake pee eaku keikeni kishomi, etomisimiso, neipang lelo tung'ana aapuo, ore eneshomo lelo tung'ana mayiolo nanu; entasioki entusujai ninche amu inepupu.”" 
Joshua2:6 Kake eyaua apa ninye ninche enchumata e nkaji, neisudoo ninche too ndupa apa naa ninche naaitobirare te nchumata e nkaji." 
Joshua2:7 Neaku etusujaitie iltung'ana ninche te nkoitoi nalo Yordan, o metabaiki ilang'at; nerisio ake eipang'a iltung'ana aapuo neikeni kishomi." 
Joshua2:8 Ore eton eitu eirura ninche, neilepu ninye alotu enetii ninche te nchumata e nkaji," 
Joshua2:9 nejoki ninche, “Ayiolo nanu nchere eishoo Olaitoriani intae ena kop, naa ore euriata nikiure intae etijing'a iyiook, naa ore iloomanya ena kop pooki nelepori te dukuya intae." 
Joshua2:10 Amu kitoning'oitie iyiook ina naitoyio Olaitoriani nkariak e Naiposha Nanyokie te dukuya intae ina kata pee impang'ung'u aapuku te Misiri, o ina nintaasa lelo aiguanak loo Lamori apa ootii lido kekun le Yordan, o Sihon o Oog, apa lindaikie ninche katukul." 
Joshua2:11 Ore ake pee kining ina, nikilepori, nemeetae empijan natelekua te likae lee hoo obo, te nkaraki intae; amu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ninye ilo ora Enkai te shumata o ti abori te nkop." 
Joshua2:12 Ore naa taata, enosakaki olmumai to Laitoriani nchere ore anaa enaitaasa nanu intae te supatisho, naa eikintaasiasa sii intae te supatisho o enkaji e papa nikinchosho nanu olmonekie osipa," 
Joshua2:13 nintajeuu pee meye papa o yieyio, o lalashera laainei o nkanashera, o lelo pooki oora ilkulenye, nikordudu enkishui ang aaitung'uaa keeya.”" 
Joshua2:14 Nejoki lelo tung'ana ninye, “Enkishui ang te rishata e nkishui inyi, te neaku eitu ilikio kuna baa ang, nikitum taa aaitaasa iyie te supatisho o te nkisiligata te neisho iyiook Olaitoriani ena kop.”" 
Joshua2:15 Neitadoyio ninye ninche te nkeene aimie elusie, amu ore apa enkaji enye naa esuntai e nkanasa apa eshetakino." 
Joshua2:16 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Enchom ildoinyo, meinepu ake intae lelo oosujita intae; nisudoriri te ine nkolong'i uni, o metaba anaa neshukunye lelo oosujita intae, nitumutumu taa aashom aaima enkoitoi inyi.”" 
Joshua2:17 Nejoki lelo tung'ana ninye, “Mikiyieu iyiook nikiaata eleyiata ti alo ele mumai linosie iyiook." 
Joshua2:18 Ng'ura, ti nikipuonu akenya aarasaki ena kop, teeniki enkarasha nanyokie ele dirisha liimie iyiook; nisot ti atua enkaji ino papaai lino o yieyioo lino, o lalashera linono o lelo pooki le nkaji e papaai lino." 
Joshua2:19 Te neipang oltung'ani boo aim kutuk aji e nkaji ino nelo enkoitoi, ore osarge lenye neaku shumata endukuya enye etii, nimikintoki iyiook aata eleyiata; kake te neiteleikini enkaina aar oltung'ani ake ninye otii te nebo iyie ti atua aji, neaku osarge lenye shumata lukuny ang etii." 
Joshua2:20 Kake ti nilikio kuna baa ang, nimikintoki iyiook aata eleyiata ti alo ele mumai linosie iyie iyiook.”" 
Joshua2:21 Nejo ninye, “Anaa enitejo intae, nchoo etiu neijia.” Neisho ninche meshomo, nepuo ninche, neeniki ninye enkarasha nanyokie oldirisha." 
Joshua2:22 Nepuo ninche aajing ildoinyo, netoni te ine nkolong'i uni, o metaba anaa neshukunye lelo apa oosujita ninche; amu eing'orutua apa lelo oosujita ninche; te nkoitoi pooki neitu etum toki." 
Joshua2:23 Neitoki lelo tung'ana pokira oare aadou too ldoinyo, nelang olkeju, nepuo enetii Yoshua olayioni le Nuni; neliki ninye nena pooki naatupukokitio ninche." 
Joshua2:24 Nejoki ninche Yoshua, “Esipa eishorua Olaitoriani enkop pooki apik inkaik ang; netalepori sii lelo pooki oomanya ina kop te nkaraki iyiook.”" 
Joshua3:1 Ore tadekenya enasirie nedumunye Yoshua nelo ninye Shitimu, te nebo iltung'ana pooki le Israel; nepuonu Yordan, neirrag ninche ine eton eitu elang." 
Joshua3:2 Ore te siadi nkolong'i uni neim ilkituaak atua ilng'oborri pooki 
Joshua3:3 neitanap iltung'ana aajo, “Ti nidolidolo intae osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi enapita ilapolosak le Lawi, nipuopuo aaing'uaa iwuejitin inyi aasuj ninye," 
Joshua3:4 pee itumutumu aatayiolo enkoitoi niimiimi, amu eitu ae kata iimiimi ena oitoi. Kake enchoo ejing erishata intae o ilo sanduku, erishata naba anaa intemat e nkaina inkalifuni are; emipuonunu intae aanyikaki ninye.”" 
Joshua3:5 Neitoki Yoshua ajoki iltung'ana, “Entisinya ate; amu ore taisere naa keas Olaitoriani inenking'asia ti atua intae.”" 
Joshua3:6 Nejoki Yoshua ilapolosak, “Entudumu osanduku lo sotua enchom dukuya iltung'ana.” Nedumu ninche ilo sanduku lo sotua nepuo dukuya iltung'ana." 
Joshua3:7 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Yoshua, “Ore ena olong kaang'as nanu ailepie iyie too nkonyek e Israel pooki, pee etum ninche aatayiolo nchere, ore apa anaa enatii nanu te nebo Musa, kaaku sii te nebo iyie." 
Joshua3:8 Naa intanapa iyie lelo apolosak oonapita osanduku lo sotua, nchere, ‘Ore pee ipuonunu aabaiki emurt e nkare e Yordan nintasheshe intae aaitirring'a te Yordan.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Nejoki Yoshua iltung'ana le Israel, “Wootu ene, entoning irorei lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi.”" 
Joshua3:10 Neitoki Yoshua ajo, “Tena intae iyiolouu nchere etii Enkai naishu atua intae, naa nchere meitadiak ninye eitu earaa te dukuya intae Ilkanaani, o Ilhiti, oIlhifi, o Ilperesi, o Ilgilgashi, o Lamori o Ilyebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Ng'ura, ore osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani le nkop pooki naa kegiroo intae alo Yordan." 
Joshua3:12 Ore naa taata ewaita iltung'ana tomon oare too loshon le Israel, to losho ake oltung'ani." 
Joshua3:13 Naa ore ake pee eroro ndapi oo nkejek e lelo apolosak oo napita osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani le nkop pooki nkariak e Yordan, neitasheyieki nkariak e Yordan meitoki aaruko, ore nena ariak naadou eing'uaa shumata neitashe aarupa to lturrur obo.”" 
Joshua3:14 Neaku ore ake pee edumunye iltung'ana too lng'oborri lenye ejo pee elang Yordan to nebo lelo apolosak oonapita osanduku lo sotua te dukuya iltung'ana," 
Joshua3:15 ore ake pee epuonu lelo oonapita osanduku lo sotua Yordan, nedoiki nkejek e lelo apolosak oonapita osanduku atua enkare (naa kenang'ari apa Yordan aim ingilat te nkata pooki e nkisampuare)," 
Joshua3:16 ore nkariak naadou eing'uaa shumata neitashe aaku orupati olo enelakua abaiki Adam, ina anasa apa natii embata e Saretani, ore nena ariak naanang'ari aadoyio aapuo enaiposha e Araba, ina Enaiposha e Munyan, nedung'o katukul; nelang iltung'ana aaim enkishaakinoto e Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Ore apa ina kata eimita Israel pooki enkop natoyio, ore lelo apolosak oonapita osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani neitashe te nkop natoyio te mpolos o lkeju le Yordan, o metaba anaa neidip olosho pooki atalang'a Yordan." 
Joshua4:1 Ore ake pee eidip olosho pooki atalang'a olkeju le Yordan, nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua," 
Joshua4:2 “Ntayu iltung'ana tomon oare ti atua iltung'ana, ti atua ake olosho oltung'ani obo," 
Joshua4:3 nintanap ninche ajoki, ‘Entayu isoito tomon oare tene te mpolos olkeju le Yordan, te ine wueji neitasheyie nkejek oo lapolosak, ninapinapa aaya te nebo intae, nirragiegie ninche te wueji ade nirragirraga kewarie.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Neitoki Yoshua aipotu iltung'ana tomon oare ti atua iltung'ana le Israel, laa ninche etegelua, oltung'ani ake to losho;" 
Joshua4:5 nejoki Yoshua ninche, “Entogiroi osanduku lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi enchom empolos e Yordan, nidumu ake oltung'ani osoit anap to loililai lino, te risioroto e siana oo loshon le Israel," 
Joshua4:6 pee etum ena ataa olmonekie ti atua intae, ore akenya te neikilikuan intae inkera inyi te nkata nalotu aajoki, ‘Kainyoo tipat e kulo soito te intae?’" 
Joshua4:7 Nitumutumu taa aatiaki ninche nchere etudung'ote apa nkariak e Yordan te dukuya o sanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani; ore apa pee elang'u Yordan, nedung'o nkariak e Yordan. Neaku keaku kulo soito too ltung'ana le Israel enkitadamunoto ntarasi.”" 
Joshua4:8 Neas iltung'ana le Israel anaa enaitanapa Yoshua, nedumu isoito tomon o are te mpolos e Yordan, te risioroto e siana oo loshon loo ltung'ana le Israel, anaa enatiaka Olaitoriani Yoshua; nenap ninche aaya ine wueji apa neshomo aairrag, neirragie ninche te ine." 
Joshua4:9 Neirragie Yoshua isoito tomon o are aitobiraki te mpolos e Yordan, te ine wueji apa neitasheyie nkejek e lelo apolosak oonapita osanduku lo sotua; netii ninche ine ebaiki ena olong." 
Joshua4:10 Amu ore apa lelo apolosak oonapita osanduku neitasheito te mpolos e Yordan, o metaba anaa neidipayu pooki toki apa naitanapa Olaitoriani Yoshua metiaaki iltung'ana, te risioroto e nena apa pooki naaitanapa Musa Yoshua. Nelang iltung'ana ilo keju te nkisarrisar;" 
Joshua4:11 ore ake pee eidip iltung'ana pooki aatalang, nelang ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani o lapolosak te dukuya lelo tung'ana." 
Joshua4:12 Ore ilayiok le Ruben o layiok le Gad o lpisiai lo losho le Manase nelang etanapate te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel, anaa apa enatiaka Musa ninche;" 
Joshua4:13 iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni artam ooterretenate te nkaraki olarrabal ootalang'a te dukuya Olaitoriani aapuo olarrabal, aapuo nkisiajat e Yeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Ore apa ina olong neilepie Olaitoriani Yoshua too nkonyek e Israel pooki; neyanyitu ninche ninye anaa apa enayanyit Musa, nkolong'i e nkishui enye pooki." 
Joshua4:15 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua," 
Joshua4:16 “Ntanapa lelo apolosak oonapita osanduku ilo sanduku le nchakenisho meilepu aapuku te Yordan.” 
Joshua4:17 Neitanap taa Yoshua lelo apolosak ejo, “Elepu entupuku te Yordan.”" 
Joshua4:18 Ore ake pee eilepu lelo apolosak apa oonapita osanduku lo Laitoriani ti atua empolos e Yordan, neroro nkejek e lelo apolosak enkop natoyio, nerrinyokino nkariak e Yordan erishata enye nenang'ari aaim ngilat o lkeju, anaa apake." 
Joshua4:19 Neilepu iltung'ana aapuku ti atua Yordan te nkolong e tomon o lapa le dukuya, neitayu ilng'oborri te Gilgal to lpolosie le nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong le Yeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Ore lelo soito tomon o are apa ooitayutuo ninche ti atua Yordan, neirragie Yoshua apik Gilgal." 
Joshua4:21 Nejoki ninye iltung'ana le Israel, “Te neikilikuan akenya nkera inyi iloo papaai lenye te nkata nalotu aajoki, ‘Kainyoo tipat e kulo soito?’" 
Joshua4:22 Nitumokiki taa aaitayiolo nkera inyi nchere, ‘Etalang'a apa Israel ele keju le Yordan aaim enkop natoyio.’" 
Joshua4:23 Amu eitoyio Olaitoriani Enkai inyi inkariak e Yordan te nkaraki intae o metaba anaa nilang'ilang'a, anaa apa enaikuna Olaitoriani Enkai inyi Enaiposha Nanyokie, apa naitoyio te nkaraki iyiook o metaba anaa nikilang," 
Joshua4:24 pee etum iloreren pooki le nkop aatayiolo nchere ore enkaina o Laitoriani naa aimagilani; pee itumutumu aatureita Olaitoriani ntarasi.” 
Joshua5:1 Ore ake pee ening ilaiguanak pooki loo Lamori apa ootii lido kekun Yordan enkalo o loo ntoluo, o laiguanak pooki loo Lkanaani apa ootii embata e naiposha, nchere eitoyio Olaitoriani nkariak e Yordan te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel o metaba anaa nelang'u nelepori ninche, neitu eitokini aata hoo obo oata oltau te ninche, te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel." 
Joshua5:2 Ore apa te ina kata nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua, “Ntobira nkalema oo soito oogol pee intoki amurat iltung'ana le Israel enkata e are.”" 
Joshua5:3 Neitayu Yoshua nkalema oo soito, nemurat iltung'ana le Israel te Gibeat-haaralot." 
Joshua5:4 Naa te nkaraki ena apa pee etumurata Yoshua ninche: ore apa ilayiok pooki loo ltung'ana ooetuo eing'ua Misiri, iltung'ana pooki lo larrabal, netuata ninche te nkoitoi to lpurkel pee eidip ake aatupuku aatung'uai Misiri." 
Joshua5:5 Ore hoo netumurataki apa iltung'ana pooki ooipang'utua aapuonu, kake ore eyia lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootoiuoki te nkoitoi to lpurkel eidipa ninche aatupuku te Misiri neton apa eitu emurati." 
Joshua5:6 Amu eshomo apa iltung'ana le Israel ilarin artam to lpurkel, o metaba anaa neishunye olosho pooki, lelo tung'ana lo larrabal apa ooipang'utua aapuku te Misiri, enkaraki neitu apa ening ninche oltoilo lo Laitoriani; ore ti alo ninche neinosa Olaitoriani olmumai nchere meisho ninche metoduaa ina kop nainosakinye Olaitoriani olmumai loo papaai lenye pee eisho iyiook, enkop naruko kule o naishi." 
Joshua5:7 Neaku nkera enye apa etudumua ninye te rishata enye, ninche etumurata Yoshua; amu memurata apa, enkaraki neitu apa emurati ninche te nkoitoi." 
Joshua5:8 Ore ake pee eidipayu emuratare o losho pooki, netoni ninche ti atua ilng'oborri o metaba anaa neishiu." 
Joshua5:9 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua, “Ore ena olong aibeleleng'oyie nanu esulare e Misiri aitung'uaa intae.” Neaku ore enkarna e ine wueji naa keji Gilgal o metabaiki ena olong." 
Joshua5:10 Ore eton etii iltung'ana le Israel ilng'oborri te Gilgal nenya ninche Pasaka te nkolong e tomon o ong'uan o lapa teipa too nkisiajat e Yeriko. 
Joshua5:11 Ore pee ekenyu te siadi Pasaka, te ina olong, nenya ninche ilng'anayio le ina kop, imukateni neitu eisuijieki o entapa natapejoki." 
Joshua5:12 Neishunye mana pee ekenyu ina kata apa enya ilng'anayio le ina kop; neitu eitoki iltung'ana le Israel aatum mana, kake einosa ilng'anayio le nkop e Kanaan te ilo ari." 
Joshua5:13 Ore apa etii Yoshua embata e Yeriko, neshumu nkonyek enyena aing'orisho, naa ng'ura, eitashe oltung'ani te mbata ninye eeta olalem lenye oshutuno te nkaina enye; nelo Yoshua enetii ninye nejoki ninye, “Eira iyie ole nkalo ang, aashu oloo lmang'ati lang?”" 
Joshua5:14 Nejo ninye, “A-a; kake aewuo nanu anaa olarikoni le njore o Laitoriani.” Nebatata Yoshua te nkomom enye o metabaiki enkop, neserem, nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo ejoki Olaitoriani lai osinka lenye?”" 
Joshua5:15 Ore ilo arikoni le njore o Laitoriani nejoki Yoshua, “Ntayu inamuka inono too nkejek inono; amu ore ine wueji nintasheyie naa eisinyati.” Neas Yoshua ina." 
Joshua6:1 Naa keikeno apa Yeriko ti atua o ti oriong te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel; meetae apa oltung'ani olo boo nemeetae olojing'u. 
Joshua6:2 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua, “Toduaa, aishorua nanu apik nkaik inono Yeriko, te nebo olaiguanani lenye o ltung'ana magil lo larrabal." 
Joshua6:3 Tamana iyie ina anasa, ore iltung'ana pooki lo larrabal nepuo aaman enkanasa te nkata nabo. Ninkoko neijia too nkolong'i ile." 
Joshua6:4 Ore ilapolosak oopishana nenap imouarak naapishana oo lmeregeshi te dukuya ilo sanduku; ore te nkolong e naapishana, nimanimana enkanasa katitin naapishana, ekutita ilapolosak imouarak:" 
Joshua6:5 Naa ore ake pee eitayu ninche eoshoto naado te nena mouarak oo lmeregeshi, ore ake pee ining'ining'i oltoilo le mouo, nebuaku iltung'ana pooki te mbuakunoto kitok; neurunye esuntai e nkanasa abaiki enkop, nepuo iltung'ana dukuya, oltung'ani ake neiulokino dukuya ninye.”" 
Joshua6:6 Neipotu Yoshua olayioni le Nuni ilapolosak nejoki ninche, “Ewaita osanduku lo sotua, ninchosho ilapolosak oopishana enap imouarak naapishana oo lmeregeshi te dukuya ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani.”" 
Joshua6:7 Nejoki ninye iltung'ana, “Enchom dukuya; entaman enkanasa, ninchosho lelo tung'ana oata imasaa o larrabal egiroo aapuo dukuya ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani.”" 
Joshua6:8 Naa ore apa anaa enaitanapa Yoshua iltung'ana, ore lelo apolosak oopishana oonapita imouarak naapishana oo lmeregeshi te dukuya Olaitoriani nepuo dukuya, eoshito imouarak, esujita ninche ilo sanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani." 
Joshua6:9 Ore lelo tung'ana apa oata imasaa o larrabal nepuo te dukuya lelo apolosak ooshito imouarak ore lelo ootii siadi nesuju ilo sanduku, eoshito imouarak." 
Joshua6:10 Kake eitanapa apa Yoshua iltung'ana ajoki, “Mibuakuku ake aashu inchosho oltoilo linyi ening'oyu, nemepuku hoo ororei obo aimu inkutukie inyi, o metabau ina olong najokinye intae entabuaku.”" 
Joshua6:11 Neisho ninye ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani meitamani enkanasa, neman ninye nabo kata; nepuonu ninche ilng'oborri lenye, neirrag ninche ina kewarie ilng'oborri." 
Joshua6:12 Nedumunye Yoshua tadekenya enasirie, nedumu ilapolosak osanduku lo Laitoriani." 
Joshua6:13 Ore lelo apolosak apa oonapita nena mouarak naapishana oo lmeregeshi te dukuya ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani neituruk, eoshito mouarak aaigil; ore lelo tung'ana apa oata imasaa o larrabal nepuo tedukuya ninche, ore apa lelo ootii siadi nesuju osanduku lo Laitoriani, ina kata eoshitoi imouarak aaigil." 
Joshua6:14 Ore te nkolong e are neman ninche enkanasa kata nabo, neshukunye aapuonu ilng'oborri. Neiko ninche neijia too nkolong'i ile." 
Joshua6:15 Ore te nkolong e naapishana nedumunye ninche enasirie, neman enkanasa anaa oshiake katitin naapishana: naa ina olong ake apa etamana ninche enkanasa katitin naapishana." 
Joshua6:16 Ore te nkata e naapishana, eidipa ilapolosak aatoosh imouarak, nejoki Yoshua iltung'ana, “Entabuaku; amu eishoo intae Olaitoriani ena anasa." 
Joshua6:17 Ore ena anasa o pooki natii atua ninye neidaikieki tukul te nkaraki Olaitoriani; Rahabu ina mulayoi ake o lelo pooki ootii te nebo ninye ti atua enkaji enye naapok, enkaraki apa naisudoyie ninye lelo aikitalak likirriwaitie." 
Joshua6:18 Kake ore intae, entalama ate nena tokitin naaiteng'elakaki enkidaaroto, pee meaku ake ore inteng'ela intae ninche niyaya nabo e nena tokitin naaiteng'elaki nintaa ilng'oborri le Israel entoki e nkidaaroto, niyauu enyamali shumata ninye." 
Joshua6:19 Kake ore enkosholai pooki o sahabu, o masaa o suyai o esekenkei, naa eisinyat to Laitoriani keyae ninche atua olchumati lo Laitoriani.”" 
Joshua6:20 Nebuaku iltung'ana neoshi imouarak. Erisio ake etoning'o iltung'ana oltoilo le mouo, neilepie iltung'ana embuakunoto kitok, neurori esuntai abaiki enkop, nejing iltung'ana atua ina anasa, neitoriokino ake oltung'ani dukuya enye, neya ninche ina anasa." 
Joshua6:21 Neitoki ninche aaidaikie tukul pooki natii atua ina anasa, ilewa o nkituaak, ilooti o lbotoro, o lmong'i o nkerra o sirkon te nepi o lalem." 
Joshua6:22 Nejoki Yoshua lelo tung'ana oare apa ooikitalana ina kop, “Enchom atua enkaji e ina mulayoi, nimpang'unyenye ti atua ninye ina kitok, o lelo pooki oora ilkulenye, anaa apa eninosakitia ninye olmumai.”" 
Joshua6:23 Neaku ore lelo barnot apa oora ilaikitalak nepuo atua aji, neipang'unye Rahabu, o papaai lenye, o ng'otonye o lalashera o pooki oora ilkulenye; neyau ninche olmarei lenye pooki, nepik ninche auluo ilng'oborri le Israel." 
Joshua6:24 Nepejoo ninche ina anasa te nkima o pooki naatii atua ninche; enkosholai ake o sahabu, o masaa o suyai o nesekenkei, etipika ninche atua olchumati le nkaji o Laitoriani." 
Joshua6:25 Kake ore Rahabu ina mulayoi, o enkaji e papaai lenye o pooki oora ilkulenye, eitajeuo Yoshua metopua; neton ninye ti atua Israel o metabaiki ena olong, enkaraki apa natunuka ilaikitalak ooirriua Yoshua meikitalana Yeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Neirragakinye Yoshua ninche olmumai te ina kata, ejo “Ediaa te dukuya Olaitoriani ilo tung'ani odumunye neigil ashet ena anasa e Yeriko; te nkinyang'a o lkikau lenye epik ninye olkitamanyunoto lenye, naa te nkinyang'a o ldung'oret lenye epik ninye nchomito enyena.”" 
Joshua6:27 Neaku etii apa Olaitoriani tenebo Yoshua; ore olning'o lenye neibulu enkop pooki. 
Joshua7:1 Kake etigila apa iltung'ana le Israel enkirukoto ti alo nena tokitin apa naaitengelaki; amu ore Akan olayioni le Karmi, olayioni le Sabdi, olayioni le Sera lo losho le Yuda, eewa embata e nena tokitin apa naaiteng'elaki; neyupuyup engoro o Laitoriani te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel." 
Joshua7:2 Neirriwaa Yoshua iltung'ana te Yeriko meshomo enkang e Ai, apa nataaniki Bet-afen, enkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong e Betel, nejoki ninche, “Elepa enchom enkitalana enkop.” Neilep iltung'ana aapuo aaikitalan Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Neshukunye ninche enetii Yoshua, nejoki ninye, “Mincho iltung'ana pooki eilep aapuo, kake nchoo iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni are aashu nkalifuni uni eilep aapuo, aaibung Ai; mincho iltung'ana pooki epuo aanauru te ine amu ei kuti ninche.”" 
Joshua7:4 Neaku iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni uni ake ooilepa aapuo ti atua iltung'ana le Israel; nepuo aaisik te dukuya iltung'ana le Ai," 
Joshua7:5 nesesekuan iltung'ana le Ai iltung'ana oobaya tomoni uni o ile lenye, nemiraa ninche te kishomi o meitabaiki Shebarim, nesesekuan ninche to loshong'ishong'i nelepori iltauja loo ltung'ana netiu anaa enkare." 
Joshua7:6 Nepolos Yoshua nkilani enyena nebatatakino enkop te nkomom enye te dukuya ilo sanduku ometaba anaa neaku teipa, ninye te nebo ilpayiani le Israel; nepik enterit ilukuny enye." 
Joshua7:7 Nejo Yoshua, “Ee, Olaitoriani Enkai, kainyoo apa pee intasima aitalang'u kulo tung'ana Yordan, pee ilotu aishooyo iyiook apik atua nkaik oo Lamori, pee eidaikie iyiook? Enaikash apa ti nikitobiko te lido kekun le Yordan!" 
Joshua7:8 Olaitoriani, kaa nanu eton ajo eibelekenyate Israel aaisho oriong ilmang'ati lenye!" 
Joshua7:9 Amu ore Ilkanaani o lelo pooki oomanya ena kop naa keyooki aaning ena, nemuat iyiook aaman nedung'oo enkarna ang aaiwuang'ie te nkop; naa kaa iyie ias te nkaraki enkarna ino kitok?”" 
Joshua7:10 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua, “Tudumunye, kainyoo iyie pee itabatate aiko nji te nkomom ino?" 
Joshua7:11 Etaasa Israel eng'oki; etigila ninche olning'o lai apa laitanapa nanu ninche, ewaita ninche embata oo ntokitin apa naaiteng'elaki, etupurrishote ninche nelejisho, nepik ninche atua imasaa enye." 
Joshua7:12 Neaku meidim iltung'ana le Israel aaitasheiki ilmang'ati lenye, eibelekenyate ninche aaisho oriong ilmang'ati lenye, enkaraki nataa ninche entoki e nkidaata. Maitoki ae kata nanu aaku te nebo iyie, aashu ake ti nindaikie nena tokitin apa naaiteng'elaki aitung'uaa atua intae." 
Joshua7:13 Tudumunye, ntisinya iltung'ana, nijoki, Entisinya ate te nkaraki taisere, amu nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, Ntokitin apa naaiteng'elaki kuna naatii atua intae, Israel; mindim iyie aitasho te dukuya ilmang'ati, linono, o metaba anaa nintayu nena tokitin apa naaiteng'elaki aiwuang'ie ti atua iyie." 
Joshua7:14 Ore naa tadekenya keyauni intae aaitinyiku anaa too loshon linyi; ore ilo osho oya Olaitoriani nelotu anyiku anaa too lmareita; ore ilo marei oya Olaitoriani neyauni aaitinyiku anaa too nkajijik; ore ina aji naya Olaitoriani nelotu anyiku oltung'ani ake oltung'ani. 
Joshua7:15 Naa ore ilo oyai eeta nena tokitin apa naaiteng'elaki nepejori te nkima, ninye o ntokitin pooki naata ninye, enkaraki natigila ninye olning'o lo Laitoriani, o enkaraki nataasa ninye embae e sulare ti atua Israel. ”" 
Joshua7:16 Neaku etudumunye apa Yoshua tadekenya enasirie, neyau Israel aitinyiku olosho o losho, neyae olosho le Yuda;" 
Joshua7:17 neyau ninye aitinyiku ilmareita le Yuda, neyae olmarei loo Lsera; neyau ninye aitinyiku to lmarei loo Lsera oltung'ani o ltung'ani; neyae Sabdi;" 
Joshua7:18 neyau ninye aitinyiku enkaji enye oltung'ani ake oltung'ani, neyae Akan, olayioni le Karmi, olayioni le Sabdi, olayioni le Sera lo losho le Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Neitoki Yoshua ajoki Akan, “Enkerai ai, nchoo enkitoo Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, nincho ninye enkisisa; naa tolikioki taata nanu enitaasa iyie; mikisudoriyie nanu.”" 
Joshua7:20 Newaliki Akan Yoshua ajoki, “Esipa ataasa nanu eng'oki to Laitoriani Enkai e Israel, naa ena nanu ataasa:" 
Joshua7:21 Ore ake pee adol ti atua nena naatarayioki olkila sidai oing'uaa Shinari o shekeli iip are e nkosholai o lbelati le sahabu oata shekeli onom te nkiroishi, nang'uar nanu ninche, naya ninche; naa ng'ura, enukaro ninche ti atua enkop ti atua olng'obor lai, etii enkosholai ti abori.”" 
Joshua7:22 Neirriwaa Yoshua iltung'ana, neipirri ninche aapuo olng'obor; naa ng'ura, keturoro apa ti atua olng'obor lenye etii enkosholai abori." 
Joshua7:23 Neitayu ninche ti atua olng'obor neyau ninche enetii Yoshua o ltung'ana pooki le Israel; neirragie ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani. 
Joshua7:24 Ore Yoshua o Siraeli pooki ootii te nebo ninye neya Akan olayioni le Sera, o enkosholai, o lkila o ilo belati le sahabu, o layiok lenyena o ntoyie enyena, o lmong'i lenyena o sirkon lenyena o nkerra, o lng'obor lenye o pooki toki apa naata ninye; neyauni ninche oerata le Akori." 
Joshua7:25 Nejoki Yoshua, “Kainyoo iyie pee iyaka iyiook enyamali? Eikiyaki iyie Olaitoriani enyamali taata.” Nenang Israel pooki ninye too soito; nepejori ninche te nkima, nenang ninche too soito." 
Joshua7:26 Nesot ninche te shumata ninye enkurare kitok too soito leton etii o metabaiki ena olong neibelekenya taa Olaitoriani te ina goro enye nayupuyup. Neaku ore ebaiki ena olong ore enkarna e ine wueji naa keji oerata le Akori. 
Joshua8:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua, “Miureishoyu niming'aing'ai; iwa lelo tung'ana pooki lo larrabal te nebo iyie, naa tudumunye, ilepa shomo Ai; toduaa ajo aishorua nanu apik atua enkaina ino olaiguanani le Ai, o ltung'ana lenyena, enkanasa enye o enkop enye." 
Joshua8:2 Naa intaasiasa intae Ai o laiguanani lenye anaa apa enintaasa Yeriko o laiguanani lenye; kake ewaita ntokitin enyena o nkishu entarai; entipik olnukata empirakinye enkanasa ti oriong.” 
Joshua8:3 Nedumunye Yoshua te nebo ltung'ana pooki lo larrabal, pee eilep aapuo Ai, negelu Yoshua iltung'ana nkalifuni tomoni uni magil oodupa, neirriwaa ninche kewarie." 
Joshua8:4 Neitanap ninye ninche ajoki, “Ng'ura, irragirraga intae aanuka aaishiaakinore enkanasa, aaimu ninye ti oriong; emipuopuo intae aalamari oleng te ina anasa, kake enterretenata pee irasakiki." 
Joshua8:5 Ore nanu, o ltung'ana pooki ootii te nebo nanu, nikipuo aanyikaki ina anasa. Naa ore te neipang'u ninche aapuonu aarare iyiook, anaa apa, nikimpirri aailanyisho te dukuya ninche;" 
Joshua8:6 naa keipang'u ninche aapuonu aamir iyiook, o metaba anaa nikiya ninche enelakua te ina anasa; amu kejo ninche, ‘Eisika aailany iyiook, anaa apa.’ Neaku eikisik iyiook aailany ninche;" 
Joshua8:7 nitumokiki taa aatudumunye aatupuku te ilo nukata nimbung'ubung'u ina anasa; amu keisho intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi apik atua enkaina inyi. 
Joshua8:8 Naa ore te nindipidipi aawaita ina anasa, nipikipiki intae ina anasa enkima, niasiasa anaa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani; entodol nchere aitanapa nanu intae.”" 
Joshua8:9 Neaku eirriwayie apa ninche Yoshua; nepuo ninche ewueji o lnukata, neirrag te rishata e Betel o Ai, enkalo e ndoyoroto e Ai; kake etotona apa Yoshua ina kewarie te nebo iltung'ana." 
Joshua8:10 Nedumunye Yoshua tadekenya enasirie neiturrur iltung'ana, neilep alo te nebo ilpayiani le Israel neituruk te dukuya iltung'ana alo Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Ore lelo tung'ana pooki apa lo larrabal ootii te nebo ninye neilep aapuo nenyikaa aataaniki ina anasa; nepik ilng'oborri enkalo e moikuape e Ai. 
Joshua8:12 Neya ninye arik iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni imiet, nepik ninche atua olnukata te rishata e Betel o Ai, te nkalo o loo ntoluo le nkanasa." 
Joshua8:13 Neitobiraki ninche iltimito, etii oltim kitok enkalo e moikuape e ina anasa netii oriong enye enkalo o loo ntoluo e nkanasa. Kake eirraga apa Yoshua ina kewarie atua oerata." 
Joshua8:14 Ore ake pee edol olaiguanani le Ai ena, ninye o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, lelo tung'ana le ina anasa, neisarrisar neipang aapuo tadekenya aaishong'ishong, aaipirri enkalo e Araba pee enang'are Israel aarare; kake eitu apa eyiolou nchere etii olnukata oarare ninye otii oriong ina anasa." 
Joshua8:15 Ore Yoshua o Israel pooki neitaakuno ketaraki te dukuya ninche, neisik aapuo enkalo e ong'ata." 
Joshua8:16 Neaku ore iltung'ana pooki apa ootii atua enkanasa neipotuni te nebo pee esujaa ninche, naa ore esujita ninche Yoshua nerikori aaitalam ina anasa." 
Joshua8:17 Metii apa oltung'ani hoo obo otung'uayioki te Ai arashu te Betel, leitu eipang alo asujaa Israel; neing'uaa ninche enkanasa ebolo, nesujaa Israel." 
Joshua8:18 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua, “Ntorioi ina pere natii enkaina ino ing'orie Ai, amu kaaisho nanu iyie apik atua enkaina ino.” Neitorioo Yoshua ina pere apa natii enkaina enye aing'orie ina anasa." 
Joshua8:19 Ore lelo apa ootii olnukata nedumunye nabo kata aapuku te ine wueji apa nenukare, nerisio ake eitorioyie ninye enkaina enye, nekuet ninche nejing atua ina anasa neya ninye; neisarrisar aapik atua ina anasa enkima." 
Joshua8:20 Neaku ore pee eing'or lelo tung'ana apa le Ai siadi, ng'ura, neilep empuruo e ina anasa alo shumata; nemeekure eeta engolon naisikakinye ena shoto aashu idia, amu ore lelo tung'ana apa ooisikakitia ong'ata neibelekenyakinote lelo apa oosujita." 
Joshua8:21 Ore ake pee edol Yoshua o Israel pooki nchere eibung'a lelo apa ootii olnukata enkanasa, neilepa empuruo e ina anasa alo shumata, neibelekenyunye aar metuata lelo tung'ana le Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Neipang'u ilkulikae ooing'uaa enkanasa aapuonu aarare ninche; nejing empolos e Israel, etii ilkulikae ena shoto netii ilkulikae idia shoto; nesesekuan Israel ninche, o metaba anaa neaku metii hoo obo otelekua aashu otuluayie." 
Joshua8:23 Kake ore olaiguanani le Ai neya ninche eishu, neyau ninye enetii Yoshua." 
Joshua8:24 Ore ake pee eidip Israel atara metuata lelo pooki apa oomanya Ai ti atua ina ong'ata naisiaja apa natusujakitia ninche ore ninche pooki o metabaiki olobayie lenye netabatatate te nepi o lalem, neshukunye Israel pooki aapuonu Ai neosh ninche te nepi o lalem." 
Joshua8:25 Ore lelo pooki apa ootabatatate ina olong, ilewa o nkituaak naa nkalifuni tomon o are, iltung'ana pooki le Ai." 
Joshua8:26 Amu eitu apa eshuk Yoshua enkaina enye, naa ninye apa eitorioriyie ina pere, o metaba anaa neidaikie tukul lelo pooki apa oomanya Ai." 
Joshua8:27 Nkishu ake o masaa e ina anasa apa ewaita Israel aaitaa ntokitin naataraitie, te risioroto e ilo rorei lo Laitoriani apa oitanapa Yoshua." 
Joshua8:28 Neaku etapejoyie Yoshua Ai, neitaa ninye intarasi osototi le nkidaata, anaa enatiu ena olong." 
Joshua8:29 Neilili ninye ilo aiguanani le Ai to lchani o metaa teipa; ore pee eaku kedoyio enkolong neitanapisho Yoshua, neitayu ninche aaitadou osesen lenye to lchani nenang'aki enejing'ieki kishomi e ina anasa nepik shumata ninye osototi kitok loo soito, leton eitashe te ine o taata." 
Joshua8:30 Neitoki Yoshua ashet olperere lo lasar to ldoinyo le Ebal, ashetaki Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel," 
Joshua8:31 anaa apa enaitanapa Musa ilo sinka lo Laitoriani iltung'ana le Israel, anaa enaigero ti atua embuku oo nkitanapat e Musa, “Olperere lo lasar loo soito lemegueta, leitu ae kata eiteleiki oltung'ani enguetet e sekenkei;” neishooyo ninche te nchumata enye ilasarri oopejori aaisho Olaitoriani, nepolos ilasarri le seriani." 
Joshua8:32 Ore te ine, etii iltung'ana le Israel, neiger te nchumata oo soito enkigilata e nkitanapata e Musa, apa naigero ninye." 
Joshua8:33 Ore Israel pooki, oldokunoti o inoti, te nebo ilpayiani lenye o lkituaak o larishak lenye, neitashe too nkipirakinot e ilo sanduku te dukuya lapolosak le Lawi apa oonap ilo sanduku lo lning'o lo Laitoriani, etii olpisiai lenye dukuya oldoinyo le Geresim netii olpisiai lenye dukuya oldoinyo le Ebal, anaa apa enaitanapishe Musa ilo sinka lo Laitoriani te dukuya, nchere pee emayian ninche iltung'ana le Israel." 
Joshua8:34 Ore te siadi nena neisuma ninye irorei pooki le nkitanapata, emayianata o ldeket, te risioroto e nena pooki naaigeroki ti atua embuku oo nkitanapat." 
Joshua8:35 Meetae apa ororei hoo obo le nena pooki apa naaitanapishe Musa neitu eisuma Yoshua te dukuya ina umata pooki e Israel, o nkituaak o nkera kutiti, o ldokunot apa ootii atua ninche." 
Joshua9:1 Ore ake pee ening ilaiguanak pooki apa ootii lido kekun Yordan ina kop oo ldoinyo o ina kop nagum ilo omanaa pooki le naiposha kitok te nkalo e Lebanon, o Lhiti, o Lamori, o Lkanaani, o Lperisi," 
Joshua9:2 neiturrurro ninche te nebo pee earare Yoshua o Israel. 
Joshua9:3 Kake ore ake pee ening lelo apa oomanya Gibeon ina apa naitaasa Yoshua Yeriko o Ai," 
Joshua9:4 ore ninche te nkalo enye neas enkeleekisho neitobir ninche ndaiki, neyau ilkuniyiani ootopolosate nepik nkoriong'i oo sirkon lenye, o lbenia le naisho, oopolosa nepololo nerami," 
Joshua9:5 o namuka naatumutate too nkejek enye, o nkilani naapolosa; ore endaa enye pooki netoyio nebaa." 
Joshua9:6 Nepuo ninche enetii Yoshua too lng'oborri te Gilgal, nejoki ninye o ltung'ana le Israel, “Kietuo iyiook king'ua enkop nalakua; neaku ntobira taata iyie olning'o o iyiook.”" 
Joshua9:7 Kake etiakitia iltung'ana le Israel lelo Hafi, “Ebaiki naa atua iyiook intae itii; kaji naa kinko iyiook ti nikintobir olning'o o intae?”" 
Joshua9:8 Nejoki ninche Yoshua, “Eikira iyiook isinkan linono.” Nejoki Yoshua ninche, “Eirara intae akua? Naa kaji intae ing'uaa?”" 
Joshua9:9 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Enkop nalakua eing'uaa isinkan linono te nkaraki enkarna o Laitoriani Enkai ino; amu kitoning'o iyiook ilomon lenyena, o nena pooki naataasa ninye te Misiri," 
Joshua9:10 o nena pooki naaitaasa ninye ilaiguanak loo Lamori apa otii lido kekun Yordan, Sihon ilo aiguanani le Heshbon, o Oog olaiguanani le Bashan ilo apa omanya Ashtarot." 
Joshua9:11 Ore ilpayiani lang o lelo pooki oomanya enkop ang netiakitia iyiook, Ewaita endaa too nkaik inyi te lototo, nipuopuo aanang'are ninche, nijokiki ninche, Kira iyiook isinkan linyi; wootu naa taata, entobira olning'o te nebo iyiook." 
Joshua9:12 Nena emukate ang; eton apa eirowua ina kata pee kintayu too nkajijik ang aaitaa endaa te nkoitoi ina olong apa nikitudumunye aapuonu enitii intae; kake ore taata, ng'ura, etoyio netabee," 
Joshua9:13 ore kulo benia le naisho naa aing'ejuko apa pee kimput iyiook ninche, naa ng'ura, etadanyate; ore kulo kilani o namuka ang netumutate tena lototo naado.”" 
Joshua9:14 Neaku etang'amutua apa nena daiki enye, neitu eikilikuanu eutaroto to Laitoriani." 
Joshua9:15 Neitayu Yoshua eseriani te nebo ninche, neitayu olning'o te nebo ninche, pee eisho ninche epok; ore lelo kituaak apa lo lturrur neinosaki ninche olmumai." 
Joshua9:16 Ore te siadi nkolong'i uni eidipa ninche aaitobira olning'o te nebo ninche, nening ninche nchere ilelatia enye ninche, naa atua ninche oshi ake etii." 
Joshua9:17 Nedumunye iltung'ana le Israel aapuo nebaya nkanas enye te nkolong e uni. Ore apa nkanas enye naa Gibeon, Chefira, Be-erot, o Kiriat-yearim." 
Joshua9:18 Kake eitu ear iltung'ana le Israel ninche metuata, amu ore apa ilkituaak lo lturrur neinosa olmumai to Laitoriani, Enkai e Israel. Neing'unyung'uny olturrur pooki te nkaraki lelo arikok." 
Joshua9:19 Kake etiakitia lelo arikok pooki olturrur, “Kinosakitia iyiook ninche olmumai to Laitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ore taata mikindim iyiook aaiseyie ninche." 
Joshua9:20 Ena iyiook maitaasa ninche, nikincho ninche epok, mejing ake engoro shumata iyiook, te nkaraki ilo mumai apa likinosakitia ninche.”" 
Joshua9:21 Nejoki lelo kituaak ninche, “Enchoo ninche epok.” Neaku ninche ilaiperrak loo lkeek neoku enkare te nkaraki olturrur pooki, anaa enatiakitia lelo kituaak ninche." 
Joshua9:22 Neipotu Yoshua ninche, nejoki ninye ninche, “Kainyoo intae pee iteleja iyiook, aajo, ‘Eikilakuaniki iyiook intae oleng;’ aa atua iyiook ake itii?" 
Joshua9:23 Ore naa taata iakuku intae iloodiaa, ore ilkulikae te intae naa keaku irrindiki anaake, ilaiperrak loo lkeek o laokunok le nkare te nkaraki enkaji e Nkai ai.”" 
Joshua9:24 Newaliki ninche Yoshua aajo, “Ore enkaraki natolikioki apa isinkan linono aaitisipaki nchere eitanapa Olaitoriani Enkai ino osinka lenye Musa pee eisho intae ena kop pooki, pee indaikiekie lelo pooki oomanya ena kop aaiwuang'ie te dukuya intae; neaku kitureishote iyiook oleng te nkaraki enkishui ang te dukuya intae; nikiaas ena bae." 
Joshua9:25 Naa ore taata, ng'ura, kitii iyiook atua enkaina ino: taasa anaa enidol ajo sidai neishaakino too nkonyek inono ti nintaas iyiook.”" 
Joshua9:26 Neaku eitaasa ninye ninche, nekordu ninche aitayu ti atua enkaina oo ltung'ana le Israel; neitu ninche ear ninche metuata." 
Joshua9:27 Kake eitaa apa Yoshua ninche ina olong ilaiperrak o laokunok le nkare te nkaraki ilo turrur o te nkaraki olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani, pee emooki ninche aas ina o metabaiki ena olong, te ine wueji netegelua ninye." 
Joshua10:1 Ore apa pee ening Adoni-sedek olaiguanani le Yerusalem eneikuna Yoshua pee eibung Ai, neidaikie ninye katukul, aitaas Ai o laiguanani lenye anaa apa enaitaasa Yeriko o laiguanani lenye, o ina naitobira lelo oomanya Gibeon eseriani o Israel netii atua ninche." 
Joshua10:2 Neureishoyu ninye oleng, amu enkanasa kitok apa Gibeon, anaa ake duoo ae anasa e nkitoo, o enkaraki naa eikitok apa alang Ai naa magil iltung'ana lenyena pooki." 
Joshua10:3 Ore enkaraki ina neirriwaki Adoni-sedek olaiguanani le Yerusalem Hoham olkilikuai ilo aiguanani le Hebron, o Piram olaiguanani le Yarmut, o Yafia olaiguanani le lakish, neirriwaki sii Debir olaiguanani le Eglon, ejoki," 
Joshua10:4 “Wootu enatii nanu, entaretuoki nanu, emataar iyiook Gibeon; amu eitobira ninye eseriani o Yoshua o te nebo iltung'ana le Israel.”" 
Joshua10:5 Ore lelo aiguanak pokira imiet loo Lamori, o ilo aiguanani le Yerusalem, o ilo aiguanani le Hebron, o ilo aiguanani le Yarmut, o ilo aiguanani le Lakish, o laiguanani le Eglon neiturrur iltimito lenye, nepuo ninche te nebo njorin enye pooki neitayu ninche ilng'oborri aaipirakinore Gibeon, neitayunye ninye olarrabal." 
Joshua10:6 Neirriwaki lelo tung'ana le Gibeon Yoshua olkilikuai too lng'oborri te Gilgal, ejo, “Miyeng'iyeng'ie iyie enkaina te nkaraki isinkan linono; tasieku wou enikitii, pee intajeu iyiook, niretu iyiook, amu ore kulo aiguanak pooki loo Lamori oomanya enkop oo ldoinyo neiturrurrote te nkaraki iyiook.”" 
Joshua10:7 Neaku eilepa apa Yoshua te Gilgal, ninye o ltung'ana pooki lo larrabal te nebo ninye, o ltung'ana pooki magil oodupa." 
Joshua10:8 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua, “Miureyu ninche, amu aishooyie nanu ninche apik atua nkaik inono; meitashe hoo oltung'ani lenye te dukuya intae.”" 
Joshua10:9 Neaku eewuo apa Yoshua enetii ninche aipang'aki te luamata, eewuo apa enkewarie pooki eing'uaa Gilgal." 
Joshua10:10 Nepik ninche Olaitoriani olkirutoto te dukuya Israel, laa ninche ootasesekuana ninche te sesekuanata kitok te Gibeon, nemiraa ninche aaimie enkoitoi nashong'ishong e Bet-horon near ninche metuata o metabaiki Aseka o Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Naa ore eisikita ninche te dukuya Israel, epuoito ninche aadoyio to loshong'ishong'i le Bet-horon, nenang'u Olaitoriani aitadou isoito sapuki aitung'uaa shumata aitadoiki ninche ebaiki Aseka, neye ninche; ilkumok apa ootuata te nkaraki isoito le nchan aalang iltung'ana ootara Israel to lalem." 
Joshua10:12 Neitoki Yoshua airorie Olaitoriani te ina olong apa naishooyie Olaitoriani Ilamori aisho iltung'ana le Israel; nejo ninye too nkonyek e Israel, “Na olong, ntasho iyie ntirring'ayu te Gibeon, naa ore sii iyie Lo apa intasho to erata le Ajalon.”" 
Joshua10:13 Neitashe enkolong aitirring'a, neuno olapa, o metaba anaa neitalaku ilo osho elap too lmang'ati lenye. Aimeigero ena ti atua embuku e Yashar? Eitasho enkolong te mpolos e shumata, neitu eitasim adoyio te ndama pooki." 
Joshua10:14 Eitu ae kata etumi enkolong naaijo ena too nkolong'i naatulusoitie o too naatusujutua, eji nening Enkai oltoilo lo ltung'ani; amu etijing'a apa Olaitoriani olarrabal te nkaraki Israel." 
Joshua10:15 Neitoki Yoshua ashukunye o Israel pooki te nebo ninye aapuonu ilng'oborri te Gilgal. 
Joshua10:16 Neisik apa kulo aiguanak pokira imiet, neisudoo ate ti atua enkapune te Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Netolikioki apa Yoshua, “Ore lelo aiguanak pokira imiet nenotoki eisudori ti atua enkapune te Makeda.”" 
Joshua10:18 Nejo Yoshua, “Emperiperaki isoito sapuki enkutuk e ina apune, nipikipiki iltung'ana embata enye pee errip ninche;" 
Joshua10:19 kake emitonini intae te ine, entusujai ilmang'ati linyi, entadoiki ilo kidong'oe lenye, emincho ninche metijing'a nkanas enye; amu eishorua Olaitoriani Enkai inyi apik atua enkaina inyi.”" 
Joshua10:20 Ore ake pee eidip Yoshua o ltung'ana le Israel aatasesekuan ninche te sesekuanata kitok, o metaba anaa nejutuni ninche, ore ake ilo pisiai, arashu ore ake ilo pisiai lenye otelekua pee ejing atua nena ang'itie naagol naasheta sunta," 
Joshua10:21 neshukunye iltung'ana pooki eserian aapuonu enetii Yoshua too lng'oborri te Makeda; nemetii ninye oltung'ani hoo obo otabolo enkutuk te ntorroni ti alo likae tung'ani ninye obo le Israel. 
Joshua10:22 Neitoki Yoshua ajo, “Entabol enkutuk e nkapune nimpang'unyenye lelo aiguanak pokira imiet te nkapune aayau enatii nanu.”" 
Joshua10:23 Neiko ninche neijia, neyau lelo aiguanak pokira imiet aaitayu te nkapune aayaki ninye, olaiguanani le Yerusalem, o laiguanani le Hebron, o laiguanani le Yarmit, o laiguanani le Lakish, o laiguanani le Eglon." 
Joshua10:24 Ore ake pee eipang'unye ninche lelo aiguanak aayau enetii Yoshua, neipotu Yoshua iltung'ana pooki le Israel, nejoki lelo kituaak apa loo ltung'ana le njore ooshomo te nebo ninye, “Wootu entinyiku, entipik nkejek inyi enchumata oo murto e kulo aiguanak.” Nepuonu ninche aanyiku nepik nkejek enye nchumat oomurto e lelo aiguanak aaroro." 
Joshua10:25 Nejoki Yoshua ninche, “Emiureishoyu niming'aing'ayiayia; entagoluoto nipijuju; amu nji eiko Olaitoriani ilmang'ati linyi pooki laa ninche iararere.”" 
Joshua10:26 Ore te siadi near Yoshua ninche metuata, neilili ninche too lkeek imiet. Neililio ninche te lelo keek o metaa teipa;" 
Joshua10:27 kake ore te ndoyioroto e nkolong, neitanapisho Yoshua, neitayuni ninche aaitadou too lkeek, nenang'akini ninche atua ina apune apa naisudorie ate, nepik isoito sapuki enkutuk e ina apune, leton etii o metabaiki ena olong." 
Joshua10:28 Neya apa Yoshua Makeda ina olong, near ninye olaiguanani lenye te nepi o lalem; neidaikie ninye tukul pooki tung'ani otii atua, eitu ninye eleku oltung'ani; neitaas ilo aiguanani le Makeda anaa apa enaitaasa olaiguanani le Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Neitoki Yoshua alo agiroo Makeda, o Israel pooki te nebo ninye, nelo Libna, nearare Libna;" 
Joshua10:30 neitoki sii Olaitoriani aishooyo ninye o laiguanani lenye apik atua enkaina e Israel; near Yoshua ninye te nepi o lalem, o pooki tung'ani otii atua ninye; eitu ninye eleku oltung'ani obo ti atua ninye eishu; neitaas olaiguanani lenye anaa apa enaitaasa olaiguanani le Yeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Nelo Yoshua agiroo Libna, o Israel pooki te nebo ninye, nelo Lakish, nemuat aaman ninye, neibung ninye:" 
Joshua10:32 neishooyo Olaitoriani Lakish apik atua enkaina e Israel, neya ninye te nkolong e are, near ninye te nepi o lalem, o pooki tung'ani otii atua ninye, anaa apa enaitaasa ninye Libna." 
Joshua10:33 Neitoki Horam olaiguanani le Geser alotu aretu Lakish; near Yoshua ninye o ltung'ana lenyena, o metaba anaa neing'uaa ninye meishu hoo oltung'ani obo." 
Joshua10:34 Neitoki Yoshua te nebo Israel pooki aagiroo Lakish nepuo Eglon; neng'adu ninche ninye, neibung ninye;" 
Joshua10:35 neya ninche ninye ina olong, near ninye te nepi o lalem; ore pooki tung'ani otii atua ninye neidaikie tukul ina olong, anaa apa enaitaasa Lakish." 
Joshua10:36 Neitoki Yoshua te nebo Israel pooki aagiroo Eglon nepuo Hebron; neibung ninche ninye," 
Joshua10:37 neya ninye, near ninye te nepi o lalem, olaiguanani lenye o nkang'itie enyena, o pooki tung'ani otii atua; eitu ninye eleku oltung'ani hoo obo oishu anaa apa enaitaasa Eglon, neidaikie ninye tukul te nebo pooki tung'ani otii atua ninye." 
Joshua10:38 Neitoki Yoshua, te nebo Israel pooki, aashukunye aapuonu Debir neibung ninye," 
Joshua10:39 neya ninye te nebo olaiguanani lenye o nkang'itie enyena pooki; near ninche te nepi o lalem, neidaikie tukul pooki tung'ani otii atua ninye, eitu ninye eleku oltung'ani obo eishu; ore anaa apa enataasa te Hebron o te Libna o laiguanani lenye neijia sii eikuna Debir o laiguanani lenye." 
Joshua10:40 Neaku eisula apa Yoshua enkop pooki, ina kop oo ldoinyo e Negeb, o ina kop nagum o neeshong'ishong, o laiguanak lenye pooki; eitu ninye eleku hoo oltung'ani oishu, kake eidaikie tukul pooki ng'ae oishu, anaa apa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel." 
Joshua10:41 Nemir apa Yoshua ninche ebaiki Kadesh-Barnea o metabaiki Gasa, o enkop pooki e Goshen ebaiki Gibeon." 
Joshua10:42 Neya apa Yoshua kulo aiguanak pooki o nkuapi enye te nkata nabo, amu etijing'a Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel olarrabal te nkaraki Israel." 
Joshua10:43 Neshukunye taa Yoshua, o Israel pooki te nebo ninye, aapuonu ilng'oborri te Gilgal." 
Joshua11:1 Ore ake pee ening Yabin olaiguanani le Hasor ena, neirriwaki olkilikuai Yobab olaiguanani le Madon, o laiguanani le Shimron, o laiguanani le Akshaf;" 
Joshua11:2 o laiguanak apa ootii moikuape ina kop oo ldoinyo o atua Araba kopikop e Kineret, o atua ina kop nagum, o atua Nafat-dor te nkalo o loontoluo," 
Joshua11:3 Ilkanaani te nkalo o loo saen o to loontoluo, o Lamori, o Lhiti, o Lperisi, o Lyebusi, ti atua ina kop oo ldoinyo, o Lhifi ti abori Hermon ti atua enkop e Mispa." 
Joshua11:4 Neipang'u ninche aapuonu, te nebo iltimito lenye pooki, olorora kitok, eba esiana enye anaa osinyai le mbata e naiposha, neeta mbartan kumok oleng o ngarrin oo mbartan." 
Joshua11:5 Ore apa kulo aiguanak pooki neitutum njorin enye, nepuonu aaitayu ilng'oborri te nebo too nkariak e Merom, pee earare Israel." 
Joshua11:6 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yoshua, “Miureyu iyie ninche, amu ore taisere tena saa naa kaishoru nanu ninche pooki, etuata tesesekuana, aisho Israel, nidung'udung'u irrisheta mbartan enye, nipejoo ngarrin enye oo mbartan te nkima.”" 
Joshua11:7 Neaku eewuo apa Yoshua aipang'aki ninche nabo kata te nebo iltung'ana lenyena pooki lo larrabal, te mbata oo nkariak e Merom, nedoiki ninche." 
Joshua11:8 Neishooyo Olaitoriani ninche apik atua enkaina e Israel, apa ootara ninche nemiraa ninche eneba anaa Sidon kitok o Mirsefot-maim, o enkalo o loo saen eneba anaa o erata le Mispe; nesesekuan ninche, o metaba anaa neing'ua ninche eitu ninye eleku oltung'ani oishu." 
Joshua11:9 Neitaas Yoshua ninche anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye; etudung'o rrisheta mbartan enye, nepejoo ngarrin enye oo mbartan te nkima." 
Joshua11:10 Neibelekenya apa Yoshua te ina kata, neya Hasor, nesesekuan olaiguanani lenye to lalem; amu ore Hasor li apa naa ninye endukuya e nena kitoriat pooki." 
Joshua11:11 Nepik ninche olalem lelo pooki apa ootii atua ninye, aaidaikie ninche tukul; eitu ninye eing'uari obo leton eiresa, nepejoo ninye Hasor te nkima." 
Joshua11:12 Ore apa nkanas pooki e lelo aiguanak, o laiguanak lenye pooki, neya Yoshua ninche near ninche te nepi o lalem, aidaikie ninche tukul, anaa apa enaitanapishe Musa osinka lo Laitoriani." 
Joshua11:13 Kake meetae apa enkanasa hoo nabo te nena apa naaitashe too ldoinyo natapejoitie Israel, meteleku ake Hasor, naa ninye etapejoyie Yoshua." 
Joshua11:14 Ore imasaa pooki e kuna anas o nkishu neya iltung'ana le Israel aaitaa intokitin naataraitie, kake ore pooki tung'ani nesesekuan ninche te nepi o lalem, o metaba anaa neidaikie ninche tukul, neitu ninye eleku obo eiresa." 
Joshua11:15 Anaa apa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa osinka lenye, neitanapa sii apa Musa Yoshua, netaasa apa Yoshua ina; eitu ninye eing'uaa ae toki measa te nena apa pooki naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Joshua11:16 Neaku ewa apa Yoshua ina kop pooki, ina kop oo ldoinyo o Negeb pooki, o enkop e Goshen pooki o ina kop pooki nagum o Araba o ina kop oo ldoinyo e Israel o enkop nagum," 
Joshua11:17 ebaiki oldoinyo le Halak, ilo oshumunye aing'or Seir, o metabaiki Baalgad to erata le Lebanon ti abori oldoinyo le Hermon. Neya ninye ilaiguanak lenye pooki, nesesekuan ninche, near ninye ninche metuata." 
Joshua11:18 Neitayuo apa Yoshua olarrabal te nkata naado o lelo aiguanak pooki. 
Joshua11:19 Meetae apa ninye enkanasa nabo naitayio osotua o Israel, meteleku ake Ilhafi, lelo oomanya Gibeon; nerik apa ninche pooki olarrabal." 
Joshua11:20 Amu enkitobirata apa o Laitoriani pee eitagol iltauja lenye pee etum aaetu aataarare Israel to larrabal, pee etumi aaidaikie ninche katukul, nemeng'amu ninche olng'ur kake pee eishuni anaa apaenaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
Joshua11:21 Nelotu apa Yoshua te ina kata, nejutu katukul aiwuang'ie Anakim te ina kop oo ldoinyo, neiwuang'ie to Hebron, neiwuang'ie te Debir, neiwuang'ie te Anab, neiwuang'ie sii te ina kop oo ldoinyo eYuda, neiwuang'ie sii te ina kop oo ldoinyo e Israel; neidaikie Yoshua ninche tukul te nebo nkanas enye." 
Joshua11:22 Meetae apa hoo obo le Anakim otelekua ti atua enkop oo ltung'ana le Israel; te Gasa ake, ti atua Gati, o ti atua Ashdod, etelekutua embata." 
Joshua11:23 Neaku ewa apa Yoshua enkop pooki te risioroto e nena pooki apa naatiaka Olaitoriani Musa, neishooyo Yoshua metaa enjung'ore te Israel te risioroto eorikinoto oo loshon lenye. Neitirring'a enkop to larrabal." 
Joshua12:1 Kulo apa ilaiguanak le ina kop, ootimira iltung'ana le Israel, neya ina kop enye te lido kekun Yordan te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong ebaiki oerata le Arnon o metabaiki oldoinyo le Hermon, o Araba pooki te nkalo o loosaen:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihon olaiguanani loo Lamori apa omanya Heshbon, naa ninye apa oitore ebaiki Aroer natii olomanaa lo erata le Arnon, o metabaiki empolos o erata o metabaiki olkeju le Yabok, ilo polosie loo Lamori, aa taa, olpisiai le Gilead," 
Joshua12:3 O Araba o metabaiki enaiposha e Kineret te nkalo o loo saen, o te nkalo e Bet-yeshimot, o metabaiki enaiposha e Araba, ina aiposha naisukut, enkalo e kopikop o metabaiki abori lelo jurumi le Pisga;" 
Joshua12:4 o Oog olaiguanani le Bashan, obo apa lo lpisiai le Refaim, apa omanya Ashtarot o Edrei," 
Joshua12:5 naa ninye apa oitore oldoinyo le Hermon o Saleka o Bashan pooki o metabaiki olpolosie loo Lkishi o Lmaakati, o lpisiai le Gilead o metabaiki olpolosie le Sihon olaiguanani le Heshbon." 
Joshua12:6 Etimira apa ninche Musa osinka lo Laitoriani te nebo iltung'ana le Israel; neishooyo Musa ilo sinka lo Laitoriani enkop enye metaa enkop oo le Ruben, ole Gad olpisiai lo losho le Manase." 
Joshua12:7 Naa kulo apa ilaiguanak le ina kop ootimira Yoshua o ltung'ana le Israel te nkalo o loontoluo le Yordan, ebaiki Baal-gad ti atua oerata le Lebanon o metabaiki ilo doinyo le Halak, oshumunye aing'or Seir (neisho Yoshua ina kop enye iloshon le Israel meitaa enenye te risioroto enkiririkinoto enye," 
Joshua12:8 ti atua ina kop nagum, ti atua Araba, o tiatua nkishong'ishong'at, ti atua ong'ata ooti atua negeb, ina kop oo Lhiti, o Lamori, o Lkanaani, o Lperisi, o Lhafi o Lyebusi):" 
Joshua12:9 olaiguanani le Yeriko; obo, olaiguanani le Ai aa ninye natashare Betel, obo:" 
Joshua12:10 olaiguanani le Yerusalem, obo; olaiguanani le Hebron, obo;" 
Joshua12:11 olaiguanani le Yarmut, obo; olaiguanani le Lakish, obo;" 
Joshua12:12 olaiguanani le Eglon, obo; olaiguanani le Geser, obo;" 
Joshua12:13 olaiguanani le Debir, obo; olaiguanani le Geder, obo;" 
Joshua12:14 olaiguanani le Horma, obo; olaiguanani le Aradi, obo;" 
Joshua12:15 olaiguanani le Libna, obo; olaiguanani le Adulam, obo;" 
Joshua12:16 olaiguanani le Makeda, obo; olaiguanani le Betel, obo;" 
Joshua12:17 olaiguanani le Tapua, obo; olaiguanani le Hafer; obo;" 
Joshua12:18 olaiguanani le Afek, obo; olaiguanani le Lasharon, obo;" 
Joshua12:19 olaiguanani le Maden, obo; olaiguanani le Hasor, obo;" 
Joshua12:20 olaiguanani le Shimron-meron, obo; olaiguanani le Akshaf, obo;" 
Joshua12:21 olaiguanani le Taanak, obo; olaiguanani le Megido, obo;" 
Joshua12:22 olaiguanani le Kedesh, obo; olaiguanani le Yokneam ti atua Karmel, obo;" 
Joshua12:23 olaiguanani le Dori te Nafat-dor, obo; olaiguanani le Goiim ti atua Galilaya, obo;" 
Joshua12:24 olaiguanani le Tirsar, obo: ore pooki neaku tomoni uni o obo." 
Joshua13:1 Netamorua apa Yoshua neaku oloo larin kumok; nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Itamorua iyie nitaa oloo larin kumok, neton ake etii enkop sapuk oleng naji pee eyae." 
Joshua13:2 Ena kop ina neton eng'or: nkuapi pooki oo Lfilisti, o nekua pooki oo Lgerushi" 
Joshua13:3 (ebaiki Shihor te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong e Misiri, moikuape te nkalo o lpolosie le Ekron, eyioloi ninye aajo enoo Lkanaani; netii ilaitoriak imiet loo Lfilisti, lekua le Gasa, o Ashdod, o Ashkelon, Gati o Ekron), o lekua le Afiim," 
Joshua13:4 ore te nkalo e kopikop, naa enkop pooki oo Lkanaani, o Meara nara ninye enoo Lsidoni o metabaiki Afek, o metabaiki olpolosie loo Lamori," 
Joshua13:5 o enkop oo Lgibali o Lebanon pooki, te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong, ebaiki Baalgad ti abori oldoinyo le Hermon o metabaiki enejing'ieki Hamat," 
Joshua13:6 ore lelo pooki oomanya ina kop oo ldoinyo ebaiki Lebanon o metabaiki Misrefot-maim, o metabaiki doi ninye Isidoni pooki. Kamiraa nanu makewan aipang'ie te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel; kake tooriki ake duoo iyie ina kop iltung'ana le Israel metaa enjung'ore enye, anaa apa enaaitanapa nanu iyie." 
Joshua13:7 Ore naa taata tooro ena kop metaa enjung'ore too loshon oopishana o lpisiai lo losho le Manase.” 
Joshua13:8 Ore olikae pisiai lo losho le Manase o le Ruben o le Gad neng'amu enjung'ore enye, apa naishoo ninche Musa, te lido kekun Yordan te nkalo o loosaen, anaa enaishoo ninche Musa osinka lo Laitoriani:" 
Joshua13:9 ebaiki Aroer aa ninye apa natii olomanaa lo erata le Arnon, o ina anasa natii empolos o erata o ina kop naluaa e Medeba o metabaiki Dibon;" 
Joshua13:10 o nkanas pooki e Sihon olaiguanani loo Lamori, apa laa ninye oitoreisho te Heshbon, o metabaiki olpolosie loo Lamoni;" 
Joshua13:11 o Gilead o nkuapi oo Lgeshuri o Lmaakati, o ldoinyo le Hermon pooki, o Bashan pooki o metabaiki Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 enkitoria pooki e Oog te Bashan, laa ninye apa oitoreisho ti atua Ashtarot etii atua Edrei (ninye apake etelekuaki to lpisiai le Refaim); kulo apa etimira Musa nearaa aipang'ie." 
Joshua13:13 Ore eyia eitu apa earaa iltung'ana le Israel Ilgeshuri aashu Ilmaakati; kake etobiko apa Ilgeshuri o Lmaakati te mpolos e Israel o metabaiki ena olong. 
Joshua13:14 Olosho le Lawi ake eitu eisho Musa enjung'ore; nkishorot o lasar opejori te nkima eisho Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel ninche metaa enjung'ore enye anaa apa enatiaka ninye. 
Joshua13:15 Neishoo apa Musa enjung'ore olosho loo Leruben te risioroto oo lmareita lenye. 
Joshua13:16 Neaku ore apa enkop enye naa ebaiki Aroer, aa ninye apa olomanaa lo erata le Arnon, o ina anasa natii empolos oerata, o ina kop pooki naluaa te mbata e Medeba;" 
Joshua13:17 te nebo Heshbon, o nena anas pooki naatii atua ina kop naluaa; Dibon o Bamot-baal, o Bet-baa-meon," 
Joshua13:18 o Yahas, o Kedemot o Mefaat," 
Joshua13:19 o Kiriataim o Sibma, o Seret-shahar te nchumata o ldoinyo le ilo erata," 
Joshua13:20 o Betpeor o ljurumi le Pisga, o Betjeshimot," 
Joshua13:21 aa taa nkanas pooki e ina kop naluaa, o enkitoria pooki e Sihon olaiguanani loo Lamori, apa laa ninye oitoreisho te Heshbon, laa ninye apa etimira Musa te nebo ilarikok le Midian, Efi o Rekem o Sur o Huri o Reba ilkituaak le Sihon, laa ninye apa omanya ina kop." 
Joshua13:22 Ore sii Balaam, olayioni le Beor, ilo asakutoni, near iltung'ana le Israel ninye metua to lalem te nebo lelo apa lenye ootasesekuanaki." 
Joshua13:23 Ore apa olpolosie loo ltung'ana le Ruben naa Yordan orish. Ena apa enjung'ore oo le Ruben, te risioroto oo lmareita lenye o nkanas o nkang'itie kutiti." 
Joshua13:24 Neitoki sii Musa aisho enjung'ore olosho le Gad, te risioroto oo lmareita lenye." 
Joshua13:25 Ore apa enkop enye naa Yaser o nkanas pooki e Gilead o lpisiai le nkop oo Lamori, o metabaiki Aroer, ina natii enkalo o loo saen le Raba," 
Joshua13:26 o ebaiki Heshbon o metabaiki Ramat-mispe o Betonim, o ebaiki Mahanaim o metabaiki enkop e Debir," 
Joshua13:27 o atua oerata le Bet-haram, o Bet-nimra, o Sukot, o Safon, o ina ae kitoria pooki e Sihon olaiguanani le Heshbon, aitaa Yordan olpolosie, o metabaiki enkalo e abori enaiposha e Kineret te nkalo o loo saen te lido kekun le Yordan." 
Joshua13:28 Ena ninye enjung'ore oo le Gad te risioroto oo lmareita lenye, o nkanas enye o nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua13:29 Neitoki Musa aisho enjung'ore olpisiai lo losho le Manase; etoorikiaki apa olpisiai lo losho le Manase te risioroto oo lmareita lenye. 
Joshua13:30 Nelo apa enkop enye abaiki Mahanaim, neim Bashan pooki, o atua enkitoria pooki e Oog, olaiguanani le Bashan o nkang'itie pooki e Yair, nena naatii atua Bashan, nkanas ntomoni ile," 
Joshua13:31 o lpisiai le Gilead, o Ashtarot, o Edrei, nena anas e nkitoria e Oog ti atua Bashan, etoorikiaki apa kuna iltung'ana le Makir olayioni le Manase aaisho olpisiai loo le Makir te risioroto oo lmareita lenye." 
Joshua13:32 Kuna apa njung'oreitin naaishooyie Musa too nkisiajat e Moab, te lido kekun le Yordan te nkalo o loo saen le Yeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Kake ore ti alo olosho le Lawi eitu eisho Musa enjung'ore; Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel ninye enjung'ore enye, anaa apa enatiaka ninye ninche." 
Joshua14:1 Naa kuna apa njung'oreitin naatang'amutua iltung'ana le Israel te nkop e Kanaan, apa naaishoo ninche Eliesa olapolosani o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni o lukuny oo lmareita loo loshon loo ltung'ana le Israel." 
Joshua14:2 Ore apa enjung'ore enye naa te nkukuo, anaa apa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa te lelo oshon ooudo o lpisiai loo loshon." 
Joshua14:3 Amu eishoo apa Musa enjung'ore iloshon oare o lpisiai obo loo loshon te lido kekun le Yordan; kake ore ti alo ile Lawi eitu ninye eishooyo enjung'ore ti atua ninche. 
Joshua14:4 Amu ore apa iltung'ana le Yosef naa iloshon oare, Manase o Efraim; nemeetae apa erubata naishooki ile Lawi te ina kop, nkanas ake eishooki naatonie, te nebo iwuejitin neeirritishore te nkaraki nchoo enye o neetumie ndaiki enye." 
Joshua14:5 Etaasa apa iltung'ana le Israel anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa; neor ninche enkop. 
Joshua14:6 Neitoki iltung'ana le Yuda aapuonu enetii Yoshua te Gilgal; ore Kaleb olayioni le Yefune ilo loo Lkeni nejoki ninye, “Iyiolo iyie apa enatiaka Olaitoriani Musa oltung'ani le Nkai te Kadesh-Barnea ti alo nanu o iyie." 
Joshua14:7 Ara apa nanu o loo larin artam ina kata apa pee aairriwaa nanu Musa osinka lo Laitoriani te Kadesh-Barnea mashomo aikitalan enkop; naitoki nanu arrinyoki ninye olomoni anaa apa enatiu ti atua oltau lai. 
Joshua14:8 Kake ore ilalashera laainei apa ooshomo te nebo nanu neitalepoo oltau loo ltung'ana, ore eyia naiting'ie nanu asuj Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Joshua14:9 Nenya Musa olmumai ina olong, ajo, ‘Esipa ore enkop natororua enkeju ino naa keaku enjung'ore te iyie o too nkera inono ntarasi enkaraki ninting'ie iyie asuj Olaitoriani Enkai ai.’" 
Joshua14:10 Naa ore taata, ng'ura, aaishoo nanu Olaitoriani aishu, anaa enatejo ninye, ore kulo arin artam o imiet ebaiki ina kata apa nairorie Olaitoriani Musa ele rorei, ina kata eloito Israel to lpurkel, ore taata ara nanu ena olong o loo larin ntomoni isiet o imiet." 
Joshua14:11 Eton ake agol ena olong anaa apa enatiu ina olong apa pee aairriwaa Musa, etiu engolon ai taata anaa engolon ai ina kata apa, to larrabal o te lototo o elotunoto." 
Joshua14:12 Neaku naa taata, nchooki nanu ena kop oo ldoinyo apa naa ninye eimaka Olaitoriani ina olong; amu itoning'o apa iyie ina olong eneikununo ile Anakim te ine, eeta nkang'itie naasheta kituaak; ebaiki netii Olaitoriani te nebo nanu, naa kamiraa nanu ninche aipang'ie anaa enatejo Olaitoriani.”" 
Joshua14:13 Nemayian Yoshua ninye, neisho ninye Hebron Kaleb olayioni le Yefune metaa enjung'ore enye." 
Joshua14:14 Neaku etaa apa Hebron enjung'ore e Kaleb olayioni le Yefune loo Lkeni o metabaiki ena olong, enkaraki apa naiting'ie ninye asuj Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel." 
Joshua14:15 Ore apa enkarna e Hebron naa keji Kiriat-arba, ore ele Arba naa ninye apa oltung'ani kitok oleng ti atua Anakim. Neitirring'a taa enkop to larrabal." 
Joshua15:1 Ore apa erubata oo ltung'ana lo losho le Yuda te risioroto oo lmareita lenye nelo abaiki enkalo e moikuape o metabaiki olpolosie le Edom, o metabaiki olpurkel le Sin te nelakua oleng te nkalo emoikuape." 
Joshua15:2 Ore olpolosie lenye le nkalo e moikuape nedumunye te nkiting'oto Enaiposha e Munyan ebaiki olkina le naiposha oing'or enkalo e moikuape: 
Joshua15:3 nelo aipir enkalo e moikuape enkilepakinoto e Akarabim, negiroo o meshomo Sin nelo o metabaiki moikuape e Kadesh-Barnea, aipirakinore Hesron, o metabaiki Adar, neboina o metabaiki Karka," 
Joshua15:4 negiroo o metabaiki Asmon, neipang alo o metabaiki enong'oto e Misiri, nelotu enkiting'oto enye te naiposha. Ele oaku olpolosie linyi te nkalo e moikuape." 
Joshua15:5 Ore olpolosie le nkalo o loo saen naa Enaiposha e Munyan naisukut, o metabaiki enkutuk o lkeju le Yordan. Ore olpolosie le nkalo e kopikop neiteru te mbata e naiposha te nkutuk o lkeju le Yordan;" 
Joshua15:6 nelo ilo polosie o metabaiki Bet-hogla, nelo agiroo kopikop e Bet-araba; nelo ilo polosie o metabaiki osoit le Bohan olayioni le Ruben;" 
Joshua15:7 nelo ilo polosie o metabaiki Debir ebaiki oerata le Akor o meshomo enkalo e kopikop neibelekenya aing'or Gilgal, aa ninye apa natalakinore enkilepakinoto e Adamin, aa ninye apa natii enkalo e moikuape e ilo erata; nelo ilo polosie o metabaiki nkariak e En-shemesh, nelo aiting te En-rogel;" 
Joshua15:8 neitoki ilo polosie adumunye o meshomo embata oerata lo layioni le Hinom te murte moikuape oo Lyebusi (aa taa Yerusalem) nelo ilo polosie o metabaiki enchumata e ilo doinyo o talakinore oerata le Hinom, te nkalo o loo ntoluo te nkalo e moikuape te ine neiting'ie o erata le Refaim;" 
Joshua15:9 neitoki ilo polosie ayiatari te nchumata e ilo doinyo o metabaiki enkong'u oo nkariak e Neftoa nedumunye teine o metabaiki nkanas o ldoinyo le Efron; neitoki ilo polosie aloja nemanaa nelo Baala (aa taa, Kiriat-yearim);" 
Joshua15:10 neman ilo polosie enkalo oloontoluo le Baala o metabaiki oldoinyo le Seir, negiroo o meshomo oljurum lo ldoinyo le Yearim te nkalo e kopikop Kesalon nedoyio o meshomo Betshemesh, nelo agiroo Timna." 
Joshua15:11 Nelo ilo polosie o metabaiki oljurum lo ldoinyo te nkalo e kopikop e Ekron, neitoki ilo polosie aloja nemanaa o meshomo Shikeron, negiroo alo o metabaiki Yabneel; nelo ilo polosie o meiting'oki enaiposha." 
Joshua15:12 Ore apa olpolosie le nkalo o loo ntoluo naa ina aiposha kitok o ilo omanaa lenye. Ele ninye olpolosie omanita iltung'ana le Yuda te risioroto oo lmareita lenye. 
Joshua15:13 Ore te risioroto e nkitanapata o Laitoriani naitanapa Yoshua, eishoo ninye Kaleb olayioni le Yefune erubata ti atua iltung'ana le Yuda, Kiriat-arba, aa taa Hebron (Arba apa menye le Anak)." 
Joshua15:14 Nearaa apa Kaleb te ine lelo ayiok pokira okuni le Anak, Sheshai o Ahiman o Talmai, lelo le ishoi e Anak." 
Joshua15:15 Neilep ninye teine alo aarare lelo oomanya Debir; ore apa enkarna e Debir ti apa naa keji Kiriat-seper. 
Joshua15:16 Nejo apa Kaleb, “Ore Oltung'ani oar Kiriat-seper, neya ninye, naisho nanu ninye Aksa entito ai meyama.”" 
Joshua15:17 Neya Otniel olayioni le Kenas, olalashe le Kaleb, neisho Kaleb ninye Aksa entito ninye meyama," 
Joshua15:18 nejoki meikilikuana papaai lenye meishoo enkop, nedou ninye to sikiria lenye, nejoki Kaleb ninye, “Kainyoo iyie iyieu?”" 
Joshua15:19 Nejoki ninye, “Nchooki nanu enkishoroto; ore kitipika nanu atua enkop e Negeb, nyaaki sii nchooki nanu nkonyek oo nkariak.” Neisho Kaleb ninye nkonyek oo nkariak e shumata o niabori." 
Joshua15:20 Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho loo ltung'ana le Yuda te risioroto oo lmareita lenye. 
Joshua15:21 Ore nkanas naara inolosho loo ltung'ana le Yuda te nkiting'oto e nkalo e moikuape ti alo olpolosie le Edom, naa Kabseel, o Eder, o Yagur," 
Joshua15:22 o Kina, o Dimona, o Adaba," 
Joshua15:23 o Kedesh, o Hasor, o Itnan," 
Joshua15:24 o Sifu, o Talemu, o Bealot," 
Joshua15:25 o Hasor-hadata, o Keriothesron, (aa taa Hasor)," 
Joshua15:26 o Amam, o Shema, o Molada," 
Joshua15:27 o Hasar-gada, o Heshmon, o Bet-pelet," 
Joshua15:28 o Hasar-shual, o Beer-sheba, o Bisiotia," 
Joshua15:29 o Baala, o Iyumu, o Esem," 
Joshua15:30 o Eltolad, o Chesil, o Horma," 
Joshua15:31 o Siklag, o Madmana, o Sansana," 
Joshua15:32 o Lebaot, o Shilhim, o Ain, o Rimon; ore te umata naa nkanas tikitam o obo tenebo inkang'itie kutiti." 
Joshua15:33 Ore te ina kop nagum naa Eshtaol, o Sora, o Ashna," 
Joshua15:34 o Sanoa, o En-ganim, o Tapua, o Enam," 
Joshua15:35 o Yarmut, o Adulam, o Soko, o Aseka," 
Joshua15:36 o Sharaim, o Aditaim, o Gedera, o Gederotaim: nkanas tomon o ong'uan te nebo nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua15:37 O Senan, o Hadasha, o Migdal-gad," 
Joshua15:38 o Dilean, o Mispe, o Yokteel," 
Joshua15:39 o Lakish, o Boskat, o Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 o Kabon, o Laham, o Kitilish," 
Joshua15:41 o Gederat, o Bet-dagon, o Naama, o Makeda: nkanas tomon o ile te nebo nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua15:42 O Libna, o Eter, o Ashan," 
Joshua15:43 o Ifta, o Ashna, o Nesib," 
Joshua15:44 o Keila, o Aksib o Maresha: nkanas naaudo o nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua15:45 O Ekron, te nebo nkanas enyena o nkang'itie kutiti," 
Joshua15:46 ebaiki Ekron o metabaiki enaiposha ina apa pooki natii embata e Ashdod, te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
Joshua15:47 Ashdod, inkang'itie enyena o nkang'itie enyena kutiti o metabaiki enong'oto e Misiri, o enaiposha kitok te nebo olomanaa lenye." 
Joshua15:48 Ore te ina kop oo ldoinyo, naa Shamir, Yatir, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 o Dana, o Kiriat-sana (aa taa Debir)," 
Joshua15:50 o Anab, o Eshtemo, o Anim," 
Joshua15:51 o Goshen, o Holon, o Gilo: nkanas tomon o obo te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
Joshua15:52 O Arabu, o Duma, o Eshan," 
Joshua15:53 o Yanim, o Bet-tapua, o Ajeka," 
Joshua15:54 o Humta, o Kiriat-araba (aa taa, Hebron), o Sior: nkanas naaudo o nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua15:55 O Maen, o Karmel, o Sifi, o Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 o Yesreel, o Yokdeam, o Sanoa," 
Joshua15:57 o Kain, o Gibea, o Timna: nkanas tomon te nebo nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua15:58 O Halhul, o Bet-sur, o Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 o Maarat, o Bet-anot, o Eltekon: nkanas ile te nebo nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua15:60 O Kiriat-baal (aa taa Kiriat-yearim) o Raba: nkanas are te nebo nkang'itie enye kutiti. 
Joshua15:61 Ore ti atua olpurkel, naa Bet-araba, o Midin, o Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibshan, o Enkanasa e Munyan, o En-gedi: nkanas ile te nebo nkang'itie kutiti." 
Joshua15:63 Kake ore Ilyebusi, lelo oomanya Yerusalem, eitu eidimu iltung'ana le Yuda aatarai ninche; neaku etobiko apa Ilyebusi te nebo iltung'ana le Yuda te Yerusalem o metabaiki ena olong." 
Joshua16:1 Ore apa eorikinoto e ishoi e Yosef nelo ebaiki Yordan agiroo Yeriko, o loo saen loo nkariak e Yeriko, o metabaiki atua olpurkel, eilep te Yeriko, o metabaiki atua olpurkel, eilep te Yeriko o metijing'a atua ina kop oo ldoinyo o metabaiki Betel." 
Joshua16:2 Neitoki alo te Betel o metabaiki Lusi, negiroo alo o metabaiki Atarot, ina kop oo Larkit;" 
Joshua16:3 neitoki adoyio aing'or enkalo oloo ntoluo o metabaiki enkop oo Lyafelet o metabaiki ina kop e Bet-horon ti abori, neitoki alo Geser nelo aiting te naiposha." 
Joshua16:4 Ore iltung'ana le Yosef, o Manase o Efraim neng'amu enjung'ore enye." 
Joshua16:5 Ore apa enkop oo le Efraim too lmareita lenye netiu nji: ore olpolosie le njung'ore enye te nkalo o loo saen naa Atarotadar o metabaiki shumata Bet-horon," 
Joshua16:6 nelo ilo polosie o metabaiki enaiposha, te nkalo e kopikop Mikmetal; ore te nkalo o loo saen neloja olpolosie aing'or enkalo e Taanat-shilo, nelo agiroo aimu te nkalo o loo saen o metabaiki Yanoa," 
Joshua16:7 neitoki adoyio alo te Yanoa o metabaiki Atarot o Naara, nerepaa Yeriko, nelo aiting te Yordan." 
Joshua16:8 Ore ebaiki Tapua nelo olpolosie enkalo o loo ntoluo o metabaiki enong'oto e Kana, nelo aiting te naiposha. Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho loo le Efraim too lmareita lenye," 
Joshua16:9 te nebo nena ang'itie naaiteng'elakaki ile Efraim ti atua enjung'ore oo le Manase, nena ang'itie pooki o nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
Joshua16:10 Neitu apa earaa ninche lelo Kanaani apa oomanya Geser: neaku etobiko apa Ilkanaani te mpolos e Efraim o metabaiki ena olong kake etaa rrindiki pee eas esiaai nagol. 
Joshua17:1 Neitokini aaisho erubata olosho le Manase, amu ninye apa olkikau le Yosef. O Makir olkikau le Manase, menye le Gilead, neorikini ninche Gilead o Bashan, amu oltung'ani apa lo larrabal." 
Joshua17:2 Neitokini aaoriki irubat lelo kulikae lo losho le Manase, too lmareita lenye, Abiesa, o Helek, o Asriel, o Shekem, o Hafer o Shenuda; kulo apa ilayiok ootoiuo Manase olayioni le Yosef, too lmareita lenye." 
Joshua17:3 Ore apa Selofehad olayioni le Hefer, olayioni le Gilead, olayioni le Makir, olayioni le Manase, nemeeta apa ilayiok, kake ntoyie apake eeta; naa kuna nkarn e nena toyie enyena: o Mahala, o Noa, o Hogla, o Milka, o Tinsa." 
Joshua17:4 Nepuonu ninche dukuya Eliesa olapolosani o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni o larikok, nejo, “Eitanapa apa Olaitoriani Musa pee eisho iyiook enjung'ore te nebo ilalashera lang.” Neaku ore te risioroto e nkitanapata o Laitoriani eishoo ninye ninche enjung'ore te nebo ilalashera le papaai lenye." 
Joshua17:5 Ina apa pee enoto Manase irubat tomon, metii enkop e Gilead o Bashan, apa naatii lido likae kekun le Yordan;" 
Joshua17:6 enkaraki natang'amutua intoyie e Manase enjung'ore te nebo ilayiok lenyena. Ore enkop e Gilead neorikini lelo kulikae le ishoi e Manase. 
Joshua17:7 Ore enkop e Manase nelo abaiki Asheri o metabaiki Mikmetat apa naa enkalo o loo saen le Shekem; nelo olpolosie enkalo e moikuape o metabaiki lelo oomanya Entapua. 
Joshua17:8 Ore apa enkop e Tapua naa ene Manase, kake ore enkang e Tapua apa natii olpolosie le Manase naa enoo layiok le Efraim." 
Joshua17:9 Nelo ilo polosie adoyio o metabaiki enong'oto e Kana. Ore nkanas tene, te nkalo e moikuape e nong'oto ti atua nkanas e Manase, naa ine Efraim. Nelo apa olpolosie le Manase enkalo e kopikop e ina nong'oto nelo aiting te naiposha;" 
Joshua17:10 ore enkop te nkalo e moikuape naa ene Efraim, ore te nkalo e kopikop naa ene Manase, nelo enaiposha aitayu olpolosie; ore te nkalo e kopikop nebaiki Isaakar." 
Joshua17:11 Ore ake sii ti atua Isaakar o ti atua Asheri neeta apa Manase Betshean o nkang'itie enyena, o Ibleam o nkang'itie enyena, o lelo oomanya Dori o nkang'itie enyena, o lelo oomanya Endor o nkang'itie enyena, o lelo oomanya Taanak o nkang'itie enyena, o lelo oomanya Megido o nkang'itie enyena, ore ene uni naa Nafat." 
Joshua17:12 Ore eyia eitu apa eidimu ilayiok le Manase aaibung'a nena anas; kake eting'iriakinote Ilkanaani aabik te ina kop. 
Joshua17:13 Kake ore apa pee eponari iltung'ana le Israel aagolu, nepik ninche Ilkanaani enkisiaayiare nagol, neitu earaa ninche tukul aaipang'ie." 
Joshua17:14 Neirorie olosho le Yosef Yoshua, ejo, “Kainyoo iyie pee kinchoo nanu erubata nabo o eoroti nabo metaa enjung'ore, hoo nara olosho loo ltung'ana kumok, naatamayiana nanu Olaitoriani aiko nji?”" 
Joshua17:15 Nejoki Yoshua ninche, “Te nirara intae olosho loo ltung'ana kumok, elepa enchom entim, ore te ine, nisiajakinyenye ate enkop te ina kop oo Lperisi o ene Rafaim, amu ore ena kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim naa eironkai te intae.”" 
Joshua17:16 Nejo olosho le Yosef, “Meidip iyiook ena kop oo ldoinyo; ore ake sii kulo Kanaani pooki oomanya enkop naisiaja naa keeta ngarrin oo mbartan oo sekenke, lekua ootii Betshean o nkang'itie enyena o lekua ootii oerata le Yesreel.”" 
Joshua17:17 Neitoki Yoshua ajoki enkaji e Yosef o Efraim o Manase, “Irara intae olosho loo ltung'ana kumok, niatata enkidimata kitok; mintokiki intae aata erubata nabo ake," 
Joshua17:18 kake keaku eninyi ena kop oo ldoinyo, ore hoo naa entim, isiajayieyie intae niyaya ninye aaitabaiki ilpolosien lenyena oolakua; amu iyookiki intae aaraa aaipang'ie lelo Kanaani, hoo neeta ninche ngarrin oo mbartan oo sekenke, hoo naa kegol.”" 
Joshua18:1 Neitoki olturrur pooki loo ltung'ana le Israel auma te Shilo nepik olng'obor le ntumo ine; neirrag apa ina kop naibung'aki te dukuya ninche. 
Joshua18:2 Netelekutua apa ti atua iltung'ana le Israel iloshon oopishana leton eitu eorikini enjung'ore enye. 
Joshua18:3 Nejoki Yoshua iltung'ana le Israel, “Eintashaluoluo akenya o anu mijing'ijing'i atua aapuo aaibung ena kop, apa naishoo intae Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi?" 
Joshua18:4 Enchoru iltung'ana okuni ake to losho, pee airriwaa nanu ninche meshomo aailep nedou te ina kop, nasirakino ninche anaa injung'oreitin enye, neitoki ninche aapuonu enatii nanu." 
Joshua18:5 Nepuo ninche aaor aaitaa irubat naapishana, nebik Yuda te nkop enye te nkalo e moikuape, nebik enkaji e Yosef te nkop enye te nkalo e kopikop." 
Joshua18:6 Naa entisir intae ina kop too orot naapishana niyauu lelo sirat ene natii nanu; amu kaosh nanu enkukuo te nkaraki intae tene te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ang. 
Joshua18:7 Meeta lelo le Lawi erubata ti atua intae, amu empolosare o Laitoriani ninye enjung'ore enye; ore Gad o Ruben o lpisiai lo losho le Manase netang'amutua enjung'ore enye te lido kekun Yordan te nkalo o loo saen, apa naishoo ninche Musa osinka lo Laitoriani.”" 
Joshua18:8 Nedumunye apa lelo tung'ana aaiteru elototo enye; neitanap Yoshua lelo apa ooshomo aasir eoroto e nkop, ajoki, “Enchom elepa nidouu nisirisiri eoroto e nkop, nintokiki aashukunye aapuonu enatii; amu kaosh nanu enkukuo te nkaraki intae tene te dukuya Olaitoriani te Shilo.”" 
Joshua18:9 Neaku eshomo apa lelo tung'ana neilep nedou ti atua ina kop nepik atua embuku eoroto enye anaa too nkang'itie ti atua iorot naapishana; neitoki ninche aapuonu enetii Yoshua too lng'oborri te Shilo," 
Joshua18:10 neosh Yoshua enkukuo te nkaraki ninche te Shilo te dukuya Olaitoriani; neoriki Yoshua enkop te ine iltung'ana le Israel, olosho ake erubata enye." 
Joshua18:11 Neitoki alotu erubata o losho le Benchamen te risioroto oo lmareita lenye, ore ina kop naishooki ninye nejing erishata o losho le Yuda o losho le Yosef." 
Joshua18:12 Ore te nkalo e moikuape neiteru olpolosie lenye te Yordan, neilep ilo polosie alo enkilepakinoto e Yeriko te nkalo e moikuape, neitoki ailep aim ina kop oo ldoinyo te nkalo o loo ntoluo; nelo aiting to lpurkel le Bet-hafen." 
Joshua18:13 Nedumunye olpolosie te ine aim enkalo e kopikop aipir Lusi, o metabaiki enkilepakinoto e Lusi (aa ninye Betel), neitoki ilo polosie adoyio alo Atarot-adar, te nchumata e ilo doinyo otii enkalo e kopikop tiabori Bet-horon." 
Joshua18:14 Neitoki ilo polosie alo aim enkae shoto, aibelekenya te nkalo o loo ntoluo aing'or moikuape te ilo doinyo otii enkalo e moikuape, eipirakinore Bet-horon, nelo aiting te Kiriat-baal (Kiriat-Yearim taa ena), enkanasa nara eno losho le Yuda. Ena naitayu enkalo o loo ntoluo." 
Joshua18:15 Ore te enkalo e kopikop neiteru too mbat e Kiriat-yearim; nelo olpolosie te ine o metabaiki Efron, o meshomo nkonyek oo nkariak e Neftoa;" 
Joshua18:16 neitoki ilo polosie adoyio o meshomo olpolosie lo ldoinyo otalita oerata lo layioni le Hinom, otii enkalo e moikuape eneiting'ie oerata le Refaim; neitoki adoiki oerata le Hinom, enkalo e kopikop enkilepakinoto oo Lyebusi, nedoyio alo En-rogel;" 
Joshua18:17 neitoki alo Gelilot, ina naipirakinore enkilepakinoto e Adumim; neitoki adoyio o meshomo osoit le Bohan olayioni le Ruben;" 
Joshua18:18 negiroo alo o meshomo osegel le Bet-araba nedoyio o meshomo Araba; 
Joshua18:19 neitoki ilo polosie agiroo alo o meshomo moikuape o segel le Bet-hogla; nelo ilo polosie aiting te moikuape olomanaa le Enaiposha e Munyan, te kopikop e Yordan; ele ninye olpolosie le kopikop." 
Joshua18:20 Neitayu Yordan olpolosie lenye te nkalo o loo saen. Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho le Benchamen, te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena, olpolosie ake olpolosie emanaa." 
Joshua18:21 Ore apa nkanas o losho le Benchamen te risioroto oo lmareita lenye naa Yeriko, o Bet-hogla, o Emekesis," 
Joshua18:22 Bet-araba, o Semaraim, o Betel," 
Joshua18:23 Afiim, o Para, o Ofra," 
Joshua18:24 Kefarmoni, o Ofni, o Geba - nkanas tomon o are te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti:" 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon, o Rama, o Beerot," 
Joshua18:26 o Mispe, o Kefira, o Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, o Irpeel, o Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 o Sela, o Ha-elef, o Yebus (aa taa Yerusalem), o Gibea o Kiriat-yearim - nkanas tomon o ong'uan te nebo nkang'itie enye kutiti. Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho le Benchamen te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena." 
Joshua19:1 Neitoki e rubata eare alotu o losho le Simeon te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena; netii apa enjung'ore enye empolos e njung'ore o losho le Yuda. 
Joshua19:2 Neeta apa ninye aitaa enjung'ore enye Beer-sheba, o Sheba, o Molada," 
Joshua19:3 o Hasar-shual, o Bala, o Esem," 
Joshua19:4 o Eltolad, o Betul, o Horma," 
Joshua19:5 o Siklag, o Bet-markabot, o Hasar-susa," 
Joshua19:6 o Betlebaot, o Sharuhen - nkanas tomon o okuni te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti;" 
Joshua19:7 o En-rimon, o Eter, o Ashan - nkanas ong'uan te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti;" 
Joshua19:8 te nebo nena ang'itie pooki kutiti naamanita kuna anas o metabaiki Baalat-beer, o Rama e Negeb. Ena apa enjung'ore o losho le Simeon te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena." 
Joshua19:9 Ore apa enjung'ore o losho le Simeon neitayu ematua e nkop e Yuda; amu ore apa erubata o losho le Yuda; naa eidapash oleng te ninche, netum olosho le Simeon enjung'ore te mpolos e njung'ore enye." 
Joshua19:10 Nelotu erubata e uni te nkaraki olosho le Sebulon, te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena. Ore ina kop e njung'ore enye nelo abaya Sarid;" 
Joshua19:11 neitoki ilo polosie alo enkalo o loo ntoluo, nelo abaya Mareal, nelo aikob Dabeshet, neitoki abaya enong'oto natii enkalo o loo saen le Yoknear;" 
Joshua19:12 nedumunye te Sarid aipir enkae shoto enkalo o loo saen aing'or eneilepunye enkolong o metabaiki olpolosie le Kislot-tabor; nelo te ine o metabaiki Daberat, neitoki ailep alo Yafia;" 
Joshua19:13 nedumunye neim enkalo o loo saen aing'or eneilepunye enkolong o metabaiki Gad-hefer, o metabaiki Et-kasin, nelo o metabaiki Rimon neloja aing'or Nea;" 
Joshua19:14 neitoki alo te nkalo e moikuape aboina olpolosie aing'or Hanaton, nelo aiting to erata le Iftahel;" 
Joshua19:15 o Katat, o Nahalal, o Shimron, o Idala, o Betlehem - nkanas tomon o are te nebo nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua19:16 Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho le Sebulon, te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena - kuna anas te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
Joshua19:17 Nelotu erubata e ong'uan te nkaraki Isaakar, te nkaraki olosho le Isaakar te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena." 
Joshua19:18 Ore olpolosie lenye neitushulu Yesreel, o Kesulot, o Shunem," 
Joshua19:19 o Hafaraim, o Shion, o Anaharat," 
Joshua19:20 o Rabit, o Kishion, o Ebes," 
Joshua19:21 o Remet, o Enganim, o Enhadad, o Bet-pases;" 
Joshua19:22 nelo sii ilo polosie aikop Tabor, o Shahasuma, o Bet-shemesh, nelo ilo polosie lenye aiting te Yordan - nkanas tomon o ile te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
Joshua19:23 Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho le Isaakar te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena - nena anas te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti. 
Joshua19:24 Neitoki alotu erubata e imiet te nkaraki olosho le Asheri te risioroto oo lmareita lenye. 
Joshua19:25 Ore enkop enye neitushulu Helkat, o Hali, o Beton, o Aksaf," 
Joshua19:26 o Alamelek, o Amad, o Mishal; ore te nkalo o loo ntoluo nelo aikop Karmel o Shihor-libnat," 
Joshua19:27 neitoki aibelekenya aing'or enkalo o loo saen, nelo Bet-dagon, o meikobo Sebulon oerata le Iftahel te nkalo e moikuape o meshomo Bet-emek o Niel, neitoki alo te nkalo e moikuape o meshomo Kabul,"
