Joshua19:28 o Ebron, o Rehobu, o Hamon, o Kana o metabaiki Sidon Kitok;" 
Joshua19:29 neitoki ilo polosie aibelekenya aingor enkalo e Rama, ometabaiki enkanasa nasheta sunta e Turo; neitoki ilo polosie alo ometabaiki Hosa, nelo aiting te naiposha; Mahalab, o Aksib." 
Joshua19:30 O Uma, o Afek, o Rehob - nkanas tikitam o are te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
Joshua19:31 Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho le Asheri te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena - kuna anas te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti. 
Joshua19:32 Neitoki alotu erubata e ile te nkaraki olosho le Naftali, te nkaraki olosho le Naftali, te risioroto oo lmareita lenye." 
Joshua19:33 Nedumunye olpolosie lenye te Helef o te Saananim o Adaminekok, o Yabneel, o meshomo Lakum; nelo aiting te Yordan;" 
Joshua19:34 neitoki ilo polosie aboina aing'or enkalo o loo ntoluo o meshomo Asnot-tabor, nelo te ine o metabaiki Hukok, nelo aikob Sebulon te nkalo e kopikop, neikob, Asheri te nkalo o loo ntoluo; neikobYuda te nkalo o loo saen le Yordan." 
Joshua19:35 Ore apa nkanas naasheta sunta naa Sidim, o Seer, o Hamat, o Rakat, o Kineret," 
Joshua19:36 o Adama, o Rama, o Hasor," 
Joshua19:37 o Kedesh, o Edrei, o En-hasor," 
Joshua19:38 o Yironi, o Migdalel, o Horem, o Betanat o Bet-shemesh - nkanas tomon o oudo te nebo nkang'itie enye kutiti." 
Joshua19:39 Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho le Naftali te risioroto oo lmareita lenye - kuna anas te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutit. 
Joshua19:40 Neitoki alotu erubata e naapishana te nkaraki olosho le Dan, te risioroto oo lmareita lenye." 
Joshua19:41 Ore enkop e njung'ore enye neitushulu o Sora, o Eshtaol, o Ir-shemesh," 
Joshua19:42 o Sha-alabin, o Aijalon, o Itla," 
Joshua19:43 o Elon, o Timna, o Ekron," 
Joshua19:44 o Elteke, o Gibeton, o Baalat," 
Joshua19:45 o Yehud, o Bene-berak, o Bat-rimon," 
Joshua19:46 o Me-yarkon o Rakon o ina kop apa naipirakinore Yopa. 
Joshua19:47 Ore ake pee elau lelo le Dan enkop enye, nepuo lelo le Dan aarare Leshem, ore ake pee eidip aaibung'a ina kop nepik ninye olalem neya ninye nemany atua, neipot Leshem aajo, Dan; aaipotie enkarna e nkakuyiaa lenye." 
Joshua19:48 Ena ninye enjung'ore o losho le Dan, te risioroto oo lmareita lenyena - kuna anas te nebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
Joshua19:49 Ore ake pee eidip ninche aatoor enkop aitaa injung'oreitin, neisho lelo tung'ana le Israel enjung'ore ti atua ninche Yoshua olayioni le Nuni." 
Joshua19:50 O teina kitanapata o Laitoriani neisho ninche ninye ina anasa natoomonuo, Timnat-sera te ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim; neitoki ninye ashetu ina anasa nemany atua." 
Joshua19:51 Kuna ninche njung'oreitin apa naatoorikitia Eliesa olapolosani, o Yoshua olayioni le Nuni, o lukuny oo nkajijik oo ltung'ana le Israel, iltung'ana te oshoto e nkukuo te Shilo, te dukuya Olaitoriani, te kutukaji o lng'obor le ntumo. Neaku eidipa apa ninche aatudung enkop." 
Joshua20:1 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Yoshua," 
Joshua20:2 “Tiaki iltung'ana le Israel, ‘Entegelu nkanas naasaruni, apa naa ninche nanu atiaaka intae aimunye Musa," 
Joshua20:3 nchere, ore oltung'ani oar olikae metua eitu eotiki aashu eitu ebaraki neidim akuetiki ine; keaku ninche te intae enesaruni te nkaraki ilo oitalaku elap to sarge." 
Joshua20:4 Neisikaki ninye nabo e nena anas nelo aitashe te nejing'ieki kishomi e ina anasa, nelimu mbaa enyena ainosaki ilpayiani le ina anasa; netum taa ninche aawaita ninye aaitijing'a atua enkanasa; neisho ninye ewueji, neton ninye te nebo ninche." 
Joshua20:5 Naa ore ake te nesuju ilo oitalaku elap to sarge ninye, nemeishooyo ninche ilo otasesekuanishe aapik nkaik enyena, amu etasesekuana apa ninye ilo le latia enye eitu eotiki, meetayie apa ninye olomang'ati too nkolong'i naatulusoitie." 
Joshua20:6 Naa keton ninye ti atua ina anasa o metaba anaa neaku eitasho ninye te dukuya olturrur meiguanareki, o metaba anaa neye ilo ora olapolosani kitok te ina kata; neaku taa keidim ilo apa otasesekuanishe anyaaki ashomo enkang enye makewan o enkaji enye makewan, ina ang apa naa ninye eisikie.’ ”" 
Joshua20:7 Neaku eiteng'ela apa ninche Kedesh te Galilaya ti atua ina kop oo ldoinyo e Naftali, o Shekem ti atua ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim, o Kiriat-arba, (aa taa Hebron) ti atua ina kop oo ldoinyo e Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Ore te lido kekun Yordan te nkalo o loo saen le Yeriko, negelu ninche Beser ti atua ilo purkel le nkop naitoriori, enkop o losho le Ruben, o Ramot ti atua Gilead, enkop o losho le Gad; o Golan ti atua Bashan, enkop o losho le Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Kuna ninche nena anas apa naaiteng'elakaki iltung'ana pooki le Israel, olomoni omanya ina kop atua ninche, pee aa ore pooki ng'ae oar oltung'ani metua eitu eotiki neidim aisikaki ine pee melo ake aye te nkaina e ilo oitalaku elap to sarge o metaba anaa neitashe ninye te dukuya olturrur." 
Joshua21:1 Neitoki aapuonu ilukuny oo nkajijik oo le Lawi enetii Eliesa ilo apolosani o enetii Yoshua olayioni le Nuni o enetii ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loshon loo ltung'ana le Israel; 
Joshua21:2 nejoki ninche te Shilo ti atua enkop e Kanaan, “Eitanapishe apa Olaitoriani aimunye Musa nchere pee eishori iyiook nkanas nikimany te nebo ineeirritishoreki te nkaraki nkishu ang.”" 
Joshua21:3 Neaku ore te nkaraki enkitanapata o Laitoriani neisho iltung'ana le Israel lelo le Lawi kuna anas o neeirritishoreki metaa enjung'ore enye. 
Joshua21:4 Nelotu erubata te nkaraki ilmareita loo Lkohat. Neaku ore lelo le Lawi apa oora ile ishoi e Aron olapolosani neng'amu te oshoto e nkukuo too loshon le Yuda, o Simeon, o Benchamen, nkanas tomon o okuni." 
Joshua21:5 Ore lelo kulikae loo Lkohat neng'amu te oshoto e nkukuo too lmareita lo losho le Efraim o to losho le Dan o to lpisiai lo losho le Manase nkanas tomon. 
Joshua21:6 Neng'amu ile Gershon te oshoto e nkukuo too lmareita to losho le Isaakar, o to losho le Asheri, o to losho le Naftali, o to lpisiai lo losho le Manase nkanas tomon o okuni." 
Joshua21:7 Ore ile Merari te risioroto oolmareita lenye neng'amu to losho le Ruben, o to losho le Gad o to losho le Sebulon, nkanas tomon o are." 
Joshua21:8 Kuna anas apa o neeirritishoreki eishoo iltung'ana le Israel te oshoto enkukuo ile Lawi, anaa apa enaitanapishe Olaitoriani aimunye Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Ore ti alo olosho le Yuda o losho le Simeon neishooyo ninche kuna anas naaipoto too nkarn," 
Joshua21:10 apa naataa ine lelo le ishoi e Aron, obo loo lmareita loo le Kohat apa loo le Lawi; amu ninche etadoikio enkukuo asioki." 
Joshua21:11 Neisho ninche Kiriat-arba (aa Arba taa menye le Anak) aa Hebron taa ina, ti atua ina kop oo ldoinyo e Yuda, te nebo nene wuejitin neeirritishoreki neemanita." 
Joshua21:12 Kake ore nkurman e nkanasa o nkang'itie enyena kutiti neishori Kaleb olayioni le Yefune metaa nkunenyena. 
Joshua21:13 Ore te lelo le ishoi e Aron ilo apolosani neishori Hebron, ina anasa nasaru olotasesekuanishe, te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:14 Yatir te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Eshtemoa te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:15 Holon te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Debir te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:16 Ain te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Yuta te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Bet-shemesh te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas naaudo naaing'uaa kulo oshon pokira oare;" 
Joshua21:17 nepuku sii to losho le Benchamen Gibeon te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Geba te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:18 Anatot te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, o Almon te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas naaudo." 
Joshua21:19 Ore apa nkanas e lelo le ishoi e Aron naa nkanas tomon o okuni te nebo iwuejitin enye neeirritishoreki. 
Joshua21:20 Ore lelo kulikae loo Lkohat oora iloo lmareita loo Lkohat loo Lawi, ore apa nkanas naatoorikiaki ninche naa olosho le Efraim eing'uaa." 
Joshua21:21 Ninche apa eishooki Shekem, ina anasa nasaru olotasesekuanishe, te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki te ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim, Geser te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:22 Kibsa-im te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Bet-horon te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas ong'uan;" 
Joshua21:23 ore inaaing'uaa olosho le Dan naa El-teke te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Gibeton te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas ong'uan; 
Joshua21:25 ore inaaing'uaa olpisiai lo losho le Manase, naa Taanak te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki o Gat-rimon te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas are." 
Joshua21:26 Ore apa nkanas e lelo kulikae tung'ana loo Lkohat naa tomon pooki te nebo iwuejitin enye neeirritishoreki. 
Joshua21:27 Ore te lelo le Gershon, lo olmarei obo loo lmareita le Lawi, neishori olpisiai le nkop e Manase, Golan te Bashan te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas are;" 
Joshua21:28 ore to losho le Isaakar neishori Kishion te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Daberat te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:29 Yarmut te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, En-ganim te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas ong'uan;" 
Joshua21:30 naa ore to losho le Asheri, neishori Mishal te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Abdon te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:31 Helkat te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, o Rehob te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas ong'uan;" 
Joshua21:32 naa ore to losho le Naftali, neishori Kedesh te Galilaya te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, ina anasa e sarunoto te ilo otasesekuanishe, Hamot-dor te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, o Kartan te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas uni." 
Joshua21:33 Ore apa nkanas oo lmareita loo le Gershon naa tomon o okuni pooki te nebo iwuejitin enye neeirritishoreki. 
Joshua21:34 Ore lelo kulikae loo Lawi, lelo mareita loo Lmerari neishori ninche to losho le Sebulon, Yokne-am te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Karta te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Nahalal te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas ong'uan;" 
Joshua21:36 ore to losho le Ruben neishori Beser te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Yahas te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemot te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, o Mefaat te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas ong'uan;" 
Joshua21:38 ore to losho le Gad, neishori Ramot te Gilead te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, ina anasa e sarunoto te ilo otasesekuanishe, Mahanaim te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki," 
Joshua21:39 Heshbon te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki, Yasar te nebo iwuejitin enyena neeirritishoreki - nkanas ong'uan te umata." 
Joshua21:40 Ore ti alo nkanas oo lmareita loo Lmerari, aa taa lelo ootelekutua too lmareita le Lawi, nena apa naatoorikiaki ninche, naa nkanas tomon o are pooki." 
Joshua21:41 Ore apa nkanas oo le Lawi ti atua ina kop oo ltung'ana le Israel naa nkanas artam o isiet pooki te nebo iwuejitin enye neeirritishoreki. 
Joshua21:42 Ore kuna anas neeta ake pooki anasa ewueji enye neirritishoreki namanita ninye; neijia apa etiu te kuna anas pooki. 
Joshua21:43 Neaku eishoo Olaitoriani Israel ina kop pooki apa nainosie ninye olmumai nchere keisho loo menye; ore ake eibung ina kop, nemany ninche ine." 
Joshua21:44 Neisho ninche Olaitoriani enkiyeng'iyeng te pooki shoto anaa apa enainosa ninye olmumai too loo menye; meetae hoo ninye obo loo lmang'ati lenye oidima aitasheikinore ninche, amu eishooyie apa Olaitoriani ilmang'ati lenye pooki apik atua nkaik enye." 
Joshua21:45 Meetae hoo enkisiligata nabo e nena kisiligat apa sidain naaisiligie Olaitoriani enkaji e Israel neitu ebaya; etabaitie pooki. 
Joshua22:1 neitoki Yoshua aipotu ile Ruben o le Gad, o lpisiai lo losho le Manase," 
Joshua22:2 nejoki ninche, “Embung'a intae nena pooki apa naaitanapa intae Musa osinka lo Laitoriani, nitoning'o intae oltoilo lai te nena pooki naitanapa nanu intae;" 
Joshua22:3 eitu intae ipuopuo aaing'uaa ilalashera linyi te kuna olong'i pooki o metabaiki ena olong, kake itorripote intae pee imbung'ubung'u enkitanapata o Laitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Joshua22:4 Ore taata neishoo intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi enkiyeng'iyeng too lalashera linyi, anaa apa enaitanapa ninche; ore naa embelekenyata enchom nkang'itie inyi ti atua ina kop inyi, apa naa ninye eishoo intae Musa osinka lo Laitoriani te lido kekun le Yordan." 
Joshua22:5 Entonyok eng'ura ina kitanapata naishoo intae Musa osinka lo Laitoriani, pee inyorrurru Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, nipuopuo too nkoitoi enyena, nimbung'arere ninye nisiaayiayia ninye to ltau linyi pooki o te nkishui inyi pooki.”" 
Joshua22:6 Neaku etamayiana apa Yoshua ninche neisho ninche meshomo, nepuo ninche nkang'itie enye." 
Joshua22:7 Ore apa olpisiai obo lo losho le Manase neishoo Musa enkop te Bashan; kake ore olikae pisiai eishoo ninche Yoshua enkop te mbata oo lalashera lenye te nkop natii o loo ntoluo le Yordan. Ore ake pee eisho Yoshua ninche meshomo nkang'itie enye nemayian ninche, nejoki," 
Joshua22:8 “Entushukoto enchom nkang'itie inyi te karsisisho sapuk o te nebo nkishu kumok oleng, o enkosholai, o sahabu, o suyai, o esekenkei, o te nebo nkilani kumok; entooriki nena nitaarutua ilalashera linyi.”" 
Joshua22:9 Neaku etushukote apa lelo le Ruben o le Gad o ilo pisiai lo losho le Manase aapuo nkang'itie, aaorore iltung'ana le Israel te Shilo, aa ninye apa natii enkop e Kanaan, aapuo enkop e Gilead, enkop enye maate apa naibung'a maate te nkitanapata o Laitoriani naimua Musa." 
Joshua22:10 Ore ake pee epuonu ninche enkop natii embata e Yordan ti tua enkop e Kanaan neshet ile Ruben o le Gad o lpisiai le Manase olperere lo lasar te ine te mbata e Yordan, olperere lo lasar kitok oleng." 
Joshua22:11 Nening iltung'ana le Israel eji, “Ng'ura etesheta ile Ruben ole Gad o ilo pisiai lo losho le Manase olperere lo lasar te dukuya enkop e Kanaan, ti atua ina kop nataaniki Yordan, te ina shoto apa nara enoo ltung'ana le Israel.”" 
Joshua22:12 Ore ake pee ening iltung'ana le Israel ina, neiturrurro olturrur pooki loo ltung'ana le Israel te Shilo, pee earare ninche." 
Joshua22:13 Neirriwaki iltung'ana le Israel olkilikuai iltung'ana le Ruben o le Gad o ilo pisiai lo losho le Manase te nkop e Gilead, Finehas olayioni le Eliasa olapolosani," 
Joshua22:14 netii te nebo ninye ilaiguanak tomon, obo ake loo loshon loo lmareita le Israel." 
Joshua22:15 Nepuonu ninche enetii ile Ruben, o le Gad o ilo pisiai le Manase te nkop e Gilead, nejoki ninche," 
Joshua22:16 “Nji ejo olturrur lo Laitoriani, ‘Kaa taboi ena nitaasa intae ti alo Enkai e Israel aaibelekenya ena olong aaing'uaa esujata o Laitoriani, te ina niteshetakita ate ena olong olperere lo lasar te ngolong'akinoto o Laitoriani?" 
Joshua22:17 Keitu iyiook kiaas eng'oki sapuk te Peor neton eitu o tene kintisiny ate, naa tenkaraki ninye pee eewuo olmeitai shumata olturrur lo Laitoriani," 
Joshua22:18 eji pee imbelekenyanya ena olong aaing'uaa Olaitoriani? Naa ti nigolong'akiki ena olong Olaitoriani naa kegorokino ninye olturrur pooki le Israel taisere. 
Joshua22:19 Kake ore taata, te nemesinya enkop inyi, entogiru wootu atua enkop o Laitoriani ine netii olng'obor lo Laitoriani, nimbung'akiki ate enkop ti atua iyiook; emigolong'akiki ake duoo intae Olaitoriani, aashu intaa iyiook iloogolong'u te nchetakinoto nishetakiki ate olperere lo lasar leme ilo perere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ang." 
Joshua22:20 Keitu apa eiturraa Akan olayioni le Sera enkirukoto ti alo nena baa naaiteng'elaki, nedoiki engoro olturrur pooki le Israel? Neme ninye ake oidaa te nkitarruoroto enye.’ ”" 
Joshua22:21 Neitoki lelo le Ruben, o le Gad, o lpisiai le Manase aajo te walikinoto e nena lukuny oo lmareita le Israel," 
Joshua22:22 “Olmagilani, Enkai, Olaitoriani! Olmagilani, Enkai, Olaitoriani! Eyiolo ninye; naa nchoo sii Israel eyiolou makewan! Tenaa ei te ngolong'akinoto, anaa te anyata e nkirukoto ti alo Olaitoriani, mileku iyiook taata" 
Joshua22:23 te nkaraki enchetata o lperere lo lasar pee kitum aaibelekenyata aatung'uai esujata o Laitoriani; aashu tenaa eikitaasa iyiook ina pee kitum aaishoru ilasarri oopejori aashu ilasarri le nkurma aashu ilasarri le seriani te nchumata enye, metaa Olaitoriani makewan oitalak iyiook." 
Joshua22:24 A-a, kake kitaasa iyiook te nkuretisho nchere ore te nkata nalotu neidim nkera inyi aatiaki nkera ang, ‘Kaa intae iporokiki Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel?" 
Joshua22:25 Amu eitaa Olaitoriani Yordan olpolosie lang o intae, ore intae ile Ruben o ile Gad; miatata intae erubata ti atua Olaitoriani.’ Neaku keidim nkera inyi aaitapala nkera ang eseremata o Laitoriani." 
Joshua22:26 Neaku kitejo apa, ‘Mateshetu iyiook olperere lo lasar, neme olopejorieki nkishorunot, neme ino lasar." 
Joshua22:27 Kake pee eaku shakeni te iyiook o te intae o ishoritin te siadi iyiook, inchere eikintayu iyiook olasar lo Laitoriani te dukuya ninye too nkishorot ang naapejori o lasarri o nkishorot e seriani; pee meyooki ake nkera inyi aajoki nkera ang te nkata nalotu, Miatata intae erubata ti atua Olaitoriani." 
Joshua22:28 Nikijo apa iyiook, te nelo nejokini iyiook ena aashu eishoi ang te nkata nalotu, nikindim iyiook aatejo, Eng'ura, enkitanyaanyukoto o lperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani, apa naitobira iloo papa, neme too nkishorot naapejori, neme too lasarri, kake pee eaku enchakenisho te iyiook o te intae.’" 
Joshua22:29 Kilome mikigolong'aki iyiook Olaitoriani aaibelekenya ena olong aaing'uaa esujata o Laitoriani te nchetata o lperere lo lasar te nkaraki nkishorot naapejori, o nkishorot e nkurma aashu olasar. Mikishet iyiook likae perere lo lasar meteleku ake ilo perere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ang oitashe te dukuya olng'obor lenye!”" 
Joshua22:30 Ore ake pee ening Finehas ilo apolosani o lelo kituaak lo lturrur o nena lukuny oo lmareita le Israel apa naatii te nebo ninye, lelo rorei ootejo ile Ruben o le Gad o le Manase, neitiship ninche oleng." 
Joshua22:31 Nejoki Finehas ilo apolosani ayioni le Eliesa ile Ruben o le Gad, o le Manase, “Kiyiolo iyiook, ena olong aajo etii Olaitoriani atua iyiook, amu eitu intae iasiasa ena kitarruoroto to Laitoriani; ore taata intajeutuo intae iltung'ana le Israel te nkaina o Laitoriani.”" 
Joshua22:32 Neitoki Finehas olayioni le Eliesa ilo apolosani, o lkituaak aashuko too le Ruben, o le Gad te nkop e Gilead aapuo enkop e Kanaan, enetii iltung'ana le Israel neyaki ilomon." 
Joshua22:33 Neitiship lelo omon lelo tung'ana le Israel, neisis iltung'ana le Israel Enkai, neitu eigil aaimaki olarrabal tialo ninche, pee eidaikie ina kop apa natamanya ile Ruben o le Gad." 
Joshua22:34 Nejo apa ile Ruben o le Gad enkarna e ilo perere lo lasar “Shakeni;” amu etejo ninche, “shakeni ninye te iyiook nchere Olaitoriani ninye Enkai.”" 
Joshua23:1 Ore etulusoitie nkolong'i kumok, eidipa Olaitoriani aishoo Israel enkiyeng'iyeng ti alo ilmang'ati lenye oomanita ninche, netamorua Yoshua oleng neaku oloo larin kumok," 
Joshua23:2 neipotu Yoshua Israel pooki, ilpayiani lenye, o lukuny oo nkajijik, olarishak lenye o lkituaak, nejoki ninche, “Atamorua taata nanu nataa oloo larin kumok;" 
Joshua23:3 nitoduaa intae nena pooki naaitaasa Olaitoriani Enkai inyi kuna kuapi pooki te nkaraki intae, amu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ninye otijing'a olarrabal te nkaraki intae." 
Joshua23:4 Ng'ura, atoorikia nanu intae metaa enjung'ore too loshon linyi nena kuapi naang'or, te nebo nkuapi pooki naidipa nanu aiwuang'ie, ebaiki Yordan o metabaiki enaiposha kitok te nkalo o loo ntoluo." 
Joshua23:5 Kerrumoo ninche arriny siadi Olaitoriani Enkai inyi te dukuya intae nereu ninche aiwuang'ie too nkonyek inyi; naa iyaya intae enkop enye anaa apa enaisiligie intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi. 
Joshua23:6 Metaa entuunoto embung'a niasiasa nena pooki naaigero ti atua embuku oo nkitanapat e Musa, nimimbelekenyanya aaing'uaa aapuo enkalo e tatene aashu enkalo e kedienye," 
Joshua23:7 pee mishularere ake kuna kuapi naatelekutua naatii atua intae, aashu impotipoto nkaitin enye, aashu inyanya olmumai te ninche, aashu isiayiayia ninche, aashu irrugokinono ninche," 
Joshua23:8 kake enteenikinoto Olaitoriani Enkai inyi anaa enitaasa intae o metabaiki ena olong. 
Joshua23:9 Amu etaarayie Olaitoriani te dukuya intae nkuapi kituaak naagol, ore tialo intae meetae oltung'ani oidima aitasheikinore intae o metabaiki ena olong." 
Joshua23:10 Oltung'ani obo te intae odumu enkalifu meisika, amu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi otii olarrabal te nkaraki intae, anaa apa enaisiligie intae." 
Joshua23:11 Entujurroto naa maate, pee inyorrurru Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Joshua23:12 Amu ti nimbelekenyanya aaibung'are olpisiai le kuna kuapi naatelekutua tene ti atua intae niyamama o ninche, pee iyamiyama nkituaak enye neyam nkuninyi," 
Joshua23:13 entayiolo te sipata nchere meitoki Olaitoriani Enkai inyi areu kuna kuapi te dukuya intae; kake keaku ninche orreshet te intae, enchipishipi too sunta inyi o lkiku too nkonyek inyi, o metaba anaa nindaayaya aaishunye tena kop sidai naishoo intae Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Joshua23:14 “Ore naa taata etaa nanu kalo anaa enapuo iltung'ana pooki, niyiololo intae too ltauja linyi o te nkishui inyi, intae pooki, nchere, meetae embae hoo nabo neitu ebaya te nena baa pooki sidain naaisiligishore Olaitoriani Enkai inyi ti alo intae, eetuo pooki aabaya te nkaraki intae, meetae hoo nabo neitu ebaya." 
Joshua23:15 Kake ore anaa enaitabayioki nena baa pooki sidain naaisiligishore Olaitoriani ti alo intae, neijia sii eiko Olaitoriani ayaki intae ntorrok pooki, o metaba anaa nemut intae aiwuang'ie tena kop sidai apa naishoo intae Olaitoriani Enkai," 
Joshua23:16 ti nigiligili olning'o lo sotua lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi, apa oitanapa ninye intae, nipuopuo aaisiai kulie aitin, nirrugokinono ninche. Netum taa engoro o Laitoriani ayupuyupo te nkaraki intae nindaayaya intae aaing'uaa ina kop sidai naishoo ninye intae.”" 
Joshua24:1 Neitoki Yoshua aiturrur iloshon pooki le Israel te Shekem, neipotu ilpayiani, ilukuny oo nkajijik, o larishak o lkituaak le Israel, neyau ninche ate dukuya Enkai." 
Joshua24:2 Nejoki Yoshua lelo tung'ana pooki, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ‘Etamanya apa loo papaai linyi lido kekun Frati, Tera menye le Abraham o Nahori; neisiaai ninche kulie aitin." 
Joshua24:3 Naya apa nanu papaai linyi Abraham aitayu te lido kekun olkeju narik nanu ninye ti atua enkop e Kanaan pooki; naitubul eishoi enye aitaa kumok. Aishoo nanu ninye Isaak; 
Joshua24:4 naisho Isaak Yakobo o Esau. Naisho nanu Esau ina kop oo ldoinyo e Seir meitaa enenye, kake eshomo Yakobo o nkera enyena Misiri." 
Joshua24:5 Nairriwaa nanu Musa o Aron, naar nanu enkop e Misiri te nena nataasa nanu ti atua ninche; ore te siadi naipang'unye nanu intae." 
Joshua24:6 Naipang'unye nanu loo papaai linyi aitung'uaa Misiri, nipuonunu enaiposha; nesuju apa Ilmisiri loo papaai linyi too ngarrin o too mbartan o meetu Enaiposha Nanyokie." 
Joshua24:7 Ore ake pee eishiraki ninche Olaitoriani nepik ninye enaimin erishata intae o lelo Misiri, naisho enaiposha meeu shumata ninche neitemoo ninche; netoduaa nkonyek inyi enaitaasa nanu Misiri; nitotoni intae to lpurkel enkata naado." 
Joshua24:8 Naitoki nanu ayau intae enkop oo Lamori, laa ninche apa ootii lido likae kekun le Yordan; nearare ninche intae, naishoru nanu ninche apik atua nkaik inyi, niyaya intae enkop enye aaitaa eninyi, naidaikie nanu ninche te dukuya intae." 
Joshua24:9 Neitoki adumunye Balak olayioni le Sipor, olaiguanani le Moab, nearare Israel; neirriwaa olkilikuai aitoomon Balaam olayioni le Beor meeu adek intae," 
Joshua24:10 kake eitu nanu aning Balaam; neaku etamayiana ninye intae; neaku atokordua nanu intae aitung'uaa enkaina enye. 
Joshua24:11 Nitalang'utua apa intae Yordan nipuonunu Yeriko, nearare intae iltung'ana le Yeriko, o Lamori sii, o Lperisi o Lkanaan, o Lhiti, o Lgigashi o Lhifi, o Lyebusi; naishoru nanu ninche apik atua nkaik inyi." 
Joshua24:12 Napik nanu enkuretisho dukuya intae naa enkaraki ena apa mme olalem linyi neme enkawuo inyi, natimirayie lelo aiguanak oare loo Lamori." 
Joshua24:13 Aishoo nanu intae enkop neitu iekarere, o nkanas neitu ishetishete, nibikitoto intae ti atua ninche ninyanya ilng'anayio le nkurma o sabibu leitu iunuunu.’" 
Joshua24:14 “Ore naa taata entureita Olaitoriani nisiayiayia ninye to ltau owang o te sipata (metii esunkureisho); ewuang'ie nena aitin apa naaisiaayia iloo papaai linyi te lido kekun Yordan; o te Misiri nisiayiayia Olaitoriani. 
Joshua24:15 Naa ti nimiyieuu intae nisiayiayia Olaitoriani, entegelu ena olong olisiayiayia tenaa ai nena aitin apa naaisiaayia iloo papaai linyi te lido kekun Yordan aashu tenaa ai nena aitin oo Lamori naa enkop enye itii; kake ore nanu o olmarei lai naa aikisiaai Olaitoriani.”" 
Joshua24:16 Newal iltung'ana aajo, “Kilome miking'uaa iyiook Olaitoriani, aapuo aaisiai kulie aitin;" 
Joshua24:17 amu Olaitoriani Enkai ang apa oyaua iyiook o loo papa aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, aitupuku te nkaji e sinkaisho, naa ninye apa otaasa nena kitoduaat sapuki too nkonyek ang, negolie iyiook te ina oitoi pooki apa nikiima o ti atua iltung'ana pooki apa likiimaitie atua ninche;" 
Joshua24:18 nearaa Olaitoriani te dukuya iyiook iloreren pooki, Ilamori apa laa ninche emanya ena kop; metaa eikisiai sii iyiook Olaitoriani, amu ninye Enkai ang.”" 
Joshua24:19 Kake etiaka Yoshua iltung'ana, “Mindimidimi intae aaisiaayia Olaitoriani, amu Enkai sinyati ninye; Enkai o lom ninye; mepalaki ninye nkitarruorot inyi aashu ing'ok inyi." 
Joshua24:20 Tining'uaa intae Olaitoriani aapuo aaisiai nkaitin omon, naa keibelekenya sii ninye neitaas intae entorrono, nemut intae, eidipa aitaasa intae esidai.”" 
Joshua24:21 Nejoki iltung'ana Yoshua, “A-a; eikisiai iyiook Olaitoriani.”" 
Joshua24:22 Neitoki Yoshua ajoki iltung'ana, “Irara intae ilchakenini ti alo intae maate nchere itudutaitie Olaitoriani pee isiayiayia ninye.” Nejo ninche, “Kira iyiook ilchakenini.”" 
Joshua24:23 Nejo ninye, “Ewuang'ie naa nena aitin omon naatii atua intae nimbelekenyakiki oltau linyi Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel.”" 
Joshua24:24 Nejoki lelo tung'ana Yoshua, “Olaitoriani Enkai ang iyiook kisiaai, naa oltoilo lenye iyiook kining.”" 
Joshua24:25 Neitobir Yoshua olning'o o ltung'ana ina olong, neisho ninche nkitanapat o nkikoot te Shekem." 
Joshua24:26 Neiger Yoshua kulo rorei ti atua embuku oo nkitanapat e Nkai; neya osoit kitok neitasheyie te ine ti abori olchani te ine wueji o Laitoriani. 
Joshua24:27 Nejoki Yoshua lelo tung'ana pooki, “Ng'ura, ore ele soit naa keaku shakenisho ti alo iyiook; amu etoning'o ninye irorei pooki lo Laitoriani ootiaka ninye iyiook; metaa keaku shakeni ti alo intae, pee mintaasiasa ake entorroni Enkai inyi.”" 
Joshua24:28 Neisho taa Yoshua iltung'ana meshomo, oltung'ani ake nelo enjung'ore enye." 
Joshua24:29 Ore te siadi kuna baa neye Yoshua olayioni le Nuni, osinka lo Laitoriani, aa oloo larin iip o tomon." 
Joshua24:30 Nenukaa ninche ninye ti atua enjung'ore enye te Timnat-sera, apa naa ninye natii ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim, moikuape o ldoinyo le Gaash." 
Joshua24:31 Neisiaai Israel Olaitoriani too nkolong'i pooki e Yoshua, o nkolong'i pooki e lelo payiani apa ootung'uayie Yoshua, apa ooyiolo esiaai pooki nataasa Olaitoriani te nkaraki Israel." 
Joshua24:32 Ore iloik le Yosef apa ooyautua iltung'ana le Israel te Misiri nenukari te Shekem, ti atua erubata e nkop apa nainyiang'ua Yakobo too layiok le Hamor menye Shekem too mpisai iip; netaa apa ine enjung'ore oo layiok le Yosef." 
Joshua24:33 Neye sii Eliesa olayioni le Aron nenukaa ninche ninye te Gibeya, te nkang e Finehas olayioni lenye, apa naishooki ninye ti atua ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim." 
Judges1:1 Ore te siadi keeya e Yoshua neikilikuanishore iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani ejo, “Kaing'ae ong'as aituruk alo te nkaraki iyiook pee earare Ilkanaani?”" 
Judges1:2 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Yuda oilep alo; ng'ura aishooyie nanu enkop apik atua enkaina enye.”" 
Judges1:3 Nejoki Yuda Simion olalashe lenye, “Ilepu wou te nebo nanu tamanya atua ena kop naatoorikiaki nanu, pee kitum aataarare Ilkanaani; ore sii nanu naa kaiko neijia alo te nebo iyie atua ina kop nikitoorikiaki iyie.” Nelo Simion te nebo ninye." 
Judges1:4 Neilep Yuda alo neishooyo Olaitoriani Ilkanaani o Lperesi apik atua enkaina enye, nemir apa ninche nkalifuni tomon enye te Besek." 
Judges1:5 Nepuonu apa ninche aadoiki Adoni-besek te Besek, nearare ninye, neisulie Ilkanaani o Lperesi." 
Judges1:6 Neisik Adoni-besek; kake etimira, neibung ninye, nedung'oo ninche ilmogirrani lenyena loo nkaik o loo nkejek." 
Judges1:7 Nejo Adoni-besek, “Ore apa ilaiguanak ntomoni naapishana ootudung'oyioki ilmogirrani lenye loo nkaik o loo nkejek naa ti abori emesa ai esotu ndaiki naadoyio; anaa enataasa nanu, neaku aaitalakua nanu Enkai.” Neyau ninche ninye Yerusalem, neye ninye te ine." 
Judges1:8 Nearare iltung'ana le Yuda Yerusalem, neibung, near te nepi o lalem nepik ina anasa enkima." 
Judges1:9 Ore te siadi nena nepuo iltung'ana le Yuda aarare Ilkanaani apa oomanya enkop oo ldoinyo ti atua Negeb o te ina kop nagum. 
Judges1:10 Nelo Yuda aarare lelo Kanaani apa oomanya Hebron, ore apa enkarna e Hebron naa keji Kiriat Arba; near neisulie ninche Sheshai o Ahiman o Talmai." 
Judges1:11 Nedumunye te ine nepuo aarare lelo oomanya Debir. Ore apa enkarna e Debir naa keji Kiriat-sefer. 
Judges1:12 Nejo Kaleb, “Ore ilo orasaki Kiriat-sefer neya ninye, naisho ninye Aksa entito ai meitaa enkitok enye.”" 
Judges1:13 Neya Otniel olayioni le Kenas, olalashe oti le Kaleb, neisho Kaleb ninye Aksa ina tito enye meitaa enkitok." 
Judges1:14 Ore ake pee eyam ninye, neikilikuan Aksa ninye metoomono menye enkop; nedou ninye to sikiria lenye, nejoki Kaleb ninye, “Kainyoo iyieu?”" 
Judges1:15 Nejoki ninye, “Nchooki enkishoroto; ore amu kiterewa nanu mashomo enkop e Negeb, nchooki sii nkonyek e nkare.” Neisho Kaleb ninye nkonyek e nkare e shumata o ni abori." 
Judges1:16 Ore lelo le ishoi e Keni, ilo aputani le Musa, neilep aapuo te nebo iltung'ana le Yuda te ina anasa oo ltuka nepuo ong'ata e Yuda apa natii Negeb embata e Aradi; nepuo ninche aatoni te nebo lelo tung'ana." 
Judges1:17 Nelo Yuda te nebo Simion olalashe lenye, nemir ninche Ilkanaani apa oomanya Sefat, neidaikie tukul. Neaku keji apa enkarna e ina anasa Horma." 
Judges1:18 Ewa sii apa Yuda Gasa te nebo enkop enye, o Ashkelon te nebo enkop enye, o Ekron te nebo enkop enye." 
Judges1:19 Netii apa Olaitoriani te nebo Yuda neya ninye aitaa enenye ina kop oo ldoinyo, kake eitu apa eidimu ataarai aipang'ie lelo oomanya enkisiajata, amu eeta apa ninche ngarrin oo sekenke." 
Judges1:20 Neishooyioki apa Hebron aaisho Kaleb anaa apa enatejo Musa; nearaa Kaleb aipang'ie ti atua ninye lelo ayiok pokira okuni le Anak. 
Judges1:21 Kake eitu earaa iltung'ana le Benchamen Ilyebusi apa oomanya Yerusalem; neaku etobiko apa Ilyebusi te nebo iltung'ana le Benchamen te Yerusalem ometabaiki ena olong. 
Judges1:22 Ore sii apa enkaji e Yosef neilep aapuo aarare Betel; netii Olaitoriani te nebo ninche. 
Judges1:23 Neirriwaa enkaji e Yosef ilaikitalak meshomo aaikeern Betel. (Ore apa enkarna e ina anasa naa keji Lus). 
Judges1:24 Nedol lelo aikitalak oltung'ani eipang'u te nkanasa, nejoki, “Tuutaki sii ake iyiook enkoitoi nalo atua enkanasa, pee kintaas iyie esidai.”" 
Judges1:25 Neitodol ninye ninche enkoitoi nalo atua ina anasa; near ninche ina anasa te nepi o lalem, kake eishoo ninche ilo tung'ani te nebo olmarei lenye meshomo." 
Judges1:26 Nelo ilo tung'ani enkop oo Lhiti nelo ashet enkanasa nejo enkarna enye Lus; ina enkarna enye o metabaiki ena olong. 
Judges1:27 Eitu apa earaa Manase aipang'ie lelo oomanya Betshean o nkang'itie enyena kutiti, aashu Taanak o nkang'itie enyena kutiti, aashu lelo oomanya Dori o nkang'itie enyena kutiti aashu lelo oomanya Ibleam o nkang'itie enyena kutiti, aashu lelo oomanya Megido o nkang'itie enyena kutiti; kake eting'iria Ilkanaani aabik ti atua ina kop." 
Judges1:28 Ore ake pee egolu Israel, nepik ninche Ilkanaani enkisiaayiare nagol, kake eitu earaa ninche aaipang'ie tukul." 
Judges1:29 Eitu apa earaa Efraim aipang'ie lelo Kanaani oomanya Geser; kake etobiko Ilkanaani ti atua Geser te nebo ninche. 
Judges1:30 Eitu apa earaa Sebulon aipang'ie lelo oomanya Kitron, aashu lelo oomanya Nahalol; kake etobiko Ilkanaani ti atua ninche neaku ilenkisiaayiare nagol." 
Judges1:31 Eitu apa earaa Asheri aipang'ie lelo oomanya Ako, aashu lelo oomanya Sidon, aashu ile Ahalab, aashu ile Aksib, aashu ile Helba, aashu ile Afik, aashu ile Rehob;" 
Judges1:32 kake etobiko apa ile Asheri ti atua Ilkanaani lelo oomanya ina kop; amu eitu earaa ninche aaipang'ie. 
Judges1:33 Eitu apa earaa Naftali aaipang'ie lelo oomanya Bet-she-mesh, aashu lelo oomanya Bet-anat, kake etobiko ninche ti atua lelo Kanaani oomanya ina kop; ore ake eyia, ore lelo oomanya Bet-she-mesh, o le Bet-anat netaa ilenkisiaayiare nagol te ninche." 
Judges1:34 Nerrumoki apa Ilamori ile Dan enkop oo ndoinyo, amu eitu apa eisho ninche meetu enkisiajata tiabori;" 
Judges1:35 neng'iri Ilamori aabik ti atua Har-heres, o ti atua Aiyalon, o ti atua Sha-albim, kake eturokine enkaina e nkaji e Yosef ninche te ngolon, neaku ile nkisiaayiare nagol." 
Judges1:36 Ore olpolosie loo Lamori nelo te nkilepunoto e Akrabim ebaiki Sela neilep. 
Judges2:1 Neilep apa olmalaika lo Laitoriani te Gilgal alo Bokim. Nejo ninye, “Ayaua apa nanu intae ailepunye te Misiri, nayau intae atua ina kop apa nainosa olmumai pee aisho loo papaai linyi. Atejo apa, ‘Magil ae kata olning'o lai o intae," 
Judges2:2 nimintobiribiri sii intae olning'o o kulo oomanya ena kop; niaariara ilpereren lenye lo lasar’ kake eitu intae imbung'ubung'u enkitanapata ai. Kainyoo ena nitaasa intae? 
Judges2:3 Neaku ajoki taata intae, maaraa ninche aipang'ie te dukuya intae; kake keaku ninche ilmang'ati te intae, naa keaku nkaitin enye orreshet te intae.”" 
Judges2:4 Ore ake pee eiro ilo malaika lo Laitoriani kulo rorei too ltung'ana pooki le Israel, neyietu iltung'ana aaishir." 
Judges2:5 Neisho ninche ine wueji enkarna aajo Bokim; neitaiki Olaitoriani olasar te ine. 
Judges2:6 Ore ake pee eisho Yoshua iltung'ana meshomo, nepuo lelo tung'ana le Israel oltung'ani ake enjung'ore enye, pee elo aya enkop." 
Judges2:7 Neisiaai iltung'ana Olaitoriani nkolong'i pooki e Yoshua, o nkolong'i pooki e lelo payiani apa ootii te siadi Yoshua, apa ootoduaa ina siaai pooki kitok nataasa Olaitoriani te nkaraki Israel." 
Judges2:8 Neye Yoshua olayioni le Nuni, ilo sinka lo Laitoriani, aa oloo larin iip o tomon." 
Judges2:9 Nenukaa ninche ninye to lpolosie le njung'ore enye te Timat-heres, ti atua ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim, te moikuape oldoinyo le Gaash." 
Judges2:10 Ore apa ina ishoi pooki neishunye sii ninche aaye; neitoki ailepu ae ishoi te siadi ninche, apa nemeyiolo ninye Olaitoriani aashu esiaai apa nataasa ninye te nkaraki Israel." 
Judges2:11 Neas lelo tung'ana le Israel entorrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani neisiaai inkaitin e Baal; 
Judges2:12 neing'uaa ninche Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo menye apa laa ninye nayaua ninche aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri; nepuo ninche aasujaa kulie aitin, ti atua nena aitin oo loreren apa oomanita ninche, neirrugokino ninche; neitagor ninche Olaitoriani." 
Judges2:13 Neing'uaa ninche Olaitoriani, neisiaai inkaitin e Baal o Ashtarot." 
Judges2:14 Neaku eyupuyupo apa engoro o Laitoriani ti alo Israel, neishooyo ninye ninche apik atua nkaik oo lmang'ati lenye nemiraki ninche engolon e lelo mangati oomanita ninche, o metaa meekure eidim aairisha ilmang'ati lenye." 
Judges2:15 Kejo ake maape, negilunore ninche enkaina o Laitoriani te ntorroni anaa apa enatejo Olaitoriani, o anaa sii enainosa Olaitoriani olmumai ti alo ninche, neing'aing'ai ninche oleng." 
Judges2:16 Neput Olaitoriani ilarishak, ooitajeu ninche aaitayu te ngolon e lelo apa ootaraitie ninche." 
Judges2:17 Ore ake eyia eitu ninche ening ilarishak lenye, amu eiborrie onyek esujaa kulie aitin neirrugokino ninche; eibelekenyate apa nabo kata aapong ina oitoi naa ninye apa eima loo menye, lelo apa oibung'a nkitanapat o Laitoriani, neitu ninche eas ina." 
Judges2:18 Ore ake anaa te neput Olaitoriani ilarishak te nkaraki ninche, netii Olaitoriani te nebo ilo arishani, neitajeu ninye ninche aitung'uaa enkaina oo lmang'ati lenye too nkolong'i pooki e ilo arishani; amu eing'urrie apa Olaitoriani ninche te nkaraki osina lenye te nkaraki lelo apa ooisomita ninche neinosie osina." 
Judges2:19 Kake ore apa te neye olarishani, neibelekenya ninche neas ntorrok alang iloo menye, epuo aasujaa kulie aitin, neisiaai ninche neirrugokino ninche; eitu apa ninche epal ae nabo oo mbaa enye torrok aashu nena enye engolong'u." 
Judges2:20 Neaku eyupuyupo apa engoro o Laitoriani te nkaraki Israel; nejo ninye, “Ore enkaraki natigila kulo tung'ana olning'o lai apa laitanapa nanu loo menye, neitu ening oltoilo lai," 
Judges2:21 meekure nanu ebaiki taata aaraa aipang'ie te dukuya ninche hoo ninye olosho obo te lelo apa ootung'uayie Yoshua pee eye," 
Judges2:22 paa ore te ninche natum nanu atetema Israel, tenaa keshilaa aapuo te nkoitoi e Nkai, anaa apa enataasa iloomenye aashu eneitu.”" 
Judges2:23 Neaku etapala apa Olaitoriani lelo oshon, eitu earaa ninche aipang'ie nabo kata, neitu ninye eishooyo ninche apik atua engolon e Yoshua." 
Judges3:1 Kulo apa iloshon ootelekua Olaitoriani pee etemie ninche Israel, aa taa lelo pooki ti atua Israel leitu ae kata eyiolou likae arrabal obo te Kanaan;" 
Judges3:2 enkaraki ena apa pee etum iishoritin oo ltung'ana le Israel aatayioloito olarrabal, pee etum ninye aiteng'ena ninche olarrabal, amu eitu apa eyiolou." 
Judges3:3 Kulo ninche lelo oreren: Ilkituaak imiet loo Lfilisti, o Lkanaani pooki, le Sidon, o Lhafi apa oomanya oldoinyo le Lebanon, ebaiki oldoinyo le Baalhermon ebaiki enejing'ieki Hamat." 
Judges3:4 Ilootemieki Israel apa ninche, pee eyiolouni tenaa keidim Israel aibung'a nkitanapat o Laitoriani apa naaitanapa ninye loo menye te Musa." 
Judges3:5 Neaku etobiko apa iltung'ana le Israel ti atua Ilkanaani, o Ilhiti, Ilamori, Ilperisi, Ilhifi o Lyebusi;" 
Judges3:6 neyam ninche ntoyie enye aaitaa nkituaak enye, ore ntoyie enye maate neisho ilayiok le lelo oreren, neisiaai nkaitin enye." 
Judges3:7 Neas iltung'ana le Israel entorroni too nkonyek o Laitoriani, nerikino ninche Olaitoriani Enkai enye, neisiaai inkaitin e Baal o Asherot." 
Judges3:8 Neaku eyupuyupo apa engoro o Laitoriani ti alo Israel nemir ninche metijing'a atua enkaina e Kushan-rishataim olaiguanani le Mesopotamia neisiaai iltung'ana le Israel Kushan-rishataim ilarin isiet. 
Judges3:9 Kake ore ake pee eishiraki iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani, neisho Olaitoriani olakordunoni te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel, laa ninye apa otokordua ninche Otiniel olayioni le Kenas, olalashe oti le Kaleb." 
Judges3:10 Nelotu Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata ninye, neaku ninye olarishani te Israel; neilep ninye alo olarrabal neishooyo Olaitoriani Kushan-rishataim, olaiguanani le Mesepotamia apik atua enkaina enye; neisulu enkaina enye Kushan-rishataim." 
Judges3:11 Netum taa enkop enkiyeng'iyeng ilarin artam. Neye Otiniel olayioni le Kenas. 
Judges3:12 Neitoki iltung'ana le Israel aaigil aas entorroni too nkonyek o Laitoriani; neitagol Olaitoriani Eglon olaiguanani le Moab metaarare Israel, enkaraki nataasa ninche entorroni too nkonyek o Loitoriani." 
Judges3:13 Neiturrurroki ninye kewan Ilamori o Lmaleki nelo amir Israel neya ninche ina anasa oo ltuka aaitaa enenye. 
Judges3:14 Neisiaai iltung'ana le Israel Eglon olaiguanani le Moab ilarin tomon o isiet. 
Judges3:15 Kake ore ake pee eishiraki iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani neisho Olaitoriani ninche olakordunoni, Ehudi, olayioni le Gera, lolosho le Benchamen, oltung'ani kedienye. Neirriwaa iltung'ana le Israel ninye meyaki Eglon olaiguanani le Moab kodi." 
Judges3:16 Neitobiraki Ehudi kewan olalem opi nkaloli pokira are laa entemet nabo e nkaina o lpisiai enkadoro, neeniki ninye enkupes enye e nkeju e tatene aitabolu nkilani enyena." 
Judges3:17 Neitarasaa ninye ina kishoroto aisho Eglon olaiguanani le Moab, naa oltung'ani apa opir oleng." 
Judges3:18 Ore ake pee eidip Ehudi aitarasai ina kodi, neisho lelo tung'ana meshomo apa ooyautua ina kodi." 
Judges3:19 Kake eibelekenyunye ninye makewan ashukunye te nena kitanyaanyukot oo soito naaguetuno naatii embata e Gilgal, nejo, “Aata nanu olkilikuai laakurraki olaiguanani.” Nejo ninye, “Entigirata.” Ore apa lelo pooki ooisiaaita ninye neipang aapuo aaing'uaa ninye." 
Judges3:20 Nelotu Ehudi enetii ninye, etonita openy ti atua olgilata lenye oirobi le shumata. Nejo Ehudi, “Aata olkilikuai oing'uaa Enkai te nkaraki iyie.” Nedumunye ninye to lorika lenye." 
Judges3:21 Neitorioo Ehudi enkaina enye e kedienye, neshutu olalem te nkupes enye e tatene neisuroki atua enkoshoke enye;" 
Judges3:22 nejing pooki o olkidong'oi lenye, neibung enkurriny ilo alem, amu eitu apa eshutu ilo alem te nkoshoke enye; nebukunye enkorotik e nkoshoke." 
Judges3:23 Neipang'u Ehudi boo, neiken nkutukie oo nkajijik e ilo gilata le shumata, neen." 
Judges3:24 Ore eidipa ashomo, nepuonu ilaisiaayiak; ore pee edol aajo keikeno nkutukie e lelo gilat le shumata, nejo ninche, “Ebaiki naa kewan ebakita ti atua ilo gilata oirobi.”" 
Judges3:25 Neanyisho ninche o metaba anaa nepalari; kake ore ake eton eitu ebol ninye nkutukie e lelo gilat le shumata, neitayu ninche olbolet nebol; neirragita te ine olkitok lenye to ltiren etua." 
Judges3:26 Neisika duoo Ehudi aluaya ina kata eanyisho ninche, nelo agiroo nena kitanyaanyukot naaguetuno too soito, neisik alo Se-ira." 
Judges3:27 Ore ake pee ebaya neosh entarumpeta te ina kop oo ndoinyo e Efraim, nepuo iltung'ana le Israel te nebo ninye aadoyio te ina kop oo ndoinyo, etii ninye dukuya ninche." 
Judges3:28 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Entusujuaki; amu eishorua Olaitoriani ilmang'ati linyi lelo Moabu apik atua enkaina inyi.” Neaku etadoitie apa ninche aasujaa ninye, neibung ilang'at olkeju le Yordan naaimu Ilmoabu, neitu ninche eisho hoo oltung'ani obo metalang'u." 
Judges3:29 Near ninche ina olong iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni tomon loo Lmoabu, oogol pooki, eitu ninye eimisho obo." 
Judges3:30 Neaku etimiraki apa Moab ina olong nejing abori enkaina e Israel. Netum apa ina kop enkiyeng'iyeng too larin ntomoni isiet. 
Judges3:31 Ore te siadi ninye naa Shamgar olayioni le Anat, apa laa ninye otara metuata iltung'ana iip ile loo Lfilisti te ng'udi nareyieki lmong'i, netokordua sii ninye Israel." 
Judges4:1 Neigil ake iltung'ana le Israel aas entorrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani, ina kata eidipa Ehudi atua." 
Judges4:2 Nemir Olaitoriani ninche metijing'a atua enkaina e Yabin olaiguanani le Kanaan, apa laa ninye oitoreisho te Hasor; ore apa olarikoni le njore enye naa Sisera, nemanya apa ninye Harosheta-goiim." 
Judges4:3 Neitoki iltung'ana le Israel aaishiraki Olaitoriani metaretu; amu eeta apa ninye ngarrin iip naaudo oo sekenke, neisomita apa iltung'ana le Israel te nkisikong'ata too larin tikitam." 
Judges4:4 Ore apa Debora enkoiboni e Nkai, ina kitok e Lapidot, naa ninye apa narishita Israel te ina kata." 
Judges4:5 Neton apa ninye te ntonata o ltukai le Debora te rishata e Rama o Betel ti atua ina kop oo ndoinyo e Efraim; neilepu iltung'ana le Israel aapuonu enetii ninye te rishare. 
Judges4:6 Neirriwaa ninye olkilikuai aipotu Barak olayioni le Abinoam te Kedesh ti atua Naftali, nejoki ninye, “Kintanapa iyie Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ejo, ‘Shomo, nturrurro iltung'ana linono to ldoinyo le Tabor iwa iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon lo losho le Naftali o lo losho le Sebulon." 
Judges4:7 Naa kayietu nanu Sisera, ilo kitok le njore e Yabin, pee kilotu atumore te mbata o lkeju le Kishon te nebo ngarrin enyena o ltimito lenyena; naa kaishoru nanu ninye apik atua enkaina ino.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Nejoki Barak ninye, “Ti nilo iyie te nebo nanu, nalo, kake te nimilo iyie te nebo nanu, nemalo nanu.”" 
Judges4:9 Nejo ninye, “Ore te sipata kalo nanu te nebo iyie; ore eyia, ore ina oitoi niim iyie nemeyau enkisisa ino, amu kemir Olaitoriani Sisera apik atua enkaina e nkitok.” Nedumunye Debora alo te nebo Barak Kedesh." 
Judges4:10 Neipotu Barak Sebulon o Naftali meetu Kedesh; neilep iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon aasujaa ninye, nelo sii Debora te nebo ninye." 
Judges4:11 Netoorote apa Heberi ilo le Keni o Lkeni, lelo le ishoi e Hobabu olaputani le Musa, nelo aunoki olng'obor lenye olchani onyaanyukie olng'aboli te Sa-ananim, apa nataaniki Kedesh." 
Judges4:12 Ore ake pee elikini Sisera nchere eshomo Barak olayioni le Abinoam oldoinyo le Tabor," 
Judges4:13 neipotu Sisera ngarrin enyena pooki, ngarrin iip naaudo oo sekenke, o lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye, ebaiki Haroshet-hagoiim o metabaiki olkeju le Kishon." 
Judges4:14 Nejoki Debora Barak, “Tudumunye! Amu ena olong eishooyie Olaitoriani Sisera apik atua enkaina ino. Aime Olaitoriani olo te dukuya iyie?” Nedoiyio Barak to ldoinyo le Tabor tenebo iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon oosujita ninye." 
Judges4:15 Nemir Olaitoriani Sisera o ngarrin enyena pooki o enjore enye pooki te dukuya Barak nepik enepi olalem; nedou Sisera te ngarri enye neisik alo too nkejek. 
Judges4:16 Nesujaa Barak nena garrin o mbartan o enjore o meshomo Haroshet-ha-goiim, ore ina jore pooki e Sisera nebatata te nepi olalem; eitu ninye eleku oltung'ani." 
Judges4:17 Kake eisika apa Sisera too nkejek o meshomo olng'obor le Yael, enkitok e Heberi loo Lkeni, amu etii apa eseriani erishata e Yabin olaiguanani le Hasor o enkaji e Heberi ilo Keni." 
Judges4:18 Neipang'u Yael alotu anang'are Sisera, nejoki ninye, “Wou, olkitok lai, wou enkaji ai, miureishoyu.” Neaku eibelekenyunye ninye ajing atua olng'obor lenye neimulumul ninye to lmukeka." 
Judges4:19 Nejoki Sisera ninye, “Nchooki siaake enkiti are naok; amu kaata enkure.” Nebol ninye olbene lo lchoni le kule neisho ninye metooko neitoki aimulumul ninye." 
Judges4:20 Nejoki ninye, “Ntasho te kutuk aji o lng'obor, naa ore pooki tung'ani likilotu aikilikuan ajoki, ‘Ketii oltung'ani ene?’ Tejo, ‘Metii.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Kake eewa apa Yael ina kitok e Heberi encheitoi o Lng'obor, neya enyuntu te nkaina enye, nelo ninye aakutiti, neoshoki encheitoi eseder enye nepudaki enkop, kaae neye ninye te nauri." 
Judges4:22 Naa ng'ura ore esujita Barak Sisera nelo Yael anang'are ninye, nejoki ninye, “Wou maaitoduaa ilo tung'ani ligira aing'oru.” Nelo ninye atua olng'obor lenye, neirrag Sisera te ine etua, etii encheitoi o lng'obor olpura le nkomom enye." 
Judges4:23 Neaku ore apa ina olong etimira Enkai Yabin olaiguanani le Kanaan te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel. 
Judges4:24 Netum enkaina oo ltung'ana le Israel engolon oleng ti alo Yabin ilo aiguanani le Kanaan, o metaba anaa neidaikie Yabin olaiguanani le Kanaan." 
Judges5:1 Ore apa ina olong nerany Debora o Barak olayioni le Abinoam. 
Judges5:2 “Ore enkaraki natijing'a ilkituaak dukuya te Israel, ore enkaraki naitayutuo iltung'ana ate te yieunoto, meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Judges5:3 Entoning intae Laaiguanak, enchoru enkiok, lo kituaak; Olaitoriani nanu aranyaki, kaoshoki nanu olkerempe, Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel." 
Judges5:4 Olaitoriani, ore ishomo iyie aaing'uaa Seir, nilo iyie te nkop e Edom, neikirikira enkop, neitong'u shumata, ee, neitong'u inkatambo enkare." 
Judges5:5 Neikirikira ildoinyo te dukuya Olaitoriani, lido Sinai te dukuya Enkai e Israel." 
Judges5:6 Ore apa too nkolong'i e Shamgar, olayioni le Anat, ore apa too nkolong'i e Yael, eishunye ilapuayak, ore lelo oopuaya neim embata oo nkoitoi." 
Judges5:7 Eishunye iloing'ok te Israel, eishunye ninche o metaba anaa nilotu iyie Debora alotu anaa ng'otonye te Israel." 
Judges5:8 Te negeluni apa kulie aitin, neaku nchomito etii olarrabal, Amaa, ketumi apa elong'o anaa empere ti atua nkalifuni artam te Israel?" 
Judges5:9 Eipirta oltau lai ilarikok le njore e Israel, lelo apa ooitayutuo ate te yieunoto ti alo iltung'ana. Meisisi Olaitoriani." 
Judges5:10 Embalunye ninye, intae ilooked isirkon barrikon, intae ilootonie ilmukekani oogol enkinyiang'a, o intae iloopuo te nkoitoi." 
Judges5:11 Ore too ltoiloishi loo laranyak, too wuejitin oo nkariak, ore te ine nelikioo aaigil nkisulat o Laitoriani, enkisulata oo loing'ok lenye ti atua Israel. Neruko aadoyio aaim nchomito iltung'ana lo Laitoriani." 
Judges5:12 Inyo, Inyo, Debora! Inyo, inyo taranya osinkolio! Tudumunye, Barak, toriko lelo litarayie, La ayioni le Abinoam." 
Judges5:13 Nedoyio aapuo ilo pisiai loo lkituaak; neruko aadoyio iltung'ana lo Laitoriani, te nkaraki ninye, aapuo aarare lelo magil." 
Judges5:14 Ore ebaiki Efraim nepuonu ninche aaipang'u nejing oerata, kisujita iyie Benchamen tenebo iltung'ana linono; ore te Makir neruko ilkituaak aapuo, ore te Sebulon neruko aapuo lelo oonap esiare o larikoni." 
Judges5:15 Eetuo ilkituaak le Isaakar te nebo Debora, o Isaakar oisiligayu te Barak; atua ilo erata ekuetikitia aasuj ninye. Ore ti atua ilgilat le Ruben netii apa eoro sapuk." 
Judges5:16 Kainyoo iyie pee itotona too ntare ijo pee ining nkisulat oo ntare? Ore ti atua ilgilat le Ruben netii eoro sapuk eitu emut tenaa keidim aaetu. 
Judges5:17 Etotona Gilead te lido kekun Yordan; oo Dan, kainyoo pee etotona ninye too melin? Etotona Asheri aitirring'a to lomanaa le naiposha, neton abik te nedounyeki." 
Judges5:18 Ore Sebulon naa olorere otipika enkishui batisho o metabaiki keeya neijia sii etiu Naftali, too neerupa ti ong'ata." 
Judges5:19 Eetuo ilaiguanak, neitayu olarrabal; nearare ilaiguanak le Kanaan, te Taanak, te mbata oo nkariak e Megido; neitu ninche etum iyarunot e nkosholai." 
Judges5:20 Ore te shumata keper etarate ilakir, ore epuoito ninche nearare Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Ore ilo keju le Kishon onang'ari neya ninche, ina are naisarrisar, olkeju le Kishon. Lo tau lai, shomo dukuya te ngolon." 
Judges5:22 Neitayu oltoilo le ndarata nkejek oo mbartan, engorori, aang'orori mbartan o larrabal." 
Judges5:23 Tediaa Meros, neijia ejo olmalaika lo Laitoriani, tediaa te nduaran lelo oo manya ninye, amu eitu ninche epuonu aaretu Olaitoriani, aapuonu aaretu Olaitoriani earare lelo magil." 
Judges5:24 Emayiana Yael aisul too nkituaak, ina kitok e Heber loo Lkeni, emayiana aisul ti atua nena kituaak naamanya lng'oborri." 
Judges5:25 Eikilikuanua ninye enkare neisho ninye kule, eyaka ninye kule naaoto te ngirra e nkitoo." 
Judges5:26 Etipika ninye enkaina enye encheitoi o lng'obor, ore te enkaina enye e tatene neibung enyuntu o laisiaayiani, neosh ninye Sisera, nedany endukuya enye, neud eseder enye." 
Judges5:27 Eirruge ninye nebatata, neirrag ninye too nkejek e Yael; too nkejek enyena eirruge neirrag, ore ine neirrugore neirrag etua." 
Judges5:28 Te lusie ninye eturumishe, neishir ng'otonye e Sisera erumisho te lusie, ‘Kainyoo pee eimutie engarri enye oo mbartan eitu elotu? Kainyoo pee eimutie oltoilo loo nkejek oo ngarrin enyena oo mbartan?’" 
Judges5:29 Ore nena kituaak enyena ng'eni newaliki, A-a, etawalikia ninye kewan," 
Judges5:30 ‘Aimetumito neorita nena naataarutua, neya ake oltung'ani entito nabo aashu are; ore te Sisera naa inkilani oomuain kumok, inkilani naaikodo, mpukunot are oomuain naaikodo te murt ai anaa iyarunot?’" 
Judges5:31 Meidaa aaiko neijia ilmang'ati linono Olaitoriani! Kake ore ilchoreta nchoo eilepu anaa enkolong eilepu te ngolon enye.” Netum apa enkop enkiyeng'iyeng ilarin artam. 
Judges6:1 Etaasa apa iltung'ana le Israel entorrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neishooyo Olaitoriani ninche apik atua nkaik e Midian ilarin oopishana." 
Judges6:2 Netum enkaina e Midian engolon alang Israel; ore te nkaraki Midian neitaiki iltung'ana le Israel ate ngumot too ldoinyo, o nkapuniaa o sempewueti." 
Judges6:3 Amu ore ake enkata pooki naun Isiraeli ilanterera, nepuonu Ilmidian o Ilmaleki o iltung'ana lo loo saen aarasaki ninche;" 
Judges6:4 nepuonu ninche aaitayu ilng'oborri aarare ninche neinyal nena daiki naatuunoki, o metabaiki elatia enye Gasa, neing'uaa Israel metii endaa, nemetii enker aashu olkiteng aashu osikiria." 
Judges6:5 Amu kepuonu apa ninche te nebo nkishu enye o lng'oborri lenye, nepuonu eba anaa olmaati te nkumoi; ore ninche o ntamesin enye meikenayu, neaku keinyal apa enkop te nepuonu." 
Judges6:6 Neitadou apa Midian Israel oleng," 
Judges6:7 neishiraki iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani te nkaraki Ilmidian," 
Judges6:8 neirriwaki Olaitoriani iltung'ana le Israel oloiboni; nejoki ninche, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: Atorikoyie apa nanu intae ailepunye aitung'uaa Misiri, naipang'unye intae te nkaji esinkaisho;" 
Judges6:9 nakordu intae te nkaina oo Lmisiri o te nkaina e lelo pooki ooibooki intae enkop, naaraa ninche te dukuya intae, naisho intae enkop enye;" 
Judges6:10 najoki nanu intae, ‘Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi; mintokiki intae aayanyitu inkaitin oo Lamori, laa atua enkop enye imanyanya!’ Kake eitu intae ining'ining'i oltoilo lai.”" 
Judges6:11 Nelotu apa olmalaika lo Laitoriani neton ti abori olchani te Ofra, apa laa ole Yoash Olabiesiri, ina kata apa eidong'ito olayioni lenye Gideon enkano te nkironyet oo sabibu, ejo pee eisudoo tenkaraki Ilmidian." 
Judges6:12 Neipang'aki olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninye nejoki, “Etii Olaitoriani te nebo iyie, iyie oloing'oni magilani.”" 
Judges6:13 Nejoki Gideon ninye, “Aatoomono, olkitok, amaa tenaa ketii Olaitoriani te nebo iyiook, kainyoo naa pee etadoikitio kuna iyiook pooki? Naa koree nkiasin enyena pooki e nking'asia apa naainosakitia iyiook iloo papa, ejo, ‘Keitu ninye eilepunye iyiook Olaitoriani aitung'uaa Misiri?’ Kake ore taata eiturrayie iyiook Olaitoriani neishooyie iyiook apik atua nkaik oo Lmidian.”" 
Judges6:14 Neibelekenyakino Olaitoriani ninye nejoki, “Shomo tena magilanisho ino tokordu Israel te nkaina e Midian; aime nanu laairriwayie?”" 
Judges6:15 Nejoki ninye, “Aatoomono, Olaitoriani, kaji nanu aiko te nakordu Israel? Ng'ura, ajo ore olgilata lang naa ninye oloti te Manase, naa nanu oloti lo lmarei lang.”" 
Judges6:16 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Ee, kake atii nanu te nebo iyie, naa iosh iyie Ilmidian anaa oltung'ani obo.”" 
Judges6:17 Nejoki ninye, “Tenaa taata kanoto omom te iyie, ntoduaaki naa olmonekie inchere iyie doi ilo likirorie nanu." 
Judges6:18 Milo iyie aing'uaa ene, aatoomono, o metaba anaa nalotu nanu enitii, pee ayau enkishoroto ai, nairragie te dukuya iyie.” Nejo ninye, “Katon nanu o metaba anaa nishukunye.”" 
Judges6:19 Neaku eshomo Gideon enkaji enye neyieng olkuoo, neitobir imukateni neitu eisuijieki e nkurma; nepik nkiri atua enkikapu, nepik imotori atua emoti, neyaki ninye ti abori olchani, neitarasaki ninche." 
Judges6:20 Nejoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani ninye, “Ntayu nena kiri o nena mukateni neitu eisuijieki tipika ninche enchumata ena dapidapoi nibukoki imotori shumata ninche.” Neiko ninye neijia." 
Judges6:21 Neitoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani aitorioo ina ng'udi apa natii enkaina enye, neiseyie nena kiri o nena mukateni apa neitu eisuijieki; neipang'u enkima teine te ndapidapoi neinos nena kiri o nena mukateni neitu eisuijieki; neimin ilo malaika lo Laitoriani too nkonyek enyena." 
Judges6:22 Nemusu taa Gideon inchere olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninye; nejo Gideon, “Oi nanu, Olaitoriani Enkai! Amu atoduare nanu olmalaika lo Laitoriani king'ura too nkomomi.”" 
Judges6:23 Kake etiaka Olaitoriani ninye, “Metaa eseriani te nebo iyie, miureishoyu, miye iyie.”" 
Judges6:24 Neshetaki Gideon te ine Olaitoriani olperere lo lasar, nejo ninye, “Olaitoriani eseriani.” Ore ebaiki ena olong neton eitashe ilo perere te Ofra nara enoo Ilabiesi." 
Judges6:25 Ore ina kewarie nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Iwa oloing'oni li are le papaai lino, ilo oing'oni le papaai lino loo larin oopishana, niuroki enkop ilo perere lo lasar le Baal oata papaai lino, nidung ina Ashera natii embata enye;" 
Judges6:26 nishet olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ino te nchumata o sempewuet tene, nirragie isoito aitobiraki, niyau ilo oing'oni li are nintaa olasar opejori te nena keek e ina Ashera nidung meirraga te nkop.”" 
Judges6:27 Neya Gideon iltung'ana tomon te lelo aisiaayiak lenyena, neas anaa enatiaka Olaitoriani ninye, kake ore amu keure apa aataas dama te nkaraki olmarei lenye, o lelo tung'ana le ina ang, etaasa apa ninye ina kewarie." 
Judges6:28 Ore pee einyototo iltung'ana te ina ang tadekenya enasirie ng'ura etigilaki olperere lo lasar le Baal, ore ina Ashera apa natii embata enye netudung'oki meirraga te nkop, ore ilo oing'oni li are neitaaki olasar te nchumata e ilo perere lo lasar oteshetaki." 
Judges6:29 Nejokino ninche maate, “Kaing'ae otaasa ena?” Ore ake pee eidip aatakekenu neikilikuanu, nejo ninche, “Gideon olayioni le Yoash otaasa ena.”" 
Judges6:30 Nejoki iltung'ana te ina ang Yoash, “Mpang'unye olayioni lino, pee etum atua, amu etusulua ninye olperere lo lasar le Baal, netudung'o ina Ashera natashare.”" 
Judges6:31 Nejoki Yoash lelo pooki apa ooing'orunore ninye, “Ai Baal ing'oring'oro intae? Arashu orrekie lenye igolielie? Ore oloba anaa oloing'or ninye neyookini aar metua tadekenya. Tenaa ke nkai ninye nchoo eing'or kewan amu etusulayioki aauroo olperere lenye lo lasar.”" 
Judges6:32 Neaku ore ebaiki ina olong etaa keji ninye Yerubaal, aa taa, “Nchoo Baal eng'or agilunore ninye” amu etusulayie ninye auroo olperere lenye lo lasar." 
Judges6:33 Neitoki iltung'ana le Midian o le Amaleki o iltung'ana le nkalo o loo saen aaipotuno te nebo, nelang'u Yordan neshet ilng'oborri to oerata le Yesereel." 
Judges6:34 Nelotu Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata Gideon, neosh ninye entarumpeta neipotuni iltung'ana le Abiesiri metusujai ninye." 
Judges6:35 Neirriwaa ninye ilkiliku meshomo atua Manase pooki, neipotuni sii ninche metusujai ninche. Neitoki airriwaa ilkiliku meshomo Asheri, o Sebulon, o Naftali neilep ninche aapuo aanang'are ninche." 
Judges6:36 Neitoki Gideon ajoki Enkai, “Tenaa eikordu iyie Israel te nkaina ai anaa enitejo," 
Judges6:37 ng'ura, kairragie nanu endapana enker te wueji neidong'ieki enkano; ore ake pee ejing enkoleelio endapana ake, netoyio enkae wueji pooki, nayiolou taa ajo ikordu iyie Israel te nkaina ai, anaa enitejo iyie.”" 
Judges6:38 Netiu neijia. Ore ake pee einyototo ninye tadekenya enasirie neirony ina dapana, neironyu enkoileelio naiputa olbakuli enkare." 
Judges6:39 Neitoki Gideon ajoki Enkai, “Mincho iyie engoro ino eyupuyup ti alo nanu, kake nchooki nanu mairoro ena kata nabo ake, aatoomono, nchooki nanu manyaaki atem ena kata nabo endapana; aatoomono, nchoo endapana ake metoyio, ore enkae kop pooki nchoo ejing enkoileelio.”" 
Judges6:40 Neiko Enkai neijia ina kewarie; amu etoyio apa endapana ake, ore enkop pooki nejing enkoileelio." 
Judges7:1 Neitoki Yerubaal (aa taa Gideon) o lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye aadumunye tadekenya nepuo aaitayu ilng'oborri te mbata enchorro e Harod; netii apa ilng'oborri le Midian moikuape enye, embata oldoinyo le More, ti atua oerata." 
Judges7:2 Nejoki Olaitoriani Gideon, “Eikumok kulo tung'ana ootii te nebo iyie te nanu, te naishoru ile Midian apik atua nkaik enye, mewuasayu ake Israel ti alo nanu, ejo, ‘Enkaina ai makewan naatokordua nanu." 
Judges7:3 Ore naa taata mbalunye too nkiyiaa oo ltung'ana, tejo, ore pooki ng'ae otureishe neikirikira, nchoo ninye eshuko alo ang.’ ” Netem Gideon ninche, neshuko iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oare, neleku iltung'ana tomon." 
Judges7:4 Nejoki Olaitoriani Gideon, “Eton aa kumok kulo tung'ana oleng; toriko ninche metadoi aapuo enkare pee atem nanu ninche te ine; ore olaajoki nanu, ‘Kelo ele tung'ani te nebo iyie,’ nelo te nebo iyie, ore oloba anaa olaajoki, ‘Melo ele tung'ani te nebo iyie’, melo ninye.”" 
Judges7:5 Nerik ninye iltung'ana enkare; nejoki Olaitoriani Gideon, “Ore pooki oilab enkare to lng'ejep lenye, anaa enailab oldia, taaraki ninye enkalo nabo, neijia ake sii nkuna ilo ogil kung aok enkare.”" 
Judges7:6 Ore esiana e lelo ooilap enkare, epik nkaik enye nkutukie enye naa iltung'ana iip uni; kake ore ilkulikae tung'ana pooki negil kung aaok enkare." 
Judges7:7 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Gideon, “Ore te lelo tung'ana iip uni ooilap enkare naa kakordu nanu intae napik iltung'ana le Midian atua inkaik inyi; naa nchoo lelo kulikae tung'ana meshomo pooki tung'ani enkang enye.”" 
Judges7:8 Neya ninye iltooi le lelo tung'ana o ntarumpetani too nkaik enye, neisho ninye lelo kulikae pooki le Israel meshomo ake oltung'ani olng'obor lenye, kake eiboo lelo tung'ana apa iip uni; netii apa ilng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Midian abori ninye to erata." 
Judges7:9 Ore apa ina kewarie nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Tudumunye shomo tadoi taara enkang oo lng'oborri, amu aishorua nanu apik enkaina ino." 
Judges7:10 Kake ti niure iyie ashomo, tadoi shomo ina ang oo lng'oborri te nebo Pura, osinka lino;" 
Judges7:11 amu ilo iyie aning enejo ninche; ore te siadi ina nikigolu oshoke pee ilo arasaki lelo ng'oborri.” Nedoyio ninye alo te nebo Pura, ilo sinka lenye, nepuo enetii iltung'ana oobayie ooata imasaa olarrabal le lelo ng'oborri." 
Judges7:12 Ore lelo tung'ana le Midian o le Maleki o ltung'ana pooki lo loo saen neirrag to erata eba anaa olmaati te nkumoi; ore ntamesin enye nemeikenayu, eba anaa osinyai le nkiyopata e naiposha te nkumoi." 
Judges7:13 Ore ake pee elotu Gideon, ng'ura etii oltung'ani oinosaki ole ncholiek enye enkidetidet; nejoki, “Ng'ura aidetidetua nanu emukate natadoikio atua enkang oo lng'oborri le Midian, nelotu olng'obor obo, neosh neibelekeny airragie ti oriong, neaku tenkop eirrag ilo ng'obor.”" 
Judges7:14 Newaliki ilo oboitare ajoki, “Mme likae ele leme olalem le Gideon olayioni le Yoash, oltung'ani le Israel; atua enkaina enye etipika Enkai Midian o lorora lenye pooki.”" 
Judges7:15 Ore ake pee ening Gideon elimunoto e ina kidetidet o empukunoto enye, neserem; neshuko alo ilng'oborri le Israel, nejo, “Entudumunye, amu eishorua Olaitoriani ilo orora le Midian apik atua enkaina inyi.”" 
Judges7:16 Neor ninye lelo tung'ana iip uni aitaa ilturrurri okuni, nepik intarumpetani nkaik enye pooki, o iltooi lemetii enkare, nepik ilkilang'ilang'eta ti atua nena tooi." 
Judges7:17 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Eng'uraki nanu, niasiasa enaas; te nalotu nanu auluo e nkang oo lng'oborri entaas anaa enaas nanu." 
Judges7:18 Te naosh nanu entarumpeta, nanu o lelo pooki ootii te nebo nanu, entoosh sii intae intarumpetani te pooki shoto e nkang oo lng'oborri, nibuakuku aajo, ‘Te nkaraki Olaitoriani o te nkaraki Gideon.’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Nelotu Gideon o lelo tung'ana iip apa ootii te nebo ninye auluo e nkang oo lng'oborri te mpolos e nkewarie, ina kata ake pee eibelekenya ilarripok, nekut ninche intarumpetani, nedany lelo tooiapa ootii nkaik enye." 
Judges7:20 Neosh lelo turrurri okuni intarumopetani nedany lelo tooi; neibung too nkaik enye e kedienye inkilang'ilang'eta; ore too nkaik enye e tatene neibung'ita intarumpetani pee eosh; nebuaku ninche aajo, “Olalem lo Laitoriani o Gideon!”" 
Judges7:21 Neitashe ninche oltung'ani ake te wueji enye emanita ina ang oo lng'oborri, nekuet ina jore pooki, neyietu aaishir, neisik." 
Judges7:22 Ore ake pee eosh nena tarumpetani iip uni neiuloki Olaitoriani olalem ake lo ltung'ani olikae tung'ani o enjore pooki; neisik ina jore o meshomo Betshita enkalo e Serera, o metabaiki olpolosie le Abel-mehola, te mbata e Tabat." 
Judges7:23 Neipotuni iltung'ana le Israel te Naftali o te Asheri o te Manase pooki metusujai aamir iltung'ana le Midian. 
Judges7:24 Neirriwaki Gideon ilkiliku aibulunye ina kop pooki oo ldoinyo e Efraim, ejo, “Entadou wootu mataarare iltung'ana le Midian, nimbung'ubung'u nena ariak ebaiki Betbara o Yordan.” Neipotuni iltung'ana pooki le Efraim, neibung ninche nkariak ebaiki Betbara, o Yordan sii." 
Judges7:25 Neya ninche lelo kituaak pokira oare le Midian, Oreb o Seeb; near ninche Oreb metua te ndapidapoi e Oreb, ore Seeb near metua te nkironyet oo sabibu e Seeb, ina kata esujita ninche iltung'ana le Midian; neyau ninche ilukuny e Oreb o Seeb enetii Gideon telido keku le Yordan." 
Judges8:1 Nejoki iltung'ana le Efraim ninye, “Kainyoo ena nintaasa iyie iyiook, eitu impot iyiook te nilo aarare Midian?” Neilepilepaki ninye oleng." 
Judges8:2 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Kaa nanu ataasa te naaitanyaanyukieki intae? Aimesidan ilekunot oo sabibu le Efraim alang enkisampuare e Abisi?" 
Judges8:3 Eishorua Enkai apik atua inkaik inyi lelo kituaak le Midian, Oreb o Seeb: kaa nanu aaidim ataasa te naaitanyaanyukieki intae?” Neyagaa taa engoro enye apa natagorokinote apa ninye, ina kata pee ejo neijia." 
Judges8:4 Nelotu Gideon Yordan nelang alo lido kekun, ninye o lelo tung'ana iip uni apa ootii te nebo ninye, enaurate nesujita ake olmang'atinta." 
Judges8:5 Neaku etiaka apa ninye lelo tung'ana le Sukot, “Atoomono intae, enchoo sii ake endaa kulo tung'ana laasujita nanu, amu etaa keiterre, nasujita nanu Seba o Salmuna, lelo aiguanak le Midian.”" 
Judges8:6 Nejo lelo kituaak le Sukot, “Keidipa Seba o Salmuna aatijing atua enkaina ino metaa eji eikincho iyiook endaa enjore ino?”" 
Judges8:7 Nejo Gideon, “Ore te nkaraki ena, ore akenya te nelo nepik Olaitoriani Seba o Salmuna enkaina ai nayiet nanu iseseni linyi too ikiku lo lpurkel o te ntamejoi.”" 
Judges8:8 Nedumunye te ine nelo Penuel, neirorie iltung'ana te ine te ina oitoi; newaliki iltung'ana le Penuel ninye anaa apa enatawalikitia iltung'ana le Sukot." 
Judges8:9 Nejoki ninye iltung'ana le Penuel, “Ore te naitoki ashukunye te seriani nagil ele talet asulu.”" 
Judges8:10 Netii apa Seba o Salmuna Karkor te nebo enjore enye, iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni tomon o imiet, lelo pooki apa ootelekuaki te njore pooki oo ltung'ana lo loosaen; amu etabatatate apa iltung'ana nkalifuni iip o tikitam ooata lalema." 
Judges8:11 Neilep apa Gideon aim enkoitoi naim intamesin to loosaen le Neba o Yogbeha nerasaki ina jore; amu merripo apa ina jore. 
Judges8:12 Neisik Seba o Salmuna; nemir ninye ninche neibung lelo aiguanak pokira oare le Midian, Seba o Salmuna, nepik ninye ina jore pooki olkirutoto." 
Judges8:13 Neitoki Gideon olayioni le Yoash ashukunye to larrabal aimu embata e nkilepunoto e Heresi. 
Judges8:14 Neibung olbarnoti le Sukot, neikilikuanishore ninye, neigeroki ilo barnoti ninye ilkituaak loo lpayiani le Sukot, iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana o opishana." 
Judges8:15 Nelotu ninye enetii iltung'ana le Sukot, nejoki, “Eng'ura Seba o Salmuna, laa ninche apa kinkorojie nanu ijojo, ‘Keidipa Seba o Salmuna, aatijing atua enkaina ino pee kitum aaishoo endaa lelo tung'ana linono ooiterre?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Neya ninye ilpayiani le ina anasa neya ilkiku lo lpurkel o entamejoi neiteng'enie ninche iltung'ana le Sukot. 
Judges8:17 Negil ninye asulu oltapeet le Penuel, nesesekuan iltung'ana le ina anasa." 
Judges8:18 Neitoki ninye ajoki Seba o Salmuna, “Koree apa iltung'ana litasesekuana te Tabor?” Newal ninche, “Anaa eninkununo iyie, neijia apa eikununo ninche, oltung'ani ake te ninche; kenyaanyukie apa ninche ilayiok lo laiguanani.”" 
Judges8:19 Nejo ninye, “Ilalashara laainei apa ninche, ilayiok le yieyio; ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, tenaa apa eintajeutuo ninche aaitopok, anaata nanu masesekuan intae.”" 
Judges8:20 Nejoki ninye Yeter olkikau lenye, “Tudumunye tasesekuana ninche.” Kake eitu apa eshutu ilo barnoti olalem lenye; amu eturia, enkaraki apa neton aa olbarnoti." 
Judges8:21 Neitoki Seba o Salmuna aajo, “Tudumunye makewan tadoiki iyiook: amu ore anaa enatiu oltung'ani, naa neijia etiu engolon enye.” Nedumunye Gideon nesesekuan Seba o Salmuna, neya nena masaa apa naatii imurto o ntamesin enye." 
Judges8:22 Neitoki iltung'ana le Israel aajoki Gideon, “Ntoria iyiook, iyie o layioni o layioni lo layioni lino, amu itokordua iyiook aitayu te nkaina e Midian.”" 
Judges8:23 Nejoki Gideon ninche, “Maitore nanu intae, nemeitore intae olayioni lai; Olaitoriani ninye oitore intae.”" 
Judges8:24 Neitoki Gideon ajoki ninche, “Enchooki nanu matoomono intae nabo toki; enchooki nanu pooki ng'ae te intae ilgiso loo nkiyiaa apa liwaita le lelo tung'ana litaara.” (Amu eeta apa ninche ilgiso loo nkiyaa le sahabu, enkaraki naa ile Ishmael.)" 
Judges8:25 Newal ninche aajo, “Eikinchoru iyiook te nyorrata.” Neisalaash ninche olkila, nenang'aki ine pooki tung'ani lelo giso loo nkiyiaa apa ooyaua." 
Judges8:26 Ore enkiroishi e lelo giso loo nkiyiaa le sahabu apa ootoomonuo naa shekeli e sahabu enkalifu nabo o iip naapishana, te nebo imasaa o nkilani sinteti apa naaishopito lelo kituaak le Midian o lkataarri apa ootii imurto oo ntamesin enye." 
Judges8:27 Neitayunye Gideon enkila dorrop nepik ninye enkanasa enye makewan, Ofra; neloloito Israel pooki te ninye, neaku orreshet te Gideon o to lmarei lenye." 
Judges8:28 Neaku etimira apa iltung'ana le Israel Midian, neitu ae kata eigil aairish ninche. Netum apa enkop enkiyeng'iyeng ilarin artam too nkolong'i e Gideon." 
Judges8:29 Nelo apa Yerubaal olayioni le Yoash aton te nkaji enye. 
Judges8:30 Neeta apa Gideon ilayiok ntomoni naapishana, inot lenyena, amu keeta apa nkituaak kumok." 
Judges8:31 Ore apa enkapiani enye natii Shekem neiu sii ninye olayioni, neji enkarna enye Abimelek." 
Judges8:32 Neye apa Gideon olayioni le Yoash etaa moruo oleng, nenukari ninye te nkurare e Yoash papaai lenye, te Ofra oo Labiesi." 
Judges8:33 Erisio ake etua Gideon, neibelekenya iltung'ana le Israel aaloloito aasujaa inkaitin e Baal, neitaa Baal-berit enkai enye." 
Judges8:34 Neitu eitoki iltung'ana le Israel aadamu Olaitoriani Enkai enye, laa ninye apa otokordua ninche aitayu te nkaina oo lmang'ati lenye pooki te pooki shoto:" 
Judges8:35 neitu ninche eitaas isidain olmarei le Yerubaal (aa taa Gideon) te nkaraki nena pooki sidain naaitaasa ninye Israel. 
Judges9:1 Nelo apa Abimelek olayioni le Yerubaal Shekem, enetii ilalashera ng'otonye nejoki ninche o lgilata pooki lo lmarei le ng'otonye," 
Judges9:2 “Entejo too nkiyiaa e kulo oomanya Shekem, ‘Kaa naikash te intae, te neitore intae ilayiok pokira ntomoni naapishana anaa te neitore intae obo?’ Entadamu sii aajo ara nanu oloito linyi o erubata inyi.”" 
Judges9:3 Neiro ilalashera ng'otonye kulo rorei pooki te rishata enye too inkiyiaa oo ltung'ana pooki te Shekem: neng'amaa iltauja lenye pee esujaa Abimelek, amu etejo ninche, “Olalashe lang ninye.”" 
Judges9:4 Neisho ninche ninye mpisai e nkosholai ntomoni naapishana naaig'uaa enkaji e Baal-berit, naa ninche eigerie Abimelek iltung'ana le pesho arruok, apa ootusuja ninye." 
Judges9:5 Nelo ninye enkaji e papaai lenye te Ofra nesesekuan ilalashera lenyena, lelo ayiok le Yerubaal, pokira ntomoni naapishana, te nchumata osoit obo; kake etelekuaki apa Yotam olayioni oti le Yerubaal, amu eisudoyie kewan." 
Judges9:6 Neiturrurrunye lelo oomanya Shekem te nebo, o Bet-milo pooki, nepuo ninche neitaa Abimelek olaiguanani, te mbata o lchani onyaanyukie olng'aboli le ng'ape te Shekem." 
Judges9:7 Ore ake pee elikini Yotam, nelo ninye aitashe te nchumata o ldoinyo le Gerisim, neyietu aishir nejoki ninche, “Entoning'oki nanu lo tung'ana le Shekem, pee etum Enkai atoning'o intae." 
Judges9:8 Eshomo apa ilkeek aagelaki ate olaiguanani, nejoki ninche oltamiyoi, ‘Ntoria iyiook.’" 
Judges9:9 Nejoki ilo tamiyioi ninche, ‘Kaing'uaa nanu eilata ai naa ninye eyanyitieki nkaitin o ltung'ana, nalo alimana ti atua ilkeek?’" 
Judges9:10 Nejoki lelo keek olng'aboli, ‘Wou iyie ntoria iyiook.’" 
Judges9:11 Nejoki ilo ng'aboli ninche, ‘Kalo nanu aing'uaa emeloni ai o lng'anayio ilai sidai nalo alimana too lkeek?’" 
Judges9:12 Nejoki lelo keek osabibu, ‘Wou iyie ntoria iyiook.’" 
Judges9:13 Nejoki ilo sabibu ninche," 
Judges9:14 ‘Kalo nanu aing'uaa enaisho ai oo sabibu naa ninye naitiship nkaitin o ltung'ana alo alimana too lkeek?’ Nejoki ilkeek pooki olchani onyaanyukie olayakuji, ‘Wou iyie ntoria iyiook." 
Judges9:15 Nejoki ilo shani onyaanyukie olayakuji lelokeek, Tinikibukokiki nanu eilata aaitaa olaiguanani maitoria intae, wootu naa entaseriana to loip lai; naa te neme neijia, nchoo meipang'u enkima te ilo shani loo lkiku nemut lelo tarakua le Lebanon.’" 
Judges9:16 “Ore naa taata, tenaa eitaasa apa intae te nkirukoto sidai o te nkanyit ina kata apa pee intaa intae Abimelek olaiguanani, naa tenintaasa apa intae esidai Yerubaal o enkaji enye, nintaasa intae ninye anaa enaishiaakino nkiaasin enyena" 
Judges9:17 amu etarishe papa te nkaraki intae, nepik enkishui enye batisho, nekordu intae aitung'uaa enkaina e Midian;" 
Judges9:18 nitudumakinote intae enkaji e papa aarare ena olong, nitasesekuana intae ilayiok lenyena, iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana te nchumata osoit obo, nintaa Abimelek olayioni le nkapiani, olaiguanani oitore lelo oomanya Shekem, enkaraki naa olalashe linyi." 
Judges9:19 Tenaa eitaasa apa te nkirukoto sidai o te nkanyit o Yerubaal o enkaji enye ena olong, enting'idakinoto naa Abimelek, naa nchoo sii ninye eng'idakino intae," 
Judges9:20 kake te neme neijia, nchoo enkima epuku te Abimelek, nemut lelo oomanya Shekem o Bet-milo nemut Abimelek.”" 
Judges9:21 Nekuet Yotam aisik, nelo Beer-sheba nebik te ine, te nkaraki naure Abimelek olalashe lenye." 
Judges9:22 Neitore Abimelek Israel ilarin okuni. 
Judges9:23 Neirriu Enkai oltau torrono erishata e Abimelek o lelo tung'ana le Shekem; ore lelo tung'ana le Shekem neitaas Abimelek te nkeleekisho; 
Judges9:24 nchere ore ina torroni apa naitaasaki lelo ayiok pokira ntomoni naapishana le Yerubaal naa kelotu osarge lenye shumata Abimelek olalashe lenye, laa ninye apa otasesekuana ninche, o shumata lelo tung'ana le Shekem laa ninche apa ooitagolo nkaik enyena metesesekuana ilalashera lenyena." 
Judges9:25 Nepik lelo tung'ana le Shekem iltung'ana olnukata pee ear ninye te nchumata o ldoinyo, neoru ninche ntokitin lelo pooki apa ootogiroitie ninche te nkoitoi, nelikini Abimelek." 
Judges9:26 Nelo apa Gaal olayioni le Ebed Shekem te nebo ilalashera lenyena, neisilig apa iltung'ana le Shekem ninye." 
Judges9:27 Neipang ninche aapuo nkurman, nesotu ninche isabibu te nena kurman enye oo sabibu, neirony ninche, nenya osirua, nepuo atua enkaji e nkai enye, nedaa neokisho nedek Abimelek." 
Judges9:28 Nejo Gaal olayioni le Ebed, “Kaing'ae Abimelek naa eikira iyiook nyoo ile Shekem, eji pee kisiaai ninye? Keitu eisiaai olayioni le Yerubaal o Sebul, olkitok lenye, iltung'ana le Hamori, menye le Shekem? Kainyoo naa pee kisiaai iyiook ninye?" 
Judges9:29 Tenaa naaji kaabori enkaina ai etii ele orere anaata aiwuang'ie Abimelek. Anaata ajoki Abimelek, ‘Toponai enjore ino, nimpang'u alotu.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Ore ake pee ening Sebul ilo apa laa ninye oitore enkanasa irorei le Gaal olayioni le Ebed, neyupuyup engoro enye." 
Judges9:31 Neirriwaa ninye ilkiliku enetii Abimelek te Aruma, ejo, “Ng'ura, ore Gaal olayioni le Ebed o lalashera lenyena eetuo Shekem, neingolingola ninche enkanasa pee kiarare iyie." 
Judges9:32 Ore naa taata, shomo kewarie, iyie o lelo tung'ana ootii te nebo iyie nirragirraga aanyu ti ong'ata." 
Judges9:33 Ore te nkakenya, ore ake pee eng'oru enkolong iltiil, nidumunyenye aayooki nikuetikiki ina anasa; ore ake pee kimpang'aki ninye o lelo tung'ana ootii te nebo ninye aapuonu aarare, entaasa ninche anaa enaishiaakino.”" 
Judges9:34 Nedumunye Abimelek o lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye kewarie, neirrag aanyisho pee earare Shekem too lturrurri oong'uan." 
Judges9:35 Neipang Gaal olayioni le Ebed alo aitashe te nejing'ieki kishomi e nkanasa; nedumunye Abimelek o lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye to lnukata. 
Judges9:36 Ore ake pee edol Gaal lelo tung'ana nejoki Sebul, “Ng'ura, edou iltung'ana aapuonu too nchumat oo ldoinyo!” Nejoki Sebul ninye, “Iloipi loo ldoinyo idol, nijo iltung'ana.”" 
Judges9:37 Neitoki Gaal airo nejo, “Ng'ura, edou iltung'ana aaing'uaa empolos e nkop, ore oltim obo nelotu aimu enkalo o lchani loo lamusok onyaanyukie olng'aboli.”" 
Judges9:38 Neitoki Sebul ajoki ninye, “Koree naa taata enkutuk ino, iyie apa otejo ‘Kainyoo ninye Abimelek eji metaa eikisiaai ninye?’ Aime kulo tung'ana apa itemena? Mpang'a taata shomo taarare ninche.”" 
Judges9:39 Neipang Gaal alo ajing dukuya iltung'ana le Shekem nearare Abimelek. 
Judges9:40 Nemir Abimelek ninye, neisik ninye te dukuya Abimelek, nebatata ilkumok ootipikaki ilbaa, o metabaiki enejing'ieki kishomi." 
Judges9:41 Nebik Abimelek te Aruma; nearaa Sebul Gaal o lalashera lenyena, pee meitoki ninche aatoni te Shekem." 
Judges9:42 Ore taisere neipang lelo tung'ana aapuo ong'ata. Nelikini Abimelek. 
Judges9:43 Nedung ninye iltung'ana lenyena metaa ilturrurri okuni, neirrag aanyisho ti ong'ata: neing'orisho ninye nedol iltung'ana eipang'u aapuku te nkanasa, nedumunye ninye, aar ninche nesesekuan ninche." 
Judges9:44 Neisarrisar Abimelek o ilo tim apa otii te nebo ninye nepuo aaitashe te nejing'ieki kishomi e nkanasa, ina kata eisarisaraki lelo timito pokira oare o lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii ong'ata nesesekuan ninche." 
Judges9:45 Nearare Abimelek ina anasa ina olong pooki, neya ninye ina anasa near metuata lelo tung'ana apa ootii atua, nemut ina anasa nebukoki enkop e munyan." 
Judges9:46 Ore ake pee ening lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii oltalet le Shekem ina, nejing ninche osempewuet le nkaji e Elberit." 
Judges9:47 Netolikioki apa Abimelek nchere eiturrurrote iltung'ana pooki to ltalet le Shekem te nebo. 
Judges9:48 Neilep Abimelek alo oldoinyo le Salmon, ninye o lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye; nedumu Abimelek entolu te nkaina enye, nedung'u olng'osila lo lchani, nedumu aiteleiki oloililai lenye. Nejoki lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye, “Ore ina nikitoduaa nanu aasita, esarisara entaas, anaa enataasa nanu.”" 
Judges9:49 Neaku etudung'uo pooki ng'ae te lelo tung'ana olng'osila lenye nesuj Abimelek neirishakini ilo sempewuet, nepik ilo sempewuet enkima te shumata ninche, neaku etuata apa sii ninche iltung'ana pooki to ltalet le Shekem, iltung'ana oobaya enkalifu ilewa o nkituaak." 
Judges9:50 Neitoki Abimelek alo Tebes, nelo aitayu ilng'oborri aarare Tebes, neya ninye." 
Judges9:51 Kake etii apa oltalet ogol atua ina anasa, ore iltung'ana pooki le nkanasa neisik aapuo ine, ilewa pooki o nkituaak, neikenoo ate ti atua ine; nepuo ninche enchumata o ltalet." 
Judges9:52 Nelotu Abimelek ilo talet, nearare ninye, nenyiku alotu enkutuk e ilo talet pee epejoo ninye te nkima." 
Judges9:53 Nenang'u enkitok nabo nenang'aki osoit le shumata oituutishoreki endukuya e Abimelek, nedany elukunya enye." 
Judges9:54 Neipotu nabo kata ilo barnoti apa onapaki ruparen, nejoki ninye, “Tushutu olalem lino taaraki nanu matua, mejo ake ilewa ti alo nanu, ‘Enkitok natara ninye metua.’ ” Nerem ilo barnoti aipang'ie olalem, neye ninye." 
Judges9:55 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana le Israel nchere etua Abimelek, nepuo ninche oltung'ani ake enkang enye." 
Judges9:56 Neijia eikuna Olaitoriani Enkai aitalaku entorroni e Abimelek apa nataasa ti alo papaai lenye pee ear ilalashera lenyena pokira ntomoni naapishana. 
Judges9:57 Neisho sii Enkai entorroni pooki oo ltung'ana le Shekem metadoiki nchumat oo lukuny enye, nelotu shumata ninche ilo deket apa le Yotam olayioni le Yerubaal." 
Judges10:1 Ore te siadi Abimelek nedumunye pee ekordu Israel Tola olayioni le Pua, olayioni le Dodo, oltung'ani le Isaakar, neton apa ninye te Shamir ti atua ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim." 
Judges10:2 Neaku ninye olarishani le Israel ilarin tikitam ookuni. Neye ninye, nenukari te Shamir." 
Judges10:3 Ore te siadi ninye nedumunye Yair, ilo le Gilead, laa ninye apa otaa olarishani le Israel ilarin tikitam oare." 
Judges10:4 Neeta apa ninye ilayiok tomoni uni ooked isirkon tomoni uni; neeta apa ninche nkanas tomoni uni, naaji Hoyot-yair o metabaiki ena olong, apa naatii enkop e Gilead." 
Judges10:5 Neye apa Yair nenukari te Kamon. 
Judges10:6 Neitoki iltung'ana le Israel aas entorrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neisiaai inkaitin e Baal o Ashtarot, nena aitin e Siria, o nkaitin e Sidon, o nkaitin e Moab, o nkaitin oo Lamori, o nkaitin oo Lfilisti, neing'uaa ninche Olaitoriani, neitu eisiaai ninye." 
Judges10:7 Neyupuyup engoro o Laitoriani tialo Israel, nemir ninye ninche metijing'a atua enkaina oo Lfilisti o atua enkaina oo Lamori," 
Judges10:8 neisomit ninche neibooki enkop iltung'ana le Israel te ilo ari. Ore too larin tomon o isiet neibooki ninche enkop lelo tung'ana le Israel apa ootii lido kekun Yordan te nkop oo Lamori, apa natii Gilead." 
Judges10:9 Nelang'u Ilamori Yordan aapuonu sii aarare Yuda earare Benchamen nearare enkaji e Efraim; neaku etudupa osina Israel oleng.
