Judges10:10 Neishiraki iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani, ejo, “Kitaasa iyiook eng'oki ti alo iyie, enkaraki nikitung'uaitie Enkai ang nikisiaai inkaitin e Baal.”" 
Judges10:11 Nejoki Olaitoriani iltung'ana le Israel, “Keitu apa nanu akordu intae aitung'uaa Ilmisiri naitung'uaa Ilamori, naitung'uaa Ilamoni naitung'uaa Ilfilisti?" 
Judges10:12 Eibookito sii intae enkop iltung'ana le Sidon, o Lmaleki, o Lmaoni; nikinchirakiki intae nanu, nakordu nanu intae aitayu ti atua nkaik enye." 
Judges10:13 Ore ake eyia kitung'uaitie intae nanu nipuopuo aaisiaai kulie aitin; neaku maitoki nanu akordu intae. 
Judges10:14 Enchom enchiraki nena aitin nitudutaitie; nchoo ninche ekordu intae te nkata inyi o sina.” 
Judges10:15 Nejoki iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani, “Kitaasa iyiook eng'oki; ntaasa iyiook anaa enidol eishiaakino te iyie; kake tokordu ake duoo iyie iyiook, kitoomono iyie ena olong.”" 
Judges10:16 Neiwuang'ie ninche nena aitin omon apa naatii atua ninche, neisiaai Olaitoriani, netum ninye emion oleng te nkaraki osina le Israel." 
Judges10:17 Neipotuni apa iltung'ana le Amon metanapata, nepik ninche ilng'oborri lenye Gilead, neiturrurro sii ninche iltung'ana le Israel te nebo, nepik ilng'oborri lenye Mispa." 
Judges10:18 Ore lelo tung'ana, lelo arikok le Gilead, nejokino maate, “Kalo tung'ani oiteru aarare ile Amon? Ninye oaku olkitok te lelo pooki oomanya Gilead.”" 
Judges11:1 Ore apa Yepta ilo le Gilead naa olmurrani magilani, kake olayioni apa le mulayoi ninye. Gilead apa menye le Yepta." 
Judges11:2 Ore apa enkitok e Gilead neiki sii ninye ilayiok; ore ake pee ebulu lelo ayiok le ina kitok enye, nearaa ninche Yepta, nejoki ninye, “Mijung iyie enkaji e papa lang; amu ira iyie oliae kitok.”" 
Judges11:3 Neisik Yepta aing'uaa ilalashera lenyena, nelo abik te nkop e Tob; neiturrurrokino iltung'ana le pesho Yepta, nepuo aarisho te nebo ninye." 
Judges11:4 Ore te nkiti rishata neitayunye iltung'ana le Amon olarrabal Israel. 
Judges11:5 Ore ake pee eitayunye iltung'ana le Amon Israel olarrabal, nepuo ilpayiani le Gilead aariku Yepta te nkop e Tob;" 
Judges11:6 nejoki ninche Yepta, “Wou taa olarikoni lang, pee kitum iyiook aataarare Ilamoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Kake etiaka Yepta lelo payiani le Gilead, “Keitu apa intae kimbayuyu nanu, nikiaraa nanu aaipang'ie te nkaji e papa lai? Kainyoo taata pee ietuo enatii nanu iatata enyamali?”" 
Judges11:8 Nejoki lelo payiani le Gilead Yepta, “Ena pee kimbelekenyakinote taata iyiook iyie, pee itum ashomo te nebo iyiook niarare Ilamoni, niaku olarikoni lang te lelo pooki oomanya Gilead.”" 
Judges11:9 Nejoki Yepta lelo payiani le Gilead, “Ti nikintokiki nanu aaya ang mashomo aarare Ilamoni, ore ake pee aaisho Olaitoriani ninche, naaku nanu olarikoni linyi.”" 
Judges11:10 Nejoki lelo payiani le Gilead Yepta, “Olaitoriani olo aaku shakeni te rishata ang, esipa eikiaas iyiook anaa enitejo.”" 
Judges11:11 Nelo Yepta te nebo lelo payiani le Gilead, neitaa ninye iltung'ana endukuya o larikoni te shumata ninche; neiro irorei lenyena pooki te dukuya Olaitoriani te Mispa." 
Judges11:12 Neitoki Yepta airriwaa ilkiliku enetii olaiguanani le Amon nejoki, “Kainyoo iyie kiatakinore nanu, pee iewuo enatii nanu, pee iarare enkop ai?”" 
Judges11:13 Newaliki ilo aiguanani le Amon lelo apa ooirriwayie Yepta ajoki, “Enkaraki naa ore apa Israel pee elotu te Misiri neya enkop ai, ebaiki Arnon o metabaiki Yabok nelo abaiki Yordan; ore naa taata torrinyu te seriani.”" 
Judges11:14 Neitoki Yepta airriwaki ilkiliku olaiguanani le Amon," 
Judges11:15 nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Yepta: Eitu eya Israel enkop e Moab aashu enkop e Amon," 
Judges11:16 kake ore apa pee eilepu Israel te Misiri nepuo aaim olpurkel o metabaiki Enaiposha Nanyokie nepuonu Kadesh. 
Judges11:17 Neirriwaki Israel ilkiliku olaiguanani le Edom, ejo, ‘Nchoo siaake iyiook maima enkop ino.’ Kake etanya olaiguanani le Edom ening. Neitoki sii airriwaki ilkiliku olaiguanani le Moab, kake eitu enyorraa. Neaku etobiko apa Israel te Kadesh." 
Judges11:18 Neim ninche olpurkel pooki nepuo aamanaa te nkop e Edom o enkop e Moab, nepuo aaitayu ilng'oborri te nkae shoto e Arnon; kake eitu ninche ejing atua enkop e Moab, ore apa Arnon naa ninye olpolosie le Moab." 
Judges11:19 Neitoki Israel aairriwaki ilkiliku Sihon loo Lamori, o laiguanani le Heshbon; nejoki Israel ninye, ‘Nchoo sii ake iyiook matulusoi kitasayia iyie, aaim enkop ino aapuo enkop ang.’" 
Judges11:20 Kake eitu apa eisilig Sihon Israel meima enkop enye; neaku eiturrurro apa Sihon iltung'ana lenyena pooki te nebo, neitayu ilng'oborri te Yahas, nearare Israel." 
Judges11:21 Neishoru Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel Sihon o ltung'ana lenyena pooki apik atua nkaik e Israel, nemir Israel ninche; neya taa Israel ina kop pooki oo Lamori, apa oomanya ina kop." 
Judges11:22 Neya sii ina kop pooki oo Lamori ebaiki Arnon o metabaiki Yabok o ebaiki olpurkel o metabaiki Yordan. 
Judges11:23 Neaku taa, Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ninye otarayie aoru Ilamori te dukuya iltung'ana lenyena, Israel; naa amaa iya iyie ninche araya?" 
Judges11:24 Eimiya iyie ina nikincho Kemosh enkai ino? Ore ina pooki natarua Olaitoriani Enkai ang te dukuya iyiook nikiya iyiook. 
Judges11:25 Eira iyie supat alang Balak olayioni le Sipor, olaiguanani le Moab? Ketekeshare ae kata ninye Israel anaa keshomo ae kata aarare ninche?" 
Judges11:26 Amaa apa ebikito Israel te Heshbon o too nkang'itie enye kutiti, o ti atua Aroer o nkang'itie enyena kutiti, o ti atua nena anas pooki apa naatii embata e Arnon, too larin iip uni, kainyoo apaiyie pee eitu iya nena kuapi te ina kata?" 
Judges11:27 Eitu naa nanu aas eng'oki ti alo iyie, nikintaasa iyie nanu entorrono aitayunye olarrabal; nchoo Olaitoriani, ilo Arishani eaku olarishani too ltung'ana le Israel o too ltung'ana le Amon.”" 
Judges11:28 Kake ore ilo aiguanani le Amon eitu eshilaa ilo kilikuai le Yepta apa oirriwaka ninye. 
Judges11:29 Nelotu enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata Yepta, nelo agiroo Gilead o Manase, negiroo alo Mispa e Gilead, aim Gilead negiroo Mispa e Gilead alo enetii ile Amon." 
Judges11:30 Nenya Yepta olmumai to Laitoriani, nejo, “Tenaa einchoru iyie ile Amon apik atua nkaik aainei," 
Judges11:31 neaku ore pooki ng'ae oipang'u aimu nkutukie e nkaji ai, pee aalotu anang'are nanu, te narrinyo alotu aisula ile Amon, neaku olo Laitoriani, naishoru nanu ninye metaa olasar opejori.”" 
Judges11:32 Nelang Yepta alo enetii ile Amon aarare ninche neishooyo Olaitoriani ninche apik atua inkaik enyena. 
Judges11:33 Near ninche ebaiki Aroer o metabaiki elatia e Minit, nkanas tikitam, o metabaiki Abel-keramim, te sesekuanata kitok oleng. Neaku etimiraki apa ile Amon te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel." 
Judges11:34 Neitoki Yepta alotu enkang enye te Mispa, naa ng'ura, neipang'u entito enye alotu anang'are ninye eranyisho neosh entampuri, naa ninye apake enkerai naata, meeta apa ae tito aashu olayioni." 
Judges11:35 Ore ake pee edol ninye, nepolos nkilani enyena, nejo, “Ee entito ai! Kintadouo iyie nanu oleng, nitaa iyie enkipirunoto e nyamali sapuk te nanu; amu ataboloko nanu Olaitoriani enkutuk ai nemaidim ainyaai olmumai lai.”" 
Judges11:36 Nejoki ina tito enye ninye, “Papa, ti nitaboloko iyie Olaitoriani enkutuk ino, ntaasaki nanu enaba anaa enaimua enkutuk ino, amu kitalaaka Olaitoriani too lmang'ati linono te lelo le Amon.”" 
Judges11:37 Nejoki ninye menye, “Nchoo maaitaasi ena bae; nchooki ake duoo iyie ilapaitin oare, pee alo nanu aisampash too ldoinyo aishiraki titoisho ai, nanu o esirit ai.”" 
Judges11:38 Nejoki menye, “Shomo.” Neisho ninye meshomo ilapaitin oare; nelo ninye ina tito, ninye o encholuek enye, nelo aishiraki titoisho enye too nchumat oo ldoinyo." 
Judges11:39 Ore te nkiting'oto oo lapaitin oare, neshukunye ninye enetii papaai lenye, apa oitaasa ninye te risioroto e ilo mumai apa oinosa. Eitu ae kata eyiolou ina tito olee. Neaku apa olkerreti te Israel" 
Judges11:40 nchere kepuo ake ntoyie e Israel to lari aaishiraki entito e Yepta ilo le Gilead nkolong'i ong'uan to lari. 
Judges12:1 Neipotuni apa iltung'ana le Efraim metanapata, nelang ninche aapuo Sapon nejoki Yepta, “Kainyoo iyie pee italang'a alo aarare Ilamoni, neitu impotu iyiook pee kipuo te nebo iyie? Eikipejoo iyiook enkaji ino itii atua te nkima.”" 
Judges12:2 Nejoki Yepta ninche, “Ore nanu o ltung'ana laainei nikitii olarrabal kitok te nebo Ilamoni; ore ake pee aipotu nanu intae, neitu kikordudu nanu te nkaina enye." 
Judges12:3 Ore ake pee adol ajo mikikordudu intae nanu, naya nanu enkishui ai te nkaina ai, nalang alo aarare Ilamoni, neishoru Olaitoriani ninche apik nkaik aainei kainyoo naa taata pee ileputua intae aapuonu enatii ena olong, pee kipuonunu aarare nanu?”" 
Judges12:4 Neiturrur Yepta iltung'ana pooki le Gilead nearare Efraim, nesesekuan iltung'ana le Gilead Efraim, enkaraki natejo, “Irara intae ilaisikak le Efraim, intae ile Gilead, te mpolos e Efraim o Manase.”" 
Judges12:5 Neya lelo tung'ana le Gilead ilang'at e Yordan pee earare ile Efraim. Naa ore ake pee ejo oltung'ani le lelo apa ootimiraki le Efraim, “Ntasho nanu matalang'a alo,” nejoki ninye iltung'ana le Gilead, “Eira iyie ole Efraim?” Ore ake pee ejo ninye, “A-a,”" 
Judges12:6 nejoki ninche ninye, “Tejo naa Shibolet,” nejo ninye “Sibolet” amu meidim ninye atejo ina aitobiraki; neibung taa ninye near metua too lang'at e Yordan. Nebatata ina kata te ine ilung'ana le Efraim nkalifuni artam oare." 
Judges12:7 Neaku Yepta olarishani le Israel ilarin ile. Neye Yepta nenukari te nkanasa enye e Gilead. 
Judges12:8 Ore te siadi ninye naa Ibsan le Betlehem otaa olarishani le Israel. 
Judges12:9 Eeta apa ninye ilayiok tomoni uni; o ntoyie tomoni uni, neishooyo meyami iltung'ana leme lo lgilata lenye neyau ntoyie e boo neme no lgilata lenye meyama ilayiok lenyena. Neaku ninye olarishani le Israel ilarin oopishana." 
Judges12:10 Neaku etua Ibsan nenukari te Betlehem. 
Judges12:11 Ore te siadi ninye naa Elon le Sebulon otaa olarishani le Israel, netaa apa ninye olarishani le Israel ilarin tomon." 
Judges12:12 Neitoki sii Elon aye, ilo le Sebulon nenukari te Aiyalon te nkop e Sebulon." 
Judges12:13 Ore te siadi ninye naa Abdon olayioni le Hilel le Piraton otaa olarishani le Israel. 
Judges12:14 Eeta apa ninye ilayiok artam o lakuyiaani tomoni uni, apa ooked isirkon ntomoni naapishana; neaku ninye olarishani le Israel ilarin isiet." 
Judges12:15 Neitoki aye Abdon ilo ayioni le Hilel le Piraton, nenukari te Piraton te nkop e Efraim, te ina kop oo ndoinyo oo Lmaleki." 
Judges13:1 Neitoki iltung'ana le Israel aas entorroni too nkonyek o Laitoriani; neishooyo Olaitoriani ninche apik atua enkaina oo Lfilisti too larin artam. 
Judges13:2 Netii apa oltung'ani obo le Sora, lo losho le Dan, oji enkarna enye Manoa; naa koolupi apa enkitok enye nemeeta nkera." 
Judges13:3 Neipang'aki olmalaika lo Laitoriani ina kitok nejoki ninye, “Ng'ura, ira iyie olupi nimiaata nkera; kake inutayu iyie niiu olayioni." 
Judges13:4 Metaa, ng'ura kewan, miok enaisho oo sabibu aashu enaisho napi, niminya entoki nemesinya," 
Judges13:5 amu, ng'ura, inutayu iyie niiu olayioni. Nemeetae olmurunya olotu shumata endukuya enye, amu ore ina ayioni naa keaku Olnasarayoi te Nkai ebaiki einoto enye; naa keiteru ninye akordu Israel aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lfilisti.”" 
Judges13:6 Nelotu ina kitok ajoki olmoruo lenye, “Eewuo oltung'ani le Nkai enatii nanu, ore empukunoto enye nenyaanyukie empukunoto o lmalaika le Nkai, keitureisho oleng; eitu nanu aikilikuan ninye eneing'uaa neitu ninye aaliki enkarna enye;" 
Judges13:7 kake aatiaaka ninye nanu, ‘Ng'ura, inutayu iyie niiu enkayioni; metaa naa miok enaisho oo sabibu aashu ae aisho napi niminya entoki nemesinya, amu keaku ina ayioni Olnasarayoi te Nkai ebaiki einoto o metabaiki keeya enye.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Neomon Manoa Olaitoriani, nejo, “Olaitoriani lai, aatoomono iyie, nchoo ilo tung'ani le Nkai lirriua menyaaki alotu enikitii iyiook, aiteng'en iyiook enikintaas ina ayioni naini.”" 
Judges13:9 Nening Enkai oltoilo le Manoa, neigil ilo malaika le Nkai alotu enetii ina kitok etonita te nkurma; kake metii apa Manoa olmoruo lenye te nebo ninye." 
Judges13:10 Nekuet ina kitok te nkisarrisar alo ajoki olmoruo lenye, “Ng'ura ore olapa tung'ani oewuo enatii enapa olong aanyaaka aipang'aki.”" 
Judges13:11 Nedumunye Manoa nelo asuj enkitok enye, nelotu enetii ilo tung'ani nejoki ninye, “Kaiyie apa ilo tung'ani oirorie ena kitok?” Nejoki ninye, “Nanu ilo.”" 
Judges13:12 Nejo Manoa, “Amaa, akenya te nebaya irorei linono, kaji kenya etiu ina ayioni, naa kaa kenya eas?”" 
Judges13:13 Nejoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani Manoa, “Ore nena pooki natiaaka ena kitok nchoo ninye eing'or." 
Judges13:14 Menya ninye ae toki naing'uaa isabibu nemeok enaisho aashu ae toki nemesinya; ore nena pooki naitanapa ninye nchoo ninye eas.” 
Judges13:15 Nejoki Manoa ilo malaika lo Laitoriani, “Aatoomono, nchoo iyiook maiboo iyie pee kintobiraki iyie olkuoo le kine.”" 
Judges13:16 Nejoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani Manoa, “Tinikimbok iyie nanu, nemanya nanu endaa ino; kake ti nintobir olasar opejori, ntobiraki naa Olaitoriani.” (Amu eitu apa eyiolou Manoa nchere olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninye.)" 
Judges13:17 Nejoki Manoa ilo malaika lo Laitoriani, “Eikiji ng'ae enkarna, pee aa te nelo kenya nebaya irorei linono, nikitum aaishoo iyie enkanyit?”" 
Judges13:18 Nejoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani ninye, “Kainyoo pee inkilikuanu enkarna ai, itoduaa ajo enenking'asia?”" 
Judges13:19 Neya Manoa olkuoo le kine te nebo enkishoroto e ntapa, neitaiki te nchumata endapidapoi Olaitoriani olasar, ilo laa ninye oas inenking'asia." 
Judges13:20 Ore ake pee eilep olng'ejep le nkima alo shumata epuku te ilo asar, neilep ilo malaika te ilo ng'ejep le nkima lo lasar eing'orita Manoa o enkitok enye; nebatata aaitabaiki nkomomi enye enkop." 
Judges13:21 Eitu ae kata eigil ilo malaika lo Laitoriani aipang'aki Manoa o enkitok enye. Neyiolou apa Manoa nchere olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninye. 
Judges13:22 Nejoki Manoa enkitok enye, “Esipa eikiye iyiook, amu kitoduaa iyiook Enkai.”" 
Judges13:23 Kake etiaaka enkitok enye ninye, “Tenaa keyieu apa Olaitoriani near iyiook matuata, anaata eitu ninye eng'amu ilo asar opejori o lasar le ntapa too nkaik ang, aashu eitodol iyiook kuna baa pooki, aashu eliki iyiook mbaa naaijo kuna.”" 
Judges13:24 Neiu ina kitok olayioni, neisho enkarna enye ajo Samson; nebulu ina ayioni, nemayian Olaitoriani ninye." 
Judges13:25 Neitera Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani aputu ninye ti atua Mahane-dan te rishata e Sora o Eshtaol. 
Judges14:1 Nedoyio apa Samson alo Timna, ore te Timna nedol entito nabo oo Lfilisti." 
Judges14:2 Neilepu ninye alotu, nejoki menye o ng'otonye, “Atoduaa nanu entito nabo oo Lfilisti te Timna; entorikokoki nanu metaa enkitok ai.”" 
Judges14:3 Kake etiaakitia menye o ng'otonye ninye, “Aimeetae enkitok ti atua ntoyie o lgilata linyi, aashu ti atua iltung'ana lang pooki, eji pee ilo ayamu enkitok too Lfilisti lememurata?” Kake etiaaka Samson menye, “Torikokoki nanu ninye; amu aaitiship ninye nanu oleng.”" 
Judges14:4 Meyiolo apa menye o ng'otonye nchere Olaitoriani eing'uaa ina; amu keing'oru apa ninye erishata naarie Ilfilisti. Ore apa ina kata naa Ilfilisti ooitore Israel. 
Judges14:5 Nedoyio Samson o menye o ng'otonye aapuo Timna, nepuo enkurma oo lng'anayio e Timna. Naa ng'ura, neikurrukurroki ninye olkuoo lo lng'atuny;" 
Judges14:6 nelotu Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata ninye te ngolon, nepolos ninye ilo ng'atuny anaa oltung'ani opolos olkuoo le kine; nemeeta apa ninye toki te nkaina enye. Kake eitu apa ninye eliki menye aashu ng'otonye enataasa ninye." 
Judges14:7 Nedoyio ninye alo airorie ina kitok; neitiship ina kitok Samson oleng. 
Judges14:8 Ore te nkiti rishata nerrinyo alo aya ninye; neibelekenya aing'or empopong o lng'atuny, naa ng'ura, etii olemaat loo lotorok ina popong o lng'atuny, o enaisho oo lotorok." 
Judges14:9 Nebelu ninye neibung too nkaik enyena, nelo, ainosaa eloito; nelotu enetii menye o ng'otonye, neisho ninche embata, nenya ninche. Kake eitu ninye eliki ninche nchere te mpopong o lng'atuny eitayio ina aisho oo lotorok." 
Judges14:10 Nedoyio menye alo enetii ina kitok, neitobir Samson osirua te ine, amu neijia apa eiko ilbarnot." 
Judges14:11 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana ninye, neyau ninche iltung'ana tomoni uni pee epuonu aaku te nebo ninye." 
Judges14:12 Nejoki Samson ninche, “Kaisho nanu intae oloyiote, naa ti nikindimidimi aatoliki nanu eneikununo, ti atua kuna olong'i naapishana o sirua, niyiolouu aajo kainyoo, naisho nanu intae nkilani tomoni uni e kitani o kulie kilani tomoni uni sidain;" 
Judges14:13 kake ti nimikindimidimi aatoliki nanu nchere kainyoo, nikinchosho intae nanu nkilani tomoni uni e kitani, o nkilani sidain.” Nejoki ninche ninye, “Tolimu oloyiote lino matoning.”" 
Judges14:14 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Oyiote: Etupukuo enainosi tiatua ina nainosisho. Etupukuo entoki namelok aimu ina nagol.” Neitu ninche eidim aatayiolo ilo oyiote too nkolong'i uni." 
Judges14:15 Ore te nkolong e ong'uan nejoki ninche ina kitok e Samson, “Ilejileja olmoruo lino metoliki iyiook nchere kainyoo ilo oyiote mikipejoo ake iyie o enkaji e papaai lino te nkima. Ntoomono apa iyiook pee itumutumu aawaita imasaa ang?”" 
Judges14:16 Ore ina kitok e Samson neishir te dukuya ninye, nejoki, “Eikimba iyie, mikinyor nanu; itipikaka iyie oloyiote iltung'ana lang, neitu ninye kiliki nanu ajoki kainyoo.” Nejoki ninye, “Ng'ura, eitu aliki papa aashu yieyio, paa eijo iyie aliki?”" 
Judges14:17 Neishir ninye te dukuya ninye nena olong'i naapishana apa osirua lenye; ore te nkolong e naapishana neliki ina kitok enye, amu eitirrishaka apa ninye oleng. Neliki ina kitok oloyiote lelo tung'ana lenye." 
Judges14:18 Nejoki ilewa apa le ina anasa ninye te nkolong e naapishana eton eitu edoyio enkolong, “Kainyoo namelok alang enaisho oo lotorok? Kainyoo nagol alang olng'atuny?” Nejoki Samson ninche, “Teneme enkashe ai itukurrishore intae, anaata intae eitu itumutumu oloyiote lai.”" 
Judges14:19 Nelotu Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani te ngolon shumata ninye, nedoyio ninye alo Ashkelon near metuata iltung'ana tomoni uni le ina ang, neya ntokitin enye neisho nkilani lelo apa ootolimutuo oloyiote. Ore te ngoro napi neshuko alo enkaji e papaai lenye." 
Judges14:20 Neishori ina kitok e Samson ilo apa oboitare ninye, aa ninye apa shepu-lkerra lenye." 
Judges15:1 Ore etulusoyie enkiti rishata, te nkata naisampuni enkano, nelo Samson amutan enkitok enye, neyaki olkuoo le kine; nejo ninye, “Kalo nanu adol enkitok ai ti atua aji.” Kake eitu apa eisho menye meshomo atua aji." 
Judges15:2 Nejoki menye le ina kitok, “Kajo apa eimba ninye oleng naisho ninye ilo apa liboitare. Aimesidai ina anashe enye kiti alang ninye? Aatoomono iwa ninye te rishata e nkae.”" 
Judges15:3 Nejoki Samson ninche, “Ore tena kata maaitokini nanu aailap ti alo Ilfilisti te naitaas ninche entorrono.”" 
Judges15:4 Nelo Samson neibung mbariak iip uni, neya ilkilang'ilang'eta neitutum ninche ilkidong'o, nepik ake enkilang'ilang'et erishata oo lkidong'o oare." 
Judges15:5 Ore ake pee eitudup nena kilang'ilang'eta enkima neisho nena bariak meshomo aaim atua enkano oo Lfilisti nepejoo isotot o enkano nauno o nkurman oo loirienito. 
Judges15:6 Nejo Ilfilisti, “Kang'ae otaasa ena?” Nejo ninche, “Samson, ilo aputani lo Ltimini, enkaraki nawa ninye enkitok enye neisho ilo apa oboitare ninye.” Neilepu Ilfilisti aaponu nepejoo ninye o papaai lenye te nkima." 
Judges15:7 Nejoki Samson ninche, “Tenaa ena intae iasiasa, kanya nanu olmumai pee aitalak intae, ore te siadi ina nalo nanu.”" 
Judges15:8 Near ninye ninche oleng metuata te nkumoi; nedoyio alo aton ti atua enkapune natii endapidapoi e Etam. 
Judges15:9 Nepuonu Ilfilisti nepik ilng'oborri Yuda, neibung enkang e Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Nejo iltung'ana le Yuda, “Kainyoo intae pee ileputua aapuonu aarare iyiook?” Nejo ninche, “Kileputua iyiook aapuonu aaen Samson, aaitaas ninye anaa enaitaasa iyiook.”" 
Judges15:11 Nepuo iltung'ana nkalifuni uni le Yuda enchumata e ndapidapoi e Etam, nejoki Samson, “Eimiyiolo iyie nchere Ilfilisti ilaitoriak te shumata iyiook kainyoo naa ena nintaasa iyie iyiook?” Nejoki ninye ninche, “Anaa enaaitaasa ninche nanu, ina sii nanu aitaasa ninche.”" 
Judges15:12 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Kietuo iyiook aaen iyie, pee kitum aaishooi iyie ti atua nkaik oo Lfilisti.” Nejoki Samson ninche, “Enosa olmumai nchere mikiaariara intae maate.”" 
Judges15:13 Nejoki ninche ninye, “A-a; eikien ake iyiook iyie nikinchooyo iyie aapik atua nkaik enye; mikiaar iyiook iyie tua.” Neen ninche ninye too lgoso ng'ejuko oare, neyau aailepunye te ndapidapoi." 
Judges15:14 Ore ake pee elotu ninye Lehi, nepuonu Lfilisti aanang'are ninye ebuaku; nelotu Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata ninye te ngolon; ore lelo goso apa ootii nkaik enyena netiu anaa iusin naaibung'a enkima; ore ienat enyena neshola too nkaik enyena." 
Judges15:15 Netum ninye oltagiligili oshal lo sikiria, neitorioo enkaina adumu, ore te ilo tagiligili nesesekuan iltung'ana enkalifu." 
Judges15:16 Nejo Samson, “Ore to ltagiligili lo sikiria naa osototi te shumata osototi. To ltagiligili lo sikiria atasesekuana nanu iltung'ana enkalifu.”" 
Judges15:17 Ore ake pee eidip ninye airoro, nenang'aa ilo tagiligili lo sikiria te nkaina enye; neji apa enkarna e ine wueji Ramat-lehi." 
Judges15:18 Netir apa ninye enkure oleng, neipot ninye Olaitoriani nejo, “Nchorua iyie enkordunoto kitok te nkaina o sinka lino; naa kaye nanu taata te nkure, nabatatakino atua nkaik oo lememurata?”" 
Judges15:19 Nebol Enkai engumoto te Lehi, nepuku enkare te ine, ore ake pee eok, neitoki apok, nepiu. Neaku ore enkarna enye etejoki apa En-hakore; etii ine Lehi o taata." 
Judges15:20 Neaku ninye olarishani le Israel too nkolong'i oo Lfilisti ilarin tikitam. 
Judges16:1 Nelo apa Samson Gasa, nedol ninye emulayoi te ine, nelo enetii ninye." 
Judges16:2 Netiaakaki apa lelo le Gasa, “Eeuo Samson ene,” neman ninche ine wueji neirrag aanyu ninye enkewarie pooki te nkishomi e ina anasa. Negira ninche enkewarie pooki, ejo, “Mataanyu iyiook o mekenyu, pee kitum aataar ninye metua.”" 
Judges16:3 Kake eirure apa Samson o metaa empolos e nkewarie; ore te mpolos e nkewarie nedumunye neya nkikeneta e kishomi e ina anasa o ng'apeta pokira are, nedotu ninche, te nebo osekenkei o pooki toki, neiteleiki ninche oloililai nenap ninche enchumata e ina doinyo apa natii dukuya Hebron." 
Judges16:4 Ore te siadi ena nenyorru enkitok apa natii oerata le Sorek, naji enkarna enye Delila." 
Judges16:5 Nepuonu ilkituaak loo Lfilisti enetii ninye nejoki ninye, “Ilejileja ninye, pee idol enetii engolon enye kitok, naa tiaa oitoi kiindim aaitojoola ninye, pee kitum iyiook aateen ninye nikigilu ninye; nikisilisil; naa eikincho iyiook iyie oltung'ani ake mpisai enkalifu nabo o iip nabo e nkosholai.”" 
Judges16:6 Nejoki Delila Samson, “Tolikioki sii ake enetii ena golon ino kitok, naa kaji naaji kinkoni ti nikieni, pee kitum oltung'ani atigilu.”" 
Judges16:7 Nejoki Samson ninye, “Te naaeni nanu too mpi oo nkai ng'ejuko naapishana neton eitu etoyu, nashalu nanu, natiu anaa pooki tung'ani.”" 
Judges16:8 Neyaki ilkituaak loo Lfilisti ninye mpi oo nkai naapishana ng'ejuko neenie ninye. 
Judges16:9 Neeta apa Delila iltung'ana ooisudori ti atua olgilata ti aji. Nejoki Delila Samson, “Kipuonu Lfilisti aaibung, Samson!” Nedung ninye nena pi anaa usin naaibung'a enkima. Neaku meyioloi apa enkisudoroto e ngolon enye." 
Judges16:10 Neitoki Delila ajoki Samson, “Ng'ura, kitusukenya nanu, nikiteleja nanu; tolikioki sii ake enikinkoni pee kimbung'i.”" 
Judges16:11 Nejoki ninye, “Te naaeni nanu too lgoso ng'ejuko leitu ae kata eenishoreki, nashalu nanu natiu anaa pooki tung'ani.”" 
Judges16:12 Neyau Delila lelo goso ng'ejuko neen ninye te ninche, nejoki ninye, “Kipuonu Ilfilisti aaibung, Samson!” Ore apa iltung'ana ooisudori netii olgilata ti atua aji, nedung lelo goso too nkaik enyena anaa eusi." 
Judges16:13 Neitoki Delila ajoki Samson, “Ore o tene kitusukenya nanu, nikilej nanu; tolikioki nanu enikinkoni ti nikimbung'i.” Nejoki Samson ninye, “Ti nishet kuna tukusi aainei naapishana e ndukuya ai te nkarasha nintirrish oleng te ncheitoi, nashalu nanu natiu anaa pooki tung'ani.”" 
Judges16:14 Neaku ore apa eirura Samson, neitayu Delila nena enat oolpapit pokira naapishana neshetaki enkarasha neitirrish ninche aunoki encheitoi, nejoki ninye, “Kipuonu Ilfilisti aaibung iyie Samson!” Neinyototo ninye too njo enyena nedotu encheitoi neshurta ina arasha nashetakino." 
Judges16:15 Nejoki Delila ninye, “Kaji iyie inko ti nijo, ‘Kaanyor nanu iyie,’ te nemetii oltau lino te nebo nanu? Kitusunkenya iyie kuna katitin pokira uni, neitu iyie kiliki enetii engolon ino kitok.”" 
Judges16:16 Ore ake pee eitirrishaki Delila ninye too rorei lenyena anaake, neitagor ninye, nenauru oltau lenye oleng." 
Judges16:17 Neliki ninye mbaa enyena pooki, nejoki Delila, “Eitu ae kata eim olmurunya endukuya ai; amu ataa apa nanu Olnasarayoi te Nkai atii enkoshoke e yieyio. Ore ake naaji pee aabarni, naaing'uaa nanu engolon ai, nashalu nanu natiu anaa pooki tung'ani.”" 
Judges16:18 Ore ake pee edol Delila ajo etolikio ninye mbaa enyena pooki, neirriwaa olkilikuai aipotu ilkituaak loo Lfilisti pooki, ejo, “Elepu wootu ena kata nabo, amu aatolikio mbaa enyena pooki.” Neilepu ilkituaak loo Lfilisti aapuonu enetii ninye, neyau mpisiai too nkaik enye." 
Judges16:19 Neisho ninye meirurayu too nkejek enyena; neipotu ninye oltung'ani, neisho ninye metabarnu nena enat naapishana oo lpapit le ndukuya enye. Neiteru aitanyamal ninye, neing'ua engolon enye ninye." 
Judges16:20 Nejo Delila, “Kimbung'ita iyie Ilfilisti, Samson!” Neinyototo ninye too njo, nejo, “Kaipang nanu alo boo anaa oshi ake nkulie katitin, narerio.” Neitu apa eyiolou ninye ajo etung'uayie Olaitoriani ninye." 
Judges16:21 Neibung Ilfilisti ninye nekurtu nkonyek enyena neitadou ninye aayau Gasa, neen ninye too lpisia lo suyai; neidong apa ninye enkano etii atua korokoroni." 
Judges16:22 Kake enyaakita apa ilpapit le ndukuya enye aabulu ina kata eidipaki aatabarn. 
Judges16:23 Neiturrurro apa ilkituaak loo Lfilisti pee etum aaitaiki olasar kitok Dagon, enkai enye, neshipa sii, amu etejo apa ninche, “Eishorua enkai ang Samson ilo mang'atinta lang apik atua nkaik ang.”" 
Judges16:24 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana ninye neisis enkai enye; amu etejo ninche, “Eishorua enkai ang olmang'atinta lang apik atua enkaina ang, laa ninye apa otumuta enkop ang, netasesekuana ilkumok lang.”" 
Judges16:25 Ore eting'idate iltauja lenye, nejo ninche, “Empoto Samson pee elotu aitiship iyiook.” Neipotu ninche ninye ti atua korokoroni, pee eitiship ninye ninche. Neisho ninche ninye meitasho te rishata oo ng'apeta are;" 
Judges16:26 nejoki Samson enkayioni apa naa ninye narik aibung enkaina, “Ntasho sii iyie mairrapirrapa ng'apeta naairishaa ena aji, pee atum aigarakinoyu ninche.”" 
Judges16:27 Nebore apa ina aji ilewa o nkituaak; netii apa ilkituaak pooki loo Lfilisti ine; ore enchumata enkaji netii apa iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni uni ilewa o nkituaak, ooing'orisho ina kata eiguran Samson." 
Judges16:28 Neipot Samson Olaitoriani ajo, “Olaitoriani Enkai, tadamuaki nanu, nikintagol nanu aatasayia ena kata nabo, Na Ai, pee atum aitalaku too Lfilisti nabo oo nkonyek aainei.”" 
Judges16:29 Neibung nena ng'apeta pokira are apa naatii empolos enkaji, naa ninche apa naairisha e nkaji, neirishakino te ngolon enye pooki shumata ninche, neibung te nkaina enye e tatene nabo ng'ape neibung tene kedienye enkae." 
Judges16:30 Nejo Samson, “Ntasho nanu matua te nebo Ilfilisti.” Neirrugo ninye te ngolon enye pooki; neurokino ina aji lelo kituaak o lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii atua. Neaku ore iltung'ana apa ootuata te keeya enye naa eikumok aalang lelo apa ootasesekuana ninye eton eishu." 
Judges16:31 Nepuonu ilalashera lenyena o lmarei lenye pooki aaya ninye neilepunye ninye aapuonu aanukaa te rishata e Sora o Eshtaol te nkurare e Manoa papaai lenye. Etaa apa ninye olarishani le Israel ilarin tikitam. 
Judges17:1 Etii apa oltung'ani le nkop oo ndoinyo e Efraim oji enkarna enye Mika. 
Judges17:2 Nejoki ninye ng'otonye, “Ore inapa pisai enkalifu nabo o iip nabo e nkosholai apa nikitooruoki iyie, naa ninche itedekishore, nidekisho too nkiyiaa aainei, ng'ura, aata nanu nena oshola; nanu apa oowa.” Nejo ng'otonye, “Metamayiana Olaitoriani enkayioni ai.”" 
Judges17:3 Nerrinyu ninye nena oshola apa enkalifu nabo o iip nabo aisho ng'otonye; nejo ng'otonye, “Kaiteng'el nanu kuna oshola aisho Olaitoriani aiwuang'ie te nkaina ai te nkaraki olayioni lai, pee eitayunyeki enkitanyaanyukoto e Nkai naguetuni o enkitanyaanyukoto nasholuni; ore naa taata kaarrinyoki nanu iyie.”" 
Judges17:4 Neaku ore apa pee errinyoki ninye ng'otonye nena pisai, neya ng'otonye mpisai iip are e nkosholai, neisho ninche ilkunono oopej enkosholai laa ninye oitobira enkitanyaanyukoto naguetuni o enkitanyaanyukoto nasholuni; nepiki apa enkaji e Mika." 
Judges17:5 Neeta apa ltung'ani oji Mika enkaji oo nkaitin. Neitobiru ninye nkitanyaanyukot o enkila o lgoo oo lapolosak; neput olayioni obo loo layiok lenyena aitaa olapolosani lenye. 
Judges17:6 Ore apa te nena olong'i nemeetae olaiguanani te Israel; keas apa pooki ng'ae enaba anaa esidai too nkonyek enyena makewan. 
Judges17:7 Etii apa oltung'ani le Betlehem ti atua Yuda, lo lmarei le Yuda, laa olawi apa ninye; neidurraki apa ninye ine." 
Judges17:8 Nelo apa ilo tung'ani aing'uaa enkang e Betlehem te Yuda alo aton te wueji neidim anotie erishata; ore eidurrita ninye nelotu ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim enetii enkaji e Mika. 
Judges17:9 Nejoki Mika ninye, “Kaji iyie ing'uaa?” Nejoki ninye, “Ara nanu Olawi le Betlehem ti atua Yuda, naa kalo amany ewueji naidim anotie erishata.”" 
Judges17:10 Nejoki Mika ninye, “Totona te nebo nanu pee iaku te nanu papa o lapolosani naaisho nanu mpisai tomon e nkosholai to lari o nkilani o endaa.”" 
Judges17:11 Nenyorraa ilo Lawi abik te nebo ilo tung'ani; netiu ilo barnoti te ninye anaa obo loo layiok lenyena. 
Judges17:12 Neput Mika ilo Lawi, neaku ilo barnoti olapolosani lenye, netii apa ninye atua enkaji e Mika." 
Judges17:13 Nejo apa Mika, “Ayiolo taata ajo kaaitopok Olaitoriani, amu aata Olawi aitaa olapolosani lai.”" 
Judges18:1 Ore apa te nena olong'i nemeetae olaiguanani te Israel. Ore apa te nena olong'i neing'oru olosho le Dan enjung'ore enye maate ewueji nemany; amu ore ebaiki ina kata meetae enjung'ore ti atua iloshon loo Siraeli nanoto ninche. 
Judges18:2 Neirriu apa ile Dan iltung'ana imiet oodupa ti atua iltung'ana lo losho lenye pooki, eing'uaa Sora neing'uaa Eshtaol, pee epuonu aaikitalan enkop nejur; nejokini ninche, “Enchom entujur enkop.” Nepuonu apa ninche ina kop oo ndoinyo e Efraim, ine netii enkaji e Mika, neirrag ine." 
Judges18:3 Ore apa etii ninche embata e nkaji e Mika, neyiolou ninche oltoilo le ilo barnoti le Lawi; neibelekenya ninche nejoki ninye, “Kaing'ae likiyaua iyie ine? Kainyoo iyie iasita tene wueji? Kainyoo esiaai ino tene?”" 
Judges18:4 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Nji o nji aaitaasa nanu Mika: aaigero nanu, naaitaa nanu olapolosani lenye.”" 
Judges18:5 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Nkilikuanishore Enkai, kitoomono iyie, pee kitum aatayiolo tenaa kerasaa ena lototo nikipuoito.”" 
Judges18:6 Nejoki ilo apolosani ninche, “Enchom te seriani. Ore ina lototo nipuopuo netii abori enkong'u o Laitoriani.”" 
Judges18:7 Nepuo lelo tung'ana pokira imiet, nepuonu Laish, nedol iltung'ana apa ootii ine, eneikununo oltonei lenye te seriani, te mpukunoto oo le Sidon, eitirring'a nememuso, meeta entoki nabo e nkop nang'or, neeta karsisisho, o eneba elakuaniki ile Sidon nemeeta enaporokinore likae tung'ani." 
Judges18:8 Ore ake pee epuonu ninche enetii ilalashera lenye te Sora o Eshtaol, nejoki ilalashera lenye ninche, “Kainyoo intae ilimumu?”" 
Judges18:9 Nejo ninche, “Entudumunye, maape iyiook aarare ninche; amu kitoduaa iyiook ina kop, naa ng'ura, kepir oleng. Eimiatata intae eniaasiasa? Emiyieta intae te lototo, kake entijing atua ina kop embung'a." 
Judges18:10 Ti nipuopuo intae, naa ipuopuo aainepu iltung'ana lememuso. Kelala ina kop; ee, eishorua Enkai apik atua nkaik inyi, ewueji nemeeta entoki hoo nabo ena kop nemetii.”" 
Judges18:11 Nedumunye iltung'ana iip ile lo losho le Dan, ootanapate too roparen o larrabal, nepuo eing'uaa Sora o Eshtaol," 
Judges18:12 neilep aapuo neitayu ilng'oborri te Kiriat-Yearim ti atua Yuda. Ore te nkaraki ena naa keji ine wueji Mahanedan o taata; ng'ura, etii enkalo o loo ntoluo le Kiriat-yearim." 
Judges18:13 Negiroo ninche ine nepuo ina kop oo ndoinyo e Efraim, nepuonu enkaji e Mika." 
Judges18:14 Nejoki lelo tung'ana apa imiet ooshomo aaikitalan enkop e Laish lelo alashera lenye, “Iyiololo intae aajo ore atua kuna ajijik netii enkila o lgoo oo lapolosak, o Terafim e nkitanyaanyukoto naaguetuno o naasholuno? Ore naa taata entayiolo eniaasiasa.”" 
Judges18:15 Neibelekenyakino ninche ine, nepuonu enkaji e ilo barnoti le Lawi te nkang e Mika, neikilikuan ninye ilomon lenyena." 
Judges18:16 Ore apa lelo tung'ana iip ile le Dan, ootanapate too roparen enye o larrabal, neitashe te nejing'ieki kishomi;" 
Judges18:17 ore lelo tung'ana imiet apa ooshomo aaikeern enkop neilep aapuo, nejing atua nepuo aaitayu ina kitanyaanyukoto naguetuno, ina kila o lgoo oolapolosak, o enkitanyaanyukoto o Terafim, o ina kitanyaanyukoto nasholuno, ina kata eitashe olapolosani te mbata ewueji nejing'ieki kishomi te nebo lelo tung'ana iip ile apa ootanapate too masaa enye o larrabal." 
Judges18:18 Ore ake pee epuo kulo atua enkaji e Mika neya ina kitanyaanyukoto naguetuno, o enkila o lgoo oo lapolosak, o Terafim, o ina kitanyaanyukoto nasholuno, nejoki ilo apolosani ninche, “Kainyoo intae iasitata?”" 
Judges18:19 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Tigirayu, tipika enkaina ino enkutuk ino, nilotu te nebo iyiook, niaku te iyiook papa o lapolosani. Kenaikash iyie ti niaku olapolosani te nkaji o ltung'ani obo, anaa ei ti niaku olapolosani to losho to lmarei le Israel?”" 
Judges18:20 Neshipayu oltau le ilo apolosani; neitayu ninye ina kila o lgoo oo lapolosak, o Terafim ina kitanyaanyukoto naguetuno, nelo ninye te nebo lelo tung'ana." 
Judges18:21 Neibelekenya ninche nepuo, nepik nkera kutiti o nchoo o masaa dukuya ninche." 
Judges18:22 Ore eshomo ninche aalam enkang e Mika, neishiruni iltung'ana ootii nkajijik ootaaniki enkaji e Mika, nepuo ninche aainepu lelo tung'ana le Dan." 
Judges18:23 Nebuaaki ninche lelo tung'ana le Dan, ooibelekenyunye nejoki Mika, “Kainyoo nikinosita anaijo itorikuo olorere kitok obanji?”" 
Judges18:24 Nejoki ninye, “Iwaita intae nkaitin aainei naitayio nanu, o lapolosani, nipuopuo, kainyoo naa aatung'ueikiaki? Kainyoo naa pee kijokiki intae nanu, ‘Eji kainyoo nikinosita?’ ”" 
Judges18:25 Nejoki lelo tung'ana le Dan ninye, “Mincho iyie oltoilo lino metoning'i ti atua iyiook, pee mikidoiki iltung'ana ootagorote, niminie enkishui ino o nena tokitin e nkaji ino.”" 
Judges18:26 Nepuo lelo tung'ana le Dan aaibung enkoitoi enye; ore ake pee edol Mika nchere kegol ninche oleng aalang ninye, neibelekenya neshuko alo enkang enye." 
Judges18:27 Neyau ninche nena tokitin apa naaitobirua Mika, o ilo apolosani apa ora olenye, nepuonu lelo tung'ana le Dan Laish, enetii iltung'ana oobor lememuso, nesesekuan ninche te nepi o lalem, nepejoo ina anasa te nkima." 
Judges18:28 Nemeetae apa olakordunoni amu kelakuaniki apa ninye Sidon, nemetii apa kulikae tung'ana ooata enabaikinore ninche. Etii atua oerata le Bet-rehob. Neitoki apa ninche aashet ina anasa nemany atua." 
Judges18:29 Neisho apa ina anasa enkarna aajo Dan, aaipotie nkakuyiaa lenye, apa otoiuo Israel; amu keji apa enkarna e ina anasa te dukuya Laish." 
Judges18:30 Neitasheikinye apa lelo tung'ana le Dan ate ina kitanyaanyukoto naguetuno; naa Yonasan ilo ayioni le Geshom, olayioni le Musa, o layiok lenyena apa ilapolosak lo losho le Dan o metabau ina olong apa natarayoki ilo osho." 
Judges18:31 Neaku eitasheyie apa ninche ina kitanyaanyukoto e Mika naguetuno, naitayio ninye ina kata pooki apa natii enkaji e Nkai te Shilo." 
Judges19:1 Ore apa te nena olong'i, eton meetae olaiguanani ti atua Israel, netii Olawi obo otii nena rishat naaliyio e ina kop oo ndoinyo e Efraim, apa oyaka kewan enkapiani e Betlehem ti atua Yuda." 
Judges19:2 Ore ina apiani negorokino ninye, nelo enkaji e menye te Betlehem ti atua Yuda aing'uaa ilo Lawi, neton ninye te ine too lapaitin oong'uan." 
Judges19:3 Nedumunye ilo moruo lenye nelo asujaa, pee elo ailejilej ninye neshuku ninye ayau. Netii apa te nebo ninye osinka lenye o sirkon aare. Nelotu apa ninye enkaji e papaai lenye; ore ake pee edolmenye ina tito ninye, nelotu te nchipai anang'are ninye." 
Judges19:4 Neibok ninye olaputani, menye ina tito, neton ninye te nebo ninye nkolong'i uni; neaku etadaate ninche neokisho neirrag ine." 
Judges19:5 Ore te nkolong e ong'uan nedumunye ninche tadekenya nenapa ninye pee elo; kake etiaaka menye ina tito olaputani lenye, “Ntagolo kewan inosa endaa, ore te siadi ina nitum taa ashomo.”" 
Judges19:6 Netoni lelo lewa pokira oare aadaa neokisho te nebo; nejoki menye ina tito ilo tung'ani, “Tobiko tishipayu niyeng'iyeng'a.”" 
Judges19:7 Ore ake pee edumunye ilo tung'ani ajo alo, neitirrishaki olaputani ninye, o menyaaki aigil aairrag ine." 
Judges19:8 Ore te nkolong e imiet nedumunye ninye tadekenya enasirie pee elo; nejoki menye ina tito, “Ntagolo kewan, totona o metigilayu enkolong.” Nedaa ninche pokira oare." 
Judges19:9 Ore ake pee edumunye ilo tung'ani o ina apiani enye o laisiaayiani lenye pee epuo, nejoki ninye olaputani lenye menye ina tito, “Ng'ura, etinyikaiyie endama aaku teipa; totona siaake kewarie pooki, ng'ura etinyikua endama; irraga ene nchoo oltau lino eng'ida; ore taisere nidumunye tadekenya enasirie te nkaraki elototo ino, pee ilo ang.”" 
Judges19:10 Kake etanya apa ilo tung'ani eirrag ina kewarie etudumunye ninye alo, nelo abaya enkipirakinoto e Yebus (aa taa Yerusalem). Neeta apa te nebo ninye isirkon oare ooitobiraki pee ekedi, netii apa ina apiani te nebo ninye." 
Judges19:11 Ore ake pee etaaniki ninche Yebus, netinyikayie endama, nejoki olaisiaayiani olkitok lenye, “Wou taata maibelekenyakinoto iyiook ena anasa oo Lyebusi, pee kirrag ena kewarie.”" 
Judges19:12 Nejoki ilo kitok ninye, “Mikimbelekenya iyiook aajing atua enkanasa oo ltung'ana leeiking'a leme iltung'ana le Israel ninche; kake eikigiroo iyiook aapuo Gibea.”" 
Judges19:13 Neitoki ninye ajoki ilo sinka lenye, “Wou matataaniki iyiook nabo e kuna wuejitin pee kirrag ena kewarie Gibea aashu Rama.”" 
Judges19:14 Negiroo ninche nepuo aaibung enkoitoi enye; nedoyio enkolong etii ninche embata e Gibea, nara ninye ene Benchamen," 
Judges19:15 neibelekenya ninche te ine, aapuo aairrag ina kewarie Gibea. Nelo ninye aton te nkoitoi kitok e ina anasa; amu meetae oltung'ani otoriko ninche atua enkaji enye meirraga ina kewarie." 
Judges19:16 Ng'ura, nelotu apa olpayian kitok eing'uaa esiaai enye ti atua enkurma teipa; ore apa ilo tung'ani naa o leina kop oo ndoinyo e Efraim, neidurraka apa Gibea amany; ore apa iltung'ana le ine wueji naa ile Benchamen." 
Judges19:17 Neshumu ninye nkonyek enyena nedol ilo tung'ani elotu to losinko leina anasa nejo ilo payian kitok, “Kaji iyie iloito? Naa kaji ing'uaa?”" 
Judges19:18 Nejoki ninye ilo payian kitok, “Kipuoito iyiook aagiroo Betlehem ti atua Yuda, aapuo nekua rishat naabayie e ina kop oo ndoinyo e Efraim, naa ninye aing'uaa nanu. Ashomo apa Betlehem ti atuaYuda, naloito taata enkang ai, nemetii hoo ng'ae laatoriko nanu atua enkaji enye." 
Judges19:19 Kiaata iyiook endaa o lkujita loo sirkon lang, o mukateni o enaisho te nkaraki nanu o ena sinka ino, o ele barnoti otii te nebo isinkan linono; eitu eng'oriki iyiook toki.”" 
Judges19:20 Nejo ilo payian kitok, “Meeu eseriani enitii; kagolie nanu iyieunot inono pooki; kake mirrag ena kewarie to losinko.”" 
Judges19:21 Neaku etorikuo apa ninye atua enkaji enye, neisho lelo sirkon lenyena olkujita, neisuj ninche nkejek enye, nedaa ninche neokisho." 
Judges19:22 Ore apa ina kata etishipate ninche iltauja lenye, ng'ura, ore iltung'ana le ina anasa, iltung'ana arruok neng'adu ina aji aaman, eosh kutuk e nkaji nejoki ninche ilo payian kitok, ilo openy e nkaji, “Mpang'unye ilo tung'ani duo oewuo atua enkaji ino, pee kitum iyiook aatayiolo ninye.”" 
Judges19:23 Ore ilo payian, olopeny ina aji, neipang'aki ninche nejoki ninche, “A-a, ilalashera laainei, emiaas intae ena torroni; itoduaa aajo eewuo ele tung'ani atua enkaji ai, emiaas intae ena bae suuji." 
Judges19:24 Ng'ura, etii ene entito selenkei neitu eyiolou olee o enkapiani enye; ntasho maipang'unye nanu ninche. Embung'a ninche nintaasiasa ninche anaa enidolidolo eishiaakino te intae; kake ore ti alo ele tung'ani emintaas ena bae suuji.”" 
Judges19:25 Kake mening lelo tung'ana ninye. Neaku eibung'a apa ilo payian enkapiani enye neipung'ie ninye boo mewaita ninche; neyiolou ninche ninye, neinyal enkewarie pooki o mekenyu. Ore ake pee emanaa enkakenya neisho meshomo." 
Judges19:26 Ore pee ekenyu, nelotu ina kitok nebatata te kutuk aji e nkaji e ilo payian apa naa ninye etii olkitok lenye, neirrag o metawang'a." 
Judges19:27 Nedumunye olkitok lenye tadekenya; ore ake pee ebol kutuk aji e ina aji neipang alo, ng'ura, eirragita enkapiani enye te kutuk aji e ina aji, eibung'ita too nkaik enyena ntaloishin e kutukaji." 
Judges19:28 Nejoki ninye, “Tudumunye maape.” Kake eitu ewalikini ninye. Nepik ilo tung'ani ninye enkoriong o sikiria lenye; nedumunye ilo lee nelo enkang enye." 
Judges19:29 Ore ake pee ejing ninye enkaji enye, neyau enkalem, neibung ina apiani enye neorrior ninye erubata o erubata aitaa irubat tomon o are, neirriwaa ninye nkuapi pooki e Israel." 
Judges19:30 Ore pooki ootoduaa ina nejo, “Eitu ae kata easayu embae neeijo ena aashu edoli ebaiki enkolong apa naileputua iltung'ana le Israel aapuku te nkop e Misiri o metabaiki ena olong; embirribirra enguanare niwaliwala.”" 
Judges20:1 Nepuonu iltung'ana pooki le Israel, ebaiki Dan o metabaiki Beer-sheba te nebo enkop e Gilead; ore ina umata neiturrurro anaa oltung'ani obo te dukuya Olaitoriani te Mispa." 
Judges20:2 Ore laiguanak le lelo tung'ana pooki, too loshon pooki le Israel neyau ate atua ilo turrur loo ltung'ana le Nkai, naa nkalifuni iip ong'uan apa iltung'ana oopuo too nkejek ooata lalema." 
Judges20:3 Nening apa iltung'ana le Benchamen nchere eilepa iltung'ana le Israel aapuo Mispa. Nejo iltung'ana le Israel, “Entoliki iyiook, kaji apa eikununye ena torroni?”" 
Judges20:4 Ore ilo Lawi, ilo moruo apa le ina kitok nataraki metua, newal ajo, “Aewuo apa nanu Gibea, ina nara ene Benchamen, nanu o enkapiani ai, pee kirrag ina kewarie." 
Judges20:5 Naadumakino nanu ilewa le Gibea, neman aang'adu ina aji natii kewarie; keyieu apa ninche naar nanu matua, neikony enkapiani ai, netua ninye." 
Judges20:6 Naya nanu ina apiani ai nadung nanu aitaa ndung'udung'ot, nairriwaa nanu ninye aibulunye enkop pooki enjung'ore e Israel, amu etaasa apa ninche embae torrono naa olminong sapuk entorroni ti atua Israel." 
Judges20:7 Eng'ura, intae iltung'ana le Israel, intae pooki, enchoru enkikoo inyi o eutaroto inyi tene.”" 
Judges20:8 Nedumunye iltung'ana pooki le Israel anaa oltung'ani obo, ejo, “Mikipuo iyiook hoo obo lang olng'obor lenye, nemeetae olalang orrinyo alo enkaji enye." 
Judges20:9 Kake ore taata ena iyiook kintaas Gibea: eikipuo iyiook aarare ninye te oshoto e nkukuo," 
Judges20:10 nikiya iltung'ana tomon te iip ti atua iloshon pooki le Israel, o iip ti atua enkalifu, o enkalifu too nkalifuni tomon, pee eyaki iltung'ana ndaiki, paa te nepuonu ninche netum aaitalaa Gibea e Benchamen elap, te ina taboi pooki entorroni nataasa ninche ti atua Israel.”" 
Judges20:11 Neaku eiturrurrote apa iltung'ana le Israel aaipirakinore ina anasa etaa oltung'ani obo. 
Judges20:12 Neirriwaa iloshon le Israel iltung'ana meshomo atua olosho pooki le Benchamen, ejo, “Kaa torroni ena nataase ti atua intae?" 
Judges20:13 Ore naa taata entayu lelo tung'ana, lelo arruok le Gibea, pee kitum iyiook aataar ninche metuata, nikiwuang'ie entorroni te Israel.” Kake mening Ibenchamen oltoilo loo lalashera lenye, lelo tung'ana le Israel." 
Judges20:14 Neiturrurrunye ile Benchamen te nebo aaipang'u too nkanas aapuonu Gibea, pee epuo olarrabal aarare iltung'ana le Israel." 
Judges20:15 Neiturrurro ile Benchamen ina olong too nkanas enye iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam o ile ooata lalema, te nebo lelo oomanya Gibea ooiturrurro iltung'ana iip naapishana gelunot." 
Judges20:16 Ore ti atua kulo pooki netii iltung'ana iip naapishana gelunot kedienyiaa; laa keidim ake pooki lenye atanang'a oleinyuaa to soit le nkopito nemediak. 
Judges20:17 Ore iltung'ana le Israel metii Benchamen neiturrur iltung'ana nkalifuni iip ong'uan oata ilalema; ore kulo pooki naa iltung'ana lo larrabal. 
Judges20:18 Nedumunye iltung'ana le Israel neilep aapuo Betel, neikilikuanishore Enkai, “Kalo lang oituruk alo aarare ile Benchamen?” Nejoki Olaitoriani, “Yuda ong'as alo.”" 
Judges20:19 Nedumunye iltung'ana le Israel tadekenya nepuo aaitayu ilng'oborri te nkipirakinoto e Gibea. 
Judges20:20 Neilep iltung'ana le Israel aapuo olarrabal aarare Benchamen; neitoluakino iltung'ana le Israel ninche te Gibea. 
Judges20:21 Neipang ile Benchamen te Gibea neirragieki te nkop ina olong iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam o are oo le Israel. 
Judges20:22 Kake ore lelo tung'ana, lelo lewa le Israel eitagoluote, neitoki aaluaakino olarrabal te ine wueji netoluare te nkolong e dukuya." 
Judges20:23 Nepuo iltung'ana le Israel aaishir te dukuya Olaitoriani o metaa teipa; neikilikuanishore Olaitoriani, “Eikingil iyiook aaluakino olarrabal aarare ilalashera lang lelo le Benchamen?” Nejo Olaitoriani, “Elepa enchom entaarare ninche.”" 
Judges20:24 Neigutu iltung'ana le Israel aapuonu aarare lelo le Benchamen te nkolong e are. 
Judges20:25 Nelo Benchamen aarare ninche te Gibea te nkolong e are, nebatata te nkop iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon o isiet oo ltung'ana le Israel; ore kulo pooki naa iltung'ana loo lalema." 
Judges20:26 Neitoki iltung'ana pooki le Israel, enjore pooki, aailep aapuo Betel neishir; netoni ninche te ine te dukuya Olaitoriani, neen ate aaitupukoo ina olong o metaa teipa, neitayu ilasarri oopejori o lasarri le seriani te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Judges20:27 Neikilikuanishore iltung'ana le Israel Olaitoriani (amu ore apa osanduku lo sotua le Nkai naa ine apa etii te nena olong'i," 
Judges20:28 ore Finehas olayioni le Eliesa, olayioni le Aron, neisiaaisho te dukuya ilo sanduku apa te nena olong'i), ejo, “Eikingil iyiook aapuo olarrabal aarare lelo alashera lang lelo le Benchamen, anaa eikintirring'a?” Nejo Olaitoriani, “Elepa enchom; amu ore taisere kaishoru nanu ninche apik atua nkaik inyi.”" 
Judges20:29 Neaku eirriwayie Isiraeli iltung'ana meshomo aajing ilnukat aaman Gibea. 
Judges20:30 Nepuo iltung'ana loo Siraeli aarare ile Benchamen te nkolong e uni, neitobirakino olarrabal pee earare Gibea, anaa enaikuna too nkulie katitin." 
Judges20:31 Neipang iltung'ana le Benchamen aapuo aarare lelo tung'ana nerrumori aaitalam enkanasa. Ore anaa oshi too nkulie katitin neiteru aaoshisho near embata oo ltung'ana metuata, too nkoitoi, aa ore enkoitoi nabo nalala naa enailep alo Betel, nelo enkae Gibea. Ore te ina kisiajata near iltung'ana oobaya tomoni uni o are loo Siraeli." 
Judges20:32 Nejo lelo tung'ana le Benchamen, “Ekueta ninche te dukuya iyiook anaa apa te dukuya.” Kake etejo iltung'ana loo Siraeli, “Maisika iyiook nikintalamaa ninche te nkanasa aarik nkoitoi kituaak.”" 
Judges20:33 Nedumunye iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli too wuejitin enye, neitobirakino olarrabal te Baal-tamar; ore lelo tung'ana loo Siraeli ootii olnukata neisarrisar too wuejitin enye aapuo enkalo o loo ntoluo le Geba." 
Judges20:34 Nepuonu aaimu enkalo e Gibea iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon oogeluno ti atua Israel pooki. Negolu olarrabal oleng. Neitu apa eyiolou iltung'ana le Benchamen aajo etataanikia ninche enkidaata. 
Judges20:35 Nemir Olaitoriani Benchamen te dukuya Isirael. Neidaikie iltung'ana le Israel iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam o imiet o iip nabo oo ltung'ana le Benchamen te ina olong; ore kulo pooki naa iltung'ana loo lalema. 
Judges20:36 Neaku etoduaa ile Benchamen ina olong aajo etimiraki. Ekueta apa iltung'ana le Israel aailany ile Benchamen, amu eisiliga apa ninche lelo tung'ana ootii olnukata, otii embata e Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Nedumunye lelo tung'ana apa ootii olnukata, neisarisaru aakuetiki Gibea, nepuo lelo tung'ana ootii olnukata aar enkanasa tenepi o lalam." 
Judges20:38 Ore apa olmonekie otoning'oteki te rishata oo ltung'ana le Israel o ltung'ana ootii olnukata, naa nchere, teneitayu enkatampoi sapuk e mpuruo naailep shumata, te nkanasa," 
Judges20:39 neibelekenyakino iltung'ana le Israel olarrabal. Neiterua apa Benchamen aar metuata iltung'ana loo Siraeli oobaya tomoni uni nejo ninche, “Esipa etooshoki ninche aanang'ie enkop te dukuya iyiook, anaa apa to larrabal le dukuya.”" 
Judges20:40 Kake ore pee eiter ailepu ilo monekie te nkanasa, te mpuruo nairrusha, neing'or ile Benchamen siadi, naa ng'ura, etaa duoo enkanasa pooki empuruo naijukujuku alo keper." 
Judges20:41 Neibelekenyuni taa iltung'ana loo Siraeli, neidang iltung'ana le Benchamen, amu etoduaa ninche aajo etataanikia ninche enkidaata." 
Judges20:42 Ore enkaraki ina neibelekenya ninche te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel aaipirri ong'ata; kake einepuaki ninche ore lelo ooipang'u ti atua nkanas nemut ninche te rishata enye. 
Judges20:43 Nedung'oo iltung'ana le Benchamen, nemir aasujaa ninche neitunyoo ninche ebaiki Noha o meitabaiki enkipirakinoto Gibea te nkalo o loosaen." 
Judges20:44 Nebatata ile Benchamen nkalifuni tomon o isiet, ore pooki naa iltung'ana yiolot." 
Judges20:45 Neibelekenya ninche neisikaki enkalo e ong'ata aapuo endapidapoi e Rimon; neari metuata iltung'ana nkalifuni imiet too nkoitoi kituaak, neitirrishakini aasujaa o meitabaikini Gibom, nesesekuani iltung'ana nkalifuni are te ine." 
Judges20:46 Neaku ore lelo pooki le Benchamen ootabatate te ina olong naa nkalifuni tikitam o imiet le lelo ooenita ilalema, ore pooki naa iltung'ana yiolot." 
Judges20:47 Kake eibelekenyate iltung'ana iip ile neisik aapuo ong'ata enkalo e ndapidapoi e Rimon, nebik ninche te ina dapidapoi e Rimon ilapaitin oong'uan." 
Judges20:48 Neitoki iltung'ana le Israel aaibelekenyakino iltung'ana le Benchamen neshurt ninche te nepi olalem, iltung'ana o ng'uesi o pooki naanoto ninche. Ore nkanas enye apa pooki naaitobira nepejoo te nkima." 
Judges21:1 Einosa apa iltung'ana le Israel olmumai te Mispa, nejo, “Meetae hoo obo te iyiook oisho entito enye meyama iltung'ana le Benchamen.”" 
Judges21:2 Nepuonu iltung'ana Betel netoni teine te dukuya Enkai ometaa teipa, neyietu aaishir te mion." 
Judges21:3 Nejo ninche, “Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, kainyoo pee eewuo ena atiu nji tiatua Israel, eji metaa keetae taata olosho obo lemeetae te Israel?”" 
Judges21:4 Ore taisere neyooki iltung'ana aadumunye enasirie, neshet olperere lo lasar teine, neitayu ilasarri oopejori o lasarri le seriani." 
Judges21:5 Nejo iltung'ana le Israel, “Kalo osho too loshon le Israel leitu elotu ena umata o Laitoriani?” Amu einosa apa ninche olmumai kitok tenkaraki ilo osho leitu elotu eumata o Laitoriani te Mispa, ejo, “Keari ninye metua.”" 
Judges21:6 Eeta apa iltung'ana le Israel olng'ur te nkaraki Benchamen olalashe lenye, nejo ninche, “Eiwuang'ieki olosho obo aaitung'uaa Israel ena olong." 
Judges21:7 Kaji kinko tenikincho nkituaak lelo ootelekutua, nikinosa apa olmumai to Laitoriani nchere, mikincho ninche hoo nabo oo ntoyie ang meyama.”" 
Judges21:8 Nejo ninche, “Kalo osho ilo too loshon le Israel leitu elotu enetii Olaitoriani te Mispa?” Naa ng'ura, meetae hoo obo ebaiki Yabesh-gilead oshomo ina umata." 
Judges21:9 Amu ore ina kata eipotitoi iltung'ana nkarn, meetae hoo obo le lelo oomanya Yabesh-gilead oirukishe." 
Judges21:10 Neaku eirriwayie apa ina umata iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon oare oopi, neitanap aajoki, “Enchom entaar metuata lelo oomanya Yabesh-gilead to lalem, o nkituaak o nkera." 
Judges21:11 Ena intae enchom entaas. Ore pooki lee o pooki ngoruoi naatayiolounote endaikie ninche tukul.” 
Judges21:12 Netum ninche tiatua lelo oomanya Yabesh-gilead iselenken iip ong'uan nemeyiolo olee, neriku ninche ilng'oborri te Shilo, naa enkop e Kanaan etii." 
Judges21:13 Neitoki ina umata pooki aairriwaki olkilikuai ile Benchamen apa ooti endapidapoi e Rimon, neibalakinye ninche eseriani." 
Judges21:14 Nerrinyunye Benchamen neisho ninche ile Benchamen nena kituaak apa neitu eari metuata te Yabesh-gilead, kake eitu eidip ninche." 
Judges21:15 Neing'urrie apa iltung'ana Benchamen enkaraki natipika Olaitoriani elusie iloshon le Israel. 
Judges21:16 Neitoki ilpayiani leina umata aajo, “Kaa iyiook kiaas tenkaraki nkituaak e lelo ootelekutua, neidaikieki apa ing'oruo aaishie te Benchamen?”" 
Judges21:17 Nejo ninche, “Meeta nchere metumi enjung'ore te lelo ootelekutua le Benchamen, pee meimin ake ilo osho te Israel." 
Judges21:18 Ore ake eyia, mikindim iyiook aaishoo ninche ntoyie ang meyama.” Amu einosa olmumai iltung'ana le Israel nchere, “Etediaaki ilo oisho Benchamen enkitok.”" 
Judges21:19 Neaku etejo ninche, “Ng'ura eetae anaake to lari osirua lo Laitoriani te Shilo, aa taa moikuape e Betel, te nkalo o loo saen e nkoitoi kitok nalo te Betel ometabaiki Shekem, o kopikop e Lebona.”" 
Judges21:20 Neitanap ninche ile Benchamen ejo, “Enchom erraga to lnukata tiatua nkurman oo sabibu," 
Judges21:21 ning'orishosho, naa tenepuonu ntoyie e Shilo aaranyisho to sinkolio, nimpang'ung'u tiatua enkurma oo sabibu, neibung ake pooki lee enkitok enye aya, te nena toyie e Shilo, nelo enkop e Benchamen." 
Judges21:22 Naa tenepuonu loo menye anaa ilalashera lenye aailepilepaki iyiook, nikijoki iyiook ninche, ‘Enchoo iyiook mawaita ninche te mpiris, amu eitu iyiook kiya ninche aaitaa nkituaak ang to larrabal, neitu sii intae inchosho iyiook, anaa naa eaku eninyi entorroni.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Neas ile Benchamen ina, neya nkituaak enye terisioroto esiana enye te nena toyie apa naaranyisho naaibung'a ninche aaya. Neitoki ninche aapuo aarrinyokino enjung'ore enye, neshet inkang'itie nemany." 
Judges21:24 Neitoki iltung'ana le Israel aadumunye. Nelo ake oltung'ani olosho lenye, o lmarei lenye, neipang aapuo teine, nelo ake pooki ng'ae enjung'ore enye." 
Judges21:25 Ore apa te nena olong'i nemeetae olaiguanani te Israel; etaasa ake pooki tung'ani enaishiaakino too nkonyek enyena. 
Ruth1:1 Ore apa te nena olong'i naaitoreisho ilarishak, netii olameyu enkop, ore oltung'ani obo le Betlehem ti atua enkop e Yuda nelo amany enkop e Moab. Eshomo ninye te nebo enkitok enye o layiok lenyena oare." 
Ruth1:2 Ore apa enkarna e ilo tung'ani naa Elimelek, ore enkarna e nkitok enye naa Naomi. Ore nkarn oo layiok lenyena pokira oare naa Mahalon o Kilion. Ile Frati apa ninche ooing'uaa Betlehem ti atua enkop e Yuda. Eshomo apa ninche enkop e Moab nepuo aabik te ine." 
Ruth1:3 Kake etua apa Elimelek ilo moruo le Naomi, neing'uari aa ninye ake o layiok lenyena pokira oare." 
Ruth1:4 Ore kulo pokira neyam ntoyie oo Lmoabu; ore apa enkarna e nabo naa Orpa ore enkarna e nkae naa Rusi. Etobiko apa ninche te ine ilarin oobaya tomon. 
Ruth1:5 Ore Mahalon o Kilion neye sii ninche, neaku ore ina kitok enoto olkiyioi lo lmoruo lenye o loo layiok lenyena." 
Ruth1:6 Nedumunye ninye o nena toyie oo layiok lenyena pee errinyo te ina kop e Moab, amu etoning'o apa ninye te ina kop e Moab nchere etumutana Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena neisho ninche endaa." 
Ruth1:7 Nedumunye teine aapuo teine wueji netii ninye te nebo ntoyie are oo layiok lenyena, neibung enkoitoi aapuo enkop e Yuda." 
Ruth1:8 Kake enyaaka Naomi ajoki nena toyie are oo layiok lenyena, “Enchom entorrinyoto, shomo ake oltung'ani enkaji e ngotonye. Naa meitaasa intae Olaitoriani isupati, anaa apa enintaasa intae ilootuata o nanu." 
Ruth1:9 Meidimie intae Olaitoriani enoto nkang'itie, oltung'ani ake te intae netum olmoruo!” Neitoki ang'utut ninche, neyietu ninche aaishir." 
Ruth1:10 Nejoki ninche ninye, “A-a, eikirrinyo iyiook te nebo aapuo enetii iltung'ana linono.”" 
Ruth1:11 Kake etejo Naomi, “Entorrinyoto enchom ntoyie aainei, kainyoo pee kiriamariyieyie nanu? Keton nanu aata ilayiok te nkoshoke ai eji pee eyooki aayam intae?" 
Ruth1:12 Entorrinyoto enchom, ntoyie aainei, shomo ake oltung'ani enkoitoi enye, amu atamorua nanu meekure atum olmoruo. Amaa naaji ninye te najo kaata osiligi, anaa napaji ninye tenaa katum olmoruo ena kewarie naiu ilayiok," 
Ruth1:13 iyanyunyu naa o metubulu? Eipalipala intae meyami intae. A-a, ntoyie aainei, amu keme oleng te nanu te nkaraki intae, nchere aatigilunore nanu enkaina o Laitoriani.”" 
Ruth1:14 Neitoki ninche aayietu aaishir, neng'utut Orpa enkaputani enye kake etamuatakine Rusi ninye." 
Ruth1:15 Nejo ninye, “Ng'ura, esintani ino eshomo olorere lenye nelo enetii nkaitin enyena; torrinyoyu tusuja esintani ino.”" 
Ruth1:16 Kake etejo Rusi, “Mikisai nanu maatung'uai iyie arashu pee arrinyo eitu aasuj iyie; amu ore ewueji nilo ninye nanu alo, ore ewueji nirrag naa ninye nanu airrag; ore iltung'ana linono naa keaku iltung'ana laainei, neaku Enkai ino Enkai ai;" 
Ruth1:17 ore ewueji ninang ninye nanu anang, naa te ine aanukari nanu. Maaitaasa nanu Olaitoriani ena aitulus tenaa ninye kaarishie keeya iyie.”" 
Ruth1:18 Ore ake pee edol Naomi ajo eteenikine asuj ninye, neitu eitoki ajo ae." 
Ruth1:19 Neaku eshomo ninche pokira are ometabai Betlehem. Ore ake pee ebau Betlehem neing'asia enkang pooki te nkaraki ninche; nejo nkituaak, “Ai Naomi ena?”" 
Ruth1:20 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Emikimpot nanu aajo Naomi, entejoki nanu Mara, amu aaitaasa nanu Olmagilani mbaa e mion." 
Ruth1:21 Ashomo apa nanu abore, naatorrinyuo nanu Olaitoriani arok. Kainyoo pee kimpotipoto nanu aajo Naomi, aaisilisilo nanu Olaitoriani neyaua Olmagilani entaboi shumata nanu?”" 
Ruth1:22 Neaku etorrinyunye Naomi o Rusi ina oo Lmoabu nara entito o layioni lenye. Etorrinyunye ninche eing'uaa enkop e Moab. Nepuonu ninche Betlehem te nkiterunoto e nkisampuare e shairi. 
Ruth2:1 Eeta apa Naomi oltung'ani le sotua lo lmarei lo lmoruo lenye, o ltung'ani karsis, lo lmarei le Elimelek, oji enkarna enye Boas." 
Ruth2:2 Ore Rusi ina oo Lmoabu nejoki Naomi, “Nchooki nanu mashomo enkurma ang'osilu ilng'osil le nkano te siadi ilo latumie nanu ninye omom.” Nejoki Naomi ninye, “Shomo entito ai.”" 
Ruth2:3 Neaku etudumunye Rusi alo asotisho ti atua enkurma asuj lelo ooisampu, nelotu apa ninye ewueji enkurma e Boas laa olo lmarei le Elimelek." 
Ruth2:4 Naa ng'ura, eewuo Boas eing'uaa Betlehem, nejoki lelo ooisampu enkurma, “Metaa Olaitoriani te nebo intae!” Newal ninche aajo, “Mikitamayiana Olaitoriani.”" 
Ruth2:5 Neitoki Boas ajoki ilo aisiaayiani lenye oitasheiki lelo ooisampu, “Keneng'ae ena sila?”" 
Ruth2:6 Nejoki ilo sinka aitasheikinoni, “Entito oo Lmoabu apa nairiamunore Naomi te nkop e Moab." 
Ruth2:7 Netejo ninye, ‘Aatasayia nchooki nanu matasotu naiturrur tiatua irridat le shairi o le nkano te siadi ilooisampu.’ Neaku eewuo ninye, netasotishe ebaiki tadekenya o metabaiki ena kata, eitu ninye eyagie te nkiti rishata.”" 
Ruth2:8 Neitoki Boas ajoki Rusi, “Ore taata, toning'o, entito ai, milo asotisho ti ai kurma, nimilo aing'uaa ena, kake tataaniki ntoyie aainei." 
Ruth2:9 Ing'ura iyie ewueji nepuo ninche aaisampishore, nilo iyie asujaa ninche. Keitu nanu aitanap ilbarnot pee mikintanyamal ninche iyie? Naa te niata enkure shomo enetii motioo tooko ina natookutuo ilbarnot.”" 
Ruth2:10 Negilaki kung neirugokino enkop nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo nanu pee anoto omom too nkonyek inono, eji nikitishilayie hoo nara enkomoni?”" 
Ruth2:11 Kake etawalikia Boas ninye ajoki, “Ore nena pooki nintaasa enkaputani ino ebaiki keeya o lmoruo lino aatolikioki nanu aaitobiraki, o ina apa nitung'uayie papaai lino o yieyioo lino o enkop inyi nilotu enkop oo ltung'ana apa limiyiolo." 
Ruth2:12 Mikitalaaki Olaitoriani ina apa nitaasa, nikincho Olaitoriani olerrinyore te nkiputakinoto Enkai oo Siraeli, naa abori inaipuko enyena iewuo asaru!”" 
Ruth2:13 Neitoki Rusi ajo, “Kimpirisie iyie nanu, olkitok lai, amu kintagolo nanu oshoke nirorie esinka ino te supatisho, hoo ninye nemara nanu nabo oo nkaisiayiak inono.”" 
Ruth2:14 Ore te nkata nainosi endaa nejoki Boas, “Wou ene, pee inos endaa nintadoiki oldung'oti lino engirra atua enaisho oo sabibu.” Neaku etotona ninye te nebo nena aisampuak, neitarasaki ninye emukate natapejoki; neinos ninye o metaraposhoyu, neleku." 
Ruth2:15 Ore pee edumunye ninye alo asotisho, neiguan Boas ilbarnot lenyena ajoki, “Enchoo ninye metasotisho ninye tiatua o metong'osilu irridat, nimibuakiki ninye." 
Ruth2:16 Ore sii entaiki ninye kulie naatii irridat, ning'ueikiki ninye metasotu, nimimbuakiki ninye.”" 
Ruth2:17 Neaku etasotishe ninye ti atua enkurma o metaa teipa; neitoki aidong nena naatasotuo ninye, neaku efa nabo e ntapa naji shairi." 
Ruth2:18 Nedumu ninye aya nelo atua enkanasa; neitodol enkaputani enye entoki natasotuo ninye, neyaua sii aisho ninye endaa duoo natelekua ninye etaraposhe." 
Ruth2:19 Nejoki enkaputani enye ninye, “Kaji duo taata ishomo asotishore? Naa kaji itaasishore? Metamayiani ilo tung'ani likitisirua iyie.” Neaku etolikio ninye enkaputani oltung'ani duo oshomo aaisiaai, nejoki, “Ore enkarna e ilo tung'ani duo lashomo aaisiaai naa keji Boas.”" 
Ruth2:20 Nejoki Naomi ina tito o layioni lenye, “Metamayiana Olaitoriani ilo leitu eing'uaa esupatisho enye ilo oishu aashu iloo tuata!” Neitoki sii Naomi ajoki ninye, “Olo lmarei lang ilo tung'ani, obo le ntaloishi ang.”" 
Ruth2:21 Nejo Rusi, ina tito oo Lmoabu, “Ore te nebo nena, aatiaaka ninye, ‘Tataaniki ilaisiayiak laainei, o metaba anaa neidip enkisampuare.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 Neitoki Naomi ajoki Rusi, ina tito o layioni lenye, “Keishiaakino entito ai te nilo iyie te nebo nkaisiayiak enyena, pee mikintanyamali ake ti ae kurma.”" 
Ruth2:23 Neaku etataanikia apa ninye nkaisiayiak e Boas, esotisho o metabau enkiting'oto e nkisampuare e shairi o enkano; neton ninye te nebo enkaputani." 
Ruth3:1 Neitoki Naomi enkaputani enye ajoki ninye, “Entito ai, aimaaing'uraki nanu iyie ang, pee itum aitirring'ayu?" 
Ruth3:2 Amaa, Boas, aime olol lgilata lang, naa atua nkaisiayiak enyena itii? Ng'ura eitobir ade shairi kewarie te wueji neidong'ishoreki." 
Ruth3:3 Ntukuoyu naa niyela te ilata ninchop ilkilani sidain nidoyio alo ewueji neidong'ishoreki; kake mincho kidol ilo tung'ani o metaba anaa neidip ainosa endaa neokisho. 
Ruth3:4 Kake te nelo ninye airrag, tisipu ewueji neirragie ninye; nilo taa abolu nkejek enyena nirrag te ine; naa eikiliki ninye enias.”" 
Ruth3:5 Newal ninye ajo, “Ore pooki nijo kalo nanu aas.”" 
Ruth3:6 Neaku eshomo ninye ewueji neidong'ishoreki neas anaa enaitanapa enkaputani ninye. 
Ruth3:7 Ore eidipa Boas ainosa endaa neokisho netishipe oltau lenye nelo ninye airrag te bayie o sototi le nkurma. Nelotu Rusi akiti nebolu nkejek enyena, neirrag." 
Ruth3:8 Ore te mpolos e kewarie neipirriu ilo tung'ani, neibelekenya, naa ng'ura, eirragita enkitok too nkejek enyena!" 
Ruth3:9 Nejo ninye, “Ira ng'ae?” Newal ninye ajo, “Ara nanu Rusi, enkaisiaayiani ino; isalaasha olkila lino ntoipo enkaisiaayiani ino amu iyie olo lgilata lang o taana.”" 
Ruth3:10 Nejoki ninye, “Mikitamayiana Olaitoriani, entito ai; inyaaka aitasapuk ena supatisho aitulusoo tene dukuya, nchere eitu iyie ilo asujaa ilbarnot, aa karsisi o aa aisinak." 
Ruth3:11 Ore naa taata entito ai, miureishoyu, kaaitaas nanu nena pooki niomonu, amu eyiolo pooki lena ang nchere ira enkitok e tipat." 
Ruth3:12 Naa kesipa nchere ara nanu olo lgilata linyi linyikare, ore ake eyia etii olo lgilata linyikare alang nanu." 
Ruth3:13 Totona ena kewarie, ore tadekenya, ti nikintaas ninye te rishat o ltung'ani lo lgilata, naa sidai; nchoo ninye eas ina. Kake te nemeyieu ninye neas ina rishata o ltung'ani lo lgilata te iyie, ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, nalo nanu aas erishata o ltung'ani lo lgilata te iyie. Irraga mekenyu.”" 
Ruth3:14 Neaku eirraga ninye too nkejek enyena o mekenyu, kake etudumunye ninye enasirie; nejoki Boas, “Mincho ake eyiolouni aajo eewuo enkitok ewueji neidong'ishoreki.”" 
Ruth3:15 Nejo ninye, “Iyau ilo karasha linchopito toluaa.” Neaku etoluaa ninye, nepik ninye mboreitin ile e shairi neitanap ninye; nelo ninye atua enkanasa." 
Ruth3:16 Ore pee elo ninye enetii enkaputani, nejoki ninye, “Kaji eikunari mbaa, entito ai?” Neliki Rusi nena pooki naaitaasa ilo tung'ani," 
Ruth3:17 ejo, “Ore kuna boreitin ile e shairi ninye laaishoo, amu etejo ninye, ‘Milo too nkaik naarook enetii nkaputani ino.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Newalu Naomi ajo, “Taanyisho entito ai o metaba anaa niyiolou enetiu ena bae, amu meitirring'a ilo tung'ani, kake kelo taata aitabaya ena bae.”" 
Ruth4:1 Neilep Boas alo kishomi neton te ine; naa ng'ura ore oladuoo lo lgilata lenye onyikare oimaka Boas nelotu agiroo. Neaku etiaaka Boas, “Mbelekenyunye olchore, totona tene;” neibelekenyunye ninye neton." 
Ruth4:2 Neyau ninye ilpayiani tomon le ina anasa nejo, “Entotoni tene;” netoni ninche." 
Ruth4:3 Neitoki ninye ajoki lelo lo lgilata lenye, “Ore Naomi enoshi natorrinyunye te nkop e Moab, nemirita enkiti wueji e nkop apa o ltung'ani lo lgilata lang oji Elimelek." 
Ruth4:4 Neaku atejo nanu kaaliki iyie, naajoki, Inyang'u te dukuya kulo ootoni tene, o te dukuya kulo payiani lo lorere lang. Tenaa iyie inyang'u; kake te niminyang'u, tolikioki nanu, pee atum atayiolo, amu meetae likae likidutieki pee inyang'u, naa nanu laaitoki asuju.” Nejoki ninye, “Kainyang'u nanu.”" 
Ruth4:5 Neitoki Boas ajoki, “Ore akenya enkolong ninyang'u enkurma te nkaina e Naomi, ninyang'u sii ninye Rusi, ina tito oo Lmoabu, ina oliai olapa lemeishu pee errinyokini enkarna e ilo lemeishu enjung'ore enye.”" 
Ruth4:6 Neitoki ilo tung'ani lo lgilata lenye ajo, “Maidim nanu ainyang'u te nkaraki kewan ai, pee mainyal ake enjung'ore ai. Iwa iyie erishata ai metaa enino makewan, amu maidim nanu atalaku.”" 
Ruth4:7 Ele apa olkerreti too le Israel too nkolong'i e apa, too mbaa naaipirta elakunoto o ewalunoto; ore pee eitisipi enkinyiang'a neitayu oltung'ani enamuke neisho olikae, naa ena pukunoto apa enkitabaroto too Siraeli." 
Ruth4:8 Neaku ore ake pee ejoki ilo tung'ani lo lgilata lenye Boas, “Inyang'u iyie,” nedotu ninye enamuke." 
Ruth4:9 Neitoki Boas ajoki lelo payiani o ltung'ana pooki, “Irara intae ilchakenini ena olong nchere ainyang'ua nanu te nkaina e Naomi nena pooki apa naara ine Elimelek, o pooki naara ine Kilion o Mahalon." 
Ruth4:10 O Rusi sii ina tito oo Lmoabu ina, oliai e Mahalon, ainyang'ua nanu ninye metaa enkitok ai, pee eitudupari enkarna e ilo otua te njung'ore enye, pee meiminieki enkarna e ilo lemeishu too lalashera lenyena, o te kishomi e wueji enye; irara intae ilchakenini ena olong.”" 
Ruth4:11 Nejo lelo tung'ana pooki ootii kishomi, o lpayiani, “Kira iyiook ilchakenini. Meitotiuo Olaitoriani ina kitok nalotu atua enkaji ino anaa Raheli o Lea, naa ninche pokira naatesheta enkaji e Israel. Tubulu iyie te Efrata nining'oyu te Betlehem;" 
Ruth4:12 naa metotiuo enkaji ino anaa enkaji e Peres, laa ninye etoikio Tamar Yuda, te nkaraki nkera nikincho iyie Olaitoriani tena siankiki.”" 
Ruth4:13 Neaku eewa Boas Rusi neitaa enkitok enye; nelo aboitare ninye, neisho Olaitoriani metunutayu, neiu enkayioni." 
Ruth4:14 Nejoki inkituaak Naomi, “Meisisi Olaitoriani, laa ninye leitu kipalaa iyie ena olong miata oltung'ani lo lgilata, naa metoning'oyu enkarna enye te Israel!" 
Ruth4:15 Keaku ina kerai olikirrinyoki enkishui nikintagol te moruao ino; amu ore ina tito o layioni lino nikinyor iyie, nelang ninye ilayiok oopishana, netoiuo ninye.”" 
Ruth4:16 Kaae nedumu Naomi ina kerai neirragie to lgoo lenye, neaku ninye enkaing'urani enye." 
Ruth4:17 Nedung'oki nkituaak e latia e nkarna, ejo, “Etoikioki Naomi olayioni.” Neisho ninche ninye enkarna aajo Obed; ninye apa menye le Yese, menye le Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Ena ninye eishoi e Peres: Peres apa menye le Hesron," 
Ruth4:19 neiu Hesron Raam, Neiu Raam Aminadab," 
Ruth4:20 Neiu Aminadab Nashon, neiu Nashon Salmon," 
Ruth4:21 neiu Salmon Boas, neiu Boas Obed," 
Ruth4:22 Neiu Obed Yese, neiu Yese Daudi." 
1Samuel1:1 Etii apa oltung'ani obo le Ramataim, le ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim, oji enkarna enye Elkana olayioni le Yeroham, olayioni le Elihu, olayioni le Tohu, olayioni le Sufi ilo le Efraim." 
1Samuel1:2 Neeta apa ninye nkituaak are; ore enkarna e ina e dukuya naa Hana, ore enkarna e nkae naa Penina. Neeta apa Penina nkera kake meeta apa Hana nkera." 
1Samuel1:3 Naa keilep apa ele tung'ani to lari ake o to lari ailep te nkanasa enye alo aserem nepolosaki Olaitoriani loo lororani te Shilo, te ine apa nerayie ilayiok pokira oare le Eli, Hofni o Finehas ilapolosak lo Laitoriani." 
1Samuel1:4 Ore apa te ina olong napolosisho Elkana, neisho ninye irubat Penina, enkitok enye o layiok lenyena pooki o ntoyie enyena;" 
1Samuel1:5 naa, ore hoo nenyor apa Hana neisho ninye erubata nabo ake, amu eikeno Olaitoriani enguset enye." 
1Samuel1:6 Ore apa Penina naitayunore ninye naa keitagor ninye oleng neinosie osina, te nkaraki naikeno Olaitoriani enguset enye." 
1Samuel1:7 Neikunari neijia to lari ake, o to lari. Ore anaake te nelo ninye enkaji o Laitoriani neitagor apa ina aini enye ninye. Ore enkaraki ina neishir Hana ometaa menya endaa." 
1Samuel1:8 Ore Elkana ilo payian lenye, nejoki ninye, “Hana, kainyoo peyie inchir? Naa kainyoo pee minya endaa? Naa kainyoo pee eeta oltau lino osina? Aimalusoo too ilayiok tomon te iyie?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Ore pee eidip ninche aainosa endaa, neokisho te Shilo nedumunye Hana. Netonita apa ina kata Eli ilo apolosani to ltonet te mbata e ng'ape e kutukaji e ina aji o Laitoriani." 
1Samuel1:10 Neeta apa ninye Hana emion sapuk to ltau neomon Olaitoriani, neishir te mion." 
1Samuel1:11 Nenya ninye olmumai nejo, “Olaitoriani loo lororani, tenaa eing'or iyie te sipata osina le sinka ino, nikidamu nanu, nimincho kirikino esinka ino, kake nincho esinka ino olayioni, naisho nanuninye Olaitoriani inkolong'i pooki e nkishui enye, nemeetae olmurunya oiseyie endukuya enye.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Ore eomonito ninye te dukuya Olaitoriani, neing'or Eli enkutuk enye." 
1Samuel1:13 Eirorita apa Hana to ltau lenye, nchonito enyena e nkutuk ake naaiseuseu nemening'o oltoilo lenye; ore enkaraki ina nejo Eli tenaa kenkitok natemere." 
1Samuel1:14 Nejoki Eli ninye, “Imera ade o anu? Intalamai ina aisho ino.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Kake etawala Hana ajo, “A-a, Olkitok lai, ara nanu enkitok naata emion to ltau; eitu nanu aok enaisho naitemerisho, agira nanu abukoki Olaitoriani enyamali oltau lai." 
1Samuel1:16 Minko naa esinka ino aitaa enkitok e pesho, amu ore ena rishata pooki kagira alikioo eyieunoto ai o sina lai.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Neitoki Eli awaliki, “Shomo te seriani, mikinchoo Enkai oo Siraeli nena nitasayua te dukuya ninye.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Nejo ninye, “Nchoo esinka ino menoto omom too nkonyek inono.” Nelo ina kitok te nkoitoi enye nenya endaa, neitu ninye eitoki aisinanuo." 
1Samuel1:19 Neinyototo ninche aayooki tadekenya neserem Olaitoriani; neitoki aashuko aapuo enkang enye te Rama. Neyiolou Elkana Hana ina kitok enye, nedamu Olaitoriani ninye;" 
1Samuel1:20 ore pee ebaya enkata nenutayu Hana neiu ninye enkayioni, nejo ninye enkarna enye Samuel, amu etejo ninye, “Atoomonuo nanu ninye to Laitoriani.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Ore ilo tung'ani oji Elkana o enkaji enye pooki neilep aapuo aaitaiki Olaitoriani olasar te pooki ari, nelak ninye olmumai lenye." 
1Samuel1:22 Kake eitu ninye eilep Hana alo, amu etiaaka ninye olpayian lenye, “Te neoruni enkerai lke, nayau nanu ninye, pee etum ataliooyu te dukuya Olaitoriani, neton te ine ntarasi.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Nejoki Elkana ilo payian lenye, “Taasa ina naa ninye sidai te iyie; totona ometaba anaa neoruni ninye lke; meibung'a ake duoo ninye Olaitoriani ororei lenye.” Neton ina kitok neing'or aitubulu olayioni lenye, ometaba anaa neere ninye." 
1Samuel1:24 Ore ake pee eoruni ilke neya ninye ailepie te nebo ninye, oloing'oni loo larin okuni, o entemet nabo e nkurma o olbene lo lchoni le naisho oo sabibu, neyau ninye enkerai ina aji o Laitoriani natii Shilo; naa ei kiti ina kerai." 
1Samuel1:25 Neyieng' ninche ilo oing'oni, neitoki ninche aayau ina kerai enetii Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 Nejo ninye, “Olkitok lai! Ore anaa eninchu, Olkitok lai, ara nanu ina kitok apa naitashe tene te dukuya iyie, eomonito Olaitoriani." 
1Samuel1:27 Atoomonuo naaishori ena kerai, naaishoo nanu Olaitoriani eomonunoto ai apa natoomono ninye." 
1Samuel1:28 Metaa aishoo nanu ninye Olaitoriani. Ore anaa neishu ninye naa keaku olo Laitoriani.” Neserem ninche Olaitoriani te ine. 
1Samuel2:1 Neitoki Hana aomon nejo, “Keshipakino oltau lai Olaitoriani; eitaaki kitok engolon ai to Laitoriani. Etaboloki enkutuk ai, matakueniki ilmang'ati laainei, amu kang'idakino nanu enjeunoto ino." 
1Samuel2:2 Metii likae sinyati anaa Olaitoriani. Metii likae leme iyie, metii endapidapoi nanyaanyukie, Enkai ang." 
1Samuel2:3 Emintoki aairo aabuaku to lwuasa, emincho enkitokoos eimu nkutukie inyi; amu ore Olaitoriani naa Enkai e ng'eno, naa te ninye eineneng'i iasat." 
1Samuel2:4 Etigilate nkaik e lelo magil. Kake eitagoloki lelo ooshal. 
1Samuel2:5 Ore lelo apa ooiputakinote neisilenoitie ate pee etum endaa, kake ore lelo apa ooisumash nemeekure eisumash. Etoiuo ina apa olupi nkera naapishana, kake ore ina apa naata nkera kumok nemeekure eeta." 
1Samuel2:6 Olaitoriani oar metua naa ninye oitopiu. Eitadou ninye aya enemeneng'a neilepunye. 
1Samuel2:7 Olaitoriani oitaa aisinani naa ninye oitaa karsis. Ninye oitadou, ninye sii oilepie." 
1Samuel2:8 Ninye odumu olaisinani aitung'uaa enterit. Nedumu ilaisinak aitung'uaa olchala loo nkuruon. Neitoton ninche te nebo lelo kituaak nejung olorika le nkanyit. Amu ore ing'apeta e nkop naa ino Laitoriani naa shumata ninche eiteleikia enkop. 
1Samuel2:9 Kerrip ninye nkejek e lelo ooisiligayu lenyena. Kake keiturrarri lelo arruok tiatua enaimin; amu mme te magilanisho eisulu oltung'ani. 
1Samuel2:10 Ore lelo mang'ati lo Laitoriani naa kegiligili aaitaa mbelibelat, kegilunore ninche naa kedaraki ninche te keper. Kedung'oki Olaitoriani enkiguana ineeiting'ie enkop, neisho ninye engolon ilo aiguanani lenye, neilepie ninye engolon eilo lenye otubukokoki eilata aaput.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Nelo Elkana ang te Rama. Neisiaai ina ayioni Olaitoriani te ine netii Eli ilo apolosani. 
1Samuel2:12 Ore apa lelo ayiok le Eli naa iltung'ana le pesho; meshilaa apa ninche Olaitoriani. 
1Samuel2:13 Ore apa olkuaak loo lapolosak loo ltung'ana naa nchere te neitayu pooki ng'ae olasar, nelotu osinka lo lapolosani, eton eitokitok inkiri, eeta enkisuret oo lala okuni te nkaina enye," 
1Samuel2:14 neisuroki ina kisuret atua entereet arashu ene eng'irra arashu emoti oo nkulukuok, arashu ae toki; ore ina pooki nayau ina kisuret neya olapolosani makewan. Neas ninche ina te Shilo too Siraeli apa ooetuo ine." 
1Samuel2:15 Ore ake sii, eton eitu epeji eilata, nelotu osinka lo lapolosani nejoki ilo tung'ani oitayuto olasar, “Nchoru nkiri o lapolosani naapeji. Amu meng'amaa ninye nkiri naayiera te iyie, kake inaajon.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Naa te nejoki ilo tung'ani ninye, “Nchoo ninche eng'as apej eilata, pee intoki aya inaaba anaa iniyieu,” nejo ninye, “A-a, iyau tena kata; naa te neme neijia, naya nanu te ngolon.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Ei sapuk apa ina ng'oki e lelo barnot oleng te dukuya Olaitoriani amu eitu eyanyit lelo tung'ana olasar lo Laitoriani. 
1Samuel2:18 Keisiaaisho apa Samuel te dukuya Olaitoriani, ina ayioni eishopito enkila sidai dorrop." 
1Samuel2:19 Naa keripaki apa ng'otonye oloti kila neyaki ninye te pooki ari, te neilep alo te nebo olpayian lenye epuo aaitayu olasar lo lari." 
1Samuel2:20 Nemayian Eli Elkana o enkitok enye, nejoki ninye, “Mikinchoo iyie Olaitoriani inkera tena kitok te ina sile apa naisilenoki ninye Olaitoriani,” neitoki ninche aashuko aapuo enkang enye." 
1Samuel2:21 Neitoki Olaitoriani amutan Hana, nenutayu ninye neiu ilayiok okuni o ntoyie are. Nebulu ina ayioni Samuel te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
1Samuel2:22 Etamorua apa Eli oleng ina kata, nening ninye nena pooki naaitaasita ilayiok lenyena Israel pooki, neboitare ninche nena kituaak naasisho te kutukaji e ilo ng'obor le ntumo." 
1Samuel2:23 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Kainyoo pee iasiasa kuna baa? Amu atoning'o nanu iasat inyi torrok too ltung'ana pooki." 
1Samuel2:24 A-a, ilayiok laainei, ime lomon supati lelo laning iltung'ana eidapashaa." 
1Samuel2:25 Te neas oltung'ani eng'oki tialo oltung'ani neitobiraki Enkai osotua, kake amaa teneas oltung'ani eng'oki tialo Enkai, kaing'ae namitu ninye.” Kake mening ninche oltoilo le papaai lenye; amu eyieunoto apa o Laitoriani pee ear ninche metuata." 
1Samuel2:26 Nebulu ina ayioni Samuel to sesen netum omom to Laitoriani o too ltung'ana. 
1Samuel2:27 Nelotu oltung'ani le Nkai enetii Eli, nejoki ninye, “Inji ejo Olaitoriani, Aitodolua apa nanu kewan te nkaji e papaai lino apa etii ninche Misiri, eisiaaisho te nkaji e Farao." 
1Samuel2:28 Nagelu nanu ninye ti atua iloshon pooki le Israel pee eaku olapolosani lai, pee eilep alo olperere lai lo lasar, apej enkorropil, neishop ina kila dorrop te dukuya nanu; naisho nanu enkaji e papaai lino ilasarri pooki le nkima ooing'uaa iltung'ana le Israel." 
1Samuel2:29 Kainyoo naa pee ing'or too nkonyek olorok lelo asarri laainei o nkishorot aainei apa naitanapishe, niyanyitu ilayiok linono aitalang nanu, intopiripiri ate too rubat nigelulu te pooki kishoroto oo ltung'ana laainei Israel?" 
1Samuel2:30 Ore enkaraki ena eibalunye Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli: ‘Aitisipa nanu nchere, ore enkaji ino o enkaji e papaai lino naa kejing atua neipang te dukuya nanu ntarasi’; kake eibalunye taata Olaitoriani; ‘Metalakuana ena te nanu; amu ore lelo laayanyit nanu nayanyit nanu,’ ore lelo laamen nanu neitololoikini." 
1Samuel2:31 Ng'ura, kepuonu inkolong'i, pee adung' nanu engolon inyi o engolon e nkaji e papaai lino, metaa meitoki atii oltung'ani kitok atua enkaji ino." 
1Samuel2:32 Ore to sina ning'or iyie te nkong'u o lom ina karsisisho pooki nayookini aaisho Israel; nemeitoki ae kata atii oltung'ani kitok atua enkaji ino ntarasi. 
1Samuel2:33 Ore oltung'ani te intae leitu aiwuang'ie aitung'uaa olperere lai lo lasar nelekuni pee eishir nkonyek enyena neisinanuo oltau lenye; ore emponaroto pooki e nkaji ino neye to lalem loo ltung'ana. 
1Samuel2:34 Naa ore ena nadoiki ilayiok linono pokira oare, Hofni o Finehas neaku olmonekie te iyie! Keye ninche pokira te nkolong nabo." 
1Samuel2:35 Nadumaki nanu kewan olapolosani supat, oas ninye te risioroto e ina natii atua oltau lai o atua endamunoto ai; nashetaki nanu ninye enkaji nasipa, nejingu ninye neipang boo te dukuya ilo gelunoti lai intarasi." 
1Samuel2:36 Ore pooki ng'ae oing'uari ti atua enkaji ino nelotu airrugo asai ninye te nkosholai nabo arashu emukate, naa kejo, ‘Tipikaki nanu aatoomono iyie, atua ewueji nabo oo lapolosak, pee atum ainosa embelati e mukate.’”" 
1Samuel3:1 Ore apa ina ayioni Samuel neisiaai Olaitoriani ti abori Eli. Nemeibala apa ororei lo Laitoriani nena olong'i. Meetae apa nduaat oleng. 
1Samuel3:2 Ore apa ina kata Eli, eidipa nkonyek aailiilai, metaa meekure edolisho, neirura apa ninye te wueji enye makewan;" 
1Samuel3:3 Ore oltaa lo Laitoriani neton eitu enye, neirragita Samuel ti atua enkaji o Laitoriani, te ine apa netii osanduku le Nkai." 
1Samuel3:4 Neipotisho Olaitoriani ajo, “Samuel! Samuel!” Nejo ninye, “Nele nanu!”" 
1Samuel3:5 Neipirri alo enetii Eli nejo, “Nele nanu, amu kimpoto iyie nanu.” Kake etejo ninye, “Eitu nanu aipot; nyaaki irraga.” Nelo ninye airura." 
1Samuel3:6 Neitoki Olaitoriani aipotisho nejo, “Samuel!” Nedumunye Samuel nelo enetii Eli, nejo, “Nele nanu, amu kimpoto.” Kake etejo ninye, “Eitu nanu aipotisho, Enkayioni ai, nyaaki irraga." 
1Samuel3:7 Neton apa eitu eyiolou Samuel Olaitoriani, neton eitu eibalunyeki ororei lo Laitoriani te ninye." 
1Samuel3:8 Neitoki Olaitoriani aipot Samuel enkata e uni. Nedumunye ninye nelo enetii Eli, nejo, Nele nanu, amu kimpoto nanu.” Nemusu Eli ajo Olaitoriani oipotito enkayioni." 
1Samuel3:9 Nejoki Eli Samuel, “Shomo, irraga; naa ti nikimpot ninye tejo, ‘Iroro, Olaitoriani, amu ening'ito osinka lino.’ ” Nelo Samuel airrag te wueji enye." 
1Samuel3:10 Nelotu Olaitoriani aitashe te ine, aipotisho anaa too nkulie katitin, ejo “Samuel! Samuel!” Nejo Samuel, “Iroro, amu ening'ito osinka lino.”"
