1Samuel3:11 Nejoki Olaitoriani Samuel, “Ng'ura etaa nanu enaas entoki ti atua Israel, naa ore nkiyiaa pokira are e ilo oning neitang'e." 
1Samuel3:12 Ore te ina olong naitabaya nanu ti alo Eli nena pooki natejo naaipirta enkaji enye, ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto." 
1Samuel3:13 Najoki nanu ninye nchere etaa nanu kaitame enkaji enye ntarasi, te ina torroni apa nayiolo ninye, te nkaraki apa namor ilayiok lenyena Enkai, neitu ninye eibooyo ninche." 
1Samuel3:14 Metaa kanya nanu olmumai te nkaji e Eli nchere ore ina torroni e nkaji e Eli meitayu ae kata olasar arashu enkishoroto ntarasi.” 
1Samuel3:15 Neirrag Samuel o mekenyu, neitoki ninye abol nkutukie oo nkajijik e nkaji e Nkai. Neureyu Samuel eliki Eli ina duaata." 
1Samuel3:16 Kake eipoto Eli Samuel nejoki, “Samuel, enkayioni ai.” Nejo ninye, “Nele nanu.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Nejo Eli, “Kainyoo kitiaaka ninye? Misudoo iyie te nanu. Metaasa Enkai ena te iyie aitulus, ti nimiki pooki toki e nena pooki nikitiaaka ninye.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Neliki Samuel ninye pooki toki nemeeta entoki naisudoyie te ninye. Nejo ninye, “Olaitoriani, nchoo ninye eas ina naishaakino te ninye.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Nebulu Samuel, netii apa Olaitoriani te nebo ninye, neitu eisho obo loo rorei lenyena edoiki enkop." 
1Samuel3:20 Ore Israeli pooki ebaiki Dan o metabaiki Beersheba neyiolo nchere etudupe Samuel aaku oloiboni lo Laitoriani. 
1Samuel3:21 Neitoki Olaitoriani alioyu te Shilo, amu eibalunye Olaitoriani kewan te Samuel te Shilo to rorei lo Laitoriani." 
1Samuel4:1 Nelotu ororei le Samuel enetii Israeli pooki. Nepuo Isiraeli aarare Ilfilisti; neitayu ilng'oborri te Ebenesa; ore Ilfilisti neitayu ilng'oborri te Afek. 
1Samuel4:2 Nenyiku Ilfilisti aaluaa pee earare Isiraeli; ore ake pee eibulaa olarrabal, nemir Ilfilisti Isiraeli nesesekuan iltung'ana oobaya nkalifuni ongu'an te ine wueji o larrabal." 
1Samuel4:3 Ore ake pee epuonu iltimito ilo kirragarie nejo ilpayiani le Israel, “Kainyoo pee eishoo iyiook Olaitoriani metimira Ilfilisti? Mayautu iyiook osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani ene aaitung'uaa Shilo, pee etum ninye aeu te nebo iyiook aitajeu iyiook aitung'uaa engolon oo lmang'ati lang.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Neaku eirriwayioki iltung'ana Shilo, meyautu aaitung'uaa ine ilo sanduku lo Sotua lo Laitoriani loo lolorani, ilo otonita te nchumata oo Ikerubi; ore lelo ayiok pokira oare le Eli, Hofni o Finehas netii apa ine te nebo osanduku lo Sotua le Nkai." 
1Samuel4:5 Ore ake pee elotu ilo sanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani atua lelo ng'oborri nebuak Israeli pooki embuakunoto kitok, o meikirikirayu enkop." 
1Samuel4:6 Ore pee ening Ilfilisti ilo toilo le mbuakunoto sapuk, nejo ninche, “Kainyoo ena buakunoto kitok too lng'oborri loo Lhebrania?” Ore ake pee eyiolou aajo eyauaki osanduku lo Laitoriani ilng'oborri" 
1Samuel4:7 neureishoyu Ilfilisti; amu etejo ninche, “Eewuo Enkai atua olg'obor.” Nejo ninche “Oi iyiook! Amu meetae ae kata entoki natotiuo nji." 
1Samuel4:8 Oi iyiook! Kaing'ae okordu iyiook aitung'uaa engolon e kuna aitin magil? Kuna aitin apa naataara Ilmisiri te pooki meitai ti ong'ota. 
1Samuel4:9 Entagolo oishua, niarishosho anaa lewa, intae Ilfilisti, miakuku ake irrindiki loo Lhebrania anaa apa enataa ninche te intae; entejo kiti! Anaa lewa entaarare ninche.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Neitayu Ilfilisti olarrabal, nemiri Isiraeli, neisik ninche, pooki tung'ani ake enkang enye; nesesekuani iltung'ana kumok oleng, amu etuata too Siraeli isikarini nkalifuni tomoni uni oopuo too nkejek." 
1Samuel4:11 Neibung'i ilo sanduku le Nkai; neari metuata lelo ayiok pokira oare le Eli, Hofni o Finehas." 
1Samuel4:12 Neipirri oltung'ani le Benchamen te ine nearareki, nelotu Shilo ina olong ake, epolosa nkilani enyena neeta enterit te ndukuya enye." 
1Samuel4:13 Ore ake pee ebaya, etonita Eli to lorika lenye te mbata e nkoitoi nalala aing'orisho, amu eiputukunyo oltau lenye te nkaraki ilo sanduku le Nkai. Ore ake pee elotu ilo tung'ani atua ang nelimu ilomon, neyietu enkang pooki aishir." 
1Samuel4:14 Ore ake pee ening Eli oltoilo lo lkiyioi, nejo ninye, “Kainyoo ena buakunoto?” Neitoki ilo tung'ani aisarisaru nelotu aliki Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Naa oloo larin ntomoni naaudo o isiet apa Eli, netiripate nkonyek enyena metaa meidim atodolisho." 
1Samuel4:16 Nejoki ilo tung'ani Eli, “Ara nanu ilo oewuo aing'uaa olarrabal; aisikua nanu aing'uaa olarrabal duoo.” Nejoki ninye, “Kaji eikunari, enkerai ai?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Ore ilo oyaua lomon newalu ajo, “Eisika Isiraeli te dukuya Ilfilisti, netaaraki sii iltung'ana kumok metuata; etuata sii ilayiok linono pokira oare, Hofni o Finehas, neibung'aki aaya osanduku le Nkai.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Ore pee eimaki osanduku le Nkai, nebatata Eli ti oriong aurori to lorika lenye te mbata e kishomi; negila emurt enye neye, amu oltung'ani moruo apa ninye, neiroshi. Netirisha ninye Israeli ilarin artam." 
1Samuel4:19 Ore entito enye, ina kitok e Finehas naa entuaa, etaa kejing aji. Ore ake pee ening lelo omon nchere eibung'aki osanduku lo Laitoriani, netua papaai lenye o lpayian lenye, neirrugo aisho; amu etijinga emion enye ninye." 
1Samuel4:20 Ore ina kata eye ninye nejoki nena kituaak naaitoisho ninye, “Miureisho, amu itoiuo enkayioni.” Kake eitu ninye ewal arashu eshilaa." 
1Samuel4:21 Neisho ninye ina kerai enkarna ajo Ikabod, ejo, “Eshomo enkitoo aing'uaa Israel!” Te nkaraki ilo sanduku le Nkai oibung'aki o te nkaraki papaai lenye o lpayian lenye." 
1Samuel4:22 Nejo ninye, “Eshomo enkitoo aing'uaa Israel, amu eibung'aki osanduku le Nkai.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Ore ake pee eibung' Ilfilisti ilo sanduku le Nkai, nenap ebaiki Ebenesa o metabaiki Ashdod." 
1Samuel5:2 Neya Ilfilisti ilo sanduku le Nkai nepik atua enkaji e Dagon neitatashaki Dagon. 
1Samuel5:3 Ore ake pee eyooki aainyototo iltung'ana le Ashdod, ng'ura, etusulari Dagon te nkomom aosh enkop te dukuya ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani. Neya ninche Dagon neinyaaki ewueji enye." 
1Samuel5:4 Kake ore ake pee einyototo aayooki ti ae olong, ng'ura, etusulari Dagon te nkomom aosh enkop te dukuya ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani; ore endukuya e Dagon o nkaik enyena pokira are neirragita maate te mbata e kutukaji; osesen ake le Dagon etung'uayioki." 
1Samuel5:5 Enkaraki ena pee aa ore ilapolosak le Dagon o pooki oojing ina aji e Dagon nemeroro embata e kutukaji e Dagon te Ashdod o metabaiki ena olong. 
1Samuel5:6 Keiroishi apa enkaina o Laitoriani te Shumata iltung'ana le Ashdod, neitame ninche, neisomit ninche too ltuduta, Ashdod o ina kop namanita." 
1Samuel5:7 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana le Ashdod eneikununo mbaa, nejo ninche, “Meton osanduku le Nkai oo Siraeli te nebo iyiook; amu keiroishi enkaina enye te shumata iyiook o te shumata Dagon, enkai ang.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Neirriwaa ninche ilkiliku neiturrur te nebo ilkituaak pooki loo Lfilisti, nejo, “Kaa kintaas osanduku le Nkai oo Siraeli?” Newal ninche, ejo “Nchoo osanduku le Nkai oo Siraeli eyauni aaitamanu Gas.” Neyau ninche osanduku le Nkai oo Siraeli ine." 
1Samuel5:9 Kake ore ake pee eyau aaitamanu, near enkaina e Nkai ina anasa ayau enkuretisho sapuk, neitame ninye lelo tung'ana le ina ang, ilooti o lbotoro, o metaa eibulaitie iltuduta te ninche." 
1Samuel5:10 Neirriwaa ninche ilo sanduku le Nkai Ekron. Kake ore ake pee elotu osanduku le Nkai Ekron, neyietu iltung'ana le Ekron aaishir ejo, “Eyautua ninche aaitaman iyiook osanduku le Nkai oo Siraeli pee ear iyiook matuata o iltung'ana lang.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Neirriwaa ninche ilkiliku neiturrur te nebo ilkituaak loo Lfilisti, nejo, “Ewaita ele sanduku le Nkai oo Siraeli, enchoo eshuko alo ewueji enye makewan, pee memut ake iyiook o ltung'ana lang.” Amu etii apa enkuretisho e keeya atua ina ang pooki. Keiroishiu apa enkaina e Nkai te ine oleng;" 
1Samuel5:12 ore iltung'ana leitu eye nejing iltuduta, ore olkiyioi le ina ang neilep alo shumata." 
1Samuel6:1 Etii apa ilo sanduku le Nkai enkop oo Lfilisti ilapaitin oopishana. 
1Samuel6:2 Neipotu Ilfilisti ilapolosak o lasakutok nejo, “Kaa kintaas ele sanduku lo Laitoriani? Toliki iyiook entoki nikiyayie ewueji enye.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Nejo ninche, “Ti niyaya intae aashuk ilo sanduku le Nkai oo Siraeli, emiyaya ake erok, kake entayiolo ake pee ishorikinyenye ninye olasar le nkitarruorroto pee eishiunyeki intae, neyiolouni te intae aajo kainyoo pee meiuang'ieki enkaina enye te intae.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Nejo ninche, “Kainyoo ilo asar le nkitarruorroto likishukoki iyiook ninye?” Newalu ninche aajo, “Iltuduta imiet le sahabu o ndero imiet e sahabu, anaa esiana oo lkituaak loo Lfilisti; amu etii apa shumata intae olmeitai otiu anaa ele o shumata ilkituaak linyi." 
1Samuel6:5 Metaa meeta nchere mintayuyu nkitanyaanyukot oo ltuduta linyi o inkitanyaanyukot oo ndero inyi naainyal enkop, ninchosho enkitoo Enkai oo Siraeli; amu ebaiki neiteneneng' ninye aitung'uaa intae o nkaitin inyi o enkop inyi." 
1Samuel6:6 Kainyoo pee ntagoligolo intae iltauja linyi anaa apa enaitagolo Ilmisiri o Farao iltauja lenye? Amaa pee eidip ninye atekeshare ninche, keitu ninche eisho iltung'ana meshomo, nedumunye ninche aapuo?" 
1Samuel6:7 Ore naa taata ewaita nintobiribiri engarri ng'ejuk o nkishu naalepo are neitu ae kata epiki nkeek imurto niyenikiki nena kishu engarri, kake ewaita ilasho lenye ang, aaitalamaa te ine netii ninche." 
1Samuel6:8 Niyaya ilo sanduku le Nkai ninteleikiki ina garri, nepiki atua ilo sanduku enchoto enye nabo nena kitanyaanyukot e sahabu, naa ninche ishukoki ninye anaa olasar le nkitarruorroto. Nireureu ninye, nipalaa meshomo openy." 
1Samuel6:9 Ning'oring'oro; te neilep ninye aibung' enkoitoi nalo enkop enye kewan, alo Bet-shemesh, naa ninye ilo oitaasa iyiook ena taboi; Kake te neme neijia, nikiyiolou iyiook nchere mme enkaina enye natoosho iyiook, ketotiuo ake duoo neijia te iyiook tolbuket.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Neiko neijia iltung'ana, neya nkishu are naalepo neeniki ninche ina garri, neikenoo ilasho lenye ti ang." 
1Samuel6:11 Nepik ninche ilo sanduku le Nkai eng'arri, o ilo sanduku te nebo indero e sahabu o inkitanyaanyukot oo ltuduta lenye." 
1Samuel6:12 Nepuo nena kishu aaitoriori enkalo e Bet-shemesh aaibung' enkoitoi naporo neru epoito; nemeibelekenya enkalo aapuo tatene arashu aapuo kedienye; ore ilkituaak loo Lfilisti nesujaa ninche o metabaiki olpolosie le Bet-shemesh. 
1Samuel6:13 Ore ina kata neisamputua iltung'ana le Bet-shemesh enkano to erata; ore ake pee eshumu nkonyek enye nedol osanduku lo Laitoriani neng'idayu pee edol ninye. 
1Samuel6:14 Nelotu ina garri atua enkurma e Yoshua le Bet-shemesh Neitashe te ine. Netii apa osoit sapuk ine, neiper apa ninche nkeek e ina garri neitayu nena kishu anaa olasar opejori to Laitoriani." 
1Samuel6:15 Neitadou Ilawi ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani o ilo sanduku otashare, laa ninye etii atua nena kitanyaanyukot e sahabu, neirragie ninche te nchumata o soit sapuk; ore iltung'ana le Bet-shemesh neitayu ilasarri oopejori nepolosaki ilasarri Olaitoriani ina olong." 
1Samuel6:16 Ore ake pee edol lelo kituaak loo Lfilisti ina, neshuko ninche ina olong aapuo Ekron." 
1Samuel6:17 Kulo ninche lelo tuduta le sahabu ootushukutuo Ilfilisti anaa olasar le nkitarruorroto to Laitoriani: obo le Ashdod, obo le Gasa, obo le Ashkelon, obo le Gas, obo le Ekron;" 
1Samuel6:18 ore sii nena dero e sahabu, naa te risioroto oo nkang'itie oo Lfilisti e lelo kituaak pokira imiet, nkang'itie naasheta sunta o inkang'itie kutiti nemeeta sunta. Ore ilo soit sapuk, apa laa ninye eiteleikiaki ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani, naa shakenisho ebaiki ena olong ti atua enkurma e Yoshua olayioni le Bet-shemesh." 
1Samuel6:19 Near ninye metuata embata oo ltung'ana le Bet-shemesh, enkaraki naing'ura ninche atua ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani; near ninye metuata iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana te ninche, neishir iltung'ana enkaraki naitayio Olaitoriani emutata kitok ti atua iltung'ana." 
1Samuel6:20 Nejo iltung'ana le Bet-shemesh, “Kaingae oidim aitasho te dukuya Olaitoriani, ena Ai sinyati? Naa tenetii ng'ae ninye eilep alo aing'uaa iyiook?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Neirriwaki ninche ilkiliku lelo oomanya Kiriat-Yearim, ejo, “Etushukutuo Ilfilisti osanduku lo Laitoriani. Entadou wootu ewaita enitii.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Nepuonu iltung'ana le Kiriat-Yearim, neilepie ninche aaya ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani neyau ninye enkaji e Abindab te nchumata oldoinyo; neitisiny ninche olayioni lenye Eliesa, pee etum enkitasheikinoto e ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani." 
1Samuel7:2 Ore ebaiki ina olong apa nairragieki osanduku lo Laitoriani te Kiriat-Yearim, netulusoyie enkata naado, enkata oo larin tikitam, ore enkaji pooki e Israel neishiraki Olaitoriani." 
1Samuel7:3 Nejoki Samuel enkaji pooki e Israel, “Tenaa eishukunyenye aapuonu enetii Olaitoriani to ltau linyi pooki, ewuangie naa nena aitin oo loreren o ina Ashtarot entung'uai ate, nintoriokiki oltau linyi Olaitoriani, nisiaayiayia ninye ake, naa keitajeu ninye intae aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lfilisti.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Neiwuang'ie Isiraeli nkaitin naaji baal o Astorot, neisiaai ninche Olaitoriani ake." 
1Samuel7:5 Neitoki Samuel ajo, “Enturrurro Isiraeli pooki te Mispa, pee aomon nanu Olaitoriani te nkaraki intae.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Neiturrurro ninche te Mispa, neoku enkare neibukoo ina are te dukuya o Laitoriani ina olong, nejo te ine, neen ate aaitupukoo teina olong. Nejo ninche kitaasa eng'oki to Laitoriani. Neiguanaki Samuel iltung'ana le Israel te Mispa." 
1Samuel7:7 Ore ake pee ening Ilfilisti nchere eiturrurrote iltung'ana le Israel te Mispa, neilepu ilkituaak loo Lfilisti aapuo aarare Israel. Ore ake pee ening iltung'ana le Israel ina neureyu Ilfilisti oleng." 
1Samuel7:8 Nejoki iltung'ana le Israel Samuel, “Miyagie ake eitu inchiraki Olaitoriani Enkai ang te nkaraki iyiook, pee etum ninye aitajeu iyiook aitung'uai enkaina oo Lfilisti.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Neya Samuel olkuoo oleporeki nepolos anaa olasar opejori pooki to Laitoriani; neishiraki Samuel Olaitoriani te nkaraki Isiraeli, newaliki Olaitoriani ninye." 
1Samuel7:10 Ore eitayu Samuel olasar opejori, nenyiku Ilfilisti pee ear Israel: kake etadara Olaitoriani to ltoilo sapuk adaraki Ilfilisti nenang'aki ninche atua olmilo; neilanyisho aaisik te dukuya Israel." 
1Samuel7:11 Neipang iltung'ana le Israel te Mispa nesujaa Ilfilisti, nemut ninche o metabaiki abori Bes-kar." 
1Samuel7:12 Neitoki Samuel adumu osoit neirragie te rishata e Mispa o Yeshana, nejo enkarna enye Ebenesa; amu etejo ninye, “Ore otene etareto iyiook Olaitoriani.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Nemiri Ilfilisti neitu eigil aajing enkop oo Siraeli. Nearare enkaina o Laitoriani Ilfilisti too nkolong'i pooki e Samuel. 
1Samuel7:14 Ore nkanas e Israel apa naawaita Ilfilisti neshukokini Israel, ebaiki Ekron o metabaiki Gas; nekordu Israeli enkop enye aaitung'ua enkaina oo Lfilisti. Netii apa eseriani erishata e Israel o Lamori." 
1Samuel7:15 Neaku Samuel olarishani te Israel too nkolong'i pooki enkishui enye. 
1Samuel7:16 Nelo ninye amanaa to lari o to lari alo Betel, o Gilgal, o Mispa; neiguanaki ninye Israel te kuna wuejitin pooki." 
1Samuel7:17 Paa keshuko alo Rama, amu ine apa etii enkanasa enye, naa te ine sii apa eiguanaki Isiraeli (arish). Neshetaki ninye teine Olaitoriani olperere lo lasar." 
1Samuel8:1 Ore ake pee emoruau Samuel neitaa ilayiok lenyena ilarishak te Israel. 
1Samuel8:2 Ore enkarna e ilo ayioni lenye kikau naa Yoel, ore enkarna o liare, eji Abija; neiguana apa ninche te Beer-sheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Ore eyia eitu apa eibung lelo ayiok lenyena nkoitoi enyena, kake eibelekenyate aasujaa dupoto; neya ninche ntokitin eropare neboin esipata." 
1Samuel8:4 Neitoki ilpayiani pooki loo Siraeli aaiturrurro te nebo nepuonu enetii Samuel te Rama," 
1Samuel8:5 nejoki ninye, “Ng'ura, ira iyie moruo, ore layiok linono nemepuo too nkoitoi inono; ore naa taata tegelaki iyiook olaiguanani pee eitore iyiook anaa nkuapi pooki.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Kake eitu eitiship ina bae Samuel ina kata pee ejo ninche, “Nchoo iyiook olaiguanani pee eitore iyiook.” Neomon Samuel Olaitoriani." 
1Samuel8:7 Nejoki Olaitoriani Samuel, “Toning'o oltoilo loo ltung'ana te nena pooki nikijoki ninche iyie; amu eitu ninche kiany iyie, kake aatanyaita ninche nanu pee maitoki aaku olaiguanani te ninche." 
1Samuel8:8 Ore te risioroto oo nkiaasin pooki naaitaasa ninche nanu, ebaiki ina olong apa nayaua ailepunye aitung'uaa Misiri o metabaiki ena olong, aaing'uaa nanu, neisiai kulie aitin, metaa easita sii ina te iyie." 
1Samuel8:9 Ore naa taata, toning'o oltoilo lenye; nabo ake, nkoo ninche tuunoki, nintodol ninche nkoitoi e ilo aiguanani ooyooki aitore ninche.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Neliki Samuel irorei pooki lo Laitoriani lelo tung'ana ooikilikuanu olaiguanani te ninye. 
1Samuel8:11 Nejo ninye, “Kuna naaku nkoitoi e ilo aiguanani oyooki aitore intae; keya ninye ilayiok linyi, negelaki ingarrin enyena neaku ilakedok loo mbartan enyena, neipirri ninche te dukuya ingarrin enyena;" 
1Samuel8:12 negelu te nkaraki kewan enye ilarikok loo nkalifuni o larikok loo moomon, o kulikae pee etur enkurma enye o kulikae pee eisampu enkurma enye, neitobir sii imasaa olarrabal o ntokitin oo ngarrin enyena." 
1Samuel8:13 Neya ninye ntoyie inyi aitaa nkaitobirak oo sonkoyoni, o nkayiarak o nkapejok oo mukateni." 
1Samuel8:14 Neya ninye eneisul too nkurman inyi, o too sabibu o nkurman oo loirienito neisho ninche isinkan lenyena." 
1Samuel8:15 Neya ninye ematua e tomon oo ntapan inyi oe noo sabibu neisho ninche ilkituaak lenyena o isinkan lenyena. 
1Samuel8:16 Neya ninye isinkan linyi lewa o nkaisiaayiak inyi, o nkishu inyi naaisul, o sirkon linyi, nepik ninche esiaai enye." 
1Samuel8:17 Neya ninye ematua e tomon oo nkerra inyi, niakuku intae irrindiki lenyena." 
1Samuel8:18 Ore akenya ina olong niyietutu aaishir te nkaraki olaiguanani linyi, laa ninye itegelakitia ate; kake meng'amaa kenya intae Olaitoriani te ina olong.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Kake etanyaita iltung'ana einining ilo toilo le Samuel; nejo ninche, “A-a! Kake eikitum ake iyiook olaiguanani oitore iyiook," 
1Samuel8:20 pee kitum sii iyiook aatotiu anaa nkuapi pooki, netum sii olaiguanani lang aitoria iyiook, nerikoo ninye iyiook, nearisho ninye too larrabali lang.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Ore ake pee eidip Samuel atoning'o irorei pooki loo ltung'ana, nelimu ninche pooki too nkiyiaa o Laitoriani." 
1Samuel8:22 Nejoki Olaitoriani Samuel, “Toning'o oltoilo lenye, nigelaki ninche olaiguanani.” Neitoki Samuel ajoki iltung'ana le Israel, “Shomo pooki tung'ani enkanasa enye.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Etii apa oltung'ani le Benchamen oji enkarna enye Kish, olayioni le Abiel, olayioni le Seror, olayioni le Bekoras, olayioni le Afia, Olbenchameni, oltung'ani karsis oleng." 
1Samuel9:2 Neeta apa olayioni oji enkarna enye Saul, ilo barnoti oikishiaan. Metii apa oltung'ani ti atua iltung'ana pooki le Israel olang ninye te nkishaa; ebaiki ironyi lenyena neilep neado apa ninye alang pooki tung'ani." 
1Samuel9:3 Neimin apa isirkon le Kish, menye Saul. Nejoki Kish Saul olayioni lenye, “Toriko obo loo sinkan te nebo iyie, nidumunye, shomo ing'oru isirkon.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Neim ninche enkop oo ldoinyo e Efraim neim enkop e Shalisha, kake eitu ninche etum. Neitoki ninche aaim enkop e Shaalim kake metii apa ine. Neitoki ninche aaim enkop e Benchamen, kake eitu etum ninche." 
1Samuel9:5 Ore ake pee epuonu ninche enkop e Suf, nejoki Saulo ilo sinka lenye apa otii te nebo ninye, “Wou, maape aashuko mepal ake papaai lai enadamu isirkon neaku iyiook edamu.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Kake etiaaka, “Ng'ura, etii oltung'ani le Nkai ena ang, naa oltung'ani oyanyiti; ore ina pooki najo ninye nesipayu. Maape iyiook ine; ebaiki neliki ninye iyiook inaaipirta ena lototo nikitii.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Neitoki Saul ajoki ilo sinka lenye, “Kake amaa ti nikipuo, kainyoo iyiook kiyaki ilo tung'ani? Amu eishunye imukateni naatii atua ilbenia lang, nemetii enkishoroto nikiyaki ilo tung'ani le Nkai. Kainyoo kiata iyiook?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Neitoki ilo sinka awaliki Saul ajoki, “Ore tene, aata nanu ematua e ong'uan e shekel enkosholai; naa kaisho ilo tung'ani le Nkai, pee eliki iyiook enkoitoi ang.”" 
1Samuel9:9 Ore apa te Israel, te nelo oltung'ani aikilikuanisho ti alo inaaipirta Enkai, nejo ninye, “Wootu maapeiti enetii oladuani,” amu ore ilo taata oji oloiboni naa keji apa oladuani." 
1Samuel9:10 Nejoki Saul osinka lenye, “Enkiroroto sidai, wou maape.” Nepuo ninche ina ang apa natii ilo tung'ani le Nkai." 
1Samuel9:11 Ore eilepaki oldoinyo aapuo ina ang, nenang'are ninche iselenken aisiaayiak eipang'u aapuonu aaoku enkare, nejoki ninche, “Ketii oladuani ene?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Newalu ninche, “Etii, ng'ura, etii ninye dukuya intae. Esarisara; eewuo ninye tena kata ang, amu eeta taata iltung'ana olasar te wueji e shumata." 
1Samuel9:13 Ore ina kata ake ti nijing'ijing'i enkanasa nitumutumu intae ninye, eton eitu elo eilep alo ine wueji neika anya endaa; amu menya iltung'ana endaa o metaba anaa nelotu, aa keng'as ninye amayian olasar; ore te siadi nenya endaa lelo ooitoomonoki. Elepa taata enchom, amu ipuopuo aainepu ninye aasioki.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Neilep ninche aapuo ina anasa. Ore ejing'ita ninche ang, nedol ninche Samuel eipang'u alotu anang'are ninche eloito ailep alo ine wueji e shumata." 
1Samuel9:15 Ore apa eton eitu elotu Saul, netaboloko Olaitoriani Samuel:" 
1Samuel9:16 “Ore taisere enyikita ena saa naairriwaki nanu iyie oltung'ani oing'uaa enkop e Benchamen, naa ibukoki iyie ninye eilata aput pee eaku olkitok oitore iltung'ana laainei Isiraeli. Neitajeu ninye iltung'ana laainei aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lfilisti; amu atoduaa nanu osina loo ltung'ana laainei, amu eewuo olkiyioi lenye enatii nanu.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Ore ake pee edol Samuel Saul, nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Nele oltung'ani laa ninye aatolikio iyie! Ninye ilo olo aitore iltung'ana laainei.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Netaaniki Saul Samuel te kishomi, nejo, “Tolikioki nanu enetii enkaji o laduani.”" 
1Samuel9:19 Newaliki Samuel Saul, “Ara nanu oladuani; ilepa shomo te dukuya nanu ine wueji e shumata, amu ore taata ninya iyie endaa te nebo nanu, ore tadekenya naayooki aisho iyie shomo naaliki iyie nena pooki naatii ndamunot inono." 
1Samuel9:20 Ore te lelo sirkon linono ooimina nkolong'i uni naatulusoitie, mintoki adamu ninche, amu eidipaki aanoto. Naa kaing'ae ilo oyieuni ti atua Israel pooki? Aime iyie o enkaji e papaai lino pooki?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Newalu Saul, “Eimara nanu Olbenchameni, ilo osho kiti oleng too loshon le Israel? Aime aiterani, olmarei lang alang ilmareita pooki lo losho le Benchamen? Kainyoo naa pee kirorie iyie nanu tena oitoi?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Nerik Samuel Saul o ilo sinka lenye neyau ninche atua aji* neisho ninche ewueji te dukuya lelo pooki ooitoomonoki, nebaya apa lelo tung'ana tomoni uni." 
1Samuel9:23 Nejoki Samuel olayierani, “Iyau erubata duoo naaishoo, naa ninye aatiaaka iyie nteng'ela.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Neyau olayierani emuro o enkiring'o naibung'are neirragie ninche te dukuya Saul; nejo Samuel, “Toduaa ajo ore ina duoo natushumaki neirragieki te dukuya iyie. Inosa amu iyie duoo etushumakaki o metabau esaa natudung'uoki, pee itum ainosa te nebo ilomon.”" 
1Samuel9:25 Nedaa Saul te nebo Samuel ina olong. Ore ake pee edou ninche aaing'uaa ine wueji e shumata aapuonu ina anasa, eitobirakaki Saul endapash te nchumata enkaji neirrag ninye airura." 
1Samuel9:26 Ore enasirie neipot Samuel Saul te nchumata e nkaji ajoki, “Inyo, pee aatum airriwai iyie te nkoitoi ino.” Neinyototo Saul, ore ninye o Samuel neipang aapuo enkoitoi." 
1Samuel9:27 Ore epuoito ninche auluo ina ang, nejoki Samuel Saul, “Tiaaki ele sinka meituruko alo dukuya iyiook, ore eidipa aituruko, ntasho iyie tene te nkiti rishata, pee atum aibalunye te iyie ororei le Nkai.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Neitayu Samuel oltulet le ilata nebukoki endukuya e Saul eilata aput, neng'utut ninye nejo, “Keitu iyie kibukoki Olaitoriani eilata aput pee iaku olkitok oitore iltung'ana lenyena Isiraeli? Naa intore iyie iltung'ana lo Laitoriani, nintajeu iyie ninche aitung'uaa enkaina oo lmang'ati lenye oomanita. Neaku ele olmonekie te iyie nchere kitubukoko iyie Olaitoriani eilata aput pee iaku olkitok oitore enjung'ore enye." 
1Samuel10:2 Tinikilo iyie aorore nanu taata nitum iltung'ana oare te mbata e nkurare e Raheli te nkop e Benchamen pee etumo o Selsa, nikijoki ninche iyie, Ore ilapa sirkon lishomo iyie aing'oru nenotoki; ore taata papaai lino etapala enadamu isirkon neaku intae edamu, ejo, ‘Kaji aiko to layioni lai?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Nilo iyie dukuya o metabaiki olchani onyanyukie olng'aboli otii Tabor; nikinang'are iyie te ine iltung'ana okuni ooilep aapuo enetii Enkai te Betel, enapita obo ilkuoo okuni le kineji, nenapita olikae imukateni uni, ore olikae nenapita olbene lo lchoni le naisho oo sabibu." 
1Samuel10:4 Nikiroroki ninche nikincho iyie imukateni are ning'amu iyie te nkaina enye. 
1Samuel10:5 Ore te siadi ina nilotu iyie Gibeat-elohim, ine netii oltim loo Lfilisti; ore te ine, ilotu ina anasa, ninang'are entukus oo loibonok edou aapuonu eing'uaa ine wueji e shumata eeta enkawuo oo sinkolioitin o ntampurini o endule, o lwulul loo usin, te dukuya ninche, eibonisho." 
1Samuel10:6 Nelotu enkiyang'et o Laitoriani te ngolon shumata iyie, naa imbonisho iyie te nebo ninche nikimbelekenyi iyie aaitaa likae tung'ani." 
1Samuel10:7 Nchoo ake pee kinang'are iyie kulo monek, taasa enaba anaa enatum nkaik inono aataas, amu etii Enkai te nebo iyie." 
1Samuel10:8 Nidoyio iyie alo Gilgal te dukuya nanu; naa ng'ura, kalotu nanu enitii aitayu olasar opejori napolos olasar le seriani. Too nkolong'i naapishana taanyisho, o metaba anaa nalotu pee aaitodol iyie eniaas.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Ore ake pee eibelekenya ninye aisho Samuel enkoriong enye, neisho Enkai ninye likae tau; nebaya lelo monek pooki ina olong." 
1Samuel10:10 Ore ake pee epuonu ninche Gibea, ng'ura, nenang'are ninye entukus oo loibonok; nelotu enkiyang'et o Laitoriani te ngolon shumata ninye, neibonisho ninye ti atua ninche." 
1Samuel10:11 Ore apa lelo pooki ooyiolo ninye pee edol eneiko eibonisho te nebo iloibonok, nejokino iltung'ana maate, “Kainyoo naewuo shumata olayioni le Kish? Ketii sii Saul atua iloibonok?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Newal oltung'ani le ine wueji ajo, “Naa kaing'ae papaai lenye?” Metaa etaa endung'et e rashe eji, “Ketii sii ninye Saul atua iloibonok?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Ore ake pee eidip aibonisho nelotu ine wueji e shumata. 
1Samuel10:14 Nejoki olenkapu lenye Saul o ilo sinka lenye, “Kaji apa ishomo?” Nejo ninye, “Kishomo aaing'oru isirkon; ore ake pee kidol aajo metumi, nikipuo enetii Samuel.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Nejo ilo lenkapu le Saul, “Tolikioki siaake enikitiaaka Samuel.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Nejoki Saul olenkapu lenye, “Etiaaka ninye iyiook aibalakinye nchere enotoki lelo sirkon.” Kake ore ti alo ina bae e nkitoria natejo Samuel, eitu ninye eliki ai toki." 
1Samuel10:17 Neipotu Samuel iltung'ana meiturrurrokinoto Olaitoriani te Mispa. 
1Samuel10:18 Nejoki ninye iltung'ana le Israel, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli, ‘Ayaua nanu Israel ailepunye aitung'uaa Misiri, nalaku nanu intae aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lmisiri naitung'ua enkaina oo nkitoriat apa pooki naaisomita intae.’" 
1Samuel10:19 Kake itanyaita intae ena olong Enkai inyi, ilo oitajeu intae ti atua isinaitin linyi pooki o loisilisili; nitejo intae, ‘A-a, kake tipika olaiguanani shumata iyiook.’ Ore naa taata eyautu ate dukuya Olaitoriani too loshon linyi o too nkalifuni inyi.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Neriku Samuel iloshon pooki le Israel enetaana, nedoiki enkukuo olosho le Benchamen." 
1Samuel10:21 Neyau olosho le Benchamen enetaana too lmareita lenyena, nedoiki enkukuo olmarei le Matrit; ore te siadi neyau olmarei le Matri enetaana olee o lee, nedoiki enkukuo Saul ole Kish. Kake ore ake pee eing'oru ninche ninye, neitu etumi ninye." 
1Samuel10:22 Neitoki ninche aaikilikuanu to Laitoriani, “Keewuo ele tung'ani ene?” Nejo Olaitoriani, “Ng'ura, eisudori ninye ti atua lolan.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Neipirri ninche aayau ninye te ine; ore pee eitashe ti atua iltung'ana, naa keado alang pooki tung'ani ebaiki ironyi lenyena neilep." 
1Samuel10:24 Nejoki Samuel iltung'ana pooki, “Idolitata olaa ninye etegelua Olaitoriani? Metii likae laaijo ninye ti atua iltung'ana pooki.” Nebuaku iltung'ana pooki aajo, “Metobikoi olaiguanani!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Neliki Samuel iltung'ana enkitoo nairirikino olaiguanani isiaaitin enyena; neiger ti atua embuku neirragie te dukuya Olaitoriani. Neisho Samuel iltung'ana pooki meshomo, oltung'ani ake nelo enkang enye." 
1Samuel10:26 Nelo sii ninye Saul enkanasa enye te Gibea, ore te nebo ninye nepuo ilpayiani oogol ooiseyie Olaitoriani iltauja lenye." 
1Samuel10:27 Kake ore ilkulikae tung'ana le pesho, nejo, “Kaji eiko ele tung'ani te neitajeu iyiook?” Nemenaa ninche ninye, neitu ninche eyaki ninye nkishorot. Kake etigire ninye." 
1Samuel11:1 Neitoki Nahash, ilo Amoni, ailep alo neman Yabesh-gilead; nejoki iltung'ana pooki le Yabesh Nahash, “Ntaiki iyiook olning'o pee kisiaai iyie.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Kake etiaaka ninye Nahash, ilo Amori, “Tena oitoi aitaiki intae olning'o nchere kakurtu nanu nkonyek inyi pooki e tatene, napik esulare Israel pooki.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Nejoki ilpayiani le Yabesh ninye, “Nchoo iyiook muro too nkolong'i naapishana pee kitum aairriwai ilkiliku enkop pooki e Israel. Ore ake pee metii hoo obo oitajeu iyiook, nikincho iyiook iyie ate.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Ore ake pee epuonu ilkiliku Gibea e Saul, nelikioo ninche olomoni too nkiyiaa oo ltung'ana; neishir iltung'ana pooki aayietu." 
1Samuel11:5 Negira Saul alotu te nkurma te siadi ilmong'i; nejo Saul, “Kainyoo naishirie iltung'ana, pee eishirita?” Neliki ninche ilomon le lelo tung'ana le Yabesh." 
1Samuel11:6 Nelotu enkiyang'et e Nkai te ngolon shumata Saul pee eidip atoning'o kulo omon, neyupuyup oleng engoro enye." 
1Samuel11:7 Neya ninye ilmong'i oare ootii enchata emurt nabo, nedung'udung ninche aitaa ndung'ot, neirriwaa nena dung'ot enkop pooki e Israel, too nkaik e lelo kiliku ejo, “Ore pooki ng'ae lemeipang'u asuj Saul o Samuel, neikoni neijia ilmong'i lenyena!” Nejing iltung'ana euriata e Nkai, neipang'u ninche anaa oltung'ani obo." 
1Samuel11:8 Ore ake pee eiturrur aiken ninche te Besek, nera iltung'ana le Israel nkalifuni iip uni, ore iltung'ana le Yuda naa nkalifuni tomoni uni." 
1Samuel11:9 Nejoki ninche lelo ooetuo ooata olkilikuai, “Entiaaki iltung'ana le Yabesh-gilead inji, ‘Ore taisere, te neirouaju enkolong, nitumutumu intae enkordunoto.’ ” Ore pee epuonu lelo lo ilkilikuai neliki iltung'ana le Yabesh, neng'idayu ninche." 
1Samuel11:10 Neaku etejo iltung'ana le Yabesh, “Ore taisere naa eikipalari iyiook te ntae, naa indimidimi aaitaasa iyiook enaba anaa enidolidolo aa sidai te ntae.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Ore pee ekenyu nepik Saul lelo tung'ana ilturrurri okuni; nepuonu ninche atua empolos oo lng'oborri tadekenya enasirie, nedung lelo Amoni o meipira enkolong; ore lelo ooimishote neidapasha, o metaba anaa neaku meetae ninye oare lenye ootoni te nebo." 
1Samuel11:12 Nejoki iltung'ana Samuel, “Kaing'ae ilo apa otejo, ‘Eji keitore iyiook Saul?’ Entoriku lelo tung'ana pee kiar iyiook metuata.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Kake etejo Saul, “Meari ninye oltung'ani obo metua ena olong, amu ore taata neyaua Olaitoriani enkordunoto ti atua Israel.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Neitoki Samuel ajoki iltung'ana, “Wootu, maapeiti iyiook Gilgal paa te ine kintang'ejuk enkitoria.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Neaku eshomo iltung'ana pooki Gilgal, ore te ine neitaa ninche Saul olaiguanani te dukuya Olaitoriani te Gilgal. Ore te ine nepolos ninche ilasarri le seriani te dukuya Olaitoriani; ore te ine neshipa Saul o ltung'ana pooki le Israel oleng." 
1Samuel12:1 Nejoki Samuel Isiraeli pooki, “Eng'ura, atoning'o nanu oltoilo linyi te nena pooki nikitiaakita intae nanu, natuputoko nanu intae olaiguanani." 
1Samuel12:2 Ore taata, eng'ura, eloito olaiguanani te dukuya intae; nara nanu moruo naaiborra lukunya, naa eng'ura, etii layiok laainei te nebo intae; nashomo nanu te dukuya intae ebaiki kitisho ai o metabaiki ena olong." 
1Samuel12:3 Nele nanu; enchakenokoki nanu te dukuya Olaitoriani o te dukuya ilo lenye otubukokoki eilata aaput. Kol kiteng le ng'ae nanu aawa? Arashu ko sikiria le ng'ae nanu aawa? Arashu kaing'ae nanu ainyala? Kaing'ae nanu ainosie osina? Arashu ai te nkaina e ng'ae nanu atang'amua eropare pee aitamodok nkonyek aainei te ninye? Enchakenokoki nanu, naa kashukoki nanu intae.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Nejo ninche, “Eitu iyie iinyal iyiook arashu ainosie osina, arashu aisimaa ae toki te nkaina o ltung'ani.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Olaitoriani olchakeni te intae, naa ilo lenye otubukokoki eilata aaput olchakeni ena olong, nchere eitu intae itumutumu ae toki te nkaina ai.” Nejo ninche, “Ninye olchakeni.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Nejoki Samuel iltung'ana, “Olaitoriani olchakeni apa otegelua Musa o Aron neyau iloo papaai linyi ailepunye aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri." 
1Samuel12:7 Ore naa taata entasho entirring'ata, pee atum atasayia intae te dukuya Olaitoriani ti alo nkiaasin pooki e njeunoto o Laitoriani naataasa ninye te nkaraki intae o te nkaraki iloo papaai linyi." 
1Samuel12:8 Ore apa pee elo Yakobo Misiri neinosie ninye Ilmisirini osina, neishiraki iloo papaai linyi Olaitoriani neirriwaa Olaitoriani Musa O Aron, laa ninche ooyautua iloo papaai linyi aaitung'uaa Misiri, neisho ninche metobiko tene wueji." 
1Samuel12:9 Kake etorikine ninche Olaitoriani Enkai enye; nemiraki ninye ninche atua enkaina e Sisera, olkitok le njore e Yabin, olaiguanani le Hasor, o atua enkaina oo lfilisti, o atua enkaina o laiguanani le Moab; nearare ninche lelo." 
1Samuel12:10 Neishiraki ninche Olaitoriani, nejo, ‘Kitaasa iyiook eng'oki amu kitung'uaitie iyiook Olaitoriani, nikisiaayia iyiook Baal o Astarot; kake ore taata tokordu iyiook intung'uai atua enkaina oo lmang'ati lang, naa eikisiaai iyie.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Neirriu Olaitoriani Yerubaal o Barak o Yepsa, o Samuel, nekordu ninche intae aaitung'uaa enkaina oo lmang'ati linyi te pooki shoto; nibikibiki intae te seriani." 
1Samuel12:12 Ore pee idolidolo intae Nahash, olaiguanani loo Lamori eewuo aarare intae, nikijokiki intae nanu, ‘A-a, kake olaiguanani oitore iyiook,’ apa aa Olaitoriani Enkai inyi olaiguanani linyi." 
1Samuel12:13 Ore naa taata eng'ura ilo aiguanani litegelutua, laa ninye inkilikuanutua intae; eng'ura, etipika Olaitoriani olaiguanani shumata intae." 
1Samuel12:14 Ti niureyuyu intae Olaitoriani nisiaiaya ninye, nining'ining'i oltoilo lenye, nimipaashaa aarare enkitanapata o Laitoriani, naa ti nisujaa intae tenebo olaiguanani oitore intae, Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, nisidanunu" 
1Samuel12:15 kake te nimining'ining'i oltoilo lo Laitoriani, kake niayianya ina kitanapata o Laitoriani, nearare intae enkaina o Laitoriani, o ilo aiguanani linyi." 
1Samuel12:16 Ore naa taata entasho entirring'ata pee idolidolo ena toki kitok, nayooki Olaitoriani aas te dukuya nkonyek inyi." 
1Samuel12:17 Aime enkolong e nkisampuare e nkano ena olong? Ee, kaipot nanu Olaitoriani pee etum airriu endarata o enchan; niyiolouu nidolidolo aajo aikitok esuujisho inyi, apa nitaasa too nkonyek o Laitoriani, inkilikuanakiki ate olaiguanani.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Neaku neipot Samuel Olaitoriani, neirriu Olaitoriani endarata o enchan ina olong apa; neureyu iltung'ana pooki Olaitoriani o Samuel oleng." 
1Samuel12:19 Nejoki iltung'ana pooki Samuel, “Toomonoki isinkan linono to Laitoriani Enkai ino, pee mikiye iyiook; amu kinkilikuanakita ate ing'ok o ena suujisho amu kitopona iyiook ing'ok ang tena torroni, kinkilikuanakita ate olaiguanani.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Nejoki Samuel iltung'ana, “Emiureishoyu; itaasa intae ena torroni pooki, ore eyia emimbelekenya intae aany isujusuju Olaitoriani, kake esiaiya Olaitoriani too ltauja linyi pooki;" 
1Samuel12:21 nimimbelekenyanya aasujaa ntokitin e pesho nemeretisho nemeitajeusho, amu ine pesho." 
1Samuel12:22 Amu meiturraa Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena, te nkaraki enkarna enye kitok, amu eitisipa Olaitoriani pee eitaa intae iltung'ana lenyena." 
1Samuel12:23 Ore ake anaa te nanu, metalakuana te nanu malo ake naas eng'oki to Laitoriani te mpalata napal aomonoki intae naa kaiteng'en nanu intae te nkoitoi sidai naitoriori." 
1Samuel12:24 Entureita ake Olaitoriani nisiaayiayia te sipata to ltau linyi pooki; entadamu eneba mbaa sapuki naaitaasa ninye intae. 
1Samuel12:25 Kake te neton iasiasa ine suujisho, nejutori, intae o laiguanani linyi.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Eeta apa Saul ilarin esiana pee eiteru aitoreisho; neitore ninye Israel ilarin ooata esiana. 
1Samuel13:2 Negelu Saul iltung'ana nkalifuni uni le Israel; ore nkalifuni are netii te nebo Saul te Mikmash o ina kop oo ldoinyo e Betel, ore enkalifu nabo netii te nebo Yonatan te Gibea e Benchamen; ore ilkulikae tung'ana nerriny ang, pooki tung'ani ake nelo olng'obor lenye." 
1Samuel13:3 Nemir Yonatan oltim loo Lfilisti apa otii Geba; nening Ilfilisti ina. Neosh Saul emowuo te nkop pooki; ejo, “Nchoo Lhebrania metoning'o.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Nening Isiraeli pooki eji nchere etimira Saul oltim loo Lfilisti, o sii etaa Israeli ilmang'ati too Lfilisti. Neipoti iltung'ana meetu aaibung'are Saul te Gilgal." 
1Samuel13:5 Neiturrurro lfilisti pee eitayu olarrabal o Israel, ngarrin oo mbartan nkalifuni ntomoni uni, o lakedok loo mbartan nkalifuni ile, o sikerin ooba anaa osinyai le mbata enaiposha te nkumoi; nepuonu aailepu nepik ilng'oborri lenye Mikmash, natii enkalo oloo saen e Beshafen." 
1Samuel13:6 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana le Israel aajo etaa emiri (amu earitae apa iltung'ana oleng) neisudoo iltung'ana ate too nkapuniaa o too ngumot o too ndapidapo o too nkuraren o too lchorroi," 
1Samuel13:7 arashu eim ilang'at e Yordan aapuo e nkop e Gad o Gilead. Neton apa etii Saul Gilgal, nesujaa iltung'ana pooki ninye eikirikira." 
1Samuel13:8 Neanyisho ninye nkolong'i naapishana, enkata apa natudung'o Samuel; kake eitu elotu Samuel Gilgal, naa kegira iltung'ana aaidapasha aaing'uaa ninye." 
1Samuel13:9 Neaku etejo Saul, “Eyautu ilo asar opejori ene natii, o ilo asar le seriani.” Neitayu ninye olasar opejori." 
1Samuel13:10 Ore enaidipie enkitayunoto o lasar opejori, ng'ura, nelotu Samuel; neipang Saul alo anang'are ninye neng'asaki ninye." 
1Samuel13:11 Nejo Samuel, “Kaa iyie itaasa?” Nejo Saul, “Ore ake pee adol nchere kaaidapashari iltung'ana aaing'uaa, neitu sii ilotu too nkolong'i nikitudung'okinote neiturrurrote sii Lfilisti te Mikmash," 
1Samuel13:12 najo nanu, ‘Kaapuonu taata Ilfilisti aadoiki te Gilgal, neton eitu aing'oru omom to Laitoriani’; neaku ataaraka kewan, naitayu olasar opejori.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Nejoki Samuel Saul, “Itaasa te modai; eitu iyie imbung enkitanapata o Laitoriani Enkai ino, apa nikintanapa; amu ore taata anaata eitubulayie Olaitoriani enkitoria ino te Israel intarasi." 
1Samuel13:14 Kake ore taata mebikoo enkitoria ino; eing'orua Olaitoriani oltung'ani onyor oltau lenye; netegelua ninye Olaitoriani pee eaku olkitok too ltung'ana lenyena, enkaraki neitu iyie imbung ina nikintanapa Olaitoriani.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Nedumunye Samuel, neilep te Gilgal alo Gibea e Benchamen. Neiken Saul iltung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye, naa iltung'ana oobaya iip ile." 
1Samuel13:16 Ore Saul o Yonatan, olayioni lenye, o lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninche netoni te Geba e Benchamen; kake etuuno Lfilisti ilng'oborri te Mikmash." 
1Samuel13:17 Ore lelo oarisho neipang'u aaing'uaa ilng'oborri loo Lfilisti too lturrurri okuni; neibelekenya olturrur obo aing'or Ofra, alo enkop e Shual;" 
1Samuel13:18 ore olikae turrur neibelekenya aing'or enkalo e Bet-horon, ore olikae turrur neibelekenya aing'or ilo polosie oing'orita oerata le Sebuim te nkalo o lpurkel." 
1Samuel13:19 Nemetumi apa olkunoni hoo obo te nkop pooki e Israel; amu etejo Ilfilisti, “Pee meitobiraki ate Ilhebrania ilalema arashu iremeta.”" 
1Samuel13:20 Kake ore pooki ng'ae loo Siraeli nedoyio alo enetii Ilfilisti pee eii enchempe enye, o osururu, o entolu enye, o empanka enye nariuo nadung'ieki enkano;" 
1Samuel13:21 ore apa elaata naa esenti nabo kiti te nkiiyioto oo nchempei o too munton, naa erubata e shekel te nkiiyioto oo ntoluo o te mpikata oo nkeek." 
1Samuel13:22 Neaku te ina olong apa o larrabal nemetumi olalem arashu empere te nkaina e likae tung'ani obo le lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo Saul o Yonatan; kake eeta apa Saul o Yonatan, olayioni lenye." 
1Samuel13:23 Neipang oltim loo Lfilisti aapuo empaash e Mikmash. 
1Samuel14:1 Nejoki nabo olong Yonatan olayioni le Saul olbarnoti apa onap imasaa enyena o larrabal, “Wou, maape iyiook enetii oltim loo Lfilisti te lido kekun.” Kake eitu ninye eliki menye." 
1Samuel14:2 Netonita apa Saul te netaaniki Gibea ti abori olchani otii Migron; ore iltung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye nebaya iip ile," 
1Samuel14:3 o Ahija olayioni le Ahitab, ilo alashe le Ikabod olayioni le Finehas, olayioni le Eli, ilo apolosani lo Laitoriani te Shilo eishop enkila dorrop. Neitu eyiolou iltung'ana aajo eshomo Yonatan." 
1Samuel14:4 Ore te mpaash te ine apa neim Yonatan elo oltim loo Lfilisti netii apa emarti enchoto nabo o emarti te nkae shoto; neji nabo Boses neji enkae Sene. 
1Samuel14:5 Ore emarti nabo neitashe te moikuape te dukuya Mikmash ore enkae te kopikop te dukuya Geba. 
1Samuel14:6 Nejoki Yonatan ilo barnoti apa onapita imasaa enyena o larrabal, “Wou, maape iyiook enetii oltim le kulo lememurata; eidimayu pee eret Olaitoriani iyiook; amu meetae ae toki naidim aibooi Olaitoriani amitiki eitajeusho too lkumok arashu too lkuti.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Nejoki ilo onapita imasaa enyena olarrabal ninye, “Taasa anaa eniyieu niaas; ng'ura, atii nanu te nebo iyie, anaa enatiu ndamunot inono neijia etiu inaainei.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Nejo ninye Yonatan, “Ng'ura, eikilang iyiook aapuo enetii ilewa, nikintodol ate ninche." 
1Samuel14:9 Ore pee ejoki iyiook, ‘Entaanyisho o maetu iyiook enitii intae;’ nikintashe iyiook aaitirring'a te wueji ang, nimikilep iyiook aapuo enetii ninche." 
1Samuel14:10 Kake te nejo ninche, ‘Wootu elepu enikitii,’ nikilep iyiook aapuo; amu eishorua Olaitoriani ninche apik enkaina ang. Neaku ele olmonekie te iyiook.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Neitoduaaya pokira oare ate to ltim loo Lfilisti; nejo Ilfilisti, “Eng'ura, epuonu Ilhebrania aaipang'u too ngumot te nenen apa neisudorie ate.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Neipotu lelo tung'ana lo ltim, Yonatan o ilo anapani loo masaa enyena olarrabal nejo, “Elepu wootu enikitii, naa eikintodol intae entoki.” Nejoki Yonatan ilo anapani lenye, “Ilepu wou tusujuaki amu eishoo ninche Olaitoriani metijing'a atua enkaina e Israel.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Neked Yonatan ailep too nkaik enyena o too nkejek, nesuju olanapani lenye. Nebatata ninche te dukuya Yonatan near ilo anapani ninche metuata te siadi ninye." 
1Samuel14:14 Ore lelo meneng'a le dukuya, ooitayutuo Yonatan o ilo anapani lenye, nebaya iltung'ana tikitam te rishata naba anaa olpisiai le eka." 
1Samuel14:15 Nejing enkuretisho ilng'oborri, o ong'ata, o atua iltung'ana; ore oltim o lelo oarisho neikirikira; neikirikira enkop neaku olkirutoto kitok." 
1Samuel14:16 Neing'or ilarripok le Saul te Gibea e Benchamen; naa ng'ura, eidapashari olorora idie o idie." 
1Samuel14:17 Nejoki Saul lelo tung'ana ootii te nebo ninye, “Enkenisho eng'urai kaing'ae oshomo ti atua iyiook.” Ore ake pee eidip aaikenisho, ng'ura, metii Yonatan o lanapani lenye loo masaa olarrabal ine." 
1Samuel14:18 Nejoki Saul Ahija, “Iyau ene ilo Sanduku le Nkai.” Amu kelo apa ilo Sanduku le Nkai ina kata te nebo iltung'ana le Israel." 
1Samuel14:19 Ore egira Saul airorie olapolosani, neponari olodoo too lng'oborri loo Lfilisti oleng oleng; nejoki Saul ilo apolosani, “Tushuko enkaina ino.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Ore Saul o lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye neipirri aapuo olarrabal; naa ng'ura, ore ake olalem lo ltung'ani near olikae, netii apa olmilo kitok oleng." 
1Samuel14:21 Ore ina kata Ilhebrania apa ootii te nebo Ilfilisti te dukuya ina kata, lelo ooshomo aailep atua ilng'oborri, eibelekenyate aaku te nebo Israeli apa ootii te nebo Saul o Yonatan." 
1Samuel14:22 Neijia eikununo, ore iltung'ana pooki le Israel apa ooisudoitie ate te ina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim nening nchere eisikita Ilfilisti; nesuju sii ninche te ngolon epuo enjore." 
1Samuel14:23 Neaku etokordua Olaitoriani Israel ina olong; ore olarrabal negiroo te idiaalo Bes-afen. 
1Samuel14:24 Nenyamalu iltung'ana le Israel ina olong; amu einosie Saul iltung'ana olmumai, ejo, “Ediaa ilo tung'ani onya endaa o metaba anaa neaku teipa aitalakua too lmang'ati laainei.” Neaku meetae obo too ltung'ana oishamishama endaa." 
1Samuel14:25 Nepuonu iltung'ana pooki atua entim; netii apa enaisho enkop. 
1Samuel14:26 Ore ake pee ejing iltung'ana entim, ng'ura, eitong'ita olkenkei le naisho, kake meetae oltung'ani otipika enkaina enkutuk; amu etureita iltung'ana ilo mumai." 
1Samuel14:27 Kake eitu ening Yonatan eitanap papaai lenye iltung'ana ilo mumai; neaku eisuroko eng'udi apa natii enkaina, nepik atua lukuny oo naishi nepik enkaina enkutuk; newang'u nkonyek enyena." 
1Samuel14:28 Nejo obo loo ltung'ana, “Eitanapa papaai lino iltung'ana akurraki to lmumai, ejo, ‘Ediaa ilo tung'ani onya endaa ena olong.’ ” Netanaurate iltung'ana." 
1Samuel14:29 Nejo Yonatan, “Eitanyamala papaai enkop; ng'ura ajo etawang'ita nkonyek aainei enkaraki naishamishama enkiti ena aisho." 
1Samuel14:30 Kebaa na eikash tenaa keinosa iltung'ana ena olong nena yarunot oo lmang'ati lenye naaineputua ninche. Amu ore taata earata olalem too Lfilisti neme kitok.” 
1Samuel14:31 Near ninche Ilfilisti ina olong ebaiki Mikmash o metabaiki Aijalon. Neaku etanaurate iltung'ana," 
1Samuel14:32 nekuetiki iltung'ana nena tokitin apa naataarutua, neya ninche nkerra o lmong'i o lasho, neyieng te nkop nenya iltung'ana ninche te nebo osarge." 
1Samuel14:33 Nejoki ninche Saul, “Ng'ura, easita iltung'ana eng'oki to Laitoriani, aanya nkiri te nebo osarge.” Nejo ninye, “Itaasa te nkaldaroto; embeleleng'u osoit sapuk ene natii nanu.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Neitoki Saul ajo, “Endapashaki ate atua olorere, nijokiki ninche, ‘Nchoo pooki tung'ani meyau olkiteng lenye arashu enker enye, neyieng ninche tene, nenya; nimiasiasa eng'oki to Laitoriani aanya nkiri te nebo osarge.’ ” Neaku eyaua pooki tung'ani olkiteng lenye te nebo ninye ina kewarie apa, neyieng ninche te ine." 
1Samuel14:35 Neshetu Saul olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani; naa olperere lo lasar le dukuya oitera Saul ashetaki Olaitoriani. 
1Samuel14:36 Neitoki Saul ajo, “Matadoi aapuo aasujaa Ilfilisti nikimbung, nikiya ntokitin enye nikiar kewarie ninche o mekenyu; miking'uaa iyiook oltung'ani obo te ninche.” Nejo ninche, “Taasa enaba anaa enidol aa sidai te iyie.” Kake etejo olapolosani, “Maigutu iyiook aanyikaki Olaitoriani tene.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Neikilikuanishore Saul Enkai, “Amaa, kalo nanu adoyio asujaa Ilfilisti? Amaa nchoru ninche apik atua enkaina e Israel?” Kake eitu ninye ewaliki ninye ina olong." 
1Samuel14:38 Neitoki Saul ajo, “Wootu ene, intae ilarikok pooki loo ltung'ana; entayiolo nidolidolo eneikununye ena ng'oki taata." 
1Samuel14:39 Amu ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, ilo oitajeu Israel, hoo tenaa atua Yonatan, olayioni lai etii meeta nchere meye ninye.” Kake metii apa oltung'ani ti atua iltung'ana pooki otawalikia ninye." 
1Samuel14:40 Neitoki ninye ajoki Israel pooki, “Entijing intae enkalo nabo, ore nanu o Yonatan, olayioni lai, nikijing enkae shoto.” Nejoki iltung'ana Saul, “Taasa ina nidol aa sidai te iyie.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Neaku etejo Saul, “Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, kainyoo pee eitu iwaliki osinka lino ena olong? Tenaa atua nanu etii ena torroni arashu atua Yonatan, olayioni lai, Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, nchoru Urim; kake tenaa atua iltung'ana linono Israel etii ena torroni, nchoru Tummin.” Neyae Yonatan o Saul, nepok iltung'ana." 
1Samuel14:42 Neitoki Saul ajo, “Entoosh enkukuo te rishata nanu o layioni lai Yonatan.” Neyae Yonatan." 
1Samuel14:43 Nejoki Saul Yonatan, “Tolikioki nanu ina nitaasa.” Neliki Yonatan ninye, “Ainyorrinyorra nanu enkiti aisho te ndukuya e ng'udi apa natii enkaina ai; nele nanu, naa kaye.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Nejo Saul, “Metaasa Enkai ena te nanu neitulus; meeta nchere pee miye iyie, Yonatan.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Nejoki iltung'ana Saul, “Keye Yonatan laa ninye oisula te nkisulata sapuk e Israel? Ekelakua ina! Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, meetae ninye olpapita le ndukuya enye odoiki enkop; amu etaasishe ninye te nebo Enkai ena olong.” Neaku eitopuaa iltung'ana Yonatan, metaa eitu eye." 
1Samuel14:46 Neilep Saul alo aing'uaa emirata oo lfilisti; nepuo Ilfilisti ewueji enye. 
1Samuel14:47 Ore apa pee eya Saul enkiguana te Israel, nearare ninye ilmang'ati lenyena pooki te pooki shoto, etaarare Moab, o Ilamoni, o Idom o laiguanak le Soba o Lfilisti; naa ore ake eneibelekenyakine neisulu ninye." 
1Samuel14:48 Nearisho te mpijan nemir Ilmaleki, nekordu Israel aitung'uaa nkaik e lelo apa ooibung'a ninche." 
1Samuel14:49 Ore apa ilayiok le Saul naa Yonatan, o Ishfi, o Malkishua; ore nkarn oo ntoyie enyena pokira are ninche kuna; eji ina kikau Merab, neji ina kiti Mikal;" 
1Samuel14:50 neji enkitok e Saul Ahinoam, entito e Ahimaas. Neji olkitok lenye le Njore Abna olayioni le Ner, olenkapu le Saul;" 
1Samuel14:51 Kish apa menye le Saul, ore Ner menye le Abna naa olayioni apa le Abiel." 
1Samuel14:52 Eetae apa olarrabal ogol too Lfilisti too nkolong'i pooki e Saul, naa ore ake pee edol Saul oltung'ani ogol, arashu oltung'ani opi, neitinyikaki ninye kewan enye." 
1Samuel15:1 Nejoki Samuel Saul, “Olaitoriani apa laairriwua nanu maatubukoki eilata aput pee iaku olaiguanani te shumata iltung'ana lenyena Isiraeli; ore naa taata toning'o irorei lo Laitoriani." 
1Samuel15:2 Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, ‘Kaitame nanu ina naitaasa Ilamaleki Israel te ina naibooitie ninche te nkoitoi, apa eilepu aaing'uaa Misiri." 
1Samuel15:3 Shomo taata taara Amalek, inyala tukul nena pooki naata ninche; mileku ninche, kake taara metua oltung'ani pooki olee o enkitok, enkerai kiti o enanakita, olkiteng o enker, entames o sikiria.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Neaku eipoto Saul iltung'ana neiken ninche te Telaim, netii apa iltung'ana oopuo too nkejek nkalifuni iip are, o nkalifuni tomon oo ltung'ana le Yuda." 
1Samuel15:5 Nelotu Saul enkanasa oo Lamaleki neirrag arresh to erata. 
1Samuel15:6 Nejoki Saul Ilkeni, “Entudumunye, enchom entadoi enchom entung'uai Ilmaleki, mamut ake nanu intae te nebo ninche; amu intodolutua apa intae esupatisho too ltung'ana pooki le Israel apa pee epuonu aailepu aapuku aaing'uaa Misiri.” Neaku etudumunye Ilkeni aapuku ti atua Ilameleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Nemir Saul lelo Amaleki ebaiki Hafila o meshomo aabaiki Shur, aa ninye oloo saen le Misiri." 
1Samuel15:8 Neibung Agag ilo aiguanani loo Lamaleki eishu, nemut tukul iltung'ana pooki te nepi o lalem." 
1Samuel15:9 Kake etelekutua Saul o iltung'ana Agag, o nkerra sidain oleng o lmong'i o lasho o lkuoo le kerra o pooki nara sidai, neitu eyieng ninche amut; ore ina pooki apa nameni naa pesho nemut ninche tukul." 
1Samuel15:10 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Samuel ejo: 
1Samuel15:11 “Airridua nanu nchere aitaa Saul olaiguanani; amu eibelekenye ninye ashuko aing'uaa esujata ai, neitu eas inkitanapat aainei.” Netagore apa Samuel neishiraki ninye Olaitoriani enkewarie pooki." 
1Samuel15:12 Neinyototo Samuel ayooki pee enang'are Saul tadekenya; netiaakaki apa Samuel, “Eewuo Saul Karmel, naa ng'ura eshetaki kewan esoit nadamunyeki neitoki ashuko, nelo agiroo, nedoyio alo Gilgal.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Nelotu Samuel enetii Saul, nejoki Saul ninye, “Mikitamayiana Olaitoriani; ataasa nanu enaaitanapa Olaitoriani.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Neitoki Samuel ajo, “Kainyoo naa ena orui oo nkerra too nkiyiaa aainei, o nkipurrot oo lmong'i naning'ito nanu?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Nejo Saul, “Eyautua ninche too Lamaleki; amu etelekutua iltung'ana nkerra sidain o lmong'i, pee epolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai; ore nkulie nikitumuta iyiook tukul.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Neitoki Samuel ajoki Saul, “Tigirayu! Ekaaliki nanu enaatiaaka Olaitoriani ena kewarie.” Nejoki Saul ninye “Tolimu.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Nejo Samuel, “Ore hoo nira oti too nkonyek inono, aimira iyie endukuya oo loshon le Israel? Kitubukoko iyie Olaitoriani eilata aput aitaa olaiguanani le Israel." 
1Samuel15:18 Nikirriwayie iyie Olaitoriani esiaai, nejo, ‘Shomo, indaikie lelo aing'okok, Ilamaleki, niarare ninche o metaba anaa neishunye.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Kainyoo naa pee eitu ining oltoilo lo Laitoriani? Kainyoo pee ikuetikia nena tokitin nitaarutua, niaas embae torrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani.”" 
1Samuel15:20 Nejoki Saul Samuel, “Atoning'o oltoilo lo Laitoriani, ashomo nanu esiaai naa ninye aairriwayie Olaitoriani, ayaua Agag olaiguanani le Amalek, natumuta aidaikie Ilmaleki." 
1Samuel15:21 Kake eyautua iltung'ana nena tokitin naataarutua, nkerra o lmong'i, nena tokitin sidain apa naatejoki keidaikieki pee epolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai ino te Gilgal.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Nejo Samuel, “Amaa keeta Olaitoriani enchipai sapuk too lasarri oopejori o nkishorot, anaa te nening'i oltoilo lo Laitoriani? Ng'ura eisidai ening'oto alang olasar, o enkinining'oto alang ilmeregeshi oopir." 
1Samuel15:23 Amu etiu empaasharoto anaa esakutore, ore engolon e nkong'u naa esuujisho anaa eseremata oo ntokitin neme Enkai. Ore enkaraki nitanya ororei lo Laitoriani, kitanya sii ninye iyie pee miaku olaiguanani.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Nejoki Saul Samuel, “Ataasa nanu eng'oki; amu atigila nanu enkitanapata o Laitoriani o rorei linono, amu aturia nanu iltung'ana naning oltoilo lenye." 
1Samuel15:25 Ore naa taata, aatoomono nanu, tapalakaki eng'oki ai, nirrinyo te nebo nanu, pee atum nanu ateserema Olaitoriani.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Nejoki Samuel Saul, “Marrinyo nanu te nebo iyie; amu itanya iyie ororei lo Laitoriani, nikitanya iyie Olaitoriani pee miaku olaiguanani te Israel.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Ore eshuko Samuel alo aing'uaa, neibung Saul olcholoi lo lkila lenye, nepolosa." 
1Samuel15:28 Nejoki Samuel ninye, “Etopolosayie Olaitoriani enkitoria e Israel te iyie ena olong, neishoo ninye olelatia ino, laa ninye supat likilang iyie." 
1Samuel15:29 Ore sii Ilo ora Enkitoo e Israel nemelejisho arashu eirridu; amu mme oltung'ani ninye, metaa keirridu.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Nejo ninye, “Ataasa nanu eng'oki; ore eyia; iyanyitaki taata te dukuya ilpayiani loo ltung'ana laainei o te dukuya Israel, nirrinyo te nebo nanu, pee atum nanu ateserema Olaitoriani Enkai ino.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Nerrinyo Samuel asuj Saul; neserem Saul Olaitoriani. 
1Samuel15:32 Neitoki Samuel ajo, “Iyau ene natii nanu Agag, ilo aiguanani loo Lamaleki.” Nelotu Agag enetii ninye eshipa. Nejo Agag, “Esipa etulusoyie emion e keeya.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Nejo Samuel, “Ore anaa enatooruo olalem lino nkituaak inkera, keaku sii ninye taata ngutunyi enemeeta enkerai ti atua nkituaak.” Nedung Samuel Agag aitaa ndung'ot te dukuya Olaitoriani te Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:34 Neitoki Samuel alo Rama; nelo Saul enkaji enye te Gibea e Saul. 
1Samuel15:35 Neitu ae kata eitoki Samuel adol Saul o metabau enkolong e keeya enye, kake eishiraka Samuel Saul. Neirridu Olaitoriani nchere eitaa Saul olaiguanani le Israel." 
1Samuel16:1 Nejoki Olaitoriani Samuel, “Nchiraki akenya Saul o anu, idolita ajo atanya nanu ninye pee meaku olaiguanani te Israel? Imputa ina mouo eilata nilo; kaairriwaa nanu iyie enetii Yese, ilo Betlehemi, amu aing'uraka nanu kewan ai olaiguanani ti atua ilayiok lenyena.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Nejo Samuel, “Kaji nanu aiko te nalo? Te nening Saul ina naar nanu matua.” Nejo Olaitoriani, “Iwa enkashe te nebo iyie nijo, ‘Aewuo pee apolosaki Olaitoriani olasar.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Nintoomon Yese meeu olasar, naa kaaitadol eniaas; nibukoki iyie eilata aput ilo laaipotoki enkarna enye.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Neas Samuel ina naitanapa Olaitoriani, nelotu Betlehem. Nepuonu ilpayiani le nkanasa eikirikira aanang'are ninye nejo, “Ilotu iyie te seriani?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Nejo ninye, “Te seriani; aewuo nanu apolosaki Olaitoriani; entisinya ate, nipuonunu te nebo nanu olasar.” Neitisiny ninye Yese o layiok lenyena, neitoomon ninche to lasar." 
1Samuel16:6 Ore pee ebau ninche, neing'or ninye Eliab, nedamu ajo, “Esipa etii ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aput dukuya.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Kake etiaaka Olaitoriani Samuel, “Ming'or enaikununo ninye arashu enkadoro enye o lkitashei lenye, amu atanya nanu ninye; amu meing'or Olaitoriani anaa enaing'or tung'ani; eing'or tung'ani enaikununo oriong, kake oltau eing'or Olaitoriani.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Neitoki Yese aipot Abinadab, neisho ninye metogiroi te dukuya Samuel. Nejo ninye, “Eitu sii egelu Olaitoriani ele.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Neitoki Yese aisho Shamas metogiroi. Nejo ninye, “Eitu sii egelu Olaitoriani ele.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Neisho Yese ilayiok lenyena pokira oopishana metogiroi te dukuya Samuel. Nejoki Samuel Yese, “Eitu egelu Olaitoriani kulo.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Nejoki Samuel Yese, “Ketii ilayiok linono pooki ene?” Nejo ninye, “Etiooyo ilo oti, kake ng'ura, etii ntare.” Nejoki Samuel Yese, “Irriwai olkilikuai metorikuni ninye; amu mikitoni iyiook o metaba anaa nelotu ninye ene.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Neirriwaa ninye olkilikuai, nerikuni ninye aaitijing'u. Naa kenyokie apa ninye newang nkonyek enyena, neikishiaan. Nejo Olaitoriani, “Tudumunye, tubukoki ninye eilata; amu ninye ele.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Neya Samuel emowuo e ilata nebukoki ninye eilata aput te mpolos oo lalashera lenyena; nelotu Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani te ngolon shumata Daudi ebaiki ina olong neito dukuya. Nedumunye Samuel nelo Rama. 
1Samuel16:14 Nelo Enkiyang'et e Nkai aing'uaa Saul, nelotu enkiyang'et torrono naing'uaa Olaitoriani aitanyamal aisomit ninye." 
1Samuel16:15 Nejoki Saul isinkan lenyena, “Ng'ura taata, kintanyamalita iyie enkiyang'et torrono naing'uaa Olaitoriani." 
1Samuel16:16 Nchoo taata olkitok lang eitanap isinkan linono ootii dukuya iyie, pee eing'oru oltung'ani oyiolo atoosho enkawuo oo sinkolioitin; ore ake pee eitoki atii shumata iyie enkiyang'et torrono naing'uaa Enkai, nerany ninye te ina auo oo sinkolioitin, naa inchiu iyie.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Neaku etiaaka Saul isinkan lenyena, “Entorikokoki nanu oltung'ani oyiolo ataranya oleng, nirikuku ninye ene natii.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Newal obo loo lbarnot ajo, “Ng'ura, atoduaa nanu olayioni le Yese le Betlehem, laa kaarriyia te ranyare, oltung'ani opi, naa oltung'ani lo larrabal, arriyia te nkiroroto naa oltung'ani le nkishaa sidai; netii Olaitoriani te nebo ninye.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Neaku eirriwayie Saul ilkiliku enetii Yese nejo, “Irriwakaki nanu Daudi, olayioni lino, laa ninye otii ntare.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Neitayu Yese olkurrarruu onap imukateni, olbene lo lchoni le naisho, o lkuoo le kine, neirriwaa ninche te Daudi, olayioni lenye, airriwaki Saul." 
1Samuel16:21 Nelotu Daudi enetii Saul, nejing enkisiaayiare enye. Nenyorru Saul ninye oleng; neaku ninye olanapani lenye loo masaa o larrabal." 
1Samuel16:22 Neirriwaki Saul olkilikuai Yese, ejo, “Nchoo Daudi eton te nkisiaayiare ai, amu enoto ninye omom too nkonyek aainei.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Naa ore ake pee elotu enkiyang'et torrono naing'uaa Enkai shumata Saul, nedumu Daudi enkawuo oo sinkolioitin neosh te nkaina enye; neaku eitagoloki apa Saul, nesupatu, neing'uaa ninye ina kiyang'et torrono." 
1Samuel17:1 Neiturrur apa Ilfilisti ilororani lenye le njore te nkaraki olarrabal. Neiturrurrote apa ninche te Soko, naa ene Yuda, nepik ilng'oborri erishata e Soko o Aseka, te Efes-damim." 
1Samuel17:2 Ore Saul o iltung'ana le Israel neiturrurrote, nepik ilng'oborri oerata le Ela, neluaa too lkererin lo larrabal pee earare Ilfilisti." 
1Samuel17:3 Neitashe Ilfilisti te nchumata oldoinyo te nkalo nabo, neitashe Isiraeli te nchumata oldoinyo te nkae shoto, etii oerata erishata ninche." 
1Samuel17:4 Neipang'u apuku too lng'oborri loo Lfilisti oloing'oni oji Goliat, le Gas, laa ore enkadoro enye negiroo ntemat e nkaina ile," 
1Samuel17:5 neeta apa ninye emaupe o suyai neishopito olkila lo lgoo lo suyai le shekeli nkalifuni imiet. 
1Samuel17:6 Neeta apa nkitushureta o suyai too nkejek enyena. Ore eremet o suyai neika te rishata oo ronyi lenyena. 
1Samuel17:7 Neba enchata e remet enye anaa enauner ore esipil e ina remet enye naa irratilini tomon o imiet; ore ilo onap elong'o enye nelo te dukuya ninye. 
1Samuel17:8 Neitashe ninye nebuaaki enjore oo Siraeli ejo, “Kainyoo pee impang'utua intae aapuonu aataaniki olarrabal? Ae mara nanu Olfilisti, nirara intae isinkan le Saul? Entegelaki ate oltung'ani, ninchosho ninye edou alotu ene natii." 
1Samuel17:9 Te naidim ninye ataarare nanu naar nanu matua, nikiaku iyiook isinkan linyi; kake te naisulu nanu te ninye naar ninye metua, niakuku intae isinkan lang, nisiaayiayia iyiook.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Nejo ilo Filisti, “Atamoro nanu iltimito le njore e Israel ena olong; enchooki nanu oltung'ani pee kitum aatarata te nebo.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Ore ake pee ening Saul o Siraeli pooki kulo omon lo Lfilisti neing'aeng'ae ninche neirut oleng. 
1Samuel17:12 Naa olayioni lo Lframiti apa Daudi le Betlehem e Yuda, oji Yese, oata apa ilayiok isiet. Ore apa too nkolong'i e Saul netamorua ilo tung'ani oleng neaku oloo larin kumok." 
1Samuel17:13 Ore lelo ayiok okuni botoro le Yese netusuja apa Saul aapuo enjore; ore nkarn e lelo ayiok lenyena ooshomo enjore naa Eliab ilo kikau, ore olosujita ninye naa Abinadab, ore oliokuni naa Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Daudi apa oloti te pooki; ore lelo okuni botoro netusuja Saul," 
1Samuel17:15 kake eshomo apa, Daudi ailoiki enetii, o Betlehem alo airrita ntare e menye." 
1Samuel17:16 Too nkolong'i artam apa eewuo ilo Filisti dukuya neitashe te nkitashoto enye, tadekenya o teipa." 
1Samuel17:17 Nejoki Yese Daudi olayioni lenye, “Iyaki ilalashera linono ena efa enkano napejo, o kuna mukateni tomon, ninap aitasiooyo aya ilng'oborri enetii ilalashera linono;" 
1Samuel17:18 niyaki sii kulo belat tomon le ng'orno naitoyioki olkitok le nkalifu enye. Toduaa eneikununo ilalashera linono, nishoru iyie entoki naitodolu ajo itoduaa ninche naa eisupati.”" 
1Samuel17:19 Ore apa Saul, o ninche, o ltung'ana pooki le Israel, netii atua oerata le Ela, eara o lelo Filisti." 
1Samuel17:20 Neinyototo Daudi ayooki tadekenya, neing'uaa nkerra te nebo olaing'urani, neya endaa, nelo anaa enaitanapa Yese ninye; nelotu lelo ng'oborri egira olorora alo dukuya too lkererin lo larrabal te wueji niarareki; ebuaku to lkiyioi lo larrabal." 
1Samuel17:21 Ore Isiraeli o Lfilisti nenyikakino pee eara, enjore earare njore." 
1Samuel17:22 Neing'ueiki Daudi intokitin olaing'urani loo lolan, neipirri alo enetii iltimito, nelo neiroroki ilalashera lenyena." 
1Samuel17:23 Ore eirorie ninche, ng'ura, ore ilo oing'oni ilo Filisti le Gas, oji Goliat neilepu apuku ti atua iltimito loo Lfilisti; neiro lelo rorei anaa apa. Nening Daudi ninye." 
1Samuel17:24 Ore iltung'ana pooki le Israel, pee edol ilo tung'ani, neipirri aailany ninye, neirut ninche oleng." 
1Samuel17:25 Nejo iltung'ana le Israel, “Itoduaa iyie ele tung'ani oilepua? Esipa eewuo ninye ailepu pee emor Israel; ore oltung'ani oar ninye metua, neitaaa ninye olaiguanani karsis te nkarsisisho kitok, neisho ninye entito enye neitaa enkaji e papaai lenye metalakunoyu te Israel.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Nejoki Daudi lelo tung'ana apa ooitashe te mbata enye, “Kaa eitaasi oltung'ani oar ele Filisti metua, neitayu emoroto te Israel? Amu kaing'ae ninye ele Filisti lememurata, metaa keidim atamoro njoreitin e Nkai naishu?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Newaliki ninye iltung'ana neijia inchere, “Ina eitaasi oltung'ani oar ninye metua.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Nening Eliab, ilo alashe lenye botor, eirorie iltung'ana; neyupuyup engoro e Eliab te nkaraki Daudi, nejo ninye, “Kainyoo iyie pee itadouo ene? Naa kaing'ae itung'ueikia nekua kuti kerra naatii ong'ota? Ayiolo nanu enkitokoos ino, o entorroni o ltau lino; amu iewuo adou aing'or olarrabal.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Nejo Daudi, “Kaa taata ataasa? Aime ororei ake?”" 
1Samuel17:30 Neibelekenya aing'uaa ninye alo enetii olikae, neiro te ina oitoi; neitoki iltung'ana aawaliki ninye anaa duoo ake te dukuya." 
1Samuel17:31 Ore ake pee ening'i lelo rorei ooiroro Daudi, neigil ninche aalimu te dukuya Saul; neirriwaa ninye olkilikuai aipotu ninye." 
1Samuel17:32 Nejoki Daudi Saul, “Emincho oltung'ani hoo obo epalari te nkaraki ninye; kelo osinka lino aarare ele Filisti.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Nejoki Saul Daudi, “Mindim iyie ashomo ataarare ele Filisti; amu ira iyie olbarnoti ake, naa oltung'ani apa ninye lo larrabal ebaiki kitisho enye.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Kake etiaaka Daudi Saul, “Keing'or apa osinka lino nkerra e papaai lenye; naa tenelotu olng'atuny arashu olng'arurumi, neya olkuoo ti atua eluaata," 
1Samuel17:35 nalo nanu asujaa naar ninye naitayu nanu olkuoo te nkutuk enye; naa te nelo naadumakino nanu, naibung olmunyei lenye naar metua." 
1Samuel17:36 Etaara osinka lino metuata ilng'atunyo o lng'arurumi; ore ele Filisti lememurata naa ketiu anaa obo te ninche, amu etamoro injoreitin e Nkai naishu.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Nejo Daudi, “Ore ilo Aitoriani laaitajeuo nanu too loisotok lo lng'atuny o te nkaina o lng'arurumi naa kaaitajeu te nkaina ele Filisti.” Nejoki Saul Daudi, “Shomo, neaku Olaitoriani te nebo iyie.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Neishopoki Saul Daudi iruparen enyena e njore; nepik emaupe o suyai e ndukuya enye, neishopoki olkila lo lgoo lo larrabal." 
1Samuel17:39 Nerreten Daudi olalem lenye ti oriong olkila lenye lo larrabal, nejo pesho ajo alo, amu eitu apa emoku ninche. Neitoki Daudi ajoki Saul, “Maidim nanu ashomo te kuna; amu eitu nanu amoku ninche.” Neitayu Daudi ninche airragie." 
1Samuel17:40 Neya ninye eng'udi enye te nkaina, negelu isoito imiet oosipa to lkeju, nepik atua ilo bene lenye lo lairritani loo ntare, netii enkopito enye enkaina, nelo anyikaki ilo Filisti." 
1Samuel17:41 Nelotu ilo Filisti anyikaki Daudi, etii ilo anapani le long'o enye dukuya ninye." 
1Samuel17:42 Ore ake pee eing'or ilo Filisti, nedol Daudi; nemenaa ninye, amu olbarnoti apa ninye onyokie neikishiaan te nking'urata." 
1Samuel17:43 Nejoki ilo Filisti Daudi, “Kara nanu oldia, pee ilotu enatii too ng'udisin?” Nedek ilo Filisti Daudi too nkaitin enyena." 
1Samuel17:44 Nejoki ilo Filisti Daudi, “Wou enatii, naa kaisho nanu nkiri o sesen lino imotonyi o loing'ang'e o ng'uesi e ong'ata.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Neitoki Daudi ajoki ilo Filisti, “Ilotu iyie enatii to lalem o te mpere, o te nkae pere naado; kake alotu nanu enitii iyie te nkarna o Laitoriani loo lororani, ina Ai oo njoreitin e Israel, naa ninye iyie itamoro." 
1Samuel17:46 Ore ena olong eikipik iyie Olaitoriani atua enkaina ai, naar abatat, nadung'oo endukuya ino, naisho nanu impopong'i oo lororani oo tuata loo Lfilisti ena olong imotonyi o loing'ang'e o ilowuarak le ntim pee etum enkop pooki atayiolo nchere etii Enkai atua israel," 
1Samuel17:47 neyiolou sii ele turrur pooki nchere keitajeu Olaitoriani neme to lalem o te remet; amu olo Laitoriani ele arrabal naa eikinchoru ninye apik iyie atua enkaina ang.” 
1Samuel17:48 Ore ake pee edumunye ilo Filisti nelotu pee enang'are Daudi, neipirri Daudi asiooyo alo ilo kereri lo larrabal anang'are ilo Filisti." 
1Samuel17:49 Nepik Daudi enkaina atua olbene lenye neitayu osoit, nepik enkopito, neyuk ninye, nenang ilo Filisti olpura le nkomom enye; neimis ilo soit ti atua olpura le nkomom enye, nebatata ninye te nkomom enye aosh enkop." 
1Samuel17:50 Neaku eisula Daudi ilo Filisti te nkopito o to soit, neosh ilo Filisti, near ninye metua; nemetii apa olalem enkaina e Daudi." 
1Samuel17:51 Neipirri Daudi neitashe te nchumata e ilo Filisti, neya olalem lenye, neyietu ashurtu te nchashur enye, near ninye metua, nedung'orie endukuya enye. Ore ake pee edol Ilfilisti aajo etua oloing'oni lenye neisik." 
1Samuel17:52 Ore iltung'ana le Israel o Yuda nedumunye te mbuakunoto nesuj Ilfilisti o metabai Gas o nchomito e Ekron neaku ore lelo Filisti loo lbaa nebatata ebaiki She-ara-im o metabaiki Gas o Ekron. 
1Samuel17:53 Nepuonu Israeli aashukunye te mirata oo Lfilisti neya intokitin too lng'oborri lenye. 
1Samuel17:54 Neyau Daudi endukuya eilo Filisti Yerusalem, kake etipika imasaa enyena o larrabal atua olngobor lenye." 
1Samuel17:55 Ore ake pee edol Saul Daudi elo aarare ilo Filisti, nejoki ninye Abna, olkitok le njore, “Abna, kole ng'ae ele barnoti?” Nejo Abna, “Anaa enaishu oltau lino, olaiguanani, maaidim nanu atolimu.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Nejo olaiguanani, “Inkilikuanu kole ng'ae ele ayioni.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Ore eshukunye Daudi aing'uaa enkirragata e ilo Filisti, neya Abna ninye, neyau ninye dukuya Saul eeta elukunya e ilo Filisti te nkaina enye." 
1Samuel17:58 Nejoki Saul ninye, “Ira iyie ole ng'ae, lo barnoti?” Newal Daudi ajo, “Ara nanu olo sinka lino Yese le Betlehem.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Ore ake pee eidip airorie Saul, neibung'a oltau le Yonatan oltau le Daudi, nenyorru Yonatan ninye anaa oltau lenye kewan." 
1Samuel18:2 Nerik Saul ninye ina olong, nemeisho ninye metushukoyu alo enkang enye." 
1Samuel18:3 Nenya Yonatan olmumai lo sotua te nebo Daudi, enkaraki apa nanyor ninye anaa oltau lenye kewan." 
1Samuel18:4 Neitayu Yonatan olkila apa oishopito neisho Daudi, o masaa enyena, o lalem lenye o enkawuo o enkimeita enye." 
1Samuel18:5 Naa ore ake te neipang Daudi alo eneba anaa eneirriwayie Saul nedupoyu; neaku etipika ninye Saul shumata iltung'ana le njore. Naa eisidai apa ina too nkonyek oo ltung'ana pooki o too nkonyek sii oo sinkan le Saul. 
1Samuel18:6 Ore egira aapuonu ang, ina kata pee eshukunye Daudi eing'uaa esesekuanata e ilo Filisti, neipang'u nkituaak aapuonu too nkanas pooki e Israel, eranyisho neiguran pee enang'are olaiguanani Saul, too ntampurini, o too sinkolioitin le ng'ida, o too nkinantani oo sinkolioitin." 
1Samuel18:7 Neranyakino nkituaak maate eraposhoki ejo, “Etasesekuana Saul nkalifuni enyena, nesesekuan Daudi nkalifuni tomon enyena.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Negoro Saul oleng, ore ena kiroroto neitu eitiship ninye; nejo ninye, “Eterrepakitia ninche Daudi nkalifuni tomon, ore nanu naaterrepakitia nkalifuni; kainyoo ae naitoki ninye aata meteleku enkitoria?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Neduaaki Saul Daudi olom ebaiki ina olong neito dukuya. 
1Samuel18:10 Ore pee ekenyu nelotu enkiyang'et torrono naing'uaa Enkai nejing atua Saul, neiyiang'iyiang ninye ti atua enkaji enye, eoshito Daudi enkawuo oo sinkolioitin, anaa ake. Neeta apa Saul empere te nkaina enye;" 
1Samuel18:11 nengoroo Saul empere amu etejo ninye, “Apudaki nanu Daudi esuntai.” Kake etapaashare Daudi ninye katitin are." 
1Samuel18:12 Keure apa Saul Daudi, amu etii Olaitoriani te nebo ninye kake etung'uayie Saul." 
1Samuel18:13 Neaku eiwuang'ie Saul ninye te ine netii, neitaa ninye olkitok le nkalifu neipang alo nelo dukuya iltung'ana." 
1Samuel18:14 Netum Daudi dupoto te nena pooki apa naataasa; amu etii Olaitoriani te nebo ninye. 
1Samuel18:15 Ore ake pee edol Saul nchere enoto ninye dupoto sapuk, neureyu ninye." 
1Samuel18:16 Kake ore Israel pooki o Yuda pooki naa kenyor apa Daudi amu eshomo apa ninye aipang nejing'u atua te dukuya ninche. 
1Samuel18:17 Nejoki Saul Daudi, “Nena entito ai botor Merab; kaaisho nanu iyie pee intaa enkitok; kake tudupayu te nanu niarisho too larrabali lo Laitoriani.” Amu etejo Saul, “Mincho enkaina ai eaku shumata ninye, kake nchoo enkaina oo Lfilisti eaku shumata ninye.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Nejoki Daudi Saul, “Kara nanu ng'ae, naa kainyoo olmarei lai, olmarei le papaai te Israel, metaa kaaku nanu olaputani lo laiguanani?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Kake te nkata apa nataa keishori Merab, entito e Saul, Daudi, neishori ninye Adriel ilo Meholati meitaa enkitok." 
1Samuel18:20 Nenyor apa entito e Saul, Mikal, Daudi; neliki ninche Saul, neitiship ina toki ninye." 
1Samuel18:21 Nejo Saul, “Ntasho maishoo nanu ninye, pee etum ataa orreshet te ninye, pee etum sii enkaina oo Lfilisti ataarare ninye.” Metaa etiaaka Saul Daudi te nkata e are, “Iaku taata iyie olaputani lai.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Neitanap Saul isinkan lenyena ejo, “Erorie Daudi too nkurrat nijokiki, ‘Ng'ura, eikishipakino iyie olaiguanani, naa eikinyor isinkan lenyena pooki; ore naa taata taa olaputani lo laiguanani.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Neiro isinkan le Saul lelo rorei too nkiyiaa e Daudi. Nejo Daudi, “Idolidolo intae aa entoki kiti te neaku oltung'ani olaputani lo laiguanani, idolitata aajo ara nanu oltung'ani aiterani lemening'o?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Nejoki ninye isinkan le Saul, “Inji o nji eiroro Daudi.”" 
1Samuel18:25 Neitoki Saul ajo, “Entoliki Daudi ijokiki, ‘Meyieu olaiguanani entoki e nkaputi meteleku isuaaten iip oo Lfilisti pee etum aitalaku elap too lmang'ati lo laiguanani.’ ” Naa kejo apa Saul pee eisho Daudi metua te nkaina oo Lfilisti." 
1Samuel18:26 Ore ake eliki isinkan lenyena Daudi kulo rorei, neitiship Daudi ina neaku olaputani lo laiguanani. Ore eton eitu eishunye enkata," 
1Samuel18:27 nedumunye Daudi nelo, te nebo iltung'ana lenyena, near metuata Ilfilisti iip are; neyau Daudi isuaaten enye, naaishooki apa te siana nalulung'a olaiguanani, pee etum ninye ataa olaputani lo laiguanani. Neisho Saul ninye ina tito enye Mikal meitaa enkitok." 
1Samuel18:28 Kake ore ake pee edol Saul neyiolou ajo etii Olaitoriani te nebo Daudi, o nchere kenyor Isiraeli pooki ninye," 
1Samuel18:29 neponari Saul aureyu Daudi oleng. Neaku etaa apa Saul olmang'atinta le Daudi anaake. 
1Samuel18:30 Neitoki ilkituaak loo Lfilisti aaipang'u aapuonu olarrabal, naa ore ake anaa te nepuonu netum Daudi dupoto sapuk alang isinkan pooki le Saul; neaku ore apa enkarna enye naa kejukari oleng." 
1Samuel19:1 Neirorie Saul Yonatan, olayioni lenye, o lelo sinkan lenyena pooki, nchere pee ear ninche Daudi metua. Kake ore Yonatan, olayioni le Saul, keshipakino apa Daudi oleng." 
1Samuel19:2 Nejoki Yonatan Daudi, “Ore Saul, papaai lai, naa eiking'oru iyie aar tua; neaku tagolie kewan tadekenya, totona te wueji misil isudoi kewan;" 
1Samuel19:3 naa kalo nanu aipang aitashe atashare papaai lai te ine wueji nitii, nairorie nanu papaai lai mbaa inono; naa te nayiolou nanu pooki toki naaliki iyie.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Neiro Yonatan mbaa sidain ti alo Daudi te Saul, papaai lenye, nejoki ninye, “Mincho olaiguanani eas eng'oki ti alo osinka lenye Daudi; amu eitu ninye eas eng'oki tialo iyie, amu ore nkiaasin enyena naa ine nkisiaayiare sidain apa te iyie;" 
1Samuel19:5 amu etipika ninye enkishui enye nkaik enyena nesesekuan ninye ilo Filisti, neyaki Olaitoriani Israel pooki emirata kitok. Itoduaa apa iyie, ning'idayu; kainyoo naa pee ias eng'oki to sarge lemeeta entioto aar Daudi metua meeta emporeet?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Nening Saul oltoilo le Yonatan; nenya Saul olmumai ajo, “Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, meari ninye metua.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Neipotu Yonatan Daudi, neitodol Yonatan ninye kuna baa pooki. Neriku Yonatan Daudi enetii Saul, netii apa ninye ine netii ninye anaa apa te dukuya." 
1Samuel19:8 Neitoki olarrabal apuku; neipang Daudi alo nearare Ilfilisti, neitayu esesekuanare sapuk ti atua ninche, neaku eipirritio te dukuya ninye." 
1Samuel19:9 Neitoki enkiyang'et torrono naing'uaa Olaitoriani alotu shumata Saul, etonita ti atua enkaji enye eeta empere enye te nkaina enye; neoshito Daudi enkawuo oo sinkolioitin." 
1Samuel19:10 Nejo Saul apudaki Daudi esuntai te mpere; kake etapaashare Daudi Saul, neaku eibitaka empere esuntai. Neisik Daudi, neimisho." 
1Samuel19:11 Ore ina kewarie neirriwaa Saul ilkiliku enkaji e Daudi metaleeno ninye, pee etum ataara ninye metua tadekenya. Kake etiaaka ninye Mikal, enkitok e Daudi, “Ti nimintajeu enkishui ino ena kewarie, ore taisere niye.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Neaku eitadoyie Mikal Daudi aimie elusie nelo ninye aisik neimisho. 
1Samuel19:13 Neya Mikal enkitanyaanyukoto neirragie ninye te ndapash nepik entoki nairishunyeki endukuya oo lpapit loo ntare elukunya enye, neimulumul too nkarash." 
1Samuel19:14 Ore ake pee eirriwaa Saul ilkiliku meshomo aaya Daudi, nejo ninye, “Kemuei ninye.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Neirriwaa Saul ilkiliku meshomo aadol Daudi, ejo, “Eyakaki nanu ti atua endapash, pee atum nanu ataara ninye metua.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Ore ake pee ejing'u lelo kipaareta, ng'ura, etii ina kitanyaanyukoto endapash, o ina toki nairishunyeki endukuya oo lpapit loo nkineji te ndukuya enye." 
1Samuel19:17 Nejoki Saul Mikal “Kainyoo pee kiteleja aikonji, nincho olmang'atinta lai meshomo neaku etajeuo ninye?” Newaliki Mikal Saul, “Aatiaaka ninye nanu, ‘Ntasho mashomo; kainyoo pee aar nanu iyie tua?’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Neisik Daudi neimisho nelotu apa ninye enetii Samuel te Rama, neliki nena pooki naaitaasa Saul ninye. Ore ninye o Samuel nepuo aabik te Naios." 
1Samuel19:19 Netiaakaki apa Saul, “Ng'ura, etii Daudi Naios te Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:20 Neitoki Saul airriwaa ilkiliku meyau Daudi; ore ake pee edol ninche olturrur loo loibonok le Nkai eibonisho, o Samuel aa olarikoni te shumata ninche, nelotu enkiyang'et e Nkai shumata lelo kipaareta le Saul, neibonisho sii ninche." 
1Samuel19:21 Ore ake pee elikini Saul, neirriwaa ninye kulikae kipaareta, neibonisho sii ninche. Neitoki Saul airriwaa ilkiliku te nkata e uni, neibonisho ake sii ninche." 
1Samuel19:22 Neitoki ninye makewan alo Rama, nelotu ilo shorro sapuk apa otii Seku; neikilikuanu ajo, “Kaji etii Samuel o Daudi?” Nejo obo, “Ng'ura, etii ninche Naios te Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Nelo ninye teine Naios te Rama; nelotu enkiyang'et e Nkai shumata ninye, ore eloito neibonisho ninye, o metaba anaa nelotu ninye Naios e Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 Neshurtu sii ninye nkilani enyena, neibonisho sii ninye te dukuya Samuel, neirrag meeta enkila ina olong pooki o ina kewarie pooki. Neaku etejoki, “Ketii sii ninye Saul atua iloibonok le Nkai?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Neitoki Daudi aisik aing'uaa Naios te Rama, nelotu ajoki Yonatan, “Kainyoo nanu ataasa? Kainyoo entorroni ai? Naa kainyoo eng'oki ai te dukuya papaai lino, metaa keing'oru ninye enkishui ai?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Nejoki Yonatan ninye, “Metalakuana ina! Miye iyie. Ng'ura, meas papaai toki aa kitok o aa kiti eitu aaimakinye nanu; naa kainyoo naa pee aamikinye nanu papaai ena? Mme neijia etiu.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Kake etawala Daudi ajo, “Eyiolo papaai lino oleng nchere anoto nanu omom too nkonyek inono; nejo ninye, ‘Mincho Yonatan eyiolou ena, pee megoro ake.’ Kake esipa, anaa enaishu Olaitoriani o anaa enaishu oltau lino, eroruata nabo ake natii erishata nanu o keeya.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Neitoki Yonatan ajoki Daudi, “Ore pooki nijo, naaitaas nanu iyie.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Nejoki Daudi Yonatan, “Ng'ura, olapa ng'ejuk taisere, nemajoyio nanu eitu aton te mesa te nebo olaiguanani, kake nchooki nanu mashomo, pee atum aisudoi kewan ti ong'ata o metabau enkolong e uni teipa." 
1Samuel20:6 Te naalau nanu papaai lino tukul, nijoki, ‘Etasaishe Daudi aomonu pee ekuet alo Betlehem, enkanasa enye; amu etii ine olasar anaake to lari to lmarei pooki.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Te nejo ninye, ‘Sidai!’ nesidanu to sinka lino; kake te negoro ninye, nitum atayiolo ajo eitobirita ninye entorroni." 
1Samuel20:8 Neaku intaasa osinka lino te supatisho, amu iyaua osinka lino atua olmumai osinya lo sotua te nebo iyie. Kake te netii entorroni atua nanu, taaraki iyie nanu; amu kainyoo paa papaai lino kiyaki?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Nejo Yonatan, “Mikitalama kuna! Amaa naaji tenaa kayiolo nchere eitobirita papaai entorroni pee elotu shumata iyie, aimaaliki nanu iyie?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Neitoki Daudi ajoki Yonatan, “Kaing'ae laaliki nanu tenaa eikiwaliki papaai lino te nkisikong'ota?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Nejoki Yonatan Daudi, “Wou, maipang'a aapuo ong'ota.” Neaku eipang'a pokira oare aapuo ong'ota." 
1Samuel20:12 Nejoki Yonatan Daudi, “Metaa Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli shakeni! Te naimakinye nanu papaai lai tena rishata taisere, arashu te nkolong e uni, ng'ura, tenaa esidai ninye ti alo iyie, aimairriu nanu olkilikuai pee aaitayiolo iyie." 
1Samuel20:13 Kake te nelo neaku keitiship papaai lai pee kintaas iyie entorrono, metaasa sii Olaitoriani ina te Yonatan, neitulusoo sii te nemaaitayiolo nanu, areu iyie shomo, pee itum ashomo te seriani. Metaa Olaitoriani te nebo iyie, anaa enataa te nebo papaai lai." 
1Samuel20:14 Te neton nanu aishu, ntoduaaki nanu enyorrata nemeibelekenya o Laitoriani, pee maye nanu;" 
1Samuel20:15 nimidung esupatisho ino aitung'uaa enkaji ai ntarasi. Te neiwuang'ie Olaitoriani adung'oo pooki ng'ae loo lmang'ati le Daudi aiwuang'ie ti oriong e nkop," 
1Samuel20:16 mincho enkarna e Yonatan edung'ori aaitung'uaa enkaji e Daudi. Naa meitalaku Olaitoriani elap too lmang'ati le Daudi.” 
1Samuel20:17 Neitoki Yonatan ainosie Daudi olmumai aigil ti alo enyorrata enye te ninye; amu kenyor apa ninye anaa enanyor oltau lenye. 
1Samuel20:18 Neitoki Yonatan ajoki ninye, “Ore taisere naa olapa ng'ejuk; naa eikilai iyie, enkaraki nemetii toki olorika lino." 
1Samuel20:19 Ore te nkolong e uni naa eikilai iyie oleng; neaku shomo ewueji apa nisudoriyie kewan aa torrok mbaa, niton te mbata oo soito oosoto." 
1Samuel20:20 Naa kang'oroo nanu mbaa uni embata enye anaa duoo kaata entoki nang'orito.
