1Samuel20:21 Naa ng'ura, kairriu nanu enkerai, ajoki, ‘Shomo, ing'oru mbaa.’ Ore ake pee ajoki enkerai, ‘Ng'ura ena shoto ino etii mbaa, iyau ninche’; nilotu iyie, amu, ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, keserian te iyie nemetii embatisho." 
1Samuel20:22 Kake te najoki nanu ilo barnoti, ‘Ng'ura etii mbaa te idia alo iyie;’ shomo, amu Olaitoriani likirriwayie iyie shomo." 
1Samuel20:23 Ore ti alo ina bae nikiimakitia nanu o iyie, ng'ura, etii Olaitoriani erishata iyie o nanu ntarasi.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Neaku eisudoyie Daudi kewan ti atua enkurma; ore ake pee elotu olapa ng'ejuk, neton olaiguanani anya endaa." 
1Samuel20:25 Neton olaiguanani to lorika lenye, anaa too nkulie katitin, to lorika otii embata e suntai; neton Yonatan aipirakinore, neton Abna atashare Saul kake keisiu ewueji e Daudi." 
1Samuel20:26 Ore eyia eitu ejo Saul ae ina olong; amu etejo ninye, “Eeta ake naanoto ninye; mesinya ninye, esipa mesinya ninye.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Kake ore te nkolong e are, taisere e tulusoyie olapa ng'ejuk, neisiu ake ewueji e Daudi. Nejoki Saul Yonatan, olayioni lenye, “Kainyoo pee eitu elotu olayioni le Yese anya endaa, ng'ole arashu taata?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Newaliki Yonatan Saul ajoki, “Aatasayia nanu Daudi aomonu pee elo Betlehem;" 
1Samuel20:29 etejo ninye, ‘Nchooki nanu mashomo; amu eeta olmarei lang olasar ti atua enkang, naaitanapa nanu olalashe lai pee atii ine. Neaku taata, te nanoto nanu omom too nkonyek inono, nchooki mashomo, pee adol ilalashera laainei.’ Te nkaraki ena eitu ninye elotu emesa o laiguanani.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Neyupuyup engoro e Saul tialo Yonatan, nejoki ninye Yonatan “Iyie olayioni le nkitok modai nemening'isho, aimayiolo nanu ajo itegelua iyie olayioni le Yese te nkurruna ino makewan, o te nkurruna e masipaisho e ng'utunyi?" 
1Samuel20:31 Amu ore anaa enaishu olayioni le Yese ti oriong kop, mibul iyie nemebul enkitoria ino. Metaa irriwai olkilikuai niyau ninye enatii, amu esipa eye ake.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Neitoki Yonatan awaliki Saul, papaai lenye ajoki, “Kainyoo pee eari ninye metua? Kainyoo etaasa ninye?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Kake etang'oroyie Saul empere enye ajo ang'or ninye; neaku etayiolo Yonatan nchere enyokita apa papaai lenye ajo aar Daudi metua. 
1Samuel20:34 Nedumunye Yonatan aing'uaa emesa te ngoro napi neitu enya endaa te nkolong e are o lapa, amu eishirieki te nkaraki Daudi, te nkaraki naitukurrua papaai lenye ninye." 
1Samuel20:35 Ore tadekenya neipang Yonatan alo atua enkurma ewueji netoning'okinote o Daudi, nelo te nebo ninye enkiti ayioni." 
1Samuel20:36 Nejoki ninye enkerai enye, “Kueta ing'oru nena baa natang'oroyie nanu.” Ore ekuet enkayioni nengoroo embae te idia alo ninye." 
1Samuel20:37 Ore ake elotu enkayioni ewueji netii ina bae natang'oroyie Yonatan, neipot Yonatan enkayioni nejoki," 
1Samuel20:38 “Aimetii embae te idia alo iyie?” Neipot Yonatan enkayioni, “Tasiooi, isarisara, miton.” Neaku etasotuo enkayioni e Yonatan mbaa, nelotu enetii olkitok lenye." 
1Samuel20:39 Kake meyiolo apa ina ayioni toki; Yonatan ake o Daudi ooyiolo ina bae. 
1Samuel20:40 Neisho Yonatan imasaa enyena olarrabal ina ayioni nejoki ninye, “Shomo iwa ninche enkanasa.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Ore ake eshomo ina ayioni nedumunye Daudi te mbata oo soito oorupa, nebatata ninye te nkomom enye abaiki enkop, neirrugo katitin uni; neng'ututa maate, neishirakino maate, o metaba anaa neyagaa Daudi." 
1Samuel20:42 Neitoki Yonatan ajoki Daudi, “Shomo te seriani, amu ore anaa enikinosa olmumai iyiook pokira te nkarna o Laitoriani, kijo, Olaitoriani otii erishata nanu o iyie, o erishata e ishoi ai o eshoi ino, intarasi.” Nedumunye ninye nelo; nelo Yonatan ajing enkanasa." 
1Samuel21:1 Nelotu Daudi Nob enetii Ahimelek olapolosani; nelotu Ahimelek anang'are Daudi eikirikira, nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo paa iyie openy, nemetii hoo obo te nebo iyie?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Nejoki Daudi Ahimelek ilo apolosani, “Aairriwayie nanu olaiguanani te mbae naje, naajoki nanu, ‘Mincho ake hoo ng'ae eyiolou ae toki ena bae naa ninye aairriwarie, naa ninye aaitanapa iyie.’ Aata nanu ndung'eta oo lbarnot te wueji neje." 
1Samuel21:3 Ore naa, kainyoo iata? Nchooki nanu imukateni imiet, arashu entoki naba anaa enatii ene.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Newaliki ilo apolosani Daudi ajo, “Maata nanu imukateni e oshi ake tene, kake etii imukateni naasinya, te neitalama ake duoo ninche ilbarnot ate nkituaak.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Newaliki Daudi ilo apolosani ajo, “Ore te sipata eitalamayioki apa nkituaak te iyiook anaa oshi ake te nalo te nkisiaayiare eisinyat imasaa oo lbarnot, hoo duoo ninye tenaa elototo e oshi ake; kebaa naa taata aa sinyat imasaa enye?”" 
1Samuel21:6 Neaku eishoo olapolosani ninye emukate nasinya, amu metii apa emukate ine meteleku ake ina mukate enkitoduaaroto, naa ninche eiwuang'ieki aaitung'uaa dukuya o Laitoriani, pee eitapaashikini imukateni naairowua ina olong naawaki." 
1Samuel21:7 Netii apa oltung'ani oje loo sinkan le Saul ine ina olong, oikenoyioki te dukuya o Laitoriani; ore apa enkarna enye naa Doeg le Edom, olkitok loo lchekuti le Saul." 
1Samuel21:8 Nejoki Daudi Ahimelek, “Amaa aimiaata iyie empere arashu olalem tene? Amu eitu duoo ayau olalem lai arashu empere ai te nebo nanu, enkaraki naa ore enkisiaayiare o laiguanani neyieu enkisarrisar.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Nejo olapolosani, “Ore olalem le Goliat ilo Filisti litara apa to oerata le Ela, ng'ura, etii ene eirina te nkarasha ti oriong enkila dorrop; tenaa iya ilo, iwa, amu metii likae kake ele ake.” Nejo Daudi, “Meetae likae laaijo ilo; nchooki nanu.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Nedumunye Daudi neisik ina olong ailany Saul, nelo enetii Akish olaiguanani le Gas." 
1Samuel21:11 Nejoki ninye isinkan le Akish, “Aime Daudi ele olaiguanani le nkop? Keitu ninche eranyakino maate ti alo ninye too sinkolioitin ejo: ‘Etasesekuana Saul nkalifuni enyena, Ore Daudi naa nkalifuni tomon enyena?’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Neya Daudi kulo rorei to ltau, neureyu oleng Akish ilo aiguanani le Gas." 
1Samuel21:13 Neaku eibelekenya ninye olkuaak lenye te dukuya ninche, neitaakuno koltung'ani omoda, too nkaik enyena, nekord mbaoi oo milankoni e kishomi, neisho nkamulak edou aapuo olmunyei lenye." 
1Samuel21:14 Nejoki Akish isinkan lenyena, “Eng'ura aajo kemoda ele tung'ani; kainyoo naa pee iyautua intae enatii?" 
1Samuel21:15 Ai maata nanu iltung'ana oomoda, pee iyautua ele tung'ani metaasa emodaisho te dukuya nanu? Kelotu ele tung'ani atua enkaji ai?”" 
1Samuel22:1 Nedumunye Daudi te ine neisik alo enkapune e Adulam; ore ake pee ening ilalashera lenyena o enkaji e papaai lenye pooki, nedoyio aapuo enetii ninye." 
1Samuel22:2 Ore pooki ng'ae oata osina, o pooki ng'ae oata esile, o pooki ng'ae leton emonira neiturrurrukino ninye, neaku ninye olarikoni lenye. Netii apa te nebo ninye iltung'ana oobaya iip ong'uan." 
1Samuel22:3 Nelo Daudi teine Mispe e Moab; nejoki ninye olaiguanani le Moab, “Aatoomono nchoo sii ake papaai o yieyio etoni te nebo iyie, o metaba anaa nayiolou enaas Enkai te nanu.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Neing'uaa ninye ninche te nebo olaiguanani le Moab, netoni ninche te nebo ninye ina kata pooki etii Daudi enkapune." 
1Samuel22:5 Nejoki oloiboni le Nkai Daudi, “Mintoki aton to lnukata, shomo enkop e Yuda.” Neaku etudumunye Daudi nelo atua entim e Heres." 
1Samuel22:6 Nening apa Saul nchere enotoki Daudi, o lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye. Netonita apa Saul te Gibea ti abori olchani oji olkuaju te wueji neika, eeta empere enye te nkaina enye neitashe isinkan lenyena pooki aaman ninye." 
1Samuel22:7 Nejoki Saul lelo sinkan lenyena oomanita ninye, “Entoning taata, intae ile Benchamen; amaa keisho ole Yese pooki ng'ae te intae inkurman o nkurman oo sabibu, keitaa ninye intae pooki ilkituaak loo nkalifuni o ilkituaak le maaip," 
1Samuel22:8 pee kitarresho intae pooki nanu? Meetae hoo obo laaliki nanu enkata naibung'are olayioni lai olayioni le Yese, meetae obo te intae laaing'urrie nanu arashu aaliki nanu nchere eisisa olayioni lai osinka lai maataara nanu, maatarresho, anaa enatiu ena olong.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Newal Doeg le Edom, apa oitasho te mbata oo sinkan le Saul ejo, “Ataduaa nanu olayioni le Yese elotu Nob, enetii Ahimelek, olayioni le Ahitab," 
1Samuel22:10 neikilikuanishore ninye Olaitoriani te nkaraki ninye, neisho ninye ndaiki, neisho ninye olalem le Goliat ilo Filisti.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Neitoki olaiguanani airriwaa olkilikuai aipotu Ahimelek olapolosani, olayioni le Ahitab, o enkaji e papaai lenye pooki, lelo apolosak apa ootii Nob; nepuonu ninche pooki enetii olaiguanani." 
1Samuel22:12 Nejo Saul, “Toning'o taata, olayioni le Ahitab.” Newalu ninye, “Nele nanu, olkitok lai.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Nejoki Saul ninye, “Kainyoo pee kitarresho nanu, iyie o layioni le Yese, te ina ninchoo ninye imukateni o olalem, ninkilikuanishore Enkai te nkaraki ninye, neaku aatudumakine ninye nanu naairrag arresh, anaa enatiu ena olong?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Newaliki Ahimelek olaiguanani ajo, “Naa kaing'ae ti atua isinkan linono pooki oisiligayu oleng alang Daudi, kaing'ae olaputani lo laiguanani, olkitok oitasheiki lelo likirrip iyie, neyanyiti ti atua enkaji ino?" 
1Samuel22:15 Ae taata enkata e dukuya naikilikuanishore nanu Enkai te nkaraki ninye? A-a! Mincho olaiguanani eomonu ae toki to sinka lenye arashu te nkaji pooki e papaai lai; amu eitu eyiolou osinka lino ae toki te kuna pooki, te sapuk arashu te nkiti.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Nejo olaiguanani, “Esipa, iye ake, Ahimelek, iyie o enkaji e papaai lino.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Nejoki olaiguanani lelo arripok oomanita ninye, “Embelekenyata entaar ilapolosak lo Laitoriani metuata; amu etii sii enkaina enye te nebo Daudi, neyiolo apa aajo eisika ninye, neitu ninche aaliki nanu.” Kake ore isinkan lo laiguanani nemeidim aatudumu enkaina enye aaiteleiki lelo apolosak lo Laitoriani." 
1Samuel22:18 Neitoki olaiguanani ajoki Doeg, “Imbelekenyayu iyie tusulakinoyu ilapolosak.” Neibelekenya Doeg le Edom nedoiki lelo apolosak, near ninye ina olong iltung'ana ntomoni isiet o imiet ooishopito enkila dorrop sidai." 
1Samuel22:19 Ore Nob ina ang oo lapolosak, near ninye to lalem; ilewa o nkituaak, nkera o naanakita, ilmong'i, isirkon o nkerra, near to lalem." 
1Samuel22:20 Kake ore obo loo layiok le Ahimelek ole Ahitab, oji Abiata, neisudori neisik asujaa Daudi." 
1Samuel22:21 Neliki Abiata Daudi nchere etaara Saul ilapolosak lo Laitoriani metuata. 
1Samuel22:22 Nejoki Daudi Abiata, “Atayiolo apa te ina olong, etii Doeg ilo Edometi ine, inchere esipa keliki ninye Saul. Ayaua nanu ina keeya oo ltung'ana pooki le nkaji e papaai lino." 
1Samuel22:23 Totona te nebo nanu, miureisho; amu ore ilo oing'oru enkishui ai neing'oru enkishui ino; ore te nebo nanu niton te wueji neserian.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Nejoki ninche Daudi, “Ng'ura, earita Ilfilisti Keila nepurrito nenen neeitobirieki enkurma.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Neaku eikilikuanishore Daudi Olaitoriani, “Kalo nanu aar kulo Filisti?” Nejoki Olaitoriani Daudi, “Shomo taara pee intajeu Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Kake etiaakitia iltung'ana le Daudi ninye, “Ng'ura, eikiureisho iyiook tene te Yuda; kebaa naa naaji ti nikipuo Keila aarare injorin oo Lfilisti?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Neitoki ake Daudi aikilikuanishore Olaitoriani. Newaliki Olaitoriani ninye ajo, “Tudumunye, tadoi shomo Keila; amu kaishoru nanu Ilfilisti apik atua nkaik inono.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Nelo Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena Keila, nearare Ilfilisti, neyau nchoo enye, near iltung'ana kumok metuata tiatua ninche. Neaku etokordua Daudi lelo oomanya Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Ore apa pee eisik Abiata olayioni le Ahimelek alo enetii Daudi te Keila, nedou ninye alotu eeta enkila dorrop te nkaina enye." 
1Samuel23:7 Netiaakaki apa Saul nchere eewuo Daudi Keila. Nejo Saul, “Eishorua Enkai ninye apik atua nkaik aainei amu eikenoyie ninye kewan ajing enkanasa naata nchomito oo sekenke.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Neipotu Saul iltung'ana pooki meetu olarrabal, metadoi aapuo Keila, pee eng'adu Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena." 
1Samuel23:9 Neyiolou Daudi ajo eitobirita Saul entorroni te nkaraki ninye; nejoki ninye Abiata ilo apolosani, “Iyau ina kila dorrop ene.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Nejo Daudi, “Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, etoning'o osinka lino asipu nchere keing'oru Saul pee elotu Keila pee eidaikie enkang te nkaraki nanu." 
1Samuel23:11 Amaa, kaaishooyo nanu iltung'ana le Keila aapik atua enkaina enye? Kedou Saul alotu, anaa enatoning'o osinka lino? Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, aatasayia iyie, toliki osinka lino.” Nejo Olaitoriani, “Kedou ninye alotu.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Neitoki Daudi ajo, “Amaa, kaishooyo nanu iltung'ana le Keila iltung'ana laainei aapik atua enkaina e Saul?” Nejo Olaitoriani, “Eikinchooyo ninche.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Nedumunye Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena, oobaya iip ile neing'uaa Keila, nepuo ninche eneba anaa eneidim aashom. Ore ake pee elikini Saul nchere eisika Daudi nepal elototo." 
1Samuel23:14 Neton Daudi ti atua ilnukat ti ong'ota, te ina kop oo ldoinyo lo lpurkel le Sif. Neing'oru Saul ninye nkolong'i pooki, kake eitu epik ninye Enkai atua enkaina enye." 
1Samuel23:15 Neiruto apa Daudi enkaraki naipang'u Saul alo aing'oru enkishui enye. Netii apa Daudi ong'ata e Sif te Horesh. 
1Samuel23:16 Nedumunye Yonatan, olayioni le Saul, nelo enetii Daudi te Horesh, neitagol enkaina enye te Nkai." 
1Samuel23:17 Nejoki, “Miureisho amu ore enkaina e Saul, papaai lai, mikitum iyie; iaku iyie olaiguanani te Israel, naaku nanu oliare te iyie; eyiolo sii Saul papaai lai ena.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Nenya pokira oare olmumai lo sotua te dukuya Olaitoriani; neton Daudi te Horesh, nelo Yonatan ang." 
1Samuel23:19 Nepuo Ilsifi enetii Saul te Gibea, ejo, “Aimeisudori Daudi ti atua iyiook too lnukat te Horesh, ldoinyo le Hakila, le kopikop e Yesimon?" 
1Samuel23:20 Tadou naa wou, olaiguanani, te risioroto e yieunoto o ltau lino pooki pee idou alotu; ore erishata ang naa pee kinchoru ninye aapik atua enkaina o laiguanani.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Nejo Saul, “Metamayiana intae Olaitoriani; amu inotito intae olng'ur te nanu." 
1Samuel23:22 Enchom, enyaaki entisipa oleng; entayiolo nidolidolo eneisudoriyie, naa kaing'ae otodua ninye te ine; amu aatiaakaki nchere eikalamas ninye oleng." 
1Samuel23:23 Entodol naa, nijurrurru iwuejitin oshi neeisudoriyie, o neerreshishore, nishukunyenye enatii iatata olomoni osipa, pee alo nanu te nebo intae; naa te netii ninye ina kop, naing'oru nanu ninye ti atua nkalifuni pooki e Yuda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Nedumunye ninche, nepuo Sif aaituruk te Saul. Netii apa Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena ong'ata e Maon, ti atua Araba te nkalo e kopikop e Yesimon." 
1Samuel23:25 Nelo Saul o ltung'ana lenyena aaing'oru ninye. Nelikini Daudi; neaku etadoyie alo endapidapoi natii ong'ata e Moan. Ore ake pee ening Saul ina, nesujaa Daudi ti ong'ata e Moan." 
1Samuel23:26 Nelo Saul enchoto nabo o ldoinyo, nelo Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena te nkai shoto o ldoinyo, neisarisarita apa Daudi pee eilany Saul, ore etinyikutua Saul o ltung'ana lenyena aapunyaki Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena pee eibung ninche," 
1Samuel23:27 nelotu olkipaaret enetii Saul, ejo, “Isarisaru wou; amu etaara Ilfilisti enkop.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Neaku etushuke Saul eitu eitoki asujaa Daudi, nelo aarare Ilfilisti; neaku etejoki apa ine wueji Endapidapoi e nkisikata." 
1Samuel23:29 Neilep Daudi alo te ine, nebik too lnukat le En-gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Ore pee eshukunye Saul eing'uaa esujata oo Lfilisti, nejokini, “Ng'ura, etii Daudi ong'ata e En-gedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Neya Saul iltung'ana nkalifuni uni oogeluno ti atua Israel pooki, nepuo aaing'oru Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena te dukuya ndapidapo oo nkineji oo soito." 
1Samuel24:3 Nelotu ninye imuatat oo nkerra e mbata e nkoitoi, ine apa netii enkapune, nelo Saul atua pee eyeng'iyeng'ie kewan. Ore apa Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena netonita teneiting'ie enkapune ti atua." 
1Samuel24:4 Nejoki iltung'ana le Daudi ninye, “Nena enkolong naa ninye kitiaaka iyie Olaitoriani, ‘Ng'ura, kapik nanu olmang'atinta lino atua enkaina ino, naa intaas ninye anaa enidol aa sidai.’ ” Neinyototo Daudi neiseleejari alo adung'oo olcholoi lo lkila le Saul." 
1Samuel24:5 Ore te siadi neitanyamal Daudi oltau lenye, enkaraki natudung'oyie ninye olcholoi lo lkila le Saul." 
1Samuel24:6 Nejoki ninye iltung'ana lenyena, “Maatomitiki nanu Olaitoriani pee maitaas nanu ena olkitok lai, ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aput aitorioo enkaina ai agilunore ninye adolita ajo olotuputo Olaitoriani ninye.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Neaku eilejileja Daudi iltung'ana lenyena te kulo rorei, neitu eisho ninche metarasaki Saul. Nedumunye Saul neing'uaa enkapune, nelo te nkoitoi enye." 
1Samuel24:8 Ore te siadi nedumunye sii ninye Daudi, neipang'u ti atua enkapune, neipotu Saul, “Olkitok lai, olaiguanani!” Ore ake pee enang Saul silig, neirrugo Daudi o metabaiki enkop te nkomom enye, neserem ninye." 
1Samuel24:9 Nejoki Daudi Saul, “Kainyoo iyie pee ining irorei loo ltung'ana oojo, ‘Ng'ura, eing'oru Daudi enkitamioto ino?’" 
1Samuel24:10 Dol, ore ena olong etoduaa nkonyek inono aajo kitipika taata iyie Olaitoriani atua enkaina ai ti atua enkapune; naajoki nanu ilkulikae maataara iyie tua, kake aatapala nanu. Najo, ‘Maitorioo enkaina ai aar olkitok lai; amu olotubukokoki eilata aaput lo Laitoriani ninye!’" 
1Samuel24:11 Toduaa, papaai lai, toduaa ajo etii olcholoi lo lkila lino enkaina ai; amu ore te sipata nchere atudung'oyie olcholoi lo lkila lino, neitu aar iyie tua, indim atayiolo nidol nchere metii entorroni e nkibelekenyata arashu enkitoria atua nkaik aainei. Eitu aas eng'oki ti alo iyie, hoo nirresh enkishui ai pee intayu." 
1Samuel24:12 Metaa Olaitoriani orish erishata ai o iyie, maaitalaa nanu Olaitoriani te iyie; kake mikiarare iyie enkaina ai." 
1Samuel24:13 Anaa enajo endung'et e rashe e apa moitie, ‘Atua ilo torrono epukunye entorroni.’ Kake mikiarare iyie enkaina ai." 
1Samuel24:14 Kaing'ae eipang'u olaiguanani le Israel asujaa? Kaing'ae isujita iyie? Koldia otua isujita iyie! Kolpidilai isujita! 
1Samuel24:15 Metaa naa Olaitoriani orish nedung'oki enkiguana te rishata ai o iyie, neingor ninye, naamitu nanu, naakordu nanu te nkaina ino.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Ore ake pee eidip Daudi airorie kulo rorei Saul, nejo Saul, “Koltoilo lino ele, enkerai ai Daudi?” Neyietu Saul aishir." 
1Samuel24:17 Nejoki ninye Daudi, “Iyie asipani alang nanu, amu kitalaaka nanu esidai aa entorroni nanu aatalaaka." 
1Samuel24:18 Nimbalunye iyie ena olong ina nikintaasa nanu esidai, te ina neitu kiar matua ina kata pee aapik nanu Olaitoriani atua nkaik inono." 
1Samuel24:19 Amu amaa te netum oltung'ani olmang'atinta lenye, keisho ninye meshomo ninye eserian? Neaku mikitalaaki Olaitoriani te sidai te ina nikintaasa iyie nanu ena olong." 
1Samuel24:20 Ore taata, ng'ura, ayiolo nanu ajo esipa iaku iyie olaiguanani, neitubulari enkitoria e Israel te nkaina ino." 
1Samuel24:21 Inosieki olmumai to Laitoriani nchere midung'oo iyie eishoi ai te siadi nanu, o nchere mindaikie iyie enkarna ai aitayu te nkaji e papaai lai.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Nenya Daudi ele mumai te nkaraki Saul. Nelo Saul ang; kake eshomo Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena atua olnukata. 
1Samuel25:1 Neye apa Samuel, neiturrurro Israel pooki aaishiraki ninye, nenukaa ninche ninye te nkaji enye te Rama. Nedumunye Daudi nedoyio alo ong'ata e Paran." 
1Samuel25:2 Netii apa oltung'ani otii Maon, otii esiaai enye Karmel. Eikarsis apa ilo tung'ani oleng; eeta apa ninye nkerra nkalifuni uni o nkineji enkalifu nabo. Nebarnu apa ninye ilpapit loo nkerra enyena te Karmel." 
1Samuel25:3 Ore apa enkarna e ilo tung'ani naa Nabal, ore enkarna e nkitok enye naa Abigail. Naa ng'en apa ina kitok neikishiaan kake kemoda apa olee naa torrono olkuaak; naa ole ntipat e Kaleb apa." 
1Samuel25:4 Nening Daudi ti ong'ata nchere ebarnita Nabal nkerra enyena. 
1Samuel25:5 Neaku eirriwayie Daudi ilbarnot tomon; nejoki Daudi lelo barnot, “Elepa enchom Karmel, nipuopuo enetii Nabal, nirorokiki ninye te nkarna ai." 
1Samuel25:6 Naa nji enkuna te nirorokiki ninye: ‘Metaa enino eseriani, metaa eseriani ene nkaji ino, metaa eseriani ene lelo pooki liata iyie." 
1Samuel25:7 Aning nanu nchere iata iyie ilabarnok; etii oshi ilchekuti linono te nebo iyiook, neitu iyiook kintaas ninche entorrono, neitu ninche elau toki, ina kata pooki etii Karmel." 
1Samuel25:8 Nkilikuana ilbarnot linono, amu eikiliki ninche. Metaa nchoo ilbarnot laainei etum omom too nkonyek inono; amu kipuonu iyiook te nkolong o sirua. Kitoomono iyie, nchoo pooki toki niaata isinkan linono o olayioni lino Daudi.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Ore ake pee epuonu ilbarnot le Daudi, nejoki ninche nena pooki Nabal te nkarna e Daudi; netoni aanyisho." 
1Samuel25:10 Newaliki Nabal isinkan le Daudi nejo, “Kaing'ae Daudi? Kaing'ae olayioni le Yese? Etii oshi taata kuna olong'i isinkan kumok oopuo aaing'uaa ilkituaak lenye." 
1Samuel25:11 Kaitayu nanu endaa ai o enkare ai o enkiring'o ai nateyieng'uo te nkaraki ilabarnok laainei, aisho iltung'ana ooing'uaa ewueji nemayiolo nanu ajo kaji eing'uaa?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Neaku eibelekenyate lelo barnot le Daudi aapuo, neshuko neliki ninye ina." 
1Samuel25:13 Nejoki Daudi iltung'ana lenyena, “Teena pooki ng'ae olalem lenye!” Ore pooki ng'ae te ninche neen olalem lenye; neen sii ninye Daudi olalem lenye; nepuo iltung'ana oobaya iip ong'uan aasujaa Daudi, netoni iltung'ana iip are aarrip ilolan." 
1Samuel25:14 Kake etiaaka obo loo lbarnot Abigail, enkitok e Nabal, “Ng'ura, Eirriwua Daudi ilkiliku ooing'uaa ong'ata meetu aairoroki olkitok lang, kake etamoro ninche." 
1Samuel25:15 Ore eyia, eisupati apa lelo tung'ana te iyiook, neitu iyiook kitum entorroni, neitu iyiook kilau toki apa kitii ong'ota, te nkata naba anaa enikishomo te nebo ninche;" 
1Samuel25:16 esuntai apa ninche te iyiook te nkewarie o te ndama, te ina kata pooki apa nikitii iyiook te nebo ninche king'orita nkerra." 
1Samuel25:17 Ore naa taata tayiolo ena nidamu eniaas; amu eitobirakitia olkitok lang entorroni o enkaji enye pooki, naa kegogong ninye oleng meetae oltung'ani oidim airorie ninye.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Kaae neisarrisar Abigail, neya imukateni iip are, o lbenia oare loo lonito le naisho oo sabibu o nkerra imiet naayieng'a, o ntemat imiet enkurma napejo o rridat iip loo sabibu, o mukateni iip are oo lng'abolo, neirragie ninche te nchumata oo sirkon." 
1Samuel25:19 Nejoki ninye lelo barnot lenye, “Enchom enturuko te dukuya nanu; ng'ura, kalotu nanu asuju intae.” Kake eitu ninye eliki olpayian lenye Nabal." 
1Samuel25:20 Ore eloito ninye ekedito osikiria nedou alotu abori olmelil lo ldoinyo, ng'ura, nelotu Daudi, o ltung'ana lenyena aadou aanang'are ninye; nenang'are ninye ninche." 
1Samuel25:21 Netejo apa Daudi, “Esipa pesho apa nanu atorripo nena pooki naata ele tung'ani ti ong'ata neaku meetae entoki natalaki te nena pooki naara nkunenyena; naatushukoko ninye nanu entorroni te sidano." 
1Samuel25:22 Metaasa Enkai ena te Daudi, neitulusoo sii, te natung'uayie nanu tadekenya obo lee le lelo pooki oora ilenyena.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Ore ake pee edol Abigail Daudi, neisarrisar ninye, nedou to sikiria, nebatata ninye te dukuya Daudi te nkomom enye, neirrugo abaiki enkop." 
1Samuel25:24 Nebatata ninye too nkejek enyena nejo, “Shumata nanu ake, olkitok lai, nchoo elotu entorroni; aatoomono nchoo esinka ino eiro too nkiyiaa inono, nining irorei le sinka ino." 
1Samuel25:25 Mincho olkitok lai eshilaa ele tung'ani le ntorroni, Nabal; amu ore anaa enatiu enkarna enye, neijia etiu ninye, Nabal enkarna enye, netii emodai te nebo ninye; kake ore nanu esinka ino eitu adol lelo barnot lo lkitok lai, laa ninche iyie irriwua," 
1Samuel25:26 ore naa taata, olkitok lai, anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, o anaa enaishu oltau lino, idolita ajo kimbooyie iyie Olaitoriani aitung'uaa enkibukoroto o sarge, o enkitalakunoto e lap te nkaina ino makewan, ore naa taata nchoo ilmang'ati linono o lelo ooing'oru aaitaas entorroni olkitok lai etiu anaa Nabal." 
1Samuel25:27 Ore taata ena kishoroto naa ninye eyaka esinka ino olkitok lai inchoo meishori lelo barnot oosuj olkitok lai. 
1Samuel25:28 Aatoomono tapalakaki engolong'akinoto e sinka ino; amu esipa keitaa Olaitoriani olkitok lai enkaji nauno, amu ilarrabali lo Laitoriani etii olkitok lai; nemetumi entorroni te iyie anaa ninchu." 
1Samuel25:29 Te nedumunye iltung'ana pee kisujaa iyie pee eing'oru enkishui ino, ore enkishui o lkitok lai naa keenari to rridata loo looishu te nking'urata o Laitoriani Enkai ino; ore enkishui oo lmang'ati linono nenang'aa ninye anaa osoit onang'ari te nkopito." 
1Samuel25:30 Ore ake pee eidip Olaitoriani aitaasa olkitok lai te risioroto e nena pooki sidain naairoro ninye ti alo iyie, nikitegelua ninye taa olkitok te shumata Israel," 
1Samuel25:31 metum olkitok lai enaitagor arashu enyamali o ltau, te nkibukoroto o sarge metii emporeet, arashu to lkitok lai eitalaku elap makewan. Ore ake pee kindip Olaitoriani aitaasa olkitok lai esidai, nidamu naa esinka ino.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Nejoki Daudi Abigail, “Meisisi Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, laa ninye nikirriua iyie ena olong pee kinang'are nanu!" 
1Samuel25:33 Metamayiani eng'eno ino, naa mikitamayiani iyie, aa iyie nikimbooyie nanu ena olong te nkibukoroto o sarge o te nkitalakunoto elap te nkaina ai makewan!" 
1Samuel25:34 Amu ore te sipata anaa enaishu Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, laa ninye laaibooyie nanu eitu aaitame iyie, te neme eisarisarua iyie nikilotu anang'are nanu, esipa ore tadekenya anaata eitu ninye elekakini Nabal hoo ninye olee obo.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Neng'amu Daudi too nkaik eina kitok ina nayaka ninye ninye; nejoki ninye, “Ilepa shomo te seriani enkaji ino; ing'ura, atoning'o nanu oltoilo lino, naishorua nanu ina omonunoto ino.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Nelotu Abigail enetii Nabal; naa, ng'ura eeta apa ninye osirua ti atua enkaji enye, anaa osirua lo laiguanani. Neng'ida apa oltau le Nabal ti atua ninye, amu etemere apa oleng; neaku eitu eliki ninye toki tukul o metaba anaa nekenyu awang'u." 
1Samuel25:37 Ore te nkakenya eishunye emerai te Nabal, neliki ninye enkitok enye kuna baa, neye oltau lenye ti atua ninye, netiu ninye anaa osoit." 
1Samuel25:38 Ore too nkolong'i naabaya tomon te siadi neosh Olaitoriani Nabal; neye ninye. 
1Samuel25:39 Ore pee ening Daudi nchere etua Nabal, nejo ninye, “Metamayiani Olaitoriani laa ninye oitalakua ina moroto apa natang'amua nanu te nkaina e Nabal, neibooyie ninye osinka lenye aitung'uaa entorroni; etushukoko Olaitoriani ina kiaas torrono enchumata endukuya enye makewan.” Neirriwaa Daudi iltung'ana pee esir Abigail aitaa ninye enkitok enye." 
1Samuel25:40 Ore ake pee epuonu isinkan le Daudi enetii Abigail te Karmel, nejoki ninche ninye, “Eirriua Daudi iyiook enitii pee kintaa iyie te ninye anaa enkitok enye.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Nedumunye ninye neirrugo te nkomom enye o metabaiki enkop, nejo, “Ng'ura, ore esinka ino naa enkaisaayiani naituku nkejek oo sinkan lo lkitok lai.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Neisarrisar Abigail, nedumunye neked osikiria, neisiaai ninye nkaisiaayiak enyena imiet; nesujaa ninye lelo kiliku le Daudi, neaku enkitok enye." 
1Samuel25:43 Neitoki sii Daudi aya Ahinoam e Yesreel; neaku ninche pokira are nkituaak enyena. 
1Samuel25:44 Neishoo apa Saul Mikal, entito enye, ina kitok e Daudi, Palti olayioni le Laish, laa olayioni le Galim apa ninye." 
1Samuel26:1 Nepuonu Ilsifi enetii Saul te Gibea, nejo, “Aimeisudori Daudi to ldoinyo le Hikila, otii enkalo o loo saen le Yeshimon?”" 
1Samuel26:2 Neaku etudumunye Saul nedoyio alo ong'ata e Sif, te nebo iltung'ana nkalifuni uni oogeluno le Israel, pee eing'oru Daudi ti ong'ata e Sif." 
1Samuel26:3 Neitayu Saul olg'obor to ldoinyo le Hikila, otii embata enkoitoi nalala te nkalo o loo saen le Yesimon. Kake etotona Daudi to lpurkel; ore ake pee edol ajo eewuo Saul asuju ninye atua olpurkel," 
1Samuel26:4 neirriwaa Daudi ilaikitalak, pee eyiolou aasipu nchere eewuo Saul." 
1Samuel26:5 Nedumunye Daudi nelotu ine wueji apa netipika Saul olg'obor, nedol Daudi ine wueji neirragie Saul, te nebo Abna olayioni le Ner, olkitok le njore enye; neirragita apa Saul ti atua olng'obor nemanita enjore pooki ninye." 
1Samuel26:6 Nejoki Daudi Ahimelek ilo Hitati; o lalashe le Yoab Abishai olayioni le Seruiya, “Kaing'ae odoyio alo te nebo nanu atua olng'obor enetii Saul?” Nejo Abishai, “Kadoyio nanu alo te nebo iyie.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Neaku eshomo Daudi o Abishai enetii ina jore kewarie; neirragita Saul te ine airura ti atua olng'obor, neunokino empere enye enkop te mbata e ndukuya enye; ore Abna o enjore neirrag aaman ninye." 
1Samuel26:8 Nejoki Abishai Daudi, “Eishorua Enkai olmang'atinta lino apik atua enkaina ino ena olong; ore naa nchooki nanu matupudaki ninye enkop te remoto nabo e mpere, nemaitoki nanu arem ninye kat are.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Kake etiaaka Daudi Abishai, “Minyal ninye, amu kaing'ae oidim aitorioi enkaina enye metaarare ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aaput, neaku meeta entioto?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Nejo Daudi, “Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, kear Olaitoriani ninye; arashu elotu enkolong enye pee eye; arashu elo ninye atua olarrabal neari metua." 
1Samuel26:11 Metomito Olaitoriani nchere kadumu nanu enkaina ai aar ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aput; kake iwa taata ina pere natii embata endukuya enye, o ina moti e nkare, pee kipuo iyiook.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Neaku ewa Daudi empere o emoti e nkare aitung'uaa endukuya e Saul, nepuo ninche. Metii oltung'ani otoduaa ina, arashu otayiolo ina, arashu einyo hoo likae; amu keirura apa pooki, te nkaraki eetuo njo naairoishi naaing'uaa Olaitoriani shumata ninche." 
1Samuel26:13 Neitoki Daudi alang alo lido kekun, neitashe te nelakua te nchumata o ldoinyo, etii erishata sapuk erishata enye." 
1Samuel26:14 Neipot ina jore, o Abna olayioni le Ner, ejo, “Aimiwal iyie, Abna?” Newal Abna, “Ira ng'ae ilo oipot olaiguanani?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Nejoki Daudi Abna, “Aimira iyie olee? Kaing'ae likinyaanyukie iyie ti atua Israel? Kainyoo naa pee eitu iyie irrip olkitok lino olaiguanani? Amu eewuo obo loo ltung'ana atua pee eidaikie olaiguanani olkitok lino." 
1Samuel26:16 Ore ena toki nitaasa iyie neme sidai. Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, kinchiaakinore iyie niye, enkaraki neitu iyie irrip olkitok ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aput. Naa ore taata ing'ura enetii empere o laiguanani, o ina moti e nkare duoo natii embata endukuya enye.”" 
1Samuel26:17 Neyiolou Saul oltoilo le Daudi, nejo, “Koltoilo lino ele, enkerai ai, Daudi?” Nejo Daudi, “Oltoilo lai, olkitok lai, olaiguanani.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Nejo ninye, “Kainyoo pee esuj olkitok lai osinka lenye? Amu kainyoo nanu ataasa? Kaa torroni natii nkaik aainei?" 
1Samuel26:19 Ore naa taata nchoo olkitok lai olaiguanani ening irorei lo sinka lenye. Tenaa Olaitoriani likituputuo iyie taaraki nanu, metang'amu ninye olasar; kake tenaa iltung'ana, metaa kediaa ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani, amu aataaraitie ninche aaipang'ie ena olong pee matum nanu eng'arata e njung'ore o Laitoriani, ejo, ‘Shomo isiaayia kulie aitin.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Ore naa, mincho osarge lai ebukokino enkop te nelakuaniki ine netii Olaitoriani; amu eipang'ua olaiguanani le Israel alotu aing'oru enkishui ai, anaa oltung'ani orresh enkurle too ldoinyo.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Neitoki Saul ajo, “Ataasa nanu entorrono; tushukunye, enkerai ai, Daudi, amu maaitoki nanu aitaas iyie entorrono, amu keeta enkishui ai tipat ena olong too nkonyek inono.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Neitoki Daudi awalu ajo, “Nena empere o laiguanani! Nchoo obo loo lbarnot elang'u alotu aya." 
1Samuel26:23 Ekelaaki Olaitoriani pooki tung'ani te supatisho enye o te nkisiligata enye; amu kinchorua iyie Olaitoriani apik atua enkaina ai taata, nemadumu nanu enkaina ai aarare ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aaput." 
1Samuel26:24 Ng'ura, anaa enaata enkishui ino tipat ena olong too nkonyek aainei, neaku metaa enkishui ai ene tipat too nkonyek o Laitoriani, naa maatokordu ninye aitayu ti atua isinaitin pooki.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Neitoki Saul ajoki Daudi, “Mikitamayiani iyie, enkerai ai, Daudi! Ias iyie mbaa kumok naa idupoyu te pooki.” Neaku eshomo Daudi enkoitoi enye neshuko Saul alo ewueji enye." 
1Samuel27:1 Nejo Daudi to ltau lenye, “Kaye nanu nabo olong te nkaina e Saul; metii entoki sidai te nanu alang te naisikaki enkop oo Lfilisti; pee etum Saul atapalari aaing'oru nanu too lpolosien le Israel, naluaya nanu apuku te nkaina enye.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Neaku etudumunye Daudi nelang alo, ninye o lelo tung'ana iip ile apa ootii te nebo ninye, aapuo enetii Akish olayioni le Moak, olaiguanani le Gas." 
1Samuel27:3 Nebik Daudi te nebo Akish te Gas, ninye o ltung'ana lenyena, pooki tung'ani te nebo enkaji enye o Daudi te nebo nkituaak enyena pokira are, Ahinoam e Yesreel, o Abigail e Karmel, enkoliai e Nabal." 
1Samuel27:4 Ore ake pee ejokini Saul nchere eshomo Daudi Gas, neitu ninye eitoki aing'oru ninye." 
1Samuel27:5 Neitoki Daudi ajoki Akish, “Tenaa kanoto nanu omom too nkonyek inono, nchoo maaishori nanu ewueji ti atua nabo oo nkang'itie ena kop pee atum nanu atobiko te ine; amu kainyoo pee eton osinka lino te nkanasa e nkitoo te nebo iyie?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Neaku eishoo Akish ninye ina olong Siklag; metaa etaa Siklag enoo laiguanak le Yuda o metabaiki ena olong. 
1Samuel27:7 Ore esiana oo nkolong'i naatobiko Daudi te nkop oo Lfilisti naa olari o lapaitin oong'uan. 
1Samuel27:8 Neilep Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena nerasaki Ilgeshuri, Ilgirsi, o Lamaleki; amu kulo apa emanya enkop ti apa, o Shuri, o metabaiki enkop e Misiri." 
1Samuel27:9 Near Daudi enkop, neitu eing'uaa olee arashu enkitok eishu, kake eewa nkerra, o lmong'i, o isirkon, o intamesin, o nkilani, neshukunye alotu enetii Akish." 
1Samuel27:10 Ore pee eikilikuan Akish ajo, “Kakua duoo taata itaara?” Nejo Daudi, “Ilnegeb le Yuda,” arashu, “Ilnegeb le Ijerame,” arashu, “Kitaarare Ilnegeb le Keni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Neitu eing'uaa Daudi olee arashu enkitok eishu, pee etum ayau olomoni Gas, ejo, “Pee melikioo ake ninche iyiook, nejo, ‘Ena etaasa Daudi.’ ” Ele apa olkuaak lenye ina kata pooki apa ebikito te nkop oo Lfilisti." 
1Samuel27:12 Neisilig apa Akish Daudi edamu ajo, “Eibaitie tukul iltung'ana lenyena Israeli; metaa keaku ninye osinka lai anaake.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Ore apa te nena olong'i neiturrur Ilfilisti njorin enye te nkaraki olarrabal, pee earare Israel. Nejoki Akish Daudi, “Tayiolo nchere ore iyie o ltung'ana linono naa impang'ipang'a aapuo te nebo nanu ti atua enjore.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Nejoki Daudi Akish, “Sidai oleng, iyiolou iyie enaidim osinka lino ataasa.” Nejoki Akish Daudi, “Sidai oleng, kaaitaa nanu iyie olarriponi lai te nkishui pooki.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Netua apa Samuel neidipa Israel pooki aaishiraki ninye nenukaa ninye te Rama, te nkanasa enye kewan. Netaarayie apa Saul lelo aisi le yiolounoto o lasakutok meshomo te ina kop." 
1Samuel28:4 Neiturrurro Ilfilisti nepuonu aaitayu olng'obor te Shunem; neiturrur Saul Israel pooki, neitayu ninche olng'obor te Gilboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Ore ake pee edol Saul enjore oo Lfilisti, neureishoyu neikirikira oltau lenye oleng." 
1Samuel28:6 Ore pee eikilikuanishore Saul Olaitoriani, neitu ewaliki Olaitoriani ninye, aa te nkidetidet arashu te Urim, arashu too loibonok." 
1Samuel28:7 Neitoki Saul ajoki isinkan lenyena, “Eng'urakaki nanu enkitok nadolisho te naibon, pee atum nanu ashomo enetii ninye naikilikuanishore ninye.” Nejoki isinkan lenyena ninye, “Etii enkaisi nadolisho te naibon Endor.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Neibelekeny Saul kewan nepika kulikae kilani, nelo, ninye o ltung'ana oare te nebo ninye; nepuonu ninche enetii ina kitok kewarie. Nejo ninye, “Mbonokoki nanu te nkiyang'et, nikilepakinye nanu oltung'ani abo laaipotoki enkarna enye.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Nejoki ina kitok ninye, “Esipa iyiolo ina nataasa Saul, ina naitaasa ninye iloibonok oodolisho, o lasakutok aipang'ie tena kop. Kainyoo naa pee kirragakinye nanu orreshet te nkaraki enkishui ai pee iyau keeya ai?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Kake einosaka Saul ninye olmumai to Laitoriani ejo, “Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, melotu enkitamioto shumata iyie tena bae.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Neitoki ina kitok ajo, “Kaing'ae aayaki ailepakinye?” Nejo ninye, “Iyau ilepakinyeki nanu Samuel.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Ore ake pee edol ina kitok Samuel neyietu aishir to ltoilo sapuk; nejoki ina kitok Saul, “Kainyoo iyie pee kiteleja nanu? Ira iyie Saul.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Miureshoyu iyie; kainyoo iyie idolita?” Nejoki ina kitok Saul, “Adolita nanu enkai eilepu apuku te nkop.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Nejoki ninye ninye, “Kainyoo eliooto enye?” Nejo ninye, “Olpayian moruo oilepu alotu; neirina ninye to lkila.” Neyiolou Saul inchere Samuel ninye, neirrugo ninye te nkomom enye o metabaiki enkop, neserem." 
1Samuel28:15 Nejoki Samuel Saul, “Kainyoo pee kintanyamal ailepunye nanu?” Newal Saul ajo, “Atii nanu atua osina sapuk, amu aaitirrishakitia nanu Ilfilisti aarare, naaibelekenye Enkai aing'uaa nemeekure aawaliki, aa too loibonok arashu te nkidetidet, neaku aaipoto iyie pee kiliki enaas.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Neitoki Samuel ajo, “Kainyoo naa pee kinkilikuan nanu, aa Olaitoriani likimbelekenye aing'uaa neaku ninye olmang'atinta lino?" 
1Samuel28:17 Kintaasa iyie Olaitoriani anaa apa enairoro te nanu; amu etopolosayie Olaitoriani enkitoria aitung'uaa enkaina ino, neisho ilo le latia ino Daudi." 
1Samuel28:18 Enkaraki neitu iyie ining oltoilo lo Laitoriani, neitu intabaya ina goro enye napi aarare Amalek, neaku kintaasa iyie Olaitoriani ena bae ena olong." 
1Samuel28:19 Ore ake sii keishooyo sii Olaitoriani Israel te nebo iyie apik atua enkaina oo Lfilisti; ore taisere iyie o layiok linono niakuku te nebo nanu; naa kelo aishoru Olaitoriani enjore e israel apik atua enkaina oo Lfilisti.” 
1Samuel28:20 Nebatata Saul nabo kata te nkop aitorriori eiputa enkuretisho te nkaraki irorei le Samuel; nemeekure apa etii engolon atua ninye, amu eitu ninye enya toki endama pooki o enkewarie pooki." 
1Samuel28:21 Nelotu ina kitok enetii Saul, ore ake pee edol ajo eiputukunyo, nejoki ninye, “Ng'ura, kitoning'o iyie esinka ino; aitayio nanu enkishui ai te nkaina ai natoning'o ina nikitiaaka iyie nanu." 
1Samuel28:22 Ore naa taata, toning'o sii iyie esinka ino; nchooki nanu mairragie embelati e mukate te dukuya iyie; pee inya, pee itum engolon te nilo te nkoitoi ino.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Neany ninye nejo, “Manya nanu endaa.” Kake etasayia isinkan lenyena ninye te nebo ina kitok, nening irorei lenye. Neaku neinyototo ninye te nkop neton te rruat." 
1Samuel28:24 Neeta apa ina kitok olashe opir ti aji, neyieng ninye asioki, neitayu enkurma, neipurjupurj nepeju imukateni neitu eisuijeki," 
1Samuel28:25 nepik dukuya Saul o laisiaayiak lenyena; neya. Nedumunye ninche nepuo ina kewarie. 
1Samuel29:1 Neiturrurro apa Ilfilisti injoreitin enye pooki te Afek; ore Israeli neitayutuo apa ninche ilng'oborri te mbata e nkong'u natii atua Yesreel. 
1Samuel29:2 Ore ilkituaak loo Lfilisti nepuo te maa iip o too nkalifuni, ore Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena nepuo ninche te siadi te nebo Akish," 
1Samuel29:3 nejo ilkituaak le njore loo Lfilisti, “Kainyoo easita kulo Hebrania tene?” Nejoki Akish lelo kituaak le njore loo Lfilisti, “Aime Daudi ele, osinka le Saul, olaiguanani le Israel, otaa ninye te nebo nanu too nkolong'i o too larin, naa ore anaa neing'uaa ninye alotu enatii nanu eitu atum entorroni ti atua ninye o metabaiki ena olong.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Kake etagorokinote ilkituaak le njore oo lfilisti ninye; nejoki ninye ilkituaak le njore oo lfilisti, “Tushuko ele tung'ani, pee etum atorrinyoyu ashomo ewueji apa nitiaaka ninye; medoyio ninye alo te nebo iyiook olarrabal, meaku ake to larrabal olmang'atinta te iyiook. Amu kaji eiko ele tung'ani te neitayu osotua o lkitok lenye. Aime too lukuny e kulo tung'ana tene?" 
1Samuel29:5 Aime ele Daudi, oshi ilo oranyakino maate too sinkolioitin ejo: ‘Etaara Saul inkalifuni enyena, near Daudi nkalifuni tomon enyena!’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Neipotu Akish Daudi nejoki ninye, “Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, isiligayu oshi iyie, ore te nanu kadol aa sidai te nilo apuku nijing te nebo nanu to larrabal, amu eitu nanu atum entoki torrono ti atua iyie ebaiki enkolong apa elotunoto ino niewuo enatii o metabaiki ena olong. Ore ake eyia mikinyorraa ilkituaak." 
1Samuel29:7 Neaku tushukoyu shomo taata, naa shomo te seriani, pee mintagor ake ilkituaak loo Lfilisti.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Nejoki Daudi Akish, “Kake kaa nanu ataasa? Kainyoo iyie inoto to sinka lino ebaiki enkolong apa natijing'a enkisiaayiare ino o taata, nchere malo nanu aarare ilmang'ati lo kitok lai olaiguanani?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Newaliki Akish Daudi ajoki, “Ayiolo ajo miata eleyiata too nkonyek aainei anaa olmalaika le Nkai; ore ake eyia, etejo ilkituaak le njore loo lfilisti, ‘Meilep ninye alo te nebo iyiook olarrabal.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Ore naa tayooki tudumunye tadekenya te nebo isinkan lelo lo lkitok lino apa ooetuo te nebo iyie, nipuopuo anaa ake pee ewang'aki intae.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Neaku eshomo Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena aayooki tadekenya, aashuko aapuo enkop oo lfilisti. Kake eshomo Ilfilisti Yesreel." 
1Samuel30:1 Ore apa ina kata pee elotu Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena Siklag te nkolong e uni, netaara Ilmaleki Negeb o Siklag. Eisulie ninche Siklag nepejoo te nkima." 
1Samuel30:2 Neya nkituaak o pooki ootii atua, ilooti o lkituaak; eitu ear hoo ng'ae metua, kake etanapa ninche aaya, nepuo enkoitoi enye." 
1Samuel30:3 Ore ake pee elotu Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena ina anasa, neinepu etapejoki te nkima, ore nkituaak enye o layiok lenye o ntoyie enye netaraayioki aaya." 
1Samuel30:4 Ore Daudi o ltung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye neyietu aaishir o metaba anaa neaku meeta engolon naishirie. 
1Samuel30:5 Ore nkituaak pokira are e Daudi newaki sii ninche aaraya, Ahinoam e Yesreel o Abigail ina oliai apa e Nabal le Karmel." 
1Samuel30:6 Nenyamalu Daudi oleng; amu ejo iltung'ana pee enang ninye too soito, enkaraki etamioto iltung'ana pooki too ltauja, oltung'ani ake too layiok lenyena o ntoyie enyena. Kake eitagolo Daudi kewan ti atua Olaitoriani Enkai enye." 
1Samuel30:7 Nejoki Daudi Abiatar olapolosani, olayioni le Ahimelek, “Iyakaki nanu enkila dorrop.” Neaku eyaka Abiatar ina kila dorrop Daudi." 
1Samuel30:8 Neikilikuanishore Daudi Olaitoriani, “Amaa, kasujaa nanu ele wuampa Kamir nanu ninche?” Newaliki ninye ninye, “Tusujai, amu esipa imir, nesipa imitu akordu.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Neaku eshomo Daudi o lelo tung'ana iip ile apa ootii te nebo ninye nepuonu ninche oreyiet te Besor, ina netonie lelo ooing'uari te siadi." 
1Samuel30:10 Kake eshomo Daudi agiroo ine te sujaroto, ninye o ltung'ana iip ong'uan; netoni iltung'ana iip are te siadi, lelo apa oonaurate oleng leitu eidim aatalang oreyiet le Besor." 
1Samuel30:11 Netum ninche Olmisiri te nkop naisiaja, neyau ninye enetii Daudi; neisho ninche emukate nenya ninye, neisho enkare naok," 
1Samuel30:12 neisho ninche ninye embelati e mukate oo lng'abolo o nkimarrat are oo sabibu. Ore ake pee enya ninye, nepiu oltau lenye; amu eitu apa ninye enya endaa arashu eok enkare too nkolong'i uni o nkewaritin uni." 
1Samuel30:13 Nejoki Daudi ninye, “Aira iyie oleng'ae? Naa kaji iyie ing'uaa?” Nejo ninye, “Ara nanu olbarnoti le Misiri, osinka lo Lamaleki; naatung'uayie nanu olkitok enkaraki natamueyia too nkolong'i uni naatulusoitie." 
1Samuel30:14 Kitaara apa iyiook Negeb oo Lkerite o ina nara ene Yuda o Negeb e Kaleb; nikipejoo Siklag te nkima.” 
1Samuel30:15 Nejoki Daudi ninye, “Eikirik enetii ilo wuampa?” Nejo ninye, “Inosakaki nanu olmumai te Nkai, nchere mikiar matua, arashu kiya nanu apik atua nkaik o lkitok lai, naa kaarik enetii ele wuampa.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Ore ake pee eaku etoriko ninye aitadoyio, ng'ura, eidapashate ninche te nkop pooki, edaa neokisho neranyisho, te nkaraki nena tokitin kumok naataarutua te nkop oo Lfilisti o te nkop e Yuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Near Daudi ninche aiteru teipa o metabaiki enteipa e nkae olong. Neitu eisik hoo obo lenye, meteleku ilbarnot iip ong'uan apa ookedito ntamesin neisik." 
1Samuel30:18 Nerrinyu Daudi nena pooki apa naataaraitie Ilmaleki; nekordu Daudi nkituaak enyena pokira are. 
1Samuel30:19 Neitu eimin toki aa kiti o aa sapuk, ilayiok arashu ntoyie, imasaa arashu ae toki apa nawaki; eyaua Daudi ashuku pooki." 
1Samuel30:20 Eibung'a sii apa Daudi nkerrai pooki o nchoo; nereu iltung'ana nena shoo te dukuya ninye, nejo, “Iyarunot e Daudi kuna.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Neitoki Daudi alotu enetii lelo tung'ana apa iip are oonaurate oleng neitu esuj Daudi, neing'uari apa ninche to erata le Besor; neipang ninche aapuo aanang'are Daudi nenang'are lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye; ore pee elotu Daudi anyikaki iltung'ana neiroroki ninche." 
1Samuel30:22 Ore lelo pooki arruok o ltung'ana oora pesho apa ooshomo te nebo Daudi nejo, “Ore enkaraki neitu ninche epuo te nebo iyiook, mikincho iyiook ninche toki e kuna yarunot nikitushukutuo, meteleku ake nchere keidim pooki ng'ae atoriko enkitok enye o nkera, nelo.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Kake etejo Daudi, “Minkoko neijia, ilalashera laainei, te ina naishoo iyiook Olaitoriani; etagolie ninye iyiook neishoru apik atua enkaina ang ilo wuampa apa oewuo aar iyiook." 
1Samuel30:24 Kaing'ae oinining intae tena bae? Amu ore anaa enatiu erubata e ilo olo olarrabal, neijia sii etiu erubata e ilo oton too lolan keng'ar ninche aaitoris.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Ore ebaiki ina olong neito dukuya neitaa ina nkiguanat o nkitanapat te Israel o metabaiki ena olong. 
1Samuel30:26 Ore apa elotu Daudi Siklag, neiteng'el embata oo yarunot pee eisho ilchoreta lenyena, ilpayiani le Yuda; ejo, “Nena enkishoroto te intae naing'uaa nena naaruno too lmang'ati lo Laitoriani;”" 
1Samuel30:27 ene lelo ootii Betel, o lootii Ramot e Negeb, te Yatir," 
1Samuel30:28 ootii Aroer, o Sifmot, o Eshtemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 otii Rakal atua inkanas oo Ljerahami, o nkanas oo Lkeni," 
1Samuel30:30 ootii Horma, o Borashan, o Atak," 
1Samuel30:31 ootii Hebron, too wuejitin pooki neeshomo Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena." 
1Samuel31:1 Nearare apa Ilfilisti Israel; neipirri iltung'ana le Israel te dukuya Ilfilisti neidaikieki to Ldoinyo le Gilboa. 
1Samuel31:2 Neinepu Ilfilisti Saul o layiok lenyena; near Ilfilisti Yonatan o Abinadab o Malikishua, lelo ayiok le Saul." 
1Samuel31:3 Neitirrishaki olarrabal Saul oleng, netum ninye ilang'orok loo mbaa, netum olbae torrono te lelo ang'orok loo mbaa." 
1Samuel31:4 Nejoki Saul ilo anapani lenye loo ruparen, “Intayu olalem lino taremoki meipanga te nanu, maapuonu ake kulo lememurata aa ng'ung'ur nanu, naaitaa nanu enkiguran.” Kake meidim ilo anapani lenye loo ruparen; amu eturia oleng. Neaku eitayio Saul olalem lenye makewan, nebatatakino." 
1Samuel31:5 Ore ake pee edol ilo anapani lenye loo ruparen ajo etua Saul, nebatatakino sii ninye olalem lenye, neye te nebo ninye." 
1Samuel31:6 Neaku etua Saul o layiok lenyena pokira okuni, o lanapani lenye loo ruparen, o ltung'ana lenyena pooki, te nkolong nabo te nebo." 
1Samuel31:7 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana le Israel apa ootii likae kekun o erata o lekua ootii te idia alo Yordan nchere eisika iltung'ana le Israel, netua Saul o layiok lenyena, neing'uaa ninche inkang'itie enye neisik; nepuonu Ilfilisti nebik ti atua ninche." 
1Samuel31:8 Ore pee ekenyu, ore pee epuonu Ilfilisti aapur lelo ootaraki metuata, netum ninche Saul o layiok lenyena pokira okuni eirrag to Oldoinyo le Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Nedung'oo ninche endukuya enye, nelaku iruparen neirriwaa ilkiliku ti atua enkop pooki oo lfilisti, mewaita ilomon sidain aayaki inkaitin enye o ltung'ana." 
1Samuel31:10 Nepik iruparen o larrabal enkaji e nkitanyaanyukoto e nkai naji Ashtarot; nesheiki osesen lenye esuntai e Bet-shan. 
1Samuel31:11 Kake ore ake pee ening lelo oomanya Yabesh-Gilead ina naitaasa Ilfilisti Saul," 
1Samuel31:12 nedumunye iltung'ana pooki oopi, nepuo enkewarie pooki, neitayu osesen le Saul o seseni loo layiok lenyena aaitung'uaa esuntai e Bet-shan; nepuonu ninche Yabesh nepejoo ninche te ine." 
1Samuel31:13 Neya iloik lenye nenukaa ti abori olchani oji olkuaju te Yabesh, nepukoo ninche nkolong'i naapishana." 
2Samuel1:1 Ore eidipa Saul atua eidipa Daudi atushukunye te mutata oo Lmaleki, neton Daudi nkolong'i are te Siklag;" 
2Samuel1:2 ore te nkolong e uni, ng'ura, nelotu oltung'ani oing'uaa ilng'oborri le Saul, epolosa nkilani enyena netii enterit endukuya enye. Ore ake pee elotu enetii Daudi, neirrugo abaiki enkop nesai ninye." 
2Samuel1:3 Nejoki Daudi ninye, “Kaji iyie ing'uaa?” Nejoki, “Kaisikua nanu aing'uaa ilng'oborri le Israel.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Nejoki Daudi ninye, “Kaji eikunari mbaa? Tolikioki nanu.” Newalu ninye, nejo “Eisika iltung'ana aaing'uaa olarrabal, ore sii ilkumok loo ltung'ana neirragaa etuata ore Saul o olayioni lenye Yonatan etuata sii ninche.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Nejoki Daudi ilo barnoti otiaka ninye, “Kainyoo nikintayiolo iyie nchere etua Saul o Yonatan olayioni lenye?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Nejoki ilo barnoti apa otiaka ninye, “Aishiaakinore ake duoo atii enchumata oldoinyo le Gilboa; netii Saul airishakino empere enye, naa ng'ura, etinyikakitia ngarrin o lakedok loo mbartan emir ninye." 
2Samuel1:7 Ore ake pee eingor siadi enye, naadol nanu, naaipot. Nairukisho nanu ajo, ‘Nele nanu.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Naajoki ninye, ‘Ira iyie alo?’ Nawaliki, ‘Ara nanu Olmaleki.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Naajoki ninye nanu, ‘Ntasho te mbata nanu tasesekuanaki; amu aanoto nanu osina, neton ake eishu enkishui ai ti atua nanu.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Neaku aitasho nanu te mbata ninye, nasesekuan ninye, amu aitisipa ajo meidim anyaaki atopuaa eidipa atabatatayu; naya ilo marisian apa le nkitoo otii endukuya enye o lkataar apa otii enkaina enye, nayaua ninche ene netii olkitok lai.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Neibung Daudi nkilani enyena, nepolos, neiko sii neijia lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye;" 
2Samuel1:12 neishir ninche neitayu ilkiyio nepukoo o metaa teipa te nkaraki Saul o Yonatan olayioni lenye o te nkaraki iltung'ana lo Laitoriani o te nkaraki enkaji e Israel, enkaraki etabatatate ninche to lalem." 
2Samuel1:13 Nejoki Daudi ilo barnoti apa otiaaka ninye, “Kaji iyie ing'uaa?” Newaliki, “Ara nanu olayioni leilo omoni lo Lmaleki.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Nejoki Daudi ninye, “Kainyoo iyie pee eitu iureyu idumu enkaina ino ainyal ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aput?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Neipotu Daudi obo loo lbarnot nejoki, “Shomo, taara ninye metua.” Neosh oltung'ani Olmaleki metua." 
2Samuel1:16 Nejoki Daudi ninye, “Metaa osarge lino shumata endukuya ino; amu enkutuk ino kewan nikinchakenoko iyie, ejo, ‘Atasesekuana nanu ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aput.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Nerany Daudi ele sinkolio le nkishirata, aishiraki Saul o Yonatan olayioni lenye." 
2Samuel1:18 Nejo ninye keiteng'eni iltung'ana le Yuda; ng'ura kesira te mbuku e Yashar. Nejo: 
2Samuel1:19 “Etua enkitoo ino, iyie Israel, etasesekuanaki te shumata iwuejitin inono neeika! Kaji eikunakinote embatatata lelo magil!" 
2Samuel1:20 Milikioo ena te Gas, emintubulaa ena too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa e Askelon; meng'idayu ake intoyie oo Lfilisti, mewuasayu ake ntoyie e lelo lememurata." 
2Samuel1:21 Intae ildoinyo le Gilboa, nchoo metaa metii empaso arashu enchan shumata intae arashu enkaitubului nabulu te nkop! Amu te ine eidurukieki elong'o e ilo magilani, elong'o e Saul, eitu eelieki eilata." 
2Samuel1:22 To sarge le lelo oosesekuani, te ilata e lelo magil, eitu eshuko enkawuo e Yonatan, neitu eshukunye olalem le Saul erok." 
2Samuel1:23 Saul o Yonatan oonyorri naa shaati! Ore te nkishui o te keeya merisha ninche; neneneng ninche aalang ilkurragoso, negol ninche aalang ilng'atunyo." 
2Samuel1:24 Intae ntoyie oo Siraeli enchiraki Saul, oishopo intae too kilani naanyokioo, neikodo nkilani inyi te sahabu." 
2Samuel1:25 Kaji eikunakinote embatatata lelo magil, te mpolos o larrabal! Eirrag Yonatan etasesekuanaki te nchumata oo wuejitin inono neeika" 
2Samuel1:26 Aisinanuo te nkaraki iye olalashe lai Yonatan; eikishipakino apa iyie nanu oleng; ore apa enyorrata ino te nanu naa enking'asia, kegiroo enyorrata oo nkituaak." 
2Samuel1:27 Kaji eikunakinote embatatata lelo magil, ore imasaa o larrabal nerruoyo!”" 
2Samuel2:1 Ore te siadi ena neikilikuanishore Daudi Olaitoriani, “Kailep nanu alo atua ae nabo oo nkang'itie e Yuda?” Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Ilepa shomo.” Nejo Daudi, “Kaa ailep alo?” Nejo ninye, “Shomo Hebron.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Neaku eilepa Daudi nelo ine, te nebo sii nkituaak enyena pokira are, Ahinoam e Yesreel o Abigail ina oliai apa e Nabal le Karmel." 
2Samuel2:3 Neyau Daudi ailepunye lelo tung'ana lenyena apa ootii te nebo ninye, oltung'ani ake o enkaji enye; nebik ninche too nkang'itie e Hebron." 
2Samuel2:4 Nepuonu iltungana le Yuda, nebukoki ninche Daudi eilata aaput teine aaitaa olaiguanani le nkaji e Yuda. Ore ake pee eliki ninche Daudi aajoki, “Iltung'ana le Yabesh Gilead apa ootunukaitie Saul,”" 
2Samuel2:5 neirriwaki Daudi ilkiliku lelo tung'ana le Yabesh gilead, nejoki ninche, “Entaa intae iloomayiana to Laitoriani, enkaraki nintodolutua intae ena anyit te Saul, olkitok linyi, ninukaa ninye!" 
2Samuel2:6 Meitodua intae Olaitoriani enyorrata nauno o enkisiligata! Naa kaitaas nanu intae esidai enkaraki nitaasa ena bae. 
2Samuel2:7 Ore naa enchoo metagolo nkaik inyi, nipijuju; amu etua Saul olkitok linyi, naatubukokitio nanu enkaji e Yuda eilata aaput aaitaa olaiguanani te shumata ninche.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Ore apa Abna olayioni le Ner, olkitok le njore e Saul, neya Ishboshet olayioni le Saul, neyau ninye Mahanaim," 
2Samuel2:9 neitaa Abna ninye olaiguanani te shumata Gilead o Ashuri o Yesreel o Efraim o Benchamen o Israel pooki. 
2Samuel2:10 Ore apa Ishboshet, ilo ayioni le Saul, naa ilarin artam ina kata pee eiteru aitore Israel, neitore ninye ilarin oare. Kake etusujaitie enkaji e Yuda Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Ore enkata apa nara Daudi olaiguanani te Hebron te shumata enkaji e Yuda naa ilarin oopishana o lapaitin ile. 
2Samuel2:12 Ore Abna olayioni le Ner o sinkan le Ishboshet olayioni le Saul, neipang aapuo te Mahanaim nepuo Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:13 Ore Yoab olayioni le Seruiya, o sinkan le Daudi, neipang aapuo nenang'are ninche te nchorro e Gibeon; netoni ninche, obo te nchoto nabo e nchorro o likae te nkae shoto e nchorro." 
2Samuel2:14 Nejoki Abna Yoab, “Nchoo ilbarnot edumunye aarany te dukuya iyiook.” Nejo Yoab, “Nchoo edumunye ninche.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Kaae nedumunye ninche nepuo te siana enye, tomon oare ile Benchamen o Ishboshet ilo ayioni le Saul, o tomon oare loo sinkin le Daudi." 
2Samuel2:16 Neibung ake oltung'ani ilo oarare endukuya nerrumoki olalem lenye eluboto e ilo oarare; neaku etabatatate te nebo. Neaku etejoki apa ine wueji Helkat-hasurim, naa Gibeon etii." 
2Samuel2:17 Nerrishu olarrabal ina olong, nemiri Abna o ltung'ana loo Siraeli te dukuya isinkan le Daudi." 
2Samuel2:18 Netii apa ine ilayiok pokira okuni le Seruiya, Yoab, Abishai o Asahel. Naa keneneng apa Asahel too nkejek anaa enkolii e ong'ata;" 
2Samuel2:19 nemir Asahel Abna, ore eloito nemeibelekenya aing'or enkaina e tatene arashu enkaina e kedienye esujaa Abna." 
2Samuel2:20 Nenang Abna silig nejo, “Kaiyie Asahel?” Newalu ninye, nejo “Ee nanu.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Nejoki Abna ninye, “Shomo enkaina ino e tatene arashu ene kedienye, imbung'a obo loo lbarnot, pee iya nena naataarua ninye.” Kake meyieu Asahel neibelekenya te sujata enye." 
2Samuel2:22 Neitoki Abna aigil ajoki Asahel, “Shomo mikintoki asuj kainyoo pee aar nanu iyie tua? Kaji naa aiko te nashumaki enkomom ai olalashe lino Yoab?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Kake etanya ninye elo aapaash neaku etaremo Abna ninye enkoshoke to lng'urrat le mpere enye, neaku eipang'ua empere te nkoriong enye, nebatata ninye te ine, neye te ine apa netii. Ore lelo apa pooki ooetuo ine wueji netabatatare Asahel neye, neitashe aaitirring'a." 
2Samuel2:24 Kake etimira Yoab o Abishai Abna; ore edoyio enkolong nepuonu ninche oldoinyo le Ama, laa ninye otii dukuya Gia te nkoitoi nalo olpurkel le Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:25 Neiturrurro tenebo iltung'ana le Benchamen te siadi Abna, neaku olwuampa obo, neitashe te ntopij o ldoinyo." 
2Samuel2:26 Neipot Abna Yoab, nejoki, “Amaa, keaku kedaa olalem ntarasi? Aimiyiolo ajo keduaru enkiting'oto? Kebaa kenya enkata pee imbok iltung'ana linono metapala emirata oo lalashera lenye?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Nejo Yoab, “Anaa enaishu Enkai, te neme iroro, esipa anaata etapala iltung'ana esujata oo lalashera lenye tadekenya.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Neaku etoosho Yoab emowuo; neitashe iltung'ana pooki, neitu eitoki aasujaa Israel, arashu eitoki aara." 
2Samuel2:29 Ore Abna o ltung'ana lenyena nepuo ina kewarie pooki nepuo aaim atua Araba; nelang ninche olkeju le Yordan, nepuo entadekenya pooki o meetu Mahanaim." 
2Samuel2:30 Neshukunye Yoab te mirata e Abna; ore ake pee eidip aiturrurro iltung'ana pooki te nebo, nemetii isinkan le Daudi iltung'ana tomon ooudo metii Asahel." 
2Samuel2:31 Kake etaara isinkan le Daudi iltung'ana iip uni o ntomoni ile metuata too ltung'ana le Abna lo losho le Benchamen. 
2Samuel2:32 Neya Yoab o ltung'ana lenyena osesen le Asahel, nenukaa te nkurare e papaai lenye, apa natii Betlehem. Nelo Yoab o ltung'ana lenyena enkewarie pooki, neilepaki ninche enkolong te Hebron." 
2Samuel3:1 Etii apa te nkata naado olarrabal te rishata enkaji e Saul o enkaji e Daudi; neponari Daudi agolu edoyio enkaji e Saul ashalu. 
2Samuel3:2 Neikini Daudi ilayiok te Hebron: ore olkikau lenye naa Amnon, le Ahinoam e Yesreel;" 
2Samuel3:3 ore oliare, Kileab, le Abigail ina oliai apa e Nabal le Karmel; ore oliokuni, Absalom olayioni le Maaka ina tito e Talmai olaiguanani le Geshur;" 
2Samuel3:4 ore oliong'uan, Adonija olayioni le Hagis; ore oleimiet, Sefatia olayioni le Abital;" 
2Samuel3:5 ore olayioni le ile, Isrem, le Egla, enkitok e Daudi. Etoikioki kulo Daudi te Hebron." 
2Samuel3:6 Ore etii olarrabal erishata e nkaji e Saul o enkaji e Daudi, neitagolito Abna kewan ti atua enkaji e Saul." 
2Samuel3:7 Neeta apa Saul enkapiani naji enkarna Rispa, entito e Aia; nejoki Ishboshet Abna, “Kainyoo pee ishomo iyie ajing'aki enkapiani e papaai lai?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Negoro oleng Abna te lelo rorei le Ishboshet, nejo, “Kara nanu endukuya o ldia le Yuda? Ore ena olong eton ake aitodolu enkanyit te nkaji e Saul papaai lino, too lalashera lenyena, o too lchoreta lenyena, neton eitu aaishooyo iyie apik nkaik e Daudi; ore taata niking'uanare nanu te nkaraki enkitok." 
2Samuel3:9 Metaasa sii Enkai ena te Abna, neitulusoo sii, te neitu nanu aitabaya te Daudi ina apa nainosakinye Olaitoriani ninye olmumai," 
2Samuel3:10 aitarasaa enkitoria aitung'uaa enkaji e Saul, neitasheyie olorika le nkitoo le Daudi te shumata Israel o te shumata Yuda, ebaiki Dan o metabaiki Beer-sheba.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Neitu eitoki Ishboshet aidimu atawaliki Abna likae omoni, amu eturia ninye." 
2Samuel3:12 Neirriwaa Abna ilkiliku enetii Daudi te Hebron, ejo, “Keneng'ae ena kop? Intobira olning'o lino o nanu, naa ng'ura keaku enkaina ai te nebo iyie pee ayau Israel pooki enitii iyie.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Nejo ninye, “Sidai; Kaitobir nanu olning'o o iyie; kake nabo toki nanu aayieunye iyie; nchere midol iyie enkomom ai, arashu ake te niyau Mikal, entito e Saul, te nikilotu adol enkomom ai.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Neirriwaki Daudi ilkiliku Ishboshet olayioni le Saul, ejoki, “Nchooki nanu enkitok ai Mikal, naa ninye apa atisira te nkinyang'a oo suaten iip oo Lfilisti.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Neirriwaa Ishboshet ilkiliku, neya ninye aitung'uaa olmoruo lenye Paltiel olayioni le Laish." 
2Samuel3:16 Kake eshomo olmoruo lenye te nebo ninye, eishir asujaa ninye te nkoitoi pooki o metabai Bahurim. Nejoki Abna ninye, “Shomo, torrinyoyu;” nerrinyo ninye." 
2Samuel3:17 Neiguanakini Abna te nebo ilpayiani le Israel, ejo, “Ore te nkata naje natulusoyie ning'oruru intae Daudi aaitaa olaiguanani te shumata intae." 
2Samuel3:18 Ore naa taata entabai intae; amu eitanapa Olaitoriani Daudi, ejo, ‘Te nkaina o sinka lai Daudi aitajeu nanu iltung'ana laainei Israel aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lfilisti; naitung'uaa enkaina oo lmang'ati lenye pooki.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Neirorie sii Abna Benchamen; neitoki Abna alo aliki Daudi te Hebron nena pooki naatodua Israel; pooki o enkaji e Benchamen pooki aajo sidain te neas. 
2Samuel3:20 Ore pee elotu Abna te nebo iltung'ana tikitam enetii Daudi te Hebron, neitobiraki Daudi osirua Abna o lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye." 
2Samuel3:21 Nejoki Abna Daudi, “Kadumunye nanu alo, naa kaiturrurroki Israel pooki olkitok lai olaiguanani, pee etum ninche aaitobira olning'o o iyie, pee itum iyie aitoreisho te shumata nena pooki naayieu oltau lino.” Neaku eishoo Daudi Abna meshomo; nelo ninye te serian." 
2Samuel3:22 Ore te ina kata nebau lelo sinkan le Daudi te nebo Yoab eing'uaa enjore, neyau iyarunot kumok te nebo ninche. Kake metii apa Abna te nebo Daudi te Hebron, amu eishoo ninye meshomo, nelo ninye te seriani." 
2Samuel3:23 Ore ake pee ebau Yoab o ina jore pooki apa natii te nebo ninye, nejokini Yoab, “Eewuo Abna olayioni le Ner enetii olaiguanani, neishoo ninye meshomo, neshomo ninye te seriani.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Nelo Yoab enetii olaiguanani nejo, “Kaa iyie itaasa? Ng'ura eewuo Abna enitii, kainyoo pee inchoo ninye meshomo, neaku eshomo?" 
2Samuel3:25 Iyiolo iyie ajo kiewuo Abna ilo ayioni le Ner alej, neyiolou elototo ino e boo o elotunoto ino e atua, neyiolou nena pooki niasita.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Ore eipang'u Yoab aing'uaa ine aing'uaa ine netii Daudi, neirriwaa ninye ilkiliku metusujai Abna, nerik ninye aashuku teilo kesumet le Sira; kake eitu eyiolou Daudi ina." 
2Samuel3:27 Ore ake pee errinyunye Abna Hebron, neya Yoab ninye enkilepata te mpolos e kishomi pee eiro te nebo ninye too nkurrat, ore te ine nerem ninye enkoshoke, neye ninye, te nkaraki ilo sarge le Asahel olalashe lenye." 
2Samuel3:28 Ore te siadi, ina kata pee ening Daudi ina, nejo ninye, “Ore nanu o enkitoria ai mikiata entioto ntarasi te dukuya o Laitoriani te nkaraki osarge le Abna ilo ayioni le Ner." 
2Samuel3:29 Metaa endukuya e Yoab edoiki o enchumata enkaji pooki e papaai lenye; naa nchoo metaa melai aekata te nkaji e Yoab oltung'ani oata nkimek arashu enkeeya oo lbolot arashu oloibung'i entirma arashu olosesekuani to lalem, arashu ololau endaa.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Kaae near metua Yoab o Abishai olalashe lenye Abna, enkaraki etara apa ninye metua olalashe lenye Asahel ti atua olarrabal te Gibeon." 
2Samuel3:31 Neitoki Daudi ajoki Yoab o lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye, “Entopolos inkilani inyi, nirrotianana ilkuniyiani, ninchirishiri te dukuya Abna.” Nesujaa olaiguanani Daudi ilo sanduku otii osesen." 
2Samuel3:32 Nenukaa ninche Abna te Hebron, neyietu olaiguanani aishir te nkurare e Abna; neishir iltung'ana pooki." 
2Samuel3:33 Nerany olaiguanani osinkolio lo lkiyioi, ejo “Keye Abna anaa enaiko olmodai?" 
2Samuel3:34 Meena apa nkaik inono, nemeena apa nkejek inono; Ore anaa enabatata oltung'ani te dukuya lelo torrok itabatate iyie.” Neitoki iltung'ana pooki aaishiraki ninye." 
2Samuel3:35 Nepuonu iltung'ana pooki aailejilej Daudi meinosa endaa eton aa dama; kake einosa Daudi olmumai, ejo, “Meikuna Enkai neijia te nanu, neitulusoo sii, te naishamisham endaa arashu ae toki eton eitu edoyio enkolong?”" 
2Samuel3:36 Nedol iltung'ana pooki ina, neitiship ina ninche, amu ore apa pooki toki naas olaiguanani neitiship iltung'ana." 
2Samuel3:37 Neaku etayioloito iltung'ana pooki o Israel pooki ina olong nchere mme eyieunoto apa o laiguanani pee ear Abna olayioni le Ner. 
2Samuel3:38 Nejoki olaiguanani isinkan lenyena, “Aimiyiololo intae aajo olayioni lo laiguanani naa oltung'ani oTurori ena olong te Israel?" 
2Samuel3:39 Nashal nanu ena olong, hoo naatubukokoki eilata aaput aaitaa olaiguanani; ore kulo tung'ana, ayiok le Seruiya naa kegolong'u oleng te nanu. Nchoo elaaki Olaitoriani olarruoni te risioroto enkarruoisho enye!”" 
2Samuel4:1 Ore ake pee ening Ishboshet, olayioni le Saul, nchere etua Abna te Hebron, neiropijaa empijan enye, ore Israel pooki neiputukuny." 
2Samuel4:2 Neeta apa olayioni le Saul iltung'ana oare laa ilkituaak loo Ltimito le njore; ore enkarna e obo naa Baana, ore enkarna o likae naa Rekab, ilayiok le Rimon oltung'ani le Benchamen oing'uaa Be-erot (amu keyioloi sii apa ninye Be-erot aajo ematua e Benchamen;" 
2Samuel4:3 eisika apa Ilbeeroti aapuo Gitam netoni ninche te ine o metabaiki ena olong.) 
2Samuel4:4 Neeta apa Yonatan olayioni le Saul olayioni maima tarrushi nkejek enyena. Naa oloo larin imiet apa ninye ina kata pee epuonu ilomon ooipirta Saul o Yonatan eing'uaa Yesreel; nedumu ninye enkaibung'ani enye, neisik, naa ore eisik te nkisarrisar enye, nebatata, neakunye ine olmaima. Ore apa enkarna enye naaMefiboshet." 
2Samuel4:5 Ore apa ilayiok le Rimon ilo tung'ani le Be-erot naa Rekab o Baana, nepuo ninche, ore tenkata e nkipirata e nkolong nepuonu ninche enkaji e Ishboshet, etii ninye enkiyeng'iyeng enye a enaipiriee nkolong." 
2Samuel4:6 Naa ng'ura, ore enkaing'urani e kutuk aji negelita enkano, kake eimugo ninye neirura; neaku etasaakinote Rekab o Baana olalashe lenye atua aji." 
2Samuel4:7 Ore pee ejing'u ninche atua aji eirrag ninye te ndapash enye ti atua ilo gilata le ndapash, nerem ninye, near metua nedung'u endukuya enye. Neya ninche endukuya enye nepuo aaim enkoitoi e Araba enkewarie pooki," 
2Samuel4:8 neyau ninche endukuya e Ishboshet, enetii Daudi te Hebron. Nejoki ninche olaiguanani, “Nena endukuya e Ishboshet, olayioni le Saul, olmang'atinta lino oing'orua apa enkishui ino; eitalaku Olaitoriani elap o lkitok lai olaiguanani ena olong te Saul te ishoi enye.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Kake etawalikia Daudi Rekab o Baana olalashe lenye, lelo ayiok le Rimon ilo le Be-erot ajoki, “Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, otokordua enkishui ai aitayu ti atua embatisho pooki," 
2Samuel4:10 ore apa pee aajoki oltung'ani obo nanu, ‘Ng'ura, etua Saul.’ Nejo ninye keyaua ilomon sidain, naibung ninye naar ninye metua te Siklag, aa ilo apa olerrinyore laishoo nanu ninye too lomon lenyena." 
2Samuel4:11 Kebaa naa elusoo, te netaara iltung'ana torrok oltung'ani supat ti atua enkaji enye te nchumata e ndapash enye, aimaikilikuanu nanu osarge lenye te nkaina inyi, namut intae aiwuang'ie te nkop?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Neitanap Daudi ilbarnot lenyena, metaara ninche metuata, nedung'oo nkaik enye o nkejek, neilili ninche te mbata o lchorro te Hebron. Kake ewaita ninche endukuya e Ishboshet, nenukaa te nkurare e Abna te Hebron." 
2Samuel5:1 Nepuonu iloshon pooki loo Siraeli enetii Daudi te Hebron, nejo, “Ng'ura, kira iyiook iloik linono o nkiri o sesen lino." 
2Samuel5:2 Ore too nkolong'i naatulusoitie, apa aa Saul olaiguanani te shumata iyiook, iyie apa otorikoyie aipang'ie niriku aitijing'u Israel; nikijoki Olaitoriani iyie, ‘Iaku iyie olchekut loo ltung'ana laainei, Israel, niaku kitok te shumata Israel.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Neaku eetuo ilpayiani pooki loo Siraeli enetii olaiguanani te Hebron; neitobir olaiguanani Daudi olning'o te nebo ninche te Hebron te dukuya o Laitoriani, nebukoki ninche Daudi eilata aaput aaitaa olaiguanani te shumata Israel." 
2Samuel5:4 Naa oloo larin tomoni uni apa Daudi pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ilarin artam." 
2Samuel5:5 Ore te Hebron neitore ninye Yuda ilarin oopishana o lapaitin ile; ore te Yerusalem neitore Israel pooki o Yuda ilarin tomoni uni o okuni. 
2Samuel5:6 Nelo olaiguanani o ltung'ana lenyena Yerusalem aarare Ilyebusi, lelo oomanya ina kop, apa ootiaakitia Daudi, “Milotu iyie ajing'u atua ene, kake eikimbooyo ninye ilmodook o lmaiman” - ejo, “Meidim ae kata Daudi aeu atua ine.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Ore eyia eibung'a Daudi eng'ape e Sion, aa taa, enkanasa e Daudi." 
2Samuel5:8 Nejo Daudi te ina olong, “Ore pooki ng'ae olo aar Ilyebusi, nchoo eilep to lbaata le nkare pee erasaki lelo modook o lmaiman, apa ooiba oltau le Daudi.” Neaku etejoki, “Ore olmodooni o lmaima melotu atua aji.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Nebik Daudi ti atua ilo sempewuet nejo ninye enkanasa e Daudi. Neshet Daudi ina anasa aitamanaa ebaiki Milo neito atua. 
2Samuel5:10 Neaku Daudi kitok oleng oleng, amu ore Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani, etii apa te nebo ninye." 
2Samuel5:11 Ore Hiram olaiguanani le Turo neirriwaa ilkiliku enetii Daudi, neirriwaa sii iltarakua o laguetak loo nkeek o laguetak loo soito laa ninche ooteshetakitia Daudi enkaji." 
2Samuel5:12 Neyiolou Daudi nchere eitasheyie Olaitoriani ninye aitaa olaiguanani le Israel, o nchere eilepunye ninye enkitoo enye te nkaraki iltung'ana lenyena Israel." 
2Samuel5:13 Neya Daudi nkapiak kumok o nkituaak te Yerusalem, eidipa aeu eing'uaa Hebron; neikini Daudi ilayiok kumok o ntoyie." 
2Samuel5:14 Naa kuna nkarn e lelo ootoikioki ninye te Yerusalem: o Shamua, o Shobab, o Natan, o Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 o Ibar, o Elishua, o Nefeg, o Yafia," 
2Samuel5:16 o Elishama, o Eliada, o Elifelet." 
2Samuel5:17 Ore ake pee ening Ilfilisti nchere etubukokoki Daudi eilata aaitaa olaiguanani te Israel, neilepu Ilfilisti pooki eing'oru Daudi; kake etoning'o Daudi ina nelo aisudori to sempewuet." 
2Samuel5:18 Neaku eetuo apa Ilfilisti neidapashakino oerata le Rafadim. 
2Samuel5:19 Neikilikuanishore Daudi Olaitoriani, ejo, “Amaa, kalo nanu aarare Ilfilisti? Inchoru iyie ninche apik atua enkaina ai?” Nejoki Olaitoriani Daudi, “Ilepa shomo; amu esipa kaishoru nanu Ilfilisti apik atua enkaina ino.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Nelotu Daudi Baalperasim, nemir Daudi ninche te ine; nejo ninye, “Etigila Olaitoriani ilmang'ati laainei te dukuya nanu, anaa olairrag le enkare teneosh enkuaas.” Neaku ore enkarna e ine wuejinaa keji Baalperasim." 
2Samuel5:21 Neing'uaa Ilfilisti nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye te ine, nenap Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena ninche aaya." 
2Samuel5:22 Neitoki ake Ilfilisti aaigil aailepu aapuonu, neidapashakino oerata le Refaim." 
2Samuel5:23 Ore ake pee eikilikuanishore Daudi Olaitoriani, nejo ninye, “Milep alo; shomo tamanai iimu te siadi, nilotu enetii ninche te nkishiaakinoto oo lkeek adoru." 
2Samuel5:24 Ore ake pee ining oltoilo le lototo te nchumata oo lkeek, ina kata tonyuaa amu etaa eipang Olaitoriani alo te dukuya ino aar enjore oo Lfilisti.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Neas Daudi anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninye, near Ilfilisti ebaiki Geba o metabaiki Gesa." 
2Samuel6:1 Neitoki Daudi aiturrur lelo tung'ana pooki gelunot te Israel, nkalifuni tomoni uni." 
2Samuel6:2 Nedumunye Daudi nelo te nebo iltung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye ebaiki Baale-Yuda, pee eyau aailepunye aaitung'uaa ine osanduku le Nkai, laa ninye eipotieki enkarna o Laitoriani loo lororani oton ninye te nkitoo te nchumata oo lkerubi." 
2Samuel6:3 Nenap ninche ilo sanduku le Nkai te ngarri ng'ejuk, neyau ninye aaipang'unye te nkaji e Abinadab apa natii enchumata e ndoinyo; ore Usa o Ahio lelo ayiok le Abinadab nereu ina garri ng'ejuk," 
2Samuel6:4 te nebo ilo sanduku le Nkai; nelo Ahio dukuya ilo sanduku. 
2Samuel6:5 Ore Daudi o enkaji pooki e Israel neiguranita apa te dukuya Olaitoriani te nkidimata enye, too sinkolioitin, too lwululi loo usin, o nkai oo sinkolioitin, o ntampurini o kule kinantani, o saanini naaitooshi aaranyishore." 
2Samuel6:6 Ore ake pee epuonu ninche ilo kurroto oidong'ishoreki le Nakon neitorioki Usa enkaina enye ilo sanduku le Nkai, neibung amu etarrorrote lelo mong'i." 
2Samuel6:7 Neyupuyup engoro e Nkai te nkaraki Usa, near Enkai ninye te ine te nkaraki naitorioyie enkaina enye aibung ilo sanduku; neye ninye te ine te mbata ilo sanduku le Nkai." 
2Samuel6:8 Negoro apa Daudi enkaraki natara Olaitoriani Usa; ore ine wueji naa keji Peres-usa, o metabaiki ena olong." 
2Samuel6:9 Neureyu apa Daudi Olaitoriani ina olong; nejo ninye, “Kaji eiko te nelotu osanduku lo Laitoriani enatii nanu?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Neaku meyieu apa Daudi neya ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani atua enkanasa e Daudi; kake eiteng'ela Daudi aya enkaji e Obed-e-dom ilo Giti. 
2Samuel6:11 Neton ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani ti atua enkaji e Obed-e-dom ilo Giti ilapaitin okuni; nemayian Olaitoriani Obed-e-dom o enkaji enye pooki. 
2Samuel6:12 Nelikini apa olaiguanani Daudi aajoki, “Etamayiana Olaitoriani enkaji e Obed-e-dom o pooki nara enenye, te nkaraki ilo sanduku le Nkai.” Neaku eshomo Daudi neyau ailepunye ilo sanduku le Nkai aitung'uaa e nkaji e Obed-e-dom aya enkanasa e Daudi eng'ida;" 
2Samuel6:13 ore ake pee epuo lelo oonapita ilo sanduku le Nkai iroruat ile, nepolos ninye olkiteng o lashe opir." 
2Samuel6:14 Neiguran Daudi te dukuya Olaitoriani te nkidimata enye pooki; neterretene apa Daudi te nkarasha dorrop napuyiapui. 
2Samuel6:15 Neaku eyaua apa Daudi o enkaji e Israel pooki osanduku le Nkai aailepunye te mbuakunoto o to ltoilo le mowuo. 
2Samuel6:16 Ore elotu ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani atua ina anasa e Daudi, neing'orisho Mikal entito e Saul te lusie, nedol Olaiguanani Daudi eipid neiguran te dukuya Olaitoriani; nemenu ninye to ltau lenye." 
2Samuel6:17 Neyau ninche atua ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani, neirragie ninye te wueji enye, ti atua olng'obor otuuno Daudi te nkaraki ninye; neishoru Daudi ilasarri oopejori o lasarri le seriani te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
2Samuel6:18 Ore ake pee eidip Daudi aishooi ilasarri oopejori o lasarri le seriani, nemayian ninye iltung'ana te nkarna o Laitoriani loo lororani," 
2Samuel6:19 neishooyo ti atua iltung'ana pooki ina siamo pooki e Israel, ilewa o nkituaak, o ltung'ani ake emukate napurupurana, o ldung'oti le nkiring'o o emukate oo lng'anayio ooitoyioki. Nepuo iltung'ana pooki le Israel, oltung'ani ake enkang enye." 
2Samuel6:20 Neshuko Daudi alo amayian enkaji enye. Kake eipang'ua Mikal entito e Saul alotu anang'are Daudi, nejo, “Kebaa duoo taata enkanyit nayanyita olaiguanani le Israel kewan, aiturraa duoo taata nkilani te dukuya nkonyek oo nkaisiaayiak oo sinkan lenyena, anaa obo loo ltung'ana oomoda oiturraa nkilani medol enkurruna!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Nejoki Daudi Mikal, “Te dukuya Olaitoriani laa ninye apa laategelua te shumata papaai lino, o te shumata enkaji enye pooki naagelu nanu aitaa kitok te shumata Israel, iltung'ana lo Laitoriani - naa kashipa nanu te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
2Samuel6:22 Naa kasul nanu kewan oleng aitalang ena, naaitadouni too nkonyek inono; kake ore te nena sinkan naa ninche iimaka, ore ninche naa kaayanyit nanu oleng.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Ore Mikal ina tito e Saul neitu ae kata etum enkerai o metua. 
2Samuel7:1 Ore apa ebikito olaiguanani te nkaji enye, neishoo ninye Olaitoriani enkiyeng'iyeng too lmang'ati lenyena pooki oomanita," 
2Samuel7:2 nejoki olaiguanani Natan ilo oiboni, “Ng'ura taata, abikito nanu te nkaji oo ltarakua, kake ore osanduku le Nkai netonita ti atua olng'obor.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nejoki Natan olaiguanani, “Shomo, taasa ina pooki natii atua oltau lino; amu etii Olaitoriani te nebo iyie.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Kake ore ina kewarie ake nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Natan ajoki," 
2Samuel7:5 “Shomo tiaaki osinka lai Daudi, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Amaa, eikishetaki iyie enkaji nabikie atua?" 
2Samuel7:6 Eitu ae kata nanu aton ti atua enkaji ebaiki enkolong apa nailepunye iltung'ana loo Siraeli aitung'uaa Misiri o metabaiki ena olong, kake to lng'obor oshi aloolo aitaa emanyisho ai." 
2Samuel7:7 Ore ti atua iwuejitin pooki nashomo nanu te nebo iltung'ana pooki le Israel, eitu nanu airo ororei te likae hoo obo loo larishak loo Israeli laa ninche aitanapa meirrita iltung'ana laainei Israeli, ajoki Kainyoo pee eitu kishetakiki nanu enkaji oo ltarakua?’" 
2Samuel7:8 Ore naa nji tiaaki osinka lai Daudi, Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, aawa apa nanu iyie aitung'uaa enkirritare, aitung'uaa esujata oo nkerra, pee itum ataa olkitok te shumata iltung'ana laainei Israel;" 
2Samuel7:9 natii nanu te nebo iyie te pooki wueji nishomo, naar ilmang'ati linono pooki aiwuang'ie te dukuya ino; naa kaaitobiraki nanu iyie enkarna kitok, anaa enkarna e lelo kituaak le nkop." 
2Samuel7:10 Naa kagelu nanu ewueji te nkaraki iltung'ana laainei Israel, naun nanu ninche, pee etum aatobik te wueji enye maate, nemeitokini ae kata aaitanyamal; nemeitoki iltung'ana lo larrabal aaisilisil ninche, anaa apa," 
2Samuel7:11 ebaiki ina kata apa nagelu ilarishak apik shumata iltung'ana laainei Israel; naa kaaisho nanu iyie enkiyeng'iyeng too lmang'ati linono pooki. Ore ake eibalunye Olaitoriani te iyie nchere, eikintaa iyie Olaitoriani enkaji." 
2Samuel7:12 Ore te neiputayu nkolong'i inono nirrag iyie te nebo loo papaai lino, nadamu nanu eishoi ino te siadi iyie, ilo olotu aing'uaa osesen lino, naitubulaa nanu enkitoo enye." 
2Samuel7:13 Keshet ninye enkaji te nkaraki enkarna ai, naa kaitasheyie nanu olorika le nkitoo enye ntarasi." 
2Samuel7:14 Naaku nanu papaai lenye, neaku ninye olayioni lai. Te neas ninye entorroni, naitame nanu ninye te ng'udi e tung'ana, o too oshot e tung'ana;" 
2Samuel7:15 kake maiwuang'ie nanu enyorrata ai nauno aitung'uaa ninye, anaa apa enaiwuang'ie te Saul, ilo apa laiwuang'ie nanu te dukuya iyie." 
2Samuel7:16 Ore enkaji ino o enkitoria naa keitisipi te dukuya nanu; ore olorika lino le nkitoo keitasheyieki ntarasi.” 
2Samuel7:17 Ore te risioroto e kulo rorei, o te risioroto ena duata pooki, neirorie Natan Daudi." 
2Samuel7:18 Nelo olaiguanani Daudi atua neton te dukuya Olaitoriani, nejo, “Kara nanu ng'ae, Ee Olaitoriani Enkai, naa kainyoo enkaji ai, metaa eikiyaua nanu eneba nji?" 
2Samuel7:19 Ore ake eyia naa entoki kiti apa ena too nkonyek inono, Olaitoriani Enkai; iroro sii iyie te nkaraki enkaji o sinka lino te nkata sapuk nalotu, nikintoduaa nanu iishoritin naapuonu, Olaitoriani Enkai!" 
2Samuel7:20 Naa kainyoo epon Daudi pee kijoki iyie? Amu iyiolo iyie osinka lino, Olaitoriani Enkai!" 
2Samuel7:21 Te nkaraki enkisiligata ino, naa te risioroto oltau lino, itaasa iyie ena enkitoo aidimie osinka lino metayiolo ina." 
2Samuel7:22 Metaa ira iyie kitok, Ee Olaitoriani Enkai; amu metii likae oikununo anaa iyie, nemetii ae Ai neme iyie ake, te risioroto e nena pooki nikitoning'o too nkiyiaa ang." 
2Samuel7:23 Kalo likae orere ti oriong e nkop oikununo anaa iltung'ana linono Israel, laa ninche eshomo Enkai akordu aitaa iltung'ana lenyena, aitobiraki kewan enkarna, neas te nkaraki ninche intokitin kituaak naaitureisho, te araroto te dukuya iltung'ana lenyena iloreren o nkaitin enye?" 
2Samuel7:24 Nintasheyie te nkaraki kewan ino iltung'ana linono Israel metaa iltung'ana linono ntarasi; ore iyie, Olaitoriani, niaku Enkai enye." 
2Samuel7:25 Ore taata, Ee Olaitoriani Enkai, ntisipa ntarasi ilo rorei liroro iyie oipirta osinka lino neipirta enkaji enye, nias anaa eniroro;" 
2Samuel7:26 naa kerupi enkarna ino ntarasi, eji, ‘Olaitoriani loo lororani ninye Enkai oo Siraeli,’ ore enkaji o sinka lino Daudi neitubulari te dukuya iyie." 
2Samuel7:27 Amu iyie, ee Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel, naitayio ena bolunoto aitodol osinka lino, ijo, ‘Kaashetaki iyie enkaji;’ neaku etagolo osinka lino oshoke pee kiomon iyie ena omono." 
2Samuel7:28 Ore taata, iyie Olaitoriani Enkai, iyie Enkai, nesipa irorei linono, nisiligie ena toki sidai osinka lino;" 
2Samuel7:29 ore naa taata tishipayu iyie pee imayian enkaji osinka lino, pee etum ashomo dukuya ntarasi te dukuya iyie; amu ore iyie, ee Olaitoriani Enkai, niroro, naa te mayianata ino emayiani enkaji o sinka lino ntarasi.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Ore te siadi ena nemir Daudi Ilfilisti neitore ninche, neya Daudi Metegama aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lfilisti." 
2Samuel8:2 Nemir ninye Moab, netem ninche to lgosoi lkereri, aisho ninche meirraga te nkop; ore ilkererin oare netemi pee eari metuata, ore olkereri obo olulung'a nepali. Neaku Ilmoabu isinkan le Daudi neyaki kodi." 
2Samuel8:3 Neitoki sii Daudi amir Hadadesa olayioni le Rehob, olaiguanani le Soba, eloito arrinyu enkitoo enye to lkeju le Frati." 
2Samuel8:4 Neya Daudi aitung'uaa ninye enkalifu o iip naapishana o sikarini ooked mbartan, oo sikarini nkalifuni tikitam oopuo too nkejek nedung Daudi irrisheta mbartan pooki oo ngarrin, kake etelekua inaaidip ngarrin iip oo mbartan." 
2Samuel8:5 Ore ake pee epuonu Isiria le Dameski aaretu Hadadesa ilo aiguanani le Soba, near Daudi metuata iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oare loo Siria." 
2Samuel8:6 Nepik Daudi iltimito atua Aram e Dameski; neaku Isiria isinkan le Daudi neyaki kodi. Neisho Olaitoriani Daudi metimirisho te pooki wueji neba anaa eneshomo. 
2Samuel8:7 Neya Daudi ilong'oi e sahabu apa naanapita isinkan le Hadadesa, neyau ninche Yerusalem." 
2Samuel8:8 Ore ebaiki Beta ometabaiki Berotai, nkanas e Hadadesa, neya olaiguanani Daudi isuyan kumok." 
2Samuel8:9 Ore ake pee ening Toi olaiguanani le Hamat nchere etimira Daudi enjore pooki e Hadadesa," 
2Samuel8:10 neirriwaa Toi olayioni lenye Yoram enetii olaiguanani Daudi, pee eisho ninye enchunet, o pee eisho ninye enchunet enkaraki nataarare Hadadesa nemir ninye; amu kesej apa eeta Hadadesa olarrabal o Toi. Neyau Yoram te nebo ninye ntokitin e nkosholai, o sahabu, o no suyai." 
2Samuel8:11 Ore sii kuna neitisiny olaiguanani Daudi to Laitoriani, te nebo ina osholai o sahabu apa naaitisinya naaing'uaa iloreren pooki apa ootimira ninye," 
2Samuel8:12 ebaiki Edom, o Moab, o Ilamoni, o Ilfilisti, o Amaleki, o naaing'uaa iyarunot e Hadadesa olayioni le Rehob, olaiguanani le Soba."
