2Samuel8:13 Neishur enkarna e Daudi. Ore pee eshukunye ninye, nesesekuan Iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon o isiet ti atua Oerata le Munyan." 
2Samuel8:14 Nepik ninye iltimito Edom; ore atua Edom pooki nepik iltimito, lelo le Edom pooki isinkan le Daudi. Neishoo Olaitoriani Daudi metimirisho te pooki wueji neba anaa eneshomo." 
2Samuel8:15 Neaku eitoria apa Daudi Israel pooki; neisiaisho Daudi te sipata o te risioroto too ltung'ana lenyena pooki. 
2Samuel8:16 Naa Yoab olayioni le Seruiya apa oitore enjore, naa Yehoshafat olayioni le Ahilud apa olaigeroni." 
2Samuel8:17 Naa Sadok apa olayioni le Ahitab o Ahimelek olayioni le Abiata ninche ilapolosak; naa Seraia apa olasirani; 
2Samuel8:18 naa Benaia olayioni le Yehoida apa otii shumata lelo Kereti o lelo le Peleti ore ilayiok le Daudi naa ilapolosak. 
2Samuel9:1 Nejo Daudi, “Keton etii oltung'ani obo otelekua te nkaji e Saul, pee atum nanu aitoduaa ninye esupatisho te nkaraki Yonatan?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Netii apa osinka le nkaji e Saul oji Siba, neipotu ninche ninye enetii Daudi; nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Ira iyie Siba?” Nejo ninye, “Ore osinka lino naa ninye ilo.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Nejo olaiguanani, “Aimeton etii likae obo le nkaji e Saul, pee atum nanu aitoduaa ninye esupatisho e Nkai?” Nejoki Siba olaiguanani, “Eton etii olayioni le Yonatan; olmaima ninye tarrushi nkejek enyena.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Koree ninye?” Nejoki Siba olaiguanani, “Etii atua enkaji e Makir olayioni le Amiel te Lo-debar.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Kaae neirriwaa olaiguanani meyauni ninye aaitung'uaa enkaji e Makir ole Amiel, te Lo-debar." 
2Samuel9:6 Nelotu Mefiboshet, olayioni le Yonatan ole Saul enetii Daudi, nebatata te nkomom enye neserem. Nejo Daudi, “Mefiboshet!” Newal ninye, “Ng'ura, osinka lino.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Nejoki Daudi ninye, “Miureisho; amu kaaitodol nanu esupatisho te nkaraki papaai lino Yonatan, naa kaashukoki iyie enkop pooki e Saul papaai lino; nidaa iyie te mesa ai anaake.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Neserem ninye, nejo, “Kainyoo ninye osinka lino, metaa ing'or iyie oldia otua anaa nanu?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Neipotu olaiguanani Siba, ilo sinka le Saul, nejoki ninye, “Ore nena pooki apa naara ine Saul o ne nkaji enye pooki aishoo nanu olayioni lo lkitok lino." 
2Samuel9:10 Ore iyie o layiok linono o sinkan linono niturokiki ninye enkurma niyauu atua nena nintayuyu, pee etum olayioni lo lkitok lino endaa nanya; kake ore Mefiboshet olayioni lo lkitok lino nedaa anaake te mesa ai.” Neeta apa Siba ilayiok tomon o imiet o sinkan tikitam." 
2Samuel9:11 Nejoki Siba olaiguanani, “Ore te risioroto e nena pooki, naaitanap olkitok lai olaiguanani osinka lenye, neaku ina eas osinka lino.” Neaku etadee Mefiboshet te mesa e Daudi, anaa obo loo layiok lo laiguanani." 
2Samuel9:12 Neeta apa mefiboshet olayioni oti oji enkarna Mika. Ore pooki ootobiko te nkaji e Siba neaku isinkan le Mefiboshet. 
2Samuel9:13 Neaku etobiko Mefiboshet te Yerusalem; amu kedaa apa ninye anaake te mesa o laiguanani. Naa olmaima apa too nkejek enyena pokira are. 
2Samuel10:1 Ore te siadi ena neye olaiguanani loo Lamoni neitoreisho Hanan olayioni lenye te rishata enye. 
2Samuel10:2 Nejo Daudi, “Kaitodol nanu esupatisho Hanan olayioni le Nashash, anaa apa enaaitaasa papaai lenye nanu te supatisho.” Neaku eirriwayie Daudi isinkan lenyena pee eitigir ninye ti alo papaai lenye. Nepuonu isinkan le Daudi atua enkop oo Lamori." 
2Samuel10:3 Kake etiaakitia lelo lkituaak loo Lamoni Hanan olkitok lenye, “Ijo iyie ore enkaraki nikirriwaka iyie Daudi iltung'ana likintagol naa keyanyitita papaai lino? Keitu ninye eirriu Daudi isinkan lenyena enitii iyie pee eing'or enkanasa, neikeern ninye, nenang'aa ninye?”" 
2Samuel10:4 Neaku eewa Hanan isinkan le Daudi, nebarn ake enchoto o lmunyei lo ltung'ani nedung nkilani enye too mpolosi enye neisho ninche meshomo." 
2Samuel10:5 Ore ake pee elikini Daudi, neirriwaa iltung'ana metanang'are ninche, amu etukurrutua apa lelo tung'ana oleng. Nejo olaiguanani, “Entotoni te Yeriko o metaba anaa nebulu ilmunyo linyi, pee intokiki aashukunye.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Ore ake pee edol lelo tung'ana le Amoni aajo etaa ilmang'ati te Daudi, neirriwaa lelo tung'ana le Amoni ilkiliku aaisho esiaai Isiria le Beterehob, o Isiria le Soba, isikarini nkalifuni tikitam oopuo too nkejek, o laiguanani le Maaka te nebo iltung'ana enkalifu, o ltung'ana le Tob, iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon o are." 
2Samuel10:7 Ore ake pee ening Daudi ina, neirriwaa Yoab o lorora pooki lo ltung'ana magil." 
2Samuel10:8 Nepuonu Ilamoni aaipang'u neluaa to larrabal te kishomi; ore lelo Siria le Soba o le Rehob, o ltung'ana le Tob o Maaka netii ninche maate enkop naisiaja." 
2Samuel10:9 Ore pee edol Yoab inchere eirragieki olarrabal aarare ninye te dukuya o te siadi, negelu ninye embata oo ltung'ana gelunot le Israel, neitobiraki ninche metaarare Isiria;" 
2Samuel10:10 ore ilkulikae pooki loo ltung'ana lenyena nepik ninye atua enkitoria e Abishai olalashe lenye, neitobiraki ninche metaarare Ilamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Nejo ninye, “Tenaa kegol oleng Isiria te nanu, naa eikiretu iyie nanu; kake tenaa kegol oleng Ilamoni te iyie naa kaalotu nanu aretu iyie." 
2Samuel10:12 Ntagoluoyu, naa maikuna anaa lewa te nkaraki iltung'ana lang, o too nkanas e Nkai ang; naa nchoo metaasa Olaitoriani ina nadol aa sidai te ninye.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Neaku etupunyakitia Yoab o lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo ninye olarrabal aarare Isiria; neipirri aailanyisho ninche te dukuya ninye. 
2Samuel10:14 Ore pee edol Ilamoni aajo eilanyishote Isiria, neiko sii ninche neijia aailanyisho te dukuya Abishai, nejing atua enkanasa. Kaae neshukunye Yoab aing'uaa olarrabal loo Lamoni, nelotu Yerusalem." 
2Samuel10:15 Kake ore ake pee edol Isiria aajo etimira ninche Israel, neiturrurro maate te nebo." 
2Samuel10:16 Neirriwaa Hadadesa olkilikuai, neyau aitupuku lelo Siria apa ootii te idia alo Frati; nepuonu ninche Helam, te nebo Shobak olkitok le njore e Hadadesa te dukuya ninche." 
2Samuel10:17 Ore ake pee elikini Daudi, neiturrur ninye Israeli pooki te nebo, nelang Yordan, nepuonu Helam. Neitobira Isiria maate aarare Daudi, neitayu olarrabal te nebo ninye." 
2Samuel10:18 Neipirri Isiria aailanyisho te dukuya Israel, near Daudi metuata too ltung'ana le Siria iip naapishana loo ngarrin, o lakedok loo mbartan nkalifuni artam, nepik olbae Shobak ilo kitok le njore enye, neaku etua ninye te ine." 
2Samuel10:19 Ore pee edol lelo aiguanak pooki apa laa isinkan le Hadadesa ninche etimira Israel neitayu ninche osotua te nebo Israel, neaku isinkan te ninche. Neaku etureita Isiria eitoki aaretu Ilamoni." 
2Samuel11:1 Ore te nkiterunoto o lari, ina kata apa napuoie ilaiguanak olarrabal, neirriwaa Daudi Yoab, o sinkan lenyena te nebo ninye, o Israel pooki, neitalaku ninche elap too ltung'ana le Amoni neman aamuat Raba. Kake etotona Daudi te Yerusalem." 
2Samuel11:2 Ore nabo olong, etigile enkolong, ore pee edumunye Daudi te ndapash enye, neloolo ninye te nchumata oltapeet le nkaji o laiguanani, nedol ninye te nchumata olperere enkitok eitukuo; naa eisidai ina kitok oleng." 
2Samuel11:3 Neirriwaa Daudi olkilikuai aikilikuanu ina kitok. Nejo obo, “Aime Betsheba ena, entito e Eliam, enkitok e Uria Olhiti?”" 
2Samuel11:4 Neaku eirriwayie Daudi ilkiliku, neya ninye; nelotu ninye enetii, neboitare ninye ninye. (Naa keitobira apa ninye kewan te nkiduruk enye.) Neitoki ashuko alo enkaji enye." 
2Samuel11:5 Nenutayu ina kitok; neirriwaa ninye olkilikuai nejoki Daudi, “Atunute.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Neirriwaki Daudi Yoab olomoni, ejo, “Irriwakaki nanu Uria loo Lhiti.” Neirriwaa Yoab Uria enetii Daudi." 
2Samuel11:7 Ore pee elotu Uria enetii ninye, neikilikuanu Daudi enaasita Yoab o eneikununo iltung'ana, o eneikunari olarrabal." 
2Samuel11:8 Nejoki Daudi Uria, “Tadoi shomo enkaji ino, pee intuku nkejek inono.” Neipang Uria alo te nkaji o laiguanani, nesujaa ninye enkishooroto naing'uaa olaiguanani." 
2Samuel11:9 Kake eirure Uria te kutukaji e nkaji o laiguanani te nebo isinkan pooki lo lkitok lenye, neitu elo enkaji enye." 
2Samuel11:10 Ore ake pee ejoki ninche Daudi, “Eitu edoyio Uria alo enkaji enye,” nejoki Daudi Uria, “Keitu iyie ilotu aing'uaa enkop naado kainyoo pee eitu idoyio alo enkaji ino?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Nejoki Uria Daudi, “Ore osanduku le Nkai, e Israel o Yuda nebikito too lng'oborri; ore olkitok lai Yoab o sinkan lo lkitok lai netii ilng'oborri ti ong'ata naisiaja; kalo naa nanu enkaji ai, adaa naokisho, nairrag te nebo enkitok ai? Anaa eninchu, o anaa enaishu oltau lino, maas nanu ena bae.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Neitoki Daudi ajoki Uria, “Totona ake sii taata tene, ore taaisere naaisho iyie shomo.” Neaku etotona Uria te Yerusalem ina olong o pee ekenyu." 
2Samuel11:13 Neitoomon Daudi ninye, nedaa ninye te dukuya ninye neokisho, neaku eitemera ninye; ore te nteipa neipang ninye alo airrag te ndapash enye te nebo isinkan lo lkitok lenye, kake eitu ninye edoyio alo enkaji enye." 
2Samuel11:14 Ore tadekenya neigeroki Daudi Yoab empalai, neirriwaa te nkaina e Uria." 
2Samuel11:15 Ore ti atua empalai neiger ajo, “Tipika Uria enkomom o larrabal ogol, paa intokiki aaitiakunye aaing'uaa ninye, pee etumi aatar metua." 
2Samuel11:16 Ore emanita Yoab enkanasa neisho ninye Uria ewueji neyiolo ajo ketii iltung'ana oopi. 
2Samuel11:17 Neipang'u iltung'ana le nkanasa aapuonu aarare Yoab, ore embata oo ltung'ana le Daudi ti atua iltung'ana neurori. Ore Uria ilo Hiti nesesekuani sii ninye." 
2Samuel11:18 Neirriwaa Yoab olkilikuai aliki Daudi ilomon pooki lo larrabal. 
2Samuel11:19 Neitanap ninye ilo kilikuai, ejo, Ore ake pee indip ainosaki ilomon pooki lo larrabal olaiguanani," 
2Samuel11:20 ore ake pee eilep, engoro o laiguanani, ore ake pee kijoki iyie, ‘Kainyoo intae pee ishomo aataaniki enkang oleng to larrabal? Keitu intae iyiolouu aajo kengorisho te suntai." 
2Samuel11:21 Kaing'ae apa natara Abimelek olayioni le Yerubeshet metua? Aime enkitok natanang'ua osoit oidong'ishoreki aitadoiki te suntai, neaku etua ninye te Tebes. Kainyoo intae pee ishomo oleng aanyikaki esuntai?’ Nijo iyie, ‘Ore sii osinka lino Uria Olhiti etua sii ninye.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Kaae nelo ilo kilikuai, nelotu neliki Daudi nena pooki naairriwua Yoab ninye metoliki." 
2Samuel11:23 Nejoki ilo tung'ani lo lkilikuai Daudi, “Enotokitio iyiook iltung'ana, neipang'u aapuonu aarare iyiook ti ong'ata; kake kiterewa aashukoki enejing'ieki kishomi." 
2Samuel11:24 Neng'or iltung'ana loo mbaa isinkan linono te suntai; netuata embata oo sinkan lo laiguanani; ore osinka lino Uria Olhiti netua sii ninye.” 
2Samuel11:25 Nejoki Daudi ilo kilikuai, “Nji iyie shomo tiaaki Yoab, ‘Mincho iyie ena bae kintanyamal, amu ear olalem obo taata near taata olikae; ntirrisha erasakinoto ino, enkanasa nimbung ninye.’ Nintagol ninye oshoke.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Ore pee ening enkitok e Uria nchere etua Uria olmoruo lenye, neishir ninye olkiyioi lo Sina enkaraki olmoruo lenye." 
2Samuel11:27 Ore pee eishunye olkiyioi, neirriwaa Daudi olkilikuai neyau ninye enkaji enye, neaku ninye enkitok enye, neiki ninye olayioni. Kake ore ina bae nataasa Daudi neitu eitiship Olaitoriani." 
2Samuel12:1 Neirriwaa Olaitoriani Natan enetii Daudi. Nelotu ninye enetii ninye nejoki ninye, “Etii apa iltung'ana oare enkang naje, naa karsis obo naa aisinani olikae." 
2Samuel12:2 Ore ilo tung'ani karsis neeta nkerrai kumok o nchoo; 
2Samuel12:3 kake ore ilo tung'ani aisinani nemeeta toki meteleku ake enkiti supen e ker, apa nainyiang'ua ninye. Neoroo ninye, nebulu ninye te nebo ninye o te nebo nkera enyena; naa keng'arie apa ninye endaa enye, neokisho te nkikompe enye, neirrag to lgoo lenye, netiu apa ninye anaa entito te ninye." 
2Samuel12:4 Nelotu apa olalotoni enetii ilo tung'ani karsis, nemeyieu apa ninye neya too nkerrai enyena arashu too nchoo pee eitobiraki ilo otudung'uo enkop oewuo enetii ninye, kake eewa ninye olkuoo le ilo aisinani, neitobiraki ilo tung'ani apa oewuo enetii ninye.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Neyupuyup oleng engoro e Daudi te nkaraki ilo tung'ani; nejoki ninye Natan, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, ore ilo tung'ani otaasa ena eishiaakino neye;" 
2Samuel12:6 nelak ilo kuoo katitin ong'uan, enkaraki ena bae, o enkaraki nemeeta olng'ur.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Nejoki Natan Daudi, “Iyie ilo tung'ani. Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ‘Aatubukoko iyie eilata aput aitaa olaiguanani te shumata Israel naatokordua iyie aitayu te nkaina e Saul;" 
2Samuel12:8 naaisho nanu iyie enkaji o lkitok lino, o nkituaak o lkitok lino to lgoo lino, naaisho iyie enkaji e Israel o ene Yuda; naa tenaa ae kiti ena, naaponiki nanu iyie nkumok oleng." 
2Samuel12:9 Kainyoo iyie pee itemenayie ororei lo Laitoriani, pee ias ina suuji too nkonyek enyena? Itasesekuana iyie Uria ilo Hiti to lalem, niya enkitok enye metaa enkitok ino, nitara ninye to lalem looLamori." 
2Samuel12:10 Ore naa taata meiwuang'a ae kata olalem te nkaji ino amu kitemena nanu, niya enkitok e Uria ilo Hiti metaa enkitok ino.’" 
2Samuel12:11 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Ng'ura, kadumu nanu entorroni nikiarare iyie ti atua enkaji ino makewan; naya nanu nkituaak inono te dukuya nkonyek inono, naisho nanu ninche olelatia ino, neirrag ninye te nebo inkituaak inono dama ena olong." 
2Samuel12:12 Amu itaasa iyie too nkisudorot kake kaas nanu ena te dukuya Israel pooki, naas nanu dama.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Nejoki Daudi Natan, “Ataasa nanu eng'oki to Laitoriani.” Nejoki Natan Daudi, “Eiwuang'ie sii ninye Olaitoriani eng'oki ino; miye iyie." 
2Samuel12:14 Ore eyia, enkaraki ore tena yasata nintorioko iyie amor Olaitoriani, keye ina kerai nikitoikioki iyie.” Nelo Natan enkaji enye." 
2Samuel12:15 Neosh Olaitoriani ina kerai apa natoikio enkitok e Uria Daudi, nemueyu ninye." 
2Samuel12:16 Nesai Daudi Enkai te nkaraki ina kerai; nepukoo Daudi, nelo atua neirrag enkewarie te nkop." 
2Samuel12:17 Ore ilpayiani le nkaji enye neitashe te mbata ninye, pee edumu ninye aaitung'uaa enkop; kake medumunye ninye, nemenya ninye endaa te nebo ninche." 
2Samuel12:18 Ore te nkolong e naapishana neye ina kerai. Neureyu isinkan le Daudi eliki ninye nchere etua enkerai; amu etejo ninche, “Ng'ura ore apa eton eishu enkerai, nikirorie iyiook ninye, neitu ninye ening iyiook; kaji naa kinko ti nikijoki ninye inchere etua enkerai? Eidim ninye aitaasa kewan ae torrono.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Kake ore pee edol Daudi nchere keing'oming'omakino isinkan lenyena, nemuso Daudi nchere etua enkerai; nejoki Daudi isinkan lenyena, “Ketua enkerai?” Nejo ninche, “Etua ninye.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Kaae nedumunye Daudi te nkop, neitukuo, neel kewan te ilata, neibelekeny nkilani enyena nelo ninye atua enkaji o Laitoriani, neserem; neitoki ninye alo enkaji enye kewan; ore pee eikilikuanu, neirragieki endaa te dukuya ninye, nenya ninye." 
2Samuel12:21 Nejoki isinkan lenyena, “Kainyoo ena bae nitaasa iyie? Itupukoyie ninchiraki eton eishu; kake ore ake pee eye enkerai nidumunye ninya endaa.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Nejo ninye, “Ore apa eton eishu enkerai, napukoo naishir; amu atejo nanu, ‘Kaing'ae oyiolo tenaa kaaing'urrie nanu Olaitoriani, pee epok enkerai?’" 
2Samuel12:23 Kake ore taata etua; kainyoo naa pee apukoo nanu? Kaidim anyaaki atushuku ninye? Kalo nanu enetii ninye, kake meshukunye ninye enatii nanu.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Neilejilej Daudi enkitok enye, Bet-sheba, nelo enetii ninye, neirrag te nebo ninye, neiu ninye olayioni, nejo enkarna enye Solomon. Naa kenyor apa ninye Olaitoriani." 
2Samuel12:25 Naa kenyor apa Olaitoriani ninye neirriwaa olkilikuai te Natan ilo oiboni, neaku etejo ninye enkarna enye Yedidia, te nkaraki Olaitoriani." 
2Samuel12:26 Nearare Yoab Raba loo Lamoni, neya ina ang e nkitoo." 
2Samuel12:27 Neirriwaa Yoab ilkiliku enetii Daudi, nejo, “Ataarare nanu Raba, ore sii, aawa nanu ina anasa oo nkariak." 
2Samuel12:28 Ore naa taata, nturrurro tenebo ilkulikae tung'ana, nintayuyu ilng'oborri aaipirakinore enkanasa, niyaya ninye, pee maya ake nanu ina anasa, neaku te nkarna ai eipoti.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Neaku eiturrurro Daudi iltung'ana pooki tenebo nepuo Raba, nearare ninye neya ninye." 
2Samuel12:30 Neya ninye olmarisian le nkitoo lo laiguanani lenye te lukunya enye, ore apa enkiroishi enye naa entalanta e sahabu, netii atua ninye osoit ogol e nkinyang'a; nepiki ninye endukuya e Daudi. Neya ninye nena yarunot e ina anasa ntokitin kumok oleng." 
2Samuel12:31 Neyau ninye lelo tung'ana apa ootii atua enkanasa, nepik ninche enkisiaayiare too musumenoni, o sururuni o ntoluo, neisho ninche meteekenyata te mpejoto oo lmatofali naa nji eikuna ninye too nkanas pooki oo Lamoni. Kaae neitoki Daudi o ltung'ana pooki aashuko Yerusalem." 
2Samuel13:1 Ore apa Absalom, olayioni le Daudi, neeta enkanashe sidai naji enkarna Tamar; ore pee elusoo enkata, nenyorru ninye Amnon, olayioni le Daudi." 
2Samuel13:2 Neisomita oleng Amnon o metaba anaa nemueyu te nkaraki enkanashe enye Tamar; amu eselenkei apa nemeyiolo olee neaku etaliee ajo meidimayu te Amnon pee eitaas ninye ae. 
2Samuel13:3 Kake eeta apa Amnon olchore, oji enkarna Yonadab, olayioni le Shimea, olalashe le Daudi; ore apa Yonadab naa oltung'ani kalamas oleng." 
2Samuel13:4 Nejoki ninye ninye, “Olayioni lo laiguanani, kainyoo pee igira asasu anaake? Aimikiliki iyie nanu?” Nejoki Amnon ninye, “Kanyor nanu Tamar, enkanashe o lalashe lai Absalom.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Nejoki Yonadab ninye, “Irraga te ndapash ino, nintaakuno eimuei; ore ake pee kilotu papaai lino adol, tiaaki ninye, ‘Nchoo enkanashe ai Tamar aalotu aisho endaa nanya, neitobir endaa te dukuya nanu, pee atum nanu atoduaa ina daa, nanya nanu te nkaina enye.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Neaku eirraga Amnon, neitaakuno kemuei; ore ake pee elotu olaiguanani adol ninye, nejoki Amnon olaiguanani, “Nchoo siaake enkanashe ai Tamar elotu aitobir inkuti mukateni te dukuya nanu, pee aatum ninye aishoo endaa.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Neirriwaa Daudi olkilikuai enetii Tamar ejoki, “Shomo enkaji olalashe lino Amnon, intobiraki ninye endaa.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Neaku eshomo Tamar enkaji o lalashe lenye Amnon, ine apa neirragie. Neya ninye enkurma, neipurj, neitobir imukateni too nkonyek enyena, nepej imukateni." 
2Samuel13:9 Neitayu ninye enkarae oo mukateni neitayu imukateni aisho te dukuya ninye, kake etanya ninye enya. Nejo Amnon, “Taarai pooki tung'ani maashomo aaing'uaa nanu.” Neipang pooki ng'ae alo aing'uaa ninye." 
2Samuel13:10 Nejoki Amnon Tamar, “Iyau endaa atua olgilata, pee atum nanu ainosa te nkaina ino.” Neya Tamar nena mukateni naaitobira, neyau ninche atua olgilata enetii Amnon olalashe lenye." 
2Samuel13:11 Kake ore ake pee eyau ninche aitinyikaki ninye meinosa, neibung ninye, nejoki, “Wou, irraga te nebo nanu, enkanashe ai.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Newaliki ninye, “A-a, olalashe lai, mikiaraki nanu; amu measi ena te Israel; mias ena torroni emodai." 
2Samuel13:13 Amaa te nanu, kaji aya enkurruna ai? Amaa te iyie, nitiu iyie anaa obo loo larruok oomoda too Siraeli. Ore naa taata, aatasayia iyie, irorie olaiguanani, amu maamitiki ninye iyie.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Kake eitu ening, naa ore amu ninye ogol alang ninye, nearaki ninye, neirag ninye te nebo ninye." 
2Samuel13:15 Neitoki Amnon aibayu ninye te nkiba sapuk; neaku ore enkiba naiba ninye naa eisapuk alang enyorrata apa natonyorra ninye. Nejoki Amnon ninye, “Tudumunye, shomo.”" 
2Samuel13:16 Kake etiaka ninye, “A-a, olalashe lai, amu ore ena kitarruoroto nikiararie nanu naa eikitok alang ina ae nikintaasa nanu.” Kake meinining ninye ninye." 
2Samuel13:17 Neipotu ninye olbarnoti apa oisiaaita ninye nejoki, “Iwuang'ie ena kitok tene natii nanu, ninken kutukaji te siadi ninye.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Neishopito apa ninye olkila oado adoru nkaik; amu nji apa eiko iselenken o laiguanani nemeyiolo olee te neishopo. Neaku eitayio osinka lenye ninye boo, neiken kutukaji te siadi ninye." 
2Samuel13:19 Nepik Tamar nkuruon endukuya enye nepolos ilo kila oado apa oishopito; neiteleiki nkaik enyena endukuya enye, nelo, neyietu aishir eloito." 
2Samuel13:20 Nejoki olalashe lenye Absalom ninye, “Ketii duoo Amnon olalashe lino te nebo iyie? Tigirayu naa taata, enkanashe ai; olalashe lino ninye; mipik ena oltau.” Nebik Tamar, anaa enkitok naliyio, ti atua enkaji o lalashe lenye Absalom." 
2Samuel13:21 Ore pee ening Olaiguanani Daudi kuna baa pooki, negoro ninye oleng." 
2Samuel13:22 Kake eitu eirorie Absalom Amnon aa esidai aa entorrono; amu eibayie apa Absalom Amnon, enkaraki naikonya enkanashe enye Tamar." 
2Samuel13:23 Ore te siadi ilarin oare oolulung'a neeta apa Absalom ilabarnok loo nkerra te Baal-haso, naa ninye nataaniki Efraim, neitoomon Absalom ilayiok pooki lo laiguanani." 
2Samuel13:24 Nelotu Absalom enetii olaiguanani, nejo, “Ng'ura, eeta osinka lino ilabarnok loo nkerra; aatasayia nchoo olaiguanani o sinkan lenyena epuo te nebo osinka lino.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Kake etiaka olaiguanani Absalom, “A-a, olayioni lai, mincho iyiook kipuo pooki, mikiaku ake iyiook olola te iyie.” Neitirrishaki ninye, kake meyieu ninye nelo kake eishoo ninye emayianata enye." 
2Samuel13:26 Nejo Absalom, “Ti nimilo, aatoomono nchoo olalashe lai Amnon elo te nebo iyiook.” Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Kainyoo pee elo ninye te nebo intae?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Kake eitirrishaka Absalom ninye o metaba anaa neisho ninye Amnon o layiok pooki lo laiguanani meshomo te nebo ninye. 
2Samuel13:28 Neitanap Absalom isinkan lenyena, ejo, “Entujurru ore ake pee emera Amnon te naisho oo sabibu, ore ake pee ajoki intae, ‘Entoosh Amnon,’ niariara intae ninye metua. Emiureisho; aime nanu oitanapa intae? Entipijuoto niarriyianunu.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Neaku eitaasa isinkan le Absalom Amnon anaa enaitanapishe Absalom. Nedumunye ilayiok lo laiguanani pooki, neked ake oltung'ani enyumpu enye neisik." 
2Samuel13:30 Ore epuoito ninche te nkoitoi, nepuonu ilomon enetii Daudi, nejo “Etaara Absalom ilayiok lo laiguanani pooki, metuata neitu ninye eing'uari obo.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Nedumunye olaiguanani, nepolos ilkilani lenyena, neirrag te nkop; ore isinkan lenyena pooki apa ooitashe te mbata nepolos ilkilani lenye." 
2Samuel13:32 Kake etejo Yonadab olayioni le Shimea, ilo alashe le Daudi, “Mincho olkitok lai ejo ketaara ninche metuata lelo barnot pooki, lelo ayiok lo laiguanani, amu Amnon ake otua, amu te nkitanapata e Absalom etaasaki ena ebaiki apa enkolong naikonya ninye enkanashe enye Tamar." 
2Samuel13:33 Ore naa taata, mincho olkitok lai olaiguanani epik oltau adamu ajo etuata ilayiok pooki lo laiguanani; amu Amnon ake otua.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Kake eisika Absalom. Ore apa olbarnoti orripisho nedumu nkonyek enyena, neing'orisho, naa ng'ura, epuonu iltung'ana aaimu enkoitoi e Horonaim emurte o ldoinyo." 
2Samuel13:35 Nejoki Yonadab olaiguanani, “Ng'ura, eetuo ilayiok lo laiguanani; anaa enatejo osinka lino, metaa etaa ina.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Ore ake enaidipie airoro, ng'ura, nepuonu ilayiok lo laiguanani, neilepie oltoilo neishir; ore olaiguanani o sinkan lenyena pooki neishir te mion oleng." 
2Samuel13:37 Kake eisika Absalom, nelo enetii Talmai olayioni le Amihud, olaiguanani le Geshur. Neishir Daudi te nkaraki olayioni lenye anaake." 
2Samuel13:38 Neaku eisika Absalom, nelo enetii Geshur, netii apa ine ilarin okuni." 
2Samuel13:39 Neyieu oltau lo laiguanani nelo enetii Absalom; amu eitigiraki ti alo Amnon, etodua ajo etua ninye." 
2Samuel14:1 Ore apa Yoab olayioni le Seruiya nemusu ajo Absalom edamu oltau lo laiguanani. 
2Samuel14:2 Neirriwaa Yoab olkilikuai meshomo Tekoa, meyau te ine enkitok ng'en, nejoki ninye, “Ntaakunoyu ira enkaishirani, nipika ilkilani lo lkiyioi; nimiel kewan te ilata, kake taasa anaa enkitok naishirita too nkolong'i kumok te nkaraki o lotua;" 
2Samuel14:3 nilo enetii olaiguanani, niro aiko nji te ninye.” Neaku etipika Yoab irorei enkutuk enye." 
2Samuel14:4 Ore pee elotu ina kitok e Tekoa enetii olaiguanani, nebatata te nkomom enye o metabaiki enkop, nesai, nejo, “Taretuoki, Olaiguanani.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Kainyoo enyamali ino?” Newal ninye ajo, “Ng'ura ara nanu enkoliai; etua olmoruo lai." 
2Samuel14:6 Neeta esinka ino ilayiok oare, neitarrikino ninche maate ti ong'ata; nemetii apa oltung'ani orish ninche, neosh obo olikae near ninye metua." 
2Samuel14:7 Ore taata netudumakine olmarei pooki esinka ino, nejo ninche, ‘Nchoru ilo tung'ani otara olalashe lenye, pee kitum iyiook aataar ninye metua te nkaraki olalashe lenye apa otasesekuana’; neaku keinyal sii ninye olajung'oni. Neiko neijia aar enkukuo ai natung'uayioki, nemeing'ueiki olmoruo lai enkarna arashu olpisiai ti oriong enkop.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Nejoki olaiguanani ina kitok, “Shomo enkaji ino, naa kaishoru nanu nkitanapat ti alo iyie.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Nejoki ina kitok e Tekoa olaiguanani, “Nchoo eaku shumata nanu etii enkitarruoroto, Olaitoriani lai olaiguanani, o shumata enkaji e papa lai; nchoo olaiguanani o lorika lenye le nkitoo eaku meeta entioto.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Nejo olaiguanani, “Ti nikijoki oltung'ani ae toki, iyau ninye enatii nanu, nimikingil ae kata ninye aibung.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Nejo ninye, “Aatoomono nchoo olaiguanani eipot Olaitoriani Enkai ino, paa ore ilo oitalaku elap to sarge nemeitoki ae kata asesekuanisho, ore olayioni lai nemeari metua.” Nejo ninye, “Anaaenaishu Olaitoriani, medoiki ninye olpapita obo lo layioni lino enkop.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Neitoki ina kitok ajo, “Aatasayia nchoo esinka ino eiro ororei to lkitok lai olaiguanani.” Nejo ninye, “Iroro.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Nejo ina kitok, “Kainyoo naa iyie pee intobira embae naaijo ena aarare iltung'ana le Nkai? Amu ore te nkishorunoto ena walata neen olaiguanani kewan, te ina nemeyau olaiguanani ilo lenye oararo nerrinyunye ang." 
2Samuel14:14 Meeta nchere mikiye pooki, kitiu iyiook anaa enkare naisuaakaki enkop, nemeitoki asotunoyu; kake meitayu Enkai enkishui e ilo oing'oru nkoitoi pee mepal ilo lenye oararo metaa oloiturrayioki." 
2Samuel14:15 Aewuo nanu ajo ena to lkitok lai olaiguanani amu aaitaa nanu iltung'ana kuret; nedamu apa esinka ino, ajo, ‘Kairorie nanu olaiguanani; eidimayu pee eas olaiguanani eomonunoto e sinka enye." 
2Samuel14:16 Amu kening olaiguanani, nekordu esinka enye aitung'uaa enkaina o ltung'ani laaidim ainyala nanu o layioni lai te nebo aitung'uaa enjung'ore e Nkai.’" 
2Samuel14:17 Nedamu esinka ino ajo, ‘Ore ororei lo lkitok lai olaiguanani naa kaayeng'iyeng'ie nanu’; amu ore olkitok lai olaiguanani netiu anaa olmalaika le Nkai te nerish esidai o entorrono. Metaa Olaitoriani Enkai ino te nebo iyie!”" 
2Samuel14:18 Neitoki olaiguanani awaliki ina kitok nejo, “Mikisudorie nanu pooki toki naba anaa enaaikilikuan iyie.” Nejo ina kitok, “Nchoo olkitok lai olaiguanani eiro.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Nejo olaiguanani, “Ketii enkaina e Yoab te nebo iyie te kuna pooki?” Newal ina kitok nejo, “Esipa ore anaa eninchu iyie, olkitok lai olaiguanani, meidim oltung'ani aibelekenyayu enkaina e tatene arashu enkaina e kedienye te pooki bae natejo olkitok lai olaiguanani. Osinka lino Yoab laaiguanaka nanu; ninye otipika kulo rorei pooki enkutuk e sinka ino." 
2Samuel14:20 Etaasa osinka lino Yoab ena pee etum aibelekenya kuna baa. Kake ore olkitok lai neeta eng'eno anaa olmalaika le Nkai ayiolou mbaa pooki naatii enkop.” 
2Samuel14:21 Nejoki olaiguanani Yoab, “Ng'ura taata, aishorua ena; shomo tushuku ilo barnoti Absalom.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Nebatata Yoab te nkomom enye abaiki enkop, nesai, nemayian olaiguanani, nejo Yoab, “Ore taata etayiolo osinka lino nchere anoto omom too nkonyek inono, olkitok lai olaiguanani, te ina naishorua olaiguanani eomonunoto osinka lenye.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Neaku etudumunye Yoab nelo Geshur, nelo ariku Absalom Yerusalem." 
2Samuel14:24 Nejo olaiguanani, “Nchoo ninye eton openy ti atua enkaji enye makewan; melotu ninye enatii nanu.” Neaku etotona Absalom openy te enkaji enye makewan, neitu elotu enetii Olaiguanani." 
2Samuel14:25 Ore apa ti atua Israel pooki nemetii oltung'ani orrepi te nkishaa enye anaa Absalom; ore ebaiki endap e nkeju enye o metabaiki endukuya enye nemeetae eleyiata te ninye. 
2Samuel14:26 Naa te nedung ninye ilpapit le ndukuya enye (amu kedung apa te nkiting'oto e pooki ari; te neiroshiu oleng te ninye, nedung) neipim ninye ilpapit le ndukuya enye, naa shekeli iip are te ntemata o laiguanani." 
2Samuel14:27 Netoikioki apa Absalom ilayiok okuni o entito nabo naji Tamar; naa enkitok sidai apa ninye. 
2Samuel14:28 Neaku etobiko Absalom ilarin oare oolulung'a te Yerusalem, eitu elotu enetii olaiguanani." 
2Samuel14:29 Neirriwaki Absalom ilkiliku Yoab pee eirriwaa ninye enetii olaiguanani; kake etanya elotu Yoab enetii ninye. Neirriwaa eniare, kake melotu Yoab." 
2Samuel14:30 Nejoki ninye isinkan lenyena, “Eng'ura aajo ore enkurma e Yoab netashare enaai, neeta enkano te ine; enchom entipik enkima.” Neaku eshomo aapej enkurma." 
2Samuel14:31 Nedumunye Yoab nelo enetii Absalom te nkaji enye, nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo pee etapejo isinkan linono enkurma ai?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Newaliki Absalom Yoab nejo, “Ng'ura aairriwaka iyie olomoni, ‘Wou ene, pee aatum airriwaki olaiguanani, pee aikilikuan ajoki, Kainyoo nanu pee aewuo aing'uaa Geshur? Enaikash te nanu te neton atii ine.’” Ore naa taata nchooki nanu alo enetii olaiguanani; “naa te naata enkitarruoroto, nchoo ninye maatara nanu matua.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Kaae nelo Yoab enetii olaiguanani, neliki ninye; neipotu ninye Absalom. Neaku eewuo ninye enetii olaiguanani, neirrug kewan te nkomom enye o metabaiki enkop te dukuya olaiguanani; neng'utut olaiguanani Absalom." 
2Samuel15:1 Ore te siadi ena neing'uraki Absalom kewan engarri oo mbartan o ltung'ana onom ookuet te dukuya ninye. 
2Samuel15:2 Naa keinyototo apa Absalom ayooki neitashe te mbata enkoitoi e kishomi; ore te neeta oltung'ani enkiguana nayau dukuya olaiguanani pee eiguanareki, neipotu Absalom ninye, nejo, “Kaa anasa ing'uaa iyie?” Ore ake pee ejo, “Ore osinka lino naa olosho oje te Israel,”" 
2Samuel15:3 nejoki Absalom ninye, “Ng'ura, kesipa neishiaakino ena niyieu; kake metii oltung'ani otegelua olaiguanani likining iyie.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Nepon Absalom ajo, “Oi naaji aa kara oladung'oni le nkiguana tena kop! Neaku ore pooki tung'ani oata enkiguana arashu enaikilikuanu neidim aeu enatii, naisho nanu ninye esipata.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Naa ore ake pee ejo oltung'ani anyiku alotu aserem ninye, neitorioo enkaina enye neibung ninye, neng'utut ninye." 
2Samuel15:6 Neiko neijia Absalom too ltung'ana loo Israeli oopuonu enetii olaiguanani metundung'okini enkiguana; neaku etupurroyie Absalom iltauja loo ltung'ana le Israel. 
2Samuel15:7 Ore te nkiting'oto oo larin oong'uan nejoki Absalom olaiguanani, “Aatasayia nchooki nanu mashomo alak olmumai apa lainosa to Laitoriani, te Hebron." 
2Samuel15:8 Amu einosa apa osinka lino olmumai atii Geshur natii Aram, najo, ‘Esipa te naaitoki nanu Olaitoriani ashuku Yerusalem, naitayu nanu eseremata to Laitoriani.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:9 Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Shomo te seriani.” Neaku etudumunye ninye nelo Hebron." 
2Samuel15:10 Kake eirriwayie Absalom ilkiliku te nkisudoroto atua Israel pooki, ejo, “Ore ake pee ining'ining'i oltoilo le mowuo, entejo, ‘Absalom olaiguanani te Hebron!’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Nepuo te nebo Absalom iltung'ana iip are ooing'uaa Yerusalem aa ilomon apa ooitoomonoki, nepuo ninche meeta ae too ltauja neitu eyiolou toki." 
2Samuel15:12 Ore eitayu Absalom olasar, neirriwaki olkilikuai meipotuni Ahitofel ilo le Gilom olaikooni le Daudi meeu te nkanasa enye Gilo. Neponari enkarruoisho e Absalom ore iltung'ana ootii te nebo Absalom neponari." 
2Samuel15:13 Nelotu olkilikuai enetii Daudi, ejo, “Eshomo iltauja loo ltung'ana le Israel aasujaa Absalom.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Nejoki Daudi iltung'ana lenyena pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye te Yerusalem, “Entudumunye, emaisika iyiook, arashu eaku mikiata iyiook enikisikaki aailany Absalom; enchom entasiooi meinepu akeninye iyiook asioki, neyau entorroni aitadoiki shumata iyiook, neshurt ena anasa te nepi o lalem.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Nejoki isinkan lo laiguanani olaiguanani, “Ng'ura, eanyita isinkan linono pee eas enaba anaa enadung'u olkitok lai olaiguanani.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Neaku eshomo olaiguanani, ore enkaji enye pooki nesujaa ninye. Neing'uaa olaiguanani nkapiak tomon pee eing'or enkaji." 
2Samuel15:17 Nelo olaiguanani nesujaa iltung'ana pooki ninye; neitashe ninche te nkaji nabayie. 
2Samuel15:18 Negiroo isinkan lenyena pooki ninye; o Lkereti pooki, o Lpeleti, o lelo iip ile le Giti apa ootusujaitie ninye ebaiki Gas, negiroo aaim dukuya olaiguanani." 
2Samuel15:19 Nejoki olaiguanani Itai ilo le Giti, “Kainyoo sii pee ilo iyie te nebo iyiook? Tushukoyu shomo, pee ilo aton te nebo olaiguanani; amu ira iyie olomoni, nira sii oloisikua aing'uaa enkang ino." 
2Samuel15:20 Ng'ole ake iewuo iyie, naa kaaisho nanu iyie taata tamanai te nebo iyiook, idolita aloito, nemayiolo enalo? Tushukoyu shomo, nirik ilalashera linono te nebo iyie; naa mikintoduaa iyie Olaitoriani enyorrata nauno o enkisiligata.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Kake etawalikia Itai olaiguanani ajoki, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, naa ore enaishu olkitok lai olaiguanani, ore eneba enaa enetii olkitok lai olaiguanani, aa te keeya arashu te nkishui, ine sii ninye etii osinka lino.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Nejoki Daudi Itai, “Shomo naa, tulusoi.” Neaku eshomo Itai ilo le Giti agiroo, te nebo iltung'ana lenyena pooki o nena kutiti pooki apa naatii te nebo ninye." 
2Samuel15:23 Neishir enkop pooki ayietu egiroo iltung'ana pooki, nelang olaiguanani oerata le Kidron, negiroo iltung'ana pooki aing'or enkalo o lpurkel." 
2Samuel15:24 Neilepu Abiata, naa ng'ura, eewuo sii Sadok, te nebo Ilawi pooki, enapita osanduku lo sotua le Nkai; neirragie ninche ilo sanduku le Nkai, o metaba anaa negiroo iltung'ana pooki ti oriong enkanasa." 
2Samuel15:25 Nejoki olaiguanani Sadok, “Entanap osanduku le Nkai entorriny tiaatua enkanasa. Te natum nanu kirotetisho too nkonyek o Laitoriani, naa kaashuku ninye naaisho ninye matodua ninye o emanyisho enye;" 
2Samuel15:26 kake te nejo ninye, ‘Maashipakino nanu iyie,’ ng'ura, nele nanu, nchoo ninye maaitaasa ina nadol aa sidai te ninye.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Neitoki ake sii olaiguanani ajoki Sadok olapolosani, “Ng'ura, tushukoyu shomo enkanasa te seriani, iyie o Abiata, te nebo ilayiok linyi pokira oare, Ahimasi olayioni lino, o Yonatan olayioni le Abiata." 
2Samuel15:28 Ng'ura, kaanyu nanu iyie too lang'at o lpurkel, o metaba anaa nelotu olomoni oing'uaa enitii pee aaitayiolo nanu.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Neaku etanapa Sadok o Abiata osanduku le Nkai aashuk Yerusalem; nebik ninche te ine. 
2Samuel15:30 Kake eilepa Daudi alo enchumata o ldoinyo loo loirienito, neishiraa eloito, meeta namuka neimulumula endukuya enye; ore lelo tung'ana pooki ootii te nebo ninye neimulumul ilukuny enye, neilep ninche aapuo, neishiraa epuoito." 
2Samuel15:31 Nejokini apa Daudi, “Etii Ahitofel atua lelo arruok te nebo Absalom.” Nejo Daudi, “Olaitoriani, aatoomono nanu iyie, mbelekenya enkiguana e Ahitofel metaa emodai.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Ore ake pee elotu Daudi entopij o ldoinyo ine apa neseremieki Enkai, ng'ura, nelotu Hushai ilo Akiti anang'are ninye epolosa olkila lenye lioriong netii enterit endukuya enye." 
2Samuel15:33 Nejoki Daudi ninye, “Ti nilo iyie te nebo nanu niaku iyie olola te nanu." 
2Samuel15:34 Kake ti nishuko iyie alo enkanasa, nijoki Absalom, ‘Kaaku nanu osinka lino, iyie olaiguanani, naa ore apa anaa enara nanu osinka le papaai lino te nkata natulusoyie, neijia sii taata etiu kaaku nanu osinka lino,’ niaku intashal iyie te nkaraki nanu enkiguana e Ahitofel." 
2Samuel15:35 Ai metii Sadok o Abiata ilapolosak te nebo iyie te idie? Metaa ore enaba anaa enining te nkaji o laiguanani, toliki Sadok o Abiata ilapolosak." 
2Samuel15:36 Ng'ura etii ilayiok lenye pokira oare te nebo ninche te ine, Ahima-as, olayioni le Sadok, o Yonatan, olayioni le Abiata; naa te ninche kirriwaki nanu pooki toki nining.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Neaku eewuo Hushai, olchore le Daudi atua enkanasa, ina kata apa ejing'ita Absalom Yerusalem." 
2Samuel16:1 Ore ake pee egiroo Daudi enchumata o ldoinyo peno, netumore ninye Siba osinka le Mofiboshet, o sirkon are naairotoki, enapita imukateni iip are, o rridat iip loo sabibu ooitoyioki, o rridat iip loo lng'anayio le nkolong, o lbene lo lchoni le naisho oo sabibu." 
2Samuel16:2 Nejoki olaiguanani Siba, “Kainyoo iyie pee iyaua kuna?” Newal Siba ajo, “Ore kulo sirkon laa ile nkaji o laiguanani pee eked alotie, ore imukateni o lng'anayio naa inoo lbarnot naanya, ore enaisho oo sabibu naa ene lelo ooiterre to lpurkel pee eok.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Nejo olaiguanani, “Paa koree olayioni lo lkitok lino?” Nejoki Siba olaiguanani, “Ng'ura, etotona te Yerusalem; amu etejo ninye, ‘Taata aaisho nanu enkaji e Israel aashukoki enkitoria e papa lai.’ ”" 
2Samuel16:4 Neitoki olaiguanani ajoki Siba, “Ng'ura, ore nena apa pooki naara ine Mefiboshet naa nkuninono taata.” Nejo Siba, “Kaasai nanu; nchooki nanu manoto omom too nkonyek inono, olkitok lai olaiguanani.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Ore pee elotu Olaiguanani Daudi Bahurim, neipang'u te ine oltung'ani lo lmarei le nkaji e Saul, oji enkarna enye Shimei, olayioni le Gera; naa ore elotu neidikidik adekisho." 
2Samuel16:6 Nenang Daudi too soito; nenang sii isinkan pooki lo laiguanani Daudi, o ltung'ana pooki, o ltung'ana pooki kituaak ootii enkaina enye e tatene o ene kedienye." 
2Samuel16:7 Nejo Shimei ina kata edekisho, “Shomo, shomo, iyie oltung'ani lo sarge, iyie oltung'ani le pesho!" 
2Samuel16:8 Eitalakua Olaitoriani te iyie osarge pooki le nkaji e Saul, laa te wueji enye intoreishe; neishooyie Olaitoriani enkitoria apik atua enkaina o layioni Absalom. Toduaa ajo etii emutata ino shumata ino; amu ira oltung'ani lo sarge.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Neitoki Abishai olayioni le Seruiya ajoki olaiguanani, “Kainyoo pee edek ele dia otua olkitok lai olaiguanani? Nchooki nanu mashomo adungu endukuya enye.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Kake etejo olaiguanani, “Kaa nanu aabaikinore iyie, olayioni le Seruiya? Te nedekisho ninye te nkaraki natiaaka ninye Olaitoriani, ‘Tediaa Daudi,’ kaing'ae naa ojo, ‘Kainyoo pee itaasa iyie ena?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Nejoki Daudi Abishai o sinkan lenyena pooki, “Ng'ura, olayioni lai kewan oing'oru enkishui ai; kebaa elusoo ele tung'ani le Benchamen! Tung'uai ninye, naa nchoo ninye edekisho; amu Olaitoriani oishoo ninye." 
2Samuel16:12 Eidimayu pee eing'or Olaitoriani osina lai, naa kaalaaki nanu Olaitoriani too supati tele deket lena olong.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Neaku eshomo Daudi o ltung'ana lenyena te nkoitoi, ina kata eloito Shimei te murte o ldoinyo eipirakinore ninye, nedekisho eloito, nenang ninye too soito neisuaaki enterit." 
2Samuel16:14 Ore olaiguanani, o ltung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye, nebau enaurate Yordan; neyeng'iyeng'a ninye te ine." 
2Samuel16:15 Ore apa Absalom o ltung'ana pooki, ilewa le Israel nepuonu Yerusalem, o Ahitofel te nebo ninye." 
2Samuel16:16 Ore ake pee elotu Hushai, lo losho le Akito ilo shore le Daudi, enetii Absalom, nejoki Hushai Absalom, “Tobikoi olaiguanani! Tobikoi olaiguanani!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Nejoki Absalom Hushai, “Kena enkanyit ino to lchore lino? Kainyoo pee eitu ilo te nebo olchore lino?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Nejoki Hushai Absalom, “A-a; amu ore ilo otegelua Olaitoriani o kulo tung'ana o lewa pooki le Israel, olenye aaku nanu, naa te nebo ninye nanu abik." 
2Samuel16:19 Ore ake sii, kaing'ae nanu aisiaai? Aime ilo ayioni lenye? Ore apa anaa enaisiaayia papaai lino, kaaisiaai sii nanu iyie.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Nejoki Absalom Ahitofel, “Nchoru enkikoo ino; kaa iyiook kias?”" 
2Samuel16:21 Nejoki Ahitofel Absalom, “Shomo iyie atua enetii nkapiak e papaai lino, apa naatung'uayie ninye meing'ura enkaji; pee ening Israel pooki nchere intaa kewan olmang'atinta te papaai lino, ore inkaik e lelo pooki ootii te nebo iyie neitagoli.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Neaku etuunokito ninche Absalom olng'obor te nchumata enkaji; nelo Absalom atua enetii nkapiak e papaai lenye edolita Israel pooki. 
2Samuel16:23 Ore apa te nena olong'i eutaroto naishoru Ahitofel neikununo ake duoo anaa ororei le Nkai eikilikuanishoreki; keyanyiti apa oleng enkikoo e Ahitofel, Daudi o Absalom, pokira are." 
2Samuel17:1 Neponaa Ahitofel ajoki Absalom, “Nchooki nanu mategelu iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon o are, pee aipang nanu amir Daudi kewarie." 
2Samuel17:2 Naa kalotu nanu enetii ninye etanaure netashala, nanang'aki ninye atua enkiputukuny; ore iltung'ana ootii te nebo ninye neisik. Naar nanu olaiguanani ake," 
2Samuel17:3 naayaki nanu iltung'ana pooki enitii anaa esiankiki narikuni ang aarikoki olpayian lenye. Aing'oru iyie enkishui o ltung'ani obo ake, ore iltung'ana pooki neserianu.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Neitiship ina kikoo Absalom o lpayiani pooki le Israel. 
2Samuel17:5 Neitoki Absalom ajo, “Empoto sii ninye Hushai ilo Alkiti, pee kining iyiook enajo ninye.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Ore pee elotu Hushai enetii Absalom, nejoki Absalom ninye, “Nji eiroro Ahitofel ajo; amaa aikias iyiook anaa enautu ninye? Tinimikias iroro naa iyie.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Nejoki Hushai Absalom, “Ore tena kata enkikoo naishorua Ahitofel neme sidai.”" 
2Samuel17:8 Nejo Hushai, “Ore ake, iyiolo nchere ore papaai lino o ltungana lenyena naa ltung'ana magil netarasutua sii, anaa olng'arurumi otooruoki nkera enyena ti ong'ata. Ore etii ina, kaarriyia papaai lino to larrabal; meirura ninye kewarie te nebo iltung'ana." 
2Samuel17:9 Ng'ura, ore ninye taata eisudoyie ninye kewan te ngumoto nabo, arashu ti ae wueji. Naa ore ake pee ebatata embata oo ltung'ana te rasakinoto e dukuya, ore pooki ng'ae oning nejo, ‘Etii enkidaaroto atua lelo tung'ana oosujita Absalom.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Neaku ore ninye oltung'ani opi, oikununo oltau anaa oltau lo lng'atuny, nelepori tukul te nkuretisho; amu eyiolo Israel pooki nchere ore papaai lino naa oltung'ani magilani, naa ore lekua ootii te nebo ninye naa iltung'ana oopi." 
2Samuel17:11 Kake ore eutaroto ai naa nchere pee kinturrurrokino iyie Israel pooki, ebaiki Dan o metabaiki Beer-sheba, eba anaa osinyai le naiposha te nkumoi naa nchere, mirikoo iyie makewan olarrabal." 
2Samuel17:12 Neaku eikipuonu iyiook shumata ninye ti atua ewueji neba anaa enetumieki ninye, paa eikidoiki iyiook ninye te wueji neba anaa enetumieki nikidoiki iyiook ninye anaa enadoiki enkoileelio enkop; ore te ninye o ltung'ana pooki ootii te nebo ninye meing'uari ninye obo." 
2Samuel17:13 Naa tenelo ninye ajing atua enkanasa, neyau Isiraeli pooki nkeenta ina ang, nikinkurtutaa iyiook ina ang atua oerata o metaba anaa neaku metumi ninye osoit obo te ine.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Ore Absalom o ltung'ana pooki le Israel nejo, “Ore enkikoo e Hushai Olakiti naa eisidai alang enkikoo e Ahitofel.” Amu etegelua Olaitoriani pee emir enkikoo sidai e Ahitofel, pee etum Olaitoriani ayau entorroni shumata Absalom." 
2Samuel17:15 Nejoki Hushai Sadok o Abiata lelo apolosak, “Nji o nji eikoo Ahitofel Absalom o lpayiani le Israel; naa nji o nji nanu aikoo." 
2Samuel17:16 Ore naa taata erriwai ilkiliku entasioki entiaki Daudi, ‘Mirura taata iyie kewarie too lang'eta oo lkejek to lpurkel, kake togiroi tukul; meijori ake olaiguanani o ltung'ana pooki ootii te nebo ninye.’ ”" 
2Samuel17:17 Ore apa Yonatan o Ahima-aa neanyisho ninche te En-rogel; nelo apa enkaisiaayiani aliki ninche, nepuo ninche aaliki olaiguanani Daudi; amu meeta nchere pee etoduaki ninche ejing enkanasa." 
2Samuel17:18 Kake etoduaa ninche enkayioni, neliki Absalom; neaku eshomo ninche pokira are aasiooyo, nepuonu enkaji o ltung'ani te Bahurim, apa oata enchorro ti oriong e nkaji enye; nedoiki ninche atua." 
2Samuel17:19 Neya enkitok neimulumul enjing'et enchorro, neidapashaki enkano shumata enye; neaku meyiolounoyu toki." 
2Samuel17:20 Ore pee epuonu isinkan le Absalom enetii ina kitok ti aji, nejo ninche, “Koree Ahima-as o Yonatan?” Nejoki ina kitok ninche, “Eshomo ninche aalang ereyiet.” Ore ake pee esujaa ninche neitu einepu ninche, neshukunye ninche aapuonu Yerusalem." 
2Samuel17:21 Ore pee eidip ninche aatulusoi, neilepu lelo tung'ana te nchorro, nepuo aaliki Olaiguanani Daudi. Nejoki ninche Daudi, “Tudumunye, nilo asiooyo alang enkare; amu nji o nji eikoo Ahitofel te iyie.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Nedumunye Daudi, o ltung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye, nelang ninche Yordan; ore enasirie eitu eleku obo leitu elang Yordan." 
2Samuel17:23 Ore ake pee edol Ahitofel ajo eitu esuji enkikoo enye, neirot osikiria lenye, nelo ninye ang enkanasa enye makewan. Neitobir mbaa e nkaji enye, negor kewan; neye ninye, nenukari te nkurare e papaai lenye." 
2Samuel17:24 Neitoki Daudi alotu Mahanaim. Nelang Absalom Yordan te nebo iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli. 
2Samuel17:25 Netipika apa Absalom Amasa shumata enjore te rishata e Yoab. Ore apa Amasa naa olayioni lo ltung'ani oji Itra le Ishimail, apa oyama Abigail entito e Nahash, enkanashe e Seruiya, ng'otonye Yoab." 
2Samuel17:26 Ore israel o Absalom neitayu ilng'oborri te nkop o Gilead. 
2Samuel17:27 Ore pee elotu Daudi Mahanaim, ore Shobi olayioni le Nahash oing'uaa Raba oo lamori, o Makir olayioni le Amiel oing'uaa Lo-deba, o Barsilai o Lgiliadi ooing'uaa Rogelim," 
2Samuel17:28 neyau ndapashi, o ngirran, o motioo oo nkulukuok, o enkano, o shairi, o enkurma, naidong'o, o mpoosho, o ndaiki oo mpukunot pooki," 
2Samuel17:29 o enaisho, o engorno, o nkerra naaitung'uari eluaata te nkaraki Daudi o ltung'ana ootii te nebo ninye pee enya; amu etejo ninche, “Eeta iltung'ana esumash nenaura nenoto enkure ti ong'ata.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Neiturrur Daudi eiken iltung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo ninye, nepik shumata ninche ilarikok loo nkalifuni o larikok loo maa iip." 
2Samuel18:2 Neya Daudi enjore ematua nabo e uni ti abori erikore e Yoab, ematua nabo e uni ti abori erikore e Abishai olayioni le Seruiya, olalashe le Yoab, o ematua nabo e uni ti abori erikore e Itai Olgiladi. Nejoki olaiguanani lelo tung'ana, “Kalo sii nanu makewan aipang te nebo intae.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Kake etejo lelo lewa, “Mimpang iyie alo. Amu ti nikisik iyiook nemeshilaa ninche iyiook. Te neye olpisiai lang nemeshilaa ninche iyiook. Kake inyaanyukie iyie iip tomon katitin tomon lang. Metaa enaikash tinirriwaki iyie iyiook eretoto te nkanasa.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Nejoki olaiguanani ninche, “Ore enaba anaa enidolidolo aa sidai te intae naas nanu.” Neaku eitashe olaiguanani te mbata e kishomi, ina kata eruko enjore pooki aapuo too maa iip o too nkalifuni." 
2Samuel18:5 Neitanap olaiguanani Yoab o Abishai o Itai, ajoki, “Emintaas entorrono te nkaraki nanu ilo barnoti Absalom.” Nening iltung'ana pooki eisho olaiguanani nkitanapat lelo arikok pooki le njore tiaalo Absalom." 
2Samuel18:6 Neaku eipang'a enjore alo ong'ata aarare Israel; neitayuni olarrabal tiaatua entim e Efraim. 
2Samuel18:7 Nemiri iltung'ana le Israel teine isinkan le Daudi nesapuku enkidaaroto teine ina olong, iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam." 
2Samuel18:8 Neidapashakino olarrabal oriong enkop pooki; neinos entim iltung'ana kumok ina olong alang olalem. 
2Samuel18:9 Nediding Absalom isinkan le Daudi. Nekedito apa Absalom enyumpu enye, nelo enyumpu aim abori ilng'osil sapuki lo lchani neng'amari endukuya too lng'osil, neing'uari ninye eililio to lgam; ore ina nyumpu apa natii abori ninye nelo." 
2Samuel18:10 Nedol oltung'ani obo, neliki Yoab, “Ng'ura, atoduaa nanu Absalom eisiong'a to lchani.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Nejoki Yoab ilo tung'ani otiaka ninye, “Kainyoo itoduaa iyie ninye! Kainyoo naa pee eitu iosh ninye teine asulaki enkop? Anaata naaji ashipa nanu naaisho iyie mpisai tomon e nkosholai o enkimeita.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Kake etiaka ilo tung'ani Yoab, “Ore naaji ninye hoo te naning nanu te nkaina ai enkiroishi oo mpisai nkalifuni tomon e nkosholai, maitorioo nanu enkaina ai aar olayioni lo laiguanani; amu ore te ning'oto ang nikintanapa iyie olaiguanani o Abishai o Itai, ejo, ‘Ore te nkaraki nanu entomitu ilo barnoti Absalom.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Ore sii enkae, tenaa naaji kaitaasa nanu enkishui enye entorrono (nemetii entoki naisudoro to laiguanani) anaata indim iyie makewan atekepari.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Nejo Yoab, “Maitoki nanu aiturraa enkata aiko nji te nebo iyie.” Neyau ninye iremeta uni te nkaina enye neibitaki ninche oltau le Absalom, eton eishu to lchani." 
2Samuel18:15 Ore ilbarnot tomon anapak loo masaa o larrabal e Yoab, neman ninche Absalom neosh ninye near ninye metua." 
2Samuel18:16 Neosh Yoab emowuo nepuonu iltimito aashukunye te mirata oo Siraeli amu etomitikio Yoab ninche. 
2Samuel18:17 Neitayu ninche Absalom, nenang'aki ninye atua engumoto sapuk ti atua entim, nesot te shumata ninye osototi sapuk loo soito, neisik Israel pooki, pooki ng'ae alo enkang enye." 
2Samuel18:18 Ore apa Absalom eton eishu neitobiraka kewan eng'ape osoit natii atua oerata lo Laiguanani, amu etejo ninye, “Maata nanu olayioni oshum enkarna ai metadamuni.” Neipotie ina ng'ape kewan, naa keji enadamunyeki Absalom o metabaiki ena olong." 
2Samuel18:19 Nejo Ahimaas olayioni le Sadok, “Nchooki nanu maipirrio, pee aya ilomon sidain enetii olaiguanani nchere etalakua Olaitoriani ninye aitung'uaa engolon oo lmang'ati lenyena.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Nejoki Yoab ninye, “Miya iyie ilomon taata; indim iyie aawa lomon ae olong, kake ore taata miya iyie lomon, amu etua olayioni lo laiguanani.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Neitoki Yoab ajoki ilo tung'ani le Kushi, “Shomo tiaaki olaiguanani ina nitoduaa.” Neirrugo Olkushi te dukuya Yoab, nekuet." 
2Samuel18:22 Neitoki Ahimaas olayioni le Sadok ajoki Yoab, “Nchoo etiu enatiu, nchooki sii nanu maipirrio asujaa Olkushi.” Nejoki Yoab, “Kainyoo iyie pee impirri, olayioni lai, idolita ajo mitum iyie olerrinyore too lomon?”" 
2Samuel18:23 Nejo ninye, “Nchoo eaku enaaku, aipirri ake.” Neaku etiaka ninye, “Mpirrio.” Neipirri Ahimaas te nkoitoi e nkisiajata negiroo ilo Kushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Netonita apa Daudi te rishata oo nchomito are; neilep olarriponi alo shumata enkishomi te mbata e suntai, ore ake pee eshumu nkonyek enyena neing'orisho, nedol oltung'ani oipirri openy." 
2Samuel18:25 Neipotisho olarriponi neliki olaiguanani. Nejo olaiguanani, “Tenaa ninye ake, netii ilomon sidain enkutuk enye.” Nelotu ninye anyiku netaanu." 
2Samuel18:26 Nedol olarriponi likae tung'ani ekuetu; neipotisho olarriponi te nkishomi nejo, “Ng'ura ekuetu likae tung'ani openy!” Nejo olaiguanani, “Ilomon sidain sii ninye eyau.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Nejo olarriponi, “Amen ajo ore enkuetata ole dukuya naa kenyaanyukie enkuetata e Ahimaas olayioni le Sadok.” Nejo olaiguanani, “Oltung'ani supat ninye naa kelotu ayau ilomon sidain.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Neishiraki Ahimaas olaiguanani ajo, “Eseriani.” Neirrugo ninye te dukuya olaiguanani nebaiki enkomom enye enkop, nejo, “Meisisi Olaitoriani Enkai ino, laa ninye oishooyie lelo tung'ana ootekepari aarare olkitok lai olaiguanani!”" 
2Samuel18:29 Nejo olaiguanani, “Eisidain mbaa ti alo ilo barnoti Absalom?” Newalu Ahimaas ejo, “Ore pee eirriwaa Yoab osinka lino, nadol enking'oling'ol sapuk, kake mayiolo nanu ajo kainyoo.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Nejo olaiguanani, “Mbelekenyau, ntasho tene.” Neaku eitasho ninye te mbata, neitashe aitirring'a." 
2Samuel18:31 Naa ng'ura, nelotu Olkushiti; nejo ilo Kushiti, “Ilomon sidain to lkitok lai olaiguanani! Amu kitokordua iyie Olaitoriani ena olong aitung'uaa engolon e pooki apa likitudumakinote iyie.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Nejoki olaiguanani Olkushiti, “Eisidain mbaa ti alo ilo barnoti Absalom?” Newal ilo Kushiti ajo, “Metaa ilmang'ati lo lkitok lai olaiguanani, o pooki likidumakino aarare iyie te ntorroni, etiu anaa ilo barnoti.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Nenyamalu olaiguanani oleng, neilep alo olgilata otii shumata kishomi neishir; naa ore eloito, nejo ninye, “Oi olayioni lai Absalom, olayioni lai, olayioni lai Absalom! Enyor naa katua nanu te rishata ino, Absalom, olayioni lai, olayioni lai!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Netiaakaki apa Yoab, “Ng'ura, eishirita olaiguanani neisina te nkaraki Absalom.”" 
2Samuel19:2 Neaku eibelekenyaki enkishuroto e njore ina olong metaa olkiyioi too ltung'ana pooki; amu etoning'o iltung'ana ina olong, “Eisinanuo olaiguanani te nkaraki olayioni lenye.”" 
2Samuel19:3 Nepurrokino iltung'ana ina olong anaa enapurrokino iltung'ana atua ootukurrutua ekueta to larrabal. 
2Samuel19:4 Neimulumul olaiguanani enkomom enye, neishir olaiguanani to ltoilo sapuk, “Oi olayioni lai Absalom, Oi Absalom, olayioni lai, olayioni lai.”" 
2Samuel19:5 Nelotu Yoab atua aji enetii olaiguanani, nejo, “Imulumula iyie taata te nkurruna nkomomi oo sinkan linono pooki, laa ninche ooitajeutuo ena olong enkishui ino, o enkishui oo layiok linono o ntoyie inono, o enkishui oo nkituaak inono o nkapiak inono," 
2Samuel19:6 te nkaraki ninyor iyie lelo likimba iyie nimba lelo likinyor iyie. Amu imbalunye iyie taata nchere, ore larikok le njore o sinkan naa pesho te iyie; amu ore taata adol nanu ajo, tenaa naaji keishu Absalom nikituata iyiook pooki taata, anaata ishipa iyie." 
2Samuel19:7 Ore naa taata tudumunye, shomo auluo irorie te supato isinkan linono; amu anya nanu olmumai to Laitoriani, ti nimilo iyie, meton ninye oltung'ani obo te nebo iyie ena kewarie; naa keaku ena torrono oleng te iyie alang entorroni apa naewuo shumata iyie ebaiki kitisho ino o metabaiki taata.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Nedumunye olaiguanani, netonie olorika lenye te kishomi. Nelikini iltung'ana pooki aajoki, “Ng'ura, etonita olaiguanani te kishomi”; nepuonu iltung'ana pooki dukuya olaiguanani. Ore apa Israel neisika pooki tung'ani alo enkang enye." 
2Samuel19:9 Ore iltung'ana pooki neing'oling'ola ti atua iloshon pooki loo Siraeli ejo, “Etokordua iyiook olaiguanani aitung'uaa enkaina oo lmang'ati lang, neitajeuo iyiook aitung'uaa enkaina oo Lfilisti; ore taata neisika alo te nkop aing'uaa Absalom." 
2Samuel19:10 Kake ore Absalom, laa ninye kitubukokitio eilata aaput meitoria iyiook, netua to larrabal. Ore naa taata kainyoo pee mijojo intae ae ti alo enchukunoto o laiguanani?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Neirriwaa olaiguanani Daudi olkilikuai lenye enetii Sadok o Abiata lelo apolosak nejo, “Entiaaki ilpayiani le Yuda, ‘Kainyoo pee iakuku ile bayie te nchukokinoto o laiguanani enkaji enye, eidipa ororei le Israel pooki aeu enetii olaiguanani?" 
2Samuel19:12 Irara intae iltung'ana laainei, irara intae o loito lai o sesen lai; kainyoo pee iakuku ile siadi te nchukunoto o laiguanani?’" 
2Samuel19:13 Naa tiaaki Amasa, ‘Aimira iyie oltoilo lai o sesen lai? Nchoo eiko neijia Enkai te nanu, neitulusoo sii, ti nimira iyie olkitok le njore ai ebaiki taata te rishata e Yoab.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Neibelekeny ninye oltau loo ltung'ana le Yuda netiu anaa oltung'ani obo; neaku eirriwaitie ninche ororei enetii olaiguanani ejo, “Tushukunye, o sinkan linono pooki.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Neaku etushukunye olaiguanani alotu Yordan; nelotu Yuda Gilgal anang'are olaiguanani neriku olaiguanani aaitalang'u Yordan. 
2Samuel19:16 Ore Shimei olayioni le Gera, ilo lo losho le Benchamen, oing'uaa Bahurim, neisarisaru adou te nebo iltung'ana le Yuda pee enang'are olaiguanani Daudi;" 
2Samuel19:17 ore te nebo ninye netii iltung'ana enkalifu ooing'uaa Benchamen. Ore Siba osinka le nkaji e Saul, te nebo ilayiok lenyena tomon o imiet, o sinkan lenyena tikitam, nekuet aadoyio aapuo Yordan dukuya olaiguanani," 
2Samuel19:18 nelang ninche te lang'ata aariku enkaji o laiguanani, neas ninche ina nayieu ninye. Ore Shimei olayioni le Gera nebatata te dukuya olaiguanani, etaa kejo ninye pee elang Yordan," 
2Samuel19:19 nejoki olaiguanani, “Mincho olkitok lai aaibung nanu te ntorroni arashu edamu eneikuna osinka lino pee eas entorrono ina olong apa naing'uaa olkitok lai olaiguanani Yerusalem; mincho olaiguanani enap too ndamunot enyena." 
2Samuel19:20 Amu eyiolo osinka lino nchere ataasa nanu eng'oki; metaa, ng'ura, aewuo nanu ena olong, ole dukuya te nkaji pooki e Yosef otadowuo alotu anang'are olkitok lai olaiguanani.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Newaliki Abishai olayioni le Seruiya ajoki, “Aimeari Shimei metua tena, enkaraki netediaa ninye ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Kake etejo Daudi, “Kaa nanu aaporoki intae, intae ilayiok le Seruiya, nchere itiuu intae ena olong anaa ilmang'ati te nanu? Keari pooki ng'ae metua te Israel ena olong? Amu aimayiolo nanu nchere ara nanu ena olong olaiguanani le Israel?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Nejoki olaiguanani Shimei, “Miye iyie.” Neisho olaiguanani ninye olmumai lenye." 
2Samuel19:24 Ore Mefiboshet olayioni le Saul nedou alotu anang'are olaiguanani; neitu ninye eituku nkejek enyena, arashu eitobir olmunyei lenye, arashu eituku nkilani enyena, ebaiki enkolong apa nashomo olaiguanani o metabaiki enkolong naewuo ninye ashukunye te seriani." 
2Samuel19:25 Ore pee elotu ninye aing'uaa Yerusalem anang'are olaiguanani, nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Kainyoo pee eitu ilo te nebo nanu Mefiboshet?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Newal ninye ajo, “Olkitok lai, olaiguanani, aateleja apa nanu osinka lai; amu etiaka osinka lino ninye, ‘Irotokoki nanu osikiria, pee atum atakedo nalo te nebo olaiguanani.’ Amu olmaima osinka lino." 
2Samuel19:27 Etakaldayie ninye osinka lino to lkitok lai olaiguanani. Kake ore olkitok lai olaiguanani netiu anaa olmalaika le Nkai; taasa naa ina nidol aa sidai te iyie. 
2Samuel19:28 Amu ore enkaji pooki e papa lai netaa ninche iltung'ana ooishiaakino keeya te dukuya olkitok lai olaiguanani; kake itipika apa iyie osinka lino atua lelo oodaa te mesa ino. Kainyoo naa ai sipata naata nanu, naa, pee aishiraki olaiguanani?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Kainyoo pee iro oleng mbaa inono? Atudung'o nanu; ore iyie o Siba naa iorioro enkop.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Nejoki Mefiboshet olaiguanani, “Oi nchoo ninye eya pooki, etaa eewuo olkitok lai olaiguanani ang te seriani.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Ore apa Barsilai le Giliad netadowuo alotu aing'uaa Rogelim; nelo ninye te nebo olaiguanani Yordan, pee eitarioo ninye aitalang Yordan." 
2Samuel19:32 Ore apa Barsilai naa oltung'ani otamorua oleng, ilarin ntomoni isiet; te moruao neishoo apa ninye olaiguanani endaa eton etonita te Mahanaim; amu oltung'ani apa karsis ninye." 
2Samuel19:33 Nejoki olaiguanani Barsilai, “Wou talang'u te nebo nanu, naa kaagolie nanu iyie te nebo nanu te Yerusalem.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Kake etiaka Barsilai olaiguanani, “Kailarin aja nanu eton aishu, metaa kailep nanu alo te nebo olaiguanani Yerusalem?" 
2Samuel19:35 Ara nanu ena olong oloo larin ntomoni isiet; kaidim nanu atayiolo ajo kainyoo sidai naa kainyoo neme sidai? Keidim osinka lino aishamisham ina nanya ninye arashu enaok ninye? Keton nanu aidim ainining'o oltoilo loo lewa ooranyisho o nkituaak naaranyisho? Kainyoo naa pee eaku osinka lino olola oponari tolkitok lai olaiguanani? 
2Samuel19:36 Kelo osinka lino enkiti wueji te nkoitoi te lido kekun Yordan te nebo olaiguanani. Kainyoo pee aalaaki nanu olaiguanani to lerrinyore oba nji? 
2Samuel19:37 Aatasayia nchoo osinka lino eshuko, pee atum nanu atua ti atua enkanasa ai makewan, te netaaniki enkurare e papa lai o yieyio lai. Kake nele osinka lino Kimham; nchoo ninye elo te nebo olkitok lai olaiguanani; nintaas ninye enaba anaa enidol aa sidai te iyie.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Newaliki olaiguanani ajoki, “Kelo Kimham te nebo nanu, naa kaitaas nanu ninye enaba enaa enidol aa sidai te iyie; ore nena pooki niyieu iyie te nanu naaitaas nanu iyie.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Nepuo iltung'ana pooki aalang Yordan, nelo olaiguanani alang; neng'utut olaiguanani Barsilai nemayian ninye, neshuko ninye alo enkang enye kewan." 
2Samuel19:40 Nelo olaiguanani dukuya o meshomo Gilgal, nelo Kimham te nebo ninye; ore iltung'ana pooki le Yuda o lpisiai sii loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, neriku olaiguanani te nkoitoi enye." 
2Samuel19:41 Nepuonu iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli enetii olaiguanani, nejoki olaiguanani, “Kainyoo pee kitupurroitie iyie ilalashera lang iltung'ana le Yuda, neyau olaiguanani o enkaji enye aaitalang'u Yordan, o ltung'ana pooki le Daudi te nebo ninye?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Newaliki iltung'ana pooki le Yuda lelo tung'ana loo Siraeli ejo, “Enkaraki naa olo lgilata onyikita iyiook. Kainyoo naa pee igoro tena bae? Eikitadaate iyiook pooki te nkinyang'a olaiguanani? Anaa tenaa keishoo ninye iyiook ae enkishoroto?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Newaliki iltung'ana loo Siraeli iltung'ana le Yuda nejo, “Kiata iyiook irubat tomon to laiguanani, ore sii te Daudi nikiata iyiook nkumok aitulusoo intae. Kainyoo naa pee itemena intae iyiook? Aimikira iyiook ile dukuya ooiroro pee eshukuni olaiguanani?” Kake ore apa rorei loo ltung'ana le Yuda naa kepe alang irorei loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli." 
2Samuel20:1 Ore apa, netumi oltung'ani lemeeta tipat, oji enkarna enye Sheba, olayioni le Bikiri, lo losho le Benchamen neosh ninye emowuo nejo, “Mikiata iyiook erubata te Daudi nimikiata iyiook enjung'ore to layioni le Yese; shomo pooki tung'ani olng'obor lino, iyie Israel!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Neaku etung'uaitie iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli Daudi, nesuj Sheba olayioni le Bikiri; kake etusuja iltung'ana le Yuda olaiguanani lenye aakurraki ebaiki Yordan o metabaiki Yerusalem." 
2Samuel20:3 Nelotu Daudi enkaji enye te Yerusalem; neya olaiguanani nkapiak tomon apa naatung'uayie meing'ura enkaji, nepik ninche atua enkaji narripitoi, neitoti ninche, kake eitu elo atua enetii ninche. Neaku eikenoyioki ninche o metabaiki enkolong e keeya enye, etoni anaa nkolia." 
2Samuel20:4 Nejoki olaiguanani Amasa, “Mpoto iltung'ana le Yuda te nebo meetu enatii ti atua nkolong'i uni, nitii iyie ene makewan.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Neaku eshomo Amasa aipot Yuda; kake eimutie ninye aitogiroo enkata apa natudung'okoki apa nategelakaki ninye. 
2Samuel20:6 Nejoki Daudi Abishai, “Ore taata keitaas iyiook Sheba olayioni le Bikiri entorrono alang Absalom; iwa isinkan lo lkitok lino tusujai ninye, meisho ake kewan nkanas naasheta isunta too soito nepik iyiook enyamali.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Neipang aapuo aasujaa Abishai, Yoab o lelo Sheriti o lelo Peleti, o lelo tung'ana pooki magil; neipang ninche aapuo aaing'uaa Yerusalem aasujaa Sheba olayioni le Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:8 Ore etii ninche osoit sapuk otii Gibeon, nelotu Amasa anang'are ninche. Neishopito apa Yoab olkila lo ltung'ani le njore, ore ti oriong ninye netii enkimeita te nebo olalem ti atua enchashur eteenaki aakurraki te mpolos enye; ore eloito ninye dukuya nedoyio." 
2Samuel20:9 Nejoki Yoab Amasa, “Iserian iyie, olalashe lai?” Neibung Yoab Amasa olmunyei lenye te nkaina enye e tatene pee eng'utut ninye." 
2Samuel20:10 Kake eitu edol Amasa olalem otii enkaina e Yoab; neaku ninye etaremie Yoab ninye enkoshoke, nebuloki imonyit enyena enkop, neye ninye eitu eigilieki ai oshoto. Ore Yoab o Abishai olalashe lenye nesujaa Sheba olayioni le Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:11 Ore obo loo ltungana le Yoab, neitashe te mbata e Amasa nejo, “Ore olonyor Yoab anaa ole nkalo e Daudi, nchoo ninye esujaa Yoab.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Ore Amasa neirrag akurro tiaatua o sarge lenye te mpolos enkoitoi. Ore pooki ng'ae ogiroo, nedol ninye, neitashe; ore pee edol ilo tung'ani ajo eitasheito iltung'ana pooki, nenap ninye Amasa aitung'uaa enkoitoi apik ong'ata, nenang'aki enkila shumata ninye." 
2Samuel20:13 Ore ake pee eyae aaitung'uaa enkoitoi, nepuo iltung'ana pooki aasuj Yoab esujaa olayioni le Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:14 Neim Sheba atua iloshon pooki loo Isiraeli o meshomo Abel e Bet-maka, ore lelo Bikiri pooki neiturrurro, nesujaa ninye atua." 
2Samuel20:15 Ore lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootii te nebo Yoab nepuonu aang'adu ninye ti atua Abel e Bet-maka; neitayu ninche olkiu te mbata e nkang, neitashe ninye aipirakinore esuntai; neoshito apa ninche esuntai pee euroo." 
2Samuel20:16 Neipotisho enkitok ang'eni ti atua enkanasa ejo, “Entoning! Entoning! Entiaaki Yoab, ‘Wou ene, pee aatum nanu airorie iyie.’ ”" 
2Samuel20:17 Nelotu ninye ataaniki ninye; nejo ina kitok, “Ira iyie Yoab?” Newaliki ninye, “Ara nanu.” Neitoki ajoki ninye, “Toning'o irorei le sinka ino.” Newaliki ninye, “Aning'ito nanu.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Ore apa naa keji, ‘Nchoo ninche eikilikuanu enkoo te Abel’; neidip ninche olomoni." 
2Samuel20:19 Ara nanu nabo e nekua nemeetayie olomang'ati neisiligayu too Siraeli amaa ing'oru iyie aidaikie enkanasa naa ninye ng'otonye ti atua Israel; kainyoo pee iijoo iyie ina jung'ore o Laitoriani?” 
2Samuel20:20 Newal Yoab, “Kikoino maatalama ena nchere kaijoo nanu arashu aidaikie!" 
2Samuel20:21 Mesipa ina. Kake oltung'ani le nkop oo ldoinyo e Efraim, oji Sheba olayioni le Bikiri, oilepie enkaina enye aarare olaiguanani Daudi; enchoru ninye ake, naa kalo nanu aing'uaa enkanasa.” Nejoki ina kitok Yoab, “Ng'ura, eikinang'akini iyie endukuya enye aaitadooki te suntai.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Nelo ina kitok enetii iltung'ana pooki te ng'eno enye. Nedung'u ninche endukuya e Sheba olayioni le Bikiri nenang'u auluo enetii Yoab. Neosh ninye emowuo, neidapasha ninche aaing'uaa enkanasa, oltung'ani ake nelo enkang enye. Nerrinyo Yoab alo Yerusalem enetii olaiguanani." 
2Samuel20:23 Naa Yoab apa olkitok le njore pooki e Israel; ore Benaia olayioni le Yehoida naa ninye olkitok loo Lkereti o Lpelesi; 
2Samuel20:24 naa Adoram oitasheiki esiaai oo nkaik; naa Yehoshafat olayioni le Ahilud apa olaigeroni; 
2Samuel20:25 naa Shefa olasirani; naa Sadok o Abiata apa ilapolosak; 
2Samuel20:26 ore apa Ira ilo Yairiti naa olapolosani sii ninye le Daudi. 
2Samuel21:1 Netii apa olameyu too nkolong'i e Daudi too larin okuni, to lari ake o to lari, neing'oru Daudi enkomom o Laitoriani. Nejo Olaitoriani, “Etii entorroni o sarge shumata Saul o shumata enkaji enye, enkaraki natara Ilgibioni metuata.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Neaku eipoto olaiguanani Ilgibioni. Ore apa Ilgibioni neme iloo ltung'ana le Israel, kake ilo lpisiai loo Lamori; hoo neinosa iltung'ana le Israel olmumai pee eleku ninche, etonyuaa Saul ear ninche metuata te ina nyuata enye te nkaraki iltung'ana le Israel o Yuda." 
2Samuel21:3 Nejoki Daudi lelo Gibioni, “Kaa nanu aitaas intae? Naa kaji nanu aikunu enkipooto, pee itumutumu intae aatamayian enjung'ore o Laitoriani?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Nejoki ilgibioni ninye, “Mme mbae e nkosholai arashu sahabu erishata ang o Saul arashu enkaji enye; neme enaang pee kiar oltung'ani metua te Israel.” Nejo ninye, “Ijojo intae pee aitaas aa nanu intae?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Nejoki ninche olaiguanani, “Ore ilo tung'ani apa otumuta iyiook neitobir pee eidaikie iyiook, metaa mikitum iyiook ewueji ti atua enkop pooki oo Siraeli." 
2Samuel21:6 Nchoo meishori ilayiok lenyena oopishana pee kisiong iyiook ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani te Gibeon to ldoinyo lo Laitoriani.” Nejo olaiguanani, “Kaishoru nanu ninche.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Kake etelekua olaiguanani Mefiboshet, olayioni lo layioni le Saul, Yonatan, te nkaraki olmumai lo Laitoriani apa otii erishata ninche, o erishata e Daudi, o Yonatan olayioni le Saul." 
2Samuel21:8 Neya olaiguanani ilayiok oare le Rispa entito e Aia apa naa ninye etoikio Saul, Armon o Mefiboshet; o layiok imiet le Merab entito e Saul laa ninche etoikio Adriel olayioni le Barsilai ilo Meholati;" 
2Samuel21:9 neishooyo ninche apik atua nkaik oo Lgibioni; neilili ninche teilo doinyo te dukuya Olaitoriani, ore ninche pokira oopishana neidak te nebo. Neari ninche metuata too nkolong'i e dukuya e nkisampuare, te nkiterunoto e nkisampuare e shairi." 
2Samuel21:10 Neitoki Rispa entito e Aia aya ilkuniyiani neisalaashaki te ndapidapoi ebaiki enkiterunoto e nkisampuare o metaba anaa neshaiki enchan ninche eing'uaa shumata; neitu ninye eisho imotonyi o loing'ang'e epuonu aadoiki ninche te ndama, arashu ing'uesi e ong'ata te nkewarie." 
2Samuel21:11 Ore ake pee elikini Daudi enataasa Rispa entito e Aia ina apiani e Saul," 
2Samuel21:12 nelo Daudi aitayu iloik le Saul o loik lo layioni lenye Yonatan ti atua iltung'ana le Yabesh-gilead, apa ootupurroitie ninche to lkurroto otumoreki te Bet-shan, te ine apa neililiyie Ilfilisti ninche, te ina olong apa nataara Ilfilisti Saul metua te Gilboa;" 
2Samuel21:13 neyau ninye ailepunye te ine iloik le Saul o loik lo layioni lenye Yonatan; neiturrur ninche iloik le lelo apa oo lilioki. 
2Samuel21:14 Nenukaa ninche iloik le Saul o layioni lenye Yonatan te nkop e Benchamen te Sela, ti atua enkurare e Kish papaai lenye; neas ninche nena pooki naaitanapishe olaiguanani. Ore te siadi ina nening Enkai eomonokinoto te nkaraki enkop." 
2Samuel21:15 Nenyaakitia apa Ilfilisti aata olarrabal o Israel, nedoyio Daudi alo te nebo isinkan lenyena nearare ninche Ilfilisti; neilepunye Daudi." 
2Samuel21:16 Ore Ishbi-benob, obo apa le ishoi e lelo tung'ana sapuki laa shekeli iip o suyai enkirroishi e mpere enye, oenita olalem ng'ejuk, neing'oru pee ear Daudi metua." 
2Samuel21:17 Kake eewuo Abishai olayioni le Seruiya aretu, nerasaki ilo Filisti near ninye metua. Neitirrishaki iltung'ana le Daudi ninye aajoki, “Mintoki aekata iyie aipang alo te nebo iyiook olarrabal, pee miar ake olkilang'ilang'et le Israel.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Ore te siadi ena neitoki atii olarrabal apa o Lfilisti te Gob; neari metua Sibekai ol Husati Saf, laa ninye apa obo le ishoi e lelo tung'ana sapuki." 
2Samuel21:19 Neetae ake sii apa olarrabal o Lfilisti te Gob; neari Elhanan olayioni le Yaareoregim, le Betlehem near metua Goliat le Giti oba enchata e mpere enye anaa embokishi o lashetani." 
2Samuel21:20 Neetae sii apa olarrabal te Gas, teine apa netii oltung'ani sapuk oado oata lkimojik ile te pooki aina, o nkimojik ile te pooki keju, tikitam o ong'uan esiana e pooki; naa ole ishoi sii apa ninye e lelo tung'ana sapuki." 
2Samuel21:21 Ore ake pee edek ninye Israel near ninye metua Yonatan olayioni le Shimei, ilo alashe le Daudi." 
2Samuel21:22 Ore kulo oong'uan naa ile ishoi e lelo tung'ana apa sapuki ootii Gas; near Daudi te nkaina enye o te nkaina oo sinkan lenyena metuata. 
2Samuel22:1 Neirorie Daudi Olaitoriani irorei lele sinkolio ina olong natalakua ninye Olaitoriani aitung'uaa enkaina oo lmang'ati lenyena pooki, neitung'uaa enkaina e Saul." 
2Samuel22:2 Nejo ninye, “Olaitoriani endapidapoi ai, naa osempewuet lai," 
2Samuel22:3 Enkai ai, endapidapoi ai, laa ninye esarunoto ai elong'o ai o emowuo enjeunoto ai, oltim lai o enkisudoroto ai, Olaitajeunoni lai; kintajeu iyie nanu aitung'uaa entorroni." 
2Samuel22:4 Aipoto nanu Olaitoriani, laa ninye eishiaakino nerrepi, naaitajeuoki nanu too lmang'ati laainei." 
2Samuel22:5 Amu aamanita nanu ilopir le keeya, naapik nanu indoorot e ntorroni enkuretisho." 
2Samuel22:6 Aarrueshita nanu nkeenta e nemeneng'a, naaluaakino nanu irresheta le keeya." 
2Samuel22:7 Ore ti atua osina lai aipoto nanu Olaitoriani; Enkai ai nanu aipoto. Te nkaji enye etoning'o ninye oltoilo lai, nelotu enkishirata ai nkiyiaa enyena." 
2Samuel22:8 Kaae neikirikira enkop neigirigiro; ore ilkitamanyunot le shumata, neigirigiro, enkaraki natagore ninye." 
2Samuel22:9 Neilep empuruo alo keper eing'uaa nkumeishin enyena, nepuku enkima nanyaisho te nkutuk enye; nkuk naaishu naayupuyup epuku te ninye." 
2Samuel22:10 Neirrugu ninye shumata, nelotu adou; netii emisimisi nairrusha abori nkejek enyena." 
2Samuel22:11 Etakedo ninye enchumata olkerubi, nelo tiaai; etoduaaki ninye te nchumata oo naipuko osiwuo." 
2Samuel22:12 Eishoo enaimin metamana ninye, neman ninye nkatampo naairrusha o nkariak naaiturrurro." 
2Samuel22:13 Nepuku te ina wang'an natii dukuya ninye nkuk e nkima naayupuyup. 
2Samuel22:14 Etadara Olaitoriani te shumata, ore ilo otii shumata oleng neitayu oltoilo lenye." 
2Samuel22:15 Neirriwaa ninye mbaa, neidapash ninche; te nkiwuang'ata eterewa ninche." 
2Samuel22:16 Nedoli kop e naiposha, neirragieki ilkitamanyunot le nkop meirraga aaibalayu, te nkisikong'ata o Laitoriani, te nkutata e nkiyang'et oo nkumeishin enyena." 
2Samuel22:17 Neitoriou ninye te shumata naaya ninye nanu, naaitayu ti atua nkariak kumok." 
2Samuel22:18 Aatokordua te nkaina o lmang'atinta lai ogol, aitung'uaa lelo apa laaiba nanu; amu kegol apa oleng te nanu." 
2Samuel22:19 Eetuo ninche shumata nanu te nkolong ai e nyamali; kake etaa Olaitoriani enkigarakinoto ai. 
2Samuel22:20 Aayaua ninye nanu atua ewueji nelala; aatokordua amu kaashipakino ninye nanu. 
2Samuel22:21 Aaitaasa nanu Olaitoriani te risioroto e supatisho ai; te risioroto e ina nemeiduruk nkaik aainei aaitaasa ninye. 
2Samuel22:22 Amu aibung'a nkoitoi o Laitoriani, neitu nanu te ntorroni aing'uaa Enkai ai." 
2Samuel22:23 Amu ore nkitanapat enyena pooki netii dukuya nanu, ore too nkitanapat enyena neitu nanu aibelekenya." 
2Samuel22:24 Maata apa nanu eleyiata te dukuya ninye, narrip nanu kewan te ntorroni." 
2Samuel22:25 Metaa aaitaasa nanu Olaitoriani te risioroto e supatisho ai, te risioroto e ina nemaiduruk nanu too nkonyek enyena." 
2Samuel22:26 Ore te ilo oisiligayu nintodol kewan ajo isiligayu; ore to ltung'ani le meeta eleyiata nintodol kewan ajo miata eleyiata; 
2Samuel22:27 Ore te ilo shaat nintodol iyie kewan ajo ira sii iyie shaat, ore ilo lemeitoriori nintodol iyie ajo ira olo larrabal." 
2Samuel22:28 Ikordu iyie iltung'ana oobor, kake etii nkonyek inono shumata iloowuasa pee intadou ninche." 
2Samuel22:29 Ee, ira iyie oltaa lai, Olaitoriani, naa keitawang Enkai ai enaimin ai." 
2Samuel22:30 Ee, te iyie aidim nanu aidaikie oltim, naa te Nkai ai nanu aidim aida esuntai." 
2Samuel22:31 Ore ena Ai - kesipa enkoitoi enye; ore enkisiligata o Laitoriani naa keibalayu ajo kesipa; elong'o ninye te pooki ooing'oru enkisudoroto te ninye. 
2Samuel22:32 Amu kaing'ae Enkai, neme Olaitoriani? Naa kaing'ae endapidapoi, neme Enkai ang?" 
2Samuel22:33 Ore ena Ai naa enkisudoroto ai nagol, netaseriana ninye enkoitoi ai." 
2Samuel22:34 Neitagol ninye nkejek aainei anaa entarakuet, naagolie ninye mabatata too neeika." 
2Samuel22:35 Neiteng'en ninye nkaik aainei to larrabal, metaa keriu nkaik aainei enkawuo osuyai." 
2Samuel22:36 Kinchoo iyie nanu elong'o e njeunoto ino, naaitaa nanu eretoto ino kitok." 
2Samuel22:37 Kinchoo iyie nanu ewueji nelala too roruat aainei ti abori nanu, neitu eideketari nkejek aainei;" 
2Samuel22:38 atusujayie nanu ilmang'ati laainei naidaikie ninche, neitu ashukunye o metaba anaa neishunye ninche." 
2Samuel22:39 Aishua nanu ninche; ataremo nanu ninche aipang'ie, metaa eitu ninche edumunye; etabatatate ti abori nkejek aainei." 
2Samuel22:40 Amu kiterretena nanu te ngolon te nkaraki olarrabal; nincho iyie ilmang'ati laainei meimiso ti abori nanu. 
2Samuel22:41 Inchoo iyie ilmang'ati laainei maaibelekenyaki nkoriong'i enye, lelo laaiba nanu, naidaikie nanu ninche." 
2Samuel22:42 Neing'orisho, kake metii hoo obo oitajeu ninche; eishirakitia ninche Olaitoriani, kake eitu ninye ewaliki ninche." 
2Samuel22:43 Aidong'o nanu ninche naitunyoki ninche enkop anaa esarng'ab e nkoitoi. 
2Samuel22:44 Kintajeuo iyie nanu te lelo tung'ana ootekepari aakeshisho; kitipika nanu mataa endukuya oo loreren; ore apa iltung'ana leitu nanu ayiolou naaisiaai nanu. 
2Samuel22:45 Nepuonu iloo loreren naairr ugokino nanu; ore ake pee aaning'oo nanu, naairuk ninche nanu." 
2Samuel22:46 Etapalari iloo loreren, nepuonu eikirikira aaipang'u too nkisudorot enye." 
2Samuel22:47 Ekeishu Olaitoriani! Meisisi endapidapoi ai! Naa meitubulari enkitoo e Nkai ai, endapidapoi e njeunoto ai." 
2Samuel22:48 Ina Ai naaitalaaka nanu elap neitadou iltung'ana apik abori nanu," 
2Samuel22:49 laa ninye laaitayio nanu aitung'uaa ilmang'ati laainei; naailepie nanu te shumata ilmang'ati laainei, nikikordu iyie nanu aitung'uaa iltung'ana arruok." 
2Samuel22:50 Ore tena kaaisis nanu iyie, Olaitoriani, ti atua iloreren, naa karanyaki irrepat e nkarna ino." 
2Samuel22:51 Nkisulat sapuki eisho ninye olaiguanani lenye, neitodolu enyorrata nauno te ilo lenye obukokino eilata, Daudi o eishoi enye ntarasi.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Ore taata kulo ilomon le nkiting'oto le Daudi: Enkitanapata e Daudi, olayioni le Yese, enkitanapata e ilo tung'ani oilepieki aaya shumata, ilo obukokino eilata te Nkai e Yakobo, ilo oranyu isinkolioitin oomelok le Israel:" 
2Samuel23:2 “Eirorita enkiyang'et o Laitoriani te nanu, etii ororei lenye olng'ejep lai." 
2Samuel23:3 Eiroro Enkai e Israel, aatiaka endapidapoi e Israel: Te neitore oltung'ani te sipata iltung'ana, neitore te uriata e Nkai," 
2Samuel23:4 neitawang'aki ninche anaa ewang'an e nkakenya, anaa enkolong nawang'u tadekenya metii nkatampo, anaa enchan naisho nkujit metubulu te nkop." 
2Samuel23:5 Ee, aimeitashe enkaji ai aiko neijia te Nkai? Amu eitobira ninye te nebo nanu osotua loo ntarasi, eishiaakino too ntokitin pooki netagolieki. Amu aimeidimie ninye metubula eretoto ai pooki o eyieunoto ai?" 
2Samuel23:6 Kake ore iltung'ana lemeeta Enkai, netiu pooki anaa ilkiku ootanang'ayioki; amu meidimi aawaita te nkaina;" 
2Samuel23:7 kake ore ilo tung'ani oibung ninche neeta esekenkei o enchata e mpere, nemuti ninche tukul te nkima.”" 
2Samuel23:8 Kuna nkarn oo ltung'ana magil apa oata Daudi: Yosheb-bashebet Oltakenoni; kitok apa ninye te lelo okuni, eilepie ninye empere enye aarare iltung'ana iip isiet ootasesekuana ninye te nkata nabo." 
2Samuel23:9 Ore oliare te ninye ti atua iltung'ana okuni magil naa Eliesa olayioni le Dodo olayioni le Ahohi. Etii apa ninye te nebo Daudi ina kata pee eiturrurro Ilfilisti to larrabal, neshuko iltung'ana le Israel." 
2Samuel23:10 Nedumunye ninye near Ilfilisti o meteekunye enkaina enye, neibung'are enkaina enye o lalem lenye; neyau Olaitoriani enkisulata kitok ina olong; nerrinyunye iltung'ana aasujaa ninye pee epur lelo ootasesekuanaki." 
2Samuel23:11 Ore olosujita ninye naa Shama, olayioni le Agee Olharari. Eiturrurrote Ilfilisti te nebo te Lehi, te ine wueji apa nebore endaa nauno; neisik iltung'ana aailany Ilfilisti." 
2Samuel23:12 Kake etune ninye aitashe te mpolos e ine, nengoroo ine, nesesekuan Ilfilisti; neyau Olaitoriani enkisulata kitok." 
2Samuel23:13 Ore okuni loo ltung'ana tomoni uni gelunot nedoyio aapuo, nepuonu enetii Daudi etinyikua enkata e nkisampuare te nkapune e Adulam, ina kata apa etii oltim loo Lfilisti oerata le Refaim." 
2Samuel23:14 Netii apa Daudi ina kata atua enkisudoroto; ore oltim loo Lfilisti netii Betlehem. 
2Samuel23:15 Nejo te yieunoto, “Oi naaji aaisho nanu oltung'ani enkare naok naing'uaa olchorro le Betlehem otii embata kishomi!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Neim lelo tung'ana okuni magil atua ilng'oborri loo Lfilisti; neoku enkare te ilo shorro le Betlehem apa otii embata e kishomi, neyaki Daudi. Kake eitu eok; eibukoyie ninye abukoki Olaitoriani," 
2Samuel23:17 nejo, “Metalakuana te nanu, Olaitoriani, tenaa kaas nanu ena. Kaok nanu osarge loo ltung'ana ooshomo te mbatisho e nkishui enye?” Neaku meok ninye. Kuna baa etaasa lelo tung'ana okuni magil." 
2Samuel23:18 Ore apa Abishai, olalashe le Yoab, olayioni le Seruiya, naa ninye olarikoni le tomoni uni. Neilepie ninye enkaina enye aarare iltung'ana iip uni nesesekuan ninche, neisulie enkarna te lelo okuni." 
2Samuel23:19 Ninye apa eyioloi oleng te lelo tomoni uni, neaku olarikoni lenye; kake eitu eaku te lelo okuni." 
2Samuel23:20 Ore apa Benaia olayioni le Yohoida naa oltung'ani opi oleng le Kabseel, olaasani loo nkiasin sapuki; etara ntiamasini are e Moab. Eshomo sii apa adoyio near olng'atuny ti atua engumoto ina kata apa etadowuo empaso e nkirobi." 
2Samuel23:21 Nesesekuan olmisiri, oltung'ani le nkishaa. Eeta apa ilo Misiri empere te nkaina enye; kake eshomo Benaia enetii ninye te ng'udi enye, newuapaa empere te nkaina o Lmisiri, nesesekuan ninye tempere enye kewan." 
2Samuel23:22 Kuna baa etaasa Benaia olayioni le Yehoida, netum enkarna ti atua lelo tung'ana okuni magil." 
2Samuel23:23 Keyioloi apa oleng ti atua lelo tomoni uni, kake eitu elusoo te pokira okuni. Nepik apa Daudi ninye meitasheiki ilarripok lenyena." 
2Samuel23:24 Ore apa Asahel olalashe le Yoab naa obo le lelo tomoni uni; Elhanan olayioni le Dodo le Betlehem," 
2Samuel23:25 Shama le Harod, Elika le Harod," 
2Samuel23:26 Heles o Lpalti, Ira olayioni le Ikesh le Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiesa le Anatot, o Mebunai Olhushati," 
2Samuel23:28 Salmon Olhohi, o Maharai le Netofa," 
2Samuel23:29 o Heleb olayioni le Baana le Netofa, Itai olayioni le Ribai le Gibea loo Lbenchamen," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaia le Piraton, Hidai loo nong'ot e Gaash," 
2Samuel23:31 Abilabon le Lbati, Asmafet le Bahurim," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba le Shaalbon, olayioni le Yashen, Yonatan," 
2Samuel23:33 Shama Olharari, Ahiam olayioni le Sharar Olharari;" 
2Samuel23:34 Elifelet olayioni le Ahasbai le Maaka, Eliam olayioni le Ahitofel le Gilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Hesro le Karmel, Paarai Olabi," 
2Samuel23:36 Igal olayioni le Natan le Soba, Bani Olgadi," 
2Samuel23:37 Selek Olamori; Naharai le Be-erot, olanapani loo masaa o larrabal le Yoab olayioni le Seruiya," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira ilo Tiriti; Gareb ilo Tiriti; Uria ilo Hiti: 
2Samuel23:39 tomoni uni o opishana pooki. 
2Samuel24:1 Neitoki engoro o Laitoriani ayupuyup te nkaraki Israel, nepik Daudi endamunoto te nkaraki ninche, ejo, “Shomo nkena Israel o Yuda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Neaku etiaka olaiguanani Yoab o lkituaak le njore, apa ootii te nebo ninye, “Enchom atua iloshon pooki le Israel, ebaiki Dan o metabaiki Beer-sheba, ninkenikene iltung'ana, pee atum atayiolo esiana oo ltung'ana.”"
