2Samuel24:3 Kake etiaka Yoab olaiguanani, “Metoponai Olaitoriani Enkai ino iltung'ana katitin iip aa kumok anaa enaba, eton edolita nkonyek o lkitok lai olaiguanani; kake kainyoo pee eshipakino olkitok lai olaiguanani ena bae?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Kake etune ororei lo laiguanani te Yoab o too lkituaak le njore. Neaku eshomo Yoab o lkituaak le njore te ine netii olaiguanani aapuo aaiken iltung'ana. 
2Samuel24:5 Nelang ninche Yordan, neiteru abaiki Aroer, o ebaiki ina anasa natii atua empolos o erata, te nkalo e Gad nelo Yaser." 
2Samuel24:6 Neitoki aapuonu Gilead, o Kadesh ti atua enkop oo Lhiti; nepuonu ninche Dan, nepuo te Dan nemanaa aapuo Sidon," 
2Samuel24:7 nepuonu enkisudoroto e Turo o nkang'itie oo Lhafi o Lkanaani; neipang ninche aapuo Negeb e Yuda te Beer-sheba. 
2Samuel24:8 Neaku ore ake pee eidip ninche aashom enkop pooki, nepuonu ninche Yerusalem te nkiting'oto oo lapaitin ooudo o nkolong'i tikitam." 
2Samuel24:9 Neisho Yoab esiana e nkikenata oo ltung'ana olaiguanani: ore ti atua Israel netii nkalifuni iip isiet oopi oo tushututua ilalema, ore iltung'ana le Yuda naa nkalifuni iip imiet." 
2Samuel24:10 Neitanyamal Daudi oltau lenye ena kata eidipa aikena iltung'ana. Nejoki Daudi Olaitoriani, “Ataasa nanu eng'oki sapuk tena nataasa. Kake ore taata, Olaitoriani, aatoomono nanu iyie, iwuang'ie entorroni to sinka lino; amu ataasa nanu te modai.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Ore ake pee einyototo Daudi tadekenya, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii oloiboni oji Gad, ilo aduani le Daudi, ejo," 
2Samuel24:12 “Shomo tiaaki Daudi, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ntokitin uni nanu aaisho; tegelu nabo te ninche, pee aatum aitaasa iyie.’ ”" 
2Samuel24:13 Neaku eewuo Gad enetii Daudi neliki ninye, nejoki ninye, “Kailarin okuni lo lameyu oopuonu atua enkop ino. Arashu impirri iyie ilapaitin okuni te dukuya ilmang'ati linono kisujita ninche? Arashu te neaku nkolong'i uni ino lmeitai ti atua enkop ino? Nguanare taata, nidut ewalata nashukoki nanu ilo laairiwua.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Nejoki Daudi Gad, “Atii nanu atua osina sapuk; matabatatakinoto iyiook enkaina o Laitoriani, amu kitok olng'ur lenye, kake mikincho abatatakino enkaina e tungani.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Neaku eirriwaka Olaitoriani Israel olmeitai ebaiki tadekenya o metabaiki enkata apa natudung'uoki; neye te ine iltung'ana ebaiki Dan o metabaiki Beer-sheba nkalifuni ntomoni naapishana. 
2Samuel24:16 Ore ake pee eitorioo olmalaika enkaina enye aing'orie Yerusalem pee eidaikie, neirridu Olaitoriani ina torroni, nejoki ilo malaika apa oasita ina mutata ti atua iltung'ana, “Eidipe; tushuko taata enkaina ino.” Netii apa ilo malaika lo Laitoriani embata ewueji neidong'ishoreki e Arauna Olyebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Neirorie Daudi Olaitoriani ina kata pee edol ilo malaika apa oarita iltung'ana, nejo, “Oi, ataasa nanu eng'oki, nataasa entorroni; kake amaa kuna kerra, kaa etaasa ninche? Nchoo enkaina ino, aatoomono, aar nanu near enkaji e papa.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Nelotu Gad ina olong enetii Daudi, nejoki ninye, “Shomo ilepa, tataaniki olperere lo lasar enetii Olaitoriani te ine wueji neidong'ishoreki e Arauna o Ljebusi.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Neaku eshomo Daudi ailep to rorei le Gad, anaa enaitanapishe olaiguanani." 
2Samuel24:20 Ore ake eing'orisho Arauna airrugo, nedol olaiguanani o sinkan lenyena epuonu aayiaya ninye; nelo Arauna, neserem olaiguanani neitabaiki enkomom enye enkop." 
2Samuel24:21 Nejo Arauna, “Kainyoo pee eewuo olkitok lai olaiguanani enetii osinka lenye?” Nejo Daudi, “Pee ainyiang'u ene wueji neidong'ishoreki te iyie pee atum ateshetaki olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani, pee etumi aaiwuang'ie olmeitai too ltung'ana.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Nejoki Arauna Daudi, “Nchoo olkitok lai olaiguanani eya neishoru ina nadol aa sidai te ninye; noolo ilmong'i lo lasar opejori, ore ntokitin naaidong'ishoreki o nkeek oo lmong'i naa keaku ilkeek." 
2Samuel24:23 Ore kuna pooki, olaiguanani, eishoo Arauna olaiguanani.” Nejoki Arauna olaiguanani, “Mikitang'amai iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Kake etiaka olaiguanani Arauna, “A-a, kake kainyiang'u nanu te iyie te nkinyang'a; maishoru nanu olasar opejori to Laitoriani eitu nanu ainosie toki.” Neaku einyiang'ua Daudi ine wueji neidong'ishoreki, o lmong'i te shekeli onom e nkosholai." 
2Samuel24:25 Neshetaki Daudi te ine Olaitoriani olperere lo lasar, neishoru olasar opejori o lasar le seriani. Neaku etoning'o Olaitoriani eomonokinoto enkop, neiwuang'ieki olmeitai aaitung'uaa Israel." 
1Kings1:1 Etamorua apa olaiguanani Daudi neaku oloo larin kumok. Ore hoo ninye teneimulumuli too ilkilani nemeirouaju osesen. 
1Kings1:2 Ore enkaraki ina etiakita isinkan lenyena, “Nchoo eing'urakini enkiti siankiki olkitok lai olaiguanani, naa nchoo ninye eboitare olaiguanani, pee egolie ninye; nchoo ninye eirrag to lgoo lino pee etum olkitok lai olaiguanani airouaja.”" 
1Kings1:3 Neaku eing'orutua ninche esiankiki sidai te nkishiaa tiatua enkop pooki e Israel, nepuo aatum Abishag e Shunam, neyaki ninye olaiguanani." 
1Kings1:4 Eisidai apa ina siankiki oleng te nkishiaa, neaku ninye enkaing'urani o laiguanani neisiaai ninye; kake eitu eboitare olaiguanani ninye." 
1Kings1:5 Ore apa Adonija olayioni le Hagit neitaa kewan kitok ejo, “Kaaku nanu olaiguanani.” Neitobiraki kewan ngarrin oo mbartan, o lakedok loo mbartan, o ltung'ana onom oo kuet te dukuya ninye." 
1Kings1:6 Neitu aekata eitagor menye ninye eikilikuan ajoki, “Kainyoo pee itaasa ena o ena?” Oltung'ani sii apa sidai ninye te nkishiaa, naa ninye etoiuoki eirukurukore Absalom." 
1Kings1:7 Eiroro ninche o Yoab olayioni le Seruyia tenebo Abiata olapolosani; nesujaa ninche Adonija neretu ninye. 
1Kings1:8 Kake ore Sadok ilo apolosani o Benaia olayioni le Yehoida, o Natan oloiboni le Nkai, o Shimei, o Rei o lelo tung'ana le Daudi magil nemetii ninche enkalo e Adonija." 
1Kings1:9 Nepolos Adonija ilkerra, o lmong'i o ntokitin naapir te ndapidapoi oo lasuriaa, te mbata e Norogel, neitoomon ninye ilalashera lenyena pooki, lelo ayiok lo laiguanani, o lelo tung'ana pooki kituaak le Yuda." 
1Kings1:10 Kake eitu ninye eitoomon Natan oloiboni le Nkai arashu Benaia arashu lelo tung'ana magil lo lalashe lenye Solomon. 
1Kings1:11 Neitoki Natan ajoki Betsheba ngotonye Solomon, “Keitu iyie ining ajo etaa Adonija olayioni le Hagit olaiguanani nemeyiolo Daudi olkitok lang?" 
1Kings1:12 Ore naa taata wou maaishoo nanu eutaroto, pee itum aitajeu enkishui ino makewan o enkishui o layioni lino Solomon." 
1Kings1:13 Shomo nabo kata tijing'aki olaiguanani Daudi, nijoki ninye, ‘Keitu apa iyie olkitok lai olaiguanani, inos olmumai te sinka ino, ijo, Solomon olayioni lino oitoreisho te siadi nanu, naa ketonie ninye olorika lai le nkitoo? Kainyoo naa pee etaa Adonija olaiguanani?’”" 
1Kings1:14 Ore eton irorie olaiguanani, “najing'u sii nanu te siadi iyie naitisip irorei linono.”" 
1Kings1:15 Neaku eshomo Betsheba enetii olaiguanani tiatua enkaji enye, netamorua olaiguanani oleng, o Abishag ina e Shunam neisiaaita olaiguanani." 
1Kings1:16 Neirrugo Betsheba aisho olaiguanani enkanyit, nejoki olaiguanani, “Kainyoo iyieu?”" 
1Kings1:17 Nejoki ninye, “Olkitok lai, inosie apa esinka ino olmumai, to Laitoriani Enkai ino, ijo, ‘Solomon olayioni lino oitoreisho tesiadi nanu, naa ketonie ninye olorika lai le nkitoo.’" 
1Kings1:18 Ore naa taata, ng'ura, Adonija ninye olaiguanani, hoo nimiyiolo ninye iyie olkitok lai olaiguanani." 
1Kings1:19 Etopolosa ninye ilmong'i, o ntokitin naapir o nkerra kumok, neitoomono ninye ilayiok pooki lo laiguanani, Abiata ilo apolosani o Yoab olarikoni le njore, kake ore Solomon osinka lino eitu eitoomon." 
1Kings1:20 Ore naa taata olkitok lai olaiguanani, iyie eing'orita nkonyek pooki oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli pee iliki ninche ololo atonie olorika le nkitoo lo lkitok lai olaiguanani tesiadi ninye." 
1Kings1:21 Amu eidimayu naa tenelo olkitok lai olaiguanani aaku tenebo loo menye naaikenari nanu o Solomon olayioni lai anaa ilaitarruorrok.” 
1Kings1:22 Ore eton ninye eirorie olaiguanani, nejing'u Natan oloiboni le Nkai." 
1Kings1:23 Nejoki ninche olaiguanani, “Nele Natan oloiboni le Nkai.” Ore pee ejing'u ninye alotu aitashe te dukuya olaiguanani, neirrugo ninye te dukuya olaiguanani, neitabaiki enkomom enye enkop." 
1Kings1:24 Nejo Natan, “Olkitok lai olaiguanani, itejo iyie, ‘Adonija oitoreisho te siadi nanu, naa kelo atonie olorika lai le nkitoo?’" 
1Kings1:25 Amu eshomo ninye ena olong apolos ilmong'i, o ntokitin naapir o nkerra kumok, neitoomono ilayiok pooki lo laiguanani, Yoab olarikoni le njore, o Abiatar olapolosani; naa ng'ura edaa ninche neokisho te dukuya ninye, nejo ‘Tobikoi olaiguanani Adonija!’" 
1Kings1:26 Kake ore nanu osinka lino, o Sadok olapolosani o Benaia, olayioni le Yehoida, o sinka lino Solomon, neitu ninye eitoomon." 
1Kings1:27 Kolkitok lang olaiguanani oyaua ena bae neitu iyie iliki isinkan linono nchere kalo otonie olorika le nkitoo lo lkitok lai te siadi ninye. 
1Kings1:28 Neitoki olaiguanani Daudi awalu nejo, Empotokoki Betsheba.” Neaku eewuo ninye enetii olaiguanani, neitashe te dukuya olaiguanani." 
1Kings1:29 Neinos olaiguanani olmumai, ejo, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, laa ninye laatokordua oltau lai te pooki mang'atinta," 
1Kings1:30 anaa enainosa olmumai te iyie te nkarna o Laitoriani, e Nkai e Israel, ajo Solomon olayioni lino oitoreisho te siadi nanu, naa ketonie ninye olorika lai le nkitoo te rishata ai; neijia ake sii aiko ena olong.”" 
1Kings1:31 Neirrugo Betsheba aitabaiki enkomom enye enkop, neisho olaiguanani enkanyit, nejo, “Metobikoi olkitok lai olaiguanani Daudi ntarasi!”" 
1Kings1:32 Nejo olaiguanani Daudi, “Empotokoki Sadok olapolosani, o Natan oloiboni le Nkai o Benaia olayioni le Yehoiada.” Neaku eetuo ninche dukuya olaiguanani." 
1Kings1:33 Nejoki olaiguanani ninche, “Ewaita tenebo intae isinkan lo lkitok linyi, ninchosho Solomon olayioni lai metakedo enyumpu ai nintadou ninye te Gibon;" 
1Kings1:34 ninchosho Sadok olapolosani o Natan oloiboni le Nkai metubukoki ninye eilata aaput metaa olaiguanani le Israel; nintokiki aaosh emowuo, nijojo, tobikoi olaiguanani Solomon!" 
1Kings1:35 Nintokiki taa aailepu aasuju ninye, nelotu ninye atonie olorika lai le nkitoo, amu ninye oaku olaiguanani te rishata ai; nategelua nanu ninye meitoria Israel o Yuda.”" 
1Kings1:36 Newaliki Benaia olayioni le Yehoida olaiguanani ajo “Esai! Meiruko Olaitoriani lai, Enkai anaa enatii Olaitoriani tenebo olkitok lai olaiguanani, metotiwuo neija." 
1Kings1:37 Ore anaa enatii Olaitoriani tenebo olkitok lai olaiguanani, metaa sii tenebo Solomon, neitaa kitok olorika lenye le nkitoo aitalang olorika le nkitoo lo lkitok lai Daudi!”" 
1Kings1:38 Neaku eshomo Sadok olapolosani o Natan oloiboni le Nkai o Benaia olayioni le Yehoida o lkeresi o lpelesi aaitaked Solomon enyumpu o laiguanani Daudi neyau ninye Gibon. 
1Kings1:39 Ore teine neya Sadok olapolosani olmouo le ilata to lng'obor nebukoki Solomon aput. Neitoki ninche aaosh emowuo; nejo iltung'ana pooki tobikoi olaiguanani Solomon. 
1Kings1:40 Neilep iltung'ana pooki aasujaa ninye, ekutita ndulen, neng'ida te nchipai sapuk, ometaa keikirikirie ndarat enye enkop." 
1Kings1:41 Nening Adonija o lomon pooki ootii tenebo ninye ina shipai o osirua. Ore pee ening Yoab oltoilo le ntarumpeta nejo, “Kainyoo ele odoo te nkanasa?”" 
1Kings1:42 Ore eton eirorita, ng'ura, nelotu Yonatan olayioni le Abiata; nejo Adonija, “Tijing'u, amu ira iyie oltung'ani le tipat oyau ilomon.”" 
1Kings1:43 Newaliki Yonatan Adonija ajoki, “A-a amu eitaa olkitok lang olaiguanani Daudi Solomon olaiguanani;" 
1Kings1:44 neirriwayie olaiguanani tenebo ninye Sadok olapolosani, o Natan oloiboni le Nkai, o Benaia olayioni le Yehoida o Lkeresi o lLpelesi, neishoo ninche ninye metakedo enyumpu o laiguanani." 
1Kings1:45 Netubukokitio Sadok olapolosani o Natan oloiboni le Nkai ninye eilata aaput aaitaa olaiguanani te Gihon, neilepa ninche aapuo teine eng'ida. Neaku enkanasa enkilepilep. Ena kilepilep ina nitoning'oitie." 
1Kings1:46 Etonita taata Solomon to lorika le nkitoo. 
1Kings1:47 Ore sii eetuo ilaisiaayiak lo laiguanani aaisho enashe olkitok lang Daudi ejo, ‘Eishoo Enkai ino enkarna e Solomon metoning'oyu alang enkarna ino, neitaa olorika lenye le nkitoo kitok alang olino.’ Neirrugo olaiguanani te ndapash." 
1Kings1:48 Neitoki sii olaiguanani ajo, ‘Meisisi Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, laa ninye oishoo obo le ishoi ai metotonie olorika lai le nkitoo ena olong, adolita too nkonyek aainei.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Neikirikira ilomon pooki le Adonija to lkirutoto, nedumunye, nelo ake oltung'ani aim enkoitoi enye makewan." 
1Kings1:50 Neureyu Adonija Solomon, nedumunye ninye, neibung imouarak olperere lo lasar." 
1Kings1:51 Nelikini Solomon aajoki, “Ng'ura keure Adonija olaiguanani Solomon; amu eji eibung'a ninye imouarak o lperere lo lasar, nejo, ‘Nchoo olaiguanani Solomon eng'as ainos olmumai nchere mesesekuan ninye osinka lenye to lalem.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 Nejo Solomon, “Teneitodolu ninye neitisip nchere oltung'ani le tipat, meiseyieki ninye olpapita hoo obo le ndukuya enye.”" 
1Kings1:53 Neaku eirriwayie olaiguanani Solomon olkilikuai neyauni ninye aaitung'uaa olperere lo lasar. Nelotu ninye airrugokino Solomon aisho ninye enkanyit; nejoki Solomon ninye, “Shomo enkaji ino.”" 
1Kings2:1 Ore ake pee eaku keye Daudi, neitanap Solomon olayioni lenye; ejo" 
1Kings2:2 “Etataana enkata ai pee alo aye. Ntagoluoyu niaaku olee," 
1Kings2:3 nimbung nkitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai ino, aim inkoitoi enyena, nimbung nkiguanat enyena, o nkitanapat enyena, o nkikoot enyena, o enchakenisho enye, anaa enaigero too nkitanapat e Musa, pee itum atudupayu te pooki niaas o te pooki wueji niim;" 
1Kings2:4 pee etum Olaitoriani aitabai ina apa nairoro tialo nanu ejo, ‘Teneing'or ilayiok linono nkoitoi enye, aapuo te dukuya nanu too sipat, too ltauja lenye pooki o te nkishui enye, melai aekata te iyie oltung'ani otonie olorika le nkitoo too Siraeli’." 
1Kings2:5 “Ore ake sii iyiolo enaaitaasa nanu Yoab olayioni le Seruyia, ina naitaasa ilkituaak oare le njore oo Siraeli, Abna olayioni le Neer o Amasa olayioni le Yeser, oo tasesekuana ninye. Eitalakua ninye te nkata e seriani, elap o sarge apa oibukoyioki to larrabal, nepik osarge lemeeta entioto enkimeita natii empolos ai, nepik inamuka naatii nkejek aainei." 
1Kings2:6 Entaasisho naa nabo kata te risioroto e ng'eno inyi, kake emincho ina lukunya enye naibor edoiki enemeneng'a te seriani." 
1Kings2:7 Kake ntoduaa esupatisho lelo ayiok le Barsilai le Gilead, nincho ninche eaku tenebo lelo oodaa te Misa ino; amu teina supatisho aatang'amutua ninche nanu apa pee aisik ailany Absalom olalashe lino." 
1Kings2:8 Netii sii tenebo iyie Shimei olayioni le Gera, le Benchamen oing'ua Bahurin, laa ninye apa laatediaa to ldeket torrono teina olong apa nashomo Mahanaim; kake ore ake pee aalotu anang'are nanu to lkeju le Yordan, nainosaki nanu ninye olmumai to Laitoriani, ajoki, ‘Maar nanu iyie tua to lalem.’" 
1Kings2:9 Ore naa taata eminkenaa ninye aajo meeta entioto, naa ore amu ira iyie oltung'ani ng'en; iyiolo iyie enilo aitaas, niyau iyie ina lukunya enye naibor enemeneng'a etii osarge.”" 
1Kings2:10 Neirura Daudi anaa loo menye, aye, nenukari ninye te nkanasa e Daudi." 
1Kings2:11 Ore apa enkata naitoreisho Daudi te Israel naa ilarin artam eitoreishe ninye ilarin tomoni uni oo kuni te Yerusalem. 
1Kings2:12 Neaku etotona Solomon to lorika le nkitoo le Daudi papaai lenye ore enkitoo enye neitashe auno. 
1Kings2:13 Neitoki Adonija olayioni le Hagit alotu enetii Betsheba ngotonye Solomon. Nejoki ninye, “Aite seriani iewuo iyie?” Nejo ninye “Teseriani.”" 
1Kings2:14 Neitoki ajo, “Aata embae naaliki iyie.” Nejoki ninye, “Tolimu.”" 
1Kings2:15 Nejo ninye, “Iyiolo iyie ajo enaai apa enkitoria, naa nanu apa eisiligita Israel pooki pee aitore ninche; kake eibelekenye enkitoria neaku eno lalashe lai, amu enenye apake eing'uaa enetii Olaitoriani." 
1Kings2:16 Ore naa taata aata embae nabo naomonu te iyie, nimikianyaki iyie nanu.” Nejoki Betsheba ninye, “Tolimu.”" 
1Kings2:17 Nejo ninye, “Aatoomono nkilikuana olaiguanani Solomon, amu mikianyaki ninye, pee aaisho nanu Abishag e Shunam maitaa enkitok ai.”" 
1Kings2:18 Nejo Betsheba, “Eisidai; kairorie olaiguanani te rishata ino.”" 
1Kings2:19 Neaku eshomo Betsheba enetii olaiguanani Solomon, pee eirorie ninye te rishata e Adonija. Nedumunye olaiguanani anang'are ninye, neirrugokino ninye, neitoki aton to lorika lenye le nkitoo, neitoki aipotu olorika meyakini ngotonye olaiguanani, neton ninye te nkaina enye e tatene." 
1Kings2:20 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Aata enkiti omonunoto nabo naaomon iyie, mikianyaki iyie nanu.” Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Tolimu eomonunoto ino yieyio lai, amu maanyaki nanu iyie.”" 
1Kings2:21 Nejo ninye, “Nchoo Abishag e Shunam meishori Adonija olalashe lino meyama.” Nejoki olaiguanani Solomon ngotonye, “Paa kainyoo peyie aa Abishag e Shunam iomonu meishori Adonija?" 
1Kings2:22 Toomonoki sii ninye enkitoria; amu olalashe lai botor ninye, ore too matuan enyena netii Abiatar olapolosani o Yoab olayioni le Seruyia.”" 
1Kings2:23 Neitoki olaiguanani Solomon ainos olmumai to Laitoriani ejo, “Maaitaasa Olaitoriani ena naaitulus tenemeinosieki ele rorei enkishui e Adonija!" 
1Kings2:24 Ore naa taata anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, laa ninye laaitasheyie nanu aitagol, naaitoton nanu to lorika le Daudi papaai lai, laa ninye laaitaa nanu olmarei, anaa apa enaisiligishore, keari Adonija metua ena olong.”" 
1Kings2:25 Neaku eirriwayie olaiguanani Solomon Benaia olayioni le Yehoida; neosh ninye anang'ie enkop, neye ninye." 
1Kings2:26 Ore tialo Abiatar olapolosani, nejo olaiguanani, “Shomo Anasot, enkop inyi amu keeya nikiririkino iyie. Kake maar nanu iyie tua tena kata, amu itanapa apa osanduku lo Laitoriani te dukuya Daudi papaai lai, o enkaraki sii nitang'arie apa papa isinaitin lenyena pooki.”" 
1Kings2:27 Neaku etaarayie Solomon Abiatar pee meitoki aaku olapolosani lo Laitoriani, neitabaya ororei lo Laitoriani apa oiroro ninye eipirta enkaji e Eli te Shilo." 
1Kings2:28 Ore ake pee ebaiki ilomon Yoab, amu etijing'a apa Yoab Adonija enkoriong, hoo neitu ejing Absalom, neisikaki Yoab olng'obor lo Laitoriani nelo aibung imouarak o lperere lo lasar." 
1Kings2:29 Ore ake pee elikini olaiguanani Solomon, nchere, “Eisika Yoab alo atua olng'obor lo Laitoriani, naa ng'ura, etii ninye embata olperere lo lasar.” Neirriwaa Solomon Benaia olayioni le Yehoida, ejo, “Shomo toosho ninye tanang'ie enkop.”" 
1Kings2:30 Neaku eshomo Benaia atua ilo ng'obor lo Laitoriani nejoki ninye, “Eitanapishe olaiguanani ejo, ‘Tupuku’ ” kake etejo ninye, “A'a tene nanu aye.” Neitoki Benaia ayaki olaiguanani olomoni ajoki, “Nji ejo Yoab naa ena einosa olmumai ajo.”" 
1Kings2:31 Newaliki olaiguanani ninye ajoki, “Taasa anaa enatejo ninye toosho ninye tanang'ie enkop, nilo anukaa; pee eiwuang'ieki te nanu o te nkaji e papaai lai entorroni o sarge lemeeta entioto oibukoyie Yoab." 
1Kings2:32 Neyau Olaitoriani arrinyu nkiasin enyena e nkibukoroto o sarge shumata endukuya enye makewan, amu ore apa meyiolo papa Daudi, etarasaka ninye nesesekuan to lalem iltung'ana oare supati naa iletipat aalang ninye, Abna olayioni le Neer, ilo kitok le njore oo Siraeli o Amasa olayioni le Yeter, olkitok le njore e Yuda." 
1Kings2:33 Neaku kerrinyunye isargeta lenye aapuonu shumata endukuya e Yoab o shumata oo lukuny eishoi enye, intarasi; kake ore tialo Daudi, o eishoi enye o enkaji enye o lorika lenye le nkitoo, naa keaku eseriani naing'uaa Olaitoriani ntarasi moitie.”" 
1Kings2:34 Nedumunye Benaia olayioni le Yehoida alo neosh ninye anang'ie enkop, near ninye metua, nenukari ninye tiatua enkaji enye makewan tiong'ota." 
1Kings2:35 Nepik olaiguanani Benaia olayioni le Yehoida aitaa olkitok le njore te rishata e Yoab, nepik olaiguanani Sadok metaa olapolosani terishata e Abiatar." 
1Kings2:36 Neitoki olaiguanani airriwaa olkilikuai aipotu Shimei nejoki, ninye, “Teshetaki kewan enkaji te Yerusalem, nibik teine, nimilo iyie teine aidurraki dikae." 
1Kings2:37 Amu ore akenya enkolong nilo, alang enongoto e Kebron, tayiolo ntisipa nchere meeta nchere miye. Ore osarge lino nelotu shumata endukuya ino makewan.”" 
1Kings2:38 Nejoki Shemei olaiguanani, “Ore ina nitejo iyie naa eisidai; ore anaa enatejo olkitok lai olaiguanani, ina elo osinka lino aas.” Neaku etobiko Shimei te Yerusalem nkolong'i kumok." 
1Kings2:39 Ore etulusoitie ilarin okuni, neisik irrindiki oare le Shimei aapuo enetii Akish olayioni le Maaka, olaiguanani le Gaat. Ore pee elikini Shimei aajoki, “Ng'ura etii irrindiki linono Gaat.”" 
1Kings2:40 Nedumunye Shimei neirot osikiria nelo Gaat enetii Akish, aing'oru irrindiki lenyena; nelo Shimei arrinyu irrindiki lenyena te Gaat." 
1Kings2:41 Ore ake pee elikini Solomon aajoki eshomo Shimei te Yerusalem nelo Gaat neitoki arrinyunye," 
1Kings2:42 neirriwaa olaiguanani olkilikuai aipotu Shimei, nejoki ninye “Keitu apa nanu aainosie iyie olmumai to Laitoriani, naairorie oleng aikok ajoki, ‘Tayiolo ntisipa nchere ore akenya enkolong nilo ake ninye dikae wueji, niye iyie?’ Nikijoki iyie nanu, ‘Ore enitejo naa eisidai; kairuk nanu.’" 
1Kings2:43 Kainyoo naa peyie eitu iyie imbung olmumai to Laitoriani oina kitanapata naaitanapa nanu iyie?” 
1Kings2:44 Neitoki ake sii olaiguanani ajoki Shimei, “Iyiolo iyie to ltau lino ina torroni apa nintaasa Daudi papa lai; neaku kerrinyu Olaitoriani entorroni ino shumata endukuya ino." 
1Kings2:45 Kake kemayian Olaitoriani olaiguanani Solomon, ore olorika le nkitoo le Daudi neitasheyieki te dukuya Olaitoriani ntarasi.”" 
1Kings2:46 Neitoki olaiguanani aitanap Benaia olayioni le Yehoida; neipang ninye alo aosh ninye anang'ie enkop, neye ninye. Neaku eitasheyieki apa enkitoo te nkitoria e Solomon." 
1Kings3:1 Eitobira apa Solomon osotua o Farao olaiguanani le Misiri; neyam ninye entito e Farao, neriku ninye atua enkanasa e Daudi, o metaba anaa neidip atesheta enkaji enye makewan o enkaji o Laitoriani o esuntai naman Yerusalem." 
1Kings3:2 Too wuejitin neeika apa epolosisho iltung'ana, amu meetae apa enkaji naidipaki aateshet naipotieki Olaitoriani." 
1Kings3:3 Enyor apa Solomon Olaitoriani, nelo too nkikoot e Daudi papaai lenye. Kake eitayu apa ninye ilasarri nepej enkorropil too wuejitin neeika." 
1Kings3:4 Nelo apa olaiguanani Gibeon alo apolosisho teine amu ine apa ewueji neika kitok; naa keishooyo apa Solomon ilasarri oopejori enkalifu tenchumata eilo perere lo lasar. 
1Kings3:5 Ore te Gibeon neipang'aki Olaitoriani Solomon te nkidetidet kewarie, nejo Enkai, “Toomonu entoki niyieu naaisho.” Nejo Solomon," 
1Kings3:6 “Ntodolua iyie enyorrata kitok nauno to sinka lino Daudi, papa lai, enkaraki nashomo ninye te dukuya iyie te supatisho, o too sipat o to ltau oitoriori tialo iyie, nimbung'a iyie te ninye ena nyorrata kitok nauno, ninchoo ninye olayioni otonie olorika lenye le nkitoo ena olong." 
1Kings3:7 Ore taata, Olaitoriani Enkai ai, intaa iyie osinka lino olaiguanani te rishata e Daudi papa lai, hoo ninye naa kara nanu enkerai; mayiolo nanu aipang'a nemayiolo atijing'u." 
1Kings3:8 Netii osinka lino atua iltung'ana linono litegelaka, olorere kitok, lemeidimi aaikena te nkumoi anaa aatayiolo esiana te nkumoi." 
1Kings3:9 Nchoo naa osinka lino endamunoto e ningunoto pee etum aitoria ltung'ana linono, pee atum atumusu atirishu mbaa sidain o ntorrok, amu kaing'ae oidim aitoria ele orere lino kitok?”" 
1Kings3:10 Etishipakine apa Olaitoriani nchere ena bae etoomono Solomon. 
1Kings3:11 Nejoki Enkai ninye, “Ore enkaraki ninkilikuanua ena, neitu iomonu enkishui naado tenkaraki enkishui ino, anaa karsisisho, anaa enkishui oo lmang'ati linono, kake itoomonoko kewan pee kinchori eyiolounoto pee imusu esidai," 
1Kings3:12 ng'ura kaaitaas naa nanu taata te risioto o rorei lino. Ng'ura aaisho nanu iyie endamunoto e ng'eno nimusunye mbaa, metaa meetae olikinyaanyukie otulusoyie nemeetae oloyooki atiu anaa iyie tesiadi iyie." 
1Kings3:13 Aaisho sii nena neitu iomonu, karsisisho o enkanyit ometaa meetae likae aiguanani likintanyaanyukieki too nkolong'i inono pooki." 
1Kings3:14 Naa tenilo iyie too nkoitoi aainei, aibung nkitanapat aainei o nkikoot aainei, anaa apa enataasa papaai lino Daudi, naitoodor nkolong'i inono.”" 
1Kings3:15 Neputunye Solomon, naa ng'ura, enkidetidet ake, Neitoki alotu Yerusalem, neitashe te dukuya osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani, neishooyo nkishorot o lasarri oopejori, o lasarri le seriani, neitobir osirua tenkaraki isinkan lenyena pooki." 
1Kings3:16 Neitoki nkituaak are naibor onyek aapuonu enetii olaiguanani neitashe te dukuya ninye. 
1Kings3:17 Nejo enkitok nabo e nena, “Oi olkitok lai, ore ena kitok o nanu naa enkaji nabo kimanya; naisho nanu eton kishula teina aji." 
1Kings3:18 Ore te nkolong e uni aidipa atoisho, neitoki sii ninye ena kitok aisho; naa iyiook ake, metii hoo likae tung'ani tenebo iyiook tiatua aji, iyiook ake pokira are naatii atua aji." 
1Kings3:19 Ore enkayioni ena kitok neye kewarie amu etepetayie ninye. 
1Kings3:20 Nedumunye ninye te mpolos e nkewarie neya enkayioni ai te mbata ai ina kata eirura esinka ino, neirragie ninye to lgoo lenye. Neirragie ina kerai enye natua to lgoo lai." 
1Kings3:21 Ore pee ainyototo tadekenya aaitanak enkerai ai, ng'ura etua; kake ore ake pee aaing'or nanu asipu tadekenya, ng'ura mme enapa kerai natoiuo.”" 
1Kings3:22 Kake etejo ina ae kitok, “A'a enaai ena kerai naishu, naa enino ena natua.” Neitoki enaduoo e dukuya ajo, “A'a, enino ina natua, naa enaai ena kerai naishu.” Neijia eikuna eiro te dukuya olaiguanani." 
1Kings3:23 Neitoki olaiguanani ajo, “Ejo ake nabo, ‘Enaai ena kerai naishu, netua enkayioni ino’; nejo enkae; ‘A'a; amu enkayioni ino natua naa enkayioni ai ena naishu.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Neitoki olaiguanani ajo, “Eyakaki nanu olalem.” Neaku eyauaki olalem dukuya olaiguanani." 
1Kings3:25 Nejo olaiguanani, “Entoor ina kerai naishu katitin are, nincho ematua nabo enkitok nabo ninchosho enkae rubata enkae kitok.”" 
1Kings3:26 Ore ina kitok apa naishu enkayioni enye nejoki olaiguanani, enkaraki naata ninye enkirimo to ltau te nkaraki enkayioni enye. “Oi olkitok lai, nchoo ninye meewa ina kerai naishu, nimimper ninye.” Kake etejo ina ae kitok, “Nchoo eaku mme enaai neme enino, tasasha ninye matoor.”" 
1Kings3:27 Neitoki olaiguanani awalu ajo, “Enchoo ena kerai naishu enkitok e dukuya, nimisajisasha ake, amu ninye ngotonye.”" 
1Kings3:28 Nening Israel pooki enkiguana natudung'o olaiguanani; neing'asiakino ninche olaiguanani; amu etumusutuo aajo etii engeno e Nkai atua ninye pee inguana too sipat. 
1Kings4:1 Olaiguanani Solomon apa oiguanaki enkop e Israel pooki," 
1Kings4:2 naa kulo apa iltung'ana lenyena kituaak: Asaria olayioni le Sadok apa olapolosani; 
1Kings4:3 Elihoref o Ahija ilayiok le Shisha ninche apa ilaigerok; Yehoshefat olayioni le Ahilud apa olashumani loo mbaa; 
1Kings4:4 Benaia olayioni le Yehoida apa olkitok le njore; naa Sadok o Abiatar ninche apa ilapolosak; 
1Kings4:5 Asaira olayioni le Natan apa oitasheiki lelo kituaak, Sabud olayioni le Natan ninye apa olapolosani naa olchore lo laiguanani;" 
1Kings4:6 Ahishar ninye apa olaitasheikinoni le nkaji e nkitoo; naa Adomiram olayioni le Abna ninye apa olaitasheikinoni le siai oo nkaik. 
1Kings4:7 Eeta apa Solomon iltung'ana tomon oare kituaak te Israel pooki, laa ninche ooisho olaiguanani endaa o lmarei lenye pooki; ore ake oltung'ani neishoru endaa to lapa obo to lari." 
1Kings4:8 Kuna ninche nkarn enye, Benhuri teina kop oo ldoinyio e Efraim," 
1Kings4:9 o Ben-deker te nkop e Makas, o Shaalbim o Betshemesh o Elenbet-hanan" 
1Kings4:10 o Ben-hesed, te nkop e Arubot (enenye apa enkop e Soko o enkop pooki e Hefer)" 
1Kings4:11 Ben-abin apa te nkop pooki e Nafat-do (eyama apa ninye Tafat entito e Solomon); 
1Kings4:12 Baana olayioni le Ahilud te nkop e Taanak, o Megido o Betshean pooki apa naa ninye natii embata e Saretan tiabori Yesreel, neitoki adumunye teine ometabaiki Abel-mehola, ometabaiki enkae shoto e Yokmeam;" 
1Kings4:13 Benkeber, apa te nkop e Ramot-gilead (eeta apa ninye nkang'itie e Yair olayioni le Manase apa naatii Gilead; neeta sii olkerenket le Argob, otii enkalo e Argob, tiatua enkop e Basham, nkanas ntomoni ile kituaak naasheta sunta o nchomito o suyai);" 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadab olayioni le Ido apa te nkop e Mahanaim; 
1Kings4:15 Ahinaas te nkop e Naftali (eyama apa ninye Basemat entito e Solomon); 
1Kings4:16 Baana olayioni le Hushai, te nkop e Asher o te Bealot;" 
1Kings4:17 Yehoshefat olayioni le Parua te nkop e Isaakar; 
1Kings4:18 Shimei olayioni le Ela te nkop e Benchamen; 
1Kings4:19 Geber olayioni le Uri te nkop e Gilead, teina kop e Sihon olaiguanani le Amori o Oog olaiguanani le Bashan. Netii apa oltung'ani obo kitok enkop e Yuda." 
1Kings4:20 Ore apa iltung'ana le Yuda o Israel naa eikumok anaa osinyai le naiposha, nedaa apa ninche neokisho neshipayu." 
1Kings4:21 Eitoria apa Solomon nena kitoriat pooki ebaiki olkeju le Frati ometabaiki ina kop oo Lfilisti ometabaiki olpolosie le Misiri; neyau ninche kodi neisiaai Solomon too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui enye. 
1Kings4:22 Ore apa endaa e Solomon te nkolong nabo, naa mboreitin nkalifuni imiet e ntapa napuyiapui o mboreitin nkalifuni tomon e mpirbil e nkano;" 
1Kings4:23 o lmong'i tomon oopir, o nkishu o lokeri tikitam naapir, o nkerra iip, ore tenebo nena, ng'uesi naanyanyukie nkoliin, o ronkon, o motonyi naapir." 
1Kings4:24 Amu eeta apa ninye enkitoria te nkop pooki o loo ntoluo to lkeju le Frati ebaiki Tipsa ometabaiki Gasa, te shumata ilaiguanak pooki le Frati; neeta ninye eseriani too nchot pooki naamanita ninye." 
1Kings4:25 Ore Yuda o Israel netoni te Seriani; ebaiki Dan o metabaiki Beer-sheba, eton ake oltung'ani tiabori osabibu lenye o tiabori olng'aboli lenye, too nkolong'i pooki e Solomon." 
1Kings4:26 Eeta sii apa Solomon ilaleta nkalifuni artam loo mbartan o ngarrin oo mbartan o lakedok loo mbartan nkalifuni tomon oare. 
1Kings4:27 Ore apa lelo tung'ana kituaak neisho ninche Solomon endaa o pooki oopuonu emisa o laiguanani Solomon, oltung'ani ake neishooyo endaa to lapa lenye; eitu ninche eisho metongoro hoo toki." 
1Kings4:28 Eyauaki sii shairi o lkujita loo mbartan aaitasioki te wueji neyieuni. Neyau ake oltung'ani te risioroto enkitanapata naitanapaki. 
1Kings4:29 Neisho Enkai Solomon engeno nagut o ening'unoto nemeimakinoyu, neiputaki engeno naba anaa osinyai le naiposha," 
1Kings4:30 neaku ore engeno nagut e Solomon kelusoo te engeno oo ltung'ana pooki to loosaen, o engeno pooki e Misiri." 
1Kings4:31 Amu aingen apa ninye alang iltung'ana pooki, ngen alang Etan le Esrahiti o Heman o Kalkol, o Darda lelo ayiok le Mahol; nelo olning'o lenye neibulaa lelo oreren pooki oo manita." 
1Kings4:32 Eiroro sii ndung'eta e rashe nkalifuni uni; ore isinkoliotin lenyena naa enkalifu nabo o imiet. 
1Kings4:33 Eimaka sii ilkeek, ebaiki lelo tarakua otii Lebanon ometabaiki ina hisopu nabulu too sunta neimaki sii ing'uesi, o ntaritik o ntokitin naaiserpepiari o sinkir." 
1Kings4:34 Nepuonu iltung'ana ooing'uaa iloreren pooki aainining engeno nagut e Solomon, o looing'uaa ilaiguanak pooki le nkop, ootoning'oitie engeno nagut e Solomon." 
1Kings5:1 Eirriwaka apa Hiram olaiguanani le Turo Solomon isinkan lenyena etoning'o nchere etuputoki aaitaa olaiguanani te rishata e papaai lenye, amu kenyor apa Hiram Daudi." 
1Kings5:2 Neirriwaki Solomon Hiram olkilikuai ajoki," 
1Kings5:3 “Iyiolo ajo eitu apa etumoki papaai lai Daudi atesheta enkaji te nkarna o Laitoriani Enkai te nkaraki olarrabal amu etang'adutua apa ilmang'ati lenyena ninye, ometaba anaa nepik Olaitoriani ninche abori nkejek enyena." 
1Kings5:4 Kake ore taata aaishoo nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ai enkiyeng'iyeng te pooki shoto. Metii olmang'atinta nemetii enyamali. 
1Kings5:5 Neaku atejo kashetu enkaji te nkarna o Laitoriani Enkai, anaa apa enatiaaka Olaitoriani Daudi papaai lai, ‘Ore olayioni lino laa ninye nanu apik olorika lino le nkitoo, te rishata ino, ninye oshetu enkaji tenkaraki enkarna ai.’" 
1Kings5:6 Ore naa taata ntanapisho pee aadung'okini ltarakua le Lebanon; ore ilaisiaayiak laainei, neibung'are ilaisiaayiak linono naa kalaaki nanu isinkan linono olekoisiaayio anaa enijo; amu iyiolo iyie ajo meetae likae oyiolo atuuroi iltarakua anaa iltung'ana le Sidon.”" 
1Kings5:7 Ore ake pee ening Hiram lelo omon le Solomon neshipayu oleng, nejo ninye, “Meisisi Olaitoriani ena olong, oishoo Daudi olayioni ngen oitore ele orere kitok.”" 
1Kings5:8 Neirriwaki Hiram Solomon olkilikuai ejoki, “Atoning'o nanu ilo kilikuai likirriwaka; naa kaas nanu nena pooki ninkilikuanua tialo mbaoi o ltarakua o no lchani onyaanyukie oltarakuai." 
1Kings5:9 Keitadou ilaisiaayiak laainei lelo keek te Lebanon neyau embata enaiposha, neen ninche tenebo naaitadoiki te naiposha meetu ewueji niyieu naisho ninche meiperi teine, ning'amaa iyie ninche; ore te nkalo ino naa kayieu nincho iltung'ana laainei endaa.”" 
1Kings5:10 Neaku eishoo apa Hiram Solomon mbaoi pooki oltarakuai o lerai naaba anaa inaayieu," 
1Kings5:11 neisho Solomon Hiram mboreitin e mpirbil nkalifuni tikitam e nkano meitaa endaa enkaji enye, o mboreitin empirbil e ilata nkalifuni tikitam. Neisho Solomon Hiram kuna te pooki ari." 
1Kings5:12 Neisho Olaitoriani Solomon engeno, anaa apa enaisiligie ninye, neaku ketii apa eseriani erishata e Hiram o Solomon, ore lelo pokira neitobir olning'o." 
1Kings5:13 Neitayu olaiguanani Solomon iltung'ana oas esiaai te Israel pooki; ore lelo tung'ana naa nkalifuni tomoni uni. 
1Kings5:14 Neirriwaa ninche meshomo Lebanon, nepuo ake iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon te nkata nabo to lapa, netii ake iltung'ana Lebanon to lapa obo, netii ang ilapaitin oare. Adoniram apa olkitok le lelo tung'ana oasisho." 
1Kings5:15 Eeta sii apa Solomon iltung'ana nkalifuni ntomoni naapishana oonapisho o laguetak loo soito nkalifuni ntomoni isiet te nkop oo ldoinyo. 
1Kings5:16 Ore tenebo lelo etii sii iltung'ana kituaak le Solomon nkalifuni uni o iip uni ooitasheiki esiaai, ninche ooitasheiki lelo tung'ana oonapisho te siai." 
1Kings5:17 Ore te nkitanapata o laiguanani, nenap ninche isoito sapuki; oogol enkinyiang'a pee etum aatipik olkitamanyunoto le nkaji too soito oogueta." 
1Kings5:18 Neaku ore apa ilashetak le Solomon o lashetak le Hiraim, oltung'ana le Gebal neas esiaai e nguetare neitobir mbaoi o soito pee eshet enkaji." 
1Kings6:1 Ore te rishata oo larin iip ong'uan o ntomoni isiet eidipa iltung'ana loo Siraeli aatupuku te nkop e Misiri, to lari liong'uan eitore Solomon Israel, to lapa oji ole Sif, aa ninye olapa liare, neiteru ninye ashet enkaji o Laitoriani." 
1Kings6:2 Ore apa ina aji natesheta olaiguanani Solomon naa ntemat e nkaina ntomoni ile enkadoro, naa ntemat e nkaina tikitam endapasho naa ntemat e nkaina tomoni uni e nkadoro nailep." 
1Kings6:3 Naa ore olgoriet otii enkalo najing'ieki enkaji naa ntemat e nkaina tikitam, nerisioro endapasho e nkaji, naa ntemat tomon e nkaina eng'uton te dukuya ina aji." 
1Kings6:4 Nepik ninye ilusien naaitobiruaki te nkarriyiano 
1Kings6:5 Neitobir sii aitaman isunta eina aji nkajijik naakedo too nchot pooki. 
1Kings6:6 Ore enkaji eabori naa ntemat imiet e nkaina endapasho, ore enkaji e polos naa ntemat ile e nkaina endapasho, ore enkaji e uni te shumata naa ntemat e nkaina naapishana endapasho. Ore te manaroto eina aji neitodorropu isunta pee meibung ake nena rishinani isunta e ina aji." 
1Kings6:7 Ore apa pee esheti ina aji naa too soito ooitobiraki te wueji neguetishoreki; pee mening'i ake enyuntu anaa entolu anaa ae toki e sekenkei tiatua enkaji e Nkai, ina kata eshetitae." 
1Kings6:8 Ore enejing'ieki ilo gilata liabori naa enkalo e kopikop eina aji; naa nkedeta eimi pee epuoi olgilata le polos, nepuoyieki sii olgilata liokuni." 
1Kings6:9 Neaku etesheta ninye ina aji neidip; nepik enkitoipet e shumata too mbaoi o ltarakuai. 
1Kings6:10 Neitobir ninye lelo gilat meishiaakino ake olgilata ntemat imiet e nkaina enkadoro, neibung'ieki enkaji too mbaoi oltarakuai." 
1Kings6:11 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Solomon," 
1Kings6:12 nejo, “Ore ena aji nishetita iyie, tenilo iyie too nkikoot aainei nimbung nkitanapat aainei pooki nirubare ninche, natum taa atuuno ilo rorei te iyie, apa lairorie Daudi papaai lino." 
1Kings6:13 Naa kabik nanu tiatua nkera e Israel nemaing'uaa nanu iltung'ana laainei Isiraeli.” 
1Kings6:14 Neaku etesheta Solomon ina aji, neidip ninye." 
1Kings6:15 Neikod isunta eina aji tiatua too mbaoi oltarakuai, ore ebaiki oltiren le nkaji ometabaiki enkimulumulet e shumata, nepik nkeek; ore oltiren leina aji neimulumul too nkeek oltepesi." 
1Kings6:16 Etesheta ninye oriong ina aji apik mbaoi o lerai erishata oo ntemat e nkaina tikitam; etesheta ebaiki oltiren ometabaiki enchumata e suntai, neshet ine aiko anaa atua ina aji e Nkai, anaa ewueji sinyati aisul." 
1Kings6:17 Ore ilo gilata le wueji sinyati oleng naa ntemat tomon oisiet e nkaina enkadoro. 
1Kings6:18 Ore iltarakua ootii atua ina aji negueti aikunu anaa imalasin o ntapuka naalaa; naa iltarakua ake pooki, medoli ninye osoit." 
1Kings6:19 Ore atua ina aji e Nkai, neitobir ninye olgilata liatua tukul, pee etum atipika ine osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani." 
1Kings6:20 Ore apa ilo gilata liatua naa ntemat tikitam e nkaina enkadoro, naa ntemat e nkaina tikitam endapasho, naa ntemet e nkaina tikitam enkadoro nailep, nemura pooki wueji te sahabu nasila, nepik olpisiaai le sahabu metaleng'o dukuya ilo gilata liatua, nemur ninye te sahabu." 
1Kings6:21 Nemur Solomon atua ina aji te sahabu nasila, nepik ninye olpisiaai aitalang ine wueji sinyati, nemur te sahabu." 
1Kings6:22 Nemur ninye enkaji pooki te sahabu ometaba anaa neidipayu enkaji pooki. Ore sii ilo perere lo lasar liatua ewueji sinyati nemur te sahabu. 
1Kings6:23 Ore tiatua ine wueji sinyati neitobir ninye ilkerubi oare loo nkeek o loirien, ore ake obo, ntemat tomon e nkaina enkadoro." 
1Kings6:24 Ntemat imiet e nkaina enkadoro e naipukoi o lkerubi obo. Naa ntemat imiet ebaiki enkiting'oto e naipukoi nabo o metabaiki enkae aipukoi. 
1Kings6:25 Ore olikae kerubi naa ntemat tomon ake sii ninye. Entemata nabo lelo kerubi naa empukunoto nabo. 
1Kings6:26 Ore enkadoro olkerubi obo naa ntemat tomon e nkaina, naa neijia ake sii etiu ilo likae." 
1Kings6:27 Nepik ninye lelo kerubi ewueji e atua eina aji; ore inaipuko e lelo kerubi nelaki aaisalaash ometaa kebaiki enaipukoi e obo e suntai nebaiki enaipukoi o likae e suntai; ore nkulie aipuko enye nebaikino te mpolos e nkaji. 
1Kings6:28 Nemur ninye lelo kerubi te sahabu. 
1Kings6:29 Ore isunta eina aji neikodi aaguetaki ilkerubi oltuka o ntapuka naalaa, neikodi too lgilat o tioriong o too liatuani." 
1Kings6:30 Ore oltiren le nkaji nemur te sahabu tiatua o tioriong. 
1Kings6:31 Ore te wueji nejing'ieki ine wueji sinyati nepik nkikeneta o loirien; ore imolinkaishi neriwi aaitobiraki, nemur ninye." 
1Kings6:32 Neimulumul ninye aikod nena kikeneta e kutukaji pokira are oo loirienito too ntokitin naaguetuno anaa ilkerubi, o ltuka o ntapuka dapashi, nemur lelo kerubi te sahabu o lelo tuka." 
1Kings6:33 Neaku eitobira ninye teine nejing'ieki imolinkaishi e kutukaji o loirien, neisho metorisioto nkaloli pooki," 
1Kings6:34 o nkikenata are e kutukaji oltepesi, ore imatuan are e nkikenet nabo naa keshukunoyu eikeni o eboli naa neijia eitiu enkae matua e nkikenet." 
1Kings6:35 Ore nena kikeneta neikodi aapik olkerubi, o ltuka o ntapuka, nemur ninche te sahabu, anaa ina natipikaka nena tokitin naaguetuno." 
1Kings6:36 Neshetu ninye olodung'oro liatua too lkererin okuni loo soito ooguetuno o too ng'apeta oltarakuai. 
1Kings6:37 Ore to lari liong'uan nepiki ina aji o Laitoriani olkitamanyunoto, to lapa le Sif." 
1Kings6:38 Ore to lapa le tomon oobo, to lapa oji ole Buul, laa ninye olapa le imiet neidipayu ina aji too nkaloli pooki, terisioroto oo nkitobirat enyena pooki apa naaitobirakaki ninye. Ilarin oopishana etesheta ninye ina aji." 
1Kings7:1 Ilarin tomon ookuni apa etesheta Solomon enkaji enye, neidip ninye enchetata enkaji pooki." 
1Kings7:2 Etesheta ninye enkaji e ntim e Lebanon; ore enkadoro enye naa ntemat enkaina iip nabo ore endapasho naa ntemat e nkaina onom, ore enkadoro eilep naa ntemat e nkaina tomoni uni, neteshetaki apa too lkererin ooiriamari okuni too ng'apeta o ltarakuai, o rishinani oltarakuai te shumata ing'apeta." 
1Kings7:3 Neimulumuli apa shumata lelo gilat te lelo tarakua ootipikaki shumata nena ng'apeta artam oimiet, etii ake iltarakua tomon o imiet olkereri obo." 
1Kings7:4 Netii apa irubat oo lusien olkereri ake obo, netii apa ilusien aaipira too nkaloli pokira, katitin uni." 
1Kings7:5 Ore njing'eta pooki oo nkajijik o lusien naa kerisioro too nchot pooki. Ore ake elusie neipirakinore elusie katitin uni eiriamari maare. 
1Kings7:6 Neitobir ninye enkaji nalala oo ng'apeta; ore enkadoro enye naa ntemat onom e nkaina, ore endapasho enye naa ntemat tomoni uni e nkaina. Netii apa olodungoro dukuya enye oitobiruno too ng'apeta, netii enkitushuret dukuya ninye." 
1Kings7:7 Neitobir ninye enkaji nalala o lorika le nkitoo teine nedung'ie ninye enkiguana, aa taa enkaji e nkiguana, neitobiri too ltarakua ebaiki oltiren o metabaiki shumata enye." 
1Kings7:8 Ore enkaji enye makewan naa ninye, etonie, tiae dung'oroto te siadi ina aji nalala, naa neijia ake eikunuaki olchetei. Enyaaka ake sii Solomon aitobiru enkaji natiu anaa ena aji nalala tenkaraki entito e Farao apa nayama." 
1Kings7:9 Eitobiruaki kuna pooki too soito oogol enkinyiang'a, ootaguetaki te risioroto naba anaa enairirikino, neiriri te musumeno, oriong o atua, ebaiki olkitamanyunoto o metabaiki shumata. Ore ebaiki endung'oroto e nkaji o Laitoriani o metabaiki endung'oroto kitok." 
1Kings7:10 Ore apa olkitamanyunoto naa oloo soito oogol enkinyiang'a, isoito sapuki oleng, isoito loo ntemat isiet anaa ntemat tomon enkaina." 
1Kings7:11 Ore shumata naa isoito oogol enkinyiang'a, ooguetuno anaa enairirikino, tenebo iltarakua." 
1Kings7:12 Ore apa ina dung'oroto kitok neeta ilkererin okuni too soito oogueta oomanita o lkereri loo loom to ltarakuai, neeta sii nena ina dung'oroto e atua e nkaji o Laitoriani, o lodung'oro ojing'ieki enkaji." 
1Kings7:13 Neirriwaa olaiguanani Solomon meyauni Huram aaitung'uaa Turo. 
1Kings7:14 Olayioni apa ninye le nkoliai o losho le Naftali, ore menye naa oltung'ani le Turo, olaitobirani lo suyai; naa ngen apa ninye oleng, neeta engeno nagut sapuk o ening'unoto o enkarriyiano te nkitobirata e pooki siaai o suyai. Nelotu ninye enetii olaiguanani Solomon, neas esiaai enye pooki." 
1Kings7:15 Etipika apa ninye ing'apeta are o suyai. Ntemat tomon oisiet enkadoro e ng'ape nabo, naa enkopito ntemat tomon oare enkaina naaman ake eng'ape nabo negum nchumat enye. Ore apa enkirrushai enye naa ilkimojik oong'uan neijia apa eikununo ing'apeta pokira are." 
1Kings7:16 Neitoki sii aitobir ntokitin e shumata naaikununo anaa nkopiyiani enkitoo, to suyai otosholaki, pee epiki shumata e nena ng'apeta; ore apa enkadoro entoki nabo naa ntemat imiet e nkaina." 
1Kings7:17 Neitoki aitobiru ntokitin are naashetuno anaa ilmarisiani to lpisiai, nepik shumata nena ng'apeta, netii ake ina toki nashetuno anaa olmarisian shumata nabo ng'ape netii enkae shumata enkae ng'ape." 
1Kings7:18 Neitoki ake sii aitobiru ilgululu oopurupurana oonyaanyukie kukumanka ilkererin oare pee eitoip nena lukuny oo ng'apeta. 
1Kings7:19 Ore apa nena kikompeni naatii ilukuny e nena ng'apeta neitobiruaki anaa ntapuka, naa ntemat ong'uan e nkaina." 
1Kings7:20 Netii apa nena kikompeni ilukuny e nena ng'apeta are, o shumata ina natii embata ena ripata olmarisian, netii apa ilgululu iip are, emanaa too lkererin oare, naa neija eikununo enkae toki te nchumata enkae ng'ape." 
1Kings7:21 Neitasheyie ninye nena ng'apeta ntaloishin pokira are e wueji nejing'ieki enkaji e Nkai; nepik ninye eng'ape enkalo e kopikop nejo enkarna eine Yakini; neitoki, apik eng'ape enkalo e moikuape nejo enkarna enye Boas." 
1Kings7:22 Ore too nchumat oo ng'apeta netii ntokitin naaitobiruaki anaa ntapuka sidain. Neaku eidipe apa esiaai oo ng'apeta. 
1Kings7:23 Neitoki aitobir olmoti sapuk lo suyai otosholaki; naa kepurupurana ilo moti, naa ntemat tomon e nkaina ebaiki enchoto nabo e nkererema ometabaiki enkae shoto. Naa ntemat imiet e nkaina enkadoro ebaiki kop o metabaiki shumata. Naa ntemat tomoni uni emanaroto enye." 
1Kings7:24 Ore abori enkererema enye netii iltuleta oomanita, ore lelo tuleta naa ilkererin oare, neenikini ilo moti metaa entoki nabo." 
1Kings7:25 Neitakedi ilo moti shumata iloing'ok tomon oare lo suyai, neing'orita okuni lenye enkalo e moikuape, neing'orita okuni endoyioroto e nkolong, neing'orita okuni kopikop, neing'orita okuni enkalo o loo ntoluo; ore apa ilo moti naa shumata ninche eiteleikino. Ore enkalo enye pooki e siadi naa atua etii." 
1Kings7:26 Ore endapasho enye neba anaa endap e nkaina, ore enkererema enye neikununo anaa enkererema e nkikompe, eikunuaki anaa entapukai sidai. Naa iltooi ooitukuoreki nkalifuni are enkare natii ilo moti." 
1Kings7:27 Enyaaka sii aitobir nkejek tomon naatonie ilo moti. Ore ake enkitotonet nabo naa ntemat ong'uan e nkaina enkadoro, naa ntemat ong'uan e nkaina endapasho, naa ntemat uni e nkaina enkadoro nailep." 
1Kings7:28 Ele apa olchetunei loo nkitotoneta. Etipikaki nkeek meibung'a enkamanaa e oriong," 
1Kings7:29 ore nena keek naatipikaki enkamanaa e oriong naguetakino ilng'atunyo, o loing'ok, o lkerubi. Ore enchumata nena rubat te shumata o tiabori lelo ng'atunyo, o loing'ok, netii ilmarisiani le siaai naikoduno." 
1Kings7:30 Ore ake sii eeta ake enkitotonet nabo nkejek e ngarri o ng'uan o suyai o ltidii lo suyai, ore ilpijat pokira oong'uan naa ineeirisharieki ilo moti. Ore nena rishinani neikodoki too lmarisiani te pooki shoto." 
1Kings7:31 Ore enjing'et enye naa enchumata enye etii neilep enkadoro e ntemata nabo e nkaina, ore ina jing'et enye naa kepurupurana naa entemata nabo olpisiai enguton. Ore ina jing'et enye neeta imolinkaishi ore irubat enyena naa kerisioro nchot pooki, mepurupurana." 
1Kings7:32 Netii apa nena kejek pokira ong'uan nkeek e abori. Ore apa nkeek naaibung nkejek naa entoki nabo o nkitotoneta. Ore enkadoro enkeju naa entemet nabo e nkaina olpisiai. 
1Kings7:33 Neitobiraki apa nena kejek anaa nkejek oo ngarrin oo mbartan; ore nkeek enye o enkamanaa o ltidii o eneibungare, naa ino suyai." 
1Kings7:34 Neeta ake te pooki garri nkeek onguan naairishaa tiabori, naa nabo ninche o engarri." 
1Kings7:35 Ore te nchumata e nkitotonet netii entoki napurupurana aa olpisiai le ntemata e nkaina enkadoro nailep; ore enchumata eina kitotonet, irishinani enyena o nkeek enyena naa entoki nabo o ninye." 
1Kings7:36 Ore tioriong nena rishinani o tioriong nkeek neguetaki ilkerubi, o lng'atunyo, o iltuka, te risioroto e rishata e nabo ake enye, neitaman olmarisian." 
1Kings7:37 Ore tele rrekie neitobiru nkitotoneta tomon; neitobiruni pooki aaitanyaanyuk te risioroto o te mpukunoto. 
1Kings7:38 Neitobiru ninye ilmotioo tomon lo suyai; ore ake olmoti obo neeta mboreitin oo ltooi artam ooitukuoreki, ore ake olmoti obo naa ntemat ong'uan e nkaina, etii ake olmoti nkitotoneta tomon." 
1Kings7:39 Nepik ninye nena kitasheta imiet enkalo e kopikop eina aji, nepik imiet enkalo e moikuape enkaji, nepik ilo moti olpijata aaitorit kopikop o loo saen leina aji." 
1Kings7:40 Eitobira apa sii Hiram imotioo, o nchempei naata ilala, o ngirran. Neaku eidipa apa Hiram esiaai pooki nataasaka Solomon tialo ina aji Olaitoriani:" 
1Kings7:41 nena ng'apeta pokira are, o lelo bakulini pokira oare apa otii nchumat e nena ng'apeta, o nena sosin pokira are naaimulumul ilbakulini ootii nchumat oo ng'apeta." 
1Kings7:42 O lelo gululu iip ong'uan le nena sosin pokira are, ilkererin oare loo lgululu ake te sos nabo, pee eimulumul lelo bakulini oare loo nchumat oo ng'apeta;" 
1Kings7:43 o nena kitasheta tomon o lelo motioo tomon ootii shumata nkitasheta tomon," 
1Kings7:44 oilo moti obo, o lelo oing'ok tomon oare ootii abori ilo moti." 
1Kings7:45 Ore nena motioo, o nena kurteta, o ngirran, ore kuna masaa pooki naatii atua enkaji o Laitoriani, apa naaitobiraka Hiram olaiguanani Solomon, naa ino suyai otisikaki." 
1Kings7:46 Ore teina kisiajata e Yordan neiturraa olaiguanani ninche teina kop e nterit natii erishata e Sukot o Seretan. 
1Kings7:47 Neing'ua Solomon nena masaa pooki eitu etemi aaineneng enkaraki naa eikumok apa oleng. Ore enkiroishi o suyai neitu apa eyiolouni. 
1Kings7:48 Neaku eitobira apa Solomon ntokitin pooki naatii atua enkaji o Laitoriani: ilo perere lo lasar le sahabu, ina misa e sahabu tenkaraki emukate naitisinyaki" 
1Kings7:49 o nkitasheta oo ltaai e sahabu nasila, imiet te nkalo e kopikop o imiet te nkalo e moikuape, eitu ebaiki ilo gilata liatua; o ntapuka, o ltaai, o ntokitin naarieki iltaai e sahabu:" 
1Kings7:50 o nkikompeni o nkalema o ngirran, o ntokitin e nkorropil, o ngirran e nkima, e sahabu, tenkaraki nena kikeneta e kutukaji e atua ilo gilata liatua, ine wueji nesinya aisul, o nena kikeneta olgos le nkaji e Nkai." 
1Kings7:51 Neaku ina siaai pooki apa etaasa olaiguanani Solomon neidipayu ina aji o Laitoriani. Neitoki Solomon ayau nena tokitin apa naaitisinya Daudi papaai lenye, ina osholai, oina sahabu o nena masaa, neshum ninche te wueji neshumishoreki tiatua enkaji Olaitoriani." 
1Kings8:1 Neitoki Solomon aiturrur ilpayiani loo Siraeli o larikok pooki loo loshon, lelo arikok loo nkajijik oo loo menye, loo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, meetu dukuya olaiguanani Solomon te Yerusalem, pee eyau osanduku lo lning'o lo Laitoriani aaitung'uaa enkanasa e Daudi, aa taa Sion." 
1Kings8:2 Neiturrurrokino ilewa pooki loo Siraeli olaiguanani Solomon to sirua to lapa le Etamin, laa ninye olapa liopishana." 
1Kings8:3 Nepuonu ilpayiani pooki loo Siraeli, nedumu ilapolosak ilo sanduku." 
1Kings8:4 Neyau ninche ilo sanduku lo Laitoriani, oilo ng'obor, o nena tokitin pooki naasinya apa naatii atua ilo ng'obor, neyau ilapolosak o Lawi nena pooki." 
1Kings8:5 Ore olaiguanani Solomon o eumata pooki oo siraeli, apa naiturrurre te dukuya ninye, netii tenebo ninye te dukuya ilo sanduku, nepolos nkerra kumok oleng olmong'i lemeikenayu te nkumoi." 
1Kings8:6 Neitoki ilapolosak aayau ilo sanduku lo lning'o ewueji enye, tiatua ilo gilata liatua le nkaji, tiatua ine nesinya aisul. Tiabori inaipuko oo lkerubi." 
1Kings8:7 Amu kelak apa lelo kerubi inaipuko enye aaitushur ilo sanduku o nkeek enyena. 
1Kings8:8 Naa kaadoru apa nena keek oleng ometaa kelioo ineeiting'ie te wueji sinyati eton eitu ejing'i ine wueji sinyati e atua. Kake melioo te boo; netii ninche ine o taata. 
1Kings8:9 Metii apa toki atua ilo sanduku meteleku ake inapa soito are dapashi naatipika Musa ine te Horeb, teine apa neitobirie Olaitoriani olning'o o ltung'ana loo Siraeli, apa pee epuku aaing'uaa enkop e Misiri." 
1Kings8:10 Ore ake pee eipang'u ilapolosak aaing'uaa ine wueji sinyati, neiput enkatampoi enkaji Olaitoriani." 
1Kings8:11 Ore enkaraki ina neaku meidim ilapolosak aaitasho aaisiaaisho tenkaraki ina atampoi; amu eiputa enkitoo o laitoriani enkaji o Laitoriani. 
1Kings8:12 Neitoki Solomon ajo, “Etipika Olaitoriani enkolong keper, kake etejo ninye keton ninye te naimin namisimis." 
1Kings8:13 Aateshetaka nanu iyie ewueji e shumata. Ewueji nimany iyie ntarasi.” 
1Kings8:14 Neitoki olaiguanani aibelekenya aing'or olorere, nemayian ina umata pooki oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli. Neitashe ina kata eumata pooki oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli." 
1Kings8:15 Nejo ninye, “Meisisi Enkai, oo Siraeli, laa ninye oitabayie te nkaina enye ina apa naisiligie te nkutuk enye Daudi papaai lai, ejo," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Ore ebaiki enkolong nayaua iltung'ana laainei loo Siraeli aitung'uaa Misiri, eitu nanu agelu enkanasa too loshon pooki loo Siraeli naa ninye ashetie enkaji, pee etum enkarna ai ataa ketii ine; kake ategelua nanu Daudi pee eaku oloitore iltung'ana laainei Isiraeli.’" 
1Kings8:17 Etii apa atua oltau le Daudi papaai lai pee eshet enkaji tenkaraki enkarna Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli." 
1Kings8:18 Kake etiaka apa Olaitoriani Daudi papa, ‘Ore amu etii apa oltau lino pee ishet enkaji te nkaraki enkarna ai, itaasa iyie embae sidai amu etii apa ena atua oltau lino." 
1Kings8:19 Kake ore ake eyia mishet iyie ina aji, olayioni lino likiikini ninye olo ashet ina aji tenkaraki enkarna ai.’" 
1Kings8:20 Ore taata eitabayie Olaitoriani enkisiligata enye apa naisiligishore, amu atijing'a nanu erishata e Daudi papaai lai, naton to lorika le nkitoo le Israel, anaa apa enaisiligishore Olaitoriani, natesheta nanu enkaji te nkaraki enkarna Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel." 
1Kings8:21 Ore teina naishorua nanu ewueji nepiki osanduku le Nkai, laa ninye etii atua olning'o lo Laitoriani, apa oitobira tenebo loo papa, apa pee eyau ninche aaitung'uaa enkop e Misiri.”" 
1Kings8:22 Neitoki Solomon aitashe te dukuya olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani te dukuya ina umata pooki oo Siraeli, neitorio nkaik enyena pokira are ailepie shumata;" 
1Kings8:23 nejo ninye “Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, meetae Enkai nikinyaanyukie, te shumata te keper, arashu tiabori te nkop, imbung olning'o nintodolu enyorrata nauno too sinkan linono, oopuo te dukuya iyie too ltauja lenye pooki;" 
1Kings8:24 iyie apa oibung'a te papaai Daudi ina nimbalunye te ninye; ee iroro iyie te nkutuk ino, te nkarna ino nintabaya ina ena olong." 
1Kings8:25 Ore naa taata Olaitoriani, Enkai, e Israel, mbung'a to sinka lino Daudi, te papaai lai; ina apa nisiligie ninye ijo, Melai aekata te iyie oltung'ani oitashe te dukuya nanu, pee etonie olorika le nkitoo le Israel, teneing'or ake duoo ninye ilayiok linono nkoitoi enye, nepuo te dukuya nanu anaa apa enishomo te dukuya nanu." 
1Kings8:26 Ore naa taata na Ai e Israel, nchoo ilo rorei lino meitabari apa lirorie osinka lino Daudi, papaai lai." 
1Kings8:27 “Kake amaa, kemany Enkai enkop? Ng'ura mikiishaa iyie shumata o keper nalakua; kebaa naa enkitisho ena aji natesheta nanu!" 
1Kings8:28 Ore ake eyia itishilayie iyie enkomono o sinka lino o esayiata enye, Olaitoriani Enkai ai. Toning'o enkishirata o enkomono naomon osinka lino te dukuya iyie ena olong;" 
1Kings8:29 pee etum nkonyek inono aataboloto dama o kewarie aaing'ura ena aji, ene wueji nitejo iyie, ‘keaku keton enkarna ai teine.’ Pee itum iyie atoning'o ena omono naomon osinka lino te nkaraki ene wueji." 
1Kings8:30 Nining iyie enkomono esayiata o sinka lino oltung'ana linono Isiraeli, teneomon ninche eing'or ene wueji; ee toning'o iyie itii keper ina manyisho ino; tenining, nipalaki iyiook." 
1Kings8:31 “Teneas oltung'ani eng'oki tialo olelatia enye neinosieki ninye olmumai, nelotu ninye ainos olmumai te dukuya olperere lino lo lasar tiatua ena aji," 
1Kings8:32 nining naa iyie te keper, niaas embae nguanare iyie isinkan linono, nidung'oki enkiguana ilo arruoni, ayau enkarruoisho enye shumata endukuya enye makewan, nimbalunye ilo asipani alaaki ninye te risioroto e supatisho enye." 
1Kings8:33 “Tenemir ilmang'ati iltung'ana linono le Israel, enkaraki nataasa eng'oki tialo iyie," 
1Kings8:34 tenikimbelekenyakino ninche, neibalunye enkarna ino, neomon aasaisho te dukuya iyie tiatua ena aji; nining iyie te keper, nipalaki ing'ok oo ltung'ana linono. Torrinyu ninche ina kop ninchoo loo menye." 
1Kings8:35 “Teneikeno keper neaku meetae enchan, enkaraki nataasa ninche eng'oki tialo iyie, teneomon ninche eing'or ene wueji, neibalunye enkarna ino, neibelekenya aaing'uaa ing'ok enye ina kata intamio iyie ninche," 
1Kings8:36 toning'o naa iyie te keper, nipalaki eng'oki oo sinkan linono, Isiraeli, te nintengen iyie ninche enkoitoi napuo aaim, nincho iyie ninche enchan, naa ninye inchoo iltung'ana linono metaa ninye enjungore." 
1Kings8:37 “Tenelotu olameyu enkop, anaa olmeitai, anaa enkidaata oo ndaiki, anaa olmaati arashu olkurto; teneman aamuat ninche ilmang'ati lenye tiae anasa nabo oo nkanas enye; to lmeitai ake ninye pooki, o te muoyian ake ninye naba anaa enatii;" 
1Kings8:38 Teneomon te nkomono ake pooki, o te sayiata ake pooki nasaisho pooki tung'ani arashu iltung'ana linono loo Siraeli pooki, eyiolo ake oltung'ani emion oltau lenye makewan, neilepie nkaik enyena aipirie ena aji," 
1Kings8:39 nining naa iyie te keper teina manyisho ino, nipalaki ninche, niaas embae, nincho ake pooki tung'ani te risioroto oo nkoitoi enyena pooki, amu iyie ake, iyie ake, openy oyiolo iltauja too nkera pooki e tung'ani." 
1Kings8:40 Pee kitum ninche aatureita nkolongi pooki naaishu teina kop apa ninchoo iyie loo menye. 
1Kings8:41 “Ore tenebo nena, tenelotu oltung'ani loo loreren, leme o loo ltung'ana linono Isiraeli, oing'uaa enkop nalakua, nelotu tenkaraki enkarna ino," 
1Kings8:42 (amu kening'oo ninche enkarna ino kitok, o enkarna ino magilani, o enkaina ino naitoriori,) tenelotu ninye neomon eing'or ena aji," 
1Kings8:43 toning'o iyie te keper, teina manyisho ino, niaas te risioroto e nena naaomonu ilo tung'ani loo loreren te iyie; pee etum iloreren pooki le nkop aataiyiolo enkarna ino nikiureyu iyie, anaa enatiu iltung'ana linono loo Siraeli, netum sii aatayiolo nchere ore ena aji natesheta nanu naa enkarna ino eipotieki." 
1Kings8:44 “Teneipang iltung'ana linono aapuo olarrabal aagilunore ilmang'ati lenye, te nkoitoi ake ninye naba anaa enirriwayie ninche meima, neomon ninche Olaitoriani eing'or ina anasa nitegelua iyie oenkaji natesheta nanu te nkaraki enkarna ino," 
1Kings8:45 toning'o naa iyie itii keper enkomono o esayiata enye, nincho ninche meisula." 
1Kings8:46 “Teneas ninche eng'oki tialo iyie - amu meetae oltung'ani lemeas eng'oki, nigorokino iyie ninche, nincho iyie ninche ilmang'ati lenye, neaku ewaki ninche aaraya enkop oo lmang'ati lenye, elakua o etaana;" 
1Kings8:47 Kake tenepik ninche iltauja lenye teina kop apa nataarayioki aaya, neirridu ninche, nikisai ninche iyie teina kop oo lmang'ati lenye apa ooibung'a ninche nejo, ‘Kitaasa iyiook eng'oki, kitogolong'utua nikitaasa entorroni’;" 
1Kings8:48 teneirridu ninche too ndamunot enye pooki o too ltauja lenye pooki tiatua ina kop oo lmang'ati lenye, apa oowaita ninche aaraya, nikiomon ninche eing'orita enkop enye, apa ninchoo iyie loo menye, ina anasa nitegelua iyie, o ina aji natesheta nanu tenkaraki enkarna ino;" 
1Kings8:49 toning'o naa iyie ninche te keper teina manyisho ino, enkomono enye o esayiata enye. Nchoo ninche meisula." 
1Kings8:50 Tapalaki lelo tung'ana linono ootaasa eng'oki tialo iyie, tapalaki nkitarruorrot enye pooki naataasa tialo iyie. Nchoo ninche olng'ur too nkonyek e lelo ooibung'a aaraya ninche pee etum aaing'urrie ninche." 
1Kings8:51 (Amu iltung'ana linono ninche, naa enjung'ore ino ninche apa niyaua iyie aitung'uaa Misiri, aitung'uaa atua olmoti le nkima loo senkenke)." 
1Kings8:52 Nchoo nkonyek inono metoduaa esayiata o sinka lino o esayiata oo sinkan linono Isiraeli, nining ninche enkata naba anaa enikimpot iyie." 
1Kings8:53 Amu nteng'ela iyie ninche too loreren pooki le nkop, pee eaku enjung'ore ino, anaa apa enimbalunye te Musa, osinka lino, apa pee iyau loo papa aitung'uaa Misiri, Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
1Kings8:54 Ore ake pee eidip Solomon atejo ena omono pooki o esayiare to Laitoriani, neinyototo ninye aing'uaa dukuya olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani, te wueji duoo netigilie kung neilepie nkaik enyena aing'orie keper." 
1Kings8:55 Neitashe ninye nemayian eumata pooki oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli to ltoilo kitok, ejo," 
1Kings8:56 “Meisisi Olaitoriani laa ninye oishoo enkiyeng'iyeng iltung'ana lenyena loo Siraeli, te risioroto e nena pooki apa naaisiligishore ninye. Meetae ninye ororei obo otong'oro too nkisiligat enyena sidain, naatolikio apa ninye Musa osinka lenye." 
1Kings8:57 Metaa Olaitoriani Enkai ang tenebo iyiook anaa apa enatii tenebo loo papa; metaa meing'uaa ninye iyiook nemeiturraa iyiook. 
1Kings8:58 Pee etum aitonyorra iltauja lang kewan enye pee kipuo too nkoitoi enyena pooki, nikimbung nkitanapat enyena, o nkikoot enyena, o nkiguanat enyena, apa naaitanapa ninye loo papa." 
1Kings8:59 Nchoo kulo rorei laainei, laa ninche atasaishore te dukuya Olaitoriani, etaaniki Olaitoriani Enkai ang dama o kewarie, naa nchoo ninye meisula osinka lenye, neisulu iltung'ana lenyena Isiraeli, anaa ake enaishiaakino te pooki olong." 
1Kings8:60 Pee etum iloreren pooki le nkop aatayiolo nchere Olaitoriani ninye Enkai. Meetae likae. 
1Kings8:61 Enchoo naa iltauja linyi eitoriori te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai, nipuopuo too nkiguanat enyena, nimbung'ubung'u nkitanapat enyena anaa ena olong.”" 
1Kings8:62 Neitoki olaiguanani, o Siraeli pooki ootii tenebo, aaitayu olasar te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
1Kings8:63 Neishooyo Solomon anaa ilasarri le seriani to Laitoriani ilmong'i nkalifuni tikitam oare o nkerra nkalifuni iip nabo o tikitam. Neaku eitisinya olaiguanani o iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli enkaji Olaitoriani. 
1Kings8:64 Ore ake teina olong nemayian olaiguanani empolos e ndung'oroto apa natii dukuya enkaji o Laitoriani. Amu teine eitayio olasar opejori o lasar le ntapa o rubat naapir o lasar le seriani, amu ore apa ilo perere lo lasar lo suyai otii ine naa aikiti oleng, tenepiki olasar opejori o lasar le ntapa, o rubat naapir o lasar le seriani." 
1Kings8:65 Neaku eeta apa Solomon osirua teina kata, o Siraeli pooki tenebo ninye, eumata kitok nabaiki enejing'ieki Hamat o metabaiki oerata le Misiri, te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai ang, nkolong'i naapishana." 
1Kings8:66 Ore te nkolong e isiet neisho iltung'ana meshomo, nemayian lelo tung'ana olaiguanani, nepuo taa nkang'itie enye eng'ida neshipa too ltauja tenkaraki esupatisho pooki naitoduaa Olaitoriani Daudi osinka lenye o Siraeli lelo tung'ana lenyena." 
1Kings9:1 Ore pee eidip Solomon atesheta ina aji o Laitoriani o enkaji o laiguanani o pooki apa naayieu Solomon neshet," 
1Kings9:2 neitoki Olaitoriani aipang'aki Solomon enkata eare, anaa apa enaipang'aka ninye te Gibeon." 
1Kings9:3 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Atoning'o enkomono ino o esayiata ino, nitoomono iyie te dukuya nanu. Aitisinya nanu ena aji nitesheta iyie, natipika enkarna ai ine ntarasi. Ore nkonyek aainei oltau lai keaku ine etii nkatitin pooki." 
1Kings9:4 Kake ore tialo iyie, tenaa eilo te dukuya nanu, anaa apa papaai lino Daudi, to ltau le mborron o esupatisho, aas te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapa, nimbung nkiguanat aainei o nkikoot," 
1Kings9:5 naun aitubulaa olorika le nkitoria ino te Isirael ntarasi, anaa apa enaisiligie Daudi papaai lino, ajoki, ‘Melai aekata te iyie oltung'ani otonie olorika le nkitoo te Israel.’" 
1Kings9:6 Kake tenimbelekenya apaash esujata ai, iyie anaa nkera inono, nimimbung nkitanapat aainei, o nkiguanat aainei natipika nanu dukuya intae, nipuopuo aaisiaai kulie aitin niserememe ninche," 
1Kings9:7 naiwuang'ie naa nanu Isiraeli teina kop apa naishoo ninche; ore ina aji apa naitisinya nanu tenkaraki enkarna ai naiwuang'ie too nkonyek aainei, neaku Isirael endung'et e rashe o entoki naimakini too loreren." 
1Kings9:8 Neaku ena aji olchala le nkidaata, ore pooki ng'ae ogiroo neiputukuny, neisulisho, nejo ninche, ‘Kainyoo pee etaasa Olaitoriani ena tena kop o tena aji?" 
1Kings9:9 Naa kepuo ninche aajo, Enkaraki natung'uaitie Olaitoriani Enkai enye, naa ninye apa nayaua loo menye aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, neibung'are kulie aitin, neserem ninche neisiaai ninche. Ore enkaraki ina eyaua Olaitoriani ena torroni pooki shumata ninche.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Ore etulusoitie ilarin tikitam, eidipa Solomon atesheta nena ajijik pokira are, enkaji o Laitoriani," 
1Kings9:11 o enkaji olaiguanani, neidipa Hiram olaiguanani le Turo aishoo Solomon iltarakua o mbaoi o sahabu, anaa enayieu. Eishoo sii ninye olaiguanani Solomon Hiram nkanas tikitam tiatua enkop e Galilaya." 
1Kings9:12 Kake ore ake pee elotu Hiram te Turo adol nena anas naaishoo Solomon ninye, neitu eitiship ninye." 
1Kings9:13 Neaku etejo ninye, “Kaji eikununo kuna anas nikinchoo iyie nanu olalashe lai? Neaku etejoki apa ninche, enkop Kabul o taata." 
1Kings9:14 Neirriwaka apa Hiram olaiguanani ntalantani iip o tikitam e sahabu.” 
1Kings9:15 Naa nji eikununo enkisiaayiare, apa nataasa olaiguanani Solomon eshet enkaji o Laitoriani o enkaji enye makewan, o Milo, o esuntai e Yerusalem, o Hasor, o Megido, o Geser." 
1Kings9:16 (Ore apa Farao olaiguanani le Misiri neshomo aibung Geser nepejoo ninye te nkima, netaara apa ninye Ilkanaani oomanya ina anasa metuata, neishooyo enkanasa anaa enkishooroto enkiyama te ntito enye, ina kitok e Solomon." 
1Kings9:17 Neaku enyaaka apa Solomon ashet Geser) o Bet-horon e abori 
1Kings9:18 o Baalat, o Tamar tiong'ota, tiatua enkop e Yuda," 
1Kings9:19 o nkanas pooki naashumishoreki apa naata Solomon, o nkanas oo ngarrin enyena oo mbartan o nkanas oo lakedok lenyena loo mbartan, o pooki toki apa nayieu Solomon neshet te Yerusalem, otiatua Lebanon, o tiatua enkop pooki enkitoria enye." 
1Kings9:20 Ore lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootelekutua Ilamori, o Ilhiti, Olperesi, o Lhifi, o Lyebusi, lelo apa leme ilo lorere loo Siraeli" 
1Kings9:21 ore ina ishoi enye natelekuaki, teina kop, lelo apa leitu eidaikie iltung'ana loo Siraeli tukul - ore kulo neitaa Solomon irrindiki le nkisiaayiare enye, netiu ninche neija o metabaiki ena olong." 
1Kings9:22 Kake ore too ltung'ana loo Isiraeli eitu eitaa Solomon irrindiki. Isikarini apa ninche, iltung'ana lenyena kituaak apa ninche. Ilkituaak le njore, ilarikok le njore, o lkituaak loo ngarrin oo mbartan o lakedok loo mbartan." 
1Kings9:23 Ore kulo naa iltung'ana kituaak ooitasheiki esiaai e Solomon iip imiet ninche o onom, laa ninche ooitasheiki iltung'ana aasak le siaai." 
1Kings9:24 Kake eshomo ina tito e Farao teina anasa e Daudi nelo enkaji enye makewan apa nateshetaka Solomon ninye, neitoki ashetu Milo." 
1Kings9:25 Katitin uni apa to lari eitayu Solomon ilasarri oopejori o lasarri le seriani te nchumata ilo perere lo lasar apa oteshetaka Olaitoriani. Nepej enkorropil te dukuya Olaitoriani. Neaku eidipa apa ninye enkaji. 
1Kings9:26 Eitobira sii apa Solomon imelin kumok te Esiong'eber naa ninye nataaniki Eliton, to lomanaa le naiposha Nanyokie, te nkop e Edom." 
1Kings9:27 Neirriwaa Hiram tenebo nena melin kumok isinkan lenyena, iltung'ana oopuo too nkariak, ootamoo enaiposha, tenebo isinkan le Solomon." 
1Kings9:28 Nepuo ninche Ofir neyau sahabu teine naa ore esapuko enye ntalantani tikitam, neyaki ninche olaiguanani Solomon." 
1Kings10:1 Naa ore apa pee ening enkaiguanani e Sheba enkishoroto e Solomon tialo enkarna o Laitoriani, nelotu atem ninye too nkikilikuanat naagol." 
1Kings10:2 Nelotu apa ninye Yerusalem erikito iltung'ana kumok oleng, o ntamesin naanapita isonkoyoni, o sahabu kitok oleng, o soito oogol enkinyiang'a; ore ake pee elotu enetii Solomon, neliki ninye nena pooki naadamu naayieu neikilikuanu." 
1Kings10:3 Newal Solomon nkikilikuanat enyena pooki; meetae entoki neitu eliki olaiguanani ninye. 
1Kings10:4 Ore ake pee edol ina aiguanani e Sheba ina ng'eno nagut o laiguanani pooki, oina aji natesheta," 
1Kings10:5 o endaa natii emesa enye, oltonei loo lkituaak lenyena, o enkisiaayiare oo sinkan lenyena, nkilani enye, o lanapak lenyena loo nkikompeni o lasarri lenyena oopejori ooishooyo ninye tiatua enkaji Olaitoriani, eitu eitoki aidim atejo ae." 
1Kings10:6 Nejoki ninye olaiguanani, “Ekesipa ilomon apa latoning'o nanu te nkop ai makewan, ooipirta mbaa inono o engeno ino." 
1Kings10:7 Kake eitu apa nanu anyorraa lelo omon o maeu adol too nkonyek aainei makewan, naa ng'ura, eitu apa aalikini nanu mbaa pooki; ore engeno ino o karsisisho ino kelusoo te nena natoning'o nanu." 
1Kings10:8 Emunyak nkituaak inono, nemunyak isinkan linono, ootii dukuya iyie anaake nening engeno" 
1Kings10:9 Meisisi Olaitoriani Enkai ino; amu kitishipakine ninye iyie, nikipik iyie olorika le nkitoo le Israel! Ore enkaraki natonyorra Olaitoriani Israel ntarasi, kintaaninye iyie olaiguanani, pee itum atudung'o enkiguana niaas isupati.”" 
1Kings10:10 Neitoki ninye aisho olaiguanani ntalantani iip o tikitam e sahabu, o sonkoyoni kumok oleng o soito oogol enkinyiang'a. Eitu aekata eitokini aatum enkorropil naba anaa ina naishoo enkaiguanani e Sheba olaiguanani Solomon." 
1Kings10:11 Ore nena melin e Hiram apa naayautua sahabu te Efir neyau aaitung'uaa Ofir ilkeek kumok o soito oogol enkinyiang'a. 
1Kings10:12 Neitaa olaiguanani lelo keek irishinani enkaji o Laitoriani, o ne nkaji o laiguanani. O lwululi loo usin o nkai oo sinkolioitin tenkaraki ilaranyak. Eitu aekata eitokini aayau lelo keek, anaa aadol ometabaiki ena olong." 
1Kings10:13 Neisho Solomon ina aiguanani e Sheba nena pooki naayieu ninye. Entoki ake ninye natoomonuo metii nena naaishooki ninye tialo karsisisho o laiguanani Solomon. Neaku etorrinye apa ninye nelo enkop enye, tenebo isinkan lenyena." 
1Kings10:14 Naa ore apa enkiroishi e sahabu nayakaki Solomon to lari obo naa ntalantani iip ile o ntomoni ile o ile e sahabu," 
1Kings10:15 metii ina apa naing'uaa ilbiasharani o kodi oo lamirak o naaing'uaa ilaiguanak pooki le Arabia o lbalusuni leina kop. 
1Kings10:16 Neitobir olaiguanani Solomon ilong'oi iip are dapashi naaidong'uoki te sahabu; ore ake nabo naa shekeli iip ile e sahabu enkiroishi. 
1Kings10:17 Neitobiru ninye ilong'oi iip uni naaidong'uoki te sahabu, nepik ake elong'o nabo nkiloi are e sahabu. Nepik olaiguanani nena long'oi atua enkaji natii atua entim e Lebanon." 
1Kings10:18 Neitayu sii olaiguanani olorika le nkitoo kitok too lala loo lkanchaoni, nemur ninye te sahabu nasila." 
1Kings10:19 Eeta apa ilo orika le nkitoo nkedeta ile, ore tioriong olorika le nkitoo netii endukuya o lashe, ore ake enkalo nabo olorika netii ineeiteleikini nkaik, olng'atunyo oare ooitashe tembata oo neiteleikini nkaik," 
1Kings10:20 neitashe sii ilng'atunyo tomon oare teine, netii ake obo enkalo nabo e nkedet. Eitu aekata etumi embae nanyaanyukie ena te nkitoria ake ninye pooki." 
1Kings10:21 Ore apa ntokitin pooki naaokishoreki o laiguanani naa ine sahabu, ore imasaa pooki enkaji natii entim e Lebanon naa ine sahabu nasila. Meetae ine nkosholai, meshilari apa nena aaitaa toki toonkolong'i e Solomon." 
1Kings10:22 Amu eeta apa olaiguanani imelin e Tarshish te naiposha tenebo imelin e Hiram. Ore ake kata nabo te rishata oo larin okuni nepuonu imelin kumok naaing'uaa Tarshish enapita sahabu, o enkosholai, o lala loo lkanchaoni, olkuluoin, o motonyi sidain." 
1Kings10:23 Kaae nelusoo olaiguanani Solomon too laiguanak pooki le nkop, te karsisisho o te ng'eno." 
1Kings10:24 Neing'oru enkop pooki enetii Solomon pee epuonu aaning engeno enye, natipika Enkai atua endukuya enye." 
1Kings10:25 Neyau ake pooki tung'ani enkishooroto enye, ntokitin e nkosholai o ne sahabu, o lkarash, o manemane, o enkorropil, o mbartan, o nyumpui, neyau nkumok te pooki ari." 
1Kings10:26 Neitoki Solomon aiturrur tenebo ngarrin oo mbartan o lakedok loo mbartan; eeta apa ninye ngarrin oo mbartan enkalifu nabo o iip ong'uan, o lakedok loo mbartan nkalifuni tomon oare, apa ootipika ninye nena anas oo ngarrin oo mbartan tenebo sii olaiguanani te Yerusalem." 
1Kings10:27 Neitaa olaiguanani enkosholai entoki nalelek tumoto te Yerusalem, neitotiu anaa isoito, ore iltarakua nebayu anaa ilkeek lo lpurkel." 
1Kings10:28 Ore apa imbartan e Solomon naa Misiri eing'uaa o Kilikia. Ore lelo ooinyiang'u engarri oo mbartan te Misiri te shekeli iip uni e nkosholai, ore embarta naa te shekeli iip o onom;" 
1Kings10:29 neaku ore tialo ilbiasharani lo laiguanani nemirakini mbartan ilaiguanak pooki loo Lhiti o laiguanak le Siria. 
1Kings11:1 Etonyorra apa Olaiguanani Solomon nkituaak kumok oo loreren; entito e Farao, o enoo Lmoabu, o enoo le Amon o enoo le Edom, o enoo le Sidon, o nkituaak oo Lhiti, nena e lelo oreren apa ootiaaka Olaitoriani iltung'ana loo Siraeli," 
1Kings11:2 “Emiyama ake o ninche, nemeyama ninche o ntae. Amu esipa kepuo ninche aaibelekeny iltauja linyi nisujaa nkaitin enye.” Neibung apa Solomon kuna te nyorrata." 
1Kings11:3 Eeta apa ninye nkituaak iip naapishana, o nkapiak iip uni, ore nena kituaak enyena neibelekenya oltau lenye." 
1Kings11:4 Ore anaa nemoruau Solomon eibelekenya nkituaak enyena oltau lenye metusujai nkaitin enye; neitu eibung'are oltau lenye oleng Olaitoriani Enkai enye, anaa enatiu apa oltau le Daudi papaai lenye." 
1Kings11:5 Amu etusujayie Solomon Ashtoret ina ai ng'oruoi e Sidon, nesujaa Milkom ilo minong loo le Amoni." 
1Kings11:6 Neaku etaasa apa Solomon entorrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neitu ninye, eunokino asujaa Olaitoriani anaa apa enataasa Daudi papaai lenye." 
1Kings11:7 Neitoki Solomon ashetu ewueji e shumata e Kermosh ilo minong le Moab o ene Molek oilo minong le Amon, to ldoinyo te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong e Yerusalem." 
1Kings11:8 Neiko ninye neijia te nena kituaak enyena pooki oo loreren naapej enkorropil nepolosaki nkaitin enye. 
1Kings11:9 Negorokino apa Olaitoriani Solomon enkaraki naibelekenye oltau lenye aing'uaa Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, naipang'aka ninye katitin are" 
1Kings11:10 neitanapa ninye tialo ena bae pee melo arubare kulie aitin; kake eitu ninye eibung ina naitanapa Olaitoriani. 
1Kings11:11 Ore enkaraki ina nejoki Olaitoriani Solomon, “Ore amu ena itadamua, neitu imbung olning'o lai lo sotua o nkiguanat aainei naaitanapa nanu iyie esipa, kadung'oo nanu enkitoria ino aiwuang'ie te iyie naisho osinka lino." 
1Kings11:12 Kake ore te nkaraki Daudi papaai lino, maas nanu ena too nkolong'i e nkishui ino, kake kalo nanu adung'oo enkitoria te nkaina o layioni lino." 
1Kings11:13 Ore ake eyia, madung'oo nanu enkitoria pooki; kake kaisho nanu olosho obo olayioni lino, tenkaraki Daudi osinka lai, o tenkaraki Yerusalem naa ninye ategelua.”" 
1Kings11:14 Nedumu Olaitoriani olmang'atinta metigilunore Solomon, oji Hadad le Edom. Ole nkaji enkitoo apa ninye te Edom." 
1Kings11:15 Amu ore apa etii Daudi Edom, ore Yoab olarikoni le njore neilep alo anukaa ilootuata" 
1Kings11:16 Near Hadad metuata ilewa pooki le Edom. (Amu etobiko apa Yoab o ltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli te Edom ilapaitin ile, ometaba anaa neishie pooki lee te Edom.)" 
1Kings11:17 Kake eisikaka Hadad Misiri tenebo kulikae tung'ana le Edom loo sinkan le menye, neton apa aa enkerai kiti Hadad." 
1Kings11:18 Nedumunye ninche te Midian nepuonu Paran, neshoru kulikae te Paran nepuonu Misiri, enetii Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, laa ninye oishoo Enkaji, neikenaki ninye eorikinoto endaa, neisho ninye enkop." 
1Kings11:19 Netum Hadad omom oleng too nkonyek e Farao, neaku eishoo meyama enkanashe enkitok enye, enkanashe e Tafenes ina kitok o laiguanani." 
1Kings11:20 Ore ina anashe e Tefenes neiki ninye olayioni oji Genabat, laa te nkaji e Farao eoru Tafenes ninye ilki, netii apa Genebat enkaji e Farao aboitare ilayiok le Farao." 
1Kings11:21 Kake ore ake pee ening Hadad ajo eirure Daudi tenebo loo menye, netua sii Yoab olarikoni le njore, nejoki Hadad Farao, “Nchooki nanu mashomo enkop ang.”" 
1Kings11:22 Kake etiaaka Farao ninye, “Kainyoo nikitong'orikia te nanu, eji metaa ing'oru arrinyo enkop inyi? Nejoki Hadad ninye, Nchooki ake duoo mashomo.”" 
1Kings11:23 Neitoki Enkai adumu likae mang'atinta oji Rason olayioni Eliada, apa oisika aing'uaa olkitok lenye Hadadesa olaiguanani le Soba." 
1Kings11:24 Neiturrurroki ninye kewan iltung'ana neaku olarikoni loo larruok, ina kata apa eidipa Daudi atasesekuanisho; nepuo ninche Dameski nebik teine, neitaa ninche ninye olaiguanani le Dameski." 
1Kings11:25 Olmang'atinta apa le Israel ninye too nkolong'i pooki e Solomon, neas ntorrok anaa apa enataasa Hadad. Neaku olmang'atinta le Israel, neitore Siria." 
1Kings11:26 Ore apa Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat le Efraim e Sereda, ore osinka le Solomon, oji enkarna e ng'otonye Seruyia, naa enkoliai, neinyototokino sii ninye olaiguanani agilunore." 
1Kings11:27 Naa enkaraki ena apa pee etudumakine olaiguanani. Etesheta apa Solomon Milo, neram esuntai apa natigile te nkanasa e Daudi papaai lenye." 
1Kings11:28 Oltung'ani apa ogol oleng Yeroboam, naa ore ake pee edol Solomon ajo kaarriyia ilo barnoti, neisho meitasheiki esiaai pooki oo nkaik e nkaji e Yosef." 
1Kings11:29 Ore apa teina kata, pee eipang Yeroboam te Yerusalem, netumore oloiboni le Nkai oji Ahija le Shilo. Neishopito apa Ahija enkila ng'ejuk; netumo lelo pokira aa ninche ake te nkisiajata." 
1Kings11:30 Neitoki Ahija aibung enaduoo kila ng'ejuk naishopito nepolos aitayu ndung'ot tomon aare. 
1Kings11:31 Nejoki ninye Yeroboam, “Iwa iyie ndung'ot tomon, amu inji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli, ‘Ng'ura, etaa kajo pee adung'oo enkitoria te nkaina e Solomon, naa kaaisho iyie iloshon tomon," 
1Kings11:32 (kake ketum ninye olosho obo tenkaraki osinka lai Daudi o tenkaraki Yerusalem, ina anasa naa ninye ategelua too loshon loo Siraeli;)" 
1Kings11:33 Ore enkaraki naatung'uayie nanu Solomon, nelo aserem Ashterot ina ai ng'oruoi oo le Sidon, o Kemosh ina ai e Moab, o Milkom ina ai oo Lamori, neitu eaas esidai too nkonyek aainei, neitu eibung nkikoot aainei, o nkiguanat aainei, anaa apa enataasa Daudi papaai lenye." 
1Kings11:34 Ore ake eyia maya nanu enkitoo pooki aitung'uaa enkaina enye; kake kaitaa nanu ninye olarikoni too nkolong'i pooki enkishui enye tenkaraki Daudi osinka lai, laa ninye ategelua, neibung'a ninye nkitanapat aainei o nkiguanat aainei;" 
1Kings11:35 kake kaya nanu enkitoria aitung'uaa enkaina o layioni lenye naaisho nanu iyie iloshon tomon. 
1Kings11:36 Kake ore olayioni lenye kaisho nanu olosho obo, pee etum Daudi osinka lai ataa keeta oltaa te dukuya nanu anaake te Yerusalem, teina anasa nategelua nanu apik enkarna ai." 
1Kings11:37 Naa kaaya nanu iyie, nilo aitore nena pooki naang'uar oltau lino, nilo aaku olaiguanani te Israel." 
1Kings11:38 Naa tenining iyie nena pooki naaitanapa nanu iyie, nilo too nkoitoi aainei, niaas isupati too nkonyek aainei, aibung nkikoot aainei, anaa apa enataasa Daudi osinka lai, naaku nanu tenebo iyie, nashetu nanu enkaji ino aitubul, anaa apa enateshetaka Daudi, naaisho nanu iyie Israel." 
1Kings11:39 Naa ore tenkaraki ena kaitame nanu eishoi e Daudi, kake mme ntarasi.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Neing'oru taa Solomon pee ear Yeroboam metua: kake etudumunye Yeroboam, neisikaki Misiri, nelo enetii Shishak olaiguanani le Misiri, neton ninye te Misiri ometabau keeya e Solomon." 
1Kings11:41 Ore apa teina kata nkiaasin pooki e Solomon, o nena pooki naataasa, o engeno enye nagut, neigeroki te mbuku oo nkiasin e Solomon." 
1Kings11:42 Ore apa enkata naitoria Solomon Yerusalem o Israel pooki naa ilarin artam. 
1Kings11:43 Neirura Solomon aye tenebo loo menye, nenukari te nkanasa e Daudi papaai lenye; neitoreisho Rehoboam olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
1Kings12:1 Nelo Rehoboam Shekem, eshomo apa Isiraeli pooki Shekem aaitaa ninye olaiguanani." 
1Kings12:2 Ore ake pee ening Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat ina, (Amu eton apa etii Misiri, ine apa neisikaka ailany olaiguanani Solomon) neitoki Yeroboam ashukunye te Misiri." 
1Kings12:3 Neirriwaa ninche olkilikuai aaipotu ninye; ore Yeroboam o eumata oo Siraeli pooki nepuonu aajoki Rehoboam," 
1Kings12:4 “Eiroshiyie apa papaai lino enchata ang oo murto. Ore naa taata nteneneng'a ina kisiaayiare nagol e papaai lino, oina shata nairoishi oo murto natii shumata iyiook, naa aikisiaai iyiook iyie.”" 
1Kings12:5 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Enchom entung'uayioki too nkolong'i uni, nintokiki aashukunye enatii.” Neaku eshomo iltung'ana." 
1Kings12:6 Neitoki olaiguanani Rehoboam aikilikuanishore ilpayiani kituaak apa laa ninche ooitashe te dukuya papaai lenye Solomon, apa eton eishu, nejoki, “Kaa kiutakiki matawaliki ele orere?”" 
1Kings12:7 Nejoki ninche, “Tenaa iyaku iyie osinka le kulo tung'ana ena olong, nisiaai ninche, nirorie iyie ninche te supatisho tiniwaliki ninche, naa keaku ninche isinkan linono ntarasi.”" 
1Kings12:8 Kake etanya ninye ina utaroto natuutakita lelo payiani kituaak, neing'oru eutaroto oolbarnot le sirit enye, neitasheyie te dukuya ninye." 
1Kings12:9 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Kaa intae iututu pee kiwaliki ele orere laatiaakitia nanu, ‘Nteneneng'a ina shata oo murto apa natipika papaai lino shumata iyiook?’ ”" 
1Kings12:10 Nejoki lelo barnot le sirit enye, “Nji shomo tiaki ele orere likijoki ninche, ‘Eiroshiyie apa papaai lino enchata ang oo murto, kake inteneneng'aki iyie iyiook’; nji iyie shomo tiaaki ninche, ‘Ore enkilinta ai naa eisapuk alang empolos e papaai." 
1Kings12:11 Naa ore taata, teneiteleikia papaai intae olchata oiroishi le murt, kaponaa nanu ilo shata linyi loo murto. Eitamio intae papaai too lishien, kaitame nanu intae too nkulupani.’ ”" 
1Kings12:12 Neaku eewuo Yeroboam tenebo iltung'ana pooki enetii Rehoboam te nkolong e uni, anaa enatejo olaiguanani nejoki olaiguanani ninche, “Enyaaki wootu enatii te nkolong e uni.”"
