1Kings12:13 Newalaki olaiguanani iltung'ana te nkitarrikinoto, neany ina utaroto naishoo ilpayiani kituaak." 
1Kings12:14 Neirorie olorere anaa enatuutakitia ninye ilbarnot, ejoki, “Eiroshiyie apa papaai enchata inyi oo murto, naa kaponaa nanu ina shata inyi oo murto; eitamio apa intae papaai too lishien kake kaitame nanu intae too nkulupani.”" 
1Kings12:15 Neaku eitu ening olaiguanani olorere, amu embae ena nayaua Olaitoriani pee etum aitabai ororei lenye, apa oiroro Olaitoriani aimunye Ahija le Shilon aliki Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat." 
1Kings12:16 Ore ake pee edol Isiraeli pooki aajo eitu ening olaiguanani ninche, newaliki olorere olaiguanani, aajoki, “Kaa rubata iyiook kiata te Daudi? Mikiata iyiook enjung'ore to layioni le Yese. Enchom ilng'oborri linyi intae Israel! Ng'ura naa taata enkaji ino makewan Daudi.”" 
1Kings12:17 Neaku eshomo Isiraeli ilng'oborri lenye. Kake eitoria apa Rehoboam iltung'ana loo Siraeli oomanya atua nkanas e Yuda. 
1Kings12:18 Neitoki olaiguanani Rehoboam airriwaa Adoram, laa ninye apa olaitasheikinoni le siaai oo nkaik. Nenang iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli ninye too soito ometua. Neisarisaraki olaiguanani Rehoboam aked engari enye oo mbartan, neisikaki Yerusalem." 
1Kings12:19 Neaku etekepari apa Isiraeli aagilunore enkaji e Daudi ometabaiki ena olong. 
1Kings12:20 Ore ake pee ening iltung'ana pooki loo siraeli nchere etorrinyunye Yeroboam, neirriwaa olkilikuai aaipotu ninye meeu eumata, neitaa ninye olaiguanani te shumata Isiraeli pooki. Meetae hoo obo otusujayie enkaji e Daudi, meteleku ake olosho le Yuda." 
1Kings12:21 Ore ake pee elotu Rehoboam Yerusalem, neiturrurru enkaji e Yuda pooki o losho le Benchamen, iltung'ana nkalifuni iip nabo o ntomoni isiet, gelunot ooked ngarrin oo mbartan, pee earare enkaji eIsrael, pee errinyoki enkitoria Rehoboam olayioni le Solomon." 
1Kings12:22 Kake eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Shemaia, ilo tung'ani le Nkai, ejo" 
1Kings12:23 “Tiaki Rehoboam olayioni le Solomon, olaiguanani le Yuda, o ltung'ana pooki le nkaji e Yuda o e ne Benchamen, o kulikae tung'ana pooki," 
1Kings12:24 nji ejo Olaitoriani, milo iyie aarare ilalashera linono, lelo tung'ana le Israel. Torrinyoyu pooki ng'ae shomo enkang enye, amu ore ena bae naa nanu eing'uaa.” Neaku etoning'o ninche ororei lo Laitoriani, nerrinyo aapuo nkang'itie, te risioroto ororei lo Laitoriani." 
1Kings12:25 Neitoki Yeroboam ashet Shekem teina kop oo ldoinyo e Efraim, nelo abik teine, neitoki alo teine nelo ashet Penuel." 
1Kings12:26 Nejo Yeroboam to ltau lenye, “Kerrinyunye taata enkitoria alotu enkaji e Daudi," 
1Kings12:27 teneilep kulo tung'ana aapuo aaitayu ilasarri te nkaji e Nkai te Yerusalem. Neitoki iltauja le kulo tung'ana aaibelekenyakino olkitok lenye, Rehoboam olaiguanani le Yuda, naar ninche nanu matua nerrinyokino Rehoboam olaiguanani le Yuda.”" 
1Kings12:28 Neaku eiguane olaiguanani, neitobir ilasho oare le sahabu. Nejoki olorere, “Ishomo intae Yerusalem enkata naado. Eng'ura nkaitin inyi intae Israel, naa ninche apa naaitayutuo intae te nkop e Misiri.”" 
1Kings12:29 Neitasheyie ninye nabo te Betel nepik enkae Dan. 
1Kings12:30 Neaku ina bae eng'oki, amu eshomo iltung'ana aayiaya nabo te Betel, nepuo aayiaya enkae te Dan." 
1Kings12:31 Eitobira sii apa nkajijik too wuejitin e shumata, negelu ilapolosak tiatua olorere pooki, leme iloo Lawi." 
1Kings12:32 Negelu Yeroboam osirua te nkolong e tomon o imiet o lapa le isiet, anaa apa osirua oatae te Yuda, neitayu ninye ilasarri te nchumata olperere lo lasar; neaku etaasa ninye ina te Betel, apolosaki lelo asho ooitobira. Nepik ilapolosak Betel too wuejitin e shumata neeitobira ninye." 
1Kings12:33 Neilep ninye alo ilo perere lo lasar oitobira te Betel te nkolong e tomon o imiet, to lapa le isiet, teilo apa otegelua ninye to ltau lenye makewan; neitisiny ilo sirua tenkaraki iltung'ana loo Siraeli, neilep alo olperere lo lasar apej enkorropil." 
1Kings13:1 Ore te nkintanapata o Laitoriani, nelotu oltung'ani le Nkai eing'uaa Yuda nelotu Betel. Neitashe apa Yeroboam tembata o lperere lo lasar apej enkorropil." 
1Kings13:2 Neishiraki ilo tung'ani le Nkai olperere lo lasar to rorei lo Laitoriani ejo, “Lo perere lo lasar, lo perere, nji ejo Olaitriani: ‘Ng'ura, keikini enkaji e Daudi enkayioni, naa keji enkarna enye Yosia, naa kepolos ninye te shumata iyie lelo apolosak loo wuejitin e shumata, lelo oopej enkorropil te shumata iyie, naa kepuoi aapejoo iloik loo ltung'ana te shumata iyie.’ ”" 
1Kings13:3 Neishoru ninye olmonekie teina olong ake, ejo, “Olmonekie ele oiroro Olaitoriani; ejo, ‘Ng'ura kegili ele perere lo lasar aasulaki enkop, ore nena kuruon naatii enchumata enye nebukokini enkop.’ ”" 
1Kings13:4 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani ina kiroroto o ltung'ani le Nkai, naishiraka ilo perere lo lasar te Betel, neitorio enkaina enye teilo perere lo lasar ajo, “Embung'a ninye.” Ore ina aina enye duoo naitorioyie aimbung'ie ninye, netoyu, ometaa meekure errinyo." 
1Kings13:5 Nedanya sii olperere lo lasar neibukori nkuruon teilo perere lo lasar, te risioroto eilo monekie oishorua ilo tung'ani le Nkai to rorei lo Laitoriani." 
1Kings13:6 Nejoki olaiguanani ilo tung'ani le Nkai, “Toomonokoki taata to Laitoriani Enkai ino, pee etum enkaina ai anyaaki atisidana.” Neomon ilo tung'ani le Nkai Olaitoriani, neitoki enkaina olaiguanani aishiu, netiu anaa duoo." 
1Kings13:7 Neitoki olaiguanani ajoki ilo tung'ani le Nkai, “Wou maape ang pee ilo ainos endaa, naaisho sii enkishoroto.”" 
1Kings13:8 Nejoki ilo tung'ani le Nkai olaiguanani, “Tenikincho ninye olpisiaai le nkaji ino, maairiamariyie nanu iyie. Nemainos nanu endaa aashu aok enkare tene wueji;" 
1Kings13:9 amu ina apa aaitanapa ororei lo Laitoriani, ejo, ‘Minos endaa nimiok enkare, nimilo aim enkoitoi duoo niimua.’ ”" 
1Kings13:10 Neaku eshomo ninye aim ae oitoi, neitu eibelekenya aim enkoitoi duoo naimua elotu Betel." 
1Kings13:11 Netii apa oloiboni moruo Betel. Nepuonu ilayiok lenyena aaliki nena pooki naataasa oltung'ani le Nkai ina olong te Betel; o lelo rorei sii ootiaaka olaiguanani, neliki ninche papaai lenye." 
1Kings13:12 Nejoki papaai lenye ninche, “Kaa oitoi eima?” Neitodol ilayiok lenyena ninye ina oitoi naimua oltung'ani le Nkai oing'uaa Yuda." 
1Kings13:13 Nejoki ninye ilayiok lenyena, “Erotokoki osikiria,” Neirotoki ninche ninye osikiria, neked ninye." 
1Kings13:14 Nelo ninye asujaa ilo tung'ani le Nkai neinepu etonita te ntonata olchani, oji olmaloni; nejoki ninye, “Eiyie doi oltung'ani le Nkai oing'uaa Yuda?” Nejoki ninye, “Ee nanu.”" 
1Kings13:15 Neitoki ajoki ninye, “Wou maape ang pee ilo ainos endaa.”" 
1Kings13:16 Nejo ninye, “Marrinyo nanu alo tenebo iyie, anaa alo ajing atua aji tenebo iyie; nemainos nanu endaa anaa aok enkare tenebo iyie tene wueji;" 
1Kings13:17 amu aatiaka nanu ororei lo Laitoriani, ‘Minos endaa nimiok enkare teine, nimirrinyo aim enkoitoi duoo niimua.’ ”" 
1Kings13:18 Nejoki ninye ilo tung'ani le Nkai, “Ara sii nanu oloiboni le Nkai anaa iyie, naairorie nanu olmalaika to rorei lo Laitoriani, ejo, ‘Torrinyu ninye meeu tenebo iyie enkaji ino pee etum ainosa endaa neok enkare.’ ”" 
1Kings13:19 Kake eteleja apa ninye ninye. Neaku eshomo tenebo ninye neinos endaa te nkaji enye neok enkare. 
1Kings13:20 Ore etonita ninche te mesa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii ilo oiboni apa otorrinyuo ninye ariku;" 
1Kings13:21 neishiraki ninye ilo tung'ani le Nkai apa oing'uaa Yuda, ejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Ore enkaraki neitu imbung ororei lo Laitoriani, neitu imbung nkitanapat Olaitoriani Enkai, kake itorrinyunye," 
1Kings13:22 ninya endaa niok enkare tene wueji, nikitiaaka apa ninye iyie Minos endaa nimiok enkare. Mepuoi aanukaa osesen lino te nkurare oo loo papaai lino.’”" 
1Kings13:23 Ore ake pee eidip ainosa endaa neokisho neirotoki osikiria ilo oiboni duoo otorrinyuo ariku. 
1Kings13:24 Ore eloito nenang'are olng'atuny ninye te nkoitoi near ninye metua. Nenang'akini osesen lenye enkoitoi, neitashe osikiria tembata enye; neitashe sii olng'atuny te mbata o sesen." 
1Kings13:25 Naa ng'ura! Etogiroitie iltung'ana nedol osesen otanang'akaki e nkoitoi, neitashe olng'atuny te mbata. Nepuonu aaimaki teina anasa apa namanya ilo oiboni moruo." 
1Kings13:26 Ore ake pee ening ilo oiboni apa otorrinyuo ninye te nkoitoi ina, nejo ninye, “Oltung'ani le Nkai ilo; leitu ening ororei lo Laitoriani; neaku eishooyie Olaitoriani meinosa olng'atuny, neinos olng'atuny ninye aar metua, terisioroto eilo rorei oirorie ninye.”" 
1Kings13:27 Nejoki ninye ilayiok lenyena, “Erotokoki nanu esikiria” neaku eirotokoki ninye esikiria," 
1Kings13:28 Nelo ninye neinepu ninye eirrag te nkoitoi, neitashe osikiria o lng'atuny te mbata ilo sesen Neitu einos olng'atuny ilo sesen neitu eony ilo sikiria." 
1Kings13:29 Neya ilo oiboni osesen leilo tung'ani le Nkai neiteleiki osikiria, nerrinyu ayau enkanasa pee eishiraki nenukaa." 
1Kings13:30 Neirragie ilo sesen anukaa te nkurare enye makewan; neishiraki ninche ninye ejo," 
1Kings13:31 “Ee olalashe lai!” Ore ake pee eidip atunukai ninye, nejoki ilayiok lenyena, “Tenaye akenya, entunukayioki te nkurare natunukarieki oltung'ani le Nkai; erragie iloik laainei tembata oo loik lenyena." 
1Kings13:32 Amu ore ina kiroroto apa naishiraka to rorei lo Laitoriani olperere lo lasar te Betel, o nkajijik pooki oo wuejitin e shumata naati nkanas e Samaria, esipa, keyookini aaitabaya.”" 
1Kings13:33 Ore te siadi ena eitu eibelekenya nkoitoi e Yeroboam torrok, kake enyaaka aitayu ilapolosak too wuejitin e shumata tiatua olorere pooki; te pooki ooyieu, neitisiny metaa ilapolosak too wuejitin e shumata." 
1Kings13:34 Neaku ena bae eng'oki te nkaji e Yeroboam, o metaa eiwuang'ieki neidaikieki aaishie te nkop." 
1Kings14:1 Ore apa teina kata nemuoyu olayioni oji Abija, olayioni le Yeroboam." 
1Kings14:2 Nejoki Yeroboam enkitok enye, “Tudumunye nimbelekenya, pee meyiolouni ake ajo ira enkitok e Yeroboam, nilo Shilo; ng'ura etii oloiboni oji Ahija ine laa ninye apa oibonuo tialo nanu nchere kaaku olaiguanani le kulo tung'ana." 
1Kings14:3 Toshoroi imukateni tomon, o embata oo mukateni naamelook o siang'au le naisho, nilo enetii ninye; pee kiliki ninye enatiu enkerai.”" 
1Kings14:4 Neas enkitok e Yeroboam ina, nedumunye ninye nelo Shilo, nelo enkaji e Ahija. Nemeekure apa edolisho Ahija amu eiliilaitie nkonyek enyena te nkaraki emoruao." 
1Kings14:5 Nejoki Olaitoriani Ahija, “Ng'ura, kilotu enkitok e Yeroboam aikilikuanishore tenkaraki olayioni lenye; amu kemuoi ninye. Ena o ena tiaaki ninye.” Ore ake pee ebau neitaakuno kaae kitok." 
1Kings14:6 Kake ore ake pee ening Ahija oltoilo loo roruat enyena, ejing'u aimu kutukaji, nejoki “Tijing'u ena kitok e Yeroboam; kainyoo pee intaakuno eira likae tung'ani? Amu aaitanapaki ilomon ooiroishi tenkaraki iyie." 
1Kings14:7 Shomo tiaaki Yeroboam Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli. ‘Ore amu aailepie iyie tiatua iltung'ana pooki, naaitaa iyie olarikoni te shumata iltung'ana laainei Isiraeli," 
1Kings14:8 natudung'oyie enkitoria aitung'uaa enkaji e Daudi, naaisho iyie; neitu ake sii itiu anaa osinka lai Daudi, apa oibung nkitanapat aainei naasuj ninye nanu to ltau lenye pooki, aas ake nena sidain too nkonyek aainei," 
1Kings14:9 kake ore iyie itaasa ntorrok aitalang nena pooki apa naatii dukuya iyie, nishomo dukuya aitobiraki kewan kulie aitin, o nkitanyaanyukot naasholuno, nikintagor nanu, nikincho nanu oriong. Ore naa ng'ura," 
1Kings14:10 kayau nanu entorroni shumata enkaji e Yeroboam, naiwuang'ie te Yeroboam pooki lee, aa oloena o lolakuno tiatua Israel pooki, namut nanu enkaji e Yeroboam tukul, anaa enapejoo oltung'ani olchala neishie." 
1Kings14:11 Ore pooki ng'ae lo lmarei le Yeroboam oye tena anasa neinos ildiain. Ore pooki ng'ae oye tiong'ata neinos intaritik oloing'ang'e; amu Olaitoriani oiroro ena.’” 
1Kings14:12 “Tudumunye naa taata shomo enkaji ino. Naa tenebaiki nkejek inono enkanasa, neye ina kerai." 
1Kings14:13 Naa keishiraki Isiraeli pooki ninye, nenukaa ninye; amu ore ilo laa ninye eeta Yeroboam naa kenukari te nkurare, amu atua ninye ake enotieki entoki naitiship Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli, tiatua enkaji e Yeroboam." 
1Kings14:14 Ore ake sii kedumu Olaitoriani tenkaraki kewan enye olaiguanani olotu shumata Isiraeli, laa ninye olo aiwuang'ie enkaji e Yeroboam." 
1Kings14:15 Naa keosh Olaitoriani Isirael neitotiu anaa oseyiai oikirikira tiatua enkare, naitayu isiraeli aiwuang'ie tena kop sidai apa naishoo loo menye, neidapashaki ninche teidia alo Frati, enkaraki naitobira ninche Asherim enye neitagor Olaitoriani." 
1Kings14:16 Naa kepalaa ninye Isiraeli tenkaraki ina ng'oki e Yeroboam, apa naataasa neitaas sii iltung'ana loo Siraeli.”" 
1Kings14:17 Nerrinyo enkitok e Yeroboam alo Tirsa. Ore ake pee ebau embata enkaji enye, neye enkerai." 
1Kings14:18 Nenukaa Isiraeli pooki ninye neishiraki terisioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani, apa oiroro aimunye osinka lenye Ahija oloiboni le Nkai." 
1Kings14:19 Ore kulie kiaasin e Yeroboam, ilarrabali, o enkitoria enye, ng'ura, eigeroki ninche te mbuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak loo Siraeli." 
1Kings14:20 Ore enkata apa naitoreishe Yeroboam, naa ilarin tikitam oare, neirura aye anaa loo menye neitoreisho Nadab te rishata enye." 
1Kings14:21 Eitoria apa Rehoboam olayioni le Solomon Yuda. Ore apa pee eiteru Rehoboam aitoreisho naa oloo larin artam oobo. Eitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon oopishana te Yerusalem, teina anasa naa ninye etegelua Olaitoriani tiatua iloshon pooki loo Siraeli, pee etum atipika enkarna enye ine. Naa keji apa enkarna e ng'otonye Naama e Amon." 
1Kings14:22 Neas apa Yuda embae torrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neitagor ninche ninye nepik olom tenkaraki nena ng'ok enye naataasa." 
1Kings14:23 Amu eteshetakitia sii ninche ate iwuejitin e shumata, o ng'apeta o Asherim, te pooki wueji neika o tiabori pooki shani onyori" 
1Kings14:24 neetae sii apa ilewa le nkisiaayiare e seremare enkibor oo nkonyek teina kop. Etaasa ninche te risioroto e nena pooki olminong te lelo oreren apa ootaarayie Olaitoriani te dukuya iltung'ana loo Siraeli. 
1Kings14:25 Ore to lari le imiet le nkitoria e Rehoboam neilepu Shishak olaiguanani le Misiri alotu agilunore Yerusalem; 
1Kings14:26 neya ninye ilchumat te nkaji o Laitoriani o lchumat te nkaji o laiguanani, neya ninye pooki toki. Neya sii nena long'oi pooki e sahabu apa naaitobira Solomon;" 
1Kings14:27 neitobir olaiguanani Rehoboam ilong'oi o suyai apik erishata e nena, neisho ninche lelo kituaak le rripore, apa oorripito kutukaji e nkaji o laiguanani." 
1Kings14:28 Naa ore ake tenelo olaiguanani enkaji o Laitoriani, nenapu olarriponi nena long'oi ayau enkaji e rripore." 
1Kings14:29 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Rehoboam o pooki apa naataasa ninye, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
1Kings14:30 Neeta apa Rehoboam o Yeroboam olarrabal anaake. 
1Kings14:31 Neirura Rehoboam, neye anaa loo menye nenukari too nkuraren oo loo menye te nkanasa e Daudi. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Naama e Amon, neitoreisho Abijam olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
1Kings15:1 Ore apa to lari le tomon o isiet le nkitoria o layioni le Nebat, neiteru Abijan aitoreisho te Yuda." 
1Kings15:2 Neitoreisho ninye ilarin okuni te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Maaka entito e Abishalom. 
1Kings15:3 Neas ninye ing'ok pooki apa naataasa menye te dukuya ninye, nemeitoriori oltau lenye tialo Olaitoriani Enkai enye, anaa apa oltau le Daudi papaai lenye." 
1Kings15:4 Ore ake eyia tenkaraki Daudi, neisho ninye Olaitoriani oltaa te Yerusalem, aisho olayioni lenye metijing'a erishata enye, neitasheyie Yerusalem;" 
1Kings15:5 enkaraki apa nataasa Daudi mbaa supati too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neitu ninye eibelekenya te pooki toki naitanapa ninye Olaitoriani, too nkolong'i pooki enkishui enye, meteleku ake te mbae naipirta Uria ilo le Hiti." 
1Kings15:6 Neeta Rehoboam o Yeroboam olarrabal too nkolong'i e nkishui enye pooki. 
1Kings15:7 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Abijam, o nena pooki naataasa, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda. Neeta apa Abijan olarrabal o Yeroboam." 
1Kings15:8 Neirura Abijam neye anaa loo menye, nenukari ninye te nkanasa e Daudi, neitoreisho Asa olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
1Kings15:9 Ore to lari le tikitam le nkitoria e Yeroboam olaiguanani loo Siraeli neiteru Asa aitoreisho te Yuda. 
1Kings15:10 Neitoreisho ilarin artam oobo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Maaka entito e Abishalom. 
1Kings15:11 Neas Asa mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani anaa apa enataasa Daudi papaai lenye. 
1Kings15:12 Neiwuang'ie lelo lewa le nkisiaayiare e seremare enkiborra oo nkonyek apa naitobira loo menye. 
1Kings15:13 Eiwuang'ieki sii Maaka ng'otonye meitoki aaku enkaiguanani enkaraki naata apa enkitanyaanyukoto olminong apa naitobirakaki Ashera, nesulaki Asa ina kitanyaanyukoto enkop nepejoo to erata le Kedron." 
1Kings15:14 Kake eitu apa eiwuang'ieki iwuejitin neeika. Ore ake eyia, keitoriori apa oltau le Asa tialo Olaitoriani katukul, nkolong'i pooki enkishiu enye." 
1Kings15:15 Neyau ninye atua enkaji o Laitoriani ntokitin apa naaitisinya menye o naaitisinya ninye makewan, enkosholai, o sahabu o masaa." 
1Kings15:16 Netii apa olarrabal erishata e Asa o Baasha olaiguanani loo Siraeli too nkolong'i enye pooki. 
1Kings15:17 Eshomo Baasha olaiguanani loo Siraeli agilunore Yuda, neshet Rama, pee etum aibooi pooki ng'ae olotu enetii Asa olaiguanani le Yuda." 
1Kings15:18 Neyau Asa enkosholai pooki oina sahabu apa natelekua to lchumati le nkaji Olaitoriani, o to lchumati le nkaji o Laitoriani, nepik nkaik oo sinkan lenyena. Neirriwaa olaiguanani Asa ninche meshomo enetii Benhadad olayioni le Tabrimon olayioni le Hesion, olaiguanani le Siria, laa Dameski apa namanya, nejoki," 
1Kings15:19 “Maibung'ata iyiook pokira anaa apa enatiu papaai o papaai lino: ng'ura aairriwaka nanu iyie enkishoroto e nkosholai o sahabu. Shomo ntobira osotua lino o Baasha olaiguanani loo Siraeli, pee aatum atung'uai nanu.”" 
1Kings15:20 Nening Benhadad enatejo olaiguanani Asa, neirriwaa ilarikok lenyena le njore meshomo aagilunore nkanas oo Siraeli, nemir Ljion, o Dan, o Abelbet-Maaka o Kinerut pooki tenebo enkop pooki e Naftali." 
1Kings15:21 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani Baasha ina, neitu eitoki ashet Rama, nelo ninye abik te Tirsa." 
1Kings15:22 Neitoki olaiguanani Asa alimu enkitanapata, tiatua Yuda pooki, pee meing'uari ninye oltung'ani obo, pee epuo aaya lelo soito apa le Rama o mbaoi enyena, apa naa ninche eshetishore Baasha, nelo olaiguanani Asa ashetie Geba e Benchamen o Mispa." 
1Kings15:23 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Asa, enkidimata enye pooki, o nena pooki naataasa ninye, o nkanas naatesheta ninye, neigero pooki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak loo Siraeli. Kake ore etamorua ninye netum emuoyian too nkejek enyena." 
1Kings15:24 Neirura Asa neye anaa loo menye, nenukari ninye te nkurare oo loo menye te nkanasa e Daudi papaai lenye. Neitoreisho Yehoshafat olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
1Kings15:25 Neiteru Nadab olayioni le Yeroboam aitoreisho tiatua Isiraeli, to lari liare le Asa ilo aiguanani le Yuda. Neitoreishe ninye te Israel ilarin oare." 
1Kings15:26 Neas ninye ntorrok te dukuya nkonyek Olaitoriani, nelo aibung olkuaak, le menye. Neas ing'ok nerikoki Isiraeli metaasa ing'ok." 
1Kings15:27 Ore Baasha olayioni le Ahija lo losho le Isaakar, nerresh ninye. Near Baasha ninye metua te Gibeton nara enoo lfilisti, amu eirraga apa Nadab o Siraeli pooki aang'adu Gibeton." 
1Kings15:28 Neaku etaara Baasha ninye metua to lari liokuni le nkitoria e Asa olaiguanani le Yuda, neitoreisho ninye te rishata e Nadab." 
1Kings15:29 Ore ake pee eaku olaiguanani nesesekuan enkaji e Yeroboam pooki, eitu ninye eing'uaa olaishirani te nkaji e Yeroboam. Eidakie pooki te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani apa oiroro aimunye osinka lenye oji Ahija le Shilo." 
1Kings15:30 Naa tenkaraki nena ng'ok e Yeroboam apa naataasa, nerikoki Israel metaasa engoki, o enkaraki ina naitagoro ninye Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel." 
1Kings15:31 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Nadab, o nena pooki naataasa, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak loo Siraeli." 
1Kings15:32 Neeta apa Asa olarrabal, o Baasha ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli too nkolong'i enye pooki." 
1Kings15:33 Ore to lari liokuni le nkitoria e Asa olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Baasha olayioni le Ahija aitore Israel pooki te Tisra, neitoreisho ilarin tikitam oong'uan." 
1Kings15:34 Neas ninye intorrok too nkonyek Olaitoriani, neibung orrekie le Yeroboam teina ng'oki natorikoko Israeli metaasa." 
1Kings16:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani aimu Yehu olayioni le Hanani tenkaraki Baasha, ejo," 
1Kings16:2 “Ore anaa naadumu ailepie iyie aitung'uaa nkulukuok, naaitaa iyie olarikoni loo ltung'ana laainei Isiraeli, nimbung'a iyie orrekie le Yeroboam, nitorikoko iltung'ana laainei Isiraeli metaasa ing'ok, kintagoro nanu tenkaraki ing'ok enye." 
1Kings16:3 Ng'ura kaiwuang'ie nanu katukul, Baasha o enkaji enye aishie, naitotiu enkaji ino anaa enkaji e Yeroboam olayioni le Nabat." 
1Kings16:4 Ore pooki ng'ae to lmarei le Baasha oye tiatua enkanasa, neinos ildiain. Ore pooki ng'ae oye tiong'ota neinos ilmotonyi lo loing'ang'e.”" 
1Kings16:5 Ore apa nkiaasin e Baasha, o naataasa, o enkidimata enye, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak loo Siraeli." 
1Kings16:6 Neirura Baasha neye anaa loo menye nenukari te Tirsa; neitoreisho Ela olayioni lenye te rishata enye. 
1Kings16:7 Neitoki ororei Lo Laitoriani alotu eimu Yehu oloiboni le Nkai, olayioni le Hanani. Baasha o enkaji enye apa eipirta ilo rorei, tenkaraki entorroni pooki apa nataasa too nkonyek Olaitoriani, neitagor ninye teina siaai oo nkaik enyena, neiko anaa apa Yeroboam, nenyaaka sii aidaikie." 
1Kings16:8 Ore to lari le tikitam o ile lo laiguanani Asa le Yuda, neitore Ela olayioni le Baasha Isiraeli te Tirsa, neitoreisho ilarin oare." 
1Kings16:9 Kake etarresho Simri, ilo kitok lo lpisiaai loo ngarrin oo mbartan ninye. Ore apa etii ninye Tirsa, eokisho nemera te nkaji e Arsa, laa ninye apa oitasheiki enkaji te Tirsa," 
1Kings16:10 nejing'u Simiri neosh ninye anang'ie enkop, near metua to lari le tikitam oopishana le nkitoria e Asa olaiguanani le Yuda, neitoreisho ninye te rishata enye." 
1Kings16:11 Ore ake pee eiteru aitoreisho, ore ake enatonie to lorika lenye le nkitoo, near enkaji e Baasha pooki metuata. Eitu ninye eing'uaa olee obo lo lmarei lenye anaa ilchoreta lenyena." 
1Kings16:12 Neidaikie Simri anaa enkaji e Baasha pooki, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani apa oiroro tialo Baasha aimunye Yehu oloiboni le Nkai," 
1Kings16:13 tenkaraki ing'ok pooki e Baasha o ng'ok e Ela olayioni lenye apa naataasa ninche. Eitagoro ninche Olaitoriani Enkai oo siraeli too nkitanyaanyukot enye. 
1Kings16:14 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Ela o nena pooki naataasa ninye, neigeroki tiatua mbukui oo ntepen oo laiguanak loo Siraeli." 
1Kings16:15 Ore to lari le tikitam oo pishana le nkitoria e Asa olaiguanani le Yuda neitoreisho Simri nkolong'i naapishana te Tirsa. Netii apa iltimito ootuuno ilng'oborri egilunore Gibeton oo Lfilisti," 
1Kings16:16 ore lelo timito ootii ilng'oborri nening eji, “Etarresho Simri olaiguanani near metua.” Ore enkaraki ina neitaa Isiraeli pooki Omori ilo kitok le njore, metaa olaiguanani le Israel ina olong oo lng'oborri." 
1Kings16:17 Neaku eilepa Omori aing'uaa Gibeton o Siraeli pooki tenebo ninye. Nepuo aang'adu Tirsa. 
1Kings16:18 Ore ake pee edol Simiri nchere eibung'aki enkanasa, nelo ninye olgilata liatua le nkaji o laiguanani, nepejoo inaa aji o laiguanani etii atua, neye ninye." 
1Kings16:19 Etua tenkaraki e nena ng'ok enyena naataasa, neas ntorrok te dukuya Olaitoriani, neibung olkerreti le Yeroboam. O tenkaraki sii ng'ok naataasa erikoki Isiraeli ing'ok." 
1Kings16:20 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Simiri, oina natarreshishe, neigeroki tiatua mbukui oo ntepen oo laiguanak loo Siraeli." 
1Kings16:21 Etoorote apa iltung'ana loo Siraeli katitin are: etusujaitie olpisiaai loo ltung'ana Tibni olayioni le Ginat aaitaa olaiguanani. Etusujaitie olikae pisiaai Omori. 
1Kings16:22 Kake ore lelo tung'ana ootusujaitie Omori, nemir lelo ootusuja Tibni olayioni le Ginat. Neaku etua Tibni neaku Omori ninye olaiguanani." 
1Kings16:23 Ore to lari le tomoni uni oo kuni le nkitoria e Asa olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Omori aitore Israel, neitoreisho ilarin tomon oare. Too larin ile eitoria Tirsa." 
1Kings16:24 Einyiang'ua apa ninye endoinyo e Samaria te Shemer neinosie ntalantani are e nkosholai, neitobir apa ninye ina doinyo ashet, nejo enkarna eina anasa natesheta Samaria, eipotie enkarna e Shemer, olopeny ina doinyio." 
1Kings16:25 Neas Omori ntorrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neas ntorrok aitulus te lelo pooki ooituruko te dukuya ninye." 
1Kings16:26 Amu eibung'a ninye olkerreti le Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat. Ore too ng'ok naatorikoko ninye Israeli metaasa, neitagor Olaitoriani Enkai oo siraeli, tenkaraki nkitanyaanyukot enye." 
1Kings16:27 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin naataasa Omori, oina kidimata naitodolua, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak loo Siraeli." 
1Kings16:28 Neirura Omori neye anaa loo menye, nenukari te Samaria. Neitoreisho Ahab olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
1Kings16:29 Ore to lari le tomoni uni o isiet le nkitoria e Asa olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Ahab olayioni le Omori aitore Isiraeli te Samaria. Neitoreisho ilarin tikitam oong'uan." 
1Kings16:30 Neas Ahab olayioni le Omori ntorrok te dukuya Olaitoriani aitulus te lelo apa ooituruko te dukuya ninye. 
1Kings16:31 Ore edol anaa entoki nalelek te ninye teneibung olkerreti le Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, neyau ninye Yesebel entito e Etabal olaiguanani le Sidon aitaa enkitok enye. Nelo ninye aisiai Baal neserem ninye." 
1Kings16:32 Neshetaki ninye Baal olperere lo lasar tiatua enkaji e Baal apa natesheta te Samaria. 
1Kings16:33 Neitobir Ahab ashera. Etaasa Ahab mbaa kumok aitagor Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli aitulus too laiguanak pooki loo Siraeli apa ootii te dukuya ninye." 
1Kings16:34 Ore too nkolong'i enyena neshet Hiel le Betel Yeriko. Etipika ninye olkitamanyunoto ainosie Abiram olkikau lenye, nepik nchomito ainosie Segub olayioni lenye oti, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani, apa oiroro aimunye Yoshua olayioni le Nuni." 
1Kings17:1 Nejoki apa Eliya le Tishbi te Gilead, nejoki Ahab, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, laa te dukuya ninye aitashe, metumi enkinuku aashu enchan te kuna olong'i, meteleku ake to rorei lai.”" 
1Kings17:2 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii ninye, ejo," 
1Kings17:3 shomo tung'uai ine nimbelekenya alo enkalo o loosaen, nilo aisudori to erata le Kerit. Aa taa oloo saen lo lkeju le Yordan." 
1Kings17:4 Shomo tooko enkare eilo erata amu aitanapa nanu ilkurruki pee kintoti iyie teine. 
1Kings17:5 Neaku eshomo ninye te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani. Nelo ninye abik tembata eilo erata le Kerit tenkalo oloosaen to lkeju le Yordan. 
1Kings17:6 Neyaki ilkurruki ninye imukateni o nkiri tadekenya, neyaki sii teipa, neokisho teilo shorro." 
1Kings17:7 Ore te nkiti kata netoyu ilo shorro, amu meetae apa enchan teina kop." 
1Kings17:8 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii ninye, nejoki," 
1Kings17:9 “Tudumunye, shomo Serafat e Sidon, nilo abik teine. Ng'ura aitanapa nanu enkoliai teine pee kintoti iyie.”" 
1Kings17:10 Neaku etudumunye ninye nelo Serafat. Ore ake pee ebaiki kishomi enkanasa, ng'ura etii enkoliai ine nasotu ilkeek, neipot ninye nejoki, “Iyakaki nanu enkiti are te nkikompe, pee aok.”" 
1Kings17:11 Ore eloito ina oliai ayau enkare, neipotu ninye ajoki, “Iyakaki nanu embelati e mukate te nkaina ino.”" 
1Kings17:12 Nejoki ina oliai ninye, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, eitu nanu apej toki, emborei enkaina e ntapa ake aata te siang'au o enkiti ilata to ltulet. Naa ore taata, ilkuti keek nanu asotu pee alo ayier tenkaraki kewan ai o enkayioni ai, pee kitum aainosa nikiye.”" 
1Kings17:13 Nejoki Eliya ninye, “Miureisho, shomo taasa anaa enitejo; kake tang'asa ntobirakaki enkiti mukate nikiyaki, ore tesiadi ina nintoki taa aitobiraki kewan o enkayioni ino." 
1Kings17:14 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, ‘Ore ilo siang'au le ntapa metoyu aekata, ore ilo tulet le ilata nemeishunye aekata ometabau ina olong nairriwaki Olaitoriani enchan enkop.’ ”" 
1Kings17:15 Nelo ninye aas anaa enatejo Eliya; ore ninye o Eliya olmarei lenye neinos endaa nkolong'i kumok. 
1Kings17:16 Ore ilo siang'au le ntapa neitu aekata etoyu, neitu aekata eishunye ilo tulet le ilata, terisioroto eilo rorei lo Laitoriani oirorie Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Ore te siadi nena olong'i nemuoyu enkayioni eina oliai. Neitirrishaki emuoyian oleng o metaa meekure eyang. 
1Kings17:18 Nejoki ninye Eliya, “Kaa kiaatakinore iyie nanu, lo tung'ani le Nkai? Iewuo iyie enatii pee edamuni eng'oki ai, niyau keeya e nkayioni ai!”" 
1Kings17:19 Nejoki Eliya ninye, “Inchooki sii iyie ina ayioni ino.” Neya ninye ina ayioni too nkaik e ngotonye, nenap ninye aya olgilata le shumata ine apa neirrag ninye, neirragie te ndapash enye makewan." 
1Kings17:20 Neishiraki ninye Olaitoriani ejo, “Olaitoriani Enkai ai, iyaka iyie entorroni shumata ena oliai apa naa ninye aewuo airragaa, aar enkayioni enye metua?”" 
1Kings17:21 Neitoriori ninye te shumata ina ayioni katitin uni, neishiraki Olaitoriani, ejo, “Olaitoriani Enkai, nchoo enkishui ena kerai errinyokino.”" 
1Kings17:22 Nening Olaitoriani olkiyioi le Eliya; nerrinyokino ina kerai enkishui enye aitoki, nepiu ninye." 
1Kings17:23 Neya Eliya ina kerai, neitadou aitung'uaa ilo gilata le shumata, neyau olgilata neitarasaki ngotonye; nejo Eliya, “Ng'ura eishu enkayioni ino.”" 
1Kings17:24 Nejoki ina kitok Eliya, “Ayiolo taa taata ajo ira iyie oltung'ani le Nkai, nesipa ororei lo Laitoriani te nkutuk ino.”" 
1Kings18:1 Ore te siadi nkolong'i kumok, nelotu ororei le Nkai enetii Eliya, to lari liokuni, ejo, “Shomo ntoduaai kewan te Ahab, amu kairriwaki nanu enchan enkop.”" 
1Kings18:2 Kaae nelo Eliya aitoduaaya kewan te Ahab. Ore apa ina kata netirrisha olameyu te Samaria. 
1Kings18:3 Neipotu Ahab Obadiah laa ninye apa oitasheiki enkaji enye. Naa keyanyit apa Obadiah Olaitoriani oleng. 
1Kings18:3 Neipotu Ahab Obadiah laa ninye apa oitasheiki enkaji enye. Naa keyanyit apa Obadiah Olaitoriani oleng. 
1Kings18:4 Naa ore ake pee earaa Yesebel iloibonok lo Laitoriani, neya Obadia iloibonok le Nkai iip nelo aisudoo moo onom te nkapune, neitoti ninche too mukateni o te nkare." 
1Kings18:5 Neipotu Ahab Obadiah nejoki, “Shomo atua enkop pooki, o nchorroi pooki oo nkariak o erat pooki, amu ebaiki nikitum nkujit nikincho mbartan o nyumpui meye, pee mikintiany ake embata oo ng'uesi.”" 
1Kings18:5 Neipotu Ahab Obadiah nejoki, “Shomo atua enkop pooki, o nchorroi pooki oo nkariak o erat pooki, amu ebaiki nikitum nkujit nikincho mbartan o nyumpui meye, pee mikintiany ake embata oo ng'uesi.”" 
1Kings18:6 Neaku etooro apa ninche enkop pokira oare, pee etum aashom. Nelo Ahab enkae alo nelo Obadia enkae alo openy." 
1Kings18:7 Ore eloito Obadia te nkoitoi, ng'ura, nenang'are Eliya ninye; neyiolou Obadia ninye, nebatata te nkomom abaiki enkop, nejo, “Kaiyie ele olkitok lai Eliya?”" 
1Kings18:8 Newaliki ninye ajoki, “Ee nanu. Shomo tiaaki olkitok lino, ‘Ng'ura ajo etii Eliya ene!’ ”" 
1Kings18:9 Nejoki Obadia ninye, “Kaa ng'oki ataasa nanu, eji metaa nchooyo osinka lino apik enkaina e Ahab, maataara nanu matua?" 
1Kings18:10 Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, meetae olorere aashu enkitoria neitu eirriwaa olkitok lai ilkiliku king'oru iyie, naa tenejo ninche, ‘Metii ninye ene,’ neinosie olmumai ina kitoria aashu ilo orere, nchere eitu ninche kitum iyie." 
1Kings18:11 Eji ore taata nijo iyie, Shomo tiaaki olkitok lino, Ng'ura, etii Eliya ene." 
1Kings18:12 Naa tenaaorore nanu iyie nikiya iyie enkiyang'et o Laitoriani ewueji nemayiolo, niaaku tenalo nanu ajoki Ahab ina, nikilau ninye, naar nanu matua, hoo nayanyita nanu osinka lino Olaitoriani ebaiki telelero ai." 
1Kings18:13 Aimetolikioki apa olkitok lai enataasa ina kata apa ear Yesebel iloibonok lo Laitoriani, naisudoo nanu iloibonok iip lo Laitoriani, moonom tiatua enkapune, naitoti nanu ninche too mukateni o te nkare?" 
1Kings18:14 Eji nijo taata iyie, Shomo tiaaki olkitok lino, ng'ura etii Eliya ene.” Pee aar nanu matua." 
1Kings18:15 Nejo Eliya, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani loo lororani, laa te dukuya ninye nanu aitashe, kalo ake aitoduaaya kewan ai te ninye taata.”" 
1Kings18:16 Kaae nelo Obadia atumore Ahab, neliki ninye. Nelo Ahab atumore Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Ore ake pee edol Ahab Eliya, nejoki ninye, “Kaa iyie doi ele, olaitanyamalani loo Siraeli?” Newaliki ninye ajoki," 
1Kings18:18 “Eitu nanu aitanyamal Isirael kake iyie oitanyamala, o enkaji e papaai lino, enkaraki nitalama nkitanapat o Laitoriani, nisujaa Baal." 
1Kings18:19 Ore naa taata shomo nturrurrokoki iltung'ana loo Siraeli to ldoinyo le Karmel, o lelo oibonok pokira iip ong'uan o onom le Baal. O lelo oibonok iip ong'uan le Ashera, oodaa te Mesa e Yesebel.”" 
1Kings18:20 Neipotu Ahab iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli, neiturrur iloibonok tenebo to ldoinyo le Karmel." 
1Kings18:21 Nelotu Eliya anyikaki iltung'ana pooki nejoki, “Ibukaashasha akenya o anu too ndamunot are? Tenaa Olaitoriani ninye Enkai, entusuj ninye; kake tenaa Baal nisujaa ninye.” Neitu ewaliki iltung'ana ororei hoo obo." 
1Kings18:22 Neitoki Eliya ajoki iltung'ana, “Nanu ake openy taata otelekua too loibonok lo Laitoriani; kake ore iloibonok le Baal naa iip ong'uan o onom." 
1Kings18:23 Nchoo meishori iyiook iloing'ok oare naa nchoo ninche metegelaki ate obo, nedung'udung neiteleiki ilkeek, kake emipik enkima ine. Naa kaitobir sii nanu olikae oing'oni naiteleiki ilkeek, nemapik enkima ine." 
1Kings18:24 Nimpotipoto enkarna e nkai inyi, naipot sii nanu enkarna Olaitoriani. Ore Enkai nawalu te nkima naa ninye Enkai.” Newalu iltung'ana pooki aajo, “Enkiroroto sidai.”" 
1Kings18:25 Neitoki Eliya ajoki lelo oibonok le Baal “Entegelaki ate oloing'oni obo ning'asing'asa aaitobir, amu intae ilkumok. Nimpotipoto enkarna e nkai inyi, kake emipik enkima.”" 
1Kings18:26 Neya ninche oloing'oni obo oishooki ninche, neitobir ninye, neipot enkarna e Baal ebaiki tadekenya ometaa dama, ejo, “Oo Baal tawaliki iyiook!” Kake eitu etumi oltoilo anaa oltung'ani otawala. Neitiam ninche aaman ilo perere lo lasar apa oitobira." 
1Kings18:27 Ore eipira enkolong neikoroj Eliya ninche, ejo “Entabuaku oleng amu enkai ninye, ebaiki negira adamisho oleng, aashu enyamalita, aashu eshomo nkang'itie. Aashu ebaiki neirura naa keishiaakino neinyeyieki.”" 
1Kings18:28 Neishir ninche aabuaku, nedung'udung ate too lalema anaa enatiu olkerreti lenye, ometaba anaa nerukunye osarge too seseni lenye." 
1Kings18:29 Ore pee elusoo enkipirrata e nkolong, nelimana ninche aaibonisho ometabau erishata naishoori olasar. Kake meetae oltoilo otoning'oki, metii ewalata, nemetii oltung'ani otishilayie." 
1Kings18:30 Neitoki Eliya ajoki iltung'ana pooki, “Wootu entinyikakaki,” nepuonu iltung'ana pooki aanyikaki ninye. Neram ninye ilo perere lo lasar lo Laitoriani apa otigilaki." 
1Kings18:31 Neya Eliya isoito tomon oare te risioroto e siana oo layiok le Yakobo, laa ninche apa eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii, “Ejo keaku eikiji enkarna ino Isiraeli.”" 
1Kings18:32 Ore te lelo soito neshetu olperere lo lasar te nkarna Olaitoriani. Netur ninye engumoto aitaman emanaroto olperer lo lasar, oba tendapasho anaa ilanterera oare." 
1Kings18:33 Nepik ilkeek aitobiraki. Nedung'udung ilo oing'oni aitaa ndung'udung'ot neiteleiki shumata lelo keek. Neitoki ninye ajo, “Emputa iltooi oong'uan enkare, nibukokiki olasar opejori, tenchumata oo lkeek.”" 
1Kings18:34 Neitoki ajo, “Engilie entubukoki” neigilie ninche eniare. “Neitoki ajo Engilie ene uni;” neigilie ninche ene uni." 
1Kings18:35 Neigilie ninche ene uni. Neruko enkare teilo perere lo lasar, neiput ine negum nemanaa to lperere lo lasar." 
1Kings18:36 Ore te nkata naishoori olasar le nkitukuo, nelotu oloiboni Eliya anyiku nejo, “Oi Olaitoriani, naa Ai e Abraham, o Isaak, o Israel, nchoo eyiolouni ena olong nchere iyie Enkai tiatua Israeli. Nara nanu osinka lino, naa tenkarna ino nanu ataasa kuna kitoduat pooki." 
1Kings18:37 Tawalikiaki nanu Olaitoriani, tawalikiaki pee eyiolou kulo tung'ana nchere, iyie Olaitoriani ora Enkai, naa iyie oibelekenya iltauja lenye.”" 
1Kings18:38 Nedou enkima o Laitoriani, neinos ilo asar, olkeek o soito, o enterit neishu ina are apa natii ewueji negum nemanaa to lperere lo lasar." 
1Kings18:39 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana pooki ina, nebatata aaitabaiki nkomomi enye enkop; nejo, “Olaitoriani ninye Enkai, Olaitoriani ninye Enkai.”" 
1Kings18:40 Neitoki Eliya ajoki ninche, “Embung'a lelo oibonok le Baal; emincho ninye elo obo.” Neibung'i ninche, neyau Eliya ninche aitadou ayau olchorro le Kishon, near ninche metuata teine." 
1Kings18:41 Neitoki Eliya ajoki Ahab, “Ilepa shomo tadaayu niokisho; amu ening'o oltoilo le nchan eshaita.” Kaae nelo Ahab adaa neokisho." 
1Kings18:42 Neilep Eliya alo enchumata oldoinyo le Karmel, neirrugo abaiki enkop, nepik enkomom enye erishata oo nkung enyena." 
1Kings18:43 Nejoki ninye osinka lenye, “Ilepa taata shomo, ning'or enkalo e naiposha.” Neilep ninye alo neing'or, nejo, “Metii toki.”" 
1Kings18:44 Neitoki ajoki, “Nyaaki shomo katitin naapishana.” Ore te nkata e naapishana nejo ninye, “Ng'ura etii enkiti atampoi naikununo anaa enkaina oltung'ani nailepu tiatua enaiposha.” Neitoki ajoki, “Ilepu shomo tiaaki Ahab, ‘Ntobira engarri ino oo mbartan nidoyio alo, pee mikimbok ake enchan.’ ”" 
1Kings18:45 Ore te nkiti rishata neroku shumata too nkatampo o to siwuo, nelotu enchan kitok, neked Ahab engarri enye nelo Yesreel." 
1Kings18:46 Netii apa enkaina Olaitoriani shumata Eliya; nerreten ninye empolos enye nekuet aituruk te Ahab nelo enjing'et e Yesreel. 
1Kings19:1 Neliki Ahab Yesebel nena pooki naataasa Eliya. Oina sii natara metuata iloibonok pooki to lalem. 
1Kings19:2 Neitoki Yesebel airriwaki Eliya olkilikuai, ejo, “Maaitaasa nanu nkaitin ina, naaitulus sii, teneitu nanu aitotiu enkishui ino anaa enkishui e obo lenye tena saa taisere.”" 
1Kings19:3 Neureishoyu ninye neinyototo aisik, nelo Beer-sheba e Yuda neing'uaa osinka lenye teine." 
1Kings19:4 Kake ore ninye makewan eshomo elototo enkolong nabo tiong'ota. Nelo aton te ntonata olchani oata oloip. Neomonu pee eye, ejo, “Eiririkine Olaitoriani, iwuang'ie enkishui ai, amu maikash nanu too loo papa.”" 
1Kings19:5 Neirrag ninye airura to loip lo lchani, naa ng'ura neiseyie olmalaika ninye nejoki ninye, “Tudumunye inosa endaa.”" 
1Kings19:6 Neing'orisho ninye, naa ng'ura etii embata e ndukuya enye emukate natapejoki too soito ooirowua, o esiang'au e nkare. Nedaa ninye neokisho, neitoki airrag." 
1Kings19:7 Neitoki olmalaika lo Laitoriani enkata e are, neiseyie ninye, nejoki, “Tudumunye inosa endaa, amu kegolu elototo te iyie.”" 
1Kings19:8 Nedumunye ninye nedaa neokisho, nelo te ngolon eina daa nainosa too nkolong'i artam, o nkewarietin artam, omeshomo Horeb ilo doinyo le Nkai." 
1Kings19:9 Nebau ninye enkapune neirrag ine, naa ng'ura, eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii ninye, nejoki ninye, “Kaa iasita tene, Eliya?”" 
1Kings19:10 Nejo ninye, “Aata apa nanu olom to Laitoriani, Enkai oo lororani, amu etanyaita iltung'ana loo Siraeli olning'o lino, nesulaa ilpereren loo lasarri, near iloibonok linono metuata to lalem; metaa nanu ake, nanu ake openy otelekua; neing'oru ninche enkishui ai, pee eiwuang'ie.”" 
1Kings19:11 Neitoki ajoki, “Shomo ntasho te nchumata o ldoinyo te dukuya Olaitoriani.” Naa ng'ura eloito Olaitoriani agiroo, nekut olkutati kitok ogol lelo doinyo, nebel ndapidapo aitaa mbelibelat te dukuya Olaitoriani, kake metii Olaitoriani atua olkutati. Ore te siadi olkutati nelotu enkikirikirata enkop, kake metii Olaitoriani atua enkikirikirata e Nkop." 
1Kings19:12 Ore te siadi enkikirikirata enkop nelotu enkima, kake metii Olaitoriani atua enkima. Ore te siadi enkima nelotu oloti toilo obor." 
1Kings19:13 Ore ake pee ening Eliya ina, neimulumul enkomom enye to lkila nelo aitashe te nkutuk e nkapune. Naa ng'ura nelotu oltoilo enetii ninye, nejoki, “Kaa iyie iasita tene, Eliya?”" 
1Kings19:14 Nejo ninye, “Aata apa nanu olom te nkaraki Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani amu etanyaita iltung'ana loo Siraeli olning'o lino, neuroo ilpereren linono loo lasarri, near iloibonok linono metuata tolalem, netaa nanu ake openy otelekua, neing'oru ninche enkishui ai peyie eiwuang'ie.”" 
1Kings19:15 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Torrinyoyu shomo te nkoitoi ino enkalo e ong'ata e Dameski; ore ake pee ibaya, nilo abukoki eilata Hasael, aput metaa olaiguanani le Siria." 
1Kings19:16 Niput Yehu olayioni le Nimshi metaa olaiguanani loo Siraeli. Ore Elisha olayioni le Shefat le Abel-mehola, nibukoki eilata aput metaa oloiboni le Nkai te rishata ino." 
1Kings19:17 Ore ilo oilanya olalem le Hasael nelo Yehu aar metua. Ore ilo oilany olalem le Yehu nelo Elisha aar metua. 
1Kings19:18 Ore ake eyia kaleku nanu nkalifuni naapishana tiatua Isiraeli, lelo pooki leitu egilaki kung neitu eirrugokino Baal, o pooki leitu eng'utut Baal.”" 
1Kings19:19 Kaae nelo Eliya teine, nelo atum Elisha olayioni le Shefat eturishore ilmong'i tomon oare. Netii apa ninye tenebo ilo kiteng le tomon oare. Negiroo Eliya ninye nenang'aki olkila lenye." 
1Kings19:20 Neing'ua Elisha lelo mong'i nekuet asujaa Eliya, nejoki ninye, “Nchooki nanu mashomo ang'utut papaai o yieyioo aisho ole sere, pee aatum atusuja iyie.” Nejoki Eliya ninye, “Torrinyoyu shomo; amu kaa nanu aaitaasa iyie?”" 
1Kings19:21 Nerrinyo ninye te sujata enye, neitayu nena keek oo murto oo lmong'i neyieng ninche. Neyier nkiri enye tenebo nkeek oo murto oo lmong'i. Neisho iltung'ana meinosa, neinos ninche. Neitoki ninye adumunye alo asujaa Eliya nelo aisiaai ninye." 
1Kings20:1 Eiturrurro apa Benhadad iltung'ana lenyena tenebo. Netii ilaiguanak tomoni uni oare tenebo ninye, neeta mbartan o ngarrin oo mbartan. Nelo ninye aman Samaria neitayunye olarrabal." 
1Kings20:2 Neirriwaa ninye ilkiliku enkanasa e Ahab olaiguanani loo Siraeli, nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Benhadad." 
1Kings20:3 ‘Ore enkosholai ino o sahabu ino naa nkunainei. Inaainei nkituaak inono o nkera inono.’ ” 
1Kings20:4 Newal olaiguanani loo Siraeli ajo, “Ore anaa enitejo olkitok lai, lo aiguanani, ara nanu olino, o nena pooki naata nanu.”" 
1Kings20:5 Neitoki ilkiliku aapuonu ejo, “Nji ejo Benhadad: Aairriwaka nanu iyie ilkiliku ajo, Iyakaki nanu enkosholai ino, o sahabu ino, o nkituaak inono o nkera inono." 
1Kings20:6 Ore ake eyia kaairriwaki nanu isinkan laainei taisere tena saa, naa kepuonu aajur enkaji ino o nkajijik oo sinkan linono, neya pooki toki naitiship ninche.”" 
1Kings20:7 Neitoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli aiturrur ilpayiani pooki leina kop, nejoki, “Entisipu taata nidolidolo aajo enyamali eing'oru ele tung'ani. Amu aairriwaka ninye nanu olkilikuai te nkaraki nkituaak aainei o nkera aainei, o tenkaraki enkosholai ai osahabu, nemaata nanu entoki natomito.”" 
1Kings20:8 Ore lelo payiani pooki oltung'ana pooki, nejoki ninye, “Mining iyie ninye niminyorraa.”" 
1Kings20:9 Kaae nejoki ninye lelo ooirriwua Benhadad, “Entiaaki olkitok lai olaiguanani, ‘Ore nena pooki e dukuya niyieu tialo osinka lino, kaas nanu, kake ore ena bae maidim nanu ataasa.’ ” Nerrinyo lelo ooirriwuaki neyaki ninye olkilikuai. Neirriwaki Benhadad ninye olkilikuai nejoki," 
1Kings20:10 “Maaitaasa nanu nkaitin ina naaitulus, tenaa kelekuni ninye enterit te Samaria naaiput nkaik ang.”" 
1Kings20:11 Newal olaiguanani loo Siraeli ajo, “Entiaaki ninye, ‘Mincho ilo orreten imasaa enyena o larrabal ewuasa anaa ilo olaku.’ ”" 
1Kings20:12 Ore ake pee ening Benhadad ilo kilikuai eokisho tenebo ilaiguanak too lng'oborri, nejoki ninye ltung'ana lenyena, “Entijing irrishat inyi to larrabal.” Nejing ninche irrishat enye aarasaki ina anasa." 
1Kings20:13 Naa ng'ura, nelotu oloiboni le Nkai anyikaki Ahab olaiguanani loo Siraeli nejoki, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Itoduaa iyie ele orora kitok pooki? Ng'ura kaishoru ninche apik nkaik inono ena olong; naa ilo iyie ayiolou nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
1Kings20:14 Neitoki Ahab ajo, “Aitialo ng'ae?” Nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Tialo isinkan loo lbalusuni loo lkerenketi.” Neitoki Ahab ajo, “Kaing'ae oiteru olarrabal?” Newaliki ajo, “Iyie.”" 
1Kings20:15 Neitoki ninye aipotu lelo sinkan loo lbalusuni loo lkerenketi, naa iip are ninche o tomoni uni oare, ore te siadi ninche neitoki aipotu iltung'ana loo Siraeli, nkalifuni naapishana." 
1Kings20:16 Neipang ninche aapuo te nkipirata enkolong, ina kata eokisho Benhadad too lng'oborri, ninye o lelo aiguanak tikitam oare apa ootareto ninye." 
1Kings20:17 Ore lelo sinkan loo lbalusuni loo lkerenketi neituruk aapuo. Neirriu Benhadad iltung'ana, nepuo aajoki ninye, “Eilepu iltung'ana aapuonu te Samaria.”" 
1Kings20:18 Nejo ninye, “Tenaa eiteseriani eetuo ninche, eyau ninche eishu, naa tenaa eitolarrabal epuonu iyau ninche eishu.”" 
1Kings20:19 Kaae neipang kulo aapuo te nkanasa, lelo sinkan loo lbalusuni too lkerenketi, oina jore natusujayie ninche." 
1Kings20:20 Near ake oltung'ani oltung'ani oipirare; neilanyisho iltung'ana le Siria, nesujaa Isiraeli ninche, kake eilanyishe Benhadad olaiguanani le Siria te mbarta tenebo ilakedok loo mbartan." 
1Kings20:21 Nelo olaiguanani loo Siraeli aibung mbartan o ngarrin oo mbartan, near iltung'ana le Siria oleng." 
1Kings20:22 Neitoki oloiboni le Nkai alotu anyikaki olaiguanani loo Siraeli, nejoki ninye, “Wou, ntagoluoyu, nidamu oleng enilo aas; amu ore telde ari, naa eikilotu olaiguanani le Siria agilunore.”" 
1Kings20:23 Nejoki isinkan lo laiguanani le Siria ninye, “Ore nkaitin enye naa nkaitin oo ldoinyo, neaku kegol ninche aalang iyiook. Metaa maape iyiook aarare ninche te nkop naisiaja, nemeeta nchere pee eitu kimir ninche." 
1Kings20:24 Naa nji nkuna, iwuang'ie ilaiguanak too wuejitin enye, nipik ilarikok le njore irrishat enye;" 
1Kings20:25 nimpotu enjore naikununo anaa enapa natimiraki. Aipirakinye embarta enkae barta o engarri oo mbartan enkae garri oo mbartan; nikipuo iyiook aarare ninche te nkop naisiaja nemeeta nchere pee eitu iyiook kigolu aalang ninche.” Nening ninye enatejo ninche, neas ina." 
1Kings20:26 Ore teina rishata o lari neipotu Benhadad aiturrur enjore e Siria, neilep aapuo Afek, pee earare Isiraeli." 
1Kings20:27 Neipotuni Iltung'ana loo Siraeli, neishori ninche imasaa o larrabal, nepuo aarare ninche. Neun iltung'ana loo Siraeli ilng'oborri te dukuya ninche netiu anaa iluaat are kutiti oo nkineji, kake eiputa iltung'ana le Siria enkop." 
1Kings20:28 Nelotu oltung'ani le Nkai anyiku nejoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Ore amu etejo iltung'ana le Siria eji, hore Olaitoriani naa enkai oo ldoinyo, kake mme enkai oo erat ninye, ore enkaraki ina, kaishoru nanu ele orora pooki apik nkaik inono, pee itum iyie atayiolo nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Neun ninche ilng'oborri aaipirakinore ninche nkolong'i naapishana. Ore te nkolong e naapishana neitutumi olarrabal. Neosh iltung'ana loo Siraeli iltung'ana le Siria, isikarini nkalifuni iip nabo oopuo too nkejek te nkolong nabo." 
1Kings20:30 Neisikaki ilkulikae enkanasa e Afek, neurokino esuntai iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam e lelo ootelekutua. Neisik sii ninye Benhadad nelo ajing olgilata liatua le nkanasa." 
1Kings20:31 Nejoki isinkan lenyena ninye, “Ng'ura, kitoning'o iyiook nchere, ore ilaiguanak le nkaji e Israel, naa ilaiguanak oata olng'ur. Nchoo iyiook maishopo ilkuniyiani too mpolosi ang, nikipik nkeenta ilukuny ang, nikipuo enetii olaiguanani loo Siraeli; amu ebaiki nikipal iyie nchu.”" 
1Kings20:32 Kaae nerrotian ninche ilkuniyiani too mpolosi enye, nepik nkeenta ilukuny enye, nepuo enetii olaiguanani loo Siraeli, nejoki, “Etejo osinka lino Benhadad, Aatoomono nchooki nanu aishu. ” Nejo ninye, “Keton ake eishu? Olalashe lai ninye.”" 
1Kings20:33 Neanyita apa lelo tung'ana pee etum ororei supat, netum ninche nabo kata to laiguanani, nejo ninche, “Ee olalashe lino Benhadad.” Neitoki ninye ajo, “Enchom entoriku ninye.” Nelotu Benhadad enetii ninye, neisho ninye metijing'a engarri oo mbartan." 
1Kings20:34 Nejoki Benhadad ninye, “Ore nkanasa natooruo papaai, papaai lino kaarrinyoki nanu; nindim iyie atasheta iwuejitin neemirishoreki te Dameski, anaa apa enataasa papaai te Samaria.” Nejo Ahab, “Kaaisho nanu iyie shomo te kulo rorei.” Kaae neitobir olning'o o ninye neisho meshomo." 
1Kings20:35 Nejoki oltung'ani obo loo layiok loo loibonok olikae te nkitanapata Olaitoriani, “Tooshoki nanu, aatoomono” kake etanya ilo tung'ani eosh ninye." 
1Kings20:36 Neitoki ajoki ninye, “Ore amu itanya ining oltoilo lo Laitoriani, ng'ura, teneaku ishomo nikilo olng'atuny aar tua.” Ore pee elo aing'uaa nenang'are olng'atuny ninye near metua." 
1Kings20:37 Neitoki ninye atum likae tung'ani, nejoki, “Tooshoki nanu, aatoomono.” Neosh ilo tung'ani ninye nepik olbae." 
1Kings20:38 Kaae nelo ilo oiboni le Nkai nelo aanyu olaiguanani te mbata enkoitoi, eteena too nkarash ilo bae otii olpura le nkomom." 
1Kings20:39 Ore ejo olaiguanani agiroo, neishiraki ninye olaiguanani ejo, “Eshomo osinka lino empolos olarrabal, naa ng'ura, eibelekenye osikari neyau oltung'ani enatii, naajoki nanu, ‘Ng'ura ele tung'ani; naa tenelo neluaya, neinosieki enkishui ino enkishui enye, aashu ilak entalanta e nkosholai.’" 
1Kings20:40 Ore enyamalita osinka lino tene o teidie, neluaya ninye.” Nejoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli ninye, “Neija elo atiu endung'okinoto ino enkiguana; amu iyie makewan otudung'o ina.”" 
1Kings20:41 Nesiokisioki aitayu ina arasha natii olpura le nkomom, neyiolou olaiguanani loo Siraeli ajo obo loo loibonok le Nkai." 
1Kings20:42 Nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Ore enkaraki ninchoo elo too nkaik inono, ilo tung'ani apa laiteng'elaka enkidaaroto, ore enkaraki ina, keinosieki enkishui ino enkishui enye. Neinosieki enkishui oo ltung'ana linono enkishui oo ltung'ana lenyena.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Nelo olaiguanani loo Siraeli enkaji enye te Samaria eiruto neeta osina. 
1Kings21:1 Neeta apa Nabot le Yesreel enkurma oo lng'anayio te Yesreel, te mbata e nkaji e nkitoo e Ahab olaiguanani le Samaria." 
1Kings21:2 Ore tesiadi ena nejoki Ahab Nabot, “Nchooki nanu enkurma ino oo lng'anayio pee aitaa olchampa loo mbenek, amu ketaaniki enkaji ai. Naa kaaisho nanu enkurma sidai oo sabibu naa tenidol eishiaakino, naaisho elaakinoto enye too mpisai.”" 
1Kings21:3 Kake etiaka Nabot Ahab, “Too loo papa nanu atujung'o ena kurma, oo lng'anayio. Metomito Olaitoriani tenaa kaaisho nanu iyie.”" 
1Kings21:4 Nelo Ahab enkaji enye eeta osina netagore enkaraki ina natiaka Nabot le Yesreel ninye. Amu etejo ninye, “Maaisho nanu iyie enjung'ore oo loo papa.” Neirrag ninye te ndapash enye, neibelekeny ninye endukuya enye aing'or idia alo neany einos endaa." 
1Kings21:5 Kake eewuo enkitok enye Yesebel enetii ninye nejoki, “Kainyoo pee eeta oltau lino osina eji neaku minos endaa?”" 
1Kings21:6 Nejoki ninye, ninye, “Enkaraki nairorie nanu Nabot le Yesreel, najoki nanu ninye, ‘Timirakaki nanu enkurma ino oo lng'anayio too ropiyiani, aashu tenidol eishiaakino, nawalu nanu tiae kurma oolng'anayio.’ Newalu ninye ajo, ‘Maaisho nanu enkurma ai oo lng'anayio.’ ”" 
1Kings21:7 Nejoki Yesebel ina kitok enye ninye, “Keton aa iyie oitore Israel? Tudumunye inosa endaa, nincho metishipayu oltau lino; amu kaaisho nanu iyie ina kurma oo lng'anayio e Nabot le Yesreel.”" 
1Kings21:8 Neiger ninye mpala te nkarna e Ahab, nemishir ninche to lmishire lenye, neirriwaki lelo payiani o ltung'ana kituaak ooboitare Nabot teina anasa enye." 
1Kings21:9 Neiger ninye te nena pala ajo, “Embalie enkolong naeni aapukoo, neishori Nabot enkitoo aaitulusoo too ltung'ana." 
1Kings21:10 Nipikipiki iltung'ana oare lemeeta tipat, meetu aaitang'or ninye. Naa nchoo ninche eishankarrarre ninye ejo, ‘Itediaa iyie Enkai o laiguanani!’ Nimbung'ubung'u taa ninye aaya auluo, ninang'inang'a too soito metua.”" 
1Kings21:11 Ore iltung'ana leina anasa, ilpayiani, o lkituaak apa oomanya ina anasa, neas anaa enatolikio Yesebel ninche. Anaa enaigeroki te nena pala naaigeroko ninye ninche." 
1Kings21:12 Neibalunye ninche enkolong naeni aapukoo, neisho Nabot enkitoo aaitulusoo too ltung'ana." 
1Kings21:13 Ore ilooti tung'ana oare le pesho, nepuonu aaitang'or ninye, nepuonu lelo le pesho aaishankarrare Nabot te dukuya iltung'ana, ejo, “Etediaa Nabot Enkai o laiguanani.” Neya ninche ninye auluo enkanasa nenang ninye metua too soito." 
1Kings21:14 Neitoki ninche aairriwaki Yesebel olkilikuai ejo, “Etanang'aki Nabot too soito, etua ninye.”" 
1Kings21:15 Ore ake ina kata pee ening Yesebel nchere etanang'aki Nabot ometua too soito, nejoki Yesebel Ahab, “Inyo tudumunye, inyo shomo iwa enkurma oo lng'anayio apa nikitomitikio Nabot too mpisai. Amu meekure eishu Nabot, etua ninye.”" 
1Kings21:16 Ore ake ina kata pee ening Ahab ajo etua Nabot, nedumunye Ahab adoyio alo aya enkurma oo lng'anayio e Nabot le Yesreel, pee eitaa enenye." 
1Kings21:17 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Elija le Tishibi ejo," 
1Kings21:18 “Tudumunye shomo tanang'are Ahab olaiguanani loo Siraeli, etii ninye Samaria. Ng'ura etii ninye atua enkurma oo lng'anayio e Nabot, neshomo ninye aya ine aitaa enenye." 
1Kings21:19 Shomo iyie tiaaki ninye, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Itara iyie oltung'ani metua niya ntokitin enyena?’ Nintoki ajoki ninye, Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Ore ine wueji apa nemejie ildiain osarge le Nabot, teine epuo ildiain aamej osarge lino.’”" 
1Kings21:20 Nejoki Ahab Elija, “Ekinepua nanu lo mang'atinta lai?” Newaliki ajoki, “Ee aainepua, amu itegelaka iyie kewan pee ias mbaa torrok te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
1Kings21:21 Ng'ura kayau nanu entorroni shumata iyie, kaaiwuang'ie nanu iyie aishie, naiwuang'ie nanu te Ahab pooki lee, tiatua Israel, oloena o lolakuno." 
1Kings21:22 Naa kaitotiu nanu enkaji ino anaa enkaji e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, o enkaji e Baasha olayioni le Ahija, tenkaraki ena goro nikintagoro nanu. O enkaraki sii nitorikoko Isiraeli metaasa ing'ok." 
1Kings21:23 Ore tialo Yesebel neitoki Olaitoriani ajo, ‘Keinos ildiain Yesebel too lpolosien le Yesreel.’" 
1Kings21:24 Ore pooki ng'ae lolmarei le Ahab oye tiatua enkanasa neinos ildiain; ore pooki ng'ae oye tiong'ata neinos ilmotonyi.” 
1Kings21:25 Meetae apa oltung'ani otegelaka kewan aas mbaa torrok te dukuya o Laitoriani anaa Ahab oisisayie ninye enkitok enye Yesebel. 
1Kings21:26 Etaasa ninye ntabo arubare nkitanyaanyukot. Etaasa ninye anaa apa Ilamori, laa ninche eiturrayie Olaitoriani te dukuya iltung'ana loo siraeli." 
1Kings21:27 Ore ake pee ening Ahab lelo rorei, nepolos nkilani enyena, neishopoki kewan ilkuniyiani, neen ninye apukoo neirrag too lkuniyiani, nelo ninye to sina." 
1Kings21:28 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Elija le Tishibi, ejo," 
1Kings21:29 “Itoduaa ajo eitoborro Ahab kewan te dukuya nanu? Ore enkaraki naitoborro ninye kewan te dukuya nanu, mayau nanu entorroni too nkolong'i enyena. Too nkolong'i oo layiok lenyena nanu ayau entorroni shumata enkaji enye.”" 
1Kings22:1 Ore apa too larin okuni netoni iltung'ana le Israel o le Siria te seriani. 
1Kings22:2 Kake ore to lari liokuni nelotu Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda enetii olaiguanani le Israel. 
1Kings22:3 Nejoki ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli isinkan lenyena, “Iyiololo intae aajo enaang oshi Ramot-gilead, naa eikigira oshi iyiook, mikiyieu nikiya aaoru olaiguanani le Siria?”" 
1Kings22:4 Nejoki Ahab Yehoshafat, “Eikiriamariyie iyie nanu pee kipuo olarrabal te Ramot-gilead.” Nejoki Yehoshafat ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli, “Atiu ake nanu enitiu, netiu iltung'ana laainei anaa enatiu iltung'ana linono, netiu mbartan aainei anaa nkuninono.”" 
1Kings22:5 Nejoki Yehoshafat ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli, “Tang'asa naa nkilikuanu ororei oing'uaa Olaitoriani.”" 
1Kings22:6 Neitoki ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli aiturrur iloibonok le Nkai tenebo, oobaya iip ong'uan, nejoki ninche, “kalo nanu olarrabal aarare Ramot-gilead anaa aimalo?” Nejo ninche, “Ilepa shomo amu keishoru Olaitoriani apik nkaik o laiguanani.”" 
1Kings22:7 Kake enyaaka Yehoshafat ajo, “Aimeekure etii ene likae oiboni lo Laitoriani likinkilikuanishore?”" 
1Kings22:8 Nejoki ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli Yehoshafat, “Eton etii oltung'ani obo likindim aaikilikuanishore tialo Olaitoriani. Mikaia olayioni le Imla, kake kaiba nanu ninye amu maaibonoki aekata ninye embae sidai, ntorrok ake aaibonoki.” Nejo Yehoshafat, “Mincho olaiguanani ejo neijia.”" 
1Kings22:9 Neitoki ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli aipotu oltung'ani kitok nejoki, “Toriku ntasieku Mikaia olayioni le Imla.”" 
1Kings22:10 Ore apa ina kata netonita olaiguanani loo Siraeli o Yehoshafat ilo aiguanani le Yuda too lorikan lenye le nkitoo, etukusote too lkilani lenye. Netoni ninche te wueji neidong'ishoreki tembata enkishomi e Samaria. Neibonisho apa iloibonok pooki te dukuya ninche." 
1Kings22:11 Ore Sedekia olayioni le Kenaana neitobiraki kewan imouarak e sekenkei, nejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Te kuna ipuopuo intae aarrumoo iltung'ana le Siria ometaba anaa neidak.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 Neibonisho iloibonok pooki aaiko neijia, nejo ninche, “Ilepa shomo Ramot-gilead timirisho; amu keishoru Olaitoriani apik nkaik olaiguanani.”" 
1Kings22:13 Ore ilo tung'ani apa oirriwayioki meshomo aipotu Mikaia nejoki ninye, “Ng'ura, ore irorei loo loibonok pooki naa eisidain tialo olaiguanani; nchoo irorei linono metotiwuo anaa irorei liobo lenye, niro mbaa sidain.”" 
1Kings22:14 Kake etejo Mikaia, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, ina naajoki nanu Olaitoriani ninye alo airo.”" 
1Kings22:15 Ore ake pee elotu ninye enetii olaiguanani, neikilikuan olaiguanani ninye ajoki, “Mikaia eikipuo iyiook olarrabal te Ramot-Gilead anaa aimikipuo?” Newalu ninye ajo, “Shomo timirisho, amu keishoru Olaitoriani apik nkaik olaiguanani.”" 
1Kings22:16 Kake etiaka olaiguanani ninye, “Ae katitin aja nanu aaikilikuan pee iro esipata ake te nkarna Olaitoriani?”" 
1Kings22:17 Nejo ninye, “Atoduaa nanu Isiraeli pooki eidapashate too ldoinyo anaa ntare nemeeta olchekut; nejo Olaitoriani, ‘Meeta kulo olaitasheikinoni, nchoo ake errinyo pooki ng'ae enkang enye te seriani.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Nejoki ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli Yehoshafat, “Keitu nanu aajoki iyie meibonu ninye embae sidai, kake entorrono eibonu?”" 
1Kings22:19 Neitoki Mikaia ajo, “Entoning naa ororei lo Laitoriani: Atoduaa nanu Olaitoriani eton to lorika lenye le nkitoo. Ore olorora pooki le shumata neitashe te mbata enye te nkalo e tatene o te kedienye." 
1Kings22:20 Nejo Olaitoriani, ‘Kaing'ae ilo olo alej Ahab, meilepa ninye alo metaari metua te Ramot-gilead?’ Nejo ake oltung'ani embae nabo nejo olikae enkae bae." 
1Kings22:21 Nelotu enkiyang'et naishu aitashe te dukuya Olaitoriani, nejo, ‘Kalo nanu alej ninye.’" 
1Kings22:22 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, ‘Kaitiaa oitoi?’ Nejo ninye, ‘Kalo nanu aaku ololejisho too nkutukie oo loibonok pooki.’ Nejo ninye, ‘Ilo iyie alej ninye naa ilo aidimu ninye, shomo naa taasa ina.’" 
1Kings22:23 “Ore naa taata, ng'ura etipika Olaitoriani oltau le lejare kulo oibonok pooki; eimaka Olaitoriani embae torrono tialo iyie.”" 
1Kings22:24 Nenyiku Sedekia olayioni le Kenaana neosh Mikaia eseder, nejoki, “Kaji eiko enkiyang'et o Laitoriani tenepuku te nanu nelotu airo te iyie?”" 
1Kings22:25 Nejo Mikaia, “Ng'ura, ilo kenya adol teina olong nilo ajing'ie olgilata liaji isudori.”" 
1Kings22:26 Nejo ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli, “Embung'a Mikaia eyaki Amon olbalusui le nkanasa, o Yoash olayioni lo laiguanani;" 
1Kings22:27 nipuopuo aajo, Nji ejo olaiguanani, Entipik ena tung'ani atua korokoroni nintotiti ninye too mukateni o te nkare ake ometaba anaa narrinyunye te seriani.”" 
1Kings22:28 Nejo Mikaia, “Tenirrinyunye iyie te seriani, neitu naa aairorie nanu Olaitoriani.” Neitoki ajo, “Entoning lo tung'ana pooki!”" 
1Kings22:29 Kaae nelo apa olaiguanani loo Siraeli o Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda Ramot-gilead. 
1Kings22:30 Nejoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli Yehoshafat, “Kalo nanu anapa pee alo olarrabal, kake nchopo iyie ilkilani linono le nkitoo.” Nelo olaiguanani loo Siraeli anapa nelo olarrabal." 
1Kings22:31 Neitanap apa olaiguanani le Siria lelo arikok le pokira tomoni uni oare loo ngarrin oo mbartan, ejo, “Emiaar oltung'ani kitok aashu oloti, kake olkitok loo Siraeli ake entaar.”" 
1Kings22:32 Ore ake pee edol lelo akedok loo ngarrin oo mbartan Yehoshafat, nejo, “Esipa olaiguanani le Israel.” Kaae neibelekenya aarare ninye, neyietu Yehoshafat aishir." 
1Kings22:33 Ore ake pee edol lelo arikok loo ngarrin oo mbartan ajo mme olaiguanani loo Siraeli, neibelekenya aapuo te sujaroto enye." 
1Kings22:34 Kake eteyietuo oltung'ani obo enkawuo enye, neng'or olaiguanani loo Siraeli eripata e long'o enye, to lgoo. Ore enkaraki ina nejoki olaiguanani ilo arewani le ngarri enye oo mbartan, “Mbelekenyayu, iwaki matung'uai olarrabal, amu aatipikaki olbae.”" 
1Kings22:35 Neirowuaju olarrabal ina olong, neigarakino olaiguanani engarri enye eing'or enkalo oo ltung'ana le Siria. Ore pee eaku teipa neye ninye, ore osarge leina ng'oroto neiput oltiren leina garri oo mbartan." 
1Kings22:36 Ore etaa kedoyio enkolong neibulu olkiyioi enkop pooki, eji, “Shomo pooki tung'ani enkanasa enye, nelo pooki tung'ani enkop enye!”" 
1Kings22:37 Kaae neaku etua olaiguanani, neyauni ninye Samaria; nepuoi aanukaa ninye te Samaria." 
1Kings22:38 Nepuoi aaituku ina garri oo mbartan to lchorro le Samaria nemej ildiain ilo sarge lenye, ore nkituaak naaibor onyek neituku ate teilo sarge, te risioroto eilo rorei le Nkai apa oiroro ninye." 
1Kings22:39 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Ahab, o nena pooki naataasa ninye, o ina aji oo lala loo lkanchaoni apa natesheta ninye, o nena anas pooki apa naatesheta ninye, neigero tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak loo Siraeli." 
1Kings22:40 Kaae neirura Ahab neye anaa loo menye, neitoreisho Ahasia te rishata enye." 
1Kings22:41 Neiteru Yehoshafat olayioni le Asa aitore Yuda to lari liong'uan le enkitoria e Ahab olaiguanani loo Siraeli. 
1Kings22:42 Oloo larin tomoni uni o imiet apa Yehoshafat pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tikitam o imiet te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Asuba entito e Shilhi." 
1Kings22:43 Nerubare ninye orrekie le Asa Papaai lenye, eitu ninye eibelekenya apaash easata oo mbaa sidain te dukuya Olaitoriani. Ore ake eyia eitu eyai iwuejitin neeika, ore iltung'ana neitayu ilasarri nepej enkorropil te nena wuejitin neeika." 
1Kings22:44 Eitobira sii apa Yehoshafat osotua o laiguanani loo Siraeli. 
1Kings22:45 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Yehoshafat, oina kidimata enye naitodolua, oina nashomo olarrabal, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
1Kings22:46 Ore olpisiai le lelo ooibor onyek apa ootelekutua too nkolong'i e papaai lenye, neishie ninche teina kop." 
1Kings22:47 Meetae apa olaiguanani te Edom; olaiguanani oti ninye apa etegeluaki 
1Kings22:48 neitobir Yehoshafat imelin e Tarshish pee epuo Ofir aayau sahabu; kake eitu ninche epuo, amu eidaaitie nena melin te Esiong'eber." 
1Kings22:49 Neitoki Ahasia Olayioni le Ahab ajoki Yehoshafat, “Nchoo isinkan laainei epuo tenebo isinkan linono too melin.” Kake eitu enyorraa Yehoshafat." 
1Kings22:50 Neirrag Yehoshafat airura neye anaa loo menye, nenukari te nkurare oo loo menye te nkanasa e Daudi papaai lenye. Neitoreisho Yehoram olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
1Kings22:51 Neiteru Ahasia olayioni le Ahab aitoreisho te Isirael te Samaria to lari le tomon oopishana le nkitoria e Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda, neitoreisho ninye ilarin oare te Israel." 
1Kings22:52 Etaasa apa ninye embae torrono too nkonyek o Laitoriani, nerubare orrekie le papaai lenye, o rrekie le ng'otonye, o rrekie le Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, laa ninye apa oitapong'oyie Isiraeli metaasa eng'oki." 
1Kings22:53 Eisiaayia apa ninye Baal neserem ninye, neitagor Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, te pooki oitoi apa nataasa menye." 
2Kings1:1 Ore eidipa Ahab atua, neiser Moab apaashare Israel." 
2Kings1:2 Nesulunye apa Ahasia to lkitara le nkaji e shumata, te Samaria, neirrag ninye etamuoyia. Neaku eirriwayie ninye ilkiliku ajoki olorere, “Enchom enkilikuanishore Baalsebub, ina ai e Ekron tenaa kaishiu nanu tena muoyian.”" 
2Kings1:3 Kake etiaaka olmalaika le Nkai Eliya le Tishibit, “Tudumunye shomo tanang'are ilkiliku lo laiguanani le Samaria, nijoki ninche, ‘Kenkaraki nemeetae Enkai te Israeli pee ishomo aaikilikuanishore Baalsebub, ina ai e Ekron?’" 
2Kings1:4 Ore naa taata, nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Mipuku iyie teina dapash nitii, kake esipa iye iyie.’ ” Nelo Eliya." 
2Kings1:5 Nerrinyo lelo tung'ana lo lkilikuai aapuo enetii olaiguanani, nejoki ninye ninche, “Kainyoo intae pee itorrinyunye?”" 
2Kings1:6 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Eewuo oltung'ani anang'are iyiook, nejoki iyiook, ‘Entorrinyoto enchom enetii ilo aiguanani oirriwua intae, nijokiki ninye, Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Kenkaraki nemeetae Enkai te Israel pee irriwayie ilkiliku meshomo aaikilikuanishore Baalsebub, ina ai e Ekron? Ore enkaraki ina midou iyie teina dapash nitii, kake iye iyie.’”" 
2Kings1:7 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Kaa pukunoto o ltung'ani ilo tung'ani oewuo anang'are intae, nejoki intae kuna baa?”" 
2Kings1:8 Newaliki ninche ninye aajoki, “Eishopito enkila oo lpapit neeta enkimeita o lchoni te mpolos enye.” Nejo ninye, “Eliya le Tishibit ilo.”" 
2Kings1:9 Neitoki olaiguanani airriwaki ninye olkitok le njore loo ltung'ana onom. Neilep ninye alo enetii Eliya, etonita te nchumata e ndoinyo, nejoki ninye, “Lo tung'ani le Nkai, ejo olaiguanani, ‘Tadou wou.’ ”" 
2Kings1:10 Kake etiaaka Eliya ilo arikoni le njore loo ltung'ana onom, “Tenaa kara nanu oltung'ani le Nkai, nchoo edou enkima naing'uaa shumata, nikinos iyie o lelo tung'ana linono onom.” Nedou enkima naing'uaa shumata neinos ilo tung'ani o lelo tung'ana lenyena onom." 
2Kings1:11 Neitoki olaiguanani airriwaki ninye o likae kitok le njore loo ltung'ana onom, tenebo iltung'ana lenyena pokira onom. Neilep ninye alo enetii nejoki ninye, “Lo tung'ani le Nkai, enkitanapata o laiguanani ena, ‘Tasioki tadou!’ ”" 
2Kings1:12 Kake etawalikia Eliya ajoki ninche, “Tenaa kara nanu oltung'ani le Nkai, nchoo edou enkima naing'uaa shumata nikinos iyie o kulo tung'ana linono pokira onom.” Nedou enkima e Nkai naing'uaa shumata neinos ninye o lelo tung'ana lenyena pokira onom." 
2Kings1:13 Neitoki olaiguanani airriwaa olarikoni le ntukus e uni oo ltung'ana onom, tenebo iltung'ana lenyena onom. Ore ilo arikoni liokuni le njore loo ltung'ana onom, neilep alo. Nelotu agil kung te dukuya Eliya, nesai ninye ajoki, “Lo tung'ani le Nkai, aatoomono iyie, nchoo enkishui ai o enkishui e kulo sinkan linono menoto tipat too nkonyek inono." 
2Kings1:14 Ng'ura etadowuo enkima naing'uaa shumata neinos lelo arikok le njore loo ltung'ana maa onom, o lelo tung'ana lenye maa onom. Kake ore naa taata nchoo enkishui ai menoto tipat too nkonyek inono.”" 
2Kings1:15 Neitoki olmalaika le Nkai ajoki Eliya, “Tadoi shomo tenebo ninye; miureyu iyie ninye.” Nedumunye ninye nedoyio alo tenebo ninye, enetii olaiguanani." 
2Kings1:16 Nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Ore enkaraki irriwayie ilkiliku meshomo aaikilikuanishore Baalsebub, ina ai e Ekron, kenkaraki nemeetae Enkai te Israel, pee inkilikuanishore too rorei lenyena? Ore enkaraki ina midou iyie teina dapash nishomo, ajing', kake meeta nchere pee miye iyie.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Neaku etua ninye terisioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani oiroro Eliya. Neaku Yoram olalashe lenye olaiguanani terishata enye, to lari liare le Yehoram olayioni le Yehoshafat, olaiguanani le Yuda. Amu meeta apa Ahasia olayioni." 
2Kings1:18 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin pooki e Ahasia naataasa ninye, neigero tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings2:1 Ore etaa kejo pee eya Olaitoriani Eliya ailepie shumata, to lkutati, negira Eliya o Elisha aairiamari te nkoitoi eing'uaa Gilgal." 
2Kings2:2 Nejoki Eliya Elisha, “Totona tene aatoomono amu aairriwayie nanu Olaitoriani Betel.” Kake etejo Elisha, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani o anaa eninchu iyie makewan, maaing'uaaa nanu.” Nedoyio ninche aapuo Betel." 
2Kings2:3 Nepuonu ilayiok loo loibonok le Nkai nejoki Elisha, “Iyiolo iyie ajo keya taata Olaitoriani olkitok lino, nikintung'uaa iyie?” Nejo ninye, “Ee kayiolo, entirring'ata ake intae.”" 
2Kings2:4 Neitoki Eliya ajoki ninye, “Elisha, totona tene, aatoomono amu aairriwayie nanu Olaitoriani Yeriko.” Kake etejo ninye, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, o anaa eninchu iyie makewan, maaing'uaaa nanu iyie.” Nepuonu ninche Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Ore ilayiok loo loibonok le Nkai ootii Yeriko nepuonu aataaniki Elisha, nejoki ninye, “Iyiolo iyie ajo keya taata Olaitoriani olkitok lino nikintung'uaa iyie?” Newal ninye ajo, “Ee kayiolo, entirring'ata ake intae.”" 
2Kings2:6 Neitoki Eliya ajoki ninye, “Totona tene, aatoomono, amu aairriwayie nanu Olaitoriani Yordan.” Kake etejo ninye, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, o anaa eninchu iyie makewan maaing'uaaa nanu iyie.” Neaku eiriamari aapuo pokira oare." 
2Kings2:7 Nepuo iltung'ana onom le lelo ayiok loo loibonok le Nkai, neitashe tenelakuaniki ninche, neitashe ninche pokira oare tembata olkeju le Yordan." 
2Kings2:8 Neitayu Eliya olkila lenye nenunuk, neoshie enkare, neoro enkare neito ena shoto o enda shoto. Neim ninche pokira oare ine etaa enkop natoyio." 
2Kings2:9 Ore ake pee eidip aatalang', nejoki Eliya Elisha, “Tolimu embae niyieu naaitaas eton eitu aayae aaitung'uaa iyie.” Nejo Elisha, “Aatoomono, ntujung'oki nanu enkiyanget inokat are oltau lino.”" 
2Kings2:10 Nejoki ninye, “Inkilikuanua iyie embae nagol, kake ore ake eyia, tenikiduaaya nanu aayaitae aaitung'uaa iyie, naa ketiu neijia te iyie, kake tenimikiduaaya iyie, nemetiu neijia.”" 
2Kings2:11 Ore epuoito ninche einosaa lomon, ng'ura, nerish ninche pokira oare engarri oo mbartan e nkima. Nelo Eliya to lkutati shumata." 
2Kings2:12 Nedol Elisha ina bae, neishir ajo, “Papaai lai! Papaai lai! Ngarrin oo mbartan e Israel o lakedok lenyena loo mbartan!” Neitu ninye eitoki adol Eliya. Neitoki ninye aibung ilkilani lenyena, nepolos aitaa are." 
2Kings2:13 Nedumu ninye ilo kila apa oitadoikio ninye, nerrinyo ninye nelo aitashe tembata olkeju le Yordan." 
2Kings2:14 Neitoki ninye adumu olapa kila le Eliya oitadoikio ninye, neoshie enkare, ejo, “Koree Olaitoriani, Enkai e Eliya?” Ore ake pee eosh enkare, neoro enkare, nelo ena shoto o enda shoto; nelang Elisha alo." 
2Kings2:15 Ore ake pee edol lelo ayiok loo loibonok le Nkai apa ootii Yeriko ninye, nejo ninche, “Etii Enkiyang'et e Eliya Shumata Elisha.” Nepuonu ninche aanang'are ninye, neirrugo aaitabaiki nkomomi enkop te dukuya ninye." 
2Kings2:16 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Etii tenebo isinkan linono iltung'ana onom oogol; aatoomono nchoo ninche epuo aaing'oru olkitok lino, ebaiki neewa ninye Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani nelo anang'aki ninye likae doinyo, aashu epik atua oerata.” Nejo ninye, “Mirriwaa intae ninche.”" 
2Kings2:17 Kake ore ake pee eitirrishaki ninye o metaba anaa nedol enkurruna, nejo ninye, “Erriwai.” Neirriwaa ninche iltung'ana onom; ore too nkolong'i uni, neing'oru ninye kake eitu etum ninye." 
2Kings2:18 Nerrinyunye ninche aapuonu enetii ninye etonita te Yeriko, nejoki ninye ninche, “Keitu nanu ajoki intae emipuopuo?”" 
2Kings2:19 Nejoki apa iltung'ana le nkanasa Elisha, “Ng'ura, eisidai ena anasa, anaa enadolita olkitok lai; kake eitorrono enkare, nemeisho enkop.”" 
2Kings2:20 Nejo ninye, “Eyakaki nanu olbakuli ng'ejuk, nipikipiki emunyan atua.” Neyaki ninche ninye." 
2Kings2:21 Nelo ninye enetii enchorro e nkare neisuaaki emunyan atua, nejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani aitamelono nanu ena are, ore ebaiki ena kata meitokini ae kata aatum keeya anaa olkibiroto tialo ena are.”" 
2Kings2:22 Neaku eitamelonoki apa ina are ometabaiki ena olong', terisioroto eilo rorei apa oiroro Elisha." 
2Kings2:23 Nedumunye ninye teine nelo Betel; ore eloito ninye te nkoitoi, nepuonu nkuti ayiok aakueniyie ninye, ejo, “Ilepa shomo iyie olokurro lukunya! Ilepa shomo olokurro elukunya!”" 
2Kings2:24 Neibelekenya ninye anang silig, ore ake pee edol ninche, nedek ninche te nkarna o Laitoriani. Neipang'u tiatua entim ilng'arurum oare le ntim nedung nena ayiok artam o are aaitaa ndung'udung'ot." 
2Kings2:25 Nedumunye teine nelo oldoinyo le Karmel neitoki arrinyo alo Samaria. 
2Kings3:1 Ore to lapa le tomon oo kuni le nkitoria e Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda, etaa Yehoram olayioni le Ahab olaiguanani loo Siraeli te nkop e Samaria. Neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon oare." 
2Kings3:2 Etaasa ninye entorroni too nkonyek o Laitoriani, hoo neitu etiu anaa menye o ng'otonye, amu eiwuang'ie ninye eng'ape e Baal apa naitobira papaai lenye." 
2Kings3:3 Ore ake eyia eibung'are ninye eng'oki e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, apa natorikoko Israel metaasa eng'oki. Eitu ninye eing'uaa ina ng'oki." 
2Kings3:4 Ore apa Mesha olaiguanani le Moab naa olaramatani loo nkerra. Naa ore ake to lari neisho olaiguanani le Israel ilkuoo le kerra nkalifuni iip nabo. O lpapit loo nkerra loo lmeregeshi nkalifuni iip nabo. 
2Kings3:5 Kake ore ake pee eye Ahab, neiser olaiguanani le Moab apaashare olaiguanani le Israel." 
2Kings3:6 Neaku eshomo apa teina kata olaiguanani Yehoram tiatua enkop e Samaria pooki, neiturrur Isiraeli pooki." 
2Kings3:7 Nelo ninye airriwaki olkilikuai Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda, nejoki, “Eisero olaiguanani le Moab tialo nanu; aimikiriamariye nanu olarrabal le Moab?” Nejoki ninye, “Kalo nanu; atiu nanu anaa enitiu iyie, netiu iltung'ana linono anaa iltung'ana laaainei, netiu mbartan aainei anaa mbartan inono.”" 
2Kings3:8 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Kaa oitoi iyiook kipuo aaim?” Newal Yehoram ajo, “Enkoitoi e ong'ata e Edom.”" 
2Kings3:9 Neaku eshomo olaiguanani le Israel tenebo olaiguanani le Yuda o laiguanani le Edom. Ore ake pee eidip ninche aashom elototo oo nkolong'i naapishana, neishunye enkare naok enjore o enaok ng'uesi apa naasujita ninche." 
2Kings3:10 Neitoki olaiguanani le Israel ajo, “Wooi Ee! Eipotuo Olaitoriani kulo aiguanak pokira okuni pee elotu apik ninche nkaik e Moab.”" 
2Kings3:11 Nejo Yehoshafat, “Aimeetae oloiboni le Nkai tene pee kitum iyiook aaikilikuanishore tialo Olaitoriani?” Neitoki obo osinka loo lelo sinkan lo laiguanani loo Siraeli awal ajo, “Etii Elisha olayioni le Shefat ene, laa ninye apa otubukoko enkare nkaik e Eliya.”" 
2Kings3:12 Nejo Yehoshafat, “Etii ororei lo Laitoriani tenebo ninye.” Nedoyio olaiguanani loo Siraeli o Yehoshafat o laiguanani le Edom aapuo enetii ninye." 
2Kings3:13 Nejoki Elisha olaiguanani loo Siraeli, “Kainyoo nanu aatakinore iyie? Shomo enetii iloibonok le papaai lino o loibonok le yieyioo lino.” Kake etiaaka olaiguanani loo Siraeli ninye, “A-a; Olaitoriani oipotuo kulo aiguanak pokira okuni apik nkaik e Moab.”" 
2Kings3:14 Nejo Elisha, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani loo lororani, laa ninye nanu aisiaai, teneme napaji Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda, anaata maashilaa iyie nemaaing'or iyie." 
2Kings3:15 Kake ore naa taata entorikokoki olaranyani.” Ore ake pee eranyisho olaranyani, nelotu engolon o Laitoriani shumata ninye." 
2Kings3:16 Nejo ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Ore ele erata otoyio kaiput nanu enkare.’" 
2Kings3:17 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani ‘Midolidolo intae olkutati anaa enchan, kake ore ele erata pooki naa keiputi enkare, pee itumutumu aatook, intae, o nkishu inyi, o ng'uesi inyi.’" 
2Kings3:18 Embae nalelek ena too nkonyek o Laitoriani; naa keishoru sii Ilmoabu apik atua nkaik inyi. 
2Kings3:19 Naa ipuopuo intae aaibung pooki anasa nasheta isunta, o pooki anasa yioloti, niuroo pooki shani sidai, nimbooyoyo nkonyek oo nkariak pooki, ninyalinyala pooki kop sidai too soito.”" 
2Kings3:20 Ore te nkolong nasuju tadekenya, etaa enkata naishoori ilasarri, ng'ura, nelotu enkare naing'uaa enkalo e Edom, o metaba anaa neiput enkare enkop." 
2Kings3:21 Ore ake pee ening Ilmoabu nchere eetuo ilaiguanak aagilunore ninche, ore pooki ooidim aatanap imasaa o larrabal, eiteru to loti o metabaiki to lbotor, neipotuni nepuoi aaibok to lpolosie." 
2Kings3:22 Ore ake pee edumunye ninche tadekenya, nedal enkolong ina are, nedol Ilmoabu enkare te dukuya ninche enyokie anaa osarge." 
2Kings3:23 Nejo ninche, “Osarge ele; esipa etumutakinote ilaiguanak maate, netaarate maate. Ore naa taata, Moab nalo aya iyarunot.”" 
2Kings3:24 Kake ore ake pee epuonu ninche, ilng'oborri le Israel, nedumunye Israeli nerasaki Ilmoabu, o metaba anaa neipirri aailanyisho te dukuya ninche. Nepuo ninche dukuya ear Ilmoabu too lalema epuoito." 
2Kings3:25 Neibung ninche nkanas, ore te pooki kop sidai, nenang'aki pooki tung'ana osoit, ometaba anaa neiput isoito. Neibooyo pooki ong'u naruko enkare, neuroo ilkeek pooki sidain, ometaba anaa niaaku isoito ake ootelekutua te Kiharet. Neng'adu ilang'orok loo soito te nkopito ine neisulie." 
2Kings3:26 Ore ake pee edol olaiguanani le Moab ajo etii olarrabal agilunore ninye, neshoroo iltung'ana oata ilalema, iip naapishana pee epuo aagiroo olaiguanani le Edom, kake eitu ninche eidim aashom." 
2Kings3:27 Neitoki ninye ayau olkikau lenye laa ninye ojing te rishata enye te nkitoria, neitayu ninye aitaa olasar opejori te nchumata e suntai. Nejing engoro napi Israel, nepuo ninche aaing'uaa ninye nerrinyo aapuo enkop enye." 
2Kings4:1 Ore enkitok e obo le lelo ayiok loo loibonok le Nkai, neishiraki Elisha ejo, “Etua osinka lino olmoruo lai; niyiolo iyie ajo keure apa osinka lino Olaitoriani. Kake eewuo ilo apa likiaata esile enye aya nkera aainei pokira are aitaa irrindiki lenyena.”" 
2Kings4:2 Nejoki Elisha ninye, “Kaa iyieu naitaas nanu? Tolikioki nanu entoki niaata tiatua aji?” Nejoki ninye, “Meeta esinka ino toki tiaji meteleku esiang'au e ilata.”" 
2Kings4:3 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Shomo enetii olelatia ino toomonu imasaa e aji to lelatia ino pooki, imasaa nemetii toki naa kumok." 
2Kings4:4 Nintoki alo atua aji ninkenoo kewan tiaji o layiok linono, nipik eilata nena masaa pooki, naa teneiput nabo, ninteng'el.”" 
2Kings4:5 Neaku eshomo ninye aing'uaa Elisha, nelo aikenoo kewan o layiok lenyena. Ore ebukoki ninye eilata, neyau ilayiok lenyena nena kulie masaa aaitinyikaki ninye." 
2Kings4:6 Ore ake pee eiputayu nena masaa, nejoki ninye olayioni lenye, “Nyaaki iyakaki enkae.” Nejoki olayioni lenye ninye, “Meekure etii ae.” Neishunye erukunoto eina ilata." 
2Kings4:7 Neipang'u ninye nelotu aliki ilo tung'ani le Nkai, nejoki ninye, “Shomo timira ina ilata nilo alak isilen inono, ore iyie o layiok linono ninosinoso enkae ilata.”" 
2Kings4:8 Ore nabo olong nelo Elisha Shunem, netii ine enkitok karsis natiaaka ninye pee einos endaa. Naa ore apa enkata pooki naim ine nelo ainos endaa te nkaji enye." 
2Kings4:9 Nejoki ina kitok olpayian lenye, “Ng'ura ore taata, kamusu nanu ajo, oltung'ani osinya le Nkai ele, oimita ena oitoi ang anaake." 
2Kings4:10 Maitobira iyiook enkiti aji naitushura netii isunta, nikipikaki ninye endapash, o emesa, o lorika, o ltaa, paa ore enkata ake pooki nalotu ninye enikitii, neidim ashomo ine.”" 
2Kings4:11 Ore nabo olong nelotu ninye ine, nelo ninye ilo gilata neyeng'iyeng'a teine." 
2Kings4:12 Nejoki ninye Gehasi osinka lenye, “Mpotu ena kitok e shunam.” Ore ake pee eipotu ninye, neitashe ina kitok te dukuya ninye." 
2Kings4:13 Nejoki ilo sinka ninye, “Irorie iyie ninye, ng'ura ajo itanyamala iyie oleng te nkaraki iyiook, kaa iyieu nikintaasi iyie? Iyieu neirorieki terishata ino olaiguanani tenaa olkitok le njore?” Newalu ina kitok ajo, “Atua olorere lang nanu atii.”" 
2Kings4:14 Neitoki ninye ajoki, “Kaa naa eitaasi ninye?” Newal Gehasi ajo, “Meeta ninye olayioni, netamorua olpayian lenye.”" 
2Kings4:15 Nejoki ninye, “Mpotu ninye.” Ore ake pee eipotu ninye, nelotu ninye aitashe te kutukaji." 
2Kings4:16 Nejo Elisha, “Ore tena rishata tenemanu olari naa eitum iyie enkayioni.” Nejo ina kitok, “A-a olkitok lai, lo tung'ani le Nkai, milej iyie esinka ino.”" 
2Kings4:17 Kake eiroshiwuo apa ina kitok, neiu enkayioni te rishata naaijo ina, te rishata o loirujuruj anaa apa enatiaaka Elisha ninye." 
2Kings4:18 Ore etubulua ina kerai nelo nabo olong enetii papaai lenye tiatua ilaisampuak. 
2Kings4:19 Nejoki ninye papaai lenye, “Oi endukuya ai, endukuya ai!” Nejoki papaai lenye osinka lenye, “Ewaita ninye enetii ng'otonye.”" 
2Kings4:20 Ore ake pee edumu ilo sinka ninye, neyau enetii ng'otonye, neton ina kerai too nkejek e ng'otonye o meiulo enkolong', neye." 
2Kings4:21 Nedumu ninye nelo airragie te ndapash o ltung'ani le Nkai, neiken kutukaji, neipang alo." 
2Kings4:22 Neitoki aipot olpayian lenye, nejoki, “Irriwakaki obo loo laisiaayiak o esikiria nabo, pee atum nanu atasiooi ashomo enetii oltung'ani le Nkai, naitoki arrinyunye.”"
