2Kings4:23 Nejo ninye, “Kainyoo iyie pee iyieu nilo enetii ninye taata? Mme olapa ng'ejuk neme sabato.” Nejo ina kitok, “Kesidanu mbaa.”" 
2Kings4:24 Neirot ninye esikiria, nejoki osinka lenye, “Isiosionie osikiria, nimilo akiti ometaba anaa naajoki.”" 
2Kings4:25 Neaku etudumunye ninye nelotu ine netii oltung'ani le Nkai, to ldoinyo le Karmel. Ore ake pee edol oltung'ani le Nkai ina kitok elotu, nejoki ninye Gehasi osinka lenye, ng'ura elotu enkitok e Shunam te idie." 
2Kings4:26 Kueta nabo kata shomo tanang'are ninye, nijoki ninye, Aisidan mbaa tialo iyie? Aisidan mbaa tialo eno lpayian lino? Aisidan mbaa tialo enkerai ino? Newal ninye ajo, “Aisidain.”" 
2Kings4:27 Ore ake pee elotu ina kitok oldoinyo ine netii oltung'ani le Nkai, neibung ninye nkejek enyena, nelotu Gehasi aiwuang'ie ninye. Kake etejo ilo tung'ani le Nkai, “Tapala ninye, amu etii ninye atua osina ogol; neisudoyie Olaitoriani tialo nanu. Neitu aaliki nanu.”" 
2Kings4:28 Neitoki ina kitok ajo, “Kaatoomono nanu olkitok lai olayioni? Keitu nanu ajo, mikilej nanu?”" 
2Kings4:29 Nejoki ilo tung'ani le Nkai Gehasi, “Terretena empolos ino, ninap eng'udi ai te nkaina ino, nilo. Teninang'are oltung'ani nimiroroki ninye, naa tenikiroroki ninye niming'amaa, nilo aiteleiki ena ng'udi enkomom eina kerai.”" 
2Kings4:30 Neitoki ng'otonye ina kerai ajo, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani o anaa eninchu iyie makewan maaing'uaaa nanu.” Neaku etudumunye ninye nesuj ninye." 
2Kings4:31 Neituruk Gehasi alo neiteleiki ina ng'udi enkomom eina kerai kake eitu etumi enkikashata anaa enkitoduaata e nkishui. Neaku etorrinye alo anang'are ninye, nejoki ninche, “Eitu einyototo ina kerai.”" 
2Kings4:32 Ore ake pee ejing'u Elisha atua ina aji, nedol ina kerai eirrag etua te ndapash enye." 
2Kings4:33 Nelo ninye atua aji neiken kutukaji neaku ninche ake pokira are tiatua ina aji. Neomon Olaitoriani. 
2Kings4:34 Neilepaki ninye endapash neirrag te nchumata eina kerai, nepik enkutuk enye enkutuk eina kerai, nepik nkonyek enyena nkonyek eina kerai, neiteleiki nkaik enyena nkaik eina kerai, neitoriori ninye te nchumata ina kerai, neirowuaju osesen leina kerai." 
2Kings4:35 Neitoki ainyototo nelo nabo kata amanimanaa tiatua aji, neitoki ailepaki endapash eina kerai, nesing ina kerai katitin naapishana, nebol nkonyek enyena." 
2Kings4:36 Neitanap ninye Gehasi ajoki, “Mpotu ena kitok e Shunam.” Neipotu Gehasi ninye. Ore ake pee elotu ina kitok enetii Elisha, nejoki ninye, “Tudumu enkayioni ino.”" 
2Kings4:37 Nelotu ninye nebatata too nkejek enyena, neirrugo abaiki enkop; neitoki adumu enkayioni enye neipang alo boo." 
2Kings4:38 Neitoki Elisha alotu Gilgal naa aisapuk olameyu teina kop. Ore etonita nkera oo loibonok le Nkai te dukuya ninye, nejoki ninye, osinka lenye, “Ntobira emoti sapuk pee iyier endaa te nkaraki ninche.”" 
2Kings4:39 Nelo obo lenye ong'ata asotu ilkeek le ntim, netum olchani loo lng'anayio liong'ota, ore teilo shani neitayu ilng'anayio, nelotu adung'udung'oki emoti endaa, nemeyiolo ninye ajo kainyoo lelo." 
2Kings4:40 Nebukoki ninche lelo tung'ana meinosa. Kake ore einosita ninche ina daa, neishir aajo, “Lo tung'ani le Nkai, enkeeya natii atua ena moti!” Nelaikino ninche aainosa." 
2Kings4:41 Nejo ninye, “Eyau naa endaa.” Nenang'aki atua ina moti, nejo, “Entooriki iltung'ana, pee etum aainosa.” Neitu eitoki atii entoki torrono atua ina moti." 
2Kings4:42 Nelotu oltung'ani oing'uaa Baal-shalisha, neyaki oltung'ani le Nkai imukateni tikitam e shairi, o lng'osil ng'erng'er le ntapa ootii olbene lenye. Nejo Elisha, “Nchoo kuna iltung'ana pee etum aainosa.”" 
2Kings4:43 Kake etejo osinka lenye, “Kaji nanu aiko te naisho kuna iltung'ana iip nabo?” Neigil Elisha ajo, “Nchoo ninche iltung'ana, pee etum aainosa, amu neijia ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Keinos ninche neleku.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Neaku eirragie ninye ina daa te dukuya ninche, neinos ninche, neleku, te risioroto ororei lo Laitoriani." 
2Kings5:1 Ore apa Naaman olkitok le njore o laiguanani le Siria, naa oltung'ani kitok to lkitok lenye netum omom oleng', amu te nkaraki ninye apa eishoo Olaitoriani Siria enkisulata. Oltung'ani apa magilani yioloti, kake eeta enkeeya oo lbolot." 
2Kings5:2 Ore apa iltung'ana le Siria te njore enye nabo, neraya enkiti sila aisiaayiani te nkop oo Siraeli, naa enkitok e Naaman apa eisiaai." 
2Kings5:3 Nejoki ina sila ina kitok e Naaman, “Tenaa napaji ketumore olkitok lai oloiboni le Nkai otii Samaria anaata eishiunye ninye teina keeya enye oo lbolot.”" 
2Kings5:4 Nelo Naaman atua aji nelo ajoki olkitok lenye, “Nji eiroro ajo ena aisiaayiani naing'uaa enkop oo Siraeli.”" 
2Kings5:5 Nejo, olaiguanani le Siria, “Shomo taata, amu kairriwaki nanu empalai olaiguanani loo Siraeli.” Neaku eshomo ninye, neshoroo talanta tomon, o shekeli nkalifuni ile e sahabu, o ntukusi tomon oo nkilani." 
2Kings5:6 Neyaki ina palai olaiguanani loo Siraeli, neigero ajo, “Tenebau ena palai enitii, tayiolo nchere aairriwaka Naaman osinka lai, pee itum aishiunye ninye teina keeya enye oo lbolot.”" 
2Kings5:7 Ore ake pee eisum olaiguanani loo Siraeli ina palai, nepolos nkilani enyena nejo, “Kara nanu Enkai, naar metua neitoki aitopiu, eji metaa kaairriwaki ele tung'ani olkilikuai pee aishiunye oltung'ani oata enkeeya oo lbolot? Tadamu pee idol ajo olarrabal eing'oru te nanu.”" 
2Kings5:8 Ore ake pee ening Elisha, ilo tung'ani le Nkai ajo etopolosa olaiguanani loo Siraeli nkilani, neirriwaki olaiguanani olkilikuai, ejo, “Kainyoo iyie pee itopolosa nkilani inono? Nchoo ninye elotu enatii pee eyiolou ajo etii oloiboni le Nkai Israel.”" 
2Kings5:9 Neaku eewuo Naaman too mbartan enyena, o ngarrin oo mbartan, neitashe te kutuk aji e Nkaji e Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Neirriwaki Elisha ninye olkilikuai ejoki, “Shomo intukuoyu to lkeju le Yordan katitin naapishana, pee esidanu osesen lino nilaari aishiu.”" 
2Kings5:11 Kake etagore apa Naaman oleng, nelo ejoito, “Ng'ura, kajo duoo nanu kelotu enatii, neitashe, neipot enkarna o Laitoriani Enkai enye, neyuk enkaina enye te shumata ene wueji naaya, neishiu enkeeya oo lbolot." 
2Kings5:12 Amaa Abana o Fabar, lelo kejek le Dameski, aimesidan ninche aalang nkariak pooki e Israel? Aimaidim nanu aitukuore nena naishiu?” Neaku eibelekenye ninye alo te ngoro." 
2Kings5:13 Kake eetuo isinkan lenyena aataaniki nejoki ninye, “Papa lai, amaa tenaa eikintanapa oloiboni le Nkai entoki sapuk, aime anaata itaasa? Kebaa naa elusoo tenetejo ninye, ‘Ntukuoyu pee isidanu?’ ”" 
2Kings5:14 Nedoyio ninye nelo adoiki olkeju le Yordan katitin naapishana, te risioroto o rorei lo ltung'ani le Nkai, neishiu osesen lenye netiu anaa osesen le nkerai kiti nesidanu." 
2Kings5:15 Neitoki ninye arrinyunye alotu enetii oltung'ani le Nkai nejoki, ninye o encholuek enye pooki, nelotu aitashe te dukuya ninye, nejo ninye, “Ng'ura ayiolo nanu ajo meetae Enkai te nkop pooki meteleku te Israeli. Tang'amai naa taata enkishoroto naing'uaa osinka lino.”" 
2Kings5:16 Kake etejo Elisha, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, laa ninye nanu aisiaai, mang'amu nanu hoo toki.” Nesai ninye metang'amu kake etanya." 
2Kings5:17 Neitoki Naaman ajo, “Teniming'amaa, aatoomono naa, nchoo naa meishori osinka lino inyumpui are naanap ilolan, amu ore ebaiki ena olong', meigil osinka lino aitayu olasar opejori, anaa olasar liae ai meteleku ake Olaitoriani." 
2Kings5:18 Ore tena bae metapalaki Olaitoriani osinka lino: Tenelo olkitok lai atua enkaji e Rimion aserem teine, naigarakino nanu enkaina ai, nairrugo nanu tiatua enkaji e Rimon, metapalaki Olaitoriani osinka lenye tena bae.” Nejoki Elisha Naaman, “Shomo te seriani.”" 
2Kings5:19 Kake ore eidipa Naaman ashomo atung'uai Elisha te nkiti rishata," 
2Kings5:20 ore Gehasi ilo sinka le Elisha, nejo, “Dol ajo etapala olkitok lai ele tung'ani oji Naaman le Siria, neitu eng'amaa te nkaina enye nena tokitin naayawua ninye. Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, kasujaa nanu ninye pee atum toki te ninye.”" 
2Kings5:21 Neaku etusujayie Gehasi Naaman. Ore ake pee edol Naaman oltung'ani okuetu osujaa ninye, nedou ninye te ngarri oo mbartan nenang'are ninye. Nejo, “Keseriani ake?” Nejo ninye “Eseriani ake.”" 
2Kings5:22 Nejo Gehasi, “Aairriwua nanu olkitok lai pee ajoki, ‘Eetuo tena kata enatii nanu ilbarnot ooing'uaa enkop oo ldoinyo e Efraim, ilbarnot oare loo layiok loo loibonok le Nkai, aatoomono nchoo ninche entalanta e nkosholai, o ntukusi are oo nkilani.’ ”" 
2Kings5:23 Nejo Naaman, “Tang'amu ntalantani are te nchipai.” Nesai ninye, neineneng nena talantani are e nkosholai too lbenia oare, tenebo ntukusi are oo nkilani, neiteleiki ninche isinkan lenyena oare. Neya ninche aanap te dukuya Gehasi." 
2Kings5:24 Ore ake pee elotu endoinyo, neya nena tokitin too nkaik enye, nepik ninche atua enkaji enye, neisho lelo tung'ana meshomo, nedumunye ninche aapuo." 
2Kings5:25 Nejing ninye atua aji nelo aitashe te dukuya olkitok lenye, nejoki Elisha ninye, “Kaji duoo ishomo Gehasi?” Nejo ninye, “Meeta eneshomo osinka lino.”" 
2Kings5:26 Kake etiaaka ninye, “Keitu nanu alo tenebo iyie te nkiyang'et ina kata pee eibelekenya oltung'ani le ngarri enye embarta pee kinang'are? Kenkata ina nang'amarieki mpisai o nkilani o eilata oo loirienito o sabibu, o nkerra, o lmong'i, o sinkan o nkaisiaayiak?" 
2Kings5:27 Ore naa enkeeya oo lbolot e Naaman naa eikimbung iyie, o eishoi ino ntarasi.” Nelo Gehasi teine netii ninye etaa ole nkeeya oo lbolot. Neibor anaa soito le nchan." 
2Kings6:1 Etiaakita apa nkera oo loibonok le Nkai Elisha, “Ng'ura ajo eikiti ene wueji nikitii tiabori eutaroto ino." 
2Kings6:2 Nchoo iyiook maape Yordan neyau ake pooki ng'ae te iyiook embokishi, pee kintobir ewueji nikibikie teine.” Newaliki ajo, “Enchom.”" 
2Kings6:3 Neitoki obo lenye ajoki, “Tonyorrai shomo tenebo isinkan linono.” Newalu ninye ajo, “Kalo nanu.”" 
2Kings6:4 Neaku eshomo ninye tenebo ninche. Ore ake pee epuonu ninche Yordan nedung ilkeek. 
2Kings6:5 Kake ore egira obo lenye auroo olchani nedoiki entolu enye atua enkare, neishir ninye ajo, “Oi olkitok lai! Katoomonuo apa ena tolu.”" 
2Kings6:6 Neitoki ilo tung'ani le Nkai ajo, “Eitiaji etadoiyie.” Ore ake pee eitodol ninye ine wueji, nedung'u ninye enchata e ntolu nenang'aki ine, nepor ina dukuya e ntolu enkare." 
2Kings6:7 Nejoki ninye, “Intayu.” Neitorioo ninye enkaina enye neitayu." 
2Kings6:8 Ore apa earare olaiguanani le Siria Isiraeli, neiguana ninye o sinkan lenyena ejo, “Ore te wueji neje o eneje naun nanu ilng'oborri laainei.”" 
2Kings6:9 Kake eirriwaka oltung'ani le Nkai olkilikuai olaiguanani loo Siraeli ejo, “Toduaa ake migiroo ene wueji, amu etadoitie iltung'ana le Siria aapuo ine.”" 
2Kings6:10 Neirriwaa olaiguanani loo Siraeli oltung'ani meshomo ine netiaaka ninye oltung'ani le Nkai. Neaku ninye oikok ninye, neitajeuo ninye kewan katitin naagiroo nabo anaa are." 
2Kings6:11 Nenyamalu oltau lo laiguanani le Siria te nkaraki ena bae; neipotu isinkan lenyena nejoki ninche, “Aimikintodolidolo nanu nchere kalo tiatua iyiook otii enkalo o laiguanani loo Siraeli?”" 
2Kings6:12 Nejoki obo loo sinkan lenyena, “Meetae, lo kitok lai, olaiguanani kake Elisha ilo oiboni le Nkai otii atua Israel, ninye ojoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli lelo rorei liro iyie tiatua olgilata lino le rruat.”" 
2Kings6:13 Nejo ninye, “Enchom entodol enetii ninye, pee airriwaa nanu iltung'ana meshomo aayau ninye.” Nejokini ninye, “Ng'ura etii ninye Dotan.”" 
2Kings6:14 Neirriwaa ninye mbartan meshomo ine, o ngarrin oo mbartan o enjore kitok nepuonu ninche kewarie, neman enkanasa aang'adu." 
2Kings6:15 Ore ake pee einyototo osinka loltung'ani le Nkai tadekenya, neipang alo boo, ng'ura etamana duoo enjore oo mbartan o ngarrin oo mbartan enkanasa. Nejo ilo sinka, “Oi lokitok lai! Kaa iyiook kiaas?”" 
2Kings6:16 Nejoki ninye, “Miureisho, amu ore lelo ootii tenebo iyiook naa eikumok aalang lelo ootii tenebo ninche.”" 
2Kings6:17 Neitoki Elisha aomon nejo, “Olaitoriani, aatoomono iyie tabolo nkonyek enyena pee etum atoduaa.” Nebol Olaitoriani nkonyek eilo barnoti, nedol ninye, naa ng'ura, ebore ilo doinyo mbartan o ngarrin oo mbartan e nkima naamanita Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Ore pee epuonu iltung'ana le Siria aagilunore ninye, neomon Elisha Olaitoriani, nejo, “Toosho kulo tung'ana aatoomono, ntamodoo.” Neaku etoosho aitamodok ninche te risioroto e nkomono e Elisha." 
2Kings6:19 Nejoki Elisha ninche, “Mme enkoitoi ena, neme enkanasa ena; entusujaki nanu, pee arikoki nanu intae ilo tung'ani ling'oruru.” Nerik ninye ninche Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Ore ake enabaunye ninche Samaria, nejo Elisha, “Olaitoriani, tabolo nkonyek e kulo tung'ana, pee etum aatodolisho.” Nebol Olaitoriani nkonyek enye, nedolishoyu ninche, ng'ura etii ninche empolos e Samaria." 
2Kings6:21 Ore ake pee edol olaiguanani loo Siraeli ninche, nejoki Elisha, “Papaai lai, aar ninche metuata?”" 
2Kings6:22 Aar ninche metuata, “Newal ninche ajo miaar iyie ninche metuata lelo litaarua to lalem lino o too mbaa inono? Nchoo ninche endaa o enkare, pee etum ainosa neok, nepuo enetii olkitok lenye.”" 
2Kings6:23 Neitobiraki ninye ninche osirua sapuk; ore ake pee eidip aainosa endaa neokisho, neisho ninche meshomo, nepuo ninche enetii olkitok lenye. Neitu aekata eitoki iltung'ana le Siria aapuonu aarasaki enkop e Israel." 
2Kings6:24 Ore etulusoitie nena neipotu Benhadad olaiguanani le Siria enjore enye pooki, neilep alo aman ang'adu Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Netii apa olameyu kitok Samaria, ina kata pee eman ninche ninye. Etaa apa ore endukuya o sikiria naa shekeli ntomoni isiet e nkosholai emirieki, ore enkiti pirbil oo nkik e nturkuluo naa shekeli imiet e nkosholai." 
2Kings6:26 Ore apa eloito olaiguanani loo Siraeli te nchumata e suntai, neishiraki ninye enkitok, ejoki, “Taretuoki, olkitok lai olaiguanani!”" 
2Kings6:27 Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Amaa teneitu kiret Olaitoriani kaji nanu aiko tenaaret? Te wueji neidong'ishoreki arashu te wueji neironyieki isabibu?”" 
2Kings6:28 Neitoki olaiguanani aikilikuan ninye ajoki, “Kainyoo enyamali ino?” Newaliki ninye ajoki, “Aatiaaka nanu ena kitok, ‘Iyau enkerai ino pee kinos ninye taata, ore taisere nikinos enkerai ai.’" 
2Kings6:29 Nikiyier iyiook enkerai ai nikinos. Ore pee ekenyu najoki nanu ninye, ‘Iyau enkerai ino, pee kitum aainosa’; neisudoo ninye enkerai enye.”" 
2Kings6:30 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani irorei leina kitok, nepolos nkilani enyena ore ina kata negira ninye alo te nchumata e suntai nedol iltung'ana naa ng'ura, eishopito ninye ilkuniyiani tiatua nkilani enyena." 
2Kings6:31 Nejo ninye, “Maaitaasa nanu Olaitoriani ena neitulusoo, teneitu edung'ori endukuya e Elisha olayioni le Shefat ena olong.”" 
2Kings6:32 Netonita apa Elisha te nkaji enye, netonita ilpayiani tenebo ninye. Neirriwayie apa olaiguanani oltung'ani, kake ore eton eitu ebaiki ilo kilikuai Elisha, nejoki Elisha lelo payiani, “Idolidolo aajo eirriwua ele oitayu iloikop oltung'ani laalotu adung'oo endukuya? Eng'orisho ore ake pee elotu ilo kilikuai ninkenikene kutukaji, nimbung'ubung'u enkikenet e kutukaji aaibooyo ninye. Aimening'o oltoilo loo nkejuk olkitok lenye te siadi ninye?”" 
2Kings6:33 Ore eton eirorita ninye o lelo payiani, nedou olaiguanani alotu enetii ninye, nejoki, “Ore ena nyamali naa Olaitoriani eing'uaa! Kainyoo nanu pee aitoki aanyu Olaitoriani?”" 
2Kings7:1 Nejoki Elisha toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani: Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ore taisere tena rishata, nemiri entemet empirbil entapa napuyiapui te shekeli nabo, ore mpirbili are e shairi te shekeli nabo, te kishomi e Samaria." 
2Kings7:2 Ore ilo kitok le njore laa ninye apa eigarakino o laiguanani, nejoki ilo tung'ani le Nkai, “Amaa napaji tenaa kebol Olaitoriani ilusien e keper, keitabari ena bae?” Nejoki ilo tung'ani le Nkai ninye, “Ilo iyie adol too nkonyek inono, kake minos iyie.”" 
2Kings7:3 Netii apa iltung'ana oong'uan oata enkeeya oo lbolot ootii embata e kishomi; nejokino ninche maate, “Kainyoo iyiook pee kitoni tene o matuata?" 
2Kings7:4 Tenikijo iyiook matijing atua enkanasa; netii olameyu atua enkanasa, naa eikipuo aaye teine. Naa tenekitoni tene nikiye ake sii. Maape naa taata ilng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Siria. Tenetapala ninche iyiook, nikinchu, naa tenetaara iyiook matuata, nikiye naa.”" 
2Kings7:5 Nedumunye ninche, pee emirimiru enteipa aapuo ilng'oborri le Siria, kake ore ake pee ebau emanaroto oo lng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Siria, ng'ura, metii hoo toki ine." 
2Kings7:6 Amu eishoo apa Olaitoriani iltung'ana le Siria metoning'o oltoilo loo ngarrin oo mbartan, o loo mbartan, o ltoilo le njore kitok, neaku etiaakinote maate, “Ng'ura, eipotuo olaiguanani loo Siraeli, aiger o laiguanani le Hiti, o laiguanani le Misiri meetu aarare iyiook.”" 
2Kings7:7 Neisik ninche ina teipa aailanyisho, neing'uaa ilng'oborri lenye, o mbartan enye, o sirkon lenye, neing'uaa ilng'oborri etiu anaa duoo ake. Neilanyisho aaitajeu enkishui enye." 
2Kings7:8 Ore ake pee epuonu kulo tung'ana le nkeeya oo lbolot emanaroto oo lng'oborri, nejing ninche atua olng'obor, nedaa neokisho, neya ninche enkosholai o sahabu o nkilani nepuo aaisudoo. Neitoki aapuonu nejing likae ng'obor, neya ntokitin tiatua ilo ng'obor, nepuo aaisudoo." 
2Kings7:9 Neitoki aajokino maate, “Mme embae sidai iyiook kiaasita. Ore ena olong naa enkolong oo lomon supati. Tenikigira iyiook o mekenyu, naa kebaiki iyiook enkitamioto. Ore naa taata, wootu maape aajoki enkaji o laiguanani.”" 
2Kings7:10 Nepuonu ninche aaipot ilarripok loo nchomito e nkanasa, neliki ninche aajoki, “Kishomo iyiook ilng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Siria, ng'ura medoli nemening'i hoo oltung'ani obo teine, meteleku ake mbartan naaena o sirkon ooena, netiu lelo ng'oborri anaa apake.”" 
2Kings7:11 Neipotisho lelo arripok le kishomi, nelimuni ina bae tiatua enkaji o laiguanani." 
2Kings7:12 Nedumunye olaiguanani kewarie, nejoki isinkan lenyena, “Kaliki nanu intae ina naitobira iltung'ana le Siria tialo iyiook. Eyiolo ninche aajo eikisumash; neaku eipang'a ninche too lng'oborri aapuo aaisudori te nkop naisiaja, ejo, ‘Teneipangu ninche te nkanasa, nikiya iyiook ninche, eishu meshomo eyararoto nikijing atua enkanasa.’ ”" 
2Kings7:13 Nejo obo loo sinkan lenyena, “Nchoo ilkuti tung'ana eya nena bartan imiet apa naatelekutua, amu idolitata aajo, ore kulo ootelekutua netiu ake anaa ilo orora pooki le Israel oidaa. Mairriwuai ninche meshomo aadol.”" 
2Kings7:14 Neyau ninche iltung'ana oare oo kedito mbartan, neirriwaa olaiguanani ninche meshomo aasujaa enjore e Siria, nejoki, “Enchom entodol.”" 
2Kings7:15 Nepuo ninche aasujaa ninche ometabaiki olkeju le Yordan; naa ng'ura, ore te nkoitoi pooki, naa mpurdat oo nkilani o ntokitin naaiturraitie iltung'ana le Siria te nkisarrisar. Nerrinyunye lelo tung'ana ooirriwayioki, neliki olaiguanani." 
2Kings7:16 Neipang iltung'ana nepuo aar lelo ng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Siria. Neaku ore empirbil entapa napuyiapui nemiri te shekeli nabo, ore mpirbili are e shairi nemiri te shekeli nabo te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani." 
2Kings7:17 Netegelua apa olaiguanani olkitok le njore laa ninye eisilig, metaa olarriponi le kishomi. Neitunyoo iltung'ana ninye te kishomi o metua, anaa enatejo oltung'ani le Nkai, ina kata pee elotu olaiguanani aduaare ninye." 
2Kings7:18 Amu ore ina kata pee ejoki oltung'ani le Nkai olaiguanani, “Kemirieki mpirbili are e shairi te shekeli nabo, neinosieki empirbil e ntapa napuyiapui shekeli nabo, taisere, tena rishata, te kishomi e Samaria.”" 
2Kings7:19 Etawalikia apa ilo kitok le njore oltung'ani le Nkai ajoki, “Amaa napaji tenaa kebol Olaitoriani ilusien te keper, keitabari ena bae?” Nejoki ilo tung'ani le Nkai ninye, “Ilo iyie adol too nkonyek inono, kake miinos iyie ina daa.”" 
2Kings7:20 Neaku neijia ake etotiwuo te ninye, amu eitunyoitie iltung'ana ninye te kishomi neye." 
2Kings8:1 Etiaka apa Elisha ina kitok naitopiwuoki enkerai enye, “Inyo tenebo olmarei lino, shomo tamanya ewueji neba anaa enitamanya, amu eipotuo Olaitoriani olameyu, naa kelotu ajing ena kop too larin oopishana.”" 
2Kings8:2 Nedumunye ina kitok alo te risioroto o rorei leilo tung'ani le Nkai. Nedumunye ninye o lmarei lenye nelo amany enkop oo Lfilisti ilarin oo pishana. 
2Kings8:3 Ore te nkiting'oto oo larin oopishana, eidipa ina kitok atushukunye te nkop oo Lfilisti, nelo asai olaiguanani te nkaraki enkaji enye." 
2Kings8:4 Negira apa olaiguanani airorie Gehasi osinka lo ltung'ani le Nkai, ajoki, “Tolikioki nanu kuna mbaa pooki sapuki naataasa Elisha.”" 
2Kings8:5 Ore egira ninye aliki olaiguanani eneikuna Elisha pee eitopiu oltung'ani otua, ng'ura, ore ina kitok apa naitopiwuoki enkerai enye, nesai olaiguanani te nkaraki enkaji enye o enkurma enye. Nejo Gehasi, “Olkitok lai, lo aiguanani, nena ina kitok naa nena ina kerai enye apa naitopiwuoki.”" 
2Kings8:6 Ore ake pee eikilikuan olaiguanani ina kitok, neliki ninye. Negelu olaiguanani oltung'ani kitok tenkaraki ina kitok, ejo, “Torrinyoki ninye entoki pooki nara enenye, tenebo endaa pooki naing'uaa enkurma enye, ebaiki enkolong apa nashomo tena kop o metabaiki taata.”" 
2Kings8:7 Eshomo apa Elisha Dameski. Naa kemuoi Benhadad olaiguanani le Siria; ore pee elikini ninye, aajoki, “Etii oltung'ani le Nkai ene,”" 
2Kings8:8 nejoki olaiguanani Hasael, “Toshoroi enkishoroto shomo notore oltung'ani le Nkai, ninkilikuanishore Olaitoriani tialo ninye ajoki, ‘Kaishiu nanu tena muoyian?’ ”" 
2Kings8:9 Nelo Hasael anagare ninye, neshoroo enkishooroto, mpukunot pooki oo ntokitin sidain e Dameski, ilolan loo ntamesin onom, ore pee aitashe te dukuya ninye, nejoki, “Aairiwua nanu olayioni lino Benhadad, olaiguanani le Asiria maeu enitii ejo, ‘Kaishiu nanu tena muoyian?’" 
2Kings8:10 Nejoki Elisha ninye, Shomo tiaaki ninye, ‘Inchiu iyie’, kake aaitoduaa nanu Olaitoriani nchere meeta nchere pee miye.”" 
2Kings8:11 Neshumu nkonyek enyena aing'or ninye, ometaba anaa nedol enkurruna. Neishir ilo tung'ani le Nkai." 
2Kings8:12 Nejo Hasael, “Kainyoo pee eishir olkitok lai?” Newaliki ajoki, “Enkaraki naiyolo entorroni nilo aitaas iltung'ana loo Siraeli; ilo iyie apejoo isempewueti lenye, nilo aar metuata ilbarnot lenye to lalem, nidung'udung' nkera enye aitaa ndung'udung'ot, niaar metuata nena kituaak enye naairoshiutuo.”" 
2Kings8:13 Nejoki Hasael ninye, “Kainyoo ninye osinka lino, laa oldia ake, eji metaa keas ena bae sapuk?” Newaliki Elisha ajoki, “Aaitoduaa nanu Olaitoriani nchere ilo aaku olaiguanani le Siria.”" 
2Kings8:14 Nelo ninye aing'uaa Elisha, nelo enetii olkitok lenye, nejoki ilo kitok lenye ninye, “Kaa iyie kitiaaka Elisha?” Newaliki ninye ajo, “Aatiaaka ninye inchiu iyie.”" 
2Kings8:15 Kake ore pee ekenyu, nedumu ninye olkarasha le dapash, neitadoiki enkare neisalaashaki enkomom enye, ometua ninye. Neaku Hasael olaiguanani te rishata enye." 
2Kings8:16 Ore to lari le imiet le nkitoria e Yoram olayioni le Ahab, olaiguanani loo Siraeli, neiteru Yehoram olayioni le Yehoshafat ilo aiguanani le Yuda aitoreisho." 
2Kings8:17 Oloo larin tomoni uni oare apa ninye pee eiteru aaku olaiguanani, neitoreisho ninye ilarin isiet te Yerusalem." 
2Kings8:18 Neibung ninye orrekie loo laiguanak le Israel, anaa apa enataasa enkaji e Ahab, amu entito e Ahab apa enkitok enye. Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani." 
2Kings8:19 Kake eitu ake eidaikie Olaitoriani Yuda, te nkaraki Daudi osinka lenye, amu eisiligie apa Olaitoriani pee eisho ninye oltaa, o layiok lenyena ntarasi." 
2Kings8:20 Ore too nkolong'i enyena, neorori Edom te nkitoria e Yuda, negelaki ate olaiguanani lenye maate." 
2Kings8:21 Nelo Yoram agiroo Saair tenebo ngarrin enyena pooki oo mbartan, nedumunye kewarie, ore ninye o lelo kituaak loo ngarrin e njore, near aamut lelo tung'ana pooki le Edom apa oo manita ninye. Kake eilanyishe enjore enye alo ang." 
2Kings8:22 Neaku etoorori apa Edom te nkitoria e Yuda ometabaiki ena olong. Neitoki ake sii Libna aorori teina kata. 
2Kings8:23 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Yoram, o nena pooki naataasa ninye neigeroki te mbuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings8:24 Neirura Yoram etua anaa apa loo menye, nenukari tenebo loo menye te nkanasa e Daudi, neitoreisho Ahasia olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings8:25 Ore to lari le tomon oare le nkitoria e Yoram olayioni le Ahab, olaiguanani loo Siraeli, neitaae Ahasia olayioni le Yoram olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru aitoreisho." 
2Kings8:26 Oloo larin tikitam oare apa Ahasia pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye olari obo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Atalia, naa nkakuyiaa lenye apa Omori olaiguanani loo Siraeli." 
2Kings8:27 Eibung'a sii apa ninye orrekie le nkaji e Ahab, neas mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, anaa apa enataasa enkaji e Ahab. Amu olaputani apa ninye lo lmarei le Ahab." 
2Kings8:28 Eshomo apa ninye tenebo Yoram olayioni le Ahab aarare Hasael olaiguanani le Siria te Ramot-Gilead nepuo iltung'ana le Siria aapik Yoram olbae teine. 
2Kings8:29 Nerrinyunye olaiguanani Yoram metabaki te Yesreel, lelo baa lenyena ootipika iltung'ana le Siria te Ramot, ina kata apa pee earare Hasael olaiguanani le Siria. Nedoyio Ahasia olayioni le Yehoram, olaiguanani le Yuda alo adol Yoram olayioni le Ahab te Yesreel, amu kemuoi apa ninye." 
2Kings9:1 Neitoki Elisha aipotu obo loo layiok loo loibonok le Nkai nejoki ninye, “Terretena empolos ino, niya ele tulet le ilata, nilo Ramot-Gilead." 
2Kings9:2 Ore ake pee ibaya, ning'oru Yehu olayioni le Yehoshafat olayioni le Nimshi; nijing'aki ninye, nirik ninye aitung'uaa ilchoreta lenyena, nirik ninye enkilepata to lgilata liatua." 
2Kings9:3 Nintoki adumu ilo tulet le ilata, nibukoki eilata endukuya enye, nijo, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, aatubukoko nanu eilata aput aitaa olaiguanani le Israel.’ Nintoki abol kutukaji nisik, mintoki aton teine.”" 
2Kings9:4 Neaku eshomo ilo barnoti oiboni Ramot-Gilead. 
2Kings9:5 Ore ake pee elotu ng'ura, etii ilarikok le njore enkiguana, nejo ninye, “Aata olkilikuai lino lo kitok le njore.” Nejoki, Yehu, “Kalo obo te iyiook pooki.” Nejoki ninye, “Iyie lo kitok.”" 
2Kings9:6 Nedumunye ninye nelo atua aji, nelotu ilo barnoti abukoki eilata endukuya enye, nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, aatubukoko nanu eilata aaput aitaa olaiguanani loo ltung'ana lo Laitoriani, Isiraeli." 
2Kings9:7 Naa ilo iyie aosh enkaji e Ahab olkitok lino, pee atum nanu aitalaku elap te Yesebel, ilo sarge loo sinkan laainei, lelo oibonok le Nkai, o sarge le lelo sinkan pooki lo Laitoriani." 
2Kings9:8 Amu ore ina aji pooki e Ahab naa keidaaya; naa kaiwuang'ie nanu olee pooki aishie, o rrindik o lolakuno tiatua Israel." 
2Kings9:9 Naa kaitotiu nanu enkaji e Ahab anaa enkaji e Yeroboam olayioni le Nabat, naitotiu anaa enkaji e Baasha olayioni le Ahija." 
2Kings9:10 Naa kepuo ildiain aainos Yesebel to lpolosie le Yesreel, nemeetae oltung'ani onukaa ninye.” Nebol ilo barnoti kutukaji neisik." 
2Kings9:11 Ore ake pee eipang'u Yehu alotu enetii isinkan lo lkitok lenye, nejoki ninche ninye, “Aisidain mbaa? Kainyoo pee eewuo ele tung'ani omoda enitii?” Nejoki ninye ninche, “Iyiololo intae ele tung'ani o enkiroroto enye.”" 
2Kings9:12 Nejo ninche, “Mesipa ina; toliki iyiook.” Nejo ninye, “Nji o inji aatiaka ninye nanu, nejo, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Kaabukoki eilata aput aitaa olaiguanani loo Siraeli.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Ore nabo kata neya pooki ng'ae nkilani enyena neirragie tiabori nkejek e Yehu, neosh ntarumpetani, neibalunye aajo, “Olaiguanani Yehu.”" 
2Kings9:14 Etarresho apa Yehu olayioni le Yehoshafat olayioni le Nimshi pee ear Yoram metua. Ore apa Yoram o Siraeli pooki, nerripisho ninche te Ramot-Gilead te nkaraki Hasael olaiguanani le Siria;" 
2Kings9:15 kake etorrinyunye apa olaiguanani Yoram metabaki te Yesreel te nkaraki ilbaa apa ootipika ninye iltung'ana le Siria, ina kata apa pee earare Hasael olaiguanani le Siria. Neaku etejo Yehu, “Tenaa ena endamunoto ino, mincho naa oltung'ani hoo obo eipang te nkanasa alo ainosaa ilomon te Yesreel.”" 
2Kings9:16 Neirot Yehu ngarrin enyena oo mbartan, nelo Yesreel, amu teine apa eirragita Yoram. Neewuo apa Ahasia olaiguanani le Yuda amutan Yoram." 
2Kings9:17 Ore apa olarriponi negira aitashe to ltalet te Yesreel, neikeern encholuek e Yehu egira alotu, nejo, “Adolita olturrur,” Nejo Yoram, “Iwa olakedoni le mbarta pee elo anang'are ninche, naa nchoo ninye ejo, ‘Keseriani ake?’ ”" 
2Kings9:18 Neaku eshomo oltung'ani okedito embarta anang'are ninye, nejoki, “Nji ejo olaiguanani, ‘Keseriani ake.’ ” Nejoki Yehu, “Kaa iyie intaasa eseriani? Mbelekenyayu tusujuaki.” Nelikioo olarriponi ina ejo, “Etabaikia olkilikuai ninche, kake merrinyunye ninye.”" 
2Kings9:19 Neitoki Yoram airriwaa likae kilikuai oewuo ine netii ninche, nejoki, “Nji ejo olaiguanani, ‘Keseriani ake,’ ” neitoki Yehu ajoki, “Kenenyoo eseriani? Mbelekenyayu tusujuaki.”" 
2Kings9:20 Neitoki ake olarriponi alikioo ajo, “Etabaikia ninye ninche, kake megira ninye arrinyunye. Ore elotunoto neikununo anaa elotunoto e Yehu olayioni le Nimshi amu kekuetu te ngolon oleng.”" 
2Kings9:21 Nejo Yoram, “Entobira engarri ai oo mbartan.” Neipang'u Yoram olaiguanani loo Siraeli o Ahasia olaiguanani le Yuda, meetae ake olemetii engarri enye oo mbartan, nepuo aanang'are Yehu, nepuo aanang'aa te wueji e Nabot le Yesreel." 
2Kings9:22 Ore ake pee edol Yoram Yehu, nejoki ninye, “Ke seriani ake Yehu?” Newaliki ajoki, “Kaa seriani etumi, eba nji enkiborra oo nkonyek o esakutore e ng'utunyi Yesebel te nkumoi?”" 
2Kings9:23 Neibelekenya Yoram ailanyisho, ejoki Ahasia “Olosek Ahasia!”" 
2Kings9:24 Neyietu Yehu enkawuo enye te ngolon enye pooki, neng'or Yoram erishata oo ronyi, nelo embae ang'or oltau lenye, neimis ninye tiatua engarri oo mbartan." 
2Kings9:25 Nejoki Yehu Bidkar olaretoni lenye, “Ilepie ninye nilo aiturraa te wueji e Nabot le Yesreel. Amu idamu iyie enapa kata kiriamari kikedito mbartan te siadi Ahab papaai lenye, nchere eiroro Olaitoriani ena kitanapata tialo ninye:" 
2Kings9:26 ‘Ore te sipata, anaa enatoduaa ngole osarge le Nabot, o sarge loo layiok lenyena Olaitoriani ojo kaitalaku nanu te iyie tene wueji.’ Ore naa taata iwa iyie ninye nilo anang'aa ninye teine wueji te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani.”" 
2Kings9:27 Ore ake pee edol Ahasia olaiguanani le Yuda ena, neisik alo enkalo e Bet-hagan. Nesujaa sii Yehu ninye, nejo, “Entang'or sii ninye.” Neng'or ninche ninye etii atua engarri oo mbartan te nkilepata e Guur, te mbata e Iblem. Neisikaki ninye Megido nelo aye teine." 
2Kings9:28 Nenap isinkan lenyena te ngarri oo mbartan neya Yerusalem, nepuo aanukaa ninye te nkurare enye, tenebo loo menye tiatua enkanasa e Daudi." 
2Kings9:29 Ore to lari le tomon oobo le nkitoria e Yoram olayioni le Ahab neiteru Ahasia aitoreisho te Yuda. 
2Kings9:30 Ore apa pee elotu Yehu Yesreel, nening Yesebel ina; nesir nkonyek enyena, neitobir akus endukuya enye, nerumisho te lusie." 
2Kings9:31 Ore eimu Yehu kishomi, nejo ninye, “Keseriani ake iyie Simri, oloata iloikop lo lkitok lenye?”" 
2Kings9:32 Neshumu Yehu nkonyek enyena aing'or elusie, nejo, “Kalo ilo otii embata ai? Kalo?” Ore iltung'ana oare okuni naa sunaishi oogelema neing'or ninye." 
2Kings9:33 Nejoki ninche, “Entusulaki ninye enkop.” Nesulaki ninche ninye enkop; ore embata o sarge lenye neisuakino esuntai, o mbartan, neitunyoo mbartan ninye." 
2Kings9:34 Neitoki ninye ajing atua aji nedaa neokisho; nejo, “Entodol ena kitok nadiaa, enchom entunukai ninye; amu entito o laiguanani ninye.”" 
2Kings9:35 Kake ore ake pee epuo ninche aanukaa ninye, neitu edol toki meteleku ake endukuya o nkejek, o ndapi oo nkaik." 
2Kings9:36 Ore ake pee errinyunye ninche aaliki ninye, nejo ninye, “Ororei lo Laitoriani ele, apa oiroro aimunye osinka lenye Elisha le Tishbi, ejo, ‘Ore to lpolosie le Yesreel naa keinos ildiain nkiri o sesen le Yesebel;" 
2Kings9:37 naa ketiu empopok e Yesebel anaa emodioi eirrag tioriong enkop, to lpolosie le Yesreel, ometaa meetae oltung'ani ojo, Yesebel ena.’ ”" 
2Kings10:1 Eeta apa Ahab ilayiok ntomoni naapishana te Samaria. Neiger Yehu mpala airriwaa Samaria, airriwaki ilaitoriak le nkanasa, o lpayiani, o laing'urak loo layiok le Ahab, ejo," 
2Kings10:2 “Tenebau ena palai enitii, amu iatata ilayiok lo lkitok linyi tenebo intae, niaatata ngarrin oo mbartan, o mbartan, o nkanas naasheta sunta, o masaa o larrabal," 
2Kings10:3 entegelu oloisul ogol te lelo ayiok lo lkitok linyi, ninchosho ninye olorika le papaai lenye, nimitutu enkaji olkitok linyi.”" 
2Kings10:4 Kake eiruto ninche oleng, nejo, “Ng'ura eitu eigaraa ilaiguanak oare ninye; kaji naa iyiook kinko tenikintasheikinore ninye?”" 
2Kings10:5 Neaku ore ilo aitasheikinoni le nkaji e nkitoo, o laitasheikinoni le nkanasa, tenebo ilpayiani, o laing'urak, neirriwaki Yehu olkilikuai ejo, “Kira iyiook isinkan linono, naa eikiaas pooki nintanap iyiook. Mikintaa iyiook likae tung'ani, olaiguanani; taasa enaba anaa enidol aa sidai too nkonyek inono.”" 
2Kings10:6 Neitoki ninye aigeroki ninche enkae palai e are, ajoki, “Tenaa enkalo ai itii, naa tenaa eikining'ining'i nanu, entudung'oi ilukuny oo layiok lo lkitok linyi, nipuopuo aapuonu enatii taisere te Yesreel tena rishata.” Ore apa lelo ayiok lo laiguanani pokira ntomoni naapishana, netii tenebo iltung'ana kituaak le nkanasa, laa ninche apa ooitubulu ninche." 
2Kings10:7 Ore ake pee ebau ina palai enetii ninche, neibung ninche lelo ayiok lo laiguanani, near metuata, iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana, nepik ilukuny enye nkikapuni, neyau ninche enetii Yehu te Yesreel." 
2Kings10:8 Ore ake pee elotu olkilikuai ajoki ninye, “Eyautua ninche ilukuny oo layiok lo laiguanani,” nejo ninye, “Erragie ninche too lturrurri oare tembata e kishomi o mekenyu.”" 
2Kings10:9 Ore tadekenya pee eipang ninye alo boo, neitashe ajoki iltung'ana pooki, “Miatata intae entioto. Nanu apa otarresho olkitok lai, naar ninye metua; kake aing'ae natara metuata kulo pooki?" 
2Kings10:10 Entayiolo naa nchere, menya enkop ororei lo Laitoriani, apa oiroro ninye oipirta olmarei le Ahab; amu etaasa Olaitoriani ina apa natejo ninye aimunye osinka lenye Eliya.”" 
2Kings10:11 Near Yehu metuata lelo pooki apa ootelekutua te nkaji e Ahab te Yesreel, o ltung'ana lenyena kituaak, o lchoreta lenyena yiolot, o lapolosak lenyena, ometaba anaa neishu pooki." 
2Kings10:12 Neitoki ninye adumunye nelo Samaria. Ore te nkoitoi etii ninye Beteked ewueji oo lairritak loo ntare," 
2Kings10:13 nenang'are Yehu iltung'ana lo lmarei lenye lo laiguanani le Yuda oji Ahasia, nejoki ninche, “Irara akua?” Newaliki ninche aajoki, “Kira iyiook ilo lmarei le Ahasia, nikietuo iyiook aamutan iltung'ana le nkaji e nkitoo, o layiok le nkitok o laiguanani.”" 
2Kings10:14 Nejo ninye, “Ewaita ninche eishu.” Neyae ninche eishu, nepuo ninche aar metuata te ngumoto e Beteked, iltung'ana artam oare neitu elekuni obo lenye." 
2Kings10:15 Ore pee edumunye ninye alo teine, nenang'are Yehonadab olayioni le Rekab elotu anang'are ninye; neiroroki ninye, nejoki, “Ketiu oltau lino te nanu anaa enatiu olalai te iyie?” Nejo Yehonadab, “Ee” Nejoki Yehu, “Tenaa neijia nchooki enkaina ino.” Neisho ninye Yehu enkaina. Neyiataa Yehu ninye apik engarri oo mbartan." 
2Kings10:16 Nejoki ninye, “Wou tusujaki pee idol enyuaata naata to Laitoriani.” Kae neked ninye tenebo ninye engarri enye oo mbartan." 
2Kings10:17 Ore ake pee elotu Samaria, near metua lelo pooki apa ootelekutua lo lmarei le Ahab ootii Samaria, ometaba anaa neishu pooki, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani apa otiaka Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Neitoki Yehu aiturrur iltung'ana pooki, nejoki ninche, “Eisiaayia apa Ahab Baal penyo; kake kelo Yehu aisiaai ninye oleng." 
2Kings10:19 Ore naa taata empotokoki nanu iloibonok pooki le Baal, o laseremak lenyena pooki o lapolosak lenyena pooki; emincho eaku metii ninye olemetii, amu aata olasar kitok laitaiki Baal. Ore oltung'ani lemelotu neari metua.” Etaasa apa Yehu ina te nkalamasisho ejo pee eidaikie ilapolosak le Baal." 
2Kings10:20 Neitanapisho Yehu ajo, “Entobira eumata kitok te nkaraki Baal.” Neaku eibalunye ninche." 
2Kings10:21 Neirriwaa Yehu ilkiliku meshomo Israel pooki, nepuonu ilaseremak pooki le Baal, neaku meetae oltung'ani leitu elotu. Nejing ninche atua enkaji e Baal, neiputayu ina aji e Baal ebaiki esuntai ometabaiki enkae suntai." 
2Kings10:22 Nejoki ilo laa ninye oitasheiki osanduku oshumishoreki, “Iyau masaa o ntokitin enkisiaayiare te nkaraki eseremare e Baal.” Neyau ninye nena masaa," 
2Kings10:23 nelo Yehu atua ina aji e Baal tenebo Yehonadab olayioni le Rekab; nejoki ilaseremak le Baal, “Entujurru entodol nchere metii osinka lo Laitoriani hoo obo atua intae. Kake ilaseremak le Baal ake.”" 
2Kings10:24 Neitoki alo atua aji aishooyo inkishorot neitayu ilasarri oopejori. Netipika apa Yehu iltung'ana ntomoni isiet boo, nejoki, “Ore oltung'ani obo te lelo latipika nkaik inono metuluai neiturraa enkishui enye.”" 
2Kings10:25 Ore ake pee eidip aishooi nkishorot o lasar opejori, nejoki Yehu olarriponi o lkituaak, “Entijing'aki entaar metuata; emincho oltung'ani obo eimisho.” Ore ake pee eidip aatar ninche too lalema, ore ilo arriponi o lkituaak nenang'aki ninche boo, nepuo olgilata li atua te nkaji e Baal." 
2Kings10:26 Neipang'unye ninche ina ng'ape apa natii enkaji e Baal, nepejoo." 
2Kings10:27 Neidaikie ninche ina ng'ape e Baal, neidaikie ina aji e Baal, neitaa enkaji narotokini ometabaiki ena olong." 
2Kings10:28 Neijia eikuna Yehu eishie Baal tiatua Israel. 
2Kings10:29 Kake eitu apa eibelekenya Yehu apaash ing'ok e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, naa te ninche apa aitapong'oyie Isiraeli, meteserema ilasho le sahabu te Betel o te Dan." 
2Kings10:30 Nejoki Olaitoriani Yehu, “Ore enkaraki nitaasa esidai too nkonyek aainei, nintaasa enkaji e Ahab te risioroto e nena pooki naatii oltau lai, ore ilayiok linono le ishoi e ong'uan, kepuo aatonie olorika le nkitoo too Siraeli.”" 
2Kings10:31 Kake mme arriyia apa Yehu te nkibung'ata oo nkitanapat o Laitoriani. Enkai oo Siraeli, to ltau lenye pooki; eitu apa ninye epaash ing'ok e Yeroboam naa ninche eitapong'orie Isiraeli metaasa ing'ok." 
2Kings10:32 Ore apa te nena olong'i, neiteru Olaitoriani adung'oo kulie wuejitin e nkop oo Siraeli. Etimira apa Hasael ninche eisulie tialo ilpolosien le Israel pooki." 
2Kings10:33 Ebaiki olkeju le Yordan te nkalo o loo saen, o enkop pooki e Gilead, o ene Gad, o ene Ruben o ene Manase, ebaiki Aroa, te mbata o erata oji Arnon, aa taa Gilead o Bashan." 
2Kings10:34 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin pooki e Yehu, o nena pooki nataasa ninye o enkidimata enye pooki, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings10:35 Neirura Yehu etua anaa loo menye, nenukari ninye te Samaria. Neitoreisho Yehoahas olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings10:36 Ore apa enkata naitoria Isiraeli te Samaria naa ilarin tikitam o isiet. 
2Kings11:1 Ore ake pee edol Atalaia ng'otonye Ahasia ajo etua olayioni lenye, nedumunye ninye aidaikie enkaji pooki e nkitoo." 
2Kings11:2 Kake ore Yehosheba, ina tito o laiguanani Yoram, enkanashe e Ahasia, neya Yoash olayioni le Ahasia, nepurroo ninye nelo aisudoo aitung'uaa lelo ayiok lo laiguanani apa ooji pee eari metuata, nepik ninye o enkaibung'ani enye atua olgilata oirragi. Neisudoo ninye te nkaraki Atalia, neaku eitu eari ninye metua." 
2Kings11:3 Neboitare Yoash ninye ilarin ile, eisudoo tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, naa Atalia naitoreisho ina kata teina kop." 
2Kings11:4 Kake ore to lari liopishana neirriwaki olapolosani oji Yehoida olkilikuai lelo aitasheikinok loo larripok le nkaji e nkitoo, nejoki ninche pee epuonu enkaji e Nkai. Ore teine neinosie ninche olmumai pee ening'okino ina apa naitobira pee eas. Neitodol ninche olayioni lo laiguanani." 
2Kings11:5 Neitanap ninye ninche ajoki, “Ena bae intae enchom entaas: ore erubata inyi e uni, lelo ooipang'u aaing'uaa enkisiaayiare te nkolong e sabato, nerrip enkaji o laiguanani" 
2Kings11:6 netii enkae rubata e uni kishomi e Suri, ore enkae rubata e uni nelo kishomi natii oriong ilarripok, nerrip lelo enkaji e nkitoo." 
2Kings11:7 Ore ntukusi inyi are naapuonu enkisiaayiare te nkolong e sabato, nerrip enkaji o Laitoriani," 
2Kings11:8 neman ninche aang'adu olaiguanani, oltung'ani ake eibung'ita imasaa enyena o larrabal te nkaina. Ore pooki ng'ae onyikaki lelo turrurri neari metua. Etaa tenebo o laiguanani teneipang auluo o tenejing'u.”" 
2Kings11:9 Neas lelo kituaak le njore te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapishe Yehoida olapolosani neriku ake pooki lenye oltung'ani lenye lemetii enkisiaayiare te nkolong e sabato, tenebo lelo oopuonu aajing enkisiaayiare te nkolong e sabato, nepuonu enetii Yehoida olapolosani." 
2Kings11:10 Neyaki ilo apolosani lelo kituaak le njore iremeta o long'oi apa naara ino laiguanani Daudi, naatii atua enkaji o laiguanani;" 
2Kings11:11 neitashe lelo arripok neibung'ita ake pooki tung'ani imasaa enyena o larrabal too nkaik enyena, ebaiki enkalo e kopikop e nkaji o metabaiki enkalo e moikuape, neman olperere lo lasar oina aji." 
2Kings11:12 Neipang'unye ninye ilo ayioni lo laiguanani neishopoki enkopiyia e nkitoo, neisho ninye enchakenisho, neibalunyeki ninye aaitaa olaiguanani nebukokini eilata aaput. Neosh ninche nkaik ejo, “Metobikoi olaiguanani.”" 
2Kings11:13 Ore ake pee eining'oo Atalia enkilepilep oo larripok tenebo iltung'ana, nelo ninye atua enkaji o Laitoriani ine netii iltung'ana;" 
2Kings11:14 nejo aing'orisho, eitashe olaiguanani te mbata e ng'ape, anaa enatiu olkerreti lenye, ore ilarikok le njore o laoshok loo ntarumpetani ootashare olaiguanani o ltung'ana pooki leina kop, neshipa neosh ntarumpetani. Nepolos Atalia nkilani enyena neishir ajo, “Entorroni! Entorroni!”" 
2Kings11:15 Neitanap olapolosani Yehoida ilarikok le njore laa ninche apa ooitasheiki esikari ajoki, “Eyau ninye eimunye erishata oo ltimito naa iariara pooki tung'ani osuj ninye to lalem.” Amu etejo apa ilo apolosani, “Mincho eari ninye metua tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani.”" 
2Kings11:16 Neaku eibung'a ninche ninye; neim ninye erishata e kishomi oo mbartan nelo enkaji o laiguanani, nepuoi aar ninye metua teine." 
2Kings11:17 Neitobir Yehoida olning'o te rishata o Laitoriani o laiguanani o ltung'ana, nchere eaku ninche iltung'ana lo Laitoriani; neitobir sii olning'o te rishata o laiguanani o ltung'ana." 
2Kings11:18 Neitoki iltung'ana pooki leina kop aapuo enkaji e Baal neuroo ninye, o lperereni lenyena loo lasarri, ore nkitanyaanyukot enyena nebel aaitaa mbelibelat. Near Matan ilo apolosani le Baal metua te dukuya lelo pereren loo lasarri. Nepik ilo apolosani ilarripok ooing'or enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings11:19 Neyau ninye lelo arikok le njore, o laitasheikinok le nkaji e nkitoo, o larripok, o ltung'ana pooki leina kop; neriku ninche pooki olaiguanani te nkaji o Laitoriani, nepuo aaim kishomi oo larripok, nepuo enkaji o laiguanani. Neton ninye to lorika le nkitoo lo laiguanani." 
2Kings11:20 Neshipayu iltung'ana pooki leina kop. Neitirring'a ina anasa ina kata eidipaki aatar Atalia metua to lalem te enkaji o laiguanani. 
2Kings11:21 Oloo larin oopishana apa Yehoash pee eiteru aitoreisho. 
2Kings12:1 Ore apa to lari liopishana le nkitoria e Yehu, neiteru Yehoash aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin artam oare te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Sibia e Beer-sheba." 
2Kings12:2 Neas Yehoash mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani too nkolong'i enyena pooki, amu eiteng'ena apa olapolosani Yehoida ninye." 
2Kings12:3 Ore ake eyia eitu apa eiwuang'ieki iwuejitin neeika, metaa eshomo iltung'ana dukuya epolosisho nepej enkorropil too wuejitin neeika." 
2Kings12:4 Nejoki Yehoash lelo apolosak, “Ore kuna pisai pooki oo ntokitin sinyat naayawuaki atua enkaji o Laitoriani, nena pisai naaikenakaki pooki ng'ae - nena pisai naaikenakaki iltung'ana pooki, o nena pisai naadumaki oltau oltung'ani meyau atua enkaji o Laitoriani," 
2Kings12:5 nchoo ilapolosak eya, eya ake oltung'ani te lelo ooyiolo. Naa nchoo ninche eitobir ina aji aaram te nkata ake naba anaa enadoli ewueji nerami." 
2Kings12:6 Kake ore to lari le tikitam ookuni le nkitoria o laiguanani Yehoash, neitu eram ilapolosak ina aji." 
2Kings12:7 Ore enkaraki ina, neipotu olaiguanani Yehoash Yehoida olapolosani o kulikae apolosak nejoki ninche, Kainyoo intae pee mintobiriri enkaji aaram? Ore naa taata mintokiki aaya mpesai te lelo liyiolorere, kake enchooi nena pisai pee eitobirieki enkaji.”" 
2Kings12:8 Nenyorraa lelo apolosak pee meitoki aaya kulie pisai too ltung'ana, nemeitobir ninche aaram ina aji." 
2Kings12:9 Neitoki Yehoida ilo apolosani adumu osanduku, nepik enaudoto enkikenet enye, nepik ilo sanduku embata o lperere lo lasar, te nkalo e tatene, te wueji nejing'ieki enkaji o Laitoriani; ore lelo apolosak oorip kutukaji nepik atua ine nena pisai pooki naayawuaki atua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings12:10 Naa ore ake enkata nadoli aajo aikumok mpisai naatii atua ilo sanduku, nelotu olasirani lo laiguanani o lapolosani kitok, aaiken neenaa ninche too lbenia oo notoki tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings12:11 Neisho ninche nena pisai naaidipaki aaikena lelo aasak le siaai ooitasheiki enkaji o Laitoriani; nelaaki ninche lelo aguetak loo nkeek, o lashetak ooshetita ina aji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings12:12 Neisho sii ilashetak loo soito o ladung'ok loo soito. Neinyiang'u sii mbaoi o soito ooitobirieki enkaji o Laitoriani aaram. 
2Kings12:13 Kake eitu eishoori te nkaraki enkaji o Laitoriani ntokitin naaitobirieki, ngirran e nkosholai, o ntokitin naarieki enkima, o lbakulini, o ntarumpetani, anaa kulie masaa e sahabu, arashu ine nkosholai, te nena pisai apa naayawuaki atua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings12:14 Amu eishooki apa nena pisai ilaitobirak le nkaji ooramita enkaji o Laitoriani. 
2Kings12:15 Neitu apa eikilikuani metolimu enkikenakinoto te lelo tung'ana ooishooitie nena pisai too nkaik enye, aalaaki lelo aisiaayiak, amu etaasishote apa ninche te nkoitoi naisiligayu." 
2Kings12:16 Ore mpisai o lasar le nkitarruorroto o no lasar le ng'oki, neitu eyauni atua enkaji o Laitoriani; inoo lapolosak nena." 
2Kings12:17 Ore apa teina kata nelo Hasael olaiguanani le Siria aarare Gaat, neya ninye. Kake ore ake pee eibelekenya Hasael aing'or Yerusalem," 
2Kings12:18 neya Yehoash ilo aiguanani le Yuda nena kishorot pooki apa naaitisinya, Yehoshafat o Yoram o Ahasia, lelo aiguanak apa le Yuda, oara iloo menye. O nena kishorot naaitisinya ninye makewan, o sahabu pooki apa natii atua ilchumat le nkaji o Laitoriani, o enkaji o laiguanani neirriwaki nena pooki Hasael olaiguanani le Siria. Nelo Hasael aing'uaa Yerusalem." 
2Kings12:19 Ore apa kulie kiaasin e Yoash, o nena pooki naataasa, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings12:20 Nedumunye isinkan lenyena aarreshisho, near Yoash metua te nkaji e Milo teina oitoi nadoyio alo Sila." 
2Kings12:21 Isinkan lenyena apa, Yasakar olayioni le Shimet o Yehoshad olayioni le Shomer ootanang'ie ninye enkop, neaku etua ninye nenukari tenebo loo menye tiatua enkanasa e Daudi, neitoreisho Amasia olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings13:1 Ore to lari le tikitam ookuni le nkitoria e Yoash olayioni le Ahasia, olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Yehoahas olayioni le Yehu aitoreisho te Israel o te Samaria, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon oopishana." 
2Kings13:2 Etaasa apa ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani nerubare ing'ok e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, naa ninche apa eitapong'orie Isiraeli. Eitu ninye eing'uaa nena ng'ok." 
2Kings13:3 Neyupuyup engoro o Laitoriani tialo Isiraeli, neishooyo ninche apik nkaik e Hasael olaiguanani le Siria, o nkaik e Benhadad olayioni le Hasael." 
2Kings13:4 Neitoki Yehoahas aishiraki Olaitoriani, nening Olaitoriani ninye; amu etoduaa ninye ina kibookinoto naibookoki Israel enkop, oina naibooko ninche olaiguanani le Siria enkop." 
2Kings13:5 Ore enkaraki ina eishoo Olaitoriani Isiraeli olaitajeunoni, neaku eitajeutuo ninche too nkaik oo ltung'ana le Siria. Nebik iltung'ana le Israel too nkang'itie enye anaa apa ake." 
2Kings13:6 Ore ake eyia eitu ninche eing'uaa ing'ok e nkaji e Yeroboam, naa ninche apa eitapong'orie Isiraeli. Kake eibung'a ninye orrekie lenye, neitobik Asher te Samaria." 
2Kings13:7 Amu eitu apa eing'ueikini Yehoahas enjore oo ltung'ana onom loo mbartan o ngarrin oo mbartan tomon o ltung'ana nkalifuni tomon oopuo too nkejek. Amu eidaikie apa olaiguanani le Siria ninche neitotiu ninche anaa enterit te wueji neidong'ishoreki. 
2Kings13:8 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Yehoahas o nena pooki naataasa neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel. 
2Kings13:9 Neaku eirure Yehoahas etua anaa apa loo menye, nenukaa ninche ninye te Samaria neitoreisho Yoash olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings13:10 Ore to lari le tomoni uni oopishana le nkitoria e Yoash olaiguanani le Yuda neiteru Yehoas olayioni le Yehoahas aitore Isirael te Samaria, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon o ile." 
2Kings13:11 Etaasa apa sii ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, eitu ninye epaash ing'ok pooki e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, naa ninche eitapong'orie Isiraeli metaasa ing'ok. Kake eibung'a ninye orrekie lenye aas ing'ok." 
2Kings13:12 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin pooki e Yoash, o nena pooki naataasa, oina magilanisho naa ninye etigilunore Amasia olaiguanani le Yuda, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel?" 
2Kings13:13 Neaku eirure Yoash etua anaa loo menye, netonie Yeroboam olorika lenye le nkitoo; nenukari Yoash te Samaria tenebo ilaiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings13:14 Ore apa pee ejing Elisha emuoyian naa ninye naawa, nelo Yoash olaiguanani le Israel enetii ninye neishir ninye te dukuya Elisha ejo, “Papaai lai, papaai lai! Ngarrin oo mbartan e Israel o lakedok lenyena loo mbartan”" 
2Kings13:15 Nejoki Elisha ninye, “Iwa enkawuo o mbaa;” neya ninye enkawuo o mbaa." 
2Kings13:16 Neitoki ninye ajoki olaiguanani le Israel, “Teyietu enkawuo,” neyietu ninye, neiteleiki Elisha nkaik enyena endukuya o laiguanani." 
2Kings13:17 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Tabolo elusie te nkalo oloosaen,” nebol olaiguanani elusie. Neitoki Elisha ajoki ninye, “Tang'oroi embae,” nengoroo olaiguanani embae. Nejoki Elisha, “Embae o Laitoriani e nkisulata embae e nkisulata namirieki Siria! Amu ilo aarare Siria te Afek ometaba anaa niishie ninche.”" 
2Kings13:18 Nejo ninye, “Iwa nena baa.” Neya olaiguanani nena baa. Nejoki ninye ilo aiguanani le Israel, “Tooshie nena baa enkop;” neoshie ninye enkop katitin uni, neitirring'a." 
2Kings13:19 Negorokino ilo tung'ani le Nkai ninye, nejoki, “Anaata napaji itooshie enkop katitin imiet anaa ile; naa anaata ilo aar Siria ometaba anaa niishie ninche, kake ore taata katitin uni ake ilo aosh Siria.”" 
2Kings13:20 Neaku etua apa Elisha nenukari ninye. Ore ilooti wuampan loo Lmoabu naa kegira apa aarasaki ina kop te rishata o loirujuruj teilo ari. 
2Kings13:21 Ore ina kata enukari oltung'ani otua, ng'ura nedoli entukus eilo wuampa nenang'akini ilo tung'ani otua atua enkurare e Elisha; eji ore ake pee eiseyie ilo tung'ani iloik le Elisha, nepiu neitashe too nkejek enyena." 
2Kings13:22 Ore apa Hasael olaiguanani le Siria neibooko Isiraeli enkop too nkolong'i pooki e Yehoahas. 
2Kings13:23 Kake eing'urrie Olaitoriani ninche, neibelekenyakino ninche, te nkaraki osotua lenye o Abraham, o Isaak, o Yakobo, neaku meidaikie ninye ninche; nemearaa ninche aitung'uaa kewan ometabaiki taata." 
2Kings13:24 Ore ake pee eye Hasael olaiguanani le Siria, neaku Benhadad olayioni lenye olaiguanani te rishata enye." 
2Kings13:25 Neitoki Yehoash olayioni le Yehoahas aya te Benhadad olayioni le Hasael nena anas apa naatooruo ninye Yehoas papaai lenye to larrabal. Katitin uni etimira Yoash ninye nerrinyu nena anas oo Siraeli. 
2Kings14:1 Ore to lari liare le nkitoria e Yoash olayioni le Yoahas, olaiguanani le Israel, neiteru aitoreisho Amasia olayioni le Yoash, ilo aiguanani le Yuda." 
2Kings14:2 Oloo larin tikitam o imiet apa ninye pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tikitam ooudo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Yeho-adin e Yerusalem." 
2Kings14:3 Neas ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani, kake mme sii anaa apa Daudi papaai lenye. Etaasa ninye too mbaa pooki anaa enataasa papaai lenye Yoash." 
2Kings14:4 Kake eitu eiwuang'ieki iwuejitin neeika, eton ake eitayu iltung'ana ilasarri nepej enkorropil too wuejitin neeika." 
2Kings14:5 Ore ake pee eidipi aaishoo enkitoo metaa ninye olaiguanani, near ninye isinkan lenyena metuata, laa ninche apa ootasesekuana menye." 
2Kings14:6 Kake eitu ninye ear nkera e lelo tung'ana oata iloikop, te risioroto e nena naaigeroki te mbuku oo nkitanapat e Musa. Teine apa neitanapishe Olaitoriani ajo, “Meari iloo menye metuata te nkaraki nkera, nemeari nkera metuata te nkaraki loo menye; kake keye ake pooki ng'ae te nkaraki eng'oki enye makewan.”" 
2Kings14:7 Etaara apa ninye iltung'ana le Edom nkalifuni tomon metuata to erata le munyan, neya enkanasa e Sela to larrabal, neisho ninye enkarna ajo Yokteel, naa ninye enkarna enye o taata." 
2Kings14:8 Neitoki Amasia airriwaa ilkiliku meshomo enetii Yoash olayioni le Yehoahas, olayioni le Yehu, olaiguanani le Israel, ajoki, “Wou maing'urata iyiook too nkomomi.”" 
2Kings14:9 Neitoki Yehoash olaiguanani le Israel airriwaki olkilikuai olaiguanani le Yuda, nejoki, “Etiaaka apa olkikuei lo doinyo le Lebanon oltarakuai, ‘nchoru entito ino meyama olayioni lai.’ Nelotu eng'ues entim e Lebanon aim ine neituny ilo kikuei." 
2Kings14:10 Esipa itoosho iyie Edom, nikinting'ida iyie oltau lino. Ndipakinoyu naa iyie te nkitoo ino nintirring'a tiang. Amu kainyoo iyie pee ing'oru enyamali ijo pee ibatata iyie tenebo Yuda.”" 
2Kings14:11 Kake eitu ening Amasia ina. Neaku etudumunye Yehoash olaiguanani le Israel alo, ore ninye o Amasia olaiguanani le Yuda neipirakino to larrabal te Bet-shenesh, e Yuda." 
2Kings14:12 Nemir Israel Yuda neisik pooki tung'ani alo enkang enye. 
2Kings14:13 Neibung Yehoash olaiguanani le Israel Amasia ilo aiguanani le Yuda, olayioni le Yehoash, olayioni le Ahasia te Betshe-mesh, nelotu Yerusalem neuroo esuntai e Yerusalem erishata oo ntemat e nkaina iip ong'uan, ebaiki kishomi e Efraim ometabaiki kishomi o lpijata." 
2Kings14:14 Neya ninye sahabu pooki o enkosholai, o masaa pooki apa naainepuaki tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, o tiatua ilchumat le nkaji o laiguanani, o ltung'ana apa ootarayioki, neyau ninche Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Yehoash apa naataasa ninye, o enkidimata enye oina nataarare Amasia olaiguanani le Yuda, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings14:16 Neirura Yehoash etua anaa loo menye, nenukari ninye te Samaria, tenebo ilaiguanak le Israel; neitoreisho Yeroboam olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings14:17 Etobiko apa Amasia olayioni le Yoash, olaiguanani le Yuda, ilarin tomon o imiet, te siadi enkeeya e Yehoash olayioni le Yehoahas olaiguanani le Israel." 
2Kings14:18 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Amasia, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings14:19 Nerresh ninche ninye te Yerusalem, neisikaki enkop e Lakish. Kake eirriwakita ninche iltung'ana le Lakish, nepuo ninche aar ninye metua teine." 
2Kings14:20 Nenapu ninche ninye too mbartan; nepuoi aanukaa ninye te Yerusalem tenebo loo menye te nkanasa e Daudi. 
2Kings14:21 Neya iltung'ana pooki le Yuda Asaria, laa oloo larin tomon o ile, neitaa ninye olaiguanani te rishata e papaai lenye Amasia." 
2Kings14:22 Etesheta apa ninye Elat nerrinyoki Yuda, ina kata eidipa olaiguanani atua tenebo loo menye." 
2Kings14:23 Ore to lari le tomon o imiet le nkitoria e Amasia olayioni le Yoash, olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Yeroboam olayioni le Yoash, olaiguanani le Israel aitoreisho te Samaria, neitoreisho ninye ilarin artam oobo." 
2Kings14:24 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani. Eitu ninye epaash ing'ok pooki e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, naa ninche apa eitapong'orie Isiraeli." 
2Kings14:25 Etorrinyuo ninye olpolosie pooki le Israel ebaiki enejing'ieki Hamatoo metabaiki enaiposha e Araba, te risioroto eilo rorei lo Laitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli, apa oiroro aimunye osinka lenye Yona olayioni le Amitai, ilo oiboni le Nkai; oing'uaa Gat-hafer." 
2Kings14:26 Amu etoduaa apa Olaitoriani nchere ore ina kibookinoto e nkop oo Siraeli naa keme, amu meetae hoo obo otelekua, oloena anaa ololakuno, nemeetae oltung'ani oret Isiraeli." 
2Kings14:27 Kake eitu apa ejo Olaitoriani keiwuang'ie enkarna e Israel tiabori keper. Neaku eitajeuo ninye ninche aitung'uaa enkaina e Yeroboam olayioni le Yoash. 
2Kings14:28 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Yeroboam, o nena pooki naataasa ninye, o enkidimata enye, o larrabali lenyena, oina natorrinyoko Israel Dameski o Hamat, naa ene Yuda apa, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings14:29 Neirura Yeroboam etua anaa apa loo menye, lelo aiguanak le Israel. Neitoreisho Sakaria olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings15:1 Ore to lari le tikitam oopishana le nkitoria e Yeroboam olaiguanani le Israel, neiteru Asaria olayioni le Amasia, ilo aiguanani le Yuda aitoreisho." 
2Kings15:2 Oloo larin tomon o ile apa ninye pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin onom oare te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Yekolia e Yerusalem." 
2Kings15:3 Neas ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani, te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa Amasia papaai lenye." 
2Kings15:4 Kake ore eyia eitu eiwuang'ieki iwuejitin neeika; neton ake epej iltung'ana enkorropil too wuejitin neeika. 
2Kings15:5 Neosh Olaitoriani ilo aiguanani, neaku ninye olayioni le nkeeya oo lbolot ometabaiki ina olong apa natua ninye. Neton apa ninye te nkaji enye etekepayioki. Naa Yotam apa olayioni lo laiguanani oitasheiki enkaji e nkitoo, neitore iltung'ana leina kop." 
2Kings15:6 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Amasia, o nena pooki naataasa ninye, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings15:7 Neirura Asaria etua anaa apa loo menye, nenukari ninye tenebo loo menye te nkanasa e Daudi, neitoreisho Yatam olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings15:8 Ore to lari le tomoni uni o isiet le nkitoria e Asaria olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Sakaria olayioni le Yeroboam aitoreisho too Siraeli te nkop e Samaria, ilapaitin ile." 
2Kings15:9 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, anaa apa enataasa papaai lenye. Eitu ninye epaash ing'ok e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, naa ninche eitapong'orie Isiraeli." 
2Kings15:10 Nerresh Shalum olayioni le Yabesh ninye, neosh ninye abatat te Ibleam, near ninye metua, neitoreisho te rishata enye." 
2Kings15:11 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Sekaria, ng'ura, eigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings15:12 (Ina apa enkisiligata naishoo Olaitoriani Yehu, ajoki, “Ketonie ilayiok linono olorika le nkitoo le Israel ometabaiki e ishoi e ong'uan,” nelotu aaku ina.)" 
2Kings15:13 Eiterua apa Shalum olayioni le Yabesh aitoreisho to lari le tomoni uni o naaudo le nkitoria e Usia olaiguanani le Yuda, neitoreisho ninye olapa obo te Samaria." 
2Kings15:14 Neitoki Menaham olayioni le Gadi alotu eing'uaa Tirsa nelotu Samaria, neosh ninye Shalum olayioni le Yebesh te Samaria near ninye metua, neitoreisho ninye te rishata enye." 
2Kings15:15 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Shalum, ina rreshoto natarreshishe, ng'ura, eigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings15:16 Ore apa teina kata near Manahem Tipua o pooki ootii atua, o lpolosien lenyena ebaiki Tirsa neito idia alo. Etaara apa tenkaraki neitu ninche ebolu ninye, nedanyaa nkoishua nkituaak pooki naairoishi." 
2Kings15:17 Ore to lari le tomoni uni o naaudo le nkitoria e Asaria olaiguanani le Yuda neiteru Menahen olayioni le Gadi aitoreisho te Israel, neitoreisho ilarin tomon te Samaria." 
2Kings15:18 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani; eitu ninye epaash te nkishui enye pooki ing'ok e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, naa ninche eitapong'orie Isiraeli metaasa ing'ok." 
2Kings15:19 Nelotu Pul olaiguanani le Asiria aarare ina kop; neisho Menahem Pul ntalantani enkalifu nabo e nkosholai, pee etum ninye ataretu ninye, meitagolo enkitoria enye." 
2Kings15:20 Netasotuo apa Menahem nena pisai te Israel, aa taa, too ltung'ana pooki karsisi. Neitayu ake oltung'ani shekeli onom aisho olaiguanani le Asiria. Neaku etorrinye olaiguanani le Asiria, neitu eitoki aton teina kop." 
2Kings15:21 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin pooki e Manahem, nena pooki naataasa, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings15:22 Neirura Mehahem etua anaa apa loo menye, neitoreisho Pekalia olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings15:23 Ore to lari le onom oare le nkitoria e Asaria olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Pekahia olayioni le Menahem aitore Isiraeli te Samaria, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tikitam." 
2Kings15:24 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani; eitu ninye epaash ing'ok e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat naa ninche apa eitapong'orie Isiraeli. 
2Kings15:25 Ore Peka ilo kitok lenye le enjore, olayioni le Remalia, nerresh ninye tenebo iltung'ana onom le Gilead ilo aiguanani, near ninye metua te Samaria, too lgilat le nkaji e nkitoo. Neitoreisho ninye te rishata enye." 
2Kings15:26 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Pekahia, o nena pooki naataasa, ng'ura, eigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings15:27 Ore to lari le onom o are le nkitoria e Asaria olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Peka olayioni le Remalia aitore Isiraeli te Samaria, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tikitam." 
2Kings15:28 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani. Eitu ninye epaash ing'ok e Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat naa ninche apa eitapong'orie Isiraeli metaasa ing'ok. 
2Kings15:29 Ore too nkolong'i e Peka olaiguanani le Israel nelotu Tiglat-Pilesa olaiguanani le Asiria neibung nkanas e Ijon, o Abel-bet-maka, o Yanoa, o Kadesh, o Hasor, o Gilead o Galilaya, o enkop pooki e Naftali; neya iltung'ana eararoto te Asiria." 
2Kings15:30 Neitoki Hoshea, olayioni le Ela arresh Peka olayioni le Remalia, neosh ninye, near metua, neitoreisho ninye te rishata enye, to lari le tikitam le nkitoria e Yotam olayioni le Usia." 
2Kings15:31 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin pooki e Peka, o nena pooki naataasa ninye, ng'ura, eigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings15:32 Ore to lari liare le nkitoria e Peka olayioni le Remalia, olaiguanani le Israel, neiteru Yotam olayioni le Usia ilo aiguanani le Yuda aitoreisho." 
2Kings15:33 Oloo larin tikitam apa o imiet ninye pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ilarin tomon o ile te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Yerusha entito e Sadok." 
2Kings15:34 Neas ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitorian, te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa papaai lenye Usia." 
2Kings15:35 Ore ake eyia eitu apa eiwuang'ieki iwuejitin neeika. Eton ake epolosisho iltung'ana nepej enkorropil too wuejitin neeika. Etesheta apa ninye kishomi e shumata e nkaji o Laitoriani. 
2Kings15:36 Ore apa nkulie kiasin e Yoram, o nena pooki naataasa, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings15:37 Ore apa te nena olong'i neiteru Olaitoriani airriwaa Resin olaiguanani le Siria o Peka olayioni le Remalia meshomo aagilunore Yuda. 
2Kings15:38 Neirura Yotan etua anaa loo menye, nenukari ninye tenebo loo menye, tiatua enkanasa e Daudi papaai lenye. Neitoreisho Ahas olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings16:1 Ore to lari le tomon oopishana le nkitoria e Peka olayioni le Remalia neiteru Ahas olayioni le Yotan, olaiguanani le Yuda aitoreisho." 
2Kings16:2 Oloo larin tikitam apa Ahas pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon o ile te Yerusalem. Neitu ninye eas mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani Enkai enye, anaa apa enataasa papaai lenye Daudi." 
2Kings16:3 Kake eibung'a ninye orrekie loo laiguanak le Israel. Etapejoyie ninye olayioni leye aitaa olasar, te risioroto e ilo minong loo loshon apa ootaarayie Olaitoriani te dukuya Isiraeli." 
2Kings16:4 Neitayu ninye ilasarri nepejoo enkorropil too wuejitin neeika; o too nchumat oo ldoinyo, o tiabori pooki shani onyori." 
2Kings16:5 Neitoki Resin olaiguanani le Siria o Peka olayioni le Remalia, olaiguanani le Israel aapuonu aaitayunye Yerusalem olarrabal, neman Ahas aang'adu kake eitu emir ninye." 
2Kings16:6 Ore apa teina kata nerrinyu olaiguanani le Edom enkanasa e Elat, metaa ene Edom, nearaa iltung'ana le Yuda aitung'uaa enkanasa e Elat; nepuonu iltung'ana le Edom Elat nebik ninche teine o taata." 
2Kings16:7 Neaku eirriwaka Ahas ilkiliku Tiglat-pilesa olaiguanani le Asiria, ejo, “Ara nanu osinka lino, nara olayioni lino. Wou tokorduaki nanu too nkaik o laiguanani le Siria o too nkaik o laiguanani le Israel, amu aatarasakitia ninche.”" 
2Kings16:8 Neitoki sii Ahas adumu enkosholai o sahabu pooki natii enkaji o Laitoriani o atua ilchumat le nkaji o laiguanani, neirriwaa anaa enkishooroto aisho olaiguanani le Asiria." 
2Kings16:9 Nening olaiguanani le Asiria ninye. Nelo olaiguanani le Asiria agilunore Dameski, neya ninye, neya iltung'ana eararoto te Kiir, near Resin metua." 
2Kings16:10 Ore ake pee elo olaiguanani Ahas Dameski atumore Tiglat-pilesa olaiguanani le Asiria, nelo ninye olperere lo lasar otii Dameski. Neirriwaki olaiguanani olapolosani oji Uria empukunoto eilo perere lo lasar, o enkitobirunoto enye, o mbaa enyena pooki." 
2Kings16:11 Neshetu ilo apolosani oji Uria olperere lo lasar oikununo anaa ilo, te risioroto e nena pooki naairriwaka ninye olaiguanani Ahas te Dameski, neaku eitobira olapolosani Uria ina, eton eitu ebau olaiguanani Ahas te Dameski." 
2Kings16:12 Ore ake pee errinyunye olaiguanani te Dameski nelo aing'or ilo perere lo lasar. Neitoki olaiguanani anyikaki ilo perere lo lasar. Nelo aked shumata enye," 
2Kings16:13 nepejoo ilasarri lenyena o lasarri le ntapa, nebukoki olasar opikuni, neisuaki osarge lenye lo lasar le seriani enchumata eilo perere lo lasar le seriani." 
2Kings16:14 Ore ilo perere lo lasar lo suyai apa otii dukuya Olaitoriani, neiwuang'ie ninye te dukuya enkaji, teine wueji e rishata olperere lenye lo lasar o enkaji o Laitoriani, nelo apik enkalo e moikuape eilo perere lenye lo lasar." 
2Kings16:15 Neitanap olaiguanani Ahas Uria, ilo apolosani, ejo, “Ore te nchumata eilo perere kitok lo lasar, entapejoi olasar le nkakenya opejori, o lasar teipa le ntapa opejori, o lasar lo laiguanani opejori, o lasar lenye le ntapa, o lasar opejori loo ltung'ana pooki leina kop, o lasar lenye le ntapa, o lasar lenye ooki, nisuakiki shumata ninye osarge pooki lo lasar opejori, o sarge pooki lo lasar, kake ore ilo perere lo lasar lo suyai naa nanu ake olo aikilikuanishore.”" 
2Kings16:16 Neas Uria ilo apolosani nena pooki anaa enaitanapa olaiguanani Ahas ninye. 
2Kings16:17 Nedung olaiguanani nena kitotoneta enkitashoto, neiwuang'ie ilo moti oitukuoreki aitung'uaa ninche, neiwuang'ie ilo moti le nkare aitung'uaa lelo mong'i ooitobiruno to suyai apa ootii tiabori, neiteleiki ninye isoito." 
2Kings16:18 Ore ine wueji apa neitobiraki te nkaraki sabato, tiatua enkaji o laiguanani, oina kishomi e auluo o laiguanani, neiwuang'ie ninye tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, te nkaraki ilo aiguanani le Asiria." 
2Kings16:19 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Ahas naataasa eigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda. 
2Kings16:20 Neirura Ahas etua anaa apa loo menye, nenukari ninye tenebo loo menye tiatua enkanasa e Daudi; neitoreisho Hesekia olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings17:1 Ore to lari le tomon oare le nkitoria e Ahas olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Hosea olayioni le Elan aitoreisho te Samaria, neitore ninye Isiraeli. Neitoreisho ninye ilarin ooudo." 
2Kings17:1 Ore to lari le tomon oare le nkitoria e Ahas olaiguanani le Yuda, neiteru Hosea olayioni le Elan aitoreisho te Samaria, neitore ninye Isiraeli. Neitoreisho ninye ilarin ooudo." 
2Kings17:2 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, kake eitu sii etiu anaa ilaiguanak le Israel apa ootii te dukuya ninye." 
2Kings17:3 Nelotu Shalmanesa olaiguanani le Asiria agilunore ninye. Neaku Hoshea osinka lenye, nelaaki ninye kodi." 
2Kings17:4 Kake enoto apa olaiguanani le Asiria enkitang'oroto te Hoshea; amu eirriwaka apa ninye ilkiliku Soo, olaiguanani le Misiri, neitu eitoki alaaki ninye kodi anaa apa enataasa too larin oo tulusoitie. Ore enkaraki ina neikenoo olaiguanani le Asiria ninye, neen tiatua korokoroni." 
2Kings17:5 Neitoki olaiguanani le Samaria aibung ina kop pooki, nelotu Samaria, ore too larin okuni, neman Samaria agadu." 
2Kings17:6 Ore to lari lioudo le nkitoria e Hoshea, neibung olaiguanani le Asiria Samaria, neya Isiraeli ootii Asiria nepik ninche enkanasa e Hala o embata olkeju le Habo, o olkeju le Gosan, o atua nkanas oo Lmedi." 
2Kings17:7 Netiu neijia, amu etaasa apa iltung'ana le Israel eng'oki tialo Olaitoriani Enkai enye, laa ninye oitayio ninche aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, neitupuku te nkaina e Farao olaiguanani le Misiri. Eteserema ninche kulie aitin," 
2Kings17:8 neibung olkerreti le lelo oreren apa ootarayie Olaitoriani te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel, neibung lelo kerreti ooiteng'enishote ilaiguanak le Israel." 
2Kings17:9 Negolong'aki iltung'ana le Israel too nkisudorot mbaa torrok naaiba Olaitoriani Enkai enye, neas mbaa torrok. Eteshetakita ninche ate iwuejitin neeika too nkang'itie enye pooki, ebaiki oltalet ometabaiki enkanasa nasheta isunta." 
2Kings17:10 Etipikakitia ninche ate ing'apeta o Asherim te pooki doinyo naado, o tiabori pooki shani onyori." 
2Kings17:11 Ore teine nepuo aapejoo enkorropil too wuejitin pooki neeika anaa apa enataasa lelo oshon ooiwuang'ie Olaitoriani te dukuya ninche. Neas ninche mbaa torrok neitagor Olaitoriani. 
2Kings17:12 Neisiaai naa ninche nkitanyaanyukot naa ninche apa etiaakinye Olaitoriani ninche, “Emiaas intae ena.”" 
2Kings17:13 Ore ake sii eikoo apa Olaitoriani Israel o Yuda te pooki oiboni le Nkai, o te pooki aduaani, ejo, “Embelekenyata entapaash nkoitoi inyi torrok, nimbung'ubung'u nkitanapat aainei, o nkikoot aainei, te risioroto e nena kitanapat apa naitanapa loo papaai linyi, o nena nairriwaka intae too sinkan laaainei, lelo oiboonok le Nkai.”" 
2Kings17:14 Kake eitu ninche ening, kake etogolong'akita anaa apa loo menye, amu eitu apa eiruk Olaitoriani Enkai enye." 
2Kings17:15 Etemenaitie ninche nkikoot enyena, oilo sotua lenye apa oitobira o loo menye o nena kikoot naaishoo ninye ninche. Eshomo ninche aasujaa nkitanyaanyukot neme Enkai, neaku ilootapong'ori, neibung ninche olkerreti le lelo oshon oomanita ninche, laa ninche apa eitanapa Olaitoriani nchere pee metiu anaa ninche." 
2Kings17:16 Nepaash ninche nkitanapat pooki o Laitoriani Enkai enye, neitobiraki ate nkitanyaanyukot naasholuno oo lasho oare, neitobir Asherim, neserem olorora pooki le shumata, neisiaai Baal." 
2Kings17:17 Nepejoo ilayiok lenye o ntoyie enye anaa ilasarri, neasishore ninche enaibon o esakutore, nemir ate pee etum aataas entorroni too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neitagor ninye." 
2Kings17:18 Ore enkaraki ina etagorokine Olaitoriani Isiraeli oleng, neiwuang'ie ninche te dukuya ninche; eitu eing'uari toki meteleku olosho le Yuda ake." 
2Kings17:19 Eitu apa sii ninye eibung Yuda nkitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai enye, kake eibung'a ilo kerreti apa oiteng'en Isiraeli ninche." 
2Kings17:20 Neany Olaitoriani eishoi e Israel pooki, nepik ninche osina, nepik ninche atua nkaik oo lainyalak, ometaba anaa nenang'aa ninche aiwuang'ie te dukuya enye." 
2Kings17:21 Ore ake pee eidip aiwuang'ie Isiraeli te nkaji e Daudi, neitaa ninche Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat olaiguanani. Nerikoo Yeroboam Isiraeli aitapaash esujata o Laitoriani, nerikoki ninche metaasa eng'oki sapuk." 
2Kings17:22 Eturubare iltung'ana le Israel nena ng'ok pooki apa naataasa Yeroboam. Eitu ninche epaash nena ng'ok," 
2Kings17:23 ometaba anaa neiwuang'ie Olaitoriani Isiraeli too nkonyek enyena, anaa apa enairoro aimunye isinkan lenyena lelo oibonok le Nkai. Neaku eshomo Isiraeli eararoto, neing'uaa enkop enye maate nepuo Asiria, netoni teine ometabaiki ena olong." 
2Kings17:24 Neyau olaiguanani le Asiria iltung'ana ooing'uaa Babilon, Kuta, o Afa, o Hamat, o Shefafaim, nepik ninche nkanas e Samaria, terishata oo ltung'ana le Israel. Neya ninche Samaria nebik too nkanas enyena." 
2Kings17:25 Ore te nkiterunoto e manyisho enye teine, neitu ninche eureyu Olaitoriani ore enkaraki ina neirriwaki Olaitoriani ilng'atunyo atua ninche, neinos lelo ng'atunyo kulikae lenye." 
2Kings17:26 Nelikini olaiguanani le Asiria aajoki, “Ore lelo oshon apa liwa te araroto nilo apik nkanas e Asiria, meyiolo ninche nkitanapat e Nkai eina kop. Ore enkaraki ina eirriwayie ninye ilng'atunyo atua ninche, naa ng'ura, earita ninche iltung'ana metuata. Amu meyiolo ninche nkitanapata e Nkai eina kop.”" 
2Kings17:27 Neitoki olaiguanani le Asiria aitanapisho ajo, “Erriwai ine obo loo lapolosak apa litaaraitie ninchosho ninye meshomo abik teine; pee eiteng'enisho nkitanapat e Nkai eina kop.”" 
2Kings17:28 Neaku eewuo obo le lelo apolosak apa ootaarayioki te Samaria nelotu abik te Betel, neiteng'en ninche eneiko teneureyu Olaitoriani." 
2Kings17:29 Kake meetae apa olosho lemeitobir nkaitin enye maate, nepik ninche nkajijik oo wuejitin neeika apa naaitobira ltung'ana le Samaria, nepik ake olosho nena anas apa naabikie ninche." 
2Kings17:30 Ore iltung'ana le Babilon neitobir Sukot-be-not. Ore iltung'ana le Kut, neitobir Nergal, ore iltung'ana le Hamat, neitobir Ashima." 
2Kings17:31 Ore iltung'ana le Efrit neitayu Nibas o Tarka; ore iltung'ana le Sefafit nenukaa nkera enye tenkaraki Adramalek o Anamelek nena aitin e Shefafaim. 
2Kings17:32 Etureita sii apa ninche Olaitoriani, negelaki ate mpukunot pooki oo ltung'ana aaitaa ilapolosak loo wuejitin neeika, pee eitayu ilasarri too wuejitin neeika." 
2Kings17:33 Neaku etureita ninche Olaitoriani kake eisiaayia sii nkaitin enye maate, aasujaa orrekie le lelo oshon apa oo tarayioki aaya eararoto tenebo ninche." 
2Kings17:34 Ore ebaiki ena olong neas ninche ilo rrekie apake. Meure ninche Olaitoriani, nemerubare ninche nkikoot anaa nkiguanat, anaa nkitanapat apa naaitanapa Olaitoriani nkera e Yakobo laa ninye apa etejoki Israel." 
2Kings17:35 Eitobira apa Olaitoriani olning'o lo sotua o ninche, neitanap ninche ajoki, “Miureyuyu intae kulie aitin, nimirrugokinono ninche anaa isiaayiayia ninche, anaa ipolosakiki ninche." 
2Kings17:36 Kake Olaitoriani entureita laa ninye apa oyawua intae aitupuku te nkop e Misiri, te ngolon kitok, o te nkaina naitoriori. Ninye errugokinoto, naa ninye entopolosaki." 
2Kings17:37 Ore nena kikoot o nkiguenat, oina kitanapata apa naigeroki intae, entaas entobiraki. Miureyuyu intae kulie aitin." 
2Kings17:38 Niminchosho erikino intae osotua lai apa laitobiraka intae. Miureyuyu intae kulie aitin. 
2Kings17:39 Kake entureita Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, naa kekordu ninye intae aitupuku too nkaik oo lmang'ati linyi.”" 
2Kings17:40 Ore ake eyia, mening'isho ninche, kake etaasa ninche te risioroto olkerreti lenye liopa." 
2Kings17:41 Neaku eteserema apa kulo oshon neisiaai sii nkaitin oo nkitanyaanyukot naaguetuno, neijia sii eikununo nkera enye, o nkera oo nkera enye. Ore apa enataasa loo menye, neas sii ninche ina ometabaiki ena olong." 
2Kings18:1 Ore to lari liokuni le nkitoria e Hoshea olayioni le Ela, ilo aiguanani le Israel, neiteru Hesekia olayioni le Ahas ilo aiguanani le Yuda aitoreisho." 
2Kings18:2 Oloo larin tikitam o imiet apa ninye pee eiteru aitoreisho. Neitoreisho ninye ilarin tikitam ooudo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Abi entito e Sekaria. 
2Kings18:3 Neas ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani, te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa Daudi papaai lenye." 
2Kings18:4 Eiwuang'ie ninye iwuejitin neeika, neuroo ing'apeta, nedung Asherim. Nebel aitaa mbelibelat ilo asurai apa lo suyai oitobira Musa, amu ore ebaiki nena olong'i kepejoo apa iltung'ana le Israel enkorropil teine. Keji apa ine Nehushatan." 
2Kings18:5 Eisiliga apa ninye Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli; neaku meetae oltung'ani oikununo anaa ninye too laiguanak pooki le Yuda te siadi ninye, anaa te lelo apa ootii te dukuya ninye." 
2Kings18:6 Eiruko apa ninye Olaitoriani, eitu epaash esujata enye, kake eibung'a nena kitanapat apa naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa." 
2Kings18:7 Netii apa Olaitoriani tenebo ninye, ore pooki wueji neshomo, ninye nedupoyu. Etapong'ori ninye olaiguanani le Asiria neany eisiaai ninye." 
2Kings18:8 Etaara apa ninye Ilfilisti ebaiki Gasa o metabaiki ilpolosien lenyena, o ebaiki oltalet ometabaiki enkanasa nasheta isunta." 
2Kings18:9 Ore to lari liong'uan le nkitoria e Hesekia, laa ninye olari liopishana le nkitoria e Hosea olayioni le Ela, ilo aiguanani le Israel nelotu Shalamanesa olaiguanani le Asiria agilunore Samaria neman ninye ang'adu." 
2Kings18:9 Ore to lari liong'uan le nkitoria e Hesekia, laa ninye olari liopishana le nkitoria e Hosea olayioni le Ela, ilo aiguanani le Israel nelotu Shalamanesa olaiguanani le Asiria agilunore Samaria neman ninye ang'adu." 
2Kings18:10 Ore te nkiting'oto oo larin okuni neya ninye. Ore to lari le ile le nkitoria e Hesekia laa ninye olioudo le nkitoria e Hoshea, olaiguanani le Israel, neyai Samaria." 
2Kings18:11 Eewa apa olaiguanani le Asiria Isiraeli eararoto te Asiria, nelo apik ninche atua Hala, nepik embata olkeju le Gosam, o atua nkanas oo Lmedi," 
2Kings18:12 enkaraki neitu ninche ening oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai enye, kake etogolong'akita ilo sotua, o nena sii pooki apa naaitanapishe Musa osinka lo Laitoriani, neitu ening anaa eibung." 
2Kings18:13 Ore to lari le tomon oo ong'uan le nkitoria o laiguanani Hesekia, nelotu Senakerib olaiguanani le Asiria agilunore nkanas pooki naasheta isunta e Yuda, neya ninche." 
2Kings18:14 Neirriwaki Hesekia olaiguanani le Yuda olkilikuai olaiguanani le Asiria te Lakish, ejo, “Ataasa nanu entorroni; tapalaki nanu, naa ore pooki toki nikintelekiki nanu naa kanap.” Ore apa entoki nayieu olaiguanani le Asiria to laiguanani le Yuda naa talanta iip uni e nkosholai, o talanta tomoni uni e sahabu." 
2Kings18:15 Neisho Hesekia ninye enkosholai pooki apa nanotoki tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, o tiatua ilchumat le nkaji o laiguanani." 
2Kings18:16 Ore apa teina kata nekinyu Hesekia sahabu pooki too nkutukie oo nkajijik e nkaji o Laitoriani, o ntaloishin oo nkutukie oo nkajijik apa naatumura Hesekia olaiguanani le Yuda, neisho olaiguanani le Asiria." 
2Kings18:17 Neirriwaa olaiguanani le Asiria Tatan le Rabsari, o Rabshake eeta enjore kitok, naing'uaa Lakish pee erasaki Hesekia te Yerusalem. Ore ake pee ebau nepuonu aaitashe tembata olchorro le shumata, otii enkoitoi oo laitobirak loo nkilani." 
2Kings18:18 Ore ake pee eipotu olaiguanani neipang'aki ninche Eliakim olayioni le Hilkia, laa ninye apa oitasheiki enkaji e nkitoo, o Shebna laa ninye apa olasirani, o Yoa olayioni le Asaf ilo aigeroni." 
2Kings18:19 Nejoki Rabshake ninche, “Entiaaki Hesekia, Nji ejo olaiguanani kitok, ilo aiguanani le Asiria: Kainyoo iyie ingarakino?" 
2Kings18:20 Eijo doi kiaku irorei ake engolon to larrabal? Kaing'ae taata iyie ingarakino, peyie kitogolong'aka nanu?" 
2Kings18:21 Ng'ura ajo Misiri iyie ingarakino, ilo peresi otigile, orem enkaina e pooki tung'ana ooingarakino. Neijia etiu Farao olaiguanani le Misiri te pooki tung'ani oigarakino ninye.”" 
2Kings18:22 Kake tenikijoki iyie nanu, “Olaitoriani Enkai ang kingarakino iyiook aime ilo eiwuang'ie Hesekia iwuejitin enyena neeika, ejoki Yuda, o Yerusalem, Te dukuya ele perere lo lasar intae enteseremisho te Yerusalem?" 
2Kings18:23 Wootu taata matoning'oto o lkitok lai olaiguanani le Asiria: Kaaisho nanu iyie mbartan iip are; tenindim iyie te nkalo ino atipika ilakedok shumata ninche. 
2Kings18:24 Kaji naa iyie inko tenintasheikinore obo ninye le lelo aisiaayiak ooti lo lkitok lai aa Misiri ingarakino too ngarrin oo mbartan o too mbartan? 
2Kings18:25 Amaa ake sii, aijo ke nkaraki nemetii Olaitoriani pee aewuo nanu agilunore ena kop naidaikie ninye? Aatiaaka nanu Olaitoriani, shomo tigilunore ene wueji, nindaikie.”" 
2Kings18:26 Neitoki Eliakim olayioni le Hilkia, o Shebna o Yoa, aajoki Rabshake, “Kitoomono iyie, irorei isinkan linono te nkutuk e Aramea, amu ninye kiyiolo. Mintoki airorie iyiook te nkutuk e Yuda metoning'o iltung'ana ootii esuntai.”" 
2Kings18:27 Kake etiaaka Rebshake ninche, “Aatiaaka olkitok lai pee aliki kulo rorei olkitok linyi, o ntae, neme lelo tung'ana ootii esuntai, ootaa ore tenebo intae, keinos nkik enye maate neok nkulak enye?”" 
2Kings18:28 Neitoki Rabshake aitashe nebuaku to ltoilo sapuk, te nkutuk e Yuda, ajo, “Entoning irorei lo laiguanani kitok, olaiguanani le Asiria!" 
2Kings18:29 Nji ejo olaiguanani: ‘Emincho Hesekia meteleja intae, amu meidim ninye aitajeu intae te nkaina ai." 
2Kings18:30 Emincho Hesekia ejoki intae eji pee ingarakinono Olaitoriani ejo, Ekesipa kekordu iyiook Olaitoriani, nemeishoori ena anasa aapik nkaik o laiguanani le Asiria.’"
