2Kings18:31 Emining intae Hesekia, amu nji ejo olaiguanani le Asiria; ‘Ntobira olning'o o nanu, nilotu enatii; ore pooki ng'ae te intae, neinos enkurma enye oo sabibu, neinos pooki ng'ae ilng'anayio lo lng'aboli lenye; neok pooki ng'ae enkare olchorro lenye;" 
2Kings18:32 ometaba anaa narik entae enkop naikununo anaa enkop inyi, enkop e ntapa o enaisho oo sabibu, enkop oo mukateni o nkurman oo sabibu. Enkop oo loirienito o enaisho, pee ipuopuo aapok, nimiyeye.’ Nimining'ining'i Hesekia teneitapong'oo intae, ejo, ‘kekordu iyiook Olaitoriani.’" 
2Kings18:33 Keetae aekata enkai oo loreren naitajeuo enkop enye te nkaina o laiguanani le Asiria? 
2Kings18:34 Koree nkaitin e Hamat o Arpad? Koree nkaitin e Sefarfaim, Hena o Ifaa? Ketokordutua ninche Samaria aaitupuku tiae aina hoo nabo?" 
2Kings18:35 Kaa tiatua nkaitin oo nkuapi, natokordua nkuapi enye aitupuku te nkaina ai, eji metaa kekordu Olaitoriani Yerusalem aitupuku te nkaina ai? ”" 
2Kings18:36 Kake etigirate iltung'ana neitu ewaliki ninye olomoni hoo obo; amu ore apa enkitanapata o laiguanani naa, “Kejo emiwaliki ninye.”" 
2Kings18:37 Ore Eliakim olayioni le Hilkia laa ninye apa oitasheiki enkaji e nkitoo, o Shebna, ilo aigeroko, o Yoa olayioni le Asaf ilo asirani, nepuonu enetii Hesekia etopolosa nkilani enye, neliki ninche ninye lelo rorei le Rabshake." 
2Kings19:1 Ore ake pee ening Hesekia ina, nepolos nkilani enyena neimulumul kewan too lkuniyiani nelo atua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings19:2 Neirriwaa ninye Eliakim, laa ninye apa oitasheiki enkaji e nkitoo, o Shebna ilo aigeroni, o lapolosak kituaak ooimulumula ate too kuniyiani, neirriwaki ninche Isaya olayioni le Amos." 
2Kings19:2 Neirriwaa ninye Eliakim, laa ninye apa oitasheiki enkaji e nkitoo, o Shebna ilo aigeroni, o lapolosak kituaak ooimulumula ate too kuniyiani, neirriwaki ninche Isaya olayioni le Amos." 
2Kings19:3 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Nji ejo Hesekia, Ore ena olong naa enkolong o sina, enkolong e nkisikong'ata naa enkolong e sulare, etoiwuoki nkera nemeeta ninche engolon nabulunye." 
2Kings19:4 Ebaiki netoning'o Olaitoriani Enkai ino lelo rorei pooki le Rabshake, laa ninye eirriwua olkitok lenye ilo aiguanani le Asiria meeu amor Enkai naishu. Keisikong Enkai ninye tenkaraki lelo rorei ootoning'o. Ore naa taata ilepie enkomono tenkaraki ilo pisiai otelekua.”" 
2Kings19:5 Ore ake pee epuonu isinkan lo laiguanani Hesekia enetii Isaya," 
2Kings19:6 nejoki Isaya ninche, “Entiaaki olkitok linyi, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Miureishoyu tenkaraki lelo rorei litoning'o, laa ninche aatusukenyie nanu isinkan leilo aiguanani le Asiria." 
2Kings19:7 Ng'ura kapik nanu ninye oltau lo lkirutoto oitoning olkukui, nerrinyo alo enkop enye makewan, naisho nanu metabatatayu to lalem tiatua enkop enye makewan.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Nerrinyo Rabshake neinepu olaiguanani le Asiria earare Libna; amu etoning'o ninye nchere etung'uayie olaiguanani Lakish. 
2Kings19:9 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani nchere etudumunye Tihaka olaiguanani le Etiopia, alotu aarare ninche, neirriwaki ilkiliku arewaki Hesekia ejo," 
2Kings19:10 “Nji enchom entiaki Hesekia, olaiguanani le Yuda, ‘Mincho kilej ina Ai nisiligita tenikisiligie ninye iyie nchere meyae Yerusalem aapik nkaik o laiguanani le Asiria." 
2Kings19:11 Ng'ura itoning'o iyie enaitaasa ilaiguanak le Asiria nkuapi pooki, eidaike ninche katukul. Paa ijo iyie eikikorduni?" 
2Kings19:12 Amaa nena aitin oo loreren ketokordutua ninche, lelo oshon apa ooidaikie loo papa, Gosan, o Haran, o Resef o ltung'ana le Eden apa ootii Telasa?" 
2Kings19:13 Koree olaiguanani le Hamat, o laiguanani le Arpad, o laiguanani le nkanasa e Sefarfaim o laiguanani le Hena, anaa olaiguanani le Ifaa?’ ”" 
2Kings19:14 Neng'amaa Hesekia ina palai too nkaik e lelo kiliku, neisuma; neilep Hesekia alo enkaji o Laitoriani, neisalaash ina palai te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
2Kings19:15 Neomon Hesekia te dukuya Olaitoriani, nejo, “Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, iton iyie to lorika le nkitoo te shumata ilkerubi. Ira iyie Enkai, naa iyie ake Enkai, tiatua nkitoriat pooki e nkop. Iyie oitobira keper o enkop." 
2Kings19:16 Irrugu enkiok ino Olaitoriani toning'o, tabolo nkonyek inono, Olaitoriani toduaa, nining kulo rorei le Senakerib, ooirriwua ninye pee elotu amor Enkai naishu." 
2Kings19:17 Esipata, Olaitoriani, nchere eitomijoono ilaiguanak le Asiria iloreren o nkuapi enye," 
2Kings19:18 nenang'aki nkaitin enye atua enkima; amu mme nkaitin apa ninche, kake esiaai oo nkaik e tung'ani oo nkeek o soito. Ore enkaraki ina eidaikieki ninche." 
2Kings19:19 Ore naa taata Olaitoriani Enkai ang, ntajeu iyiook, aatasayia, ntung'uai iyiook enkaina enye, pee etum nkitoriat pooki e nkop aatayiolo nchere, iyie Olaitoriani, iyie ake Enkai.”" 
2Kings19:20 Neitoki Isaya olayioni le Amos airriwaki Hesekia olkilikuai ejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli: ore ina omono nikitoomono te nkaraki Senakerib olaiguanani le Asiria, atoning'o nanu." 
2Kings19:20 Neitoki Isaya olayioni le Amos airriwaki Hesekia olkilikuai ejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli: ore ina omono nikitoomono te nkaraki Senakerib olaiguanani le Asiria, atoning'o nanu." 
2Kings19:21 Ele rorei eiroro Olaitoriani oipirta ninye: Kitemenayie ninye iyie, kitusurdaanya ninye iyie na tito e Sion; eipirripir endukuya enye te siadi iyie; na tito e Yerusalem." 
2Kings19:22 Kaing'ae doi ilo litamoro nisurdaany? Kaing'ae ilo lidumaki oltoilo lino, nishumaki nkonyek inono to lwuasa? Ilo osinya le Israel!”" 
2Kings19:23 Ore te lelo kiliku linono nitamoro Olaitoriani, nitejo iyie, “Ore te nkumoi oo ngarrin aainei oo mbartan, ailepa nanu alo nchumat oo ldoinyo, o mashomo atua Lebanon, atuuroyie nanu iltarakua lenyena adoru aaisul, o lelo keek lenyena gelunot; atijing'a nanu atua nalo atua ina tim enye nagol." 
2Kings19:24 Atuturuo ilchorroi naok nkariak enkop eeiking'a, naaituny nanu too nkejek aainei nchorroi pooki neelepo e Misiri.”" 
2Kings19:25 “Keitu aekata iyie ining ajo aitobira apa ina te musano? Aitobira apa nanu moitie ena taata nalo aitabaya, nchere ore nkanas naasheta isunta naa ilo aitaa osototi loo suut." 
2Kings19:26 Meeta apa lelo oomanya engolon, neiputukunyo neidang, etotiutuo ninche anaa nkaitubulu e ong'ota, o anaa nkujit naanana, etotiutuo anaa nkujit naabulu too nchumat oo nkajijik, te nekut olkutati eton eitu ebulu.”" 
2Kings19:27 “Kake ayiolo nanu oltonei lino, o enkipang'ata ino o enjing'unoto ino, oina nikigilunore iyie nanu." 
2Kings19:28 Ore enkaraki nikitigilunore iyie nanu, netabaikia enkitokoos ino nkiyiaa aainei, kapik nanu olalae lai oololo enkume ino, napik olgisoi lai enkutuk ino, naarriny nanu iyie aing'orie ina oitoi niimua.”" 
2Kings19:29 Naa ena nalo aaku olmonekie te intae: ore tele ari, ninosinoso intae nena naabulu oopeny, ore to lari liare ninosinoso nena ake ore to lari liokuni, niunuunu nisampumpu, niunuunu isabibu, ninosinoso ilng'anayio lenye." 
2Kings19:30 Ore ilo pisiai oleku le nkaji e Yuda neitoki aibung ntona, neiu ilng'anayio." 
2Kings19:31 Amu te Yerusalem epuku ilo pisiai, naa to ldoinyo le Sion epuku olturrur le lelo ooleku. Olom lo Laitoriani olo aas ena." 
2Kings19:32 “Ore enkaraki ina nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo olaiguanani le Asiria, melotu ninye ajing'u atua ena anasa, anaa engoroo embae teine, anaa elotu ataanikini ninye eeta elong'o, anaa elotu aman ang'adu." 
2Kings19:33 Ore ina oitoi apa naimua ninye, ina ake eitoki aim arrinyo, nemelotu ninye ena anasa, Olaitoriani ojo." 
2Kings19:34 Amu kamitu nanu ena anasa aitajeu tenkaraki kewan ai o tenkaraki o sinka lai Daudi.” 
2Kings19:35 Ore ina kewarie nelo olmalaika lo Laitoriani aar metuata iltung'ana nkalifuni iip nabo o ntomoni isiet o imiet too lng'oborri le Asiria: ore ake pee einyototo iltung'ana tadekenya, ng'ura etuata kulo pooki." 
2Kings19:36 Nedumunye taa Senakerib olaiguanani le Asiria alo ang, nelo abik te Ninawi." 
2Kings19:37 Ore eseremisho ninye tiatua enkaji e Nisrok, ina ai enye, near Adramelek o Sheresa, lelo ayiok lenyena ninye to lalem, neisik aapuo enkop e Ararat. Neitoreisho Esarhadon olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings20:1 Ore apa te nena olong'i, etamuoyia Hesekia ometaa kejo pee eye. Nelotu Isaya, ilo oiboni le Nkai enetii ninye, nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Ntobira mbaa olmarei lino, amu iye iyie, minchiu iyie.’ ”" 
2Kings20:2 Neibelekenya Hesekia aing'orie enkomom enye esuntai neomon Olaitoriani ejo," 
2Kings20:3 “Tadamu taata Olaitoriani, aatasayia iyie, ina nashomo nanu te dukuya iyie too sipat, o to ltau pooki, nataasa nanu mbaa sidain too nkonyek inono.” Neishir Hesekia te mion." 
2Kings20:4 Ore eton eitu elo Isaya aipang to lgoriet le polos, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii nejoki," 
2Kings20:5 “Torrinyoyu, nilo ajoki Hesekia, ilo kitok loo ltung'ana laainei, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Daudi papaai lino: Atoning'o nanu enkomono ino. Atoduaa nanu ilkiyio linono; ng'ura kaaishiunye nanu iyie; ore te nkolong e uni, naa ilep iyie alo enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings20:6 Naa kaponaa nanu ilarin tomon o imiet te nkishui ino. Kaakordu nanu iyie o ena anasa aitayu te nkaina o laiguanani le Asiria, naa kamitu nanu ena anasa te nkaraki kewan ai, o tenkaraki o sinka lai Daudi.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Nejo Isaya, “Iyau emukate oo lng'abolo, naa o nchoo epuo ninche aaiteleiki oltudutai, pee etum ninye aishiu.”" 
2Kings20:8 Nejoki Hesekia Isaya, “Kainyoo enkitodolunoto nchere kaaishiunye nanu Olaitoriani, naa kayooki nanu alo enkaji o Laitoriani te nkolong e uni?”" 
2Kings20:9 Nejoki Isaya ninye, “Ele olmonekie te iyie oing'uaa Olaitoriani, nchere keas Olaitoriani ina toki naisiligishore ninye. Kelo oloip dukuya iroruat tomon anaa errinyo siadi iroruat tomon?”" 
2Kings20:10 Newalu Hesekia ajo, “Kelelek pee eadoru oloip alo iroruat tomon alang tenerrinyo siadi iroruat tomon.”" 
2Kings20:11 Neishiraki Isaya ilo oiboni le Nkai Olaitoriani, nerrinyunye oloip siadi iroruat tomon, nerrinyo enkolong aipirakinore enkoitoi o sagam le Ahas." 
2Kings20:12 Ore apa teina kata, neirriwaa Merodak-baladan olayioni le Bat-adam, ilo aiguanani le Babilon ilkiliku ooyautua mpala o enkishoroto enetii Hesekia, amu etoning'o apa ninye ajo etamuoyia Hesekia." 
2Kings20:13 Neitoomon Hesekia ninche, neitodol ninche ilchumat pooki le nkaji enye, ina osholai, o sahabu o enkorropil, o eilata nagol enkinyiang'a o ewueji enye oo masaa o larrabal, o nena pooki apa naatii nkajijik enyena naashumishoreki. Meetae apa entoki natii atua enkaji enye, anaa pooki toki e nkitoria enye neitu eitodol Hesekia ninche." 
2Kings20:14 Neitoki Isaya ilo oiboni le Nkai alotu enetii olaiguanani Hesekia nejoki ninye, “Kaa etejo kulo tung'ana? Naa kanu eetuo ninche enitii?” Nejo Hesekia, “Enkop nalakua eing'uaa ninche, Babilon eing'uaa ninche.”" 
2Kings20:15 Neitoki ninye ajoki olaiguanani, “Kainyoo ninche etoduaa te nkaji ino?” Newalu Hesekia ajo, “Etoduaa ninche nena pooki naatii atua enkaji ai. Meetae entoki tiatua nena ajijik aainei naashumishoreki neitu nanu aitodol ninche.”" 
2Kings20:16 Neitoki Isaya ajoki Hesekia, “Toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani:" 
2Kings20:17 Ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, ore nena pooki naatii atua enkaji ino, o nena apa naatushuma loo papaai lino o metabaiki ena olong, naa kenapi aaya Babilon; meing'uari toki, Olaitoriani ojo." 
2Kings20:18 Ore embata oo layiok linono makewan likitoikioki iyie, neyai sii ninche naa kepuo aaku isunaishi oogelema tiatua enkaji o laiguanani le Babilon.”" 
2Kings20:19 Neitoki Hesekia ajoki Isaya, “Ore ilo rorei lo Laitoriani liroro naa aisidai. Neijia etiu, eetae eseriani o enkitirring'a too nkolong'i aainei.”" 
2Kings20:20 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Hesekia o enkidimata enye pooki, o ilo shorro oitobira ninye, o ewueji neimieki enkare, neyau enkare atua enkanasa, neigeroki pooki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings20:21 Neirura Hesekia etua anaa apa loo menye; neitoreisho Manase olayioni lenye te rishata enye. 
2Kings21:1 Oloo larin tomon oare apa Manase pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin onom o imiet te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Hefasiba." 
2Kings21:2 Etaasa apa ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, te risioroto eilo minong apa oasita lelo oreren ootaarayie Olaitoriani te dukuya iloshon loo Siraeli." 
2Kings21:3 Amu enyaaka apa ninye ashet iwuejitin neeika apa naaidaikie papaai lenye Hesekia, neshetaki Baal ilpereren loo lasarri, neitobir ashera, anaa apa enataasa Ahab olaiguanani le Israel. Neserem ninye olorora pooki le keper neisiaai ninche." 
2Kings21:4 Neshetu ninye ilpereren loo lasarri tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, laa ninche apa etejo Olaitoriani, “Atua Yerusalem nanu alo apik enkarna ai.”" 
2Kings21:5 Neshetu ninye ilpereren loo lasarri ashetaki olorora pooki le keper, too lgorieti pokira oare le nkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings21:6 Nepejoo olayioni lenye anaa olasar, neas ninye mbaa e naibon o easata oo mbaa e nking'asia. Neasishore ninye ilaitumusumusok o lasakutok. Etaasa ninye mbaa kumok torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neitagor ninye." 
2Kings21:7 Ore ina kitanyaanyukoto e Ashera apa naitobira ninye nepik ninye atua ina aji natiaaka Olaitoriani Daudi, o Solomon olayioni lenye, “Atua ena aji o atua Yerusalem naa ninche nanu ategelua too loshon pooki loo Siraeli, nchere kapik nanu enkarna ai ntarasi." 
2Kings21:8 Nemaitoki nanu aisho nkejek oo ltung'ana laainei loo Siraeli menyaaki aalimana, aapuku teina kop apa naishoo loo menye. Oi ake duoo ninche easisho te risioroto e nena pooki naitanapa ninche, o te risioroto eina kitanapata pooki naitanapa osinka lai Musa ninche.”" 
2Kings21:9 Kake eitu ninche ening'isho nelejaki Manase ninche metaasa ntorrok aaitulus te lelo oreren apa ooidaikie Olaitoriani te dukuya iltung'ana loo Siraeli. 
2Kings21:10 Nejo Olaitoriani eimunye lelo sinkan lenyena, lelo oibonok le Nkai," 
2Kings21:11 “Ore enkaraki nataasa Manase, olaiguanani le Yuda, ele minong, netaasa mbaa torrok aitulus nena oo Lamori, apa laa ninche ootii te dukuya ninye, nerikoki Yuda metaasa eng'oki te nena kitanyaanyukot enyena;" 
2Kings21:12 ore naa enkaraki ina, nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ng'ura, kayau nanu shumata Yerusalem o Yuda, entorroni naikununo neijia naa ore ake nkiyiaa pooki naaning neng'eyu." 
2Kings21:13 Naa kalo nanu aitorioo te shumata Yerusalem olkereri le ntemat le Samaria, o latemani lo nkitorioroto le nkaji e Ahab, naa kajut nanu Yerusalem anaa enajut oltung'ani engirra najutu ninche aiwuang'ie naibelekenyu atua aing'orie oriong," 
2Kings21:14 naa kaiturraa nanu ilo pisiai le njung'ore ai, naishooyo nanu apik ninche atua nkaik oo lmang'ati lenye, neaku ninche eararoto too lmang'ati lenye pooki." 
2Kings21:15 Enkaraki nataasa ninche mbaa torrok too nkonyek aainei naaitagoro ninche nanu, ebaiki ina olong apa naitupukutuo loo menye te Misiri o metabaiki ena olong.”" 
2Kings21:16 Ore ake sii eibukoyie Manase osarge sapuk oleng lemeeta entioto, omeiputa Yerusalem ebaiki enchoto nabo ometabaiki enkae shoto. Eeta ake sii eng'oki eina apa natorikoko Yuda metaasa ing'ok, neaku etaasa mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani." 
2Kings21:17 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Manase, o nena pooki naataasa, o ina ng'oki nataasa, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings21:18 Neirura Manase etua tenebo apa loo menye, nenukari ninye te nkurma natii embata e nkaji enye. Tiatua e nkurma e Usa; neitoreisho Amon olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings21:19 Oloo larin tikitam o are apa Amon pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin oare te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Meshulemet entito e Harus le Yotba." 
2Kings21:20 Etaasa apa ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek O laitoriani, anaa enataasa papaai lenye Manase." 
2Kings21:21 Eibung'a ninye orrekie le papaai lenye, neisiaai nena kitanyaanyukot apa naaisiaayia papaai lenye, neserem ninche." 
2Kings21:22 Etung'uayie ninye Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye, neitu ninye eibung enkoitoi o Laitoriani." 
2Kings21:23 Nerresh isinkan le Amon ninye, near ilo aiguanani metua te nkaji enye." 
2Kings21:24 Kake etaara apa iltung'ana leina kop lelo tung'ana pooki metuata apa ootarresho olaiguanani Amon, neitaa lelo tung'ana leina kop Yosia ilo ayioni lenye olaiguanani le rishata enye." 
2Kings21:25 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin pooki e Amon apa naataasa, neigeroki tiatua mbukui oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings21:26 Nenukari ninye te nkurare enye tiatua enkurma e Usa; neitoreisho Yosia olayioni lenye te rishata enye. 
2Kings22:1 Oloo larin isiet apa Yosia pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomoni uni oobo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Yedida entito e Adaia le Boskat." 
2Kings22:2 Etaasa apa ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neibung orrekie le Daudi papaai lenye, neitu ninye eibelekenya alo enkaina e tatene anaa enkalo e kedienye." 
2Kings22:3 Ore to lari le tomon o isiet le nkitoria o laiguanani Yosia, neirriwaa olaiguanani Shafan olayioni le Asalia, olayioni le Meshulam, laa ninye olaigeroni le nkaji o Laitoriani, ejo," 
2Kings22:4 “Ilepa shomo enetii Hilkia ilo apolosani kitok, pee etum aigero esiana oo mpisai naayauaki enkaji o Laitoriani, nena naatang'amutua lelo arripok le kishomi too ltung'ana;" 
2Kings22:5 naa nchoo eishori lelo aitasheikinok loo laisiaayiak le nkaji o Laitoriani. Nchoo ninche meishoo lelo aisiaayiak ootii enkaji o Laitoriani, aaram ina aji." 
2Kings22:6 Aa taa ilaguetak loo mbaoi, o lashetak, o lashetak loo soito, neinyiang'unyieki mbaoi neturuni soito pee eitobirieki aaram ina aji." 
2Kings22:7 Kake meikeni nena pisai tialo ninche amu keasisho ninche te nkoitoi naisiligayu. 
2Kings22:8 Nejoki Hilkia ilo apolosani kitok Shefat olaigeroni, Anoto nanu embuku oo nkitanapat tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani.” Neisho Hilkia ina buku Shafan, neisum ninye." 
2Kings22:9 Nelotu Shafan ilo aigeroni enetii olaiguanani, neliki olaiguanani ajoki, “Eitayutuo isinkan linono nena pisai naanotoki tiatua enkaji, newaita ninche aapik nkaik e lelo aisiaayiak ooitasheiki enkaji o Laitoriani.”" 
2Kings22:10 Neitoki Shafan ilo aigeroni ajoki olaiguanani, “Aaishoo nanu Hilkia olapolosani embuku.” Neisum Shafan ina buku te dukuya olaiguanani." 
2Kings22:11 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani irorei leina buku oo nkitanapat, nepolos nkilani enyena." 
2Kings22:12 Neitanap olaiguanani Hilkia ilo apolosani, o Ahikam olayioni le Shafan o Akobor olayioni le Mikaia, o Shafan olaigeroni, o Asaiya osinka lo laiguanani ejo," 
2Kings22:13 “Enchom enkilikuanishore Olaitoriani te nkaraki nanu, o te nkaraki olorere, o te nkaraki Yuda pooki, tialo rorei ootii ena buku nanotoki, amu aikitok engoro o Laitoriani nayupuyupo te nkaraki iyiook, enkaraki neitu eibung iloo papa irorei lena buku, pee eas nena pooki naaigeroki, naaipirta iyiook.”" 
2Kings22:14 Nelo Hilkia ilo apolosani o Ahikam, o Akobor, o Shafan, o Asaya enetii Hulda ina oiboni. Ore apa ina oiboni naa enkitok e Shulam olayioni le Tikfa, olayioni le Harhas. Olaing'urani apa lo sanduku loo nkilani ilo payian le Huda, (naa Yerusalem apa namanya ninche), ina manyisho e are ina kata pee eirorie ninche." 
2Kings22:15 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli: ‘Tiaki ilo tung'ani likirriwua enatii," 
2Kings22:16 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Ng'ura kayau nanu entorroni shumata ene wueji, o shumata lelo oomanya, lelo rorei pooki leina buku ooisuma olaiguanani le Yuda." 
2Kings22:17 Enkaraki naatung'uaitie ninche nanu, netapejo ninche enkorropil te nkaraki nkulie aitin, pee aatum ninche aaitagoro teina siaai pooki oo nkaik enye. Ore enkaraki ina keyupuyup engoro ai tenkaraki ene wueji, nemeyagaa." 
2Kings22:18 Kake ore te nkaraki olaiguanani le Yuda, laa ninye likirriwua pee inkilikuanishore Olaitoriani, nji iyie shomo tiaaki ninye, Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel: Ore tialo lelo rorei likitoning'o," 
2Kings22:19 ore enkaraki nairridua oltau lino, nintoborro kewan te dukuya Olaitoriani, ina kata pee ining ajo airoro inaaipirta ene wueji, o lelo oomanya, nchere keaku ninche olmuaate o ldeket, nitopolosa iye nkilani inono ninchir te dukuya nanu. Aatoning'o sii nanu iye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
2Kings22:20 Ore naa, ng'ura, kaaya nanu iyie aiturrurroki loo papaai lino apa oo tuata, nilo aiturrurro te nkurare ino te seriani, nemedol nkonyek inono ina torroni nayau nanu ene wueji.’ ” Neyaki ninche olaiguanani ilo rorei." 
2Kings23:1 Neitoki olaiguanani airriwaa olkilikuai, nepuonu ilpayiani pooki le Yuda o Yerusalem aaiturrurrokino." 
2Kings23:2 Neilep olaiguanani alo enkaji o Laitoriani, netii iltung'ana pooki le Yuda o lelo pooki oomanya Yerusalem, o lapolosak o loibonok le Nkai, o ltung'ana pooki, ilooti o lkituaak; neisum ninye ening'ito ninche irorei pooki leina buku o sotua apa nanotoki tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings23:3 Neitashe olaiguanani te mbata oo ng'apeta neitobir olning'o te dukuya Olaitoriani, pee esuj orrekie lo Laitoriani neibung nkitanapat enyena, o enchakenisho enye o nkikoot enyena, to ltau lenye pooki, o te nkishui enye pooki, pee eas irorei leilo ning'o lo sotua ooigero tena buku; neibung'are ltung'ana pooki tenebo ninye teilo ning'o lo sotua." 
2Kings23:4 Neitanap olaiguanani Hilkia ilo apolosani kitok, o lapolosak oosujaki te nkitoo, o laing'urak le kishomi, pee eipang'unyeki tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani nena masaa pooki apa naaitobirakaki Baal, o Ashera, o lorora pooki le keper. Nepejoo ninye ninche tiauluo Yerusalem too nkong'at e Kedron, nenap nkuruon enye aaya Betel." 
2Kings23:5 Neiwuang'ie ninye lelo apolosak apa ootuputo ilaiguanak le Yuda pee epej enkorropil too wuejitin neeika too nkanas e Yuda naamanita Yerusalem; o kulie sii oopejoki Baal enkorropil, aapejoki enkolong o lapa, o lakir, o lorora pooki le keper." 
2Kings23:6 Neipang'unye ninye ashera aitung'uaa enkaji o Laitoriani, neya auluo Yerusalem, neya oerata le Kedron, nelo apejoo to erata le Kedron, neidong aitaa empunyua neisuaki ina punyua nkuraren oo ltung'ana le setia." 
2Kings23:7 Negil ninye nkajijik oo lewa le nkisiaayiare e seremare e nkiborra oo nkonyek, apa naatii atua enkaji o Laitoriani. Ine apa eripunye nkituaak nkisiong'at e Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 Neyau lelo apolosak lenye pooki aitupuku too nkanas e Yuda, neisarkionie ninye wuejitin neeika apa naapejie ilapolosak enkorropil, ebaiki Geba o metabaiki Beer-sheba; neitoki ninye agil auroo nena wuejitin neeika oo nchomito apa naatii enejing'ieki kishomi e Yoshua ilo balusui le nkanasa, apa naatii enkalo e Kedienye teina kishomi e nkanasa." 
2Kings23:9 Ore ake eyia, eitu epuonu lelo apolosak loo wuejitin neeika aapuonu olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani te Yerusalem. Kake einosa ninche imukateni neitu eisuijieki tiatua ilalashera lenye." 
2Kings23:10 Neisarkionie ninye Tofet, ina natii oerata loo layiok le Hinom, pee meitoki atii hoo obo opejoo olayioni lenye anaa entito enye aitaa olasar oishori Molek." 
2Kings23:11 Neiwuang'ie ninye nena bartan naaitisinya ilaiguanak le Yuda te nkaraki eseremata enkolong, te nejing'ieki enkaji o laitoriani, te mbata e nkaji e Natan-Melek, laa ninye olkitok. Etapejoyie apa ninye nena garrin oo mbartan naaseremieki enkolong te nkima." 
2Kings23:12 Ore lelo pereren loo lasarri ootii enchumata enkaji e shumata e nkaji e Ahas, apa naaitobira ilaiguanak le Yuda, o lpereren apa ooitobira Manase too lgorieti pokira oare le nkaji o Laitoriani, nesulu ninche aitadou nebel aitaa mbelibelat, nenang'aki ina punyua enye atua oerata le Kedron." 
2Kings23:13 Neitoki olaiguanani aisarkionie iwuejitin neeika apa naatii enkalo oloo saen le Yerusalem, o metabaiki kopikop o ldoinyo le ntorroni, naateshetaka apa Solomon olaiguanani le Israeli Ashterot, ilo minong loo le Sidon, neitobiraki sii Kemosh ilo minong loo le Moab, o Milkoni ilo minong loo Lamoni." 
2Kings23:14 Negil ninye aitaa mbelibelat nena ng'apeta, neuroo asulaki enkop Asherim, neiput iwuejitin enye iloik loo ltung'ana." 
2Kings23:15 Ore ake sii ilo perere lo lasar apa otii Betel, ine wueji neika apa natesheta Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat, laa ninye otorikoko Isiraeli metaasa eng'oki, ore ilo perere lo lasar tenebo ewueji neika nesulu auroo nebel aitaa mbelibelat isoito lenyena, nerrar aitaa enterit; neitoki sii apejoo Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Ore ejo Yosia eibelekenya, nedol nkuraren teine to ldoinyo, neirriwaa olkilikuai meyauni iloik aaitupuku too nkuraren, nepejoo ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar, neisarkionie ninye, te risioroto eilo rorei lo Laitoriani apa otolimuo oltung'ani le Nkai, laa ninye apa otolimuo aibonu kuna baa." 
2Kings23:17 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Kainyoo idia kurare, nadolita nanu?” Nejoki iltung'ana leina anasa ninye, “Enkurare o ltung'ani le Nkai apa oing'uaa Yuda, nelotu aibonu kuna baa niyewuo iyie aas tialo olperere lo lasar te Betel.”" 
2Kings23:18 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Metotiwuo ninye neijia; nchoo eaku meiwuang'ieki iloik lenyena.” Neaku etapala ninche iloik lenyena teine, tenebo iloik leilo oiboni le Nkai oing'uaa Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Ore nena wuejitin apa oo lpereren naatii iwuejitin neeika too nkanas e Samaria, naaitobira ilaiguanak loo Siraeli, neitagor Olaitoriani, neiwuang'ie Yosia. Eitaasa ninye ninche anaa ina pooki nataasa te Betel." 
2Kings23:20 Near ninye metuata ilapolosak loo wuejitin neeika apa ootii ine, too nchumat oo lpereren loo lasarri, nepejoo iloik loo ltung'ana te shumata ninche. Nerrinyo ninye alo Yerusalem." 
2Kings23:21 Neitanap olaiguanani iltung'ana pooki ajoki, “Embung'a osirua le ngiroroto oji pasaka tenkaraki Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, anaa enaigeroki tiatua ena buku o sotua.”" 
2Kings23:22 Amu meetae aekata osirua le ngiroroto oji Pasaka onyaakaki aaibung ebaiki nkolong'i oo larishak apa oorish Isiraeli, anaa too nkolong'i oo laiguanak loo Siraeli, anaa iloo laiguanak le Yuda;" 
2Kings23:23 kake ore to lari le tomon o isiet le nkitoria o laiguanani Yosia, neibung'i ena pasaka te nkaraki Olaitoriani te Yerusalem." 
2Kings23:24 Enyaaka sii apa Yosia aiwuang'ie ilaitumusumusok o lasakutok, o nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin o ilo minong pooki otii ina kop e Yuda o Yerusalem, pee etumoki aitudupai irorei leina kitanapata ooigero tiatua ina buku apa nanoto Hilkia olapolosani tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Kings23:25 Ore apa te dukuya ninye nemetii olaiguanani oikununo anaa ninye, oibelekenyakine Olaitoriani, to ltau lenye pooki, o te nkishui enye pooki, o te nkidimata enye pooki, te risioroto e nkitanapata e Musa pooki, neitu eitokini aatum likae laaijo ninye te siadi ninye." 
2Kings23:26 Neton ake eitu eibelekenya Olaitoriani teina goro enye napi, naa te ninye apa eyupuyupo egoro o Laitoriani tialo Yuda te nkaraki nena pooki naaitagorie Manase ninye." 
2Kings23:27 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Kaiwuang'ie sii Yuda too nkonyek aainei, anaa apa enaiwuang'ie Israel, nanang'aa nanu ena anasa apa nategelua, Yerusalem oina aji apa natejo nanu ninye etii enkarna ai.”" 
2Kings23:28 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Yosia, o nena pooki naataasa ninye, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings23:29 Ore apa too nkolong'i enyena, nelo Farao Neko, olaiguanani le Misiri enetii olaiguanani le Asiria, to lkeju le Frati. Nelo olaiguanani Yosia atumore ninye, near Farao Neko ninye metua te Megido, ina kata pee edol ninye." 
2Kings23:30 Nenap isinkan lenyena ninye etua te ngarri oo mbartan te Megido neyau ninye Yerusalem, nenukaa ninye te nkurare enye makewan. Neyau iltung'ana leina kop Yehoahas, olayioni le Yosia, nebukoki ninye eilata aaput, neitaa ninye olaiguanani te rishata enye." 
2Kings23:31 Oloo larin tikitam apa ookuni Yehoahas pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilapaitin okuni te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Hamutal, entito e Yeremia olayioni le Libna." 
2Kings23:32 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa loo menye." 
2Kings23:33 Neen Farao Neko ninye te Ribla te nkop e Hamat, pee meitoki ninye aitoreisho te Yerusalem, nepik ninye ina kop kodi e talanta iip nabo e nkosholai o talanta nabo e sahabu." 
2Kings23:34 Neitaa Farao Neko Eliakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani te rishata e Yosia papaai lenye. Neibelekeny ninye enkarna enye aitaa Yohoiakim. Kake eiwuang'ie ninye Yehoahas, nelotu ninye Misiri neye teine." 
2Kings23:35 Neishooyo Yehoiakim enkosholai o Sahabu aisho Farao, kake eitalaa ninye ina kop kodi pee eitayu mpisai te risioroto e nkitanapata e Farao. Eitalakua ninye enkosholai o sahabu too ltung'ana leina kop, te pooki tung'ani te risioroto e nkikena enye, pee eisho Farao Neko." 
2Kings23:36 Oloo larin tikitam apa oimiet Yehoiakim pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon oobo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Sebida entito e Pedaia." 
2Kings23:37 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa loo papaai lenye. 
2Kings24:1 Ore apa aa olaiguanani Yehoiakim, neilepu Nebukadnesa, alotu neaku Yehoiakin osinka lenye ilarin okuni. Neitoki ninye aibelekenya agilunore ninye." 
2Kings24:2 Neirriwaki Olaitoriani metigilunore ninye ilwuampan loo ltung'ana loo Lkaldayo o too ltung'ana le Moab o loo ltung'ana le Amori, neirriwaki ninche meshomo aarasaki Yuda neidaikie ninye, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani, apa oiroro aimunye isinkan lenyena, lelo oibonok le Nkai." 
2Kings24:3 Eewuo ena bae shumata Yuda te nkitanapata o Laitoriani, pee eiwuang'ie ninche too nkonyek enyena, tenkaraki ing'ok e Manase, te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa ninye." 
2Kings24:4 O tenkaraki sii ilo sarge lemeeta entioto apa oibukoyie ninye, amu eiputa apa ninye Yerusalem, osarge lemeeta entioto, neaku meidim Olaitoriani ataapalaki ninye." 
2Kings24:5 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Yehoiakim, o nena pooki naataasa ninye, neigeroki tiatua embuku oo ntepen oo laiguanak le Yuda." 
2Kings24:6 Neaku eirure Yehoiakim etua anaa apa loo menye, neitoreisho Yehoiakim olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Kings24:7 Eitu eitoki olaiguanani le Misiri aipang'u te nkop enye, amu eewa olaiguanani le Babilon nena pooki apa naara ino laiguanani le Misiri ebaiki oerata le Misiri o metabaiki olkeju le Frati." 
2Kings24:8 Oloo larin tomon o isiet apa Yehoiakin pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilapaitin okuni te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Nabusta, entito e Elnatan." 
2Kings24:9 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa loo papaai lenye." 
2Kings24:10 Ore apa teina kata neilepu isinkan le Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon aapuonu Yerusalem, neibung'i ina anasa aang'adu." 
2Kings24:11 Ore Nebukadnesa, olaiguanani le Babilon nelotu ina anasa ina kata etang'adutua isinkan lenyena;" 
2Kings24:12 ore Yehoiakin olaiguanani le Yuda, neitarasaki kewan olaiguanani le Babilon, kewan enye, o ng'otonye o sinkan lenyena, o lkituaak lenyena, o sinkan le nkaji enye e nkitoo. Neen olaiguanani le Babilon ninye, neya ninye, to lari le isiet le nkitoria enye." 
2Kings24:13 Nenap ninye aya lelo shumat pooki le nkaji o Laitoriani o lchumat le nkaji o laiguanani, nedung aitaa mbelibelat imasaa pooki e sahabu naatii atua enkaji o Laitoriani, apa naaitobira Solomon olaiguanani loo Siraeli, anaa apa enatolimuo Olaitoriani." 
2Kings24:14 Etanapa ninye aya Yerusalem pooki, o lkituaak pooki o ltung'ana pooki magil yiolot, iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon ooibung'aki, o ltung'ana pooki arriyiak te nguetare, o too sekenke. Meetae hoo obo otelekua, meteleku ake lelo tung'ana ake aisinak oleng leina kop." 
2Kings24:15 Neya ninye Yehoiakin Babilon; o ng'otonye olaiguanani, o nkituaak o laiguanani, o lkituaak lenyena o ltung'ana kituaak leina kop. Eewa ninye te araroto aitung'uaa Yerusalem nerik Babilon." 
2Kings24:16 Neyau olaiguanani le Babilon lelo yarunot Babilon, lelo tung'ana pooki yiolot, nkalifuni naapishana, o ltung'ana arriyiak te nguetare, o loo sekenke, iltung'ana enkalifu nabo, ore lelo pooki naa iltung'ana oogol neishiaakino to olarrabal." 
2Kings24:17 Neitoki olaiguanani le Babilon aitaa Matania olenkapu le Yehoiakin, olaiguanani te rishata enye, neibelekeny enkarna enye ajo Sedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Oloo larin tikitam oobo apa Sedekia ina kata pee eaku olaiguanani, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon o obo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Hamutal, entito e Yeremia le Libna." 
2Kings24:19 Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, te risioroto e nena pooki naataasa Yehoiakin." 
2Kings24:20 Amu ore te nkaraki engoro o Laitoriani, etabawua e rishata te Yerusalem o te Yuda, naiturrayie ninye ninche aitalam kewan. Negolong'aki Sedekia olaiguanani le Babilon." 
2Kings25:1 Ore to lari lioudo le nkitoria enye, to lapa le tomon, te nkolong e tomon o lapa, nelotu Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon tenebo enjore enye pooki agilunore Yerusalem, neng'adu ninye aman, nepik ninche engumoto aaitaman enkanasa." 
2Kings25:2 Neaku etang'aduaki enkanasa ometaa olari le tomon oobo le nkitoria olaiguanani Sedekia. 
2Kings25:3 Ore te nkolong e naaudo o lapa liong'uan nerasu olameyu teina anasa, amu meekure eetae endaa too ltung'ana leina kop." 
2Kings25:4 Neitobiri elusie teina anasa; neisik olaiguanani kewarie o ltung'ana pooki le njore, aaim enkoitoi e kishomi natii erishata oo sunta, embata e nkurma o laiguanani, hoo netang'adutua apa Ilkaldayo ina anasa. Nepuo ninche aaim enkoitoi e Araba." 
2Kings25:5 Kake etusujaitie apa enjore oo Lkaldayo olaiguanani nepuo aainepu ninye too nkisiajat e Yeriko. Neidapasha enjore enye pooki aaing'uaa ninye. 
2Kings25:6 Neibung ninche olaiguanani neyau enetii olaiguanani le Babilon te Ribla, nedung'oki ninye enkiguana." 
2Kings25:7 Near ninche ilayiok le Sedekia metuata too nkonyek enyena neen ninye too lpisia, neya ninche ninye Babilon." 
2Kings25:8 Ore to lapa le imiet, te nkolong e naapishana o lapa aa ninye olari le tomon o oudo le nkitoria e Nebukadnesa, olaiguanani le Babilon, nelotu Nebusaradan ilo kitok loo larripok lo olaiguanani, osinka leilo aiguanani le Babilon, alotu Yerusalem." 
2Kings25:9 Nepejoo ninye enkaji o Laitoriani, o enkaji o laiguanani, o nkajijik pooki e Yerusalem. Ore pooki aji kitok, nepejoo ninye." 
2Kings25:10 Ore ina jore pooki oo lkaldayo, apa ootii tenebo ilo kitok le rripore, neuroo isunta pooki naamanita Yerusalem." 
2Kings25:11 Ore lelo kulikae tung'ana pooki apa ootung'uayioki tiatua enkanasa, o lelo ooisika, aaisikaki olaiguanani le Babilon, tenebo ilo orora pooki, neya Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore eyararoto." 
2Kings25:12 Kake etung'uayie apa ilo kitok le rripore embata oo ltung'ana aisinak oleng leina kop, pee eaku ilooitobir isabibu, o laturok." 
2Kings25:13 Ore nena ng'apeta o suyai apa naatii enkaji o Laitoriani, o nkitotoneta enyena o ilo moti lo suyai, apa naatii atua enkaji o Laitoriani, nebel ilkaldayo aaitaa mbelibelat, nenap ilo suyai aaya Babilon." 
2Kings25:14 Neya ninche imotioo, o nchempei, o nkuteta e nkima, o ntokitin e nkorropil, o masaa pooki o suyai apa naasishoreki te nkaji e Nkai o motioo," 
2Kings25:15 o lbakulini. Ore apa nena tokitin e sahabu neya ilo kitok le rripore anaa sahabu ore ina nara enkosholai neya anaa enkosholai. 
2Kings25:16 Ore tialo nena ng'apeta pokira are, o ilo moti, o nkitotoneta enyena, apa naaitobira Solomon te nkaraki enkaji o Laitoriani, ore enkiroishi eilo suyai pooki nemeimakinoyu te nkiroishi." 
2Kings25:17 Ore enkadoro e ng'ape nabo naa ntemat e nkaina tomon o isiet, ore enchumata enye netii osunyai. Ore enkadoro eina dukuya naa ntemat e nkaina uni." 
2Kings25:18 Neya ilo kitok le rripore Seria olapolosani kitok o Sefania ilo apolosani liare, o lelo arripok le kishomi pokira okuni;" 
2Kings25:19 ore teina anasa neya ilo kitok apa oitasheiki iltung'ana le njore, o ltung'ana imiet lo lkiama lo laiguanani apa ooinepuaki te nkanasa; o laigeroni lo lkitok le njore laa ninye apa oipotuo iltung'ana leina kop, o ltung'ana ntomoni ile loo ltung'ana leina kop apa oonotoki teina anasa." 
2Kings25:20 Ore Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore neya ninche, neyau ninche enetii olaiguanani le Babilon te Ribla." 
2Kings25:21 Near olaiguanani le Babilon ninche, near metuata te Ribla, tiatua enkop e Hamat. Neaku eewaki apa Yuda eyararoto aaitung'uaa enkop enye." 
2Kings25:22 Ore te shumata lelo tung'ana oo telekutua te nkop e Yuda, lelo apa ootung'uayie Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon, negelu ninye Gedalia olayioni le Ahikan, olayioni le Shafan, aitaa olbalusui." 
2Kings25:23 Ore ake pee ening ilarikok pooki le njore, teina kop naisiaja nchere eitaaki tenebo iltung'ana lenye nchere eitaa olaiguanani le Babilon Gedalia o lbalusui, nepuonu ninche tenebo iltung'ana lenye enetii Gedalia te Mispa, aa taa Ishmael olayioni le Natania, o Yohanan olayioni le Karea, o Seriai olayioni le Tahumet le Netofat, o Yaasania olayioni le Maakat." 
2Kings25:24 Neinos Gedalia olmumai tialo ninche o ltung'ana lenye, ejo, “Emiureishoyu intae te nkaraki ilkituaak loo lkaldayo. Entobik intae tena kop, nisiaayiayia olaiguanani le Babilon, amu keserianu te intae.”" 
2Kings25:25 Kake ore to lapa liopishana, nelotu Elishama, leilo marei le nkitoo, tenebo iltung'ana lenyena tomon, nerasaki Gedalia near metua, tenebo Ilyahudi o Lkaldayo apa ootii tenebo ninye te Mispa." 
2Kings25:26 Neitoki iltung'ana pooki, ilooti o lkituaak o larikok loo njorin, aadumunye nepuo Misiri, amu keure apa Ilkadayo." 
2Kings25:27 Ore to lari le tomoni uni oopishana le yararoto e Yehoiakin olaiguanani le Yuda, to lapa le tomon oare, te nkolong e tikitam oopishana o lapa, nelaaya Efil Merodak, ilo aiguanani le Babilon, teilo ari oitera aitoreisho, Yehoiakin olaiguanani le Yuda metupuku te jela." 
2Kings25:28 Neirorie ninye te supatisho, neisho ninye olorika olus too lorikan loo laiguanak apa ootii tenebo ninye te Babilon." 
2Kings25:29 Neaku eitayio Yehoiakin lelo kilani lenyena le jela, ore too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui enye neinos ninye endaa te mesa o laiguanani." 
2Kings25:30 Ore te retoto enye, eishooki apa ninye eretoto e anaake naishoo olaiguanani, ore ake te nkolong neng'amaa erubata, te nkishui enye pooki." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam, Seti, Enosh," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenan o Mahalael, Yared;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Enok, o Metusela, o Lamek" 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, o Shem, o Ham o Yafet." 
1Chronicles1:5 Ore apa ilayiok le Yafet naa Gomer, o Magog, o Madai o Yafan, o Tubal o Meshek o Tiras." 
1Chronicles1:6 Ore ilayiok le Gomer naa Askenas, o Difat, o Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Ore ilayiok le Yafan naa Elisha, o Tarshish o Kitim o Rodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ore ilayiok le Ham naa Kushi o Misiri o Puti o Kanaan. 
1Chronicles1:9 Ore ilayiok le Kushi naa Seba, o Hafila, o Sabta o Raama o Sableka. Ore ilayiok le Raama naa Sheba o Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi apa menye le Nimrod, naa ninye otang'asa aaku oltung'ani magilani te nkop." 
1Chronicles1:11 Misiri apa menye le Ludim, o Anamim, o Lehabim, o Napatuhim, o" 
1Chronicles1:12 Patusim o Kusluhim (aa ine taa eing'uaa Ilfilisti, o Kaftorim.)" 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaan apa menye le Sidon, ilo kikau lenye, o Heti," 
1Chronicles1:14 o Lyebusi o Lamori o Lgirgashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 o Lhifi ole Arki o Lsini, o" 
1Chronicles1:16 Lafadi, o Lsamari, o Lhamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Ore ilayiok le Shem naa Elam o Ashur o Arpakashad o Lud, o Aram o Usi o Huli o Feter, o Meshek," 
1Chronicles1:18 Apakashad apa menye le Shela; naa Shela menye le Eber. 
1Chronicles1:19 Etoikioki apa Eber ilayiok oare, ore enkarna e obo naa Peleg (amu too nkolong'i enyena apa etooroki enkop) ore enkarna o lalashe naa Yoktin." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yoktin apa menye le Almodad, o Shelaf o Hasamafet, o Yera." 
1Chronicles1:21 O Hadoram, o Usal, o Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 o Ebal o Abimael o Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 o Ofir, o Hafila o Yobab; ore kulo pooki naa ilayiok le Yoktan." 
1Chronicles1:24 O shem, o Arpakshad o Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 o Eber o Peleg o Reu; 
1Chronicles1:26 o Serug o Nahor o Tera; 
1Chronicles1:27 o Abram aa taa Abraham. 
1Chronicles1:28 Ore ilayiok le Abraham naa Isaak o Ishmael. 
1Chronicles1:29 Kuna ninche iiishoritin enye. Ore olkikau le Ishmael naa Nebaiot; o Kedar, o Adbel Mibsan," 
1Chronicles1:30 o Mishma, o Duma, o Masa, o Hadad, o Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 o Yetur o Nafish o Kedema. Kulo ninche ilayiok le Ishmael. 
1Chronicles1:32 Ore apa ilayiok le Ketura, ina apiani e Abraham, netoiuo Simra, o Yokshan o Medan o Midian o Ishbak o Shua. Ore ilayiok le Yokshan naa Sheba o Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Midian, Efa o Efer, o Hanok o Abida o Eldaa. Kulo pooki ninche eishoi e Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abraham apa menye le Isaak. Kulo ninche ilayiok le Isaak, Esau o Israel." 
1Chronicles1:35 Ore ilayiok le Esau naa Elfas, o Reul, o Yeush, Yalaam o Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Ore ilayiok le Elfas naa Teman, o Omar o Sefi o Satam o Kenas o Timna o Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Ruel, Nahat, o Serak, o Shama o Miisa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Seir: Lotan, o Shobal, o Sibeon, o Anak, o Dishon, o Eser o Dishan." 
1Chronicles1:39 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Lotan: Hori o Homan, ore apa enkanashe e Lotan naa Timna." 
1Chronicles1:40 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Shobai: Alian o Manahat o Ebai, o Shefi, o Onam. Ore ilayiok le Sibeon naa Aia o Anak." 
1Chronicles1:41 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Anak: Dishon ore ilayiok le Dishon naa Hamran o Eshban, o Itran o Keran." 
1Chronicles1:42 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Eser, Bilhan, o Saafan o Yaakan. Ore ilayiok le Dishon naa Usi o Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Kulo aiguanak apa ooitoreisho te enkop e Edom, eton eitu eitore hoo likae aiguanani Isiraeli: Bela ole Boer, laa ninye eipotieki enkanasa naji Dinhaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ore pee eye Bela neitoreisho Yohab ole Serak te rishata enye. 
1Chronicles1:45 Ore pee eye Yohab, neitoreisho Husam ole nkop oo Ltaman te rishata enye." 
1Chronicles1:46 Ore pee eye Husham ore Hadad ole Bedad laa ninye apa otimira Midian te nkop e Moab neitoreisho te rishata enye; ore enkarna enkanasa enye naa Afit. 
1Chronicles1:47 Ore pee eye Hadad, neitoreisho Samala le Masreka te rishata enye." 
1Chronicles1:48 Ore pee eye Samli, ore Shaul le Rehobot to lkeju le Frati neitoreisho te rishata enye." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ore pee eye Shaul neitoreisho Baalhanan ole Akbor te rishata enye. 
1Chronicles1:50 Ore pee eye Baalhanan neitoreisho Hadad te rishata enye, ore enkarna e nkanasa naa Pai, ore enkarna e nkitok enye naa Mahetabel, entito e Matred, entito e Mesaba. Neye Hadad." 
1Chronicles1:51 Ore ilaiguanak loo loshon le Edom naa; olaiguanani Timna, o Alka, Yetet," 
1Chronicles1:52 o Oholibama, o Ela, o Pinon o Kenas," 
1Chronicles1:53 o Teman, o Mibsar, o Magdiel, o Iram," 
1Chronicles1:54 kulo ninche ilaiguanak le Edom. 
1Chronicles2:1 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Israel, Ruben, o Simion o Lawi, o Yuda, o Isaakar, o Sebulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 o Dan, o Yosef, o Benchamen, o Naftali, o Gaad, o Asheri," 
1Chronicles2:3 kulo ninche ilayiok le Yuda. Eer, o Onan, o Shela, ore kulo pokira okuni apa etoikio Betshua oo Lkanaani ninye. Ore apa Eer ilo kikau le Yuda naa oltung'ani arruoni te dukuya Olaitoriani. Neaku etara Olaitoriani ninye metua." 
1Chronicles2:4 Ore ina tito apa nayama olayioni lenye naji Tamar, neiki ninye Peres o Serak. Eeta apa Yuda ilayiok imiet." 
1Chronicles2:5 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Peres: Hesron o Hamul. 
1Chronicles2:6 Ore ilayiok le Serak naa Simri, o Etan, o Hemian, o Kalkol o Dara, imiet pooki." 
1Chronicles2:7 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Kormi; Akar ilo aing'oling'olani loo Siraeli, laa ninye apa otigila nkitanapat too ntokitin naaitisinyakaki Enkai," 
1Chronicles2:8 ore olayioni le Etan naa Asaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Kulo ayiok apa etoikioki Hesron: Yerameel, o Ram, o Kelubia." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ram apa menye le Aminadab, naa Aminadab apa menye le Nahashon, ilo kitok loo layiok le Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashon apa menye le Salma, Salma le Boas," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boas le Obed, Obed le Yese" 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese apa menye le Eliab naa ninye olkikau. Aminadab oliare, o Shimea aa ninye oliokuni." 
1Chronicles2:14 Natanel oliong'uan," 
1Chronicles2:15 Radai ole imiet, Osem ole ile" 
1Chronicles2:16 Daudi oliopishana, ore nkanashera enye naa Seruyia, o Abigail. Ore ilayiok le Seruyia naa Abishai, o Yoab, o Asahel. Lelo pokira okuni." 
1Chronicles2:17 Etoiuo apa Abigail Amasa, ore menye le Amasa naa Yeter le Ishmael." 
1Chronicles2:18 Eeta apa Kaleb olayioni le Hesron nkera naatoiuo enkitok enye naji Asuba, ore te Yeriot, naa kuna nkarn oo layiok lenyena, Yesher, o Shobab, o Adron." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ore pee eye Asuba, neyam Kaleb Efarat naa ninye natoiuo Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri apa menye le Uri naa Uri menye le Besalel. 
1Chronicles2:21 Ore te siadi nelo Hesron ayam entito e Makir, menye le Gilead. Neyamisho ninye aa oloo larin ntomoni ile, neiki ina tito ninye Segub." 
1Chronicles2:22 Naa Segub apa menye le Yair, laa ninye apa oata nkanas tikitam ookuni te nkop e Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:23 Kake etaaraitie apa Geshur o Aram nkanas e Hofotajir, o Kenat, o nkang'itie enyena kutiti, nkang'itie ntomoni ile. Ore kuna pooki naa inoo le ishoi oo le Makir, menye le Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ore tesiadi te keeya e Hesron, nelo Kaleb ayiolou Efarata, enkitok e Hesron papaai lenye. Neiki ina kitok ninye Ashuri, menye le Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Yerameel ilo kikau le Hesron: Ram ilo kikau lenye, o Buna, o Oren o Osem o Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Eeta sii apa Yerameel enkae kitok, naji enkarna enye Atara; naa ninye apa ngotonye e Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Ram ilo kikau le Yerameel: Maas o Yamin o Eker. 
1Chronicles2:28 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Onam: Shamai o Yuda ore ilayiok le Shamai naa Nadab o Abishur. 
1Chronicles2:29 Ore apa enkarna enkitok e Abishur naa Abihail neiki Abishu Ababan o Molid. 
1Chronicles2:30 Ore ilayiok le Nadab naa; Seled o Apaim, neye Selad meeta enkerai." 
1Chronicles2:31 Ore ilayiok le Apaim naa Ishi, ore ilayiok le Ishi, naa Sheshan, ore ilayiok le Sheshan naa Ahalai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Naa kulo ilayiok le Yada, olalashe le Shamai, o Yeter o Yonatan. Etua apa Yeter meeta enkerai." 
1Chronicles2:33 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Yonatan: Pelet o Sasa. Ore kulo naa ile ishoi e Yerameel. 
1Chronicles2:34 Meeta apa Sheshem ilayiok, ntoyie ake eeta. Neeta apa Sheshem Olmisiri rrindik oji enkarna enye Yerha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Neishooyo Sheshan ina tito enye meyama Yerha, orrindik lenye. Neiu ina tito Atai," 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai apa menye le Natan," 
1Chronicles2:37 naa Natan menye le Sabad. Sabad apa menye le Efla naa Efla menye le Obed. 
1Chronicles2:38 Obed apa menye le Yehu, naa Yehu menye le Asaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Asaria apa menye le Heles," 
1Chronicles2:40 naa Heles menye le Eleasa. Eleasa menye le Sismai naa Sismai menye le Shalum. 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalum menye le Yekemia naa Yekemia menye le Elishama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Kaleb ilo alashe le Yerameel: Marehash ilo kikau lenye, laa ninye menye le Sif, ore ilayiok le Maresha olkikau lenye naa" 
1Chronicles2:43 ilayiok le Hebron: Kora, Tapua, o Rekem o Shema," 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema apa menye le Raham, menye le Yorkeam; aa menye Shamai apa Rekem," 
1Chronicles2:45 kulo ninche ilayiok le Shamai: Maon: naa Maon apa menye le Betsar. 
1Chronicles2:46 Ore sii apa Efa ina apiani e Kaleb, neiu Haran, o Mosa o Geses, naa Haran apa menye le Geses." 
1Chronicles2:47 Ilayiok le Yehadai; Regem, o Yotam, o Gesham o Pelet o Efa, o Shaaf." 
1Chronicles2:48 Ore Maaka ina apiani e Kaleb neiu Sheber o Tirhana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Etoiuo sii Shaaf menye le Madmana, o Shefa menye le Makbena o menye le Gibea; ore apa entito e Kaleb naa keji Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Kulo apa ileishoi e Kaleb. Ilayiok le Huri ilo kikau le Efrata: Shobal menye le Kiriat-yearim," 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma menye le Betlehem o Heref menye le Betgader. 
1Chronicles2:52 Eeta apa Shobal menye le Kiriat jearim kulikae ayiok; Haroe laa ninye olpisiai loo lmonubot. 
1Chronicles2:53 Ore ilmareita loo Lkiriat-yearim naa Iltiriti, o Iputi, o Ilchumati o Imishirati, naa kulo eing'uaa Ilsoriti o Ilshitoa." 
1Chronicles2:54 Ilayiok le Solma: Betlehem o Lnetofari o Arot-bet-Yoab, o lpisia loo Lmahahati, o Lsori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ore sii ilmareita loo laigerok apa oomanya Yabes, naa Iltirati o Ichimeat o Lsukati. Ore kulo naa Ilkeni apa ooetuo aaing'uaa Hamat, menye lolmarei le Rekab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Daudi apa ootoikioki ninye te Hebron: Ore olkikau naa Amon, otoiwuo Ahinoam oo Lyesreel; ore oliare naa Daniel, otoiwuo Abigail e Karmel." 
1Chronicles3:1 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Daudi apa ootoikioki ninye te Hebron: Ore olkikau naa Amon, otoiwuo Ahinoam oo Lyesreel; ore oliare naa Daniel, otoiwuo Abigail e Karmel." 
1Chronicles3:2 Ore oliokuni naa Absalom apa laa Maaka ng'otonye. Entito e Talmai olaiguanani le Geshur. Ore oliong'uan anaa Adonija, neji ng'otonye Hagit." 
1Chronicles3:3 Ore oleimiet naa Shefatia otoiwuo Abital; ore ole ile naa Itream otoiwuo enkitok enye Egla. 
1Chronicles3:4 Etoikioki apa ninye kulo pokira ile te Hebron, teine apa neitoreisho ilarin oopishana o lapaitin ile. Neitoreisho ninye te Yerusalem ilarin tomoni uni oo kuni." 
1Chronicles3:5 Kulo apa lelo ootoikioki ninye te Yerusalem: Shimei o Shobab, o Natan, o Solomon, lelo oong'uan etoiuo Betshua entito e Amiel." 
1Chronicles3:6 Neitokini aaiu Ibar, o Elishama, o Elifelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 o Noga, o Nefeg o Yafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 o Elishama, o Eliada, o Elifelet, ooudo," 
1Chronicles3:9 ilayiok le Daudi kulo pooki metii ilayiok loo nkapiak; naa Tamar enkanashe enye. 
1Chronicles3:10 Ore eishoi e Solomon naa: Rehoboam o Abija olayioni lenye, o Asa olayioni lenye, o Yehoshefat olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles3:11 o Yoram olayioni lenye, o Ahasia olayioni lenye, o Yoash olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles3:12 O Amasai olayioni lenye, o Asaria olayioni lenye o Yotan olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles3:13 o Ahas olayioni lenye. O Hesekia olayioni lenye o Manase olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles3:14 o Amon olayioni lenye, o Yosia olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles3:15 Ore ilayiok le Yosia naa: Yohanan olkikau lenye, ore oliare naa Yehoiakim, ore oliokuni naa Sedekia, ore oliong'uan naa Shulum." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ore eishoi e Yehoiakim naa: Yekonia olayioni lenye o Sedekia olayioni lenye. 
1Chronicles3:17 Ore eishoi e Yehoiakin ilo apa oshomo eyararoto naa: Shealtiel olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles3:18 o Malkiram, o Pedaia, o Shenasa, o Yekania, o Hoshama, o Nedabisha." 
1Chronicles3:19 Ore ilayiok le Pedaia naa Serubabel o Shimei; ore ilayiok le Serubabel naa Meshulam o Hanania naa Shelomit enkanashe enye," 
1Chronicles3:20 o Heshuba, o Obel, o Berekia, o Hasadia, o Yushabhesed, ninche pokira imiet." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ore ilayiok le Hanania, naa Peletia o Yeshaia, o layioni lenye Refaina, o layioni lenye Arnan, o layioni lenye Obadia, o layioni lenye Shekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ore ilayiok le Shekania naa Shemaia. Ore ilayiok le Shemaia naa Hatush, o Lgal, o Baria, o Neris o Shafat, kulo pokira ile." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ore ilayiok le Neara naa Elioenai, Hiskia, o Asrikam, kulo pokira okuni." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ore ilayiok le Elioenai naa: Hodafia, o Eliashib, o Pelaia, o Akub, o Yohanan, o Delaia, o Anani, kulo pokira oopishana." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ore ilayiok le Yuda naa, Peres, o Hesron, o Karmi, o Huri, o Shobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaia ole Shobal apa menye le Yahat, naa Yahat menye le Ahumei o Lahad. Kulo apa ilmareita loo le Sorat." 
1Chronicles4:3 Kulo apa ilayiok le Etam: Yesreel, o Ishma o Ldbash; ore enkarna e nkanashe enye naa Haseloponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Naa Panuel apa menye le Gedor, naa Eser menye le Hushash. Kulo ninche ilayiok le Huri, ilo kikau le Efrata, menye le Betlehem." 
1Chronicles4:5 Eeta apa Ashuhur, menye le Tekoa nkituaak are, Heba, o Naara;" 
1Chronicles4:6 Neiki Naara ninye Ahusum, o Hefer, o Temeni, O Haashatari. Kulo ninche apa ilayiok le Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Kulo ilayiok le Hela: Seret, o Ishar, o Etanan." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koos apa menye le Anub, o Sebeba, o lmareita le Aharhel olayioni le Harum." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabes apa oning'o oleng too lalashera lenyena; neisho apa ninye ng'otonye enkarna ajo Yabes, ejo, “Enkaraki natoiuo ninye te mion.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Neomon Yabes Enkai e Israel ejo, “Tamayianaki Na Ai, nikiponiki enkop, nchoo enkaina ino eaku tenebo nanu, naamitu nanu te mbatisho pooki pee maatum nanu!” Neisho Enkai ninye ina natoomonuo." 
1Chronicles4:11 Keleb ilo alashe le Shusha apa menye le Mekir, laa ninye menye le Eshton." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshton apa menye le Betrafa, o Pasea, o Tihina menye le Irnabash. Kulo ninche iltung'ana le Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Ore ilayiok le Kenas naa: Otiniel, o Seraia. Ore ilayiok le Otimiel naa: Hanat o Meonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai apa menye le Ofra: naa Serai apa menye le Yoab menye Geharashim, neijia apa ejo ninche amu iltung'ana arriyiak." 
1Chronicles4:15 Ore ilayiok le Kaleb olayioni le Yefune naa: Iru, o Ela, o Naam; ore ilayiok le Ela naa Kenas." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ore ilayiok le Yehaledel naa: Sif o Sifa, o Tiria, o Asarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ore ilayiok le Esrahi naa: Yeter, o Mered, o Efer, o Yolon. Kulo ninche ilayiok le Bitia entito e Farao, apa nayama Mered, nenutayu ninye neiu Meriam o Shamai o Ishba menye le Eshtemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Ore ina kitok enye oo Lyahudi neiu Yared menye le Gedor, o Heber menye le Soko, o Yekutiel menye le Samoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Ore ilayiok le nkitok e Hodia, ina anashe e Naham, naa iloomenye le Keila le Garmit o Eshtemoa le Maakuti." 
1Chronicles4:20 Ore ilayiok le Shimon naa: Amon, o Rina, o Benhanan, o Tilon. Ore ilayiok le Ishi naa Sohet, o Bensohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 Ore ilayiok le Shela ole Yuda naa: Eer menye le Leka, o Laada menye le Maresha, o lmareita le nkaji oo laitobirak oopuyiapui te Bet-ashbea." 
1Chronicles4:22 Ore Yokim oltung'ana le Koseba, o Yoash o Saraf apa laa ninye oitoreisho te Moab nerrinyo alo Lahem. (Ore apa kuna baa naa iniopa oleng.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Kulo apa lelo aitobirak loo ntokitin oo nkulupuok naa ninche oomanya Netaim o Gedera: Nebik ninche teine tenebo olaiguanani tenkaraki esiaai enye. 
1Chronicles4:24 Ore ilayiok le Simeon naa: Nemuel, o Yamin, o Yarib, o Serak o Shaul;" 
1Chronicles4:25 Shalum apa olayioni lenye, o Mibsai olayioni lenye, o Mibsam olayioni lenye o Mishma olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ore ilayiok le Mishma naa: Hamuel olayioni lenye, o Sakur olayioni lenye o Shimei olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles4:27 Eeta apa Shimei ilayiok tomon o ile o ntoyie ile; kake meeta apa ilalashera lenyena nkera kumok, neitu eponari ilmareita lenye anaa iltung'ana le Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Nebik apa ninche te Beersheba, o te Moloda, o te Hasar-shual," 
1Chronicles4:29 o te Bilha, o te Esem, o te Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 o te Betuel, o te Horma, o te Siklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 o te Betmarkobat, o te Harsarsusim, o te Betbiri, o te Sharraim. Kuna ninche nkanas enye o metabaiki enkitoria e Daudi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ore nkang'itie enye naa Efan, o Ain, o Rimon, o Token o Ashan, nkanas imiet." 
1Chronicles4:33 Ore tenebo nena ang'itie enye pooki naamanita o kuna anas ometabaiki baal, kuna apa imanyiishoritin enye neigero iiishoritin enye." 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshohab, o Yamlek, o Yosha, apa ilayiok le Amasai." 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoel o Yehu apa ilayiok le Yoshibia olayioni le Seraia, olayioni le Asiel." 
1Chronicles4:36 Elioenai o Yaakoba o Yeshohaia, o Asaia, o Adiel, o Yesimeil o Benaia," 
1Chronicles4:37 o Sifa ole Shifi olayioni le Alon, o layioni le Yedaia, olayioni le Shimri, olayioni le Shemaia" 
1Chronicles4:38 ore kulo ooipotoki nkarn ninche apa ilkituaak too lmareita lenye, ore nkajijik oo loo menye nebul oleng," 
1Chronicles4:39 Eshomo apa ninche enejing'ieki Gedor nepuo enkalo o loo saen lo erata, eing'oru ndaat oo nkerrai enye," 
1Chronicles4:40 nepuo aatum ndaat sidain teine, amu kelala ina kop, nebor oilole, neserian; ore apa iloomanya ine te dukuya naa ile Ham." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ore kulo ooigeroki nkarn ninche apa loo nkolong'i e Hesekia, olaiguanani le Yuda, neidaikie ilng'oborri lenye o Lmeunin apa oomanya ine, neishieki ninche teine o taata, nemany ninche ina kop enye enkaraki natii ine ndaat oo nkerrai enye." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ore ilkulikae lenye, iltung'ana oobaya iip imiet too le Simeon, nepuo oldoinyio le Seir, ore ilarikok lenye naa Pelatia, o Neara, o Refaia, o Usiel, ilayiok le Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Neidaikie ninche ilo pisiai apa le Ameleki oisika nebik ninye teine o metabaiki ena olong. 
1Chronicles5:1 Kulo ile ishoi e Ruben ilo kikau le Israel, (ore enkaraki natijing'a enkaji e papaai lenye, meekure eikenari aajo olkikau. Ore erishata enye neishori ilayiok le Yosef olayioni le Israel. Amu eitu eigeri enkarna enye te mbuku oo iishoritin anaa olkikau." 
1Chronicles5:2 Ore hoo naa Yuda apa ogol alang ilalashera lenyena, naa ninye eimu ilo kitok, kake ene Yosef enjung'ore o lkikau.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Ore ilayiok le Ruben ilo kikau le Israel naa: Hanok, o Palu, o Hesron, o Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Kulo ilayiok le Yoel: Shemia olayioni lenye, o Gog olayioni lenye, o Shimei olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles5:5 o Mika olayioni lenye, o Reaia olayioni lenye, o Baal olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles5:6 o Beara olayioni lenye, laa ninye apa eewa olaiguanani Tilgat Pilnesa le Asiria te yararoto. Ninye apa oltung'ani kitok too le Ruben." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ore iltung'ana lenye too lmareita lenye, ina kata pee eigeri iiishoritin enye naa: ore olkitok lenye naa Yerel, o Sakaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 o Bela olayioni le Asas, olayioni le Shema, olayioni le Yoel, apa omanya Aroer ometabaiki Nebo o Baalmeon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Etobiko sii apa te nkalo o loo saen ometabaiki olpolosie lo lpurkel tena shoto e Frati, amu etoponari apa nkishu enye te nkop e Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ore too nkolong'i e Saul neitayunye iltung'ana le Hagrit olarrabal, neibung ninche, nebik ninche too lng'oborri lenye te nkop pooki e Gilead te nkalo oloosaen." 
1Chronicles5:11 Etamanya apa ilayiok le Gad aatashare ninche te nkop e Bashan ometabaiki Saleka. 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoel apa olkitok nesujaki Shafan o Yanai o Shafat te Bashan. 
1Chronicles5:13 Ore olorere lenye te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye naa: Mikael, o Meshulam, o Sheba, o Yorai, o Yakan, o Sia, o Eber, lelo pokira oopishana." 
1Chronicles5:14 Kulo apa ilayiok le Abihail olayioni le Huri olayioni le Yaroa, olayioni le Gilead, olayioni le Mikael, olayioni le Yeshishai, olayioni le Yohado, olayioni le Buus;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahis olayioni le Abdiel, olayioni le Guni ninye apa olkitok te nkaji e menye;" 
1Chronicles5:16 nebik apa ninye te Gilead, tiatua Bashan o too nkang'itie enyena, o teina kop pooki nairritishoreki e Sharon o meiting'ie." 
1Chronicles5:17 Eigeroki apa kuna baa pooki anaa iishoritin too nkolong'i e Yotam olaiguanani le Yuda o too nkolong'i e Yeroboam olaiguanani le Israel. 
1Chronicles5:18 Ore tiatua iloshon le Ruben ore Gad o lpisiaai lo losho le Manase, neeta iltung'ana magil, oata long'oi o lalema, neeta nkai, naa arriyiak to larrabal, naa nkalifuni artam oong'uan, o iip naapishana o ntomoni ile, neterretenate ninche te nkisiaayiare." 
1Chronicles5:19 Neitayu ninche olarrabal o Lhagri, olyetur, Olmafish, Olnadab;" 
1Chronicles5:20 ore ake pee eng'amu ninche eretoto pee egilunore ninche, ore Ilhagri, o lelo pooki ootii tenebo ninche neishoori aapik nkaik oo le Ruben, amu Olaitoriani eishirakitia ninche to larrabal, neisho ninche Enkai eomonunoto enye enkaraki naisiliga ninche ninye." 
1Chronicles5:21 Neya ninche nkishu enye, o ntamesin enye nkalifuni onom, o nkerra nkalifuni iip are o onom, o sirkon nkalifuni are, o ltung'ana ooishu nkalifuni iip nabo." 
1Chronicles5:22 Amu eirragaitie ilkumok etuata, amu ore ilo arrabal naa ole Nkai. Nebik ninche te nkop enye ometabau eyararoto." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ore olpisiai loo ltung'ana le Manase nebik teina kop, neaku ninche kumok oleng te Bashan o metabaiki Baarhermon, o Senir, o ldoinyio le Hermon." 
1Chronicles5:24 Kulo apa ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye: Efer, o Ishi, o Eliel, o Esriel, o Yeremia, o Hadafia, o Yadiel, lelo murran magil, ooning'o, laa lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye." 
1Chronicles5:25 Kake etogolong'okita ninche Enkai oo loomenye, neiborrie onyek aarubare nkaitin oo ltung'ana leina kop apa naaidaikie Enkai te dukuya ninche." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ore enkaraki ina neputu Enkai e Israel oltau le Puul, olaiguanani le Asiria, o ltau le Tilgal-Pilnesa, olaiguanani le Asiria, nearaa ninche meshomo, aa taa ile Ruben o le Gad, o lpisiaai loo ltung'ana le Manase, nereu ninche Hala, o Habor, o Hara, nereu sii olkeju le Gosan ometabaiki ena olong." 
1Chronicles6:1 Kulo ilayiok le Lawi: Gershom, o Kohat, o Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Ore ilayiok le Kohat naa: Amram, o Ishar, o Hebron o Usiel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Kuna nkera e Amram: Aron, o Musa, o Miriam. Kulo ilayiok le Aron: Nadab o Abihu, o Eliesa, o Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eliesa apa menye le Finehas, naa Finehas menye le Abishua" 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua menye le Buki, Buki menye le Usi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Usi menye le Serahia, Serahia menye le Meraiot," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiot menye le Amaria, Amaria menye le Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitub menye le Sadok, Sadok menye le Ahimaas," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaas menye le Asaria, Asaria menye le Yohanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 naa Yohanan menye le Asaria. (Ninye apa ilo oisiaaisho anaa olapolosani teina aji apa natesheta Solomon te Yerusalem) 
1Chronicles6:11 Asaria apa menye le Amaria, naa Amaria menye le Ahitub" 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitub menye le Sadok naa Sadok menye le Shalum," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalum menye le Hilkia; Hilkia menye le Asaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Asaria menye le Seraia, naa Seraia le Yehosadak;" 
1Chronicles6:15 nelo apa Yohosadak eyararoto ina kata pee eirriwaa Olaitoriani Yuda o Yerusalem meshomo eyararoto te nkaina e Nebukadnesa. 
1Chronicles6:16 Ilayiok le Lawi: Gershom, o Kohat, o Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Naa kuna nkarn oo layiok le Gershom: Libni o Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Ilayiok le Kohat: Amram, o Ishar, o Hebron o Usiel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Ilayiok le Merari: Mahali, o Mishi, kulo ninche ilmareita loo Lawi terisioroto oo loo menye." 
1Chronicles6:20 Ile Gershom: Libni, olayioni lenye, o Yohat olayioni lenye, o Sima olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles6:21 o Yoash olayioni lenye, o Ido olayioni lenye, o Serak olayioni lenye, o Yeaterai olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles6:22 Ilayiok le Kohat: Aminadab olayioni lenye, o Kora olayioni lenye, o Asir olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles6:23 O Elkana olayioni lenye, o Ebiasaf olayioni lenye o Asir olayioni lenye" 
1Chronicles6:24 o Tahat olayioni lenye, o Uriel olayioni lenye, o Usia olayioni lenye, o Shaul olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ilayiok le Elkana: Amasai, o Ahimot o," 
1Chronicles6:26 Elkana olayioni lenye, o Sofai olayioni lenye, o Nahat olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles6:27 o Eliab olayioni lenye o Yeroham olayioni lenye, o Elkana olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ilayiok le Samuel: Yoel olkikau lenye, ore olosuju naa Abija." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ilayiok le Merari: Mahali, o Libni olayioni lenye, o Shimei olayioni lenye, o Usa olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles6:30 o Shimea olayioni lenye, o Higia olayioni lenye o Asaia olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles6:31 Kulo tung'ana apa etipika Daudi meitasheiki esiaai e Ranyare tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, eidipaki aairragie osanduku lo sotua teine." 
1Chronicles6:32 Etaranyishote apa ninche te dukuya ilo ng'obor le wueji sinyati, ometaba anaa neshetu Solomon enkaji o Laitoriani te Yerusalem; neas ninche ina siaai enye anaa enaishiakino." 
1Chronicles6:33 Kulo tung'ana apa lelo tenebo ilayiok lenye. Ore too layiok le Kohat naa: Haman olaranyani ole Yoel, olayioni le Samuel," 
1Chronicles6:34 olayioni le Elkana, olayioni le Yehoram, olayioni le Eliel, olayioni le Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 olayioni le Suf, olayioni le Elkana, olayioni le Mahat, olayioni le Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 olayioni le Elkana olayioni le Yoel, olayioni le Asaria, olayioni le Sefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 olayioni le Tahat, olayioni le Asir, olayioni le Ebiasaf, olayioni le Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 olayioni le Ishar, olayioni le Kohat, olayioni le Lawi, olayioni le Israel;" 
1Chronicles6:39 o lalashe lenye Asafu laa ninye apa oitashe te nkalo enye e tatene, aa taa Asafu ole Berekia, olayioni le Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 olayioni le Mikaeli olayioni le Baaseia, olayioni le Malkija," 
1Chronicles6:41 olayioni le Etni, olayioni le Serak, olayioni le Adaia," 
1Chronicles6:42 olayioni le Elan, olayioni le Sima, olayioni le Shimei" 
1Chronicles6:43 o layioni le Yahat, olayioni le Gershom, olayioni le Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ore te nkalo e kedienye netii ilalashera lenye, lelo ayiok le Merari: Etam ole Kishi, olayioni le Abdi; olayioni le Maluk," 
1Chronicles6:45 olayioni le Hashabia, olayioni le Amasai, olayioni le Hilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 olayioni le Amsi, olayioni le Beni, olayioni le Shemer," 
1Chronicles6:47 olayioni le Mahali, olayioni le Mushi, olayioni le Merari, olayioni le Lawi;" 
1Chronicles6:48 ore ilalashera lenye Ilawi netegelakaki enkisiaayiare pooki e wueji sinyati tiatua enkaji Enkai. 
1Chronicles6:49 Kake ore apa Aron o layiok lenyena neitayu ilasarri te nchumata olperere loo lasarri oopejoro te nchumata olperere le nkorropil tenkaraki esiaai pooki eine wueji sinyati oleng. Neitobir sii olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki Israel, te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapishe Musa osinka le Nkai." 
1Chronicles6:50 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Aron: Eliesa olayioni lenye, o Finehas olayioni lenye, o Abishua olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles6:51 o Buki olayioni lenye, o Usi olayioni lenye, o Serahia olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles6:52 o Meraiot olayioni lenye, o Amaria olayioni lenye o Ahitab olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles6:53 o Sadok olayioni lenye, o Ahimaas olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles6:54 Kuna ninche imanyishoritin enye terisioroto oo wuejitin neetamanya ninche too lpolosien lenye. Ore too layiok le Aron loo lmareita le Kohat, naa ena erubata enye." 
1Chronicles6:55 Eishooki ninche Hebron tiatua enkop e Yuda o nena daat oo nchoo naamanita," 
1Chronicles6:56 kake ore nkong'at embata e ina anasa o nkang'itie kutiti neishori Kalebu ole Yefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Ore ilayiok le Aron neishori nena anas e sarunoto, Hebron o Libna, tenebo ndaat enye oo nchoo, Yatir o Eshtemoa tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo," 
1Chronicles6:58 o Hilen tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Debir tenebo ndaat enyena, oo nchoo," 
1Chronicles6:59 o Ashan tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Bet-shemesh tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Ore olosho le Benchamen neishori Geba tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Alemet tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Anatot tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo. Ore nkanas enye pooki too lmareita lenye naa tomon oo kuni." 
1Chronicles6:61 Ore lelo ootelekutua le Kohat, neishori te oshoto e nkukuo, anaa ilmareita leilo osho olpisiai lo losho le Manase, nkanas tomon." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ore ile Gershom te risioroto oo lmareita lenye neorikini nkanas tomon ookuni, o losho le Isaakar, o Asheri, o Naftali, o Manase te Bashan." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ore too le Merari te risioroto oo lmareita lenye neorikini Nkanas tomon oare to losho le Ruben, o Gad, o Sebulon." 
1Chronicles6:64 Kaae neisho iltung'ana le Israel ile Lawi nkanas tenebo ndaat enye oo nchoo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Neisho sii ninche te oshoto e nkukuo kuna anas naaipotoki tene oo loshon le Yuda, o Simeon o Benchamen." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ore kulikae mareita loo layiok le Kohat neeta nkanas natii enkop enye apa anaa inolosho le Efraim. 
1Chronicles6:67 Ninche apa eishooki nkanas e sarunoto. Shekem tenebo nena daat enyena oo nchoo, te nkop oo ldoinyio e Efraim. O Geser tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo." 
1Chronicles6:68 O Yokmeam tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo. O Bet-horon tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo," 
1Chronicles6:69 o Aijalon tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Gatrimon tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo," 
1Chronicles6:70 ore to lpisiaai le nkop o losho le Manase neya Aner tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Bileam tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, te nkaraki lelo mareita loo le Kohat." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ore ile Gershom neishori olpisiaai le nkop e Manase: Golan te Bashan, tenebo nkanas enyena pooki o Ashtarot tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo," 
1Chronicles6:72 ore to losho le Isakar neyai Kadesh tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Damerat tenebo nena ndaat enyena oo nchoo," 
1Chronicles6:73 o Ramot tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Anem tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo." 
1Chronicles6:74 Ore to losho le Asheri neyai: Mashal tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Abdon tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo," 
1Chronicles6:75 o Hukok tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Rahob tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo." 
1Chronicles6:76 Ore to losho le Naftali neyai: Kadesh te Galilaya tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Hamon tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Kiriataim tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Ore lelo ootelekutua loo le Merari, neorikini ewueji olosho le Sebulon: Rimono tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo: o Tabor tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo," 
1Chronicles6:78 o te lido kekun lo lkeju le Yordan, te Yeriko, te nkalo oloo saen to lkeju le Yordan, ore to losho le Ruben neyai: Beser tiong'ota, tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Yahasa tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o" 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemot tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Mafaat tenebo ndaat enyena, oo nchoo." 
1Chronicles6:80 Ore to losho le Gad neyai, Ramot te Gilead tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo, o Mahanaim tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo" 
1Chronicles6:81 o Hesbon tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo o Yaser tenebo ndaat enyena oo nchoo. 
1Chronicles7:1 Ilayiok le Isaakar; Tola, o Pua o Yashub, o Shimron, lelo pokira oong'uan." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ilayiok le Tola, Usi, o Refaia, o Yeriel, o Yahamai, o Ibsam, o Shemuel, ninche ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, aa taa Tola, Lmurran magil too lporori lenye. Ore esiana enye too nkolong'i e Daudi naa nkalifuni tikitam oare o iip ile." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ilayiok le Usi: Israhia. Ore ilayiok le Israma naa: Mikael, o Obadia, o Yoel, o Ishia, lelo pokira imiet, naa iltung'ana kituaak pooki." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ore tenebo ninche too iishoritin enye, terisioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye, naa iltimito le njore, nkalifuni tomoni uni oile, amu eeta apa ninche nkituaak kumok o layiok." 
1Chronicles7:5 Ore iltung'ana lenye ootii ilmareita le Isaakar naa nkalifuni ntomoni isiet oopishana pooki, ilmurran magil, eigeroki nkarn enye anaa iishoritin." 
1Chronicles7:6 Ilayiok le Benchamen: Bela, o Besher, o Yediael, lelo pokira okuni." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ilayiok le Bela: Esron, o Usi, o Usiel o Yerimot o Iri, lelo pokira imiet, ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, ilmurran magil. Ore enkigeroto enye anaa too iishoritin enye naa nkalifuni tikitam oare o tomoni uni oong'uan." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ilayiok le Beker: Semira o Yoash, o Eliesa, o Elioenai, o Omori, o Yeremot, o Abija o Anatot o Alemet. Ore apa kulo pooki naa ilayiok le Beker." 
1Chronicles7:9 Ore enkigeroto oo nkarn enye te risioroto oo iishoritin enye, anaa lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, lelo murran magil naa nkalifuni tikitam o iip are." 
1Chronicles7:10 Ilayiok le Yediel: Bilhan. Ore ilayiok le Bilhan naa Yeush o Benchamen, o Ehud, o Shenana, Sesan, o Tarshish o Ahishahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Ilayiok le Yediel kulo pooki te risioroto oo lukuny oo nkajijik oo loomenye, ilmurran magil ninche. Nkalifuni tomon oopishana o iip are esiana enye, ilooterretenate to larrabal." 
1Chronicles7:12 Ore Shupim o Hupim naa ilayiok le Iri, ore Hushim naa obo loo layiok le Aher." 
1Chronicles7:13 Ilayiok le Naftali: Yahasiel, o Guni, o Yeser, o Shalum, ilo le ishoi e Bilhal." 
1Chronicles7:14 Ilayiok le Manase: Asriel laa ninye apa etoikio enkapiani enye e Aramean, etoiuo sii apa Makir menye le Gilead." 
1Chronicles7:15 Eyamaka sii apa Makir Hupim o Shupim. Ore enkarna e nkanashe enye naa Maaka. Ore enkarna e nkanashe enye e are naa Selofehad; neiu apa Selofehad ntoyie. 
1Chronicles7:16 Ore Maaka ina kitok e Makir neiu olayioni, neisho enkarna ajo Peres, ore enkarna o lalashe lenye naa Sheresh: Ore ilayiok lenyena naa Olam o Rakem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ilayiok le Ulam: Bedan. Kulo apa ilayiok le Gilead ole Makir, olayioni le Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Ore enkanashe enye Hamoleket neiu Ishod, o Abiesa, o Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Ore ilayiok le Shemida naa Ahian, o Shekem, o Likihi o Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ilayiok le Efraim: Shutela, o Bered, olayioni lenye, o Tahat olayioni lenye, o Eleada olayioni lenye, o Tahat olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles7:21 o Sabad olayioni lenye, o Shutela olayioni lenye, o Eser o Elead laa ninche apa ootasesekuana iltung'ana le Gat apa ootoiwuoki teina kop, enkaraki naetuo ninche aaibung nkishu enye." 
1Chronicles7:22 Neishiraki ninche Efraim papaai lenye nkolong'i kumok nepuonu ilalashera lenye aaitagol ninche. 
1Chronicles7:23 Nelo Efraim ayiolou enkitok enye, nenutayu ninye neiu enkayioni, neisho ninye enkarna ajo, Beria, enkaraki natijing'a entorroni atua enkaji enye." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ore entito enye naa keji Sheera, naa ninye apa natesheta Betoron e abori o ene shumata o Usensheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Rafan apa olayioni lenye, o Rashef olayioni lenye o Tela, olayioni lenye," 
1Chronicles7:26 o Ladan olayioni lenye o Amihud olayioni lenye, o Elishama, olayioni lenye" 
1Chronicles7:27 o Nuni olayioni lenye o Yoshua olayioni lenye. 
1Chronicles7:28 Ore apa emanyisho enye o masaa enye naa Betel o nkang'itie enyena kutiti, o enkalo oloo saen le Naaran, o enkalo o loo ntoluo le Geser o nkang'itie enyena kutiti o Shekem o nkang'itie enyena kutiti, o Aya o nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
1Chronicles7:29 Tenebo sii ilpolosien loo le Manase, o Betshean tenebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti, o Taanak o nkang'itie enyena kutiti, o Dor o nkang'itie enyena kutiti. Kunen apa neemanya ilayiok le Yosef ole Israel." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ilayiok le Asheri: Imna, o Ishfa o Ishfi, o Beria o enkanashe enye Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Ilayiok le Beria: Heber o Malkiel, laa ninche apa iloomenye le Birsait." 
1Chronicles7:32 Herber apa menye le Yafet, o Shomer, o Hatam, o enkanashe enye Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ilayiok le Yafet: Pasak, o Bimhal, o Ashfat. Kulo ninche ilayiok le Yafet." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ilayiok le Shemer olalashe lenye: Roga, o Yehuba, o Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ilayiok le Helem olalashe lenye: Sofa, o Imna, o Shelesh, o Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ilayiok le Sofa: Sua, o Harnefen o Shual, o Beri, o Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 o Beser, o Hod, Shama, o Shilsha, o Iltran, o Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ilayiok le Yater: Yefune o Pispa o Ara. 
1Chronicles7:39 Ilayiok le Ula: Ara, o Hamiel, o Risia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Ore kulo pooki naa iltung'ana le Asheri, ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, ilootonyorrayioki naa ilmurran magil, ilarikok loo lkituaak. Ore esiana enye anaa too iishoritin enye tenkaraki enkisiaayiare o larrabal, naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam o ile." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benchamen apa menye le Bela ilo kikau lenye, o Ashbel oliare, o Ahara oliokuni," 
1Chronicles8:2 o Noha oliong'uan, o Rafa ole imiet." 
1Chronicles8:3 Neeta apa Bela ilayiok: Adar, o Gera o Abihab," 
1Chronicles8:4 o Abishua, o Naaman, o Ahoa, o" 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, o Shefufan, o Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Kulo ninche ilayiok le Ehud (ninche apa ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye le lelo oomanya Geba, neewaki apa ninche eyararoto nepuo Mahat.)" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naaman o Ahija o Gera, aa taa Heglam, laa ninye apa menye le Usa o Ahihud." 
1Chronicles8:8 Neeta apa Shaharaim ilayiok te nkop e Moab ina kata eidipa ataarai nkituaak enyena, Hushim o Baara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Etoikio ninye enkitok enye Hodesh nkera: Yobab o Sibia, o Meshia, o Melkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 o Yeus, o Sakia, o Mimra. Kulo apa ilayiok lenyena, ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye." 
1Chronicles8:11 Eeta sii apa ilayiok ootoiuo Hushim enkitok enye: Abitub o Elpaal. 
1Chronicles8:12 O Eber, o Misham, o Shemed laa ninye apa otesheta Ono o Lod o nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
1Chronicles8:13 Ore Beria o Shema, (naa ninche apa ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, te lelo oomanya enkop e Yalon, lelo oomir iltung'ana le Gat)." 
1Chronicles8:14 O Ahio o Shashak o Yeremot. 
1Chronicles8:15 Ore Sebediah, o Arad o Eder," 
1Chronicles8:16 o Mikael, o Ishpa o Yoha naa ilayiok le Beria." 
1Chronicles8:17 Ore Sebadia o Meshulam, o Hiski, o Heber," 
1Chronicles8:18 o Ishmerai, o Islia o Yobab naa ilayiok le Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:19 Ore Yakim o Sikri, o Sabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 o Elienai o Siletia o Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:21 o Adaia, o Beraia o Shiurat naa ilayiok le Shimei." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ore Ishpan, o Eber o Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:23 o Abdon, o Sikri, o Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 o Hanania, o Elam, o Antotija," 
1Chronicles8:25 o Ifdeia o Penuel, naa ilayiok le Shashak." 
1Chronicles8:26 Ore Shamsherai, o sheharia, o Atalia, o" 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaareshia o Eliya o Sikri, naa ilayiok le Yeroham." 
1Chronicles8:28 Kulo apa ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto oo iishoritin enye, iltung'ana kituaak ninche. Nebik kulo te Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles8:29 Ore Yaiel menye le Gibeon nebik te Gibeon, ore enkarna e nkitok enye naa Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 Ore olkikau lenye naa: Abdon, nesuju Suur, o Kish, o Baal, o Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 o Gedor, o Ahio, o Seker," 
1Chronicles8:32 o Miklot, (ninye apa menye le Shimea) Etamanyishote sii apa kulo aatashare ilalashera lenye te Yerusalem, tenebo iltung'ana lenye." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neer apa menye le Kish, Kish menye le Saul, naa Saul menye le Yonatan, o Malkishua o Abinadab o Eshbaal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Ore apa olayioni le Yonatan naa Meribaal; naa Meribaal apa menye le Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Ilayiok le Mika: Pison o Melek, o Tarea o Ahas." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahas apa menye le Yehoada; naa Yehoada menye le Alemet, o Asmefet, o Simri. Simri apa menye le Mosa." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa apa menye le Binea; naa Rafa olayioni lenye, o Eliesa, o Asel olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles8:38 Eeta apa Asel ilayiok ile, naa kuna nkarn enye Asikarni o Bokero, o Ishmael, o Shearia, o Obadia, o Hanan. Ore kulo pooki naa ilayiok le Asel." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ilayiok le Eshek olalashe lenye: Ulam olkikau lenye, o Yeush laa ninye oliare, o Elifelet laa ninye oliokuni." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ore apa ilayiok le Ulam naa ilmorran magil, oata nkai, neeta nkera kumok, o nkera oo nkera enye, iip nabo o onom. Ore kulo pooki naa ile Benchamen." 
1Chronicles9:1 Eigeroki apa nkarn oo ltung'ana pooki le Israel anaa too iishoritin enye, neigeroki pooki te mbuku oo laiguanak le Israel. Neewaki apa iltung'ana le Yuda eyararoto te Babilon tenkaraki nemeisiligayu ninche." 
1Chronicles9:2 Ore apa iltung'ana le dukuya ootang'asa aamany iwuejitin tiatua nkanas enye naa ile Israel, o lapolosak, o le Lawi o laisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ore kulikae tung'ana le Yuda, na Benchamen o Efraim, o Manase nebik te Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai ole Amihud, olayioni le Omri, olayioni le Imri, olayioni le Bani, oing'uaa ilayiok le Peres olayioni le Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ore too le Shilo naa: Asaia ilo kikau, o layiok lenyena." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ore too layiok le Serak naa: Yeul o lalashera lenyena, iip ile o ntomoni naaudo." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ore loo le Benchamen naa: Salu olayioni le Meshulam ole Hodafia, olayioni le Hasenau," 
1Chronicles9:8 o Ibneaia olayioni le Yeroham, o Elak olayioni le Usi olayioni le Mikri, o Meshulam olayioni le Shefatia olayioni le Reul, olayioni le Ibnija," 
1Chronicles9:9 ore ilalashera lenyena te risioroto oo iiishoritin enye naa iip naaudo o onom o ile. Ore kulo pooki naa lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye. 
1Chronicles9:10 Ore too lapolosak naa Yedaia, o Yehoiarib o Yakin," 
1Chronicles9:11 o Asaria olayioni le Hilkia, olayioni le Meshulam, olayioni le Sadok, ilo aitasheikinoni kitok le nkaji e Nkai." 
1Chronicles9:12 O Pashur olayioni le Malkija o Maasai olayioni le Adiel, olayioni le Yehesera, olayioni le Meshulam, olayioni le Meshilamit, olayioni le Imer." 
1Chronicles9:13 Ore tenebo ilalashera lenye o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye naa enkalifu nabo o iip naapishana o ntomoni ile. Iltung'ana oata enkidimata oleng ninche, tenkaraki e nkisiaayiare e nkaji e Nkai." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ore too Lawi apa naa Shemaia olayioni le Hashub, olayioni le Asrikam, olayioni le Hasabia, loo layiok le Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 o Babakar, o Heresh, o Galal, o Matamia olayioni le Mika, olayioni le Mikiri, olayioni le Asaf." 
1Chronicles9:16 O Obadiah olayioni le Shemaia, olayioni le Galal, olayioni le Yedutum, o Berekia olayioni le Asa, olayioni le Elkana laa ninche apa oomanya nkang'itie kutiti oo Lnetofati."
