1Chronicles9:16 O Obadiah olayioni le Shemaia, olayioni le Galal, olayioni le Yedutum, o Berekia olayioni le Asa, olayioni le Elkana laa ninche apa oomanya nkang'itie kutiti oo Lnetofati." 
1Chronicles9:17 Ore apa ilarripok le kishomi naa, Shalum, o Akun, o Talmon o Ahinam o lalashera lenyena, (aa Shalum olkitok)." 
1Chronicles9:18 Netipikaki lelo metorripo kishomi o laiguanani te nkalo o loosaen. Kulo apa ninche ilarripok le kishomi te nkang oo lng'oborri oo le Lawi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Ore Shalum olayioni le Kore, olayioni le Ebisaf, olayioni le Kora o lalashera lenyena, o enkaji e menye, lelo le Kora, naa ninche apa ooitasheiki esiaai e nkisampuare, ninche ilaing'urak le wueji nejing'ieki olng'obor anaa apa enaitasheiki iloo menye ilo ng'obor lo Laitoriani, nerrip kishomi." 
1Chronicles9:20 Naa Finehas olayioni le Eliesa ninye apa oitasheiki ninche too nkolong'i naatulusoitie; netii Olaitoriani tenebo ninye. 
1Chronicles9:21 Sekaria olayioni le Meshelemia apa olaing'urani le kishomi eilo ng'obor le ntumo. 
1Chronicles9:22 Ore kulo pooki ootegeluaki metaa larripok loo njing'eta olng'obor, naa iip are o tomon oare. Neigeroki ninche too iishoritin tiatua nkang'itie enye. Ore Daudi o Samuel ilo aduaani nepik ninche esiaai enye enkaraki naisiligayu ninche." 
1Chronicles9:23 Neaku ninche o layiok lenye ooitasheiki nchomito naajing'ieki enkaji o Laitoriani, o metabaiki ena olong, ina aji olng'obor, aaku ilarripok." 
1Chronicles9:24 Ore apa lelo arripok loo nchomito netii imatuan ong'uan, oloosaen, o loontoluo, o kopikop o moikuape;" 
1Chronicles9:25 ore lelo alashera lenye apa ootii nkang'itie enye nepuonu apa too rishat oo nkolong'i naapishana anaake, pee eaku tenebo kulo," 
1Chronicles9:26 amu ore apa lelo aitasheikinok le kishomi ong'uan kituaak, laa ile Lawi, naa ninche ooitasheiki nkajijik o neeshumishoreki e nkaji e Nkai;" 
1Chronicles9:27 netoni aaman enkaji e Nkai amu ninche ilaing'urak, naa ninche oobol nchomito tadekenya anaake." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ore kulikae lenye neitasheiki imasaa e nkisiaayiare, amu keyieuni apa neikeni ninche teneitijing'uni o teneipang'ieki aaya." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ore kulikae lenye negeluni meitasheiki ilorikan o masaa pooki naasinya, o ina tapa napuyiapui, o enaisho oo sabibu, o eilata o enkorropil o sonkoyoni." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ore kulikae le lelo ayiok loo lapolosak neitushul isonkoyoni," 
1Chronicles9:31 ore Matitia obo loo Lawi, ilo kikau le Shalum le Kora, naa ninye oitasheiki enkitobirata oo mukateni dapashi." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ore sii kulikae alashera lenye le Kohat neitasheiki emukate e nkitoduaaroto, pee eitobir te pooki sabato." 
1Chronicles9:33 Naa kulo apa ilaranyak, ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye too le Lawi, oobikito too lgilat le nkaji e Nkai, lemetii ae kisiayiare, amu etii apa ninche esiaai enye dama o kewarie." 
1Chronicles9:34 Kulo apa ninche ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye too le Lawi, te risioroto oo iishoritin enye, lelo arikok apa oomanya Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Emanya apa Gibeon menye le Gibeon, oji Yeiel, ore enkarna e nkitok enye naa Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 ore olkikau lenye naa Abdon, nesuju Sur, o Kish o Baal, o Neer, o Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 o Gedor o Ahio, o Sakaria, o Miklot," 
1Chronicles9:38 naa Miklot apa menye le Shimeam, ore sii kulo nemanyisho aataaniki ilalashera lenye te Yerusalem, tenebo iltung'ana lenye." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neer apa menye le Kish naa Kish menye le Saul, naa Saul menye le Yonatan, o Malkishua, o Aminadab o Esbaal:" 
1Chronicles9:40 ore olayioni le Yonatan naa Meribaal; naa Meribaal menye le Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Ore ilayiok le Mika naa Pison, o Melek, o Taharea, o Ahas," 
1Chronicles9:42 naa Ahas apa menye le Yara, naa Yara menye le Alemet, o Asmafet, o Simri; naa Simri menye le Mosa." 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosa apa menye le Binea naa Refaia olayioni lenye, naa Eliesa olayioni lenye o Asiel olayioni lenye." 
1Chronicles9:44 Eeta apa Asel ilayiok ile naa kuna nkarn enye: Askrikam, o Bokeru, o Ishmael, o Shearia, o Obadia, o Hanan; kulo apa ninche ilayiok le Asel." 
1Chronicles10:1 Etaarare apa Ilfilisti Isiraeli neilanyisho iltung'ana le Israel te dukuya Ilfilisti, neari ninche meirragai etuata to ldoinyio le Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Neinepu Ilfilisti Saul o layiok lenyena; nesesekuan Ilfilisti Yonatan o Aminadab o Malkishua, lelo ayiok le Saul." 
1Chronicles10:3 Neirowuaju olarrabal ina olong tialo Saul, neinepu iltung'ana loo mbaa ninye; neng'or iltung'ana loo mbaa ninye nepik olbae." 
1Chronicles10:4 Nejoki Saul ilo anapani lenye loo masaa o larrabal, “Tushutu olalem lino, taremieki nanu matua, pee maapuonu ake kulo tung'ana lememurata aasul.” Kake etanya ilo anapani loo masaa enyena o larrabal; amu etureishe ninye oleng. Ore enkaraki ina neshutu Saul olalem lenye makewan nebatatakino." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ore ake pee edol ilo anapani loo masaa enyena o larrabal ajo etua Saul, nebatatakino sii ninye olalem lenye, neye." 
1Chronicles10:6 Neaku etua apa Saul; ninye o layiok lenyena pokira okuni neidak enkaji enye pooki tenebo. 
1Chronicles10:7 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana pooki le Israel apa ootii atua oerata aajo eilanyishe enjore, netua sii Saul o layiok lenyena, neing'uaa ninche nkang'itie enye, neisik; nepuonu Ilfilisti aamany ninche." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ore pee ekenyu, ina kata pee epuo Ilfilisti aapur lelo ootuata, netum ninche Saul o layiok lenyena eirrag to ldoinyio le Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Neitayu ninche imasaa enyena, neya endukuya enye o masaa enyena o larrabal, neiriwaa ilkiliku aaibulunye enkop pooki oo Lfilisti, pee eyae ilomon supati aayaki nkitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin, oltung'ana." 
1Chronicles10:10 Nepik ninche imasaa enyena o larrabal atua enkaji oo nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye, neeniki endukuya enye enkaji e nkai naji Dagon." 
1Chronicles10:11 Kake ore ake pee ening Yabesh-gilead pooki nena naaitaasa Ilfilisti Saul," 
1Chronicles10:12 nedumunye lelo lewa pooki magil, neya osesen le Saul o loo layiok lenyena neyau ninche Yabesh. Nenukaa ninche iloik lenye tentonata olchani onyaanyukie olng'aboli te Yabesh, neen ate aapukoo nkolong'i naapishana." 
1Chronicles10:13 Neaku etua apa Saul tenkaraki ina nemeisiligayu; meisilig apa ninye o Laitoriani amu eitu ninye eibung nkitanapat o Laitoriani nelo aikilikuanishore iloiriruani, eingoru eutaroto" 
1Chronicles10:14 neitu ninye eing'oru eutaroto o Laitoriani. Ore enkaraki ina etara Olaitoriani ninye metua, neibelekenyaki enkitoo Daudi olayioni le Yese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Neitoki iltung'ana pooki le Israel aaiturrurro tenebo te netii Daudi te Hebron, nejo ninche, “Ng'ura, kira iyiook oloito lino o sesen lino." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ore too nkolong'i naatulusoitie, o enapa kata doi ninye aa olaiguanani Saul, iyie apa orikoo Israel aipang'ie nintijing'u; nikitiaaka iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ‘Iyie oaku olairritani loo iltung'ana laainei Isiraeli, naa ilo aaku olkitok oitore iltung'ana laainei le Israel.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Neaku eetuo ilpayiani pooki le Israel enetii olaiguanani te Hebron; neitobir Daudi olning'o o ninche te Hebron te dukuya Olaitoriani. Nebukoki ninche Daudi eilata aaput metaa olaiguanani le Israel, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani oimunye Samuel." 
1Chronicles11:4 Ore Daudi, o ltung'ana pooki le Israel nepuo Yerusalem, aa taa Yebus, ine apa netii Ilyebusi lelo oomanya ina kop." 
1Chronicles11:5 Nejoki lelo oomanya Yebus Daudi, “Milotu iye ine.” Ore ake eyia neibung Daudi ina ang nagol e Sion, aa taa, enkanasa e Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Nejo Daudi, “Ore oltung'ani oiter arasaki Ilyebusi naa keaku olkitok neaku olarikoni le njore.” Ore olayioni le Seroya, neituruk alo, neaku etaa ninye olkitok." 
1Chronicles11:7 Nebik Daudi tiatua ina ang nasheta sunta, neaku etejoki apa ine enkanasa e Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Neshet ninye ina anasa aitamanaa ebaiki Milo neidip aitamanaa. Neitoki Yoab aram ineetebelate te nkanasa. 
1Chronicles11:9 Neponari Daudi aaku kitok oleng, amu etii apa Olaitoriani loo lororani tenebo ninye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Naa kulo apa ilkituaak le lelo tung'ana le Daudi magil, laa ninche ootijing'a ninye enkoriong te nkitoria enye, tenebo Israel pooki, pee eitaa ninche olaiguanani, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani oipirta Israel." 
1Chronicles11:11 Kulo lelo tung'ana le Daudi magil; Yashabean le Hakomon, ilo arikoni le lelo okuni, etara ninye te mpere iltung'ana iip uni near pooki metuata te nkata nabo." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ore oliare ninye te lelo pokira okuni magil naa, Eliesa olayioni le Dodo, le Ahoti." 
1Chronicles11:13 Etii apa ninye tenebo Daudi te Pas-damim ina kata apa pee eiturrurro Ilfilisti teine to larrabal. Etii apa ine enkurma nabore shairi neisik iltung'ana aailany Ilfilisti. 
1Chronicles11:14 Kake eitasho ninye te mpolos eina kurma neisulie, nesesekuan Ilfilisti, neitajeu Olaitoriani ninche te nkisulata kitok." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ore lelo okuni le lelo tung'ana pokira tomoni uni kituaak nedoyio aapuo endapidapoi ine netii Daudi te nkapune e Adulam, ina kata etii enjore oo Lfilisti ilng'oborri to erata le Refaim." 
1Chronicles11:16 Netii apa Daudi ina kata atua osempewuet; netii oltim loo Ilfilisti ina kata Betlehem. 
1Chronicles11:17 Nejo Daudi eeta enkure, “Woi naaji tenatum oltung'ani laayaki enkare naok to lchorro le Betlehem otii embata e kishomi!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ore lelo tung'ana okuni magil neim atua ilng'oborri loo Lfilisti; nepuo aaoku enkare teilo shorro le Betlehem otii embata e kishomi, neyaki Daudi. Kake eitu eok Daudi, etubukoko ninye Olaitoriani," 
1Chronicles11:19 nejo, “Maatalama nanu ena te dukuya Olaitoriani tenaa kaas ena. Kaok nanu osarge le nkishui le kulo lewa? Amu etipika ninche enkishui enye batisho pee eyau.” Kuna baa etaasa lelo tung'ana okuni magil." 
1Chronicles11:20 Ore apa Abishai, olalashe le Yoab laa olarikoni le tomoni uni. Near ninye te mpere iltung'ana iip uni metuata, nening'oyu enkarna enye tenebo lelo okuni." 
1Chronicles11:21 Ninye apa yioloti oleng te lelo tomoni uni, neaku olarikoni lenye, kake eitu etiu anaa lelo pokira okuni." 
1Chronicles11:22 Naa ore apa Benaia olayioni le Yehoida naa oltung'ani oning'o oleng te Kabseel olaasani loo mbaa sapuki; etara ninye iltung'ana oare yiolot le Moab metuata. Eshomo sii apa ajing'aki olng'atuny te ngumoto near metua teina olong apa naiputa enkirobi enkop. 
1Chronicles11:23 Etara sii apa metua Olmisiri, ilo tung'ani apa sapuk laa ntemat e nkaina imiet enkadoro, eeta ilo Misiri empere enye naba anaa embokishi; kake eshomo Benaia enetii ninye eeta eng'udi ake, newuapaa empere te nkaina e ilo Misiri near ninye metua te mpere enye makewan." 
1Chronicles11:24 Kuna baa etaasa Benaia olayioni le Yehoida, nening'oyu enkarna enye tenebo lelo tung'ana okuni magil." 
1Chronicles11:25 Ening'o apa ninye oleng te lelo tomoni uni, kake menyaanyukie lelo pokira okuni. Nepik Daudi ninye meitasheiki lelo arripok lenyena." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ore apa lelo tung'ana magil loo njorin naa Asahel, olalashe le Yoab, o Elhanan olayioni le Dodo le Betlehem," 
1Chronicles11:27 o Shumot le Harod, o Heles le Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 o Ira olayioni le Ilkedesh le Tekoa, o Abiesa le Anatot," 
1Chronicles11:29 o Sibekai, le Hushati, o Ilai le Ahoti," 
1Chronicles11:30 o Maharia le Netofa, o Heled olayioni le Baana le Netofam, o" 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai olayioni le Ribai le Gibea loo le Benchamen, o Benaia le Piraton," 
1Chronicles11:32 o Hurai too nchorroi e Gash, o Abiel le Abati," 
1Chronicles11:33 o Asmafet le Baharum, o Eliaba le Shaalbon," 
1Chronicles11:34 o Hashem, le Gison, o Yonatan olayioni le Shagee le Harari," 
1Chronicles11:35 o Ahinoam olayioni le Sakar le Harari, o Elifat olayioni le Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 o Hafer le Mecherat, o Ahija le Pelon" 
1Chronicles11:37 o Hesso le Karmel, o Naarai olayioni le Esbai," 
1Chronicles11:38 o Yoel olalashe le Natan, o Mibar olayioni le Hagri," 
1Chronicles11:39 o Selek le Amon, o Naharai le Beerot, ilo anapani loo masaa olarrabal e Yoab olayioni le Seruya." 
1Chronicles11:40 O ira le Itiri, o Gareb le Itiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 o Uria le Hiti, o Sabad olayioni le Ahalai," 
1Chronicles11:42 o Adina olayioni le Shisa le Ruben, olarikoni loo le Ruben, tomoni uni ootii tenebo ninye," 
1Chronicles11:43 o Hanan olayioni le Maaka o Yoshafat le Mitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 o Usia le Asheri, o Shama o Yerel ilayiok le Hotam le Arori," 
1Chronicles11:45 o Yediel olayioni le Shiuri o Yoha olalashe lenye, le Tisi," 
1Chronicles11:46 o Eliel le Mahafi, o Yeribai o Yoshafia, ilayiok le Elnaan, o Itam, o Itma le Moab," 
1Chronicles11:47 o Eliel, o Obed, o Yaasiel le Moraba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Kulo tung'ana apa ooetuo enetii Daudi te Siklag, ina kata metumoki ashomo oleng tenkaraki Saul olayioni le Kish; netii apa ninche tenebo lelo tung'ana magil ootareto ninye to larrabal." 
1Chronicles12:2 Iltung'ana oong'oroo mbaa ninche, naa keidim ninche aatang'oroi mbaa nenang'aa isoito te nkopito, te nkaina e tatene aashu te kedienye. Ile Benchamen ninche, lo lgilata le Saul." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ore apa olkitok lenye naa Ahiesa, nesujaki Yoash, naa ilayiok le Shemaa pokira, le Gibea; o Yesiel sii o Pelet ilayiok le Asmafet; o Beraka, o Yehu le Anatot," 
1Chronicles12:4 o Ishmai le Gibeon, ilo tung'ani magilani te lelo tomoni uni naa olarikoni le lelo tomoni uni; o Yeremia o Yohasiel, o Yohanan, o Yosabad le Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 o Elusai, o Yerimot, o Bealia, o Shemaria, o Shefatia, le Harufi," 
1Chronicles12:6 o Elkana, o Ishia, o Asarel, o Yoeser, o Yashobeam, le Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 o Yaela, o Sebadia, lelo ayiok le Yeroham le Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ore too le Gad nepuo enetii Daudi to sempewuet otii ong'ata ilmurran magil oogol, arriyiak too long'oi o remeta, ootiu nkomomi enye anaa iloo ng'atunyo, neneneng anaa ntarakueti too nchumat oo ldoinyio:" 
1Chronicles12:9 Esa laa ninye olkitok, o Obadia aa ninye oliare, o Eliab aa ninye oliokuni," 
1Chronicles12:10 o Mishamana aa ninye oliong'uan, o Yeremia aa ninye olayioni le imiet," 
1Chronicles12:11 o Atai aa ninye olayioni le ile, o Eliel, aa ninye oliopishana," 
1Chronicles12:12 o Yohanan aa ninye olayioni le isiet, o Elasabad aa ninye olioudo," 
1Chronicles12:13 o Yeremia naa ninye olayioni le tomon, o Makabania aa ninye olayioni le tomon oobo." 
1Chronicles12:14 Kulo tung'ana apa le Gad ninche ilkituaak le njore. Ore ilkuti naa shumata e iip nabo, ore ilkumok naa shumata enkalifu nabo." 
1Chronicles12:15 Kulo tung'ana apa lelo ootalang'a olkeju le Yordan to lapa le dukuya, ina kata edooyo enkare aim mpoorri, neisikie lelo pooki ootii ierat, te nkalo o loo saen o to loo ntoluo." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ore kulikae tung'ana le Benchamen o Yuda nepuonu osempewuet enetii Daudi. 
1Chronicles12:17 Nelo Daudi anang'are ninche nejoki ninche, “Tenaa iyetuo intae enatii nanu to sotua, pee kiretutu nanu, naa keibung'are oltau lai intae; kake tenaa ietuo pee kikaldaa too lmang'ati laainei, hoo tenemaata entorroni nataasa nchoo naa edol Enkai oo loo papa neitalaku te intae.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Nelotu enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata Amasia, ilo kitok le tomoni uni, nejo ninye: “Kira iyiook ilkulinono iyie Daudi; kitii tenebo iyie ara Yese! Eseriani, eseriani te iyie naa eseriani too laretok linono! Amu kiretu iyie Enkai ino.” Neng'amu Daudi ninche, neitaa ninche ilkituaak loo ltimito lenyena le njore." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ore kulikae tung'ana le Manase neisik aapuo enetii Daudi ina kata pee epuonu Ilfilisti olarrabal aarare Saul. (Ore ake eyia eitu ninye eretu Lfilisti, amu eiguanate ilaitoriak lenye nearaa ninye, ejo, “Ilukuny ang edung'ori, teneing'uaa ninye iyiook nerrinyokino olkitok lenye Saul.”)" 
1Chronicles12:20 Ore ake pee epuo Siklag nepuo kulo tung'ana le Manase enetii ninye: Adna, o Yodabad, o Yediel, o Mikael, o Yosabad, o Elihu o Siletai, o laiguanak le nkalifu te Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Etareto apa ninche Daudi tialo olturrur loo lapurrok, amu iltung'ana apa oopi ninche naa magil, naa ilarikok le njore." 
1Chronicles12:22 Amu ore apa too nkolong'i pooki naa kepuonu apa iltung'ana enetii Daudi, ometaba anaa neaku olorora kitok le njore, nebayu anaa enjore e Nkai." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ena ninye esiana e lelo timito le njore le Daudi, apa ooetuo enetii Daudi te Hebron, pee eibelekeny enkitoria e Saul aaibelekenyaki Daudi, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani." 
1Chronicles12:24 Ore lelo tung'ana le Yuda oata ilong'oi o remeta naa nkalifuni ile o iip isiet ilturrurri ootanapate. 
1Chronicles12:25 Ore too le Simeon, iltung'ana magil arriyiak to larrabal, naa nkalifuni naapishana o iip nabo." 
1Chronicles12:26 Ore too le Lawi naa nkalifuni ong'uan o iip ile," 
1Chronicles12:27 ore ilo kitok oji Yehoida le nkaji e Aron, ore tenebo ninye netii iltung'ana nkalifuni uni o iip naapishana." 
1Chronicles12:28 Ore Sadok, ilo barnoti magilani nepi netii tenebo ilarikok le njore tikitam oare lolmarei lenye." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ore too le Benchamen, ilo le ntalipa oo Saul, netii iltung'ana nkalifuni uni, ore ilkumok lenye neibung'are enkaji e Saul." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ore too le Efraim naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam o iip isiet, iltung'ana magil oopi, iltung'ana ooning'o too nkajijik oo loo menye." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ore olpisiai lo losho le Manase naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon oisiet, laa ninche apa etegeluaki pee epuonu aaitaa Daudi olaiguanani." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ore too le Isaakar, lelo tung'ana ang'eni ooyiolo nkatitin, ooyiolo enayieu Israel neas, naa iltung'ana kituaak iip are, tenebo lelo alashera lenye pooki ootii abori enkitoria enye." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ore too le Sebulon naa iltung'ana nkalifuni onom, ootanapate to larrabal neeta masaa pooki e njore o larrabal, pee eretu Daudi to ltau obo metii olng'ash." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ore too le Naftali naa ilkituaak le njore enkalifu nabo ootii tenebo iltung'ana nkalifuni tomoni uni oopishana oata ilong'oi o remeta. 
1Chronicles12:35 Ore too le Dan naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oisiet o iip ile iltung'ana ootanapate pee epuo olarrabal. 
1Chronicles12:36 Ore too le Asheri naa iltung'ana nkalifuni artam o iip ile arriyiak te pooki arrabal. 
1Chronicles12:37 Ore too le Ruben o le Gad o lpisiai lo losho le Manase ootii lido kekun olkeju le Yordan naa iltung'ana nkalifuni iip nabo o tikitam oota imasaa pooki olarrabal. 
1Chronicles12:38 Ore kulo tung'ana pooki lo larrabal, neishopo iruparen, nepuonu Hebron eeta eyieunoto pee eitaa Daudi olaiguanani le Israel pooki. Neijia sii apa etiu ilkulikae tung'ana le Israel, etumuta nabo pee eitaa Daudi olaiguanani." 
1Chronicles12:39 Netii apa ninche tenebo Daudi too nkolong'i uni, einos endaa neokisho, amu eitobirakitia apa ilalashera lenye ina." 
1Chronicles12:40 Ore sii lelo le latia enye ebaiki Isaakar o Sebulon o Naftali, nepuonu enapita ndaiki too sirkon, o too ntamesin o too nyumpui, o too lmong'i, neyau ndaiki kumok, o mukateni oo lng'abolo, o sabibu ooitoyioki, o enaisho oo sabibu o eilata, o lmong'i o lkerra, amu keetae apa enchipai te Israel." 
1Chronicles13:1 Neikilikuanishore apa Daudi ilarikok loo nkalifuni, o loo maa iip o pooki arikoni." 
1Chronicles13:2 Nejoki Daudi ina umata oo Siraeli, “Tenidolidolo intae eishiakino, naa tenaa eyieunoto o Olaitoriani Enkai ang, mairriwaki olkilikuai lelo alashera lang apa ootung'uaiyioki te nkop e Israel, o tenebo lelo apolosak ootii atua nena anas naata ndaat oo nchoo pee etum ninche aaetu tenebo enikitii." 
1Chronicles13:3 Naa manyaaki iyiook aayau osanduku le Nkai ene nikitii amu kitapalaitie apa too nkolong'i e Saul.” 
1Chronicles13:4 Nenyorraa ina umata pooki aas ina, amu eisidai apa ina bae too nkonyek o lorere." 
1Chronicles13:5 Neiturrur apa Daudi Israel pooki ebaiki Shihor e Misiri o meetu enejing'ieki Hamat, pee eyau osanduku le Nkai te Kiriat-Yearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Ore Daudi o ltung'ana le Israel pooki neilep aapuo Baala, aa taa Kiriat-Yearim natii Yuda, pee epuo aayau teine osanduku le Nkai, laa ninye eipotieki Olaitoriani oton te nchumata oo Lkerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Nenap ninche ilo sanduku le Nkai te ngarri ng'ejuk, aaitung'uaa enkaji e Aminadab, naa Usa, o Ahio apa ooreu ina garri." 
1Chronicles13:8 Ore Daudi o Siraeli pooki neshipa te dukuya Enkai te nkidimata enye pooki, to sinkolio, o to lwulul loo usin, o too nkai oo sinkolioitin, o too ndulen o too nkinantani dapashi o too ntarumpetani." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ore ake pee ebau olkurroto oidong'ishoreki le Kidon, neiteleiki Usa enkaina enye ilo sanduku, amu etarrorre apa ilo kiteng," 
1Chronicles13:10 neyupuyup engoro o Laitoriani tialo Usa; neosh ninye tenkaraki naitorioyie enkaina enye aibung ilo sanduku; neye ninye teine te dukuya Enkai. 
1Chronicles13:11 Negoro Daudi enkaraki natarasaka Olaitoriani Usa; ore ine wueji neaku keji Peres Usa; o taata. 
1Chronicles13:12 Neureyu Daudi Olaitoriani oleng ina olong, nejo ninye, “Kaji nanu aiko tenayau osanduku le Nkai enkaji ai?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Neaku eitu eya Daudi ilo sanduku ang, atua enkanasa e Daudi, kake eibakibakie aya enkaji e Obed-edom le Giti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Neton ilo sanduku le Nkai te nkaji e Obed-edom ilapaitin okuni, nemayian Olaitoriani enkaji e Obed-edom o pooki toki naata." 
1Chronicles14:1 Eirriwayie apa Hiram olaiguanani le Turo olkilikuai enetii Daudi, o ltarakua, o laguetak loo soito sii o laguetak loo mbaoi, pee eshetaki enkaji." 
1Chronicles14:2 Nemusu Daudi ajo eitasheyie Olaitoriani ninye metaa olaiguanani le Israel, ore enkitoria enye neisisi oleng te nkaraki iltung'ana lenyena Israel." 
1Chronicles14:3 Neyam Daudi nkituaak kumok te Yerusalem, netum Daudi ilayiok kumok o ntoyie." 
1Chronicles14:4 Kuna ninche nkarn o nena kera naanoto ninye te Yerusalem: Shamua, o Shobab, o Natan, o Solomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 o Ibar, o Elishua, o Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 o Noga, o Negef, o Yafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 o Elishama, o Bediada, o Elifelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ore ake pee ening Lfilisti etuputoki Daudi aaitaa olaiguanani te Israel pooki, nepuo Lfilisti pooki aaing'oru Daudi; nening Daudi ina nelo agilunore ninche." 
1Chronicles14:9 Neetuo apa Lfilisti nerasaki oerata le Refaim. 
1Chronicles14:10 Neikilikuanishore Daudi Olaitoriani ejo, “Kalo nanu aarare Lfilisti?” Nchoru iyie ninche apik atua enkaina ai? Newaliki Olaitoriani ninye ejo, “Ilepa shomo, amu kaishoru nanu ninche apik atua enkaina ino.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Neilep ninye alo Baalperasim, nemir Daudi ninche teine; nejo Daudi, “Etusulaka Enkai ilmang'ati laainei enkaina ai, anaa oloirrag le nkare.” Ore enkaraki ina naa keji enkarna eine wueji Baalperasim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Neing'uaa Lfilisti nkaitin enye teine neitanapisho Daudi pee epejori. 
1Chronicles14:13 Neigil ake Lfilisti aarasaki ilo erata. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ore ake pee eigil Daudi aikilikuanishore Enkai, nejoki Enkai ninye, “Milo iyie asujaa ninche; tamanai shomo pee ilo arasaki ninche te nkishaakinoto oo lkeek ooji Balsham." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ore ake pee ining oltoilo le nkiyukoto te nchumata oo lkeek le basasam, shomo taa tarasaki ninche; amu eshomo Enkai te dukuya iyie pee eosh enjore oo lfilisti.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Neas Daudi anaa enaitanapa Enkai, near ninche enjore oo Lfilisti ebaiki Gibeon ometabaiki Geser." 
1Chronicles14:17 Nelo olning'o le Daudi aibulaa too nkuapi pooki neyau Olaitoriani euriata enye shumata nkuapi pooki. 
1Chronicles15:1 Eteshetaka apa Daudi kewan nkajijik te nkanasa e Daudi; neitobir ewueji nepiki osanduku le Nkai, neunoki olng'obor shumata ninye." 
1Chronicles15:2 Nejo Daudi, “Meetae hoo oltung'ani obo meteleku Ilawi ake ooidim aatanap osanduku le Nkai, amu etegelua Olaitoriani ninche metanapa osanduku lo Laitoriani, neisiai ninye ntarasi.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Neiturrur Daudi Israel pooki te Yerusalem, pee etum aayau osanduku lo Laitoriani ewueji enye; ine apa neitobiraki." 
1Chronicles15:4 Neiturrur Daudi tenebo ilayiok le Aron o Lawi: 
1Chronicles15:5 loo layiok le Kora, o Uriel ilo kitok, tenebo lelo alashera lenyena iip o tikitam;" 
1Chronicles15:6 ore too layiok le Merari, naa Asaia ilo kitok, tenebo ilalashera lenyena iip are o tikitam." 
1Chronicles15:7 Ore too layiok le Gershom, naa Yoel ilo kitok tenebo ilalashera lenyena iip o tomoni uni;" 
1Chronicles15:8 ore too layiok le Elisafan, naa Shemaia ilo kitok, tenebo ilalashera lenyena iip are." 
1Chronicles15:9 Ore too layiok le Hebron naa Eliel ilo kitok, tenebo ilalashera lenyena ntomoni isiet." 
1Chronicles15:10 Ore too layiok le Usiel naa Aminadab ilo kitok tenebo ilalashera lenyena iip o tomon oare. 
1Chronicles15:11 Neitoki Daudi aipotu ilapolosak, Sadok o Abiata o Lawi, o Uriel, o Asaia, o Yoel, o Shemaia, o Eliel, o Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:12 nejoki ninche, “Irara intae ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye too Lawi, entisinya naa ate, intae o lalashera linyi, pee itumutumu aayau osanduku lo Laitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli, ine wueji naitobiraka nanu ninye." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ore enkaraki neitu apa intae inapinapa te dukuya, etagorokine iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang, enkaraki neitu iyiook kishilaa teina oitoi, nategeluaki.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Kaae neitisiny ate ilapolosak o Lawi, pee etum aayau osanduku lo Laitoriani Enkai e Israel." 
1Chronicles15:15 Nenapu Ilawi ilo sanduku le Nkai too loilila lenye too mbokishi, anaa apa enaitanapishe Musa te risioroto o rorei lo laitoriani." 
1Chronicles15:16 Neitoki sii Daudi aitanap lelo kituaak loo Lawi, pee egelu ilalashera lenye pee eranyisho nebuaku te oshoto oo nkinantani, too nkai oo sinkoliotin, o lwululi loo usin o nkinantani, neilepie oltoilo le ng'ida." 
1Chronicles15:17 Neaku etegelutua apa Ilawi Heman olayioni le Yoel o lalashera lenyena, Asaf olayioni le Berekia; o layiok le Merari, o lalashera lenye, o Etam olayioni le Kushaia;" 
1Chronicles15:18 ore tenebo ninche netii ilalashera lenye te ntukus e are e Sakaria o Yaasiel, o shemiramot, o Yehiel, o Uni, o Eliab o Benaia o Maaseia, o Matitia, o Elifele, o Mikneia, o larripok le kishomi, Obed-edom o Yaeil." 
1Chronicles15:19 Ore ilaranyak Heman o Asaf o Etan naa pee eosh aaitabuaku nkinantani dapashi o suyai," 
1Chronicles15:20 ore Sakaria, o Asiel, o Shemiramot, o Yehiel, o Uni, o Eliab o Maaseia, o Benaia, neosh ninche nkai oo sinkolioitin, te risioroto o ltoilo le Alamot;" 
1Chronicles15:21 kake ore Matitia o Elifele, o Mikneia, o Obed-edom o Yerel, o Asasia, nerikoo eoshoto oo lwululi loo usin, terisioroto oltoilo le Shemnit," 
1Chronicles15:22 o Kenania olarikoni lo sinkolio too Lawi, ninye orikoo osinkolio, amu keyiolo apa." 
1Chronicles15:23 Ore Berekia o Elkana neaku ilarripok le kutukaji ine netii osanduku. 
1Chronicles15:24 Ore Shebania o Yoshefat, o Natanel, o Amasai, o Sakaria, o Benaia, o Eliesa, lelo apolosak, ninche oosh ntarumpetani te dukuya ilo sanduku le Nkai. Ore sii Obed-edom o Yehia naa ninche ilarripok le kutukaji eine netii osanduku." 
1Chronicles15:25 Neaku eshomo apa Daudi o lpayiani, o lkituaak loo nkalifuni, aayau osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani te nkaji e Obed-edom te ng'ida." 
1Chronicles15:26 Naa ore amu etareto apa Olaitoriani lelo Lawi oonapita osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani, etopolosa ninche iloing'ok oopishana, o ilmeregeshi oopishana." 
1Chronicles15:27 Neishopito apa Daudi olkila le kitani sidai napiyaya, naa neijia sii eikununo lelo Lawi pooki oonapita osanduku, o laranyak, o Kenania ilo arikoni lo sinkolio o laranyak; neishop Daudi enkila olgoo e Kitani." 
1Chronicles15:28 Neaku eyautua iltung'ana le Israel pooki osanduku le lning'o lo Laitoriani too mbuakunot, o to ltoilo le mouo, o ntarumpetani, o nkinantani dapashi, nebuaku aaranyisho too nkai oo sinkoliotin, o lwululi loo usin." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ore egira ilo sanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani alotu enkanasa e Daudi, nerum Mikal entito e Saul Daudi te lusie, nedol olaiguanani Daudi eranyisho eipid aranyisho neng'ida; nemenaa ninye to ltau lenye." 
1Chronicles16:1 Neyau ninche aaitijing'u ilo sanduku le Nkai, nepik atua ilo ng'obor otuuno Daudi tenkaraki ninye; neitayu ninche olasar opejori, o lasar le seriani te dukuya Enkai." 
1Chronicles16:2 Ore ake pee eidip Daudi aitayu olasar oopejori o lasarri le seriani, nemayian olorere te nkarna Olaitoriani," 
1Chronicles16:3 neorioriki iltung'ana le Israel pooki, ilewa o ntomonok, neisho ake oltung'ani embelati e mukate, o ldung'oti le nkiring'o, o emukate oo lng'abolo." 
1Chronicles16:4 Neitoki sii agelu kulikae tung'ana loo Lawi pee eaku ilaisiaayiak te dukuya osanduku lo Laitoriani, pee edamu, neranyisho neisho enashe, neisis Olaitoriani Enkai e Israeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asaf apa olkitok lenye nesujaki Sakaria, o Yeiel, o Shemuramot, o Yehiel, o Matitia, o Eliab, o Benaia, o Obed-edom, o Yeiel, laa ninche oowosh nkai oo sinkoloitin, o lwululi loo usin; naa Asafowosh enkinanta oo saanini dapashi," 
1Chronicles16:6 ore Benaia o Yahasiel, lelo apolosak naa ninche oowosh ntarumpetani anaake te dukuya ilo sanduku lo sotua le Nkai." 
1Chronicles16:7 Ore apa teina olong, neng'as Daudi agelu metaranyi isinkolioitin le nkishooroto e nashe, nerany Asaf o lalashera lenyena." 
1Chronicles16:8 Enchoo Olaitoriani enashe, empoto enkarna enye, embalie nkiaasin enyena tiatua iloreren!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Entaranyaki ninye, entaranyaki ninye enkisisa entolimu isiaaitin enyena pooki e nking'asia!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Entaa enkarna enye kitok sinyati; nchoo iltauja le lelo ooing'oru Olaitoriani eng'ida! 
1Chronicles16:11 Eng'oru Olaitoriani o engolon enye, eng'oru ninye anaake!" 
1Chronicles16:12 Entadamu nena siaaitin enking'asia naataasa ninye, o enkiguana natudung'o ninye." 
1Chronicles16:13 Na ishoi e Abraham, ilo sinka lenye, lo ayiok le Yakobo, oogeluno." 
1Chronicles16:14 Olaitoriani Enkai ang ninye, etii nkiguanat enyena enkop pooki." 
1Chronicles16:15 Eibung ninye osotua lenye ntarasi; teilo rorei apa otejo ninye too iishoritin enkalifu nabo. 
1Chronicles16:16 Ilo sotua apa oitobira ninye o Abraham, ina kisiligata o lmumai tenkaraki Isaak," 
1Chronicles16:17 naitasheyie ninye metaa enkitanapata te Yakobo, metaa olning'o lo sotua te Israel," 
1Chronicles16:18 ejo, “Iyie nanu aisho enkop e Kanaan, erubata ina naaku enjung'ore ino.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Ore apa aa kuti ninche nemedupa ninche, naa ilomon," 
1Chronicles16:20 elimana ninche to losho o to losho, te nkitoria nabo ometabaiki likae orere," 
1Chronicles16:21 eitu ninye eisho likae tung'ani meibooki ninche enkop; neisikong ninye ilaiguanak tenkaraki ninche," 
1Chronicles16:22 ejo “Miseyie lelo lainei ootubukokoki eilata aaput, miinyal ake iloibonok laainei!”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Taranyaki Olaitoriani na kop pooki, mbalunye enjeunoto enye nkolong'i pooki." 
1Chronicles16:24 Mbalunye enkitoo e nkisisa enye too nkuapi pooki, o nena siaaitin enyena e nking'asia too loreren pooki!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Amu aikitok Olaitoriani, naa keisisi ninye oleng, naa keyanyituni ninye aaitulusoo too nkaitin pooki." 
1Chronicles16:26 Amu ore nkaitin pooki oo loreren naa nkitanyaanyukot, kake Olaitoriani oitobira keper." 
1Chronicles16:27 Etii enkanyit o enkitoo dukuya ninye; netii engolon o eng'ida emanyisho enye. 
1Chronicles16:28 Enchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo too lmareita pooki loo loreren, enchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo o engolon!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Enchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo naishiakino enkarna enye; eyau enkishoroto nipuonunu dukuya ninye! Enteserem Olaitoriani te seremata sinyati; 
1Chronicles16:30 nkirikirayu te dukuya ninye na kop pooki; ee, eitashe enkop pooki aitirring'a, nemeigusugusieki aekata." 
1Chronicles16:31 Nchoo eshipayu keper, neng'idayu enkop, naa nchoo ninche ejo tiatua iloshon, “Olaitoriani oitoreisho!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Nchoo eikurrukur enaiposha, o nena pooki naabore atua ninye, nchoo eosh enkop olkerempe o pooki toki natii atua." 
1Chronicles16:33 Neranyisho ilkeek le ntim te ng'ida, te dukuya Olaitoriani, amu kelotu ninye aiguanare enkop." 
1Chronicles16:34 Enchoo enashe Olaitoriani, amu aisupat ninye; amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi!" 
1Chronicles16:35 Tejo sii iyie: “Tokordu iyiook, Na Ai e njeunoto ang, ninturrurru iyiook nintajeu tiatua iloshon, pee kitum aaishoo enashe enkarna ino, niking'idare enkisisa ino." 
1Chronicles16:36 Meisisi Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ebaiki ntarasi o ntarasi!” Kaae nejo iltung'ana pooki, “Esai”, naa meisisi Olaitoriani." 
1Chronicles16:37 Neaku etung'uayie apa Daudi Asaf o lalashera lenyena teine te dukuya osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani, pee eisiaisho anaake te dukuya ilo sanduku anaa enayieuni te pooki olong," 
1Chronicles16:38 o Obed-edom o lalashera lenyena ntomoni ile oisiet; ina kata aa ilarripok le kishomi Obed-edom, olayioni le Yehutum o Hosa naa larripok le kishomi." 
1Chronicles16:39 Neing'uaa sii Sadok ilo apolosani o lalashera lenyena lelo apolosak te dukuya ilo ng'obor lo Laitoriani, teine wueji neika te Gibeon." 
1Chronicles16:40 Pee eitaki Olaitoriani ilasarri oopejori anaake tadekenya o teipa, te risioroto e nena pooki naaigeroki te nkitanapata o Laitoriani naitanapa ninye Israel." 
1Chronicles16:41 Ore tenebo ninye netii Heman o Yedutum, o lelo kulikae ootegeluaki neipoti nkarn meishoo enashe o Laitoriani, amu ebik enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi." 
1Chronicles16:42 Neeta apa Heman o Yedutum ntarumpetani o nkinantani dapashi tenkaraki osinkolio, o ntokitin naaranyieki osinkolio osinya. Netegeluaki apa ilayiok le Yedutum meitasheiki kishomi." 
1Chronicles16:43 Neitoki iltung'ana pooki aarrinyo nelo ake oltung'ani enkaji enye nelo Daudi pee emayian olmarei lenye. 
1Chronicles17:1 Ore apa etobiko Daudi te nkaji enye, nejoki ninye Natan ilo oiboni le Nkai, “Ng'ura, abikito nanu tiatua enkaji oo ltarakua, kake ore osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani naa olng'obor etii.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nejoki Natan Daudi, “Taasa ina pooki natii atua oltau lino, amu etii Olaitoriani tenebo iyie.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Kake ore ina kewarie ake, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Natan, ejo," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Shomo tiaaki osinka lai Daudi, nji ejo Olaitoriani: ‘Mikishetaki iyie enkaji nabikie." 
1Chronicles17:5 Amu eitu aekata nanu abik te nkaji ebaiki apa ina olong natorikoyie Isirael ometabaiki ena olong, kake ashomo nanu arukoo ilng'oborri, naimaa emanyisho o emanyisho." 
1Chronicles17:6 Ore too wuejitin pooki nashomo nanu tenebo Isiraeli pooki, neitu airo ororei te pooki tung'ani le lelo arishak le Israel, apa laitanapa pee eirrita iltung'ana laainei, ajo, Kainyoo pee eitu intae kishetakiki enkaji oo ltarakua?’”" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Ore naa taata nji shomo tiaaki osinka lai Daudi, Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, aaitayio apa nanu te nkirrita oo ntare, te sujata oo nkerra, pee itum ataa olkitok loo ltung'ana laainei Israel;" 
1Chronicles17:8 natii nanu tenebo iyie te pooki wueji nishomo, naiwuang'ie nanu ilmang'ati linono te dukuya iyie naa kaaitobiraki nanu iyie enkarna naikununo anaa nkarn e lelo kituaak le nkop." 
1Chronicles17:9 Naa kagelu nanu ewueji tenkaraki iltung'ana laainei le Isirael, naun nanu ninche, pee etum ninche aatobik te wueji enye maate, nemeitokini aekata aaitanyamal; nemeitoki aekata ilarruok aaisilisil ninche anaa apa." 
1Chronicles17:10 Ebaiki ina kata apa nategelua ilarishak meitoria iltung'ana laainei le Isirael. Naa kamir nanu ilmang'ati linyi pooki. Ore ake si aaibalakinye nanu iyie nchere eikishetaki Olaitoriani enkaji. 
1Chronicles17:11 Teneiputayu inkolong'i inono pee irura aye anaa iloo papaai lino, naa kadumu nanu eishoi ino te siadi iyie, obo loo layiok linono inot, naitubulaa nanu enkitoria enye." 
1Chronicles17:12 Kaalo ninye ashetaki nanu enkaji, naa kaitubulaa nanu olorika lenye le nkitoo ntarasi." 
1Chronicles17:13 Kaaku nanu menye lenye neaku ninye enkerai ai. Maiwuang'ie nanu ina nyorrata ai nauno te ninye, anaa apa enaiwuang'ie teilo otii te dukuya iyie." 
1Chronicles17:14 Kake kaitasheyie nanu ninye tiatua enkaji o te nkitoria ai ntarasi ore olorika lenye le nkitoo enye neitubulari ntarasi. ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Ore te risioroto e kulo rorei pooki o te risioroto ena duata pooki, neirorie Natan Daudi." 
1Chronicles17:16 Neitoki olaiguanani Daudi alo atua aji, neton te dukuya Olaitoriani, nejo, “Kara nanu ng'ae iyie Olaitoriani Enkai, naa kainyoo enkaji ai, eji metaa kiyaua iyie naba nji?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Naa embae kiti ena too nkonyek inono, iyie Enkai; niroro sii aimaki enkaji osinka lino te nkata sapuk nalotu, nikitoduaa iyie nanu iishoritin naapuonu, Olaitoriani Enkai!" 
1Chronicles17:18 Naa kainyoo eitoki Daudi ajo tialo iyie inchoo meyanyituni osinka lino? Amu iyiolo iyie osinka lino. 
1Chronicles17:19 Ore tenkaraki osinka lino, iyie Olaitoriani, o terisioroto oltau lino makewan, iyaua iyie ena kitoo pooki, nchoo metayiolouni kuna baa pooki sapuki." 
1Chronicles17:20 Meetae likae laaijo iyie, iyie Olaitoriani, nemeetae ae Ai neme iyie, te risioroto e nena pooki nikitoning'o too nkiyiaa ang." 
1Chronicles17:21 Kalo likae osho te nkop onyaanyukie iltung'ana linono Israel, laa ninche eshomo Enkai akordu pee eaku iltung'ana lenyena, pee intobiraki kewan enkarna too mbaa sapuki naaitureisho, aaraa aipang'ie iloshon te dukuya iltung'ana linono, apa litokordua ninche aitayu te Misiri." 
1Chronicles17:22 Nintaa iyie iltung'ana linono te Israel metaa iltung'ana linono ntarasi, niaku iyie, iyie Olaitoriani Enkai enye." 
1Chronicles17:23 Ore naa taata iyie Olaitoriani nchoo ilo rorei liroro oipirta osinka lino, neipirta enkaji enye meitubulari ntarasi, niaas anaa eniroro;" 
1Chronicles17:24 neitasheyieki enkarna ino neibalieki ntarasi, ejo, ‘Olaitoriani loo lororani Enkai e Israel, ninye Enkai oo Siraeli.’ Ore enkaji osinka lino Daudi naa keitasheyieki te dukuya iyie." 
1Chronicles17:25 Amu iyie, Enkai ai, naitalio to sinka lino nchere ishetaki ninye Enkaji, ore enkaraki ina etagolo osinka lino oshoke pee eomon te dukuya iyie." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ore naa taata iyie Olaitoriani, iyie Enkai, nisiligishore iyie ena bae sidai tialo osinka lino." 
1Chronicles17:27 Ore naa taata nchoo kintiship iyie pee imayian enkaji o sinka lino, pee elo ninye dukuya anaake ntarasi te dukuya iyie; amu ore entoki nitamayiana iyie Olaitoriani nemayiana ntarasi.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Ore tesiadi e nkiti rishata neitoki Daudi arasaki Ilfilisti nemir ninche. Ewa ninye aoru ninche enkanasa e Gaat o nkang'itie naataaniki kutiti neoru Ilfilisti. 
1Chronicles18:2 Etimira sii apa Ilmoabu ootaa isinkan lenyena nelak kodi. 
1Chronicles18:3 Neitoki Daudi arasaki olaiguanani Hadadesa le nkop e Siria naji Soba, natii embata enkop e Hamat, amu keyieu apa Hadadesa neing'oru pee eitore ina kop aimu te nkalo e shumata e Frati." 
1Chronicles18:4 Neibung Daudi ingarrin enyena oo mbartan enkalifu nabo, o lakedok loo mbartan nkalifuni naapishana, o sikarini nkalifuni tikitam oopuo too nkejek. Nemut Daudi mbartan pooki oo ngarrin, neing'uaa ake inaaidip ngarrin iip nabo." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ore ake pee eirriu Isiria le Dameski enjore nalotu aretu olaiguanani Hadadesa olaiguanani le Soba, neibung Daudi ina jore near metuata iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oare le Siria," 
1Chronicles18:6 neitoki airriwaa iltimito le njore ilpolosien lenye, neaku ile Siria isinkan le Daudi neitaiki ninye kodi. Neisho Olaitoriani Daudi meisula te pooki wueji." 
1Chronicles18:7 Neibung Daudi nena long'oi e sahabu apa naanapita ilkituaak le Hadadesa, neya ninche Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles18:8 Enyaaka sii aya osuyai kitok le Tibha o te Kun, nena anas apa naaitore Hadadesa (ilo suyai apa enyaaka Solomon aasishore te siadi aitayunye ilmotioo, o ng'apeta, o masaa o suyai.)" 
1Chronicles18:9 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani Toi le Hamat nchere etimira Daudi enjore pooki e Hadadesa, ilo aiguanani le Soba," 
1Chronicles18:10 neirriwaa olayioni lenye Hodoram meshomo enetii Daudi, pee eiroroki ninye, neisho ninye enchunet, enkaraki natimira Hadadesa; amu kesesh apa egilunore Hadadesa Toi to larrabal. Neirriwaki ninye mpukunot pooki oo masaa e sahabu, o enkosholai, ono suyai." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ore ake kuna pooki neitisinyaki Daudi Olaitoriani, tenebo ina osholai o sahabu apa nayaua too loshon, o te Edom, o Moab o too Lamoni, o too Lfilisti o too Lmaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Ore Abishai olayioni le Seruya near metuata nkalifuni tomon o isiet oo le Edom, to erata le munyan." 
1Chronicles18:13 Nepik ninye iltimito le njore Edom; neaku lelo pooki le Edom isinkan le Daudi. Neisho Olaitoriani Daudi enkisulata te pooki wueji neshomo. 
1Chronicles18:14 Neaku eitoreisho Daudi te Israel pooki, neitoreisho ninye too sipat o too nkiririkinot too ltung'ana lenyena pooki." 
1Chronicles18:15 Naa Yoab olayioni le Seruya apa olkitok le njore, naa Yehoshafat olayioni le Ahilud olasirani;" 
1Chronicles18:16 naa Sadok olayioni le Ahitab o Ahimelek olayioni le Abiata ilapolosak; naa Shafsha olaigeroni; 
1Chronicles18:17 naa Benaia olayioni le Yehoiada oitasheiki Ilkeriti o lpeleti. Ore ilayiok le Daudi naa ninche ilkituaak te nkisiayiare o laiguanani. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ore apa tesiadi ena, neye Nahash olaiguanani loo Lamori, neitoreisho olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
1Chronicles19:2 Nejo Daudi, “Kaitaas nanu ine supatisho Hanan olayioni le Nahash, amu aaitaasa apa menye ine supatisho.” Neaku eirriwayie Daudi ilkiliku pee epuoi aaitagol ninye tenkaraki keeya e menye. Nepuonu isinkan le Daudi enetii Hanan teina kop oo Lamori, pee eitagol ninye," 
1Chronicles19:3 kake etiaakitia lelo kituaak loo Lamori Hanan, “Ijo iyie eji ore amu kirriwaka Daudi ilarumak naa papaai lino eyanyit? Aime keetuo isinkan lenyena enitii pee ejurrisho, neibelekeny enkop aaikeern?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Neaku etang'amua Hanan isinkan le Daudi, nebarn ninche, nedung'oo nkilani enye aitoritie too mpolosi, neisho ninche meshomo;" 
1Chronicles19:5 nepuo ninche. Ore ake pee elikini Daudi kulo tung'ana, neirriwaa iltung'ana metanang'are ninche, amu etipikaki apa lelo tung'ana esulare oleng. Nejo olaiguanani, Entobik te Yeriko ometaba anaa nebulu ilmunyo linyi nintokiki aapuonu.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Ore ake pee edol Ilamori aajo eitagoro Daudi, neirriwaa Hanan ntalantani enkalifu nabo e nkosholai pee eisilenu ngarrin oo mbartan, o lakedok loo mbartan te Mesopotamia, tenetii Aramaaka, o te Soba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Neisilenu ninche ngarrin oo mbartan nkalifuni tomoni uni oare, o laiguanani le Maaka tenebo enjore enye, apa naewuo aun ilng'oborri te Madeba. Neipotuni Ilamori metupuku too nkanas aapuonu olarrabal." 
1Chronicles19:8 Ore ake pee ening Daudi ina, neirriwaa enjore pooki oo ltung'ana magil." 
1Chronicles19:9 Nepuonu Ilamori neluakino olarrabal etanapate te nejing'ieki enkanasa, ore lelo aiguanak apa ooetuo netii ninche iwuejitin enye maate te wueji neisiaja." 
1Chronicles19:10 Ore ake pee edol Yoab ajo eimua ninye olarrabal te dukuya o te siadi, negelu iltung'ana arriyiak le Israel, neitobiraki olarrabal too le Siria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Ore kulikae tung'ana lenyena nepik abori erikoto e Abishai olalashe lenye, neitoluakini ninche metaarare Ilamoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Nejo ninye, “Tenaa kegol Siria oleng te nanu nikipuonunu aaretu nanu; naa te negol Ilamori oleng te intae, naa karetu intae." 
1Chronicles19:13 Entagoluoto naa mataa lewa to losho lang, o nkanas e Nkai ang; naa metaasa Olaitoriani ina naishiakino te ninye.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Nepuonu Yoab o lelo tung'ana apa ootii tenebo ninye aaigutaki ile Siria to larrabal; neilanyisho ninche te dukuya ninye. 
1Chronicles19:15 Ore ake pee edol Ilamoni aajo eilanyishote Isiria, neilanyisho sii ninche te dukuya Abishai, ilo alashe le Yoab, nepuo aajing atua enkanasa. Nelo Yoab Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Kake ore ake pee edol Isiria aajo etimira Isiraeli ninche, neirriwaa ilkiliku meyauni lelo Siria apa ootii te idia alo olkeju le Frati, tenebo Shofak le njore e Hadadesa te dukuya ninche." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ore ake pee elikini Daudi, neiturrur Isiraeli pooki tenebo, nelang olkeju le Yordan, nepuonu enetii ninche, neitoloku iltimito lenyena aipirakinye ninche. Ore ake pee eitobir Daudi olarrabal tenkaraki Siria, nearare ninche ninye." 
1Chronicles19:18 Neilanyisho Isiria te dukuya Isiraeli, near Daudi to lalem iltung'ana le Siria nkalifuni naapishana e lelo ooreu ngarrin oo mbartan, o nkalifuni artam oo loopuo too nkejek near sii metua Shofak ilo kitok le njore." 
1Chronicles19:19 Ore ake pee edol isinkan le Hadadesa nchere etimira Isiraeli ninche, neitayu osotua o Daudi, neaku ilaisiaayiak lenyena. Neaku meyieu Isiria neigil aaretu Ilamoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ore te nkiterunoto eilo ari, ina kata napuoyie ilaiguanak olarrabal, nerikoo Yoab enjore, nerasaki enkop oo Lamori, nelotu amuatu Aman enkang e Raba, neibelekeny ina ang agil." 
1Chronicles20:2 Neitayu Daudi enkopiyia e nkitoo te ndukuya o laiguanani lenye; nedol ajo entalanta e sahabu enkiroishi enye; naa osoit ogol enkinyiang'a, nepiki endukuya e Daudi. Neitoki ninye aya nena yarunot eina anasa ntokitin kumok." 
1Chronicles20:3 Neitoki ayau iltung'ana apa ootii atua ina anasa, nepik ninche esiaai oo nkaik, too musumenoni o sekenke o ntoluo. Neiko Daudi neijia too nkanas pooki oo Lamori. Nerrinyo Daudi o ltung'ana pooki aapuo Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ore tesiadi ena nedumunye olarrabal o Lfilisti, te Gasa, near Sebekai le Hushati Sipai metua, laa oleina ishoi apa oo ltung'ana sapuki; nemiri Lfilisti." 
1Chronicles20:5 Neitoki apuku olarrabal loo Lfilisti; near Elhanan olalashe Yair Lahami metua olalashe le Goliat le Giti, ilo apa oba enchata enye empere anaa embokishi sapuk." 
1Chronicles20:6 Neitoki ake apuku olarrabal te Gat, teine netii oltung'ani sapuk oleng neado, neeta ilkimojik ile loo nkaik, o lkimojik ile loo nkejek te pooki aina o te pooki keju, neaku tikitam oong'uan ilkimojik lenyena pooki. Naa oleishoi sii ninye e lelo tung'ana sapuki." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ore ake pee emor Isiraeli, near Yonatan olayioni le Shimea, to lelem ninye metua. Olalashe le Daudi apa Shimea." 
1Chronicles20:8 Ile ishoi apa oo ltung'ana sapuki kulo tung'ana ootii Gat, nebatata ninche aaye te nkaina e Daudi o too nkaik oo sinkan, lenyena." 
1Chronicles21:1 Eitasho apa oloirirua agilunore Isirael, neputu Daudi meikena Isiraeli." 
1Chronicles21:2 Neaku etiaaka Daudi Yoab o larikok le njore, “Shomo nkena Isiraeli, ebaiki Beersheba o metabaiki Dan, nikiyaki nanu oratioti, pee atum atayiolo esiana enye.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Kake etiaaka Yoab, “Metoponai Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena te maaip terisioroto enkumoi enye. Amaa ninche pooki olkitok lai olaiguanani, aime isinkan linono pooki? Kainyoo naa pee eyieu olkitok lai ena? Kainyoo pee eyaki ninye ena kitarruorroto Israel?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kake etirrisha ororei lo laiguanani tialo Yoab, neaku eshomo Yoab atua Israel pooki, nerrinyunye Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Neisho Yoab esiana oo ltung'ana Daudi. Ore tiatua Israel pooki netii iltung'ana milion nabo o nkalifuni iip nabo oata ilalema, Ore te Yuda naa nkalifuni iip ong'uan o ntomoni naapishana iltung'ana oata ilalema." 
1Chronicles21:6 Kake eitu eikenaki Lawi o Benchamen teina kikena, amu eitagoro apa irorei lo laiguanani Yoab." 
1Chronicles21:7 Kake eitu apa eitiship ena bae Olaitoriani, neosh ninye Israel." 
1Chronicles21:8 Nejoki Daudi Enkai, Ataasa nanu eng'oki oleng ataasa ena bae. Kake ore naa taata aatoomono nanu iyie, iwuang'ie entorroni o sinka lino; amu ataasa nanu ena te modai.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Neirorie Olaitoriani Gad, ilo aduani le Daudi ejo," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Shomo tiaaki Daudi, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, mbaa uni aaisho nanu iyie; tegelu nabo te ninche, pee aatum nanu aishoo iyie.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Nelotu Gad enetii Daudi nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Iwa ina niyieu:" 
1Chronicles21:12 Ilarin okuni lo lameyu, aashu ilapaitin okuni likintanyamal ilmang'ati linono, nikinepu olalem loo lmang'ati linono; arashu nkolong'i uni o lalem lo Laitoriani, olmeitai le nkop, neidaikie olmalaika lo Laitoriani tiatua enkop e Israel pooki.’ Toduta ewalata nayaki ilo laairriwua.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Neitoki Daudi ajoki Gad, “Atii nanu atua osina sapuk; nchooki nanu matabatatakinoyu enkaina o Laitoriani, amu aisapuk olng'ur lenye oleng, kake mincho nanu abatatakino enkaina e tung'ani.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Neaku eirriwaka Olaitoriani olmeitai shumata Isiraeli; neye teine iltung'ana le Israel nkalifuni ntomoni naapishana. 
1Chronicles21:15 Neirriwaa olmalaika Yerusalem pee eidakie ninye; kake ore etaa keidaikie, neing'or Olaitoriani neirridu ina torroni; nejoki ninye ilo malaika le nkidaata, “Eidip ina; torrinyo taata enkaina ino.” Neitashe apa ilo malaika lo Laitoriani tembata e wuejineiutuutishoreki e Onan le Yebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Nedumu Daudi nkonyek enyena nedol olmalaika lo Laitoriani eitashe te rishata e nkop o shumata, neeta te nkaina enye olalem otushutuaki te nchashur neitoriokini shumata Yerusalem. Neishop Daudi olpayiani ilkuniyiani, nebatata too nkomomi enye." 
1Chronicles21:17 Nejoki Daudi Enkai, “Aime nanu doi oitanapishe meikeni olorere? Nanu otaasa eng'oki naas ena bae torrono. Kake amaa kuna kerra, kaa ninche etaasa? Nchoo naa enkaina ino Olaitoriani aatoomono, Olaitoriani Enkai ai, maatara nanu o enkaji e papaai lai; kake mincho olmeitai elotu shumata iltung'ana linono.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Neitoki ilo malaika le Nkai aitanap Gad metiaki Daudi nchere, pee elo aitobiraki olasar Olaitoriani te wueji neiutuutishoreki, e onan le Yebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Nelo Daudi teilo rorei le Gad oiroro te nkarna o Laitoriani. 
1Chronicles21:20 Neidong'ito apa Onan enkano; neibelekenya nedol olmalaika ore lelo ayiok lenyena pokira oong'uan neisudori. 
1Chronicles21:21 Ore elotu Daudi enetii Onan neing'orisho Onan nedol Daudi, nelo ninye teilo kurroto oiutuutishoreki neirrugo aitabaiki enkomom enye enkop, aisho Daudi enkanyit." 
1Chronicles21:22 Nejoki Daudi Onan, “Nchooki nanu olkurroto oiutuutishoreki pee ashetie olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani timirakaki nanu te nkinyiang'a nalulung'a, pee etumi aaiwuang'ie olmeitai too ltung'ana.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Neitoki Onan ajoki Daudi, “Iwa iyie; naa nchoo olkitok lai olaiguanani eas ina naishiakino te ninye, ng'ura kaishoru nanu ilmong'i pee eitaae olasar opejori, ore kuna keek naaidong'ishoreki neaku ilkeek, neaku enkano olasar le ntapa. Kaishoru nanu pooki.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Kake etiaaka olaiguanani Daudi Onan, “A'a, kake kainyiang'u nanu te nkinyiang'a nalulung'a; mayaki nanu Olaitoriani entoki nara enino, anaa aitayu ilasarri oopejori leitu ainyiang'u.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Neaku etalaaka Daudi Onan shekeli iip ile e sahabu te nkiroishi, tenkaraki ine wueji." 
1Chronicles21:26 Neshetu Daudi teine olperere lo lasar, lo Laitoriani, neitarasaa olasar opejori, o lasar le seriani, neipot enkarna o Laitoriani, newaliki Olaitoriani ninye te nkima, naing'uaa keper naewuo shumata ilo perere lo lasar opejori." 
1Chronicles21:27 Neitanap Olaitoriani ilo malaika, nerrinyoki olalem atua enchashur." 
1Chronicles21:28 Ore teina kata, ore ake pee edol Daudi ajo etawalikia Olaitoriani ninye teilo kurroto oiutuutishoreki le Onan loo Lyebusi, neitobir ninye ilasarri lenyena teine." 
1Chronicles21:29 Amu ore apa ilo ng'obor le manyisho Olaitoriani, oitobira Musa tiong'ota, o ilo perere lo lasar opejori netii apa ina kata ewueji neika te Gibeon;" 
1Chronicles21:30 kake meidim apa Daudi ashomo aitasho te dukuya ninye aikilikuanishore Enkai, amu keure apa olalem leilo malaika lo Laitoriani." 
1Chronicles22:1 Neitoki Daudi ajo, “Ene nelo aaku enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai, naa ene nelo aaku olperere lo lasar opejori te Israel.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Neitanapisho Daudi pee eiturrurri tenebo iltung'ana pooki omon ootii atua enkop e Israel, nepik iladung'ok loo soito, pee eitobir isoito oogueta ooshetieki enkaji e Nkai." 
1Chronicles22:3 Neishoru sii Daudi isekenke kumok naaitayunyeki ilmushumaani loo nkutukie oo nkajijik o nkikeneta, tenebo osuyai kitok oleng lemeimakinoyu enkiroishi." 
1Chronicles22:4 O mbaoi o oltarakuai nemeikenayu; amu eyautua iltung'ana le Sidon, o le Tiro mbaoi kumok o ltarakuai aayaki Daudi." 
1Chronicles22:5 Amu etejo apa Daudi, “Ore Solomon olayioni lai, naa koti, nemeyiolo toki, naa ore ena aji nashetakini Olaitoriani naa aisidai oleng, nening'o neeta enkitoo te nkop pooki; kaitobir nanu mbaa olchetei leina aji.” Neaku eishorua Daudi ntokitin kumok e nchetare eton eitu eye." 
1Chronicles22:6 Neitoki aipotu Solomon ilo ayioni lenye, neitanap metesheta enkaji Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel." 
1Chronicles22:7 Nejoki Daudi Solomon, “Enkerai ai, aata apa to ltau lai pee ashetu enkaji te nkarna Olaitoriani Enkai, ai." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kake eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii, ejo, ‘Mbukoyie iyie osarge sapuk nitijing'a ilarrabali kumok sapuki; mishetu iyie enkaji tenkaraki enkarna ai, amu imbukoyie iyie osarge sapuk te dukuya nanu o tioriong enkop." 
1Chronicles22:9 Ng'ura, eikiikini iyie enkayioni, naa keaku ninye oltung'ani le seriani. Kaisho nanu ninye eseriani too lmang'ati lenyena pooki oomanita; amu keaku keji enkarna enye Solomon, naa kaishoru nanu eseriani o enkitirring'a te Israel too nkolong'i enyena." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ninye olo ashet enkaji tenkaraki enkarna ai. Keaku ninye enkerai ai naaku nanu menye lenye, naa kaitasheyie nanu olorika lenye le nkitoo tiatua Israel ntarasi.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Ore naa taata enkerai ai, metaa Olaitoriani tenebo iyie, pee itum atudupoyu te nchetata enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai ino, anaa apa enairoro ninye tialo iyie." 
1Chronicles22:12 Mikinchoo ake ninye Olaitoriani eng'eno o ening'unoto, peyie tinikincho ninye enkitanapata naipirta Isiraeli, nitum aibung'a enkitanapata o Laitoriani Enkai ino." 
1Chronicles22:13 Nitum taa atudupoyu, tenijurru, nimbung nena kikoot o nkiguanat naaitanapa Olaitoriani Musa tenkaraki Israeli. Ntagoluoyu, nintagol oshoke. Miureishoyu; mipalari." 
1Chronicles22:14 Ore te mion kitok oleng, naishorua nanu tenkaraki enkaji o Laitoriani ntalantani nkalifuni iip nabo e sahabu, o ntalantani milion nabo e nkosholai o suyai, o esekenkei nemetemayu, amu aikumok apa oleng. Aishorua sii mbaoi o soito. Ore te kuna nemeeta nchere pee miponaa." 
1Chronicles22:15 Iyata isinkan kumok oleng; iladung'ok loo soito, o lashetak loo soito, o laguetak loo mbaoi, o mpukunot pooki oo laisiaayiak arriyiak lemeikenayu. Iltung'ana arriyiak te siaai," 
1Chronicles22:16 e sahabu, o enkosholai, o suyai, o sekenke. Entudumunye entaasisho! Metaa Olaitoriani tenebo intae!”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Eitanapa sii apa Daudi ilarikok pooki le Israel pee eretu Solomon, ilo ayioni lenye ejo," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Aimetii Olaitoriani Enkai inyi tenebo intae? Naa keitu ninye eisho intae eseriani te pooki shoto? Amu eyaua ninye lelo oomanya ena kop apik atua nkaik aainei; naa keaku enkop abori Olaitoriani etii o ltung'ana lenyena. 
1Chronicles22:19 Esiaayia naa taata Olaitoriani Enkai inyi too ltauja. Entudumunye enteshet ewueji sinyati o Laitoriani Enkai inyi, pee etumi aayau nena masaa sinyat atua ina aji nateshetaki tenkaraki enkarna o Laitoriani.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Ore ake pee emoruau Daudi, neitaa Solomon olayioni lenye metaa olaiguanani le Israel." 
1Chronicles23:2 Neiturrur Daudi ilarikok pooki le Israel, o lapolosak pooki loo Lawi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ore too Lawi, neikeni pooki oata ilarin tomoni uni neilep, ore esiana enye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tomoni uni oisiet." 
1Chronicles23:4 Nejo Daudi, “Ore nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan e kulo, ninche ooitasheiki esiaai e nkaji Olaitoriani, ore nkalifuni ile neaku ilkituaak o larishak." 
1Chronicles23:5 Ore ilarripok le kishomi naa nkalifuni ong'uan, naa nkalifuni oong'uan oisis Olaitoriani te nena kinantani naitobira nanu pee eisisieki.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Neitobir Daudi ninche aorrior aaitaa ilturrurri aitusuj ilayiok le Lawi: Gershom, o Kohat, o Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Ore apa ilayiok le Gershom naa Ladan, o Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:8 Ore ilayiok le Ladan naa: Yehiel aa ninye olkitok, o Setam, o Yoel, lelo pokira okuni." 
1Chronicles23:9 Ilayiok le Shimei naa Shelomot, o Hasiel, o Haran, lelo pokira okuni. Kulo apa ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye too le Ladan." 
1Chronicles23:10 Ore ilayiok le Shimei naa: Yahat, o Sina o Yeush, o Beria. Ilayiok apa le Shimei kulo pokira oong'uan." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yohat apa ninye olkitok, naa Sisa o liare; kake meeta apa Yeush o Beria ilayiok kumok, neaku eitaaki ninche olmarei obo." 
1Chronicles23:12 Ore ilayiok le Kohat naa: Amram, o Ishar, o Hebron, o Usiel, lelo pokira oong'uan." 
1Chronicles23:13 Ore ilayiok le Amram naa: Aron o Musa. Eiteng'elaki apa Aron pee eitisiny nena tokitin naasinya oleng, pee etum ninye o layiok lenyena aataa iloopej enkorropil te dukuya Olaitoriani, neisiaaisho ninye, nemayianisho te nkarna enye ntarasi." 
1Chronicles23:14 Kake ore ilayiok le Musa ilo tung'ani le Nkai, neishooki nkarn oo ltung'ana le Lawi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Nkarn oo layiok le Musa: Gershom o Eliesa. 
1Chronicles23:16 Ore ilayiok le Gershom naa Shebuel aa ninye olkitok," 
1Chronicles23:17 ore ilayiok le Eliesa naa: Rehabia aa ninye olkitok, nemeeta apa Eliesa kulikae ayiok, kake aikumok apa ilayiok le Rehabia oleng." 
1Chronicles23:18 Ore ilayiok le Ishar naa, Shelomit aa ninye olkitok." 
1Chronicles23:19 Ore ilayiok le Hebron naa: Yeria aa ninye olkitok, o Amaria aa ninye oliare, o Yahasiel aa ninye oliokuni o Yekameam aa ninye oliong'uan." 
1Chronicles23:20 Ore ilayiok le Usiel naa: Mika aa ninye olkitok o Ishia aa ninye oliare. 
1Chronicles23:21 Ore ilayiok le Merari naa: Mahali o Mushi. Ore ilayiok le Mahali naa: Eliesa o Kish. 
1Chronicles23:22 Etua apa Eliesa meeta ilayiok, ntoyie ake eeta; ore iltung'ana lenye, lelo ayiok le Kish, neyam ninche." 
1Chronicles23:23 Ore ilayiok le Mushi naa: Mahali, o Eder, o Yeremot, lelo pokira okuni." 
1Chronicles23:24 Kulo apa ninche ilayiok le Lawi anaa too nkajijik oo loo menye, nena lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, anaa enaigeroki ninche te risioroto e siana oo nkarn e pooki ng'ae ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep, te lelo ooas esiaai e nkisiaayiare e nkaji Olaitoriani." 
1Chronicles23:25 Amu etejo apa Daudi, “Ore Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, eishoo eseriani iltung'ana lenyena, nebik ninye te Yerusalem ntarasi." 
1Chronicles23:26 Metaa meekure eeta tipat nanapie Ilawi olng'obor le Nkai o kulie tokitin ake pooki e nkisiaayiare.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Amu ore too rorei oobayie le Daudi, naa ena esiana oo Lawi ebaiki ilarin tikitam neilep." 
1Chronicles23:28 “Kake ore esiaai enye naa pee eretu ilayiok le Aron te nkisiayiare e nkaji Olaitoriani aaing'or Ilgorieti o too lgilat le nkaji, neituku nena pooki sinyat, neas pooki siaai te nkisiaayiare e nkaji e Nkai;" 
1Chronicles23:29 neretisho te nkisiaayiare e mukate e nkitoduaaroto, o entapa tenkaraki olasar le ntapa, naa ninye eitobirieki imukateni neitu eisuishieki, o lasar loo mukateni naatapejoki, o lasar oitushula te ilata, o ntemat pooki e nkumoi o esapuko." 
1Chronicles23:30 Naa keitashe ninche anaake tadekenya aaisho enashe neisis Olaitoriani, naa neijia sii etiu teipa." 
1Chronicles23:31 O enkata ake pooki naishori Olaitoriani olasar opejori te nkolong e sabato, o to lapa ng'ejuk, o too nkolong'i o Sirua, terisioroto e siana nayieuni te ninche, anaake te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
1Chronicles23:32 Neijia ninche eiko aaing'or olng'obor le ntumo o ewueji sinyati, negolie ninche ilayiok le Aron, lelo alashera lenye, te nkisiaayiare e nkaji Olaitoriani.”" 
1Chronicles24:1 Ore ilturrurri loo layiok le Aron naa ninche kulo. Ore ilayiok le Aron naa: Nadab, o Abihu, o Eliesa, o Itamar," 
1Chronicles24:2 kake etasiokito apa Nadab o Abihu aaye te dukuya papaai lenye, nemeeta ninche nkera, neaku etaa Eliesa o Itamar ilapolosak." 
1Chronicles24:3 Ore te retoto e Sadok obo loo layiok le Eliesa, o Ahimelek obo loo layiok le Hamar, neitobir Daudi nkitobirat te risioroto e nkisiayiare enye." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ore amu enotoki apa iltung'ana kituaak tiatua ilayiok le Eliesa alang too layiok le Itamar, etipikaki ninche ilturrurri tomon o ile tiabori ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, too layiok le Eliesa, o isiet too layiok le Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:5 Eitobira ninche te oshoto e nkukuo, aaitanyaanyuk pooki, amu eetae apa ilkituaak anaake te wueji sinyati, o lkituaak le Nkai tiatua ilayiok le Eliesa o layiok le Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:6 Ore ilo aigeroni oji Shemaia olayioni le Nataniel, loo Lawi, neiger ninche pooki te dukuya olaiguanani, olkituaak, o Sadok olapolosani, o Ahimelek olayioni le Abiata, o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye oo lapolosak o Lawi; negeluni enkaji nabo too le Eliesa negeluni nabo too le Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:7 Etadoikio enkukuo e dukuya Yehoirib, nedoiki eniare Yedaia," 
1Chronicles24:8 nedoiki ene uni Harim, nedoiki ene ong'uan Seorim," 
1Chronicles24:9 nedoiki ene imiet Malkija, nedoiki ene ile Mijamin," 
1Chronicles24:10 nedoiki ene naapishana Hakos, nedoiki ene isiet Abija," 
1Chronicles24:11 nedoiki ene naaudo Yeshua, nedoiki ene tomon Shekenia," 
1Chronicles24:12 nedoiki ene tomon oobo Eliashib, nedoiki ene tomon oare Yakim," 
1Chronicles24:13 nedoiki ene tomon ookuni Hupa, nedoiki ene tomon oong'uan Yeshebeab," 
1Chronicles24:14 nedoiki ene tomon o imiet Bilga, nedoiki ene tomon o ile Imer," 
1Chronicles24:15 nedoiki ene tomon oopishana Hesir, nedoiki ene tomon o isiet Hapiser," 
1Chronicles24:16 nedoiki ene tomon ooudo Petahia, nedoiki ene tikitam Yeheskel," 
1Chronicles24:17 nedoiki ene tikitam oobo Yakin, nedoiki ene tikitam oare Gamul," 
1Chronicles24:18 nedoiki ene tikitam oo kuni Delai, nedoiki ene tikitam oo ng'uan Maasia," 
1Chronicles24:19 egeluno apa kulo pooki te nkisiaayiare enye pee epuonu atua enkaji Olaitoriani terisioroto eilo kerreti apa oitasheyie Aron papaai lenye tenkaraki ninche, anaa enaitanapa ninye Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel." 
1Chronicles24:20 Naa kuna nkarn e kulikae ayiok le Lawi: ore too layiok le Amram naa, Shubael; ore too layiok le Shubael, naa Yehedia." 
1Chronicles24:21 Ore too layiok le Rahedia naa: Ishia aa ninye olkitok. 
1Chronicles24:22 Ore too le Isharit, naa Shelemot; ore too layiok le Shelemot naa Yahat." 
1Chronicles24:23 Ore too layiok le Hebron naa Yeria aa ninye olkitok, naa Amaria oliare, naa Yahasiel oliokuni, naa Yekameam oliong'uan." 
1Chronicles24:24 Ore ilayiok le Usiel naa Mika, ore too layiok le Mika naa Shamir." 
1Chronicles24:25 Ore olalashe le Mika naa Ishia; ore ilayiok le Ishia naa Sakaria. 
1Chronicles24:26 Ore ilayiok le Merari naa Mahali o Mushi. Ore ilayiok le Yaasia naa Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Ore ilayiok le Merari naa Yaasia, o Beno, o Shoham, o Sakur, o Ibri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Ore too layiok le Mahali naa: Eliesa ilo apa lemeeta ilayiok. 
1Chronicles24:29 Ore too layiok le Kish naa Yerameel. 
1Chronicles24:30 Ore ilayiok le Mushi naa Mahali, o Eder, o Yerimot. Kulo apa ilayiok loo Lawi te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye." 
1Chronicles24:31 Ore sii kulo, ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, o lalashera lenye ooti, neosh sii ninche enkukuo, anaa ake ilalashera lenye, lelo ayiok le Aron, te dukuya olaiguanani Daudi, o Sadok o Ahimelek, o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye e lelo apolosak le Lawi." 
1Chronicles25:1 Ore Daudi o lelo kituaak le nkisiayiare neiteng'el kulikae te nkaraki enkisiaayiare embata oo layiok le Asaf le Heman o le Yedutum, laa ninche apa ooibonisho too lwululi loo usin, o too nkai oosinkolioitin, o too nkinantani dapashi. Ore lelo ootaasa esiaai enkisiaayiare enye naa:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Ore too layiok le Asaf, naa, Sekur, o Yosef, o Natania, o Aharela, lelo ayiok le Asaf te utaroto e Asaf, laa ninye apa oibonisho te utaroto o laiguanani." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ore too layiok le Yedutum naa Gedalia, o Seri, o Yeshaia, o Shemei, o Hashabia o Matitia, lelo pokira ile, tiabori eutaroto e papaai lenye Yedutum, laa ninye apa oibonisho to lwulul loo usin, eishooyo enashe neisis Olaitoriani." 
1Chronicles25:4 Ore too layiok le Heman naa: Bukia, o Matania, o Usiel o Shebuel, o Yerimot, o Hania, o Hanani, o Eliata, o Gidalti, o Romantieser, o Yoshbekasha, o Meloti, o Hotir, o Mahasiot." 
1Chronicles25:5 Ore kulo pooki naa ilayiok le Heman, oladuaani lo laiguanani le Seer, terisioroto enkisiligata e Nkai pee eitaa ninye kitok, amu eishoo apa Enkai Heman ilayiok tomon oong'uan o ntoyie uni." 
1Chronicles25:6 Etii apa ninche pooki abori eutaroto e papaai lenye to sinkolio le nkaji e Nkai, too nkinantani, o nkai oo sinkoliotin, o lwululi loo usin, tenkaraki enkisiaayiare e nkaji e Nkai. Ore Asaf, o Yedutum, o Heman netii abori enkitanapata o laiguanani." 
1Chronicles25:7 Ore esiana enye tenebo lelo alashera lenye, apa ooiteng'enaki te ranyakinoto o Laitoriani, lelo pooki arriyiak, naa iip are o ntomoni isiet." 
1Chronicles25:8 Neosh ninche enkukuo tenkaraki isiaaitin enye, kutiti o sapuki. Olaiteng'enani o loiteng'eni." 
1Chronicles25:9 Nedoiki enkukuo e dukuya Asaf lo lmarei le Yosef; nedoiki eniare Gedalia, ninye olalashera lenyena, o layiok lenyena pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:10 nedoiki ene uni Sakar o layiok lenyena o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare," 
1Chronicles25:11 nedoiki eniong'uan Isri, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:12 nedoiki ene imiet Natania, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare," 
1Chronicles25:13 nedoiki ene ile Bukia, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare," 
1Chronicles25:14 nedoiki ene naapishana Yesherela, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare," 
1Chronicles25:15 nedoiki ene isiet Yeshaia, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare," 
1Chronicles25:16 nedoiki ene naaudo Matania, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira, tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:17 nedoiki ene tomon Shimei, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:18 nedoiki ene tomon oobo Asarel, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:19 nedoiki ene tomon oare Hashabia, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:20 nedoiki ene tomon ookuni Shubael, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:21 ore ene tomon oo ng'uan nedoiki Matitia, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:22 ore ene tomon oimiet, nedoiki Yeremot, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:23 ore ene tomon oile, nedoiki Hanania, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:24 ore ene tomon oopishana, nedoiki Yashbekasha, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:25 ore ene tomon oisiet, nedoiki Hanani, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:26 ore ene tomon ooudo, nedoiki Malotu, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:27 ore ene tikitam nedoiki Eliata, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:28 ore ene tikitam oobo, nedoiki Hatir, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:29 ore ene tikitam oare nedoiki Gatalti, o layiok lenyena o lalashera lenyena, pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:30 ore ene tikitam ookuni nedoiki Mahasiot, o layiok lenyena o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare;" 
1Chronicles25:31 ore ene tikitam oong'uan, nedoiki Romatiesa, o layiok lenyena, o lalashera lenyena pokira tomon oare." 
1Chronicles26:1 Ore tialo eoroto oo larripok loo nchomito: ore too ltung'ana le Kora naa Meshelemia olayioni le Kore, obo loo layiok le Asaf." 
1Chronicles26:2 Neeta apa Meshelemia ilayiok: Sakaria aa ninye olkikau, naa Yediael oliare, naa Sebadia oliokuni, naa Yatiniel oliong'uan," 
1Chronicles26:3 naa Elam olayioni le imiet, naa Yehohanaan olayioni le ile, naa Eliehoenia oliopishana." 
1Chronicles26:4 Neeta sii apa Obed-edom ilayiok: naa Shemaia olkikau, naa Yehosabad oliare, naa Yoa oliokuni, naa Sakar oliong'uan, naa Netanel olayioni le imiet," 
1Chronicles26:5 naa Amiel olayioni le ile, naa Isaakar oliopishana, naa Peuletai olayioni le isiet; amu etamayiana apa Enkai ninye." 
1Chronicles26:6 Ore sii apa tialo olayioni lenye Shemaia, netoiuoki ilayiok laa ninche ootaa ilaitoriak loo nkajijik oo loo menye, amu iltung'ana apa oata enkidimata kitok oleng." 
1Chronicles26:7 Ore ilayiok le Shimeia, naa, Otini, o Refael, o Obed, o Elisabad, neeta apa ilalashera lenye enkidimata, Elihu o Shimeia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Ore kulo pooki naa ilo lmarei le Obed-edom, tenebo ilayiok lenye o lalashera lenye. Iltung'ana oata enkidimata ninche naa arriyiak te siai. Iltung'ana le Obed-edom ntomoni ile oare." 
1Chronicles26:9 Neeta sii apa Meshelemia ilayiok o lalashera iltung'ana oata enkidimata oora tomon o isiet. 
1Chronicles26:10 Ore Hosa loo layiok le Merari neeta ilayiok: Shimri aa ninye olkitok, (amu ore duoo ninye neme olkikau ninye, neitaa menye kitok)." 
1Chronicles26:11 Naa Hikia osuju, naa Tebalia oliokuni naa Sekaria oliong'uan; ore ilayiok pooki o lalashera le Hosa naa tomon oo kuni." 
1Chronicles26:12 Ore kulo turrurri pooki loo larripok loo nchomito, negeluno ake aaipirare ltung'ana lenye kituaak, negelakino enkisiaayiare, anaa apa enataasa ilalashera lenye, eisiaaisho tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
1Chronicles26:13 Neosh ninche enkukuo anaa too nkajijik oo loo menye, neitorisi nkutiti o sapuki, tenkaraki nchomito enye." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ore enkukuo enkalo oloo saen nedoiki Shelemia. Enyaakita sii aoshoki olayioni lenye Sekaria enkukuo, ilo autaroni ng'en nedoiki enkukuo enye enkalo e moikuape." 
1Chronicles26:15 Nelotu Obed-edom enkalo e kopikop ore ilayiok lenyena neishori enkaji nashumishoreki. 
1Chronicles26:16 Ore Shupim o Hosa nedoiki enkukuo enye enkalo o loo ntoluo, embata e nkishomi e Sheleket, teina oitoi kitok nalo ailep. Neipirakinore ake olarriponi olarriponi." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ore te nkalo oloo saen netii ilarripok ile anaake, ore te nkalo e moikuape netii ilarripok oong'uan anaake, ore te nkalo e kopikop netii ilarripok oong'uan anaake, tenebo ake sii kulikae maaremaare te nkaji nashumishoreki." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ore te nkalo o loo ntoluo netii ilarripok oong'uan enkoitoi kitok netii oare ine wueji neitobiraki aakus. 
1Chronicles26:19 Kulo ninche ilturrurri loo larripok loo nchomito tialo ile Kora o layiok le Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Ore too Lawi, naa Ahija apa oata enkitasheikinoto tenkaraki enchumare oo masaa e nkaji e Nkai, o lchumat loo nkishorot naaitisinyaki." 
1Chronicles26:21 Ore ilayiok le Ladan, lelo ayiok le Gershom ooara ile Ladan, nena lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye naa ile Ladan le Gershom: Yehiel." 
1Chronicles26:22 Ore ilayiok le Yehiel, naa Setam o Yoel olalashe lenye, naa ninche ooitasheiki ilchumat le nkaji o Laitoriani." 
1Chronicles26:23 Ore too le Amram, lelo le Isharit," 
1Chronicles26:24 o le Shebuel ilo ayioni le Gershom, olayioni le Musa, naa ninye olkitok oitasheiki ilchumat." 
1Chronicles26:25 Ore ilalashera lenyena, ebaiki Eliesa; naa olayioni lenye Rehabia o layioni lenye Yeshaia, olayioni lenye Yoram, olayioni lenye Sikri, naa olayioni lenye Shelomot." 
1Chronicles26:26 Ore Shelemot o lalashera lenyena naa ninche ooitasheiki ilchumat le nena kishorot apa naaitisinya olaiguanani Daudi, tenebo ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, o lkituaak loo nkalifuni, o loo maa iip loo larikok le njore naaitisinyaki." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ore ntokitin naataaruaki to larrabal, neitisiny ninche nena kishorot pee eitobirieki enkaji Olaitoriani." 
1Chronicles26:28 O nena sii pooki naaitisinya Samuel oladuaani, o Saul olayioni le Kish, o Abna olayioni le Neer, o Yoab olayioni le Seruya - ore nena kishorot pooki naaitisinyaki naa abori enking'urata e Shelemot etii o lalashera lenyena." 
1Chronicles26:29 Ore too Lharisit, naa Kenaia o layiok lenyena, negeluni tenkaraki isiaaitin e boo too Siraeli, metaa ilkituaak o larishak." 
1Chronicles26:30 Ore too le Hebron, naa Hashabia o lalashera lenyena, iltung'ana enkalifu nabo o iip naapishana oata enkidimata, ooing'or aagolie Isirael, te nkalo o loo ntoluo olkeju le Yordan, te siaai pookiOlaitoriani, o te nkisiayiare olaiguanani." 
1Chronicles26:31 Ore too le Hebron, naa Yeriya olkitok loo le Hebron te pooki iishoritin o too nkajijik oo loo menye. (Ore to lari liartam le nkitoria e Daudi, netujurroki iltung'ana netumi iltung'ana oata enkidimata tiatua ninche te Yaser tiatua Gilead.)" 
1Chronicles26:32 Etegelua olaiguanani Daudi ninye o lalashera lenyena, iltung'ana nkalifuni are o iip naapishana oata enkidimata, nena lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, pee eitasheiki ile Ruben, o le Gad, olpisiai lo losho le Manase te pooki bae naipirta Enkai o too mbaa o laiguanani." 
1Chronicles27:1 Kuna nkarn oo ltung'ana le Israel, nena lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, lelo arikok le njore loo nkalifuni o loo maa iip, o lkituaak lenye ooisiaai olaiguanani too mbaa pooki naaipirta nena orot oo lturrurri, te pooki apa o to lari pooki, ore ake olturrur obo naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:2 Yoshobeam olayioni le Sabdiel apa oitasheiki olturrur le dukuya, to lapa le dukuya; ore ilo turrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:3 Ole ishoi e Peres apa ninye, naa ninye olkitok too larikok pooki le njore to lapa le dukuya." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodai le Ahohit apa oitasheiki olturrur lo lapa liare; ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan. 
1Chronicles27:5 Ore olarikoni le njore liokuni, to lapa liokuni, naa Benaia olayioni le Yehoida ilo apolosani, aa ninye olkitok; ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:6 Olapa taa Benaia ele ora oltung'ani magilani tiatua lelo tomoni uni naa ninye olarikoni le tomoni uni; Amisabad olayioni lenye apa oitasheiki olturrur lenye. 
1Chronicles27:7 Asahel ilo alashe le Yoab ninye apa oliong'uan, to lapa liong'uan, naa olayioni lenye Sebadia osujaki ninye; ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:8 Ore olarikoni le njore le imiet, to lapa le imiet naa Shumhut, le Israhit; Ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan. Ore olayioni le ile to lapa le ile" 
1Chronicles27:9 naa Ira olayioni le Ikesh le Tekoa; ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan. 
1Chronicles27:10 Ore oliopishana, to lapa liopishana, naa Heles le Peloni, loo layiok le Efraim; ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:11 Ore olayioni le isiet to lapa le isiet naa Sibekia le Hushat le Serahit, ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:12 Ore o lioudo to lapa lioudo naa Abiesa le Anatot, loo le Benchamen; ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:13 Ore olayioni le tomon, to lapa le tomon naa Maharai le Netofa, loo le Serahit, ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:14 Ore olayioni le tomon oobo to lapa le tomon oobo naa Benaia le Piraton, loo layiok le Efraim; ore olturrur lenye lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:15 Ore olayioni le tomon oare, to lapa le tomon oare naa Hildai le Netofat loo le Otiniel; ore olturrur lenye naa iltung'ana nkalifuni tikitam oong'uan." 
1Chronicles27:16 Ore tialo iloshon le Israel, ore too le Ruben, naa Eliesa olayioni le Sikri ninye olkitok; ore too le Simeon, naa Shefatia olayioni le Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 ore too Lawi naa Hashabia olayioni le Kemuel; ore too le Aron naa Sadok; 
1Chronicles27:18 ore too le Yuda naa Elihu, obo loo lalashera le Daudi; ore too le Isaakar, naa Umri olayioni le Mikael;" 
1Chronicles27:19 ore too le Sebulon, naa Ishmaia olayioni le Obadia, ore too le Naftali, naa Yeremot olayioni le Asriel;" 
1Chronicles27:20 ore too le Efraim, naa Hoshea olayioni le Asasia; ore to lpisiai lo losho le Manase, naa Yoel olayioni le Pedaia;" 
1Chronicles27:21 ore to likae pisiai lo losho le Manase te Gilead naa, Ido olayioni le Sakaria, ore too le Benchamen, naa Yaasiel olayioni le Abna;" 
1Chronicles27:22 ore too le Dan, naa Asarel olayioni le Yeroham, kulo apa lelo arikok loo loshon le Israel." 
1Chronicles27:23 Eitu apa eiken Daudi lelo ootii abori ilarin tikitam, amu eisiligishore apa Olaitoriani pee eitaa Isiraeli kumok anaa ilakir le shumata." 
1Chronicles27:24 Neiteru Yoab olayioni le Seroya aikenisho, kake eitu ninye eidip, neitoki engoro alotu shumata Israel tenkaraki ena, neitu epiki ina siana atua nkatinin o laiguanani Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Ore apa olaitasheikinoni loo lchumat lo laiguanani naa Asmafet olayioni le Adiel. Naa ore olaitasheikinoni loo lchumat leina kop, tiatua nkanas, o tiatua nkang'itie kutiti, o too ltaleta, naaYonatan olayioni le Usia;" 
1Chronicles27:26 ore oloitasheiki lelo oaasisho too nkurman, neturisho naa Esiri olayioni le Kelub;" 
1Chronicles27:27 ore oloitasheiki inkurman oo lng'anayio naa Shimei le Rematil; ore oloitasheiki ilng'anayio ooitayuni te nkurma oo sabibu naa Sabdi le Shifamit. 
1Chronicles27:28 Ore oloitasheiki iloirienito o lkeek laaijo retet ootii atua Shefala naa Baalhanan le Gederi; ore oloitasheiki ineeshumieki iila naa Yoash. 
1Chronicles27:29 Ore oloitasheiki nchoo too ndaat te Sharon naa Shitrai le Sharon, ore oloitasheiki nchoo naadaa too erat naa Shefat olayioni le Adlai." 
1Chronicles27:30 Ore oloitasheiki ntamesin naa Obil le Ishmael; ore oloitasheiki isirkon lipong'a naa Yehedia le Meronot. Ore oloitasheiki Illuat oo nkerrai naa Yasis le Hagrit. 
1Chronicles27:31 Ore kulo pooki naa ilaitasheikinok loo masaa o laiguanani Daudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Ore apa Yonatan olenkapu le Daudi, naa ninye olaikooni le Daudi, amu oltung'ani ninye oata ening'unoto naa olaig'eroni; ninye o Yehiel olayioni le Hakmoni apa oiteng'en ilayiok lo laiguanani." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofel apa olaikooni lo laiguanani, naa Husai le Akit olchore lo laiguanani." 
1Chronicles27:34 Etijing'a apa Yehoida olayioni le Benaia tenebo Abiata erishata e Ahitofel. Naa Yoab apa olarikoni le njore olaiguanani. 
1Chronicles28:1 Eiturrurro apa Daudi te Yerusalem ilkituaak pooki le Israel, ilkituaak loo loshon, o larikok le lelo turrurri apa ooisiaai olaiguanani, o larikok le njore le nkalifu, o larikok le njore le maa iip, o laitashiekinok loo masaa pooki, o nkishu o laiguanani, o layiok lenyena, tenebo o lkituaak le nkaji o laiguanani, o lelo tung'ana magil, o lelo murran pooki yiolot." 
1Chronicles28:2 Nedumunye Daudi aitashe nejo, “Entoning'oki nanu, ilalashera lainei oltung'ana laainei. Atadamua apa to ltau lai pee ashetu enkaji nairragieki osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani, neaku eneitasheyie nkejek e Nkai ang: naitobira nanu mbaa naashetieki," 
1Chronicles28:3 kake aatiaka nanu Enkai, ‘Mindim iyie atesheta enkaji tenkaraki enkarna ai, amu ira iyie olmurrani nimbukoyie osarge sapuk.'" 
1Chronicles28:4 Ore ake eyia aategelua nanu Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel te nkaji e papaai pooki pee aaku olaiguanani le Israel ntarasi, amu etegelua Yuda metaa olarikoni, naa ore te nkaji e Yuda, teina aji e papa, o tiatua ilayiok le papa neitishipa ninye pee aaitaa olaiguanani le Israel pooki." 
1Chronicles28:5 Naa ore too layiok laainei pooki (amu aaishoo Olaitoriani ilayiok kumok) netegelua Solomon olayioni lai, pee eton to lorika le nkitoo le nkitoria o Laitoriani te Israel." 
1Chronicles28:6 Aatiaka ninye nanu, Solomon olayioni lino olo ashet enkaji ai o lgorieti laainei, amu ategelua nanu ninye metaa enkerai ai, naa kaaku nanu menye lenye." 
1Chronicles28:7 Kaitasheyie nanu enkitoria enye ntarasi tenebik ninye aibung neitabaya nkitanapat aainei, o nkikoot aainei, anaa enatiu ninye taata.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 Ore naa taata te dukuya Isirael pooki, ena umata o Laitoriani o te ning'oto e Nkai ang, entujurru ning'oruru nkitanapat pooki o Laitoriani Enkai inyi; pee itumutumu aawaita ena kop sidai aaitaa eninyi, ningueikiki nkera inyi metaa enjung'ore enye ntarasi." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Naa ore iyie Solomon enkerai ai, tayiolo Enkai e papaai lino, nisiaai ninye to ltau pooki o te ndamunoto e yieunoto amu kejur Olaitoriani iltauja pooki, neyiolo pooki kitobirat o endamunoto. Tening'oru iyie ninye, naa eitum iyie ninye, kake tenilam ninye, naa eikinturraa ninye iyie ntarasi." 
1Chronicles28:10 Toning'o naa taata, amu kitegelua iyie Olaitoriani pee ishet enkaji naaku ewueji sinyati; ntagoluoyu taasa ina.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Neisho Daudi Solomon eutaroto enkitobirata eina aji Enkai pooki, o enoo nkajijik enyena, o neeshumishoreki, o lgilat lenyena le shumata, o lgilat lenyena liatua, o lgilat lo lorika lolng'ur," 
1Chronicles28:12 o nena kitobirat pooki naata to ltau, tenkaraki ilgorieti le nkaji o Laitoriani, o lgilat pooki oomanita, o wuejitin pooki neeshumishoreki e nkaji e Nkai, o eneshumieki nkishorot naaitisinyaki;"
