1Chronicles28:13 tenkaraki lelo turrurri loo lapolosak o Lawi, o esiaai pooki enkisiaayiare tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, o masaa pooki e nkisiaayiare tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani," 
1Chronicles28:14 o enkiroishi e sahabu tenkaraki imasaa e sahabu te pooki kisiaayiare, o enkiroishi oo masaa e nkosholai te pooki kisiayiare." 
1Chronicles28:15 O enkiroishi oo nkitasheta oo ltaai, lenye, o enkiroishi e pooki kitashet oltaa o ltaai lenyena, o enkiroishi enkosholai tenkaraki enkiteshet oltaa, o ltaai lenyena, te risioroto enkisiaayiarete pooki kitashet o ltaa." 
1Chronicles28:16 O enkiroishi e sahabu te pooki mesa, e mukate e nkitoduaaroto, o enkosholai tenkaraki imisai naaitobiri te nkosholai." 
1Chronicles28:17 O sahabu nasila naitobirieki nkijikoni oo lala, o mbesenini, o nkikompeni, o nena girran e sahabu, o enkiroishi e sahabu naitobirieki pooki o ngirran e nkosholai." 
1Chronicles28:18 O te nkaraki olperere lo lasar le nkorropil le sahabu nasila, o enkiroishi e sahabu naitobirieki. Neisho sii nkitobirat tenkaraki engarri oo lbartan e sahabu nanapieki lelo kerubi oolak inaipuko enye aaitoip ilo sanduku lo sotua le Nkai." 
1Chronicles28:19 Eibalunye ninye kuna baa pooki too lkigerot le nkaina o Laitoriani, ooipirta ena bae. Keasi ena siaai pooki aaiturubare ina kitobirata e utaroto." 
1Chronicles28:20 Neitoki Daudi ajoki Solomon ilo ayioni lenye, “Ntagoluoyu nintagol oshoke, niaas ina, miureishoyu, milepori nimishalu; amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai ai, ee Enkai ai, netii tenebo iyie, mikintiak ninye iyie nimikinguanare ometaba anaa neidipayu esiaai pooki e nkisiaayiare e nkaji Olaitoriani. Naa ng'ura, ore ilturrurri loo lapolosak; o loo Lawi, teina kisiaayiare pooki enkaji e Nkai, netii tenebo iyie, ometaba anaa neidipayu esiaai pooki e nkisiaayiare e nkaji Olaitoriani." 
1Chronicles28:21 Naa ng'ura, ore ilturrurri loo lapolosak, o loo Lawi, teina kisiaayiare pooki enkaji e Nkai netii tenebo iyie, neeta ake pooki tung'ani eyieunoto, neeta pooki ng'ae enkarriyiano te pooki kisiaayiare; ore sii ilkituaak o ltung'ana pooki naa kening aakurraki tenintanap ninche.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Nejoki olaiguanani Daudi ina umata pooki, “Ore Solomon enkerai ai laa ninye ake etegelua Enkai, naa oltung'ani oti lemeeta enkarriyiano, naa eikitok ena siaai, amu ore ena aji nemeaku ene tung'ani, kake eno Olaitoriani Enkai." 
1Chronicles29:2 Neaku aishoru nanu ntokitin naashetieki enkaji e Nkai, ai anaa enaidim. Aishorua sahabu tenkaraki ntokitin e sahabu, o enkosholai tenkaraki ntokitin e nkosholai, o suyai tenkaraki ntokitin o suyai, o esekenkei tenkaraki ntokitin e sekenkei o nkeek tenkaraki ntokitin oo nkeek, ore tenebo nena netii isoito kumok ooji oniks, o soito ooitasheyieki, o soito loo muain kumok, o mpukunot pooki oo soito oogol enkinyiang'a, o ltoto ooibor." 
1Chronicles29:3 Ore ake tenebo nena tokitin pooki naishorua nanu tenkaraki ina aji sinyati, naata nanu olchumati lai makewan le sahabu o enkosholai, naa ore tenkaraki enyorrata ai tenkaraki enkaji e Nkai ai, aishoo nanu enkaji e Nkai ai:" 
1Chronicles29:4 ntalantani nkalifuni uni e sahabu, ina sahabu e Ofir, o ntalantani nkalifuni naapishana e nkosholai nasila, pee emurieki isunta eina aji," 
1Chronicles29:5 o tenkaraki ina siaai pooki naas lelo tung'ana arriyiak, o sahabu tenkaraki ntokitin e sahabu, o enkosholai tenkaraki ntokitin e nkosholai. Kaing'ae naa likae oishoru te yieunoto, neitisiny kewan ena olong, neitisinyaki kewan Olaitoriani?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Neitoki nena lukuny oo nkajijik o nkajijik oo loo menye aaishoru nena kishorot enye o lpela, anaa ake sii enataasa ilarikok loo loshon, o larikok le njore loo nkalifuni, o loo maa iip, o lelo kituaak ooitasheiki esiaai o laiguanani." 
1Chronicles29:7 Neishoru ninche tenkaraki enkisiaayiare e nkaji e Nkai ntalantani nkalifuni imiet e sahabu, o ntalantani nkalifuni tomon e nkosholai, o ntalantani nkalifuni tomon oisiet o suyai, o ntalantani nkalifuni iip nabo e sekenkei." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ore pooki ng'ae oata soito oogol enkinyiang'a, nepik ilo shumati le nkaji Olaitoriani, naa Yehiel le Gershon apa olaing'urani." 
1Chronicles29:9 Neng'idayu apa iltung'ana enkaraki eitayutuo kulo te nyorrata, amu to ltau pooki eishorutua ninche to lpela aaisho Olaitoriani; neng'idayu sii olaiguanani Daudi oleng." 
1Chronicles29:10 Neitoki Daudi aisis Olaitoriani te dukuya ina umata pooki; nejo Daudi: “Metaa iyie eisisi, iyie Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel papa lang, ntarasi o ntarasi." 
1Chronicles29:11 Enino, iyie Olaitoriani enkitoo, o engolon, o enkitoria, o enkisulata, o enkishiaa; amu ore pooki natii shumata o enkop naa nkuninono; enino enkitoria, iyie Olaitoriani, naa iyie eilepieki aaitulusoo te pooki." 
1Chronicles29:12 Ore enkarsisisho o enkanyit naa iyie eing'uaa, naa iyie oitoreisho te shumata pooki. Enkaina ino etii engolon o enkidimata; naa enkaina ino; naitaa kitok neisho engolon pooki ng'ae." 
1Chronicles29:13 Ore taata nikincho iyie enashe, Enkai ang, nikisis Enkarna ino kitok." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Kake kara nanu ng'ae, naa kainyoo olorere lai, eji metaa eikindim aaishoru kuna te yieunoto. Amu iyie eing'uaa ntokitin pooki naa nkuninono kitorrinyokito iyie." 
1Chronicles29:15 Amu kira iyiook omon te dukuya iyie, nikira lapuayak anaa apa enatiu loo papa pooki; etiu nkolong'i ang te nkop anaa oloip, nemeetae enebikieki." 
1Chronicles29:16 Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ang, ore ena kumoi e kuna tokitin nikintayutuo pee kishetakinye iyie enkaji tenkaraki enkarna ino sinyati, naa enkaina ino eing'uaa, naa nkuninono pooki." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ayiolo nanu, Enkai ai, nchere, ijur oltau, nishipakino enkishui sidai; ore te sidano oltau lino naishorua nanu kuna pooki te nyorrata, natoduaa nanu taata kulikae tung'ana linono, ootoni tene, neishoru te nyorrata o te ng'ida." 
1Chronicles29:18 Olaitoriani, Na Ai e Abraham o Isaak o Israel, loo papa, tipika ntarasi kuna yieunot o ndamunot atua iltauja loo ltung'ana linono, niutaa iltauja lenye meetu enitii." 
1Chronicles29:19 Nchoo Solomon enkerai ai meibung'a to ltau lenye nkitanapat inono, pooki o enchakenisho ino, o nkikoot inono, neitabaya pooki, neshet ninye ine wueji apa naitobira.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Neitoki Daudi ajoki ina umata, “Esisa Olaitoriani Enkai inyi.” Neisis ina umata pooki Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye, neirrug ninche ilukuny enye, neserem Olaitoriani, neisho enkanyit aaitaa Olaiguanani." 
1Chronicles29:21 Neisho ninche Olaitoriani ilasarri, ore te nkolong nasuju, neishooyo ilasarri oopejori to Olaitoriani, iloing'ok enkalifu nabo, olmeregeshi enkalifu nabo, o lkuoo le kerra enkalifu nabo tenebo ilasarri lenye ooki, o lasaari kumok oleng te Israel pooki;" 
1Chronicles29:22 neokisho ninche nedaa te dukuya Olaitoriani ina olong te ng'ida sapuk oleng. Neitaa ninche Solomon ilo ayioni le Daudi olaiguanani te nkata e are, nebukoki ninche ninye eilata aaput aaitaa olkitok te nkaraki Olaitoriani, neitaa Sadok olapolosani." 
1Chronicles29:23 Neton Solomon to lorika le nkitoo lo Laitoriani anaa olaiguanani te rishata e Daudi papaai lenye; nebul ninye, nening Israel pooki ninye." 
1Chronicles29:24 Ore ilarikok pooki o lelo tung'ana magil, o layiok sii le Daudi pooki, nelimu aaibalunye enkirukoto enye to laiguanani Solomon." 
1Chronicles29:25 Neisho Olaitoriani Solomon metoning'oyu oleng te dukuya Israeli pooki, nepik shumata ninye enkitoo neitu aekata eishori likae aiguanani too Siraeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Neaku eitoreisho apa Daudi olayioni le Yese te Israel pooki. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ore apa enkata naitoria ninye Israel naa ilarin artam; eitoreishe ninye ilarin ile te Hebron, neitoreisho ilarin tomoni uni oo kuni te Yerusalem." 
1Chronicles29:28 Neye ninye aa oltung'ani moruo oleng, oiputakinote nkolong'i eeta enkarsisisho o enkanyit kitok; neitoreisho Solomon olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
1Chronicles29:29 Ore apa nkiaasin o laiguanani Daudi, ebaiki enkiterunoto ometabaiki enkiting'oto, neigeroki te mbuku oo nkatinin e Samuel oladuaani, o too nkatinin e Natan ilo oiboni le Nkai, o too nkatinin eGad oladuaani," 
1Chronicles29:30 tenebo mbaa pooki e nkitoria enye, o mbaa pooki e nkitoria enye, o emagilanisho enye, o mbaa pooki naaetuo shumata ninye o shumata Israel, o shumata nkitoriat pooki oo nkuapi." 
2Chronicles1:1 Eitagolo apa Solomon olayioni le Daudi kewan te nkitoria, netii Olaitoriani Enkai enye tenebo ninye, neitaa ninye kitok oleng." 
2Chronicles1:2 Neirorie Solomon Isiraeli pooki, neirorie ilarikok le njore loo nkalifuni, o loo maaip, o larishak, o larikok pooki loo Siraeli, o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles1:3 Ore Solomon, oina umata pooki natii tenebo ninye, nepuo ine wueji e shumata natii Gibeon; amu ine apa etii olng'obor le Nkai oitobira Musa osinka lo Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles1:4 Kake eyaua apa Daudi ilo sanduku le Nkai te Kiriat-Yearim neya ine wueji apa neitobiraka, amu etuuno apa ninye olng'obor tenkaraki ninye te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles1:5 Kake ore ilo perere lo lasar lo suyai oitobira Besalel olayioni le Uri, olayioni le Huri, netii dukuya ilo ng'obor lo Laitoriani. Nesai Solomon oina umata Olaitoriani." 
2Chronicles1:6 Neilep Solomon alo ine netii olperere lo lasar lo suyai te dukuya Olaitoriani. Atua ilo ng'obor le ntumo apa etii ilo perere lo lasar, neitayu Solomon ilasarri oopejori enkalifu nabo te nchumata enye." 
2Chronicles1:7 Ore teina kewarie neitalio Olaitoriani kewan te Solomon, nejoki ninye, “Toomonu entoki niyieu naaisho.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Nejoki Solomon Enkai, “Ntodolua iyie enyorrata kitok nauno te papaai lai Daudi, nikintaa nanu olaiguanani te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles1:9 Olaitoriani Enkai, nchoo ina kisiligata ino tialo Daudi papa lai meitabari taata, amu kintaa iyie nanu olaiguanani te shumata olorere kitok oba anaa enterit e nkop." 
2Chronicles1:10 Nchooki naa taata nanu eng'eno nagut o yiolounoto pee alo najing'u naitashe te dukuya kulo tung'ana, amu aing'ae oidim aitoria ele orere lino kitok?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Newaliki Enkai Solomon ajoki, “Ore enkaraki natii ena atua oltau lino, neitu iyie iomonu imasaa, o enkarsisisho, o enkanyit, anaa enkishui e lelo likimba iyie, neitu doi ninye iomonu enkishui naado, kake eng'eno o eyiolounoto te kewan ino, pee itum aitoria lelo tung'ana laainei laa te ninche nanu aaitaa olaiguanani," 
2Chronicles1:12 kinchooki iyie eng'eno nagut o eyiolounoto. Kaaisho sii karsisisho, o masaa, o enkanyit, neitu ae kata etum obo le lelo aiguanak apa ootii dukuya iyie, nemeeta te siadi iyie olotum mbaa naatiu anaa kuna.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Neitoki Solomon alotu teine wueji e shumata te Gibeon, te dukuya ilo ng'obor le ntumo, nelotu Yerusalem. Neitore ninye Israel." 
2Chronicles1:14 Neiturrur Solomon tenebo ngarrin oo mbartan o lakedok loo-mbartan nkalifuni tomon oare, laa ninche apa etipika nkanas, oo ngarrin oo mbartan tenebo olaiguanani te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles1:15 Neitotiu olaiguanani enkosholai o sahabu anaa isoito te Yerusalem neiput iltarakua pooki wueji anaa iretet le Shefela. 
2Chronicles1:16 Neinyang'u Solomon mbartan naaing'uaa Misiri o enkop naji Kue, ore lelo biasharani lo laiguanani neng'amu ninche te Kue te nkinyang'a." 
2Chronicles1:17 Naa keinyang'u apa ninche engarri oo mbartan naing'uaa Misiri te shekeli iip ile e nkosholai, neinyang'u embarta te shekeli iip nabo o onom. Neikunaki sii apa neijia aamiraki ilaiguanak pooki le Hiti o laiguanak le Siria." 
2Chronicles2:1 Neitobir apa Solomon pee eshet enkaji e Nkai tenkaraki enkarna o Laitoriani, neitobiraki kewan enkaji e nkitoo." 
2Chronicles2:2 Neiteng'el Solomon iltung'ana nkalifuni ntomoni naapishana pee enap ilolan, neiteng'el iltung'ana nkalifuni ntomoni isiet pee eturu isoito teina kop oo ndonyio, neiteng'el iltung'ana nkalifuni uni o iip ile ooitasheiki ninche." 
2Chronicles2:3 Neirriwaki Solomon olkilikuai Huram olaiguanani le Turo: Nejoki, “Ore apa anaa enintaasa Daudi papa, nirriwaki ninye iltarakua ooshetie enkaji enye nabikie, ntaasaki sii nanu ina." 
2Chronicles2:4 “Ng'ura etaa nanu kajo pee ashet enkaji tenkaraki enkarna o Laitoriani Enkai ai, naitisinya nanu ninye apejoki enkorropil, o sonkoyoni naarropil te dukuya ninye. Naishoru nanu anaake emukate enkitoduaarato, naishoru nanu ilasarri oopejori tadekenya o teipa, too sabatoni o too lapaitin ng'ejuko, o too siruai gelunot lo Laitoriani Enkai ang, anaa apa enaiteng'elaki ntarasi te Israel." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ore ina aji nalo nanu ashet naa keaku kitok, amu ore Enkai ang naa aikitok alang nkaitin pooki." 
2Chronicles2:6 Kake aing'ae oidim ateshetaki ninye keper, aa ore keper nalakua oleng nemeishaa? Kara nanu ng'ae oshetaki ninye enkaji, aa ore meteleku ake ewueji nepejieki enkorropil te dukuya ninye?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ore naa taata irriwakaki nanu oltung'ani arriyia te siaai e sahabu, o enkosholai, o suyai, o sekenkei, o too muain pilei o naanyokie o nkilani pusi oltung'ani oiteng'enaki te nguetare, pee elo aaku tenebo lelo aisiaayiak arriyiak ootii tenebo nanu te Yuda o te Yerusalem, lelo apa ooishorua Daudi papa lai." 
2Chronicles2:8 Irriwakaki sii iltarakua o lkeek oonyaanyukie iltarakua, o mbaoi naaing'uaa Lebanon, amu ayiolo nanu ajo keyiolo isinkan linono aatudung mbaoi te Lebanon. Naa keaku isinkan laainei tenebo isinkan linono," 
2Chronicles2:9 pee aaitobiraki nanu mbaoi kumok, amu ore ina aji nalo nanu ashet naa keaku kitok naa enenking'asia." 
2Chronicles2:10 Naa kaishoru nanu tenkaraki isinkan linono, lelo oodung'u mbaoi, mpirbili nkalifuni tikitam e nkano naidong'o, o mpirbili nkalifuni tikitam e shairi, o mboreitin iip ong'uan oltulet le naisho oo sabibu, o eilata mboreitin iip ong'uan oltulet.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Neitoki Huram ilo aiguanani le Turo awal te mpalai naigeroko Solomon, nejo, “Ore enkaraki nanyor Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena, kintaa iyie olaiguanani lenye.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Neitoki Huram, ajo, “Meisisi Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, ilo oitobira shumata o enkop, laa ninye oishoo olaiguanani Daudi olayioni ng'en, neiputaki enkarriyiano o eyiolounoto, laa ninye oshetaki Olaitoriani enkaji, neshetaki kewan enkaji e nkitoo." 
2Chronicles2:13 “Airriwua naa taata nanu oltung'ani arriyia, obore eyiolounoto Huramabi" 
2Chronicles2:14 olayioni le ntito e Dan, ore apa menye naa oltung'ani le Turo. Eiteng'enaki ninye pee easishore sahabu, o enkosholai, o suyai, o esekenkei, o soito o nkeek, o muain pooki pilei o mpusi, o nkilani naanyokie o kitani napuyiapui. Neas mpukunot pooki e nguetare nedamu enkipirunoto ake ninye naishooki ninye meipiru. Keaku lelo tung'ana linono arriyiak tenebo iltung'ana arriyiak lo lkitok lai Daudi papaai lino." 
2Chronicles2:15 Ore naa taata ina ano o shairi, o eilata o enaisho oo sabibu, naa ninche eimaka olkitok lai, nchoo ninye meirriwaki isinkan linono;" 
2Chronicles2:16 naa aikidung'u iyiook mbaoi naaba anaa iniyieu te Lebanon, nikiyaki iyie too rridat aaimunye enaiposha e Yopa, pee itum iyie aawa Yerusalem.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Neitoki Solomon aiken iltung'ana pooki dokunot apa ootii enkop e Israel, aiturubare ina kikenare apa naikenishe Daudi papaai lenye. Netumi iltung'ana nkalifuni iip nabo o onom o okuni o iip ile." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ore ntomoni naapishana negelu metanapa ilolan. Ore nkalifuni ntomoni isiet nepuo aaturu isoito teina kop oo ldoinyio, ore nkalifuni uni o iip ile neitaa ilaitasheikinok pee etum iltung'ana aataas esiaai." 
2Chronicles3:1 Neiteru Solomon ashetu enkaji o Laitoriani te Yerusalem, te nchumata o ldoinyo le Moria, teine wueji apa neibalunye Olaitoriani kewan te papaai lenye Daudi. Teine wueji apa netegelua Daudi, te nchumata ine apa neiutuutishoreki e Ornan ilo le Yebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Neiteru ninye ashet to lapa liare to lari liong'uan le nkitoria enye. 
2Chronicles3:3 Kuna apa ntemeta e Solomon te nchetata e nkaji e Nkai: ore enkadoro naa ntemat e nkaina tikitam oopishana, naa ntemat e nkaina naaudo endapasho." 
2Chronicles3:4 Ore ine wueji nejing'ieki neba anaa endapasho eina aji. Ore enkadoro oo sunta naa ntemat enkaina onom o ong'uan. Ore atua ina aji nemura te sahabu nasila. 
2Chronicles3:5 Ore ilo gilata sapuk neikodo too ltarakua nemura te sahabu nasila, neguetakino iltuka, o lpisia." 
2Chronicles3:6 Eikodo apa olaiguanani ina aji e Nkai too soito sidain oogol enkinyang'a, o te sahabu naing'uaa enkop e Paraim." 
2Chronicles3:7 Neaku etipika apa ninye sahabu atua ina aji, ing'apeta enyena, o loom lenyena o sunta enyena." 
2Chronicles3:8 Neitobir sii ine wueji nesinya aisul, nenyaanyuk enkadoro enye o endapasho eina aji, naa ntemat e nkaina naaudo ake enchoto nabo, nemur ninye te sahabu nasila oo ntalantani iip ile." 
2Chronicles3:9 Ore enkiroishi oo lmushumaani naa shekeli nabo ometabaiki shekeli onom e sahabu. Nemur ninye lelo gilat le shumata te sahabu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Ore teine wueji nesinya aisul nepik ilkerubi oare loo nkeek, nemur ninche te sahabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Ore inaipuko e lelo kerubi pokira oare naa ntemat e nkaina are enkadoro. 
2Chronicles3:12 Ore enaipukoi olkerubi obo nelo atumore enaipukoi e likae kerubi te mpolos e nkaji. 
2Chronicles3:13 Ore inaipuko e kulo kerubi nebaya te nkadoro ntemat naaudo e nkaina, neitashe ake olkerubi too nkejek enyena eing'or olgos le kutukaji." 
2Chronicles3:14 Neitobir ilkarash liatua, pusi, o sinteti o loonyokie, o kitani napuyiapui neitobir ilkerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Ore te dukuya ina aji, neitobir ninye ing'apeta are naa ntemat e nkaina tomon o imiet o lpisiaai enkadoro, nepik inkopiyiani ilukuny naa ntemat imiet e nkaina enkadoro." 
2Chronicles3:16 Neitobir ninye olpisiai anaa osaei le murt nepik ninche enchumata e nena ng'apeta; neitobir ilgululu iip nabo neripaki ilo pisiaai. 
2Chronicles3:17 Etipika apa ninye nena ng'apeta dukuya ina aji e Nkai, nepik ake nabo enkalo e kopikop nepik enkae enkalo e moikuape; ore ina natii enkalo e kopikop nejo ninye Yakin, ore ina natii enkalo e moikuape nejo Boas." 
2Chronicles4:1 Eitobira ninye olperere lo lasar lo suyai, naa ntemat e nkaina naaudo enkadoro, naa neijia etiu endapasho, naa ntemat ong'uan olpisiai enkadoro nailep." 
2Chronicles4:2 Neitoki aitobir olmoti le sekenkei natosholaki, naa intemat are olpisiai enkaina endapasho, naa ntemat ong'uan olpisiai e nkaina endapasho naa ntemat tomon ookuni e nkaina enkamanaa enye. Naa kepurupurana apa." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ore tiabori ilo moti netii intokitin naaijo ilmong'i ooitashe emanita; naa ilkererin oare apa ninche. 
2Chronicles4:4 Neitashe ilo moti te nchumata lelo mong'i, neing'or okuni enkalo e moikuape, neing'or okuni enkalo o loontoluo, neing'or okuni enkalo e kopikop, neing'or okuni enkalo o loosaen, naa ninche apa eiteleikiaki ilo moti, ore nkaloli enye oo lkidong'o naa enkalo e atua etii." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ore endapasho enye neba anaa endap e nkaina, ore emanaroto enye neikununo anaa enkikompe, netiu anaa entapukai sidai; neeta mboreitin nkalifuni uni o ltulet enkare natii." 
2Chronicles4:6 Neitobir sii ilmotio tomon ooitukuoreki, nepik imiet enkalo e kopikop nepik imiet enkalo e moikuape. Kuna apa eitukuyieki irubat eng'ues naitaae olasar opejori, ore ilo moti naa oloo lapolosak pee eitukuore." 
2Chronicles4:7 Neitobir ninye nkitasheta oo ltaai anaa enatuutuaki nepik ninche atua ina aji e Nkai, nepik imiet enkalo e kopikop, nepik imiet enkalo e moikuape." 
2Chronicles4:8 Neitobir sii imesai tomon, nepik ninche atua ina aji e Nkai, nepik imiet enkalo e moikuape." 
2Chronicles4:9 Neitobir olgoriet loo lapolosak, o lgoriet kitok enejing'ieki olgoriet," 
2Chronicles4:10 nemur nena kutukie oo lgorieti to suyai; nepik ilo moti olpijata le nkalo e kopikop eina aji. 
2Chronicles4:11 Neitobir sii Huram imotioo, o nchempei oo lala, o ngirran. Neaku eidipa apa Huram esiaai pooki nataasaka olaiguanani Solomon te nkaji e Nkai:" 
2Chronicles4:12 nena ng'apeta pokira are, o lbakulini, o nena opiyiani naaishopokino, oina siaai oo usin naaripunyeki nkarash are naaimulumulieki nena girran naatii nchumat e nena ng'apeta;" 
2Chronicles4:13 o lgululu iip ong'uan ooikodieki ina siaai e ripare oo usin, te nkarasha ake nabo, pee eimulumul nena girran pokira are naatii nchumat e nena ng'apeta." 
2Chronicles4:14 Neitobir sii nkitasheta neiteleiki lelo motioo nena kitasheta. 
2Chronicles4:15 O ilo moti obo, o lelo mong'i pokira tomon oare ootii abori enye." 
2Chronicles4:16 O mbokishi o nchempei oo lala, o masaa pooki naaitobira Huram to suyai oidong'o, aitobiraki olaiguanani Solomon, tenkaraki enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles4:17 Ore teina kisiajata e nkop e Yuda eipurjaki ninche, teina terit natii erishata e Sukot o Sereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Neitobir Solomon kuna tokitin pooki te nkumoi sapuk oleng, o metaa meikenayu enkiroishi o suyai." 
2Chronicles4:19 Neaku eitobira Solomon ntokitin pooki apa naatii atua enkaji e Nkai: olperere lo lasar le sahabu, o misai tenkaraki emukate e nkitoduaaroto," 
2Chronicles4:20 o nkitasheta oo ltaai, o lelo taai lenye le sahabu nasila, pee eyupuyup te dukuya ilo gilata liatua osinya, anaa apa enatuutuaki." 
2Chronicles4:21 O ntapuka, oltaai, o nena tokitin naarieki iltaai e sahabu nasila;" 
2Chronicles4:22 o ntokitin naaitobirieki iltaai, o mbeseni, o ntokitin e nkorropil, o ngirran e nkima, e sahabu nasila, o lgos le nkaji e Nkai ojing'ieki kutukaji o lgilata liatua o metabaiki ine wueji nesinya aisul, ore nkutukie eine nejing'ieki ina aji e Nkai naa ine sahabu." 
2Chronicles5:1 Neaku eidipe ina siaai pooki apa nataasa Solomon tenkaraki enkaji o Laitoriani. Neyau Solomon aitijing'u nena tokitin apa naaitisinya Daudi papaai lenye, neshum ina osholai, o sahabu, o masaa pooki teneshumishoreki e nkaji e Nkai." 
2Chronicles5:2 Neitoki Solomon aiturrur ilpayiani loo Siraeli, o lukuny pooki oo loshon, o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye too ltung'ana loo Siraeli, te Yerusalem, pee epuo aailepunye osanduku lo lning'o lo sotua lo Laitoriani aaitupuku te nkanasa e Daudi, aa taa Sion." 
2Chronicles5:3 Neiturrurro iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli te dukuya olaiguanani to sirua lo lapa liopishana. 
2Chronicles5:4 Nepuonu ilpayiani pooki loo Siraeli, nenap ilawi ilo sanduku," 
2Chronicles5:5 neyau ilo sanduku oilo ng'obor le ntumo, o nena masaa naasinya pooki naatii atua ilo ng'obor; neyau ilapolosak o Lawi ninche." 
2Chronicles5:6 Ore olaiguanani Solomon o lturrurr pooki le Israel apa oiturrurre te dukuya ninye, netii dukuya ilo sanduku, nepolos nkerra kumok o lmong'i lemeikenayu." 
2Chronicles5:7 Neaku eyautua ilapolosak ilo sanduku lo lning'o lo sotua lo Laitoriani ewueji enye, tiatua olgilata liatua leina aji, tiatua ine wueji nesinya aisul, tiabori inaipuko oo lkerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Amu kelak apa lelo kerubi inaipuko enye te shumata ilo sanduku lo lning'o lo sotua, neaku keitoip lelo kerubi ilo sanduku lo sotua, o mbokishi enyena." 
2Chronicles5:9 Naa kaadoru apa nena bokishi oleng, ometaa ore ineeiting'ie nelioyu teine wueji sinyati te dukuya olgilata liatua osinya. Kake melioo te boo. Netii ninche ine ometabaiki ena olong." 
2Chronicles5:10 Metii apa toki atua ilo sanduku meteleku ake nena baoi dapashi oo soito apa naatipika Musa te Horeb, teine apa naitobirie Olaitoriani olning'o lo sotua o ltung'ana loo Siraeli, apa pee eipang'u te nkop e Misiri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Ore apa pee eipang'u ilapolosak teine wueji sinyati (amu ore apa lelo apolosak pooki ootii ine neitisinya ate, meshilaa ilturrurri lenye;" 
2Chronicles5:12 ore lelo aranyak pooki le Lawi, o Asaf, o Heman, o Yedutum, o layiok lenye o lalashera lenye, neishop ilkilani sidain, neeta inkinantani dapashi, o nkai oo sinkolioitin, o lwululi loo usin, neitashe te nkalo o loo saen lo lperere lo lasar, tenebo ilapolosak iip nabo o tikitam ookut ntarumpetani.)" 
2Chronicles5:13 Naa esiaai apa oo lakutak loo ntarumpetani, o laranyak pee eitoning'oo ate te nkirukoto o sinkolio eisis neisho enashe Olaitoriani. Naa teneilepieki osinkolio too ntarumpetani o too nkinantani dapashi, o kulie ake kinantani naaranyishoreki eisisi Olaitoriani, aajo, “Eisupat ninye nebik enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi” ore ina aji, ina aji o Laitoriani neiput enkatampoi;" 
2Chronicles5:14 amu keiput apa enkitoo o Laitoriani enkaji e Nkai. 
2Chronicles6:1 Neitoki Solomon ajo, “Etejo Olaitoriani kebik ninye te misimisi nagut." 
2Chronicles6:2 Aateshetaka nanu iyie enkaji e shumata, ewueji ino nibikie ntarasi.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Neitoki olaiguanani aibelekenya nemayian ina umata oo Siraeli, eitashe ina umata pooki oo Siraeli." 
2Chronicles6:4 Nejo ninye, “Meisisi Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, amu eitabayie ninye te nkaina enye ina apa naisiligie te nkutuk enye Daudi papaai lai, ejo," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Ore ebaiki ina olong nayaua nanu iltung'ana laainei aitupuku te nkop e Misiri, eitu nanu agelu enkanasa tiatua Israel pooki, naa ninye eshetieki enkaji, pee etum enkarna ai ataa ine etii. Neitu nanu agelu oltung'ani aitaa kitok te shumata iltung'ana laainei loo Siraeli." 
2Chronicles6:6 Kake ategelua nanu Yerusalem pee etum enkarna ai ataa ine etii, nategelua nanu Daudi pee eitasheiki iltung'ana laainei le Israel.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 Eeta apa Daudi papaai lai to ltau lenye pee eshet enkaji tenkaraki enkarna o Laitoriani, Enkai e Israel." 
2Chronicles6:8 Kake etiaaka Olaitoriani Daudi papaai lai, ‘Ore hoo niata to ltau lino pee ishet enkaji tenkaraki enkarna ai, intobira amu iata ina to ltau lino;" 
2Chronicles6:9 ore ake eyia, milo iyie ashet ina aji, kake olayioni lino likiikini iyie, ninye olo ashet enkaji tenkaraki enkarna ai.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 Eitabayie taata Olaitoriani ina kisiligata enye apa naisiligishore; amu aitasho nanu te rishata e Daudi, papaai lai, naton to lorika le nkitoo, le Israel, anaa apa enaisiligishore Olaitoriani natesheta nanu enkaji tenkaraki enkarna o Laitoriani, Enkai e Israel." 
2Chronicles6:11 Natipika ine osanduku laa ninye etii ilo sotua lo Laitoriani oitobira ninye tenebo iltung'ana loo Siraeli.” 
2Chronicles6:12 Neitashe Solomon te dukuya ilo perere lo lasar lo Laitoriani te dukuya ina umata pooki neilepie nkaik enyena aitorioo. 
2Chronicles6:13 Eitobira apa Solomon ewueji o suyai neika ntemat are e nkaina enkadoro o endapasho, naa entemata nabo enkadoro nailep, nepik apa ine wueji olgoriet. Neitashe te nchumata. Neitoki agil kung te nchumata ine te dukuya ina umata pooki oo Siraeli neitorioo nkaik enyena aing'orie shumata," 
2Chronicles6:14 nejo, “Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, meetae Enkai natiu anaa iyie, te keper o te nkop, naibung osotua neitodolu enyorrata nauno too sinkan lenyena oopuo te dukuya iyie too ltauja lenye pooki." 
2Chronicles6:15 Mbung'a iyie tialo osinka lino Daudi, papaai lai ina apa nimbalakinye ninye; ee iroro iyie te nkutuk ino, nintabayie te nkaina ino nena ena olong." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ore naa taata, Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, mbung'a to sinka lino Daudi, papaai lai, ina apa nisiligie ninye, ijo, Mikiany ae kata oltung'ani kisiaai iyie te dukuya nanu, pee etonie olorika le nkitoo le Israel, oi duoo tenaa kejurru ilayiok linono nkoitoi enye nepuo too nkitanapat aainei anaa enishomie iyie te dukuya nanu.”" 
2Chronicles6:17 Ore naa taata Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, nchoo eunoyu ilo rorei lino, apa lirorie osinka lino Daudi." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Kake amaa, kesipa kebik Olaitoriani tenebo iltung'ana te nkop? Ng'ura, ore keper o keper nalakua nemikiishaa iyie; kebaa naa mikiishaa iyie ena aji natesheta nanu!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Toning'o naa enkomono o sinka lino o esayiata enye, Olaitoriani Enkai ai. Toning'o enkishirata o enkomono nayau osinka lino dukuya iyie;" 
2Chronicles6:20 pee etum nkonyek inono aaing'ura ena aji dama o kewarie, ene wueji apa nisiligishore pee ipik enkarna ino, pee itum atoning'o enkomono naomon osinka lino tene wueji." 
2Chronicles6:21 Toning'o iyie eomonokinoto o sinka lino o enoo ltung'ana linono le Israel, te neomon eing'or ene wueji, ee toning'o iyie itii emanyisho ino te keper, naa te nining nipalaki." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Teneas oltung'ani eng'oki tialo ole latia enye, neinosieki olmumai lenye te dukuya ele perere lo lasar tena aji," 
2Chronicles6:23 toning'o naa iyie itii keper, nias, ninguanare isinkan linono, aitalaku entorroni ayau entorroni enye shumata endukuya enye makewan, nimbalunye ilo supat alaaki ninye te risioroto e supatisho enye." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Tenemiri iltung'ana linono loo Siraeli te dukuya ilmang'ati, enkaraki nataasa ninche eng'oki te iyie, tenelo neibelekenya ninche aaibalie enkarna ino, neomon, nesaisho tiatua ena aji," 
2Chronicles6:25 toning'o ake iyie itii keper, nipalaki eng'oki oo ltung'ana linono loo Siraeli, nirrinyu ninche menyaaki aapuonu ina kop apa ninchoo ninche o loo menye." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Teneikeno keper, nelai enchan tenkaraki nataasa ninche eng'oki tialo iyie, teneomon ninche eing'or ene wueji, neibalie enkarna ino, neibelekenya aaing'uaa ing'ok enye, itoosho iyie ninche," 
2Chronicles6:27 toning'o naa iyie itii keper, nipalaki eng'oki oo sinkan linono, iltung'ana linono loo Siraeli, niutaki ninche enkoitoi sidai naa ninye epuoyie; nirriwaki enchan ena kop ino, naa ninye inchoo iltung'ana linono metaa enjung'ore." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Tenelotu olameyu enkop anaa olmeitai, anaa erruoyo ndaiki naatii nkurman, anaa tenelotu olmaati, anaa enkurto; teneng'adu ilmang'ati lenye ninche te nabo ake ninye oo nkanas enye; o pooki meitai anaa pooki muoyian;" 
2Chronicles6:29 ore ake enkomono pooki o esayiata naomon oltung'ani obo anaa iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli, eyiolo ake oltung'ani eoshoto enye o sina lenye, neitorioo nkaik aaing'orie ena aji;" 
2Chronicles6:30 toning'o naa iyie te keper, teina manyisho ino, nipalaki, ore ake pooki tau liyiolo iyie nilaaki te risioroto oo nkoitoi enyena (Amu iyie ake openy oyiolo iltauja loo nkera e tung'ana);" 
2Chronicles6:31 pee kitum ninche aatureita iyie, nepuo too nkoitoi inono, nkolong'i pooki naaishu teina kop apa ninchoo iloo menye." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Naa tenelotu oltung'ani loo loreren, ilo leme oloo ltung'ana linono loo Siraeli eing'uaa enelakua tenkaraki enkarna ino kitok, o enkarna ino magilani, tenelotu ninye aomon eing'or ena aji," 
2Chronicles6:33 toning'o iyie itii keper, ina manyisho ino, nias te risioroto e nena pooki nikimpotie ilo tung'ani loo loreren iyie; pee etum iloreren pooki le nkop aatayiolo enkarna ino, nikiureyu iyie, anaa enaasita iltung'ana linono loo Siraeli, netum aatayiolo nchere ore ena aji natesheta nanu te nkarna ino naa enkarna ino eipotieki." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Tenepuo iltung'ana linono olarrabal aagilunore ilmang'ati lenye, ore te pooki oitoi niimie iyie ninche; nikiomon ninche iyie eing'or ena anasa nitegelua, iyie o ena aji natesheta nanu te nkarna ino," 
2Chronicles6:35 toning'o iyie itii keper enkomono enye o esayiata enye, nintagol ninche." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Teneas ninche eng'oki te dukuya iyie, amu meetae oltung'ani lemias ing'ok, nigorokino iyie ninche, ninchooyo ninche too lmang'ati lenye nenapi ninche aaya eyararoto te nkop nalakua o enataana;" 
2Chronicles6:37 kake tenedamu ninche too ltauja teina kop apa nawaki ninche, neirridu, nikisai ninche iyie teina kop e yararoto enye, ejo, ‘Kitaasa iyiook eng'oki, nikitaasa ntorrok’;" 
2Chronicles6:38 teneirridu ninche too ndamunot enye pooki o too ltauja lenye pooki teina kop e yararoto enye, apa naawaki ninche, neomon eing'or ina kop enye apa ninchoo iyie loo menye, oina anasa nitegelua iyie, o ina aji natesheta nanu tenkaraki enkarna ino," 
2Chronicles6:39 toning'o iyie itii keper ina manyisho ino, enkomono enye o esayiata enye. Ntagolo ninche, nipalaki lelo tung'ana linono ootaasa eng'oki te iyie." 
2Chronicles6:40 Ore naa taata Enkai ai nchoo eing'or nkonyek inono nening nkiyiaa inono enkomono ene wueji. 
2Chronicles6:41 Naa tudumunye taata, Olaitoriani Enkai, shomo ewueji ino enkiyeng'iyeng, iyie oilo sanduku lino le magilanisho. Nchoo ilapolosak linono Olaitoriani Enkai meishopokini enjeunoto ino. Nchoo isinyat linono eshipakino esupatisho ino." 
2Chronicles6:42 Olaitoriani Enkai, mimbelekeny enkomom ino aitung'uaa ilo lino otubukokoki eilata aaput! Tadamu enyorrata ino nauno tenkaraki Daudi osinka lino.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Ore ake pee eidip Solomon enkomono enye nedou enkima naing'uaa shumata neinos ilo asar opejori o nkishorot neiput enkitoo o Laitoriani ina aji e Nkai. 
2Chronicles7:2 Neitu eidim ilapolosak aatijing atua ina aji o Laitoriani. 
2Chronicles7:3 Ore ake pee edol nkera pooki oo Siraeli ina kima edou, o enkitoo o Laitoriani te shumata ina aji e Nkai, neirrugo ninche aaitabaiki nkomomi enkop, te ndung'oroto, neserem neisho Olaitoriani enashe ejo, “Amu aisupat ninye, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Neitoki olaiguanani o ltung'ana pooki aaishooyo ilasarri te dukuya o Laitoriani. 
2Chronicles7:5 Eishorua olaiguanani Solomon olasar ilmong'i nkalifuni tikitam oare, o nkerra nkalifuni iip o tikitam. Ore olaiguanani, o ltung'ana pooki neitisiny ina aji e Nkai." 
2Chronicles7:6 Neitashe ilapolosak too wuejitin enye. Neitashe sii Ilawi aaiko neijia, eeta nena kinantani oo sinkolioitin, apa naaitobira olaiguanani Daudi pee eishorieki Olaitoriani enashe - amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi. Naa teneisis apa Daudi Olaitoriani te nkisiaayiare enye, ore te nda shoto neosh ilapolosak ntarumpetani; neitashe Israel pooki." 
2Chronicles7:7 Neitisiny Solomon empolos e ilo goriet apa otii dukuya enkaji o Laitoriani. Amu teine eitayio olasar opejori, o eilata o lasar le seriani. Amu ore apa ilo perere lo lasar lo suyai oitobira Solomon, nemeishaa olasar opejori, o lasar le ntapa, o eilata." 
2Chronicles7:8 Ore apa teina kata neibung Solomon osirua nkolong'i naapishana o Siraeli pooki tenebo ninye, eumata kitok oleng nabaiki enejingieki Hamat ometabaiki oerata le Misiri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Ore te nkolong e isiet neibung ninche eumata e nkitirring'a; amu eibung'a apa ninche enkitisinyata o lperere lo lasar nkolong'i naapishana, o sirua nkolong'i naapishana." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ore te nkolong e tikitam oo kuni o lapa liopishana neisho iltung'ana meshomo nkang'itie enye, eng'ida neeta enchipai too ltauja lenye tenkaraki ina supatisho naitoduaa Olaitoriani, Daudi, o Solomon o ltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli." 
2Chronicles7:11 Neidip Solomon ina aji o Laitoriani, o enkaji o laiguanani e nkitoo, o nena pooki apa naaitobira Solomon pee eas te nkaji enye makewan, neitabaya pooki aitobiraki." 
2Chronicles7:12 Neitoki Olaitoriani aitalioo kewan te Solomon kewarie nejoki ninye, “Atoning'o nanu enkomono ino, nategelua ene wueji te nkaraki kewan ai pee eaku enkaji o lasar." 
2Chronicles7:13 Tenaiken nanu keper ometaa meetae enchan, anaa aitanap olmaati pee emut enkop, anaa airriu olmeitai atua iltung'ana laainei," 
2Chronicles7:14 ore ake pee eitobir ate iltung'ana laainei, lelo laa enkarna ai eipotieki, neomon ninche neing'oru enkomom ai, neibelekenya aaing'uaa nkoitoi enye torrok, naa kaning nanu atii keper, napalaki eng'oki enye naishiunye enkop enye." 
2Chronicles7:15 Ore taa ina kata, nebolo nkonyek aainei neinining nkiyiaa aainei enkomono naomoni tene wueji." 
2Chronicles7:16 Amu ore taata ategelua nanu, naitisinya ena aji pee etum enkarna ai atobiko tene ntarasi; ore nkonyek aainei o ltau lai neaku ine etii nkatitin pooki." 
2Chronicles7:17 Naa ore tialo iyie, tenilo te dukuya nanu, anaa apa Daudi papaai lino, nias te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapa nanu, nimbung nkikoot aainei, o nkiguanat aainei," 
2Chronicles7:18 naitasheyie nanu olorika lino le nkitoo; anaa apa anatoning'ore Daudi papaai lino, ajoki, ‘Melai aekata te iyie oltung'ani oitoreisho te Israel.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 “Kake tenimbelekenya iyie, ninturraa nkikoot aainei o nkitanapat aainei natipika nanu dukuya iyie; nilo aisiaai kulie aitin, niserem ninche," 
2Chronicles7:20 naadotu nanu teina kop apa naaishoo; ore ena aji naitisinya nanu tenkaraki enkarna ai, naiturraa aiwuang'ie too nkonyek aainei, naitaa nanu endung'et e rashe, o rorei ooimakini tiatua loreren." 
2Chronicles7:21 Naa ore tiatua ena aji, naailepieki oleng, ore pooki ng'ae ogiroo neing'asia, nejo, ‘Kainyoo pee etaasa Olaitoriani ena tena kop o tena aji?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Naa kepuo ninche aajo Enkaraki natanyaita ninche Enkai oo loo menye, apa nayaua ninche aitupuku te nkop e Misiri, neigarakino ninche kulie aitin, neserem ninche, neisiaai ninche; ore enkaraki ina eyaua Enkai ena torroni pooki shumata ninche. ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Ore tesiadi ilarin tikitam laa ninche eteshetie Solomon enkaji o Laitoriani o enkaji enye makewan 
2Chronicles8:2 neitoki Solomon ashetu nena anas apa naaishoo Huram ninye, nepik iltung'ana loo Siraeli ine." 
2Chronicles8:3 Neitoki Solomon alo Hamatsoba, neisulie ninye." 
2Chronicles8:4 Neshet ninye Tadamor tiong'ata o nkanas pooki naashumishoreki apa naatesheta ninye te Hamat. 
2Chronicles8:5 Enyaaka sii ashet Bet-horon e shumata o Bet-horon e abori, nkanas naasheta isunta, o nchomito, naatii isekenke." 
2Chronicles8:6 O Baalat o nkanas naasheta too soito apa naara ine Solomon, o nkanas pooki oo ngarrin enyena oo mbartan, o nkanas oo lakedok lenyena loo mbartan, o pooki toki nayieu Solomon neshetu te Yerusalem, o te Lebanon, o teina kop pooki enkitoria enye." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ore lelo tung'ana pooki ootelekutua too Lhiti, o Lamori, o Lperisi, o Lhifi, o Lyebusi, lelo leme iloo Siraeli," 
2Chronicles8:8 ebaiki iishoritin enye, apa ootelekutua teina kop leitu eidaikie iltung'ana loo Siraeli - neitaa Solomon lelo ilenkisiaayiare nagol, naa neijia etiu o taata." 
2Chronicles8:9 Kake ore tialo iltung'ana loo Siraeli, eitu eitaa Solomom irrindiki le siaai enye. Isikarini apa ninche, o ltung'ana le nkitoo, o lkituaak le njore loo ngarrin oo mbartan, o lakedok loo mbartan." 
2Chronicles8:10 Naa kulo apa iltung'ana kituaak le Solomon, iip are o onom, laa ninche oata enkitoria tiatua olorere." 
2Chronicles8:11 Neyau Solomon entito e Farao aitung'uaa enkanasa e Daudi neriku ina aji apa nateshetaka ninye. Amu etejo ninye, “Meton enkitok ai te nkaji e Daudi olaiguanani loo Siraeli. Amu ore iwuejitin neeyauaki osanduku lo Laitoriani naa kesinya.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Neitaiki Solomon Olaitoriani olasar opejori te nchumata ilo perere lo lasar lo Laitoriani apa otesheta ninye te mbata e nkaji e Nkai. 
2Chronicles8:13 Ore anaa enayieuni te nkisiayiare e pooki olong'i, neitayuni ilasarri terisioroto enkitanapata e Musa too sabatoni, o too lapaitin ng'ejuko okuni to lari o sirua loo mukateni neitu eisuijieki, o sirua loo wikii, o sirua loo lng'oborri." 
2Chronicles8:14 Ore te risioroto e nkikoo e Daudi papaai lenye, etegelua ninye ilturrurri loo lapolosak tenkaraki enkisiaayiare enye, o Lawi tenkaraki isiaaitin enye e nkisisa o enkisiaayiare te dukuya ilapolosak metaasa esiaai te pooki olong nayieuni; o ilarripok loo nchomito loo lturrurri lenye too nchomito esiana naje; amu ina apa eitanapishe Daudi osinka le Nkai." 
2Chronicles8:15 Neitu ninche eibelekenya apaash ina naitanapa olaiguanani ilapolosak o Lawi tialo pooki bae o too lchumat. 
2Chronicles8:16 Neaku eidipe apa esiaai pooki e Solomon ebaiki ina olong apa napiki olkitamanyunoto le nkaji o Laitoriani. O meidipayu, neidipayu ina aji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles8:17 Neitoki Solomon alo Esiong'eber o Elot te mbata e naiposha, te nkop e Edom." 
2Chronicles8:18 Neirriwaki Huram ninye too sinkan lenyena imelin o sinkan ootamoo enaiposha, nepuo ninche Ofir tenebo isinkan le Solomon. Neyau teine ntalantani iip ong'uan o onom e sahabu nayaki olaiguanani Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:1 Ore ake pee ening'oo enkaiguanani e Sheba olnigo le Solomon, nelotu Yerusalem atem ninye too nkikilikuanat naagol. Nelotu ninye eeta ilaisiaayiak kumok o ntamesin naanapita isonkoyoni, o sahabu sapuk oleng, o soito oogol enkinyang'a. Ore ake pee elotu enetii Solomon, neliki ninye nena pooki apa naatii oltau lenye." 
2Chronicles9:2 Newal Solomon nkikilikuanat enyena pooki. Meetae entoki hoo nabo naisudoro to laiguanani Solomon neitu eibalakinye ninye. 
2Chronicles9:3 Ore ake pee edol ina aiguanani e sheba eng'eno e Solomon, oina aji natesheta ninye;" 
2Chronicles9:4 o endaa natii emisa enye, o ltonei loo lkituaak lenyena, o enkisiaayiare oo sinkan lenyena, o nkilani enye, o lanapak loo nkikompeni enye o nkilani enye, o lasarri lenyena oo pejori ooitayio ninye te nkaji o Laitoriani, eitu eitoki ninye aidim atejo ae." 
2Chronicles9:5 Nejoki ninye olaiguanani, “Ekesipa olkilikuai apa latoning'o nanu te nkop ai makewan tialo mbaa inono o eng'eno ino." 
2Chronicles9:6 Kake eitu apa nanu anyorraa ilo kilikuai ometaba anaa nalotu adol too nkonyek aainei makewan, naa ng'ura, eitu apa nanu aalikini olpisiaai le ng'eno ino. Ilus iyie teilo kilikuai apa latoning'o nanu." 
2Chronicles9:7 Emunyak siaake nkituaak inono o sinkan linono ooitashe te dukuya iyie anaake nening eng'eno ino! 
2Chronicles9:8 Meisisi Olaitoriani Enkai ino amu kitishipakine ninye iyie nikipik iyie olorika lenye le nkitoo pee iyaku olaiguanani te rishata o Laitoriani Enkai ino! Ore amu kenyor Olaitoriani Enkai ino Israel naa keitasheyie ninche ntarasi, kintaa ninye iyie olaiguanani lenye, pee itum aiguanayu te sipata o te supatisho.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Neitoki ninye aisho olaiguanani shekeli iip o tikitam e sahabu, o sonkoyoni kumok, o soito oogol enkinyang'a: ooishoo enkaiguanani e Sheba olaiguanani Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:10 Ore lelo sinkan le Huram o sinkan le Solomon apa ooyautua sahabu naing'uaa Ofir neyau sii ilkeek ooji ilmusantali o soito oogol enkinyang'a. 
2Chronicles9:11 Neitayunye Solomon lelo keek nkedeta naajing'ieki enkaji e Nkai o enkaji o laiguanani, o wululi loo usin, o nkinantani oo usin, tenkaraki lelo aranyak. Eitu aikata edoli embae naaijo ena te nkop e Yuda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Neisho Solomon enkaiguanani e Sheba nena pooki naayieu ninye, pooki toki ake ninye natoomonuo metii ntokitin naayaka ninye olaiguanani. Nerrinyo ninye alo enkop enye tenebo ilaisiaayiak lenyena." 
2Chronicles9:13 Ore apa enkiroishi e sahabu nayauaki enetii olaiguanani Solomon naa ntalantani iip ile o ntomoni ile o ile. 
2Chronicles9:14 Ore nena naayautua ilainyang'ak o lamirak, eyautua sii ilaiguanak pooki le Arabia o lbalusuni leina kop sahabu o enkosholai aayaki Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:15 Neitobir olaiguanani ilong'oi iip are sapuki e sahabu naidong'oki, ore ake elong'o nabo naa shekeli iip ile e sahabu naidong'oki." 
2Chronicles9:16 Neitoki aitobir ilong'oi iip uni e sahabu naidong'oki; naa shekeli iip uni e sahabu naidong'oki ake elong'o nabo. Nepik olaiguanani nena long'oi atua ina aji o sero le Lebanon. 
2Chronicles9:17 Neitobir sii olaiguanani olorika le nkitoo kitok loo lala loo lkanchaoni, nemur te sahabu nasila." 
2Chronicles9:18 Neeta ilo orika le nkitoo nkedeta ile o ewueji neiteleikini o nkejek e sahabu, neitatashakini ilo orika le nkitoo, ore ake enkalo nabo eilo orika le nkitoo netii ineeiteleikini Nkaik, o lng'atunyo oare ooitashe too mbat nena wuejitin neeiteleikini nkaik." 
2Chronicles9:19 Neitashe ake ilng'atunyo tomon oare teine, neitashe ake obo te nkalo e bayie e pooki kedet enena kedeta pokira ile, eitu aekata edoli entoki naaijo ina te pooki kitoria." 
2Chronicles9:20 Ore ntokitin pooki naaokishoreki o laiguanani Solomon naa ine sahabu, ore imasaa pooki eina aji entim e Lebanon naa ine sahabu nasila. Meikenari apa enkosholai aajo toki too nkolong'i e Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:21 Amu kepuo apa imelin o laiguanani Tarshishi tenebo isinkan le Huram kata nabo te rishata oo larin okuni ore nena melin e Tarshish naa kepuonu apa enapita sahabu, o enkosholai, o lala loo lkanchaoni, o yekenyi o motonyi sidain naaijo ilukunkuni." 
2Chronicles9:22 Neisulu Solomon ilaiguanak pooki le nkop te karsisisho o te ng'eno. 
2Chronicles9:23 Neing'oru ilaiguanak pooki le nkop enetii Solomon ejo pee ening eng'eno enye natipika Enkai atua endamunoto enye. 
2Chronicles9:24 Neyau ake pooki lenye enkishoroto, ntokitin e nkosholai o ne sahabu, o lkilani, o emanoo, o sonkoyoni, o mbartan o nyumpui te pooki ari." 
2Chronicles9:25 Neeta apa Solomon ilaleta nkalifuni ong'uan loo mbartan, o ngarrin oo mbartan, o lakedok loo mbartan nkalifuni tomon o are, ootamanya nena anas oo ngarrin oo mbartan tenebo olaiguanani te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles9:26 Neitore ninye ilaiguanak pooki ebaiki olkeju le Frati, ometabaiki enkop oo Lfilisti, o metabaiki olpolosie le Misiri." 
2Chronicles9:27 Neitotiu olaiguanani sahabu te Yerusalem anaa isoito nebayu iltarakua te nkumoi anaa ilng'abolo le Shefela. 
2Chronicles9:28 Neyakini Solomon mbartan naaing'uaa Misiri neing'uaa nkuapi pooki. 
2Chronicles9:29 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Solomon ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto neigeroki tiatua embuku oo nkatinin e Natan ilo oiboni le Nkai o tiatua e naibon e Ahija le Shilon, o too nduaat e Ido ilo aduaani, eipirta Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat." 
2Chronicles9:30 Eitoreishe apa Solomon te Yerusalem neitore Israel pooki ilarin artam. 
2Chronicles9:31 Neirrag Solomon etua anaa loo menye. Nenukari te nkanasa e Daudi papaai lenye. Neitoreisho Rehoboam olayioni lenye te rishata enye. 
2Chronicles10:1 Eshomo apa Rehoboam Shekem, amu eshomo apa iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli Shekem aaitaa ninye olaiguanani." 
2Chronicles10:2 Ore ake pee ening Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat ina, (amu Misiri apa etii ninye, ine apa neisikaka ailany olaiguanani Solomon) neitoki Yeroboam arrinyunye te Misiri." 
2Chronicles10:3 Neirriwaa ninche olkilikuai meipotuni ninye. Ore Yeroboam o Siraeli pooki nepuonu aajoki Reroboam," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Eiroshiyie apa papaai lino enchata ang oo murto. Ore naa taata nteneneng'a ina kisiayiare nagol natii shumata iyiook, naa eikisiaai iyiook iyie.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Enyaaki wootu enatii nanu te rishata oo nkolong'i uni.” Neaku etorrinyote iltung'ana aapuo." 
2Chronicles10:6 Neitoki olaiguanani Rehoboam aikilikuanishore ilpayiani, laa ninche apa ooitashe te dukuya olaiguanani Solomon papaai lenye, apa eton eishu, ejoki, “Kaa intae kiutakaki matiaaki kulo tung'ana?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Tiniaku iyie supat tialo kulo tung'ana, nintiship ninche, niro irorei supati tialo ninche, naa keaku ninche isinkan linono ntarasi.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Kake etanya ninye ina kikoo oo lpayiani, neing'oru enkikoo oo lbarnot le risiori enye." 
2Chronicles10:9 Nejoki ninche, “Kaa intae iututu pee kiwaliki kulo tung'ana laatiaakita ninche nanu, Nteneneng'a enchata ang oo murto apa natipika papaai lino shumata iyiook? ”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Nejoki lelo barnot le risiori enye ninye, “Nji iyie shomo tiaaki lelo tung'ana likitiaakitia, ‘Eiroshiyie apa papaai lino enchata ang oo murto, kake inteneneng'aki iyie iyiook;’ nji shomo tiaaki ninche, ‘Ore enkilinta ai naa ninye sapuk alang empolos e Papaai." 
2Chronicles10:11 Naa Ore naa taata, teneiteleikia apa papaai intae enchata oo murto nairoishi, naa kaponaa nanu enkiroishi eina shata inyi oo murto. Eitamio intae papaai too nkibokoni, kake kaitame nanu intae too nkulupani.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Neitoki Yeroboam o ltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli aapuonu enetii Rehoboam te nkolong e uni, anaa enatejo olaiguanani, “Enyaaki wootu enatii nanu te nkolong e uni.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Newaliki olaiguanani ninche tenkisikong'ata, neany ina kikoo oo lpayiani." 
2Chronicles10:14 Neirorie olaiguanani ninche te risioroto enkikoo oo lbarnot, ejoki, “Eiroshiyie apa papaai enchata inyi oo murto, kake kaponaa nanu enkiroishi. Eitamio apa intae papaai too nkibokoni, kake kaitame nanu intae too nkulupani.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Neaku eitu ening olaiguanani iltung'ana amu embae ena nayaua Enkai, pee etum Olaitoriani aitabai ororei lenye, apa oiroro aimunye Ahija le Shilon metoliki Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat." 
2Chronicles10:16 Ore ake pee edol Isiraeli pooki aajo eitu ening olaiguanani ninche, newaliki iltung'ana olaiguanani aajoki, “Kaa rubata iyiook kiata te Daudi? Mikiata iyiook enjung'ore to layioni le Yese. Shomo pooki ng'ae olng'obor lino, intae Israel! Ing'ura taata enkaji ino makewan Daudi.” Nedumunye Isiraeli pooki aapuo ilng'oborri lenye." 
2Chronicles10:17 Kake eitoria apa Rehoboam iltung'ana pooki loo Siraeli ootii nkanas e Yuda. 
2Chronicles10:18 Neitoki olaiguanani Rehoboam airriwaa Hadoram laa ninye apa olaitasheikinoni le siaai nagol, nenang iltung'ana loo Siraeli ninye too soito metua. Neisarrisar olaiguanani Rehoboam alo airot ngarrin enyena oo mbartan, pee eisikaki Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles10:19 Neaku etekepari Isiraeli te nkaji e Daudi ometabaiki ena olong. 
2Chronicles11:1 Ore ake pee elotu Rehoboam Yerusalem, neiturrur enkaji e Yuda o ene Benchamen, iltung'ana nkalifuni iip o ntomoni isiet gelunot, pee earare Israel, pee errinyoki Rehoboam enkitoria." 
2Chronicles11:2 Kake eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Shemaia ilo tung'ani le Nkai, ejo," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Tiaaki Rehoboam olayioni le Solomon, olaiguanani le Yuda, o Siraeli pooki ootii Yuda, o Benchamen," 
2Chronicles11:4 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Mipuopuo intae aarare ilalashera linyi. Torrinyoyu pooki tung'ani shomo enkang enye, amu ore ena bae naa nanu eing'uaa.” Neaku etoning'o ninche ororei lo Laitoriani, nerrinyo neitu epuo aarare Yeroboam." 
2Chronicles11:5 Etobiko apa Rehoboam te Yerusalem neshet nkanas naamitunye kewan tiatua Yuda," 
2Chronicles11:6 etesheta Betlehem, o Etam, o Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 o Betsur, o Soko, o Adulam," 
2Chronicles11:8 o Gat, o Maresha, o Sif," 
2Chronicles11:9 o Adoraim, o Lakish, o Ashetak," 
2Chronicles11:10 o Sora, o Ahijalon, o Hebron, nkanas naasheta isunta naatii Yuda o Benchamen." 
2Chronicles11:11 Neitagol ninye isempewueti, nepik ilarikok le njore atua ninche, nepik ineeshumieki endaa o eilata o enaisho oo sabibu." 
2Chronicles11:12 Nepik sii iremeta o long'oi atua nena anas pooki, neitagol ninche oleng. Neaku eeta apa ninye Yuda o Benchamen." 
2Chronicles11:13 Ore ilapolosak o Lawi apa ootii atua Israel pooki, neing'uaa ninye too wuejitin pooki apa neetii ninche." 
2Chronicles11:14 Amu etung'uaitie Ilawi iwuejitin enye, o ntokitin enye nepuonu Yuda o Yerusalem enkaraki nataarayie Yeroboam ninche o layiok lenyena aaitung'uaa enkisiaayiare anaa lapolosak lo Laitoriani," 
2Chronicles11:15 negelu ilapolosak lenyena loo wuejitin neeika, o too wuejitin neeseremieki nkitanyaanyukot, o Nkaitin oo lasho naaitobira ninye." 
2Chronicles11:16 Ore lelo ootipika iltauja lenye pee eing'oru Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel nepuonu aasuju ninche eing'uaa iloshon pooki loo Siraeli o meetu Yerusalem, aapolosaki Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles11:17 Neitagol ninche enkitoria e Yuda, ore too larin okuni neitaserian ninche Rehoboam olayioni le Solomon, amu eshomo ninche too larin okuni aaibung orrekie le Daudi o Solomon." 
2Chronicles11:18 Eewa apa Rehoboam aitaa enkitok enye Mahalat entito e Yerimot olayioni le Daudi, apa ole Abigail entito e Eliab olayioni le Yese." 
2Chronicles11:19 Neiki ninye ilayiok, Yeush, o Shemaria, o Saham." 
2Chronicles11:20 Ore tesiadi ina neitoki aya Maaka entito e Absalom, naa ninye natoikio ninye Abija, o Atai, o Sisa, o Shelomit." 
2Chronicles11:21 Kenyor apa Rehoboam Maaka ina tito e Absalom aitalang nena kituaak enyena pooki, o nkapiak. (Eyama apa ninye nkituaak tomon o isiet o nkapiak ntomoni ile neeta ilayiok tikitam o isiet, o ntoyie ntomoni ile.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Negelu Rehoboam Abija ilo ayioni le Maaka metaa ninye olkitok tiatua ilalashera lenyena, amu kejo apa pee eitaa ninye olaiguanani." 
2Chronicles11:23 Neas ninye ine ng'eno, neidapashaki kulikae ayiok lenyena aibulunye enkop e Yuda o Benchamen, eeta ndaiki kumok, neing'uraki ninche nkituaak." 
2Chronicles12:1 Ore ake pee eitashe enkitoria e Rehoboam negolu, neiturraa ninye enkitanapata o Laitoriani o Siraeli pooki tenebo ninye." 
2Chronicles12:2 Ore to lari le imiet le nkitoria o laiguanani Rehoboam, enkaraki nataa ninche ilemeisiligayu to Laitoriani, nelotu Shishak olaiguanani le Misiri arasaki Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles12:3 Neeta ngarrin oo mbartan enkalifu nabo o iip are, o lakedok loo mbartan nkalifuni ntomoni ile. Nemeikenayu esiana e lelo tung'ana oo etuo tenebo ninye ooing'uaa Misiri ile Libia o le Sukiim o le Etiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 Neya ninye nena anas naasheta sunta e Yuda o meeu abaiki Yerusalem. 
2Chronicles12:5 Neitoki Shemaia oloiboni le Nkai alotu enetii Rehoboam o lkituaak le Yuda, apa ooiturrurro te Yerusalem tenkaraki Shishak, nejoki ninche, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Kitung'uaitie intae nanu, atung'uayie naa sii nanu intae napik intae enkaina e Shishak.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Ore lelo kituaak loo Siraeli o laiguanani neitobor ate nejo, “Olaitoriani olasipani.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Ore ake pee edol Olaitoriani ajo eitoborro ate, neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Shemaia ejo, “Eitoborro ninche ate nemaidaikie nanu ninche, kake kaisho nanu ninche enkiti oitoi napokie, nemebukokini engoro ai shumata Yerusalem te Nkaina e Shishak." 
2Chronicles12:8 Ore ake eyia keaku ninche isinkan lenyena. Pee etum ninche aatayiolo enkisiaayiare ai o enkisiaayiare oo nkitoriat oo nkuapi.” 
2Chronicles12:9 Neaku eewuo Shishak olaiguanani le Misiri arasaki Yerusalem; neya ninye ilchumat le nkaji o laitoriani o lchumat le nkaji o laiguanani. Eewa ninye pooki toki. Eewa sii nena long'oi e sahabu apa naaitobira Solomon. 
2Chronicles12:10 Neitobir olaiguanani Rehoboam te rishata e nena long'oi ilong'oi o suyai, nepik ninche Nkaik o lelo kituaak le rripore, laa ninche ooing'or kishomi e nkaji o laiguanani." 
2Chronicles12:11 Naa ore ake tenelotu olaiguanani alo enkaji o Laitoriani nepuonu ilarripok aanap ninche, neyau atua ina aji e rripore." 
2Chronicles12:12 Ore ake pee eitobir ninye kewan neibelekenya engoro o Laitoriani apaash ninye, pee meidaikieki ninye tukul. Ore ake etiu neijia neme torrok apa mbaa te Yuda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Neaku eitagolo apa olaiguanani Rehoboam kewan te Yerusalem. Ilarin artam o obo apa Rehoboam pee eiteru aitoreisho. Eitoreishe ninye ilarin tomon o isiet te Yerusalem, teina anasa apa nategelua Olaitoriani tiatua iloshon pooki loo Siraeli pee epik enkarna enye ine. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Naama, e Amoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Neas ninye entorroni amu eitu ninye eing'oru Olaitoriani to ltau lenye. 
2Chronicles12:15 Ore apa nkiaasin e Rehoboam ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto, neigeroki too mbukui oo nkatinin e Shemaia oloiboni le Nkai o ne Ido oladuaani. Ilarrabali apa lemeish kulo te rishata e Rehoboam o Yeroboam." 
2Chronicles12:16 Neirura Rehoboam etua anaa loo menye, nenukari te nkanasa e Daudi; neitoreisho Abija olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles13:1 Ore to lari le tomon o isiet le nkitoria o laiguanani Yeroboam, neiteru Abija aitoreisho te Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Eitoreishe ninye ilarin okuni te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Mikaia, entito e Uriel le Gibea. Netii apa olarrabal erishata e Abija o Yeroboam." 
2Chronicles13:3 Neipang Abija alo olarrabal eeta enjore oo ltung'ana yiolot to larrabal, iltung'ana nkalifuni iip ong'uan oogeluno. Neitoloku Yeroboam iltung'ana lenyena to larrabal aitoluaaki ninye, naa iltung'ana nkalifuni iip isiet magil, gelunot." 
2Chronicles13:4 Neitashe Abija tenchumata oldoinyio le Semaraim otii ina kop oo ldoinyio e Efraim, nejo, “Entoning'oki nanu, iyie Yeroboam o Israel pooki!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Aimeishiaakino teneyiolou nchere, eishoo o Laitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli, enkitoria oo Siraeli pooki Daudi ntarasi to lmumai le munyan?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Ore Yeroboam olayioni le Nebat ilo sinka le Solomon olayioni le Daudi, nedumunye agilunore olkitok lenye." 
2Chronicles13:7 Ore ilkulikae tung'ana le pesho, nerrumoki ninche Rehoboam olayioni le Solomon, ilo leton aa oti nemeeta enkarriyiano, metaasa enkarruoisho. Nemeidimaa apa Rehoboam ninche." 
2Chronicles13:8 “Amaa taata, ijo iyie indim aitasheikinore enkitoria o Laitoriani too Nkaik oo layiok le Daudi, eji enkaraki nira iyie olorora, kitok, niata nkitanyaanyukot e Nkai oo lasho le sahabu, apa naaitobira Yeroboam aitaa nkaitin." 
2Chronicles13:9 Keitu iyie iaraa aipang'ie ilapolosak lo Laitoriani, ilayiok le Aron, o Lawi, nintobiraki kewan ilapolosak anaa iltung'ana le kulie kuapi? Ore pooki ng'ae olotu aitisiny kewan to loti oing'oni anaa too lmeregeshi oopishana neaku olapolosani le nena neme Nkaitin." 
2Chronicles13:10 Kake ore tialo iyiook, Olaitoriani ninye Enkai ang, neitu iyiook kipuo aaing'ua ninye. Kiata iyiook ilapolosak ooisiaaita Olaitoriani laa ilayiok le Aron, o Lawi te nkaraki enkisiaayiare enye." 
2Chronicles13:11 Kepolosaki ninche Olaitoriani anaake tadekenya o teipa ilasarri oopejori, o enkorropil o sonkoyoni naarropil, neirragie emukate e nkitoduaaroto te mesa e sahabu nasila, neing'or nena kitasheta oo ltaai e sahabu pee etum iltaai lenyena aayupuyupo anaake teipa. Amu eikimbung iyiook enkitanapata Olaitoriani Enkai ang, kake itanyaita intae ninye." 
2Chronicles13:12 Ng'ura etii Enkai tenebo iyiook, ninye orikito iyiook, tenebo ilapolosak eeta ntarumpetani enye o larrabal pee eosh tenikinteru olarrabal o intae. Nakera, e Israel emiarare intae Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo minyi, amu mimirishosho.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Neirriu apa Yeroboam iltung'ana olnukata aitaman ninche te siadi. Netii ilturrurri lenyena dukuya iltung'ana le Yuda. Netii lelo tung'ana oonuka siadi ninche. 
2Chronicles13:14 Ore pee eing'orisho Yuda, ng'ura etii olarrabal dukuya o siadi, neishiraki ninche Olaitoriani nekut ilapolosak ntarumpetani." 
2Chronicles13:15 Neitayu iltung'ana le Yuda embuakunoto o larrabal. Ore ake pee ebuaku iltung'ana le Yuda nemir Enkai Yeroboam o Siraeli pooki ootii dukuya Abija o Yuda. 
2Chronicles13:16 Neilanyisho iltung'ana loo Siraeli te dukuya iltung'ana le Yuda neishoru Enkai ninche apik atua Nkaik e Yuda. 
2Chronicles13:17 Nesesekuan Abija o ltung'ana lenyena iltung'ana kumok oleng; neaku etuata too Siraeli iltung'ana gelunot nkalifuni iip imiet. 
2Chronicles13:18 Neaku eidimuaki apa iltung'ana loo Siraeli ina kata, neisulu iltung'ana le Yuda, enkaraki naigarakinote ninche Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles13:19 Nesujaa Abija Yeroboam, neoru ninye nkanas, Betel o nkang'itie enyena kutiti o Yeshana tenebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti o Efron tenebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti." 
2Chronicles13:20 Neitu aekata eitoki Yeroboam arrinyu engolon enye too nkolong'i e Abija. Neosh Olaitoriani ninye neye ninye. 
2Chronicles13:21 Kake etaa Abija magilani, neyam ninye nkituaak tomon oo ng'uan, netum ilayiok tikitam oare, o ntoyie tomon o ile." 
2Chronicles13:22 Ore nkulie kiaasin pooki e Abija, nkoitoi enyena o nkirorot enyena, neigeroki too nkatinin o loiboni le Nkai oji Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Neaku eirure apa Abija etua anaa loo menye nenukari te nkanasa e Daudi; neitoreisho Asa olayioni lenye te rishata enye. Ore too nkolong'i enyena netum enkop enkiyeng'iyeng ilarin tomon. 
2Chronicles14:2 Neas Asa imbaa supati naa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani. 
2Chronicles14:3 Eiwuang'ie apa ilperereni loo lasarri loo loreren, o wuejitin neeika, neuroo ing'apeta nedung'oo Asherim aauroo." 
2Chronicles14:4 Neitanap Yuda pee eing'oru Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye, neibung nkitanapat enyena." 
2Chronicles14:5 Eiwuang'ie sii too nkanas pooki e Yuda iwuejitin neeika lperereni oopejieki enkorropil. Netum enkitoria enkiyeng'iyeng too nkolong'i enyena. 
2Chronicles14:6 Etesheta ninye nkanas naata isunta te Yuda, amu enoto enkop enkiyeng'iyeng. Eitu ninye etum olarrabal te nena olong'i amu eishoo Olaitoriani ninye eseriani." 
2Chronicles14:7 Nejoki ninye Yuda, “Mateshet iyiook kuna anas, nikintaman isunta o ltaleta, nikipik nchomito oo sekenke; eton aa enaang ena kop, amu king'orutua iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang; king'orutua iyiook ninye, neishoo ninye iyiook eseriani too nkaloli pooki.” Neaku eteshetishote ninche nedupoyu." 
2Chronicles14:8 Neeta apa Asa enjore oo ltung'ana nkalifuni iip uni le Yuda, oata ilong'oi o remeta. O ltung'ana nkalifuni iip are o ntomoni isiet oo ltung'ana le Benchamen, oata ilong'oi o nkai; ore kulo pooki naa iltung'ana magil yiolot." 
2Chronicles14:9 Nelotu Serak le Etiopia agilunore ninche eeta enjore oo ltung'ana milion nabo, o ngarrin oo mbartan iip uni, nepuonu o metabau Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Nelo Asa anang'are ninye, neitolok ilkererin lenye aaluakino olarrabal to erata le Sefata te Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Neishiraki Asa Olaitoriani Enkai enye ejo, “Olaitoriani, meetae likae likinyaanyukie te retoto, te rishata o lmagilani o loshal. Taretu iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang, amu kingarakino iyiook iyie, naa te nkarna ino kiyetuo iyiook aagilunore ele orora. Olaitoriani, ira iyie Enkai ang; mincho eisulu likae tung'ani te iyie.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Neaku etimira Olaitoriani ile Etiopia te dukuya Asa o te dukuya Yuda, neilanyisho ile Etiopia." 
2Chronicles14:13 Ore Asa o lelo tung'ana apa ootii tenebo ninche, nesujaa ninche o meitabaiki Gerar. Nebatata ile Etiopia o metaa meetae obo otelekua eishu; amu etigilaki ninche te dukuya Olaitoriani o enjore enye. Nenap iltung'ana le Yuda intokitin kumok oleng naatarutua." 
2Chronicles14:14 Neitoki sii aagil nkanas naamanita Gerar, amu etijing'a euriata o Laitoriani shumata ninche, neya ninche imasaa kumok te nena anas." 
2Chronicles14:15 Near ilng'oborri le lelo apa oata nchoo, neya nkerrai te nkumoi, o ntemesin. Neitoki taa aarrinyo aapuo Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles15:1 Eewuo apa enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata Asaria olayioni le Oded," 
2Chronicles15:2 neipang ninye alo anang'are Asa. Nejoki ninye, “Toning'oki nanu Asa, o Yuda pooki o Benchamen: Etii Olaitoriani tenebo iyie, eton sii iyie itii tenebo ninye. Tening'oru iyie ninye nitum, kake tening'ua iyie ninye niking'uaa sii ninye iyie." 
2Chronicles15:3 Ore te nkata naado nemeeta Israel Enkai nasipa. Nemeeta olapolosani oiteng'enisho, nemeeta enkitanapata." 
2Chronicles15:4 Kake teneibelekenyakino ninche to sina lenye Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, neing'oru ninye nenoto ninche ninye." 
2Chronicles15:5 Ore apa te nena katitin nemeetae eseriani teilo oipang o teilo ojing'u amu etijing'aka enyamali sapuk lelo oomanya nkuapi. 
2Chronicles15:6 Eitaaki ninche ngiligilat. Negilunore olosho olosho, negilunore enkanasa enkanasa, amu eitanyamala Enkai ninche te pooki pukunoto o sina." 
2Chronicles15:7 Kake ntagoluoyu iyie! Mincho elepori nkaik inono, amu eikilaakini esiaai ino.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Ore ake pee ening Asa kulo rorei, ina aibon e Asaria olayioni le Aded, neitagoluo, neiwuang'ie nena kitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin naa ninche olminong teina kop e Yuda o ene Benchamen, o te nena anas naawa ninye teina kop oo ldoinyio e Efraim. Neitoki ninye aitobir olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani apa otii dukuya olgoriet le nkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles15:9 Neiturrur ninye Yuda pooki o Benchamen, o lelo ooing'uaa Efraim, o Manase o Simion apa oobikito tenebo ninche, amu iltung'ana kumok ooisikakita ninye eing'ua Israel, ina kata pee edol aajo etii Olaitoriani Enkai enye tenebo ninye." 
2Chronicles15:10 Eiturrurrote apa ninche te Yerusalem to lapa liokuni lo lari le tomon o imiet le nkitoria e Asa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Nepolosaki ninche Olaitoriani olasar teina olong, te nena masaa apa naataarutua ninche ilmong'i iip naapishana, o nkerra nkalifuni naapishana." 
2Chronicles15:12 Neibung ninche olning'o lo sotua pee eing'oru Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye, too ltauja lenye pooki o te nkishui enye pooki;" 
2Chronicles15:13 naa ore pooki ng'ae lemeing'oru Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, neari metua, aa oti o aa moruo, aa olee anaa enkitok." 
2Chronicles15:14 Einosie ninche Olaitoriani olmumai to ltoilo sapuk, o te mbuakunoto o too ntarumpetani, o te oshoto oo mowuarak." 
2Chronicles15:15 Neshipa Yuda pooki tenkaraki ilo mumai; amu einosa ninche too ltauja lenye pooki, neing'orutua ninche ninye te yieunoto enye pooki, nenoto ninche ninye, neishoo Olaitoriani ninche enkiyeng'iyeng too nkaloli pooki." 
2Chronicles15:16 Ore doi ninye Maaka, ng'otonye, eiwuang'ie olaiguanani Asa pee meitoki aata enkitoo enye enkaraki nataasa embae olminong, aitobir enkitanyaanyukoto e Ashera. Nedung Asa ina kitanyaanyukoto auroo, neidong aitaa irrarrat, nelo apejoo to erata le Kidron." 
2Chronicles15:17 Kake eitu apa eiwuang'ieki iwuejitin neeika e Israel. Ore ake etiu neijia nemeeta apa oltau le Asa eleyiata too nkolong'i e nkishui enye pooki. 
2Chronicles15:18 Neyau ninye atua enkaji e Nkai nena tokitin apa naaitisinya menye o nkishorot naaitisinya ninye makewan, enkosholai o sahabu o masaa," 
2Chronicles15:19 neitu aikata eitokini aata olarrabal o metabau olari le tomoni uni o imiet le nkitoria e Asa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Ore to lari le tomoni uni o ile le nkitoria e Asa, nelo Baasha olaiguanani loo Siraeli agilunore Yuda, neshet Rama, ejo pee meipang hoo oltung'ani obo anaa ejing'u alo enetii Asa olaiguanani le Yuda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Nedumu Asa enkosholai o sahabu te lelo shumat le nkaji o Laitoriani, o te nkaji o laiguanani, neirriwaki Benhadad olaiguanani le Siria, apa omanya Damaskas, nejoki," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Nchoo metijing'a olning'o erishata ai o iyie, anaa enatiu te papaai o te papaai lino. Ng'ura kaairriwaki nanu iyie enkosholai o sahabu; shomo tigila olning'o lino o Baasha olaiguanani loo Siraeli; pee aalo aing'uaa nanu.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Nening Benhadad olaiguanani Asa, neirriwaa ninye ilarikok le njore enye meshomo aagilunore nkanas oo Siraeli, neibung ninche aaisulie Iyon, o Dan, o Abelnaim o nkanas pooki naashumishoreki e Naftali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Ore ake pee ening Baasha ina neitu eitoki ashet Rama, neitasheyie esiaai enye." 
2Chronicles16:6 Neitoki olaiguanani Asa aya Yuda pooki, nenap ninche lelo soito le Rama o mbaoi enyena, apa naa ninche eshetishore olaiguanani Baasha, nelo ashetie ninche Geba o Mispa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Ore apa teina kata nelotu Hanani oladuaani enetii Asa olaiguanani le Yuda, nejoki ninye, “Ore enkaraki naa olaiguanani le Siria ingarakine, neitu ingarakino Olaitoriani Enkai ino, kitapaashare iyie enjore o laiguanani le Siria." 
2Chronicles16:8 Amaa enjore e Etiopia o ene Libia, aime enjore kitok naata ngarrin oo mbartan kumok oleng? Eji ore enkaraki ningarakine Olaitoriani neishoru ninche apik nkaik inono." 
2Chronicles16:9 Amu ekuet nkonyek o Laitoriani idie o ene tiatua enkop pooki, pee eitodolu enkidimata enye te rishata e lelo lemeeta ileyiat too ltauja lenye tialo ninye. Itaasa iyie ena te modai, amu ore ebaiki ena kata neito idia alo, itum ilarrabali.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Negorokino Asa ilo aduaani, neikenoo ninye te korokoroni, amu eibayie ninye te nkaraki ena. Neitoki Asa aitaas mbaa e ngogong'i kulikae teina kata." 
2Chronicles16:11 Ore nkiaasin e Asa ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto neigeroki te mbuku oo laiguanak le Yuda o Israel. 
2Chronicles16:12 Ore to lari le tomoni uni ooudo le nkitoria enye, netum Asa emuoyian too nkejek nerruoyo ina muoyian enye oleng; ore ake teina muoyian enye neitu ninye eing'oru Olaitoriani. Kake eing'orua eretoto too labaak." 
2Chronicles16:13 Neirrag Asa etua anaa loo menye, neye ninye to lari liartam oobo le nkitoria enye." 
2Chronicles16:14 Nenukaa ninche ninye te nkurare apa nataguetua ninye, aguetaki kewan te nkanasa e Daudi. Neirragie ninche ninye too sisineta naaiputa ninye ina gumoto naabore mpukunot pooki oo sonkoyoni naaitobiraki te nkarriyiano o laitobirani loo sonkoyoni; neitobir ninche enkima kitok te nkanyit enye." 
2Chronicles17:1 Yehoshafat olayioni le Asa oitoreishe te rishata enye, neitagol kewan agilunore Isiraeli." 
2Chronicles17:2 Nepik ninye iltimito nena anas pooki naasheta isunta e Yuda, nepik iltimito enkop e Yuda, o nkanas e Efraim apa naatarayie Asa papaai lenye." 
2Chronicles17:3 Etii apa Olaitoriani tenebo Yehoshafat, enkaraki nashomo ninye aibung olapa rrekie le menye; eitu ninye eing'oru Baal." 
2Chronicles17:4 Kake eing'orua Enkai e papaai lenye, nelo too nkitanapat enyena, neitu eibung irrekiei loo Siraeli." 
2Chronicles17:5 Ore enkaraki ina neitasheyie Olaitoriani enkitoria te nkaina enye, ore iltung'ana pooki le Yuda neyaki Yehoshafat nkishorot, netum ninye enkarsisisho sapuk o enkanyit." 
2Chronicles17:6 Keuno apa oltau lenye tialo nkoitoi o Laitoriani; neiwuang'ie sii iwuejitin neeika e Asherim te Yuda. 
2Chronicles17:7 Ore to lari liokuni le nkitoria enye neiriwaa ninye iltung'ana lenyena kituaak, Benhail, o Obadiah, o Sekaria, o Netanel, o Mikaia, pee epuo aaiteng'enisho too nkanas e Yuda." 
2Chronicles17:7 Ore to lari liokuni le nkitoria enye neiriwaa ninye iltung'ana lenyena kituaak, Benhail, o Obadiah, o Sekaria, o Netanel, o Mikaia, pee epuo aaiteng'enisho too nkanas e Yuda." 
2Chronicles17:8 Ore tenebo ninche netii Ilawi, Shemaia o Netania, o Sebadia, o Asahel, o Shemiramot, o Yehonatan, o Adonija, o Tobija, o Tobadonija. Ore tenebo kulo Lawi netii ilapolosak, Elishama, o Yehoram." 
2Chronicles17:9 Neiteng'enisho ninche te Yuda, eeta embuku oo nkitanapat o Laitoriani tenebo ninche. Nepuo ninche aamanaa too nkanas pooki e Yuda aiteng'enisho tiatua olorere." 
2Chronicles17:10 Etipika apa Olaitoriani enkuretisho nena kitoriat pooki oo nkuapi naamanita Yuda, neitu ninche eitayunye Yehoshefat olarrabal." 
2Chronicles17:11 Ore ilkulikae Filisti neyaki Yehoshefat nkishorot. Neyaki nkishorot e nkosholai, neyau Ilmarabu ilmeregeshi enkalifu nabo o iip naapishana o loroi enkalifu nabo o iip naapishana." 
2Chronicles17:12 Neponari Yehoshefat agolu te nkitoria. Neshet ninye te Yuda isempewueti o nkanas naashumishoreki. 
2Chronicles17:13 Neeta apa ninye ineeshumishoreki sapuki too nkanas e Yuda. Neeta isikarini magil yiolot, te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles17:14 Eiturrurroki apa kulo te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye. Ore te Yuda netii ilarikok le njore loo nkalifuni; etii olarikoni le njore e iip oji Adna, tenebo iltung'ana nkalifuni iip uni magil yiolot." 
2Chronicles17:15 Ore oliare naa Yehohanan ilo arikoni le njore, tenebo iltung'ana nkalifuni iip are o ntomoni isiet," 
2Chronicles17:16 ore olosujaki naa Amasia olayioni le Sikri, ilo oishorua kewan te nkisiaayiare o Laitoriani, tenebo iltung'ana nkalifuni iip are magil yiolot." 
2Chronicles17:17 Ore too le Benchamen naa: Eliada, ilo tung'ani magilani yioloti, tenebo iltung'ana nkalifuni iip are oata mbaa o long'oi." 
2Chronicles17:18 Ore olosujaki naa Yehosabad tenebo iltung'ana nkalifuni iip o ntomoni isiet ootanapate pee epuo olarrabal. 
2Chronicles17:19 Kulo apa ootii enkisiaayiare o laiguanani, metii lelo apa ootipika olaiguanani nkanas naasheta sunta te Yuda pooki." 
2Chronicles18:1 Eeta Yehoshafat enkarsisisho sapuk o enkanyit neitobir olning'o tenkaraki enkiyama o ltung'ana le Ahab," 
2Chronicles18:2 ore te siadi ilkuti arin nedoyio alo enetii Ahab te Samaria. Neyiang'aki Ahab ninye nkerra kumok o lmong'i tenebo lelo tung'ana apa ootii tenebo ninye, neilejilej ninye pee epuo aagilunore Ramot-Gilead." 
2Chronicles18:3 Nejoki Ahab, ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda, “Eilo iyie tenebo nanu Ramot-gilead?” Newal ninye ajo, “Atiu nanu anaa enitiu iyie, netiu iltung'ana laainei anaa iltung'ana linono. Kiaku iyiook tenebo iyie to larrabal.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Neitoki Yehoshafat ajoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli, “Tang'asa nkilikuanishore ororei lo Laitoriani.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Neitoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli aiturrurr iloibonok le Nkai tenebo, iltung'ana iip ong'uan, nejoki ninche, “Aikipuo iyiook olarrabal aagilunore Ramot-Gilead, anaa aimikipuo?” Nejoki ninche, enchom, amu keishoru Enkai apik nkaik o laiguanani." 
2Chronicles18:6 Kake etejo ninye Yehoshafat, “Aimeetae likae oiboni le Nkai likinkilikuanishore?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Nejoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli Yehosafat, “Eton etii oltung'ani obo likindim iyiook aaikilikuanishore tialo Olaitoriani, Mikaia olayioni le Imala; kake manyor nanu ninye, amu meibonu aikata isupati tialo nanu, ntorrok ake eibonu.” Nejo Yehoshafat, mincho olaiguanani ejo neijia." 
2Chronicles18:8 Neitoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli aipotu olkitok obo, nejoki, “Iyau nabo kata Mikaia olayioni le Imala.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Ore ina kata netonita olaiguanani loo Siraeli o Yehoshafat, olaiguanani le Yuda too lorikan le nkitoo, neishopo ilkilani lenye, netonita ninche te wueji neituutishoreki, te mpolos e kishomi e Samaria; neibonisho iloibonok pooki te dukuya ninche." 
2Chronicles18:10 Ore Sedekia olayioni le Kenaana neitobiraki kewan imowuarak e sekenkei, nejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Te kuna ilo iyie arrumoo ile Siria o metaba anaa neidak ninche.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Ore iloibonok pooki neibonu ina, nejo, “Ilepa shomo Ramot-gilead pee ilo amirisho; aikincho iyie Olaitoriani apik enkaina o laiguanani.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Ore lelo kulikae apa ooshomo aaipotu Mikaia nejoki ninye, “Ng'ura ore irorei loo loibonok le Nkai pooki neimaki embae nabo supat tialo olaiguanani; nchoo orerei lino etiu anaa orerei le obo lenye, niro te supatisho.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Kake etejo Mikaia, “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, ore ina najo Enkai ai ina nanu airo.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Ore ake pee ebau enetii olaiguanani, nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Mikaia, eikipuo iyiook Ramot-gilead, olarrabal anaa aikipal?” Newalu ninye ajo, “Ilepa shomo timirisho; kepiki ninche enkaina ino.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Kake etiaka olaiguanani ninye, “Aikatitin aja aasai nanu pee iro esipata ake te nkarna o Laitoriani?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Atoduaa nanu Isiraeli pooki eidapashakinote ildoinyio anaa nkerra nemeeta olchekut; netejo Olaitoriani, ‘Meeta kulo olaitasheikinoni; nchoo pooki ng'ae errinyo alo enkang enye te seriani.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Neitoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli ajoki Yehoshafat, “Keitu nanu aajoki iyie nchere meibonu ninye esidai tialo nanu, kake entorroni ake eibonu?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Nejo Mikaia, “Toning'o naa orerei lo Laitoriani: Atoduaa nanu Olaitoriani etonita to lorika lenye le nkitoo, ore olorora pooki le shumata, neitashe te nkaina enye e tatene, o te ne kedienye." 
2Chronicles18:19 Nejo Olaitoriani, ‘Aing'ae olo alej Ahab olaiguanani loo Siraeli, pee etum ninye ashomo atabatatayu te Ramot-gilead?’ Nejo obo embae nabo, nejo olikae enkae." 
2Chronicles18:20 Neitoki alotu enkiyang'et neitashe te dukuya Olaitoriani, ejo, ‘Kalo nanu alej ninye.’ Nejoki Olaitoriani, ‘Tia oitoi?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Nejo ninye, ‘Kalo nanu, naaku oltau le lejare too nkutukie oo loibonok lenyena.’ Nejo ninye ilo iyie alej ninye, naa ndimu ninye, shomo naa taasa ina." 
2Chronicles18:22 Ore naa taata etipika Olaitoriani enkiyang'et e lejare nkutukie e kulo oibonok linono; eiroro entorroni tialo iyie.” 
2Chronicles18:23 Neitoki Sedekia olayioni le Kenaana anyiku neosh Mikaia eseder, nejoki, “Kaji eimua enkiyang'et o Laitoriani pee epuku te nanu nikilotu airorie iyie?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Nejo Mikaia, “Ng'ura, ilo iyie adol teina olong, tinilo iyie olgilata liatua aisudori.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Nejo ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli, “Embung'a Mikaia, nirrinyirrinyi ninye aaya enetii Amon ilo balusui le nkanasa, o enetii Yoash ilo ayioni lo laiguanani." 
2Chronicles18:26 Nilo ajo, ‘Nji ejo olaiguanani, Entipik ena tung'ani atua korokoroni, ninchosho ninye meinosa imukateni naatoito neok enkare, o metaba anaa nashukunye te seriani.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Nejo Mikaia, “Tenitushukunye iyie te seriani, neitu nanu aairorie Olaitoriani”, neitoki ninye ajo, “Entoning intae lo orere pooki!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Neaku eshomo olaiguanani loo Siraeli; o Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda Ramot-gilead. 
2Chronicles18:29 Nejoki olaiguanani loo Siraeli Yehoshafat, “Kaibelekeny nanu enkishopo ai nalo olarrabal, kake inchopo iyie ilkilani linono le nkitoo.” Neibelekeny olaiguanani loo Siraeli enkishopo enye nepuo ninche olarrabal." 
2Chronicles18:30 Neitanapa apa olaiguanani le Siria ilkituaak loo ngarrin enyena oo mbartan, ajoki, “Emiarare ake oloti anaa olkitok, kake olaiguanani loo Siraeli ake entaarare.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Ore ake pee edol lelo kituaak loo ngarrin oo mbartan Yehoshafat nejo ninche, “Olaiguanani loo Siraeli ilo.” Neibelekenya ninche aarare ninye; neyietu Yehoshafat abuaku, neretu Olaitoriani ninye. Neboinaa Enkai ninche aitung'uaa ninye." 
2Chronicles18:32 Amu etoduaa ake lelo kituaak loo ngarrin oo mbartan aajo mme olaiguanani loo Siraeli ilo nerrinyo te sujata enye. 
2Chronicles18:33 Kake eteyietuo oltung'ani obo enkawuo enye nengoroo embae, neng'or olaiguanani loo Siraeli eripata enkila enye esekenkei, to lgoo; ore enkaraki ina nejoki ninye olarewani lenye le ngarri e mbarta, “Mbelekenyayu ntung'uayioki nanu olarrabal, amu aatipikaki nanu olbae.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Neirowuaju oleng olarrabal ina olong, neigarakino olaiguanani loo Siraeli eng'arri enye embarta aing'or ile Siria o metaa teipa. Ore ake pee edoyio enkolong neye." 
2Chronicles19:1 Nerrinyunye te Seriani Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda alotu enkaji enye te Yerusalem. 
2Chronicles19:2 Kake eshomo Yehu olayioni le Hanani, ilo aduaani anang'are ninye, nejoki ninye olaiguanani Yehoshafat, “Iretu iyie olarruoni ninyor lelo ooiba Olaitoriani? Ore enkaraki ena, eewuo engoro naing'ua Olaitoriani enkaraki iyie." 
2Chronicles19:3 Ore ake eyia enotoki kulie baa sidain te iyie, amu indaikie Ashera aishie tena kop, ning'oru Enkai to ltau lino.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Nebik Yehoshafat te Yerusalem; nelo ninye tiatua olorere, ebaiki Beer-sheba o metabaiki ina kop oo ndoinyio e Efraim, neyau ninche aarrinyoki Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles19:5 Negelu ninye ilarishak teina kop tiatua nkanas pooki naasheta isunta e Yuda. Te nkanasa ake o te nkanasa," 
2Chronicles19:6 nejoki ninye lelo arishak, “Entadamu eniasiasa, amu mme oltung'ani nguanarere, kake Olaitoriani; etii ninye tenebo intae idung'udung'u enkiguana." 
2Chronicles19:7 Ore naa taata nchoo euriata o Laitoriani eaku tenebo intae; entujurru eniasiasa; amu meetae enkibelekenyata e sipata to Laitoriani Enkai, anaa enyorrakinoto, anaa eng'amunoto oo ntokitin e ropare.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Ore ake sii te Yerusalem negelu Yehoshafat kulikae Lawi o lapolosak, o lukuny oo lmareita loo Siraeli, pee edung enkiguana tenkaraki Olaitoriani nedung enkiguana tenetii enchankar. Yerusalem apa etii entonata enye." 
2Chronicles19:9 Neitanap ninye ninche, ejo, “Nji intae enkuna te uriata o Laitoriani, o te nkisiligata, o to ltauja linyi pooki:" 
2Chronicles19:10 Tenelo nelotu enkiguana naing'uaa ilalashera linyi ootii kulie anas, eipirta enkibukoroto o sarge, o enkitanapata, anaa nkikoot, o nkiguanat, ninteng'en iyie ninche, pee meas ake entorroni te dukuya Olaitoriani, melotu ake engoro napi shumata intae o lalashera linyi. Ena intae entaas nimbayuyu intae entorroni." 
2Chronicles19:11 Naa ng'ura Amaria ilo apolosani kitok otii te shumata intae tialo mbaa pooki o Laitoriani; naa Sebadia olayioni le Ishmael ninye olbalusui le nkaji e Yuda, too mbaa pooki naaipirta olaiguanani; naa Ilawi likisiai iyie anaa iltung'ana kituaak. Taasisho te mpijan naa nchoo eaku Olaitoriani tenebo ilo oitoriori mbaa enyena.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Ore te siadi ena nepuonu Ilmoabu, o le Amon o kulikae ooing'uaa Meani, nepuonu aarasaki Yehoshafat to larrabal." 
2Chronicles20:2 Nepuonu kulikae tung'ana aajoki Yehoshafat, “Etii olorora kitok oing'ua Edom likipuonu aarare, ooing'uaa lido kekun le naiposha; naa ng'ura, etii ninche Hasasotama” (aa taa Enkedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Neureishoyu Yehoshafat, neing'oru Olaitoriani makewan, neitanapisho meteena iltung'ana ate aapukoo te Yuda pooki." 
2Chronicles20:4 Neiturrurro Yuda aaing'oru eretoto to Laitoriani; eing'uaa nkanas pooki e Yuda nepuonu aaing'oru Olaitoriani. 
2Chronicles20:5 Neitashe Yehoshafat tiatua eumata e Yuda o Yerusalem, tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, te dukuya ilo goriet ng'ejuk," 
2Chronicles20:6 nejo ninye, “Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papa, aime iyie Enkai te keper? Aimintore iyie nkitoriat pooki oo loshon? Enkaina ino etii engolon o enkidimata, ore enkaraki ina meetae oltung'ani likindimaa iyie." 
2Chronicles20:7 Keitu iyie, Na Ai ang, iaraa lelo apa oomanya ena kop te dukuya iltung'ana linono loo Siraeli; ninchooyie ntarasi aisho eishoi e Abram ilo shore lino?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Netamanya ninche atua, nikiteshetakita ninche ewueji sinyati, tenkaraki enkarna ino, ejo," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Tenelotu entorroni shumata iyiook, olalem, o enkiguana, anaa olmeitai, anaa olameyu, nikintashe iyiook te dukuya ena aji, o te dukuya iyie, amu etii enkarna ino atua ena aji, nikinchiraki iyie tosina lang, nining iyie, nintajeu iyiook.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 “Ore naa taata ng'ura kulo tung'ana le Amon o le Moab, o to ldoinyio le Seir, nimincho iyie Isiraeli metarasaki ninche, apa eing'uaa enkop e Misiri, netapaasha apa ninche neitu eidaikie." 
2Chronicles20:11 Ng'ura elaaki ninche iyiook epuonu aaraa iyiook aaipang'ie te nkop ino, apa ninchoo iyiook matujung."
