2Chronicles20:12 Na Ai ang aimidung'oki iyie ninche enkiguana? Amu mikiata iyiook engolon tialo ele orora kitok olotu agilunore iyiook. Mikiyiolo iyiook aajo kaa kias, kake iyie eimariri nkonyek ang.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Ore teina kata neitashe iltung'ana pooki le Yuda te dukuya Olaitoriani, tenebo nkera enye kutiti o nkituaak enye, o nkera enye." 
2Chronicles20:14 Nelotu enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata Yahasiel olayioni le Sekaria, olayioni le Yerel, olayioni le Matania, Olawi loo layiok le Asaf, te mpolos eina umata." 
2Chronicles20:15 Nejo ninye, “Entoning, Yuda pooki o loomanya Yerusalem, o laiguanani Yehoshafat: Nji ejoki intae Olaitoriani, ‘Emiureisho nimileporiri tenkaraki ele orora kitok; amu mme olinyi ele arrabal, kake olo Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles20:16 Ore taisere tadoi shomo tigilunore ninche; ng'ura keilepu ninche aaimu enkoitoi e Siis; ilo iyie ainepu ninche te nkiting'oto o erata, te nkalo o loo saen tiong'ota e Yeruel." 
2Chronicles20:17 Meeta tipat niarishore iyie tele arrabal; ntasho ake duoo, ntirring'ayu pee idol enkisulata o Laitoriani, te rishata ino. Iyie Yuda o Yerusalem.’ Miureishoyu nimilepori. Ore taisere tadoi shomo tigilunore ninche, naa keaku Olaitoriani tenebo intae.”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Neirrugo Yehoshafat aitabaiki enkomom enye enkop, ore Yuda pooki, o lelo oo manya Yerusalem nebatata te dukuya Olaitoriani, neserem Olaitoriani." 
2Chronicles20:19 Ore ilawi le Kohat o Lkorati neitashe aaisis Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel to ltoilo sapuk oleng. 
2Chronicles20:20 Nedumunye ninche tadekenya enasirie, nepuo ong'ata e Tekoa; ore epuito ninche neitashe Yehoshafat nejo, “Entoning'oki nanu Yuda o intae iloomanya Yerusalem! Eruko Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, pee eitasheyieki intae; entoning iloibonok lenyena pee idupoyuyu.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Ore ake pee eidip aiguana iltung'ana, negelu lelo oopuo aaranyaki Olaitoriani neisis ninye eishopito ilkilani sinyat, nepuo ninche te dukuya enjore, nejo “Enchoo Olaitoriani enashe, amu ore enyorrata enye nauno nebikoo ntarasi.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Ore ake pee eiteru aaranyisho neisis Olaitoriani, nerasaki Olaitoriani iltung'ana le Amon, o Moab o lo ldoinyio le Seir, laa ninche apa ooetuo aagilunore Yuda, neaku eishieki ninche." 
2Chronicles20:23 Amu etudumakinote iltung'ana le Amon o le Moab iltung'ana lo ldoinyo le Seir, neidaikie ninche katukul, ore ake pee eishie iltung'ana le Seir, neitoki ninche aaidaakino maate." 
2Chronicles20:24 Ore pee epuonu Yuda oltalet liong'ota, neing'or ilo orora naa ng'ura! Mpopong'i ake naairragaa te nkop. Meetae oloilanyishe." 
2Chronicles20:25 Ore pee elotu Yehoshafat o ltung'ana lenyena aaya iyarunot enye, netum ninche nkishu kumok, o masaa, o nkilani, o ntokitin naagol enkinyang'a, naawaita ninche o metaba anaa neaku menapayu. Nkolong'i uni eyaita ninche nena yarunot, eikumok apa oleng." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ore te nkolong e ong'uan neiturrurro ninche to erata le Beraka, ore teine neisis Olaitoriani. Ore enkaraki ina naa keji enkarna eine wueji oerata le Bereka, o metabaiki ena olong." 
2Chronicles20:27 Neitoki aarrinyo, pooki tung'ani le Yuda o Yerusalem, netii Yehoshafat dukuya ninche, errinyo aapuo Yerusalem te nchipai, amu eishoo ninche Olaitoriani enchipai tialo ilmang'ati lenye." 
2Chronicles20:28 Nepuonu ninche Yerusalem eeta nkai oo sinkolioitin o lwululi loo usin, o ntarumpetani, nepuo enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles20:29 Neiput enkuretisho e Nkai nena kitoriat pooki e nena kuapi ina kata pee ening nchere, etaarare Olaitoriani ilmang'ati loo Siraeli." 
2Chronicles20:30 Neaku eitirring'e Yehoshafat te seriani, amu eishoo ninye Enkai enkiyeng'iyeng too nkaloli pooki." 
2Chronicles20:31 Metaa neijia apa eikuna Yehoshafat te neitore Yuda. Oloo larin tomoni uni o imiet apa ninye pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ilarin tikitam o imiet te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Asuba, entito e Shilhi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Neibung apa ninye orrekie le Asa papaai lenye, neitu eibelekenya apaash. Etaasa ninye isidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles20:33 Ore apa iwuejitin neeika neitu eiwuang'ieki; eitu epik iltung'ana iltauja lenye nkaitin e kulikae tung'ana. 
2Chronicles20:34 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Yehoshafat, ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto, neigeroki too nkatinin e Yehu olayioni le Hanani, apa naatisiraki te mbuku oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Chronicles20:35 Ore te siadi ena, neibung'are olaiguanani Yehoshafat Ahasia olaiguanani loo Siraeli, apa oas entorroni." 
2Chronicles20:36 Neibung'are ninye te nchetata oo melin naapuo Tarshish, neshetu ninche imelin te Esiong'eber." 
2Chronicles20:37 Neitoki Eliesa olayioni le Dodawahu le Maresha, aibonisho tialo Yehoshafat, ejo, “Ore enkaraki nimbung'are Ahasia, keidaikie Olaitoriani ina nitaasa.” Nemuta nena melin neitu ninche epuo Tarshish." 
2Chronicles21:1 Neirrag Yehoshafat etua anaa loo menye, nenukari tenebo loo menye tiatua enkanasa e Daudi, neitoreisho Yehoram olayioni lenye, te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles21:2 Eeta apa ninye ilalashera, lelo ayiok le Yehoshafat: Asaria, o Yehiel, o Sekaria, o Mikael, o Shefatia. Ore apa kulo pooki naa ilayiok le Yehoshafat olaiguanani le Yuda." 
2Chronicles21:3 Eishoo apa ninche menye nkishorot sapuki, e nkosholai o sahabu, o ntokitin e tipat, tenebo nkanas naasheta isunta e Yuda. Kake Yehoram eishoo enkitoria, amu ninye apa olkikau." 
2Chronicles21:4 Ore ake pee etonie Yehoram olorika le nkitoo le papaai lenye, nebul, near ilalashera lenyena pooki metuata to lalem, tenebo sii kulikae tung'ana kituaak le Israel." 
2Chronicles21:5 Oloo larin tomoni uni oare apa Yehoram pee eiteru aaku olaiguanani, neitoreisho ninye ilarin isiet te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles21:6 Neibung ninye orrekie loo laiguanak le Israel anaa apa enataasa Ahab. Amu entito apa e Ahab enkitok enye. Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani. 
2Chronicles21:7 Kake meidaikie ake Olaitoriani enkaji e Daudi, tenkaraki olning'o lo sotua apa oitobira ninye o Daudi, neisiligishore apa ninye pee eitoreisho eishoi enye, o layiok lenyena ntarasi." 
2Chronicles21:8 Ore too nkolong'i enkitoria enye, nekepari Edom aing'uaa enkitoria e Yuda, negelaki ninche ate olaiguanani." 
2Chronicles21:9 Nedumunye Yehoram tenebo ilarikok lenyena le njore, o ngarrin enyena oo mbartan pooki, nepuo kewarie aaidaikie iltung'ana le Edom apa oomanita ninye o lkituaak lenyena loo ngarrin oo mbartan." 
2Chronicles21:10 Neaku etekepari apa Edom aing'uaa enkitoria e Yuda o metabaiki ena olong. Ore apa teina kata nekepari sii ninye Libna aing'uaa enkitoria enye, enkaraki natanya ninye Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles21:11 Ore ake sii eshomo ninye aitobir iwuejitin neeika teina kop oo ldoinyio e Yuda, neitapong'oo lelo oo manya Yerusalem metapaasha Olaitoriani, neitapong'oo Yuda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Nelotu empalai enetii ninye naing'uaa oloiboni le Nkai oji Eliya, ejo, “Nji ejo o Laitoriani, Enkai e Daudi papaai lino, ‘Ore enkaraki neitu iyie imbung orrekie le Yehoshafat papaai lino, anaa orrekie le Asa olaiguanani le Yuda," 
2Chronicles21:13 kake orrekie loo laiguanak le Israel iturubare, nintapong'oyie Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem metaasa ing'ok, anaa apa enaitapong'oyie enkaji e Ahab Israel metaasa ing'ok, nitaara sii ilalashera linono metuata, lelo le nkaji e papaai lino, laa ninche supati te iyie;" 
2Chronicles21:14 ng'ura keyau Olaitoriani olmeitai kitok shumata iltung'ana linono, o nkera inono, o nkituaak inono, o ntokitin inono pooki." 
2Chronicles21:15 Ore iyie makewan nikijing enkeeya torrono, e nkoshoke, o metaba anaa nikipuku imonyit tenkaraki ina keeya.’ ”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Neputu Olaitoriani engoro oo Lfilisti olmarabu tenkaraki Yehoram. Etaaniki apa lelo Filisti o lmarabu Etiopia. 
2Chronicles21:17 Nepuonu ninche aarasaki Yuda, neibung ninye, nenap ninche aaya ntokitin pooki naanoto te nkaji o laiguanani, neya sii ilayiok lenyena o nkituaak enyena, neaku meetae olayioni otung'eikiaki ninye, meteleku ake Yehoahas ilo ayioni lenye oti te pooki." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ore etulusoitie kuna pooki near Olaitoriani ninye teina keeya nemeishiunoyu enkoshoke enye. 
2Chronicles21:19 Ore te nkiti rishata etulusoitie ilarin oare, neipang'u imonyit enyena tenkaraki ina keeya. Neye ninye te mion sapuk. Neitu eitobir iltung'ana lenyena enkima, aasho ninye enkanyit anaa apa enaitobiraki enkima too loo menye." 
2Chronicles21:20 Oloo larin tomoni uni oare apa ninye pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin isiet te Yerusalem. Eiwuang'a ninye meetae oltung'ani otishilayie. Etunukaitie ninche ninye te nkanasa e Daudi, kake mme too nkuraren oo laiguanak." 
2Chronicles22:1 Ore lelo oomanya Yerusalem neitaa Ahasia olayioni lenye oti olaiguanani terishata enye. Amu ore ilo wuampa apa loo ltung'ana ooetuo tenebo Ilmarabu atua ilng'oborri, netaara metuata lelo ayiok pooki botoro. Neaku Ahasia olayioni le Yehoram olaiguanani le Yuda ninye oitoreishe." 
2Chronicles22:2 Oloo larin artam oare apa Ahasia pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye olari obo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Atalia, enkakuyiaa e Omri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Eshomo sii apa aibung orrekie le nkaji e Ahab, amu ng'otonye apa naiguan metaasa entorroni." 
2Chronicles22:4 Etaasa apa ninye entorroni too nkonyek o Laitoriani, anaa enataasa enkaji e Ahab. Amu ore apa te siadi keeya e papaai lenye, ninche ooiguanaki ninche, neitasur ninye." 
2Chronicles22:5 Etusujayie ninye enkikoo enye, o meshomo ninye tenebo Yehoram olayioni le Ahab, ilo aiguanani le Israel, nepuo aaitayunye Hasael olaiguanani le Siria olarrabal te Ramot-gilead. Nepik iltung'ana le Siria Yoram olbae." 
2Chronicles22:6 Nerrinyo ninye alo metabaki te Yesreel tenkaraki lelo baa apa ootipikaki ninye te Rama, ina kata apa pee elo aarare Hasael olaiguanani le Siria. Nedoyio Ahasia olayioni le Yehoram, olaiguanani le Yuda alo arum Yoram olayioni le Ahab te Yesreel, amu kemuoi apa ninye." 
2Chronicles22:7 Kake etegelua apa Enkai pee eyau embatatata e Ahasia tena lototo nashomo ninye abaiki Yoram. Ore apa pee elotu ninye ine, neipang ninye alo anang'are Yehu olayioni le Nimshi, laa ninye apa etubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aput pee eidaikie enkaji e Ahab." 
2Chronicles22:8 Ore edung'ito Yehu enkiguana tenkaraki enkaji e Ahab, netumore ninye ilkituaak le Yuda o layiok loo lalashera le Ahasia, laa ninche apa ooing'orita Ahasia. Near ninche metuata." 
2Chronicles22:9 Neing'oru ninye Ahasia, neibung'i ninye eisudori tiatua Samaria, neyauni ninye enetii Yehu neari ninye metua. Nenukaa ninye amu etejo, “Nkakuyiaa lenye Yehosahafat, apa oing'oru Olaitoriani to ltau lenye pooki.” Ore te nkaji e Ahasia nemeetae oltung'ani oidim aitoreisho." 
2Chronicles22:10 Ore apa pee edol Atalia, ng'otonye Ahasia nchere etua olayioni lenye, nedumunye ninye, neidaikie lelo pooki le nkaji e nkitoo te Yuda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Kake eewa Yehoshabet ina tito o laiguanani Yoash olayioni le Ahasia nelo aisudoo ninye aitung'uaa ilkulikae ayiok lo laiguanani letaa keji pee eari metuata, nepik ninye tenebo enkaibung'ani enye olgilata oirragi. Neiko neijia Yehoshabet, ina tito o laiguanani Yehoram, ina kitok e Yehoida olapolosani. Ore enkaraki naa enkanashe apa ninye e Ahasia, eisudoyie ninye arishie Atalia, neaku eitu ear ninye metua." 
2Chronicles22:12 Nebik ninye tenebo ninche ilarin ile, eisudori tiatua enkaji e Nkai, ina kata eitore Atalia ina kop." 
2Chronicles23:1 Ore to lari liopishana, neitagoluo Yehoida, neibung'are ninye ilarikok le njore le maa iip. Asaria olayioni le Yeroham, o Ishmael olayioni le Obed, o Maaseia olayioni le Adaia, o Elishafat olayioni le Sikri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Nepuo ninche aamanaa te Yuda pooki neiturrurru Ilawi too nkanas pooki e Yuda, o lukuny oo nkajijik oo Siraeli, nepuonu ninche Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles23:3 Ore ina umata pooki neitobir olning'o tenebo olaiguanani tiatua enkaji e Nkai. Nejoki Yehoida ninche, “Eng'ura olayioni lo laiguanani! Nchoo ninye eitoreisho, anaa enairoro Olaitoriani tialo ilayiok le Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Ena bae intae entaas, ore intae ilapolosak o Lawi oopuo aing'uaa esiaai te nkolong e Sabato, ore ematua inyi e uni neaku ilarripok loo nchomito." 
2Chronicles23:5 Ore ematua nabo e uni nepuo enkaji o laiguanani, ore ematua nabo e uni nepuo kishomi o lkitamanyunoto. Ore iltung'ana pooki nepuo olgoriet le nkaji e Nkai." 
2Chronicles23:6 Emincho ejing hoo ng'ae atua enkaji o Laitoriani meteleku ilapolosak o Lawi ooisiaaisho. Eidim ninche aatijing, amu eisinyat. Kake ore iltung'ana pooki neibung enkitanapata o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles23:7 Ore Ilawi neman olaiguanani aang'adu, oltung'ani ake eeta imasaa enyena o larrabal te nkaina enye. Ore pooki ng'ae ojing e nkaji o Laitoriani neari metua. Entaa tenebo olaiguanani tenejing'u o teneipang.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Ore Ilawi o Yuda pooki neas te risioroto e nena pooki naaitanapa Yehoida olapolosani ninche. Eyaua ake pooki ng'ae iltung'ana lenyena, lelo lemetii esiaai te nkolong e sabato, amu eitu apa eisho Yehoida olapolosani iltung'ana meidapashari too lturrurri." 
2Chronicles23:9 Neitoki Yehoida olapolosani aisho ilarikok le njore iremeta o long'oi dapashi o nkutiti apa naara ino laiguanani Daudi, naa atua enkaji e Nkai etii." 
2Chronicles23:10 Nepik ninye iltung'ana pooki metaa ilarripok lo laiguanani, eeta ake pooki tung'ani masaa enyena o larrabal te nkaina, ebaiki enkalo e kopikop enkaji o metabaiki enkalo e moikuape e nkaji, neman olperere lo lasar o enkaji." 
2Chronicles23:11 Neitoki ninye ariku olayioni lo laiguanani, neishopoki ninye emaupe e nkitoo, neisho ninye enchakenisho nelimu ninche ninye aajo olaiguanani. Ore Yehoida o layiok lenyena nebukoki ninye eilata aaput, nejo ninche, “Metobikoi olaiguanani.”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Ore ake pee ening Atalia enkilepilep oo ltung'ana ekuet neisis Olaiguanani, nelo ninye atua enkaji o Laitoriani, ine netii iltung'ana." 
2Chronicles23:13 Ore ake pee eing'orisho, nedol olaiguanani eitashe tembata e ng'ape te wueji nejing'ieki enkaji e Nkai, neitashe ilarikok le njore o laoshok loo ntarumpetani te mbata o laiguanani ore iltung'ana pooki leina kop neshipa neosh ntarumpetani. Ore ilaranyak neeta nkinantani enye oo sinkolioitin, erikoo osirua. Nepolos Atalia nkilani enyena, nebuaku ajo, “Enkarruoisho! Enkarruoisho.”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Neitoki Yehoida olapolosani ayau lelo kituaak le njore apa oitasheiki enjore, ejoki ninche, “Iyau ninye mpang'unye erishata oo lturrurri. Ore pooki ng'ae osuju ninye neari to lalem metua.” Amu etejo apa ilo apolosani, “Emiar ninye metua tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Neaku eibung'a ninche ninye, nelo ninye kishomi e mbarta natii enkaji o laiguanani, neari ninye metua teine." 
2Chronicles23:16 Neitobir Yehoida olning'o terishata enye o ltung'ana pooki o laiguanani nchere, pee eaku ninche iltung'ana lo Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles23:17 Nepuo iltung'ana pooki enkaji e Baal, nepuo aadung aauroki enkop; ore ilperereni lenyena loo lasarri, o nkitanyaanyukot enyena oo nkaitin nebel aaitaa mbelibelat, near ninche Matan ilo apolosani le Baal metua, te dukuya lelo pereren loo lasarri." 
2Chronicles23:18 Nepik Yehoida ilarripok le nkaji o Laitoriani, abori erikoroto oo lapolosak o Lawi, o lelo Lawi apa ootegelua Daudi pee eitasheiki enkaji o Laitoriani. Pee eitaiki Olaitoriani ilasarri oopejori, anaa apa enaigeroki too nkitanapat e Musa, te nchipai o te ranyare, te risioroto e nkitanapata e Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Nepik ninye ilarripok loo nchomito, nchomito e nkaji o Laitoriani, pee mejing'u ake oltung'ani hoo obo oiduruk." 
2Chronicles23:20 Neitoki ninye aya ilkituaak le njore, o nkasisin, o lbalusuni loo ltung'ana o ltung'ana pooki le nkop; neriku ninche olaiguanani aaitadou te nkaji o Laitoriani, erukunye aagilaki te nkishomi e shumata o meetu enkaji o laiguanani. Neitoton ninche olaiguanani to lorika lenye le nkitoo." 
2Chronicles23:21 Neaku etishipate iltung'ana pooki leina kop; neitirring'a ina anasa, ina kata eidipaki aatar Atalia to lalem." 
2Chronicles24:1 Oloo larin oopishana apa Yoash pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin artam te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Sibia e Beer-sheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Neas Yoash mbaa sidain te dukuya Olaitoriani too nkolong'i pooki e Yehoida olapolosani. 
2Chronicles24:3 Neisho Yehoida ninye nkituaak are, netum ninye ilayiok o ntoyie." 
2Chronicles24:4 Ore tesiadi ena nemut Yoash pee eitobir e nkaji o Laitoriani. 
2Chronicles24:5 Neiturrur ninye ilapolosak, o Lawi, nejoki ninche, “Enchom nkanas e Yuda nisotutu too Siraeli pooki mpisai naaitobirieki enkaji e Nkai inyi, te pooki ake ari. Naa eng'ura pee isosionienie ina bae.” Kake eitu eisosion Ilawi." 
2Chronicles24:6 Neitoki olaiguanani aipotu olkitok oji Yehoida, nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo iyie pee eitu nkilikuanu too Lawi, meyauni te Yuda o te Yerusalem kodi apa natejo Musa, osinka lo Laitoriani, te umata oo Siraeli tenkaraki olng'obor le nchakenisho?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Amu etigila apa ilayiok le Atalia, ina kitok arruoni, enkaji e Nkai, netaasishore sii nena tokitin pooki apa naaitisinyaki e nkaji o Laitoriani tenkaraki Baal." 
2Chronicles24:8 Neaku eitanapishe olaiguanani, neitobir ninche osanduku nepik ninye boo ina kishomi e nkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles24:9 Neibalunyeki tiatua Yuda pooki o Yerusalem, pee eyakini Olaitoriani ina kodi apa natejo Musa osinka le Nkai pee eitayu Isiraeli tiong'ota." 
2Chronicles24:10 Ore ilkituaak pooki o ltung'ana pooki neshipa, neyau kodi enye aaitadoiki ilo sanduku o metaba anaa neidipayu." 
2Chronicles24:11 Naa ore apa teneyaki Ilawi ilo sanduku iltung'ana kituaak lo laiguanani, naa tenedol ninche aajo etii mpisai kumok, nelotu olaigeroni lo laiguanani o lkitok loo lapolosak aapiku teilo sanduku, nerriny osanduku ewueji duoo netii. Neas ninche ina anaake, nesotu mpisai kumok oleng." 
2Chronicles24:12 Neisho olaiguanani o Yehoida lelo apa ooitasheiki esiaai enkaji o Laitoriani, neiger ilaguetak loo soito, o laguetak loo nkeek pee eitobir ninche enkaji o Laitoriani. Tenebo sii ilaitobirak loo sekenke o suyai, pee eram ninche enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles24:13 Neaku etaasishote apa lelo ootipikaki esiaai, ore enkitobirata e nkaji nelo dukuya too nkaik enye, neitobir ninche enkaji e Nkai netiu anaa apake, neitagol ninye." 
2Chronicles24:14 Ore ake pee eidip neyau nena pisai naatelekutua dukuya olaiguanani o Yehoida. Neitobiraki nena pisai imasaa e nkaji o Laitoriani, tenkaraki enkisiaayiare o lasarri oopejori, o ntokitin e nkorropil, o ntokitin e sahabu o enkosholai. Neitayu ninche ilasarri oopejori tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani anaake too nkolong'i pooki e Yehoida." 
2Chronicles24:15 Kake etamorua Yehoida, neye; naa oloo larin iip o tomoni uni apa ninye ina kata pee eye." 
2Chronicles24:16 Nenukaa ninche ninye te nkanasa e Daudi tenebo ilaiguanak, amu etaasa apa ninye mbaa sidain te Israel, o tialo Olaitoriani o enkaji enye." 
2Chronicles24:17 Ore etulusoyie keeya e Yehoida, nepuonu ilkituaak le Yuda aailejilej olaiguanani nening olaiguanani ninche." 
2Chronicles24:18 Neing'uaa ninche enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai oo loo menye, neisiaai Asherim o nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin. Nelotu engoro napi shumata Yuda o Yerusalem tenkaraki ena kitarruoroto enye." 
2Chronicles24:19 Ore ake eyia, neirriwua ninye iloibonok meetu aarrinyoki ninche Olaitoriani, neishakenoki kulo ninche, kake etanyaita ninche ening." 
2Chronicles24:20 Nejing enkiyang'et o Laitoriani Sakaria olayioni le Yehoida olapolosani; neitashe arumaki iltung'ana kop, nejoki ninche, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ‘Kainyoo pee igiligili intae nkitanapat o Laitoriani o metaa meekure ibulubulu? Ore enkaraki nitanyaita intae Olaitoriani, etanya sii ninye intae.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Kake eing'orutua ninche pee ear ninye metua, ore te nkitanapata olaiguanani nenang ninye too soito to lgoriet le nkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles24:22 Neaku eitu apa edamu olaiguanani Yoash esupatisho apa naitoduaa Yehoida, menye le Sakaria ninye, kake etaara olayioni lenye metua. Ore eye ninye, nejo, “Metoduaa Olaitoriani neitalaku.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Ore etulusoyie olari nelotu enjore e Siria agilunore Yoash. Nepuonu ninche Yuda o Yerusalem, neidaikie ninche ilkituaak pooki loo ltung'ana, neishie tiatua olorere, neirriwaki ninche nena masaa pooki naawaita o laiguanani le Dameski." 
2Chronicles24:24 Ore hoo naa ilkuti tung'ana apa ina jore e Siria, eishooyie Olaitoriani apik nkaik enye enjore kitok, enkaraki natanyaita ninche Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye. Neaku etudung'okito ninche enkiguana, Yoash." 
2Chronicles24:25 Ore pee epuo ninche aaing'uaa ninye, neing'uaaa ninye eeta olbae sapuk, neiguanare isinkan lenyena ninye pee ear metua, aaitalaku osarge lo layioni le Yehoida ilo apolosani, near ninche ninye metua te nchumata endapash enye. Neye ninye; nenukaa ninche ninye te nkanasa e Daudi, kake eitu ninche enukaa ninye too nkuraren oo laiguanak." 
2Chronicles24:26 Ore apa lelo ooiguanare ninye pee ear metua naa Sabad olayioni le Shimeat le Amon, o Yehoshafat olayioni le Shimrit le Moab." 
2Chronicles24:27 Ore mbaa oo layiok lenyena o mbaa kumok naaibarieki ninye, o ne nchetata e nkaji e Nkai neigeroki too limunot tiatua embuku oo laiguanak. Neitoreisho Amasia olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles25:1 Oloo larin tikitam o imiet apa Amasia pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tikitam te Yerusalem. Ore enkarna e ng'otonye naa Yehodan e Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles25:2 Neas ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani, kake mme sidai ake oltau lenye." 
2Chronicles25:3 Ore ake pee eibung enkitoria akurraki too nkaik enyena, near metuata isinkan lenyena apa ootara menye ilo aiguanani." 
2Chronicles25:4 Kake eitu ninye ear nkera enye metuata terisioroto e nena naaigeroki too nkitanapat, tiatua embuku e Musa, teina apa naitanapishe Olaitoriani ajo, “Meari loo menye metuata tenkaraki nkera, anaa meari nkera metuata tenkaraki iloo menye. Kake keye ake pooki tung'ani te nkaraki eng'oki enye makewan.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Neitoki Amasia aiturrurr iltung'ana le Yuda, neitoton ninche anaa ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, tiabori ilarikok le njore loo nkalifuni o loo maa iip te Yuda pooki o te Benchamen. Nepik ninye lelo loo larin tikitam neilep. Ore esiana enye neaku iltung'ana nkalifuni iip uni gelunot, ooidim olarrabal, ooidim aatanap iremeta o long'oi." 
2Chronicles25:6 Neitoki sii aiger iltung'ana nkalifuni iip nabo magil ooing'uaa Isiraeli te shekeli iip nabo e nkosholai. 
2Chronicles25:7 Kake eewuo oltung'ani le Nkai enetii ninye nejoki, “Lo aiguanani, mincho enjore e Israel elo tenebo iyie, amu metii Olaitoriani tenebo Isiraeli, tenebo kulo pooki le Efraim." 
2Chronicles25:8 Kake tenaa ijo iyie tena oitoi ilo agolu to larrabal, naa aikilo anang'aa Enkai te dukuya ilmang'ati; amu eeta Enkai engolon naretishore o enanang'arie.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Nejoki Amasia ilo tung'ani le Nkai, “Kaa iyiook kias tenkaraki nena talantani iip nabo naishoo nanu enjore oo Siraeli?” Newalu ilo tung'ani le Nkai ajo, “Eikindim iyie Olaitoriani aishoo nkumok naalang kuna.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Neisho Amasia ina jore naing'uaa Efraim metorrinyoyu alo ang. Negorokino ninche Yuda oleng; nerrinyo aapuo ang te ngoro sapuk. 
2Chronicles25:11 Kake eitagoluo Amasia, nerikoo ninye iltung'ana lenyena, nepuo oerata le munyan, nesesekuan iltung'ana oogiroo nkalifuni tomon le Seir." 
2Chronicles25:12 Neibung iltung'ana le Yuda kulikae nkalifuni tomon eishu, neya ninche enchumata endapidapoi nesulaa ninche teine; nepurda pooki aaku mpurdat." 
2Chronicles25:13 Kake ore ilapa tung'ana le njore ootorrinyo Amasia, amitiki epuo olarrabal tenebo ninye, nedoiki nkanas e Yuda ebaiki Samaria o metabaiki Bet-horon, near iltung'ana nkalifuni uni tiatua ninche, neya iyarunot kumok oleng." 
2Chronicles25:14 Ore pee errinyunye Amasia eing'uaa-esesekuanata oo ltung'ana le Edom, neyau nkaitin oo ltung'ana le Seir, neitaa ninche nkaitin enyena, neserem ninche, neitaiki ninche ilasarri." 
2Chronicles25:15 Ore enkaraki ina negorokino Olaitoriani Amasia, neirriwaki ninye oloiboni le Nkai, otiaaka ninye, “kainyoo pee imbelekenyakine nkaitin oo ltung'ana neitu ninye ekordu iltung'ana lenye maate te nkaina ino?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Kake ore eton eirorita ninye nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Eikintaa iyiook iyie olaikooni lang? Tigirayu! Eijo iyie pee kiari tua?” Neaku etigire ilo oiboni le Nkai, kake etejo, “Ayiolo nanu ajo eitobira Olaitoriani pee kindaikie iyie, enkaraki nitaasa ena neitu ining enkikoo ai.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Neitoki Amasia aikilikuanishore iltung'ana lenyena, neirriwaki Yoash olayioni le Yehoahas olkilikuai. Naa Yehu olaiguanani loo Siraeli apa nkakuyiaa lenye. Nejoki Amasia Yoash, “Wou maing'urata too nkomomi.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Neirriwaki Yoash ilo aiguanani loo Siraeli Amasia olkilikuai nejoki, “Eirriwaka enkiti aitubului e Lebanon olkilikuai oltarakuai, ajoki, ‘Nchoo entito ino meyama olayioni lai’; nelotu eng'ues e ntim e Lebanon aim ine neituny ina aitubului amut." 
2Chronicles25:19 Ijo taata iyie, ‘Ng'ura, aidaikie nanu Edom,’ nikitudumua iyie oltau lino to lwuasa. Kake ore taata totona iyie tiang; kainyoo iyie pee impiru enyamali pee itum atua, iyie tenebo Yuda?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Kake etanya Amasia ening, amu enkitobirata e Nkai apa ina, pee etum atipika ninye atua nkaik oo lmang'ati lenye, enkaraki nateserema ninche nkaitin e Edom." 
2Chronicles25:21 Neaku eshomo apa Yoash olaiguanani le Israel, netumo ninye o Amasia ilo aiguanani le Yuda, netumo to larrabal te Betshemesh, e Yuda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Nemir Israel Yuda neisik pooki tung'ani alo enkang enye. 
2Chronicles25:23 Neibung Yoash olaiguanani loo Siraeli Amasia ilo aiguanani le Yuda, olayioni le Yoash, olayioni le Ahasia te Betshemesh neyau ninye te Yerusalem, neuroo ninye esuntai e Yerusalem, erishata oo ntemat e nkaina iip ong'uan, ebaiki enkishomi e Efraim o metabaiki kishomi olpijata." 
2Chronicles25:24 Neya ninye sahabu pooki o enkosholai, o masaa pooki naatii atua enkaji e Nkai, netii Obed edom tenebo ninche. Neya sii ilchumat ootii enkaji o laiguanani, o ltung'ana ooibung'aki aaya, nerrinyo alo Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Ore Amasia olayioni le Yoash olaiguanani le Yuda nebik ilarin tomon o imiet etulusoyie keeya e Yoash olayioni le Yehoahas, olaiguanani loo Siraeli." 
2Chronicles25:26 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Amasia, ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto, neigeroki too mbukui oo laiguanak le Yuda o Israel." 
2Chronicles25:27 Ore ebaiki ina kata apa naibelekenye ninye apaash Olaitoriani, neitobir ninche pee ear ninye metua te Yerusalem. Neisikaki ninye Lakish. Kake etusujakita ninche ninye Lakish, near ninye metua teine." 
2Chronicles25:28 Neyau ninche ninye too mbartan. Nenukari tenebo loo menye te nkanasa e Daudi. 
2Chronicles26:1 Ore iltung'ana pooki le Yuda, neibung Usia laa oloo larin tomon o ile, neitaa ninye olaiguanani terishata e papaai lenye Amasia." 
2Chronicles26:2 Etesheta apa ninye Elot nerrinyoki ninye Yuda, ina kata eidipa olaiguanani atua." 
2Chronicles26:3 Oloo larin tomon o ile apa Usia pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin onom oare te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Yekolia e Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles26:4 Etaasa apa ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa papaai lenye Amasia. 
2Chronicles26:5 Eing'orua apa ninye Olaitoriani, too nkolong'i e Sakaria, laa ninye oiteng'ena ninye te uriata o Laitoriani; naa ore anaa enaserem Olaitoriani neisho Enkai ninye metubula." 
2Chronicles26:6 Eshomo ninye aitayunye Ilfilisti olarrabal, neuroo esuntai e Gat o e suntai e Yabne, o esuntai e Ashdod; neshetu ninye nkanas too lpolosien le Ashdod, te kulie wuejitin tiatua Ilfilisti." 
2Chronicles26:7 Etaretuo Enkai ninye tialo Ilfilisti, o lelo Marabu apa oomanya Kurbal, o Lmeuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 Etalaa apa Ilamoni kodi aaisho Usia, ore olning'o lenye nelo o metabaiki ilpolosien le Misiri, amu etaa apa ninye oltung'ani ogol oleng." 
2Chronicles26:9 Ore ake sii eteshetua apa Usia iltaleta te Yerusalem te kishomi o lpijata, o te kishomi oerata, o to lkutoto, neshetu ninche aitagol." 
2Chronicles26:10 Neshetu ninye iltaleta tiong'ota, neturu ilchorroi kumok, amu eeta apa ninye nkishu kumok oleng too ldoinyio o te nkop naisiasha. Neeta apa ninye ilaramatak o laitobirak loo lng'anayio too ldoinyio o te wueji sidai enterit, amu kenyor apa ninye enturore e nkurma." 
2Chronicles26:11 Neeta sii apa Usia enjore oo sikarini, ooidim olarrabal, too lturrurri, terisioroto enkikena e Yeiel ilo aigeroni o Maaseia ilo kitok, tiabori erikoto e Hanania, obo apa loo larikok le njore lo laiguanani." 
2Chronicles26:12 Ore esiana pooki oo lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, oo ltung'ana magil yiolot, naa nkalifuni are o iip ile." 
2Chronicles26:13 Ore ti abori erikoroto enye netii enjore oo ltung'ana nkalifuni iip uni o oopishana o iip imiet, ooidim aatigilunore engolon kitok, pee eretu olaiguanani tialo ilmang'ati lenyena." 
2Chronicles26:14 Neitobiraki Usia enjore pooki ilong'oi, o remeta, o maupen oo sekenke, o ruparen; o nkai o mbaa, o soito oo nang'ari le nkopito." 
2Chronicles26:15 Ore te Yerusalem neitobir iwuejitin neengororieki mbaa, too iltaleta, o too lpijat. Nengorori mbaa nenang'ari isoito sapuki. Nelo olning'o enelakua, amu etaretoki ninye oleng, o metaa oltung'ani ogol." 
2Chronicles26:16 Kake ore apa pee eaku olaiguanani Usia oltung'ani ogol, newuasayu ninye, ina pee eidak ninye. Amu eitarruoyie apa ninye to Laitoriani Enkai enye, nejing atua enkaji o Laitoriani alo apej enkorropil to lperere lo lasar le nkorropil." 
2Chronicles26:17 Kake eshomo apa Asaria olapolosani ajing'aki ninye, tenebo ilapolosak ntomoni isiet lo Laitoriani yiolot, nepuo ninche aaitasheiki olaiguanani Usia, nejoki ninye," 
2Chronicles26:18 “Mme esiaai ino Usia, pee ipejoki Olaitoriani enkorropil, kake esiaai oo lapolosak, lelo ayiok le Aron, laa ninche apa eiteng'elaki pee epej enkorropil. Tupuku mpang'a te wueji sinyati, amu itaasa embae torrono, amu mikiyaki ina enkanyit to Laitoriani, Enkai.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Negoro Usia. Neeta ninye te nkaina entoki napejieki enkorropil, ore ake pee egorokino lelo apolosak, nejing enkeeya oo lbolot enkomom enye, te dukuya lelo apolosak ootii atua enkaji o Laitoriani, ooitashe tembata olperere lo lasar le nkorropil." 
2Chronicles26:20 Ore Asaria ilo apolosani kitok, o lelo apolosak pooki neing'or ninye, naa ng'ura, etijing'a enkeeya oo lbolot enkomom enye! Neipang'ie ninye boo nabo kata, ore ninye makewan neisarrisar alo boo, amu etoosho Olaitoriani ninye." 
2Chronicles26:21 Neton olaiguanani Usia eeta enkeeya oo lbolot o metua. Naa ore anaa oltung'ani oata enkeeya oolbolot neton te nkaji enye makewan. Amu eiwuang'ieki ninye tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani. Naa Yotam olayioni lenye ninye apa oing'or ntokitin e nkaji o laiguanani, neitore iltung'ana leina kop." 
2Chronicles26:22 Naa ore apa nkiaasin pooki e Usia, ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto, neigero oloiboni le Nkai oji Isaya olayioni le Amos." 
2Chronicles26:22 Naa ore apa nkiaasin pooki e Usia, ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto, neigero oloiboni le Nkai oji Isaya olayioni le Amos." 
2Chronicles26:23 Neirrag Usia etua anaa apa loo menye, nenukaa ninche ninye tenebo loo menye te wueji oo nkuraren oo laiguanak, amu etejo ninche, “Ole nkeeya oo lbolot ninye.” Neitoreisho Yotam olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles27:1 Oloo larin tikitam o imiet apa Yotam pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon o ile te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Yerusha entito e Sadok." 
2Chronicles27:2 Neas ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani terisioroto enena pooki apa naataasa papaai lenye Usia, kake eitu ninye elo aibung ntokitin e nkaji o Laitoriani. Kake eton ake eas iltung'ana mbaa torrok." 
2Chronicles27:3 Etesheta ninye kishomi e shumata e nkaji o Laitoriani neshet oleng esuntai e Ofel. 
2Chronicles27:4 Etesheta sii nkanas teina kop oo ndonyio e Yuda, o sempewueti, o ltaleta te nena doinyio e ntim." 
2Chronicles27:5 Etaarare ninye olaiguanani le Amon nemir ninye. Neisho Ilamoni ninye teilo ari shekeli iip nabo e nkosholai, o lbenia nkalifuni tomon le nkano, o lbenia nkalifuni tomon le shairi. Neisho Ilamoni ninye nena tokitin too larin okuni." 
2Chronicles27:6 Neaku etaa Yotam oltung'ani magilani enkaraki naipirie ninye nkoitoi enyena dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai enye. 
2Chronicles27:7 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Yotam, o larrabali lenyena pooki, o nkoitoi enyena, ng'ura neigeroki tiatua embuku oo laiguanak loo Siraeli o Yuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Oloo larin tikitam o imiet apa ninye pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon o ile te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles27:9 Neirura Yotam etua anaa loo menye, nenukaa ninche ninye te nkanasa e Daudi; neitoreisho Ahas olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles28:1 Oloo larin tikitam apa Ahas pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon o ile te Yerusalem. Neitu ninye eas mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani, anaa apa papaai lenye Daudi." 
2Chronicles28:2 Kake eibung'a ninye irrekiei loo laiguanak le Israel. Eitobira doi ninye nkitanyaanyukot o ntokitin naatosholaki aaitobiraki Baal. 
2Chronicles28:3 Nepej enkorropil to erata lo layioni le Hinom; nepejoo ilayiok lenyena anaa olasar, te risioroto e nena tabo apa oo loshon ooterewa Olaitoriani aiwuang'ie te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel." 
2Chronicles28:4 Neitayu ninye olasar nepejoo enkorropil, too wuejitin e shumata o too ldoinyio, o tiabori pooki shani onyori." 
2Chronicles28:5 Ore enkaraki ina eishooyie Olaitoriani ninye apik nkaik o laiguanani le Siria. Nemir olaiguanani le Siria ninye, neibung iltung'ana lenyena kumok neya ninche Dameski. Eishooyioki sii apa aapik nkaik o laiguanani le Israel, ilo otimira ninye te sesekuanata sapuk." 
2Chronicles28:6 Amu ore olayioni le Remalia netasesekuana iltung'ana nkalifuni iip nabo o tikitam te Yuda te nkolong nabo. Ore lelo pooki naa iltung'ana yiolot, enkaraki natanyaita ninche Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles28:7 Ore Sikri ilo tung'ani magilani le Efraim, nesesekuan Maaseia, olayioni lo laiguanani, o Asikam ilo kitok le nkaji e nkitoo, o Elkana ilo osujaki te nkitoo o laiguanani." 
2Chronicles28:8 Ore iltung'ana le Israel neibung iltung'ana nkalifuni iip are e lelo tung'ana lenye, nkituaak o layiok o ntoyie. Ewaita sii iyarunot kumok te ninche neya Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Kake etii apa oloiboni lo Laitoriani ine, oji enkarna enye Oded. Neipang ninye alo atumore ina jore naing'uaa Samaria, nejoki ninche, “Ng'ura, ore amu etagorokine apa Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi Yuda, eishorua ninche apik nkaik inyi, kake itasesekuana intae ninche te ngoro naing'uaa shumata." 
2Chronicles28:10 Niyieuu taata intae nintaa irrindiki iltung'ana le Yuda o le Yerusalem, Ilewa o nkituaak. Aimiatata intae ing'ok inyi maate tialo Olaitoriani Enkai inyi?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Entoning'oki naa taata nirrinyirrinyi lelo apa limbung'a aayau, amu etii engoro napi o Laitoriani shumata intae.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Ore apa kulikae tung'ana kituaak too ltung'ana le Efraim, Asaria olayioni le Yohanan, o Berekia olayioni le Meshilemot, o Yehikia olayioni le Shalum, o Amasa olayioni le Hadalai, neitashe aagilunore lelo apa ooing'uaa olarrabal." 
2Chronicles28:13 Nejoki ninche, “Miyauu intae lelo yarunot ene, amu ijojo intae pee iyauu shumata iyiook enkitarruroto to Laitoriani aaponiki ing'ok ang o nkitarrurot ang maate. Amu aikitok enkitarruoroto ang maate, netii engoro napi tenkaraki Israel.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Neaku etapala lelo tung'ana le njore lelo yarunot aaisho meshomo, tenebo nena masaa, te dukuya lelo kituaak o eumata pooki." 
2Chronicles28:15 Ore lelo tung'ana apa ooipotoki nkarn nedumunye aaya lelo yarunot, o masaa naatarayioki, neishopoki nkilani lelo lemeishopo. Neishopoki ninche nkilani, neisho ninche inamuka, neisho endaa o entoki naok, neyel ninche te ilata. Ore lelo lemeidimari nenapi too sirkon. Neyau ninche enkop enye maate, Yeriko enkanasa oo ltuka. Neitoki ninche aarrinyo aapuo Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Ore apa teina kata neomonu olaiguanani Ahas eretoto to laiguanani le Asiria. 
2Chronicles28:17 Amu enyaakita iltung'ana le Edom aarasaki nemir Yuda, neya ninye nkanas e Betshemesh o Aijalon, o Gederot, o Soko tenebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti," 
2Chronicles28:18 neya Timna tenebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti, o Gumso tenebo nkang'itie enyena kutiti, nemanyisho ninche tenena wuejitin." 
2Chronicles28:19 Amu eitadouo apa Olaitoriani Yuda tenkaraki Ahas olaiguanani le Israel, amu etaasa apa ninye inenkarruoisho tiatua Yuda, netaa olemeisiligayu to Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles28:20 Neaku eewuo Tilgat-pilnesa, ilo aiguanani le Asiria agilunore ninye, ore terishata naitagol ninye neidop ninye." 
2Chronicles28:21 Amu eitayio apa Ahas te nkaji o Laitoriani, o te nkaji o laiguanani o too nkajijik oo lkituaak, ntokitin e kodi naaishoo olaiguanani le Asiria; kake eitu eretu nena tokitin ninye." 
2Chronicles28:22 Ore teina kata enye o sina neponari ninye aaku olemeisiligayu to Laitoriani. Ore ake sii ele aiguanani oji Ahas," 
2Chronicles28:23 amu etopolosaka ninye nkaitin e Dameski, naa ninche apa naatimira ninye, nejo ninye, “Ore enkaraki natareto nkaitin oo ltung'ana le Asiria ninche, kapolosaki nanu ninche pee aatum aataretu nanu.” Kake etaa ninche enkidaata te ninye o te Israel pooki." 
2Chronicles28:24 Neiturrur Ahab tenebo imasaa e nkaji nedung'udung nena masaa aitaa ndung'udung'ot, neiken ninye nkutukie oo nkajijik e nkaji o Laitoriani; neitobiraki kewan ilperereni loo lasarri te pooki pijata le Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles28:25 Ore tiatua pooki anasa e Yuda, neitobir ninye iwuejitin neeika neepejokinye enkorropil kulie aitin, neitagor Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles28:26 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin enyena o nkoitoi enyena pooki, ebaiki enkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto, ng'ura eigeroki te mbuku oo laiguanak le Yuda o Israel." 
2Chronicles28:27 Neirrag Ahas etua anaa loo menye, nenukaa ninche ninye te nkanasa, tiatua Yerusalem, amu eitu ninche eyau ninche nkuraren oo laiguanak le Israeli. Neitoreisho Hesekia olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles29:1 Eiterua apa Hesekia aitoreisho aa o loo larin tikitam o imiet, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tikitam ooudo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa Abija entito e Sekaria." 
2Chronicles29:2 Neas mbaa sidain te dukuya Olaitoriani, te risioroto e nena pooki apa naataasa papaai lenye Daudi." 
2Chronicles29:3 Ore to lari le dukuya le nkitoria enye, to lapa le dukuya, nebol ninye nkutukie oo nkajijik e nkaji o Laitoriani, neram ninche." 
2Chronicles29:4 Neitijing'u ninye ilapolosak o Lawi, neiturrur ninche to lgoriet le nkalo oloo saen, nejoki ninye ninche, “Entoning'oki nanu lo Lawi!" 
2Chronicles29:5 Entisinya ate, nintisinyinyi enkaji o Laitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi, niwuang'ieng'ie intae olduruk teine wueji sinyati." 
2Chronicles29:6 Amu etaa apa iloo papa ilemeisiligayu, netaasa ninche entorroni too nkonyek o Laitoriani Enkai ang; etung'uitie ninche ninye, neibelekenyate aapaash emanyisho o Laitoriani, neisho ninche ninye oriong." 
2Chronicles29:7 Neiken sii kutukaji eine wueji sinyati, near iltaai, neitu epejoki enkorropil anaa eishooyo ilasarri teine wueji sinyati, aaisho Enkai e Israel." 
2Chronicles29:8 Ore enkaraki ina, nelotu engoro o Laitoriani napi shumata e Yuda o Yerusalem, neitaa ninche entoki naitureisho, o enenking'asia, o entoki naimakini, anaa enidolidolo too nkonyek inyi." 
2Chronicles29:9 Amu ng'ura to lalem apa etabatatate loo papa o ilayiok lang, o ntoyie ang, ore nkituaak ang naatii netii atua eyararoto tenkaraki ena." 
2Chronicles29:10 Etii naa taata oltau lai pee aitobir osotua lo lning'o o Laitoriani, Enkai e Israel, pee etum ina goro enye napi aibelekenyayu te iyiook." 
2Chronicles29:11 Na kera aainei, emimenaa naa taata, amu etegelua intae Olaitoriani pee ipuopuo aaitashe te dukuya ninye, pee isiayiayia ninye, niakuku ilaisiaayiak lenyena nipejokiki ninye enkorropil.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Neitoki aadumunye kulikae Lawi, Mahat olayioni le Amasia, o Yoel olayioni le Asaria loo layiok le Kohat; ore too layiok le Merari naa Kish olayioni le Abdi, o Asaria olayioni le Yahalel; Ore too le Gershon, naa Yoa olayioni le Sima, o Eden olayioni le Yoa." 
2Chronicles29:13 Ore too layiok le Elisafan, naa Shimri o Yeul; ore too layiok le Asaf naa Sekaria o Matania;" 
2Chronicles29:14 ore too layiok le Heman, naa Yehuel o Shimei; ore too layiok le Yedutum naa Shimeia o Usiel." 
2Chronicles29:15 Neiturrur ninche ilalashera lenye neitisiny ate, nejing ninche atua anaa enaitanapishe olaiguanani, too rorei lo Laitoriani, pee eitisinyi enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles29:16 Nepuo ilapolosak olgilata liatua le nkaji o Laitoriani aaitisiny, neitayu ninche olduruk pooki, apa otii atua enkaji o Laitoriani aayau boo, ilo goriet le nkaji o Laitoriani, nedumu Ilawi aaya oerata le Kidron." 
2Chronicles29:17 Eiterutua apa ninche aaitisiny te nkolong e dukuya o lapa le dukuya, ore te nkolong e isiet o lapa nepuonu ninche olgoriet le kutukaji enkaji o Laitoriani; ore too nkolong'i isiet neitisiny ninche enkaji o Laitoriani ore te nkolong e tomon o ile o lapa le dukuya neidip ninche." 
2Chronicles29:18 Neitoki ninche aapuo enetii olaiguanani Hesekia nejoki ninye, “Kintisinya iyiook enkaji o Laitoriani pooki, ilo perere lo lasar opejori o masaa enyena pooki, o ina mesa e mukate e nkitoduaaroto o masaa enyena pooki." 
2Chronicles29:19 Ore imasaa pooki apa naawa olaiguanani Ahas te nkitoria enye apa meisiligayu, nikintobira iyiook, nikintisinya; naa ng'ura etii ninche dukuya olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Neitoki olaiguanani Hesekia adumunye tadekenya neiturrur iltung'ana kituaak le nkanasa, neilep alo enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles29:21 Neyau ninche iloing'ok oopishana, o lmeregeshi oopishana o lkuoo le kerra oopishana, tenkaraki olasar loo ng'ok o tenkaraki enkitoria, o tenkaraki ewueji sinyati o tenkaraki Yuda. Neitoki ninye aitanap ilapolosak lelo ayiok le Aron pee eishooyo ninche anaa olasar te nchumata olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles29:22 Neyieng ninche lelo oing'ok, neng'amu ilapolosak osarge neisuaki olperere lo lasar; neyieng lelo meregeshi neisuaki osarge lenye olperere lo lasar; neyieng ilkuoo le kerra neisuaki osarge lenye olperere lo lasar." 
2Chronicles29:23 Neitokini aayau lelo kineji anaa olasar loo ng'ok, dukuya olaiguanani o eumata, neiteleiki ninche nkaik enye shumata ninche." 
2Chronicles29:24 Neyieng ilapolosak ninche neitobir olasar loo ng'ok to sarge le lelo kineji te nchumata olperere lo lasar, pee eitobir olning'o lo sotua tenkaraki Israel pooki. Amu eitanapishe olaiguanani nchere, ore olasar opejori, o lasar le ng'oki naa keitobiri tenkaraki Israel pooki." 
2Chronicles29:25 Nepik ninye Ilawi atua enkaji o Laitoriani, eeta nkinantani dapashi oo saanini, o Nkai oo sinkolioitin, o lwululi loo usin, te risioroto enkitanapata e Daudi, o ene Gad ilo aduaani lo laiguanani o Natan oloiboni le Nkai. Amu ore apa ina kitanapata naa Olaitoriani eing'uaa eimunye iloibonok lenyena." 
2Chronicles29:26 Neitashe Ilawi eeta nena kinantani e Daudi neitashe ilapolosak eeta ntarumpetani. 
2Chronicles29:27 Neitoki Hesekia aitanapisho pee eitobiri olasar opejori te nchumata olperere lo lasar. Ore ake pee eiteruni ilo perere lo lasar, neiteruni sii osinkolio oranyakini Olaitoriani, neitusuji eoshoto oo ntarumpetani, o nkinantani e Daudi ilo aiguanani le Israel." 
2Chronicles29:28 Neserem ina umata pooki, neranyisho ilaranyak, nebuaku ntarumpetani. Neranyisho nena pooki o metaba anaa neishunye ilo asar opejori." 
2Chronicles29:29 Ore ake pee eidipayu olasar, neirrugo olaiguanani o lelo pooki ootii tenebo ninye aaserem." 
2Chronicles29:30 Neitanap olaiguanani Hesekia o lapolosak, o ltung'ana kituaak ilapolosak, metaranyaki Olaitoriani enkisisa too rorei le Daudi, o Asaf ilo aduaani. Nerany ninche enkisisa o Laitoriani te nchipai, neirrugo ninche aaserem." 
2Chronicles29:31 Neitoki Hesekia ajo, “Intisinyakita taata intae ate Olaitoriani; entinyiku ene; niyauu ilasarri o nkishorot e nashe atua enkaji o Laitoriani.” Neyau ina umata ilasarri, o nkishorot e nashe, ore lelo pooki oota enyorrata too ltauja, neyau ilasarri oopejori." 
2Chronicles29:32 Ore esiana oo lasarri oopejori, ooyautua ina umata naa iloing'ok ntomoni naapishana, o lmeregeshi iip nabo, o lkuo le kerra iip are. Ore kulo pooki naa iloo lasarri oopejokini Olaitoriani." 
2Chronicles29:33 Ore olasar lenkitisinyata naa iloing'ok iip ile o nkerra nkalifuni uni. 
2Chronicles29:34 Kake aikuti apa ilapolosak oleng nemeidim aaitobira ilasarri oopejori pooki, neaku eitisinya apa ilapolosak ate, neretu ninche ilalashera lenye, o metaba anaa neidipayu esiaai. Amu kedupa apa Ilawi too ltauja aalang ilapolosak." 
2Chronicles29:35 Ore tenebo ilo asar opejori kitok, netii eilata o lasar le seriani, netii ilasarri oopikuni tenkaraki ilasarri oopejori. Neikoni neijia aarrinyu enkisiaayiare e nkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles29:36 Ore Hesekia o ltung'ana pooki neshipayu tenkaraki ina naitaasa Olaitoriani iltung'ana; amu eewuo ina bae nabo kata. 
2Chronicles30:1 Neirriwaa Hesekia olkilikuai te Israel pooki o Yuda, neigeroki sii Efraim impala, o Manase, pee epuonu ninche enkaji o Laitoriani te Yerusalem, pee epuonu aaibung pasaka o Laitoriani Enkai e Israel." 
2Chronicles30:2 Amu eibung'a olaiguanani, o ltung'ana pooki kituaak, o eumata pooki natii Yerusalem enkiguana, pee eibung pasaka to lapa liare." 
2Chronicles30:3 Amu metumoki apa ninche aaibung'a te rishata enye amu eitu eitisiny ilapolosak ate, te siana naishiaakino, neitu sii eiturrurro iltung'ana te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:4 Nedol olaiguanani aa sidai ina kitobirata, nedol sii ina umata aajo aisidai." 
2Chronicles30:5 Nelikio ninche aaibalunye te Israel pooki ebaiki Beer-sheba o metabaiki Dan, nchere pee epuonu iltung'ana aaibung sabato tenkaraki Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, te Yerusalem, amu eitu aikata eibung te nkumoi anaa apa enatolimuoki." 
2Chronicles30:6 Nepuo ilkipaareta enkop e Israel pooki o Yuda eeta mpala naaing'uaa olaiguanani o ltung'ana lenyena kituaak, anaa enaitanapishe olaiguanani, ejo, “Lo tung'ana le Israel, entorrinyokinoto Olaitoriani, Enkai e Abraham, o Isaak, o Israel, pee eitoki sii ninye arrinyokino ilo pisiai linyi, apa otelekua too nkaik oo laiguanak le Asiria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Emitiuu intae anaa loo papaai linyi anaa ilalashera linyi, apa lemeisiligayu to Laitoriani Enkai oo loo menye, ore enkaraki ina neitaaki ninche olmuate, anaa enidolitata." 
2Chronicles30:8 Emiaku naa taata iloosho murto anaa apa enatiu iloo papaai linyi, kake embelekenyakinoto Olaitoriani, nipuonunu ewueji enye sinyati, apa naitisinya ninye ntarasi, nisiayiayia Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, pee etum ina goro enye napi aibelekenyayu atapaasha intae." 
2Chronicles30:9 Amu tenimbelekenyakinono intae Olaitoriani, ore ilalashera linyi o nkera inyi netum olng'ur te lelo apa ootaraitie ninche, nerrinyunye ninche aapuonu ena kop. Amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai inyi naa kenana oshoke neeta olng'ur, nemeboin enkomom enye aitapaash intae, te nimbelekenyakinono ninye.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Nepuo lelo kipaareta aaimaa nkanas pooki, te nkop e Efraim pooki o Manase, nepuo o metabaiki Sebulon, kake etakueniyie iltung'ana ninche nesurdaany, neikordod ninche." 
2Chronicles30:11 Ilkuti tung'ana ake le Asheri o le Manase o le Sebulon ooitoborruote nepuonu Yerusalem. 
2Chronicles30:12 Etii sii apa enkaina o Laitoriani shumata Yuda, pee eisho ninche oltau obo oasie nena naaitanapishe olaiguanani o lkituaak lenyena, tialo ororei lo Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles30:13 Nepuonu iltung'ana kumok aaiturrurro tenebo aaibung osirua loo mukateni neitu eisuijieki; to lapa liare, eumata sapuk oleng." 
2Chronicles30:14 Neasisho ninche, neiwuang'ie ilperereni loo lasarri apa ootii Yerusalem, o lperereni loo lasarri oopejorieki enkorropil, neya ninche nepuo aanang'aki oerata le Kidron." 
2Chronicles30:15 Neyieng ninche ilkuoo le kerra le pasaka, te nkolong e tomon oo ng'uan o lapa liare. Ore ilapolosak o Lawi nekurru, nepuo ninche aaitisiny ate, neyau ilasarri oopejori atua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles30:16 Nejing ninche irishat enye terisioroto enkitanapata e Musa, ilo tung'ani le Nkai. Neisuaya ilapolosak ilo sarge otang'amutua too nkaik oo Lawi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Amu etii apa ilkumok teina umata leitu eitisiny ate. Ore enkaraki ina eteyiang'a Ilawi ilkuoo le kera te pooki ng'ae leitu eitisinyi, pee eitaae sinyati to Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles30:18 Ore teilo orora lo lorere naa Efraim eing'uaa ilkumok lenye, o Manase, o Isaakar, o Sebulon, neitu eitisiny ate, eji neinosa ake pasaka kake mme te nkoitoi natolimuoki. Amu etoomonoko Hesekia ninche ejo, “Metapalaki Olaitoriani supat pooki tung'ani," 
2Chronicles30:19 oing'oru to ltau lenye Enkai, Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo menye, hoo duoo teneme too nkitanapat e wueji sinyati e nkitukuore.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Nening Olaitoriani Hesekia, neishiunye iltung'ana." 
2Chronicles30:21 Ore iltung'ana le Israel apa ootii Yerusalem neibung osirua loo mukateni neitu eisuijieki nkolong'i naapishana, te nchipai sapuk oleng. Ore Ilawi o lapolosak neisis Olaitoriani anaake. Neranyaki te nkidimata enye pooki Olaitoriani." 
2Chronicles30:22 Neirorie Hesekia aitagol lelo Lawi apa ooitodolutua enkarriyiano te nkisiayiare o Laitoriani. Neinos iltung'ana ina daa o sirua nkolong'i naapishana. Neitayu ilasarri leseriani, neisho enashe Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles30:23 Neitoki eumata pooki aaning'okino tenebo pee eibung osirua nkulie olong'i naapishana. Neaku eibung'a ninche nkulie olong'i naapishana, te nchipai." 
2Chronicles30:24 Amu eishoo apa Hesekia, ilo aiguanani le Yuda eumata ilmong'i enkalifu nabo, o nkerra nkalifuni naapishana tenkaraki olasar. Ore ilkituaak neisho ina umata ilmong'i enkalifu nabo o nkerra nkalifuni tomon. Ore ilapolosak neitisiny ate te nkumoi oleng." 
2Chronicles30:25 Ore ina umata pooki e Yuda, oina umata pooki naing'uaa enkop e Israel, o lelo oomanya Yuda, neshipayu." 
2Chronicles30:26 Neaku sapuk oleng enchipai te Yerusalem, amu ore ebaiki enkata e Solomon olayioni le Daudi olaiguanani le Israel, eitu aekata etumi entoki naaijo ena te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:27 Neinyototo ilapolosak o Lawi aamayian olorere, nening'i oltoilo lenye, nelotu enkomono enye ine wueji enye sinyati te keper." 
2Chronicles31:1 Ore apa pee eidipayu nena pooki, ore lelo Siraeli pooki apa ootii ine, neipang aapuo nkanas e Yuda nebel aaitaa mbelibelat ing'apeta neuroki Asherim enkop, nesulaa iwuejitin neeika, o lperereni loo lasarri te Yuda pooki, o te Benchamen, o te Efraim o te Manase, ometaba anaa neidaikie pooki. Neitoki iltung'ana pooki le Israel aarrinyo aapuo nkanas enye, nelo ake oltung'ani ewueji enye." 
2Chronicles31:2 Negelu Hesekia ntukusi oo lapolosak o noo Lawi. Entukus ake o enkae tukus, negelu ake entukus te risioroto esiaai enye, ilapolosak o Lawi tenkaraki ilasarri oopejori o lasarri le seriani. Pee eisiaaisho too nchomito oo lng'oborri lo Laitoriani neishooyo enashe o enkisisa." 
2Chronicles31:3 Ore apa enkishorunoto o laiguanani naing'uaa imasaa enyena makewan, naa tenkaraki ilasarri oopejori. Ilasarri oopejori le tadekenya o le nteipa. O lasarri oopejori le sabato, o lapaitin ng'ejuko, o siruai oogeluno, anaa enaigeroki tiatua enkitanapata o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles31:4 Neitanap ninye lelo tung'ana apa oomanya Yerusalem, pee eishooyo erubata oo lapolosak o Lawi, pee etum ninche aaishoo ate enkitanapata o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ore ake ina kata pee eitubulari ina kitanapata, neishooyo iltung'ana le Israel te nkumoi, ilng'anayio lenye le dukuya le ntapa, o enaisho oo sabibu, o eilata, o enaisho oo lotorok o ntokitin pooki naanotoki te nkurma. Neyau ninche te leng'on erubata e tomon e pooki toki." 
2Chronicles31:6 Ore iltung'ana le Israel o le Yuda ootii nkanas e Yuda neyau sii ninche erubata e tomon oo nkishu o nkerra, o ntokitin apa naaitisinyaki neiteng'elakini Olaitoriani Enkai enye, neirragieki ninche aasot too lturrurri." 
2Chronicles31:7 Ore to lapa liokuni neiteru ninche aaiturrur lelo sotot neidip to lapa liopishana. 
2Chronicles31:8 Ore ake pee elotu Hesekia o lkituaak aadol lelo sotot, neisis Olaitoriani nemayian iltung'ana lenyena le Israel." 
2Chronicles31:9 Neikilikuanishore Hesekia ilapolosak o Lawi tenkaraki lelo sotot. 
2Chronicles31:10 Newaliki ninye Asaria ilo apolosani kitok le nkaji e Sadok, nejoki, “Ore anaa neiteru ninche aayau nkishorot atua enkaji o Laitoriani kitadaate iyiook, nikiraposho nikileku nkumok. Amu etamayiana Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena, neaku kinoto iyiook ele shumati pooki otelekua.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Neitoki Hesekia aitanap ninche meitobira ilgilat tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, neitobir ninche." 
2Chronicles31:12 Neyau ninche nena kishorot, o ematua e tomon, o nena tokitin naaitisinyaki. Ore olaitasheikinoni kitok naa Konania olayioni le Lawi, tenebo Shimei olalashe lenye, aa ninye oliare." 
2Chronicles31:13 Naa Yehiel apa, o Asasia, o Natan, o Asahel, o Yerimot, o Yosabad, o Elieli, o Ismakia, o Mahat, o Benaia, ninche ilaitasheikinok ooretu Konania o Shimei olalashe lenye. Ninche etegelua olaiguanani Hesekia o Asaria ilo kitok oitasheiki enkaji e Nkai." 
2Chronicles31:14 Naa Kore olayioni le Imna, le Lawi, ninye olarriponi le nkishomi enkalo oloo saen, ninye oitasheiki nkishorot o lpela naaishori Enkai. Pee eiteng'el nkishorot naaiteng'elakaki Olaitoriani o nena kishorot naasinya oleng." 
2Chronicles31:15 Naa Eden, o Miniamin, o Yoshua ninche apa ootonyuaa aaretu ninche te nena anas oo lapolosak, pee eorioriki ilalashera lenye irubat enye, ilbotoro o looti, aaitorisioki, too ntukusi." 
2Chronicles31:16 Meteleku ake lelo ooigeroki anaa ilmareita, ilewa ebaiki ilarin okuni neilep. Lelo pooki oojing'u atua enkaji o Laitoriani, anaa enayieuni te pooki olong, te nkisiayiare enye terisioroto oo siaaitin enye, too lturrurri lenye." 
2Chronicles31:17 Ore apa enkigeroto oo lapolosak naa te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye. Aa taa Ilawi ooitabaya ilarin tikitam o imiet neilep naa te risioroto oo siaaitin enye too lturrurri lenye. 
2Chronicles31:18 Ore apa ilapolosak neigeroki tenebo nkera enye pooki, o nkituaak enye o layiok lenye, o ntoyie enye, o eumata pooki. Amu keisiligayu apa ninche egolie ate aaitaa sinyat." 
2Chronicles31:19 Ore too layiok le Aron, lelo apolosak, lelo apa ootii enkop namanya pooki ng'ae, o nkanas enye netii iltung'ana ootii atua kulie anas ootegelakaki too nkarn, pee eoriki irubat pooki lee tiatua ilapolosak, o pooki tung'ani tiatua Ilawi apa ooigeroki enkarna enye." 
2Chronicles31:20 Neas Hesekia ina tiatua Yuda pooki, neas ninye mbaa sidain naaishiaakino te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai enye." 
2Chronicles31:21 Ore pooki siaai nataasa ninye te nkisiayiare e nkaji e Nkai, o te risioroto e nkitanapata eing'orua Enkai enye, neas ninye ina to ltau lenye pooki. Nebul ninye." 
2Chronicles32:1 Ore etulusoitie kuna baa o kuna kiaasin, e nkisiligata, nelotu Senakerib arasaki Yuda neun ilng'oborri aipirakinye nena anas naasheta isunta, eji ejo ninye tenaa keisulie." 
2Chronicles32:2 Ore ake pee edol Hesekia ajo eewuo Senakerib, neyieu ninye niarare Yerusalem," 
2Chronicles32:3 neitobir tenebo ilkituaak lenyena o ltung'ana lenyena magil, pee eibooyo enkare e nena shorroi naatii auluo enkanasa. Neret ninche ninye." 
2Chronicles32:4 Neiturruro olorere kitok, neibooyo nkonyek oo nkariak pooki o erata apa naaruko teina kop, ejo, “Kainyoo pee epuonu ilaiguanak le Asiria aatum enkare sapuk?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Neasisho ninye etumuta nabo, neshet ninye nena sunta apa naaturori, nepik iltaleta shumata enye. Ore tioriong ninye neshetu enkae suntai. Neitagol sii Milo teina anasa e Daudi. Eitobira sii apa imasaa o larrabal o long'oi te nkumoi." 
2Chronicles32:6 Nepik ninye iltung'ana abori ilarikok le njore teina anasa. Neiturrurroki ninche kewan to lkurroto te mbata e kishomi, neirorie ninche aitagol ejo," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Entagoluoto. Emiureishoyu nimileporiri te dukuya olaiguanani le Asiria oina jore pooki natii tenebo ninye. Amu etii obo kitok tenebo iyiook olang ninye. 
2Chronicles32:8 Ore tenebo ninye naa enjore oo ltung'ana lo sesen kake ore tialo iyiook netii Olaitoriani Enkai ang, pee eretu iyiook nearisho too larrabali lang.” Negolu iltung'ana oishua te lelo rorei le Hesekia olaiguanani le Yuda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Ore tesiadi ena, neirriu Senakerib, olaiguanani le Asiria ilo apa otang'adua Lakish aman, tenebo enjore enye pooki, isinkan lenyena meetu Yerusalem enetii olaiguanani Hesekia olaiguanani le Yuda o ltung'ana. Oltung'ana pooki le Yuda apa ootii Yerusalem ejo," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Nji ejo Senakerib olaiguanani le Asiria, Ainyoo intae isiligitata, eji pee intasheshe intae itang'adutua aairin Yerusalem?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Keitu eitapong'oo intae Hesekia pee eisho intae entuata to lameyu o te nkure, ejoki intae, ‘Kekordu iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang te nkaina o laiguanani le Asiria?’" 
2Chronicles32:12 Keitu ninye eiwang'ie Hesekia iwuejitin o lperereni loo lasarri neitanap Yuda o Yerusalem ejo, ‘To lperere obo lo lasar intae enteserem naa te nchumata enye intae entayutu ilasarri?’" 
2Chronicles32:13 Aimiyiololo intae enaitaasa nanu o loo papa iltung'ana le kulie kuapi? Keidim apa nkaitin e lelo oreren aatokordu iloshon lenye te nkaina ai? 
2Chronicles32:14 Kake kaa tiatua nkaitin pooki e lelo oshon apa ooidaikie papa lai tukul naidima atokordu iltung'ana lenyena te nkaina ai, eji metaa keidim Enkai inyi atokordu intae te nkaina ai?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Ore naa taata emincho Hesekia meitapong'oi intae anaa elej intae, tena pukunoto enye, nimining'ining'i intae ninye. Amu meetae enkai e ae kop anaa enkitoria naidima atokordu iltung'ana lenyena te nkaina ai, anaa te nkaina oo loo papa. Kebaa naa meidim Enkai inyi atokordu intae te nkaina ai!”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Neiro lelo sinkan lenyena mbaa kumok naaipirta Olaitoriani Enkai o sinka lenye Hesekia. 
2Chronicles32:17 Neiger ninye mpala amor Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli neiro asukeny ninye ejo, “Anaa nkaitin oo loshon neitu eidim aatokordu iltung'ana lenye too nkaik aainei, neijia etiu Enkai e Hesekia, mekordu ninye iltung'ana te nkaina ai.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Nebuaku ninche aajo neijia te nkutuk e Yuda, aaitoning iltung'ana le Yerusalem apa ootii esuntai, ejo pee eiture neitashal, ejo pee etum aawaita enkanasa." 
2Chronicles32:19 Neiro ninche aaimaki Enkai e Yerusalem, anaa enaimaki nkaitin oo loreren le nkop, naa esiaai oo nkaik oo ltung'ana." 
2Chronicles32:20 Neomon Hesekia olaiguanani o Isaya oloiboni le Nkai, olayioni le Amos tenkaraki ena, neishiraki ninche keper." 
2Chronicles32:20 Neomon Hesekia olaiguanani o Isaya oloiboni le Nkai, olayioni le Amos tenkaraki ena, neishiraki ninche keper." 
2Chronicles32:21 Neirriu Olaitoriani olmalaika otara metuata lelo morran pooki magil, o larikok le njore o lkituaak loo lng'oborri lo laiguanani le Asiria. Neaku etorrinye ninye te nkurruna e nkomom enye alo enkop enye makewan. Ore pee elotu atua enkaji e nkai enye, near kulikae ayiok lenyena ninye metua." 
2Chronicles32:22 Neitajeu Olaitoriani Hesekia, o lelo oomanya Yerusalem te nkaina e Senakerib, olaiguanani le Asiria, o te nkaina oo lmang'ati lenyena pooki. Neisho ninche enkiyeng'iyeng te pooki shoto." 
2Chronicles32:23 Neyau ilkumok nkishorot aaisho Olaitoriani te Yerusalem, neisho ntokitin e tipat Hesekia olaiguanani le Yuda, neaku keyanyiti ninye too loshon pooki, ebaiki ina kata neito idia alo." 
2Chronicles32:24 Ore apa te nena olong'i nemuoyu Hesekia neaku keye, neomon ninye Olaitoriani, newal Olaitoriani enkomono enye, neisho ninye olmonekie." 
2Chronicles32:25 Kake eitu eishoru Hesekia olerrinyore te risioroto eina supatisho naitaasaki ninye, amu etawuase to ltau lenye. Neaku eewuo engoro napi shumata ninye o Yuda o Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles32:26 Kake eitoborro Hesekia kewan teilo wuasa lo ltau lenye, ninye o lelo oomanya Yerusalem, neaku eitu eitoki engoro napi o Laitoriani alotu shumata ninche too nkolong'i pooki e Hesekia." 
2Chronicles32:27 Neeta apa Hesekia enkarsisisho sapuk o enkanyit, neitobiraki kewan ilchumat le nkosholai o le sahabu, o soito oogol enkinyang'a, o sonkoyoni, o long'oi o masaa pooki naagol enkinyang'a." 
2Chronicles32:28 Etesheta sii apa nkajijik naashumishoreki tenkaraki entapa, o enaisho oo sabibu, o eilata, o laleta tenkaraki mpukunot pooki oo nkishu, o muatat oo nkerra." 
2Chronicles32:29 Neitobiraki sii kewan nkanas, o luaat oo nkerra, o nkishu kumok, amu eishoo apa Olaitoriani ninye imasaa kumok." 
2Chronicles32:30 Eikeno sii apa Hesekia iwuejitin oo nkariak e shumata oo nkariak e Gishon, neboinaa ninche aipirie enkalo o loontoluo le nkanasa e Daudi. Nebul Hesekia too siaaitin pooki." 
2Chronicles32:31 Ore tialo ilbalusini le Babilon o lkituaak le Babilon, apa ooirriwakaki ninye meikilikuanishore tenkaraki ilo monekie otaasaki te nkop, nepalaa Enkai ninye, pee etum atetema ninye neyiolou nena pooki naatii oltau lenye." 
2Chronicles32:32 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Hesekia, o nkiaasin enyena sidain, ng'ura eigeroki te nduaata e Isaya ole Amos, ilo oiboni le Nkai, te mbuku oo laiguanak le Yuda o Israel." 
2Chronicles32:32 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Hesekia, o nkiaasin enyena sidain, ng'ura eigeroki te nduaata e Isaya ole Amos, ilo oiboni le Nkai, te mbuku oo laiguanak le Yuda o Israel." 
2Chronicles32:33 Neirura Hesekia etua anaa apa loo menye, nenukari ninye te wueji neika oo nkuraren oo layiok le Daudi. Ore Yuda pooki o lelo oomanya Yerusalem neisho ninye enkanyit te keeya enye. Neitoreisho olayioni lenye Manase te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles33:1 Oloo larin tomon oare apa Manase pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin onom o imiet te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles33:2 Etaasa ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, te risioroto e nena baa olminong loo loreren apa ooiwuang'ie Enkai te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel." 
2Chronicles33:3 Amu enyaaka ninye ashet iwuejitin neeika apa neetigila papaai lenye Hesekia auroo. Neshetaki Baal ilperereni loo lasarri, neitobir Ashera, neserem olorora pooki le shumata, neisiaai ninche." 
2Chronicles33:4 Neshetu ilperereni loo lasarri tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, laa ninche apa etejo Olaitoriani “Atua Yerusalem etonie enkarna ai ntarasi.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Neshetu ninye ilperereni loo lasarri tenkaraki olorora le shumata too lgorieti pokira oare le nkaji o Laitoriani. 
2Chronicles33:6 Nepejoo ilayiok lenyena anaa olasar to erata loo layiok le Hinom. Neas ninye mbaa oo nkitumusumusot, neas ne naibon, o esakutore neton tenebo iloo ntaleng'o o lkuyantik. Etaasa ninye entorroni sapuk te dukuya Olaitoriani, neitagor ninye." 
2Chronicles33:7 Ore ina kitanyaanyukoto e nkai naitobira ninye nepik atua enkaji e Nkai, naa ninye apa etiaka Enkai Daudi o Solomon olayioni lenye, “Ore tiatua ena aji, o te Yerusalem, naa ninye ategelua too loshon pooki le Israel, kapik enkarna ai ntarasi." 
2Chronicles33:8 Nemaigil nanu aiwuang'ie enkeju e Israel teina kop apa nategelaka loo papaai linono teneing'or ninche aaibung nena pooki naitanapa ninche, o nkitanapat pooki, o nkikoot o nkiguanat apa naaishoruaki aaimunye Musa.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Eteleja Manase Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem, o metaasa ntorrok aaitulus te lelo oshon apa ooidaikie Olaitoriani te dukuya iltung'ana le Israel." 
2Chronicles33:10 Eirorie apa Olaitoriani aikok Manase o ltung'ana lenyena, kake eitu ninche ening." 
2Chronicles33:11 Ore enkaraki ina eyaka ninche Olaitoriani ilarikok le njore e Asiria, lelo ooibung'a Manase too lala oololo neen ninye too lpisia lo suyai, nenap ninche aaya Babilon." 
2Chronicles33:12 Ore etii ninye atua osina, neomonu omom to Laitoriani Enkai enye, neitobir kewan oleng, te dukuya Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles33:13 Neomon ninye, neng'amaa Enkai esayiata enye, o enkomono enye, neitoki Enkai arrinyoki ninye enkitoria enye tiatua Yerusalem. Neyiolou taa Manase ajo Olaitoriani ninye Enkai." 
2Chronicles33:14 Ore te siadi ina neshet esuntai e oriong e nkanasa e Daudi te nkalo oloo ntoluo le Gishon, to erata, tembata e wueji nejing'ieki enkishomi e dukuya, nelo aitamanaa te Ofel. Neilepie aitoodor oleng. Etipika sii ilarikok le njore nkanas pooki naasheta isunta e Yuda." 
2Chronicles33:15 Neiwuang'ie ninye nena aitin oo loreren, o nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin aitung'uaa enkaji o Laitoriani, o lelo pereren loo lasarri apa ootesheta to ldoinyio le nkaji o Laitoriani o te Yerusalem, nenang'aki ninche auluo enkanasa." 
2Chronicles33:16 Neshuku sii apa olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani, neitayu te nchumata enye ilasarri le seriani o lasarri le nashe. Neitanap ninye Yuda meisiaayia Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel." 
2Chronicles33:17 Ore ake eyia neton ake eitayu iltung'ana ilasarri too wuejitin o neeika, kake Olaitoriani Enkai enye ake eitaiki." 
2Chronicles33:18 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Manase, o enkomono enye e Nkai enye, o rorei le lelo aduaak apa oirorie ninye te nkarna o Laitoriani Enkai e Israel, etii atua ntepen oo laiguanak le Israel." 
2Chronicles33:19 Ore ina omono enye, oina natang'amayie Enkai esayiata enye, o ng'ok enyena pooki, o enkisiligata enye, o wuejitin apa neeteshetie ilperereni loo lasarri, o eneitasheyie Asherim, o nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin, enapa kata eitu eitobor kewan, ng'ura eigeroki too ntepen oo laduaak." 
2Chronicles33:20 Neaku eirure Manase etua anaa apa loo menye, nenukaa ninche ninye tiatua enkaji enye; neitoreisho Amon olayioni lenye te rishata enye." 
2Chronicles33:21 Oloo larin tikitam o are apa Amon pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin oare te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles33:22 Etaasa apa ninye ntorrok te dukuya Olaitoriani, anaa apa enataasa papaai lenye Manase. Etopolosaka apa Amon nkitanyaanyukot pooki oo nkaitin naaitobira papaai lenye Manase, neisiaai ninche." 
2Chronicles33:23 Neitu ninye eitobor kewan te dukuya Olaitoriani, anaa apa enaitoborro papaai lenye Manase kewan, kake etoponayie Amon aas entorroni oleng." 
2Chronicles33:24 Nerresh ilaisiaayiak lenyena ninye near metua tiatua aji. 
2Chronicles33:25 Kake etara iltung'ana leina kop metuata lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootarresho olaiguanani Amon; ore iltung'ana leina kop neitaa Yosia olayioni lenye olaiguanani te rishata enye. 
2Chronicles34:1 Oloo larin isiet apa Yosia pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomoni uni oobo te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:2 Etaasa ninye mbaa sidain too nkonyek o Laitoriani, neibung orrekie le Daudi papaai lenye, neitu eibelekenya alo enkalo e tatene anaa ene kedienye." 
2Chronicles34:3 Amu ore to lari le isiet le nkitoria enye, eton aa oti, neiteru aing'oru Enkai e Daudi papaai lenye; ore to lari le tomon oare neiteru aituku Yuda o Yerusalem, aiwuang'ie iwuejitin neeika, o Asherim, nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin naaguetuno o naatosholuaki." 
2Chronicles34:4 Negil ninche ilperereni loo lasarri le Baal eitasheiki ninye. Neuroo ilperereni loo lasarri le nkorropil apa ootii shumata ninche. Nebel asherim aitaa mbelibelat, o nena kitanyaanyukot naaguetuno o naasholuno. Neitaa empunyua neisuaaki nkuraren e lelo apa ooitayu ilasarri too nchumat enye." 
2Chronicles34:5 Etapejoyie sii apa iloik le lelo apolosak too nchumat e lelo pereren lenye, neituku Yuda o Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:6 Ore tiatua nkanas e Manase o Efraim, o Simion o metabaiki Naftali, te nkidaata enye too nkaloli pooki," 
2Chronicles34:7 eturoyie ninye ilperereni loo lasarri, neidong Asherim, o nkitanyaanyukot aitaa empunyua, nesulaki enkop ilperereni pooki le nkorropil te nkop e Israel pooki. Neitoki ninye arrinyo alo Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:8 Ore apa to lari le tomon o isiet le nkitoria enye, eidipa aipoo ina kop o enkaji e Nkai, neirriwaki Shafan olayioni le Asalia olkilikuai, o Mesai ilo balusui le nkanasa o Yoa olayioni le Yoahas, ilo aigeroni, pee etum aaitobira enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai enye." 
2Chronicles34:9 Nepuonu ninche enetii Hilkia olapolosani kitok, neisho nena pisai apa naayawuaki enkaji e Nkai, apa naatasotutuo Ilawi, ebaiki Manase o Efraim o metabaiki ilo pisiai pooki le Israel o Yuda pooki, o Benchamen, o lelo pooki oomanya Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:10 Neisho ninche lelo aisiaayiak apa ooitasheiki enkaji o Laitoriani. Ore lelo aisiaayiak apa oasisho tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani; neishooyo te nkaraki eramata o enkitobirata eina aji. 
2Chronicles34:11 Neisho ninche ilaguetak loo nkeek, o lashetak, pee einyiang'u isoito, o nkeek, o loom, tenkaraki ina shetare apa naishoo ilaiguanak le Yuda erruoyo." 
2Chronicles34:12 Neas iltung'ana esiaai aaitobiraki. Ore apa oloitasheiki ninche naa Yohat o Obadia loo Lawi, loo layiok le Merari naa Sakaria o Meshulam, too layiok le Kohat. Naa Ilawi pooki, naa arriyiak too nkinantani o sinkolio." 
2Chronicles34:13 Ninche apa ooitasheiki ilanapak loo lolan, neutaa pooki oas pooki pukunoto e nkisiaayiare. Ore ilkulikae Lawi naa ilasirak, o lkituaak, o larripok le kishomi." 
2Chronicles34:14 Ore eitayu ninche nena pisai apa naayawuaki atua enkaji o Laitoriani, netum Hilkia olapolosani embuku oo nkitanapat o Laitoriani apa naaishoruaki aaimunye Musa." 
2Chronicles34:15 Nejoki Hilkia Shafan olaigeroni, “Anoto nanu embuku oo nkitanapat tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani.” Neisho Hilkia ina buku Shafan." 
2Chronicles34:16 Neyaki Shafan ina buku olaiguanani, neitoki aliki olaiguanani ajoki, “Ore nena pooki naaitanapaki isinkan linono, easita ninche." 
2Chronicles34:17 Eishutua ninche nena pisai apa naanotoki te nkaji o Laitoriani, netipika ninche nkaik o laigerok o laitasheikinok.”" 
2Chronicles34:18 Neitoki Shafan olaigeroni ajoki olaiguanani “Aishoo nanu Hilkia olapolosani embuku.” Neisumaki Shafan olaiguanani. 
2Chronicles34:19 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani irorei loo nkitanapat nepolos nkilani enyena. 
2Chronicles34:20 Neitanap olaiguanani Hilkia o Ahikam olayioni le Shafan, o Abdon olayioni le Mika, o Shafan olaigeroni, o Asaia ilo aisiaayiani lo laiguanani nejoki," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Enchom enkilikuanishore Olaitoriani tenkaraki nanu, o tenkaraki lelo ootelekutua te Israel, o te Yuda, tialo kulo rorei lena buku nanotoki. Amu eikitok engoro napi o Laitoriani natubukokoki shumata iyiook, enkaraki apa neitu eibung loo papa irorei lo Laitoriani, neas te risioroto e kuna pooki naaigeroki tena buku.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Nelo Hilkia o lelo pooki ooirriwayie olaiguanani enetii enkoiboni naji Hilda. Naa enkitok apa e Shalum olayioni le Takat, olayioni le Hasra, ilo aing'urani lo sanduku. (Naa Yerusalem apa namanya ninye) neirorie ninche ninye aaikilikuanishore." 
2Chronicles34:23 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ‘Tiaaki ilo tung'ani likirriua enatii nanu," 
2Chronicles34:24 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ng'ura kayau nanu entorroni shumata ene wueji, o shumata lelo oomanya o lelo deketa pooki ooigero teina buku naisumakaki olaiguanani le Yuda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Ore enkaraki naatanyaita ninche nanu, netapejokitio enkorropil kulie aitin, pee aatum ninche aaitagoro nanu te siaai oo nkaik enye, kebukokini naa engoro ai napi shumata ene wueji nemeibooroyu ina goro ai." 
2Chronicles34:26 Kake ore tialo ilo aiguanani le Yuda oirriwua intae pee ipuonunu aaikilikuanishore Olaitoriani, nji enchom entiaaki ninye, Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo Siraeli: Ore tialo lelo rorei litoning'o," 
2Chronicles34:27 enkaraki nairridua oltau lino nintoborro kewan te dukuya Enkai, ina kata pee ining irorei lenyena ooipirta ene wueji o lelo oomanya, nintoborro iyie kewan tialo nanu, nitopolosa iyie nkilani inono ninchir te dukuya nanu, aatoning'o sii nanu iyie, Olaitoriani ojo." 
2Chronicles34:28 Ng'ura kaaiturrurroki nanu iyie loo papaai lino, nikipiki iyie engumoto te seriani, nemedol nkonyek inono ina torroni nayau nanu shumata ene wueji, o lelo oomanya.’ ” Neyaki ninche olaiguanani olkilikuai." 
2Chronicles34:29 Neitoki olaiguanani airriwaa ilkiliku neiturrur ilpayiani pooki le Yuda o le Yerusalem. 
2Chronicles34:30 Neilep olaiguanani alo enkaji o Laitoriani, tenebo iltung'ana pooki le Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem, o lapolosak o Lawi, o ltung'ana pooki kituaak o looti. Neisum ninye ening'ito pooki irorei pooki leina buku o sotua apa nanotoki tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles34:31 Neitashe olaiguanani te wueji enye neitobir olning'o, te dukuya Olaitoriani pee elo ninye asuj Olaitoriani o nkitanapat enyena o enchakenisho enye, o nkiguanat enyena, to ltau lenye pooki o te nkishui enye pooki. Pee eas lelo rorei lo lning'o ooigero teina buku." 
2Chronicles34:32 Neisho ninye lelo pooki apa ootii Yerusalem o Benchamen meitasho aaibung ina. Ore lelo oomanya Yerusalem neas te risioroto o sotua le Nkai ina Ai oo loo menye. 
2Chronicles34:33 Neiwuang'ie Yosia ilo minong pooki otii enkop oo Siraeli, neisho lelo pooki ootii atua Israel meisiaayia Olaitoriani Enkai enye. Ore too nkolong'i enyena pooki neitu ninche eibelekenya te sujata o Laitoriani Enkai oo loo menye." 
2Chronicles35:1 Eibung'a apa Yosia osirua lo Laitoriani le pasaka te Yerusalem. Neyieng ninche olkuoo le pasaka te nkolong e tomon oong'uan o lapa le dukuya. 
2Chronicles35:2 Etegelua apa ninye ilapolosak tenkaraki enkisiaayiare neitagol ninche te nkisiaayiare e nkaji o Laitoriani. 
2Chronicles35:3 Nejoki ninye Ilawi pooki laa ninche apa ooiteng'en iltung'ana loo Siraeli, naa sinyat ninche to Laitoriani, “Entipik ilo sanduku sinyati atua ina aji apa natesheta Solomon olayioni le Daudi, olaiguanani le Israel. Meeta tipat pee intokiki aanap too loilila linyi. Esiayia naa taata Olaitoriani Enkai inyi o ltung'ana lenyena le Israel." 
2Chronicles35:4 Entobira ate te risioroto oo lmareita linyi, o lgilat linyi, nisujaa orrekie le Daudi olaiguanani loo Siraeli o rrekie le Solomon olayioni lenye." 
2Chronicles35:5 Nintasheshe teine wueji sinyati te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo papaai linyi, o noo lalashera linyi. Naa nchoo ake metaa keeta pooki tung'ani erubata e nkaji e menye tiatua Ilawi." 
2Chronicles35:6 Niyieng'iyieng'e olkuoo le ker lo sirua le pasaka, nintisinyinyi ate. Nintobiriri ilalashera linyi pee easisho te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani oimunyeki Musa.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Neisho Yosia lelo apa tung'ana leme lapolosak, pooki ootii ine, ilkuoo le kerra o le kineji le luaata enye oobaya nkalifuni tomoni uni, o loing'ok nkalifuni uni. Ore kuna pooki naa imasaa o laiguanani eing'uaa." 
2Chronicles35:8 Ore ilkituaak lenyena neitayu nkishorot te nyorrata aaisho iltung'ana, o lapolosak, o Lawi. Ore Hilkia, o Sakaria o Yehiel lelo kituaak le nkaji e Nkai, neisho ilapolosak to sirua le pasaka anaa nkishorot oo lkuo le kerra, nkalifuni are o iip ile eshula o lkuoo le kineji. O loing'ok iip uni." 
2Chronicles35:9 Ore sii Konania, o Shemaia, o Natanel o lalashera lenyena, o Hashanbia o Yeiel o Yosabad, lelo kituaak loo Lawi, neisho nkishorot e pasaka ilkuoo le kerra o le kineji nkalifuni imiet o loing'ok iip imiet." 
2Chronicles35:10 Ore eidipaki aaitobira ilo sirua, neitashe ilapolosak te wueji enye, neitashe ilawi too ntukusi enye, te risioroto enkitanapata o laiguanani." 
2Chronicles35:11 Neyieng ninche olkuoo le pasaka neisuaaya ilapolosak ilo sarge otang'amutua too Lawi, ore Ilawi neibung ina nateyieng'aki aapolos." 
2Chronicles35:12 Neiteng'el ninche ilasarri oopejori pee etumi aatooriki iltung'ana terisioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye, pee eishori Olaitoriani, anaa enaigeroki te mbuku e Musa. Neiko ninche neijia lelo oing'ok." 
2Chronicles35:13 Nepej ninche nkiri eilo kuo le pasaka te nkima terisioroto oo nkoon. Neyier lelo asarri oosinya too motio o too ng'irran, o too saanini dapashi, nenap ninche nabo kata aayaki olorere." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ore tesiadi ina neitobiraki iltung'ana ate endaa, o lapolosak amu ore apa lelo apolosak ayiok le Aron netanyamala, eitayu ilasarri oopejori, o nkiri naapir, o metaa kewarie. Neaku eitobirakita ate Ilawi o lapolosak lelo ayiok le Aron endaa." 
2Chronicles35:15 Ore apa ilaranyak lelo ayiok, le Asaf netii ewueji enye, terisioroto enkitanapata e Daudi o Asaf, o Heman, o Yedutum ilo aduaani lo laiguanani. Ore ilarripok le kishomi netii kishomi. Meeta apa ninche tipat naing'uarie esiaai enye amu ore ilalashera lenye, loo lawi neitobirakita ninche endaa." 
2Chronicles35:16 Neaku eitobiraki apa esiaai pooki o Laitoriani ina olong, pee eibung'i pasaka neitayuni olasar opejori, tenchumata olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani, terisioroto enkitanapata o laiguanani Yosia." 
2Chronicles35:17 Ore apa iltung'ana le Israel ootii ine, neibung osirua le pasaka teina kata. Neibung osirua loo mukateni neitu eisuijieki nkolong'i naapishana." 
2Chronicles35:18 Eitu aekata etumi pasaka nanyaayukie ena te Israel ebaiki nkolong'i e Samuel oloiboni le Nkai. Meetae too laiguanak le Israel oloibung'a pasaka anaa enaibung'a Yosia, o ilapolosak o Lawi, o Yuda pooki o Siraeli ootii ine, o lelo oomanya Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles35:19 Ore to lari le isiet le nkitoria e Yosia neibung'aki ena pasaka. 
2Chronicles35:20 Ore etulusoitie kuna pooki eidipa Yosia aitobira enkaji e Nkai, nelo Neko olaiguanani le Misiri aarare Karkemish te Frati, nelo Yoash agilunore ninye." 
2Chronicles35:21 Kake eirriwaka ninye ilkiliku, ejoki, “Kainyoo iyiook kiporokino o iyie, olaiguanani le Yuda? Maatakinore nanu iyie ena olong, kake ina aji naatayie olarrabal ninye agilunore, naaitanapa nanu Enkai pee aisarrisar. Mintoki naa akeshare Enkai naa ninye natii tenebo nanu pee mikindaikie ake.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Kake ore ake eyia eitu eibelekenya Yosia alo aing'uaa, kake etonyuaa ajo aarare. Eitu ninye ening irorei le Neko, ooing'uaa enkutuk Enkai, kake etijing'a ninye olarrabal tiong'ata e Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Neng'or ilang'orok loo mbaa olaiguanani Yosia, nejoki olaiguanani isinkan lenyena, “Ewuang'ieki nanu tene, amu aatipikaki olbae torrono.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Neaku eitayutuo isinkan lenyena ninye te ngarri oo mbartan nenap ninche tenkae garri oo mbartan, neyau ninye Yerusalem. Neye ninye, nenukari ninye too nkuraren oo loo menye. Ore Yuda pooki o Yerusalem neishiraki Yosia." 
2Chronicles35:25 Eishiraka sii apa Yeremia Yosia, ore ilewa pooki o nkituaak pooki aranyak neranyu aalimu Yosia o metabaiki ena olong. Neitobir ninche enkitanapata te Israel, ng'ura eigero te mbuku oo nkishirat." 
2Chronicles35:26 Ore nkulie kiaasin e Yosia, o nkiaasin enyena sidain te risioroto e nena naaigeroki too nkitanapat o Laitoriani," 
2Chronicles35:27 o nkiaasin enyena e dukuya o kulie e siadi, ng'ura eigeroki ninche te mbuku oo laiguanak le Israel o le Yuda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Ewaita iltung'ana leina kop Yoahas olayioni le Yosia neitaa ninye olaiguanani terishata e papaai lenye te Yerusalem. 
2Chronicles36:2 Oloo larin tikitam ookuni apa Yoahas pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilapaitin okuni te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:3 Neitoki olaiguanani le Misiri aaraa ninye te Yerusalem, nepikaki iltung'ana leina kop kodi e talanta iip nabo e nkosholai o talanta e sahabu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Neitaa olaiguanani le Misiri Eliakim olalashe lenye olaiguanani te Yuda o te Yerusalem, neibelekeny enkarna enye ajo Yehoiakim. Kake eewa Neko olalashe lenye Yoahas Misiri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Oloo larin tikitam o imiet apa Yehoiakim pee eiteru aitoreisho neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon oobo te Yerusalem. Neas ninye ntorrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani Enkai enye. 
2Chronicles36:6 Nelotu Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon agilunore ninye, neen ninye too lpisia neya ninye Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:7 Etanapa sii apa Nebukadnesa aya kulie tokitin e nkaji o Laitoriani Babilon, nepik ninche atua enkaji e nkitoo o laiguanani te Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:8 Ore apa nkulie kiaasin e Yehoiakim o nena tokitin o ilo minong otaasa ninye, o mbaa torrok naaipirta ninye, ng'ura eigeroki tiatua embuku oo laiguanak le Israel o le Yuda. Neitoreisho Yehoiakin olayioni lenye terishata enye." 
2Chronicles36:9 Oloo larin isiet apa Yehoiakin pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ilapaitin okuni o nkolong'i tomon te Yerusalem. Neas ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles36:10 Ore to lapa lo loirujuruj leilo ari, neirriu olaiguanani Nebukadnesa olkilikuai meyauni ninye Babilon, tenebo nena tokitin e tipat apa naati atua enkaji o Laitoriani neitaa olalashe lenye Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda o Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:11 Oloo larin tikitam oobo apa Sedekia pee eiteru aitoreisho, neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon oobo te Yerusalem."
