2Chronicles36:12 Etaasa ninye mbaa torrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani Enkai enye. Eitu ninye eitobor kewan te dukuya Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai, oiroro apa alimu ilomon lo Laitoriani." 
2Chronicles36:13 Eisero apa Sedekia apaashare olaiguanani Nebukadnesa, laa ninye apa oishoo ninye meinosa olmumai tialo Enkai; negolong'u ninye neitagol oltau lenye, neany eibelekenyakino Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel." 
2Chronicles36:14 Ore ilapolosak pooki kituaak, oltung'ana sii neponari aaku ilemeisiligayu, nesuj olminong le lelo oshon; neisarkionie enkaji o Laitoriani, apa naitisinya ninye te Yerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:15 Ore Olaitoriani Enkai oo loo menye, neirriwaki ninche ilkiliku aimunye isinkan lenyena, enkaraki naing'urrie ninye iltung'ana lenyena, o tenkaraki emanyisho enye." 
2Chronicles36:16 Kake etigirate ninche aamor lelo sinkan le Nkai, nemenaa irorei lenyena, nesurdaay iloibonok le Nkai, o metaba anaa nedumunye engoro o Laitoriani too iltung'ana lenyena, ometaba anaa neaku meetae olmairo." 
2Chronicles36:17 Ore enkaraki ina neyau aitaar ninche olaiguanani loo Lkaldayo ilo apa otasesekuana ilbarnot lenye metuata tiatua enkaji e Nkai, nemeetayie olng'ur olbarnoti anaa esila, anaa oltung'ani kitok aashu oltung'ani moruo. Neishooyo ninche apik atua enkaina enye." 
2Chronicles36:18 Ore nena masaa pooki e nkaji e Nkai nkutiti o sapuki, o lchumat pooki le nkaji o Laitoriani o lchumat lo laiguanani o lkituaak lenyena, neyai nena pooki Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:19 Nepejoo ninche enkaji e Nkai neuroo esuntai e Yerusalem, nepejoo nkajijik enyena pooki e nkitoo te nkima. Neinyal nena tokitin pooki e tipat." 
2Chronicles36:20 Eewa ninye eyararoto meshomo Babilon lelo apa ooilanya olalem, neaku isinkan lenyena, o metaba anaa neitasheyieki enkitoria e Parsia." 
2Chronicles36:21 Pee eitabari ororei lo Laitoriani oimua enkutuk e Yeremia, o metaba anaa neshipakino enkop sabato. Ore te nena olong'i pooki naitomijoonoki, neibung sabato neitabaya ilarin ntomoni naapishana." 
2Chronicles36:22 Ore apa to lari le dukuya le nkitoria olaiguanani Sairos le Parsia, pee etumi aaitabai ororei lo Laitoriani oimunyeki enkutuk e Yeremia, neputu Olaitoriani oltau le Sairos olaiguanani le Parsia, neaku etolimuo aibalunye te nkitoria enye pooki, neiger sii ajo," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Nji ejo Sairos olaiguanani le Parsia, ‘Ore Olaitoriani Enkai e keper, naaisho nanu nkitoriat pooki enkop, naaitanap ninye nanu pee ashetaki ninye enkaji te Yerusalem. Aa taa te Yuda. Ore pooki ng'ae tiatua intae, te kulo tung'ana pooki nchoo eaku Olaitoriani Enkai enye tenebo ninye, nchoo ninye eilep alo.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 Ore to lari le dukuya le nkitoria e Sairos olaiguanani le Parsia, pee etumi aaitabai ororei lo Laitoriani te nkutuk e Yeremia, neputu Olaitoriani oltau le Sairos olaiguanani le Parsia, pee eibalunye enkitanapata te nkitoria enye pooki, neiger sii aajo," 
Ezra1:2 “Nji ejo Sairos olaiguanani le Parsia; Aaishoo nanu Olaitoriani, Enkai e keper, nkitoriat pooki enkop, naaitanapa ninye nanu pee ashetaki ninye enkaji te Yerusalem, te nkop e Yuda." 
Ezra1:3 Ore pooki ng'ae tiatua intae iltung'ana lenyena pooki, metaa Enkai enye tenebo ninye, naa nchoo ninye eilep alo Yerusalem, te nkop e Yuda, nelo ashet enkaji o Laitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli ninye ilo otii Yerusalem;" 
Ezra1:4 naa nchoo pooki tung'ani otelekua, te pooki wueji nemanya ninye, eretu ninye iltung'ana le manyisho enye te nkosholai o te sahabu, o too masaa o too ng'uesi, tenebo nena kishorot o lpela tenkaraki ina aji e Nkai natii Yerusalem.”" 
Ezra1:5 Nedumunye ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye te Yuda o te Benchamen, o lapolosak o Lawi, o pooki ng'ae otuputuo Olaitoriani oltau lenye pee eilep alo ashet ina aji o Laitoriani natii Yerusalem." 
Ezra1:6 Ore lelo pooki oomanita ninche neretu ninche too masaa e nkosholai, o te sahabu, o too masaa, o too ng'uesi, o too ntokitin naagol enkinyiang'a tenebo nena pooki naaishoruaki to lpela." 
Ezra1:7 Neyau sii Sairos ilo aiguanani nena masaa enkaji o Laitoriani apa naawa Nebukadnesa te Yerusalem nelo apik atua enkaji oo nkaitin enyena. 
Ezra1:8 Neyau Sairos olaiguanani le Parsia nena pooki eitasheiki Mitrehat ilo ashumani, laa ninye oikenaka ninye pooki Sheshbasa ilo kitok le Yuda." 
Ezra1:9 Naa ena apa esiana enye: ngirran enkalifu nabo e sahabu, o ngirran enkalifu nabo e nkosholai, nkalema tikitam ooudo," 
Ezra1:10 ilbakulini tomoni uni le sahabu, o lbakulini nkalifuni are o iip ong'uan le nkosholai, o kulie masaa enkalifu nabo;" 
Ezra1:11 ore imasaa pooki e sahabu o nenkosholai naa nkalifuni imiet o iip ong'uan o ntomoni ile o naaudo. Kuna pooki eyaua Sheshbasa ina kata pee eyauni ilootaarayioki metushukunye aaing'uaa Babilon nepuonu Yerusalem. 
Ezra2:1 Kulo apa lelo tung'ana leilo kerenket ooetuo te yararoto eing'uaa lelo apa ootarayie Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon arik eenata te Babilon. Etorrinyunye ninche aapuonu Yerusalem o Yuda nelo ake pooki tung'ani enkang enye makewan. 
Ezra2:2 Eetuo apa ninche tenebo Serubabel, o Yeshua, o Nehemia, o Seraia, o Reelaia, o Mordekai, o Balshan, o Mispar, o Bigfai, o Rehum, o Baana. Ena esiana oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli;" 
Ezra2:3 ore ilayiok le Parosh era esiana enye nkalifuni are o iip nabo o ntomoni naapishana oare. 
Ezra2:4 Ore ilayiok le Shefatia, nera esiana enye, iip uni o ntomoni naapishana oare." 
Ezra2:5 Ore ilayiok le Ara, nera esiana enye iip naapishana o ntomoni naapishana o imiet." 
Ezra2:6 Ore ilayiok le Pahatmoab, aa taa ilayiok le Yeshua o Yoab, naa nkalifuni are o iip isiet o tomon oare." 
Ezra2:7 Ore ilayiok le Elam naa enkalifu nabo o iip are o onom o ong'uan. 
Ezra2:8 Ore ilayiok le Satu naa iip naaudo o artam o imiet. 
Ezra2:9 Ore ilayiok le Sakai, naa iip naapishana o ntomoni ile." 
Ezra2:10 Ore ilayiok le Bani naa iip ile o artam o are. 
Ezra2:11 Ore ilayiok le Bebai, naa iip ile o tikitam o okuni." 
Ezra2:12 Ore ilayiok le Asgad naa enkalifu nabo o iip are o tikitam oare. 
Ezra2:13 Ore ilayiok le Adonikam naa iip ile o ntomoni ile o ile. 
Ezra2:14 Ore ilayiok le Bigfai naa nkalifuni are o onom o ile. 
Ezra2:15 Ore ilayiok le Adin, naa iip ong'uan o onom o ong'uan." 
Ezra2:16 Ore ilayiok le Ater, aa taa ile Hesekia, naa ntomoni naaudo o isiet." 
Ezra2:17 Ore ilayiok le Besai naa iip uni o tikitam o okuni. 
Ezra2:18 Ore ilayiok le Yora naa, iip nabo o tomon oare." 
Ezra2:19 Ore ilayiok le Hashum naa, iip are o tikitam o okuni." 
Ezra2:20 Ore ilayiok le Gibar, naa ntomoni naaudo o imiet." 
Ezra2:21 Ore ilayiok le Betlehem naa iip nabo o tikitam o okuni. 
Ezra2:22 Ore iltung'ana le Netofia naa onom o ile. 
Ezra2:23 Ore iltung'ana le Anatot naa iip nabo o tikitam o isiet. 
Ezra2:24 Ore ilayiok le Asmafet naa artam oare. 
Ezra2:25 Ore ilayiok le Kiriataim, Kefira o Beerot naa iip naapishana o artam o okuni." 
Ezra2:26 Ore ilayiok le Rama o Geba, naa iip ile o tikitam o obo." 
Ezra2:27 Ore iltung'ana le Mikmas, naa iip nabo o tikitam oare." 
Ezra2:28 Ore iltung'ana le Betel o Ai naa iip are o tikitam o okuni. 
Ezra2:29 Ore ilayiok le Nebo, naa onom o are." 
Ezra2:30 Ore ilayiok le Makbish naa iip nabo o onom o ile. 
Ezra2:31 Ore ilayiok le likae le Elam naa enkalifu nabo o iip are o onom o ong'uan. 
Ezra2:32 Ore ilayiok le Harim, naa iip uni o tikitam." 
Ezra2:33 Ore ilayiok le Lod, o Hadid, o Ono, naa iip naapishana o tikitam o imiet." 
Ezra2:34 Ore ilayiok le Yeriko, naa iip uni o artam o imiet." 
Ezra2:35 Ore ilayiok le Seena naa nkalifuni uni o iip ile o tomoni uni. 
Ezra2:36 Ore ilapolosak lelo ayiok le Yedaia, le nkaji e Yeshua naa iip naaudo o ntomoni naapishana o okuni." 
Ezra2:37 Ore ilayiok le Imer naa, enkalifu nabo o onom oare." 
Ezra2:38 Ore ilayiok le Pashur, naa enkalifu nabo o iip are o artam oopishana." 
Ezra2:39 Ore ilayiok le Harim, naa enkalifu nabo o tomon oopishana." 
Ezra2:40 Ore Ilawi, lelo ayiok le Yeshua o Kadmiel, loo layiok le Hadafia, naa ntomoni naapishana o ong'uan." 
Ezra2:41 Ore ilaranyak: lelo ayiok le Asaf, naa iip nabo o tikitam o isiet." 
Ezra2:42 Ore lelo ayiok loo larripok loo nchomito; ilayiok le Shalum, o layiok le Ater, o layiok le Talmon o layiok le Akub, o layiok le Hatita, o layiok le Shobai, ore pooki tenebo, naa iip nabo o tomoni uni o oudo." 
Ezra2:43 Ore ilaisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai, naa lelo aisiaayiak, o layiok le Siha, o layiok le Hafusa, o layiok le Taabaot," 
Ezra2:44 o layiok le Keros, o layiok le Siaha, o layiok le Padon," 
Ezra2:45 o layiok le Lebana, o layiok le Habaga, o layiok le Akub," 
Ezra2:46 o layiok le Hagab, o layiok le Shamlai, o layiok le Hanan," 
Ezra2:47 o layiok le Gidel, o layiok le Gahar, o layiok le Reaia," 
Ezra2:48 o layiok le Resin, o layiok le Nekoda, o layiok le Gasam," 
Ezra2:49 o layiok le Usa, o layiok le Pasea, o layiok le Besai," 
Ezra2:50 o layiok le Asna, o layiok le Meumin, o layiok le Nefisim," 
Ezra2:51 o layiok le Bakuk, o layiok le Hakufa, o layiok le Hahur," 
Ezra2:52 o layiok le Baslut, o layiok le Mehida, o layiok le Harsha," 
Ezra2:53 o layiok le Barkos, o layiok le Sisera, o layiok le Tema," 
Ezra2:54 o layiok le Nesia, o layiok le Hatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Ore too layiok loo sinkan le Solomon; naa ilayiok le Sotai, o layiok le Hosoferet, o layiok le Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 o layiok le Yaala, o layiok le Darkon, o layiok le Gidel," 
Ezra2:57 o layiok le Shefatia, o layiok le Hatil, o layiok le Pokeret-hasebaim, tenebo ilayiok le Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Ore ilaisiaayiak pooki le nkaji e Nkai o layiok loo sinkan le Solomon naa iip uni o ntomoni naaudo oare. 
Ezra2:59 Kulo apa lelo ooetuo eing'uaa Telmela, o Telhasha, o Kerub, o Adan, o Imer, hoo neitu apa ninche eidim aaibalie nkajijik oo loo menye anaa enetii ntipati enye, tenaa keitipat ninche Isirael:" 
Ezra2:60 lelo ayiok le Delaia, o layiok le Tobia, o layiok le Nekoda, nera pooki iip ile o onom oare." 
Ezra2:61 Ore sii too layiok loo lapolosak, lelo ayiok le Barsilai, laa ninye apa oyama nabo oo ntoyie e Barsilai le Gilead, laa ninye apa eipotieki enkarna enye." 
Ezra2:62 Eing'orutua kulo enkigeroto enye tiatua lelo ooigeroki too iishoritin, kake eitu etumi ninche teine, neaku eiwuang'ieki ninche te mpolosare aajo mesinya;" 
Ezra2:63 etiaaka ninche olbalusui nchere pee meinos ina daa sinyati oleng, meteleku ake tenaa ketii olapolosani oikilikuanishore Urim o Tumim." 
Ezra2:64 Ore apa ina umata pooki tenebo naa nkalifuni artam o are o iip uni o ntomoni ile," 
Ezra2:65 metii isinkan lenye o nkaisiaayiak enye, laa ore tenebo ninche naa, nkalifuni naapishana o iip uni o tomoni uni oopishana, neeta apa ninche ilaranyak loo lewa o ngoruo iip are." 
Ezra2:66 Ore mbartan enye naa iip naapishana o tomoni uni o ile, ore inyumpui enye naa iip are o artam o imiet," 
Ezra2:67 ore ntamesin enye naa iip ong'uan o tomoni uni o imiet, ore isirkon lenye naa nkalifuni ile o iip naapishana o tikitam." 
Ezra2:68 Ore erubata oo lukuny oo lmareita, ina kata pee epuonu enkaji o Laitoriani te Yerusalem, neishoru nkishorot olpela te nkaraki enkaji e Nkai, pee esheti ninye te wueji enye;" 
Ezra2:69 te risioroto e nkidimata enye eishorutua ninche aapik olchumati le siaai nkiloi iip imiet e sahabu, o nkiloi nkalifuni are o ntomoni isiet e nkosholai, o lkilani iip nabo loo lapolosak." 
Ezra2:70 Ore ilapolosak o Lawi o embata oo ltung'ana nemany Yerusalem, o neemanita ninye, ore ilaranyak, o larripok loo nchomito, o laisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai nebik too nkang'itie enye, ore Isiraeli pooki nebik too nkang'itie enye." 
Ezra3:1 Ore ake pee ebau olapa liopishana, netii iltung'ana loo Siraeli nkang'itie, neiturrurro iltung'ana aaku tenebo te Yerusalem." 
Ezra3:2 Neitoki adumunye Yeshua olayioni le Yohasadak, tenebo ilapolosak le ncholuek enye, o Serubabel olayioni le Shealtiel tenebo iltung'ana lenye le sotua, neshetu ninche olperere lo lasar le Nkai e Israel, pee etum aaitayu olasar opejori te nchumata enye, anaa enaigeroki too nkitanapat e Musa ilo tung'ani le Nkai." 
Ezra3:3 Eitasheyie apa ninche ilo perere lo lasar te ewueji enye, amu keureisho apa ninche, te nkaraki lelo tung'ana leina kop. Neitayu ninche ilasarri oopejori te nchumata enye aaitaiki Olaitoriani tadekenya o teipa." 
Ezra3:4 Neibung ninche osirua loo lng'oborri, anaa enaigeroki, neiken te risioroto oo nkitanapat, anaa ake anaishiaakino te nkolong." 
Ezra3:5 Ore te siadi ina neitayuni ilasarri oopejori lianaake, ilasarri lo lapa ng'ejuk too siruai pooki gelunot to Laitoriani, o lasarri le pooki ng'ae oitayu nkishorot o lpela aisho Olaitoriani." 
Ezra3:6 Ore ebaiki enkolong e dukuya o lapa liopishana neiteru ninche aaitayu olasar opejori aaisho Olaitoriani. Kake eton eitu eshetuni olkitamanyunoto le nkaji e Nkai. 
Ezra3:7 Metaa eishoo apa ninche mpisai ilaguetak loo soito, o laguetak loo mbaoi, o endaa, o enaoki o eilata aaisho ile Sidon o le Turo, pee eyau iltarakua te Lebanon, aaya enaiposha, neya Yopa, te risioroto e nkishoroto nanoto apa ninche te Sairos olaiguananile Parsia." 
Ezra3:8 Ore apa to lari liare oetunye ninche enkaji e Nkai te Yerusalem, to lapa liare, neitobir Serubabel olayioni le Shealtiel o Yeshua olayioni le Yosadak enkiterunoto, tenebo ilkulikae alashera lenye, lelo apolosak o Lawi o pooki ooetuo Yerusalem eing'ua eyararoto. Negelu ninche Ilawi ooitabaitie ilarin tikitam neilep, pee eitasheiki esiaai enkaji o Laitoriani." 
Ezra3:9 Ore Yeshua o layiok lenyena o ltung'ana lenye le sotua oonyikare o Kadmiel, o layiok lenyena, lelo ayiok le Yuda, neitasheiki pooki ilaisiaayiak tiatua enkaji e Nkai, tenebo ilayiok le Hanadad o Lawi, o layiok lenye, o ltung'ana lenye le sotua oonyikare." 
Ezra3:10 Ore ake pee eiteru ilashetak olkitamanyunoto le nkaji o Laitoriani, ore ilapolosak eishopo nkilani enye e siaai nepuonu dukuya eeta ntarumpetani, ore Ilawi lelo ayiok le Asaf neyau isaanini dapashi enye, pee eisis Olaitoriani, te risioroto eutaroto e Daudi; olaiguanani loo Siraeli;" 
Ezra3:11 nerany ninche eirukokino, eisis neisho enashe Olaitoriani, ejo, “Amu aisupat ninye amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi tialo Isiraeli.” Nebuaku iltung'ana pooki te mbuakunoto sapuk, ina kata eisis Olaitoriani enkaraki naiteruaki olkitamanyunoto le nkaji o Laitoriani." 
Ezra3:12 Kake ilapolosak kumok o Lawi o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, ilpayiani kituaak apa ootoduaa enkaji e dukuya neyietu aaishir ina kata pee edol olkitamanyunoto lena aji eshetuni, hoo netabuakutua ilkumok te nchipai;" 
Ezra3:13 neaku meidim iltung'ana aaitirisha oltoilo le mbuakunoto e nchipai o ltoilo lo lkiyio loo ltung'ana; amu etabuakutua apa lelo tung'ana te mbuakunoto sapuk oleng, nening'ori ina buakunoto te nelakua." 
Ezra4:1 Ore apa pee ening ilmang'ati le Yuda o Benchamen nchere ore ilapa yararot oo torrinyunye neshetita enkaji o Laitoriani, Enkai oo Siraeli," 
Ezra4:2 nepuo ninche enetii Serubabel, o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye nejoki ninche, “Nchoo iyiook mateshet tenebo ntae; amu kiserem sii iyiook Enkai inyi anaa eninkoko intae, naa aikipolosaki apa iyiook ninye ebaiki nkolong'i e Esarhadon olaiguanani le Asiria, laa ninye apa oyaua iyiook ene.”" 
Ezra4:3 Kake etiaakita ninche Serubabel, o Yeshua o kulie lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye te Israel, “Miatata eniporokiki iyiook te nchetata e nkaji e Nkai ang; kake iyiook ake oopeny ooshetaki Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, anaa enaitanapa iyiook Olaiguanani Sairos, ilo aiguanani le Parsia.”" 
Ezra4:4 Ore lelo tung'ana leina kop neitashal iltung'ana le Yuda, neitukuret ninche te nchetata," 
Ezra4:5 neiger ninche ilautarok oogilunore ninche pee eitashal ninche teina kiaas enye, too nkolong'i pooki e nkitoria e Sairos olaiguanani le Parsia, ometabaiki enkitoria e Darias olaiguanani le Parsia." 
Ezra4:6 Ore te nkitoria e Ahasero te nkiterunoto e nkitoria enye, neiger ninche enkitang'oroto te nkaraki lelo oo manya Yuda o Yerusalem." 
Ezra4:7 Ore apa too nkolong'i e Artaserses, o Bishlam o Mitredat, o Tabeel o lkulikae le ncholuek enye, neigeroki empalai Artaserser olaiguanani le Parsia. Eigeroki apa ina palai te nkutuk e Aramea neibelekenyi." 
Ezra4:8 Ore apa Rehum olkitok le njore o Shimshai ilo aigeroni neiger empalai te nkaraki Yerusalem aigeroki Artaserses ilo aiguanani nejo nji 
Ezra4:9 neitoki Rehum ilo kitok le njore aiger, o Shimshai ilo aigeroni, o lelo kulikae le ncholuek enye, o larishak, o lbalusuni, o lkituaak, o le Parsia, o ltung'ana le Erek, o le Babilon, o ltung'ana le Susa, aa taa ile Elam," 
Ezra4:10 tenebo ilkulikae oreren laa ninche etimirayie olkitok oji Osnapar nepuo aamany nkanas e Samaria, o kulie lo lkerenket otii idia alo olkeju, naa ore taata," 
Ezra4:11 ena entashati eina palai apa nairriwaitie ninche - “Enetii Artaserses olaiguanani: Ore isinkan linono, lelo tung'ana lo lkerenket otii teidia alo olkeju, kirriu enkirorokino. Ore taata," 
Ezra4:12 nchoo eyiolou olaiguanani nchere, ore ilapa Yahudi ooetuo eing'ua enitii, nepuonu enikitii neshomo Yerusalem. Enyaakita aashet enapa anasa kiserut e ntorroni; eidipa ninche isunta neramita ilkitamanyunot." 
Ezra4:13 Nchoo naa taata eyiolou olaiguanani nchere, teneigili aashet ena anasa neidipayu isunta, meitoki ninche aalak kodi; anaa mpisai olpolosie anaa ine nkoitoi, ore mpisai enkitoria nengoroo." 
Ezra4:14 Ore naa enkaraki naa iyie kingarakino, nemeishiaakino iyiook nikiduaaki olaiguanani esulare, enkaraki ena pee kirriwakita olaiguanani olkilikuai aaitayiolo," 
Ezra4:15 pee itum aing'oru enjurrunoto tiatua embuku oo mbaa oo loo papaai lino. Itum iyie tiatua embuku oo mbaa, niyiolou nchere ore ena anasa naa aikiserut, naa enkaitooshoni too laiguanak, o too lkerenketi, netipikaki apa ninye enking'oling'ol ebaiki moitie, enkaraki ena apa pee eitaaki ena anasa olmuaate." 
Ezra4:16 Kintayiolo iyiook olaiguanani nchere, teneigili aashet ena anasa neidipayu isunta enyena, nimintoki aata enipor ilo kerenket otii lido kekun olkeju.”" 
Ezra4:17 Neirriwaa olaiguanani ewalata ejo: “Enetii Rehum ilo kitok le njore o Shimshai olaigeroni o lkulikae pooki le ncholuek enye ootii Samaria otii olkerenket teidia alo olkeju, airriu enkirorokino. Naa ore taata," 
Ezra4:18 enapa palai nirriwakita iyiook neisumaki aaibalie te dukuya nanu. 
Ezra4:19 Aitayio nanu enkitanapata neitobiraki enjurrunoto, nenotoki nchere ore ena anasa ebaiki apa moitie netudumakine ilaiguanak agilunore, netii enkiser o enkarruoisho atua ninye." 
Ezra4:20 Netii apa ilaiguanak magil Yerusalem, ooitoreishote to lkerenket pooki le lido kekun olkeju, laa ninche apa elaakini kodi o mpisai o lpolosie, o mpisai oo nkoitoi." 
Ezra4:21 Ore enkaraki ina entobira pee elikini kulo tung'ana metapala esiaai, nemeitoki aashet ena anasa, ometaba anaa naitobir enkitanapata." 
Ezra4:22 Naa entodol pee mintololong'ong'o ena bae; kainyoo pee eibulaa enkinyalata pee einyal ilaiguanak?” 
Ezra4:23 Ore ake pee eisumi entashati e mpalai o laiguanani Artaserser te dukuya Rehum o Shimshai olaigeroni o lelo le ncholuek enye, neisarrisar aapuo enetii Ilyahudi te Yerusalem ore te nkisikong'ata o te ngolon neitapal ninche esiaai." 
Ezra4:24 Ore ina siaai e nkaji e Nkai natii Yerusalem neitasheyieki; neitashe ometabau olapa liare le nkitoria e Darias olaiguanani le Parsia. 
Ezra5:1 Ore apa iloibonok le Nkai, Hagai o Sakaria olayioni le Ido, neibonoki Ilyahudi ootii Yuda o Yerusalem, te nkarna e Nkai e Israel natii shumata ninche." 
Ezra5:2 Neitoki Serubabel olayioni le Shealtiel o Yeshua olayioni le Yehosadak aadumunye neiteru aashet enkaji e Nkai natii Yerusalem; ore tenebo ninche netii iloibonok le Nkai, eretito ninche." 
Ezra5:3 Ore teina kata ake nelotu Tartenai, ilo balusui lo lkerenket otii teidia alo olkeju o Shetar-bosenai tenebo lelo le ncholuek enye neirorie aajoki nji, “Kaing'ae oishoo ntae enkitanapata nishetietie ena aji nindipidipi olchetei lenye?”" 
Ezra5:4 Enyaakita sii aaikilikuan ninche ena, “Kakua nkarn e kulo tung'ana ooshetita ena aji?”" 
Ezra5:5 Kake etii apa enkong'u e Nkai enye shumata lelo payiani loo Lyahudi, neitu ninche eibooyo ninche ometabaiki ilo omoni Darias nerrinyuni ewalata naipirta ina te palai." 
Ezra5:6 Ore entashati eina palai nairriwakita Tartanai, ilo balusui lo lpolosie otii teidia alo olkeju o Shotar-bosnai o lelo le ncholuek enye, lelo balusuni apa ootii olkerenket otii lido kekun olkeju, o Darias olaiguanani;" 
Ezra5:7 neirriwaki ninche ninye olomoni, oigerore kuna baa: “Enetii Darias olaiguanani, eseriani te pooki." 
Ezra5:8 Nchoo metayiolouni to laiguanani nchere kishomo iyiook olkerenket le Yuda, enkaji e Nkai kitok. Eshetitae ninye too soito sapuki, netipikaki isunta enyena mbaoi, eloito ena siaai dukuya aponari easita nkaik enye." 
Ezra5:9 Nikintoki iyiook aaikilikuan lelo payiani nikirorie iyiook ninche aajoki nji, ‘Kaing'ae oishoo intae enkitanapata pee ishetishete ena aji, nindipidipi olchetei lenye?’" 
Ezra5:10 Kinyaakita sii aaikilikuan ninche nkarn enye, pee itum atayiolo, nikitum aaigero nkarn e lelo tung'ana too lukuny enye." 
Ezra5:11 Naa ena apa ninche etawalikitia iyiook, ‘Kira iyiook isinkan le Nkai e keper o enkop, naa eikingil iyiook aashet ena aji apa nateshetaki too larin kumok ootulusoitie, apa natesheta olaiguanani le Israel kitok neidip." 
Ezra5:12 Kake ore enkaraki apa naitagoro loo papa Enkai e keper, neishooyo ninye ninche apik enkaina e Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon, o Lkaldayo, laa ninche apa ooidaikie ena aji neya iltung'ana Babilon." 
Ezra5:13 Ore ake eyia neijia, to lari le dukuya le nkitoria e Sairos olaiguanani le Babilon, neitayu Sairos ilo aiguanani enkitanapata, nchere pee eitokini aashet ena aji e Nkai." 
Ezra5:14 Ore nena masaa e sahabu o ne nkosholai e nkaji e Nkai, apa naaitayio Nebukadnesa teina aji e Nkai natii Yerusalem, neyau ina aji e nkai e Babilon, eyaua Sairos olaiguanani kuna aitupuku te nkaji e nkai e Babilon nepiki enkaina e obo oji enkarna Sheshbasa, laa ninye apa eitaa olbalusui;" 
Ezra5:15 nejoki olaiguanani ninye, Iwa kuna masaa, shomo tipika ninche atua enkaji e Nkai natii Yerusalem, naa nchoo enkaji e Nkai eitokini aashet te wueji enye." 
Ezra5:16 Neitoki alotu ilo oji Sheshbasa neshet olkitamanyunoto le nkaji e Nkai natii Yerusalem; ore ebaiki ina kata o taata etaa ina aji enateshete, neitu eidipayu.’”" 
Ezra5:17 “Ore enkaraki ina te nelioo aa sidai to laiguanani, nchoo ejurruni to lchumati loo mbaa musan o laiguanani teidie te Babilon, pee edoli tenaa keitayio apa Sairos olaiguanani enkitanapata nashetieki ina aji e Nkai natii Yerusalem. Naa nchoo olaiguanani eirriwaki iyiook enaitiship ninye tialo ena bae.”" 
Ezra6:1 Neitoki Darias olaiguanani aitayu enkitanapata, nejurruni te Babilon, te nkaji nashumieki mbaa musan, teine apa neshumieki mbaa naaigeroki." 
Ezra6:2 Ore te Ebatana, teina anasa kitok natii olkerenket le Media, netumi teine olpiyayati oigerore ena: “Embae nadamuni." 
Ezra6:3 Ore to lari le dukuya le nkitoria e Sairos olaiguanani, naitayu Sairos olaiguanani enkitanapata: Naipirta enkaji e Nkai te Yerusalem, ejo, nchoo metesheti ina aji, ine wueji apa neishoorieki ilasarri, neyauni ilasarri oopejori; ore enkadoro enye naa keaku ntemat e nkaina ntomoni ile ore endapasho naa ntemat e nkaina ntomoni ile," 
Ezra6:4 neeta nkererin uni oo soito sapuki, o enkereri nabo oo mbaoi; nchoo elaata e nchetata enye meitayuni to lchumati lo laiguanani." 
Ezra6:5 Ore sii nchoo inapa masaa e sahabu o ne nkosholai e nkaji e Nkai naawa Nebukadnesa te nkaji e Nkai natii Yerusalem, neya Babilon, errinyuni aayau atua ina aji e Nkai natii Yerusalem, neyauni ake pooki nabo ewueji enye, nipik ninche atua enkaji e Nkai.”" 
Ezra6:6 “Neirriwaa Darias ena walata; ejo, Ore taata Tetanai, olbalusui lo lkerenket otii teidia alo olkeju, o Shetar-bosenai, o lelo le ncholuek ino, lelo balusuni ootii olkerenket otii teidia alo olkeju, entalamari;" 
Ezra6:7 entalam esiaai ena aji e Nkai; enchoo olbalusui loo lyahudi, o lpayiani loo Lyahudi eitoki aashet ena aji e Nkai te wueji enye." 
Ezra6:8 Ore ake sii aitayio nanu enkitanapata naipirta enintaasiasa kulo payiani loo Lyahudi te nchetata ena aji e Nkai; kelaakini kulo tung'ana te nkiputakinoto to lchumati le nkitoo nemeimutieki te kodi naing'uaa olkerenket otii teidia alo olkeju. 
Ezra6:9 Ore entoki pooki nayieuni - ilooti oing'ok, ilmeregeshi, anaa nkerra tenkaraki ilasarri oopejokini Enkai e keper, o enkano, o emunyan, o enaisho oo sabibu, anaa eilata, anaa enayieu ilapolosak te Yerusalem, nchoo ninche ina anaake, nemepali," 
Ezra6:10 pee etum ninche aaishooi ilasarri ooitishipisho te Nkai e keper, neomonoki enkishui o laiguanani o layiok lenyena." 
Ezra6:11 Aitayio sii enkitanapata nchere teneibelekeny ake oltung'ani ena limunoto, neiwuang'ieki imbokishi te nkaji enye, nesheyieki ninye, neaku enkaji enye olkiu le modioi." 
Ezra6:12 Ore Enkai apa naitamanya enkarna enye ine wueji, metusulai pooki aiguanani o ltung'ana ooitorioo nkaik enye aaibelekeny ena, anaa einyal ena aji e Nkai natii Yerusalem. Nanu Darias oitayio ena kitanapata nchoo metaasi neibung'i aakurraki.”" 
Ezra6:13 Ore te risioroto eilo rorei oirriwayie olaiguanani Sairos, neas Tatenai ilo balusui lo lkerenket otii teidia alo olkeju o Shetar-bosenai, o lelo le ncholuek enye, nena pooki naaitanapishe olaiguanani Darias." 
Ezra6:14 Ore ilpayiani loo Lyahudi neshetisho nebul, teina aibon apa e Hagai oloiboni le Nkai o Sakaria olayioni le Ido. Eidipa ninche ina aji enye te nkitanapata e Nkai oo Siraeli o te nkitanapata e Sairos o Darias o Artaseses olaiguanani le Parsia;" 
Ezra6:15 neidipe apa ena aji te nkolong e uni o lapa le Adar, to lari le ile le nkitoria o laiguanani Darias." 
Ezra6:16 Ore iltung'ana loo Siraeli, ilapolosak o Lawi, o lelo kulikae apa ootorrinyunye te yararoto, neraposhoki enkitisinyata eina aji e Nkai te nchipai." 
Ezra6:17 Neishooyo ninche teina kitisinyata ena aji e Nkai iloing'ok iip nabo, o lmeregeshi iip are, o lkuo le kerra iip ong'uan, neitayu anaa olasar le ng'oki too Siraeli pooki ilkineji tomon oare, terisioroto e siana oo loshon loo Siraeli." 
Ezra6:18 Nepik ninche ilapolosak ilturrurri lenye nepik Ilawi irishat enye e siaai, tenkaraki enkisiaayiare e Nkai te Yerusalem anaa enaigeroki te mbuku e Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Ore te nkolong e tomon oo nguan o lapa le dukuya, neibung lelo apa ootorrinyunye te yararoto pasaka." 
Ezra6:20 Amu eitisinya apa ilapolosak o Lawi ate tenebo; etaa apa pooki ilemeiduruk. Neaku eteyiang'a ninche olkuoo lenye le pasaka tenkaraki lelo pooki ootorrinyunye te yararoto, te nkaraki lelo apolosak alashera lenye, o tenkaraki ninche maate," 
Ezra6:21 einosa apa ina pasaka iltung'ana loo Siraeli ootorrinyunye te yararoto, o pooki ng'ae oibung'are ninche, neitalam kewan olduruk loo ltung'ana leina kop, neserem Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel." 
Ezra6:22 Neibung ninche osirua loo mukateni neitu eisuishieki nkolong'i naapishana te nchipai; amu eitishipa ninche Olaitoriani, neibelekenya oltau lo laiguanani le Asiria aibelekenyakino ninche, ometaa etareto ninye ninche te siaai e nkaji e Nkai, Enkai e Israel." 
Ezra7:1 Ore apa te siadi ena, te nkitoria e Artaseses olaiguanani le Parsia, ore Esra olayioni le Seraia, olayioni le Asaria, olayioni le Hilkia," 
Ezra7:2 olayioni le Shalum, olayioni le Sadok, olayioni le Ahitab," 
Ezra7:3 olayioni le Amaria, olayioni le Asaria, olayioni le Merariot," 
Ezra7:4 olayioni le Serahia, olayioni le Usii, olayioni le Buki," 
Ezra7:5 olayioni le Abishua, olayioni le Finehas, olayioni le Eliesa, olayioni le Aron ilo apolosani kitok - neilepu sii ilo Esra eing'uaa Babilon." 
Ezra7:6 Olaigeroni apa ninye arriyia too nkitanapat e Musa, apa naaishorua Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, neisho olaiguanani ninye nena pooki naatoomonuo, amu etii apa enkaina o Laitoriani Enkai enye shumata ninye." 
Ezra7:7 Neilep sii apa aapuo Yerusalem to lapa liopishana le nkitoria e Artaseses olaiguanani, embata oo ltung'ana loo Siraeli, o embata oo lapolosak o Lawi, o laranyak o larripok loo nchomito, o laisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai." 
Ezra7:8 Nelotu ninye Yerusalem to lapa le imiet, aa olari liopishana le nkitoria eilo aiguanani;" 
Ezra7:9 amu ore te nkolong e dukuya o lapa le dukuya neiteru ninye alo te Babilon, ore te nkolong e dukuya o lapa le imiet nelotu ninye Yerusalem, amu etii enkaina supat e Nkai enye shumata ninye." 
Ezra7:10 Amu etipika Esra oltau lenye pee eiteng'enuo enkitanapata o Laitoriani, neas ninye, neitengenisho nkiguanat enyena, o nkikoo enyena tiatua Israel." 
Ezra7:11 Ena entashati e mpalai naishoo olaiguanani Artaseses Esra ilo apolosani, naa olaigeroni, ang'eni loo mbaa oo nkitanapat o Laitoriani o nkiguanat enyena tialo Isiraeli:" 
Ezra7:12 “Artaseses olaiguanani loo laiguanak oirriwaki Esra olapolosani, ilo aigeroni loo nkitanapat e Nkai e keper. Ore taata," 
Ezra7:13 aitobira nanu enkitanapata ore pooki ng'ae too ltung'ana loo Siraeli anaa ilapolosak lenye anaa Ilawi tiatua enkitoria ai, onyorraa alo Yerusalem te yieunoto enye, neidim ashomo tenebo iyie." 
Ezra7:14 Amu kirriwayie iyie olaiguanani o lautarok lenyena oopishana, pee eikilikuan mbaa e Yuda o Yerusalem te risioroto eina kitanapata natii nkaik inono, e Nkai ino," 
Ezra7:15 nimbalunye sii enkosholai o sahabu apa naishoo olaiguanani tenebo ilautarok Enkai e Israel, natii emanyisho enye atua Yerusalem," 
Ezra7:16 tenebo enkosholai pooki o sahabu nilo iyie atum to lkerenket pooki le Babilon, tenebo nkishorot o lpela oo ltung'ana o noo lapolosak, naainosaki olmumai pee eishoruni tenkaraki enkaji e Nkai enye natii Yerusalem." 
Ezra7:17 Ore naa te kuna pisai ilo iyie ainyiang'u iloing'ok, o lmeregeshi, o lkuo le kerra, tenebo ilasarri lenye le ntapa, o lasarri lenye ooki, nilo aishooyo ninche te nchumata olperere lo lasar le nkaji e Nkai ino natii Yerusalem." 
Ezra7:18 Ore pooki naba anaa enidol aa sidai te iyie o lalashera linono neasi teina ae osholai o sahabu, nindimidimi aataas, te risioroto e yieunoto e Nkai ino." 
Ezra7:19 Ore inapa masaa nikinchooki tenkaraki enkisiaayiare e nkaji e Nkai ino, nilo aitayu te dukuya e Nkai e Yerusalem." 
Ezra7:20 Ore pooki naba anaa enayieuni te nkaraki enkaji e Nkai ino, niata erishata pee inchoru nindim aishoru te nena naatii olchumati lo laiguanani." 
Ezra7:21 “Ore nanu Artaseses olaiguanani, naitobira enkitanapata too lashumak pooki lo lkerenket otii teidia alo olkeju. Ore pooki nayieu Esra, ilo apolosani, aigeroni loo nkitanapat e Nkai e keper, nchoo easi aakurraki," 
Ezra7:22 neitabaikini ntalantani iip nabo e nkosholai, o rridat iip e nkano, o lbenia iip le nkano, o emunyan neitu eimakini eneba esapuko." 
Ezra7:23 Ore pooki naaitanapishe Enkai e keper, nchoo metaasi aaitabaya te nkaraki enkaji e Nkai e keper, pee melotu ake engoro enye adoiki olaiguanani o layiok lenyena." 
Ezra7:24 Kiliki sii iyie nchere meishiaakino pee eitalaki olapolosani kodi e arakinoto, anaa mpisai o lpolosie, anaa mpisai e nkoitoi, nemeitalaki Ilawi o laranyak, o laitasheikinok loo nkutukie oo nkajijik, o laisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai, anaa kulikae aisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai." 
Ezra7:25 “Naa ore iyie Esra te risioroto eina ng'eno nagut e Nkai ino niata te nkaina ino, tegelu ilooiguanare o larishak oorish iltung'ana to lkerenket pooki otii lido kekun olkeju, ore lelo pooki naa ilooyiolo nkitanapat Enkai ino: ore lelo lemeyiolo nkitanapat ninteng'en." 
Ezra7:26 Ore pooki ng'ae lemeiruk nkitanapat e Nkai ino o nkitanapat o laiguanani, nchoo edung'okini ninye enkiguana narrish, aa te keeya, anaa erewe eyararoto anaa, eoruni imasaa enyena, anaa eeni te korokoroni.”" 
Ezra7:27 Meisisi Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papa, laa ninye otipika embae naikununo nji atua oltau lo laiguanani, pee eitisidan enkaji e Nkai natii Yerusalem," 
Ezra7:28 naa ninye laaitabaikia nanu enyorrata enye nauno te dukuya olaiguanani, o lautarok lenyena. O te dukuya iltung'ana pooki magil lo laiguanani. Naagolu nanu oshoke amu etii enkaina o Laitoriani Enkai ai shumata nanu, naiturrur nanu iltung'ana ooisul Isiraeli pee aapuo aairiamariyie." 
Ezra8:1 Kuna apa ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, naa kuna nkarn oo ishoritin e lelo apa ooshomo tenebo nanu eing'uaa Babilon, te nkitoria o laiguanani Artaseses." 
Ezra8:2 Ore too layiok le Finehas naa Gershom. Ore too layiok le Itamar, naa Daniel, ore too layiok le Daudi naa Hatush," 
Ezra8:2 Ore too layiok le Finehas naa Gershom. Ore too layiok le Itamar, naa Daniel, ore too layiok le Daudi naa Hatush," 
Ezra8:3 ore too layiok le Shekania, o too layiok le Parosh, naa Sekaria, laa te ninye eigeroki ilewa iip o onom." 
Ezra8:4 Ore too layiok le Pahat-moab, naa Elieho-enai olayioni le Serahia, ore tenebo ninye netii ilewa iip are o onom." 
Ezra8:5 Ore too layiok le Satu, naa Shekania olayioni le Yehasiel, ore tenebo ninye netii ilewa iip uni." 
Ezra8:6 Ore too layiok le Adin, naa Ebed olayioni le Yonatan, ore tenebo ninye netii ilewa onom." 
Ezra8:7 Ore too layiok le Elam, naa Yeshaia olayioni le Atalia, ore tenebo ninye netii ilewa ntomoni naapishana." 
Ezra8:8 Ore too layiok le Shefatia, o Sebadia olayioni le Mikael, netii tenebo ninye Ilewa ntomoni isiet." 
Ezra8:9 Ore too layiok le Yoab, o Obadia olayioni le Yehiel, netii tenebo ninye ilewa iip are o tomon oisiet." 
Ezra8:10 Ore too layiok le Bani, o Shelomit olayioni le Yosifia, netii tenebo ninye ilewa iip o ntomoni ile." 
Ezra8:11 Ore too layiok le Bebai, Sekaria olayioni le Bebai, netii tenebo ninye ilewa tikitam o isiet." 
Ezra8:12 Ore too layiok le Asgat, Yohanan olayioni le Hakatan, netii tenebo ninye ilewa iip o tomon." 
Ezra8:13 Ore too layiok le Adonikam, lelo apa ooetuo te siadi, ore nkarn enye naa Elifalet, Yeuel, o Shemaia, netii tenebo ninche ilewa ntomoni ile." 
Ezra8:14 Ore too layiok le Bigfai, Utai o Sakur, netii tenebo ninche ilewa ntomoni naapishana." 
Ezra8:15 Aiturrurro apa nanu ninche te mbata olkeju orukokino Ahafa, ore teine nikibik too lng'oborri nkolong'i uni. Najo nanu ajur iltung'ana o lapolosak, nadol nchere metii Ilawi." 
Ezra8:16 Nairriwaa nanu olkilikuai meipoti Eliesa, o Ariel, o Shemaia o Elinatan, o Yarib, o Elnatan, o Natan, o Sekaria, o Meshulam, lelo arikok, neipotuni sii Yoiarib o Elnatan, laa iltung'ana apa oota engeno nagut neiriwarri ninche meshomo enetii Ido," 
Ezra8:17 ilo arikoni te wueji neji Kasifia, neliki ninche enapuo aajoki Ido o lalashera lenyena lelo sinkan le nkaji e Nkai, te wueji neji Kasifia, aa taa, pee eirriwakini iyiook ilaisiaayiak te nkaraki e nkaji e Nkai." 
Ezra8:18 Ore te nkaraki enkaina supat e Nkai ang, natii te shumata iyiook eyakita ninche iyiook oltung'ani oata enkidimata, too layiok le Mahali, olayioni le Lawi, olayioni le Israel, oji enkarna enye Sherabia, ore tenebo ilayiok lenyena o ltung'ana lo lgilata lenye naa tomon oisiet," 
Ezra8:19 tenebo sii Hashabia, ore tenebo ninye netii Yashabia, too layiok le Merari, ore ninche tenebo iltung'ana lo lgilata lenye, o layiok lenye naa tikitam." 
Ezra8:20 Ore tenebo lelo aisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai iip are o tikitam, apa ooiteng'ela Daudi, pee etum aaisiaayia Ilawi, neipotoki kulo pooki too nkarn." 
Ezra8:21 Naitoki nanu aibalunye eenata e mpukoroto to lkeju le Ahafa, pee kitum iyiook aitoborro ate te dukuya Enkai ang, pee king'oru te ninye enkoitoi naitoriori te nkaraki iyiook maate, o nkera ang o masaa ang pooki." 
Ezra8:22 Amu atoduaa apa nanu enkurruna tenaomon olaiguanani meishoo iyiook ilkuti sikarini, o lakedok loo mbartan, pee emitu iyiook too lmang'ati te nkoitoi, amu kindipa iyiook aatiaaki olaiguanani, “Ore enkaina e Nkai ang naa pee eyaki eretoto lelo pooki ooing'oru ninye. Ore engolon e ng'oro enye napi naa pee egilunore lelo oopaashare ninye.”" 
Ezra8:23 Nikiyen iyiook ate aaitupukoo, nikisai Enkai ang tena bae, nening ninye esayiata ang." 
Ezra8:24 Naiteng'el nanu ilapolosak tomon oare te lelo apolosak kituaak: Sherabia, o Hashabia, o kulikae tomon loo lgilat lenye tenebo ninche." 
Ezra8:25 Naineneng'aki nanu ninche enkiroishi e nkosholai o sahabu o masaa, o nena kishorot te nkaraki enkaji e Nkai ang apa naaishorua olaiguanani, o lautarok lenyena, o lkituaak lenyena, elulung'a Israel pooki;" 
Ezra8:26 naineneng nanu too nkaik enye enkiroishi e shekeli iip naa ntalantani iip ile e nkosholai, o masaa e nkosholai naabaya enkinyiang'a enye shekeli iip nabo, o sahabu ntalantani iip nabo." 
Ezra8:27 O lbakulini tikitam le sahabu loo nkiloi isiet enkiroishi enye, o masaa are sidain o suyai naanyaanyukie te nkiroishi nena e sahabu." 
Ezra8:28 Najoki nanu ninche, “Irara intae sinyat to Laitoriani, naa sinyat kuna masaa, ore enkosholai o sahabu naa nkishorot o lpela naaishori Olaitoriani, Enkai oo loo papaai linyi." 
Ezra8:29 Entagolie ninche, ning'oring'oro ninche ometaba anaa nimpimipimi ninche te dukuya ilapolosak kituaak o Lawi o lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye te Israel te Yerusalem, tiatua ilgilat le nkaji o Laitoriani.”" 
Ezra8:30 Metaa eibung'a ilapolosak o Lawi enkipimore e nkosholai o sahabu o masaa, neyau ninche Yerusalem atua ina aji e Nkai ang." 
Ezra8:31 Nikintoki iyiook aadumunye to lkeju le Ahafa te nkolong e tomon oare o lapa le dukuya, aapuo Yerusalem. Netii enkaina e Nkai ang shumata iyiook, nekordu ninye iyiook te nkaina o lmang'atinta lang o too rresheta te nkoitoi." 
Ezra8:32 Nikibau iyiook Yerusalem nikibik teine nkolong'i uni. 
Ezra8:33 Ore te nkolong e ong'uan tiatua enkaji e Nkai ang, neipimi enkosholai o sahabu o masaa aapik nkaik e Meremot olapolosani, olayioni le Uria, netii tenebo ninye Eliesa olayioni le Finehas, netii tenebo ninche Ilawi, Yosabad olayioni le Binui." 
Ezra8:34 Eikenayioki nena pooki aajo keipima, ore enkiroishi e pooki toki neigeri." 
Ezra8:35 Ore teina kata lelo apa ooetuo eing'uaa eyararoto, lelo yararot ootorrinyunye, neishoru ilasarri oopejori aaisho Enkai e Israel, iloing'ok tomon oare tenkaraki Isiraeli pooki o lmeregeshi ntomoni naaudo o ile, o lkuoo le kerra ntomoni naapishana, neitayuni anaa olasar le ng'oki ilkineji tomon oare: ore kuna pooki naa ilasarri oopejokini Olaitoriani." 
Ezra8:36 Eyautua sii apa empalai naishorua olaiguanani aayaki ilkituaak o lbalusuni lo lkerenket otii teidia alo olkeju; neretu ninche iltung'ana o enkaji e Nkai. 
Ezra9:1 Ore eidipaki aataas kuna baa, nepuonu lelo kituaak enatii nejo, “Ore iltung'ana loo Siraeli, o lapolosak o Lawi, neitu egelaa ate aarishu too ltung'ana le kuna kuapi oata olminong oing'uaa ileKanaan, o Lhiti, o Lperisi, O Ljebusi o Lamoni o Lmoabu, o Lmisiri o Lamori." 
Ezra9:2 Amu ewaita ninche embata oo ntoyie enye aayamaki ate o layiok lenye, metaa etushulare ilo osho osinya iltung'ana loo loreren. Ore te nkaraki ena nemeisiligayu ninche, eituruk lelo kituaak o laiguanak eitarruoitie.”" 
Ezra9:3 Ore ake pee aning ena, napolos nanu ilkilani laainei, olkila lai oado, naputu olpapita te ndukuya ai o to lmunyei naton aiputukuny." 
Ezra9:4 Ore lelo pooki ooikirikirate too rorei le Nkai e Israel, tenkaraki nemeisiligayu lelo ootorrinyunye te yararoto, neiturrurro naaman nanu, ina kata aitashe aiputukuny ometabau olasar le nteipa." 
Ezra9:5 Ore to lasar le nteipa nadumunye nanu te enata ai e mpukoroto, aishopito lelo kilani laainei o lkila lai oado epolosa, nagil nanu kung naitorioo nkaik aainei aitorioki Olaitoriani Enkai ai," 
Ezra9:6 ajo, “Oi Enkai ai, aata enkurruna tenaashumaki nanu iyie enkomom ai, Enkai ai, amu eilepa entorroni ang shumata alang ilukuny ang, neilepa entorroni ang ebaiki keper." 
Ezra9:7 Ore ebaiki nkolong'i oo loo papa o metabaiki ena olong kitii iyiook atua enkitarrurroto sapuk. Naa too nkitarruorrot ang, ewaki iyiook, o laiguanak lang o lapolosak lang aapik nkaik oo laiguanak loo nkuapi, nepiki iyiook olalem, nepiki eyararoto, neoruni iyiook imasaa, nepiki iyiook esulare anaa enatiu ena olong." 
Ezra9:8 Kake ore taata te nkiti rishata, neishorua omom Olaitoriani Enkai ang, alekaki iyiook oloti pisiaai, neisho iyiook ewueji e seriani, tiatua ewueji enye sinyati. Pee etum Enkai ang aitawang'a nkonyek ang neisho iyiook enkiti piunoto te rrindikisho ang." 
Ezra9:9 Amu kira iyiook iltung'ana le rrindikisho; ore ake eyia eitu eiturraa iyiook Enkai ang te rrindikisho ang. Kake eitabaikia iyiook enyorrata enye nauno, te dukuya le Parsia pee eisho iyiook enkiti kiyagata maitasheyie enkaji e Nkai ang, nikiram iwuejitinneeidaaitie, neisho iyiook emitunoto te Yudea o te Yerusalem." 
Ezra9:10 “Naa ore taata iyie Enkai ang, kaa iyiook kipuo aajo te siadi ena? Amu kinturraitie iyiook nkitanapat inono," 
Ezra9:11 apa nintanapishe aimunye isinkan linono, iloibonok le Nkai, ijo, ‘Ore ina kop nipuopuo aajing, pee iyaya metaa eninyi, naa enkop nemesinya, naata olduruk loo loreren le kuna kuapi, tenebo ilo minong oiputa ninye, ebaiki enkiting'oto o metabaiki enkiting'oto teilo duruk lenye." 
Ezra9:12 Ore enkaraki ina emincho ntoyie inyi meyama ilayiok lenye, nimiyaya sii ntoyie enye aayamaki ilayiok linyi. Niming'oruru aekata osotua o ninche o karsisisho enye eji pee igolulu, nitumutumu aainosa endaa sidai eina kop nintaa enjung'ore oo nkera inyi ntarasi.’" 
Ezra9:13 Ore eidipa kuna pooki aatadoiki iyiook te nkaraki nkiaasin ang torrok o te nkitarruoroto ang kitok, nikidol aajo, iyie Enkai ang naitamio, aitodorropu too nkitarruorot ang, ninchoo iyiook olpisiai loo lekunot oba nji." 
Ezra9:14 Eikingil iyiook aagil nkitanapat inono nikiyama o ltung'ana oas kuna baa olminong? Aimigorokino iyie iyiook, nimut iyiook ometaa metumi ninye olpisiai loo lekunot, nemeimisho ninye obo?" 
Ezra9:15 Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, ira iyie asipani, amu etelekuaki iyiook olpisiaai oimishe, anaa enikitiu ena olong. Ng'ura kitii iyiook dukuya iyie te nkitarruorroto ang, amu meetae oloidim aitasho te dukuya iyie te nkaraki ena.”" 
Ezra10:1 Ore eomonito Esra neirridu, neishir, nenang'ie kewan enkop te dukuya enkaji o Laitoriani, neiturrurrokino ninye eumata sapuk oo lewa, o nkituaak o nkera, eing'uaa Israel, amu eishira lelo tung'ana te mion." 
Ezra10:2 Ore Shekamia olayioni le Yehiel, loo layiok le Elam, neirorie Esra: ajoki, “Kinturraitie iyiook enkirukoto te Nkai nikiyama nkituaak oo loreren oo ltung'ana lena kop, kake ore ake o taata eetae osiligi too Siraeli hoo netii ena." 
Ezra10:3 Ore enkaraki ina, maitobira iyiook olning'o lo sotua o Enkai ang, aaiwuang'ie kuna kituaak pooki o nkera enye, te risioroto e nkikoo o lkitok lai, o ene lelo ooikirikira te nkaraki enkitanapata e Nkai ang: naa nchoo easi ina te risioroto e nkitanapata." 
Ezra10:4 Tudumunye amu esiaai ino ina, nikitii iyiook tenebo iyie. Ntagoluoyu nias ina.”" 
Ezra10:5 Nedumunye Esra neinosie olmumai ilapolosak kituaak, o Lawi o Siraeli pooki, pee eas anaa enatejoki. Neinos ninche olmumai." 
Ezra10:6 Neitoki Esra alo te nkaji e Nkai nelo olgilata le Yehobadan olayioni le Eliaship, naa ine eshomo airrag. Neitu einos endaa anaa eok enkare; amu eishiraka apa ninye lelo ooshomo eyararoto lemeisiligayu." 
Ezra10:7 Neitayuni enkitanapata tiatua Yuda pooki o Yerusalem tenkaraki lelo yararot pooki ootorrinyunye, pee epuo ninche aaiturrurro te Yerusalem." 
Ezra10:8 Naa teneitu elotu oltung'ani ake ninye obo too nkolong'i uni, te nkitanapata oo lkituaak o lpayiani, ore imasaa enyena pooki, neyai, ore ninye makewan, neiwuang'ieki te umata o yararot ootorrinyunye." 
Ezra10:9 Ore iltung'ana pooki le Yuda o Benchamen, neiturrurro te Yerusalem too nkolong'i uni, naa olapa lioudo apa ilo e nkolong e tikitam o lapa. Netoni iltung'ana pooki to lkurroto otumoreki te dukuya enkaji e Nkai, eikirikira te nkaraki ena bae o tenkaraki enchan sapuk." 
Ezra10:10 Neitashe Esra ilo apolosani nejoki ninche, “Itigila intae inkitanapat niyama nkituaak oo loreren, nitoponaitie enkitarrurroto te Israel." 
Ezra10:11 Ore naa taata entobira enkirridunoto to Laitoriani Enkai oo loo papaai linyi, niasiasa eyieunoto enye. Entegelari maate entung'uai iltung'ana lena kop, ning'uaa nkituaak enye.”" 
Ezra10:12 Newal eumata pooki to ltoilo sapuk aajo, “Neijia etiu, meeta nchere keitu iyiook kiaas anaa enitejo." 
Ezra10:13 Kake aikumok iltung'ana, naa erishata e nchan sapuk, mikindim iyiook aaitasho tena kisiajata. Ore sii ena siaai, neme ene nkolong nabo anaa nkolong'i are, amu kintarruoitie iyiook oleng tena bae." 
Ezra10:14 Nchoo ilkituaak lang eitashe te rishata e umata pooki, naa nchoo pooki tiatua nkanas ang apa oowaita nkituaak oo loreren epuonu too rishat naategeluaki, ore ilpayiani o larishak te pooki anasa neaku tenebo ninche, ometaba anaa neibelekenya engoro napi e Nkai ang aing'uaa iyiook.”" 
Ezra10:15 Yonatan ake olayioni le Asahel o Yohaseia olayioni le Tikfa otanya ena, ore Meshulam o Shebetai, ilo le Lawi, neibung'are ninche." 
Ezra10:16 Neas lelo yarunot apa ootorrinyunye ina. Negelu Esra olapolosani iltung'ana, ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo menye, ore ake pooki ng'ae te ninche neigeri enkarna enye. Ore te nkolong e dukuya o lapa le tomon netoni ninche pee ejurru ina bae." 
Ezra10:17 Ore te nkolong e dukuya o lapa le dukuya nebau ninche eneiting'ie lelo lewa apa ooyama nkituaak oo loreren. 
Ezra10:18 Ore too layiok loo lapolosak apa ooyama nkituaak oo loreren, netumi, Maaseia, o Eliesa, o Yarib, o Gedaia, loo layiok le Yeshua olayioni le Yosadak, o lalashera lenyena." 
Ezra10:19 Etonyorraitie ninche maate pee eiwuang'ie nena kituaak enye oo loreren, ore apa olasar lenye le nkitarruorroto naa olmeregesh le luaata oo ntare te nkaraki enkitarrurroto enye." 
Ezra10:20 Ore too layiok le Imer netumi Hanani o Sebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Ore too layiok le Harim, netumi Maaseia, o Eliya, o Shemaia, o Yehiel o Usia." 
Ezra10:22 Ore too layiok le Pashur: netumi Elioenai, o Maaseia, o Ishmael, o Natanael o Yosabad, o Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Ore too Lawi: netumi Yosabad o Shimei o Kelaia, (aa taa Kelita) o Petahia, o Yuda, O Eliesa." 
Ezra10:24 Ore too laranyak, netumi: Eliashib. Ore too larripok loo nchomito netumi: Shalum, o Telem, o Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Ore te Israel: too layiok le Parosh netumi: Ramia, o Isia, o Malkija, o Mijamin, o Eleasa, o Hashabia o Benaia." 
Ezra10:26 Ore too layiok le Elam netumi: Matania, o Sekaria, o Yehiel, o Abdi, o Yeremot o Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Ore too layiok le Satu netumi: Elioenai, o Eliashib, o Matania, o Yeremot o Sabad, o Asisa." 
Ezra10:28 Ore too layiok le Bebai naa Yehohanan, o Hanania, o Sabai, o Atalia." 
Ezra10:29 Ore too layiok le Bani naa Meshulam, o Maluk, o Adaia, o Yashub, o Sheal, o Yeremot." 
Ezra10:30 Ore too layiok le Pahat-moab: netumi Adna, o Chelai, o Benania o Maaseia, o Matania, o Besalel, o Binui o Manase." 
Ezra10:31 Ore too layiok le Harim: naa Eliesa o Ishija, o Malkija, o Shemaia, o Shimeon," 
Ezra10:32 o Benchamen, o Maluk, o Shemaia." 
Ezra10:33 Ore too layiok le Hashum: naa Matenai, o Matata, o Sabad, o Elifelet, o Yeremai, o Manase o Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Ore too layiok le Bani: naa Maadai, o Amram, o Uel," 
Ezra10:35 O Benania, o Bedeia, o Cheluki," 
Ezra10:36 o Fenia, o Meremot, o Eliashib," 
Ezra10:37 o Matania, o Matenai, o Yaasil." 
Ezra10:38 Ore too layiok le Binui: naa Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 o Shelania, o Natan, o Adaia," 
Ezra10:40 o Maknadebai, o Sheshai, o Sherai" 
Ezra10:41 o Asarel o Shelemia, o Shemaia," 
Ezra10:42 o Shalum, o Amaria, o Yosef." 
Ezra10:43 Ore too layiok le Nebor: naa Yeil o Matitia, o Sabad, o Sebina, o Yadai, o Yoel, o Benaia." 
Ezra10:44 Eyama apa kulo pooki nkituaak oo loreren, neiwuang'ie ninche tenebo nkera enye." 
Nehemiah1:1 Irorei le Nehemia kulo olayioni le Hekalia. Ore apa to lapa oji ole Kislep, to lari le tikitam, atii nanu Susa ina ang kitok," 
Nehemiah1:2 nelotu Hananai obo loo lalashera laainei tenebo kulikae tung'ana eing'uaa Yuda. Naikilikuan nanu ninche mbaa naaipirta lelo Yahudi ootelekutua, lelo apa ooimishote te yararoto, naikilikuan sii mbaa naapirta Yerusalem." 
Nehemiah1:3 Naajoki ninche nanu, “Ore lelo lekunot ootii olkerenket, apa ooimishote te yararoto, neeta enyamali sapuk o enkurruna. Etuurori esuntai e Yerusalem, ore nchomito enyena netumuta enkima.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Ore ake pee aning kulo rorei naton aishir, naisinanuo nkolong'i kumok; nabik nanu apukoo naomon te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai e shumata." 
Nehemiah1:5 Najo nanu, “Olaitoriani, Enkai e shumata, Enkai kitok naitureisho naibung osotua o enyorrata nauno, te lelo oonyor ninye, neibung nkitanapat enyena." 
Nehemiah1:6 Nchoo enkiok ino einining, nincho nkonyek inono eing'orisho, pee ining enkomono o sinka lino, naomon taata nanu te dukuya iyie, dama o kewarie, te nkaraki iltung'ana linono le Israel, isinkan linono, airridu ing'ok oo ltung'ana le Israel, nikitaasa iyiook tialo iyie. Ee ore nanu o enkaji e papaai lai nikitaasa eng'oki." 
Nehemiah1:7 Kitaasa iyiook entorroni oleng tialo iyie, neitu kimbung nkitanapat, o nkiguanat, o nkikoot apa nintanapa osinka lino Musa." 
Nehemiah1:8 Tadamu ilo rorei apa lintanapa osinka lino Musa, ijo, ‘Tenirara intae ilemeisiligayu, nalo nanu aidapash intae tiatua iloreren." 
Nehemiah1:9 Kake tenikirrinyokinono intae nanu nimbung'ubung'u nkitanapat aainei, niasiaasa ninche, ore hoo neba enkidapashari inyi anaa nkatampo te lakuani, kaiturur nanu ninche tene, nayau ninche ine wueji nategelua, pee aisho enkarna ai metobiko teine.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 Isinkan linono ninche naa iltung'ana linono, lelo litokordua iyie te ngolon ino kitok, o te nkaina ino nagol." 
Nehemiah1:11 Olaitoriani, nchoo enkiok ino metoning'o enkomono o sinka lino, o enkomono oo sinkan linono, ooshipakino euriata e nkarna ino. Nchoo enkishuroto osinka lino ena olong, nincho ninye olng'ur too nkonyek ele tung'ani.” Ara apa nanu olanapani le nkikompe o laiguanani." 
Nehemiah2:1 Ore apa to lapa le Nisan to lari le tomon oare le nkitoria o laiguanani Artaserses, ina kata apa etii enaisho dukuya ninye, naya nanu enaisho alo aisho olaiguanani. Neitu ae kata nanu aaku olemeshipa te dukuya Olaiguanani." 
Nehemiah2:2 Naajoki nanu olaiguanani, “Kainyoo pee eeta enkomom ino osina, nadolita ajo mimuoi? Meeta ae toki osina lo ltau ele.” Nairut nanu oleng." 
Nehemiah2:3 Najoki nanu olaiguanani, “Metobikoi olaiguanani ntarasi! Kainyoo pee meisinanuo enkomom ai, aa ore enkanasa, ine netii nkuraren oo loo papa, netaa olmuate, ore nchomito enyena, netumuta enkima?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Naaitoki nanu olaiguanani ajoki, “Naa kainyoo iyie iomonu?” Naomon nanu Enkai e keper." 
Nehemiah2:5 Najoki nanu olaiguanani, “Tenaa keitiship olaiguanani, naa tenenoto osinka lino omom too nkonyek inono, pee kirriwaa nanu mashomo Yuda, ina anasa natii nkuraren oo loo papa, pee alo ashet.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Naajoki nanu olaiguanani, etii enkitok o olaiguanani embata enye etonita, “Kenkata nabaa iyie ilo naa kanu ishukunye?” Tenaa taa keitiship olaiguanani pee aairriwaa nanu, naa kadung'oki ninye enkata." 
Nehemiah2:7 Najoki nanu olaiguanani, “Tenaa keitiship olaiguanani, nchoo nanu maaishori mpala nayaki ilbalusuni le lido kekun otii lido kerenket olkeju, pee aaisho ninche nanu maima ina kop o matabai Yuda;" 
Nehemiah2:8 neishoruni sii imapala naayakini Asaf ilo aing'urani le ntim o laiguanani, pee aatum nanu aishoo mbaoi naitobirie iloom te nkaraki nena shomito o sempewuet le nkaji e Nkai, o esuntai pooki e nkanasa, o ina aji nalo nanu amany.” Naaisho nanu olaiguanani nena pooki naatoomonuo, amu etii apa enkaina supat o laitoriani shumata nanu." 
Nehemiah2:9 Naitoki nanu alotu ilo kerenket le lelo balusuni ootii lido kekun o lkeju, naisho ninche nena pala o laiguanani. Neirriwayie apa olaiguanani tenebo nanu ilkituaak le njore o lakedok loo mbartan." 
Nehemiah2:10 Kake ore ake pee ening' Sanbalat le Heroni ena, o Tobia ilo sinka, ilo le Amori, neitagor ninche oleng' pee ening nchere, eewuo oltung'ani obo aing'oru olmabarishoi loo nkera e Israel." 
Nehemiah2:11 Metaa aeuo apa nanu Yerusalem naton teine nkolong'i uni. 
Nehemiah2:12 Naitoki nanu adumunye kewarie, nanu o lkuti tung'ana apa ootii tenebo nanu; neitu nanu aliki oltung'ani hoo obo, ina natipika Enkai ai atua oltau lai, pee alo aitaas Yerusalem. Meetae apa eng'ues natii ine meteleku ake ina apa natakedo alotunye." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ashomo apa nanu auluo kewarie aim kishomi enkalo o Erata nalo olchorro loo mbariak, o kishomi e Modioi. Naing'or nanu asipu isunta e Yerusalem apa naaturori, tenebo o nchomito enyena apa naatumuta e nkima." 
Nehemiah2:14 Naitoki nanu alo kishomi e nkong'u enkare o lchorro lo laiguanani; kake meetae apa ewueji neeim ina ng'ues nakedito nanu teine. 
Nehemiah2:15 Naitoki nanu alo kewarie aim embata o erata, naing'or asipu ina suntai. Naitoki nanu aibelekenya najing kishomi natii enkalo o erata. Naitoki arrinyunye." 
Nehemiah2:16 Neitu apa eyiolou lelo tung'ana kituaak aajo kaji nanu ashomo anaa kaa aasita; neton apa nanu eitu aliki Ilyahudi, o lapolosak, o ltung'ana le nkaji e nkitoo, o lkulikae kituaak, o lelo kulikae laa ninche oas esiaai." 
Nehemiah2:17 Naitoki nanu ajoki ninche, “Idolitata ena nyamali nikitii iyiook atua, entodol aajo eirragita Yerusalem aa olmuate, netapejoki nchomito enyena. Wootu mateshet iyiook esuntai e Yerusalem, peemikingil aata esulare.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Naliki nanu ninche ina aina e Nkai ai oshi natii shumata nanu, naliki sii lelo rorei laairorie nanu olaiguanani. Nejo ninche, “Matudumunye iyiook aashet.” Neaku eitagolo ninche nkaik enye tenkaraki ina siaai sidai." 
Nehemiah2:19 Kake ore ake pee ening Sanbalat le Heroni o Tobia ilo sinka, le Amoni o Geshem ilo marabui ina, nekueniyie iyiook, nemenaa iyiook nejo, “Kainyoo ena toki niaasitata intae?” Aigolong'akiki intae olaiguanani?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Naitoki nanu awaliki ninche ajoki, “Ore Enkai e shumata keisho iyiook matudupoto, naa ore iyiook isinkan lenyena aikidumunye aashetisho. Kake ore intae miaatata erubata, anaa esipata, anaa endamunoto te Yerusalem.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Nedumunye Eliashib ilo apolosani kitok, tenebo ilalashera lenyena, lelo apolosak, neshet ninche kishomi oo nkerra. Neitisiny ninche ina kishomi, nepik nkikeneta enyena. Neitisiny ninche ina kishomi o meitabaiki oltalet le iip nelo abaiki oltalet le Hananel." 
Nehemiah3:2 Ore enetashare ninye neshet Iltung'ana le Yeriko. Ore enetashare ninche neshet Sakar olayioni le Imri. 
Nehemiah3:3 Ore ilayiok le Hasena neshet kishomi oo sinkir; eitoluaa ninche iloom, nepik nkikeneta enyena o lmushumaani lenyena, o sekenke enyena." 
Nehemiah3:4 Ore enetashare ninche, neitobir aram Meremot olayioni le Uria, olayioni le Hakos. Ore enetashare ninche neitobir aram Meshulam olayioni le Berekia, olayioni le Meshesabel. Ore enetashare ninche neitobir aram Sadok olayioni le Baana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Ore enetashare ninche neitobir aaram iltung'ana le Tekoa, kake ore lelo kituaak lenye eitu ninche epik imurto ina siaai o Laitoriani lenye." 
Nehemiah3:6 Ore Yoida olayioni le Pasea o Mehulam olayioni le Besodia, neitobir aaram enkishomi musana. Nepik iloom lenyena o nkikeneta enyena, o lmushumaani lenyena; o sekenke enyena." 
Nehemiah3:7 Ore enetashare ninche, neitobir aram Melatia le Gebeon o Yadon le Meron, o ltung'ana le Gebeon o le Mispa, apa ootii abori enkitoria o lbalusui leilo kerenket te lido kekun o lkeju." 
Nehemiah3:8 Ore enetashare ninche neitobir aram Usiel olayioni le Harbaia, ilo kunoni. Ore enetashare ninye neitobir aram Hanania, ilo obo loo laitobirak loo sonkoyoni; Neshet ninche Yerusalem o meitabaiki e suntai dapash." 
Nehemiah3:9 Ore enetashare ninche, neitobir Aram Refaia olayioni le Huri, ilo aitoriani le nchoto e Yerusalem." 
Nehemiah3:10 Ore olotashare ninche neitobir aram Yedia olayioni le Harumap, ina kipirakinoto e nkaji enye. Ore enetashare ninye neitobir aram Hatush olayioni le Hashabneia." 
Nehemiah3:11 Ore Malkija olayioni le Harim o Hashub olayioni le Pahat Moab neitobir aaram enkae rishata tenebo oltalet lo lkokuet. 
Nehemiah3:12 Ore enetashare ninye neitobir aram Shalum olayioni le Halohesh, ilo aitoriani le nchoto nabo e Yerusalem, neshet ninye o ntoyie enyena." 
Nehemiah3:13 Ore Hanam o lelo oomanya Senoa, neitobir aaram enkishomi o erata; neshetu ninche ninye nepik nkikeneta enyena, o lmushumaani lenyena o sekenke enyena, neram ntemat e nkaina e nkalifu nabo e suntai, o meitabaiki kishomi e modioi." 
Nehemiah3:14 Ore Malkija olayioni le Rekab, ilo aitoriani lo lkerenket le Bethashekem, neitobir aram enkishomi e modioi, neitoki ashet ninye nepik nkikeneta enyena, o lmushumaani lenyena, o sekenke enyena." 
Nehemiah3:15 Ore Shalum olayioni le Galhose, ilo aitoriani lo lkerenket le Mispa neram aitobir, enkishomi e nkong'u enkare. Etesheta ninye neimulumul nepik nkikeneta enyena, o lmushumaani lenyena, o sekenke enyena. Neshet ninye esuntai o lchorro le Shela, le nkurma o laiguanani, omeitabaiki nkedeta naadoyio aapuo enkanasa e Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ore te siadi ninye, neitobir aram Nehemia olayioni le Asbak, ilo aitoriani le nchoto nabo o lkerenket le Betsar o meitabaiki enkipirakinoto oo nkuraren e Daudi, o meitabaiki olchorro oitobiruaki, o meitabaiki enkaji oo ltung'ana magil." 
Nehemiah3:17 Ore te siadi ninye neitobir Ilawi aaram: Reham olayioni le Bani; ore te siadi ninye naa Shashabia, ilo aitoriani lo lpisiaai lo lkerenket le Keila, neram aitobir olkerenket lenye." 
Nehemiah3:18 Ore te siadi ninye neitobir aaram ilalashera lenye; Bafai olayioni le Hanadad, ilo aitoriani le nchoto nabo o lkerenket le Keila;" 
Nehemiah3:19 ore olosujaki ninye naa Eser olayioni le Yoshua, ilo aitoriani le Mispa, neitobir aram enkae rishata, enkipirakinoto e wueji neshumieki imasaa o larrabal teine nelojare e suntai." 
Nehemiah3:20 Ore te siadi ninye neitobir aram Baruk enkae rishata ebaiki elojata e suntai o meitabaiki kutukaji e nkaji e Eliaship ilo apolosani kitok. 
Nehemiah3:21 Ore te siadi ninye naa Meremot olayioni le Uria, olayioni le Hakos oitobira enkae rishata, ebaiki kutukaji e nkaji e Eliab o metabaiki enkiting'oto, e nkaji e Eliaship." 
Nehemiah3:22 Ore te siadi ninye naa ilapolosak, lelo tung'ana le nkisiajata, ooitobira aaram." 
Nehemiah3:23 Ore te siadi ninche neitobir aaram Benchamen o Hashab enkipirakinoto e nkaji enye. Ore te siadi ninche neitobir aram Asaria olayioni le Maaseia, olayioni le Anania embata e nkaji enye makewan." 
Nehemiah3:24 Ore te siadi ninye naa Benui olayioni le Hanadad oitobira aram enkae rishata, ebaiki enkaji e Asaria ometabaiki elojata e suntai." 
Nehemiah3:25 Nelo abaiki olpijata. Ore Palal olayioni le Usai neitobir aram enkipirakinoto elojata o ilo talet oipang'u te nkaji e shumata o laiguanani to lgoriet le rripore. Ore te siadi ninye neitobir aaram Pedaia olayioni le Parosh," 
Nehemiah3:26 tenebo ilaisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai ootii Ofel ewueji neipirakinore kishomi e nkare, te nkalo o loo saen oilo talet oilep shumata." 
Nehemiah3:27 Ore te siadi ninye neitobir iltung'ana le Tekoa enkae rishata te nkipirakinoto eilo talet oilep shumata, o metabaiki esuntai e Ofel." 
Nehemiah3:28 Ore shumata enkishomi oo mbartan neitobir ilapolosak aaram, oltung'ani ake enkipirakinoto e nkaji enye makewan." 
Nehemiah3:29 Ore te siadi ninche neitobir aram Sadok olayioni le Imer enkipirakinoto e nkaji enye. Ore te siadi ninye neram Shemaia olayioni le Shekemia, ilo arriponi le kishomi e nkalo o loosaen." 
Nehemiah3:30 Ore te siadi ninye neitobir aram Hanania olayioni le Shelemia, o Hanam ilo ayioni le ile le Selap neitobir aram enkae rishata. Ore te siadi ninye neitobir aram Meshalam olayioni le Berekia enkipirakinoto e nkaji enye." 
Nehemiah3:31 Ore te siadi ninye, neshet aram Malkija obo loo lkunono omeitabaiki enkaji oo laisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai, o ewueji oo lamirak enkipirakinoto e kishomi e rripore, o meitabaiki enkaji e shumata natii olpijata." 
Nehemiah3:32 Ore ebaiki olgilata le shumata o metabaiki kishomi oo nkerra, neitobir aaram ilkunono le sahabu." 
Nehemiah4:1 Ore apa pee ening Sanbalat nchere kishetita iyiook esuntai negoro oleng, neim engoro enye oleng. Nesurdaany ninye Ilyahudi." 
Nehemiah4:2 Nejo ninye te dukuya ilalashera lenyena, o te dukuya enjore e Samaria, “Kainyoo easita kulo Yahudi tashala? Keigil ninche aaitobir ntokitin? Keigil ninche aapolosisho? Keidip ninche te nkolong nabo? Keigil ninche aaiturrur isoito, aaitayu teilo sototi loo suut naapejore." 
Nehemiah4:3 Netii apa Tobia olayioni le Amori embata enye, nejo ninye, Ee, ore ina nashetita ninche, tenelo embarie shumata ninye, neuroo ina suntai enye oo soito!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Naomon nanu najo, “Toning'o na Ai ang, amu etemenaki iyiook; mbelekenya iyie esurdaanyata enye meeu shumata ilukuny enye maate, naa nchoo ninche meitoroki teina kop enye e yararoto." 
Nehemiah4:5 Mintemoo iyie enkitarruorroto enye, nimincho metujuti eng'oki enye metujuti aaiwuang'ie too nkonyek inono. Amu kintagoro ninche iyie te dukuya ilashetak.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Ina pee kishet iyiook esuntai; neiruburuba esuntai pooki tenebo, to lpisiaai le nkadoro enye. Amu eeta apa lelo tung'ana endamunoto pee eas esiaai." 
Nehemiah4:7 Kake ore ake pee ening Sanbalat, o Tobia, o Lmarabu, o Lamori le Ashdod nchere eloito dukuya e ramata e suntai e Yerusalem, netunukaki ilusien enyena, negoro ninche oleng." 
Nehemiah4:8 Neitobir ninche tenebo pee erasaki Yerusalem neyau olmilo atua ninye. 
Nehemiah4:9 Nikiomon iyiook Enkai ang, nikipik ilarripok ooibooyo ninche, dama o kewarie." 
Nehemiah4:10 Kake etejo apa Yuda, “Eishunye engolon oo lanapak loo lolan, naa kumok isuut, mikindim iyiook aateshet esuntai.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Nejo ilmang'ati lang, “Meyiolou ninche toki, anaa edolisho, ometaba anaa nikipuonu empolos enye, nikiaar ninche metuata, nikintasheyie esiaai.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Ore ake pee epuonu lelo Yahudi apa ootashare ninche, nejoki ninche iyiook katitin tomon, ore too wuejitin pooki neemanya ninche, nepuonu ninche aagilunore iyiook." 
Nehemiah4:13 Neaku ore too wuejitin neegum oorishat e oriong e suntai, too loingengen, atipika nanu iltung'ana te risioroto oo lmareita lenye, eeta ilalema, o remeta enye o nkai enye." 
Nehemiah4:14 Naing'orisho nanu, nadumunye, najoki lelo kituaak, o larikok, o lkulikae tung'ana, “Emiureyu ninche. Entadamu Olaitoriani, laa ninye olkitok neitureisho, naa ninye omitu ilalashera linyi, o layiok linyi, o ntoyie inyi, o nkituaak inyi, o nkang'itie inyi.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Ore ake pee ening ilmang'ati lang nchere kitayioloito nena kitobirat enye, neibooyie Olaitoriani, nikirrinyokino pooki esuntai, nelo ake oltung'ani esiaai enye." 
Nehemiah4:16 Ore ebaiki ina olong neito idia alo, ore olpisiaai loo laisiaayiak laainei neas esiaai e nchetare, neibung likae pisiaai iremeta, o long'oi o nkai, o nkilani oo lgooitie, neitashe ilarikok tioriong enkaji pooki e Yuda," 
Nehemiah4:17 laa ninche apa ooshetita esuntai. Ore lelo oonap ilolan, neitanapi te nkaina nabo ilolan ore te nkae aina neibung imasaa o larrabal." 
Nehemiah4:18 Ore ake obo loo lashetak, neenita olalem te mpolos enye eshetisho. Ore ilo tung'ani apa oosh entarumpeta naatashare nanu." 
Nehemiah4:19 Najoki nanu lelo kituaak, o larikok, o lkulikae tung'ana pooki, “Aisapuk esiaai, netalala oleng, neidapasha iyiook esuntai, kitalamate maate." 
Nehemiah4:20 Ore te wueji nining'ieng'ie oltoilo le ntarumpeta, enkuetu ene nikitii. Kearisho Enkai ang te rishata ang.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Neaku kitaasishote iyiook teina siaai, ore olpisiaai loo ltung'ana, neibung iremeta ebaiki tadekenya o metaliooto ilakir teipa." 
Nehemiah4:22 Atiaaka sii apa iltung'ana, “Nchoo pooki tung'ani o sinka lenye eirrag Yerusalem, pee etum aatorrip iyiook kewarie, neidim aataasisho dama.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Metaa mme nanu, neme lalashera laainei, neme isinkan laainei, neme larripok laasujita nanu, meetae hoo obo oitayio nkilani enyena; neibung'ita ake oltung'ani imasaa enyena o larrabal te nkainaenye." 
Nehemiah5:1 Nedumunye apa olkiyioi kitok loo ltung'ana o nkituaak enye, te nkaraki Ilyahudi alashera lenye." 
Nehemiah5:2 Amu etii apa lelo oojo, “Ore iyiook tenebo ilayiok lang o ntoyie ang naa eikira kumok, maing'oru iyiook entapa pee kitum aainosa nikinchu.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Eetae sii apa lelo oojo, “Kiteena te sile nkurman ang, o nkurman ang oo sabibu o nkajijik ang, pee kitum entapa te nkaraki olameyu.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Netii sii lelo oojo, “Kisilenoitie mpisai te kodi o laiguanani te nkaraki nkurman ang o nkurman ang oo sabibu." 
Nehemiah5:5 Etotiutuo taata iseseni lang anaa iseseni loo lalashera lang; netotiutuo nkera ang anaa nkera enye; eji neton ake kirrumoki ilayiok lang o ntoyie ang metaa rrindiki; ore kulie oo ntoyie ang neidipaki aaitaa rrindiki; amu mikiaata engolon nikiretunye. Amu ewaita kulikae tung'ana nkurman ang o nkurman ang o sabibu.” 
Nehemiah5:6 Atagore apa oleng pee aning olkiyioi lenye o kulo rorei. 
Nehemiah5:7 Aiguane nanu makewan, nadung'oki enkiguana lelo kituaak o larikok. Najoki nanu ninche, “Ntulusoitie elaakinoto e dupoto o ltung'ani ake olalashe lenye.” Naibung ina umata kitok agilunore ninche," 
Nehemiah5:8 najoki ninche, “Ore iyiook anaa enikindim nikinyiang'utua aarrinyu ilyahudi alashera lang apa ootimirakaki iloreren; kake eji imir iyie ilalashera linono eji pee etumi aatimiraki iyiook!” Etigirate ninche neitu etum ororei owalu." 
Nehemiah5:9 Kaae najo nanu, “Ore ina bae niaasitata intae neme sidai. Aimeishiaakino intae nipuopuo te uriata e Nkai ang, pee imbooyoyo nkinyalat e lelo oshon mang'ati lang?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Ore ake sii nanu o lalashera laainei nikisilenoki ninche mpisai o entapa. Matung'uai iyiook ena dupoto. 
Nehemiah5:11 Entorrinyoki ninche ena olong taata nkurman enye, o nkurman enye oo sabibu, o nkurman enye oo loirienito, o nkajijik enye, o maaip oo ropiyiani enye, o entapa, o enaisho oo sabibu o ina ilata apa niwaita aaitung'uaa ninche.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Neitoki ninche aajo, “Eikirrinyu iyiook kuna nimikinkilikuanu toki te ninche. Eikiaas iyiook anaa enijo.” Naipotu nanu ilapolosak nainosie ninche olmumai pee eas anaa enaisiligishore." 
Nehemiah5:13 Naitoki sii aipirripir enkila ai, najo, “Meikuna neijia Enkai aipiripiroo pooki tung'ani te nkaji enye, o te siaai enye tenemeitabaya ena kisiligata. Meipiripiri ninye neitoroki.” Nejo eumata pooki, “Esai” Neisis Olaitoriani. Neas lelo tung'ana aanaa enaisiligishore ninche." 
Nehemiah5:14 Ore ake sii ebaiki ina kata apa naageluni mataa olbalusui te nkop e Yuda, ebaiki olari le tikitam o metabaiki olari le tomoni uni o are le nkitoria e Arteserses ilo aiguanani, ilarin tomon o are, eitu nanu o lalashera laainei aainos ina daa o lbalusui." 
Nehemiah5:15 Ore lelo balusuni apa le dukuya ootii te dukuya nanu neitanap iltung'ana ilolan ooiroishi, neoru ninche endaa o enaisho oo sabibu, metii shekeli artam e nkosholai. Neitore sii isinkan lenye olorere. Kake eitu nanu aas ina, te nkaraki euriata e Nkai." 
Nehemiah5:16 Aibung'a sii apa enchetata ena suntai, neitu aing'oru enkop. Ore isinkan laainei pooki neiturrurro teine tenkaraki esiaai." 
Nehemiah5:17 Ore ake sii etii apa emisa ai iltung'ana iip nabo o onom, Ilyahudi o lkituaak metii lelo apa ooetuo enikitii eing'uaa lelo oreren oomanita iyiook." 
Nehemiah5:18 Ore apa endaa naitobiri te nkolong nabo naa olkiteng obo o nkerra ile gelunot; eitobiraki sii apa ilukunkuni te nkaraki nanu. Ore ake too nkolong'i tomon netii ilbenia le naisho oo sabibu te nkumoi; ore ake etii kuna pooki eitu nanu aikilikuanu endaa naipirare olbalusui, amu keiroishi apa esinkaisho te kulo tung'ana." 
Nehemiah5:19 Tadamu te nkaraki esupatisho tialo nanu na Ai ai, nena pooki nataasa te nkaraki kulo tung'ana." 
Nehemiah6:1 Ore apa pee elikini Sanbalat o Tobia le Geshem ilo Marabui o kulikae mang'ati lang nchere atesheta nanu ina esuntai nemeekure etii olong'eng'e, hoo naa ore ebaiki ina kata eton eitu apik nkikeneta e kishomi," 
Nehemiah6:2 naairriwaki Sanbalat o Geshem olkilikuai ejo, “Wou manototo tenebo te nkang nabo e nkisiajata e Ono.” Kake keyieu apa ninche naaitaas entorrono." 
Nehemiah6:3 Airriwaka nanu ninche ilkiliku ajoki, “Aasita esiaai kitok nemaidim aeu. Kainyoo pee eitashe esiaai eji pee alotu enitii?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Naairriwaki ninche nanu ilkiliku katitin ong'uan aaiko nji, nawaliki ninche aiko nji." 
Nehemiah6:5 Ore ake teina oitoi neirriu Sanbalat olkilikuai lenye te nkata e imiet, nereu olaisiaayiani lenye eeta empalai nabolo te nkaina enye." 
Nehemiah6:6 Ore tiatua ina palai neigero, ajo, “Etolimuoki tiatua iloshon, netejo sii Geshem neijia, nchere ore iyie o Lyahudi nintobiritata pee iseriser ina pee ishetitata esuntai, naa ijo pee iyaku olaiguanani lenye te risioroto eina limunoto." 
Nehemiah6:7 Itegelua sii iloibonok pee eibalie aalimu mbaa naaipirta Yerusalem, ‘Etii olaiguanani Yuda.’ Ore naa taata kelikini olaiguanani te risioroto e kulo rorei. Ore naa taata wou matoning'oto.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Nairriwaki nanu olkilikuai ajoki, “A-a, ore nena baa nijoito netaasate, amu iyie oipirua ninche too ndamunot inono.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Amu keyieu apa pooki neiture iyiook, edamu aajo, “Keidim nkaik enye aatalepori neitiak esiaai, nemeitokini aas” kake ore iyie na Ai ntagolo iyie nkaik aainei." 
Nehemiah6:10 Ore apa pee alo enkaji e Shemaia olayioni le Delaia, olayioni le Mehatabel, apa oikenoyioki, nejo ninye, “Manototo iyiook tenebo tiatua enkaji e Nkai, tiatua ewueji sinyati, nikinken nkikeneta e nkaji e Nkai; amu aikipuonu ninche aar iyie tua, kewarie kipuonu ninche aar iyie tua.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Kake atiaaka nanu ninye, “Kaisik ailanyisho toltung'ani laaijo nanu? Ijo iyie kaitajeu enkishui ai tenalo aisudori tiatua enkaji e Nkai. Maas nanu ina.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Nayiolou nanu aitisip, nadol ajo eitu eirriu Enkai ninche, kake eibalunye ninye enaibon pee aagilunore nanu, enkaraki naigero Tobia o Sanbalat ninye." 
Nehemiah6:13 Tenkaraki ena bae apa eigeroki ninye pee aitukureti mataasa eng'oki tena oitoi, naatumoki ninche aaishoo enkarna torrono ejo pee aaitongu." 
Nehemiah6:14 Tadamu Tobia o Sanbalat, na Ai ai te risioroto e kuna baa naataasa ninche, o enkoiboni sii naji No-adia o lelo kulikae oibonok laayieu naaitukuret." 
Nehemiah6:15 Eidipe apa ina suntai te nkolong e tikitam o imiet o lapa oji le Israel Elul, too nkolong'i onom oare." 
Nehemiah6:16 Ore pee ening ilmang'ati lang pooki ina, neirut iloshon pooki oomanita iyiook, neibung oloputukunyi kitok amu etumusutuo aajo etaasaki ena siaai te retoto e Nkai ang." 
Nehemiah6:17 Ore ake sii apa te nena olong'i, eirriwaitie ilkituaak le Yuda mpala aairriwaki Tobia, neirriwaki sii ninye Tobia ninche mpala." 
Nehemiah6:18 Amu ore apa iltung'ana kumok te Yuda neinosakinote olmumai o ninye, amu olaputani apa ninye le Shekania olayioni le Ara: naa olayioni lenye Yehohanan apa oyama entito e Meshulam, olayioni le Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Eimakita sii apa nkiaasin sidain te dukuya nanu, nepuo aaliki ninye irorei latejo. Naairriwaki Tobia mpala ejo pee aaiture." 
Nehemiah7:1 Ore apa pee eidipayu esuntai naidipa nkikeneta oo nchomito, neidipaki aategelu ilarripok loo nchomito, o laranyak, o Lawi," 
Nehemiah7:2 naisho nanu, olalashe lai Hanani o Hanania meitasheiki Yerusalem. Amu oltung'ani apa oisiligayu neure Enkai alang ilkumok." 
Nehemiah7:3 Najoki nanu ninche, “Emincho ake nchomito e Yerusalem eboli ometaba anaa neilepu enkolong; naa ore eton eitashe aarripisho nchoo ninche eiken nepik isekenke ooikenieki nchomito. Entegelu ilarripok tiatua lelo oomanya Yerusalem, neitashe ake pooki ng'ae te rishata enye, neipirare ake oltung'ani enkaji enye.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Aisapuk apa ina anasa nelala, kake ore iltung'ana ootii atua naa kuti nemetii nkajijik naaidipaki aateshet." 
Nehemiah7:5 Nepik apa Enkai ndamunot aainei pee aiturrur ilkituaak, o larikok, o ltung'ana pee eiger pooki anaa ntipati oo lmareita, lelo apa ootangasa aapuonu, natum nanu eigeroki aaiko nji:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Iltung'ana lo lkerenket kulo apa ooetuo eing'uaa eyararoto e lelo apa ootarayie Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon nenap aya, etorrinyunye ninche Yerusalem o Yuda nelo ake pooki ng'ae enkang enye." 
Nehemiah7:7 Eetuo apa ninche tenebo Serubabel, o Yoshua, o Nehemia, o Asaria, o Raamia o Nahamani, o Mordekai, o Bilshan o Misparet o Bigfai, o Nehum o Baana. Ore esiana oo ltung'ana le Israel:" 
Nehemiah7:8 lelo ayiok le Perosh, naa nkalifuni are o iip nabo o ntomoni naapishana oare." 
Nehemiah7:9 Ore ilayiok le Shefatia naa iip uni o ntomoni naapishana oare. 
Nehemiah7:10 Ore ilayiok le Ara, naa iip ile o onomm oare." 
Nehemiah7:11 Ore ilayiok le Pahatmoab, aa taa ilayiok le Yoshua o Yoab, naa nkalifuni are o iip isiet o tomon o isiet." 
Nehemiah7:12 Ore ilayiok le Elam naa enkalifu nabo o iip are o onom o ong'uan. 
Nehemiah7:13 Ore ilayiok le Setu naa iip isiet o artam o imiet. 
Nehemiah7:14 Ore ilayiok le Sakai, naa iip naapishana o ntomoni ile." 
Nehemiah7:15 Ore ilayiok le Binui, naa iip ile o artam o isiet." 
Nehemiah7:16 Ore ilayiok le Bebai naa iip ile o tikitam o isiet. 
Nehemiah7:17 Ore ilayiok le Asgad, naa nkalifuni are o iip uni o tikitam o are." 
Nehemiah7:18 Ore ilayiok le Adonikan naa iip ile ontomoni ile oopishana. 
Nehemiah7:19 Ore ilayiok le Bigfai naa nkalifuni are o ntomoni naapishana. 
Nehemiah7:20 Ore ilayiok le Adin naa iip ile o onomm o imiet. 
Nehemiah7:21 Ore ilayiok le Ater, a taa ile Hesekia naa ntomoni naaudo o isiet." 
Nehemiah7:22 Ore ilayiok le Hashum naa iip uni o tikitam o isiet. 
Nehemiah7:23 Ore ilayiok le Besai, naa iip uni o tikitam o ong'uan." 
Nehemiah7:24 Ore ilayiok le Harif naa iip o tomon oare. 
Nehemiah7:25 Ore ilayiok le Gibeon naa ntomoni naaudo o imiet. 
Nehemiah7:26 Ore iltung'ana le Betlehem o Netofa naa iip ontomoni isiet o isiet. 
Nehemiah7:27 Ore iltung'ana le Anatot naa iip o tikitam o isiet. 
Nehemiah7:28 Ore iltung'ana le Bet-asmapet naa artam oare. 
Nehemiah7:29 Ore iltung'ana le Kiriat-yearim, Kepira o Beerot, naa iip naapishana o artam o kuni." 
Nehemiah7:30 Ore iltung'ana le Rama o Geb, naa iip ile o tikitam o obo." 
Nehemiah7:31 Ore iltung'ana le Mikmas naa iip o tikitam o are. 
Nehemiah7:32 Ore iltung'ana le Betel o Ai, naa iip o tikitam okuni." 
Nehemiah7:33 Ore iltung'ana le nkae Nebo naa onomm o are. 
Nehemiah7:34 Ore ilayiok le likae oji Elam naa enkalifu nabo o iip are o onomm o ong'uan. 
Nehemiah7:35 Ore ilayiok le Harim, naa iip uni o tikitam." 
Nehemiah7:36 Ore ilayiok le Yeriko naa iip uni o artam o imiet. 
Nehemiah7:37 Ore ilayiok le Lod, Hadid o Ono, naa iip naapishana o tikitam o obo." 
Nehemiah7:38 Ore ilayiok le Senaa naa nkalifuni naapishana o iip naaudo o tomoni uni. 
Nehemiah7:39 Ore ilapolosak: lelo ayiok le Yedaia aa taa enkaji e Yoshua, naa iip naaudo o ntomoni naapishana o okuni." 
Nehemiah7:40 Ore ilayiok le Imer, naa enkalifu nabo o onomm o are." 
Nehemiah7:41 Ore ilayiok le Pashur, naa enkalifu nabo o iip are o artam o oopishana." 
Nehemiah7:42 Ore ilayiok le Harim naa enkalifu nabo o tomon oopishana. 
Nehemiah7:43 Ore Ilawi: lelo ayiok le Yoshua, aa taa ile Kadmiel loo layiok le Hedefa, naa ntomoni naapishana o ong'uan." 
Nehemiah7:44 Ore ilaranyak lelo ayiok le Asaf, naa iip nabo o artam o isiet." 
Nehemiah7:45 Ore ilarripok loo nchomito: lelo ayiok le Shalum, ilayiok le Ater, lelo ayiok le Talmon, lelo ayiok le Akub, lelo ayiok le Hatita, lelo ayiok le Shobai, naa iip nabo o tomoni uni o isiet." 
Nehemiah7:46 Ore lelo aisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai, lelo ayiok le Siha, lelo ayiok le Hasufa, lelo ayiok le Taabaot," 
Nehemiah7:47 lelo ayiok le Keros, lelo ayiok le Sia, lelo ayiok le Padon" 
Nehemiah7:48 lelo ayiok le Lebana, lelo ayiok le Hagaba lelo ayiok le Shalmai," 
Nehemiah7:49 lelo ayiok le Hanan, lelo ayiok le Gidel, lelo ayiok le Gahar," 
Nehemiah7:50 lelo ayiok le Reia, lelo ayiok le Resin, lelo ayiok le Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 lelo ayiok le Gesam, lelo ayiok le Usa, lelo ayiok le Pasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 lelo ayiok le Besai, lelo ayiok le Meunim, lelo ayiok le Nefushesim," 
Nehemiah7:53 lelo ayiok le Bakbuk, lelo ayiok le Hakufa, lelo ayiok le Hashur," 
Nehemiah7:54 lelo ayiok le Bashit, lelo ayiok le Mehida, lelo ayiok le Harsha," 
Nehemiah7:55 lelo ayiok le Barkos lelo ayiok le Sisera, lelo ayiok le Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 lelo ayiok le Nesia, lelo ayiok le Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Ore ilayiok loo sinkan le Solomon, ilayiok le Sotai, ilayiok le Soferet, ilayiok le Persida," 
Nehemiah7:58 ilayiok le Yaala, ilayiok le Darkon, ilayiok le Gidel," 
Nehemiah7:59 ilayiok le Shefatia, ilayiok le, Hatil, ilayiok le Pokeret-Lasebaim, lelo ayiok le Amon." 
Nehemiah7:60 Ore isinkan pooki le nkaji e Nkai, o sinkan loo layiok le Solomon pooki naa iip uni o ntomoni naaudo oare." 
Nehemiah7:61 Kulo oodukino apa lelo ooetuo eing'uaa Telmela, Telhasha, Keurub, Adon, o Imer, kake meidim apa ninche aaibalie ilmareita loo loo menye aashu ineeikino ninche, tenaa ke ltung'ana le Israel ninche." 
Nehemiah7:62 Ilayiok le Delaia, ilayiok le Tobia, ilayiok le Nekoda, naa iip ile o artam oare." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ore sii ilapolosak: lelo ayiok le Hobaia, lelo ayiok le Hakos, ilayiok le Barsilai, (laa ninye apa oyama entito nabo too ntoyie e Barsilai le Gilead neaku ninche eipotieki)." 
Nehemiah7:64 Eing'orutua kulo enkigeroto oo nkarn enye tenebo lelo ooigeroki too lmareita, kake eitu etumi teine, neaku etundung'oyioki too lapolosak aajo keiduruk;" 
Nehemiah7:65 etiaaka olbalusui ninche pee mejing ninche enkinosata eina daa sinyati aisul, ometaba anaa nedumunye olapolosani oata Urim o Tummim." 
Nehemiah7:66 Ore apa eumata pooki tenebo naa nkalifuni artam oare o iip uni o ntomoni ile 
Nehemiah7:67 metii isinkan lenye lewa o sinkan enye ng'oruo, nera apa ninche nkalifuni naapishana o iip uni o ntomoni ile o opishana; neeta apa ninche ilaranyak iip are o artam o imiet, ilewa o ng'oruo." 
Nehemiah7:68 Ore mbartan enye naa iip naapishana o tomoni uni o ile. Ore inyumpui enye naa iip are o artam o imiet. 
Nehemiah7:69 Ore ntamesin enye naa iip ong'uan o tomoni uni o imiet. Ore isirkon lenye naa nkalifuni ile o iip naapishana o tikitam. 
Nehemiah7:70 Ore apa ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye neishooyo nkishorot tenkaraki esiaai. Eishooyie olbalusui apik olchumati nkiloi isiet e sahabu, o ngirran onomm, o lkilani loo lapolosak iip imiet o tomoni uni." 
Nehemiah7:71 Ore ilkulikae oora ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye neishooyo aapik olchumati le siaai sahabu nkiloi iip o ntomoni ile, o imiet, o enkosholai nkiloi enkalifu nabo o iip are o onomm." 
Nehemiah7:72 Ore ilkulikae tung'ana neishooyo sahabu nkiloi iip nabo o ntomoni ile o isiet, o nkiloi iip nabo o artam e nkosholai, o lkilani ntomoni ile oopishana loo lapolosak." 
Nehemiah7:73 Neaku ore ilapolosak, lelo le Lawi, o larripok loo nchomito, o laranyak, o embata oo ltung'ana, o embata oo sinkan le nkaji e Nkai, o Siraeli pooki; netoni too nkang'itie enye. Ore pee ebau olapa liopishana, netii nkera e Israel nkang'itie enye maate." 
Nehemiah8:1 Neiturrurro iltung'ana pooki aatiu anaa oltung'ani obo to lkurroto ooipirakinore enkishomi e Nkare. Nejoki ninche Esra ilo aigeroni pee eyau embuku oo nkitanapat e Musa, apa naishoo Olaitoriani Israel." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ore Esra ilo apolosani neyau nena kitanapat dukuya ina umata, oo lewa o ng'oruo, o lelo pooki ooidim aatoning neyiolou, te nkolong e dukuya o lapa liopishana." 
Nehemiah8:3 Neisum ninye ina kitanapata eing'orita olkurroto eipirare kishomi e Nkare eiteru tadekenya enasirie o metabaiki dama eipire enkolong, te dukuya iltung'ana lelo lewa o ng'oruo o ltung'ana pooki ooidim aatoning'u nening'u lelo tung'ana too nkiyiaa enye ina buku oo nkitanapat." 
Nehemiah8:4 Neitashe Esra ilo aigeroni te nchumata ewueji oo nkeek neikarere neitobira iltung'ana te nkaraki ina siaai; ore te mbata enye neitashe Matitia o Shema, o Anaia, o Uria, o Hilkia o Maaseia te nkaina enye e tatene. Neitashe Pedaia o Mishael o Malkija, o Hashum o Hashbadana, o Sakaria, o Meshulam te nkaina enye e kedienye." 
Nehemiah8:5 Nebol Esra ina buku te dukuya iltung'ana pooki, amu etii apa ninye shumata iltung'ana pooki. Ore ake pee ebol ina buku neitashe iltung'ana pooki." 
Nehemiah8:6 Neisis Esra Olaitoriani, ina Ai kitok, newal iltung'ana pooki aajo, “Esai, Esai,” eilepie nkaik enye; neirrug ninche ilukuny enye neserem Olaitoriani eitabaiki nkomomi enye enkop." 
Nehemiah8:7 Ore sii Yoshua o Bani o Sherebia o Yamin, o Akub, o Shabetai, o Hodia, o Maaseia, o Kelita, o Asariaf, o Yosabad, o Hanan, o Pelaia lelo apolosak neretu iltung'ana aaitoning'u nkitanapat, ina kata etii iltung'ana iwuejitin enye." 
Nehemiah8:8 Neisum ninche ina buku, natii nkitanapat e Nkai, aaibalie, neitobiraki neaku etoning'utuo iltung'ana enkisumata." 
Nehemiah8:9 Ore Nehemia laa ninye apa olbalusui, o Esra ilo apolosani naa olaigeroni, o Lawi laa ninche ooiteng'en iltung'ana, nejoki iltung'ana pooki, “Ore ena olong naa aisinyati to Laitoriani Enkai inyi; emisinanuo niminchirishiri.” Amu eishira apa iltung'ana pooki ina kata pee ening irorei loo nkitanapat." 
Nehemiah8:10 Neitoki ninye ajoki ninche, “Enchom iwuejitin, enosa ntokitin naapir, niokioko enaisho oo sabibu namelok nirriwakiki erubata ilo leitu eitobirakini toki, amu ore ena olong naa aisinyati to laitoriani, nimisinanuonuo ntae, amu enchipai o Laitoriani ninye engolon inyi.”"
