Nehemiah8:11 Kaae neitigir Ilawi iltung'ana pooki, ejo, “Entigirata, amu ore ena olong naa aisinyati; emisinanuo.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Nepuo iltung'ana pooki iwuejitin enye aadaa neokisho, neirriwaa irubat, neitobir osirua kitok le nchipai, amu etoning'utuo ninche lelo rorei ooibalakinyeki ninche." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ore te nkolong e are, ore ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, too ltung'ana pooki, tenebo ilapolosak o Lawi, nepuonu tenebo enetii Esra ilo aigeroni pee etum aaiteng'enuoto irorei loo nkitanapat." 
Nehemiah8:14 Netum ninche eigeroki tiatua nkitanapat nchere, eitanapa apa Olaitoriani Musa pee etoni iltung'ana too lng'oborri to sirua to lapa liopishana," 
Nehemiah8:15 neji pee elimuni aaibalie too nkang'itie enye pooki o te Yerusalem, entejo, “Empang'a enchom ndoinyo niyauu ilng'osil lo loirien, oloirien le ntim olng'osil o ltuka, okulikae keek eeta mbenek pee eitainyeki ilng'oborri, anaa enaingeroki.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Neaku eshomo iltung'ana neyau ninche, neitobiraki ate ilng'oborri ore ake oltung'ani neitushur olng'obor lenye, o lgoriet lenye, o lgorieti le nkaji e Nkai, o lkurroto otii kishomi e Nkare, o lkurroto otii kishomi e Efraim." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ore ina umata pooki e lelo apa ootorrinyunye te yararoto neitobir ilng'oborri nebik too lng'oborri amu ore ebaiki nkolong'i e Yoshua olayioni le Nuni ometabaiki ina olong eitu aekata eas iltung'ana le Israel ina. Netii apa enchipai sapuk. 
Nehemiah8:18 Ore too nkolong'i pooki, ebaiki enkolong e dukuya o metabaiki enkolong nabayie, neisum ninye ina buku oo nkitanapat e Nkai. Neibung ninche osirua nkolong'i naapishana; ore te nkolong e isiet neibung'i eumata nasinya, terisioroto eina kiguana." 
Nehemiah9:1 Ore apa te nkolong e tikitam o ong'uan ele apa, neiturrurro iltung'ana le Israel te eenata empukoroto neishop ilkuniyiani, nepik enterit ilukuny enye." 
Nehemiah9:2 Nekepu ate iltung'ana le Israel aalam iltung'ana leeiking'a, neitashe aaibalie ing'ok enye o entorroni oo loo menye." 
Nehemiah9:3 Neitashe ninche te wueji enye neisum embuku oo nkitanapat o Laitoriani Enkai enye te nkolong e ong'uan: ore tiae rishata e ong'uan nelimu ninche aaibalie ing'ok enye, neserem Olaitoriani Enkai enye." 
Nehemiah9:4 Ore too nkedeta oo Lawi neitashe Yeshua o Bani, o Kadmeil, o Shebania o Buni, o Sherebia, o Bani, o Kenani; nebuaku ninche aaishiraki Olaitoriani Enkai enye." 
Nehemiah9:5 Neitoki Ilawi, o Yeshua, o Kadmiek, o Bani, o Hashabneia, o Sherebia, o Hodia, o Shebania, o Petahia aajo, “Entasho esisa Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, ntarasi o ntarasi. Meisisi enkarna ino kitok neyanyiti oleng too mayianat o te nkisisa.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Nejo Esra: “Iyie Olaitoriani, iyie ake openy; iyie oitayio keper, o lororani pooki le keper, enkop o pooki naatii oriong enkop; naaiposha o pooki naatii atua ninche, igolie iyie ninche pooki; naa iyie eserem olorora pooki le shumata." 
Nehemiah9:7 Iyie Olaitoriani, ina Ai nategelua Abraham niyau ninye aitupuku te Uri, oo Lkaldayo ninchoo ninye enkarna ajo Abraham;" 
Nehemiah9:8 nidol iyie ajo keisiligayu oltau lenye te dukuya iyie, nintobir iyie o ninye osotua lo lning'o pee incho eishoi enye enkop oo Lkanaan; o enoo Ihiti, o ene Amori, o enoo Lperisi, o enoo Lyebusi, o enoo Lgirshi, nintabayie iyie ina kisiligata ino, amu ira iyie asipani." 
Nehemiah9:9 Nitoduaa apa iyie osina loo loo papa lang te Misiri nining enkomono enye te Enaiposha Nanyokie. 
Nehemiah9:10 Niaas iyie nkitoduaat o mbaa e nking'asia agilunore Farao o sinkan lenyena pooki o ltung'ana pooki le nkop enye. Amu iyiolo iyie ajo etaasa apa ninche mbaa e nkinyala too loo papa, nintobiraki iyie kewan enkarna, anaa enatiu taata." 
Nehemiah9:11 Ni tirisha iyie enaiposha te dukuya ninche, neaku eshomo ninche aaim empolos e naiposha te nkop natoyio; ninturraa iyie lelo oomirta ninche anang'aki enguton, anaa osoit onang'akini enkare, kitok." 
Nehemiah9:12 Ore te ng'ape e nkatampoi nirikoo iyie ninche dama, ore te ng'ape e nkima nirikoo ninche te nkewarie, pee ilang'ilang'aki ninche ina oitoi naaim." 
Nehemiah9:13 Itadowuo apa iyie alotu enchumata o ldoinyo le Sinai, nirorie ninche itii keper nincho ninche nkikoot sidain o nkitanapat naasipa, o nkiguanat supati." 
Nehemiah9:14 Nintayiolo iyie ninche sabato ino sinyati nintanap ninche nkitanapat o nkikoot o enkitanapata aimunye Musa osinka lino. 
Nehemiah9:15 Nchoo iyie ninche imukateni naaing'uaa keper tenkaraki esumash enye, niyaki ninche enkare naing'uaa endapidapoi te nkaraki enkure enye. Nijoki iyie ninche meshomo aaya ina kop apa ninosie olmumai pee incho ninche." 
Nehemiah9:16 Kake ore ninche o loo papa netaasa mbaa olwuasa neitagol ilukuny enye, neitu eiruk nkitanapat." 
Nehemiah9:17 Etanyaita ninche ening, neitu eshilaa nena baa e nking'asia apa nitaasa tiatua ninche. Kake eitagolo ninche ilukuny enye negelu olarikoni pee errinyo aapuo esinkaisho enye te Misiri. Kake ira iyie Enkai nasioki apalaki, osupat, neeta olng'ur, nemesioki agoro nebik te nyorrata nauno neitu iyie inturaa ninche." 
Nehemiah9:18 Ore doi ninye apa pee eitobiraki ate olashe le sahabu nashola nejo, ‘Ena ninye Enkai inyi apa nayaua intae ailepunye te Misiri,’ neas mbaa kituaak e morore." 
Nehemiah9:19 Ore iyie to lng'ur lino kitok, neitu inturraa ninche tiong'ota. Ore ina ng'ape e nkatampoi apa natorikoyie ninche te nkoitoi, neitu elo aing'uaa ninche te ndama, neitu elo eng'ape e nkima aing'uaa ninche te nkewarie, pee eitawang enkoitoi enye napuo aaim ninche." 
Nehemiah9:20 Nchoo iyie Enkiyang'et supat meiteng'ena ninche, neitu iyie mbooyo mana ino amitiki ninche einos. Nincho ninche enkare te nkaraki enkure enye." 
Nehemiah9:21 Ilarin artam iyie ntotio ninche tiong'ota, neitu elau toki neitu emuta nkilani enye neitu ejeyu nkejek enye." 
Nehemiah9:22 Ninchoo iyie ninche nkitoriat oo loreren nioriki iyie ninche pooki shoto. Neaku ewaita ninche ina kop e Sihon olaiguanani le Heshbon o enkop e Oog olaiguanani le Bashan," 
Nehemiah9:23 Itoponayie iyie eishoi enye aitaba anaa ilakir le keper, nitorikuo ninche atua ina kop apa nitolikio loo menye pee ejing aamany." 
Nehemiah9:24 Metaa eshomo ina ishoi enye aaya ina kop, nipik iyie lelo oomanya ina kop abori enkitoria enye, lelo Kanaani, ninchooyo ninche apik nkaik enye, tenebo ilaiguanak lenye o ltung'ana leina kop. Pee etum aaitaasa ninche anaa enayieu." 
Nehemiah9:25 Neibung ninche nena anas enye naasheta sunta o enkop sidai. Neya nkajijik naabore ntokitin sidain, o lchorroi ooturo, o nkurman oo sabibu, o loirienito o lkeek loo lng'anayio kumok, neinos ninche neraposho nepiru neshipayu ninche te supatisho ino." 
Nehemiah9:26 Ore ake eyia eisero ninche nikigolong'aki iyie, nenang'aa nkitanapat inono aainyaaya oriong, near iloibonok linono metuata. Laa ninche apa ooikoo ejo pee errinyu ninche enitii, neas ninche mbaa sapuki e morore." 
Nehemiah9:27 Ore enkaraki ina inchooyie iyie ninche apik nkaik oo lmang'ati lenye, ooisilisilo ninche, ore teina kata enye o sina, kinchirakitia ninche iyie, nining iyie ninche itii keper. Ore te risioroto o lng'ur lino kitok ninchoo iyie ninche olaitajeunoni oitajeu ninche aitayu te nkaina oo lmang'ati lenye." 
Nehemiah9:28 Kake ore eidipa ninche aayagie neitoki ninche aas entorroni too nkonyek inono, nintoki iyie aiturraa ninche apik nkaik oo lmang'ati lenye, pee atum aaitoria ninche. Kake ore ake eyia teneibelekenya ninche nikinchiraki iyie, nining iyie ninche itii shumata, naa katitin kumok itokordua iyie ninche te risioroto olng'ur lino." 
Nehemiah9:29 Inkoo apa iyie ninche ijo pee itum atorrinyoki ninche nkitanapat inono. Kake etawuasate apa ninche, neitu eibung nkitanapat inono, kake etaasa ninche eng'oki too nkiguanat inono, naa ninche eishuyie oltung'ani teneibung, neisho ninche oriong, neitagol ilukuny enye, neany ening." 
Nehemiah9:30 Too larin kumok iting'iriakine iyie ninche, ninkok ninche te Nkiyang'et ino, iimunye iloibonok linono; ore ake eyia eitu ninche ening. Ore enkaraki ina inchooyie iyie ninche apik nkaik oo loreren." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ore ake eyia te nkaraki olng'ur lino kitok eitu iyie iishie ninche anaa inturraa ninche; amu ira Enkai supat naata olng'ur. 
Nehemiah9:32 Ore naa taata na Ai ang, Enkai kitok magilani naitureisho, naibung o sotua o enyorrata nauno, mincho kuna golikinot naaetuo shumata iyiook elioyu aa kutiti te iyie o shumata ilaiguanak lang, o lkituaak lang, o lapolosak lang, o loibonok lang, o loo papa, o shumata iltung'ana linono pooki ebaiki enkata oo laiguanak le Siria, o metabaiki ena olong eaku entoki kiti te iyie." 
Nehemiah9:33 Ore ake eyia itaa iyie asipani te nena pooki naaetuo shumata iyiook, amu itaasishe iyie te sipata nikitaasishote iyiook te ntorroni." 
Nehemiah9:34 Ore ilaiguanak lang, o lkituaak lang, o lapolosak lang, o loo papa, neitu eibung nkitanapat inono, o nkikoot inono ninchoo iyie ninche." 
Nehemiah9:35 Eitu ninche kisiaai iyie te nkitoria enye, naa ore te supatisho ino kitok ninchoo iyie ninche, o te nkop sidai nalala nitipika iyie dukuya ninche, neitu ninche errinyunye aaing'uaa isiaaitin enye torrok." 
Nehemiah9:36 Ng'ura kira iyiook irrindiki ena olong; tiatua ena kop apa ninchoo loo papa pee eshipakino ilng'anayio lenyena o nkishorot enyena sidain, ng'ura, kira iyiook irrindiki." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ore ilng'anayio lenyena neinos lelo aiguanak apa litipika shumata iyiook tenkaraki ingok ang; eeta ake sii lelo aiguanak engolon naitoreyie iseseni lang, o nkishu ang, pee eitaas anaa enayieu, nikitii iyiook osina kitok.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Ore enkaraki kuna pooki, aikintobir iyiook olning'o lo sotua niking'er. Ore ilkituaak lang, o lawi lang, o lapolosak lang, nepik ilmishiren lenye." 
Nehemiah10:1 Ore apa lelo ootipika olmishire lenye naa Nehemia ilo balusui, olayioni le Hekalia, o Sedekia," 
Nehemiah10:2 o Seraia, o Asaria o Yeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 o Pashur, o Amaria o Malkija," 
Nehemiah10:4 o Hatush, o Shebania, o Maluk, o" 
Nehemiah10:5 Harim, o Meremot, o Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 o Daniel, o Gineton, o Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:6 o Daniel, o Gineton, o Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:7 o Meshulam, o Abijia, o Mijomin," 
Nehemiah10:8 o Maasia, o Bilgai, o Shemaia. Kulo apa ninche ilapolosak." 
Nehemiah10:9 Ore Ilawi naa: Yoshua olayioni le Asania, o Binui loo layiok le Henadad, o Kadimiel," 
Nehemiah10:10 o lalashera lenye, o Shebania, o Hodia, o Kelita, o Pelaia, o Hanan," 
Nehemiah10:11 o Mika, o Rehob, o Hashabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 o Sakur, o Sherebia o Shebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 o Hodia, o Bani, o Bininu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Ore ilaiguanak loo iltung'ana naa Parosh, o Pahatmoab, o Elam, o Satu, o Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 o Buni, o Asgad, o Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 o Adonija, o Bigfai, o Adin," 
Nehemiah10:17 o Ater, o Hesekia, o Asur," 
Nehemiah10:18 o Hodia, o Hashum, o Besai," 
Nehemiah10:19 o Harif, o Anatot, o Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 o Magpiash, o Meshulam, o Hesir," 
Nehemiah10:21 o Meshesapel o Sadok, o Yadua" 
Nehemiah10:22 o Pelatia, o Hanan, o Hanaia, o" 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoshea, o Hanania, o Hashub," 
Nehemiah10:24 o Halohesh, o Pilha, o Shobek," 
Nehemiah10:25 o Rehum, o Hashabana, o Maaseia," 
Nehemiah10:26 o Ahia, o Hanan, o Anan," 
Nehemiah10:27 o Maluk, o Harim o Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Ore ilkulikae tung'ana, ilapolosak, o Lawi, o larripok le kishomi, o laranyak, o laisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai, o lelo pooki ooitekeputua ate aaitalam iloreren le nena kuapi, aaibelekenyakino nkitanapat e Nkai, tenebo inkituaak enye, o layiok lenye, o ntoyie enye, lelo pooki oata engeno o eyiolounoto," 
Nehemiah10:29 neibung'are ilalashera lenye, o lkituaak lenye, nejing ninche oldeket, o lmumai pee eibung nkitanapat e Nkai apa naaishoruaki aaimunye Musa osinka le Nkai. Pee esipu neas nkitanapat pooki o Laitoriani, Olaitoriani lang, o nkikoot enyena o nkiguanat enyena." 
Nehemiah10:30 Mikincho iyiook ntoyie ang meyama iltung'ana lena kop, nimikiyamaki iyook ilayiok lang ntoyie enye:" 
Nehemiah10:31 naa teneyau iltung'ana lena kop ntokitin naamiri o entapa e pooki pukunoto te nkolong e sabato pee emir, nimikinyiang'u iyiook te ninche, te nkolong e sabato anaa te nkolong sinyati; nimikitur iyiook nkurman to lari liopishana, nikipalaa pooki sile." 
Nehemiah10:32 Kinteleikitia sii ate olola pee kintalak ate te pooki ari erubata e uni e shekeli te nkaraki enkisiaayiare e nkaji e Nkai. 
Nehemiah10:33 Te nkaraki emukate e nkitoduaaroto, o lasar le ntapa le anaake, o lasar opejori le anaake, o sabatoni, o lapaitin ng'ejuko, o siruai gelunot, o ntokitin sinyat, o lasarri le ng'oki ooitobirieki olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki Isirael, o te nkaraki esiaai pooki e Nkai ang." 
Nehemiah10:34 Kitoosho sii enkukuo, ilapolosak, o Lawi, o ltung'ana, te nkaraki nkiri olasar loo lkeek, pee eyauni atua enkaji e Nkai ang, te risioroto oo nkajijik oo loo papa, too nkatitin naategeluaki, te pooki ari. Pee einoki te nchumata o lperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani Enkai ang anaa enaigero too nkitanapat." 
Nehemiah10:35 Kitudung'okitio iyiook ate, pee kiyau ilng'anayio le dukuya te nkop ang, o lng'anayio le dukuya le pooki shani, te pooki ake ari, enkaji o Laitoriani." 
Nehemiah10:36 Nikiyau sii atua enkaji e Nkai ang, aayaki lelo apolosak ooisiaaisho tiatua enkaji e Nkai ang, ilkikaunot lang o lkikaunot loo nkishu ang, anaa enaigero too nkitanapat, o lkikaunot loo nkishu ang o loo ntare ang." 
Nehemiah10:37 Nikiyaki sii ilapolosak ina tapa ang e dukuya e nkisampuare, o nkishorot ang, o lng'anayio le pooki shani o enaisho oo sabibu o eilata nikiya ilgilat le nkaji e Nkai ang, nikiyaki Ilawi ematua e tomon naing'uaa nkurman ang, amu Ilawi oosotu imatuan e tomon, too nkang'itie ang pooki." 
Nehemiah10:38 Ore olapolosani olayioni le Aron, naa keetii tenebo Ilawi ina kata nang'amu imatuan e tomon neyau Ilawi ematua e tomon oo matuan e tomon e nkaji e Nkai ang nepik ilgilat o mpechen." 
Nehemiah10:39 Amu keyau iltung'ana le Israel o layiok le Lawi nkishorot e ntapa, o enaisho oo sabibu, o eilata atua lelo gilat, ine netii imasaa e wueji sinyati, o lapolosak ooisiaaisho o larripok le kishomi o laranyak. Mikipalaa iyiook enkaji e Nkai ang." 
Nehemiah11:1 Ore apa ilarikok loo ltung'ana netoni te Yerusalem; ore ilkulikae tung'ana, neosh enkukuo, pee eyau oltung'ani obo te tomon meeu amany Yerusalem ina anasa sinyati, nebik lelo ooudo te kulie ang'itie." 
Nehemiah11:2 Nemayian apa iltung'ana lelo pooki ootonyorraitie aatoni te Yerusalem. 
Nehemiah11:3 Kulo apa ilkituaak loo lkerenketi ootamanya Yerusalem; kake ore too nkang'itie e Yuda, etii ake pooki ng'ae enkang enye neton tiatua imasaa enyena: ile Israel, o lapolosak, o Lawi, o laisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai, o le ishoi o laisiaayiak le Solomon." 
Nehemiah11:4 Netii apa Yerusalem embata oo layiok le Yuda o layiok le Benchamen. Ore too layiok le Yuda naa Ataia olayioni le Usia, olayioni le Sekaria, olayioni le Amaria, olayioni le Shefatia, olayioni le Mahalalel, loo layiok le Peres:" 
Nehemiah11:5 o Maaseia olayioni le Baruk olayioni le Kolhose olayioni le Hasaia, olayioni le Aidaya, olayioni le Yairib, olayioni le Sakaria, olayioni le Shilonit." 
Nehemiah11:6 Ore ilayiok pooki le Peres apa oomanya Yerusalem naa iip ong'uan o ntomoni ile o isiet, iltung'ana yiolot oopi." 
Nehemiah11:7 Naa kulo ilayiok le Benchamen: Salu olayioni le Meshulam, olayioni le Yoed, olayioni le Pedaia, olayioni le Kolaia, olayioni le Maaseia, olayioni le Itiel, olayioni le Yeshai." 
Nehemiah11:8 Nesujaki ninye Gebai, o Saalai, iltung'ana iip naaudo o tikitam o isiet." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoel olayioni le Sikri apa olaitasheikinoni lenye, naa Yuda olayioni le Hasenua oliare te nkitoria ena anasa." 
Nehemiah11:10 Ore too lapolosak naa: Yedaia olayioni le Yairib, o Yakin," 
Nehemiah11:11 o Seraia olayioni le Hilkia, olayioni le Meshulam, olayioni le Sadok, olayioni le Merairiot, olayioni le Ahitab, olaitasheikinoni le nkaji e Nkai," 
Nehemiah11:12 ore ilalashera lenye oaas esiaai eina aji naa, iip isiet o tikitam o are; ore Adai olayioni le Yeroham, olayioni le Pelalia, olayioni le Amsi, olayioni le Sekaria, olayioni le Pashur, olayioni le Malkija," 
Nehemiah11:13 o lalashera lenyena, nena lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye naa iip are o artam o are; o Amashai, olayioni le Asarel, olayioni le Asai, olayioni le Meshilemot, olayioni le Imer," 
Nehemiah11:14 o lalashera lenye, lelo tung'ana magil yiolot, iip o tikitam o isiet; ore olaitasheikinoni lenye naa Sibdiel olayioni le Hagedolin." 
Nehemiah11:15 Ore too Lawi: naa Shemaia olayioni le Hashub, olayioni le Asrikam, olayioni le Hashabia, olayioni le Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 o Shabetai o Yasabad, loo lkituaak loo lawi laa ninche apa ooitasheiki esiaai e oriong e nkaji e Nkai;" 
Nehemiah11:17 o Matania olayioni le Mika olayioni le Sabdi, olayioni le Asaf, laa ninye oiterua enkishoroto e nashe te nkomono, o Bakukia laa ninye oliare too lalashera lenyena; o Abda olayioni le Shamaua, olayioni le Falal, olayioni le Yedutum." 
Nehemiah11:18 Ore Ilawi pooki teina anasa sinyati naa iip are o ntomoni isiet o ong'uan. 
Nehemiah11:19 Ore ilarripok le kishomi naa: Akub, o Talmon o lalashera lenye, laa ninche apa oorrip nchomito, naa iip nabo o ntomoni napishana o are." 
Nehemiah11:20 Ore ilkulikae Siraeli, o lapolosak o Lawi netii nkang'itie e Yuda, etii ake oltung'ani enjung'ore enye." 
Nehemiah11:21 Kake ore ilaisiaayiak le Nkaji e Nkai nemanya Ofel; naa Siha, o Gispa apa ooitasheiki ilaisiaayiak le nkaji e Nkai." 
Nehemiah11:22 Ore apa olaitasheikinoni loo Lawi te Yerusalem naa Usi olayioni le Bani, Olayioni le Hashabia, olayioni le Matania, olayioni le Mika loo layiok le Asaf, lelo aranyak, ooitasheiki esiaai e nkaji e Nkai." 
Nehemiah11:23 Amu etii apa enkitanapata naing'uaa olaiguanani naipirta ninche, o enkitobirata oo laranyak anaa enaiyieuni te pooki olong." 
Nehemiah11:24 Naa Petahia olayioni le Meshesabel, loo layiok le Sera olayioni le Yuda, ninye apa olaretoni lo laiguanani too mbaa pooki naaipirta iltung'ana." 
Nehemiah11:25 Ore tialo nkang'itie, etamanya apa embata oo ltung'ana le Yuda Kiriat-arba, o nkang'itie enyena, o Dibon o nkang'itie enyena o Yekabseel o nkang'itie enyena, o" 
Nehemiah11:26 Yeshua, o Molada, o Betber Betpeler, o" 
Nehemiah11:27 Harshulal, o Beer-sheba o nkang'itie enyena," 
Nehemiah11:28 o Siklag, o Mekona, o nkang'itie enyena," 
Nehemiah11:29 o Enrimon o Sora o Yemut," 
Nehemiah11:30 o Sanoa, o Adulam nkang'itie enyena, o Lakish o nkong'at enyena, a Aseka o nkong'at enyena. Neaku etipika apa ninche ilng'oborri ebaiki Beer-sheba o metabaiki oerata le Hinom." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ore sii ninche iltung'ana le Benchamen nemany ebaiki Geba neito idia alo, te mbata e Mikmash, o Aija, o Betel o nkang'itie enyena," 
Nehemiah11:32 o Anotot, o Noab, o Anania, o" 
Nehemiah11:33 Hasor, o Rama, o Gitaim," 
Nehemiah11:34 o Hadid, o Seboim, o Nebalot," 
Nehemiah11:35 o Lod, o Ono, ilo erata loo laguatak." 
Nehemiah11:36 Ore ilkulikae turrurri loo Lawi te Yuda neshulare Benchamen. 
Nehemiah12:1 Kulo ninche ilapolosak o Lawi apa ooetuo tenebo Serubabel olayioni le Shealtiel, o Yeshua: o Seraia o Yeremia o Esra," 
Nehemiah12:2 o Amaria, o Maluk, o Hatush," 
Nehemiah12:3 o Shekemia, o Rehum, o Meremot," 
Nehemiah12:4 o Ido, o Ginetoi, o Abija," 
Nehemiah12:5 o Mijamin, o Maadia, o Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 o Shemia, o Yoiarib, o Yedaia," 
Nehemiah12:7 o Sulu, o Amok, o Hilkia o Yedaia. Kulo ninche apa ilkituaak loo lapolosak o lalashera lenye too nkolong'i e Yeshua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Ore too Lawi; naa Yeshua o Binui o Kadmiel, o Sherebia, o Yuda, o Matania, laa ore tenebo ilalashera lenyena, naa ninye oitasheiki isinkolioitin le nkishooroto e nashe." 
Nehemiah12:9 O Bakbukia, o Uno, neitashe ilalashera lenye aaipirakinore ninche te nkisiaayiare." 
Nehemiah12:10 Naa Yeshua apa menye le Yoiakim, naa Yoiakim menye le Eliashib naa Elishiab menye le Yoiada," 
Nehemiah12:11 naa Yoiada menye le Yonatan, naa Yonatan menye le Yadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Ore apa too nkolong'i e Yoiakim, netii ilapolosak oora lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye: te Seraia, o te Meraia, o te Yeremia, o te Hanania;" 
Nehemiah12:13 ore te Esra naa Meshulam; ore te Amaria naa Yehohanan; 
Nehemiah12:14 ore te Maluki naa Yonatan; ore te Shebania naa Yosef: 
Nehemiah12:15 ore te Harm naa Adna; ore te Merariot naa Helkai; 
Nehemiah12:16 ore te Ido naa Sekaria; ore te Gineton naa Meshulam; 
Nehemiah12:17 ore te Abija naa Sikri; ore te Miniamin o te Moadia naa Piltai; 
Nehemiah12:18 ore te Bilga, naa Shamua; ore te Shemaia naa Yehonatan," 
Nehemiah12:19 ore Yoiarib naa Matenai; ore te Yedaia naa Usi," 
Nehemiah12:20 ore te Salai naa Kalai; ore te Amok naa Eber," 
Nehemiah12:21 ore te Hilkia naa Hashabia; ore te Yedaia, naa Natanel." 
Nehemiah12:22 Ore too Lawi, apa too nkolong'i e Eliashib, o Yoiada o Yohanan o Yadua, kulo apa eigeroki metaa lukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye; naa lapolosak sii o metabaiki enkitoria e Darias le Parsia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Ore ilayiok le Lawi, ilukuny oo nkajijik oo loo menye, neigeroki te mbuku oo ntepen, o metabaiki nkolong'i e Yohanan olayioni le Eliashib." 
Nehemiah12:24 Ore ilkituaak loo Lawi naa: Hashabia, o Sherabia, o Yeshua olayioni le Kadmiel tenebo ilalashera lenye ooipirakinore ninche, pee eisis Enkai neishooyo enashe, te risioroto e nkitanapata e Daudi ilo tung'ani le Nkai pee easi aairukokino." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matahia apa, o Bakbukia, o Obadia, o Meshulam, o Talmon, o Akub ninche ilarripok le kishomi ooitashe aarrip nkajijik naashumishoreki o nchomito." 
Nehemiah12:26 Ore apa kuna baa naa too nkolong'i e Yoaikim olayioni le Yeshua olayioni le Yosadak, o too nkolong'i e Nehemia ilo balusui o Esra ilo apolosani naa olasirani." 
Nehemiah12:27 Ore teina kitisinyata e suntai e Yerusalem, neyauni Ilawi too wuejitin pooki meetu Yerusalem aaraposhoki ina kitisinyata te nchipai, o te nkishooroto e nashe o te ranyata e oshoto oo nkinantani, o enkawuo oo sinkolioitin, o lwululi loo usin." 
Nehemiah12:28 Ore nkera e lelo aranyak, neiturrurro too manyishoritin enye naamanita Yerusalem, o too nkang'itie e Netofati;" 
Nehemiah12:29 neiturrurro sii te Bet-gilgal o te nkop e Geba o Asmafet; amu eteshetakita apa ate ilaranyak nkang'itie aaitaman Yerusalem. 
Nehemiah12:30 Ore ilapolosak o Lawi neitisiny ate; neitisiny olorere, o nchomito o esuntai." 
Nehemiah12:31 Naitoki nanu aiturrurru ilkituaak le Yuda te nchumata eina suntai, nagelu ilturrurri oare sapuki ooishooyo enashe nepuo ninche too lkererin. Nelo olturrur obo enkalo e tatene teina suntai ometabaiki kishomi e modioi;" 
Nehemiah12:32 nesuju ninche Hoshaia, o lpisiaai le lelo kituaak le Yuda," 
Nehemiah12:33 o Asaria, o Esra, o Meshulam," 
Nehemiah12:34 o Yuda, o Benchamen, o Shemaia, o Yeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 o kulikae ayiok loo lapolosak oata ntarumpetani: Sekaria olayioni le Yonatan, olayioni le Shemaia, olayioni le Matamia, olayioni le Mikaia, olayioni le Sakur, olayioni le Asaf;" 
Nehemiah12:36 o ltung'ana lenye, Shemaia, o Asarel, o Milalai, o Gilalai, o Maai, o Natanel, o Yuda, o Hanani, eeta nkinantani oo sinkolioitin e Daudi ilo tung'ani le Nkai. Ore Esra ilo aigeroni nelo te dukuya ninche." 
Nehemiah12:37 Ore te kishomi e nchorro, neitoriori ninche aapuo te dukuya ninche aaim nkedeta e nkanasa e Daudi, te wueji neilepakinyeki esuntai, te shumata enkaji e Daudi; aapuo enkishomi e Nkare te nkalo o loosaen." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ore olikae turrur le lelo ooishooyo enashe, nepuo enkalo e kedienye, nasujaa nanu ninche tenebo olpisiaai le lelo tung'ana ootii enchumata e suntai, te nchumata o ltalet le wueji nepejishoreki, o metabaiki esuntai nalala," 
Nehemiah12:39 o metabaiki kishomi e Efraim, o embata e kishomi musana, o embata e kishomi o sinkirri o ltalet le Hananel, o ltalet le iip o metabaiki kishomi oo nkerra. Nepuonu ninche aaitashe te kishomi oo larripok." 
Nehemiah12:40 Metaa ore lelo turrurri pokira oare le lelo ooishooyo enashe neitashe tiatua enkaji e Nkai; ore nanu o lpisiaai loo nkituaak tenebo nanu; 
Nehemiah12:41 o lapolosak, Eliakim o Maaseia, o Miniamin, o Makaia, o Elioenai, o Sekaria, o Hanania, eeta ntarumpetani;" 
Nehemiah12:42 o Maaseia, o Shemaia, o Eleasa, o Eusi, o Yehoahanan, o Malkija, o Elam, o Eser. Neranyisho ilaranyak erikoo Yesrahia." 
Nehemiah12:43 Neitayu ninche ilasarri sapuki ina olong, neshipayu amu Enkai naitishipa ninche te ng'ida sapuk; neshipa sii nkituaak o nkera. Nening'ori enchipai e Yerusalem tenelakua oleng." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ore apa teina olong negeluni iltung'ana ooitasheiki ilgilat ooshumishoreki, oopiki nkishorunot, o lelo ng'anayio le dukuya, o matuan e tomon, pee eiturrurri tiatua nena ajijik nena rubat pooki naaishiaakino too nkitanapat te nkaraki ilapolosak o Lawi, te risioroto oo nkurman e nena ang'itie; amu etishipe apa Yuda te nkaraki lelo apolosak o Lawi oisiaaishote." 
Nehemiah12:45 Etaasa apa ninche esiaai e Nkai enye o esiaa nkitisinyata anaa enataasa ilaranyak o larripok le kishomi, te risioroto e nkitanapata e Daudi o layioni lenye Solomon." 
Nehemiah12:46 Amu ore apa too nkolong'i e Daudi o Asaf, tiapa, neetae olkitok loo laranyak, neetae isinkolioitin le nkisisa o enkishooroto e nashe te Nkai." 
Nehemiah12:47 Ore Israel pooki too nkolong'i e Serubabel o too nkolong'i e Nehemia, neisho erubata e anaake lelo aranyak, o larripok le kishomi; neiteng'el ninche ina rubata oo Lawi; neiteng'el ile Lawi ina rubata oo layiok le Aron." 
Nehemiah13:1 Ore apa teina olong neisuma ninche embuku e Musa aaitoning olorere; netumi eigero teina buku nchere meetae Olamori aashu Olmoabui ojing ae kata eumata e Nkai; 
Nehemiah13:2 amu eitu apa ninche enang'are nkera e Israel aaisho endaa o enkare, kake eishoo ninche Balaam mpisai metigilunore ninche nedek ninche - ore ake eyia eibelekenya Olaitoriani oldeket aitaa emayianata." 
Nehemiah13:3 Ore ake pee ening' iltung'ana ina kitanapata, nekepaa ninche aaitung'uaa Israel lelo pooki loo loreren." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ore apa eng'or ena, ore Eliashib olapolosani laa ninye etegeluaki meitasheiki ilgilat le nkaji e Nkai ang, laa ninye sii apa oyiolore Tobia," 
Nehemiah13:5 neitobiraki ninye Tobia olgilata olala teine apa netang'asa ninche aapik nkishorot e ntapa, oina orropil, o masaa, o matuan e tomon e ntapa, o enaisho oo sabibu, o eilata, naa ninche apa eishoruaki te nkitanapata meishori Ilawi, o laranyak, o larripok le kishomi, o nkishorot oo lapolosak." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ore apa easayu kuna, nematii nanu Yerusalem, amu ore to lari le tomoni uni oare le nkitoria e Artaserses olaiguanani le Babilon, nashomo nanu enetii olaiguanani. Ore etulusoyie enkiti rishata naomon nanu olaiguanani maaisho mashomo," 
Nehemiah13:7 nalotu nanu Yerusalem, nairrash nanu ina torroni naitaasa Eliashib Tobia, aitobiraki ninye olgilata too lgorieti le nkaji e Nkai." 
Nehemiah13:8 Atagore apa nanu oleng nanang'aa imasaa enkaji e Tobia aitupuku boo. 
Nehemiah13:9 Naitoki nanu aitanapisho neitisinyi ina aji, naitoki nanu arrinyu nena masaa e nkaji e Nkai, tenebo olasar le ntapa o enkorropil." 
Nehemiah13:10 Atayiolo sii ajo eitu eishori Ilawi irubat enye; metaa ore Ilawi o laranyak apa oasisho, neisika ake pooki ng'ae alo enkurma enye." 
Nehemiah13:11 Neaku aisikong'a nanu lelo kituaak najoki, “Kainyoo pee etung'uayioki enkaji e Nkai?” Naiturrur nanu ninche tenebo napik iwuejitin enye." 
Nehemiah13:12 Neya Yuda imatuan e tomon e ntapa, o enaisho oo sabibu, o eilata aaya nena ajijik naashumishoreki." 
Nehemiah13:13 Nagelu nanu metaa ilashumak ooitasheiki nena ajijik naashumishoreki, Shelemia ilo apolosani, o Sadok olaigeroni, o Pedaia loo Lawi, ore olaretoni lenye naa Hanan olayioni le Sakur, olayioni le Matamia, amu ninche apa eisiligaki. Ore apa esiaai enye naa pee eoriki ilalashera lenye ntokitin." 
Nehemiah13:14 Tadamuaki nanu, Enkai, ai, tialo ena, nimijut iyie aiwuang'ie nena kiasin aainei sidain nataasa nanu te nkaraki enkaji e Nkai ai o te nkaraki enkisiaayiare enye." 
Nehemiah13:15 Ore apa te nena olong'i, atoduaa nanu lelo tung'ana te Yuda eironyu enaisho oo sabibu too nkironyata te nkolong e sabato, neyau isotot le ntapa neirotoki ninche isirkon; neyau sii enaisho oo sabibu, o lng'anayio loo sabibu, o lng'abolo, o lolan loo mpukunot pooki ooyautua ninche atua Yerusalem te nkolong e Sabato. Aikoo apa nanu ninche teina olong natimira endaa." 
Nehemiah13:16 Ore sii iltung'ana le Turo apa ootii ina anasa, neya isinkir o ntokitin oo mpukunot pooki naamiri, nemiraki ninche te nkolong e Sabato iltung'ana le Yuda te Yerusalem." 
Nehemiah13:17 Naisikong nanu lelo kituaak le Yuda najoki ninche, “Kainyoo ena bae torrono niaasitata, aaisarkionie enkolong e Sabato?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Ketaasa apa iloo papaai linyi ena, naa keitu eyau Enkai ang ena torroni pooki shumata iyiook o shumata ena anasa? Ore ake eyia, iyauu intae engoro kitok shumata Israel, aaisarkionie Sabato.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Ore ake pee eiteru amisimisu too nchomito e Yerusalem eng'or Sabato, naitanapisho nanu pee eikeni nkutukie oo nkajijik nemeboli ometulusoi Sabato. Napik nanu embata oo sinkan laainei meitasheiki nchomito, pee meetae olola oitijing'uni te nkolong e sabato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Ore lelo ainyiang'ak o lamirak loo mpukunot pooki neirrag auluo Yerusalem enkolong nabo anaa nkolong'i are. 
Nehemiah13:21 Kake aikoo nanu ninche najoki ninche, “Kainyoo intae pee irragirraga tioriong e suntai? Teningiligili aaiko neijia, naibung nanu intae.” Ore ebaiki ina olong neito idia alo eitu ninche eigil aapuonu te nkolong e Sabato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Naitanap nanu Ilawi pee eitisiny ate nepuonu aarrip nchomito, neitaa enkolong e Sabato Sinyati. Tadamuaki sii ena te nkaraki nanu, na Ai ai, nikileku nanu te risioroto e nkitoo e nyorrata ino." 
Nehemiah13:23 Ore sii apa te nena olong'i, atoduaa nanu Ilyahudi ooyama nkituaak e Ashdod, o Amon, o Moab;" 
Nehemiah13:24 ore olpisiaai loo nkera enye neiro enkutuk e Ashdod, nemeidim ninche aairoro enkutuk e Yuda, kake keidim aairoro nkutukie e lelo tung'ana." 
Nehemiah13:25 Nailepilepaki nanu ninche, nadek ninche, naidong kulikae lenye nayiet ilpapit lenye, nainosie ninche olmumai te nkarna e Nkai, ajoki, “Mincho iyie ntoyie inono ilayiok lenye, nimiyaki ilayiok linono ntoyie enye, nimiyamiyama intae maate." 
Nehemiah13:26 Keitu apa eas olaiguanani Solomon eng'oki tenkaraki kuna kituaak? Ore tiatua iloshon kumok meetae olaiguanani otiu anaa ninye, naa kirotet te Nkai enye, neitaa Enkai ninye olaiguanani te shumata Israel pooki; ore ake eyia, etorikokitio nkituaak oo loreren ninye metaasa ing'ok." 
Nehemiah13:27 Eikining naa iyiook intae nikias ena torroni sapuk aagolong'aki Enkai ang, aayam nkituaak oo loreren?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Ore apa obo loo layiok le Yehoiada olayioni le Eliashib, ilo apolosani kitok, naa olaputani le Sanbalat le Horoni; ore enkaraki ina aterewa nanu ninye aitalam kewan." 
Nehemiah13:29 Tadamu ninche, Enkai ai, Amu eisarkionie ninche empolosare o lning'o lo sotua le mpolosare oo lawi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Naitisiny nanu ninche te pooki toki oo loreren, naitobir mbaa naaipirta, isiaaitin oo lapolosak o Lawi, o ltung'ani ake te siaai enye;" 
Nehemiah13:31 naishoru nanu ilkeek oopejorieki olasar, too rishat enye naageluno, o too rishat oo lng'anayio le dukuya. Tadamuaki nanu Enkai ai, te mbae supat." 
Esther1:1 Ore apa too nkolong'i e Serser, Serser laa ninye apa oitore ebaiki India ometabaiki Etiopia, ilkerenketi oobaya iip o tikitam oopishana." 
Esther1:2 Ore te nena olong'i ina kata pee eton olaiguanani Serser to lorika lenye le nkitoo te Susa, naa ninye enkang kitok." 
Esther1:3 Ore to lari liokuni le nkitoria enye neitobiraki osirua ilkituaak lenyena, o sinkan, Netii sii ilkituaak le njore le Parsia o Media o larikok o laiguanak loo lkerenketi dukuya ninye," 
Esther1:4 ina kata eitoduaya enkarsisisho e nkitoo enye e nkisisa, o enkishiaa e nkitoo enye too nkolong'i kumok. Inkolong'i iip o ntomoni isiet." 
Esther1:5 Ore ake pee ebaya nena olong'i, neisho olaiguanani lelo tung'ana pooki ootii Susa, ina ang kitok, ilkituaak o looti osirua too nkolong'i naapishana, ti atua enkaji e ntumo natii atua olgoriet le nkurma e ina manyisho o laiguanani." 
Esther1:6 Netii ilkarash ooibor o lpusi ooika eisiong'are iusin sidain naanyokie olgiso le nkosholai o ng'apeta naashetuno too soito oowang, netii sii ilorikan dapashi le sahabu o enkosholai shumata oleng'oti loo soito oonyokie o loonyori, netii isoito oogol enkinyang'a." 
Esther1:7 Neisho ninche metookisho too nkikompeni e sahabu oo mpukunot kumok, naa eisapuk oleng enaisho oo sabibu anaa enaikununo enkaminino o laiguanani." 
Esther1:8 Ore eokore naa anaa enaitanapishoteki, mearakini hoo ng'ae, amu eitanapishe olaiguanani too lkituaak lenyena pooki ootii enkaji enye e nkitoo nchere nchoo metaasa pooki tung'ani enayieu." 
Esther1:9 Neisho sii Fashiti ina kitok o laiguanani inkituaak o sirua te ina aji e nkitoo o laiguanani Serser. 
Esther1:10 Ore te nkolong' e naapishana, etishipe oltau lo laiguanani te nkaraki enaisho oo sabibu, neitanap ninye Mehuman, o Bista, o Harbona, o Bigta, o Abaguta o Setar o Karkas, lelo sunaishi oogelema oopishana ooisiaisho te dukuya olaiguanani Serser," 
Esther1:11 pee eyau Fashiti dukuya olaiguanani eishopito emaupe enye e nkitoo pee eitodol iltung'ana pooki o lkituaak pooki e nkishiaa enye, amu eisidai apa oleng te nking'urata." 
Esther1:12 Kake etanya apa Fashiti ina kitok o laiguanani, elotu te ina kitanapata o laiguanani anaa enatolimutuo lelo sunaishi oogelema. Neitagor ina olaiguanani oleng, netiu engoro enye anaa enkima nayupuyup ti atua ninye." 
Esther1:13 Nejoki olaiguanani ilang'eni ooyiolo nkatitin, amu ilo apa olkerreti lo laiguanani ti alo lelo pooki arriyiak too nkitanapat o te nkiguana." 
Esther1:14 Ore apa iltung'ana ootashare ninye naa Karshena o Shetar, o Admata, o Tarshish, o Meres, o Marsena, o Memukan, lelo kituaak oopishana le Parsia o Media, ootoduaa enkomom o laiguanani, naa ninche ootang'asa aatoni te nkitoo enye." 
Esther1:15 Nejoki, “Amaa te risioroto oo nkitanapat kaa eitaasi Fashiti amu eitu eas enaitanapa olaiguanani Serser natolikitio lelo sunaishi oogelema?”" 
Esther1:16 Nejoki Memukan te dukuya olaiguanani o lelo kituaak, “Mme ake olaiguanani eitaasa Fashiti entorrono, kake eitaasa sii ilkituaak pooki o ltung'ana pooki ootii iloshon pooki lo laiguanani Serser." 
Esther1:17 Amu ore ena yasata e ina kitok o laiguanani naa keyiolou nkituaak pooki, nemenu ilpayiani lenye, te neimakini aajo eitanapishe olaiguanani Serser ajo meyauni Fashiti dukuya enye, neany elotu." 
Esther1:18 Ore ninye taata ena olong ntomonok e Parsia o Media naaidipa aatoning olkuak le nkitok o laiguanani naa keliki ilkituaak pooki lo laiguanani, neaku sapuk olmena o engoro." 
Esther1:19 Tenaa keitiship ena olaiguanani, nchoo epukunye ninye enkitanapata, neigeri too nkitanapat oo Lpasia o Lmedia pee meibelekenyi, nchere meitoki ae kata Fashiti alotu dukuya Serser, naa nchoo eisho olaiguanani erishata enye e nkitoo esupat alang ninye." 
Esther1:20 Ore ake pee einosuni aaibalunye ina kitanapata o laiguanani ti atua enkitoo enye pooki, aa sapuk anaa enatiu, pee eisho nkituaak enkanyit ilpayiani lenye, lkituaak o looti.”" 
Esther1:21 Neitiship ena utaroto olaiguanani, o lkituaak, neas olaiguanani anaa enatolimuo Memukan." 
Esther1:22 Neirriwaa mpala iloshon pooki le nkitoria enye, olosho ake too lkigeroto lenye o te nkutuk enkiroroto enye, nchere pee eaku olee ake ninye pooki olaitoriani le nkaji enye, neiro te risioroto enkutuk o lorere lenye." 
Esther2:1 Ore te siadi kuna baa, ina kata pee eyagaa engoro o laiguanani Serser, nedamu Fashiti ina nataasa o ina naidipaki aatejo enkaraki ninye." 
Esther2:2 Nejoki isinkan lo laiguanani ooisiaita ninye, “Nchoo meing'orakini olaiguanani ntoyie sidain." 
Esther2:3 Negelu olaiguanani ilaitasheikinok too loshon pooki le nkitoria enye, pee eiturrurru ntoyie pooki sidain meshomo enkaji oo nkituaak te Susa te ina ang kitok netoni ti abori enkirrita e Hegai ilo sunash ogelema lo laiguanani laa ninye olaing'urani loo nkituaak; nchoo meishori ninche iila enye." 
Esther2:4 Ore entito naitiship olaiguanani nchoo eaku ninye enkitok enye te rishata e Fashiti.” Neitiship ina olaiguanani, neiko neijia." 
Esther2:5 Netii apa Olyahudi otii Susa ina ang kitok oji enkarna enye Mordekai, olayioni le Yair, olayioni le Shimei olayioni le Kish Olbenchamini," 
Esther2:6 otarayioki apa te Yerusalem te nebo lelo ootarayioki te nebo Yekonia olaiguanani le Yuda, otaarayie Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon." 
Esther2:7 Neitubulu Hadasa, aa taa Esta, entito o lenkapu lenye amu meeta apa menye aashu ng'otonye. Entito apa ninye sidai naa supat, ore ake pee eye menye o ng'otonye, neya Mordekai netiu anaa enkerai enye keon." 
Esther2:8 Ore ake pee eibulaa enkitanapata o laiguanani, neiturrurri ntoyie kumok te Susa te ina aji naitasheiki Hegai, neyae sii ninye Esta atua enkaji o laiguanani nepiki abori enkirrita e Hegai laa ninye olaing'urani loo nkituaak." 
Esther2:9 Neitiship ina tito ninye nenyorru ninye neisho ninye asioki ntokitin naakusore, o eoroti enye e ndaa, o sinkan naapishana gelunot naaing'ua enkaji o laiguanani, neisho ninye o nena sinkan enyena ewueji sidai te nkaji oo nkituaak." 
Esther2:10 Eitu ninye elimu Esta iltung'ana lenye o lorere lenye amu eitanapa Mordekai pee melimu. 
Esther2:11 Naa ore nkolong'i pooki nelo Mordekai te dukuya ina aji oo nkituaak pee eiyiolou Esta eneikununo, tenaa keserian." 
Esther2:12 Ore ake pee elotu enkata pee elo ake pooki tito enetii Serser, te siadi ilapaitin tomon ti abori nkitanapat oo nkituaak, aa taa ena apa enkata enye naisikarrare, ilapaitin ile te ilata o manemane, o lapaitin ile loo sonkoyoni naarropil oo nkituaak." 
Esther2:13 Ore ake pee elo entito atua ine netii olaiguanani tena oitoi, neishori pooki toki naba anaa enayieu neya eing'uaa enkaji oo nkituaak o meshomo enkaji o laiguanani." 
Esther2:14 Elo ninye teipa, ore tadekenya neshukunye alo olgilata li are te nkaji e Sha-ashgas ilo apa sunash ogelema lo laiguanani oing'or nkapiak; eitu eitoki alo enetii olaiguanani, meteleku te netishipe olaiguanani te ninye naa keipoti te nkarna." 
Esther2:15 Ore pee ebau erishata e Esta entito e Abihail nkapu e Mordekai, oowa apa ninye aitaa entito enye, pee elo atua ine netii olaiguanani, eitu eikilikuanu toki meteleku ake ina natiaaka Hegai, ilo sunash ogelema lo laiguanani laa ninye oitasheiki nkituaak. Neitiship Esta nkonyek e lelo pooki ootodua ninye." 
Esther2:16 Ore ake pee eyae Esta enetii olaiguanani Serser, ti atua enkaji enye e nkitoo to lapa le tomon, laa ninye olapa le Tebes to lari li opishana le nkitoria enye," 
Esther2:17 nenyorru olaiguanani Esta aitalang nkituaak pooki, neitiship Esta nkonyek enyena alang nkulie toyie pooki, neaku etipika emaupe e nkitoria endukuya enye nepik ninye erishata e Fashiti." 
Esther2:18 Neitoki olaiguanani aisho osiriua sapuk ilkituaak lenyena pooki o sinkan; osirua le Esta. Neitoki sii aishoru empalakinoto e kodi too lkerenketi neishori nkishorot te risioroto e nkarsisisho e nkitoria. 
Esther2:19 Ore pee eitokini aiturrur nena toyie eniare, etonita Mordekai te nkishomi o laiguanani." 
Esther2:20 Neitu elimu Esta olmarei lenye arashu iltung'ana lenye, anaa enaitanapa Mordekai; amu kening apa Esta Mordekai ebaiki apa pee eitubulu ninye." 
Esther2:21 Naa ore nena olong'i, anaa enatonita Mordekai te kishomi o laiguanani, negoro oare le lelo sunaishi oogelema lo laiguanani Bigsan o Teres neing'oru eneiko pee epik nkaik enye olaiguanani Serser." 
Esther2:22 Neyiolou Mordekai ina bae, neliki ninye Esta enkitok o laiguanani, neliki Esta olaiguanani te nkarna e Mordekai." 
Esther2:23 Ore ake pee ejurruni ina bae nenyorrikini aajo neijia etiu, neilili lelo tung'ana pokira oare te nchumata olchani. Neigeri nena baa te mbuku oo nkatitin te dukuya olaiguanani." 
Esther3:1 Ore te siadi kuna baa, neilepie olaiguanani Serser Haman le Agag, olayioni le Hamedata, neisho ninye enkitoo nepik olorika lenye shumata ile lelo kituaak ooboitare ninye." 
Esther3:2 Ore laisiaayiak pooki lo laiguanani ootii kishomi neirrugo aaisho Haman enkanyit; amu neijia apa eitanapishe olaiguanani ajo. Kake eitu eirrugo Mordekai arashu aitodolu enkanyit. 
Esther3:3 Nejoki lelo aisiaayiak lo laiguanani ootii kishomi Mordekai, “Kainyoo pee igil enkitanapata o laiguanani?”" 
Esther3:4 Ore pee eirorie ninche ninye anaake neany ening ninche, neliki ninche Haman, ejo pee edol tenaa kepal Mordekai nena, amu etiaaka ninye ninche nchere Olyahudi ninye." 
Esther3:5 Ore pee edol Haman ajo eitu eirrugo Mordekai arashu eitodolu enkanyit negoro oleng. 
Esther3:6 Kake eitu ejo aar Mordekai aa ninye ake. Amu eitayioloki ninye iltung'ana pooki le Mordekai, neing'oru Haman pee ear Ilyahudi pooki, iltung'ana le Mordekai, te nkitoria pooki e Serser." 
Esther3:7 Ore to lapa le dukuya, laa ninye olapa le Nisan, to lari le tomon oare lo laiguanani Serser, neosh ninche Pura nchere enkukuo te dukuya Haman nkolong'i pooki; neosh too lapaitin pooki o metabaiki olapa le tomon oare, laa ninye olapa le Adar." 
Esther3:8 Neitoki Haman ajoki olaiguanani Serser, “Etii iltung'ana moobo ooisardakari aaorikino atua iltung'ana loo loshon pooki le nkitoria ino; ore nkitanapat enye nepaashare inoo lkulikae tung'ana pooki, nemeibung nkitanapat o laiguanani, metaa metumie olaiguanani dupoto te nepalaa ninche." 
Esther3:9 Te neishiaakino to laiguanani nchoo meigeri enkitanapata pee emuti ninche, naa kalak nanu ntalantani nkalifuni tomon oo mpisai apik nkaik e lelo ooitasheiki esiaai o laiguanani pee eyau aapik atua masaa o laiguanani.”" 
Esther3:10 Neitayu olaiguanani olgisoi ashurtu te nkaina enye neisho Haman le Agag ole Hamedata, olmang'atinta loo Lyahudi." 
Esther3:11 Nejoki olaiguanani Haman, “Kinchooki mpisai, o ltung'ana sii, pee intaas ninche anaa enaishiaakino te iyie.”" 
Esther3:12 Neipoti ilaigerok lo laiguanani te nkolong e tomon ookuni o lapa le dukuya, neigeri anaa enaitanapishe Haman neigerokini lelo ang'eni o lelo kituaak ooitasheiki iloshon, o laitasheikinok pooki loo ltung'ana, olosho ake to rorei lenye o ltung'ana te nkutuk enye; neigeroki apa te nkarna e Serser nepiki olmishire te ilo gisoi lo laiguanani." 
Esther3:13 Neirriwari mpala too nkaik e lelo ooirriwari meshomo ilkerenketi pooki lo laiguanani, pee eidaikie, neari metuata, neiwuang'ieki Ilyahudi pooki ooti o lbotoro, inkituaak o nkera, te nkolong nabo, te nkolong e tomon ookuni o lapa le tomon oare, laa ninye olapa le Adar, neya imasaa enye." 
Esther3:14 Naa keirriwari empalai e ilo kigeroto iloshon pooki pee eitanapi metolikini iltung'ana pooki meterretenata te ina olong. 
Esther3:15 Nepuo lelo ooirriwari aaya mpala te nkisarrisar te nkitanapata o laiguanani, neitayuni ina kitanapata te Susa teina ang kitok. Netoni olaiguanani o Haman aaokisho, kake ore ina ang anasa e Susa neaku enking'asia." 
Esther4:1 Ore pee eyiolou Mordekai nena pooki naataasaki, nepolos Mordekai nkilani enyena neishop ilkuniyiani neelare nkuruon, neipang alo empolos e nkanasa, eyietu to ltoilo sapuk o te mion aishir;" 
Esther4:2 nelo ninye o metabaiki dukuya e nkishomi o laiguanani, amu meetae hoo abo oidim atijing'a enkishomi o laiguanani eishopito ilkuniyiani." 
Esther4:3 Ore pooki kerenket otabaikia enkitanapata o laiguanani o nkiguanat enyena, naa eisapuk olkiyioi loo Lyahudi, neen ate aaitupukuo, neyietu aaishir, nepetaa ilkumok lenye ilkuniyiani o nkuruon." 
Esther4:4 Ore ake pee epuo nkaisiaayiak e Esta o lelo sunaishi oogelema aainosaki, neisina oleng ina kitok o laiguanani: Neirriwaa nkilani aishop Mordekai, pee etum aitayu ilkuniyiani, kake menyorraa ang'amaa nena kilani." 
Esther4:5 Neitoki Esta aipot Hatak, obo le lelo sunaishi oogelema lo laiguanani, laa ninye etegeluaki pee eisiaai ninye, neirriwaa ninye meshomo enetii Mordekai pee eyiolou ajo kaa ena naa ae tenkaraki nyoo pee etotiuo neijia." 
Esther4:6 Neipang Hatak alo enetii Mordekai teilo kurroto otumoreki le nkanasa te dukuya enkishomi o laiguanani. 
Esther4:7 Neliki Mordekai nena pooki naataasate, o esiana oo mpisai naatonyorrayie Haman alak apik olchumati lo laiguanani te mutata oo Lyahudi." 
Esther4:8 Neitoki Mordekai aisho emboitati e mpalai e ina kitanapata naitayioki te Susa te nkaraki emutata enye, pee elo aitodol Esta, neinosaki ninye ilomon, neitanap meshomo enetii olaiguanani pee eomon nesai te nkaraki iltung'ana lenyena." 
Esther4:9 Nelo Hatak aliki Esta ina natejo Mordekai. 
Esther4:10 Neitoki Esta airorie Hatak neisho ninye olkilikuai oyaki Mordekai ejo," 
Esther4:11 “Ore laisiaayiak pooki lo laiguanani o ltung'ana loo lkerenketi pooki lo laiguanani neyiolo aajo te nelo olee arashu enkitok ajing'aki olaiguanani ti atua ine netonie eitu eipoti, naa enkitanapata nabo ake natii, ore pooki te risioroto naa keari metuata meteleku ilo oitorioki olaiguanani eng'udi enye e sahabu pee epok. Naa eitu nanu aaipoti maeu atua enetii olaiguanani kuna olong'i tomoni uni.”" 
Esther4:12 Neliki ninche Mordekai ina natejo Esta. 
Esther4:13 Neitoki Mordekai ajoki ninche metushuku ewalata enetii Esta, “Mijo taa ore ti atua enkaji o laiguanani niserian alang ilkulikae Yahudi pooki." 
Esther4:14 Amu te nigira te nkata natiu anaa ena, naa kelotu eretoto o enjeunoto ti ae oitoi, kake ore iyie o enkaji e papaai lino nindaayaya. Naa eing'ae oyiolo tenaa ieuo ena kitoo te nkaraki enkata anaa ena?”" 
Esther4:15 Neitoki Esta ajoki ninche metawaliki Mordekai," 
Esther4:16 “Shomo, inturrurro Ilyahudi pooki ootii Susa nieniene ate aaitupukoo te rishata ai niminyanya endaa arashu iokioko too nkolong'i uni dama o kewarie. Ore nanu o nkaisiaayiak aainei nikien sii iyiook ate aaitupukoo anaa intae. Alo enetii olaiguanani, hoo tenaa kengilata oo nkitanapat ina naa tenaa kaye nanu naye.”" 
Esther4:17 Nelo Mordekai neas pooki toki anaa enaitanapa Esta ninye. 
Esther5:1 Ore te nkolong e uni neishop Esta nkilani enyena e nkitoo neitashe ti atua olgoriet le nkaji o laiguanani, oipirakinore ina aji o laiguanani. Neton olaiguanani to lorika lenye le nkitoo ti atua enkaji e nkitoo aipirakinore kutukaji e nkaji e nkitoo," 
Esther5:2 Ore ake pee edol olaiguanani Esta eitashe to lgoriet, netum ninye Esta omom too nkonyek enyena neitarasaki ninye Esta ina ng'udi e sahabu apa naata te nkaina enye. Nelotu Esta ayiaya neibung endukuya e ina ng'udi." 
Esther5:3 Nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Kainyoo Esta? Kainyoo eomonunoto ino? Eikinchori iyie, o metabaiki olpisiai le nkitoria ai.”" 
Esther5:4 Nejo Esta, “Tenaa keishiaakino to laiguanani, nchoo olaiguanani o Haman epuonu osirua taata laitobiraka nanu olaiguanani." 
Esther5:5 Nejo olaiguanani, Eyau Haman entasieku, pee kitum aataas anaa enayieu Esta.” Nelotu olaiguanani o Haman ilo sirua oitobira Esta." 
Esther5:6 Ore eokito enaisho oo sabibu, nejoki olaiguanani Esta, “Kainyoo olkiyioi lino? Eikinchori iyie. Naa kainyoo eomonunoto ino? Tenaa duoo ninye kolpisiai le nkitoria ai, naa keitabari ake.”" 
Esther5:7 Kake etejo Esta, “Ore enkolat ai o eomonunoto ai naa;" 
Esther5:8 tenaa kanoto nanu omom too nkonyek o laiguanani, naa tenaa keitiship olaiguanani meishoru enkolat neitabaya eomonunoto ai, nchoo olaiguanani o Haman epuonu taisere osirua layooki aitobiraki ninche, ore taisere naas anaa enatejo olaiguanani.”" 
Esther5:9 Neipang Haman ina olong alo eng'ida neshipa to ltau. Kake ore ake pee edol Haman Mordekai te nkishomi o laiguanani, nchere eitu eitashe neitu eikirikira te dukuya ninye neiput engoro te nkaraki Mordekai." 
Esther5:10 Ore ake eyia eibooyie Haman keon, nelo ang, neirriwaa meipoti ilchoreta lenyena o enkitok enye Seresh." 
Esther5:11 Neinosaki Haman ninche esikar o enkarsisisho enye, esiana oo layiok lenyena o enkitoo pooki naishoo ninye olaiguanani o ina nailepieki ninye aaitalang ilkituaak o laisiaayiak lo laiguanani." 
Esther5:12 Neitoki Haman aponaa ajo, “Ore ninye Esta enkitok o laiguanani eitu eisho hoo ng'ae meeu te nebo olaiguanani ilo sirua oitobira ninye meteleku nanu ake. Naa ore sii taisere aaitoomono ninye te nebo olaiguanani." 
Esther5:13 Ore eyia, maaitiship kuna pooki te nadol Mordekai ilo Yahudi eton te nkishomi o laiguanani.”" 
Esther5:14 Nejoki enkitok enye Seresh o lchoreta lenyena pooki, “Nchoo eitayuni olchani ogorishoreki intemat onom enkadoro ore taisere tadekenya niliki olaiguanani pee eiki Mordekai te nchumata e ilo shani. Nijing, iyie osirua lo laiguanani te ng'ida.” Neitiship ina walata Haman, neisho meitobiri olchani ogorishoreki." 
Esther6:1 Ore te ina kewarie neitu eirura olaiguanani; neitanapisho ninye pee eyauni embuku natii mbaa naadamuni, neisumi te dukuya olaiguanani." 
Esther6:2 Netumi eigero ajo etolimuo Mordekai Bigtana o Teres, lelo oare ti atua isunaishi oogelema lo laiguanani, apa oorripito kutuk aji, neyieu sii apa nepik nkaik enye olaiguanani Serser." 
Esther6:3 Nejo olaiguanani, “Amaa kaa anyit anaa kaa kitoo eishooki Mordekai tena bae?” Nejoki ilaisiaayiak lo laiguanani ooisiaita ninye, “Meetae enaitaasaki.”" 
Esther6:4 Nejo olaiguanani, “Aing'ae otii olodung'oro, naa enalotunye Haman atua ilo odung'oro li oriong enkaji o laiguanani, pee etum airorie olaiguanani pee eiki Mordekai te nchumata ilo shani ogorishoreki oitobiraka." 
Esther6:5 Neliki ilaisiaayiak lo laiguanani ninye, ejo, Etii Haman idie, eitashe to lodung'oro.” Nejo olaiguanani, “Enchoo elotu atua aji.”" 
Esther6:6 Nejing'u Haman atua aji, nejoki olaiguanani ninye, “Kaa eitaasi oltung'ani oshipakino olaiguanani pee eyanyit.” Nejo Haman to ltau lenye, Kaing'ae pasa oitishipa olaiguanani pee eyanyit aitalang nanu?" 
Esther6:7 Neitoki Haman ajoki olaiguanani, “Ore oltung'ani oshipakino olaiguanani pee eyanyit" 
Esther6:8 inchoo eyauni nkilani e nkitoo naaidipa olaiguanani aishopo, o ina barta naidipa olaiguanani atakedo, neishopokoki olmarisian le nkitoo endukuya enye;" 
Esther6:9 neishori nena kilani o ina barta eitarasakini obo loo laitasheikinok lo laiguanani oata enkitoo; nchoo ninye eishopoki ilo tung'ani oshipakino olaiguanani pee eyanyit, nerikoo ninye ekedito embarta te nkoitoi sapuk e ina ang, eitayiolo aibalunye te dukuya ninye nchere, neijia eikoni ilo tung'ani oshipakinoolaiguanani pee eyanyit.”" 
Esther6:10 Neitoki olaiguanani ajoki Haman, “Isarisara intayu nena kilani o ina barta, ore anaa enitejo, nintaas ina Mordekai ilo Yahudi otonita te nkishomi o laiguanani. Mintong'or ake nabo te nena duoo nitejo.”" 
Esther6:11 Neitayu Haman inkilani o embarta neishopoki Mordekai neisho ninye metakedo embarta nerikoo ninye aimie ilo kurroto otumoreki le nkanasa eibalunye ajo, “Inji eikoni oltung'ani oshipakino olaiguanani pee eyanyit.”" 
Esther6:12 Neitoki Mordekai ashuko alo kishomi o laiguanani. Kake eisarisara Haman alo enkaji enye eishirita neimulumula elukunya enye. 
Esther6:13 Neliki Haman enkitok enye Seresh o lchoreta lenyena pooki nena baa pooki naanoto ninye. Nejoki ninye ilang'eni lenyena o enkitok enye Seresh, “Tenaa ko Lyahudi Mordekai ilo apa litang'asa adumakino mindim naa iyie ninye kake meeta nchere mibatata iyie te dukuya ninye.”" 
Esther6:14 Ore eton eirorie ninche ninye, nebau lelo sunaishi oogelema lo laiguanani eisosion pee eya Haman ilo sirua oitobira Esta." 
Esther7:1 Nelo olaiguanani o Haman ilo sirua te nebo Esta enkitok o laiguanani. 
Esther7:2 Ore te nkolong e are, ina kata eokito enaisho oo sabibu, neitoki olaiguanani ajoki Esta, “Kainyoo eomonunoto ino Esta? Eikinchori iyie. Ainyoo eyieunoto ino? Tenaa ninye kolpisiai le nkitoo ai, naa keitabari.”" 
Esther7:3 Newaliki Esta ajoki, “Tenaa kanoto omom, too nkonyek inono, olaiguanani, naa te neitiship olaiguanani, nchoo maaishori enkishui ai te yieunoto ai, o ltung'ana laainei te nkomono ai." 
Esther7:4 Amu etimiraki iyiook, nanu o ltung'ana laainei, pee emuti iyiook neari matuata neimisieki iyiook. Tenaa naaji ketimiraki iyiook aaitaa irindiki, ilewa o nkituaak, anaata atigire, amu meitanyaanyukieki osina lang enkitarruorroto to laiguanani.”" 
Esther7:5 Nejoki olaiguanani Serser Esta, “Kaing'ae ilo, naa kaji etii, ilo oitieu ataasa ena?”" 
Esther7:6 Nejoki Esta, “Olaarani naa olmang'atinta ninye; ele arruoni Haman!” Neureishoyu Haman te dukuya olaiguanani o enkitok o laiguanani." 
Esther7:7 Neinyototo olaiguanani te ilo sirua te ngoro nelo enkurma e ina aji e nkitoo; neton Haman aomonu enkishui enye te Esta enkitok o laiguanani, amu etoduaa ajo eitobirita olaiguanani entorroni naarie ninye." 
Esther7:8 Neshukunye olaiguanani eing'uaa ina kurma e nkaji e nkitoo elotu ewueji duoo neokie enaisho oo sabibu, ore Haman ina kata ebatata aomonu olng'ur, nebatatakino ina rruat natii Esta; nejo olaiguanani, “Keyieu neikony enkitok o laiguanani te dukuya nanu ti atua enkaji ai, Ore pee epuku ilo rorei te nkutuk o laiguanani neimulumuli enkomom e Haman." 
Esther7:9 Nejo Harbona obo loo sunaishi oogelema ooisiaai olaiguanani, Ore ninye ilo shata ogorishoreki ooitobiraka Haman Mordekai, laa ororei lenye oitajeuo olaiguanani, neitasheyieki te nkaji e Haman naa intemat onom enkadoro.”" 
Esther7:10 Nejo olaiguanani, “Entiik elilio ninye te ilo shata.” Neilili Haman te ilo shata ogorishoreki apa oitobiraka Mordekai neyagaa engoro o laiguanani." 
Esther8:1 Ore teina olong neisho olaiguanani Esta enkaji e Haman, ilo mang'atinta loo lyahudi. Nelotu Mordekai dukuya olaiguanani amu etolikio Esta enabaikinore ninye;" 
Esther8:2 neshurtu olaiguanani olgisoi lenye otooruo Haman neisho Mordekai. Neisho Esta Mordekai enkaji e Haman meitoria. 
Esther8:3 Neitoki Esta airorie olaiguanani, nebatata too nkejek enyena nesai ninye too lkiyio pee eiwuang'ie entorroni apa naitobira Haman Olagagi o nena naaiguanua te nkaraki Ilyahudi." 
Esther8:4 Neutie olaiguanani Esta eng'udi e sahabu," 
Esther8:5 Neinyototo Esta aitashe te dukuya olaiguanani Nejo, “Tenaa keitiship olaiguanani, naa tenaa kanoto omom too nkonyek inono, naa tenaa keishiaakino ena bae te dukuya olaiguanani te naishiaakino nanu te dukuya nkonyek enyena, nchoo meigeri enkitanapata naibelekenyieki mpala e nena apa naaipirua Haman Olagagi, olayioni le Hamedata, apa naaigero pee emut Ilyahudi ootii iloshon pooki lo laiguanani." 
Esther8:6 Amu kaji aiko te nangiri aing'or ina torroni nalotu atua iltung'ana laainei? Arashu kaji aiko te nangiri te nadol ina mutata o lorere lai.” 
Esther8:7 Nejoki olaiguanani Serser Esta o Mordekai ilo Yahudi, “Eng'ura, aishoo Esta enkaji e Haman, neililio ninche ninye to lchani ogorishoreki, amu eitorioko ninye nkaik Ilyahudi." 
Esther8:8 Naa indimidimi aaigero anaa eniyieuu, anaa enaishiaakino Ilyahudi, te nkarna o laiguanani, nipikipiki olmishire lo lgisoi lo laiguanani, amu ore ilkigerot ooigeroki te nkarna o laiguanani, nepiki olmishire lo lgisoi lo laiguanani meetae oltung'ani oidim aibelekenya.”" 
Esther8:9 Neipoti ilaigerok lo laiguanani te ina kata to lapa li okuni, aa olapa le Sifan te nkolong e tikitam o okuni; neigeri enkitanapata anaa enaitanapishe Mordekai meyakini Ilyahudi pooki, o lkituaak pooki, o lbalusuni o laitasheikinok loo lkerenketi ebaiki India o metabaiki Etiopia naa iloshon iip o tikitam o opishana, pooki osho ake to lkigeroto lenye, o pooki tung'ani te nkutuk enye, o lo Lyahudi sii to lkigeroto lenye o enkutuk enye." 
Esther8:10 Ore lelo kigerot naa te nkarna o laiguanani Serser nemishira to lmishire lo lgisoi lenye, neyae nena pala iltung'ana ooirriwari ookedito mbartan naaten oleng apa naasishoreki te nkisiayiare o laiguanani, naaitubuluaki ti atua boo o laiguanani." 
Esther8:11 Ore te kuna nenyorraa olaiguanani Ilyahudi ootii nkanas pooki meiturrurroto pee emitu ate, nemut near metuata, neidaikie pooki jore e pooki tung'ani o pooki osho oidim atarasaki ninche, o nkera enye o nkituaak, neya masaa enye," 
Esther8:12 nabo olong too loshon pooki lo laiguanani Serser te nkolong e tomon o okuni to lapa le tomon o are, laa olapa le Adar." 
Esther8:13 Ore empalai e nena naaigeroki naa keishoori anaa enkitanapata te pooki osho, o te nkitayioloto oo ltung'ana pooki, nerretena Ilyahudi pee eitalaku elap enye te lelo mang'ati lenye." 
Esther8:14 Neked lelo ooirriwari imbartan enye naaten apa naasishoreki te nkisiayiare o laiguanani, neipang aapuo te nkisarrisar, eitirrishakita enkitanapata o laiguanani, neitayuni enkitanapata te Susa te ina ang kitok." 
Esther8:15 Neitoki Mordekai apuku alo te ine netii olaiguanani eishopito inkilani e nkitoo pusi o naaibor o lmarisian sapuk le nkitoo le sahabu, olkila sidai sintet, ina kata ebuaku enkang e Susa neng'ida." 
Esther8:16 Netum Ilyahudi ewang'an, o enchipai, o eng'ida o enkanyit." 
Esther8:17 Ore te pooki osho, o te pooki ang, eneba anaa enetabaikia enkitanapata o lkilikuai lo laiguanani, netii enchipai o eng'ida atua Ilyahudi; o sirua o enkisampash. Ore ilkumok te lelo tung'ana le ina kop neibalunye ate aaitaa ate Ilyahudi amu eiputa enkuretisho oo Lyahudi atua ninche." 
Esther9:1 Ore to lapa le tomon o are laa olapa le Adar, te nkolong e tomon o okuni e ilo apa ina kata etinyikutua inkitanapat o laiguanani o lkilikuai lenye pee eitabari, te ina olong apa ejo ilmang'ati loo Lyahudi ketum engolon te ninche, kake eibelekenye ina, aaku enkolong natumie Ilyahudi engolon too lmang'ati lenye," 
Esther9:2 neiturrurro Ilyahudi too nkanas enye ti atua loshon pooki lo laiguanani Ahasero pee epik nkaik lelo oshi ooyieu near ninche. Nemetii oltung'ani oidim airisha ninche, amu eiputa iltung'ana pooki enkuretisho eure ninche." 
Esther9:3 Ore ilkituaak pooki loo loshon o laitasheikinok, o lbalusuni o lelo pooki oata enkitoo neretu sii ninche Ilyahudi, amu etijing'a ninche enkuretisho eure Mordekai." 
Esther9:4 Amu eikitok apa Mordekai ti atua enkaji o laiguanani, ore ening'oi enye neidapashakino iloshon pooki; amu ore ilo tung'ani oji Mordekai netoponari oleng agolu." 
Esther9:5 Near Ilyahudi lelo mang'ati lenye pooki to lalem, nemut, neidaikie ninche, neas anaa enayieu te lelo pooki apa ooiba ninche." 
Esther9:6 Ore te Susa te ina ang kitok ake near Ilyahudi metuata neidaikie ilewa iip imiet," 
Esther9:7 near sii Par-shandata o Dalfon o Aspata 
Esther9:8 o Parata o Adalia o Aridata 
Esther9:9 o Parmasta o Arisai o Aridai o Faisata," 
Esther9:10 ilayiok pokira tomon le Haman ole Hamedata, olmang'atinta loo Lyahudi; Kake eitu epik nkaik enye nena naataarutua." 
Esther9:11 Ore ina olong ake nelikini olaiguanani esiana e lelo ootaaraki te Susa te ina ang kitok. 
Esther9:12 Nejoki olaiguanani Esta enkitok o laiguanani, “Ore te Susa te ina ang kitok etaara Ilyahudi ilewa iip imiet o layiok tomon le Haman, Kainyoo naa sii yie etaasa te lelo kerenketi le laiguanani ootelekutua! Kainyoo naa taata eyieuna ino? Eikinchori iyie. Naa kainyoo intoki aomonu? Amu keitabari.”" 
Esther9:13 Nejo Esta, “Tenaa keitiship olaiguanani, nchoo Ilyahudi ootii Susa menyaakini aanyorraki taisere metaasa anaa ena kitanapata ena olong. Naa nchoo layiok le Haman meilili to lchani ogorishorek.”" 
Esther9:14 Neitanapisho olaiguanani ina metaasi; neitayuni enkitanapata te Susa, neilili ilayiok pokira tomon le Haman." 
Esther9:15 Neitoki Ilyahudi ootii Susa aaiturrurro te nkolong e tomon o ong'uan o lapa le Adar near metuata iltung'ana iip uni te Susa; kake eitu epik nkaik enye nena naataarutua. 
Esther9:16 Ore lelo kulikae Yahudi ootii atua lelo oshon lo laiguanani neiturrurro sii ninche pee emitu ate, netum ninche enkiyagata ti alo ilmang'ati lenye. Neitoki aar inkalifuni ntomoni naapishana o imiet e lelo apa ooiba ninche; kake eitu epik nkaik enye nena naataarutua." 
Esther9:17 Te nkolong e tomon o ong'uan neeng'iyeng'a neitaa ina olong osirua o enchipai. 
Esther9:18 Kake ore Ilyahudi ootii Susa neiturrurro te nkolong e tomon o okuni o te nkolong e tomon o ong'uan, neeng'iyeng'a te nkolong e tomon o imiet, aaitaa ina olong osirua o enchipai." 
Esther9:19 Metaa ore Ilyahudi loo nkang'itie kutiti, ootoni too nkang'itie nemeeta isunta, neitaa enkolong e tomon o ong'uan olapa le Adar enkolong e nchipai, osirua o enkiyeng'iyeng, enkolong naa ninye eishorore nkishorot." 
Esther9:20 Neiger Mordekai kuna baa, neitoki airriwaki mpala Ilyahudi pooki ootii iloshon lo laiguanani Serser, ilootaana o loolakua," 
Esther9:21 aikok ninche pee edamu, enkolong e tomon oong'uan o lapa le Adar o enkolong sii e tomon o imiet to lari o to lari," 
Esther9:22 aa inkolong'i naa ninche enotie Ilyahudi enkiyagata too lmang'ati lenye, naa olapa sii oibelekenyaki te ninche metaa kepuku to sina aajing enchipai nepuku to lkiyioi aajing enkiyeng'iyeng, pee etum aaitaa ninche inkolong'i o sirua o enchipai, inkolong'i naaishorore nkishorot maate neisho nkishorot ilaisinak." 
Esther9:23 Neiruk lelo Yahudi aas anaa ina naiterutua aas, anaa sii ina naigeroko Mordekai ninche." 
Esther9:24 Amu ore Haman ilo Agag olayioni le Hamedata, olmang'atinta loo Lyahudi pooki, eitobira pee ear Ilyahudi; neidaikie ninche, netoosho Pur aa nchere enkukuo pee eparripar neidaikie ninche." 
Esther9:25 Kake ore ake pee elotu Esta dukuya olaiguanani, neishooyo inkitanapat too lkigerot nchere ore ina kitobirata enye torrono naitobira pee emuti Ilyahudi enyor nelotu shumata endukuya enye, ore ake sii neilili ninye o layiok lenyena to lchani ogorishoreki." 
Esther9:26 Neaku kejo ninche kuna olong'i Purim, aaitusuj ilo rorei oji Pur. Metaa ore te nkaraki nena pooki naaigeroki tena palai, o nena naatadua tena bae, o te nena naaetuo atua ninche." 
Esther9:27 Neitayu Ilyahudi enkitanapata neibung ninche maate o nkera enye o pooki ooibung'are ninche, nchere keibung kuna olong'i pokira are eitu eitadiak te risioroto e nena apa naaigeroki o te nkata naba anaa enageluni te pooki ari" 
Esther9:28 nchere keishiaakino nedamuni kuna olong'i neibung'i ti atua iishoritin pooki ishoi, te pooki marei, o losho o enkang, naa ore kuna olong'i e Purim nemeishori aekata eimin ti atua Ilyahudi, nemepali sii enkitadamunoto ti atua ishoritin pooki." 
Esther9:29 Neitoki Esta, ina kitok o laiguanani, entito e Abihail o Mordekai ilo Yahudi, aaiger enkitanapata nalulung'a te nkitoria, aaitadedeyie ena palai e are naipirta Purim." 
Esther9:30 Neigerokini mpala Ilyahudi pooki, ootii lelo oshon tikitam o opishana lo laiguanani Serser, too rorei le seriani o esipata," 
Esther9:31 nchere ore kuna olong'i e Purim neishiaakino neibung'i too nkatitin naatudung'okoki, anaa enaitanapa Mordekai ilo Yahudi o Esta enkitok o laiguanani Ilyahudi, o ina sii nairuko aaibung ninche maate o nkera enye mbaa naaipirta eenata o enkishirata enye." 
Esther9:32 Neitagol enkitanapata e Esta nena baa e Purim, neigeri te mbuku." 
Esther10:1 Neitalaku olaiguanani Serser kodi te ina kop o to loomanaa loo naaiposha. 
Esther10:2 Ore iasat enyena pooki o engolon o enkidimata, o lomon pooki le nkitoo e Mordekai, naishoo olaiguanani ninye, aimeigero kuna te mbuku oo nkoon oo laiguanak le Media o Parsia?" 
Esther10:3 Amu Mordekai ilo Yahudi naa ninye apa osujita te nkitoo olaiguanani Serser, naa aikitok too Lyahudi nening'o to lorora loo lalashera lenyena, amu eing'orua olmabarishoi loo ltung'ana lenyena neiro eseriani too ltung'ana lenyena pooki." 
Job1:1 Eetae apa oltung'ani omanya enkop e Us, oji enkarna enye Yoab. Naa ore apa ilo tung'ani nemeeta entioto naa oltung'ani oitashe too sipat, neure ninye Enkai oleng, neorunye aing'uaa intorrok." 
Job1:2 Eeta apa ninye ilayiok oopishana o ntoyie uni. 
Job1:3 Neeta apa ninye intare nkalifuni naapishana, o ntamesin inkalifuni uni, o lmong'i iip imiet ooyietaa enchata emurt, o sirkon lipong'a iip imiet, o sinkan kumok oleng, naa ore apa ele tung'ani meetae olkarsis olang too ltung'ana pooki lo loosaen." 
Job1:4 Ore apa ilayiok lenyena naa kepuo aaitayu isiruai too lmareita lenye, meeta ake olemeeta enkolong enye. Neipotu inkanashera enye pokira uni meetu aadaa te nebo neokisho te nebo." 
Job1:5 Ore ake pee elusoo inkolong'i o sirua, neinyototo Yoab alo aitisiny ninche te dukuya Enkai. Naa keyooki tadekenya alo aitayu olasar opejori terishata oo layiok lenyena pooki; amu ejo apa Yoab, “Ebaiki netaasa ilayiok laainei ing'ok, nedek Enkai too ltauja lenye.” Neas Yoab ina anaake." 
Job1:6 Eetae apa enkolong naetuo ilayiok le Nkai aaitayu ate te dukuya Olaitoriani, nelotu sii ninye Shetani te nebo ni nche." 
Job1:7 Nejoki Olaitoriani Shetani, “Kaji ing'uaa iyie?” Newaliki Shetani Olaitoriani ajoki, “Aing'uaa ene o idie ti oriong e nkop, naing'uaa sii elototo ai e shumata o abori te shumata ninye.”" 
Job1:8 Nejoki Olaitoriani Shetani, “Itoduaa osinka lai Yoab, olaa meetae likae laaijo ninye te enkop, oltung'ani lemeeta entioto neitashe too sipat, neure Enkai neorunye aing'uaa intorrok?”" 
Job1:9 Ina pee ewaliki Shetani Olaitoriani ejo, “Keure Yoab Enkai te mpesho?" 
Job1:10 Aa keitu doi intaman ninye enkikarrata tenebo enkaji enye o pooki toki naata too nkaloli pooki? Itamayiana esiai oo nkaik enyena, netoponari imasaa enyena aaiput ena kop." 
Job1:11 Kake intorioi sii iyie enkaina ino tenakata iseyie nena pooki naata, naa aikidek ninye aitoriokino enkomom ino.”" 
Job1:12 Nejoki Olaitoriani Shetani, “Ng'ura, ore pooki naata ninye etii atua engolon ino; ninye ake enkorrok enye mintorioki enkaina ino.” Neaku eshomo Shetani aing'uaa ine netii Olaitoriani." 
Job1:13 Eetae apa enkolong natotona ilayiok le Yoab o ntoyie enyena aadaa neok enaisho oo lsabibu te nkaji olalashe lenye botor; 
Job1:14 nelotu olkilikuai enetii Yoab nejoki, “Ore duoo eturito ilmong'i enkurma nedaa isirkon tembata enye;" 
Job1:15 nedoiki iltung'ana le Sabea, nereu ninche pooki, near isinkan ootii te nepi olalem; neaku nanu ake oisikua peyie aalotu aliki.”" 
Job1:16 Ore eton eiro eitu eishu, nelotu likae nejo, “Etadowuo enkima Enkai te shumata nepejoo intare te nebo isinkan, neidakie ninche; neaku nanu ake oisikua peyie aalotu aliki.”" 
Job1:17 Ore eton eirorita ilo, nejing'u likae nejo, “Eitayutuo Ilkaldayo iltimito okuni, nepuonu aarare iyiook aaikonyaa intamesin nereu, near isinkan te nepi olalem; metaa nanu ake oisikua peyie aalotu aliki.”" 
Job1:18 Ore eton eirorita ilo, nelotu likae nejoki, “Ore layiok linono o ntoyie edaa duoo neok enaisho oo sabibu tenebo te nkaji olalashe lenye botor;" 
Job1:19 naa ng'ura; eewuo osiwuo sapuk odung'u olpurkel, neosh ilpijat pokira oong'uan leina aji, nesulakino lelo tung'ana lelerue, netuata pooki, metaa nanu ake openy oisikua peyie aalotu aliki.”" 
Job1:20 Ina pee edumunye Yoab, nepolos olkila lenye, nebarn elukunya enye, nebatatakino enkop aserem." 
Job1:21 Nejo ninye, atupukuo apa te ng'uset e yieyio maishopo naa karrinyo alo maishopo. Olaitoriani oishorua naa ninye onyaaka aya. Meisisi enkarna o Laitoriani." 
Job1:22 Ore te kuna pooki neitu eas Yoab eng'oki arashu eipotoki Enkai entorroni. 
Job2:1 Neitokini ake aata ae olong naetuo ilayiok le Nkai aaitoduaaya ate te dukuya Olaitoriani, nelotu sii ninye Shetani te nebo ninche aitoduaaya kewan te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Job2:2 Nejoki Olaitoriani Shetani, “Kaji doi iyie ing'uaa?” Newaliki Shetani Olaitoriani ajoki, “Aing'uaa idie o idie te nkop, nalilita te shumata o tiabori.”" 
Job2:3 Nejoki Olaitoriani Shetani, “Itoduaa osinka lai Yoab, olaa meetae olonyaanyukie ninye te nkop, o lemeeta entioto naa oltung'ani oitashe too sipat, oltung'ani oure Enkai neibelekenye aing'uaa intorrok? Eton ake eibung'ita enkirukoto enye anaa apake, hoo nikiewuo arrumoki ninye mataarare, meeta ninye enataasa.”" 
Job2:4 Ina pee ewaliki Shetani Olaitoriani ajoki, “Olchoni to lchoni eitayu oltung'ani pooki naata te nkaraki enkishui enye." 
Job2:5 Kake intorioi sii iyie enkaina ino tenakata, iseyie sii iyie oloito lenye o sesen lenye, naa aikimor ninye aitoriokino enkomom ino.”" 
Job2:6 Nejoki Olaitoriani Shetani, “Ng'ura, etii ninye nkaik inono enkishui enye ake miseyie.”" 
Job2:7 Metaa eshomo Shetani aing'uaa enetii Olaitoriani, nelo aisilisil Yoab apik impaldakani torrok naang'u eiteru too ndapi oo nkejek enyena o metabaiki elukunya enye." 
Job2:8 Neya Yoab embelati e moti oo nkulukuok, nelo aton to lchala loo suut aoj kewan." 
Job2:9 Ina pee ejoki enkitok enye, “Keton ake imbung akurraki enkirukoto? Ainyoo pee midek Enkai pee itum atua.”" 
Job2:10 Kake etiaka Yoab ninye, “Iro iyie anaa nabo oo nkituaak naamoda. Aiking'amu esidai te nkaina Enkai, nimiking'amu intorrok?” Ore te kuna pooki eitu eas Yoab eng'oki te nkutuk enye." 
Job2:11 Ore ina kata pee ening ilchoreta le Yoab okuni ina torroni natijing'aka Yoab, nepuonu pooki ng'ae eing'uaa wuejitin enye, Elifas le Teman, o Bildad le Shushi o Sofar le Naamat. Negelu pooki olkekun opuonu tenebo aaitobor neitagol sii." 
Job2:12 Ore ake pee edol ninche ninye eton elakuaniki, eitu ninche eyiolou ninye; neyietu aaishir nepolos ilkilani lenye neisuaaki enterit ilukuny eing'or keper." 
Job2:13 Netoni te nebo ninye te nkop inkolong'i ile o nkewaritin enye; nemeetae hoo obo otaboloko ninye enkutuk airorie, amu etoduaa ninche aajo ore osomit lenye naa kitok oleng." 
Job3:1 Ore te siadi ena, etabolo Yoab enkutuk enye adek enapa olong natoinyeki." 
Job3:2 Nejo Yoab: 
Job3:3 “Inchoo ina olong apa naatoinyieki eidak, te nebo ina kewarie apa natejoki, ‘Kenutae enkayioni!’" 
Job3:4 Inchoo ina olong eaku enaimin! Inchoo Enkai e shumata epal eitu eing'oru ninye, nemeetae ewang'an naitawang'aki ninye." 
Job3:5 Inchoo eaku enkolong torrono o enaimin nagut te shumata enye. Tunuka ninye too nkatampo niwuang'ie enkolong te ninye. 
Job3:6 Ore ina kewarie, inchoo enaimin narok ong'u eibung ninye! Mincho ninye eshipa tiatua nena olong'i o lari. Mincho ninye elotu ajing esiana oo lapaitin." 
Job3:7 Ee inchoo ina kewarie eaku olupi; emincho oltoilo le nchipai ening'i tiatua. 
Job3:8 Inchoo lelo oodekisho metediaa ina olong, lelo arriyiak oodumu Lefiatan." 
Job3:9 Inchoo ilakir lenyena le nkakenya emisimisu nchoo ninye eisiligu ewang'an nemetum nemedol osirua enkakenya tenewang'u. 
Job3:10 Ore amu eitu een ina olong eng'uset e yieyio, neitu eisudoo enyamali too nkonyek aainei." 
Job3:11 Ainyoo apa pee eitu aye te nkata e inoto, anaa pee apuku ake te ng'uset naye." 
Job3:12 Aainyoo pee aaibung'a yieyio too nkejek enyena? Anaa pee aaitanaa ilke lenyena? 
Job3:13 Amu anaata apa airraga nagira; anaata airure; naa anaata ayeng'iyeng'e. 
Job3:14 Tenebo ilaiguanak o laitoriak le nkop lelo apa ooteshetakita ate inkidaarot. 
Job3:15 Arashu ilkituaak oota sahabu, lelo ooiput inkajijik enye enkosholai." 
Job3:16 Ainyoo apa pee eitu aaisudori anaa olkibiroto anaa nkiyiotin neitu ae kata edol ewang'an? 
Job3:17 Teine eishu ilarruok te nyamali, naa teine eyeng'iyeng'ieki iloonaurate." 
Job3:18 Teine eyeng'iyeng'a ilooena tenebo; mening ninche ilo toilo lo loitasheiki esiai. 
Job3:19 Etii ine ilooti netii sii ilkituaak, nelakuno osinka to loitore ninye." 
Job3:20 Ainyoo pee eishori ewang'an ilo otii engolikinoto, neishori enkishui ilo oata emion to ltau." 
Job3:21 Ilo otayiewua to ltau keeya, nemelotu ninye, neturu ninye ninye oleng alang entoki nagol enkinyang'a naiteng'ela." 
Job3:22 Lelo ooshipa te nchipai sapuk oleng, neshipa tenetum ninche enkurare?" 
Job3:23 Ainyoo peyie eishori ewang'an oltung'ani laa ore enkoitoi enye neisudoro, ilo oitamana Enkai olpaashe ninye." 
Job3:24 Amu elotu enkiyang'ata anaa emukate ai, ore inkishirat aainei nebukunye anaa enkare." 
Job3:25 Amu ore ina toki naure nanu nelotu shumata nanu, naadoiki nanu ina naitureisho." 
Job3:26 Maata esidano te nkewan ai, nemaata sii engira, maata enkiyeng'iyeng; kake enyamali nalotu.”" 
Job4:1 Ina pee ewal Elifas le Teman ajo: 
Job4:2 “Amaa tenikishirraki oltung'ani airorie, igoro Naa kaing'ae oidim atigirayu eitu eiro." 
Job4:3 Ing'ura ituutayie lkumok, nintagolo inkaik nemeeta engolon." 
Job4:4 Ore irorei linono neitasheyie ilo orrorro nitipika engolon inkung naashal. 
Job4:5 Kake ore taata kitabaikia iyie, nimindim ating'iria; kimbung'a iyie nimimputukuny." 
Job4:6 Amaa euriata ino Olaitoriani aime ninye empijan ino naa enkitashoto sidai oo nkoitoi inono ninye osiligi lino? 
Job4:7 Tadamisho sii iyie, kalo ae kata ilo loo supati oidaayie? Anaa aitiaji ae kata etudung'oyioki, lelo ooitashe too sipat?" 
Job4:8 Ore anaa enatoduaa, ore lelo ooun entorroni; neun enyamali naa ninye ejung." 
Job4:9 Ore te nkiyang'et e Nkai naa keidak, ore te ndarata e ng'oro enye neijori ninche." 
Job4:10 Ore ina kikurrukur o lng'atuny, o ilo toilo lo lng'atuny pushati, o lelo ala le lelo ng'atunyo ooti negili." 
Job4:11 Ore ilo ng'atuny ogol neish te nkaraki natala entoki nanya, ore inkera e ng'atuny neidapashari." 
Job4:12 Aayakaki olomoni aakurraki, neng'amu enkiok ai ina king'oming'omakinoto." 
Job4:13 Tiatua indamunot naaing'uaa induaat enkewarie, ina kata etijing'a injo naairoishi iltung'ana." 
Job4:14 Nelotu shumata nanu enkuretisho sapuk olokirikiri ina naikirikirie iloik laainei pooki. 
Job4:15 Nekut enkiyang'et enkomom ai, ore ilpapit lo sesen lai neitashe." 
Job4:16 Neitashe aauno kake eitu nanu amusu eneikununo. Etii apa enkitanyaanyukoto dukuya nkonyek aainei; netii engira, ina pee aning oltoilo:" 
Job4:17 ‘Keidim oltung'ani oye ataa sinyati te dukuya Enkai? Keidim oltung'ani ataa sinyati te dukuya Olaitobirani lenye? 
Job4:18 Ore doi ninye too laisiaayiak lenyena mepik ninye osiligi, ore ilmalaika lenyena neikenaki enkitadiata." 
Job4:19 Kebaa elus lelo oomanya inkajijik esarng'ab laa ore olkitamanyunoto lenye netii atua enterit, lelo oorrarri anaa olasai." 
Job4:20 Ore teneitoriti entadekenya o enteipa nemuti; neish ninche intarasi meeta hoo oloyiolo. 
Job4:21 Nemuti aaya olng'obor lenye aimemuta ninche aaye, neton ake meeta engeno nagut?’”" 
Job5:1 “Impotisho taata, ketii hoo obo liking'amaa iyie? Kalo obo loo sinyat imbelekenyakino iyie?" 
Job5:2 Esipa ore enkuretisho nalus naa kear olmodai ore olom near ilo lemeeta engeno. 
Job5:3 Atoduaa ilo modai enoto ntona, kake atasioko nanu adek emanyisho enye." 
Job5:4 Ore ilayiok lenyena nelakuaniki eseriani, etumutaki ninche aaidaikie te kishomi, nemetii hoo obo oitajeu ninche." 
Job5:5 Ore enkisampuare enye nenya lelo oota esumash, naa keya doi ninye aitayu tiatua ilkiku; ore iloota enkure neipang'ipang eing'oru enkarsisisho enye." 
Job5:6 Amu ore olosilisili neme enterit epukunye, ore enyamali neme te nkop ebulu." 
Job5:7 Kake etoikioki oltung'ani enyamali anaa enailep iltiil le nkima shumata. 
Job5:8 Ore nanu, naa kaing'oru Enkai, naa Enkai apik nanu enkoitoi ai." 
Job5:9 Ilo oas isiaitin sapuki enking'asia nemejurrunoyu te nguton, intokitin kumok enking'asia nemeikenayu;" 
Job5:10 eisho ninye enchan metashaiki oriong enkop, neirriwaa inkariak metijing'a nkurman." 
Job5:11 Nedumu ailepie lelo oobor ore lelo ooishir nedumuni aailepakinye eneserian. 
Job5:12 Neitaa pesho nkitobirat e lelo loo losekin, metaa metum inkaik enye hoo dupoto." 
Job5:13 Eya ninye lelo ng'eni to losek lenye maate, ore inkitobirat e lelo lo losek neiting'ie asioki." 
Job5:14 Etum ninche enaimin te ndama, neirrapirrapisho enaipirie enkolong, anaa lootii atua enkewarie." 
Job5:15 Kake keitajeu lelo okishin too nkutukie enye; ore iloomena neitajeu te nkaina eilo magilani. 
Job5:16 Metaa keeta ilo aisinani osiligi, ore imbaa nemetii isipat nenuk enkutuk enye." 
Job5:17 Ing'ura, eshipa ilo tung'ani oisikong Enkai; metaa mimenaa ina kisikong'ata o eilo magilani." 
Job5:18 Amu kepik ninye olbae, neitoki aen, neoshisho ninye kake aikinchiunye enkaina enye." 
Job5:19 Aikintajeu ninye iyie too nyamalaritin ile, ore tenaapishana nemeeta entorroni nikintoki aiseyie." 
Job5:20 Ore to lameyu naa aikilaku iyie te keeya, ore to larrabal sapuk nikilaku aitung'uaa engolon eilo alem." 
Job5:21 Aikisudori iyie teina kirowuaj e ilo ng'ejep, nimiureyu enkidaaroto tenebau." 
Job5:22 Ore te mutata o to lameyu nikueni iyie, nimiureyu nena ng'uesi e nkop." 
Job5:23 Amu mikintanyamal isoito te wueji nitur, nimikintanyamal ing'uesi entim." 
Job5:24 Iyiolou iyie ina kata ajo keserian olng'obor lino, naa ijur intare inono netii pooki elulung'a." 
Job5:25 Iyiolou sii ajo ore iishoritin inono naa keaku kumok, naa neijia etiu inkera eishoi ino, ebayu anaa inkujit enkop." 
Job5:26 Ilo akenya enkurare ino itaa olpayian kitok, anaa enkano naku nabaiki ewueji neidong'ieki te nkata enye." 
Job5:27 Ng'ura, king'orutua kuna aajurru, naa kesipa. Toning'o, naa tayiolo ninye te nkaraki esidano nikiyaki.”" 
Job6:1 Neitoki Yoab awal ajo," 
Job6:2 “Oi duoo tenaa kepiki entemet nainenengishoreki isinaitin laainei! Te nebo enyamali ai pooki aaineneng. 
Job6:3 Amu ina kata eaku keiroishi alang osinyai le naiposha; metaa, ekuetieki irorei laainei." 
Job6:4 Amu etii imbaa e ilo magilani atua nanu; neok oltau lai e sayiet enye; ore nena naaitureisho e Nkai neitoluaaki te dukuya nanu maataare. 
Job6:5 Keru osikiria le ntim eeta olkujita, anaa olkiteng einosita olkujita." 
Job6:6 Amaa ina nemeeta entoki naishamu, keinosayu metii emunyan." 
Job6:7 Maata esumash endaa naaijo ina, naa ore pooki toki nanya naaitamuoi." 
Job6:8 Oi duoo tenaa katum entoki natoomonuo, naaisho Enkai eyieunoto ai," 
Job6:9 peyie eshipakino Enkai aapurd nanu, pee eitorioo enkaina enye, pee aadung'oo nanu aiwuang'ie." 
Job6:10 Ena naaku enkitagoloto ai; ekaipid doi ninye te nchipai hoo naata emion, amu eitu amiki lelo rorei Leilo Sinyati." 
Job6:11 Ainyoo engolon ai metaa katon aanyu? Naa kainyoo enkiting'oto ai metaa katon ang'iri? 
Job6:12 Amaa engolon ai keng'olon oo soito, arashu amaa osesen lai kolo suyai?" 
Job6:13 Ore te sipata maata nanu eretoto te kewan, naa ore pooki wueji natumie eretoto neterewaki aaitung'uaa enatii." 
Job6:14 Ore ilo oibooyo esupatisho aitung'uaa olchore, naa keing'uaa euriata e ilo magilani." 
Job6:15 Ore lalashera laainei, neeta entorroni anaa nena ariak naatoyu neish." 
Job6:16 Nena naamisimis too soito le nchan, oine neisudoriyie isoito le nchan ate." 
Job6:17 Ore te nkata enkirowuaj neimin. Ore teneirowuaju, neish te wueji enye." 
Job6:18 Ore lelo apuayak neing'uaa inkoitoi enye, nepuo ninche olpurkel, neidak." 
Job6:19 Ore lapuayak le Tema neing'oru ore lelo apuayak le Sheba neisiligu. 
Job6:20 Neidang ninche amu eeta apa osiligi sapuk. Epuonu ninche ine neidang. 
Job6:21 Neijia iyie itotiuo tena kata te nanu; idolita osina lai, niureishoyu." 
Job6:22 Katejo doi, ‘Entaikiaki nanu enkishooroto?’ Anaa, ‘Entaikiaki nanu te karsisisho inyi entoki nikiropiepie?’" 
Job6:23 Aashu, ‘Tokorduaki nanu te nkaina e ilo mang'atinda lai?’ Arashu, ‘Talakuaki nanu te nkaina e ilo laaironyita?’" 
Job6:24 Nteng'enaki nanu naa kagira nanu; intayioloki nanu matoning'u enaikuna peyie apong'ori. 
Job6:25 Kebaa enkiroishi oo rorei oosipa! Kake amaa doi ainyoo eutu eutaroto ino? 
Job6:26 Idamu naaji ajo indim aiturrai irorei, aa ore ina kiroroto oltung'ani oiting'o osiligi naa enkijape?" 
Job6:27 Indim doi ninye atoosho enkukuo te lelo okishin nimipenyare ilamirak amir olchore lino. 
Job6:28 Kake ore taata, tishipakinoyioki niking'or nanu; amu malej enkomom ino." 
Job6:29 Imbelekenyunye, aatasayia, mincho entorrono easayu, imbelekenyunye tena kata amu eiting'o osiligi lai." 
Job6:30 Ketii olng'ejep lai emonkoi ake ninye pooki? Amaa enkishamisham aimemusu enyamali? 
Job7:1 Keitu etum oltung'ani esiaai nagol tioriong enkop, naa amaa inkolong'i enyena, aimetiu anaa inkolong'i oltung'ani oigero?" 
Job7:2 Anaa orrindik oyieu oleng oloip, anaa etiu anaa oltung'ani oigero oing'oru olekoisiayio lenye?" 
Job7:3 Metaa ore too lapaitin pooki maata toki; naaishooki nanu inkewarieitin o sina. 
Job7:4 Ore tenairrag najo, ‘Kanu doi ade adumunye?’ Kake ekeado enkewarie, naibelibelekenya omekenyu." 
Job7:5 Ore osesen lai naairuja ilkuru o loirerio, negolu olchoni lo sesen lai, neitoki adanya." 
Job7:6 Elang inkolong'i aainei erisioroto oo naipuko olkurragos, nepuonu aaiting meeta osiligi." 
Job7:7 Tadamu ajo ore enkishui ai naa enkiyang'et, medol ae kata enkong'u ai esidano." 
Job7:8 Ore ina ong'u e ilo laadol maitoki adol ae kata; ore etii inkonyek inono shumata nanu, naa kaish." 
Job7:9 Anaa enaisardaka enkatampoi neish, neijia etiu ilo olo enemeneng'a meitoki ailepu;" 
Job7:10 meigil ae kata ninye ashukokino enkaji enye nemeitoki ewueji enye ayiolo ninye ae kata. 
Job7:11 Metaa maitigir nanu enkutuk ai; ekairo te nkaraki emion oltau lai. Ekailepilep te nduaran oltau lai. 
Job7:12 Kara nanu enaiposha arashu enkukuu e naiposha, metaa intobira iyie olarriponi te shumata nanu?" 
Job7:13 Ore tenajo, ‘Ekaaitagol endapash ai, ekeitololong olorika lai enkilepilep ai’;" 
Job7:14 ina pee kinture nanu too nkidetidetat, nikinture nanu too nduaat." 
Job7:15 Metaa kagelu engoroto o keeya aitalang iloik laainei. 
Job7:16 Meekure eeta enkishui ai tipat, meekure abikoo intarasi. Entung'uayioki nanu amu ore inkolong'i aainei naa enkiyang'et." 
Job7:17 Ainyoo doi oltung'ani metaa ing'orunye ninye toki, nipik endamunoto ino aitorioki ninye;" 
Job7:18 niparan ninye anaake tadekenya, nitem ninye pooki kata?" 
Job7:19 Kerishata naba aa miwuang'ie enkomom ino te nanu, anaa kipal nanu matoijoi nkamulak."
