Job7:20 Amaa tenaas eng'oki, kaa aaitaas iyie, iyie olaing'urani loo ltung'ana? Ainyoo peyie kitisirua nanu? Ainyoo peyie ataa olola te iyie?" 
Job7:21 Ainyoo peyie mikipalaki inkitarruorrot aainei niya aitalamaa intorrok aainei? Amu ore tena kata naa kairrag tiatua enkop; aiking'oru iyie nanu nematii.” 
Job8:1 Neitoki Bildad le Shushi awal ajo: 
Job8:2 “Kerishata naba aa ijo kuna baa, ore irorei le nkutuk ino netiu anaa osiwuo kitok?" 
Job8:3 Amaa, kemerregel Enkai esipata? Amaa kemerregel Olmagilani enasipa." 
Job8:4 Amaa tenetaasa inkera inono eng'oki aaitaas ninye, eitarasayie ninye ninche apik engolon oo ntorrok enye." 
Job8:5 Tening'oru iyie Enkai, nisai iyie ilo Magilani;" 
Job8:6 tenaa aira sinyati nintashe too sipat, nesipa katukul inchere ekedumunye ninye te nkaraki iyie; nikilaaki ninye iyie te wueji neishaakino tinimany." 
Job8:7 Neaku ore hoo duoo naa kiti apa enkiterunoto ino, keaku inkolong'i inono naapuonu sapuki oleng." 
Job8:8 Amu inkilikuanu, aatoomono too lporori ooshomo, nijurru ayiolou nena naanoto iloo papa;" 
Job8:9 amu ore iyiook nikira ile ng'ole, nimikiyiolo pito, amu ore inkolong'i ang tioriong enkop naa oloip." 
Job8:10 Aimikinteng'en ninche iyie, nikiliki iyie, nelimu irorei tening'unoto enye?" 
Job8:11 Keidim enarau atubulu te wueji nemetii olkishakual? Keidim oseyiai atubulu tewueji nemetii enkare? 
Job8:12 Ore eton aa entapukai eitu edung'i, netoyu ninche engor ae aitubului ake." 
Job8:13 Neijia etiu inkoitoi e lelo pooki oorikino Enkai amu ore osiligi le lelo tung'ana lemeeta Enkai naa keidak. 
Job8:14 Ore enkirukoto osiligi lenye negila ina kata naa neijia etiu osiligi lenye le nkaji olkedi. 
Job8:15 Eirishakino ninye enkaji enye nemeitashe ina aji; eibung ninye ina aji enye, kake meitashe." 
Job8:16 Ebulu iltung'ana torrok anaa entiati natii ewueji netii enkolong, neibulaa ilukuny aaidapashakino enkurma enye." 
Job8:17 Ore intona enye neman aaen isoito, neton ninye tiatua lelo soito akurrakino." 
Job8:18 Naa teneari aamut ninye te wueji enye, naa kemiki ninye, ejoki ‘Eitu ae kata aadol.’" 
Job8:19 Ing'ura, ena enchipai enkoitoi enye; nepuku tiatua enkop kulie aabulu." 
Job8:20 Ing'ura, meany Enkai oltung'ani lemeeta entioto, nemeng'amaa enkaina oo laasak loo ntorrok." 
Job8:21 Aikintoki ninye aigil aiput enkutuk ino enkuenia nepik enkutuk ino embuakunoto. 
Job8:22 Ore lelo likimba iyie naa keishopokini ninche enkurruna, ore ilo ng'obor loo ltorrok, nemeitokini aata.”" 
Job9:1 Neitoki Yoab awal ajo: 
Job9:2 “Esipa kayiolo ajo neijia etiu: Kake kaji eiko oltung'ani teneaku supat te dukuya Enkai? 
Job9:3 Amaa teneyieu obo nekeshare ninye, meeta obo oidim atawaliki ninye kata nabo too nkatitin enkalifu nabo." 
Job9:4 Aing'en ninye to ltau, naa magilani te ngolon, aing'ae oidima aitagolo kewan ataarare ninye, nemir ninye?" 
Job9:5 Ilo odotu ildoinyo, nemeyiolo ninche ina, tenenang'aa ninye ninche te ng'oro enye," 
Job9:6 ilo oigusugusie enkop aitung'uaa ewueji enye, neikirikirie ing'apeta enyena" 
Job9:7 ilo oitanap enkolong, meitoki ailepu; ilo oitoip ilakir," 
Job9:8 ilo laa ninye ake openy oisalaash keper, neroruaa apurd ilopir le naiposha;" 
Job9:9 ilo oitobirua entukus oo lakir naji olng'arurumi, o enaji orion, o enaji Pledes, o entukus oo lakir le kopikop." 
Job9:10 Ilo oas isiaitin sapuki nena naagiroo ening'unoto, o ntokitin enking'asia nemeeta esiana." 
Job9:11 Ing'ura eim embata ai, nemadol ninye; eloolo dukuya, nemaning'u ninye." 
Job9:12 Ng'ura, ewuapaa ninye aiwuang'ie, aing'ae oidim aibooi ninye, Aing'ae ojoki ninye, ‘Ainyoo iyasita iyie?’" 
Job9:13 Meshuk Enkai siadi engoro enye; ore tiabori ninye eirrugo ilaretok le Rahab. 
Job9:14 Kaji naa aiko tenawaliki ninye, agelu irorei laainei te nebo ninye?" 
Job9:15 Ore hoo nemaata entorroni, mawaliki ninye; ekaomonu olng'ur to Laitang'oroni lai." 
Job9:16 Tenairorie ninye naawaliki nanu, mairuk ajo keinining'ito ninye oltoilo lai." 
Job9:17 Amu kaar nanu to lkutati ogol neponaa ilbaa laainei meeta emporeet. 
Job9:18 Maaisho ninye nanu mayagie, kake kaaiput ninye nanu emion." 
Job9:19 Ore tenaa kenkesha engolon, ng'ura ninye! Naa tenaa kembae naipirta esipata aing'ae oidim aterewa ninye meshomo?" 
Job9:20 Ore hoo nemaata entioto, naa keiguanareki enkutuk ai; ore hoo nemaata entioto, naa kaaitaa nanu olopaashari." 
Job9:21 Maata nanu entioto; mang'or nanu kewan; meekure aatayie enkishui ai tipat. 
Job9:22 Etaa pooki nabo; metaa atejo, emut ninye ilo lemeeta entioto o lelo torrok." 
Job9:23 Tenelo neyau olbuket keeya aitasieku, nekueniyie engolikinoto e ilo lemeeta entioto." 
Job9:24 Eishooki enkop enkaina e ilo torrono; eimulumul inkomomi oo laiguanak lenyena. Amaa teneme ninye, aing'ae naa ninye?" 
Job9:25 Eten inkolong'i aainei aalang oltung'ani oipirri; eisik aailanyisho, medol ninche esidano." 
Job9:26 Eish enkishui ai anaa emeli nakuet oleng, anaa olkurragos odoiki aibung entoki nainos." 
Job9:27 Tenajo, ‘Madamu nanu enking'unyung'uny ai, ekaiwuang'ie esototo enkomom ai, naaku oloota enchipai’;" 
Job9:28 naureishoyu oleng te nkaraki inyamalaritin aainei, amu ayiolo ajo, mikintaa iyie nanu olemeeta entioto." 
Job9:29 Ekaaku oloiguanareki; kainyoo naa peyie aasisho te mpesho? 
Job9:30 Tenaituku kewan te ntoki naibor anaa enturoto, naituku inkaik aainei to sabuni ogol." 
Job9:31 Naa aikinang'aki ake iyie nanu engumoto, ore ninye inkilani aainei naaibayu nanu." 
Job9:32 Amu ime oltung'ani ninye anaa nanu, metaa kaidim atawaliki ninye, metaa aikipuonu metetemi iyiook te nebo." 
Job9:33 Metii olarishani erishata ang, oidim aiteleiki enkaina enye shumata iyiook." 
Job9:34 Inchoo ninye eiwuang'ie eng'udi enye te shumata nanu, nimincho engoro enye aaiture nanu." 
Job9:35 Ina peyie aaitieu airoro imbaa enyena maata enkuretisho amu ime neijia atiu tiatua enkewan ai. 
Job10:1 Aibayie enkishui ai tukul; ekaisho enkiroroto e pesho enking'unyung'uny ai; ekairo tiatua emion oltau lai. 
Job10:2 Ekajoki nanu Enkai, mikidung'oki nanu enkiguana; intayioloki nanu nchere ainyoo peyie kiarare nanu." 
Job10:3 Idol aa sidai te iyie tinikimbooki enkop, pee imenaa esiaai oo nkaik inono, nincho omom inkitobirat e lelo torrok?" 
Job10:4 Iyata iyie inkonyek o sesen? Idol iyie anaa enadol tung'ani. 
Job10:5 Amaa inkolong'i inono ketiu anaa inkolong'i e tung'ani arashu ilarin linono ketiu anaa ilarin le tung'ani? 
Job10:6 Metaa ing'oru aturu ingok aainei, nijurru ingok aainei." 
Job10:7 Ore hoo duoo nayiolo ajo iyiolo ajo maata entioto, nemeetae hoo obo oidim aitajeu too nkaik inono?" 
Job10:8 Enkaina ino naaitobirua nanu; nikinyaaka taata aibelekenyakino nanu aaidaikie. 
Job10:9 Tadamu ajo kintobirua apa nanu te nterit, naa aikintoki aigil arrinyoki nanu enterit?" 
Job10:10 Keitu iyie kibuku nanu anaa kule nikimposhu nanu anaa eng'orno? 
Job10:11 Kinchopo nanu to lchoni o to sesen nikirip nanu aitutum iloik omorlooishi. 
Job10:12 Kinchoo nanu enkishui o enyorrata nauno; ore erripoto ino netorripo oltau lai. 
Job10:13 Naa ore nena tokitin nisudoyie tiatua oltau lino; ayiolo ajo ena apa eyieuna ino. 
Job10:14 Tenaas eng'oki, nikiut nanu, nimikipalaki nanu entorroni ai." 
Job10:15 Na tenara oltorrono, oi kewan ai. Naa tenara osupat, nemashumu elukunya ai, amu aabore enkurruna, naing'or olosilisil lai." 
Job10:16 Naa tenadumu kewan ailepie, niking'oru nanu anaa olng'atuny ore ake sii nias inenking'asia enkaraki nanu;" 
Job10:17 intang'ejuk shakenisho ino tenkaraki nanu, niponaa engoro ino aitubulu tenkaraki nanu, niyau ilororani ng'ejuko maatigilunore nanu." 
Job10:18 Ainyoo peyie kiyaua nanu aitupuku te ng'uset? Enaikash apa tenatua eitu aadol toki," 
Job10:19 natiu anaa aimaatae apa aekata. Aatanapaki te ng'uset aaya enkurare. 
Job10:20 Aimekuti inkolong'i enkishui ai? Tapalaki nanu, pee atum anoto enkiti kiyagata." 
Job10:21 Eton eitu alo ine nemashukunore ina kop engoro natii enaimin nagut," 
Job10:22 enkop engoro o longolingoli naa ore ewang'an netiu anaa enaimin.” 
Job11:1 Neitoki Sofa le Naamat awal, ajo:" 
Job11:2 “Keishori irorei kumok meshomo eitu ewali, neishori oltung'ani oiro oleng esipata?" 
Job11:3 Ijo doi keitigir enkiratirat ino iltung'ana, naa tininya kutuk ajo miata entioto, aimeeta obo likintukurru iyie?" 
Job11:4 Amu ijoito, ‘Ore enkiteng'enare ai naa kesila, nara sinyati te dukuya nkonyek e Nkai.’" 
Job11:5 Kake ore duoo tenaa keiro Enkai, nikiboloki ninye enkutuk enye," 
Job11:6 naa aikiliki ninye iyie inkisudorot eng'eno nagut! Amu kitok ening'unoto enye. Tayiolo nchere aikiririki Enkai nkuti nemeba anaa nkitarruorot inono. 
Job11:7 Indim atayiolo intokitin naagut naaipirta Enkai? Indim atayiolo ineebaiki Olmagilani? 
Job11:8 Ekeilep oleng aalang keper, kainyoo indim ataasa? Egut alang enemeneng'a, kainyoo indim atayiolo?" 
Job11:9 Ore entemet enye neado alang enkop, nelala alang enaiposha." 
Job11:10 Amaa teneimaa ninye enkop, neenaa olorere, neipotu adung'oki enkiguana aing'ae oidim aibooi ninye?" 
Job11:11 Amu eyiolo Enkai lelo tung'ana lemeeta tipat; amaa tenedol ninye entorroni, aimeshilaa ninye?" 
Job11:12 Kake ore oltung'ani omoda naa ketum ening'unoto; oo teneini olkurrarru le ntim aa tung'ani. 
Job11:13 Tenintorioki oltau lino esipata, nilak nkaik inono aitorioki ninye." 
Job11:14 Tenetii entorroni enkaina ino, iwuang'ie intalamai, nimincho intorrok emany atua ilng'oborri linono." 
Job11:15 Nesipayu katukul ina kata nchere idumu enkomom ino metii entioto; iyaku oloserian, nimiureishoyu." 
Job11:16 Naa aikirikino osina lino; idamu ninye anaa inkariak naatulusoitie. 
Job11:17 Ore enkishon ino newang'u alang enaiwulie enkolong; ore enaimin enye netiu anaa entadekenya. 
Job11:18 Naa aitum empijan amu etii osiligi; naa aikirripi nilo ayeng'iyeng'a te seriani. 
Job11:19 Irraga airura, nemeeta likae likipik enkuretisho; eomonu ilkumok omom ino." 
Job11:20 Kake ore inkonyek oltorrono nemeitoki aadolisho. Ore enkoitoi pooki naaisikie naa keimin te ninche, ore osiligi lenye neyang enabayie.”" 
Job12:1 Neitoki Yoab awal ajo," 
Job12:2 “Meeta inchere irara iltung'ana, naa keish eng'eno nagut te intae tiniyeye." 
Job12:3 Kake kaata ening'unoto anaa intae; madou sii doi nanu te ntae. Aing'ae lemeyiolo intokitin naaijo kuna? 
Job12:4 Ara nanu entoki nakueniyieki too ilchoreta laainei, nanu, ilo oipoto Enkai naawaliki ninye nanu, oltung'ani supat lemeeta entioto, ataa entoki nakueniyieki." 
Job12:5 Ore tiatua ndamunot oo ltung'ana lemeeta enyamali olmena te lelo ootijing'a olbuket ioshiosho oltung'ani letaa kejo pee ebatata openy. 
Job12:6 Ore ilng'oborri loo laikonyak neeta eseriani, ore lelo ooitagor Enkai neserian, lelo ooen Enkai enye aapik enkaina enye." 
Job12:7 Kake inkilikuana ing'uesi, naa aikinteng'en ninche iyie, ore nena motonyi o loing'ang'e, naa aikiliki ninche iyie;" 
Job12:8 arashu inkaitubulu e nkop, naa aikinteng'en iyie; ore lelo sinkir le naiposha naa aikimbalakinye iyie." 
Job12:9 Kaa te kuna pooki nemeyiolo ajo, enkaina Olaitoriani nataasa ena." 
Job12:10 Etii atua enkaina enye enkishui e pooki toki naishu, netii enkiyang'et e pooki tung'ani." 
Job12:11 Aimetem enkiok irorei, anaa enatem enoret endaa?" 
Job12:12 Etii eng'eno nagut atua emoruo, ore ening'unoto netii atua enkadori oo nkolong'i." 
Job12:13 Atua Enkai etii eng'eno nagut o emagilanisho; eeta eutaroto o ening'unoto. 
Job12:14 Tenesulaki enkop, nemeetae oloidim atesheta; teneikenoo oltung'ani tiatua, meetae oloidim atabolo." 
Job12:15 Teneibooyo inkariak, netoyu pooki; teneirriwaa aipang'ie, nenum enkop." 
Job12:16 Atua ninye etii engolon o eng'eno nagut; ore ilo oleji o lolejisho naa ilenyena. 
Job12:17 Eiwuang'ie ilautarok meeta toki, neitaa ilarishak ilmoda." 
Job12:18 Eitadoyio ilaiguanak, neitaa ninche ilooena, neeniki impolosi enye enkimeita." 
Job12:19 Etorikoyie ilapolosak meeta toki nenang'aa lelo magil. 
Job12:20 Emitiki enkiroroto lelo oisiligayu neya aoru emusunoto lelo tung'ana kituaak. 
Job12:21 Ebukoki enkurruna lelo kituaak, neitololong ina kimeita e ilo ogol." 
Job12:22 Eibalunye nena naagut e naimin, neyau enaimin nagut apik ewang'an." 
Job12:23 Eitaa ninye iloreren kituaak, neitoki aidakie ninche, eitasapuk iloreren, nerikoo aiwuang'ie." 
Job12:24 Eya aiwuang'ie ening'unoto too laiguanak le nkop, neisho ninche metilimanata to lpurkel lemetii enkoitoi." 
Job12:25 Eirrapirrapisho ninche te naimin metii ewang'an neesiesari anaa olamerani. 
Job13:1 Ing'ura, etoduaa enkong'u ai kuna pooki, etoning'o enkiok ai nening'u ninye." 
Job13:2 Ore ina niyiolo nayiolo sii nanu, maaure iyie tukul." 
Job13:3 Kake ekairorie Olmagilani, nayieu naishankarra embae ai te Nkai." 
Job13:4 Ore iyie, nikitumuraki te nturoto e lejare irara intae pooki ilabaak le pesho." 
Job13:5 Oi duoo tenaa intirring'a agira, naa keaku ina eng'eno ino nagut!" 
Job13:6 Inining'u tena kata embae najo, nining'u olkiyioi oing'uaa enkutuk ai." 
Job13:7 Indim airoro emonkoi aipirie Enkai niro to losek tenkaraki ninye? 
Job13:8 Indim aitodolu olkep te ninye indim atoomonu ororei te ninye? 
Job13:9 Kesipa aisidai te iyie tenikituru ninye iyie aing'oru? Arashu aindim ateleja ninye, anaa enalej oltung'ani olikae?" 
Job13:10 Aikisikong ninye iyie katukul tenaa intodolu olkep too nkisudorot. 
Job13:11 Amaa enkitoo enye aimikinture iyie, o engoro enye tinikibatatakino iyie?" 
Job13:12 Ore indung'eta inono e rashe kumok netiu anaa inkuruon, ore enchankar ino netiu anaa enterit." 
Job13:13 Nchooki nanu matigirayu, naitoki airo, naa inchoo aatum pooki naaba enaa enaatum." 
Job13:14 Ekapik enkishui ai batisho, nchoo aiwuang'ie enkishui ai." 
Job13:15 Ng'ura ajo kaar ninye matua, aaiting'o osiligi kake kamitu inkoitoi aainei te dukuya enkomom enye." 
Job13:16 Ena naaku enjeunoto ai, inchere melotu oltung'ani lemeeta Enkai dukuya ninye." 
Job13:17 Inining'u tukurraki irorei laainei, nincho embae nalimu aibalie ejing'u inkiyiaa inono." 
Job13:18 Ng'ura, aitobira enkiguana ai; ayiolo ajo aata esipata." 
Job13:19 Aing'ae ilo laalotu akeshare nanu? Amu ina kata agira nanu naye. 
Job13:20 Intokitin are ake inchooki nanu, nemaitoki aisudoo kewan te nkomom ino:" 
Job13:21 iwuang'ie enkaina ino intalamai te nanu, nimincho olkirutoto lino aaiture nanu." 
Job13:22 Nimpotisho iyie, naawaliki nanu, oi inchooki nanu mairoro, nikiwaliki iyie nanu." 
Job13:23 Kaja esiana oo ntorrok aainei o ng'ok aainei? Intayioloki nanu intorrok aainei o eng'oki ai. 
Job13:24 Ainyoo peyie isudoo enkomom ino, nikinkenaa nanu anaa olmang'atinta lino?" 
Job13:25 Isujaa iyie embeneyio nayaita osiwuo, nimir errarrati natoyio?" 
Job13:26 Amu ingero iyie mbaa e mion te nkaraki nanu, nikintijing nanu entorroni e kitisho ai." 
Job13:27 Itipika nkejek aainei ilpisia, ningor inkoitoi aainei pooki, itipika ienat ndapi oo nkejek aainei." 
Job13:28 Eidaaya tung'ani anaa entoki natong'ua anaa enkila nainosa oriri. 
Job14:1 Ore tung'ani otoiwuo enkitok naa oloo nkolong'i kuti, nebore enyamali." 
Job14:2 Epuku abulu anaa entapukai, netoyu; nelo anaa oloip, nemeitoki alo." 
Job14:3 Naa aibol inkonyek inono aboloki olaaijo ilo, niyau ninye atua enkiguana ino." 
Job14:4 Aing'ae oidim ayau entoki naiduruk tiatua enemeiduruk? 
Job14:5 Ore amu etuutuaki aaibalie inkolong'i enyena, ore esiana oo lapaitin lenyena niata iyie, nituutua ineebaiki metaa meidim aima." 
Job14:6 Mintoki aing'or ninye, tapala ninye inchoo ninye eshipakino enkishui enye nagol, tenaa keidim." 
Job14:7 Eeta olchani otudung'oki osiligi, tenedung'i, naa keitoki abulu, nemetoyu intapuka enyena." 
Job14:8 Ore hoo tenemusanu intona enyena tiatua enkop, netoyu aye olchani lenye tiatua enkop." 
Job14:9 Kake ore ake peyie etum enkiti are nepok; nepuku ilng'osil anaa enkiti aitubului. 
Job14:10 Kake keye oltung'ani, neirragieki aaitadoyio tiabori; eyang oltung'ani enabayie, naa koree ninye?" 
Job14:11 Ore anaa enasulunye inkariak te naiposha, neish oreyiet netoyu." 
Job14:12 Neijia etiu oltung'ani eirrag nemeitoki adumunye; o metaa meetae keper, meitoki adumunye, arashu edumuni aaitung'uaa injo enyena." 
Job14:13 Oi naaji tenaa aikisudoo nanu te nemeneng'a, nikisudoo nanu ometogiroi engoro ino, metaa aikigelaki nanu erishata niyiolo, nikidamu nanu!" 
Job14:14 Amaa teneye oltung'ani keitoki apiu aigil? Ore inkolong'i aainei pooki esiaai ai naa kaanyu. Ometabau elakunoto ai. 
Job14:15 Impotisho iyie naa kaairuk nanu iyie, iyieu oleng esiaai oo nkaik inono." 
Job14:16 Amu ina kata inken iroruat aainei, nimintoki aing'or ingok aainei;" 
Job14:17 ore intorrok aainei neripari aaikenoo to lbene, naa aintemoo aimulumulaa ingok aainei." 
Job14:18 Kake esulunye ildoinyo nerrarra aaishunye, neitayuni indapidapo too wuejitin enye." 
Job14:19 Neoroo inkariak isoito, neoroo olairrag le nkare enterit, metaa iishie iyie osiligi le tung'ani." 
Job14:20 Itimira oltung'ani nitii shumata ninye ntarasi. Itumuguta enkomom enye nireu ninye aitalamaa. 
Job14:21 Epuonu ilayiok lenyena aayanyit, nemeyiolo ninye; eyawuaki ninche abori, neitu emusu aayiolou." 
Job14:22 Emion ake osesen lenye ening'ito, naa kewan ake eishiraki.”" 
Job15:1 Neitoki Elifas le Tema awal ajo: 
Job15:2 “Amaa oltung'ani ng'en, keishaakino newal te ng'eno e nkijape, neiput kewan te nkijape oloosaen?" 
Job15:3 Keishankarra ninye te nkiroroto nemeeta tipat, arashu too rorei lemeidim aitaasa ae sidai?" 
Job15:4 Kake igira aitalamaa ina uriata e Nkai, nimbooyo enkibirribirrata te dukuya Enkai." 
Job15:5 Amu ingok inono naaiteng'en enkutuk ino, nigelu olng'ejep le lejare." 
Job15:6 Enkutuk ino makewan nikidung'oki iyie enkiguana, mme nanu, nikinchakenoki iyie enkutuk ino makewan." 
Job15:7 Aiyie doi apa oltung'ani le dukuya otoiwuoki? Arashu aikiyawuaki apa eton meetae ildoinyo? 
Job15:8 Inining'ishe iyie tiatua enkiguana Enkai? Naa amaa eng'eno nagut intodorrop aiririki enkorrok ino ake? 
Job15:9 Ainyoo doi iyiolo iyie nimikiyiolo iyiook? Ainyoo doi ining'u iyie nemeibala te iyiook? 
Job15:10 Eboitare iyiook lelo ooibor lukuny, tenebo lelo kituaak te iyiook. Ilaa kituaak ninche te papaai lino:" 
Job15:11 Amaa nkilejilej e Nkai a kutiti te iyie, oo ilo rorei likirorie iyie te mborron?" 
Job15:12 Ainyoo peyie incho oltau lino mikitanapa aitalamaa, naa ainyoo peyie incho inkonyek inono eirriap?" 
Job15:13 Nimbelekeny oltau lino aarare Enkai, nincho irorei ootiu neijia epuku te nkutuk ino?" 
Job15:14 Ainyoo doi oltung'ani metaa keidim ataa olemeiduruk? Arashu ilo otoiwuo enkitok, metaa keidim ataa supat?" 
Job15:15 Ing'ura, mepik Enkai osiligi isinyat lenyena, nemesinya keper too nkonyek enyena;" 
Job15:16 kebaa engoroto e ilo lo lminong, naa arruoni, oltung'ani ook intorrok anaa enkare!" 
Job15:17 Ekaaitodol nanu iyie ininingoki nanu; ore ina natoduaa naa kaibalunye. 
Job15:18 (Ina natolimutuo iltung'ana le ngeno nagut, neitu eisudoo iloomenye," 
Job15:19 ilo laa ninye ake eishooki ina kop, nemeetae olomoni oimayie ninche.)" 
Job15:20 Etoyu oltung'ani torrono te mion enye too nkolong'i enyena pooki, tiatua lelo arin pooki ooirragieki, te nkaraki ilo lemeeta olng'ur." 
Job15:21 Etii inkiyiaa enyena iltoiloishi ooitureisho; ore etudupe, nelotu oloidaikie shumata ninye." 
Job15:22 Meiruk ninye ajo keitoki arrinyo aing'uaa enaimin. Naa olalem elo ninye aitingoki. 
Job15:23 Elimana ninye te nkop pooki eing'oru endaa ejo, ‘Kaji etii?’ Eyiolo ajo etabawua enkolong enaimin, etabaikia ninye;" 
Job15:24 ore osina o emion neiture ninye; nebaiki ninye anaa olaiguanani otanape pee elo olarrabal. 
Job15:25 Amu eitorioyie ninye enkaina enye aarare Enkai, neyaki esarkionisho ilo Magilani." 
Job15:26 Ekuetiki ninye te ngolong'akinoto aarare ninye, eibung elong'o enye nairrusha o lwuasa." 
Job15:27 Amu eteijia enkomom enye te mpiron neirrag enkurriny too lairakuj lenyena. 
Job15:28 Netamanya inkanas mijoonto, atua nkajijik nememanya, apa naatudung'okoki enkiguana metaa osototi loo suut;" 
Job15:29 meaku ninye karsis, nemebikoo karsisisho enye nemetum intona tiatua enkop." 
Job15:30 Meilany ninye enaimin, ore olang'at le nkima neitoi imbenek enyena ore enkipilipil enye naa kekutaa osiwuo." 
Job15:31 Mincho ninye epik osiligi lenye entoki nemeetae, alej kewan; amu ore entoki nemeetae naa keaku elaakinoto enye." 
Job15:32 Ekelaki te lulung'ata eng'or enkata enye, ore olng'osila lenye nemenyoriju." 
Job15:33 Keipiripiroo ninye lelo sabibu lenyena leitu eku, anaa ilo shani lenye, neiturraa adung'oo esidano enye anaa oloirien." 
Job15:34 Amu ore encholiek e lelo lemeeta Enkai naa koolupi. Naa keidaikie enkima ilo ng'obor lo loropisho. 
Job15:35 Enutayu ninche too ntorrok, neiu ingok ore oltau lenye neitobiru elejare.”" 
Job16:1 Ina peyie ewal Yoab ejo: 
Job16:2 “Atoning'o nanu intokitin kumok naatiu neija; irara pooki ilaitagolok te nkata o sina. 
Job16:3 Amaa irorei le nkijape keeta enkiting'oto? Arashu ainyoo doi nikintagoro peyie iwalu? 
Job16:4 Ekaidim sii nanu airoro anaa iyie, tenaa naaji itii erishata ai anaata aitulus irorei tenebo pee aagilunore naigusugusie elukunya ai te iyie." 
Job16:5 Ekaaitagol iyie te nkutuk ai, ore enkitagoloto e nkiroroto ai neiwuang'ie emion ino." 
Job16:6 Tenairo nemeish emion ai, naa amaa tenangiri, kebaa emion naaing'uaa nanu?" 
Job16:7 Esipa taata aatalepuo Enkai tukul; eitomijoono ninye encholiek ai pooki. 
Job16:8 Kimbung'a iyie nanu akurraki; ira iyie olmang'atinta lai. Ara nanu endapana o loik neibung'a iltung'ana ina pee eishakenoki entorroni ai. 
Job16:9 Aatopolosa ninye te ng'oro enye, naaibayu nanu; etoonyo ninye ilala te nkaraki nanu. Ore olmang'atinta lai naakurraki inkonyek enyena." 
Job16:10 Aatusurdaanya iltung'ana nanu too nkutukie enye, aatoosho ninche nanu eseder, eiturrurrote pooki peyie aarare nanu." 
Job16:11 Aaishooyie nanu Enkai aitarasaki lelo lemeure Enkai, naanang'aki nanu nkaik e lelo arruok." 
Job16:12 Atonita apa te seriani, kake aaibung'a ninye nanu olgos, naadung'udung aitaa ndung'ot. Aaitasheyie ninye nanu aitaa oloitoriokino lenye." 
Job16:13 Aamanita nanu imbaa enyena naatang'oruo te pooki shoto, etangoro apolol ilairakuj laainei, nemepal nebukoki olodua lai enkop." 
Job16:14 Aarasaki ninye naapik ilbaa katitin kumok naakuetiki ninye nanu anaa olmurrani. 
Job16:15 Atiripaka ilkuniyiani osesen lai, neirragie engolon ai tiatua enterit." 
Job16:16 Etodoro enkomom ai te nkishirata, netiu inkonito aainei o nkonyek anaa enaimin nagut;" 
Job16:17 ore hoo nemetii olarrabal inkaik aainei, naa kesila enkomono ai." 
Job16:18 Na kop, minukaa osarge lai, nimincho enkishirata ai etum eneeng'iyeng'are." 
Job16:19 Ore doi ninye tena kata ng'ura, etii olchakeni lai keper, peyie eitashe terishata ai." 
Job16:20 Kaasurdaany ilchoreta laainei; ore inkonyek aainei nebukoki Enkai ilkiyio. 
Job16:21 Metaa ekeitasheyie esipata e tung'ani o e Nkai, anaa ina oltung'ani tenebo ole latia enye." 
Job16:22 Amu ore eetuo ilkuti arin, ekalo aim enkoitoi nemaitoki ashukunye." 
Job17:1 Etigile oltau lai, eishunye inkolong'i aainei, etataana enkurare te nanu." 
Job17:2 Esipa etii tenebo nanu ilasukenyak, ore inkonyek aainei netii esurdaany enye." 
Job17:3 Irragie elakunoto ai te kewan ino; kalo likae om aishoru elakunoto te nkaraki nanu. 
Job17:4 Ore amu inkeno indamunot enye peyie mening'u, mincho naa ninche meisula." 
Job17:5 Ore ilo okaldaa ilchoreta lenyena too mpisai, pee etum erubata oo masaa enye, naa kemodoku nkera enyena." 
Job17:6 Aaitaa ninye nanu entoki naimakini too loreren; nara obo le lelo oonotaki iltung'ana. 
Job17:7 Eiliilaitie inkonyek aainei te nkaraki olkiyioi lo sina, ore irubat o sesen lai netiu anaa oloip." 
Job17:8 Ore lelo ooitashe too sipat neing'asia tena, ore ilo lemeeta entioto neitagor kewan te lelo lemeure Enkai." 
Job17:9 Kake ore isupati nekurraki enkoitoi enye, ore ilo oota inkaik nemeiduruk nebulaa agolu." 
Job17:10 Kake ore intae enyaaki wootu intae pooki, nematum nanu oltung'ani ng'en te ntae pooki." 
Job17:11 Etulusoitie inkolong'i aainei, ore nkitobirat aainei netudung'oyioki aaituraa, o nena yieunot oltau lai." 
Job17:12 Eitaa ninche enaimin endama; ‘Ore ewang'an, anaa enajo ninche, netaaniki enaimin.’" 
Job17:13 Tenaing'oru enemeneng'a aitaa enkaji ai, tenaisalaash olorika lai te naimin," 
Job17:14 Tenajoki enkurare, ‘Ira iyie papa lai’ najoki ilo kurto, ‘Ira yeiyio lai’; arashu ‘Enkanashe ai,’" 
Job17:15 koree naa teine osiligi lai? Aing'ae odol osiligi lai? 
Job17:16 Kelo ninye atua ine netii iloom le nemeneng'a? Amaa aikidoyio pokira aapuo atua enterit. 
Job18:1 Neitoki Bildad le Shuhit awal, ejo:" 
Job18:2 Kenkata nabaa iyie ing'oru irorei? Tujurru, ina peyie kiro." 
Job18:3 Ainyoo peyie eikenari iyiook anaa nkishu? Ainyoo peyie kira iyiook lmoda te dukuya iyie? 
Job18:4 Iyie ilo opolos kewan te ngoro ino, keing'uari enkop te nkaraki iyie, arashu eiwuang'ieki endapidapoi aaitung'uaa ewueji enye?" 
Job18:5 Ee, ore ewang'an oo ltorrok netaaraki. Ore olang'at le nkima enye nemeitoki awang." 
Job18:6 Ore ewang'an naa kemisimis to lng'obor lenye, ore oltaa otii shumata enye neari." 
Job18:7 Ore iroruat enyena naagol neitodorropi, ore inkoitoi enyena nenang'aa ninye." 
Job18:8 Amu etanang'akaki atua orreshet too nkejek enyena, nelo te nkoitoi nebatatakino." 
Job18:9 Eibung orreshet entutunyo enye, neirrag orreshet oibung ninye." 
Job18:10 Eisudoro olgosoi lenye tiatua enkop, orreshet otii enkoitoi enye." 
Job18:11 Emanita ninye inaaitureisho te pooki alole, nemir ninye too nkejek enyena." 
Job18:12 Ore engolon enye apa, netaa taata olameyu te ninye, netinyikaka ninye engolikinoto pee error." 
Job18:13 Ore te nkaraki emuoyian netumute osesen lenye ore olkikau le keeya netumuta irubat o sesen lenye. 
Job18:14 Etopolosaki ninye teilo lng'obor apa oisilig neyauni ninye aayaki ilo aiguanani oitureisho. 
Job18:15 Netii olng'obor lenye ina neme enenye; ebore enkima aidapashakino emanyisho enye pooki. 
Job18:16 Etoito intona enyena tiabori netoyu imbenek enyena too lukuny. 
Job18:17 Neish endamunoto enye te nkop, nemeeta enkarna too nkoitoi naalala." 
Job18:18 Eturrumoyioki ninye te wang'an aanang'aki enaimin, nerewi aaitung'uaa enkop." 
Job18:19 Meeta ninye eishoi arashu iishoritin tiatua olorere, nemeetae oloishu teine apa nemanya." 
Job18:20 Ore lelo oomanya oloontoluo, neing'asiate teina olong enye, neibung ninche olkirutoto lo loosaen." 
Job18:21 Esipa imanyishoritin kuna e lelo lemeure Enkai, ewueji ene eilo lemeyiolo Enkai.”" 
Job19:1 Neitoki Yoab awal ajo: 
Job19:2 “Kenkata nabaa kisilisil iyie nanu, nikigiligil aitaa ndung'ot too rorei?" 
Job19:3 Kindipa atipika nanu enkurruna kuna katitin tomon, aimidol iyie enkurruna tenikinyal nanu?" 
Job19:4 Naa tenaa kesipa doi inchere aitarruoyie, etii enkinyala ai atua enkorrok ai." 
Job19:5 Tenesipa tukul ajo intasapuk kewan kiarare nanu, nintaa emborron ai, enchankar nikiarare nanu;" 
Job19:6 tayiolo naa ajo aatipika Enkai nanu atua entorroni, naaitamana nanu orreshet lenye." 
Job19:7 Ng'ura, aishira abuaku ajo ‘Olarrabal!’ kake eitu aawalikini; aipotishe to ltoilo sapuk, kake metii esipata." 
Job19:8 Etipika esuntai enkoitoi ai, metaa maidim aima, netipika enaimin inkoitoi aainei." 
Job19:9 Aatooruo ninye nanu enkitoo ai, neya te nanu enkopiyia enkitoo te ndukuya ai." 
Job19:10 Aagiligil nanu too nkaloli pooki, netaa aisha, neitayio ninye osiligi lenye anaa olchani." 
Job19:11 Einuaa ninye engoro enye napi peyie aarare, naaikenaa nanu aitaa olmang'atinta lenye." 
Job19:12 Eirriwua ninye iltimito lenyena maataarare netur ninche iloong'elu, naarresh ninche eman olng'obor lai." 
Job19:13 Eitalamayie ninye iltung'ana maatung'uai ataa olomoni te lelo pooki laayiolo nanu. 
Job19:14 Aatung'uaitie iltung'ana laainei le sotua tenebo ilchoreta laainei. 
Job19:15 Ore ilomon ootii enkaji ai nemaadamu ninche nanu; ore inkaisiaayiak aainei naaikenaa anaa olomoni; ataa nanu olomoni too nkonyek enye. 
Job19:16 Aipoto nanu osinka lai, kake eitu ninye aawaliki; meeta nchere masai nanu ninye te nkutuk ai." 
Job19:17 Ataa kereek te nkitok ai, naatonyimo ilayiok lang'arie kina." 
Job19:18 Ore ninye nkera kutiti naatemenaitie nanu, ore tenainyototo neimaki imbaa olmena te nanu." 
Job19:19 Ore ilchoreta laainei likinyorra oleng naaing'or ninche to lmena, ore lelo apa lanyor naaibelekenyakinote aarare." 
Job19:20 Ore iloik laainei netaremo olchoni lai o sesen lai, naa te mpesho nanu ailanya keeya aimisho." 
Job19:21 Eng'urrieki nanu, eng'urrieki nanu, intae lo shoreta laainei, amu aatoshoroyie nanu enkaina Enkai!" 
Job19:22 Kainyoo iyie pee kisujaa nanu anaa Enkai? Kainyoo iyie pee mikindip enkisilisiloto o sesen lai? 
Job19:23 Oi naaji tenaa keigeroki te mbuku! Nedamuni pooki aiger te mbuku. 
Job19:24 Naa tenaa keigeroki te nkalamu e sekenkei naata esipil! Pee eguetakini endapidapoi ntarasi! 
Job19:25 Amu ayiolo ajo eishu olalakunoni lai, naa ore te siadi neitashe ti oriong enkop;" 
Job19:26 neaku ore eidipaki aatumut osesen lai, naitoki ake adol Enkai to sesen lai," 
Job19:27 ilo ladol etii enkalo ai, naa kadol too nkonyek aainei; neme too ne likae. Eiterre oltau lai tiatua nanu!" 
Job19:28 Naa tinijo, ‘Kaji kinko tinikisuj ninye!’ Naa ‘Ore esipata embae netumi ti atua ninye’;" 
Job19:29 turia ilo alem, amu eyau engoro napi enkitamioto to lalem, peyie itum atayiolo inchere eetae endung'okinoto enkiguana.”" 
Job20:1 Neitoki Sofa le Naamat awal ajo," 
Job20:2 “Metaa aatawalikitia indamunot aainei nanu, tenkaraki nakuetiki imbaa te nkewan ai." 
Job20:3 Aning'ito elap aasukenyita nanu, ore te ning'unoto ai naawaliki nanu enkiyang'et." 
Job20:4 Keitu apa iyiolou ena temusano, anaa apa peyie epiki tung'ani oriong e nkop." 
Job20:5 Inchere ore enkisulata eilo torrono naa dorrop, ore enchipai e ilo lemeeta Enkai naa enkiti kata?" 
Job20:6 Ore hoo duoo neilep aaku ildoinyo aabaiki keper enkadori enye, nebaiki elukunya enye inkatampo;" 
Job20:7 keish ninye intarasi anaa inkik enyena; ore lelo ootoduaa ninye naa kejo, ‘Koree doi ninye?’" 
Job20:8 Ekeipid ninye alo too naipuko anaa enkidetidet, nemetumoyu; kearari ninye aitalamaa anaa enduaata e nkewarie." 
Job20:9 Ore nena onyek apa naatoduaa ninye, nemeitoki aekata aaigil aadol, nemeigil aekata ewueji enye adol ninye." 
Job20:10 Ore nkera enyena neing'oru omom teilo aisinani, ore inkaik enyena nerriny aaishooyo enkarsisisho enye." 
Job20:11 Ore iloik lenyena nebore engolon e kitisho, kake keirrag ninche tenebo ninye tiatua enterit." 
Job20:12 Ore hoo duoo nemelok intorrok te nkutuk enye, ore hoo duoo neisudoo ninye tiabori olng'ejep lenye," 
Job20:13 ore hoo nemeyieu ninye nepal, nemuk ninye te nkutuk enye," 
Job20:14 kake eibelekenyi ake aaitaduar endaa enye te nkoshoke, edua naleng anaa enduaran e pooki sayiet." 
Job20:15 Eijoo ninye enkarsisisho neitoki alopu; eitayu Enkai ninche anang'aa te nkoshoke enye. 
Job20:16 Eibibi ninye esayiet, olng'ejep le nturbubua olo aar ninye." 
Job20:17 Melo ninye aing'or lelo kejek, nena shorroi naaruko inaishi o kule." 
Job20:18 Kerriny ninye aaishooyo ilng'anayio le siaai enye, nemeitoki aekata ninye aijoo aitadoyio; ore dupoto e biashara enye nemetum ninye murruna." 
Job20:19 Amu etupurda ninye neing'uaa lelo aisinak, eibung'a ninye aikonyaa enkaji neitu eshet." 
Job20:20 Ore amu meeta olorok lenye enkiyagata, meleku ninye ae toki hoo nabo nashipakino." 
Job20:21 Meetae entoki natelekua eidipa ninye atadaayu; ore enkaraki ina mebikoo karsisisho enye. 
Job20:22 Ore enkiputakinoto e raposhoi enye, naa osina, kelotu engolon pooki o sina shumata ninye." 
Job20:23 Neiput enkoshoke enye aitaraposh, keirriu Enkai engoro enye napi shumata ninye neitashaiki shumata ninye anaa endaa." 
Job20:24 Keisik ninye aing'uaa emasaai o larrabal e sekenkei nengor ninye embae o suyai neipang. 
Job20:25 Etushutuaki ina bae nepuku to sesen lenye, ore ine wueji neimerlel neipang'u to lodua lenye, neibung ninye enkuretisho." 
Job20:26 Ore ilchumat lenyena pooki nepuo aajing enaimin nagut, enkima neitu einoki nalo amut ninye, ore ina natelekua to lng'obor lenye nemuti." 
Job20:27 Neibalunye keper ing'ok enyena pooki, nedumakino enkop aarare ninye." 
Job20:28 Ore imasaa enkaji enye nenapi aaya neingirtitori aaya teina olong e ngoro napi e Nkai. 
Job20:29 Ena erubata oltung'ani torrono naing'uaa Enkai, enjung'ore naibalakinye ninye Enkai.”" 
Job21:1 Neitoki Yoab awal ajo: 
Job21:2 Inining'o tisipu irorei laainei, nincho ina eaku enkitagoloto ino." 
Job21:3 Ting'iria nchooki nanu mairoro, ore peyie aidip airoro, nisurdaany." 
Job21:4 Amaa nanu, ke iltung'ana aing'unyung'unyaki? Ainyoo peyie maidim ating'iria?" 
Job21:5 Ing'uraki nanu, nimimputukuny, nipik enkaina ino enkutuk ino." 
Job21:6 Ore tenelo nadamu naing'asia oleng, neibung olokirikiri osesen lai." 
Job21:7 Ainyoo peyie eishu lelo ooas intorrok, nebaiki moruao, nebul aaku magil te ng'olon?" 
Job21:8 Etubula inkera enye te dukuya ninche, netodua ninche iishoritin enye too nkonyek enye." 
Job21:9 Ore inkajijik enye neserian metii enkuretisho, nemeetae eng'udi Enkai natii shumata ninche." 
Job21:10 Edumu iloing'ok lenye nkishu nemedung; eisho nkishu enye, nemeiturraa ilasho." 
Job21:11 Eiguran nkera enye anaa lkuoo le kerra, neiguran nkera enye aaipid." 
Job21:12 Eranyisho ninche neosh entampuri, olwulul loo usin, neshipa tenening oltoilo le ndule." 
Job21:13 Etoni te nkishui oo nkolong'i enye eeta enkarsisisho nalulung'a, nedoyio aapuo enemeneng'a te seriani." 
Job21:14 Ejoki ninche Enkai, Shomo tung'uai iyiook! Miking'uar ina ng'eno oo nkoitoi inono." 
Job21:15 Aing'ae doi ilo Magilani, netaa aikisiaiai ninye? Naa kainyoo kitum tinikiomon ninye?" 
Job21:16 Ng'ura, aimetii inkaik enye ina dupoto? Ore enkiguana oo larruok naalakuaniki nanu." 
Job21:17 “Keari aekata oltaa le ilo torrono? Pee edoiki entaboi enye ninche? Neitame Enkai ninche te ngoro enye. 
Job21:18 Eikununo ninche anaa olkujita otoyio to lkutati, netiu anaa isuut naakutaa osiwuo?" 
Job21:19 Ijo iyie, Etushuma Enkai ing'ok enye aitaany ilayiok lenyena. Inchoo ninye elaaki ninche peyie etum aatayiolo." 
Job21:20 Inchoo inkonyek enye metoduaa enkidaata enye, naa nchoo ninche metooko ina goro e ilo Magilani." 
Job21:21 Amu kainyoo eshilaa ninche too nkajijik enye etulusoitie ninche eidipaki aaitodorropa esiana oo lapaitin lenye. 
Job21:22 Ketii obo oidim aiteng'ena Enkai engeno, idol ajo eiguanare ninye lelo ootii shumata?" 
Job21:23 Eye obo eeta enkarsisisho nalulung'a, eidipakine neserian." 
Job21:24 Nebore osesen lenye empiron neruko entolit loo loik lenyena. 
Job21:25 Neye likae te mion oltau, eitu aikata eishamisham esidano." 
Job21:26 Neirrag ninche enyaanyuk tiatua enterit, neiruj ninche olkurto." 
Job21:27 Ng'ura, ayiolo nanu indamunot inono, nkitobirat nikinyalie nanu." 
Job21:28 Amu ijo iyie, ‘Koree enkaji olkitok? Koree ilo ng'obor otonie ilo torrono?’" 
Job21:29 Keitu iyie inkilikuan lelo oopuo too nkoitoi naalala, naa keitu iyie ing'amaa enchakenisho enye," 
Job21:30 inchere etelekuaki ilo tung'ani torrono teina olong e nyamali, inchere eitajeuoki ninye teina olong engoro napi?" 
Job21:31 Aing'ae oidim aibalakinye ninye enkoitoi enye? Naa aing'ae oitalaku te ninye teina nataasa. 
Job21:32 Ore tenenapi ninye aaya enkurare, neing'ori aarrip enkurare enye." 
Job21:33 Esujaa ilkumok osesen lenye epuoi aanukaa, ore enterit e nkop neirrag aitirring'a aitemoo osesen lenye." 
Job21:34 Kaji naa inko iyie tinikintagol nanu te mpesho narok? Meetae toki natelekua too walat inono neme elejare ake.” 
Job22:1 Neitoki Elifas le Teman awal ajo: 
Job22:2 “Keidim oltung'ani ataa oloota tipat te Nkai? Esipa ore ilo ng'en neeta tipat te kewan enye. 
Job22:3 Ke sikar to Lmagilani tenira asipani anaa ke dupoto te ninye tenira olemeeta eleyiata too nkoitoi inono. 
Job22:4 Kenkaraki euriata niure iyie ninye peyie kisikong'a ninye, niking'uanare ninye iyie?" 
Job22:5 Aime sapuk enkarruoisho ino? Meeta intorrok inono enkiting'oto. 
Job22:6 Intagolikio ilalashera linono te sile nitoning'okinote nioru ninye nkilani meshomo meishopo. 
Job22:7 Eitu iyie incho enkare ilo onaure, nitomitikio endaa ilo oota esumash." 
Job22:8 Ore ilo tung'ani ogol naa ninye oya enkop, ore ilo tung'ani onyorri nemany." 
Job22:9 Inchoo nkolia epuo too nkaik naarook, ore inkaik e lelo okishin nigil." 
Job22:10 Ore enkaraki ina kintamanaki irresheta, nikijing aluam olkirutoto." 
Job22:11 Eitomisimisoki ewang'an ino pee midolisho, nikimulumula iyie olairrag le nkare." 
Job22:12 Aimetii Enkai shumata keper? Neing'or ilakir tiabori hoo naa shumata etii. 
Job22:13 Metaa itejo iyie kainyoo eyiolo Enkai? Keidim ninye aiguanare enaimin narok ongu? 
Job22:14 Eimulumulayie ninye enkatampoi nairrusha, metaa meidim atoduaa ninye nelo ninye te rishata e keper o enkop." 
Job22:15 Iton aibung ina oitoi musana, naa ninye apa eima ilarruok?" 
Job22:16 Etawuapayioki ninche aaiwuang'ie eng'or enkata enye; etooroyioki aaiwuang'ie olkitamanyunoto lenye. 
Job22:17 Etiakita ninche Enkai, ‘Shomo tung'uai iyiook’ naa ‘Kaa eidim ilo Magilani aitaasa iyiook?’" 
Job22:18 Ore ake etiu neijia eiput ninye nkajijik enye ntokitin sidain, kake ore eutaroto e lelo torrok naalakuaniki nanu." 
Job22:19 Edol lelo supati neshipa; nekueni ilemeeta entioto tenedol ilarruok eitamei; 
Job22:20 ejo, esipa etudung'oyioki aaiwuang'ie ilmang'ati lang, ore ilekunot netumuta enkima." 
Job22:21 Toning'ore Enkai, pee itum eseriani, pee epuonu isupati enitii." 
Job22:22 Tang'amai enkiteng'enare te nkutuk enye, nishum ororei lenye tiatua oltau lino." 
Job22:23 Tinishukokino ilo Magilani nintobor kewan, tiniwuang'ie ntorrok pooki aitalam olng'obor lino," 
Job22:24 tinirragie sahabu te nterit, aashu inang'aa sahabu naisul too lturot ootoito" 
Job22:25 naa teneaku ilo Magilani ninye sahabu ino, naa ninye enkosholai ino naata tipat;" 
Job22:26 nitum taa atishipakinoyu ilo Magilani, nidumu enkomom ino ashumaki Enkai." 
Job22:27 Niomon iyie ninye naa aikining ninye iyie; nilak iyie ilmuma linono. 
Job22:28 Keaku idung iyie embae alimu, netiu neija, naa kewang'u ewang'an too nkoitoi inono." 
Job22:29 Amu keitadou Enkai lelo oowuasa, neitajeu lelo oobor." 
Job22:30 Eitajeu ninye ilo tung'ani lemeeta entioto; aikintajeuni iyie te nkaraki nkaik inono nemeiduruk.” 
Job23:1 Neitoki Yoab awal ajo," 
Job23:2 “Ore sii taata ena olong naa keme enking'unyung'uny ai, ekeiroshi enkaina enye hoo naigorito nanu." 
Job23:3 Ore naaji tenaa kayiolo ewueji natumie ninye, pee elotu doi ninye olorika lenye!" 
Job23:4 Nairragie enkiguana ai te dukuya ninye, naiput enkutuk ai inchankarri." 
Job23:5 Nayiolou ina naawaliki ninye nanu, naning'u ina naajoki ninye nanu." 
Job23:6 Kaagilunore ninye nanu te nkitoo engolon enye? A-a, ekaaning ninye nanu." 
Job23:7 Ore oltung'ani oitashe too sipat neirorie ninye, naalaku olarishani lai intarasi." 
Job23:8 Ng'ura, alotito dukuya, kake metii ninye ine; nashuko siadi, kake mamusu nanu ninye;" 
Job23:9 ore te nkaina e kedienye naing'oru ninye kake madol ninye; naibelekenyakino enkalo e tatene, kake madol nanu ninye." 
Job23:10 Kake eyiolo ninye enkoitoi nalo aim; ore peyie aaidip atetema nanu, nalotu apuku atotiuo anaa sahabu." 
Job23:11 Etuunokinote nkejek aainei iroruat enyena; aibung'a enkoitoi enye neitu apaash. 
Job23:12 Eitu aing'uaa nkitanapat e nkutuk enye; atushuma tiatua oltau lai irorei le nkutuk enye. 
Job23:13 Kake meibelekenya ninye, naa aing'ae oidim aibelekenya ninye? Ore ina nayieu ninye naa ina eas." 
Job23:14 Amu keitabaya ninye ina naategelaka nanu; ore intokitin kumok naaijo nena netii endamunoto. Netii atua endamunoto enye mbaa neeijo nena. 
Job23:15 Metaa airuto nanu te dukuya ninye, ore peyie adamu, naa kaure ninye." 
Job23:16 Eiterreyie Enkai oltau lai; aaituria Olmagilani nanu; 
Job23:17 amu aatiripakine enaimin, neitemoyie enaimin nairrusha enkomom ai." 
Job24:1 Ainyoo pee meiteng'el Olmagilani nkolong'i e nkiguana, naa kainyoo paa ore lelo ooyiolo ninye nemedol aekata inkolong'i enyena?" 
Job24:2 Eiwuang'ie iltung'ana ilpolosien; neibung iluaat oo ntare aapurroo nepuo aaramat. 
Job24:3 Eya ninche osikiria le ilo okishi; neya olkiteng le nkoliai alakie esile enye. 
Job24:4 Errumoo ninche ilo aisinani aaiwuang'ie te nkoitoi ore ilaisinak pooki le nkop neisudoo ate. 
Job24:5 Ng'ura etiu ninche anaa isirkon le ntim to lpurkel epuo te nkisiayiare enye nagol eing'oru eng'ues naibung tiong'ota, pee enya inkera enye." 
Job24:6 Eiturrurru ninche endaa enye tiong'ota, nesot isabibu too nkurman oo larruok." 
Job24:7 Eirrag ninche enkewarie pooki meeta nkilani, nemeeta entoki naitoipore te nkijape." 
Job24:8 Keshal ninche te nchan oo ldoinyio, nepetikino endapidapoi eyieu eneshurie." 
Job24:9 Etii lelo oowuapaa enkerai okishi aaoru ilki, neya pee elakie esile enye enkerai o laisinani." 
Job24:10 Emanimanaa ninche meishopo, meeta nkilani neisumash enap irridat le nkano." 
Job24:11 Tiatua intukusi oo loirienito easisho ninche; eironyu enaisho too sabibu, neton ake eeta enkure." 
Job24:12 Tiauluo enkanasa eigor ilo oye neishiru oltau le ilo otipikaki olbae eretoto. Ore ake eyia, meshilaa Enkai ina omono." 
Job24:13 Etii lelo ooiser eiba ewang'an, lelo leitu emoku inkoitoi enyena, nemetoni too nkoitoi enyena." 
Job24:14 Edumunye ilarruok te naimin, pee etum aataarr metua ilo aisinani o ilo oata osina; ore kewarie netiu anaa olapurroni." 
Job24:15 Eanyu sii enkong'u e ilo ololoito metomisimiso, ejo, ‘meeta enkong'u naadol nanu’; neimulumul enkomom enye." 
Job24:16 Ore te naimin netur inkajijik; ore dama neikenoo ate, nemeyiolo ninche ewang'an." 
Job24:17 Amu enaimin nagut entadekenya enye pooki; amu ilchoreta ninche lo lkirutoto le naimin nagut. 
Job24:18 Itejo, ‘Eitasiooyioki ninche aaya shumata nkariak; etediaaki erubata enye te nkop; meetae ololo nkurman enye oo sabibu." 
Job24:19 Eshol olameyu o enkirouaj neishu aitoi enkare nataa osoit le nkirobi neijia sii eiko enemeneng'a lelo ooas ing'ok. 
Job24:20 Medamuni ninche too lkurrot ootumoreki le nkanasa, meekure edamuni nkarn enye, neaku etigilaki entorroni anaa olchani.’" 
Job24:21 Edaa ninche too nkajijik oo nkituaak olupin, nemeitaas inkolia mbaa supati." 
Job24:22 Ore ake eyia, eitoodor Enkai nkolong'i e ilo Magilani te ngolon enye. Edumunye ninche etapalari te nkishui." 
Job24:23 Eisho ninche erripoto neretuni sii; ore nkonyek enyena neing'or nkoitoi enye. 
Job24:24 Eilepieki ninche te nkiti kata, neitoki aaish; etoyu ninche neish anaa endiati pooki edung'ori ninche anaa ilukuny entapa." 
Job24:25 Naa tenemenejia etiu, aing'ae ooidim aitisipa nchere kara olalejani, neitodolu ajo meetae esipata te pooki natejo nanu?”" 
Job25:1 Neitoki Bildad le Shusi awal ajo," 
Job25:2 “Ene Nkai enkitoria o euriata, eitobir ninye eseriani te shumata enye e keper." 
Job25:3 Keeta enjore enye esiana? Aing'ae meilepaki ewang'an enye? 
Job25:4 Kaji naa eiko oltung'ani teneaku sinyati te dukuya Enkai? Kaji eiko ilo otoiwuo enkitok teneton meiduruk. 
Job25:5 Ng'ura mewang doi ninye olapa nemewang'an aasila ilakir te dukuya ninye. 
Job25:6 Oo naa duoo tung'ani, laa oloti kurto, o enkerai e tung'ani laa enkurto!”" 
Job26:1 Neitoki Yoab awal ajo: 
Job26:2 “Kebaa eretoto nitareto ilo lemeeta engolon. Intajewuo ina aina nemeeta engolon! 
Job26:3 Inkoo ilo lemeeta engeno nagut, nincho ninye te lengon engeno sapuk." 
Job26:4 Aiteretoto e ng'ae iyie iroro irorei naa ae te nkiyang'et e ng'ae etupukutuo te iyie? 
Job26:5 Eikirikira iloipi liabori, o nkariak o lelo oomanya." 
Job26:6 Meishopo enemeneng'a te dukuya Enkai, nemeeta Abadon entoki naitoipieki." 
Job26:7 Eisalaash moikuape aisalaashaki olngam neik enkop aililioki olngam. 
Job26:8 Een inkariak too nkatampo naairrusha, nemepolosa inkatampo tiabori ninche." 
Job26:9 Eitoip ninye olapa neisalaashaki ninye enkatampoi enye. 
Job26:10 Etuutua olokelel tioriong nkariak, to lpolosie le rishata ewang'an o enaimin." 
Job26:11 Eikirikira ing'apeta e keper, neirut aaiputukuny te nkisikong'ata enye." 
Job26:12 Eitigir enaiposha te ngolon enye; te ng'eno enye etoosho Rahab. 
Job26:13 To lkutati lenye eitisidanaki keper; nerem enkaina enye olasurai oilanyisho. 
Job26:14 Ngura, ore kuna naa nkuti ake oo nkoitoi naa kebaa enkitisho enking'oming'om oo mbaa enyena nikitoning'o! Naa amaa endarata engolon enye, aing'ae oidim atoning'u?”" 
Job27:1 Neitoki ake Yoab airo nejo: 
Job27:2 “Ore anaa enaishu Enkai, ilo laaitung'uayie esipata ai, o ilo Magilani, ilo otipika oltau lai emion;" 
Job27:3 ore ake ninye aishu, netii enkiyang'et Enkai nkumeishin aainei," 
Job27:4 mairo te nkutuk ai mbaa e lejare, nemeibalie olng'ejep lai enemesipa." 
Job27:5 Metalakuana te nanu elimunoto nchere, itisipa intae ore omatua, nemaiwuang'ie aekata enkitashoto ai e sipata." 
Job27:6 Ekaibung akurraki esinyatisho ai, nemaitiak, maaitukurru oltau lai too nkolong'i aainei pooki." 
Job27:7 Inchoo olmang'atinta lai eaku oltorrono, nincho ilo laadumakino aarare eaku olarruoni." 
Job27:8 Amaa kainyoo osiligi le ilo lemeure Enkai teneiwuang'ie Enkai ninye, teneiwuang'ie Enkai enkishui enye?" 
Job27:9 Kening Enkai enkishirata enye, tenebaiki ninye enyamali?" 
Job27:10 Keshipakino ninye ilo Magilani? Keipot ninye Enkai pooki kata? 
Job27:11 Ekaaiteng'en nanu iyie enkipirta enkaina e Enkai; ore pooki natii atua Olmagilani nemaisudoo. 
Job27:12 Ng'ura, indipa pooki aatodol maate; kainyoo naa pee itaa pooki ilooiro mbaa e pesho?" 
Job27:13 Ena erubata oltung'ani torrono te Nkai, naa ina enjung'ore nang'amu ilooitorogonyisho te ilo Magilani:" 
Job27:14 Teneponari inkera enyena, naa kemut olalem, ore eishoi enye nemetum endaa naraposh." 
Job27:15 Ore lelo ootelekutua neye to lmeitai ore nkolia enye nemeidim aaishira. 
Job27:16 Ore hoo neiturrurr enkosholai anaa enterit, nerup inkilani anaa esarng'ab;" 
Job27:17 eidim aiturrurro, kake lelo supati ooishop, ore lelo lemeeta entioto neor enkosholai." 
Job27:18 Ore enkaji nashet ninye netiu anaa enkaji o lkedi, anaa olng'obor oitobiru olarriponi." 
Job27:19 Elo ninye endapash aa karsis, neyooki ainyototo eisha karsisisho enye ebol inkonyek enyena, nenyorriki eshomo enkarsisisho enye." 
Job27:20 Eipang'aki ninye oloputukunyi anaa olairrag le nkare; ore kewarie nenap ninye osiwuo sapuk. 
Job27:21 Edumu ninye olkutati lo loo saen neya; eoroo ninye aitung'uaa ewueji enye. 
Job27:22 Ekekut olkutati ninye meeta olng'ur ina kata etem ninye ailany engolon enye. 
Job27:23 Keoshoki olkutati ninye nkaik, neiture ninye aitupuku te wueji enye." 
Job28:1 Esipa etii ewueji neturunyeki enkosholai, netii ewueji nesilieki sahabu." 
Job28:2 Eitayuni esekenkei te nkop, nesholuni osuyai te nterit enye." 
Job28:3 Eishie iltung'ana enaimin, nelimana aaing'oru olpolosie olakua ina terit natii emisimisi te naim nagut." 
Job28:4 Etur ineeimi too nong'ot nemetaaniki iltung'ana; meekure edamu ninche lelo apuayak. Eililio ninche too neelakuaniki iltung'ana neyuko inkaloli pooki. 
Job28:5 Enkop ninye epukunye endaa; kake ore tiabori eatua neibelekenyi aitaa enkima. 
Job28:6 Ore isoito lenyena neeta ewueji oo soito sidain, neeta enterit e sahabu." 
Job28:7 Ore ina oitoi nemetii olmotonyi oinos nkiri oyiolo, neitu edol enkong'u o lmotonyi odolisho oleng." 
Job28:8 Ore ng'uesi naawuasa, eitu eitunyoo ine; neitu eim olng'atuny shumata enye." 
Job28:9 Etur iltung'ana osoit ogol oleng, neibeleleng'oo ildoinyo too ntona enye." 
Job28:10 Eturu ineimi too ndapidapo, nedol enkong'u enye pooki toki sidai." 
Job28:11 Een ninye inchorroi pooki pee meitoki aitong, ore entoki naisudoro neyau atua ewang'an." 
Job28:12 Kake aitiaji etumi engeno nagut? Naa koree ewueji ening'unoto? 
Job28:13 Meyiolo oltung'ani enkoitoi nalo ine, nemetumi ninye te nkop oo looishu." 
Job28:14 Ejo enguton, ‘ime nanu etii’; nejo enaiposha ime nanu etii." 
Job28:15 Metumi ninye te sahabu, nemeineneng'i enkosholai metaa elaata enye." 
Job28:16 Metemieki ninye e sahabu e Ofir, nemetemieki enkosholai sidai." 
Job28:17 Ore sahabu o enkosholai nemerisiore ninye, nemewalunyeki isoito le sahabu nasila." 
Job28:18 Meitasimi aatemaki isoito oogol enkinyiang'a, ore enkinyiang'a e ng'eno nagut nelang isoito oogol enkinyiang'a." 
Job28:19 Ore isoito oogol enkinyiang'a ooji Topas le Etiopia, nemeitanyaanyukieki ninye, nemeitanyaanyukieki ninye sahabu nasila." 
Job28:20 Kaji naa doi eing'uaa engeno nagut? Naa koree ewueji ening'unoto? 
Job28:21 Eisudoyioki too nkonyek e pooki toki naishu; nenukari pee medol imotonyi oloing'ang'e. 
Job28:22 Ejo Abadon o keeya, ‘Kitoning'o iyook olmarenke too nkiyiaa ang.’" 
Job28:23 Eyiolo Enkai enkoitoi nalo ine, neyiolo ewueji enye." 
Job28:24 Amu eing'or ninye inkiting'ot e nkop, nedol pooki toki natii abori keper." 
Job28:25 Ore pee eisho enkijape enkiroishi enye, neyiolou eneba endapasho enaiposha." 
Job28:26 Neitobiru too rorei enchan, neitobiru enkoitoi enkiwuang'ata e ndarata;" 
Job28:27 nedol ninye neibalie ninye; neitasheyie ninye, neing'oru ninye." 
Job28:28 Nejoki ninye tung'ani, ‘Ng'ura, euriata Olaitoriani naa ninye engeno nagut, naa tining'uaa ntorrok naa ninye ening'unoto.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Neitoki ake Yoab airo nejo: 
Job29:2 “Oi naaji tenaa katii ilapaitin liapa, anaa too nkolong'i apa naatorripo Enkai nanu;" 
Job29:3 ina kata apa eitawang'aki oltaa lenye endukuya ai, ore te wang'an enye nalo aim enaimin." 
Job29:4 Anaa apa enatiu too nkolong'i e nkiputakinoto ai, ina kata etii shoruetisho e Nkai shumata olng'obor lai." 
Job29:5 Ina kata eton etii Olmagilani tenebo nanu ina kata aamanita nkera aainei nanu. 
Job29:6 Ina kata eisuji iroruat aainei te kule, naabukoki ina dapidapoi inchorroi eilata!" 
Job29:7 Tenaipang nanu alo auluo enkishomi e nkanasa, ina kata naitobir nanu olorika lai to lkurroto otumoreki." 
Job29:8 Naadol lelo barnot neilanyisho, neinyototo ilpayiani kituaak neitashe;" 
Job29:9 negira lelo kituaak eitu eitoki aairo, nepik inkaik enye nkutukie enye aaibung," 
Job29:10 negira oltoilo le lelo yiolot nerep ilng'ejepa lenye inoreti enye. 
Job29:11 Ore te nening enkiok naaipot nanu ajo olomayiana, ore peyie edol enkong'u nenyorra ninye;" 
Job29:12 amu aitajewuo nanu ilo aisinani oishira o ilo okishi lemeeta hoo obo oretu ninye. 
Job29:13 Ore emayianata e ilo letaa keidak nelotu shumata nanu, naretu nkolia menoto eseriani." 
Job29:14 Aishopoko kewan esupatisho, naaitoip ninye nanu. Ore esipata ai netiu anaa olkila o enkarasha e lukunya." 
Job29:15 Ara apa nanu nkonyek tialo olmodooni, nara nkejek to lmaima." 
Job29:16 Ara apa nanu menye ilo aisinani, naturu aing'oru aretu ilo lemaayiolo." 
Job29:17 Atigila ilala le ilo oas ing'ok, naitiakie ninye ina nainosita too lala lenyena." 
Job29:18 Ina peyie adamu ajo, kaye nanu tiatua enkaji ai, naa kaponaa inkolong'i aainei aitaba anaa osinyai." 
Job29:19 Epuo intona aainei aaidapashakino inkariak, netii enkoilielio enkewarie pooki ilng'osil laainei." 
Job29:20 Ore enkisisa ai naa ng'ejuk te nanu, ore enkawuo ai naa ng'ejuk anaake te nkaina ai." 
Job29:21 Aainining'o nanu iltung'ana naanyu, negira einining enkikoo ai." 
Job29:22 Ore peyie aidip airoro, eitu eitoki ninche aairo, nebaiki ororei lai ninche." 
Job29:23 Aataanyutua ninche nanu anaa enaanyu enchan; nebol inkutukie enye anaa enchan oloirujuruj. 
Job29:24 Aatakweniyie nanu ninche ina kata meeta enkitieunoto; ore ina wang'an enkomom ai neitagol ninche. 
Job29:25 Ategelua nanu enkoitoi enye, naton anaa olautaroni, naton anaa olaiguanani tiatua oltim lenye, natiu anaa ilo oitagol lelo ooishir." 
Job30:1 Kake aakueniyie taata ninche nanu, iltung'ana ooti te nanu, laa ore apa loo menye, naa iltung'ana le pesho, ilaa maidim ninye aitaboitaki ildiein laainei oorrip intare." 
Job30:2 Ainyoo nanu aidim anoto te ngolon oo nkaik enye, iltung'ana ooisha engolon enye?" 
Job30:3 Ore to sina o te sumash nagol, naa kenyaal intona naatoito." 
Job30:4 Edung'u ninche mbenek e ntim, o ntona olpurkel aaitaa endaa." 
Job30:5 Etaarayioki ninche aaitung'uaa iltung'ana, nebuaku iltung'ana emirta ninche anaa iloosujaa olapurroni." 
Job30:6 Ilbaat loo ndapidapo epuo ninche aamany, ingumot enkop o olkutot loo ndapidapo." 
Job30:7 Eru ninche anaa ng'uesi tiatua ntimi, neiturrurro tenebo too loipi." 
Job30:8 Ilmoda ninche, le ishoi oo larruok, etaarayioki ninche aaipang'ie te nkop." 
Job30:9 Nataa taata osinkolio lenye meekure aata tipat te ninche. 
Job30:10 Aaibaitie nanu naatalama nanu; meingash ninche aanotaki tenaadol. 
Job30:11 Ore enkaraki natalaa Enkai enkeene ai naaitobor nanu, aaibelekenyakinote ninche nanu te ngoro enye pooki." 
Job30:12 Ore te nkaina ai e tatene einyeito ilmang'ati, naareu ninche nanu aarrumoo, naapikaki nanu aarare inkoitoi enye e nkidaaroto." 
Job30:13 Einyal ninche enkoitoi ai, neitubulaa ninche engolikinoto ai, metii hoo obo omitiki ninche." 
Job30:14 Epuonu ninche anaa iloim elusie nalala naapuonu aasulakino nanu aapurd. 
Job30:15 Aaibelekenyakaki nanu olkirutoto ore enkisisa ai nemirareki anaa enamirta enkijape ore karsisisho ai neisha anaa enkatampoi. 
Job30:16 Ore taata neiting'ieki enkishui ai te nanu; aaineputua nanu inkolong'i osina aaibung. 
Job30:17 Ore enkewarie pooki neme iloik laainei, ore emion naaitame nanu nemeyagaa." 
Job30:18 Ore to larrabal neibung ninye olkila lai, naaen nanu anunuk anaa enkila." 
Job30:19 Aatanang'aka nanu Enkai atua esarng'ab, natotiwuo anaa enterit o nkuruon." 
Job30:20 Aaishiraka nanu iyie neitu kiwaliki nanu, aitasho nanu nimikining iyie nanu." 
Job30:21 Kimbelekenyakine nanu agorokino; te nkidimata enkaina ino kitaarare iyie nanu. 
Job30:22 Kidumu iyie nanu aya shumata enkijape, nikincho iyie matakedo ninye nikimposhiposh iyie nanu te nkikurrukur olkutati." 
Job30:23 Ee, ayiolo nanu ajo aikipik iyie atua keeya, o atua ina aji nategelakaki lelo pooki oishu." 
Job30:24 Naa amaa obo to lturrur le nkidaata aimeitorioo enkaina enye, ore te mutata enye neishiru eretoto." 
Job30:25 Keitu nanu aishiraki ilo laa ore enkolong enye netagolikio, keitu eishir oltau lai to sina te nkaraki lelo aisinak?" 
Job30:26 Kake tenaing'oru nanu esidano, nepuonu ntorrok; naa tenaanyu ewang'an, nelotu enaimin." 
Job30:27 Etii oltau lai osomit, nemeitirring'a aekata, naatabaikitia inkolong'i o loisilisili nanu." 
Job30:28 Aloolo aaitorokaki neme te nkolong; aitashe tiatua olturrur naishiru eretoto. 
Job30:29 Ataa nanu olalashe loo mbariak nataa olecholiek oo sidain. 
Job30:30 Eibelekenye olchoni lai aroku naaitoki aing'uaa, ore iloik laainei neyupuyup te nkirouaj." 
Job30:31 Eibelekenyaki olwulul lai loo usin, metaa enkishirata o sina ore oltoilo le ndule ai neibelekenyaki metotiwuo anaa oltoilo le lelo ooishir." 
Job31:1 Aitobirua olning'o too nkonyek aainei; kaji naa aiko tenaitoki aing'or eselenkei? 
Job31:2 Kainyoo erubata ai naing'uaa Enkai natii shumata, naa ainyoo enjung'ore ai te ilo Magilani le shumata?" 
Job31:3 Aimedoiki ingolikinot lelo torrok, netum emutata lelo aasak loo ntorrok?" 
Job31:4 Aimedol ninye inkoitoi aainei, neiken iroruat aainei pooki?" 
Job31:5 Amaa tenaa kashomo nanu tenebo iloolejisho, neisarisara enkeju ai alo alejisho." 
Job31:6 (Inchoo maineneng'i te ntemet naineneng'ishoreki nemeeta emonkoi naa inchoo Enkai eyiolou enkitashoto ai!) 
Job31:7 Tenaa keibelekenye eroruata apaash enkoitoi neshomo oltau lai arubare nkonyek aainei, naa teneibung'a oltipoto ake ninye pooki inkaik aainei;" 
Job31:8 nchoo naa aaku oloun, neinos likae; naa inchoo ina nabulu aaku enaai eturuni aaitayu." 
Job31:9 Tenetang'uarra oltau lai enkitok ole latia ai, nairraga aanyisho te kutukaji ole latia ai," 
Job31:10 inchoo enkitok ai eyieraki likae lee, naa inchoo ilkulikae eirrugokino ninye." 
Job31:11 Amu keaku ina embae torrono oleng, neaku entorroni naiguanare neitame ilarishak." 
Job31:12 Amu keaku ina enkima namut pooki toki, nepejoo too ntona pooki toki ai natum." 
Job31:13 Tenatanya nanu aning enyamali olaisiaayiani lai arashu enkaisiaayiani ai, ore peyie eyau olong'unyung'unyi te nkaraki nanu," 
Job31:14 Kaa naa alo aas teneinyototo Enkai? Amaa teneikilikuanisho, kaa nanu awaliki ninye?" 
Job31:15 Amaa ilo laaitobirua nanu te ng'uset aimeninye oitobirua ninye? Naa aime ilo obo oitobirua iyiook te ng'uset. 
Job31:16 Tenatomito nanu ae toki nayieu olaisinani, arashu tenaishirie nanu enkoliai," 
Job31:17 arashu tenainosa nanu endaa ai openy eitu ang'arie likae, neitu ang'arie ilo okishi" 
Job31:18 (amu ore eiteru te nkitisho enye naitubulua nanu ninye anaa menye ore epuku aing'uaa enguset e ng'otonye atuutayie nanu ninye); 
Job31:19 tenatoduaa nanu obo lenye eidaa, te nkaraki meeta inkilani o sesen, arashu oltung'ani aisinani lemeitoipo," 
Job31:20 teneitu ninye aamayian nanu, naa teneitu eirowuajieki too lpapit loo ntare aainei," 
Job31:21 tenatudumua enkaina ai aarare lelo okishin amu atoduaa eretoto te kishomi; 
Job31:22 neaku inchoo inkaik aainei epuku aing'uaa oloililai lai, naa inchoo enkaina ai eorunye terubata enye." 
Job31:23 Amu ara apa oloure enyamali naing'uaa Enkai nemaitieu aibelekenyakinoyu aing'ura enkitoo enye. 
Job31:24 Tenaitaa nanu sahabu osiligi lai, arashu tenetaa sahabu nasila aigarakino;" 
Job31:25 tenatishipe nanu enkaraki naa sapuk enkarsisisho ai, arashu enkaraki nanoto enkaina ai imasaa kumok;" 
Job31:26 tenaing'ura nanu enkolong ewang oleng, arashu olapa elo te sidano enye," 
Job31:27 neeni oltau lai too nkisudorot mayiolo, netung'ututa enkutuk ai enkaina ai;" 
Job31:28 ore sii ninye ena naa eng'oki naitame ilarishak amu ataa olalejani te Nkai e shumata. 
Job31:29 Tenatishipakine nanu enkidaata e ilo laaiba, arashu ashipa ina kata peyie eidimu ninye entorroni." 
Job31:30 (Eitu nanu aisho enkutuk ai eas eng'oki, pee aomonu enkishui enye to ldeket);" 
Job31:31 teneitu ejo iltung'ana lolng'obor lai, ‘Kalo otii ine leitu etum aiputakinoyu te ndaa enye?’" 
Job31:32 (Ore ilo omoni eitu eirrag enkoitoi nalala e nkanas; ataboloko nchomito aainei lelo apuayak); 
Job31:33 tenaisudoyie aitemoo enkarruoisho ai too ltung'ana anuk intorrok aainei to lgoo lai," 
Job31:34 amu aitasho nanu te nkuretisho sapuk aure olturrur, naaiture nanu enkiba oo lmareita, metaa atigire neitu aipang aim inchomito." 
Job31:35 Oi naaji duoo tenaa kaata obo laaning nanu! (Nena entukunyata olkimojino lai! Inchoo Olmagilani aawaliki nanu!) Oi naaji tenaa kataa enesirare imbaa aainei naaigero ilo mang'atinta lai! 
Job31:36 Esipa anaata nanu anap to loililai lai; anaata aeniki kewan anaa emaupe e nkitoo; 
Job31:37 ekaisho nanu ninye imbaa aainei pooki oo roruat aainei; ekalo nanu enetii ninye te nkanyit naishori oltung'ani kitok. 
Job31:38 Teneishira enkop ai, te nkaraki nanu, naa teneishira ineeturo enkurma tenebo;" 
Job31:39 tenainosa ilng'anayio lenyena eitu alak, nayau keeya oo loopeny;" 
Job31:40 inchoo ilkiku ebulu te rishata enkano, o endiati te rishata e shairi.” Neishunye irorei le Yoab" 
Job32:1 Metaa eitu eitoki kulo tung'ana pokira okuni aawaliki Yoab amu aisupat ninye too nkonyek enyena makewan. 
Job32:2 Neitoki Elihu olayioni le Berakel le Busi lo lmarei le Ram agoro. Etagorokine ninye Yoab amu eitaa kewan olemeeta entioto neaku Enkai eiteleiki entorroni. 
Job32:3 Etagorokine sii lelo shoreta le Yoab pokira okuni amu eitu eitoki aatum ewalata nawaliki Yoab, hoo neibalie aajo etapong'ori Yoab." 
Job32:4 Etaanyua apa Elihu peyie eirorie Yoab amu aibotoro apa ninche te ninye. 
Job32:5 Ore peyie edol Elihu ajo meekure eetae ewalata te lelo lewa pokira okuni, negoro." 
Job32:6 Newal Elihu olayioni le Barakel le Busi ajo, “Ara nanu oti too larin, nitamorua iyie metaa kaata duoo nanu enkuretisho aibalunye enduaata ai te iyie" 
Job32:7 Atejo nanu, ‘Nchoo eiro nkolong'i ore ilarin kumok neiteng'enisho eng'eno nagut.’" 
Job32:8 Kake ina kiyang'et natii tung'ani, enkiyang'et e ilo Magilani, ninye naidimie ninye metoning'u." 
Job32:9 Ime lelo moruak oata engeno nagut, neme ilkituaak ooning'u esipata." 
Job32:10 Metaa ajo nanu, ‘Toning'oki; nchooki sii nanu maibalie enduaata ai.’" 
Job32:11 Ng'ura ataanyua nanu irorei linono, atoning'o nanu nkirorot inono eng'eno nagut, ina kata ing'oru enijo." 
Job32:12 Aaishoo iyie enkiok ai, nemetii hoo nabo neitu ewalu Yoab, arashu olotawalua irorei lenyena te ntae." 
Job32:13 Eng'ura ake ate pee mijojo ‘Kinoto eng'eno nagut; Enkai ake naidim atawalaki Yoab amu italaikinote.’ 
Job32:14 Eitu ninye aaitorioki irorei lenyena agilunore nanu, nemawaliki nanu ninye too nkirorot inono." 
Job32:15 Etunumate ninche, meekure eeta enawalu; meekure ninche eeta ororei ojo." 
Job32:16 Naa katon nanu aanyisho, eji amu meiro ninche, amu eitashe ninche te ine nemeekure ewalu?" 
Job32:17 Ekaishoru sii nanu ewalata ai; naa kaibalie sii nanu enduaata ai. 
Job32:18 Amu kaabore nanu irorei naarrumito oltau lai mairoro. 
Job32:19 Ng'ura etiu oltau lai anaa enaisho oo sabibu napising'a, etiu anaa olbene le naisho oo sabibu ng'ejuk, netaa kedanya." 
Job32:20 Ekairo nanu peyie atum ayagie, ekabol enkutuk ai awalu." 
Job32:21 Maitodolu nanu oloshomitore te likae, arashu asukeny likae tung'ani," 
Job32:22 amu mayiolo nanu atusukenyisho, pee maapik ake Olaitobirani lai enkiting'oto." 
Job33:1 Kake ore naa taata toning'o enkiroroto ai iyie Yoab, nining'u irorei laainei pooki." 
Job33:2 Ng'ura, atabolo enkutuk ai; eirorita olng'ejep le nkutuk ai." 
Job33:3 Eibalunye irorei laainei esupatisho oltau lai, ore nena naayiolo enkutuk ai neiro te sipata." 
Job33:4 Aaitobirua nanu enkiyang'et Enkai naaisho nanu enkiyang'et e ilo Magilani enkishui. 
Job33:5 Tawalikiaki nanu tinindim; intobiru irorei linono te dukuya nanu; inyo mbalie enkitashoto ino. 
Job33:6 Ng'ura ajo aitoriokine sii nanu Enkai anaa iyie; aaitobiruaki sii apa nanu te nterit. 
Job33:7 Ing'ura, mincho enkuretisho ai kinture iyie mesapuku enkitirrishakinoto ai te iyie." 
Job33:8 Esipa, iroro iyie aning'ito, natoning'o nanu oltoilo loo rorei linono." 
Job33:9 Itejo, iyie ‘Kara nanu sinyati, maata enaitapong'o, maata eleyiata nemetii entorroni atua nanu." 
Job33:10 Ng'ura ajo etum ninye inkitolonyat naaisikong'ie nanu, naaikenaa nanu aitaa olmang'atinta lenye;" 
Job33:11 etipika nkejek aainei ilpisia aen neing'or inkoitoi aainei pooki.’ 
Job33:12 Ng'ura ajo ore tena nimira asipani. Ekaawaliki nanu iyie, aikitok Enkai alang oltung'ani." 
Job33:13 Ainyoo iyie pee ikeshare ninye; ijo, ‘Mewalu ninye hoo obo loo rorei laainei?’" 
Job33:14 Amu eiro Enkai te nkoitoi nabo, o tiare hoo nememusu tung'ani ninye." 
Job33:15 Te nkidetidet o nduaat e kewarie, ina kata najing injo nairoishi iltung'ana ina kata eimugito too ndapashi enye," 
Job33:16 nebol ninye inkiyiaa oo ltung'ana, neiture ninche too nkikoot." 
Job33:17 Peyie etum ninye atoboina tung'ani aitung'uai nkoitoi enyena, neiwuang'ie olwuasa te tung'ani;" 
Job33:18 negolie oltau lenye aibooyo mejing engumoto o enkishui enye pee meidak to lalem. 
Job33:19 Eutari sii oltung'ani te nkitamioto emuoyian te ndapash enye, neponaa emion too loik lenyena." 
Job33:20 Metaa meitoki enkishui enye ang'uar endaa ore enkoshoke enye nemeitoki aayieu endaa. 
Job33:21 Neibibiari osesen lenye ometaa meekure elioo; ore iloik apa lemelioo nepuku aibalayu. 
Job33:22 Nenyikaki oltau lenye enemeneng'a, nenyikaki enkishui enye lelo ooyau keeya." 
Job33:23 Tenetii olmalaika tenebo ninye, Olaitutumoni obo te nkalifu, pee eibalakinye tung'ani enasipa te ninye;" 
Job33:24 neeta olng'ur te ninye ejoki, ‘Intajeu ninye mincho edoyio enemeneng'a, anoto elakunoto;" 
Job33:25 inchoo osesen lenye esika nejing kitisho inchoo ninye errinyokino inapa olong'i e ngolon e kitisho;’ 
Job33:26 eomon oltung'ani Enkai, neng'amu Enkai ninye, elotu ninye enetii Enkai te nchipai. Neliki iltung'ana enjeunoto enye," 
Job33:27 neranyisho te dukuya iltung'ana ejo: ‘Ataasa eng'oki, natokordilo ina apa nasipa, neitu apa aaitalaki nanu." 
Job33:28 Etalakua ninye oltau lai, pee medoyio alo atua enemeneng'a, naa kedol enkishui ai ewang'an.’" 
Job33:29 Ng'ura ajo Enkai naas kuna pooki, kat are, kat uni tenebo tung'ani." 
Job33:30 Pee eyau arrinyu oltau lenye aitung'uaa enemeneng'a, pee etum ninye atoduaa ewang'an e nkishui." 
Job33:31 Irrugu enkiok, iyie Yoab, toning'oki; tigirayu peyie atum airoro." 
Job33:32 Tiniata embae niyieu nijo, tawalikiaki; iroro amu kayieu oleng naaisho iyie esipata." 
Job33:33 Naa tenemeneijia, toning'oki nanu; tigirayu, amu kaaiteng'en iyie eng'eno nagut.”" 
Job34:1 Neitoki Elihu ajo: 
Job34:2 “Entoning irorei laainei, intae iltung'ana ng'eni, nikirrugokiki enkiok, intae ooyiolo;" 
Job34:3 amu etem enkiok irorei, anaa enkutuk te ndaa." 
Job34:4 Emategelu iyiook ina nasipa; ematujurru tiatua ate ina sidai. 
Job34:5 Amu etejo Yoab, ‘Maata nanu entioto, neewa Enkai esipata ai;" 
Job34:6 Ore hoo naata esipata aaikenayioki aajo olaimonkoni; meishiunoyou olbae lai, hoo nemaata entorroni.’" 
Job34:7 Kalo tung'ani onyaanyukie Yoab ook esurdaanyata anaa enkare," 
Job34:8 ilo olo te ncholiek oo laasak loo ntorrok, neiriamariyie iltung'ana arruok?" 
Job34:9 Amu etejo ninye, ‘Meeta toki natum oltung'ani teneshipakino Enkai.’" 
Job34:10 Metaa, entoning'oki, intae iltung'ana oota ening'unoto, metalamari ina te Nkai, tenaa keas ninye enkarruoisho, metalamari to Lmagilani tenaa keas ninye entorroni." 
Job34:11 Amu ore te risioroto e siaai e tung'ani keitalakuni te ninye, naa ore te risioroto oo nkoitoi enyena nelaaki ninye." 
Job34:12 Ore te sipata meas Enkai entorroni, nemeboin Olmagilani esipata." 
Job34:13 Aing'ae oishoo ninye metaa olaitasheikinoni le nkop? Naa aing'ae otipika ninye meitasheiki enkop pooki? 
Job34:14 Tenerriny ninye enkiyang'et enye makewan, neiturrurroki kewan enkiyang'et enye," 
Job34:15 neidak iseseni pooki tenebo nerrinyo tung'ani atua enterit. 
Job34:16 Tiniata eyiolounoto, toning'u ena; toning'o ina najo nanu." 
Job34:17 Amaa ilo lemenyor esipata, keitoreisho? Idung'oki iyie enkiguana ilo asipani naa magilani" 
Job34:18 ilo ajoki olaiguanani, ‘Miata tipat’ nejoki ilkituaak, ‘Oltung'ani torrono;’" 
Job34:19 ilo lemeitodolu oloshomitore too lkituaak, nemeshilaa ilo karsis aitalang ilo aisinani, amu ore ninche pooki naa esiaai oo nkaik enyena?" 
Job34:20 Ore tenkiti kata neye ninche; ore te mpolos enkewarie neari metuata ore lelo magil neyae ninche neme too nkaik e tung'ani. 
Job34:21 Amu etii nkonyek enyena shumata nkoitoi e tung'ani, nedol ninye iroruat enyena pooki." 
Job34:22 Metii osina arashu enaimin nagut, ine neisudoriyie ilaasak loo ntorrok ate." 
Job34:23 Amu eitu eutu enkata te pooki tung'ani pee elo dukuya Enkai te nkiguana. 
Job34:24 Eiwuang'ie ninye lelo magil eitu eng'as ajurru, nepik kulikae iwuejitin enye." 
Job34:25 Ore amu eyiolo ninye isinaitin lenye, eibeleleng'oo ninche te nkewarie, nepurdi ninche." 
Job34:26 Eosh ninye ninche te nkaraki enkarruoisho enye edolita pooki tung'ani. 
Job34:27 Amu eibelekenyate ninche aany esuj ninye nemeikenaa hoo enkoitoi enye nabo," 
Job34:28 pee etum aaishoo olkiyioi le ilo aisinani elotu enetii, netoning'o ninye enkishirata e ilo oota enyamali." 
Job34:29 Amaa tenegira, aing'ae oidim aiguanare? Amaa teneisudoo enkomom enye, aing'ae oidim atoduaa ninye, aa olorere anaa tung'ani?" 
Job34:30 Meitoreisho iltung'ana lemeure Enkai, pee mepik iltung'ana orreshet." 
Job34:31 Ketii olotiaaka Enkai, ‘Anoto enkitamioto oleng,’ maitoki aekata aitadiak." 
Job34:32 Inteng'enaki nanu ina nemadolita; tenataasa nanu entorroni, nemaitoki aekata aigil aas?" 
Job34:33 Keitobir ninye ina ninyorraa iyie, amu itanya iyie ninye? Amu meeta nchere pee meyie ogelu; neme nanu ogelu metaa imbalie ina niyiolo." 
Job34:34 Ekaajoki nanu iltung'ana lening'unoto, ore lelo tung'ana ng'eni laainining'ito nanu nejo," 
Job34:35 ‘Ekeiro Yoab meeta eng'eno, ore irorei lenyena nemetii eng'eno nagut.’" 
Job34:36 Enaikash tenetemi Yoab o meiting'o, amu kewal ninye anaa iltung'ana torrok." 
Job34:37 Amu eponiki ninye enkiseroto ing'ok enyena, eosh inkaik enyena tiatua iyiook, neponaa irorei lenyena akeshare Enkai.”" 
Job35:1 Neitoki Elihu ajo," 
Job35:2 “Idamu iyie ena nijo kesipata? Ijo iyie, ‘Esipata ai ena te dukuya Enkai,’" 
Job35:3 amu inkilikuanu ajo, ‘ainyoo tipat naata nanu? Kaa sipata nanu aata alang tenataasa eng'oki?’" 
Job35:4 Ekaawaliki nanu iyie tenebo ilchoreta linono likiboitare. 
Job35:5 Ing'ura keper pee idol, naa ng'ura nena atampo, naatii shumata oleng shumata iyie." 
Job35:6 Amaa tinitaasa eng'oki, kainyoo indim ataasa atigilunore ninye? Naa amaa tenetoponari intorrok inono, kaa iyie intaas ninye?" 
Job35:7 Amaa tinira iyie asipani ainyoo inchoo ninye; arashu ainyoo doi eng'amu ninye te nkaina ino? 
Job35:8 Ore intorrok inono naa oltung'ani laaijo iyie eipirta ore esupatisho ino naa enkerai e tung'ani. 
Job35:9 Ore enkaraki nena kibookinot kumok e nkop e tung'ani neishir iltung'ana; eipotu ninche eretoto te nkaraki enkaina e ilo Magilani. 
Job35:10 Kake metii olojo, ‘Koree Enkai Olaitobirani lai, ilo oishoru isinkolioitin te nkewarie;" 
Job35:11 ilo oiteng'en iyiook alang nena ng'uesi enkop neiteng'en iyiook aitalang imotonyi oloing'ang'e?’ 
Job35:12 Eishir ninche teidie, mewaliki ninye ninche, te nkaraki ilo wuasa loo ltung'ana torrok." 
Job35:13 Esipa tukul mening Enkai enkishirata e pesho, nemeshilaa ilo Magilani ninye." 
Job35:14 Kebaa naa elus tenijo midolita ninye, inchere etii enkiguana dukuya ninye, naa ninye iyie iyanyu!" 
Job35:15 Neaku ore naa taata amu meitameisho engoro enye, nemeinining'u ninye oleng intorrok." 
Job35:16 Ebol Yoab enkutuk enye tenkiroroto e pesho, eponaa irorei lemeeta eng'eno.”" 
Job36:1 Neitoki Elihu alo dukuya nejo: 
Job36:2 “Nyaaki ting'iria penyo peyie aatum aitoduaa, amu eton ake aata enajo terishata Enkai." 
Job36:3 Ekayau nanu eng'eno ai tenelakua, naisho esipata Olaitobirani lai." 
Job36:4 Amu esipa tukul ore irorei laainei neme elejare; ore ilo oiputakine eng'eno netii tenebo iyie. 
Job36:5 Ng'ura, Aimagilani Enkai, nemeeta ninye olomenaa, magilani ninye te ngolon eyiolounoto." 
Job36:6 Meisho ninye lelo torrok ebikoo, kake eisho lelo ooitanyamali esipata enye." 
Job36:7 Meiwuang'ie ninye inkonyek te lelo supati, kake ore too laiguanak te nkitoo enye, eitasheyie ninche intarasi, nejukari ninche." 
Job36:8 Naa teneeni ninche too lpisia neibung'i too lgoso le nkisilisiloto e mion," 
Job36:9 neibalakinye ninye ninche esiaai enye, tenebo enkarruoisho enye, inchere easita ninche mbaa o lwuasa." 
Job36:10 Ebol ninche inkiyiaa enye aaning enkiteng'enare, neitanapisho ajo metung'uai ninche intorrok enye." 
Job36:11 Tenening ninche ninye neisiaai ninye, neishu ninche inkolong'i enye te dupoto, ore ilarin lenye nebore enchipai." 
Job36:12 Kake tenemening ninche, naa keidak to lalem neye meeta eng'eno." 
Job36:13 Ore ilo lemeeta Enkai to ltau, nenyor engoro; meishiru ninche eretoto teneen ninye ninche." 
Job36:14 Keye ninche eton aa ooti, neiting enkishui enye te nkurruna." 
Job36:15 Eitajeu ninye lelo ooitamei aitung'uaa nyamaliritin enye, nebol inkiyiaa enye too ngolikinot." 
Job36:16 Aikilaku sii ninye iyie too sinaitin, nikipik ewueji nelala nemetii batisho, ore ina natipikaki emisa ino nebore olkar." 
Job36:17 Kake kibore iyie enkiguana e ilo torrono, kimbung'a akurraki enkiguana o esipata." 
Job36:18 Todua ake mikien engoro aeniki esurdaanyare; nimincho ina sapuko elakunoto kimbelekeny. 
Job36:19 Amaa enkishirata ino aikindim aitayu tiatua osina, arashu engolon enkidimata ino pooki?" 
Job36:20 Mianyu iyie enkewarie, ina kata nadung'ori iltung'ana aaiwuang'ie te wueji enye." 
Job36:21 Todua kewan mimbelekenyakino intorrok amu ena ninye itegelua eitu igelu olosilisili. 
Job36:22 Ng'ura, Eisisaki Enkai te ngolon enye; aing'ae olaiteng'enani onyaanyukie ninye." 
Job36:23 Aing'ae otisiraka ninye enkoitoi enye, arashu aing'ae oidim atejo, ‘itaasa iyie entorrono?’" 
Job36:24 Tadamu ilepie esiaai enye, ina nataranyakita iltung'ana." 
Job36:25 Eing'ura iltung'ana pooki ninye; neing'or oltung'ani ninye te nelakua. 
Job36:26 Ng'ura, aikitok Enkai, nimikiyiolo iyiook ninye; mejurrunoyu esiana oolarin lenyena." 
Job36:27 Amu eitadou ninye ilkitong'at le nchan, neirriu ninye enkinuku te nkata e nchan." 
Job36:28 Ina nabukunye enchan te shumata, neshaiki iltung'ana te nkumoi." 
Job36:29 Keidim likae atayiolo enkisalaashata oo nkatampo, o endarata e keper enye?" 
Job36:30 Ng'ura, eidapash ninye enkiwuangata enye aitaman kewan, nenuk nkonyek oo naaiposha." 
Job36:31 Amu te kuna eiguanare ninye iloreren; neishooyo endaa te lengon. 
Job36:32 Eimulumul ninye inkaik enyena te nkiwang'ata, neitanap ninye metoosho ine neyieu." 
Job36:33 Elimu endarata elotunoto enye, Ilo oata olom o engoro eiba entorroni." 
Job37:1 Ore ake sii tena neikirikira oltau lai, nepuku aing'uaa ewueji enye." 
Job37:2 Toning'o endarata oltoilo lenye o endarata napuku te nkutuk enye. 
Job37:3 Abori keper pooki eimie ninye ina darata, ore enkiwuang'ata enye, neisho meshomo ilpijat pooki le nkop." 
Job37:4 Ore pee elusoo neikurrukurr oltoilo lenye; nedaru ninye to ltoilo lenye le nkitoo nemeibooyo ninye inkiwuang'at tenening'i oltoilo lenye. 
Job37:5 Edaru Enkai te nking'asia to ltoilo lenye; eas ninye imbaa sapuki nimikindim aatoning'u. 
Job37:6 Amu ejoki ninye enkare nataa osoit te nkirobi, ‘tadoiki enkop;’ nejoki enkirujuruj tenebo enchan, ‘Entagol.’" 
Job37:7 Enuk ninye inkaik e pooki tung'ani pee etum iltung'ana pooki aatayiolo esiaai enye. 
Job37:8 Ina pee epuo ing'uesi entim irrumati lenye, neitirring'a too lkutot lenye." 
Job37:9 Nepuku olkutati te wueji enye, o enkijape to lkutati le nkidapash." 
Job37:10 Te nkiyang'et Enkai eishoruni isoito le nchan, ore nkariak naalala neitaa enkare osoit." 
Job37:11 Eirotoki ninye enkatampoi nairrusha enkare; ore nkatampo neidapash enkiwuang'ata enye. 
Job37:12 Eipila ninche aamanaa te utaroto enye, pee etum aaitabai nena pooki naaitanapa ninche, tioriong eina kop namanyayu." 
Job37:13 Enkai nairriu enchan metashaiki enkop, eidim airriu meitamio iltung'ana, anaa eitodol ninche omon enye." 
Job37:14 Toning'o ena iyie Yoab; intasho ineneng'a nena siaaitin enking'asia e Nkai. 
Job37:15 Iyiolo iyie eneikunaki Enkai enkitanapata enye ntokitin, neisho ina kiwuang'ata enkatampoi enye metawang'a?" 
Job37:16 Iyiolo iyie enkiroishi oo nkatampo, nena baa enking'asia e ilo oota eng'eno nalulung'a." 
Job37:17 Iyie laa ore nkilani enyena keirowua ina kata eitirring'e enkop, te nkaraki olkutati le kopikop?" 
Job37:18 Indim iyie anaa ninye aisalaasha keper, aitagolo anaa enking'uret nasholuno?" 
Job37:19 Inteng'ena iyiook enikipuo aajoki ninye, mikindim iyiook aayau ororei lang te nkaraki enaimin." 
Job37:20 Kejokini ninye nchere ekairo nanu? Ketang'uarra ae kata oltung'ani ajo eishaakino neijori ninye? 
Job37:21 Ore taata meidim iltung'ana aaing'ura ewang'an, ina kata aa sapuk ewang'an te keper ina kata eidipa olkutati aimai neor." 
Job37:22 Elotu te moikuape esikar e sahabu; eishopokino Enkai enkitoo enking'asia. 
Job37:23 Ore ilo Magilani, mikiindim aanoto ninye, kitok ninye te ngolon o too sipat ore esupatisho natimitunye mepal ninye." 
Job37:24 Ore enkaraki ina keure iltung'ana ninye; meshilaa hoo lelo oojo aing'eni te lejare enye maate.” 
Job38:1 Neitoki Olaitoriani awaliki Yoab to lkutati: 
Job38:2 “Aing'ae ele oitomisimis enkikoo too rorei lemetii eng'eno? 
Job38:3 Intasho anaa olee, kaaikilikuanishore nanu iyie, naa aikimbalakinye iyie nanu." 
Job38:4 Kaji apa itii iyie ina kata napik olkitamanyunoto le nkop? Tolikioki, tiniata eyiolounoto." 
Job38:5 Aing'ae oibalie ntemat enyena - esipa iyiolo iyie! Arashu aing'ae oyietaa ilo gosoi aitaman ninye? 
Job38:6 Ainyoo naitasheyie ng'apeta enyena, arashu aing'ae oitasheyie osoit lenye lolmairroto," 
Job38:7 ina kata eranyisho ilakir le ntadekenya tenebo, nebuaku inkera pooki e Nkai te nchipai?" 
Job38:8 Arashu aing'ae oiken ina aiposha too nkikeneta, ina kata nadanya aing'uaa eng'uset;" 
Job38:9 tenaitaa nanu nkatampo olkila lenye, naitaa enaimin enkimulumulet enye," 
Job38:10 nautaki ninye ilpolosien, napik iloom ooikenieki nchomito," 
Job38:11 najo, ‘Ene taa ilotu abaiki, nimigiroo, naa ene ebaiki olwuasa loo lopir linono’?" 
Job38:12 Intanapa ae olong entadekenya anaa ninteru nkolong'i inono, nincho entadekenya metayiolo ewueji enye." 
Job38:13 Peyie etum aibung'a ineeiting'ie enkop, neipiripirori iltorrok aaitung'uaa ninye?" 
Job38:14 Eibelekenyi ninye anaa enterit natii abori olmishire, neibelekenye emua enye anaa enkila." 
Job38:15 Ore too ltorrok eibooki ewang'an enye, ore enkaina enye natudumuaki aailepie negili." 
Job38:16 Itijing'a oshi aikata atua nkonyek enaiposha arashu ilo tiatua enegut enaiposha too nkejek? 
Job38:17 Aikintoduaki iyie inchomito e keeya, anaa itodua iyie nchomito enaimin nagut?" 
Job38:18 Itoning'uo iyie asipu endapasho enkop? Imbalunye tiniyiolo kuna pooki. 
Job38:19 Koree doi ina oitoi nalo emanyisho e wang'an, naa koree emanyisho e enaimin," 
Job38:20 peyie itum aitabaiki ninye olpolosie lenye, peyie itum atumusu atayiolo nena oitoi naapuo enkang enye?" 
Job38:21 Iyiolo iyie amu kitoiwuoki apa ina kata, ore esiana oo nkolong'i inono naa kumok!" 
Job38:22 Itijing'a iyie impechen naashumieki enkare nataa osoit le nkirobi, anaa itodua iyie nena ajijik naashumishoreki oo soito le nchan," 
Job38:23 lelo apa laiteng'ela nanu te nkaraki enkata enyamali, te nkolong olarrabal o enjore?" 
Job38:24 Koree enkoitoi nalo ine wueji neidapashieki ewang'an arashu ewueji neidapashieki olkutati lo loo saen tioriong enkop? 
Job38:25 Aing'ae otuturo olbaata oim enkare enchan, neitobir enkoitoi te nkaraki endarata." 
Job38:26 Pee eyau enchan enkop ine nemetii tung'ani, ilo purkel lememanya tung'ani." 
Job38:27 Pee eitaraposh ina kop mijooni nememanya, neisho enkop metubulaki nkujit?" 
Job38:28 Keeta enchan papaai lenye, naa aing'ae ilo oitobirua ilkitong'at le nkoileelio?" 
Job38:29 Ke ng'uset eng'ae etupukunye isoito le nchan, naa aing'ae otoiwuo isoito le nchan le shumata?" 
Job38:30 Etoyu nkariak negolu anaa soito, ore oriong eng'uton netoyu agolu te nkirobi." 
Job38:31 Indim iyie ateena ilpisia loo lakir, anaa intololong ieneta e orion?" 
Job38:32 Indim iyie atuutai ilakir too nkatitin enye, arashu indim iyie atorikoi olgarurumi tenebo ilkuoo lenyena?" 
Job38:33 Iyiolo iyie nkiguanat e keper? Indim iyie aitasheyie enkitoria enye te nkop? 
Job38:34 Indim iyie atudumu oltoilo lino aitabaiki nkatampo, pee kitum olairrag loo nkariak aaitoipoi iyie?" 
Job38:35 Indim iyie airriwai inkiwuang'at pee etum aashom, nikijoki ninche iyie, ‘Noona iyiook?’" 
Job38:36 Aing'ae otipika eng'eno nagut atua nkatampo, arashu aing'ae naishoo eyioulounoto enkinuku?" 
Job38:37 Aing'ae oidim aikena nkatampo te ng'eno nagut? Anaa aing'ae oidim atipika ilbenia le nkare. 
Job38:38 Ina kata eibung'a enterit aaku esarng'ab, neibung'a pooki aaku nabo?" 
Job38:39 Indim iyie atarreshoki olng'atuny entoki nanya, arashu intaraposho enkoshoke oo nkiyioitin olng'atuny," 
Job38:40 ina kata eisudori too nkapuniaa enye, arashu eirrag aanyisho too rrumati lenye?" 
Job38:41 Aing'ae oitoti ilkurruki, ina kata eishiraki inkiyioitin enye Enkai, nemanimanaa eitu etum endaa?" 
Job39:1 Iyiolo iyie enkata naisho nkineji oo ldoinyio? Itodua iyie enkolii eisho? 
Job39:2 Indim iyie aikena ilapaitin ooitabaya ninche, niyiolou enkata napuo aaisho?" 
Job39:3 Iyiolo iyie enkata nairrugo neiu nkera enye? 
Job39:4 Ore nkera enye neiteru aagolu nebulu too nkisiajat; nepuaya nemeitoki aarrinyokino ninche. 
Job39:5 Aing'ae oishoo iloitikoishi meidapashari aapuaya? Aing'ae otalaa ieneta enkurrarru naten. 
Job39:6 Aishoo ninche olpurkel metaa emanyisho enye, ore enkop emunyan neaku emanyisho enye." 
Job39:7 Elam ninche inkanas naabore enkilepilep, nemeetae oltung'ani oidim aitoborro ninche, neisiaaishore ninche." 
Job39:8 Nchumat oo ldoinyo ninche ndaat enyena, nelimana aaing'oru pooki toki nanyori." 
Job39:9 Keyieu olkiteng le ntim nikisiaai iyie? Keirrag ninye ilo ale lino? 
Job39:10 Indim iyie aibung'a ninye te nkeene mikituturoki enkurma, arashu incho ninye mikitaaraki ilboro te nkurma ino?" 
Job39:11 Indim iyie aisiliga ninye te nkaraki naa sapuk engolon enye, naa aing'ueiki iyie ninye esiaai ino?" 
Job39:12 Isilig iyie ninye ajo keshukunye, neyau entapa ino olkurroto oidong'ishoreki?" 
Job39:13 Eyuko inaipuko e sidai to lwuasa; kake amaa, keeta ninche olng'ur?" 
Job39:14 Amu eing'uaa ninye ilmosor lenyena te nkop, neisho ninche eirowuajieki te nkop," 
Job39:15 nerikino ajo eidim enkeju atadanya ninche, ore ng'uesi entim neitunyoo ninche." 
Job39:16 Meing'urrie ninye nkera enyena, meitaas ninche anaa nkera enyena; ore hoo tenaa enepesho esiaai enye, meureisho ninye;" 
Job39:17 amu eishoo Enkai ninye metorikinoyu eng'eno nagut, neitu eoriki ninye erubata ening'unoto." 
Job39:18 Ore tenedumunye ninye aisik, nekueniyie embarta olokedito ninye." 
Job39:19 Incho embarta engolon enye? Ieniki emurt enye engolon? 
Job39:20 Incho ninye eipid alo anaa olmaati? Ore enkitoo enye o ltoilo oitayu neitureisho.
