Job39:21 Etur ninye atua nong'ot, neng'idare engolon enye, neipang ninye alo ong'ata anang'are te ngolon olarrabal." 
Job39:22 Ekueniyie ninye enkuretisho, nemeirut ninye; nemeibelekenya ninye apaashare olalem." 
Job39:23 Eikirikirie emootian to loililai lenye neeta empere naimerlel. 
Job39:24 Ore te mpijan o te ngoro sapuk neijoo ninye enkop; meidim ninye aitasho aitirring'ayu te nkorui e ntarumpeta. 
Job39:25 Ore teneru entarumpeta, nejo ninye ‘Aha!’ Eing'uaya ninye olarrabal tenelakua endarata e lelo kituaak le njore, o nena buakunot." 
Job39:26 Aiteng'eno ino nagut eyiolou lenkalem ailepa shumata oleng, nelak inaipuko enyena aipirie kopikop?" 
Job39:27 Aitenkitanapata ino edumunye olkurragos alo ashet enkaji enye te shumata? 
Job39:28 Te ndapidapoi eton aitobiraki kewan enkang, neitaa ineepi oo soito osempewuet lenye." 
Job39:29 Eikeernu ninye entoki nainos, nedol inkonyek enyena ninye tenelakua." 
Job39:30 Ore nkiyioitin enyena neibibiu osarge; ore ewueji pooki neteyieng'ishoreki ine etii ninye.” 
Job40:1 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajoki Yoab: 
Job40:2 “Keidim oloing'oru entorroni atekeshare ilo Magilani? Ore ilo oishankarrare Enkai, inchoo ninye ewal ina.”" 
Job40:3 Neitoki Yoab awaliki Olaitoriani, ejo:" 
Job40:4 “Ng'ura ajo mara toki naikenaroyu; ainyoo nanu aawaliki iyie? Atipika nanu enkaina ai anuk enkutuk ai aiken. 
Job40:5 Airoro apa te nkata nabo, nemaitoki awal; kat are, nemaitoki alo dukuya.”" 
Job40:6 Newaliki Olaitoriani Yoab to lkutati ejo: 
Job40:7 “Terretena empolos ino anaa olee; kaaikilikuanishore nanu iyie, nikimbalakinye nanu." 
Job40:8 Aikipik sii nanu enkitapong'oto? Aikidung'oki iyie nanu enkiguana peyie itum aitaa kewan olasipani? 
Job40:9 Iyata iyie enkaina natiu anaa ene Nkai? Naa indim iyie atadara to ltoilo laaijo olenye? 
Job40:10 Tukusoyu te nkitoo o te nkanyit. Inchopoki kewan enkitoo o esikar. 
Job40:11 Tubuku intayu ina goro ino nadooyo, ning'or pooki ngae owuasa, nintadoyio ninye." 
Job40:12 Ing'ura pooki ng'ae owuasa, nintadou ninye, nintunyoki enkop lelo torrok te pooki neitasheyie." 
Job40:13 Isudoi ninche pooki tenebo tiatua enterit, nkenoi inkomomi enye te nkop e abori." 
Job40:14 Naalotu sii nanu anyorraa, nchere enkaina ino e tatene makewan nayau enkisulata." 
Job40:15 Ing'ura sii iyie ina kukuu naji Behemot ina naitobirua nanu anaa pee aaitobirua iyie; enya ninye olkujita anaa olkiteng. 
Job40:16 Naa ng'ura, empolos enye etii engolon enye, netii engolon enye nkirnyany e nkoshoke enye." 
Job40:17 Neitagol ninye olkidong'oe lenye anaa oltarakuai; ore isinigi loo nkejek enyena neibung'a tenebo. 
Job40:18 Ore iloik lenyena netiu anaa indulen o suyai; netiu inkejek enyena anaa ing'apeta e sekenkei. 
Job40:19 Ninye ene nkiterata too siatin pooki Enkai; inchoo ilo oitobirua ninye eitinyiku olalem lenye! 
Job40:20 Amu too ldoinyio epuku endaa enye, teine neiguranie ng'uesi pooki entim." 
Job40:21 Eirrag ninye tiabori entim oo lkiku, tiatua ine netii iseyia to lbalbal." 
Job40:22 Amu tiabori lelo oipi loo lkiku elo ninye ashur; neman ninye nchorroi oo nkariak. 
Job40:23 Ing'ura, tenenang'unye oreyiet nemeiture ninye; meeta enkuretisho hoo tenenang'unye olkeju le Yordan." 
Job40:24 Keetae oloidim aawa ninye too ntokitin naibung'ieki isinkir? Arashu een enkume enye torreshet? 
Job41:1 Indim iyie aibung'a aitupuku Lefiatan to rreshet loo sinkir? Arashu ikurraki olng'ejep lenye nkeene? 
Job41:2 Indim iyie atipika olgosoi enkume enye: arashu iremoki olboony lenye orreshet oo lolo? 
Job41:3 Aikiyaki ninye esayiata sapuk aikirorie ninye iyie te mborron? 
Job41:4 Aikining'ore ninye iyie? Pee iya ninye metaa olaisiaayiani lino ntarasi? 
Job41:5 Inguranie iyie ninye anaa eninguranie emotonyi arashu intaa entoki naiguranie inkaisiaayiak inono? 
Job41:6 Keimaki ilainyangak enkinyang'a enye? Keorrioor ninche ninye aaoriki ilainyangak? 
Job41:7 Indim aiputa olchoni lenye iltidii loo sinkir; arashu ipik elukunya enye entoki naibung'ieki isinkir? 
Job41:8 Imbung'a sii iyie ninye; tadamu sii olarrabal, mintoki aigil aas!" 
Job41:9 Ng'ura ore osiligi le tung'ani naa pesho; eitadouoki ninye teina duaata enye. 
Job41:10 Meetae hoo olopi oleng oidim atuputu ninye aing'ae naa doi ilo oidim aitasho te dukuya nanu? 
Job41:11 Aing'ae laishoo nanu, metaa kalaaki nanu ninye? Ore pooki toki natii abori e keper naa enaai." 
Job41:12 Magirakino nanu eitu alimu irubat oo nkejek enyena, arashu engolon enye, arashu ilo ning'o lenye." 
Job41:13 Aing'ae oidim aitayu olkila lenye lioriong? Aing'ae oidim ataremo ina kila enye nagol. 
Job41:14 Aing'ae oidim atabolo iltagiligil lenyena? Emanita ninye ilala lenyena ooitureisho. 
Job41:15 Ore enkoriong enye neitobiruaki too long'oi naaripakino, neripakino oleng anaa inaamishirakino." 
Job41:16 Etiripaki ninche aaitinyik oleng, ometaa meim enkijape erishata enye." 
Job41:17 Eibung'ieki aitutum tenebo; eibungieki metaa meekure erishayu. 
Job41:18 Ore pee esing ninye neidapashaa ewang'an, ore nkonyek enyena netiu anaa entadekenya nawang'u." 
Job41:19 Epuku te nkutuk enye ilkilang'ilang'eta le wang'an neng'orunye iltiil le nkima teine. 
Job41:20 Nepuku too nkumeishin enyena empuruo, naikununo anaa empuruo oo suut naayupuyup tiabori emoti." 
Job41:21 Ore enkiyang'et enye neinok inkuk enkima, nepuku olang'at le nkima te nkutuk enye." 
Job41:22 Etii emurt enye engolon, eiture ninye pooki odol ninye." 
Job41:23 Ore ngilat o lchoni lo sesen lenye neibung'a tenebo, ekurrakino pooki ninye metaa meigusugus." 
Job41:24 Egol oltau lenye anaa osoit, agol anaa osoit oturuno to lodo le nkop." 
Job41:25 Ore tenedumu kewan ailepie neirut lelo magil; ore te nkaraki enkuretisho enye, nemilo." 
Job41:26 Ore hoo nebaiki ninye olalem nemedung ninye; arashu eremet, o embae o empere naado, naji mataarie naaijo eremet." 
Job41:27 Edol ninye esekenkei etiu anaa olkujita, ore osuyai netiu anaa oltiapurusi." 
Job41:28 Meiture ninye embae meilanyisho; amu ore isoito oonang'ieki ninye netiu anaa ng'uetat. 
Job41:29 Ore irinkan te ninye netiu anaa olkujita, ekueniyie ninye engororoto e mpere." 
Job41:30 Ore ilpala lenyena le nkoshoke netiu anaa mbelibelat e moti oo nkulukuok, ekur ninye enkop neitaa esarng'ab." 
Job41:31 Eitokitokie ninye eng'uton anaa emoti; neitotiu enaiposha anaa emoti e ilata. 
Job41:32 Ore etulusoyie ninye neing'uaa ewang'an te nkoitoi, neibelekeny enaiposha aiborrie anaa olaburra." 
Job41:33 Ore tioriong enkop meeta ninye enanyaanyukie, ore ninye naa entoki nemeeta enkuretisho." 
Job41:34 Eing'or ninye pooki toki natii shumata; naa ninye olaiguanani oitore nkera pooki olwuasa.” 
Job42:1 Neitoki Yoab awaliki Olaitoriani ejo," 
Job42:2 “Ayiolo nanu ajo indim ataasa pooki toki, nayiolo ajo meeta eyieunoto ino nemeitabari." 
Job42:3 ‘Aing'ae ele oisudoo enkikoo meeta eng'eno?’ Ore enkaraki ina atejo imbaa neitu aning'u, intokitin enking'asia te nanu, neitu apa aidip atayiolo." 
Job42:4 ‘Toning'o amu kairo nanu; kaaikilikuanishore nanu iyie, nikimbalakinye iyie nanu?’" 
Job42:5 Aatoning'oyie nanu iyie te ning'oto e nkiok, kake ore tena kata naadolita too nkonyek aainei." 
Job42:6 Ore enkaraki ina atemenayie nanu kewan tukul, nairridu te nterit o too nkuruon.”" 
Job42:7 Ore pee eidip Olaitoriani airorie Yoab te kulo rorei, nejoki Olaitoriani Elifas le Teman: “Eyupuyupieki engoro ai te nkaraki iyie tenebo lelo shoreta linono pokira aare; amu eitu iroro intae tialo nanu imbaa naasipa anaa enairoro osinka lai Yoab." 
Job42:8 Ore naa taata iwa iloing'ok oopishana olmeregeshi oopishana, nilo enetii osinka lai Yoab, nilo aitayu teine te nkaraki kewan ino olasar opejori; pee kiomonoki osinka lai Yoab, amu kang'amaa enkomono enye nemaaitaas nanu iyie terisioroto emodai ino; amu eitu iro te nanu ina nasipa anaa enairoro osinka lai Yoab.”" 
Job42:9 Metaa eshomo Elifas le Tema tenebo Bildad le Shuhi tenebo Sofa le Naaman aas ina natiaaka Olaitoriani ninche, neng'amaa Olaitoriani enkomono e Yoab." 
Job42:10 Neitoki Olaitoriani arrinyoki Yoab imasaa enyena, ina kata eomonoki ilchoreta lenyena. Neisho Olaitoriani Yoab katitin are oo ntokitin apa pooki naata te dukuya." 
Job42:11 Neitoki aapuonu enetii ninye ilalashera lenyena pooki o nkanashera o lelo pooki apa ooyiolo ninye te dukuya, nenya ninche endaa tenebo ninye te nkaji enye; neing'urrie ninche ninye neitagol too ntorrok pooki apa naayaka Olaitoriani ninye; ore pooki lenye neisho ninye mpisai tenebo olpisiai le sahabu." 
Job42:12 Nemayian Olaitoriani nkolong'i e siadi e Yoab oleng alang ine dukuya; neeta apa ninye intare nkalifuni tomon oong'uan, o ntamesin nkalifuni ile, o lmong'i ooturishore enkalifu nabo, osirkon enkalifu nabo." 
Job42:13 Eeta sii ninye apa ilayiok oopishana o ntoyie uni. 
Job42:14 Nedung'oki enkarna enkikau enye ajo Yemima; ore eniare neipot ajo enkarna enye Kesia, ore eneuni nedung'oki enkarna ajo Karen Happuk." 
Job42:15 Naa ore teina kop pooki, meetae apa ntoyie naainepu intoyie e Yoab te sidano; neitujung menye pooki tenebo lalashera lenye." 
Job42:16 Ore pee eidipayu ena, enyaaka Yoab abik ilarin iip o artam, nedol ilayiok lenyena, o layiok loo layiok lenyena, iishoritin ong'uan." 
Job42:17 Neirura Yoab, etaa olpayian kitok netobikoyie nkolong'i kumok oleng." 
Psalms1:1 Emayiana ilo tung'ani lemelo enkiguana oo ltung'ana torrok, nemeitashe te nkoitoi oo laing'okok, nemeton to lturrur le lelo loo lderrat torrok;" 
Psalms1:2 kake ore eng'ida enye naa enkitanapata o Laitoriani, naa enkitanapata eibirribir ninye dama o kewarie." 
Psalms1:3 Eikununo ninye anaa olchani otuunoki te mbata e nkare e nchorro, oiu ilng'anayio lenyena te rishata enye, nemetoyu mbenek enyena. Ore te nena pooki naas ninye, nedupoyu." 
Psalms1:4 Mme neijia etiu lelo torrok, kake eikununo anaa suut naakutaa osiuo." 
Psalms1:5 Ore enkaraki ina etudung'okoki enkiguana lelo torrok, negeluni aaitalam olturrur le lelo supati" 
Psalms1:6 amu eyiolo Olaitoriani enkoitoi e lelo supati, kake ore enkoitoi e lelo torrok naa keidak." 
Psalms2:1 Kainyoo pee eitobirita iloshon enkarruoisho, kainyoo pee eitobir iloreren nkitobirat enye e ntorroni e pesho?" 
Psalms2:2 Eiturrurrote ilaiguanak le nkop, neiguana lelo ooitoreisho te nebo, aagilunore Olaitoriani o ilo lenye otubukokoki eilata aaput, ejo," 
Psalms2:3 “Matalak ienat enye nabo kata, nikinturraa nkeenta enye aaitalam ate.”" 
Psalms2:4 Ore ilo oton te shumata nekueni; neikordod nena kitobirat enye e pesho. 
Psalms2:5 Naa keitoki ninye airorie ninche te ngoro enye napi, neiture ninche te ngoro namutisho, ejo," 
Psalms2:6 “Atipika nanu olaiguanani lai shumata Sion, ilo doinyo lai sinyati.”" 
Psalms2:7 Kalikioo nanu ina natejo Olaitoriani: Aatiaaka ninye nanu, “Ira iyie enkerai ai, ore ena olong, aatoiuo nanu iyie." 
Psalms2:8 Toomonoki nanu, naa kaitaa nanu lelo oshon enjung'ore ino, naitaa ineeiting'ie enkop iwuejitin inono." 
Psalms2:9 Nigil iyie ninche te ng'udi e sekenkei, nintaa ninche mbelibelat anaa emoti oo nkulupuok.”" 
Psalms2:10 Ore naa taata, lo aiguanak, entaa ng'eni; nchoo eikok intae lo aitoriak le nkop." 
Psalms2:11 Esiaayia Olaitoriani te nkuretisho, te nkikirikirata," 
Psalms2:12 entung'utut nkejek enyena, megoro ake, nindaayaya te nkoitoi; amu keyupuyup engoro enye asioki. Emayiana lelo pooki oosaru ninye." 
Psalms3:1 Iyie Olaitoriani, meikenayu ilmang'ati laainei! Aatudumakinote nanu ilkumok aagilunore;" 
Psalms3:2 ejoito ilkumok ti alo nanu, metii eretoto naing'uaa Enkai te nkaraki ninye." 
Psalms3:3 Kake ore iyie Olaitoriani, ira elong'o naamanita nanu, iyie enkitoo ai, naa iyie likishumu endukuya." 
Psalms3:4 Atabuakua nanu aishiraki Olaitoriani, naawaliki ninye nanu te ilo doinyo lenye sinyati." 
Psalms3:5 Airraga nanu nairura; naitoki ainyototo, amu Olaitoriani laarripito." 
Psalms3:6 Maure nanu iltung'ana nkalifuni tomon, lelo laatudumakinote nanu aarare naamuat." 
Psalms3:7 Inyo, iyie Olaitoriani! Tokorduaki nanu na Ai ai! Amu itoosho iyie ilmang'ati laainei pooki eseder, itigila iyie ilala le lelo arruok." 
Psalms3:8 Eno Laitoriani enkordunoto meetu mayianat inono shumata iltung'ana linono. 
Psalms4:1 Tawalikiaki nanu te naipot, iyie na Ai e sipata ai! Kinchoo iyie nanu erishata ina kata atii atua osina. Ing'urrieki nanu, nining enkomono ai." 
Psalms4:2 Lo tung'ana, eikintukurrurru akenya o anu? Inyorrurru intae irorei le pesho o anu, nirubarere elejare?" 
Psalms4:3 Kake tayiolo nchere, etegelaka Olaitoriani kewan ilo oure ninye; kening Olaitoriani te naipot nanu ninye." 
Psalms4:4 Entagoroto kake emiaas ingok enguanata too ltauja linyi too ndapashi inyi, nigirara." 
Psalms4:5 Ntayu ilasarri oosipa nipik osiligi lino atua Olaitoriani. 
Psalms4:6 Etii ilkumok oojo, “Oi naaji tenaa eikidol iyiook embae sidai. Ntorioki iyiook ewang'an e nkomom ino, Olaitoriani!”" 
Psalms4:7 Itipika iyie eng'ida kitok oltau lai nalang eng'ida naata ninche teneponari entapa enye o enaisho oo sabibu. 
Psalms4:8 Te seriani nanu airrag airura, amu iyie ake Olaitoriani likincho matobiko te seriani." 
Psalms5:1 Toning'o irorei laainei, iyie Olaitoriani; toduaa ndamunot aainei o ltau." 
Psalms5:2 Toning'o oltoilo le nkishirata ai, Olaiguanani lai naa Enkai ai, amu iyie aomon nanu." 
Psalms5:3 Iyie Olaitoriani, ining iyie oltoilo lai tadekenya; ore tadekenya naaitobiraki nanu iyie olasar, naton aanyisho." 
Psalms5:4 Amu mira iyie Enkai nashipakino entorroni; meton entorroni te nebo iyie. 
Psalms5:5 Meidim ilo oitokoos aitasho te dukuya nkonyek inono; imba iyie ilaasak loo ntorrok pooki. 
Psalms5:6 Indaikie iyie lelo ooiro elejare; neitame Olaitoriani lelo oata enkure o sarge o ltung'ana. 
Psalms5:7 Kake ore nanu te nkaraki ina nyorrata ino sapuk nauno, naa kajing atua enkaji ino; kaseremisho nanu aipirare ina aji ino sinyati te uriata ino." 
Psalms5:8 Torikoyioki nanu Olaitoriani te supatisho ino, te nkaraki ilmang'ati laainei; ntorioi enkoitoi ino te dukuya nanu." 
Psalms5:9 Amu metii esipata nkutukie enye; ore iltauja lenye naa enkidaata, ore olgos lenye naa enkurare nang'a, neikordodisho to lng'ejep lenye." 
Psalms5:10 Nchoo ninche enap enkitarruorroto enye, iyie Enkai; nchoo ninche ebatata too nkiguanat enye maate; ore te nkaraki nkitarruorot enye kumok taarai ninche mpang'ie, amu kitogolong'akita ninche iyie." 
Psalms5:11 Kake nchoo lelo pooki likisaru iyie meting'idata, nchoo ninche metaranyisho anaake te ng'ida; naa tomitu iyie ninche, paa ore lelo pooki oonyor enkarna ino niking'idakino iyie." 
Psalms5:12 Amu imayian iyie ilo asipani, iyie Olaitoriani; nintushur iyie ninye enyorrata ino anaa elong'o." 
Psalms6:1 Iyie Olaitoriani, mikisikong nanu te ngoro ino, nimikintame nanu te ngoro ino napi." 
Psalms6:2 Ing'urrieki nanu iyie Olaitoriani, amu ataa oloishunye nanu: Olaitoriani, nchiunyeki, amu etororonyate iloik laainei." 
Psalms6:3 Netanyamala sii oltau lai. Kake amaa iyie Olaitoriani, o anu kenya?" 
Psalms6:4 Mbelekenyayu Olaitoriani, ntajeu enkishui ai; tokorduaki nanu te nkaraki ina nyorrata ino nauno." 
Psalms6:5 Amu ore ti atua keeya nimikintokini aadamu iyie; amaa, ti atua enemeneng'a kaing'ae likisis iyie?" 
Psalms6:6 Atalepori nanu te nkishirata ai; ore pooki kewarie neibalibala ilkiyio laainei te ndapash, neilibilib endapash ai too lkiyio." 
Psalms6:7 Eiliilaitie nkonyek aainei te nkaraki osina, eimisiloitie te nkaraki ilmang'ati laainei." 
Psalms6:8 Enchom entung'uayioki, intae pooki aasak loo ntorrok; amu etoning'o Olaitoriani oltoilo le nkishirata ai." 
Psalms6:9 Etoning'o Olaitoriani enkomono ai, etang'amayie Olaitoriani enkomono ai." 
Psalms6:10 Keitukurruni ilmang'ati laainei pooki, neitanyamali, keibelekenya ninche aarrinyo, neitukurruni te nkata nabo." 
Psalms7:1 Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ai, iyie nanu asaru; ntajeuoki nanu te lelo pooki laasujita, nikikordu nanu," 
Psalms7:2 maaibung ake anaa olng'atuny, naaing'irtitoo aanya, metii hoo obo laamitu." 
Psalms7:3 Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ai, te nataasa nanu ena, te netii entorroni nkaik aainei," 
Psalms7:4 tenaa katalaaka nanu olchore lai te ntorroni, tenaa kaitajeuo nanu ilo mang'atinta lai pesho," 
Psalms7:5 nchoo ninye ilo mang'tinta lai aasuj naainepu nanu, naa nchoo ninye eitunyoki enkishui ai enkop, neipurrupur oltau lai." 
Psalms7:6 Tudumunye Olaitoriani te ngoro ino, ntaisheikinore tigilunore ina pushuna oo lmang'ati laainei; inyo na Ai ai; amu itudung'uo iyie enkiguana." 
Psalms7:7 Nchoo eumata oo ltung'ana kinturrurrokino iyie, aaman; ore te shumata tipika olorika lino." 
Psalms7:8 Olaitoriani oiguanare loreren; nguanareki nanu iyie Olaitoriani, te risioroto oo sipat aainei, o te risioroto e ina biotisho e supatisho ai" 
Psalms7:9 nchoo eiting entorroni e lelo torrok, kake ntubulai ilo supat, iyie ilo otem ndamunot o ltauja, iyie Enkai oo sipat." 
Psalms7:10 Enkai ninye elong'o ai, ninye oitajeu ilo supat to ltau." 
Psalms7:11 Enkai olaiguanani loo sipat, naa Enkai naata engoro nkolong'i pooki." 
Psalms7:12 Te nemeirridu oltung'ani, neii Enkai olalem lenye, eteyietuo ninye enkawuo enye;" 
Psalms7:13 neitobira ninye nena masaa enyena o larrabal torrok, nepik mbaa enyena esayiet napi." 
Psalms7:14 Ng'ura ore ilo tung'ani torrono nedamu entorroni, nenuta ninche ntabo, neiu elejare." 
Psalms7:15 Neitobiru ninye engumoto aturu, nedoiki atua ina gumoto natuturuo." 
Psalms7:16 Ore ina taboi enye nerrinyokino enkorrok enye makewan, naa endukuya enye makewan edoiki entaboi enye." 
Psalms7:17 Kaisho nanu Olaitoriani enashe nairirikino esupatisho enye, naranyaki nanu te nkisisa enkarna o Laitoriani, Ilo otii shumata Aisul." 
Psalms8:1 Iyie Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani lang, kebaa enkitoo e nkarna ino te nkop pooki! Ore enkisisa e nkitoo ino nebaiki keper" 
Psalms8:2 too nkutukie oo nkera kutiti o naanakita, intobira iyie olkitamanyunoto le negol, te nkaraki ilmang'ati linono, pee imbooyo ilo mang'atinta o ilo oitalaku elap." 
Psalms8:3 Te naing'or nanu keper ino, ina siaai oo lkimojik linono, olapa o lakir litipika iyie;" 
Psalms8:4 kainyoo oltung'ani lilo iyie ashilaa, o enkerai e tung'ani ligolie iyie ninye?" 
Psalms8:5 Nintaa iyie ninye kiti penyo te Enkai, ninchopoko iyie ninye enkitoo o enkanyit." 
Psalms8:6 Nchoo iyie ninye enkitoria te shumata isiaaitin oo nkaik inono; itipika iyie ntokitin pooki abori nkejek enyena," 
Psalms8:7 ore nkerra pooki o lmong'i, ng'uesi sii e ong'ata." 
Psalms8:8 Imotonyi o loing'ang'e, o sinkir le naiposha, pooki toki ake ninye nalo ti atua enaiposha." 
Psalms8:9 Iyie Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani lang, kebaa enkitoo e nkarna ino ti atua enkop pooki!" 
Psalms9:1 Kaisho nanu Olaitoriani enashe to ltau lai pooki; kalikioo nena kiaasin inono e nking'asia. 
Psalms9:2 Kang'ida nanu naa kaaranyaki iyie, karanyisho nanu te nkisisa e nkarna ino, iyie Olotii Shumata Aisul." 
Psalms9:3 Te neibelekenya ilmang'ati laainei, kerrorro neidak te dukuya iyie." 
Psalms9:4 Amu ntasheyie iyie esipata ai; itotona iyie to lorika le nkitoo ninguana te sipata. 
Psalms9:5 Isikong'a iyie iloshon, ndaikie iyie lelo torrok; aitujutoyie iyie aiwuang'ie enkarna enye ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Psalms9:6 Eisha ilmang'ati te nkidaata oo ntarasi; nitadotuo iyie nkanas enye; ore endamunoto enye neisha. 
Psalms9:7 Kake eton Olaitoriani to lorika le nkitoo ntarasi, neitasheyie olorika lenye le nkitoo pee etum atudung'o enkiguana;" 
Psalms9:8 nedung'oki ninye enkop enkiguana te sipata, nedung'oki loreren enkiguana too nkiririkinot." 
Psalms9:9 Olaitoriani ninye osempewuet le ilo oitorogonyi, osempewuet too nkatitin e nyamali." 
Psalms9:10 Ore lelo ooyiolo enkarna ino nepik osiligi lenye atua iyie, amu ore iyie Olaitoriani, neitu inturraa lelo likisilig iyie." 
Psalms9:11 Entaranyaki enkisisa Olaitoriani, ilo oton te Sion! Entolikioi ti atua loreren nkiaasin enyena!" 
Psalms9:12 Amu ore ilo oitalaku elap o sarge, nedamu ninche; merikino ninye olkiyioi le ilo oata osina." 
Psalms9:13 Ing'urrieki nanu Olaitoriani! Toduaa enyamali naata te nkaraki lelo laaiba, Iyie ilo laadumu nanu aitung'uaa nchomito e keeya," 
Psalms9:14 pee atum atolimu enkisisa ino, paa ore too nchomito e ina tito e Sion, nang'idakino nanu enkordunoto ino." 
Psalms9:15 Eimiso iloshon tiatua ina gumoto natuturo ninche; ore te ilo rreshet oisudoitie ninche nerruesh nkejek enye maate. 
Psalms9:16 Eibalunye Olaitoriani kewan, etudung'o ninye enkiguana; etijing'a lelo torrok orreshet ti atua esiaai oo nkaik enye maate." 
Psalms9:17 Kepuo lelo torrok aajing enemeneng'a, lelo oshon pooki lemedamu Enkai." 
Psalms9:18 Ore ilaisinak nemeitokini aapalaa anaake ore osiligi loo laisinak nemerrarri ntarasi. 
Psalms9:19 Tudumunye Olaitoriani! Mincho oltung'ani meisula; nchoo iloreren eiguanareki te dukuya iyie! 
Psalms9:20 Tipika ninche atua enkuretisho, Olaitoriani! Nchoo iloreren eyiolou aajo iltung'ana ake ninche!" 
Psalms10:1 Kainyoo pee intashe alamari, iyie Olaitoriani? Kainyoo iyie pee isudoo kewan too nkatitin oo ng'olikinot." 
Psalms10:2 To lwuasa emir lelo torrok ilaisinak; nchoo meibung'a ninche lelo rresheta ooitobira. 
Psalms10:3 Amu keitokoos ilo torrono too yieunot o ltau lenye, ore ilo tung'ani oata olorok loo masaa nemenaa Enkai." 
Psalms10:4 Ore to lwuasa le nkomom enye nemeing'oru ninye Enkai; ore too ndamunot enyena pooki naa, “Meetae Enkai.”" 
Psalms10:5 Nebul too nkoitoi enyena nkatitin pooki; ore nkiguanat inono netii shumata, mebaiki ninye; ore ilmang'ati lenyena pooki neikordod ninche." 
Psalms10:6 Nedamu ninye to ltau lenye ajo, “Maaigusugusieki nanu; ore ti atua iishoritin pooki matum nanu batisho.”" 
Psalms10:7 Ebore enkutuk enye ildeketa o elejare o enkitorogonyare; ore abori olng'ejep lenye netii ntabo o entorroni. 
Psalms10:8 Neton ninye to lnukata too nkang'itie, ore ti atua iwuejitin neeisudoriyie nesesekuan lelo supati. Neikeern lelo ooshal," 
Psalms10:9 neirrag ninye to lnukata lenye anaa olng'atuny; neirrag ninye pee etum aibunga ilo aisinani, neibung ninye ilo aisinani te nemiraki ninye atua orreshet lenye." 
Psalms10:10 Nerrarri ilo oshal, neimisieki te nkop, nebatata te ngolon enye." 
Psalms10:11 Nejo to ltau lenye, “Etorikine Enkai, eisudoyie ninye enkomom enye, medol ae kata ina.”" 
Psalms10:12 Tudumunye, iyie Olaitoriani, iyie Enkai, tudumu enkaina ino; mincho kirikino ilo oata osina." 
Psalms10:13 Kainyoo pee eany ilo torrono Enkai, nejo to ltau lenye, “Maaitamie ninye nanu.”" 
Psalms10:14 Idol iyie; ee, itoduaa iyie enyamali o sina, pee itum iyie aiwuang'ie too nkaik inono; ore ilo oshal naa iyie eigarakino; iyie otaa olaretoni loo lokishin." 
Psalms10:15 Tigila iyie enkaina e ilo torrono o eno larruoni; tusuja entorroni enye o metaba anaa neishunye. 
Psalms10:16 Olaitoriani ninye olaiguanani ntarasi o ntarasi; keidak iloshon te nkaina enye. 
Psalms10:17 Iyie Olaitoriani, ining iyie eyieunoto eilo obor; nintagol iyie ninye oshoke nirrugoki enkiok ino" 
Psalms10:18 pee inguenare te sipata ilo okishi o ilo oibookoki enkop, paa ore ilo tung'ani le nkop nemeigil ae kata aitureisho." 
Psalms11:1 Atua Olaitoriani nanu asaru; kaji iyie inko pee kijoki nanu, “Isika anaa emotonyi shomo ildoinyo;" 
Psalms11:2 amu ng'ura, eteyietutuo lelo torrok enkawuo enye, etipika ninche embae enye empito, pee etum aatang'or te naimin ilo supat to ltau;" 
Psalms11:3 amaa te neidaikieki ilkitamanyunot kaa eas ilo supat?” 
Psalms11:4 Etii Olaitoriani atua enkaji enye sinyati, etii olorika le nkitoo lo Laitoriani keper; neing'orisho too nkonyek enyena, netem too nkonyek enyena, nkera e tung'ana." 
Psalms11:5 Ketem Olaitoriani ilo supat o ltorrono, neiba to ltau lenye olarruoni." 
Psalms11:6 Ore te lelo torrok, naa keitashaiki nkuk e nkima o enchan oo soito; o lkutati opejisho olo aaku erubata e nkikompe enye." 
Psalms11:7 Amu aisupat Olaitoriani, nenyor ninye nkiaasin supati; ilo oata oltau sidai odol enkomon enye." 
Psalms12:1 Taretu iyiook, Olaitoriani: amu meekure eetae hoo obo oata euriata e Nkai; amu eishunye ilooisiligayu tiatua nkera e tung'ana." 
Psalms12:2 Eiro pooki ng'ae elejare tialo ole latia enye; to lkoroj o te nkilelemare eiro ninche. 
Psalms12:3 Metudung'oi Olaitoriani nkutukie pooki naaikorojisho lelo ng'ejepa le nkitokoos kitok," 
Psalms12:4 lelo oojo, “Ore olng'ejep lang nikisulie, kiaata nkutukie ang, kaing'ae naitore iyiook.”" 
Psalms12:5 “Ore enkaraki naitorogonyaki olaisinani, oe nkaraki naigorito ilo oata osina kadumunye taata nanu,” Olaitoriani ojo; “Kapik nanu ninye atua ina seriani naa ninye eng'uar.”" 
Psalms12:6 Ore nkisiligat o Laitoriani naa nkisiligat naasila, naaikununo anaa enkosholai natisilaki to lkokuet te nkop, nesili katitin naapishana." 
Psalms12:7 Torripo iyie iyiook Olaitoriani, torripo iyiook anaake tena ishoi." 
Psalms12:8 Ore too nkaloli pooki, nemanimanaa anaa olng'atuny lelo torrok anaa enatudumuye entorroni aponari ti atua nkera e tung'ana." 
Psalms13:1 Ke nkata nabaa iyie Olaitoriani? Mikidamu iyie nanu? Kenkata nabaa isudoo iyie enkomom ino te nanu. 
Psalms13:2 Kanap nanu emion to ltau lai o anu, naisinanuo to ltau lai endama pooki? Keitokoos akenya olmang'atinta lai ti alo nanu o anu?" 
Psalms13:3 Ing'uraki nanu, nikiwaliki, iyie Olaitoriani, Enkai ai; ntawang'a nkonyek aainei, pee mairura ake too njo e keeya;" 
Psalms13:4 pee mejo ake olmang'atinta lai, “Aisula nanu te ninye”; pee meng'ida ake ilo mang'atinta lai tenkaraki embatata ai." 
Psalms13:5 Kake aisiliga nanu ina nyorrata ino nauno; naa keng'ida oltau lai te nkaraki enjeunoto ino. 
Psalms13:6 Karanyaki nanu Olaitoriani, amu aaitaasa ninye nanu ine supatisho te nkumoi." 
Psalms14:1 Ejo ilo modai to ltau lenye, “Meetae Enkai.” Etarruoitie ninche, neas mbaa o lminong, meetae hoo obo oas mbaa sidain." 
Psalms14:2 Eing'or Olaitoriani kop etii keper, neing'or nkera e tung'ana, pee edol tenaa ketii iloasisho te ng'eno, lelo ooing'oru Enkai." 
Psalms14:3 Eshomo ninche pooki aapong'ori, enyaanyuk pooki; meetae hoo obo oas isupati, meetae, metii hoo obo." 
Psalms14:4 Aimeeta ninche eng'eno, kulo aasak loo ntorrok pooki, ooinos iltung'ana laainei, anaa enainos ninche endaa, nemeserem ninche Olaitoriani?" 
Psalms14:5 Ore te ine kepuo ninche aajing olkirutoto sapuk, amu etii Enkai te nebo ina ishoi e lelo supati." 
Psalms14:6 Inyalinyala intae nena kitobirat e ilo aisinani, kake Olaitoriani esarunoto enye." 
Psalms14:7 Oi siaake elotu enkordunoto e Israel eing'uaa Sion! Te neitopok Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena, naa keng'ida Yakobo, neshipayu Israel." 
Psalms15:1 Iyie Olaitoriani, kaing'ae olo aton to lng'obor lino? Kaing'ae olo amany ilo doinyo lino sinyati." 
Psalms15:2 Ilo olo meeta entioto, neas isupati, neiro esipata to ltau lenye;" 
Psalms15:3 nemeiro mbaa e nkiteenikino to lng'ejep lenye, nemeitaas entorroni olchore lenye, nemekur aitubulaa olmarenke teilo le latia enye;" 
Psalms15:4 laa ore too nkonyek enyena nemenaa looiba Enkai, neyanyit lelo ooure Enkai, ilo oinos olmumai nemeibelekenya;" 
Psalms15:5 nemeitayu mpisai enyena te nkaraki dupoto, nemeng'amaa ninye entoki e ropare pee einyal esipata. Ore ilo oas kuna baa nemeigusugusieki ae kata." 
Psalms16:1 Tagolieki nanu Olaitoriani, amu iyie nanu asaru." 
Psalms16:2 Atiaaka nanu Olaitoriani, “Ira iyie Olaitoriani lai; ore pooki toki sidai naata naa iyie eing'uaa.”" 
Psalms16:3 Ore ti alo lelo sinyat ootii enkop, naa ile tipat ninche, laa ninche nanu ashipakino." 
Psalms16:4 Ore lelo oogelu ae kitanyaanyukoto oo nkaitin neponaa isinaitin lenye; ore lelo asarri lenye lo sarge nemaibukoo nanu, nemaipot nkarn e nena kitanyaanyukoto te nkutuk ai." 
Psalms16:5 Olaitoriani ninye erubata ai nageluno naa enkikompe ai, mbung'ita iyie enkishui ai." 
Psalms16:6 Kebaa enking'asia oo nkishorot inono te nanu, kebaa esidano enye!" 
Psalms16:7 Kaisis nanu Olaitoriani laa ninye laaikok, ore sii te nkewarie naaiteng'en oltau lai." 
Psalms16:8 Kapik nanu anaake Olaitoriani dukuya ai; amu etii ninye enkaina ai e tatene, maaigusugusieki nanu." 
Psalms16:9 Ore enkaraki ina keng'ida oltau lai, neshipa enkishui ai; neton sii osesen lai te seriani." 
Psalms16:10 Amu eitu iyie kipalaa mashomo atua enemeneng'a, neitu ncho ilo oure Enkai edoiki engumoto." 
Psalms16:11 Kintodol iyie nanu enkoitoi e nkishui; ore enitii iyie, netii eng'ida nabore, ore enkaina ino e tatene netii ntokitin sidain ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Psalms17:1 Toning'o esipata, iyie Olaitoriani; toning'o enkishirata ai! Nchoo enkiok ino enkomono ai naing'uaa enkutuk nemetii elejare!" 
Psalms17:2 Nchoo eaku iyie eing'uaa esipata ai! Nchoo nkonyek inono edol esipata! 
Psalms17:3 Ti nitem iyie oltau lai, ti nikimutan iyie nanu kewarie, ti nikijur iyie nanu, nimitum iyie entorroni ti atua nanu; eitu apong'ori too nkirorot aainei." 
Psalms17:4 Ore ti alo isiaaitin e tung'ana, ore to rorei lino, natapaasha nanu nkoitoi oo larruok." 
Psalms17:5 Ore roruat aainei neibung'a nkoitoi inono, eitu eideketari nkejek aainei." 
Psalms17:6 Aaipoto nanu iyie, amu eikiwaliki iyie, Olaitoriani; irrugokoki enkiok ino, toning'o irorei laainei." 
Psalms17:7 Ntodolu enyorrata ino nauno te mpukunoto e nking'asia, iyie Laaitajeunoni le lelo likisaru, too lmang'ati lenye te nkaina ino e tatene." 
Psalms17:8 Tagolieki nanu anaa enerok e nkong'u; isudoyioki nanu to loip loo naipuko inono," 
Psalms17:9 te nkaraki ilo torrono laainyal nanu, lelo mang'ati laainei laamanita nanu." 
Psalms17:10 Neitagol ninche iltauja lenye; pee meitoki aata olng'ur, ore too nkutukie enye neiro te nkitokoos." 
Psalms17:11 Naasuj ninche nanu; naatamana taata ninche; naaing'or nanu pee aatum aatanang'ie enkop. 
Psalms17:12 Eikununo ninche anaa olng'atuny oibung eng'ues, etiu anaa olkuoo lo lng'atuny erreshito eng'ues." 
Psalms17:13 Tudumunye, Olaitoriani! Intoriokinoyu ninche taarare, tanang'ai ninche! Tokordu enkishui ai ti alo ilo torrono to lalem lino," 
Psalms17:14 tokorduaki too ltung'ana te nkaina ino, iyie Olaitoriani, tialo lelo tung'ana laa ore erubata enye te nkishui naa ena kop. Ntamio ninche teilo sina litushumaka ninche, menoto nkera enye osina olang ilo, metelekakini ilo sina nkera oo nkera enye." 
Psalms17:15 Ore nanu, naa kaing'or enkomom ino te supatisho, te nainyototo, naraposho te nduaata ino." 
Psalms18:1 Kaanyor nanu iyie, iyie Olaitoriani, iyie engolon ai." 
Psalms18:2 Olaitoriani ninye endapidapoi ai, o sempewuaet lai, naa olakordunoni, Enkai ai, endapidapoi ai naa ninye asaru, elong'o ai, naa emowuo e njeunoto ai, naa ninye osempewuet lai." 
Psalms18:3 Aipoto nanu Olaitoriani, laa ninye eishiaakino neisisi, naaitajeuo nanu too lmang'ati laainei." 
Psalms18:4 Aatamana nanu nkeenta e keeya, naaiputukunyie nanu olairrag le nkare e ntorroni." 
Psalms18:5 Aatamana nanu nkeenta e nemeneng'a, naaipirakinore nanu irresheta le keeya." 
Psalms18:6 Ore ti atua osina lai naipoto Olaitoriani; Enkai ai nanu aishiraka maataretu. Ore etii enkaji enye sinyati nening oltoilo lai, ore ina kishirata naishiraka ninye nelo abaiki nkiyiaa enyena." 
Psalms18:7 Neikirikira taa enkop neigirigiro; ore sii ilkitamanyunot loo ldoinyo neikirikira, nejing enkop olokirikiri te nkaraki natagore ninye." 
Psalms18:8 Nepuku empuruo too nkumeishin enyena, nepuku enkima nanyaisho te nkutuk enye, o nkuk naaishu naapuku te ninye." 
Psalms18:9 Neirrugu ninye shumata, nedou alotu kop; netii emisimisi kitok abori nkejek enye." 
Psalms18:10 Neked ninye enchumata olkerubi, nelo tiaai, nelo too naipuko o siwuo." 
Psalms18:11 Neitaa ninye enaimin enkimulumulet ore enkitushuret enye naa nkatampo naairrusha naabore enkare. 
Psalms18:12 Ore te ina wang'an e nkiwuang'ata natii dukuya ninye, nepuku isoito sapuki le nchan o nkuk e nkima." 
Psalms18:13 Etadara sii Olaitoriani to loing'ang'e, ore Ilo otii Shumata Aisul neitayu oltoilo lenye, neitayu enchan oo soito o nkuk naaishu." 
Psalms18:14 Neirriwaa ninye mbaa enyena, neidapash ninche; neyau nkiwuang'at o enkimerlel, neidapash ninche." 
Psalms18:15 Nelioyu nkoitoi e nkare tiatua enaiposha, ore ilkitamanyunot le nkop neibalayu aalioyu, te mbuakunoto ino, Olaitoriani, te nkutata e nkiyang'et oo nkumeishin inono." 
Psalms18:16 Naabaiki ninye atii enkop, naaya nanu, naaitayu ninye nanu ti atua nkariak kumok." 
Psalms18:17 Naakordu ninye nanu te ilo mang'atinta lai ogol, o te lelo laaiba nanu; amu kegol ninche oleng te nanu." 
Psalms18:18 Eetuo ninche shumata nanu te ina olong o sina lai, kake Olaitoriani ninye entonata ai." 
Psalms18:19 Aayaua ninye ewueji nelala; aatokordua ninye nanu amu aatishipakine nanu. 
Psalms18:20 Aatalaaka nanu Olaitoriani te risioroto oo sipat aainei; te risioroto e sinyatisho oo nkaik aainei aatalaaka ninye nanu. 
Psalms18:21 Amu aibung'a nanu nkoitoi o Laitoriani, neitu nanu alo aing'uaa Olaitoriani Enkai ai te ntorroni." 
Psalms18:22 Amu ore nkiguanat enyena pooki netii dukuya nanu, ore nkikoot enyena neitu nanu aiwuang'ie aitalam kewan." 
Psalms18:23 Maata apa nanu eleyiata te dukuya ninye, naitalam nanu kewan nkitadiaat." 
Psalms18:24 Ore nkaraki ina, aatalaaka nanu Olaitoriani te risioroto e supatisho ai, te risioroto e sinyatisho oo nkaik aainei, te dukuya ninye." 
Psalms18:25 Ore te lelo supati nintodolu esupatisho ino, ore to ltung'ani lemeeta entioto nintodol esinyatisho ino." 
Psalms18:26 Ore te ilo lemeiduruk nintodol ajo minduruk iyie; ore te ilo otolo nintodol entoloi ino. 
Psalms18:27 Amu ikordu iyie lelo oobor; kake ore lelo oowuasa nerup ate nintadou. 
Psalms18:28 Ee, inok iyie oltaa lai; Olaitoriani Enkai ai oitawang enaimin ai." 
Psalms18:29 Ee, ore te nkaraki iyie namir oltim loo lmang'ati; ore te nkaraki Enkai ai naidim aida esuntai." 
Psalms18:30 Ore ena Ai, nesipa enkoitoi enye; ore enkisiligata o Laitoriani neuno asipayu; elong'o ninye te lelo pooki oosaru ninye." 
Psalms18:31 Amu kaing'ae Enkai leme Olaitoriani? Naa, kaing'ae endapidapoi neme Enkai ang?" 
Psalms18:32 Ina Ai naaterretena nanu te ngolon, neitaserian enkoitoi ai." 
Psalms18:33 Neiteneneng nkejek aainei anaa entarakuet, naaitaserian ninye nanu too neeika." 
Psalms18:34 Neitaarriyian ninye nkaik aainei to larrabal, neaku keidim nkaik aatoriuo enkawuo o suyai." 
Psalms18:35 Kinchoo iyie nanu elong'o e njeunoto ino, ore enkaina ino e tatene naaitagol nanu, ore eretoto ino naaitaa nanu kitok." 
Psalms18:36 Kinchoo iyie nanu ewueji nelala te nkaraki nkejek aainei, neitu eideketari nkejek aainei." 
Psalms18:37 Atimira nanu ilmang'ati laainei nainepu ninche; neitu nanu arrinyo o metaba anaa neidak ninche. 
Psalms18:38 Atoosho ninche anang'ie enkop nemeigil ninche aadumunye nebatata ti abori nkejek aainei. 
Psalms18:39 Amu kiterretena iyie nanu te ngolon, te nkaraki olarrabal; ninchoo ilmang'ati laainei meimiso tiabori nanu." 
Psalms18:40 Iyie oishoo ilmang'ati laainei meibelekenyata aailanyisho, ore lelo apa laaiba naidaikie nanu ninche." 
Psalms18:41 Eishira ninche eing'oru eretoto, kake meetae oloitajeu ninche, eishirakitia ninche Olaitoriani kake eitu ninye ewaliki ninche." 
Psalms18:42 Aidong'o nanu ninche metotiwuo anaa enterit te dukuya; atanang'ayie nanu ninche anaa esarng'ab oo nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa. 
Psalms18:43 Kitokordua iyie nanu aitung'uaa enkesha oo ltung'ana, kintaa iyie nanu endukuya oo loshon; ore iloreren apa lemayiolo naaisiaai nanu." 
Psalms18:44 Ore ake pee aaning ninche nanu naairuk ninche; ore iltung'ana omon naayanyitu nanu. 
Psalms18:45 Etalepori iltung'ana omon, nepuonu ninche eikirikira eing'uaa isempewueti lenye." 
Psalms18:46 Keishu Olaitoriani; meisisi ina dapidapoi ai, meitaae kitok Enkai e njeunoto ai," 
Psalms18:47 ina Ai naitalaku elap nepik iloreren abori nanu; 
Psalms18:48 ilo laakordu nanu too lmang'ati laainei; ee, eikilepunye iyie aitulusoo too lmang'ati laainei; kitokordua iyie nanu too ltung'ana lo larrabal." 
Psalms18:49 Ore te nkaraki ena kaarrep nanu iyie, Olaitoriani ti atua iloreren, narany arrep enkarna ino." 
Psalms18:50 Eishoo ninye enkisulata kitok ilo aiguanani lenye, neitodolu enyorrata nauno te ilo lenye otubukoki eilata aaput, Daudi o eishoi enye ntarasi." 
Psalms19:1 Eitodolu keper enkitoo o Laitoriani; ore oloing'ang'e neitodolu esiaai oo nkaik enyena. 
Psalms19:2 Ore enkolong o enkolong neinosakino lomon, ore enkewarie o enkewarie neibalunye eng'eno." 
Psalms19:3 Meetae enkiroroto, nemeetae irorei; mening'o iltoiloishi lenye;" 
Psalms19:4 ore ake eyia, nelo oltoilo lenye aim enkop pooki, ore rorei lenye nebaiki ineeiting'ie enkop. Ore atua ninche netipika olng'obor le nkolong," 
Psalms19:5 ina olong nailepu anaa oloyamisho eipang'u te nkaji enye, o anaa oltung'ani ogol okuet ailanyisho te ng'ida." 
Psalms19:6 Ore enkilepunoto enye naa ineeiting'ie keper eing'uaa, ore manarot enyena nelo ineeiting'ie ninche, nemeetae entoki naisudoyioki te nkirowuaj enye." 
Psalms19:7 Ore enkitanapata o Laitoriani naa keikishiaan, neitopiu oltau; ore enchakenisho o Laitoriani naa kedede, neiteng'en olmodai;" 
Psalms19:8 ore nkikoot o Laitoriani naa sidain, neiting'id oltau; ore nkitanapat o Laitoriani naa kesila, nepik nkonyek ewang'an;" 
Psalms19:9 ore euriata o Laitoriani nemeiduruk, nebikoo ntarasi, ore nkiguanat o Laitoriani nesipa naa supati pooki." 
Psalms19:10 Neng'uarrayu ninche oleng aalang sahabu, aalang ninye sahabu sidai, nemelok sii aalang enaisho nelang olkenkei le mulug." 
Psalms19:11 Naa ninche eikokieki osinka lino; ore te nkibung'ata enye netii olerrinyore kitok. 
Psalms19:12 Kake kaing'ae omusu nkitarruorot enyena? Ntisinyaki iyie nanu too nkitarruorot naaisudoro. 
Psalms19:13 Imbooi iyie osinka lino too ng'ok o lwuasa, mincho ninche etum engolon ti atua nanu! Pee atum ataa maata entioto nasinyayu too nkitarruorot sapuki." 
Psalms19:14 Nchoo irorei le nkutuk ai, o nkibirribirrat o ltau lai, eng'amaroyu too nkonyek inono, iyie Olaitoriani, endapidapoi ai, naa olakordunoni lai." 
Psalms20:1 Mikitawaliki Olaitoriani iyie te nkolong e nyamali! Mikitorripo enkarna e Nkai e Yakobo! 
Psalms20:2 Mikirriwaki ninye iyie eretoto naing'uaa enkaji enye sinyati, nikintagolo ninye iyie te ina golon naing'uaa Sion!" 
Psalms20:3 Metadamu ninye ilasarri linono pooki, neing'or te nyorrarota ilasarri linono oopejori!" 
Psalms20:4 Mikinchoo ninye iyie iyieunot o ltau lino, neitabaya nkitobirat inyi pooki!" 
Psalms20:5 Nchoo iyiook matabuaku te ng'ida te nkaraki enkisulata ino, ore te nkarna e Nkai ang nikiun iyiook inankan ang! Meitabai Olaitoriani iomonunot inyi pooki." 
Psalms20:6 Ayiolo taata nanu ajo keretu Olaitoriani ilo lenye otubukokoki eilata aaput, kewaliki ninye te ine wueji sinyati te shumata, eeta nkisulat sapuki naaisula te nkaina enye." 
Psalms20:7 Eng'idare kulikae ngarrin oo mbartan, neng'idare kulikae mbartan; kake king'idare iyiook enkarna o Laitoriani Enkai ang." 
Psalms20:8 Keurori ninche aabatata; kake kidumunye iyiook nikintashe aaitoriori. 
Psalms20:9 Nchoo olaiguanani meisula, Olaitoriani; tawaliki iyiook ti nikimpot iyie." 
Psalms21:1 Te ngolon ino eng'ida olaiguanani iyie, Olaitoriani; naa te retoto ino eisulie ninye oleng." 
Psalms21:2 Inchoo iyie ninye eyieunoto oltau lenye neitu iyie mbooyo eomonunoto e nkutuk enye. 
Psalms21:3 Amu inang'are iyie ninye too mayianat sidain, ninchopoki ninye enkopiyia e nkitoo e sahabu nasila endukuya enye." 
Psalms21:4 Neomonu ninye enkishui te iyie, nincho iyie ninye, nkolong'i kumok ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Psalms21:5 Eisapuk enkitoo enye te nkaraki eretoto ino; nchopoko iyie ninye enkikodo o enkitoo. 
Psalms21:6 Ee, ntaa iyie ninye olomayiana oleng ntarasi, ninting'id iyie ninye te dukuya enkomom ino." 
Psalms21:7 Amu Olaitoriani eisilig olaiguanani; naa ore te nkaraki ina nyorrata nauno e Ilo otii Shumata Aisul, nemeigusugusuieki ninye." 
Psalms21:8 Ore enkaina ino ninye nalo aing'oru ilmang'ati linono pooki; neing'oru enkaina ino e tatene lelo pooki likimba. 
Psalms21:9 Nintotiu iyie ninche anaa olang'at le nkima te liooto ino. Keijoo Olaitoriani ninche te ngoro enye; neinos ninche enkima. 
Psalms21:10 Nindaikie iyie eishoi enye te nkop, niwuang'ie nkera enye aishie ti atua ltung'ana." 
Psalms21:11 Ti nikintobiraki ninche iyie entorroni, te neiguenu entaboi nemerasaa ninche." 
Psalms21:12 Amu ncho iyie ninche mekueta aailanyisho, niimul iyie nkomomi enye too mbaa inono." 
Psalms21:13 Nchoo kisisi iyie Olaitoriani, te nkaraki engolon ino! Eikiranyisho iyiook nikisis engolon ino." 
Psalms22:1 Enkai ai, Enkai ai, kainyoo pee kitung'uayie? Kainyoo pee kitalama nanu eitu kiret, nilam irorei laainei le nkigoroto?" 
Psalms22:2 Iyie na Ai ai, aaishiraka nanu dama kake eitu iyie kiwaliki; naaishiraki kewarie, kake eitu nanu atum enkiyeng'iyeng." 
Psalms22:3 Kake ira iyie sinyati, niton iyie te nkitoo e nkisisa e Israel." 
Psalms22:4 Iyie apa eisiliga loo papa; kisiliga apa ninche, nitokordua iyie ninche." 
Psalms22:5 Iyie apa eishirakita ninche, neitajeuni; iyie apa eisiliga ninche, neitu eitukurruni." 
Psalms22:6 Kake ara nanu olkurto, mara oltung'ani; naaikordod iltung'ana, naailap iloreren." 
Psalms22:7 Ore pooki laaing'or nanu naakueniyie, naadasaki nkineji, neipirripir ilukuny;" 
Psalms22:8 nejo, “Eisiliga ninye Olaitoriani; nchoo eitajeu ninye, nchoo ekordu ninye, amu ninye eshipakino!”" 
Psalms22:9 Ore ake sii, iyie apa likintayio te nguset e yieyio lai; kintaseriana iyie nanu atii ilki le yieyio." 
Psalms22:10 Shumata iyie apa aatanang'akaki ebaiki pee aaini, ore anaa naaiu yieyio lai ira iyie Enkai ai." 
Psalms22:11 Mikilam iyie nanu, amu etataana enyamali nemeeta likae laaretu." 
Psalms22:12 Aatang'adutua nanu iloing'ok kumok, aatamana nanu iloing'ok oogol le Bashan;" 
Psalms22:13 naang'aki nanu nkutukie enye, netiu anaa olng'atuny oikurrukur." 
Psalms22:14 Aaibukoyioki nanu anaa enkare, netirishate iloik laainei pooki too rubat; netotiwuo oltau lai anaa enkapoi, etoshole oltau lai ti atua olgoo lai;" 
Psalms22:15 etoyio engolon ai anaa oleleo le moti, neterepa olng'jep lai ntakul aainei; nikirragie iyie nanu te nterit e keeya." 
Psalms22:16 Ee, aamanita nanu ildiein; aatang'adua nanu olturrur loo laasak loo ntorrok, etaremo ninche ndapi oo nkaik aainei o nkejek -" 
Psalms22:17 kaidim nanu aikena loik laainei pooki - aaing'orita ninche naashil; 
Psalms22:18 neorikino ninche ilkilani laainei maate, ore to lkila lai neosh ninche enkukuo." 
Psalms22:19 Kake, ore iyie Olaitoriani, mikilakuaniki! Iyie la aretoni lai, tasieku taretoki!" 
Psalms22:20 Tokordu oltau lai to lalem, nikordu enkishui ai aitung'uaa engolon e ilo dia." 
Psalms22:21 Ntajeuoki nanu te nkutuk o lng'atuny, ntajeu ele tau lai oaata osina too mowuarak o olosokuan!" 
Psalms22:22 Kaibalunye nanu enkarna ino too lalashera laainei, naaisis iyie te mpolos e umata:" 
Psalms22:23 Esisa Olaitoriani intae ilooure ninye! Ore intae ilayiok pooki le Yakobo, entaa ninye kitok, nintasheshe te uriata enye, intae ilayiok pooki le Israel!" 
Psalms22:24 Amu eitu ninye emenu aashu eiteeng lelo oaata osina; neitu ninye eisudoo enkomom enye te ninye, kake etoning'o ninye ina kata pee eishiraki ninye te nkaraki eretoto." 
Psalms22:25 Iyie eing'uaa enkisisa ai ti atua eumata kitok; naa kalak nanu olmumai lai te dukuya lelo ooure ninye. 
Psalms22:26 Kedaa ilo oata osina neraposho, ore lelo ooing'oru ninye neisis Olaitoriani! Metaa keishu iltauja linyi ntarasi!" 
Psalms22:27 Kepuo aadamu ineieting'ie enkop pooki, neibelekenyakino Olaitoriani; neserem ilmareita pooki loo loshon te dukuya ninye." 
Psalms22:28 Amu eno Laitoriani enkitoria, neitore ninye iloshon." 
Psalms22:29 Ee, ninye epuo aairrugokino lelo pooki oowuasa lena kop; te dukuya ninye epuo aairrugo lelo pooki oopuo enkop, o ilo lemeidim aitopiu oltau lenye." 
Psalms22:30 Naa kelo eishoi enye aisiaai ninye, nepuo iltung'ana aaimaki Olaitoriani too ishoritin naapuonu," 
Psalms22:31 neibalunye enkordunoto enye too ltung'ana leton meino, nchere ninye otaasa ina." 
Psalms23:1 Olaitoriani ninye olchekut lai, maang'oriki nanu toki;" 
Psalms23:2 aairragie ninye nanu too nkujit naanyori, naarikoo ninye nanu te nkiopata oo nkariak naaitirring'a" 
Psalms23:3 neitagol ninye oltau lai. Naarikoo ninye nanu te nkoitoi oo sipat te nkaraki enkarna enye. 
Psalms23:4 Tenaa napaji ninye kalo aim oerata lo loip le keeya, nemaure entorroni; amu itii iyie te nebo nanu; eng'udi ino o rinka lino ninche naaitagol nanu." 
Psalms23:5 Ntobira iyie emisa te dukuya nanu, teine netii ilmang'ati laainei; nibukoki endukuya ai eilata, nipik enkikompe ai metaa kedooyo." 
Psalms23:6 Esipa aasuju esidano o lng'ur inkolong'i pooki e nkishui ai, naa kabik nanu ti atua enkaji o Laitoriani ntarasi." 
Psalms24:1 Eno Laitoriani enkop o ntokitin pooki naabore, enkop o lelo oomanya;" 
Psalms24:2 amu ninye oitamanyua too naaiposha, neitasheyie too lkejek." 
Psalms24:3 Kaing'ae olo aked ilo doinyo lo Laitoriani? Naa kaing'ae olo aitashe te wueji enye sinyati? 
Psalms24:4 Ilo osinya nkaik neeta oltau owang, ilo lemedumaki oltau lenye entorroni, nemeinos olmumai le lejare." 
Psalms24:5 Keng'amu ninye emayianata naing'uaa Olaitoriani, neng'amu esupatisho naing'uaa Enkai e njeunoto enye." 
Psalms24:6 Ore ileeijo kulo, naa eishoi e lelo ooing'oru ninye, lelo ooing'oru enkomom e Nkai e Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Entudumu lukuny inyi na shomito! Nidumunyenye intae na shomito musan! Pee etum Olaiguanani le nkitoo atijing'u. 
Psalms24:8 Kaing'ae Olaiguanani le nkitoo? Olaitoriani ogol magilani, Olaitoriani magilani to larrabal!" 
Psalms24:9 Entudumu lukuny inyi na shomito! Nidumunyenye intae, na shomito musan! Pee etum Olaiguanani le nkitoo atijing'u." 
Psalms24:10 Kaing'ae Olaiguanani le nkitoo? Olaitoriani loo lororani, ninye Olaiguanani le nkitoo!" 
Psalms25:1 Iyie nanu Olaitoriani adumaki oltau lai. 
Psalms25:2 Na Ai ai, iyie nanu aisilig, mincho nanu aaitukurruni; mincho ilmang'ati laainei eng'ida te nkaraki nanu." 
Psalms25:3 Ee, mincho hoo obo likingarakino iyie meitukurruni; nchoo meitukurruni lelo aitang'orok le pesho." 
Psalms25:4 Ntayioloki nanu nkoitoi inono, Olaitoriani; nteng'enaki nanu inkoitoi inono." 
Psalms25:5 Torikoki nanu ti atua esipata ino, nikinteng'en nanu, amu ira iyie Enkai e njeunoto ai; amu iyie nanu aanyita endama pooki." 
Psalms25:6 Tadamuaki nanu to lng'ur lino, Olaitoriani, o te nyorrata ino nauno, amu eetae apa ninche ebaiki moitie." 
Psalms25:7 Midamu iyie ing'ok e kitisho ai, anaa nkitarruorot aainei; ore te risioroto e nyorrata nauno, tadamuaki nanu, te nkaraki esupatisho ino Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms25:8 Eisupat naa asipani Olaitoriani; ore enkaraki ina neiteng'en ninye ilaing'okok te nkoitoi. 
Psalms25:9 Nerikoo ninye lelo oobor te nkoitoi sidai, neiteng'en lelo oobor te nkoitoi enye." 
Psalms25:10 Ore nkoitoi pooki o Laitoriani naa enyorrata nauno o esupatisho, te lelo ooibung olning'o lenye lo sotua o enchakenisho enye." 
Psalms25:11 Ore te nkaraki enkarna ino, Olaitoriani, tapalakaki entorroni ai, amu ai sapuk." 
Psalms25:12 Kalo tung'ani oure Olaitoriani? Ore ilo tung'ani eiteng'en ninye te nkoitoi nagelu. 
Psalms25:13 Ore ninye makewan neton te nkiputakinoto, ore nkera enyena nejung enkop." 
Psalms25:14 Ore shoruetisho o Laitoriani naa ene lelo ooure ninye, neitayiolo ninye ninche olning'o lenye lo sotua." 
Psalms25:15 Etii nkonyek aainei dukuya Olaitoriani anaake, amu keitayu ninye nkejek aainei to rreshet." 
Psalms25:16 Torrinyokinoyioki Olaitoriani, niking'urrie nanu, amu kaliyio naata osina." 
Psalms25:17 Nchooki enkiyagata te nyamali oltau lai, nikintupuku nanu ti atua isinaitin laainei." 
Psalms25:18 Ing'ura osina lai o enyamali ai, nikipalaki ing'ok aainei pooki." 
Psalms25:19 Ng'ura eneba ilmang'ati laainei, o eneba enkiba naaiba ninche nanu te ntoloi." 
Psalms25:20 Torripo siaake enkishui ai, nikikordu nanu; mikincho nanu aaitukurruni, amu iyie nanu asaru." 
Psalms25:21 Nchoo aagolie nanu esupatisho o emborron, amu iyie nanu aanyu." 
Psalms25:22 Talaku Israel, Iyie Enkai, ti atua inyamalaritin enyena pooki." 
Psalms26:1 Nguanareki nanu, iyie Olaitoriani, amu ashomo nanu te supatisho ai, naaisiliga nanu iyie Olaitoriani metii enking'aing'ai." 
Psalms26:2 Tujurroki nanu Olaitoriani nikitem; tetema oltau lai o ndamunot aainei. 
Psalms26:3 Amu etii ina nyorrata ino nauno dukuya nkonyek aainei, nalotu nanu te sipata enitii." 
Psalms26:4 Maton nanu te nebo iltung'ana torrok, nemashulare nanu isunkuro." 
Psalms26:5 Kaiba nanu encholiek o laasak loo ntorrok, nematon nanu te nebo ilarruok." 
Psalms26:6 Naa kaituku nkaik aainei ajo maata entioto, nalo aman olasar lino, iyie Olaitoriani," 
Psalms26:7 abuaku aranyita osinkolio le nashe, nalimu nkiaasin inono e nking'asia." 
Psalms26:8 Olaitoriani, kanyor nanu emanyisho e nkaji ino, o ewueji netii enkitoo ino." 
Psalms26:9 Mikioroo nanu aiwuang'ie te nebo laing'okok, teleku enkishui ai te lelo oota enkure o sarge" 
Psalms26:10 iltung'ana laa ore nkaik enye nebore osarge, ore nkaik enye oo ntateniaa nebore ntokitin e ropare." 
Psalms26:11 Kake ore nanu naa te supatisho ino alo; talakuaki nanu niking'urrie nanu. 
Psalms26:12 Eitashe nkejek aainei te wueji neitoriori; ore ti atua eumata kitok naisis nanu Olaitoriani. 
Psalms27:1 Olaitoriani ewang'an ai naa enjeunoto ai; kaing'ae nanu aure? Olaitoriani osempewuet le nkishui ai; kaing'ae naa aure? 
Psalms27:2 Te nepuonu ilarruok shumata nanu, aainos nkiri osesen lai, lelo mang'ati laainei o larak, nerrorro ninche nebatata." 
Psalms27:3 Ore ninye te naamuat olorora aaman nemeureishoyu oltau lai; te naadumakino ninye nanu enjore, ore ake etiu neijia naisiliga nanu Olaitoriani." 
Psalms27:4 Entoki nabo nanu atoomono Olaitoriani naa ninye nanu aing'oru; nchere pee abik nanu ti atua enkaji o Laitoriani, nkolong'i pooki e nkishui ai, pee aaing'or enkishiaa o Laitoriani, naikilikuanisho ti atua enkaji enye sinyati." 
Psalms27:5 Amu kaaitushur ninye nanu ti atua olng'obor lenye, te nkolong e nyamali; naaikenoo ninye nanu ti abori o lng'obor lenye, naailepie ninye nanu apik shumata endapidapoi." 
Psalms27:6 Naa keshumuni endukuya ai aailepie neitulusori te lelo mang'ati laainei laamanita, naa kalo nanu aishooyo ti atua olng'obor lenye, ilasarri te mbuakunoto o te ng'ida; naa karanyisho nanu narrep Olaitoriani." 
Psalms27:7 Toning'oki iyie Olaitoriani, te nabuaku nanu aishir, ing'urrieki nanu nikiwaliki nanu!" 
Psalms27:8 Itejo iyie, “Ing'oru iyie enkomom ai.” Nikijoki oltau lai iyie, “Enkomom ino, Olaitoriani, ninye nanu aing'oru.”" 
Psalms27:9 Mikisudorie nanu enkomom ino. Mirriny iyie osinka lino te ngoro, iyie apa otaa eretoto ai. Mikinturraa nanu, miking'uaa nanu, Na Ai e njeunoto ai!" 
Psalms27:10 Amu aatung'uaitie nanu papa o yieyio, kake kaadumu nanu Olaitoriani." 
Psalms27:11 Nteng'enaki nanu enkoitoi ino, iyie Olaitoriani; nikirikoo nanu te neserian, te nkaraki ilmang'ati laainei." 
Psalms27:12 Mikinchooyo nanu too lmang'ati laainei, amu aatudumakinote nanu ilchakenini le lejare, neipang'ipang ninche te ntorroni." 
Psalms27:13 Kairuk nanu ajo kadol esupatisho o Laitoriani, te ina kop oo looishu!" 
Psalms27:14 Taanyu Olaitoriani; ntagoluoyu, nintagol oltau lino, ee, taanyu Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms28:1 Iyie nanu aipoto Olaitoriani; endapidapoi ai, mikigirare nanu, amu ti nikigirare iyie nanu natiu anaa lelo oopuo aadoiki Engumoto." 
Psalms28:2 Toning'o oltoilo le sayiata ai, enkata naaishiraki nanu iyie te nkaraki eretoto, ina kata ailepie nanu nkaik aainei, aing'orie ewueji ino sinyati aisul." 
Psalms28:3 Mikiya iyie nanu te nebo larruok, te nebo lelo aasak loo ntorrok, ooiro eseriani te nebo lelo le latia enye, ore too ltauja lenye neeta entorroni." 
Psalms28:4 Ntalaa ninche te risioroto e siaai enye, o te risioroto oo nkiaasin e ntorroni enye, ntalaa ninche te risioroto e siaai oo nkaik enye, nchoo ninche olerrinyore oiririkino." 
Psalms28:5 Ore enkaraki meshilaa ninche isiaitin o Laitoriani, anaa esiaai oo nkaik enyena, kegil ninye ninche nemeigil ae kata ashetu ninche." 
Psalms28:6 Meisisi Olaitoriani, amu etoning'o ninye oltoilo le nkomono ai." 
Psalms28:7 Olaitoriani ninye engolon ai naa elong'o ai; ninye eisilig oltau lai; naataretuo ninye nanu, ore enkaraki ina neting'ide oltau lai, naa kaisho nanu ninye enashe to sinkolio lai." 
Psalms28:8 Olaitoriani ninye engolon oo ltung'ana lenyena, iyie enjeunoto nasaru ilo lenye otubukoki eilata aaput." 
Psalms28:9 Ntajeu iltung'ana linono, nimayian enjeunoto ino; laa iyie olchekut lenye ninap ninche ntarasi." 
Psalms29:1 Enchoo Olaitoriani enkisisa intae ntokitin pooki e shumata, enchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo o engolon." 
Psalms29:2 Enchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo e nkarna enye; enteserem Olaitoriani te nkishiaa e sinyatisho enye. 
Psalms29:3 Etii oltoilo lo Laitoriani shumata nkariak; etadara Enkai e nkitoo, Olaitoriani te shumata nkariak kumok." 
Psalms29:4 Kegol oltoilo lo Laitoriani, ebore oltoilo lo Laitoriani enkitoo." 
Psalms29:5 Egil oltoilo lo Laitoriani iltarakua egil Olaitoriani iltarakua le Lebanon. 
Psalms29:6 Keisho ninye Lebanon meipido anaa olashe, neipidie oldoinyo le Hormon anaa oloti oing'oni." 
Psalms29:7 Eeta oltoilo lo Laitoriani enkimerlel olng'ejep le nkima. 
Psalms29:8 Eikirikirie oltoilo lo Laitoriani olpurkel, eikirikirie Olaitoriani olpurkel le Kadesh." 
Psalms29:9 Oltoilo lo Laitoriani oibirunye ing'uesi, near entim aisiajayie, naa ti atua enkaji enye sinyati eishir pooki aajo, “Enkitoo!”" 
Psalms29:10 Etonita Olaitoriani to lorika lenya le nkitoo te shumata nkariak; etonita Olaitoriani to lorika le nkitoo aaku olaiguanani ntarasi. 
Psalms29:11 Meishoo Olaitoriani engolon iltung'ana lenyena! Metamayiana Olaitoriani kulo tung'ana lenyena aisho eseriani! 
Psalms30:1 Kaaisis nanu iyie, iyie Olaitoriani, amu kitudumua iyie nanu ailepunye, neitu ncho ilmang'ati laainei aang'idakino." 
Psalms30:2 Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ai, iyie nanu aishiraka pee kiretu, nikinchiunye iyie nanu." 
Psalms30:3 Olaitoriani, ilepunye iyie oltau lai aitupuku te nemeneng'a, nikirrinyoki nanu enkishui ti atua lelo ooshomo aadoiki Engumoto." 
Psalms30:4 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani enkisisa, intae isinyat lenyena, ninchosho enkisisa enkarna enye sinyati." 
Psalms30:5 Amu ore engoro enye naa enkata kiti, ore omom enye naa ene nkishui pooki. Eruko ilkiyio te nkewarie, kake ore tadekenya nelotu eng'ida." 
Psalms30:6 Ore nanu, atejo apa te nkitumurrunoto ai, “Maaiwuang'ieki ae kata nanu.”" 
Psalms30:7 Ore enkaraki nanoto nanu omom te iyie, Olaitoriani, nikintagolo iyie nanu anaa oldoinyo; kisudorie iyie nanu enkomom ino, natum osina." 
Psalms30:8 Iyie nanu Olaitoriani aishiraka, naa Olaitoriani ayaka enkomono ai;" 
Psalms30:9 “Kaa retoto eeta keeya ai, te nadoyio ajing Engumoto? Eikisis iyie enterit? Kelimu ninye esupatisho ino?" 
Psalms30:10 Toning'oki, Olaitoriani, niking'urrie nanu! Olaitoriani, taa iyie Olaretoni lai!”" 
Psalms30:11 Mbelekenya iyie enkishirata ai aitaa osinkolio le ng'ida; italaayie iyie ilkuniyiani laainei nikinchopoki nanu eng'ida," 
Psalms30:12 pee kitum oltau lai aisisa iyie nemegira. Olaitoriani Enkai ai, kaaisho nanu iyie enashe ntarasi." 
Psalms31:1 Ti atua iyie nanu Olaitoriani aing'oru esarunoto; mikincho iyie nanu maaitukurruni ae kata; ore te supatisho ino tokorduaki nanu! 
Psalms31:2 Irrugokoki nanu enkiok ino, tasaruaki nanu tasioki! Taa iyie endapidapoi nasaru nanu, osempewuet lajeunye nanu." 
Psalms31:3 Ee, ira iyie endapidapoi o sempewuet lai; ore te nkaraki enkarna ino torikoyioki nanu nikiutaa nanu," 
Psalms31:4 ntayioki nanu ti atua orreshet oisudoyioki te nkaraki nanu, amu ira iyie esarunoto ai." 
Psalms31:5 Nkaik inono nanu apik enkishui ai, kintajeuo iyie nanu Olaitoriani, na Ai oo sipat." 
Psalms31:6 Mba iyie lelo ooserem nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin, kake Olaitoriani nanu aisilig." 
Psalms31:7 Kang'ida nanu nashipa te nkaraki enyorrata ino nauno, amu itoduaa iyie osina lai, itoduaa iyie ilmang'ati laainei," 
Psalms31:8 neitu iyie kinchooyo nanu apik nkaik olmang'atinta; itipika iyie nkejek aainei ewueji nelala. 
Psalms31:9 Ing'urrieki nanu Olaitoriani amu atii atua osina; etimitari nkonyek aainei te nkaraki osina, o ltau lai o sesen lai sii." 
Psalms31:10 Amu eisha enkishui ai to sina, neishunye enkishui ai te nkishirata, eishunye engolon ai te nkaraki osina lai, netororonyate iloik laainei." 
Psalms31:11 Ataa nanu entoki nailapi too lmang'ati laainei, ataa enkitureisho too le latia ai, entoki naitureisho too lchoreta laainei; ore lelo laadol nanu te nkoitoi naaipirri aailany." 
Psalms31:12 Aiwuang'a nanu too ndamunot anaa oltung'ani otua; atotiuo nanu anaa entoki natebele. 
Psalms31:13 Ee, aning'ito nanu enking'oming'om oo lkumok - etii enkuretisho pooki shoto - aaiguanare ninche nanu pee eitayu enkishui ai." 
Psalms31:14 Kake iyie nanu aisiliga, Olaitoriani, atejo nanu, “Ira iyie Enkai ai.”" 
Psalms31:15 Etii nkatitin aainei nkaik inono, tokorduaki nanu too nkaik oo lmang'ati laainei o lelo laaisilisil nanu!" 
Psalms31:16 Nchoo enkomom ino meitawang'aki osinka lino; ntajeuoki iyie nanu te ina nyorrata ino nauno! 
Psalms31:17 Mikincho nanu aaitukurruni, amu iyie Olaitoriani nanu aipoto; nchoo ilo arruoni meitukurruni, nchoo ninche edoyio aapuo enemenenga." 
Psalms31:18 Nchoo nena kutukie e lejare metunukata, amu ninche naairo te ntorroni tialo ilo asipani, to lwuasa o te ng'ogong'i." 
Psalms31:19 Oi kebaa esapuko e supatisho ino, nirragakinye lelo likiure iyie, nintaas iyie lelo likipuonu aasaru, te dukuya nkera e tung'ana!" 
Psalms31:20 Naa eisudoo iyie ninche te seriani e ine nitii, intaserian iyie ninche tiabori olchurie lino, te nkaraki nena kirorot torrok." 
Psalms31:21 Meisisi Olaitoriani, amu eitodolua ninye te nking'asia ina nyorrata enye nauno ti alo nanu, ina kata apa pee aaibung'i anaa enkanasa natang'aduaki aaman." 
Psalms31:22 Atejo nanu to lkirutoto lai, “Aaterewaki nanu aaitalamaa too nkonyek inono.” Kake itoning'o iyie esayiata ai, ina kata pee aaishiraki nanu te nkaraki eretoto." 
Psalms31:23 Entonyor Olaitoriani intae isinyat lenyena! Kegolie Olaitoriani lelo ooisiligayu, kake kelaaki te nkumoi lelo oas to lwuasa." 
Psalms31:24 Entagoluoto niminchosho iltauja linyi epalari, intae pooki oanyu Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms32:1 Emayiana ilo otapalakaki ing'ok enyena, ilo oimulumulayioki ing'ok enyena." 
Psalms32:2 Emayiana ilo lemeikenaki Olaitoriani entorroni, laa ore atua enkishui enye metii elejare." 
Psalms32:3 Te neitu nanu alimu eng'oki ai aibalunye, neibiitiari osesen lai te nkaraki enkishirata ai e mion endama pooki." 
Psalms32:4 Amu ore te ndama o te nkewarie naa keiroishi enkaina ino te nanu; netoyu engolon ai anaa enainosa enkolong te nkata e nkirowuaj. 
Psalms32:5 Aaibalakinyie nanu iyie eng'oki ai te iyie neitu nanu aisudoo entorroni ai; atejo nanu, “Kairridu nkitarruorot aainei to Laitoriani;” nikitapalaka iyie esuujisho e ng'oki ai." 
Psalms32:6 Ore enkaraki ina, nchoo pooki ng'ae lo rrekie le Nkai, kiomon iyie. Ore te nkata o sina, o enang'unoto oo nkariak kituaak, nemebaiki ninye." 
Psalms32:7 Ira iyie ewueji enkisudoroto te nanu, eikigolie iyie nanu te ng'olikinoto nikintaman nanu enkordunoto." 
Psalms32:8 Kaaitaarriyian nanu iyie naaiteng'en enkoitoi niim. Kaaiguan nanu iyie etii nkonyek aainei shumata iyie. 
Psalms32:9 Mitiu iyie anaa embarta anaa enyumpu nemeeta ndamunot e ning'unoto, naa keeni te nkeene nepiki olgisoi pee eitoborri, naa te nemeikoni neijia nimikirukorukore ninye iyie." 
Psalms32:10 Eikumok nkitamiot naatum lelo torrok kake ore enyorrata nauno nemanita ilo oisilig Olaitoriani. 
Psalms32:11 Enting'idata ti atua Olaitoriani, nishipapa intae lelo supati, nibuakuku te ng'ida, intae pooki lelo sidain iltauja!" 
Psalms33:1 Enting'idata ti atua Olaitoriani, intae lelo supati! Eishiaakino enkisisa lelo sidain ltauja." 
Psalms33:2 Esisa Olaitoriani to lwulul loo usin enterrep ninye to lkerempe te nkawuo oo sinkolioitin naata iusin tomon! 
Psalms33:3 Entaranyaki ninye osinkolio ng'ejuk, entoosh iusin enkinanta te nkarriyiano, too mbuakunot kituaak." 
Psalms33:4 Amu keitoriori ororei lo laitoriani; ore siaitin enyena pooki neasi te nkitoriori. 
Psalms33:5 Kenyor ninye esupatisho o esipata; ebore enkop pooki enyorrata nauno o Laitoriani. 
Psalms33:6 Ore to rorei lo Laitoriani neitobiruaki apa keper, o lorora lenye pooki te nkiyang'et e nkutuk enye." 
Psalms33:7 Neiturrur ninye nkariak e naiposha anaa enkare natii atua oltulet; nepik ninye enguton atua ilaleta oo shumishoreki. 
Psalms33:8 Nchoo enkop pooki eureyu Olaitoriani, nchoo lelo pooki oomanya enkop meitasho te nkanyit te dukuya ninye!" 
Psalms33:9 Amu eiroro apa ninye, netabayie ina natejo; neitanapishe ninye, netuune ina." 
Psalms33:10 Eitaa Olaitoriani nkiguanat oo loshon pesho; neitukurru ninye nkitobirat oo loreren. 
Psalms33:11 Ore enkiguana o Laitoriani neitashe ntarasi, ore ndamunot o ltau lenye nebaiki iishoritin pooki." 
Psalms33:12 Emayiana ilo osho laa Enkai Olaitoriani lenye, ilo orere otegelua ninye aitaa enjung'ore enye!" 
Psalms33:13 Eing'or Olaitoriani kop etii keper, nedol ninye nkera e tung'ana;" 
Psalms33:14 ore etii ninye ine wueji e nkitoo neing'orisho, neing'or lelo pooki oomanya enkop," 
Psalms33:15 ninye ilo oitobirua iltauja lenye pooki, nejurru nkiaasin enye pooki." 
Psalms33:16 Meitajeuni olaiguanani te nkaraki enjore enye kitok; mejeu olmurrani te nkaraki engolon enye kitok. 
Psalms33:17 Pesho osiligi le mbarta o larrabal te nkisulata, ore te ngolon enye kitok nemeitajeusho." 
Psalms33:18 Ng'ura, etii enkong'u o Laitoriani shumata lelo ooure ninye, shumata lelo ooisilig enyorrata enye nauno," 
Psalms33:19 naa keidim ninye atokordu enkishui enye te keeya, nemeisho ninche eye te nkata o lameyu." 
Psalms33:20 Olaitoriani eanyu enkishui ai; ninye eretoto ang naa elong'o. 
Psalms33:21 Ee, keng'ida enkishui ang ti atua ninye, enkaraki nikisiliga iyiook enkarna enye sinyati." 
Psalms33:22 Nchoo ina nyorrata ino nauno, Olaitoriani, meeu shumata iyiook, anaa enikisilig iyiook iyie." 
Psalms34:1 Kaisis nanu Olaitoriani nkatitin pooki; etii enkisisa enye enkutuk ai anaake. 
Psalms34:2 Olaitoriani ninye eng'idare oltau lai, nchoo ilo oata osina ening neng'ida." 
Psalms34:3 Embalunye enkitoo o Laitoriani te nebo nanu, nikirrep enkarna enye te nebo!" 
Psalms34:4 Aing'orua nanu Olaitoriani naawaliki ninye, naakordu ninye nanu te nkuretisho ai pooki." 
Psalms34:5 Eng'ura ninye pee iwang'ung'u; nemeitoki ae kata enkurruna atii nkomomi inyi. 
Psalms34:6 Eishira ele tung'ani aisinani, nening Olaitoriani ninye, neitajeu Olaitoriani ninye aitung'uaa ingolikinot enyena pooki." 
Psalms34:7 Keman olmalaika le Nkai aitushur lelo pooki ooure ninye, nekordu ninche." 
Psalms34:8 Wootu enchamishama pee idolidolo aajo eisupat Olaitoriani! Emayiana ilo tung'ani osaru ninye! 
Psalms34:9 Entureita Olaitoriani intae isinyat lenyena, amu ore lelo ooure ninye nemeng'oriki toki!" 
Psalms34:10 Keng'oriki nkiyioitin olng'atuny netum esumash, kake ore lelo ooing'oru Olaitoriani nemelau ntokitin sidain." 
Psalms34:11 Wootu, na kera, entoning'oki nanu, kaiteng'en nanu intae euriata o Laitoriani." 
Psalms34:12 Kalo tung'ani te kuldo oyieu enkishui, neng'uar nkolong'i kumok pee etum atishipakinoyu isupati?" 
Psalms34:13 Ntalama olng'ejep lino entorroni, nimincho enkutuk ino eiro elejare." 
Psalms34:14 Talama entorroni nias isupati, ing'oru eseriani, nisuj ninye." 
Psalms34:15 Eing'orita nkonyek o Laitoriani lelo supati, neinining'ito nkiyiaa enyena enkishirata enye." 
Psalms34:16 Keiba enkomom o Laitoriani lelo oas ntorrok, neiwuang'ie ninche meitokini aadamu te nkop." 
Psalms34:17 Te neishir oltung'ani supat te nkaraki eretoto, nening Olaitoriani, nekordu ninye ninche aitayu ti atua enyamali enye pooki." 
Psalms34:18 Ketaaniki Olaitoriani lelo ootigilate ltauja, neitajeu ninye lelo ooisha osiligi." 
Psalms34:19 Eikumok isinaitin le ilo supat, kake kekordu Olaitoriani ninye aitung'uaa te pooki." 
Psalms34:20 Negolie iloik lenyena pooki; meisho ninye metigilayu obo. 
Psalms34:21 Kear entorroni ilo arruoni; ore lelo ooiba o supat nedung'okini enkiguana. 
Psalms34:22 Kekordu Olaitoriani enkishui oo sinkan lenyena, meetae obo le lelo oosaru ninye otum oldeket." 
Psalms35:1 Olaitoriani tigilunore, lelo laagilunore nanu; taarare lelo laarare nanu!" 
Psalms35:2 Tudumu elong'o ino o emasaai ino o larrabal, taretuoki nanu!" 
Psalms35:3 Ntayu empere ino taarare lelo laasujita! Tiaaki oltau lai, “Ara nanu ilo likikordu!”" 
Psalms35:4 Nchoo meitukurruni neitadouni lelo ooing'oru enkishui ai! Nchoo meibelekenyata ninche nekurru lelo ooiguanu entorroni te nkaraki nanu! 
Psalms35:5 Ntotiwuo ninche anaa suut naakutita osiwuo, ereuta olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninche!" 
Psalms35:6 Nchoo emisimisu enkoitoi enye neideketu, esujita olmalaika lo Laitoriani ninche!" 
Psalms35:7 Amu ore metii emporeet neisudoo ninche irresheta lenye te nkaraki nanu; ore metii emporeet netuturo ninche engumoto te nkaraki enkishui ai. 
Psalms35:8 Nchoo ninche metaluama enkidaata! Naa nchoo ilo rreshet oisudoitie ninche meibung'a ninche; nchoo ninche metadoiki enkidaata! 
Psalms35:9 Keng'idakino oltau lai Olaitoriani, neshipakino enjeunoto enye." 
Psalms35:10 Nejo iloik laainei pooki, “Iyie Olaitoriani, kaing'ae likinyaanyukie, iyie okordu ilo omena aitajeu aitung'uaa ilo ogol oleng alang ninye, nintajeu ilo oshal naa aisinani aitung'uaa ilo oitorogony ninye?”" 
Psalms35:11 Etudumunye ilchakenini le lejare; naaikilikuan ninche mbaa nemayiolo nanu. 
Psalms35:12 Naalaaki ninche ntorrok too supati naitaasa ninche, etalepori oltau lai." 
Psalms35:13 Kake ore nanu, enkata namuei ninche - naishop ilkuniyiani, naitame kewan te enata e mpukoroto naomon nanu eirruge elukunya ai abaiki olgoo" 
Psalms35:14 natiu anaa oltung'ani oishiraki olchore anaa olalashe; namanimanaa anaa oltung'ani oishiraki ng'otonye, nairrugo te nkishirata o sina." 
Psalms35:15 Kake ore te rrorroto ai neiturrurro ninche aashipa, naaiturrurrokino aagilunore ilmaiman lemayiolo, naasukeny ninche metii enkiyagata;" 
Psalms35:16 neinosisho ninche too nkala pee etum aatakuenia too siruai, neony ninche ilala lenye te nkaraki nanu." 
Psalms35:17 Kenkata nabaa Olaitoriani iton iyie aing'or? Tokorduaki nanu te rasakinoto enye, tokordu enkishui ai te lelo ng'atunyo!" 
Psalms35:18 Naa kaaisho nanu iyie enashe ti atua eumata kitok; ore ti atua olorora kitok naaisis iyie. 
Psalms35:19 Mincho lelo mang'ati laainei eng'ida te nkaraki nanu, nimincho lelo ooimul nkonyek laaiba nanu pesho." 
Psalms35:20 Amu meiro ninche ine seriani, kake lelo oobor te nkop egilunore neipiru ninche irorei le lejare." 
Psalms35:21 Naaboloki ninche nkutukie enye aagilunore; nejo ninche, “Aha, Aha! Etoduaa nkonyek ang!”" 
Psalms35:22 Olaitoriani, itoduaa iyie, migira! Olaitoriani, mikilam iyie nanu!" 
Psalms35:23 Tuputunye, tudumunye te nkaraki esipata ai, te nkaraki ewalata ai, Enkai ai naa Olaitoriani lai!" 
Psalms35:24 Nguanareki nanu, Olaitoriani, Enkai ai, te risioroto e supatisho ino; nimincho ninche eng'ida te nkaraki nanu!" 
Psalms35:25 Mincho ninche ejokino maate, “Aha, kinoto iyiook eyieunoto oo ltauja lang!” Mincho ninche ejo, “Kitoijoitie iyiook ninye.”" 
Psalms35:26 Nchoo ninche meitukurruni nepiki olmilo te nebo, lelo oong'ida te nkaraki enyamali ai! Nchoo ninche meishopokini enkurruna o esulare lelo oojukaa ate laaitainore!" 
Psalms35:27 Nchoo lelo oong'uar esupatisho ai metabuaku te ng'ida, neshipa, nejo ntarasi moitie, “Eikitok Olaitoriani, neshipakino ninye eseriani o sinka lenye!”" 
Psalms35:28 Netum taa olng'ejep lai atolimu esupatisho ino o enkisisa ino endama pooki. 
Psalms36:1 Ore enkarruoisho neiro ti atua ilo arruoni, te nguton o ltau lenye; metii euriata e Nkai dukuya nkonyek enyena." 
Psalms36:2 Amu keikoroj ninye kewan nchere meyiolouni entorroni enye neibayuni. 
Psalms36:3 Ore rorei le nkutuk enye naa ntorrok o lejare; meekure ninye easisho te ng'eno neas isupati. 
Psalms36:4 Ntorrok edamu ninye te ndapash enye; nepik ninye kewan enkoitoi neme sidai; nemeiturraa entorroni. 
Psalms36:5 Ore ina nyorrata ino nauno, Olaitoriani, nelo abaiki shumata, ore esupatisho ino nelo abaiki nkatampo." 
Psalms36:6 Etiu esupatisho ino anaa ildoinyo le Nkai, eikununo nkiguanat inono anaa enguton kitok; Olaitoriani, iyie oitajeu oltung'ani o eng'ues." 
Psalms36:7 Kebaa esidano e nyorrata ino nauno, iyie Enkai! Oloip loo naipuko inono esaru nkera e tung'ana." 
Psalms36:8 Nedaa ninche te nena naabore enkaji ino, nincho iyie ninche entoki naok te ilo keju lino le ng'ida." 
Psalms36:9 Amu iyie etii enkong'u e nkishui; te wang'an ino iyiook kidol ewang'an. 
Psalms36:10 Nchoo ebikoo ina nyorrata ino nauno te lelo likiyiolo iyie, nebikoo enjeunoto ino te lelo loo ltauja sidain!" 
Psalms36:11 Mincho enkeju e lelo oowuasa meeu shumata nanu, nimincho enkaina e ilo torrono aarrumoo nanu." 
Psalms36:12 Eirrabalakinote lelo arruok e nkop, etanang'ieki enkop nemeigil aadumunye." 
Psalms37:1 Ming'aing'ai te nkaraki ilo torrono, niming'uar lelo aasak loo ntorrok." 
Psalms37:2 Amu kesioki ninche aaishunye anaa nkujit, netiu anaa mbenek naatoito." 
Psalms37:3 Isiliga Olaitoriani nias esidai; pee itum atobiko tena kop, nitum eseriani." 
Psalms37:4 Tishipakinoyu Olaitoriani, naa aikincho ninye iyieunot o ltau lino." 
Psalms37:5 Tipika nkoitoi inono Olaitoriani; isiliga ninye, amu eikintaas ninye." 
Psalms37:6 Amu keibalunye ninye esipata ino anaa ewang'an, o enchunet ino aitotiu anaa dama." 
Psalms37:7 Ntirring'ayu te dukuya Olaitoriani, nianyu ninye te ng'iriata; ming'aing'ai te nkaraki ilo odupoyu te nkoitoi enye, te nkaraki ilo tung'ani olo too nkoitoi enyena oo nkitobirat torrok!" 
Psalms37:8 Talama engoro ninturraa eserserisho! Mintanyamal kewan, amu entorroni ake eyau ina." 
Psalms37:9 Amu ore ilo torrono naa kedung'ori; ore lelo oanyu Olaitoriani naa kejung ina kop. 
Psalms37:10 Kake ore te nkiti rishata, nemeitoki ilo torrono atii; ore ninye te ning'oru oleng te wueji enye, metii ninye ine." 
Psalms37:11 Kake ilo obor olo ajung enkop, neshipakino ninche ina kumoi e dupoto." 
Psalms37:12 Kepik ilo torrono orreshet ilo supat, neony ilala te nkaraki ninye;" 
Psalms37:13 kake kekueniye Olaitoriani te nkaraki ilo torrono, amu edolita ninye nchere kelotu enkolong enye." 
Psalms37:14 Etushututua ilarruok ilalema lenye neyietu nkai enye, pee ear metuata lelo aisinak oomena;" 
Psalms37:15 kejing ilalema lenye atua iltuaja lenye maate, ore nkai enye naa kegila." 
Psalms37:16 Eikash enkiti toki naata oltung'ani supat alang nkumok o ltung'ani torrono. 
Psalms37:17 Amu kegili nkaik e ilo torrono; kake egolie Olaitoriani ilo supat. 
Psalms37:18 Eyiolo Olaitoriani nkolong'i e ilo lemeeta entioto; ore enjung'ore enye nebikoo ntarasi; 
Psalms37:19 meitukurruni ninche too nkatitin e ntorroni, ore too nkatitin o lameyu neeta ninche enkiputakinoto." 
Psalms37:20 Kake keidak ilo torrono; ore lelo mang'ati lo Laitoriani neikununo anaa olari loo nkujit, keish ninche - ore anaa empuruo keishari ninche." 
Psalms37:21 Keisilenisho oltung'ani torrono, nemelak ninye esile, kake keleng ilo supat neishooyo;" 
Psalms37:22 amu ore lelo ootamayiana Olaitoriani naa kejung enkop, ore lelo ootediaa ninye naa keiwuang'ieki." 
Psalms37:23 Olaitoriani eing'uaa iroruat e tung'ana naa keitubul ilo oitiship enkoitoi enye; 
Psalms37:24 ore ninye te nebatata nemepetikino enkop amu Olaitoriani oibung enkaina enye. 
Psalms37:25 Ara apa nanu oti, nara taata moruo; ore ake eyia, eitu nanu adol oltung'ani supat eiturrayioki anaa eomonu nkera enyena endaa." 
Psalms37:26 Keeta ninye olng'ur anaake neishooyo te sile, ore nkera enyena neaku emayianata." 
Psalms37:27 Talama entorroni, nias esidai; pee itum atobikoi ntarasi." 
Psalms37:28 Amu kenyor Olaitoriani esupatisho; meiturraa ninye lelo sinyat lenyena. Kegolieki ilo supat ntarasi, kake ore nkera e ilo torrono naa keiwuang'ieki." 
Psalms37:29 Ilo supat olo ajung enkop, nemany ina kop ntarasi." 
Psalms37:30 Ore enkutuk e ilo supat neiro ine ng'eno, neiro olng'ejep lenye isipat." 
Psalms37:31 Netii enkitanapata e Nkai enye atua oltau lenye; nemeideketari too roruat enyena. 
Psalms37:32 Ore ilo torrono nejurru ilo supat, neing'oru eneiko pee ear ninye metua." 
Psalms37:33 Mepalaa Olaitoriani aisho meshomo ajing engolon enye, aashu eisho metudung'oki ninye enkiguana te neyauni aaiguanare." 
Psalms37:34 Taanyu Olaitoriani nimbung nkoitoi enyena, amu eikincho ninye esipata nilo ajungie enkop; naa ilo iyie aing'or enkidaata e ilo torrono." 
Psalms37:35 Atoduaa nanu oltung'ani torrono te ntorroni enye, nebul netiu ninye anaa oltarakuai le Lebanon." 
Psalms37:36 Najo nanu agiroo, ng'ura meekure etii; ore hoo natejo nanu aing'oru, meekure etumi." 
Psalms37:37 Tisipu tujurru ilo tung'ani supat, ning'or ilo oitoriori nkoitoi enyena, amu ore enkiting'oto e ilo tung'ani naa eseriani." 
Psalms37:38 Kake ore lelo agilak loo nkitanapat naa keidaikieki pooki te nebo; ore ilnganayio le ilo torrono naa kedung'ori. 
Psalms37:39 Ore enjeunoto e ilo supat naa Olaitoriani eing'uaa; ninye esarunoto enye te nkata e engolikinoto. 
Psalms37:40 Olaitoriani oretu ninche nekordu ninche; nekordu ninche te ilo torrono, neitajeu ninche; enkaraki natasarutua ninche ninye." 
Psalms38:1 Iyie Olaitoriani, mikisikong nanu te ngoro ino, nimikintame nanu te mpijan e ngoro ino!" 
Psalms38:2 Amu aaibitakinote nanu mbaa inono, naatadoikio nanu enkaina ino." 
Psalms38:3 Metii embiotisho atua osesen lai, te nkaraki engoro ino; metii embiotisho iloik laainei te nkaraki eng'oki ai." 
Psalms38:4 Amu eshomo ntorrok aainei aalus te ndukuya ai; olola oiroishi oleng ninche te nanu. 
Psalms38:5 Eirrokirrok ilbaa laainei netong'ueita aasioki, te nkaraki emodai ai," 
Psalms38:6 airruge nanu oleng abaiki enkop; nalo nanu aishirita endama pooki. 
Psalms38:7 Amu eiputa empolos ai emion, nemetii embiotisho osesen lai." 
Psalms38:8 Aidaayie nanu natarrarre, nayietu aishir te nkaraki emion o ltau lai." 
Psalms38:9 Olaitoriani, iyiolo iyie eyieunoto ai pooki, nemeisudoro emion ai te dukuya iyie." 
Psalms38:10 Keitiko oltau lai, neishunye engolon ai; ore ewang'an oo nkonyek aainei - neishunye sii te nanu." 
Psalms38:11 Ore ilchoreta laainei o encholuek ai, naaitashe aalam to lmeitai lai, ore iltung'ana lang le mudung neitashe te nelakua." 
Psalms38:12 Ore lelo ooing'oru enkishui ai neirragie aaitolok irresheta lenye, ore lelo ooing'oru enkitamioto ai neiro ine nkidaata, neibirribir ninche elejare endama pooki." 
Psalms38:13 Kake atiu nanu anaa oltung'ani ming'ani, maning'isho nanu, atiu anaa oltung'ani otoonye olng'ejep lemeidim airoro." 
Psalms38:14 Ee, aikununo nanu anaa oltung'ani ming'ani lemetii enkutuk enye ilomon torrok." 
Psalms38:15 Amu iyie Olaitoriani nanu aanyita; iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ai likiwaliki. 
Psalms38:16 Amu aatoomono, “Mincho ninche meting'idata te nkaraki nanu, lelo ooitokoos ti atua nanu te neideketari enkeju ai!”" 
Psalms38:17 Amu etaa nanu kabatata, neton ake aata emion ai." 
Psalms38:18 Aibalunye nanu entorroni, aainosua nanu eng'oki ai." 
Psalms38:19 Ore lelo mang'ati laaiba nanu metii emporeet, naa eimagil, naa ilkumok laaiba nanu too mbaa nemesipa." 
Psalms38:20 Ore lelo laalaaki nanu too ntorrok aitaasa nanu ninche isupati, naa ilmang'ati laainei te nkaraki nasujita isupati." 
Psalms38:21 Miking'uaa nanu iyie Olaitoriani! Iyie Na Ai, mikilam nanu!" 
Psalms38:22 Taretuoki nanu tasioki, iyie Olaitoriani, enjeunoto ai!" 
Psalms39:1 Atejo nanu, “Kagolie nkoitoi aainei, pee maas eng'oki to lng'ejep lai; kaen nanu enkutuk ai, enkata naba anaa enatii iltorrok ewueji natii nanu.”" 
Psalms39:2 Atunuke nanu agira, naitirring'a nanu eitu ajo ae, neponari emion ai," 
Psalms39:3 neirowuaju oltau lai ti atua nanu. Ore anaa enadamisho, neyupuyup enkima; nairo nanu to lng'ejep lai:" 
Psalms39:4 “Olaitoriani, ntayioloki nanu enkiting'oto ai, o eneikununo enkikenata oo nkolong'i aainei; ntayioloki nanu enkisarrisar e nkishui ai!" 
Psalms39:5 Ng'ura, ntaba iyie nkolong'i aainei anaa nkuti temat e ndap e nkaina, ore nkolong'i e nkishui ai naa pesho too nkonyek inono. Esipa keitashe pooki tung'ani aa enkijape ake!" 
Psalms39:6 Esipa, kemanimanaa oltung'ani aa oloip ake! Esipa, enepesho ake enkuretisho enye; eiturrurrisho tung'ani nemeyiolo ololo asotu!" 
Psalms39:7 Naa amaa, taata, Olaitoriani, Kainyoo nanu aanyu? Atua iyie etii osiligi lai." 
Psalms39:8 Tokorduaki nanu matung'uai nkitarruorot aainei pooki. Mikintaa nanu olorojareki te lelo oomoda! 
Psalms39:9 Atigire nanu, mabol enkutuk ai; amu iyie otaasa ina." 
Psalms39:10 Iwuang'ie eoshoto ino te nanu; aisha nanu te oshoto e nkaina ino. 
Psalms39:11 Ti nintame iyie oltung'ani te nkisikong'ata oo ng'ok, nintotiu anaa entoki nainosa oriri ina kirotet te ninye; esipa ore pooki tung'ani naa enkiyang'et ake!" 
Psalms39:12 Toning'o enkomono ai, Olaitoriani, nining olkiyioi lai migirare ilkiyio laainei! Amu ara nanu olomoni lino olo, nara olalotoni anaa loo papa pooki." 
Psalms39:13 Miking'ode nanu, pee atum atayiolo enchipai, eton eitu alo nemaitoki atii.”" 
Psalms40:1 Ataanyua nanu Olaitoriani te ngiriata; naairrugokino ninye nening enkomono ai. 
Psalms40:2 Aaitayio ninye nanu ti atua engumoto e ntorroni, ti atua oloonyionyi le sarng'ab, neitasheyie nkejek aainei te nchumata e ndapidapoi, neitaserian nkejek aainei." 
Psalms40:3 Nepik osinkolio ng'ejuk enkutuk ai, osinkolio le nkisisa te Nkai ang. Kepuo ilkumok aadol neureishoyu, nepik osiligi lenye Olaitoriani." 
Psalms40:4 Emayiana oltung'ani oitaa Olaitoriani osiligi lenye, ilo tung'ani lemeibelekenyakino lelo oowuasa, alo enetii lelo oopong'ori esujaa nkaitin oo nkitanyaanyukot!" 
Psalms40:5 Itoponayie iyie, Olaitoriani Enkai ai, nkiaasin inono e nking'asia o ndamunot inono ti alo iyiook; meetae olikinyaanyukie iyie! Tenaa napaji kaibalunye alimu ninche, naa eikumok oleng meikenayu." 
Psalms40:6 Ming'uar iyie ilasarri o nkishorot; kake kinchoo iyie enkiok naning'isho Ore lasarri oopejori o lasar loo ng'ok eitu iyie ing'uar. 
Psalms40:7 Najo nanu, “Ng'ura aeuo; ore to lpiyayati le mbuku nesira inaaipirare nanu:" 
Psalms40:8 Kang'ida nanu aas eyieunoto ino, Na Ai; etii enkitanapata ino atua oltau lai.”" 
Psalms40:9 Atolikioyie nanu ilomon supati le nkordunoto ti atua eumata sapuk; ng'ura, eitu nanu agira, anaa eniyiolo iyie, Olaitoriani." 
Psalms40:10 Eitu nanu aisudoo ina retoto ino naitajeusho ti atua oltau lai, atolimuo nanu esupatisho ino o enjeunoto ino; eitu nanu anuk ina nyorrata ino nauno o esupatisho ino, aaibalakinyie nanu te umata sapuk." 
Psalms40:11 Mimbooyo iyie Olaitoriani olng'ur lino ti alo nanu, nchoo ina nyorrata ino nauno o esupatisho ino aagolie nanu anaake!" 
Psalms40:12 Amu aatamuata nanu ntorrok nemeikenayu; aaidimutua nanu ntorrok aainei, o metaba anaa neaku meekure aidim atodolisho; eikumok ntorrok aainei aalang ilpapit te ndukuya ai, netalepori oltau lai." 
Psalms40:13 Tonyorrai, Olaitoriani, tokorduaki nanu! Olaitoriani, taretuoki nanu tasioki!" 
Psalms40:14 Nchoo ninche meitukurruni nipik olmilo te nebo, lelo ooing'oru pee eiwuang'ie enkishui ai; nchoo ninche meibelekenyi neitadouni lelo ooing'oru pee aainyal!" 
Psalms40:15 Nchoo meirriang'ieki ninche te nkaraki enkurruna enye, lelo laajoki nanu, “Aha, Aha.”" 
Psalms40:16 Kake ore lelo pooki liking'oru iyie nchoo eng'idayu neshipa ti atua iyie; nchoo lelo pooki oonyor enjeunoto ino emooki aajo, “Eikitok Olaitoriani!”" 
Psalms40:17 Ore nanu, kara aisinani namena, kake Olaitoriani laagolie. Ira iyie eretoto ai olakordunoni lai; mimutie iyie, na Ai ai!" 
Psalms41:1 Emayiana ilo oiken olaisinani! Kekordu Olaitoriani ninye te nkolong e nyamali; 
Psalms41:2 kemitu Olaitoriani ninye neitopok; keji olomayiana te nkop; minchooyo iyie ninye apik eyieunoto oo lmang'ati lenyena. 
Psalms41:3 Keitagol Olaitoriani ninye te ndapash enye; ore te muoyian enye ninchiunye iyie pooki leyiata. 
Psalms41:4 Ore ti alo nanu, atejo, “Olaitoriani, ing'urrieki nanu; nchiunyeki nanu, amu ataasa nanu eng'oki ti alo iyie!”" 
Psalms41:5 Eiro ilmang'ati laainei entorroni tialo nanu, ejo, “Kanu kenya eye ninye, pee eish enkarna enye!”" 
Psalms41:6 Naa te naalotu oltung'ani aduaare neiro ninye irorei le pesho, nesot ntorrok to ltau lenye; ore pee eipang alo neidapashaki enkop pooki." 
Psalms41:7 Ore lelo pooki laaiba nanu neing'oming'om te nebo aaimaki nanu; nemusu ninche ntorrok ti alo nanu. 
Psalms41:8 Nejo ninche, “Etijing'a ninye entaboi; meekure ae kata edumunye te ine neirragie.”" 
Psalms41:9 Ore ninye olchore lai lo ltau apa laisiliga nanu, oshi ooinos endaa ai, naatudumakine ninye nanu." 
Psalms41:10 Kake ing'urrieki iyie, Olaitoriani, tudumuaki nanu, pee atum aitalaku elap te ninye!" 
Psalms41:11 Tena nanu ayiolou nchere, eikishipakino iyie nanu, nchere eitu eisulu olmang'atinta lai te nanu." 
Psalms41:12 Kimbung'a iyie nanu te nkaraki naas isupati, nikipik nanu dukuya ino ntarasi." 
Psalms41:13 Meisisi Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ntarasi o ntarasi! Esai o Esai." 
Psalms42:1 Ore anaa enayieu enkoilii enkare naruko neijia etiu oltau lai, kiyieu iyie, Enkai."
