Psalms42:2 Eeta oltau lai enkure te nkaraki Enkai, Enkai naishu. Kanu kenya alotu aing'or enkomom e Nkai?" 
Psalms42:3 Etaa ilkiyio laainei ninche endaa ai dama o kewarie, aajoki nanu iltung'ana anaake, “Koree Enkai ino?”" 
Psalms42:4 Te nadamu nanu kuna baa nelepori oltau lai ti atua nanu, amu ashomo nanu arikoo olorora nikipuo e nkaji e Nkai, too mbuakunot e nchipai o sinkolioitin le nashe, neitobir ilo orora osirua." 
Psalms42:5 Kainyoo pee itapalari iyie, lo tau lai, naa kainyoo pee itanyamala iyie ti atua nanu? Isiliga Enkai; amu kaitoki ake aisis ninye, ninye eretoto ai naa Enkai ai." 
Psalms42:6 Etalepori oltau lai ti atua nanu, ore enkaraki ina kaadamu nanu iyie, ebaiki enkop e Yordan o ene Hermon, ebaiki oldoinyo le Misar." 
Psalms42:7 Eishiraka enguton e nguton te mbuakunoto oo nkariak inono; ore ndoorot oo nkariak o lopir le nkare naaitemoitie nanu. 
Psalms42:8 Ore tendama neitanap Olaitoriani enyorrata enye nauno, ore te nkewarie netii osinkolio lenye te nebo nanu, enkomono e Nkai e nkishui ai." 
Psalms42:9 Atiaaka nanu Enkai, endapidapoi ai, “Kainyoo pee mikidamu nanu? Kainyoo nanu pee alo aishirita, te nkaraki enkitorogonyata naaitorogony olmang'atinta?”" 
Psalms42:10 Etotiutuo anaa ilbaa torrok to sesen lai, imorot oo lmang'ati laainei, aajoki ninche anaake, “Koree e Nkai ino?”" 
Psalms42:11 Kainyoo iyie pee itapalari, lo tau lai, naa kainyoo iyie pee itigire ti atua nanu? Isiliga Enkai, amu kaitoki ake aisis ninye, eretoto ai naa Enkai ai." 
Psalms43:1 Mbalie na Ai nchere maata entorroni nikimitu nanu. Ttokorduaki nanu too lalejak o te lelo lemeitoriori! 
Psalms43:2 Amu ira iyie Enkai naa ninye nanu asaru; Kainyoo iyie pee kinturrayie nanu? Kainyoo nanu pee alo aishirita, te nkaraki enkitorogonyata o lmang'atinta lai?" 
Psalms43:3 Oi irriu ewang'an ino o esipata ino; nchoo ninche maatorikoi nanu, nchoo ninche maatoriku nanu ilo doinyo lino sinyati o emanyisho ino!" 
Psalms43:4 Pee atum nanu ashomo olperere lo lasar le Nkai, alo enetii Enkai naa ninye eng'ida ai nadooyo; naa kaalo nanu arrep iyie te nkinanta na Ai, Enkai ai." 
Psalms43:5 Kainyoo iyie pee itapalari lo tau lai, naa kainyoo iyie pee itanyamala ti atua nanu? Isiliga Enkai, amu kaitoki ake aisis ninye, eretoto ai naa Enkai ai." 
Psalms44:1 Kitoning'o iyiook too nkiyiaa ang, iyie Enkai, etolikitio iyiook iloo papa, nena kiaasin apa nitaasa iyie too nkolong'i enye, apa moitie:" 
Psalms44:2 iyie makewan oturrumoyie iloshon te nkaina ino, kake ntubula olorere lino; nipik iloreren osina, kake nchoo olorere lino etoni te seriani;" 
Psalms44:3 amu mme to lalem lenye apa eisulie ninche ena kop, neme enkaina enye maate naishoo ninche metimirisho; kake enkaina ino e tatene, ee enkaina ino, o ewang'an e nkomom ino; amu itishipakine iyie ninche." 
Psalms44:4 Ira iyie Olaiguanani lai o Enkai ai, naa iyie oisho Yakobo metimirisho." 
Psalms44:5 Te iyie iyiook kisulie ilmang'ati lang; te nkarna ino iyiook kintunyoo lelo oogilunore iyiook. 
Psalms44:6 Amu mme enkawuo ai nanu aisilig, nemaaidim olalem lai aitajeu." 
Psalms44:7 Kake ntajeuo iyie iyiook too lmang'ati lang, nitipika olmilo lelo ooiba iyiook." 
Psalms44:8 Enkai kiting'idare iyiook anaake, naa eikinchooyo enashe te nkaraki enkarna ino ntarasi." 
Psalms44:9 Ore ake eyia, nturrayie iyie iyiook nintadou iyiook, neitu iyie ilo airiamariyie njorin ang." 
Psalms44:10 Nchoo iyie iyiook maibelekenyata aailany ilmang'ati lang; ore lelo mang'ati lang neibung aaraya masaa ang. 
Psalms44:11 Ntotiuo iyie iyiook anaa ntare naayieng'i, nindapashaka iyiook iloreren." 
Psalms44:12 Itimira iltung'ana linono neitu inosie toki, eitu iyie ing'oru enkinyang'a nagol te nkaraki ninche." 
Psalms44:13 Itipika iyie iyiook elap too lmang'ati lang, neikoroj neyiet iyiook lelo oomanita iyiook." 
Psalms44:14 Ntaa iyie iyiook endung'et e rashe ti atua iloreren, entoki nakueniyieki ti atua iloshon." 
Psalms44:15 Ore endama pooki netii esulare ai dukuya nanu, neimulumula enkurruna enkomom ai," 
Psalms44:16 te nkaraki irorei le ilo oikordodisho nemorisho, te nkaraki ilo mang'atinta o ilo oitalaku elap." 
Psalms44:17 Eetuo kuna pooki shumata iyiook, hoo neitu kipal mikidamu iyie, neitu kipong'ori to lning'o lino." 
Psalms44:18 Eitu eibelekenya iltauja lang, neitu elam iroruat ang enkoitoi ino," 
Psalms44:19 nitigiligila iyiook ti atua ewueji oo mbariak, nimulumul iyiook te naimin namisimis." 
Psalms44:20 Amaa naaji te naa ketorikine iyiook enkarna e Nkai ang, anaa eikintoriokitio nkaik ang enkai omoni," 
Psalms44:21 aimeirrash Enkai ena? Amu eyiolo ninye nkisudorot o ltau. 
Psalms44:22 Ee, te nkaraki enkorrok ino pee eari iyiook endama pooki, neikoni iyiook anaa nkerra naayieng'i." 
Psalms44:23 Tuputunye! Minturraa iyiook ntarasi Kainyoo pee irura, iyie Olaitoriani? Tudumunye, minturraa iyiook anangaki enelakua." 
Psalms44:24 Kainyoo iyie pee isudoo enkomom ino? Kainyoo iyie pee kitorikine osina lang o enkitorogonyata ang? 
Psalms44:25 Eirrugote iltauja lang aabaiki enkop; eirragita iseseni lang te nkop. 
Psalms44:26 Tudumunye, wou taretu iyiook! Tokordu iyiook te nkaraki ina nyorrata ino nauno!" 
Psalms45:1 Eiputa aadooyo to ltau lai ilomon supati; naliki nanu olaiguanani irorei lo sinkolio lai; eikununo olng'ejep lai aanaa enkalamu o lasirani arriyia. 
Psalms45:2 Ira iyie sidai too nkera e tung'ana; etubukokoki empiris enkutuk ino; ore enkaraki ina, kitamayiana Enkai ntarasi." 
Psalms45:3 Teena olalem lino to mpolos ino, iyie ele magilani, ti atua enkitoo ino o enkishiaa!" 
Psalms45:4 Ore te nkishiaa ino shomo isula te nkaraki esipata nimitu ilo asipani; nchoo enkaina ino e tatene mikinteng'ena nkiaasin naaitureisho! 
Psalms45:5 Kepi mbaa inono, netii atua iltauja loo lmang'ati lo laiguanani, nebatata iloreren ti abori iyie." 
Psalms45:6 Ore ilo orika lino le nkitoo, Enkai, nebikoo ntarasi o ntarasi. Ore ina ng'udi ino e nkitoria naa eng'udi oo sipat;" 
Psalms45:7 inyor iyie esupatisho nimba enkarruoisho. Metaa ore Enkai, ina Ai ino kitubukoko eilata aput teina ilata e ng'ida nikintulusoo too lchoreta linono" 
Psalms45:8 ore ilkilani linono neitorropili te nkorropil o too sonkoyoni, o erropili o sinantei ore ti atua nena ajijik e nkitoo oo lala loo lkanchaoni, netii nkinantani oo usin nikintishipieki iyie;" 
Psalms45:9 ore ntoyie oo laiguanak netii te nebo nena kituaak inono naayanyiti; ore te nkaina ino e tatene neitashe enkaiguanani eishopito sahabu naing'uaa Ofir. 
Psalms45:10 Toning'o, iyie na tito, tadamu, nirrugu enkiok ino; nchoo kirikino olorere linyi o enkaji e papaai lino," 
Psalms45:11 pee etum olaiguanani atishipakinoyu enkishiaa ino. Ore amu olkitok lino ninye, irrugokinoyu ninye;" 
Psalms45:12 ore iltung'ana le nkop e Turo neyau nkishorot, lelo karsisi aalang iltung'ana pooki," 
Psalms45:13 eeta enkarsisisho oo mpukunot pooki. Eikodoki entito o laiguanani to lgilata lenye te nkaji e nkitoo, too ilkilani lenyena ooripuno too usin e sahabu;" 
Psalms45:14 ore etukuse too lkilani loo muain kumok, nerikokini olaiguanani, te nebo nena selenken naairukurukore ninye." 
Psalms45:15 Nerikuni ninche te nchipai o te ng'ida, ina kata ejing atua ina aji e nkitoo o laiguanani." 
Psalms45:16 Ore te rishata oo loo papaai linyi naa keaku ilayiok linono; naa ilo iyie aitaa ninche kituaak te nkop pooki. 
Psalms45:17 Kaisho nanu enkarna ino metoning'oyu too ishoritin pooki, metaa eikisis iyie iloreren ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Psalms46:1 Enkai osempewuet lang naa engolon ang, eretoto nataana ninye te nkata e nyamali." 
Psalms46:2 Ore enkaraki ina mikiureisho hoo duoo ninye tenaa keibelekenya enkop, hoo duoo ninye tenaa keikirikira ildoinyo te mpolos e naiposha;" 
Psalms46:3 hoo tenaa keikurrukur nkariak e naiposha neitayu labur, hoo tenaa keikirikira ildoinyo te nkaraki olarrabal." 
Psalms46:4 Etii olkeju oitiship nchorroi enyena enkanasa o Laitoriani, ina manyisho sinyati e ilo Otii Shumata Aisul." 
Psalms46:5 Etii Enkai atua ina anasa, nemeigusugusieki ninye; keretu Enkai ninye tadekenya." 
Psalms46:6 Etagorote iloshon, neikirikirate nkitoriat; neiro ninye to ltoilo lenye, neshola enkop." 
Psalms46:7 Etii Olaitoriani loo lororani te nebo iyiook; Enkai e Yakobo ninye esarunoto ang. 
Psalms46:8 Wootu eng'ura isiaaitin o laitoriani, eneikuna ninye pee eitomijoon e nkop." 
Psalms46:9 Ninye oishie ilarrabali o metabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop; ninye ogil enkawuo nedot empere, nepejoo ngarrin oo mbartan te nkima!" 
Psalms46:10 “Ntirring'ayu, niyiolou nchere nanu Enkai. Ara nanu kitok ti atua iloshon, aaitaaki nanu kitok te nkop!”" 
Psalms46:11 Etii Olaitoriani loo lororani te nebo iyiook; Enkai e Yakobo ninye esarunoto ang. 
Psalms47:1 Entoosh nkaik, te ng'ida lo oreren pooki! Esisa Enkai too mbuakunot oo sinkolioitin." 
Psalms47:2 Amu ore Olaitoriani, ilo Otii Shumata Aisul, naa keitureisho, ninye olaiguanani kitok te nkop pooki." 
Psalms47:3 Ninye oyau iloshon apik abori iyiook, nepik iloreren abori nkejek ang." 
Psalms47:4 Ninye otegelaka iyiook enjung'ore ang, ina kishiaa e Yakobo otonyorra ninye." 
Psalms47:5 Eilepa Enkai shumata te mbuakunoto, etii Olaitoriani te mbuakunoto e ntarumpeta." 
Psalms47:6 Entaranyaki Enkai enkisisa, entarany enkisisa! Entaranyaki Olaiguanani lang entarany enkisisa!" 
Psalms47:7 Amu Enkai olaiguanani le nkop pooki; entarany enkisisa to lkerempe! 
Psalms47:8 Enkai naitoreisho loo loreren; etonita Enkai to lorika lenye le nkitoo sinyati. 
Psalms47:9 Eiturrurrote ilkituaak loo loreren anaa iltung'ana le Nkai e Abraham. Amu ine Nkai ilong'oi pooki e nkop; neishori ninye enkitoo sapuk! 
Psalms48:1 Eikitok Olaitoriani naa keisisi ninye oleng ti atua enkanasa e Nkai ang! Te ilo doinyo lenye sinyati 
Psalms48:2 sidai te nkadoro enye, naa ninye eng'ida e nkop pooki. Etii oldoinyo le Sion enelakua te moikuape, ina anasa o laiguanani kitok." 
Psalms48:3 Ore ti atua nkajijik enyena neitodolua Enkai kewan nchere ninye omitu. 
Psalms48:4 Amu ng'ura, eiturrurrote laiguanak, nepuonu te nebo." 
Psalms48:5 Ore ake pee edol ninche ina, neing'asia, neirut ninche, nedumunye aaisik;" 
Psalms48:6 neibung ninche olokirrikir te ine, o emion neeijo ene nkitok nasaisai." 
Psalms48:7 Ore to siwuo le nkilepunoto e nkolong nigil imelin e Tarshishi. 
Psalms48:8 Ore anaa enikitoning'o, ina kitoduaa iyiook ti atua enkanasa o Laitoriani loo lororani, ti atua ina anasa e Nkai ang, apa naitasheyie Enkai ntarasi." 
Psalms48:9 Kitadamutua iyiook te ina nyorrata ino kitok, Olaitoriani, te mpolos e nkaji ino." 
Psalms48:10 Ore anaa enatiu enkarna ino, na Ai, neijia etiu enkisisa ino, elo abaiki ineeiting'ie enkop. Neeta enkaina ino e tatene enkisulata;" 
Psalms48:11 nchoo oldoinyo le Sion eng'idayu! Nchoo nena toyie e Yuda eng'idayu te nkaraki nkiguanat inono! 
Psalms48:12 Shomo tamanai te Sion, shomo tamana ninye, nkena iltaleta lenyena," 
Psalms48:13 entadamu entisipu isunta enyena o nkajijik enyena, pee itumutumu aatiaaki eishoi nasuju," 
Psalms48:14 nchere Enkai ena, ninye Enkai ang ntarasi o ntarasi. Ninye oaku olarikoni lang ntarasi." 
Psalms49:1 Entoning ena lo oreren! Enchoru nkiyiaa, intae pooki oomanya enkop," 
Psalms49:2 o liabori o le shumata, o lkarsis o laisinani te nebo!" 
Psalms49:3 Keiro enkutuk ai ine ng'eno nagut; ore nkibirribirrat o ltau lai naa keaku eyiolounoto. 
Psalms49:4 Kairrugoki nanu enkiok ai endung'et e rashe; nawalu nanu oloyiote lai te oshoto e nkinanta. 
Psalms49:5 Kainyoo nanu pee aureisho te nkata e nyamali, te naaman nanu entorroni oo laisilisilok laainei," 
Psalms49:6 lelo tung'ana ooisilig karsisisho enye, neitokoos te nkaraki enkumoi oo masaa enye?" 
Psalms49:7 Esipa meetae oltung'ani okordu kewan, anaa oloisho Enkai enkinyiang'a e nkishui enye," 
Psalms49:8 amu ore enkordunoto e nkishui enye naa kegol, nemeidimi ae kata aainyiang'u," 
Psalms49:9 pee etum oltung'ani ataa keishu ntarasi, nemejing ae kata Engumoto." 
Psalms49:10 Ee, kedol ninye nchere, ekeye sii ninye ilo ng'en, ore ilo modai o lkiminchali naa keidak te nebo neing'ueiki ina arsisisho enye ilkulikae." 
Psalms49:11 Nkuraren enye ninche nkang'itie enye ntarasi, ninche imanyishoritin enye ti atua iishoritin pooki, hoo neipot ninche nkuapi aajo nkunenye." 
Psalms49:12 Mebikoo oltung'ani te nkitoo enye, eikununo ninye anaa eng'ues naidaaya." 
Psalms49:13 Ena enkoitoi e lelo oomoda, enkiting'oto e lelo ooshipakino erubata enye." 
Psalms49:14 Etiu ninche anaa ntare naayae enemeneng'a, neaku keeya olchekut lenye; neitoriori ninche aadoiki Engumoto, ore esidano e nkitobirunoto enye neidaaya aish; neaku enemeneng'a enkang enye." 
Psalms49:15 Kake kekordu Enkai enkishui ai aitung'uaa engolon e Nemeneng'a, amu kaang'amu ninye nanu." 
Psalms49:16 Mirut iyie te neaku oltung'ani karsis, te neponari enkitoo enkaji enye." 
Psalms49:17 Amu te neye ninye nemenap toki, melo enkitoo enye asujaa ninye." 
Psalms49:18 Ore hoo neikenaa kewan ajo keshipa eton eishu, anaa hoo netum oltung'ani enkisisa te neitaas kewan esidai," 
Psalms49:19 keyooki ake alo enetii ilporori loo loo menye, lelo lemeigil ai kata aadol ewang'an." 
Psalms49:20 Mebikoo oltung'ani ti atua enkitoo enye, etiu ninye anaa eng'ues naidaaya." 
Psalms50:1 Ilo magilani, Olaitoriani Enkai, ninye oiro neipotu enkop ebaiki enkilepunoto e nkolong metabaiki endoyioroto." 
Psalms50:2 Ore te Sion, te ine neiting'ie e nkishiaa, Enkai naitawang." 
Psalms50:3 Kelotu Enkai ang, nemegira ninye, ore te dukuya ninye naa enkima nanyaisho, ore oriong ine namanita ninye naa osiwuo kitok." 
Psalms50:4 Neipot shumata e keper o abori kop, pee etum ninye aiguanare iltung'ana lenyena:" 
Psalms50:5 “Enturrurrokoki nanu lelo ooisiligayu laainei; lelo ooitobira olning'o lo sotua o nanu to lasar!” 
Psalms50:6 Eibalunye shumata esupatisho enye, amu Enkai kewan nadung enkiguana." 
Psalms50:7 “Entoning lo tung'ana laainei, amu kairo nanu, iyie Israel, kaaishakenoki nanu iyie. Ara nanu enkai, Enkai ino." 
Psalms50:8 Eitu nanu aaisikong iyie te nkaraki ilasarri linono; ore lelo asarri linono oopejori netii anaake dukuya nanu. 
Psalms50:9 Mang'amaa o lasar loo loing'ok oing'uaa enkaji ino, nemang'amaa olkine oing'uaa eluaata ino." 
Psalms50:10 Amu ore pooki ng'ues ti atua entim naa enaai, o nena kishu naatii ndoinyo inkalifuni." 
Psalms50:11 Ayiolo nanu imotonyi pooki o loing'ang'e, ore pooki toki nalo ti oriong enkop naa enaai." 
Psalms50:12 Tenaa naaji esumash aata, nemaaliki iyie; amu enaai enkop o pooki toki natii." 
Psalms50:13 Kainos nanu nkiri oo loing'ok, anaa aok osarge loo nkineji?" 
Psalms50:14 Nchoo iyie Enkai olasar le nashe, nilaaki ninye nkishorot inono ilo otii Shumata Aisul;" 
Psalms50:15 nikimpot nanu te nkata e nyamali; kaakordu nanu iyie, nikiisis iyie nanu.”" 
Psalms50:16 Kake ore te ilo arruoni, ejo Enkai: “Kaa sipata iyie iata nilimunye nkitanapat aainei, anaa iya olning'o lai lo sotua te nkutuk ino?" 
Psalms50:17 Amu mba iyie eutaroto, ninang'aa irorei laainei aidie kewan." 
Psalms50:18 Te nidol iyie olapurroni, niaku olchore lenye, nira o le ncholiek oo loo loloito." 
Psalms50:19 Nipalaa enkutuk ino too nkirorot torrok, neitobiru olng'ejep lino elejare." 
Psalms50:20 Iton iyie airo entorroni tialo olalashe lino, ninteeniki enkerai ning'arie kina." 
Psalms50:21 Kuna baa oshi iasita natigirakine nanu; itejo apa iyie kara obo otiu anaa iyie, kake kaaisikong taata nanu iyie, naibalunye mbaa te dukuya iyie." 
Psalms50:22 Entisipu naa ena, intae ilemedamu Enkai, pee mayooki ake apolos intae, nemetumi hoo obo oitajeu!" 
Psalms50:23 Ore ilo oyau olasar le nashe ninye laayanyit nanu; ore ilo oitorioo nkoitoi enyena, naa kaitodol nanu enjeunoto e Nkai!”" 
Psalms51:1 Ing'urrieki nanu iyie Enkai, te risioroto e nyorrata ino nauno; ore te risioroto o lng'ur lino kitok, tujutoi nkitarruorot aainei." 
Psalms51:2 Ntukuoki nanu tukul meishunye entorroni ai, nikintisiny too ng'ok aainei!" 
Psalms51:3 Amu ayiolo nanu nkitarruorot aainei, netii ing'ok aainei anaake dukuya nanu." 
Psalms51:4 Tialo iyie ake ataasa nanu eng'oki, naas ina torrono too nkonyek inono, metaa ira iyie asipani te nkiguana ino, nimiaata entioto te nkiguana ino." 
Psalms51:5 Ng'ura, ti atua ntorrok nanu aatoiuoki, naa ti atua ing'ok aatoiuo yieyio." 
Psalms51:6 Ng'ura, esipata e atua oltau iyieu iyie; ore enkaraki ina inteng'enaki nanu eng'eno nagut ti atua enkisudoroto o ltau lai." 
Psalms51:7 Mpooki nanu te hisopo, pee asinyayu; ntukuoki, pee awang'u alang enturoto." 
Psalms51:8 Mputaki nanu eng'ida o enchipai, nchoo lelo oik apa litigila iyie meting'idata." 
Psalms51:9 Isudoi enkomom ino too ng'ok aainei, nijutoo ntorrok aainei pooki." 
Psalms51:10 Ntobiru ti atua nanu oltau sidai, iyie Enkai, nipik enkishui ng'ejuk sidai atua nanu." 
Psalms51:11 Mikinturraa nanu aitung'uaa ine nitii, nimiwuang'ie ina kiyang'et ino sinyati ti atua nanu." 
Psalms51:12 Torrinyokoki nanu eng'ida e njeunoto ino, nikimbung nanu to ltau le yieunoto ino." 
Psalms51:13 Pee atum aiteng'ena ilaitarruorrok nkoitoi inono, nikirrinyokino ilaing'okok aapuonu enitii." 
Psalms51:14 Iyie Enkai, tokorduaki nanu te lelo loo sargeta, iyie, Enkai e njeunoto ai, naa kerany olng'ejep lai te mbuakunoto e nkordunoto ino." 
Psalms51:15 Olaitoriani, tabolo iyie enkutuk ai pee eibalunye enkutuk ai enkisisa ino." 
Psalms51:16 Amu mishipakino iyie ilasarri; te naitayu ninye olasar opejori nimikintiship iyie. 
Psalms51:17 Ore olasar ong'amaroyu te Nkai naa oltau obor; ore oltau obor neitadou kewan, mimenaa iyie Olaitoriani." 
Psalms51:18 Ntaasa Sion esidai te supatisho ino; teshetu isunta e Yerusalem. 
Psalms51:19 Pee itum taa atishipakinoyu ilasarri oodede, o lasarri oopejori, o lasarri oolulung'a oopejori; nitum taa aitayu ilasarri loo loing'ok, to lperere lino lo lasar." 
Psalms52:1 Kainyoo iyie pee intokoos, lo tung'ani magilani, te nkaraki entorroni naitaasaki ilo tung'ani le Nkai?" 
Psalms52:2 Ore endama pooki, ntobirita iyie enkidaata. Eikununo olng'ejep lino anaa olmurunya opi, iyie olaitobirani le nkeleekisho." 
Psalms52:3 Inyor iyie entorroni aitalang esupatisho, o elejare alang esipata." 
Psalms52:4 Inyor iyie irorei oomutisho, iyie o lolng'ejep olejisho" 
Psalms52:5 kake eikigiligil iyie Enkai ntarasi; nikimbung ninye iyie nikipolos ti atua olng'obor lino; Nikidotu ninye iyie aitung'uaa enkop oo looishu. 
Psalms52:6 Ore lelo supati naa kedol, neureishoyu, nekueniyie ninche ninye, ejo," 
Psalms52:7 “Eng'ura oltung'ani lemeitaa Enkai esarunoto enye, laa enkumoi oo masaa enyena eisiliga, nelo ninye aing'oru enesaru ti atua imasaa enyena!”" 
Psalms52:8 Kake aikununo nanu anaa oloirien onyori mbenek ti atua enkaji e Nkai. Aisiliga nanu ina nyorrata nauno e Nkai ntarasi o ntarasi. 
Psalms52:9 Kaaisho nanu iyie enashe ntarasi, amu itaasa iyie ena. Kaibalunye nanu enkarna ino amu eisidai, to dukuya lelo ooure Enkai." 
Psalms53:1 Ejo olmodai to ltau lenye, “Metii Enkai.” Etarruoitie ninche, neas olminong torrono, meetae ninye obo oas isidain." 
Psalms53:2 Neing'or Enkai kop etii shumata, aing'or nkera e tung'ana pee edol tenaa ketii obo ng'en oing'oru Enkai." 
Psalms53:3 Etorrinyote pooki aapuo siadi etarruoitie pooki; meetae hoo obo oas esidai, a-a, metii hoo obo." 
Psalms53:4 Aimeeta kulo ooas ntorrok indamunot, kulo ooinos iltung'ana laainei anaa endaa, nemeipotu ninche Enkai?" 
Psalms53:5 Etijing'a ninche olkirutoto kitok, olkirutoto leitu ae kata etumi! Amu keidapash Enkai iloik le lelo lemeure Enkai, keitukurruni ninche, amu etanya Enkai ninche." 
Psalms53:6 Oi elotu enkordunoto e Israel eing'uaa Sion! Ina kata errinyu Enkai iltung'ana lenyena, neng'idayu Yakobo neshipayu Israel." 
Psalms54:1 Ntajeuoki nanu, iyie Enkai, te nkarna ino, ng'uanareki nanu te nkidimata ino." 
Psalms54:2 Toning'o enkomono ai, iyie Enkai; tipika enkiok ino kulo rorei le nkutuk ai." 
Psalms54:3 Amu aatudumakinote nanu iltung'ana omon aagilunore, eing'oru iltung'ana lemeeta olng'ur enkishui ai, nemeiturukie ninche Enkai too mbaa enye." 
Psalms54:4 Ng'ura, Enkai ninye olaretoni lai; Olaitoriani ninye olaibung'ani le nkishui ai." 
Psalms54:5 Keitalaku ninye entorroni too lmang'ati laainei; ore te supatisho ino nting'ie ninche. 
Psalms54:6 Ore too lasarri lo lpela kaapolosaki nanu iyie; kaisho nanu enkarna ino enashe, iyie Olaitoriani, amu aisidai ninye." 
Psalms54:7 Amu kitokordua iyie nanu aitung'uaa pooki nyamali, netoduaa nkonyek aainei enkisulata ino too lmang'ati laainei." 
Psalms55:1 Toning'o te nkiok ino enkomono ai, na Ai; nimisudoo kewan te nkomono ai!" 
Psalms55:2 Toning'oki nanu, nikiwaliki; aaidimua nanu eng'olikinoto ai atalepunye nanu," 
Psalms55:3 te nkaraki ilo toilo lo lmang'atinta, te nkaraki ilo kibookinoto enkop eilo torrono amu keyau ninche enyamali shumata nanu; ore te ngoro neitobir ninche mang'atisho ti alo nanu." 
Psalms55:4 Etamio oltau lai ti atua nanu, neewuo olkirutoto le keeya shumata nanu." 
Psalms55:5 Eewuo olkirutoto o lokirrikir shumata nanu, naaibulua nanu enkiputukuny." 
Psalms55:6 Najo nanu, “Oi naaji tenaa kaata inaipuko anaa enturkulu, anaata aipirri enelakua ayeng'iyeng'a;" 
Psalms55:7 ee, anaata alo enelakua, nalo nanu airrag ong'ata," 
Psalms55:8 anaata aipirri alo aing'oru olng'obor aing'ataa olemua o lkutati kitok.” 
Psalms55:9 Ndaikie iyie nkitobirat enye, Olaitoriani, nipik olmilo ilng'ejepa lenye amu adolita nanu olarrabal o enchankar ti atua enkanasa." 
Psalms55:10 Ore dama o kewarie, nemanaa ninche too sunta enyena; netii enkaruoisho o enyamali atua ninye." 
Psalms55:11 Etii enkidaata empolos enye, nemepuku enkibookinoto e nkop o esunkureisho te wueji enye nemirishoreki." 
Psalms55:12 Mme olmang'atinta laatusukenya nanu, amu anaata nanu airisha; ime ilo laaiba oitokoos ti alo nanu - amu anaata nanu ashomo aisudori." 
Psalms55:13 Kake iyie, ele, larisiore, iyie ole ncholuek ai, ele shore lai latamoo." 
Psalms55:14 Eikiaata apa iyiook nkirorot naamurru te nebo; ore ti atua enkaji e Nkai nikipuo apa iyiook te nchula. 
Psalms55:15 Meeu keeya shumata ninche, metadoi ninche aapuo enemeneng'a eishu, meshomo ninche to lkirutoto aajing atua nkuraren enye." 
Psalms55:16 Kake kaipot nanu Olaitoriani; naa kaaitajeu nanu Olaitoriani. 
Psalms55:17 Ore teipa o tadekenya o te ndama nairo nanu enyamali ai naisinanuo, naa kening ninye oltoilo lai." 
Psalms55:18 Kekordu ninye oltau lai te seriani te ilo arrabal laatoluaakine, amu ilkumok laakeshare nanu." 
Psalms55:19 Kening Enkai, neitobor ninche, ilo apa ototonie olorika le nkitoo ebaiki moitie, enkaraki nemeibung ninche nkitanapat, nemeure ninche Enkai." 
Psalms55:20 Eitorioyie ilo le ncholuek ai enkaina enye agilunore ilchoreta lenyena, etigila ninye olning'o lenye." 
Psalms55:21 Kenana enkiroroto enye anaa eng'orno, kake eeta olarrabal to ltau lenye; nenana irorei lenyena anaa eilata, kake eikununo ninche anaa lalema ootushutuaki." 
Psalms55:22 Nteleiki Olaitoriani olola lino, naa aikintagol ninye iyie; menyorraa ae kata ninye meiwuang'ieki ilo asipani." 
Psalms55:23 Kake, ore iyie, Enkai, inang'aa ninche aitadou meetu abori tiatua engumoto nagut. Ore lelo tung'ana lo sarge o enkeleekisho metaa mebikoo ninche eishu to lpisiai le nkishui enye kake kaaisilig nanu iyie." 
Psalms56:1 Ing'urrieki nanu, iyie Enkai, amu aaitunyokito iltung'ana enkop; ore endama pooki naaisilisil nanu iltung'ana;" 
Psalms56:2 aaitunyokito ilmang'ati laainei enkop endama pooki, amu ilkumok laarare nanu te nkitokoos." 
Psalms56:3 Te naureishoyu nanu napik osiligi lai atua iyie. 
Psalms56:4 Atua ina Ai naisisita nanu ororei lenye, Enkai naisiligita metii enkuretisho. Kaa nanu aaidim tung'ani aitaasa?" 
Psalms56:5 Ore endama pooki neing'oru ninche pee eibelekeny irorei laainei; ore ndamunot enye pooki naa nanu egilunore te ntorroni. 
Psalms56:6 Neiturrurro ninche te nebo, neisudori, neing'oru iroruat aainei. Anaa enataanyutua ninche enkishui ai," 
Psalms56:7 ntalaa ninche te nkaraki enkarruoisho enye; ore te ngoro ino, iyie Enkai, tusulaki ninche enkop!" 
Psalms56:8 Nkena iyie enkirrang'irrang ai; tipika iyie ilkiyio laainei oltulet lino! Aimetii ninche atua embuku ino? 
Psalms56:9 Naa kerrinyi ilmang'ati laainei siadi te ina kata naaishiraki nanu iyie. Ayiolo nanu ena, nchere etii Enkai enchoto ai." 
Psalms56:10 Atua ina Ai naisisita nanu ororei lenye, Olaitoriani laisisita nanu irorei lenyena," 
Psalms56:11 Enkai naisiliga nanu metii enkuretisho. Kaa nanu aaidim tung'ani aitaasa? 
Psalms56:12 Ore lelo muma laainei te iyie naa kaitabaya, kaishoru nanu olasar le nashe te iyie." 
Psalms56:13 Amu itokordua iyie enkishui ai te keeya, ee, nintajeu nkejek aainei te mbatatata, pee atum nanu ashomo te dukuya Enkai ti atua ewang'an e nkishui ai." 
Psalms57:1 Ing'urrieki nanu iyie Enkai, ing'urrieki nanu, amu iyie esaru oltau lai; oloip loo naipuko inono nanu asaru, o metaba anaa nelusoo ilo kutati te nkidaata." 
Psalms57:2 Aishiraka nanu Enkai natii shumata aisul, Enkai naitabaya eyieunoto enyena te nanu." 
Psalms57:3 Ninye oirriu olkilikuai te keper naaitajeu nanu; keitukurru ninye lelo laaitunyoki nanu enkop. Keirriu Enkai ina nyorrata enye nauno o esupatisho enye! 
Psalms57:4 Airraga nanu te mpolos oo lng'atunyo ooinos te nkowuarisho inkera e tung'ana iremeta o mbaa ilala lenye, naa ilalema oopi ilng'ejepa lenye." 
Psalms57:5 Mikisisi iyie Enkai, aaitulusoo te keper! Nchoo meibulu enkitoo ino enkop pooki!" 
Psalms57:6 Etipika ninche orreshet nkejek aainei; neirrugi oltau lai aaing'orie enkop. Etuturutuo ninche engumoto te nkoitoi ai, kake etusulakinote ninche maate." 
Psalms57:7 Iyie Enkai, eitashe oltau lai auno, euno oltau lai! Karany nanu naosh olkerempe!" 
Psalms57:8 Tudumunye lo tau lai! Tudumunye na awuo oo sinkolioitin o lwulul loo usin! Kainyeyie nanu entadekenya! 
Psalms57:9 Ekaaisho nanu iyie enashe, iyie Olaitoriani, ti atua iloshon; kaaranyaki nanu iyie enkisisa ti atua iloreren." 
Psalms57:10 Amu ore ina nyorrata ino nauno naa eikitok o metabaiki keper, nebaiki esupatisho ino nkatampo." 
Psalms57:11 Nchoo mikisisi iyie, Iyie Enkai aaitulusoo te shumata nkatampo! Nchoo enkitoo ino eibulu enkop pooki!" 
Psalms58:1 Kesipa, lokituaak, idung'udung'u intae enkiguana te sipata? Inguanarere intae nkera e tung'ana too sipat?" 
Psalms58:2 A-a, ore ti atua iltauja linyi nidamumu ntorrok; niasiasa ntorrok too nkaik inyi te nkop." 
Psalms58:3 Ore lelo torrok netapong'ori apa ake ebaiki etii eng'uset, etapong'ori apa ebaiki pee eini neiro elejare." 
Psalms58:4 Eeta ninche esayiet neeijo eno lasurai, eikununo ninche anaa enturbubua ming'ani nemening'isho," 
Psalms58:5 nemening oltoilo loo lasakutok anaa oltoilo loo laitobirak loo ntaleng'o ng'eni hoo neibonisho ninche te nkarriyiano. 
Psalms58:6 Iyie Enkai tigila ilala lenye too nkutukie enye; Olaitariani, tadotu iltagiligil loo lkuoo loo lng'atunyo!" 
Psalms58:7 Nchoo meishunye ninche anaa nkare; nchoo meitunyokini ninche enkop anaa nkujit naatoito. 
Psalms58:8 Nchoo ninche metotiwuo anaa olosiki otoshole, nchoo metaa olkibiroto leitu ae kata edol enkolong." 
Psalms58:9 Ore eton eitu ening imotioo inyi enkima oo lkiku, naa kaitayu nanu ninche to siwuo akutaa, oloshal o lotoyio!" 
Psalms58:10 Kelo ilo supat ang'idayu te nedol enkitalakunoto e lap, nelo ninye aituku nkejek enyena to sarge le lelo arruok." 
Psalms58:11 Naa kejo iltung'ana, “Esipa keetae elaakinoto teilo supat, esipa keetae Enkai nadung'oki enkop enkiguana.”" 
Psalms59:1 Tokorduaki nanu too lmang'ati laainei, iyie Enkai, Tomituoki nanu te lelo laadumakino aagilunore," 
Psalms59:2 tokorduaki nanu te lelo ooitobir entorroni, nikintajeu nanu too ltung'ana oata enkure o sarge." 
Psalms59:3 Amu, ng'ura, keirrag ninche pee aarresh nanu aar matua, neiturrurro lelo pushunot te nebo pee aar nanu. Neme te nkaraki enkitarruorroto ai anaa eng'oki ai, Olaitoriani," 
Psalms59:4 ore ninye maata enataasa, nekuet ninche aapuo aanapa. Tudumunye, wou taretoki nanu, ning'orisho!" 
Psalms59:5 Iyie, Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani, iyie Enkai e Israel. Tudumunye ntamio iloshon pooki; mileku ninye obo le lelo ooipiru entorroni." 
Psalms59:6 Ore too nteipan nerrinyunye ninche, nebuak anaa ildiein neman enkanasa." 
Psalms59:7 Ng'ura ninche, eimujumuj nkutukie enye, netiu nkutukie enye anaa lalema - nejo ninche, “Kaing'ae oning iyiook?”" 
Psalms59:8 Kake ore iyie, Olaitoriani, ikueniyie ninche; ninkoroj iyie iloreren pooki." 
Psalms59:9 Na golon ai, kaaranyaki nanu isinkolioitin le nkisisa; amu ore, iyie Enkai, iyie osempewuet lai." 
Psalms59:10 Ore Enkai te ina nyorrata enye nauno naa kelotu enatii; kaaisho nanu Enkai ai matoduaa enkishuroto too lmang'ati laainei. 
Psalms59:11 Miar ninche metuata, merikino ake iltung'ana laainei; ndapasha ninche te ngolon ino, nintadou ninche, Olaitoriani, iyie elong'o ang!" 
Psalms59:12 Ore te nkaraki eng'oki oo nkutukie enye, lelo rorei lenye, nchoo ninche metijing'a orreshet lo lwuasa lenye. Te nkaraki ildeketa o elejare naitayu ninche," 
Psalms59:13 tumuta ninche te ngoro ino, tumuta ninche o metaba anaa neishunye, pee etum iltung'ana aatayioloito nchere Enkai naitoreisho ti atua Yakobo o metabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop." 
Psalms59:14 Ore too nteipan nerrinyunye ninche, nebuak anaa ildiein neman enkanasa." 
Psalms59:15 Nemanimanaa ninche aaing'oru endaa, neing'unyung'uny enkewarie pooki te neitu eraposho." 
Psalms59:16 Kake karanyaki nanu emagilanisho ino karany nanu abuaku isinkolioitin le nyorrata ino tadekenya. Amu itaa iyie osempewuet te nanu, itaa esarunoto ai te nkolong o sina lai." 
Psalms59:17 Na golon ai, kaaranyaki nanu iyie isinkolioitin le nkisisa, amu iyie, iyie Enkai, osempewuet lai, iyie Enkai naaitodol nanu enyorrata nauno." 
Psalms60:1 Iyie Enkai, nturrayie iyie iyiook, nitigila iltimito; itagore iyie, tokordu siaake iyiook." 
Psalms60:2 Iyie oikirikirie enkop, iyie oiperra abol; tarama ine netabee, amu keikirikira." 
Psalms60:3 Itipika iyie iltungana linono, osina kitok inchoo iyie iyiook enaisho oo sabibu naitemera," 
Psalms60:4 Ituuno iyie enanka te nkaraki lelo likiure, pee etumi aaitoduaai te nkaraki esipata." 
Psalms60:5 Pee etumi atokordu ilo lino linyor, nchoru enkisulata te nkaina ino e tatene, niwaliki iyiook!" 
Psalms60:6 Eiroro Enkai ti atua enkaji enye sinyati: “Naa kaor nanu Shekem te ng'ida kitok, narishu ierat le Sukot." 
Psalms60:7 Enaai Gilead; enaai Manase; ore Efraim naa enkopiyia ai o larrabal; ore Yuda naa eng'udi ai e nkitoo. 
Psalms60:8 Ore Moab naa engirra ai naitukuore; shumata Edom nanu aiteleiki ina amuke ai; naa te shumata Filistia nanu abuaku te nkisulata.” 
Psalms60:9 Kaing'ae laayau nanu atua ina anasa nasheta? Kaing'ae laarik nanu Edom? 
Psalms60:10 Keitu iyie inturraa iyiook, iyie Enkai? Miloito iyie, iyie Enkai, tenebo njorin ang." 
Psalms60:11 Nchoo iyiook engolon te nkaraki ilmang'ati lang, amu pesho eretoto e tung'ani!" 
Psalms60:12 Ore te retoto e Nkai nikiaas iyiook mbaa sapuki, amu ninye olo aitunyoo ilmang'ati lang." 
Psalms61:1 Toning'o enkishirata, iyie Enkai, inining'o enkomono ai;" 
Psalms61:2 ore too neeiting'ie enkop naaipot nanu iyie, elepori oltau lai. Torikoyioki iyie nanu mashomo ina dapidapoi naado alang nanu;" 
Psalms61:3 amu iyie enkisudoroto ai, iyie ewueji negol nasaru too lmang'ati laainei, oltalet ogol lagilunore ilmang'ati laainei." 
Psalms61:4 Nchooki nanu matobiko ti atua olng'obor lino ntarasi! Ee, pee atum ataseriana tiabori inaipuko inono!" 
Psalms61:5 Amu itoning'o, Enkai, ilmuma laainei, kinchoo iyie nanu enjung'ore e lelo ooure enkarna ino." 
Psalms61:6 Ntobikoi olaiguanani; metabaiki ilarin lenyena iishoritin pooki! 
Psalms61:7 Meitotonieki ninye olorika le nkitoo ntarasi te dukuya Enkai; irriu enyorrata nauno o esupatisho metorripo ninye! 
Psalms61:8 Naa karany enkisisa e nkarna ino anaake. 
Psalms62:1 Enkai ake eanyu oltau lai te nkitirring'ata; ninye eing'uaa enjeunoto ai. 
Psalms62:2 Ninye ake openy endapidapoi ai naa enjeunoto ai, ninye osempewuet lai, nemaaigusugusieki." 
Psalms62:3 Kenkata nabaa akenya mbung'ubung'u oltung'ani pee itumutumu aataar pooki te nebo, nitiuu anaa esuntai netaa keurori, anaa olpaashe letaa keurori?" 
Psalms62:4 Neitobir ninche pee esulaa ninye aaitadou to lorika lenye. Neshipakino ninche entorroni. Nemayian too nkutukie enye, ore ti atua iltauja lenye nedekisho." 
Psalms62:5 Amu Enkai ake eanyita oltau lai te nkitirring'ata, amu atua ninye etii osiligi lai." 
Psalms62:6 Ninye ake endapidapoi ai naa enjeunoto ai, ninye osempewuet lai, maaigusugusieki nanu." 
Psalms62:7 Enkai etii enkordunoto ai o enkitoo ai; ninye endapidapoi ai, Enkai esarunoto ai." 
Psalms62:8 Esiliga ninye nkatitin pooki lo tung'ana; entabol iltauja linyi te dukuya ninye; Enkai ninye esarunoto te iyiook. 
Psalms62:9 Ore iltung'ana li abori naa enkijape ake, ore iltung'ana le nkitoo naa elejare; te nejing ninche orrantili ore ninche pooki naa keneneng aalang enkijape." 
Psalms62:10 Misilig enkitorogonyare nimipik osiligi empurrorre; te neponari karsisisho, mipik oltau lino ine." 
Psalms62:11 Eiroro apa Enkai; atoning'o nanu ena katitin are, nchere Enkai eing'uaa engolon," 
Psalms62:12 naa iyie sii, Olaitoriani, ina nyorrata nauno. Amu ilaaki iyie oltung'ani te risioroto e siaai enye." 
Psalms63:1 Ira iyie Enkai, iyie Enkai ai, iyie nanu aing'oru, iyie eetayie oltau lai enkure; kaiterre nanu te yieunoto ino, atiu anaa oltung'ani te nkop natoyio nemetii enkare." 
Psalms63:2 Neaku, aaing'orua nanu iyie ti atua ine wueji ino sinyati, naing'or engolon ino o enkitoo ino." 
Psalms63:3 Amu ore ina nyorrata ino nauno, naa eisidai alang enkishui, kaaisis nanu iyie te nkutuk ai." 
Psalms63:4 Naa kaaisis nanu iyie anaa naishu; kailepie nanu nkaik aainei naipot enkarna ino. 
Psalms63:5 Etaraposhe oltau lai te mpiron o te ilata, nikisis enkutuk ai te ng'ida," 
Psalms63:6 te naadamu nanu iyie te ndapash ai, naibirribir mbaa inono airragita kewarie;" 
Psalms63:7 amu itaa apa iyie eretoto ai, naa ti abori oloip loo naipuko inono nanu aranyisho te ng'ida." 
Psalms63:8 Iyie eigarakino oltau lai, enkaina ino e tatene naairishu nanu." 
Psalms63:9 Kake ore lelo ooing'oru pee eidaikie enkishui ai, naa kedoyio aapuo olodo le nkop;" 
Psalms63:10 keishoori ninche aapik engolon o lalem, keaku ninche endaa oo mbariak." 
Psalms63:11 Kake keng'idakino olaiguanani Enkai; ore lelo ooinos olmumai te ninye neaku kituaak; amu ore nkutukie e lelo alejak naa keitigiri. 
Psalms64:1 Toning'o oltoilo lai, le nkilepilep ai, iyie Enkai, tagolie enkishui ai te mbatisho e ilo mang'atinta," 
Psalms64:2 isudoyioki nanu ntung'uayioki ilnukat le ilo torrono, ntung'uayioki mpuot oo laasak loo ntorrok," 
Psalms64:3 lelo ooitotiu ilng'ejepa lenye anaa lalema, lelo ooing'oru irorei oopi anaa mbaa," 
Psalms64:4 neng'or etii atua ilnukat ilo asipani, neng'or ninye aaluam metii enkuretisho." 
Psalms64:5 Neibung ninche aakurraki nena kitobirat enye torrok, neimaki ninche pee eirragie irresheta loo nkisudorot, edamu aajo, “Aing'ae oidim atoduaa iyiook?" 
Psalms64:6 Kaing'ae oidim aing'oru nkitarruorot ang? Kitadamutua iyiook nikintobir olnukata te ng'eno.” Amu ore endamunoto e atua o ltau le tung'ani naa kegut! 
Psalms64:7 Kake keng'or Enkai ninche te mbae enye, nepiki ninche ilbaa nabo kata." 
Psalms64:8 Ore enkaraki nkirorot enye, kelo ninye aidaikie ninche; ore pooki oodol ninche neipirripir ilukuny enye." 
Psalms64:9 Netum taa iltung'ana pooki aatureita; nelimu ninche ina nataasa Enkai, nedamu ina nataasa ninye." 
Psalms64:10 Nchoo ilo asipani eng'ida ti atua Olaitoriani, nisaru ninye! Nchoo lelo pooki sidain iltauja menoto enchipai sapuk." 
Psalms65:1 Kinchiaakino enkisisa te Sion, iyie Enkai; naa iyie einosieki ilmuma," 
Psalms65:2 iyie ele oning enkomono! Enitii elotu pooki toki naishu," 
Psalms65:3 te nkaraki ing'ok enye. Te neidimu iyiook nkitarruorot ang, nipalaki iyie iyiook." 
Psalms65:4 Emayiana ilo litegelua iyie niyau aitinyiku, pee eton ti atua indung'orot inono! Eikindipakino iyiook te supatisho e nkaji ino, ina aji ino sinyati!" 
Psalms65:5 Ore too nkiaasin naaitureisho niwaliki iyie iyiook te nkordunoto, iyie, iyie Enkai Ai e njeunoto ang, iyie osiligi loo wuejitin pooki neeiting'ie enkop, o inaaiposha naalakua;" 
Psalms65:6 laa te ngolon ino intasheyie ildoinyo, irretenita enkidimata ino;" 
Psalms65:7 iyie oitirring'ie enkikurrukur oo naaiposha, ina kikurrukur oo lopir lenye, ilo oilepilepi loo ltung'ana;" 
Psalms65:8 neaku etureishote lelo oomanya ineelakua te nkop, te nkaraki nkitoduaat inono; nchoo iyie ineelusorie enkakenya o enteipa metabuaku te ng'ida." 
Psalms65:9 Iyie omutan enkop nibukoki enkare, iyie oitubulu oleng; ebore ilo keju le Nkai enkare; iyie oisho ninche enkurma enye, amu neijia iyie ntobira aiko." 
Psalms65:10 Iyie opik ierat lenyena enkare, nintobir anuk ilbaat pooki, nintanana enterit te nkirujuruj, nebulu emayianata." 
Psalms65:11 Nchopoko iyie olari esupatisho ino, ore rrekiei le ngarri ino neitong eilata." 
Psalms65:12 Ore ndaat oo nchoo ti ong'ata neitong, ore ildoinyo nemanita eng'ida," 
Psalms65:13 ore nkong'at naaisiaja neiput nkerrai, neiput enkurma ierat, nebuaku ninche te nebo aarany te ng'ida." 
Psalms66:1 Tabuaku taranyaki Enkai te ng'ida, na kop pooki;" 
Psalms66:2 entaranyaki enkitoo e nkarna enye; enchoo ninye enkisisa e nkitoo! 
Psalms66:3 Entiaaki Enkai, “Kebaa eitureisho nkiaasin inono! Naa kitok engolon ino, o metaa kepuonu ilmang'ati linono aaborru te dukuya iyie." 
Psalms66:4 Iyie eserem enkop pooki; nikiranyaki iyie isinkolioitin le nkisisa, nerany enkisisa te nkaraki enkarna ino.”" 
Psalms66:5 Wootu entodol inaataasa Enkai: keitureisho nkiaasin enyena ti atua iltung'ana. 
Psalms66:6 Keibelekeny ninye enaiposha aitaa enkop natoyio; nepuo iltung'ana aaim olkeju too nkejek. Te ine iyiook kiting'idakinote ninye," 
Psalms66:7 ilo oitoreisho te nkidimata enye ntarasi, ilo laa nkonyek enyena naaing'or iloshon - mincho lelo ooisero eisis ate." 
Psalms66:8 Esisa Enkai ang, lo oreren, nchoo metoning'ori oltoilo le nkisisa enye," 
Psalms66:9 ilo apa otagolie iyiook te nebo ilooishu, neitu eisho nkejek ang metarrorroto." 
Psalms66:10 Amu itetema iyie iyiook, Enkai, itetema iyie iyiook anaa enkosholai, anaa enkosholai natemi." 
Psalms66:11 Itipika iyie iyiook orreshet; nieniki mpolosi ang olola oiroishi; 
Psalms66:12 nchoo iyie iltung'ana meitunyoi ilukuny ang; kishomo iyiook aaim atua enkima o atua enkare; kake iyaua ake iyie iyiook enkop nalala. 
Psalms66:13 Kalotu nanu atua enkaji ino aata ilasarri oopejori; kaalaaki nanu iyie ilmuma laainei," 
Psalms66:14 apa lairoro nanu te nkutuk ai, naisiligishore apa nanu te nkutuk ai atii enyamali." 
Psalms66:15 Kaaitaiki nanu iyie olasar opejori loo ntokitin naapir, te nebo empuruo o lasar loo lkerra; kaitobir nanu olasar loo loing'ok o nkineji." 
Psalms66:16 Wootu entoning intae pooki ooure Enkai, naa kalimu nanu ina naaitaasa ninye." 
Psalms66:17 Aishiraka nanu ninye abuaku, neisis olng'ejep lai ninye." 
Psalms66:18 Tenaa kaata apa nanu entorroni to ltau lai, anaata maaning nanu Olaitoriani." 
Psalms66:19 Kake esipa aatoning'o nanu Olaitoriani, etoning'o ninye oltoilo le nkomono ai." 
Psalms66:20 Meisisi Olaitoriani, amu eitu ninye eany enkomono ai, neitu eiwuang'ie ina nyorrata enye nauno te nanu." 
Psalms67:1 Meing'urrie iyiook Enkai nemayian iyiook neitawang'aki iyiook te nkomom enye," 
Psalms67:2 pee etumi aatayiolo enkoitoi ino te nkop pooki, neyiolouni ina golon ino naitajeusho too loshon pooki." 
Psalms67:3 Nchoo mikisisa iyie iltung'ana, na Ai; nchoo loreren pooki mikisisa iyie!" 
Psalms67:4 Nchoo meting'idata loshon nerany te ng'ida, amu nguanare iyie te nkaraki entorroni nirikoo iloshon ootii oriong enkop." 
Psalms67:5 Nchoo loreren mikisisa iyie, na Ai, nchoo loreren pooki mikisisa iyie!" 
Psalms67:6 Etoponayie enkop ilng'anayio lenyena; Ore Enkai, Enkai ang etamayiana iyiook." 
Psalms67:7 Etamayiana iyiook Enkai; nchoo ineeiting'ie enkop pooki metureita ninye! 
Psalms68:1 Nchoo Enkai metudumunye, nchoo meidapashata ilmang'ati lenyena; nchoo lelo ooiba ninye meisika te dukuya ninye." 
Psalms68:2 Ore anaa enakutari empuruo tukutai ninche nkuna neijia; anaa enashola enkapoi te nkima nchoo ilarruok meidaai te dukuya Enkai. 
Psalms68:3 Kake nchoo lelo supati meting'idata; nchoo ninche meting'idata te dukuya Enkai; nchoo ninche metishipata oleng! 
Psalms68:4 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani, entarany enkisisa e nkarna enye; elepie osinkolio entaranyaki ninye, ilo olo te shumata nkatampo; ore enkarna enye naa Olaitoriani, enting'idata te dukuya ninye!" 
Psalms68:5 Menye le lelo okishin, naa olamitunoni loo nkolia, Enkai te ine wueji enye sinyati." 
Psalms68:6 Enkai naisho ilo lemeeta ang ewueji nemany, nerikoo lelo ooena metudupoto; kake ore lelo maisero netoni te nkop natoyio." 
Psalms68:7 Iyie Enkai, ore apa pee ilo arikoo iltungana linono, ore apa pee ilo iyie aim olpurkel," 
Psalms68:8 neikirikira enkop, neshau shumata enkare, te ine netii Enkai; eikirikire oldoinyo le Sinai te dukuya Enkai, ina Ai e Israel." 
Psalms68:9 Irriwua iyie enchan kitok, Enkai, nintagol enjung'ore ino enaurate;" 
Psalms68:10 netum nkerra inono emanyisho ti atua ninye; te supatisho ino, na Ai, intoti iyie ilaisinak." 
Psalms68:11 Eishorua Olaitoriani enkitanapata; eikitok olorora le lelo oonap ilomon supati: 
Psalms68:12 “Ore laiguanak loo njorin, neilanyisho aaisik!” Ore nkituaak naaing'uari ti ang neor nena yarunot" 
Psalms68:13 ore hoo neirrag ninche ti atua imuatat, eikununo inaipuko enye anaa ine nturkulu naamura te nkosholai, ore nkopir enye neiyia anaa sahabu nanyori." 
Psalms68:14 Ore te neidapash olmagilani lelo aiguanak, nedoiki empaso Salmon." 
Psalms68:15 Lo doinyo le Nkai, lo doinyo le Bashan; lo doinyo loo mowuarak kumok, lo doinyo le Bashan!" 
Psalms68:16 Kainyoo iyie pee ing'or to lom, lo doinyo loo rruka kumok, ilo doinyo oyieu Enkai neitaa emanyisho enye, ee, ine nelo Olaitoriani abikie ntarasi?" 
Psalms68:17 Too ngarrin oo mbartan magil, nkalifuni tomon katitin are, nkalifuni o nkalifuni, apa eeunye Olaitoriani eing'uaa Sinai, nelotu atua ine wueji sinyati." 
Psalms68:18 Ilepa iyie alo shumata oleng, nirik lelo yarunot araya, ning'amaa nkishorot too ltung'ana, ning'amaa sii ine lelo torrok, pee etum Olaitoriani Enkai atobiko te ine." 
Psalms68:19 Meisisi Olaitoriani, laa ninye onap iyiook anaake; Enkai ninye enjeunoto ang." 
Psalms68:20 Enkai ang ninye Enkai e njeunoto; naa eno Laitoriani, Enkai, enkordunoto te keeya." 
Psalms68:21 Kepurd Enkai ilukuny oo lmang'ati lenyena, o enkopiyia naju e nkitoo e ilo olo too nkoitoi enyena torrok." 
Psalms68:22 Etejo Olaitoriani, “Karrinyu nanu ninche aitung'uaa Bashan, Karrinyu nanu ninche aitung'uaa ineegut e naiposha," 
Psalms68:23 pee itum iyie aitukuo nkejek inono to sarge, ore ilng'ejepa loo ldiein linono netum erubata enye te lelo mang'ati.”" 
Psalms68:24 Edolitae ilotot inono, iyie Enkai, nena gilakinot e Nkai ai, Olaiguanani lai, elo atua ewueji sinyati -" 
Psalms68:25 etii ilaranyak dukuya, netii ilaoshok loo ntampurini siadi, ore erishata enye netii ntoyie naakut ndulen:" 
Psalms68:26 “Meisisi Olaitoriani ti atua eumata kitok, ee, iyie, Olaitoriani, amu iyie entalipa e Israel!”" 
Psalms68:27 Etii Benchamen, ilo oti te ninye, dukuya, netii lelo kituaak le Yuda iwuejitin enye, o lelo kituaak le Sebulon o lelo le Naftali." 
Psalms68:28 Iyie Enkai, mpotu enkidimata ino; ntodolu engolon ino, iyie Enkai, amu iyie apa oitaasa iyiook ene nking'asia." 
Psalms68:29 Te nkaraki enkaji e Nkai te Yerusalem, te ine kiyaki iyie ilaiguanak nkishorot." 
Psalms68:30 Tabuaaki iyie nena ng'uesi naatii atua enarau, o ina luaata oo loing'ok natii te nebo ilasho le tung'ana. Nkirikirie tiabori nkejek inono lelo oong'uar kodi; ndapasha lelo oreren ooshipakino olarrabal." 
Psalms68:31 Nchoo meyauni osuyai te Misiri; nchoo Etiopia metasioki aitorioki Enkai nkaik enyena. 
Psalms68:32 Entaranyaki Enkai na kitoriat pooki e nkop; entaranyaki Olaitoriani enkisisa," 
Psalms68:33 ninye ilo okedito nkatampo te keper, ina keper e apa moitie; ng'ura, neirriu ninye oltoilo lenye, ilo toilo lenye magilani." 
Psalms68:34 Embalunye engolon e Nkai, ilo otii enkidimata enye shumata Israel, netii engolon enye atua nkatampo." 
Psalms68:35 Keitureisho Enkai ti atua ine wueji enye sinyati, ina Ai e Israel, neisho ninye engolon o enkidimata iltung'ana lenyena." 
Psalms69:1 Ntajeuoki nanu, iyie Enkai! Amu aatabaikitia nkariak emurt." 
Psalms69:2 Aimiso nanu ti atua esarng'ab te ine nemetii ewueji napik enkeju; atijing'a nanu nkariak naagut, naaya nanu olairrag le nkare." 
Psalms69:3 Anaure nanu te nkishirata ai; aatirridate ilgoso. Neiliilaitie nkonyek aainei, aanyita Enkai ai." 
Psalms69:4 Eikumok aalang ilpapit le ndukuya ai lelo laaiba nanu pesho metii emporeet; eimagil lelo laaidim nanu aaidaikie, lelo laarasaki nanu te lejare. Amaa, ina neitu nanu apurroo, kaaitalaki nanu matorrinyo taata?" 
Psalms69:5 Iyie Enkai, iyiolo iyie emodai ai; ore ntorrok nataasa, meisudoro te iyie." 
Psalms69:6 Mincho lelo likisilig iyie meitukurruni te nkaraki nanu, Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani; mincho lelo liking'oru iyie etum enkurruna te nkaraki nanu, iyie Enkai e Israel." 
Psalms69:7 Amu te nkaraki iyie pee anoto esulare, neiputa enkurruna enkomom ai." 
Psalms69:8 Atotiwuo nanu anaa oltung'ani omoni too lalashera laainei, naaku ole boo too nkera e yieyio." 
Psalms69:9 Amu aainosa nanu olom te nkaraki enkaji ino, ore nena sukenyat e lelo likisukeny iyie, naatadoikitio nanu." 
Psalms69:10 Te naitobor nanu oltau lai te mpukoroto, neaku ina enkurruna." 
Psalms69:11 Te naitaa nanu ilkuniyiani nkilani aainei, naaku nanu entoki naimakini te ninche." 
Psalms69:12 Etaa nanu ederrie lelo ootoni te kishomi, netaa nanu eokore ilamerak." 
Psalms69:13 Kake ore nanu, naa iyie airriwaki enkomono ai, Olaitoriani. Ore te nkata nang'amaroyu, iyie Enkai, tang'amayioki nanu te ina nyorrata ino nauno." 
Psalms69:14 Te ina retoto ino naisiligunoyu tokorduaki nanu maimis ti atua esarng'ab; nchooki nanu manoto enkordunoto too lmang'ati laainei, o too nkariak naagut." 
Psalms69:15 Mikincho nanu maawa oloirrag le nkare, anaa aaijoo nanu ina guton, anaa aagamaa engumoto." 
Psalms69:16 Tawalikiaki nanu, Olaitoriani, amu ore ina nyorrata ino nauno naa eisidai; ore te risioroto o lng'ur lino, mbelekenyunye enatii nanu." 
Psalms69:17 Misudoo enkomom ino to sinka lino; amu atii nanu atua osina, tasioki tawalikiaki nanu." 
Psalms69:18 Tataanikiaki nanu, tokorduaki nanu, talakuaki nanu, te nkaraki ilmang'ati laainei!" 
Psalms69:19 Iyiolo iyie esulare ai, o esulare ai o enkurruna ai; iyiolo iyie ilmang'ati laainei pooki." 
Psalms69:20 Etigila imorot oltau lai, neaku atapalari nanu, naing'oru olaaing'urrie, kake metii obo; naing'oru olaaitagol oshoke, kake eito nanu atum obo." 
Psalms69:21 Aaishoo ninche esayiet aaitaa endaa, ore aata enkure naaisho ninche siki." 
Psalms69:22 Nchoo emesa enye te dukuya ninche metaa orreshet; nchoo lelo siruai lenye loo lasarri metaa entoki narruesh ninche. 
Psalms69:23 Nchoo meitamodoki nkonyek enye pee medolisho; neikirikira mpolosi enye anaake. 
Psalms69:24 Tubukoki engoro ino shumata ninche, nincho ina goro ino nayupuyup metumurutu ninche." 
Psalms69:25 Metomijoono enkang enye, metaa metumi ae kata olojing ilng'oborri lenye." 
Psalms69:26 Amu keisilisil ninche ilo litoosho, o ilo litipika iyie olbae, neponiki ninche ninye emion oleng." 
Psalms69:27 Toponiki ninche nkitamiot te shumata nkitamiot; metaa metum ae kata ninche elaaroto te iyie. 
Psalms69:28 Nchoo metujuti nkarn enye aaiwuang'ie ti atua embuku oo looishu; nchoo metaa meigeri ninche te nebo lelo supati. 
Psalms69:29 Kake aata nanu osina naata emion; nchoo enjeunoto ino, iyie Enkai maatudumu nanu ailepunye!" 
Psalms69:30 Kaisis nanu enkarna e Nkai to sinkolio; narrep nanu ninye te nkishoroto e nashe. 
Psalms69:31 Keitiship ena Olaitoriani alang olkiteng anaa oloing'oni loo mowuarak neeta loisotok. 
Psalms69:32 Nchoo ilo oitorogonyaki metoduaa ena neng'idayu, ore intae lelo ooing'oru Enkai, enchoo epiu iltauja linyi." 
Psalms69:33 Amu kening Olaitoriani ilo oata enyamali nemerikino lelo lenyena ooena. 
Psalms69:34 Nchoo shumata o enkop meisisa ninye, o enaiposha o pooki toki naatii atua." 
Psalms69:35 Amu keitajeu Enkai Sion, neigil ashetu nkanas e Yuda; nepuo isinkan lenyena aamany ine, neya ine;" 
Psalms69:36 ore nena kera oo sinkan lenyena naa kejung ine, ore lelo oonyor enkarna enye nepuo aamany ine." 
Psalms70:1 Tonyorrai iyie Enkai, tokorduaki nanu! Olaitoriani, tasioki taretuoki nanu!" 
Psalms70:2 Nchoo metukurru nemilo lelo ooing'oru enkishui ai! Nchoo meibelekenyi ninche nesuli, lelo ooyieu naainyal!" 
Psalms70:3 Nchoo meing'asiata ninche te nkaraki enkurruna enye, lelo oojo, “Alda, Alda!”" 
Psalms70:4 Nchoo lelo pooki liking'oru iyie meting'idata neshipa ti atua iyie! Nchoo lelo pooki oonyor enjeunoto ino metejo ntarasi, “Eikitok Enkai!”" 
Psalms70:5 Kake ara nanu aisinani namena; Tasieku enatii, iyie Enkai! Iyie eretoto ai naa iyie likikordu; Olaitoriani, mimutie!" 
Psalms71:1 Iyie nanu asaru, Olaitoriani; mikincho ae kata nanu maaitukurruni!" 
Psalms71:2 Ore te supatisho ino tokorduaki nanu nikintajeu; irrugokoki enkiok ino, nikintajeu nanu!" 
Psalms71:3 Taa iyie te nanu endapidapoi e sarunoto, osempewuet ogol laaitajeu nanu, amu ira iyie endapidapoi ai nira osempewuet lai." 
Psalms71:4 Tokorduaki nanu na Enkai ai te nkaina e ilo torrono, te nkibung'ata e ilo ogogong." 
Psalms71:5 Amu ore iyie Olaitoriani, ira osiligi lai, iyie enkisiligata ai, Olaitoriani, ebaiki kitisho ai." 
Psalms71:6 Iyie nanu aigarakine ebaiki apa pee aaini, iyie apa likintayio nanu te nkoshoke e yieyio. Iyie nanu aaisis anaake." 
Psalms71:7 Atotiuo nanu anaa enking'asia too lkumok, kake ira iyie esarunoto ai nagol." 
Psalms71:8 Eiputa enkutuk ai enkisisa ino, o enkitoo ino endama pooki." 
Psalms71:9 Mikinturraa nanu te nkata e moruao; mikinturaa nanu te neishunye engolon ai. 
Psalms71:10 Amu nanu eimaki ilmang'ati laainei, ore lelo ooing'oru enkishui ai neiguana te nebo," 
Psalms71:11 nejo ninche, “Eiturrayie Enkai ninye; enepu embung'a ninye, amu meetae olokordu ninye.”" 
Psalms71:12 Iyie Enkai, mikilam iyie nanu; iyie Enkai, tasioki taretuoki nanu!" 
Psalms71:13 Nchoo meitukurruni lelo aitang'orok laainei nemuti; meitoipo ninche enkurruna o esulare, lelo ooing'oru pee aainyal." 
Psalms71:14 Kake kaaisilig nanu iyie anaake, naa kaaisis akenya o akenya." 
Psalms71:15 Neibalunye enkutuk ai nena kiaasin inono supati, nena kiaasin inono e njeunoto endama pooki, amu etogiroitie esiana enye eng'eno ai." 
Psalms71:16 Too nkiasin magil o Laitoriani nanu alotu, naa kaaisis nanu esupatisho ino, esupatisho ino ake." 
Psalms71:17 Na Ai, ore ebaiki kitisho ai kinteng'ena iyie nanu, neton ake aibalunye nkiasin inono e nking'asia." 
Psalms71:18 Neaku, ore ninye te moruao o te naaiborru endukuya, na Ai, mikintorraa nanu, o metaba anaa naibalunye enkidimata ino, too ishoritin pooki naapuonu." 
Psalms71:19 Ore engolon ino o esupatisho ino, na Ai, nebaiki keper oleng. Iyie otaasa mbaa sapuki, na Ai, kaing'ae likinyaanyukie?" 
Psalms71:20 Iyie likintoduaa nanu isinaitin kumok, iyie likintopiu nanu; ore te nguton e nkop naa eikilepunye iyie." 
Psalms71:21 Iponaa iyie enkanyit ai, nikintoki nanu aitagol oshoke." 
Psalms71:22 Kaaigil nanu aisis iyie te nkauo oo sinkolioitin te nkaraki esupatisho ino, na Ai ai, kaaranyaki nanu arrep to lwulul loo usin, iyie Lo Sinyati le Israel." 
Psalms71:23 Kabuaku te nkutuk ai te ng'ida, te naaranyaki nanu isinkolioitin le nkisisa, neng'idayu sii oltau lai, ilo apa litokordua." 
Psalms71:24 Neimaki olng'ejep lai ina retoto ino e supatisho, endama pooki, amu eitukurruaki ninche nesuli, lelo apa ooing'oru pee aainyal." 
Psalms72:1 Nchoo olaiguanani esipata ino, na Ai, nincho esupatisho ino ilo le nkaji e nkitoo!" 
Psalms72:2 Nchoo ninye meiguanaki iltung'ana linono te supatisho, neiguanaki lelo aisinak te sipata!" 
Psalms72:3 Nchoo enkop meitumurru dupoto, neyau ndoinyo esupatisho!" 
Psalms72:4 Metomitu ninye ewalata e lelo aisinak le tung'ana, nchoo enkordunoto lelo oomena, nirrar ilo oitorogonyisho!" 
Psalms72:5 Metobikoi ninye anaa enkolong, metobikoi ninye nkolong'i nabaa anaa ino lapa, ti atua iishoritin pooki." 
Psalms72:6 Metotiuo ninye anaa enchan nashaiki nkujit naatudung'oki, netiu anaa enkoirujuruji naitipitipaki enkop." 
Psalms72:7 Meibulai esupatisho too nkolong'i enyena, metuunoyu eseriani nkolong'i naabaa anaa inaabik olapa." 
Psalms72:8 Meitoria ninye ebaiki enaiposha o metabaiki enkae aiposha, neitoreisho ebaiki Olkeju le Farite o metabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop!" 
Psalms72:9 Meirrugoto ilmang'ati lenyena te dukuya ninye, metamejo ilmang'ati lenyena enterit!" 
Psalms72:10 Meitaiki ilaiguanak le Tarshishi o lelo loo lepolosi ninye nkishorot, nchoo meyau ilaiguanak le Sheba o Seba nkishorot!" 
Psalms72:11 Metabatatata ilaiguanak pooki te dukuya ninye, nchoo meisiaaiyia iloshon pooki ninye." 
Psalms72:12 Amu kekordu ninye ilo onyamal te neishiraki, neretu ilo aisinani o ilo lemeeta olaretoni." 
Psalms72:13 Keing'urrie ninye ilo oshal nemena, neitajeu enkishui e lelo oonyamal." 
Psalms72:14 Kekordu ninye ninche aitung'uaa enkitorogonyata o entorroni; naa eikirotet osarge lenye too nkonyek enyena. 
Psalms72:15 Metobikoi ninye eishu, nchoo meyakini ninye sahabu e Sheba! Nchoo metoomonokini ninye anaake, meetu imayianat shumata ninye nkatitin pooki!" 
Psalms72:16 Meiputa endaa enkop; nchoo meipiripiro ninye te nchumata oldoinyo; metotiutu ilng'anayio lenyena anaa Lebanon; naa nchoo ebul iltung'ana too nkanas aabayu anaa nkujit e ong'ata. 
Psalms72:17 Metobikoi enkarna enye ntarasi, metaa ning'oti enkarna enye anaa enkolong! Nchoo metamayiana iltung'ana ate te ninye, neipot iloshon pooki ninye aajo olomayiana!" 
Psalms72:18 Meisisi Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, laa ninye ake oas mbaa e nking'asia." 
Psalms72:19 Meisisi ina arna enye nabore olng'ur ntarasi; meiputa enkitoo enye enkop pooki! Esai, Esai!" 
Psalms72:20 Enkiting'oto e nkomono e Daudi, olayioni le Yese." 
Psalms73:1 Esipa eisupat Enkai te ilo oitoriori nkoitoi enyena, te lelo sidain iltauja." 
Psalms73:2 Kake ore ti alo nanu eyieu errorro nkejek aainei, eyieu eideketari nkejek aainei." 
Psalms73:3 Amu aata nanu olom te lelo ooitokoos, ina kata pee adol nanu dupoto e lelo arruok." 
Psalms73:4 Amu meeta ninche emion, negol naa sidain iseseni lenye." 
Psalms73:5 Meeta ninche enyamali anaa enaata iltung'ana, nemeitamei ninche anaa ilkulikae tung'ana." 
Psalms73:6 Ore enkaraki ina, olwuasa ninye osaei lenye le murt, olarrabal oimulumul ninche anaa olkila." 
Psalms73:7 Etejieita nkonyek enye te mpiron, netulusoitie mbaa enye aalang iltauja lenye." 
Psalms73:8 Neikordodisho ninche, neiro mbaa torrok; ore te nkitokoos neiro mbaa naaitorogonyie ilkulikae." 
Psalms73:9 Nebol ninche nkutukie enye aaing'orie shumata, neidapashaki ilng'ejepa lenye enkop." 
Psalms73:10 Ore enkaraki ina neibelekenya iltung'ana aaisis ninche; nemetumie ninche entioto. 
Psalms73:11 Nejo ninche, “Kaji eiko Enkai te neyiolou? Keeta eng'eno Ilo otii Shumata Aisul?”" 
Psalms73:12 Ng'ura, iltung'ana torrok kulo; neisikarra ninche anaake, neponari ninche te karsisisho." 
Psalms73:13 Pesho ake nanu aitisinya oltau lai, naituku nkaik aainei te sinyatisho." 
Psalms73:14 Amu ore endama pooki naatooshoki nanu, naaitamei nkakeny pooki." 
Psalms73:15 Naa te najo nanu, “Kalimu kuna,” anaata maaku asipani te ishoi oo nkera aainei." 
Psalms73:16 Naa te nadamu nanu ajo ayiolou kuna, naa enyamali te nanu." 
Psalms73:17 Ore ake pee alo atua ewueji sinyati e Nkai, namusu taa enkiting'oto enye." 
Psalms73:18 Esipa itipika iyie ninche iwuejitin neeideket; nchoo iyie ninche metabatatata aaidak. 
Psalms73:19 Kaji eikunakaki ninche enkidaaroto nabo kata, eishieki ninche tukul te nkiputukuny." 
Psalms73:20 Etiu ninche anaa enkidetidet te neinyototo oltung'ani, te nidumunye iyie, Olaitoriani, niwuang'ie ina golon enye." 
Psalms73:21 Te netum oltau lai emion, te neitagori oltau lai," 
Psalms73:22 naa kamoda apa nanu mayiolo toki, natiu apa nanu anaa eng'ues ti alo iyie." 
Psalms73:23 Ore ake eyia natii nanu te nebo iyie; kimbung'a iyie enkaina ai e tatene. 
Psalms73:24 Iyie likitorikoyie nanu te nkiguana ino, ore te siadi niking'amaa nanu te nkitoo ino." 
Psalms73:25 Kaing'ae nanu aata te keper leme iyie? Nemetii ai toki natii oriong enkop nang'uar nanu naadutie. 
Psalms73:26 Keidim inkiri osesen lai o ltau lai aaishunye, kake Enkai e ngolon oltau lai naa erubata ai ntarasi." 
Psalms73:27 Amu ng'ura, ore lelo likilamita iyie naa keidak; inting'ie iyie lelo arruok ti alo iyie." 
Psalms73:28 Kake ore nanu eisidai te nataaniki Enkai; aitaa nanu Olaitoriani Enkai esarunoto ai, pee atum atolimu isiaaitin inono pooki." 
Psalms74:1 Na Ai, kainyoo iyie pee nturraa iyiook ntarasi? Kainyoo pee epuru engoro ino too ntare e luaata ino?" 
Psalms74:2 Tadamu olturrur lino apa litegelaka kewan moitie, ilo apa litokordua pee eaku enjung'ore ino! Tadamu oldoinyo le Sion apa litobikie." 
Psalms74:3 Ntorioki iroruat inono iwuejitin neeidaa; einyala olmang'atinta pooki toki te wueji ino sinyati! 
Psalms74:4 Eikurrukurro ilmang'ati linono te mpolos e ine wueji sinyati; neun ninche inankan enye pee eaku olmonekie lenye le nkisulata. 
Psalms74:5 Ore te njing'et e shumata nedung'udung ninche nkeenta too ntoluo. 
Psalms74:6 Ore nena keek naagueta negiligil too nyuntui. 
Psalms74:7 Nepejoo ninche ine wueji ino sinyati, nepik olduruk ine wueji ino sinyati o metabaiki enkop." 
Psalms74:8 Nejo ninche maate, “Eikimut iyiook ninche katukul;” etapejoitie ninche iwuejitin pooki e Nkai neetumoreki ti atua ena kop." 
Psalms74:9 Meekure iyiook kiaata ilmonek lang, meekure eetae oloiboni hoo obo, nemeetae hoo obo ti atua iyiook oyiolo ajo kenkata nabaa." 
Psalms74:10 Ke nkata nabaa, Olaitoriani, eikoroj iyiook olmang'atinta? Kesukeny olmang'atinta enkarna ino ntarasi?" 
Psalms74:11 Kainyoo iyie pee inunuk enkaina ino, kainyoo iyie pee ipik enkaina ino olgoo?" 
Psalms74:12 Ore eyia, Enkai, Olaitoriani lai naa oliapa, neitobir ninye enjeunoto te mpolos e nkop." 
Psalms74:13 Iyie otooro enaiposha te nkidimata ino; itadanya iyie endukuya o lasurai ti atua nkariak. 
Psalms74:14 Itupurda iyie ilukuny e Lefitan, nincho iyie ninye ing'uesi e ntim meitaa endaa." 
Psalms74:15 Iyie oipirua nkonyek oo nkariak o erat; iyie oitoyio nkonyek oo nkariak naaruko. 
Psalms74:16 Enino endama naa enino enkewarie; iyie oitobira ewang'an o enkolong. 
Psalms74:17 Iyie otipika ilpolosien pooki le nkop; iyie oitobira enkata e nkirowuaj o enkata e nkirobi. 
Psalms74:18 Tadamu ena, Olaitoriani, ng'ura olmang'atinta eikorojisho, ore iltung'ana oomoda nesukeny enkarna ino." 
Psalms74:19 Minchooyo oltau le ina turkuluo ino aisho ing'uesi e ntim; mincho kirikino enkishui e ilo tung'ani lino aisinani ntarasi. 
Psalms74:20 Tishilai olning'o lino; amu ore iwuejitin neemisimis e nkop nebore imanyishoritin e nkarruoisho. 
Psalms74:21 Mincho ilo oitorogonyaki meitukurruni, nchoo ilo aisinani omena meisisa enkarna ino." 
Psalms74:22 Tudumunye, Na Ai, tomitu kewan; tadamu ena nikinkordod ilo omoda endama pooki!" 
Psalms74:23 Mincho kirikino oltoilo loo lmang'ati linono, ilo odoo loo nchankarri oilep anaake." 
Psalms75:1 Kincho iyiook iyie enashe, Enkai, kinchoru enashe; kimpot iyiook enkarna ino nikinken nkiaasin inono e nking'asia." 
Psalms75:2 Ore te ina kata nategeluaki, naa kaiguana nanu too sipat." 
Psalms75:3 Te neikirikira enkop o lelo pooki oomanya, nanu ilo oitasheyie ing'apeta enyena." 
Psalms75:4 Atiaaka nanu ilo owasa, “Mintoki awuasa,” najoki ilo torrono, “Midumu emowuo;" 
Psalms75:5 mishum iyie emowuo ino ailepunye, anaa iro imolesh emurt.”" 
Psalms75:6 Amu mme oloo saen, neme oloo ntoluo, neme ong'ata enkilepata;" 
Psalms75:7 kake Enkai naiguana te sipata; neitadou obo neilepunye olikae. 
Psalms75:8 Amu enkaina o Laitoriani etii enkikompe, etii enaisho naitokitok naing'oling'olaki aaitobiraki, nepiku ninye, neok lelo aarruok pooki." 
Psalms75:9 Kake kang'ida nanu ntarasi, karanyaki enkisisa e Nkai e Yakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Ore nena mowuarak pooki e ilo torrono naa kedung'oo ninye, ore mowuarak e ilo supat naa keilepieki." 
Psalms76:1 Keyioloi Enkai ti atua Yuda, eikitok enkarna enye ti atua Israel." 
Psalms76:2 Neteshetaki emanyisho enye te Salem, ewueji enye nebikie te Sion." 
Psalms76:3 Te ine wueji etigila ninye mbaa, o elong'o, o lalem, o masaa o larrabal." 
Psalms76:4 Ira iyie kitok, niata enkishiaa, alang lelo doinyo loo ntarasi." 
Psalms76:5 Ore lelo lenye oogol tauja, netooruoki pooki naata, neirragaitie ninche aaye; ore lelo tung'ana pooki lo larrabal, meidim aataasishore nkaik enye." 
Psalms76:6 Ore te nkisikong'ata ino, Na Ai e Yakobo, neirrag aaye pokira, olakedoni o embarta." 
Psalms76:7 Kake, ore iyie, naa intoreisho, kaing'ae oidim aitasho te dukuya iyie te nedumunye ngoro ino nabo kata." 
Psalms76:8 Ore itii keper nidung enkiguana ino, neureishoyu enkop neitirring'a," 
Psalms76:9 ena kata edumunye Enkai aitobir enkiguana, pee eitajeu lelo pooki ooitorogonyaki te nkop." 
Psalms76:10 Esipa eikisis iyie engoro e tung'ani; ore ilo pisiai le ngoro nien anaa enkimeita. 
Psalms76:11 Entobira ilmuma linyi to Laitoriani Enkai inyi, nintabayaya ninche; nchoo lelo pooki oomanita ninche meyau nkishorot aayaki ilo ourei," 
Psalms76:12 naa kedung ninye iltauja le lelo kituaak, ilo laa ninye eure ilaiguanak pooki le nkop." 
Psalms77:1 Aishiraka nanu Olaitoriani te mbuakunoto nabuaki Enkai pee aatum atoning'o nanu. 
Psalms77:2 Ore te nkolong e ng'olikinoto ai, naing'oru nanu Olaitoriani; ore te ina kewarie neitoriori enkaina ai menauru, neany oltau lai eitigiri." 
Psalms77:3 Kadamu nanu Enkai, naisina; naibirribir neiterre oltau lai." 
Psalms77:4 Iyie obol nkonyek aainei pee meikeno; atanyamala nanu neaku maidim airoro. 
Psalms77:5 Atadamua nanu nkolong'i e apa, nadamu ilarin liapa moitie." 
Psalms77:6 Naibirribir to ltau lai kewarie: nalimana adamisho to ltau lai. 
Psalms77:7 “Amaa, keiturraa iyiook Olaitoriani ntarasi, nemeitoki aata esupatisho katukul?" 
Psalms77:8 Keishunye enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi? Keeuo enkiting'oto oo nkisiligat enyena nkatitin pooki? 
Psalms77:9 Ketorikine Olaitoriani olng'ur? Keibooyie ninye olng'ur lenye te ngoro enye?” 
Psalms77:10 Najo nanu, “Osina lai ele, ore enkaina e tatene e Ilo otii Shumata Aisul neibelekenye.”" 
Psalms77:11 Kapik nanu ndamunot aainei nena kiaasin e nking'asia o Laitoriani; ee, kadamu nanu nena apa e nking'asia nitaasa." 
Psalms77:12 Kadamu nanu isiaaitin inono pooki, naing'asia te nena kiasin magil." 
Psalms77:13 Kesinya enkoitoi ino, Olaitoriani, kaa ai kitok anaa Enkai ang?" 
Psalms77:14 Iyie Enkai naas ine nking'asia, naa iyie oibalunye emagilanisho ino ti atua iloreren." 
Psalms77:15 Iyie otokordua iltung'ana te nkaina ino, lelo ayiok le Yakobo o Yosef." 
Psalms77:16 Ore ake pee kidol iyie nkariak, Olaitoriani, ore ake pee kidol iyie nkariak, neureishoyu ninche, ee, neikirikira enguton." 
Psalms77:17 Nebuku nkatampo enkare; neitayu oloing'ang'e enkikurrukur; neimerlel mbaa inono te pooki shoto. 
Psalms77:18 Etii oltoilo le ndarata ino atua oleimua; ore nkiwuang'at inono neitawang enkop; neikirikira enkop, neigirigiro." 
Psalms77:19 Netii apa enkoitoi ino atua enaiposha, neim enkoitoi ino atua inkariak kumok; nemelioo sii iroruat inono." 
Psalms77:20 Iyie otorikoyie iltung'ana linono anaa eluaata oo ntare, te nkaina e Musa o Aron." 
Psalms78:1 Enchoru nkiyiaa lo tung'ana laainei te nkiteng'enare ai; errugu nkiyiaa inyi too rorei le nkutuk ai! 
Psalms78:2 Kabol nanu enkutuk ai te nkitanyaanyukoto, nalimu nkirorot musan e apa," 
Psalms78:3 ntokitin apa nikitoning'o nikiyiolou, nena apa naatolikitio iyiook loo papa." 
Psalms78:4 Mikisudorie iyiook nkera enye, kake eikiliki iishoritin naapuonu, nena kiasin kituaak o Laitoriani o enkidimata enye, o nena e nking'asia apa naataasa ninye." 
Psalms78:5 Eteshetua ninye shakenisho ti atua Yakobo, negelu enkitanapata ti atua Israel, ina apa naitanapa loo papa pee eiteng'en nkera enye;" 
Psalms78:6 pee etum eishoi nasuju aaitayiolo ninche nena kera neton meino, nedumunye ninche aaliki nkera enye," 
Psalms78:7 pee etum ninche aatipik osiligi lenye Enkai, nemerikino isiaaitin e Nkai, kake pee eibung nkitanapat enyena;" 
Psalms78:8 nemetiu sii anaa loo menye, ilo porror apa ogolong'u torrono, ilo porror apa lemeuno iltauja lenye, ore enkishui enye meisiligayu te Nkai." 
Psalms78:9 Ore lelo le Efraim ootanapate too nkai, neibelekenya te nkolong o larrabal." 
Psalms78:10 Eitu ninche eibung olning'o le Nkai, kake etanyaita epuo te risioroto e nkitanapata enye." 
Psalms78:11 Nerikino ninche ina nataasa ninye, o ina apa e nking'asia naitoduaa ninye ninche." 
Psalms78:12 Ore apa too nkonyek oo loo menye neas ninye enenking'asia, tiatua enkop e Misiri, ti ong'ata e Sion." 
Psalms78:13 Etooro ninye enaiposha neisho ninche meima atua, neisho enkare meturupayu anaa olkiu." 
Psalms78:14 Ore dama nerikoo ninye ninche te nkatampoi, naa ore kewarie pooki nerikoo ninche te wang'an kitok." 
Psalms78:15 Neiper ninye ndapidapo to lpurkel, neisho ninche metooko enkare sapuk naba anaa eno lchorro." 
Psalms78:16 Neisho ninye nchorroi oo nkariak metupuku te ndapidapoi, neisho enkare meturukoyu anaa olkeju." 
Psalms78:17 Ore ake eyia, netaasa ninche ing'ok oleng ti alo ninye, negolong'aki apa ninche Ilo otii Shumata Aisul to lpurkel." 
Psalms78:18 Netem ninche Enkai too ltauja lenye, eikilikuanu endaa too ng'uarrat enye." 
Psalms78:19 Neiro ninche entorroni ti alo Enkai, ejo, “Keidim Enkai aisalaashaki iyiook emesa tene tiong'ota." 
Psalms78:20 Etoosho ninye endapidapoi nerukunye enkare, neruko ilkejek aadooyo. Keidim sii ninye aishoru imukateni, anaa eisho iltung'ana lenyena nkiri?”" 
Psalms78:21 Ore enkaraki etoning'o ake Olaitoriani ina neiput engoro; neyupuyupieki engoro metigilunore Yakobo, neitashe engoro enye te shumata Israel;" 
Psalms78:22 enkaraki nemeeta ninche enkirukoto te Nkai, neitu eisilig ina golon enye naitajeusho." 
Psalms78:23 Ore ake eyia eitanapa ninye nkatampo te shumata, nebol ildirishani le keper;" 
Psalms78:24 neitashaiki ninye ninche mana pee einos, neisho ninche enkurma e shumata." 
Psalms78:25 Neinos tung'ani endaa oo lmalaika, neirriwaki Enkai ninche endaa te nkumoi." 
Psalms78:26 Eishoo ninye olkutati lo loo saen metukutu te keper, ore te ngolong enye nerikoo osiwuo le kopikop;" 
Psalms78:27 neshau nkiri te shumata ninche anaa enterit, ntaritik naata naipuko naaba anaa osinyai loo naiposha;" 
Psalms78:28 neisho ninye ninche metadoiki empolos oo lng'oborri lenye, te manaroto pooki e manyisho enye." 
Psalms78:29 Neinos ninche neraposho oleng, amu eishoo ninye ninche ina natang'uarra." 
Psalms78:30 Kake ore eton eitu eisho ninche ing'uarrat enye, eton etii ina daa nkutukie enye," 
Psalms78:31 nedumakino engoro o Laitoriani ninche, near ninye metuata lelo lenye oogol aaisul, neirragarie lelo gelunot le Israel." 
Psalms78:32 Ore ake etii kuna pooki neton ake eas ninche ing'ok; ore hoo netii nena baa enyena e nking'asia eitu ninche eiruk. 
Psalms78:33 Ore enkaraki ina neishie ninye nkolong'i enye anaa enkiyang'et, neishie ilarin lenye te nkuretisho." 
Psalms78:34 Ore ake pee ear ninye ninche metuata, neing'oru ninche ninye; neirridu ninche neing'oru Enkai oleng." 
Psalms78:35 Nedamu ninche aajo Enkai endapidapoi enye Enkai natii shumata aisul olalakunoni lenye. 
Psalms78:36 Kake eikoroja ninche ninye too nkutukie enye, nelej ninche ninye too lng'ejepa lenye." 
Psalms78:37 Meuno iltauja lenye te ninye, medede ninche to lning'o lenye." 
Psalms78:38 Kake ore eyia te nkaraki olng'ur lenye, etapalaka nkitarruorot enye, neitu ninye eidaikie ninche; neibooyo ninye engoro enye nkatitin pooki, neitu ninye eputu engoro enye pooki." 
Psalms78:39 Nedamu ninye ajo iseseni ake ninche, enkijape naloito nemeigil arrinyunye." 
Psalms78:40 Ae katitin aja apa etogolong'akita ninche ninye ti ong'ata, neitagor ninye to lpurkel!" 
Psalms78:41 Etetema ninche ninye aaigiligil, neitagor ninche ilo Sinyati le Israel." 
Psalms78:42 Eitu ninche epik ndamunot enye engolon enye, neitu edamu ina olong apa naitajeuo ninye ninche too lmang'ati lenye;" 
Psalms78:43 ina kata apa pee eas ninye nkitoduaat enyena te Misiri, o mbaa enyena e nking'asia naataasa ti ong'ata e Sion." 
Psalms78:44 Eibelekenya ninye ilkejek lenye aitaa osarge, pee meitoki ninche aaok nena Shorroi enye." 
Psalms78:45 Neirriwaki ninye ninche emus oo lojong'a ooinosa ninche, o ntuaan naa ninche naaidaikie ninche." 
Psalms78:46 Eishoo ninye endaa enye meinosa olkurto, neisho ilng'anayio le siaai enye meinosa olmaati." 
Psalms78:47 Neinyal ninye isabibu lenye te nchan oo soito, near iretet lenye te nkirobi." 
Psalms78:48 Neisho nkishu enye metaara enchan oo soito, near nkerrai enye endarata." 
Psalms78:49 Neitadoiki ninye ninche ina pijan e ngoro enye, o engoro, o empushuna, o sina, te nebo entukus oo lmalaika ooidaikie ninche." 
Psalms78:50 Neitobir ninye enkoitoi te nkaraki engoro enye; eitu ninye emitiki ninche metuata, kake eishoo ninye enkishui enye olmeitai." 
Psalms78:51 Near ninye metuata lelo kikaunot pooki le Misiri, lelo ng'anayio lenye le dukuya ti atua olng'obor le Haam." 
Psalms78:52 Neitoki arikoo iltung'ana lenyena anaa nkerra, nerikoo ninche ti ong'ata anaa eluaata oo ntare." 
Psalms78:53 Nerikoo ninye ninche te seriani, pee meureishoyu; kake eimisie enaiposha ilmang'ati lenye." 
Psalms78:54 Neriku ninye ninche atua ina kop sinyati, enetii ilo doinyo oisulie ninye te nkaina enye e tatene." 
Psalms78:55 Nearaa ninye iloshon te dukuya ninche, neoriki ina kop enye iltung'ana lenyena neitamany iloshon le Israel ilng'oborri lenye." 
Psalms78:56 Kake ore eyia, etetemishote ninche, negolong'aki ilo otii Shumata Aisul, neitu eshilaa shakenisho enye," 
Psalms78:57 kake eibelekenyate ninche neas mbususi anaa apa loo menye; nemerregela ninche anaa enkawuo torrono. 
Psalms78:58 Amu eitagoro ninche ninye te nena wuejitin enye neeika; nepik ninche ninye olom te nena kitanyaanyukot enye naaguetuno. 
Psalms78:59 Ore ake pee ening Enkai ina, neiput ninye engoro, neany ninye tukul Israel." 
Psalms78:60 Neing'uaa ninye emanyisho enye te Shilo, ilo ng'obor apa otii ninye ti atua iltung'ana," 
Psalms78:61 neya ninye engolon enye atua eyararoto, neya enkitoo enye atua enkop oo lmang'ati." 
Psalms78:62 Neishooyo ninye iltung'ana lenyena metaari to lalem, nepik ninye engoro enye shumata ina jung'ore enye." 
Psalms78:63 Neinos enkima ilbarnot lenye, ore ntoyie enye, nelau kiyama." 
Psalms78:64 Ore lapolosak lenye nebatata too lalema, ore nena olia enye nemeishir." 
Psalms78:65 Neitoki Olaitoriani adumunye anaa oltung'ani oirora, anaa oltung'ani ogol te nebuaku etemere." 
Psalms78:66 Neosh ilmang'ati lenyena arriny siadi; nepik ninche enkurruna oo ntarasi. 
Psalms78:67 Etanya ninye olng'obor le Yosef, eitu ninye egelu olosho le Efraim;" 
Psalms78:68 kake etegelua olosho le Yuda, o ilo doinyo le Sion otonyorra ninye." 
Psalms78:69 Neshet ninye ina aji enye sinyati anaa keper, neitotiu anaa ewueji neitobiraki ntarasi." 
Psalms78:70 Etegelua ninye Daudi osinka lenye, neya ninye aitung'uaa eluaata oo ntare;" 
Psalms78:71 neitung'uaa ninye eramatata e lelo kuoo apa oonakita ooyakaki ninye, pee atum ataa olchekut le Yakobo lelo tung'ana lenyena, o Israel ina jung'ore enye." 
Psalms78:72 Ore te mborron o ltau lenye neramat ninye ninche, nerikoo ninche te nkaina e nkarriyiano." 
Psalms79:1 Na Ai, eetuo lelo limikiyiolo aajing atua enjung'ore ino; etipika ninche olminong atua enkaji ino sinyati; eitaa ninche Yerusalem olmuaate." 
Psalms79:2 Eishoo ninche mpopoki oo seseni loo sinkan linono, ilmotoni lo loing'ang'e meitaa endaa, ore lelo sinyat linono neinos ing'uesi e nkop nkiri oo seseni lenye." 
Psalms79:3 Eibukoitie isargeta lenye anaa enkare te manaroto pooki e Yerusalem, nemeetae hoo obo onukaa ninche." 
Psalms79:4 Kitaa iyiook entoki nailapi te lelo le latia ang, nesukenyi neikuyukuyaki lelo oomanita iyiook." 
Psalms79:5 Kenkata nabaa Olaitoriani? Igoro iyie ntarasi? Keyupuyup ina goro o lom lino anaa enkima? 
Psalms79:6 Tubukoki engoro ino lelo oshon limikiyiolo iyie, o shumata nena kitoriat nemeipot enkarna ino!" 
Psalms79:7 Amu eidaikie ninche Yakobo, neitomijoon emanyisho enye." 
Psalms79:8 Midamu te iyiook entorroni oo loo papa; nchoo olng'ur lino metasieku anang'are iyiook, amu eitadouoki iyiook oleng." 
Psalms79:9 Taretu iyiook, Na Ai e njeunoto ang, te nkaraki enkitoo e nkarna ino; tokordu iyiook, nipalaki iyiook ing'ok ang, te nkaraki enkarna ino!" 
Psalms79:10 Kainyoo pee ejo iloshon, “Koree Enkai enye?” Nchoo ina lap, apa enkibukoroto o sarge loo sinkan linono metayiolouni too loshon pooki te dukuya nkonyek ang!" 
Psalms79:11 Nchoo ilo kiyioi le lelo ooena meeu dukuya iyie; ore te risioroto e ngolon ino kitok tagolie lelo ootudung'okoki keeya! 
Psalms79:12 Ntalaa katitin naapishana lelo le latia ang too lgooitie lenye nena kilapat apa nikilapa ninche iyie, Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms79:13 Ore taa iyiook iltung'ana linono, ina luaata e nkirrita ino, nikincho iyie enashe ntarasi; ore ebaiki iishoritin o ishoritin, nikilimu enkisisa ino." 
Psalms80:1 Nchoru enkiok Lo Airritani le Israel, iyie ilo orikoo Yosef anaa eluaata oo ntare! Iyie ilo otii olorika le nkitoo te nchumata oo lkerubi," 
Psalms80:2 nintawang'isho te dukuya Efraim o Benchamen o Manase, tuputu enkidimata ino, nilotu aitajeu iyiook!" 
Psalms80:3 Torrinyu iyiook, Na Ai; nchoo enkomom ino ewang'u, pee etumi aaitajeu iyiook!" 
Psalms80:4 Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani, kenkata nabaa iyie igorokino enkomono oo ltung'ana linono?" 
Psalms80:5 Nintotio iyie ninche te mukate oo lkiyio, nincho ninche metooko ilkiyio te nkumoi." 
Psalms80:6 Nintaa iyiook ilmang'ati too le latia ang; ore ilmang'ati lang nekueni maate. 
Psalms80:7 Torrinyu iyiook, Na Ai oo lororani; nchoo enkomom ino metawang'a, pee etumi aaitajeu iyiook!" 
Psalms80:8 Iyie oyaua isabibu aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri; iyie otarayie iloshon niun ilo sabibu. 
Psalms80:9 Iyie oitukut enkop te nkaraki ninye; neibung ntona naapuo atua enkop neiput enkop. 
Psalms80:10 Neitoip oloip lenye ildoinyo, neitoip ilng'osil lenyena iltarakua sapuki;" 
Psalms80:11 nereu ilng'osil lenyena aitabaiki enaiposha, neitabaiki ntona enyena olkeju." 
Psalms80:12 Kainyoo naa iyie pee itigila enkikarrata enye, neaku ore pooki oogiroo aaim enkoitoi, neng'osilu ilng'anayio lenyena?" 
Psalms80:13 Neinyala ilbitiro le ntim ninye, ore nena pooki naapuo ti ong'ata neinos ninye." 
Psalms80:14 Nyaaki mbelekenyunye, Na Ai oo lororani! Ing'ura kop itii shumata, nidol, tishilai ele sabibu," 
Psalms80:15 ilo shani lituuno iyie te nkaina ino e tatene. 
Psalms80:16 Etapejoitie ninche ninye te nkurma, netudung'o ninche aauroo; meidaa ninche te nkisikong'ata e nkomom ino!" 
Psalms80:17 Kake nchoo enkaina ino elotu shumata ilo le nkaina ino e tatene, ina kerai e tung'ani nintagolo iyie te nkaraki kewan ino!" 
Psalms80:18 Nemikingil ae kata iyiook aaibelekenya aaing'uaa iyie; nchoo iyiook enkishui, pee kitum aaipoto enkarna ino!" 
Psalms80:19 Torrinyu iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani! Nchoo enkomom ino metawang'a, pee etumi aaitajeu iyiook!" 
Psalms81:1 Entabuaku entaranyaki Enkai engolon ang; entabuaaki te ng'ida Enkai e Yakobo! 
Psalms81:2 Elepie osinkolio, nioshiosho enkinanta, ina kinanta e nkopito sidai enkorui o endule." 
Psalms81:3 Entoosh entarumpeta te nduaata o lapa, te nepurupuranayu olapa, te ina olong ang o sirua." 
Psalms81:4 Amu enkitanapata ina te Israel, elimunoto e Nkai e Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Eibalunye apa ninye te Yosef, ina kata apa pee eipang ninye alo te nkop e Misiri. Aning'ito nanu oltoilo leitu ayiolou:" 
Psalms81:6 “Aiwuang'ie nanu olola to loililai lino; eyeng'iyeng'ate nkaik inono te napata e nkikapu. 
Psalms81:7 Ore te nkata o sina kimpoto iyie nanu, naatokordua nanu; aatawalikia nanu iyie te ine wueji e nkisudoroto e ndarata; aatetema nanu iyie too nkariak e Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Entoning, lo tung'ana laainei, te naikok nanu intae! Oo Israel, oi siaake tenaa eikining nanu!" 
Psalms81:9 Mejing enkai omoni atua intae; emirrugo aaserem enkai omoni. 
Psalms81:10 Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo apa likiyaua aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri. Tang'a enkutuk ino pe aiput nanu." 
Psalms81:11 Kake eitu ening iltung'ana laainei oltoilo lai; nemaayieu nanu Israel. 
Psalms81:12 Neaku aishooyie nanu te ina golon oo ltauja lenye, metusuja nkiguanat enye." 
Psalms81:13 Oi napaji tenaa kaaning iltung'ana laainei, pee etum Israel ashomo too nkoitoi aainei!" 
Psalms81:14 Etaa nanu kasioki amir ilmang'ati lenye, naibelekenyaki nanu enkaina ai ilmang'ati lenye." 
Psalms81:15 Ore lelo ooiba Olaitoriani nepuonu aaitoborruo te dukuya ninye, ore ina kitamioto enye nebik ntarasi." 
Psalms81:16 Kaaitoti nanu iyie te nkano sidai aisul, ore te ina aisho naing'uaa endapidapoi naaitaraposh iyie.”" 
Psalms82:1 Etii Enkai ewueji enye ti atua eumata enye; ore te mpolos oo nkaitin neiguana ninye: 
Psalms82:2 “Kenkata nabaa iyie inguana too ntorrok, nintodolu oloshomitore te ilo torrono?" 
Psalms82:3 Nguanaki te sipata ilo omena o ilo okishi; mbung'a esipata e ilo oata osina o ilo okishi. 
Psalms82:4 Tokordu ilo oshal o ilo aisinani; tokordu ninche ntung'uai enkaina e ilo torrono.” 
Psalms82:5 Meeta ninche eng'eno nemedamisho, nepuo ninche aamanimanaa te naimin; eikirikirate ilkitamanyunot pooki le nkop." 
Psalms82:6 Najo nanu, “Irara intae nkaitin, nkera e ilo Otii Shumata Aisul, intae pooki;" 
Psalms82:7 ore ake eyia, iyeye intae anaa iltung'ana, nibatatata anaa pooki tung'ani kitok.”" 
Psalms82:8 Tudumunye, iyie Enkai, nguanare enkop; amu ilkulinono iloreren pooki!" 
Psalms83:1 Iyie Enkai, mintoki iyie agira; migira nemintirring'a, Iyie Enkai!" 
Psalms83:2 Amu ng'ura, ebuakita ilmang'ati linono; neilepie lukuny lelo likimba iyie." 
Psalms83:3 Neitobir nkitobirat torrok too ltung'ana linono, neiguanakino te nebo pee ear lelo litomituo iyie." 
Psalms83:4 Nejo ninche, “Wootu, matujutu ninche aaishie anaa olosho, nchoo enkarna e Israel eaku meigili ae kata aadamu!”" 
Psalms83:5 Ee, neiguanakino ninche to ltau obo; neitobir ninche olning'o pee kitum aataarare iyie -" 
Psalms83:6 o lelo ng'oborri le Edom o le Ishmael, o le Moab o le Hagari," 
Psalms83:7 o Gebal, o Amon o Amaleki, o Filistia te nebo lelo oomanya Turo;" 
Psalms83:8 eibung'are sii Asiria ninche; ninche engolon oo nkera e Lutu. 
Psalms83:9 Intaasa ninche enapa nintaasa Midian, o Sisera o Yabin to lkeju le Kishon," 
Psalms83:10 lelo apa ooidaikieki te Endor, lelo otaa nkik te nkop." 
Psalms83:11 Intotiwuo lelo kituaak lenye anaa Orebu o Seebu, nintotiu ilkituaak lenye pooki anaa Seba o Salmuna," 
Psalms83:12 lelo apa ootejo, “Mawaita ena kop e Nkai aaitaa enaang.”" 
Psalms83:13 Iyie Enkai ai, ntaa ninche olemua, nchoo etiu anaa suut naakutaa osiwuo." 
Psalms83:14 Ore anaa enaaibung enkima entim, o anaa enalo olng'ejep le nkima enchumata o ldoinyo," 
Psalms83:15 neijia nkuna, tusujai ninche to lkutati lino, nturia ninche to lemua lino!" 
Psalms83:16 Mputa nkomomi enye enkurruna, pee etum ninche aaing'oru enkarna ino, iyie Olaitoriani." 
Psalms83:17 Nchoo ninche meitukurruni, neidang ntarasi; nchoo ninche meidaa te sulare." 
Psalms83:18 Nchoo ninche metayiolo nchere iyie ake openy eji enkarna Olaitoriani, iyie Otii Shumata Aisul te nkop pooki." 
Psalms84:1 Kebaa esidano e nkaji ino, Olaitoriani loo lororani!" 
Psalms84:2 Keyieu oltau lai, ee, naa keiterriakino enkaji o Laitoriani; neranyaki te ng'ida oltau lai o sesen lai Enkai naishu." 
Psalms84:3 Enoto sii ninye entiitiit ewueji, netum enkomerei enkaji, ewueji neirragakinyie nkera enyena, too lpereren linono loo lasarri, iyie Olaitoriani loo lororani, Olaitoriani lai naa Enkai ai." 
Psalms84:4 Emayiana iloobik ti atua enkaji ino, nebik aarany enkisisa ino!" 
Psalms84:5 Emayiana lelo tung'ana laa atua iyie etii engolon enye, lelo oata too ltauja lenye, nena oitoi kituaak naapuo Sion." 
Psalms84:6 Ore epuoito ninche aaim oerata le Baka, neitotiu ninche ine anaa nkonyek oo nkariak; ore ilkisirat le dukuya le nchan neiput ine ilchorroi." 
Psalms84:7 Nepuo ninche eponari engolon enye ore ina Ai oo nkaitin nepuoi aadol te Sion. 
Psalms84:8 Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai, iyie Enkai oo lororani, toning'o enkomono ai; irrugu enkiok, iyie Enkai e Yakobo!" 
Psalms84:9 Toduaa iyie Enkai, na long'o ang, ing'ura enkomom e ilo lino litubukoko eilata aput!" 
Psalms84:10 Amu enkolong nabo ti atua enkaji ino naikash alang nkolong'i enkalifu nabo te dikae. Enaikash nanu te naaku olarriponi te kutuk aji e nkaji e Nkai ai, alang te nabik too lng'oborri le nkarruoisho."
