Psalms84:11 Amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai naa enkolong naa elong'o; naa keishoru ninye omom o enkitoo. Meetae entoki sidai namit Olaitoriani te lelo oopuo too ltauja sidain. 
Psalms84:12 Olaitoriani loo lororani, emayiana ilo tung'ani likisilig iyie." 
Psalms85:1 Olaitoriani, ira apa iyie supat te nkop ino; itorrinyuo iyie olpisiai le Yakobo." 
Psalms85:2 Itapalaka iyie entorroni oo ltung'ana linono, nipalaki iyie ing'ok enye pooki." 
Psalms85:3 Itorrinyo iyie engoro ino pooki; nimbelekenya iyie aing'uaa ina goro ino napi. 
Psalms85:4 Ngila torrinyu iyiook, Iyie Enkai e njeunoto ang, niwuang'ie engoro ino te iyiook!" 
Psalms85:5 Eigorokino iyie iyiook ntarasi? Eintoodor iyie engoro ino aitabaiki iishoritin pooki? 
Psalms85:6 Eimingil iyie aitopiu iyiook, pee etum iltung'ana linono aating'idata te iyie?" 
Psalms85:7 Ntoduaa iyiook enyorrata ino nauno, Olaitoriani, nincho iyiook enjeunoto ino." 
Psalms85:8 Nchooki nanu matoning'o enajo Olaitoriani Enkai, amu keiro ninye eseriani too ltung'ana lenyena, too sinyat lenyena o te lelo ooibelekenyakino ninye too ltauja lenye." 
Psalms85:9 Esipa ketaana enjeunoto enye te lelo ooure ninye, pee etum enkitoo atobiko te nkop ang." 
Psalms85:10 Ketumo enyorrata nauno o esupatisho, neng'ututa esupatisho o eseriani te nebo." 
Psalms85:11 Nebulu ailepu te nkop esupatisho, neirrugo esupatisho te shumata aing'or enkop." 
Psalms85:12 Ee, keishoru Olaitoriani ina sidai, ore enkop ang neiu ilng'anayio kumok." 
Psalms85:13 Kelo esupatisho te dukuya ninye, neitaa iroruat enyena enkoitoi." 
Psalms86:1 Irrugu enkiok ino, iyie Olaitoriani, nikiwaliki nanu, amu kara nanu aisinani namena." 
Psalms86:2 Tagolie enkishui ai, amu ara nanu olaseremani le Nkai; ntajeu osinka lino likisilig iyie." 
Psalms86:3 Ira iyie Enkai ai; ing'urrieki nanu, Olaitoriani, amu iyie nanu aishiraki endama pooki." 
Psalms86:4 Ntishipa oltau lo sinka lino, amu iyie nanu, Olaitoriani, ailepakinye oltau lai." 
Psalms86:5 Amu iyie, iyie Olaitoriani osupat, nipalaki ing'ok, nibik te nyorrata nauno te lelo pooki likimpot iyie." 
Psalms86:6 Toning'o, Olaitoriani, enkomono ai; toning'o enkomono ai e sayiata." 
Psalms86:7 Ore te nkolong ai oo ng'olikinot, aaipoto nanu iyie, amu eikiwaliki iyie nanu." 
Psalms86:8 Meetae likae likinyaanyukie iyie ti atua nkaitin, Olaitoriani, nemeetae kulie siaitin naanyaanyukie nkuninono." 
Psalms86:9 Ore lelo oreren pooki lintobira iyie naa kepuonu, neirrugo te dukuya iyie, Olaitoriani, naa keisis ninche enkarna ino." 
Psalms86:10 Amu ira iyie kitok nias mbaa e nking'asia, iyie ake openy Enkai." 
Psalms86:11 Nteng'enaki nanu enkoitoi ino, Olaitoriani, pee atum nanu ashomo te sipata ino; nchoo oltau lai meturia enkarna ino." 
Psalms86:12 Kaaisho nanu iyie enashe, Olaitoriani, Enkai ai, to ltau lai pooki, naa kaisis nanu enkarna ino ntarasi." 
Psalms86:13 Amu eikitok ina nyorrata ino nauno ti alo nanu, itokordua iyie enkishui ai aitung'uaa enguton e nemeneng'a." 
Psalms86:14 Iyie Enkai, aatudumakinote nanu iltung'ana oouasa aarare; eing'oru entukus oo ltung'ana oouasa enkishui ai, nimikishilaa ninche iyie." 
Psalms86:15 Kake ore iyie Olaitoriani, ira Enkai o lng'ur niata osotua, nimisioki agoro, nibik te nyorrata nauno, nira oloisiligayu." 
Psalms86:16 Mbelekenyayu ng'uraki nanu, niking'urrie nanu; nchoo osinka lino engolon ino, nintajeu ina kerai e sinka ino." 
Psalms86:17 Ntoduaaki nanu olmonekie le omom ino, paa ore lelo laaiba nanu nedol nekurru, amu iyie, Olaitoriani, likitareto nanu nikintagol nanu." 
Psalms87:1 Enchumata eilo doinyo sinyati etii ina anasa nateshetua ninye; 
Psalms87:2 kenyor Olaitoriani nchomito e Sion, aitalang imanyishoritin pooki e Yakobo." 
Psalms87:3 Mbaa e nkitoo eimakini ti alo iyie, na anasa e Nkai." 
Psalms87:4 Ore te lelo laayiolo nanu, aimaki Rahabu o Babilon; ng'ura, etii Filistia, o Turo o Etiopia - nejo ninche, “Etoiuoki ele teine.”" 
Psalms87:5 Naa ore ti alo Sion naa keji, “Ore elde o elde netoiuoki ti atua ninye”; amu Ilo otii Shumata Aisul olo aitasheyie ninye." 
Psalms87:6 Keiken Olaitoriani nesir iltung'ana, “Ore ele netoiuoki apa teine.”" 
Psalms87:7 Ore lelo aranyak o looiguran, nejo, “Ore nchorroi aainei pooki naa atua iyie etii.”" 
Psalms88:1 Iyie Olaitoriani, Enkai ai, iyie nanu aipot taretuoki dama; naishir nanu kewarie te dukuya iyie." 
Psalms88:2 Nchoo enkomono ai meeu dukuya iyie, irrugu enkiok ino toning'o enkishirata ai!" 
Psalms88:3 Amu eiputa oltau lai enyamali; netataanikia enkishui ai enemeneng'a! 
Psalms88:4 Aaikenakaki nanu lelo oodoiki engumoto; ara nanu oltung'ani lemeeta engolon," 
Psalms88:5 atotiuo anaa oltung'ani oiturrayioki ti atua ilootuata, anaa oltung'ani otaraki metua neirragieki te ngumoto, anaa ltung'ana lemeekure edamuni, amu eiwuang'ieki ninche te nkaina ino." 
Psalms88:6 Kitipika iyie nanu atua enguton e ngumoto, iwuejitin neemisimis negut." 
Psalms88:7 Eirragita engoro ino nairoishi te shumata nanu, nikindaikie nanu too lopir lo siwuo lino." 
Psalms88:8 Nchoo iyie lelo le ncholuek ai maaitiaa nanu, kintaa iyie nanu entoki naitureisho te ninche. Aaikenoyioki nanu metaa maidim atuluai," 
Psalms88:9 eiliilaitie nkonyek aainei te nkaraki osina. Ore nkolong'i pooki naipot nanu iyie Olaitoriani, Nailepie aitorioo nkaik aainei te nkomono." 
Psalms88:10 Ias iyie mbaa e nking'asia too lootuata? Eikinyototo iloipi aaisis iyie? 
Psalms88:11 Keibalunyeki ina nyorrata ino nauno ti atua enkurare, anaa esupatisho ino te Abadon?" 
Psalms88:12 Keyioloi mbaa inono e nking'asia ti atua enaimin, anaa ina retoto ino naitajeusho te nkop nemedamuni?" 
Psalms88:13 Kake ore nanu, Olaitoriani, iyie aishiraka; ore tadekenya nelotu enkomono ai dukuya iyie." 
Psalms88:14 Olaitoriani, kainyoo pee kinturrayie nanu, kainyoo iyie pee kisudorie nanu enkomom ino?" 
Psalms88:15 Aainosa nanu osina neyieu aye apa ebaiki kitisho ai, aisilisile nanu too nkituriat inono; ataa nanu pesho." 
Psalms88:16 Aaisiasha nanu engoro ino; aaidaikie nanu ioshot inono. 
Psalms88:17 Aatamana ninche anaa olairrag le nkare endama pooki; naaman ninche aang'adu te nebo. 
Psalms88:18 Nchoo iyie ilchoreta laainei laning'ore maaitiaa nanu, netaa iltung'ana enaimin ake aisiritore." 
Psalms89:1 Karany nanu osinkolio le ina nyorrata ino nauno, Olaitoriani, ntarasi; ore te nkutuk ai, naa kalimu nanu esupatisho ino ti atua iishoritin pooki." 
Psalms89:2 Amu ore ina nyorrata ino nauno neitasheyieki ntarasi, ore esupatisho ino nemeigusugusieki, etiu anaa keper." 
Psalms89:3 Itejo iyie, “Aitobira nanu olning'o lai te nebo ilo lai gelunoti, ainosie nanu Daudi osinka lai olmumai:" 
Psalms89:4 ‘Kaitubul nanu eishoi ino ntarasi, nashetu olorika lino le nkitoo too ishoritin pooki.’ ”" 
Psalms89:5 Nchoo keper meisisa mbaa inono e nking'asia, iyie Olaitoriani, o esupatisho ino ti atua eumata e lelo sinyat!" 
Psalms89:6 Amu kaing'ae to loing'ang'e eidimi aaitanyaanyukie Olaitoriani? Kaing'ae ti atua lelo le keper onyaanyukie Olaitoriani. 
Psalms89:7 Iyie Enkai naurei ti atua enkiguana e lelo sinyat, kitok neitureisho, nelusoo ninye te lelo pooki oomanita ninye?" 
Psalms89:8 Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani, kalo olmagilani anaa iyie, Olaitoriani, nikimanita iyie esupatisho ino?" 
Psalms89:9 Iyie oitore engolon e naiposha, naa te nedumunye ilopir lenyena, nintirring'ie ninche." 
Psalms89:10 Iyie otarrarra Rahabu anaa empopong, iyie oidapasha ilmang'ati linono te nkaina ino." 
Psalms89:11 Enino keper naa enino enkop; o enkop o pooki toki natii atua, iyie oitobirua ninche." 
Psalms89:12 Ore moikuape o kopikop iyie oitobirua ninche; ore Tabori o Hermon neisis enkarna ino te ng'ida. 
Psalms89:13 Iata iyie enkaina magilani; kegol enkaina ino, neado enkaina ino e tatene." 
Psalms89:14 Esupatisho o esipata ninche olkitamanyunoto lo lorika lino le nkitoo; nelo esupatisho o enyorrata nauno te dukuya iyie. 
Psalms89:15 Emayiana lelo tung'ana ooyiolo embuakunoto o sinkolio lo sirua, lelo, Olaitoriani, oopuo te wang'an e nkomom ino," 
Psalms89:16 lelo oong'ida te nkaraki enkarna ino endama pooki, neisis ninche esupatisho ino." 
Psalms89:17 Amu iyie enkisisa e ngolon enye; ore te nkaraki omom ino neishur iyiook emouo. 
Psalms89:18 Amu ore elong'o ang naa eno laitoriani, ore olaiguanani lang naa oleilo sinyati le Israel." 
Psalms89:19 Ore tiapa, nirorie iyie te nduaata, ilo lino oisiligayu nijo, “Atipika nanu enkopiyia e nkitoo endukuya e obo magilani, aishoo nanu enkitoo ilo otegelutua iltung'ana." 
Psalms89:20 Anoto nanu Daudi osinka lai; atubukoko nanu ninye eilaata sinyati aput; 
Psalms89:21 pee etum enkaina ai ataa te nebo ninye, neitagol sii enkaina ai ninye." 
Psalms89:22 Memir ae kata ilmang'ati ninye, nemelo ilo torrono aitore ninye." 
Psalms89:23 Karrar nanu ilmang'ati lenyena te dukuya ninye, naosh anang'ie enkop lelo ooiba ninye." 
Psalms89:24 Ore esupatisho ai o enyorrata ai nauno naa keaku te nebo ninye, ore te nkarna ai neishur emowuo enye." 
Psalms89:25 Kalo nanu apik enkaina enye enchumata e naiposha, napik enkaina enye e tatene shumata ilkejek." 
Psalms89:26 Kaaishiraki ninye nanu, ejo, ‘Ira iyie Papa, Enkai ai o endapidapoi e njeunoto ai.’" 
Psalms89:27 Naa kaitaa nanu ninye olkikau lai, ole shumata too laiguanak le nkop." 
Psalms89:28 Kaibung nanu ti alo ninye ina nyorrata ai nauno ntarasi, ore olning'o lai nemeigusugus ti alo ninye." 
Psalms89:29 Kaitubul nanu eishoi enye ntarasi, nebikoo olorika lenye le nkitoo anaa inkolong'i e keper." 
Psalms89:30 Te neany nkera enyena enkitanapata ai, nemepuo te risioroto oo nkikoot aainei," 
Psalms89:31 te nepaashare ninche nkikoot aainei, nemeibung nkitanapat aainei," 
Psalms89:32 naa kaitame nanu nena kitarruorot enye te ng'udi; naitame entorroni enye te nkitamioto nairoua; 
Psalms89:33 kake maiwuang'ie nanu te ninye ina nyorrata ai nauno, aashu ariat esupatisho ai." 
Psalms89:34 Magil nanu olning'o lai lo sotua, anaa aibelekeny ilo rorei otupukuo te nkutuk ai." 
Psalms89:35 Atimitunye nanu ainos olmumai te sinyatisho ai; malej nanu Daudi. 
Psalms89:36 Kebikoo eishoi enye ntarasi, nebikoo olorika lenye le nkitoo anaa enkolong te dukuya nanu." 
Psalms89:37 Ketiu anaa olapa, keitasheyieki ntarasi; keitashe ninye auno anaa enabik oloing'ang'e.”" 
Psalms89:38 Kake ore taata inturrayie iyie nimbayie, kimputa iyie engoro te nkaraki ilo lino litubukoko eilata aput." 
Psalms89:39 Itanya iyie olning'o te nebo osinka lino, nimpurupuro iyie enkopiyia enye e nkitoo te nterit." 
Psalms89:40 Ituroyie iyie isunta enyena pooki; intomijoono iyie lelo sempewueti lenyena. 
Psalms89:41 Ore lelo pooki oogiroo nepur ninye, etaa ninye entoki nakueniyie ile latia enye." 
Psalms89:42 Ntagolo iyie enkaina oo lmang'ati lenye; ntishipa iyie ilmang'ati lenyena pooki. 
Psalms89:43 Mbelekenya iyie empijan o lalem lenye, neitu ncho ninye meitasho to larrabal." 
Psalms89:44 Iwuang'ie iyie eng'udi e nkitoria te nkaina enye, ninang'aki olorika lenye le nkitoo enkop." 
Psalms89:45 Ntodorropa iyie nkolong'i enyena e kitisho, nimulumula ninye te nkurruna." 
Psalms89:46 Kenkata nabaa, Olaitoriani, isudoo iyie kewan, ae ntarasi? Kenkata nabaa eyupuyup engoro ino anaa enkima?" 
Psalms89:47 Tadamu Olaitoriani eneba entemata e nkishui, ae te nyoo iyie intobira nkera pooki e tung'ana!" 
Psalms89:48 Kalo tung'ani oishu nemedol ae kata keeya? Kalo oidim atokordu oltau lenye aitung'uaa engolon e nemeneng'a? 
Psalms89:49 Olaitoriani, koree enapa nyorrata ino nauno, enapa ninosie iyie olmumai o Daudi te nkaraki esupatisho ino?" 
Psalms89:50 Tadamu, Olaitoriani, ina nakueniyie osinka lino; anapita nanu to lgoo lai imorot e tung'ana," 
Psalms89:51 nena naamor ilmang'ati, linono Olaitoriani, nena naamorie iroruat e ilo lino otubukokoki eilata aaput." 
Psalms89:52 Meisisi Olaitoriani ntarasi! Esai, Esai." 
Psalms90:1 Olaitoriani, iyie emanyisho ang, ti atua iishoritin pooki." 
Psalms90:2 Ore apa eton eitu eitobiruni ildoinyo, aashu enkop pooki, ebaiki ntarasi o ntarasi, iyie Enkai." 
Psalms90:3 Irrinyoki iyie tung'ani meshomo enterit, nijo, “Entorrinyoto, na kera e tung'ana!”" 
Psalms90:4 Amu ore ilarin enkalifu nabo too nkonyek inono netiu anaa ng'ole te nelusoo, aashu anaa erripore e nkewarie." 
Psalms90:5 Ioroo iyie iltung'ana aiwuang'ie; netiu ninche anaa enkidetidet, netiu anaa nkujit naaipilipil tadekenya;" 
Psalms90:6 ore tadekenya neitapuku neipilipil, ore teipa nemuguta netoyu." 
Psalms90:7 Amu eidaikie iyiook engoro ino; ore te nkaraki engoro ino nikiruto iyiook. 
Psalms90:8 Itipika iyie nkitarruorot ang dukuya iyie, ore nena ng'ok ang naaisudoro netii dukuya nkonyek inono." 
Psalms90:9 Amu etulusoitie nkolong'i ang pooki tiabori engoro ino, naa keiting ilarin lang anaa enkiyang'ata." 
Psalms90:10 Ore larin te nkishui ang naa ntomoni naapishana, naa ntomoni isiet te nikigol; ore to lelo arin naa enkisiaayiare ake o sina; nalusoo aasiooyo, nikipuo sii iyiook aish." 
Psalms90:11 Aing'ae oiguanare engolon e ngoro ino, o empushuna ino te risioroto e uriata ino?" 
Psalms90:12 Nteng'ena naa iyiook enkikenata oo nkolong'i ang, pee kitum aanoto oltau le ng'eno nagut." 
Psalms90:13 Torrinyunye, Olaitoriani, O anu akenya? Ing'urrie isinkan linono!" 
Psalms90:14 Ntaraposho iyiook anaake tadekenya te ina nyorrata ino nauno, pee kitum aating'idata nikishipa too nkolong'i ang pooki." 
Psalms90:15 Nting'ida iyiook too nkolong'i kumok naaba anaa ininosie iyiook osina, too larin ooba anaa ilikitodolie entorroni." 
Psalms90:16 Nchoo meibalunyeki esiaai ino too sinkan linono, neibalunyeki ina golon ino kitok too nkera enye." 
Psalms90:17 Nchoo esupatisho o Laitoriani Enkai ang elotu shumata iyiook, nintagol iyie esiaai oo nkaik ang te shumata iyiook, ee, ntagolo iyie esiaai oo nkaik ang." 
Psalms91:1 Ore ilo obik to lng'obor le ilo otii Shumata aisul; ilo obik ti atua oloip lo lmagilani," 
Psalms91:2 kelo ajoki Olaitoriani, “Esarunoto ai naa osempewuet lai; Enkai ai naa ninye aisilig.”" 
Psalms91:3 Amu eikikordu ninye iyie aitayu te ilo rreshet lo larreshoni, o too lmeita torrok;" 
Psalms91:4 eikimulumul ninye too naipuko enyena, ore ti abori inaipuko enyena nitum esarunoto; ore esupatisho enye naa elong'o o emitunoto." 
Psalms91:5 Mitum iyie enkuretisho kewarie, nimikitum embae nang'oruni dama," 
Psalms91:6 anaa olmeitai olo ti atua enaimin, anaa te nkidaata namutisho te ndama." 
Psalms91:7 Keidim aatabatata iltung'ana enkalifu nabo te mbata ino, nebatata nkalifuni tomon te nkalo ino e tatene, kake mikinyikaki iyie." 
Psalms91:8 Eing'or ake too nkonyek inono, nidol elaakinoto oo larruok." 
Psalms91:9 Ore enkaraki nintaa Olaitoriani esarunoto ino, nintaa Ilo Otii Shumata Aisul emanyisho ino," 
Psalms91:10 meetae entorroni nalotu enitii, meetae olmeitai onyikaki olng'obor lino." 
Psalms91:11 Amu keisho ninye olmalaika lenye mikitagolie iyie, nikirrip too nkoitoi inono pooki." 
Psalms91:12 Nikinap ninche too nkaik enye, pee minkob ake osoit te nkeju ino." 
Psalms91:13 Ilo iyie aroro olng'atuny o enturbubua, intuny iyie olng'atuny o lasurai too nkejek inono." 
Psalms91:14 Ejo Olaitoriani, “Ore enkaraki naatonyorra ninye nanu, kakordu nanu ninye; kamitu nanu ninye, enkaraki nayiolo ninye enkarna ai." 
Psalms91:15 Te naaipot ninye nanu nawaliki nanu ninye; kaaku nanu te nebo ninye te nkata e nyamali, kamitu nanu ninye nayanyitu ninye." 
Psalms91:16 Naitaraposh ninye te nkishui naado, naitodol ninye enjeunoto ai." 
Psalms92:1 Eisidai te neishori Olaitoriani enashe, pee eranyi enkisisa e nkarna ino, iyie Olotii shumata Aisul;" 
Psalms92:2 pee eibalunyeki ina nyorrata ino nauno tadekenya, o esupatisho ino te nkewarie," 
Psalms92:3 to sinkolio le nkinanta o usin, o enkawuo oo sinkolioitin o to lkerempe lo lwulul loo usin." 
Psalms92:4 Amu iyie, Olaitoriani, likintishipa nanu te siaai ino; ore too siaitin oo nkaik inono narany nanu te ng'ida." 
Psalms92:5 Kebaa enkitoo oo siaitin inono, Olaitoriani! Kegut oleng ndamunot inono!" 
Psalms92:6 Meyiolou oltung'ani omoda, meyiolou olkiminchali kuna baa:" 
Psalms92:7 nchere, ore hoo nebul ilarruok anaa olkujita, nedupoyu ilarruok pooki, enkidaata ninche epuo ntarasi," 
Psalms92:8 kake ore iyie, Olaitoriani, itii shumata ntarasi." 
Psalms92:9 Amu ng'ura, ilmang'ati linono, Olaitoriani, ng'ura, keidak ilmang'ati linono, ore lelo arruok naa keisardakieki." 
Psalms92:10 Amu itudumua iyie emowuo ai anaa emowuo olosokuan; nikitubukoko nanu eilata ng'ejuk. 
Psalms92:11 Etoduaa nkonyek aainei embatatata oo lmang'ati laainei, etoning'o nkiyiaa aainei entorroni e lelo mang'ati laainei." 
Psalms92:12 Kebul ilo supat anaa oltukai, nebulu anaa oltarakuai te Lebanon." 
Psalms92:13 Etuunoki ninche ti atua enkaji o Laitoriani, nebul ninche too lgorieti le Nkai ang." 
Psalms92:14 Neton ake eiu ninche ilng'anayio te moruao enye, nebulu ninche aalitu nenyori anaake," 
Psalms92:15 pee eitodolu nchere eisupat Olaitoriani; ninye endapidapoi ai, nemetii entorroni atua ninye." 
Psalms93:1 Olaitoriani oitoreisho; eishope ninye te nkitoo; eishope Olaitoriani, neterretene ninye aishop engolon. Ee, eitasheyieki enkop, nemeigusugusieki ae kata;" 
Psalms93:2 eitasheyieki olorika lino le nkitoo apa moitie; itii iyie ebaiki apa ntarasi. 
Psalms93:3 Etudumutua inaaiposha iltoiloishi lenye, iyie Olaitoriani nedumu ninche oltoilo lenye o enkikurrukur." 
Psalms93:4 Magilani ninye alang indarat oo nkariak kumok, kitok alang ilopir le naiposha, Ore Olaitoriani otii shumata naa magilani." 
Psalms93:5 Esipa nkitanapat inono eishiaakino esinyatisho enkaji ino iyie Olaitoriani, ntarasi." 
Psalms94:1 Olaitoriani, ira iyie Enkai e lap, Iyie Enkai e lap, tawang'a!" 
Psalms94:2 Tudumunye, lo adung'oni le nkiguana le nkop, nchoo lelo oouasa inaairirikino ninche!" 
Psalms94:3 Iyie Olaitoriani, o anu kenya kulo torrok, o anu kenya eisulie kulo torrok." 
Psalms94:4 Neruku ninche irorei lenye le pesho, neitokoos ninche te ntorroni pooki." 
Psalms94:5 Nerratany ninche iltungana linono, Olaitoriani, neisilisil enjung'ore ino." 
Psalms94:6 Near ninche metua enkoliai o ilo tung'ani omoni, nesesekuan ilo okishi;" 
Psalms94:7 nejo ninche, Medol Olaitoriani; memusu Enkai e Yakobo.”" 
Psalms94:8 Tayiolo, ele omoda aisul! Lo moda, kanu akenya ingenunu?" 
Psalms94:9 Amaa, ilo oitobira enkiok, ae mening'isho ninye? Amaa, ilo oitibira enkong'u, ae medolisho ninye?" 
Psalms94:10 Amaa, ilo oitame iloshon, ae meitameisho ninye? Ilo oiteng'en iltung'ana te ng'eno," 
Psalms94:11 eyiolo Olaitoriani ndamunot oo ltung'ana nchere enkijape ake. 
Psalms94:12 Emayiana ilo tung'ani lintame iyie, Olaitoriani, ilo linteng'en iyie too nkitanapat inono" 
Psalms94:13 pee incho ninye enkiyeng'iyeng'ata te nkata e nyamali, o metaba anaa neturokini ilo torrono engumoto." 
Psalms94:14 Amu meituraa Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena; meing'uaa ninye enjung'ore enye; 
Psalms94:15 amu kelotu esipata enetii lelo supati, ore lelo pooki sidain iltauja, nesuj." 
Psalms94:16 Kalo odumunye te nkaraki nanu agilunore ilo torrono? Kalo oitashe te rishata ai agilunore ilaasak loo ntorrok? 
Psalms94:17 Te neme Olaitoriani otaa eretoto ai, anaata etobiko enkishui ai te nkop e ngira." 
Psalms94:18 Te nadamisho nanu, “Neideketari enkeju ai,” enyorrata ino nauno, Olaitoriani, ninye naaibung'ita." 
Psalms94:19 Ore te nkumoi oo ndamunot aainei, naa enkitagoloto ino naaitagol oshoke." 
Psalms94:20 Keidim ilarikok arruok aaibung'ata o iyie, lelo ooitobiru ntabo te nkoitoi oo nkitanapat?" 
Psalms94:21 Keiturrurro ninche te nebo aagilunore ilo supat, nedung'oki ilo asipani enkiguana e keeya." 
Psalms94:22 Kake etaa Olaitoriani osempewuet lai, etaa Enkai ai endapidapoi e sarunoto ai." 
Psalms94:23 Kerrinyoki ninye ninche ntorrok enye, nejut ninche aiwuang'ie te nkaraki enkarrueisho enye; kejutoo Olaitoriani Enkai ang ninche aiwuang'ie." 
Psalms95:1 Wootu mataranyaki Olaitoriani matishipakinoto endapidapoi e njeunoto ang! 
Psalms95:2 Wootu maape dukuya enkomom enye kiaata enashe; mataranyaki iyiook ninye kiata eng'ida, too sinkolioitin le nkisisa!" 
Psalms95:3 Amu ore Olaitoriani naa ninye Enkai kitok, naa Olaiguanani kitok te shumata nkaitin pooki." 
Psalms95:4 Etii nkaik enyena enguton e nkop, naa enenye sii enkadoro oo ldoinyo." 
Psalms95:5 Enenye enaiposha amu ninye oitobira, naa nkaik enyena naaitobira enkop natoyio." 
Psalms95:6 Wootu mateserem nikirrugokino, matigil kung te dukuya Olaitoriani oitobira iyiook!" 
Psalms95:7 Amu ninye Enkai ang, nikira iyiook iltung'ana le nkirrita enye, o nkerra e nkaina enye. Te nining'ining'i taata oltoilo lenye!" 
Psalms95:8 Emintagol iltauja linyi, anaa apa te Meriba, anaa apa te nkolong e Masa ti ong'ata," 
Psalms95:9 ina kata apa pee aatem iloo papaai linyi, naaineneng ninche nanu, hoo netoduaa ninche esiaai ai." 
Psalms95:10 Too larin artam nanu aaitagoro ina ishoi najo nanu, “Iltung'ana ootapaashaitie iltauja, nemeshilaa ninche nkoitoi aainei.”" 
Psalms95:11 Neaku, ainosa nanu olmumai te ngoro ai, pee mejing ninche enkiyeng'iyeng'ata ai." 
Psalms96:1 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani osinkolio ng'ejuk; entaranyaki Olaitoriani na kop pooki! 
Psalms96:2 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani, esisa enkarna enye; entolimu enjeunoto enye nkolong'i pooki." 
Psalms96:3 Embalunye enkitoo enye ti atua loshon, embalunye isiaaitin enyena e nking'asia ti atua iloreren!" 
Psalms96:4 Eikitok Olaitoriani, naa keisisi ninye oleng; keureyuni ninye aaitulusoo too nkaitin pooki." 
Psalms96:5 Amu ore nkaitin pooki oo loreren naa nkitanyaanyukot; kake Olaitoriani oitobira keper. 
Psalms96:6 Etii enkanyit o enkitoo dukuya ninye; etii engolon o enkishiaa atua ewueji enye sinyati. 
Psalms96:7 Enchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo, intae ilmareita loo ltung'ana, enchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo o engolon!" 
Psalms96:8 Enchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo nairirikino enkarna enye; eyau enkishooroto, nipuonunu atua ilgorieti lenyena!" 
Psalms96:9 Enteserem Olaitoriani te sinyatisho e nkishiaa enye, inkirikirayu te dukuya ninye, na kop pooki!" 
Psalms96:10 Tejo tiatua iloshon, “Olaitoriani oitoreisho! Ee, eitasheyieki enkop, nemeigusugusieki ae kata; kelo ninye aiguanare iloshon te sipata.”" 
Psalms96:11 Nchoo metishipayu keper, naa nchoo nkop meting'idayu; nchoo enaiposha meikurrukurro o nena pooki naabore atua;" 
Psalms96:12 nchoo metishipayu enkop, o pooki toki natii atua! Neranyisho taa ilkeek pooki le ntim te ng'ida" 
Psalms96:13 te dukuya Olaitoriani, amu elotu ninye, amu elotu ninye pee eiguanare enkop. Keiguanare ninye enkop te supatisho, neiguanare iloreren te sipata enye." 
Psalms97:1 Olaitoriani oitoreisho; nchoo metishipayu enkop; nchoo metishipata iloomanaa le naiposha! 
Psalms97:2 Emanita nkatampo o emisimisi nagut ninye; esupatisho o esipata ninche olkitamanyunoto lo lorika lenye le nkitoo. 
Psalms97:3 Nelo enkima te dukuya ninye, nepejoo lelo mang'ati oomanita ninye." 
Psalms97:4 Nkiwuang'at enyena naaitawang enkop; nedol enkop neikirikira. 
Psalms97:5 Etosholate ildoinyo netiu anaa nkapo te dukuya Olaitoriani, te dukuya Olaitoriani le nkop pooki." 
Psalms97:6 Eibalunye keper esupatisho enye; neing'or iloreren pooki enkitoo enye. 
Psalms97:7 Eitukurruaki lelo aseremak pooki loo nkitanyaanyukot, lelo oowuasare nkitanyaanyukot e pesho; neirrugo nkaitin pooki te dukuya ninye." 
Psalms97:8 Nening Sion neshipa, neng'ida nena toyie e Yuda, te nkaraki nena kiguanat inono, Enkai." 
Psalms97:9 Amu ore iyie, Olaitoriani, itii shumata aisul te nkop pooki; nikilepieki aaitulusoo too nkaitin pooki." 
Psalms97:10 Enyor Olaitoriani lelo ooiba enkarruoisho, negolie ninye enkishui oo sinyat lenyena; nekordu ninye ninche aitung'uaa enkaina e ilo arruoni." 
Psalms97:11 Ewang'an naitawang ilo asipani, netum enchipai ilo oata oltau sidai." 
Psalms97:12 Ting'idayu ti atua Olaitoriani, iyie ilo ora asipani, nincho enashe enkarna enye sinyati." 
Psalms98:1 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani osinkolio ng'ejuk, amu etaasa ninye mbaa e nking'asia! Ore ina aina enye e tatene, o ina aina enye sinyati, netimirishe." 
Psalms98:2 Eibalunye Olaitoriani enkisulata enye, eibalunye ninye enkitoo te dukuya iloreren pooki." 
Psalms98:3 Etadamua ninye ina nyorrata enye nauno o esupatisho enye te nkaji e Israel. Ore nkiting'ot e nkop pooki netoduaa enkisulata e Nkai ang. 
Psalms98:4 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani te ng'ida, na kop pooki; entabuaku to sinkolio le nchipai entarany te nkisisa!" 
Psalms98:5 Entaranyaki enkisisa Olaitoriani to lwulul loo usin, to lwulul loo usin o to ltoilo lo sinkolio!" 
Psalms98:6 Too ntarumpetani o to ltoilo le mouo entayu oltoilo le nchipai te dukuya Olaiguanani, laa ninye Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms98:7 Nchoo eikurrukur enaiposha o pooki toki natii atua; o enkop o pooki oomanya! 
Psalms98:8 Ilugoyu enaiposha te nchipai; nchoo eranyisho ildoinyo te ng'ida te nebo," 
Psalms98:9 te dukuya Olaitoriani, amu kelotu ninye aiguanare enkop. Keiguanare ninye enkop te supatisho neiguanare iloreren too sipat." 
Psalms99:1 Olaitoriani oitoreisho; nchoo meikirikirata loreren! Etonita ninye to lorika le nkitoo too lkerubi; nchoo meikirikirayu enkop! 
Psalms99:2 Eikitok Olaitoriani te Sion; etii ninye shumata iloreren pooki. 
Psalms99:3 Nchoo meisisa loreren ina arna ino kitok naitureisho! Ninye osinyati! 
Psalms99:4 Olaiguanani magilani, onyor isipat; intasheyie iyie esipata; ninguana iyie te sipata o te supatisho ti atua Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Esisa Olaitoriani Enkai ang; enteseremisho too nkejek enyena! Ninye osinyati! 
Psalms99:6 Musa o Aron apa ilapolosak lenyena, etii sii apa Samuel lelo ooipot enkarna enye. Eishirakita ninche Olaitoriani, newaliki ninye ninche." 
Psalms99:7 Eirorie ninye ninche te ng'ape e nkatampoi; neimbung ninche enchakenisho enye, o nena kiguanat apa naaishoo ninche." 
Psalms99:8 Olaitoriani Enkai ang, itawalikia iyie ninche; ira iyie Enkai napalaki ninche, hoo sii nira oloitalaku ntorrok enye." 
Psalms99:9 Esisa Olaitoriani Enkai ang, niserememe to ldoinyo lenye sinyati; amu kesinya Olaitoriani Enkai ang!" 
Psalms100:1 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani te ng'ida, na kuapi pooki!" 
Psalms100:2 Esiaayia Olaitoriani te nchipai! Wootu dukuya ninye to sinkolio! 
Psalms100:3 Entayiolo nchere Olaitoriani ninye Enkai! Ninye oitobira iyiook, nikira iyiook ilenyena; kira iyiook iltung'ana lenyena, o nkerra e nkirrita enye." 
Psalms100:4 Eimutu nchomito enyena nchooyoyo enashe, entijing ilgorieti lenyena te nkisisa! Enchoo ninye enashe, nisisisisi enkarna enye!" 
Psalms100:5 Amu eisupat Olaitoriani; nebik enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi, nebikoo esupatisho enye too ishoritin pooki." 
Psalms101:1 Karanyisho nanu te nkaraki enkirukoto o esipata; iyie Olaitoriani nanu aranyaki. 
Psalms101:2 Kaibung nanu ina oitoi oo nkitoriorot. Oi kanu akenya ilotu enatii? 
Psalms101:3 Mapik nanu dukuya nkonyek aainei entoki ake pooki torrono. Kaiba nanu esiaai e lelo ooibelekenyate aaing'uaa Enkai; manyikaki nanu. 
Psalms101:4 Nchoo elamari oltau lo lwuasa te nanu; maata nanu enaporoki enkarruoisho. 
Psalms101:5 Ore ilo okur aitong'u ole latia enye too nkisudorot naa kaidaikie ninye. Ore ilo tung'ani oitokoos newuasa to ltau lenye, magirakino nanu." 
Psalms101:6 Kaisho nanu omom lelo ooisiligayu te nkop, pee etum ninche aatobik te nebo nanu; ore ilo olo te nkoitoi nemetii entioto ninye laaisiaai nanu." 
Psalms101:7 Meetae oltung'ani oas esunkureisho obik ti atua enkaji ai; meetae oltung'ani oiro elejare oton te dukuya nanu. 
Psalms101:8 Ore too nkakeny pooki naa kaidaikie nanu lelo pooki torrok te nkop, aiwuang'ie lelo pooki torrok te nkop aitung'uaa enkanasa o Laitoriani." 
Psalms102:1 toning'o enkomono ai, Olaitoriani; nchoo enkishirata ai meeu enitii!" 
Psalms102:2 Mikisudorie iyie nanu enkomom ino te nkolong o sina lai! Irrugokoki enkiok ino tawalikiaki nanu tasioki teina olong naipotisho! 
Psalms102:3 Amu kelusoo nkolong'i aainei anaa empuruo, neyupuyup iloik laainei anaa olkokuet." 
Psalms102:4 Etooshoki oltau lai aapurd anaa olkujita netoyu, naarikino enkinosata e ndaa ai." 
Psalms102:5 Ore enkaraki embuakunoto e nkishirata ai, neibiitiari osesen lai." 
Psalms102:6 Atotiwuo nanu anaa olkurragos li ong'ata onyaisho, anaa kokesena oo wuejitin neeliyio," 
Psalms102:7 kairrag nanu nemaapuku njo, atiu nanu anaa emotonyi naliyio te nchumata e nkaji." 
Psalms102:8 Ore endama pooki naainyal nanu ilmang'ati laainei, ore lelo laasukeny nanu neitaa enkarna ai oldeket." 
Psalms102:9 Amu nkuruon nanu ainos aitaa endaa, naitushulaki ilkiyio laainei ina naok," 
Psalms102:10 ore enkaraki empushuna ino o engoro ino; amu kitudumua nanu nikinang'aa. 
Psalms102:11 Etotiuo nkolong'i aainei anaa oloip le nteipa; atoyio nanu atiu anaa nkujit. 
Psalms102:12 Kake ore iyie Olaitoriani, itii olorika le nkitoo ntarasi; nebaiki enkarna ino iishoritin pooki." 
Psalms102:13 Idumunye iyie aing'urrie Sion; etabaua enkata pee ncho ninye omom, etabaua enkata apa nategaluaki." 
Psalms102:14 Amu iletipat isoito lenyena too sinkan linono, neing'urrie ninche enterit enye." 
Psalms102:15 Kepuo iloshon aaureyu enkarna o Laitoriani, neureyu ilaiguanak pooki enkitoo ino." 
Psalms102:16 Amu kelo Olaitoriani ashet Sion, neliooyu ninye te nkitoo enye;" 
Psalms102:17 neshilaa ninye enkomono e ilo aisinani, nememenaa ninye enkomono enye." 
Psalms102:18 Nchoo meigeri kuna too ishoritin naapuonu, pee etum lelo tung'ana lemeino aaisisa Olaitoriani:" 
Psalms102:19 nchere eing'ura ninye kop te ine wueji e shumata nesinya, te keper eing'ura Olaitoriani enkop," 
Psalms102:20 pee etum atoning'o olkiyioi loo looena, pee etum atalaai lelo ooigerokoki keeya;" 
Psalms102:21 pee etum iltung'ana te Sion aaibalunyie enkarna o Laitoriani, neibalunyie enkisisa enye te Yerusalem," 
Psalms102:22 te neiturrurro iloreren te nebo, o nkitoriat, pee eserem Olaitoriani." 
Psalms102:23 Etigila ninye engolon ai te mpolos; eitodorropu ninye nkolong'i aainei. 
Psalms102:24 “Iyie Enkai,” atejo nanu, “Mikiya nanu tene, te mpolos oo nkolong'i aainei, iyie olobikoo ilarin lenyena ti atua iishoritin pooki!”" 
Psalms102:25 Apa moitie iyie itipika olkitamanyunoto le nkop, ore keper naa esiaai oo nkaik inono." 
Psalms102:26 Neidak ninche, kake ibikoo iyie; keidaaya ninche pooki anaa ilkilani. Mbelekeny iyie ninche anaa nkilani neishari ninche." 
Psalms102:27 Kake mimbelekenya iyie, nemeeta ilarin linono enkiting'oto." 
Psalms102:28 Ketoni nkera oo sinkan linono te seriani, ore eishoi enye naa keitasheyieki te dukuya iyie." 
Psalms103:1 Isisa Olaitoriani, iyie lo tau lai, o pooki natii atua nanu, isisa enkarna enye sinyati!" 
Psalms103:2 Isisa Olaitoriani, iyie lo tau lai, nimincho kirikino nkitaasat enyena pooki," 
Psalms103:3 ninye likipalaki nkitarruorrot inono pooki, ninye likinchiunye imueyiaritin inono pooki," 
Psalms103:4 ninye okordu enkishui ino aitung'uaa engumoto, ninye likinchopoki enyorrata enye nauno o lng'ur," 
Psalms103:5 ninye likintaraposh iyie too supati enkata naba anaa eninchu, metaa keitang'ejuki kitisho ino nitiu anaa olkurragos." 
Psalms103:6 Olaitoriani oas isupati neisho isipat lelo ooitorogonyi. 
Psalms103:7 Ninye oitayiolo Musa nkoitoi enyena, neitayiolo iasat enyena iltung'ana le Israel." 
Psalms103:8 Keeta Olaitoriani olng'ur naa aipirisioni, mesioki agoro neeta enyorrata nauno." 
Psalms103:9 Meisikong'isho ninye anaake, nemeibung engoro enye ntarasi." 
Psalms103:10 Meitaas ninye iyiook te risioroto oo ng'ok ang, nemeosh ninye iyiook te risioroto oo nkitarruorrot ang." 
Psalms103:11 Amu ore eneba anaa enalakuaniki keper enkop, neijia eba enkitoo e nyorrata enye nauno te lelo ooure ninye;" 
Psalms103:12 ore anaa enalakuaniki oloo saen oloontoluo, neijia eiko ninye aitalamaa nkitarruorrot ang te iyiook." 
Psalms103:13 Ore anaa enaing'urrie olpayian nkera enyena, neijia eiko Olaitoriani eing'urrie lelo ooure ninye." 
Psalms103:14 Amu eyiolo ninye enkitobirunoto ang, edamu ninye ajo kira iyiook enterit." 
Psalms103:15 Ore ti alo tung'ani, etiu nkolong'i enyena anaa nkujit; kebul ninye anaa entapukai e ong'ata;" 
Psalms103:16 amu kekutaa osiwuo nedung'ori alo, ore ewueji enye nemeitoki ayiolou." 
Psalms103:17 Kake ore ina nyorrata nauno o Laitoriani naa enoo ntarasi o ntarasi te lelo ooure ninye, neton esupatisho enye too nkera oo nkera enye," 
Psalms103:18 te lelo ooibung olning'o lenye nedamu aaibung nkitanapat enyena. 
Psalms103:19 Etipika Olaitoriani olorika lenye le nkitoo keper, naa enkitoria enye naitoreisho te pooki." 
Psalms103:20 Esisa Olaitoriani intae lo mailaika lenyena, intae kulo magil oas ororei lenye, entoning oltoilo lo rorei lenye!" 
Psalms103:21 Esisa Olaitoriani, o lororani lenyena pooki lelo aisiaayiak lenyena oas eyieunoto enye!" 
Psalms103:22 Esisa Olaitoriani, nasiaitin enyena pooki, too wuejitin enyena pooki e nkitoria enye, isisa Olaitoriani lo tau lai!" 
Psalms104:1 Isisa Olaitoriani lo tau lai! Olaitoriani Enkai ai, ira iyie kitok! Kinchopokoki iyie enkanyit o enkitoo," 
Psalms104:2 iyie oishopoki kewan ewang'an anaa olkila, iyie oisalaasha keper anaa olng'obor," 
Psalms104:3 iyie otipika ing'apeta e nkaji ino shumata nkariak, nintaa nkatampo engarri ino oo mbartan, niked inaipuko o siwuo," 
Psalms104:4 nintaa osiwuo ilkiliku linono, nintaa olang'at le nkima ilaisiaayiak linono." 
Psalms104:5 Iyie otipika enkop ilkitamanyunot lenyena, pee meigusugus ae kata." 
Psalms104:6 Nimulumul te nguton anaa olkila; neitashe nkariak too nchumat oo ldoinyo. 
Psalms104:7 Ore te mbuakunoto ino neilanyisho ninche, ore to ltoilo le ndarata ino neilanyisho ninche." 
Psalms104:8 Neilepu ildoinyo, nedoyio ierat aagutu nepuo iwuejitin nitegelaka ninche." 
Psalms104:9 Itipika iyie ilpolosien lemegiroo ninche, pee meigil ninche aaiput enkop." 
Psalms104:10 Nchoo iyie nkonyek oo nkariak meturukunye too erat; nenang'ari aaim irishat oo ldoinyo," 
Psalms104:11 neitook pooki ng'ues e ong'ata; neishu iloitikoishi enkure. 
Psalms104:12 Embata enye etipika ntaritik emanyisho enye; neranyisho ninche ti atua ilng'osil lenyena. 
Psalms104:13 Ore te wueji ino neika nintook ildoinyo enkare; netaraposhe enkop too lng'anayio le siaai ino. 
Psalms104:14 Iyie oitubulu nkujit te nkaraki nkishu, o nkaitubulu te nkaraki iltung'ana, pee etum ninye aitayu endaa te nkop," 
Psalms104:15 o enaisho oo sabibu pee eitiship oltau le tung'ani, o eilata pee eitawang enkomom enye, o endaa pee eitagol enkishui e tung'ani." 
Psalms104:16 Etipikaki ilkeek lo Laitoriani enkare aaitaraposh, lelo tarakua le Lebanon apa ootuuno ninye." 
Psalms104:17 Te ninche eshetu ntaritik nkajijik; neeta ntilagosi nkajijik too lkeek sapuki oonyori. 
Psalms104:18 Netii nkineji oo soito ildoinyo aadoru, netii nkijijuri ndapidapo." 
Psalms104:19 Intobira iyie olapa pee eutu irishat; eyiolo enkolong erishata enye nadoyiorie. 
Psalms104:20 Ntobir iyie enaimin neaku kewarie, ina kata eikurtutari ing'uesi entim aapuo." 
Psalms104:21 Neipur ilkuoo loo lng'atunyo erreshisho, eing'oru endaa enye naing'uaa Enkai." 
Psalms104:22 Ore ake pee eilepu enkolong nepuo ninche, neirrag ninche too rrumati lenye." 
Psalms104:23 Nelo tung'ani esiaai enye neas esinkaisho enye o memuto. 
Psalms104:24 Olaitoriani, kebaa enkumoi oo siaitin inono! Te ng'eno iyie intobira pooki; ebore enkop seuseu oo ntokitin inono." 
Psalms104:25 Idie etii enaiposha, naa kitok nelala, neuma ntokitin ti atua nemeikenayu ntokitin naaishu sapuki o nkutiti." 
Psalms104:26 Nepuo imelin te ine, o enkukuu naji Lefiatam nintobira iyie pee eiguran teine." 
Psalms104:27 Iyie eing'or kuna pooki, pee incho ninche endaa enye too rishat enye." 
Psalms104:28 Ore te nincho iyie ninche, neiturrur ninche, te nilak iyie enkaina ino neiput ninche ntokitin sidain." 
Psalms104:29 Te nisudoo iyie enkomom ino, neidang ninche, ti niya enkiyang'et enye, neye ninche nerrinyokino enterit enye." 
Psalms104:30 Ti nirriu iyie Enkiyang'et lino, neitobiri ninche; nintang'ejuk iyie oriong enkop." 
Psalms104:31 Metobikoi enkitoo o Laitoriani ntarasi, metishipayu Olaitoriani too siaitin enyena," 
Psalms104:32 ilo laa te neing'or enkop neikirikira, ilo laa te neiseyie ildoinyo neitupuru!" 
Psalms104:33 Karanyaki nanu Olaitoriani anaa naishu; arany nanu enkisisa e Nkai eton aata enkishui. 
Psalms104:34 Inchoo mikintishipa inkibirribirrat aainei amu Olaitoriani nanu ang'idakino. 
Psalms104:35 Nchoo ilaing'okok metumuti te nkop, naa inchoo ilarruok eishieki! Isisa Olaitoriani lo tau lai! Meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms105:1 Enchoo Olaitoriani enashe, empoto enkarna enye, embalunye nkiaasin enyena ti atua iloreren!" 
Psalms105:2 Entaranyaki ninye, entaranyaki ninye enkisisa, embalunye nkiaasin enyena pooki e nking'asia." 
Psalms105:3 Enting'idata tiatua enkarna enye sinyati; nchoo iltauja le lelo ooing'oru Olaitoriani meting'idata. 
Psalms105:4 Eng'orutu Olaitoriani o engolon enye, eng'orutu entasho te dukuya ninye anaake!" 
Psalms105:5 Entadamu isiaaitin e nking'asia naataasa ninye, mbaa enyena e nking'asia, o nkiguanat naairoro ninye." 
Psalms105:6 Na ishoi e Abraham osinka lenye, lo ayiok le Yakobo, lo gelunot lenyena!" 
Psalms105:7 Ninye Olaitoriani Enkai ang; etii nkiguanat enyena enkop pooki. 
Psalms105:8 Keibung ninye olning'o lenye ntarasi, te ilo rorei apa oitanapishe, too ishoritin naabaya enkalifu nabo," 
Psalms105:9 ilo ning'o apa oitobira ninye o Abraham, ilo mumai apa oinosa te nkaraki Isaak," 
Psalms105:10 ilo apa oitudupayie te Yakobo pee eaku enkikoo, te Israel neaku olning'o loo ntarasi," 
Psalms105:11 ejo, “Kaaisho iyie enkop e Kanaan metaa erubata e njung'ore ino.”" 
Psalms105:12 Apa aa kuti ninche oleng, neme toki, naa ilomon te ina kop," 
Psalms105:13 nelimana ninche too loshon pooki, nepuo te nkitoria o metabaiki likae orere," 
Psalms105:14 eitu ninye eisho oltung'ani meitorogonya ninche, eisikong'a ninye ilaiguanak te nkaraki ninche," 
Psalms105:15 ejo, “Miseyie ele lai ootubukokoki eilata aaput, minyal iloibonok laainei!”" 
Psalms105:16 Te neipotu ninye olameyu meeu enkop, neiwuang'ie endaa pooki," 
Psalms105:17 neirriwayie ninye oltung'ani dukuya ninche, Yosef, ilo apa otimiraki aaitaa orrindik." 
Psalms105:18 Einyala ilpisia le enata nkejek enyena, nepiki emurt enye engotoo e sekenkei;" 
Psalms105:19 ore anaa nebaya ina apa natejo ninye eitisipa ororei lo Laitoriani ninye. 
Psalms105:20 Eirriwayie olaiguanani olkilikuai metalakuni ninye, ore ilo oitore iloreren neisho ninye meshomo;" 
Psalms105:21 eitaa ninye olkitok le nkaji enye, o Laitoriani loo masaa enyena pooki," 
Psalms105:22 pee eiteng'en ilkituaak lenyena anaa enayieu, neiteng'en ilpayiani lenye eng'eno." 
Psalms105:23 Nelotu sii Israel Misiri; nemany Yakobo enkop e Ham. 
Psalms105:24 Neitubul Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena, neitagol ninche aitalang ilmang'ati lenye." 
Psalms105:25 Neibelekeny ninye iltauja lenye meibai iltung'ana lenyena, nepik isinkan lenyena olosek te nkeleekisho." 
Psalms105:26 Eirriwayie Musa osinka lenye o Aron laa ninye etegelua. 
Psalms105:27 Neyau nkitoduaat enyena atua iltung'ana, neyau inenking'asia atua enkop e Ham." 
Psalms105:28 Neirriu ninye enaimin neitomisimis enkop, negolong'u ninche aany irorei lenyena." 
Psalms105:29 Neibelekeny ninye inkariak enye aitaa osarge, near isinkir lenye metuata." 
Psalms105:30 Neiput enkop enye ntuaan e nkare, o metijing'a nkajijik oo laiguanak lenye." 
Psalms105:31 Eiroro ninye nelotu emus oo lojong'a, o lashe enkop enye pooki." 
Psalms105:32 Eirriwaka ninye ninche enchan oo soito o enkimerlel e nkima ti atua enkop enye pooki. 
Psalms105:33 Etoosho ninye isabibu o lng'abolo near ilkeek le nkop enye. 
Psalms105:34 Eiroro ninye nelotu olmaati, o nkiyioitin o lmaati nemeikenayu;" 
Psalms105:35 naa ninche naaidaikie pooki toki nanyori te nkop, neinos ilng'anayio le nkop enye." 
Psalms105:36 Etoosho ninye ilkikaunot pooki le nkop enye, ilo ng'anayioi le dukuya le ngolon enye." 
Psalms105:37 Neitoki ninye arikoo Israel te nkosholai o te sahabu, nemeetae obo te lelo loo loshon lenyena otarrorre." 
Psalms105:38 Neng'idayu Misiri ina kata pee edumunye ninche aapuo, amu etijing'a enkuretisho te nkaraki ninche." 
Psalms105:39 Neirriu ninye enkatampoi meitushura ninche, o enkima naitawang'aki ninche te nkewarie." 
Psalms105:40 Eikilikuanutua olorere endaa neirriwaki ninche nkurleen, neisho ninche imukateni naaing'uaa keper te nkumoi." 
Psalms105:41 Etabolo ninye endapidapoi nengorunye enkare; neruko aim olpurkel anaa olkeju. 
Psalms105:42 Amu edamu ninye enkisilgata enye sinyati, o Abraham osinka lenye." 
Psalms105:43 Neaku etorikoyie ninye iltung'ana lenyena te ng'ida, nerikoo lelo gelunot lenyena to sinkolio." 
Psalms105:44 Neisho ninye ninche nkuapi oo loreren; neya ninche aajung ilng'anayio le siaai oo ltung'ana," 
Psalms105:45 pee etum ninche aaibung'a nkiguanat enyena, nejurru nkitanapat enyena." 
Psalms106:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani! Enchoo Olaitoriani enashe, amu eisupat ninye; amu ore enyorrata enye nauno nebikoo ntarasi!" 
Psalms106:2 Kaing'ae oidim aimaki mbaa e nking'asia o Laitoriani, arashu aitodolu enkisisa enye pooki?" 
Psalms106:3 Emayiana lelo ooing'oru isipat, lelo ooing'oru isipat nkatitin pooki!" 
Psalms106:4 Tadamuaki nanu, Olaitoriani, tinintodolu omom too ltung'ana linono; taretoki nanu ti nikordu ninche;" 
Psalms106:5 pee atum atoduaa dupoto e lelo gelunot linono, pee atum ating'idayu te nchipai o losho lino, pee atum ating'idare enjung'ore ino." 
Psalms106:6 Ore iyiook o loo papa kitaasa eng'oki; kitaasa entorroni, kintarruoitie iyiook." 
Psalms106:7 Ore apa etii loo papa enkop e Misiri, neitu eshilaa isiaaitin inono e nking'asia; eitu ninche edamu eneba enyorrata ino nauno, kake etogolong'akita ninche Ilo otii Shumata Aisul te Enaiposha Nanyokie." 
Psalms106:8 Kake eitajeuo ninye ninche te nkaraki enkarna enye, pee etum aibalunye engolon enye magilani." 
Psalms106:9 Eisikong'a ninye Enaiposha Nanyokie, netoyu; nerikoo ninye ninche aimie enguton etotiuo anaa olpurkel." 
Psalms106:10 Neaku eitajeuo ninye ninche te nkaina o lmang'atinta lenye, nekordu ninye ninche aitung'uaa engolon o lmang'atinta." 
Psalms106:11 Neimulumul nkariak ilmang'ati lenye; eitu ninye elo obo. 
Psalms106:12 Neiruk taa ina kata irorei lenyena; nerany enkisisa enye. 
Psalms106:13 Kake etorikine ninche nabo kata isiaaitin enyena; neitu ninche eanyu enkiguana enye. 
Psalms106:14 Kake etijing'a ninche inguarrat torrok ti ong'ata, nepuo aatem Enkai to lpurkel;" 
Psalms106:15 eishoo ninye ninche nena naatoomonutuo, kake eirriwaka ninche emueyian e saso." 
Psalms106:16 Ore ina kata too lng'oborri pee etum iltung'ana olom te nkaraki Musa o Aron, ilo sinyati lo Laitoriani," 
Psalms106:17 neng'a enkop enkutuk neijoo Datan, neimisie encholuek e Abiran." 
Psalms106:18 Eipang'aka sii enkima ina sholuek; nepejoo olang'at le nkima ilarruok. 
Psalms106:19 Eitobirutua ninche olashe te Horeb, neserem ina kitanyaanyukoto nasholuno." 
Psalms106:20 Eibelekenya ninche enkitoo e Nkai aaitaa enkitanyaanyukoto o lkiteng oinos nkujit. 
Psalms106:21 Eitu ninche edamu Enkai Olaitajeunoni lenye, laa ninye apa otaasa mbaa sapuki te Misiri," 
Psalms106:22 o isiaaitin e nking'asia ti atua enkop e Ham, o mbaa naaitureisho te mbata Enaiposha Nanyokie." 
Psalms106:23 Neaku etejo ninye, keidaikie ninche - keitu ninye eitashe Musa, ilo gelunoti lenye, te dukuya ninye, pee eibelekeny ina goro enye napi pee meidaikie ninche." 
Psalms106:24 Nemenaa ninche ina kop sidai, nemeeta ninche enkirukoto too nkisiligat enyena." 
Psalms106:25 Neing'unyung'uny ninche too lng'oborri lenye, neitu ening oltoilo lo Laitoriani." 
Psalms106:26 Ore enkaraki ina eilepie ninye enkaina enye neiro olmumai ti alo ninche nchere keisho ninche metabatatata ti ong'ata," 
Psalms106:27 neisardaikie sii eishoi enye ti atua loreren, aidapashaki ninche nkuapi." 
Psalms106:28 Neitoki ninche aaibung'are Baal e Peor, neinos nkishorot naatopolosakaki iloo tuata;" 
Psalms106:29 neitagor ninche Olaitoriani too nkiaasin enye, nedoiki olmeitai ninche." 
Psalms106:30 Neitashe Finehas asaisho, neiwuang'ieki olmeitai." 
Psalms106:31 Neikenakini ninye ina aajo esipata too ishoritin pooki ntarasi. 
Psalms106:32 Neitagor ninche ninye too nkariak e Meriba, netum Musa enyamali te nkaraki ninche;" 
Psalms106:33 amu etipika ninche enkishui enye emion, neiro ninye irorei le ngoro." 
Psalms106:34 Neitu ninche eidaikie iltung'ana, anaa enaitanapa Olaitoriani ninche," 
Psalms106:35 kake etushulare ninche nkuapi neitamok ate easata anaa enataasa ninche. 
Psalms106:36 Neisiai ninche nena kitanyaanyukot enye, naa ninche naataa orreshet te ninche." 
Psalms106:37 Neyieng aapolos ilayiok lenye, o ntoyie enye aapolosaki iloiriruani;" 
Psalms106:38 neibukoo ninche osarge lemeeta eleyiata, ilo sarge loo layiok lenye o ntoyie enye, apa naatopolosakitia nkitanyaanyukot e Kanaan, neisarkionieki ina kop te nkaraki ilo sarge." 
Psalms106:39 Neaku etaa enemesinya te nkaraki nena kiasin enye, neiborrie ninche onyek too nkiasin enye." 
Psalms106:40 Neirowuaju engoro o Laitoriani te nkaraki iltung'ana lenyena, neibayu ninye enjung'ore enye;" 
Psalms106:41 neishooyo ninye ninche apik nkaik oo loreren, pee etum ilapa ooiba ninche aaitoria ninche." 
Psalms106:42 Neibooki ilmang'ati lenye ninche enkop, neyauni ninche aapik abori engolon enye." 
Psalms106:43 Ore nkatitin kumok netokordua ninye ninche, kake etogolong'utua ninche too otikinot enye, neitadouni ninche te nkaraki ntorrok enye." 
Psalms106:44 Ore ake eyia etishilayie ninye osina lenye, ina kata pee eishir ninche." 
Psalms106:45 Etadamua ninye te nkaraki ninche osotua lenye, neirridu ninye te risioroto e nyorrata enye nauno." 
Psalms106:46 Eishoo ninche meing'urrieki, lelo pooki apa ooibung'a ninche." 
Psalms106:47 Ntajeu iyiook, Olaitoriani Enkai, ninturrurru iyiook aaitayu too loreren, pee kitum aaishoo enashe enkarna ino sinyati niking'idare enkisisa ino." 
Psalms106:48 Meisisi Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, ebaiki ntarasi o ntarasi! Naa nchoo ejo iltung'ana pooki, “Esai!” Meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms107:1 Enchoo Olaitoriani enashe, amu eisupat ninye; amu ore enyorrata enye nauno nebikoo ntarasi!" 
Psalms107:2 Nchoo lelo ootokordua Olaitoriani metejo neijia, lelo ootokordua ninye aitayu ti atua enyamali" 
Psalms107:3 neiturrur aitung'uaa nkuapi, aitung'uaa oloo saen o loo ntoluo, neitung'uaa moikuape o kopikop." 
Psalms107:4 Etilimanate embata aairrang'irrang to lpurkel, neitu etum enkoitoi nalo enkanasa nayeng'iyeng'areki;" 
Psalms107:5 ore te nkaraki esumash o enkure, neiterre iltauja lenye ti atua ninche." 
Psalms107:6 Neishiraki ninche Olaitoriani ti atua enyamali enye, nekordu ninye ninche aitung'uaa osina lenye;" 
Psalms107:7 etorikoyie ninye ninche aimie enkoitoi naitoriori, o metabaiki enkanasa napuo aamany." 
Psalms107:8 Nchoo eisho ninche Olaitoriani enashe, te nkaraki enyorrata enye nauno, te nkaraki isiaaitin enyena e nking'asia too nkera e tung'ana!" 
Psalms107:9 Amu keitaraposh ninye ilo oata enkure, ore ilo oisumash neiputaki ntokitin sidain." 
Psalms107:10 Etotona embata ti atua enaimin o ti atua oloip le keeya, neikenori ti atua isinaitin too sekenke," 
Psalms107:11 amu etogolong'akitia ninche irorei le Nkai, nemenaa nkitanapat e Ilo otii Shumata Aisul." 
Psalms107:12 Neisinanuo iltauja lenye te nkaraki enkisiaayiare nagol; nebatata ninche, nemeetae oloret ninche." 
Psalms107:13 Neitoki ninche aaishiraki Olaitoriani te nyamali enye, nekordu ninye ninche aitayu ti atua isinaitin lenye;" 
Psalms107:14 eyaua ninye ninche aitupuku ti atua enaimin o loip le keeya, negil iyenat enye tukul." 
Psalms107:15 Nchoo eisho ninche Olaitoriani enashe te nyorrata enye nauno, te nkaraki isiaaitin enyena e nking'asia too nkera e tung'ana!" 
Psalms107:16 Amu etigila ninye nchomito o suyai nedung aitaa are eng'udi e sekenkei. 
Psalms107:17 Etamueyia embata te nkaraki ing'ok enye, o te nkaraki entorroni enye netum isinaitin;" 
Psalms107:18 neibayu iltauja lenye empukunoto pooki e ndaa, nenyikaki ninche kishomi e keeya." 
Psalms107:19 Neitoki ninche aaishiraki Olaitoriani te nyamali enye, nekordu ninye ninche aitung'uaa osina lenye;" 
Psalms107:20 neirriu ninye ororei lenye, neishiunye ninche, nekordu ninche aitung'uaa enkidaata." 
Psalms107:21 Nchoo eisho ninche Olaitoriani enashe te nkaraki enyorrata enye nauno, te nkaraki isiaaitin enyena e nking'asia too nkera e tung'ana!" 
Psalms107:22 Naa nchoo ninche eishooyo ilasarri le nashe, nelimu nkiasin enyena too sinkolioitin le ng'ida!" 
Psalms107:23 Eshomo embata enaiposha too melin, aas biashara ti oriong nkariak kumok;" 
Psalms107:24 nedol ninche nkiaasin o Laitoriani, isiaaitin enyena e nking'asia ti atua enguton." 
Psalms107:25 Amu eitanapa ninye, neinyeyie olkutati ogol, otudumua ilopir le naiposha." 
Psalms107:26 Neilep ninche shumata, nedoyio aapuo enguton; nelepori iltauja lenye te nkaraki osina;" 
Psalms107:27 nepuo ninche tenkiesies neiterriarri anaa lamerak, neiting eng'eno enye." 
Psalms107:28 Neitoki ninche aaishiraki Olaitoriani te nyamali enye, nekordu ninye ninche to sina lenye;" 
Psalms107:29 neitigir ninye olkutati, neitirring'ieki ilopir le naiposha." 
Psalms107:30 Neng'idayu ninche enkaraki naitirring'ieki, neyau ninye ninche ewueji enye neyieu." 
Psalms107:31 Nchoo eisho ninche Olaitoriani enashe te nkaraki enyorrata enye nauno, te nkaraki isiaaitin enyena e nking'asia too nkera e tung'ana!" 
Psalms107:32 Nchoo eisis ninche ninye te umata oo ltung'ana, neisis ninye ti atua eumata oo lpayiani." 
Psalms107:33 Eibelekeny ninye ilkejek aitaa olpurkel, neibelekeny nchorroi aitaa enkop oo lbaat," 
Psalms107:34 neibelekeny enkop sidai aitaa ewueji e munyan nemebulu toki, te nkaraki enkarruoisho oo loomanya." 
Psalms107:35 Neibelekeny ninye olpurkel aitaa nchorroi oo nkariak, neibelekeny enkop natoyio oolbaat aitaa nchorroi oo nkariak." 
Psalms107:36 Neitamany ninye ine ilo oaata esumash, neshetu ninche enkanasa nabikie;" 
Psalms107:37 etuuno ninche nkurman, neun nkurman oo sabibu netum enkisampuare kitok." 
Psalms107:38 Ore te mayianata enye nebul ninche oleng; nemeisho ninche nkishu enye engoroo. 
Psalms107:39 Naa te neitoki aang'oroo nedou esiana, te nkaraki enkibookinoto e nkop, o enyamali o osina," 
Psalms107:40 nebukoki ninye olmena lelo kituaak, neisho ninche metilimanata too nkoitoi misili;" 
Psalms107:41 kake kedumu ninye aitasheyie olomena aitayu ti atua osina, neitaba ilmareita lenye anaa iluaat oo ntare." 
Psalms107:42 Ore lelo supati nedol neshipayu; ore lelo torrok neidang. 
Psalms107:43 Ore pooki ng'ae ng'en, nchoo ening'u kuna baa; nchoo iltung'ana edamu enyorrata o Laitoriani nauno." 
Psalms108:1 Etuune oltau lai, Iyie Enkai, etuune oltau lai! Karanyisho nanu, naosh olkerempe! Tuputunye lo tau lai!" 
Psalms108:2 Tuputunye na auo oo sinkolioitin o endule! Kainyototo nanu enasirie! 
Psalms108:3 Kaaisho nanu iyie enashe Olaitoriani, ti atua olorere, kaaranyaki nanu iyie enkisisa ti atua nkuapi." 
Psalms108:4 Amu ore enyorrata ino nauno naa eikitok te keper, nebaiki isipat inono keper." 
Psalms108:5 Nchoo kirrepi iyie, Iyie Enkai, te keper! Nchoo enkitoo ino meeu shumata enkop pooki!" 
Psalms108:6 Pee etumi aatokordu ilo kirotet lino, nchoru eretoto te nkaina ino e tatene, tawalikiaki nanu!" 
Psalms108:7 Eisiligishore Enkai te wueji enye sinyati: ejo, “Ore te nkisisa kaor nanu Shekem, naorrior o yerata le Sukot." 
Psalms108:8 Enaai Gilead; enaai Manase; enkopiyia ai nagol e lukunya Efraim; eng'udi ai e nkitoria Yuda. 
Psalms108:9 Embesen ai naitukuoreki Moab; shumata Edom nanu aiteleiki nkejek aainei; te Filistia nanu abuaku te nkisulata.” 
Psalms108:10 Kaing'ae laariku nanu enetii enkanasa nasheta? Kaing'ae laarik nanu Edom? 
Psalms108:11 Keitu iyie iyany iyiook Iyie Enkai? Milo iyie, Olaitoriani, te nebo ilmang'ati lang." 
Psalms108:12 Nchoo siaake iyiook eretoto te nkaraki ilmang'ati lang, amu ene pesho eretoto e tung'ani!" 
Psalms108:13 Ore etii Olaitoriani te nebo iyiook naa eikiaas mbaa sapuki; Olaitoriani ninye oitunyoki enkop ilmang'ati lang. 
Psalms109:1 Migira, iyie Enkai e nkisisa ai!" 
Psalms109:2 Amu etaboloki nkutukie torrok e lejere te nkaraki nanu, pee eiro ti alo nanu mbaa e lejare." 
Psalms109:3 Naaitag'or ninche too rorei le nkiba, naarasaki ninche pesho." 
Psalms109:4 Enkitang'oroto ninche aalaakinye enyorrata ai, hoo duoo ninye te naomonoki ninche." 
Psalms109:5 Neaku aatalaakitia ninche enkiba te nyorrata, o mang'atisho te nyorrata ai." 
Psalms109:6 Tegelu oltung'ani torrono metigilunore ninye, nchoo eiguanare ninye olaitang'oroni." 
Psalms109:7 Te neiguanareki ninye nchoo etumieki ninye enkitadiaata; nchoo enkomono enye eikenari aajo eng'oki! 
Psalms109:8 Metaa kuti nkolong'i enyena; metaa likae oya imasaa enyena! 
Psalms109:9 Metaa okishin nkera enyena, neaku enkoliai enkitok enye!" 
Psalms109:10 Metaa iloorook kutukie nkera enyena; metaarari ninche aaipang'ie to lmuaate omanya! 
Psalms109:11 Meibung'a oloisileno apa ninye ntokitin enyena pooki, meidaikie ilomon ilng'anayio le nkinyinyiret enye!" 
Psalms109:12 Metaa meetae hoo obo otumie ninye omom, anaa obo ninye oing'urrie nena kera enyena okishin!" 
Psalms109:13 Meishieki eishoi enye; meimisieki enkarna enye te ishoi e are! 
Psalms109:14 Metadamuni entorroni oo loo menye te dukuya Olaitoriani, naa nchoo eaku meiwuang'ieki eng'oki e ngotonye aajutoo." 
Psalms109:15 Nchoo ninche eaku ketii dukuya Olaitoriani anaake; nchoo eiwuang'ieki endamunoto enye te nkop! 
Psalms109:16 Amu eitu apa ninye edamu aitodolu esupatisho, kake etusujayie ninye olaisinani o ilo omena, o ilo otalepori oltau aar metuata." 
Psalms109:17 Enyor apa ninye atedekisho; nchoo ldeketa epuonu shumata ninye! Menyor apa ninye imayianat; metalama ninche ninye! 
Psalms109:18 Eishopoko ninye kewan ildeketa anaa olkila lenye, meibulu ninche osesen lenye anaa enkare, meima iloik lenyena anaa eilata!" 
Psalms109:19 Metotiwuo anaa olkila oimulumulare ninye, metotiwuo anaa enkimeita naa ninye erretenare anaake!" 
Psalms109:20 Metaa ena elaakinoto oo laitang'orok laainei naing'uaa Olaitoriani, te lelo ooiro ntorrok ti alo enkishui ai!" 
Psalms109:21 Kake ore iyie, Olaitoriani Enkai ai, taasisho te rishata ai te nkaraki enkarna ino; amu eisupat enyorrata ino nauno, tokorduaki nanu!" 
Psalms109:22 Amu ara nanu aisinani namena, netalepori oltau lai ti atua nanu." 
Psalms109:23 Aisha nanu anaa oloip le nteipa; aaipiripiroyioki nanu anaa olmaati. 
Psalms109:24 Etashala nkung aainei te nkaraki eenata empukoroto e kewan; netasasa osesen lai aaku iloik ake. 
Psalms109:25 Ataa naa enkikordo te lelo laaitang'or; te naadol ninche nanu neipirripir ilukuny enye. 
Psalms109:26 Taretoki, Olaitoriani Enkai ai! Ntajeuoki te risioroto e nyorrata ino nauno!" 
Psalms109:27 Nchoo ninche metayiolo nchere enkaina ino ena; iyie, Olaitoriani otaasa ena!" 
Psalms109:28 Nchoo ninche edekisho, kake tamayianisho iyie! Nchoo lelo ainyalak laainei meitukurruni; metishipayu osinka lino." 
Psalms109:29 Meishopokini ilaitang'orok laainei esulare; meimulumula ninche enkurruna enye anaa olkila. 
Psalms109:30 Ore te nkutuk ai kaisho Olaitoriani enashe sapuk; kaisis nanu ninye ti atua eumata. 
Psalms109:31 Amu eitashe ninye te nkaina e tatene e ilo omena, pee eitajeu ninye te lelo oiguanare pee ear metua." 
Psalms110:1 Etiaaka Olaitoriani olkitok lai: “Totona te nkaina ai e tatene, o metaba anaa napik ilmang'ati linono, abori nkejek inono.”" 
Psalms110:2 Eirriwua Olaitoriani eing'uaa Sion eng'udi ino e nkitoria, nintoreisho te mpolos oo lmang'ati linono!" 
Psalms110:3 Ore iltung'ana linono neishoru ate te nyorrata te ina olong nirikoo olorora lino te ilo doinyo sinyati. Ebaiki tadekenya enasirie ore anaa enkoileelio kelotu kitisho ino aikununye neijia. 
Psalms110:4 Einosa Olaitoriani olmumai, nemeibelekenya ninye, “Ira iyie olapolosani ntarasi, to lkerreti le Melkisedek.”" 
Psalms110:5 Etii Olaitoriani enkaina ino e tatene; near ninye ilaiguanak te nkolong e ngoro enye. 
Psalms110:6 Kedung'oki ninye nkuapi enkiguana, neiput nkuapi mpopoki; near ninye ilaiguanak te ina kop nalala." 
Psalms110:7 Keokisho ninye too nchorroi naatii embata e nkoitoi; ore enkaraki ina keraposhu ninye endukuya enye. 
Psalms111:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani. Kaisho nanu Olaitoriani enashe to ltau lai pooki, ti atua eumata oo supati, ti atua olturrur." 
Psalms111:2 Eikituaak isiaaitin o Laitoriani, neiteng'ena pooki ooshipakino." 
Psalms111:3 Ebore enkanyit o enkitoo isiaaitin enyena, nebikoo esupatisho enye ntarasi." 
Psalms111:4 Eishoo ninye metadamuni isiaaitin enyena; aipirisioni Olaitoriani neeta olng'ur. 
Psalms111:5 Neisho ninye endaa lelo ooure ninye; merikino ae kata ninye osotua lenye. 
Psalms111:6 Eitoduaa ninye iltung'ana lenyena isiaaitin enyena, aisho ninche enjung'ore oo nkuapi." 
Psalms111:7 Ore esiaai oo nkaik enyena naa isipat o supati; ore nkiguanat enyena naa keirukoyu," 
Psalms111:8 eitasheyieki ntarasi o ntarasi, pee easi te sipata o te supatisho." 
Psalms111:9 Eirriwaka ninye enjeunoto iltung'ana lenyena; neitanapisho ninye to sotua lenye ntarasi. Eisinyati neitureisho enkarna enye! 
Psalms111:10 Ore euriata o Laitoriani enkiterunoto e ng'eno nagut; eeta eyiolounoto lelo pooki oasishore. Ebikoo enkisisa enye ntarasi! 
Psalms112:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani. Emayiana ilo tung'ani oure Olaitoriani, ilo oshipakino oleng nkitanapat enyena!" 
Psalms112:2 Keaku eishoi enye magilani te nkop; ore eishoi e lelo supati naa kemayiani. 
Psalms112:3 Etii dupoto o karsisisho atua enkaji enye; ore esupatisho nebikoo ntarasi. 
Psalms112:4 Keilepaki ewang'an ti atua enaimin ilo supat; aipirisioni Olaitoriani, neeta olng'ur naa asipani." 
Psalms112:5 Eisupat ilo tung'ani oasisho te leng'on neishooyo te sile, ilo oas mbaa enyena too sipat." 
Psalms112:6 Amu meiwuang'ieki ae kata olasipani; kedamuni ninye ntarasi. 
Psalms112:7 Meure ninye elimunoto oo lomon torrok; keitashe oltau lenye auno, aisilig Olaitoriani." 
Psalms112:8 Keitirring'a oltau lenye, meureisho ninye, o metaba anaa nedol eyieunoto enye too lmang'ati lenyena." 
Psalms112:9 Eishooyie ninye pesho, eishoo ninye ilo aisinani; kebikoo esipata enye ntarasi; keishur emowuo enye te nkisisa." 
Psalms112:10 Nedol oltung'ani torrono ina negoro; neony ilala nelepori; ore eyieunoto oltung'ani torrono naa keish. 
Psalms113:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani! Esisa, intae, isinyat lo Laitoriani, esisa enkarna o Laitoriani!" 
Psalms113:2 Meisisi enkarna o Laitoriani ebaiki ena kata o ntarasi! 
Psalms113:3 Ebaiki enkilepunoto e nkolong o metabaiki endoyioroto, keisisi enkarna o Laitoriani!" 
Psalms113:4 Olaitoriani otii shumata alus too nkuapi pooki, nelusoo enkitoo enye te keper!" 
Psalms113:5 Kaing'ae onyaanyukie Olaitoriani Enkai ang, natonita te shumata," 
Psalms113:6 neing'or ninye enkop elakuaniki ore etii keper neing'or enkop. 
Psalms113:7 Ninye odumu olaisinani too nkulukuok, nedumu olomena aitung'uaa olchala loo nkuruon," 
Psalms113:8 pee eisho ninche metotona te nebo ilkituaak, te nebo ilkituaak loo ltung'ana lenyena." 
Psalms113:9 Neisho ninye enkitok olupi ang, neitaa ninye entomononi nashipa naata nkera. Meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms114:1 Ore apa pee epuo Isiraeli aaing'uaa Misiri, nelo enkaji e Yakobo aing'uaa olorere oiro enkutuk neme enenye," 
Psalms114:2 etaa Yuda ewueji enye sinyati, neaku Israel enkitoria enye." 
Psalms114:3 Neing'or enaiposha neilanyisho, nerrinyo olkeju le Yordan alo siadi." 
Psalms114:4 Neitigiran ildoinyo anaa ilmeregeshi, neitigiran ndoinyo anaa ilkuoo le kerra." 
Psalms114:5 Kainyoo nikinosita iyie, enaiposha, pee isikita? O iyie, Yordan, eji pee itorrinye siadi?" 
Psalms114:6 O intae, ildoinyo, pee ntigiranana anaa ilmeregeshi? O intae, ndoinyo, pee intigiranana anaa ilkuoo le kerra?" 
Psalms114:7 Nkirikirayu na kop, te dukuya Olaitoriani, te dukuya e Nkai e Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 laa ninye oibelekeny endapidapoi aitaa enchorro e nkare, neitaa oltotoi ogol enkong'u e nkare." 
Psalms115:1 Mme iyiook, Olaitoriani, mme iyiook, kake enkarna ino nchoo enkisisa, te nkaraki enyorrata ino nauno o sipat inono!" 
Psalms115:2 Kainyoo pee ejo loshon, “Koree Enkai enye?”" 
Psalms115:3 Etii Enkai ang keper, neas ninye anaa enayieu." 
Psalms115:4 Ore nkitanyaanyukot enye naa enkosholai o sahabu, esiaai oo nkaik e tung'ana." 
Psalms115:5 Neeta nkutukie kake meiro; neeta nkonyek kake medolisho. 
Psalms115:6 Neeta nkiyaa kake mening'isho; neeta nkumeishin kake meing'uaisho. 
Psalms115:7 Neeta nkaik kake meirrapirrapisho, o nkejek, kake meyiolo aashom; nemeitayu oltoilo too lng'ejepa lenye." 
Psalms115:8 Ore lelo ooitobira nenyaanyukie ninche; naa neijia etiu lelo pooki ooisilig ninche. 
Psalms115:9 Iyie Israel, isiliga Olaitoriani! Ninye eretoto enye naa ninye elong'o enye." 
Psalms115:10 Na aji e Aron, tipika osiligi lino Olaitoriani! Ninye eretoto enye naa ninye elong'o enye." 
Psalms115:11 Ntae kulo ooure Olaitoriani, esiliga Olaitoriani! Ninye eretoto enye naa elong'o enye." 
Psalms115:12 Etadamua Olaitoriani iyiook; kemayian ninye iyiook; kemayian ninye enkaji e Israel; kemayian ninye enkaji e Aron; 
Psalms115:13 kemayian ninye lelo ooure Olaitoriani, ilooti o lkituaak." 
Psalms115:14 Metopona intae Olaitoriani, intae o nkera inyi!" 
Psalms115:15 Metamayiana intae Olaitoriani, laa ninye oitobira keper o enkop!" 
Psalms115:16 Ore keper naa eno Laitoriani, kake ore enkop neishoo ninye nkera e tung'ana." 
Psalms115:17 Meisis ilootuata Olaitoriani, nemeisis hoo obo le lelo oodoyio aapuo engira." 
Psalms115:18 Kake eikisis iyiook Olaitoriani ebaiki ena kata taata o ntarasi. Meisisi Olaitoriani! 
Psalms116:1 Anyor nanu Olaitoriani amu etoning'o ninye oltoilo lai o enkomono ai. 
Psalms116:2 Amu aairrugoko ninye nanu enkiok enye, ore enkaraki ina kaipot nanu ninye nkolong'i naaba anaa inaishu." 
Psalms116:3 Aatang'adutua nanu irresheta le keeya; aaibung'a nanu nkeenta emion kitok e nemeneng'a; natum nanu osina o emion. 
Psalms116:4 Naitoki nanu aipot enkarna o Laitoriani: “Olaitoriani, aatasayia nanu, ntajeu enkishui ai!”" 
Psalms116:5 Aipirisioni Olaitoriani, naa asipani; eeta Enkai ang olng'ur." 
Psalms116:6 Kegolie Olaitoriani olobor; ore pee aaibookini enkop, naaitajeu ninye." 
Psalms116:7 Torrinyokinoyu lo tau lai enkiyeng'iyeng ino; amu kimpirisie iyie Olaitoriani. 
Psalms116:8 Amu itokordua iyie enkishui ai te keeya, o nkonyek aainei too lkiyio, o nkejek aainei te rrorroto." 
Psalms116:9 Alo nanu te dukuya Olaitoriani ti atua enkop oo looishu. 
Psalms116:10 Aibung'a nanu enkirukoto ai, hoo ninye te natejo, “Aaisilisiloki nanu oleng”;" 
Psalms116:11 natejo nanu te siokinoto ai, “Ilepesho iltung'ana pooki.”" 
Psalms116:12 Kainyoo nanu aisho Olaitoriani too nkishorot enyena pooki naaishoo nanu? 
Psalms116:13 Kang'amaa nanu enkikompe e njeunoto, naipot enkarna o Laitoriani," 
Psalms116:14 nalaaki Olaitoriani olmumai lai te dukuya iltung'ana lenyena pooki. 
Psalms116:15 Ene tipat te dukuya Olaitoriani keeya oo sinyat lenyena. 
Psalms116:16 Olaitoriani, ara nanu osinka lino, ara osinka lino, olayioni le nkaisiaayiani ino. Iyie otalaa ienat aainei." 
Psalms116:17 Kaaisho nanu iyie olasar le nashe naipot enkarna o Laitoriani. 
Psalms116:18 Kalak nanu ilmuma laainei to Laitoriani te dukuya iltung'ana lenyena pooki," 
Psalms116:19 too lgorieti le nkaji o Laitoriani, te mpolos ino, iyie Yerusalem. Meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms117:1 Esisa Olaitoriani iloreren pooki! Esisa ninye intae iltung'ana pooki! 
Psalms117:2 Amu eikitok enyorrata enye nauno ti alo iyiook; ore esipata o Laitoriani mebikoo ntarasi. Meisisi Olaitoriani! 
Psalms118:1 Enchoo Olaitoriani enashe, amu eisupat ninye; ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi!" 
Psalms118:2 Nchoo Israel ejo, “Ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi.”" 
Psalms118:3 Nchoo nkaji e Aron ejo, “Ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi.”" 
Psalms118:4 Nchoo lelo ooure Olaitoriani ejo, “Ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ti atua osina lai nanu aipoto Olaitoriani; naawaliki nanu Olaitoriani naalaku nanu. 
Psalms118:6 Ore etii Olaitoriani enkalo ai maureisho nanu. Kaa nanu aaidim oltung'ani aitaasa? 
Psalms118:7 Etii Olaitoriani enkalo ai pee aaretu nanu, kaing'or nanu te nkisulata lelo laaiba nanu." 
Psalms118:8 Enaikash te nesaruni Olaitoriani alang te neisiligi iltung'ana. 
Psalms118:9 Enaikash te nesaruni Olaitoriani alang te neisiligi ilkituaak. 
Psalms118:10 Aatamana aamuat nanu iloreren pooki; ore te nkarna o Laitoriani namir nanu ninche! 
Psalms118:11 Aatamana aamuat ninche nanu, naaimu too nchot pooki; ore te nkarna o Laitoriani namir nanu ninche!" 
Psalms118:12 Aatamana ninche anaa lotorok, neyupuyup anaa enkima oo lkiku; ore te nkarna o Laitoriani namir nanu ninche!" 
Psalms118:13 Aaturrumoyioki nanu oleng, eyieu arriaa, kake aatareto Olaitoriani." 
Psalms118:14 Olaitoriani engolon ai naa osinkolio lai; etaa ninye enjeunoto ai. 
Psalms118:15 Enining'o isinkolioitin sidain le nkisulata ti atua ilng'oborri le lelo sinyat: “Te nkaina enye e tatene eas Olaitoriani e nking'asia," 
Psalms118:16 eilepieki enkaina e tatene o Laitoriani, te nkaina enye e tatene eas Olaitoriani inenking'asia!”" 
Psalms118:17 Maye nanu, kake kalo aishu, naiken nkiasin o Laitoriani." 
Psalms118:18 Aaitamio nanu Olaitoriani oleng, kake eitu ninye aapalaa matua." 
Psalms118:19 Tabolokoki nanu nchomito oo sipat, pee atum nanu aima ninche nalo aisho Olaitoriani enashe." 
Psalms118:20 Ena ninye kishomi o Laitoriani; ninye eimu ilo asipani. 
Psalms118:21 Kaaisho nanu iyie enashe amu kitawalikia nitaa iyie enjeunoto ai. 
Psalms118:22 Ore ilo soit otanyaita ilashetak netaa ole ndukuya olmairroto. 
Psalms118:23 Enkiaas o Laitoriani ena; enking'asia too nkonyek ang. 
Psalms118:24 Enkolong ena naitobira Olaitoriani; matishipakinoto niking'ida te ninye. 
Psalms118:25 Ntajeu iyiook, kitasayia iyie, Olaitoriani! Olaitoriani, kitasayia iyie, nchoo iyiook dupoto!" 
Psalms118:26 Emayiana ilo olotu te nkarna o Laitoriani! Kimayian iyie too mayianat naaing'uaa enkaji o Laitoriani. 
Psalms118:27 Olaitoriani ninye Enkai, neishoo ninye iyiook ewang'an. Embung'a ilng'osil too lkererin ipuopuo, o entabaiki imouarak o lperere lo lasar!" 
Psalms118:28 Ira iyie Enkai ai, kaaisho nanu iyie enashe; ira iyie Enkai ai, naa kaarrep nanu iyie." 
Psalms118:29 Oi enchoo Olaitoriani enashe amu eisupat ninye; amu obikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi. 
Psalms119:1 Emayiana lelo lemeeta ileyiat too nkoitoi enye, lelo oopuo too nkitanapat o Laitoriani!" 
Psalms119:2 Emayiana lelo ooibung enchakenisho enye, lelo ooing'oru ninye too ltauja lenye pooki," 
Psalms119:3 lelo lemeas entorroni, kake nkoitoi enyena epuoyie!" 
Psalms119:4 Ntanapishe iyie too nkitanapat inono pee eibung'i ninche aakurraki. 
Psalms119:5 Oi naaji te neitashe nkoitoi aainei te nkibung'ata oo nkitanapat inono! 
Psalms119:6 Nemaaitukurruni naa nanu, amu aipirakinye nkoitoi aainei nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:7 Kaaisis nanu iyie to ltau sidai te nayiolou nkiguanat inono naasipa. 
Psalms119:8 Kasuj nanu nkitanapat inono; mikinturraa nanu tukul! 
Psalms119:9 Kaji eiko olbarnoti pee eitisidan nkoitoi enyena? Tenegolie ninye te risioroto o rorei lino. 
Psalms119:10 To ltau lai pooki nanu aaing'oru iyie; mikincho nanu matalamari aing'uaa nkitanapat inono! 
Psalms119:11 Atushuma nanu ororei lino to ltau lai, pee maas ake eng'oki ti alo iyie." 
Psalms119:12 Mikisisi iyie Olaitoriani; nteng'enaki nanu nkitanapat inono! 
Psalms119:13 Te nkutuk ai nanu aibalunye nkiguanat pooki naaing'uaa enkutuk ino. 
Psalms119:14 Too nkoitoi e nchakenisho ino nanu ashipa anaa te neshipakinoi karsisisho sapuk. 
Psalms119:15 Kaibirribir nanu nkiguanat inono, naipirakinye nkonyek aainei nkoitoi inono." 
Psalms119:16 Kashipakino nanu nkitanapat inono; maarikino nanu ororei lino. 
Psalms119:17 Ntaasa mbaa supati osinka lino, pee atum nanu ataa kaishu, nasuj ororei lino." 
Psalms119:18 Taboloki nkonyek aainei pee atum atoduaa mbaa e nking'asia naaing'uaa enkitanapata ino. 
Psalms119:19 Ara nanu olomoni te nkop, mikisudoriyie nanu nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:20 Etalepori oltau lai te yieunoto oo nkiguanat inono nkatitin pooki. 
Psalms119:21 Iyie oisikong'a iloowuasa, lelo oodiaa, lelo oolimana aaing'uaa nkitanapat inono;" 
Psalms119:22 iwuang'ie te nanu elap enye o lmena lenye, amu aibung'a nanu enchakenisho ino." 
Psalms119:23 Ore sii eirragita ilkituaak aarreshito nanu, nkiguanat inono ninche eibirribir osinka lino." 
Psalms119:24 Enchakenisho ino naaitiship nanu, ninche naaiguen nanu aautaa." 
Psalms119:25 Eirruge oltau lai abaiki enkop; ntopiuoki nanu te risioroto o rorei lino! 
Psalms119:26 Te nairo nanu aimaki nkoitoi aainei, nikiwaliki iyie nanu; nteng'enaki nanu nkiteng'enat inono!" 
Psalms119:27 Nchooki nanu matayiolo asipu nkitanapat inono, naa kaibirribir nanu isiaaitin inono e nking'asia." 
Psalms119:28 Etalepori oltau lai te nkaraki osina; ntagoloki nanu te risioroto o rorei lino! 
Psalms119:29 Ntalamaki nanu nkoitoi e lejare; ore te mpiris ino nteng'enaki nanu nkitanapat inono! 
Psalms119:30 Ategelua nanu enkoitoi oo sipat, atipika nanu nkiguanat inono dukuya nanu." 
Psalms119:31 Aigarakine nanu shakenisho ino, Olaitoriani; mikincho nanu maaitukurruni!" 
Psalms119:32 Kalo nanu aipirri te nkoitoi oo nkitanapat inono ti nikintalalaki nanu eyiolounoto ai! 
Psalms119:33 Nteng'enaki nanu, Olaitoriani, enkoitoi oo nkitanapat inono; naa kaibung nanu o metabaiki enkiting'oto." 
Psalms119:34 Nchooki nanu eyiolounoto, pee atum aibung'a enkitanapata ino, nasipu to ltau lai pooki." 
Psalms119:35 Torikoyioki nanu te nkoitoi oo nkitanapat inono, amu ninye ashipakino." 
Psalms119:36 Ntonyorra oltau lai enchakenisho ino, nimintonyor dupoto." 
Psalms119:37 Mbelekenya nkonyek aainei pee meing'or mbaa e pesho, nikincho nanu enkishui too nkoitoi inono." 
Psalms119:38 Ntudupa to sinka lino enkisiligata ino, naa ninye ene lelo likiure iyie." 
Psalms119:39 Mbelekenya ntung'uayioki ina sulare naure, amu eisupati nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:40 Ng'ura, nkitanapat inono nanu aanyita; ore te supatisho ino nchooki nanu enkishui!" 
Psalms119:41 Nchoo ina nyorrata ino nauno elotu enatii nanu, Olaitoriani, nchoo enjeunoto ino elotu te risioroto e nkisiligata ino;" 
Psalms119:42 pee atum taa enawalata te lelo laaikordod, amu ororei lino nanu aisilig." 
Psalms119:43 Nimiwuang'ie ororei le sipata te nkutuk ai, amu ore osiligi lai netii atua nkiguanat inono." 
Psalms119:44 Kaibung nanu nkitanapat inono anaake, ntarasi o ntarasi;" 
Psalms119:45 naa kalo nanu te lakunoto, amu aing'orua nanu nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:46 Kalo sii airo enchakenisho ino te dukuya ilaiguanak, nemaaitukurruni nanu;" 
Psalms119:47 amu too nkitanapat inono nanu atum enchipai, amu ninche nanu anyor." 
Psalms119:48 Kayanyit nanu nkitanapat inono, amu ninche anyor, naa kaibirribir nanu nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:49 Tadamu ororei lino to sinka lino, laa ninye nanu kinchoo maisiliga." 
Psalms119:50 Ena ninye enkitagoloto ai te nkata o sina, nchere kaaisho nanu enkisiligata ino enkishui." 
Psalms119:51 Aasukenyita nanu oleng lelo lemeure Enkai, kake maibelekenya nanu aing'uaa enkitanapata ino." 
Psalms119:52 Te nadamu nanu nkiguanat inono ebaiki apa moitie, naitagoluo nanu, Olaitoriani." 
Psalms119:53 Aaibung'a nanu emion oleng te nkaraki lelo arruok, lelo ootanyaita nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:54 Nkitanapat inono naataa isinkolioitin laainei ti atua enkaji ai e omonisho. 
Psalms119:55 Adamu nanu enkarna ino kewarie, Olaitoriani, naibung nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:56 Aatadoikio nanu ena mayianata, nchere aibung'a nanu nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:57 Olaitoriani ninye erubata ai; atonyorrayie nanu nchere kaibung nkitanapat inono. 
Psalms119:58 Ore to ltau lai pooki atonyuaa nanu aing'oru omom ino; ng'urrieki nanu te risioroto e nkisiligata ino. 
Psalms119:59 Te nadamu nanu inkoitoi inono, naibelekeny nkejek aainei aipirie enchakenisho ino;" 
Psalms119:60 naisarrisar nanu eitu aimutie aibung nkitanapat inono. 
Psalms119:61 Ore ninye te naarresh nkeenta e ilo torrono, maarikino nanu enkitanapata ino." 
Psalms119:62 Ore te mpolos e nkewarie naainyototo nanu aisis iyie, te nkaraki inkitanapat inono naasipa." 
Psalms119:63 Ara nanu ole ncholuek e lelo likiure iyie, ole lelo ooibung nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:64 Ore enkop pooki, Olaitoriani, ebore enyorrata ino nauno; nteng'enaki nanu nkikuanat inono!" 
Psalms119:65 Ntaasa iyie osinka lino isupati, Olaitoriani, te risioroto o rorei lino." 
Psalms119:66 Nteng'enaki nanu enkiguana sidai o eng'eno, amu airuko nanu nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:67 Ore apa eton eitu aaitamei natapong'ori nanu; kake aibung'a taata ororei lino. 
Psalms119:68 Ira iyie supat nias isupati, nteng'enaki nanu nkoitoi inono." 
Psalms119:69 Ore lelo lemeure Enkai naaiteenikitia ninche elejare, kake aibung'a nanu to ltau lai pooki nkitanapat inono;" 
Psalms119:70 meeta kulo tung'ana ening'unoto kake ashipakino nanu nkitanapat inono. 
Psalms119:71 Eisidai apa te naaitamioki nanu, pee atum atayiolo nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:72 Ore enkitanapata naing'uaa enkutuk ino naa eisidai alang nkalifuni e sahabu o enkosholai. 
Psalms119:73 Nkaik inono naaitayutuo nanu naaitobiru; nchooki nanu eyiolounoto pee atum aiteng'enuo too nkitanapat inono. 
Psalms119:74 Ore lelo likiure iyie naadol nanu neng'idayu, enkaraki naisiliga nanu ororei lino." 
Psalms119:75 Ayiolo nanu, Olaitoriani, nchere nkiguanat inono naasipa, nayiolo nchere te sipata iyie kintamio nanu." 
Psalms119:76 Nchoo enyorrata ino nauno etaanu pee aaitagol nanu, te risioroto e nkisiligata nisiligie osinka lino." 
Psalms119:77 Nchoo olng'ur lino elotu enatii, pee atum nanu ataa kaishu, amu nkitanapat inono naaitiship nanu." 
Psalms119:78 Nchoo meitukurruni lelo lemeure Enkai, amu aaiteenikitia ninche elejare; ore nanu, naa nkitanapat inono ninche aibirribir." 
Psalms119:79 Nchoo lelo likiure iyie aaibelekenyakino nanu, pee etum aatayiolo enchakenisho ino." 
Psalms119:80 Metaa meeta oltau lai entioto too nkitanapat inono, pee maaitukurruni nanu." 
Psalms119:81 Etalepori oltau lai eyieu enjeunoto ino; ororei lino nanu aisiligita. 
Psalms119:82 Eiliilaitie nkonyek aainei aanyita enkisiligata ino; naikilikuanu ajo, “Kanu kenya kintagol nanu?”" 
Psalms119:83 Atotiuo nanu anaa olbene le naisho oo sabibu otii atua empuruo, kake eitu ake aarikino nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:84 Kenkata nabaa engiri eanyisho osinka lino? Kanu iyie inguanare lelo laaisilisil nanu? 
Psalms119:85 Aatuturokitio lelo lemeure Enkai ngumot, lelo tung'ana lemeibung nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:86 Ore nkitanapat inono pooki naa kesipa, naaisilisil nanu iltung'ana te lejare; taretuoki nanu!" 
Psalms119:87 Enkiti wueji pee eitu aaishie nanu te nkop; kake eitu nanu aiturraa nkitanapat inono. 
Psalms119:88 Ore te ina nyorrata ino nauno telekuaki nanu pee atum aibung'a enchakenisho e nkutuk ino. 
Psalms119:89 Ebikoo ororei lino, Olaitoriani, ntarasi te keper." 
Psalms119:90 Ore esupatisho ino nebaiki iishoritin pooki; iyie oitayio enkop nintasheyie ninye. 
Psalms119:91 Ore te nkitanapata ino neitashe ntokitin pooki o metabaiki ena olong; amu ore ntokitin pooki naa iyie eisiaai. 
Psalms119:92 Te neme apa nkitanapat inono naaitiship nanu, anaata nanu aidaaiyie te nkitamioto ai." 
Psalms119:93 Maarikino ae kata nanu nkitanapat inono; amu te ninche nanu kinchoo iyie enkishui. 
Psalms119:94 Ara nanu olino, ntajeuoki; amu aing'orua nanu nkiteng'enat inono." 
Psalms119:95 Eirragita ilarruok pee aaidaikie nanu; kake atadamua nanu shakenisho ino. 
Psalms119:96 Atoduaa nanu engorikinoto oo ntokitin pooki sidain, kake meeta inkitanapat inono eng'orikinoto." 
Psalms119:97 Ebaa enyorrata nanyor nanu nkitanapat inono! Ninye nanu aibirribir endama pooki. 
Psalms119:98 Enkiteng'enata ino naaiteng'en nanu matalang'a ilmang'ati laainei, amu etii te nebo nanu nkatitin pooki." 
Psalms119:99 Aata nanu eyiolounoto alang ilaiteng'enak laainei pooki, amu enchakenisho ino ninye nanu aibirribir." 
Psalms119:100 Ayiolo nanu mbaa oleng alang oltung'ani moruo, amu aibung'ita nanu nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:101 Narishie nanu nkejek aainei pooki oitoi torrono, pee atum aibung'a ororei lino." 
Psalms119:102 Maibelekenya nanu apaash nkitanapat inono, amu kinteng'ena iyie nanu." 
Psalms119:103 Kemelok oleng irorei linono te nainyorrinyor, kemelok aalang enaisho te nkutuk ai!" 
Psalms119:104 Ore too nkitanapat inono natum nanu eyiolounoto; ore enkaraki ina kaiba nanu pooki oitoi torrono. 
Psalms119:105 Ore ororei lino naa oltaa loo nkejek aainei naa ewang'an te nkoitoi ai. 
Psalms119:106 Ainosa nanu olmumai naitadedeyie pee atum atisipu inkitanapat inono naasipa. 
Psalms119:107 Anoto nanu osina kitok; nchooki nanu enkishui, Olaitoriani, te risioroto o rorei lino!" 
Psalms119:108 Tang'amu nkishorot aainei e nkisisa, Olaitoriani, nikinteng'en nanu inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:109 Aibung'ita nanu enkishui ai te nkaina ai anaake, kake eitu nanu aarikino nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:110 Aatipikaka nanu oltorrono orreshet, kake mapaashari nanu alam nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:111 Enchakenisho ino ninye enjung'ore ai ntarasi; ee, ninche eng'ida o ltau lai." 
Psalms119:112 Aibelekenya nanu oltau lai aipirie nkitanapat inono, ntarasi o metabaiki enkiting'oto." 
Psalms119:113 Aiba nanu iltung'ana ooing'ashing'ash, kake anyor nanu nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:114 Ira iyie enkisudoroto ai o elong'o ai; ororei lino nanu aisiliga. 
Psalms119:115 Entalamaki nanu intae ilarruok, pee atum aibung'a nkitanapat e Nkai ai." 
Psalms119:116 Mbung'aki nanu te risioroto e nkisiligata ino, pee aton aishu, nimikincho nanu manoto enkurruna to siligi lai!" 
Psalms119:117 Mbung'aki nanu ilepieki, pee atum ataseriana, natum atishilai nkitanapat inono nkolong'i pooki!" 
Psalms119:118 Itanya iyie lelo oopaash nkitanapat inono; ee, ore enkeleekisho enye naa pesho." 
Psalms119:119 Ore ilarruok pooki le nkop niwuang'ie anaa isuut; ore enkaraki ina anyor nanu shakenisho ino. 
Psalms119:120 Eikirikira osesen lai kiure iyie, naure nanu nkiguanat inono." 
Psalms119:121 Ataasa nanu embae nasipa naishiaakino; mikipalaki nanu ilaitorogonyak laainei. 
Psalms119:122 Taa iyie olaitaishekinoni lo sinka lino te nkaraki isupati; mincho lelo lemeure Enkai aaibooki enkop. 
Psalms119:123 Eiliilaitie nkonyek aainei aing'orita enjeunoto ino, naing'or enkitabaroto enkisiligata ino supat." 
Psalms119:124 Ntaasa osinka lino te risioroto e nyorrata ino nauno, nikinteng'en nanu inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:125 Ara nanu osinka lino; nchooki nanu eyiolounoto, pee atum atayiolo shakenisho ino!" 
Psalms119:126 Etaa enkata naasisho Olaitoriani, amu etigilaki inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:127 Anyor nanu inkitanapat inono, aitalang sahabu, aitalang sahabu nasila." 
Psalms119:128 Ore enkaraki ina aiturubare nanu iroruat aainei nkiguanat inono pooki; aiba nanu pooki oitoi torrono. 
Psalms119:129 Ene nking'asia enchakenisho ino; ore enkaraki ina neibung oltau lai ninche. 
Psalms119:130 Ore embolokinoto o rorei lino neyau ewang'an, neitaarriyian ilo lemeeta eng'eno." 
Psalms119:131 Aipang'ipang nanu ang'aita enkutuk, amu aanyita inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:132 Mbelekenyayu ing'uraki, niking'urrie nanu, anaa oshi ake enintaas lelo oonyor enkarna ino." 
Psalms119:133 Ntirring'ie iroruat aainei te risioroto e nkisiligata ino, nimincho entorroni maaitoria nanu." 
Psalms119:134 Talakuaki nanu too ltung'ana laaibooki enkop, pee atum aibung'a nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:135 Nchoo meitawang'aki enkomom ino osinka lino, nikinteng'en nanu nkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:136 Eturukote nchorroi oo lkiyio too nkonyek aainei, enkaraki nemeibung iltung'ana enkitanapata." 
Psalms119:137 Ira iyie asipani, Olaitoriani, nesipa nkiguanat inono." 
Psalms119:138 Itegelua iyie enchakenisho ino too sipat o te supatisho pooki. 
Psalms119:139 Aainosita nanu olom, enkaraki narikino ilmang'ati laainei irorei linono." 
Psalms119:140 Ore enkisiligata ino netetemaki oleng, nenyor osinka lino ninye." 
Psalms119:141 Ara nanu oti naatemenaki, kake maarikino nanu inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:142 Ore esipata ino nesipa ntarasi, ore inkitanapat inono nesipa." 
Psalms119:143 Eeuo enyamali o sina shumata nanu, kake inkitanapat inono naaitiship nanu." 
Psalms119:144 Esipa enchakenisho ino ntarasi; nchooki nanu eyiolounoto pee aton aishu. 
Psalms119:145 Aishirita nanu to ltau lai pooki; tawalikiaki nanu Olaitoriani! Kaibung nanu inkitanapat inono. 
Psalms119:146 Aaishiraka nanu iyie; ntajeuoki nanu; pee atum atisipu enchakenisho ino. 
Psalms119:147 Adumunye nanu aishir enamanarie enkakenya, naishir te nkaraki eretoto; naisilig nanu irorei linono." 
Psalms119:148 Maiken nanu nkonyek enkewarie pooki, pee atum aibirribirra enkisiligata ino." 
Psalms119:149 Toning'o oltoilo lai te nkaraki enyorrata ino nauno; Olaitoriani, ore te nkaraki isipat inono tagolie enkishui ai." 
Psalms119:150 Etinyikutua lelo laaisilisil nanu too ntorrok; elakuaniki ninche nkitanapat inono.
