Psalms119:151 Kake itaana iyie, Olaitoriani, nesipa nkitanapat inono pooki." 
Psalms119:152 Atayiolo apa nanu moitie te nchakenisho ino nchere ntobira apa ninche ntarasi. 
Psalms119:153 Ing'ura iyie osina lai, nikikordu nanu, amu maarikino nanu enkitanapata ino." 
Psalms119:154 Taa iyie liking'or nikilaku nanu; nchooki nanu enkishui te risioroto e nkisiligata ino! 
Psalms119:155 Elakuaniki enjeunoto ilarruok, amu meing'oru ninche inkiguanat inono." 
Psalms119:156 Eikitok olng'ur lino, Olaitoriani; nchooki nanu enkishui te risioroto oo sipat inono." 
Psalms119:157 Kumok ilaisilisilok laainei o lmang'ati laainei; kake malimana nanu apaash enchakenisho ino. 
Psalms119:158 Aaing'or nanu lelo lemeisiligayu te ngoro, amu meibung ninche inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:159 Toduaa eneba enyorrata nanyor nanu inkiguanat inono! Tagolie enkishui ai te risioroto e nyorrata ino nauno. 
Psalms119:160 Ore esiana o rorei lino naa esipata, ore pooki ng'ae loo sipat oo inkiguanat inono nebikoo ntarasi." 
Psalms119:161 Aaisilisil nanu ilkituaak metii emporeet, kake eitashe oltau lai eanyit irorei linono." 
Psalms119:162 Ashipakino nanu ororei lino, anaa oltung'ani otum imasaa kumok." 
Psalms119:163 Aiba nanu namen entorroni, kake anyor inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:164 Katitin naapishana nanu aaisis iyie te nkolong te nkaraki inkiguanat inono naasipa. 
Psalms119:165 Eeta eseriani kitok lelo oonyor enkitanapata ino; meetae entoki narror ninye. 
Psalms119:166 Aisiligita nanu enjeunoto ino, Olaitoriani, naas nanu inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms119:167 Eibung oltau lai enchakenisho ino; nanyor nanu enchakenisho ino oleng. 
Psalms119:168 Aibung nanu inkiguanat inono o enchakenisho ino, amu etii nkoitoi aainei pooki dukuya iyie." 
Psalms119:169 Nchoo enkishirata ai elotu dukuya iyie, Olaitoriani; nchooki nanu ening'unoto te risioroto o rorei lino." 
Psalms119:170 Nchoo enkomono ai elotu dukuya iyie; tokorduaki nanu te risioroto o rorei lino. 
Psalms119:171 Elimu enkutuk ai enkisisa ino amu kinteng'en nanu nkiteng'enat inono. 
Psalms119:172 Erany olng'ejep lai irorei linono, amu ore inkitanapat inono pooki nesipa." 
Psalms119:173 Nchoo enkaina ino etaanu pee aaret nanu, amu ategelua nanu nkiguanat inono." 
Psalms119:174 Aanyita nanu enjeunoto ino, Olaitoriani, naa nkitanapat inono naaitiship." 
Psalms119:175 Nchooki nanu aishu, pee aatum aisisa, naa nchoo nkiguanat inono aaret nanu." 
Psalms119:176 Ashomo nanu apong'ori anaa enker naimina; ing'oru osinka lino, amu maarikino nanu inkitanapat inono." 
Psalms120:1 Ore to sina lai aishiraka nanu Olaitoriani, pee aatum atawaliki nanu." 
Psalms120:2 “Tokorduaki nanu, Olaitoriani, too ltung'ana le lejare, te ilo ng'ejep olejisho.”" 
Psalms120:3 Kainyoo kenya kinchori iyie? Naa kainyoo kenya kintokini aaitaas, iyie lo lng'ejep le lejare?" 
Psalms120:4 Mbaa naapi o lang'oroni, naaitagoloki too nkuk naaishu o lchani!" 
Psalms120:5 Oi nanu, olomanya atua Meshek, obikito too lng'oborri le Kedar!" 
Psalms120:6 Atobiko te nkata naado ti atua lelo ooiba eseriani. 
Psalms120:7 Anyor nanu eseriani; kake te nairo naa lo larrabal ninche 
Psalms121:1 Araposhu nanu nkonyek aainei aing'or ildoinyo. Kaji eing'uaa eretoto ai? 
Psalms121:2 Olaitoriani eing'uaa eretoto ai, laa ninye oitobira keper o enkop." 
Psalms121:3 Nemeisho ninye meigusugusieki enkeju ino, ore ilo likirrip iyie nemeimug." 
Psalms121:4 Ng'ura, ore ilo orrip Israel nemeimug nemeirura." 
Psalms121:5 Olaitoriani ninye olarriponi lino; Olaitoriani ninye oloip lino te nkalo enkaina ino e tatene. 
Psalms121:6 Nimikiosh iyie enkolong te ndama, anaa olapa te nkewarie." 
Psalms121:7 Olaitoriani likirrip iyie too ntorrok pooki; naa kerrip ninye enkishui ino. 
Psalms121:8 Kerrip Olaitoriani enkipang'ata ino o enjing'unoto ino, ebaiki ena kata o ntarasi." 
Psalms122:1 Atishipe pee aajoki ninche, “Maape enkaji o Laitoriani!”" 
Psalms122:2 Eitasheito nkejek ang too nchomito inono, iyie Yerusalem!" 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalem, nateshetaki anaa enkanasa, nateshetuaki meibung'ayu te nebo," 
Psalms122:4 naa ninye eilep iloshon aapuo, lelo oshon lo Laitoriani, anaa apa enaitanapaki Israel, pee eisho enkarna o Laitoriani enashe." 
Psalms122:5 Eirragieki ilorikan le nkiguana te ine, lelo orikan le nkitoo le nkaji e Daudi." 
Psalms122:6 Entoomon te nkaraki eseriani e Yerusalem! “Metubula lelo likinyor iyie! 
Psalms122:7 Meeu eseriani isunta inono, nelotu erripoto atua iltaleta inono!”" 
Psalms122:8 Ore too lalashera laainei o le ncholuek ai, ajo nanu, “Metijing'a eseriani atua iyie!”" 
Psalms122:9 Ore te nkaraki enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai ang, ekaing'oru nanu esupatisho ino." 
Psalms123:1 Iyie nanu araposhoki nkonyek aainei, iyie olotonita to lorika le nkitoo te keper!" 
Psalms123:2 Ng'ura, ore anaa enaing'or nkonyek oo sinkan olkitok lenye, anaa enaing'or nkonyek enkaisiaayiani enkaina e eina naitore ninye, neijia etiu nkonyek ang eing'or Olaitoriani Enkai ang, o metaba anaa neing'urrie ninye iyiook." 
Psalms123:3 Ing'urrie iyiook, Olaitoriani, ing'urrie iyiook, amu kinoto iyiook nkisilisilot naalus." 
Psalms123:4 Te nkata naado eeta iltauja lang isukenyat e lelo ooisikarra, isukenyat e lelo oowuasa." 
Psalms124:1 Te neme apa Olaitoriani otii enkalo ang nchoo taa Israel ejo tena kata 
Psalms124:2 te neme taa apa Olaitoriani otii enkalo ang, ina kata pee edumakino iyiook iltung'ana aagilunore," 
Psalms124:3 anaata etoijoitie ninche iyiook kinchu, ina kata pee eyupuyup engoro enye ti alo iyiook;" 
Psalms124:4 naa anaata etooroyie iyiook oloirrag le nkare, anaata eimisie iyiook enkare;" 
Psalms124:5 anaata eima ilopir le nkare shumata iyiook. 
Psalms124:6 Meisisi Olaitoriani, amu eitu ninye eishooyo iyiook matotiu anaa eng'ues natarreshoki te rishata oo lala lenye." 
Psalms124:7 Kilanyishote iyiook anaa emotonyi te ilo rreshet lo larreshoni etigile orreshet, nikilanyishote iyiook." 
Psalms124:8 Etii eretoto ang atua enkarna o Laitoriani, laa ninye oitobira keper o enkop." 
Psalms125:1 Ore lelo ooisilig Olaitoriani netiu anaa oldoinyo le Sion, lemeidimi aaigusugusie, kake ebik ninye ntarasi." 
Psalms125:2 Ore anaa enamanita ildoinyo Yerusalem, neijia etiu Olaitoriani emanita iltungana lenyena, ebaiki ena kata o intarasi." 
Psalms125:3 Amu melotu eng'udi e nkitoria e lelo arruok shumata ina kop natudung'okoki isupati pee meitorioo ake isupati nkaik enye aas entorroni. 
Psalms125:4 Ntaasa isupati, Olaitoriani, lelo oonyor isupati, o lelo supati too ltauja lenye!" 
Psalms125:5 Kake ore lelo ooibelekenya aapuo aaim nkoitoi enye naalojiloja, nelo Olaitoriani arikoo ninche te nebo lelo torrok! Meeu eseriani Israel!" 
Psalms126:1 Ore apa pee errinyu Olaitoriani lelo ootaarayioki le Sion, nikitiu iyiook anaa ilooidetidet." 
Psalms126:2 Neitoki enkuenia aiput nkutukie ang, neiput ilng'ejepa lang mbuakunot e ng'ida; nejo ninche ti atua nkuapi, “Etaasa Olaitoriani mbaa sapuki te nkaraki ninche.”" 
Psalms126:3 Etaasa Olaitoriani mbaa sapuki te nkaraki iyiook; kitishipate iyiook. 
Psalms126:4 Torrinyu lelo lang apa ootaarayioki, Olaitoriani, meikununye anaa nchorroi e Negeb!" 
Psalms126:5 Nchoo lelo oounisho too lkiyio eisampu too mbuakunot e ng'ida! 
Psalms126:6 Ore ilo olo eishirita, enapita olantererai olo aun, nelotu ang too mbuakunot e ng'ida, enapita enkisampuare enye." 
Psalms127:1 Te neitu eshet Olaitoriani enkaji, ore lelo ooshet pesho eekenya. Te neitu errip Olaitoriani enkanasa, ore lelo oorrip pesho eshololo." 
Psalms127:2 Te mpesho inyototo intae tadekenya, nimutietie eitu ipuopuo aairura, ninosinoso endaa osina; amu eisho ninye ilo onyor lenye njo." 
Psalms127:3 Ng'ura, nkera ninche enjung'ore naing'uaa Olaitoriani, ore nkera naa nkishorot naaing'uaa ninye." 
Psalms127:4 Ore nkera naatum oltung'ani te kitisho, netiu anaa mbaa te nkaina olmurrani" 
Psalms127:5 Emayiana ilo tung'ani oiputa emootian enye mbaa! Medol ninye enkurruna te neirorie ilmang'ati lenyena te kishomi. 
Psalms128:1 Emayiana pooki ng'ae oure Olaitoriani, ilo olo too nkoitoi enyena!" 
Psalms128:2 Amu inos iyie ilng'anayio le nkisiayiare oo nkaik inono; ishipayu iyie neaku sidain mbaa ti alo iyie. 
Psalms128:3 Naa ketiu enkitok ino anaa olchani loo lng'anayio ti atua enkaji ino; netiu nkera inono anaa nkaitubulu oo loirienito emanita emesa ino. 
Psalms128:4 Ng'ura, neijia eikunakini emayianata eilo tung'ani oure Olaitoriani." 
Psalms128:5 Mikitamayiana Olaitoriani etii Sion, toduaa iyie dupoto e Yerusalem, too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui ino!" 
Psalms128:6 Tobikoi toduaa nkera oo nkera inono! Meeu eseriani Israel! 
Psalms129:1 “Aaisilisilo ninche nkatitin kumok ebaiki kitisho ai,” nchoo Israel ejo -" 
Psalms129:2 “Aaisilisilo ninche nkatitin kumok ebaiki kitisho ai, kake eitu aaisulu ninche." 
Psalms129:3 Ore ilaturok netuturo ninche enkoriong ai, neitoodor ninche ilbaat lenye.”" 
Psalms129:4 Ore Olaitoriani naa olasipani; etudung'o ninye nkeenta e ilo arruoni. 
Psalms129:5 Ore lelo pooki ooiba Sion, nchoo meitukurruni nerrinyi siadi!" 
Psalms129:6 Metotiuo ninye anaa olkujita otii shumata e nkaji, ilo otoyu eton eitu ebulu," 
Psalms129:7 ilo lemeiput enkaina o ladung'oni, lemeaku erridata te ilo oenisho." 
Psalms129:8 Ore lelo oogiroo nemejo ninche, “Meeu emayianata o Laitoriani shumata iyie! Kimayian intae te nkarna o Laitoriani!”" 
Psalms130:1 Ti atua enguton aaishiraka nanu, Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms130:2 Olaitoriani, toning'o oltoilo lai! Nchoo nkiyiaa inono meinining'o oltoilo le sayiata ai!" 
Psalms130:3 Amaa, tenaa isir intorrok ang, Olaitoriani, kanaata aa ng'ae oidim aitasho?" 
Psalms130:4 Kake iata iyie empalikinoto pee kitumi aatureita. 
Psalms130:5 Aanyita nanu Olaitoriani, ninye eanyu oltau lai naa ororei lenye nanu aisiliga." 
Psalms130:6 Eanyita oltau lai Olaitoriani alang eanyunoto naanyu ilarripok enkakenya, elusoo te anyunoto naanyu ilarripok enkakenya." 
Psalms130:7 Iyie Israel, isiliga Olaitoriani! Amu Olaitoriani etii enyorrata nauno, naa ninye etii enkordunoto kitok." 
Psalms130:8 Naa kekordu ninye Israel too ntorrok enye pooki. 
Psalms131:1 Olaitoriani, eitu epashipashu oltau lai, neitu eshumunye nkonyek aainei aaing'or shumata; maitanyamal nanu kewan too mbaa kituaak o too mbaa e nking'asia te nanu." 
Psalms131:2 Kake aitirring'ie nanu naitobir oltau lai, anaa enkerai naitigiraki to lkina le ng'otonye; etotiuo oltau lai anaa enkerai naitigiraki." 
Psalms131:3 Iyie Israel, isiliga Olaitoriani ebaiki ena olong o ntarasi." 
Psalms132:1 Tadamu, Olaitoriani, te nkaraki Daudi, ilo sina pooki apa onoto ninye;" 
Psalms132:2 einosa ninye olmumai to Laitoriani, neinos ninye olmumai te ilo magilani le Yakobo," 
Psalms132:3 “Majing nanu atua enkaji ai nemajing endapash ai; 
Psalms132:4 maiken nanu nkonyek aainei airura nemaimug aimul nkonyek aainei," 
Psalms132:5 o metaba anaa naing'uraki Olaitoriani ewueji, ewueji nebikie ilo magilani le Yakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Ng'ura kitoning'o iyiook te Efrata, nikitum iyiook too nkong'at e Yaar." 
Psalms132:7 “Maape iyiook emanyisho enye; mateserem iyiook ti abori nkejek enyena!” 
Psalms132:8 Tudumunye, Olaitoriani, shomo ewueji ino e nkiyeng'iyeng'ata, iyie o sanduku lino le nkidimata." 
Psalms132:9 Nchoo meishopokini ilapolosak linono esupatisho, naa nchoo isinyat linono metabuaku te ng'ida." 
Psalms132:10 Ore te nkaraki osinka lino Daudi mimbelekeny enkomom e ilo lino otubukokoki eilata aaput. 
Psalms132:11 Einosa Olaitoriani ti alo Daudi olmumai le dede, nemeitoki ninye aibelekenya te ilo mumai: “Ore obo loo layiok lo sesen lino naa kaitotonie nanu olorika lino le nkitoo." 
Psalms132:12 Te neibung ilayiok linono olning'o lai o enchakenisho ai nalo nanu aiteng'en ninche, ore sii ilayiok lenye ntarasi nepuo aatonie olorika lino le nkitoo.”" 
Psalms132:13 Amu etegelua Olaitoriani Sion; etonyorra ninye aitaa emanyisho enye: 
Psalms132:14 “Ewueji ai nayeng'iyeng'are ena ntarasi; ene nanu abikie amu atonyorra nanu ene. 
Psalms132:15 Naa kamayian nanu ndaiki enyena oleng; naitaraposh lelo aisinak lenyena too ndaiki. 
Psalms132:16 Ore ilapolosak lenyena naishopoki enjeunoto, ore isinyat lenyena naisho mbuakunot e ng'ida." 
Psalms132:17 Ore te ine naisho nanu emowuo e Daudi meishuro; aitobira nanu oltaa te nkaraki ilo otubukokoki eilata aaput. 
Psalms132:18 Ore ilmang'ati lenyena naishopoki enkurruna, kake ore te dukuya enye neishopokini enkopiyia e nkitoo naikishiaan.”" 
Psalms133:1 Ng'ura, kebaa esidano o enchipai te netoni ilalashera to lning'o!" 
Psalms133:2 Etiu anaa eilata nagol enkinyang'a te ndukuya, eruko ajing olmunyei, ajing olmunyei le Aron, eruko adoiki emurt olkila lenye!" 
Psalms133:3 Etiu anaa enkoileelio e Hermon, nadoiki ildoinyo le Sion! Amu te ine eitanapishe Olaitoriani imayianat, enkishui ntarasi." 
Psalms134:1 Wootu, maisisa Olaitoriani, intae isinkan pooki lo Laitoriani, lelo ooitashe kewarie ti atua enkaji o Laitoriani!" 
Psalms134:2 Elepie nkaik inyi te ine wueji sinyati, esisa Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms134:3 Mikitamayiana Olaitoriani etii Sion, ilo oitobira keper o enkop!" 
Psalms135:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani. Meisisi enkarna o Laitoriani, enchoru enkisisa intae isinkan lo Laitoriani," 
Psalms135:2 intae lelo ooitashe ti atua enkaji o Laitoriani, too lgorieti le nkaji e Nkai ang!" 
Psalms135:3 Esisa Olaitoriani, amu aisupat Olaitoriani; enterrep enkarna enye, amu ninye aipirisioni!" 
Psalms135:4 Amu etegelaka Olaitoriani kewan Yakobo, etegelua Israel aitaa olenye." 
Psalms135:5 Amu ayiolo nanu ajo eikitok Olaitoriani, nayiolo nchere etii Olaitoriani lang te shumata nkaitin pooki." 
Psalms135:6 Ore enaba anaa enayieu Olaitoriani neas ninye te keper o te nkop, ti atua inaaiposha o too neegut pooki." 
Psalms135:7 Ninye oishoo nkatampo meilepa too neeiting'ie enkop, ninye oitobira nkiwuang'at te nkata e nchan neyau olkutati aitung'uaa nkajijik enyena naashumishoreki." 
Psalms135:8 Ninye apa otara ilkikaunot le Misiri metuata, o lenkiteng o le ng'ues;" 
Psalms135:9 laa ore ti atua empolos ino, iyie Misiri, neirriu nkitoduaat e nking'asia, agilunore Farao o sinkan lenyena pooki," 
Psalms135:10 Ninye apa ilo otoosho nkuapi kumok nesesekuan ilaiguanak magil," 
Psalms135:11 Sihon, olaiguanani le Amori, o Oog, olaiguanani le Bashan, o nkitoriat pooki e Kanaan," 
Psalms135:12 neishooyo enkop enye aitaa enjung'ore, enjung'ore too ltung'ana lenye loo siraeli." 
Psalms135:13 Ebikoo enkarna ino, Olaitoriani, ntarasi o ntarasi, ira iyie ning'oti ti atua iishoritin pooki." 
Psalms135:14 Amu keitasheyie Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena too sipat, neing'urrie isinkan lenyena." 
Psalms135:15 Ore nena kitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin oo nkuapi naa enkosholai o sahabu, isiaaitin oo nkaik e tung'ana." 
Psalms135:16 Eeta ninche nkutukie, kake meiro, eeta nkonyek kake medolisho," 
Psalms135:17 Eeta nkiyiaa kake mening'isho, nemeeta enkiyang'et too nkutukie enye." 
Psalms135:18 Metotiwuo anaa ninche lelo ooitobiru ninche! Ee metotiwuo neijia pooki ng'ae oisilig ninche! 
Psalms135:19 Na aji e Israel, esisa Olaitoriani! Na aji e Aron, esisa Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms135:20 Na aji e Lawi, isisa Olaitoriani! Intae kulo ooure Olaitoriani, esisa Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms135:21 Esisa Olaitoriani te Sion, ilo obikito le Yerusalem! Meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms136:1 Enchoo Olaitoriani enashe amu eisupat ninye, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi." 
Psalms136:2 Enchoo enashe Enkai oo nkaitin, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi." 
Psalms136:3 Enchoo enashe Olaitoriani loo laitoriak, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:4 ilo laa ninye ake oas ine nking'asia sapuki, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:5 ilo oitobira keper te nkarriyiano, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:6 ilo oisalaasha enkop natoyio te shumata nkariak, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:7 ilo oitobira iwang'aritin sapuki, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:8 neitobir enkolong meitoria endama, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:9 neitobir olapa o lakir meitoria enkewarie, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:10 ilo apa otara metuata ilkikaunot le Misiri, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:11 neipang'unye Isiraeli aitung'uaa atua ninche, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:12 te nkaina nagol naitoriori, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:13 ilo oiperra Enaiposha Nanyokie aitaa are, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:14 neisho Isiraeli meima atua ninye, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:15 kake etusulayie Farao o lorora lenye ti atua Enaiposha Nanyokie, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:16 Ilo otorikoyie iltung'ana lenyena ti ong'ata, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:17 ilo otasesekuana ilaiguanak kituaak, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:18 near to lalem ilaiguanak ning'ot, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:19 Sihon, olaiguanani le Amori, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:20 o Oog, olaiguanani le Bashan, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:21 neishooyo enkop enye metaa enjung'ore, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:22 enjung'ore to sinka lenye Israel, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi." 
Psalms136:23 Ninye otadamua iyiook apa kishal, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:24 nekordu iyiook aitung'uaa ilmang'ati lang, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi;" 
Psalms136:25 ninye oisho endaa ntokitin pooki naaishu, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi." 
Psalms136:26 Enchoo enashe Enkai e keper, amu ebikoo enyorrata enye nauno ntarasi." 
Psalms137:1 Too mbat oo lkejek le Babilon iyiook kitotoni, te ine iyiook kinchira kidamu Sion." 
Psalms137:2 Too lkeek ootaaniki ine kitiika iyiook nkinantani ang. 
Psalms137:3 Amu ore apa te ine, ore lelo ootaaraitie iyiook, neyieu nikiranyaki ninche osinkolio, ore lelo ooisilisil iyiook, nejo, “Entaranyaki iyiook obo loo sinkolioitin le Sion!”" 
Psalms137:4 Kaji iyiook kinko te nikirany osinkolio le Nkai te nkop eiking'a? 
Psalms137:5 Te naarikino nanu iyie, Yerusalem, nchoo enkaina ai e tatene etoyu!" 
Psalms137:6 Meibung'a olng'ejep lai enoret e nkutuk ai, te nemaadamu nanu iyie, te nemapik nanu Yerusalem aitulus te nchipai ai pooki!" 
Psalms137:7 Tadamu, Olaitoriani, ti alo iltung'ana le Edom, ina batatata apa e Yerusalem, etejo apa ninche, “Endaikie ninye, endaikie ninye! Entigil o metabaiki olkitamanyunoto!”" 
Psalms137:8 Na tito e Babilon, iyie naainyalani! Emayiana ilo oing'oru te iyie ina apa nintaasa iyiook!" 
Psalms137:9 Emayiana ilo oitayu nkera inono kutiti nenang'ie ninche endapidapoi! 
Psalms138:1 Kaaisho nanu iyie enashe, Olaitoriani, to ltau lai pooki; ore te dukuya nkaitin narany nanu enkisisa ino;" 
Psalms138:2 airrugo nanu aing'or enkaji ino sinyati naisho enashe enkarna ino te nkaraki enyorrata ino nauno o esupatisho ino; amu ilepie aitulus te pooki enkarna ino o rorei lino. 
Psalms138:3 Ore te nkolong naaipoto nanu, nikitawalikia, ore engolon ai oltau nikitoponikia." 
Psalms138:4 Ore laiguanak pooki le nkop naa eikisis iyie, Olaitoriani, amu etoning'o ninche irorei le nkutuk ino;" 
Psalms138:5 naa kepuo ninche aarany isinkolioitin loo nkoitoi o Laitoriani, amu aikitok enkitoo o Laitoriani." 
Psalms138:6 Amu ore hoo netii Olaitoriani shumata, keing'or ninye, keing'or ninye ilo obor; ore ilo owuasa neyiolo ninye elakua." 
Psalms138:7 Ore ninye te nalo aim empolos e nyamali, igolie ake enkishui ai; intorioo iyie enkaina ino aibooyo engoro napi oo lmang'ati laainei, naa enkaina e tatene naakordu nanu." 
Psalms138:8 Keitabaya Olaitoriani enyorrata enye te nanu; ore enyorrata ino nauno, Olaitoriani, ebikoo ntarasi. Minturraa iyie esiaai oo nkaik inono." 
Psalms139:1 Olaitoriani, kitujurro iyie nanu nikitayiolo nanu!" 
Psalms139:2 Iyiolo iyie enkata naton o enkata nadumunye; imusu iyie ndamunot aainei ilakua. 
Psalms139:3 Ijurru iyie enkoitoi ai o enkirragata ai, niyiolo iyie oleng nkoitoi aainei pooki." 
Psalms139:4 Ore ninye eitu elotu ororei ajing olng'ejep lai, ng'ura, Olaitoriani, iyiolo iyie pooki." 
Psalms139:5 Kitamana nanu te siadi o te dukuya, ninteleikia enkaina ino shumata nanu." 
Psalms139:6 Ore ena ng'eno naa eikitok oleng te nanu; etii shumata, maidim nanu aibung'a." 
Psalms139:7 Kaji nanu alo pee ailany Enkiyang'et ino? Anaa kaji nanu alo pee aailany iyie? 
Psalms139:8 Te nailep nanu alo shumata, itii iyie ine! Te naitobir nanu endapash ai te nemeneng'a itii iyie ine!" 
Psalms139:9 Te nalo nanu too naipuko e nkakenya, nalo amany enaiposha" 
Psalms139:10 ore sii te ine naa enkaina ino naarikoo, naa enkaina ino e tatene naaibung nanu." 
Psalms139:11 Te najo nanu, “Ncho maaitemoi nanu enaimin, ore ewang'an naamanita nanu neaku enkewarie,”" 
Psalms139:12 ore ninye enaimin nememisimis te iyie, kewang enkewarie anaa endama; amu etiu enaimin anaa ewang'an te iyie." 
Psalms139:13 Iyie oitobira osesen lai ti atua, iyie likiruburuba nanu ti atua enkoshoke e yieyio." 
Psalms139:14 Aaisis nanu iyie amu iyie eurei naa iyie olenking'asia. Inenking'asia isiaaitin inono! Kiyiolo iyie nanu oleng; 
Psalms139:15 meisudoro enkidikidikoto o sesen lai te iyie, ina kata pee aaitobiruni nanu te nkisudoroto, ina kata aaitubuluni nanu te nguton e nkop." 
Psalms139:16 Naaing'or nanu nkonyek inono eton eitu aaku toki; neigero te mbuku ino inkarn e pooki, nena olong'i pooki naategeluaki eton eitu ebau." 
Psalms139:17 Kebaa tipat oo ndamunot inono te nanu, iyie Enkai! Kebaa enkumoi enye!" 
Psalms139:18 Te naiken nanu ninche, nelang osinyai. Te nainyototo nanu, natii ake te nebo iyie." 
Psalms139:19 Oi naaji te naa isesekuan olarruoni, Iyie Enkai, pee aatum nanu iltung'ana lo sarge aatalam," 
Psalms139:20 lelo tung'ana torrok likikeshare iyie, lelo ooilepie ate te ntorroni likigilunore te ntorroni!" 
Psalms139:21 Aimaiba nanu lelo likimba iyie, Olaitoriani? Aimamen nanu lelo likigilunore iyie?" 
Psalms139:22 Kaiba nanu ninche oleng, aitaa nanu ninche ilmang'ati laainei." 
Psalms139:23 Tujurroki nanu, iyie Enkai, niyiolou oltau lai! Ineneng'aki nanu niyiolou ndamunot aainei!" 
Psalms139:24 Nidol tenaa ketii enkoitoi torrono atua nanu, nikirikoo nanu te nkoitoi ntarasi!" 
Psalms140:1 Tokorduaki nanu, Olaitoriani, too ltung'ana torrok, tagolieki nanu too ltung'ana lo larrabal," 
Psalms140:2 te lelo ooitobir nkitobirat torrok too ltauja lenye, nedumu ninche olarrabal anaake." 
Psalms140:3 Eitipij ninche ilng'ejepa lenye anaa ilasuriaa, ore nkutukie enye netii esayiet oo nturbubuani." 
Psalms140:4 Torripoki nanu, Olaitoriani, too nkaik e ilo torrono; tagolieki nanu too ltung'ana lo larrabal, te lelo ooitobira pee eitapong'oo nkejek aainei." 
Psalms140:5 Eisudoitie lelo oowuasa oreshet te nkaraki nanu, neitoluaa ninche too nkeenta orreshet, ore te mbata e nkoitoi aatipikakita ninche orreshet." 
Psalms140:6 Atiaaka nanu Olaitoriani, ira iyie Enkai ai; toning'o oltoilo le nkomono ai, Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms140:7 Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani lai, olakordunoni lai ogol, intoipo iyie endukuya ai te nkolong o larrabal." 
Psalms140:8 Minchooyo iyie, Olaitoriani, iyieunot e ilo torrono; mintabaya ina yieunoto enye e ntorroni!" 
Psalms140:9 Ore lelo laamanita nanu neshumu ilukuny enye, nchoo ina torroni oo nkutukie enye meibung'a ninche!" 
Psalms140:10 Nchoo metusulakinoto ninche nkuk naairowua! Nchoo ninche metusulakini ngumot, nemeigil ae kata aailepu!" 
Psalms140:11 Nchoo ilo oiro mbaa torrok eaku megolu ae kata te nkop; nchoo entorroni metanang'ie enkop oltung'ani lo larrabal! 
Psalms140:12 Ayiolo nanu ajo keitobir Olaitoriani mbaa e ilo oata osina, nedung enkiguana e ilo omena." 
Psalms140:13 Esipa keisho ilo supat enkarna ino enashe; ore ilo supat nebik ninye te dukuya iyie. 
Psalms141:1 Aaipoto nanu iyie, Olaitoriani, tasioku enatii nanu! Toning'o oltoilo lai, te naaipot nanu iyie!" 
Psalms141:2 Nchoo enkomono ai meikenari anaa enkorropil te dukuya iyie, ore enkilepata oo nkaik aainei neikenari anaa olasar le nteipa!" 
Psalms141:3 Tipika olarriponi enkutuk ai, Olaitoriani, torripo enkutuk ai, Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms141:4 Mincho oltau lai metonyorra entorroni, pee aitanyamal kewan too nkiasin torrok te ncholuek oo ltung'ana oas ntorrok; nimikincho nanu mainosa ndaiki enye e sikar!" 
Psalms141:5 Nchoo oltung'ani supat maatoosho, naaisikong te supatisho, kake mincho ae kata eilata e ilo torrono metipiki endukuya ai, amu ore enkomono ai e anaake negilunore nkiasin enye torrok." 
Psalms141:6 Ore te neishoori ninche aaitarasaki lelo oodung'oki enkiguana, nepuo taa aayiolou nchere kesipa ororei lo Laitoriani." 
Psalms141:7 Ore anaa osoit oidong'ishoreki te neiper enkop, neijia etiu iloik lenye eidapasha te nkutuk e nemeneng'a." 
Psalms141:8 Kake iyie eing'or nkonyek aainei, Olaitoriani Enkai; te iyie nanu aing'oru esarunoto; miking'uaa nanu maata olaamitu!" 
Psalms141:9 Ntalamaki nanu ilo rreshet laairragakinye ninche nanu, o too rresheta loo laasak loo ntorrok!" 
Psalms141:10 Nchoo ilarruok metadoiki pooki rresheta lenye maate, napuku nanu ailanyisho." 
Psalms142:1 Aaishiraka nanu to ltoilo lai, Olaitoriani, ore to ltoilo lai naomon Olaitoriani." 
Psalms142:2 Atubukuo nanu osina lai te dukuya ninye, nalimu nanu enyamali ai te dukuya ninye." 
Psalms142:3 Te neiterre oltau lai, niyiolo iyie enkoitoi ai! Ore te ina oitoi naaim nanu eisudoitie ninche orreshet te nkaraki nanu." 
Psalms142:4 Aing'ura nanu enkalo e tatene, naing'orisho, kake metii hoo obo laaing'or nanu, meetae esarunoto te nanu, meetae oltung'ani laashilaa nanu." 
Psalms142:5 Aaishiraka nanu iyie, Olaitoriani; najo, Ira iyie esarunoto ai, ira erubata ai te nkop oo looishu." 
Psalms142:6 Toning'o enkishirata ai; amu aaitadoyioki nanu oleng! Tokorduaki nanu te lelo laaisilisil; amu egol ninche oleng te nanu! 
Psalms142:7 Ntupukuoki nanu ti atua korokoroni, pee atum aishoru enashe te nkaraki enkarna ino! Naaman nanu lelo supati; amu kintaasa iyie isupati o ne lengon." 
Psalms143:1 Toning'o enkomono ai, Olaitoriani; nchoo metoning'o nkiyiaa inono eomonokinoto ai! Ore te nkaraki isipat inono tawalikiaki nanu ti atua esupatisho ino!" 
Psalms143:2 Minguenare iyie osinka lino, amu meetae oltung'ani hoo obo oishu oata esipata te dukuya iyie." 
Psalms143:3 Amu aatimira nanu olmang'atinta; negiligil enkishui ai aoshie enkop; naaisho ninye matotona te naimin anaa lootuata. 
Psalms143:4 Ore enkaraki ina neiterre oltau lai ti atua nanu; ore oltau lai ti atua nanu neiputukunyo. 
Psalms143:5 Adamu nanu nkolong'i e apa, naibirribir nanu nena apa nitaasa; naing'asia te siaai oo nkaik inono." 
Psalms143:6 Naaitorioki nanu nkaik aainei; nikiatayie oltau lai enkure anaa enkop natoyio. 
Psalms143:7 Tasioki tawalikiaki nanu, Olaitoriani! Amu eiterria oltau lai! Mikisudorie nanu enkomom ino, matiu ake anaa lelo oopuo aajing engumoto." 
Psalms143:8 Nchooki nanu matoning'o tadekenya ina nyorrata ino nauno, amu iyie nanu atipika osiligi lai. Nteng'enaki nanu enkoitoi naaim, amu iyie nanu ailepakinye oltau lai." 
Psalms143:9 Tokorduaki nanu, Olaitoriani, too lmang'ati laainei! Iyie nanu akuetikia asaru!" 
Psalms143:10 Nteng'enaki nanu mataasa eyieunoto ino, amu ira iyie Enkai ai! Nchoo oltau lino supat maatorikoi nanu te nkoitoi naitoriori!" 
Psalms143:11 Ore te nkaraki enkarna ino, Olaitoriani, tagolie enkishui ai! Ore te supatisho ino ntayioki nanu ti atua enyamali!" 
Psalms143:12 Naa ore te nyorrata ino nauno iwuang'ie ilmang'ati laainei, nindaikie ilmang'ati laainei pooki, amu ara nanu osinka lino." 
Psalms144:1 meisisi Olaitoriani, endapidapoi ai, laa ninye oitaarriyian nkaik aainei to larrabal, neitayiolo ilkimojik laainei olarrabal;" 
Psalms144:2 endapidapoi ai naa osempewuet lai, enkisudoroto ai naa olakordunoni lai, elong'o ai naa ninye ilo lasaru nanu, laa ninye opik iloreren abori ninye." 
Psalms144:3 Olaitoriani, kainyoo tung'ani lishilaa ninye, anaa enkerai e tung'ani eji nidamu ninye?" 
Psalms144:4 Etiu oltung'ani anaa enkiyang'et, etiu nkolong'i enyena anaa oloip oloito." 
Psalms144:5 Irrugu keper ino, Olaitoriani, nilotu adou! Iseyie ildoinyo pee epuru!" 
Psalms144:6 Imerlelie nkiwang'at nindapashaa ninche, ning'oru mbaa inono aitanyamal ninche!" 
Psalms144:7 Ntorioi enkaina ino te keper, tokorduaki nanu nikintayu nanu ti atua nkariak kumok, ntung'uayioki nkaik oo leeiking'a," 
Psalms144:8 lelo ooiro elejare too nkutukie enye, laa ore enkaina enye e tatene, naa enkaina e tatene e lejare." 
Psalms144:9 Naa kaaranyaki nanu iyie osinkolio ng'ejuk, Iyie Enkai; te nkauo oo sinkolioitin naata iusin tomon nanu aaranyaki iyie," 
Psalms144:10 iyie oisho ilaiguanak meisula, iyie otokordua Daudi osinka lino." 
Psalms144:11 Tokorduaki nanu te ilo alem torrono, nikikordu nanu aitung'uaa enkaina e lelo leeiking'a, lelo ooiro elejare too nkutukie enye, laa ore enkaina enye e tatene naa enkaina e tatene e lejare." 
Psalms144:12 Metotiwuo ilayiok lang te lelero enye anaa nkaitubulu naatubulutua aabaya, metotiutu ntoyie ang anaa ing'apeta oo lmairrot, naatudung'uoki pee eshetieki enkaji e nkitoo o laiguanani;" 
Psalms144:13 metaboreita nkajijik ang naashumishoreki meiputa mpukunot pooki oo ntokitin; metubula nkerrai ang, aaku nkalifuni o nkalifuni tomon too ndaat;" 
Psalms144:14 menoto nkishu ang oloing'oni, nemetum olkibiroto anaa ae torroni; metaa metumi olkiyioi lo sina too nkoitoi ang!" 
Psalms144:15 Emayiana lelo tung'ana ootum ena mayianata! Emayiana iltung'ana laa Enkai ninye Olaitoriani lenye! 
Psalms145:1 Kaarrep nanu iyie, Enkai ai, Olaiguanani, naisis enkarna ino ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Psalms145:2 Ore nkolong'i pooki naaisis nanu iyie, naisis enkarna ino ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Psalms145:3 Kitok Olaitoriani, naa kitok enkisisa enye, ore enkitoo enye nemelimunoyu." 
Psalms145:4 Neinosakino iishoritin o lajijik isiaaitin inono, neibalunye ninche nkiasin inono sapuki." 
Psalms145:5 Enkishiaa e nkitoo ino, enking'asia oo siaitin inono ninche nanu aibirribir." 
Psalms145:6 Neibalunye iltung'ana enkidimata oo nkiasin inono, naibalunye nanu enkitoo ino." 
Psalms145:7 Nebuku ninche ening'oi e supatisho ino, nerany ninche aabuaku isinkolioitin le supatisho oo sipat inono." 
Psalms145:8 Aipirisioni Olaitoriani neeta olng'ur, mesioki agoro nebore enyorrata nauno." 
Psalms145:9 Eisupat Olaitoriani te pooki, ore olng'ur lenye netii shumata nena pooki naaitobira ninye." 
Psalms145:10 Ore isiaaitin inono pooki naa eikincho iyie enashe, Olaitoriani, ore isinyat pooki nikiisis iyie!" 
Psalms145:11 Neiro ninche aaimaki enkitoo e nkitoria ino, nelimu engolon ino," 
Psalms145:12 neitayiolo nkera e tung'ana nkiasin inono e ngolon, o enkishiaa kitok e nkitoria ino." 
Psalms145:13 Ore enkitoria ino naa enoo ntarasi, nebikoo enkitoo e nkitoria ino too ishoritin pooki. Asipani Olaitoriani too rorei lenyena pooki, naa aipirisioni too nkiasin enyena pooki." 
Psalms145:14 Eibung Olaitoriani airishu lelo pooki oobatata, nedumu ailepunye lelo pooki oolepokino enkop." 
Psalms145:15 Iyie eing'or nkonyek e pooki, nincho iyie ninche endaa too rishat enye." 
Psalms145:16 Ilak iyie enkaina ino, nintaraposh pooki toki naishu." 
Psalms145:17 Asipani Olaitoriani too nkoitoi enyena pooki, naa supat too iasat enyena pooki." 
Psalms145:18 Etaana Olaitoriani te pooki ooipot ninye, te pooki ooipot ninye te sipata." 
Psalms145:19 Eitabaya ninye iyieunot e pooki ooure ninye, nening sii olkiyioi lenye, neitajeu ninche." 
Psalms145:20 Egolie Olaitoriani lelo pooki oonyor ninye, kake ore iltorrok pooki naa keidaikie ninye." 
Psalms145:21 Keiro enkutuk ai enkisisa o Laitoriani, nchoo pooki naaishu eisis enkarna enye sinyati ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Psalms146:1 meisisi Olaitoriani! Isisa Olaitoriani lo tau lai! 
Psalms146:2 Kaisis nanu Olaitoriani nkolong'i naaba anaa naishu; arany nanu enkisisa e Nkai ai eton aishu. 
Psalms146:3 Mipik osiligi lino ilkituaak, mipik atua tung'ani lemetii eretoto atua ninye." 
Psalms146:4 Te nepuku enkiyang'et enye nerrinyokino ninye enkop; ore te ina olong neish nkitobirat enyena. 
Psalms146:5 Emayianaa ilo laa Enkai e Yakobo ninye eretoto enye, laa Olaitoriani Enkai osiligi lenye," 
Psalms146:6 ilo oitobira keper o enkop, o enaiposha o pooki naatii atua; ilo ooibung enkirukoto ntarasi;" 
Psalms146:7 ilo oiguanare too sipat oloitorogonyaki; ilo laa ninye oitoti olooisumash. Olaitoriani olaaya ilooena; 
Psalms146:8 Olaitoriani obol ilmodook nkonyek. Olaitoriani odumu ailepunye ilootalepokinote enkop; enyor Olaitoriani ilo asipani. 
Psalms146:9 Errip Olaitoriani ilo omoni, neibung ninye enkoliai o ilo lemeeta menye, kake ore enkoitoi e ilo torrono neyau ninye enkidaata." 
Psalms146:10 Olaitoriani olo aitoreisho ntarasi, Enkai ino, iyie Sion, too ishoritin pooki. Meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms147:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani! Amu eisidai te neranyakini enkisisa e Nkai ang; amu kaaipirisioni, naa keishiaakino osinkolio le nkisisa." 
Psalms147:2 Olaitoriani oshet Yerusalem; neiturrurru ilooidapashari apa le Israel. 
Psalms147:3 Neishiunye ilootigilate iltauja, neen ilbaa lenye." 
Psalms147:4 Neiken ninye neyiolou esiana oo lakir, neisho ninche pooki nkarn enye." 
Psalms147:5 Kitok Olaitoriani lang naa kitok engolon enye; ore eng'eno enye nemeimakinoyu. 
Psalms147:6 Edumu Olaitoriani oloitunyokoki enkop, nenang'ie olarruoni enkop." 
Psalms147:7 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani ninchosho enashe; entaranyaki Olaitoriani to lwulul loo usin kumok! 
Psalms147:8 Eimulumul ninye keper too nkatampo, neitobir ninye enchan pee eshaiki enkop, neitubulu ninye nkujit too ldoinyo." 
Psalms147:9 Ninye oisho ing'uesi e ntim ndaiki enye, neisho nkiyoitin oo motonyi naaishir endaa." 
Psalms147:10 Ore enchipai enye neme engolon e mbarta, neme nkejek e tung'ana eng'idare;" 
Psalms147:11 kake lelo ooure ninye eshipakino Olaitoriani, lelo ooisilig enyorrata enye nauno." 
Psalms147:12 Isisa Olaitoriani, iyie Yerusalem! Isisa Enkai ino, iyie Sion!" 
Psalms147:13 Amu ninye oitagol isenkenke loo nchomito inono; ninye omayian ilayiok linono ootii atua iyie. 
Psalms147:14 Ninye oitaserian ilpolosien linono; ninye oiputaki intae enkano sidai. 
Psalms147:15 Ninye oirriwaki enkop inkitanapat enyena; nelo ororei lenye asiooyo. 
Psalms147:16 Neishoru empaso naikununo anaa enturoto; neisalaashaki enkinuku enkop anaa nkuruon. 
Psalms147:17 Neyau ninye isoito le nchan anaa ilbelibelat, kalo oidim aitasheiki enkirobi enye?" 
Psalms147:18 Ninye oirriu ororei lenye, neshol lelo soito; neisho osiuo lenye metukutunye, neruko nkariak." 
Psalms147:19 Eibalakinyie ninye Yakobo ororei lenye, eibalakinye inkiguanat o nkitanapat enyena Israel." 
Psalms147:20 Eitu ninye eas ena te likae osho, meyiolo ninche nkitanapat enyena. Meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms148:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani! Meisisi Olaitoriani te keper, meisisi ninye te wueji e shumata!" 
Psalms148:2 Esisa ninye ilmalaika lenyena pooki, esisa ninye ilororani lenyena pooki!" 
Psalms148:3 Esisa ninye enkolong o lapa, esisa ninye intae ilakir pooki oowang!" 
Psalms148:4 Isisa ninye iyie keper nalakua, o intae nkariak naatii shumata keper!" 
Psalms148:5 Nchoo ninche eisis enkarna o Laitoriani! Amu ninye apa oitanapishe, neitobir ninche." 
Psalms148:6 Naa ninye oitasheyie ninche ntarasi o ntarasi, naa ninye oitayio enkitanapata enye nemeibelekenya." 
Psalms148:7 Meisisi Olaitoriani te nkop, o iyie enaiposha o ntokitin pooki naatii atua," 
Psalms148:8 enkima o enchan oo soito, o empaso, o lkutati lo siwuo oitabaya enkitanapata enye!" 
Psalms148:9 Ildoinyo o ndoinyo pooki, ilkeek loo lng'anayio o ltarakua!" 
Psalms148:10 Ing'uesi o nkishu pooki, ntokitin naaiserpepiari te nkop o motonyi naapuo tiaai!" 
Psalms148:11 Ilaiguanak le nkop o ltung'ana pooki, ilkituaak o laitoriak le nkop pooki!" 
Psalms148:12 Ilbarnot o selenken te nebo, iltung'ana moruak o nkera te nebo!" 
Psalms148:13 Nchoo ninche eisis enkarna o Laitoriani amu enkarna enye ake kitok; etii enkitoo enye shumata keper o enkop. 
Psalms148:14 Eishoo ninye meishuro emowuo oo ltung'ana lenyena, esisa te nkaraki isinyat lenyena pooki, te nkaraki iltung'ana loo Siraeli ootaaniki ninye. Meisisi Olaitoriani!" 
Psalms149:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani! Entaranyaki Olaitoriani osinkolio ng'ejuk, entarany enkisisa enye te umata oo supati!" 
Psalms149:2 Nchoo Israel eshipakino ilo oitobira ninye, nchoo ilayiok le Sion eshipakino Olaiguanani lenye!" 
Psalms149:3 Nchoo ninye eisis enkarna enye neinoe, neranyaki ninye te ntampuri o to lwulul loo usin kumok." 
Psalms149:4 Amu keshipakino Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena; neikod ninye olobor te nkisulata. 
Psalms149:5 Nchoo lelo supati metishipata te nkitoo; nchoo ninche eranyisho te ng'ida too ndapashi enye. 
Psalms149:6 Nchoo enkisisa kitok e Nkai ejing iltoiloishi lenye, nejing ilalema oopi nkaloli pokira nkaik enye," 
Psalms149:7 pee eitalaku elap too loshon neitame lelo lemeure Enkai," 
Psalms149:8 pee een ilaiguanak lenye too lpisia neen lelo kituaak lenye too sekenke," 
Psalms149:9 pee edung'oki ninche enkiguana naigero! Enkitoo ena te lelo pooki lenyena supati. Meisisi Olaitoriani! 
Psalms150:1 Meisisi Olaitoriani! Meisisi Enkai ti atua ewueji enye sinyati; meisisi ninye to loing'ang'e lenye kitok! 
Psalms150:2 Meisisi ninye too nkiasin enyena sapuki; meisisi ninye te risioroto e nkitoo enye sapuk! 
Psalms150:3 Meisisi ninye to ltoilo le ntarumpeta; meisisi ninye te ndule o te nkawuo oo sinkolioitin! 
Psalms150:4 Meisisi ninye te ntampuri o te nkinoyata o sinkolio; meisisi ninye too usin o te nkinanta nakuti! 
Psalms150:5 Meisisi ninye te nkinanta naru oleng; meisisi ninye te ndarata e nkinanta! 
Psalms150:6 Nchoo pooki toki naata enkiyang'et eisis Olaitoriani! Meisisi Olaitoriani! 
Proverbs1:1 Indung'eta e rashe kuna e Solomon, olayioni le Daudi, olaiguanani le Israel." 
Proverbs1:2 Etisiraki kuna dung'eta e rashe pee etum iltung'ana aatayiolo eng'eno o enkiteng'enare, nening'u irorei oogut le ng'eno," 
Proverbs1:3 neng'amu enkiteng'enare te ng'eno naretisho, neng'amu esipata, o enkiguana nasipa, o emborron." 
Proverbs1:4 Pee etumi aishoo eng'eno sidai olmodai netum ilbarnot eng'eno naiyiolounye eneikunari te nkishon. 
Proverbs1:5 Ore sii ninye oltung'ani ng'en nening neponaa eyiolounoto, ore oltung'ani oota ening'unoto, netum anoto enkarriyiano sapuk." 
Proverbs1:6 Pee itum atoning'u endung'et e rashe, o enkipirta enye, o lelo rorei loo lang'eni o loyietiaa lenye." 
Proverbs1:7 Ore euriata o Laitoriani naa ninye enkiterunoto e ng'eno; eany ilmoda eng'eno o utarot. 
Proverbs1:8 Toning'o enkerai ai enkikoo e papaai lino, nimiany enkiteng'enare e yieyioo lino;" 
Proverbs1:9 amu keaku nena utarot enkishili te ndukuya ino, neaku olpisiai te murt ino." 
Proverbs1:10 Olayioni lai, tinikilejaa ake ilaasak loo ng'ok, minyorraa mikitelejari." 
Proverbs1:11 Naa tinikijoki ninche, “Wou tenebo iyiook mairraga aanyu osarge likimbukoo. Matarresh kisudori aaluam ilo le meeta entioto;" 
Proverbs1:12 anaa enemeneng'a matoijoi ninche eishu, nelulung'a, anaa lelo oopuo aadoiki eng'umoto;" 
Proverbs1:13 aikitum imasaa pooki e tipat, nikimput inkajijik ang intokitin nikitaarutua;" 
Proverbs1:14 tipika sii iyie erubata ino atua iyiook neaku olbene obo kiata.” 
Proverbs1:15 Enkerai ai, miim ina oitoi tenebo ninche, imboo enkeju ino pee meim inkoitoi enye;" 
Proverbs1:16 amu ekuetiki inkejek enye aas intorrok, nesiooyo aaibukoo osarge." 
Proverbs1:17 Amu te mpesho isalaash orreshet, te dukuya emotonyi ake pooki edolita." 
Proverbs1:18 Kake ore lelo tung'ana eirrag aanyisho naa osarge lenye erreshoo, enkishui enye ninye erreshoo." 
Proverbs1:19 Neijia etiu inkoitoi e lelo pooki ootum dupoto te nkikonya; eitayu enkishui aaitung'uaa iloopeny. 
Proverbs1:20 Eishir eng'eno abuaku te nkoitoi dapash e nkanasa, neitayu oltoilo lenye too wuejitin neemirishoreki." 
Proverbs1:21 Ore te nchumata oo sunta eishira abuaku; neiro too nchomito enkanasa ejo: 
Proverbs1:22 “Kerishata nabaa, intae iloo moda inyorraa aaku ilmoda? Kerishata nabaaa enyor iloo lderrat torrok aimaki ilderrat torrok. Neiba ilmoda eng'eno?" 
Proverbs1:23 Embung'a intae enking'odiata ai o eutaroto; eng'ura, kabukoki intae iutarot oo ndamunot aainei naa kaitayiolo intae irorei laainei." 
Proverbs1:24 Amu aipotishe nianyianya kining'ining'i, aitorioyie enkaina ai nemetii hoo obo otishilayie," 
Proverbs1:25 neitu ishilaa enkikoo ai pooki, neitu ishilaa enking'odia ai o utarot aainei pooki." 
Proverbs1:26 Ekakueniyie sii nanu intae te nkata engolikinoto inyi, naa kasurdaany intae te neosh intae olkirutoto," 
Proverbs1:27 teneosh intae olkirutoto anaa olkutati, nelotu engolikinoto inyi anaa osiwuo torrono te nelotu osina o emion shumata intae." 
Proverbs1:28 Neaku kaapuonu ninche aaipot nanu, nemawaliki nanu ninche; naa kaaing'oru ninche nanu oleng nemaatum nanu." 
Proverbs1:29 Amu keiba ninche eng'eno, neitu egelu euriata o Laitoriani." 
Proverbs1:30 Meyieu enkikoo ai hoo nabo, netemenaitie enkisikong'ata o eutaroto ai pooki." 
Proverbs1:31 Metaa kenya ninche ilng'anayio le nkoitoi enye, neitarruoo inkoitoi enye maate." 
Proverbs1:32 Amu etaara engogong'i enye ilmoda metuata, ore enkiyagata oo lmoda neidaikie ninche;" 
Proverbs1:33 kake ore ilo laaning nanu naa kebik eserian, naa keyeng'iyeng'a eton, meeta enkuretisho o entorroni.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Enkerai ai, tining'amaa irorei laainei, nishum aiteng'el inkitanapat aainei tenebo iyie," 
Proverbs2:2 nincho inkiyiaa inono einining aasipu eng'eno, nirrugu oltau lino aaku oloyiolou;" 
Proverbs2:3 ee tininchiru aomonu ening'unoto oo rorei oogut, nidumu oltoilo lino aaku oloning'u." 
Proverbs2:4 Tining'oru ninye anaa enkosholai, nijurru aing'oru ninye oleng anaa enoshi toki e tipat naisudoro." 
Proverbs2:5 Neaku iyiolou iyie euriata o Laitoriani, nitum eng'eno e Nkai." 
Proverbs2:6 Amu Olaitoriani ninye oishoru eng'eno; enkutuk enye epukunye eng'eno o eyiolounoto. 
Proverbs2:7 Eiteng'ela ninye eng'eno sidai te lelo ooitashe too sipat; ninye elong'o e lelo oopuo te mborron. 
Proverbs2:8 Errip inkoitoi oo sipat negolie enkoitoi oo sinyat lenyena. 
Proverbs2:9 Ina pee indimidimi aatayiolo esipata o enkiguana e sipata o emborron, o pooki oitoi sidai." 
Proverbs2:10 Amu kelotu eng'eno atua oltau lino, ore eyiolounoto neaku aisidai tiatua oltau lino." 
Proverbs2:11 Aikirrita iyie eyiolounoto; nikirrip eyiolounoto iyie. 
Proverbs2:12 Nikintajeu iyie aitung'uaa enkoitoi oo ntorrok, aitung'uaa iltung'ana ooiro nkirorot torrok," 
Proverbs2:13 lelo oing'uaa inkoitoi e nkitashoto sidai aaim inkoitoi e naimin. 
Proverbs2:14 Neshipa te neas intorrok, neshipakino ina kiminata e ntorroni," 
Proverbs2:15 iltung'ana laa ore inkoitoi enye naa keriwuo naa inaapaashaa neimin ninche tiatua inkoitoi enye. 
Proverbs2:16 Aikintajeuni iyie te ina kitok naibor onyek, ina kitok nairo te nkutuk enye irorei oo melook." 
Proverbs2:17 Ina kitok apa natung'uayie olpayian lenye le lelero, nerikino ninye osotua le Nkai enye." 
Proverbs2:18 Amu ore enkaji enye naa keimis adoiki keeya, ore inkoitoi enyena nepuo enetii ilootuata." 
Proverbs2:19 Meeta ololo enetii ninye oitoki ashukunye nemeitoki aatum inkoitoi empuaan. 
Proverbs2:20 Metaa ilo iyie te nkoitoi oo ltung'ana supati, nimbung nena oitoi oo lasipak." 
Proverbs2:21 Amu lelo ooitashe too sipat oomany ena kop, ore iltung'ana oobor naa kebikoo tiatua," 
Proverbs2:22 kake kedung'ori ilarruok te ina kop, ore ilaitang'orok nedotuni too ntona." 
Proverbs3:1 Enkerai ai, mincho kirikino inkiteng'enat aainei kake inchoo oltau lino eibung inkitanapat aainei." 
Proverbs3:2 Amu keaku inkolong'i kumok o larin le nkishui ino, nikincho enkiputakinoto e enkishon." 
Proverbs3:3 Mincho esujata oo sipat o enkirukoto kiorore; teeniki ninche emurt ino, tisira ninche te mbao o ltau lino." 
Proverbs3:4 Metaa itum omom o enkisisa sidai te dukuya Enkai o tung'ani. 
Proverbs3:5 Isiliga Olaitoriani to ltau lino pooki, nimipik osiligi le ng'eno ino metaa ninye nikirik." 
Proverbs3:6 Ore too nkoitoi inono pooki imbalie ninye naa keitorioo ninye inkoitoi inono pooki. 
Proverbs3:7 Miaku oloota eng'eno too nkonyek inono makewan, turia Olaitoriani, nimbelekenya aing'uaa ntorrok." 
Proverbs3:8 Keaku enkishiunoto to sesen lino, neaku olchani too loik linono." 
Proverbs3:9 Iyanyita Olaitoriani too ntokitin inono, o too lng'anayio le dukuya le nkurma ino." 
Proverbs3:10 Neaku ebore impechen inono enkumoi, neiput imalasin inono enaisho oo sabibu nedooyo." 
Proverbs3:11 Enkerai ai, mimenaa enkitamioto e utaroto nikiosh Olaitoriani; arashu inauru te rerioroto nikirere," 
Proverbs3:12 amu kererioo Olaitoriani ilo onyor anaa olpayian orerioo enkerai enye nanyor. 
Proverbs3:13 Emayiana oltung'ani otum eng'eno nagut, oltung'ani otum eyiolounoto." 
Proverbs3:14 Amu ore dupoto enye nelang dupoto e nkosholai ore sii dupoto enye nelang sahabu. 
Proverbs3:15 Eeta ninye tipat alang isoito oogol enkinyang'a, nemeeta entoki niyieu nindim aitanyaanyukie ninye." 
Proverbs3:16 Etii enkishui naado atua enkaina enye e tatene, ore atua enkaina enye e kedienye netii enkarsisisho o enkanyit." 
Proverbs3:17 Ore inkoitoi enyena naa inaaitishipisho, ore nkoitoi enyena pooki naa eseriani." 
Proverbs3:18 Ore ninye naa olchani le mpuaan te lelo ooibung ninye; ore lelo oibung aakurraki naa keji ilooshipa. 
Proverbs3:19 Eitobira Olaitoriani enkop te ng'eno nagut, ore te yiolounoto eitasheyie keper o ntokitin naatii." 
Proverbs3:20 Te ng'eno enye eitayio ineegut, ore inkatampo neitadou enkoileelio." 
Proverbs3:21 Enkerai ai, imbung'a eng'eno sidai o eyiolounoto; mincho ninche kisik aaing'uaa," 
Proverbs3:22 naa keaku enkishui to ltau lino, naa emasaai sidai e murt ino." 
Proverbs3:23 Neaku ilo te nkoitoi ino iserian, nemerrorro enkeju ino." 
Proverbs3:24 Tinilo niton, nimiata enkuretisho; tinirrag airura, naa kemelok injo inono." 
Proverbs3:25 Miure olkirutoto likiluam, arashu emutata oo larruok te nelotu." 
Proverbs3:26 Amu keaku Olaitoriani osiligi le nkitashoto ino, naa kerrip enkeju ino pee meibung'i." 
Proverbs3:27 Mimitiki isidain ilooishaakino ina kata aa iyie oota enkidimata pee ias. 
Proverbs3:28 Mijoki olelatia lino, “Shomo pee intoki ashukunye, ekaaisho metabaiki” – ti niata ina kata ina toki." 
Proverbs3:29 Mintobiraki ole latia ino entorroni ainyal, lelo ootoni kisilig tembata ino." 
Proverbs3:30 Miarare oltung'ani metii esipata, eitu kintaas iyie entorroni." 
Proverbs3:31 Migilaki ong'u oltung'ani onyor olarrabal, nimigelu hoo nabo oo nkoitoi enyena." 
Proverbs3:32 Amu ore oltung'ani ogolong'u naa olminong to Laitoriani, kake ore lelo ooitashe too sipat netii atua enkisiligata enye." 
Proverbs3:33 Etii oldeket le Nkai shumata enkaji oo larruok, kake kemayian ninye emanyisho oo supati." 
Proverbs3:34 Ore lelo oomenisho naa kemanaa ninye, kake ore iloobor neisho omom." 
Proverbs3:35 Ore oltung'ani ng'en naa kejung enkanyit, kake ore ilmoda netum enkurruna." 
Proverbs4:1 Entoning nkiteng'enat e papaai linyi nkera aainei, nining'ining'i aasipu itumutumu aanoto eng'eno nagut." 
Proverbs4:2 Amu kaaisho iyie iutarot sidain; miorore enkiteng'enata ai. 
Proverbs4:3 Ore apa ara enkiti kerai nanana atii tenebo papa lai, naa nanu ake eeta yieyio." 
Proverbs4:4 Naaiteng'ena ninye nanu, naajoki, “Inchoo oltau lino eibung akurraki irorei laainei tushuma inkitanapat aainei pee iton inchu." 
Proverbs4:5 Mincho kirikino, nimimbelekenya aing'uaa irorei le nkutuk ai. Noto eng'eno nagut, noto sii ening'unoto." 
Proverbs4:6 Mimenaa ninye, naa aikirrip ninye iyie; tonyora ninye naa aikirrip ninye iyie." 
Proverbs4:7 Ore enkiterunoto e ng'eno naa ena; noto eng'eno nagut, naa ore pooki nitum, noto sii ening'unoto;" 
Proverbs4:8 intagolo enkinyang'a enye oleng, naa aikintaa ninye iyie kitok; aikianyitu ninye iyie tininbung'are ninye." 
Proverbs4:9 Kepik ninye endukuya ino enkishili e nkisisa nikipik sii emaupe sidai e nkitoo.” 
Proverbs4:10 Toning'o enkerai ai, ning'amaa irorei laainei, pee etum ilarin le nkishui ino aataa kumok." 
Proverbs4:11 Aaiteng'ena nanu iyie nkoitoi e ng'eno; aatoriko iyie too nkoitoi naaitoriori. 
Proverbs4:12 Ore pee ilo iyie, nemetum enkeju ino olkob, naa tinikuet nimirrorro." 
Proverbs4:13 Imbung'a tukurraki iutarot, mincho kipuo aing'uaa; torripo ninche, amu ninye enkishui ino." 
Proverbs4:14 Mijing enkoitoi oo larruok nimiim ina oitoi e lelo tung'ana torrok. 
Proverbs4:15 Tapaasha ninye, milo aim ninye; imbelekenyunye tung'uai milo agiroo." 
Proverbs4:16 Amu meidim ninche aairurata o metaasa entorrono; meeta ninche injo ometaba anaa nerrorr obo metabatatayu. 
Proverbs4:17 Amu einos ninche endaa enkarruoisho, neok enaisho oo sabibu naikonyuno te ng'olon." 
Proverbs4:18 Kake ore enkoitoi oo supati netiu anaa ewang'an e nkakenya ina naponari awang'u newang'u o metaa dama. 
Proverbs4:19 Ore enkoitoi oo ltorrok netiu anaa enaimin nagut; meyiolo ninche aajo aitenyoo etarrorrote. 
Proverbs4:20 Enkerai ai inining'u tukurraki irorei laainei, irrugu enkiok ino inining'u inkikoot aainei." 
Proverbs4:21 Mincho ninche kilany aaing'uaa enkomom ino; tushuma ninche tiatua oltau lino. 
Proverbs4:22 Amu enkishui ninche teilo otum ninche naa olmairo lo sesen lenye pooki. 
Proverbs4:23 Ing'ura oleng tagolie oltau lino, amu ninye epukunye inchorroi e nkishui." 
Proverbs4:24 Intalama kewan nkirorot torrok, nishurtu inkirorot torrok te iyie." 
Proverbs4:25 Inchoo inkonyek inono eing'or aaitoriokino dukuya; neaku enking'urata ino enaitoriori te dukuya iyie. 
Proverbs4:26 Ing'ura tagolie enkoitoi oo nkejek inono, pee eunoyu inkoitoi inono pooki." 
Proverbs4:27 Nimiwuang alo tatene arashu kedienye; tushuku enkeju ino intung'uai e ntorroni. 
Proverbs5:1 Enkerai ai inining'u tukurraki eng'eno ai, irrugu enkiok ino inining'u eng'eno ai." 
Proverbs5:2 Pee itum atorripo te yiolounoto naiguana, ore enkutuk ino nerrip e ng'eno." 
Proverbs5:3 Amu ore enkutuk e nkitok naibor onyek neitong'u enaisho, ore ilomon lenyena nepuiyiapui aalang eilata;" 
Proverbs5:4 kake ore te nkiting'oto nedua anaa esayiet nepi anaa olalem opi imbat pokira. 
Proverbs5:5 Ore inkejek enyena nepuo aadoiki keeya; nesujaa iroruat enyena enkoitoi e nemeneng'a; 
Proverbs5:6 meinining'u ninye enkoitoi e puaan, eirrang'irrang inkoitoi enyena, nemeyiolo ninye." 
Proverbs5:7 Neaku ore naa te ina kata inkera aainei, entoning'oki nanu nimipuopuo aaing'uaa irorei le nkutuk ai." 
Proverbs5:8 Intalama enkoitoi ino enenye nimilo anyikaki kutuk aji e nkaji enye; 
Proverbs5:9 pee mincho ake enkisisa ino ilkulikae, nimincho ilarin linono lelo le meeta olng'ur," 
Proverbs5:10 pee meiput ate ilomon te ngolon ino ore isiaitin inono nepuo enkaji o lomoni. 
Proverbs5:11 Ore te nkiting'oto e nkishui ino ninchir, etumutaki inkiri o sesen lino," 
Proverbs5:12 naa ijo, “Ekaiba apa enkitamioto naautarieki netanya oltau lai ererioroto!" 
Proverbs5:13 Eitu apa ainining'u oltoilo loo laiteng'enak laainei arashu airrugoki enkiok ai ilautarok laainei," 
Proverbs5:14 atinyikaka apa nanu embata enkidaaroto tiatua eumuta olorere!” 
Proverbs5:15 Tooko enkare naing'uaa enchorro ino makewan, ina are narukunye aing'uaa enchorro ino." 
Proverbs5:16 Keidapasha inkonyek inono oo nkariak tiong'ota, inchorroi enkare too nkoitoi dapashi?" 
Proverbs5:17 Inchoo ninche eaku ininono aa iyie ake, neme pee eaku enino olomon likiboitare." 
Proverbs5:18 Inchoo enchorro ino emayiani, nishipakino enkitok e lelero ino, ololii oikishiaan anaa enkolii nadeenyari." 
Proverbs5:19 Inchoo enyorrata enye kimput iyie, inkatitin pooki te nchipai, inchoo enyorrata enye kidumu anaake." 
Proverbs5:20 Aainyo enkerai ai pee incho enyorrata enkitok naibor onyek kidumu? Nimbung olgoo le ntang'oroi? 
Proverbs5:21 Amu ore inkoitoi oltung'ani netii dukuya Olaitoriani, naa keing'orita ninye irrekiei lenyena pooki." 
Proverbs5:22 Ore enkarruoisho oo larruok naa kerresh ninye, neibung'i ninye te siaai oo ng'ok enyena." 
Proverbs5:23 Neye ninye meeta enkitamioto e utaroto, ore enkaraki emodai enye sapuk neimina ninye." 
Proverbs6:1 Enkerai ai, tinitonyorrayie te nkutuk ino aitasheiki ole latia ino te sile enye, ninosa olmumai te nkaraki olomoni;" 
Proverbs6:2 tinitarresho kewan to rorei lintayio te nkutuk ino, tinikimbung'a ororei le nkutuk ino," 
Proverbs6:3 neaku taasa naa ena, enkerai ai pee intajeu kewan, amu itijing'a inkaik ole latia ino; shomo tasioi tasayia ninye pee kilaku." 
Proverbs6:4 Mincho inkonyek inono meirurata, nimincho nkonyek inono meimugo;" 
Proverbs6:5 intajeu kewan anaa enkolii nailanya olang'oroni, anaa emotonyi natunuta olotarresho." 
Proverbs6:6 Shomo enetii enkalaoni, iyie lo tashalai; ing'ura inkoitoi enyena, nitum eng'eno." 
Proverbs6:7 Inemeeta olaiguanani lenye, o laitasheikinoni arashu oloitore," 
Proverbs6:8 eshum ninche endaa enye te nkata enkirowuaj neiturrurru endaa enye te nkata enkisampuare. 
Proverbs6:9 Kenkata nabaa iton iyie airrag te ine? Kanu kenya inyototo too njo inono? 
Proverbs6:10 “Ekaitoki airura penyo, kaimug penyo,” ejo ninye “Ekashuk inkaik aainei ayeng'iyeng'a penyo.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Ore eirura nebaiki ninye aisinanisho anaa olkirikoi, o esumash anaa oltung'ani otanape." 
Proverbs6:12 Ore oltung'ani le meeta tipat naa oltung'ani arruoni, neloolo einosaa ilomon le lejare." 
Proverbs6:13 Nerojisho too nkonyek enyena, neirorie oltung'ani too nkejek, neutisho too lkimojik lenyena." 
Proverbs6:14 Ore to lwuasa lo ltau lenye neun intorrok, eunito anaake ninye empeu emang'atisho." 
Proverbs6:15 Neaku kepulusokino ninye eng'olikinoto aluam; ore te nkiti kata naa kegila enemeishiunoyu. 
Proverbs6:16 Etii intokitin ile naaiba Olaitoriani, mbaa naapishana naa olminong te ninye:" 
Proverbs6:17 Inkonyek olwuasa, o olng'ejep olejisho, o inkaik naaibukoo osarge le meeta entioto," 
Proverbs6:18 oltau oipiru indamunot torrok, inkejek naasioyo aakuetiki enetii entorroni." 
Proverbs6:19 Olchakeni le lejare olimu te nkutuk elejare, oltung'ani oun empeu engogong'i tiatua ilalashera." 
Proverbs6:20 Enkerai ai, imbung'a inkitanapat e papaai lino, niming'uaa enkiteng'enare e yieyioo lino." 
Proverbs6:21 Teeniki ninche oltau anaake; teeniki ninche emurt ino. 
Proverbs6:22 Ore tinilo te nkoitoi, naa aikirikoo ninche iyie; naa tinirrag airura, naa aikirrip ninche iyie, ore tininyototo neiro ninche tenebo iyie." 
Proverbs6:23 Amu ore enkitanapata naa oltaa ore iutarot naa ewang'an, naa ore inkitamiot oo utarot naa ninche enkoitoi e nkishui." 
Proverbs6:24 Pee kirrip te ina kitok torrono, teilo ng'ejep opuyiapui le ina tang'oroi." 
Proverbs6:25 Ming'uar enkishiaa enye to ltau lino, nimincho ninye kimbung too nkonyek enyena." 
Proverbs6:26 Amu eidimi ainyiang'u enkitok naibor onyek te mukate nabo, kake eishu enkitok naloloito entonata e nkishui o lee." 
Proverbs6:27 Keidim olee atanapa enkima to lgoo lenye, nemepejoo inkilani enyena?" 
Proverbs6:28 Anaa keidim oltung'ani ashomo aitunyoi inkuk naaishu, aimenya indapi enyena enkima?" 
Proverbs6:29 Metaa neijia sii etiu ilo olo aloloitore enkitok olelatia enye meetae hoo obo oibung ninye olo eitu eitamei. 
Proverbs6:30 Aimeiba iltung'ana olapurroni te nepurrisho, pee eitaraposh enkoshoke enye eeta esumash?" 
Proverbs6:31 Naa te neibung'i, kelak katitin naapishana; ekeishooyo imasaa pooki e nkaji enye." 
Proverbs6:32 Ore ilo ololoito nemeeta elukunya sidai; ore ilo oas ina neidaikie kewan. 
Proverbs6:33 Etum ilbaa torrok netum sii enkarna torrono nemejutoyu enkurruna enye tukul. 
Proverbs6:34 Amu eitaa olom oltung'ani oloarisho, nemepalaki te nelo neitalakisho elap." 
Proverbs6:35 Meng'amaa ninye elaata ake ninye pooki; meetae enkumoi oo nkishorot naidim aitoborro ninye. 
Proverbs7:1 Enkerai ai, imbung'a irorei laainei, ninteng'el inkitanapat aainei tiatua iyie." 
Proverbs7:2 Imbung'a inkitanapat aainei pee inchu, tagolie nkiteng'enat aainei anaa enerok enkong'u ino." 
Proverbs7:3 Teeniki ninche ilkimojik linono, ingero ninche te mbao o ltau lino." 
Proverbs7:4 Tiaaki eng'eno, “Ira iyie enkanashe ai” nimpot eng'eno nagut ajo olchore lai oleng;" 
Proverbs7:5 pee kitum atagolie te ina kitok naibor onyek, te ina aitang'oroni napuyiapui irorei." 
Proverbs7:6 Amu ore te lusie e nkaji ai, aturumishe aing'or boo te lusie ai," 
Proverbs7:7 nadol tiatua ilmoda, namusu olbarnoti obo tiatua ilbarnot, oloti barnoti lemedamisho." 
Proverbs7:8 Eim enkoitoi dapash e nkanasa embata enkaji e ina kitok, eibung enkoitoi alo enkaji enye" 
Proverbs7:9 pee mirimiru e nteipa, te nkata enkewarie o enkata enaimin." 
Proverbs7:10 Naa ng'ura, nenang'are ninye enkitok, neishope anaa emulayoi, neeta enareuta." 
Proverbs7:11 Neiro ninye meeta enkuretisho, metoni inkejek enyena tiang;" 
Proverbs7:12 etii te ina kata enkoitoi dapash e nkanasa netii tena kata enemirishoreki, ore te pooki lojata oo nkoitoi neton ninye aanyisho." 
Proverbs7:13 Neibung ninye ang'utut, ore inkonyek enyena nekurraki ninye:" 
Proverbs7:14 nejoki ninye, “Aidipa atalaa ilasarri, neaku ore ena olong atalaa ilmuma laainei." 
Proverbs7:15 Metaa ore taata aaewuo atumore, aaing'orua iyie oleng, neaku aanoto." 
Proverbs7:16 Aitobira endapash ai too lkarash oo puyiapui le katani naing'uaa Misiri. 
Proverbs7:17 Aitorropilo endapash ai te manoo o esonkoyo o sinantei. 
Proverbs7:18 Wou, maiputa ate enchipai ang omekenyu; matishipakinoto ate te nyorrata." 
Proverbs7:19 Amu metii olpayian lai ang'; eshomo enelakua. 
Proverbs7:20 Newa olbene loo ropiyiani nelo naa keshukunye kenya ang te mpolos o lapa.” 
Proverbs7:21 Ore too rorei kumok le mpakasata, nearaki ninye; ore too rorei lenyena oo puyiapui neidimu ninye." 
Proverbs7:22 Ore ina kata ake, nesuj ninye ninye, anaa olkiteng opuoi aayieng arashu enkolii najing atua orreshet." 
Proverbs7:23 Ometaba anaa neng'or embae oltau lenye. Anaa emotonyi nakuetiki ajing atua orreshet; meyiolo duoo ajo keinosie enkishui enye. 
Proverbs7:24 Ore naa taata, nakera aainei, entoning'oki nanu niakuku ilooning'u lelo rorei le nkutuk ai." 
Proverbs7:25 Mincho oltau lino eibelekenya asuj inkoitoi enyena, mipong'okino inkoitoi enyena;" 
Proverbs7:26 amu eitayio ninye ilmeneng'a kumok lemeikenayu. Ee, ore ilmeneng'a lenyena naa olorora kitok." 
Proverbs7:27 Ore enkaji enye naa enkoitoi nalo enemeneng'a, nedoyio alo ilgilat le keeya." 
Proverbs8:1 Aimeipotisho eng'eno, aimedumu eyiolounoto oltoilo lenye?" 
Proverbs8:2 Ore too neerupa oo mbat enkoitoi, ore too nkoitoi neitashe ninye." 
Proverbs8:3 Ore tembata oo nkishomin te dukuya enkanasa, o te kishomi neipotisho ninye ejo:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Intae taa doi iltung'ana aipotito, naa ore enkishirata ai naa intae inkera e tung'ana eipirta." 
Proverbs8:5 Lo moda kulo entamoo ate eng'eno; intae iltung'ana oo moda, enining'o enajo." 
Proverbs8:6 Entoning amu kaimaki imbaa e tipat, naapuku te nkutuk ai imbaa naasipa." 
Proverbs8:7 Amu eibalunye enkutuk ai esipata; ore intorrok naa olminong te nkutuk ai. 
Proverbs8:8 Ore irorei pooki le nkutuk ai naa esupatisho; metii entoki nabo namonira anaa enariwuo te ninche. 
Proverbs8:9 Keitoriori teilo oyiolo, naa keitoriori te lelo oonoto eng'eno." 
Proverbs8:10 Imbung'a iutarot aainei aitalang enkosholai, o eng'eno alang sahabu gelunoti." 
Proverbs8:11 Amu aisidai eng'eno nagut alang isoito oogol enkinyiang'a ore pooki naaba anaa ining'uar, meidimi aaitanyaanyukie ninye." 
Proverbs8:12 Ore nanu eng'eno nagut, natii atua enkidimata e ning'unoto e ng'eno, naa katum eng'eno o eyiolounoto." 
Proverbs8:13 Ore euriata o Laitoriani, naa enkibayunoto e ntorroni. Ore olwuasa o enkitokoos o enkoitoi e ntorroni, o nkirorot naapaashaa naa kaiba." 
Proverbs8:14 Aata enkikoo o eng'eno sidai, naata eng'eno nagut, naata engolon." 
Proverbs8:15 Te nanu eitoreisho ilaiguanak, neibalunye ilooitoreisho ina nasipa." 
Proverbs8:16 Te nanu eitoreisho ilkituaak, ore ilaitoriak neitore enkop." 
Proverbs8:17 Kanyor lelo laanyor nanu, ore lelo laaing'oru nanu te nyuaata naa kaatum." 
Proverbs8:18 Etii enkarsisisho o enkanyit tenebo nanu, imasaa naabikoo o puaan." 
Proverbs8:19 Ore olng'anayioi lai nelang sahabu, o sahabu ninye nasila. Ore ntumot aainei nelang enkosholai gelunoti." 
Proverbs8:20 Alo nanu te nkoitoi e supatisho, too nkoitoi oo sipat enkiguana." 
Proverbs8:21 Naitujung karsisisho lelo laanyor nanu, neiput ilchumat lenye masaa." 
Proverbs8:22 Aaitobira Olaitoriani nanu, te nkiterunoto e siaai enye, esiaai e dukuya enye te pooki musana." 
Proverbs8:23 Ore too lporori ootulusoitie aaitasheyieki, te nkiterunoto eng'or enkiterunoto e nkop." 
Proverbs8:24 Ore eton meetae ineegut aaitobiruaki nanu, ore eton meetae inchorroi naatii enkare." 
Proverbs8:25 Ore eton eitu eitamanyuni ildoinyio, ore eton meetae indoinyo naaitobiruaki nanu." 
Proverbs8:26 Ore eton eitu eitobiru ninye enkop tenebo nkong'at enyena arashu enterit e dukuya e nkop. 
Proverbs8:27 Ore pee eitasheyie ninye keper, atii nanu ine Atii apa ina kata pee eitasheyie ninye keper. Ore pee eigeru olokelel tioriong e nguton e nkop." 
Proverbs8:28 Ina kata pee eitasheyie oloing'ang'e le shumata, ina kata pee eitayu nchorroi e ng'uton." 
Proverbs8:29 Ina kata pee epik enaiposha olpolosie metaa megil inkariak enkitanapata enye. Ina kata pee epik olkitamanyunoto le nkop. 
Proverbs8:30 Natii apa tenebo ninye anaa olaitobirani arriyia; nara anaake enchipai enye, ashipa te dukuya ninye anaake." 
Proverbs8:31 Ashipakino enkop enye namanyi, nashipakino inkera oo ltung'ana." 
Proverbs8:32 Ore naa taata nakera aainei, entoning'oki nanu; emayiana lelo ooimbung inkoitoi aainei." 
Proverbs8:33 Toning'o enkikoo pee ing'enu, nimiorore ninye." 
Proverbs8:34 Eshipa oltung'ani laaning nanu, oing'or anaake nchomito aainei, laanyu too mbat oo nkutukie oo nkajijik aainei." 
Proverbs8:35 Amu ore ilaatum nanu netum enkishui; netum omom to Laitoriani. 
Proverbs8:36 Kake ore ilo laapong nanu, nepik kewan olbae; ore lelo laaiba nanu nenyor keeya.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Etesheta eng'eno enkaji enye, eitasheyie ing'apeta enyena pokira naapishana." 
Proverbs9:2 Neteyieng'a nkishu enyena, eitushula enaisho enye oo sabibu, neitobira sii emisa enye." 
Proverbs9:3 Eirriwayie ninye nkaisiaayiak enyena meipotisho, toowuejitin neeika e nkanasa ejo," 
Proverbs9:4 “Ore ilo pooki omoda, inchoo eibelekenyunye alotu ene.” Oilo le meeta ndamunot, ejo ninye," 
Proverbs9:5 “Wou, inosa endaa ai, niok ina aisho oo sabibu naitushula." 
Proverbs9:6 Tung'uai emodai pee inchu. Nilo te nkoitoi e ng'eno nagut.” 
Proverbs9:7 Ore ilo orerioo olasukenyani netum ninye emoroto, naa ore oloisikong oltung'ani torrono netum olbae." 
Proverbs9:8 Minkok olasukenyani arashu kimbayu iyie; inkoo oltung'ani ng'en naa aikinyorru ninye iyie. 
Proverbs9:9 Inchoo enkiteng'ena oltung'ani ng'en, naa keponaa eng'eno oleng, inteng'ena oltung'ani supat naa keponaa eng'eno enye." 
Proverbs9:10 Ore euriata o Laitoriani naa ninye enkiterunoto e ng'eno, naa ore eng'eno e ilo Sinyati naa eng'eno nagut." 
Proverbs9:11 Amu te nanu eponari inkolong'i inono, aikiponikini iyie ilarin le nkishui." 
Proverbs9:12 Tenaa ira iyie ng'en, naa aira ng'en te nkorrok ino; naa tinisukenyisho, naa iyie ake openy onap." 
Proverbs9:13 Ore enkitok namoda neilepilep; nemeutaroyu, nemeeta enkurruna nayiolo." 
Proverbs9:14 Eton te nkutuk enkaji enye, neton too wuejitin neerupa enkanasa." 
Proverbs9:15 Eipotu lelo oogiroo ine, lelo oopuo inkoitoi enye maate," 
Proverbs9:16 ore pooki ng'ae omoda, inchoo eibelekenyunye alotu ene ore pooki ng'ae le meeta endamunoto ejoki," 
Proverbs9:17 “Ore enkare napurruno naa kemelok, ore emukate nainosi too nkisudorot naa aisidai.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Kake meyiolo ninye ajo etii keeya ine, inchere ore lomon lenyena netii ineegut e nemeneng'a." 
Proverbs10:1 Ore enkerai ng'en neitiship menye, kake ore enkerai namoda naa osomit te ng'otonye." 
Proverbs10:2 Ore imasaa naatumi te nkoitoi torrono nemeeta dupoto kake aikilaku esupatisho aitung'uaa keeya. 
Proverbs10:3 Meisho Olaitoriani isupati epuo eisumash, kake ore iyieunot e lelo torrok neitalamaa." 
Proverbs10:4 Ore enkaina nashal neyau aisinanisho kake ore enkaina olarriyia neyau enkarsisisho. 
Proverbs10:5 Ore enkerai nasotisho te nkata enkirowuaj naa aing'en, kake ore enkerai nairura te nkata enkisampuare neyau enkurruna." 
Proverbs10:6 Etii imayianat endukuya e ilo supat kake ore enkutuk eilo torrono nemuk enapiak. 
Proverbs10:7 Ore indamunot oo supati naa emayianata; kake ore enkarna o ltorrono naa keng'uoyu. 
Proverbs10:8 Ore eng'eno oltau naa kening'u inkitanapat, kake ore olmodai loo rorei kumok naa keidaaya." 
Proverbs10:9 Ore ilo olo te nkoitoi naitoriori nelo te seriani, kake ore ilo oibelekeny inkoitoi enyena naa ketumi." 
Proverbs10:10 Ore ilo orojisho te nkong'u enye aitunyoo esipata neyau enyamali, kake ore ilo oibalie te mpijan esipata neyau eseriani." 
Proverbs10:11 Ore enkutuk o supat naa enchorro e nkishui, kake ore enkutuk oltorrono nenuk entorroni." 
Proverbs10:12 Eyau enkiba enchankar sapuk, kake ore enyorrata neimulumul nkitarruorrot pooki." 
Proverbs10:13 Etumi te nkutuk eilo oota ening'unoto eng'eno, kake ore eng'udi neishaakino enkoriong e ilo le meeta endamunoto sidai." 
Proverbs10:14 Ore iltung'ana ng'eni neshum eng'eno, kake ore enkilepilep olmodai neitinyiku enkidaaroto." 
Proverbs10:15 Ore imasaa o ltung'ani karsis naa ninche enkanasa enye nagol, ore emenai oo laisinak naa ninye enkidaaroto enye." 
Proverbs10:16 Ore elaakinoto o supat naa ketum enkishui, ore intumot oo ltorrok naa ing'ok." 
Proverbs10:17 Ore ilo oning'u enkikoo netii enkoitoi enkishui; kake ore ilo oany enkikoo nelo apong'ori. 
Proverbs10:18 Ore ilo onuk enkiba neeta enkutuk e lejare, ore ilo oiro irorei le nkiteenikinoto naa olmodai." 
Proverbs10:19 Ore te neaku irorei kumok, nemelai inkitadiat, kake ore ilo onuk enkutuk enye naa aing'en." 
Proverbs10:20 Ore olng'ejep le ilo asipani naa enkosholai sidai gelunoti, ore endamunoto olaasani loo ng'ok nemeeta tipat." 
Proverbs10:21 Ore enkutuk e ilo supat neitoti ilkumok, kake ore ilmoda nemut emodai." 
Proverbs10:22 Ore emayianata o Laitoriani neitaa karsis, nemeponaa osina te nebo ninye." 
Proverbs10:23 Etiu ana enkiguran to lmodai eas entorroni, kake ore olkuaak le ng'eno naa enchipai to ltungani oota ening'unoto." 
Proverbs10:24 Ore nena naaure ilo torrono neipang'aki ninye; kake ore iyieunot oo supati naa keishori. 
Proverbs10:25 Ore pee eish osiwuo, nemeitoki ilo torrono atii, kake eitasheyieki osupat intarasi." 
Proverbs10:26 Anaa enatiu enaisho naisuisho oo sabibu too lala, anaa empuruo too nkonyek, nejia sii etiu oltashalai te lelo ooirriwaa ninye." 
Proverbs10:27 Ore euriata o Laitoriani neitoodor enkishui, kake ore ilarin loo larruok neitodorropi." 
Proverbs10:28 Ore osiligi loo supati neiting te nchipai, kake ore enkisiligunoto oo ltorrok nemeaku toki." 
Proverbs10:29 Ore Olaitoriani naa ninye osempewuet leilo asipani, kake enkidaaroto too laasak loo ng'ok." 
Proverbs10:30 Meiwuang'ieki aekata isupati kake ore iltorrok nemebik te enkop. 
Proverbs10:31 Ore enkutuk o supat neyau eng'eno nagut, kake ore olng'ejep olejisho naa keiwuang'ieki." 
Proverbs10:32 Ore enkutuk o lasipani neyiolo ina nang'amaroyu, kake ore enkutuk oltorrono, neyiolo ina napaashari." 
Proverbs11:1 Ore entemet natii olejet naa olminong to Laitoriani, kake ore entemet nemetii olejet naa ninye eng'ida enye." 
Proverbs11:2 Ore pee elotu olwuasa, nelotu sii enkurruna; kake eboitare eng'eno lelo oobor." 
Proverbs11:3 Ore enkitabaroto e lelo ooitashe too sipat naa kerik ninche. Kake ore enkarruoisho e lelo airrikinok ninye naidaikie ninche. 
Proverbs11:4 Meeta enkarsisisho dupoto te ina olong e ngoro, kake elaku esipata aitung'uaa keeya." 
Proverbs11:5 Ore esupatisho e lelo le meeta entioto neitaa enkoitoi enye enaitoriori, kake ore oltorrono nerrek intorrok enyena." 
Proverbs11:6 Ore esupatisho e lelo loo sipat naa kelaku ninche. Kake ore ilairrikinok naa keibung ing'uarrat enye. 
Proverbs11:7 Ore te neye oltung'ani torrono, neish osiligi lenye, ore enkisiligata e lelo lemeyieu Enkai neaku ene pesho." 
Proverbs11:8 Ore osupat naa kelakuni te nyamali enye, ore oltorrono netum ina nyamali." 
Proverbs11:9 Emut oltung'ani lemeure Enkai te nkutuk enye ole latia lenye. Kake te ng'eno elakuni lelo supati. 
Proverbs11:10 Ore teneitobirari mbaa too supati, neshipa enkanasa, ore pee eish iltorrok nening'i mbuakunot e nchipai." 
Proverbs11:11 Te mayianata oo supati eisisi nerrepi enkanasa, kake kemuti too nkutukie oo ltorrok." 
Proverbs11:12 Ore ilo omenaa olelatia enye nemeeta endamunoto sidai, kake ore oltung'ani oota ening'unoto neton agira." 
Proverbs11:13 Ore ilo oloolo ainosaa imbaa olmarenke nebolu imbaa naaisudoro, kake ore ilo oisiligayu to ltau neshum embae aisudoo." 
Proverbs11:14 Ore enemetii erikore, naa kebatata olorere; kake ore enetii ilaikook kumok netii eseriani." 
Proverbs11:15 Ore ilo onyorraa te nkutuk ajo kelaaki olomoni esile, naa kelotu anyamalu te siadi, kake ore ilo oany enyorraa neserian." 
Proverbs11:16 Ore enkitok nabor netum enkanyit; ore iltung'ana ooisimisho netum enkarsisisho. 
Proverbs11:17 Ore oltung'ani supat neret kewan, kake ore oltung'ani otolo naa kewan eitame." 
Proverbs11:18 Ore oltung'ani torrono netum olekoisiaayio lelejare, kake ore ilo oun esupatisho netum olerrinyore osipa." 
Proverbs11:19 Ore ilo oitashe too sipat nebik eishu. Kake ore ilo osuj intorrok naa keye. 
Proverbs11:20 Ore iltung'ana oota indamunot naapaashaa naa olminong to Laitoriani, kake ore lelo le meeta entioto too nkoitoi enye naa enchipai te ninye." 
Proverbs11:21 Tayiolo miata olng'ash ajo, melo oltung'ani torrono eitu eitamei, kake ore lelo supati naa kelakuni." 
Proverbs11:22 Anaa enaikununo olgisoi le sahabu te nkume embitir, nejia etiu enkitok sidai nemeeta eng'eno naret." 
Proverbs11:23 Ore eyieunoto eilo supat neiting'oki esidano; ore enkisiligata oo ltorrok neiting'oki e ngoro. 
Proverbs11:24 Eishooyo oltung'ani obo pesho, ore ake sii neitoki aponaa e enkarsisisho; ore olikae neibok ina naishiakino neishooyo, nenyamalu oleng te yieunoto sapuk." 
Proverbs11:25 Ore oltung'ani oleng naa keitaae ninye karsis, ore ilo opiku enkare, naa kepikakini sii ninye enkare." 
Proverbs11:26 Edek iltung'ana ilo omit entapa kake eeta emayianata ilo omir. 
Proverbs11:27 Ore ilo oing'oru isupati te nyuaata neing'oru omom, kake ejing'aki intorrok ilo olo aing'oru." 
Proverbs11:28 Ore ilo oisilig enkarsisisho enye naa ketoyu, kake ore ilo supat naa keipilipil anaa embeneyioi nanyori." 
Proverbs11:29 Ore ilo oitanyamal enkaji enye naa kejung enkijape, ore olmodai naa keaku osinka leilo ng'en." 
Proverbs11:30 Ore olng'anayioi leilo supat naa olchani le nkishui, ore enemetii euriata oo nkitanapat neiwuang'ie enkishui oo lkumok." 
Proverbs11:31 Amaa taa tenelaakini ilo supat tena kop, kebaa elang elaakinoto eilo torrono o laing'okoni!" 
Proverbs12:1 Ore pooki ng'ae onyor enkitamioto e utaroto, naa kenyor eng'eno, kake ore ilo oiba enkisikong'ata naa olmodai." 
Proverbs12:2 Ore oltung'ani supat netum omom to Laitoriani, kake ore oltung'ani oipiru intorrok naa kedung'okini enkiguana." 
Proverbs12:3 Meitasheyie oltung'ani intorrok, kake ore intona eilo supat nemeigutieki aekata." 
Proverbs12:4 Ore enkitok supat naa enkopiyia enkitoo to lpayian lenye; kake ore ina nayau enkurruna netiu anaa eng'uan too loik lenyena. 
Proverbs12:5 Ore indamunot oo supati naa esipata, ore inkikoot oo ltorrok naa enkirrikino." 
Proverbs12:6 Ore irorei leilo torrono neirrag eanyu osarge, kake ore enkutuk eilo supat nelaku iltung'ana." 
Proverbs12:7 Ore iltorrok naa kenang'ari nemeitokini aata, kake ore enkaji o supat naa keitashe." 
Proverbs12:8 Eisisi oltung'ani anaa enatiu endamunoto enye sidai, kake ore ilo opaashaa endamunoto naa kemenuni." 
Proverbs12:9 Eikash oltung'ani oitashe te mborron neasaki kewan esiai, alang ilo orup kewan nemeeta endaa nanya." 
Proverbs12:10 Ore oltung'ani supat negolie enkishui enkiteng enye, kake ore olng'ur lo ltorrono naa entoloi." 
Proverbs12:11 Ore ilo otur enkop enye naa ketum endaa sapuk kake ore ilo osuj imbaa e pesho nemeeta endamunoto. 
Proverbs12:12 Ore oltalet ogol loo ltorrok naa kelotu amuta, kake ore intona oo supati neitashe aauno." 
Proverbs12:13 Ore oltung'ani torrono nejing orreshet too ntorrok enkutuk enye, kake keilany ilo supat entorroni." 
Proverbs12:14 Ore too lng'anayio loo rorei lenyena, neitaraposhi oltung'ani too supati, ore esiaai oo nkaik oltung'ani nerrinyokino ninye." 
Proverbs12:15 Ore enkoitoi olmodai nelioo aa sidai too nkonyek enyena makewan, kake ore oltung'ani ng'en nening enkikoo." 
Proverbs12:16 Ore engoro o lmodai neibala asioki, kake ore oltung'ani ng'en nemeshilaa emoroto." 
Proverbs12:17 Ore ilo oiro esipata neishoru enduaata nasipa, kake ore olchakeni olejisho, nelimu elejare." 
Proverbs12:18 Etii obo laa ore irorei oitasieku netiu anaa enang'unoto olalem. Kake ore olng'ejep lo lng'en neyau enkishiunoto. 
Proverbs12:19 Ore enkutuk nairo isipat nebik intarasi, kake ore olng'ejep le lejare naa ole nkiti kata." 
Proverbs12:20 Etii elejare atua iltauja le lelo ooipiru intorrok, kake ore lelo ooun isupati neeta enchipai." 
Proverbs12:21 Medoiki entorroni isupati kake ebore iltorrok enyamali. 
Proverbs12:22 Ore inkutukie naalejisho naa olminong to Laitoriani. Kake ore lelo oisiligayu naa ninche enchipai enye. 
Proverbs12:23 Ore oltung'ani ng'en, neisudoo eng'eno enye, kake ore ilmoda neibalie emodai enye." 
Proverbs12:24 Ore enkaina eilo onyok eyooki aitoreisho, ore oltashalai naa kepiki aaisikong'aki esiaai nagol." 
Proverbs12:25 Ore enkiroishi eyieunoto oltau lo ltung'ani naa kepetaa ninye, kake ore ororei sidai neitiship ninye." 
Proverbs12:26 Ore oltung'ani supat, neibelekenya aing'uaa intorrok, kake ore inkoitoi oo ltorrok nerik ninche aitapong'oo." 
Proverbs12:27 Ore oltung'ani oshal nemeibung toki naing'oru, kake ore oltung'ani onyok aing'oru, ninye otum imasaa naagol enkinyiang'a." 
Proverbs12:28 Ore atua enkoitoi oo sipat ninye etii enkishui, kake ore enkoitoi enkiminata nelo keeya." 
Proverbs13:1 Ore enkerai ng'en nening'u enkiteng'enare e menye kake ore elde asukenyani nemening'u enkisikong'ata. 
Proverbs13:2 Etum oltung'ani supat mbaa supati too lng'anayio le nkutuk enye, kake ore iyieunot oo lairrikinok naa olarrabal." 
Proverbs13:3 Ore ilo orrip enkutuk enye neitobikoo enkishui enye; ore ilo obol enkutuk enye oleng neidaaya. 
Proverbs13:4 Ore oltau lo ltashalai naa keng'uarrisho, nemetum hoo pito, ore oltau leilo onyok naa keishori ninye te nkumoi." 
Proverbs13:5 Ore oltung'ani loo sipat neiba elejare, kake ore oltorrono neas inenkurruna one sulare." 
Proverbs13:6 Erikoo esipata ilo laa ore enkoitoi enye naa esipata, kake ore eng'oki nenang'aa ilo torrono." 
Proverbs13:7 Eitaakuno oltung'ani obo aikarsis, nemeeta hoo pito, ore likae neitaakuno olaisinani, neeta imasaa kumok." 
Proverbs13:8 Ore elakunoto e nkishui o ltung'ani naa karsisisho enye, kake meeta olaisinani enakordunye kewan." 
Proverbs13:9 Ore ewang'an oo loo sipat neshipa, kake ore oltaa loo ltorrok naa keari." 
Proverbs13:10 Ore to lwuasa neishankarra lelo lemening'isho, kake ore lelo ooibung enkikoo netum eng'eno nagut." 
Proverbs13:11 Ore imasaa naanotoki aasioki naa kengoroo, kake ore ilo osotu aakutiti naa keponaa." 
Proverbs13:12 Ore osiligi oimutieki neitamuoi oltau, kake ore eyieunoto naidipaki naa olchani le nkishui." 
Proverbs13:13 Ore ilo omenaa ororei le nkikoo neyaki kewan enkidaata, kake ore ilo oyanyit enkitanapata naa ketum olerrinyore." 
Proverbs13:14 Ore inkitamoot eilo ng'en naa enchorro enkishui, pee eidim oltung'ani atapaasha irresheta le keeya." 
Proverbs13:15 Ore endamunoto sidai netum omom, kake ore enkoitoi e lelo le meeta enkirukoto naa enkidaaroto enye." 
Proverbs13:16 Eas oltung'ani ng'en pooki bae naas te ng'eno, kake ore olmodai neitoduaaya emodai enye." 
Proverbs13:17 Ore olkilikuai torrono nesulaki iltung'ana kumok enyamali, kake ore olkilikuai oisiligayu neyau enkishiunoto." 
Proverbs13:18 Ejing'aki aisinanisho o esulare ilo lemeitaa toki iutarot, kake ore ilo oning'u inkisikong'at naa keanyituni." 
Proverbs13:19 Ore eyieunoto naitabayioki naa kemelok to ltau; kake ore empaashata oo ntorrok naa olminong too lmoda. 
Proverbs13:20 Ore ilo oiriamariyie iltung'ana ng'eni, naa keaku ng'en, kake ore ole ncholiek oo lmoda naa ketum enkitamioto." 
Proverbs13:21 Kesuj ilbuketa ilaing'okok, kake elaaki karsisisho lelo supati." 
Proverbs13:22 Ore oltung'ani supat neing'ueki enjung'ore inkera oo nkera enyena, kake ore enkarsisisho olaing'okoni netushumakaki lelo supati." 
Proverbs13:23 Ore enkurma natang'asaki aapal meturo, neiu endaa sapuk kake etawuapayioki metii esipata." 
Proverbs13:24 Ore ilo oirragie eng'udi naa keiba enkerai enye, kake ore ilo onyor ninye nenyok aitame arerioo ninye oleng." 
Proverbs13:25 Eeta ilo supat enaitigir esumash enye, kake ore enkoshoke oltorrono neisumash." 
Proverbs14:1 Eshet eng'eno e nkitok ng'en enkaji enye, kake ore emodai near enkaji enye too nkaik enyena." 
Proverbs14:2 Ore ilo olo too sipat naa keure Olaitoriani, ore ilo lemelo too sipat too nkoitoi enyena nemenaa ninye." 
Proverbs14:3 Ore enkiroroto o lmodai naa eng'udi te nkoriong enye, kake ore inkutukie oo lng'eni naa kerrip ninche." 
Proverbs14:4 Ore enemetii ilmong'i, nemetii sii entapa; kake elotu enkumoi, oo ndaiki te ngolon olkiteng." 
Proverbs14:5 Ore olchakeni osipa nemelejisho, kake ore olchakeni lemesipa neitayu entooma e lejare." 
Proverbs14:6 Eing'oru olomenisho eng'eno nagut te mpesho, kake elelek eng'eno to ltung'ani oota ening'unoto." 
Proverbs14:7 Tung'uai ine netii olmodai, amu ore teine minepu irorei le ng'eno." 
Proverbs14:8 Ore eng'eno oltung'ani ng'en naa pee emusu enkoitoi enye, kake ore emodai oo lmoda naa elejare." 
Proverbs14:9 Keisikong' Enkai lelo torrok, ore lelo supati neshipakino omom enye." 
Proverbs14:10 Eyiolo oltau enduaran enye, meeta olomoni ong'arie enchipai enye." 
Proverbs14:11 Ore enkaji eilo torrono naa keidakieki kake ore olng'obor leilo supat naa kebul. 
Proverbs14:12 Etii enkoitoi nalioo to ltung'ani aa sidai, kake ore enkiting'oto enye naa keeya." 
Proverbs14:13 Ore ake sii te nkuenia neeta oltau osina, ore enkiting'oto e nchipai naa osina." 
Proverbs14:14 Ore oltung'ani opaashari inkoitoi enyena, naa keiputakini ninye ilng'anayio loo nkoitoi enyena, ore oltung'ani supat naa keiputakini ninye ilng'anayio loo nkiasin enyena." 
Proverbs14:15 Ore ilo omoda neiruk pooki toki, kake ore olng'en neing'or enkoitoi enye." 
Proverbs14:16 Ore oltung'ani ng'en naa kerripo neibelekenya aing'uaa intorrok, kake ore olmodai nemerrip kewan eas intorrok." 
Proverbs14:17 Ore oltung'ani oirowua elukunya neas inkumok te modai kake ore oloota eng'eno naa keng'iri. 
Proverbs14:18 Ore olmodai netum inemodai, kake ore ilng'eni neishopokini eng'eno anaa emaupe e nkitoo." 
Proverbs14:19 Eirrugokino oltorrono ilo supat, ore ilo torrono nesaisho too nchomito e lelo supati." 
Proverbs14:20 Ore oltung'ani aisinani naa keiba olelatia enye, kake ore olkarsis neeta ilchoreta kumok." 
Proverbs14:21 Ore ilo omenaa olelatia enye naa olaing'okoni, kake eshipa ilo oitanana oshoke too laisinak." 
Proverbs14:22 Aimepong'ori lelo ooun intorrok? Ore lelo ooun isupati einepu enkanyit o enkisiligata. 
Proverbs14:23 Ore te pooki siaai netii dupoto kake ore too nkirorot e pesho neyau osina. 
Proverbs14:24 Ore emaupe e nkitoo oo lng'eni naa eng'eno enye nagut, kake ore emodai naa enkishili oo lmoda." 
Proverbs14:25 Ore olchakeni osipa neitajeu enkishui oo lkumok, kake ore ilo oiro elejare naa olakaldaroni." 
Proverbs14:26 Tiatua euriata o Laitoriani etum oltung'ani osiligi oitashe, ore inkera enyena netum osempewuet." 
Proverbs14:27 Ore euriata o Laitoriani naa enchorro e nkishui, pee etum oltung'ani atapaasha irreshata le keeya." 
Proverbs14:28 Atua esiamo oo ltung'ana etii enkitoo olaiguanani, kake te nemeetae iltung'ana neidaaya olkitok." 
Proverbs14:29 Ore ilo lemesioki agoro neeta eng'eno sapuk, kake ore ilo osioki agoro neitasapuk emodai." 
Proverbs14:30 Ore enchipai o ltau, neitaa osesen bioto, kake ore eng'uarrata neitong'u apurd iloik." 
Proverbs14:31 Ore ilo oitorogony oltung'ani aisinani, naa ilo oitobirua Ninye etamoro, kake ore ilo supat te lelo oomena naa keanyit ninye." 
Proverbs14:32 Enang'ari oltorrono te nena baa enyena torrok, kake etum isupati osempewuet tiatua esupatisho enye." 
Proverbs14:33 Eton eng'eno nagut te ina damunoto oltung'ani oota ening'unoto, kake meyioloi tiatua iltauja loo lmoda." 
Proverbs14:34 Esipata naisho olosho meisisi, kake ore eng'oki naa enkurruna te pooki orere." 
Proverbs14:35 Ore osinka oasisho te ng'eno netum omom to laiguanani, kake ore engoro enye nedoiki ilo oas inenkurruna." 
Proverbs15:1 Ore ewalata e mborron nerriny engoro napi, kake ore ororei le nkisikong' neinyeyie engoro."
