Proverbs15:2 Ore olng'ejep lo lng'en neitubulaa eng'eno, kake ore inkutukie oo lmoda nebuku ine modai." 
Proverbs15:3 Etii inkonyek o Laitoriani pooki wueji, eing'orita lelo torrok o lelo supati." 
Proverbs15:4 Ore irorei le mborron naa olchani le nkishui, kake ore irorei le ntorroni negil oltau." 
Proverbs15:5 Emenaa olmodai enkiteng'enata e menye, kake ore ilo oinining'u iutarot naa ng'en." 
Proverbs15:6 Etii enkaji olasipani olchumati kitok, kake edoiki enyamali tumoto eilo torrono." 
Proverbs15:7 Ore enkutuk oltung'ani ng'en neitubulaa eng'eno, nemeneija etiu indamunot oo lmoda." 
Proverbs15:8 Ore olasar leilo torrono naa olminong to Laitoriani, kake ore enkomono eilo oitashe too sipat naa enchipai enye." 
Proverbs15:9 Ore enkoitoi eilo torrono naa olminong to Laitoriani, kake enyor ninye ilo osuj aing'oru esupatisho." 
Proverbs15:10 Etii enkitamioto eutaroto name ilo otapalayie ina oitoi; ore ilo oiba iutarot naa keye. 
Proverbs15:11 Ore enemeneng'a o Abadon neibala te dukuya Olaitoriani, kebaa eibala oleng iltauja loo ltung'ana! Abadon: Etii ewueji oo rorei lemeibala." 
Proverbs15:12 Meyieu olasukenyani neutari aaitorioo, melo enetii ilo ng'en." 
Proverbs15:13 Ore oltau ong'ida, nepik enkomom enchipai, kake tosina lo ltau egila oltau." 
Proverbs15:14 Ore oltau leilo oota endamunoto e ning'unoto neing'oru eng'eno, kake ore inkutukie oo lmoda neitoti ate too nemodai." 
Proverbs15:15 Ore inkolong'i pooki e lelo ooisilisili naa torrok, kake ore oltau oshipa neeta osirua anaake." 
Proverbs15:16 Eikash ina kiti etii euriata o Laitoriani alang olchumati kitok otii enyamali atua. 
Proverbs15:17 Eikash endaa oo mbenek naanyori etii enyorrata atua, alang olkiteng opir otii enkiba atua." 
Proverbs15:18 Ore oltung'ani oirowua elukunya naa keyau enchankar, kake ore ilo lemesioki agoro neitigir enchankar." 
Proverbs15:19 Ore enkoitoi olturuai netubulakita ilkiku, kake ore enkoitoi eilo oitashe too sipat naa enkoitoi nalala naitoriori." 
Proverbs15:20 Ore enkerai ng'en neitiship menye kake ore oltung'ani omoda nemen ng'otonye. 
Proverbs15:21 Ore emodai naa enchipai teilo le meeta endamunoto, kake ore ilo oota ening'unoto nelo aitoriori." 
Proverbs15:22 Ore enemetii eutaroto nerruoyo nkitobirat naaji mataas; kake ore etii ilaikook kumok naa kedupayu. 
Proverbs15:23 Ore ewalata nairirikino naa enchipai to ltung'ani, kebaa esidano ororei te nkata naishiaakino!" 
Proverbs15:24 Ore enkoitoi oltung'ani ng'en neilepie arik enkishui, pee etum atapaasha enemeneng'a tiabori." 
Proverbs15:25 Kepolol Olaitoriani auroo enkaji eilo owuasa, kake keitashayie lelo polosien le nkoliai." 
Proverbs15:26 Ore indamunot oo ltorrok naa olminong to Laitoriani, ore irorei leilo le meeta entioto naa keitiship ninye." 
Proverbs15:27 Ore ilo oota olorok too masaa naatumi te nkoitoi torrono neyaki enyamali enkaji enye, kake ore ilo oiba eropare nebikoo." 
Proverbs15:28 Ore endamunoto o lasipani nejurru enejo te newal, kake ore enkutuk eilo torrono nebuku intokitin torrok." 
Proverbs15:29 Elakuaniki Olaitoriani lelo torrok, kake ening ina omono oo supati." 
Proverbs15:30 Ore ewang'an oo nkonyek neitiship oltau, naa ore ilomon sidain neitagol iloik." 
Proverbs15:31 Ore ilo oirrugu enkiok enye aning'u enkikoo, nebik te nebo ilang'eni." 
Proverbs15:32 Ore ilo oitaa parmetii enkikoo naa kewan emen, kake ore ilo oning'u enkikoo netum ening'unoto." 
Proverbs15:33 Ore euriata o Laitoriani naa enkiteng'enare tiatua eng'eno nagut, ore emborron nelo te dukuya enkanyit." 
Proverbs16:1 Ore inkitobirat endamunoto naa ene tung'ani, kake ore ewalata olng'ejep naa Olaitoriani eing'uaa." 
Proverbs16:2 Ore inkoitoi pooki oltung'ani naa sidain too nkonyek enyena, kake Olaitoriani ninye oineneng' oltau." 
Proverbs16:3 Inteleiki esiaai ino Olaitoriani, naa keitasheyieki inkitobirat inono." 
Proverbs16:4 Eitobirua Olaitoriani pooki toki te nkipirta enye, neija sii etiu ilarruok teina olong e nyamali." 
Proverbs16:5 Ore pooki ng'ae oota olwuasa le nkitokoos naa olminong' to Laitoriani; tayiolo miata olng'ash, esipa tayiolo, melo ninye eitu eitamei." 
Proverbs16:6 Te nkanyit o te nkisiligata epalakini ing'ok, naa te uriata o Laitoriani epaash oltung'ani intorrok." 
Proverbs16:7 Ore te neitiship inkoitoi o ltung'ani Olaitoriani, neitainye ilmang'ati lenyena ooboitare osotua." 
Proverbs16:8 Enaikash enkiti etii esupatisho alang imasaa kumok nemetii esipata. 
Proverbs16:9 Eitobir indamunot o ltung'ani enkoitoi enye, kake Olaitoriani ninye outaa iroruat enyena." 
Proverbs16:10 Etii enkutuk olaiguanani iwalat naatipikaki engolon: nemeitadiak enkutuk enye te nkiguana. 
Proverbs16:11 Ore enkineneng'ata o entemet nadede naa ino Laitoriani, ore isoito ooineneng'ishoreki otii olbene naa esiai enye." 
Proverbs16:12 Olminong torrono too laiguanak te neas ing'ok, amu ore olorika le nkitoo neitasheyieki too sipat." 
Proverbs16:13 Ore inkutukie naairo isipat naa ninche enchipai olaiguanani, nenyor ninye ilo oiro ina nasipa." 
Proverbs16:14 Ore engoro napi o laiguanani netiu anaa olkilikuai le keeya, kake ore oltung'ani ng'en naa keitiship ninye." 
Proverbs16:15 Ore te newang' enkomom o laiguanani neetai enkishui ore omom enye netiu anaa inkatampo naayau enchan oloirujuruj. 
Proverbs16:16 Tinitum eng'eno, neikash alang sahabu, tinitum ening'unoto naa keisul alang enkosholai." 
Proverbs16:17 Ore enkoitoi nalala eilo oitashe too sipat nepaash entorroni; ore ilo orrip enkoitoi enye, negolie enkishui enye." 
Proverbs16:18 Eng'asunye olwuasa nesuju enkidaaroto, naa neijia etiu oltau oisis kewan eng'asunye nesuju embatatata." 
Proverbs16:19 Enaikash ti niata oltau obor te nebo ilaisinak alang tiniorioro iyarunot te nebo iloowuasa. 
Proverbs16:20 Ore ilo oning'u ororei naa kebulaa, neshipa oleng ilo oisilig Olaitoriani." 
Proverbs16:21 Ore ilo ng'en to ltau naa keji oltung'ani odolu mbaa, naa ore ilomon ooitishipisho neponaa enkarriyiano." 
Proverbs16:22 Ore eng'eno naa enkong'u enchorro e nkishui teilo oota, kake ore emodai naa enkitamioto oo lmoda." 
Proverbs16:23 Ore endamunoto olng'en eitaa ilomon lenyena le nkiguana, neponaa enkarriyiano te nkutuk enye." 
Proverbs16:24 Ore irorei ooitishipisho netiu anaa olkenkei le naisho, emeloni tiatua oltau naa embiotisho tiatua osesen." 
Proverbs16:25 Etii enkoitoi nalioo to ltung'ani aa sidai, kake ore enkiting'oto enye naa enkoitoi e keeya." 
Proverbs16:26 Errumoki esumash olaisiaayiani metaasisho oleng, ore ina sumash enye nerrumoki ninye metaasisho." 
Proverbs16:27 Ore oltung'ani lemeeta tipat neitobiru enkarruoisho, ore ilomon lenyena netiu anaa enkima nadalisho." 
Proverbs16:28 Ore oltung'ani loo ntorrok eidapashaa olomang'ati, naa ore oltung'ani lo lmarenke eor ilchoreta ooning'o oleng." 
Proverbs16:29 Ore oltung'ani otolo eitapong'oo olelatia enye, nerikoki ninye enkoitoi neme sidai."

Proverbs16:31 Ore ilpapit ooibor te ndukuya naa enkopiyia e nkitoo, etumi ninche te nkishui naitoriori."

Proverbs16:33 Eosh iltung'ana enkukuo aaing'oru enayieu, kake ore ewalata naa Olaitoriani oishoru pooki." 
Proverbs17:1 Enaikash tininya enkiti mukate natoyio iata eseriani, alang ti niata emasho sapuk tiatua enkaji nabore enchankar." 
Proverbs17:2 Ore osinka oas ineng'eno naa keitore olayioni inoti oas inenkurruna, naa ketum sii ninye ematua e njung'ore anaa obo le lelo alashera." 
Proverbs17:3 Etemi enkosholai te moti, netemi sahabu to lkokuet, naa Olaitoriani otem iltauja." 
Proverbs17:4 Ore olaasani loo ntorrok nening nkirorot torrok; ore olalejani neinining olng'ejep arruoni. 
Proverbs17:5 Ore pooki ng'ae osukeny ilo aisinani, naa olaitobirani lenye etusukenya; ore ilo oshipa te ng'olikinoto nemelo eitu eitamei." 
Proverbs17:6 Ore inkera oo nkera naa ninche enkopiyia enkitoo, ore enkisisa oo layiok naa loo menye."

Proverbs17:8 Etiu eropet anaa osoit le ntasim too nkonyek eilo oropisho; ore pooki wueji neibelekenyakino nebul.

Proverbs17:11 Ore oltung'ani torrono neing'oru ake inenkarruoisho, keirriwakini ninye olkilikuai otolo metigilunore ninye." 
Proverbs17:12 Enaikash tininang'are olng'arurumi otooruoki inkiyoitin enyena, alang tininang'are olmodai oreuta emodai enye."

Proverbs17:18 Ore oltung'ani le meeta endamunoto, neitayu enkisiligata, neaku ninye oitasheiki esile olelatia enye." 
Proverbs17:19 Ore ilo onyor inkitadiat nenyor enchankar; ore ilo oilepie kutuk aji enye oleng, neing'oru enkidaaroto."

Proverbs17:21 Ore olayioni omoda naa osomit te menye; ore menye ilo modai nemeeta enchipai. 
Proverbs17:22 Ore oltau oshipa naa olmairo sidai, kake ore oltau otigile neitoi iloik."

Proverbs17:26 Imesidai tiniaraki oltung'ani supat metalaa entoki nemesipa, aitorrono te neitamei nkasisin." 
Proverbs17:27 Ore ilo oibooyo irorei lenyena eeta eng'eno, ore ilo oota oltau obor naa oltung'ani oota ening'unoto." 
Proverbs17:28 Ore doi ninye olmodai ogira meiro neji aing'en; ore pee eiken enkutuk enye nedoli ajo aing'en. 
Proverbs18:1 Ore ilo okepari makewan naa iyieunot enyena eing'oru, pee etum atoorunye te pooki kiguana nasipa." 
Proverbs18:2 Meshipakino olmodai embae naning'unoyu meteleku embae enye ake eibalie. 
Proverbs18:3 Tenelotu entorroni nelotu sii enkurruna ore te nebo enkurruna netii sii esulare. 
Proverbs18:4 Ore irorei le nkutuk oltung'ani naa nkariak naagut; ore enkong'u e ng'eno naa enchorro naitokitoku enkare. 
Proverbs18:5 Meishaakino tinijing' enkoriong oltung'ani arruoni, arashu imitiki oltung'ani supat esipata." 
Proverbs18:6 Ore enkutuk olmodai neyau enchankar, ore enkutuk enye neipotu ioshot." 
Proverbs18:7 Ore enkutuk o lmodai naa enkidaaroto enye, ore enkutuk enye naa orreshet te ninye."

Proverbs18:11 Ore imasaa o lkarsis naa enkanasa enye nagol, netiu anaa esuntai naado namitu ninye." 
Proverbs18:12 Eisis oltau lo ltung'ani kewan eton ebau emutata, kake eng'asunye emborron eitu nesuju enkanyit." 
Proverbs18:13 Teneishooyo oltung'ani ewalata eton eitu ening'u, naa emodai enye o enkurruna."

Proverbs18:15 Ore endamunoto oltung'ani ng'en netum eng'eno, ore enkiok oltung'ani ng'en neing'oru eng'eno."

Proverbs18:17 Ore ilo ong'as airo te dukuya nelioo aa kesipa enkiroroto enye o metaba anaa nelotu likae ajur ninye. 
Proverbs18:18 Ore eoshoto enkukuo neiting'ie enchankar nerishu autu iloogol ooishankarra. 
Proverbs18:19 Ore olalashe otaretoki netiu anaa enkanasa nagol, kake ore enchankar, netiu anaa iasheta oo sekenke o sempewuet."

Proverbs19:2 Meishaakino oltung'ani te nemeeta eng'eno, naa ore ilo oitasiooyo nkejek enyena, nepong enkoitoi enye." 
Proverbs19:3 Ore te nerikoki emodai oltung'ani enkoitoi enkidaaroto, negorokino oltau lenye Olaitoriani." 
Proverbs19:4 Eyau enkarsisisho ilchoreta kumok ng'ejuko, kake ore oltung'ani aisinani nepuo aaing'uaa ilchoreta lenyena." 
Proverbs19:5 Ore olchakeni lemesipa nemelo eitu eitamei, naa ore ilo oiro elejare nemeilanyisho aisik." 
Proverbs19:6 Eing'oru ilkumok omom o ltung'ani aminin, ore pooki tung'ani naa olchore le ilo tung'ani oishooyo inkishorot."

Proverbs19:9 Ore olchakeni lemesipa melo eitu eitamei, ore ilo oiro inelejare naa keimin."

Proverbs19:12 Ore engoro napi o laiguanani netiu anaa enkikurrukur olng'atuny, kake ore omom enye netiu anaa enkoileelio natii inkujit." 
Proverbs19:13 Ore olayioni omoda naa enkidaaroto te menye, ore enkitok enchankar netiu anaa enkirujuruj e nchan." 
Proverbs19:14 Ore enkaji o enkarsisisho naa enjung'o naing'uaa iloopapa, kake ore enkitok ng'en naa Olaitoriani eing'uaa."

Proverbs19:16 Ore ilo oibung inkitanapat nerrip enkishui enye; ore ilo omenaa ororei naa keye. 
Proverbs19:17 Ore ilo oitanana oshoke too laisinak naa Olaitoriani eisilenoko, naa kelaaki olaitoriani ninye enkias enye."

Proverbs19:19 Ore oltung'ani le ngoro napi naa kelak enkitamioto enye; amu tinilaku ninye taata, naa iyooki ake aigil alaku." 
Proverbs19:20 Toning'u enkikoo ning'amaa enkiteng'enare, pee itum anoto eng'eno too nkolong'i naapuonu." 
Proverbs19:21 Etii nkitobirat kumok endukuya e tung'ani, kake ina nayieu Olaitoriani ninye ake naitashe aaku."

Proverbs19:23 Ore euriata o Laitoriani naa aikirikoki enkishui; naa ore ilo oota neyeng'iyeng'a etaraposhe, melotu entorroni enetii ninye."

Proverbs20:1 Enkasukenyani enaisho oo sabibu naa embuaaroto enaisho napi, naa ore pooki ng'ae oitapong'oyie ninye nemeng'en." 
Proverbs20:2 Ore engoro naitureisho o laiguanani, netiu anaa enkikurrukur olng'atuny. Ore ilo oitagor ninye neiturraa enkishui enye." 
Proverbs20:3 Enkanyit telde tung'ani oibooyo kewan aitalam enchankar; kake ore pooki modai nenyor enchankar. 
Proverbs20:4 Metur oltashalai enkurma enye te nkata e nkirobi, keing'oru te nkata enkisampuare nemetum hoo pito." 
Proverbs20:5 Ore enkiguana natii atua endamunoto e tung'ani netiu anaa enkare nagut, kake ore ilo oota ening'unoto naa kebuku ninye aipang'unye." 
Proverbs20:6 Elimu pooki tung'ani aisis kewan aibalie esupatisho o enkisiligata enye, kake tetema sii iyie tujurro ilo tung'ani enaikununo!" 
Proverbs20:7 Emayiana nkera naata menye supat, naas nena naasipa." 
Proverbs20:8 Ore ilo aiguanani oton to lorika le nkiguana, negel asilu ntorrok pooki te nedol too nkonyek." 
Proverbs20:9 Aing'ae oidim atejo, “Aitukuo nanu oltau lai; ara nanu sinyati maata eng'oki?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Ore ntemeta enkiroishi naapaashipaasha o ntemeta naapaasha nenyaanyuk pokira, olminong' to Laitoriani." 
Proverbs20:11 Ore doi ninye enkerai neyiolouni too yasat enyena, tenaa ore ina naas naa sinyati nesipa." 
Proverbs20:12 Ore enkiok naning'isho te nebo enkong'u nadololisho, Olaitoriani ninye oitobirua pokira." 
Proverbs20:13 Minyorru injo, arashu ijing atua osina; tabolo inkonyek inono naa itum endaa sapuk." 
Proverbs20:14 “Aitorrono, aitorrono,” ejo ilo oinyang'isho, kake te nelo aing'uaa, neaku oloisis kewan." 
Proverbs20:15 Etii sahabu o soito kumok oogol enkinyang'a, kake ore enkutuk naata eng'eno naa osoit ogol enkinyang'a." 
Proverbs20:16 Iwa enkila eilo tung'ani otonyorrayie aitasheiki esile olomoni, nimbung ninye tena nyorrata natonyorrayie aitasheiki esile oo lomon." 
Proverbs20:17 Ore endaa nanotoki te lejare naa kemelok te tung'ani, kake ore te siadi, neiput enkutuk enye osinyai." 
Proverbs20:18 Ore nkitobirat pooki neitasheyieki te nkiguana; terikore natii eng'eno atua epuoi olarrabal. 
Proverbs20:19 Ore ilo oloolo ainosaa olmarenke, neibalie imbaa naaisudoro, metaa mintaa encholiek ilo oiro te modai." 
Proverbs20:20 Ore ilo odek menye arashu ng'otonye, netiu enkishui enye anaa oltaa otaaraki." 
Proverbs20:21 Ore enjung'ore nanotoki aasioki te nkiterunoto, neaku te siadi ene memayiana." 
Proverbs20:22 Mijo ake, “Ekaitalaku intorrok,” taanyu Olaitoriani naa aikiretu ninye." 
Proverbs20:23 Ore isoito ooineneng'ishoreki oopaashaa naa olminong' to Laitoriani, ore intemeta e nkiroishi e lejare nemesidain." 
Proverbs20:24 Ore iroruat oltung'ani naa Olaitoriani oitore; kaji naa eiko oltung'ani te nening'u enkoitoi enye? 
Proverbs20:25 Orreshet to ltung'ani te nesioki ajo, “Aisinyati Olasar”, neitoki ake asipu eidipa ainosa olmumai lenye." 
Proverbs20:26 Ore olaiguanani ng'en nesilu iltorrok nereu enkeju e ngarri aitunyoo ninche. 
Proverbs20:27 Ore enkiyang'et e tung'ani naa oltaa lo Laitoriani, ojur oleng pooki toki e atua enye." 
Proverbs20:28 Olning'o o enkanyit naasho olaiguanani metobikoi, ore enkitoria enye neitasheyieki te sipata." 
Proverbs20:29 Ore enkisisa oo lbarnot naa engolon enye, kake ore enkishiaa oo lpayiani kituaak naa ilpapit lenye ooibor." 
Proverbs20:30 Ore ioshot naadotisho, naa keitukuo intorrok, ore ioshot kumok e ng'udi neisuj nenen wuejitin e atua." 
Proverbs21:1 Ore oltau lo laiguanani naa ereyiet e nkare tiatua enkaina o Laitoriani. Neibelekenyaki ninye pooki wueji neyieu. 
Proverbs21:2 Ore pooki oitoi te tung'ani naa sidai too nkonyek enyena, kake Olaitoriani ninye oineneng' oltau." 
Proverbs21:3 Easata oo supati o esipata, ninye nang'amaroyu too nkonyek o Laitoriani alang enkitayunoto o lasar." 
Proverbs21:4 Ore nkonyek olwuasa tenebo oltau o wuasa, oltaa loo ltorrok naa ing'ok." 
Proverbs21:5 Ore nkitobirat e ilo oota enyuata osipa erikoki ninye puaan te nkumoi, kake ore pooki osioki neiting ake te yieunoto." 
Proverbs21:6 Ore olchumati litum tolng'ejep olejisho, netiu anaa enkinuku nasiooyo aish naa orreshet le keeya." 
Proverbs21:7 Ore enkinyala oo ltorrok naa keoroo ninche aishu, amu etanyaita eas ina nasipa." 
Proverbs21:8 Ore enkoitoi eilo torrono naa kekordilo, kake ore olkuaak leilo supat naa aisidai." 
Proverbs21:9 Enaikash tinimany olpijata le nchumata enkaji, alang tinitii enkaji e nkitok naata ororei." 
Proverbs21:10 Ore oltau leilo torrono neyieu intorrok, metum olelatia enye olng'ur too nkonyek enyena." 
Proverbs21:11 Ore te neitamei oloikordodisho, neng'enu olmodai ore te neutari oltung'ani ng'en, netum eng'eno." 
Proverbs21:12 Ore isupati neing'or enkaji eilo torrono; enang'akini iltorrok enkidaaroto. 
Proverbs21:13 Ore ilo oiken enkiok enye pee mening enkishirata e lelo aisinak, naa keishir sii ninye nemeetae oloning ninye." 
Proverbs21:14 Ore enkishooroto naishoruni too nkisudorot naa keshuk engoro; ore eropare oo nkishorot neitigir engoro sapuk. 
Proverbs21:15 Ore teneasi esipata, naa enchipai too supati, naa enking'asia too laasak loo ntorrok." 
Proverbs21:16 Ore oltung'ani olo aing'uaa enkoitoi e ning'unoto netum eneeng'iyeng'are to lturrur loo loo tuata. 
Proverbs21:17 Ore ilo tung'ani onyor esikar naa keaku oltung'ani aisinani ore ilo onyor enaisho o ila nemeaku karsis. 
Proverbs21:18 Ore ilo torrono naa elakunoto eilo supat, ore olemeisiligayu naa elakunoto oloitashe too sipat." 
Proverbs21:19 Enaikash tiniton te nkop olpurkel natoyio, alang tiniboitare enkitok naata enchankar o lkwenyi." 
Proverbs21:20 Ore imasaa naagol enkinyang'a naa kebik te nkaji eilo oota eng'eno, kake ore olmodai naa keijoo." 
Proverbs21:21 Ore ilo osuj isipat o enanai e oshoke naa ketum enkishui o enkanyit. 
Proverbs21:22 Ore oltung'ani ng'en, neyiolo enaikunakino enkanasa o logol, negil isunta naaisilig ninche." 
Proverbs21:23 Ore ilo oiken enkutuk enye neibooyo olng'ejep lenye, neitapaash kewan enyamali." 
Proverbs21:24 Ore olasurdaanyani, ninye enkarna o ltung'ani owuasa neitokoos, ilo oas imbaa to lwuasa le nkitokoos enye." 
Proverbs21:25 Ore eyieunoto oltashalai naa kear ninye, metua amu keany inkaik enyena eitayu esiai." 
Proverbs21:26 Eng'uarrisho iltorrok endama pooki, kake ore isupati keishooyo nememit." 
Proverbs21:27 Ore olasar leilo torrono naa olminong, kebaa elusoo eitayio to ltau torrono?" 
Proverbs21:28 Ore olchakeni lemesipa naa keimin, kake ore ororei le ilo oning'isho naa kebikoo." 
Proverbs21:29 Ore oltung'ani torrono neitodolu enkomom empijan, kake ore oltung'ani oitashe too sipat neing'or inkoitoi enyena." 
Proverbs21:30 Ore enemetii eng'eno nagut, nemetii ening'unoto nemetii enkikoo, keidim ayau eanyata Olaitoriani." 
Proverbs21:31 Eitaanyuni embarta ina olong e njore, kake ore enkisulata naa eno Laitoriani." 
Proverbs22:1 Enaikash te negeluni enkarna sidai, alang enkarsisisho sapuk, naa ore omom nelang enkosholai o sahabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Ore olkarsis o ilo aisinani naa ketumo te nebo, Olaitoriani ninye olaitobirani le pooki." 
Proverbs22:3 Ore oltung'ani ng'en naa kedolu batisho neisudoo kewan; kake ore olmodai naa kelo dukuya netum enkitamioto. 
Proverbs22:4 Ore olerrinyore le mborron o euriata o Laitoriani, naa enkarsisisho o enkanyit o enkishui." 
Proverbs22:5 Etii ilkiku o rresheta enkoitoi eilo otapong'ori; ore ilo orrip kewan naa kelam ninche. 
Proverbs22:6 Tuutaki intamoo enkerai enkoitoi naim, ore pee eaku moruo nemeing'uaa ina oitoi." 
Proverbs22:7 Ore olkarsis naa ninye oitore ilo aisinani, ore ilo oisilenu naa osinka le ilo oisilenoko." 
Proverbs22:8 Ore ilo oun inemesipa naa keisampu eng'olikinoto, ore eng'udi e ngoro enye napi naa keish." 
Proverbs22:9 Ore ilo tung'ani aminin naa kemayiani, amu keng'arie endaa enye ilaisinak." 
Proverbs22:10 Intupuku impang'ie ilo oimaki intorrok, naa aikipuku enchankar aing'uaa, ore olarrabal o emorore naa keish." 
Proverbs22:11 Ore ilo onyor esinyatisho o ltau, neeta ilomon oo melook naa keaku olchore lo laiguanani." 
Proverbs22:12 Etii nkonyek o Laitoriani shumata eng'eno, kake kenang'aa ninye lelo rorei le lelo le meeta enkirukoto." 
Proverbs22:13 Ejo olturuai, “Etii doi olng'atuny auluo: kaari matua too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa!”" 
Proverbs22:14 Ore enkutuk enkitok naibor onyek naa engumoto nagut; ore ilo otagorokine Olaitoriani naa kesulakino atua ninye. 
Proverbs22:15 Eenaro emodai tiatua oltau le nkerai, kake ore eng'udi enkitamioto nearaa ninye aitalamaa." 
Proverbs22:16 Ore oloibooki enkop olaisinani pee eponaa enkarsisisho enye, arashu eisho lelo karsisi ake, naa kelotu ake sii ninye aaku olaisinani." 
Proverbs22:17 Irrugu enkiok ino inining'u irorei lo lang'eni, nintorioki indamunot inono eng'eno ai;" 
Proverbs22:18 amu keaku esidano tinishum ninche tiatua iyie, te netii pooki atua enkutuk ino." 
Proverbs22:19 Pee etum osiligi lino ataa Olaitoriani etii, aaitayiolo iyie ninche taata ena olong, aa iyie taa." 
Proverbs22:20 Keitu aasiraki iyie inkirorot tomoni uni, imbaa enkikoo o ine ng'eno," 
Proverbs22:21 peyie aaitodol iyie embae naitoriori nesipa, pee itum aishoo ewalata naitoriori nesipa lelo likirriwaa iyie?" 
Proverbs22:22 Misim olaisinani eji amu kaaisinani, arashu irony oloota osina te kishomi;" 
Proverbs22:23 amu keng'or Olaitoriani ninche, neinyal enkishui e lelo ooinyal ninche." 
Proverbs22:24 Mintaa olchore oltung'ani oman nang'u, aashu iriamariyie oltung'ani osioki agoro." 
Proverbs22:25 Pee miyiolou inkoitoi enyena, nipik kewan atua orreshet." 
Proverbs22:26 Miaku obo le lelo ooisiligie ilkulikae imbaa, ilo oaku oloitasheiki esile." 
Proverbs22:27 Tinimiata entoki nilakie, ainyoo doi pee inyorraa meewai endapash ino?" 
Proverbs22:28 Midotu ake entoki naitodolu olpolosie musana ina apa natipika iloo papaai lino. 
Proverbs22:29 Idol oltung'ani arriyia te siaai enye? Keitashe te dukuya ilaiguanak; meitashe te dukuya iltung'ana misili. 
Proverbs23:1 Tenelo niton anya endaa te nebo oloitoreisho, ing'ura tisipu oleng ina natii dukuya iyie;" 
Proverbs23:2 naa tenaa ira oltung'ani le nkului, nipik enkalem olgos lino." 
Proverbs23:3 Ming'uar intokitin enyena naamelook, amu endaa ina nikipikieki olosek." 
Proverbs23:4 Teng'ena miar kewan amutakino ing'oru enkarsisisho, teng'ena pee imbooyo." 
Proverbs23:5 Ore pee ikurraki inkonyek inono ninye, neimin; amu ketum ninye asioki inaipuko, neilep anaa olkurragos olo te keper." 
Proverbs23:6 Minya endaa oltung'ani opiak, ming'uar indaiki enyena sidain." 
Proverbs23:7 Amu ore ninye netiu anaa ilo limikiyeu to ltau kijoki ninye, “Inosa doi niok!” Kake metii oltau lenye te nebo iyie." 
Proverbs23:8 Irrugumu nena belat pooki oo mukateni nindipa ainosa, neimin lelo rorei linono oo melook." 
Proverbs23:9 Miro ake te wueji nening'ie olmodai amu kemenaa irorei le ng'eno o rorei linono. 
Proverbs23:10 Mintayu ake ina toki musana natii olpolosie, arashu ijing nkurman e lelo lemeeta iloomenye;" 
Proverbs23:11 amu ore olalakunoni lenye naa kegol; naa keikilikuanu ninye te iyie. 
Proverbs23:12 Intorioki endamunoto ino enkiteng'enare, nipik enkiok ino irorei le ng'eno." 
Proverbs23:13 Mimbooyo enkitamioto ererioroto te nkerai; amu tinindong ninye te ng'udi nemeye. 
Proverbs23:14 Tinindong ninye te ng'udi, naa intajeu enkishui enye te nemeneng'a." 
Proverbs23:15 Enkerai ai, tenaa aing'en oltau lino, naa keshipa sii ninye oltau lai;" 
Proverbs23:16 naa te neiro enkutuk ino inaasipa, naa keshipa oltau lai." 
Proverbs23:17 Mincho oltau lino eng'uar ilaing'okok kake shomo inkolong'i pooki tiatua euriata o Laitoriani. 
Proverbs23:18 Esipa katukul etii imbaa sidain dukuya iyie, nemedung'ori osiligi lino katukul." 
Proverbs23:19 Toning'o enkerai ai niaku ng'en, nintorioki endamunoto ino ina oitoi." 
Proverbs23:20 Miaku ilencholiek oo laokok le naisho, arashu ole encholiek olooisepe tenkinosata oo nkiri." 
Proverbs23:21 Amu ore olamerani oloisepe naa keaku aisinak, neaku ore elepori e merai neishopoki oltung'ani mpurdat." 
Proverbs23:22 Toning'o papaai lino ilo apa likitoiwuo, nimimenaa yieyio lino te neaku moruo." 
Proverbs23:23 Inyang'u esipata nimimir ake, inyang'u eng'eno nagut, e nkiteng'enare; o ening'unoto." 
Proverbs23:24 Ore menye ilo supat naa keshipa oleng; ore ilo otoiwuo olayioni ng'en naa keshipakino ninye. 
Proverbs23:25 Inchoo papaai lino o yieyioo lino eshipa, inchoo ina nikitoiwuo eshipa." 
Proverbs23:26 Enkerai ai nchooki nanu oltau lino, naa inchoo inkonyek inono eing'or inkoitoi aainei." 
Proverbs23:27 Amu ore enkitok naibor onyek naa engumoto nagut; ore ina tang'oroi naa enchorro napirik. 
Proverbs23:28 Neirrag ninye aanyisho anaa olaisimani, neponaa ilewa kumok aitaa ilemeisiligayu." 
Proverbs23:29 Aing'ae ilo oishir ajo wooi? Aing'ae ilo oota osomit? Aing'ae ilo oota olarrabal? Aing'ae ilo oing'unyug'uny? Kalo ilo oota ilbaa nemeeta eneyopakaki? Kalo ilo oota endoron to onkonyek enyena? 
Proverbs23:30 Lelo le meirura eok enaisho, lelo oopuaya aatem enaisho naitushula." 
Proverbs23:31 Ming'or enaisho te nyokieni, ina kata eitokitoku te nkikompe, nedoyio aitobirari too lgoso." 
Proverbs23:32 Ore te siadi nikiony anaa olasurai, niking'or anaa enturbubua." 
Proverbs23:33 Ore inkonyek inono nedol intokitin neitu aekata edol, ore indamunot inono neimaki intokitin naaitapong'oo." 
Proverbs23:34 Nitiu anaa oltung'ani oirragita te mpolos e naiposha, anaa ilo oirragita te nchumata e ng'ape e meli." 
Proverbs23:35 Ilo iyie ajo, “Aatoosho ninche nanu, kake eitu aning emion; aaidong'o nanu, neitu aning emion. Kanu doi ade ainyototo? Pee alo aing'oru ae aisho naok.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Ming'uar lelo tung'ana torrok, niming'uar aitaa ninche encholiek." 
Proverbs24:2 Amu ore indamunot enye neipiru olarrabal neiro too nkutukie enye imbaa enkarruoisho. 
Proverbs24:3 Te ng'eno eshetuni enkaji naa te ning'unoto eitasheyieki. 
Proverbs24:4 Te ng'eno eiputi ilgilat pooki, too ntokitin pooki sidain naagol enkinyang'a" 
Proverbs24:5 Ore oltung'ani ng'en naa kegol alang oltung'ani ogol, naa neijia etiu ilo oota eng'eno elang ilo oota eng'olon." 
Proverbs24:6 Amu te rikoto e ng'eno indim aipiru enjore, naa tiatua enkumoi oo lautarok etumi enkishuroto." 
Proverbs24:7 Ore eng'eno nagut naa kelakuaniki oleng olmodai, mebol ninye enkutuk enye te kishomi." 
Proverbs24:8 Ore ilo oitobiru pee eas ine nkarruoisho, naa keipoti aajo oloitobir enkarruoisho." 
Proverbs24:9 Ore enkipirunoto e modai naa eng'oki, naa ore ilo asukenyani naa olminong too ltung'ana." 
Proverbs24:10 Ore tininterre te nkolong e nyamali, naa aikiti eng'olon ino." 
Proverbs24:11 Intajeu lelo ooyae meshomo keeya; imbooi lelo oorrorrokino keeya. 
Proverbs24:12 Tinijo “Ng'ura, eitu duoo iyiook kiyiolou ena,” keitu emusu ilo oineneng oltau ina? Amaa ilo likirrip oltau aimeyiolo ninye? Naa aimelaaki ninye pooki tung'ani anaa enaikununo esiaai enye?" 
Proverbs24:13 Enkerai ai, inosa enaisho amu aisidai, ore ilkitong'at lo lkenkei naa kemelook tininchamisham;" 
Proverbs24:14 tayiolo naa ajo neijia etiu eng'eno nagut tiatua oltau lino; tinitum ninye naa itum eseriani too nkolong'i naapuonu, nemedung'ori osiligi lino katukul." 
Proverbs24:15 Mirrag arreshisho anaa oltung'ani torrono aarare emanyisho oosupati; miarare enkang enye," 
Proverbs24:16 amu ebatata oltung'ani supat kat naapishana, neitoki ake adumunye; kake kemut oltorrono eng'olikinoto." 
Proverbs24:17 Mishipa te nebatata o lmang'atinta lino, nimincho oltau lino eshipa te nebatata ninye;" 
Proverbs24:18 pee medol ake Olaitoriani nemeshipa, negoro, neiwuang'ie engoro aitung'uaa ninye." 
Proverbs24:19 Mintanyamal kewan tenkaraki ilaasak loo ntorrok, niming'uar ilarruok." 
Proverbs24:20 Amu meeta oltung'ani torrono esidano oo nkolong'i naapuonu; amu keari oltaa loo ltorrok. 
Proverbs24:21 Enkerai ai turia Olaitoriani o laiguanani, nimigolong'aki hoo obo lenye." 
Proverbs24:22 Amu kedumunye emutata te ninche asieku, naa aing'ae oyiolo emutata nalotu eing'uaa pokira?" 
Proverbs24:23 Ore sii kuna naa nkirorot o lang'eni: ore olkep te nkiguana nemesidai. 
Proverbs24:24 Ore ilo ojoki oltung'ani torrono inchere, “Miata iyie entioto,” naa kedek iloreren ninye, neibayu iloshon ninye." 
Proverbs24:25 Kake ore ilo oisikong oltorrono naa ketum enchipai, naa kelotu emayianata sidai shumata ninye." 
Proverbs24:26 Ore ilo oishoru ewalata nasipa, neng'utut inkonito enkutuk." 
Proverbs24:27 Intobira esiaai ino tiauluo niyau pooki toki niyieu enkurma ore pee indip ina nitum taa aitesheta enkaji. 
Proverbs24:28 Miaku olchakeni oarare olelatia ino miata eniporoki, nimilejisho te nkutuk ino." 
Proverbs24:29 Mijo taa ake, “Ekaitaas ninye ina naaitaasa nanu, Ekalaaki ilo tung'ani ina naaitaasa.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Ashomo nanu agiroo olokeri lo ltashalai, embata enkurma oo sabibu oltung'ani lemeeta endamunoto." 
Proverbs24:31 Naa ng'ura, etubulakita ninye ilkiku; ore enkop nebore entamejoi; ore esuntai enye o soit neturori." 
Proverbs24:32 Ina pee aing'or natemaa ayiolou; aing'ura nang'amu enkiteng'enare. 
Proverbs24:33 Kang'as airura penyo, kang'as aimug penyo. Kang'as anunuk inkaik penyo ayeng'iyeng'a." 
Proverbs24:34 Nikijing'aki osina iyie o esumash anaa olaisimani, nikijing'aki osina anaa oltung'ani otanape." 
Proverbs25:1 Ore sii kuna naa indung'eta e rashe e Solomon naatisira iltung'ana le Hesekia olaiguanani le Yuda. 
Proverbs25:2 Enkitoo enkisisa te Nkai te neisudoo ninye imbaa, kake enkitoo too laiguanak, te nejurru imbaa aaibalie." 
Proverbs25:3 Ore anaa eneba elakuani e keper, o eneba enguton e nkop neija etiu indamunot oo laiguanak mejurrunoyu." 
Proverbs25:4 Iwuang'ie endoron ti oriong e nkosholai, netum olkunoni entoki naitainyie entoki sidai." 
Proverbs25:5 Iwuang'ie lelo torrok te dukuya olaiguanani naa keitasheyieki olorika lenye le nkitoo te sipata. 
Proverbs25:6 Mipik kewan dukuya ine netii olaiguanani arashu doi intashe te ine wueji olkitok. 
Proverbs25:7 Amu enaikash tinikijokini, “wou ilepu ene” alang tinikintadoyiori te netii olaiguanani." 
Proverbs25:8 Ore ina natoduaa inkonyek inono, misioki aisosion ayau atua enkiguana; anaa kaa ias te siadi; tinikilo ole latia ino aitukurru?" 
Proverbs25:9 Iimaki olomoni liyieu te nebo olelatia makewan, nimilo aboloo imbaa naaisudoro e likae;" 
Proverbs25:10 meyau ake ilo oning enkurruna shumata iyie, nitum enkurruna nemeeta enkiting'oto." 
Proverbs25:11 Ore ororei otolimuoki aaitobiru netiu anaa olng'anayioi le sahabu oikodokino enkosholai. 
Proverbs25:12 Anaa enatiu olgisoi le sahabu arashu e masaai e sahabu neija etiu ilo ng'en oisikong enkiok naning'isho. 
Proverbs25:13 Ore olkilikuai oisiligayu, neitagol ilo oirriwaa ninye, etiu anaa enkare nairobi, te nkirouaj enkata e nkisampuare." 
Proverbs25:14 Anaa enatiu inkatampo o lkutati lemeeta enchan, neija etiu ilo owuasare enkishooroto nemeyieu neishooyo." 
Proverbs25:15 Te ng'iriata eidimi aailejileja olaiguanani le nkop, naa ore olng'ejep omelok naa kegil oloito." 
Proverbs25:16 Tinitum enaisho inosa ake enikiririkino iyie, amu indim ainosa e sapuk nintoki alopu." 
Proverbs25:17 Mimoku enkaji o lelatia ino, pee miyek ake, nikiyooki aibayu." 
Proverbs25:18 Ore ilo oishakenu embae nemesipa te nkaraki ole latia enye, netiu anaa orinka lo larrabal arashu olalem, arashu embae napi." 
Proverbs25:19 Ore enkisiligata oltung'ani lemeisiligayu te nkata enyamali, netiu anaa olalae oigusugus arashu enkeju naishirtitari." 
Proverbs25:20 Ore ilo oranyaki osinkolio oltau oata osina, netiu anaa oltung'ani ooru kewan enkila te nkolong nairobi; netiu sii anaa tinipik enaisho naisuijo ewueji netii olbae." 
Proverbs25:21 Teneeta olmang'atinta lino esumash, inchoo ninye endaa nanya, naa te neeta enkure, inchoo ninye enkare naok." 
Proverbs25:22 Amu inturrurroki ninye inkuk naishu shumata endukuya enye, naa aikilaaki iyie Olaitoriani." 
Proverbs25:23 Ore olkutati oing'uaa moikuape naa keyau enchan; ore olng'ejep okurrisho neyau engoro. 
Proverbs25:24 Enaikash tinimany olpijata le nchumata enkaji, alang tiniboitare te e nkaji enkitok naata enchankar." 
Proverbs25:25 Anaa enatiu enkare nairobi to ltau oota enkure, neija etiu ilomon supati ooing'uaa enkop nalakua." 
Proverbs25:26 Anaa enatiu enchorro natii esarng'ab, arashu enkong'u enkare naing'ola, neijia etiu oltung'ani supat oisho kewan oltung'ani torrono." 
Proverbs25:27 Mme sidai tininya enaisho sapuk, metaa mitem aing'oru enkisisa sapuk." 
Proverbs25:28 Ore oltung'ani le meeta enkibooroto e kewan, netiu anaa enkanasa natigilaki neing'uari meeta isunta." 
Proverbs26:1 Anaa enatiu isoito le nkirobi te nkata enkirowuaj arashu enchan te nkata enkisampuare, neijia etiu enkanyit meishaakino olmodai." 
Proverbs26:2 Mikimbung ildeketa iyie arashu te naa iyata enikiporoki, etiu anaa motonyi naapuo to loing'ang'e nemedou aekata aaitirringa." 
Proverbs26:3 Eoshieki elishie embarta, ore olgisoi nepiki enkume o sikiria, ore eng'udi naa ene nkoriong oo lmoda." 
Proverbs26:4 Miwaliki olmodai te risioroto e modai enye, arashu iyaku sii iyie olonyaanyukie." 
Proverbs26:5 Tawaliki olmodai te risioroto enaikununo emodai enye, pee meng'enu ake too nkonyek enyena makewan." 
Proverbs26:6 Ore ilo oirriwaa olkilikuai te nkaina olmodai, nedung'oo nkejek enyena makewan, neok enapiak." 
Proverbs26:7 Anaa enatiu inkejek olmaima eililio pesho, neijia etiu endung'et e rashe te nkutuk olmodai." 
Proverbs26:8 Anaa enatiu oltung'ani oeniki osoit enkopito, neija etiu ilo oisho olmodai enkanyit." 
Proverbs26:9 Anaa enatiu olkikuei ojing atua enkaina olamerani, neija etiu endung'et e rashe natii atua inkutukie oo lmoda." 
Proverbs26:10 Anaa enaikununo olang'oroni le nkawuo opik ilbaa pooki ng'ae, neijia etiu ilo oisho olmodai ogiroo esiaai arashu olamerani." 
Proverbs26:11 Anaa oldia orrinyokino irrugumat enyena, neijia etiu olmodai oigil emodai enye." 
Proverbs26:12 Itoduaa oltung'ani ng'en too nkonyek enyena makewan, eeta olmodai osiligi sapuk alang ninye." 
Proverbs26:13 Ejo oltashalai, “Etii olng'atuny ina oitoi! Etii olng'atuny nena oitoi naalala enkanasa!”" 
Proverbs26:14 Anaa kutuk aji nabolo too enat enyena, neijia sii etiu oltashalai te ndapash enye." 
Proverbs26:15 Enukaa oltashalai inkaik enyena tiatua esaani; neinaur ninye te neshuku arrinyoki enkutuk enye. 
Proverbs26:16 Aing'en oltashalai too nkonyek enyena makewan, alang iltung'ana oopishana ooidim aatawal te nkarriyiano." 
Proverbs26:17 Ore ilo ojing'aki olarrabal lemenyikita, netiu anaa ilo olo aibung inkiyiaa o ldia ogiroo." 
Proverbs26:18 Anaa enaikununo oltung'ani lo loirirua onang'aa ilkeek le nkima ooyupuyup, o mbaa o keeya," 
Proverbs26:19 neijia etiu oltung'ani olej olelatia enye, nejo, “Ekaiguran taa ake!”" 
Proverbs26:20 Ore pee elai ilkeek neye enkima; naa ore enemetii olaing'oming'omani neish enchankar. 
Proverbs26:21 Anaa enatiu inkuk tiatua olang'at le nkima o lkeek te nkima, neijia etiu oltung'ani le nchankar einuaaya enchankar aitudupaa." 
Proverbs26:22 Ore irorei le nking'oming'om naa kemelook, anaa mbelat e mukate, nedoyio aapuo atua ilkutot lo sesen." 
Proverbs26:23 Anaa enatiu enkimerlel natumurieki emoti e nterit, neija etiu irorei sidain ooirori neme sidai oltau lo loiro." 
Proverbs26:24 Ore ilo oisunkur te nkiba neiro to yieta irorei, kake eisudoo aibok elejare to ltau lenye;" 
Proverbs26:25 te neiro too rorei le mpiris miruk ninye, amu etii oltau lenye olminong katitin naapishana" 
Proverbs26:26 ore hoo netem aitoipoo enkiba enye te nkeleekisho, ekeibalunyeki intorrok enyena to lturrur." 
Proverbs26:27 Ore ilo otur engumoto naa kesulakino naa keibeleleng'okino osoit shumata ilo oitera aibeleleng'oo. 
Proverbs26:28 Ore olng'ejep olejisho neiba ilmang'ati lenyena te lejare. Ore enkutuk olkordo neyau ine nkidaata. 
Proverbs27:1 Miwuasa te nkaraki ine taisere, amu miyiolo inaayooki ina olong ayau." 
Proverbs27:2 Inchoo likae kisis iyie kake imme enkutuk ino makewan, olomoni, neme enkutuk ino." 
Proverbs27:3 Ore osoit naa keiroishi, ore sii osinyai neiroshi, kake ore engoro olmodai neiroshi alang pokira." 
Proverbs27:4 Egogong engoro napi, ore engoro nemutisho, kake aing'ae oidim aitasho te dukuya olom." 
Proverbs27:5 Enaikash enkisikong'ata nikinchori naibala alang enyorrata naisudoro. 
Proverbs27:6 Eisiligayu ilbaa likipik olchore, naa kumok ing'ututat olmang'atinta." 
Proverbs27:7 Ore ilo oiputakine naa keany enaisho, kake ore te ilo oota esumash, edol ninye ina pooki nadua anaa kemelok." 
Proverbs27:8 Anaa emotonyi nalo aing'uaa enkaji enye, neijia etiu oltung'ani olo aing'uaa enkang enye." 
Proverbs27:9 Ore eilata o esonkoyo neitiship oltau, kake kepolos enyamali oltau." 
Proverbs27:10 Ming'uaa olchore lino o olchore le papaai lino, nimilo enkaji olalashe lino te nkolong e ng'olikinoto ino. Enaikash olelatia lino otaana, alang olalashe lino olakua." 
Proverbs27:11 Teng'ena enkerai ai nintiship oltau lai pee atum atawalaki ilo laaing'oru nanu aitukurru. 
Proverbs27:12 Ore oltung'ani ng'en nedolu batisho neisudoo kewan; kake ore ilo omoda nelo adoiki netum enkitamioto. 
Proverbs27:13 Iwa enkila oltung'ani te neitayio ajo kelak esile olomoni, nimbung ninye to rorei le nkutuk enye nchere keitasheiki olomoni te sile." 
Proverbs27:14 Ore ilo omayian ole latia enye to ltoilo sapuk, einyototo ayooki enasirie, naa keikenari aajo oldeket." 
Proverbs27:15 Etiu enkitok e nchankar anaa enkare naitipitipu te nkolong nasha. 
Proverbs27:16 Ore tinimbok ninye netiu anaa tinimbok osiwuo arashu imbung emborei e ilata, te nkaina enye e tatene." 
Proverbs27:17 Eii esekenkei aitipij esekenkei, neitipij oltung'ani o likae tung'ani." 
Proverbs27:18 Ore pooki ng'ae oramat olng'aboli naa keinos ilng'anayio lenyena, naa ore ilo orrip olkitok lenye naa keyanyituni." 
Proverbs27:19 Anaa enaibalunye enkare enkomom ino tining'or, neija etiu endamunoto oltung'ani eutu ilo tung'ani enatiu." 
Proverbs27:20 Ore enemeneng'a o Abadon nemeraposho aekata, nemeraposho aekata inkonyek e tung'ani." 
Proverbs27:21 Etemi enkosholai te moti, netemi sahabu to lkokuet, netemi oltung'ani te nkisisa enye." 
Proverbs27:22 Ore hoo tinipurd te ntoki naidong'ishoreki olmodai, nindong ninye tenebo enkurma naidong'i, melo hoo emodai enye aing'uaa ninye." 
Proverbs27:23 Tayiolo katukul enaikununo intare inono, niramat nena kishu inono oleng." 
Proverbs27:24 Amu mebikoo taa enkarsisisho intarasi, naa kebikoo sii enkopiyia e nkitoo too ishoritin pooki?" 
Proverbs27:25 Ore teneishunye nkujit nebulu kulie, nesotuni nkaitubulu oo ldoinyo," 
Proverbs27:26 nitum inkilani too lkuoo linono le kerra, nitumie nena kineji enkurma." 
Proverbs27:27 Ketumi kule nikibaiki too nkineji inono, neaku endaa olmarei lino pooki, o enintotiyie nkaisiaayiak inono." 
Proverbs28:1 Eilanyisho lelo torrok meeta oltung'ani omirita, kake ore isupati naa kepi ninche anaa olng'atuny." 
Proverbs28:2 Ore teneas enkop ng'ok, neeta ilaitoriak kumok, kake ore iltung'ana oota ening'unoto o eng'eno, naa keitasheyie ninche ninye te nkata naado." 
Proverbs28:3 Ore oltung'ani aisinani oibooki enkop ilo aisinani, netiu anaa enchan naar endaa nemeleku." 
Proverbs28:4 Ore lelo oomenaa inkitanapat neisis lelo torrok, kake ore lelo ooibung inkitanapat nearare ninche." 
Proverbs28:5 Ore iltung'ana torrok nemening'u esipata, kake ore lelo ooing'oru Olaitoriani naa kening'u katukul." 
Proverbs28:6 Enaikash oltung'ani aisinani olo te ng'eno enye, alang oltung'ani karsis laa torrok inkoitoi enyena." 
Proverbs28:7 Ore ilo oibung ena kitanapata naa enkerai ng'en, kake ore ololo aisiritore oltung'ani olubo naa keitukurru menye." 
Proverbs28:8 Teniaku karsis intalaku dupoto too ltung'ana, nelo karsisisho ino aaku, eno ltung'ani onana oshoke too laisinak." 
Proverbs28:9 Tenelo neitoming'an oltung'ani enkiok enye pee mening ina kitanapata, neaku ore ninye enkomono enye naa olminong to Laitoriani." 
Proverbs28:10 Ore ilo oitapong'oo ilo supat autaki atua enkoitoi torrono, naa kesulakino engumoto enye makewan, kake ore ilo le meeta entioto naa ketum enjung'ore sidai." 
Proverbs28:11 Ore oltung'ani karsis naa aing'en too nkonyek enyena makewan, kake ore oltung'ani aisinani oota endamunoto naa kejur ninye oleng." 
Proverbs28:12 Ore te nemirisho isupati, naa ketumi enkisisa sapuk, kake te neinyototo iltorrok, neisudoo iltung'ana ate." 
Proverbs28:13 Ore ilo oisudoo ing'ok enyena nemebul, kake ore ilo oibalie neing'uaa ninche naa ketum olng'ur." 
Proverbs28:14 Emayiana ilo tung'ani oure Olaitoriani anaake; kake ore ilo oitagol oltau lenye naa kebatatakino atua ing'olikinot. 
Proverbs28:15 Anaa enatiu enkikurrukur o lng'atuny, arashu olng'arurumi okuetu, neijia etiu oloitoreisho torrono too ltung'ana aisinak." 
Proverbs28:16 Ore oloitoreisho le meeta ening'unoto naa olaironyani ogogong; kake ore ilo oiba imasaa naapurruno naa keitoodor inkolong'i enyena. 
Proverbs28:17 Teneitanyamal oltung'ani osarge le ilo tung'ani apa otara, inchoo ninye elimana o metua naa inchoo melo ake oltung'ani hoo obo aretu ninye." 
Proverbs28:18 Ore ilo olo te sipata naa keitajeuni, kake ore ilo opong'ori too monko too nkoitoi enyena naa kesulakino eng'umoto." 
Proverbs28:19 Ore ilo otur enkurma enye naa ketum endaa sapuk, kake ore ilo osuj imbaa nemeeta tipat naa ketum aisinanisho sapuk." 
Proverbs28:20 Ore oltung'ani oisiligayu naa ketum imayianat kumok. Kake ore ilo osioki aaku olkarsis nemelo eitu eitamei. 
Proverbs28:21 Tinintodolu olkep neme sidai; kake eas oltung'ani ntorrok te neishori enkiti daa. 
Proverbs28:22 Ore oltung'ani lo lorok neing'oru enkarsisisho nasieku, nemeyiolo ajo kelotu osina enetii ninye." 
Proverbs28:23 Ore ilo oisikong oltung'ani, ore te siadi naa keitoki atum omom, alang ilo opakas ninye too rorei lo lng'ejep lenye oopuyiapuy." 
Proverbs28:24 Ore pooki ng'ae opur menye arashu ng'otonye nejo, “Imme enkitarruorroto ina katukul,” naa olencholiek e ilo tung'ani amutani." 
Proverbs28:25 Ore oltung'ani lo lorok neinyeyie olarrabal, kake ore ilo oisilig Olaitoriani naa keitaae karsis." 
Proverbs28:26 Ore ilo oisilig endamunoto enye naa olmodai, kake ore ilo olo te ng'eno nagut naa kekorduni." 
Proverbs28:27 Ore ilo oleng too laisinak, nemeng'oriki toki, kake ore ilo oisudoo inkonyek enyena netum ildeketa kumok." 
Proverbs28:28 Ore te nedumunye iltorrok, neisudoo iltung'ana ate, kake te neidaaya neponari iltung'ana supati." 
Proverbs29:1 Tenikirerei anaake nintagol elukunya ino, niyooki nabo olong agila, nimintoki aishiu." 
Proverbs29:2 Ore te netii isupati enkitoria, naa keshipa iltung'ana, kake te neitoreisho iltorrok naa keigoroo olorere." 
Proverbs29:3 Ore ilo onyor eng'eno nagut naa keitiship menye, kake ore ilo oitaa inkituaak naaibor onyek encholiek naa keishang'itie imasaa enyena." 
Proverbs29:4 Te sipata eisho olaiguanani enkop enkitashoto, kake ore ilo oisimaa nkishorot neidaikie enkop enye." 
Proverbs29:5 Ore oltung'ani opakas ole latia enye, naa inkejek enyena eisalaashaka orreshet." 
Proverbs29:6 Ore oltung'ani torrono naa keibung'i too ntorrok enyena, kake ore oltung'ani supat eranyisho neshipa sii." 
Proverbs29:7 Ore oltung'ani supat neyiolo sipat eilo aisinani; ore oltung'ani torrono nemening'u ine ng'eno. 
Proverbs29:8 Ore lelo asurdaanyak naa keinuaaki enkanasa enkima, kake kerriny iltung'ana ng'eni engoro napi." 
Proverbs29:9 Tenelo neishankarra oltung'ani ng'en o lmodai, naa kegoro ake olmodai neitoki akueni nemegira." 
Proverbs29:10 Ore iltung'ana oota enkure o sarge naa keiba ilo lemeeta entioto neingoru lelo torrok enkishui enye. 
Proverbs29:11 Ore olmodai naa keiro alimu engoro enye pooki, kake ore oltung'ani ng'en neitirring'a aibooyo." 
Proverbs29:12 Ore te neinining olarikoni le nkop imbaa e lejare, naa keaku ilooitoreisho lenyena pooki torrok." 
Proverbs29:13 Etumo olaisinani o ilo aironyani lenye tenebo; neisho Olaitoriani ninche pokira nkonyek enye ewang'an. 
Proverbs29:14 Teneiguanare olaiguanani ilo aisinani te sipata, naa keitasheyieki enkitoria enye ntarasi." 
Proverbs29:15 Ore eng'udi tenebo enkisikong'a e nkikoo naa keyau eng'eno nagut, kake ore enkerai natapalayioki naa keyaki ng'otonye enkurruna." 
Proverbs29:16 Ore te nejing iltorrok enkitoria, naa keponari ntorrok, kake keanyu lelo supati aadolu embatatata enye." 
Proverbs29:17 Toosho tarerioi enkerai ino tuutai naa aikincho ninye enkiyeng'iyeng; naa keisho enchipai oltau lino. 
Proverbs29:18 Ore ine nemetii enaibon e Nkai nebatata iltung'ana amu meeta enasujita. Kake emayiana ilo oibung enkitanapata. 
Proverbs29:19 Merere olaisiaayiani irorei ake le nkutuk, ore hoo duo nening'u, menyorraa aibung asuj." 
Proverbs29:20 Itodua oltung'ani okuetiki aimaki irorei lenyena? Eeta olmodai osiligi sapuk alang ninye. 
Proverbs29:21 Ore tinincho osinka lino pooki toki nayieu te keraisho, niyiooki amaniki etaa olajung'oni lino." 
Proverbs29:22 Ore oltung'ani le ng'oro napi naa kedumu olarrabal, naa ore oltung'ani oota engoro naa keyau ntorrok kumok." 
Proverbs29:23 Keitadoyio olwuasa lo ltung'ani oltung'ani, kake ore ilo obor to ltau naa ketum enkanyit." 
Proverbs29:24 Ore ilo oitaa olapurroni encholiek naa keiba enkishui enye makewan; ening ilo deket, nemeeta entoki naibalie." 
Proverbs29:25 Ore euriata e tung'ani neyau orreshet. Kake ore ilo oisilig Olaitoriani neserian. 
Proverbs29:26 Eing'oru ilkumok omom oloitoreisho, kake to Laitoriani etum oltung'ani esipata." 
Proverbs29:27 Ore oltung'ani leme asipani naa olminong te lelo supati, kake ore ilo oitoriori enkoitoi enye naa olminong' te lelo torrok." 
Proverbs30:1 Irorei kulo le Aga olayioni le Yake le Masa, etiaaka ilo tung'ani Itiel, Itiel tenebo Ukai." 
Proverbs30:2 Esipa tukul kamoda oleng mara tung'ani. Maata ening'unoto e tung'ani. 
Proverbs30:3 Eitu aitamok kewan eng'eno nagut, arashu doi ninye aata eng'eno eilo sinyati." 
Proverbs30:4 Aing'ae oilepa alo keper neitoki adou abori? Aing'ae ilo oiturrurro osiwuo too nkaik enyena? Aing'ae ilo otununuko inkariak tiatua enkila? Aing'ae ilo oitasheyie inkiting'ot ena kop? Keji ng'ae enkarna enye, naa keji enkarna enkerai enye ng'ae? Esipa iyiolo iyie!" 
Proverbs30:5 Ore pooki rorei le Nkai neibala ajo kesipa; ninye elong'o e lelo oosaru ninye. 
Proverbs30:6 Mipon ake ororei lenyena anaa kisikong iyie, nikiyookini aatum aajo ira olalejani." 
Proverbs30:7 Intokitin are aaikilikuan iyie mikimitiki ake ninche nanu eton eitu aye: 
Proverbs30:8 Intayu te nanu intalamai mbaa e ntorroni o elejare; mikincho nanu aisinanisho arashu enkarsisisho. Intotioki te ina daa naishiaakino naata. 
Proverbs30:9 Pee maraposho ake naayooki aany iyie, najo, “Aing'ae doi ilo aitoriani?” Anaa aaku aisinani, naaku olopurrisho, naisarkionie ina arna e Nkai ai." 
Proverbs30:10 Milo aitang'or osinka te dukuya olkitok lenye, anaa kiyooki adek iyie, niaku oloota entorroni." 
Proverbs30:11 Etii lelo oodek iloomenye, nememayian sii noo ng'otonye." 
Proverbs30:12 Etii lelo oodol aajo meeta ntiot too nkonyek enye maate, neitu eisujari ilduruki lenye." 
Proverbs30:13 Etii lelo oodamu aajo aisidain ninche oleng, ee, eji kejo ninche aisidain oleng'!" 
Proverbs30:14 Etii lelo laa ore ilala lenye naa ilalema, ore ilala lenye naa inkalema, pee etum aainosa ilaisinak aaitung'uai ena kop, o ilo omena tiatua iltung'ana." 
Proverbs30:15 Eeta olchutai intoyie are, naaishir aajo: “Nchooki, nchooki.” Eetae intokitin uni nemeitaraposhoyu aekata, ong'uan nemejo aekata, “Ataraposhe.”" 
Proverbs30:16 Enemeneng'a, ina kitok olupi, enkop naata anaake enkure eyieu enkare, o enkima nemejo aekata “Ataraposhe.”" 
Proverbs30:17 Ore enkong'u e ilo omen menye neany eyanyit ng'otonye, naa kedumu ilkurruki lo yerata, neinos ilkurragoso." 
Proverbs30:18 Etii intokitin uni naa enking'asia te nanu; ong'uan nemaning'u. 
Proverbs30:19 Enkoitoi olkurragos to loing'ang'e, enkoitoi olasurai te ndapidapoi, enkoitoi emeli te mpolos oo naaiposha, o enkoitoi e tung'ani eboitare eselenkei." 
Proverbs30:20 Nena enkoitoi eina naloloito: Enya ake, nejut enkutuk enye, nejo, “Eitu aas entorrono.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Ore tiabori intokitin uni eikirikira enkop; ore tiabori ong'uan nemeidim ating'iria: 
Proverbs30:22 osinka te neaku olaiguanani, olmodai oota pooki nanya naraposh;" 
Proverbs30:23 o ina kitok naibae te netum olpayian, o enkaisiaayiani najung ewueji e ina kitok naitore ninye." 
Proverbs30:24 Etii intokitin ong'uan enkop naa aikutiti, kake kelus oleng eng'eno enye:" 
Proverbs30:25 inkalao: naa imme iltung'ana oogol, neitaiki ake ate endaa neshum te nkata enkirowuaj;" 
Proverbs30:26 ore inkijujurri: neme iltung'ana oogol ninche, kake eitobir inkang'itie enye tiatua isoito;" 
Proverbs30:27 olmaati: le meeta olaiguanani, kake epuo pooki aairiamari to lturrur obo;" 
Proverbs30:28 olmokua: laa imbung too nkaik inono, kake etii ninye atua iwuejitin enkitoo oo laiguanak." 
Proverbs30:29 Etii intokitin ong'uan naadeenyari tenepuo olotei sidai. 
Proverbs30:30 Olng'atuny: ogol te pooki ng'ues, nemerrinyo siadi tiae toki;" 
Proverbs30:31 olukunku, o loro, olaiguanani ele te dukuya iltung'ana lenyena." 
Proverbs30:32 Tinitomode aaku oloisis kewan, arashu tinitaa oloun intorrok, tipika enkaina ino enkutuk ino." 
Proverbs30:33 Amu tinimposh kule naa itum eng'orno, naa tiniosh enkume e likae nepuku osarge, naa tinironyu engoro neiu enchankar o lomang'ati." 
Proverbs31:1 Irorei kulo le Lemuel olaiguanani le Masa, ooiteng'ena ng'otonye ninye:" 
Proverbs31:2 Ira iyie enkerai ai enkerai e ng'uset ai, ewalet enkomono ai, ainyoo enkerai ai?" 
Proverbs31:3 Mincho engolon ino, inkituaak, o nkoitoi inono nena naainyal ilaiguanak." 
Proverbs31:4 Imme enoo laiguanak, iyie Lemuel, imme enoo laiguanak eokoto enaisho, arashu too laitoriak pee eyieu enaisho napi." 
Proverbs31:5 Meokisho ake nerikino ninche nkitanapat, nemeitoki aasuj esipata e lelo oinyalaki." 
Proverbs31:6 Inchoo enaisho napi ilo oye, o lelo ootii emion sapuk atua iltauja." 
Proverbs31:7 Inchoo ninche metooko pee erikino osina lenye, nemeitoki aadamu osina lenye." 
Proverbs31:8 Inchoo enkutuk ino eiro te rishata e lelo lemeyiolo aairoro, niro esipata e lelo pooki ootung'uayioki oopeny." 
Proverbs31:9 Inchoo enkutuk ino eiguana anaa olarishani osipa, torripo isipat e lelo aisinak o lelo oomena." 
Proverbs31:10 Aing'ae oidim anoto enkitok nadupa naishiaakino enkanyit? Amu eeta ninye tipat oleng alang isoito oogol enkinyang'a. 
Proverbs31:11 Keisilig oltau lo lpayian lenye ninye, nemelau aekata ninye dupoto." 
Proverbs31:12 Keitaas ninye olpayian lenye isupati neme entorrono, too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui enye." 
Proverbs31:13 Neing'oru ninye aitobiru inkilani too lpapit loo ntare tenebo o enkatani neasisho too nkaik to ltau le nyorrata. 
Proverbs31:14 Etiu ninye anaa melin o lamirani, eyau ninye endaa enye te nelakua." 
Proverbs31:15 Einyototo ninye eton aa kewarie, neitobiraki enkaji enye pooki endaa nanya, neing'uraki inkaisiaayiak enyena esiaai naas." 
Proverbs31:16 Eing'oru ninye enkurma neinyang'u; ore too lng'anayio loo nkaik enyena neun enkurma oo sabibu. 
Proverbs31:17 Erreten ninye empolos enye te ngolon, neitagol nkaik enyena." 
Proverbs31:18 Edol ajo ore pooki toki naitobiru amir neeta dupoto; nemeye oltaa lenye kewarie. 
Proverbs31:19 Epik inkaik enyena ina toki naitobiru o lpiyayoi, neibung too nkaik enyena ina garri naripunyeki inkilani." 
Proverbs31:20 Eitorioki ilaisinak nkaik enyena enyena, neitoti too nkaik enyena ilaisinak." 
Proverbs31:21 Meure ninye enkata enkirobi tenebau amu ore enkaji enye pooki, neeta nkilani naairowua." 
Proverbs31:22 Eitobiraki enkaji enye ilkarash le rruat; ore inkilani enyena naa ine kitani napuiyiapuy pilei. 
Proverbs31:23 Eyioloi olpayian lenye too nkishomin neyioloi te neton tiatua lelo payiani le ina kop. 
Proverbs31:24 Eitobir ninye nkilani naapuyiapuy e kitani nemir ninche; eisho ilamirak inkimeitani meinyang'u. 
Proverbs31:25 Ore inkilani enyena naa engolon o enkanyit, nekueni too nkolong'i naapuonu e dukuya." 
Proverbs31:26 Ebol ninye enkutuk enye te ng'eno, ore enkiteng'enata o esupatisho netii olng'ejep lenye." 
Proverbs31:27 Eing'or ninye aramat imbaa pooki o lmarei lenye, nemenya ninye endaa neitu eisiayu." 
Proverbs31:28 Einyototo inkera enyena neipot ninye aajo enamaiyiana; neija sii ejo olpayian lenye, eisis ninye ejo:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Etaasa inkituaak kumok imbaa sidain oleng: kake ore iyie ilang ninche pooki.” 
Proverbs31:30 Ore enkaja naa kelejisho, ore enkishiaa naa enepesho, kake ore enkitok naure Olaitoriani naa ninye natum enkisisa." 
Proverbs31:31 Inchoo ninye olng'anayioi loo nkaik enyena, nincho esiaai enye eisis ninye te nena shomito." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Irorei kulo lo laikooni, olayioni le Daudi, olaiguanani te Yerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Ine pesho, ine pesho, ejo olaikooni, ine pesho ine pesho. Ine pesho pooki." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ainyoo etum oltung'ani te siaai enye pooki natanaurikia, ina natanaurikia tiabori enkolong?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Kelusoo eishoi, nelotu ae ishoi, kake ebik ake enkop intarasi." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Eilepu enkolong neitoki adoyio, nesiooyo alo ine neilepunye." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Ekutari olkutati alo Kopikop, nemanaa alo enkalo e moikuape; Neiulo aiulo osiwuo elo, ore teina kiuloto enye nerrinyokino eneing'uaa." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Erukokino inchorroi pooki enaiposha, kake meboreyu ae kata enaiposha. Ometabaiki ine nerukunore nchorroi, nenena naaruko ake aaigil." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ebore intokitin pooki enauri, meidim tung'ani aimaki ninye; meraposho enkong'u eing'orisho, nemeiput sii enkiok mbaa naaning." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Ore ina natii apa naa ninye naitoki atii, naa ore ina naataasaki naa ninye eitokini aas; nemeetae ae toki ng'ejuk tiabori enkolong." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ketii entoki natejoki, “Ing'ura, aing'ejuk ena?” Etii apake too nkatitin e moitie e dukuya ang." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Meetae endamunoto oo ntokitin naatulusoitie, nemeitokini ae kata aata enadamunyeki, ntokitin neton etii dukuya naasayu, te lelo oopuonu te siadi." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ore nanu ele aikooni nataa apa olaiguanani oitasheiki Isiraeli te Yerusalem. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Napik endamunoto ai aing'oru aturu eng'eno e nena pooki naasi tiabori keper; esiaai nemetii enchipai apa eishoo Enkai nkera oo ltung'ana metanyamaliki. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Atoduaa pooki toki naasitae tiabori enkolong; nanyorriki ajo ore pooki naa ine pesho, naa enkijape ake emirareki." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Ore ina natokordile nemeidimi aaitorioi, ore ina nemeetae nemeikenayu." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Najoki nanu kewan, “Aing'orua nanu eng'eno sapuk nagut, nalang lelo apa pooki ooitasheikito Yerusalem te dukuya nanu; neeta endamunoto ai enkarriyiano eng'eno nagut eng'eno oo mbaa nataasa, o eyiolounoto.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Napik endamunoto ai ayiolou eng'eno nagut nayiolou olkuenyi o emodai. Nanyorriki ajo ore sii ninye ena naa enkijape ake emirareki. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Amu ore eng'eno nagut sapuk, nepik inyamalaritin kumok oltau naa ore ilo oponaa eyiolounoto neponaa sii emion o sina." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Najoki nanu kewan, “Wou taata, ekatem esidano o lkar; ntumurru, ndipakinoyu.” Kake ng'ura, ore sii ninye apa ena naa ene pesho." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Atejo sii enkuenia “Ene modai”, ore olkar nemeeta enikintaas sidai." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Aing'orua oleng te ndamunoto ai enaiko te naitiship osesen lai te naisho oo sabibu neton ake aarikito endamunoto ai arikoo te ng'eno nagut, o enaiko te natum aibung emodai o metaba anaa nadol ina apa naji aisidai too nkera oo ltung'ana neas tiabori keper te nena kuti olong'i e nkishui enye." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ataasa isiaaitin sapuki; atesheta nkajijik, naunoki kewan inkurman oo sabibu" 
Ecclesiastes2:5 naitobiraki kewan inkurman o wuejitin neeyeng'iyeng'areki, naun te ninche impukunot pooki oo lkeek loo lng'anayio." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Naitobiraki kewan ilturot lapikie ina tim oo lkeek nabulu enkare. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Nainyiang'ua irrindiki ilewa, o ng'oruo, naata apa irrindiki ootoiuoki te nkaji ai; naata sii apa iluaat kumok oo nkishu o ntare, alang pooki ng'ae apa otii dukuya nanu te Yerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Atushumaka sii kewan enkosholai o sahabu o lchumati pooki loo laiguanak, loo lkirinen; anoto sii ilaranyak, ilewa o ng'oruo o nkapiak kumok oleng, inkituaak kumok naayieu olee neeta." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Metaa ataa apa kitok oleng nagiroo pooki apa laatii te dukuya nanu te Yerusalem; naata ake sii eng'eno nagut tiatua nanu. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ore pooki nang'uar inkonyek aainei neitu alau ninche; atipika oltau lai atua esikar, amu ore oltau lai nenoto esikar te ekenyata ai pooki, naa ore apa olekoisiaayio le nauri ai pooki." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Nalotu asipu nena apa pooki naataasa nkaik aainei o eekenyata nanoto aasita ina, naa ng'ura, ore pooki naa ine pesho naa enkijape ake amirare, nemeetae hoo toki naata dupoto tiabori enkolong." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Metaa aibelekenyakine aineneng eng'eno nagut o olkuenyi; kainyoo eas oltung'ani olotu te siadi olaiguanani? Ina ake naidipa ataasa ninye. 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Metaa atoduaa ina ng'eno nagut ajo kelus te sidano emodai anaa enalus ewang'an te sidano te naimin. 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Eeta oltung'ani oota eng'eno nagut nkonyek enyena tiatua elukunya enye, kake ore olmodai nelo te naimin; nayiolou ake ajo etum pooki olbuket obo." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ina peyie ajoki kewan, “Ore ina natum olmodai, naa katum sii nanu; ainyoo naa peyie ataa nanu olang'eni oleng?” Najoki kewan ore sii ninye ena naa empesho." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Meetae oltung'ani odamu ilo ng'en, nemeetae olodamu olmodai, amu ore too nkolong'i naapuonu nerikinisho pooki. Eye ake ilo ng'en anaa ilo modai!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Metaa aibayie apa enkishui amu ore nena naasi tiabori enkolong naa torrok te nanu; amu ine pesho pooki naa enkijape ake emirareki. 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ekaiba apa eekenyata ai pooki nateekenye tiabori enkolong, adol ajo kaing'ueki ninche ilo tung'ani olotu te siadi nanu," 
Ecclesiastes2:19 naa aing'ae oyiolo te naa keaku oltung'ani ng'en arashu olmodai. Naa keaku ake oloitore nena pooki natanyamalaka aasishore eng'eno ai nagut tiabori enkolong. Ore sii ninye ena naa enepesho. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Metaa aibelekenye aisho oltau lai meiting'o osiligi too siaitin pooki aainei nataasa tiabori enkolong. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Amu ore tiae kata ore oltung'ani otaasishe te ng'eno nagut o te yiolounoto o te nkarriyiano neing'uaa pooki metishipakinoyu ilo leitu enyamaliki ninye. Ore sii ninye ena naa empesho naa eng'oki sapuk. 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ainyoo eeta oltung'ani too siaitin o enauri natum easisho tiabori enkolong? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Amu ore nkolong'i enyena pooki nebore emion, ore esiaai enye pooki naa oltau eiroshiyie; neijia ninye etiu kewarie meeng'iyeng'a indamunot enyena. Ore sii ninye ena naa ene pesho." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Meetae entoki naikash te tung'ani alang te nenya neok netum enchipai te ekenyata enye. Atoduaa sii ena ajo nkaik Enkai eing'uaa; 
Ecclesiastes2:25 amu teneme ninye aeng'ae oidim ainosa arashu aing'ae oidim atishipakinoyu? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Ore ilo tung'ani oitiship ninye neisho Enkai ninye eng'eno nagut o eyioulounoto o eng'ida; kake ore olaing'okoni, neisho ninye ina siaai esotore neiturrur peyie eisho ilo oitiship Enkai. Ore sii ninye ena naa empesho naa enkijape ake emirareki." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ore te pooki toki neetae enkata enye, neetae enkata e pooki toki tiabori keper:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Eetae enkata naini, neetae enkata naye, neetae enkata eunore, neetae enkata nadotuni ina natuunoki;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 neetae enkata naari metua, neetae enkata naishiunyeki; neetae enkata nagili neetae enkata nasheti;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 neetae enkata naishiri, neetae enkata nakueni; neetae enkata e nkishirata o sina, neetae enkata o sinkolio" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 neetae enkata nanang'ari isoito, neetae enkata naiturrurri isoito tenebo; neetae enkata naibung'i aaitamuat nkaik, neetae enkata nemeibung'i aaitamuat nkaik" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 neetae enkata naing'oruni, neetae enkata naiminieki, neetae enkata nashumi, neetae enkata naiturrarri;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 neetae enkata napolosi, neetae enkata naripi neetae enkata nagirae, neetae enkata nairori" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 neetae enkata e nyorrata, neetae enkata e nkiba; neetae enkata o larrabal, neetae enkata e seriani." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Kainyoo dupoto natum olaisiaayiani te ekenyata enye? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Atoduaa ina siaai naishorua Enkai aisho nena kera e tung'ana metanyamaliki ninye. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Eitaa ninye pooki toki sidai te nkata enye; ore ake sii netipika ninye e ndamunoto e tung'ani endamunoto oo ntarasi, ore etiu neija nemeidim ninye atayiolo ina nataasa Enkai te nkiterunoto o metabaiki enkiting'oto." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ayiolo ajo meetae ae toki sidai te ninche alang teneitiship ate neng'ida too nkolong'i pooki naaishu ninche; 
Ecclesiastes3:13 enkishooroto sii e Nkai to ltung'ani nchere ore pooki ng'ae neinos, neok, neisikarra te ekenyata enye pooki." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ayiolo ajo ore pooki naas Enkai neitashe ntarasi; meetae ae toki naponikini ninye; nemeetae toki naiwuang'ieki te ninye; eitaa Enkai metotiwuo neija, peyie etum iltung'ana aatureita ninye." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ore ina natii, netii apake, ore ina naitoki atii, netii apake, neing'oru Enkai ina naterewaki aaitalamaa." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ore tenebo ina atoduaa ake sii tiabori enkolong teine wueji neutarieki esipata ajo etii ake sii ninye ine enkarrueisho, ore ine wueji e supatisho, netii ake sii ninye enkarrueisho." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Najo tiatua oltau lai, ekeiguanare Enkai lelo supati neiguanare lelo torrok, amu etegelua ninye enkata tenkaraki pooki toki, o pooki siai." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Najo to ltau lai tenena naaipirta nkera oo ltung'ana inchere Enkai natemita ninche pee eitodol ninche nchere ing'uesi ninche. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Amu ore eneiting'oki iltung'ana naa ninye sii eiting'oki ng'uesi; ore anaa enaye nabo neye ake sii ninye enkae. Eeta pooki enkiyang'et nabo nenyanyuk, nemeeta oltung'ani enelang'ie nena ng'uesi; amu ore pooki naa empesho." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Epuo pooki ewueji nebo; amu enterit eing'uaa pooki nerrinyokino pooki enterit aaigil. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Aing'ae oyiolo tenaa ore enkiyang'et oltung'ani neilep alo shumata ore enkiyang'et eng'ues nelo abori atua enkop? 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Metaa atoduaa ajo metii toki naikash alang teneshipakino oltung'ani esiaai enye, amu ina doi esiaai enye; aing'ae oidim ayau ninye metoduaa imbaa naasuju ninye eidipa atua?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Atoduaa ake sii nena baa pooki e nkitorogonyata naasitae tiabori enkolong. Naa ng'ura, ore lelo kiyio le lelo ooitorogonyitai, nemeetae hoo obo lenye oilejilej ninche! Ore te nkalo e lelo ooitorogony ninche; netii apa engolon, nemeetae hoo obo oilejilej ninche." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Nadamu ajo ore lelo ooidipa aatuata nemunyak ninche oleng, aalang lelo leton eishu;" 
Ecclesiastes4:3 neikash oleng te pokira ilo leton eitu eini neitu edol nena baa torrok naasi tiabori enkolong. 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Nadol ajo ore eekenyata pooki o enkarriyiano pooki esiai nelotu aimu olom oata oltung'ani to le latia enye. Ore ake sii ninye ena naa empesho naa enkijape ake emirareki. 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Emuat olmodai inkaik enyena, neisho kewan meinosa esumash." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Enaikash emborei enkaina nabo etii emborron atua alang inkaik are naabore eekenyata emirata e nkijape. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ore ake sii natodua empesho tiabori enkolong; 
Ecclesiastes4:8 ore oltung'ani lemeeta obo, aa taa olayioni arashu olalashe, nemeeta ake enkiting'oto iekenyat enyena pooki nemeraposho aekata nkonyek enyena te nkarsisisho, metaa meikilikuanu aekata ajo, “Aing'ae doi aekenyaki pee amitiki kewan enchipai.” Ore sii ninye ena naa empesho naa esiaai nemetii enchipai." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Enaikash aare alang obo, amu eeta olerrinyore sidai tenkaraki eekenyata enye." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Amu tenelo nebatata pokira, naa kedumu obo o likae; kake oi iyie ilo laa ninye ake tenelo nebatata nemeeta likae odumu ninye aitasheyie." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ore ake sii, teneirrag aare tenebo, naa keirowuaju; kake kaji eiko obo teineirowuaju aa ninye ake?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ore hoo neidim oltung'ani atigilu olikae laa ninye ake, eidim aare aairisha ninye. Ore enkopito natasha uni, nemelelek edung'i." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Enaikash olbarnoti aisinani ng'en alang olaiguanani moruo omoda, lemeekure eyieu enkikoo" 
Ecclesiastes4:14 ore hoo neshomo aing'uaa korokoroni ajing olorika le nkitoo arashu etoiwuoki te nkitoria enye aa olaisinani. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Atoduaa nena pooki naaishu naapuo tiabori enkolong, tenebo ilo barnoti ilo apa olotu aitashe te wueji enye;" 
Ecclesiastes4:16 nemeetae apa enkiting'oto oo ltung'ana pooki; etii apa ninye shumata e pooki. Kake ore lelo oopuonu te siadi nemeshipakino ninye. Esipa ore sii ninye ena naa empesho naa enkijape emirareki. 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Irrita iroruat inono ina kata iloito enkaji Enkai, enaikash tininyikaki ainining alang tinintayu ilo asar loo lmoda; amu meyiolo ninche aajo entorrono easita." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Mikuetiki airo te nkutuk ino, nimincho oltau lino ekuetiki airo irorei te dukuya Enkai, amu etii Enkai keper, nitii iyie oriong enkop; metaa inchoo irorei linono eaku kuti." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Amu elotu enkidetidet too siaitin kumok, ore oltoilo lo lmodai too rorei kumok." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Teninos olmumai te Nkai ijo intayu toki, mimutie ake eitu ilak; amu meeta ninye enchipai too lmoda. Talaa ina ninosa olmumai." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Enaikash tiniminos olmumai alang tininos nimilak. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Mincho enkutuk ino kintadoiki atua eng'oki, nimijo ake te dukuya olkilikuai eji enkitadiata ake duo, ainyoo peyie egoro Enkai te nkaraki oltoilo lino; neinyal esiaai oo nkaik inono?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Amu teneponari enkidetidet, neaku irorei kumok lemeeta tipat: kake turia iyie Enkai?" 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Tinidol to lkerenket lelo aisinak eitorogonyi neoruni esipata naishaakino te ng'olon, ming'asia ake teina bae; amu ore ilo kitok neing'orita likae kitok alang ninye, neetae ake sii kulikae ooilep te ninche." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Kake ore te pooki, ore olaiguanani neisilig sii ninye inkurman naaturi." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ore ilo onyor iropiyiani nemeraposho ae kata too ropiyiani; neijia sii etiu ilo onyor enkarsisisho e dupoto; ore sii ninye ena naa empesho. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ore teneponari intokitin neponari sii lelo ooinos ninche; naa kainyoo dupoto to lopeny aime pee edol ninche too nkonyek enyena? 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Emelok injo olaisiaayiani, oi teneinosa enkiti arashu esapuk; kake ore enkuretisho e ilo karsis nemeisho eirura." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Etii entaboi torrono natoduaa nanu tiabori enkolong; ore karsisisho nashum oltung'ani naa kewan ake eshumaki batisho. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Neimin pooki to lbuket, nemeleku toki naisho nkera enyena." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Ore anaa enatupukuo te ng'uset e ng'otonye neijia ake eitoki aiko elo, meishopo anaa apa pee elotu, nemeeta toki e siaai enye naya ninye anap too nkaik enyena." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ore sii ena naa entaboi torrono anaa apa pee elotu, neijia ake sii eikunari; neaku ainyoo dupoto nanoto ilo oekenyare enkijape." 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Neton te nkishui enye pooki tiatua enaimin, o sina sapuk, te nyamali sapuk o ltau, te moyian o te nkiba." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ng'ura ajo ore enatodua aa sidai neiririkino naa pee idaa niokisho ning'oru enchipai te ekenyata pooki naekenya oltung'ani tiabori enkolong te nena kuti olong'i enyena e nkishui enye naaishoo Enkai ninye, amu ninye erubata enye." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ore pooki tung'ani oishoo Enkai masaa o enkarsisisho o engolon pee eshipakino ninche, neng'amaa erubata enye netum enchipai tesiai enye. Ore ena naa enkishoroto e Nkai." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Amu medamu oleng nena olong'i e nkishui enye amu eishoo Enkai ninye enchipai tiatua oltau lenye. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Etii entorroni natoduaa nanu tiabori enkolong, neteeka oleng iltung'ana." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Ore oltung'ani oisho Enkai enkarsisisho o masaa, o enkanyit, metaa meeta toki nalau e pooki ake naba anaa enayieu, nemeisho ake sii Enkai ninye engolon metishipakinoyu ninche, kake olomoni olotu ashipakino ninche; ore sii ena naa empesho; naa olosilisil sapuk." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Teneiu oltung'ani nkera iip nabo, nebikoo ilarin kumok oleng, metaa ore inkolong'i oo larin lenyena naa kumok oleng, kake meshipakino ntokitin sidain e nkishui, nemetum sii enukaroto, ajo nanu enaikash olkibiroto alang ninye." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Amu elotu atua empesho nerrinyo alo atua enaimin, neitoipori enkaina enye te naimin;" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 ore ake sii, eitu doi ninye edol enkolong arashu eyiolou toki; netum ake enkiyeng'iyeng alang ninye." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Ore hoo tenaa kebikoo ninye ilarin enkalifu aigil are, neitu ake eshipakino toki aime ewueji nebo epuo ninche pooki." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Ore eekenyata pooki o ltung'ani naa tenkaraki enkoshoke ake, nemeraposho ake te sumash enye. Kainyoo elang'ie ilo ng'en olmodai?" 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Anaa ainyoo eeta ilo tung'ani ng'en nalang'ie olaisinani otayiolo eneikunaa kewan te dukuya lelo ooishu? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Enaikash ina duaata oo nkonyek alang ina yieunoto nemeuno; ore sii ninye naa empesho enkijape ake emirareki. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ore pooki naewuo aaku neidipaki apa aipoto, neyioloi enatiu tung'ani, neyioloi aajo meidim ataarare obo ogol alang ninye." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ore teneaku irorei kumok, neaku empesho sapuk, naa ainyoo eikashie oltung'ani?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Anaa aing'ae oyiolo ajo ainyoo esidai te tung'ani eton eishu tenena kuti olong'i naaishu ninye te nkishui enye e pesho, nena naagiroo ninye anaa oloip? Anaa aing'ae oidim atoliki oltung'ani imbaa naaku te siadi ninye tiabori enkolong?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Enaikash enkarna sidai alang eilata nagol enkinyang'a; neikash enkolong nitua alang enkolong apa nikitoiwoki. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Enaikash tinilo ina aji nabore olkiyioi, alang tinilo ina aji o sirua, amu ena enkiting'oto e pooki tung'ani. Neshum lelo ooishu ina too ltauja." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Enaikash osina alang enkuenia, amu to sina o enkiroishi oltau eitishipi oltung'ani." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ore oltau le ilo ng'en, netii atua ina aji, olkiyioi; kake ore ilo tau loo lmoda netii ina aji enkuenia." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Enaikash oltung'ani oning enkisikong'ata eilo ng'en, alang tenening osinkolio loo lmoda." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ore anaa enadar ilkiku einosita enkima tiabori e moti, neijia etiu enkuenia e lelo moda; ore sii ninye ena naa empesho." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Esipa ore enkitorogonyata neitomod oltung'ani ng'en, naa keinyal eropare oltung'ani e ndamunoto." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Enaikash enkiting'oto entoki alang enkiterunoto enye; neikash ilo ongiri to ltau alang ilo owuasa to ltau. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Migoro asioki, amu ore engoro neirrag to lgoo loo lmoda." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Mijo ake, “Ainyoo apa pee eikash inkolong'i naatulusoitie te kuna?” Amu ime te ng'eno inkilikuanu ena." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Eisidai eng'eno tenebo enjung'ore naa dupoto, te lelo oodol enkolong." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Amu ore erripoto e ng'eno nagut netiu anaa erripoto oo mpisai; naa ore dupoto e yiolounoto naa ina ng'eno nagut nagolie ina kishui eilo oata. 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Tadamu esiaai e Nkai: aing'ae oidim aitorioi ina naidipa atoriwuo? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ore teina olong ninoto masaa, ting'idayu; ore teina olong e nyamali nidamu; Enkai naitobira obo anaa olikae, metaa metum oltung'ani ae toki nalotu asuju ninye." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ore te nkishui ai e pesho, natoduaa pooki toki; eetae oltung'ani supat orrorri te sipata enye, neetae oltung'ani torrono oitoodor enkishui enye te yasata enye torrono." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Miaku supat aitulus, nimintaa sii kewan ololus te ng'eno, ainyoo peyie imut kewan ainyal?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Miaku sii olarruoni aitulus, nimiaku sii olmodai; ainyoo pee iye iyie eng'or enkata ino?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Enaikash tinimbung ena akurraki, ore te ina nimimuat enkaina ino; amu ore ilo oure Enkai nepuku tenena pooki." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Eisho eng'eno engolon ilo tung'ani ng'en alang ilaiguanak tomon ootii atua enkanasa. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Esipa meetae te nkop oltung'ani supat oas isupati nemeas aekata ng'ok. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mishilaa nena baa pooki naajo iltung'ana, pee meya ake nining osinka lino kidekita iyie;" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 eyiolo oltau lino ajo ore too nkatitin kumok nitedia sii iyie ilkulikae. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Atetema kuna pooki te ng'eno nagut; najo, “Ekaaku ng'en”, kake ekaalakuaniki apa nanu." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ore ina natii, naa kelakua oleng negut, egut oleng; aing'ae oidim anoto?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Naibelekeny endamunoto ai ayiolou naing'oru aturu naing'oru eng'eno nagut o esiana oo ntokitin, nayiolou nena torrok e modai o ina modai aa ninye olkuenyi." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Natum enduaran oleng alang keeya eina kitok naa ore oltau lenye naa orreshet oibung'isho, naa ore inkaik naa entoki naibung'isho; ore ilo oitiship Enkai neilany ninye, kake ore olaing'okoni neya ina kitok ninye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Ng'ura, ena nanu anoto, ejo olaikooni, intushulaki entoki enkae peyie itum esiana enye," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 naa ninye eing'orua endamunoto ai aigil neton ake eitu atum. Oltung'ani obo anoto tiatua enkalifu kake eitu atum enkitok te pooki. 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Ng'ura, ena ake aewuo atum, inchere eitayu Enkai oltung'ani meitasho te nkitashoto sidai, kake eing'orutua inkoitoi kumok nemesipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Aing'ae otiu anaa oltung'ani ng'en? Naa aing'ae oyiolo ina kibelekenyata entoki pooki? Ore eng'eno nagut e tung'ani neitawang enkomom enye, ore ina golon enkomom enye neibelekenya." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Imbung'a enkitanapata o laiguanani, naa ore enkaraki olmumai sinyati miureishoyu;" 
Ecclesiastes8:3 shomo tung'uai enkomom enye; mimutie eton mesidai esiaai amu eas ninye ina nayieu pooki. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Amu ore ilo rorei lo laiguanani naa sapuk," 
Ecclesiastes8:5 naa aing'ae oidim atiaki ninye, “Kaa doi iasita iyie?” Ore ilo oyanyit enkitanapata nemetum enkitamioto, naa ore ina damunoto oltung'ani ng'en neyiolo e nkata neyiolo enkoitoi." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Amu ore pooki bae neeta erishata enye o enkoitoi enye, hoo naa ore enyamali oltung'ani naa keyek ninye." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Amu meyiolo ninye ina nayooki aaku, anaa aing'ae oidim atoliki ninye enayooki aaku?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Meetae oltung'ani oota engolon naibokie enkiyang'et, arashu eeta engolon naitoreyie ina olong e keeya; olarrabal ilo limikiilany, nemeitajeu intorrok lelo oishooki ninye." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Atoduaa kuna pooki ina kata apikita endamunoto ai nena pooki naasi tiabori enkolong, enkop naata kulikae engolon, neitorogony ilkulikae ootii abori ninche." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Nadol lelo tung'ana torrok enukari; lelo apa oojing nepuku aaing'uaa ewueji sinyati, neisisi tiatua enkanasa teine netaasie imbaa naaijo nena. Ore sii ninye ena naa empesho." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Amu medung'okini ina torroni enkiguana aasioki, ore oltau le nena kera oo ltung'ana netudung'o pee eas entorroni." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Ore hoo neas olaing'okoni entorroni katitin iip nabo neitoodor enkishui enye, kake ayiolo ake ajo kesidanu oleng te lelo ooure Enkai, amu keureisho te dukuya ninye;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Kake mesidanu te lelo arruok, nemeitoodor inkolong'i enyena anaa oloip, amu meeta enkuretisho te dukuya Enkai." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Etii empesho naasi te nkop, etii iltung'ana supati laa ninche eitaasi nena siaitin naaipiru lelo torrok, netii iltung'ana torrok laa ninche eipang'aki iyasat naas lelo supati. Atejo sii ore ena naa empesho sii ninye." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Nanyorraa nanu enkitumurrunoto, amu meeta tung'ani toki sidai tiabori enkolong kake pee edaa, neokisho neshipakino kewan, amu eiriamariyie ena eekenyata enye tiatua nena olong'i e nkishui naisho Enkai ninye tiabori enkolong." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ore pee apik endamunoto ai aitayiolo kewan eng'eno nagut, nadol esiaai naasitae tioriong enkop, nadol ajo metum oltung'ani injo dama arashu kewarie;" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 nadol teine isiaaitin pooki e Nkai, inchere meyiolou oltung'ani ina siaai naasi tiabori enkolong. O tenaa keturu oleng oltung'ani aekenya eing'oru, metum hoo ninye pito; hoo nenya kutuk oltung'ani ng'en ajo eyiolo. Metum hoo ninye pito." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Kake atushuma nanu kuna pooki to ltau, najur aineneng pooki, enetiu lelo supati o lelo ng'eni o siaitin enye etii pooki enkaina e Nkai; tenaa kenyorrata arashu enkiba meyiolo tung'ani. Ore pooki toki natii dukuya enye naa empesho," 
Ecclesiastes9:2 amu ebatatakino pooki enyamali nabo aa lelo supati o lelo torrok; lelo lemeeta oloirerio o lelo ooiduruk, ilo oitayu olasar o ilo lemeitayu olasar. Anaa enatiu to ltung'ani supat, neijia etiu olaing'okoni; anaa enatiu te ilo onya olmumai etiu anaa ilo lemenya olmumai." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Entorroni ena te pooki naasi tiabori enkolong, nchere nebo eitingoki pooki, ore isii iltauja loo ltung'ana pooki nebore enkarruoisho, netii olkuenyi iltauja lenye eton eishu ninche. Ore te siadi ina nepuo enemeneng'a." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Kake ore ilo oitutumokoki o lelo pooki ooishu neeta osiligi, amu enaikash oldia oishu alang olng'atuny otua." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Amu eyiolo lelo ooishu inchere keyooki aaye, kake meyiolo ilootuata ae toki, nemeeta ae laakinoto; kake ore endamunoto enye neimin." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Ore enyorrata enye o enkiba enye o olom lenye neidipa pooki aisha, nemeekure eetaae ntarasi erubata e pooki naasi tiabori enkolong." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Shomo inosa endaa ino te nchipai, niok enaisho ino oo sabibu te nchipai oltau; amu eidipa Enkai atonyorrai pooki nias." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Inchoo ilkilani linono eiborru anaake; nimincho eilata elai te ndukuya ino. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Tishipakinoyu enkishui tenebo enkitok ninyor, too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui ino e pesho nikinchoo ninye iyie tiabori enkolong, amu ninye erubata ino tena kishui te ekenyata niekenya tiabori enkolong." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ore pooki naibung enkaina ino aas, taasa ninye te ngolon ino pooki; amu metii esiaai anaa endamunoto, anaa eng'eno anaa eng'eno nagut atua enemeneng'a naa ninye ilo." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Atoduaa ake sii tiabori enkolong ajo ore ina kesha neme ene lelo ake ooten, neme ene lelo ake oogol to larrabal, neme enoo lang'eni ake e ndaa, neme enoo lkarsisi ake eng'eno, neme ene leloake arriyiak too siaitin omon; kake eipang'aki ake erishata e munyani ninche pooki." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Amu meyiolo oltung'ani enkata enye. Anaa isinkir ooibung'aki to rreshet torrono, anaa imotonyi naaibung'aki tiatua orreshet neija etiu nkera oo ltung'ana eibung'i to rreshet te nkata torrono, ina kata napulusokino adoiki ninche." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Atoduaa sii ena kitanyaanyukoto e ng'eno nagut tiabori enkolong, nelioo aa sapuk te nanu." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Eetae apa enkiti anasa natii ilkuti tung'ana atua, nelotu olaiguanani kitok aarare ninye neman aibung, nepik iltimito aitaman agilunore ninye." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kake enotoki tiatua ina anasa oltung'ani aisinani ng'en, neitajeu ilo tung'ani te ng'eno enye enkanasa. Nemeetae hoo obo otadamua ilo tung'ani aisinani;" 
Ecclesiastes9:16 kake ajo ake enaikash eng'eno nagut alang engolon hoo netemenaiyioki eng'eno nagut eilo aisinani neitu eshilari irorei lenyena. 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Eikash irorei lo ltung'ani ng'en ooning'i te mborron alang imbuakunot oloitoreisho tiatua ilmoda. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Eikash eng'eno nagut alang imasaa o larrabal, kake ore olaing'okoni obo nemut intokitin sidain kumok." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Ore ilojong'a ootuata neidim aitong'ua eilata narropil. Naa ore enkiti modai neidimu eng'eno nagut o enkanyit. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Ore oltau lo ltung'ani ng'en neboiniki ninye meitoriokinoyu esipata, kake ore oltau lo lmodai neboiniki entorroni." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ore doi ninye olmodai tenelo te nkoitoi, nemeeta endamunoto, neliki pooki ng'ae ajo olmodai." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Tenelo ake nikidumakino engoro e ilo oitoreisho, milo ake aing'uaa ewueji ino e siai, amu ore nena torrok kindimi aatapalaki tinigira aitirring'a." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Etii enkarrueisho natoduaa tiabori enkolong, anaa duoo enkitarruoroto napuku aing'uaa ilo oitoreisho." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Eishori iltung'ana oomoda ilorikan le shumata; netoni lelo karsisi too wuejitin e abori. 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Atoduaa irrindiki ekedito mbartan nadol iltung'ana kituaak epuo too nkejek anaa irrindiki. 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ore ilo otur engumoto nedoiki ninye; naa keony olasurai ilo otur elusie te suntai. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ore ilo oturu isoito naa kear isoito ninye; naa ore ilo oiper ileng'ot nepik kewan bata. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Tenaa ming'ani entolu ino, neitu iii ninye, neishaakino niponaa engolon oleng; kake eng'eno nagut naretu oltung'ani meisula." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Teneonyisho olasurai eton eitu esiri te ntaleng'oi naa keaku pesho tenesiri eidipa atoonyisho.
