Ecclesiastes10:12 Ore irorei le nkutuk eilo ng'en, neisho ninye omom, kake ore enkutuk olmodai nemut ninye." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ore enkiterunoto oo rorei le nkutuk enye naa emodai, naa ore enkiting'oto e nkiroroto enye naa olkuenyi torrono." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Eponaa olmodai irorei oleng, hoo nemeeta oltung'ani oyiolo ajo ainyoo naaku, naa aing'ae oidim atoliki ninye ina naaku te siadi ninye?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Ore eekenyata o lmodai neitanaur ninye, metaa meyiolo ninye ina oitoi nalo enkanasa." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Oi iyie na kop, tenaa ore olaiguanani lino naa enkerai, ore ilkituaak linono nenya osirua lenye tadekenya!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ishipa iyie na kop, tenaa ore olaiguanani lino naa olayioni loltung'ani olakuno, ore ilkituaak linono nenya osirua te nkata naishaakino, te nkaraki eng'olon, neme tenkaraki emerai!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ore te nkaraki enturuaisho neurunye shumata enkaji, ore tenkaraki enchalan newo enkaji." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ore endaa neitobiraki te nkaraki enkuenia, ore enaisho oo sabibu neitiship enkishui, newal impisai pooki toki." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Midek ake olaiguanani, too ndamunot inono, nimidek to lgilata lirrag ilo karsis, amu ore imotonyi oloing'ang'e neya oltoilo lino, arashu eboloo kulie nyaun oo naipuko ina bae." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Nteng'ela imasaa inono too nkuapi, ore tenkata nalotu nitum dupoto." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Tooro olchumati lino kat naapishana arashu isiet, amu miyiolo ajo kaa torroni napukoki enkop." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Tenebore nkatampo enkare, neshaiki enkop; naa teneurokino olchani kopikop arashu moikuape, ore ine nesulakino olchani neirrag te ine." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ore ilo ojurru enkijape nemeunisho; naa ore ilo oisilig inkatampo nemeisampu. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Ore anaa enimiyiolo eneikunakino enkiyang'et iloik tiatua eng'uset e nkitok nairoishi, neaku miyiolo esiaai e Nkai naitobir pooki toki." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Tuuno tadekenya ilanterera linono, ore teipa niun ake aitoki; amu miyiolo ajo kakua oobulu, kulo ashu kuldo, arashu eidim pokira aatisidana." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Emelok ewang'an, naa keitiship inkonyek tining'or enkolong." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Amu tenebikoo oltung'ani ilarin kumok, inchoo ninye eshipakino pooki; kake inchoo edamu ninye ajo ore nkolong'i e naimin naa keaku kumok. Ore ina pooki nalotu naa empesho." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Tishipayu iyie lo barnoti, tiatua kitisho ino, nincho oltau lino kinting'id iyie too nkolong'i pooki e kitisho ino; shomo too nkoitoi oltau lino o too nduaat oo nkonyek inono. Kake tayiolo ajo ore te kuna baa pooki naa aikiyau iyie Enkai atua enkiguana." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Iwuang'ie enkuretisho too ndamunot inono, niwuang'ie aitalamaa emion to sesen lino; amu ore kitisho o enkakenya enkishui naa empesho." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Tadamu naa ilo likintobirua too nkolong'i e kitisho ino, eton eitu epuonu inkolong'i torrok, nenyikaa ilarin oleng, ina kata nilotu ajo, “Maatayie ninche enchipai;”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 eton eitu eitomisimisi enkolong, o lapa, o lakir eton eitu esoto nkatampo aayau enchan," 
Ecclesiastes12:3 ina olong naikirikira ilarripok leina aji ore iltung'ana oogol neirrugo, neitirring'a lelo ooidong'isho amu etaa kuti, ore lelo oing'orisho too lusien neiliilaa nkonyek enye." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Ore nkutukie oo nkajijik too nkoitoi neikeni, neyagaa oltoilo lenkidong'ore, nedumunye obo to ltoilo loo motonyi, ore ntoyie pooki o sinkolio neitadouni;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 naa keureisho sii ninche teine neika, netii enkuretisho enkoitoi; neitapuka aipilipil olchani oji olmolosi, onyaanyukie oseki, nekedoo entargeeti elo; neish eyieuna enye; amu elo oltung'ani ewueji enye nebikie intarasi, ore lelo aishirak nepuaya too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa," 
Ecclesiastes12:6 eton eitu eitir ina opito e nkosholai arashu ebela olbakuli le sahabu ore emoti naokunyeki enkare nebela te nkong'u enkare arashu egila ina keju engarri te nchoto naokunyeki enkare nerrinyo enterit alo atua enkop anaa enatiu apa tedukuya," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 nerrinyokino enkiyang'et Enkai ina apa naishorua ninye. 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Empesho oo mpeshoritin ejo olalikioroni; ore pooki naa empesho. 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ore ake sii aa ng'en olaikooni netuutaka iltung'ana eng'eno, eineneng neisum neiturrurru iloyietiaa te nkarriyiano sapuk." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Etetema olaikooni aing'oru irorei ooitishipisho; neiger aitobiraki irorei oosipa. 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ore nkirorot e ilo ang'eni netiu anaa iltuleta neikununo anaa ilmushumaani ootooshokoki aaitagol naa ore inkirorot naatasotuoki netiu anaa olchekut obo. 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Enkerai ai, tujurru oleng pooki toki nalus te kuna. Ore enkigeroto oo mbukui kumok nemeeta eneiting'ie, naa ore enkisoma sapuk naa osesen lino eek." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ore enabayie tena bae, nena pooki nitoning'o. Turia Enkai, nimbung inkitanapat enyena, amu ena elulung'ata e siaai pooki e tung'ani." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Amu eyau Enkai pooki siaai atua enkiguana, o pooki toki oo nkisudorot, aa sidai arashu torrono." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Osinkolio loo sinkolioitin laa ole Solomon," 
SongOfSongs1:2 Oi duoo tenaa aiking'utut too ng'ututat enkutuk ino! Amu ore enyorrata ino nelang enaisho oo sabibu. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Ore iila inono naaputishoreki naa kerropil oleng, ore enkarna ino naa eilata nabukuno; metaa aikinyor iyie intoyie." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Iwaki nanu tenebo iyie matasiooi aaipirri, Aayawua nanu Olaiguanani atua ilgilat lenyena, aikishipa niking'ida tenebo, nikishipakino enyorrata ino aaitalang enaisho oo sabibu, ina pee kinyor ninche pooki!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ara oltung'ani orok oleng, nara sii sidai, na toyie e Yerusalem, atiu anaa lelo ng'oborri le Kedar, anaa lkarash le Solomon." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Mayieu niking'or nanu to lmena enkaraki emua ai, amu aainosa enkolong. Ore ilayiok le yieyio naatagorokinote nanu, aaitaa ninche nanu olaramatani loo sabibu; kake ore osabibu lai makewan neitu aramat!" 
SongOfSongs1:7 Tolikioki iyie nanu, iyie ilo onyor oltau lai, Ine nirritayie imasaa inono, Ine nincho meirraga enaipirie enkolong; ainyoo peyie atiu anaa obo oloolo lemeeta enetii te mbata oo nkerrai e kulikae shekuti?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Tinimiyiolo iyie ira sidai tiatua nkituaak, Tusuja irrekiei le nena kerrai, nilo airrita ilkuoo linono, te mbata oo lng'oborri loo lchekuti." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Aaitanyaanyukie nanu iyie enyorrata ai, embarta oo ngarrin e Farao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Aisidain ilpapit linono edou aagiroo ntakul, naa sidai emurt ino ebore imasaa." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Aikintobiraki iyiook iyie imasaa e sahabu, naaripakino enkosholai." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ore apa ina kata eirrag olaiguanani to lorika lenye dapash, neitorropil esonkoyo ai ine." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ore olanyor lai netiu anaa embene e nkorropil te nanu, ina nairrag te mpolos oo lki laainei." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ore olanyor lai netiu te nanu anaa entukus oo ntapuka, tiatua enkurma oo sabibu e En-gedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ng'ura ajo ira iyie sidai enyorrata ai, ng'ura ajo ira sidai; ore nkonyek inono netiu anaa ine nturkulu." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ng'ura, inkishiaan iyie, olanyor lai, esipa ira sidai. Ore olorika lang dapash naa kenyori." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Ore mbokishi e nkaji ang naa iltarakua, ore irishinani naa olchani onyaanyukie oltarakuai." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ara nanu entapukai e Sharon, entapukai oo erat." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Anaa entapukai natii atua ilkiku, neija etiu enyorrata ai too ntoyie." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Anaa enatiu olchani loo lng'anayio tiatua entim, neija etiu olanyor lai tiatua iltung'ana ooti. Atotona te nchipai sapuk tiatua oloip lenye, nemelok olng'anayioi lenye te nkutuk ai." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Aatorikuo ninye nanu enkaji o sirua, naadumaki ninye nanu aitaman oltaa le nyorrata." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Intasheyie eng'olon ai te ndaa oo lng'anayio, nikintagol too lng'anayio; amu aata nanu emuoyian e nyorrata." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Oi duoo tenetii enkaina enye e kedienye abori elukunya ai, ore enkaina enye e tatene naaibung!" 
SongOfSongs2:7 Esiligieki intae natoyie e Yerusalem, enosa olmumai too ntarakueti naaten inchere mipututu enyorrata ang." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Aning'ito oltoilo lo lanyor lai, ng'ura elotu, edoku too ildoinyo, elang'u indoinyo." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Etiu olanyor lai anaa enkolii, arashu oloing'oni le nkolii. Ng'ura, nelido oitashe tioriong esuntai ang, eing'or atua enkaji te lusie, eing'orisho too lusien." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Airorie nanu olanyor lai naajoki ninye, “Inyo enyorrata ai, ina nanyor aisul, naa wou tung'uai;" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Amu ng'ura, ore ina kirobi neisha eishunye enchan neshomo alusoo." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Etubulutua ntapuka tioriong enkop, netabawua enkata eranyare, netoning'oki oltoilo loo nturkuluni te nkop ang." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Ore olng'aboli neitayio ilng'abolo, ore osabibu neitapuka eitayu olng'usil orropil. Inyo, enyorrata ai, enaikishiaan ai wou tupuku." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Oi iyie enturkulu ai natii atua olbaata le ndapidapoi, natii olbaata le marti, inchooki matoduaa enkomom ino, inchooki matoning'o oltoilo lino, amu ore oltoilo lino naa kemelok, naa sidai enkomom ino." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Imbung'aki iyiook mbariak, nena bariak kutiti, nena naainyal inkurman ang oo sabibu, amu ore inkurman ang oo sabibuni neitapuka.”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 Ore olanyor lai naa olalai nara nanu enenye, eirrita ninye ntare enyena tiatua ntapuka." 
SongOfSongs2:17 O metaba anaa nemanaa, nelusoo enkewarie imbelekenyunye olanyor lai, totiwuo anaa enkoilii arashu itiu anaa oloing'oni le nkolii te nchumata oldoinyo osur." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ore te nchumata erruat ai kewarie, aing'orua ilo onyor oltau lai, aing'orua nanu ninye oleng neitu atum ninye; aipotuo ninye, kake eitu aaisho ninye nanu ewalata." 
SongOfSongs3:2 “Kadumunye alo aman enkanasa, atua inkoitoi naalala e nkanasa o lkurrot oo tumoreki, ekaing'oru nanu ilo onyor oltau lai.” Aing'orua ninye, kake eitu nanu atum ninye." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Aanotito nanu ilarripok, ina kata emanimanaa te nkanasa. “Itoduaa intae ilo onyor oltau lai?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ore aa enagirorie ninche, natum ilo apa onyor oltau lai. Naibung ninye, nemaisho ninye elo, o metaba anaa nayau ninye enkaji e yeiyio, o maitijing'a ninye ilo gilata apa le ina naatoiwuo nanu." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Enosa olmumai intae natoyie e Yerusalem, enosa olmumai too ntarakueti o naaten, inchere mipututu enyorrata ang, ometaba anaa nenyorru openy." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ainyoo ina nailepu to lpurkel, natiu anaa empuruo naitorropiloki te manoo o te nkorropil, te rropili pooki e nena sonkoyoni oo lbiasharani?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ng'ura, enapitae Solomon to lorika lenye le nkitoo, nemanita ninye iltung'ana magil ntomoni ile magil te Israel." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Neenita pooki ilalema, naa arriyiak to larrabal, meeta hoo obo lenye lemeenita olalem, nerripisho te nkewarie." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Etanapaki olaiguanani Solomon to lorika le nkitoo, ilo oitobirunyeki inkeek e Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Eitobirua ing'apeta enyena te nkosholai, ore oriong enye naa ene sahabu, ore olorika lenye naa morijoi; neripuno atua te nkarriyiano, intoyie e Yerusalem naatiriputua te nkarriyiano." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Enchom intae na toyie e Sion, pee ingoringoro Olaiguanani Solomon, eeta emaupe e nkitoo apa naishopoko ng'otonye. Teina olong apa enkiyama enye, teina olong enchipai oltau lenye." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ng'ura ajo ira iyie sidai enanyor ai, ng'ura ira iyie sidai! Ore nkonyek inono netiu anaa ine nturkulu, eiwariwaru te nkarasha naitoipieki enkomom. Ore ilpapit linono netiu anaa eluaata oo nkineji, edou abori to loshong'ishong'i le Gilead." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Ore ilala linono neibor anaa isupeni e kerra naabarno, nena naaetuo eing'uaa enkisujata, neeta pooki ilmao, nemeetae hoo nabo natua olkuoo." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Ore nkonito e nkutuk ino netiu anaa eusi nanyokie, naa sidai enkutuk ino. Ore ntakul inono netiu anaa indung'ot are olng'anayioi oji kukumanka, eiwariwaru te nkarasha naitoipieki enkomom." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Etiu emurt ino anaa oltalet le Daudi, napurupurana nepuyiapui, nebore imankek naaikununo anaa ilong'oi oo lmurran enkalifu." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Ore ilki linono pokira netiu anaa nkoliin, ilmao le nkolii oodaa too ntapuka." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ometamanai enkakenya nelusoo enkewarie, o te ilo doinyo oti le nkorropil." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Ira iyie sidai oleng enanyor ai, miaata iyie oleyiata." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Wou tenebo nanu tung'uai Lebanon, esiankiki ai; wou tenebo nanu tung'uai Lebanon. Wou tung'uai entopij oldoinyo le Aman, tung'uai entopij e Senir o Hamon, tung'uai inkapuniaa oo lng'atunyo, tung'uai lelo doinyo loo lowuarak kerin." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Iwa iyie oltau lai te ngolon, enkanashe ai esiankiki ai, iwa iyie oltau lai te nking'urata oo nkonyek inono, to soit obo ogol enkinyang'a le murt ino." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Kebaa emeloni enyorrata ino, enkanashe ai, esiankiki ai! Kebaa eikash enyorrata ino alang enaisho oo sabibu ore ina rropili oo ila inono alang kulie naarropil?" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Eitong'u too inkonito e nkutuk ino enaisho namelok, esiankiki ai; etii enaisho olkenkei o kule abori olng'ejep lino; Ore olng'usil loo nkilani inono netiu anaa olng'usil le Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Ore enkurma naikenoro naa enkanashe ai, esiankiki ai, enkurma naikenoro enchorro naripa." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Ore nkaitubulu inono netiu anaa enkurma olng'anayio ooji kukumanka, eeta ilng'anayio pooki gelunot, hena o nardo." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Eeta ninye Nardo o Saparani o sinantei, o lkeek pooki oo rropil, o emanoo o sonkoyoni tenebo isonkoyoni pooki naaisul." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Olchorro le nkurma, enchorro e nkare naishu, o nchorroi naarukunye e Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Inyo iyie lo kutati le moikuape! Nilotu iyie, lo kutati le kopikop. Tukuta enkurma ai, inchoo erropili enye eibulaa. Inchoo olanyor lai elotu enkurma enye, nenya ilng'anayio lenyena gelunot." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Aewuo nanu enkurma ai, enkanashe ai, esiankiki ai, aiturrurruo nanu emanoo ai tenebo esonkoyo ai, ainosa nanu olchankaroi apudaki olkenkei le naisho, naok enaisho oo sabibu o kule. Enosa lo shoreta niokioko; entookisho oleng intae iloonyorra!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Airure nanu kake eitu eirura oltau lai. Toning'o! Eoshioshito olanyor lai kutuk aji “Taboluoki, enkanashe ai, enanyor ai, enturkulu ai, enemeeta oleyiata ai; Amu keshal elukunya ai, te nkoilielio, ore ilpapit laainei neshal te nkoilielio e nkewarie.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Aitayio nanu nkilani, naa kaji aiko tenaitoki aishop? Aisuja nkejek aainei, kaji aiko tenaitoki apik enterit?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Nepik olanyor lai enkaina enye enkikenet e kutuk aji, neng'idayu oltau lai tiatua nanu." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Nainyototo abolu olanyor lai, nebore inkaik aainei emanoo, neitong ilkimojik laainei teina manoo naruko, aibung inkikeneta e kutuk aji." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Nabolu olanyor lai, kake eibelekenye olanyor lai nelo, neisinanuo oltau lai pee eiro ninye. Naing'oru ninye neitu atum ninye; aipotuo ninye, kake eitu aawalaki nanu." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Naatum ilarripok nanu, ina kata emanaa te nkanasa; naar nanu, naapik nanu olbae, naaoru nanu enkila ai, lelo arripok le nena sunta." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Enosa olmumai intae na ntoyie e Yerusalem, tinitumutumu ake olanyor lai, nilikiki ninye aajoki ekamuoi te nyorrata." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Ainyoo elang'ie ina ninyor ino enkae ninyor? Oi ina sidai tiatua inkituaak? Kainyoo elang'ie ilo linyor lino olikae linyor eji pee intanapa iyiook ena? 
SongOfSongs5:10 Ore olanyor lai naa aisidai oleng negol, keibala too nkalifuni tomon." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Ore endukuya enye naa Sahabu nasila; ore lpapit lenyena naa sidain, kerook anaa olkurruk." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Netiu nkonyek enyena anaa ine nturkulu, te mbata oo nchorroi enkare, naaisujaki te kule, naaitobirakino entonata." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Naa sidain intakul enyena anaa ineeitobirieki isonkoyoni neitayu olng'usil oorropil, ore nkonito enkutuk enye netiu anaa ntapuka, naitong'u emanoo naruko narropil." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Ore nkaik enyena netiu anaa sahabu nairina, naikodoki too soito oogol enkinyang'a. Ore osesen lenye anaa ilaa ooitobiraki loo lkanchaoni, netii ninye iila naarropil oleng." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Ore nkejek enyena netiu anaa ing'apeta e Alabata naaikodoki te sahabu. Ore teningor ninye netiu anaa iltarakua le Lebanon. 
SongOfSongs5:16 Ore enkiroroto enye naa kemelok oleng, naa ore ninye pooki naa keng'uarrayu, olanyor lai ele naa olchore lai ele, natoyie e Yerusalem." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Kaji eshomo ilo lino linyor, iyie enaisul inkituaak? Kaji eibelekenyakine olinyor lino alo, pee kitum iyiook aaing'oru ninye tenebo iyie?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Etadoyie olanyor lai alo enkurma enye, ine neitobirieki isonkoyoni, alo airrita iluaat oo ntare enyena too nkurman, nesotu ntapuka." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ara nanu eno lanyor lai, ore olanyor lai naa olalai; eirritita ntare enyena too neetii intapuka." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ira iyie sidai anaa Tirsah, olanyor lai ira sidai anaa Yerusalem, keitureisho anaa enjore naata inankan." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Imbelekenya inkonyek inono intung'uayioki, amu kaaitanyamal ninche nanu, ore ilpapit linono netiu anaa iluaat oo nkineji, naadou to loshong'ishong'i le Gilead." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Etiu ilala linono anaa iluaat oo supeni e kerra, nena naetuo ailepu te nkisujata, neeta pooki ilmao, meetae nabo natua olkuoo." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Ore ntakul inono netiu anaa isashat olng'anayioi oji kukumanka, tiatua ina arasha naimulumulieki enkomom." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Eetae nkaiguanak ntomoni ile, neetae nkapiak intomoni isiet, o nkaisiaayiak nemeikenayu." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Na turkulu ai, enemeeta eleyiata ai, naa nabo ake, ina nanyor ng'otonye enye, ina kirotet te ng'otonye. Etoduaa ninye nkaisiayiak neipot ninye aajo enashipa; ore nkaiguanak o nkapiak neisis sii ninche ninye." 
SongOfSongs6:10 “Aing'ae ele otiu enduaata enye anaa entadekenya, newang anaa olapa, anaa enkolong, neitureisho anaa enjore naata inankan." 
SongOfSongs6:11 Atadoyie alo ine netii enkurma oo lng'anayio aing'or nena tapuka naatii oerata, aing'uraa tenaa keimarrimar ilkeek loo sabibu, tenaa keitapuka ilng'anayio ooji kukumanka." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ore apa eton mayiolo naayau oltau lai, tiatua engarri oo mbartan tembata olkitok lai.”" 
SongOfSongs6:13 Tushukunye, tushukunye iyie lo Shulami, tushukunye tushukunye pee kitum aing'ura iyie. Ainyoo peyie ing'or iyie ilo Shulami, anaa oloipidipid aiguran te dukuya injorin are?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Kebaa enare inamuka inkejek inono? Iyie natiu anaa esiankiki o laiguanani! Nepurupurana nkupesir inono anaa isoito oogol enkinyiang'a, esiaai oo nkaik o laitobirani arriyia." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ore osororua lino netiu anaa olcharaa, ilo lemelau aekata enaisho oo sabibu naitushula, ore enkoshoke ino netiu anaa osototi le nkano omanita intapuka." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Etiu ilki linono pokira anaa ilmao le nkolii. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Netiu emurt ino anaa oltalet lo lalae lo lkanchaoi, ore nkonyek inono netiu anaa lturot ootii Heshbon, te mbata enkishomi e Batrabbin. Etiu enkume ino anaa oltalet le Lebanon, ilo oing'or Dameski." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Ore endukuya ino neitashe aitobiraki anaa oldoinyo le Karmel, ore nena enat inono oo lpapit naaisiong'a netiu anaa nkilani pilei, netil olaiguanani tiatua ina sidano." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Kebaa enkishiaa o esidano niaata iyie, iyie enanyor ai, kebaa elulung'a enyorrata ino." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Isiriri iyie anaa oltukai netiu ilki linono, anaa nkimarrat enyena." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Atejo nanu kaked ilo tukai, naitayu ilng'anayio lenyena nchoo ilki linono metotiwuo anaa nkimarrat o sabibu, ore olng'usil le nkiyang'et ino netiu anaa olng'usil loo lng'anayio oonyaanyukie ilama." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Ore ng'ututat inono netiu anaa enaisho sidai oo sabibu. Ina nalo adoyio aitobirari, naisotuni te nkutuk neim rishat oo lala." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ara nanu eno lanyor lai, naa ore eyieunoto enye naa te nkaraki nanu." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Wou, olanyor lai, maape nkong'at, nikirrag nena ang'itie;" 
SongOfSongs7:12 matayooki apuo nena kurman oo sabibu, nikipuo aaing'uraa tenaa keitapuka isabibu, tenaa ketabolote intapuka oo sabibu neitapukita sii ninche kukumanka. Ore te ine naa kaaisho nanu enyorrata ai." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Ore enkaitubului nanyaanyukie enchiliwa neitayio olng'usil orropil ore ilng'anayio pooki sidain netii embata e kutukaji, ilng'ejuko tenebo ilmusan, lelo laatushumaka nanu iyie, iyie olanyor lai." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Oi napaji tenaa iaku olalashe lai, ilo otanaa ilki le yieyio! Tenaainepu nanu iyie te boo, naa kaang'utut, nemeetae hoo obo laamenaa nanu." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ekaarik nanu iyie o maaitijing'a enkaji e yieyio, olgilata le ina apa naatoiwuo nanu, Naaisho nanu iyie enaisho oo sabibu natii enkorropil tooko, ina are oo lng'anayio le kukumanka." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Oi naaji tenaa ketii enkaina enye e kedienye abori endukuya ai, naamuataki enkaina enye e tatene!" 
SongOfSongs8:4 Enosa olmumai intae na toyie e Yerusalem, inchere mipututu enyorrata ai, o metaba anaa nenyorru openy." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Aing'ae lido olotu to lpurkel, eirishakino olanyor lenye? Tiabori olchani onyaanyukie olamai aatuputuo iyie. Te ine apa earita ng'utunyi enkop kiini iyie, te ine apa earita enkop ina nikitoiwuo." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Intaaki nanu matotiwuo anaa olmishire tiatua oltau lino, anaa olmishire otii enkaina ino; amu ore enyorrata naa kegol anaa keeya, ore olom netolo anaa enkurare. Ore inkiwuang'at enyena naa nkiwuang'at e nkima, enkima napejisho oleng to lang'at." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Mear inkariak kumok enyorrata nemeidim olairrag le nkare aawa ninye. Teneitayu oltung'ani enyorrata, too masaa pooki e nkaji enye, naa kemenari tukul." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Kiaata enkiti anashe, nemeeta ninye ilki. Kaa kintaas enkanashe ang, teina olong nasai ninye?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Tenaa kesuntai ninye, naa aikishetaki te shumata ninye oltalet le nkosholai, kake tenaa aikutukaji ninye, nikiripaa ninye too mbaoi o ltarakuai." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ara apa nanu esuntai, netiu apa ilki laainei anaa iltaleta; neaku atii atua nkonyek enyena, anaa ilo oyau eseriani." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Eeta apa Solomon enkurma oo sabibu te Baalhamon; neishooyo enkurma oo sabibu aisilenoki ilaramatak; ore ake pooki lenye te lelo ng'anayio mpisai enkalifu nabo enkosholai. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Ore enkurma ai oo sabibu, ina naa enaai ake, naa enaai makewan, ore iyie Solomon indim aawa ina alifu nabo, ore ilaramatak loo lng'anayioi netum iip are." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Oi intae oomanya atua nena kurman, einining'ito ilencholuek ai oltoilo lino; nchooki matoning'o ninye." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Tasioki isarisara olanyor lai, totiuo anaa enkolii arashu oloti oing'oni le nkolii, otii oldoinyo loo sonkoyoni." 
Isaiah1:1 Enduaata e Isaya olayioni le Amos, apa natoduaa, naipirta Yuda o Yerusalem, too nkolong'i e Usia, o Yotam, o Ahas, o Hesekia, aiguanak le Yuda." 
Isaiah1:1 Enduaata e Isaya olayioni le Amos, apa natoduaa, naipirta Yuda o Yerusalem, too nkolong'i e Usia, o Yotam, o Ahas, o Hesekia, aiguanak le Yuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Toning'o, iyie keper, ninchoru enkiok na kop; amu eiroro Olaitoriani: “Aitotio nanu nkera naitubulu, naatogolong'akitia ninche." 
Isaiah1:3 Eyiolo olkiteng olopeny, neyiolo osikiria ewueji neitotiyieki kake meyiolo ninye Israel, mening ninche iltung'ana laainei.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Ee, olosho loo laing'okok, olorere onapita enkarruoisho, eishoi oo larruok, ilayiok oas inemeitoriori! Etung'uatie ninche Olaitoriani, etemenaitie ninche ilo sinyati le Israel, etapong'ori ninche tukul." 
Isaiah1:5 Kainyoo pee iyieuu neoshi intae, eji metaa ipuopuo dukuya aagolong'u? Kemuei endukuya pooki, neiterre oltau pooki." 
Isaiah1:6 Ore ebaiki entutunyo e nkeju o metabaiki endukuya, metii embiotisho, kake ilbaa, o ltuduta, o ngoldonyot naaruko nkimek; neitu eironyuni, aashu eeni, neitu eelieki eilata." 
Isaiah1:7 Eirragita enkop inyi aa mijooni, netapejoyioki nkanas inyi te nkima; te dukuya intae idolitata einosa iltung'ana leeiking'a enkop inyi; netomijoono ninye, anaa ina nainyala iltung'ana leeiking'a." 
Isaiah1:8 Etung'uayioki ina tito e Sion anaa olng'obor ti atua enkurma oo sabibu, anaa olkirragarie ti atua enkurma e entoki naaijo nkaimalasia anaa enkanasa natang'aduaki." 
Isaiah1:9 Te neme Olaitoriani loo lororani otelekaka iyiook oloti pisiai, anaata kitotiutuo anaa Sodom, nikitiu anaa Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani, intae ilaitoriak le Sodom! Enchoo enkiok enkiteng'enare e Nkai ang intae iltung'ana le Gomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 “Kainyoo te nanu enkumoi oo lasarri linyi? Olaitoriani ojo; Ataraposhe nanu ilasarri oopejori loo lmerregeshi o eilata e lelo kerra linyi oopir; mashipakino nanu osarge loo loing'ok, aashu loo lkerra aashu o loo lkineji." 
Isaiah1:12 Amu ore oshi ti nipuonunu aaitalioo ate te dukuya nanu, aing'ae naikilikuan intae nipuonunu aaituny ndung'orot aainei." 
Isaiah1:13 Mintokiki aayau ilasarri le pesho; olminong enkorropil te nanu. Ore olapa ng'ejuk o sabato o enkipototo e umata - maidim nanu aing'ura ena torroni o eumata. 
Isaiah1:14 Ore lelo apaitin linyi ng'ejuko o lelo siruai linyi oogeluno, keiba oltau lai; netaa ninche olola te nanu, atanaure anapita ninche." 
Isaiah1:15 Ti nintorioo nkaik inyi, naisudoo nkonyek aainei te ntae; ore hoo niomonono katitin kumok, mainining nanu; ebore nkaik inyi osarge." 
Isaiah1:16 Entukuo ate, entobira ate; ewuang'ie entorroni oo nkiaasin inyi, te dukuya nkonyek aainei; entapal entorroni," 
Isaiah1:17 entamoo ate easata oo mbaa sidain; eng'oru esipata, entobira enkibookinoto e nkop, entomitu ilo okishi, entasaru ina nara enkoliai." 
Isaiah1:18 Wou naa matoning'oto te nebo, Olaitoriani ojo; ore hoo neyia ing'ok inono anaa enkarasha nanyokie, keyooki aaiboru netiu anaa enkatampoi naibor oleng ore hoo nedo anaa osarge, keyooki aaiborru anaa ilpapit loo ntare naaibor." 
Isaiah1:19 Ti ninyoraa nirukuruku, ninosinoso olkar le nkop;" 
Isaiah1:20 kake ti niaanyianya nigolong'ung'u, nemuti intae to lalem; amu enkutuk o Laitoriani nairoro.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Kaji eikuna ina anasa naisiligayu, pee etaa enaibor onyek, ore apa ina nabore esipata! Naa enkiguana nasipa naton ti atua ninye, kake ore taata netaa ilarak." 
Isaiah1:22 Etaa enkosholai ino isuut, netushulare enaisho ino enkare." 
Isaiah1:23 Ore ilkituaak linono netogolong'utua, naa ile ncholiek oo lapurrok. Nenyor ake pooki te ninche eropare nekuet aasujaa nkishorot. Memitu ninche ilo okishi, nemeshilaa ninche enyamali oo nkolia." 
Isaiah1:24 Ore enkaraki ina, Olaitoriani ojo, Olaitoriani loo lororani, ilo magilani le Israel: “Ee kaitalaku nanu engoro ai too lmang'ati laainei, kaitalaku nanu makewan te lelo laaiba." 
Isaiah1:25 Kaaipirakinye nanu enkaina ai Naasil anaa enasil olkunoni esekenkei naiwuang'ie nanu oloirerio lino pooki. 
Isaiah1:26 Naa kaitasheyie nanu ilarishak linyi anaa apake, o lelo arikok linyi anaa apake te nkiterunoto. Ore te siadi ina neaku eikiji, enkanasa e supatisho, ina anasa naisiligayu.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Kekorduni Sion te sipata, ore lelo ootii atua nekorduni te supatisho." 
Isaiah1:28 Kake ore lelo oogolong'u o laing'okok, neidaikieki te nebo, ore lelo ootanyaita Olaitoriani nemuti." 
Isaiah1:29 Amu iyookiki aakurru te nkaraki lelo keek apa laaijo ilng'abolo lishipakinono, neitukurruni intae te nena kurman apa nitegelutua." 
Isaiah1:30 Amu iyookiki intae aatiu anaa olchani onyaanyukie olng'aboli otoyu mbenek enyena, aashu anaa nkurman nemetii enkare." 
Isaiah1:31 Ore ilo tung'ani ogol netiu anaa suut, ore esiaai enye netiu anaa suut naapiki enkima neyupuyup te nebo, nemeetae oltung'ani oidim aibooi ina kima." 
Isaiah2:1 Ele rorei etoduaa Isaya olayioni le Amos eipirta Yuda o Yerusalem. 
Isaiah2:1 Ele rorei etoduaa Isaya olayioni le Amos eipirta Yuda o Yerusalem. 
Isaiah2:2 Keyooki alotu too nkolong'i e siadi, paa ore ilo doinyo le nkaji o Laitoriani neitasheyieki aaitoodor too ldoinyo, neilepieki aaitogiroo too ldoinyo, ore loshon pooki nerukokino ninye," 
Isaiah2:3 naa kepuonu iltung'ana kumok aajo: “Wootu, maape oldoinyo lo Laitoriani, maape enkaji e Nkai e Yakobo; pee etum ninye aiteng'ena iyiook nkoitoi enyena, nikitum iyiook aashom too nkoitoi enyena.” Amu Sion ninye epukunye enkitanapata, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani eing'uaa Yerusalem." 
Isaiah2:4 Kelo ninye aiguanare iloreren, naa kemut ninye nabo ti alo loshon kumok, naa keitaa ninche lalema lenye nchempei, neitaa remeta enye ilalema le nkisampuare, nemeitoki olosho adumakino olikae osho to lalem, nemeitoki ae kata ninche aata olarrabal." 
Isaiah2:5 Iyie na aji e Yakobo, wou, maape iyiook ti atua ewang'an o Laitoriani." 
Isaiah2:6 Amu itung'uayie iyie iltung'ana linono, ina aji e Yakobo, enkaraki nabore ninche lasakutok ooing'uaa oloosaen, o lelo aitumusumusok anaa iltung'ana loo Lfilisti, neoshore ninche nkaik iltung'ana leeiking'a." 
Isaiah2:7 Eiputa enkop enye enkosholai o sahabu, nemeeta ilchumat lenye eneiting'ie; neiputa nkop enye mbartan, nemeeta eneiting'ie ngarrin enye oo mbartan te nkumoi." 
Isaiah2:8 Eiputa enkop enye nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin, neirrugokino ninche ina siaai oo nkaik enye, ina naitobira ilkimojik lenye." 
Isaiah2:9 Keitoborri iltung'ana, neitadouni iltung'ana - mipalaki ninche!" 
Isaiah2:10 Tijing'a atua endapidapoi, nilo aisudori ti atua enterit ailany ina kituriata o Laitoriani, nilany ina kitoo e nkisisa enye." 
Isaiah2:11 Ore ina kitokoos oo ltung'ana naa keitadouni, ore ilo wuasa loo ltung'ana naa keitoborri; neaku Olaitoriani ake eitaae kitok te ina olong." 
Isaiah2:12 Amu eeta Olaitoriani loo lororani enkolong nagilunore ilo pooki owuasa neitokoos, agilunore ina pooki nailepieki aadumu;" 
Isaiah2:13 agilunore lelo tarakua pooki le Lebanon, lelo adoru ooilepieki shumata, negilunore lelo keek oogol le Bashan;" 
Isaiah2:14 negilunore lelo doinyo adoru pooki, negilunore nena doinyo naaitokoos pooki;" 
Isaiah2:15 negilunore pooki wueji neika, o pooki suntai nasheta;" 
Isaiah2:16 negilunore imelin pooki e Tarshishi negilunore pooki toki e nkarriyiano. 
Isaiah2:17 Ore enkitokoos oo ltung'ana neitadouni, ore ilo wuasa loo ltung'ana neitadouni abori; neaku Olaitoriani ake eitaae kitok te ina olong." 
Isaiah2:18 Ore nena kitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin neishieki tukul. 
Isaiah2:19 Nejing iltung'ana nkapuniaa oo ndapidapo, o ngumot e nkop, aailany ina kituriata o Laitoriani, neilany ina kitoo e nkisisa enye, te nedumunye aiture enkop." 
Isaiah2:20 Ore akenya te ina olong nenang'aa iltung'ana aaiturraa nena kitanyaanyukot enye e nkosholai o nena kitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin e sahabu, apa naaitobirakita ate pee eserem, nenang'aki ilkirrumun o sarampalani," 
Isaiah2:21 pee etum aatijing ilbaat loo ndapidapo o nkapuniaa oo soito sapuki aailany ina kituriata o Laitoriani o ina kitoo e nkisisa enye, te nedumunye ninye aiture enkop." 
Isaiah2:22 Mbelekenyayu tung'uai tung'ani laa ore nkumeishin enyena netii enkiyang'et, Amaa kole tipat ninye?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ng'ura, ore Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani loo lororani, naa keiwuang'ie te Yerusalem o te Yuda, ina naisiligi o ina naishuyieki, eneisiligi te ndaa o nkare;" 
Isaiah3:2 ilo tung'ani magilani o sikari, o larishani o loiboni le Nkai, o laitumusumusoni o lpayian," 
Isaiah3:3 ilo arikoni le njore e onom o ilo tung'ani oata enkitoo, ilo arikoni o ilo arriyia too nkitoduaat, o ilo arriyia te naibon." 
Isaiah3:4 Naa kaitaa nanu ilayiok ilkituaak lenye, naa nkera naapuo aaitore ninche." 
Isaiah3:5 Naa kepuo iltung'ana aaibookino enkop maate, neitorogony ake oltung'ani olikae oltung'ani ake ole latia enye; neitokoos olbarnoti te dukuya olpayian, neitokoos oltung'ani li abori te dukuya ilo kitok." 
Isaiah3:6 Kelotu enkata naibung oltung'ani olalashe lenye ti atua enkaji e menye, ejo, “Iata iyie olkila; iyie olo aaku olarikoni lang, ore ele sototi pooki le nkidaata naa keaku abori enkitoria ino;”" 
Isaiah3:7 ore te ina olong naa keiro ninye ajo, “Maaku nanu olabaani, ore atua enkaji ai metii endaa nemetii olkila; mikintaa intae nanu olarikoni loo ltung'ana.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Amu etarrorre Yerusalem, netabatate Yuda; enkaraki naa ore nkirorot enye o nkiaasin enye negilunore Olaitoriani, nemor dukuya nkonyek enyena." 
Isaiah3:9 Ilo kep lenye oishakenoki ninche; keibalunye ninche ing'ok enye anaa Sodom, meisudoo ninche. Woi ninche Amu eyautua entorroni shumata ate." 
Isaiah3:10 Tiaaki lelo asipak nchere aisidain mbaa ti alo ninche, amu keinos ninche ilng'anayio loo nkiaasin enye." 
Isaiah3:11 Woi ilo tung'ani torrono! Kerruoyo mbaa te ninye, amu ore enaba anaa enataasa nkaik enyena, ina eyookini aaitaas ninye." 
Isaiah3:12 Ore too ltung'ana laainei, nkera naaitorogony ninche, naa nkituaak naaitore ninche. Lo tung'ana laainei, eitapong'oitie intae ilarikok linyi, nemil enkoitoi inyi." 
Isaiah3:13 Eitasho Olaitoriani pee eishankarra, eitasho pee eiguanare iltung'ana lenyena." 
Isaiah3:14 Etijing'a Olaitoriani enkiguana aiguanare ilpayiani o lkituaak loo ltung'ana lenyena: “Intae apa ooinosa enkurma oo lng'anayio, ore nena nitoorutuo intae ilaisinak netii atua nkajijik inyi." 
Isaiah3:15 Kainyoo intodolulu pee intorogonyonyo iltung'ana laainei, nindong'idong'o aarepeny nkomomi e lelo aisinak?” Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Isaiah3:16 Etejo Olaitoriani: Ore enkaraki naitokoos ntoyie e Sion nepuo te nkitaragirag neing'orisho to lwuasa, neyagiyag epuoito eipidie nkejek enye;" 
Isaiah3:17 keosh Olaitoriani to lpepedoi nena lukuny oo ntoyie e Sion, naa keibalunye Olaitoriani emasipaisho enye." 
Isaiah3:18 Ore kenya te ina olong naa keiwuang'ie Olaitoriani nena masaa naang'idare," 
Isaiah3:19 o lmiintoni, o lkataarri o nkarash oo murto; o nkarash" 
Isaiah3:20 oo lukuny, o sekenke oo nkaik, o ntoren, o ltuleta le sonkoyo, o ntaleng'o" 
Isaiah3:21 o lelo giso oomishira o lgiso loo nkumeishin; 
Isaiah3:22 o lelo kilani loo siruai, lelo karash li oriong, o lelo kilani, o lbenia loo nkaik;" 
Isaiah3:23 o lelo kilani oobebek, o lelo kilani oo puyiapui, o nkarash oo lukuny, o lelo karash oo imulumulieki nkonyek." 
Isaiah3:24 Ore te rishata e rropili naa eng'uan; ore te rishata e nkimeita naa olgosoi; naa ore te rishata oo lpapit ooitobiraki, naa enkurroto; naa ore te rishata o olkila sidai naa enkishopo oo lkuniyiani; naa ore te rishata e nkikishaan naa enkurruna." 
Isaiah3:25 Ore ilewa linyi naa kebatat olalem nemuta lelo lewa linyi magil to larrabal. 
Isaiah3:26 Ore nchomito enyena neyietu aaishir; neirrag ninye te nkop meishopo. 
Isaiah4:1 Naa keibung kenya nkituaak naapishana olee obo te ina olong ejo, “Eikinya iyiook endaa ang maate nikinchop nkilani ang maate, nchoo ake duoo eipotieki iyiook enkarna ino, iwuang'ie enkurruna ang.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Ore kenya te ina olong kesidanu olng'osila lo Laitoriani, ore lng'anayio le ina kop naa keaku esikar o enkitoo e ilo pisiai otelekua loo Siraeli." 
Isaiah4:3 Naa ore ilo otelekua te Sion neton te Yerusalem, neipoti aajo sinyati, pooki ng'ae ake ninye oigeroki enkarna enye te nkaraki puaan te Yerusalem," 
Isaiah4:4 ina kata eidipa Olaitoriani aitukuo olduruk too ntoyie e Sion neitukuo iltipot lo sarge le Yerusalem, aiwuangie te mpolos enye, to ltau le nkiguana o to ltau le mpejoroto." 
Isaiah4:5 Netum taa Olaitoriani aitobira te shumata o ldoinyo pooki le Sion o te shumata ilturrurri lenyena pooki enkatampoi te ndama, o empuruo o enkimerlel e nkima te nkewarie, amu ore te shumata naa kelo atii enkitushurata o lng'obor." 
Isaiah4:6 Keaku ninye oloip te ndama te nkaraki enkirowuaj, o te nkaraki sii enesaruni o enelutori te nkaraki olkutati o enchan." 
Isaiah5:1 Ntasho mataranyaki nanu olanyor lai osinkolio le nyorrata oipirta enkurma enye oo sabibu: eeta apa ilo lanyor enkurma oo sabibu te ndoinyo sidai enterit. 
Isaiah5:2 Etuturo ninye neiwuang'ie soito, neun isabibu ooshiluno; neshetu oltalet orripishoreki te mpolos e nkurma, neitobiru eneironyishoreki te ine; neton aanyu metoiu enkurma isabibu, kake isabibu le ntim etoiuo." 
Isaiah5:3 Ore naa, intae iloomanya Yerusalem o ltung'ana le Yuda, atoomono intae, enguanareki nanu o ina kurma ai oo sabibu." 
Isaiah5:4 Kainyoo nanu aitong'oro eitu aas te nkurma ai oo sabibu? Ore pee aanyu nanu metoiu ilng'anayio, kaainyo pee aa isabibu le ntim etoiuo?" 
Isaiah5:5 Ore naa taata kaaliki nanu enalo aitaas enkurma ai oo sabibu Kaiwuang'ie nanu enkikarrata enye, pee eidaikieki; naa kagil nanu isunta enyena pee eitunyori." 
Isaiah5:6 Kaitaa nanu ninye mijooni; meisampuni ae kata te ninye nemeturi naa kebulunye endiati o lkiku; naa kaitanap sii nkatampo pee meshaiki enchan ninye. 
Isaiah5:7 Amu ore ina kurma oo sabibu o Laitoriani loo lororani naa enkaji e Israel, ore lelo tung'ana le Yuda ninche enkurma natuunoki naitiship ninye; neing'oru ninye esipata, kake ng'ura, enkibukooroto osarge natii; neing'orua esupatisho, naa ng'ura, olkiyioi otii!" 
Isaiah5:8 Wooi ninche lelo ooruk nkajijik, lelo ooponiki ate ilchampai, o metaba anaa neishunye pooki wueji, nikintaae iyie oloton openy te mpolos e nkop." 
Isaiah5:9 Einosa Olaitoriani loo lororani olmumai aning'ito too nkiyiaa aainei: “Esipa kemijoonu nkajijik kumok, nena ajijik sidain sapuki nememanya." 
Isaiah5:10 Amu ore iyekai tomon oo lng'anayio naa iltuleta isiet ake eitayu le naisho oo sabibu ore enkikapu nabo oo lanterera naa emborei nabo empirbil ake entapa.” 
Isaiah5:11 Woi ninche lelo ooinyototo aayooki tadekenya, pee etum aakuet aatusujai inaishi naapi, lelo ootoni oleng o metaa kewarie o metaba anaa neidimu ninche enaisho!" 
Isaiah5:12 Neeta ninche nkinantani o nkai oo sinkolioitin, o ndulen, o naishi too siruai lenye; kake meshilaa ninche nkiaasin o Laitoriani, anaa edol ina siaai oo nkaik enyena." 
Isaiah5:13 Ore enkaraki ina kepuo iltung'ana laainei eyararoto te nkaraki emodai enye; kemut olameyu ilkituaak lenye, nemuta olorere lenye pooki te nkure." 
Isaiah5:14 Neaku eibung'a enemeneng'a esumash, netang'a enkutuk enye aitulus, ore enkitoo e Yerusalem o ilo orora lenye, naa kepuo aadoyio, olorora lenye, o ilo ong'idare." 
Isaiah5:15 Eirrugoki tung'ani aaing'orie enkop, neitadowuoki iltung'ana aayau kop, ore nkonyek e ilo oitokoos neitoborraki." 
Isaiah5:16 Kake ore Olaitoriani loo lororani, neitaaki kitok te sipata, ore Enkai Sinyati neitodolu kewan te sinyatisho te sipata." 
Isaiah5:17 Ore ilkuoo le kerra, nedaa anaa ilootii endaata enye, ore ilkuoo le kineji nedaa to lmuaate." 
Isaiah5:18 Woi ninche lelo ooyietu enkarruoisho too nkeenta e lejare, lelo ooyietu ng'ok anaa too nkeenta e ngarri," 
Isaiah5:19 lelo oojo: “Nchoo ninche eisarrisar, nchoo ninche eitasiooyo esiaai enye pee kitum iyiook aatodol; nchoo eyiolounoto e ilo Sinyati le Israel etaanu, naa nchoo ninye elotu, pee kitum iyiook aatayiolo!”" 
Isaiah5:20 Woi ninche lelo oojo entorroni eisidai nejo esidano entorroni, nepik enaimin erishata e wang'an, nepik ewang'an erishata e naimin, lelo oopik enduaran erishata e meloni nepik emeloni erishata e nduaran!" 
Isaiah5:21 Woi ninche lelo ooiteng'enuo too nkonyek enye maate, lelo ooitaa ate kalamasi!" 
Isaiah5:22 Woi ninche lelo oorup ate te neokieki enaisho, lelo arriyiak te nkitushulata oo naishi naapi," 
Isaiah5:23 lelo oo laaya olarruoni te nkaraki eropata, neoru ilo asipani esipata enye!" 
Isaiah5:24 Neaku, ore anaa enamut olng'ejep le nkima isuut, o anaa enaibung nkujit naatoito o lng'ejep le nkima, neijia etiu ntona enye, ketiu anaa entoki natong'ua apurda, ore te rishata naitapuku, netiu anaa enterit; enkaraki natanyaita ninche enkitanapata Olaitoriani loo lororani, netemenaitie ninche ororei le Ilo Sinyati le Israel." 
Isaiah5:25 Ore enkaraki ina eyupuyupo engoro o Laitoriani ti alo iltung'ana lenyena, neitorioyie ninye enkaina enye, aarare ninche neosh ninche, neikirikira oldoinyo; netiu mpopoki enye anaa suut too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa. Amu ore te kuna pooki meibooroyu engoro enye, neton ake eitoriori enkaina enye." 
Isaiah5:26 Neyuku ninye olosho olakua, neisulu ninye aipotu meetu aaing'uaa ineeiting'ie enkop; naa ng'ura, nekuetu te ngolon oleng!" 
Isaiah5:27 Meetae obo lenye onauru, meetae obo lenye orrorro, meetae oloimug neirura, meetae olololong'u enkimeita, nemedung'o enkeene e namuke enye;" 
Isaiah5:28 naa kepi mbaa enye, neteyietuoki nkai enye, negol iloisotok loo mbartan enye anaa soito, ore nkejek oo ng'arrin enye epuo anaa osiwuo." 
Isaiah5:29 Neikununo enkikurrukur enye anaa eno lng'atuny, neikurrukur ninche anaa ilkuoo loo lng'atunyo; keikurrukur ninche neibung'isho, neripaa ninche ina ng'ues naaibung'a, nemeetae ololo arrinyu." 
Isaiah5:30 Ore kenya te ina olong naa keikurrukurroki ninche nena naaibung'a, te nkikurrukur naaijo ene naiposha. Naa te neingor oltung'ani enkop, ng'ura, enaimin ake o osina; ore ewang'an neitomisimis nkatampo enyena." 
Isaiah6:1 Ore te ilo ari apa otuayie olaiguanani oji Usia, atoduaa nanu Olaitoriani etonita to lorika le nkitoo. Neilepieki ninye oleng. Ore olkila lenye neiput enkaji e Nkai." 
Isaiah6:2 Ore te shumata ninye neitashe iserafi. Neeta ake obo inaipuko ile. Ore are neimulumulie enkomom enye, ore are neimulumulie nkejek enyena, ore are nelotie tiaai." 
Isaiah6:3 Neipoto ake maate ejo: “Sinyati, Sinyati, Sinyati Olaitoriani loo lororani; eiputa enkop pooki enkitoo enye.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Neikirikira olkitamanyunoto le Nkaji e Nkai te nkaraki ina buakunoto, neiput ina aji empuruo." 
Isaiah6:5 Najo nanu: “Woi kewan ai! Amu aimina nanu; amu ara nanu oltung'ani loo nkirorot torrok; naton tiatua iltung'ana loo nkirorot torrok; amu etoduaa nkonyek aainei Olaiguanani, ilo Aitoriani loo lororani!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Nelotu obo le lelo serafi enatii, neibung'ita te nkaina enye enkukuo naishu, nayaua to lperere lo lasar." 
Isaiah6:7 Neiseyie enkutuk ai, nejo, “Ng'ura, eiseyie ena enkutuk ino; eiwuang'ieki entorroni ino, nikitapalakaki ing'ok inono.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Naning nanu oltoilo lo Laitoriani ejo, “Kaing'ae nanu airriwaa, naa kaing'ae olo te nkaraki iyiook?” Najo nanu, “Nele nanu! Irriwayioki.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Nejo ninye, “Shomo, tiaaki ele orere: ‘Ining'ining'i, kake miyiolouu; Idolidolo kake mimususu.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Iroshiyie iltauja le kulo tung'ana, nintiming'ana nkiyiaa enye, ninkeno nkonyek enye; pee medolisho too nkonyek enye, nemening'isho too nkiyiaa enye, neyiolou too ltauja lenye, neibelekenya pee eishiunyeki.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Naitoki nanu ajo, “Oi anu, Olaitoriani?” Nejo ninye: “O metaba anaa nemijoonu nkanas memanya toki, o nkajijik metii iltung'ana, ore enkop neliyioyu tukul," 
Isaiah6:12 neiwuang'ie Olaitoriani iltung'ana aitalamaa oleng, neaku ilmuaateni kumok te mpolos e nkop." 
Isaiah6:13 Ore hoo duoo ninye te neleku ematua nabo e tomon, keitokini aapejoo, ketiu ninye anaa enkobei o lchani onyaanyukie olng'aboli naing'uari eitashe, eidipaki aatuuroi.” Ilo antererai sinyati ninye ina obei." 
Isaiah7:1 Ore apa too nkolong'i e Ahas olayioni le Yotam, olayioni le Usia, olaiguanani le Yuda, nelotu Resin olaiguanani le Siria o Peka olyioni le Remalia, ilo aiguanani le Israel, Yerusalem pee eitainye olarrabal. Kake eitu ninche emir ninye." 
Isaiah7:2 Ore ake pee elikini enkaji e Daudi nchere, “Eibung'ate Siria o Efraim,” neikirikira oltau lenye o iltauja loo ltung'ana lenyena anaa ilkeek le ntim ookutita osiwuo." 
Isaiah7:3 Nejoki Olaitoriani Isaya, “Shomo tanang'are Ahas, iyie o Shearyashub olayioni lino, amu inang'arere ninye, te nkiting'oto o lkiperrata le nkare o lchorro le shumata, te wueji oo laitobirak loonkilani," 
Isaiah7:4 nijoki ninye, Terretenayu, ntirring'ayu, nimiureishoyu, nemishalu te nkaraki nena oben are e nkima netaa keimisiloo, te nkaraki engoro e Resin o Siria o layioni le Remalia." 
Isaiah7:5 Ore enkaraki naipirutua Siria, te nebo Efraim entorroni te nebo olayioni le Remalia, ejo," 
Isaiah7:6 ‘Maape iyiook aaitayunye Yuda olarrabal, nikinture ninye, nikisulie iyiook aaya, nikipik iyiook olayioni le Tabel metaa olaiguanani ti atua ninye,’" 
Isaiah7:7 nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Meitashe ina, nemeaku ae kata." 
Isaiah7:8 Amu ore entonata e Siria naa Dameski, ore entonata e Dameski naa Resin. (Ore te rishata oo larin ntomoni ile o imiet naa keitaae Efraim mpurdat o metaa meitoki aaku olorere.)" 
Isaiah7:9 Ore endukuya e Efraim naa Samaria, ore endukuya e Samaria naa olayioni le Remalia.” “Ti nimirukuruku, intae, meeta nchere pee ntasheito. ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Neitoki Olaitoriani airorie Ahas," 
Isaiah7:11 nejoki, “Ing'oru olmonekie to Laitoriani Enkai ino; nchoo egutu anaa enemeneng'a aashu eado abaiki keper.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Kake etejo Ahas, “Maikilikuanu nanu, nematem nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Neitoki Isaya ajo, “Toning'o naa, na aji e Daudi! Kentoki nalelek ena pee intanaururu intae iltung'ana, nintokiki sii aaitanaur Enkai ai?" 
Isaiah7:14 Ore naa Olaitoriani makewan oisho intae olmonekie. Ng'ura, kenutayu eselenkei neiu enkayioni naa keisho ninye enkarna aajo Emanuel." 
Isaiah7:15 Naa keaku ninye neinos eng'orno o enaisho, te neyiolou atirisha intorrok o supati." 
Isaiah7:16 Amu ore eton eitu eyiolou ina kerai atanya entorroni negelu ina sidai, ore ina kop e lelo aiguanak pookira oare ooiture intae, naa kepuoi aaing'uaa." 
Isaiah7:17 Keyau Olaitoriani shumata iyie, o shumata iltung'ana linyi, o shumata e nkaji e papaai lino nkolong'i neitu ae kata etumi ina olong apa nalo Efraim te Yuda - ilo aiguanani le Asiria.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Ore kenya te ina olong naa keipotu Olaitoriani te nkisulata lelo oopuonu anaa lojong'a ooing'uaa nchorroi e Misiri o ilo olotu anaa olotoroki oing'uaa enkop e Asiria. 
Isaiah7:19 Naa kepuonu ninche pooki nemany ineegum oo erat, o nkapuniaa oo ndapidapo, o sanagi pooki loo lkiku, o wuejitin pooki neenyori." 
Isaiah7:20 Ore kenya te ina olong naa kelo Olaitoriani abarnisho to lmurunya oisilenuoki te lido kekun o lkeju - to laiguanani le Asiria. Nebarn endukuya o lpapit loo nkejek enye, nebarn sii olmunyei tukul." 
Isaiah7:21 Ore akenya te ina olong naa keramat oltung'ani enkashe o nkerra are; 
Isaiah7:22 naa ore enkaraki enkumoi e kule naata ninche, keinos ninye eng'orno; amu ore pooki ng'ae otelekua te ina kop naa keinos eng'orno o enaisho." 
Isaiah7:23 Ore kenya te ina olong pooki wueji netii apa isabibu enkalifu nabo oata enkinyang'a e shekeli enkalifu nabo enkosholai, naa keaku entim oo lkiku." 
Isaiah7:24 Kepuonu iltung'ana ine eeta nkai o mbaa amu keaku enkop pooki entim oo lkiku; 
Isaiah7:25 ore nena doinyo apa naaturi too nchempei nimintokiki intae aapuonu ine iurere entim oo lkiku; kake keaku nene wuejitin ineeidapashakino nkishu o nkerra. 
Isaiah8:1 Naaitoki Olaitoriani ajoki nanu, “Iwa embao dapash ngero too sirat sapuki, ‘Ene Maher-shalal-hash-bas.’ ”" 
Isaiah8:2 Natum nanu olchakeni osipa, Uria ilo apolosani o Sakaria olayioni le Yeberekia, pee aaishakenoki." 
Isaiah8:3 Nalo nanu aboitare enkitok ai, nenutayu ninye neiu enkayioni. Naaitoki nanu Olaitoriani ajoki, “Tejo enkarna e ina ayioni Maher-shalal-hash-bas;" 
Isaiah8:4 amu ore eton eitu eyiolou ina kerai atejo ‘Mpapa’ aashu ‘Nini’, ore ina arsisisho e Dameski o nena apa naatarutua Samaria naa keyae eduaaya olaiguanani le Asiria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Naaitoki nanu Olaitoriani airorie, naajoki," 
Isaiah8:6 “Ore enkaraki natanyaita ele orere nkariak e Shiloa naaruko akiti, netalepori ninche eure Resin olayioni le Remalia;" 
Isaiah8:7 ore enkaraki ina kerewaki Olaitoriani aitaar ninche nkariak o Lkeju, kumok negol, ilo aiguanani le Asiria o enkitoo enye pooki; naa kenang'ari ninche aaimu imartin nepuo aaim mbat o lkeju." 
Isaiah8:8 Naa keor nena ariak Yuda, nenang'ari neruko aapuo, neitabaiki olorere murto. Naa te nelak inaipuko enyena neibulu enkop ino pooki, iyie Emanuel.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Entigilata intae oreren niureishoyuyu; entoning intae na kuapi naalakua; enterreten ate niruturutu. 
Isaiah8:10 Enguanata te nebo, kake meaku ina toki; eimaki ororei kake melo auno, amu etii Enkai te nebo iyiook." 
Isaiah8:11 Amu nji eiroro Olaitoriani ajoki, eiteleikia ina aina enye nagol shumata nanu, naaikok pee maibung orrekie le kulo tung'ana, ajoki:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Mijo iyie nena kitobirat torrok, nena pooki naajo kulo tung'ana nkitobirat torrok, nimiureyu iyie ina naure ninche, nimimputukuny." 
Isaiah8:13 Kake ore Olaitoriani loo lororani, ninye ake intaa sinyati, nchoo eaku ninye iure, nchoo eaku ninye oloputukunyi lino." 
Isaiah8:14 Naa keaku ninye ewueji sinyati, neaku osoit oluaa, neaku endapidapoi e rrorroto too nkajijik pokira e Israel. Neaku eloket o rreshet te lelo oomanya Yerusalem." 
Isaiah8:15 Naa kerrorrokino ilkumok enchumata enye, nebatata negila, nerreshi ninche neyae.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Teena ina shakenisho, entimishir ina kiteng'enare ti atua ilooiteng'eni laainei." 
Isaiah8:17 Kaanyu nanu Olaitoriani, laa ninye oisudoo enkomom enye aitung'uaa enkaji e Yakobo, naa kaisilig ninye." 
Isaiah8:18 Ng'ura, ore nanu o kuna kera naaishoo Olaitoriani nikira iyiook olmonekie o embae e nking'asia ti atua Israel, eing'uaa Olaitoriani loo lororani obik te nchumata oldoinyo le Sion." 
Isaiah8:19 Naa tenejoki ninche intae, “Enkilikuanishore ilaitumusumusok o lasakutok ooing'oming'om neyietu,” aimeikilikuanishore iltung'ana Enkai enye? Ke lootuata ninche eikilikuanishore te rishata oo looishu?" 
Isaiah8:20 Tawaliki ninche, tiaki, “Entoning ina naiteng'en intae Olaitoriani! Emining ilaitumusumusok - ore enajoki ninche intae nemeret intae.”" 
Isaiah8:21 Naa kepuo ninche aadung enkop, eeta osina kitok o esumash; naa ore te neisumashu, negoro nedek olaiguanani lenye o Enkai enye, nedumu nkomomi enye aaing'orie shumata;" 
Isaiah8:22 neitoki aaing'or enkop, kake ng'ura, osina ake o enaimin, ina misimisi o sina. Naa kenang'akini ninche atua enaimin narok ong'u." 
Isaiah9:1 Kake meetae osina te ina apa naata emion. Ore too nkatitin e dukuya neishoo ninye metemenare enkop e Sebulon o enkop e Naftali, kake ore too nkolong'i e siadi naa keisho ninye meitaai kitok ina oitoi e naiposha, ina kop natii lido kekun le Yordan, Galilaya oo loreren." 
Isaiah9:2 Ore lelo tung'ana apa oopuo te naimin netoduaa ewang'an kitok; ore apa lelo oomanya enegut e misimisi, neitawang'aka ninche ewang'an." 
Isaiah9:3 Itoponayie iyie olorere itoponikia iyie eng'ida enye; neng'ida ninche te dukuya iyie te ng'ida neeijo ene nkisampuare, neikununo anaa tene ng'ida lewa eor nena naataarutua." 
Isaiah9:4 Amu ore ina shata e murt e ilo ola lenye, o ina shata o loililai lenye, ina ng'udi e ilo aitorogonyani, nitigila iyie anaa te nkata e Midian." 
Isaiah9:5 Amu ore enamuke ake pooki e ilo otii enjore naa kemut enkima, ore pooki kila oata oltipoti lo sarge naa kepejori anaa ilkeek le nkima." 
Isaiah9:6 Amu etoikioki iyiook enkerai, eishooki iyiook enkayioni, naa keaku oloililai lenye etii enkitoria, naa kepuoi aajo enkarna enye, “Olaiguanani le Nking'asia, Enkai Magilani, Papa loo Ntarasi, Olkitok le Seriani.”" 
Isaiah9:7 Ore emponaroto e nkitoria enye o eseriani, nemeeta enkiting'oto, to lorika le nkitoo le Daudi, o te shumata enkitoo enye, pee eitubulaa, neitasheyie te sipata o te supatisho, ebaiki ena kata taata oo ntarasi moitie. Olokiyo lo Laitoriani loo lororani oitabaya ena." 
Isaiah9:8 Eirriwayie Olaitoriani olkilikuai lo larrabal te nkaraki Yakobo, naa kelo aitawang'aki Israel." 
Isaiah9:9 Naa kepuo iltung'ana pooki aayiolou, aa taa, Efraim o lelo oomanya Samaria, lelo oojo to lwuasa o te nkitokoos oo ltauja:" 
Isaiah9:10 “Etusulari isoito kake eikishet iyiook too soito oogueta; eturoyioki oreteti aadung, kake eikipik iyiook iltarakua erishata enye.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Neaku kedumaki ninche Olaitoriani ilmang'ati, neputu ilmang'ati lenye." 
Isaiah9:12 Ore lelo le Siria ootii enkalo o loo saen o lelo le Filisti ootii enkalo o loo ntoluo, kepuo aamut te nkutuk nang'a. Amu ore te kuna pooki eitu eiwuang'ieki engoro enye neitorioyioki enkaina enye." 
Isaiah9:13 Eitu eibelekenyakino iltung'ana ilo otoosho ninche, neitu eing'oru Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Isaiah9:14 Ore enkaraki ina etudung'oyie Olaitoriani te Israel endukuya o lkidong'oi; nedung ilng'osil loo ltuka o seyia te nkolong nabo - 
Isaiah9:15 lelo payiani kituaak ooyanyit ninche endukuya, ore ilo oiboni oibonisho te lejare ninye olkidong'oe;" 
Isaiah9:16 amu ore lelo oorikoo ele orere naa keitapong'oo ninche, ore lelo oorikori naa keijori." 
Isaiah9:17 Ore enkaraki ina meshipakino Olaitoriani elelero enye, nemeetayie olng'ur lelo okishin o nkolia; amu ore pooki ng'ae lenye nepaashare orrekie le Nkai naa laasak loo ntorrok, ore pooki kutuk neiro ine modai. Ore te kuna pooki neitu eiwuang'ieki engoro enye neitorioki enkaina enye." 
Isaiah9:18 Amu eyupuyupito entorroni anaa enkima, neinos isuut o lkiku; neinos isanagi le ntim, neilep ninche shumata te mpuruo kitok." 
Isaiah9:19 Ti atua engoro o Laitoriani loo lororani etapejoki enkop, netotiutuo iltung'ana anaa ilkeek le nkima; meetae oltung'ani oing'urrie olalashe lenye." 
Isaiah9:20 Ewuapaa ninche too ntateniaa, neton ake eisumash, nedaa ninche too nkedienyaa, kake eitu eraposho; neinos ake oltung'ani nkiri e ilo le latia enye." 
Isaiah9:21 Neinos Manase Efraim, neinos Efraim Manase, ore ninche pokira nedumakino Yuda. Ore te kuna pooki neitu eiwuang'ieki engoro enye, Neitorioki enkaina enye." 
Isaiah10:1 Woi ninche lelo ooiguana nkiguanat torrok, o lelo ooiger enkitorogonyare," 
Isaiah10:2 neibelekeny ilo omena aaitapaash esipata neoru ilo aisinani loo ltung'ana laainei esipata enye, neitaa ninche nkolia entoki nataarutua, netum aaibung'a nena okishin aawaita!" 
Isaiah10:3 Kaa kenya intae iasiasa te ina olong e nkitamioto, te ilo kutati olotu eing'uaa enelakua? Kaing'ae iyie isaru mikitaretu, naa kaing'ae iyie ing'ueiki karsisisho ino?" 
Isaiah10:4 Meleku toki, meteleku ake pee isukudo te nebo lelo ooena, aashu ibatata te nebo lelo ootasesekuanaki. Amu ore te kuna pooki eitu eiwuang'ieki engoro enye neton ake etudumuaki enkaina enye pee eoshisho." 
Isaiah10:5 Ee, Asiria, ninye eng'udi e ngoro ai, ninye orinka le mpijan e ngoro ai!" 
Isaiah10:6 Airriua nanu metaarare ilo osho lemeure Enkai, naitanapa nanu ninye te nkaraki ilo orere laaitagoro, pee eibung aaraya ntokitin enye, neitunyoki enkop anaa esarng'ab e nkoitoi." 
Isaiah10:7 Kake mme ina eyieu ninye, neme ina edamu ninye; kake ore ndamunot enyena naa pee einyalisho, nedung'oo iloshon leme kuti;" 
Isaiah10:8 amu ejo ninye: “Aime ilaiguanak pooki ilarikok laainei? 
Isaiah10:9 Aimetiu kulo anaa Karkemish? Aimetiu Hamat anaa Arpad? Aimetiu Samaria anaa Dameski? 
Isaiah10:10 Amaa anaa enatabaikia enkaina ai nkitoriat oo nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin, naa ore nkitanyaanyukot enye naaguetuno naa eikituaak aalang nena naatii Yerusalem o Samaria," 
Isaiah10:11 aimaitaas nanu Yerusalem o nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enyena anaa enaitaasa Samaria o nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enyena.” 
Isaiah10:12 Ore ake pee eidip Olaitoriani esiaai enye pooki to ldoinyo le Sion o te Yerusalem, naa keitame ilo owuasa o ina kitokoos o laiguanani le Siria o ina kitaragirag enye." 
Isaiah10:13 Amu ejo Ninye: “Te ngolon e nkaina ai ataasa nanu ena, o te ng'eno ai, amu kara nanu ng'en; naiwuang'ie nanu lpolosien loo loreren, natarayie nanu ilchumat lenye; ore anaa oloing'oni atusulua nanu lelo ootoni too lorikan le nkitoo." 
Isaiah10:14 Eibung'a enkaina anaa enkaji e motonyi karsisisho oo loreren; naa ore anaa enasotu iltung'ana ilmosor ootung'uayioki, neijia aikuna asotu enkop pooki; nemeetae hoo obo oiwuang'ie enaipukoi, aashu obol enkutuk, aashu eyietu.”" 
Isaiah10:15 Keaku entolu kitok alang ilo oasishore, arashu keisis emusumeno kewan te ilo odung'ishore? Eji netiu anaa eng'udi nadumu oltung'ani! Anaa netiu anaa eng'udi nadumu ilo leme enchata." 
Isaiah10:16 Ore enkaraki ina, ore Olaitoriani, ilo Aitoriani loo lororani, kelo airriwaki esaso lelo morran lenyena oopir, ore ti abori enkitoo enye neinoki enkiyupuyup, neeijo enkiyupuyup e nkima." 
Isaiah10:17 Ore ina wang'an e Israel naa keaku enkima, ore ilo lenye sinyati neaku olng'ejep le nkima, naa keinos ninye nemut lelo kiku lenyena o suut pooki te nkolong nabo." 
Isaiah10:18 Ore ina kishiaa e ntim enye o ene ina kop enye nalepo, naa keidakie Olaitoriani, osesen o enkishui, netiu anaa oltung'ani omuei te nemenayu." 
Isaiah10:19 Ore olpisiai le lelo keek lenyena ooleku naa keaku kuti, o metaa ninye keidim enkerai aikena." 
Isaiah10:20 Ore kenya te ina olong ilo pisiai le Israel o lelo oolekuni le nkaji e Yakobo, nemeitoki aairishakino ilo apa otaara ninche, kake Olaitoriani eirishakino ninche. Ilo sinyati le Israel eirishakino te sipata." 
Isaiah10:21 Olpisiai olo arrinyunye, ilo pisiai le Yakobo orrinyokino Enkai magilani." 
Isaiah10:22 Amu ore hoo neba iltung'ana linono le Israel anaa osinyai le naiposha olpisiai ake lenye orrinyunye. Etudung'okoki enkiguana e nkidaata te sipata. 
Isaiah10:23 Amu ore Olaitoriani loo lororani naa kelo aiting'ie anaa enatudung'oki ti atua enkop pooki. 
Isaiah10:24 Ore enkaraki ina nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo Aitoriani loo lororani: “Lo tung'ana laainei, kulo oomanya Sion, emiureyu ile Asiria te neoshisho te ng'udi aashu te nedumu orinka lenye aar intae anaa apa enaikuna ile Misiri." 
Isaiah10:25 Amu ore te nkiti rishata naa keish engoro ai, neibelekenyakino engoro ai enkidaata enye." 
Isaiah10:26 Nedumu Olaitoriani loo lororani eng'udi agilunore ninche anaa apa pee eosh Midian te ndapidapoi e Oreb. Ore eng'udi enye kelo shumata enaiposha, naa kedumu ninye anaa apa enaikuna te Misiri." 
Isaiah10:27 Ore te ina te neiwuang'a ilo ola lenye to loililai lino, negili ina shata enye emurt nanapishoreki te murt ino.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Eilepa ninye alo Rimon, eewuo ninye Aiat; etudung'o ninye enkop e Migron, ore te Mikmash neshum ninye olola lenye;" 
Isaiah10:29 etalang'a ninche te lang'ata, neirrag Geba enkewarie nabo, neikirikira Rama, ore Gibea e Saul neilanyisho." 
Isaiah10:30 Teyietu nchira, na tito e Galim! Entoning lo tung'ana le Laisha! Tawaliki ninye, iyie, Anatot!" 
Isaiah10:31 Eisikita Madmena, ore lelo oomanya Gebin neilanyishote aaing'oru enesaru." 
Isaiah10:32 Ore ena olong kelo ninye aitashe te Nobu, nelo aikirikirie enkaina enye te ilo doinyo le nkidaata le Sion, te ilo doinyo le Yerusalem." 
Isaiah10:33 Ng'ura ore Olaitoriani, ilo Aitoriani loo lororani, kedung lelo ng'osil te ngolon naitureisho; ore ilo magilani oado naa kedung'i, ore lelo oorup ate neitadouni." 
Isaiah10:34 Kedung ninye ina asuri e ntim te ntolu, ore Lebanon o lelo keek lenyena sidain neurori." 
Isaiah11:1 Kepuku enkaitubului te nkobei e Yese, nebulu olng'osila te nena tona enyena." 
Isaiah11:2 Naa ketonie Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata ninye, enkiyang'et e ng'eno o enkarriyiano, enkiyang'et e utaroto o enkidimata, enkiyang'et e ng'eno o euriata o Laitoriani." 
Isaiah11:3 Ore enchipai enye naa euriata o Laitoriani. Nemedung ninye enkiguana too naadol nkonyek enyena, aashu edung too naaning too nkiyiaa enyena;" 
Isaiah11:4 kake too sipat ninye eiguanare laisinak, neikok ninye te mborron lelo oobor ootii enkop; naa kear ninye enkop te ng'udi e nkutuk enye, near ilo arruoni metua te nkiyang'et e nkutuk enye." 
Isaiah11:5 Esipata ninye naaku enkimeita e mpolos enye, naa ina kisiligata naisiligayu ninye naaku enkeene narreten ninye." 
Isaiah11:6 Neton osuyiani te nebo olkuoo le ker, neirrag olowuaru keri te nebo olkuoo le kine, ore olashe o lng'atuny neirrag te nebo nerikoo enkiti kerai ninche." 
Isaiah11:7 Ore enkiteng olng'arurumi ng'iro nedaa te nebo; ore lasho lenye neirrag te nebo, ore olng'atuny neaku nkujit einos anaa olkiteng." 
Isaiah11:8 Neiguran enkerai nanakita te nkutuk e ngumoto o lasurai, nepik enkerai kiti enkaina enye enkutuk e engumoto e nturbubua." 
Isaiah11:9 Meiko ninche ae nemeinyal ti atua ilo doinyo lai pooki sinyati; amu keiput enkop eyiolounoto o Laitoriani, anaa enaiputa nkariak enaiposha." 
Isaiah11:10 Ore kenya te ina olong naa keitashe entonai e Yese anaa enkitoduaaroto too loreren; keaku ninye eing'oru loreren, ore emanyisho enye neaku ewueji e nkitoo." 
Isaiah11:11 Ore kenya te ina naa keitorioo Olaitoriani enkaina enye aigil eni are, pee errinyu ilo pisiai apa otelekua loo ltung'ana lenyena, aitung'uaa Asiria, o Misiri, o Patros, o Etiopia, o Elam, o Shina, o Hamat, neitung'uaa sii olomanaa le naiposha." 
Isaiah11:12 Naa kedumaki ninye nkuapi olmonekie pee eiturrurru lelo apa ooidapashari le Israel, neiturrur lelo ooidapashari le Yuda meetu aaing'uaa ilubot pokira oong'uan e nkop." 
Isaiah11:13 Keiwuang ilo lom le Efraim, ore lelo ooiture Yuda neiwuang'ieki; meigil Efraim aatayie olom Yuda, nemeigil Yuda aiture Efraim." 
Isaiah11:14 Naa keor ninche ebaiki oloililai loo filisti te nkalo o loo ntoluo, neibung'a ninche te nebo aaidaikie iltung'ana lo loosaen. Nepik ninche nkaik enye enkop e Edom o Moab, ore ile Amon neiruk ninche." 
Isaiah11:15 Naa keishie Olaitoriani katukul olkina le naiposha e Misiri; naa keyuk ninye enkaina enye te shumata olkeju, te ilo kutati lenye opejisho, naa keosh ninye aitaa inong'ot naapishana pee eim iltung'ana anaa enkop natoyio." 
Isaiah11:16 Naa keaku keetae enkoitoi kitok naing'uaa Asiria, te nkaraki ilo pisiai otelekuaki loo ltung'ana lenyena, ina kata apa pee epuonu ninche eing'uaa enkop e Misiri." 
Isaiah12:1 Eilo kenya iyie ajo te ina olong: “Kaaisho nanu iyie enashe, Olaitoriani, amu ore hoo nikitagorokine iyie nanu, neibelekenye engoro ino, nikintagolo iyie nanu." 
Isaiah12:2 Ng'ura, Olaitoriani ninye enjeunoto ai; kaisilig nanu ninye, nemaureishoyu; amu Olaitoriani Enkai ninye engolon ai o sinkolio lai, netaa ninye enjeunoto ai.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Ore te ng'ida nilo iyie aoku enkare naig'uaa lelo shorroi le njeunoto. 
Isaiah12:4 Nilo iyie ajo te ina olong: “Enchoo Olaitoriani enashe, empoto enkarna enye, embalunye nkiaasin enyena too loreren, embalunye nchere eikitok enkarna enye." 
Isaiah12:5 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani te nkisisa, amu etaasa ninye ine nkitoo; nchoo eyiolouni kuna ti atua enkop pooki." 
Isaiah12:6 Entabuaku entarany te ng'ida, intae iloomanya Sion, amu eikitok ilo otii atua intae, Ilo Osinya le Israel.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Olkilikuai oipirta Babilon apa otabolokoki Isaya olayioni le Amos. 
Isaiah13:1 Olkilikuai oipirta Babilon apa otabolokoki Isaya olayioni le Amos. 
Isaiah13:2 Ore te nchumata e ndoinyo naisiaja tudumu olmonekie tabuaku nchiraki ninche; iyuku ninche te nkaina metijing'u nena shomito oo lkituaak. 
Isaiah13:3 Aitanapa nanu makewan lelo gelunot laainei, aipotuo nanu lelo tung'ana laainei magil, pee eitalaku engoro ai, te lelo latagorokine." 
Isaiah13:4 Toning'o, embuakunoto too ldoinyo eba anaa eno lorora kitok! Toning'o, embuakunoto oo nkitoriat, e lelo oshon oosoto te nebo! Olaitoriani loo lororani oitobirita olarrabal." 
Isaiah13:5 Kepuonu ninche eing'uaa enkop nalakua, eing'uaa enkiting'oto e keper, nelotu Olaitoriani eeta iruparen enyena pee eidaikie enkop pooki." 
Isaiah13:6 Enteyietu enchira amu etataana enkolong o Laitoriani; pee elotu ina kidaata naing'uaa olmagilani! 
Isaiah13:7 Ore enkaraki ina kelepori nkaik pooki, neiropijaa empijan e pooki tung'ani." 
Isaiah13:8 Naa keiputukuny ninche. Nejing ninche emion naikununo anaa ene nkitok nasaisai. Neing'ura ninche maate to lkirutoto; neiput enkurruna nkomomi enye. 
Isaiah13:9 Ng'ura, kelotu enkolong o Laitoriani, ina olong torrono engoro, o empijan e mpushuna, pee eitaa enkop olmuaate neidaikie lelo aing'okok lenyena aishie." 
Isaiah13:10 Amu ore ilakir le keper, nemeitoki aaishoru ewang'an enye; nemisimisu enkolong eilepu nemeitoki olapa aitawang'isho te wang'an enye." 
Isaiah13:11 Kaitame nanu enkop te nkaraki eng'oki enye, naitame lelo arruok te nkaraki enkarruoisho enye; kaiting'ie nanu ilo wuasa le lelo ooitokoos, naitadou nanu olwuasa le lelo ooing'ola." 
Isaiah13:12 Kaitaa nanu iltung'ana iloodoorieki anaa sahabu nasila netiu iltung'ana anaa sahabu e Ofir. 
Isaiah13:13 Ore enkaraki ina kaikirikirie nanu keper, neigusugusieki enkop te ine wueji enye, te ina goro o Laitoriani loo lororani te ina olong e ngoro enye napi." 
Isaiah13:14 Ore anaa entarakuet narreshitoi, aashu anaa nkerra nemeetae oltung'ani oiturrur, keibelekenyakino ake oltung'ani olorere lenye, neisik ake oltung'ani alo enkop enye." 
Isaiah13:15 Ore oloba anaa oloinepuni neari metua; ore oloba anaa oloibung'i nebatata to lalem. 
Isaiah13:16 Ore nkera enye kutiti naa kedung'udung'i te dukuya nkonyek enye, keibung'i nkajijik enye, ore nkituaak enye neikonyi." 
Isaiah13:17 Ng'ura, kaputu nanu lelo le Amedi metarasaki ninche, lelo lemeshilaa enkosholai; nemeshipakino sahabu." 
Isaiah13:18 Nkai enye naar ilbarnot metuata; nemeing'urrie ninche ina natii enkoshoke e ng'otonye; ore nkonyek enye nemeeta olng'ur too nkera kutiti. 
Isaiah13:19 Ore Babilon, ina kitoo oo nkitoriat, ina kishiaa nawuasare Ilkaldayo, nelo atiu anaa Sodom o Gomora ina kata te nenang'aa Enkai ninche." 
Isaiah13:20 Meigili ae kata aamany ninye aashu aatoni ti atua ninye too ishoritin pooki; meetae Olmarabui oigil aun olng'obor lenye te ine; nemeetae ilairritak loo ntare ooigil aairragie nkerrai enye te ine. 
Isaiah13:21 Kake ing'uesi e ntim naapuo aairrag te ine, ore inkajijik enye neiput nkeenta enkop; nemany isidan ine, neitigiran ntarakueti te ine." 
Isaiah13:22 Nekueni ilng'ojiniaa too ltaleta lenyena, nebuaku mbariak too nkajijik sidain e nkitoo; etataana ina kata enye, nemeimutieki nena olong'i enyena." 
Isaiah14:1 Keing'urrie Olaitoriani Yakobo naa keitoki ninye agelu Israel, nepik ninche atua enkop enye. Naa kepuonu iltung'ana loo loreren aashulare ninche neidikidikore enkaji e Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Naa kepuonu iltung'ana aaya ninche neriku ninche ewueji enye. Ore ina aji e Israel neng'amaa ninche te nkaina o Laitoriani aa rrindiki lewa o ng'oruo. Neya ninche aaraya lelo apa ootaaraitie ninche, neitore ninche lelo apa ooibooki ninche enkop." 
Isaiah14:3 Ore kenya te ina kata nikilo Olaitoriani aisho enkiyagata te ina mion o to sina lino, o te ina kisiaayiare nikitipikaki isiaaisho," 
Isaiah14:4 teyietai olaiguanani le Babilon. Tejo: “Eng'ura eiting'ieki ilo apa aitorogonyani, eng'ura eiting'ieki enkisikong'are!" 
Isaiah14:5 Etigila Olaitoriani eng'udi eilo torrono, ina ng'udi e nkitoo oo looitoreisho," 
Isaiah14:6 ilo apa otoosho iltung'ana te ngoro te nena oshot nemeish, ilo apa oitoria iloshon te ngoro o to losilisili metii olng'ur." 
Isaiah14:7 Eitirring'e enkop pooki neyagaa; neranyisho ninche. 
Isaiah14:8 Kiting'idakinote iyie ilkeek laaijo iltarakua ore lelo tarakua le Lebanon, nejo, ‘Ore ebaiki ina kata apa nikirragieki aaitadou, meetae oladung'oni loo lkeek olotu adung.’" 
Isaiah14:9 Etudumunye enemeneng'a to lodo le nkop pee kinang'are te nilotu, etudumua ninye iloipi pee kiroroki iyie, ee, lelo pooki oora ilarikok le nkop; etudumunye too lorikan lenye le nkitoo le lelo apa oora ilaiguanak loo loshon." 
Isaiah14:10 Eikirorie ninche pooki iyie aajoki, ‘Itashala sii iyie anaa iyiook! Itanyaanyukie sii iyie iyiook!’" 
Isaiah14:11 Eitadoyioki enkishiaa ino aaya enemeneng'a, ina orui oo nkinantani inono; eisalaashaki aatadoyio abori iyie, ore ilkuru nikimulumul iyie." 
Isaiah14:12 “Kaji iyie inkuna pee itusulunye te keper iyie lo Akira le Nkakenya, enkerai Enkakenya! Ng'ura ajo kitudung'oki aapudaki enkop, iyie olapa oitadowuo iloreren kop!" 
Isaiah14:13 Itejo apa iyie to ltau lino, ‘Kailep alo keper; te idia alo ilakir le Nkai kapik olorika lai le nkitoo shumata oleng; katon nanu to ldoinyo le umata te nelakua te nkalo e moikuape;" 
Isaiah14:14 kailep nanu alo te idia alo nkatampo, kaitotiu nanu kewan anaa Ilo Otii Shumata aisul.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Kake kintadouoki aayau enemeneng'a, nenen neegut e nemenenga eululu." 
Isaiah14:16 Ore lelo likidol iyie nikishumaki nkonyek, nikiimaki iyie, ejo: ‘Kele tung'ani apa oikirikirie enkop, neigusugusie nkitoriat," 
Isaiah14:17 oitaa enkop olpurkel neibelekeny nkanas enyena, neitu eisho lelo ooena meshomo ang?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Ore lelo aiguanak pooki loo loreren neirrag te nkitoo, olaiguanani ake ti atua enkurare enye." 
Isaiah14:19 Kake kitanang'ayioki iyie aaiturraa, aaitalam enkurare ino, anaa enkaitubului nemeyieuni, neitemori too mpopoki e lelo ootuata, te lelo ootaaraki to lalem, lelo oosulakino isoito le ululu, anaa empopok naitunyi too nkejek." 
Isaiah14:20 Mikinukari iyie aaitaboitaki ninche enkaraki nindaikie enkop ino, itara iyie iltung'ana linono metuata. Ore eishoi e lelo aasak loo ntorrok, nchoo eaku meigili ai kata aaipot!." 
Isaiah14:21 Entobira esesekuanata oo layiok lenyena te nkaraki entorroni oo loo menye, pee mebul ake neibung enkop, neiput oriong enkop nkanas.”" 
Isaiah14:22 “Kadumunye nanu aitayunye ninche olarrabal,” Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, “naa kaiwuang'ie nanu te Babilon enkarna o lpisiai, olmarei, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah14:23 Naa kaitaa nanu ina kop emanyisho oo lkirrumun, naitaa ilturot le nkare, naa kaor nanu te oret e nkidaata, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Einosa Olaitoriani loo lororani olmumai: “Ore anaa enaitobira nanu, neijia elo atiu, naa ore anaa enatudung'o, neijia etiu keunoyu," 
Isaiah14:25 nchere kalo nanu agil ilo le Asiria ti atua enkop ai, ore te shumata lelo doinyo laainei naitunyoki nanu ninye enkop too nkejek; ore ina shata enye oo murto neiwuang'a te ninche, o ilo ola lenye otii oloililai.”" 
Isaiah14:26 Ena ninye ina yieunoto natuutuaki eipirta enkop pooki; naa ena ninye ina aina naitorioyioki te shumata iloshon pooki. 
Isaiah14:27 Amu etuutua Olaitoriani loo lororani, naa aing'ae oiwuang'ie ina? Eitorioyioki enkaina enye, naa aing'ae oshuk?" 
Isaiah14:28 Ore apa te ilo ari otanang'a olaiguanani Ahas, nelotu ele kilikuai ojo," 
Isaiah14:29 “Ming'ida iyie Filistia, o intae pooki, eji nchere, etigile ina ng'udi apa natoosho intae; amu te eishoi o lasurai epuku olasurai torrono aisul, ore olng'anayioi lenye naa olasurai olo tiaai." 
Isaiah14:30 Ore ilo kikau lo laisinani nedaa, ore ilo oata osina neirrag te seriani; kake kamut nanu entonai eishoi ino to lameyu, ore ilo pisiai lino naar nanu to lalem." 
Isaiah14:31 Teyietu, na kishomi; nchira, na anasa; talepori to lkirutoto, iyie Filistia, intae pooki! Amu kelotu empuruo eimu moikuape, nemeetae oloisiadu to ltim lenye.”" 
Isaiah14:32 Kainyoo ewaliki oltung'ani olkilikuai loo loshon? “Olaitoriani oitobirua Sion, naa ore ti atua ninye netum lelo tung'ana lenyena apa ooisilisiloki esarunoto.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Olkilikuai oipirta Moab. Enkaraki naitomijoonoki enkanasa e Aar te ina kewarie apa naishieki Moab; o enkaraki naitomijoonoki enkanasa e Kir, te ina kewarie apa, naishieki Moab." 
Isaiah15:2 Eshomo ina tito e Dibon iwuejitin neeika aishir; aishiraki Nebo neishiraki Medeba, eishirita Moab. Etabarnoki lukuny enye o lmunyo lenye," 
Isaiah15:3 ore too nkoitoi neishopo ilkuniyiani; ore too nchumat oo nkajijik o too nkisiajat eishirita pooki ng'ae netashala too lkiyio. 
Isaiah15:4 Eishirita Heshbon o Eleale, etoning'e oltoilo le nkishirata enye te Yahas; ore enkaraki ina keishir lelo lewa le Moab oata ruparen aabuaku; Eikirikire oltau lenye." 
Isaiah15:5 Eishirita oltau lai te nkaraki Moab; ekuetikitia lelo aisikak lenyena Soar, eshomo Eglat-shelishia. Amu ore eilepaki Luhit, nepuo ninche eishir, ore eimita ina oitoi nalo Horonaim neyietu enkishirata e nkidaaroto;" 
Isaiah15:6 etoito nchorroi e Nimrim; netoito nkujit nemeetae inaabulu, meekure eetae nkaitubulu." 
Isaiah15:7 Ore enkaraki ina, ore nena tokitin kumok apa naanoto ninche, o nena apa naatushuma ninche, keyae ninche aaitalang nchorroi o seyiai." 
Isaiah15:8 Amu eshomo olkiyioi, aibulu enkop e Moab; etabaikia enkishirata Eglaim, etabaikia enkishirata Beerelim." 
Isaiah15:9 Amu eiputa nkariak e Dibon osarge, ore ake eyia, kaitoki nanu ayau shumata Dibon aitulusoo, kesuj olng'atuny lelo ooisik le Moab, o ilo pisiai oleku le ina kop." 
Isaiah16:1 Eirriwakitia ninche ilkuoo le kerra ilo oitore enkop, eing'uaa Sela eimunye ina oitoi o lpurkel, aayau ilo doinyo le ntito e Sion." 
Isaiah16:2 Etotiutuo nena toyie e Moab anaa ntaritik naaidapashari tiaai, anaa nkajijik oo motonyi naaidapasha too mpoorri o lkeju le Arnon." 
Isaiah16:3 “Nchoru eutaroto, tudung'o enkiguana te sipata; ntotiwuo oloip lino anaa enkewarie te nkata e nkipirata e nkolong; isudoi lelo oo tarayioki aaipang'ie, mincho meibung'i lelo aisikak." 
Isaiah16:4 Nchoo lelo le Moab ootaarayioki aaisikie metamanyisho te nebo iyie, taa enkisudoroto te ninche te lelo ooidaikie ninche. Te neishieki kenya ilo aitorogonyani neish enkidaata, ore te neiwuang'ieki ilo oibooki ninche enkop te ina kop," 
Isaiah16:5 netumi taa aaitotona olorika le nkitoo te nyorrata nauno, ore te shumata e ilo orika neton ninye te sipata ti atua ilo ng'obor le Daudi, ilo obo oiguana te sipata amu keneneng ninye pee eas esipata.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Kitoning'oitie iyiook ilo wuasa le Moab, enetiu apa olwuasa lenye; ore enkilashilash enye, o lwuasa lenye o ina goro enye - ore enkitokoos enye naa elejare." 
Isaiah16:7 Ore enkaraki ina nchoo Moab eyietu aishir, nchoo pooki ng'ae eyietu aishiraki Moab. Enchira to sina kitok te nkaraki nena mukateni oo sabibu e Kir-Hareseti." 
Isaiah16:8 Amu etoito nena ong'at e Heshbon, o lelo sabibu le Sibma; ore lelo kituaak loo loshon netudung'o ilng'osil lenyena, lelo apa oopuo aabaiki Yaser, neidapashaki olpurkel; ore lelo ngosil lenyenanepuo aaidapashari nelang enaiposha." 
Isaiah16:9 Ore enkaraki ina, kaishir nanu te nkishirata e Yaser te nkaraki ilo sabibu le Sibma; kaaitashaiki nanu ilkiyio laainei, iyie Heshbon o Eleale; amu ore shumata ilng'anayio linono o enkisampuare ino netadoikio embuaakinoto o larrabal." 
Isaiah16:10 Neiwuang'ieki eng'ida o enchipai te ina kop sidai; ore te nkurma oo sabibu nemetii osinkolio oranyi, meetae mbuakunot naabuakuni; meetae olaironyani oirony isabibu te nkironyet; eitigiraki inabuakunoto e nkisampuare." 
Isaiah16:11 Ore enkaraki ina keishir oltau lai anaa olwulul loo usin aishiraki Moab, neishiraki oltau lai Kir-heres." 
Isaiah16:12 Naa te nelotu Moab aibalunye kewan, naa te neitanaur kewan too wuejitin neeika, te nelotu ninye atua ine wueji enye sinyati pee eomon, meret ninye ina." 
Isaiah16:13 Ororei ele oing'uaa Olaitoriani oipirta Moab too nkolong'i naatulusoitie. 
Isaiah16:14 Kake ore taata ejo Olaitoriani, “Too larin okuni, anaa larin le nkigeroto o ltung'ani, keitaae ina kitoo e Moab pesho, hoo duoo naa olorora kitok ninche. Ore lelo ooleku naa lkuti oleng leme toki.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Olkilikuai oipirta Dameski. Ng'ura, meitoki Dameski aaku enkanasa, naa keaku ninye osototi loo suut." 
Isaiah17:2 Kepuoi aaing'uaa nkanas enyena o akenya; neaku ninche ndaat oo nkerrai, neirragie ninche ine nemeetae entoki naiture." 
Isaiah17:3 Keiwuang'a ina ang nagol aitung'uaa Efraim, neiwuang'a enkitoo aitung'uaa Dameski; ore ilo pisiai oleku le Siria netiu anaa enkitoo oo nkera e Israel, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Isaiah17:4 Ore kenya te ina olong neitadouni enkitoo e Yakobo aaitabaiki enkop, ore ina piron o sesen lenye nesasu." 
Isaiah17:5 Naa ketiu ninye anaa te neisampisho olaisampuani, negilu ilng'osil le nkurma, netiu anaa ina kurma naitashe te nesuli ilng'osil lenyena netiu anaa oerata le Refaim." 
Isaiah17:6 Ina natung'uayie olaisampuani ake naleku, anaa te neisampu olaisampuani ilng'anayio neing'uaa oare anaa okuni ootii shumata oleng, aashu oong'uan anaa imiet too lng'osil lo lchani loo lng'anayio, Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel ojo." 
Isaiah17:7 Ore kenya te ina olong neaku keshilaa iltung'ana Ilo oitobira ninche, ore too nkonyek enye neing'or Ilo Sinyati le Israel;" 
Isaiah17:8 meitoki ninche aaisilig ilperereni loo lasarri, ina siai oo nkaik lenye, nemeitoki ninche aaing'or ina naitobira ilkimojik lenye, aa Asherim aashu ilperereni le nkorropil." 
Isaiah17:9 Ore kenya te ina olong nena anas enye naagol, nepuo aatiu anaa nene wuejitin neeisikieki oo le Hafi o le Amori, nenen apa neeisikie ninche te nkaraki nkera oo Siraeli. Nepuo aaku ilmuaateni." 
Isaiah17:10 Enkaraki nikitorikine iyie Enkai e njeunoto ino, neitu iyie idamu ina dapidapoi e sarunoto ino; enkaraki ina pee ituno iyie nkaitubulu sidain, nipik iyie ntokitin oo nkaitin omon," 
Isaiah17:11 ore hoo nintubulu iyie ninche ina olong ake nituuno ninche, nincho ninche meitapuka pee ekenyu ake, ore ake eyia, kelo aimin enkisampuare, te ina olong o sina o ina mion nemeishiuni." 
Isaiah17:12 Kuaak, ening'o oltoilo loo ltung'ana kumok, eikurrukur ninche anaa enkikurrukur e naiposha! Kuak, enkikurrukur oo loreren kumok eikurrukur ninche anaa e nkikurrukur oo nkariak kumok!" 
Isaiah17:13 Keikurrukur iloshon anaa enkikurrukur oo nkariak kumok, kake kelo ninye aisikong ninche, neilanyisho ninche aaisik, nepuo ninche anaa suut too ldoinyio netiu anaa enterit nakutita olkutati." 
Isaiah17:14 Ore teipa, ng'ura, nelotu olkirutoto! Ore eitu eaku tadekenya meekure eetae ninche! Ena ninye erubata e lelo ooibung iyiook aaraya, elaakinoto e lelo ooisim iyiook." 
Isaiah18:1 Kuaak, enkop oo naipuko naaikurrukur natii lido kekun ilkejek le Etiopia;" 
Isaiah18:2 ina nairriwaa ilbalusuni lenyena aimie olkeju le Nail, too mpeuti naaitobiraki te narau oo nkujit naapor nkariak! Enchom intae, intae olkilikuai oneneng ina kop e lelo adoru oosipa seseni, enetii ilo orere ourei te netaana o te nelakua, ilo osho magilani otimirishe, odung ilkejek enkop enye." 
Isaiah18:3 Ore intae kulo ootii enkop pooki, intae lelo oomanya enkop, te nedumuni olmonekie too ldoinyo, eng'ura! Te neoshi emowuo, entoning!" 
Isaiah18:4 Amu nji nanu aatiaaka Olaitoriani: “Kaitirring'a nanu aing'orisho te manyisho ai, aing'or asipu anaa te ndama eirowuaja, anaa enkatampoi e nkoiliolio te nkata e nkisampuare eirowuaju.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Amu ore eng'or enkisampuare, eidipa enkurma aitapuka, neibelekenya ntapuka aaku ilng'anayio, nedung'oo ninye lelo ng'osil to lalem odung'ishoreki, ore lelo ng'osil oo luaari nedung'oo." 
Isaiah18:6 Neing'uari ninche pooki, meinosa nena taritik e ong'ata naatoni too ldoinyo, neing'ueikini ing'uesi e ntim. Neked ilmotonyi shumata ninche te nkata e nkirowuaj, netonie ing'uesi e ntim ninche te nkata e nkirobi." 
Isaiah18:7 Ore kenya te ina kata neyauni nkishorot aaisho Olaitoriani loo lororani, naaing'uaa lelo tung'ana adoru nesipa seseni, lelo tung'ana oourei te netaana o te nelakua, ilo osho magilani omirisho, odung ilkejek enkop enye, o metabaiki oldoinyo le Sion, ine wueji e nkarna o Laitoriani loo lororani." 
Isaiah19:1 Olkilikuai oipirta Misiri. Ng'ura, ekedito Olaitoriani enkatampoi nakuet, naa Misiri elotu; naa keikirikira nena kitanyaanyukot e Misiri oo nkaitin te dukuya ninye, nelepori iltauja loo ltung'ana le Misiri ti atua ninche." 
Isaiah19:2 Naa kaputu nanu ile Misiri metudumakinoto maate, nearare ninche oltung'ani ake o lalashe lenye, nearare oltung'ani olayioni le latia enye, nearare enkanasa enkanasa, nearare enkitoo enkitoo;" 
Isaiah19:3 ore olokiyo loo le Misiri ti atua ninche, neishieki katukul, nainyal nanu nkitobirat enye; naa kepuo ninche aaikilikuanishore nena kitanyaanyukot oolaitumusumusok, o loosh nkidong'i o lasakutok;" 
Isaiah19:4 naa kaishooyo nanu ile Misiri apik nkaik o laitasheikinoni ogogong, naa olaiguanani otolo olo aitore ninche, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Isaiah19:5 Ore nkariak e ilo keju le Nail neitoi, ore ilo keju netoyu;" 
Isaiah19:6 ore nena nong'ot neing'usilu, ore ilkejek ooibung'are ilo keju le Nail le Misiri nemitari aatoyu, ore oseyiai o lkujita netoyu." 
Isaiah19:7 Keaku iorro mbat o lkeju le Nail, ore nena tokitin apa naatuunoki te mbata olkeju netoyu, nekutaa osiwuo." 
Isaiah19:8 Ore lelo arreshok loo sinkir neishir te mion o sina, lelo pooki oonang'aki irresheta lenye olkeju le Nail, neyietu ninche aaishir, lelo pooki ooisalaashaki irresheta lenye shumata enkare." 
Isaiah19:9 Ore lelo aitobirak loo nkilani naapuyiapui nepalari, o lelo ooitobir nkilani naaibor." 
Isaiah19:10 Ore lelo laa ninche ing'apeta enkop nerratanyi, ore lelo oas esiaai ooropiyiani netum osina." 
Isaiah19:11 Ore ilkituaak le Soan naa ilmoda; ore lelo ang'eni aikook le Farao neishooyo enkikoo e modai. Kaji iyie inko pee ijoki Farao, “Ara nanu olayioni lo lang'eni, olayioni lo laiguanani li apa moiti?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Koree naa lelo ang'eni linono? Nchoo ninche mikitoliki neisho metayiolouni, ina naiguanua Olaitoriani loo lororani pee egilunore Misiri." 
Isaiah19:13 Ore lelo kituaak le Soan netaa lmoda, ore lelo kituaak le Memfis neteleja ate; ore lelo apa laa ninche eitasheyie iloshon lenye, neitapong'oitie Misiri." 
Isaiah19:14 Eishoo Olaitoriani ninche olmilo; neisho Ilmisiri meyukuyukori too nkiaasin enyena pooki, anaa enayukuyukori olamerani elopisho." 
Isaiah19:15 Nemeitoki ae bae nabo atii Misiri aa endukuya aashu olkidong'oe, olng'osila lo ltukai aashu oseyiai nadimi aataas." 
Isaiah19:16 Ore kenya te ina olong, naa ketiu ile Misiri anaa ng'oroyiok, neikirikira te dukuya ina aina naikirikirie Olaitoriani loo lororani ninche." 
Isaiah19:17 Ore ina kop e Yuda naa keaku entoki naiture ile Misiri; ore pooki tung'ani oba anaa ololikini neureishoyu, enkaraki ina naiguanua Olaitoriani pee egilunore ninche."
