Isaiah19:18 Ore kenya te ina olong naa keaku keetae nkanas imiet ti atua enkop e Misiri, naairo enkutuk e Kanaan. Neinos olmumai pee eiruk Olaitoriani loo lororani. Ore nabo e kuna naa kepuoi aajo Enkanasa e Nkolong." 
Isaiah19:19 Ore kenya te ina olong naa keaku keetae olperere lo lasar lo Laitoriani te mpolos e nkop e Misiri, o eng'ape o Laitoriani to lpolosie lenye." 
Isaiah19:20 Naa keaku ina olmonekie o enchakenisho o Laitoriani loo lororani ti atua enkop e Misiri; ina kata te neishiraki ninche Olaitoriani te nkaraki lelo ooibooki ninche enkop, neirriwaki Olaitoriani ninche olaitajeunoni. Nemitu, nekordu ninye ninche." 
Isaiah19:21 Neisho Olaitoriani metayiolouni ninye too le Misiri. Neyiolou lelo le Misiri Olaitoriani te ina olong, neserem ninye to lasar o too nkishorot o lasar opejori. Neinos ninche olmumai te nkaraki Olaitoriani, neitabaya." 
Isaiah19:22 Naa kelo Olaitoriani aosh Misiri, neosh neitoki ashukunye, naa kerrinyokino ninche Olaitoriani, nening ninye esayiata enye neishiunye ninche." 
Isaiah19:23 Ore kenya te ina olong naa keaku keetae enkoitoi kitok nadumunye te Misiri alo Asiria. Nepuonunye ile Misiri Asiria, nepuo ile Misiri aaseremisho te nebo ile Asiria." 
Isaiah19:24 Ore kenya te ina olong naa keaku Israel ene uni te nebo Misiri o Asiria, neaku ninche emayianata te mpolos e nkop." 
Isaiah19:25 Naa ninche emayian Olaitoriani loo lororani ejo, “Emayiana Misiri, olorere lai o Asiria ina siaai oo nkaik aainei, o Israel enjung'ore ai.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Ore apa te ilo ari oewunye ilo kitok le njore, oirriwua Sargon ilo aiguanani le Asiria meeu Ashdod, neitainye olarrabal neya ninye" 
Isaiah20:2 ore te ina kata neirorie Olaitoriani Isaya olayioni le Amos, ejo, “Shomo, talaku ilo kuniyia lirrotianita te mpolos nidotu inamuka too nkejek inono,” netaasa apa ninye ina alo meishopo nemeeta namuka." 
Isaiah20:2 ore te ina kata neirorie Olaitoriani Isaya olayioni le Amos, ejo, “Shomo, talaku ilo kuniyia lirrotianita te mpolos nidotu inamuka too nkejek inono,” netaasa apa ninye ina alo meishopo nemeeta namuka." 
Isaiah20:3 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Ore anaa enashomo osinka lai Isaya meishopo nemeeta namuka too larin okuni anaa olmonekie le ngolon ogilunore Misiri, o Etiopia," 
Isaiah20:4 nejia naa elo atiu olaiguanani le Asiria erikoo lelo le Misiri ootarayioki o le Etiopia epuo eyararoto. Ore ndung'ot pokira ilooti o lkituaak nepuo meishopo nemeeta namuka. Nemeeta toki too ltuli neaku enkurruna e Misiri. 
Isaiah20:5 Naa keitukurruni ninche te nkaraki Etiopia naisiligie osiligi lenye Misiri natawuasare. 
Isaiah20:6 Ore lelo oomanya olomanaa le naiposha nepuo kenya aajo te ina olong, ‘Ng'ura, ena nataase te kuldo laa ninche apa kisiliga, naa ninche kisikakitia aaing'oru, eretoto pee ekordu iyiook aitung'uaa ilo aiguanani le Asiria! Naa amaa, iyiook, kaji kinko pee kiimisho?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Olkilikuai oipirta Babilon. Ore anaa enadumunye olkutati te Negeb neor enkop, olpurkel eing'uaa, ina kop torrono oleng." 
Isaiah21:2 Aatolikioki nanu te nduaata entoki torrono; keisimisho olaisimani, neinyalisho o lainyalani. Ilepa shomo, iyie Elam, irraga kitang'aduaki, iyie Media; ore lelo sinaitin pooki ooyaua ninye kaishie nanu." 
Isaiah21:3 Ore enkaraki ina aaiputa nanu olkirutoto; aaibung'a nanu emion naikununo anaa enenkitok nasaisai; atashala nanu o metaa meekure aning'isho, airuto nanu o metaa meekure adolisho." 
Isaiah21:4 Aaisurito endukuya, aaiputa nanu olkirutoto, ore enteipa duoo naanyita neibelekenye aaku enkiputukuny." 
Isaiah21:5 Eitobira ninche emesa, eisalaasha ninche ilkarash oopiki oltiren, nedaa ninche neokisho. Entudumunye intae, lo kituaak, eelie long'oi eilata!" 
Isaiah21:6 Amu nji nanu aatiaaka Olaitoriani: “Shomo ngero olarriponi, nchoo ninye elimu aibalunye ina nadol." 
Isaiah21:7 Te nedol ninye ilakedok, lelo akedok loo mbartan epuo maare, o lakedok loo sirkon, o lakedok loo ntamesin, nchoo ninye einining'isho asipu, nchoo esipu oleng.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Ore ilo otoduaa neyietu ajo: “Te nchumata oltalet orripishoreki nanu aitashe, anaake te ndama iyie o Laitoriani. Ore te siaai ai natii nanu nkewaritin pooki." 
Isaiah21:9 Naa ng'ura, nadol epuonu ilakedok, nadol ilakedok loo mbartan epuonu maare!” Newal ninye ajo, “Etabatate, etabatate Babilon, ore nena kitanyaanyukot enyena oo nkaitin, netarrarrakinote enkop.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Lo tung'ana laainei, kulo ooidong'oki neipiripiri, ore ina natoning'o nanu to Laitoriani loo lororani, ina Ai e Israel, atolikio nanu intae." 
Isaiah21:11 Olkilikuai ele oipirta Edom. Etii obo oipotisho te Seir, nejo, “Lo arriponi, kejaa enkewarie? Lo arriponi, kejaa enkewarie?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Nejo ilo arriponi: “Kelotu enkakenya nelotu sii enkewarie. Te naa e ilo aikilikuanisho, nkilikuanisho; nyaaki torrinyunye.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Olkilikuai oipirta Arabia. Too sanagi le Arabia intae ipuopuo aairrag, na tamesin oo le Dedan." 
Isaiah21:14 Eyaki enkare ilo oata enkure, entanang'are lelo aisikak endaa, intae kulo oomanya enkop e Tema." 
Isaiah21:15 Amu eisika ninche aaing'uaa ilalema, aailany ina shutati o lalem, neilany ina awuo nakurruno, neilany ilo arrabal otirrisha." 
Isaiah21:16 Amu inji nanu aatiaaka Olaitoriani, “Ore te rishata olari obo, te risioroto oo larin le nkigeroto, ore ina kitoo pooki e Kedar naa keiting;" 
Isaiah21:17 ore lelo ooleku, le lelo tung'ana magil oongoroo mbaa Kedar naa keaku kuti; amu Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, nairoro.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Olkilikuai oipirta oerata le nduaata. Kainyoo ena, eji ishomo intae shumata, ishomo pooki nchumat oo nkajijik," 
Isaiah22:2 iyie enabore enkilepilep, na anasa ena nailugo, na ang ena nabore eng'ida? Ore lelo tung'ana linono ootaraki neme to lalem, neme to larrabal etuata." 
Isaiah22:3 Eisika ilaitoriak linono pooki te nebo, eibung'aki eitu ninye engoroo embae. Ore intae pooki ooinepuaki neibung'aki, hoo neisika ninche aapuo enelakua." 
Isaiah22:4 Ore enkaraki ina atejo nanu: “Mbelekenyayu miking'or nanu, nchooki nanu maishira olkiyioi le mion; mintanaur kewan kintigir nanu, te nkaraki enkidaata e ina tito o lorere lang.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Amu Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani neeta enkata e nkiputukuny o enkitunyoto o enkinyalata ti atua ilo erata le nduaata, nena naauroo isunta e nkanasa, nebaiki embuaakinoto ldoinyo." 
Isaiah22:6 Ore Elam nenap imootiani ekedito ngarrin oo mbartan, ore Kir nebolu long'oi." 
Isaiah22:7 Ore lelo erat linono sidain neiput ngarrin oo mbartan, ore lakedok loo mbartan netumoki nkitashot too nchomito." 
Isaiah22:8 Eiwuang'ie ninye elong'o e Yuda. Ore apa te ina olong ning'oru iyie iruparen te nkaji e ntim. 
Isaiah22:9 Nidol ajo eikumok ilusien e nkanasa e Daudi, nioku enkare too lchorroi li abori," 
Isaiah22:10 ninken nkajijik e Yerusalem, nigil nkajijik pee ishet esuntai aitagol." 
Isaiah22:11 Nintobir olchumati le nkare te rishata e nena sunta pokira are. Kake eitu ing'or ilo apa oitobira ilo shorro, neitu ishilaa ilo oipirua kuna pooki apa moitie, laa ninye oishoo metaa." 
Isaiah22:12 Ore apa te ina olong neipotu Olaitoriani loo lororani olkiyioi o enkishirata, nebarni iltung'ana te nkaraki osina neishop ilkuniyiani;" 
Isaiah22:13 naa ng'ura, eng'ida o enchipai, o eyieng'ata oo lmong'i o lkerra, enkinosata oo nkiri o eokoto e naisho oo sabibu. Ijojo: “Matadaata iyiook nikiokisho, amu ore taisere nikiye.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Eibalunye Olaitoriani loo lororani kewan too nkiyiaa aainei: “Esipa ore ena kitarruorroto mikipalakini iyie, o metaba anaa niye.” Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Isaiah22:15 Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani, “Wou, shomo enetii ele aitasheikinoni, shomo enetii Shebna laa ninye oitasheiki enkaji, nijoki ninye:" 
Isaiah22:16 Kainyoo iasita tene naa kaing'ae iata iyie tene, eji o itaguetaka iyie kewan enkurare. Ee, iyie, ilo oturu enkurare te wueji e Shumata, niguetu enimany te ndapidapoi?" 
Isaiah22:17 Ng'ura, eikinang'aa iyie Olaitoriani aiturraa, lo tung'ani ele ogol. Eikimbung ninye akurraki," 
Isaiah22:18 nikiyuk ninye aitamanaa anaa empira anang'aki enelakua; nilo aye te ine. Naa ine epuo aatii nena garrin inono oo mbartan, iyie ilo ora enkurruna e nkaji o lkitok lino." 
Isaiah22:19 Kaanang'aa nanu iyie te ine niaasishore, nikintadouni te ilo orika le shumata.”" 
Isaiah22:20 Ore kenya te ina olong naa kaipotu nanu osinka lai Eliakim olayioni le Hilkia," 
Isaiah22:21 naishopoki nanu ninye olkila lino, narreten nanu ninye te nkimeita ino, ore enkitoria ino naitarasaki nanu ninye. Naa keaku ninye papa te lelo oomanya Yerusalem o te nkaji e Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Naiteleiki nanu oloililai lenye olbolet le nkaji e Daudi; nebol ninye nemeetae oloiken. Neiken nemeetae olobol. 
Isaiah22:23 Naa kaitasheyie nanu ninye netiu anaa encheitoi nauno oleng, neaku ninye olorika le nkitoo te nkaji e papaai lenye." 
Isaiah22:24 Neitanapi ninye olola le nkaji e papaai lenye pooki, eishoi pooki o nkera, ebaiki nkikompeni o metabaiki nkukurto e nkare." 
Isaiah22:25 Ore kenya te ina olong, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, ore ina sheitoi apa natuunoki oleng nelolong'u, nedotunye asulunye; ore ilo ola apa oikare nesulunye adou, amu Olaitoriani oiroro." 
Isaiah23:1 Olkilikuai ele oipirta Turo. Enteyietu enchira, na melin e Tarshishi, amu eitomijoonoki Turo neaku metii enkaji aashu ewueji neitasheyieki! Ore ebaiki enkop e Kupro eibalakinyeki ninche." 
Isaiah23:2 Entirring'ata intae kulo oomanya olomanaa le naiposha, lo ainyiang'ak le Sidon, etalang'a apa lelo lirriwaitie intae enkare nepuo ninche aaim nkariak kumok;" 
Isaiah23:3 ore ropiyiani inyi naa ina tapa e Shihor, ina kisampuare o lkeju le Nail; iyie apa olbiasharai loo loreren." 
Isaiah23:4 Tukurru iyie Sidon, amu eiroro enaiposha, ine nerripieki enaiposha ejo, “Eitu nanu atum emion e saisai neitu aisho, neitu nanu aitubulu layiok aashu ntoyie.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Te nelotu ilo omoni Misiri, nejing ninche osina tenkaraki ilo omoni oipirta Turo." 
Isaiah23:6 Entulusoi enchom Tarshishi, enteyietu enchira, intae lelo oomanya olomanaa le naiposha." 
Isaiah23:7 Kena ninye enkanasa ino e ng'ida, naa ore enkiterunoto enye naa apa moitie, ore nkejek enyena netanapa ninye meshomo amanyisho te nkop nalakua?" 
Isaiah23:8 Kaing'ae oipirua ena, agilunore Turo, naa ninye naishooyo maupen e nkitoo. Ore apa lelo ainyiang'ak lenyena naa eikituaak, ore lelo amirak lenyena naa ilooyanyiti te nkop?" 
Isaiah23:9 Eipirua Olaitoriani loo lororani ina, pee einyal ilo wuasa ena kitoo pooki, nesul ilo pooki oyanyiti te nkop." 
Isaiah23:10 Mputa ntadooi te nkop ino anaa olkeju le Nail, na tito e Tarshishi; meekure eetae entoki nikimbooyo." 
Isaiah23:11 Eitorioyie ninye enkaina enye aitalang enaiposha, eigirigirie ninye nkitoriat; eishorua Olaitoriani enkitanapata naipirta Kanaan, pee eidaikie lelo sempewueti lenyena." 
Isaiah23:12 Nejo ninye: “Mingil ae kata iyie ang'ida na tito ena natusulaki e Sidon; tudumunye shomo Kupro, ore ake sii te ine milo atum enkiyeng'iyeng.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Ng'ura ina kop oo Lkaldayo! Ilo orere apa, mme ile Asiria, oopuo aaishooyo Turo metaa enoo lowuarak le ntim. Neirrag ninche aang'adu ninye, nerasaki nena ajijik enyena e nkitoo, neing'uaa ina anasa etaa enkidaata." 
Isaiah23:14 Teyietu nchira iyie Tarshishi, amu ore osempewuet lino neitomijoonoki." 
Isaiah23:15 Ore kenya te ina olong, nemeitokini aadamu Turo too larin ntomoni naapishana, naaba anaa nkolong'i o laiguanani obo. Ore te siadi lelo arin ntomoni naapishana netiu te Turo anaa enatiu te ilosinkolio le mulayoi:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Tudumu enkawuo oo sinkoliotin, tamanimanai te nkanasa, na mulayoi ena nemedamuni! Taranyisho to ltoilo sidai, taranya isinkolioitin kumok, pee kitumi aatadamu.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Ore te siadi ilarin ntomoni naapishana naa emutan Olaitoriani Turo. Naa kerrinyokino ninye olekoisiaayio lenye, nelo aiborrie onyek te nena kitoriat e nkop naatii oriong e nkop." 
Isaiah23:18 Ore ina biashara enye o lekoisiaayio lenye neiteng'elakini Olaitoriani; meshumi ninye nemeirragieki aaisudoo, kake ore ina biashara enye kelo ainyiang'u endaa sapuk o nkilani sidain ainyang'aki lelo ootoni te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Isaiah24:1 Ng'ura, kelo Olaitoriani aitomijoon enkop neitaa mitil, naa kelo aibelekeny neidapash lelo oomanya." 
Isaiah24:2 Naa ore ina nalo atiu too ltung'ana, naa neijia etiu to lapolosani; ore enatiu to rrindik, neijia etiu to lkitok lenye; ore enatiu te nkaisiaayiani, neijia etiu te ina naigero ninye; ore enatiu te ilo oinyang'isho, neijia etiu te ilo omirisho; ore enatiu te ilo oisilenisho neijia etiu te ilo oisilenokini; ore enatiu te ilo oishooyo esile, neijia etiu te ilo oisilenokini." 
Isaiah24:3 Keitomijooni enkop katukul neitarruorri oleng; amu eiroro Olaitoriani ele ororei. 
Isaiah24:4 Eishirita enkop neisha, etemene enkop nalulung'a neisha, etemene shumata amitari te nebo enkop." 
Isaiah24:5 Etaa enkop olminong, ti abori lelo oomanya; amu etigila ninche nkitanapat, negolong'aki nena kikoot, negil ilo ning'o loo ntarasi." 
Isaiah24:6 Ore enkaraki ina keinos oldeket enkop, ore lelo oomanya kemeyu te nkaraki enkitarruorroto enye; ore naa kepejori lelo oomanya enkop, naa ilkuti ake elekuni." 
Isaiah24:7 Eishirita enaisho oo sabibu, ore olchani loo osabibu netasara, ore lelo apa oong'ida nejing osina." 
Isaiah24:8 Ore oltoilo le nkinanta netigire, ore ilo toilo le nchipai netigire, ore oltoilo lolwulul loo usin neitigiraki." 
Isaiah24:9 Meigil ae kata aaok enaisho oo sabibu eranyisho; keduaru ina aisho napi te lelo ook. 
Isaiah24:10 Ore ina anasa naing'oling'ole neturori ninye, eikenoki pooki aji metaa meetae olojing." 
Isaiah24:11 Etasapuka olkiyioi too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa eiting'o enaisho oo sabibu; neishieki eng'ida pooki; neishieki enchipai pooki e nkop. 
Isaiah24:12 Eitomijoonoki enkanasa, etigilaki nchomito aainyal." 
Isaiah24:13 Amu ena nalo aaku te mpolos e nkop, ti atua loshon, ore anaa enaigusugusieki oloirien, o anaa enasotuni ilng'anayio to sabibu." 
Isaiah24:14 Neilepie ninche iltoiloishi lenye, neranyisho te ng'ida; ore te nkitoo o Laitoriani kebuaku ninche te nkalo o loo ntoluo." 
Isaiah24:15 Ore naa te nkalo o loo saen nchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo; ore to lomanaa le naiposha nchoo Olaitoriani enkitoo, Enkai e Israel." 
Isaiah24:16 Ore too neeiting'ie enkop nikining'oo isinkolioitin le nkisisa, le nkitoo te ilo Obo Osipa. Kake atejo nanu, “Aibiitiari nanu, aibiitiari nanu. Woi keon ai! Amu ore lelo aitang'orok netarasutua, etarasutua ilaitang'orok oleng.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Olkirutoto o engumoto, o rreshet shumata iyie, shumata iyie ilo omanya enkop!" 
Isaiah24:18 Ore ilo oilanyisho to ltoilo lo lkirutoto, naa kelo adoiki engumoto; naa ore ilo oilepu te ngumoto neibung orreshet. Amu etaboloki ilusien e shumata, ore olkitamanyunot le nkop neikirikira." 
Isaiah24:19 Etigiligilaki enkop tukul, etabee neaku mbelibelat, eikirikirieki enkop oleng." 
Isaiah24:20 Eyukuyukori enkop anaa olamerani, etotiuo anaa enkaji nakutita osiuo; etii nkitarruorot enyena shumata ninye, naa kenang'aa ninye nemeigil adumunye." 
Isaiah24:21 Ore kenya te ina olong naa kelo Olaitoriani aitame olorora le shumata te keper, nelo aitame ilaiguanak le nkop teina kop." 
Isaiah24:22 Neiturrurri ninche te nebo anaa ilooena te ngumoto; neikenori ninche te korokoroni, ore te siadi nkolong'i kumok neitamei ninche." 
Isaiah24:23 Neitomisimisi olapa nemeitoki enkolong awang'u; amu Olaitoriani loo lororani olo aitoreisho to ldoinyo le Sion o te Yerusalem, naa ore te dukuya ilpayiani lenyena nelo ninye aibalunye enkitoo enye." 
Isaiah25:1 Iyie Olaitoriani, ira iyie Enkai ai; kaarrep nanu iyie, kaisis nanu enkarna ino; amu itaasa iyie mbaa e nking'asia, ntabayie te sipata nena kitobirat inono e apa moitie." 
Isaiah25:2 Amu intaa iyie ina anasa osototi le nkidaata ore ina anasa nagol nintaa olmuaate; ore apa ina aji e nkitoo oo ltung'ana leeikinga meigili ae kata aashet. 
Isaiah25:3 Ore enkaraki ina eikisis iyie iloreren oogol; ore nkanas e lelo oshon lemeeta olng'ur naa eikiureyu iyie. 
Isaiah25:4 Amu itaa iyie osempewuet le ilo aisinani, aitaa osempewuet le ilo onyamal te nyamali enye; olchurie to lkutati naa oloip te nkirowuaj, amu ore eoshoto e ilo lemeeta olng'ur neikununo anaa olkutati oipony esuntai" 
Isaiah25:5 eikununo anaa enkirowuaj te wueji netoyio Intigira iyie oltoilo loo lmang'ati lang; anaa enkirouaj ti abori oloip le nkatampoi, neaku eishieki osinkolio le ilo lemeeta olng'ur." 
Isaiah25:6 Ore te le doinyo, kelo Olaitoriani loo lororani aitobiraki olorere pooki osirua loo ntokitin naapir, osirua le naisho oo sabibu, osirua loo ntokitin naabore eilata, o enaisho oo sabibu, osirua loo ntokitin naabore eilata, o enaisho oo sabibu nasila oleng." 
Isaiah25:7 Naa kelo ninye aidaikie tele doinyo ina kimulumulet apa natanang'akaki shumata iloreren pooki, ilo karasha apa oidapashakaki shumata iloshon pooki." 
Isaiah25:8 Neijoo ninye keeya ntarasi, nejutoo Olaitoriani Enkai ilkiyio too nkomomi pooki, ore ina sulare oo ltung'ana lenyena neiwuang'ie ninye te nkop pooki; amu Olaitoriani oiroro." 
Isaiah25:9 Kepuoi kenya aajo te ina olong, “Ng'ura, Enkai ang ena; kitaanyutua apa iyiook ninye, pee elotu aitajeu iyiook. Olaitoriani ele, kitaanyutua iyiook ninye, mating'idata iyiook nikishipakino enjeunoto enye.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Amu kemitu enkaina Olaitoriani oldoinyo le Sion, naa kepuoi aaitunyoki Moab enkop te wueji enye, anaa enaitunyi olkujita te wueji olokidong'oi." 
Isaiah25:11 Naa kelo ninye aitorioo nkaik enyena te neitorit ninye, anaa enaitorioo nkaik o ltung'ani oisompira te nkare, kake kelo Olaitoriani airragie ilo wuasa lenye te nebo ina arriyiano oo nkaik enyena." 
Isaiah25:12 Ore nena sunta adoru e nkang enye nesulu ninye, neitadou, nenang'aki enkop, neitabaiki enterit." 
Isaiah26:1 Ore kenya te ina olong nepuoi aarany ele sinkolio te nkop e Yuda: “Kiata iyiook enkanasa nagol; eishoo ninye iyiook enjeunoto naikununo anaa sunta enkang nagol 
Isaiah26:2 Entabol nchomito, pee etum ilo osho loo sipat oibung enkirukoto aimu." 
Isaiah26:3 Nchoo iyie meitiring'ayu te seriani, ilo laa iyie edamu enkaraki nikisiliga ninye iyie." 
Isaiah26:4 Isiliga Olaitoriani ntarasi, amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai, naa endapidapoi oo ntarasi." 
Isaiah26:5 Amu eitadouo ninye lelo ooilepie ate ina anasa naitokoos. Eitadouo ninye, etanang'aka ninye enkop, nenang'aki enterit." 
Isaiah26:6 Eitunyito nkejek ninye, nkejek e lelo aisinak, iroruat e lelo oomena.”" 
Isaiah26:7 Keitoriori enkoitoi e ilo asipani; itooro iyie enkoitoi e ilo asipani. 
Isaiah26:8 Ina oitoi oo nkiguanat inono, kiaanyunyie iyiook, iyie Olaitoriani; ina arna nikidamunye iyie, ninye eyieunoto oo ltauja lang." 
Isaiah26:9 Iyie eng'uar oltau lai kewarie, ore enkishui ai ti atua nanu naa iyie elilitu. Ore enkata natii nkiguanat inono enkop, neiteng'enuo lelo oomanya enkop te sipata." 
Isaiah26:10 Tenaa keitoduaaki ilo torrono olng'ur, meyiolou ae kata ninye esipata; ore ti atua enkop oo sipat, neas ake ntorrok, nemedol enkitoo o Laitoriani." 
Isaiah26:11 Iyie Olaitoriani, eilepieki enkaina ino, kake medol ninche. Nchoo ninche metoduaa olom too ltung'ana linono, nekurru ninche. Nchoo ina kima te nkaraki ilmang'ati linono einos ninche." 
Isaiah26:12 Iyie Olaitoriani, intobiraki iyie iyiook eseriani, iyie oishoo iyiook nena siaitin ang pooki." 
Isaiah26:13 Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ang, eitoreita apa iyiook kulikae aitoriak leme iyie, kake enkarna ino ake kewan kiyiolo iyiook." 
Isaiah26:14 Etuata ninche, nemeitoki aapiu, etaa ninche loipi, nemeigil ninche aaitashe; ore te ina, nitumutana iyie ninche aishie, niwuang'ie ninche pee meigili ai kata aadamu." 
Isaiah26:15 Kake itoponayie iyie ilo orere, aitoriani, itoponayie iyie ele orere; kintaaki iyie kitok; intalala iyie ilpolosien lena kop." 
Isaiah26:16 Iyie Olaitoriani, ore to sina niking'oru ninche iyie, nebuku ninche enkomono, ina kata etii enkitamioto shumata ninche." 
Isaiah26:17 Ore anaa entuaa natashala, neyietu aishir te mion e saisai, neijia iyiook kitiu te nkaraki iyie, Olaitoriani;" 
Isaiah26:18 kitunutate apa iyiook, kitasaisayia, kitotiutuo anaa eikitoiutuo enkijape. Mikiaata enkordunoto nikiyautua enkop, ore lelo oomanya enkop neitu ebatata." 
Isaiah26:19 Ore lelo linono ootuata naa kepiu kedumunye aaitashe iseseni lenye. Lo tung'ana kulo oomanya atua enterit, enyeito entaranyisho te ng'ida! Amu ore ina oileelio ino naa enkoileelio e wang'an, ore te ina kop e nemeneng'a naa ilo iyie aitopiu ninche." 
Isaiah26:20 Wootu lo tung'ana laainei, entijing ilgilat linyi, ninkenikene nkutukie oo nkajijik, esudori intae maate te nkiti rishata, o metaba anaa nelusoo ina goro." 
Isaiah26:21 Amu, ng'ura, kelotu Olaitoriani aipang'u te wueji enye pee elotu aitame lelo oomanya enkop te nkaraki enkarruoisho enye. Ore enkop nelo aibalunye ilo sarge apa oibukoyioki ti oriong ninye, nemeigil ae kata aitemoo lelo apa ootaraki metuata." 
Isaiah27:1 Ore kenya te ina olong eibung'ita Olaitoriani ilo alem lenye kitok ogol, nelo ninye aitame Lefiatan, ilo asurai oisikita, ilo asurai ojo lefiatan omerregela, near ninye metua ina kukuu natii atua enaiposha." 
Isaiah27:2 Ore te ina olong: “Neranyaki enkurma sidai oo sabibu ninye! 
Isaiah27:3 Nanu Olaitoriani olaing'urani lenye; kabukoki nanu enkare pooki kata. Melotu ake likae tung'ani ainyal, karrip nanu kewarie o dama." 
Isaiah27:4 Maata nanu engoro. Tenaa naaji kaata nanu ilkiku o entiaati pee airragakinye ninche, anaata apejoo ninche pooki." 
Isaiah27:5 Anaa nchoo ninche eibung esarunoto ai, nchoo ninche eitobir osotua o nanu, nchoo ninche eitobir osotua o nanu.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Ore too nkolong'i naapuonu neibung Yakobo ntona, neitapuku Israel neiu ntilitan neiput enkop pooki ilng'anayio lenyena." 
Isaiah27:7 Ketoosho ninye ninche anaa apa enatoosho lelo mang'ati lenye? Anaa ketasesekuana ninye ninche anaa apa enatasesekuanaki lelo asesesekuanak? 
Isaiah27:8 Te nkiririkinoto iyie intamio ninche, airreu ninche meshomo eyararoto; iwuang'ie ninche te ngoro ino napi, te ina olong o lkutati lo loo saen." 
Isaiah27:9 Ore te nkaraki ina naa kepalakini enkitarruorroto e Yakobo naa kelo ena aaku olng'anayioi olulung'a le nkitayunoto e ng'oki enye: te nelo ninye aitobir isoito pooki loo lperereni loo lasarri, nerrorro anaa ilboro le nturoto, meitoki atii Asherim anaa lasarri le nkorropil ooitoki aaitashe." 
Isaiah27:10 Amu ore ina anasa nasheta netomijoono emanyisho apa naidurrieki nepuoi aaing'uaa, etotiuo anaa ong'ata, te ine edaa lasho, neirrag te ine negil ilng'osil lenyena." 
Isaiah27:11 Ore kenya te netoyu lelo ng'osil lenyena, negili; nepuonu nkituaak aaitayunye enkima. Amu olorere ele lememuso; ore enkaraki ina, ore ilo oitobira ninche meduaaki ninche olng'ur, ore ilo oitobirua ninche meisho ninche omom." 
Isaiah27:12 Ore kenya te ina olong, ebaiki olkeju le Frati o metabaiki oerata le Misiri, naa keiturrur Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena moobo, anaa oltung'ani osilu isuut te nkano." 
Isaiah27:13 Naa ore akenya te ina olong kepuoi aaosh entarumpeta kitok, ore lelo apa ooimina te nkop e Asiria, o lelo oopuonu ootarayioki Misiri nepuonu aaserem Olaitoriani te nchumata ele doinyo sinyati te Yerusalem." 
Isaiah28:1 Woi ninye ilo owuasa oata emaupe e nkitoo oo lamerak le Efraim, o ina tapukai natoyio oshi nara enkishiaa enye; naa ninye natii endukuya e ilo erata oleng le lelo ooidimua enaisho!" 
Isaiah28:2 Ng'ura, eeta Olaitoriani ilo obo magilani negol; ore anaa olkutati le nchan oo soito otiu anaa olkutati le nkidaata netiu anaa enkare nagol nadooyo kelo ninye anang'aki enkop te ngoro." 
Isaiah28:3 Ore ilo oata emaupe e nkitoo loo lamerak le Efraim, naa kepuoi aaitunyoki enkop too nkejek." 
Isaiah28:4 Ore ina tapukai natoyio enkishiaa enye, natii endukuya e ilo erata oleng, naa ketiu anaa ilng'abolo le dukuya ooton eng'or te nkata e nkirowuaj: te nedol oltung'ani ilo ng'anayioi neinos nabo kata anaa ake pee eibung te nkaina." 
Isaiah28:5 Ore kenya te ina olong naa Olaitoriani loo lororani olo aaku emaupe enkitoo, neaku enkishili e nkishiaa te ilo pisiai loo ltung'ana lenyena;" 
Isaiah28:6 o ltau le sipata te ilo oton te nkiguana, o engolon te ilo oibelekeny olarrabal te kishomi." 
Isaiah28:7 Etarruoitie sii lekua te naisho, neyukuyukori te merai e naisho napi, ore olapolosani o laiboni netarruoitie te naisho; etomilote ninche te naisho neyukuyukori ninche te merai e naisho napi, etapaashari ninche te nduaata, nerrorro ninche edung enkiguana." 
Isaiah28:8 Amu eiputa lopat imesai pooki, meetae ewueji nemetii olduruk." 
Isaiah28:9 “Kaing'ae ninye elo aiteng'en aitaarriyian, naa kaing'ae elo ninye ainosaki ilo kilikuai? Lelo ooereki, lelo lemeekure enakita?" 
Isaiah28:10 Amu enkiteng'enata te shumata nkiteng'enat, enkitanapata te shumata enkitanapata, olkereri te shumata olkereri, olkereri te shumata olkereri, etii enkiti ene netii enkiti idie.”" 
Isaiah28:11 A-a, kake too ltung'ana ooiro nkutukie nemeyioloi, neiro too lng'ejepa loo loreren, kelo Olaitoriani airorie iltung'ana lenyena," 
Isaiah28:12 laa ninche apa etiaaka, “Ena enkiyeng'iyeng inyi, enchoo eyeng'iyeng'a ilo onaure, naa ena enkiyagata inyi”; kake ore eyia mening'isho ninche." 
Isaiah28:13 Ore enkaraki ina kelo ororei lo Laitoriani aaku te ninche, enkiteng'enata te shumata nkiteng'enat, enkiteng'enata te shumata enkiteng'enata, olkereri te shumata olkereri, olkereri te shumata olkereri, enkiti tene, o enkiti te idie; pee etum ninche aashom, nebatatakino siadi, negila, nerreshi, neibung'i aaya." 
Isaiah28:14 Ore enkaraki ina, entoning naa ororei lo Laitoriani intae iloo menisho, intae lelo ooitore kulo tung'ana le Yerusalem!" 
Isaiah28:15 Amu itejo apa intae, “Kintobira iyiook olning'o o keeya, ore enemeneng'a nikitoning'ote; te nelotu enkidaata nemeeta eneiko iyiook; amu kintaa iyiook elejare esarunoto ang, naa lomon lemesipa kilutoo iyiook”;" 
Isaiah28:16 ore naa, nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, “Kairragie nanu te Sion osoit oaku olkitamanyunoto, osoit otujurruoki aatem, osoit ogol e nkinyiang'a lo lmairroto: ‘Ore ilo oiruk ninye nemeisarrisar.’" 
Isaiah28:17 Naa kaitaa nanu esipata olgiita naitaa esupatisho ina temet e nkitorioroto; naa keoroo enchan oo soito ina lejare o mbaa nemesipa, neya enkare ilo ng'obor olutori.”" 
Isaiah28:18 Ore ilo ning'o linyi o keeya neaku parmetii, ore ina nitoning'okinote o enemeneng'a nemeitoki auno; te nelotu enkidaata, naa eikiosh iyie." 
Isaiah28:19 Naa ore ake enkata naba anaa enalotu nikiya iyie, amu kelotu ninye anaake tadekenya, o endama o enkewarie; ore eyiolounoto e ilo kilikuai naa olkirutoto ake." 
Isaiah28:20 Amu kedorropu endapash te neitorioo oltung'ani nkejek, naa ronkai olkarasha te nejo oltung'ani aitoipore." 
Isaiah28:21 Amu kedumunye Olaitoriani anaa apa to ldoinyio le Perasim, naa kegoro ninye anaa apa to erata le Gibeon; pee atum ataasa enkiaas enye, napaashaa, neas esiaai enye, ina siaai enye nemeyioloi!" 
Isaiah28:22 Ore naa taata emimenaa, pee meitirrishi ake ienat inyi, amu atoning'oyie nanu endung'okinoto e nkiguana e mutai, eing'uaa Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani, eipirta enkop pooki." 
Isaiah28:23 Nchoru enkiok, toning'o oltoilo lai; toning'isho, naa toning'o enajo." 
Isaiah28:24 Amaa ilo oturisho pee eunisho keturisho anaake? Ketur ninye enkop enye neitupuyiapui enterit anaake? 
Isaiah28:25 Amaa te neidip ninye aitobira enterit, emeisuaaki ninye enkop ilanterera lenyena loo mpukunot pooki, neun enkano too lkererin nepik shairi ewueji enye, neitobiraki enerishare?" 
Isaiah28:26 Amu eiteng'enaki ninye aaitobiraki; Enkai enye naiteng'en ninye. 
Isaiah28:27 Amu meidong'i ilmomo to soit oituutishoreki, nemeimieki ilanterera leijo lelo enkeju e ngarri; amu ore ilmomo o lanterera leijo lelo naa te ng'udi eidong'i." 
Isaiah28:28 Keidong'i entapa oo mukateni? A-a, meidong'i o akenya; te nereu oltung'ani enkeju e ngarri enye te shumata e nkano eyiataa embarta, nemeidong ninye nagut." 
Isaiah28:29 Olaitoriani loo lororani sii eing'uaa ena; ole nking'asia ninye too nkikoot, naa arriyia aisul te ng'eno." 
Isaiah29:1 Woi ninye Ariel, Ariel, ina anasa apa natamanya Daudi Toponai ake to lari to lari; nchoo siruai emanikino." 
Isaiah29:2 Kapik nanu Ariel osina, nelo aaku olkiyioi o enkishirata, nelo ninye atiu te nanu anaa Ariel." 
Isaiah29:3 Naa kaalo nanu aman ang'adu too nkaloli pooki, naang'adu nanu too ltaleta naaitaman nanu iyie enkang." 
Isaiah29:4 Neaku te negut te nkop ilo iyie airo, abori enterit eimu irorei linono; enkop eimu oltoilo lino anaa oltoilo, neing'oming'om oltoilo lino eimu enterit." 
Isaiah29:5 Nebayu ilmang'ati linono anaa enterit napuyiapui, ore olorora loo larruok nebayu anaa suut. Naa keluamisho ninche too nkaitin," 
Isaiah29:6 eikimutan iyie Olaitoriani loo lororani te ndarata, o te nkikirikirata e nkop, o to ltoilo kitok, o to siuo o to lkutati o te nkima nanyaisho." 
Isaiah29:7 Ore ilo orora loo loshon pooki, oitayunye Ariel olarrabal, lelo pooki oarare ninye o wuejitin enyena neesheta, nepik ninye osina, nepuo aatiu anaa enkidetidet, enduaata e kewarie." 
Isaiah29:8 Anaa te neidetidetu oltung'ani oata esumash einosita endaa, neinyototo te sumash enye eitu eraposho, aashu anaa te neidetidetu oltung'ani oata enkure eokito enkare neinyototo ninye te nkure enye eitu eok enkare, neaku neijia epuo aatiu ilororani loo loshon, lelo oarare oldoinyo le Sion." 
Isaiah29:9 Entaa ate ilmoda, ninyanya kutukie, entaa ate ilemedolisho nimodokuku! Entaa lamerak, neme te naisho; eyukuyukori neme enaisho napi itooko!" 
Isaiah29:10 Amu etubukoko intae Olaitoriani oltau loo njio naairoishi, neikeno ninye nkonyek inyi intae iloibonok, neikeno lukuny inyi lelo aduaak." 
Isaiah29:11 Ore enduaata ena pooki netotiwuo te iyie anaa irorei le mbuku natimishiraki aaiken neishooyo oltung'ani meisuma ilo oyiolo aisuma, ejo, “Isuma ena,” nejo ninye, “Maidim nanu, amu etimishiraki aaiken.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Naa te neisho ninche embuku oltung'ani lemeyiolo aisuma nejo, “Isuma ena,” nejo ninye, “Mayiolo aisumayu.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Neitoki Olaitoriani ajo, “Ore enkaraki naanyikaki naanyor nanu kulo tung'ana too nkutukie naayanyit ninche nanu too nkutukie, aalamita iltauja lenye, ore euriata enye te nanu naa enkitanapata oo ltung'ana nayiolo ake too lukuny;" 
Isaiah29:14 Ore enkaraki ina, ng'ura kaigil nanu aitaas mbaa e nking'asia kulo tung'ana, mbaa e nking'asia sapuki; ore ina ng'eno oo lang'eni lenye neish, ore ina musunoto e lelo amusok lenye neishieki.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Woi ninche lelo ooturoki enkop aaisudoriyie Olaitoriani mbaa enye, lelo ootii mbaa enye enaimin, lelo oojo, “Kaing'ae nadol iyiook? Kaing'ae nayiolo iyiook?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Imbelekenyenye intae mbaa e atua aayau oriong! Amaa olaitobirani loo motioo oo nkulukuok, keitanyaanyukieki nkulukuok; eji metaa kejoki entoki naitayioki ilo oitayu, “Eitu ninye aitayu nanu,” aashu ejoki entoki naitobiraki ilo oitobira, “Meeta ninye ening'unoto”?" 
Isaiah29:17 Aime enkiti rishata nang'or pee eitaa Lebanon enkurma naleng, ore ina kurma naleng neibelekenyi aaitaa entim?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ore kenya te ina olong naa kelo ilo ming'ani aning irorei le mbuku, ore te misimisi o enaimin nedolishoyu nkonyek e ilo modooni." 
Isaiah29:19 Ore ilo obor neng'amu ninye eng'ida ng'ejuk naing'uaa Olaitoriani, ore olaisinani aisul iltung'ana nelo ashipakino ilo sinyati le Israel." 
Isaiah29:20 Amu, ore ilo le meeta olng'ur naa keishieki neiting'ieki ilo oitokoos, ore lelo pooki ooing'or pee eas entorroni nedung'ori aaiwuang'ie," 
Isaiah29:21 lelo ooitapong'oo iltung'ana too rorei aaitasur, nepikaki orreshet ilo oisikong'isho te kishomi, ore to sayia le pesho neibelekeny arriny ilo asipani." 
Isaiah29:22 Ore naa nji ejo Olaitoriani, laa ninye apa otokordua Abraham ti alo enkaji e Yakobo: “Meigil ae kata Yakobo adol enkurruna, nemeigil ae kata enkomom enye aipusu." 
Isaiah29:23 Amu te neing'or ninye nkera enyena, ina siaai oo nkaik aainei ti atua ninye, neitisiny ninche enkarna ai; neitisiny ninche ilo Osinya le Israel." 
Isaiah29:24 Ore lelo oopong'ori too ltauja nepuonu aayiolou, ore lelo ooing'unyung'uny neng'amaa nkitanapat.”" 
Isaiah30:1 “Woi ninche nena kera kiseruti,” Olaitoriani ojo, “lelo ooitobir enkitobirata neme enaai; lelo ooitayu mbaa enye nemetii oltau lai, pee etum ninche aatoponai eng'oki te shumata eng'oki;" 
Isaiah30:2 lelo oonapa pee edoyio aapuo Misiri nemaaikilikuanishore ninche, pee epuo aasaru emitunoto e Farao, nepuo aaing'oru eneigara to loip le Misiri!" 
Isaiah30:3 Ore enkaraki ina keibelekenya ina mitunoto e Farao aaku enkurruna, ore ine ning'arara to loip le Misiri, neibelekenya aaku osina linyi." 
Isaiah30:4 Amu ore hoo netii ilkituaak lenyena Soan nepuo ilbalusuni lenyena aabaiki Hanes," 
Isaiah30:5 kepuonu ake aakurru pooki ti alo ilo orere lemeidim aataret ninche, nemeyau eretoto aashu dupoto, kake enkurruna ake o esulare.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Olkilikuai oipirta ing'uesi naatii Negeb, ina kop pooki natii enyamali o sina, ine nepukunye elipong olng'atuny o lng'atuny, entara o enturbubua, nenap ninche karsisisho enye too nkoriong'i nenap ilchumat lenye too ntamesin aayaki ilo orere lemeret ninche." 
Isaiah30:7 Amu ore eretoto e Misiri naa pesho, ina pee atejo nanu ninye, “Rahabu ina naton aitirring'a.”" 
Isaiah30:8 Ore naa taata, shomo ngero ina te dukuya ninche too soito dapashi oogueta nintoki asiraki ninye embuku, pee etum ataa te nkata nalotu enchakenisho ntarasi." 
Isaiah30:9 Amu olorere kiseruti ninche nkera naalejisho, nkera nemening ninche enkiteng'enare o Laitoriani;" 
Isaiah30:10 lelo oojoki iladuaak, “Emidolisho” nejoki iloibonok, “Emimbonoki iyiook esipata; entoliki iyiook mbaa nemeitureisho, embonu mbaa o lng'am," 
Isaiah30:11 tung'uai enkoitoi, mbelekenyayu tapaasha enkoitoi, mincho king'il iyiook aaning mbaa e ilo Osinya le Israel.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ore naa nji ejo Ilo Osinya le Israel, “Ore enkaraki nitemenaitie intae ele rorei, nisiligigi olwuasa o enkiser, ningarakino ninche," 
Isaiah30:13 ore enkaraki ina, kelo ena ng'oki atiu te ntae anaa olbaata le suntai naado netaa kejo pee eurori, naa ore euroroto enye naa nabo kata;" 
Isaiah30:14 ore embelata nalo abela netiu anaa emoti oo nkulukuok naitiaaki aaotiki ore mbelat enyena nemeitoki asotunoyu, meitokini ninye aatum embelati nayayieki enkima aashu naokunyeki enkare to lchorro.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, Ilo Osinya le Israel, “Ti nishukunye ayeng'iyeng'a nikintajeuni; te nkitirring'ata o te nkisiligata elotu engolon ino.” Nimiyieuu intae." 
Isaiah30:16 Kake itejo, “A-a! Eikikuet iyiook too mbartan,” ore enkaraki ina, ikuetikuete aapuo, “Ore iyiook nikikuetie mbartan aakuet oleng,” neaku keten oleng lelo oosuj intae." 
Isaiah30:17 Keisik aailanyisho ilkulinyi oora enkalifu te nebuak oltung'ani obo, ore te mbuakunoto oo ltung'ana imiet nikuet ailanyisho o mikitung'uari, nitiu anaa enchata naunieki enanka te nchumata oldoinyo." 
Isaiah30:18 Ore naa kiaanyita iyie Olaitoriani pee king'urrie; neaku keisisi ninye, pee etum aing'urrie intae. Amu ore Olaitoriani naa Enkai oo sipat; emayiana lelo pooki ooanyu ninye." 
Isaiah30:19 Ee, lo tung'ana le Sion kulo oomanya Yerusalem; mingiligili ae kata aaishir. Esipa keing'urrie ninye intae te ina kishirakinoto inyi; te nening ninye ilo kiyioi linyi, naa kewaliki intae." 
Isaiah30:20 Naa ore hoo neisho intae Olaitoriani endaa e nyamali o enkare o sina, meigil Olaiteng'enani linyi aisudoo kewan, kake kedol nkonyek inyi Olaiteng'enani linyi." 
Isaiah30:21 Ore nkiyiaa inyi te siadi intae, nening oltoilo ojo, “Nena enkoitoi, eima intae ine,” ti nimbelekenyanya intae aapuo enkalo e tatene aashu enkalo e kidienye." 
Isaiah30:22 Nipikipiki intae olduruk nena kitanyaanyukot naapising'a te nkosholai, o nena naasholuno e sahabu. Nindapashaa intae ninche anaa ntokitin nemesinya; nijokiki intae ninche, “Enchom nimiitutu!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Naa keirriwaki intae Olaitoriani enchan te nkaraki lelo anterera lituuno o ina kurma nabulu te nkop, nalo aisho te nkumoi. Ore kenya te ina olong naa kepuo nchoo inyi aadaa too ndaat naalala." 
Isaiah30:24 Ore ilmong'i o sirkon ooturisho neinos olkujita otudung'oki oisukutieki. 
Isaiah30:25 Ore te pooki doinyo oado, o pooki doinyo naikarere, naa kejing nkonyek oo nkariak ina olong kenya eyiang'are kitok te neurori iltaleta." 
Isaiah30:26 Ore ake sii naa kelo ewang'an o lapa atiu anaa ewang'an e nkolong. Ore ewang'an e nkolong neaku katitin naapishana, anaa ewang'an oo nkolong'i naapishana, te ina olong kenya nalo Olaitoriani aen olbae too ltung'ana lenyena, neishiunye lelo baa apa le oshoto enye." 
Isaiah30:27 Ng'ura kelotu enkarna o Laitoriani eing'uaa enelakua, neyupuyup engoro enye netii empuruo kitok; ore enkutuk enye nebore engoro, ore olng'ejep lenye neikununo anaa enkima nanyaisho;" 
Isaiah30:28 ore enkiyang'et enye neikununo anaa enchorro naruko adooyo neilepu enkare o metaa keitabaiki oltung'ani olgos; pee esil ina are lelo oshon te silet e nkidaata entorroni, nepiki nkutukie oo loreren nkeenta naaitapong'orieki." 
Isaiah30:29 Ipuopuo intae aatiu anaa iloata osirua osinya kewarie iranyishosho. Nitumutumu eng'ida o ltau nitiuu anaa te neoshi enkinanta pee epuoi oldoinyo lo Laitoriani, ina dapidapoi e Israel." 
Isaiah30:30 Naa keisho Olaitoriani ilo toilo lenye le nkitoo metoning'o pooki ng'ae, ore ina oshoto e nkaina enye nedou metodoli te ngoro napi o te nkima namutisho, te nebo olkutati o enchan oo soito." 
Isaiah30:31 Ore lelo le Asiria naa keiput enkiputukuny o lkirutoto te nening ilo toilo lo Laitoriani, ina kata eoshisho ninye te ng'udi enye." 
Isaiah30:32 Ore eosh Olaitoriani, ninche aigil, netoni iltung'ana lenyena aaranyisho too lwululi o too nkai oo sinkolioitin Enkai makewan naarare ile Asiria." 
Isaiah30:33 Amu eidipaki apa aaitobira ewueji neyupuyup; ee te nkaraki ilo aiguanani, eitobiraki endapasho o enguton, netii ilkeek kumok o enkima kitok. Naa enkiyang'et o Laitoriani naikununo anaa enkima nakutu isoito." 
Isaiah31:1 Woi ninche lelo oodoyio aapuo Misiri aaing'oru eretoto, neisilig mbartan, lelo oong'idare ngarrin oo mbartan eji amu aikumok, o lelo akedok loo mbartan eji amu kegol ninche oleng, kake meing'orninche Ilo Sinyati le Israel, aashu eikilikuanishore ninye!" 
Isaiah31:2 Naa ng'en ake sii ninye neyau enkidaata, merrinyokino ninye irorei lenyena, kake kedumakino ninye ina aji oo larruok, nedumakino lelo aretok le lelo oas entorroni." 
Isaiah31:3 Ore lelo le Misiri naa iltung'ana, mme Enkai; ore nena bartan enye naa nkiri, mme nkiyang'eta. Te neitorioo Olaitoriani enkaina enye, neikirikira ilo oretisho, ore ilo oretitoi nebatata, neidak pooki te nebo." 
Isaiah31:4 Amu nji nanu aatiaaka Olaitoriani, “Ore anaa enaikurrukur olng'atuny anaa olkuoo lo lng'atuny te ina ng'ues natara, naa te neipotuni olturrur loo lairritak meetu aarare ninye, nemeiture ninye nena buakunot enye aashu eirutie enkilepilep enye, neijia eikununye Olaitoriani te nedou alotu aitayu olarrabal te nchumata oldoinyo le Sion, o te shumata endoinyo enye." 
Isaiah31:5 Ore anaa enaitoip e motonyi, nkera enyena neijia eiko Olaitoriani loo lororani emitu Yerusalem; kerrip neitajeu ninye, kemitu nekordu ninye.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Embelekenyakinoto ilo apa litogolong'akitia oleng, lo tung'ana loo Siraeli." 
Isaiah31:7 Amu ore kenya te ina olong, naa kenang'aa pooki ng'ae nena kitanyaanyukot enyena oo nkaitin e nkosholai, o nkitanyaanyukot e sahabu, apa naaitobirutua nkaik inyi too ng'ok, te nkaraki intae." 
Isaiah31:8 “Naa kebatata ile Asiria to lalem, leme olayioni le tung'ani; ore ilo alem leme olayioni le tung'ani neinos ninye; naa kelo ninye ailany ilo alem, ore elelero enye nepuoi aapik esinkaisho." 
Isaiah31:9 Ore ilo oitaa ninye endapidapoi neisik to lkirutoto, ore lelo kituaak lenyena neilanyisho aaing'uaa inankan enye te nkiputukuny,” neijia ejo Olaitoriani otii enkima enye Sion netii olkokuet lenye atua Yerusalem." 
Isaiah32:1 Ng'ura kelo olaiguanani aitoreisho too sipat, nepuo ilkituaak aaitoreisho too nkiguanat naasipa." 
Isaiah32:2 Kelo ake atiu te pooki lenye anaa eneigarae te nkaraki olkutati, olchurie te nkaraki olkutati, netiu anaa nchorroi oo nkariak te nkop natoyio, netiu anaa oloip le ndapidapoi kitok te nkop e nauri." 
Isaiah32:3 Ore nkonyek e lelo oodol nemeitokini aaiken, ore nkiyiaa e lelo ooning nening." 
Isaiah32:4 Ore oltau le ilo opuny netum mbarakinot, ore olng'ejep le ilo oiramiram neiro aitorioki." 
Isaiah32:5 Nemeigili aajo oltung'ani omoda kedupa, nemeji lelo aisimak eji keleng." 
Isaiah32:6 Amu mbaa e modai eiro olmodai nedamu mbaa entorroni to ltau lenye; pee etum ataasa ntorrok, neiro mbaa naapaashaa ti alo Olaitoriani, neing'uaa lelo ooisumash meeta toki, nemitiki ilo oata enkure enkare." 
Isaiah32:7 Ore enkeleekisho e ilo kiminchali naa entorroni, entorroni eipiru ninye pee einyal ilo omena too rorei le lejare, hoo duoo ninye tenaa kesipa ewalata e ilo omena." 
Isaiah32:8 Kake ore ilo supat neiro mbaa e supatisho, ore too mbaa e supatisho neitashe ninye." 
Isaiah32:9 Enyeito intae kuna kituaak naaisikarra, entoning oltoilo lai; natoyie kuna nemeshilaa toki, entoning enkiroroto ai." 
Isaiah32:10 Ore te nkiti rishata naba anaa olari obo, nipuopuo intae aatum enyamali, intae kuna naaishiliga; amu meitoki aatii ilng'anayio, meitoki atii enkisampuare oo lng'anayio." 
Isaiah32:11 Enkirikirata intae nakituaak kuna naaisikarra, entayu nkilani metaa minchopopo, nirretenene ilkuniyiani." 
Isaiah32:12 Entooshiosh ilgooitie linyi te nkaraki nena kurman sidain, te nkaraki nena kurman oo sabibu naatoishete oleng." 
Isaiah32:13 Ore te ina kurma oo ltung'ana laainei nebulu ilkiku o endiati ee too nkajijik e nchipai te ina anasa e ng'ida. 
Isaiah32:14 Amu kepuoi aaing'uaa ina aji e nkitoo, neing'uari ina anasa naning'o; ore endoinyo o ine nerripishoreki nepuo aaku iwuejitin oo ng'uesi ntarasi, ewueji neitigiranie loitikoishi, neaku ndaat oo nkerrai;" 
Isaiah32:15 ometaba anaa nebukokini iyiook Enkiyang'et naing'uaa shumata, neaku ong'ata ewueji neisho oleng, ore ine neisho neiu ilng'anayio kumok." 
Isaiah32:16 Netum taa esupatisho atamanya ina ong'ata, nemany eseriani atua ina kurma naisho." 
Isaiah32:17 Ore esupatisho neiu eseriani, ore esupatisho neyau enkitirring'ata o nkirukoto ntarasi." 
Isaiah32:18 Kepuo iltung'ana laainei aabik te manyisho e seriani ntarasi, ti atua ewueji e nkirrita oo wuejitin neeitirring'areki aayeng'iyeng'are." 
Isaiah32:19 Ore entim neurori katukul, neurori katukul ina anasa." 
Isaiah32:20 Imayianana intae lelo oounisho te mbata oo nkariak pooki, lelo ooisho ilmong'i o sirkon eidapashari aapuo." 
Isaiah33:1 Woi iyie ora olainyalani, leton eitu kinyali iyie, niaata enkeleekisho, neitu iyie kintaasi embae e nkeleekisho! Ore ake pee indip ainyalisho nikinyali sii ninye iyie; ore pee indip mbaa inono e nkeleekisho nikintaasi iyie inenkeleekisho." 
Isaiah33:2 Olaitoriani ing'urrie iyiook, iyie iyiook kiaanyita. Taa enkaina ang anaake tadekenya, neaku enjeunoto ang te nkata e nyamali." 
Isaiah33:3 Ore to ltoilo le ndarata neisik iltung'ana, ore ti nidumunye iyie neidapasha loreren." 
Isaiah33:4 Naa kearari intokitin inono neishunye anaa enaishu oimaat enkop; anaa enaitiam olmaati te nkop, neitiam iltung'ana te nkop." 
Isaiah33:5 Keisisi Olaitoriani, amu etii ninye shumata oleng; keiput ninye Sion esipata o esupatisho." 
Isaiah33:6 Naa ninye olo aaku enkitashoto too nkatitin inyi, neaku kitok enjeunoto, o eng'eno o eyiolounoto; naa euriata o Laitoriani ninye olchumati lenye." 
Isaiah33:7 Ng'ura lelo oing'ok, eishirita ninche ti auluo; ore lelo balusuni le seriani, neishirita te mion." 
Isaiah33:8 Etoliyiote nkoitoi sapuki meekure eetae olalotoni. Etigile olning'o, netemenayioki ilchakenini, meetae oltung'ani oshilaa olikae." 
Isaiah33:9 Eishirita enkop netalepori to sina; etumute Lebanon netoyio; etotiuo Sharon anaa olpurkel; ore Bashan o Karmel neipiripiroitie mbenek enye. 
Isaiah33:10 “Kadumunye nanu taata,” Olaitoriani ojo, “Ore taata kaitashe nanu; naa kaayiolouni nanu taata." 
Isaiah33:11 Ntobiribiri intae mbaa naaijo suut, nipuopuo aayau mbaa e pesho; ore enkiyang'et inyi naa enkima namut intae." 
Isaiah33:12 Netiu olorere anaa ilootapejoyioki aaitaa enkuruoni, netiu anaa ilkiku ootudung'oki nepejori te nkima.”" 
Isaiah33:13 Entoning intae lelo oolakua, ina nataasa nanu; ore intae kulo oolakua, entayiolo enkidimata ai." 
Isaiah33:14 Ore lelo aing'okok ootii Sion neiruto; eibung'a olokirikiri lelo lemeyiolo Enkai: “Kalo ti atua iyiook oidim atotona te nkima nanyaisho? Kalo ti atua iyiook oidim atobiko te nkima oo ntarasi?” 
Isaiah33:15 Ore ilo olo too nkoitoi naaitoriori neiro sipat, ilo omenaa tumoto e nkitorogonyare, ilo oipirripir nkaik enyena meibung ntokitin e ropare, ilo oiken nkiyiaa enyena pee mening enkibukoroto o sarge; neiken nkonyek enyena pee meing'or entorroni." 
Isaiah33:16 Ilo ninye olo aton too wuejiitin e shumata; ore ewueji e nkirrita naa isempewueti too soito; nepuoi aaisho ninye endaa o enkare. 
Isaiah33:17 Keyooki nkonyek inono aaing'or olaiguanani te nkishiaa enye; neing'or ninche aaing'or ina kop dapash oleng. 
Isaiah33:18 Nepuo indamunot inyi aaing'asia te ilo kirutoto, nijojo, “Koree ninye ilo apa oikenisho, Koree ninye ilo apa oineneng atem kodi? Koree ninye ilo apa oiken iltaleta?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Mingiligili ae kata aadol lelo tung'ana leeiking'a, lelo tung'ana limiyiololo intae enkutuk enye nimindimidimi aatoning'u ooiramiram te nkutuk nimining'ung'u." 
Isaiah33:20 Eng'ura Sion, ina anasa gelunoti nikipolosishore iyiook! Kepuo nkonyek inono aadol Yerusalem, ina manyisho naitirring'a, ilo ng'obor lemeigusugus, lemedotunye ae kata nena sheito naaunore, nemedung'o nena keenta naaenare." 
Isaiah33:21 Ore te ine nelo Olaitoriani te nkitoo aaku te nebo iyiook ewueji ine netii ilkejek dapashi o erat, nemeim ine imelin e enkitoo." 
Isaiah33:22 Amu Olaitoriani ninye olarishani lang Olaitoriani ninye olo aitore iyiook, Olaitoriani ninye olaiguanani lang; keitajeu ninye iyiook." 
Isaiah33:23 Eitololong'ita nkeenta e meli; meitirrishayu ninche. Ore nena masaa kumok neori keyae o mewaita ilmaiman. 
Isaiah33:24 Nemeetae obo omanya ina kop ojo, “Kamuei nanu”; ore lelo tung'ana oomanya ine naa kepalakini ing'ok enye." 
Isaiah34:1 Entinyiku intae looreren, pee ining'ining'i, entoning intae lo tung'ana! Nchoo metoning'o enkop o nena pooki naatii atua Nchoo metoning'o enkop o nena pooki naapuku tiatua enkop." 
Isaiah34:2 Amu etagorokine Olaitoriani iloshon pooki netagorokine ilmang'ati lenye, eiturrayie ninye ninche, eishooyie ninche aisho lelo oomut ninche." 
Isaiah34:3 Kenang'ari mpopoki neye, nerupa mpopoki enye eidapashakino enkop, neruko osarge lenye aim nchumat oo ldoinyo." 
Isaiah34:4 Ore olorora le keper nerrarra aaku enterit. Ore oloing'ang'e pooki nepiyaya anaa endapana ore ilo orora pooki nerrarrunye anaa enasulunye mbenek o lng'aboli, anaa enasulunye ilng'abolo ooto to lchani." 
Isaiah34:5 Amu etudumunye olalem lai netaraposhe te shumata; ng'ura kesulakino ninye Edom te nkiguana, eumata lelo tung'ana latudung'oko nanu enkiguana." 
Isaiah34:6 Eeta Olaitoriani olalem oiputa osarge, neimulumulita eilata, te nebo osarge loo lkerra o lkineji, te nebo enkurriny oo lairakuj oo lkerra, amu kelo Olaitoriani aibung olasar te Bosara, kelo ninye aitayu esesekuanare kitok te Edom." 
Isaiah34:7 Naa kedoiki ilosokuani ninche, te nebo ilmong'i o loing'ok magil. Ore ina kop enye neiput osarge, ore ina kop enye nenyilu te ilata." 
Isaiah34:8 Amu eeta Olaitoriani enkolong e lap, ina olong nalo aitalaku elap te nkaraki Sion." 
Isaiah34:9 Ore ilkejek le Edom neibelekenya aatiu anaa enkoronko, neaku enkulukuoni enye enkima nakutu isoito neaku ina kop enkoronko nayupuyup." 
Isaiah34:10 Ore dama o kewarie nemeye ina kima; neilep empuruo enye alo shumata ntarasi. Ore too ishoritin pooki neaku ina kop mijooni; nemeitoki oltung'ani aim ntarasi o ntarasi. 
Isaiah34:11 Kake kelo aaku le nkalem o yiyai otii ina kop ore emotonyi oo nkiyiaa o lkurruk nemany ine. Neitorioki Olaitoriani olmilo ina kop nedoiki enyamali lelo kituaak lenyena. 
Isaiah34:12 Neipoti ine aajo, “Enemetii enkitoria”, ore lelo kituaak lenyena pooki neaku pesho." 
Isaiah34:13 Nebulaki ilkiku lelo sempewueti lenyena nebulaki olkurushashi o suut lelo sempewueti lenyena o nkang'itie enyena naagol. Nelo ine aaku emanyisho oo mbariak ewueji nemany isidan. 
Isaiah34:14 Nepuo mbariak aashulare ilng'ojiniaa, neipotu oloirirua le ntim olikae, nejokino, ee, eisidai enkewarie tene, neing'uraki kewan ewueji neyeng'iyeng'are." 
Isaiah34:15 Te ine elo entaritiki aitobir enkaji enye, nepik inkiyioitin enyena abori oloip lenye; ee te ine epuo aaiturrurro ilkurragoso epuo maare." 
Isaiah34:16 Ing'oru isuma te mbuku o Laitoriani; meetae hoo nabo e kuna nemelo aaku; nemeetae ake enemelotu eboitare enkae. Amu enkutuk o Laitoriani naitanapishe, naa Enkiyang'et enye naiturrurro pooki." 
Isaiah34:17 Etooshoko ninye ninche enkukuo, enkaina enye natoorikia ninche rubat enye too lkererin; kepuo ninche aaya ina kop ntarasi, ore too ishoritin naa kepuo ninche aamany ina kop." 
Isaiah35:1 Keng'idayu olpurkel o enkop natoyio, neng'idayu ilo purkel neleng'u oleng; neiput ntapuka" 
Isaiah35:2 keleng'u ninye oleng, neranyisho te ng'ida. Ore ina kitoo e Lebanon neishori ninye, ore ina kitoo o enkishiaa e Karmel o Sharon. Nedol enkitoo o Laitoriani, ina kitoo e Nkai ang." 
Isaiah35:3 Ntagolo nena aik naatalepori, ntasheyie ilo oikirikira te nkuretisho." 
Isaiah35:4 Tiaaki lelo ootureishote, “Entagoluoto, emiureishoyu! Eng'ura Enkai inyi elotu te lap, eeta olerrinyore le Nkai, Kelotu ninye aitajeu intae.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Ore ilo modooni neboli nkonyek enyena, neitoning'ishoi ilo ming'ani;" 
Isaiah35:6 neipid olmaima anaa enkoilii, neranyisho olng'ejep lo lemeyiolo airoro te ng'ida. Amu keijirrijirru nkariak to lpurkel, neiput nkonyek oo nkariak enkop natoyio." 
Isaiah35:7 Ore ilo sinyai oirowua naa kelo aaku olchorro, ore ina kop oo lbaat neijirrijirru enkare, ore ina manyisho oo mbariak nelo aaku engilata naleng, netiu nena kujit anaa oseyiai o enarau." 
Isaiah35:8 Nejing enkoitoi kitok ine, naji Enkoitoi Sinyati; nemepuo aaim ine iltung'ana lemesinya, ore ilmoda nemepong'okino ine." 
Isaiah35:9 Nemejing olng'atuny ine, nemelotu ae ng'ues ake ninye torrono; mepuoi aatum ninche te ine, kake lelo ootokorduaki ake oopuo aaim ine." 
Isaiah35:10 Naa lelo ooinyiang'ua Olaitoriani ake oopuo aarrinyunye, nepuonu Sion eranyisho; nejing eng'ida oo ntarasi shumata ninche; nepuo ninche aatum enchipai o eng'ida, ore osina o emion neilanyisho aapuo." 
Isaiah36:1 Ore to lari le tomon oong'uan le nkitoria e Hesekia, nelotu Senakerib ilo aiguanani le Asiria nena anas pooki naasheta e Yuda, neibung ninche." 
Isaiah36:2 Ore ilo aiguanani le Asiria neirriwaa olkitok obo le nkitoria enye te Lakish meshomo enetii olaiguanani Hesekia te Yerusalem eeta enjore kitok. Nelo ninye aitashe te mbata olchorro le shumata, te ina oitoi natii olaitobirani loo nkilani." 
Isaiah36:3 Nelotu Eliakim olayioni le Hilkia enetii ninye laa ninye apa oitaisheiki ina aji e nkitoo. Nelotu sii Shebna ilo aigeroni, o Yoa olayioni le Asafu laa ninye oikenisho." 
Isaiah36:4 Nejoki ilo kitok le njore ninche, “Entiaaki Hesekia, Nji ejo ilo aiguanani kitok, ilo aiguanani le Asiria: Kainyoo iyie ing'idare?" 
Isaiah36:5 Eijo iyie keaku rorei ake duoo enkoitoi nagol napuoyieki olarrabal? Kaing'ae taata iyie ingarakino, eji peyie kimpirakinore nanu?" 
Isaiah36:6 Ng'ura, Misiri iyie ingarakino, naikununo anaa eng'udi o ltiyani natigile, nerem enkaina e pooki ng'ae otirman ninye.”" 
Isaiah36:7 Kake ti nikijoki, “Olaitoriani Enkai ang iyiook kingarakino, aime ilo otii ilperereni lenyena loo lasarri shumata, eiwuangie Hesekia lelo perereni, ejoki Yuda o Yerusalem, Ipuopuo intae aaserem te dukuya ele perere lo lasar?" 
Isaiah36:8 Wou naa taata, toning'ore olkitok lai, ilo aiguanani le Asiria, amu kaaisho nanu mbartan nkalifuni are, tenaa indim iyie te nkalo ino anoto ilakedok pee eked ninche." 
Isaiah36:9 Kaji naa iyie inko pee intukurru ilo arikoni obo le njore ti atua lelo kulikae aisiaayiak ti abori, eji isiligita Misiri, mikirriwaki mbartan oo ngarrin o lakedok lenye." 
Isaiah36:10 Amaa, ijo kaewuo nanu ena kop metii Olaitoriani aidaikie nainyal? Aatiaaka nanu Olaitoriani, Shomo taarare ena kop, ninyal ninye.”" 
Isaiah36:11 Neitoki Eliakim o Shebna o Yoa aajoki ilo kitok le njore, “Kitoomono iyie, irorie isinkan linono ti ae kutuk nikiyiolo, mirorie iyiook te nkutuk e Yuda metoning'o iltung'ana ootii esuntai.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Kake etejo ilo kitok le njore, “Kaairriwua nanu olkitok lai maeu airorie olkitok linyi, o intae, nemairorie lelo ootoni te suntai, laa ore ninche te nebo nipuopuo aainos nkik inyi niokioko nkulak inyi?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Neitoki ilo kitok le njore aitashe nebuaku to ltoilo kitok te nkutuk oo ltung'ana le Yuda, ajo, “Entoning irorei lo laiguanani kitok, ilo aiguanani le Asiria!" 
Isaiah36:14 Nji ejo olaiguanani, Emincho Hesekia meteleja intae, amu meidim ninye atokordu intae." 
Isaiah36:15 Emincho Hesekia ejoki intae eji maigarakinoto Olaitoriani, eji ejo, Kelo Olaitoriani akordu iyiook; ore ena anasa nemelo ninye ajing nkaik o laiguanani le Asiria." 
Isaiah36:16 Emining intae Hesekia, amu nji ejo olaiguanani le Asiria. Entobira intae osotua o nanu nipuonunu enatii nanu, pee etum pooki ng'ae te intae ainosa isabibu lenyena, o lng'abolo lenyena, neok pooki ng'ae te intae enkare o lchorro lenye;" 
Isaiah36:17 o metaba anaa nalotu nanu aya intae ina kop nanyaanyukie enkop inyi, ina kop e ntapa o sabibu, ina kop natii endaa o lng'anayio." 
Isaiah36:18 Enteng'enuoto melej ake intae Hesekia ejo, Kelo Olaitoriani akordu iyiook. Keetae ae kata enkai oo loshon natokordua enkop aitung'uaa enkaina o laiguanani le Asiria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Koree nena aitin e Hamat o Arpadi? Koree nena aitin e Serfarfaim? Ketokordutua ninche Samaria aaitayu te nkaina ai? 
Isaiah36:20 Kaa too nkaitin pooki e kuna kuapi natokordua enkop enye aitayu te nkaina ai, eji metaa kelo Olaitoriani akordu Yerusalem te nkaina ai?”" 
Isaiah36:21 Kake etigirate apa ninche neitu ewaliki olomoni hoo obo, amu ore apa enkitanapata o laiguanani naa, “Eming'amaa intae ninye.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Neitoki Eliakim olayioni le Hilkia laa ninye olaitasheikinoni le nkaji e nkitoo, o Shebna, laa ninye olaigeroni, o Yoa olayioni le Asafu, ilo aikenani, aapuonu enetii Hesekia etopolosa ilkilani lenye. Neinosaki ninye irorei le ilo kitok le njore." 
Isaiah37:1 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani Hesekia ina, nepolos ilkilani lenyena, neimulumul kewan too ilkuniyani, nelo ajing atua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
Isaiah37:2 Neirriwaa Eliakim laa ninye apa oitasheki ina aji e nkitoo, o Shebna ilo aigeroni, o lelo apolosak kituaak, eishopo ilkuniyani, meshomo enetii oloiboni le Nkai Isaya, olayioni le Amos." 
Isaiah37:2 Neirriwaa Eliakim laa ninye apa oitasheki ina aji e nkitoo, o Shebna ilo aigeroni, o lelo apolosak kituaak, eishopo ilkuniyani, meshomo enetii oloiboni le Nkai Isaya, olayioni le Amos." 
Isaiah37:3 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Nji etejo Hesekia, ‘Ore ena olong naa enkolong o sina, enkolong e moroto, o esulare; etaa keini nkera nemeetae engolon naiunyeki." 
Isaiah37:4 Ebaiki netoning'o Olaitoriani Enkai ino irorei le ilo kitok le njore, oirriwua olkitok lenye, ilo aiguanani le Asiria meeu asukeny Enkai naishu, nesurdaanyisho te lelo rorei ootoning'o Olaitoriani Enkai ino; ore enkaraki ina ilepie enkomono ino te nkaraki ilo pisiai otelekua.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:5 Ore ake pee epuonu ilaisiaayiak lo laiguanani Hesekia enetii Isaya," 
Isaiah37:6 nejoki Isaya ninche, “Entiaaki olkitok linyi, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Emiureishoyu te nkaraki lelo rorei litoning'o, laa ninche aaisikong'ie osinka lo laiguanani le Asiria." 
Isaiah37:7 Ng'ura, kapik nanu ninye enkiyang'et nelo aning olmarenke, nerrinyokino ninye enkop enye makewan, naa kaisho nanu ninye metua to lalem oibung'ita ninye te nkaina enye makewan.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Nerrinyo ilo kitok le njore, nelo ainepu olaiguanani le Asiria earare Libna; amu etoning'o apa ninche ajo eshomo olaiguanani te Lakish." 
Isaiah37:9 Nening ilo aiguanani mbaa naaipirta Tihaka olaiguanani le Etiopia nchere, “Kirriwaka ninye olkilikuai pee kilotu aarare.” Ore ake pee ening ninye ina neirriwaki ilkiliku Hesekia, ejo," 
Isaiah37:10 “Nji enchom entiaaki Hesekia ilo aiguanani le Yuda, ‘Mincho kilej ina Ai ino naa ninye isiligita, ejo esiligie olorere ajo meishoori Yerusalem aapik atua nkaik o laiguanani le Asiria." 
Isaiah37:11 Ng'ura, itoning'o enaitaasa ilaiguanak le Asiria nkuapi pooki, neinyal ninche aaidaikie katukul. Eikipuoi doi aakordu iyie?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ketokordutua nena aitin oo loshon ninche, lelo oshon apa ooidaikie loo papa, Gosan, o Haran, o Resef o lelo tung'ana le Eden apa ootii Telasar?" 
Isaiah37:13 Koree taata olaiguanani le Hamat, o laiguanani le Arpad, o laiguanani le nkanasa naji Sefana o laiguanani le Hena aashu olaiguanani le Efaa?’ ”" 
Isaiah37:14 Neng'amaa olaiguanani Hesekia ina palai te lelo ooirriwuaki, neisum ninye, Neilep Hesekia alo enkaji o Laitoriani, nelo aisalaash ina palai te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Isaiah37:15 Neomon Hesekia Olaitoriani, nejo," 
Isaiah37:16 “Olaitoriani loo lororani, na Ai e Israel, niton to lorika lino le nkitoo te shumata ilkerubi, naa iyie Enkai, iyie ake, ore too nkitoriat pooki e nkop nintobira iyie shumata o enkop." 
Isaiah37:17 Irrugu enkiok ino, Olaitoriani, toning'o, nibol nkonyek inono Olaitoriani aing'or; nining kulo rorei pooki le Senakerib, ooirriua ninye pee emor Enkai naishu." 
Isaiah37:18 Ore te sipata Olaitoriani, eitomijoono laiguanak le Asiria iloshon pooki o nkuapi pooki." 
Isaiah37:19 Netanang'akitia nkaitin enye atua enkima; amu mme nkaitin apa ninche, kake esiaai oo nkaik e tung'ana, nkeek o soito; neaku eidaikieki apa ninche." 
Isaiah37:20 Ore naa taata Olaitoriani Enkai ang, ntajeu iyiook te nkaina enye, pee etum nkitoriat pooki enkop aatayiolo nchere iyie ake Olaitoriani.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Neitoki Isaya olayioni le Amos airriwaki Hesekia olkilikuai ejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel: Ore enkaraki nikitoomono iyie nanu te nkaraki Senakerub olaiguanani le Asiria," 
Isaiah37:21 Neitoki Isaya olayioni le Amos airriwaki Hesekia olkilikuai ejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel: Ore enkaraki nikitoomono iyie nanu te nkaraki Senakerub olaiguanani le Asiria," 
Isaiah37:22 ele ninye ilo rorei oiroro Olaitoriani eipirta ninye: ‘Eikimen ninye iyie, eikisukeny ninye iyie - ena tito e Sion; neipirripir endukuya enye te siadi iyie - na tito e Yerusalem." 
Isaiah37:23 Kaing'ae doi ilo litamoro nisurdaany? Kaing'ae ilo litabuaka nishumaki nkonyek inono to lmena? Aime Ilo Osinya le Israel! 
Isaiah37:24 Ore ti alo isinkan linono nitamoro Olaitoriani, nitejo iyie, ore too ngarrin aainei kumok or mbartan, nashomo nanu ailep enchumata oo ldoinyo, o atua Lebanon; naturoyie nanu ltarakua lenyena adoru, lelo keek lenyena sidain; ashomo nanu abaya shumata aisul, ina tim enye nasur." 
Isaiah37:25 Atuturuo nanu ilchorroi naok nena ariak, natunuka too ndapi oo nkejek aainei nena onyek oo nkariak pooki e Misiri." 
Isaiah37:26 Keitu iyie ining nchere aitobira apa nanu moitie? Ina taata nalotu aas, eji nipuopuo intae aaitaa nkanas naasheta osototi loo mauti." 
Isaiah37:27 Ore apa meeta lelo oomanya ine engolon, neiruto neiputukuny, netiu ninche anaa nkaitubulu e ong'ata, netiu anaa nkujit naanana netiu anaa nkujit naatii shumata e nkaji, naaidaikieki eitu ebulu." 
Isaiah37:28 Ayiolo nanu olwuanet lino o eninkunari te nimpang o ti nijing'u, o ina nikigorokino nanu." 
Isaiah37:29 Ore enkaraki nikitagorokine iyie nanu neewuo ilo wuasa lino abau nkiyiaa aainei, kapik nanu olororoi lai nkumeishin inono napik esekenkei enkutuk ino, abaaya naaibelekeny iyie aipirie ewueji duoo ning'uaa.’" 
Isaiah37:30 “Naa kelo ena aaku olmonekie te iyie: ore tele ari inosa pooki toki nabulu openy. Ore to lari li are inosa ina nabulu aikununye neijia; ore to lari li okuni tuunisho, nisampisho, niun isabibu, ninos ilng'anayio lenye." 
Isaiah37:31 Ore ilo pisiai oleku le nkaji e Yuda, neitoki aaibung ntona ti abori, neiu ilng'anayio te shumata." 
Isaiah37:32 Amu te Yerusalem eipang'u ilo pisiai naa oldoinyo le Sion eimu ina tukus e lelo ooleku. Amu Olaitoriani loo lororani olo aitabaya ena. 
Isaiah37:33 “Ore enkaraki ina, nji ejo Olaitoriani ti alo ilo aiguanani le Asiria. Melotu ninye ajing'u atua ena anasa, anaa engoroo embae te ine, aashu elotu anyikaki eeta elong'o aashu eng'adu ninye." 
Isaiah37:34 Ina oitoi naimu ninye eigil aim errinyo, nemelotu ninye ajing'u atua ena anasa, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah37:35 Amu kamitu nanu ena anasa aitajeu, te nkaraki kewan ai o te nkaraki osinka lai Daudi.”" 
Isaiah37:36 Nelo olmalaika lo Laitoriani, nelo aar metuata iltung'ana nkalifuni iip o ntomoni isiet o imiet te lelo ng'oborri loo ltung'ana le Asiria. Ore ake pee einyototo iltung'ana tadekenya ng'ura, etaa duoo kulo pooki mpopoki." 
Isaiah37:37 Neitoki Senakerib ilo aiguanani le Asiria arrinyo nelo aton te nkang enye te Ninawi. 
Isaiah37:38 Ore eseremisho ninye te nkaji e Nisrok, ina ai enye, nepuonu Adramalek o Shereser, lelo ayiok lenyena, aasesekuan ninye to lalem, neisik aapuo oldoinyo le Ararat. Neitoreisho olayioni Esar-hadon te rishata enye." 
Isaiah38:1 Ore apa te nena olong'i etamueyia Hesekia eyieu eye. Nelo ilo oiboni le Nkai Isaya olayioni le Amos enetii ninye, nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani; Ntobira enkaji ino, amu iye iyie, minchiu.”" 
Isaiah38:1 Ore apa te nena olong'i etamueyia Hesekia eyieu eye. Nelo ilo oiboni le Nkai Isaya olayioni le Amos enetii ninye, nejoki ninye, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani; Ntobira enkaji ino, amu iye iyie, minchiu.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Neibelekenyakino Hesekia esuntai neomon Olaitoriani ejo," 
Isaiah38:3 “Tadamu taata Olaitoriani, aatasayia inchere ashomo nanu te dukuya iyie te nkisiligata pooki o to ltau pooki nataasa nanu ina sidai too nkonyek inono.” Neishir Hesekia oleng." 
Isaiah38:4 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Isaya, nejo," 
Isaiah38:5 “Shomo tiaaki Hesekia, Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai e Daudi papaai lino: Atoning'o nanu enkomono ino, natoduaa nanu ilkiyio linono; ng'ura kaponiki nanu enkishui ino ilarin tomon o imiet." 
Isaiah38:6 Kaakordu nanu iyie o ena anasa aitung'uaa nkaik o laiguanani le Asiria, namitu ena anasa." 
Isaiah38:7 “Ele olmonekie te iyie oing'uaa Olaitoriani, nchere kelo Olaitoriani aas ena naisiligishore:" 
Isaiah38:8 Ng'ura, karrinyu nanu oloip iroruat tomon, te ine netabaikia te wueji nekedi e Ahas.” Neaku etorrinye apa enkolong siadi iroruat tomon te wueji duoo netabaikia." 
Isaiah38:9 Ilkigerot kulo le Hesekia olaiguanani le Yuda, ina kata apa etamueyia ninye nenyaaka aishiu:" 
Isaiah38:10 Atejo nanu eitoritote nkolong'i aainei etaa kalo; aipirakinore nanu kishomi enemeneng'a, too larin pooki le nkishui ai." 
Isaiah38:11 Najo nanu, madol Olaitoriani te ina kop oo looishu; maigil ae kata nanu adol iltung'ana ti atua lelo oomanya enkop." 
Isaiah38:12 Etadotuoki emanyisho ai neiwuang'ieki te nanu, eikunaki anaa olng'obor lo lchekut; atununuko nanu enkishui ai anaa endapana, aaikuna nanu anaa enkila naitobiri te wueji neripishoreki; ore dama o kewarie nikiyau iyie nanu enkiting'oto." 
Isaiah38:13 Aishira nanu o mekenyu aing'oru eretoto; negiligil ninye iloik laainei pooki anaa olng'atuny; ore dama o kewarie nikiyau iyie nanu enkiting'oto. 
Isaiah38:14 Abuaku nanu anaa emotonyi aishirita anaa enturkulu, enaurate nkonyek aainei aimariri shumata. Iyie Olaitoriani, aaisoruoki nanu, taa iyie esarunoto ai!" 
Isaiah38:15 Kake kaa nanu ajo? Amu aairorie ninye nanu, netaasa ninye makewan ina. Eidurra njo aainei pooki te nkaraki ina mion o ltau lai." 
Isaiah38:16 Iyie Olaitoriani, te kuna baa eishu iltung'ana, ore enkishui o ltau lai netii atua kuna pooki. Ooi, torrinyokoki nanu embiotisho nikincho manyaaki aishu!" 
Isaiah38:17 Ng'ura, te nkaraki eseriani ai apa pee anoto emion sapuk kake mbooyie iyie enkishui ai arishie ina gumoto e nkidaata, amu itanang'aka iyie ng'ok aainei oriong ino." 
Isaiah38:18 Amu mikindim iyie enemeneng'a aishoo enashe, mikindim keeya aterrepa iyie; ore lelo oopuo aadoiki engumoto nemeidim aaisiligisho, te nkaraki ina supatisho ino." 
Isaiah38:19 Ore ilo oishu, ilo oishu, ninye likincho enashe, anaa enaasita nanu ena olong; neitayiolo menye nkera enyena esupatisho ino." 
Isaiah38:20 Kaaitajeu nanu Olaitoriani, naa eikipuo aaranyisho too nkinantani oo usin too nkolong'i pooki e nkishui ang te nkaji o Laitoriani." 
Isaiah38:21 Netejo apa Isaya, “Nchoo ninche eya emukate oo lng'abolo neelie ninche ilo tudutai pee etum ninye aishiu.”" 
Isaiah38:22 Netejo sii ninye Hesekia, “Kainyoo olmonekie nchere kalo nanu Enkaji o Laitoriani?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Ore apa te ina kata neirriu Merodek-baladan olayioni le ilo aiguanani le Babilon olkilikuai eeta mpala o enkishoroto nayaki Hesekia, amu etoning'o apa ninye nchere etamueyia nenyaaka aishiu." 
Isaiah39:2 Neitoomon Hesekia ninche; neitodol ninche ina aji enye nashumishoreki; neitodol enkosholai, o sahabu, o eilata nagol enkinyang'a, o kulie tokitin te nebo imasaa o iruparen o nena pooki apa naatii atua ina aji enye nashumishoreki. Meetae apa entoki hoo nabo natii atua enkaji enye aashu ina ang enye pooki neitu eitodol ninche." 
Isaiah39:3 Neitoki ilo oiboni Isaya alotu enetii olaiguanani Hesekia nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo etejo kulo tung'ana? Naa kaji eing'uaa pee epuonu enitii?” Nejo Hesekia, “Eetuo ninche eing'uaa enkop nalakua, Babilon eing'uaa.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Nejo ninye, “Kainyoo ninche etoduaa te nkaji ino?” Newal Hesekia ajo, “Etodua ninche nena pooki naatii atua enkaji ai; meetae entoki natii atua enkaji ai neitu nanu aitodol ninche.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Neitoki Isaya ajoki Hesekia, “Toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani loo lororani:" 
Isaiah39:6 Ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, ore nena pooki naatii atua enkaji ino, o nena pooki apa naatushuma loo papaai linyi o metabaiki ena olong, naa kenapi aaya Babilon, meetae entoki naleku, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah39:7 Ore embata e lelo ayiok linono likitoikioki naa keyai sii ninche. Naa kepuo aaku sunaishi oogelema ti atua enkaji o laiguanani le Babilon.” 
Isaiah39:8 Neitoki Hesekia ajoki Isaya, “Ore ilo rorei lo Laitoriani liroro iyie naa eisidai.” Amu etejo apa ninye, “Kelo atii eseriani too nkolong'i aainei.”" 
Isaiah40:1 Ntagolo iltung'ana laainei, ntagolo ltung'ana laainei, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah40:2 Irorie Yerusalem te mborron, ninchiraki ninye tiaaki eisha olarrabal lenye, netapalakaki ninye ing'ok enyena, amu etang'amua apa ninye te nkaina o Laitoriani enkitalakunoto oo ng'ok enyena katitin are." 
Isaiah40:3 Ening'o oltoilo oishirita: “Ore ti ong'ata ntobira enkoitoi o Laitoriani, Ntorioi to lpurkel enkoitoi tenkaraki Enkai ang." 
Isaiah40:4 Ore pooki nong'oto negum neilepunyeki, ore pooki doinyo o ewueji nerupa neitadouni; ore ewueji nemeitoriori neitoriori, ore ewueji nemeisiaja neisiajayieki." 
Isaiah40:5 Amu kepuoi aaibalunye enkitoo o Laitoriani, nedol iltung'ana pooki te nebo, amu enkutuk o Laitoriani nairoro kuna.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Ejo ilo toilo, “Nchira!” Najo nanu, “Kaaishir ajo aa?” Ore pooki naata osesen netiu anaa nkujit, ore ina kishiaa enye pooki etiu anaa entapukai e ong'ata." 
Isaiah40:7 Etoyu nkujit, nerrarrarri ntapuka, te nekut enkiyang'et o Laitoriani ninye; esipa etiu iltung'ana anaa nkujit." 
Isaiah40:8 Etoyu nkujit nerrarrarri ntapuka; kake ore ororei lo Laitoriani Enkai ang neuno ntarasi. 
Isaiah40:9 Ilepa iyie shomo enchumata o ldoinyo oado, Iyie Sion, ntadarai lelo omon supati; ilepunye oltoilo lino te ngolon, Oo Yerusalem, ntadarai lelo omon supati, ilepie oleng, miureshoyu; tiaaki nena anas e Yuda, “Eng'ura Enkai inyi!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Ng'ura, kelotu Olaitoriani te ngolon, naa enkaina enye nalotu aitoreisho; ng'ura netii enkishooroto enye te nebo ninye, netii nchuneti enyena dukuya ninye." 
Isaiah40:11 Keirrita ninye eluaata enye anaa olchekut, neibung ninye ilkuoo too nkaik enyena, nenap ninche to lgoo lenye, nerikoo maakutiti nena oijoo." 
Isaiah40:12 Kalo otetema enkare te ndap e nkaina enye netem shumata te nkitorioroto e nkaina enye, neishaki enterit e nkop pooki te ntemet neineneng ildoinyo o ndoinyo to orrantili" 
Isaiah40:13 kalo otuutayie Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani, aashu anaa olaikooni lenye neiteng'en ninye?" 
Isaiah40:14 Kaing'ae eikilikuanishore ninye pee etum ataarriyiana, naa aing'ae oiteng'ena ninye te ina neitodol ninye enkoitoi e Yiolounoto?" 
Isaiah40:15 Ng'ura, etiu iloshon anaa olkitong'ati le enkare naitong to ltoo, eikununo nkuapi anaa enkinyi terit napuyiapui; ng'ura, kedumu ninye lemankale pooki anaa enkini terit napuyiapui." 
Isaiah40:16 Meidip ilkeek le Lebanon enkima, nemeidip ing'uesi e enyena pooki olasar opejori." 
Isaiah40:17 Etiu iloshon pooki anaa pesho te dukuya ninye, eikenayie ninye ninche anaa pesho, aashu olng'am." 
Isaiah40:18 Kaing'ae naa kintanyaanyukie Enkai, aashu ainyoo narisiore ninye?" 
Isaiah40:19 Kenkitanyaanyukoto e Nkai! Ina naitobirua oltung'ani, ina namur olkunoni te sahabu, nepik ninye ilpisia le nkosholai." 
Isaiah40:20 Ore ilo omena lemeidim ainyiang'u olasar, negelu olchata lemeitiapurus; neing'uraki kewan olaguetani arriyia, ounoki enkitanyaanyukoto nemeigusugus." 
Isaiah40:21 Keitu iyie iyiolou? Keitu iyie ining? Keitu apa kilikini iyie te nkiterunoto? Keitu apa iyiolou iyie ebaiki olkitamanyunoto le nkop? 
Isaiah40:22 Ninye ilo oton te shumata enkop, ore lelo oomanya enkop neikununo anaa ntargeet; kaing'ae ilo oisalaash shumata anaa olkarasha, nelak anaa olng'obor olo amany;" 
Isaiah40:23 ninye ilo oitadou ilkituaak, aitaa pesho ore lelo aitoriak le nkop neitaa pesho." 
Isaiah40:24 Penyo netunoki ninche, penyo neibung'a ntona, narumishoyu te nkop, penyo neibung'a ntona enye enkop, te nekut ninye ninche netoyu, neya osiwuo ninche anaa suut." 
Isaiah40:25 Kaing'ae naa intae kintanyaanyukiekie nanu, eji pee atiu nanu anaa ninye? Ilo Sinyati Obo ojo." 
Isaiah40:26 Tushumu nkonyek inono toduaa shumata; kaing'ae oitobirua kuna pooki? Ilo oyau ilo orora lenye te nkumoi, neipotu ninche pooki too nkarn enye, te ina kitoo e nkidimata enye, naa ore enkaraki nagol ninye oleng meimin ninye nabo." 
Isaiah40:27 Kainyoo pee ijo iyie Yakobo, niro iyie Israel ajo, “Eisudoyie Olaitoriani enkoitoi ai, ore esipata ai neitu eshilaa Enkai ai?”" 
Isaiah40:28 Keitu iyie iyiolou? Keitu iyie ining? Ore Olaitoriani naa Enkai oo ntarasi, ninye oitobira ineeiting'ie enkop. Menauru ninye nemelepori, ore eyiolounoto enye nemejurrunoyu." 
Isaiah40:29 Keisho ninye engolon ilo oiterria, ore ilo lemeeta enkidimata neponiki engolon." 
Isaiah40:30 Keiterre doi ninye elelero nenauru nebatata iltung'ana ooti te nauri; 
Isaiah40:31 kake ore lelo oanyu Olaitoriani naa keitang'ejuk engolon enye, keilep ninche too naipuko anaa lkurragoso, nepuo aakuet nemenauru, nepuo ninche kake meiterre te nauri." 
Isaiah41:1 Entirring'ata entoning'oki nanu na kuapi, kuna o lmanie le naiposha; nchoo iltung'ana eitang'ejuk engolon enye; nchoo ninche enyiku, netum taa aairoro; maigutu pooki te nebo aanyikaki enkiguana." 
Isaiah41:2 Kaing'ae otuputuo ilo obo oing'uaa enkalo o loosaen, laa ore ake enelo neisulu? Nepalaa ninye iloreren te dukuya ninye, pee etum ninye aitunyoi ilaiguanak atupudaki enkop; neitotiu ninye ninche anaa enterit to lalem lenye, netiu anaa isuut naatang'oroyioki te nkawuo enye." 
Isaiah41:3 Nesujaa ninye ninche nelo agiroo te seriani, te ina oitoi neitu ae kata eroro nkejek enyena." 
Isaiah41:4 Kalo ilo otaasa ena bae, aipotu iishoritin ebaiki enkiterunoto? Nanu, Olaitoriani, ilo le dukuya, nara ole siadi; Nanu ilo." 
Isaiah41:5 Etoduaa olomanaa le naiposha neureishoyu, eikirikirate ineeiting'ie enkop; eetuo ninche aanyiku." 
Isaiah41:6 Etaretuo ake oltung'ani ole latia enye, nejoki olalashe lenye, “Ntagoluoyu!”" 
Isaiah41:7 Neitagol olaguetani loo nkeek olkunoni oshoke, ore oloyutuutisho neitagol oshoke ilo oidong'isho; ore te nkiruburubare nejo ninche, “Eisidai,” neitirrish ninye too lmushomaani pee meing'unung'un." 
Isaiah41:8 Kake ore iyie Israel, osinka lai, Yakobo lategelua nanu, ina ishoi e Abraham, olchore lai;" 
Isaiah41:9 iyie apa layaua nanu aitung'uaa ineeiting'ie enkop, naaipotu too neelakua oleng, aajoki nanu iyie, “Ira iyie osinka lai, aategelua nanu iyie, nemaanang'aa nanu aiturraa;”" 
Isaiah41:10 miureishoyu, amu atii nanu te nebo iyie, ming'aeng'ae, amu ara nanu Enkai ino; kaaitagol nanu iyie, kaaretu nanu iyie, kaaibung nanu iyie te nkaina ai e tatene naata engolon." 
Isaiah41:11 Ng'ura, ore lelo pooki likitagorokinote naa keitukurruni nemiri; ore lelo oo ekenya te nkaraki iyie naa kepuo aaku pesho, neidak." 
Isaiah41:12 Ilo iyie aing'oru lelo likikeshare, kake midol ninche; ore lelo likintayunye olarrabal naa kepuo aaku pesho." 
Isaiah41:13 Amu nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, likimbung enkaina e tatene; nanu ilo likijoki iyie, “Miureisho, kaaretu nanu.”" 
Isaiah41:14 Miureishoyu Yakobo, hoo niba anaa olkurto, lo tung'ana le Israel! Karetu nanu intae, Olaitoriani ojo; ilo Osinya le Israel ninye okordu intae." 
Isaiah41:15 Ng'ura, kaaitaa nanu iyie entoki nadung'ishoreki, ng'ejuk, nepi, neeta lala; naa eilo iyie adung ildoinyo niuroo ninche, nintotiu iyie oldoinyo anaa suut." 
Isaiah41:16 Naa ilo iyie aipirripir ninche neya osiwuo, neidapash olkutati ninche. Nilo iyie ang'ida ti atua Olaitoriani; ti atua ilo Obo Osinya le Israel ilo iyie ang'ida." 
Isaiah41:17 Te neing'oru lelo aisinak enkare nelau, netoyu ilng'ejepa lenye te nkure, nawaliki nanu Olaitoriani ninche, ore nanu, Enkai e Israel nemaiturraa ninche." 
Isaiah41:18 Kabolu nanu lkejek le nkare too ldoinyo, o nkonyek oo nkariak ti atua ierat; kaisho nanu ong'ata metaa olchorro le nkare, ore enkop natoyio neruko nkariak." 
Isaiah41:19 Kaun nanu to lpurkel iltarakua, o ltepes, o oloirienito kaitubulu nanu te nkop natoyio, ilkeek kumok lo supuko," 
Isaiah41:20 pee etum iltung'ana aatodol neyiolou, nedamu neyiolou te nebo, nchere enkaina o Laitoriani nataasa ina, ilo Obo Osinya le Israel oitobira ina." 
Isaiah41:21 Iyau lomon linono, Olaitoriani ojo; iyau shakenisho ino, Olaiguanani le Yakobo ojo." 
Isaiah41:22 Nchoo ninye meyau, neliki iyiook ina nalotu aaku, entoliki iyiook mbaa e apa eneikununo pee kitum iyiook aaiguanare ninche, pee kitum iyiook aatayioloito enepukoki ninche, aashu eibalakinye iyiook mbaa naayooki aapuonu." 
Isaiah41:23 Entoliki iyiook mbaa naayooki aapuonu, pee kiyiolou iyiook nchere irara nkaitin; entaas esidai anaa entorroni pee kimputukuny iyiook nikiureishoyu." 
Isaiah41:24 Ng'ura, mira iyie toki, naa pesho esiaai ino; naa olminong nikitegelua iyie." 
Isaiah41:25 Atuputuo nanu ilo obo te nkalo e moikuape, neewuo ninye, eewuo ninye eing'uaa enkilepunoto e nkolong, naa kelotu ninye aipot enkarna ai; naa kelotu ninye aituny lelo aitoriak anaa esarng'ab, anaa enaipurj olaitobirani loo motioo oo nkulupuok e sarng'ab." 
Isaiah41:26 Kaing'ae apa oibalunye te dukuya, pee kitum iyiook aatayiolo, nelimu eng'or enkata, pee kitum iyiook aatejo, “Etisipa ninye”? Metii apa hoo obo oibalunye ina meetae olotolimuo, meetae olotoning'o irorei linono." 
Isaiah41:27 Atang'asa apa nanu aibalakinye Sion, naisho nanu Yerusalem olkilikuai loo lomon supati." 
Isaiah41:28 Kake te naing'orisho nanu metii hoo obo, ore atua kulo metii olaikooni, laa te naikilikuanisho newalu." 
Isaiah41:29 Ng'ura, pesho kuna pooki, naa pesho esiaai enye; ore nena kitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin naatosholuaki naa enkijape e pesho." 
Isaiah42:1 Ng'ura osinka lai laitagol nanu, ilo gelunoti lai, oshipakino oltau lai; atipika nanu enkiyang'et ai shumata ninye, naa kelo ninye aiguanaki iloshon too sipat." 
Isaiah42:2 Meishir ninye nemebuaku, aashu ening'i ninye too nkoitoi." 
Isaiah42:3 Megil ninye entiyani naiperre nemekut aar oltaa oiliilayie; keyau ninye aitobiru enkiguana nasipa. 
Isaiah42:4 Melaikino ninye ae toki nemepalari o metaba anaa neibulunye esipata enkop; ore loo manaa le naiposha neanyu enkitanapata enye. 
Isaiah42:5 Nji ejo Enkai, Olaitoriani, ilo oitayio shumata neisalaash, ilo olak enkop aitorioo o pooki naimu ninye, ilo oisho enkiyang'et lelo tung'ana ootii oriong enkop, neisho enkishui lelo oopuo ti oriong enkop." 
Isaiah42:6 “Ara nanu Olaitoriani, aaipoto nanu iyie te supatisho, aaibung'a nanu iyie enkaina naagolie; aaishorua nanu iyie taa olning'o too loreren, ore te iyie naa kayaki nanu ewang'an iloshon," 
Isaiah42:7 ilo aitodolisho ilmodook, nilo alaaya lelo ooena te naimin, nintayu ilooena aitung'uaa olgilata liatua korokoroni nintayu te korokoroni lelo ootoni tiatua enaimin." 
Isaiah42:8 Ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina enkarna ai, ore enkitoo ai nemaisho nanu likae, nemaisho enkisisa ai nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin naaguetuno." 
Isaiah42:9 Ng'ura, etulusoitie ntokitin e apa, naa kaibalunye taata nanu ntokitin ng'ejuko; ore eton eitu eipang'u aaliooyu naa kaaliki nanu ninche.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani osinkolio ng'ejuk, nchoo enkisisa enye eimu ilubot e nkop! Nchoo eikurrukur enaiposha, o nena naabore atua, o loo manaa le naiposha o lelo oomanya ninche." 
Isaiah42:11 Nchoo nkop natoyio o nkanas enye eilepunye iltoiloishi lenye, o nena ang'itie naamanya Kedar; nchoo lelo oomanya Sela eranyisho te ng'ida, nchoo ninche ebuaku too nchumat oo ldoinyo." 
Isaiah42:12 Nchoo ninche eisho Olaitoriani enkitoo, neibalunye enkisisa enye too loomanaa le naiposha." 
Isaiah42:13 Kelo Olaitoriani anaa oltung'ani magilani, nepush anaa oltung'ani lo larrabal; neyietu aishir, nebuaku, neitoduaaya kewan ajo ai magilani alang ilmang'ati lenyena." 
Isaiah42:14 Ore te nkata naado natigire nanu, aitirring'e nanu naibooyo kewan, ore taata kaishir nanu anaa enkitok nasaisai, kaipang'ipang nanu naiyiogiyiog." 
Isaiah42:15 Kaitomijoon nanu ildoinyo o ndoinyo, naitoi nanu nkujit o lkeek; naitaa nanu ilkejek enkop natoyio, naitoi ilchorroi." 
Isaiah42:16 Nalo nanu arikoo lelo modook te ina oitoi apa neitu eyiolou ninche, aimie atua ina oitoi nemeyiolo ninche karikoo nanu ninche. Kaibelekeny nanu ina aimin natii dukuya ninche aitaa ewang'an, naisiajayie iwuejitin neesur. Kuna baa nanu aas, nemalo nanu aing'uaa ninche." 
Isaiah42:17 Kerrinyuni ninche neitukurruni katukul, lelo ooisilig nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin naaguetuni, lelo oojoki nkitanyaanyukot naasholuni, “Irara intae nkaitin ang.”" 
Isaiah42:18 Entoning intae ilming'anta, ning'oring'oro intae ilmodook, pee itumutumu aatodolisho!" 
Isaiah42:19 Kalo modooni leme ilo sinka lai, aashu kalo ming'ani anaa ol kipaaret lairriwaa nanu?" 
Isaiah42:20 Kedol ninye ntokitin kumok kake mesipu; nebolo nkiyiaa enyena kake mening'isho ninye. 
Isaiah42:21 Eitiship apa Olaitoriani, te nkaraki esupatisho enye makewan, pee eibalunye enkitanapata enye neitaa kitok." 
Isaiah42:22 Kake iltung'ana kulo ootupurroyioki nerayae, etarreshoki ninche pooki too ngumot neisudori ti atua korokoroni; meeta ninche oltung'ani okordu ninche, nemeetae ololo arrinyu ninche?" 
Isaiah42:23 Kalo te intae olo aning ena, nelo ajing ine ainining'isho te nkaraki ina kata nayooki alotu." 
Isaiah42:24 Kaing'ae apa oishooyie Yakobo meibung'i aaya, neisho Israel ilapurrok? Aime Olaitoriani, laa te ninye kitaasa iyiook eng'oki, laa nkoitoi enyena etanyaita ninche, ore nkitanapat enyena neitu ninche eiruk?" 
Isaiah42:25 Neaku etubukoko shumata ninye engoro enye, o larrabal kitok; nepik ninye enkima aitaman kake eitu ninye emuso ayiolou; nepej ina kima ninye, kake eitu edamu to ltau lenye." 
Isaiah43:1 Kake ore taata nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo likintayio iyie Yakobo, ilo likintobirua Israel: Miureishoyu amu aatokordua nanu iyie, Aaipotuo nanu iyie te nkarna ai, ira iyie olalai." 
Isaiah43:2 Tinilo iyie aim atua nkariak, naaku nanu te nebo iyie; naa ti nilang ilkejek nimikiya ninche; naa ti nilo iyie aim atua enkima nimikipej iyie, nimikinos iyie olng'ejep le nkima" 
Isaiah43:3 Amu ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, Ilo Sinyati le Israel, Olaitajeunoni lino. Aishorua nanu Misiri pee kinyang'unyeki iyie, naishooyo Etiopia o Seba pee aawalunye iyie." 
Isaiah43:4 Ore enkaraki nira iyie kirotet too nkonyek aainei, nikiyanyitaki, naatonyorra nanu, aishooyie nanu iloreren pee aawalunye iyie, aishooyie ilororen awalu enkishui ino." 
Isaiah43:5 Miureishoyu, amu atii nanu te nebo iyie; kayau nanu eishoi ino aitung'uaa enkilepunoto e nkolong, nalo aiturrur intae te nkalo o loo ntoluo." 
Isaiah43:6 Kalo nanu ajoki ina kop e moikuape, nchoru, najoki kopikop, mimbooyo iyie; ilayiok laainei ooing'uaa enelakua o nena toyie aainei naaing'uaa ineeiting'ie enkop," 
Isaiah43:7 Ore pooki ng'ae ake ninye oipotieki enkarna ai, ilo oitayioki te nkaraki enkitoo ai, ilo laitobirua nanu naitaa." 
Isaiah43:8 Iyau lelo tung'ana modook hoo neeta nkonyek, lelo ming'an hoo neta nkiyiaa!"
