Isaiah43:9 Nchoo loreren pooki eiturrurro te nebo, naa iloreren euma te nebo. Kalo tiatua ninche oidim aibalunye ena, neitodol iyiook mbaa e apa? Nchoo ninche eyau enchakenisho enye pee eitisip kuna, naa nchoo ninche ening nejo, Ee ekesipa." 
Isaiah43:10 “Irara intae ilchakenini laainei,” Olaitoriani ojo, “Nirara ilo sinka lai lategelua nanu, pee kitumutumu aatayiolo nikirukuruku nanu, niyiolouu nchere nanu ilo. Ore apa te dukuya nanu meetae ae ai naitobiruaki, nemeetae enaitokini aata te siadi nanu." 
Isaiah43:11 Ara nanu Olaitoriani, nemeetae likae Aitajeunoni leme nanu." 
Isaiah43:12 Aibalie apa nanu, naitajeu, nalimu, ina kata metii Enkai omoni atua intae, nirara intae ilchakenini laainei,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah43:13 “Ara nanu Enkai, naa neijia etiu o akenya Nanu ilo; Meetae oloidim atokordu te nkaina ai; kaasisho nanu, naa kaing'ae oidim aibooi ina siai?”" 
Isaiah43:14 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo okordu intae, ilo Sinyati le Israel, “Ore te nkaraki intae, kairriwaa nanu olkilikuai Babilon, meshomo agil nchomito pooki, ore ina buakunoto oo Lkaldayo, neibelekenyi aaitaa enkishirata." 
Isaiah43:15 Ara nanu Olaitoriani, ilo Sinyati linyi, ilo Aitobirani le Israel, Aiguanani linyi.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo oitobir enkoitoi ti atua enaiposha, nepik enkoitoi atua nkariak kumok," 
Isaiah43:17 ilo oyau ngarrin o mbartan, o lakedok o enjore; neirragie te nkop, nemeitoki aadumunye, neiliilaa ninche anaa oltaa:" 
Isaiah43:18 “Mintoki adamu mbaa e apa, niminguanare mbaa musan." 
Isaiah43:19 Ng'ura, aasita nanu embae ng'ejuk, egira taata ninye ailepu, aimimusu iyie? Kaitobir nanu enkoitoi ti ong'ata, napik ilkejek olpurkel." 
Isaiah43:20 Ore ng'uesi e ntim naayanyitu ninche nanu, mbariak o sidan; enkaraki naisho nanu ninche enkare ti ong'ata, napik ilkejek olpurkel, pee aisho nanu lelo gelunot laainei eneokishore," 
Isaiah43:21 lelo tung'ana apa laitobiraka kewan, pee etum ninche aaibalunye enkisisa ai." 
Isaiah43:22 “Ore ake eyia, eitu iyie kimpot nanu Yakobo; kake inaure iyie ti alo nanu, Israel!" 
Isaiah43:23 Eitu iyie kiyaki nkerra inono o lasar opejori, neitu kiyanyitu nanu too lasarri linono. Eitu nanu aaek too lasarri, anaa aaitanaur te nkorropil." 
Isaiah43:24 Eitu iyie kinyang'aki nanu enkorropil too mpisai, neitu kintaraposh eilata oo lasarri linono. Kake kiteeka iyie too ng'ok inono, kintanaura iyie nanu te nkarruoisho ino." 
Isaiah43:25 Nanu ilo ojutoo nkitarruorot inono, te nkaraki kewan ai, nemaitoki nanu adamu ng'ok inono." 
Isaiah43:26 Tipikaki nanu ndamunot, maishankarrata iyiook te nebo; iyau enkiguana ino, pee kitumi aaitisipa nchere iata esipata." 
Isaiah43:27 Etaasa apa papaai lino le dukuya eng'oki, ore lelo aitutumok linono naatapaashare nanu." 
Isaiah43:28 Ore enkaraki ina, aisarkionie nanu lelo kituaak le wueji sinyati, ayaua nanu Yakobo enkidaata naitaa Israel oldeket." 
Isaiah44:1 Kake ore taata toning'o, iyie Yakobo lo sinka lai, Israel laa iyie ategelua!" 
Isaiah44:2 Nji ejo Olaitoriani ilo likintobira, ilo likintobirua te nkoshoke e ng'utunyi naa ninye likilo aret. Miureishoyu iyie, Yakobo lo sinka lai, Yeshurun laa iyie ategelua." 
Isaiah44:3 Amu kabukoki nanu enkare ina kop e nkure, napik nkonyek oo nkariak ina kop natoyio; kabukoki nanu Enkiyang'et ai shumata eishoi inyi, nabukoki imayianat aainei eishoi inyi." 
Isaiah44:4 Kebulu ninche anaa nkujit naatii atua enkare, anaa iseyia oobulu too reyieta naaruko" 
Isaiah44:5 Nejo ake oltung'ani, ‘Ara nanu olo Laitoriani,’ ore olikae neipotie kewan enkarna e Yakobo, ore olikae neiger te nkaina enye ajo, ‘Olo Laitoriani,’ nedung'oki kewan enkarna metaa keji Israel.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo aiguanani le Israel naa ninye Olakordunoni lenye, Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Ara nanu ole dukuya nara ole nkiting'oto, meetae ae Ai neme nanu." 
Isaiah44:7 Kalo otiu anaa nanu? Nchoo ninye elimu aibalunye, nchoo ninye meibalunye neitodolu te dukuya nanu. Kaing'ae apa otolimuo aibalunye mbaa naapuonu? Nchoo ninche eliki iyiook mbaa naayooki aapuonu." 
Isaiah44:8 Miureishoyu nimimputukuny; keitu apa nanu aliki intae aibalakinye? Nirara intae ilchakenini laainei! Keetae ae ai neme nanu? Meetae likae ora endapidapoi; mayiolo nanu likae.” 
Isaiah44:9 Pesho lelo pooki apa ooitobira nkitanyaanyukot, ore nena tokitin naang'idare ninche nemeret ninche. Ore ilchakenini lenye nemedolisho nemeyiolo, pee etumi aaitukurru ninche." 
Isaiah44:10 Aing'ae oitobiru nkaitin oo nkitanyaanyukot nemeret hoo toki? 
Isaiah44:11 Ng'ura ore lelo tung'ana lenyena pooki naa keitukurruni. Ore lelo aguetak arriyiak naa iltung'ana ake; nchoo ninche pooki esoto, nchoo ninche eitashe, kepuo ninche pooki aairut, kepuoi aaitukurru ninche te nebo." 
Isaiah44:12 Eidong'u olkunoni ninye neitobiru te nchumata oo nkuk, neitobiru too sekenke oo idong'ishoreki, neriu ninye te ina aina enye nagol; netir ninye esumash neishunye engolon enye, naa te nelau enkare naok neiterre." 
Isaiah44:13 Eitorioo olaguetani olkereri, nesir te nkalamu; neitobiru ina naguetu too ntokitin naaguetishoreki, nesir te ntoki naipimishoreki neitobiru entoki naikununo anaa oltung'ani, nepik enkishiaa e tung'ani, pee etum atipika enkaji enye." 
Isaiah44:14 Nedung ninye iltarakua; anaa egelu ilkulikae keek, neisho ninche metubulu ti atua ilkeek le ntim, neun ninye iltarakua neitubulu enchan." 
Isaiah44:15 Neitoki aaku ilkeek le enkima, neya oltung'ani embata nelo aij, neinok ninye ina kima nepej emukate, neitoki sii aitobiru enkai te ilo shata neserem ninye. Neitobiru ninye enkitanyaanyukoto enkai neserem ninye, neitobiru ninye enkitanyaanyukoto e nkainagueta nebatata te dukuya ninye." 
Isaiah44:16 Ore olpisiai lenye nepejoo ninye te nkima, ore to likae pisiai neinosie ninche nkiri. Nepej nkiri neraposho; neij sii enkima neitoki ajo, “Ee, airowuaja nanu, atoduaa nanu enkima!”" 
Isaiah44:17 Ore enkae rubata pooki neitobirunye ninye enkae, ina kitanyaanyukoto enye, nebatatakino ninye ina kitanyaanyukoto aserem. Neomon ninye ina kitanyaanyukoto ejo, “Tokorduaki nanu, amu ira iyie enkai ai!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Meyiolo ninche nememuso; amu eikeno Olaitoriani nkonyek enye, pee medolisho ninche, o ndamunot enye pee meyiolou ninche." 
Isaiah44:19 Meetae hoo obo oshilaa, aashu olojurru ayiolou nemusu ajo, “Etapejoki olpisiai lenye te nkima, atapejo sii imukateni too nkuk enyena, natapejie nanu nkiri nainosa ninche. Paa amaa lelo ootelekutua, kaitaa nanu entoki olminong? Kabatata nanu te dukuya osototi loo lkeek?" 
Isaiah44:20 Nkuruon einos ninye; ore ina ng'eno enye nemelulung'a neitapong'oyie ninye, nemeidim ninye aitayu kewan anaa atejo, Ae metii elejare enkaina ai e tatene?”" 
Isaiah44:21 Tadamu kuna tokitin, iyie Yakobo, o Israel, amu ira iyie osinka lai; aaitobira iyie, ira iyie osinka lai Oo Israel, maarikino aikata nanu iyie." 
Isaiah44:22 Atikinyayie nanu nkitarruorot inono anaa enkatampoi, aishie ing'ok inono anaa enkinuku; torrinyunye wou enatii nanu, amu aatokordua nanu iyie." 
Isaiah44:23 Taranyisho, iyie shumata, amu etaasa Olaitoriani ina; Entabuaku intae ineegut e nkop; entang'amai entaranyisho intae ildoinyo, o iyie natim o pooki shani otii atua! Amu etokordua Olaitoriani Yakobo, naa kepuoi aaitaa ninye kitok te Israel." 
Isaiah44:24 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo likikordu iyie, laa ninye apa likintobirua te nkoshoke e yieyioo lino: “Ara nanu Olaitoriani, ilo oitobira ntokitin pooki, ilo apa oisalaasha keper openy, ilo oisalaasha enkop - Kaing'ae apa otii te nebo nanu?" 
Isaiah44:25 Ilo oibooyo enaibon oo laimonkok, neitaa iloibonok le lejare; ilo oibelekenyu ilang'eni arrinyu, neitaa ina ng'eno enye emodai;" 
Isaiah44:26 ilo oun ororei lo sinka lenye, neitabaya enkiguana oo lkipaareta lenyena; ilo ojo ti alo Yerusalem, ‘Kepuoi aamany ninye,’ nejo ti alo nkanas e Yuda, ‘Kepuoi aashet ninche, naitasheyie nanu ineeturori apa’;" 
Isaiah44:27 ilo ojoki ewueji negut, ‘Toyio, kaitoi nanu ilkejek linono’;" 
Isaiah44:28 ilo ojoki Sairos, ‘Olchekut lai ninye, naa keitabaya ninye eyieunoto ai’; ejo ti alo Yerusalem, ‘Kepuoi aashet,’ ore ti alo ina aji e Nkai, nejo, ‘Kepuoi aaitamanyu olkitamanyunoto lino.’”" 
Isaiah45:1 Nji etiaka Olaitoriani ilo otubukoko eilata, aput, ilo oji Sairos, ilo laibung'a nanu enkaina enye e tatene, pee elo ninye aitore iloreren te dukuya ninye neoru ilaiguanak imasaa enye, nebol nkutukie oo nkajijik te dukuya ninye pee meitoki nkutukie oo nkajijik aaikeno:" 
Isaiah45:2 “Kalo nanu te dukuya iyie naitorioo ildoinyio, kagiligil nanu nena shomito o suyai nagiligil nena shomito e sekenkei," 
Isaiah45:3 kaalo nanu aisho iyie ilo shumati le naimin o nena naaisudoro, pee itum iyie atayiolo nchere, ee nanu Olaitoriani, ina Ai e Israel, nikimpotuo iyie te nkarna ino." 
Isaiah45:4 Ore te nkaraki osinka lai Yakobo o Israel ilo gelunoti lai, aaipotu nanu te nkarna ino aaipotu nanu enkarna ino hoo nimikiyiolo iyie." 
Isaiah45:5 Ara nanu Olaitoriani, nemeetae likae, meetae ae Ai neme nanu; aarripito nanu hoo nimikiyiolo iyie nanu," 
Isaiah45:6 pee etum lelo tung'ana le nkilepunoto e nkolong, o lo loo ntoluo aatayiolo nchere meetae ae Ai neme nanu; nanu Olaitoriani nemeetae likae." 
Isaiah45:7 Aitobirua nanu ewang'an naitayu enaimin, nanu oyau emayianata o enkidaata, nanu Olaitoriani oas kuna baa pooki." 
Isaiah45:8 Tasha iyie shumata, te keper, naa nchoo shumata eshau esupatisho; naa nchoo enkop eng'amaa, pee etum enjeunoto aibulai, naa nchoo eitubulu esupatisho; nanu Olaitoriani oitobirua ina." 
Isaiah45:9 Woi ninye ilo okeshare oloitayio ninye, keishankarrare emoti oo nkulupuok ilo oitobira! Keikilikuan enterit ilo oitobir ajoki, Kainyoo iyie intobirita? Aashu ejoki, Meeta ena toki ino ineeibung'i?" 
Isaiah45:10 Woi ninye ilo ojoki menye, Kainyoo iyie iiu? Aashu ilo ojoki enkitok, Kainyoo iyie nikintasaisai? ”" 
Isaiah45:11 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo Osinya le Israel, ilo oitayio ninye: “Eikinkilikuanishore nanu ti alo nkera aainei, anaa eikisikong nanu ti alo esiaai oo nkaik aainei?" 
Isaiah45:12 Aitobira nanu enkop, naitayu oltung'ani apik oriong enkop; nkaik aainei apa naaisalaasha shumata, naitaisheiki nanu lelo ororani lenye pooki." 
Isaiah45:13 Ailepunye nanu ninye te sipata, naa kaitorioo nanu nkoitoi enyena pooki; kelo ninye ashet enkanasa ai ore lelo tung'ana laainei ooena nelaaya meshomo, neme te nkaraki enkishoroto anaa olerrinyore,” Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Isaiah45:14 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore ina arsisisho e Misiri o ina kinyang'a e Etiopia, o lelo tung'ana le Sabean adoru, naa kepuonu enitii neaku linono, nikipuo ninche aasujaa iyie; kepuonu ninche enitii eena too lpisia nikipuonu aairrugokino iyie. Eikipuo ninche aasai iyie ejo, ‘Etii Enkai te nebo iyie ake, meetae ae Ai neme ninye ake.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Esipa ira iyie Enkai naisudoo kewan, iyie na Ai e Israel, Olaitajeunoni." 
Isaiah45:16 Eitukurruaki ninche pooki netusulaki, ore lelo aitobirak loo nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nepuo to lmilo te nebo." 
Isaiah45:17 Kake eitajeuo Olaitoriani Israel, te njeunoto oo ntarasi; mikintukurruni iyie nimikisuli o akenya." 
Isaiah45:18 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo oitobira shumata (ninye Enkai!), Ilo oitobirua enkop neitayu (ninye oitotona; eitu ninye eitobir olmuate, eitayio ninye pee emanyi!): “Ara nanu Olaitoriani nemeetae likae." 
Isaiah45:19 Eitu apa nanu airo too nkurrat, ti atua ewueji e misimisi; eitu apa nanu ajoki eishoi e Yakobo, ‘Eng'oruaki to lmuate.’ Airo nanu Olaitoriani esipata, naibalunye ina nasipa." 
Isaiah45:20 Enturrurrunye nipuonunu, entinyiku wootu te nebo, intae lo pisai loo loshon! Meyiolo ninche toki lelo oonap nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye oo nkeek, netoni aaomon ina ai nemeidim aitajeusho." 
Isaiah45:21 Iyau lomon linono nimbalunye; nchoo ninche eiguana te nebo! Kaing'ae apa otolimuo ena te musano? Kaing'ae apa oibalunye? Aime nanu Olaitoriani? Nemeetae ae Ai neme nanu, Enkai nairo too sipat naa Olaitajeunoni; meetae ae Ai neme nanu." 
Isaiah45:22 Embelekenyata wootu enatii pee eitajeuni intae; intae ilubot pooki e nkop! Amu ara nanu Enkai, nemeetae ae." 
Isaiah45:23 Ainosa nanu olmumai te kewan ai, eimua enkutuk ai te sipata ilo rorei lemaaitoki arrinyokino: ‘Ore nanu kaagilakini pooki kung'u, neinos pooki ng'ejep olmumai.’" 
Isaiah45:24 Tiatua Olaitoriani ake, epuoi aajo tialo nanu, isipat o eng'olon. Ore lelo laaiba neitukurruni ninche." 
Isaiah45:25 Ore ti atua Olaitoriani kelo ina ishoi pooki e Israel amirisho netum enkitoo.” 
Isaiah46:1 Etusulari Beli, neijulujule Nebo, etii nkitanyaanyukot enye shumata ng'uesi o nkishu; ore kuna tokitin ninapinapa naa keiroishi anaa lolan ooek ing'uesi." 
Isaiah46:2 Neijulujula ninche, nesulunye te nebo, meidim ninche aataretu ilo ola, kake ore ninye nkorroki enye kepuo eyararoto." 
Isaiah46:3 “Toning'oki nanu, na aji e Yakobo, o ele pisiai pooki le nkaji e Israel, apa laatoikioki nanu ebaiki pee eini intae, oowaki apa ebaiki itii nguseti;" 
Isaiah46:4 ore ninye o te moruao inyi Nanu ake Ilo, ore eiborrita intae lukuny naa kanap intae. Aitobira nanu naa kanap; kaya nanu naa kalo agolie." 
Isaiah46:5 Kaing'ae intae kintanyaanyukiekie nikintorisiokiki, nikidutietie intae pee kinyaanyuku?" 
Isaiah46:6 Ore lelo oobuku sahabu too lbenia, neineneng enkosholai too ntemet e nkiroishi naa keiger olkunoni, neitayunye nena enkai; paa keitoki aabatata aaserem!" 
Isaiah46:7 Nedumu ninche ina kitanyaanyukoto aaiteleiki iloilila lenye, nenap ninye, nepuo aapik ewueji enye, neitasheyie te ine, nemeidim ninye ashomo te ine. Naa te neishiraki oltung'ani ninye, nemeidim atawaliki, aashu eitajeu ninye te nyamali enye." 
Isaiah46:8 Tadamu ena ninguanare, tadamu nkitarruorot inono," 
Isaiah46:9 tadamu inapa baa e apa musan; amu ara Olaitoriani nemeetae likae; ara nanu Olaitoriani nemeetae likae laanyaanyukie," 
Isaiah46:10 naibalunye nanu mbaa e nkiting'oto te nkiterunoto o ebaiki apa moitie naibalunye nena neton eitu eaku, ajo, ‘Kelo enkiguana ai aitashe, naa kalo nanu aitabaya iyieunot aainei pooki.’" 
Isaiah46:11 Aipotu ilo motonyi oinosisho te nkalo o loosaen, o ilo tung'ani le nkiguana ai meeu te nkop nalakua. Airoro nanu naa kaitabaya; aiguana nanu naa kaas ina." 
Isaiah46:12 Entoning'oki nanu intae iloogol onyek, intae kulo oo lakuaniki enkordunoto." 
Isaiah46:13 Aitataanua nanu enkordunoto ai, meekure elakua, nemeekure eimutie enjeunoto ai; naa kapik nanu enjeunoto atua Sion, te nkaraki Israel ina kitoo ai.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Tadou iyie totona te nterit na selenkei to e Babilon; totona te nkop metii olorika le nkitoo, naatito oo Lkaldayo! Amu meekure ae kata kingili aajo, enasipa osesen naisikarra" 
Isaiah47:2 Iwa lelo soito ooyutuutishoreki, ndong'u entapa, iwuang'ie ilo karasha limulumulare, intayu ilo kila lino, ting'ishai too nkejek inono, iima atua lkejek talang'a." 
Isaiah47:3 Kepuoi aaibalunye ina masipaisho ino, nepuoi aadol enkurruna ino. Kaitalaku nanu elap, nemaleku oltung'ani." 
Isaiah47:4 Ore Ilo okordu iyiook - naa Olaitoriani loo lororani, ninye enkarna enye - ninye Ilo Osinya le Israel." 
Isaiah47:5 Totona ntirring'ayu, nilo atua enaimin, na tito oo Lkaldayo; amu mikingili ae kata aajo enkaiguanani oo nkitoriat" 
Isaiah47:6 Atagorokine apa nanu iltung'ana laainei, aisarkionie nanu enjung'ore ai; aaishorua nanu apik atua nkaik inono, neitu iyie ing'urrie ninche; ore lelo moruak ntanapa iyie olola oiroishi oleng." 
Isaiah47:7 Itejo apa iyie, “Kaaku nanu enkaiguanani ntarasi,” ore enkaraki ina eitu iyie ipik kuna baa atua oltau lino, aashu idamu nkiting'ot enye." 
Isaiah47:8 Ore naa taata toning'o ena, iyie ena aisikarrani, ena naton eidipakine, ina najo to ltau lino, “Atii nanu, nemetii ae neiijo nanu; maton nanu anaa enkoliai nemeye nkera aainei.”" 
Isaiah47:9 Eikitum iyie kuna baa pokira, te nkata nabo, te nkolong nabo; ore keeya oo nkera inono o enkoliasho naa eikitum iyie te nkiputakinoto hoo niata iloibonok kumok o engolon kitok oo lasakutok." 
Isaiah47:10 Ndipakine apa iyie ti atua entorroni ino, nijo, “maadolita nanu oltung'ani; ” ore eng'eno ino o enkarriyiano ino nikintapong'oyie, nijo iyie to ltau lino, “Atii nanu, nemetii likae.”" 
Isaiah47:11 Kake kelotu entorroni shumata iyie, nemiindim iyie aibooi; kelotu enkidaata shumata iyie, nimindim iyie aitukuoi; nelotu enkidaata enitii nabo kata, neitu aekata idamu." 
Isaiah47:12 Ntasho tuunoyu ti atua esakutore ino o lelo oibonok linono kumok, laa ninche itanyamalikia ebaiki kitisho ino; eidimayu pee imirisho, eidimayu pee intureisho." 
Isaiah47:13 Inaure iyie te nena kiguanat inyi kumok, nchoo naa ninche eitashe pee kintajeu, lelo oor shumata, ootoni aing'or ilakir, laa ore te nedoli olapa neibonu ina nayooki alotu." 
Isaiah47:14 Ng'ura, eikununo ninche anaa suut, neinos enkima ninche; meidim ninche aaitajeu ate te ina golon o lng'ejep le nkima. Mme inoshi kuk kuna naaiji, neme enkima nanyikakinoyu!" 
Isaiah47:15 Neijia etiu te iyie ti alo nena baa apa nitanyamalikia, laa ninche apa iyie imbung'are ti atua enkishui ino pooki; kelo ake oltung'ani aim enkoitoi enye; meetae hoo obo likilo aitajeu iyie." 
Isaiah48:1 Toning'o ena, na aji e Yakobo, intae ilooipotieki e nkarna e Israel, lelo oora ile ishoi e Yuda; ooinos olmumai te nkarna o Laitoriani, nelimu aaibalunye Enkai e Israel, kake mme te sipata neme te nkitorioroto." 
Isaiah48:2 Amu ina anasa sinyati ninche eipotie ate, neisiligie ate ina Ai e Israel; Olaitoriani loo lororani ninye enkarna enye." 
Isaiah48:3 “Ore ntokitin e apa naibalunye apa nanu te musano, neipang'u nena aaimu enkutuk ai naisho nanu metayiolouni; naitoki taa nabo kata aas naitabaya." 
Isaiah48:4 Amu ayiolo apa nanu ajo igolong'u iyie, nikigol emurt anaa esekenkei netiu enkomom ino anaa osuyai," 
Isaiah48:5 atolimuo apa nanu aibalunye te musano, ore eton eitu ebaya, naaitoning'o iyie aibalakinye, pee milo ake ajo, ‘Enkitanyaanyukoto ai nataasa kuna, ina kitanyaanyukoto ai naguetuni, o ina naipurjuno nayaua kuna.’" 
Isaiah48:6 Itoning'o apa iyie; toduaa naa taata kuna pooki; ai milo naa iyie aibalunye? Ore ebaiki ena kata neito idia alo kaaitoning nanu iyie mbaa ng'ejuko, mbaa naaisudoro neitu ae kata iyiolou." 
Isaiah48:7 Taata eitobiraki ninche, mme apa; ore apa neitu ae kata iyie ining ninche, pee milo ake ajo, ‘Ng'ura, atayiolo apa nanu.’" 
Isaiah48:8 Eitu ae kata ining, eitu ae kata iyiolou, ore ebaiki apa eitu ae kata ebolokini enkiok ino. Amu atayiolo apa nanu ajo iasisho iyie te nkeleekisho, naa ore ebaiki pee kiini nira iyie oloipotokoki enkiseroto." 
Isaiah48:9 Ore te nkaraki enkarna ai aibooyie engoro ai, ore te nkaraki enkisisa ai aiwuang'ie nanu te iyie, pee maaiwuang'ie nanu iyie." 
Isaiah48:10 Ng'ura, aatisila nanu iyie, kake mme anaa enkosholai; aatetema nanu iyie to lkokuet loo nkisilisilot." 
Isaiah48:11 Te nkaraki kewan ai, te nkaraki kewan ai ake, ataasa nanu ina, amu kaji eiko pee eisarkionieki enkarna ai? Ore enkitoo ai maisho nanu likae." 
Isaiah48:12 Toning'oki nanu, iyie Yakobo, o Israel, apa laipoto nanu iyie! Nanu ilo, nanu ole dukuya, naa nanu ole siadi." 
Isaiah48:13 Enkaina ai nairragie olkitamanyunoto le nkop, naa enkaina ai e tatene naisalaasha oloing'ang'e te naipot nanu ninche, neitashe pooki te nebo." 
Isaiah48:14 Enturrurroto intae pooki pee ining'ining'i! Kalo ti atua ninche apa oibalunye kuna baa? Enyor Olaitoriani ninye; naa kelo ninye aas eyieunoto o Laitoriani te Babilon, nelo agilunore lelo Kaldayo." 
Isaiah48:15 Nanu, ee, nanu oiroro naipotu ninye, ayaua nanu ninye naa kelo ninye adupoyu te nkoitoi enye." 
Isaiah48:16 Entinyikakaki nanu, entoning ena: ore ebaiki apa te nkiterunoto eitu nanu airo too nkisudorot, ore ebaiki ina kata apa naeuo ina aaku, atii apa nanu ine.” Ore taata naairriua nanu Olaitoriani Enkai te nebo Enkiyang'et enye." 
Isaiah48:17 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Ilo likikordu iyie, Ilo Osinya le Israel: “Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo likinteng'en iyie tudupoyu, ilo likinkoo iyie te nkoitoi nilo aim." 
Isaiah48:18 Oi apa tenaa itoning'o nkitanapat aainei, amu anaata etotiuo eseriani ino anaa olkeju, netiu esupatisho ino anaa lopir le naiposha;" 
Isaiah48:19 anaata etaba eishoi ino anaa osinyai, ore lelo litoiuo iyie nebayu anaa soito lo sinyai; ore enkarna enye nemeiwuang'ieki ae kata arashu eishieki te dukuya nanu.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Shomo tung'uai Babilon, isika ilanya Ilkaldayo, mbalunye ena te mbuakunoto e ng'ida, embalunye ena, nchoo elo abaya ina enkiting'oto e nkop; tejo, “Etokordua Olaitoriani osinka lenye Yakobo!”" 
Isaiah48:21 Eitu apa ninche etum enkure ina kata erikito ninche aimie ilpurkeli; eishoo enkare meturukunye te nkaraki ninche eing'uaa endapidapoi; etoosho ninye endapidapoi nerukunye enkare. 
Isaiah48:22 “Meetae eseriani too ltorrok,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah49:1 Entoning'oki nanu, intae ilmanien le naiposha, nining'ining'i intae iloreren oo lakua. Aaipotuo apa nanu Olaitoriani atii enkoshoke, ore atii enkoshoke e yieyio neipot ninye enkarna ai." 
Isaiah49:2 Eitotiuo ninye enkutuk ai anaa olalem opi, naaisudoo ninye nanu to loip le nkaina enye; aaitaa ninye nanu embae nayopiroki, naapik atua emootian enye aisudoo." 
Isaiah49:3 Naajoki ninye nanu, “ira iyie osinka lai, Israel, laa te ninye aitaae nanu kitok.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Kake atejo nanu, “Aisiaishe pesho, ataasishore nanu engolon ai te pesho o to lng'am; kake ore ake eyia, etii esipata ai te nebo o Laitoriani, ore ole koisiayio lai neeta Enkai ai." 
Isaiah49:5 Ore taata nejo Olaitoriani, ilo apa laaitobirua nanu te nkoshoke pee aaku osinka lenye, pee ayau Yakobo arrinyoki ninye, netumi sii aaiturrurroki Israel ninye, amu aayanyitaki nanu too nkonyek o Laitoriani, netaa Enkai ai engolon ai -" 
Isaiah49:6 ejo ninye, Kentoki nalelek oleng ena nchere iaku iyie osinka lai, pee idumu iloshon le Yakobo nirrinyu lelo ootelekutua le Israel; kaaisho nanu iyie taa ewang'an too loreren, pee etum enjeunoto ai atabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo okordu Israel naa Ilo Sinyati, ajoki ilo otemenayioki oleng too ltung'ana, ilo oiba oleng iloshon, ilo sinka loo laitoriak: “Kepuo ilaiguanak aadol nedumunye; ore larikok o ninche nepuo aaserem maate, te nkaraki Olaitoriani oisiligayu ninye, Ilo Sinyati obo le Israel, laa ninye likitegelua iyie.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore te nkata e omom aatang'amayie nanu iyie, ore te nkolong e njeunoto aatareto nanu iyie; aatorripo nanu iyie naaishooyo aaitaa olning'o too ltung'ana, pee idumu ena kop, pee ioriki enjung'ore lelo ooliyio;" 
Isaiah49:9 ijoki lelo ooena, ‘Wootu ene,’ nijoki lelo ootii enaimin, ‘Entalioto.’ Nepuo ninche aadaa too mbat oo nkoitoi, ore nkisiajat pooki naaika neaku endaata enye." 
Isaiah49:10 Mepuo ninche aatum esumash o enkure, nemeitoki olkutati anaa enkolong napi aar ninche, amu ore ilo oing'urrie ninche naa ninye olo arikoo ninche, naa too nchorroi oo nkariak erikoo ninche." 
Isaiah49:11 Naitaa nanu ildoinyo laainei pooki enkoitoi, ore nena oitoi aainei kituaak naa keilepieki shumata." 
Isaiah49:12 Ng'ura, kepuonu kulo eing'uaa enelakua, naa ng'ura, eing'uaa kulo moikuape, neing'uaa oloo ntoluo, neing'uaa kulo enkop e Sirini.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Taranyisho te ng'ida, iyie shumata, nishipayu na kop; entaranyisho intae lo doinyo! Amu eitagolo Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena, naa kelo aing'urrie lelo apa ooisilisiloki." 
Isaiah49:14 Kake etejo Sion, “Aaiturrayie nanu Olaitoriani, meekure aadamu Olaitoriani lai.”" 
Isaiah49:15 “Kerikino enkitok enkerai enye nanakita, eji meitoki aing'urrie ina kerai e nkoshoke enye?” Ee keidim atorikinoyu, kake maarikino nanu iyie." 
Isaiah49:16 Ng'ura, aatisira nanu too ndapi oo nkaik aainei, etii isunta inono anaake dukuya nkonyek aainei." 
Isaiah49:17 Etumuruto ilashetak linono lelo apa likitigila, ore apa lelo likitomijoon nikipuo aaing'uaa iyie." 
Isaiah49:18 Tushumu nkonyek inono ntamanai ing'orisho; eiturrurrote pooki, nepuonu ninche enitii. Ore anaa enaishu nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, ilo iyie aishop ninche pooki anaa emasaai, nienikino ninche anaa enaenikino esiankiki narikori imasaa enyena." 
Isaiah49:19 “Esipa ore ilmuateni linyi o wuejitin apa neetomijono, o ina kop inyi apa nainyalaki - naa kepuo aapiriku te lelo oomany; ore apa lelo oo toijoitie intae naa kelamari oleng." 
Isaiah49:20 Ore nena kera apa naatoiwuoki te nkata o sina, nepuo sii ninche aajo ining'itoto, ‘Kepirik ene wueji te nanu; ing'urakaki ewueji namany.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Nilo ajo to ltau lino: ‘Kaing'ae laatoikio nanu kuna? Aatung'uayioki apa aa nanu ake nara olupi, nashomo eyararoto naayae enelakua, kake aing'ae naitubulua kuna? Ng'ura, aatung'uayioki apa aa nanu ake; Kaji naa eimutua kuna?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Ng'ura, kailepakinye nanu iloshon enkaina ai, nailepakinye olmonekie lai iloreren; neyau ninche ilayiok linyi too lgooitie lenye, ore ntoyie inyi nepuoi aanap too leilila lenye." 
Isaiah49:23 Kepuo laiguanak aaku loo papaai linyi ooitubulu intae, ore nkaiguanak enye neaku ninche naaing'or intae aaitoti. Neitabaiki ninche nkomomi enye enkop eirrugokino intae, nemej ina terit oo nkejek inyi. Nilo taa ayiolou nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani; ore lelo laanyu nanu nemeitukurruni.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Keidimi aawaita entoki naibung'ita ilo ogol, anaa keidimi aawaita ilo oibung'aki otii nkaik e ilo torrono?" 
Isaiah49:25 Esipa, Olaitoriani ojo: “Ekeidimi ninye aawaita lelo ooena le ilo ogol, neidimi aatokordu ina naibung'ita ologol, amu kagilunore nanu lelo oogilunore intae; naa kaitajeu nanu nkera inyi." 
Isaiah49:26 Kaisho nanu lelo ooitorogony intae meinosa nkiri enye maate, nemera eok isargeta lenye anaa ilootooko enaisho oo sabibu. Netum taa pooki toki naishu atayiolo nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani, Olaitajeunoni linyi, nara ilo Okordu intae, Ilo Magilani le Yakobo.”" 
Isaiah50:1 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Koree empalai naarieki enkiyama e ng'utunyi amu ataarayie apa nanu ninye? Anaa kalo te lelo laatakinore esile apa atimiraka intae? Ng'ura, te nkaraki ntorrok inono apa pee kitimiraki iyie, naa te nkaraki engilata ino oo nkitanapat apa pee etaarayioki ng'utunyi." 
Isaiah50:2 Kainyoo naa, amaa apa pee alotu, keitu ninye ainepu oltung'ani obo? Amaa, pee aipotisho, aimeetae ninye oltung'ani oirukisho? Keitodorropaki enkaina ai eji metaa meidim atokordu likae? Anaa aimaata nanu engolon naitajeunye? Ng'ura, ore te nkisikong'are ai, naitoi nanu enaiposha, naitaa nanu ilkejek e nkop natoyio; neng'ueyu isinkir lenye etalaita enkare, neye te nkure." 
Isaiah50:3 Kaishop nanu oloing'ang'e te misimisi, naitotiu anaa enaishopokoki ilkuniyiani.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Aaishoo nanu Olaitoriani Enkai olng'ejep te nkaraki lelo ooiteng'eni, pee atum nanu aitagolo to rorei ilo otalepori. Ore anaake tadekenya, naaputu ninye matoning'o te nkiok ai, matoning'o anaa lelo ooiteng'eni." 
Isaiah50:5 Etabolo Olaitoriani Enkai enkiok ai, neitu nanu agolong'aki; eitu nanu arrinyo siadi." 
Isaiah50:6 Aisho nanu enkoriong lelo ooshisho, naisho isederi lelo laayiet olmunyei; eitu nanu aisudoo enkomom ai pee maasuli anaa aanotakini." 
Isaiah50:7 Amu Olaitoriani Enkai laaret nanu; ore enkaraki ina eitu nanu aing'aeng'ae neaku aitirring'e nanu, nayiolo nanu ajo maaitukurruni nanu;" 
Isaiah50:8 ore ilo laailepie nanu naa ketaana. Kalo laagilunore nanu? Maitasheikinoto te nebo. Kalo olmang'atinta lai? Nchoo ninye aalotu anyikaki. 
Isaiah50:9 Ng'ura, Olaitoriani Enkai laaret nanu; kalo laadung'oki nanu enkiguana? Ng'ura, keishunye ninche pooki anaa enkila: keinos ninche olasai." 
Isaiah50:10 Kalo ti alo intae oure Olaitoriani neiruk oltoilo lo sinka lenye, lelo oopuonu te naimin metii ewang'an, kake ore eyia, neisilig enkarna o Laitoriani neigarakino Enkai enye?" 
Isaiah50:11 Ng'ura, ore intae pooki ooinok enkima, lelo ooinok ilkilang'ilang'eta! Ipuopuo te wang'an e nkima inyi, o te lelo kilang'ilang'eta linuaa intae! Ipuopuo intae aatum ena te nkaina ai: ipuopuo intae aairrag to sina le mion." 
Isaiah51:1 “Entoning'oki nanu intae ilooing'oru enkordunoto, intae kulo oolilitu Olaitoriani; eng'ura intae ina dapidapoi apa naa ninye etaguetunyeki intae, o ina gumoto oo soito apa natuturunyeki intae." 
Isaiah51:2 Eng'ura Abraham papaai linyi o Sara apa natoiuo intae; amu ore apa eton aa nabo aipotuo nanu ninye, namayian nanu ninye naitaa kumok." 
Isaiah51:3 Amu kelo Olaitoriani aitagol Sion; nelo aitagol nene wuejitin pooki apa neeinyalaki, neitotiu ilo purkel lenye anaa Eden, netiu ilo purkel anaa enkurma o Laitoriani; keaku eng'ida o enchipai etumi ti atua ninye, o enkishooroto e nashe o ltoilo lo sinkolio." 
Isaiah51:4 Entoning'oki lo tung'ana laainei, nikinchosho nanu enkiok, lo orere lai; amu kelotu enkitanapata naing'uaa enatii, o esupatisho naaku ewang'an too ltung'ana." 
Isaiah51:5 Kenyiku enkordunoto ai asioku, eeuo enjeunoto ai, naa kelo enkaina ai aitore iloreren, nanu eanyita lelo ootii ilmanien le naiposha, naa enkaina ai eisiligita ninche." 
Isaiah51:6 Entudumu nkonyek inyi eng'ura shumata, nirrugogo aaing'or enkop ti abori; amu keish shumata anaa empuruo, neish enkop anaa olkila, ore lelo oomanya ninye naa keye anaa lojong'a; kake keaku enjeunoto ai enoo ntarasi, ore ina kordunoto ai nemeish ae kata." 
Isaiah51:7 Entoning'oki nanu intae ilooyiolo esipata, kulo tung'ana ootii enkitanapata ai iltauja lenye; emiureyu imorot oo ltung'ana, niming'aeng'ae te neinyal intae nesukeny." 
Isaiah51:8 Amu keinos ninche olasai anaa nkilani, neinos ninche olkurto anaa ilpapit loo nkerra; kake ore enkordunoto ai naa enoo ntarasi, ore enjeunoto ai naa enoo ishoritin pooki.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Tudumunye, tudumunye, ntagoluoyu, Na aina o Laitoriani; tudumunye anaa apa, te nena ishoritin e apa moitie. Aime iyie apa otudung'udung'o Rahab aitaa ndung'ot, aime iyie apa otaremo enkukuu?" 
Isaiah51:10 Aime iyie apa oitoyio enaiposha, nena ariak e ine wueji kitok negut; aime iyie apa oitaa enguton e naiposha enkoitoi, pee etum lelo ootokorduaki aaima?" 
Isaiah51:11 Naa keshukunye lelo ooinyang'ua Olaitoriani aapuonu Sion eranyisho; kelo eng'ida nemeeta enkiting'oto shumata lukuny enye; kepuo ninche aang'amu eng'ida o enchipai, ore osina o somit nepuo aailanyisho." 
Isaiah51:12 “Nanu, nanu ilo oitagol intae ira iyie ng'ae eji metaa iure oltung'ani laa keye, ina kerai e tung'ani naitayioki anaa nkujit," 
Isaiah51:13 nikirikino Olaitoriani, Ilo likintobirua, Ilo laa ninye oisalaasha oloing'ang'e nepik olkitamanyunoto le nkop, niureishoyu endama pooki te nkaraki ina engoro napi e ilo oitorogonyisho, ina kata te nelotu ninye amutisho? Koree naa ina goro napi e ilo oitorogonyisho?" 
Isaiah51:14 Ore ilo oibookoki enkop naa kelaari nabo kata; meye ninye nedou alo atua engumoto, nemeishunye ae kata endaa enye." 
Isaiah51:15 Amu ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo oputu enaiposha o metaa keikurrukur ilopir lenyena - Olaitoriani loo lororani ninye enkarna enye." 
Isaiah51:16 Natipika nanu irorei laainei enkutuk ino, naaisudoo iyie ti atua oloip le nkaina ai, neisalaash oloing'ang'e naitobir olkitamanyunoto le nkop, najoki Sion, ‘Irara intae iltung'ana laainei.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Tushumunye, tushumunye, ntasho, iyie Yerusalem, iyie anaa ina natookishe te nkaina o Laitoriani te ina kikompe e ngoro enye, iyie enatookishe to lbakuli amera, niyukuyukori" 
Isaiah51:18 Meetae hoo obo orikoo ninye ti atua lelo ayiok pooki ooitoiuo; meetae oltung'ani oibung enkaina ti atua lelo ayiok pooki ooitubulua. 
Isaiah51:19 Kitijing'a kuna tabo pokira are - kaing'ae likintigir iyie? - eliyio, o enkidaata, o lameyu o lalem; kaing'ae likintagol iyie?" 
Isaiah51:20 Eiterritia ilayiok linono, eirragaa te dukuya pooki eitoi anaa entarakuet natijing'a orreshet; ebore ninche engoro o Laitoriani, ina kisikong'ata e Nkai ino" 
Isaiah51:21 Ore enkaraki ina, entoning ena, intae kulo ooinosa osina, kulo ootemerate neme te naisho:" 
Isaiah51:22 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Olaitoriani Enkai ino Ilo ogol le ltung'ana lenyena: “Ng'ura, aiwuang'ie nanu te nkaina ino ina kikompe e merai nikiyukuyukie; ina girra e ngoro ai mingil ae kata iyie aok;" 
Isaiah51:23 naa kalo nanu apik nkaik e lelo aisilisilok linono, lelo apa likitiakita, ‘Irrugoyu pee kitum iyiook aashom’; nintotiu iyie enkoriong ino anaa enkop netiu anaa enkoitoi naaim ninche.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Tuputunye, tuputunye, ntagoluoyu iyie Sion; nchopo lelo kilani linono sidain, iyie Yerusalem, na anasa sinyati, amu meigil ae kata alotu enitii ilo lememurata o ilo oiduruk." 
Isaiah52:2 Mpiripiroi ina terit natii osesen lino, tuputunye; iyie ena naena, Yerusalem; ntololong'a nena keenta naatii emurt ino, iyie ena tito naena e Sion." 
Isaiah52:3 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Etimiraki apa intae pesho, naa kepuoi sii aakordu intae metii enkinyang'a." 
Isaiah52:4 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Etang'asa apa iltung'ana laainei aadoyio aapuo Misiri aamany ine, neisomit lelo le Asiria ninche pesho." 
Isaiah52:5 Amaa, naa taata kainyoo nanu aata te ine, Olaitoriani ojo, idolita ajo eewaki iltung'ana laainei pesho? Kedar lelo aitoriak lenye, Olaitoriani ojo, ore endama pooki anaake nemenaa ninche enkarna ai." 
Isaiah52:6 Ore enkaraki ina kepuo iltung'ana laainei aayiolou enkarna ai; ore enkaraki ina akenya te ina olong naapuo ninche aayiolou nanu ilo oirorita; nele nanu.” 
Isaiah52:7 Kebaa esidano too nchumat oo ldoinyo nkejek e lelo ooyau ilomon supati, lelo oolimu aaibalunye eseriani, lelo ooyau ilomon supati le seriani, lelo oolimu aaibalunye enjeunoto, lelo oojoki Sion, “Enkai ino naitoreisho.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Entoning, ilarripok linyi eilepie iltoiloishi lenye, eranyisho ninche te nebo te ng'ida; amu etoduaa ninche too nkonyek ina rrinyunoto o Laitoriani elotu Sion." 
Isaiah52:9 Entijing pooki osinkolio te nebo, intae iwuejitin apa neeinyalaki e Yerusalem; amu eitagolo Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena, etokordua ninye Yerusalem." 
Isaiah52:10 Etudumua Olaitoriani enkaina enye sinyati te dukuya nkonyek oo loshon pooki; naa kedol ineeiting'ie enkop pooki enjeunoto e Nkai ang. 
Isaiah52:11 Enchom, enchom, empang'a enchom idie, eminyikaki ake entoki nemesinya; empang'a entung'uai ninye, entisinya ate, intae lelo oonapita imasaa o Laitoriani." 
Isaiah52:12 Amu mipuopuo intae te nkisarrisar, nimipuopuo te nkisikata, amu Olaitoriani olo te dukuya intae, naa Enkai e Israel naing'or intae te siadi." 
Isaiah52:13 Ng'ura, kelo osinka lai adupoyu, keitaae ninye kitok neilepieki, naa kelo ninye shumata oleng." 
Isaiah52:14 Ore anaa enaing'asiate ilkumok te nkaraki ninye - ore elioto enye, neibelekenya, meekure enyaanyukie enkomom o ltung'ani, ore empukunoto neibelekenya arruoyo alang ene tung'ani." 
Isaiah52:15 Neaku keing'asiayie ninye iloshon kumok; nenuka ilaiguanak nkutukie te nkaraki ninye; amu ore ina neitu elikini ninche naa kepuo aadol, ore ina neitu ae kata ening nepuo aayiolou." 
Isaiah53:1 Kaing'ae otonyorrayie ina nikitoning'o? Naa ae te ng'ae etabolokoki enkaina o Laitoriani? 
Isaiah53:2 Amu etubulua ninye te dukuya Olaitoriani anaa enkaitubului kiti, o anaa entonai te nkop natoyio; meeta ninye enkishiaa anaa eneing'ori, eji metaa eiking'or iyiook ninye, nemeeta esidano eji metaa eiking'uar." 
Isaiah53:3 Etanyaita apa nemenaa iltung'ana ninye, oltung'ani loo sinaitin ninye netamoo osina; ore anaa obo lemeyieu iltung'ana neing'or, netemenayioki, neitu iyiook kishilaa ninye." 
Isaiah53:4 Esipa etanapa ninye emion ang nenap isinaitin lang; ore ake eyia nikidol ninye etooshoki, etoosho ninye Enkai, neisilisil." 
Isaiah53:5 Kake etipikaki ninye olbae te nkaraki nkitarruorot ang, eitamorroojoki ninye tenkaraki ntorrok ang. Shumata ninye etii enkitamioto naa ninye naishiunye iyiook, naa too oshot enyena eishiunyeki iyiook." 
Isaiah53:6 Kitiu iyiook pooki anaa nkerra naaimina, kishomo aaidapashari; kimbelekenyakinote oltung'ani ake enkoitoi enye; neiteleikia Olaitoriani shumata ninye entorroni ang pooki." 
Isaiah53:7 Eitorogonyaki apa ninye neisilisili, kake eitu ebol enkutuk enye; ore anaa olkuo le ker opuoi aayieng, o anaa enker natii dukuya lelo oodung ilpapit lenyena, mebol enkutuk, neijia sii apa eikuna ninye, eitu ebol enkutuk." 
Isaiah53:8 Ore te nkitorogonyata e ndung'okinoto e nkiguana, newaki ninye; naa ore to lporror lenye aing'ae otishilayie, nchere eiwuang'ieki ninye te ina kop e lelo ooishu, etooshoki te nkitarruoroto oo ltung'ana laainei?" 
Isaiah53:9 Neitobir ninche enkurare enye te nebo lelo arruok etunukayioki ninye te nebo olkarsis, hoo duoo ninye nemeeta entorroni nataasa, neitu ae kata ejo elejare te nkutuk enye." 
Isaiah53:10 Kake eyieunoto apa Olaitoriani pee epik ninye olbae; etipika Olaitoriani ninye osina; neitaa ninye kewan olasar loo ng'ok, nelo adol eishoi enye, neitoodori nkolong'i enyena; kelo eyieunoto o Laitoriani adupoyu te nkaina enye;" 
Isaiah53:11 kelo ninye adol ilng'anayio le mion o ltau lenye neshipayu; ore te yiolounoto enye ilo osipa, ilo sinka lai, keisho ilkumok meikenakini isipat; naa kenap ninye nkitarruorot enye." 
Isaiah53:12 Ore enkaraki ina kaoriki ninye erubata te nebo lelo kituaak, neor ninye nena naataaruaki te nebo lelo oogol; enkaraki natubukoko ninye enkishui enye keeya, neikenakini lelo arruok; ore enkaraki ina netanapa ng'ok oo lkumok, neaku oloomonoki lelo aitarruorok." 
Isaiah54:1 “Taranyisho iyie na olupi, ina neitu eisho; tabuaku taranyisho to ltoilo sapuk, iyie ina neitu ae kata esaisayu! Amu ore nkera e ina apa naiturrayioki naa eikumok aalang ine ina nayama, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah54:2 Ntalala ewueji o lng'obor lino, nincho lelo karash le manyisho ino elaari; minunuk, ntoodoro nkeenta inono nintagol ncheito inono" 
Isaiah54:3 Amu eilo iyie aisuaa te tatene o te kedienye, naa kelo eishoi ino aya iloreren nepuo aamany nena anas apa naatung'uayioki." 
Isaiah54:4 Miureishoyu amu mikipuoi aaitukurru; ming'aing'ai amu mikintukurruni; amu mingil ae kata adamu enkurruna e kitisho ino, ore ilo sina lino apa ira enkoliai nimingil ae kata adamu." 
Isaiah54:5 Amu Ilo Likintobira iyie ninye olpayian lino, Olaitoriani loo lororani ninye enkarna enye; naa Ilo Sinyati le Israel Olakordunoni lino, naa keji ninye Enkai e nkop pooki." 
Isaiah54:6 Amu kimpoto iyie Olaitoriani, itiu anaa enkitok nataarayioki netum osina to ltau, anaa esiankiki naiturrayioki, Enkai ino najo." 
Isaiah54:7 Te rishata dorrop apa aaiturrayie nanu, kake to lng'ur kitok aaiturrur nanu." 
Isaiah54:8 Te ngoro nadooyo nanu aisudoyie enkomom ai te iyie, te nkiti rishata, kake te nyorrata oo ntarasi nanu aaing'urrie iyie, Olaitoriani ojo, Ilo akordunoni lino." 
Isaiah54:9 Amu kelo ena atiu anaa nkolong'i e Noa te nanu: ore anaa apa enainosa olmumai nchere meigil nkariak e Noa aapuonu enkop, ainosa sii olmumai nchere maaigil ae kata agorokino, nemaigil ae kata aisikong." 
Isaiah54:10 Amu eidim aaidurra ildoinyo, neidimi aaiwuang'ie ildoinyo, kake melo ae kata ina nyorrata ai nauno aing'uaa intae, ore ilo sotua lai le seriani nemeiwuang'ieki, Olaitoriani ojo, ilo oata olng'ur tialo iyie." 
Isaiah54:11 Iyie ena nainosa osina, ena natara olkutati neitu eitagoli, ng'ura, kairragie nanu isoito linono aitobiraki, naitobir ilkitamanyunot linono too ltoto oogol enkinyang'a ooji safira." 
Isaiah54:12 Naitobir nanu iltaleta linono too soito oji agate, naitobir nchomito inyi too ltoto ooji almasi, naitobir isunta inono pooki too soito oogol e nkiyang'a." 
Isaiah54:13 Ore layiok linono pooki naa Olaitoriani olo aiteng'en, naa kepuo lelo ayiok linono aadupoyu oleng." 
Isaiah54:14 Naa kepuoi aaitubul intae te sipata; nipuopuo aalakuaniki olosilisili, amu mintokiki intae aaureishoyu; ore too ntabo, nemenyikaki ninche intae." 
Isaiah54:15 Te nedumakino intae likae tung'ani neme nanu eing'uaa ina; ore ilo oba anaa olodumakino intae nebatata te nkaraki intae. 
Isaiah54:16 Ng'ura, aitobira nanu olkunoni laa ninye okut enkima oo nkuk, neitobiru imasaa o larrabal pee easishoreki. Aitobira sii ilo oitalaku elap pee eidaikie;" 
Isaiah54:17 meetae iruparen naitobiraki pee earieki intae naapuo aaku, ore pooki ng'ejep odumakino intae te nkiguana, nintukurrurru. Ena ninye enjung'ore oo sinkan lo Laitoriani naa kailepie nanu ninche, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Isaiah55:1 “Wou pooki ng'ae oata enkure, wootu entook nkariak; wou, iyie ilo lemeeta mpisai inyang'u endaa inosa! Wou, inyang'u enaisho o kule, wou, miata ropiyiani nemetii enkinyang'a." 
Isaiah55:2 Kaainyo pee inchang'itie iropiyiani te ina neme endaa? Kaainyo pee inchang'itie ole koisiayio te ina nemeraposhisho? Toning'oki nanu nias ina naajoki, pee itum ina daa sidai aisul, nishipakino nena naapir." 
Isaiah55:3 Irrugokoki nanu enkiok nilotu enatii; toning'o pee etum oltau lino atopuaa; pee aitobir nanu te nebo iyie osotua loo ntarasi, ilo sotua lai ouno te nkaraki Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Ng'ura, aitaa apa nanu ninye shakeni too loreren, pee eaku olarikoni o Laitoreisho too loreren." 
Isaiah55:5 Ng'ura, ipuopuo intae aaipuotu lelo oreren limiyiololo intae, ore lelo oreren lemeyiolo intae nekuetiki intae, te nkaraki Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, o Ilo Osinya le Israel, amu eitaa ninye intae olosho kitok." 
Isaiah55:6 Eng'oru Olaitoriani eton etumoyu, empoto ninye eton etaana;" 
Isaiah55:7 nchoo ilo torrono epaash nkoitoi enyena torrok, ore ilo lemeas isipat nepal ndamunot enyena; nchoo ninye errinyokino Olaitoriani, pee etum Olaitoriani aing'urrie ninye, nchoo errinyokino Enkai ang, amu kepalaki ninye oleng." 
Isaiah55:8 Amu ore ndamunot aainei neme ndamunot inyi, ore nkoitoi aainei neme nkoitoi inyi, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah55:9 Amu ore anaa enalakuaniki keper enkop, neijia etiu nkoitoi aainei elakuaniki nkuninyi, o ndamunot aainei elakuaniki ndamunot inyi." 
Isaiah55:10 Amu ore anaa enadou enchan o enkinuku eing'uaa keper, nemerrinyo kake kepuo aaitashal enkop, neitubulu nkaitubulu, neisho ilanterera lelo oounisho neisho endaa ilo oinos," 
Isaiah55:11 neijia sii etiu ilo rorei lai oimu enkutuk ai; maarrinyokino nanu erok, kake kelo aitabaya inaipirie, nelo aitubul ina toki apa nairriwaka." 
Isaiah55:12 Amu mpang'ipang'a intae aapuo te ng'ida, nerikori intae te seriani; ore lelo doinyio o ndoinyio naatii dukuya intae, nebuaku aaranyisho, ore lelo keek pooki li ong'ata neosh nkaik." 
Isaiah55:13 Ore erishata nabulu ilkiku naa iltarakua oobulu, ore erishata nabulu endiati naa olchani onyaanyukie olarrashi ore ena to Laitoriani naa kelo aaku entoki nadamuni, olmonekie loo ntarasi lemeiwuang'ieki ae kata.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Embung'a esipata niasiasa nena sidain, amu kelotu enjeunoto ai asieku, ore enkordunoto ai neibalunyeki." 
Isaiah56:2 Emayiana ilo tung'ani oas ena, o enkerai e tung'ani naibung akurraki, ilo oibung sabato, nemeisarkionie, neibooyo enkaina enye pee meas entorroni ake pooki.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Nchoo ilo leeiking'a oeuo aibung'are Olaitoriani ejo, “Esipa kaakepu nanu Olaitoriani too ltung'ana lenyena.” Naa nchoo ake mejo ilo sunash ogelema, “Ng'ura, ara nanu olchani otoyio.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore lelo sunaishi oogelema ooibung sabato ai, lelo oogelu mbaa naaitiship nanu neibung aakurraki olning'o lai lo sotua," 
Isaiah56:5 naa kalo nanu aisho ti atua enkaji ai o ti atua isunta e nkaji ai, entoki nadamunyeki sidai nalang ilayiok o ntoyie; kaisho nanu ninche enkarna oo ntarasi nemeiwuang'ieki ae kata." 
Isaiah56:6 “Ore lelo tung'ana leeiking'a oopuonu aaibung'are Olaitoriani, pee esiaai ninye, pee enyorru enkarna o Laitoriani, pee eaku isinkan lenyena, ore pooki ng'ae ooibung sabato, nemeisarkionie ninye, neibung olning'o lai lo sotua akurraki" 
Isaiah56:7 ore kulo nariku nanu ilo doinyio lai sinyati naisho nanu ninche meting'idata ti atua ina aji ai e nkomono; ore lelo asarri lenye oopejori o nkishorunot enye, naa kepuoi aang'amaa te nchumata ilo perere lai lo lasar; amu kepuoi aajo enkaji ai enkaji enkomono too loreren pooki." 
Isaiah56:8 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ilo oiturrur lelo apa ooiturrayioki le Israel, kaigil nanu aiturrur kulikae te nebo lelo ooidipaki aaiturruro.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Na ng'uesi kuna pooki e ong'ata wootu enosa - o intae na ng'uesi e ntim pooki. 
Isaiah56:10 “Aimodook ilarripok lenyena naa ilmoda pooki; ildiein oomoda ninche pooki, meidim aatabuak, ooidetidet eirrag oonyor aaimugo." 
Isaiah56:11 Eeta lelo diein enkuli kitok, meraposho ae kata ninche. Ore sii lelo shekuti naa kemoda; eibelekenyakinote pooki nkoitoi enye maate, oltung'ani enkoitoi enye nadupore, neijia eikuna pooki." 
Isaiah56:12 Nejo ninche, ‘Wootu’, maatook enaisho, maitaraposho ate enaisho napi; ore taisere naa ketiu anaa ena olong, keaku kitok alus.”" 
Isaiah57:1 keidak iltung'ana supati nemeetae oltung'ani oshilaa; eiwuang'ieki lelo tung'ana le Nkai aaya, nemetii oltung'ani oyiolo, amu ewaki ilo tung'ani supat aaitung'uaa entorroni," 
Isaiah57:2 nejing ninye atua eseriani; neeng'iyeng'a ninche too rruatin enye, lelo oopuo te supatisho." 
Isaiah57:3 Kake ore intae, entinyiku wootu ene, intae ilayiok loo lasakutok, eishoi oo looibor onyek o mulayoni." 
Isaiah57:4 Kaing'ae ilo linguranienie intae? Kaing'ae ilo libolokiki nkutukie aakueniki, nintarasusu ilng'ejepa? Aimirara intae nkera e nkitarruoroto, eishoi e lejare," 
Isaiah57:5 intae lelo oata enkiyupuyup o lng'uarra ti atua lkeek, ti abori pooki shani onyori; intae lelo ooyieng nkera enye too erat, ti abori ndapidapo sapuki?" 
Isaiah57:6 Atua lelo soito oopuyiapui lo earata ninye erubata ino; ninche, eluata ino; amu ninche iyie itubukoko olasar ooki, iyaua iyie olasar le ntapa. Kaaitiship nanu kuna tokitin?" 
Isaiah57:7 Shumata oldoinyo oado etii erruat ino, naa ine iyie ilepa alo aitayu olasar." 
Isaiah57:8 Ore te njoolata e kutuk aji o ng'apeta e kutuk aji nitipika iyie nkitanyaanyukot inono; amu ore kitung'uaitie, niwuang'ie ilkarash loo ndapashi inyi, nikedikede intae nena rruatin dapashi; nipuopuo intae aainyang'a maate o ninche, nitonyorra intae ina dapash enye, ning'ura intae ina masipaisho." 
Isaiah57:9 Itudumunye iyie alo Molek iata eilata niponaa iyie enkorropil ino, nirriwaa iyie olkilikuai lino enelakua, nirriwaa enelakua omeshomo enemeneng'a." 
Isaiah57:10 Iteekenye iyie te nkadoro e lototo ino, kake eitu iyie ijo, “Metii osiligi”; inoto iyie enkishui ng'ejuk nikinyaaka aitagol, neaku eitu iyie nterre." 
Isaiah57:11 Kaing'ae apa ilo liurere, neaku itelejishe, neitu kidamu nanu, eitu ninye kipik ndamunot? Keitu nanu ang'iri ena kata pooki, neitu ake kiureyu nanu?" 
Isaiah57:12 Kalikioo isipat inono o yasat inono, kake mikiret." 
Isaiah57:13 Ti ninchir iyie, nchoo ilo sototi lino loo nkitanyaanyukot mikitokordu! Kenap ninche osiuo aya, keya ninche enkiyang'et. Kake ore oloisudori ti atua nanu naa kelo aya ina kop, nelo ajung ilodoinyo lai sinyati." 
Isaiah57:14 Naa kepuoi kenya aajo, “Teshetu, teshetu, ntobira enkoitoi, iwuang'ie pooki toki naikobisho te nkoitoi oo ltung'ana laainei.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Amu nji ejo ilo otii shumata osinya, enye Sinyati: “Aamanya nanu ewueji e shumata sinyati te nebo ilo oata oltau supat obor, pee etum aitopiu enkiyang'et e ilo obor, neitopiu oltau le ilo supat nebor." 
Isaiah57:16 Amu magilunore nanu ninche ntarasi, nemagorokino nanu ninche anaake; amu nanu eimu enkiyang'et, naitobira nanu ina kiyang'et e nkishui." 
Isaiah57:17 Te nkaraki eng'oki enye o lorok apa atagore nanu, atoosho nanu ninye, naisudoo enkomom ai nagoro, kake eshomo ninye siadi aitalaaya too nkoitoi o ltau lenye makewan." 
Isaiah57:18 Atoduaa nanu nkoitoi enyena, kake kaishiunye nanu ninye; karikoo nanu ninye naitagol ninye, naitigir lelo ooishir." 
Isaiah57:19 Eseriani to lolakua o to lotaana, Olaitoriani ojo; naa kaishiunye nanu ninye." 
Isaiah57:20 Kake etiu ilo torrono anaa enaiposha nailugo, ore enkare enye neilugu isuut o esarng'ab." 
Isaiah57:21 Meetae eseriani too larruok, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Isaiah58:1 “Teyietu nchira, nimigira, tabuaku ilepunye oltoilo lino anaa entarumpeta; mbalakinye iltung'ana laainei nkitarruorot enye, mbalakinye enkaji e Yakobo ing'ok enye." 
Isaiah58:2 “Ore eyia, kaaing'oru ninche anaake, neng'ida ninche te neyiolou nkoitoi aainei, eji netiu anaa olosho oas isupati, leitu epuo aaing'uaa nkiguanat e Nkai enye; kaaikilikuan ninche nkiguanat naasipa, neng'ida ninche etaaniki Enkai." 
Isaiah58:3 “Kainyoo pee kiteena iyiook ate, aaitupukoo? Nimidol iyie. Kainyoo pee kintoborro iyiook ate, neitu iyie ishilaa ina? Ng'ura, ore te nkolong e enata ino, ning'oru iyie murruna ino makewan, nintorogony ilaisiaayiak linono pooki." 
Isaiah58:4 Ng'ura, iyeniyene intae ate pee itumokiki aailepilepa nintayuyu olarrabal. Ore eenata neeijo ena inyi ena olong, nemeisho iltoiloishi linyi metoning'i te shumata." 
Isaiah58:5 Kena enata empukuroto ategelua nanu, ina olong naitobor oltung'ani kewan? Ke nkolong nairrug oltung'ani endukuya enye anaa enkujita, neisalaash ilkuniyiani o nkuruon ti abori ninye? Ilo iyie ajo ena eenata e mpukuroto, naa enkolong nang'amaroyu to Laitoriani?" 
Isaiah58:6 Aime ena eenata empukoroto nategelua nanu: pee elaari ienat e ntorroni, neitololong'i nkeenta e nchata too murto, ore ilo oitorogonyaki nelaari meshomo, negili pooki shata oo murto?" 
Isaiah58:7 Aime pee ing'arie endaa ino ilo oisumash, neyau ilo aisinani le meeta ang atua enkaji ino; ore pee idol ilo lemeishopo ninchop, neme pee isudoo kewan te lelo tung'ana leeijo iyie?" 
Isaiah58:8 Netum taa ewang'an ino atotiuo anaa enkakenya, ore enkishiunoto ino nelotu asieku; ore esupatisho ino nelo te dukuya ino, ore enkitoo o Laitoriani neaku ninye nikirrip te siadi." 
Isaiah58:9 Nimpotisho iyie, nikiwaliki Olaitoriani; ore pee nchir iyie, nejo ninye, Nele nanu. Tiniwuang'ieng'ie ti atua ate ina shata e murt, o ina utata o lkimojino, o enkiroroto torrono," 
Isaiah58:10 ti nipukokiki intae maate lelo ooisumash, nintaraposhosho eyieunoto e ilo oata osina, netum taa ewang'an inyi ailepu te naimin ore emisimisi inyi netiu anaa enkipirata e nkolong." 
Isaiah58:11 Nikirikoo iyie Olaitoriani anaake, nikintaraposh Olaitoriani iyieunot inono too mbaa sidain, neitagol iloik linono, nitiu iyie anaa enkurma natubukokoki enkare, nitiu anaa enchorro e nkare, nemeishunye ae kata." 
Isaiah58:12 “Ore wuejitin inono apa naaidaikieki nesheti; naa ilo iyie adumu olkitamanyunoto loo ishoritin kumok; nikipuoi aajo olaramani too lusien olaitobirani loo nkoitoi naalala enkanasa. 
Isaiah58:13 “Ti nimbelekeny iroruat inono apaash sabato, nipaash isiaitin inono te nkolong ai sinyati, nintaa iyie sabato enkolong e nchipai o enkolong sinyati o Laitoriani nayanyiti; ti niyanyitu iyie ina olong, nimilo too nkoitoi inono makewan, anaa ing'oru enchipai ino makewan, anaa iro mbaa e pesho;" 
Isaiah58:14 nitumoki taa atishipakinoyu ina olong o Laitoriani, naaisho nanu iyie shomo too wuejitin e shumata e nkop; naaitoti nanu iyie te ina jung'ore e Yakobo papaai lino, amu enkutuk o Laitoriani nairoro kuna.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Ng'ura, eitu edorropu enkaina o Laitoriani, eji metaa meekure meidim aitajeu, anaa eitoming'anaki enkiok enye, eji metaa meekure ening'isho;" 
Isaiah59:2 kake entorroni inyi nayaua eoro, te rishata intae o Enkai inyi, naa ng'ok inyi naaisudoitie enkomom enye te intae, o metaa meekure ening intae." 
Isaiah59:3 Amu eisarkionieki nkaik inyi to sarge neisarkionieki ilkimojik linyi te ntorroni; eiroro nkutukie inyi elejare, neitobiru ilng'ejepa linyi entorroni." 
Isaiah59:4 Meetae hoo obo olo enkiguana te sipata, meetae ololo aiguana te sipata, osayia le pesho eng'idare ninche, neiro elejare, neipiru ninche esuujisho neyau entorroni." 
Isaiah59:5 Neiu ninche ilmosor le nturbubua neitobiru ninche orreshet te nkaji e surusuri; ore ilo oinos lelo mosor neye, ore ilo mosori odanyi nedanyuni olasurai." 
Isaiah59:6 Ore lelo rresheta ooshetu ninche nemeaku inkilani, meimulumul iltung'ana ate te nena naaitobiru ninche. Ore esiai enye naa esiaai e ntorroni, netii nkiasin o larrabal nkaik enye." 
Isaiah59:7 Nekuetiki nkejek enye enkarrueisho, neisarisaraki aaibukoo osarge lemeeta entioto; ore ndamunot enye naa ndamunot e nkarruoisho, eliyio o enkidaata naatii nkoitoi enye." 
Isaiah59:8 Meyiolo ninche nkoitoi e seriani, nemetii esipata nkoitoi enye; meetae oloim nena oitoi oyiolo eseriani." 
Isaiah59:9 Ore enkaraki ina kelakuaniki iyiook esipata, nemeinepu ae kata iyiook esupatisho; king'oru iyiook ewang'an, naa ng'ura, enaimin kitum, king'oru ewang'an kake te misimisi kipuo." 
Isaiah59:10 Nikirrapirrapu iyiook esuntai kipuo anaa iltung'ana modook, nikirrapirrapisho anaa iltung'ana lemeeta nkonyek; nikirroro dama nikitiu anaa iloopuoito te nkinuku, ore ti atua lelo tung'ana oogol kitotiutuo anaa iltung'ana ootuata." 
Isaiah59:11 Kinkurrukur pooki anaa lng'arurum le ntim nikinchir aayietu anaa nturkuluni; niking'oru esipata, kake meetae, niking'oru enjeunoto, kake kelakuaniki iyiook." 
Isaiah59:12 Amu etoponari nkitarruorot ang te dukuya iyie, ore ing'ok ang neishakenoki iyiook; ore nena kitarruorot ang netii te nebo iyiook, nikiyiolo iyiook ntorrok ang:" 
Isaiah59:13 kitigila nkitanapat nikiany Olaitoriani, nikimbelekenyate aaing'uaa esujata Enkai ang, kiimaki enkitorogonyare o engolon e nkong'u, nikidamu too ltauja nikiro ilomon le lejare." 
Isaiah59:14 Eibelekenyaki esipata, ore esupatisho netalakuana; amu eimina esipata too umat oo ltung'ana, ore enkitoriori nemetumi." 
Isaiah59:15 Metii esipata, ore ilo oiwuang'a te ntorroni nepik kewan batisho. Etoduaa Olaitoriani ina, neitu eitiship ninye nchere eji meetae esipata." 
Isaiah59:16 Etoduaa ninye ajo metii oltung'ani, neing'asia pee edol ajo meetae oltung'ani omitu ilo oitorogonyitae, neaku enkaina enye kewan nayaka ninye enkisulata, ore esipata enye neitasheyie ninye." 
Isaiah59:17 Eishopo ninye esipata anaa enkila o lgoo, neishop emaupe e njeunoto ten dukuya enye; neishop ninye ilkilani le lap, neimulumul kewan te mpushuna napi." 
Isaiah59:18 Te risioroto oo nkiasin enye elo ninye aitalak ninche, neitalak te ngoro lelo mang'ati lenyena; ore lelo ootii olmanie le naiposha neitalaku te ninche." 
Isaiah59:19 Naa kepuo ninche aaureyu enkarna o Laitoriani tenkalo o loo ntoluo, neimin enkitoo enye enkilepunoto e nkolong, amu kelotu ninye anaa enkare olkeju nanang'unye" 
Isaiah59:20 “Naa kelotu ninye Sion anaa olalakunoni too lelo le nkaji e Yakobo ooibelekenya aaing'uaa enkitarruoroto, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah59:21 “Naa ore ti alo nanu, ele olning'o lai lo sotua o ninche, Olaitoriani ojo. Ore ina kiyang'et ai natii shumata iyie, o lelo rorei laainei latipika nanu enkutuk ino, nemepuku ninche te nkutuk ino, aashu too nkutukie oo nkera inono, Olaitoriani ojo, ebaiki ena kata neito idia alo o ntarasi.”" 
Isaiah60:1 Tudumunye, tawang'a, amu eeuo ewang'an ino, netudumunye enkitoo o Laitoriani te shumata iyie" 
Isaiah60:2 Amu ng'ura, kelotu enaimin aiput enkop, neiput enaimin kitok olorere; kake kedumunye Olaitoriani ti alo intae, nedoli enkitoo enye te shumata intae." 
Isaiah60:3 Naa kepuonu iloshon ina wang'an inyi, nepuonu ilaiguanak ina kitawang'ata e nkilepunoto inyi." 
Isaiah60:4 Tushumu iyie nkonyek inono ntamanai, toduaa; eiturrurrote ninche pooki te nebo, nepuonu enitii; kepuonu ilayiok linono eing'uaa enelakua, naa kenapi ntoyie inono too nkaik." 
Isaiah60:5 Ore pee idol iyie ina ning'idayu, neiput oltau lino enchipai, amu ore ina kumoi e naiposha naa eikimbelekenyakini iyie, kelotu ina arsisisho oo loshon enitii." 
Isaiah60:6 Keiput intae o lorora loo ntamesin, nena tamesin kutiti e Midian o Efa; kepuonu nekua pooki naaing'uaa Sheba. Keyau ninche sahabu o enkorropil, neibalunye ninche enkisisa o Laitoriani." 
Isaiah60:7 Ore nena luat pooki oo ntare e Kedar, nikinturrurrokini iyie, ore lelo meregeshi le Neba-iot nikipuo aaisiai iyie; kepuonu ninche eng'amaroyu to lperere lai lo lasar, ore ina aji ai e nkitoo naitaa kitok." 
Isaiah60:8 Kakua kulo oopuo tiaai anaa enkatampoi, netiu anaa nturkuluni eim ilusien enye?" 
Isaiah60:9 Amu kaanyu nanu ilmanien loo naaiposha, ore nena melin e Tarshish neng'as aayau lelo ayiok linyi ooing'uaa enelakua, neyau enkosholai enye o sahabu enye te nebo ninche, te nkaraki Olaitoriani Enkai ino, o te nkaraki Ilo Osinya le Israel, amu kintaa ninye iyie kitok." 
Isaiah60:10 Kepuonu iltung'ana leeiking'a aashet isunta inono, nikipuonu ilaiguanak lenye aaisiai iyie; amu ore apa te ngoro ai naatoosho nanu iyie, kake ore te nyorrata ai naaing'urrie nanu iyie." 
Isaiah60:11 Keaku kebolo nchomito inono anaake, ore dama o kewarie nemeikeni ninche; pee kitum iltung'ana aayaki iyie ina arsisho oo loshon, eriku ilaiguanak lenye erukunye aapuonu." 
Isaiah60:12 Amu ore ilo osho o enkitoria nimikisiai iyie neidak; ore lelo oshon naa keidaikieki katukul. 
Isaiah60:13 Kelotu ina kitoo e Lebanon enitii, o lelo keek pooki sidain, pee epuonu aapik enkishiaa ene wueji e nkaji ai; ore ene wueji neitasheyie nkejek aainei naitaa kitok." 
Isaiah60:14 Ore layiok le lelo apa ooitorogony intae naa kepuonu enitii eirrugo; ore lelo pooki apa oomen intae nepuonu aairrugo too nkejek inyi; naa keipot ninche intae aajo Na anasa o Laitoriani, Sion e Ilo Sinyati le Israel." 
Isaiah60:15 Ore kinturrayioki apa nikimbayuni, nemeetae obo oim atua iyie, kaaitaa nanu iyie kitok te nkishiaa ntarasi, eng'ida oo ishoritin pooki." 
Isaiah60:16 Ilo iyie anaku kule oo loshon, nilo iyie anak ilki loo laiguanak, naa ilo ayiolou nchere, nanu, Olaitoriani, Olaitajeunoni lino, naa nanu Olalakunoni, Ilo Magilani le Yakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Ore te rishata o suyai naa kayau nanu sahabu, ore te rishata e sekenkei naa kayau nanu enkosholai; ore te rishata e nchata nayau osuyai, ore te rishata oo soito naa esekenkei. Kaitaa nanu lelo aitasheikinok linono eseriani, naitaa lelo likintore te ngolon esupatisho." 
Isaiah60:18 Meigili ae kata aaning olarrabal te nkop ino, nemening'i eliyio aashu enkinyala too lpolosien linyi; impotipoto intae isunta inyi aajo Enjeunoto, nijojo nchomito inyi Enkisisa." 
Isaiah60:19 Meigil ae kata enkolong aaku ewang'an inyi te dama, anaa eaku ewang'an o lapa itum kewarie; kake Olaitoriani olo aaku ewang'an ino oo ntarasi, naa Enkai ino naaku enkitoo ino." 
Isaiah60:20 Meigil ae kata enkolong adoyio te iyie, nemeigil olapa aaku enaimin, amu Olaitoriani ole aaku ewang'an ino oo ntarasi, ore nkolong'i inono e nkishirata neishieki." 
Isaiah60:21 Ore iltung'ana linono naa keaku pooki supati; naa keya ninche ena kop aaitaa enenye ntarasi, ina aitubului natuuno nanu, ina siaai oo nkaik aainei, pee aatumi aaitaa kitok." 
Isaiah60:22 Ore ilo oti te ninche naa kelo aaku olmarei kitok, ore ilo oti aisul neaku olosho magilani; ara nanu Olaitoriani; ore te nkata enye naa kaitasieku nanu ina." 
Isaiah61:1 Etii Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani shumata nanu, amu aatubukoko nanu Olaitoriani eilata aput pee ayaki lomon supati lelo aisinak aairriwayie ninye nanu pee alo aruburub lelo ootigilate iltauja, pee aibalunye elakunoto te lelo ooena, o emboloroto te lelo ooikenoro te korokoroni." 
Isaiah61:2 Pee aibalunye ajo etabawua olari lo Laitoriani, o enkolong e lap e Nkai ang; pee aitagol lelo pooki ooishir;" 
Isaiah61:3 pee aisho lelo ooishir ti atua Sion - olmarisian te rishata oo nkuruon, o ina ilata e ng'ida te rishata osina, o olkila le nkisisa te rishata e lepori o ltau; pee etumi aatejo ninche ilkeek le supatisho, ina unore o Laitoriani, pee etumi aaitaa ninye kitok." 
Isaiah61:4 Naa kepuo ninche aaigil aashet iwuejitin apa neeidaaitie neshetu ninche nene wuejitin apa neetomijoonito, neram ninche nena anas apa naaidaitie, ina mijoonisho oo ishoritin kumok." 
Isaiah61:5 Naa keitashe iltung'ana leeiking'a aairrita nkerrai inyi, naa iltung'ana loo loreren oopuo aaku ilaturok linyi o laitobirak loo sabibu;" 
Isaiah61:6 kake keipoti intae aajo ilapolosak lo Laitoriani, keimaki intae iltung'ana aajo ilaisiaayiak le Nkai ang; ipuopuo intae aainos olkar loo loshon, ore enkarsisisho enye nipuopuo intae aaisikarrare." 
Isaiah61:7 Ore te rishata e nkurruna inyi naa itumutumu intae erubata katitin are, ore te rishata e sulare nipuopuo intae aang'idakino ewueji enye; metaa ore ti atua ina kop inyi naa ipuopuo aatum erubata katitin are, nitumutumu eng'ida oo ntarasi." 
Isaiah61:8 Amu ore nanu Olaitoriani naa esipata ayieu, kaiba empurrore o enkitarruoroto; kalo nanu aisho ninche elaakinoto nasipa, nalo aitobir osotua loo ntarasi o ninche." 
Isaiah61:9 Ore eishoi enye naa kepuo aayiolou ti atua loshon, neyiolouni nkera enye ti atua iloreren; ore pooki oodol ninche neyiolou ninche. Nchere olorere ele otamayiana Olaitoriani." 
Isaiah61:10 Kang'ida nanu oleng ti atua Olaitoriani, keshipa oltau lai ti atua Enkai ai; amu aaishopo ninye nanu to lkila le njeunoto, aaimulumula ninye nanu to lkila le supatisho, anaa oloyamisho te nekus kewan too mporro anaa esiankiki narikori te neikod kewan too masaa enyena sidain." 
Isaiah61:11 Amu ore anaa enaiu enkop nkaitubulu enyena, aashu anaa enaiu enkop nkaitubulu enyena neijia eiko Olaitoriani, Enkai; keitubulu esupatisho o enkisisa, te dukuya iloshon pooki." 
Isaiah62:1 Ore te nkaraki Sion magira nanu, naa ore te nkaraki Yerusalem mayeng'iyeng'a nanu, o metaba anaa neibalayu esipata enye anaa ewang'an, netiu enjeunoto enye anaa oltaa oilang'isho oleng." 
Isaiah62:2 Kepuo iloshon aadol ina kilepunoto e sipata, nedol ilaiguanak pooki enkitoo ino, naa eikipuoi aaisho iyie ina arna ng'ejuk, naa enkutuk o Laitoriani naishoru." 
Isaiah62:3 Ilo iyie aaku emaupe e nkishiaa te nkaina o Laitoriani, niaku enkishili e nkitoo te nkaina e Nkai ino." 
Isaiah62:4 Miking'ili aekata aajo Enaiturrayioki, nemeigili ae kata aajo enkop ino Olmuate; kake keaku eikiji iyie Enatii eng'ida ai atua ninye, naa keji enkop inyi Nayamaki; enkaraki nashipakino Olaitoriani intae, ore enkop inyi neaku keyama." 
Isaiah62:5 Ore anaa enaayam olmurrani eselenkei, neijia eiko ilayiok linyi keyam intae, ore anaa enang'idakino oloyamisho esiankiki enye, neijia eiko Olaitoriani eng'idakino intae." 
Isaiah62:6 Ore shumata sunta inono iyie Yerusalem, atipika nanu ilarripok; endama pooki o enkewarie pooki, nemegira ae kata ninche. Ore intae lelo oodamu Olaitoriani nemiyeng'iyeng'ang'a," 
Isaiah62:7 Neminchosho ninye enkiyagata o metaba anaa neitasheyie Yerusalem, neitaa ninye enkisisa te nkop." 
Isaiah62:8 Einosa Olaitoriani olmumai te nkaina enye e tatene o te nkaina enye magilani, ejo, “Maaigil nanu aishooyo entapa inyi metaa endaa oo lmang'ati linyi, nemeok iltung'ana leeiking'a ina aisho inyi oo sabibu naa ninye itanaurikitia;" 
Isaiah62:9 kake ore lelo ooisampu ninche ooinos neisis Enkai, ore lelo oosotu ilng'anayio ninche ook ti atua ilgorien le nkaji ai.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Shomo iima, shomo iima nchomito, ntobiraki iltung'ana enkoitoi; ntobira, ntobira enkoitoi kitok, iwuang'ie isoito, tudumu olmonekie metoduaa iloreren." 
Isaiah62:11 Ng'ura, eibalunye Olaitoriani aitabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop: Tiaaki ina tito e Sion, “Ng'ura, eewuo enjeunoto ino; ng'ura, eeta ninye olerrinyore lenye te nebo ninye neeta olekoisiayio lenye te dukuya ninye.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Naa keipoti ninche aajo Iltung'ana sinyat, Ilookorduno lo Laitoriani; naa kepuoi aajo intae Ilooing'oruaki enkanasa neitu eing'uari." 
Isaiah63:1 Kalo ele olotu eing'uaa Edom, oishopito ilkilani oonyokie ooing'uaa Bosara, kalo ilo olotu eishopo ilkilani le nkitoo, olotu te nkitoo o te ngolon? “Nanu ilo oibalunye esipata, Olmagilani oitajeusho.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Kainyoo pee enyokioo ilkilani linono, neikununo ilkilani linono anaa ile, ilo olo aim eneironyieki isabibu?" 
Isaiah63:3 “Aitunyo nanu enkironyet oo sabibu openy, ore too ltung'ana nemetii hoo obo otaa te nebo nanu; naitunyoo nanu ninche te ngoro ai naitame nanu ninche te mpushuna ai; ore ilo sarge lenye neisuakino ilkilani laainei, naidurukie nanu ilkilani laainei pooki." 
Isaiah63:4 Amu etii apa ina olong e lap atua oltau lai, ore ilo ari lai le nkordunoto netabaua." 
Isaiah63:5 Aing'ura nanu, kake meetae hoo obo laaretu, naing'asia amu meetae hoo obo laatijing'a enkoriong, neaku te nkaina ai ake anoto enkishuroto, naaitasheyie nanu empushuna ai." 
Isaiah63:6 Aitunyoyie nanu olorere te ngoro ai, naitemer nanu ninche te ngoro ai napi, nabukoki nanu osarge lenye enkop.”" 
Isaiah63:7 kalimu nanu ina nyorrata o Laitoriani nauno, ina kisisa o Laitoriani, te risioroto e nena pooki naaishoo iyiook Olaitoriani, o ina supatisho kitok te nkaji e Israel, apa naishoo ninye ninche terisioroto o lng'ur lenye, te risioroto e ina kitoo e nyorrataenye." 
Isaiah63:8 Amu etejo ninye, Esipa iltung'ana laainei ninche, nkera aainei nemeeta elejare; netaa ninye Olaitajeunoni lenye." 
Isaiah63:9 Ore to losilisili lenye pooki, neisilisiloki ninye, naa ilo malaika otii te nebo ninye oitajeuo ninche; te nyorrata enye o to lng'ur lenye eitajeuo ninye ninche; etudumua ninye ninche nenap ninche nkolong'i pooki ti apa." 
Isaiah63:10 Kake etogolong'utua ninche nepik osina Enkiyang'et enye sinyati; neaku eibelekenye ninye aaku olmang'atinta lenye, ore ninye openy negilunore ninche." 
Isaiah63:11 Neitoki ninye adamu nkolong'i e apa moitie, e Musa ilo sinka lenye. Koree ilo apa oyaua ailepunye te naiposha lelo shekuti loo nkerrai enyena? Koree ilo opik atua ninche enkiyang'et enye sinyati," 
Isaiah63:12 ilo oisho ina aina enye e nkitoo meshomo te nkaina e tatene e Musa, ilo apa otooro nkariak te dukuya ninche, pee eitobiraki kewan enkarna oo ntarasi," 
Isaiah63:13 kaing'ae otorikoyie ninche aimie ine negut? Anaa embarta naimita olpurkel, eitu apa ninche errorro." 
Isaiah63:14 Anaa nkishu naadoyio aapuo oerata, eishoo ninche Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani enkiyeng'iyeng'ata. Neaku itorikoyie apa iyie iltung'ana linono, pee intobiraki kewan enkarna e nkitoo." 
Isaiah63:15 ng'ura kop te shumata toduaa, te ine wueji ino e nkitoo nesinya. Koree olokiyo lino o enkidimata ino? Ore eyieunoto ino o lng'ur lino neiboori te nanu." 
Isaiah63:16 Amu ira iyie Papa lang, hoo nemeyiolo iyiook Abraham nemelimu iyiook Israel; ore iyie, Lo Aitoriani, ira Papa lang, ore enkarna ino, Olokordu iyiook ebaiki apa moitie." 
Isaiah63:17 Olaitoriani, kainyoo iyie pee ncho iyiook matapaash nkoitoi inono nintagol iltauja lang metaa mikiure iyie? Torrinyunye te nkaraki isinkan linono, lelo oshon le njung'ore ino." 
Isaiah63:18 Ore lelo tung'ana linono sinyat netujung'o enkaji ino sinyati te nkiti rishata; neitunyo ilmang'ati lang ina aji ino sinyati. 
Isaiah63:19 Kitotiutuo iyiook anaa iltung'ana leitu ae kata ing'as aitore, kitotiutuo anaa iltung'ana lemeipotieki enkarna ino." 
Isaiah64:1 Oi naaji tenaa eipolos oloing'ang'e alotu enkop, pee etum ildoinyo aaikirikirata te dukuya iyie -" 
Isaiah64:2 neikirikira anaa emoti naitokitok pee eibalieki enkarna ino too lmang'ati linono, netum iloreren aikirikirata te dukuya iyie!" 
Isaiah64:3 Ore apa pee ias iyie mbaa naaitureisho neitu iyiook king'oru, nidou alotu enkop, neikirikira ildoinyo te dukuya iyie." 
Isaiah64:4 Ore ebaiki apa moitie meetae oltung'ani otoning'o, aashu olotumusuo te nkiok, nemeetae olotoduaa te nkong'u Enkai nikinyaanyukie, naasisho te nkaraki lelo ooisilig ninye." 
Isaiah64:5 Intoomon iyie ilo oshipakino easata oo supati, lelo likidamu ninche too nkoitoi inono. Ng'ura, itagore apa iyie, nikitaasa iyiook eng'oki; kitobiko iyiook ti atua ng'ok ang te nkata naado, naaamaa, keitajeuni iyiook?" 
Isaiah64:6 Kitotiutuo iyiook pooki anaa oltung'ani oiduruk, ore esupatisho ang pooki netotiuo anaa olkila loo lkereu. Kitoito pooki anaa embeneyoi netiu entorroni ang anaa osiuo, nekutaa iyiook aya enelakua." 
Isaiah64:7 Ore enkaraki ina meetae hoo obo oipot enkarna ino, meetae oliking'oru aibung'are, amu isudoyie iyie enkomom ino te iyiook, nitanapua iyie iyiook apik enkaina oo nkitarruorot ang." 
Isaiah64:8 Kake ore ake eyia, Olaitoriani ira iyie Papa lang, kira iyiook nkulupuok, nira iyie olaitobirani; kira iyiook pooki esiai oo nkaik inono." 
Isaiah64:9 Migorokino iyie iyiook oleng, Olaitoriani, nimidamu nkitarruorot ang ntarasi. Ng'ura, tadamu nchere kira iyiook pooki iltung'ana linono." 
Isaiah64:10 Etotiutuo nena anas inono sinyat anaa ong'ata, etotiuo Sion anaa ong'ata, etaa Yerusalem olmuate." 
Isaiah64:11 Ore ina aji ang sinyati naa sidai, naa atua ninye apa kisisie loo papa, netapejoioki te nkima, ore nene wuejitin ang pooki sidain neidaa." 
Isaiah64:12 Eimbooyo iyie kewan te kuna baa, Olaitoriani? Eigira iyie nintame iyiook aitulus?" 
Isaiah65:1 Aanyita nanu maaing'oru lelo apa leitu aaikilikuanu nanu, aanyita nanu maanoto lelo apa leitu aaing'oru nanu, atejo nanu, “Nele nanu, nele nanu,” teilo osho apa leitu eipot enkarna ai." 
Isaiah65:2 Aitorioko nanu nkaik aainei endama pooki aipotu olorere kiserut, lelo oopuo te nkoitoi nemesidai, esujaa mbaa enye maate;" 
Isaiah65:3 iltung'ana laaitagor ninche oas mbususi anaake te dukuya nkonyek aainei, epolosisho ti atua nkurman neinok enkorropil te shumata isoito;" 
Isaiah65:4 ilootoni ninche too nkuraren, netoni te nkewarie too lnukat lenye; lelo ooinos nkiri oo lbitiro, ore motori o lminong netii iltooi lenye;" 
Isaiah65:5 nejo ninche, “Talamari minyiku, mikinyikaki nanu, amu aaiteng'elaki nanu aaitalam iyie.” Empuruo naimu nkumeishin aainei ena, enkima nayupuyup endama pooki." 
Isaiah65:6 Ng'ura, eigeroki te dukuya nanu aajo, “Magira nanu, kake kaitalaku nanu, ee, kaitalaku nanu too lgooitie lenye," 
Isaiah65:7 te nena kitarruorot enye o too nkitarruorot oo loo menye te nebo, Olaitoriani ojo; enkaraki apa natapejo ninche enkorropil too nchumat oo ndoinyo, naasukeny ninche nanu te nchumata oo ldoinyo, katemaki nanu ilgooitie lenye elaakinoto oo nkitarruorotenye e apa.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore anaa enatiu enaisho oo sabibu te nkimarrimarrati nejo ninche, Minyal ninye, amu etii emayianata atua ninye, neijia alo aas te nkaraki osinka lai, nemaidaikie ninche pooki." 
Isaiah65:9 Kayau nanu ina ishoi e Yakobo, o ene Yuda, lelo ajung'ok lo ldoinyo lai; lelo gelunot laainei oopuo aajung ine, nepuo lelo sinkan laainei aabik te ine." 
Isaiah65:10 Kelo Sharon aaku endaata oo nkerra, ore Oerata le Akor neaku ewueji neirragie nchoo, e lelo tung'ana laainei laaing'oru nanu." 
Isaiah65:11 Kake ore intae iloany Olaitoriani, lelo lemedamu oldoinyo lai sinyati, lelo ooirragie emesa oo mbaa oo nkitumusumusot, nimputuputu nkikompeni e naisho naitushula." 
Isaiah65:12 Karewaki nanu intae olalem, nipuopuo intae pooki aairrugokino ilo oar intae entuata; amu ore apa pee aipotisho, neitu irukishosho, ore pee airo, neitu ining'ining'i, kake itaasa intae ina torrono too nkonyek aainei, nitegelutua ina nemaaitiship.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Ore enkaraki ina nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, “Ng'ura, kepuo isinkan laainei aadaa, kake ilo iyie aisumashu; ng'ura, kepuo isinkan laainei aaokisho, kake ketir intae enkure; ng'ura, kepuo isinkan laainei aang'idayu, kake kepuoi aaitukurru intae;" 
Isaiah65:14 ng'ura, kepuo isinkan laainei aaranyisho te ng'ida o ltau, kake ipuopuo intae aaishir te mion o ltau, niyietutu aaishir te nkaraki emion o ltau." 
Isaiah65:15 Ning'ueikiki intae enkarna inyi lelo gelunot laainei meitaa oldeket, naa kear intae Olaitoriani Enkai entuata; kake ore lelo sinkan lenyena naa keipot ninye ti ae arna." 
Isaiah65:16 Neaku ore ilo omayian kewan tena kop, nemayian kewan te Nkai e sipata, ore ilo oinos olmumai te nkop, neinos te Nkai e dede; amu meekure edamuni inyamalitin e apa, neisudoyioki ninche too nkonyek aainei." 
Isaiah65:17 “Amu ng'ura, kaitobiru nanu oloing'ang'e ng'ejuk o enkop ng'ejuk; nemeitokini aadamu ntokitin e apa musan, nemeitoki aajing ilukuny." 
Isaiah65:18 Kake tishipayu ning'idayu ntarasi te nkaraki ina naitobiru; amu ng'ura, kaitobiru nanu Yerusalem natii eng'ida, ore lelo tung'ana lenyena neiput enchipai." 
Isaiah65:19 Kang'idakino nanu Yerusalem, nashipakino iltung'ana laainei; meigili ae kata aaning ti atua ninye oltoilo le nkishirata, anaa olkiyioi lo sina." 
Isaiah65:20 Meigil ae kata nkera kutiti aaye ti atua ninye, nemeitokini aata iltung'ana kituaak lemebikoo, amu keaku keye enkerai etaa enoo larin iip, ore olaing'okoni loo larin iip netum oldeket." 
Isaiah65:21 Keaku keshet ninche nkajijik nemany ninche; neun ilkeek loo lng'anayio neinos ilng'anayio lenye. 
Isaiah65:22 Meigil ninche aashetisho nepuonu kulikae aamany; nemeigil ninche aaunisho nepuonu ilkulikae aainos; amu ketiu nkolong'i oo ltung'ana laainei anaa nkolong'i o lchani, naa kepuo lelo gelunot laainei aashipakino te nkata naado ina siai oo nkaik enye." 
Isaiah65:23 Mepuo ninche aanauru pesho anaa eiu nkera to sina; amu keaku ninche eishoi e ilo omayiana to Laitoriani, o nkera enye te nebo ninche." 
Isaiah65:24 Ore eton eitu eipotisho ninche nawaliki nanu ninche, ore eton eirorita ninche naning nanu." 
Isaiah65:25 Naa kelo olkuoo le ker o osuyiani aadaa te nebo, neinos olng'atuny nkujit anaa olkiteng; neaku enterit endaa o lasurai. Nemeitoki ninche aata batisho anaa einyalisho te ilo doinyo lai sinyati, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Isaiah66:1 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Olorika lai le nkitoo keper naa ewueji oo nkejek aainei enkop; kaji eikununo enkaji nikindim ateshetaki nanu kaji eikununo ewueji ai naeng'ieng'are.? 
Isaiah66:2 Ore kuna tokitin pooki naa enkaina ai naitobira, metaa nkunaainei kuna tokitin pooki, Olaitoriani ojo. Kake ele tung'ani nanu aing'oru, ilo obor neirridu to ltau lenye, neikirikira eure ororei lai." 
Isaiah66:3 Ore ilo oyieng olkiteng nenyaanyukie ilo osesekuan oltung'ani; ore ilo apolos olkuo le ker nenyaanyukie ilo ogil oldia emurt; ore ilo oitarasu olasar le ntapa, nenyaanyukie ilo oitarasu osarge le mbitir; ore ilo oitobir olasar le ndamunoto le nkorropil, nenyaanyukie ilo omayian enkitanyaanyukoto oo nkaitin. Etegelutua kulo nkoitoi enye maate, ore iltauja lenye neshipakino nena baa olminong;" 
Isaiah66:4 kagelaki sii nanu ninche enkitamioto metadoiki ninche, nayau enkuretisho shumata ninche; amu ore apa pee aipotisho, nemeetae hoo obo oirukishe, ore pee airo nanu nemeetae hoo obo laainining'o, kake etaasa ninche ina torrono too nkonyek aainei, negelu ninche nena nemaaitiship nanu.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani, intae lelo ooikirikira te nening ororei lenye: “Etejo lelo alashera linyi ooiba intae, nenang'aki intae auluo te nkaraki enkarna ai, ‘Enchoo meisisi Olaitoriani pee kitum iyiook aatodol eng'ida ino’; kake ninche epuoi aaitukurru." 
Isaiah66:6 Toning'o ina kilepilep te nkanasa! Ilo toilo oing'uaa enkaji e Nkai! Ilo toilo lo Laitoriani, eitalaku elap too lmang'ati lenyena!" 
Isaiah66:7 Ore eton eitu esaisayu ninye, neisho; ore eton eitu ebaiki emion ninye neiu ninye enkayioni." 
Isaiah66:8 Kaing'ae ae kata otoning'o entoki naikununo nji? Kaing'ae ae kata otodua ntokitin naikununo nji? Keidimi aatoiu olosho te nkolong nabo? Keidim olosho ataa te nkata nabo? Amu etasaisayia ake Sion nabo kata neiu ilayiok lenyena. 
Isaiah66:9 Kaisho nanu ninche metoini nemaretu? Olaitoriani ojo, Amaa, nanu ilo oretu kaiken eng'uset? Enkai ino najo." 
Isaiah66:10 Ting'idayu te nebo Yerusalem, nishipa te nkaraki ninye, intae pooki oonyor ninye; tishipayu te nebo ninye te ng'ida, intae lelo pooki ooishiraki ninye;" 
Isaiah66:11 pee itumutumu aatanak niraposhosho, lelo ki lenyena ooitigirisho; pee itumutumu aatook ishipakinono ina kumoi enkitoo enye.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ng'ura, kaiputaki nanu ninye enkarsisisho anaa olkeju, naiputaki enkarsisisho oo loshon anaa olkeju odooyo enkare; nipuopuo intae aanak, nenapi intae te nkoriong enye, neipoipoi intae too nkejek enyena" 
Isaiah66:13 Ore anaa enkerai nailejilej ng'otonye, kaailejilej nanu iyie aiko neijia; eikipuoi aaitigir iyie te Yerusalem." 
Isaiah66:14 Ipuopuo intae aadol neng'idayu iltauja linyi; nebulu iloik linyi anaa nkujit; naa kepuoi aayiolou nchere etii enkaina o Laitoriani te nebo isinkan lenyena, ore engoro enye negilunore ilmang'ati lenyena.”" 
Isaiah66:15 Amu ng'ura, kelotu Olaitoriani te nkima, ore ngarrin enyena nepuonu anaa olkutati, pee eitalaku engoro enye te mpijan, neisikong'isho too lng'ejepa le nkima." 
Isaiah66:16 Amu te nkima edung Olaitoriani enkiguana, naa to lalem edung'oki enkiguana pooki tung'ani; ore lelo oar Olaitoriani to lalem naa keaku kumok." 
Isaiah66:17 “Ore lelo ooitukuo neitisiny ate pee etum aashom atua enkurma esujaa ilo otii empolos enye, neinos nkiri oo lbitiro, neinos olming, neinos ilkirrumun, kelotu enkiting'oto enye nabo kata, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah66:18 “Amu ayiolo nanu isiaitin enye o ndamunot enye, naa kalotu nanu aiturrur iloshon pooki o lng'ejepa; naa kepuonu ninche nedol enkitoo ai," 
Isaiah66:19 naa kapik nanu olmonekie atua ninche. Naa ore te ninche naa kairriwaa nanu ilo pisiai oleku meshomo iloreren, meshomo Tarshish o Puti, o Ludi, lelo tung'ana oyietu nkai, nepuo Tubal o Yafan, nepuo iloomanaa le naiposha oolakua, lelo leitu ening enkisisa ai o enkitoo ai ti atua iloshon." 
Isaiah66:20 Naa kepuo ninche aayau lelo alashera linyi pooki ooing'uaa loshon pee eaku olasar lo Laitoriani, nepuonu too mbartan, o too ngarrin oo mbartan, o too ngarrin naaimulumula, o nyumpui, o ntamesin ilo doinyo lai sinyati, Yerusalem, Olaitoriani ojo, aaikununye anaa ake duoo Israeli te neyau olasar lenye le ntapa too ngirran nemeiduruk atua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
Isaiah66:21 Ore sii ilkulikae lenye, naya aitaa ilapolosak o Lawi, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah66:22 “Amu ore anaa ina keper ng'ejuk o enkop ng'ejuk nalo nanu aitobiru, nelo atii dukuya nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, neijia elo atiu iishoritin ino, o enkarna ino, kepuo aabikoo." 
Isaiah66:23 Ebaiki olapa ng'ejuk o metabaiki olikae apa, o ebaiki sabato o metabaiki enkae sabato, kaapuonu iltung'ana pooki aaserem, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Isaiah66:24 “Naa kepuo ninche aaing'oru mpopoki oo ltung'ana apa laatogolong'akita, amu meye aekata olkurui lenye, nemeyagaa enkima enye, naa keaku ninche entoki naitureisho too ltung'ana pooki.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Irorei le Yeremia, olayioni le Hilkia, loo lapolosak apa ootii Anatot tiatua enkop e Benchamen," 
Jeremiah1:2 laa ninye eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii too nkolong'i e Yosia olayioni le Amon, olaiguanani le Yuda, to lari le tomon ookuni le nkitoria enye." 
Jeremiah1:3 Eewuo sii too nkolong'i e Yehoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda, ometabaiki enkiting'oto o lari le tomon oobo le Sedekia, olayioni le Yosia olaiguanani le Yuda, ometabaiki ina kata apa naibung'i Yerusalem to lapa le imiet." 
Jeremiah1:4 Nelotu apa ororei lo Laitoriani enatii nanu ejo," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ore apa eton eitu aaitobiru iyie te ng'uset e yieyioo lino aatayiolo nanu iyie naa ore apa eton eitu kiini naaitisinya nanu iyie; “aategelua nanu iyie aitaa oloiboni le Nkai too loreren.” 
Jeremiah1:6 Najo nanu, “Ee Olaitoriani Enkai! Ng'ura, mayiolo nanu airoro amu kara ake olbarnoti.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Kake aatiaka nanu Olaitoriani, “Mijo iyie, ‘Kara ake olbarnoti’; amu ore lelo pooki laairriwaki iyie naa ilo. Ore pooki naba anaa enaaitanap iyie naa ilo airo." 
Jeremiah1:8 Miureyu iyie ninche, amu atii nanu tenebo iyie pee aakordu iyie, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Neitorioo Olaitoriani enkaina enye neiseyie enkutuk ai; naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Ng'ura atipika nanu irorei laainei atua enkutuk ino." 
Jeremiah1:10 Toduaa ajo, aatipika nanu iyie ena olong shumata iloreren o shumata nkitoriat, pee idotu nisulaa, pee inyal nimbelekeny pee ishet niun.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii ejo, “Yeremia, kainyoo idolita?” Najoki nanu, “Adolita olng'osila lo lchani laaijo oseki.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Naaitoki Olaitoriani ajoki, “Itoduaa iyie aitobiraki, amu arripito nanu ororei lai pee aitabaya ninye.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani, enatii nanu tenkata e are ejo, “Kainyoo idolita?” Najo nanu, “Adolita emoti naitokitok, eing'orita enkalo e moikuape.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Moikuape eipang'unye entorroni alotu shumata lelo pooki oomanya enkop." 
Jeremiah1:15 Amu, ng'ura kaipotu nanu iloshon pooki loo nkitoriat e moikuape, ejo Olaitoriani, naa kepuonu ninche ore ake pooki te ninche nepik olorika lenye le nkitoo tenejing'ieki nchomito e Yerusalem, aaigaraki isunta enyena pooki naamanita neman sii nkanas pooki e Yuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Naa kairo nanu endung'okinoto ai enkiguana tialo ninche, teina torroni enye pooki aatung'uaitie nanu; etapejokito ninche enkorropil kulie aitin, neserem esiaai oo nkaik enye maate." 
Jeremiah1:17 Kake ore iyie, terretena empolos ino; tudumunye tiaaki ninche pooki toki naba anaa enaaitanap iyie. Mincho kinture ninche maaiture ake nanu iyie te dukuya ninche." 
Jeremiah1:18 Ore nanu, ng'ura, kaaitaa nanu iyie ena olong enkanasa nasheta sunta, eng'ape e sekenkei, o sunta o suyai, pee igilunore enkop pooki, o ilaiguanak le Yuda, o ilkituaak lenyena, o lapolosak lenyena o lelo tung'ana leina kop." 
Jeremiah1:19 Eikiarare ninche iyie; kake mikimir ninche iyie, amu atii nanu tenebo iyie, ejo Olaitoriani, peyie aakordu iyie.”" 
Jeremiah2:1 Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii ejo,"
