Jeremiah2:2 “Shomo inosai tening'oto e Yerusalem ena natejo Olaitoriani, adamu nanu eseremata e kitisho ino, enyorrata ino anaa esiankiki narikori, ina kata kisujita nanu tiong'ota, tiatua ina kop neitu eunishoreki." 
Jeremiah2:3 Eisinyati apa Israel to Laitoriani, ilng'anayio le dukuya le nkisampuare enye. Ore pooki ooinosa netum enkitarruorroto; eewuo entorroni shumata ninche, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani iyie enkaji e Yakobo, olmareita pooki le nkaji e Israel." 
Jeremiah2:5 Inji ejo Olaitoriani: “Kaa torroni enotito loo papaai linyi te nanu pee aashomo aalam nanu, nepuo aasujaa empesho, neaku pesho?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Eitu ninche ejo, ‘Koree Olaitoriani laa ninye oilepunye iyiook aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri. Laa ninye otorikoyie iyiook tiong'ota, tiatua enkop olpurkel o ngumot, tiatua ina kop olameyu o enaimin nagut, tiatua enkop nemedung hoo ng'ae, nemetii hoo oltung'ani omanya.’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Nayau nanu intae atua enkop sidai, pee ishipakinono ilng'anayio lenyena o ntokitin enyena sidain. Kake ore pee ipuonunu atua ninturujuju enkop ai, nintaa enjung'ore ai olminong." 
Jeremiah2:8 Eitu ejo ilapolosak, ‘Koree Olaitoriani?’ Ore kuldo loo nkitanapat neitu aayiolou nanu; aatogolong'akitia nanu ilaitoriak; ore ilo oibonisho neibonisho te Baal, nepuo aasujaa nena tokitin nemeretisho." 
Jeremiah2:9 Metaa eton aatakinore iyie, Olaitoriani ojo, ore nkera oo nkera inono naatakinore." 
Jeremiah2:10 Tudung'o shomo olomanaa le Kupro toduaa, arashu irriwaa olkilikuai Kedar metujurru asipu; toduaa tenaa kenotoki ae kata entoki naikununo nji." 
Jeremiah2:11 Keibelekenya olosho nkaitin enyena, hoo duoo ninye neme nkaitin? Kake eibelekenya iltung'ana laainei enkitoo enye, teina nemeretisho." 
Jeremiah2:12 Mputukunyo iyie shumata, tena iruto, ingasiayu tukul, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah2:13 Amu etaasa iltung'ana laainei ntorrok are: aatung'uaitie nanu, ina ong'u oo nkariak naaishu, neguetaki ate ilmotioo, ilmotioo oodanya lemeidim aatushum enkare." 
Jeremiah2:14 Ko rrindik Israel? Kosinka oino liang? Kainyoo naa pee etaa ninye olorreshitoi? 
Jeremiah2:15 Eipurrokito ilng'atunyo ninye, eipurrokito aabuaku. Neitaa ninche enkop enye mitil; neidaaitie nkanas enyena, metii iloomanya." 
Jeremiah2:16 Ore sii etadanya iltung'ana le Memfis o Tafnhel olmarisian le nkitoo le ndukuya ino. 
Jeremiah2:17 Aime kewan iyie iyaka ena te nking'uaroto o Laitoriani Enkai ino, ina kata pee kirikoo ninye te nkoitoi?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Amaa taata kainyoo dupoto nitum tenilo Misiri, aok nkariak e Nail? Arashu kainyoo dupoto nitum tenilo Asiria, aok nkariak e Farite?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Entorroni ino nikintame iyie, naa ina kibelekenyata nimbelekenye niking'uanare iyie. Tayiolo nidol nchere entorroni naa kedua te iyie tening'uaa Olatoriani Enkai ino; metii euriata ai atua iyie, Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani ojo." 
Jeremiah2:20 Apa moitie itigila iyie enchata ino emurt nilak ienat inono, nijo iyie ‘Maisiaaisho nanu.’ Ee, te nchumata oldoinyo oado oleng o tiabori olchani onyori oleng irruge iyie anaa emulayoi." 
Jeremiah2:21 Ore iyia naatuuno nanu anaa osabibu gelunoti, entipat nadupa tukul kaji naa iyie nkuna pee mbelekenye niaku osabibu liong'ata?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Ore hoo nintukito kewan te munyan niaasishore osabuni sapuk, ore olduruki le ntorroni ino neton etii dukuya nanu, Olaitoriani Enkai ojo." 
Jeremiah2:23 Kaji iyie inko pee ijo ‘Eitu aaisarkionieki nanu, eitu nanu alo asujaa noo Baal?’ Ng'ura enkoitoi ino to eyarata; tayiolo ina nitaasa itiu iyie anaa entames lipong, naipirri nkaloli pooki," 
Jeremiah2:24 esikiria e ong'ata natamoo olpurkel, ore pee eyieu oloing'oni neisugaa osiwuo! Kaing'ae oidim aibooi eng'uarrata enye? Meetae ilooyieu ninye ooinaur ate, ore too lapaitin lenyena neinepu ninye." 
Jeremiah2:25 Torripo nkejek inono milo ake miata namuka, olgos lino pee mikitir enkure. Kake itejo iyie, ‘Meetae osiligi, amu atonyorra nanu ilomon, naa ninche nanu asujaa.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Anaa enakurru olapurroni teneibung'i, neijia etiu sii enkaji e Israel keitukurruni: ninche, o laiguanak lenye, o lkituaak lenye o lapolosak lenye, o loibonok lenye." 
Jeremiah2:27 Ninche ootiaakita olchani, Ira iyie papa lai, nejoki osoit, ‘Kitoiwuo iyie nanu’. Amu aaibelekenyakita ninche enkoriong enye, neitu aaibelekenyaki enkomom. Kake ore tenkata enyamali enye nejo ninche, ‘Tudumunye ntajeu iyiook!’" 
Jeremiah2:28 Kake koree nkaitin inono nena nintaikia kewan? Nchoo ninche edumunye, tenaa eikindim ninche aaitajeu iyie, tenkata ino enyamali; amu ore eneba nkang'itie inono neijia eba nkaitin inono, iyie Yuda." 
Jeremiah2:29 “Kainyoo pee kilepilepaka iyie nanu? Kitogolong'akitia intae pooki, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah2:30 Pesho nanu ataara nkera inono, eitu ninche eitoriori, olalem lino kewan oinosa iloibonok linono anaa olng'atuny otupusha." 
Jeremiah2:31 Naa ore iyie, naishoi ena, toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani. Kataa nanu olpurkel te Israel, arashu enkop e misimisi kitok? Kainyoo naa pee ejo iltung'ana laainei, ‘Kilakuno iyiook, meekure iyiook kingil aapounu enitii?’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Kerikino entito imasaa enyena, arashu esiankiki narikori ilkilani lenyena? Kake maadamu nanu iltung'ana laainei too nkolong'i nemeikenayu." 
Jeremiah2:33 Iyiolo oleng aitobira nkoitoi inono aing'oru sanchan! Neaku ore ninye nkituaak arruok ninteng'en inkoitoi inono. 
Jeremiah2:34 Ore olkila lino netii osarge le nkishui e lelo aisinak lemeeta entioto; eitu iyie inepu ninche egilita nkajijik, kake ore etii kuna tokitin pooki" 
Jeremiah2:35 ijo iyie, ‘Maata nanu entioto; esipa eibelekenye engoro enye te nanu.’ Ng'ura, kaayau nanu iyie enkiguana teina nitejo, ‘Eitu nanu aas eng'oki.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Kebaa eleleki nilotie iyie, mbelekeny enkoitoi ino! Eikipik iyie Misiri enkurruna anaa apa enikitipika Asiria enkurruna." 
Jeremiah2:37 Ninye iyie ilotu aing'uaa etii nkaik inono shumata endukuya ino, amu etanya Olaitoriani lelo laa ninche iyie isilig, nimidupoyu iyie te ninche." 
Jeremiah3:1 “Amaa tenearaa olee enkitok enye nelo ninye aing'uaa ninye neaku enkitok e likae lee, keitoki ilo apa lee ashukokino ninye? Aimeitarruoo ina enkop oleng? Itaa iyie emulayoi too sanchan kumok naa eikintoki arrinyokino nanu? Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah3:2 Taraposhu nkonyek inono ingura nena kisiajat naaika eitiaaji eitu kiboitareki iyie? Ore too mbat oo nkoitoi niton aanyu isanchan, anaa e marabui tiong'ota. Intarruoyie enkop ino teina mulayaisho ino." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ore enkaraki ina eibooki oloirujuruj ore enchan oo nkokua neitu elotu, kake ore eyia eton ake inkununo anaa e mulayioi itanya iyie ikurru." 
Jeremiah3:4 “Keitu iyie taata kimpot nanu ajo Papa lai, ira iyie olchore le leleroisho ai" 
Jeremiah3:5 kegoro ninye ntarasi, keibung ninye engoro o akenya? Ng'ura iroro iyie, kake itaasa iyie entorroni pooki naba anaa enindim.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Aatiaka nanu Olaitoriani too nkolong'i o laiguanani Yosia, “Itoduaa iyie ina nataasa ninye, ina nemeisiligayu Israel, ina nashomo ailep shumata endoinyo pooki naika o abori pooki shani onyori, ore teine neas anaa emulayoi?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Najo apa nanu, ‘Ore pee eidip ataasa kuna pooki naashukokino nanu kake eitu ninye eshukunye,’ ore ina anashe enye nemeisiligayu Yuda nedol ina." 
Jeremiah3:8 Etodua nchere ore te nkiborra enye enkong'u nemeeta enkirukoto, Israel, nadung'oki nanu enkiguana eyararoto, ore eyia ore ina anashe enye Yuda nemeisiligayu neitu eureyu, kake eshomo sii ninye aaku emulayoi." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ore enkaraki naa kelelek enkiborra enkong'u te ninye, neitarruoyie ninye enkop, aloloito to soit o to lchani." 
Jeremiah3:10 Ore eyia te kuna pooki, ore ina anashe enye nemeisiligayu, Yuda, neitu eshukunye enatii nanu to ltau lenye pooki, kake te nkitaakuno, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Ore Israel nemeisiligayu neitodolua kewan ajo aikiti enkitarruorroto enye alang Yuda nemeisiligayu." 
Jeremiah3:12 Shomo, ntudupai kulo rorei te nkalo e moikuape, ijo, ‘Tushukunye Israel nemeisiligayu, Olaitoriani ojo. Maaing'or nanu iyie te ngoro, amu kara ololng'ur, Olaitoriani ojo; magoro nanu ntarasi." 
Jeremiah3:13 Tonyorrai ake duoo iyie enkitarruoroto ino, nchere itogolong'aka Olaitoriani Enkai ino nindapashaa enyorrata ino tiatua ilomon tiabori pooki shani onyori, oina neitu ining oltoilo lai, Olaitoriani ojo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah3:14 “Entushukunye, intae nkera nemeeta enkirukoto, Olaitoriani ojo; amu ara nanu olkitok linyi; kaya nanu intae, obo aitung'uaa enkanasa oare aitung'uaa olmarei, nayau nanu intae Sion." 
Jeremiah3:15 Naa kaisho nanu intae ilchekuti laaitiship oltau lai, ooitoti intae te ng'eno o te yiolounoto." 
Jeremiah3:16 Ore ake pee iponariri niakuku kumok teina kop, te nena olong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, nemeitoki ninche aajo, Osanduku lo sotua lo Laitoriani.” Melotu ina damunoto arashu edamuni, arashu eetayieki tipat meitokini aaigil aaitayu." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ore teina kata Yerusalem neaku keji olorika le nkitoo lo Laitoriani, neitururrokino nkuapi pooki ninye, ine netii Olaitoriani te Yerusalem, nemeitoki ae kata aasuj te ngolong'u enye o ltau lenye torrono." 
Jeremiah3:18 Ore te nena olong'i neibung'are enkaji e Yuda enkaji e Israel, ore tenebo nepounu ninche aaing'uaa enkop e Moikuape aapuonu ina kop apa naishoo nanu loo papaai linyi metujung'o." 
Jeremiah3:19 “ ‘Atejo apa nanu kebaa ayieu nanu naapik atua ilaiyiok laainei, naaisho iyie enkop sidai, ina jung'ore nalang nkuapi pooki. Najo nanu eikijo iyie papa lai, nimimbelekenyanya te sujata ai." 
Jeremiah3:20 Esipa ore anaa enaing'uaa enkitok nemeisiligayu olmoruo lenye, neijia sii iyie itotiwuo aaku misiligayu te nanu, iyie na aji e Israel, Olaitoriani ojo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah3:21 Etoning'oki oltoilo le nena kisiajat naaika, lelo ayiok ooishirita nesaisho le Israel, enkaraki natapong'o ninche enkoitoi enye etorikine ninche Olaitoriani enkai enye." 
Jeremiah3:22 Entushukunye intae ilayiok lemeisiligayu kaishiunye nanu ina nimisiligayuyu intae ng'ura kiyetuo iyiook enitii iyie, amu ira iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ang." 
Jeremiah3:23 Metii eretoto eseremata too nchumat oo ldoinyo esipa atua Olaitoriani enkai ang etii enjeunoto e Israel. 
Jeremiah3:24 “Kake ore ebaiki leleroisho ang neidaikie ina toki e nkurruna nena pooki naaisiaayutua loo papa, nkerrai enye o nchoo enye, ilayiok lenye o ntoyie enye." 
Jeremiah3:25 “Mairraga iyiook tiatua enkurruna ang nchoo esulare ang eitoip iyiook, amu kitaasa iyiook eng'oki to Laitoriani Enkai ang, iyiook o loo papa, ebaiki kitisho ang ometabaiki ena olong; neitu iyiook kining oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ang.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 “Tinirrinyunye iyie, Israel, Olaitoriani ojo, naa nanu irrinyokino. Tiniwuang'ie iyie ilo minong lino, aitung'uaa enatii, nimintoki aing'aing'ai," 
Jeremiah4:2 Naa tininya iyie olmumai, ‘Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani,’ tiatua esipata, tiatua enkitorisiokinoto, o tiatua enkitorioroto, naa kemayian nkuapi ate te ninye, naa te ninye ewuasa ninche.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Amu nji ejoki Olaitoriani iltung'ana le Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem: “Entutur nena kurman inyi nemeturo nimiunishosho tiatua ilkiku. 
Jeremiah4:4 Entumurataki ate Olaitoriani ewuang'ie isuaaten oo ltauja linyi, intae iltung'ana le Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem; mepuku ake engoro ai anaa enkima, neyupuyup nemeeta hoo ng'ae oar, tenkaraki entorroni oo nkiaasin inyi.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Embalie tiatua Yuda, nintudupaa tiatua Yerusalem, nijojo, “Toosho entarumpeta tiatua enkop pooki; nchira tabuaku nijo, ‘Enturrurroto, maape iyiook atua nena ang'itie naasheta sunta!’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Tuuno enanka ing'orie enkalo e Sion. Isika ing'oru eseriani, miton ake amu kayau nanu entorroni aitung'uaa enkalo e moikuape o enkidaata kitok." 
Jeremiah4:7 Eilepa olng'atuny alo to sanag lenye, etii ilo oidakie nkuapi enkoitoi enye eshomo ninye teine wueji enye pee eitaa enkop ino mitil; neidaikieki inkanas inyi metaa meetae olomanya." 
Jeremiah4:8 Neaku terretena kewan too lkuniyiani tenkaraki osina nchira niyietu; amu ina goro napi o Laitoriani neitu eibelekenya aing'uaa iyiook.” 
Jeremiah4:9 “Ore akenya teina olong, Olaitoriani ojo, naa keing'uaa empijan olaiguanani o lkituaak; neiputukuny ilapolosak neing'asia iloibonok.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Naitoki nanu ajo, “Ee Olaitoriani Enkai, esipa iteleja apa iyie kulo tung'ana o Yerusalem, ijo, ‘Ekesidanu te intae,’ aa olalem otabaikia enkishui enye katukul.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ore akenya teina kata nejokini kulo tung'ana o Yerusalem, “Osiwuo oirowua oing'uaa inkisiajat naaika to lpurkel eing'or enkalo entito oo ltung'ana laainei neme pee ekut arashu esil." 
Jeremiah4:12 Ore ilo siwuo olotu te nkitanapata ai naa kegol oleng te nanu. Naa Nanu ilo oiro tendung'okinoto e nkiguana enye.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Ng'ura, elotu ninye ailepu anaa nkatampo, neikununo ngarrin enyena oo mbartan anaa olkutati, neneneng mbartan enyena aalang ilkurragoso - oi iyiook, amu kindaaitie!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Iyie Yerusalem, ntukuoi entorroni to ltau lino, pee kitumi aaitajeu keton akenya endamunoto ino torrono tiatua iyie o anu?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Amu eibalunye oltoilo oing'uaa Dan neitudupaa entorroni ebaiki oldoinyo le Efraim. 
Jeremiah4:16 Enkoo iloreren nchere kelotu ninye; embalunye te Yerusalem nchere kepuonu lelo oomuat aaman enkang te nkop nalakua, nebuaaki ninche nkanas e Yuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Neman ninche Yerusalem anaa larripok le nkurma enkaraki naatanya Yerusalem nanu, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah4:18 Ore nkoitoi inono o nkiaasin inono nikintadoikitio iyie ena, entorroni ino makewan ena, naa kedua, etabaikia atua oltau lino kewan." 
Jeremiah4:19 Emion ai, emion ai! Aainosita emion! Oi mbat oltau lai keng'oring'oro oltau lai oleng; maidim nanu atigirayu; amu aning'ito oltoilo le ntarumpeta, oltoilo lo larrabal." 
Jeremiah4:20 Esujita enkidaata enkidaata ore enkop pooki neirragita metii toki nabo kata einyalaki ilng'oborri laainei ilkarash laainei tenkata nabo. 
Jeremiah4:21 Kaing'or nanu enanka o anu naning oltoilo le ntarumpeta? 
Jeremiah4:22 “Amu kemoda iltung'ana laainei, nemaayiolo ninche nanu; nkera naakilo ninche, meeta ninche ening'unoto. Arriyiak ninche te asata oo ntorrok, kake ore eneiko teneas esidai meyiolo ninche.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Aing'ura nanu oriong enkop, naa ng'ura keliyio naa mitil; o shumata, nemeeta ninche ewang'an." 
Jeremiah4:24 Aing'ura nanu shumata ildoinyo, naa ng'ura, keikirikira ninche, ore ndoinyo pooki nepuo idie o idie." 
Jeremiah4:25 Aing'orishe nanu, naa ng'ura, metii apa hoo oltung'ani, ore ntaritik pooki oloing'ang'e neisika." 
Jeremiah4:26 Aing'orishe nanu, naa ng'ura, ore ina kop oo lng'anayio etaa olpurkel, ore nkanas enyena pooki neirragaa eidaa, te dukuya Olaitoriani, te dukuya ina goro enye napi." 
Jeremiah4:27 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani, “Keaku enkop pooki mitil; ore eyia maitaa nanu enkiting'oto." 
Jeremiah4:28 Amu keishir ena kop, ore shumata neroku; amu airoro nanu, atootikio nanu eitu nanu aainosu nemashuko siadi.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 To ltoilo lo lakedoni le mbarta oltung'ani le nkawuo eilany nkanas pooki olarrabal, nejing ninche ntimi; neked nchumat oo ndapidapo; etung'uayioki nkanas pooki nemetii oltung'ani oton tiatua ninche." 
Jeremiah4:30 Naa ore iyie, ena nara mijooni, kainyoo intodolu nchere, eji nchopo iyie too nkilani sinteti, nchere inkod iyie kewan too masaa e sahabu, nchere isir iyie nkonyek inono? Te mpesho iyie ikus kewan kimen iyie isanchan linono; eing'oru ninche enkishui ino." 
Jeremiah4:31 Amu atoning'o nanu enkishirata naaijo ene nkitok nasaisai, naishirita te mion anaa enaiu enkerai enye e dukuya, enkishirata eina tito oo ltung'ana le Sion eng'a enkutuk pee etum enkijape, neitorioo nkaik enyena, “Woi nanu!; Ekaiterre nanu te dukuya lelo ooitayu loikop.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Kueta nikuetu too nkoitoi naalala e Yerusalem, ing'orisho niyiolou! Tujurru olkurroto lenye otumoreki toduaa tenaa indim iyie anoto oltung'ani obo, obo oas te nkitorioroto neing'oru esipata pee atum nanu atapalaki ninye." 
Jeremiah5:2 Ore hoo nejo ninche, “Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani,” kake ore eyia, enya ninche olmumai te lejare." 
Jeremiah5:3 Olaitoriani, aime esipata eing'oru nkonyek inono? Itoosho iyie ninche, kake eitu ninche emeyu; indaikie iyie ninche, kake etanyaita ninche engamaa ererioroto. Eitagolito ninche nkomomi enye aaitulus te endapidapoi; etanyaita ninche eirridu." 
Jeremiah5:4 Najo nanu, “Ore kulo naa laisinak ake, meeta ninche endamunoto; amu meyiolo ninche enkoitoi o Laitoriani, enkitanapata e Nkai enye." 
Jeremiah5:5 Alo nanu enetii lelo kituaak, pee airorie ninche; enkitanapata e Nkai enye.” Kake enyaanyuk pooki etigila enchata oo murto, etalaa ninche ilidat oo enat." 
Jeremiah5:6 Metaa kear ninche olng'atuny oing'uaa entim metuata, keidaikie ninche osuyiani oing'uaa olpurkel. Erreshito olkinyalasho nkanas enye, ore pooki ng'ae ooipang tiatua ninche nepolosi aaitaa ndung'udung'ot; amu eikumok nkitarruorrot enye, ore nchukot enye errinyo siadi naa aikumok." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Kaji nanu aiko tenaapalaki iyie? Aatung'uaitie nanu nkera inono neinosa olmumai te nena neme nkaitin ore aidipa nanu aitotio ninche aitaraposho, neloloito ninche neiturrurrokino nkajijik oo mulayioni." 
Jeremiah5:8 Eikununo ninche anaa lamuyeishi pushunot ootaraposhote meetae ake olemeishir eyieu enkitok olelatia enye. 
Jeremiah5:9 Aimaitame nanu ninche te kuna baa? Olaitoriani ojo; naa aimaitalaku nanu to losho laaijo ele? 
Jeremiah5:10 Elepa enchom atua ilkererin lenye loo sabibu enyiala kake minyialinyala katukul; entong'osilu ilng'osil lenye, amu mme ilo Laitoriani ninche." 
Jeremiah5:11 Amu ore enkaji e Israel o enkaji e Yuda neitu ninche tukul ening'isho tialo nanu, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah5:12 “Amu eiroro ninche te lejare tialo Olaitoriani, nejo ninche, ‘Meeta ninye enaas; meetae entorroni nalotu shumata iyiook, nimikidol olalem arashu olameyu." 
Jeremiah5:13 Netiu iloibonok anaa enkijape; metii ororei atua ninche. Neijia eitaasi ninche!’ ” 
Jeremiah5:14 Metaa nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani: “Ore enkaraki nairoro ninche ele rorei, ng'ura, kaitaa nanu irorei laainei tiatua enkutuk ino enkima, ore kulo tung'ana neaku ilkeek, nenya enkima ninche." 
Jeremiah5:15 Ng'ura, kayau nanu shumata iyie, iyie na aji e Israel, olorere oing'uaa enelakua, Olaitoriani ojo. Olorere ogol ninche olorere li apa ninye olorere laa ore enkutuk enye miyiolo iyie nimiyiolou enajo ninche." 
Jeremiah5:16 Netiu emootian enye anaa enkurare nabolo iltung'ana magil ninche pooki. 
Jeremiah5:17 Kenya ninche enkisampuare ino o endaa ino, neinos ninche ilayiok linyi o ntoyie inyi; nenya ninche nkerrai inyi o nchoo inyi nenya ninche isabibu linyi o lng'abolo linyi; ore nkang'itie inyi naasheta isunta naa ninche isiligigi naa keidaikie ninche.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 “Kake ore ake sii te nena olong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, maamut nanu iyie katukul." 
Jeremiah5:19 Ore pee ejo iltung'ana linono, kainyoo pee eitaasa Olaitoriani Enkai iyiook kuna baa pooki? Nijokiki intae ninche, ‘Anaa enikitung'uaitie intae nanu nisiayiayia nkaitin oo loreren tiatua enkop inyi, neaku ipuopuo aisiaai iltung'ana leeiking'a teinakop neme eninyi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Mbalunye ena tiatua enkaji e Yakobo, ntudupai tiatua Yuda." 
Jeremiah5:21 “Entoning ena intae iltung'ana oomoda lemedamisho, lelo oata nkonyek kake medolisho lelo oata nkiyiaa, kake mening'isho." 
Jeremiah5:22 Aimikiurere intae nanu? Olaitoriani ojo; Aiminkirikirara intae te dukuya nanu? Atipika nanu osinyai aitaa olpolosie le naiposha, olpolosie loo nkolong'i pooki lemeidim ninye atogiroi; ore hooneilugo lopir le naiposha, meidim ninche aaima, ore hoo neikurrukur meidim aaima shumata enye." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kake eeta kulo tung'ana oltau ogol le ngolong'u; eibelekenyate ninche aapuo. 
Jeremiah5:24 Mejo ninche too ltauja lenye, ‘Matureita iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang, laa ninye oishoru enchan terishata enye, enchan oo nkokua o enchan oltumuret, nepikaki iyiook nkatitin naageluno enkisampuare.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Eibelekenya entorroni inyi kuna aiwuang'ie, neitalamaitie ing'ok inyi mbaa supati aitung'uaa intae." 
Jeremiah5:26 Amu etii iltung'ana torrok atua iltung'ana laainei; nerreshisho anaa larreshok ooirrag aarreshisho neitayu ninche orreshet; neibung ninche iltung'ana. 
Jeremiah5:27 Ore anaa enabore ntaritik orreshet ebore nkajijik enye enkeleekisho; neaku etaa ninche kituaak nekarsisu," 
Jeremiah5:28 etopiro ninche nesipayu netuluso too inkiaasin enye e torroni meiguanare ninche te sipata ororei leilo lemeeta menye, pee eitaa ninye karsis, nememitu ninche isipat e ilo omena." 
Jeremiah5:29 Aimaitame nanu ninche te kuna tokitin? Olaitoriani ojo, naa aimaitalaaki nanu kewan to lorere leeijo ele?”" 
Jeremiah5:30 Entaboi torrono oleng nataase tiatua ena kop; 
Jeremiah5:31 eibonisho iloibonok te lejare neitoreisho ilapolosak te nena naayieu ninche; ina enyor iltung'ana laainei, kake kaa iyie ias tenebau enkiting'oto." 
Jeremiah6:1 Enkuet eng'oru eseriani, intae iltung'ana le Benchamen, entung'uai empolos e Yerusalem! Entoosh entarumpeta te Tekoa, nidumumu olmonekie te Bet-hakerem; amu edakunye entorroni aipang'u te nkalo e moikuape, o enkidaata kitok." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ore ina sidai naata enkishaa kaidaikie nanu ina tito e Sion," 
Jeremiah6:3 ore lchekuti tenebo nkerrai enye nepuonu aarare ninye neun ninche ilng'oborri lenye aaitaman ninye, neirritisho ninche, oltung'ani ake te wueji enye." 
Jeremiah6:4 “Ntobira olarrabal taarare ninye; matudumunye, pee kirasaki te nkipirata enkolong! Woi iyiook, amu etinyikayie enkolong, amu etoodorita iloipi le nteipa!”" 
Jeremiah6:5 “Matudumunye, matarasaki kewarie, nikindaikie inkajijik enyena e nkitoo!”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, “Entudung ilkeek lenyena; nimuatimuata aaman Yerusalem. Enkanasa ena nemeeta nchere pee meitamei; metii ae toki neme enkibookinoto enkop atua ninye." 
Jeremiah6:7 Ore anaa enashum olchorro enkare enye neijia sii ninye eiko ashum entorroni enye; emarmalisho o enkidaata naning'o tiatua ninye; etii emuoyian o lbaa dukuya nanu anaake. 
Jeremiah6:8 Nkooyu, iyie Yerusalem, pee maaorieki ake iyie; pee maaitaa ake olmuaate enkop, nememanya.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, “Kesotuni anaa isabibu olpisiai le Israel, anaa olasotunoni loo lng'anayio nyaaki ntogiroi enkaina ino shumata ilng'osil.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Kaing'ae nanu airorie naikok, pee etum ninche aatoning ng'ura eikeno nkiyiaa enye meidim ninche aatoning'isho; ng'ura, ore ororei lo Laitoriani te ninche netiu anaa emoroto, meshipakino ninche ninye." 
Jeremiah6:11 Neaku aabore nanu engoro napi o Laitoriani; anaure aibookino. “Tubukoki ninye shumata nkera te nkoitoi nalala enkanasa, o shumata sii iumat oo lbarnot; neyae olmoruo o enkitok, lelo moruak olelo kituaak lenye." 
Jeremiah6:12 Ore nkajijik enye neibelekenyakini ilkulikae, inkurman enye o nkituaak enye tenebo; amu kaitorioo nanu enkaina ai aarare lelo omanya ena kop.” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Amu ore ebaiki oloti o metabaiki olkitok lenye, meetae ake olemeng'uar dupoto e lejare; ore ebaiki oloiboni ometabaiki olapolosani, meetae ake olemeas inelejare." 
Jeremiah6:14 Eishiunye ninche olbae loo ltung'ana laainei te nkitaakunoto, ejo, ‘Eseriani, eseriani’ nemetii eseriani." 
Jeremiah6:15 Ketukurrutua apa ninche ina kata apa pee eas mbaa olminong? Aa, eitu ninche ekurru tukul; menya ninche orere. Neaku kebatata ninche tenebo lelo oobatata; ore teina kata naitame nanu ninche, kenang'ari ninche,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah6:16 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, “Entasheito too nkoitoi naalaa ning'orishosho, ninkilikuanunu nkoitoi e opa, ine apa netii nkoitoi sidain, niimiimi intae atua nitumutumu enkiyeng'iyeng too ltauja linyi. Kake etejo ninche, ‘Mikiim iyiook atua ninye.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Atipika nanu ilarripok shumata intae, ejo, ‘Entoning oltoilo le ntarumpeta’ Kake etejo ninche, ‘Mikinining iyiook.’" 
Jeremiah6:18 Metaa entoning, intae iloshon, niyiolouu, intae ilturrurri, ina nayooki atiu te ninche." 
Jeremiah6:19 Toning'o iyie enkop; ng'ura kayau nanu entorroni shumata kulo tung'ana, ilng'anayio loo mbaa enye torrok, enkaraki neitu ninche ening irorei laainei; ore tialo enkitanapata ai, etanyaita ninche." 
Jeremiah6:20 Aitenkaraki nyoo naa nanu aayakini enkorropil naing'uaa sheba, arashu esonkoyo naarropil naing'uaa enkop nalakua? Ore lasarri linono oopejori meng'amaroyu, nemaaitiship nanu nkishorunot inono." 
Jeremiah6:21 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani: ‘Ng'ura, kairragakinye nanu kulo tung'ana iloketa naa ninche errorrore ninche; iloomenye o layiok tenebo, ore olelatia olchore neidak.’ ”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ng'ura, epuonu iltung'ana ooing'uaa enkop e moikuape, eilepu olosho kitok eing'uaa enelakua oleng te nkop." 
Jeremiah6:23 Eirraga ninche eibung'ita enkawuo o empere kegogong ninche nemeeta olng'ur, ore oltoilo lenye neikununo anaa enaiposha naikurrukur; neked ninche mbartan, nenapa ninche anaa oltung'ani le njore, pee kiarare iyie, ena tito e Sion!”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Kitoning'o iyiook olomoni lenye, nelepori inkaik ang; neibung iyiook osina o emion anaa enkitok nasaisai." 
Jeremiah6:25 Emimpang aapuo ong'ata, arashu ipuopuo te nkoitoi; amu eeta olmang'atinta olalem, etii olkirutoto pooki shoto." 
Jeremiah6:26 Iyie na tito oo ltung'ana laainei, terretenayu too lkuniyiani, nimperipera too nkuruon; nchira anaa enatua olayioni obo oata, to lkiyioi le mion oleng, amu nabo kata nelotu olamutani shumata iyiook." 
Jeremiah6:27 Aaitaa nanu iyie entemet o esilet tiatua iltung'ana laainei, pee itum atayiolo nitem nkoitoi enye." 
Jeremiah6:28 Kegolong'u ninche pooki, nepuoopuo too nkiteenikinot; osuyai ninche o esekenkei, eas ninche pooki ine ntorroni." 
Jeremiah6:29 Eyupuyup olkokuet oleng nenya enkima olduruk lioriong ore ilo osholishol sekenkei pesho ake esholishol amu eitu eiwuang'ieki entorroni. 
Jeremiah6:30 Enkosholai nemeeta tipat ninche, amu etanya Olaitoriani ninche." 
Jeremiah7:1 Ele ororei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani ejo: 
Jeremiah7:2 “Ntasho te kishomi enkaji o Laitoriani, nilikio teine ele rorei, nijo, Entoning ororei lo laitoriani, intae iltung'ana pooki le Yuda ooimu kuna shomito aaserem Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah7:3 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel, embelekenya nkoitoi inyi o nkiaasin inyi, naa kaisho nanu intae ibikibiki teine wueji." 
Jeremiah7:4 Emisilig kulo rorei le lejare: ‘Enkaji Olaitoriani ena, enkaji Olaitoriani, enkaji o Laitoriani.’" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Amu tenimbelekenyanya intae te dede aaing'uaa nkoitoi inyi o nkiaasin inyi, tinimbung'ubung'u te dede esipata o ltung'ani ake olikae," 
Jeremiah7:6 tenimimbookiki enkop ilo omoni, ilo lemeeta menye arashu enkoliai arashu imbukoo osarge leilo lemeeta entioto tene wueji, nimintokiki aasujaa kulie aitin te nkitamioto inyi," 
Jeremiah7:7 naa kaisho nanu intae entobik tene wueji, tiatua ena kop apa naishoo nanu loo papaai linyi ntarasi." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Ng'ura, isiligigi intae irorei le lejare lemeeta eretoto." 
Jeremiah7:9 Ipurisho iyie, nintayu loikop, niloloito, ninya olmumai te lejare, nipejoki Baal enkorropil, nirubare kulie aitin neitu iyiolou," 
Jeremiah7:10 paa intokiki aapuonu aitashe te dukuya nanu tena aji, naa ninye eipotieki enkarna ai, nijojo, ‘Etokorduaki iyiook!’ Nipuopuo dukuya iasiasa kuna pooki olminong?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Ketaa ena aji, naa ninye eipotieki enkarna ai, enkapune oo lapurrok too nkonyek inyi? Ng'ura, atoduaa nanu enkorrok ai ina, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah7:12 Enchom taata ine wueji ai apa netii shilo, naa ine aishoo enkarna ai metobikie te dukuya; pee idolidolo enaitaasa ninye te ntorroni oo ltung'ana laainei Israel." 
Jeremiah7:13 Ore taata, enkaraki nitaasa intae kuna baa pooki, Olaitoriani ojo, ore pee airorie intae aitirrishaki neitu ining'ining'i, ore pee aipot intae neitu irukishosho, ore pee aaipot intae neitu irukishosho," 
Jeremiah7:14 neaku kaitaas nanu ina aji naa ninye eipotieki enkarna ai, naa ninye isiligigi, oine wueji apa naishoo nanu intae o loo papaai linyi anaa enaitaasa Shilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Naa kanang'aa nanu intae too nkonyek aainei, anaa enatanang'ayie nanu ilalashera linyi, o eishoi pooki e Efraim." 
Jeremiah7:16 “Ore iyie miomonoki kulo tung'ana, arashu ilepiepie olkiyioi arashu enkomono te nkaraki ninche nimiomonoki te nanu, amu maaning nanu iyie." 
Jeremiah7:17 Aimidol iyie inaasita ninche too nkanas e Yuda o too nkoitoi naalala e Yerusalem? 
Jeremiah7:18 Esotu nkera ilkeek, neinok loo menye enkima, neipurj nkituaak enkurma, pee eitobiraki imukateni enkaiguanani e shumata; nebukoki ninche ilasarri ooki kulie aitin, pee aaitagor nanu." 
Jeremiah7:19 Kainanu ninche eitagor? Olaitoriani ojo. Aime ate, to lmilo lenye." 
Jeremiah7:20 Neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ng'ura keibukori engoro ai o engoro ai napi tene wueji, te shumata oltung'ani o eng'ues, shumata ilkeek liong'ota olng'anayio le nkop: keyupuyup ninye nemearayu.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani Enkai e Israel: “Entoponai nkishorot inyi oo lasarri oopejori, ninyanya nkiri." 
Jeremiah7:22 Amu ore apa teina olong nayawua nanu ninche aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, eitu nanu airorie loo papaai linyi arashu aaraki ninche tialo nkishorunot naapejori o lasarri." 
Jeremiah7:23 Kake ena kitanapata nanu aishoo ninche; ‘Entoning oltoilo lai, naa kaaku nanu Enkai inyi, niakuku intae iltung'ana laainei; nipuopuo teina oitoi pooki naitanapa nanu intae, pee etum atisidana te intae.’" 
Jeremiah7:24 Kake eitu ninche ening arashu eishoru enkiok enye, kake eshomo ninche too ndamunot enye o engolon oo ltauja lenye torrok, nepuo siadi neitu epuo dukuya." 
Jeremiah7:25 Ore ebaiki ina olong apa napuonu loo papaai linyi aaing'uaa enkop e Misiri ometabaiki ena olong, aitirrishaka nanu airriwaa isinkan laainei pooki lelo oibonok le Nkai enetii ninche te nkolong ake o te nkolong," 
Jeremiah7:26 ore eyia neitu ninche aainining nanu, arashu eishoru enkiok enye, kake eitagolo lukuny enye. Etaasa ninche ntorrok aalang loo papaai lenye." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Neaku iliki iyie ninche kulo rorei pooki, kake mikining ninche iyie. Impot iyie ninche kake mikiruk ninche iyie." 
Jeremiah7:28 Naa ilo iyie ajoki ninche, ‘Olosho ele leitu ening oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai enye, neitu eng'amu enkitamito e rerioroto; eidaayie esipata; eiwuang'ieki too nkutukie enye.’" 
Jeremiah7:29 “Entudung'oi ilpapit linyi ninturraa; to sina elepie olkiyioi too nkisiajat naaika; amu etanya Olaitoriani netung'uayie ina ishoi e ngoro enye napi. 
Jeremiah7:30 “Amu etaasa ilaiyiok le Yuda entorroni too nkonyek aainei, Olaitoriani ojo; etipika ninche ilo minong lenye atua enkaji naa ninye eipotieki enkarna ai, pee eisarkionie ninye." 
Jeremiah7:31 Netesheta ninche olperere lo lasar te wueji neika neji Tofel, ina natii oyarata lo layioni le Hinom, pee etum aatapejoi ilayiok lenye o ntoyie enye tiatua ina kima neitu nanu aitanap ninche neitu elotu atua ndamunot aainei." 
Jeremiah7:32 Metaa, ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, nemeitokini aajo Tofel, arashu oyarata lo layioni le Hinom, kake oyarata le sesekuanare amu te Tofel ninche enukaa ilootuata, enkaraki metii erishata dikae." 
Jeremiah7:33 Ore mpopoki e kulo tung'ana neaku endaa too motonyi o loing'ang'e, o too ng'uesi enkop; nemeetae oloiture ninche meshomo." 
Jeremiah7:34 Naa kaitobir nanu meishunye too nkanas e Yuda o too nkoitoi naalala e Yerusalem oltoilo le nkuenia o ltoilo le nchipai, o ltoilo lo loyamisho oltoilo le nayami; amu keaku enkop mijooni.”" 
Jeremiah8:1 “Ore kenya teina kata, Olaitoriani ojo, ore iloik loo laiguanak le Yuda, o loik loo lkituaak lenyena, o loik loo lapolosak, o loik loo loibonok le Nkai o loik le lelo oomanya Yerusalem neyauni aitung'uaa nkuraren enye;" 
Jeremiah8:2 neidapashi ninche te dukuya enkolong o lapa, o lorora pooki le keper, naa ninche apa etonyorra ninche neisiaai, aa ninche apa etusujaitie, aa ninche eing'orutua neserem; nemeiturrurri ninche arashu enukari; netiu ninche anaa modiok ti oriong enkop." 
Jeremiah8:3 Kenyorrarri kenya keeya aaitudutie enkishui ilo pisiai oleku lele marei torrono too wuejitin pooki naterewa nanu ninche, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah8:4 “Ijoki iyie ninche, nji ejo Olaitoriani, Amaa tenebatata oltung'ani aimeitoki ninye adumunye? Amaa teneibelekenya oltung'ani alo, aimeitoki ninye ashukunye?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Kainyoo naa pee eibelekenyate kulo tung'ana aapuo aashuko siadi anaake? Neibung ninche aakurraki elejare, neany ninche eshukunye." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ainining'ishe nanu, kake eitu ninche eiro aaitorioki; meetae oltung'ani oirridu te ntorroni enye, ejo ‘Kainyoo nanu ataasa?’ Eibelekenyakino ake pooki ng'ae nkoitoi enyena, anaa embarta nakuetiki olarrabal." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ekeyiolo ninye entilagos te shumata nkatitin enyena; ore enturkuluo o emotoroki, o enkaileeri neibung nkatitin enye naapuonunye; kake meyiolo iltung'ana laainei nkitanapat Olaitoriani.”" 
Jeremiah8:8 “Kaji intae inkoko tenijojo, ‘Kira iyiook ng'eni, ore enkitanapata O Laitoriani netii tenebo iyiook?’ Kake, ng'ura, ina alamu elejare oo lasirak ajo eitaa ninye emonkoi." 
Jeremiah8:9 Ore lelo tung'ana ng'eni naa keitukurruni, keidang'ieki ninche neyae; Oi, etanyaita ninche ororei lo Laitoriani, naa kaa ng'eno natii atua ninche?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Neaku kaisho nanu nkituaak enye ilkulikae naisho nkurman enye lelo ooisulu, enkaraki naa ore ebaiki oloti ometabaiki olkitok eeta pooki ng'ae olorok le dupoto te nkoitoi elejare. Eiteru to loiboni le Nkai o metabaiki olapolosani ometabaiki olapolosani meetae ake ole measisho te lejare." 
Jeremiah8:11 Eishiunye ninche olbae loo ltung'ana laainei te nkitaakunoto ejo, ‘Eseriani, eseriani’, nemetii eseriani." 
Jeremiah8:12 Ketukurrutua ninche ina kata pee eas olminong A-a, eitu ninche ekurru tukul; menya ninche orere. Neaku kebatata ninche tiatua lelo ootabatatate; ore ake pee aitame nanu ninche, nenang'ari ninche, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah8:13 “Ore tenajo aiturrur ninche; Olaitoriani ojo, nemetii ilng'anayio o sabibu arashu ilng'abolo olng'aboli etoito ninye mbenek, ore apa ina naishoo nanu ninche netulusoyie alo aing'uaa ninche.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Kainyoo pee kitoni iyiook aaitirring'a enturrurroto tenebo, maape iyiook atua nena anas naasheta, pee kindak teine; amu etudung'oko iyiook Olaitoriani Enkai ang enkidaata, neishoo iyiook enkare natii esayiet matook, enkaraki nikitaasa iyiook eng'oki to Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah8:15 Kisiligu iyiook eseriani kake meetae esidai naewuo, enkata enkishiunoto, kake ng'ura, enkuretisho." 
Jeremiah8:16 “Ore enkikurrukur oo mbartan enye nening'o te wueji neji Dan. Ore to ltoilo loo mbartan enye e njore neikirikira enkop pooki. Kepuonu ninche aaidaikie enkop o pooki toki nabore, enkanasa o lelo oomanya atua." 
Jeremiah8:17 Amu ng'ura, kairriu nanu tiatua intae ilasuriaa o nturbubuani naata esayiet nemeibooyo intalengo, naa keony ninche intae.” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah8:18 Meishiunoyu osina lai? Kemuoi oltau lai. 
Jeremiah8:19 Toning'o olkiyioi le ntito oo ltung'ana laainei eing'uaa enkadoro o endapasho enkop. “Aimetii Olaitoriani atua Sion? Aimetii olaiguanani lenye atua ninye?” Kainyoo pee aaitagoro ninche too nkitanyaanyukot enye naaguetuno, o too nkitanyaanyukot enye omon?" 
Jeremiah8:20 “Etulusoyie enkisampuare; eishunye enkata enkirowuaj, neitu eitajeuni iyiook.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Amu ore ilo bae leina tito oo ltung'ana laainei naa oltau lai etipikaki olbae, aishir nanu, naaiputa nanu enking'asia." 
Jeremiah8:22 Aimetii olchani atua Gilead? Aimetii olabaani ine? Kainyoo naa pee eitu eshukuni embiotisho eina tito oo ltung'ana laainei? 
Jeremiah9:1 Oi naaji aa nkariak ake endukuya ai, naa nkonyek oo lkiyio nkonyek ainei, pee atum nanu aishira dama o kewarie te sesekuanata eina tito oo ltung'ana laainei!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Oi naaji aa kaata to lpurkel ewueji neirragari pee atum nanu atung'uai iltung'ana laainei nalo enelakua aing'uaa ninche! Amu ile loloito ninche pooki, olturrur loo ltung'ana le nkaldoroto" 
Jeremiah9:3 neriu ilng'ejepa lenye anaa enkawuo; elejare neme esipata natubulayie tiatua ena kop; amu kepuo ninche dukuya te ntorroni o te ntorroni, nemaayiolo ninche nanu, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah9:4 Enchoo pooki ng'ae erripo to lelatia enye nemepik osiligi atua likae alashe; amu ore pooki alashe naa olairrikinoni amu ore pooki lelatia enye neloolo ainosaa olmarenke. 
Jeremiah9:5 Kelej pooki ng'ae olelatia enye, nemeetae oloiro esipata; eitamoo ninche ilng'ejepa lenye meiroro elejare neas ninche ntorrok neshal oleng te nkirridunoto." 
Jeremiah9:6 Nesot enkibookinoto e nkop te shumata enkibookinoto enkop, o elejare te shumata e lejare, neany ninche aayiolou nanu, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah9:7 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Ng'ura kashol nanu ninche natem ninche, amu kaa ae naas nanu, te nkaraki iltung'ana laainei?”" 
Jeremiah9:8 Embae e sayiet olng'ejep lenye; keiro ninye te lejare; ore te nkutuk enye meetae ake olemeirorie olelatia enye te seriani, kake ore tiatua oltau lenye neitobiraki ninye orreshet." 
Jeremiah9:9 Aimaitame nanu ninche te kuna baa, Olaitoriani ojo; naa aimaitalaaki nanu kewan to lorere laaijo ele." 
Jeremiah9:10 Teyietu nchiraki ldoinyo ninchiraki to sina ndaat e ongata enkaraki naitaaki mitil neaku meetae oltung'ani oim atua, ore enkorui oo nkishu nemening'o ore ntaritik o loing'ang'e o ng'uesi neisika nepuo." 
Jeremiah9:11 Kaitaa nanu Yerusalem osototi loo suut, olmuaate emanyisho oo mbariak naitaa nanu nkanas e Yuda mijoonto, meetae olomanya." 
Jeremiah9:12 Kaing'ae ilo tung'ani ng'en oleng oidim atayiolo ena: laa ninye eirorie enkutuk o Laitoriani, pee etum ninye aibalunye? Kainyoo pee einyalaki enkop aaidaikie anaa ong'ota, metaa meetae hoo obo ooim atua?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Nejo Olaitoriani: “Enkaraki natung'uaitie ninche enkitanapata ai apa natipika nanu dukuya ninche, neitu ening oltoilo lai, arashu epuo te risioroto enye," 
Jeremiah9:14 kake te ngolong'akinoto etusujaitie iltauja lenye maate neshomo aasujaa nena Baali, anaa enaiteng'ena loo menye ninche." 
Jeremiah9:15 Metaa nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Ng'ura, kaitoti nanu kulo tung'ana te sayiet, naisho ninche enkare natii esayiet metooko." 
Jeremiah9:16 Kaidapashaki nanu ninche iloshon leitu apa eyiolou ninche arashu loo menye; naitoki nanu airriwaa olalem aitusuj ninche ometaba anaa namut nanu ninche.” 
Jeremiah9:17 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Entadamu, nimpotutu nena kituaak naaishir meetu; erriu nena kituaak arriyiak meetu." 
Jeremiah9:18 Nchoo ninche eisarisaru neilepakinye iyiook olkiyioi pee etum nkonyek ang aaturukoto too lkiyio, neshalu nchonito oo nkonyek te nkare." 
Jeremiah9:19 Amu etoning'oki oltoilo lo lkiyioi te Sion. ‘Eneikunakaki iyiook enkidaata! Eitukurruaki iyiook oleng, enkaraki nikitung'uaitie iyiook ina kop, enkaraki naturoitie ninche imanyishoritin ang.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Entoning, intae na kituaak, ororei lo laitoriani, ninchosho nkiyia inyi eng'amu ororei le nkutuk enye; enteng'ena ntoyie inyi enkishirata, oltung'ani ake neiteng'en enelatia enye olkiyioi linchirishiri." 
Jeremiah9:21 Amu eilepua keeya alotu atua ilusien ang, etijing'ua ninye iwuejitin ang enkitoo edung'oo metuata nkera too nkoitoi naalala enkanasa, o lbarnot too lkurrot ootumoreki." 
Jeremiah9:22 Eroro, “Inji ejo Olaitoriani: ‘Ore mpopoki oo ltung'ana naa keirragaa anaa modiok te nkisiajata, anaa suut enkano te siadi olaisampuani nemeetae oloiturrur ninche.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, “Minchosho ilo tung'ani ng'en eng'idare eng'eno enye, minchosho ilo tung'ani magilani eng'idare emagilanisho enye, minchosho ilo tung'ani karsis eng'idare karsisisho enye;" 
Jeremiah9:24 kake enchoo ilo ong'ida eng'idare ena, nchere kaayiolo nanu, nchere ara Olaitoriani ilo oibung enyorrata nauno, esipata, o enkitorioroto tiatua enkop; amu te kuna tokitin ashipa nanu, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah9:25 “Ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, pee aitame nanu lelo pooki oomurata kake memurata sii" 
Jeremiah9:26 Misiri, o Yuda, o Edom, lelo ayiok le Amon, o Moab o lelo pooki, oomanya olpurkel oiriri ilpapit lenye! Amu ore kulo oshon pooki nememurata, ore enkaji pooki e Israel nememurata iltauja.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Entoning ilo rorei oirorie intae Olaitoriani, intae enkaji e Israel." 
Jeremiah10:2 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Emisuj nkoitoi oo loreren niming'asiasia ake too nkitoduaat e shumata amu eing'asiate loreren te ninche," 
Jeremiah10:3 amu ore ilkuaaki loo ltung'ana naa eitorrok. Keurori olchani te ntim, neitayuni enchata entolu too nkaik oltung'ani arriyia." 
Jeremiah10:4 Neikod iltung'ana te nkosholai o te sahabu; neitirrishi ninye te nyuntu o too lmushumaani, pee mepuku ashurtunye." 
Jeremiah10:5 Ore nkitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin neikununo anaa nkitanyaanyukot oo ltung'ana naaitasheyieki metorripo nkurman, nemeidim aairoro; kenapi ninche, amu meidim aashom. Miureyu iyie ninche, amu meidim aataas entorrono, nemetii atua ninche easata e sidai.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Metii likae likinyaanyukie iyie Olaitoriani; ira iyie kitok, naa kitok enkarna ino te magilanisho." 
Jeremiah10:7 Kaing'ae limikiureyu iyie, Iyie Olaiguanani loo loreren? Amu erishata ino ena; amu ore tiatua lelo pooki ng'eni loo loreren otiatua nkitoriat enye pooki meetae likae likinyaanyukie." 
Jeremiah10:8 Ilkilo pooki nemoda; ore enkiteng'enare enye oo nkitanyaanyukot naa nkeek ake! 
Jeremiah10:9 Eyauaki enkosholai naidong'i aaitung'uaa Tarshish, neyauni sahabu aaitung'uaa Ufas. Esiaai oltung'ani arriyia ninche o enoo nkaik olaitobirani le sahabu; ore nkilani enye naa pilei o sinteti; esiaai oo ltung'ana arriyiak pooki." 
Jeremiah10:10 Kake ore Olaitoriani naa Enkai nasipa; ninye Enkai naishu olaiguanani loo ntarasi naa tengoro enye eikirikira enkop, nemeidimu iloshon engoro enye." 
Jeremiah10:11 Nji iyie tiaaki ninche, “Ore nena aitin neitu eitayu shumata o enkop naa keidak te nkop o tiabori enkop.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Olaitoriani ninye oitobira enkop te ngolon enye, ninye oitasheyie enkop pooki te ng'eno enye nagut, naa te yiolounoto enye eitorioyie shumata." 
Jeremiah10:13 Teneitayu ninye oltoilo lenye netii enkikurrukur oo nkariak shumata neisho ninye enkinuku metunukunye too neeitingie e nkop. Neitayu ninye nkiwuang'at e nchan, neyau ninye osiwuo aitung'uaa nkajijik enyena naashumishoreki." 
Jeremiah10:14 Kekilo pooki tung'ani nemeeta eng'eno, eitukurruaki pooki aitobirani le sahabu too nkitanyaanyukot enyena oo nkaitin; amu ore nkitanyaanyukot enyena naa ine lejare, nemetii enkiyang'et atua ninche." 
Jeremiah10:15 Ine pesho ninche, esiaai e lejare, ore te nkata enkitamioto enye naa keidak ninche." 
Jeremiah10:16 Metiu ninye inji ilo ora erubata e Yakobo amu ninye oitamanyua intokitin pooki, ore Israel naa olosho le njung'ore enye; Olaitoriani loo lororani ninye enkarna enye." 
Jeremiah10:17 Nturrurro orridati lino te nkop, iyie ele obikito tiabori emanata!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ng'ura kanang'aa nanu boo lelo oomanya ena kop tena kata, nayau nanu osina shumata ninche, pee etum ninche aatayiolo.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Oi nanu tenkaraki enkitamioto ai! Ore olbae lai naa olosina, kake ore nanu atejo, “Esipa olosilisili ele lemeeta nchere pee mangiriakino nanu.”" 
Jeremiah10:20 Eidaikieki olng'obor lai, ore nkeenta aainei pooki netudung'ote; naashomo aaing'uaa nkera ainei metii ninche; metii hoo obo oigil akas olng'obor lai, nepik ilkarash laainei." 
Jeremiah10:21 Amu kemoda ilchekuti loo ntare nemeikilikuanishore Olaitoriani; neaku eitu edupo ninche, ore luaat enye pooki neidapashate." 
Jeremiah10:22 Inining'o, olmarenke! Ng'ura elotu! Embuakunoto sapuk naipang'u te nkop e moikuape, pee eitaa nkanas e Yuda ilmuateni, emanyisho oo mbariak." 
Jeremiah10:23 Ayiolo nanu, Olaitoriani, nchere ore nkoitoi e tung'ani nemetii atua ninye kewan, nchere mme atua tung'ani etii pee elo neutaa iroruat enyena." 
Jeremiah10:24 Ntorioyoki nanu, Olaitoriani kake te sipata; neme te ngoro ino, pee mikintaa ake nanu olemetii." 
Jeremiah10:25 Tubukoki engoro ino napi shumata lelo oreren limikiyiolo ninche, o shumata lelo tung'ana lemeipot enkarna ino; amu einosa ninche Yakobo; einosa ninche ninye nemut ninye, neitomijoono ninche emanyisho enye." 
Jeremiah11:1 Nelotu ororei enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani ejo: 
Jeremiah11:2 “Toning'o irorei lele ning'o lo sotua, nirorie iltung'ana le Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah11:3 Tiaaki iyie ninche, nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: ediaa ilo tung'ani lemening irorei lele ning'o lo sotua." 
Jeremiah11:4 Ilo laitanapa apa iloo papaai linyi pee ayau nanu ninche aitupuku te nkop e Misiri, aitung'uaa ilo kokuet le sekenkei, ajo, Entoning oltoilo lai, niasiasa nena pooki naitanap nanu intae. Pee iyakuku intae iltung'ana laainei, naaku nanu Enkai inyi," 
Jeremiah11:5 pee atum ataasa olmumai lai apa lainosa nanu too loo papaai linyi, pee aisho nanu ninche enkop naruko kule o naishi, anaa enatiu ena olong.” Nawal nanu ajo, “Metotiwuo neijia Olaitoriani.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Ntudupai kulo rorei pooki tiatua nkanas e Yuda, o too nkoitoi naalala e Yerusalem. Entoning irorei lele ning'o lo sotua niasiasa." 
Jeremiah11:7 Amu aikoo nanu loo papaai linyi akurraki ina kata apa pee ayau nanu ninche ailepunye aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, naikok aitirrishaki, o tena olong, ajo, entoning oltoilo lai." 
Jeremiah11:8 Ore eyia eitu ninche ening kake eshomo ake pooki ng'ae te ngolon oltau lenye torrono. Neaku ayawua nanu shumata ninche irorei pooki lele ning'o lo sotua apa laitanapa nanu ninche metaasa, kake eitu ninche eas.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Naaigil nanu Olaitoriani ajoki, “Etii enkiseroto atua iltung'ana le Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah11:10 Eibelekenyate ninche aashukokino ntorrok oo loo nkakuyiaa lenye, apa ootanyaita ening irorei laainei; eshomo ninche aasujaa kulie aitin pee eisiaai ninche; etudung'o enkaji e Israel o enkaji e Yuda osotua lai apa laitobira nanu tenebo loo papaai lenye." 
Jeremiah11:11 Neaku, nji ejo Olaitoriani, ng'ura kayau nanu entorroni shumata ninche nemeidim aatapaashare; ore hoo naaishiraki ninche nanu, maning nanu ninche." 
Jeremiah11:12 Nepuo nkanas e Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem aaishiraki nena aitin naapejoki ninche enkorropil, kake meidim ninche aaitajeu ninche te nkata e nyamali enye." 
Jeremiah11:13 Amu etaa kumok nkaitin inyi anaa nkanas inyi, iyie Yuda; naa kumok anaa nkoitoi naalala e Yerusalem lperereni loo lasarri nintobira pee intukurrurru ate te lelo perereni loo lasarri oopejokinyeki Baal enkorropil." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Metaa miomonoki iyie kulo tung'ana, arashu ilepie enkishirata arashu enkomono te rishata enye, amu mainining nanu tenaaipot ninche nanu tenkata enye enyamali." 
Jeremiah11:15 Kaa sipata eeta ina nanyor nanu tiatua enkop ai, eidipa ataasa nkiaasin torrok? Keidim ilmuma o nkiri naaitaikiaki olasar aaiwuang'ie enkidaata ino? Eikintiship naa iyie ina?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Kimpoto apa iyie Olaitoriani ajo, Oloirien onyori, obore ilng'anayio sidain; kake te nkikurrukur e ndarata sapuk epik ninye atua enkima, ore ilng'osil lenyena nemut enkima." 
Jeremiah11:17 Ore Olaitoriani loo lororani, laa ninye apa likituuno iyie, kitudung'oko iyie entorrono, te nkaraki ina torrono nataasa enkaji e Israel o enkaji e Yuda, naaitagor nanu aapejoki Baal enkorropil.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Naaitayiolo nanu Olaitoriani nayiolou nanu; nikintoki iyie aitodol nanu nkiaasin enye torrok. 
Jeremiah11:19 Kake atiu apa nanu anaa olkuoo le ker obor oriki aapuo aayieng. Eitu apa nanu ayiolou ajo nanu eitobiraki ninche entorroni ejo, “Mainyala iyiook olchani tenebo ilng'anayio lenyena, matudung iyiook aaiwuang'ie te nkop oo looishu, pee meitokini ae kata aadamu enkarna enye.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Kake ore, iyie Olaitoriani loo lororani, oiguana te sipata, ilo otem oltau o ndamunot nchooki nanu matoduaa elap ino te shumata ninche, amu iyie nanu aigarakine too mbaa aainei." 
Jeremiah11:21 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo lelo tung'ana le Anatot, lelo ooing'oru enkishui ino nejo, “Mimbonisho te nkarna Olaitoriani, arashu iye te nkaina ang”" 
Jeremiah11:22 neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Ng'ura, kaitame nanu ninche; keye lelo barnot to lalem; ore layiok lenye o ntoyie enye neye to lameyu;" 
Jeremiah11:23 nemeetae obo lenye oleku. Amu kayau nanu entorroni shumata iltung'ana le Anatot, teilo ari le nkitamioto enye.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Ira iyie asipani, Olaitoriani, tenaaishankarrare nanu iyie; ore eyia kaitirrish nanu ororei lai te dukuya iyie. Kainyoo pee edupoyu enkoitoi oo larruok? Kainyoo pee edupoyu iltung'ana le nkeleekisho?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Iun iyie ninche, neibung ninche ntona; nebulu ninche neiu ilng'anayio; nitaana iyie too nkutukie enye nilakua too ltauja lenye." 
Jeremiah12:3 Kake ore iyie, Olaitoriani, kiyiolo nanu kidolita iyie nanu, nikitem endamunoto ai tialo iyie. Teyietai ninche mpang'ie anaa nkerra naapuoi aayieng, nirragie ninche aiteng'el aitaany ina olong e yiang'are." 
Jeremiah12:4 Keishir akenya enkop o anu, netoyu nkujit e pooki ong'ata? Tenkaraki entorroni e lelo oomanya atua ore ng'uesi o ntaritik nejutori aaishie enkaraki natejo iltung'ana, “Medol ninye ae kiting'oto ang.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 “Amaa tenikueta akeshare ninche too nkejek, nikintanaura ninche kaji naa inko tenikeshare mbartan? Naa amaa tenibatata te nkop naserian kaji naa inko tiatua osero lo lkeju le Yordan?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Amu ore ninye ilalashera linono o enkaji e papaai lino, eji kitakaldaitie sii ninche; niruk ninche, hoo neiro irorei supati te iyie.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 Aiturrayie nanu enkaji ai, aitaa nanu enjung'ore ai aishooyie nanu ina nanyor to ltau lai, apik atua nkaik oo lmang'ati lenyena." 
Jeremiah12:8 Etotiwuo enjung'ore ai te nanu anaa olng'atuny tiatua entim, eilepunye ninye oltoilo lenye aarare nanu; neaku kaiba nanu ninye." 
Jeremiah12:9 Ketotiwuo enjung'ore ai anaa emotonyi narreshitoi, kemanita ninye motonyi naareshito too nkaloli pooki? Shomo inturrurro ing'uesi pooki e ntim iyau ninche meetu aapolol aainos." 
Jeremiah12:10 Einyala ilairritak kumok loo ntare enkurma ai oo sabibu eitunyokitio ninche enkop erubata ai, eitaa ninche ewueji ai sidai e ong'ata mitil." 
Jeremiah12:11 Eitaa ninche ninye mitil; naaishiraki nanu ina nataa mitil eitaaki enkop pooki mitil kake meetae oltung'ani oshilaa. 
Jeremiah12:12 Ore nena kisiajat pooki naaika to lpurkel neetuo lelo ooidaikie; amu keinos olalem lo Laitoriani enchoto nabo enkop o metabaiki enkae; meetae o loata eseriani. 
Jeremiah12:13 Etuuno ninche enkano neisampu ilkiku, eitanaurita ninche ate kake eitu edupore toki. Keitukurruni ninche te nkisampuaare enye tenkaraki engoro O Laitoriani napi." 
Jeremiah12:14 Nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo, kulo le latia ai pooki torrok ooinyal ina jung'ore naishoo nanu iltung'ana laainei Israel metujung'o: “Ng'ura, kadotu nanu ninche aitung'uaa enkop enye, naa kadotu enkaji e Yuda aitung'uaa ninche." 
Jeremiah12:15 Ore peyie aidip nanu atadotu ninche, naitoki nanu aing'urrie ninche, naitoki nanu ayau ninche pooki ng'ae enjung'ore enye o pooki ng'ae enkop pooki." 
Jeremiah12:16 Naa kelotu aaku teneibung ninche aakurraki nkoitoi oo ltung'ana laainei, pee enya olmumai te nkarna ai, ‘Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani,’ anaa sii apa enaiteng'ena ninche iltung'ana laainei meinosa olmumai te Baal, naa keshetuni ninche tiatua iltung'ana laainei." 
Jeremiah12:17 Kake tenetii olosho lemening'isho, naa kadotu nanu tukul naidaikie ninye, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Nji aatiaaka nanu Olaitoriani, “Shomo inyiang'u enkarasha e kitani, nipik empolos ino nimintadoiki ake atua enkare.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Neaku ainyiang'ua enkarasha empolos te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani napik empolos ai. 
Jeremiah13:3 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enatii nanu te nkata e are ejo," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Iwa ina arasha e mpolos ninyang'ua ina natii empolos ino, nidumunye, shomo olkeju le Farite, isudoi ninye teine to lbaata le ndapidapoi.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Nalo nanu, naisudoo te Farite, anaa enaaitanapa nanu Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah13:6 Ore etulusoite nkolong'i kumok naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Tudumunye, shomo Farite, ntayu teine enkarasha empolos apa naaitanapa iyie isudoi teine.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Nalo nanu Farite, naturu, naitayu ina karasha teine wueji apa naisudorie ninye. Naa ng'ura etarruoyie apa ina arasha e mpolos; meekure apa eeta tipat." 
Jeremiah13:8 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enatii ejo: 
Jeremiah13:9 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Neijia aiko ainyal olwuasa le Yuda o ilo owuasa kitok le Yerusalem. 
Jeremiah13:10 Ore kulo tung'ana torrok, oany ening irorei laainei, oosuj te ngolon enkong'u iltauja lenye maate neshomo aasujaa kulie aitin pee eisiaai ninche neserem ninche ketiu anaa ena arasha empolos naidaaie, nemeeta tipat." 
Jeremiah13:11 Amu ore anaa enaenikino enkarasha empolos o ltung'ani, neijia aikuna enkaji pooki e Israel o enkaji pooki e Yuda maateenikinoto ninche nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, pee etum ninche aataa te nanu iltung'ana, o enkarna, o enkisisa o enkitoo te nanu, kake mening'isho ninche.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 “Irorie iyie ninche ele rorei ijoki, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, “Keiputi pooki siang'au e naisho oo lsabibu.” Naa eikijoki ninche iyie, Eimikiyiolo iyiook aaitisip aajo keiputi pooki siang'au e naisho oo lsabibu?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Nitum iyie atiaki ninche, Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura kaiput nanu emerai lelo pooki oomanya ena kop: lelo aiguanak ootonie olorika le Daudi le nkitoo, o lapolosak, o loibonok o lelo pooki oomanya Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah13:14 Naitaar nanu ninche oltung'ani ake o likae, iloo menye o layiok lenye tenebo, Olaitoriani ojo. Maing'urrie nanu arashu aleku, arashu aitananaki enkoshoke pee mainyal nanu ninche.”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Entoning ninchoruru enkiok; emiwuasa, amu eiroro Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah13:16 Enchoo enkitoo Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, eton eitu eyau ninye enaimin eton eitu errorro nkejek inyi te nchumata ildoinyo ooitomisimisoki, ore ing'oru iyie ewang'an neibelekeny ninye aitaa emisimisi neitaa ninye enaimin nagut." 
Jeremiah13:17 Kake tenimining iyie, neishir oltau lai te nkisudoroto tenkaraki olwuasa lino; neishir nkonyek aainei te mion nerukunye ilkiyio, enkaraki nataraiyioki eluaata Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah13:18 Tiaaki Olaiguanani o ng'otonye enkitok olaiguanani “Ewaita olorika liabori, amu etadowuo enkopiyia ino e nkitoo sidai aing'uaa endukuya ino.”" 
Jeremiah13:19 Eikenoki nkanas e Negeb, nemeetae olobol ninche. Ewaki Yuda pooki eyararoto, etarayioki tukul." 
Jeremiah13:20 Tushumu nkonyek inono toduaa lelo oopuonu ooing'uaa moikuape. Koree ina luaata apa nikinchooki iyie, ina luaata ino sidai?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Kaa iyie ijo tenepik ninche ate shumata iyie lelo apa laa iyie makewan oiteng'ena? Pee eaku ilchoreta te iyie? Eimikimbung iyie emion, anaa emion enkitok nasaisai?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Naa tenijo iyie to ltau lino, kainyoo pee eetuo kuna baa shumata nanu? Tenkaraki esapuko e ntorroni ino pee engishari ilkilani linono, nikisomiti iyie." 
Jeremiah13:23 Keidim ilo le Etiopia aibelekenya olchoni lo sesen lenye arashu olowuaru keri aibelekenya iltipot lenyena? Indimidimi naa aataas esidai intae ilootamoo eas entorroni. 
Jeremiah13:24 Kaaidapash nanu iyie anaa suut, naayaita olkutati oing'uaa olpurkel." 
Jeremiah13:25 Erubata ino ena, erubata naategelaka nanu iyie, Olaitoriani ojo, amu meekure kidamu iyie nanu nisiliga elejare." 
Jeremiah13:26 Kangishaa nanu makewan olokesena lino apik shumata enkomom ino, naa kedoli enkurruna ino." 
Jeremiah13:27 Atoduaa nanu olminong lino, o eloloito ino o enkisijore ino, o lduruk le loloito ino too nchumat oo ldoinyo o too nkong'at. Oi iyie, Yerusalem! Keaku akenya o anu, eton eitu kintaai sinyati." 
Jeremiah14:1 Ele rorei lo Laitoriani oewuo enetii Yeremia eipirta olameyu: 
Jeremiah14:2 “Eishirita Yuda netameito nchomito enyena; neishir iltung'ana lenyena etoni te nkop neilep olkiyioi le Yerusalem alo shumata. 
Jeremiah14:3 Ore lelo kituaak lenyena neirriwaa isinkan lenye meyau enkare; nepuonu ninche nchorroi nelau ninche enkare, nerrinyo ninche too imotioo naarook, etukurrutua ninche neidang'a neimulumul ilukuny enye." 
Jeremiah14:4 Ore enkaraki enkop natabee, enkaraki neitu eshaiki enchan enkop netukurrutua ilaramatak, neimulumul ilukuny enye." 
Jeremiah14:5 Keituraa ninye enkolii enkuo enye amu meetae nkujit. 
Jeremiah14:6 Neitashe isirkon ti ong'ata too nkisiajat naaika, neipang'ipang aaok enkijape anaa mbariak neiliilaa nkonyek enye, amu meetae nkujit." 
Jeremiah14:7 Ore hoo neishakenoki iyiook entorroni ang, taasa, iyie Olaitoriani tenkaraki enkarna ino, amu eikumok nchukot ang e siadi, kitaasa iyiook ing'ok tialo iyie." 
Jeremiah14:8 Iyie losiligi le Israel, Olaitajeunoni lenye te nkata e nyamali kainyoo iyie pee itiu anaa olomoni te nkop, anaa olalotoni oun olng'obor lenye te nkaraki enkewarie." 
Jeremiah14:9 Kainyoo iyie pee itiu anaa iltung'ana oidang'a? Anaa oltung'ani ogol lemeidim aitajeusho? Ore eyia, iyie Olaitoriani, itii empolos ang, neipotoki iyiook te nkarna ino; ming'uaa iyiook.”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Nji ejo Olaitoriani tiaalo kulo tung'ana: “Etonyorra ninche aaidapashari aaiko nji, eitu ninche eibooyo nkejek enye; neaku meng'amu ninche Olaitoriani, kedamu ninye entorroni enye neitame ing'ok enye.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Miomon tenkaraki olmabarishoi le kulo tung'ana." 
Jeremiah14:12 Ore hoo neen ate aaitupukoo, maning nanu olkiyioi lenye, naa ore hoo neishoru ninche ilasarri oopejori o lasar le ntapa, mang'amu nanu ninche; kake kamut nanu ninche to lalem, o to lameyu o tolmeitai.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Najo nanu; “Oi Olaitoriani Enkai, ng'ura, ejoki iloibonok ninche, ‘Midolidolo intae olalem arashu itumutumu olameyu, kake kaisho nanu intae eseriani nadede tiatua ene wueji.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani: “Elejare eibonu lelo oibonok tenkarna ai: eitu nanu airriwaa ninche, neitu nanu aitanap ninche arashu airorie ninche. Kimbonokito ninche iyie enduaata e lejare, o enaibon e pesho, o elejare oo ndamunot enye." 
Jeremiah14:15 Metaa nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo lelo oibonok ooibonisho te nkarna ai hoo neitu nanu airriwaa ninche, o lelo oojo melotu olalem arashu olameyu ena kop: to lalem o to lameyu emuti lelo oibonok." 
Jeremiah14:16 Ore lelo tung'ana laa ninche eibonoki nenang'ari boo tiatua nkoitoi e Yerusalem, pee ear ninche olameyu o lalem, metii hoo obo onukaa ninche o nkituaak enye, o layiok lenye o ntoyie enye. Amu kabukoki nanu entorroni enye shumata ninche." 
Jeremiah14:17 Tiaaki iyie ninche ele rorei: ‘Nchoo nkonyek aainei enang'ari too lkiyio kewarie o ndama, naa nchoo ninche eaku medung'o ae kata, amu ore ina selenkei oo ltung'ana laainei netooshoki aapik olbae sapuk te oshoto sapuk oleng." 
Jeremiah14:18 Tenaipang nanu alo ong'ata, ng'ura, lekua ootaraki to lalem! Tenajing nanu enkang, ng'ura ilootara olameyu! Amu ore pooki oloiboni o lapolosani neas biashara enye te nkop pooki, nemeeta eng'eno.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Itanya iyie Yuda katukul? Ketonyimo oltau lino Sion? Kainyoo iyie pee itoosho iyiook, ometaa meetae olchani te iyiook? King'oru iyiook eseriani, kake meetae esidai naewuo; kisiligu enkata enkishiunoto, naa ng'ura oloputukunyi." 
Jeremiah14:20 Kimbalie iyiook entorroni ang, iyie Olaitoriani, o entorroni oo loo papa lang, amu kitaasa iyiook eng'oki tialo iyie." 
Jeremiah14:21 Ore te nkaraki enkarna ino, minturaa iyiook. Mintadou olorika lino le nkitoo; tadamu nimigil olning'o lino lo sotua tenebo iyiook." 
Jeremiah14:22 Ketii kulie tiatua nena aitin e lejare oo loreren naaidim aayau enchan? Arashu tenaa keidim shumata aishoru enkirujuruj? Aimira iyie ninye, Olaitoriani Enkai ang? Kipik iyiook osiligi lang iyie, amu ias iyie kuna baa pooki." 
Jeremiah15:1 Naaitoki Olaitoriani ajoki nanu, “Ore naaji ninye teneitashe Musa o Samuel te dukuya nanu, meibelekenya oltau lai aing'or kulo tung'ana. Taarai ninche meshomo too nkonyek aainei, naa nchoo ninche meshomo!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Ore ake pee kinkilikuan ninche iyie, aajoki, ‘Kaji iyiook kipuo?’ Nijoki iyie ninche, Nji ejo Olaitoriani:” “Ore lelo lo lmeitai nepuo olmeitai, ore lelo laa ilo lalem nepuo enetii olalem ore lelo; laa ilo lameyu, nepuo enetii olameyu, ore lelo laa ile yararoto nepuo eyararoto.”" 
Jeremiah15:3 “Kagelaki nanu shumata ninche mpukunot ong'uan oo looidaikie, Olaitoriani ojo: olalem oar, ildien oopolos, olmotonyi lo loing'ang'e o ng'uesi enkop pee emut ninche aaidaikie." 
Jeremiah15:4 Naa kaitaa nanu ninche entoki naitureisho too nkitoriat pooki enkop tenkaraki ina nataasa Manase olayioni le Hesekia, olaiguanani le Yuda tiatua Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah15:5 Kaing'ae liking'urrie iyie oo Yerusalem, arashu kaing'ae likinchiraki iyie? Kaing'ae oibelekenya aikilikuanu olmabarishoi lino?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Kitanya iyie nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, iton arrinyo siadi; neaku aaitorioki nanu enkaina ai pee aagilunore naaidaikie iyie, anaure nanu tenkibooroto engoro ai." 
Jeremiah15:7 Atisila nanu ninche te silet nasilishoreki, too nkang'itie pooki eina kop; aishirie nanu ninche, aidaikie nanu iltung'ana kumok; neitu ninche eibelekenya aaing'uaa nkoitoi enye." 
Jeremiah15:8 Aitaa nanu esiana oo nkolia enye kumok alang osinyai loo naaiposha; ayaka nanu noo ng'otonye ilmurran ooti olainyalani te nkipirata enkolong; aishoo nanu emion o lkirutoto metadoiki ninche aluam. 
Jeremiah15:9 Ore ina natoiwuo nkera naapishana neiterre; etadoyie enkolong enye eton aa dama; eitukurruaki netusulaki. Ore inkera naatelekutua, naisho metaari to lalem te dukuya ilmang'ati lenye, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Woi nanu, yieyio lai, amu kitoiwuo nanu, oltung'ani o ekenya okeshare enkop pooki, neitu aisilenisho, kake aadekita ninche pooki." 
Jeremiah15:11 Metaa nchoo etiu neijia, Olaitoriani, teneitu nanu aaisiaai aitobiraki teneitu nanu aasai iyie terishata oo lmang'ati laainei etii ninche atua enyamali o sina." 
Jeremiah15:12 Ketii obo oidim atigila esekenkei naing'uaa moikuape o suyai? 
Jeremiah15:13 “Ore karsisisho ino o lchumati lino naa kaisho metarari, metii enkinyang'a, tenkaraki ing'ok inono pooki, tiatua enkop ino pooki." 
Jeremiah15:14 Kaaisho nanu iyie isiaayia ilmang'ati linono tiatua enkop nimiyiolo, amu ore te engoro ai neinuaaki enkima nayupuyup ntarasi.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Olaitoriani iyiolo iyie; tadamuaki nanu nikimutan nanu, nintalaku elap tiaalo nanu too laisilisilok laainei. Ore te ng'iriata ino mikiya nanu; tayiolo ajo tenkaraki iyie pee anap imorot." 
Jeremiah15:16 Enotoki rorei linono, nanya nanu ninche, neaku irorei linono te nanu eng'ida o enchipai oltau lai; amu te nkarna ino aaipotoki nanu, Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani." 
Jeremiah15:17 Eitu nanu aton to lturrur loo looshipa, ang'ida; atotona nanu openy, amu etii apa enkaina ino shumata nanu, amu kimputa nanu engoro." 
Jeremiah15:18 Kainyoo pee meish emion ai. Nemeishiunoyu olbae lai ketanya eishiunyeki? Itiu iyie te nanu anaa ereyiet nalejisho, anaa nkariak naaishiunye?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Tenishukunye, naang'amu nanu, naa intashe iyie te dukuya nanu. Teniro iyie ina sidai, neme ina nara pesho, nitiu iyie anaa enkutuk ai." 
Jeremiah15:20 Naa kaaitaa nanu iyie te kulo tung'ana esuntai nasheta osuyai; nikiarare ninche iyie, kake mikimir ninche iyie, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah15:21 Kaakordu nanu iyie aitung'uaa enkaina eilo torrono, naalaku iyie aitung'uaa enkibung'ata eilo lemeeta olng'ur.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii ejo: 
Jeremiah16:2 “Miyamisho aashu iiu ilayiok aashu ntoyie tene wueji. 
Jeremiah16:3 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo ilayiok o ntoyie naaini tene wueji, o tiaalo ntomonok naatoiwutuo ninche o lpayian ooiu ninche tiatua ena kop:" 
Jeremiah16:4 keye ninche too nkeyaitin torrok. Meishirakini ninche, aashu enukari; ketiu ninche anaa emodiei ti oriong enkop, keidak ninche to lalem o to lameyu, ore mpopoki enye neaku endaa too lmotonyi lo loing'ang'e, o too lowuarak le ntim." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: Mijing enkaji naishirieki, aashu ilo aishir, aashu aishiraki ninche, amu aiwuang'ie nanu eseriani ai te kulo tung'ana, Olaitoriani ojo, enyorrata ai nauno o lng'ur." 
Jeremiah16:6 Ore pooki, lkituaak o looti naa kepuo aaye tiatua ena kop; nemenukari ninche, nemeetae hoo obo oishiraki ninche aashu edung'udung kewan aashu ebarn kewan tenkaraki ninche." 
Jeremiah16:7 Nemeetae hoo obo onya emukate eilo oishir, pee eitigir teilo otua; aashu eetae hoo oloisho ninye enkikompe enkitagoloto metooko tenkaraki menye lenye aashu ng'otonye." 
Jeremiah16:8 Milo iyie atua enkaji osirua aton tenebo ninche; adaa niokisho. 
Jeremiah16:9 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: ng'ura kaisho nanu meishunye tene wueji, te dukuya nkonyek inyi o too nkolong'i inyi, oltoilo le ng'ida, oltoilo le nchipai, oltoilo lo loyamisho oltoilo le nayami." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Naa tiniliki iyie kulo tung'ana kulo omon, nikijoki ninche iyie, ‘Kainyoo pee etudung'oko iyiook Olaitoriani ena torroni kitok? Kainyoo entorroni ang? Kainyoo eng'oki nikitaasa iyiook to laitoriani Enkai ang?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Nijoki iyie ninche: ‘Enkaraki naatung'uaitie iloo papaai linyi nanu Olaitoriani ojo, nepuo aasujaa kulie aitin neisiayia neserem ninche, naaing'uaa nanu neitu eibung enkitanapata ai," 
Jeremiah16:12 naa ore enkaraki nitaasa intae entorroni nalang enoo loo papaai linyi, amu ng'ura, etusuja ake pooki ng'ae te intae engolong'u enye torrono, eany aaning nanu;" 
Jeremiah16:13 metaa kanangaa nanu intae aitung'uaa ena kop apik atua enkop nimiyiololo nemeyiolo apa loo papaai linyi, ore teine nitum taa aisiaayia kulie aitin dama o kewarie, amu maaisho nanu iyie omom!’”" 
Jeremiah16:14 “Metaa, ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i Olaitoriani ojo, nemeitokini aajo, ‘Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani laa ninye oyaua ailepunye iltung'ana le Israel aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri.’" 
Jeremiah16:15 Kake ‘Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani laa ninye oyawua iltung'ana loo Siraeli aitung'uaa enkop e moikuape o nkuapi apa pooki naaterewa ninche.’ Amu kayau nanu ninche ashuku meetu enkop enye ate apa naishoo loo papaai lenye. 
Jeremiah16:16 “Ng'ura kairriwu nanu ilarreshok kumok loo sinkir, Olaitoriani ojo naa kerresh ninche; ore te siadi nairriu ilang'orok kumok loo ng'uesi, naa keng'or ninche te pooki doinyo o te pooki oigululu, o too nchumat oo ndapidapo." 
Jeremiah16:17 Amu etii nkonyek aainei shumata nkoitoi enye pooki, meisudoo ninche te nanu, nemeisudoro entorroni enye too nkonyek aainei." 
Jeremiah16:18 Naa kaitalaku nanu katitin are entorroni enye o eng'oki enye enkaraki naituruja enkop ai too mpopoki oo nkitaanyaanyukot, neiputa ninche enjung'ore ai nena o lminong lenye.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Olaitoriani, engolon ai naa osempewuet, naa esarunoto ai te nkolong e nyamali enitii iyie epuonu iloreren. Eing'uaa ineeiting'ie enkop nepuonu aajo: “Eitu ejung loo papaai toki neme elejare, o ntokitin e pesho nemeeta dupoto." 
Jeremiah16:20 Keidim oltung'ani aitobiraki kewan nkaitin? Ore kuna mme nkaitin!” 
Jeremiah16:21 “Metaa, ng'ura, kaisho nanu ninche metayiolo, ore ena kata nabo kaisho ninche metayioloito engolon ai o enkidimata ai, naa keyiolou ninche aajo ore enkarna ai naa Olaitoriani.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 “Eigeroki eng'oki e Yuda te nkalamu e sekenkei, ore te ntopij e almasi, etisiraki te mbao oltau lenye, o too mowuarak oo lperereni lenye loo lasarri." 
Jeremiah17:2 Ina kata edamu nkera enye ilperereni lenye loo lasarri o enkai enye naji Asherim, te mbata e pooki shani onyori, o te nchumata e pooki doinyo adoru," 
Jeremiah17:3 too nchumat oo ldoinyo te nkop naisiaja. Ore karsisisho ino o lchumat linono pooki kaisho metaari anaa enkinyang'a eng'oki ino, tiatua enkop ino pooki." 
Jeremiah17:4 Iorore iyie enjung'ore ino apa naaishoo, naa kaaisho nanu iyie isiaayia ilmang'ati linono tiatua enkop nimiyiolo, amu ore te ngoro ai, neinuaaki enkima nayupuyup ntarasi.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ediaa oltung'ani oisilig iltung'ana neitaa osesen le tung'ani emasaai o larrabal. Ilo oibelekeny oltau lenye aitung'uaa Olaitoriani. 
Jeremiah17:6 Etiu ninye anaa enkiti shani nabulu olpurkel, nemedol ninye ae sidai elotu. Keton ninye too worro tiong'ota, te nkop naisukut nememanya." 
Jeremiah17:7 Emayiana ilo tung'ani oisilig Olaitoriani, otii osiligi lenye atua Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah17:8 Etiu ninye anaa olchani otunoki te mbata enkare, oreu ntona enyena embata olkeju, nemeureishoyu tenelotu enkirowuaj, amu ketoni ake mbenek enyena enyori, nemesi ninye te nkata olameyu, amu mepal ae kata ninye meiu ilng'anayio.”" 
Jeremiah17:9 Olalejani oltau alang ntokitin pooki, naa torrono oleng. Kaing'ae oidim atayiolo ninye?" 
Jeremiah17:10 “Kajur nanu Olaitoriani ndamunot natem oltau, pee aisho pooki tung'ani te risioroto oo nkoitoi enyena te risioroto oo lng'anayio loo nkiaasin enyena.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Anaa enkurlee naiturrur nkera neitu edanyu, neijia eikununo ilo otum karsisisho kake mme te sipata; ore te mpolos oo nkolong'i enyena neing'uaa ninche ninye, ore te nkiting'oto enye neaku olmodai." 
Jeremiah17:12 Olorika le nkitoo le nkisisa otipikaki apa shumata ebaiki enkiterunoto, ninye ewueji ang sinyati." 
Jeremiah17:13 Iyie Olaitoriani osiligi le Israel, ore pooki liking'uaa iyie netum enkurruna; ore lelo likimbelekenya aaing'uaa iyie, neigeri tiatua enkop, too kulukuok amu etanyaita ninche Olaitoriani, ina ong'u enkare naishu." 
Jeremiah17:14 Nchiunyeki nanu Olaitoriani, naa kaishiu; ntajeuoki naa kajeu; amu ira iyie enkisisa ai." 
Jeremiah17:15 Ng'ura kaajoki ninche nanu, “Koree ororei oing'uaa Olaitoriani? Nchoo elotu!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Eitu nanu aaitirrishaki iyie pee irriu entorroni, neitu nanu ang'uar enkolong e mutai, iyiolo iyie; ore ina napuku tiatua enkutuk ai netii dukuya enkomom ino." 
Jeremiah17:17 Meaku olkirutoto te nanu; ira iyie esarunoto ai te nkolong entorroni. 
Jeremiah17:18 Nchoo metukurru lelo laaisilisil nanu, kake mikincho nanu aaitukurruni. Nchoo ninche eirut, kake mikincho nanu airut! Intadoiki ninche enkolong entorroni; ingilie ninche kat are enkidaata." 
Jeremiah17:19 Nji aatiaaka nanu Olaitoriani: “Shomo ntasho te nkishomi e Benchamen, naa ninye ejing'unye ilaiguanak le Yuda naa ninye eipang'ie, o too nchomito pooki e Yerusalem," 
Jeremiah17:20 nijo, ‘Entoning ororei lo laitoriani intae ilaiguanak le Yuda, o Yuda pooki, o lelo pooki oomanya Yerusalem, oojing'u te kuna shomito." 
Jeremiah17:21 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: entorripoto tenkaraki enkishui inyi, niminapinapa olola te nkolong e sabato aashu iimunyenye nchomito e Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah17:22 Niminapinapa olola aaitayu too nkajijik inyi te nkolong e sabato aashu iasiasa ae siaai, kake entaa enkolong e sabato sinyati, anaa apa enaitanapa loo papaai linyi." 
Jeremiah17:23 Ore eyia eitu apa ninche ening'isho neitu eishoru enkiok enye, kake etogolong'utua, pee mening nemeng'amu inkiteng'enat." 
Jeremiah17:24 “ ‘Kake tenikining'ining'i intae nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, nimintijing'ung'u olola too nchomito ena anasa te nkolong e sabato, kake nintaa enkolong e sabato sinyati nimiasishosho teina olong," 
Jeremiah17:25 netum aaimu nchomito ena anasa ilaiguanak ootonie olorika le nkitoo le Daudi, ekedito ngarrin oo mbartan o mbartan, ninche o lkituaak lenye, lelo tung'ana le Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem; nemanyi ena anasa ntarasi." 
Jeremiah17:26 Nepuonu iltung'ana ooing'uaa nkang'itie e Yuda o wuejitin neemanita Yerusalem, eing'uaa enkop e Benchamen, eing'uaa Shefela, eing'uaa ina kop oo ldoinyo, o looing'ua negeb, eyau ilasarri oopejori o nkishorot, nkishorot e nkurma o lbani, neyau nkishorot e nashe enkaji Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah17:27 Kake tenimikining'ining'i intae nanu, aaitaa enkolong e sabato sinyati, niminapinapa olola niimumu nchomito e Yerusalem te nkolong e sabato, nainok nanu enkima too nchomito enyena, naa kemut nkajijik e nkitoo e Yerusalem nemeari ae kata.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Ele rorei ninye oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani ejo: 
Jeremiah18:2 “Tudumunye tadoi shomo enkaji o laitobirani loo ntokitin oo nkulupuok ore tene naaisho nanu iyie toning'o irorei laainei.” 
Jeremiah18:3 Nadoyio nanu alo enkaji o laitobirani loo ntokitin oo nkulupuok, ore teine neasisho ninye te nkeju enye engarri." 
Jeremiah18:4 Ore apa ina masaai naitobirita ninye te nkulukuoni nerruoyo te nkaina o laitobirani loo ntokitin oo nkulupuok, neitoki aitobir aitayunye enkae masaai, anaa enadol o laitobirani too ntokitin oo nkulupuok enaa enadol aa sidai te neas." 
Jeremiah18:5 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enatii ejo: 
Jeremiah18:6 “Na aji e Israel, aimaidim nanu aikuna te intae anaa enaikuna ele aitobirani loo ntokitin oo nkulupuok? Olaitoriani ojo: ng'ura, ore anaa esarng'ab te nkaina o laitobirani loo ntokitin oo nkulupuok neijia itiuu intae te nkaina ai, na aji e Israel." 
Jeremiah18:7 Ore te pooki kata tenaibalunye tialo olosho aashu enkitoria, nchere kadotu nagil nainyal," 
Jeremiah18:8 naa ore ilo osho, laa tialo ninye airoro, teneibelekenya aing'uaa entorroni enye, nairridu ina torroni apa natejo kaitaas ninye." 
Jeremiah18:9 Naa ore te pooki kata tenaibalunye nanu tialo olosho aashu enkitoria nchere kashet naun ninye," 
Jeremiah18:10 naa teneas entorroni too nkonyek aainei, mening oltoilo lai, nairridu nanu teina sidai natejo pee aitaas ninye." 
Jeremiah18:11 Ore naa, tiaaki iltung'ana le Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem: ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ng'ura, aitobirita entorroni tialo iyie naipiru enkitobirata tialo intae. Tushukunye, pooki ng'ae aing'uaa enkoitoi enye torrono, nintobiriri nkoitoi inyi o nkiaasin inyi.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 “Kake ejo ninche, ‘Pesho ina! Kisuj iyiook nkitobirat ang maate, neas pooki ng'ae te risioroto engolon oltau lenye torrono.’" 
Jeremiah18:13 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani: Nkilikuanu tiatua iloreren, kaing'ae otoning'o enanyaanyukie ena? Etaasa ina tito selenkei e Israel embae suuji oleng." 
Jeremiah18:14 Kepal enturoto e Lebanon endapidapoi e Sirion? Ketoyu nena ariak o ldoinyo naaimu lelo yerat ooirobi? 
Jeremiah18:15 Kake maadamu nanu iltung'ana laainei, epejoki ninche enkorropil nkaitin e lejare; netarrorrote ninche tiatua nkoitoi enye, too ilbaribarani musan, neshomo aaim nkoitoi naangel mme enkoitoi kitok," 
Jeremiah18:16 eitaa enkop enye enaitureisho, entoki naing'asiakinie intarasi. Ore pooki ng'ae oim embata neiputukuny neipirripir elukunya enye." 
Jeremiah18:17 Anaa osiwuo ogol le nkilepunoto enkolong kaidapash nanu ninche te dukuya olmang'atinta. Kaisho nanu ninche oriong ai, mme omom ai, te nkolong enye o sina.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Nejo ninche, “Wootu, maitaikiti iyiook Yeremia irresheta, amu merruoyo enkitanapata to lapolosani, aashu enkiguana to lang'eni, aashu ororei to loiboni. Wootu, matar ninye to lng'ejep, nimikining iyiook hoo obo loo rorei lenyena.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Ng'uraki nanu Olaitoriani, nining olkiyioi lai." 
Jeremiah18:20 Kentorroni elakieki esidai? Ore eyia etuturutuo ninche engumoto tenkaraki enkishui ai. Tadamu ina naitasho te dukuya iyie pee airo esidai tenkaraki ninche, pee aibelekeny aiwuang'ie aitung'uaa ninche." 
Jeremiah18:21 Neaku iwa nkera enye meshomo aatum olameyu; nchooi ninche meshomo engolon empijan olalem, nchoo nkituaak enye eaku olupeno o nkolia. Metanang'are ilewa lenye keeya to lmeitai, metaari eleleroenye to lalem to larrabal." 
Jeremiah18:22 Metoning'ori olkiyioi eing'uaa nkajijik enye, tiniyau iyie lelo ooarr ninche metuata te luamata! Amu etuturutuo ninche engumoto pee aaya nanu, neirragakinye nkejek aainei irresheta." 
Jeremiah18:23 Ore eyia, iyiolo iyie Olaitoriani ilnukat lenye laarieki nanu matua. Mipalaki ninche entorroni enye, nimijut eng'oki enye too nkonyek inono. Nchoo ninche metanang'ari te dukuya iyie; ntaasa ninche te nkata engoro ino." 
Jeremiah19:1 Nji etejo Olaitoriani, “Shomo, inyiang'u endukuny o laitobirani loo nkulupuok, niya embata oo lpayiani loo ltung'ana o embata oo lapolosak kituaak," 
Jeremiah19:2 nimpang alo oyarata lo layioni le Hinom tenejing'ieki enkishomi e Poshed, nimbalunye teine lelo rorei laaliki nanu." 
Jeremiah19:3 Nijo iyie, ‘Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani, intae ilaiguanak le Yuda oloomanya Yerusalem. Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel, ng'ura kayau nanu entorroni shumata ene wueji ometaa ore nkiyiaa e pooki ng'ae oning ena neng'eyu." 
Jeremiah19:4 Enkaraki naatung'uaitie nanu iltung'ana, neisarkione ninche ene wueji etapejokito enkorropil tiatua ine kulie aitin neitu eyiolou ninche arashu iloomenye arashu ilaiguanak le Yuda; o enkaraki naiputa ninche ene wueji osarge le lelo lemeeta ntiot," 
Jeremiah19:5 netesheta iwuejitin neeika e Baal pee epejie ilayiok lenye te nkima anaa ilasarri oopejori te Baal, lelo leitu nanu aitanapisho aashu alimu, neitu ejing atua endamunoto ai," 
Jeremiah19:6 ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, nemeitokini aajo ene wueji Tofet, aashu oyarata lo layioni le Hinom, kake oyarata le sesekuanare o lalem." 
Jeremiah19:7 Naa ore tiatua ene wueji kainyal nanu nkitobirat e Yuda o Yerusalem, naisho ene metabatatayu to lalem te dukuya ilmang'ati lenye, o te nkaina e lelo ooing'oru enkishui enye kaisho nanu mpopoki enye metaa endaa oo motonyi oloing'ang'e o ng'uesi enkop." 
Jeremiah19:8 Naitaa nanu ena anasa entoki naitureisho, entoki naing'asiakinoi; ore pooki ng'ae ogiroo ninye neiputukuny neing'asia tenkaraki enkidaaroto enye pooki." 
Jeremiah19:9 Naisho nanu meinosa ninche nkiri oo layiok lenye o noo ntoyie enye, nenya pooki ng'ae nkiri e ilo lelatia enye emanitae ninche o to sina, opik ninche ilmang'ati lenye, o lelo ooing'oru enkishui enye neisomit ninche.’" 
Jeremiah19:10 “Nibel iyie ina dukuny te dukuya lelo tung'ana oopuo tenebo iyie! 
Jeremiah19:11 Nijoki iyie ninche, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Neaku kadanyidany nanu kulo tung'ana o ena anasa anaa enadany oltung'ani entoki oo nkulupuok, o metaa meigili ae kata aaram. Nenukaa iltung'ana ninye te Tofet amu meitokini aata ewueji nenukarieki." 
Jeremiah19:12 Nji nanu aitaas ene wueji, Olaitoriani ojo, o lelo oomanya, aitotiu ena anasa anaa Tofet." 
Jeremiah19:13 Ore nkajijik e Yerusalem o nkajijik oo laiguanak le Yuda nena ajijik pooki naatapejorieki enkorropil inchumat enye tenkaraki olorora pooki le shumata neibukorieki ilasarri ooki tenkaraki nkulie aitin naa keisarkionieki anaa ewueji e Tofet.’ ” 
Jeremiah19:14 Neitoki Yeremia alotu eing'uaa Tofet, ine apa neirriwayie Olaitoriani ninye meshomo aibonisho, neitashe ninye to lgoriet le nkaji e Nkai, nejoki ninye iltung'ana pooki:" 
Jeremiah19:15 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel, ng'ura kayaki nanu shumata ena anasa o shumata nkang'itie enyena ina torroni, pooki natejo kaitaas ninye, enkaraki naitagolo ninche lukuny enye, eany ening irorei laainei.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Nening apa Pashur olapolosani, olayioni le Imer, laa ninye apa olkitok tiatua enkaji Olaitoriani, Yeremia eibonisho te kuna baa." 
Jeremiah20:2 Near Pashur Yeremia, oloiboni le Nkai, neeniki ninye lelo pisia apa ootii shumata kishomi e Benchamen te nkaji o Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah20:3 Ore taisere, ina kata elaku Pashur Yeremia aitayu too lpisia, nejoki Yeremia ninye, “Mikintoki iyie Olaitoriani ajo enkarna ino Pashur, kake enkuretisho te pooki shoto." 
Jeremiah20:4 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura, kaaitaa nanu enkuretisho te kewan ino o too lchoreta linono pooki. Kebatata ninche to lalem loo lmang'ati lenye ing'orita iyie. Naa kaishooyo Yuda pooki apik atua enkaina o laiguanani le Babilon; neya ninye ninche eyararoto te Babilon near ninche to lalem." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ore sii, kaishooyo nanu karsisisho pooki ena anasa, dupoto enye pooki, nena masaa enyena pooki naagol enkinyang'a, o nena masaa pooki naashuma o laiguanak le Yuda apik atua nkaik oo lmang'ati lenye, pee eya ninche pooki nenap aaya Babilon." 
Jeremiah20:6 Ore iyie, Pashur, o lelo pooki ootoni tiatua enkaji ino nipuopuo eyararoto; Babilon intae ipuopuo; naa teine ipuopuo aaye, naa teine kipuoi aanukaa, iyie o lchoreta linono pooki, apa limbonoko te lejare.”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Iyie, Olaitoriani, kiteleja iyie nanu; nateleje nanu; igol iyie alang nanu, isula iyie. Ataa nanu entoki nakueniyieki endama pooki; naamor nanu pooki ng'ae." 
Jeremiah20:8 Amu ore ake anaa enairo nanu, naishir, nabuaku ajo, “Olarrabal o enkidaaroto!” Amu etotiwuo ororei lo laitoriani te nanu anaa emoroto o enkitang'oroto! Endama pooki." 
Jeremiah20:9 Tenajo nanu, “Maitoki aimaki ninye, arashu aigil airo te nkarna enye.” Nejing atua oltau lai anaa enatiu enkima nayupuyup naikenoro tiatua iloik laainei, nanaure nanu ajo aibookino, nemaidim nanu." 
Jeremiah20:10 Amu aning'ito nanu ing'omakinot kumok. Etii enkuretisho pooki shoto! “Intang'oro ninye! Maitang'oro iyiook ninye!” Tejo ore ilchoreta laainei latamoore, neanyita embatatata ai. “Ekeidimi aatelej ninye, nikisulie iyiook ninye, nikintalaku iyiook elap te ninye.”"
