Jeremiah20:11 Kake etii Olaitoriani tenebo nanu anaa olmurrani opi, neaku keikirikira lelo laaisilisil nanu, maaidimu ninche nanu. Keitukurruni ninche oleng, amu medupayu ninche, ore ina nemeyanyitisho ninche nemerikinishoi ae kata." 
Jeremiah20:12 Olaitoriani loo lororani, laa iyie otem olasipani kaing'ae odol oltau o ndamunot, nchooki nanu matoduaa elap ino te shumata ninche, amu iyie nanu atipika mbaa aainei." 
Jeremiah20:13 Entaranyaki Olaitoriani; esisa Olaitoriani! Amu eitajewuo enkishui eilo omena, aitung'uaa nkaik oo laasak loo ntorrok." 
Jeremiah20:14 Metedeki ina olong apa naatoiwuoki! Ina olong apa naatoiwuo yieyio nanu. Nchoo metaa memayiana! 
Jeremiah20:15 Metedeki ilo tung'ani, apa oyaka papaai lai ilomon ajoki, “Kitoikioki olayioni” aitiship ninye oleng." 
Jeremiah20:16 Nchoo ilo tung'ani metotiwuo anaa nkanas naaibelekenya Olaitoriani metii olng'ur; nchoo ninye ening olkiyioi tadekenya oltoilo le batisho dama," 
Jeremiah20:17 amu eitu apa aar ninye nanu matua te nguset; neaku anaata apa etaa yieyioo enkurare ai, nebik enguset aa kitok intarasi." 
Jeremiah20:18 Kainyoo apa pee atupukuo te nguset alotu adol enyamali o sina, naton nkolong'i aainei te nkurruna?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Ele rorei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani, ina kata apa pee eirriwaki ninye olaiguanani Sedekia Pashur olayioni le Malkia o Sefania olapolosani, Maasia, ejo," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Inkilikuanishore Olaitoriani tialo iyiook, amu eitobirita Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon olarrabal pee earare iyiook; eidim Olaitoriani aitaasa iyiook te risioroto oo nkiaasin enyena e nking'asia, neisho ninye metorrinyoyu aing'uaa iyiook.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Neitoki Yeremia ajoki ninche: 
Jeremiah21:4 “Nji intae entiaaki Sedekia, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: Ng'ura, Kashuku nanu nena masaa o larrabal naatii atua nkaik inyi naa te ninche iararere olaiguanani le Babilon niaararere Ilkaldayo oomanita intae tioriong isunta; naa kayau nanu ninche tenebo atua empolos ena anasa." 
Jeremiah21:5 Nanu enkorrok ai oarare intae te nkaina naitoriori o enkaina nagol, te ngoro, o te mpushuna, o te ngoro kitok." 
Jeremiah21:6 Naa kaosh nanu lelo oomanya ena anasa, oltung'ani o eng'ues, keye ninche to lmeitai kitok nepi." 
Jeremiah21:7 Ore te siadi, Olaitoriani ojo, naisho nanu Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda, o sinkan lenyena, o ltung'ana ootii ena anasa, ooleku lmeitai to olalem, o lameyu, naisho nanu metaarai enkaina e Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon o te nkaina oo lmang'ati lenye, atua enkaina e lelo ooing'oru enkishui enye. Keosh ninyeninche te nepi o lalem, meing'urrie ninye ninche, aashu epal ninche, aashu eeta olng'ur.’" 
Jeremiah21:8 “Ore tialo kulo tung'ana tiaaki iyie: ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura, Kapik nanu dukuya iyie enkoitoi enkishui o enkoitoi e keeya." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ore ilo oton tiatua ena anasa neye to lalem, o to lameyu, o to lmeitai; kake ore ilo oipang alo neisho kewan lelo kaldayo oo manita intae nepok netiu enkishui enye anaa enkishoroto olarrabal." 
Jeremiah21:10 Amu eitu nanu aarare ena anasa aarare te ntorroni neme te sidai, Olaitoriani ojo; keishoori ninye aapik atua enkaina olaiguanani le Babilon, naa kepejoo ninye te nkima.’" 
Jeremiah21:11 “Ore tialo enkaji o laiguanani le Yuda tejo, ‘Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani," 
Jeremiah21:12 na aji e Daudi! Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Tudung'o enkiguana te sipata tadekenya, niyau aitung'uaa enkaina e ilo oitorogonyisho ilo oitorongonyaki mepuku ake engoro ai anaa enkima, neyupuyup nemeetae oltung'ani oidim atara, tenkaraki nkiaasin inyi torrok." 
Jeremiah21:13 Ng'ura, kaarare nanu intae, iloomanya oyarata, iyie nadapidapoi enkisiajata, Olaitoriani ojo; intae oojo, Kaing'ae oidim atadou ataarare iyiook, aashu kaing'ae oidim atijing'a emanyisho ang?’" 
Jeremiah21:14 Kaitame nanu intae te risioroto oo lng'anayio loo nkiaasin inyi, Olaitoriani ojo kainok nanu enkima tiatua entim enye, naa kemut ninye ina pooki namanita ninye.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Tadoi shomo enkaji o laiguanani le Yuda, niro teine ele rorei," 
Jeremiah22:2 nijo, Toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani la aiguanani le Yuda, ilo otonita to lorika le nkitoo le Daudi; iyie o sinkan linono, o ltung'ana linono ooimu kuna shomito." 
Jeremiah22:3 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Taasa esipata o esupatisho, intayu te nkaina e ilo oitorogonyisho ilo oitorogonyaki. Niminyalinyala aashu iariara olomoni, o lokishi, o enkoliai, aashu imbukoo osarge lemetii entioto tene wueji." 
Jeremiah22:4 Amu esipa tinimbung ele rorei, neimu ilgorieti lena aji ilaiguanak ootonie olorika le nkitoo le Daudi, ekedito ngarrin oo mbartan o mbartan, ninche o sinkan lenye, o ltung'ana lenye." 
Jeremiah22:5 Kake tinimining kulo rorei, ainosa olmumai te kewan ai, Olaitoriani ojo, nchere ore ena aji naa keaku mijooni." 
Jeremiah22:6 “Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo enkaji o laiguanani le Yuda: Ira iyie sidai anaa Gilead te nanu, itiu iyie anaa endukuya e oldoinyo le Lebanon kake esipa kaaitaa nanu iyie olpurkel o enkanasa neme manya." 
Jeremiah22:7 Kairriu nanu ilainyalak likiarare iyie, oltung'ani ake o masaa enyena o larrabal naa kedung ninche iltarakua inono gelunot nenang'aki ninche atua enkima." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Naa kegiroo iloreren kumok ena anasa, nejoki ake pooki ng'ae olelatia enye, Kainyoo pee etaasa Olaitoriani ena tena anasa kitok?”" 
Jeremiah22:9 Naa kewaliki ninche aajo, “Enkaraki natung'uaitie ninche osotua lo Laitoriani Enkai enye, neserem kulie aitin neisiaai ninche.”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Minchirakiki ninye ilo otua aashu isinanuo tenkaraki ninye kake nchirakiki te mion ilo olo, amu meitoki ninye ashukunye adol enkop enye." 
Jeremiah22:11 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo Shalom olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda, laa ninye oitoreisho te rishata e Yosia papaai lenye. Naa ninye oshomo aing'uaa ewueji enye: “Meitoki aekata ninye ashukunye ene," 
Jeremiah22:12 kake tiatua ine wueji netanapaki ninye aaya eyararoto, teine eye ninye, nemeitoki ae kata ninye aigil adol ena kop.”" 
Jeremiah22:13 “Woi ninye ilo oshet enkaji enye te ntorroni, o nkajijik enyena e shumata te lejare ilo oisho olelatia enye meisiaayia ninye te mpesho, nemeisho ninye olmushaara lenye;" 
Jeremiah22:14 ilo ojo, ‘Kashetaki nanu kewan enkaji sapuk tenebo inkajijik e shumata naalala’ naguetaki ilusien ninye neikod ninye too ltarakua, nael toranki onyokie." 
Jeremiah22:15 Ijo iyie ira olaiguanani enkaraki nishet inkajijik oo ltarakua? Keitu apa edaa papaai lino neokisho neas esipata o esupatisho? Neaku etaa sidai te ninye. 
Jeremiah22:16 Eiguanare ninye mbaa olaisinani ono lomena; neaku sidai. Aime nanu eyiolo tena? Olaitoriani ojo. 
Jeremiah22:17 Kake iata iyie inkonyek o oltau, tenkaraki ake, dupoto o e lejare o te nkibukoroto o sarge lemeeta entioto, o easata enkitorogonyare o larrabal.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo Yehoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda: “Meishiraki ninche ninye ejo, oi olalashe lai! Aashu ejo oi enkanashe ai!" 
Jeremiah22:19 Meishiraki ninche ninye ejo, oi olkitok, anaa ejo oi oloyanyiti! Kenukari ninye anaa osikiria, eing'irtitori nenang'ari aaitogiroo nchomito e Yerusalem.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 “Ilepa shomo Lebanon, niyietu aishir, ailepunye oltoilo lino tiatua Bashan; nchira te Abarim, amu ore lelo sanchan linono pooki neidaikieki." 
Jeremiah22:21 Aairorie nanu iyie tiatua karsisisho ino, kake itejo iyie, ‘Mainining nanu.’ Ena apa nataa enkoitoi ino ebaiki lelero ino, nchere eitu iyie ining oltoilo lai." 
Jeremiah22:22 Keirrita olkutati ilchekuti linono pooki, ore isanchan linono pooki nepuo eyararoto; nitum taa atukurru nindang te nkaraki entorroni ino pooki." 
Jeremiah22:23 Iyie olomanya Lebanon oton tiatua iltarakua kebaa sii iyie enkigoroto tenelotu emion shumata iyie, emion naikununo anaa ene nkitok nasaisai!”" 
Jeremiah22:24 “Ore anaa enaishu Olaitoriani ojo, hoo naa ore Konia olayioni le Yehoiakim olaiguanani le Yuda, naa olgisoi omishirakino enkarna ai te nkaina ai e tatene, ore ake eyia, aidim nanu atopolosai" 
Jeremiah22:25 naaishooyo iyie apik atua enkaina e lelo ooing'oru enkishui ino, lelo liure iyie naapik atua enkaina e Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon o atua nkaik oo Lkaldayo." 
Jeremiah22:26 Kaanang'aa nanu iyie o ina ng'utunyi nikitoiwuo iyie anang'aki atua ae kop, ine neitu apa kiinieki, naa teine ilo iyie aye." 
Jeremiah22:27 Kake ore ina kop nang'uar ninche pee eshukokino, meshukokino ninche.”" 
Jeremiah22:28 Amaa ele tung'ani oji Konia kemoti natemenayioki natadanye, entoki nemeshilaa hoo ng'ae? Kainyoo paa ore ninye o nkera enyena netanang'ayioki aaiturraa tiatua enkop nemeyiolo ninche?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Iyie na kop, na kop, na kop, toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah22:30 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ngero ele tung'ani ajo meeta nkera, ele tung'ani lemedupoyu too nkolong'i enyena; amu meetae hoo obo tiatua eishoi enye odupoyu atonie olorika le nkitoo le Daudi, neitoki aitoreisho te Yuda.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 “Oi kulo shekuti ooidaikie neidapash ntare enkirrita ai?” Olaitoriani ojo. 
Jeremiah23:2 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, tialo lelo shekuti ooing'or iltung'ana laainei: “Indapasha intae eluaata ai, nitaaraitie ninche meshomo, neitu intae ing'oring'oro ninche. Ng'ura, kaitame nanu intae te nkaraki nkiaasin inyi torrok, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah23:3 Naitoki taa aiturrur olpisiai le luaata ai aitung'uaa nena kuapi apa naterewa ninche naa kepuo neponari. 
Jeremiah23:4 Naa kapik nanu ilchekuti shumata ninche laa ninche ooing'or ninche, nemeitoki aikata aaureisho, arashu aaiputukuny, nemeitoki hoo nabo aimin, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah23:5 “Ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, pee atum ailepakinye Daudi olng'osila le supatisho, naa keitoreisho anaa olaiguanani neasisho te ng'eno, nedung enkiguana te sipata o te supatisho te nkop." 
Jeremiah23:6 Ore tiatua nkolong'i enyena neitajeuni Yuda, nebik Israel te seriani. Naa ena enkarna naa ninye eipotieki ninye, ‘Olaitoriani esupatisho ang.’" 
Jeremiah23:7 “Neaku, ng'ura kepounu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, nemeitoki iltung'ana aajo, ‘Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani oitayio iltung'ana le Israel ailepunye te nkop e Misiri,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 kake, ‘Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani oitayio nerikoo eishoi e nkaji e Israel aitung'uaa enkop e moikuape oatua nkuapi apa naaterewa ninye ninche.’ Netum taa aatobik tiatua enkop enye maate.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Ore tiatua iloibonok: Aatigile oltau lai tiatua nanu, keikirikira iloik laainei pooki; atiu nanu anaa oltung'ani otemere, anaa oltung'ani oidimua enaisho, te nkaraki Olaitoriani o te nkaraki irorei lenyena sinyat." 
Jeremiah23:10 Amu ebore enkop iloololoito; ore te nkaraki oldeket neishir enkop, ore nkujit naanyori e ong'ata neitoi. Ore olkuaak lenye naa entorroni, ore engolon enye neme sidai." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Ore pokira oloiboni o lapolosani neme ilorrekie le Nkai; ore ninye tiatua enkaji ai nanoto entorroni enye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah23:12 Neaku ketiu enkoitoi enye te ninche anaa enkoitoi naideket te naimin, atua ninye emirakini ninche nebatata amu kayau nanu entorroni shumata ninche tiatua ilo ari le nkitamioto enye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah23:13 Ore tiatua iloibonok le Samaria atoduaa nanu entoki e modai eibonishote ninche te Baal nerik iltung'ana laainei Israeli aaitapong'oo. 
Jeremiah23:14 Kake ore tiatua iloibonok le Yerusalem atoduaa nanu entoki suuji: eas ninche eloloito nepuo te lejare; eitagol ninche inkaik oo laasak loo ntorrok, metaa meetae hoo obo oibelekenya aing'uaa nkiaasin enyena torrok; etotiutuo ninche pooki anaa Sodom te nanu, neikununo anaa lelo oomanya Gomora.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani tialo iloibonok: “Ng'ura kaitoti nanu ninche te sayiet, naisho ninche enkare natipikaki esayiet metooko; amu iloibonok le Yerusalem etupukunye orrekie leme ole Nkai alo enkop pooki.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Mining iyie, irorei leilo oiboni likimbonoki iyie nikimput iyie inkisilagat e pesho; eiro ninche induaat oo ndamunot enye, mme naaing'uaa enkutuk o Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah23:17 Ejoki ninche anaake lelo lemeshilaa ororei lo laitoriani, ‘Ekesidanu te intae’ nejoki pooki ng'ae ogolung'u osuj oltau lenye ake, ‘Metii entorroni nalotu shumata iyie.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:18 Amu kaing'ae tiatua ninche oitasho tiatua enkiguana o Laitoriani pee emusu nening ororei lenye aashu aing'ae oibung'a ororei lenye neinining? 
Jeremiah23:19 Ng'ura, osiwuo lo Laitoriani! Eipang'ua engoro napi enye o lkutati ogol kedanyakino ninye elukunya e ilo torrono." 
Jeremiah23:20 Meshuko engoro o Laitoriani ometaba anaa nedung ninye enkiguana neitabaya iyieunot endamunoto enye. Ore too nkolong'i e siadi naa iyiolou iyie aibalie. 
Jeremiah23:21 “Eitu nanu airriwaa iloibonok, kake ekueta ninche, eitu nanu airorie ninche, kake eibonishote ninche." 
Jeremiah23:22 Kake tenaa naaji keitasheito ninche te nkiguana ai, anaata etolimutuo irorei laainei too ltung'ana laainei, naa anaata aibelekenya ninche metung'uai nkoitoi enye torrok, o entorroni oo nkiaasin enye." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Ara nanu Enkai nataana, Olaitoriani ojo, neme Enkai nalakua?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Keidim oltung'ani aisudoi kewan too wuejitin oo nkisudorot pee madol nanu ninye? Olaitoriani ojo. Eimaborei nanu shumata o enkop? Olaitoriani ojo. 
Jeremiah23:25 Atoning'o nanu enatejo lelo oibonok ooibonisho te lejare te nkarna ai, ejo, ‘Aidetideta nanu, aidetideta nanu!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Keaku kenya elejare o nanu tiatua oltau le lelo oibonok ooibonu elejare oltau lenye maate," 
Jeremiah23:27 lelo oojo maishoo iltung'ana laainei erikino enkarna ai te nena kidetidetat enye naa ninche ejokino maate, anaa apa enatorikine loo menye enkarna ai tenkaraki Baal?" 
Jeremiah23:28 Nchoo ilo oiboni oata enkidetidet elimu enkidetidet, kake nchoo ilo oata ororei lai elimu ororei lai te sipata. Kainyoo ebaikino mbenek o enkano? Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah23:29 Aimetiu ororei lai anaa enkima, Olaitoriani ojo, netiu anaa enyuntu nabelibel endapidapoi?" 
Jeremiah23:30 Neaku, ng'ura, kagilunore nanu iloibonok, Olaitoriani ojo, lelo oopurro to rorei laainei te ninche maate." 
Jeremiah23:31 Ng'ura kaarare nanu lelo oibonok, Olaitoriani ojo, oasishore ilng'ejepa lenye nejo, ‘Olaitoriani ojo.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Kaarare nanu lelo ooibonu enkidetidetat e lejare, Olaitoriani ojo, laa ninche oojoki ninche nerikoo iltung'ana laainei aaitapong'oo te lejare enye o te nkitokoos enye, eitu nanu airriwaa ninche aashu aitanap ninche; metaa meret ninche ele orere katukul, olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah23:33 “Tinikinkilikuan iyie oltung'ani obo te kulo aashu oloiboni, aashu olapolosani, ajoki, ‘Kainyoo olola lo Laitoriani?’ Tiaaki iyie ninche, ‘Ntae ilo ola, naa kanang'aa intae aiturraa, Olaitoriani ojo.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Naa ore tialo oloiboni, olapolosani aashu obo loo ltung'ana ojo, ‘Olola lo Laitoriani’ naitame nanu ilo tung'ani o enkaji enye." 
Jeremiah23:35 Nji iyie tejo, ore pooki ng'ae to lelatia enye o pooki ng'ae to lalashe lenye, ‘Kainyoo etawalua olaitoriani ajo?’ aashu ‘Kainyoo eiroro Olaitoriani?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Kake ore ‘Olola lo Laitoriani’ mingil aekata aimaki, amu ore ilo ola naa ororei le pooki ng'ae makewan, nimbelekenyenye irorei le Nkai naishu, Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai ang." 
Jeremiah23:37 Neaku tiaaki iyie oloiboni, ‘Kainyoo kitawalikia Olaitoriani ajoki?’ Aashu ‘Kainyoo eiroro Olaitoriani?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Kake te nijo iyie, ‘Olola lo Laitoriani’ nji ejo Olaitoriani, Ore enkaraki nitejo kulo rorei, Olola lo Laitoriani, ina kata apa pee aairriwaki iyie olkilikuai, ajoito, Mijo ake, ‘Olola lo Laitoriani.’" 
Jeremiah23:39 Metaa, ng'ura, edede kaadumu nanu iyie aing'atie enkop naanang'aa aitung'uaa enaatii nanu, iyie o ina anasa apa naaishoo nanu iyie o loo papaai lino." 
Jeremiah23:40 Naa kayau nanu shumata iyie esulare oo ntarasi o enkurruna e anaake, ina nemerikinishoi ae kata.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Ore pee eidip Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon ataarai aitung'uaa Yerusalem Yekonia olayioni le Yehoiakin, olaiguanani le Yuda, tenebo ilkituaak le Yuda, o lelo arriyiak o lkunono, neyau ninche Babilon, naaitodol nanu Olaitoriani ena duaata: ng'ura nkikapuni are naabore ilng'abolo eirragieki te dukuya enkaji o Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah24:2 Ore enkikapu nabo neeta ilng'abolo sidain oleng, laa ninche ooitera aaku, kake ore enkae kikapu neeta ilng'abolo torrok oleng lemeinosayu." 
Jeremiah24:3 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Kainyoo iyie idolita, Yeremia?” Najo nanu ilng'abolo, “Ilng'abolo, sidain sidain oleng, o lng'abalo torrok torrok oleng, torrok, oleng lemeinosayu.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enatii nanu ejo: 
Jeremiah24:5 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: Anaa enatiu kulo ng'abolo sidain neijia adol aa sidain lelo yararot ooing'uaa Yuda, apa lairriwayie nanu meshomo aaing'uaa ene wueji aapuo enkop oo Lkaldayo." 
Jeremiah24:6 Kapik nanu nkonyek aainei shumata ninche te sidai, naa kayau nanu ninche arrinyu meetu ena kop. Kashetu nanu ninche, nemadung'udung'oki ninche enkop; kaun nanu ninche, nemadotu ninche." 
Jeremiah24:7 Kaisho nanu ninche oltau oyiolounye ninche nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani; naa keaku ninche iltung'ana laainei naaku nanu Enkai enye, amu kaashukokino ninche nanu to ltau lenye pooki." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Kake nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ore anaa lelo ng'abolo torrok oleng lemeinosayu neijia nanu aiko Sedekia olaiguanani le le Yuda, o ilkituaak lenyena, ilo pisiai le Yerusalem otelekua tiatua ena kop, o lelo ootonita tiatua enkop e Misiri." 
Jeremiah24:9 Kaitaa nanu ninche olkirutoto too nkitoriat pooki e nkop neaku enkurruna, enaileti o enkitakuenisho, o oldeket tiatua iwuejitin pooki nareu nanu ninche." 
Jeremiah24:10 Naa kairriwaa nanu olalem, o lameyu o lmeitai shumata ninche, o metaba anaa neidaikieki tukul teina kop apa naishoo nanu ninche o loo menye.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Eewuo ele rorei enetii Yeremia oipirta iltung'ana pooki le Yuda, tiatua olari liong'uan le Yehoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda (ilo apa olari le dukuya le Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon)," 
Jeremiah25:2 laa ninye etolikio Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai iltung'ana pooki le Yuda o lelo pooki oomanya Yerusalem: 
Jeremiah25:3 “Too larin tikitam oo kuni, ebaiki olari le tomon ookuni le Yosia olayioni le Amon, olaiguanani le Yuda, ometabaiki ena olong, eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii nanu, nairorie nanu intae akurraki, kake eitu intae ining'ining'i." 
Jeremiah25:4 Eitu ninye ining'ining'i neitu irugugu nkiyiaa inyi aaning, hoo neirriwaka intae Olaitoriani akurraki sinkan lenyena iloibonok," 
Jeremiah25:5 ejo ‘Embelekenyata taata, pooki ng'ae te intae, aing'uaa enkoitoi enye torrono o nkiaasin torrok, nibikibiki ti oriong ina kop apa naishoo Olaitoriani intae ebaiki apa o ntarasi;" 
Jeremiah25:6 emipuo aasujaa kulie aitin aaisiaai niserememe ninche, aashu kintagorigoro nanu te siaai oo nkaik inyi. Nemaitaas nanu intae entorrono.’" 
Jeremiah25:7 Kake ore eyia eitu intae kining'ining'i nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, pee kitumutumu intae aaitagoro nanu teina siaai oo nkaik inyi naar intae." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Ore enkaraki neitu ining'ining'i irorei laainei," 
Jeremiah25:9 ng'ura, kairriu nanu lelo oshon pooki le moikuape, Olaitoriani ojo, o Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon, osinka lai, naa kayau nanu ninche metaarare ena kop o lelo oomanya, o lelo oreren pookioomanita, kaidaikie nanu ninche katukul, naitaa ninche olkirutoto, o enkiputukuny, o enkurruna oo ntarasi." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ore ake sii, kaiwuang'ie te ninche oltoilo le nkuenia o ltoilo le ng'ida, oltoilo lo loyamisho o ltoilo le nayami, enkiyutuyutore oo soito oo yutuyutishoreki o ewang'an o ltaa." 
Jeremiah25:11 Ore ena kop pooki keaku emutata o enkidaata, naa keisiaai kuna kuapi olaiguanani le Babilon ilarin ntomoni naapishana." 
Jeremiah25:12 Ore pee elusoo ilarin ntomon naapishana, naitame nanu olaiguanani le Babilon o ina kop oo Kaldayo, tenkaraki entorroni enye, Olaitoriani ojo, aitaa ina kop mitil intarasi." 
Jeremiah25:13 Kayau nanu shumata ina kop lelo rorei laainei pooki apa latejo nanu tialo ninche pooki toki naigero tiatua ena buku apa naibonoko Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai nkuapi pooki. 
Jeremiah25:14 Amu ore doi ninye nkuapi kumok o laiguanank kituaak naa keitayu rrindiki te ninche; naa kalaaki nanu ninche te risioroto oo nkiaasin enye o siaatin oo nkaik enye.” 
Jeremiah25:15 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: “Aatiaka ninye nanu, Iwa iyie te nkaina ai ena kikompe e naisho e ngoro, nincho nena kuapi pooki naairriwaki iyie metooko." 
Jeremiah25:16 Keok ninche nemera nerruoyo lukuny tenkaraki ilo alem lairriwaki nanu atua ninche.” 
Jeremiah25:17 Naya nanu ina kikompe te nkaina o Laitoriani, naisho nanu lelo oreren pooki laairriwaka Olaitoriani metooko:" 
Jeremiah25:18 Yerusalem o nkanas e Yuda, ilaiguanak lenyena o lkituaak lenyena, pee eitaa ninche olmuaate o neitaa mitil o enkiputukuny o ldeket, anaa enatiu ena olong;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, o isinkan lenyena, o lkituaak lenyena, o ltung'ana lenyena pooki," 
Jeremiah25:20 o lelo pooki omon ootii atua ninche; laiguanak pooki le nkop e Usi o laiguanak pooki le nkop e Filisti (Ashkelon, o Gasa, o Ekron o ilo pisiai le Ashdod)," 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom, o Moab o layiok le Amon;" 
Jeremiah25:22 o ilaiguanak pooki le Turo, o laiguanak pooki le Sidon, o laiguanak lo lomanaa le naiposha;" 
Jeremiah25:23 o Dedan, Tema, o Busi, o pooki oo dung ilpijat loo lpapit lenye;" 
Jeremiah25:24 o ilaiguanak pooki le Arabia o laiguanak pooki loo loshon ooshula oomanya olpurkel; 
Jeremiah25:25 o ilaiguanak pooki le Simri, ilaiguanak pooki le Elam, o ilaiguanak pooki le Amedi;" 
Jeremiah25:26 ilaiguanak pooki le moikuape oolakua o lootaana, obo te siadi o likae, o nena kitoriat pooki enkop naatii oriong enkop. Naa ore te siadi ninche neok olaiguanani le Babilon." 
Jeremiah25:27 “Nintoki iyie ajoki ninche, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Tooko, temerayu nilopisho, tabatatayu niming'il ae kata adumunye, tenkaraki ilo alem lairriu nanu atua intae.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 “Naa teneany ninche eng'amu ina kikompe te nkaina ino aaok, nijoki iyie ninche, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, loo lororani: Meeta nchere pee miokioko!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Amu ng'ura, kaiteru nanu aas entorroni too nkanas naaipotieki enkarna ai, naa eilo iyie mintamio? Milo iyie mintamio, amu aipotoko nanu olalem lelo pooki oomanya enkop, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Ore naa iyie, shomo imbonisho tigilunore ninche te kulo rorei pooki, nijoki ninche, ‘Keikurrukur Olaitoriani te shumata, tiatua ina manyisho sinyati neitayu oltoilo lenye; keikurrukur ninye te ngolon aarare iltung'ana lenyena, nebuaku, anaa iltung'ana ooitunyoo isabibu, tenkaraki lelo pooki oomanya enkop." 
Jeremiah25:31 Elo enkorui e nkikurrukur ineeiting'ie enkop. Amu kegilunore Olaitoriani nkuapi; kejing ninye atua enkiguana tenebo pooki tung'ani ore ilo torrono nepik ninye enetii ilo alem, Olaitoriani ojo.’" 
Jeremiah25:32 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: ng'ura, kelotu entorroni aipang'u to lorere o to lorere, neyuko osiuo sapuk oing'uaa imatuan naalakua e nkop." 
Jeremiah25:33 “Ore lelo ootara Olaitoriani teina olong neponari ebaiki enkiting'oto nabo enkop ometabaiki enkae. Meishirakini ninche, aashu eiturrurrokinoi, aashu enukari; keaku ninche emodiei ti oriong enkop." 
Jeremiah25:34 Enteyietu, intae ilairritak loo ntare, ninchirishiri, nimperiperara too nkurruon intae ilaitoriak loo ntare, amu ore nkolong'i eyiang'are inyi o sina linyi neetuo, naa ibatatata intae anaa ilmeregeshi gelunot." 
Jeremiah25:35 Meetae esarunoto naitokini aata too luaat oo ntare, aashu eneisudoriyie ilaitoriak loo ntare." 
Jeremiah25:36 Entoning, olkiyioi loo lairritak, o eyiolounoto oo laitoriak lo lturrur! Amu einyalita Olaitoriani eneirritishoreki enye," 
Jeremiah25:37 ore ilo turrur le seriani neitigiraki tenkaraki ina goro napi o Laitoriani. 
Jeremiah25:38 Etung'uayie ninye orrumat linyi anaa olng'atuny, amu etaa enkop enye mitil tenkaraki ilo alem leilo oitorogonyisho, o tenkaraki engoro enye napi.”" 
Jeremiah26:1 Ore te nkiterunoto e nkitoria e Yohoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda, ele rorei oewuo eing'uaa Olaitoriani ejo:" 
Jeremiah26:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ntasho to lgoriet le nkaji o Laitoriani nirorie nena anas pooki e Yuda naapuonu aaserem tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani kulo rorei pooki laaitanap nanu iyie tiaaki ninche; mimbooyo ake ororei," 
Jeremiah26:3 eidimayu nening ninche; neibelekenya pooki ng'ae aing'uaa enkoitoi enye torrono, pee atum nanu aibelekenyayu teina torroni apa natonyorra ajo kaitaas ninche tenkaraki nkiaasin enye torrok." 
Jeremiah26:4 Tiaaki iyie ninche, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Tinimikining'ning'i intae nanu, pee ipuopuo te nkitanapata ai nairragie nanu te dukuya intae," 
Jeremiah26:5 nining'ining'i irorei loo sinkan laainei lelo oibonok le Nkai lairriwaka nanu intae te siokinoto, hoo neitu intae ining'ining'i," 
Jeremiah26:6 naitotiu nanu ena aji anaa Shilo, naa kaitaa sii ena anasa oldeket too loreren pooki le nkop.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Etoning'o ilapolosak o loibonok o ltung'ana pooki Yeremia eirorita kulo rorei tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani. 
Jeremiah26:8 Ore ake pee eidip Yeremia airoro ina pooki naitanapa Olaitoriani ninye pee eirorie iltung'ana pooki, neibung ilapolosak ninye, o loibonok, iltung'ana pooki ejoito, ejo, “Iye iyie!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Kainyoo iyie pee imbonishe te nkarna o Laitoriani, ijo, ‘Keyooki ena aji atiu anaa Shilo ore ena anasa neaku olmuaate memanya toki’?” Ore iltung'ana pooki neiturrurrokino Yeremia tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah26:10 Ore pee ening ilkituaak le Yuda kuna baa, nepuonu te nkaji o laiguanani enkaji o Laitoriani netonie olorika lenye tenejing'ieki kishomi ng'ejuk eina aji o Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah26:11 Nejoki ilapolosak o loibonok lelo kituaak o lelo tung'ana pooki, “Eishaakino ele endung'okinoto e nkiguana e keeya, enkaraki naibonoko te ntorroni ena anasa, anaa enitoning'o too nkiyiaa inyi.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Neitoki Yeremia airorie lelo kituaak pooki o ltung'ana pooki ejo, “Olaitoriani, laairriwua maibonoki entorroni ena aji o ena anasa lelo rorei pooki litoning'o." 
Jeremiah26:13 Ore naa taata entobira nkoitoi inyi o nkiaasin inyi, nining'ining'i oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi, naa keirridu Olaitoriani te ina torrono natudung'ie enkiguana tialo intae." 
Jeremiah26:14 Kake ore nanu, ng'ura atii atua nkaik inyi. Entaasaki nanu anaa enidolidolo aa sidai neishiaakino te intae." 
Jeremiah26:15 Entayiolo ake duoo intae te nkitisipata nchere tenikiariara nanu matua, niyauu osarge lemeeta eleyiata shumata intae maate o shumata ena anasa o lelo oomanya, amu ore te sipata o Laitoriani laairriwua nanu enitii pee airo kulo rorei pooki ootii nkiyiaa inyi.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Nejoki lelo kituaak o ltung'ana pooki lelo apolosak o loibonok, “Meishiaakino ele tung'ani endung'okinoto e nkiguana e keeya, amu eirorie ninye iyiook te nkarna o Laitoriani Enkai ang.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Neinyototo embata oo lpayiani leina kop neirorie ina umata pooki oo ltung'ana ejo," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Ore apa Mika le Moreshet neibonishe too nkolong'i e Hesekia olaiguanani le Yuda, nejoki iltung'ana pooki le Yuda: ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, keturi sion anaa enkurma neaku Yerusalem osototi loo suut ore enkaji e Nkai neaku entim oo lkeek.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Ketaara ninye metua Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda o Yuda pooki? Keitu ninye eureyu Olaitoriani nesayu esupatisho o Laitoriani, naa keitu ninye eirridu Olaitoriani te ina torroni apa natudung'oko ninche? Kake etaa iyiook enikijo pee kiyau entorroni shumata ate.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Etii sii likae tung'ani oibonishe te nkarna o Laitoriani, Uria olayioni le Shemia eing'uaa Kiriat-Yearim. Eibonuo entorroni tialo ena anasa o ena kop too rorei ooikununo anaa kuldo le Yeremia." 
Jeremiah26:21 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani Yehoiakim, tenebo enjore enye pooki o lkituaak pooki, irorei lenyena, neing'oru olaiguanani ajo aar ninye metua; kake ore ake pee ening Uria ina, neureisho neisikalo aisudori te Misiri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Neirriwaa olaiguanani Yehoiakim kulikae tung'ana meshomo Misiri, Elnatan olayioni le Akbo o kulikae tenebo ninye," 
Jeremiah26:23 neyau ninche Uria aaitung'uaa Misiri neyaki ninye olaiguanani Yehoiakim, laa ninye otaara ninye to lalem nenang'aki empopok enye atua ewueji e nkurare oo ltung'ana pooki." 
Jeremiah26:24 Kake etii apa enkaina e Ahikam olayioni le Shafan tenebo Yeremia neaku eitu apa eishori iltung'ana metaara metua. 
Jeremiah27:1 Ore te nkiterunoto e nkitoria e Sedekia olayioni le Yosia olaiguanani le Yuda, ele rorei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa enetii Olaitoriani ejo." 
Jeremiah27:2 Nji aatiaka nanu Olaitoriani: “Ntobiraki kewan nkeenta o enchata oo lmong'i, nipik ninche emurt ino." 
Jeremiah27:3 Irriwaki olkilikuai olaiguanani le Edom, o laiguanani le Moab, o laiguanani le lelo ayiok le Amon, o laiguanani le Turo, o laiguanani le Sidon too nkaik elelo kiliku ooetuo Yerusalem enetii Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Nchoo ninche ena kitanapata too lkituaak lenye: ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: ena intae ipupuo aajoki ilkituaak linyi:" 
Jeremiah27:5 “Nanu ilo laa ore te ngolon ai sapuk o te nkaina ai naitoriori oitayio enkop, tenebo iltung'ana o ng'uesi naatii oriong enkop naa kaisho nanu ilo pooki ladol eishiaakino te nanu." 
Jeremiah27:6 Aishooyie taata nanu kuna kuapi pooki apik nkaik e Nebukadnesa, olaiguanani le Babilon, osinka lai, naishoo sii ninye ing'uesi e ong'ata meisiayia ninye." 
Jeremiah27:7 Keisiaai ninye iloreren pooki o layioni lenye o layioni lo layioni lenye ometaba anaa nelotu enkata enkop enye makewan; netum taa nkuapi kumok o laiguanak kituaak aaitaa ninye orrindik.” 
Jeremiah27:8 “ ‘Kake tenetii ake ninye enkop aashu enkitoria nemeisiaai Nebukadnesa ele aiguanani le Babilon, nepik emurt enye abori enchata olaiguanani le Babilon, naa kaitame nanu ina kop to lalem, o to lameyu o to lmeitai, Olaitoriani ojo, ometaba anaa namut nanu ninye te nkaina enye." 
Jeremiah27:9 Metaa emining iloibonok linyi, o ilaitumusumusok linyi, o ilaidetidetak linyi, o lalimunok linyi arashu ilasakutok linyi, lelo oojoki intae, Misiaayiayia olaiguanani le Babilon.’" 
Jeremiah27:10 Amu elejare ina naibonoki ninche intae, aa ore intae naa keyae enelakua aaitung'uaa enkop inyi, naa kaaraa nanu intae aipang'ie, naa eindaayaya." 
Jeremiah27:11 Kake ore ake pooki orere oyau emurt enye apik abori enchata olaiguanani le Babilon aisiaai ninye, napalaki ninche enkop enye, pee etur ninye nebik teine, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda airorie tena oitoi: “Eyautu imurto inyi abori olchata lo laiguanani le Babilon, nisiaayiayia ninye o ltung'ana lenyena pee ipokipoko." 
Jeremiah27:13 Kainyoo iyie o ltung'ana linono pee iyeye to lalem, o to lameyu o to lmeitai, anaa enairoro Olaitoriani tialo pooki orere lemeisiaai olaiguanani le Babilon?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Emining ororei le lelo oibonok oojoki intae, ‘Misiayiayia olaiguanani le Babilon,’ amu elejare ina naibonoki ninche intae." 
Jeremiah27:15 Eitu nanu airriu ninche, Olaitoriani ojo, kake keibonisho ninche te lejare te nkarna ai, eji ejo kaaraa nanu intae naa eindaayaya, intae o loibonok o lelo oibonok ooibonoki intae.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Naitoki nanu airorie ilapolosak o ltung'ana pooki, ajoki, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Emining irorei le lelo oibonok ooibonoki intae, ejo, ‘Ng'ura, keshukuni nena masaa enkaji o Laitoriani aaitasieku aaitung'uaa Babilon,’ amu elejare ina naibonoki ninche intae." 
Jeremiah27:17 Emining intae ninche; esiaayia olaiguanani le Babilon pee ipokipoko. Kainyoo pee eitaae ena anasa olmuaate. 
Jeremiah27:18 Tenaa eloibonok ninche, naa tenaa ketii ororei lo Laitoriani tenebo ninche, nchoo naa ninche esaisho to Laitoriani loo lororani, paa ore nena masaa naatung'uayioki tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, tiatua enkaji o laiguanani le Yuda, o tiatua Yerusalem nemepuo Babilon." 
Jeremiah27:19 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani tialo ng'apeta, o lmoti le nkare, o nkitasheyieta o kulie masaa pooki naatung'uayioki tiatua ena anasa," 
Jeremiah27:20 neitu eya Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon, ina kata apa pee eya te yararoto aitung'uaa Yerusalem aya Babilon Yekonia olayioni le Yehoiakim, olaiguanani le Yuda, o lkituaak pooki le Yuda o Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah27:21 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel, tialo nena masaa naatung'uayioki tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani o tiatua enkaji o laiguanani le Yuda, o tiatua Yerusalem:" 
Jeremiah27:22 kenapi ninche aaya Babilon netoni teine ometabau ina olong naing'or nanu ninche ashukoki ene wueji.” 
Jeremiah28:1 Ore ake teilo ari, te nkiterunoto e nkitoria e Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda, to lapa le imiet lo lari liong'uan naairorie nanu Hanania olayioni le Asuri, ilo oiboni oing'uaa Gibeon, tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani, te dukuya ilapolosak o ltung'ana pooki, ejo," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Atigila nanu ina shata e murt o laiguanani le Babilon." 
Jeremiah28:3 Ore te rishata oo larin oare naa kashuku nanu ayau ene wueji nena masaa pooki e nkaji o Laitoriani, apa naatanapa Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon aitung'uaa ene wueji neya Babilon." 
Jeremiah28:4 Kayau sii ashuku ene wueji Yekonia olayioni le Yehoiakim, olaiguanani le Yuda, o lelo yararot pooki ooing'uaa Yuda apa ooshomo Babilon, Olaitoriani ojo, amu kagil nanu enchata e murt o laiguanani le Babilon.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Neitoki oloiboni le Nkai oji Yeremia airorie Hanania ilo oiboni te dukuya ilapolosak o ltung'ana pooki apa ooitashe tiatua enkaji o Laitoriani; 
Jeremiah28:6 nejo oloiboni le Nkai oji Yeremia, “Esai! Metaasa Olaitoriani neijia; meitobira Olaitoriani lelo rorei limbonuo iyie metisipata, neshuku ayau ene wueji aitung'uaa Babilon nena masaa e nkaji oLaitoriani, o lelo yararot pooki." 
Jeremiah28:7 Ore eyia toning'o taata ele rorei lairo nanu ining'ito iyie nening'ito iltung'aa pooki. 
Jeremiah28:8 Ore apa iloibonok ooiturukutuo te dukuya iyie o nanu ebaiki apa neibonutuo olarrabal, o lameyu o lmeitai tialo nkuapi kumok o nkitoriak kituaak." 
Jeremiah28:9 Ore oloiboni oibonu eseriani, ore ake pee ebaya ororei leilo oiboni, neyioulouni taa aajo esipa Olaitoriani oiriwua ilo oiboni.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Neya ilo oiboni oji Hanania nena keek naatii emurt e Yeremia ilo oiboni le Nkai, negil ninche," 
Jeremiah28:11 neiro Hanania te dukuya iltung'ana pooki, ejo, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, kaiko nanu neijia agil enchata e murt e Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon aitayu te murt oo nkuapi pooki te rishata oo larin oare.” Kake eshomo Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai enkoitoi enye." 
Jeremiah28:12 Ore te nkiti rishata eidipa oloiboni Hanania atigila nkeek aitayu te murt e Yeremia ilo oiboni le Nkai, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yeremia ejo:" 
Jeremiah28:13 “Shomo, tiaaki Hanania, nji ejo Olaitoriani: itigila iyie nkeek, kake akaitobir nanu te rishata enye isekenke." 
Jeremiah28:14 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Atipika nanu shumata emurt e kuna kuapi pooki esekenkei e sinkaisho te Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon, naa keisiaai ninche ninye, amu aishoo nanu ninye ebaiki ing'uesi e ong'ata.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Nejoki Yeremia ilo oiboni le Nkai ilo oiboni oji Hanania, “Toning'o Hanania: eitu iyie kirriu Olaitoriani ninchoo iyie kulo tung'ana meisiliga elejare." 
Jeremiah28:16 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani: ‘Ng'ura, kaaiwuang'ie nanu iyie ti oriong e nkop. Ore tele ari ake niye iyie, enkaraki niroro inenkiser tialo Olaitoriani.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Ore teilo ari ake, to lapa li opishana, neye oloiboni oji Hanania." 
Jeremiah29:1 Kulo ninche irorei leina palai nairriwayie ilo oiboni le Nkai oji Yeremia etii Yerusalem airriwaki lelo payiani apa le yararoto, o lapolosak, o loibonok, o ltung'ana pooki apa, ootarayie Nebukadnesa aitung'uaa Yerusalem nepuo Babilon." 
Jeremiah29:2 Ina kata apa eidipa olaiguanani Yekonia, o ng'otonye enkitok olaiguanani, o lelo sunaishi oogelema, o lkituaak le Yuda o Yerusalem, o lelo arriyiak tenguetare o lkunono, aatudumunye aatung'uai Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah29:3 Eirriwayioki apa ina palai te nkaina e Elesa olayioni le Shafan o Gemaria olayioni le Hilkia, laa ninche eirriwayie Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda Babilon enetii Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon. Nejo apa ina palai," 
Jeremiah29:4 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel, te lelo pooki le yararoto apa natarayie nanu meshomo eyararoto aaing'uaa Yerusalem nepuo Babilon:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Enteshet nkajijik nitonini tiatua ninche; entuun nkurman ninyanya enkisampuare enye. 
Jeremiah29:6 Eyamisho niiuu ilayiok o ntoyie; eyamaki ilayiok linyi, ninchosho ntoyie inyi meyami, pee etum aatoiu ilayiok o ntoyie; entoponari teine, nimiakuku kuti." 
Jeremiah29:7 Kake engoru olmabarishoi leina anasa apa naterewa intae te yararoto, niomonono Olaitoriani te rishata enye, tialo ninye amu ore tiatua olmabarishoi lenye nitumutumu intae olmabarishoi linyi." 
Jeremiah29:8 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Emincho iloibonok linyi o laitumusumusok linyi otii atua intae elej intae, nimining'ining'i nena kidetidetat naidetidetu," 
Jeremiah29:9 amu ore ina naa elejare naibonoki ninche intae te nkarna ai, eitu nanu airriu ninche, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah29:10 “Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: Teneishunye ilarin ntomoni naapishana te Babilon, namutan nanu intae, naa kaitabaya nanu te intae enkisiligata ai narrinyu intae ayau ene wueji." 
Jeremiah29:11 Amu ayiolo nanu nkitobirat naata te intae, Olaitoriani ojo, nkitobirat olmabarishoi neme ine ntorroni, pee eisho intae osiligi too nkolong'i naapuonu." 
Jeremiah29:12 Naa eikimpotipoto intae nanu nikipoununu aaomon nanu, naa kaning nanu intae." 
Jeremiah29:13 Eiking'oruru intae nanu nikitumutumu; teniking'oruru to ltauja linyi pooki," 
Jeremiah29:14 nikitumutumu nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, naa kaitopok nanu intae naiturrur intae aitung'uaa iloshon pooki o wuejitin pooki apa naterewa intae, Olaitoriani ojo, narrinyu nanu intae ayau ine wueji apa naterewa intae enchom eyararoto." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Ore enkaraki nitejo intae, ‘Etudumaka iyiook Olaitoriani iloibonok tiatua Babilon,’" 
Jeremiah29:16 nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo ilo aiguanani otonita to lorika le nkitoo le Daudi, o tialo lelo tung'ana pooki oomanya atua ena anasa, lelo alashera linyi leitu apa eipang aapuo tenebo intae tiatuaeyararoto." 
Jeremiah29:17 ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, ng'ura, kairriwaki nanu ninche olalem, o lameyu, o lmeitai, naa kaitotiu nanu ninche anaa ilng'abolo ootarruoitie lemeinosayu." 
Jeremiah29:18 Nasujaa nanu ninche to lalem, to lameyu o to lmeitai, naitaa ninche enkuretisho too nkitoriat pooki e nkop, pee eaku oldeket, o enkuretisho, o enkiputukuny o esulare tiatua iloreren pooki laterewa nanu ninche," 
Jeremiah29:19 amu eitu ninche ening ilomon laainei, Olaitoriani ojo, lelo laitirrishaka nanu airriwaki intae too sinkan laainei lelo oibonok, kake mining'ining'i intae, Olaitoriani ojo!’" 
Jeremiah29:20 Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani, intae pooki le yararoto apa laterewa nanu aitung'uaa Yerusalem nareu Babilon:" 
Jeremiah29:21 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel, tialo Ahab olayioni le Kalaya o Sedekia olayioni le Ma-asea, lelo ooibonu elejare te intae te nkarna ai: Ng'ura, kayau nanu ninche apik atuaenkaina e Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon, naa kear ninye ninche metuata te dukuya nkonyek inyi." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ore tenkaraki ninche ketumi aadekishore ele deket lelo pooki le yararoto ooing'uaa Yuda ootii atua Babilon: ‘Mikintotiwuo Olaitoriani anaa Sedekia o Ahab, ootapejo olaiguanani le Babilon te nkima.’" 
Jeremiah29:23 Ore enkaraki nataasa entaboi tiatua Israel, etololoitote too nkituaak oo lelatia enye, neiroro ninche, te nkarna ai irorei le lejare leitu nanu aitanap ninche. Nanu ilo oyiolo naa nanu olchakeni, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Tiaaki Shemaia le Nehelam: 
Jeremiah29:25 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Irriwaka iyie mpala te nkarna ino iltung'ana pooki le Yerusalem, o Sefania olayioni le Maaseia ilo apolosani, o lapolosak pooki, ijo," 
Jeremiah29:26 Kintaa iyie Olaitoriani olapolosani te rishata e Yehoida ilo apolosani, pee intore enkaji o Laitoriani te pooki ng'ae oata oloirirua oibonisho, apik ninye olpisiai emurt." 
Jeremiah29:27 Kainyoo naa pee eitu isikong abuaaki Yeremia le Anatot likimbonoki iyie? 
Jeremiah29:28 Amu eirriwaka ninye iyiook olkilikuai te Babilon, ejo, Keadoru eyararoto inyi; enteshet nkajijik nimanyimanya, niununu nkurman ninyanya enkisampuare enye.”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Eisuma Sefania olapolosani ena palai metoning'o Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai. 
Jeremiah29:30 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Yeremia ejo: 
Jeremiah29:31 “Irriwaki olkilikuai lelo pooki le yararoto ijo, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo Shemaya le Nehalam: Enkaraki naibonoko Shemaya intae eitu nanu airriwu ninye, neisho intae esiliga elejare," 
Jeremiah29:32 metaa nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura, kaitame nanu Shemaya le Nehelam o eishoi enye; metum ninye hoo ng'ae oishu tiatua kulo tung'ana oaku olenye odol ina sidai naitaas nanu iltung'ana laainei, Olaitoriani ojo, amu eiroro ninye enapaashari tialo Olaitoriani.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Ororei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani ejo: 
Jeremiah30:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: Ngero tiatua embuku lelo rorei pooki laatiaaka iyie." 
Jeremiah30:3 Amu ng'ura, kepounu nkolong'i Olaitoriani ojo, pee arrinyu aitopok iltung'ana laainei, Israel o Yuda, Olaitoriani ojo, nayau nanu ninche ashuku meetu enkop apa naishoo loo menye, naa keya ninche ninye.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Kulo rorei ninche eiroro Olaitoriani tialo Israel o Yudas: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, kitoning'o iyiook enkishirata o enkirutoto enkuretisho, neme eseriani." 
Jeremiah30:6 Nkilikuanu taata pee idol, keidim olee anoto enutai enkerai? Kainyoo naa pee adol pooki lee etii nkaik enyena enkoshoke anaa enkitok nasaisai? Kainyoo pee eipusa pooki ng'ae?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Kelotu enkolong torrono oleng; meetae ae olong naitanyaanyukieki enkata o sina too ltung'ana kumok kake kekorduni ninye aaitayu teine. 
Jeremiah30:8 “Naa kelotu ina olong, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, nchere kagil nanu enchata emurt aitung'uaa imurto enye nalak nanu ienat enye, nemeigil ae kata ilomon aaitaa ninche isinkan." 
Jeremiah30:9 Kake keisiaai ninche Olaitoriani Enkai enye o Daudi olaiguanani lenye laa ninye nanu aput tenkaraki ninche. 
Jeremiah30:10 Miureishoyu naa, iyie Yakobo osinka lai, Olaitoriani ojo, aashu ing'aing'ai iyie Israel, amu itayiolo ajo kaaitajeu nanu iyie aitung'uaa enelakua naitajeu eishoi ino aitung'uaa enkop enye eyararoto. Keshukunye Yakobo netum enkitirring'ata o enkiyeng'iyeng, nemeitoki hoo ng'ae aiture ninye." 
Jeremiah30:11 Amu atii nanu tenebo iyie pee aaitajeu iyie, Olaitoriani ojo: Kaiting'ie nanu iloshon pooki apa laidapashaka nanu intae, kake ore iyie maaiting'ie nanu iyie. Kaaitame nanu iyie te nkiririkinoto, nemaaing'uaa nanu hoo tiae oitoi mintamio." 
Jeremiah30:12 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: Meishiunoyu olbae lino netarruoyie empaldaka ino. 
Jeremiah30:13 Metii hoo obo likinyor iyie meetae olchani to lbae lino meetae enkishuinoto te iyie. 
Jeremiah30:14 Aaikidamu lelo sanchan pooki linono; mikishilaa ninche iyie amu aaikuna nanu anaa olmang'atinta enkitamioto o lmang'atinta lemeeta, olng'ur, amu eikitok enkitarruoroto ino enkaraki natoponari ing'ok inono." 
Jeremiah30:15 Kainyoo iyie pee nchir te mion meishiunoyu emion ino. Amu eikitok entorroni ino, ore enkaraki natoponari ing'ok inono, aaitaasa nanu iyie kuna baa." 
Jeremiah30:16 Neaku ore pooki likinya iyie naa keinosi ninche, ore ilmang'ati linono pooki, pooki ng'ae te ninche naa kelo eyararoto; ore lelo pooki oorresh naitobiraki ninche orreshet." 
Jeremiah30:17 Amu kaarrinyoki nanu embiotisho, ore ilbaa linono naishiunye, Olaitoriani ojo, enkaraki nikitejo ninche iyie, ‘Oloiturrayioki, Sion ina, nemeetae oloshilaa!’" 
Jeremiah30:18 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: ng'ura, karriny nanu lelo ootarayioki too lng'oborri le Yakobo, naing'urrie imanyishoritin enyena. Neitokini aashet nkanas too wuejitin apa neetelekutua neitashe enkaji enkitoo te wueji apake neitasheyie." 
Jeremiah30:19 Atua ninche epukunye isinkolioitin le nkishoroto e nashe o ltoiloishi le lelo ooshipa. Kaponaa nanu ninche nemeitoki ninche aaku kuti; kaisho nanu ninche meyanyituni nemeitoki aaku ooti. 
Jeremiah30:20 Netiu inkera enye anaa enatiu apake ore irumat enye neitasheyieki te dukuya nanu, naa kaitame nanu lelo pooki ooibooki ninche enkop." 
Jeremiah30:21 Ore olkitok lenye naa keaku obo lenye maate, ore olarikoni lenye naa kepuku tiatua ninche; kaisho nanu ninye metinyiku nayiaya ninye, amu kaing'ae laaitasim te kewan enye ayiaya nanu? Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah30:22 Na iakuku intae iltung'ana laainei naaku nanu Enkai inyi.” 
Jeremiah30:23 Ng'ura olkutati lo Laitoriani! Eipang'ua engoro enye napi, olkutati ogol kedanyakino ninye endukuya eilo torrono." 
Jeremiah30:24 Merrinyo ina goro napi o Laitoriani, ometaba anaa nedung'oki enkiguana neitabaya iyieunot oltau lenye. Ore too nkolong'i e siadi naa ilo ayiolou ena." 
Jeremiah31:1 “Ore kenya teina kata, Olaitoriani ojo, naa kaaku nanu Enkai oo lmareita pooki le Israel, neaku ninche ilaainei.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore lelo tung'ana apa ootelekutua to lalem nenoto empiris ti ong'ota; ina kata apa eing'oru Israel enkiyeng'yeng. 
Jeremiah31:3 Eipang'aka Olaitoriani ninye tenelakua ajoki. Aatonyorra nanu iyie te nyorrata oo ntarasi. Neaku atobiko nanu aisiligayu te intae," 
Jeremiah31:4 ore ake sii kaashet iyie, naa eishetayu, na selenkei e Israel! Ore ake sii einkod iyie kewan too ntarumpetani naa e ilo dukuya to sinkolio le lelo ooshipa." 
Jeremiah31:5 Ore ake sii naa eiun inkurman oo sabibu too nchumat oo ldoinyo le Samaria neunisho ilaunok neitumurru ilng'anayio. 
Jeremiah31:6 Amu kelotu kenya enkolong naipotisho ilarripok tiatua ina kop oo ldoinyo o Efraim. Tudumunye maape Sion enetii Olaitoriani Enkai ang.” 
Jeremiah31:7 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Entarany entabuaku te ng'ida tenkaraki Yakobo, niliepiepie mbuakunot too laiguanak loo loshon; embalie, ninchosho enkisisa, nijojo, ‘Eitajeuo Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena, ilo pisiai le Israel!’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Ng'ura kayau nanu ninche aitung'uaa enkop e moikuape. Naiturrur ninche aitung'uaa ilubot enkop naalakua, ore tiatua ninche netii olmodooni o lmaima, o enkitok nairoshiwuo o enasaisai, tenebo; olturrur kitok, keshukunye ninche ene." 
Jeremiah31:9 Te nkishirata epuonu ninche naa tenkitigirata ariku nanu ninche ashuku, naisho nanu ninche meshomo too nchorroi oo nkariak, tiatua enkoitoi naitoriori nemerrorrore ninche. Amu ara nanu papaai te Israel, naa olkikau lai Efraim." 
Jeremiah31:10 Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani intae iloreren nimbalunyenye ninye too loomanaa le naiposha oo lakua; entejo, ‘Ore ilo oidapasha Israel naa keiturrur ninye, naa keing'or ninye anaa enaing'or olairritani eluaata enye oo nkerra.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Amu etalakua Olaitoriani Yakobo, nelaku ninye aitung'uaa nkaik naagol oleng te ninye." 
Jeremiah31:12 Kepuonu ninche aabuaku aaranyisho te nchumata oldoinyo le Sion, naa keaku keng'ida ninche teina supatisho o Laitoriani te nkurma, te naisho oo sabibu te ilata, o to lkuo le luaata oo ntare o lashe loo nkishu; ketiu enkishui enye anaa enkurma natipikaki enkare, nemeitoki ae kata aatum osina." 
Jeremiah31:13 Neranyisho taa ntoyie te ng'ida. Ore ilbarnot loo ltung'ana kituaak neshipayu kaibelekeny nanu enkishirata enye metaa eng'ida, kaitagol nanu ninche, naisho ninche eng'ida to sina." 
Jeremiah31:14 Kaisho osirua iltauja loo lapolosak tenkiputakinoto, neidipakino iltung'ana laainei te supatisho ai, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Etoning'oki oltoilo tiatua Rama, olkiyioi, o enkishirata e mion. Eishirita Rahel tenkaraki nkera enyena, etanya ninye eitagoli too nkera enyena, amu meekure eetae.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Torripo oltoilo lino pee minchir, o nkonyek inono too lkiyioi; amu kelaki esiaai ino, Olaitoriani ojo, naa keshukunye ninche aaing'uaa ina kop olmang'atinta." 
Jeremiah31:17 Etii osiligi too nkolong'i inono e dukuya, Olaitoriani ojo, naa keshukunye nkera inono aapuonu enkop enye maate." 
Jeremiah31:18 Atoning'o nanu Israel eishiraki kewan, ‘Kintamio apa nanu, nameyu nanu, anaa olashe lemeyiolo eenata; torrinyuoki nanu pee aatumi aaitopuaa, amu ira iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ai." 
Jeremiah31:19 Amu ore aidipa aibelekenyayu atapaashai nairridu ore aaidipaki aataarriyiana naosh enkupes ai, atukurrua nanu naanya sura enkaraki nanapita esulare e kitisho ai.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Kolayioni lai kirotet Efraim? Kenkerai ai ninye nanyor? Amu ore anaake te nairo aarare ninye naa kadamu ake ninye. Neaku keng'uar oltau lai ninye; meeta nchere pee maing'urrie ninye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah31:21 Tipikaki kewan enkoitoi ilmonek, ntobiraki kewan ilmonek likiutaa tadamu oleng ina oitoi kitok, ina oitoi apa naa ninye iima. Tushukunye, na selenkei e Israel tushukunye wou kuna anas inono." 
Jeremiah31:22 Ing'aeng'ae akenya o anu iyie na selenkei nemeisiligayu? Amu eitayio Olaitoriani entoki ng'ejuk te nkop; enkitok namitu olee.” 
Jeremiah31:23 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: “Keigil ake ninche aasishore kulo rorei tiatua enkop e Yuda o tiatua nkanas enyena tenarriny nanu ninche enkop enye. ‘Mikitamayiana iyie Olaitoriani, iyie namanyisho e supatisho, iyie to ldoinyo sinyati!’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Nebik Yuda o nkanas enyena teine tenebo, o laramatak o lelo oopuopuo tenebo nkerrai enye." 
Jeremiah31:25 Amu kaitaraposh nanu ilo tau oshal ore pooki tau otashala naitagol.” 
Jeremiah31:26 Naitoki nanu aputunye, naing'orisho naa eisidain njo aainei te nanu." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i Olaitoriani ojo, pee aun nanu enkaji e Israel o enkaji e Yuda tenebo olantererai le tung'ani o lantererai le ng'ues aitubul." 
Jeremiah31:28 Naa kelotu enkata, ore anaa enaing'ura nanu ninche, pee adotu nanang'aa, nainyal nayau entorroni, neijia sii aiko aing'oru ninche pee ashet naun, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ore akenya te nena olong'i nemeigil ae kata ninche aajo: ‘Einosa iloomenye ilng'anayio ooisuisho, nesirayu ilala loo nkera too mbat.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Kake keye pooki ng'ae te ng'oki enye makewan; ore pooki lee onya isabibu ooisuijo nesirayu ilala lenyena too mbat.” 
Jeremiah31:31 “Ng'ura, kepounu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, pee aitobir nanu olning'o ng'ejuk tenebo enkaji e Israel o enkaji e Yuda," 
Jeremiah31:32 nemeikununo anaa ilo apa ning'o lo sotua apa laitobira tenebo iloomenye ina kata apa pee aibung ninche enkaina aitayu ninche aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, ilo ning'o lo sotua lai apa otigila hoo nara apa nanu olmoruo lenye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah31:33 Kake ore ele sotua laitobiru nanu tenebo enkaji e Israel te siadi nena olong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, kapik nanu e nkitanapata ai atua ninche nasir nanu too ltauja lenye; naa kaaku nanu Enkai enye neaku sii ninche iltung'ana laainei." 
Jeremiah31:34 Nemeigil ae kata oltung'ani aiteng'en olelatia enye o pooki ng'ae olalashe lenye, ejo, Tayiolo Olaitoriani; amu kaayiolou ninche pooki nanu, ebaiki oloti lenye ometabaiki olkitok, Olaitoriani ojo: amu kapalaki nanu entorroni enye, nemaitoki aekata nanu adamu eng'oki enye.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo oishoru enkolong dama meitawang'isho o nkatitin olapa naaishiaakino o lakir ooitawang'isho te nkewarie, laa ninye oing'oling'ol enaiposha neaku keikurrukur ilopir lenyena Olaitoriani loo lororani ninye enkarna enye." 
Jeremiah31:36 “Teneiwuang'a ena kitobirata apa naitoriokoki alo te dukuya nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, netum taa iishoritin e Israel aaishunye, meitoki aaku olosho te dukuya nanu ntarasi.”" 
Jeremiah31:37 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Tenaa keidimi napaji aatetem shumata keper, neyiolouni ilkitamanyunot le nkop tiabori, natum taa aiturrai iishoritin pooki e Israel te nena pooki naataasa, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah31:38 “Ng'ura kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, pee eshetakini Olaitoriani enkanasa aaigil ebaiki oltalet le Hananel o metabaiki kishomi olpijata." 
Jeremiah31:39 Ore olkereri otemieki neipang alo auluo oleng, neitoriori abaya oldoinyo le Gareb, neitoki taa arrinyo alo Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Ore oyarata pooki loo lmeneng'a o nkuruon, o nkong'at pooki naalakua aabaya ereyiet e Kidron, ometabaiki olpijata le nkishomi oo mbartan te nkalo enkilepunoto enkolong naa keiteng'elakini Olaitoriani. Meigili ae kata aadotu aashu eibelekenyi aanang'aa ntarasi.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Ororei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani to lari le tomon le Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda, laa ninye apa olari le tomon o isiet le nkitoria e Nebukadresa." 
Jeremiah32:2 Ore apa ina kata nemanita enjore o laiguanani le Babilon Yerusalem, ore Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai neikenoro apa to lgoriet le rripore otii enkaji enkitoo o laiguanani le Yuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Amu etipika apa Yuda Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda ninye korokoroni, ejo, “Kainyoo iyie pee imbonisho nijo, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura kaishooyo nanu ena anasa apik nkaik o laiguanani le Babilon, naa keya ninye." 
Jeremiah32:4 Meimisho tukul Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda too nkaik oo Lkaldayo kake kepiki enkaina o laiguanani le Babilon, naa keiro ninye tenebo ninye eing'ura too nkomomi;" 
Jeremiah32:5 naa keya ninye Sedekia Babilon, nebik ninye teine ometaba anaa namutan nanu ninye, Olaitoriani ojo. Ore hoo niaarare iyie Ilkaldayo mimirisho iyie.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Nejo Yeremia, “Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii nanu ejo:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Ng'ura, kelotu Hanamel olayioni le Shalom olenkapu lino enitii nejo, ‘Inyiang'u enkurma ai natii Anatot, amu iyie eishiaakino tenikordu ainyiang'u.’" 
Jeremiah32:8 Nelotu Hanamel olenkapu lai enatii tiatua olgoriet le rripore, terisioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani, naajoki nanu, ‘Inyiang'u enkurma ai natii Anatot tiatua enkop e Benchamen, amu iyie eishiaakino te niya ainyiang'u; inyiang'aki iyie kewan.’ Nayiolou taa nchere ororei lo Laitoriani.”" 
Jeremiah32:9 Nainyiang'u nanu ina kurma natii Anatot te Hanamel olayioni lo lenkapu lai, naipimoki ninye mpisai naaji shekeli tomon oopishana enkosholai." 
Jeremiah32:10 Naiger te nkarna ai teina palai enkurma, nemisir neyau ilchakenini, neipim mpisai to rratili." 
Jeremiah32:11 Naitoki nanu aitayu ina palai namishira e nkinyiang'unoto, natii olning'o o ndung'eta o ina boitati enye;" 
Jeremiah32:12 naisho nanu ina palai e nkinyiang'unoto Barak olayioni le Neria olayioni le Mahasia, te dukuya Hanamel olenkapu lai, te dukuya ilchakenini ootimishira ina palai e nkinyang'unoto, o te dukuya Ilyahudi pooki apa ootonita to lgoriet le rripore." 
Jeremiah32:13 Naitanap nanu Barak te dukuya ninche olchakenini ajoki," 
Jeremiah32:14 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Iwa kuna pala pokira, ena namishira e nkinyang'unoto o ena tashati enye nememishira, nipik ninche atua emoti oo nkulukuok, pee etum aatobik te nkata naado." 
Jeremiah32:15 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel keitokini aainyiang'u nkajijik o nkurman." 
Jeremiah32:16 “Ore aidipa aishoo ina palai e nkinyang'unoto Barak olayioni le Neria, naomon nanu Olaitoriani ajo," 
Jeremiah32:17 Ee Olaitoriani Enkai! Iyie oitobira shumata o enkop te ngolon ino kitok o te nkaina ino naitoriori! Meetae entoki nagol te iyie," 
Jeremiah32:18 oitoduaya enyorrata nauno too nkalifuni, kake intalaku entorroni oo loo menye too nkera enye te siadi ninche, Iyie Enkai olmagilani oji enkarna enye Olaitoriani loo lororani," 
Jeremiah32:19 kitok too nkiguanat naa magilani te yasata; obolo nkonyek enyena too nkoitoi pooki oo ltung'ana, nilaaki pooki tung'ani te risioroto oo nkoitoi enyena o terisioroto oo lng'anayio loo nkiaasin enyena;" 
Jeremiah32:20 oitodolua ilmonek o nenking'asia te nkop e Misiri, ometabaiki ena olong tiatua Israel o too loreren pooki, nintobiraki kewan enkarna, anaa enatiu ena olong." 
Jeremiah32:21 Iyaua apa iyie iltung'ana linono Israel aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri too lmonek o too nenking'asia, te nkaina nagol naitoriori, o to lkirutoto sapuk;" 
Jeremiah32:22 nincho ninche ena kop, apa ninosie iyie olmumai tenebo loo menye pee incho ninche, enkop naruko inaishi o kule;" 
Jeremiah32:23 nejing ninche atua neya aaitaa enenye. Kake eitu ninche ening oltoilo lino aashu epuo te nkitanapata ino; eitu ninche eas hoo toki te nena pooki apa nintanapa iyie ninche metaasa. Neaku nchoo iyie ena torroni pooki meeu shumata ninche. 
Jeremiah32:24 “Ng'ura enjore namanita amuat enkanasa pee eya, naa ore te nkaraki olalem o lameyu olmeitai eishooyioki enkanasa aapik nkaik oo Lkaldayo, laa ninche oarare ninye. Ore apa ina niroro iyie netabayie, naa ng'ura, idolita iyie." 
Jeremiah32:25 Ore ake eyia Olaitoriani, kitiaaka nanu, Inyiang'u enkurma too mpisai ning'oru ilchakenini - hoo neishooyioki enkanasa aapik nkaik oo Lkaldayo. ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yeremia ejo: 
Jeremiah32:27 “Ng'ura ara nanu Olaitoriani, Enkai e pooki naishu; keetae hoo toki nagol te nanu?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura kaishooyo nanu ena anasa apik nkaik oo Lkaldayo o atua nkaik e Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon; naa keya ninye. 
Jeremiah32:29 Ore lelo Kaldayo oarare ena anasa naa kepuonu aapik ena anasa enkima, nepejoo ninye, tenebo nkajijik naa ore nchumat enye netapejokinyeki Baal enkorropil neibukorieki inaishi enkishoroto e nashe aabukoki kulie aitin, pee aaitagor nanu." 
Jeremiah32:30 Amu ore ilayiok le Israel o layiok le Yuda meeta ae nataasa neme entorroni too nkonyek aainei ebaiki kitisho enye; meeta ilayiok le Israel ae nataasa neme kaaitagoro nanu te siaai oo nkaik enye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah32:31 Etuputuo ena anasa engoro ai o engoro ai napi ebaiki enkolong apa nateshetaki ometabaiki ena olong, neaku kaiwuang'ie nanu ninye too nkonyek aainei." 
Jeremiah32:32 Tenkaraki entorroni pooki oo ilayiok le Israel o layiok le Yuda apa nataasa pee aaitagor ilaiguanak lenye o lkituaak lenye, ilapolosak lenye o loibonok lenye, iltung'ana le Yuda o lelo oomanyaYerusalem." 
Jeremiah32:33 Aaibelekenyakita ninche nanu enkoriong enye, neitu aaitorioki inkomomi enye; naa ore hoo naiteng'ena nanu ninche aitirrishaki eitu ninche ening'isho aang'amu nkiteng'enat." 
Jeremiah32:34 Etipika ninche olminong atua ina aji naipotieki enkarna ai, pee eisarkionie ninye." 
Jeremiah32:35 Etesheta ninche iwuejitin e shumata e Baal to yarata lo layioni le Hinom, pee etum aaitayunye ilayiok lenye o ntoyie olasar oishori Molek, hoo neitu nanu aitanap ninche, neitu ninye ejing aata e ndamunoto ai, nchere pee eas ena olminong napik Yuda ing'ok." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Nji naa taata ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, tialo ena anasa nijojo intae, ‘Eishooyioki aapik atua enkaina o laiguanani le Babilon to lalem, o to lameyu, o to lmeitai’:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Ng'ura, kaiturrur nanu ninche aitung'uaa nkuapi pooki apa naterewa ninche te ngoro ai o te ngoro ai napi te mpushuna kitok; kashuku nanu ninche meetu ene wueji, naisho nanu ninche metobiko te seriani." 
Jeremiah32:38 Naa keaku ninche iltung'ana laainei, naaku nanu Enkai enye." 
Jeremiah32:39 Kaisho nanu ninche oltau obo o enkoitoi nabo pee aatum ninche aatureita nanu ntarasi tenkaraki ninche maate o nkera enye te siadi ninche. 
Jeremiah32:40 Kaitobir nanu tenebo ninche osotua loo ntarasi, nchere maibelekenya nanu eitu aitaas ninche esidai; naa kapik nanu olturiaki lai atua oltau lenye, pee maaitoki ninche aaibelekenya aaing'uaa." 
Jeremiah32:41 Kang'ida nanu tenaitaas ninche esidai, naa kaun nanu ninche tiatua ena kop naitubulu to ltau lai pooki o te nkishui ai pooki." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: ore anaa enayaua nanu ena torroni kitok shumata kulo tung'ana, neijia sii aiko, kayau nanu shumata ninche ina pooki sidai apa naisiligie ninche." 
Jeremiah32:43 Keinyiang'uni nkurman tena kop nijoitoto intae, olmuaate, metii oltung'ani aashu eng'ues; eishooyioki aapik atua nkaik oo Lkadayo." 
Jeremiah32:44 Keinyiang'uni nkurman too mpesai neigerokini mpala nkarn nemishiri neikeni, tiatua enkop e Benchamen, tiatua iwuejitin naamanita Yerusalem, o tiatua nkanas e Yuda, tiatua nkanas e nkop oo ldoinyo, tiatua nkanas e Shefela, o tiatua nkanas e Negeb; amu kashuku nanu ilooena lenye, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yeremia enkata e are, eton eikenoro to lgoriet le rripore ejo:" 
Jeremiah33:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani laa ninye oitobira enkop, Olaitoriani oipirua ninye neitobiru ninye, Olaitoriani enkarna enye:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Mpotoki nanu naa kaairuk iyie; naa kaaliki iyie ntokitin sapuki naaisudoro neitu iyie iyiolou. 
Jeremiah33:4 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, tialo nkajijik ena anasa o nkajijik oo laiguanak le Yuda apa naatuuroyioki aasulaki enkop pee eitobirieki isempewueti" 
Jeremiah33:5 o te nkaraki o lalem loo lmang'ati. Kepuonu Ilkaldayo aagilunore intae neiput ninche mpopoki oo ltung'ana laar nanu te ngoro ai o te ngoro ai napi, amu aisudoyie nanu enkomom ai pee maing'or ena anasa tenkaraki entorroni enye pooki." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ng'ura, kayau nanu atua ninye embiotisho e nkishiunoto, naa kaishiunye nanu ninche naboloki ninche enkiputakinoto e dupoto o eseriani." 
Jeremiah33:7 Naa kashuku nanu lelo ootaarayioki le Yuda o loo taarayioki le Israel, naitoki ashetu ninche metotiwuo anaa enatiu apake te dukuya." 
Jeremiah33:8 Naa kaitisiny nanu ninche te ntorroni pooki oo ng'ok enye o engolong'akinoto naatogolong'akitia nanu. 
Jeremiah33:9 Naa keaku ena anasa te nanu enkarna e ng'ida, enkisisa o enkitoo te dukuya iloreren pooki le nkop ooning nena kenya pooki sidain naitaas nanu ninche; keureshoyu ninche neikirikira tenkaraki inapooki sidai o karsisisho pooki naisho nanu ninye." 
Jeremiah33:10 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ore tiatua ene wueji nijojo intae, ‘Olmuaate metii oltung'ani aashu eng'ues;’ ore tiatua nkanas e Yuda o too nkoitoi e Yerusalem naatomijoonito, metii oltung'ani aashu olomanya aashu eng'ues, keitokini aaning" 
Jeremiah33:11 oltoilo le ng'ida o enchipai, oltoilo lo loyamisho o ltoilo le nayami, oltoilo le lelo ooranyisho eyau nkishorunot e nashe enkaji e Nkai. ‘Enchoo enashe Olaitoriani loo lororani, amu eisupat Olaitoriani amu ore ina nyorrata enye nauno ebik intarasi!’ Amu kashuku nanu lelo apa ootarayioki tena kop metotiwuo anaa apake te dukuya, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah33:12 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Ore taata ene wueji naa olmuaate, metii oltung'ani aashu eng'ues, o tiatua nkanas enyena pooki keitoki aaigil aajing imanyishoritin oo lairritak loo ntare eing'or nkerrai enye." 
Jeremiah33:13 Ore tiatua nkanas eina kop oo ldoinyo, tiatua nkanas e Shefala, o tiatua nkanas e Negeb tiatua enkop e Benchamen, nene wuejitin neemanita Yerusalem, o tiatua nkanas e Yuda, keitoki nkerrai aaim abori nkaik eilo oiken ninche; Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, pee aitabaya nanu nkisiligat apa naitayio nanu te nkaji e Israel o te nakaji e Yuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Ore akenya te nena olong'i o teina kata naisho nanu olng'osila osinya metubulu te Daudi, naa kedung ninye enkiguana te sipata o te supatisho te nkop." 
Jeremiah33:16 Ore akenya te nena olong'i neitajeuni Yuda nebik Yerusalem te seriani. Naa ena arna kenya eipotieki: ‘Olaitoriani esupatisho ang.’ 
Jeremiah33:17 “Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: Melau ae kata Daudi oltung'ani otonie olorika le nkitoo le nkaji e Israel," 
Jeremiah33:18 ore lelo apolosak le Lawi nemelau ae kata oltung'ani te dukuya nanu oitayu ilasarri oopejori, nepejoo entapa o lasar, neitayu ilasarri ntarasi.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yeremia ejo: 
Jeremiah33:20 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Tenaa indim iyie atigila olning'o lai o enkolong olning'o lai o enkewarie, metaa meekure elotu endama o enkewarie nkatitin naategelakaki," 
Jeremiah33:21 naa keidim sii olning'o lai o Daudi osinka lai atigilayu, metaa metum ninye olayioni oitoreisho to lorika lenye le nkitoo, o lning'o lai lo sotua o lapolosak le Lawi lelo aisiaayiak laainei." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ore anaa enemeikenayu olorora le shumata o anaa enemetemayu osinyai le naiposha, neijia aiko aponaa eishoi e Daudi osinka lai, o lelo apolosak le Lawi laisiaai nanu.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yeremia ejo," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Keitu iyie iyiolou enajeito kulo tung'ana, ‘Etanya Olaitoriani ilmareita oare apa ootegelua?’ Nji eikuna aamenu iltung'ana laainei ometaa meekure ninche aa olosho te dukuya ninche." 
Jeremiah33:25 Nji ejo Olaitoriani teneitu nanu aun aitagol olning'o lai lo sotua te ndama o te nkewarie o too nkitanapat e shumata o enkop," 
Jeremiah33:26 anaata naa aany iishoritin e Yakobo o Daudi osinka lai nemagelu hoo obo le ishoi enye meitoria eishoi e Abraham, Isaak o Yakobo. Amu kashuku nanu lelo lenye ootarayioki, naa kaing'urrie nanu ninche.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Ele rorei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani, teina kata apa egilunore Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon o enjore enye pooki o nkitoriat pooki e nkop naatii abori enkitoria enye o ltung'ana pooki le Yerusalem o nkanas enyena pooki ejo:" 
Jeremiah34:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: Shomo irorie Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda nijoki ninye, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ng'ura kaishooyo nanu ena anasa apik atua nkaik o laiguanani le Babilon, naa kepejoo ninye te nkima." 
Jeremiah34:3 Mijeu iyie te nkaina enye, kake meeta nchere mikimbung'i nikiyauni aapik atua enkaina enye; ingurara intae too nkonyek o le Babilon nirorie ninye inchororo nkomomi, naa ilo iyie Babilon.’" 
Jeremiah34:4 Ore ake eyia toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani, Iyie Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda! Nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo iyie: ‘Miye iyie to lalem." 
Jeremiah34:5 Te seriani iyie ilo aye.’ Naa ore apa anaa enatapejoki enkorropil too loo papaai lino, lelo aiguanak apa ootii te dukuya iyie, neijia kipuoi aaiko aapejoki enkorropil, nikinchiraki iyie, ejo, Aha, Olaitoriani!” Amu airoro nanu, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah34:6 Neitoki Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai aliki kulo rorei pooki Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda, tiatua Yerusalem ejo," 
Jeremiah34:7 ina kata apa earare enjore o laiguanani le Babilon Yerusalem o nena anas pooki e Yuda naatelekutua, Lakish o Aseka amu kuna apake nkanas e Yuda naasheta isunta naatelekutua sunta." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ele rorei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani, eidipa olaiguanani Sedekia aitobira olning'o tenebo iltung'ana pooki tiatua Yerusalem pee eibalie elakunoto te ninche," 
Jeremiah34:9 nchere pee elaku pooki ng'ae Ilhebrania rrindik lenyena olee o eng'oruoi, metaa metii hoo obo oitaa Olyahudi olalashe lenye orrindik." 
Jeremiah34:10 Nening ninche, lelo kituaak pooki o ltung'ana pooki ooibung'akinote olning'o nchere pee elaaya pooki ng'ae orrindik lenye olee aashu eng'oruoi meitokini aaigil aairrindikishore; neiruk ninche nelaaya ninche." 
Jeremiah34:11 Kake ore te siadi neibelekenya ninche neitoki aarriny ilewa o nkituaak rrindiki apa ootang'asa aalaaya, neitoki aasishore ninche anaa rrindiki." 
Jeremiah34:12 Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani ejo: 
Jeremiah34:13 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel: Aitobira apa nanu olning'o tenebo loo papaai linyi ina kata apa pee aitupuku nanu ninche aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri, aitung'uaa enkaji e sinkaisho, ajo," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Ore te siadi oo larin ile nelaaya ake pooki ng'ae te ntae o Iheburaniai alashe lenye apa likitimirakaki iyie nikisiaaia ninye ilarin ile; meeta nchere pee milaaya ninye aaitung'uaa enkisiaayiare ino;’ kake eitu apa aainining loo papaai lino aashu aaisho nanu nkiyiaa enye. 
Jeremiah34:15 Irridutua oshi det niasiasa esidai too nkonyek aainei te nkibalunoto e lakunoto, oltung'ani ake o to le latia enye, nintayuyu intae olning'o te dukuya nanu tiatua ina aji naipotieki enkarna ai;" 
Jeremiah34:16 kake inyaakita intae aaibelekenya nisarkionienie enkarna ai ina kata apa erriny pooki ng'ae irrindiki lenyena olee o eng'oruoi, apa nitalaaitie te risioroto e yieunoto enye, niyauwu ninche aaisiaaishore anaa irrindik linyi." 
Jeremiah34:17 Neaku, nji ejo Olaitoriani: Eitu nanu kining'ining'i teina kibalunoto o elakunoto, pooki ng'ae to lalashe lenye o to lelatia enye; ng'ura, aibalunye nanu te ntae elakunoto to lalem o to lmeitai o to lameyu Olaitoriani ojo. Kaitaa nanu intae enkuretisho too nkitoriat pooki enkop." 
Jeremiah34:18 Ore lelo tung'ana ootigila olning'o lai lo sotua leitu eibung nkitanapat olning'o lai lo sotua oitobira ninche te dukuya nanu, kaitaas nanu ninche anaa oloshi ashe odung'i aaiper kat are neimi erishata nena rubat." 
Jeremiah34:19 Ilkituaak le Yuda, o ilkituaak le Yerusalem o sunaishi oogelema, o ilapolosak o ltung'ana pooki leina kop ooima erishata oo matuan eilo ashe" 
Jeremiah34:20 naa kaishooyo nanu ninche apik atua enkaina oo lmang'ati lenye o atua enkaina e lelo ooing'oru enkishui enye. Ore mpopoki enye naa keaku endaa too motonyi o loing'ang'e o ng'uesi enkop. 
Jeremiah34:21 Ore Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda, olkituaak lenyena kaishooyo nanu ninche apik atua enkaina oo lmang'ati lenye o atua enkaina oo lmang'ati ooing'oru enkishui enye, atua ena jore o laiguanani leBabilon nikitorrinye aaing'uaa iyie." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ng'ura kaitanap nanu, Olaitoriani ojo, nashuku nanu ninche meetu ena anasa, nepuonu aagilunore ninye; neya ninye, nepejoo ninye te nkima, kaitaa nanu nkanas e Yuda olmuaate lememanya toki." 
Jeremiah35:1 Ele ororei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani too nkolong'i e Yehoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda ejo:" 
Jeremiah35:2 “Shomo ina aji oo Lkabii nirorie ninche, niyau ninche atua enkaji o Laitoriani, atua olgilata obo, nincho enaisho oo sabibu metooko.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Naya nanu Yaa-asama olayioni le Yeremia, o layioni le Habasania, o lalashera lenyena, o layiok lenyena pooki, o enkaji pooki e Rekabi." 
Jeremiah35:4 Ayaua nanu ninche enkaji o Laitoriani atua olgilata loo layiok le Hanan olayioni le Igdalia, ilo tung'ani le Nkai, apa otii embata olgilata loo lkituaak, shumata olgilata le Maaseia olayioni le Shalum, olarriponi le kutukaji." 
Jeremiah35:5 Nairragie nanu te dukuya ilkabi imotioo naabore enaisho oo sabibu, o nkikompeni, najoki nanu ninche, “Entook enaisho oo sabibu.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Kake etawalutua ninche ejo, “Mikiok iyiook enaisho, amu ore Yonadabu olayioni le Aekab, papaai lang neitanapa iyiook ajo, ‘Emiok ake enaisho oo sabibu, intae aashu ilayiok linyi ntarasi;" 
Jeremiah35:7 mishetishete intae enkaji; misampumpu intae olantererai, miunuunu intae aashu itumutumu enkurma oo sabibu; kake itonini intae too lng'oborri too nkolong'i inyi pooki, pee itumutumu aatobikoi nkolong'i kumok teina kop nimanyimanya.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Kiruko iyiook oltoilo le Yonadabu olayioni le Rekab, papa lang, te nena pooki naaitanapa ninye iyiook, pee mikiok enaisho oo sabibu too nkolong'i ang pooki, maate, nkituaak ang, ilayiok lang, aashu ntoyie ang," 
Jeremiah35:9 nimikishetu inkajijik nikimany atua. Mikiata iyiook isabibu, aashu enkurma aashu olantererai," 
Jeremiah35:10 kake kitobiko iyiook too lng'oborri nikitoning'o nikias nena pooki naaitaanapa iyiook Yonadabu papa lang. 
Jeremiah35:11 Kake ore apa pee elotu Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon aarare enkop, nikijo iyiook, ‘Wootu maape Yerusalem te nkuretisho nikiure enjore oo Lkadayo o enjore oo le Siria.’ Neaku kitii iyiook Yerusalem.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Yeremia ejo: 
Jeremiah35:13 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Shomo tiaaki iltung'ana le Yuda o lelo oomanya Yerusalem, aiming'amumu intae enkiteng'enare nimining'ining'i irorei laainei? Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah35:14 Ore apa ina kitanapata naishoo Yonadabu olayioni le Rekab ilayiok lenyena, pee meok enaisho oo sabibu, neibung'aki, nemeok aaitasim ometabaiki ena olong, amu eibung'a ninche enkitanapata e papaai lenye. Airorie nanu intae aitirrishaki kake eitu intae kining'ining'i nanu." 
Jeremiah35:15 Airriwaka nanu intae isinkan laainei pooki iloibonok, airriu ninche aitirrishaki, ajoito, ‘Mbelekenyayu taata pooki ng'ae te intae aing'uaa enkoitoi enye torrono, nintobir nkiaasin inono, nimilo asujaa kulie aitin pee isiaai ninche, pee itum taa atobiko tiatua ina kop apa naaishoo iyie o loo papaai linono!’ Kake eitu iyie kincho nanu enkiok." 
Jeremiah35:16 Ore ilayiok le Yonadabu olayioni le Rekab neibung'a ninche ina kitanapata naishoo ninche papaai lenye, kake eitu nanu aairuk kulo tung'ana." 
Jeremiah35:17 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: Ng'ura, kayaki nanu shumata Yuda o lelo pooki oomanya Yerusalem nena natudung'oko nanu ninche; enkaraki nairorie nanu ninche neitu ninche ening, aipoto nanu ninche neitu ninche eirukisho.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Kake ore tialo enkaji o Lrekab nejo Yeremia, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Ore enkaraki nimbung'a enkitanapata e Yonadabu papaai linyi nintabaitie pooki, nitaasa nena pooki naaitanapa ninye intae," 
Jeremiah35:19 nji naa ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Melau ae kata Yonadabu olayioni le Rekab oltung'ani oitashe te dukuya nanu.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Ore to lari liong'uan le nkitoria e Yehoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda, eewuo ele rorei enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani ejo:" 
Jeremiah36:2 “Iwa olpiyayati ninger tiatua ninye lelo rorei pooki laairorie iyie tialo Israel o Yuda o loreren pooki, ebaiki apa enkolong naairorie nanu iyie ebaiki nkolong'i e Yosia ometabaiki taata." 
Jeremiah36:3 Ekeidimayu nchere kening enkaji e Yuda ina torroni pooki naitobirita pee aitaas nanu ninche, pee etum pooki ng'ae aibelekenyayu atung'uai enkoitoi enye torrono, natumoki nanu atapalaki entorroni enye o eng'oki enye.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Neitoki Yeremia aipot Baruk olayioni le Neria, nesir Baruk tiatua olpiyayati nena naalimu Yeremia, lelo rorei pooki lo Laitoriani oirorie Yeremia ninye." 
Jeremiah36:5 Neitanapa Yeremia Baruk, nejoki, “Aateenaki nanu pee malo enkaji Enkai;" 
Jeremiah36:6 metaa ilo iyie, ore te nkolong e dukuya ening'ito iltung'ana pooki tiatua enkaji e Nkai nisuma iyie irorei lo Laitoriani teilo piyayati lingero le limunoto ai. Nilo sii aisum ninche metoning'olelo tung'ana pooki le Yuda ootupukutuo aaing'uaa nkanas enye." 
Jeremiah36:7 Ekeidimayu pee elotu esayiare enye dukuya o laitoriani, neibelekenya pooki ng'ae aing'uaa enkoitoi enye torrono, amu eikitok engoro o engoro napi natudung'oko Olaitoriani kulo tung'ana.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Neaku etaasa Baruk olayioni le Neria nena pooki naaitanapa ninye oloiboni Yeremia nchere pee eisum to lpiyayati irorei lo Laitoriani tiatua enkaji o laitoriani. 
Jeremiah36:9 Ore to lari le imiet le nkitoria e Yehoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda, to lapa lioudo, ore iltung'ana pooki ooing'uaa nkanas e Yuda nepuonu Yerusalem neibalunye eenata aaitupukoo ate te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah36:10 Ore ina kata ening'ito iltung'ana pooki, neisum Baruk irorei le Yeremia to lpiyayati, tiatua enkaji e Nkai, tiatua olgilata le Gemaria olayioni le Shefan ilo aigeroni, apa otii olgoriet le shumata, teine nejing'ieki enkishomi ng'ejuk e nkaji o Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah36:11 Ore ake pee ening Mikaia olayioni le Gemaria, olayioni le Shefan lelo rorei pooki lo Laitoriani eing'uaa olpiyayati," 
Jeremiah36:12 nedoyio ninye alo enkaji o laiguanani, atua olgilata lo laigeroni netonita apa lkituaak pooki teine. Elishama ilo aigeroni, o Delaia olayioni le Shemaia, o Enatan olayioni le Akber, o Gemaria olayioni le Shafan, o Sedekia olayioni le Hanania, olkituaak pooki." 
Jeremiah36:13 Neliki Mikaia ninche lelo rorei pooki ootoning'o ninye, ina kata pee eisum Baruk olpiyayati ening'ito iltung'ana." 
Jeremiah36:14 Neitoki lelo kituaak pooki aairriwaa Yehudi olayioni le Netania, olayioni le Shelemia, olayioni le kushi, metiaki Baruk, “Tudumu te nkaina ino ilo piyayati lisuma ening'ito iltung'ana nilotu.” Nedumu Baruk olayioni le Neria olpiyayati te nkaina enyenelotu enetii ninche." 
Jeremiah36:15 Nejoki ninche ninye, “Totona isuma.” Neisumaki Baruk ninche." 
Jeremiah36:16 Ore pee ening ninche irorei pooki, neibelekenyakino maate te nkuretisho; nejoki ninche Baruk, “Meeta nchere mikiliki olaiguanani kulo rorei pooki.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Neitoki ninche aaikilikuan Baruk ejo, “Toliki iyiook, kaji iyie nkunaka enkigeroto e kulo rorei pooki? Aitelimunoto apa e Yeremia?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Newaliki Baruk ninche, “Aatolikio ninye nanu kulo rorei pooki, ina kata apa aigerito nanu ninche to ranki to lpiyayati.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Neitoki lelo kituaak aajoki Baruk, “Shomo isudori, iyie o Yeremia niminchosho ake oltung'ani eyiolou enitii.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Nepuo ninche atua olgoriet enetii. Eidipa aairragie ilo piyayati to lgilata le Elishama ilo aigeroni; neinosaki olaiguanani mbaa pooki. 
Jeremiah36:21 Neirriwaa olaiguanani Yehudi meyau olpiyayati, neya ninye aitung'uaa olgilata le Elishama ilo aigeroni; neisumaki Yehudi olaiguanani o lelo kituaak pooki apa ooitashe aatashare olaiguanani." 
Jeremiah36:22 Olapa lioudo apa ina rishata, netonita apa olaiguanani tiatua enkaji enye enkirobi netii enkima nayupuyupito dukuya ninye." 
Jeremiah36:23 Ore ake pee eisum Yehudi imatuan uni aashu ong'uan, nedung olaiguanani te nkalem nenang'aki atua ina kima nayupuyup ometaba anaa nemut enkima nayupuyup ilo piyayati." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ore eyia eitu eirut olaiguanani aashu lelo sinkan lenyena ootoning'o kulo rorei neitu epolos nkilani enye. 
Jeremiah36:25 Ore ninye Elnatan o Delaia o Gemaria pee esai olaiguanani pee mepej olpiyayati, mening duoo ninye ninche." 
Jeremiah36:26 Neitanap olaiguanani Yerameel olayioni lo laiguanani o Seraia olayioni le Asriel o Shelemia olayioni le Abdeel pee epuo aaibung Baruk ilo aigeroni o Yeremia oloiboni, kake eisudoyie Olaitoriani ninche." 
Jeremiah36:27 Ore te siadi, eidipa olaiguanani atapejo olpiyayati tenebo lelo rorei ooigero Baruk te limunoto e Yeremia ejo:" 
Jeremiah36:28 “Iwa olikae piyayati ning'er ninye lelo rorei apa pooki ootii olpiyayati le dukuya, otapejo Yehoiakim olaiguanani le Yuda." 
Jeremiah36:29 Naa ore tialo Yehoiakim olaiguanani le Yuda tejo, Nji ejo Olaitoriani, itapejo iyie ele piyayati, ijo, Kainyoo iyie pee ingero tiatua ninye nchere esipa kelotu olaiguanani le Babilon neinyal ena kop neishie tiatua ninye tung'ani o eng'ues?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani tiaalo Yehoiakim olaiguanani le Yuda, metum ninye hoo obo otonie olorika le nkitoo le Daudi, ore empopok enye naa kenang'ari nepej oldalati dama neinosie endeem kewarie." 
Jeremiah36:31 Naa kaitame nanu ninye o eishoi enye o sinkan lenyena tenkaraki entorroni enye; kayau nanu shumata ninche, o shumata lelo oomanya Yerusalem, o shumata ilewa le Yuda, ina torroni pooki natudung'oko nanu ninche, kake mening ninche.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Neitoki Yeremia adumu likae piyayati neisho Baruk ilo aigeroni, ayioni le Neria, laa ninye oigero te limunoto e Yeremia lelo rorei pooki lo lpiyayati otapejo Yehoiakim olaiguanani le Yuda te nkima; neponiki kulikae rorei laaijo lelo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Ore Sedekia olayioni le Yosia, laa ninye eitaa Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Yuda, neitoreisho te rishata e Konia olayioni le Yehoiakim." 
Jeremiah37:2 Kake eitu ninye aashu isinkan lenyena aashu iltung'ana leina kop ening lelo rorei lo Laitoriani ooiroro aimunye Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai. 
Jeremiah37:3 Neirriwaa olaiguanani Sedekia Yehukal olayioni le Shelemia o Sefania olapolosani, olayioni le Maaseia meshomo enetii Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai, ejo, “Toomonoki iyiook to Laitoriani Enkai ang.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Neton apa elo Yeremia aipang nejing'u tiatua iltung'ana, amu eton apa eitu epiki ninye korokoroni." 
Jeremiah37:5 Neipang'ua apa enjore e Farao tiatua Misiri, ore ake pee ening lelo Kaldayo apa oomanita Yerusalem ilomon lenye, nepuo aaing'uaa Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah37:6 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Yeremia oloiboni: 
Jeremiah37:7 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel: Nji iyie tiaaki ilo aiguanani le Yuda likirriwua iyie enatii nanu pee kinkilikuanishore nanu, Ng'ura, ore enjore e Farao duoo nikiyewuo aretu iyie netaa keshuko alo Misiri, enkop enye makewan." 
Jeremiah37:8 Naa keshukunye Ilkaldayo aapuonu aarare ena anasa; keya ninche ninye nepejoo ninye te nkima. 
Jeremiah37:9 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Emileja maate, ijojo, Kepuo Ilkaldayo aaing'uaa iyiook, amu mepuo ninche aaing'uaa iyiook." 
Jeremiah37:10 Amu ore naaji ninye te nimirimiri enjore pooki oo Lkaldayo oarare intae, neing'uari te ninche iltung'ana oata ilbaa ake, oltung'ani ake to lng'obor lenye, naa kedumunye ake ninche nepejoo ena anasa te nkima.”"
