Jeremiah37:11 Ore ina kata pee eshuko enjore oo Lkaldayo aing'uaa Yerusalem etataana enjore e Farao," 
Jeremiah37:12 nelo Yeremia te Yerusalem alo enkop e Benchamen pee eng'amu erubata enye teine tiatua iltung'ana. 
Jeremiah37:13 Ore apa etii ninye enkishomi e Benchamen netii olkitok loo larripok oji Irija olayioni le Shelemia, olayioni le Hanania otimira aibung Yeremia oloiboni, ejo, “Isikaka iyie enkalo oo Lkaldayo.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Nejo Yeremia, “Elejare ina: maisik nanu alo enkalo oo Lkaldayo.” Kake mening Irija ninye, neibung Yeremia neyau ninye enetii ilkituaak." 
Jeremiah37:15 Netagorokinote apa oleng lelo kituaak Yeremia neidong ninche ninye neikenoo ninye tiatua enkaji e Yonatan olaigeroni, amu eitaaki apa korokoroni." 
Jeremiah37:16 Ore apa ina kata pee elo Yeremia nena ajijik eenata naatii atua enkop, nebik teine nkolong'i kumok," 
Jeremiah37:17 neirriwaa olaiguanani Sedekia olkilikuai meyauni ninye, neng'amu ninye. Neikilikuanishore olaiguanani ninye too nkurrat tiatua enkaji enye, nejo, “Ketii ororei oing'uaa Olaitoriani?” Nejo Yeremia “Etii” Neitoki ajo, “Eikiyauni iyie aapik atua nkaik olaiguanani le Babilon.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Neitoki sii Yeremia ajoki olaiguanani Sedekia, “Kaa torroni ataasa te iyie aashu too sinkan linono aashu te kulo tung'ana pee kitipika nanu korokoroni?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Koree lelo oibonok linono apa likimbonokito iyie, ejo, ‘Mikilotu olaiguanani le Babilon agilunore iyie nearare ena kop?’" 
Jeremiah37:20 Toning'o taata, aatoomono iyie, olkitok lai olaiguanani nchoo esayiata ai enkanyit elotu dukuya iyie, nimikingil nanu areu enkaji e Yonatan olaigeroni, maye ake nanu teine.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Neishooyo Sedekia nkitanapat, nepik ninche Yeremia enkaji erripore; neishori ninye emukate anaake eing'uaa enepejunyeki te nkoitoi, ometaba anaa neishunye imukateni eina anasa. Neaku etobiko apa Yeremia tiatua enkaji e rripore." 
Jeremiah38:1 Ore apa Shefatia olayioni le Matan, o Gedalia olayioni le Pashur olayioni le Malkia, o Yukal olayioni le Shelemia nening lelo rorei apa oojoki Yeremia iltung'ana pooki," 
Jeremiah38:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ore ilo oton tena anasa neye to lalem, o to lameyu o to lmeitai; kake ore ilo oipang alo Ilkaldayo nepok, netum ninye enkishui enye anaa enkishoroto to larrabal, nepok." 
Jeremiah38:3 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Esipa keishoori ena anasa aapik atua enkaina e njore o laiguanani le Babilon neyai ninye.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Neitoki lelo kituaak aajoki olaiguanani, “Nchoo ele tung'ani metaari metua, amu eitashalita ninye nkaik e lelo sikarini oo tung'uayioki tiatua ena anasa, o nkaik oo ltung'ana pooki, tena kiroroto nairorie ninye ninche kulo rorei. Amu ore ele tung'ani mme olmabarishoi le kulo tung'ana eing'oru, kake enkitamioto enye.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Nejo olaiguanani Sedekia, “Ng'ura, etii ninye atua nkaik inyi; amu meidim olaiguanani ataasa ae toki napaashare intae.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Neaku etudumutua ninche Yeremia nesulaki ninye atua olchorro le Malkia olayioni lo laiguanani, apa otii atua olgoriet le rripore, eitadoyio Yeremia abori too lgoso. Nemetii apa enkare atua ilo shorro, kake esarng'ab ake, neimis Yeremia tiatua ina sarng'ab." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ore ake pee ening Ebed Melek ilo apa le Etiopia, ilo apa sunash ogelema kitok otii atua enkaji o laiguanani, nchere etipika ninche Yeremia atua olchorro. Netonita apa olaiguanani tiatua enkishomi e Benchamen." 
Jeremiah38:8 Nelo Ebedmelek te nkaji o laiguanani nejoki olaiguanani," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Olkitok lai olaiguanani, etaasa kulo tung'ana entorroni teina pooki naitaasa ninche Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai tesulakinoto natusulakitia ninye atua olchorro: naa keye ninye te sumash, amu meetae emukate natelekua tiatua ena anasa.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Neitoki olaiguanani aitanap Ebedmelek ilo apa le Etiopia ajoki, “Iwa iltung'ana okuni tene nipuopuo aailepunye Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai aaitayu tiatua olchorro eton eitu eye.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Nerik Ebedmelek iltung'ana tenebo ninye enkaji o laiguanani, enetii osanduku loo nkilani teneshumishoreki, neitayu ninye teine mpurdat o nkilani naatopolosate, apa naaitadoikio ninye Yeremia tiatua olchorro too lgoso." 
Jeremiah38:12 Nejoki Ebedmelek ilo le Etiopia Yeremia, “Tipika nena purdat oo nkilani nkitikit inono o lgoso.” Neiko neijia Yeremia." 
Jeremiah38:13 Neitayu ninche Yeremia aailepunye too lgoso neilepunye ninye aaitayu tiatua ilo shorro. Nebik Yeremia to lgoriet le rripore. 
Jeremiah38:14 Neirriwaa Sedekia olkilikuai meyauni Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai neng'amu ninye te nejing'ieki e uni e nkaji o Laitoriani. Nejoki olaiguanani Yeremia, “Kaaikilikuan nanu iyie enkikilikuanata; misudoo toki te nanu.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Nejoki Yeremia Sedekia, “Amaa tenaaliki nanu, aimintisip iyie pee kiar nanu matua? Naa tenaaisho iyie enkikoo nimikining iyie nanu.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Nenya olaiguanani Sedekia olmumai te nkisudoroto te Yeremia, “Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani, laa ninye oitayio iltauja lang, maar nanu iyie tua aashu aapik atua nkaik e kulo tung'ana ooing'oru enkishui ino.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Nejoki Yeremia Sedekia, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani, Enkai e Israel, tenintayu iyie kewan aishooyo too lkituaak lo laiguanani le Babilon, neitajeuni enkishui ino, nemepejori ena anasa te nkima, ore iyie o enkaji ino nipokipoko." 
Jeremiah38:18 Kake tenimintayu iyie kewan aishooyo too ilkituaak ooya lo laiguanani le Babilon, neishoori ena anasa aapik atua enkaina oo Lkaldayo, naa kepejoo ninche ninye te nkima, nimisik iyie apuku te nkaina enye.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Nejoki olaiguanani Sedekia Yeremia, “Kaure nanu lelo Yahudi apa ooshomo aajing atua Ilkaldayo, maapuoi ake aaitarasaki ninche naamor ninche.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Nejoki Yeremia ninye, “Mikipuoi aishooyo te ninche, toning'o taata oltoilo lo Laitoriani teina naajoki nanu iyie, amu kelo asidanu te iyie, neitajeuni enkishui ino." 
Jeremiah38:21 Kake tiniany iyie intayu kewan aishooyo, ena duaata nanu aaitoduaa Olaitoriani:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Ng'ura, ore nkituaak apa pooki naatung'uayioki tiatua enkaji o laiguanani le Yuda netorikokoki ilkituaak lo laiguanani le Babilon nejoito ninche, ‘Ore ilchoreta linono apa lisilig nikiteleja iyie nikisulaa ninche iyie; ore taata eimiso nkejek inono tiatua esarng'ab kimbelekenyate ninche aing'uaa iyie.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 Ore nkituaak inono pooki o layiok linono naa keyookini aaipang'ie aarikoki ilkaldayo, ore iyie enkorrok ino nimijeu te nkaina enye, kake eikimbung olaiguanani le Babilon; ore ena anasa nepejori te nkima.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Nejoki Sedekia Yeremia, “Mincho hoo oltung'ani eyiolou kulo rorei aashu iye iyie." 
Jeremiah38:25 Tenening ilkituaak nchere aairorie nanu iyie nepuonu enitii nikijoki iyie, ‘Toliki iyiook ina nitiaaka olaiguanani naa kaa kitiaka olaiguanani, misudoo hoo toki te iyiook amu mikiar iyiook iyie tua.’" 
Jeremiah38:26 Tiaaki iyie ninche, ‘Atasayia nanu olaiguanani te nkanyit pee maaigil ake areu enkaji e Yonatan mashomo aye teine.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Nepuonu ilkituaak pooki enetii Yeremia neikilikuan ninye, newaliki ninche anaa enatiaka ninye olaiguanani. Nepuo ninche aaing'uaa ninye, amu ore ina kiroroto neitu apa ening'i." 
Jeremiah38:28 Nebik Yeremia te nkaji e rripore o metabau ina olong apa naawaki Yerusalem. 
Jeremiah39:1 Ore to lari lioudo le nkitoria e Sedekia, olaiguanani le Yuda, to lapa le tomon, nelotu Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon o enjore enye pooki aarare Yerusalem nemuat aman ninye," 
Jeremiah39:2 ore to lari le tomon oobo le nkitoria e Sedekia, to lapa liong'uan, te nkolong e naaudo o lapa, negili isunta e nkang." 
Jeremiah39:3 Ore apa ina kata pee eyae Yerusalem, ore ilkituaak pooki lo laiguanani le Babilon nepuonu aatoni te nkishomi empolos: Negal-Sharesa, o Samgarebo, o Sarsekim ilo apa kitok, tenebo lelo kulikae kituaak apa lo laiguanani le Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:4 Ore pee edol Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda o sikarini pooki ninche, neisik ninche, nepuo auluo enkanasa te nkewarie aaim enkoitoi o enkurma o laiguanani aaim ina kishomi natii erishata oo sunta pokira are; nepuo ninche aaipir enkalo e Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kake etusujaitie ninche enjore oo Lkaldayo, neinepu Sedekia too nkisiajat e Yeriko ore ake pee eibung ninche ninye, neyau ninche ninye enetii olaiguanani Nebukadnesa le Babilon, te Ribla, te nkop e Hamat; nedung'okini ninye enkiguana." 
Jeremiah39:6 Near olaiguanani le Babilon ilayiok le Sedekia te Ribla; metuata te dukuya nkonyek enyena; near olaiguanani le Babilon ilkituaak pooki le Yuda metuata. 
Jeremiah39:7 Naitayu ninye nkonyek e Sedekia, neyau ninye too lpisia pee eya ninye Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:8 Nepejoo Ilkaldayo enkaji o laiguanani o enkaji oo ltung'ana, neurori isunta e Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah39:9 Neitoki Nebusaradan, olkitok le rripore aya te yararoto meshomo Babilon lelo kulikae tung'ana ootelekutua tiatua ina anasa, lelo apa ooshomo enetii ninye, o lelo tung'ana otung'uayioki." 
Jeremiah39:10 Neing'uaa Nebusaradan olkitok le rripore tiatua enkop e Yuda o embata oo ltung'ana aisinak lemeeta toki, neisho ninche nkurman oo sabibu o nkurman teina kata ake." 
Jeremiah39:11 Neishooyo Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon enkitanapata tialo Yeremia eimaa Nebusaradan, ilo kitok le rripore ejo," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Ewaita ninye eng'ura ninye oleng nimintaasiasa ake entorrono, kake entaasa ninye anaa enajoki intae.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Ore Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore, neirriwaa olkilikuai, o Nebusaradan, o Rabsaris, o Negal Saresa, o Rabmag, o lkituaak pooki lo laiguanani le Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:14 Neirriwaa ninche olkilikuai, neitayu Yeremia tiatua olgoriet le rripore. Neisho ninche ninye Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam, olayioni le Shefan, nchere pee erik ninye ang. Neaku etotona ninye tiatua iltung'ana." 
Jeremiah39:15 Eewuo apa ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yeremia ina kata apa eikenoro to lgoriet le rripore ejo. 
Jeremiah39:16 “Shomo naa tiaaki Ebedmelek ilo le Etiopia, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: ng'ura kaitabaya nanu irorei laainei tialo ena anasa te ntorroni neme te sidai, naa keitabari kenya te dukuya iyie teina olong." 
Jeremiah39:17 Kake kaakordu kenya nanu iyie teina olong, Olaitoriani ojo, nimikinchoori iyie aapik atua enkaina e lelo tung'ana liure." 
Jeremiah39:18 Amu esipa kaaitajeu nanu iyie, nimibatata iyie to lalem, kake itum iyie enkishui ino anaa enkishoroto o larrabal, enkaraki nitipika osiligi lino atua nanu, Olaitoriani ojo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Ele rorei oewuo enetii Yeremia eing'uaa Olaitoriani eidipa Nebusaradan olkitok le rripore aishoo ninye meshomo aing'uaa Rama, ina kata apa pee eya ninye eena too lpisia tenebo lelo pooki apa leYerusalem o Yuda ootarayioki meshomo Babilon." 
Jeremiah40:2 Neya ilo kitok le rripore Yeremia nejoki ninye, “Olaitoriani Enkai ino otudung'oko ene wueji entorroni:" 
Jeremiah40:3 eyaua Olaitoriani, netaasa ninye anaa enatejo. Enkaraki nitaasa iyie eng'oki tialo Olaitoriani, neitu ining oltoilo lenye, pee eewuo ena toki shumata iyie," 
Jeremiah40:4 ng'ura ore taata, kaalaku nanu aitung'uaa lelo pisia ootii nkaik inono. Tenidol eishiaakino te iyie pee ilo tenebo nanu Babilon, wou, anaa kaalo nanu agolie; kake tenidol ajo meishiaakino nilotu tenebo nanu Babilon, nimilotu. Ng'ura ajo etii enkop pooki dukuya iyie; shomo eneba anaa enidol ajo sidai neishiaakino nilo." 
Jeremiah40:5 Tinitobiko iyie, torrinyoyu naa shomo enetii Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam olayioni le Shafan, laa ninye apa etegelua olaiguanani le Babilon aitaa olbalusui too nkanas e Yuda nibik tenebo ninye tiatua iltung'ana; aashu ilo eneba anaa enidol ajo sidai tinilo.” Neisho ilo kitok le rripore ninye endaa o enkishoroto, neisho ninye meshomo." 
Jeremiah40:6 Nelo ninye Yeremia enetii Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam, te Mispa nebik tenebo ninye tiatua iltung'ana apa ootung'uayioki teina kop." 
Jeremiah40:7 Ore ake pee ening ilkituaak pooki loo njorin e Yuda teina kop naisiaja o ltung'ana lenye nchere etegelua olaiguanani le Babilon Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam aitaa olbalusui teina kop, neishoo ninye meitoria ilewa o nkituaak, o nkera, lelo apa aisinak oleng leitu eyae Babilon te yararoto," 
Jeremiah40:8 eshomo apa ninche enetii Gedalia te Mispa Ore Ishmael olayioni le Netania, Yohanan olayioni le Karea, o Seraia olayioni le Tanhumet, ilayiok le Efai olnetofiti, Yetania olayioni le Maakasite, ninche o ltung'ana lenye." 
Jeremiah40:9 Ore Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam, olayioni le Shafan, nenya olmumai tenkaraki ninche o ltung'ana lenye, ejo, “Emiureishoyu tinisiaayiayia Ilkaldayo. Entobik tiatua ena kop, nisiaayiayia olaiguanani le Babilon, amu kesidanu te intae." 
Jeremiah40:10 Ore nanu, kabik te Mispa, pee aitashe te nkaraki intae te dukuya Ilkaldayo oopuonu enikitii iyiook; kake ore intae, enturrurro enaisho oo sabibu o lng'anayio le nkata enkirowuaj o eilata, nishumushumu ninche too ntokitin inyi naashumishoreki nibikibiki tiatua nkanas inyi apa nitegelutua.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Neijia eikununo, ore apa pee ening Ilyahudi pooki ootii Moab o atua Ilamoni o atua Edom o atua kulie kuapi nchere etelekua olaiguanani le Babilon olpisiai tiatua Yuda netegelua Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam, olayioni le Shafan aitaa olbalusui te shumata ninche." 
Jeremiah40:12 Neitoki Ilyahudi pooki ashukunye eing'uaa iwuejitin apa naaterewaki ninche nepuonu enkop e Yuda, enetii Gedalia te Mispa; neiturrur ninche enaisho oo sabibu o lng'anayio le nkata enkirowuaj tenkumoi sapuk." 
Jeremiah40:13 Nelotu apa Yohanan olayioni le Karea o larikok pooki loo njorin teina kop naisiaja aapuo enetii Gedalia te Mispa. 
Jeremiah40:14 Nejoki ninye, “Iyiolo iyie nchere eirriwua olaiguanani loo Lamoni Ishmael olayioni le Netania pee elotu aiwuang'ie enkishui ino?” Kake menyorraa Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam ninche." 
Jeremiah40:15 Neitoki Yohanan olayioni le Karea airorie Gedalia too nkurrat te Mispa ejo, “Nchooki nanu mashomo asesekuan Ishmael olayioni le Netania, nemeetae oltung'ani oyiolou. Kainyoo ninye pee eyieu neiwuang'ie enkishui ino, neaku ore Ilyahudi pooki likinturrurrokinote iyie neidapasha, ore ilo pisiai le Yuda neidak?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Kake etiaaka Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam Yohanan olayioni le Karea, “Miaas iyie ena bae, amu irorita iyie te lejare tialo Ishamel.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Ore to lapa liopishana, nelotu Ishmael ilo ayioni le Netania, olayioni le Elishama, leilo marei le nkitoria, laa ninye obo loo lkituaak lo laiguanani, tenebo iltung'ana tomon enetii Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam, te Mispa. Ore enyaita ninche endaa tenebo teine te Mispa," 
Jeremiah41:2 nedumunye Ishmael o lelo tung'ana tomon apa ootii tenebo ninye nedung to lalem Gedalia ilo ayioni le Ahikam olayioni le Shafan, near ninye metua, naa ninye apa etegelua olaiguanani le Babilon metaa olbalusui teina kop." 
Jeremiah41:3 Nesesekuan sii Ishmael Ilyahudi pooki apa ootii tenebo Gedalia te Mispa, o sikarini loo Lkaldayo apa otii ine." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ore apa teina olong te siadi esesekuanata e Gedalia, eton eitu eyiolou hoo ng'ae," 
Jeremiah41:5 nebau iltung'ana ntomoni isiet ooing'uaa Shekem o Shilo o Samaria ebarno ilmunyo lenye nepolosa nkilani enye, nedung'udung'o iseseni lenye, eyau nkishoorot e nkurma o enkorropil pee eishooyo te nkaji o Laitoriani." 
Jeremiah41:6 Nelotu Ishmael olayioni le Netania te Mispa anang'are ninche, eishirita elotu. Ore enang'are ninche, nejoki ninche “Entijing'u wootu enetii Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Ore pee epuonu ninche atua enkanasa, nesesekuan ninche Ishmael olayioni le Netania o lelo tung'ana ootii tenebo ninye, nenang'akini ninche atua engumoto." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kake etii apa iltung'ana tomon atua ninche ootiaakitia Ishmael, “Miar iyie iyiook matuatua, amu kiata ilchumat le nkano, o eilata, o enaisho oo lotorok eisudoro ti ong'ata.” Neaku etoning'o ninye neitu ear ninche metuata tenebo lelo apa le ncholuek enye." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ore apa ina gumoto natanang'aka Ishmael impopoki e lelo tung'ana ootasesekuana naa engumoto sapuk apa naitobira olaiguanani Asa arripore ina kata egilunore olaiguanani oji Baasha le Israel; neigany Ishmael olayioni le Netania impopoki oo lootuata. 
Jeremiah41:10 Neitoki Ishmael araya lelo kulikae tung'ana apa ootii Mispa, ntoyie o laiguanani o ltung'ana pooki apa ootung'uayioki te Mispa ootung'ueikia Nebusaradan, olkitok le rripore Gedalia olayioni leAhikam. Neraya ninche Ishmael olayioni le Netania neboin ninche metalang'aki Ilamori." 
Jeremiah41:11 Kake ore ake pee ening Yohanan olayioni le Karea o larikok pooki loo njorin tenebo ninye ina torroni pooki naataasa Ishmael olayioni le Netania. Nerik ninche ilewa lenye pooki nepuo aarare Ishmael olayioni le Netania, nepuonu ninche aainepu ninye to lchorro apa otii Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:12 Neriku ninche iltung'ana lenye pooki nepuo aarare Ishmael olayioni le Natania. Nerik ninche ilewa lenye pooki nepuo aarare Ishmael olayioni le Natania. Neinepu ninye to lchorro sapuk otii Gibeon. 
Jeremiah41:13 Ore ake pee edol iltung'ana pooki apa ootii tenebo Ishmael Yohanan olayioni le Karea o larikok pooki loo njorin tenebo ninye, neng'idayu ninche." 
Jeremiah41:14 Neaku ore iltung'ana pooki apa ootaarayie Ishmael aitung'uaa Mispa neibelekenya aashukunye, nepuo enetii Yohanan olayioni le Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Kake etuluayie Ishmael olayioni le Netania ailany Yohanan tenebo iltung'ana isiet, nelo atua Ilamoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Neya Yohanan olayioni le Karea o larikok pooki loo njorin apa ootii tenebo ninye lelo tung'ana pooki apa ootarayie Ishmael olayioni le Netania aitung'uaa Mispa ina kata pee eidip atasesekuana Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam o sikarini, o nkituaak, o nkera, o sunaishi oo gelema apa ooyaua Yohanan ashuku te Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:17 Nepuo ninche, aatoni te Geruut Chimham te mbata e Betlehem, ejo pee epuo Misiri," 
Jeremiah41:18 tenkaraki Ilkaldayo; amu keure apa ninche, enkaraki netasesekuana apa Ishmael olayioni le Netania Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam, laa ninye eitaa olaiguanani le Babilon olbalusui oitore ina kop." 
Jeremiah42:1 Ore ilarikok pooki loo njorin, o Yohanan olayioni le Karea o Asaria olayioni le Hoshaia, o ltung'ana pooki ebaiki oloti ometabaiki olkitok, nepuonu aanyiku." 
Jeremiah42:2 Nejoki ninche Yeremia ilo oiboni le Nkai, “Nchoo esayiata ang elotu dukuya iyie, niomon Olaitoriani Enkai ino tenkaraki iyiook, tenkaraki ele pisiai pooki, (amu etelekuaki iyiook ilkuti too lkumok, anaa enidolita iyiook.)" 
Jeremiah42:3 Pee etum Olaitoriani Enkai ino aitoduaa iyiook enkoitoi nikiim, o embae nikias.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Nejoki Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai ninche, “Atoning'o nanu intae, ng'ura, kaomon nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi te risioroto eomonunoto inyi, ore eneba anaa enawaliki intae Olaitoriani naa kaliki nanu intae; maisudoo nanu hoo toki te intae.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Nejoki ninche Yeremia, “Metaa Olaitoriani olchakeni osipa tiaalo iyiook tenikiaas iyiook terisioroto eilo rorei likirriwakinye Olaitoriani Enkai ino iyiook." 
Jeremiah42:6 Tenaa sidai aashu torrono, eikiruk iyiook ororei lo Laitoriani Enkai naa ninye kirriwaa iyie enetii, pee etum atisidana te iyiook tinikiruk oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ang.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Ore te siadi nkolong'i tomon nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yeremia. 
Jeremiah42:8 Neitoki ninye aipotu Yohanan olayioni le Karea o Larikok pooki loo njorin apa ootii tenebo ninye, o ltung'ana pooki ebaiki oloti ometabaiki olkitok," 
Jeremiah42:9 nejoki ninche, “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel, naa ninye kirriwakita nanu mayaki enkomono inyi dukuya ninye:" 
Jeremiah42:10 tinibikibiki intae tiatua ena kop nashetu nanu intae nemauroo nanu intae; naun nanu intae, nemadotu nanu intae; amu airridua nanu ina torroni apa naitaasa nanu intae." 
Jeremiah42:11 Emiureyu olaiguanani le Babilon, laa ninye iurere intae; emiureyu intae ninye, Olaitoriani ojo, amu atii nanu tenebo intae, pee aitajeu intae nakordu intae aitung'uaa enkaina enye." 
Jeremiah42:12 Kaisho nanu intae olng'ur, pee etum ninye aing'urrie intae neisho intae itonini te nkop inyi maate." 
Jeremiah42:13 Kake tenijojo intae, ‘Mikitoni iyiook tiatua ena kop,’ aagolong'aki oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi;" 
Jeremiah42:14 nijojo, ‘A-a, eikipuo iyiook enkop e Misiri, ine nimikidolie iyiook olarrabal, aashu kining oltoilo le mowuo, aashu kiata esumash oo mukateni, naa eikipuo iyiook aabik teine,’" 
Jeremiah42:15 toning'o naa ororei lo Laitoriani, lopisiai le Yuda. Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Tenipuopuo intae Misiri nimingiligili aashukunye," 
Jeremiah42:16 ore ilo alem liurere nelo ainepu intae teine tiatua enkop e Misiri; ore ilo ameyu liurere nesuj intae te ngolon indipa aashom Misiri; nipuopuo aaye teine. 
Jeremiah42:17 Ore lelo tung'ana pooki ooipirie nkomomi enye aapuo Misiri aatoni teine naa kepuo aaye to lalem, o to lameyu o to lmeitai; metum ninche olpisiai aashu ololeku teina torroni nayooki nanu ayau shumata ninche." 
Jeremiah42:18 “Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Ore anaa enapa natubukoko engoro ai o engoro ai napi lelo oomanya Yerusalem, neijia eikoni aabukoki engoro ai napi intae tenipuopuo Misiri. Naa iakuku intae entaboi, o olkirutoto o ldeket o esulare. Mingiligili ae kata aadol ene wueji." 
Jeremiah42:19 Etiaaka intae Olaitoriani, lo pisiai le Yuda, ‘Milo Misiri tayiolo te sipata nchere aaikoo nanu iyie ena olong," 
Jeremiah42:20 nchere ishomo intae aaimin tenkinyiang'a enkishui inyi. Amu kirriwaitie intae enetii Olaitoriani Enkai inyi, ijojo, Toomonoki iyiook to Laitoriani Enkai ang, ore enaba anaa enajo Olaitoriani Enkai ang mbalakinye iyiook amu eikiaas iyiook.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Naibalakinye nanu ena olong intae, kake eitu irukuruku oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi te pooki toki naairriua nanu matoliki intae." 
Jeremiah42:22 Ore naa taata entayiolo entisipa nchere iyeye intae to lalem, o to lameyu o to lmeitai tiatua ine wueji nitang'uarra intae aapuo aatonie.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Ore pee eidip Yeremia airorie iltung'ana pooki kulo rorei pooki lo Laitoriani Enkai enye, laa ninche eirriwayie Olaitoriani Enkai enye meshomo enetii ninche," 
Jeremiah43:2 ore Asaria olayioni le Hoshaiai o Yohanan olayioni le Karea o ltung'ana pooki oowuasa nejoki Yeremia, “Elejare iyie ijoito. Eitu iyie kirriu Olaitoriani Enkai ang tejo, ‘Emipuo intae Misiri aatoni teine.’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Kake Barak olayioni le Neria ninye likimbayunye iyiook, pee iyau iyiook matuata aashu eya iyiook te yararoto Babilon.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Neaku ore Yohanan olayioni le Karea o larikok pooki loo njorin o ltung'ana pooki neitu eiruk oltoilo lo Laitoriani, pee ebik tiatua enkop e Yuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Kake ore Yohanan olayioni le Karea o lkituaak pooki loo njorin neya olpisiai pooki le Yuda apa otushukunye alotu aton tiatua enkop e Yuda eing'uaa iloshon pooki apa oowaki 
Jeremiah43:6 ilewa, o nkituaak, o nkera, o ilkituaak o pooki tung'ani apa otung'ueikia Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore e Gedalia olayioni le Ahikam, olayioni le Shafan; o Yeremia ilo oiboni le Nkai o Barak olayioni le Neria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Nepuonu ninche atua enkop e Misiri, amu eitu apa eiruk oltoilo lo Laitoriani. Nebau ninche Tefahes." 
Jeremiah43:8 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Yeremia tiatua Tafahes ejo: 
Jeremiah43:9 “Iwa too nkaik inono isoito sapuki, nisudoo ninche te nkop teine nejing'ieki enkaji enkitoo e Farao tiatua Tafehes, te dukuya iltung'ana le Yuda," 
Jeremiah43:10 nijoki ninche, ‘Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Ng'ura, kairriu nanu nayau Nebukadresa ilo aiguanani le Babilon, osinka lai, naa kepik ninye olorika lenye le nkitoo shumata kulo soito laisudoiyie nanu, naa keisalaashaki ninye olng'obor lenye le nkitoo shumata ninche." 
Jeremiah43:11 Kelotu ninye aar enkop e Misiri, aisho lelo apake lo lmeitai enya olmeitai, ore lelo apake ooigerokino eyararoto nepuo eyararoto, nepuo olalem lelo apake oigerokino olalem." 
Jeremiah43:12 Neinok ninye enkima tiatua nkajijik oo nkaitin e Misiri; naa kepejoo ninye ninche nenap ninche aya eyararoto; naa keituku ninye enkop e Misiri, anaa enaituku olairritani loo ntare olkila lenye meshomo lashe; naa kelo ninye aing'uaa ine te seriani." 
Jeremiah43:13 Naa kegil ninye nena ng'apeta naasinya e Heliopolis naatii atua enkop e Misiri; ore nkajijik oo nkaitin e Misiri nepejoo te nkima.’ ” 
Jeremiah44:1 Ele rorei oewuo enetii Yeremia eipirta lelo Yahudi pooki apa oomanya enkop e Misiri, te Migdol, te Tafahes, te Memfis, o tiatua enkop e Patros ejo," 
Jeremiah44:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Itoduaa intae ina torroni pooki nayaua nanu shumata Yerusalem o shumata nkanas pooki e Yuda. Ng'ura, ore ena olong olmuaate ninche, nemetii hoo ng'ae omanya atua ninche," 
Jeremiah44:3 enkaraki ina torroni nataasa ninche, naaitagor nanu, teina nashomo ninche aapej enkorropil neisiaai kulie aitin apa neitu eyiolou ninche, ninche aashu o intae aashu loo papaai linyi." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ore ake eyia aitirrishaka nanu airriwaki intae isinkan laainei pooki lelo oibonok le Nkai, ajo, ‘Ee, miaas ena taboi naiba nanu!’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Kake eitu ninche ening aashu eishoru enkiok enye, pee eibelekenya aaing'uaa entorroni enye nemeitoki aapejoki enkorropil kulie aitin." 
Jeremiah44:6 Neaku ore emion o engoro ai napi netubukuoki neyupuyupieki tiatua nkanas e Yuda o tiatua nkoitoi e Yerusalem; neaku ninche mijoonito o lmuaateni, anaa enatiu tena olong." 
Jeremiah44:7 Ore naa taata nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Kainyoo intae pee iasiasa ena torroni sapuk tialo intae maate, aadung'oo aaiwuangie tiatua intae olee o enkitok, elooyo o enkerai, aaitung'uaa empolos e Yuda, nemeing'uiekini intae olpisiai?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Kainyoo pee kintagorigoro nanu te siaai oo nkaik inyi, ipejokiki enkorropil kulie aitin tiatua enkop e Misiri teine apa nietuo aatonie, pee etumi aaiwuang'ie intae niakuku oldeket o enkurruna tiatua iloreren pooki le nkop?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Ketorikine intae esuujisho oo loo papaai linyi, entorroni o laiguanani le Yuda, o entorroni oo kituaak enye, o entorroni inyi maate, o entorroni oo nkituaak inyi apa nataasa ninche tiatua enkope Yuda o too nkoitoi naalala e Yerusalem?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Eitu ninche eitobor ate ometabaiki ninye ena olong, aashu eureishoyu, aashu epuo te nkitanapata ai o nkiguanat aainei apa natipika dukuya intae o dukuya loo papaai linyi." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Ore naa nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Ng'ura kaing'orie nanu enkomom ai intae te ntorroni, pee aiwuang'ie Yuda pooki." 
Jeremiah44:12 Kaya nanu ilo pisiai le Yuda ooibelekenya inkomomi enye pee epuonu enkop e Misiri aatonie naa keidaikieki ninche pooki; tiatua enkop e Misiri epuo ninche aabatata to lalem, o to lameyu eidaikieki ninche; ebaiki oloti ometabaiki olkitok, keye nincheto lalem o to lameyu; naa keaku ninche enking'asia o enkuretisho o ldeket o enkurruna." 
Jeremiah44:13 Kaitame nanu lelo oobikito tiatua enkop e Misiri anaa enaidipa aitamio Yerusalem, to lalem to lameyu o to lmeitai," 
Jeremiah44:14 keaku meetae hoo obo teilo pisiai le Yuda apa oewuo aton tiatua enkop e Misiri, ojeu aashu epok aashu eshuko alo enkop e Yuda, naa ninye apa etang'uarra pee eshuko aapuo aabik teine, amu merrinyo ninche meteleku ake ilkuti aisikak.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Ore apa lelo lewa pooki ooyiolo aajo eishoo nkituaak enye enkorropil kulie aitin, o nkituaak pooki naaitasheto te mbata, o lturrur kitok, ore iltung'ana pooki oomanya Patros tiatua enkop e Misiri, newaliki Yeremia ejo:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Ore tialo ele rorei litolikio iyiook te nkarna o Laitoriani, mikining iyiook iyie." 
Jeremiah44:17 Kake eikiaas iyiook pooki toki naba anaa enikinosakita olmumai, aapejoki enkorropil enkaiguanani e shumata nikibukoki ninye ilasarri ooki, anaa apa enikitaasa iyiook o loo papa, o laiguanak lang o lkituaak lang, tiatua inkanas e Yuda o too nkoitoi naalala e Yerusalem; amu ore apa ina kata nikiata endaa sapuk nikidupoyu, neitu kidol entorroni." 
Jeremiah44:18 Ore anaa nikipal iyiook eitu kipejoki enkorropil enkainguanani e shumata o embukokinoto o lasar ooki, nikitalaita iyiook pooki toki neidaikieki iyiook to lalem o to lameyu.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Nejo nkituaak, “Amaa apa pee kipejoki enkorropil enkaiguanani e shumata nikibukoki ninye olasar ooki, aimeyiolo apa ilmoruak lang pee kintayu imukateni naata enkitanyaanyukoto enye nikibukokininye ilasarri ooki?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Neitoki Yeremia ajoki iltung'ana pooki, ilewa o nkituaak, o lelo tung'ana pooki ooishoo ninye ena walata:" 
Jeremiah44:21 “Amaa tialo ina orropil apa nitapejo intae tiatua inkanas e Yuda, o too nkoitoi e Yerusalem, intae o loo papaai linyi, o laiguanak linyi olkituaak linyi, oltung'ana lena kop, keitu edamu Olaitoriani? Keitu elotu ena damunoto enye?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Meekure eidim Olaitoriani ating'iriakinoyu entorroni oo nkiaasin inyi o nena o lminong nitaasa intae, neaku etaa enkop inyi olmuaate ewueji mitil oldeket meetae olomanya, anaa enatiu ena olong." 
Jeremiah44:23 Enkaraki nitapejo intae enkorropil o enkaraki nitaasa intae eng'oki to Laitoriani aashu ipuopuo te nkitanapata enye o too nkiguanat enyena o te nchakenisho enye, pee etadoikio intae ena torroni, anaa enatiu ena olong.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Nejoki Yeremia iltung'ana pooki o nkituaak pooki, “Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani, intae pooki le Yuda ootii atua enkop e Misiri," 
Jeremiah44:25 nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Ore intae o nkituaak inyi nimbalie too nkutukie inyi, nintabaitie too nkaik inyi, ijojo, ‘Esipa eikiaas iyiook nena nikinosakita olmumai likintobira aapejoki enkorropil enkaiguanani e shumata nikibukoki ninye olasar ooki.’ Entudup naa ilmuma linyi niasiasa nena!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Ore naa entoning ororei lo Laitoriani, intae pooki le Yuda oobikito tiatua enkop e Misiri: ng'ura, ainosa nanu olmumai te nkarna ai kitok, Olaitoriani ojo, nchere ore enkarna ai meitokini ae kata aaipot te nkutuk e pooki tung'ani le Yuda tiatua enkop pooki e Misiri, ejo, ‘Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Ng'ura, aing'orita nanu ninche te ntorroni neme te sidai, ore iltung'ana pooki le Yuda ootii atua enkop e Yuda naa keidaikieki to lalem o to lameyu, ometabau enkiting'oto enye." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ore lelo ooimisho to lalem naa keshuko aaing'uaa enkop e Misiri aapuo enkop e Yuda, naa kuti esiana; ore ilo pisiai pooki le Yuda, apa oewuo enkop e Misiri aton, neyiolou aajo kalo rorei ouno, kolalai aashu olenye." 
Jeremiah44:29 Ele olo aaku olmonekie te intae, Olaitoriani ojo, nchere kaitame nanu intae tene wueji, pee itumutumu aatayiolo nchere esipa keitashe ororei lai tialo intae te ntorroni:" 
Jeremiah44:30 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ng'ura, kaishooyo nanu Farao, aisho Hofra ilo aiguanani le Misiri apik atua enkaina oo lmang'ati lenyena o atua enkaina e lelo ooing'oru enkishui enye, anaa apa enaishooyie Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda apik atua enkaina e Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon olaa olmang'atinta lenye apa neing'oru enkishui enye.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Ele rorei eirorie Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai Barak olayioni le Neria, ina kata apa pee eiger ninye kulo rorei tiatua embuku te limunoto e Yeremia, to lari liong'uan le Yehoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda ejo:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai e Israel tialo iyie Barak:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Itejo iyie, ‘Woi kewan ai, amu etoponayie Olaitoriani osina le mion ai, atalepori nanu too nkigorot aainei, nematum enkiyeng'iyeng.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 Nji iyie tiaaki ninye, nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura ina natesheta nanu naa kasulaa, ore ina natuuno nanu naa kadotu taa enkop pooki." 
Jeremiah45:5 Ing'oru doi iyie ntokitin pooki sapuki tialo kewan ino? Ming'oru iyie ninche; amu ng'ura, kayau nanu entorroni shumata pooki toki naishu naata osesen Olaitoriani ojo: kake ekaaisho nanu iyie enkishooroto o larrabal tiatua iwuejitin pooki neeba anaa nilo.”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Ele rorei lo Laitoriani oewuo enetii Yeremia ilo oiboni le Nkai eipirta iloreren ejo. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ena naipirta Misiri, tenkaraki ina jore e Farao Neko, olaiguanani le Misiri, apa natii embata o lkeju le Farite te Karkemish naa ninye apa etimira Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon to lari liong'uan le Yehoiakim olayioni le Yosia, olaiguanani le Yuda:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Entobira ilong'oi kutiti o long'oi sapuki pee ingutakiki olarrabal! 
Jeremiah46:4 Entobira mbartan; entaked, intae ilakedok loo mbartan! Entoluaata iatata iruparen inyi, entisik iremeta inyi, enchopo nkilani inyi oo lgooitie!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Kainyoo nanu pee atoduaa ina? Etureishote ninche neibelekenyate aashuko. Earitae ilmuran lenye aaiting'ie, neipirritio aaisik te nkisarrisar; menang ninche silig enkuretisho te pooki shoto! Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah46:6 Meidim ilo oten ailanyisho, nemeidim olmurrani aimisho te moikuape te mbata olkeju le Farite etarrorrote ninche nebatata." 
Jeremiah46:7 Kaing'ae ele, oilepu anaa olkeju le Nail, anaa ilkejek ooilugo nkariak?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Eilepua Misiri anaa olkeju le Nail, anaa ilkejek ooilugo nkariak. Etejo ninye, kailepu nanu, kaiput nanu enkop, kainyal nanu nkanas o lelo oomanya." 
Jeremiah46:9 Enchom oleng nabartan, nikuetikuete, na garrin oo mbartan enchoo ilmurran epuo lelo tung'ana le Etiopia o Puti ooyiolo long'oi, o lelo tung'ana le Ludi arriyiak tenkibung'ata e nkauo." 
Jeremiah46:10 Ore idia olong naa enkolong o Laitoriani loo lororani, enkolong e lap, pee eitalaaki kewan too lmang'ati lenyena. Keinos olalem ometaraposhoyu, neok osarge ometirikayu. Amu Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani oibung'ita olasar, teina kop e moikuape te mbata olkeju le Farite." 
Jeremiah46:11 Ilepa shomo Gilead niyau olchani, na selenkei e Misiri! Itooko iyie ilkeek kumok pesho; meetae enkishiunoto te iyie." 
Jeremiah46:12 Etoning'o iloreren nkuapi kumok enkurruna ino, neiputa enkop pooki olkiyioi linyi; amu etabatatakine olmurrani olikae murrani etabatatate tenebo.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Ele rorei eirorie Olaitoriani Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai oipirta elotunoto e Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon pee eosh enkop e Misiri: 
Jeremiah46:14 “Mbalie tiatua Misiri, nintoning'oo tiatua Migdol; ntoning'oi tiatua Memfis o Tayahes; Tejo, ‘Ntasho tashololoyu nirretena, nirretena amu keman olalem amuat embata ino.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Kainyoo pee eisika Enkai inyi napi Apis kainyoo pee eitu eitashe oloing'oni linyi? Enkaraki natanang'aka Olaitoriani ninye enkop: 
Jeremiah46:16 Etarrorre esiamo inyi nebatata, nejokino ninche oltung'ani o likae, ‘Tudumunye, ematushukoto iyiook aapuo enetii iltung'ana lang maate. O enkop apa natoinyeki iyiook, tenkaraki ilo alem leilo oibooki iyiook enkop.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Mpoto enkarna e Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, ‘Olailepilepani oiturraa enkata.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 Ore anaa enaishu nanu, Olaiguanani ojo, laa ore enkarna enye naa Olaitoriani loo lororani, ore anaa Tabor tiatua ildoinyo, o anaa Karmel te mbata enaiposha, neijia etiu ilo olotu." 
Jeremiah46:19 Entobira ilolan linyi pee isikisiki, intae iloomanya Misiri! Amu keaku Memfis olmuaate o enkidaata, meetae olomanya." 
Jeremiah46:20 Enkashe sidai Misiri, kake eewuo olojong'ani torrono ooing'uaa moikuape shumata ninye." 
Jeremiah46:21 Ore ninye lelo sikarini lenyena ooigeroki ootii atua ninye netiu anaa ilasho ooitopiroki, ee, eibelekenyate ninche neisik tenebo, eitu ninche eitashe; amu eewuo enkolong enkidaata enye shumata ninche, enkata enkitamioto enye." 
Jeremiah46:22 Eitayu ninye oltoilo leijo olasurai elotu te ngolon; amu eisarisarutua ilmang'ati lenyena te ngolon, nepuonu aarare ninye too ntoluo, anaa loshi oouroo ilkeek." 
Jeremiah46:23 Kepuonu ninche aadung entim enye, Olaitoriani ojo. Hoo nemeikenayu amu eikumok ninche aalang olmaati; meeta ninche esiana." 
Jeremiah46:24 Ore ina tito e Misiri naa keitukurruni, keyauni ninye aapik atua enkaina oo ltung'ana ooing'uaa moikuape.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Etejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel, “Ng'ura kayau nanu enkitamioto shumata Amon le Sebes, o Farao, o Misiri, o nkaitin enyena o laiguanak lenyena, shumata Farao o lelo ooisilig ninye." 
Jeremiah46:26 Kayau nanu ninche apik atua enkaina e lelo ooing'oru enkishui enye, atua enkaina e Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon o lkituaak lenyena. Ore te siadi nemanyi Misiri anaa apake, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah46:27 Kake miureishoyu, iyie Yakobo osinka lai, aashu ing'aing'ai iyie Israel; amu ng'ura, kaaitajeu nanu aitung'uaa enelakua, ore eishoi ino naitung'uaa ina kop enye eyararoto. Keshukunye Yakobo netum enkitirring'a o enkiyeng'iyeng, nemeetae oloitore ninye." 
Jeremiah46:28 Miureishoyu, iyie Yakobo osinka lai, Olaitoriani ojo, amu atii nanu tenebo iyie. Kaiting'ie nanu katukul iloshon pooki lelo apa laaterewa nanu iyie. Kake ore iyie maaiting'ie tukul kaaitame nanu iyie te nkiririkinoto nasipa, nemeeta nanu nchere pee aatung'uayie mintamio.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Ele ororei lo Laitoriani apa oewuo enetii Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai eipirta Ilfilisti, eton eitu ear Farao Gasa ejo," 
Jeremiah47:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura, keilepu nkariak naaing'uaa moikuape, naa keaku olkeju onang'ari; naa keiput enkop pooki o pooki nabore, enkanasa o lelo oomanya atua. Neyietu ilewa aaishir, ore pooki ng'ae omanya ina kop neyietu aishir" 
Jeremiah47:3 to ltoilo loo loisotok loo mbartan enyena te nkuetata oo ngarrin enyena oo mbartan te manaroto oo nkejek oo ngarrin, ore iloomenye nkera nemeitoki aaibelekenya aaing'or nkera enye, etalepori nkaik enye." 
Jeremiah47:4 Tenkaraki ina olong nalotu aidaikie Ilfilisti pooki aiwuang'ie te Turo o Sidon pooki aretoni oing'uari amu emutita Olaitoriani Ilfilisti, ilo pisiai lo lmanie le nkare le Kafto." 
Jeremiah47:5 Eewuo osina kitok shumata Gasa, eidaa Ashkelon. Lopisiai o telekua le Anakim, eidung'udung'u akenya kewan to sina o anu?" 
Jeremiah47:6 La alem lo Laitoriani! Kanu kenya intirring'a? Tipika kewan atua enchashur ino, iyeng'iyeng'ayu nintirring'a!" 
Jeremiah47:7 Kaji eiko ninye teneitirring'a teneisho ninye Olaitoriani enkitanapata? Metaarare Ashkelon nearare olomanaa lenaiposha amu ine etegelua ninye.” 
Jeremiah48:1 Ena naipirta Moab. Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: “Woi Nebo, amu eitomijoonoki Eitukurruaki Kiriataim, ewaki ninye; eitukurruaki osempewuet negili ninye;" 
Jeremiah48:2 meekure ening'o Moab. Tiatua Heshbon eitobira ninche entorroni tenkaraki ninye: ‘Wou, maiwuang'ie iyiook ninye meitoki aaku olosho!’ Ore sii intae, lo tung'ana oomoda, keitigiri intae; kesujaa intae olalem." 
Jeremiah48:3 Etoning'e olkiyioi te Horonaim ‘Eyararoto o enkidaata sapuk!’ 
Jeremiah48:4 Eidaikieki Moab; ening'itoi olkiyioi tenelakua anaa Soar. 
Jeremiah48:5 Amu ore eilepaki iltung'ana Luhit neilepaki eishirita; amu ore edoiki Horonaim netoning'o ninche olkiyioi le nkidaata. 
Jeremiah48:6 Eisika! Entajeu ate! Kueta anaa oloitiko to lpurkel! 
Jeremiah48:7 Amu, ore enkaraki nisiliga intae engolon inyi o lchumat linyi, keyae sii ninche intae; naa kelo Kemosh atua eyararoto, tenebo ilapolosak lenyena o lkituaak lenyena." 
Jeremiah48:8 Kelotu olainyalani shumata pooki anasa, nemeetae enkanasa naimisho keidak oyarata, ore enkisiajiata neidaikieki anaa enairoro Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah48:9 Enchoo Moab inaipuko, amu kelotu ninye tiaai, keaku nkanas enyena ilmuateni meetae olomanya atua ninche." 
Jeremiah48:10 Etediaki ilo oas esiaai Olaitoriani emereriana; netediaaki ilo oibooyo olalem lenye meibukoo osarge. 
Jeremiah48:11 “Eitirring'a apa Moab ebaiki kitisho enye eitirring'e ninye te mumit enye eitu epikuni te mpirbil aapik ae pirbil, neitu ninye elo atua eyararoto; neaku etii olnyorrie lenye atua ninye, neitu eibelekenya olng'usil lenye." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Neaku, ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, nairriwaki nanu ninye lelo oopiku pee epikuni ninye, neitoroki empirbil enye nebelibel mpirbili enyena aaitaa mbelibelat." 
Jeremiah48:13 Nekurru Moab tenkaraki kemosh, anaa apa enatukurrua enkaji e Israel tenkaraki Betel, osiligi lenye." 
Jeremiah48:14 Kaji intae inkoko pee ijojo, ‘Kira iyiook iloing'ok, iltung'ana ooidipa olarrabal?’" 
Jeremiah48:15 Ore olainyalani le Moab o nkanas enyena neilepua alotu, ore ilbarnot lenyena gelunot nedoyio aapuo enkidaaroto Olaiguanani ojo laa ore enkarna enye naa Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Jeremiah48:16 Ore olkiyioi le Moab netataana ore osina lenye nekuetu. 
Jeremiah48:17 Enchiraki ninye, intae pooki oomanita ninye, o pooki ooyiolo enkarna enye; entejo, ‘Eng'ura etigile eng'udi nagol, ina ng'udi enkitoo.’" 
Jeremiah48:18 Wou tadou tung'uai enkitoo ino, niton te nkop e nkure iyie olomanya Dibon! Amu eewuo oloidaikie Moab pee kigilunore, neidaikie ninye isempewueti linono." 
Jeremiah48:19 Ntasho te mbata e nkoitoi ing'ura, iyie olomanya Areor! Nkilikuana ilo oisik oina naluaya; tejo, ‘Kaa nataase?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Eitukurruaki Moab, amu etigilaki; teyietu ninchir! Tolikioi te mbata olkeju le Aron, nchere eirragita Moab aa olmuaate." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Eewuo enkiguana shumata ina kop naitoriori, shumata Holon, o Yahasa, o Mefaat," 
Jeremiah48:22 o Dibon, o Nebo, o Bet-diplataini," 
Jeremiah48:23 o Kiriataim, o Betagam, o Betmeon," 
Jeremiah48:24 o Keriot, o Bosra, o nkanas pooki enkop e Moab, naalakua o naataana." 
Jeremiah48:25 Etudung'oyioki esesekuan e Moab, ore enkaina enye netigilaki, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Ntemera ninye, enkaraki nailepie ninye kewan aitorisioki Olaitoriani; neaku kelo Moab aiperipera tiatua irrugumat enyena, naa keaku sii entoki nakueniyieki." 
Jeremiah48:27 Aime entoki apa nakueniyieki Israel te iyie? Keinepuaki apa ninye tiatua ilapurrok, eji peyie aa ore ake pee iimaki nimipirripir elukunya?" 
Jeremiah48:28 “Entung'uai nkanas nimanyimanya ndapidapo intae iloomanya Moab! Entotiu anaa nturkuluoni naaitobir nkajijik too mbat enkutuk e ngumoto. 
Jeremiah48:29 Kitoning'oitie iyiook olwuasa le Moab kewuasa ninye oleng tenkilashilash enye, olwuasa lenye, enkitokoos enye, o emusunoto oltau lenye." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ayiolo nanu enkilashilash enye, Olaitoriani ojo: ore enkitoo enye naa elejare, ore nkiaasin enyena naa elejare." 
Jeremiah48:31 Neaku kayietu nanu te nkaraki Moab; kaishir nanu te nkaraki Moab pooki; ore te nkaraki iltung'ana le Kiheres naishir nanu. 
Jeremiah48:32 Kaaishiraki nanu iyie oleng oleng alang enaishiraki Yaser, lo sabibu le Sibma! Elang ilng'osil linono enaiposha, nepuo aabaya Yaser, ore shumata ilng'anayio linono te nkata enkirowuaj etadoikio olainyalani oidaikie." 
Jeremiah48:33 Ewaki enchipai o eng'ida aaitung'uaa ina kop naisho oleng e Moab; aishoo nanu enaisho oo sabibu meishunye too nkironyeta; meetae hoo ng'ae oirony ninche too mbuakunot eng'ida; ore ina buakunoto neme embuakunoto e ng'ida. 
Jeremiah48:34 “Ening'itoi oltoilo le nkishirata e Heshbon o Eleale te Yahas, eitayutuo iltoiloishi lenye eing'uaa Saor ometabaiki Horonaim o Eglat-shelishia. Amu etomijoono sii nkariak e Nimrim." 
Jeremiah48:35 Naa kayau nanu meiting'o te Moab, Olaitoriani ojo, ilo oitayu olasar tiatua ewueji e shumata nepejoki enkorropil enkai enye." 
Jeremiah48:36 Neaku keishiraki oltau lai Moab anaa endule, neishir oltau lai anaa endule te nkaraki iltung'ana le Kiheres; neaku ore enkarsisisho apa nanoto ninche neidaayie." 
Jeremiah48:37 “Amu etabarnoki pooki lukunya nedung'i pooki munyei; netii nkaik pooki indung'ot ore mpolosi neishopokino ilkuniyiani to sina. 
Jeremiah48:38 Ore nchumat oo nkajijik e Moab o tiatua nkoitoi dapashi metii ae toki neme enkishirata, amu atigila nanu Moab anaa emasaai nemeetae oltung'ani oshilaa, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah48:39 Eng'ura etigile! Eng'ura eyietu! Eibelekenye Moab te nkurruna! Neaku etaa Moab entoki nakueniyieki o enkuretisho te lelo pooki oomanita ninye.” 
Jeremiah48:40 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ng'ura kelo obo tiaai aipirri anaa olkurragos, neisalaashaki inaipuko enyena shumata Moab;" 
Jeremiah48:41 keyae nena anas neibung'i lelo sempewueti. Ore oltau loo loing'ok le Moab teina olong netiu anaa oltau le nkitok nasaisai; 
Jeremiah48:42 keidaikieki Moab nemeitoki aatii iltung'ana, enkaraki nailepie ninye kewan aitorisioki Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah48:43 Etii enkuretisho, o engumoto o rreshet dukuya intae, iloomanya Moab! Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ore ilo oisik aing'uaa enkuretisho nedoiki atua engumoto, ore eked engumoto ailepu neibung orreshet. Amu kayau nanu kuna baa shumata Moab teilo ari le nkitamioto enye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah48:45 Tiatua oloip le Heshbon eitashe ilaisikak meeta engolon; amu eipang'a enkima alo eing'uaa Heshbon, enkiyupuyup naing'uaa enkaji e Sihon: einyala ninye enkomom e Moab, emaupe enkitoo o ruparen e lelo ayiok oonyor olarrabal." 
Jeremiah48:46 Oi iyie Moab! Eishieki iltung'ana le Kemosh; amu ewaki ilayiok linyi aaraya ore ntoyie inyi neyae atua eyararoto. 
Jeremiah48:47 Ore eyia kashuku nanu dupoto e Moab too nkolong'i naapuonu, Olaitoriani ojo.” Nji eikununo endung'okinoto e nkiguana e Moab." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ena ejo Olaitoriani tialo Ammon: “Aimeeta Israel ilayiok? Aimeeta ninye oloyooki ajung? Kainyoo naa pee ewa Milkom Gad, ore iltung'ana lenyena netamanya nkanas enyena?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Neaku, ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i, Olaitoriani ojo, pee aisho nanu olkiyioi lo larrabal metoning'oyu te nkaraki Raba oo Lamoni; naa keaku olmuaate mijooni, ore nkang'itie enyena nepejori te nkima; netum taa Israel aawa lelo apa oowaita ninye, Olaitorianiojo." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Teyietu, iyie Heshbon, amu eitomijoonoki enkang e Ai! Nchira iyie, natito e Raba! Nchopoki kewan ilkuniyiani, nchira, nikuet alimana tiatua nkang'itie! Amu kelo Milko atua eyararoto, tenebo ilapolosak lenyena o lkituaak lenyena." 
Jeremiah49:4 Kainyoo iyie pee intokoos too yarat linono naselenkei nemeisiligayu, apa naisiliga olchumati lenye, ejo, ‘Kaing'ae laalo aarare nanu?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ng'ura kayau nanu enkuretisho shumata iyie, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, aitung'uaa lelo pooki likimanita iyie, naa kearari intae aaipang'ie, neilanyisho pooki ng'ae, nemeetae hoo ng'ae oiturrur lelo ooimin." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Kake ore te siadi nashuku nanu lelo tung'ana loo Lamoni apa ootarayioki, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Ena bae etejo Olaitoriani naipirta Edom: “Aimeekure etii eng'eno atua Teman? Keidaayie enkiguana te lelo ang'eni? Keimisiloyie eng'eno enye? 
Jeremiah49:8 Elanyisho entushukoto, entotoni tiatua ewueji negut, intae iloomanya Dedan! Amu kayau nanu entaboi e Esau shumata ninye, teina kata naitameyie nanu ninye." 
Jeremiah49:9 Amaa tenepuonu ilaiturrurrok loo sabibu enitii aimeleku ninche kulikae ng'anayio? Amaa tenepuonu ilapurrok kewarie, aime ina ake nairirikino ninche einyal?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Kake atooruo nanu Esau nkilani, metaa olmasipai, ataboluo nanu iwuejitin enyena neeisudoriyie, nemeekure eidim aisudori. Eidaikieki nkera enyena, o lalashera lenyena o lelatia enye; nemeekureeetae ninye." 
Jeremiah49:11 Tapala nena kera inono nemeeta menye, kaitopok nanu; nchoo maaisiliga inyi nkolia nanu.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani, “Amaa teneok, lelo lemeishiaakino teneok enkikompe enye enkitamioto ijo iyie ilo mintamio? Milo iyie mintamio, kake meeta nchere pee miok iyie." 
Jeremiah49:13 Amu ainosa nanu olmumai te kewan ai, Olaitoriani ojo, nchere keaku Basara, entoki naitureisho, enkurruna, olmuaate oldeket, ore nkanas enyena pooki neaku ilmuaateni anaake.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Atoning'o nanu ilomon supati ooing'uaa Olaitoriani, neirriwakaki olkilikuai atua nkuapi pooki: “Enturrurroto maate tenebo, nipuonunu aarare ninye, nidumakinono olarrabal!”" 
Jeremiah49:15 Amu ng'ura, kaaitaa nanu iyie kiti tiatua iloreren, nikimenuni tiatua iltung'ana." 
Jeremiah49:16 Ore nena baa naaitureishore nikiteleja iyie, oilo wuasa lo ltau lino, iyie oton too lbaat le ndapidapoi oibung entopij oldoinyo. Ore hoo nipik enkaji ino shumata oleng anaa olkurragos, kaaitadou nanu iyie aitung'uaa ine, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Keaku Edom entoki naitureisho; ore pooki ng'ae oim embata enye neiputukuny, te nkaraki ina nataraki ninye." 
Jeremiah49:18 Ore anaa enapa natanang'ayioki Sodom o Gomora, o nkanas naatashare, Olaitoriani ojo, meetae oltung'ani oitoki alo aton teine, meetae oltung'ani omany atua ninye." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ng'ura, ore anaa olng'atuny oilepu alotu aing'uaa entim e Yordan ajing'aki emuatata nagol oo nkerra, kaisho nanu ninche mekueta nabo kata aapuo aaing'uaa ninye, nagelaki nanu shumata ninye oloba anaa olagelu. Amu kaing'ae laanyaanyukie nanu? Kaing'ae laaipotu nanu? Kalo shekut loo ntare oidim aitasho te dukuya nanu?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Neaku toning'o enkitobirata naitobira Olaitoriani tialo Edom o eyieunoto naipirakinye ninye lelo oomanya Teman: Keing'irtitori ninye lelo ooti le luaata aaya; ore iluaat enye neiputukuny teina. 
Jeremiah49:21 Ore to ltoilo le mbatatata enye neigirigiro enkop; ore oltoilo le nkishirata enye nening'i te naiposha nanyokie. 
Jeremiah49:22 Ng'ura kekedisho obo nekuet tiai anaa olkurragos, nelak inaipuko enyena agilunore Basara, ore oltau loo lmurran le Edom netiu akenya ina olong anaa oltau le nkitok te saisai enye.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Ena ejo Olaitoriani tialo Dameski: “Eitukurruaki Hamad o Arpad, amu etoning'o ninche mbaa torrok, etalepori ninche te nkuretisho, neilugo anaa enaiposha nemeidim aitirring'ayu." 
Jeremiah49:24 Etemene Dameski, eibelekenye ninye aisik, neterewa ninye olkirutoto; neibung ninye emion o sinaitin, laaijo ilenkitok nasaisai." 
Jeremiah49:25 Anaaijo ketung'uayioki enkanasa ning'oti, ina anasa e ng'ida!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Neaku kepuo ilbarnot lenyena aabatata too lkurrot ootumoreki le nkanasa, ore isikarini lenyena pooki nemuti teina olong, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Jeremiah49:27 Anaa kainok nanu enkima tiatua olpaashe, naa keidaikie lelo sempewueti le Benhadad.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Ena ejo Olaitoriani tialo Kedar o enkitoria te Hasar apa natesesekuana Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon: “Entudumunye, enchom entaarare Kedar! Endaikie iltung'ana le nkilepunoto enkirowuaj!" 
Jeremiah49:29 Keyae akenya ilng'oborri lenye o luaat enye oo nkerrai, o ilkarash lenye o masaa enye pooki; nerei ntamesin enye aaitung'uaa ninche neishiraki iltung'ana ninche: ‘Enkuretisho te pooki shoto!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 Esika endapashari te nelakua, entobik tiatua enguton, intae iloomanya Hasor! Olaitoriani ojo. Amu ore Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon, neitobira enkitobirata tialo intae neipirua ina nayieu tialo intae." 
Jeremiah49:31 Tudumunye, shomo taarare ina kop te leleki, etonita te seriani Olaitoriani ojo, ina nemeeta nchomito aashu isekenke, ina nabikito openy." 
Jeremiah49:32 Kerayae akenya ntamesin enye ore luaat enye oo nchoo neaku iyararot. Naidapashaki nanu pooki siuo lelo oodung ilpijat loo lpapit lenye nayau nanu osina lenye aimunye pooki shoto enye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah49:33 Keaku Hasor emanyisho oo mbariak, olmuaate loo ntarasi. Meetae oltung'ani olo aton tiatua ninye.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Ele rorei lo Laitoriani oewuo enetii Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai eipirta Elam, te nkiterunoto enkitoria e Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda ejo:" 
Jeremiah49:35 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, “Ng'ura kagil nanu enkawuo e Elam, ine netii engolon e magilanisho enye;" 
Jeremiah49:36 naa kayau nanu shumata Elam ilkutat pokira oong'uan eing'uaa imatuan ong'uan e shumata naa kaidapashaki nanu ninche lelo kutat pooki, nemeitoki atii olorere lemepuonu lelo ooterewa olkutati te Elam." 
Jeremiah49:37 Kaiture nanu Elam te dukuya ilmang'ati lenye, o te dukuya lelo ooing'oru enkishui enye; kayau nanu entorroni shumata ninche, o engoro ai napi, Olaitoriani ojo. Kairriwaa nanu olalem metusujaininche, ometaba anaa namut nanu ninche;" 
Jeremiah49:38 naa kapik nanu olorika lai le nkitoo Elam, naidaikie olaiguanani lenye o lkituaak, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah49:39 Kake ore too nkolong'i e siadi nashuku nanu lelo ooena le Elam, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Ele rorei eiroro Olaitoriani neipirta Babilon eipirta enkop oo Lkaldayo eimunye Yeremia ilo oiboni le Nkai ejo: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Mbalie tiatua loreren nintudupaa, entipik enanka nintudupaa, emisudoo, naa entejo: ‘Ewaki Babilon neitukurruni enkai enye naji Bel, Etapalari Merodak eitukurruaki nkitanyaanyukot enyena ore nena kitanyaanyukot neme enkai neitapalari.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 “Amu moikuape eing'uaa enkop nalotu aarare ninye, naa ninye nalotu aitaa enkop enye mitil, nemeitoki hoo ng'ae amanya; keisik oltung'ani o eng'ues aailanyisho." 
Jeremiah50:4 “Ore kenya te nena olong'i o teina kata, Olaitoriani ojo, ore iltung'ana le Israel o ltung'ana le Yuda, nepuonu tenebo, neishir ninche epuonu neing'oru Olaitoriani Enkai enye." 
Jeremiah50:5 Neikilikuanu ninche enkoitoi nalo Sion, eibelekenya nkomomi enye aaing'or ina alo, ejo, ‘Wootu, matushulare iyiook Olaitoriani tiatua osotua loo ntarasi lemerikinishoi ae kata.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Etaa apa iltung'ana laainei ntare naaimina, etorikoitie ninche ilairritak lenye aaitapong'oo, aaibelekeny ninche too ldoinyo nepuo ninche oldoinyo o endoinyo, etorikine ninche eluaata enye." 
Jeremiah50:7 Ore pooki oonoto ninche neinosa ninche, netejo ilmang'ati lenye, Eitu iyiook kintarruoo; amu etaasa ninche eng'oki tialo Olaitoriani, laa ninye emanyisho enye nadede, Olaitoriani osiligi loo loo papaai lenye." 
Jeremiah50:8 “Esika entung'uai empolos e Babilon, nipuopuo aaipang te nkop oo Lkaldayo, nitiuu anaa iloroi te dukuya iluaat oo ntare." 
Jeremiah50:9 Amu ng'ura, kadumu nanu nayau metaarare Babilon olorora kitok loo loreren oogol, ooing'uaa enkop e moikuape; naa keitobirakino ninche olarrabal pee earare ninche; ore teine neyae ninye. Eikununo mbaa enye anaa olmurrani arriyia lemeshukunye ninye too nkaik naarook." 
Jeremiah50:10 Keaku kepuo Ikaldayo eyararoto; ore lelo pooki ooraya ninye netum pooki toki, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Ore hoo ning'ida, ore hoo nirup kewan, intae ilararok le njung'ore ai, ore hoo nintigiran anaa enkashe too nkujit, ninchirishiri anaa oloing'oni le mbarta," 
Jeremiah50:12 keitukurruni ng'utunyi katukul, ore apa ina natoiwuo intae nesuli. Ee, keaku ninye e nesiadi too loreren, ong'ata natoyio naa olpurkel." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ore te nkaraki engoro o Laitoriani memanyi ninye, kake keaku olmuaate mijooni; ore pooki ng'ae ogiroo Babilon neiputukuny, neing'asia te nkaraki ilbaa lenyena pooki." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Entobirakinoto pee iararere Babilon aaman aamuat te pooki shoto, intae pooki ooriu enkawuo, entang'or ninye, mileku mbaa, amu etaasa ninye eng'oki tialo Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah50:15 Tabuaaki ninye te pooki shoto, ekueta ninye etuurori nkang'itie enyena, etusulari isunta enyena, amu elap Olaitoriani ena; intalaku elap te ninye, ntaasa ninye anaa apa enataasa." 
Jeremiah50:16 Iwuang'ie te Babilon olaunoni, o ilo oibung olalem le nkisampuare te nkata enkisampuare; ore te nkaraki ilo alem lo loitorogonyani, keibelekenyakino pooki ng'ae iltung'ana lenye maate, neisikaki pooki ng'ae enkop enye makewan." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Enker narreshitoi Israel namirta ilng'atunyo etang'asa olaiguanani te Asiria ainos ninye, ore taata te siadi neguenyita Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon iloik lenyena." 
Jeremiah50:18 Neaku, nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Ng'ura, kayau nanu enkitamioto shumata olaiguanani o enkop enye, anaa apa enaitame nanu olaiguanani le Asiria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Kashukoki nanu Israel ewueji enye nedaare, naa kedaa ninye te nchumata e Karmel o tiatua Bashan, neiputakini ninye eyieunoto enye te nchumata oldoinyo le Efraim o tiatua Gilead." 
Jeremiah50:20 Ore akenya te nena olong'i o teina kata, Olaitoriani ojo, neing'oruni entorroni te Israel, nelai, neing'oruni ng'ok tiatua Yuda, nemetumi hoo nabo; amu kapalaki nanu lelo laleku metaa olpisiai." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Ilepa shomo taarare enkop e Merasaim, nilo aarare lelo oomanya Pekod, taara metuata, tusujai indaikie ninche katukul. Olaitoriani ojo, naa taasa nena pooki naaitanapa nanu iyie." 
Jeremiah50:22 Etii oltoilo lo Larrabal atua enkop, o enkidaata kitok!" 
Jeremiah50:23 Kaji eikuna olnyuntu le nkop pooki pee etudung'oki aagil! Kaji eikuna pee etaa Babilon entoki naitureisho tiatua iloreren! 
Jeremiah50:24 Airragie apa nanu orreshet te nkaraki iyie, nikimbung'aki iyie Babilon, neitu apa iyie iyiolou; kinotoki apa iyie nikimbung'i, enkaraki nitekeshere iyie Olaitoriani." 
Jeremiah50:25 Etabolo Olaitoriani ewueji enye neshumieki imasaa o larrabal, neitayu imasaa o larrabal engoro enye napi, amu eeta Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani esiaai naas tiatua enkop oo Lkaldayo." 
Jeremiah50:26 Tarasaki ninye te pooki shoto; tabolo ilchumat lenyena le ndaa; tasoto ninye anaa isotot le nkano, nindaikie ninye tukul; mincho eleku toki te ninye." 
Jeremiah50:27 Taara metuata ilmurran lenyena pooki oingok nchoo ninche edoyio aapuo ewueji neyieng'ishoreki. Oi ninche, amu eewuo enkolong enye, enkata enkitamioto enye." 
Jeremiah50:28 “Enining'o oltoilo lenye eisik te nkop e Babilon, pee eibalunye tiatua Sion elap o Laitoriani Enkai ang, elap te nkaraki enkaji enye." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Mpotu lelo oong'oroo mbaa meetu aarare Babilon lelo pooki ooriu enkawuo. Entamuat entaman ninye; emincho eluaya hoo obo. Entalaa ninye te risioroto oo nkiaasin enyena, entaasa ninye te risioroto e nena pooki naataasa ninye; amu eisarkionie ninye to lwuasa lenye Olaitoriani, ilo sinyati le Israel." 
Jeremiah50:30 Neaku kebatata ilbarnot lenyena too lkurrot ootumoreki le nkanasa, enye, ore isikarini lenye pooki neidaikieki teina olong, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Ng'ura, kaarare nanu iyie, lo tawuasai, Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani ojo; amu eetuo nkolong'i inono, e nkata naaitameyie nanu iyie." 
Jeremiah50:32 Kerrorro ilo wuasa nebatata, nemeetae olodumu ninye aitasheyie, naa kainok nanu enkima too nkanas enye naa kemut pooki toki namanita ninye." 
Jeremiah50:33 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Eibookoki iltung'ana le Israel enkop o ltung'ana le Yuda tenebo ninche, ore lelo pooki apa ootaraitie ninche neibung'a ninche aakurraki, etanyaita ninche eisho ninche meshomo." 
Jeremiah50:34 Ore ilo olaku ninche naa kegol; Olaitoriani ninye enkarna enye. Kemitu ninye ninche tukul, pee etum aishoo enkop enkiyeng'iyeng, kake enyamali te lelo oomanya Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:35 Etii olalem shumata Lkaldayo, Olaitoriani ojo, o shumata lelo oomanya Babilon o shumata lkituaak lenyena o lang'eni lenyena!" 
Jeremiah50:36 Etii olalem shumata lelo aitumusumusok, pee etum aataa ilmoda! Pee etumi aaidaikie ninche!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Etii olalem shumata mbartan enyena o shumata ngarrin enyena oo mbartan o shumata lelo timito omon ootii atua ninye, pee etum aata ing'oruo! Etii olalem shumata ilchumat lenyena, pee etumi aawaita." 
Jeremiah50:38 Etii entoi shumata nkariak enyena pee etumi aaitoyio. Amu enkop oo nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin ninye netomodate ninche too nkitanyaanyukot neme inkaitin. 
Jeremiah50:39 “Neaku kemany ilouarak le ntim o lng'ojinia Babilon, nebik isidan tiatua ninye; meitoki aatii iltung'ana atua ninye ntarasi, nememanyi too lporori pooki." 
Jeremiah50:40 Amu ore apa enatotiuo pee enang'aa Enkai Sodom o Gomora o nkang'itie naatashare, Olaitoriani ojo, neijia etiu meitokini aata oltung'ani omanya ine nemeitokini aata oltung'ani obik teine." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Ng'ura, epuonu iltung'ana ooing'uaa enkalo e moikuape; erretena olosho magilani o laiguanak kumok too wuejitin neelakua enkop." 
Jeremiah50:42 Eibung'ita ninche enkawuo o empere; kegogong ninche nemeeta olng'ur. Ore oltoilo le lototo enye etiu anaa enaiposha nailugo; neked ninche mbartan, neishopo anaa oltung'ani lo larrabal pee kiarare iyie, natito e Babilon!" 
Jeremiah50:43 Etoning'o Olaiguanani le Babilon oratioti lenye, neilepunye nkaik enyena; neiput ninye emion, emion naaijo ene nkitok nasaisai." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Ng'ura, ore anaa olng'atuny olotu te ntim e Yordan ajing'aki eluaata oo ntare, kaluam nanu ninche mekueta aaing'uaa Babilon; nagelu nanu meitoria ninye oloba anaa olagelu. Amu kaing'ae laanyaanyukie nanu? Kaing'ae laakesh nanu? Kalo shekut loo ntare oidim aitasho te dukuya nanu?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Neaku toning'o enkitobirata naitobira Olaitoriani agilunore Babilon, o yieunot naaipirua ninye agilunore enkop oo Lkaldayo. Esipa ore lelo ooti le luaata enye naa keingirtitori aaya; esipa ore eluaata enye naa keiputukuny." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ore to ltoilo le yararoto e Babilon neigirigiro enkop, ore enkishirata enye nening'ori tiatua iloreren.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ng'ura, kaputu nanu enkiyang'et enkidaaroto metigilunore Babilon, negilunore lelo oomanya Kaldea;" 
Jeremiah51:2 naa kairriwa Babilon ilasilak naa kepuo aasil ninye, naa keitorok ninche enkop enye, tenepuonu aarare ninye te pooki shoto teina olong e nyamali." 
Jeremiah51:3 Mincho ilo ong'orisho te nkauo eyietu enkawuo enye, nimincho ninye meitasho eeta imasaa enyena o larrabal mileku ilbarnot lenyena; indaikie tukul ilororani lenyena pooki." 
Jeremiah51:4 Kebatata ninche etaraki metuata te nkop oo Lkaldayo, netipikaki ilbaa too nkoitoi enyena naalala." 
Jeremiah51:5 Amu eitu eing'ua Israel o Yuda Enkai enye, Olaitoriani loo lororani; kake ore enkop oo Lkaldayo nebore enkitarruoroto tialo ilo Sinyati le Israel." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Esika entung'uai empolos e Babilon, enchoo pooki tung'ani eitajeu enkishui enye! Emincho edung'ori intae te nkitamioto enye amu enkata e lap o Laitoriani ena, enkitalakunoto naitalak ninye." 
Jeremiah51:7 Etiu apa Babilon anaa enkikompe e sahabu te nkaina o laitoriani, eitemer enkop pooki; etemerate iloreren te naisho enye oo sabibu, neaku eshomo nkuapi etarruoitie ilukuny." 
Jeremiah51:8 Etabatate nabo kata Babilon negila; teyietu nchiraki ninye! Ewaita olchani te nkaraki emion enye. Eidimayu pee eishiunyeki ninye. 
Jeremiah51:9 Anaata iyiook kinchiunye Babilon, kake eitu ninye eishiu tung'uai ninye, maape iyiook oltung'ani ake enkop enye makewan; amu ore endung'okinoto enye e nkiguana netabaikia shumata netudumuaki aailepie omeitabaikini nkatampo.”" 
Jeremiah51:10 Etabawua enkata pee eilepie iyiook Olaitoriani enkilepioto ang, wou, maibalunye iyiook tiatua Sion esiaai o Laitoriani Enkai ang." 
Jeremiah51:11 “Eiyio nena baa! Entudumu ilong'oi! Etuputuo Olaitoriani oltau loo laiguanak le Amedi, amu ore eyieunoto enye tialo Babilon naa pee eidakie ninye, amu ina elap o laitoriani, elap te nkaraki enkaji enye." 
Jeremiah51:12 Entipik ilmonek isunta e Babilon; Entagolo ilarripok. Entipik ilarripok; Entobira ilnukat. Amu eitobira Olaitoriani neitabayie ina apa nairoro tialo lelo oomanya Babilon. 
Jeremiah51:13 Oi iyie oton too nkariak kumok, karsis too lchumat etabawua enkiting'oto ino, etudung'oki o lpiyayoil le nkishui ino." 
Jeremiah51:14 Einosa Olaitoriani loo lororani olmumai te kewan enye: Esipa kaaiput nanu iyie iltung'ana ooba anaa ilmaat, naa keilepie ninche embuakunoto e nkisulata nikisulie ninche iyie." 
Jeremiah51:15 Ilo ninye oitayio enkop te ngolon enye, laa ninye oitobira enkop te ng'eno enye nagut, ore te yiolounoto enye neitorioo shumata." 
Jeremiah51:16 Teneitayu oltoilo lenye netii enkikurrukur oo nkariak shumata, neisho ninye enkinuku metudumunye too nkiting'ot enkop. Eitayu ninye nkiwuang'at e nchan, neisho osiwuo metupuku aing'uaa ineeshumishoreki enyena." 
Jeremiah51:17 Kemoda pooki tung'ani nemeeta eng'eno; eitukurruaki pooki kunoni too nkitanyaanyukot enyena; amu ore nkitanyaanyukot enyena naa elejare, nemetii enkiyang'et atua ninche." 
Jeremiah51:18 Inepesho ninche, esiaai nemeeta tipat; ore te nkata enkitamioto enye nerruoyo ninche." 
Jeremiah51:19 Mitiu iyie anaa kulo, ilo laa erubata e Yakobo, amu ninye oipirua ntokitin pooki, ore Israel naa olosho le njung'ore enye; Olaitoriani loo lororani enkarna enye." 
Jeremiah51:20 Ira iyie enyuntu ai o emasaai o larrabal: te iyie nanu agil iloreren aitaa ingiligilat. Te iyie nanu aidaikie nkitoriat," 
Jeremiah51:21 negiligili imbartan o lakedok, negiligili ingarrin oo mbartan o larewak lenye." 
Jeremiah51:22 Near metuata ilewa o ngoruo nesesekuan iltung'ana moruak o looti; near metuata nkayiok o ntoyie. 
Jeremiah51:23 Nesesekuan ilairritak loo ntare o nkerrai enye, nesesekuan ilaturok loo nkurman o mbartan enye, nepurd ilaitoriak o lelo oota enkitoo." 
Jeremiah51:24 “Kalaaki nanu o lelo pooki oomanya atua Ilkaldayo te dukuya nkonyek inono teina torroni apa pooki nataasa ninche te Sion, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Ng'ura kaarare nanu iyie ele otiu anaa oldoinyo oinyalisho, Olaitoriani ojo, ilo oidaikie enkop pooki; kaitorioo nanu enkaina ai pee aarare iyie, naa kaibeleleng'oo nanu too ndapidapo naaitaa nanu iyie oldoinyo otapejoki." 
Jeremiah51:26 Nemeitayuni te iyie osoit oitaae o lo lmairroto, nemeitayuni osoit lo lkitamyunoto, kake iaku iyie mijooni anaake Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Tuuno iyie enanka te nkop, toosho entarumpeta tiatua iloreren, ntobiraki nkuapi olarrabal tialo ninye, mpotoki ninye nkitoriat meetu aarare ninye, Ararat, o Mini, o Askenas; Entegelu olarikonile njore oarare ninye. Eyautu mbartan naaba anaa olmaati." 
Jeremiah51:28 Ntobiraki nkuapi olarrabal pee earare ninye lelo aiguanak le Mede, tenebo ilbalusuni lenye, o laretok lenye, o pooki kop natii abori enkitoria enye." 
Jeremiah51:29 Eikirikira enkop te mion, amu eitashe nkitobirat o Laitoriani ear Babilon, pee eitaa enkop e Babilon mitil, nememanya tung'ani." 
Jeremiah51:30 Etapala ilmurran le Babilon olarrabal, ebikito ninche too sempewueti lenye eishunye engolon enye etaa ninche nkituaak eibung'ita enkima imanyishoritin enye. Etigilate ntaloishin oo nchomito enye." 
Jeremiah51:31 Eipirri oltung'ani anang'are olikae nenang'are olkilikuai olikae pee eliki olaiguanani le Babilon nchere eibung'aki enkanasa enye te pooki shoto. 
Jeremiah51:32 Eibung'aki iwuejitin neelang'ieki too lkejek netapejoki iwuejitin neeisudoriyieki te nkima neiputukunyo isikarini lo larrabal. 
Jeremiah51:33 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai e Israel: Etotiwuo entito e Babilon anaa osoit oiutuutishoreki tenakata naitunyoki, ore ake eyia naa tenkiti kata naa kelotu enkata e nkisampuare enye.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukadresa ilo aiguanani le Babilon laatumuta nanu, aatupurda ninye nanu, aaitaa ninye empirbil narok aatoijoie ninye anaa enkukuu. Eiputa ninye enkoshoke enye intokitin ainei e sikar, aaiturrayie ninye anotu." 
Jeremiah51:35 Metijing'a shumata Babilon ina kinyalata naainyalaki nanu o ltung'ana laainei.” Nchoo ilo omanya Sion ejo, “Metijing'a osarge lai shumata lelo oomanya Kaldayo. Nchoo Yerusalem ejo.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani, “Ng'ura, kaamitu nanu naitalaku elap te nkaraki iyie. Kaitoi nanu enaiposha enye naitoi enkong'u enye e nkare," 
Jeremiah51:37 naa keaku Babilon osototi loo suut neaku emanyisho oo mbariak ewueji olkirutoto o enking'asia nememanya tung'ani. 
Jeremiah51:38 Keikurrukur ninche tenebo anaa ilng'atunyo; neishir anaa ilkuoon lo lng'atuny. 
Jeremiah51:39 Ore te nkure enye naitobiraki nanu ninche, naitemer nanu ninche o metishipata neirura ninche nkolong'i pooki nemeigil aainyototo, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah51:40 Kaitadou nanu ninche anaa ilkuoon le kerra oopuoi aayieng, anaa ilmeregeshi o loroi." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Eng'ura eneikunayioki Babilon, ewaki ina naikasie enkop pooki eng'ura aajo etaa Babilon entoki naitureisho too loreren!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Eilepaka enaiposha Babilon, eitemoyioki ninye te lelo apir le naiposha kumok." 
Jeremiah51:43 Etaa nkanas enyena entoki naitureisho enkop natoiwuo olpurkel, enkop nememanya hoo ng'ae nemeim hoo oltung'ani atua ninye." 
Jeremiah51:44 Naa kaitame nanu ina ai e Babilon naji Bel, naitayu tiatua enkutuk enye ina toki natoijoyie meitoki nkuapi aarukokino ninye etusulari esuntai e Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:45 “Empang'a enchom te mpolos enye, lo tung'ana laainei! Nchoo pooki tung'ani eitajeu enkishui enye teina goro napi o Laitoriani!" 
Jeremiah51:46 Emimputukunyunyu nimiruturutu teilo marenke oning'o te nkop tenelotu olomoni to lari obo. Neitoki ake olomoni alotu to likae ari netii olarrabal enkop nearare oloitoreisho likae oitoreisho. 
Jeremiah51:47 “Neaku, ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i pee aitame nanu nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin e Babilon; neitukurruni enkop enye pooki, ore lelo tung'ana lenyena pooki ootaraki metuata te mpolos enye." 
Jeremiah51:48 Netum taa shumata o enkop, o pooki natii atua ninche, aatarany te ng'ida tenkaraki Babilon amu kelotu oloidaikie aarare ninche oing'uaa moikuape, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah51:49 Meeta nchere mebatata Babilon tenkaraki lelo ootuata le Israel, amu tenkaraki Babilon etabatatate lelo loo nkuapi pooki ootuata." 
Jeremiah51:50 “Ore intae oo imishote to lalem, enchom, emintashe aaitirring'a! Entadamu Olaitoriani tenelakua enchoo Yerusalem elotu ndamunot inyi:" 
Jeremiah51:51 ‘Eitukurruaki iyiook, amu kitoning'o embuaakinoto eimulumulayie esulare inkomomi ang amu eetuo iltung'ana loo loreren atua iwuejitin sinyat e nkaji o Laitoriani!’" 
Jeremiah51:52 “Neaku, ng'ura kepuonu nkolong'i Olaitoriani ojo, pee adung'oki nanu enkiguana nena kitanyaanyukot enyena naa ore tiatua enkop enye pooki neishir te mion lelo oata ilbaa." 
Jeremiah51:53 Ore hoo nerupa Babilon abaiki shumata ore hoo naa keitagol ailepie ine neshurie, ore ake eyia naa kepuonu ilainyalak ooidaikie ooing'uaa enatii nanu aapuonu enetii ninye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Jeremiah51:54 Enining'o! Enkishirata naing'uaa Babilon! Oltoilo le nkidaata kitok eing'uaa enkop oo Lkaldayo! 
Jeremiah51:55 Amu emutita Olaitoriani Babilon neimisie ilo toilo lenye kitok. Ore ilopir lenye neikurrukur anaa ilopir loo nkariak kumok, ore embuakunoto oo ltoiloishi lenye neitabuakuni;" 
Jeremiah51:56 amu eewuo olainyalani shumata ninye, shumata Babilon; ewaki ilmurran lenyena etigilaki nkai enyena aaitaa ngiligilat amu ore Olaitoriani naa Enkai e lap, esipa keitalaku ninye." 
Jeremiah51:57 Kaitemer nanu ilkituaak lenyena o lang'eni lenyena, ilbalusuni lenyena, ilarikok lenyena le njore, o lmurran lenyena; keirura ninche anaake nemeigil aainyototo, olaiguanani ojo, oji enkarna enye Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Jeremiah51:58 Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Ore ina suntai dapash e Babilon naa keitorisiokini enkop aaitadou, ore nena shomito enyena adoru naa kepeji te nkima. Eisiaaisho iltung'ana te mpesho ore nkuapi pooki naa te nkima ake eitanaur ate.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Ele rorei apa eitanapa Yeremia oloiboni le Nkai Seraia olayioni le Neria, olayioni le Mahaseia ina kata apa pee elo tenebo Sedekia olaiguanani le Yuda Babilon, to lari liong'uan le nkitoria enye. Olaitasheikinoni apa Seraia." 
Jeremiah51:60 Neiger apa Yeremia tiatua embuku ina torroni pooki nalotu shumata Babilon, kulo rorei pooki apa eigeroki ooipirta Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:61 Nejoki Yeremia Seraia: “Tinilotu kenya Babilon, toduaa nchere isuma iyie kulo rorei pooki," 
Jeremiah51:62 nijo iyie Olaitoriani, itejo inaaipirta ene wueji nchere iwuang'ie iyie ninye, pee meitoki amanya toki atua ninye, aa tung'ani aashu eng'ues, naa keaku olmuaate ntarasi." 
Jeremiah51:63 “Ore pee indip aisuma ena buku, teeniki ninye isoito ninang'aki empolos olkeju le Frati," 
Jeremiah51:64 nijo, ‘Nji eikoni Babilon aaimisie, pee meigil ae kata adumunye, tenkaraki ina torroni nayau nanu shumata ninye.’ ” Ene ebaiki irorei le Yeremia." 
Jeremiah52:1 Ilarin tikitam oo obo apa eeta Sedekia pee eiteru aitoreisho; neitoreisho ninye ilarin tomon oobo te Yerusalem. Ore apa enkarna e ng'otonye naa keji Hamutal entito e Yeremia le Libna. 
Jeremiah52:2 Neas apa ninye entorroni te dukuya Olaitoriani, te risioroto eina pooki nataasa Yehoiakim." 
Jeremiah52:3 Esipa ore tenkaraki engoro o Laitoriani eetuo mbaa aaikunakino neijia Yerusalem o Yuda neaku etanang'ayie ninye ninche aitung'uaa kewan. Netogolong'ua Sedekia apong'ore olaiguanani le Babilon. 
Jeremiah52:4 Ore to lari lioudo le nkitoria enye, to lapa le tomon, te nkolong e tomon olapa, nelotu Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon tenebo enjore enye pooki agilunore Yerusalem, nemuat aman ninye neshetu esuntai tiauluo aaitaman enkang." 
Jeremiah52:5 Neaku etamuataki apa aaman ina anasa ometabaiki olari le tomon oobo le nkitoria o laiguanani Sedekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ore te nkolong e naaudo o lapa liong'uan nerasu olameyu tiatua ina anasa, nchere meetae apa endaa too ltung'ana leina kop." 
Jeremiah52:7 Neitayuni elusie te suntai eina anasa kewarie, ore iltung'ana pooki lo larrabal neipang aaisik teina anasa kewarie, aaim enkoitoi natii erishata oo sunta are te mbata enkurma o laiguanani. Ore ina kata nemanita ilkaldayo enkanasa. Neim lelo tung'ana le Sedekia enkalo e Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kake etusujaitie enjore oo Lkaldayo olaiguanani, neinepu ninche Sedekia te nkisiajata e Yeriko; ore enjore enye pooki neidapasha aaing'uaa ninye." 
Jeremiah52:9 Neibung ninche olaiguanani, neyau ninye enetii olaiguanani le Babilon te Ribla tiatua enkop e Hamat, nedung'oki ilo aiguanani le Babilon ninye enkiguana." 
Jeremiah52:10 Near olaiguanani le Babilon ilayiok le Sedekia metuata te dukuya ninye neitoki sii aar metuata ilkituaak pooki le Yuda te Ribla. 
Jeremiah52:11 Nekurtu ninye nkonyek e Sedekia neen ninye too lpisia, neya olaiguanani le Babilon ninye Babilon, nepik ninye korokoroni ometabaiki enkolong enkeeya enye." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ore to lapa le imiet, te nkolong e tomon o lapa aa olari apa le tomon ooudo le nkitoria o laiguanani Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon ore Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore apa oisiaai olaiguanani le Babilon, nejing Yerusalem." 
Jeremiah52:13 Nepejoo ninye enkaji o Laitoriani, o enkaji o laiguanani, o nkajijik pooki e Yerusalem; ore pooki aji kitok nepejoo ninye." 
Jeremiah52:14 Ore ina jore pooki oo Lkaldayo apa natii tenebo ilo kitok le rripore negil isunta pooki naamanita Yerusalem. 
Jeremiah52:15 Neya Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore araya embata oo ltung'ana aisinak o kulikae tung'ana pooki apa ootung'uayioki teina anasa o lelo apa ooisikakitia olaiguanani le Babilon, tenebo lelo aisiaayiak arriyiak." 
Jeremiah52:16 Kake etung'uayie apa Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore embata oo ltung'ana aisinak oleng pee eing'or isabibu neturisho. 
Jeremiah52:17 Ore apa ing'apeta o suyai naatii atua enkaji o Laitoriani o nkitotoneta e ilo moti le nkare lo suyai apa otii atua enkaji o Laitoriani, nebel Ilkaldayo aaitaa mbelibelat, nenap osuyai pooki aaya Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:18 Neya ninche imotioo, o nchempei o ntokitin o ltaa o ngirran, o masaa naapejieki enkorropil o masaa pooki osuyai apa naasishoreki te nkisiaayiare e nkaji e Nkai." 
Jeremiah52:19 Ewaki sii ngirran kutiti, o ntokitin nainokieki enkima, o ngirran sapuki o motio, o iketa oo ltaai o ntokitin naapejieki enkorropil o lbakulini ooitukuoreki. Ore apa ina nara sahabu neya ilo kitok le rripore anaa sahabu, ore enapa nara enkosholai, neya anaa enkosholai." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ore apa nena ng'apeta are, o ilo moti obo le nkare o lelo oing'ok tomon oare lo suyai apa otii abori ilo moti le nkare, o nena kitasheta apa naaitobira Solomon olaiguanani tenkaraki enkaji o Laitoriani, ore osuyai le kuna tokitin pooki nemeipimoyu te nkiroishi." 
Jeremiah52:21 Ore ing'apeta enkadoro eng'ape nabo naa ntemat tomon o isiet e nkaina ore ne emanaroto enye naa ntemat tomon oare, ore enkirrushai enye naa ntemat oo lkimojik oong'uan naa keudo empolos." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ore enchumata enye netii osuyai, ore enkadori e nchumata nabo naa ntemat imiet e nkaina, neikodo too lgululu oopurupurana, naa ilo suyai pooki netii enchumata enye aaman. Ore enkae ng'ape naaneijia eikununo, eeta ilgululu oopurupurana." 
Jeremiah52:23 Etii apa ilgululu oopurupurana ntomoni naaudo o ile mbat enye, ore lelo gululu oopurupurana naa iip nabo neikodokino te manarato." 
Jeremiah52:24 Neya ilo kitok le rripore Seraia ilo apolosani kitok, o Sefania ilo apolosani osujita ninye te nkitoo, o lelo arripok kituaak okuni le kishomi;" 
Jeremiah52:25 ore te nkanasa neya olkitok apa laa ninye oitasheiki enjore, o ltung'ana oopishana le nkiguana o laiguanani, ooinepuaki tiatua enkanasa, o laigeroni lo lkitok le njore laa ninye apa oiger iltung'ana leina kop, o ltung'ana ntomoni ile loo ltung'ana leina kop ooinepuaki te mpolos eina anasa." 
Jeremiah52:26 Neya ninche Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore ayaki olaiguanani le Babilon te Ribla. 
Jeremiah52:27 Near olaiguanani le Babilon ninche metuata te Ribla tiatua enkop e Hamat. Neaku eibung'aki Yuda aaraya neitung'uari enkop enye. 
Jeremiah52:28 Ena esiana oo ltung'ana oowa Nebukadresa eyararoto: ore to lari liopishana, naa Ilyahudi nkalifuni uni o tikitam oo kuni." 
Jeremiah52:29 Ore to lari le tomon oisiet le Nebukadresa neya ninye araya aitung'uaa Yerusalem iltung'ana iip isiet o tomoni uni o are. 
Jeremiah52:30 Ore to lari le tikitam oo kuni le Nebukadresa, neya Nebusaradan ilo kitok le rripore araya Ilyahudi iip naapishana o artam o imiet; era esiana oo ltung'ana pooki nkalifuni ong'uan o iip ile." 
Jeremiah52:31 Naa ore to lari le tomoni uni oopishana le yararoto e Yohoiakim olaiguanani le Yuda, to lapa le tomon o are, te nkolong e tikitam o imiet o lapa, ore teilo ari otaarayie Efi-Merodak olaiguanani le Babilon, neitopok ninye Yehoiakim ilo aiguanani le Yuda, neitayu ninye aitung'uaa korokoroni;" 
Jeremiah52:32 neirorie ninye te supatisho, neisho ninye olorika olang ilorikan loo laiguanak apa ootii tenebo ninye te Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:33 Neitayu Yehoiakim nena kilani enyena apa e korokoroni. Ore nkolong'i pooki te nkishui enye nedaa ninye anaake te misa o laiguanani; 
Jeremiah52:34 ore tialo nkolati enyena, keisho apa ninye olaiguanani enkishooroto anaake te risioroto eyieunoto enye, ometabaiki enkolong e keeya enye, anaa ake duoo neishu." 
Lamentations1:1 Ebaa ena liyio natii enkanasa e Yerusalem, nabore apa iltung'ana! Ina apa naa ninye enkitok alang nkuapi! Ina apa naata enkitoo too loreren, netotiwuo taata anaa enkoliai." 
Lamentations1:2 Eishir ninye te mion kewarie, etii ilkiyio ntakul enyena; ore tiatua lelo sanchan lenyena pooki meetae hoo obo oitagol ninye eibelekenyate ilchoreta lenyena pooki etaa ninche ilmang'ati lenyena." 
Lamentations1:3 Eshomo Yuda eyararoto te nkaraki osina. O te nkaraki enkisiaayiare nagol; ebikito taata ninye tiatua iloreren; kake eitu etum ewueji neyeng'iyeng'are. Ore lelo oomirita ninye neineputua ninye tiatua ilo sina lenye. 
Lamentations1:4 Ore nkoitoi naapuo Sion, naa olkiyioi, amu meetae oltung'ani olotu lelo siruai oogeluno, etoliyiote nchomito enyena pooki eig'orita ilapolosak lenyena te mion; neteyietayioki intoyie enyena aaya; ore ninye makewan neeta olosilisili te mion sapuk." 
Lamentations1:5 Etaa ilmang'ati lenyena ooitoreisho. Etubula ilmang'ati lenyena enkaraki naishoo ninye Olaitoriani menoto osina, te nkaraki enkumoi oo nkitarruorrot eshomo nkera enyena eyararoto, ereuta ilmang'ati lenyena." 
Lamentations1:6 Ore ina tito e Sion etung'uayie enkitoo pooki. Etotiutuo ilkituaak lenyena, anaa eng'ues natala enedaare. Eilanyisho ninche neeta engolon te dukuya ilo omirta ninye." 
Lamentations1:7 Edamu Yerusalem nkolong'i enyena olosilisili o emion, mbaa pooki naatulusoitie, apa naa nkunenyena ebaiki moitie. Ina kata apa pee ejing iltung'ana lenyena, enkaina olmang'atinta, nemeetae hoo obo oretu ninye. Neikordod olmang'atinta ninye, nesurdaany teina batatata enye." 
Lamentations1:8 Etaasa Yerusalem eng'oki torrono ore enkaraki ina etaa ninye olminong; ore apa pooki ooyanyit ninye netemena, amu etoduaa ninye emasipaisho enye; ee eishirita ninye makewan te mion, neibelekeny enkomom enye aing'or idia alo." 
Lamentations1:9 Etii olduruk lenye olkila lenye eitu ninye edamu enkidaata enye ore enkaraki ina aikitok embatatata enye. Meeta ninye oltung'ani oitagol ninye. Olaitoriani, ing'ura osina lai, amu eisula olmang'atinta." 
Lamentations1:10 Etalaa olmang'atinta nkaik enyena, aisalaashaki ntokitin enyena pooki e tipat ee, etoduaa ninye iloreren eibung ewueji enye sinyati, lelo apa litomitioko iyie ejing atua eumata ino." 
Lamentations1:11 Eigorito iltung'ana lenyena pooki, eing'oru endaa, newalunye ntokitin enye e tipat endaa, ejo pee eitoki aagolu. “Ng'ura Olaitoriani, naa toduaa, amu aatemenaki nanu.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Aime toki te intae pooki, lelo oogiroo? Eng'ura nidolidolo, tenaa keetae osina onyaanyukie osina lai oyawuaki shumata nanu, ilo laatipika Olaitoriani teina olong e ngoro enye napi." 
Lamentations1:13 Eitadowuo ninye enkima te shumata; nereu apik iloik laainei neisalaashaki nkejek aainei orreshet; naaibelekeny ninye nanu, aatung'uayie ninye aidang'ita naiterre endama pooki." 
Lamentations1:14 Eteenikiaki nkitarruorot aainei pooki enchata oo murto; te nkaina enye eteenaki aakurraki tenebo; nepiki ninche emurt ai, neisho ninye engolon ai meishunye; aaishooyie Olaitoriani apik nkaik e lelo lemaidim aitasheikinore." 
Lamentations1:15 Eitaa Olaitoriani pesho iltung'ana laainei pooki magil, tiatua empolos ai; eipotuo ninye olturrur maatigilunore nanu. Pee epurdipurdi ilbarnot laainei; eitunyo Olaitoriani anaa enkironyet ina selenkei e Yuda."
