Lamentations1:16 Ore te nkaraki kuna baa naishir nanu; neruko ilkiyio too nkonyek aainei, amu elakua olaaitagol nanu, ilo laaputu manyaaki apiju; eliyio nkera aainei, amu etimirishe olmang'atinta.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Etaalaa Sion nkaik enyena, aitorioo, kake meetae oloitagol ninye, eitanapishe Olaitoriani tialo Yakobo, nchere ore ilelatia enye pooki naa keaku ilmang'ati lenyena; etaa Yerusalem entoki naiduruk olminong tiatua ninche." 
Lamentations1:18 “Olaitoriani ninye olasipani; amu atogolong'ua nanu apaash ororei lenye; kake entoning intae iloreren nidolidolo isinaitin laainei; ore ntoyie aainei o lbarnot laainei eshomo eyararoto. 
Lamentations1:19 Aipotuo nanu isanchan laainei, kake aateleja ninche, ore ilapolosak laainei o lpayiani neidaa tiatua enkanasa ina kata eing'oru ninche endaa pee eitang'ejuk engolon enye." 
Lamentations1:20 Ng'ura, Olaitoriani, amu atii nanu atua osina. Etii oltau lai atua enyamali, eibelekenye oltau lai tiatua nanu enkaraki nara apa nanu oltung'ani kiserut oleng, ore te nkoitoi nalala enkanasa neitayu olalem nkera okishin, ore tiatua aji netiu anaa keeya." 
Lamentations1:21 Toning'o enkigoroto ai metii hoo obo laaitagol nanu etoning'o ilmang'ati laainei pooki enyamali ai etishipate nchere itaasa iyie ina. Iyau iyie ina olong apa nitolimuo, nincho ninche etiu anaa nanu." 
Lamentations1:22 Nchoo nkiaasin enye pooki torrok epuonu dukuya iyie nintaas ninche anaa enikintaasa nanu te nkaraki nkitarruorot aainei pooki amu kumok nkishirat aainei e mion neiterria oltau lai.” 
Lamentations2:1 Kebaa engoro Olaitoriani natipikie ninye ina tito e Sion abori enkatampoi! Etanang'ua ninye te keper anang'ie e nkop, ina sikar e Israel, eitu ninye edamu olorika loo nkejek enyena teina olong e ngoro enye." 
Lamentations2:2 Eidaikie Olaitoriani metii olng'ur, emanyisho pooki e Yakobo ore te ngoro enye netigila ninye isempewueti pooki leina tito e Yuda. Etuuroko ninye ninche enkop asul enkitoria o laitoriak lenye." 
Lamentations2:3 Etusulaka enkop te ngoro napi emagilanisho pooki e Israel; eiwuang'ie te ninche enkaina enye e tatene, te dukuya ilmang'ati lenye. Eyupuyupo ninye anaa olang'at le nkima tiatua Yakobo, ainos pooki wueji." 
Lamentations2:4 Eteyietuo ninye enkawuo enye anaa olmang'atinta, ore te nkaina enye e tatene nesesekuanisho anaa olmang'atinta, netasesekuana ninye ntokitin pooki niking'idare, tiatua ilo ng'obor le ntito e Sion; etubukuo ninye engoro enye napi anaa enkima." 
Lamentations2:5 Etotiwuo Olaitoriani anaa olmang'atinta, eidaikie ninye Israel, eidaikie ninye wuejitin enyena pooki enkitoo neitomijoon isempewueti lenyena netopona ninye tiatua ina tito e Yuda osina o enkishirata." 
Lamentations2:6 Etigila ninye olpaashe lenye anaa olpaashe le nkurma, neitomijoon ewueji oo siruai oogeluno; eishie Olaitoriani tiatua Sion isiruai oogeluno o sabato ore te ngoro enye napi netemenayie ilaiguanak o lapolosak." 
Lamentations2:7 Eiturrayie Olaitoriani olperere lo lasar lenye, etanya ewueji enye sinyati; etipika ninye nkaik oo lmang'ati isunta oo wuejitin enkitoo; nejing embuakunoto atua enkaji Olaitoriani, anaa te nkolong o sirua otegeluaki." 
Lamentations2:8 Etootikio Olaitoriani aitomijoon isunta e ina tito e Sion; etudung'uo olpolosie lenye apik olkereri eitu ninye eibooyo enkaina enye pee meidaikie; eyawua ninye oloputukunyi o enkishirata nena sunta, neishunye engolon enye nabo kata." 
Lamentations2:9 Eimiso nchomito enyena te nkop eidaikie ninye negil isekenke enyena; eshomo olaiguanani lenye o lkituaak lenyena atua iloreren; meekure etii enkitanapata, ore iloibonok lenyena eitu eitoki aatum enduaata naing'uaa Olaitoriani." 
Lamentations2:10 Ore ilpayiani leina tito e Sion, netoni te nkop aagira; etipika ninche enterit ilukuny enye neishop ilkuniyiani; ore nena toyie e Yerusalem neirrug ilukuny enye aaitabaiki enkop." 
Lamentations2:11 Etanaurate nkonyek aainei te nkishirata eeta oltau lai emion o sina, eiputa oltau lai emion te nkaraki enkidaata e ntito oo ltung'ana laainei enkaraki naiterre nkera o looyoni, tiatua nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa." 
Lamentations2:12 Eishiraki ninche noo ng'otonye ejo, “Koree endaa enaisho oo sabibu?” Eiterriaa anaa iltung'ana oata ilbaa, too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa, eishunye enkishui enye too lgooitie loo noo ng'otonye." 
Lamentations2:13 Kaa nanu ajo tialo iyie, kainyoo aaitanyaanyukie iyie, na tito e Yerusalem? Kainyoo nanu aaitanyaanyukie te iyie pee aatum aitagolo, na tito e Sion? Amu elala anaa enaiposha enkidaata ino; kaing'ae likinchiunye iyie?" 
Lamentations2:14 Etoduaakita intae iloibonok linyi elejare o nduaat naapong'ori; eitu ninche eitodolu entorroni inyi pee errinyu intae te araroto, kake etodua te nkaraki intae olkilikuai le lejare opong'ori." 
Lamentations2:15 Ore pooki ooim enkoitoi neosh nkaik te nkaraki intae; neing'asia neipirripir ilukuny enye te nkaraki entito e Yerusalem; nejo, “Kena anasa apa eji enaiting'ie esidano, eng'ida e nkop pooki?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Ore ilmang'ati linono neng'a nkutukie te nkaraki iyie neing'asia neony ilala, neishir aajo, kindaikie iyiook ninye! Ee, ena olong apa kitaanyutua iyiook; kinotito taata, kidolita taata!" 
Lamentations2:17 Etaasa Olaitoriani ina apa nayieu, eitabayie ena yieunoto enye; anaa apake enategelua te moitie, etigila metii olng'ur, eishoo ninye ilmang'ati meting'idata te nkaraki iyie, neitulusoo emagilanisho oo lmang'ati linyi." 
Lamentations2:18 Tabuaku nchiraki Olaitoriani! Na tito e Sion! Nchoo ilkiyio linono eruko anaa olkeju dama o kewarie, miyeng'iyeng'a, miyeng'iyeng'ie nkonyek inono!" 
Lamentations2:19 Tuputunye nchira kewarie, te nkiterunoto e pooki kata e rripore! Mbukoi oltau lino anaa enkare te dukuya Olaitoriani! Ilepie nkaik inono te dukuya ninye, te nkaraki enkishui oo nkera inono, naaiterre to lameyu te nkiterunoto e pooki oitoi nalala e nkanasa." 
Lamentations2:20 Ing'ura Olaitoriani nidol! Kaing'ae iyie intaasa ina? Keaku keinos nkituaak nkera enye naatoiutuo nena kera enye naamana naatii nkaik enye? Keaku keyieng'i olapolosani o loiboni tiatua ewueji sinyati o Laitoriani? 
Lamentations2:21 Eirragaa too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa ilooti o lbotoro; ore ntoyie aainei o lbarnot laainei netabatate to lalem; ore teina olong e ngoro ino nitasesekuana iyie ninche, nisesekuan metii olng'ur." 
Lamentations2:22 Impotuo iyie ninche anaa iloopuonu osirua otegeluaki, neimu olkirutoto lai pooki shoto; naa ore teina olong e ngoro o Laitoriani meetae oloimishe arashu oloshomo eishu. Ore lelo apa latanapa naitubulu eidaikie olmang'atinta lai." 
Lamentations3:1 Ara nanu oltung'ani otoduaa osina tiabori eng'udi e ngoro enye napi; 
Lamentations3:2 aaterewa ninye naayau nanu enaimin metii hoo ewang'an; 
Lamentations3:3 esipa nanu egilunore enkaina enye nkatitin pooki endama pooki. 
Lamentations3:4 Aaitasasa nanu nemugut olchoni lo sesen lai negil iloik laainei; 
Lamentations3:5 aatamuata ninye nanu naaimulumul te mion o sina. 
Lamentations3:6 Aaishoo ninye nanu matobiko tiatua enaimin anaa olotua apa moitie. 
Lamentations3:7 Aaitamana nanu esuntai pee maisik; naapik nanu olpisiai oiroishi. 
Lamentations3:8 Ore hoo naipotishe naishiru eretoto neikeno ninye enkomon ai. 
Lamentations3:9 Etunuka ninye inkoitoi aainei too soito, nelojiloj ninye inkoitoi aainei aboiboin." 
Lamentations3:10 Etiu ninye te nanu anaa olng'arurumi orreshisho, etiu anaa olng'atuny oisudori airrag." 
Lamentations3:11 Aaitapaasha ninye enkoitoi ai naaitaa nanu mpurdat aaitoliyio ninye nanu; 
Lamentations3:12 eteyietuo ninye enkawuo enye naiul nanu aarie osuyiet too mbaa enyena. 
Lamentations3:13 Eishaka ninye atua oltau lai mbaa e mootian enye. 
Lamentations3:14 Ataa nanu entoki nakueniyieki too ltung'ana pooki, ataa osinkolio lenye endama pooki." 
Lamentations3:15 Aaiputa ninye nanu emion naairuji nanu olkurto. 
Lamentations3:16 Etarrarra ninye ilala laainei to sinyai naaimulumul nanu too nkuruon. 
Lamentations3:17 Eitalamayioki oltau lai aarishie eseriani, aatorikinote nanu mbaa e nchipai." 
Lamentations3:18 Neaku ajo nanu, “Eshomo enkitoo ai neshomo enkisiligunoto ai naing'uaa Olaitoriani.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Tadamu osina lai o emion ai o lkurto o lodua. 
Lamentations3:20 Edamu oltau lai kuna anaake neirrugo oltau lai tiatua nanu. 
Lamentations3:21 Kake tenadamu nanu kuna, natum osiligi." 
Lamentations3:22 Meish ae kata enyorrata o Laitoriani nauno, meish ae kata olng'ur lenye." 
Lamentations3:23 Ng'ejuko ninche anaake tadekenya, aikitok esupatisho enye." 
Lamentations3:24 “Olaitoriani ninye erubata ai” neijia ejo oltau lai, “Ore enkaraki ina kaisilig nanu ninye.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Aisupat Olaitoriani te lelo oanyu ninye, te lelo ooing'oru ninye." 
Lamentations3:26 Eisidai teneitirring'a oltung'ani aanyu enjeunoto o Laitoriani. 
Lamentations3:27 Eisidai tenenap oltung'ani enchata e murt nanapishoreki te kitisho enye. 
Lamentations3:28 Nchoo ninye egira aitirring'a openy teneiteleikini ninye; 
Lamentations3:29 nchoo ninye eitabaiki enkutuk enye enterit, amu ebaiki netii osiligi." 
Lamentations3:30 Nchoo ninye meishoo eseder enye ilo ooshisho; neiputi ninye imorot. 
Lamentations3:31 Amu meiturraa Olaitoriani ninye ntarasi. 
Lamentations3:32 Kake ore hoo neyau osina, ketum ninye olng'ur, te risioroto e sapuko e nyorrata enye nauno;" 
Lamentations3:33 amu meotiki ninye aitameisho arashu epik osina nkera e tung'ana. 
Lamentations3:34 Apurdaki enkop too nkejek, lelo pooki ooena te nkop." 
Lamentations3:35 Pee eibelekeny esipata oltung'ani te dukuya ilo otii shumata aisul," 
Lamentations3:36 neibelekeny esipata too nkiguanat, menyorraa Olaitoriani nena." 
Lamentations3:37 Kaing'ae oiro embae nebaya aaku," 
Lamentations3:38 teneme Olaitoriani otonyorrayie? 
Lamentations3:39 Kainyoo pee eilepilep iltung'ana ooishu, kainyoo pee eilepilep oltung'ani te nkitamioto oo ng'ok enyena?" 
Lamentations3:40 Maineneng'a nikijurru nkoitoi ang, nikirrinyokino Olaitoriani!" 
Lamentations3:41 Mailepie iltauja lang o nkaik ang, aailepakinye Enkai natii keper:" 
Lamentations3:42 “Kitapong'ori iyiook nikitogolong'utua, neitu iyie ipalaki iyiook." 
Lamentations3:43 Kimputa iyie engoro oleng nimir iyiook nisesekuan metii olng'ur; 
Lamentations3:44 imulumula iyie kewan te nkatampoi neaku meetae enkomono, naimu abau enitii." 
Lamentations3:45 Ntaa iyie iyiook isuut o ntokitin e pesho, tiatua iltung'ana." 
Lamentations3:46 Ore ilmang'ati lang pooki neng'a nkutukie te nkaraki iyiook. 
Lamentations3:47 Eewuo olkirutoto o esulakinoto e ngumoto shumata iyiook, eliyio o enkidaata." 
Lamentations3:48 Eruko ilkejek loo lkiyio too nkonyek aainei, te nkaraki enkidaata e ntito oo ltung'ana laainei." 
Lamentations3:49 Keruko ilkiyio too nkonyek aainei nemeish, nemegem ae kata," 
Lamentations3:50 ometaba anaa neing'or Olaitoriani te keper nedol asipu; 
Lamentations3:51 aatipika nanu nkonyek aainei osina te nkaraki nena silan e nkanasa ai. 
Lamentations3:52 Aatarreshoki nanu anaa emotonyi, lelo mang'ati laainei metii emporeet." 
Lamentations3:53 Aasulaki ninche engumoto naanang too soito; 
Lamentations3:54 naaimisie enkare endukuya ai; najo, ‘Aimina nanu.’" 
Lamentations3:55 Aipoto nanu enkarna ino iyie Olaitoriani atii enguton e ngumoto. 
Lamentations3:56 Ining iyie esayiata ai, ‘Minken iyie enkiok ino, te nkishirata ai te nkaraki eretoto!’" 
Lamentations3:57 Itinyikua iyie ina kata peyie aaipot nanu iyie, itejo iyie, ‘Miureishoyu!’" 
Lamentations3:58 Kitomituo iyie nanu Olaitoriani, itokordua iyie enkishui ai." 
Lamentations3:59 Itoduaa iyie entorrono naaitaasaki nanu, Olaitoriani, tudung'okoki iyie nanu enkiguana." 
Lamentations3:60 Itoduaa iyie elap enye pooki nena kitobirat enye pooki te nkaraki nanu. 
Lamentations3:61 Itoning'o iyie imorot enye, Olaitoriani nena kitobirat enye pooki te nkaraki nanu." 
Lamentations3:62 Ore nkirorot o ndamunot oo lmang'ati laainei, naa nanu egilunore endama pooki." 
Lamentations3:63 Ng'ura ore etoni o eitashe, naa nanu ake eimaki eranyisho." 
Lamentations3:64 Ntalaku iyie te ninche Olaitoriani, te risioroto e siaai oo nkaik enye." 
Lamentations3:65 Ipik iyie iltauja lenye emodai; nelotu oldeket lino shumata ninche. 
Lamentations3:66 Nisujaa iyie ninche te ngoro nindaikie ninche; aiwuang'ie tiabori keper ino, Olaitoriani.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Kainyoo pee meekure ewang sahabu. Kainyoo pee eibelekenye sahabu nasila! Ore lelo soito oosinya neirragaa aaidapasha te nkiterunoto e pooki oitoi nalala e nkanasa. 
Lamentations4:2 Ore ilayiok le Sion le tipat anaa sahabu sidan nesila, kainyoo pee etotiutuo anaa motioo oo nkulupuok, esiaai oo nkaik o laitobirani!" 
Lamentations4:3 Ore ninye mbariak keisho ilki neitanak nkera kake ore entito oo ltung'ana laainei netagogong'o, etotiuo anaa isidan tiong'ota." 
Lamentations4:4 Ore olng'ejep le nkerai nanakita, neibung enoret te nkure; neomonu nkera endaa, kake meetae oloisho ninche." 
Lamentations4:5 Ore lelo oodaa te sikar, neidak too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa; ore lelo apa ootamoo eishop nkilani pilei neirrag too lchalai loo nkuruon." 
Lamentations4:6 Ore enkitamioto entito oo ltung'ana laainei naa eikitok, alang enkitamioto e sodom, apa natusulayioki nabo kata, nemeetae enkaina naiteleikiaki ninye." 
Lamentations4:7 Ore apa ilkituaak lenyena newang aalang enturoto, neibor aalang kule; ore iseseni lenye nenyokioo aalang intoto sidain, ore enkishiaa enye newang anaa oltotoi oji safire." 
Lamentations4:8 Netorokita taata nkomomi enye aalang nkuk, meekure eyiolounoyu too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa; neibibiari iseseni lenye aarep iloik te saso netoito anaa nkeek." 
Lamentations4:9 Enaikash apa lelo ootaraki to lalem, alang lelo ooya olameyu lelo oo temenate, ootomitiokoki ilng'anayio le nkop." 
Lamentations4:10 Ore nkaik e nena kituaak naata olng'ur neitokitokie nkera enye maate; neitaa ninche endaa enye, teina kidaata e ntito oo ltung'ana laainei." 
Lamentations4:11 Eitabayie Olaitoriani engoro enye etubukuo ninye engoro enye nairowua; neiyupuyup anaa enkima te Sion, nemut ilkitamanyunot lenyena." 
Lamentations4:12 Eitu apa enyorraa ilaiguanak le nkop anaa hoo obo le lelo oomanya enkop, nchere keidim olmang'atinta atijing'u nchomito e Yerusalem." 
Lamentations4:13 Ore ena naa te nkaraki ing'ok oo loibonok le Nkai o ntorrok oo lapolosak lenyena lelo ooibukoo te mpolos enye osarge le lelo lemeeta entioto. 
Lamentations4:14 Nelimana ninche too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa medolisho, eeta olduruk lo sarge. Nemeetae ninye oltung'ani oiseyie ilkilani lenye." 
Lamentations4:15 Nejoki iltung'ana ninche, “Entalamari ilooiduruk Entalamari, Entalamari! Emiseyie!” Neaku etaa ninche ilaisikak oloolimana; nejo iltung'ana too nkuapi, “Meigil ae kata aatoni tenebo iyiook.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Olaitoriani makewan oidapasha ninche meigil ae kata ninye ashilaa ninche nemeigili aayanyitu ilapolosak nemeikiroteti ilpayiani. 
Lamentations4:17 Eiliilaitie nkonyek ang eisiligu eretoto nemetii, ore te rripore ang, nikiaanyu olorere lemeidim aaitajeusho." 
Lamentations4:18 Nerreshu iltung'ana iroruat ang, ometaa meekure kipuo aaim nkoitoi ang naalala, nenyiku enkiting'oto ang, neaku kuti nkolong'i ang, amu etabawua enkiting'oto ang." 
Lamentations4:19 Keneneng lelo oomirita iyiook aalang ilmotonyi oopuo tiaai nemir ninche iyiook too ldoinyo neirrag ninche aarresh iyiook tiong'ota. 
Lamentations4:20 Ore enkiyang'et oo nkumeishin ang, ilo otubukoko Olaitoriani eilata aput, neyae too nkumeishin enye ilo apa likitejo iyiook, “Tiabori oloip lenye kipuo aatoni tiatua iloreren.”" 
Lamentations4:21 Ting'idayu nishipa na tito e Edom, ina namanya enkop e Usi, ore sii iyie eikiimarieki enkikompe; ilo iyie amera ninturraa ilkilani niaaku enemeishopo." 
Lamentations4:22 Ore enkitamioto e ng'oki ino, na tito e Sion neitabayioki, meekure ninye kingil aibok te eyararoto ae kata, kake ore eng'oki ino naa tito e Edom, ninye eitamei, kebolu ninye ing'ok inono." 
Lamentations5:1 Tadamu Olaitoriani ena bae natadoikio iyiook; ing'ura nidol enkurruna ang. 
Lamentations5:2 Ore enjung'ore ang neibelekenyakaki iltung'ana leeiking'a, ore nkang'itie ang neaku inoo ltung'ana leeiking'a." 
Lamentations5:3 Kitaa iyiook okishin, lemeeta loomenye etiu noo yieyio anaa nkolia." 
Lamentations5:4 Meeta nchere mikilak enkare nikiok ore ilkeek likitum aainok keinyiang'uni. 
Lamentations5:5 Eturrumoyioki iyiook kiaata enchata oo murto nanapishoreki too murto. Kinaurate iyiook neitu eishori iyiook enkiyeng'iyeng. 
Lamentations5:6 Kisiaayia iyiook Misiri o Asiria, pee kitum endaa naraposh iyiook." 
Lamentations5:7 Etaasa apa loopapa eng'oki, nemeekure eetae; kinapita iyiook entorroni enye." 
Lamentations5:8 Eitoreita iyiook irrindiki; nemeetae olokordu iyiook aitayu too nkaik enye. 
Lamentations5:9 Kipik iyiook enkishui ang batisho pee kitum endaa, te nkaraki ilo alem tiong'ota." 
Lamentations5:10 Eirowuaja iseseni lang anaa olkokuet, te nkaraki enkolong napejisho o lameyu." 
Lamentations5:11 Ebatata nkituaak te Sion, o selenken too nkang'itie e Yuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Neiki ilkituaak aaisiong too nkaik enye; nemeyanyiti ilpayiani kituaak. 
Lamentations5:13 Nearakini ilbarnot meidong'isho te wueji neidong'ishoreki neitaari inkayiok ilolan loo lkeek. 
Lamentations5:14 Eisha ntonat oo lpayiani too leng'ot neisha eranyata o sinkolio too lbarnot. 
Lamentations5:15 Eisha eng'ida oo ltauja lang, neibelekenye eranyata ang osinkolio aaku enkishirata." 
Lamentations5:16 Eiwuang'ieki enkopiyia e nkitoo te ndukuya ang; oi iyiook, amu kitaasa iyiook eng'oki!" 
Lamentations5:17 Enkaraki ena pee etamuoita iltauja lang, enkaraki ena pee eiliilaitie nkonyek ang," 
Lamentations5:18 amu ore ilo doinyo le Sion otoliyie netamanya mbariak. 
Lamentations5:19 Kake ore iyie, Olaitoriani, ntoreisho ntarasi; ebikoo olorika lino le nkitoo too ishoritin pooki." 
Lamentations5:20 Kainyoo iyie pee midamu iyiook ntarasi, kainyoo iyie pee inturraa iyiook te nkata naado?" 
Lamentations5:21 Torrinyoki iyiook kewan ino Olaitoriani, pee kitum aatorrinyunye! Ntang'ejuko nkolong'i ang metotiwuo anaa apa!" 
Lamentations5:22 Anaa itanya iyiook tukul. Itagorokine doi iyiook tukul? 
Ezekiel1:1 Ore to lari le tomoni uni, to lapa liong'uan, te nkolong e miet, o lapa, ina kata atii tenebo yarunot te mbata olkeju le Keba, nebolo keper nadol induaat e Nkai." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ore te nkolong e imiet olapa (naa olari le imiet le yararoto olaiguanani Yehoiakin)," 
Ezekiel1:3 nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Esekiel ilo apolosani, olayioni le Busi teina kop oo Ilkaldayo te mbata olkeju le Keba; netii apa enkaina o Laitoriani shumata enye teine." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ore aing'orisho, ng'ura, nadol osiwuo le nchan olotu aing'uaa enkalo e moikuape, o enkatampoi sapuk, o enkimerlel namanita ninye, olng'ejepa le nkima ooidikidiko, ore te mpolos enkima, netiu anaa entoki enkimerlel o suyai." 
Ezekiel1:5 Ore te mpolos enye nepuku enkitanyaanyukoto oo ng'uesi ong'uan naaishu. Naa nji apa eikununo eliooto enye: eeta apa pooki enyaanyukie e tung'ana," 
Ezekiel1:6 nemeeta ake nabo nemeeta nkomomi ong'uan, neeta ake nabo te ninche inaipuko ong'uan." 
Ezekiel1:7 Ore inkejek enye naa keitoriori, ore ndapi oo nkejek enye netiu anaa loisotok le nkeju olashe neitintil ninche anaa osuyiai otisikaki oleng." 
Ezekiel1:8 Ore tiabori oo naipuko enye too matuan enye pokira ong'uan neeta nkaik oo ltung'ana. Neeta pokira nena ong'uan inkomomi enye o naipuko enye eikununo nji: 
Ezekiel1:9 Eibung'a nena aipuko, nepuo pooki dukuya, meibelekenya epuo." 
Ezekiel1:10 Ore enyaanyukie oo nkomomi enye, eeta ake nabo te ninche enkomom o ltung'ani te dukuya; ore pokira ong'uan neeta enkomom olng'atuny te matua e tatene, ore pokira ong'uan neeta enkomom olkitengte nkalo e kedienye, neeta pokira ong'uan enkomom olkurragos tesiadi." 
Ezekiel1:11 Neijia apa etiu nkomomi enye. Ore inaipuko enye nelak aaitorioo meeta ake eng'ues nemeeta inaipuko are, nemeeta ake enemeibung'ita enaipukoi enkae, nenunua are too seseni lenye." 
Ezekiel1:12 Nelo ake pooki aitoriori dukuya, ore pooki wueji nelo enkiyang'et, nepuo sii ninche, nemeibelekenya epuo." 
Ezekiel1:13 Ore te mpolos e nena ng'uesi naaishu netii apa entoki natiu anaa nkuk naaishu enkima, netiu anaa iltaai oopuoopuo tiatua nena ng'uesi naaishu; naa kewang apa enkima oleng, nepuku tiatua ina kima enkiwuang'ata." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ore nena ng'uesi naaishu neipirri dukuya netiu, anaa enkiwuang'ata." 
Ezekiel1:15 Ore peyie aing'or nena ng'uesi naaishu, nadol enkeju e ng'arri te nkoriong enkop te mbata e nena ng'uesi naaishu, meeta ake eng'ues nemeitoriokino enkeju nabo te pokira ong'uan." 
Ezekiel1:16 Ore anaa enatiu empukunoto e nena kejek o enkitobirata enye: etiu empukunoto enye anaa enkitiil osoit barrikoi oji Krisolit; neeta pokira oong'uan empukunoto nabo; ore enkitobirata enye netiu apa anaa enkeju eng'arri natii atua enkae keju eng'arri. 
Ezekiel1:17 Ore ina kata napuo, neim ake enkalo pooki te nena aloli enye pokira ong'uan eitu eibelekenya epuo." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ore nena kejek eng'arri pokira ong'uan neeta inkimanaa neeta enchata iltidii ooibung enkeju eng'arri inkejek, nebore enkamanaa oo nkejek eng'arri nkonyek naamanita too nkaloli pooki." 
Ezekiel1:19 Ore pee epuo nena ng'uesi naaishu, neiriamariyie nkejek ninche aashep; ore pee edumunye ng'uesi naaishu te nkop, nedumunye sii nena kejek." 
Ezekiel1:20 Ore pooki wueji nelo enkiyang'et nepuo sii ninche, nedumunye nena kejek tenebo ninche eshepita, amu etii enkiyang'et e nena ng'uesi naaishu nena kejek." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ore pee epuo nena nepuo sii kuna; ore pee eitashe nekua, neitashe sii kuna; ore pee edumunye nekua aing'uaa enkop, nedumunye nena kejek te nebo ninche; amu etii apa enkiyang'et e nena ng'uesi naaishu atua nena kejek oo ng'arrin." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ore te shumata e nena lukuny e nena ng'uesi naaishu netii entoki nanyaanyukie oloing'ang'e le keper, newang oleng anaa soito oibor oleng, neisalaashakino shumata ilukuny enye." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ore tiabori oloing'ang'e neitoriori inaipuko enye aitoriokino dukuya, neipirare enkae enkae; nemeeta ake eng'ues nemeeta inaipuko are naitoipito osesen." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ore epuoito naning oltoilo loo naipuko enye, netiu anaa oltoilo loo nkariak kumok, netiu anaa endarata Olmagilani, oltoilo lo larrabal anaa oltoilo lo lorora; ore ake peyie eitashe inaipuko enye;" 
Ezekiel1:25 nelotu oltoilo oing'uaa oloing'ang'e le keper, oimua shumata lukuny enye; ore pee eitashe aaitirring'a neshuk inaipuko enye." 
Ezekiel1:26 Ore te shumata oloing'ang'e te nchumata oo lukuny enye netii enkitanyaanyukoto olorika le nkitoo, nenyaanyukie osoit pus oji Safi; ore entopij enye netonie enkitanyaanyukoto olorika le nkitoo netii enkitanyaanyukoto naa ijo oltung'ani." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ore ebaiki empolos enye neilep, nadol enkimerlel naikununo anaa osuyai otisikaki, netiu anaa enkima naikenoro te pooki alole; ore ebaiki empolos enye nedoyio nadol etiu anaa enkitanyaanyukoto enkima netii ewang'an namanita ninye." 
Ezekiel1:28 Etiu anaa eliooto olokirrai too nkatampo teina olong enchan neijia apa etiu eliooto e wang'an sapuk namanita ninye. Neijia apa etiu elioto enkitanyaanyukoto enkitoo o Laitoriani. Ore peyie adol ninye, nabatata te nkomom ai naning oltoilo le ilo oirorita." 
Ezekiel2:1 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, inyo ntasho too nkejek inono, amu kaairorie nanu iyie.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Ore peyie aairorie nanu, naajing Enkiyang'et Sinyati atua nanu naaitasheyie maitasho; naning ninye aairorie nanu." 
Ezekiel2:3 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, ekaairriwaa iyie airriwaki iltung'ana loo Siraeli, ilo orere ogolong'u; laatogolong'akita nanu; ore ninche o loo menye netaasa eng'oki te nanu o ena olong." 
Ezekiel2:4 Ore sii kulo tung'ana nemeeta enkanyit negolong'u sii: Ekaairriwaa iyie shomo enetii ninche; nijoki ninche, ‘Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.’" 
Ezekiel2:5 Naa tenaa keinining'u arashu eany ening (amu enkaji kiserut ninche) ekeyiolou aajo etii oshi oloiboni atua ninche. 
Ezekiel2:6 “Ore iyie, enkerai e tung'ani, miureyu ninche, nimiureyu irorei lenye, hoo netii ilaimerrerruak o lkiku tenebo iyie nitonie nkulupani, miureyu irorei lenye, arashu kinture enking'odia enye, amu enkaji kiserut ninche." 
Ezekiel2:7 Naa ilo iyie airo irorei laainei airorie ninche, o tenaa keinining'u arashu eany einining amu enkaji ninche nataa kiserut." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Kake ore iyie, enkerai e tung'ani, ininingu enaajoki iyie; miaku iyie kiserut anaa ina aji kiserut tabolo enkutuk ino inosa ina naaisho iyie.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Ore peyie aing'or, ng'ura, aaitoriokoki nanu enkaina, naa ng'ura, etii olpiyayati le mbuku oigero ina aina;" 
Ezekiel2:10 neisalaash ninye te dukuya nanu; nesira inkaloli pokira e ilo piyayati le mbuku, nesira teine irorei le nkishirata o emion o nkigorot." 
Ezekiel3:1 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, inosa ina nikinchooki iyie; inosa ele piyayati le mbuku, nilo airorie enkaji e Israel.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Metaa atabolo nanu enkutuk ai, naaisho ninye nanu olpiyayati le mbuku mainosa." 
Ezekiel3:3 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, inosa ele piyayati le mbuku laaisho iyie nimput enkoshoke ino ninye.” Metaa ainosa ninye; naa ore etii enkutuk nemelok anaa olkenkei le naisho." 
Ezekiel3:4 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, shomo, tabaiki enkaji e Israel, niro too rorei laainei airorie ninche." 
Ezekiel3:5 Amu eitu kirriwari iyie aairriwaki iltung'ana le likae ng'ejep o enkutuk nagol enkiroroto, kake enkaji e Israel" 
Ezekiel3:6 neme iloreren kumok loo lng'ejepa oopaashaa o enkutuk nagol, ilaa mining'u irorei lenye. Esipa tenaairriwaki iyie kulo, naa aikindim aatoning'u iyie." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kake ore enkaji e Israel nimikinining iyie; amu meyieu ninche naaning nanu amu ore enkaji pooki e Israel naa inoo logol lukuny negolong'u iltauja. 
Ezekiel3:8 Ing'ura ajo aitaa elukunya ino enagol anaa ilukuny enye, naitagol elukunya ino anaa ilukuny enye." 
Ezekiel3:9 Anaa enagol osoit oji almasi alang isoito aitaa elukunya ino neijia; miureyu ninche tukul, nimimputukuny too nking'urat enye, amu enkaji kiserut ninche.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Aanyaaka ake sii ajoki nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore irorei laainei pooki lelo laaliki iyie tang'amai toltau lino nining'u too nkiyiaa inono." 
Ezekiel3:11 Nilo enetii iltung'ana linono ootii eararoto nijoki ninche, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai; toliki ninche ening o meyieu nening.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Ina peyie aadumu enkiyang'et nanu ailepie, ore edumunye enkitoo o Laitoriani te wueji enye, naning te siadi nanu oltoilo sapuk le nkirikirata enkop." 
Ezekiel3:13 Naa oltoilo loo naipuko e nena ng'uesi naaishu eibung'a maate, naning sii nena kejek oo ngarrin naashepita te mbata enye, nening'oyu anaa olokirikiri sapuk le nkop." 
Ezekiel3:14 Naadumu ina Kiyang'et nanu ailepie naaya, nalo te mion enkirowuaj oltau lai, eiroishi ina aina te shumata nanu;" 
Ezekiel3:15 nalotu enetii lelo yarunot te Telabib, lelo ootii enkiyopata olkeju le Keba. Naton teine atunume tenebo ninche nkolong'i naapishana." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ore peyie eishunye inkolong'i naapishana, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii nejo:" 
Ezekiel3:17 “Enkerai e tung'ani, aaitaa iyie olarriponi te nkaji e Israel; ore ake pooki kata nining ororei eing'uaa enkutuk ai, nincho ninche enkikoo naing'uaa enatii." 
Ezekiel3:18 Tenajoki ilo torrono, ‘Meeta nchere aimiye,’ neitu inkok ninye aliki, neitu iro aikok ilo torrono metung'uai enkoitoi enye torrono, peyie etum aitajeu enkishui enye, keye oltung'ani torrono too ntorrok enyena; kake ore osarge lenye naa kaing'oru te nkaina ino." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kake tininkok ilo torrono, nemeibelekenya ninye aing'uaa ntorrok enyena, arashu too nkoitoi enyena, naa keye ninye too ng'ok enyena; kake intajewuo iyie enkishui ino." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Ore ake sii, teneibelekenya oltung'ani supat aing'uaa esupatisho enye neas intorrok, napik entoki narror dukuya enye, naa keye ninye; amu eitu inkok iyie ninye, keye ninye too ng'ok enyena, ore isiaaitin enyena sidain nena naataasa nemeitokini aadamu; kake ore osarge lenye nayieu too nkaik inono." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kake ore ake eyia, tininkok ilo tung'ani supat peyie meas eng'oki, neitu eas eng'oki, nemeeta nchere meton eishu, amu etang'amayie ninye enkikoo; nintajeu iyie enkishui ino.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Netii apa enkaina Olaitoriani shumata nanu; naajoki nanu, “Tudumunye shomo enkisiajata peyie aatum airorie teine.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Metaa atudumunye nalo enkisiajata; naa ng'ura, neitashe enkitoo o Laitoriani teine, neikununo anaa enkitoo apa natoduaa te nkiyopata olkeju le Keba; nabatata te nkomom ai." 
Ezekiel3:24 Kake aatijing'a Enkiyang'et nanu, naadumu aitasheyie too nkejek; naairorie nanu naajoki, “Shomo inkenoi kewan tiatua enkaji ino." 
Ezekiel3:25 Ore iyie nakerai e tung'ani, ing'ura eikipiki iyie inkeenta, naa aikienieki iyie metaa mintoki alo tenebo iltung'ana;" 
Ezekiel3:26 naa kaiterep olng'ejep lino enoret ino, metaa iaku olemeidim airoro aikoo ninche; amu enkaji kiserut ninche." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kake tenaairorie iyie, naabol iyie enkutuk, naa aijoki iyie ninche, ‘Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai;’ ore ilo oning, inchoo ening; ore ilo oany ening, inchoo eany amu enkaji kiserut ninche." 
Ezekiel4:1 “Ore iyie, Nakerai e tung'ani, iwa osoit nirragie te dukuya iyie, nisir ilkererin te ilo soit oitodolu enkanasa e Yerusalem;" 
Ezekiel4:2 nipik emanata amuat Yerusalem, nishetu esuntai aitaman, nituru olong'elu aitaman ninye, intasheyie sii ilng'oborri te mbata, niun ilkedeta aitaman ninye." 
Ezekiel4:3 Niya esaani e sekenkei nipik ninye aitaa esuntai e sekenkei te rishata ino o enkanasa; nintorioki enkomom ino ninye, nincho metaa enatii ewueji osempewuet, nirrumoki osempewuet ninye. Keaku ena olmonekie le nkaji e Israel." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Nirrag iyie te nkalo ino e kedienye, naa kairragie enkitamioto enkaji e Israel te shumata ino; amu ore esiana oo nkolong'i nirrag apetaa, naa inapaki ninche enkitamioto enye." 
Ezekiel4:5 Amu kaaisho nanu iyie nkolong'i esiana oo nkolong'i iip uni o ntomoni naaudo, naarisiore esiana oo larin lenkitamioto enye; metaa erishata naba neijia imbung ina kitamioto enkaji e Israel." 
Ezekiel4:6 Ore peyie indip ena, nintoki airrag eniare, kake ore te nkalo ino e tatene, ninap enkitamioto enkaji e Yuda; inkolong'i artam aatipika ena, enkolong ake to lari pooki." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Naa intorioki enkomom ino ina manata namuati Yerusalem, metii toki enkaina ino; nimbonoki ina anasa." 
Ezekiel4:8 Naa ng'ura, ekaapik iyie inkeenta, metaa mimbelekenyakino ae alo, ometaba anaa niishu nkolong'i inono nimanie ina anasa." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Ore iyie, iwa enkano o shairi, mpoosho o lpompo, o loikempe, o enkurma napuyiapui nipik nena pooki eng'irra nabo, nintobiru emukate te ninche. Ore te siadi e nena olong'i nirrag te murte ino; inkolong'i iip uni o ntomoni naaudo ina mukate." 
Ezekiel4:10 Naa ore endaa ninya naa keineneng'i, inchekelini tikitam te nkolong; ninya enkata nabo te nkolong." 
Ezekiel4:11 Neaku iok enkare te ntemata ematua e ile e hini; niok kata nabo te nkolong. 
Ezekiel4:12 Naa inya ninye anaa emukate e shairi, naa ipeju ninye te nkima nainokieki nkik oo ltung'ana edolita pooki ng'ae.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Neija eiko iltung'ana loo Siraeli tenenya emukate enye eeta oloirerio, tiatua iloreren laitarasaki ninche.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Ina peyie ajo, “Aha, Olaitoriani Enkai! Eitu aekata aisarkionie kewan; ina kata eton ara olbarnoti o matubulu taata eitu aekata anya entoki natua openy arashu enataara ing'uesi e ntim, arashu etijing'a enkutuk ai endaa torrono.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Ina peyie aajoki ninye nanu, “Ing'ura ekaaisho iyie ilboro le modiei e nkiteng te rishata oonkik o ltung'ani, neaku ninye ipejunye emukate ino.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Aanyaaka ake sii ajoki, “Enkerai e tung'ani ing'ura ajo kadung'oo ine neimu emukate e Yerusalem; ee kenya ninche imukateni naaineneng'i te ntemet naineneng'ishoreki te nkuretisho; naa keok enkare naturuni tenking'ashing'ash sapuk." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ekaas ena peyie meitoki aatum emukate o enkare, neing'ura maate te nkidang'ata sapuk, neibiitiari tiatua enkitamioto enye." 
Ezekiel5:1 “Ore iyie, enkerai e tung'ani, iwa olalem opi; intaa olmurunya libarnie kewan, nibarnie elukunya ino tenebo olmunyei lino; niya intemeta naaineneng'ishoreki nior lelo papit." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ore ematua e nabo te uni nipejoo te nkima te mpolos e nkanasa, ore peyie eishunye inkolong'i emanata e nkanasa; ore e matua e nabo te uni niya adung'udung to lalem aitaman enkanasa; ore ematua nabo te uni nindapashaki enkijape, naa kashurtu olalem asujaa ninche." 
Ezekiel5:3 Niya te kulo enkiti siana oo lpapit aeniki olcholoi lo lkila lino. 
Ezekiel5:4 Nintoki aitayu ilkuti te kulo, nipik ninche enkima, nipejoo ninche te nkima; ore te ine nelotu enkima adoiki atua ina aji pooki e Israel.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore ena Yerusalem; aitasheyie ninye te mpolos oo loreren, netii nkuapi naamanita ninye." 
Ezekiel5:6 Neewuo ninye te ntorroni enkiseroto agilunore inkitanapat aainei alang iloreren, negilunore ninye inkitanapat aainei alang nkuapi naamanita ninye, te anyata natanyaita inkitanapat aainei neitu epuoyie nkikoot aainei." 
Ezekiel5:7 Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore amu itarruoitie aalang iloreren oomanita intae neitu ipuopuo too nkiguanat aainei, anaa imbung'ubung'u nkikoot aainei, niasiasa enaas nkitanapat ooloreren oomanita intae;" 
Ezekiel5:8 neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura nanu ilo oarare intae; naa kayau inkiguanat erishata inyi edolita iloshon pooki. 
Ezekiel5:9 Naa ore tenkaraki olminong linyi pooki, kaitaas intae eneitu aekata aitaas intae, anaa enanyaanyukie enemaitoki aikata aas aigil." 
Ezekiel5:10 Metaa kenya iloomenye ilayiok lenye tiatua intae, nenya ilayiok iloomenye, naa kadung'oki intae enkiguana, ore pooki ng'ae linyi oleku naidapashaki inkaloli pooki enkijape." 
Ezekiel5:11 Neaku ore naa anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, esipa tukul, ore amu isarkionie ewueji ai sinyati too ntokitin pooki torrok o siaaitin inyi pooki torrok, neaku kadung'oo intae, meleku enkong'u ai nemaata nanu olng'ur." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ore ematua inyi nabo e uni naa keye to lmeitai neijori to lameyu tiatua intae; ore ematua nabo e uni naa kebatatakino olalem te rishata namanita intae; ore ematua nabo e uni naa kaidapashaki ilubot pooki enkop, nashurtu olalem asuj ninche." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Neaku neijia eikununye engoro ai napi tenelotu naa kainuaaki engoro ai ninche naitaraposh kewan; netum ninche aatayiolo aajo ore nanu Olaitoriani airoro to lom lai, ina kata naitorioki engoro ai napi shumata ninche." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ore ake sii naa kaitomijoon intae, niakuku entoki enkurruna tiatua lelo oshon oomanita intae, o te dukuya lelo pooki oodol intae egiroo." 
Ezekiel5:15 Iyakuku enkurruna o entoki namenari, enkisikong'a oloputukunyi, te nena kuapi naamanita intae, ina kata nayau inkiguanat ayaki intae te ngoro, o te ngoro napi, o too oshot engoro enkitamioto, nanu Olaitoriani oiroro." 
Ezekiel5:16 Ina kata nalaku agilunore intae too imbaa aainei esayiet olameyu, imbaa emutata, nena nalaku meidaikie intae; ina kata naitasapuk olameyu oleng te intae, nadung'oo ineeimu indaiki inyi." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ekairriwaki intae olameyu ong'uesi entim metigilunore intae, naa keoru intae inkera inyi, neim olmeitai o sarge atua intae naa kayau olalem shumata intae. Nanu Olaitoriani oiroro.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii; naajoki: 
Ezekiel6:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, intorioki enkomom ino enkalo oo ldoinyio le Israel, nimbonoki agilunore ninche," 
Ezekiel6:3 nijo: intae lo doinyio le Israel, entoning ororei lo Laitoriani Enkai! Inji ejoki Olaitoriani Enkai ildoinyio o ndoinyo, o lashepak o nong'ot: ing'ura, ore nanu enkewan ai naa kayau olalem shumata intae, naar ainyal iwuejitin inyi neeika." 
Ezekiel6:4 Ore ilpereren linyi naa keaku mijoonto ore ilpereren le nkorropil inyi naa kegili; ore lelo linyi ootaraki metuata nanang'aa ninche te dukuya inkitanyaanyukot inyi oo nkaitin. 
Ezekiel6:5 Naa kairragie lelo seseni ootuata loo ltung'ana le Israel te dukuya inkitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin nemeishu; naidapash iloik linyi aitaman ilpereren linyi loo lasarri. 
Ezekiel6:6 Ore pooki nimanyimanya naa keaku nkanas inyi mijoonto nemuti iwuejitin inyi neeika, metaa ore ilpereren linyi loo lasarri neaku ile pesho netumutaki, negili aabelibel inkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin inyi nemeishu, nedung'i ilpereren linyi le nkorropil aauroo, nejutori isiaaitin inyi." 
Ezekiel6:7 Nebatatakino ilkumok ootuata atua intae, niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Naa kaleku ilkuti linyi eishu. Neaku iatata too loshon ilekunot ooilanya ilo alem, naa teneidapashi intae too nkuapi," 
Ezekiel6:9 neaku ore lelo linyi ooilanyishote naadamu nanu te lelo oshon oowaita ninche aitaa iyarunot, ina kata atigila iltauja lenye lemaairuk naaing'uaa nanu, naitamodok inkonyek enye nena naaibelekenyakinote to lng'uarra nena kitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin; naa keibayu te nduaata enye maate nena torrok naataasa, o lminong lenye pooki." 
Ezekiel6:10 Naa keyiolou ina kata aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani; eitu airo te mpesho inchere kaitaas ena torrono ninche.” 
Ezekiel6:11 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Entoosh inkaik inyi, nioshieshie nkejek inyi enkop nijojo, Aha! Ore enkaraki ina bae olminong le nkaji e Israel; amu kebatata ninche to lalem, o lameyu, o lmeitai." 
Ezekiel6:12 Ore ilo olakua oleng naa keye to lmeitai; ore ilo otaana nebatatakino olalem; ore ilo otelekua neitajeuoki naa keye to lameyu. Neaku neijia aikunaki engoro ai napi ninche. 
Ezekiel6:13 Niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata eirragaa impopoki enye tiatua inkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye nemeishu emanita ilpereren lenye, te shumata pooki doinyo oodo, o too nchumat pooki oo ldoinyo, o tiabori olchani pooki onyori, o tiabori pooki shani dapashi mbenek, o te pooki wueji ake neitainye esong'uana narropil aaitaiki inkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye nemeishu." 
Ezekiel6:14 Naa kaitorioo enkaina ai agilunore ninche, naitaa enkop mitil naitomijoon, too manyishoritin enye pooki, eiteru to lpurkel o meshomo Ribla. Ina kata eyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel7:2 “Ore iyie nakerai e tung'ani, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai ajoki enkop e Israel: Enkiting'oto! Eewuo enkiting'oto shumata ilpijat pokira oong'uan le nkop." 
Ezekiel7:3 Etabawua taata enkiting'oto shumata iyie, naa kabolu engoro ai meeu shumata iyie naa kaaiguanare iyie anaa enaikununo inkoitoi inono; naa kaaitame iyie to lminong lino pooki." 
Ezekiel7:4 Nimikileku iyie enkong'u ai, nemaata olng'ur; kake kaaitame iyie tenkaraki nkoitoi inono, ina kata etii olminong lino atua iyie. Ina peyie iyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel7:5 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ‘Emutata nasuju emutata!’ Ing'ura, neina nalotu." 
Ezekiel7:6 Etabawua enkiting'oto, eewuo enkiting'oto; kitudumakine ninye iyie agilunore. Ing'ura elotu." 
Ezekiel7:7 Eewuo emutata enitii iyie, oi intae oomanya ina kop; etabawua enkata, etinyikua ina olong enkolong enkishirata neme enkolong nabuakuni too nchumat e lelo doinyo." 
Ezekiel7:8 Ekayau aitasieku engoro ai shumata intae, nayaki intae engoro ai napi, agilunore intae, naiguanare intae te risioroto oo nkoitoi inyi; naa kaitame intae too lminong' linyi pooki." 
Ezekiel7:9 Nemeleku enkong'u ai, nemaata nanu olng'ur, ekaitame intae te risioroto oo inkoitoi inyi, ina kata etii olminong linyi pooki atua intae. Ina pee iyiolouu aajo ara Olaitoriani ooshisho." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Ing'ura, ina olong! Ing'ura elotu ninye! Eewuo emutata inyi, eitapuka imbaa enkikonya, etubulutua ilukuny olwuasa." 
Ezekiel7:11 Etubulua enkikonya aaku eng'udi oo ntorrok; meetae obo lenye oleku, arashu ninye enkumoi enye, arashu enkarsisisho enye; nemeitokini aata te ninche oloituruku." 
Ezekiel7:12 Etabawua enkata, etinyikua enkolong. Mincho ilo oinyang'isho eshipa, arashu olamirani eishir, amu etii engoro napi atua olorora lenye pooki." 
Ezekiel7:13 Amu merrinyunye olamirani arrinyokino ina natimira, eton eishu ninche. Amu etii engoro napi sapuk shumata olorora lenye pooki; nemerrinyo siadi; naa ore te nkaraki ing'ok enyena, meeta oloidim aitasheiki enkishui enye." 
Ezekiel7:14 “Etoosho ninche entarumpeta nerretena pooki; nemeeta obo lenye olo olarrabal, amu etii engoro ai napi shumata olorora lenye pooki." 
Ezekiel7:15 “Etii olalem auluo, netii olmeitai o lameyu atua boo. Ore pooki ng'ae otii atua enkurma neye to lalem, ore pooki ng'ae otii atua enkanasa nemuat olameyu o lmeitai." 
Ezekiel7:16 Naa teneilanyisho ake ninye obo loo lekunot, naa kepuo ildoinyo, anaa nturkuluoni oo nong'ot, eishir pooki, eishiraki pooki ng'ae intorrok enyena." 
Ezekiel7:17 Ekelepori nkaik e pooki ng'ae, neshalu nkung enye anaa enkare." 
Ezekiel7:18 Neishopoki ate ilkuniyiani, neitoipoo ate to lkirutoto; netii enkurruna inkomomi enye pooki, nemetii ilpapit ilukuny enye pooki." 
Ezekiel7:19 Naa kenang'aa enkosholai enye too nkoitoi naalala e nkanasa, ore sahabu enye netiu anaa entoki naiduruk; ore enkosholai enye o sahabu nemeidim aaitajeu ninche te ina olong engoro napi o Laitoriani; meitaraposh ninche esumash enye arashu eiput inkoshuaa enye te ninye. Amu endapidapoi apa ina narror ing'ok enye." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ore imasaa enye sidain naaishopo te nkisisa e pesho, neitobiru inkitanyaanyukot oo loipi lo lminong o ntokitin enye pooki torrok metaa kaitaa entoki naiduruk te ninche." 
Ezekiel7:21 “Naa kapik ninye inkaik oo ltung'ana leeiking'a metarresho ninche aaibung naisho ilarruok mewaita ninche; naa kepuo aaisarkionie ninye. 
Ezekiel7:22 Akaiwuang'ie enkomom ai aitung'uaa ninche, peyie etum ninche aaisarkionie ewueji ai e tipat; ejing ilaikonyak atua neisarkionie ninye," 
Ezekiel7:23 neitaa olmuaate. “Ore amu ebore enkop esesekuanare osarge; nebore enkanasa enkikonya," 
Ezekiel7:24 naa kayau nena kuapi torrok oleng meibung'a aaya inkajijik enye; ekaiting'ie ilo wuasa lenye le ngolon, ore wuejitin enye sinyat neisarkionieki." 
Ezekiel7:25 Ore tenebau emion, naa keing'oru ninche eseriani, nemetum ninye." 
Ezekiel7:26 Elotu emutata nasuju ae mutata, nelotu olkilikuai leme sidai asuju olikae, neing'oru ninche enduaata to loiboni le Nkai, kake eisha enkitanapata to lapolosani, neisha enkikoo too lpayiani." 
Ezekiel7:27 Neishir olaiguanani neiting'o osiligi lo ltung'ani kitok, ore nkaik oo ltung'ana oopeny enkop neikirikira tenkuretisho sapuk. Ekaitaas ninche te risioroto oo nkoitoi enye, o terisioroto oo nkiguanat enye ekaiguanare ninche, naa keyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Ore to lari le ile, to lapa le ile, te nkolong e miet o lapa, ore atonita te nkaji ai, tenebo ilpayiani le Yuda etoni te dukuya nanu, ore enkaina o Laitoriani Enkai naaiteleikino nanu." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ina peyie adol naa ng'ura, enkitanyaanyukoto natiu anaa eno ltung'ani; ore tiabori enye ine netiu anaa empolos enye naa enkima, ore te shumata empolos enye netiu anaa enkitanyaanyukoto naitiil oleng, anaa osuyai oitiil otisikaki." 
Ezekiel8:3 Neitorioo enkitanyaanyukoto neeijo enkaina, naaya nanu adumu aibung ilpapit le ndukuya ai; naadumu nanu Enkiyang'et ailepie aya erishata e nkop o keper, naayau nanu too nduaat Enkai Yerusalem, naapik kishomi najing'ieki endung'oroto e atua ina naipirare moikuape, ine apa netii olorika le nkitanyaanyukoto o lom, ina naipiru aaku olom." 
Ezekiel8:4 Naa ng'ura, etii enkitoo e Nkai e Israel ine anaa apa enduaata natoduaa te nkisiajata." 
Ezekiel8:5 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, taraposhu nkonyek inono shumata ing'ura enkalo e moikuape.” Metaa ataraposhuo nkonyek aainei aitorioki moikuape, naa ng'ura, ore te moikuape e kishomi olperere lo lasar, teine nejing'ieki, netii apa enkitanyaanyukoto olom." 
Ezekiel8:6 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, idolita enaasita ninche, olminong kitok oasita enkaji e Israel tene, aaraa nanu aitalam ewueji ai sinyati? Kake eton ake intoki adol likae minong sapuk.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Naayau nanu kutuk aji e ilo odung'oro; ore peyie aing'or, ng'ura etii enaudoto natii esuntai." 
Ezekiel8:8 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, tuturo atua esuntai”, ore peyie atur esuntai, ng'ura netii kutuk aji." 
Ezekiel8:9 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Shomo atua, nidol intabo olminong naasita ninche tene.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Metaa nalo atua nadol; ore teine, etisiraki te suntai aaitaman ing'uesi pooki naaiserpepiari, o ng'uesi pooki torrok o nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin pooki nemeishu enkaji e Israel." 
Ezekiel8:11 Neitashe te dukuya ninche iltung'ana ntomoni naapishana loo lpayiani le nkaji e Israel, tenebo Yaasania olayioni le Shafan eitashe tenebo ninche. Neeta ake pooki ng'ae lenye entoki napejieki enkorropil te nkaina enye, neilep empuruo enkorropil shumata." 
Ezekiel8:12 Ina pee aajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, itodua enaasita ilpayiani le nkaji e Israel tenaimin, pooki tung'ani ake tiatua olgilata lenye too mpishai? Amu ejo ninche, ‘Medol iyiook Olaitoriani, eibayie Olaitoriani enkop.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Naaitoki ake ajoki nanu, “Intoki ake adol kulie tabo olminong naasita ninche.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Ina peyie aariku nanu kishomi enkalo e moikuape enkaji o Laitoriani; naa ng'ura, etoni inkituaak teine naaishiraki enkai enye naji Tammus." 
Ezekiel8:15 Ina pee aajoki ninye nanu, “Itodua iyie ena, iyie nakerai e tung'ani? Intoki ake adol intabo olminong sapuki naalang kuna.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Naayau ninye nanu olgilata liatua le nkaji o Laitoriani: naa ng'ura ore te kutukaji e nkaji o Laitoriani, enerish eneimi olgoriet o lperere, netii iltung'ana oobaya tikitam o imiet, eisho nkoriong'i enye ina aji Olaitoriani, neing'orita nkomomi enye enkalo o loosaen, eomon enkolong te nkalo oloosaen." 
Ezekiel8:17 Ina pee aajoki ninye nanu, “Itoduaa iyie ena, Nakerai e tung'ani? Kentoki nalelek te nkaji e Yuda pee eas intabo olminong naasita tene, eji metaa keiput enkop pooki enkikonya naainuaaki nanu oleng matagoroyu? Ng'ura, epik olng'osila lenye inkumeishin enye." 
Ezekiel8:18 Metaa kaitame te ngoro napi; meitoki enkong'u ai aleku, nemaitoki aata nanu olng'ur; ore hoo neishir too nkiyiaa aainei to ltoilo sapuk, mainining'u ninche.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Neishir ninye to ltoilo sapuk too nkiyiaa aainei ejo, “Entinyiku, intae oopuo aar enkanasa pooki ng'ae ake te ntoki nalo amutishore te nkaina enye.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Naa ng'ura, eetuo iltung'ana ile te nkalo enkishomi e shumata, natii enkalo e moikuape pooki tung'ani ake eeta entoki enye namutishore te nkaina enye, netii tenebo ninche oltung'ani oishopito enkila napuyiapui, tenebo entoki naguetishoreki te matua enye. Nepuo atua neitashe te mbata olperere lo suyiai." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ore ina kata neshomo enkitoo e Nkai e Israel aing'uaa lelo kerubi laa ninche etotonie teine nejing'ieki ina aji, neipot ilo tung'ani oishopito enkila napuyiapui, ilo oota entoki naigerishoreki te matua enye." 
Ezekiel9:4 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Shomo topolosa enkanasa turuko Yerusalem, nipik olmishire shumata oo nkomomi e lelo tung'ana pooki ootanyamala te nkishirata osina te nkaraki olminong otaasaki tiatua.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Nejoki ilkulikae aning'ito, “Topolosa ina anasa isujaa ninye, niar mincho enkong'u ino eleku, nimintodolu hoo olng'ur;" 
Ezekiel9:6 iishu iltung'ana pooki kituaak teine, ilbarnot o ntoyie, nkera kutiti o nkituaak, kake mishoroo ake pooki ng'ae oota olmishire. Naa interu te wueji ai sinyati.”" 
Ezekiel9:7 Neitoki ajoki ninche, “Esarkionie ina aji, nimputuputu iloodung'oro ilmeneng'a. Enchom dukuya.” Metaa eshomo dukuya, nearisho tiatua ina anasa." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ore ina kata earisho, naatung'uayioki aa nanu ake, nabatata te nkomom ai aishir, “Aha Olaitoriani Enkai! Indaikie iyie ilekunot pooki le Israel tembukunoto engoro ino napi te Yerusalem?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Ore entorroni enkaji e Israel o Yuda netuluso aaku sapuk oleng; eiputa enkop pooki osarge, neiputa enkanasa imbaa nemesipa; amu ejo ninche, ‘Eibayie Olaitoriani enkop, nemedol Olaitoriani.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Ore te nanu meleku enkong'u ai, nemaata olng'ur, kake kaitalaku ninche anaa enatiu isiaaitin te shumata ilukuny enye.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Naa ng'ura, oltung'ani oishopito inkilani naapuiyapui, tenebo entoki naigerishoreki te matua enye nayau olkilikuai ojo: “Ataasa anaa inikintanapa.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Naing'orisho nanu, naa ng'ura, ore oloing'ange ilo otii shumata nena lukuny e lelo kerubi etii enchumata enye entoki neeijo olorika le nkitoo oitobiruno to soit pus oji Safire*g*." 
Ezekiel10:2 Nejoki ilo tung'ani oishopito nkilani naapuyiapui, “Shomo atua nena kejek e ngarri naapuo to loing'ang'e naatii abori lelo kerubi; imputa nkaik inono inkuk naaishu te rishata lelo kerubi, nindapashaki ninche ina anasa.” Naduaaya ninye elo," 
Ezekiel10:3 ore ina kata neitashe ilkerubi te nkalo e kopikop eina aji, ore peyie ejing oltung'ani atua; neiput enkatampoi olodung'oro liatua." 
Ezekiel10:4 Neilep enkitoo o Laitoriani aing'uaa olkerubi o metabaiki enejing'ieki enkaji; neiput ina aji enkatampoi, ore olodung'oro neiput ewang'an enkitoo o Laitoriani." 
Ezekiel10:5 Nening'i oltoilo loo naipuko oo lkerubi to lodung'oro liong'ota, etiu anaa oltoilo le Nkai Magilani teneiro." 
Ezekiel10:6 Ore peyie eitanap ilo tung'ani oishopito nkilani naapuyiapui ajoki, “Iwa enkima te mpolos e nena kejek eng'arri naapuo to loing'ang'e, te rishata oo lkerubi”, nelo ninye atua neitashe te mbata enkeju e ng'arri." 
Ezekiel10:7 Neitorioo olkerubi enkaina enye te rishata oo lkerubi aitorioki enkima natii empolos oo lkerubi, neya embata enye, nepik atua nena aik e ilo tung'ani oishopito nkilani naapuyiapui, neya ninye, neipang boo." 
Ezekiel10:8 Etiu ilo kerubi anaa oloota enkaina oltung'ani tiabori naipuko enye. 
Ezekiel10:9 Naing'orisho, naa ng'ura, etii nkejek eng'arri ong'uan naashepita ilo kerubi, eshepita ake nabo olkerubi, ore emua oo nkejek engarri netiu anaa osoit oimerlel oji Krisolit*g*." 
Ezekiel10:10 Ore empukunoto enye, eeta nena ong'uan emua nabo, anaa enkeju eng'arri natii atua enkeju eng'arri." 
Ezekiel10:11 Ore peyie epuo ninche, neim enkalo ake nabo te nena ong'uan eitu eibelekenya epuoito, kake ore ake pooki alo neibelekenyakino enkeju engarri e dukuya nesuju nkulie pooki, eitu eibelekenya epuo." 
Ezekiel10:12 Ore nkaamanaa oo nkejek enye, o ltidii loo nkejek enye, o nkejek oo ngarrin nebore nkonyek naamanita." 
Ezekiel10:13 Ore nena kejek oo ng'arrin, neipoti aning'ito aajo nkejek osiwuo oloing'ang'e." 
Ezekiel10:14 Ore pooki ng'ae te ninche neeta nkomomi ong'uan: Ore enkomom e dukuya naa enkomom olkerubi, ore enkomom e are naa enkomom oltung'ani ore enkomom e uni naa enkomom olng'atuny, ore enkomom e ong'uan naa enkomom olkurragos." 
Ezekiel10:15 Nedumunye ilo kerubi ailep alo shumata. Ore kulo naa nena ng'uesi apa naaishu natoduaa te nkiyopata olkeju le Keba. 
Ezekiel10:16 Ore peyie epuo lelo kerubi nemanaa aapuo nena kejek e ng'arri; ore pee edumu lelo kerubi inaipuko enye aadumunye aaing'at enkop, neitu eibelekenya nena kejek aaing'uaa meshep ninche." 
Ezekiel10:17 Ore pee eitashe, neitashe sii kuna, ore pee edumunye aailep, neilep sii ninche tenebo, amu etii apa atua ninche enkiyang'et e nena ng'uesi naaishu." 
Ezekiel10:18 Nepuku enkitoo Olaitoriani aing'uaa kutuk aji e ina aji, neitashe te nchumata e ilo kerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Nedumu ilkerubi inaipuko enye aailep aapuo to loing'ang'e aaing'uaa enkop adolita epuo, ore epuo, etii nkejek emurte enye; neitashe te kutuk aji enkishomi enkalo oloosaen enkaji Olaitoriani; netii shumata enye enkitoo Enkai e Israel." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ore kuna naa ing'uesi naaishu nena natoduaa tiabori ina Ai e Israel te nkiyopata olkeju le Keba; nayiolou ajo ilkerubi apa ninche. 
Ezekiel10:21 Neeta ake pooki obo te ninche nkomomi ong'uan, neeta ake pooki inaipuko maa ong'uan, ore tiabori inaipuko enye nenyaanyukie nkaik oo ltung'ana." 
Ezekiel10:22 Ore empukunoto oo nkomomi enye, netiu anaa inapa omomi natoduaa te nkiyopata olkeju le Kebar. Nepuo pooki dukuya aaitoriori." 
Ezekiel11:1 Naadumu nanu Enkiyang'et shumata, naayau nanu kishomi oloosaen e nkaji o Laitoriani, ina naipirare oloosaen. Naa Ng'ura, ore te kutuk aji e ina kishomi netii iltung'ana tikitam o imiet; nadol tiatua ninche Yaasania olayioni le Asuri, o Peletia olayioni le Benaia o lkituaak loo ltung'ana." 
Ezekiel11:2 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, iltung'ana kulo laa ninche ooipiru enkarruoisho laa ninche ooishoru nkikoot torrok tena anasa;" 
Ezekiel11:3 ninche oojo, ‘Eton eitu enyiku enkata nikishetie nkajijik; ore ena anasa naa emoti nayierishoreki ake nikira iyiook nkiri.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Metaa imbonoki ninche, tigilunore ninche imbonoki iyie enkerai e tung'ani.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Naadoiki nanu Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani naajoki ninye nanu, “Tejo, Inji ejo Olaitoriani: Metaa idamu, iyie na aji e Israel; amu kayiolo nena baa pooki naajing endamunoto ino." 
Ezekiel11:6 Intaa kumok oleng ilmeneng'a linono tena anasa nimputa inkoitoi naalala enkanasa ilmeneng'a. 
Ezekiel11:7 Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore ilmeneng'a linono lirragie ti atua ninye, naa nkiri ake, naa emoti nayierishoreki ena anasa, kake aikintaini iyie tiatua ninye." 
Ezekiel11:8 Ituria iyie olalem; naa kayau shumata iyie olalem, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel11:9 Naa kaaitupuku nanu iyie tiatua ninye, naapik iyie nkaik oo ltung'ana leeiking'a, naadung'oki iyie enkiguana." 
Ezekiel11:10 Kibatati iyie to lalem, ekaaiguanare iyie to lpolosie le Israel: niyiolou iyie ajo ara Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel11:11 Meaku ena anasa emoti ino nayierishoreki nimiaku iyie nkiri tiatua ninye; ekaaiguanare iyie to lpolosie le Israel; 
Ezekiel11:12 niyiolou ajo ara nanu Olaitoriani; amu eitu imbung alotie nkitanapat aainei, arashu isujaa nkiguanat aainei, kake itaasa anaa enatiu nkitanapat oo loshon lelo likimanita iyie.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Ore pee ebau ina kata, aibonisho nanu, neye Peletia olayioni le Benaia. Nabatata te nkomom ai, naishir to ltoilo sapuk najo, “Aha Olaitoriani Enkai! Inting'ie aishu lelo lekunot le Israel?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii nanu ejo: 
Ezekiel11:15 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore iltung'ana linono, aa lelo alashera, lelo yarunot linono, ina aji pooki e Israel, ninche pooki, naa ninche lelo ootejo iloomanya Yerusalem inchere, ‘Eshomo ninche aalam Olaitoriani; eishooki iyiook ena kop metaa enaang.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Metaa tejo, ‘Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore hoo naitayio ninche aitalamaa too loshon naa ore hoo naidapashayie ninche tiatua nkuapi, nataa nanu enkaji Enkai te ninche te nkiti kata tenena kuapi, naashomo.’" 
Ezekiel11:17 Metaa tejo, ‘Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ekaiturrurru intae too loreren, naiturrurru ntae aitung'uaa nena kuapi naaidapashakaki ntae, naa kaisho ntae ina kop e Israel.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 Naa tenepuonu ninche ine, neitayu tiatua ninye intokitin pooki torrok o pooki toki olminong." 
Ezekiel11:19 Naa kaisho ninche oltau obo, napik enkiyang'et ng'ejuk atua ninche; naitayu tiatua ninche ilo tau lo soit aitung'uaa iseseni lenye naisho ninche oltau le nkiring'o," 
Ezekiel11:20 peyie etum aashomie nkitanapat aainei, neibung inkitanapat aainei neyanyit ninche; naa keaku ninche iltung'ana laainei, naaku nanu Enkai enye." 
Ezekiel11:21 Kake ore lelo oopuo aasuj too ltauja lenye intokitin torrok o mbaa olminong, ekayieu isiaaitin enye too lukuny enye, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Ina peyie edumu lelo kerubi inaipuko enye, eeta nkejek oo ngarrin too mbat enye; ore enkitoo Enkai e Israel neitoipito ninche." 
Ezekiel11:23 Nepuku enkitoo Olaitoriani aing'uaa atua ina anasa, neitashe te nchumata oldoinyio otii enkalo oloo saen eina anasa." 
Ezekiel11:24 Naadumu nanu Enkiyang'et ailepie shumata naayau nanu te nduaata Enkiyang'et e Nkai atua Ilkaldayo, enetii lelo yarunot. Ore ina duaata natoduaa naalo aing'uaa nanu." 
Ezekiel11:25 Naliki lelo yarunot imbaa pooki naaitodua Olaitoriani nanu. 
Ezekiel12:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel12:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, imanya atua enkaji kiserut, lelo oota nkonyek naadolishore, nemedolisho, lelo oota nkiyiaa naaning'ishore, nemening'isho" 
Ezekiel12:3 amu enkaji kiserut ninche. Metaa, enkerai e tung'ani, intobiraki kewan olola le yararoto, nilo eyararoto dama kiduaaya ninche; ilo anaa oloaruno aing'uaa ewueji ino alo dikae wueji kiduaaya ninche. Ebaiki neidim ninche aatoning'u hoo naa enkaji natogolong'ua ninche." 
Ezekiel12:4 Intupuku iyie olola lino dama kidolita ninche anaa olola le yararoto; naa ipuopuo intae teipa edolita ninche ntae, anaa enaas iltung'ana lelo oopuo e yararoto." 
Ezekiel12:5 Entutur intae esuntai edolita ninche niimiimi ina lusie. 
Ezekiel12:6 Ore edolita ninche intae nidumumu olola aaiteleiki iloilila linyi, ninapinapa aaipang'ie te naimin, nintoipipi nkomomi inyi, peyie midolidolo ina kop; amu aaitaa iyie olmonekie te nkaraki enkaji e Israel.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Naataasa ina anaa enaaitanapaki. Ayaua olola lai te ndama, anaa olola le yarunoto, ore teipa, natur esuntai too nkaik aainei, nalo te naimin, anapita pooki toki ai to loililai lai edolita ninche." 
Ezekiel12:8 Ore tadekenya nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Enkerai e tung'ani, amaa enkaji e Israel, ena aji kiserut keitu kijoki iyie, ‘Kaa doi iasita iyie?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Tiaaki ninche, ‘Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore ele kilikuai oiroishi neipirta ilo kitok otii Yerusalem oina aji pooki e Israel natii atua ninye.’" 
Ezekiel12:11 Tejo, ‘Ara nanu olmonekie te iyie: anaa enataasa, neaku ina eitaasi ninche ekepuo ninche eyararoto aaku ilooena.’" 
Ezekiel12:12 Ore ilo kitok otii tenebo ninche nedumu olola lenye aiteleiki oloililae lenye te naimin, neipang alo; ketur esuntai aaim; naa keimulumul enkomom enye, peyie medol ina kop too nkonyek enyena." 
Ezekiel12:13 Naa kaisalaash orreshet lai aitoipoki ninye, naa keyae ninye tiatua orreshet lai; naa kayau ninye Babilon ina natii enkop oo Lkaldayo, nemedol ake sii ninye; naa keye ninye te ine." 
Ezekiel12:14 Naa kaidapashaki aing'orie pooki kijape lelo pooki oomanita ninye, ilaretok lenyena tenebo iltimito lenyena pooki; naa kashurt kashutu olalem asujaa ninche." 
Ezekiel12:15 Naa keyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata naidapashaki ninche iloshon naidapashaa ninche too nkuapi." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kake kaisho ilkuti lenye eilanyisho aailany ilo alem, aaing'uaa olameyu o lmeitai torrono, peyie etum aaisirayia olminong lenye pooki tiatua lelo oshon oojing atua, netum aatayiolo aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Enyaaka ake sii ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enatii nanu ejo," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Enkerai e tung'ani inosa endaa ino to lkirutoto, niok enkare to lokirikiri o te nkuretisho;" 
Ezekiel12:19 nijo te nkaraki lelo tung'ana leina kop, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai te nkaraki lelo oomanya Yerusalem teina kop e Israel: Kenya ninche endaa enye te nkuretisho, neok enkare te nking'asia, amu keitayuni te nkop ina pooki natii, tenkaraki ina kikonya e lelo pooki oomanya atua ninye." 
Ezekiel12:20 Ore nena anas neitomijooni, neaku ina kop enememanyae; niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii nanu ejo: 
Ezekiel12:22 “Enkerai e tung'ani, kaa dung'et e rashe ena niata naipirta ena kop e Israel, ijo, ‘Etoodoro inkolong'i, ore pooki duaata nelotu aaku enemeetae.’ Tiaaki naa ninche," 
Ezekiel12:23 ‘Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ekaiting'ie ena dung'et e rashe, nemeitoki aekata aasishore anaa endung'et e rashe te Israel.’ Kake tiaaki ninche, etinyikutua nena olong'i, oo nkitabarot e pooki duaata." 
Ezekiel12:24 Amu meitokini aata aekata enduaata nemesipa arashu enduaata elejare te nkaji e Israel. 
Ezekiel12:25 Kake ore nanu Olaitoriani naa kairo ororei ilo lairo, naa keasi. Meekure eitokini aekata aaitumutiki, kake ore too nkolong'i inyi iyie na aji kiserut ekairo nanu ororei naas ina, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Ore ake sii eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel12:27 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ing'ura, ore lelo le nkaji e Israel ejo, ‘Ore ina duaata enye naa enoo nkolong'i kumok e dukuya, nelimu nduaat oo nkolong'i naatii dukuya oleng.’" 
Ezekiel12:28 Neaku tiaaki ninche, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Meetae ororei lai hoo obo oitokini aitumutiki, kake ore ilo rorei lairo naa keasi, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii ejo: 
Ezekiel13:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, imbonisho tigilunore iloibonok le Israel, imbonisho nijoki lelo ooibonisho too ndamunot enye maate: ‘Entoning ilo rorei lo Laitoriani!’”" 
Ezekiel13:3 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, “Ekake ayia intae lelo oibonok oomoda lelo oosuj enkiyang'et enye maate, nemeeta toki natoduaa!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Etotiwuo iloibonok linyi anaa mbariak tiatua ilmuaateni, iyie Israel." 
Ezekiel13:5 Eitu ilepaki ajing atua ilusien, arashu ishet esuntai te nkaraki enkaji e Israel, pee etum aitasho to larrabal te ina olong o Laitoriani." 
Ezekiel13:6 Eiroro ninche elejare neibonu elejare; nejo ninche, ‘Ejo Olaitoriani’ eitu eirriwaa Olaitoriani ninche, neisilig ninche meitabai irorei lenye." 
Ezekiel13:7 Keitu idol iyie enduaata namilisho, nimbalie te nkutuk ino enaibon e lejare, te pooki kata nitejo, ‘Ejo Olaitoriani, hoo neitu nanu airo?’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Ore amu imbalie te nkutuk ino inemesipa nitoduaa elejare, neaku ng'ura, kaagilunore iyie, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ekegilunore enkaina ai lelo oibonok lelo oota nduaat olmilo neitayu nduaat elejare; mejing ninche atua olturrur loo ltung'ana laainei, arashu eigeri ninche te mbuku oo nkarn e nkaji e Israel, arashu ejing ninche ina kop e Israel; niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Ore enkaraki, ee enkaraki naitapong'oitie iltung'ana laainei, ejo, ‘Eseriani,’ ina kata meetae eseriani; te nkaraki, ina kata nashet iltung'ana esuntai, nepuonu iloibonok aamur te nturoto;" 
Ezekiel13:11 tiaaki lelo oibonok oomur te nturoto kesulari ninye! Ekelotu olairrag le nchan, o isoito le nchan oodou nelotu olkutati kitok oleng;" 
Ezekiel13:12 ore peyie esulari esuntai, aimejokini intae, ‘Koree apa emurata nitumurie ninye?’" 
Ezekiel13:13 Metaa nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ekaitaa olkutati kitok opuku losiwuo metigila te ngoro ai; naa ketumi oloirrag le nchan te ngoro ai, o enchan sapuk te ngoro napi naidaikie ninye." 
Ezekiel13:14 Naa kagil auroo ina suntai nitumurakita enturoto nauroo ninye te nkop, metaa ore olkitamanyunoto lenye neirrag metii toki; ore tenesulari, terishata enye; niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel13:15 Neaku neijia aiko tenaitayu engoro ai te ina suntai, o te lelo ootumura ninye te nturoto; naa kaajoki iyie, meekure eetae ina suntai, arashu lelo ootumura ninye," 
Ezekiel13:16 ore lelo oibonok le Israel lelo ooibonoki Yerusalem nedol induaat eseriani te nkaraki ninye, ina kata meetae eseriani ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel13:17 “Ore iyie nakerai e tung'ani, intorioki enkomom ino tigilunore nena toyie oo ltung'ana linono, nena naaibonisho too ndamunot enye maate; imbonoki tigilunore ninche" 
Ezekiel13:18 tiaki, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ekake ayia nena kituaak naeniki nkaik enye pooki intasimi, naaitobiraki entoki naitoipie ilukuny iltung'ana pooki, irreshoo iltauja! Irreshoo iltauja loo ltung'ana laainei, ninchosho ilkulikae tauja etoni aaisho tenkaraki dupoto inyi." 
Ezekiel13:19 Kisarkionie nanu tiatua olorere lai te mborei e nkaina e shairi o te mbelati emukate, iariara metuata iltung'ana lemeishaakino neye ninchosho iltung'ana lemeishaakino neishu etoni eishu, te lejare inyi ilejileje iltung'ana laainei, lelo ooinining'u elejare." 
Ezekiel13:20 “Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura kagilunore nena tasimi inyi nirreshieshie iltauja, naa kapolosu aiwuang'ie too nkaik inyi; naa kaisho lelo tauja litarresho epuo etalaayioki anaa imotonyi." 
Ezekiel13:21 Ore sii nena nintoipiepie ate naa kapolos aiwuang'ie, naitajeu iltung'ana laainei aitung'uaa nkaik inyi, nemeitoki aekata aatii nkaik inyi anaa eng'ues naibung'aki aanya; niyiolouu ina kata aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel13:22 Amu itaara iltauja loo supati te monkoi, hoo neitu nanu aar ninye oltau, nintagolo ilo torrono, nemeibelekenya ninye aing'uaa enkoitoi enye e ntorroni pee eitajeu enkishui enye;" 
Ezekiel13:23 neaku meekure aekata intokiki aadol induaat olmilo anaa iasishorere ntasimi; ekaitajeu iltung'ana laainei aitung'uaa nkaik inyi. Niyiolouu ina kata aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.” 
Ezekiel14:1 Nepuonu kulikae payiani le Israel enatii, netoni te dukuya nanu." 
Ezekiel14:2 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii, aajoki:" 
Ezekiel14:3 “Enkerai e tung'ani ewaita kulo tung'ana inkitanyaanyukot oo inkaitin nemeishu aapik iltauja lenye, nepik entoki narrueshisho oo ntorrok enye dukuya nkomomi enye; kaisho kewan maikilikuanishore tukul ninche?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Neaku irorie ninche, nijoki ninche, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore pooki tung'ani le nkaji e Israel opik inkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enyena nemeishu oltau, nepik entoki narror oo ntorrok dukuya enkomom enye, neitoki ake alotu enetii ilo oiboni le Nkai, kawaliki nanu ninye makewan ara Olaitoriani, te nkaraki olorora loo nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enyena nemeishu," 
Ezekiel14:5 peyie atum aibung'a lelo tauja leina aji e Israel, lelo pooki ootapong'ori te nanu too nkitayaanyukot oo nkaitin enye nemeishu." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Metaa tiaaki enkaji e Israel, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Erridutu nimbelekenyunyenye aaing'uaa nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin inyi nemeishu; nimbelekenyunyu inkomomi inyi to lminong linyi pooki." 
Ezekiel14:7 Amu ore ake ninye pooki ng'ae le nkaji e Israel, arashu olomoni ake pooki tiatua Israel ooroo kewan te nanu, nepik nkitanyaanyukot oo inkaitin nemeishu oltau lenye nepik entoki narror oo ntorrok enyena dukuya enkomom enye, eji neitoki ake alotu enetii oloiboni le Nkai pee elotu aikilikuanu imbaa enyena te nanu, ore nanu makewan Olaitoriani naa kawaliki ninye nanu enkorrok ai;" 
Ezekiel14:8 naa kaitorioki enkomom ai ilo tung'ani agilunore ninye, ekaitaa ninye olmonekie naitaa olo menuni nadung'oo ninye tiatua iltung'ana laainei; niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Naa teneleji oloiboni lai neiro ororei, ore nanu, Olaitoriani oteleja ilo oiboni, naa kaitorioo enkaina ai agilunore ninye naidaikie ninye tiatua iltung'ana laainei Isiraeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Naa kenap ninche enkitamioto enye enkitamioto oloiboni naa ketiu neijia enkitamioto e ilo oikilikuanu," 
Ezekiel14:11 peyie meitoki aekata enkaji e Israel aapuo aapong'ori aaing'uaa nanu, nemeitoki aaigil aaisarkionie ate too ng'ok enye pooki, kake pee etum aataa iltung'ana laainei, natum ataa nanu Enkai enye, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii ejo: 
Ezekiel14:13 “Enkerai e tung'ani teneas enkop ing'ok aa nanu egilunore eas ine metii enkirukoto, naitorioki enkaina ai agilunore ninye, nagil ine netumie endaa nairriwaki ninye olameyu, nadung'oo te ninye tung'ani o eng'ues," 
Ezekiel14:14 ore ninye naaji te kulo tung'ana okuni, Noa, o Daniel o Yakobo te netii atua, naa keitajeu ake enkishui enye maate te supatisho enye maate,” ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel14:14 ore ninye naaji te kulo tung'ana okuni, Noa, o Daniel o Yakobo te netii atua, naa keitajeu ake enkishui enye maate te supatisho enye maate,” ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Tenaisho ing'uesi entim meima atua ina kop, neinyal ninye metaa mitil, metaa meetae oltung'ani oidim aima atua te nkaraki nena ng'uesi;" 
Ezekiel14:16 o tenaa ketii duoo ninye lelo tung'ana pokira okuni atua, ore anaa enaishu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai meitajeu hoo nkayiok arashu intoyie, ninche ake enkorrok enye eitajeuni, kake keaku enkop mitil." 
Ezekiel14:17 Arashu tenayau olalem shumata e ina kop, najo, inchoo olalem eim atua ina kop; nadung'oo te ninye tung'ani o eng'ues," 
Ezekiel14:18 ore hoo netii apa kulo tung'ana pokira okuni atua, ore anaa enaishu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, meitajeu hoo nkayiok arashu intoyie, kake ninche ake inkorroki enye eitajeuni." 
Ezekiel14:19 Arashu tenairriu olmeitai atua ina kop, nabuku engoro ai napi abukoki shumata ninye tenebo osarge, pee adung'oo te ninye tung'ani o eng'ues;" 
Ezekiel14:20 enyor duoo naa Noa otii, o Daniel o Yob atua ninye, ore anaa enaishu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, meitajueu hoo nkayiok arashu intoyie, enkishui enye ake eitajeu te supatisho enye." 
Ezekiel14:20 enyor duoo naa Noa otii, o Daniel o Yob atua ninye, ore anaa enaishu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, meitajueu hoo nkayiok arashu intoyie, enkishui enye ake eitajeu te supatisho enye." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Amu neijia ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Kebaa elang tenairriwaki Yerusalem nena kitamiot aainei ong'uan enkiguana, olalem, olameyu, ing'uesi torrok o lmeitai, pee adung'oo tung'ani o eng'ues tiatua!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Ore ake eyia, tenelo neing'uari tiatua ilooleku pee erik aaipang'ie ilayiok o ntoyie, tenepuo nepuonu enitii nidol inkoitoi enye o yasat enye, naa aikintagoli iyie teina torrono nayau shumata e Yerusalem, te nena pooki nayaua shumata ninye." 
Ezekiel14:23 Naa keitagol ninche intae, tinidolidolo inkoitoi enye o yasat enye; niyiolouu aajo eitu aas ina meeta enataasie pooki nataasa te ninye, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii ejo: 
Ezekiel15:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, kaji eiko enchata olchani loo sabibu tenegiroo te nkadori likae shani ake pooki, olng'osila lo sabibu otii atua ilkeek le ntim?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Keyae enchata te ninye aaitobirie ae toki? Keya iltung'ana enchata te ninye aililiyie ake pooki girra? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ng'ura, epiki ninye enkima metaa eilata enye; ore peyie emut enkima ineeiting'ie enyena pokira, ore empolos enye netumute, keitoki aata tipat tiae toki?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ing'ura, ore apa eton elulung'a ninye, nemeeta ae naitaasi; kebaa meeta tipat etumuta enkima ninye, keitoki aata tipat tiae toki." 
Ezekiel15:6 Neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: anaa enatiu ilkeek to olchani loo sabibu tiatua entim, ilo latipika enkima meitaa eilata, neaku neijia alo ake lelo oomanya Yerusalem." 
Ezekiel15:7 Naa kaitorioki ninye enkomom ai agilunore ninche; hoo neilanyisho ninche aing'uaa enkima, kenya ina kima ninche amut; niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani tenaitorioki ninche enkomom ai agilunore." 
Ezekiel15:8 Naa kaitaa enkop mitil, amu etaa ninche ilemeeta enkirukoto, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Neitoki ake ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enatii, ejo:" 
Ezekiel16:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, intayiolo Yerusalem olminong lenye," 
Ezekiel16:3 nijoki, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai ajoki Yerusalem: Ore entipat ino o einoto ino netii enkop oo Lkanaan; ore apa papaai lino naa Olamori, ore yieyio lino naa e Hiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ore te nkipirta e inoto ino, teina olong eitu edung'i osotua lino, neton eitu kisuji iyie te nkare neton eitu kiutuutieki emunyan, arashu kirridi too nkarash." 
Ezekiel16:5 Meetae obo liking'urrie iyie, pee eas embae nabo e kuna to lng'ur te nkaraki iyie; kake kitanang'akaki iyie ong'ata naisiasha, amu kinturrayioki, ina olong apa nikitoiwuoki iyie." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Ore peyie aim ine nitii iyie, naadol iyie ishuma tiatua osarge lino, naajoki iye tiatua osarge lino, taa oloishu," 
Ezekiel16:7 nibulu anaa enkaitubului e ong'ata nibulu niadoru abaiki enkiputakinoto enkaisiaayiani; netubulutua ilki linono, netubulutua ilpapit linono; nira ake emasipai nemeishopo." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Ore ina kata naim embata ine nitii naaing'or iyie, ing'ura, itaa apa olerisiori le nyorrata; naaisalaashaki iyie enkila ai, naitoipoo emasipaisho ino: ee naaliki ajoki ainosa olmumai te iyie nikintayu olning'o o iyie, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, niaku iyie olalai." 
Ezekiel16:9 Naaitadoiki iyie enkare naisujaa osarge ilo liata, naael iyie te ilata." 
Ezekiel16:10 Aaishopo ake sii too nkilani naaikodo naishopoki iyie inamuka, naaishopoki iyie inkilani naapuyiapuy e katani naaitoip iyie te nkila napuyiapui." 
Ezekiel16:11 Naakus iyie too masaa, naishopoki iyie ilgiso inkaik inono, o olpisiai emurt ino." 
Ezekiel16:12 Naapik olgisoi enkume ino, naapik imuna nkiyiaa inono, napik emaupe enkitoo sidai endukuya ino." 
Ezekiel16:13 Neaku neijia apa kinkunaki aakus te sahabu o te nkosholai, ore inkilani inono naa kitani napuyiapui sidai o enkila napuyiapui o enkila naikodo; ninos enkurma sidai tenebo enaisho o eilata. Nibulu asidanu oleng, nilotu abau enetii olkitok." 
Ezekiel16:14 Ore iyie niaku ningoti ti atua iloshon kumok te nkaraki enkishiaa ino, amu aisidai apa oleng eibulayie iloshon te nkaraki ina kishiaa naisul naaishopoko nanu iyie, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Kake isiliga iyie enkishiaa ino, nias ine nkiborra oo nkonyek te nkaraki nitoninge, nintubulaa enkiborra ino oo nkonyek te lelo likiimaa epuo." 
Ezekiel16:16 Iwaita embata oo nkilani inyi, nintobirakiki ate iwuejitin neeika, niasiasa inenkiborra oo nkonyek te nchumata enye; eitu aikata etumi inaanyaanyukie, nemeitokini aikata aatum." 
Ezekiel16:17 Iwaita sii kulikae soito le tipat laainei le sahabu o le nkosholai ai, lelo laaishoo iyie, nintobirakinye kewan inkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nemeishu oo ltung'ana, niasie ninche ine nkiborra oonkonyek;" 
Ezekiel16:18 niya inkilani inono naaikodo aitoipie ninche, nirragie eilata ai o enkorropil ai te dukuya ninche." 
Ezekiel16:19 O emukate ai sii, aaishoo iyie, aitotio iyie te nkurma napuyiapui o eilata o enaisho irragie te dukuya ninche metaa olgusil orropil, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel16:20 Niya ilayiok linono o ntoyie inono, nena nikitoikio nanu, nintainye ninche olasar peyie emuti. Amaa isiaitin inono enkiborra oo nkonyek kenkiti toki apa" 
Ezekiel16:21 eji metaa iteyieng'a nkera aainei nintarasaa ninche anaa olasar te nkima aitaiki ninche? 
Ezekiel16:22 Ore to olminong lino pooki o te nkiborra ino oo nkonyek eitu idamu nena olong'i inono e kitisho, ina kata minchopo nira emasipai, itii atua osarge lino." 
Ezekiel16:23 “Ore pee eish intorrok inono pooki (Woi, woi iyie! Ejo Olaitoriani Enkai)" 
Ezekiel16:24 iteshetaka kewan enkaji sidai, nintobiraki kewan ewueji neika too wuejitin pooki enkanasa, neesotoreki." 
Ezekiel16:25 Ore te dukuya e pooki oitoi nalala e nkanasa nishetu ewueji nimborrie onyek esidano ino, nincho kewan pooki ng'ae ogiroo, niponaa esiaai ino enkiborra oo nkonyek." 
Ezekiel16:26 Itaasa sii iyie esiaai enkiborra oo nkonyek too Lmisiri, tenebo lelo litashare oobore eng'uarrata, niponaa enkiborra oo nkonyek nikintagor nanu." 
Ezekiel16:27 Ing'ura, metaa aitorioyie enkaina ai pee aagilunore iyie, naitong'oroo ina rubata nikinchooki iyie, naaitarasaki iyie ilo olubo loo lmang'ati linono, nena toyie oo Lfilisti, nena naatukurrutuate nkaraki olkuaak lino torrono." 
Ezekiel16:28 Itaasa sii inenkiborra oo nkonyek tenebo ile Asiria, amu ira apa olemeraposho; ee nias inenkiborra oo nkonyek tenebo ninche, neton ake eitu iraposho." 
Ezekiel16:29 Intaa kumok isiaaitin inono enkiborra oo nkonyek tenebo ina kop e biashara enkop oo Ilkaldayo; ore ake sii tena neitu ake iraposho. 
Ezekiel16:30 “Kebaa emoyian enyorrata oltau lino, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, idol ajo itaasa kuna baa pooki isiaaitin naaijo osuyai enkiborra oo nkonyek;" 
Ezekiel16:31 nishetu inkajijik te dukuya pooki oitoi nalala enkanasa, nintobiru iwuejitin inono neeika too wuejitin pooki neetumoreki. Niminyaanyukie ake enkitok naibor onyek, amu itanya ing'amaa elaakinoto ole koisiaayio." 
Ezekiel16:32 Enkitok naibor onyek nang'amu ilomon terishata olpayian lenye! 
Ezekiel16:33 Eisho ilewa nkishorot ing'oruo pooki naibor onyek; kake inchoo iyie inkishorot inono lelo pooki linyor, irop ninche meetu ine nitii too nkaloli pooki te nkaraki isiaitin enkiborra oo nkonyek inono." 
Ezekiel16:34 Metaa inyaanyukie apa iyie kulie kituaak te siaai ino enkiborra oo nkonyek, meeta olikitaaraka iyie taa enaibor onyek; nincho olekoisiaayio, eitu kinchori iyie olekoisiaayio; metaa ira iyie enapaashaa." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Neaku naa, iyie naibor onyek, toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani." 
Ezekiel16:36 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ore amu eibalunyeki enkurruna ino, neboluni emasipaisho ino ti atua enkiborra ino oo nkonyek tenebo isintan linono, o te nkaraki nena aitin inono pooki nemeishu, o te nkaraki ilo sarge loo nkera inono nena ninchoo ninche," 
Ezekiel16:37 neaku, ing'ura ekaiturrurru isintan linono pooki, lelo litishipakine lelo pooki linyor o lelo limbayie; ekaiturrurru ninche mikitaarare iyie too nkaloli pooki, naboloo emasipaisho ino eboloki ninche, pee etum aatodol emasipaisho ino pooki." 
Ezekiel16:38 Naa kaaiguanare iyie anaa nkituaak naagil olning'o le nkiama neiguanareki ilooibukoo osarge, neyau shumata iyie ilo sarge lengoro napi o lom." 
Ezekiel16:39 Naa kaishooyo iyie apik inkaik oo sintan linono naa kasulaa ilgilat linono negil aauroo iwuejitin inono neeika, naa aikioru ninche iyie inkilani inono neya imasaa inono sidain, niking'uaa iyieira emasipai minchopo." 
Ezekiel16:40 Naa keyau ninche olorora likigilunore iyie, naa aikinang ninche iyie too soito nikidung ninche iyie aitaa ndung'udung'ot too lalema lenye." 
Ezekiel16:41 Naa kepejoo nkajijik inyi neyau enkiguana shumata iyie te dukuya nkituaak kumok; naamitiki iyie pee mias esiai enkiborra oo nkonyek, nimintoki aikata aishoru olekoisiaayio." 
Ezekiel16:42 Metaa kaitaraposh engoro ai te iyie, neiwuang olom lai te iyie; kaaku nanu olobor, nemaitoki aigil agoro." 
Ezekiel16:43 Ore amu eitu idamu nena olong'i e kitisho ino, kake kintagoro nanu oleng te kuna tokitin pooki; neaku ng'ura, kaitalaku sii nanu inkiaasin inono te shumata endukuya ino, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai. Keitu doi ias eloloito aitushulaki olminong lino pooki?" 
Ezekiel16:44 “Ing'ura ajo ore pooki ng'ae oasishore endung'et e rashe naa keasishore ena dung'et e rashe te nkaraki iyie, anaa enatiu ng'otonye, ‘Anaa enatiu entito.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Ira iyie entito e yieyio lino, ina naiba olpayian lenye o nkera enyena; nira enkanashe oo nkanashera inono, nena naaiba ilpayiani lenye oo nkera enye, ore apa yieyio lino naa e Hiti ore papaailino naa Olamori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Ore enkanashe ino botor naa Samaria, ina naboitare intoyie enyena te nkalo ino e moikuape; ore enkanashe ino kiti, ina namanya enkalo ino e kopikop naa Sodom tenebo intoyie enyena." 
Ezekiel16:47 Neitu ake kindip enkiimata oo nkoitoi enye arashu ias enatiu olminong lenye; ore te nkata kiti oleng nitarruoyie alang ninche too nkoitoi inono pooki. 
Ezekiel16:48 Ore anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ore enkanashe ino Sodom o ntoyie enyena eitu eas ninche anaa ina nitaasa iyie o intoyie inono." 
Ezekiel16:49 Ing'ura, ena apa entorroni naata enkanashe ino Sodom: ore ninye tenebo ntoyie enyena neeta olwuasa, o endaa sapuk, o embularoto metii engoloto, kake eitu eretu lelo aisinak o lemeeta toki." 
Ezekiel16:50 Ekewuasa apa ninche, netaasa imbaa olminong te dukuya nanu; neaku aiwuang'ie nanu ninche, ina kata nadol ninye." 
Ezekiel16:51 Eitu eas Samaria olpisiai loo ng'ok inono; itaasa intae imbaa kumok olminong aalang ninche, nintaa nkanashera inyi inaalioo aa supati ti atua nena baa pooki olminong nitaasa." 
Ezekiel16:52 Tanapa esulare ino, iyie sii, amu iyopiruo enkiguana sidai too nkanashera inono; te nkaraki ing'ok inono nena nitaasa te ntorroni oleng alang ninche, etisipa ninche aalang iyie. Metaa tukurru, iyie sii, ninap esulare ino makewan, amu intaa nkanashera inono inemeeta entioto." 
Ezekiel16:53 “Ekashuku aiturrurru emunyani enye, emunyani e Sodom tenebo ntoyie enyena, o emunyani e Samaria tenebo ntoyie enyena, naa kashuku emunyani inyi ti atua ninche," 
Ezekiel16:54 peyie itumutumu aatanap esulare inyi nikurrurru te pooki nitaasa, niyakuku enkilejilej te ninche." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ore too nkanashera inono, Sodom tenebo intoyie enyena naa kerrinyokino eneikununo apa te dukuya, ore Samaria o ntoyie enyena nerrinyo eneikununo apa te dukuya; ore iyie tenebo ntoyie inono naa irrinyokino eninkununo apa." 
Ezekiel16:56 Amaa apa enkanashe ino Sodom keitu eipoti tenkutuk ino teina olong apa olwuasa lino," 
Ezekiel16:57 eton eitu eboluni intorrok inono? Indipa taata atotiu anaa ninye entoki nadol esulare too ntoyie e Edom o lelatia enye pooki, o too ntoyie oo Lfilisti, lelo pooki likimanita likimenaa iyie." 
Ezekiel16:58 Inap iyie enkitamioto eloloito ino, tenebo olminong lino, ejo Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel16:59 “Ee, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ekaitaas iyie anaa ina nitaasa, ilo otemenayie ilo mumai agil ilo ning'o lo sotua." 
Ezekiel16:60 Kake kadamu osotua lai tenebo iyie too nkolong'i e kitisho ino, naa kaitasheyie te iyie olning'o lai lo sotua loo ntarasi." 
Ezekiel16:61 Ina peyie ilotu adamu inkoitoi inono nikurru tenaya nkanashera inono, nkanashera inono botoro o nkutiti, naaisho ninche iyie anaa ntoyie, kake mme te nkaraki ilo sotua tenebo iyie." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ekaitasheyie osotua lai tenebo iyie, naa iyiolou ajo ara nanu Olaitoriani,"
