Ezekiel16:63 peyie itum atadamu nimputukuny, nimintoki aekata abol enkutuk ino te nkaraki enkurruna ino, tenaapalaki iyie nena pooki nitaasa, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii nanu ejo: 
Ezekiel17:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, tolimu oloyiote niro enkitanyaanyukoto airorie enkaji e Israel;" 
Ezekiel17:3 tiaaki inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, Eewuo olkurragos sapuk oota naipuko sapuki o nkopir naado too naipuko, nebore esidano oomuain kumok, nelotu Lebanon negil ilukuny ooltarakua;" 
Ezekiel17:4 negilu ilukuny oo ltarakua nena lukuny enye naaipilipil aya ninche enkop namirishoreki, nepik enkanasa oo lbiasharani." 
Ezekiel17:5 Neitoki aya lelo anterera leina kop neun ninche te nterit napir; nepik ninye embata oo nkariak sapuki; Neitasheyie ninye anaa Enkaitubului nabulu," 
Ezekiel17:6 nebulu ninye neaku osabibu oti oisalaashari, nerrinyokino ninye ilng'osil lenyena, ore ntona enyena nebik teine neitasheyie ninye. Metaa etaa ninye olchani lo sabibu, neiu ninye ilng'osil kumok neitayu ntapuka." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Kake etii apa likae kurragos sapuk oata inaipuko sapuki naa sidai oleng emua; naa ng'ura, idol ilo shani lo sabibu neitorioki ntona enyena ninye peyie etum ninye atipika enkare ninye. Ore teine apa netuunieki ninye," 
Ezekiel17:8 neitoki ninye aun ninye te nterit sidai natii inkariak sapuki, peyie etum atoiu ilng'osil neiu ilng'anayio, neaku olchani lo sabibu le nkitoo." 
Ezekiel17:9 Tejo, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: kebulaa ninye? Aimedotu ninye ntona enyena nedung'oo ilng'osil lenyena, neaku ore nena pilipil enyena ng'ejuko oo mbenek netoyu? Meya enkaina nagol oo ltung'ana kumok peyie edotuni ninye too ntona enyena." 
Ezekiel17:10 Ng'ura, ore teneitokini aaun kebulaa ninye? Aimetoyu katukul teneosh enkijape oo loo saen ninye, netoyu teine netuunieki ninye?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enatii ejo," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Tiaki taata ina aji kiserut, Aimiyiolo enautu kuna baa? Toliki ninche tiaki, ng'ura, eewuo olaiguanani le Babilon Yerusalem, neya laiguanak lenyena tenebo ilkituaak lenyena neyaki ninche ninye te Babilon." 
Ezekiel17:13 Neya olantererai obo le nkitoo neitayunye olning'o o ninye, nepik ninye abori olmumai. (Ore iltung'ana kituaak leina kop oowa ninye aitung'uaa enkop," 
Ezekiel17:14 peyie etumi aaitoborro ina kitoo nemeitoki ailepie kewan shumata, neaku teneibung olning'o lenye neidim aitasho.)" 
Ezekiel17:15 Kake eisero ninye eirriwaki ilbalusuni le Misiri, peyie etum ninche ninche aaishoo mbartan o enjore kitok. Keidim ninye aisula? Keidim oltung'ani ailanyisho oas nena baa? Keidim atigila olning'o neitoki ake ailanyisho?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, esipa ore teine wueji nemanya olaiguanani ilo oitaaki ninye olaiguanani, ilo otanya olmumai lenye, ilo otigila osotua lenye tenebo ninye, te Babilon elo eninye aye." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ore Farao tenebo enjore enye kitok tenebo enkumoi enye meidim aataretu ninye to larrabal, ina kata nanang'ari inkang'itie nemani aamuat isunta naateshetaki peyie edung'oo enkishui oo lkumok." 
Ezekiel17:18 Ore amu etemenayie ninye ilo mumai, negil olning'o, neishoo enkaina enye metaasa ake kuna baa pooki, meimisho ninye." 
Ezekiel17:19 Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ore anaa enaishu nanu, esipa katukul ajo ore olmumai lai otemenayie ninye, osotua lai otigila ninye, ekaikilikuanu ninye te lukunya enye." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ekaisalaashaki ninye orreshet lai, naa keyae ninye Babilon najing atua enkiguana tenebo ninye teine te nkaraki ina taboi nataasa aagilunore nanu." 
Ezekiel17:21 Ore lelo arikok le njore enye, nebatata to lalem, ore lelo ooleku neidapashakini pooki shoto naimu enkijape; naayiolou ajo nanu Olaitoriani oiroro.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore nanu enkorrok ai naa kaitayu elukunya oltarakuai oodo, naitayu ninye aipang'ie; nagilu te ntopij, elukunya enye elukunya embeneyioi, naa idol nanu naa kaun ninye te nchumata entopij eine neeika aisul oldoinyio;" 
Ezekiel17:23 ore te nchumata oldoinyio le Israel naa kaun ninye peyie etum atoiu ilng'osil neiu ilng'anayio, neaku oltarakuai kitok; ore tiabori enye nemany impukunot pooki oo ng'uesi; ore to loip loo lng'osil lenyena ore impukunot pooki oo motonyi neponari aaisho." 
Ezekiel17:24 Neyiolou ilkeek pooki liong'ota aajo nanu Olaitoriani oitadoyio lelo keek adoru, naitubulu aitoodor lelo keek dorropu, naitoi lelo keek oonyori, naitonyorij lelo keek ootoito. Nanu Olaitoriani oiroro naa kaas ina." 
Ezekiel18:1 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani aigil alotu enatii ejo: 
Ezekiel18:2 “Ainyoo eutu ena ningil ena dung'et e rashe te nkop e Israel, ‘Einosa iloopapa isabibu ooisuijo, ore ilala loo nkera nenoto enkisuijo?’" 
Ezekiel18:3 Ore anaa enaishu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ore ena dung'et e rashe mintokiki aikata aasishore te Israel." 
Ezekiel18:4 Ing'ura, ore iltauja pooki naa ilaainei; o ltau sii le papa anaa enatiu oltau le nkerai olalai sii ninye: ore oltau pooki oas ing'ok naa keye." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Tenaa supat oltung'ani neas ina supat naishiaakino 
Ezekiel18:6 tenemedaa too ldoinyo arashu edumu inkonyek enyena aing'or nena aitin nemeishu enkaji e Israel, nemeisarkionie enkitok olelatia enye arashu elo enetii enkitok te nkata enye oloirerio," 
Ezekiel18:7 nemeirony hoo likae tung'ani, kake elaaki ilo oota esile elaata enye, nemeas inenkikonya, neisho emukate enye lelo oota esumash neitoip olemeeta enkila te nkila," 
Ezekiel18:8 nemeisilenoo eponaa arashu eya pooki ponaroto, neibooyo enkaina enye aitung'uaa ntorrok, nedung enkiguana nasipa terishata oltung'ani o likae" 
Ezekiel18:9 nelo too nkitanapat aainei neing'or oleng agolie nkitanapat aainei, naa supat ninye, eketon ninye eishu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Teneiu ninye olayioni laa olaikonyani, olaibukoroni lo sarge, ilo lemeas nabo e kuna siaitin," 
Ezekiel18:11 kake edaa te kulo doinyo, neisarkionie enkitok olelatia enye," 
Ezekiel18:12 neirony lelo aisinak o lelo oota enyamali, neas ine nkikonya, nemeiteng'el ilo mumai, nedumu nkonyek enyena adumaki inkaitin nemeishu, neas imbususi," 
Ezekiel18:13 neisilenoo te mponaroto neya emponaroto; keitoki pasa aton eishu? Meitoki ninye aton eishu. Etaasa ninye kuna baa pooki olminong, meeta nchere aimeye, naa ore osarge lenye neaku shumata enyeetii." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Kake teneiu ele tung'ani enkayioni nadol nena ng'ok pooki naataasa papaai lenye, neureishoyu, nemeas nena naataasa" 
Ezekiel18:15 nemedaa too nchumat oo ldoinyo arashu edumu inkonyek enyena adumaki nkaitin nemeishu enkaji e Israel, nemeisarkionie enkitok olelatia enye" 
Ezekiel18:16 nemeinyal likae tung'ani, neshuku ina nainosie olmumai elulung'a nemeas inenkikonya, kake eisho endaa enye lelo oota esumash neishopoki lelo lemeishopo enkila," 
Ezekiel18:17 neibooyo enkaina pee meas intorrok, nemeya ina naponari arashu eponaa, neing'or ajurru irrekiei laainei, nelo ti atua nkitanapat aainei; nemeye ninye too ng'ok e papaai lenye; meeta nchere peemeton eishu." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ore enkaraki papaai lenye, amu eitamoo kewan imbaa enkiba, neikony olalashe lenye, neas ina neme sidai ti atua iltung'ana lenyena, ing'ura, keye ninye te nkaraki ing'ok enye." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Nijo ake, ‘Ainyoo peyie menyamalu ilo ayioni too ng'ok e menye?’ Teneas olayioni ina naishiaakino nesipa, netujurruo oleng inkitanapat aainei, metaa nchere pee meton eishu." 
Ezekiel18:20 Ore oltau oas eng'oki naa keye. Menyamalu olayioni te nkaraki ing'ok e menye, arashu enyamalu menye te nkaraki ing'ok o layioni lenye; ore esupatisho osupat neton te shumata e ilo oota, ore entorroni e ilo torrono netonie shumata ninye." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Kake teneibelekenyunye ilo torrono too ntorrok enyena pooki naataasa neibung inkitanapat aainei neas ina naishiaakino nesipa, meeta nchere pee meton eishu; nemee ninye." 
Ezekiel18:22 Meetae entorroni enye nabo naataasa naitokini aadamu te nkaraki ninye; ore tesupatisho nataasa nemeeta nchere, meton eishu." 
Ezekiel18:23 Kaatayie nanu enchipai keeya e ilo torrono, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, neme nchere pee eibelekenya ninye te nkoitoi enye neton eishu?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Kake teneibelekenya oltung'ani supat aing'uaa ina supatisho enye neas ing'ok neas nena bususi olminong pooki naasita ilo tung'ani torrono, keidim atotona eishu ninye? Meetae nabo oo siaitin naataasa supati naitokini aadamu; amu ore te nkitapong'oto nataayie ninye olarruoni o te ngoki nataasa ninye, naa kee." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Nijo ake, ‘Ore ina oitoi Olaitoriani nemesipa!’ Inining'o tena kata, iyie naaji e Israeli: Amaa enkoitoi ai aimesipa? Aime inkoitoi inyi nemesipa?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Ore teneibelekenya oltung'ani supat aing'uaa esupatisho enye, neas ing'ok, naa keye te nkaraki ina; keye te nkaraki ina ng'oki nataasa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Ake sii, ore teneibelekenyunye oltung'ani aing'uaa nena torrok naataasa neas ina naishiaakino nesipa, naa keitajeu enkishui enye." 
Ezekiel18:28 Amu etujurruo neibelekenyunye aing'uaa ntorrok pooki naataasa, meeta nchere peyie meton eishu, meye ninye." 
Ezekiel18:29 Nejoito ake enkaji e Israel, ‘Ore enkoitoi o Laitoriani nemesipa!’ Iyie na aji e Israel, amaa nkoitoi aainei aimesipa? Aime nkoitoi inono nemesipa?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Metaa ekaaiguanare iyie, iyie na aji e Israel, pooki ng'ae te risioroto oo inkoitoi enyena, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai. Irridu nimbelekenya aing'uaa intorrok inono pooki, arashu eyaku ing'ok inono enkidaaroto ino." 
Ezekiel18:31 Taarai intung'uai kewan intorrok pooki nena nitaasa kigilunore nanu, nitumokiki ate oltau ng'ejuk o enkiyang'et ng'ejuk! Ainyoo peyie iye naaji e Israel?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Amu maata enchipai e keeya e pooki ng'ae ejo Olaitoriani Enkai; metaa imbelekenyunye pee inchu.” 
Ezekiel19:1 Ore iyie tudumu enkishirata adumaki ilkituaak le Israel," 
Ezekiel19:2 nijo: Kaa lipong apa olng'atuny ng'utunyi ti atua ilng'atunyo! Eitubulua ing'atunyo kutiti ti atua ilng'atunyo. 
Ezekiel19:3 Eitubulua nabo oo ng'atunyo enyena, neaku oloti ng'atuny, neitamok kewan eneiko teneibung ing'uesi, neinos ninye iltung'ana." 
Ezekiel19:4 Ore iloreren nening'oo ninche, nerreshi ninye te ngumoto enye neyau ninche ninye too lala oogamishoreki, aayau enkop e Misiri." 
Ezekiel19:5 Ore pee edol ng'otonye ajo eisulieki, netaa eiting'o osiligi lenye, neya ninye likae kuoo, too lkuoo lenyena, neitaa oloti ng'atuny." 
Ezekiel19:6 Neloolo ninye ti atua ilng'atunyo, neaku oloti ng'atuny; neitayiolo kewan eneiko teneibung ing'uesi; neinos iltung'ana." 
Ezekiel19:7 Nemut aidaikie isempewueti lenye, neitomijooni inkanas enye; ore enkop neiputukuny o lelo pooki oomanya ninye, to ltoilo lenkikurrukur enye." 
Ezekiel19:8 Ina peyie edumakino ninye iloreren aarare ninye, nepik irresheta pooki alo; neisalaashaki orreshet lenye shumata enye; neyae ninye atua engumoto enye." 
Ezekiel19:9 Ore too lala oololo nepiki ninye osanduku, oibung'ieki nenapieki ing'uesi neyakini ninye olaiguanani le Babilon; nenapi ninye atua ewueji neikenorieki, peyie meitokini aekata aaning oltoilo lenye, te shumata lelo doinyo le Israel." 
Ezekiel19:10 Etiu apa ng'utunyi anaa osabibu le nkurma, otuunokoki embata enkare, oiu ilng'anayio nebore sii ilng'osil, te nkaraki enkare sapuk." 
Ezekiel19:11 Ore enchata enye empolos neaku eng'udi olaiguanani; etubulua ninye alus pooki, ti atua nenen neesur oo lng'osil; nedoli enkadori enye, ti atua enkumoi oo lng'osil lenyena." 
Ezekiel19:12 Kake etadotuoki olchani lo sabibu te ngoro napi, aanang'aki enkop, ore olkutati loo loo saen neitoi ninye; ore ilng'anayio lenyena nedung'ori, ore entonata o lchani ogol neitoi, nemut ninye enkima aidaikie." 
Ezekiel19:13 Enyaakaki taata aaun to lpurkel, te nkop natoyio neeta enkure." 
Ezekiel19:14 Neshomo enkima aing'uaa entonata enye, nemut ilng'osil lenyena olng'anayio, metaa metii enetelekua te ninye teina tonata nagol, nemeetae eng'udi o laiguanani. Ore ena naa enkishirata, netaa enkishirata." 
Ezekiel20:1 Ore to lari le naapishana, to lapa le imiet te nkolong e tomon o lapa, nepuonu embata oo lpayiani le Israel aaikilikuanu mbaa to Laitoriani, netoni te dukuya nanu." 
Ezekiel20:2 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel20:3 “Enkerai e tung'ani, irorie ilpayiani le Israel nijoki ninche, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, Ainanu ipuonunu aaikilikuanishore pee ietuo? Ore anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, mikinkilikuanishorere nanu." 
Ezekiel20:4 Aiminguanare iyie ninche, enkerai e tung'ani, aiminguanare iyie ninche? Ina pee inchosho ninche metayiolo olminong loo loo menye lenye," 
Ezekiel20:5 nijoki ninche, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore teina olong apa nategelua Israel, nanya olmumai teina ishoi e nkaji e Yakobo, naitayiolo kewan ninche te ina kop e Misiri, ainosa apa olmumai teninche ajo, Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Ezekiel20:6 Ore teina olong nainosa olmumai te nkaraki ninche inchere kayau ninche aitupuku te ina kop e Misiri aya ninche ina kop naing'uraka ninche, enkop naruko kule o enaisho, enkop sidai aisul too nkuapi pooki." 
Ezekiel20:7 Najoki nanu ninche, entayu enturrai intokitin torrok naadaare nkonyek inyi, pooki ng'ae te intae, nimintokiki aaisarkionie ate too nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nemeishu e Misiri; Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Ezekiel20:8 Kake etaa ninche kiseruti te nanu nemaaning nanu; eitu eitayu aipang'ie ong'ata pooki tung'ani intokitin torrok naaingor nkonyek enye neitu eiturraa nena kitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nemeishu e Misiri. “Amu atadamua nanu ajo kabukoki engoro ai napi shumata ninche, naishoru engoro ai aarare ninche ti atua enkop e Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Kake ataasa enataasa te nkaraki enkarna ai, peyie meisarkionieki te dukuya iloreren lelo oomanya atua, lelo laibalakinye kewan edolita aitupuku ninche teina kop e Misiri." 
Ezekiel20:10 Metaa atorikoyie ninche aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri nayau ninche atua olpurkel. 
Ezekiel20:11 Naisho ninche nkiguanat aainei naitodol ninche nkitanapat aainei, laa ore pooki tung'ani ogolie asuj ninche, neton eishu." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ore ake sii aishoo ninche isabatoni aainei, anaa olmonekie te rishata ai o ninche, peyie etum aatayiolo aajo nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny ninche." 
Ezekiel20:13 Kake ore enkaji e Israel netaa kiseruti te nanu to lpurkel, eitu ninche epuoyie nkiguanat aainei kake etanyaita nkitanapat aainei, naa tenesuj oltung'ani ninche neton eishu; ore isabatoni aainei neisarkionie oleng. “Ina peyie adamu ajo kabuku engoro ai abukoki shumata ninche to lpurkel peyie atum aishie ninche tukul." 
Ezekiel20:14 Kake ataasishe te nkaraki enkarna ai, peyie meisarkionieki ninye te dukuya iloreren, laa ninche aitupukunye ninche edolita." 
Ezekiel20:15 Ore ake sii nainosa olmumai te nkaraki ninche to lpurkel inchere mayau ninche ina kop naishoo ninche, enkop naruko kule o enaisho, enkop naisul te sidano," 
Ezekiel20:16 ore amu etanyaita ninche nkiguanat aainei neitu epuoyie ninche nkitanapat aainei, neisarkionie isabatoni aainei; amu etusuja iltauja lenye nena kitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye nemeishu." 
Ezekiel20:17 Ore ake eyia, eing'urrie enkong'u ai ninche, neaku eitu amut ninche aidaikie arashu aiting'ie ninche tiong'ota." 
Ezekiel20:18 “Najoki nanu nkera enye tiong'ota, emipuoyie nena kitanapat o loo papaai linyi, arashu isujusuju inkiguanat enye, arashu indurukiekie ate too nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye nemeishu." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi; enchomie nkitanapat aainei ning'oring'oro oleng aajurru nkiguanat aainei," 
Ezekiel20:20 niyanyititi isabatoni aainei peyie etum aataa olmonekie te rishata ai o intae, peyie iyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi." 
Ezekiel20:21 Kake ore nena kera kiseruti te nanu; eitu ninche epuoyie nkiguanat aainei, neitu ejurru aaing'or inkiguanat aainei, naa te njurrunoto najurruni eishu oltung'ani; eisarkionie ninche isabatoni aainei. “Ina peyie adamu ajo kairriu engoro ai napi shumata ninche naitorioki engoro ai agilunore ninche ti ong'ota." 
Ezekiel20:22 Kake aibooyie nanu enkaina ai, naasisho te nkaraki enkarna ai, peyie meisarkionieki ninye te dukuya iloreren, laa too nkonyek enye eipang'unye nanu ninche." 
Ezekiel20:23 Ore ake sii ainosie ninche olmumai tiong'ata inchere ekaisardakie ninche ti atua iloreren naidapashaa ninche too nkuapi," 
Ezekiel20:24 amu eitu eas ninche nkiguanat aainei, kake etanyaita nkitanapat aainei neisarkionie isabatoni aainei, ore nkonyek enye neitoriokino nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nemeishu oo loo menye." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ore ake eyia naishoo ninche nkitanapat nena nemesidain o nkiguanat naa te ninche meidim aanoto enkishui; 
Ezekiel20:26 naisarkionie nanu ninche te nena kishorot enye, aisho ninche meishooi to lasar le nkima lelo ilkikaunot lenye, pee atum aituria ninche; ataasa nanu ina pee etum ninche aatayiolo nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Metaa, enkerai e tung'ani, irorie enkaji e Israel nijoki ninche, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore ake sii, nena ae toki naatamorie iloo papaai linyi, amu eitarruoitie ninche te dukuya nanu." 
Ezekiel20:28 Ore apa peyie ariku ninche ina kop apa nainosie olmumai ajo kaisho ninche, neaku ore pooki doinyo oodo odol arashu olchani ake ninye pooki oota mbenek, neishooyo ninche teine ilasarri lenye, neitarasaa ninche teine iolasar le ngoro; neirriwaa teine olasar le ngoro ooki." 
Ezekiel20:29 (Najoki nanu ninche, koree ine wueji neika nipuopuo? Neaku keji enkarna e ine Bama o metabaiki ena olong.)" 
Ezekiel20:30 Neaku naa tiaaki enkaji e Israel, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Indurukiekie ate anaa enaikuna iloo papaai linyi nipong'oriri aasuj nena tokitin enye naaiduruk?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Ore tinintayuyu inkishorot inyi nintayuyu inkera inyi too lasarri le nkima, nindurukiekie ate too nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin inyi nemeishu pooki o ena olong. Naa aikindimidimi intae aaikilikuanishore nanu, na aji e Israel? Ore anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, mikinkilikuanishorere intae nanu." 
Ezekiel20:32 “Ore ina natii indamunot inyi nemeaku ae kata ina damunoto, ‘Matotiu anaa iloreren anaa iloshon loo nkuapi, nikiserem inkeek o soito.’" 
Ezekiel20:33 “Ore anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, esipa te nkaina magilani o te nkaina naitoriori, o te ngoro natubukuoki, kaaku nanu Olaiguanani te shumata iyie." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ekaaitayu iyie aitupuku tiatua iloreren naiturrurru intae aitung'uaa nkuapi nena nindapashakinote, te nkaina magilani o te nkaina naitoriori, o te ngoro nabukuni," 
Ezekiel20:35 naa kayau nanu intae ongota too loshon, najing te ine enkiguana tenebo intae king'ura too nkomomi." 
Ezekiel20:36 Anaa enatijinga enkiguana tenebo iloo papaai linyi tiong'ota enkop e Misiri, naa kajing enkiguana tenebo intae, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ekaimie intae abori eng'udi, naisho intae entijing atua te nkikena." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ekaisujaa lelo kiseruti tiatua intae, o lelo ooas intorrok aagilunore nanu; ekaitupuku ninche te ina kop nashomo kake mejing ninche enkop e Israel. Ina peyie iyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel20:39 “Ore te iyie, iyie naaji e Israel, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Shomo pooki ng'ae isiayia inkaitin oo nkitanyaanyukot inono nemeishu, tenakata o te siadi ena, tinimikining'ining'i nanu; kake ore enkarna ai sinyati mintokiki aikata aaisarkionie too nkishorot inyi oo nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nemeishu." 
Ezekiel20:40 “Amu ore te shumata oldoinyo lai sinyati, too nchumat oo ldonyo le Israel, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, teine aaisiai enkaji pooki e Israel pooki ng'ae, akaaisiaiai nanu teina kop; naa kang'amaa nanu ninche te ine, naa teine aikilikuanu inkishorot inyi o ntokitin sidain oo nkishorot inyi, tenebo lasarri linyi oosinya." 
Ezekiel20:41 Anaa esong'uana narropil ekang'amaa intae, ina kata naitupuku intae too loreren, naiturrurru intae aitung'uaa nena kuapi pooki naaidapashakaki intae; naa kaibalunye esinyatisho ai tiatua intae edolita iloreren pooki." 
Ezekiel20:42 Niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata nayau intae enkop e Israel, ina kop apa nainosie iloo papaai linyi olmumai ajo kaisho ninche" 
Ezekiel20:43 ore teine naa idamumu inkoitoi inyi o pooki nitaasa te nena nindurukie ate, naa igorokinono ate te pooki torrono nitaasa." 
Ezekiel20:44 Naa iyiolouu inchere ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata naitaas intae ina te nkaraki enkarna ai, neme te nkaraki inkoitoi inyi torrok neme te nkaraki isiaaitin inyi torrok, iyie naaji e Israel, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel20:46 “Enkerai e tung'ani, intorioki enkomom ino enkalo e kopikop tolikioi ororei tigilunore kopikop," 
Ezekiel20:47 nimbonoki agilunore entim e nkop e Negeb ijoki: entim e Negeb toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, Ing'ura ekaainuaaki iyie enkima, naa kemut pooki shani onyori otii atuaiyie o pooki shani otoyio; ore olang'a le nkima nemearaiyu, ore inkomomi pooki eiteru te kopikop o metabaiki moikuape naa keilang ninye." 
Ezekiel20:48 Ore iseseni pooki naa kedol aajo nanu Olaitoriani oinuaa ninye nemeari ninye.” 
Ezekiel20:49 Ina peyie ajo, “Aha Olaitoriani Enkai! Aajoki ninche nanu, ‘Aime Olaitoriani ele loo nkitanyaanyukot too nkatinin?’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii aajoki: 
Ezekiel21:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, intorioki enkomom ino enkalo e Yerusalem niliki ororei aarare nena wuejitin sinyat; imbonoki tigilunore enkop e Israel" 
Ezekiel21:3 nijoki ina kop e Israel, Inji ejo Olaitoriani: Ing'ura ekaarare iyie, naa kaaitorioki iyie olalem lashutu te nchashur enye, nadung'oo tiatua iyie lelo supati o ltorrok." 
Ezekiel21:4 Ore amu kadung'oo te iyie lelo supati o lelo torrok, neaku kepuku olalem lai aing'uaa enchashur enye aarare iltung'ana pooki eiteru te kopikop o meshomo moikuape;" 
Ezekiel21:5 neyiolou iltung'ana pooki aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani otushutua olalem lai te nchashur; nemeitokini aaigil aashukoki olalem enchashur. 
Ezekiel21:6 Iyagie naa, enkerai e tung'ani; iyagie oltau omu eeta osina to ltau le mion te dukuya nkonyek enye." 
Ezekiel21:7 Naa tinikinkilikuan ninche aajoki, ‘Ainyoo peyie iyagie?’ Naa ijoki, ‘Te nkaraki lelo kiliku oopuonu. Ore peyie ebau, naa kelepori pooki tau ore nkaik pooki naa keshalu, ore pooki tau neiterre neshalu nkung pooki anaa enkare. Ing'ura, ajo elotu naa keitabari ninye.’ ” Ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel21:8 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Enkerai e tung'ani, imbonisho nijo, Ena ejo Olaitoriani: Olalem, eiyioki olalem, neiutuutoki aasik," 
Ezekiel21:10 aaii tenkaraki eyieng'are, netisikaki meimerlela anaa enkiwuang'ata! Arashu aikintobiru enkuenia? Itemenayie eng'udi, enkerai ai, o pooki toki e nchata." 
Ezekiel21:11 Metaa eishooyioki olalem metisiki, peyie etumi aaibung'a neiyioki nesiki, peyie etumi aatipik ina aina oloyieng'isho." 
Ezekiel21:12 Inchira niyietu nakerai e tung'ani, amu kegilunore ninye iltung'ana laainei; kegilunore ninye iltung'ana pooki kituaak le Israel; etipikaki ninche pooki olalem tenebo iltung'ana laainei. Toosho naa enkupes ino." 
Ezekiel21:13 Amu meaku ninye entemata kaa eas ninye tinimenaa iyie engudi?” ejo Olaitoriani Enkai. 
Ezekiel21:14 “Imbonisho naa, enkerai e tung'ani, toosho inkaik inono nincho olalem meeu adou katitin are, ee kat uni, ilo alem le lelo ooari metuata; olalem leyieng'are kitok, laa ninye oman ninche," 
Ezekiel21:15 peyie etum iltauja lenye aatalepori, nebatata ilkumok too nkishomin enye. Aishorua ilo alem oimerlel; Aha! Eitobiruno ninye anaa enkiwuang'ata, netisikaki peyie etum ateyiengisho." 
Ezekiel21:16 Tudung'o oleng tatene o kedienye ine wueji netuutakaki enepi olalem. 
Ezekiel21:17 Ekaosh sii nanu nkaik aainei, naa kaitaraposh engoro ai; nanu Olaitoriani oiroro.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel21:19 “Enkerai e tung'ani, tuutu inkoitoi are tenkaraki ilo alem le ilo aiguanani le Babilon olotu; epuonu pokira are teina kop. Nintobiriri embao nautu eneimi, nipik ninye dukuya ina oitoi nalo enkanasa;" 
Ezekiel21:20 tuutu enkoitoi naim ilo alem alo Raba oo Lamoni o meshomo Yuda o meshomo Yerusalem ina ang nasheta isunta. 
Ezekiel21:21 Amu eitasho olaiguanani le Babilon teine neorore inkoitoi te rishata e nena oitoi are, easishore enaibon; neikirikirie mbaa, neikilikuanishore enkitanyaanyukoto e nkai naji Terafi, neing'or emonyua eina ngues naibonishore." 
Ezekiel21:22 Ore atua enkaina enye e tatene nepuku enkukuo e Yerusalem pee ebol enkutuk enye te nkishirata, peyie eilepie oltoilo te mbuaata, pee eitorioki isekenke naagilieki nkishomin neitasheyie nenen neesheta te ng'olon neshetu iltaleta ooibung'ishore." 
Ezekiel21:23 Kake ore te ninche, netiu anaa enaibon elejare; einosa ninche ilmuma oogol; kake eyau ninye eng'oki enye metadamuni, peyie etumi aaibung'a." 
Ezekiel21:24 “Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore amu intaa ing'ok inono inaadamuni, te ina nemeekure eisudoroyu intorrok inono, neaku ore too siaaitin inono pooki naa keibalayu ing'ok inono; amu ieuo iyie adamu; naa aikiya ninche iyie." 
Ezekiel21:25 Ore iyie, intae iltung'ana torrok lemesinya, olkitok le Israel, ilo oewuo enkolong enye, erishata enkitamioto ino nabayie," 
Ezekiel21:26 inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Intayu enkarasha endukuya, nintayu ina maupe enkitoo; meitoki intokitin aatiu anaa enaikununo; isisa ina nidol etii abori, nintadou ina natii shumata." 
Ezekiel21:27 Enkidaata, enkidaata, kaitobiru nanu enkidaata; metumi ninye eneima ninye o meeu ninye aa enenye esipata; naa ninye aisho nanu." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Ore iyie, nakerai e tung'ani, imbonisho nijo: Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai tialo Ilamoni, neipirta sii enkurruna enye; tejo, Olalem, olalem etushurtuaki peyie eyieng'ishoi, netisikaki meimerlela anaa enkiwuang'ata," 
Ezekiel21:29 ore edol ninche te ntae induaat elejare ina kata eibonoki ninche intae elejare, peyie eeniki imurto e lelo tung'ana lemesinya torrok, lelo ootabaikia ninche enkolong enye enkata enkitamioto enye nabayie." 
Ezekiel21:30 Tushukoki olalem enchashur enye. Teine wueji nikintobirieki iyie, teina kop apa ning'uaa ekaaiguanare nanu iyie." 
Ezekiel21:31 Naa kabukoki shumata intae engoro ai; nakutaki intae enkima engoro ai; na kapik intae inkaik oo ltung'ana arruok meidaikie. 
Ezekiel21:32 Iakuku intae ilkeek le nkima; ore osarge linyi nejing empolos e ina kop; meitokini aekata aadamu intae; amu nanu Olaitoriani oiroro.” 
Ezekiel22:1 Ore ake sii eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani ine natii naajoki: 
Ezekiel22:2 “Ore iyie enkerai e tung'ani, aiminguanare iyie, aiminguanare iyie enkanasa osarge? Nimbalakinye ninye nena baa pooki olminong enyena." 
Ezekiel22:3 Naa ijoki, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore enkanasa naibukoyie osarge te rishata enye; peyie etum enkata enye aeu, neitobiru nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nemeishu aidurukie kewan!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Itaa iyie torrono tenkaraki osarge limbukoitie; ninduruko te nena kitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nemeishu nintobirutua, niyautua aaitinyiku enkolong inyi etabawua ina kata nageluno oo larin linyi. Neaku aaitaa iyie enkurruna too loreren, nikisurdaanyi iyie too nkuapi pooki." 
Ezekiel22:5 Ore lelo ootaana o lelo oo lakua te iyie naa aikisurdaany iyie, iyie leme toki, obore enkingolingol." 
Ezekiel22:6 “Ng'ura, ore lelo kituaak le Israel netii atua iyie, pooki ng'ae te ngolon enye, netemerregelaki to sarge oibukori." 
Ezekiel22:7 Ore papa o yieyio neitaasaki inolmena tiatua iyie; ore olomoni otii atua iyie neisimaki te rishata ino; ore nkokishin o nkolia tiatua iyie neinyalaki. 
Ezekiel22:8 Itemenayie iyie intokitin aainei sinyat, nisarkionienie isabatoni aainei." 
Ezekiel22:9 Etii iltung'ana ootii atua iyie ooiro imbaa enkarruoisho pee eibukori osarge, oltung'ana tiatua iyie oodaa too nchumat oo ildonyio; iltung'ana ooas enkarruoisho tiatua intae." 
Ezekiel22:10 Ore tiatua iyie neoru iltung'ana iloo menye ilkilani, ore tiatua iyie neibung inkituaak te rishata enye enkiduruk." 
Ezekiel22:11 Eas obo olminong te nkitok ole latia enye; ore likae neotiki te nkoitoi torrono ainyal enkitok olayioni lenye; ore likae tiatua iyie neinyal enkanashe enye, entito e papaai lenye." 
Ezekiel22:12 Ore ake tiatua iyie neya iltung'ana eropare peyie eibukoo o sarge; niyaya ilaat emponaroto e dupoto inyi too lelatia linyi ironyironyo; nemeekure kidamumu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Ing'ura, ore naa, atoosho inkaik aainei tenebo te ina dupoto e lejare nintobirua o te ilo sarge otii arishata ino." 
Ezekiel22:14 Keidim engolon ino e oshoke atobikoi, arashu keidim inkaik inyi aatagol, te nena olong'i naalotu aarare iyie? Nanu Olaitoriani oiroro, naa kaas ina." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ekaaidapash iyie tiatua iloreren naisardakie iyie too nkuapi, namut ilduruki linono te iyie." 
Ezekiel22:16 Naa kaaisarkionieki nanu te dukuya iyie tiatua iloreren; niyiolou ajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.” 
Ezekiel22:17 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel22:18 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore enkaji e Israel netupuruko oleng te nanu, ninche pooki, ore enkosholai o suyiai o empirbil o esekenkei o risasi otii atua olkokuet, netupuruko pooki." 
Ezekiel22:19 Neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore amu itupuruko pooki, neaku ing'ura ekaiturrur intae terishata e Yerusalem." 
Ezekiel22:20 Anaa enaiturrurru iltung'ana enkosholai o suyai o esekenkei o risasi o empirbil nepik atua olkokuet peyie ekutaki ninche enkima shumata ninye peyie etum aatoshol ninye; neaku kaiturrurru intaete ngoro ai o te ngoro ai napi, napik intae atua ashol intae." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ekaiturrur intae nakutaki intae enkima engoro ai napi, naa kesholi intae te rishata enye." 
Ezekiel22:22 Anaa enasholi enkosholai to lkokuet, naa kesholi intae te rishata enye; naa iyiolouu ajo nanu Olaitoriani otubukoko engoro ai shumata inyi.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel22:24 “Enkerai e tung'ani tiaaki ninye, ira iyie enkop nemesinya, arashu natashaikia te ina olong e ng'oro." 
Ezekiel22:25 Ore ilkituaak ootii atua ninye netiu anaa olng'atuny oikurrukur opolos engues, etumuta enkishui oo ltung'ana; ewaita ninche ilchumat o ntokitin naagol enkingang'a; eitaa ninche inkituaak kumok inkolia." 
Ezekiel22:26 Ore ilapolosak lenye netaasa ine nkikonya too nkitanapat aainei neisarkionie intokitin aainei sinyat; eitu ninche erishu intokitin sinyat o ntokitin e pooki ng'ae, neitu eitamok olorere enepaashare entoki naiduruk o esidai, netemenaitie ninche isabatoni aainei, metaa aaisarkionieki nanu tiatua ninche." 
Ezekiel22:27 Ore ilkituaak ootii erishata enye netiu anaa isuyian oopolos inkiri engues naibung'a, neibukoo osarge, neishu enkishui peyie etum nena kishorot nemesipa. Ekairriu enchan sapuk oleng, isoito sapuki le nchan, nelotu olkutati kitok oleng." 
Ezekiel22:28 Ore iloibonok lenye netumura te nturoto e monkoi, nedol induaat nemesipa, neibonoki ninche elejare ejoki: ‘Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai’, eitu ninye eiro Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel22:29 Etaasa iltung'ana lena nkop entorrono, netaasa inenkikonya; eironya ninche ilaisinak o lomena, netaasa ine mesipa too ldokunot eitu ejurru enyamali enye." 
Ezekiel22:30 Naing'oru oltung'ani tiatua ninche olo ashet ina suntai neitashe teina lusie e suntai te dukuya nanu tenkaraki ina kop, peyie matum aidaikie ninye; kake eitu atum hoo obo." 
Ezekiel22:31 Metaa atubukuo nanu engoro ai shumata ninche; atumuta nanu ninche te nkima engoro ai napi; ore enkoitoi enye eitalakua too lukuny enye, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki; 
Ezekiel23:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, etii apa inkituaak are naa intoyie enkitok nabo;" 
Ezekiel23:3 neiborrie apa onyek te Misiri; neas inenkiborra oo nkonyek tekitisho ore teine, neirragi too lki lenye neirrapirrapi ilgooitie lenye." 
Ezekiel23:4 Keji apa enkarna eina botor Ohola neji enkarna enkanashe enye Oholiba. Neaku ninche inaainei, neiu ninche ilayiok o ntoyie. Ore too nkarn enye ore Ohola naa Samaria ore Oholiba naa Yerusalem." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Eiborrie ongu Ohola aa enaai ninye, netonyarra ninye isintan lenyena, le Asiria," 
Ezekiel23:6 ilmurran ooishopo inkilani naata emua morijoi, ilaitoriak o laitasheikinok, laa ore pooki naa ilbarnot oo ng'uarri oleng, nekedito ninche imbartan." 
Ezekiel23:7 Eishoo ninye kewan ninche anaa emulayoi lelo gelunot pooki le Asiria; neidurukie kewan too nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin e pooki ng'ae otaasie ine nkiborra oo nkonyek. 
Ezekiel23:8 Eitu ninye epal esiaai enye enkiborra oo nkonyek ina apa nataasa eiteru too nkolong'i naatiiyie Misiri; amu ore apa te nkitisho enye netaboitare ilewa ninye neibung'a olgoo netaboitare ninye etonaa eselenkei te mulayaisho nebukoki ninye enkiborra enye oo nkonyek. 
Ezekiel23:9 Metaa atanang'aka nanu ninye atua inkaik oo sintan lenyena, inkaik oo le Asiria lelo apa ootonyorra te nkiborra oo nkonyek." 
Ezekiel23:10 Nebolu lelo emasipaisho enye; neibung ilayiok lenyena o ntoyie enyena; ore tenebo ninye nedung to lalem; neaku ninye entoki naimakini tiatua inkituaak ina kata nadung'okini ninye enkiguana. 
Ezekiel23:11 “Ore enkanashe enye Oholiba netoduaa ena naa torrono apa ninye oleng alang ninye te nkiborra oo nkonyek, naa torrrono apa ninye alang enkanashe enye." 
Ezekiel23:12 Eiborrie ninye onyek too le Asiria, ilkituaak o larikok, ilmurran ooishopo too masaa olarrabal, ilookedito imbartan, laa ore pooki naa ilbarnot oo ng'uarrayu." 
Ezekiel23:13 Nadol apa ajo eidurukieki ninye; neim pokira orrekie obo. 
Ezekiel23:14 Kake etanapa ninye enkiborra enye oo nkonyek aitulus; etoduaa ninye ilewa, ootaguetakaki inkitanyaanyukot enye isunta nena kitanyaanyukoto oo Ilkaldayo oo yela to ranki onyokie," 
Ezekiel23:15 nerretena impolosi enye too nkimeitani o nkarash natii ilukuny enye netiu pooki anaa ilkituaak, empisha oo Babilon, laa ore enkop enye naa Ilkaldayo." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ore peyie edol ninye ninche neiborrie onyek te ninche neirriwaki ilkiliku ninche te Ilkaldayo. 
Ezekiel23:17 Nejing'aki Ilbabilon ninye tiatua endapash enye enyorrata, neidurukie ninye to lng'uarra lenye; ore peyie eidip ninche aaisarkionie ninye, nelo ninye aing'uaa ninche te ngoro." 
Ezekiel23:18 Ore teneas ninye inenkiborra oo nkonyek meeta enkuretisho neboloo emasipaisho enye aaibelekenya te ngoro aing'uaa ninye, anaa peyie aibelekenya aing'uaa enkanashe enye." 
Ezekiel23:19 Kake etoponayie ake ninye enkiborra oo nkonyek, edamu inkolong'i enyena e kitisho, ina kata eiborrie onyek te nkop e Misiri" 
Ezekiel23:20 neiborrie ninye onyek te lelo sanchan lenyena ooba irubat oo seseni lenye anaa inoo sirkon neeta esingate oo lamuyeishi loo mbartan, oonyaanyukie isirkon, neikununo eneing'uaa anaa enetiu eneing'uaa mbartan." 
Ezekiel23:21 Neaku neijia etiu eyieunoto entorroni oo lbarnot linono ina kata kimbung Ilmisiri olgoo lino neirony ilki linono kutiti.” 
Ezekiel23:22 Metaa, oi iyie Oholiba, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Ing'ura ajo kadumakino isanchan linono limbelekenyakine te ngoro mikitigilunore iyie eing'uaa nkaloli pooki." 
Ezekiel23:23 Ore ile Babilon tenebo Ilkaldayo pooki, o Pekod, o Shoa, o Koa, tenebo ile Asiria pooki tenebo ninche, o ltung'ana pooki ooti sidain, ilaiguanak o laitoriak pooki tenebo, ilarikok o lmurran, ekedito pooki imbartan." 
Ezekiel23:24 Naa aikipuonu aarare iyie eing'uaa enkalo e moikuape too ngarrin oo imbartan, o ngarrin o lorora kitok lo lorere; keiturrurro ninche peyie kiarare too nkaloli pooki eeta ilong'oi kutiti o sapuki, o nkopiyiani o larrabal, naa kapik enkiguana atua ninche, naa keiguanare intae anaa enatiu enkiguana enye." 
Ezekiel23:25 Naa kaibelekenyaki intae engoro ai aarare intae, peyie atum ataarare intae te ngoro napi. Kedung'oo ninche inkumeishin inyi o nkiyiaa inyi, ore ilekunot linyi nebatatakino olalem. Naa keibung aaya ilayiok linyi o ntoyie inyi, ore ilekunot linyi nemutite nkima." 
Ezekiel23:26 Keoru sii intae inkilani inyi neya te intae isoito linyi gelunot. 
Ezekiel23:27 Neaku neijia aiko tenaiting'ie enkiborra inyi oo nkonyek ina niyautua te nkop e Misiri; metaa mintokiki aaraposhoki nkonyek inyi Ilmisiri arashu intokiki aadamu ninche. 
Ezekiel23:28 Amu inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo kapik intae atua nkaik e lelo limbaba, atua inkaik e lelo limbelekenyanya aaing'uaa te ngoro;" 
Ezekiel23:29 naa kearare ninche intae te nkiba, neya ninche aaitung'uaa intae ilng'anayio pooki le siaai inyi, neing'uaa intae irara imasipa nemeishopo, ore emasipaisho inyi enkiborra oonkonyek inyi neboluni. Ore olng'uarra lino tenebo enkiborra ino oo nkonyek" 
Ezekiel23:30 ninye nayaua ena shumata iyie, amu itaasa enkiborra oo nkonyek tenebo iloreren, nindurukie ate too nkitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin." 
Ezekiel23:31 Itusuja iyie ina oitoi enkanashe ino; metaa kapik enkikompe enye enkaina ino. 
Ezekiel23:32 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Iok iyie enkikompe enkanashe ino, ina nagut naa sapuk; aikikuneiyieki iyie nikimenuni, amu keeta ninye esapuk;" 
Ezekiel23:33 aikimputi iyie emerei o sina Enkikompe enkuretisho sapuk o emutata, ina kikompe enkanashe ino Samaria;" 
Ezekiel23:34 iok iyie ninye nimitu pooki aishu, nidotu kewan ilpapit, nidung ilki linono; amu airoro nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel23:35 Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Ore amu intorikino kewan nanu, nikinyaaya oriong ino, neaku tanapa naa enyamali ino olng'uarra lino o enkiborra ino oo nkonyek.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani: “Enkerai e tung'ani, ainguanare iyie Ohola o Oholiba? Neaku imbalakinye naa ninche imbaa enye olminong." 
Ezekiel23:37 Amu etaasa ninche inenkiborra oo nkonyek, netii osarge atua inkaik enye; ore too nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye nemeishu netaasa eloloito; neishoo doi ninye endaa lelo ayiok laa nanu etoikitio." 
Ezekiel23:38 Ore ake sii eyia aaitaasa ninche nanu ena: eisarkionie ninche ewueji ai sinyati teina olong ake neisarkionie isabatoni aainei. 
Ezekiel23:39 Amu ore peyie eidip aateyieng inkera enye te mpolosare too nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye nemeishu, ore teina olong ake neetuo ninche atua ewueji ai sinyati aaisarkionie ninye. Naa ing'ura ena etaasa ninche te nkaji ai." 
Ezekiel23:40 Eipotutuo doi ninye iltung'ana meetu tenelakua, ilo oirriwakaki olkilikuai, naa ng'ura eetuo ninche. Amu tiatua ninche isuja iyie kewan, niyel inkonyek inono, nikus kewan too masaa;" 
Ezekiel23:41 nitonini intae te shumata olorika sidai, niata emisa natipikaki dukuya iyie naa ninye itipika iyie enkorropil ai tenebo eilata ai." 
Ezekiel23:42 Netii atua ninye oltoilo loo lororani lemeshilaa toki; tenebo ilewa ookishore tenebo ootorikuoki tiong'ota, nepik ninche ilkataarri nkaik e nena kituaak, o maupen enkitoo sidain too ilukuny enye." 
Ezekiel23:43 “Ina peyie ajo, aimeasita tena kata ilewa eloloito teneas enkiborra oo nkonyek tenebo ninye?" 
Ezekiel23:44 Amu etijing'akita ninche ninye, anaa enajing'aki ilewa enkitok naibor onyek. Neaku neijia eikunakinote ninche Ohila o Oholiba peyie eas inenkiborra oo nkonyek." 
Ezekiel23:45 Kake ore iltung'ana supati naa kedung'oki ninche enkiguana edung'oki ninche enkiguana enkiborra enye oo nkonyek, tenebo enkiguana oo nkituaak naaibukoitie osarge; amu inaaibor onyek ninche, netii osarge inkaik enye.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Iyau olorora taarare ninche, nintaa ninche entoki naitureisho naaruno." 
Ezekiel23:47 Naa kenang olorora ninche too soito neiwuang'ie ninche too lalema lenye; naa keyieng ninche ilayiok lenye o ntoyie enye nepejoo inkajijik enye. 
Ezekiel23:48 Neaku neijia aiko tenaiting'ie enkiborra enye oo nkonyek te nkop peyie etum ing'oruo pooki aaibung'ie ina inkiyiaa nemeitoki aas inenkiborra oo nkonyek anaa enitaasa iyie. 
Ezekiel23:49 Ore enkiborra inyi oo nkonyek naa keitalakuni te intae, ninapinapa elaakinoto tenkaraki eng'oki oo inkitanyaanyukot inyi oo nkaitin nemeishu; niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Ore to lari le naaudo to lapa le tomon, te nkolong e tomon o lapa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii aajoki:" 
Ezekiel24:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani ingero enkarna ena olong, etamuata olaiguanani le Babilon Yerusalem." 
Ezekiel24:3 Niro endung'et e rashe te nkaraki ina aji kiserut nijoki ninche, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai:" 
Ezekiel24:4 Intasheyie ina moti, intasheyie ninye, tubukoki ninye enkare; tipika ninye indung'ot oo nkiri, nena dung'ot pooki sidain, enkupes o orony; nimput ninye too loik sidain gelunot." 
Ezekiel24:5 Iwa enker naisul eluaata, nipik ilkeek le nkima abori enye; nintokitokie indung'ot enyena, nintokitokie sii iloik lenyena tiatua." 
Ezekiel24:6 “Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Woi iyie ina anasa osarge, ina nanyaanyukie emoti nainosa enkop, neton ake eitu eing'uaa ninye oloirerio lenye! Intayu te ninye indung'ot iitu, miata enigelu te nkukuo." 
Ezekiel24:7 Amu ore osarge oibukoyie ninye neton ake etii atua erishata enye; eiteleiki ninye enchumata endapidapoi nasipa eitu ninye ebukoki pee eitoipoo enterit. 
Ezekiel24:8 Peyie edumu engoro ai napi, peyie aitalaku, atipika ninye shumata endapidapoi nasipa ilo sarge oibukoyie ninye peyie meitoipori ake." 
Ezekiel24:9 Neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Wooi iyie ina anasa osarge! Kaitaa sii nanu olchala osototi. 
Ezekiel24:10 Turupa ilkeek ninok enkima, nintokitokie oleng nena kiri nibuku nena tokitin naapiki ndaiki, nincho iloik epejori." 
Ezekiel24:11 Nintasheyie ninye metii toki te shumata nkuk, peyie etum airowuaja, ore osuyai lenye nepeji peyie aa ore oloirerio lenye nesholi tiatua ninye, nemuti kuti lenye." 
Ezekiel24:12 Te mpesho aitanaura nanu kewan ore ina kutu enye nairrusha nemeim enkima. 
Ezekiel24:13 Ore ina kutu enye naa olduruk le nkiborra ino oo nkonyek. Amu anaata apa aaitukuo iyie neitu eitukuori olduruk lino. Mikintokini aaituku iyie aaigil o metaba anaa naidip aishu engoro ai te iyie. 
Ezekiel24:14 Nanu Olaitoriani oiroro; naa kelotu aasayu ina, ekaas nanu; marrinyo nanu siadi, maaleku nanu, mairridu nanu; ore terisioroto oo inkoitoi inono o siaaitin inono ekaaiguanare nanu iyie ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Ore ake sii eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ng'ura ajo etaa kaya enchipai oo nkonyek inono peyie aaitung'uaa iyie te oshoto, niminchir hoo arashu isinanuo nemedou ilkiyio linono." 
Ezekiel24:17 Iyang'a kake mibuaku; minchiraki ake lelo meneng'a. Teena enkarasha ino elukunya, nipik inkejek inono inamuka; niminuk ake enkutuk ino, arashu inos endaa e lelo ooishir.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Neaku airorie nanu lelo tung'ana tadekenya, ore teipa neye enkitok ai, ore enkolong entadekenya nasuju naas ina naaitanapaki." 
Ezekiel24:19 Naajoki nanu iltung'ana, “Aimiliki iyiook enautu kuna baa te iyiook, paa ninche iasita?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Ina peyie ajoki ninche, “Eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki:" 
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Tiaki ina aji e Israel, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ng'ura ajo kaisarkionie ewueji ai sinyati, o lwuasa le ng'olon ino o enchipai oo nkonyek inono, o eyieunoto oltau lino; ore ilayiok linono tenebo ntoyie inono nena nitung'uayie te siadi naa kebatata to lalem." 
Ezekiel24:22 Naa ias iyie anaa ina nataasa; minuk iyie enkutuk ino, arashu inos endaa e lelo ooishir." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ore inkarash inono e lukunya naa ketii ilukuny inyi netii inamuka nkejek inyi; nimisinanuonuo arashu inchirishiri, kake iishunyenye aamuta te nkaraki ing'ok inyi ning'orokinono maate." 
Ezekiel24:24 Neaku neijia etiu Esekiel te iyie aaku olmonekie; terisioroto e nena pooki naataasa ias sii iyie. Ore peyie elotu ena naa iyiolouu taa aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai!’ 
Ezekiel24:25 “Ore iyie nakerai e tung'ani, ore te ina olong naya aitung'uaa ninche isempewueti lenye, enchipai enye, o enkitoo enye, o enchipai oo nkonyek enye o iyieunot oo ltauja lenye, tenebo sii ilayiok lenye o ntoyie enye," 
Ezekiel24:26 ore teina olong naa keisiku olaishirani ayaki intae lelo omon. 
Ezekiel24:27 Ore teina olong naa ibolokiki ilo aishirani nkutukie inyi neaku iroro nimintokiki aaku ilemeidim aairoro. Neaku iakuku intae olmonekie te ninche; neyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.” 
Ezekiel25:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii aajoki," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, intorrioki enkomom ino enkalo oo Lamoni, imbonisho tigilunore ninche." 
Ezekiel25:3 Tiaaki Ilamoni: Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani Enkai: Ore amu itejo ‘Aha!’ Te nkaraki ewueji ai sinyati ina kata peyie eisarkionieki ninye, o te nkaraki ina kop e Israel ina kata peyie eitaa ninye mitil, o te nkaraki ina aji e Yuda ina kata peyie elo eyararoto;" 
Ezekiel25:4 neaku kaaitarasaa iyie aitarasaki iltung'ana le nkalo o loosaen peyie iaku entoki enye, naa keitasheyie ninche ilng'oborri lenye tiatua intae neitobiru imanyat enye tiatua intae; naa kenya ninche ilng'anayio linyi, neok ninche kule inyi." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ekaitaa Raba olokeri loo ntamesin ore nkanas oo Lamori emuatata oo ntare. Niyiolouu taa aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Ezekiel25:6 Amu inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ore amu itoosho inkaik inyi nioshieshie inkejek inyi enkop nishipapa te nkaraki intorrok pooki naatii atua intae te nkaraki enkop e Israel," 
Ezekiel25:7 metaa, eng'ura, aitorioyie nanu enkaina ai aagilunore iyie naa kaaitarasaa iyie anaa iyarunot aitarasaki iloreren; naa kaadung'oo iyie aaitung'uaa loreren; naaisho iyie indaai too nkuapi; ekaaidaikie iyie. Pee itum iyie atayiolo ajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel25:8 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore amu etejo Yuda, ing'ura ajo ore ina aji e Moab netiu anaa ilkulikae oreren pooki," 
Ezekiel25:9 neaku kaboloo inkanas oo lpolosien le Moab eiteru too nkanas naatii ilpolosien lenyena, o ina kop e Beteshimot o Baalmeon o Kiriatai." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ekaishooyo ninye tenebo ile Amoni o metabaiki iltung'ana le nkalo o loo saen metaa enjung'ore, metaa meitokini aekata aadamu too loreren." 
Ezekiel25:11 Naa kadung'oki Moab enkiguana; ina peyie etum aatayiolo nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Ezekiel25:12 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore amu etaasa Edom entorrono aarare enkaji e Yuda, naaitagoro ninye aitalaku elap te ninche." 
Ezekiel25:13 Metaa nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ekaitorioo enkaina ai aarare Edom, nadung'oo tiatua ninye tung'ani o eng'ues; naa kaitaa ninye mitil; eiteru te Teman o metabaiki Dedan naa kebatata ninche to lalem." 
Ezekiel25:14 Naa kapik elap ai shumata Edom te nkaina oo ltung'ana laainei Isiraeli; naa keas ninche te Edom anaa enatiu engoro ai anaa enatiu engoro ai napi; naa keyiolou ninche elap ai, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel25:15 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ore amu eitalakutua Ilfilisti elap neya ina to lwuasa lo ltau pee eidaikie teilo omang'ati lemeish; 
Ezekiel25:16 neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo kaitorioo enkaina ai agilunore Ilfilisti, naa kadung'oo ile Kereti, namut iloomanaa le naiposha." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ekairriu elap sapuk shumata ninche tengoro sapuk e nkitamioto. Ina pee eyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata naiteleiki elap ai shumata ninche.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Ore to lari le tomon oobo, te nkolong e dukuya o lapa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii aajoki:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore amu etejo Turo embae naipirta Yerusalem ejo, ‘Aha, ore ina kishomi oo loreren netigilaki, etabole tukul aisiu te nkaraki nanu; ekaaitasheyieki nanu, ore naa amu eitomijoonoki,’ neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai:" 
Ezekiel26:3 Ing'ura ajo kaarare iyie, iyie Turo, naa kayau iloshon kumok mikitaarare iyie, anaa enayau enaiposha ilopir lenyena." 
Ezekiel26:4 Kemut ninche isunta e Turo, negil auroo iltaleta lenyena; naa keoroo enterit aitung'uaa ninye neitaa ninye endapidapoi nasipa." 
Ezekiel26:5 Keaku ketii ninye empolos e naiposha ewueji neisalaashieki irresheta; amu airoro nanu ejo Olaitoriani Enkai; naa keaku ninye entoki naaruno too loreren; 
Ezekiel26:6 ore intoyie enyena naatii enkop natoyio naa keyieng'i to lalem. Ina peyie eyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai. 
Ezekiel26:7 “Amu inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo ekayau shumata e Turo eiteru te moikuape Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon, olaiguanani loo laiguanak, eeta imbartan oo ng'arrin enye tenebo ilakedok loo mbartan tenebo olorora loo sikarini kumok." 
Ezekiel26:8 Kear ninye to lalem intoyie inyi naatii enkop natoyio; naa kemuat aaman ninche esuntai nagol nikiarare, nashetaki intae oltim aagilunore intae, neitasheyie ilchureta o long'oi aarare intae." 
Ezekiel26:9 Ekeitorioki ninye intae entoki oo sekenke agilunore isunta inyi ore too ntoluo enyena naa keuroo iltaleta linyi. 
Ezekiel26:10 Keaku kumok oleng imbartan enyena metaa ore enterit enye neitoipoo intae; ore isunta inyi naa keigusugus te ilo toilo le lelo akedok loo mbartan tenebo ngarrin oo mbartan, tenejing atua inchomito inyi anaa oltung'ani ojing enkanasa natumutaki naata ilusien too sunta." 
Ezekiel26:11 Ore too loisotok loo mbartan enyena naa keituny inkoitoi dapashi e nkanasa inyi naa kear iltung'ana linyi to lalem; ore ing'apeta inyi kituaak naa kesulakini enkop. 
Ezekiel26:12 Keitaa ninche iyarunot e karsisisho inyi imasaa enye; anaa eng'ues entim imasaa inyi e biashara naa kesulaa ninche isunta inyi neinyal inkajijik inyi sidain; ore isoito linyi o mbaoi o enterit naa kenang'akini empolos oo nkariak. 
Ezekiel26:13 Naa kaitasheyie eranyare oo sinkolioitin linyi, ore oltoilo loo wululi loo usin inyi nemeitokini aekata aaning." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ekaitaa intae endapidapoi nasipa nemetii toki; iakuku intae ewueji neisalaashieki irresheta; nemeitokini aekata aashet intae; amu nanu Olaitoriani oiroro, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel26:15 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai ajoki Turo: amaa olmanie le naiposha aimeikirikira tenening embuaata e mbatatata ino, ina kata naigor ilo otipikaki olbae, ina kata etii lelo ootipikaki ilbaa atua erishata inyi?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Neaku ore lelo kituaak leina aiposha tenedou aaing'uaa ilorikan lenye le nkitoo, neitayu ilkilani lenye, nekinyaa nena kilani enye naaikodo; naa keishopoki ate enkuretisho; Eketoni ninche te nkop neikirikira anaa adake, neureyu intae oleng." 
Ezekiel26:17 Naa kedumu enkishirata aaishiraki intae, nejoki intae ‘Kaji inkuna peyie iisha too naaiposha, iyie na anasa yioloti, ina apa magilani teina aiposha, iyie o lelo likimanya, lelo ooikonyu olkirutoto lino, tiatua enkop natoyio!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Eikirikira ile mankale teina olong ino embatatata; ee, lelo loo lemankale ootii enaiposha neing'asia ina kata niishunye!’" 
Ezekiel26:19 “Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai. Ore ake peyie aitaa enkanasa ino, anaa inkanas nememanya, ore peyie ayau ailepunye enegut peyie aaitoip iyie nikintoip iyie nkariak sapuki," 
Ezekiel26:20 neaku kaanang'aa iyie abori tenebo lelo oodoyio aapuo engumoto, ine netii iltung'ana liopa, naaitaa iyie olobik to lodo le nkop, tenebo lelo apa ooidaaitie te dukuya tenebo lelo oopuo abori ina gumoto, metaa mikintokini aamanya arashu iatata ewueji te nkop oo looishu." 
Ezekiel26:21 Kaayau iyie apik enkiting'oto torrono, nimintoki aekata atii; hoo naa aiking'oruni iyie, kake mikintokini ae kata aatum aaigil, ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel27:2 “Ore tena kata nakerai e tung'ani tudumu enkishirata nchiraki Turo nijoki ninye," 
Ezekiel27:3 nijoki Turo, ina naton namanya enejingieki enaiposha, olbiasharai le lelo tung'ana to loomanaa loo naaiposha, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ‘Oi Turo, itejo iyie, atimitunye nanu te nkishiaa.’" 
Ezekiel27:4 Ore ilpolosien linono netii empolos oo naaiposha; ore ilashetak linono netimitunye kinkishiaanie iyie. 
Ezekiel27:5 Eitobirutua ninche imbaoi inyi pooki too lkeek ooing'uaa Semir; neyau iltarakua aaitung'uaa Lebanon nikintobiraki iyie eng'ape naado. 
Ezekiel27:6 Ore too lkeek oonyaanyukie ilng'abolo le Bashan, nintobiru ilkurteta le meli; neitobiru ewueji ino neitasheyieki too nkeek olchani oing'uaa olomanaa le naiposha e Kupro, nepik ine ilala loo lkanchaoni." 
Ezekiel27:7 Tenebo enkitani sidai naikodo naing'uaa Misiri, naa ninye apa olkarasha oreu emeli, naa ninye naitashe anaa enanka ino; enkarasha pus o emorijoi naing'uaa olomanaa le naiposha e Elisha, naa ninye apa enchuret ino." 
Ezekiel27:8 Ore lelo oomanya Sidon o Arfad naa ninche ilarewak linono loo melin, ore iltung'ana linyi arriyiak le Semer netii apa atua intae, ninche apa ilarewak linyi loo melin." 
Ezekiel27:9 Ore lelo ashetak lemeli, le Gebal o ltung'ana arriyiak netii atua iyie, kinukaki ilbaat loo melin inono. Ore nena melin pooki e naiposha tenebo isikarini le naiposha netii atua iyie, eitawalaa imasaa inono e biashara." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Ore apa Parsia o Lud o Put netii atua enjore inyi anaa iltung'ana linyi lo larrabal; neik ninche nena long'oi enye tenebo imaupen tiatua iyie; neisho ninche intae esidano enye. 
Ezekiel27:11 Ore lelo tung'ana le Arfad o Helek netii apa isunta inyi aamanita, ore iltung'ana le Gamad netii sii ninche iltaleta linono; neik ninche ilong'oi enye too isunta inono aaitaman; neitisidan aitaa bayarot enkishiaa inyi." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Ore Tarshish nikitoning'ore te siaai e biashara enye amu iata imasaa kumok e pooki pukunoto; enkosholai o esekenkei, empirbil o risasini. Eitawalunye ninche imasaa inyi e biashara." 
Ezekiel27:13 Ore Yafan o Tubal o Meshek netimirishote tenebo iyie; eitawalunye ninche iltung'ana nena masaa o suyai aawalunye imasaa inyi. 
Ezekiel27:14 Ore Betogarma newalunye imasaa inyi mbartan olarrabal o nyumpui. 
Ezekiel27:15 “Ore lelo tung'ana le Rode netaasa biashara tenebo intae; iloomanaa loo naaiposha iwuejitin inyi nimirishorere, eyakita intae te laata ilala loo lkanchaoni o nkeek oltiasika." 
Ezekiel27:16 Ore Edom nikitoning'ore te siaai e biashara, te nkaraki enkumoi oo masaa inono; eitawalunye ninche imasaa inyi isoito oonyori o nkilani morijo, intokitin naaikodo, kitani naapuyiapui, o sikira le naiposha o soit oji agate." 
Ezekiel27:17 Ore Yuda o ina kop e Israel netimirishote tenebo iyie; einyang'utua imasaa inyi emirare te nkano, too loirienito o lng'abolo le dukuya, o inaishi o ila, o lchani oji Seri." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ore Dameski netijing'a esiaai e biashara tenebo iyie te nkaraki enkumoi oo masaa inono, te nkaraki enkumoi ino oo masaa e pooki pukunoto; enaisho oo sabibu e Helbon, o ilpapit ooibor loo ntare," 
Ezekiel27:19 o enaisho oo sabibu naing'uaa Usal newalunye ninche too ntokitin inyi; isekenke naasika, o enkaitubului naji mdalasini, o enkaitubului naji mchai naatii apa atua imasaa inono e biashara." 
Ezekiel27:20 Ore Dedan netaasa esiaai e biashara tenebo iyie too nkilani naarewueki imbartan. 
Ezekiel27:21 Ore Arabia tenebo ilkituaak pooki le Kedar naa ilamirak linono linyor too ilkuoo linono le kerra, o lmeregeshi tenebo inkineji; neaku te nena apa etaasa biashara tenebo iyie." 
Ezekiel27:22 Ore ilbiasharani le Sheba o Rama netaasa biashara tenebo iyie; newalunye ninche imasaa inyi e nkorropil oo mpukunot pooki naaisul te sidano o soito pooki oogol enkinyang'a, o sahabu." 
Ezekiel27:23 Ore Haran, o Kane, o Eden o Ashur tenebo Kilmad netaasa esiaai e biashara tenebo iyie." 
Ezekiel27:24 Etaasa ninche biashara too nkilani sidain, te nena kilani pusi o nkilani naaikodo, o too ilkarash ooisalaashi tiatua iltirenito loo muain kumok neteenaki too lgoso aaitirrish; naa te kuna apa etaasie ninche biashara tenebo iyie." 
Ezekiel27:25 Ore imelin e Tarshish nepuo te nkaraki intae enapita imasaa inyi nimirimiri. Metaa kimputaki apa iyie nikiroishiyieki oleng tiatua ineegut oo naaiposha. 
Ezekiel27:26 Ore ilarewak linono loo melin nikintupukutuo iyie aapik inaaiposha naado. Ore olkutati lo loosaen nikitoosho amut te mpolos oo naaiposha. 
Ezekiel27:27 Ore enkarsisisho ino, o masaa inono, o ntokitin inono e biashara, o sikarini linono le naiposha o lelo arewak le meli, lelo aripak linono le meli o lbiasharani linono, o ltung'ana linono pooki lo larrabal otii atua iyie, tenebo olorora lino pooki, lelo ootii atua erishata ino. Nedoiki pooki empolos oo naaiposha, teina olong ino enkidaaroto." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ore to ltoilo le nkishirata lo lkiyioi loo larewak linono le meli ore nkuapi naamanita neikirikira," 
Ezekiel27:29 ore tiabori imelin enye, mepuonu lelo pooki aaing'uaa. Ore lelo sikarini le naiposha tenebo pooki ootii atua emeli o larewak loo melin, neitashe pooki te nkop natoyio" 
Ezekiel27:30 nikinchiraki ninche iyie to ltoilo sapuk, neishir too lkiyio le mion. Nepik enterit ilukuny enye neiperipera too nkuruon;" 
Ezekiel27:31 nebarn ninche ilukuny enye te nkaraki iyie, neen ate too lkuniyiani neishiraki intae oleng te mion sapuk oltau, te nkishirata sapuk e mion." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ore to lkiyioi lenye, nikidumaki iyie enkishirata, nikinchiraki iyie ejo; ‘Aing'ae ae kata eidaikieki anaa Turo, te mpolos e naiposha?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ore tenepuku imasaa inyi too naaiposha, nintaraposh iyie iltung'ana kumok; te nkumoi ino oo masaa e biashara ino, inkarsisiyie lelo aiguanak le nkop." 
Ezekiel27:34 Ore taata nikitumutaki aaidaikie too naaiposha, too neegut e nena ariak; ore imasaa inono pooki nimirta tenebo iltung'ana linono pooki liaata neimiso pooki tenebo iyie.’" 
Ezekiel27:35 “Ore lelo pooki oomanya olomanaa le naiposha, neing'asiate te nkaraki iyie; ore ilaiguanak lenye neiruto oleng, ore inkomomi enye netanyamala." 
Ezekiel27:36 Ore lelo biasharani otii atua iltung'ana neisulisho te nkaraki iyie; ieuo iyie enkiting'oto torrono oleng' nimikintokini ae kata aata intarasi. ” 
Ezekiel28:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel28:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani,” tiaaki ilo kitok le Turo, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Ore amu kewuasa oltau lino, nitejo iyie, Ara nanu Enkai. Aton nanu te ilo orika loo nkaitin, te mpolos oo naaiposha; nira ake sii tung'ani, nimira Enkai, hoo naa idol kewan anaa ira ng'en anaa Enkai," 
Ezekiel28:3 neaku esipa ira iyie ng'en alang Daniel; metii entoki naisudoro te iyie; 
Ezekiel28:3 neaku esipa ira iyie ng'en alang Daniel; metii entoki naisudoro te iyie; 
Ezekiel28:4 teng'eno ino o tening'unoto ino inotoko kewan imasaa, ninturrurruo sahabu o enkosholai apik atua arsisisho ino;" 
Ezekiel28:5 teng'eno ino nagut e biashara itoponayie imasaa inono, netawuase oltau lino too masaa inono," 
Ezekiel28:6 neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore amu idol kewan anaa olotiu anaa Enkai te ng'eno," 
Ezekiel28:7 neaku, ing'ura, ekayau nanu ilomon atua iyie lelo ooitureisho oleng loo loreren, naa keshutu ninche ilalema lenye aarare esidano eng'eno ino nagut neisarkionie esikar ino." 
Ezekiel28:8 Naa kenang'aki ninche intae engumoto niyeye intae enkeeya e lelo ooyieng'i tempolos oo naaiposha. 
Ezekiel28:9 Eton ake ijo, Ara nanu Enkai! Te dukuya lelo likiyieng iyie, hoo nira tung'ani neme Enkai, tiatua inkaik e lelo likipik iyie ilbaa?" 
Ezekiel28:10 Iye iyie aya enkeeya e ilo lememurata te nkaina oo ltung'ani leeiking'a, ilo omoni, amu airoro nanu ejo Olaitoriani Enkai. ”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Ore ake sii eewuo orerei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel28:12 “Enkerai e tung'ani, teyietu olkiyioi intorioki olaiguanani le Turo, nijoki ninye, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ira apa iyie enkitanyaanyukoto bayaroti, kibore apa eng'eno nagut, nitimitunye te nkishiaa." 
Ezekiel28:13 Itii apa iyie Eden, ina kurma e Nkai; ore apa pooki soit ogol enkinyang'a naa ninye intoipore, isoito ooji Karnelian o Topas o Yaspa o Krisolit o Beril, o Oniks, o Safire, o Karbunkol, o emerald; ore sahabu nasiluno naa ninche apa ininono, ninche apa isoito liguetiguete, ore teina olong apa nikintobiruaki iyie ina kata eitobiruaki sii ninche." 
Ezekiel28:14 “Aaitaboitaka iyie olmalaika likirrip. Itii apa iyie enchumata oldoinyio sinyati le Nkai, nishomo aimaa isoito le nkima." 
Ezekiel28:15 Miata apa iyie entioto too nkoitoi inono, eiteru teina olong apa nikintobiruaki, o menoti ing'ok tiatua iyie." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ore te nkumoi e biashara ino nikibore apa iyie olarrabal, nias iyie eng'oki; neaku aatanang'ayie iyie anaa entoki naisarkionieki aaitung'uaa oldoinyo le Nkai, ore ilo kerubi arriponi nikiaraa iyie aipungie ong'ata aitung'uaa empolos e lelo soito ooimerlel." 
Ezekiel28:17 Ore apa oltau lino naa kewuasa te nkaraki enkishiaa ino; inyala iyie eng'eno ino nagut te sikar ino. Aatanang'aka iyie enkop; aataboloyie iyie te dukuya ilaiguanak meitaraposho nkonyek enye te iyie. 
Ezekiel28:18 Ore te nkumoi oo ing'ok inyi, teina nemetii esipata biashara inyi nisarkionie iwuejitin inono sinyat, neaku ayaua atua iyie enkima aitung'uaa erishata ino; nikinya ninye iyie amut, naaibelekeny iyie aitaa nkuruon tioriong enkop, te dukuya lelo pooki likitoduaa iyie." 
Ezekiel28:19 Ore lelo pooki likiyiolo iyie too loreren neing'asia te iyie, itabaikia iyie enkiting'oto torrono, nimintoki atii intarasi.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel28:21 “Enkerai e tung'ani, intorioki enkomom ino enkalo e Sidon, nimbonoki aarare ninye" 
Ezekiel28:22 nijo inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo kaarare iyie, oi iyie Sidon, naa kaibalie enkitoo ai tiatua iyie, naa keyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata nayau inkiguanat shumata ninye, naibalunye esinyatisho ai tiatua ninye;" 
Ezekiel28:23 amu kairriu olmeitai atua ninye, nairriwaki osarge inkoitoi enyena naalala enkanasa; ore lelo oari to lalem nebatata tiatuaninye, te ilo alem oarare ninye too nkaloli pooki. Ina pee eyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel28:24 “Ore teina aji e Israel nemeitokini aata ilkiku oorem arashu eitame lelo oomanita ootaarare ninche. Ina pee eyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai. 
Ezekiel28:25 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore tenaiturrur ina aji e Israel tiatua lelo oreren ooidapashakaki ninche, naibalie esinyatisho ai tiatua ninche te dukuya lelo oreren pooki, neaku kepuo aatoni te nkop enye maate ina naishoo apa osinka lai Yakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Naa ketoni tiatua ninye te seriani naa keshet ninche inkajijik neun inkurman oo sabibu. Naa ketoni tiatua te seriani, ina kata nayau adung'oki enkiguana shumata lelo le latia enye lelo ootarare ninye te ng'oro sapuk. Ina peyie eyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai enye.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Ore to lari le tomon, lo lapa le tomon, te nkolong e tomon aare o lapa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii nanu naajoki:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, impirare taarare Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, nimbonoki aarare ninye niarare sii Misiri pooki;" 
Ezekiel29:3 irorie nijo, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo kaarare iyie, Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, ilo asurai kitok olejisho, te mpolos oo nchorroi enyena, ina najo, ‘Ore olkeju le Nail naa olalai ake; nanu oitobirua ninye.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Ekaapik ilala oololo iltagiligil linono, naisho lelo sinkir loonchorroi inyi mikimbung'a iyie akurraki, naa kaaitayu iyie aitupuku tempolos oo inchorroi inono, nena nikimbung iyie." 
Ezekiel29:5 Naa kaanang'aki iyie ong'ota, iyie tenebo lelo sinkir pooki loo nchorroni inono; isulakinono enkoriong e ong'ota naisiasha, nemeiturrurri intae aapuo aanukaa. Meinosa intae ing'uesi e ina kop o montonyi o loing'ang'e aaishooyie iyie taa endaa enye." 
Ezekiel29:6 “Ina peyie eyilou lelo pooki oomanya Misiri aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani. Amu itaa apa iyie eng'udi entiyani te nkaji e Israel. 
Ezekiel29:7 Ore tinikimbung ninche iyie te nkaina, nigiligili, nipolososo iloilila lenye pooki; naa tenepetaa ninche intae, nigiligili, ninchosho impolosi enye pooki meikirikirata;" 
Ezekiel29:8 metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo, ekayau olalem shumata iyie, naa kadung'oo te iyie oltung'ani o eng'ues;" 
Ezekiel29:9 ore ina kop e Misiri neaku mitil nemeeta toki natii. Ina peyie eyiolou ninche aajo ara Olaitoriani. “Ore amu itejo iyie ore olkeju le Nail naa olalai, nanu oitobira," 
Ezekiel29:10 neaku ing'ura ajo kaarare iyie; naarare inchorroi inono, naa kaitaa enkop e Misiri enkop mitil nemetii toki, eiteru te Migdol ometabaiki Siene, o meshomo abaiki olpolosie le Etiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Meetae enkeju e tung'ani naim atua ninye, nemeetae enkeju e ng'ues naim atua ninye; keaku ninye mitil ilarin artam." 
Ezekiel29:12 Naa kaitaa enkop e Misiri enkop mitil tiatua nkuapi mitili; ore inkanas enyena neaku mijoonto ilarin artam tiatua nena anas naaidaikieki. Ekaidapashaki Ilmisiri iloreren, naidapash ninche toonkuapi." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore tenkiting'oto oo larin artam naa kaiturrurru Ilmisiri too loreren lelo pooki ooidapashakaki ninche; 
Ezekiel29:14 naa kashukoki Misiri entonata enye e apake, nashukoki ninche ina kop e Patros, ina kop naa ninye apa eing'uaa; neaku ninye teine enkitoria nashal." 
Ezekiel29:15 Keaku ninye enkitoria nashal too nkitoriat pooki nemeitoki ae kata aigil ailepie kewan too loreren; naa kaitaa ninche kiti oleng metaa meitoki ae kata aaitore iloreren. 
Ezekiel29:16 Nemeitoki ae kata aaku osiligi leina aji e Israel, edamu ing'ok enye, ina kata eibelekenyakino ninche eing'oru eretoto enye. Ina peyie eyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Ore to lari le tikitam o naapishana to lapa le dukuya, te nkolong e dukuya olapa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon neishoo enjore enye metaasisho oleng earare Turo, ore pooki dukuya netabarnoki ore pooki oililai netujutoki aasip; ore ake eyia eitu hoo etum ninye arashu enjore enye ae toki naing'uaa Turopeyie elak ina siaai nataasa earare ninye." 
Ezekiel29:19 Neaku inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo kaisho ina kop e Misiri Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon; naa kenap ninye arsisisho enye neitaa ninye enaaruno neidaikie ninye; naa keaku elaata enjore enye. 
Ezekiel29:20 Aishoo ninye ina kop e misiri metaa olerrinyore teina naisiayua, amu nanu eisiaayia ninche, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Ore teina olong naa kaitubulu emowuo ti atua enkaji e Israel, naa kabol inkutukie inyi tiatua ninche. Ina peyie eyilou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii; naajoki: 
Ezekiel30:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani,” imbonisho nijo, “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Teyietu nchira, ‘Woi ina olong!’" 
Ezekiel30:3 Amu etinyikua ina olong! Etinyikua ina olong o Laitoriani; keaku enkolong oo nkatampo enkata enkidaaroto too loreren. 
Ezekiel30:4 Kelotu olalem shumata Misiri, nejing oloputukunyi sapuk Etiopia, ina kata nabatata lelo oo yieng'i te Misiri, nenapi arsisisho enye aaya, ore ilkitamanyunot nepolosi aauroo." 
Ezekiel30:5 “Ore Etiopia, o Put, o Lud o Arabia pooki, o Libya o iltung'ana pooki le nkop ooibung'are, naa kebatata te nebo to lalem.”" 
Ezekiel30:6 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani: Ore lelo oretu Misiri naa kebatata, ore olwuasa lenye le ngolon enye nedou; eiteru te Migdol o meshomo Siene kebatatakino ninye to lalem, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel30:7 Neaku ninye mitil tiatua nena kuapi mitili, ore inkanas enyena nejing empolos e nena anas naaitomijoonoki." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ina peyie eyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata nainuaaki enkima Misiri, ore ilaretok lenye pooki negili." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Ore teina olong nepuo lelo kiliku ooisarrisar ooing'uaa enatii, aaiture lelo le Etiopia meiteiki. Nejing ninche emion o sina teina olong e nkidaata e Misiri, amu, ng'ura, etabawua!”" 
Ezekiel30:10 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ekaiting'ie karsisisho e Misiri, teina aina e Nebukadresa olaiguanani le Babilon." 
Ezekiel30:11 Ninye tenebo iltung'ana lenyena, inkuapi torrok oleng too loreren, eyauni ninche meidaikie ina kop; naa keshurtu ninche ilalema lenye aarare Misiri, neiput ina kop lelo meneng'a." 
Ezekiel30:12 Naa kaitoi nanu olkeju le Nail, namiraki ina kop inkaik oo ltung'ana torrok; Kayau ina kop aitaa mitil o pooki toki natii atua ninye te ina aina oo ltung'ana leeiking'a nanu Olaitoriani oiroro.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ekaidaikie nena kitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin nemeishu, naiting'ie nena kitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin naatii Memfis; meitoki atii ae kata olkitok ina kop e Misiri; neaku kapik enkuretisho ina kop e Misiri." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ekaitaa Patros mitil, naisuroki enkima Soan nayau inkiaasin enkiguana shumata Tebes." 
Ezekiel30:15 Naa kabukoki engoro ai shumata Pelusium ilo sempewuet le Misiri, nadung'oo olorora le Tebes." 
Ezekiel30:16 Naa kaisuroki enkima Misiri; ore Pelusium neigor enkigoroto kitok; ore Tebes nepiki ilusien, ore isunta enyena neurori aasulaki enkop." 
Ezekiel30:17 Ore ilbarnot le On o Pibeset, nebatatakino ilo alem; ore inkituaak nepuo e araroto." 
Ezekiel30:18 Ore te Tehafnehes keaku ina olong enaimin, ina kata nagil teine enkitoria e Misiri, ore ina golon enye olwuasa nebaiki enkiting'oto; keitoipi ninye te nkatampoi, ore ntoyie enyena nepuo eararoto." 
Ezekiel30:19 Neaku neijia aikunaki endung'okinoto enkiguana shumata e Misiri, Ina peyie eyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Ore to lari le tomon oobo, to lapa le dukuya, te nkolong e naapishana o lapa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki:" 
Ezekiel30:21 “Enkerai e tung'ani, atigila ina aina e Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, naa ing'ura, eton eitu erubi ninye, peyie eishiunyeki ninye teenata enkarasha, peyie metum ninye atagolo peyie meidimu ayuko olalem." 
Ezekiel30:22 Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo, kaarare nanu Farao olaiguanani le Misiri, naa kagil inkaik enyena, pokira are, aa ina nagol o ina natigile; naa kaisho olalem lenye epuku te nkaina enye." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ekaidapashaa Ilmisiri tiatua iloreren, naidapashaa ninche tiatua iloreren tiatua inkuapi." 
Ezekiel30:24 Naa kaitagol enkaina e ilo aiguanani le Babilon, napik enkaina enye olalem lai; kake kagil nena aik e Farao naa keigor te dukuya ninye anaa oltung'ani otipikaki olbae aaidop." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ekaitagol nena aik o laiguanani le Babilon, kake ore nena aik e Farao naa kebatata; naa keyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani. Ore ina kata napik olalem lai nkaik olaiguanani le Babilon, naa keitorioo ninye aarare ina kop e Misiri;" 
Ezekiel30:26 naa kaidapashaki Ilmisiri atua iloreren, naidapashaa meshomo too nkuapi pooki. Ina peyie eyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Ore to lari le tomon oobo, to lapa li okuni, te nkolong e dukuya olapa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, tiaaki Farao olaiguanani le Misiri o lororani lenyena inchere: Aing'ae doi inyaanyukie iyie te sapuko ino?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ing'ura, ekaaitanyaanyukie iyie oltarakuai otii Lebanon, oota ilng'osil sidain, neeta oloip le ntim, naa keado oleng, ore enkadori enye netii nkatampo." 
Ezekiel31:4 Ore inkariak neitoti ninye, ore eng'uton enye neisho ninye metaadoro neitaa lelo kejek lenyena ilooruko, neitaman ine wueji netuunieki, neidapashaa inchorroi enyena, aidapashaki lelo keek pooki le ntim." 
Ezekiel31:5 Metaa eilepa ninye oleng alus ilkeek pooki le ntim, ore ilng'osil lenyena sapuki nebul aasapuku; neado ilng'osil lenyena, te nkaraki enkare sapuk too ntona enyena." 
Ezekiel31:6 Ore imotonyi pooki o loing'ang'e, neitobira isinkin enye too lng'osil lenyena sapuki; ore abori ilng'osil lenyena netii ing'uesi pooki e ong'ata, neisho teina aaiu nkera enye; ore abori oloip lenye, netii iloreren kituaak." 
Ezekiel31:7 Aisidai apa oleng te sapuko enye; o te nkadori oo lng'osil lenyena; amu eshomo intona enyena abori, ine netii inkariak kumok." 
Ezekiel31:8 Ore iltarakua ootii enkurma e Nkai nemekeshare ninye, nemeirisiore lelo keek oo nyori ilng'osil lenyena; ore lelo keek oorisiore naa pesho, tinintanyaanyukie ilng'osil lenyena; meetae olchani te nkurma Enkai o nyaanyukie ninye te sidano." 
Ezekiel31:9 Aitobira ninye aikishiaan, tenkumoi oolng'osil lenyena, ore lelo keek pooki le Eden neng'uar ninye, lelo ootii apa enkurma e Nkai." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore amu etubulua ninye ajing atua inkatampo, ore oltau lenye newuasa te nkaraki enkadori enye," 
Ezekiel31:11 ekapik ninye atua enkaina e ilo magilani loo loreren naa kearare ninye anaa enatiu ing'ok enyena, atanang'ayie ninye ong'ota." 
Ezekiel31:12 Ore ilomon lelo torrok oleng loo loreren, naa kedung ninye aauroo neing'uaa. Edoiki inchumat oo ldoinyo o nong'ot pooki ilng'osil lenyena, ore lelo ng'osil lenyena sapuki neirrag too wuejitin pooki neeim inchorroi eina kop; ore iloreren pooki le nkop nepuo aaing'uaa oloip lenye aaing'uaa ninye." 
Ezekiel31:13 Ore teina kidaaroto enye netonie imotonyi pooki oloing'ang'e, ore atua ilng'osil lenyena, netonie ing'uesi pooki oo nkong'at." 
Ezekiel31:14 Ore kuna pooki naa inchere peyie meeta ilkeek le mbata enkare oobulu aaika oleng teshumata arashu epik ilukuny enye inkatampo, nemeetae likae shani ook enkare ebaiki shumata ninche te nkadori; amu eishooki ninche pooki metuata, teina kop oo lmeneng'a natii tung'ani oye, tenebo lelo oopuo olodo le nkop." 
Ezekiel31:15 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore peyie elo abori enemeneng'a, naa kaitaa enegut pee eishir te nkaraki ninye, naibok lelo kejek lenyena pooki, ore inkariak kumok nedung'i; naishopoki Lebanon osina te nkaraki ninye, ore ilkeek pooki liong'ota netoito te nkaraki ninye." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ekaisho iloreren meikirikirata to ltoilo lembatata enye, ina kata nanang'aki ninye abori enemeneng'a tenebo lelo oopuo tenebo engumoto; ore lelo keek pooki le Eden, lelo ooisul gelunot sidain le Lebanon, lelo pooki ook enkare, neitagoli to lodo le nkop." 
Ezekiel31:17 Ekepuo sii ninche abori enemeneng'a tenebo ninye, ine netii lelo ootaraki to lalem; ee, lelo ootoni tiabori oloip too loreren naa keish." 
Ezekiel31:18 Ira naa iyie ng'ae onyaanyuke te nkisisa o te nkitoo tiatua lelo kejek le Eden? Aikintadoiyiori iyie tenebo lelo keek le Eden aaya olodo le nkop; nirrag iyie tenebo lelo lememurata, tenebo lelo ootaraki to lalem. “Ore ele naa Farao tenebo olorora lenye pooki, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Ore to lari le tomon aare, to alapa le tomon aare, te nkolong e dukuya o lapa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki:" 
Ezekiel32:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, teyietu inchiraki Farao olaiguanani le Misiri nijoki ninye: “Itadamua iyie aitaa kewan olng'atuny tiatua iloreren, kake itiu iyie anaa olasurai otii inaaiposha; idanya iyie apuku too lkejek linono, nintanyamal inkariak too nkejek inono, nindurukie ilkejek lenye." 
Ezekiel32:3 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ekanang'aki orreshet lai shumata iyie; tenebo olorora sapuk loo ltung'ana; naa kaaikurtutaa iyie tiatua orreshet lai. 
Ezekiel32:4 Naa kaanang'ie iyie enkop, ore te nkong'ata naisiaja naayieng iyie naisho ilmotonyi pooki lo loing'ang'e mikitadoiki iyie, naitaraposh ng'uesi enkop te iyie." 
Ezekiel32:5 Naidapashaki inkiri inyi inchumat oo ldoinyo, naiput inong'ot too mpopoki inono." 
Ezekiel32:6 Naa kaitadooyo osarge lino te nkop o too ldoinyo; nimput iyie lelo shorroi. 
Ezekiel32:7 Ore peyie aajutoo iyie, naa kaitoip keper o loing'ang'e lenye, naitomisimis ilakir lenye; naa kaitoip enkolong te nkatampoi, nemeitoki olapa aitayu ewang'an enye." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ore ilkilang'ilang'eta pooki le shumata na kaitomisimis te shumata iyie, napik enaimin shumata enkop ino ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ekaitanyamal sii iltauja loo ltung'ana kumok, ina kata naaya iyie eyarunoto tiatua iloreren, naapik iyie inkuapi neitu iyiolou." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ekaisho iltung'ana kumok meing'asiata te nkaraki iyie, ore ilaiguanak lenye neilanyisho te nkaraki iyie, ina kata naiwul olalem lai te dukuya ninche; naa keikirikira pooki kata, pooki ng'ae te nkaraki enkishui enye, teina olong' embatatata ino." 
Ezekiel32:11 Amu inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore ilo alem lo laiguanani le Babilon naa kelotu shumata iyie. 
Ezekiel32:12 Ekaitaa olorora linyi metabatatata too lalema loo lmagil, ninche pooki lelo torrok oleng too loreren. “Naa kayau aitaa olemeetae ilo wuasa le Misiri, ore ilororani lenyena pooki naa keish." 
Ezekiel32:13 Kaidaikie nanu ing'uesi enyena pooki, too nkiyopat oo nkariak kumok; nemeetae enkeju e tung'ani naitoki aitanyamal ninche aigil, nemeitoki lelo oisotok loo ng'uesi aaitanyamal ninche." 
Ezekiel32:14 Ina peyie aitaa nkariak enye inaasila, naisho ilkejek lenye meturukoto anaa eilata, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ore ina kata naitaa enkop e Misiri mitil, o ina kata nakinyi enkop te pooki nabore, o ina kata naosh lelo pooki ootii atua ninye, naa keyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel32:16 Ore ele naa osinkolio lo lkiyioi opuoi aarany; ore nena toyie oo loshon nepuo aaranyaki; Misiri tenebo lelo pooki ororani lenyena, kepuo ninche aarany ilo sinkolio ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Ore to lari le tomon o are, to lapa le dukuya, te nkolong e tomon o imiet o lapa, nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki:" 
Ezekiel32:18 “Enkerai e tung'ani, inchiraki ilo orora le Misiri nirriwaa ninche abori, ninye tenebo nena toyie kituaak oo loreren, ine olodo le nkop, enetii lelo ooshomo abori enemeneng'a ijoki ninye:" 
Ezekiel32:19 ‘Aing'ae doi italang'a iyie te nkishiaa? Shomo abori, nikirragieki iyie tenebo ilememurata.’" 
Ezekiel32:20 “Kebatatakino ninche erishata e lelo ootaraki to lalem, ore tenebo ninye neirrag olorora pooki lenye." 
Ezekiel32:21 Ore ilaiguanak magil naa keimaki imbaa naaipirta ninche, tenebo ilaretok lenye, tiatua empolos e nemeneng'a ejo: ‘Etadoutuo ninche abori, neirrag aaitirring'a, lelo lememurata, ootaraki to lalem.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Etii sii Asiria ine, tenebo olorora lenye pooki, nemanita ninye inkuraren enye, lelo pooki ootaraki, ootumutaki to lalem;" 
Ezekiel32:23 lelo ootipikaki nkuraren enye nenen wuejitin neeg'ut oleng e nemeneng'a nemanita olturrur lo lorora enkurare enye, etaraki pooki aabatat to lalem, ilo oidapashaa olkirutoto tiatua ina kop oo loishu." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Eti sii Elam ine, nemanita ninye olorora lenye pooki enkurare enye; netaraki pooki, aabatat to lalem, lelo lememurata ooshomo atua olodo le nkop, lelo oidapashaa olkirutoto teina kop oo loishu, neya enkurruna enye tenebo lelo oopuo abori eng'umoto." 
Ezekiel32:25 Eitobirakita ninye endapash tenebo lelo ootaraki to lalem tenebo olorara nemanita ninye inkuraren enyena, lelo pooki lememurata lelo ootaraki to lalem; amu eidapashakaki olkirutoto lenye ninche ina kop oo looishu, nenap ninche enkurruna enye tenebo lelo oopuo adoyio aapuo eitaboitakaki ninche lelo ootaraki to lalem." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Etii sii ine Meshek, o Tubal, tenebo olorora lenye pooki, emanita inkuraren enye ninche, lelo pooki lememurata, ootaraki to lalem; amu eidapasha ninche olkirutoto teina kop oo loishu." 
Ezekiel32:27 Nemeirrag ninche tenebo lelo ootabatatate magil liopa lelo ooshomo abori enemeneng'a tenebo imasaa enye olarrabal, lelo ooiteleikiaki ilalema lenye abori ilukuny enye, ore ilong'oi enye neiteleikino iloik lenye; amu ore olkirutoto le lelo tung'ana magil netii enkop e lelo ooishu." 
Ezekiel32:28 Metaa aikigili iyie nikirragieki tenebo lelo lememurata, tenebo lelo ootaraki to lalem." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Etii sii Edom ine, o ilaiguanak lenyena tenebo ilkituaak lenye pooki, laa ore te ngolon enye pooki neirragieki tenebo lelo ootaraki to lalem; neirrag ninche tenebo lelo lememurata, tenebo lelo oopuo abori enemeneng'a." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Etii sii ilkituaak le moikuape ine ninche pooki tenebo ile Sidon pooki lelo ooshomo abori te nkurruna tenebo lelo ootaraki, tenebo ina kirutoto pooki nayautua te nkaraki olkirutoto lenye eirragie ninche memurata tenebo lelo ootaraki to lalem, nenap enkurruna enye tenebo lelo oodoyio aapuo enemeneng'a engumoto." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Ore peyie edol Farao ninche, neilejilej kewan to lorora lenye pooki, ore Farao tenebo enjore enye pooki, naaraa to lalem ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel32:32 Amu eidapashayie olkirutoto te nkop oo loishu; metaa keirragieki ninye tenebo lelo lememurata, tenebo lelo ootaraki to lalem, Farao tenebo olorora lenye pooki, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel33:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, irorie iltung'ana linono nijoki ninche, tenelo nayau olalem shumata enkop, negelu iltung'ana oltung'ani obo tiatua ate, neitaa ninye olarriponi lenye;" 
Ezekiel33:3 naa tenedol ninye olalem elotu shumata enkop neosh entarumpeta aitayiolo iltung'ana; 
Ezekiel33:4 neaku ore pooki ng'ae otoning'o ilo toilo leina tarumpeta neitaa parmetii, nelotu olalem aar ninye, ore osarge lenye naa shumata endukuya enye eaku etii." 
Ezekiel33:5 Etoning'o ninye ilo toilo leina tarumpeta, neitu esuj ina naitayioloki ninye; ekeaku etii osarge lenye shumata enkorrok enye. Kake tenetusuja ina naitayioloki, anaata eitajeuo enkishui enye." 
Ezekiel33:6 Kake te nedolu olarriponi olalem elotu nemeosh ninye ina tarumpeta, metaa eitu eitayioloi iltung'ana, nelotu olalem, neya ake ninye obo lenye; ore ilo tung'ani newaki too ng'ok enyena, kake ore osarge lenye naa kaikilikuanu too nkaik e ilo arriponi." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Metaa ore iyie enkerai e tung'ani, aaitaa iyie olarriponi te nkaraki enkaji e Israel; ore pooki kata nining ororei oing'uaa enkutuk ai, naa intayiolo ninche olkilikuai oing'uaa enatii."
