Ezekiel33:8 Tenelo najoki ilo torrono, Oi iyie ele tung'ani torrono, meeta inchere pee miye neitu iyie irorie ilo torrono aitayiolo meibelekenyunye aing'uaa enkoitoi enye, ore ilo tung'ani torrono naa keye tiatua ing'ok enyena, kake ore osarge lenye naikilikuanu too nkaik inono." 
Ezekiel33:9 Kake tinintayiolo ilo torrono pee eibelekenyunye te nkoitoi enye, neitu eibelekenyunye ninye te nkoitoi enye; naa keye ninye too ng'ok enyena, kake intajeuo iyie enkishui ino." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Ore iyie nakerai e tung'ani, tiaaki ina aji e Israel, Inji itejo iyie: ‘Ore inkitarruorot ang tenebo ing'ok ang netii shumata iyiook, nikiishunye iyiook pesho te nkaraki ninche, kaji naa kinko tinikinchu?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Tiaaki ninche, ore anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, maata nanu enchipai te keeya e ilo torrono, kake peyie eibelekenya ilo torrono te nkoitoi enye peyie eishu; imbelekenyunye, imbelekenyunye too nkoitoi inono torrok; ainyoo doi peyie iye iyie, oi naaji e Israel?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Ore iyie, nakerai e tung'ani, tiaaki iltung'ana linono, ore esipata e ilo supat nemeitajeu ninye teneas entorroni; naa ore teina torroni e ilo torrono nemebatata te ninye teneibelekenyunye te nkitarruorroto enye; ore ilo supat nemeitoki aidim atotona te supatisho enye teneas eng'oki." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ore hoo natiaaka ilo supat meeta inchere peyie meton ninye eishu, kake ore ake peyie eisilig ninye esipata enye neas intorrok, meetae hoo nabo oosiatin enyena esupatisho naaitokini aadamu; kake ekeye ninye tiatua ina ng'oki nataasa." 
Ezekiel33:14 Ore ake sii, hoo natiaaka ilo torrono, ‘Meeta inchere aimiye,’ kake ilo teneibelekenyunye too ng'ok enyena, neas ina nasipa naishaakino," 
Ezekiel33:15 tenelo neshuku ilo torrono ina nainosie apa olmumai, neshuku ina apa nawa te nkikonya, nelo too nkoitoi enkishon, nemeitoki aas enkarruoisho; naa kesipa keton katukul eishu, nemeye ninye." 
Ezekiel33:16 Meetae hoo eng'oki nabo oo naataasa apa ninye naitokini aadamu te nkaraki ninye; etaasa ninye ina naishaakino nesipa, nemeeta inchere pee meton ninye eishu." 
Ezekiel33:17 “Kake ejoito ake sii iltung'ana linono inchere, ‘Ore enkoitoi o Laitoriani nemetii esipata;’ naa inkoitoi enye maate metii esipata." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ore teneibelekenya osupat aing'uaa esipata enye makewan, neas enkarruoisho, naa keye ninye te nkaraki ina." 
Ezekiel33:19 Naa teneibelekenya ilo torrono aing'uaa entorroni enye, neas ina naishaakino neas nasipa, neton eishu teina." 
Ezekiel33:20 Nijojo ake sii, ‘Ore ina oitoi o Laitoriani nemesipa’; iyie na aji e Israel, ekaiguanare pooki ng'ae linyi terisioroto oo nkoitoi enyena.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Ore to lari le tomon aare le araroto ang, to lapa le tomon, te nkolong e imiet o lapa nelotu oltung'ani oisikua aing'uaa Yerusalem enatii nanu naajoki: “Etabatate enkanasa.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Etii apa enkaina o Laitoriani shumata nanu ina teipa eng'or elotunoto e ilo oisikua; netabolo ninye enkutuk ai te ina kata naewuo ilo tung'ani enatii tadekenya; metaa etaboloki apa enkutuk ai, nemeekure ara olemeiro." 
Ezekiel33:23 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel33:24 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore lelo oomanya kunen neetumutaki te nkop e Israel, nejoito; ore apa Abraham naa oltung'ani obo ake, kake enoto ninye aitaa ina kop enenye, nikira iyiook kumok, esipa tukul eishooki iyiook enkop maitaa enaang.”" 
Ezekiel33:25 Neaku, tiaaki ninche, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Inyanya intae inkiri tenebo osarge, nidumakiki inkonyek inyi inkitanyaanyukot oo inkaitin inyi nemeishu, nimbukoo osarge; intokiki ake aaku iloopeny ena kop?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Ipikipiki ilo alem aaitaa osiligi linyi, niasiasa inolminong ore pooki ng'ae linyi neidurukie enkitok ole latia enye; ijojo iakuku iloopeny ena kop?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Tiaaki ena ninche, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore anaa enaishu nanu, esipa tukul ajo ore lelo ootii iwuejitin neidaaitie naa kebatata to lalem; ore ilo otii enkong'ata naisiaja naa kaisho ninye ing'uesi entim meinosa, ore lelo ootii isempewueti o lootii nkapuniaa naa keye to lmeitai." 
Ezekiel33:28 Naa kaitaa ina kop mitil naidaayie, ore ina golon enye nawuasare nebaiki enkiting'oto; ore lelo doinyo le Israel neaku mitili oleng metaa meetae hoo oloim empolos enye." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ina pee eyilou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani ina kata naitaa ina kop enkop mitil naitomijoon naa ene pesho te nkaraki nena baa olminong lenye pooki naataasa ninche. 
Ezekiel33:30 “Ore te iyie, enkerai e tung'ani, ore iltung'ana linyi ooiro tenebo tenkaraki iyie too sunta, o too nkutukie oo nkajijik, ejokino ninche maate, pooki ng'ae ejoki olalashe lenye, ‘Wou sii iyietoning'o ajo kalo rorei ilo olotu aing'uaa Olaitoriani.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Nepuonu enitii anaa enapuonu iltung'ana enitii, netoni te dukuya intae anaa iltung'ana laainei; neinining ina nijo iyie kake meas ninche ina amu eibalunye oleng too nkutukie enye enyorrata sapuk, kake ore iltauja lenye netii atua dupoto enye." 
Ezekiel33:32 Naa, ing'ura, itiu iyie te ninche anaa ilo oranyaki isinkolioitin le nyorrata, to ltoilo sidai oleng neosh te nkarriyiano e nkinanda, amu ening ninche ina nijo, kake meas ninche ina." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ore peyie elotu ena, naa kelotu ninye, ina peyie eyiolou aajo etii apa oloiboni atua ninche.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii, naajoki:" 
Ezekiel34:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, imbonoki taarare lelo airritak le Israel, imbonoki tiaaki ninche, o metabaiki lelo airritak inchere: Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Oi ilairritak le Israel lelo ooitotito ate! Amaa ilairritak aimeitoti intare?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Inyanya intae nena naapir, ninchopokiki ate inkilani oo lpapit loo ntare, niyieng'iyieng'e nena naaisul te mpiron; kake mintotiti intae nena tare." 
Ezekiel34:4 Ore nena naashal neitu intagoligolo, ore nena naamuoi neitu inchiunyenye, ore nena ng'ojiniaa neitu iruburubu, ore nena naatapong'ori neitu irrinyunyu, ore inaaimina neitu ing'oruru, neaku te ngolon o te nking'odia intoria ninche." 
Ezekiel34:5 Metaa eidapashate ninche, amu metii apa olairritani; neaku ninche endaa oo ng'uesi pooki e ntim." 
Ezekiel34:6 Eidapashaki apa intare aainei, nepuaya ninche too ldoinyo pooki, o te pooki doinyo naado; ore intare aainei neidapashi te nkoriong enkop pooki, meetae obo oikilikuanua arashu oing'oru ninche." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Metaa, entoning intae lo airritak ororei lo Laitoriani ejo:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Ore anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ore amu etaa intare aainei entoki nainosi, netaa intare aainei endaa nanya ing'uesi pooki entim, anaa ae metii olairritani; neaku ore amu eitu eing'oru ilairritak laainei intare aainei, kake eitotito ate ilairritak, neitu eitoti intare aainei;" 
Ezekiel34:9 neaku entoning intae ilairritak ororei lo Laitoriani: 
Ezekiel34:10 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ing'ura ajo kaarare lelo airritak; naa kayieu nanu intare aainei too nkaik enye, naiting'ie te ninche ina kitotio enye oo ntare; meigil ae kata ilairritak aaitoti ate. Ekaitajeu nanu intare aainei too nkutukie enye, peyie meitoki aaku endaa te ninche." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Amu inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura, nanu, nanu kewan oing'oru intare aainei, nalilitu ninche." 
Ezekiel34:12 Anaa enaing'oru olchekut intare enyena ina kata naidapashate kulie tare enyena too neelakua, neaku kaing'oru sii nanu ntare aainei; naa kaitajeu ninche too wuejitin pooki neeidapashakaki teina olong natii inkatampo netii sii enaimin narok ong'u." 
Ezekiel34:13 Naa kaitupuku ninche too loreren, naiturrurru ninche too nkuapi naa kayau ninche enkop enye maate; naa kaitoti ninche too ldoinyo le Israel, too nkiyopat e nena shorroi, o too wuejitin pooki neemanyae eina kop." 
Ezekiel34:14 Kaitoti ninche too wuejitin neeleng, o too nchumat oo ldoinyo le Israel, keaku ninche ndaat enye; ore teine neiperipera ninche te ine te neleng sidai, o too wuejitin neebore olkujita ekedaa ninche too ldoinyo le Israel." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ore nanu enkewan ai naa kaaku olchekut loo ntare aainei, naa kaisho ninche meirraga, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ekaing'oru ina naimina, naa karrinyu ina natapong'ori, naa karub ina ng'ojine, naa kaitagol ina natashala, ore ina napir oina nagol naa kaing'or; naa kaitoti ninche te sipata." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Ore intae intare aainei, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura, ekaiguanare enker o enker, naiguanare ilmeregeshi o loroi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Aimebaiki intae entadaata too neeleng sidain eji metaa intunyoo ake too nkejek inyi olokeri pooki; niokioko enkare nasila, peyie intunyoo inkulie too nkejek inyi?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Naa kenya intare aainei nena nintunyoitie too nkejek inyi, neok ina are ning'ola too nkejek inyi?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “Metaa, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai ajoki ninche; ing'ura, ore nanu, nanu enkewan ai ekapik enkiguana erishata oo nkerra naapir o nkerra sasin." 
Ezekiel34:21 Amu irrumoo te murte o too ronyi, nimponyaa nena pooki naashal too mowuarak inyi, o metaba anaa nindapashakiki ninche pooki wueji," 
Ezekiel34:22 ekaitajeu nanu intare aainei, meitoki ae kata aaku inaainos ing'uesi; naa kaiguanare erishata e nker o enker." 
Ezekiel34:23 Naa kaitasheyie olchekut obo oitasheiki ninche, osinka lai Daudi, naa keitoti ninye ninche: ekeitoti ninye ninche neaku ninye olchekut lenye." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ore nanu, Olaitoriani, naa kaaku Enkai enye, ore osinka lai Daudi neaku olkitok tiatua ninche; nanu Olaitoriani oiroro." 
Ezekiel34:25 “Ekaitobir tenebo ninche osotua le seriani, naishu ing'uesi pooki entim teina kop, peyie etum aatobik ninche te seriani ti ong'ata neirrag atua entim." 
Ezekiel34:26 Naa kaitaa ninche o nenen wuejitin pooki neemanita ildoinyo laainei e mayianata; naa kairriu aitadou enchan terishata enye; naa ninye enkoirujuruji e emayianata. 
Ezekiel34:27 Ore lelo keek liong'ota neiu ilng'anayio lenye, ore enkop neiu ilng'anayio lenyena, naa keaku ninche ilooserian te nkop enye; neyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata nagil iloom le nchata enye oo murto, nalaku ninche aitung'uaa inkaik e lelo ooitaa ninche isinkan." 
Ezekiel34:28 Meitoki aaigil ae kata aaku eng'ues nainosi iloreren, nemeitoki ilowuarak le ina kop aapolol ninche; eketoni ninche te seriani, nemeeta entoki naitoki aiture ninche." 
Ezekiel34:29 Naa kaisho ninche embularoto oo ndaiki metaa meitoki amut ninche esumash teina kop, nemeitoki aatum enyamali enkurruna oo loreren." 
Ezekiel34:30 Naa keyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai enye, atii nanu tenebo ninche, naa ore ninche, ina aji e Israel naa iltung'ana laainei, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel34:31 Nirara intae intare, intare o lokeri lai, nara nanu Enkai inyi, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii aajoki: 
Ezekiel35:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani, impirare oldoinyo le Seir, nimbonoki aarare ninye" 
Ezekiel35:3 nijoki ninye, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo, kaarare iyie oldoinyo le Seir, naa kaaitorioki enkaina ai aarare iyie, naa kaaidapash iyie naaidaikie naitaa ene pesho." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ekaidaikie inkanas inono niaku iyie mitil; ina pee iyiolou ajo ara nanu Olaitoriani. 
Ezekiel35:5 Amu inyor iyie emang'atisho e anaake, ninchoo lelo tung'ana le Israel engolon o lalem te nkata e ngolikinoto enye, te nkata e mutata enye nabayie;" 
Ezekiel35:6 metaa, ore anaa enaishu nanu ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ekarreten intae te nkaraki osarge naa kesuj intae osarge; amu irara intae arruok te nkaraki osarge, metaa kesuj intae osarge." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ekaitaa oldoinyo le Seir olemetii toki, naitaa mitil; naa kadung'oo te ninye lelo pooki oopuonu atua aaparan nepuo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Naa kaiput ildoinyo linyi lmpopoki; o too ndoinyo inyi o too nong'ot inyi o iyarat o lashepak linyi pooki kebatata nena pooki to lalem. 
Ezekiel35:9 Naa kaitaa intae mitili anaake, ore inkanas inono nemeitokini aamany. Ina peyie iyiolou ajo ara nanu ilo Aitoriani." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Ore amu itejo, ‘Ore kulo oshon pokira o kuna kuapi pokira naa keaku inaainei, naa aikintaa ninche inkunaang,’ ore hoo netii apa Olaitoriani ine," 
Ezekiel35:11 neaku, ore anaa enaishu nanu, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ekaitaas intae anaa enatiu engoro o enkiba nintodolua te nkaraki enkiba aarare ninche; naa kaitayiolo nanu kewan tiatua intae, ina kata naiguanare intae." 
Ezekiel35:12 Naa iyiolouu aajo nanu, Olaitoriani otoning'o nena baa pooki torrok nitejo iararere lelo doinyo le Israel, ijojo, ‘Eitaaki ninche mitili, eishooki iyiook maidakie.’" 
Ezekiel35:13 Nirupurupu intae ate oleng kiararere nanu too nkutukie inyi, niponaa irorei aitaa kumok kiararere nanu; natoning'o nanu ina." 
Ezekiel35:14 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore tenkaraki enchipai enkop pooki ekaaitaa iyie mitil. 
Ezekiel35:15 Ore anaa enitishipakine ina jung'o enkaji e Israel, amu aimitil apa ninye, neaku kaarare sii nanu iyie; iaku sii iyie mitil, oldoinyo le Seir, o Edom pooki, pooki elulung'a. Ina peyie eyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel36:1 “Ore iyie enkerai e tung'ani imbonoki lelo doinyo le Israel, nijoki, intae ildoinyo le Israel, entoning ororei lo Laitoriani." 
Ezekiel36:2 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai; ore amu etejo ilo mang'atinda te iyie ‘Aha! Ore iwuejitin e apa neeika netaa enaang,’" 
Ezekiel36:3 neaku imbonoki nijoki, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore enkaraki, ee, ore enkaraki naitaa ninche intae mitili nepurd intae too nkaloli pooki, metaa itaa intae entoki e kulie kuapi, nitaa intae enkiroroto o entorroni olmarenke loo ltung'ana;" 
Ezekiel36:4 metaa, oi intae ildoinyo le Israel, entoning ororei lo Laitoriani Enkai: Inji ejoki Olaitoriani Enkai lelo doinyo o ndoinyo, o lashepak o nenen neeidurrieki o nkanas naaidurraki aaing'uaa, nena naataa entoki nainos pooki toki netaa enameni iloreren pooki oomanita;" 
Ezekiel36:5 metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ekairo nanu to lom lai oirowua aarare ilkulikae oreren, naarare Edom pooki, lelo ooishoo enkop ai ate metaa enenye te nchipai oltau neimaki inolmena, pee etum aawaita ninye te ngolon." 
Ezekiel36:6 Metaa imbonoki ina kop e Israel, nijoki lelo doinyo o nena doinyo, lelo ashepak o yarat, tiaki: Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, Ing'ura ajo, ekairo nanu to lom le ngoro ai, amu itaa intae iloonoto enkurruna too loshon;" 
Ezekiel36:7 metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, ainos olmumai ajo ore iloshon oomanita intae naa ketum ninche enkurruna." 
Ezekiel36:8 “Kake ore intae ildoinyo le Israel, naa keitubulu ninche ilng'osil lenye, neiki ilng'anayio linyi iltung'ana laainei Israel; amu kepuonu ninche aasieku ang." 
Ezekiel36:9 Amu, ing'ura, ara nanu olinyi, naa kaaibelekenyakino iyie naa aikituri nikiuni;" 
Ezekiel36:10 naa kaponaa iltung'ana te iyie, enkaji pooki e Israel, ninye pooki; ore nena anas naa kemanyi ore iwuejitin mijoonto nesheti;" 
Ezekiel36:11 naa kaponaa te iyie iltung'ana o ng'uesi; naa keponari ninche neisho oleng; naa kaaitaa iyie enamanyae anaa apa inkolong'i naatulusoitie, naa kaaitaas iyie esidai eneitu apa ae kata aaitaas. Ina peyie iyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ee, ekaisho iltung'ana meshomo tiatua iyie, o ltung'ana laainei Israel; naa keya ninche intae, iyakuku intae enjung'ore enye, nemeitoki ae kata inkera ang aatum osina." 
Ezekiel36:13 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore amu ejoki intae iltung'ana, ‘Inyanya intae iltung'ana, nioruru olosho linyi inkera,’" 
Ezekiel36:14 neaku mintokiki ae kata aanya iltung'ana nimintokiki aaoru olosho linyi inkera, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai;" 
Ezekiel36:15 nimintokiki intae aainining ae kata enkurruna e lelo oreren, nimintokiki ae kata aanap esulare oo ltung'ana nimintoki aaisho olorere linyi metorrorroto, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel36:17 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore peyie emany enkaji e Israel enkop enye, neisarkionie ninye too nkoitoi enye o too nkiaasin enye; ore olkuaak lenye te dukuya nanu netiu anaa oloirerio le nkitok te nkata enkiduruk enye." 
Ezekiel36:18 Metaa atubukoko nanu engoro ai shumata ninche te nkaraki osarge oibukoitie ninche te nkop, te nkaraki nena aitin nemeishu naisarkionie ninche." 
Ezekiel36:19 Aidapasha ninche tiatua iloreren, neidapashari ninche tiatua inkuapi, te risioroto oo lkuaaki lenye ore too siaitin enye naiguanare nanu ninche." 
Ezekiel36:20 Kake tenepuonu ninche iloreren ore pooki wueji neetuo ninche, neisarkionie ninche enkarna ai sinyati, ore teina nejo iltung'ana tenkaraki ninche, ‘Ore kulo tung'ana naa iltung'ana lo Laitoriani, naa kepuku ake aapuo aing'uaa enkop enye.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Kake kaata endamunoto te nkaraki enkarna ai sinyati, ina naitaa enkaji e Israel enaisarkionieki tiatua iloreren laa ninche eing'uaa." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Metaa tiaaki ina aji e Israel, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ime te nkaraki intae, na aji e Israel, peyie ataa kaas embae, kake te nkaraki enkarna ai sinyati ina nisarkionie intae tiatua lelo oshon lietuo." 
Ezekiel36:23 Naa kaibalie esinyatisho enkarna ai kitok, ina apa naisarkionieki tiatua iloreren, naa intae oo isarkionie intae tiatua ninche; neyiolou iloreren ina kata aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai ina kata naibalie esinyatisho ai aimaa intae te dukuya nkonyek enye." 
Ezekiel36:24 Amu kaitupuku nanu intae aitung'uaa iloreren, naiturrurru intae too nkuapi pooki nayau intae atua enkop inyi maate." 
Ezekiel36:25 Kaisuaaki nanu intae enkare nasila niakuku sidain too ntorrok inyi pooki, o too nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin inyi pooki ekaisuj nanu intae." 
Ezekiel36:26 Naisho nanu intae oltau ng'ejuk, naisho intae enkiyang'et ng'ejuk napik atua intae; naitayu aitung'uaa iseseni linyi ilo tau lo soit, naisho intae oltau le nkirring'o," 
Ezekiel36:27 naa kapik enkiyang'et ai atua intae, naitaa intae iloopuo too nkiguanat aainei nijurrurru oleng aaing'or nkikoot aainei." 
Ezekiel36:28 Imanyimanya ina kop naishoo iloo papaai linyi; niakuku intae iltung'ana laainei, naaku nanu Enkai inyi." 
Ezekiel36:29 Naa kaitajeu intae too loirerioni linyi pooki; naitanap entapa naitaa sapuk nemaitoki aiteleiki intae olameyu. 
Ezekiel36:30 Naa kaponaa ilng'anayio naitubul enkurma ino peyie mintokiki ae kata aatum enkurruna o lameyu tiatua iloreren. 
Ezekiel36:31 Ina peyie idamumu inkoitoi inyi torrok; o siatin inyi neme sidain; nimbayuyu ate te nkaraki ing'ok inyi, o lminong linyi litaasa." 
Ezekiel36:32 Ime tenkaraki iyie peyie aas ina, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai; inchoo ina eyiolounoyu te iyie. Tukurru nimilo too nkoitoi inono, iyie na aji e Israel." 
Ezekiel36:33 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore teina olong naaituku iyie too ntorrok inono pooki, naa kaisho inkanas inono metamanyi, ore iwuejitin nememanya nesheti." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ore ina kop apa nememanyae neturi, alang enaitoki aaku mitil te lelo pooki oogiroo ninye." 
Ezekiel36:35 Naa kejo ninche, ‘Ore apa ena kop mitil netotiwuo anaa ina kurma e Eden; ore nenen mijoonto naa mitil nememanya o nkanas naaidaitie, nemanya taata nesheta osempewuet.’" 
Ezekiel36:36 Ore ina kata dol lelo oreren ootung'uayioki oomanita iyie neyiolou aajo nanu, Olaitoriani, otesheta nenen wuejitin apa neeidaitie, naun ine apa netung'uayioki aa olmuaate; Nanu, Olaitoriani oiroro, naa kaas ina." 
Ezekiel36:37 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore sii ena naa kaisho ina aji e Israel maaikilikuana nanu maitaasa ninche; peyie aponaa ilewa lenye anaa inkerrai. 
Ezekiel36:38 Anaa inkerrai naaitainyieki ilasarri anaa nena kerrai e Yerusalem te lelo siruai lenye gelunot, metaa keaku keiputayu nena anas apa mijoonto too ntukusi oo ltung'ana. Ina peyie eyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Etii apa enkaina O Laitoriani shumata nanu naaitupuku nanu te Nkiyang'et o Laitoriani, naaitoton nanu te neitorit e nong'oto; naa kebore apa ninye iloik." 
Ezekiel37:2 Naarik nanu aitaman ninche; naa ing'ura, etii apa iloik kumok oleng ina nong'oto; naa ing'ura etoito ninche oleng." 
Ezekiel37:3 Naajoki ninye nanu “Enkerai e tung'ani, keidim kulo oik aatopiu?” Nawalaii ajoki, “Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai, iyiolo iyie.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Naaitoki ake ajoki nanu, “Imbonoki kulo oik, nijoki ninche, intae kulo oik ootoito, entoning ororei lo Laitoriani." 
Ezekiel37:5 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai ajoki kulo oik: eng'ura, ajo kapik intae enkiyang'et najing atua intae, nipiuu." 
Ezekiel37:6 Naa kapik intae imorlooishi, naisho nkiri metijing'a intae, neitoip intae tolchoni lo sesen, napik intae enkiyang'et, nipiuu; niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Metaa aibonoko anaa enaaitanapaki; ore ina kata aibonisho, nelotu oltoilo naa ng'ura, nadol enkop eikirikira; nepuonu lelo oik aaibung'a maate, oloito ake o loito lenye." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ore aingorisho netii ninche imorlooishi, neetuo nkiri osesen aaibung'are ninche, neitoip olchoni ninche; kake metii apa enkiyang'et atua ninche." 
Ezekiel37:9 Ina peyie aajoki ninye nanu, “Imbonoki enkiyang'et, imbonoki, enkerai e tung'ani, nijoki enkiyang'et, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Wou too nkaloli pokira ong'uan enkijape, iyie na kijape, niyang'aki kulo ootuata, peyie etum ninche aatopiu.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Metaa aibonoko ninche anaa enaaitanapa ninye nanu, nelotu enkiyang'et atua ninche, nepiu ninche neitashe too nkejek enye, olorora kitok oleng." 
Ezekiel37:11 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore kulo oik naa enkaji pooki e Israel. Ing'ura ajo ejo ninche ‘Etoito iloik lang, neiting'o iyiook osiligi; etudung'oyioki iyiook katukul.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Metaa imbonoki ninche nijoki, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo kabol inkuraren inyi, naitopiu intae too nkuraren inyi, intae lo tung'ana laainei; naa kayau intae ang atua ina kop e Israel." 
Ezekiel37:13 Niyiolouu aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ina kata nabol inkuraren inyi, naitopiu intae too nkuraren inyi, intae iltung'ana laainei." 
Ezekiel37:14 Naa kapik nanu atua intae enkiyang'et ai, nipiuu intae, napik intae enkop inyi maate; ina peyie iyiolouu inchere Nanu ilo Aitoriani, oiroro, nataasa ina, ejo Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Nelotu ororei lo laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel37:16 “Enkerai e tung'ani iwa eng'udi nisir ninye ajo, ‘Ene Yuda o nkera e Israel ooboita o ninye;’ nintoki aya ae ng'udi nisir ninye te dukuya enye, ‘Te nkaraki Yosef (ina ng'udi e Efraim) o enkaji pooki e Israel ooboita o ninye;’" 
Ezekiel37:17 nintutum ninche te nebo aitaa eng'udi nabo, peyie etum aataa nabo te nkaina ino." 
Ezekiel37:18 Ore peyie kijoki iltung'ana linono, ‘Aimintodol iyie iyiook enautu ena?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 Tiaaki ninche, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura, etinyikua peyie aya ina ng'udi e Yosef (ina natii ina aina e Efraim) o iloshon le Israel ooboitare ninye; naitutumoki ninye ina ng'udi e Yuda, naitaa ninche eng'udi nabo peyie etum aataa ninche nabo te nkaina ai." 
Ezekiel37:20 Ore nena keek nisirishore naatii enkaina ino te dukuya inkonyek enye," 
Ezekiel37:21 ina peyie ijoki ninche, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura ajo, kaya iltung'ana le Israel aitupuku te lelo oshon apa ooshomo lelo ootijing'a ninche, naiturrurru ninche too nkaloli pooki, nayau ninche enkop enye maate;" 
Ezekiel37:22 naa kaitaa ninche olorere obo te nkop, o too nchumat lelo doinyo le Israel, naa olaiguanani obo oitasheiki ninche pooki; nemeitoki aaku ninche iloshon aare, nemeitoki aaoro aaku inkitoriat are." 
Ezekiel37:23 Nemeitoki aaisarkionie ate aaigil too nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin enye o ntokitin enye torrok, arashu te pooki ake ninye ng'oki enye nabo; kake kaitajeu ninche te pooki rrinyoto enye narrinyo siadi teina ng'oki nataasa ninche, naa kaituku ninche; naa keaku ninche iltung'ana laainei, naaku nanu Enkai enye." 
Ezekiel37:24 “Naa keaku osinka lai Daudi olaiguanani lenye oitore ninche; naa keaku ninche ololchekut obo. Naa kesuj ninche inkitanapat aainei, neing'or oleng aasuj inkiguanat aainei." 
Ezekiel37:25 Ekebik ninche te nkop apa natotonie iloo papaai linyi ina apa naishoo osinka lai Yakobo; ninche te nebo nkera enye o nkera oo nkera enye etoni ninche te ine ntarasi; ore Daudi osinka lai neaku olkitok lenye intarasi. 
Ezekiel37:26 Ekaitobiru olning'o le seriani tenebo ninche; naa keaku ninche olning'o lo sotua intarasi tenebo ninche; naa kamayian ninche naitaa ninche kumok, naitasheyie tiatua ninche enkaji ai sinyati intarasi o ntarasi." 
Ezekiel37:27 Ore emanyisho ai neaku tenebo ninche; naa kaaku nanu Enkai enye, neaku ninche iltung'ana laainei." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ore iloreren neyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani oitisiny Isiraeli, ina kata etii ewueji ai sinyati atua ninche intarasi pooki.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii naajoki: 
Ezekiel38:2 “Enkerai e tung'ani,” impirare Gog, “leina kop e Magog, ilo arikoni kitok le Meshek o Tubal, nimbonoki agilunore ninye" 
Ezekiel38:3 ijoki ninye, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura, ekaarare iyie, iyie Gog, olarikoni kitok le Meshek o Tubal," 
Ezekiel38:4 naa kaaboin iyie arriny apik ilala oololo intakul inono; naa kaitupuku intae, tenebo enjore inyi pooki, imbartan o lakedok loo mbartan eishopo pooki imasaa o larrabal kitok oleng ninche pooki, eeta pooki ilong'oi kutiti, ilong'oi sapuki, o lalema," 
Ezekiel38:5 etii iltung'ana le Parsia o Kus o Put tenebo ninche, neeta pooki ilong'oi o nkopiyiani oo sekenke;" 
Ezekiel38:6 etii gomer tenebo ilturrurri lenyena pooki; o Bet-togaiman eing'uaa enkalo nalakua oleng e moikuape tenebo ilturrurri lenyena pooki o ltung'ana kumok tenebo iyie. 
Ezekiel38:7 “Terretenayu niton irretena, iyie tenebo lelo ororani pooki ooiturrurro tenebo iyie, niaku olarriponi te nkaraki ninche." 
Ezekiel38:8 Ore eishunye inkolong'i kumok naa aikipuonunui aabaiki iyie, ore too larin le siadi nilo agilunore enkop ina kop nanyaaka aaku olosho eishunye olarrabal, ina kop naiturrurrore olorere oing'uaa kulikae oreren too ldoinyo le Israel, nataa tenkata naado mitil; ore iltung'ana lenyena neyauni aaitupuku too loreren, netoni taata ninche pooki te seriani." 
Ezekiel38:9 Inyikakiki ninche anaa olkutati nitiu anaa enkatampoi naitoipito enkop, iyie tenebo ilturrurri linono pooki, tenebo iloreren kumok tenebo iyie.”" 
Ezekiel38:10 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore teina olong naa kepuonu atua iyie indamunot atua endamunoto ino, naa intobiruru endamunoto torrono." 
Ezekiel38:11 Nijojo, ‘Ekalo ailepaki aarare ina kop nemetii isunta inkang'itie; naa kabatatakino shumata lelo tung'ana ooitirring'a te seriani lelo oomanya enemetii isunta nemeeta isekenke arashu inchomito;’" 
Ezekiel38:12 peyie aibung iyarunot nanap nena naibung'aki; naim nenen pooki nemeekure emanyae tenebo lelo tung'ana ooing'uaa iloreren lelo oata inkishu o masaa, lelo oomanya empolos enkop." 
Ezekiel38:13 Ore Sheba, o Dedan o lbiasharani le Tarshish tenebo inkang'itie enye pooki naa kejoki intae, ‘Iyetuo intae aaibung iyarunot? Inturrurro ilororani linono peyie enap aaya iyarunot, peyie enap aaya enkosholai tenebo sahabu, neya nkishu tenebo imasaa, nenap iyarunot kumok?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Metaa, enkerai e tung'ani, imbonoki Gog tiaki, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore teina olong etoni iltung'ana laainei Isiraeli te seriani, aimiyiolouu intae?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Idumumu ate nipuonunu aaing'uaa ewueji inyi aaing'uaa nenen wuejitin neelakua e moikuape, ntae tenebo olorora loo ltung'ana kumok tenebo iyie, ekedito ninche pooki mbartan enye, o lorora kitok, enjore sapuk;" 
Ezekiel38:16 ipuonunu aailepu aagilunore aarare iltung'ana laainei Isirael, nimilumululu enkop anaa enkatampoi. Ore too nkolong'i naasuju naa kayau intae entaarare enkop ai, peyie aatum iloreren aatayiolo nanu, aa te iyie Gog aitoduaaya nanu esinyatisho ai te dukuya ninche." 
Ezekiel38:17 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ai iyie ilo apa laimaka too nkolong'i naatulusoitie to sinkan laainei lelo aidetidetak le Israel, laa ore te nena olong'i eibonishe te ninche too larin ejo kaayau iyie taarare ninche?”" 
Ezekiel38:18 Kake ore te ina olong, “ina kata nalotu Gog aarare ina kop e Israel, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, naa kedumuni engoro ai." 
Ezekiel38:19 Amu to lom lai o te ngoro ai napejisho aibalie, ore kenya te ina olong naa ketumi olokirikiri sapuk tiatua enkop e Israel;" 
Ezekiel38:20 ore isinkir le naiposha, o motonyi o loing'ang'e o nguesi e ong'ota, o ntokitin pooki naaiserpepiari tioriong e nkop, o ltung'ana pooki ootii oriong enkop, naa keilanyisho pooki te dukuya nanu, ore ildoinyo naa kenang'uni abori, ore imartin nesulari, ore pooki suntai naa keurokino enkop." 
Ezekiel38:21 Kaipotu olkirutoto pooki metaarare Gog, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai; ore pooki alem lo ltung'ani nearare olalashe lenye." 
Ezekiel38:22 Tolmeitai o te nkibukoroto o sarge ajing'aki ninye enkiguana, naa kashaiki shumata ninye te nebo ilororani lenyena o tenebo iltung'ana kumok ootii tenebo ninye, enchan sapuk tenebo isoito le nchan, enkima o enkibiriti nayupuyup." 
Ezekiel38:23 Metaa kaitodolu nanu enkitoo ai tenebo esinyatisho ai, naitayiolo kewan te dukuya inkonyek oo loreren kumok. Ina peyie eyilou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Ore iyie, nakerai e tung'ani, imbonoki tigilunore Gog, nijoki: Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ing'ura, ekaarare iyie, iyie Gog, ilo arikoni kitok le Meshek o Tubal;" 
Ezekiel39:2 naa kaaibelekeny iyie naareu iyie dukuya, naayau iyie shumata aitung'uaa inkiting'ot pooki e moikuape, naarik iyie taarare lelo doinyo le Israel;" 
Ezekiel39:3 naa kaaosh enkawuo ino te nkalo e nkaina ino e kedienye naisho imbaa inono metadoiki enkop te nkaina ino e tatene. 
Ezekiel39:4 Ibatatakino iyie enchumata oo ldoinyo le Israel, iyie tenebo ilturrurri linono pooki tenebo iltung'ana pooki likiboitare iyie; ekaaisho iyie lelo motonyi oonya nkiri le pooki pukunoto tenebo nena ng'uesi e ong'ata peyie kinos." 
Ezekiel39:5 Ibatata iyie te nkong'ata naisiaj; amu airoro nanu ejo Olaitoriani Enkai. 
Ezekiel39:6 Ekairriwaki enkima Magog, tenebo lelo ootoni te seriani to lomanaa le nkiyopat e naiposha; naa keyiolou ninche aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel39:7 “Ore enkarna ai Sinyati naa kaibalie ninye te rishata oo ltung'ana laainei Isiraeli; nemaitoki aisho enkarna ai sinyati eitokini aaisarkionie; neyiolou iloreren aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani, ilo Sinyati te Israel," 
Ezekiel39:8 Ing'ura, elotu ninye, naa keyauni aaitabau, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai. Ina olong ina naimaka." 
Ezekiel39:9 “Neaku ore lelo oomanya nena anas e Israel naa kepuo dukuya neitobiru inkimaitie too masaa olarrabal nepejoo ninche, ilong'oi sapuki o long'oi kutiti, o inkai o mbaa, irinkan o mperria. Naa keitobiru inkimaitie te ninche too larin oopishana;" 
Ezekiel39:10 metaa meitoki ninche aayieu neya ilkeek le nkima aaitung'uaa olokeri arashu edung'u too ntimi, amu keitobiru enkima enye too masaa enye olarrabal; ekeinyal ninche lelo ooinyal ninche, nemut lelo oomut ninche ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Ore teina olong naa kaisho Gog ewueji nanukarieki te Israel, ina nong'oto oo lapuayak te nkalo o loo saen le naiposha; keibooyo ninye ilapuayak, amu keaku teine eturori Gog o lorora lenye pooki naa keipoti ninye aajo o yarata le Hamon-gog." 
Ezekiel39:12 Amu ore too lapaitin oopishana, eaku keturoo ina aji e Israel ninche peyie etum aaipoo ina kop." 
Ezekiel39:13 Ore iltung'ana pooki leina kop naa keturoo ninche; naa keyanyiti ninche teina olong naitodolu enkitoo ai, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel39:14 Keitasheyie ninche iltung'ana ooim atua ina kop inkatitin pooki peyie epuo aanukaa lelo ootelekutua ti oriong e nkop, peyie etum aaipoo ninye; ore te nkiting'oto o lapaitin oopishana neitoki aaingoru impopoki aajurru." 
Ezekiel39:15 Naa dol teneim kulo atua ina kop nedol ake obo oloito lo ltung'ani, naa kepik ninye olmonekie enye, o metaba anaa neturoo lelo aturorok ninye teina nong'oto e Hamon-gog." 
Ezekiel39:16 (Etii sii enkanasa e Hamona netii sii ninye ine). Neaku neijia eiko teneipok ina kop. 
Ezekiel39:17 “Ore te iyie, nakerai e tung'ani, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Irorie imotonyi e pooki pukunoto o pooki pukunoto eng'ues e ong'ata, ‘Enturrurrunye wootu, enturrurroto too nkaloli pooki enturrurrokinoto ina masho o lasar ilo laitobiraki intae, e masho kitok oleng o lasar te nchumata e lelo doinyo le Israel, naa inosinoso inkiri niokioko osarge." 
Ezekiel39:18 Inosinoso nena kiri e lelo magil niokioko osarge loo lkituaak le nkop, o loo lmeregeshi, o loo lkuoo le kerra, o loo lkineji o loo loing'ok, lelo pooki oopir le Bashan." 
Ezekiel39:19 Naa inosinoso nena pooki naapir o entaraposhoto, niokioko osarge o entemerata, teina masho olasar naitobiraki intae." 
Ezekiel39:20 Naa iraposhosho intae te misa ai te nena bartan o lakedok lenye, tenebo iltung'ana magil o ilmurran loo mpukunot pooki; ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.’" 
Ezekiel39:21 “Naa kaitasheyie enkitoo ai tiatua iloreren; naa kedol iloreren pooki enkiguana ai ina nayaua, o enkaina ai ina naiteleikia ninche." 
Ezekiel39:22 Ore enkaji e Israel naa keyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai enye, eiteru ina olong nelo dukuya." 
Ezekiel39:23 Naa keyiolou iloreren aajo eshomo apa enkaji e Israel e araroto te nkaraki ing'ok enye, amu etaasa ninche ine nkarrueisho oleng te nanu metaa aisudoyie nanu enkomom ai aitung'uaa ninche naisho ninche metijing'a inkaik oo lmang'ati lenye, nebatata ninche pooki to lalem." 
Ezekiel39:24 Aaitaasa ninche terisioroto olduruk o nkitarruorrot enye, naisudoo enkomom ai aitung'uaa ninche." 
Ezekiel39:25 “Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore tena kata naa kashukoki Yakobo imayianat enyena, natum olng'ur te nkaji pooki e Israel; naaku oloota olom te nkaraki enkarna ai sinyati." 
Ezekiel39:26 Kerikino ninche enkurruna enye, o mbaa pooki torrok naataasa ninche aagilunore nanu, ina kata etoni te seriani te nkop enye meeta likae oiture ninche," 
Ezekiel39:27 ina kata nayau ninche ashuku too loreren naiturrurru ninche aitung'uaa ilmang'ati le nkop enye, naa tiatua ninche aibalie esinyatisho ai edolita iloreren kumok." 
Ezekiel39:28 Ina peyie eyiolou aajo ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai enye amu aterewa ninche eararoto tiatua iloreren, naitoki aiturrurroki ninche enkop enye maate. Maing'uaa hoo obo lenye eton tiatua iloreren aitoki;" 
Ezekiel39:29 nemaitoki aikata aisudoo enkomom ai aigil te ninche, ina kata nabuku Enkiyang'et abukoki ina aji Israel, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Ore to lari le tikitam o imiet le yararoto ang, te nkiterunoto o lari te nkolong e tomon o lapa, to lari le tomon oong'uan eidipaki aaibung'a enkanasa, teina olong; netii apa enkaina o Laitoriani shumata nanu." 
Ezekiel40:2 Naayau nanu too nduaat Enkai atua enkop e Israel naaitoton ninye nanu te nchumata oldoinyo oodo oleng, netii shumata enye olchetei laaijo enkanasa naipirare nanu." 
Ezekiel40:3 Ore peyie aayau ninye ine, ng'ura, etii apa oltung'ani, laa ore empukunoto enye netiu anaa osuyai, neeta te nkaina enye enkopito natemishoreki o entiyani natemishoreki te nkaina enye; neitashe ninye te wueji e kishomi." 
Ezekiel40:4 Naajoki nanu ilo tung'ani, “Enkerai e tung'ani ing'ura, too nkonyek inono, nining too nkiyiaa inono, nipik indamunot inono nena pooki naaitodol iyie, amu kitorikuoki ene peyie aatum aitoduaa iyie ninye; imbalakinye nena pooki nidol enkaji e Israel.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Naa ng'ura, etii apa esuntai namanita ine wueji e oriong netii enkaji e Nkai, ore enkadori e ina tiyani natemishoreki natii enkaina e ilo tung'ani naa intemat ile enkaina enkadori, ore pooki nabo enye naa entemata enkaina nabo o endap te nkadori; metaa etetema ina kirrushai eina suntai, naa entiyani nabo." 
Ezekiel40:6 Neitoki ninye alo ina kishomi naipirare oloosaen, eilep too nkedeta enyena, neipim entonata eina kishomi, entiyani nabo eng'uton; o lgilat oomanita, entiyani nabo enkadori," 
Ezekiel40:7 ore ilgilat loo mbaat naa entiyani nabo enkadoro ore erishata e lelo gilat loo mbaat naa intemat emiet e nkaina; ore ine neitasheyie ina kishomi te mbata o lgoriet tenejing'ieki kishomi naa entiyani nabo. 
Ezekiel40:8 Neitoki ninye atem olgoriet le kishomi, intemat enkaina isiet;" 
Ezekiel40:9 tenebo ineeitasheyie enyena, intemat are enkaina; ore olgoriet le kishomi netii enkalo enkiting'oto e atua e kishomi." 
Ezekiel40:10 Netii ilgilat pokira okuni loo mbaat inkaloli pokira e kishomi oloosaen; ore nena pokira uni nerisio pooki; ore ing'apeta oo nkaloli pokira nerisioro. 
Ezekiel40:11 Ina peyie etem endapasho eine nebolieki kishomi, intemat tomon; o endapasho e ina kishomi, intemat tomon oo kuni." 
Ezekiel40:12 Netii apa enerisha dukuya lelo gilat okuni loo mbat naa entemata nabo enkaina te pooki shoto. 
Ezekiel40:13 Ina peyie atem ina kishomi tioriong enkalo olgilata obo ometabaiki oriong olikae, neeta endapasho o ntemat imiet o ntemat tikitam eiteru te kutuk aji ometabaiki enkae kutuk aji." 
Ezekiel40:14 Neitoki ake sii atem olgoriet, intemat tikitam enkaina; ore ine emanaroto e ilo goriet netii olodung'oro." 
Ezekiel40:15 Ore te dukuya ina kishomi teine nejing'ieki o metabaiki ine enkiting'oto olgoriet liatua leina kishomi naa intemat onom. 
Ezekiel40:16 Ore ine wueji nejing'ieki kishomi neeta ilusien naamanita naapirik ijing atua nena ng'apeta enye tiatua lelo gilat loo mbat, neeta ake sii ilo goriet ilusien naamanita tiatua, ore too ng'apetae kutuk aji netii iltuka." 
Ezekiel40:17 Naariku nanu atua endung'oroto e oriong; naa ng'ura, etii ilgilat olgos o manaa teilo odung'oro; ilgilat tomoni uni ootii dukuya ilo gos." 
Ezekiel40:18 Neim ilo gos embata nena shomito, eipirare ina adori e nena shomito; ele apa olgos le abori." 
Ezekiel40:19 Neitoki ninye atem enkadori eiteru tiatua tenkalo e dukuya enkalo e atua eina kishomi e abori o metabaiki oriong tenkalo e dukuya ea atua olgoriet, intemat iip nabo enkaina." 
Ezekiel40:20 Neituruk ninye te dukuya nanu alo enkalo e moikuape, naa ng'ura etii apa enkishomi naing'orita enkalo e moikuape, enaa ene nkalo olodung'oro lioriong. Netem enkadori enye o endapasho enye." 
Ezekiel40:21 O lgilat lenyena loo mbat, okuni ake te pooki matua, o ng'apeta enyena tenebo olgorieti lenye laa erisiori o nekua e kishomi e dukuya; ore enkadori naa intemat enkaina onom o imiet." 
Ezekiel40:22 Ore ilusien enyena, o lgorieti enyena, tenebo iltuka lenyena naa erisiori nabo anaa lelo leina kishomi ina naing'orita enkalo oloosaen; naa inkedeta naapishana ninche naailepaki ine; netii olgoriet atua ine." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ore tenkae alo naipirare kishomi tenkalo e moikuape, anaa enatiu tenkalo o loo ntoluo netii enkishomi natii atua olgoriet; netem eiteru te kishomi o metabaiki kishomi, intemat e nkaina iip nabo." 
Ezekiel40:24 Naarik ninye nanu enkalo e kopikop, naa ng'ura, etii apa enkishomi enkalo e kopikop; netem ninye ing'apeta enyena tenebo ilgilat lenyena; neeta apa pooki erisiori nabo anaa ilkulikae." 
Ezekiel40:25 Netii apa ilusien naamanita tiatua olgoriet lenye, anaa ilusien e kulie; ore enkadori enye naa intemat e nkaina onom, ore endapasho enye naa intemat tikitam o imiet." 
Ezekiel40:26 Netii apa inkedeta naapishana naailepaki ninye, ore olgoriet lenye netii enkalo e atua; neeta apa iltuka too ng'apeta enye, obo ake tenkalo e atua; neeta apa ilkeek loo ltuka too ng'apeta enye, obo ake tenkalo nabo too nkaloli pooki." 
Ezekiel40:27 Netii apa enkishomi tenkalo e kopikop te nkalo e atua olodung'oro; netem ninye eiteru te kishomi o meshomo kishomi tenkalo e kopikop, intemat e nkaina iip nabo." 
Ezekiel40:28 Ina peyie aariku nanu atua olodung'oro li atua te nkalo e kishomi e kopikop, netem ninye ina kishomi e kopikop; naa erisio apa o nkulie." 
Ezekiel40:29 Ore ilgilat lenyena loo mbat, o ing'apeta enyena, olgorieti lenye naa erisio o nena kulie; netii apa ilusien naamanita tiatua tenebo olgilata lenye; ore enkadori naa intemat enkaina tikitam o imiet." 
Ezekiel40:30 Netii ilgorieti oomanita, intemat e nkaina tikitam o imiet enkadori naa intemat imiet endapasho." 
Ezekiel40:31 Ore olgoriet lenye neipirare olodung'oro li oriong netii iltuka ing'apeta enyena, ore enekedieki enye neeta inkedeta isiet." 
Ezekiel40:32 Ina peyie aariku nanu oliatua lo lodung'oro tenkalo oloosaen, netem ninye ina kishomi; nerisiore nena kulie." 
Ezekiel40:33 Ore ilgilat lenyena loo mbat, o ing'apeta enyena tenebo ilgorieti lenyena naa erisiori o lkulikae; netii atua ilusien naamanita tiatua tenebo olgoriet lenye ore enkadori enye naa intemat enkaina onom, ore endapasho enye naa intemat e nkaina tikitam o imiet." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ore olgoriet lenye neipirare ilo odung'oro li oriong, neeta apa iltuka too ng'apeta enyena, obo ake te pooki shoto; ore enekedieki enye neeta inkedeta isiet." 
Ezekiel40:35 Ina peyie aariku nanu enkalo e kishomi e moikuape, netem ninye; naa kerisioro o nkulie." 
Ezekiel40:36 Ore ilgilat lenyena loo mbat, o ng'apeta enyena, tenebo ilgorieti lenyena nerisioro o lkulikae; neeta ilusien naamanita, ore enkadori enye naa intemat e nkaina tikitam o imiet." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ore olgoriet lenye neipirare olodung'oro lioriong, neeta iltuka too ng'apeta enyena, obo ake te pooki shoto; ore enekedieki enye neeta inkedeta isiet." 
Ezekiel40:38 Netii apa olgilata sapuk oota kutuk aji enye to lgoriet le kishomi, naa teine apa eisuji ilo asar opejori." 
Ezekiel40:39 Ore tiatua ilo goriet le kishomi netii enkishomi natii imisai are too nkaloli pokira, naa ninche eyieng'ieki ilasarri oopejori, o lasarri le ngoki, o lasarri le nkitarruorroto." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ore tioriong ilo goriet tenkalo najing'ieki e kishomi moikuape, netii imisai are, ore te nkae alo eilo goriet eina kishomi netii imisai are." 
Ezekiel40:41 Netii apa imisai are atua, netii imisai ong'uan oriong, te nchoto e ina kishomi, imisai isiet, naa te nchumata enye eyieng'ieki ilasarri." 
Ezekiel40:42 Netii sii apa imisai ong'uan oo soito oogueta te nkaraki olasar opejori entemata enkaina nabo, o lpisiai enkadori, naa entemata nabo olpisiai endapasho, naa entemata nabo enkaina enkilepata, laa ninye eiteleikini intokitin pooki naayieng'ishoreki laa teine eteyieng'ieki olasar opejori." 
Ezekiel40:43 Ore ilala oololo, naa ore enkadori enye naa endap e nkaina, neenikino atua ninye tiatua. Ore tenchumata e nena misai naa ine eiteleikini nena kiri naaitaini olasar." 
Ezekiel40:44 Ina peyie aariku nanu tiauluo aitijing'u atua olodung'oro liatua, naa ing'ura, etii apa ilgilat aare sapuki otii atua olodung'oro liatua, ore obo naa ole nkishomi e moikuape naipirare kopikop, ore enkae neipirare enkalo e kishomi naing'orita moikuape." 
Ezekiel40:45 Naajoki ninye nanu, ore ele gilata oipirare enkalo e kopikop naa enelelo apolosak ooitasheiki enkaji e Nkai," 
Ezekiel40:46 ore olgilata oipirare moikuape olgilata loo lapolosak ooing'or olperere lo lasar; naa kulo ninche ilayiok le Sadok, laa ninye openy tiatua ilayiok le Lawi eishoro enyikaki Olaitoriani aaisiyiai ninye." 
Ezekiel40:47 Netem ninye ina dung'oroto, intemat e nkaina iip nabo enkadori, o ntemat iip nabo endapasho, nerisio inkaloli pokira ong'uan; netii olperere dukuya ina aji Enkai." 
Ezekiel40:48 Ina peyie aariku nanu olgoriet le nkaji e nkai, netem ing'apeta olgoriet, naa intemat imiet enkaina too nkaloli pokira; ore endapasho eina kishomi naa intemat e nkaina tomon oo ng'uan ore isunta enchoto naa intemat e nkaina uni te pooki shoto." 
Ezekiel40:49 Ore enkadori o lgoriet naa intemat e nkaina tikitam ore endapasho naa intemat e nkaina tomon aare naa inkedeta tomon naailepaki; netii apa inkitotoneta embata oo ng'apata too nkaloli pooki. 
Ezekiel41:1 Naariku nanu atua olgilata le polos, netem ninye ing'apeta enyena, ore ake te nchoto nabo naa intemat enkaina ile apa endapasho oo ntoneta eng'ape." 
Ezekiel41:2 Ore endapasho e ine nejing'ieki naa intemat e nkaina tomon; ore isunta e ine nejing'ieki naa intemat imiet too nkaloli pokira; netem ninye enkadori e ilo gilata, intemat e nkaina artam, o endapasho enye, intemat e nkaina tikitam." 
Ezekiel41:3 Ina peyie ejing atua olgilata liatua netem ing'apeta e kutuk aji, intemat are; o endapasho eina kutuk aji, intemat ile; o suntai natii embata e kutuk aji intemat naapishana." 
Ezekiel41:4 Netem enkadori e ilo gilata, intemat e nkaina tikitam, o endapasho enye, intemat e nkaina tikitam, tinigiroo olgilata le mpolos. Naajoki ninye nanu, ore ene naa ewueji sinyati aisul." 
Ezekiel41:5 Ina peyie etem ina suntai enkaji e Nkai, intemat ile enkirrushai; ore endapasho oo lgilat le nchoto, naa intemat e nkaina ong'uan, eman ina aji e Nkai." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ore ilgilat le nchoto neidikidikokino inkajijik uni te shumata, neipirare ake obo likae, tomoni uni ake te nkaji nabo natii shumata enkae. Netii ineeipiku naamanita ina suntai e nkaji e Nkai aa ninche naairishaa nena ajijik too nchot pooki kake meshetakino." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ore lelo gilat mbat nepuo alalau te nkaji e shumata o enkae e shumata, eipirare ine neirishakino te nkaji ake e shumata o te nkae te manaroto pooki enkaji e Nkai; Ore te matua enkaji e Nkai netii inkedeta naailep shumata, neaku neija eikunari oltung'ani teneilep eiteru te nkaji e abori o metabaiki enkaji e shumata eimaa enkaji e polos." 
Ezekiel41:8 Atoduaa sii ajo ore enkaji e Nkai neeta eneika namanita; ore ilkitamanyunot loo lgilat le nchoto naa entiyani nalulung'a oo ntemat ile naalulung'a enkadori. 
Ezekiel41:9 Ore enkirrushai eina suntai e oriong to lgilata le nchoto naa intemat e nkaina imiet. Ore enchoto e ine neika nemetii toki, naa intemat enkaina imiet, ore te rishata e ine neika e ina aji e Nkai," 
Ezekiel41:10 o lgilat lo lodung'oro naa endapasho oo ntemat tikitam eman ina aji e Nkai te pooki shoto. 
Ezekiel41:11 Ore inkutukie oo nkajijik e lelo gilat le nchoto oobolo embata eine neika netung'uayioki metii toki te kutuk aji e nkalo e moikuape, ore enkae kutuk aji netii e nkalo e kopikop; ore endapasho eine wueji natung'uayioki metii toki naa intemat imiet emanita." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ore ina aji apa naipirare olodung'oro lena aji e Nkai te nkalo oloontoluo naa intemat intomoni naapishana e lalai; ore ina suntai eina aji naa intemat imiet te nkirrushai emanita, ore enkadoro naa intemat intomoni naaudo." 
Ezekiel41:13 Netem ninye ina aji e Nkai, intemat enkaina iip nabo enkadori; o lodung'oro tenebo ina aji o sunta enyena, intemat iip nabo enkadori;" 
Ezekiel41:14 tenebo endapasho te nkalo oloontoluo te dukuya enkaji e Nkai, tenebo olodung'oro intemat enkaina iip nabo." 
Ezekiel41:15 Netem enkadori eina aji eipirare ilo odung'oro otii enkalo oloontoluo o sunta enyena too nkaloli pooki, intemat e nkaina iip nabo. Ore ilo gilata olala leina aji e Nkai, o lgilata liatua oilo lioriong neeta ineerupa" 
Ezekiel41:16 ore emanaroto e pokira okuni neeta ilusien o ng'apeta. Ore te ntonata naipirare enetonie enkaji e Nkai nerupa too nkeek emanita, eiteru toltiren o meilepaki ilusien (ore ilusien naa kemura)," 
Ezekiel41:17 o metabaiki ine nemetii toki te shumata kutuk aji, o tenebo ilo gilata liatua, o tenkalo e oriong; Ore too sunta pooki naamanita tiatua olgilata liatua o ilo gilata sapuk liatua neguetuno te nkitanyaanyukoto o lkerubi," 
Ezekiel41:18 o lchani loo ltuka, netii ake oltukai erishata o lkerubi o lkerubi." 
Ezekiel41:19 Neeta ake olkerubi obo inkomomi are: enkomom o ltung'ani oipirare oltukai te nkalo nabo, o enkomom oloti ng'atuny eipirare oltukai te nkae alo. Neguetakino ninche enkaji pooki e Nkai temanaroto;" 
Ezekiel41:20 ore eiteru toltiren o meshomo shumata e kutuk aji naguetakino olkerubi oltuka ina suntai. 
Ezekiel41:21 Ore nena molinkaishi e kutuk aji e ilo gilata nerisioro pooki aloli. Ore te dukuya ine wueji sinyati netii entoki nanyaanyukie olperere loo nkeek," 
Ezekiel41:22 intemat e nkaina uni enkadoro enkilepata, intemat are enkadori, intemat are endapasho; ore ilpijat lenyena entonata enye, o sunta enyena naa inoo nkeek. Naajoki ninye nanu, “Nena ina mesa natii dukuya Olaitoriani.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Ore ilo gilata liatua tenebo ine wueji sinyati neeta ake nabo kikenet naidikidiko katitin are. 
Ezekiel41:24 Neeta nena kikeneta imatuan are imatuan are naamanaa too yeneta te pooki kikenet. 
Ezekiel41:25 Ore te nena kikeneta e ilo gilata neguetakino ilkerubi o ltuka, anaa lelo ooguetakino nena sunta; netii ilkeek kumok oonukita ilo gilata lioriong." 
Ezekiel41:26 Netii ilusien enchoto e ilo gilata too nkaloli pokira, neikodoki nena sunta too lkeek loltukai." 
Ezekiel42:1 Ina peyie aariki nanu atua olgoriet liatua le nkalo e moikuape, naariku nanu atua ilgilat ooipirare enkalo olodungoro le nkaji e Nkai netii sii enkae alo eina aji natii moikuape." 
Ezekiel42:2 Ore enkadori eina aji natii enkalo e moikuape naa intemat iip nabo, ore endapasho enye naa intemat onom." 
Ezekiel42:3 Neibung'are intemat e nkaina tikitam naatii atua olodung'oro liatua, neipirare enkiyopata naimi enkaji e oriong olodung'oro. Oltapeet le nkaji oipirare olikae too nkajijik uni naakedo aaidikidiko." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ore eitu ijing lelo gilat netii enkoitoi najing atua, intemat enkaina tomon endapasho o ntemat e nkaina iip te nkadori netii inkutukie oo nkajijik enye enkalo e moikuape." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ore ilgilat le shumata naa aironkeni, amu ewaita iltapeeti le shumata erishata sapuk aalang ilgilat liabori o le mpolos le nkaji." 
Ezekiel42:6 Amu inkajijik apa uni naakedo, nemeeta apa ing'apeta anaa ing'apeta ololodung'oro liauluo; metaa ore ilgilat le shumata neingat enkop aalang ile abori o le polos." 
Ezekiel42:7 Netii apa esuntai boo naipirare lelo gilat te nkalo olodung'oro lioriong; eipirare lelo gilat, intemat enkaina onom enkadori." 
Ezekiel42:8 Ore ilgilat lolodung'oro lioriong naa intemat onom te nkadori, ore lelo ootii enkae alo enkaji e Nkai naa intemat iip nabo enkadoro." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ore tiabori lelo gialat netii kutuk aji te nkalo oloosaen, ejing iltung'ana ninche eing'uaa oriong endung'oroto, ine neiterunye esuntai e oriong." 
Ezekiel42:10 Ore sii te nkalo e kopikop, eipirare olodung'oro o eipirare sii ina aji; etii ilgilat oota enejing'ieki te dukuya ninche;" 
Ezekiel42:11 nenyaanyukie ninche lelo gilat ootii enkalo e kopikop, nabo enkadoro o endapasho, neeta ewueji nebo neipang'ieki, naa nabo o nkutukie oo nkajijik." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ore tiabori ilgilat le kopikop netii enejing'ieki te nkalo oloosaen, teine nejing'ieki ina oitoi, ore te nkalo e kurum netii esuntai narish esuntai." 
Ezekiel42:13 Ina peyie aajoki ninye nanu, “Ore ilgilat le nkalo e moikuape o lgilat le kopikop lelo ooipirare ilo odung'oro naa lgilat Sinyat, laa teine epuo lelo apolosak oopuonu enetii Olaitoriani aanyalelo asarri sinyat oleng ilo asar le ntapa, ilo asar le ng'oki, o ilo asar le nkitarruoroto, amu ore ine wueji naa aisinyati." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ore tenejing ilapolosak ine wueji sinyati, nemeipang auluo teine aapuo ina dung'oroto e auluo eitu eitayu te ine nena kilani enye a enkisiaayiare, amu aisinyat kuna; neishop ninche kulie kilani eton eitu epuo aanyikaki ina oo nara ine tung'ana.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Ore peyie eidip atetema atua ine wueji e nkaji e Nkai, naarik nanu aipang'ie teina kishomi naipirare enkalo oloosaen, netem ewueji e nkaji e Nkai aman." 
Ezekiel42:16 Netem enkalo oloo saen te ntiyani natemishoreki intemat enkaina iip imiet te ntiyani natemishoreki. 
Ezekiel42:17 Neitoki aibelekenya netem enkalo e moikuape, intemat enkaina iip imiet te ntiyiani natemishoreki." 
Ezekiel42:18 Neitoki aibelekenya netem enkalo e kopikop, intemat iip imiet e nkaina teina tiyani natemishoreki." 
Ezekiel42:19 Neitoki aibelekenyakino enkalo oloontoluo, netem, intemat iip imiet e nkaina teina tiyani natemishoreki." 
Ezekiel42:20 Etetema ninye too inkaloli pokira ong'uan. Neeta apa esuntai namanita ninye, intemat enkaina iip imiet te nkadori, o ntemat iip imiet e nkaina endapasho, pee etum atirishu ewueji sinyati o ene pooki ng'ae." 
Ezekiel43:1 Ore te siadi naayau ninye nanu kishomi, ina kishomi naipirare enkalo oloosaen." 
Ezekiel43:2 Naa ng'ura, eeuo enkitoo e Nkai e Israel eing'uaa enkalo oloosaen; ore oltoilo le lotunoto enye netiu anaa oltoilo loo nkariak kumok; newang'u enkop te nkitoo enye." 
Ezekiel43:3 Ore ina duaata natoduaa, netiu anaa enduaata apa natoduaa apa ina kata nalotu aidaikie ina anasa, netiu anaa enduaata apa natoduaa te mbata o lkeju le kebar; nabatata te nkomom ai." 
Ezekiel43:4 Ore ejing'ita enkitoo e Nkai atua ina aji e Nkai eimu ina kishomi natii enkalo o loosaen," 
Ezekiel43:5 naadumu nanu Enkiyang'et ailepie, naayau atua olgoriet liatua; naa ng'ura, eiputa enkitoo o Laitoriani ina aji e Nkai." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ore eitashe ilo tung'ani te mbata nanu, naning obo laairorie nanu tiatua enkaji e Nkai; naajoki ninye nanu," 
Ezekiel43:7 “Enkerai e tung'ani, ore ene wueji naa ewueji olorika lai le nkitoo, naa ewueji oo ndapi oo nkejek aainei, ewueji namany tiatua iltung'ana le Israel intarasi. Nemeitoki ae kata enkaji e Israel aaisarkionie enkarna ai Sinyati, nemeitoki ninche, arashu ilaiguanak lenye, teina kiborra enye oo nkonyek, o too mpopoki oo laiguanak lenye ootuata" 
Ezekiel43:8 eitasheyie ineeidong'ishoreki enye te wueji ai neidong'ishoreki, o ntaloishin e kutuk aji enye tembata oo ntaloishin e kutuk aji aainei, metaa esuntai ake natii erishata e nanu o ninche. Eisarkionie ninche enkarna ai sinyati teilo minong otaasa ninche, metaa atumuta nanu ninche te ng'oro ai." 
Ezekiel43:9 Inchoo taata eitalamaa ninche enkiborra enye oo nkonyek o mpopoki oo laiguanak lenye ootuata aaitalamaa te nanu, naa kamany nanu atua ninche intarasi." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Ore iyie, nakerai e tung'ani, toliki ina aji e Israel enkaji e Nkai o enaikununo o enaikunuuni, peyie etum aatukurru too ntorrok enye." 
Ezekiel43:11 Naa tenaa kekurru te pooki nataasa ninche, imbalie enkaji e Nkai, enkitobirata enye neeipang'ieki, o ineejing'ieki enyena o pooki kitamanyunoto enye nintayiolo ninche pooki nkiguanat enye o nkitanapat enyena pooki; ninger ninche edolita, peyie etum aatujurru neibung inkitanapat pooki tenebo nkiguanat pooki." 
Ezekiel43:12 Ena ninye enkitanapata e Nkaji e Nkai: ina kop pooki namanita te shumata e ilo doinyo keaku enasinya oleng. Ing'ura ajo ena ninye enkitanapata e nkaji e Nkai. 
Ezekiel43:13 “Kuna ninche ntemat olperere lo lasar too ntemat (entemata enkaina nalulung'a o ndapasho enkaina.) Ore entonata enye naa keaku entemata enkaina nabo eilep naa entemata enkaina nabo endapasho, tenebo enkamanaa nabo namanita osegel lenye. Naa ena ninye naaku enkadori olperere lo lasar." 
Ezekiel43:14 Ore eiteru te ntonata enkop o metabaiki enkedet enye e abori, naa intemat are enkaina, neeta endapasho entemata enkaina nabo; ore eiteru te nkedet kiti o metabaiki enkedet sapuk, naa intemet ong'uan e nkaina, neeta endapasho entemet enkaina nabo;" 
Ezekiel43:15 ore ewueji enkima olperere lo lasar, naa intemat ong'uan enkaina; ore epuku te wueji enkima olperere lo lasar eilep shumata naa imowuarak ong'uan entemata nabo enkaina eilep." 
Ezekiel43:16 Ore ine wueji enkima olperere lo lasar naa keaku kerisioro pooki intemat tomon aare enkaina enkadoro, naa intemat tomon oare enkaina endapasho." 
Ezekiel43:17 Ore sii ninye enkedet naa kerisioro te pooki aloli, intemat enkaina tomon oong'uan enkadoro, naa intemat enkaina tomon oong'uan endapasho, neeta enkamanaa namanita ninye olpisiai le ntemata e nkaina endapasho, ore entonata enye naa entemata nabo e nkaina emanita. Ore inkedeta e ilo perere lo lasar neipirare enkalo o loosaen.”" 
Ezekiel43:18 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Kuna ninche inkitanapat naaipirta olperere lo lasar: Ore teina olong naitasheyieki ninye peyie eitaini olasar opejori teshumata ninye o pee ebukokini osarge shumata ninye," 
Ezekiel43:19 incho ilo apolosani loo Lawi lolmarei le Sadok, ilo laanyikaki nanu aisiai, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai oloing'oni meitainyie olasar le ng'oki." 
Ezekiel43:20 Naa iya iyie embata osarge lenye, nipik ninye nena mowuarak ong'uan o lperere lo lasar, nipik ilpijat oong'uan le nkedet, nipik ina amanaa aitaman neaku neijia inko tinimpok olperere lo lasar aitisiny, nintayu olning'o lo sotua te ninye." 
Ezekiel43:21 Iya sii ilo oing'oni lo lasar le ng'oki, nepeji ninye te ine wueji negeluno e nkaji e Nkai, tiauluo ine wueji nesinya." 
Ezekiel43:22 Ore te nkolong e are nintayu oloro lemeeta entioto te nkaraki olasar le ng'oki; naa keipoki olperere lo lasar, anaa apa peyie eipoki te ilo oing'oni." 
Ezekiel43:23 Ore peyie indip aipoo ninye, nintayu oloing'oni lemeeta entioto olmeregesh oing'uaa intare nemeeta entioto." 
Ezekiel43:24 Ninchooyo ninche te dukuya Olaitoiriani, naa keisuaaki ilapolosak emunyan shumata ninche neitayu ninche anaa olasar opejori aitaiki Olaitoriani." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ore too nkolong'i naapishana, naa intayu anaake enkine te nkaraki olasar le ng'oki, tenebo oloing'oni tenebo olmeregesh oing'uaa intare, lemeeta entioto, ninye eitaini." 
Ezekiel43:26 Neitayu ninche olasar lo lning'o lo sotua too nkolong'i naapishana te nkaraki olperere lo lasar aipok ninye aitisiny, neiteng'elakini ninye." 
Ezekiel43:27 Ore peyie eishu kuna olong'i, neaku ore te nkolong e isiet nelo dukuya neitayu ilapolosak to lperere lo lasar lelo asarri linyi oopejori tenebo ilasarri linyi le seriani, naa kang'amaa intae, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Naaitoki ariku nanu ina kishomi e auluo e ine wueji sinyati, naipirare enkalo oloosaen, naa keikeno apa." 
Ezekiel44:2 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Keton ena kishomi eikeno; meboli ninye, nemeeta oltung'ani ojing'u aimu ina kishomi; amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel, naa ine etijing'unye, neaku keton ninye eikeno." 
Ezekiel44:3 Olkitok ake oton tiatua ninye peyie etum ainosa emukate te dukuya Olaitoriani; naa kejing ninye atua te nkoitoi olgilata le kishomi, neitoki ake aipang teina oitoi.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Naariku ninye nanu aimunye enkalo e kishomi e moikuape omatabaiki enkalo e dukuya e nkaji e Nkai, naing'or naa ng'ura, eiputa enkitoo Olaitoriani e nkaji o Olaitoriani; nabatata te nkomom ai." 
Ezekiel44:5 Naajoki Olaitoriani nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, tujurru oleng, toduaa too nkonyek inono, nining too nkiyiaa inono nena pooki naaliki iyie naaipirta inkitanapat pooki e nkaji o Laitoriani tenebo nkitanapat enyena pooki; nijurru oleng ayiolou lelo pooki ooishori metijing'a enkaji e Nkai o lelo pooki oodung'ori tewueji sinyati." 
Ezekiel44:6 Nijoki ina aji kiserut, ina aji e Israel, Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Naaji e Israel, incho eish ilo minong lino pooki," 
Ezekiel44:7 teine ning'amaa ilomon ile memurata too ltauja o seseni, peyie ejing ewueji ai sinyati, neisarkionie ninye, ina kata nikinchosho nanu endaa ai, nena naapir o ilo sarge. Itigila intae olning'o lai lo sotua, tenebo ilo minong linyi pooki." 
Ezekiel44:8 Neitu iramatata intokitin aainei sinyat; kake itipika ilomon meing'ura atua ewueji ai sinyati. 
Ezekiel44:9 “Metaa inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Meetae olomoni olememurata oltau o sesen lenye, o pooki omoni lelo ootii atua iltung'ana le Israel, oojing ewueji ai sinyati." 
Ezekiel44:10 “Kake ore lelo le Lawi laashomo aalam nanu, ootapong'ori te nanu aasuj nena kitanyaanyukot enye oo nkaitin ina kata peyie epong'ori Israel, naa kenap enkitamioto enye maate." 
Ezekiel44:11 Keaku ninche ilaisiaayiak te wueji ai sinyati, neitasheiki too nkishomin e nkaji e Nkai, neisiaaisho te nkaji e Nkai; naa keyieng ninche olasar opejori te nkaraki iltung'ana, naa keramat ninche olorere, eisiaai ninche." 
Ezekiel44:12 Amu eisiaayia ninche te dukuya inkaitin enye oo nkitanyaanyukot neaku ninche ilooibooyo ng'ok te nkaji e Israel, neaku ainosa olmumai te ninche, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai, inchere kenap ninche maate enkitamioto enye." 
Ezekiel44:13 Maapuonu ninche aanyikaki nanu aaisiai nanu anaa ilapolosak, arashu epuonu aanyikaki intokitin aainei sinyat o ntokitin naa sinyat oleng; kake kenap ninche enkurruna enye, te nkaraki ilo minong otaasa ninche." 
Ezekiel44:14 Ore ake sii naa kagelu ninche meitasheiki ina aji e Nkai, peyie atum aas esiaai pooki naasi tiatua ninye." 
Ezekiel44:15 “Kake ore ilapolosak loo Lawi, lelo ayiok le Sadok, lelo oogolie ewueji ai sinyati, ina kata nashomo iltung'ana le Israel aapong'ori aaing'uaa nanu, kepuonu ninche enatii aanyiku peyie aasiai nanu, naa kaaisiaai nanu aaitaiki nanu nena naapir tenebo ilo sarge, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai;" 
Ezekiel44:16 naa kejing ninche ewueji ai Sinyati, naa kejing ninche emisa ai, peyie aaisiai nanu, naa keibung ninche enkitanapata ai." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ore peyie ejing ninche atua inchomito o lgoriet liatua, naa keishop ninche inkilani e kitani naapuyiapui; meishop hoo ninche toki naitobiruno too lpapit loo ntare, ina kata aaisiaai too nchomito o lgoriet tiatua aji." 
Ezekiel44:18 Naa keishop ninche inkarash e kitani too lukuny enye o surualini e kitani too mpolosi enye; merrotian ninche ae toki naitaar ninche enkima. 
Ezekiel44:19 Naa tenebo eipang aapuo olodung'oro lioriong enetii iltung'ana, naa keitayu nena kilani nena apa naaisiaaishore, neirragie ninche too lgilat sinyat; neishop ninche kulie kilani, pee mepik ake esinyatisho iltung'ana too nkilani enye." 
Ezekiel44:20 Nemebarn ninche ilukuny enye aarashu eisho ilpapit lenye ebulu aadoru, keisor ake ninche ilpapit lenye loo lukuny enye." 
Ezekiel44:21 Meetae olapolosani ook enaisho oo sabibu, ina kata ejing olgoriet liatua." 
Ezekiel44:22 Meyam ninche enkoliai, arashu enkitok natung'uayie o lpayian lenye, kake eselenkei ake o lorere le nkaji e Israel, arashu enkoliai naa enkoliai o lapolosani." 
Ezekiel44:23 Keiteng'en ninche iltung'ana laainei enepaashare ina nasinya o ina nemesinya, neitodol ninche eneiko teneirishu ina naiduruk o enemeiduruk." 
Ezekiel44:24 Ore tembae pooki natii enchankar, neaku ninche ilarishak te risioroto oo nkiguanat aainei. Keibung ninche inkitanapat aainei tenebo inkiguanat too siruai laainei pooki gelunot, neitisiny isabatoni aainei." 
Ezekiel44:25 Meisarkionie ninche ate aapuo aanyikaki olmeneng'ani; ore ake eyia, te papaai arashu yieyioo to layioni arashu te ntito, to lalashe arashu teina anashe nemeyama keidim aaisarkionie ate." 
Ezekiel44:26 Ore peyie eidip aiduruko, neikenaki kewan nkolong'i naapishana neaku ninye olemeeta olduruk." 
Ezekiel44:27 Ore teina olong nalo ninye ine wueji sinyati, atua olgoriet liaatua, peyie aaisiai tiatua ewueji sinyati, naa keitayu ninye olasar lenye le ng'oki ejo, Olaitoriani Enkai," 
Ezekiel44:28 “Meitoki ninche aata enjung'ore; nanu enjung'ore enye; nimincho ninche toki naitaa enenye tiatua Israel; ara nanu entoki enye. 
Ezekiel44:29 Kenya ninche olasar le ntapa, olasar le ng'oki tenebo olasar le ntorroni; ore pooki toki te Israel naiteng'elaki neaku enenye." 
Ezekiel44:30 Ore pooki nganayio le dukuya le pooki pukunoto o pooki kishoroto e pooki pukunoto too nkishorot inono pooki, naa keaku inoo lapolosak; nincho sii ninche lelo apolosak olng'anayioi lino le dukuya le mukate, peyie etum emayianata atotona te nkaji ino." 
Ezekiel44:31 Menya ilapolosak pooki toki, aa emotonyi arashu eng'ues, ina natua makewan arashu enataara nkulie." 
Ezekiel45:1 “Ore tenelo niorikinono enkop aaya, entooriki Olaitoriani erubata teina kop metaa enkop sinyati. Intemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet enkadoro; o ntemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam endapasho, naa keaku sinyati te pooki nebaiki pooki." 
Ezekiel45:2 Ore teina kurma nedung'uni ewueji nerisioro inkaloli pooki oo ntemat enkaina iip imiet naaku ine wueji sinyati neeta intemat onom enkaina e wueji nemetii toki namanita ninye. 
Ezekiel45:3 Ore teina kop sinyati nirishu aoru erubata intemat nkalifuni tikitam o imiet te nkadoro o ntemat enkaina inkalifuni tomon te ndapasho, naa ninche ejing ina aji sinyati, ewueji sinyati oleng." 
Ezekiel45:4 Keaku ninye esashati sinyati teina kop; naa keaku enelelo apolosak ooasisho tiatua ine wueji sinyati; nejing ine wueji sinyati aaisiai Olaitoriani; naa keaku ninye ewueji oo nkajijik enye, naa ewueji Sinyati te nkaraki ine wueji sinyati." 
Ezekiel45:5 Ore enkae sashati, intemat e nkaina nkalifuni tikitam o imiet tenkadoro naa ntemat e nkaina nkalifuni tomon endapasho, naa keaku enoo le Lawi lelo ooisiaisho te nkaji e Nkai, pee eaku ewueji oo nkanas enye naamany." 
Ezekiel45:6 “Ore ake sii teina sashati natudung'uoki aitaa enkop nasinya, nidung'u aitaa ewueji e nkanasa, enkop oo ntemat nkalifuni imiet te ndapasho naa ntemat enkaina inkalifuni imiet te nkadoro neaku ene nkaji pooki e Israel." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Naa keaku eno lkitok enkop pooki natii nkaloli pokira ina kop sinyati o ine wueji e nkanasa, emanita ine wueji sinyati o ine wueji enkanasa, te nkalo oloontoluo o te nkalo o loosaen, eipirarete nkadoro nabo sashati olorere, nenyikaa eiteru te nkalo o loontoluo o meshomo oloo saen lo lpolosie leina kop. Keaku ina enkop enye te Israel." 
Ezekiel45:8 Ore ilkituaak laainei nemeitoki ae kata airony iltung'ana laainei; kake keisho ina aji e Israel menoto ina kop te risioroto oo loshon lenye. 
Ezekiel45:9 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: itaasa ingok, lo kituaak le Israel! Ewuang'ie enkikonya o enkitorogonyare, nimbalilie esipata o esinyatisho; entapal eyararoto oo ltung'ana laainei, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Entaa iloota intemat naasipa naaineneng'ishoreki, efa nemetii emonkoi, o bati nemetii emonkoi." 
Ezekiel45:11 Ore efa tenebo e bati naa erisiori nabo, ore bati neeta ematua nabo e tomon e Homa, ore efa ematua nabo e tomon e Homa; neaku ore Homa ninye erikorieki enkiroishi pooki." 
Ezekiel45:12 Ore shekeli naa keaku ing'erai tikitam; ore shekeli imiet neaku shekeli imiet, ore shekeli tomon neaku shekeli tomon, ore mina ino neaku shekeli onom." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Ena ninye enkishooroto naa ninye intayu; ore ematua nabo e ile e efa te pooki homa e nkano e ematua nabo e ile e pooki homa e shairi," 
Ezekiel45:14 o erubata nauno e ilata, ematua nabo e tomon bati te pooki Kori (ore kori netiu anaa homa, eeta bati tomon);" 
Ezekiel45:15 ore enker nabo te luaata oo nkerrai iip are, too lmarei pooki le Israel. Ena ninye enkishooroto te nkaraki olasar le ntapa, olasar opejori, o lasar le seriani, peyie itum aitobira olasar lo lning'o lo sotua te nkaraki ninche, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel45:16 Ore iltung'ana pooki leina kop, neisho ena kishooroto ilo kitok otii atua Israel." 
Ezekiel45:17 Keaku esiaai o lkitok peyie eitobir ilasarri oopejori, ilasarri le ntapa, o lasarri ooki, te lelo siruai, teina rishata nadoli olapa too sabatoni, o te lelo siruai pooki gelunot le nkaji e Israel: keitayu ninye ilasarri le ng'oki, o lasarri le ntapa, o lasarri oopejoro, o lasarri le seriani, peyie etum aitaiki olning'o lo sotua ina aji e Israel." 
Ezekiel45:18 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: ore to lapa le dukuya, te nkolong e dukuya o lapa, niyaya oloti oing'oni lemeeta entioto, nimpok ine wueji sinyati." 
Ezekiel45:19 Naa keya olapolosani oloti sarge lo lasar le ng'oki nepik ninye intaloishin e kutuk aji eina aji e Nkai, nepik sii inkedeta pokira ong'uan o lperere lo lasar, o ng'apeta e kishomi e ine wueji olgoriet liatua." 
Ezekiel45:20 Niasiasa ina te nkolong e naapishana o lapa te pooki ng'ae otaasa eng'oki te ntorroni arashu te modai; metaa intayuyu olning'o lo sotua te nkaraki enkaji e Nkai. 
Ezekiel45:21 “Ore to lapa le dukuya, te nkolong e tomon oong'uan o lapa, naa ishipakinono ilo sirua le ngiroroto oji Pasaka ore too nkolong'i naapishana naa kenyae emukate neitu eisiujieki." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ore teina olong naa keitayu olkitok te nkaraki enkewan enye tenebo iltung'ana pooki leina kop oloti oing'oni te nkaraki olasar le ng'oki. 
Ezekiel45:23 Ore te nena olong'i naapishana e ilo sirua, naa keitaiki anaa olasar opejokini Olaitoriani iloing'ok ooti oopishana o lmeregeshi oopishana lemeeta entioto, te pooki olong e nena naapishana; o loro pooki olong te nkaraki olasar le ng'oki." 
Ezekiel45:24 Naa keitayu anaa olasar le ntapa e efa te pooki oing'oni, e efa te pooki meregesh, o hini e ilata te pooki efa." 
Ezekiel45:25 Ore to lapa le naapishana, te nkolong e tomon o imiet olapa o too nkolong'i naapishana e ilo sirua, naa keitobiri ina kishorunoto tenkaraki olasar loo ng'ok ilasarri oopejori, o lasarri le ntapa, o te ilata." 
Ezekiel46:1 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Ore kishomi o lodung'oro liatua oipirare oloo saen naa keikeni te nena olong'i ile naasishoi; kake ore teina olong e sabato naa keboli o enkolong nadoli olapa. 
Ezekiel46:2 Kejing olkitok eimu olgoriet leina kishomi eing'uaa auluo, neitashe ninye te mbata entaloishi e kishomi. Neitayu ilapolosak ilasarri lenye oopejori, ilasarri lenyena le seriani, neseremisho tempolos e kishomi, neipung alo auluo, kake meikeni kishomi o metaa teipa." 
Ezekiel46:3 Ore iltung'ana leina kop neseremisho te nejing'ieki ina kishomi te dukuya Olaitoriani too sabatoni te nedoli olapa. 
Ezekiel46:4 Ore ilo asar opejori oitayio ilo kitok aitaiki Olaitoriani te ina olong e sabato naa keaku ilkuoo le kerra ile lemeeta entioto, o lmeregesh lemeeta entioto;" 
Ezekiel46:5 o lasar le ntapa te nebo olmeregesh neaku e efa, te nebo olasar le ntapa tenebo ilkuoo keaku ake duoo anaa enaidim, tenebo eilata te pooki efa." 
Ezekiel46:6 “Ore teina olong nadoli olapa naa keitayu ninye oloti oing'oni lemeeta entioto, olkuoo le kerra o lmeregesh, lemeeta entioto;" 
Ezekiel46:7 anaa olasar le ntapa neitayu e efa tenebo oloing'oni tenebo e efa tenebo olmeregesh, tenebo olkuoo le kerra anaa enaidim aitayu, tenebo hini e ilata te pooki efa." 
Ezekiel46:8 Ore peyie ejing olkitok, nejing'u atua eimu ilo goriet le kishomi, naa ina oitoi ake naimua eitoki aim." 
Ezekiel46:9 “Ore peyie epuonu iltung'ana leina kop dukuya o Laitoriani te lelo siruai oogeluno, ore ilo ojing'u te kishomi e moikuape aseremisho neipang alo te kishomi e kopikop; ore ilo ojing'u te kishomi e kopikop neipang auluo te kishomi e moikuape; meetae oltung'ani oshuko aipang eimaa kishomi natijing'ie, kake keipang ake pooki ng'ae aitoriori alo dukuya." 
Ezekiel46:10 Ore peyie ejing ninche atua naa kejing olkitok atua tenebo ninche; naa teneipang ninche boo neipang sii ninye boo. 
Ezekiel46:11 “Ore te lelo siruai o nena rishat naageluno, ore olasar le ntapa tenebo oloti oing'oni naa keaku efa nabo, ore tenebo olkuoo le ker naa efa, ore tenebo ilkuoo le kerra anaa ake duoo enaidim oltung'ani aishoru, tenebo hini e ilata te efa." 
Ezekiel46:12 Teneitayu olkitok enkishooroto to lpela aa olasar opejori arashu olasar le seriani anaa enkishooroto o lpela to Laitoriani, ore ina kishomi naipirare oloo saen naa kebolokini ninye; naa keitayu ninye olasar lenye opejori arashu olasar lenye le seriani anaa enaas ninye te nkolong e sabato. Naa keipang ninye auluo, ore peyie eipang ninye auluo, neikeni kishomi." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Naa keitayu ninye olkuoo le ker lo lari obo lemeeta entioto metaa olasar opejori to Laitoriani anaake; tadekenya eitayu ninye. 
Ezekiel46:14 Neitayu tenebo ninye olasar le ntapa tenebo ninye anaake tadekenya, ematua nabo e ile e efa, o ematua nabo e uni e hini e eilata peyie eitashal ina tapa, anaa olasar le ntapa lo Laitoriani; ena ninye enkitanapata naipirta ilo asar opejori le anaake." 
Ezekiel46:15 Neaku neijia eikununi ilo kuoo le ker tenebo olasar le ndaa tenebo eilata eitaini, anaake tadekenya metaa olasar ouno anaake." 
Ezekiel46:16 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Tenelo neitayu olkitok enkishooroto aitaiki obo loo layiok lenyena tiatua enjung'ore enye, naa keaku enoo layiok lenyena, entoki nara enenye te njung'ore." 
Ezekiel46:17 Kake tenelo neitayu enkishooroto aitaiki obo loo sinkan lenyena neaku enenye o metabaiki ilo ari le lakunoto; nerrinyokino aaku enolkitok; keaku ilayiok lenyena ake ooidim aatushum enkishooroto te njung'ore enye. 
Ezekiel46:18 Meya olkitok enjung'ore hoo nabo oo ltung'ana nemerrumoo ninche te wueji enye; keisho ninye ilayiok lenyena enjung'ore enye teine wueji enye makewan, metaa meetae hoo obo loo ltung'ana laainei ooruni entoki enye.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Ina peyie aaitijing'u nanu te wueji najing'ieki, ina apa naatii embata eina kishomi, te nkalo e moikuape oo lgilat sinyat tenkaraki ilapolosak; ore teine nadol ewueji te bayie o loontoluo te nkiting'oto enye." 
Ezekiel46:20 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Nena ewueji nepejie ilapolosak enkishooroto o lasar le nkitarruorroto tenebo enkishooroto o lasar le ngoki naa teine sii epej olasar le ntapa peyie metum ninche aayau ninche aaitupuku ine wueji olgoriet le boo, neitabaiki esinyatisho olorere." 
Ezekiel46:21 “Naariku nanu dukuya atua ilo goriet lioriong naarik nanu ilpijat pokira oong'uan lo lgoriet; ore te pooki pijata lo lgoriet netii olgoriet 
Ezekiel46:22 ore tiatua nena matuan pokira ong'uan o lgoriet netii gorieti dung'orot, intemat enkaina artam te nkadoro o ntemat enkaina tomoni uni endapasho; ore nena pokira ong'uan nerisioro." 
Ezekiel46:23 Ore tiatua, ine nemanita lelo gorieti pokira oong'uan, netii isoito oo gueta netii ewueji neinokieki enkima namanita." 
Ezekiel46:24 Ina peyie aajoki ninye nanu, Ore kuna naa iwuejitin neeyierie lelo oasisho te nkaji e Nkai ilasarri ooishorutua iltung'ana.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Naariku nanu arrinyu oriong e kutuk aji e nkaji e Nkai; naa ng'ura epuku enkare tiabori ine neitasheyie enkaji e Nkai te nkalo oloo saen (amu ore enkaji e Nkai neipirare oloosaen); neruko enkare abori naing'uaa kopikop o eneitasheyie ina aji e Nkai, kopikop olperere lo lasar." 
Ezekiel47:2 Naaipang'unye ninye nanu te nkalo e kishomi e kopikop, naarik nanu aitaman oriong ina kishomi e oriong, ina naipirare enkalo oloosaen; nepuku enkare te nkalo e kopikop." 
Ezekiel47:3 Ore eloito enkalo o loo saen eeta enkopito te nkaina enye, netem ilo tung'ani intemat enkaina enkalifu nabo, naarik nanu aimie atua ina are; naa oloure kokoyo ebaiki eng'uton enye." 
Ezekiel47:4 Neitoki atem intemat enkaina enkalifu, naarik nanu aimie atua enkare; naa enkung'u ebaiki eng'uton, neitoki atem intemat enkalifu, naarik nanu aimie atua enkare; nebaiki empolos ai ina are." 
Ezekiel47:5 Neitoki atem intemat enkaina enkalifu, naa olkeju lemaidim aima atalang'a, amu eilepua enkare; ekegut apa oleng enaa indim aisompirayu tiatua olkeju lemelang'ayu." 
Ezekiel47:6 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Enkerai e tung'ani, itoduaa iyie ena?” Naarriny nanu aimie enkiyopata o lkeju." 
Ezekiel47:7 Ore arrinyo, nadol te nkiyopata olkeju ilkeek kumok te nchoto nabo o te nkae." 
Ezekiel47:8 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Ore ena are nerukokino enkalo enkop oloosaen, nelo arukokino atua Araba; ore peyie ejing atua nkariak nemeruko e naiposha, nesilayu ina are." 
Ezekiel47:9 Ore pooki wueji nelo ilokeju ore pooki toki naishu nalo tiatua neton eishu, naa keaku ketii isinkir kumok; amu ine wueji elo ina are, peyie etum nena ariak enaiposha aatisilata; metaa etii pooki toki ine nelo ilo keju." 
Ezekiel47:10 Ore lelo arreshok loo sinkir neitashe te nkiyopata enaiposha; eiteru te En-gedi, ometabaiki Eneglaim, keaku ewueji neidapashieki irresheta; ore isinkir lenyena naa keaku iloompukunot kumok, anaa isinkir le naiposha kitok." 
Ezekiel47:11 Kake ore olng'arua o lkishankual lenye; nemesila asidanu ekeing'uaa ninche metaa emunyan. 
Ezekiel47:12 Ore too nkiyopat o lkeju too lkekuno pokira lo lkeju, naa kebulu impukunot kumok oo lkeek aaku endaa. Metoyu mbenek enye arashu elau ilng'anayio lenye, kake keiu ilng'anayio sidain te pooki apa, amu ore ina are enye nerukunye aing'uaa ine wueji sinyati. Ore ilng'anayio lenye naa keaku ile ndaa ore imbenek enye neaku olmairo oishiunye olorere." 
Ezekiel47:13 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: Kulo ninche ilpolosien laa ninche iorie enkop te njung'ore tiatua lelo oshon loo Siraeli tomon aare. Ore Yosef naa ketum irubat are. 
Ezekiel47:14 Naa ior iyie ninye aitoris; ainosa apa olmumai ajo kaisho ninye iloo papaai linyi, naa keaku ena kop te intae enjung'ore." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Keaku ena olpolosie leina kop: ore te nkalo e moikuape, eiteru te Naiposha kitok te nkalo enkoitoi e Hetlon, o metabaiki ine nejing'ieki e Hamat, o te nkalo e Sedad, o Berota," 
Ezekiel47:16 o Sibraim (ina natii olpolosie orish Dameski o Hamat) o metabaiki Haseratikon, ina natii olpolosie le Hauran." 
Ezekiel47:17 Metaa kepuku olpolosie le naiposha e Hasarenon, ina natii moikuape olpolosie le Dameski, tenebo olpolosie le Hamat o meshomo moikuape. Keaku ena enkalo e moikuape." 
Ezekiel47:18 “Ore te nkalo oloosaen, naa kepuku olpolosie te Hasarenom te rishata Hauran o Dameski; eimaa Yordan te rishata e Gilead o enkop e Israel; o meshomo enkalo oloosaen enaiposha o metabaiki Tamau. Keaku ina enkalo oloosaen." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Ore te nkalo e kopikop, naa kepuku te Tamar o metabaiki nena ariak e Meribatkadesh, o meshomo lelo motioo le Misiri, o metabaiki enaiposha kitok. Keaku ina enkalo e kopikop." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Ore te nkalo o loontoluo, ore ina aiposha kitok neaku ninye olpolosie o metabaiki ewueji enkae alo ine nejing'ieki Hamat. Keaku ina enkalo oloontoluo." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Neaku iorioro ena kop tiatua intae te risioroto oo loshon le Israel. 
Ezekiel47:22 Idung'okiki ate metaa enjung'ore te ntae o tenebo ilomon oomanya atua intae netoiutuo nkera tiatua intae. Keaku ninche te intae olayioni oino loo layiok le Israel; ore tenebo intae naa keishori enjung'ore tiatua iloshon le Israel. 
Ezekiel47:23 “Ore te pooki ake ninye osho omanya ilo omoni, neaku teine idung'okiki ninye enjung'ore enye, ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel48:1 “Kuna ninche inkarn oo loshon: Eiteru to lpolosie le moikuape, eiteru te naiposha te nkalo enkoitoi e Hetlon o meshomo enejing'ieki Hamat, o metabaiki Hasarenon (ina natii olpolosie le moikuape e Dameski o metabaiki Hamat), nepuku te nkalo oloo saen o metabaiki oloontoluo, Dan erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:2 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Dan, eiteru te nkalo oloosaen o metabaiki Asheri, naa erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:3 Ore epuku to lpolosie le nkop e Asheri, te nkalo oloosaen o metabaiki oloontoluo, naa Naftali, naa erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:4 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Naftali, eiteru tenkalo oloo saen o metabaiki oloontoluo naa Manase, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:5 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Manase, eiteru te nkalo oloo saen o metabaiki enkalo oloontoluo, naa Efraim, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:6 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le Efraim, eiteru te nkalo oloosaen o metabaiki oloontoluo naa Ruben, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:7 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Ruben, eiteru tenkalo oloosaen o metabaiki oloontoluo naa Yuda, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:8 “Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Yuda, eiteru te nkalo o loosaen, o metabaiki oloontoluo, naa keaku erubata naitaini aaiteng'el, intemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet e ndapasho, ore tenkadori nerisiore eneba nabo e nena rubat olosho, eiteru tenkalo oloo saen o metabaiki oloontoluo, etii ewueji sinyati empolos enye." 
Ezekiel48:9 Ore ina rubata ninteng'elakiki Olaitoriani, naa keaku intemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet te nkadori, o ntemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam tendapasho." 
Ezekiel48:10 Kuna ninche naaku iorot ewueji sinyati, naa keishori ilapolosak eoroto nabaiki intemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet te nkalo e moikuape, intemat enkaina inkalifuni tomon te ndapasho te nkalo oloontoluo, intemat enkaina inkalifuni tomon te nkalo oloo saen o ntemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet te nkadoro te nkalo e kopikop, netii ewueji sinyati o Laitoriani eneitorit." 
Ezekiel48:11 Keaku ena enoo lapolosak ooitisinyaki lelo ayiok le Sadok, lelo ooibung'a enkitanapata ai, lelo leitu epuo aapong'ori ina kata napuo iltung'ana le Israel aapong'ori, anaa enataasa ile Lawi." 
Ezekiel48:12 Naa keaku enenye anaa erubata e tipat naing'uaa ine wueji sinyati eina kop, e wueji neisul te sinyatisho eiteru to lpolosie le Lawi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Ore tembata ina kop oo lapolosak keaku keeta Ilawi ewueji oo ntemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet te nkadori naa intemat enkaina inkalifuni tomon endapasho. Ore enkadori enye pooki naa keaku intemat e nkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet ore endapasho naa intemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam. 
Ezekiel48:14 Nememir arashu ewalaa ina rubata enkop ake pooki, amu aisinyati ninye to Laitoriani." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Ore ina naleku, intemat enkaina inkalifuni imiet te ndapasho, o ntemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet te nkadori, naa keaku ene pooki siaai teina anasa eiana anasa, ee nemanyi oe wueji nemetii toki. Ore te mpolos enye netii enkanasa;" 
Ezekiel48:16 naa kuna ninche intemet enyena: ore enkalo e moikuape naa intemat enkaina inkalifuni ong'uan o iip imiet, ore enkalo e kopikop intemat enkaina inkalifuni ong'uan o iip imiet, ore te nkalo oloontoluo naa intemat enkaina inkalifuni ong'uan o iip imiet." 
Ezekiel48:17 Naa keeta enkanasa enkop nalala: ore te nkalo e moikuape intemat e nkaina iip are oo onom, ore te nkalo e kopikop naa intemat enkaina iip are o onom, ore tenkalo o loontoluo naa intemat enkaina iip are o onom." 
Ezekiel48:18 Ore ina adori natelekua ina natashare ine wueji sinyati naa keaku intemat enkaina inkalifuni tomon te nkalo oloosaen, naa intemat enkaina inkalifuni tomon te nkalo o loontoluo, naa keaku enatashare ina rubata sinyati. Ore ina naiu ninye naa keaku endaa e lelo aisiaayiak lenkanasa." 
Ezekiel48:19 Ore ilaisiaayiak le nkanasa, too loreren pooki le Israel, naa ketur ninye."
