Ezekiel48:20 Ore ine wueji pooki ninteng'el naa keaku intemat e nkaina nkalifuni tikitam o imiet erisioro nkaloli pooki, aa taa, ina rubata nasinya tenebo nena tokitin naara ineina anasa." 
Ezekiel48:21 “Ore enaleku te pooki alo eina rubata sinyati o ina nara ene nkanasa naa keaku ino lkitok. Eiteru too ntemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o imiet eina rubata nasinya o meshomo olpolosie lo loosaen, neito oloontoluo eiteru too ntemat enkaina inkalifunitikitam o imiet o meshomo olpolosie lo loontoluo, ine neshepita isashat oo loshon, naa keaku eneilo kitok. Ore inewueji sinyati tenebo ina aji sinyati Enkai natii empolos enye," 
Ezekiel48:22 tenebo ina nara enoo le Lawi, tenebo ina nara ene nkanasa, naa keaku enatii empolos eina nara enoo lkitok. Ore erubata eilo kitok naa keaku enatii ilo polosie le Yuda olpolosie le Benchamen." 
Ezekiel48:23 “Ore tenkaraki ilkulikae oshon: Eiteru te nkalo oloosaen o meshomo oloo ntoluo, naa Benchamen, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:24 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Benchamen, eiteru te nkalo oloo saen o meshomo oloontoluo, naa Simion, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:25 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Simion, eiteru te nkalo oloo saen o meshomo oloontoluo, naa Isaakar, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:26 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Isaakar, eiteru te nkalo oloo saen o meshomo oloo ntoluo naa Sebulon, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:27 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Sebulon, eiteru tenkalo oloo saen o meshomo oloo ntoluo naa Gad, erubata nabo." 
Ezekiel48:28 Ore eiteru to lpolosie le nkop e Gad o meshomo kopikop, naa kepuku olpolosie te Tamar o meshomo nkariak e Meribatkadesh, aa keim enkiyopata ina shorro e Misiri o metijing'a enaiposha kitok." 
Ezekiel48:29 Ore ena naa enkop nidung'oki metaa enjung'o tiatua iloshon le Israel, naa kuna ninche irubat enye ejo Olaitoriani Enkai." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Keaku keetae ineepukunyeki enkanasa: Ore te nkalo e moikuape ina naaku intemat enkaina inkalifuni tikitam o ong'uan o iip imiet te ntemet, inchomito uni," 
Ezekiel48:31 e nkishomi e Ruben, e nkishomi e Yuda, o enkishomi e Lawi, ore nchomito enkanasa naa keipotieki iloshon le Israel." 
Ezekiel48:32 Ore te nkalo oloosaen, ina naaku intemat enkaina inkalifuni oong'uan o iip imiet, naa inchomito uni, kishomi e Yosef, kishomi e Benchamen, o kishomi e Dan." 
Ezekiel48:33 Ore te nkalo e kopikop, ina naaku intemat enkaina inkalifuni ong'uan o iip imiet te ntemet, naa inchomito uni, kishomi e Simion, kishomi e Isaakar, o kishomi e Sebulon." 
Ezekiel48:34 Ore te nkalo oloo ntoluo ina naaku intemat enkaina inkalifuni ong'uan o iip imiet naa nchomito uni, kishomi e Gad, o kishomi e Asheri, o kishomi e Naftali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Ore emanaroto e nkanasa naa keaku intemat enkaina inkalifuni tomon o isiet. Ore enkarna e nkanasa eiteru teina kata nelo dukuya naa keji, Etii Olaitoriani ine!”" 
Daniel1:1 Ore to lari li okuni le nkitoria e Yohoiakim olaiguanani le Yuda, nelotu Nebukadnesa olaiguanani le Babilon, Yerusalem nemuat ninye near." 
Daniel1:2 Neishooyo Olaitoriani Yohoiakim olaiguanani le Yuda apik atua inkaik enyena, te nebo embata oo masaa e nkaji e Nkai, neyau ninye ninche enkop e Shinari atua enkaji e Nkai enye, nepik nena masaa e wueji neshumieki ntokitin e tipat e nkai enye." 
Daniel1:3 Neitoki olaiguanani aitanap Ashpenas, ilo aitasheikinoni lenye kitok sunash ogelema, pee eyau embata oo ltung'ana le Israel, lelo le nkaji e nkitoo o lelo kituaak," 
Daniel1:4 ilbarnot lemeeta leyiat, shaati naa arriyiak te ng'eno pooki nagut, ooishoro eyiolounoto, o enkibung'ata e nkiteng'enata, oodupa te nkisiayiare e nkaji o laiguanani, pee eiteng'eni ninche isirat o enkutuk oo Lkaldayo." 
Daniel1:5 Nedung'oki olaiguanani ninche erubata e anaa ake e ndaa sidai naa ninye apa einos olaiguanani, o ene naisho oo sabibu naa ninye eok. Naa kepuoi apa aaiteng'en ninche ilarin okuni, ore te siadi ina kata nepuo ninche aaitashe te dukuya olaiguanani." 
Daniel1:6 Ore te kulo naa Daniel, o Hanania, o Mishael, o Asaria lo losho le Yuda." 
Daniel1:7 Ore ilo kitok loo laitasheikinok loo sunaishi oogelema nedung'oki ninche nkarn: nejo Daniel Belteshasa, ore Hanania nejo Shadrak, ore Mishael nejo Meshak, ore Asaria nejo Abednego." 
Daniel1:8 Kake etumuta Daniel nchere meyieu neisarkionie kewan te ndaa o laiguanani aashu te ina aisho oo sabibu apa naok ninye; neaku eikilikuana apa ninye ilo kitok loo laitasheikinok loo sunaishi oogelema pee enyorraa ninye, pee meisarkionie kewan." 
Daniel1:9 Neisho Olaitoriani Daniel omom o lng'ur too nkonyek e ilo kitok loo laitasheikinok loo sunaishi oogelema; 
Daniel1:10 nejoki ilo kitok loo laitasheikinok sunash ogelema Daniel, “Kaureisho nanu, medol ake olkitok lai olaiguanani, laa ninye likitegelaka endaa ino o entoki niok, ajo ira menati alang lelo barnot lerisiori ino. Neaku ipik iyie enkishui ai batisho ti alo olaiguanani.”" 
Daniel1:11 Neitoki Daniel ajoki ilo aitasheikinoni laa ninye apa etegelua ilo kitok loo laitasheikinok sunash ogelema meing'ura Daniel, o Hanania, o Mishael o Asaria;" 
Daniel1:12 “Tujurro isinkan linono too nkolong'i tomon; nchoo eishori iyiook mbenek mainosa o enkare nikiok. 
Daniel1:13 Nitum taa aing'ura empukunoto ang o ene lelo barnot ooinos endaa sidai o laiguanani, naa ore te risioroto e mbae naba anaa enidol neijia ntaasa isinkan linono.”" 
Daniel1:14 Neaku etoning'o apa ninye ninche tena bae, nejur ninche nkolong'i tomon." 
Daniel1:15 Ore te siadi nkolong'i tomon nedoli aajo ninche oopir naa biot aalang lelo barnot pooki ooinos endaa sidai o laiguanani. 
Daniel1:16 Neaku eiwuang'ie ilo aitasheikinoni ina daa enye sidai o ina aisho oo sabibu apa naji pee eok ninche, neisho ninche mbenek." 
Daniel1:17 Ore kulo barnot pokira oong'uan, neisho Enkai ninche enkiteng'enata o enkarriyiano too sirat pooki o te ng'eno; neeta apa Daniel eyiolounoto too nduaat pooki o te ng'eno nagut." 
Daniel1:18 Ore te siadi ina kata, eidipa olaiguanani aitanapisho nchere meitijing'uni ninche atua aji, neyau ilo kitok loo laitasheikinok sunaishi oogelema ninche atua aji dukuya Nebukadnesa." 
Daniel1:19 Neirorie olaiguanani ninche, ore te ninche pooki meetae hoo obo onotoki onyaanyukie Daniel, o Hanania, o Mishael o Asaria; neaku eitasheito ninche te dukuya olaiguanani." 
Daniel1:20 Naa ore te pooki bae e ng'eno o eyiolounoto naipirta enaikilikuana olaiguanani ninche, nedol ajo kelang ninche katitin tomon ilkuyantik pooki o lasakutok ootii atua enkitoria enye pooki." 
Daniel1:21 Neton Daniel o metabau olari le dukuya lo laiguanani Sairos. 
Daniel2:1 Ore to lari li are le nkitoria e Nebukadnesa, neidetidet Nebukadnesa nenyamalu oltau lenye, neimin ninye njo." 
Daniel2:2 Neitanapisho ilo aiguanani nchere ore ilkuyantik, o lasakutok o loas inenking'asia o Lkaldayo neiturrurruni te nebo pee etum aatoliki olaiguanani enkidetidet enye. Nejing'u ninche nepuonu aaitashe te dukuya olaiguanani." 
Daniel2:3 Nejoki olaiguanani ninche, “Aidetideta duoo, netanyamala oltau lai eyieu neyiolou ina kidetidet.”" 
Daniel2:4 Nejoki Ilkaldayo olaiguanani, “Lo aiguanani, tobiko ntarasi! Toliki isinkan linono enkidetidet, pee kintodol iyie enkibalakinoto enye.”" 
Daniel2:5 Newaliki olaiguanani Ilkaldayo ajoki, “Ore ilo rorei opuku ti atua nanu naa kedede; te nimikintayiololo intae nanu enkidetidet o empukunoto enye, nedung'udung'i intae aaitaa ndung'udung'ot, neidaikieki nkajijik inyi." 
Daniel2:6 Kake te nintodolulu intae ina kidetidet o empukunoto enye, niyookiki aang'amu te nanu nkishorot, o nchuneti o enkanyit kitok. Metaa entoduaaki nanu ina kidetidet o enkibalakinoto enye.”" 
Daniel2:7 Newalu ninche aaigil eni are, “Nchoo olaiguanani eliki isinkan lenyena enkidetidet, pee kintodolu iyiook enkibalakinoto enye.”" 
Daniel2:8 Newalu olaiguanani ajo, “Ayiolo aitisip nchere, erishata intae ing'oruru, enkaraki nitoduaa intae aajo aauno nanu olomoni," 
Daniel2:9 nchere ti nimimbalunyenye intae ina kidetidet te nanu, naa ena nabo ake endung'okinoto inyi e nkiguana. Itoning'okinote intae pee iroro elejare o lemeitoriori te dukuya nanu o meibelekenyata nkatitin. Metaa entolikioki nanu enkidetidet pee ayiolou nchere eikindimidimi aatoliki enkibalakinoto enye.”" 
Daniel2:10 Newaliki Ilkaldayo olaiguanani aajoki, “Meetae hoo oltung'ani te nkop oidim aitabai ena yieunoto o laiguanani; amu meetae aekata olaiguanani kitok aashu ogol oikilikuanua embae naaijo ena too loibonok pooki o too lasakutok, o too Lkaldayo." 
Daniel2:11 Ore ena bae naikilikuanu olaiguanani naa kegol, nemeetae likae oidim aitoduaa ninye olaiguanani meteleku ake nkaitin, naa ore emanyisho enye neme te nebo iloata seseni loo nkiri.”" 
Daniel2:12 Ore enkaraki ena negoro olaiguanani nerasu oleng te ngoro neitanapisho nchere ore lelo tung'ana pooki ang'eni le Babilon neidaikieki. 
Daniel2:13 Neaku eibulayie ina kitanapata nchere ore lelo tung'ana ang'eni naa keari metuata, neing'oru ninche Daniel o lelo le ncholiek enye, pee ear ninche metuata." 
Daniel2:14 Newaliki Daniel Ariok, ilo kitok le rripore o laiguanani, to losek o tenkarriyiano, laa ninye apa oshomo aar metuata iltung'ana ang'eni le Babilon;" 
Daniel2:15 nejoki ninye Ariok, ilo kitok le rripore o laiguanani, “Kainyoo pee errish oleng ena kitanapata o laiguanani?” Neitayiolo taa Ariok Daniel ina bae." 
Daniel2:16 Nelo Daniel atua aji nesai olaiguanani meishoo ninye enkata pee etum aitoduaa olaiguanani enkibalakinoto. 
Daniel2:17 Neitoki Daniel alo atua enkaji enye, neitayiolo ina bae Hanania, o Mishael o Asaria, lelo le ncholiek enye," 
Daniel2:18 nejoki ninche meing'oru olng'ur le Nkai e shumata ti alo ena kisudoroto, pee meidaaya ake Daniel o lelo le ncholiek enye te nebo lelo ang'eni le Babilon." 
Daniel2:19 Neboluni taa ina kisudoroto aaitodol Daniel te nduaata e kewarie. Neisis Daniel Enkai e shumata. 
Daniel2:20 Nejo Daniel: “Meisisi enkarna e Nkai ntarasi o ntarasi, amu enenye eng'eno o enkidimata." 
Daniel2:21 Eibelekeny ninye nkatitin o rishat; eiwuang'ie ninye ilaiguanak neput ilaiguanak; neisho ninye eng'eno nagut lelo ng'eni o eyiolounoto; 
Daniel2:22 eitodolu ninye mbaa naagut oo nkisudorot; neyiolo ninye ina natii atua enaimin, naa ninye ebikie ewang'an." 
Daniel2:23 Iyie, Enkai o loo papa, aaisho nanu enashe o enkisisa, amu kinchoo nanu eng'eno o engolon, nikintayiolo nanu nena nikinkilikuanutua te iyie, amu ntayiolo iyie iyiook ina bae naipirta olaiguanani.”" 
Daniel2:24 Nelo taa Daniel atua ine netii Ariok, laa ninye etegelua olaiguanani meidaikie lelo tung'ana ang'eni le Babilon, nelo ajoki ninye nji, “Mindaikie iyie lelo tung'ana ang'eni le Babilon; torikoki nanu mashomo dukuya olaiguanani, pee alo aitodol olaiguanani ina kibalakinoto.”" 
Daniel2:25 Neriku Ariok Daniel aitasieku aitijing'u meitasho te dukuya olaiguanani nelo ajoki ninye nji: “Anoto nanu ti atua lelo yarunoto ooing'uaa Yuda oltung'ani oidim aitayiolo olaiguanani ina kibalakinoto.” 
Daniel2:26 Nejoki olaiguanani Daniel, laa keji apa enkarna enye Belteshasa, “Eikindim iyie aitayiolo nanu ina kidetidet natoduaa o enkibalakinoto enye?”" 
Daniel2:27 Newaliki Daniel olaiguanani ajoki, “Meetae iltung'ana ang'eni, anaa iloontaleng'o, anaa ilkuyantik, aashu laaing'urak loo lakir ooidim aaitoduaa olaiguanani ina kisudoroto naikilikuanua," 
Daniel2:28 kake etii Enkai e shumata naa ninye nabolu nkisudorot neitayiolo ninye olaiguanani Nebukadnesa ina nayooki aaku too nkolong'i e siadi. Ore ina kidetidet ino o nena duaat e lukunya ino ina kata irragita te ndapash naa ninche kuna: 
Daniel2:29 Ore te iyie, lo aiguanani, ina kata irrag te ndapash, nepuonu ndamunot oo naaidim aataa te siadi; naa ore ilo oibalunye nkisudorot nikintayiolo iyie ina nayooki aaku." 
Daniel2:30 Kake ore te nanu, mme te nkaraki eng'eno ai naata alang pooki ooishu pee eibalunyeki ena kisudoroto te nanu, kake pee etumi aaitayiolo olaiguanani enkibalakinoto enye, pee itum atayiolo indamunot o ltau lino." 
Daniel2:31 “Itoduaa iyie, lo aiguanani, naa ng'ura, enkitanyaanyukoto kitok. Ore ena kitanyaanyukoto kitok oleng neeta ewang'an nawang oleng, neitashe te dukuya iyie, naa tenidol keitureisho." 
Daniel2:32 Ore endukuya ena kitanyaanyukoto naa ene sahabu nasila, ore olgoo lenye o nkaik naa ine nkosholai, ore enkoshoke enye o nkupesir naa ino suyai," 
Daniel2:33 ore nkejek enyena naa ine sekenkei, ore ndapi enyena oo nkejek naa olkuroti oshula esekenkei o enterit." 
Daniel2:34 Ore anaa enitoduaa etebeluaki osoit neme te nkaina e tung'ani nesulakino aosh ina kitanyaanyukoto nena kejek enyena naashula esekenkei o esarng'ab nebel ninche aitaa mbelibelat. 
Daniel2:35 Neaku ore ina sekenkei, o ina sarng'ab o ilo suyai, o ina osholai o ina sahabu nerrarra pooki aaku mbelibelat netiu anaa suut ewueji neidong'ieki enkurma te nkata e nkirowuaj, neya ninche olkutati o metaa medoli ninye enkiti enye. Kake ore ilo soit otoosho ina kitanyaanyukoto neaku oldoinyo sapuk neiput enkop pooki." 
Daniel2:36 “Ena apa ina kidetidet; naa eikiliki naa taata iyiook olaiguanani enkibalakinoto enye. 
Daniel2:37 Ore iyie, Laaiguanani, nira olaiguanani loo laiguanak, laa iyie eishoo Enkai e shumata enkitoria, o engolon, o enkidimata, o enkitoo;" 
Daniel2:38 naa atua nkaik inono etipika ninye, eneba anaa enemanya tung'ani, o ng'uesi e ong'ata, o ntaritik o loing'ang'e, nikintaa iyie olaitoriani te shumata ninche pooki - iyie ina dukuya e sahabu." 
Daniel2:39 Ore te siadi iyie nedumunye ae kitoria nemegol anaa enino, o enkae e uni o suyai naa kelo aitore enkop pooki." 
Daniel2:40 Naa kelotu enkitoria e ong'uan, nagol anaa esekenkei, amu kebel esekenkei ntokitin pooki neitaa empunyua; naa ore anaa esekenkei napurdisho kebel nepurd kuna pooki." 
Daniel2:41 Naa ore anaa enitoduaa ndapi enyena oo nkejek o lkimojik aa esarng'ab, o laitobirani eshula o esekenkei keaku enkitoria naoro; kake ore embata ndapai e sekenkei keaku ketii atua ninye, anaa ake enitoduaa esekenkei eshula o enterit." 
Daniel2:42 Naa ore anaa enitoduaa lelo kimojik loo nkejek aa esekenkei nashula o enterit neijia etiu ina kitoria kegol ti ae alo neshal ti ae alo. 
Daniel2:43 Ore anaa enitoduaa iyie esekenkei eshula o esarng'ab neijia etiu eshula maate aayama, kake meibung'a maate aaku nabo, anaa ake enemeibung'a esekenkei o enterit." 
Daniel2:44 Ore ti atua nkolong'i e lelo aiguanak neun Enkai e shumata enkitoria merruoyo ae kata, ore enkitoria enye meya ae kata kulikae tung'ana, naa kerrar ninye nkitoriat pooki neiting'ie ninche, neitashe ninye ntarasi;" 
Daniel2:45 anaa ake enitoduaa nchere etebeluaki osoit to ldoinyo neme te nkaina e tung'ani nerrar ina sekendei, o suyai, o enterit, o enkosholai o ina sahabu. Enkai kitok naitayiolo olaiguanani ina nayooki atiu te siadi. Kedede ina kidetidet nesipa enkibalakinoto enye.”" 
Daniel2:46 Nebatata olaiguanani Nebukadnesa te nkomom enye, neserem ninye Daniel, neitanapisho pee ei taikini ninye olasar nepejokini enkorropil." 
Daniel2:47 Nejoki olaiguanani Daniel, “Esipa ore Enkai ino naa Enkai oo nkaitin naa Olaitoriani loo laiguanak, naa olaitodolunoni loo nkisudorot, amu indima iyie atabolu ena kisudoroto.”" 
Daniel2:48 Neisho ilo aiguanani Daniel enkitoo e shumata o nkishorot kumok sapuki neisho ninye meitoria olosho e nkop e Babilon pooki, neitaa sii ninye olkitok loo lang'eni pooki le Babilon." 
Daniel2:49 Neikilikuanu Daniel to laiguanani, negelu ninye Shadrak, o Meshak o Abednego metaa ninche ooing'or mbaa e nkop e Babilon; kake etobiko ninye Daniel to lgoriet te nkaji o laiguanani." 
Daniel3:1 Neitobir olaiguanani Nebukadnesa enkitanyaanyukoto e sahabu, naa ore enkadoro enye naa ntemat e nkaina ntomoni ile naa ntemat e nkaina ile neitasheiyie ninye enkong'ata e Dura, to lkerenket e Babilon." 
Daniel3:2 Neitoki Nebukadnesa airriwaa ilkiliku meiturrurruni ilkituaak o laitasheikinok sunash ogelema o lbalusuni o ilaiguanak o ilashumak loo mpisai o ilkituaak loo nkitanapat o lkituaak pooki loo loshon pee epuonu enkitisinyata ina kitanyaanyukoto natesheta olaiguanani Nebukadnesa. 
Daniel3:3 Neiturrurro lelo kituaak, o laitasheikinok sunash ogelema, o lbalusuni, o lautarok o lashumak loo mpisai, o ilkituaak loo nkitanapat, o iladung'ok loo nkiguanat o lelo kituaak loo lkerenket, tenkaraki enkitisinyata e ina kitanyaanyukoto natesheta olaiguanani Nebukadnesa; neitashe ninche te dukuya ina kitanyaanyukoto natesheta Nebukadnesa." 
Daniel3:4 Ore ilo kilikuai, neibalunye to ltoilo sapuk ajo, “Eitanapaki intae, loo rere, nakuapi, o lng'ejepa," 
Daniel3:5 nchere ore ti nining'ining'i oltoilo le mowuo, o endule, o lwulul loo usin, o enkinanta nanyaanyukie olwulul, o enkawuo oo sinkolioitin, o lbene olkuti te ndule, o pooki pukunoto o sinkolio, nirrugogo aabaiki enkop, aaserem ina kitanyaanyukoto e sahabu naitasheyie olaiguanani Nebukadnesa." 
Daniel3:6 Naa ore pooki ng'ae lemebatata aserem nepuoi nabo kata aanang'aki atua olkokuet le nkima oyupuyup.” 
Daniel3:7 Neaku ore ake pee ening iloreren ilo toilo le mowuo o lwulul loo usin, o enkinanta nanyaanyukie olwulul, o enkawuo oo sinkolioitin, o lbene okuti te ndule, o pooki pukunoto o sinkolio, ore iltung'ana pooki, o loreren o lng'ejepa nebatata pooki te dukuya ina kitanyaanyukoto e sahabu naitasheyie olaiguanani Nebukadnesa." 
Daniel3:8 Neaku ore apa teina kata nepuonu kulikae Kaldayo dukuya neitang'or lelo Yahudi. 
Daniel3:9 Nejoki ninche olaiguanani Nebukadnesa, “Laaiguanani, tobiko ntarasi!" 
Daniel3:10 Ore iyie, laaiguanani, intobira enkitanapata, nchere ore pooki tung'ani oning oltoilo le mowuo, o endule, o lwulul loo usin, o enkinanta nanyaanyukie olwulul, o enkawuo oo sinkolioitin, o lbene okuti te ndule, o pooki pukunoto o sinkolio naa kebatata aserem ina kitanyaanyukoto e sahabu;" 
Daniel3:11 ore oloba anaa olemebatata aserem nenang'akini atua olkokuet le nkima oyupuyup. 
Daniel3:12 Etii kulikae Yahudi litegelua iyie meitasheiki mbaa olkerenket le Babilon: Shadrak, o Meshek o Abednego. Eji ore kulo tung'ana, laaiguanani, mikishilaa ninche iyie; meisiaai ninche nkaitin inono aashu eserem ina kitanyaanyukoto e sahabu nintasheyie.”" 
Daniel3:13 Neitanapisho Nebukadnesa te ngoro napi meyauni Shadrak o Meshak o Abednego. Neyauni kulo tung'ana dukuya olaiguanani. 
Daniel3:14 Nejoki Nebukadnesa ninche, “Kesipa doi, Shadrak o Meshak o Abednego, nchere misiaayiayia intae nkaitin aainei aashu iserememe ina kitanyaanyukoto e sahabu naitasheyie nanu?" 
Daniel3:15 Ore naa taata ti niterretenate, ti nining'ining'i oltoilo le mowuo o le ndule o lwulul loo usin o enkinanta nanyaanyukie olwulul, o enkawuo oo sinkolioitin o lbene okuti te ndule, o pooki pukunoto o sinkolio, naa nibatatata aaserem ina kitanyaanyukoto e sahabu naitobira nanu, naa aisidai ina. Kake tinimiserememe intae, nenang'akini intae nabo kata atua olkokuet oyupuyup; naa kaa ai ina naidim atokordu intae aitayu too nkaik aainei?”" 
Daniel3:16 Newaliki Shadrak o Meshak o Abednego olaiguanani nejoki, “Oo Nebukadnesa, mikiaata iyiook tipat pee kiwaliki iyie tena bae." 
Daniel3:17 Naa tenaa neijia, ore Enkai ang naa ninye kisiaai naa keidim atokordu iyiook aitayu ti atua ilo kokuet oyupuyup; naa kekordu ninye iyiook aitung'uaa enkaina ino, laaiguanani." 
Daniel3:18 Kake te neitu, tayiolo iyie, laaiguanani nchere, mikisiaai iyiook nkaitin inono aashu kiserem ina kitanyaanyukoto e sahabu nintasheyie iyie.”" 
Daniel3:19 Neiput Nebukadnesa engoro napi, ore enkomom enye neibelekenya arruoyo ti alo Shadrak o Meshak o Abednego. Neitanapisho ninye meinoki ilo kokuet le nkima aaitulusoo katitin naapishana tena duoo kijukujuk e kiyupuyup." 
Daniel3:20 Neitanap kulikae tung'ana magil le njore enye meteena Shadrak o Meshek o Abednego, nenang'aki ninche atua ilo kokuet oyupuyup le nkima." 
Daniel3:21 Neeni kulo tung'ana eishopito nkilani enye e atua o nioriong, o nkopiyiani enye o kulikae kilani lenye, nenang'akini ninche atua olkokuet le nkima oyupuyup." 
Daniel3:22 Ore enkaraki narrish apa ina kitanapata o laiguanani neirowua oleng ilo kokuet le nkima, etang'amayie olng'ejep le nkima anya lelo tung'ana ootudumutua Shadrak o Meshek o Abednego." 
Daniel3:23 Ore kulo tung'ana okuni, Shadrak o Meshak o Abednego, nesulakini eena atua ilo kokuet le nkima oyupuyup." 
Daniel3:24 Neing'asia olaiguanani Nebukadnesa nedumunye nabo kata. Nejoki ninye ilarikok lenyena, “Keitu iyiook kinang'aki iltung'ana okuni eena atua enkima?” Newaliki ninche olaiguanani ejo, “Esipa, Laaiguanani.”" 
Daniel3:25 Newaliki ninye ajo, “Kake adolita nanu iltung'ana oong'uan lemeena oopuoito te mpolos e nkima, neitu eiseyieki; ore eliooto e ilo li ong'uan nenyaanyukie enkerai oo nkaitin.”" 
Daniel3:26 Nelotu Nebukadnesa anyiku enkutuk e ilo kokuet le nkima nayupuyup nejo, “Shadrak o Meshak o Abednego, isinkan le Nkai natii shumata aisul, wootu elepu, naa wootu ene!” Neipang'u Shadrak o Meshek o Abednego ti atua enkima." 
Daniel3:27 Ore lelo kituaak, o laitasheikinok sunaishi oogelema o lbalusuni o laikook lo laiguanani neiturrurro te nebo nedol aajo eitu etum enkima ai golon too seseni le lelo tung'ana; ore ilpapit loo lukuny enye eitu ninye eisui, ore nkilani enye neitu eikoni ae, nemetii olng'usil le nkima ninche." 
Daniel3:28 Nejo Nebukadnesa, “Meisisi Enkai e Shadrak o Meshek o Abednego, nairriwua ninye olmalaika lenye netokordua isinkan lenyena, lelo ooisiliga ninye, neitu eitaa toki enkitanapata o laiguanani, neitayu iseseni lenye alang te neisiaai neserem ae neme ina Ai enye maate." 
Daniel3:29 Ore naa kaitayu enkitanapata: Ore pooki orere, o pooki kop, o pooki ng'ejep oiro inaapaashare Enkai e Shadrak o Meshek o Abednego nedung'i aaitaa ndung'udung'ot, ore nkajijik enye neidaikieki; amu meetae ae Ai naidim atokordu tena pukunoto.”" 
Daniel3:30 Neilepie olaiguanani aisho enkitoo Shadrak o Meshek o Abednego to lkerenket le Babilon. 
Daniel4:1 Olaiguanani Nebukadnesa oigeroki iltung'ana pooki, o loreren, o lng'ejepa oomanya enkop pooki: Metoponikini intae eseriani!" 
Daniel4:2 Atoduaa nanu ajo eisidai te naitodolu ilmonek o nenking'asia naataasaka Enkai natii shumata aisul tialo nanu. 
Daniel4:3 Kebaa esapuko oo lmonek lenyena le nking'asia, kebaa enkidimata oo mbaa enyena e nking'asia! Ore enkitoria enye naa enkitoria oo ntarasi, ore enkitoo enye nebaiki iishoritin o ishoritin." 
Daniel4:4 Ore nanu Nebukadnesa kaisikarra apa ti atua enkaji ai natudupe ti atua enkaji ai natudupe ti atua enkaji ai e nkitoo. 
Daniel4:5 Anoto apa nanu enkidetidet naaituria; ore airragita te ndapash naaitanyamal ndamunot o nduaat e ndukuya ai. 
Daniel4:6 Neaku aitanapishe nanu meyauni lelo tung'ana pooki ang'eni le Babilon meyauni dukuya nanu, pee aatum ninche aaitayiolo nanu enkibalakinoto eina kidetidet." 
Daniel4:7 Nepuonu ilkuyantik o loo ntaleng'o o Lkaldayo, o laing'urak loo lakir atua ine natii; naliki nanu ninche ina kidetidet, kake maaidim ninche aatoliki nanu enkibalakinoto enye." 
Daniel4:8 Ore te siadi nelotu Daniel dukuya nanu - ilo apa oji enkarna Belteshasa aaipotie enkai ai, naa atua ninye etii enkiyang'et oo nkaitin sinyat naliki nanu ninye ina kidetidet, ajoki," 
Daniel4:9 “Iyie Belteshasa, olkitok loo lkuyantik, ore enkaraki nayiolo nanu ajo etii enkiyang'et oo nkaitin sinyat atua iyie nemeetae enkisudoroto nagol te iyie, ena kidetidet nanu atoduaa; tolikioki nanu enkibalakinoto enye." 
Daniel4:10 Ore nena duaat e ndukuya ai ina kata airragita te ndapash naa kuna: Atoduaa nanu, naa ng'ura, olchani te mpolos e nkop; ore enkadoro enye naa eikitok." 
Daniel4:11 Nebulu ilo shani negolu ore enchumata enye nebaiki keper, naa kelioo te neiting'ie enkop pooki." 
Daniel4:12 Ore mbenek enyena naa eisidain naa kumok ilng'anayio lenyena, ore ilo shani netii endaa e pooki toki. Netum ing'uesi e ong'ata oloip ti abori ninye ore ntaritik o loing'ang'e nemany ilng'osil lenyena, ore pooki toki naishu neitoti te ilo shani." 
Daniel4:13 “Atoduaa nanu te nena duaat e ndukuya ai ina kata airragita te ndapash, naa ng'ura, olarriponi, ilo osinya, nelotu adou eing'uaa shumata." 
Daniel4:14 Neyietu aishir nejo nji, ‘Entudung ilo shani meturori, nisulaa ilng'osil lenyena, nidung'oo mbenek enyena nisardakiekie ilng'anayio lenyena; nchoo ng'uesi eisik aapuo te ntonata enye neisik ntaritik too lng'osil lenyena." 
Daniel4:15 Kake entung'uai enkobei o ntona enyena te nkop, eena te sekenkei o to suyai te mpolos oo nkujit naanana e ong'ata. Nchoo ninye eshalu te nkoliolio e shumata; nchoo erishata enye eaku te nebong'uesi ti atua nkujit e nkop;" 
Daniel4:16 nchoo eibelekenya endamunoto enye e tung'ani naa nchoo eishori ninye endamunoto e ng'ues naa nchoo nkatitin naapishana egiroo ninye. 
Daniel4:17 Ore ina dung'okinoto e nkiguana ene lelo arripok, embae natudung'oki to rorei le lelo sinyat, pee eyiolou ilooishu pooki nchere ore ilo otii shumata aisul ninye oitore enkitoria oo ltung'ana, neisho ninye ilo oyieu, nepik shumata ninye ilo oshal.’" 
Daniel4:18 Ore ena kidetidet, nanu olaiguanani Nebukadnesa, otadua. Naa ore iyie Belteshasa, mbalunye enkibalakinoto, enkaraki ore lelo tung'ana pooki ang'eni le nkitoria ai maaidim aaitayiolo nanu enkibalakinoto, kake indim iyie, amu etii enkiyang'et oo nkaitin sinyat atua iyie.”" 
Daniel4:19 Neitoki Daniel, apa oji enkarna enye Belteshesa, aing'asia te nkiti rishata neitanyamal ndamunot enyena ninye. Nejo olaiguanani, “Belteshesa, mincho kintanyamal ina kidetidet aashu enkibalakinoto.” Newalu Belteshasa ajo, “Olkitok lai, metaa ina kidetidet ene lelo likimba iyie ore enkibalakinoto enye neaku enoo lmang'ati linono!" 
Daniel4:20 Ore ilo shani litodua iyie, otubulua negolu, o metabaiki enchumata enye keper, naa dapash ninye abaiki enkop pooki;" 
Daniel4:21 laa eisidan mbenek enyena naa kumok ilng'anayio lenyena, naa ninye etii endaa e pooki toki; naa abori ninye etumie ng'uesi e ong'ata oloip, naa ilng'osil lenyena emanya ntaritik o loing'ang'e" 
Daniel4:22 iyie, ilo laaiguanani, itubula nigolu. Etubulua enkitoo ino o metabaiki shumata ore enkitoria ino netabaikia lubot e nkop." 
Daniel4:23 Ore ina natoduaa olaiguanani olarriponi, ilo sinyati, edou eing'uaa shumata ejo, ‘Entudung entuuroi olchani ninyalinyala ninye, kake entung'uai enkobei o ntona enyena te nkop, eena te sekenkei o to suyai, too nkujit naanana e ong'ata; naa nchoo erubata enye eaku te nebo ng'uesi e ong'ata, o metaba anaa negiroo ninye nkatitin naapishana;’" 
Daniel4:24 ena ninye enkibalakinoto enye, laaiguanani: Enkitanapata e ilo otii shumata aisul, ninye shumata olkitok lai olaiguanani," 
Daniel4:25 nchere eikipuoi aaraa iyie aaitung'uaa iltung'ana, ore emanyisho ino naa keaku te nebo ing'uesi e ong'ata; eikinchori iyie inosa nkujit anaa olkiteng, naa eishalu iyie te nkoileelio e shumata, naa eikigiroo iyie nkatitin naapishana o metaba anaa niyiolounchere ilo otii shumata aisul oitore enkitoo e tung'ana, neisho ninye ilo oyieu." 
Daniel4:26 Naa ore anaa enaitanapishoteki pee eing'uari enkobei o ntona e ilo shani, naa kelo enkitoria ino adedeyu obaiki ina kata niyiolounye nchere keper naitoreisho." 
Daniel4:27 “Metaa naa laaiguanani nchoo enkikoo ai eng'amaroyu te iyie; nturrai ing'ok inono te asata e sipata, o ntorrok inono te nkitodolunoto o lng'ur too looitorogonyaki, pee ebaiki neponari nkolong'iinono e seriani.”" 
Daniel4:28 Eeuo ena pooki shumata olaiguanani Nebukadnesa. 
Daniel4:29 Ore te siadi ilapaitin tomon o are neloito ninye te nchumata e nkaji e nkitoo e Babilon," 
Daniel4:30 nejo olaiguanani, “Aimekitok ena Babilon natesheta nanu te ngolon ai kitok metaa enkaji e nkitoo nairragie o te nkitoo e nkitoria ai.”" 
Daniel4:31 Ore eton epuku kulo rorei te nkutuk o laiguanani, nedou oltoilo oing'uaa shumata, “Olaiguanani Nebukadnesa, kirorieki iyie: Kishomo enkitoria aing'uaa iyie," 
Daniel4:32 naa aikiarari iyie aaitung'uaa iltung'ana, ore emanyisho ino naa keaku te nebo ing'uesi e ntim; naa keaku inos iyie nkujit anaa olkiteng; naa eikigiroo iyie ilarin naapishana, o metaba anaa niyiolou nchere ilo otii shumata aisul oitore enkitoo etung'ana, neisho ninye ilo oyieu.”" 
Daniel4:33 Ore ina kata ake neitabari ilo rorei to laiguanani Nebukadnesa. Nearari ninye aaitung'uaa iltung'ana, neinos nkujit anaa olkiteng, neshalu osesen lenye, te nkoileelio e shumata o metubulu ilpapit lenyena te nkadoro anaa nkopir o lkurragos, netiu iloisotok lenyena anaa loo lmotonyi." 
Daniel4:34 Ore te siadi nena olong'i, nashumu nanu Nebukadnesa nkonyek aainei aing'or shumata, naarrinyokino nanu ndamunot aainei, naisis nanu ilo otii shumata aisul, naisis nayanyitu ilo oishu ntarasi; amu ore enkitoria enye naa enkitoria oo ntarasi, ore enkitoo enye nebikoo too ishoritin o ishoritin" 
Daniel4:35 ore lelo pooki oomanya enkop neikenaki aajo pesho; neas ninye te risioroto e yieunoto enye to lorora le shumata o ti atua lelo oomanya enkop; nemeetae oloidimaa enkaina enye, aashu ejoki ninye, “Kaa iasita iyie?”" 
Daniel4:36 Ore te ina kata ake naarrinyokino nanu endamunoto ai; ore te nkaraki enkitoo e nkitoria ai naarrinyokini enkisisa o enkishiaa. Naaing'oru ilaikook o lkituaak laainei, naapiki nanu atua enkitoria ai, naaponikini nanu enkitoo sapuk." 
Daniel4:37 Ore nanu Nebukadnesa naisis naserem nayanyitu ilo Aiguanani le shumata; amu ore isiaaitin enyena pooki naa neitoriori. Ore nkoitoi enyena nesipa. Naa ore lelo oopuo to lwuasa eidim ninye aitadou. 
Daniel5:1 Neitobir apa olaiguanani Belshasa osirua kitok te nkaraki ilkituaak lenyena enkalifu nabo, neok ninye enaisho oo sabibu te dukuya lelo enkalifu nabo." 
Daniel5:2 Ore ake pee eishamisham Belshasa enaisho, neitanapisho nchere ore nena masaa e sahabu o nenkosholai apa naaitayio Nebukadnesa papaai lenye ti atua enkaji e Nkai te Yerusalem meyauni, pee etum olaiguanani o lkituaak lenyena o nkituaak enyena o nkapiak enyena aatookishore ninche." 
Daniel5:3 Neyau ninche nena masaa e sahabu o nenkosholai apa naaitayioki ti atua enkaji e Nkai, te ina aji e Nkai te Yerusalem. Neokishore olaiguanani ninche, o lkituaak lenyena, o nkituaak enyena o nkapiak enyena." 
Daniel5:4 Neok ninche enaisho oo sabibu, nerrep nkaitin nena aitin e sahabu, o nenkosholai, o nosuyai, o nesekenkei, o enosoit." 
Daniel5:5 Ore nabo kata neliooyu ilkimojik le nkaina e tung'ani neiger enturoto naelare esuntai e nkaji o laiguanani enkipirakinoto oiket lo ltaa; nedol olaiguanani ina aina eigerisho. 
Daniel5:6 Neibelekenya emua o laiguanani, neitanyamal ninye ndamunot enyena, nelepori irubat osesen lenye neikirikira nkung aaosho." 
Daniel5:7 Neyietu olaiguanani abuaku pee eyakini iloibonok, o Lkaldayo o laduaak. Nejoki olaiguanani lelo tung'ana ang'eni le Babilon, “Ore oloba anaa oloisoma ele sirata nelimu enajo ninye, naaitodol nanu enkibalakinoto enye neishopokini olkila sintet nepiki olpisiai le sahabu aaitaman emurt enye, nelo ninye aaku oloitoreisho liokuni te nkitoria.”" 
Daniel5:8 Nejing'u lelo ang'eni pooki lo laiguanani, kake meidim ninche aaisoma ilo sirata aashu eitayiolo olaiguanani enkibalakinoto." 
Daniel5:9 Nenyamalu oleng ilo aiguanani Belshasa neibelekenya emua enye, neiputukuny lelo kituaak lenyena." 
Daniel5:10 Ore enkitok o laiguanani, te nkaraki irorei lo laiguanani o lelo kituaak lenyena, nelotu olgilata oitoomonishoreki, nejo ina kitok olaiguanani, “La aiguanani, tobiko ntarasi! Mincho ndamunotinono kintanyamal aashu emua ino eibelekenya." 
Daniel5:11 Etii atua enkitoria ino oltung'ani otii atua ninye enkiyang'et oo nkaitin sinyat. Ore apa too nkolong'i e papaai lino, nenotoki ti atua ninye ewang'an, o eyiolounoto o eng'eno natiu anaa eng'eno oo nkaitin, ore apa olaiguanani Nebukadnesa, papaai lino, neitaa ninye olkitok loo lkuyantik, oloo ntalengo, Ilkaldayo o laing'urak loo lakir," 
Daniel5:12 enkaraki naa ore oltau sidai, o eng'eno, o ening'unoto nalimunye enkibalakinoto oo nkidetidetat oo iloyiotiaa neiwuang'ie inyamalitin nenotoki tele tung'ani oji Daniel, apa oishoo olaiguanani enkarna ajo Belteshasa. Nchoo naa Daniel eipotuni pee eitodolu ninye enkibalakinoto ele sirata.”" 
Daniel5:13 Neitijing'uni Daniel meeu dukuya olaiguanani. Nejoki olaiguanani Daniel, “Ira iyie lido Daniel, apa ora obo loo yarunot le Yuda, apa oyaua olaiguanani papa lai te Yuda." 
Daniel5:14 Atoning'o ilomon linono nchere etii enkiyang'et oo nkaitin sinyat atua iyie nenotoki sii ewang'an, o eyiolounoto o eng'eno nagut ti atua iyie." 
Daniel5:15 Etorikuoki taata ilang'eni o loo ntalengo meetu dukuya nanu pee eisom ele kigeroto naaitayiolo nanu enkibalakinoto enye; kake meidim ninche aaitodolu enkibalakinoto ena bae. 
Daniel5:16 Kake atoning'o nanu nchere indim iyie atolimu nkibalakinot niwuang'ie enyamali. Ore naa taata ti nindim iyie aisoma ele kigeroto nikintayiolo nanu enkibalakinoto, nikinchopokini olkila sintet, nikipiki olpisiai le sahabu aaitaman emurt ino, niaaku oliokuni oitoreisho te nkitoria.”" 
Daniel5:17 Newal Daniel te dukuya olaiguanani ajo, “Nchoo nkishorot inono eaku nkuninono, naa nchoo nena kishorot inono likae; ore ake eyia kaisomaki nanu olaiguanani ilo kigeroto naitayiolo ninye enkibalakinoto e ilo kigeroto." 
Daniel5:18 La aiguanani, eishoo Enkai kitok oleng Nebukadnesa, papaai lino enkitoria o enkisisa o esikar;" 
Daniel5:19 naa ore enkaraki ina kitoo naishoo Enkai ninye eikirikirate iltung'ana pooki, o loreren, o lng'ejepa neureishoyu te dukuya ninye; ore oloyieu near metua near metua; ore oloyieu neitopok neitopok; ore ilo oyieu neilepie, neilepie, ore oloyieu neitadou neitadou." 
Daniel5:20 Kake ore ake pee eilepunye oltau lenye neitagol oltau metaa keasisho to lwuasa neiwuang'ieki ninye te ilo orika lenye le nkitoo, neyae enkitoo enye aaitung'uaa ninye;" 
Daniel5:21 nerei ninye aitung'uaa iltung'ana, neitotiuni ndamunot enyena anaa ineng'ues, ore emanyisho enye neaku te nebo isirkon le ntim; neitoti ninye too nkujit anaa olkiteng, neshalu osesen lenye te nkoliolio e shumata, o metaba anaa neyiolou ninye nchere Ina Ai natii shumata aisul naitore enkitoria e tung'ana, nepik shumata ninye ilo oyieu ninye." 
Daniel5:22 Naa ore iyie, olayioni lenye, Belshasa, eitu intobor oltau lino hoo niyiolo kuna pooki," 
Daniel5:23 kake ilepunye kewan nigilunore Olaitoriani le shumata; ore nena masaa e nkaji enye neitijing'uaki aayau dukuya iyie, ore iyie o lkituaak linono, o nkituaak inono o nkapiak inono nitookie ninche enaisho oo sabibu, nirrepirrepe intae nena aitin e nkosholai o nesahabu o nosuyai, o nesekenkei, o nenchata, o nosoit, nena nemedolisho aashu ening'isho aashu eyiolo, kake ore ina Ai naa enkaina enye etii enkiyang'et ino netii inkoitoi inono pooki neitu iyie iyanyit." 
Daniel5:24 “Neaku te ine netii ninye eirriwuaki ina aina, nesiri ele kigeroto." 
Daniel5:25 Naa ele kigeroto otisiraki: MENE, MENE, TEKEL, o PARSIN." 
Daniel5:26 Ena enkibalakinoto ena bae: MENE, eikena Enkai nkolong'i e nkitoria ino neyau ninye enkiting'oto;" 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL, kineneng'aki iyie te ntemet naineneng'ishoreki nedoli aajo ing'or." 
Daniel5:28 PERES, etooroki enkitoria ino neishori ile Mede o le Parsia.”" 
Daniel5:29 Neitoki Belshasa aitanapisho neishopokini Daniel olkila sintet o lpisiai le sahabu oitamanaki emurt enye, nelimuni aaibalunye naaipirta ninye, nchere keaku ninye o liokuni oitoreisho te nkitoria." 
Daniel5:30 Ore ina kewarie ake neari Belshasa ilo aiguanani loo Lkaldayo metua. 
Daniel5:31 Neng'amu Darius le Mede enkitoria, aa oloo larin oobaya ntomoni ile oare." 
Daniel6:1 Eitishipa apa Darias pee epik ilbalusuni iip o tikitam meitoreisho ti atua enkitoria enye pooki; 
Daniel6:2 ore shumata ninche naa ilkituaak okuni, laa Daniel apa obo, aa ninye eyaki kulo balusuni ilomon, pee metum ake olaiguanani eng'orikinoto." 
Daniel6:3 Ore apa ilo Daniel nening'oyu oleng alang lelo kituaak pooki o lbalusuni, amu etii apa enkiyang'et sidai atua ninye. Neitobir olaiguanani pee epik ninye shumata enkitoria pooki." 
Daniel6:4 Ore lelo kituaak o lbalusuni neing'oru enaitang'orie Daniel ti alo enkitoria; kake eitu ninche etum enaitang'orie aashu eleyiata, amu keisiligayu apa ninye, nemeetae enkitadiaata aashu eleyiata nanotoki te ninye." 
Daniel6:5 Neitoki kulo tung'ana aajo, “Mikitum ae kitang'oroto aashu eniking'unyung'unyakinye ele Daniel meteleku ake ti niking'oru ti alo nkitanapat e Nkai enye.”" 
Daniel6:6 Nening'okino kulo kituaak o lbalusuni embae nayaki olaiguanani, nepuonu aajoki ninye, “Olaiguanani Darias, tobikoi ntarasi." 
Daniel6:7 Ore iyiook pooki oosiaisho te nkitoria ino - ilaitasheikinok, o lbalusuni, o laitasheikinok loo lkerenketi, o lkulikae arikok, nikitoning'okinote nchere pee eitobir olaiguanani enkitanapata, neitirrishi oleng, nchere ore pooki ng'ae oserem ae ai aashu tung'ani too nkolong'i tomon uni, metelekuake iyie lo aiguanani nenang'akini ninye eululu oo lng'atunyo." 
Daniel6:8 Ore naa taata, la aiguanani, intobira ina kitanapata nipik olmishire ina natoning'okinoteki pee meidimi aaibelekenya, anaa enatiu nkitanapat oo Lmedi o Lparsian, nena nemeidimi aaibelekenya.”" 
Daniel6:9 Neaku etipika apa olaiguanani Darias olmishire ina palai neimie. 
Daniel6:10 Ore ake pee eyiolou Daniel nchere etipikaki olmishire ina naimieki nelo ninye enkaji enye ebolo ildirishani le nkaji e shumata eing'orita Yerusalem; negil ninye kung katitin uni te nkolong neomon neishooyo enashe te dukuya Enkai enye, anaa apake enataasa." 
Daniel6:11 Neitoki kulo tung'ana aapuonu te ning'okinoto neinepu Daniel esaisho neomon te dukuya Enkai enye. 
Daniel6:12 Neitoki ninche aapuonu aanyiku nejo te dukuya olaiguanani, “Amaa, ti alo enkitanapata, la aiguanani! Keitu iyie ipik olmishire ina natoning'okinoteki; nchere ore pooki tung'ani osaisho tiae ai aashu te tung'ani ti atua nkolong'i tomoni uni meteleku ake te iyie, la aiguanani, nenang'akini atua eululu oo lng'atunyo?” Newal olaiguanani ajo, “Keuno ina bae, anaa enatiu enkitanapata oo Lmedi o enoo Lpasi, nena nemeidimi aaibelekenya.”" 
Daniel6:13 Neitoki ninche aawal te dukuya olaiguanani ejo, “Ore lido Daniel ora obo loo yarunot ooitung'uari Yuda, mikishilaa ninye iyie, laaiguanani, aashu ina naimieki nitipika olmishire, kake keomon ninye asaisho katitin uni te nkolong.”" 
Daniel6:14 Ore ake pee ening olaiguanani kulo rorei, neing'oru eneiko pee ekordu Daniel; nenyamalu o metadoi enkolong pee ekordu ninye." 
Daniel6:15 Neitoki kulo tung'ana aapuonu te nkiguanakinoto enetii olaiguanani, nejoki olaiguanani, “Tayiolo, laaiguanani, nchere enkitanapata ena oo Lmede o Lpasi naa nchere meetae enatudung'o olaiguanani aashu enkitanapata naidimi aaibelekenya.”" 
Daniel6:16 Neitoki olaiguanani aitanapisho, neyauni Daniel nenang'akini atua eululu oo lng'atunyo. Nejoki olaiguanani Daniel, “Inchoo Enkai ino, ina nisiaaita anaake kikordu iyie!”" 
Daniel6:17 Neyauni osoit aairragie te nkutuk e ina ululu nemishir olaiguanani to lmishire lenye o to lmishire loo lkituaak lenyena, nchere meetae embae naidimi aaibelekenya ti alo Daniel." 
Daniel6:18 Nelo olaiguanani enkaji enye e nkitoo, neen kewan ina kewarie pee menya endaa, nemeetae nkinantani naayakaki ninye, nelau ninye njo." 
Daniel6:19 Ore enamanarie enkakenya nedumunye olaiguanani neisarrisar alo eululu oo lng'atunyo. 
Daniel6:20 Ore pee elotu ninye ataaniki ina ululu natii Daniel neyietu aishir to ltoilo lo sina nejoki Daniel, “Oo Daniel, osinka le Nkai naishu, eikindima duoo Enkai ino ina nisiaai anaake atokordu too lng'atunyo?”" 
Daniel6:21 Nejoki Daniel olaiguanani, “La aiguanani, tobiko ntarasi!" 
Daniel6:22 Eirriwua Enkai ai olmalaika neiken nkutukie oo lng'atunyo, neitu ninche aainyal, amu aatoduaki aajo maata entioto te dukuya ninye, o te dukuya iyie sii, laaiguanani, eitu aas entorrono.”" 
Daniel6:23 Neng'idayu ilo aiguanani oleng, neitanapisho meitayuni Daniel ti atua eululu. Neaku eitayioki apa Daniel ti atua eululu nemetii hoo olkordata le nkinyalata onotoki te ninye, enkaraki apa naisiliga ninye Enkai enye." 
Daniel6:24 Neitanapisho olaiguanani, ore lelo tung'ana apa ooitang'oro Daniel neyauni, nenang'akini atua eululu oo lng'atunyo, ninche, o nkera enye o nkituaak enye; naa ore eitu ninche ebaiki abori ina ululu neng'amaa ilng'atunyo ninche negiligil iloik lenye." 
Daniel6:25 Neitoki olaiguanani Darias aigeroki iloreren pooki, o nkuapi pooki o nkutukie pooki naatii enkop pooki ajo: “Metoponikini intae eseriani." 
Daniel6:26 Aitobira nanu enkitanapata nchere ore ti atua enkitoria ai pooki neikirikira iltung'ana te nkuretisho te dukuya Enkai e Daniel, Amu Enkai naishu ninye, nebik ntarasi; meidak ae kata enkitoria enye, naa enoontarasi enkitoo enye." 
Daniel6:27 Kekordu ninye nesaru, neas ninye nkitoduaat e nking'asia te shumata o te nkop, ilo laa ninye oitajeuo Daniel aitung'uaa engolon oo lng'atunyo.”" 
Daniel6:28 Neaku etubula apa ele Daniel te nkata e nkitoria e Darias o enkitoria e Sairos ilo le Parsian. 
Daniel7:1 Ore to lari le dukuya le Belshasa, olaiguanani le Babilon, netum Daniel enkidetidet o nduaat e ndukuya enye ina kata apa eirragita te ndapash enye. Neiger ninye ina kidetidet, nelimu esiana e ina bae." 
Daniel7:2 Nejo Daniel, “Atoduaa nanu te nduaata ai kewarie, naa ng'ura, ore lelo kutat oong'uan le shumata nekut te ngolon enaiposha kitok." 
Daniel7:3 Neipang'u ing'uesi ong'uan aapuku ti atua enaiposha, nemeetae ake enemepaashare enkae." 
Daniel7:4 Ore ene dukuya nenyaanyukie olng'atuny neeta inaipuko o lkurragos. Ore aing'orita nanu nedotuni inaipuko enyena, neilepieki ninye te nkop neishori ninye meitasho too nkejek are anaa oltung'ani, neishori ninye endamunoto e tung'ani." 
Daniel7:5 Naa ng'ura, enkae ng'ues e are, naikununo anaa olng'arurumi. Neilepieki ninye te nkalo nabo; neeta ninye ilaras okuni te nkutuk enye, too rishat oo lala lenyena; netiaakaki apa ninye, ‘Tudumunye inosa nkiri oleng.’" 
Daniel7:6 Ore te siadi ena naing'orisho nanu, naa ng'ura, enkae, nanyaanyukie olowuaru keri, neeta inaipuko ong'uan e motonyi te nkoriong enye; neeta ina ng'ues ilukuny ong'uan neishori ninye enkitoria." 
Daniel7:7 Ore te siadi ena nadol nanu too nduaat e nkewarie, naa ng'ura eng'ues e ong'uan, torrono neitureisho negol oleng; neeta ilala sapuki le sekenkei; kenyaisho ninye negiligilisho, neituny ilekunottoo nkejek enyena. Nepaashare ninye nena ng'uesi pooki apa naatii dukuya ninye, neeta mowuarak tomon." 
Daniel7:8 Atisipua nanu nena mowuarak, naa ng'ura etupukuo ti atua ninche enkae mouo, enkiti, naa te dukuya ninye etadotuoki imowuarak uni oo naduoo e dukuya, naa ng'ura ena mouo netii nkonyek naanyaanyukie nkonyek o ltung'ani o enkutuk nairo mbaa sapuki." 
Daniel7:9 “Ore aing'orisho nanu, neirragieki ilorikan le nkitoo ore obo otobikoyie ilarin kumok netonie olorika lenye; ore ikilani lenyena neibor anaa soito le nchan, ore ilpapit le ndukuya enye neikununoanaa ilpapit loo nkerra; ore ilo orika lenye le nkitoo naailng'ejepa le nkima ooyupuyup, ore nkejek oo ngarrin enyenanaa enkima nayupuyup." 
Daniel7:10 Nepuku olkeju le nkima nelo aim dukuya ninye; neisiai ninye nkalifuni o nkalifuni, ore te dukuya ninye neitashe nkalifuni tomon katitin nkalifuni tomon; neton enkiguana eiguanare, neboli mbukui." 
Daniel7:11 “Naing'orisho taa nanu te nkaraki ilo toilo le lelo rorei sapuki ooiroro ina mouo. Naa ore aing'orita, neyieng'i ina ng'ues, neinyali osesen lenye neishoori metapeji te nkima." 
Daniel7:12 Ore nena kulie ng'uesi neoruni enkitoria enye, kake ore enkishui enye neitoodoroki te rishata o te nkata." 
Daniel7:13 Atoduaa to nduaata e kewarie, naa ng'ura, ore too nkatampo e shumata nelotu obo onyaanyukie enkerai e tung'ani, nelotu enetii Ilo otobikoyie ilarin kumok neitarasari te dukuya ninye." 
Daniel7:14 Neishori ninye enkitoria o enkitoo o enkitoria, pee etum iltung'ana pooki, o nkuapi, o lng'ejepa aaisiaayia ninye. Ore enkitoria enye naa enkitoria oo ntarasi nemeish aekata, Ore enkitoo enye naa enkitoo oo ntarasi, nemeish aekata, naa nabo enkitoria enye nemeidimi aaidaikie." 
Daniel7:15 “Ore ti alo nanu, Daniel, nelimana oltau lai ti atua nanu ore nena duaat e ndukuya ai naaitanyamal." 
Daniel7:16 Atataanikia nanu obo le lelo ooitashe te ine naikilikuan esipata naipirta kuna pooki, neaku aatolikio ninye, naaibalakinye nanu enkibalakinoto e kuna tokitin." 
Daniel7:17 ‘Ore kuna ng'uesi pokira ong'uan kituaak naa ilaiguanak oong'uan ooyooki aaipang'u te nkop. 
Daniel7:18 Kake ore lelo sinyat le ilo Otii Shumata Aisul naa keng'amu enkitoria, neaku enkitoria enenye ntarasi, o ntarasi o ntarasi.’" 
Daniel7:19 “Naitoki ayieu nayiolou esipata naipirta ina ng'ues e ong'uan napaashari ninye too nkulie, naitureisho oleng, neeta ilala lenyena le sekenkei o loisotok lo suyai; nenyaisho negiligilisho neituny ilekunot too nkejek enyena;" 
Daniel7:20 o naaipirta nena mourak tomon naatii endukuya enye, o ina ae mouo naa te dukuya ninye etigilari uni enye, ina mouo naata nkonyek o enkutuk nairo mbaa sapuki neeijo ninye kitok te nena naaboitare." 
Daniel7:21 Ore aing'orisho nanu neitayunye ena mouo olarrabal lelo sinyat, nemir ninche," 
Daniel7:22 o metaba anaa nelotu Ilo Otobikoyie, neiguanareki lelo sinyat le Ilo Otii Shumata aisul, nebau ina kata pee eishori lelo sinyat enkitoria." 
Daniel7:23 “Nji etejo ninye, ‘Ore ti alo ina ng'ues e ong'uan, kelotu enkitoria e ong'uan enkop, naa kepaashari ninye too nkitoriat pooki, naa kemut ninye enkop, pooki, neituny, negiligil." 
Daniel7:24 Ore nena mowuarak tomon, ore ti atua ena kitoria neipang'u ilaiguanak tomon, naa kedumunye likae te siadi ninche; naa kepaashari ninye te kuldo le ndukuya, naa keiwuang'ie ninye ilaiguanak okuni." 
Daniel7:25 Keiro ninye mbaa naapaashare Ilo Otii Shumata Aisul, naa kelo ninye aitanaur lelo sinyat le Ilo Otii Shumata Aisul, nedamu pee eibelekeny nkatitin o nkitanapat; naa keishoori ninche aapik atuaenkaina enye te nkiti kata, nkatitin are o lpisiai le nkata." 
Daniel7:26 Kake keton enkiguana aiguana, ore enkitoo enye naa keyae aaitung'uaa ninye, pee eishieki neinyali aaiting'ie." 
Daniel7:27 Ore enkitoria o enkitoo o engolon oo nkitoriat naatii abori shumata pooki, neishori iltung'ana loo sinyat le Ilo Otii Shumata Aisul; ore enkitoria enye naa keaku enkitoria oo ntarasi, ore enkitoo pooki neisiai nening ninche.’" 
Daniel7:28 “Ene enkiting'oto e ina bae. Ore tialo nanu Daniel, aaitanyamala ndamunot aainei oleng, neibelekenya emua o sesen lai; kake atushuma ina bae too ndamunot aainei.”" 
Daniel8:1 Ore to lari li okuni le nkitoria o laiguanani Belshasa nadol nanu enduaata eare. 
Daniel8:2 Nadol nanu te ina duaata; naa ore apa pee adol, natii Susa ina anasa kitok, natii olkerenket le Elam; nadol apa nanu te nduaata, atii embata olkeju le Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Naraposhu nkonyek aainei nadol, naa ng'ura, olmeregesh oitashe te ngilata o lkeju. Neeta imowuarak are; ore nena mowuarak pokira are naa kaadoru oleng, kake keado nabo alang enkae, ore ina naado neilep oleng, nelotu ina naado te siadi enkae." 
Daniel8:4 Nadol nanu ilo meregesh eipusho te nkalo o loo ntoluo, o moikuape o kopikop; nemeetae eng'ues naidim aitasho te dukuya ninye; nemeetae hoo obo oidim atokordu enatii abori engolon enye; etaasa anaa enayieu makewan nerup kewan aitaa sidai." 
Daniel8:5 Ore aibirribirrita, ng'ura, nelotu oloro eing'uaa enkalo o loo ntoluo eimu oriong enkop pooki eitu eibung enkop; neeta ilo oro emowuo e nking'asia te rishata oo nkonyek enyena." 
Daniel8:6 Nelotu ninye enetii ilo meregesh oata imowuarak are, ilo duoo latoduaa nanu eitashe te ngilata o lkeju, nekuetiki ninye te ngoro enye kitok." 
Daniel8:7 Nadol ninye eeuo anyikaki ilo meregesh neiponyare ninye, neosh ilo meregesh negil nena mowuarak enyena pokira are; neitu eitoki ilo meregesh aata engolon naitasheyie te dukuya ninye, kake etanang'ie ilo oro ninye enkop neituny ninye; nemeetae hoo obo oidim atokordu ilo meregesh aitung'uai engolon enye." 
Daniel8:8 Neisis ilo oro kewan oleng, kake ore ina kata egol ninye, negila ina mouo enye kitok, ore te rishata enye, nepuonu imowuarak ong'uan e nking'asia naaing'uaa ilkutat pokira ong'uan le shumata." 
Daniel8:9 Etubulua emowuo nabo teina kiti mouo, natubulua oleng aipir enkalo e kopikop, neipir enkalo o loo saen neipir ina kop kitok." 
Daniel8:10 Nebulu ninye oleng o metabaiki olorora le shumata, ore embata o lorora loo lakir nesulaki ninye enkop, neituny ninche." 
Daniel8:11 Nerup ninye kewan o te ilo kitok lo lorora; ore olasar opejori anaake neiwuang'ieki te ninye, ore ewueji e manyisho enye nenang'ari." 
Daniel8:12 Neishori ninye ilo orora te nebo ilo asar opejori anaake te ngilata oo nkitanapat; ore esipata nenang'akini enkop, neas ina mouo anaa enayieu nedupoyu." 
Daniel8:13 Naitoki nanu aning osinyati eiro; ore likae sinyati nejoki ilo oiroro, “Ae te nkata nabaa eetae ina duaata naipirta ilo osar opejori anaake, o ina gilata oo nkitanapat naitaa olmuaate, o ina naishooyioki emanyisho enye, o lorora meitunyi too nkejek?”" 
Daniel8:14 Nejoki ninye, “Too nkalifuni are o iip uni oo nteipai o nkakeny; nerrinyokini taa ine wueji sinyati enapake wueji enye.”" 
Daniel8:15 Ore nanu, Daniel, pee aidip atoduaa ina duaata, nanyok ajo ayiolou, naa ng'ura, eitashe te ine te dukuya nanu obo oata empukunoto o ltung'ani." 
Daniel8:16 Naning nanu oltoilo lo ltung'ani te rishata oo ngilat o lkeju le Ulai, neipotisho ilo toilo ajo, “Gabriel, nchoo ele tung'ani ening'u neyiolou enduaata.”" 
Daniel8:17 Neaku etinyikua ninye alotu ine apa naitasheyie nanu; ore pee elotu nairut nabatata te nkomom. Kake aatiaaka ninye nanu, “Toning'o iyie nakerai nchere ore ena duaata naa te nkaraki enkata e nkiting'oto.”" 
Daniel8:18 Ore aairorie ninye nanu, naaibung njo oleng nairrag aitabaiki enkomom enkop; kake aaiseyie ninye naadumu nanu maitasho too nkejek aainei." 
Daniel8:19 Nejo ninye, “Ng'ura, kaaitayiolo nanu iyie ina nayooki aaku te nkata e siadi e ngoro, amu ina kata apa nageluno e nkiting'oto eipirta." 
Daniel8:20 Ore ilo meregesh litoduaa oata imowuarak are, ore nena mowuarak are naa ilaiguanak le Media o Parsia." 
Daniel8:21 Ore ilo oro naa olaiguanani loo Lyunani; ore ina mouo kitok natii erishata oo nkonyek enyena naa ilo aiguanani oituruku. 
Daniel8:22 Ore ina mouo apa natigile te ine netubulunye kulie ong'uan naa keyooki aadumunye nkitoriat ong'uan te nkop enye, kake mme te ngolon enye." 
Daniel8:23 Ore te nkata e siadi e nkitoria enye, eidipa ilaitarruorrok aatimitunye, nelotu olaiguanani ogogong netolo oyiolo oleng ndung'eta e rashe." 
Daniel8:24 Naa kesapuku engolon enye, naa keyau enkidaata naitureisho naa keisul ninye te naba anaa enaas, naa keidaikie ninye iltung'ana magil o ltung'ana le lelo sinyat." 
Daniel8:25 Ore te nkalamasisho enye naa keponaa aitubul elejare te nkaina enye ore too ndamunot enyena makewan nerup kewan. Keidaikie ilkumok metii enkikoo naa kedumakino doi ninye o metabaiki Olkitok loo lkituaak, kake kepuoi aagil ninye metii enkaina e tung'ani." 
Daniel8:26 Ore ina duaata oo nteipai o nkakeny duoo natolimuoki naa kesipa; kake tunuka ina duaata, amu enoo nkolong'i naapuonu.”" 
Daniel8:27 Ore nanu, Daniel, naaidimuni naairrag nkuti olong'i atamuoyia; naitoki nanu adumunye nalo enkisiaayiare o laiguanani; kake aiputukunyo nanu te ina duaata aningu ayiolou." 
Daniel9:1 Ore to lari le dukuya le Darias olayioni le Ahaseuro, laa ore te inoto naa Olmedei, ilo otaa olaiguanani le nkitoria oo Lkaldayo" 
Daniel9:2 ore to lari le dukuya le nkitoria enye, namusu nanu Daniel ti atua mbukui esiana oo larin, laa ore te risioroto ororei lo Laitoriani otolikioki Yeremia ilo oiboni meeta nchere pee mebaya te dukuya enkiting'oto e nkidaata e Yerusalem, naa ilarin ntomoni naapishana." 
Daniel9:3 Naitoki aibelekenyakino Olaitoriani Enkai, aing'oru ninye te nkomono o te sayiata te enata e kewan o te nkishopoto oo lkuniyiani o nkuruon." 
Daniel9:4 Atoomono nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ai nairridu ajo, “Olaitoriani Na ai kitok magilani, oibung ninye olning'o lo sotua o enyorrata nauno te lelo oonyor ninye neibung nkitanapat enyena," 
Daniel9:5 kitaasa iyiook eng'oki nikintarruoitie nikiaasisho te suujisho nikigolong'u, kimbelekenyate aaing'uaa nkitanapat inono o nkiguanat inono;" 
Daniel9:6 eitu iyiook kining isinkan linono lelo oibonok le Nkai, apa ooirorie ninche te nkarna ino ilaiguanak lang, o ilkituaak lang o loo papa, o ltung'ana pooki lena kop." 
Daniel9:7 Enino Olaitoriani esipita, kake kiaata iyiook enkurruna anaa enikitiu ena olong too ltung'ana le Yuda, te lelo oomanya Yerusalem, o Israel pooki, lelo ootaana o lelo oolakua pooki, ti atua nenakuapi pooki apa niterewa iyie ninche. Te nkaraki ina taboi nataasa ninche ti alo iyie." 
Daniel9:8 Enaang, Olaitoriani, enkurruna, o laiguanak lang, o lkituaak lang, o loo papa enkaraki nikitaasa iyiook eng'oki." 
Daniel9:9 Eno Laitoriani Enkai ang olng'ur o empalakino amu kitogolong'akitia iyiook ninye," 
Daniel9:10 neitu iyiook kining oltoilo lo Laitoriani Enkai ang aasuj nkitanapat enyena, apa naatipika ninye dukuya iyiook too sinkan lenyena lelo oibonok le Nkai." 
Daniel9:11 Etigila Israel pooki enkitanapata ino neibelekenye, neany ening oltoilo lino. Ore ilo deket o lmumai naaigeroki ti atua nkitanapat e Musa ilo sinka le Nkai netubukokoki iyiook, enkaraki nikitaasa iyiook eng'oki ti alo ninye." 
Daniel9:12 Eitabayie ninye irorei lenyena, lelo apa ooiroro ninye ti alo iyiook o ti alo lelo kituaak ooitore iyiook, ayau shumata iyiook enkitamioto sapuk; amu ore ti abori shumata pooki eitu ae kata etumi embae nanyaanyukie enaitaasaki Yerusalem." 
Daniel9:13 Ore anaa enaigeroki ti atua nkitanapat e Musa, eeuo ena kitamioto pooki shumata iyiook, neitu ake kiomonu omom o Laitoriani Enkai ang, aaibelekenya aaing'uaa ntorrok ang nikining ina sipata." 
Daniel9:14 Neaku eitobira Olaitoriani ina kitamioto neyaua ninye shumata iyiook; amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai ang naa asipani too siaitin pooki naataasa ninye, neitu iyiook kining oltoilo lenye." 
Daniel9:15 Naa ore taata, Olaitoriani Enkai ang, laa iyie oyaua iltung'ana linono aitupuku ti atua enkop e Misiri te nkaina magilani, nintobiraki kewan enkarna, anaa enatiu ena olong, kitaasa iyiook eng'oki, kitaasishote te ntorroni." 
Daniel9:16 Iyie Olaitoriani, ore te risioroto oo nkiaasin inono naasipa, nchoo engoro ino o empijan ino eibelekenya apaash ena anasa ino Yerusalem, ena doinyo ino sinyati; amu te nkaraki ing'ok ang o entorroni oo loo papa pee eimakini Yerusalem o ltung'ana linono ti atua kulo tung'ana pooki oomanita iyiook." 
Daniel9:17 Ore naa Olaitoriani, na Ai ang, toning'o enkomono o sinka lino o esayiata enye, naa ore te nkaraki kewan ino Olaitoriani, nchoo enkomom ino meitawang'aki ewueji ino sinyati ina nataa olmuaate." 
Daniel9:18 Na Ai ai, irrugu enkiok ino toning'o; tabolo nkonyek inono toduaa emijoonisho ang o ina anasa naipotieki enkarna ino; amu mikintarasu dukuya iyie isayiat ang te nkaraki esipata ang, kake te nkaraki olng'ur lino kitok." 
Daniel9:19 Olaitoriani, toning'o; Olaitoriani tapalaki iyiook; Olaitoriani toning'o iyiook niasisho; mimutie, te nkaraki kewan ino, na Ai ai, ore te nkaraki ena anasa ino o ltung'ana linono naa enkarna ino eipotieki.”" 
Daniel9:20 Ore ina kata airorita nanu naomonito, airridu ing'ok aainei o ng'ok oo ltung'ana laainei Israel, naitarasaa esayiata ai te dukuya Olaitoriani Enkai te nkaraki ina doinyo sinyati e Nkai ai;" 
Daniel9:21 ore ina kata airorita nanu aomon, ore ilo tung'ani oji Gabriel, duoo latoduaa te nduaata e dukuya, nelotu ine natii nanu akuetu oleng te ina kata o lasar le teipa." 
Daniel9:22 Nelotu ninye naajoki nanu, “Oo Daniel, aewuo taata pee aaisho iyie eng'eno nagut o eyiolounoto." 
Daniel9:23 Ore te nkiterata e sayiata ino eewuo ororei abau, naewuo nanu pee aaliki iyie, amu eikinyorri iyie oleng; metaa tadamu ilo rorei niyiolou ina duaata." 
Daniel9:24 “Etudung'oki iwikii ntomoni naapishana oo larin te nkaraki iltung'ana linono o ina anasa ino sinyati, pee eiting'ieki enkitarruorroto, pee eishieki easata oo ng'ok, pee eitaikinyeki osotua ilaing'okok, pee eyauni esupatisho oo ntarasi, nemishiri enduaata o loiboni, nebukokini eilata ine wueji sinyati aisul." 
Daniel9:25 Toning'o niyiolou naa nisipu nchere ore ebaiki elototo e ilo rorei pee eitobiri neitokini aashet Yerusalem o metabau elotunoto e ilo otubukokoki eilata aaput, ilo kitok, naa keaku iwikii naapishana. Ore too wikii ntomoni ile oare naa keaku keigili aashet too lkurrat oo tumoreki o wuejitin neegol, kake te nkata e nyamali." 
Daniel9:26 Ore te siadi nena wikii ntomoni ile o are neiwuang'ieki ilo otubukokoki eilata aaput, ilo kitok nemeitoki aata toki, ore lelo tung'ana le ilo kitok olotu neidaikie ina anasa o ewueji sinyati. Kelotu enkiting'oto enye anaa to loirrag le nkarenetii olarrabal o metabaiki enkiting'oto; neibalunyekiemijoonisho." 
Daniel9:27 Naa keitobir ninye olning'o ogol te wiki nabo; ore to lpisiai le wiki naa keisho ninye ilasarri o nkishorot meishunye; ore te ina rishata nepiki olkirutoto torrono entopij e nkaji e Nkai, naa keton ninye teine, ometaba anaa neitabaya ilo otipika ine ina naitobiraka Enkai.”" 
Daniel10:1 Ore to lari li okuni le Sairos olaiguanani le Parsia nebolokini ororei Daniel, ilo oji enkarna Belteshasa. Naa kesipa apa ilo rorei, naa olarrabal kitok. Nesipu ninye ilo rorei netum eyiolounoto e ina duaata." 
Daniel10:2 Ore apa te nena olong'i, naishirita nanu Daniel too wikii uni. Eitu nanu ainos ndaiki sidain, neitu ejing nkiri aashu enaisho oo sabibu enkutuk ai," 
Daniel10:3 neitu nanu aitasim aela te ilata te nena wikii uni naalulung'a. 
Daniel10:4 Ore te nkolong e tikitam oong'uan olapa le dukuya aitashe nanu te ngilata e ilo keju kitok, aa taa, Tigris," 
Daniel10:5 naraposhu nanu nkonyek aainei aing'orisho, naa ng'ura, oltung'ani oishopo too nkilani naapuyiapui, laa keena empolos enye te sahabu e Ufas." 
Daniel10:6 Neikununo osesen lenye anaa osoit oji beril, neikununo enkomom enye anaa enkiwuang'ata, neikununo nkonyek enyena anaa ilkilang'eta ooyupuyup, neikununo nkaik enyena o nkejek enyena anaa enkitiil o suyai osika, ore oltoilo loo rorei lenyena neikununo anaa oltoilo lo lorora." 
Daniel10:7 Ore nanu Daniel aa nanu ake, nadol ina duaata, amu ore lelo tung'ana apa ootii te nebo nanu eitu edol ina duaata." 
Daniel10:8 Neaku aatung'uayioki aa nanu ake nadol ina duaata kitok, nemeetae engolon natelekua ti atua nanu; ore emua o sesen lai neibelekenya oleng, nashalu oleng." 
Daniel10:9 Naitoki nanu aning oltoilo loo rorei lenyena; ore ake pee aning oltoilo loo rorei lenyena, nabatata nanu te nkomom too njo kumok naitabaiki nanu enkomom ai enkop." 
Daniel10:10 Naa ng'ura, aaibung'a nanu enkaina naaikirikirie nanu nkaik aainei o nkung." 
Daniel10:11 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Oo Daniel lo tung'ani onyorri oleng, toning'o kulo rorei laajoki nanu, nintashe too nkejek amu ore taata aairriwuaki nanu enitii.” Ore ina kata aaliki ninye ele rorei, naitashe nanu aikirikira." 
Daniel10:12 Naaitoki ninye ajoki nanu, “Miureisho iyie Daniel, amu ore ebaiki ina olong apa e dukuya nitipika ndamunot inono ijo pee ining'u nintobor kewan te dukuya Enkai ino, etoning'oki irorei linono, naewuo nanu te nkaraki e lelo rorei linono." 
Daniel10:13 Ore olkitok le nkitoria e Parsia aaibooyie nanu nkolong'i tikitam o obo; kake aaweuo Mikael aretu, ilo obo kitok loo lkituaak, neaku atung'uayie nanu ninye te ine te nebo ilo kitok le nkitoriae Parsia," 
Daniel10:14 naaewuo nanu aitayiolo ina nayooki adoiki iltung'ana linono too nkolong'i e siadi. Amu ore ina duaata naa enoo nkolong'i e siadi.” 
Daniel10:15 Ore pee aaidip ninye airorie nanu te risioroto e kulo rorei, naibelekenya nanu aing'orie enkomom ai enkop neaku mairo." 
Daniel10:16 Naa ng'ura, ore obo onyaanyukie nkerai e tung'ana naaiseyie enkutuk ai, nabol enkutuk ai airo. Najoki nanu ilo oitasho te dukuya nanu, “Olaitoriani lai, ore te nkaraki ina duaata aatijing'a nanu emion, nemeekure aata engolon." 
Daniel10:17 Kaji eiko osinka lo Laitoriani lai te neirorie Olaitoriani lai? Amu meekure taata aata engolon nemetii enkiyang'et atua nanu.” 
Daniel10:18 Naaitoki aiseyie nanu obo oata empukunoto e tung'ani naaitagol nanu. 
Daniel10:19 Nejo ninye, “Lotung'ani ele onyorri oleng, miureishoyu, metaa eseriani te nebo iyie; tagolo nintagol oshoke.” Ore ake pee aairorie nanu nagolu najo, “Nchoo Olaitoriani lai eiro, amu kintagolo iyie nanu.”" 
Daniel10:20 Neitoki ninye ajo, “Amaa, iyiolo iyie ajo kainyoo pee aewuo enitii? Kake karrinyo taata nanu alo aarare ilo kitok le nkitoria e Parsia; ore pee aidip ataarare ninye, neeitu olkitok loo Lyunani." 
Daniel10:21 Kake kaaliki nanu iyie ina natisiraki ti atua ina buku oosipat; meetae likae laaretu nanu aarare kulo meteleku Mikael ake ilo kitok linyi.” 
Daniel11:1 Ore ti alo nanu te ilo ari le dukuya le Darias loo Lmede, aitasho aitisip ninye napik engolon." 
Daniel11:2 “Naa ore taata kaaitodol nanu esipata. Ng'ura keitoki aailepu laiguanak okuni te Parsia; ore oliong'uan eikarsis alang ninche pooki; ore ake pee egolu te nkaraki karsisisho enye neisisaki ninye ninche pooki metaarare enkitoo oo Lyunani. 
Daniel11:3 Neitoki adumunye olaiguanani magilani laa kelotu aitoreisho te nkitoria kitok neasisho te risioroto e yieuna enye. 
Daniel11:4 Ore eidipa ninye atudumunye negila enkitoria enye neoro aipir isiwuon okuni le shumata, kake mme taa te nkaraki dupoto enye, neme te nkaraki ina kitoria naitore ninye; amu kedotuni ina kitoria enye neishori ilkulikae leme ninye." 
Daniel11:5 “Negolu ilo aiguanani le kopikop, kake ore obo loo lkituaak lenyena naa kegolu alang ninye ore enkitoria enye naa keaku enkitoria kitok." 
Daniel11:6 Ore te siadi ilarin oata esiana, neitobir ninche enchula, ore ina tito o laiguanani le kopikop nelotu enetii olaiguanani le moikuape aitayu osotua; kake mebikie engolon enkaina enye, ore ninye o eishoi enye nemebik; kake keishieki ninye, te nebo lelo ooisiai ninye, o enkerai enye o ilo ora olkitok lenye." 
Daniel11:7 “Ore akenya te nena katitin naa kedumunye olng'osila le ntonai enye te rishata enye; kelotu ninye aarare enjore nelo ajing osempewuet lo laiguanani le moikuape, neitainye ninche olarrabal nemirisho." 
Daniel11:8 Kelo sii anap aya Misiri nkaitin enye te nebo nkitanyaanyukot naaipurjuno te sarng'ab te nebo imasaa e tipat e nkosholai o ne sahabu; naa ore too larin oora esiana nepal ninye eitu eitainye olarrabal olaiguanani le moikuape. 
Daniel11:9 Neitoki ilo aiguanani alotu atua enkitoria e kopikop kake kerrinyo alo atua enkop enye makewan. 
Daniel11:10 “Keipiru ilayiok lenyena olarrabal neiturrur olorora kitok le njore laa keilepu alotu neimisie neim atua, nereu ninye olarrabal o metabaiki osempewuet lenye." 
Daniel11:11 Ore ilo aiguanani le kopikop etagore oleng keipang'u alotu aarare ilo aiguanani le moikuape; naa kedumu ninye olorora kitok, kake keishoori ilo orora aapik atua enkaina o lmang'atinta lenye." 
Daniel11:12 Ore pee eyae ilo orora, neng'idayu oltau lenye newuasayu, nenang'ie ninye enkop iltung'ana nkalifuni maa tomon, kake melo ninye amirisho." 
Daniel11:13 Amu keitoki ilo aiguanani le moikuape adumu olorora, kitok alang ola duoo le dukuya; ore te siadi ilarin oata esiana naa kelotu ninye te nebo enjore kitok o masaa kumok." 
Daniel11:14 “Ore akenya te nena katitin naa kedumunye ilkumok aarare ilo aiguanani le kopikop; ore lelo tung'ana lo larrabal ti atua iltung'ana linono naa kerup ate pee etum aaitabai ina apa natolimuoki kake kepuo ninche aabatata. 
Daniel11:15 Kelotu ilo aiguanani le moikuape ayau eng'adunoto, neya ina ang nasheta isunta. Ore nena jorin e kopikop nemeitashe, aashu ilo orora lenye ogeluno, amu metumi engolon naitasheyie." 
Daniel11:16 Kake ore ilo olotu aarare ninye naa keas anaa enayieu ninye makewan, nemeetae oloidim aitasho te dukuya ninye; naa kelo ninye aitashe te ina kop e nkishiaa, ore pooki e ina kop naa keaku atua enkitoria enye etii." 
Daniel11:17 Naa keipirakinore ninye te nkomom enye pee elotu atua enkitoria enye pooki, naa keyau ninye olning'o lo sotua neas ninche. Naa keisho ninye entito e nkitok meidaikie enkitoria, kake meitashe ninye nemetum dupoto." 
Daniel11:18 Ore te siadi neibelekenya ninye aing'or olemankale, naa kelo aya ilkumok lenye; kake kelotu likae kitok aishie ilo wuasa lenye le sulare. Ee kerrinyokino ninye ilo wuasa lenye le sulare alotushumata ninye." 
Daniel11:19 Neitoki ninye aibelekenya alo lelo sempewueti le nkop enye, kake kelo ninye arrorro nebatata, nemeitokini aatum." 
Daniel11:20 “Neitoki adumunye te rishata enye likae oirriu iladung'ok le kodi pee eirony iltung'ana te nkaraki enkitoria enye; kake too nkuti olong'i ake negila ninye, neme te ngoro aashu to larrabal." 
Daniel11:21 “Ore te rishata enye neitoki adumunye olomeni leitu eishori enkanyit anaa olaiguanani; kelotu ninye aluamisho neya enkitoria to losek. 
Daniel11:22 Keiwuang'ieki njorin aaishie tukul te dukuya ninye, te nebo ilo kitok lo sotua." 
Daniel11:23 Ore te ina kata naning'oi o ninye neasisho ninye te lejare; nelo ninye agolu eeta ilkuti tung'ana. 
Daniel11:24 Ore eluamisho nelotu ninye atua nene wuejitin sidain e ina kop; nelo ninye aas ina neitu ae kata eas iloomenye anaa iloo nkakuyiaa lenye, eidapash ti atua ninche imasaa o nena naataarua ninye te njore. Keipiru ninye nkiguanat pee ear isempewueti, kake te nkiti kata ake." 
Daniel11:25 Naa keputu ninye engolon enye o empijan enye pee elo aitayunye olarrabal o laiguanani le kopikop eeta enjore kitok; ore ilo aiguanani le kopikop nelo olarrabal te nebo enjore kitok oleng magilani; kake melo ninye aitashe, amu keitobirakini ninye ilnukat." 
Daniel11:26 Ore ninye lelo oinos endaa enye sidai ninche oar ninye. Ore enjore enye neishieki, nebatata ilkumok etaraki too lalema." 
Daniel11:27 Ore ti alo lelo aiguanak oare neibelekenyakino ndamunot enye entorroni, neiro ninche elejare te mesa nabo, kake metum toki; amu ore enkiting'oto naa te nkata natudung'uoki." 
Daniel11:28 Naa keshukunye ninye alotu enkop enye eeta masaa kumok; kake ore oltau lenye eibelekenye aibayu ilo sotua sinyati. Naa keas ninye anaa enayieu, nerrinyo alo enkop enye makewan." 
Daniel11:29 “Ore akenya te ina kata nategeluaki nerrinyo ninye alo enkalo e kopikop; kake melo atiu te ina kata anaa enatiu apa. 
Daniel11:30 Amu kepuonu imelin e Kitim aaitainye ninye olarrabal, naa keureishoyu ninye nerrinyo nelo aigorokino ilo sotua sinyati. Kerrinyo ninye aning lelo ooany ilo sotua sinyati." 
Daniel11:31 Nelotu enjore naing'uaa ninye neisarkionie ina aji e Nkai o sempewuet neya ilo asar opejori le anaake. Neitasheiyie ninche olminong aaitaa ine olmuaate. 
Daniel11:32 Neitapong'oo te nkilelemare lelo ooany ilo sotua. Kake ore lelo tung'ana ooyiolo Enkai enye neitashe aauno neas enkiaas. 
Daniel11:33 Ore lelo ti atua olorere oora ng'eni neidimie ilkumok metayiolo hoo naa kepuo ninche aabatata to lalem o to lng'ejep le nkima, o te yararoto o te enata, too nkuti olong'i." 
Daniel11:34 Ore te nebatata ninche naa ketum enkiti retoto. Naa keibung'a ilkumok maate to lkoroj. 
Daniel11:35 Ore embata e lelo oora ng'eni nebatata, pee esil neitisiny ninche neiborrie ninche, o metabau enkata e nkiting'oto, amu eton ina aa ene nkata apa nategeluaki." 
Daniel11:36 “Naa keas olaiguanani anaa enayieu; kerup ninye kewan neilepie kewan aitulus te pooki ai, naa keiro ninye mbaa esulare ti alo Enkai oo nkaitin. Kedupayu ninye o metaba anaa neitabari engoro; amu ore ina apa natudung'oki kepuoi aas." 
Daniel11:37 Mening ninye nkaitin oo loo menye, aashu ina nanyor nkituaak; meshilaa ninye hoo ae ai, amu keilepie ninye kewan aitulus te pooki." 
Daniel11:38 Keyanyitu ninye enkai oo sempewueti te rishata e kuna; ina ai neitu ae kata eyiolou loo menye eyanyit ninye te sahabu o te nkosholai, too soito oogol enkinyiang'a o too nkishorot naagol enkinyiang'a." 
Daniel11:39 Naa kear ninye osempewuet ogol oleng te retoto e nkai omoni. Ore lelo oonyorraa ninye nerup ninye ninche aisho enkanyit. Neitaa ninche ilkituaak te shumata ilkumok naa keor ninye enkop te nkinyiang'a. 
Daniel11:40 “Ore te nkata e nkiting'oto kelotu ilo aiguanani le kopikop arasaki ninye; kake ore ilo aiguanani le moikuape agilunore ninye anaa olemua, eeta ngarrin oo mbartan, o lakedok loo mbartan, te nebo imelin kumok; naa kelotu nena kuapi, neiput aaibulu enkop pooki." 
Daniel11:41 Naa kelotu ninye atua ina kop e nkishiaa. Ore nkalifuni maa iip tomon nebatata, kake ore kulo kekorduni aaitayu te nkaina enye: Edom o Moab o erubata kitok oo Lamori." 
Daniel11:42 Keitorioo enkaina enye aarare nkuapi, ore ina kop e Misiri nemeimisho." 
Daniel11:43 Neaku ninye oitore ilchumat le sahabu ole nkosholai, ore nena tokitin pooki e tipat e Misiri; o ne Libia o ne Etiopia neirukurukore iroruat enyena." 
Daniel11:44 Kake keitanyamal ninye ilomon ooing'uaa oloo saen o moikuape, naa kelo ninye te ngoro kitok napi pee einyal neidaikie ilkumok." 
Daniel11:45 Naa kelo ninye aunoki lelo ng'oborri lenyena le nkitoo erishata e naiposha e ilo doinyo kitok sinyati; ore eyia kelotu ake enkiting'oto enye, nemetii hoo obo oret ninye." 
Daniel12:1 “Ore akenya te ina kata naa kedumunye Mikael, ilo kitok oitore iltung'ana linono. Naa kelotu enkata e nyamali, neitu ae kata etumi ebaiki apa meetae olorere o metabaiki ina kata; kake ore inakata naa kepuoi aakordu iltung'ana linono, pooki ng'ae otumi enkarna enye eigero ti atua embuku." 
Daniel12:2 Ore ilkumok le lelo ooirurate ti atua enterit e nkop neinyototo, ore kulikae nedumakino enkishui nemeiting, ore ilkulikae naa enkurruna o esulare oo ntarasi." 
Daniel12:3 Ore lelo ng'eni newang'u anaa ewang'an e shumata; ore lelo ooboiniki ilkumok enkoitoi oosipat newang'u anaa ilakir ntarasi o ntarasi. 
Daniel12:4 Kake ore iyie Daniel, tunuka lelo rorei; nimishir aiken ina buku, o metabau enkata e nkiting'oto Keyooki ilkumok aakuet nekuetu, naa keponari eng'eno.”" 
Daniel12:5 Ore nanu Daniel naing'orisho, naa ng'ura, eitashe kulikae oare, obo tele kekun e olkeju o likae te lido kekun o lkeju." 
Daniel12:6 Najoki nanu ilo tung'ani oishopo too nkilani naapuyiapui, ilo otii shumata eilo keju, “Kenkata nabaa pee ebau enkiting'oto e kuna baa e nking'asia?”" 
Daniel12:7 Ore ilo tung'ani oishopo too nkilani naapuyiapui, ilo otii shumata nena ariak e olkeju nedumu enkaina enye e tatene o enkaina enye e kedienye aipirie shumata; naning nanu ninye einos olmumai teilo oishu ntarasi nchere te nkata, o inkatitin are, o lpisiai le nkata; naa te neidip ninche aatigil engolon e lelo tung'ana sinyat aaiting'ie ore kuna baa pooki neaku eitabayioki." 
Daniel12:8 Atoning'o nanu kake eitu aning'u ayiolou. Najo nanu, “Olaitoriani lai, kainyoo akenya epuo kuna baa aaku.”" 
Daniel12:9 Nejo ninye, “Shomo enkoitoi ino Daniel, amu eikenoyioki lelo rorei nemishiri o metabau enkata e nkiting'oto." 
Daniel12:10 Keipok ilkumok ate, neiborrie ate, nesilayu; kake ore lelo arruok neasisho te nkarruisho; nemeetae obo le lelo arruok olo aning'u; kake ore lelo ng'eni naa kepuo aaning'u." 
Daniel12:11 Naa ore ebaiki ina kata neiwuang'ieki ilo asar opejori anaake aaitasheyie ilo minong le mijoonisho, naa keaku nkolong'i enkalifu nabo, o iip are o ntomoni naaudo." 
Daniel12:12 Emayiana ilo oanyisho nelotu nena olong'i enkalifu, iip uni o tomoni uni." 
Daniel12:13 Kake shomo enkoitoi ino o metabau enkiting'oto; amu ilo ayeng'iyeng'a, nilo aitashe te wueji ino negeluno te nkiting'oto e nena olong'i.”" 
Hosea1:1 Ele rorei apa lo Laitoriani oewuo enetii Hosea olayioni le Beeri, too nkolong'i, e Usia, o Yotam, o Ahas, o Hesekia ilaiguanak le Yuda, o too nkolong'i e Yeroboam olayioni le Yoash, olaiguanani le Israel." 
Hosea1:2 Ore apa pee eng'as Olaitoriani airo eimunye enkiroroto enye Hosea, nejoki Olaitoriani Hosea, “Shomo, iyamaki kewan enkitok naibor onyek niiu nkera e nkibor oo nkonyek, amu eiborrie ena kop onyek oleng ainguaa Olaitoriani.”" 
Hosea1:3 Nelo ninye ayam Gomer ina tito e Diblaim, neiroshiu ninye neiki ninye olayioni." 
Hosea1:4 Nejoki Olaitoriani ninye, “Tejo enkarna enye Yesreel; amu enkiti kata ake nang'or, pee aitame nanu enkaji e Yehu te nkaraki osarge le Yesreel, naa kaishie nanu enkitoria e nkaji e Israel." 
Hosea1:5 Ore akenya te ina olong, nagil nanu enkawuo e Israel to erata le Yesreel.”" 
Hosea1:6 Neitoki ina kitok anutayu neiu entito. Nejoki Olaitoriani Hosea, “Tejo enkarna enye Enemeing'urrieki, amu maigil nanu aing'urrie enkaji e Israel, mapalaki ninche katukul." 
Hosea1:7 Kake kaing'urrie nanu enkaji e Yuda naa kakordu ninche to Laitoriani e Nkai enye; makordu nanu ninche te nkauo aashu to lalem, nemakordu to larrabal, aashu too mbartan aashu too lakedok loo mbartan.”" 
Hosea1:8 Ore pee eoru Gomer ilki, “Enemeing'urrieki,” nenutayu neiu olayioni." 
Hosea1:9 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Tejo enkarna enye Mme iltung'ana laainei, amu mirara intae iltung'ana laainei nemara nanu Enkai inyi.”" 
Hosea1:10 Kake ore esiana oo ltung'ana le Israel naa kebayu anaa osinyai le naiposha, lemeidimi aatetem anaa aaikena, naa ore to ine wueji apa netiakinyeki ninche, “Mirara iltung'ana laainei,” keaku keji ninche, “Nkera e Nkai naishu.”" 
Hosea1:11 Ore iltung'ana le Yuda o ltung'ana le Israel nepuo aaiturrurr te nebo negelaki ate o lkitok obo; naa keilep ninche aapuo te ina kop, amu eikitok kenya ina olong e Yesreel." 
Hosea2:1 Tejo olalashe lino, “Iltung'ana laainei,” nijo enkanashe ino, “Enanoto olng'ur.”" 
Hosea2:2 “Tasayia ng'utunyi, tasayia amu mme enkitok ai ninye, nemara nanu olpayian lenye pee etum aiwuang'ie enkibor oo nkonyek te nkomom enye, neiwuang'ie eloloito enye to lki lenyena;" 
Hosea2:3 pee masul ake aoru ilkilani naitotiu ninye anaa ina olong apa naini, naitotiu ninye anaa ong'ata, naitotiu ninye anaa enkop natoyio, naar ninye te nkure." 
Hosea2:4 Ore sii ti alo nkera enyena maing'urrie nanu amu inkera e nkibor oo nkonyek ninche. 
Hosea2:5 Amu eiborrie ng'otonye onyek; ore ina natunute ninche netaasa embae enkurruna. Amu etejo ninye, ‘Kalo arubare isintan laainei, laa ninche laaisho nanu emukate ai o enkare ai, o enkila ai napuyiapui, o kitani ai, o eilata ai o enaisho.’" 
Hosea2:6 “Tenkaraki ina kanuk nanu enkoitoi enye too lkiku; nashetaki nanu esuntai, pee metum ninye eneim." 
Hosea2:7 Kemir ninye isintan lenyena, kake meinepu; neing'oru ninche, kake metum ninche. Neitoki ninye ajo, ‘Kalo nanu narrinyokino olapa moruo lai le dukuya, amu keikash apa ina kata te nanu alang taata.’" 
Hosea2:8 Neitu eyiolou ninye inchere nanu apa ilo oishoo ninye entapa, o enaisho oo sabibu o eilata, naiputaki ninye enkosholai o sahabu naa ninche etaasishore te Baal." 
Hosea2:9 “Ore enkaraki ina ekarriny ilpaek laainei te nkata enye, o enaisho ai oo sabibu te rishata enye, narriny nanu ina kila ai napuyiapui o kitani, naa ninche apa naaitemoo emasipaisho enye." 
Hosea2:10 “Ore taata naa kasul nanu ninye aoru nkilani te dukuya isintan lenyena, nemeetae olokordu ninye aitayu te nkaina ai." 
Hosea2:11 Naa kaishie nanu isiruai lenyena pooki, o mashoi, o lapaitin lenyena ng'ejuk o sabatoni enyena, o siruai lenyena pooki gelunot." 
Hosea2:12 Nainyal nanu isabibu lenyena o lkeek loo lng'anayio, laa ninche ejo ninye, ‘Elaakinoto ai kulo, laa ninche aaishoo isanchan laainei.’ Kaitaa nanu ninche entim, naa keinos ninche ing'uesi e ntim." 
Hosea2:13 Naa kaitame nanu ninye te nkaraki nena olong'i o sirua le Baal ina kata apa pee epejoki enkorropil ninche, nekuso ninye too lgiso o too masaa, nelo asujaa isintan lenyena, nemaadamu ninye nanu, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Hosea2:14 “Ore enkaraki ina, ng'ura, kalejaa, narik ninye ong'ata, nairorie ninye te mborron." 
Hosea2:15 Ore te ine naisho enkurma enye oo sabibu, naitaa ilo erata le Akor elusie o siligi. Ore te ine newal ninye anaa apa too nkolong'i e kitisho enye, anaa apa pee eipang'u aing'uaa enkop e Misiri." 
Hosea2:16 “Naa ore kenya te ina olong, Olaitoriani ojo, nikimpot iyie nanu ijo, ‘Olpayian lai,’ nimikingil iyie ajo, ‘Baal ai.’" 
Hosea2:17 Amu kaiwuang'ie nanu nkarn e Baal te nkutuk enye, nemeigili ae kata aaipot ninche katukul." 
Hosea2:18 Naa kaaitobiraki nanu iyie osotua te ina olong te nebo ing'uesi e ntim, o ntaritik o loing'ang'e o ng'uesi naaiserpepiari te nkop; naiwuang'ie nanu enkawuo, o lalem, o larrabal tena kop; naaisho nanu iyie irraga te seriani." 
Hosea2:19 Naa kaasiraki nanu iyie kewan ntarasi; kaasiraki nanu iyie kewan ai te supatisho o te sipata, te nyorrata nauno o to lng'ur." 
Hosea2:20 Kaasiraki nanu iyie kewan ai te nkitisipata; naa eyiolou iyie Olaitoriani. 
Hosea2:21 Naa ore kenya te ina olong, Olaitoriani ojo, kawaliki nanu keper newaliki sii ninche enkop;" 
Hosea2:22 newaliki sii ninye enkop ilpaek o sabibu o eilata, naa kewaliki sii ninche Yesreel;" 
Hosea2:23 naa kaun nanu ninye, aunoki kewan ti atua ena kop. Naa kaing'urrie nanu ilo leitu eing'urrieki, naa kajoki nanu lelo leme iltung'ana laainei, ‘Irara intae iltung'ana laainei,’ nejo ninye, ‘Ira iyie Enkai ai.’ ”" 
Hosea3:1 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Nyaaki shomo tonyorra ina kitok nanyor osintani lenye, naa enaibor onyek, tonyorra anaa enanyor Olaitoriani iltung'ana le Israel, hoo neibelekenyakino ninche kulie aitin nenyorru imukateni o sabibu naatoito.”" 
Hosea3:2 Neaku ainyang'ua nanu ninye te shekeli tomon o imiet e nkosholai o ntemet nabo e shairi olpisiai lo ntemet e shairi. 
Hosea3:3 Najoki nanu ninye, “Meeta nchere pee mibik ira enaai too nkolong'i kumok; mintoki aiborrie onyek, aashu iaku ene likae lee; neijia sii nanu atiu te iyie.”" 
Hosea3:4 Amu kebik nkera oo Israeli nkolong'i kumok meeta olaiguanani aashu olkitok, meeta olasar aashu eng'ape, meeta enkila o lgoo aashu enkitanyaanyukoto." 
Hosea3:5 Ore te siadi nerrinyunye nkera e Israel neing'oru Olaitoriani Enkai enye, o Daudi olaiguanani lenye; naa kepuonu ninche te nkuretisho enetii Olaitoriani o esupatisho enye too nkolong'i e siadi." 
Hosea4:1 Entoning ororei lo Laitoriani lo tung'ana le Israel; amu eeta Olaitoriani olarrabal too ltung'ana lena kop. Metii esipata aashu esupatisho, nemetii eyiolounoto e Nkai ena kop." 
Hosea4:2 Etii enkinosata o lmumai, o elejare, o esesekuanare, o empurrorre, o eloloito; elang'u ninche ilpolosien pooki neitusuj iloikop iloikop." 
Hosea4:3 Ore enkaraki ina neishir enkop, ore pooki ootii atua neye, o ng'uesi e ong'ata sii, o ntaritik o loing'ang'e ore sii isinkir le naiposha neiwuang'ieki." 
Hosea4:4 Ore ake eyia mincho hoo ng'ae ekesha, nimincho hoo ng'ae eitang'orisho amu iyie etii enkesha ai, lo apolosak." 
Hosea4:5 Irrorrorro intae dama, nerrorro sii oloiboni te nebo intae kewarie, naa kaar nanu ng'utunyi." 
Hosea4:6 Eidaikieki iltung'ana laainei te nkaraki emodai nemeeta eng'eno enkaraki nitanyaita intae eng'eno, aatanya nanu iyie pee miaku olapolosani te nanu. Naa ore anaa enikitorikine enkitanapata e Nkai ino madamu sii nanu inkera inono." 
Hosea4:7 Ore anaa enatoponari, neponari aas ing'ok ti alo nanu; kaibelekeny nanu enkisisa enye metaa enkurruna." 
Hosea4:8 Eitoti ninche ate too ng'ok oo ltung'ana laainei; neeta ninche olorok too ntorrok enye. 
Hosea4:9 Naa ketiu ake anaa enatiu too ltung'ana, to lapolosani, kaitame nanu ninche te nkaraki nkoitoi enye, naitalaku te ninche nkiaasin enye." 
Hosea4:10 Kedaa ninche nemeraposho; neiborrie ninche onyek, kake meponari; amu etung'uaitie ninche Olaitoriani ejo pee eitumurru eloloito." 
Hosea4:11 Ore enaisho musana o eng'ejuk, neoru iltung'ana ndamunot." 
Hosea4:12 Entoki e nchani eikilikuanishore iltung'ana laainei, neisho eng'udi oo nkitanapat. Amu eitapong'oyie ninche oltau le nkiborra oo nkonyek, neitung'uaitie ninche Enkai enye aapuo aaiborrie onyek." 
Hosea4:13 Eitayu ninche ilassarri too nchumat oo ldoinyo, neitobir nkishorot too nchumat oo ldoinyo ti abori ilkeek sapuki amu eisidan iloipi lenye. Neaku keibor onyek ntoyie inono, ore siankikin inono naayama neloloito." 
Hosea4:14 Maitame nanu ntoyie inyi te nkiborra enye oo nkonyek, aashu nena siankikin inono naayama te neloloito; amu ore lelo lewa maate nepudariyie nkituaak naaibor onyek neitayu ilasarri te nebo nkituaak naibor onyek naa kepuonu olorere le meeta eyiolounoto aaidak." 
Hosea4:15 Ore hoo nikimbor onyek, iyie Israel, mincho Yuda etiu neijia. Mijing atua Gilgal, nimilep alo Bet-afen, niminya olmumai ajo, “Anaa enaishu Olaitoriani.”" 
Hosea4:16 Ore anaa enkashe nape, kepe Siraeli; keidim taata Olaitoriani aitotio ninche anaa olkuo le ker to lokeri o lala?" 
Hosea4:17 Eibung'are Efraim inkitanyaanyukot, talama ninye." 
Hosea4:18 Olturur loo lamerak, eishooitie ate te nkiborra oo nkonyek; kenyor ninche enkurruna alang enanyor enkitoo enye." 
Hosea4:19 Etununukoyie ninye osiwuo too naipuko enyena, naa kekurru ninche te nkaraki ilperereni lenye loo lasarri." 
Hosea5:1 Entoning ena, intae ilapolosak! Enchoru enkiok, na aji e Israel! Toning'o na aji o laiguanani! Amu intae eipirta ena kiguana; amu itaa intae orreshet te Mispa o orreshet ooisalaashakaki Tabor." 
Hosea5:2 Neituguto ninche engumoto e Shitim, kake kaitame nanu ninche pooki." 
Hosea5:3 Ayiolo nanu Efraim, neitu eisudori Israel te nanu, amu ore taata Efraim, nimborrie iyie onyek, neidurukie Israel."
