Hosea5:4 Meisho ninche nkiasin enye errinyokino Enkai enye. Amu etii oltau le nkibor oo nkonyek atua ninche, nemeyiolo ninche Olaitoriani." 
Hosea5:5 Ore olwuasa le Israel neishakenu enkomom enye; kelo Efraim arrorro te ntorroni enye; kerrorro sii Yuda te nebo ninche. 
Hosea5:6 Kepuo ninche te nebo iluaat enye oo nchoo o noo nkerrai, aaing'oru Olaitoriani, kake metum ninye, etung'uayie ninye ninche." 
Hosea5:7 Eitaasa ninche te nkeleekisho Olaitoriani; amu etoiutuo ninche nkera oo naataluno. Ore taata ele apa ng'ejuk kemut ninche te nebo o nkurman enye. 
Hosea5:8 Toosho emouo ti atua Gibea, toosho esekekua ti atua Rama, te Bet-afen; nkirikirayu iyie Benchamen!" 
Hosea5:9 Keaku Efraim olmuate te ina olong e nkitamioto; ti atua lelo oshon le Israel aibalunye nanu ina nasipa. 
Hosea5:10 Etotiutuo ilkituaak le Yuda anaa iltung'ana ooiwuang'ie ilpolosien; ore shumata ninche, kabukoki nanu ninche engoro ai anaa enkare." 
Hosea5:11 Eibookoki Efraim enkop, neidimuaki te nkiguana, enkaraki nateenikine ninye asujaa entoki nemeetae olng'am." 
Hosea5:12 Ore enkaraki ina, atotiuo nanu anaa olasai to Efraim natiu anaa oltiapurusi te nkaji e Yuda." 
Hosea5:13 Ore pee edol Efraim emueyian enye nedol Yuda olbae lenye, neitoki Efraim alo Asiria, neirriwaki olkilikuai ilo aiguanani kitok; kake mikindim ninye atabaa iyie aashu aishiunye olbae lino." 
Hosea5:14 Amu katiu nanu anaa olng'atuny te Efraim, natiu anaa olng'atuny oti te nkaji e Yuda. Amu nanu, ee nanu, opolos nalo aing'uaa nanu aya, nemeetae olokordu." 
Hosea5:15 Naa kaitoki nanu arrinyokino ewueji ai, o metaba anaa neirridu entorroni enye neing'oru enkomom ai, naa ore ti atua osina lenye naaing'oru ninche nanu, ejo," 
Hosea6:1 “Wootu, matorrinyokinoto Olaitoriani; amu etopolosa pee etum aishiunye iyiook; etoosho ninye naa kelo aen iyiook." 
Hosea6:2 Ore te siadi nkolong'i are neitopiu ninye iyiook; ore te nkolong e uni nedumu ninye iyiook maitasheito, pee kitum aataa aikinchu te dukuya ninye." 
Hosea6:3 Matayiolo iyiook, matonyok aapuo dukuya, aayiolou Olaitoriani; Ore elotunoto enye, esipa kelotu ninye anaa enkakenya anaa enchan o loirujuruj naitashal enkop.”" 
Hosea6:4 Kaa nanu aaitaas iyie Efraim? Kaa nanu aaitaas iyie Yuda? Etiu enyorrata ino anaa enkatampoi o sina, anaa enkoileelio nasiooyo aishunye." 
Hosea6:5 Ore enkaraki ina atudung'udung'o nanu ninche too loibonok laainei, atara nanu ninche metuata too rorei le nkutuk ai, naa keipang'aki ninche enkiguana ai anaa ewang'an." 
Hosea6:6 Amu enyorrata nauno nanu ayieu, mme olasar, eyiolounoto e Nkai alang nkishorunot." 
Hosea6:7 Kake ore te Adam netigila ninche olning'o; ore teine naaitaasa ninche nanu te nkeleekisho. 
Hosea6:8 Ore Gilead naa enkanasa oo larruok, naitunyokino osarge." 
Hosea6:9 Ore anaa enairrag ilapurrok aanyu oltung'ani, neijia eikununo ilapolosak eibung'ate te nebo; neitayu iloikop te nkoitoi e Shekem, ee, neas mbaa torrok oleng." 
Hosea6:10 Ore ti atua enkaji e Israel atoduaa nanu embae busus oleng; ine etii eloloito e Efraim, neidurukie Israeli." 
Hosea6:11 Ore sii ti alo iyie Yuda, kitegelakaki enkisampuare Ina kata te narrinyu nanu lelo tung'ana laainei te sinkaisho." 
Hosea7:1 Te najo nanu aishiunye Israel, neibalunyeki entorroni e Efraim, o nkiasin torrok e Samaria; amu te ntorroni easisho ninche, egil olapurroni inkajijik, ore laisimak neisimisho ti ong'ata." 
Hosea7:2 Kake mejo ninche nchere kadamu nanu esiaai enye pooki torrono. Etang'adutua nkiasin enye ninche, etii dukuya enkomom ai." 
Hosea7:3 Ore te ntorroni enye neiting'ie olaiguanani, o lkitok le lejare enye." 
Hosea7:4 Keibor onyek ninche pooki; eikununo ninche anaa ewueji nepejieki imukateni nainuaaki, ore ilo oasishore nepal eitu ekut ebaiki ina kata naipurji o metabaiki ina kata naisuijieki." 
Hosea7:5 Ore teina olong o laiguanani lang etamueita lelo kituaak te mpijan e naisho; neitorioo ninye enkaina enye te nebo lelo torrok. 
Hosea7:6 Amu ore anaa enatiu ewueji nepejieki imukateni, neijia eikununo iltauja lenye eyupuyup erreshisho; ore kewarie pooki etiu engoro enye anaa olang'at ore tadekenya neyupuyup anaa ilng'ejepa le nkima." 
Hosea7:7 Ore ninche pooki naa keirowua anaa olkokuet, nemut ninche ilaitoriak lenye. Ore ilaiguanak lenye pooki netabatatate nemeetae hoo obo lenye laaipot nanu." 
Hosea7:8 Eitushulaka Efraim kewan iloreren; ore Efraim naa emukate neitu eibelekenyi. 
Hosea7:9 Einosa iltung'ana loo loreren eng'olon enye, nemeyiolo ninye; eisuaaki ilpapit ooibor shumata ninye, nemeyiolo ninye." 
Hosea7:10 Ore olwuasa le Israel neishakenoki te dukuya ninye; ore eyia merrinyokino ninche Olaitoriani Enkai enye, are ake eing'oru ninye te kuna pooki." 
Hosea7:11 Eikununo Efraim anaa enturkulu namoda nemeeta endamunoto naipotu Misiri, neloito Asiria." 
Hosea7:12 Naitadou ninche anaa ntaritik o loing'ang'e naitame ninche too nkiasin enye torrok. 
Hosea7:13 Woi ninche, amu aashomo aaing'uaa nanu! Enkidaata te ninche, amu aatogolong'akitia ninche! Anaata naaji akordu ninche, kake kelejisho ninche tiaalo nanu." 
Hosea7:14 Maaishiraki ninche nanu too ltauja, kake keyietu ninche aaishir too ndapashi enye; ore te nkaraki enkurma o enaisho nedung ate, naagolong'aki ninche aapaashare nanu." 
Hosea7:15 Ore hoo naitaarriyiana naitagol nanu inkaik enye, entorroni aaipiraki ninche nanu." 
Hosea7:16 Eibelekenyakinote ninche Baal; etotiutuo ninche anaa enkawuo nemeisiligayu, ore lelo kituaak lenye, naa kepuo aabatata to lalem te nkaraki ina keilasilas ilng'ejepa lenye. Keaku te ninche ena embae e nakueniyieki te nkop e Misiri." 
Hosea8:1 Tipika entarumpeta enkutuk ino pee iosh, amu eewuo olkurragos shumata enkaji o Laitoriani, enkaraki natigila ninche olmumai lai, negil nkitanapat aainei." 
Hosea8:2 Nanu eishiraki ninche aajo, Enkai ai, kiyiolo iyiook Israel iyie." 
Hosea8:3 Etanya Israel ina sidai; kelo olmang'atinta asujaa ninche. 
Hosea8:4 Kegelu ninche laiguanak, kake mme nanu eikilikuan. Negelu iltung'ana kituaak, kake metii eyiolounoto ai. Ore te nkosholai enye o sahabu neitobir ninche nkitanyaanyukot te nkidaata enye maate." 
Hosea8:5 Atanya nanu ilo ashe lino, iyie Samaria. Eyupuyup engoro ai tiaalo ninche. Ketoni kenya o anu, pee esinyayu ninche ti alo Israel?" 
Hosea8:6 Olaitobirani oitayio, mme Enkai. Ore ilo ashe le Samaria, kepuoi aabel metaa imbelibelat." 
Hosea8:7 Amu etuuno ninche enkijape, naa kepuo ninche aaisampu olkutati." 
Hosea8:8 Etoijoyioki Israel, eidipa aatotiu ti atua iloreren anaa emasaai nemeeta." 
Hosea8:9 Amu eilepa ninche aapuo Asiria eikununo anaa osikiria li ong'ata olimana openy; einyang'ua Efraim isintan. 
Hosea8:10 Ore hoo neinyang'ua ninche iltung'ana leeiking'a ti atua iloreren, kaiturrur nanu ninche asioki. Naa keitirring'a ninche te nkiti kata eitu eitoki aaput olaiguanani o ilkituaak." 
Hosea8:11 Enkaraki natoponayie Efraim ilperereni lo lasarri le asata oo ng'ok, etaa lelo asarri ing'ok te ninye." 
Hosea8:12 Tenaa naaji ninye kaigeroki nanu ninye nkitanapat aainei naa nkalifuni tomon, keitaae ake entoki ng'ejuk nemeyioloi." 
Hosea8:13 Kenyor ninche olasar; neitayu ninche olasar loo nkiri neinos; kake meshipakino Olaitoriani ninche. Ore taata kedamu ninye entorroni enye neitame ing'ok enye; kerrinyo ninche aapuo Misiri. 
Hosea8:14 Amu etorikine Israel ilo oitobira ninye neshet inkajijik e nkitoo; netoponayie Yuda inkang'itie naagol; kake kairriwaa nanu enkima shumata nena anas enyena. Nemut isempewueti lenyena pooki. 
Hosea9:1 Ming'ida iyie Israel! Nimishipa te ng'ida anaa loreren; amu imborrie iyie onyek, ning'uaa Enkai ino. Itonyorra iyie olekoisiaayio le nkiborra oo nkonyek too wuejitin pooki neeiutuutishoreki." 
Hosea9:2 Ore eneituutishoreki o eneironyieki ilng'anayio meitoti ninche. 
Hosea9:3 Nebatat ninche enaisho ng'ejuk. Nebik ninche tiaatua ina kop o Laitoriani; kake kerrinyo Efraim alo Misiri, nepuo ninche aainos endaa nemesinya te Asiria." 
Hosea9:4 Meigil ninche aabukoki Olaitoriani ilasarri ooki le naisho oo sabibu; nemeitiship ninye too lasarri lenye. Ore imukateni enye naa ketiu anaa imukateni o lkiyioi; ore naa pooki oinos ninche neisarkioneki amu ore imukateni enye naa keaku inesumash enye ake; meyauni atua enkaji o Laitoriani. 
Hosea9:5 Kaa kenya iasiasa teina olong o sirua, o teina olong o sirua lo Laitoriani?" 
Hosea9:6 Amu ng'ura kepuo Asiria; keiturrur Misiri ninche; nenukaa Memfis ninche. Nebulaki endiati nena masaa enye sidain e nkosholai; nejing ilkiku atua ilng'oborri lenye. 
Hosea9:7 Eetuo nkolong'i enkitamioto, eetuo nkolong'i e nkitalaata; naa keyiolou Israel ina. Kemoda ilo oiboni, ore ilo tung'ani le nkiyang'et neeta oloirirua, te nkaraki ina arruoisho ino kitok o enkiba kitok." 
Hosea9:8 Ore ilo oiboni, naa olarriponi le Efraim, lelo tung'ana le Nkai ai, ore eyia netii orreshet laaijo olo larreshoni loo ntaritik inkoitoi enyena pooki, netii enkiba atua enkaji e Nkai enye." 
Hosea9:9 Neisarkionie ninche ate oleng anaa too nkolong'i e Gibea: keyooki ninye adamu entorroni enye nelo aitame ingok enye. 
Hosea9:10 Anoto apa Israel eikununo anaa isabibu ti ong'ata. Nadol iloo papaai linyi eikununo anaa ilng'anayio lo lng'aboli le nkiterata. Kake eetuo apa ninche enetii Baal-peor, neitisinyaki ate Baal, neaku ninche enkitagoroto anaa nena tokitin naatonyorra ninche." 
Hosea9:11 Ore ina kitoo e Efraim naa kelo aaing'uaa ninye anaa entaritiki meitoki atii eishoi, nemetii enutai, nemetii enkibung'aroto." 
Hosea9:12 Ore ninye te neitubulu ninche nkera, naoru nanu ninche o metaba anaa metii enaleku. Woi ninche te nalo nanu aing'uaa ninche!" 
Hosea9:13 Ore ilayiok le Efraim anaa enatoduaa nanu, nepuoito enkidaata; meeta nchere merik Efraim ilayiok lenyena enepuoi aar metuata." 
Hosea9:14 Nchoo ninche iyie Olaitoriani, kainyoo incho iyie? Nchoo ninche olkibiroto le ng'uset o lki oo toito." 
Hosea9:15 Ore pooki arruoisho enye netii Gilgal; teine apa nanu atang'asa aibayu ninche. Ore te nkaraki entorroni oo nkiasin enye aaraa ninche aaitung'uaa enkaji ai. Maigil nanu anyorru ninche; ore lelo kituaak lenye pooki naa larruok. 
Hosea9:16 Etooshoki Efraim, etoito ntona enye, meitoki aaiu ilng'anayio. Ore hoo duoo ninye neisho ninche, kaar nanu metuata nena kera enye kiroteti." 
Hosea9:17 Keiturraa Enkai ai ninche, ore enkaraki neitu ening ninche ninye; keaku ninche ilapuayak ti atua iloreren." 
Hosea10:1 Olchani loo sabibu Israel oiu ilng'anayio lenyena. Ore anaa enaponari ilng'anayio lenyena neponaa ashet ilperereni loo lasarri kumok; ore anaa enaponari enkop enye asidanu, neponaa ing'apeta enyena." 
Hosea10:2 Etelejishote iltauja lenye; meeta taata nchere meitalaki entorroni enye. Kegil Olaitoriani lelo perereni lenye loo lasarri, neparripar nena ng'apeta enye." 
Hosea10:3 Amu kepuo taata ninche aajo: “Mikiaata iyiook olaiguanani, amu mikiure iyiook Olaitoriani, amaa olaiguanani, kaa eidim ninye aitaasa iyiook?”" 
Hosea10:4 Eiro ninche irorei le pesho; ore too lmuma le lejare keitayu osotua; nebulu nkiguanat enye anaa sayieti naabulu too nkong'at e nkurma. 
Hosea10:5 Keikirikira lelo oomanya Samaria te nkuretisho, te nkaraki ilo ashe le Babel. Keishiraki iltung'ana lenyena ninye, ore lelo apolosak lenyena ooserem nkitanyaanyukot neyietu aaishiraki ninye, teina kitoo enye nashomo aing'uaa ninye." 
Hosea10:6 Ee kenapi ina toki kewan aaya Asiria, pee eaku enkishooroto te ilo aiguanani kitok. Keitukurruni Efraim, nekurru sii Israel te nkaraki enkitanyaanyukoto enye." 
Hosea10:7 Ore ilo aiguanani le Samaria naa kelo aidaaya, anaa olaburra ti oriong enkare." 
Hosea10:8 Ore nena wuejitin e shumata e Afen, ina ng'oki e Israel, naa keidaikieki. Kebulu ilkiku o laimerrerruani te nchumata lelo perereni lenye loo lasarri; naa kepuo ninche aajoki ildoinyo, Entemoi iyiook, nejoki indoinyo, enturokinoto iyiook." 
Hosea10:9 Ore apa ebaiki nkolong'i e Gibea itaasa eng'oki, iyie Israel; ore teine neshomo ninche aas ing'ok. Ae meinepu ninche olarrabal te Gibea?" 
Hosea10:10 Kalotu nanu aarare kulo tung'ana aing'okok pee aitame ninche, naa keiturrurro iloshon aarare ninche, neitame ninche te nkaraki ina ng'oki enye natatashe." 
Hosea10:11 Ore Efraim enkashe apa naitamooki, nanyor aidong'o entapa. Naitajeuo apa nanu ina murt enye sidai, kake kalo nanu apik Efraim enchata emurt meeta nchere pee meturisho Yuda, meeta nchere meitupuyiapui Yakobo enkulukuoni makewan." 
Hosea10:12 Entuunoki ate esupatisho, nisampumpu ilng'anayio le nyorrata nauno; entutur ina kulukuoni inyi nayeng'iyeng'ieki amu etabaua enkata naing'orunyeki Olaitoriani, pee etum ninye aeu aitashaiki enjeunoto shumata intae." 
Hosea10:13 Ituuno apa intae entorroni, nisampupu enkarruoisho, inosa intae ilng'anayio le lejare. Amu isiliga apa intae ngarrin inyi o larrabal o ina siamo oo lmurran linyi." 
Hosea10:14 Ore enkaraki ina kejing olarrabal atua iltung'ana linono, ore lelo sempewueti linono neidaikieki, anaa apa enaidaikie Shalaman Bet-arbelon teina olong o larrabal; nedung'udung'i nkera o noo ng'otonye." 
Hosea10:15 Ena ninye eyookini aaitaas intae, iyie na aji e Israel, te nkaraki ina torroni ino kitok. Ore enasirie neishieki ilo aiguanani le Israel katukul." 
Hosea11:1 Ore apa aa enkerai Israel atonyorra nanu ninye, ore te Misiri naipotuo nanu enkerai ai." 
Hosea11:2 Ore anaa enaipotu nanu ninche, naapuo ninche aaing'uaa nanu; netotoni ninche epolosaki Baal, nepejoki nkitanyaanyukot enkorropil." 
Hosea11:3 Ore eyia nanu apa oitamoo Efraim meshomo, atudumua nanu ninche too nkaik aainei; Kake eitu ninche eyiolou nchere aishiunye nanu ninche." 
Hosea11:4 Atorikoyie nanu ninche too nkeenta o lng'ur, too enat e nyorrata, natiu nanu te ninche anaa ilo oitololong enchata too iltagiligil lenye too murto enye, nairrugokino nanu ninche naitoti ninche." 
Hosea11:5 Kerrinyo ninche aapuo enkop e Misiri, naa kelo Asiria aaku olaiguanani lenye, enkaraki natanyaita ninche aarrinyokino nanu." 
Hosea11:6 Olalem olo ashurt nena anas enye, neidaikie ninche tiatua nena wuejitin enye neegol." 
Hosea11:7 Eteenikinote iltung'ana laainei enkibelekenyakinoto pee aapuo aaing'uaa nanu; neaku etegelakaki ninche enchata e murt nemeetae ololaku. 
Hosea11:8 Kaji nanu aiko te naitarasaa intae; iyie Efraim? Kaji nanu aiko te naitarasaa intae; iyie Israel! Kaji nanu aiko te naitanyaanyukie intae Adama! Kaji nanu aiko te naitaas intae anaa Seboim! Eibelekenye oltau lai ti atua nanu, eirowuaja olng'ur lai neborru." 
Hosea11:9 Maasishore nanu engoro ai napi, maigil nanu aidaikie Efraim amu ara nanu Enkai mara oltung'ani Ilo Sinyati otii atua intae, nemalotu nanu aidaikie." 
Hosea11:10 Kepuo ninche aasujaa Olaitoriani, naa keikurrukur ninye anaa olng'atuny, ee keikurrukur, ore layiok lenyena nepuonu eikirikira eing'uaa enkalo o loo ntoluo." 
Hosea11:11 Nepuonu ninche eikirikira anaa ntaritik naaing'uaa Misiri, o anaa nturkuluni eing'uaa enkop e Asiria; naa karriny nanu ninche meshomo inkang'itie enye, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Hosea11:12 Aatang'adua nanu Efraim te lejare, naang'adu enkaji e Israel too monko; kake eton eyioloi Yuda te Nkai, naa keisiligayu ninye te ilo Osinya." 
Hosea12:1 Osiwuo eirrita Efraim, nemirare ninye olkutati lo loosaen endama pooki; neponaa ninche elejare o larrabal; nening'ore ninche te nkinyang'a enkop e Asiria, nenapi eilata aaya Misiri." 
Hosea12:2 Eeta Olaitoriani enaikilikuanu tiaalo Yuda, naa kelo aitame Yakobo te risioroto oo iasat enyena, neitalak ninye te risioroto oo nkiaasin enyena." 
Hosea12:3 Ore ti atua enkoshoke e ng'otonye neibung ninye olalashe lenye entutunyo, o e etaa oltung'ani kitok nekeshare Enkai." 
Hosea12:4 Etekeshare ninye olmalaika neisulu, eishira ninye neing'oru omom enye. Enotore ninye Enkai te Betel, neirorie ninye Enkai teine." 
Hosea12:5 Olaitoriani Enkai oo lororani, Olaitoriani ninye enkarna enye:" 
Hosea12:6 “Neaku ore iyie te retoto e Nkai ino, tushukunye, mbung'a enyorrata o esipata tukurraki nibik aanyu Enkai ino.”" 
Hosea12:7 Olbiasharai oata entemet e lejare te nkaina enye. 
Hosea12:8 Eji etejo Efraim, “Ee kara nanu karsis, anotoko kewan imasaa.” Kake ore ina arsisisho enye, nemeiwuang'ie enkarruoisho oo ng'ok enyena." 
Hosea12:9 Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino aitupukuo apa intae te nkop e Misiri; naa kaigil areu intae entobik too lng'oborri; anaa apa too nkolong'i o sirua otegeluaki. 
Hosea12:10 Airorie apa nanu iloibonok; nanu apa ilo otoponayie induaat, ore too loibonok naishoru nkitanyaanyukot." 
Hosea12:11 Tenaa ketii entorroni Gilead meeta nchere pee mepuonu ninche aaku pesho; Tenaa kepolosi iloing'ok te Gilead, ore lelo perereni lenye naa kepuo aatiu anaa sotot loo soito too nong'ot e nkurma." 
Hosea12:12 (Eisikaka apa Yakobo enkop e Aram, ore teine neisiaisho Israel te nkaraki enkitok, naa ore te nkaraki enkitok neirrita nkerra.)" 
Hosea12:13 To loiboni le Nkai eilepunye Olaitoriani Israel aitung'uaa Misiri; naa to loiboni le Nkai eitagolieki ninye. 
Hosea12:14 Eyaua Efraim embae naitagorisho oleng; neaku ore Olaitoriani lenye, keing'uaa ina kitarrurroto o sarge te shumata ninye, nerrinyoki ninye ina kurruna enye." 
Hosea13:1 Teneiro apa Efraim, neikirikira iltung'ana; eilepieki apa ninye tiatua Israel; kake etaasa ninye entorroni te Baal neye." 
Hosea13:2 Ore taata neponaa ninche aas ing'ok, neitobiraki ate nkitanyaanyukot naasholuni, o nkitanyaanyukot naaitayuni te nkarriyiano te nkosholai enye, ore ninche pooki naa esiaai oo ltung'ana arriyiak. Nejo, “Entopolosaki kuna. Neng'utut iltung'ana ilasho.”" 
Hosea13:3 Ore enkaraki ina ketiu ninche anaa enkinuku e nkakenya, arashu anaa enkoileelio nayooki aishunye, anaa suut naakutaa osiwuo te wueji neidong'ishoreki arashu anaa empuruo naipang'u te lusie." 
Hosea13:4 Ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino ore apa te nkop e Misiri; miyiolo ae Ai neme nanu, nemetii likae aitajeunoni leme nanu." 
Hosea13:5 Nanu apa ilo laatayiolo ti ong'ata, tiatua ina kop o lpurkel;" 
Hosea13:6 kake ore apa pee edaa ninche aaraposho, neiputakino ninche, ore iltauja lenye nedumunye; neaku aatorikinote ninche nanu." 
Hosea13:7 Ore enkaraki ina katiu nanu te ninche anaa olng'atuny, karresh ninche te mbata e nkoitoi anaa olowuaru keri." 
Hosea13:8 Kadoiki nanu ninche anaa olng'arurumi otooruoki nkera enyena, kapolos nanu olgoo lenye, ore teine naidaikie nanu ninche anaa olng'atuny, anaa enaiko enkukuu." 
Hosea13:9 Kaidaikie nanu intae, Israel; kaing'ae oidim atareto intae?" 
Hosea13:10 Koree taata olaiguanani lino pee kintajeu; koree lelo kituaak linono pooki pee kimitu lelo apa litejo iyie, “Inchooki nanu olaiguanani o ilkituaak?”" 
Hosea13:11 Aaishoo nanu iyie olaiguanani te ngoro, naiwuang'ie ninche te ngoro ai." 
Hosea13:12 Ore enkarruoisho e Efraim netirridaki, ore eng'oki enye netushumaki te mpere." 
Hosea13:13 Etabawua emion esaisai te nkaraki ninye, kake olayioni omoda ninye, amu ore o taata melotu ninye aimu eng'uset e ishoi." 
Hosea13:14 Kakordu nanu ninche te ng'olon e nemeneng'a? Kainyang'u nanu ninche aitung'uaa keeya? Nakeeya, koree ilmeita linono? Nemeneng'a koree enkidaata ino? Eiwuang'ieki olng'ur too nkonyek aainei." 
Hosea13:15 Ore hoo duoo ninye tenaa kebul ninye anaa oseyiai kelotu olkutati oing'uaa enkilepunoto e nkolong, kelotu olkutati lo Laitoriani, ailepu eing'uaa olpurkel; ore inkonyek enyena oo nkariak netoyu, ore nchorroi enyena neishieki; neishie ilo kutati olchumati lenye te pooki toki e tipat." 
Hosea13:16 Kelo Samaria anap enkitarruoroto enye, enkaraki natogolong'aka ninye Enkai enye; kepuo ninche aabatata to lalem, ore nkera enye kutiti neitaa ndung'udung'ot, ore nkituaak naanuta, nebuli nkoishuaa." 
Hosea14:1 Tushukunye iyie Israel, torrinyokinoyu Olaitoriani Enkai ino amu itarrorre iyie te nkaraki enkarruoisho ino." 
Hosea14:2 Shomo iata rorei nirrinyokino Olaitoriani; tiaaki ninye, “Iwuang'ie enkarruoisho pooki; tang'amai ina sidai naa ekinchoru iyiook ilng'anayio loo nkutukie ang." 
Hosea14:3 Meitajeu iyiook Asiria, mikipuo iyiook aaked mbartan; nimiking'il ae kata aajo, ‘Enkai ang, too siaaitin oo nkaik ang. Ti atua iyie etum enkerai okishi olng'ur.’ ”" 
Hosea14:4 Kaishiunye nanu ina golong'akinoto enye; kanyorru nanu ninche to ltau lai, amu eibelekenye engoro ai aing'uaa ninche." 
Hosea14:5 Katiu nanu anaa enkoileelio te Israel; naitupuku ninye anaa entapukai, naa keibung ntona anaa olchani onyaanyukie olchartuyian," 
Hosea14:6 neisuaa ilng'osil lenyena; netiu esidano enye anaa oloirien, ore erropili enye netiu anaa iltarakua ootii Lebanon." 
Hosea14:7 Kerrinyunye ninche nepuonu aamany abori oloip lai, naa kebul ninche anaa enkurma nebul anaa osabibu, nepuo ninche aaning'oyu anaa enaisho e Lebanon." 
Hosea14:8 Oo Efraim kaa nanu aporokinore nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin? Nanu doi ilo likiwaliki nikigolie iyie. Atiu nanu anaa olchani onyori, onyaanyukie oltarakuai, nanu eing'uaa ilng'anayio linono." 
Hosea14:9 Ore ilo ora ng'en, nchoo eyiolou kuna baa; ore ilo ojurrisho, nchoo eyiolou ninche; amu keitoriori nkoitoi o Laitoriani, ore ilasipak neim ninche, kake kerrorro ilaitarruorok te ninche." 
Joel1:1 Ororei lo Laitoriani ele oirriwaka Yoel olayioni le Petuel. 
Joel1:2 Entoning ena intae iltung'ana moruak, nining'ining'i intae iloomanya ena kop! Ketaase aekata embae naikununo nji too nkolong'i inyi, anaa too nkolong'i oo loo papaai linyi?" 
Joel1:3 Entoliki nkera inyi, naa nchoo nkera inyi metoliki nkera enye, neliki nkera enye eishoi enye." 
Joel1:4 Ore entoki naleku ilo maati o dung'isho, neinos ina mus oo lmaat. Ore entoki naleku ina mus oo lmaat, neinos olmaati le mpukunoto oo ntargeet ore entoki naleku ilo maati le mpukunoto oo ntargeet neinos ilo maati le nkidaata." 
Joel1:5 Enyeito intae ilamerak; enchira intae ilaokok le naisho, te nkaraki ina aisho namelok, amu eiwuang'ieki aaitung'uaa nkutukie inyi." 
Joel1:6 Amu eewuo olosho agilunore enkop ai, negol nemeikenayu te nkumoi; netiu ilala lenyena anaa ilala lo lng'atuny, neeta iltagiligil le lipong o lng'atuny." 
Joel1:7 Eitomijoono ninche ilkeek laainei loo sabibu, neidaikie ninche ilng'abolo laainei, etikinyutua ninche nkabobok enye nenang'aki enkop; eiborrieki ilng'osil lenye." 
Joel1:8 Nchira anaa esila naishopokoki ilkuniyiani, eishiraki keeya eilo ojo pee eyam ninye." 
Joel1:9 Ore olasar lenye le ntapa o lasar lenye ooki neiwuang'ieki, te nkaji o Laitoriani. Eishira ilapolosak, lelo aisiaayiak lo Laitoriani." 
Joel1:10 Eitomijoonoki nkong'at, neishir enkop; enkaraki naidaikieki entapa, etoito isabibu neishunye eilata." 
Joel1:11 Esinanuoto intae ilaturok le nkop, enchira intae iloota nkurman oo sabibu, enchiraki enkano o shairi amu eidaayie enkisampuare e nkurma." 
Joel1:12 Etoyio olchani loo sabibu, netoyio olng'aboli, ore kukumanka, o ltukai, o lchani loo lng'anayio, netoito pooki. Neiting'o enchipai too nkera e tung'ana." 
Joel1:13 Enchopo ilkuniyiani, niyietutu aaishir intae ilapolosak. Enteyieutu enchira intae ilaisiaayiak lo lperere lo lasar. Entijing'u intae, entotoni enkewarie, pooki nchopitoto ilkuniyiani, intae ilaisiaayiak le Nkai ai! Amu ore olasar le ntapa o lasar ooki, neiwuang'ieki te nkaji e Nkai inyi." 
Joel1:14 Entisinya eenata inyi e mpukoroto, empotu eumata nasinya enturrurro ilpayiani, o lelo pooki oomanya ina kop meetu enkaji o Laitoriani Enkai inyi; nipuonunu aaishiraki Olaitoriani." 
Joel1:15 Oi ina olong! Amu etataana ina olong o Laitoriani, nelotu anaa enkidaaroto naing'uaa ilo magilani." 
Joel1:16 Keitu eiwuang'ieki endaa aaitung'uaa te dukuya nkonyek ang, neiwuang'ieki eng'ida o enchipai te nkaji e Nkai ang?" 
Joel1:17 Etumutate ilanterera te nkop natoyio, netomijoonito nkajijik naashumishoreki einyalaki mpechen enkaraki nemeetae entapa." 
Joel1:18 Eng'ura eneba olkiyioi loo ng'uesi! Ore iluaat oo nchoo neidang'a enkaraki nemeetae ndaat oo nchoo tenkaraki ninche. Ore sii iluaat oo nkerrai neiputukunyo. 
Joel1:19 Aaishiraka nanu iyie Olaitoriani. Amu etumuta enkima ndaat e ong'ata, neinos olng'ejep le nkima ilkeek pooki liong'ata." 
Joel1:20 Eikinchiraki sii ninche ing'uesi e ntim, amu etoito nchorroi oo nkariak, netumuta enkima ndaat e ong'ata." 
Joel2:1 Entoosh entarumpeta te Sion; entoosh entadara teilo doinyo lai sinyati! Nchoo eikirikira lelo pooki oomanya ena kop, amu kelotu enkolong o Laitoriani etataana." 
Joel2:2 Enkolong e naimin o sina, enkolong oo nkatampo o enaimin nagut! Etotiuo anaa erokan eisalaashakino ildoinyo, olorere kitok ogol, eitu aekata etumi enanyaanyukie ninche ebaiki moitie, nemetumi aekata enanyaanyukie ena too larin loo ishoritin pooki." 
Joel2:3 Kemutisho enkima te dukuya ninche. Ore te siadi ninche neinosisho olang'at le nkima. Eikununo ina kop anaa enkurma e Eden te dukuya ninche, kake ore te siadi ninche naa ong'ata nememanya, nemeetae entoki naidim ailanya ninche." 
Joel2:4 Ore eliooto enye neikununo anaa mbartan, nekuet ninche anaa mbartan o larrabal." 
Joel2:5 Ore anaa elototo oo ng'arrin oo mbartan, neipid ninche too nchumat oo ldoinyo, anaa endarata enkima nainos isuut, anaa enjore nagol, natoluaakine olarrabal." 
Joel2:6 Ore te dukuya ninche neirut olorere, neipusita nkomomi enye." 
Joel2:7 Nerasaa ninche anaa ilmurran, neked isunta anaa sikarini, nepuo ninche dukuya oltung'ani ake te nkoitoi enye, meibelekenya ninche aapaash nkoitoi enye." 
Joel2:8 Meetae olorruesh olikae, enkoitoi enye ake eibung pooki lenye, epuo ninche eeta imasaa enye o larrabal, nemeibooroyu." 
Joel2:9 Neipid ninche te nchumata eina anasa, nekuet too nchumat oo sunta; neked nkajijik, neim ilusien anaa lapurrok." 
Joel2:10 Neikirikira enkop te dukuya ninche, neikirikira shumata. Neitomisimisi enkolong o lapa, neibooyo ilakir ewang'an enye." 
Joel2:11 Neitayu Olaitoriani oltoilo lenye, te dukuya enjore enye, amu aikitok oleng olorora lenye ore ilo olimu ororei lenye neeta engolon. Amu ore ina olong o Laitoriani naa kitok neitureisho oleng, aing'ae oidim ating'iria?" 
Joel2:12 “Ore ake sii o taata,” Olaitoriani ojo, “Torrinyunye wou enatii to ltau lino pooki, te enata e mpukoroto o te nkishirata o to sina." 
Joel2:13 Nipolososo iltauja linyi, mme ilkilani linyi.” Torrinyokinoyu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, amu aisupat ninye neeta olng'ur, mesioki agoro, neeta enyorrata nauno, neirridu entorroni." 
Joel2:14 Kalo oyiolo tenaa keibelekenya ninye neirridu, neing'uaa emayianata etulusoyie ninye, olasar le ntapa o lasar ooki, te nkaraki Olaitoriani Enkai ino." 
Joel2:15 Entoosh entarumpeta te Sion. Entisinya eenata e mpukoroto; empotu eumata nasinya; 
Joel2:16 enturrurro iltung'ana. Entisinya eumata; enturrurro ilpayiani; enturrurro nkera ometabaiki nkutiti naanakita. Nchoo oloyamisho eing'uaa olgilata lenye neing'uaa ina nayami olgilata lenye. 
Joel2:17 Ore te rishata enjing'et o lperere lo lasar, nchoo lapolosak lelo aisiaayiak lo Laitoriani eishir, nejo, “Teleku iltung'ana linono, Olaitoriani, nimintaa enjung'ore ino enkurruna, entoki naimakini tiatua iloreren. Kainyoo pee ejo ninche tiatua iloreren, ‘Koree Enkai enye?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Neitoki Olaitoriani atum olom tenkaraki enkop enye, neing'urrie iltung'ana lenyena." 
Joel2:19 Newal Olaitoriani nejoki iltung'ana lenyena, “Kairriwaki nanu intae entapa o enaisho oo sabibu, o eilata. Naa ipuopuo intae aaraposho; nemaigil aekata nanu aitaa intae enkurruna too loreren." 
Joel2:20 Kaiwuang'ie nanu ilo le moikuape aitung'uaa intae, nareu nanu ninye empusel mitil. Ore lelo lenye le lukunya nepuo enaiposha o loosaen, ore lelo le siadi nepuo atua enaiposha o loontoluo; ore olng'usil o eng'uan enye nedumunye, amu etaasa ninye mbaa sapuki." 
Joel2:21 Miureishoyu iyie na kop tishipayu iyie ning'ida, amu etaasa Olaitoriani mbaa sapuki." 
Joel2:22 Emiureishoyu intae ing'uesi e ong'ata, amu kenyori ndaat e ong'ata; eiu olchani ilng'anayio lenyena, neiu olng'aboli o sabibu ilng'anayio lenye te nkumoi." 
Joel2:23 Entishipata intae ilayiok le Sion, ning'idakinono Olaitoriani Enkai inyi; amu eitasiekuo ninye enchan tenkaraki intae. Eitashaikia ninye intae olari seur; eirriwua enchan naituruku o ene siadi anaa apake." 
Joel2:24 Keiput entapa ilkurrot ooidong'ishoreki, nedooyo enaisho oo sabibu o eilata too lbenia." 
Joel2:25 Kaarrinyoki nanu iyie, ilarin apa ooinosie emus olmaati enkop, o ntargeet, o enamutisho, o enadung'isho ina jore ai kitok nairriwua nanu atua intae." 
Joel2:26 Inos iyie endaa endaa sapuk nikiraposh, nilo aisis Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo laa ninye otaasa inenking'asia te nkaraki iyie. Maigil aekata aaitukurru iltung'ana laainei." 
Joel2:27 Iyiolouu intae nchere atii nanu atua Israel, naa nanu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi nemetii likae. Nemeigili aekata aaitukurru iltung'ana laainei." 
Joel2:28 Naa kepuonu nkolong'i te siadi ena, naa kabukoki nanu enkiyang'et ai pooki tung'ani; ore ilayiok linyi o ntoyie inyi neibonisho, ore ilpayiani linyi neidetidet ore ilbarnot linyi neidetidet nedol ilbarnot linyi nduaat." 
Joel2:29 Ore doi ninye isinkan linyi isinkan linyi lewa o sinkan inyi ng'orou, kenya te nena olong'i, naa kabukoki nanu enkiyang'et ai." 
Joel2:30 Naa kaishoru nanu nkikoot te keper o te nkop, osarge o enkima, o empuruo nairrusha." 
Joel2:31 Keitomisimisi enkolong, neitotiuni olapa anaa osarge, eng'or ina olong kitok o Laitoriani naitureisho." 
Joel2:32 Naa keaku ore pooki ng'ae oipot enkarna o Laitoriani, nekorduni. Amu ore to ldoinyo le Sion o te Yerusalem netii lelo oopuo aaimisho, anaa enatejo Olaitoriani; ore te lelo ooleku, ninche etii lelo ooipot Olaitoriani." 
Joel3:1 Ng'ura, ore kenya te nena olong'i, o teina kata, tenarrinyu nanu lelo ootarayioki le Yuda o le Yerusalem," 
Joel3:2 naa kaiturrur nanu iloreren pooki, nayau ninche aitadou oerata le Yehoshafat, naiguanare nanu ninche te nkaraki iltung'ana laainei o enjung'ore e Israel amu eidapashakaki apa ninche atua iloreren, netooro ninche enkop ai," 
Joel3:3 netooshokitio ninche iltung'ana laainei enkukuo, neishooyo ninche enkayioni aainosie emulayoi, nemir entito aainosie enaisho oo sabibu, netooko ninche ina aisho." 
Joel3:4 “Ira iyie nyoo te nanu iyie Turo o Sidon, o kulo kirinen le Filistia? Kaa toki kirrinyoki nanu alaaki? Tenaa eikilaaki iyie nanu, naitalaku nanu enkias ino te nchumata endukuya ino makewan, te wuapunoto o te nkisarrisar." 
Joel3:5 Amu iwa iyie enkosholai ai o sahabu ai, nitanapa iyie ilchumat laainei le karsisisho atua nkajijik oo nkaitin inyi." 
Joel3:6 Itimiraka iyie iltung'ana le Yuda o le Yerusalem Ilgiriki, niya ninche aitalamaa oleng to lpolosie lenye." 
Joel3:7 Kake ore taata kaputu nanu ninche teine wueji nitimiraka ninche, naitalaku nanu enkias ino te ndukuya ino makewan." 
Joel3:8 Kamir nanu ilayiok linono o ntoyie inono apik nkaik oo layiok le Yuda, naa kepuo ninche aamiraki lelo oshon le Sabea, oolakua, amu Olaitoriani oiroro.”" 
Joel3:9 Entolimu ena embalie tiatua iloshon: entobira olarrabal, entuputu iltung'ana magil. Nchoo iltung'ana pooki lo larrabal enyiku, nchoo ninche epuonu aailepu." 
Joel3:10 Endogo ilchempei linyi metaa lalema, nintaa ilalema linyi oodung'ishoreki iremeta; nchoo ilo oshal ejo, “Ara nanu olmurrani.”" 
Joel3:11 Entasieku wootu, intae iloreren pooki ootaana, enturrurro ate teine. Ntadou ilmurran linono, iyie Olaitoriani." 
Joel3:12 Nchoo iloreren eputu ate, nepuonu oerata le Yehoshafat; amu teine nanu alo aton adung'oki enkiguana, lelo oreren pooki ootaana." 
Joel3:13 Tipika olalem oololo amu eo enkisampuare. Entijing'u entunyo amu eipute enkironyet. Eilogilog iltooi aadooyo, amu aikitok entorroni enye." 
Joel3:14 Ilororani, ilororani, tiatua oearata odung'ieki enkiguana. Amu etinyikua enkolong o Laitoriani tiatua ilo erata odung'ieki enkiguana." 
Joel3:15 Eitomisimisoki enkolong o lapa netajaaitie ilakir ewang'an enye. 
Joel3:16 Neikurrukur Olaitoriani te Sion neitayu oltoilo lenye te Yerusalem, ore keper o enkop neikirikira. Kake Olaitoriani esarunoto too ltung'ana lenyena, osempewuet too ltung'ana lenyena le Israel." 
Joel3:17 “Metaa ilo iyie ayiolou nchere ara nanu Olaitoriani Enkai ino, ilo obik te Sion, to ldoinyo lai sinyati. Naa keaku Yerusalem sinyati, nemeigil aekata iltung'ana omon aaim atua ninye." 
Joel3:18 Ore kenya teina olong neitong'u ildoinyo enaisho oo sabibu namelok, neruko ndoinyo te kule, ore inongot pooki e Yuda neruko enkare; nerukunye enchorro e nkare naing'uaa enkaji o Laitoriani, nepik oerata le Shitim enkare." 
Joel3:19 Kelo Misiri aaku olmuate, neaku Edom ong'ata mitil tenkaraki enkarruoisho apa naitaasaki iltung'ana le Yuda, amu eibukoitie apa osarge lemeeta entioto te nkop enye." 
Joel3:20 Kake kemanyi Yuda ntarasi nememanyi Yerusalem too iishoritin pooki. 
Joel3:21 Kaitalaku nanu osarge lenye, naiwuang'ie nanu entorroni enye, amu ebik Olaitoriani te Sion.”" 
Amos1:1 Kulo irorei le Amos, apa laa obo loo lairritak loo ntare le Tekoa. Etoduaa apa ninye kuna naaipirta Israel too nkolong'i e Usia olaiguanani le Yuda o too nkolong'i e Yeroboam olayioni le Yoash, olaiguanani le Israel ilarin oare eng'or enkikirikirata e nkop." 
Amos1:2 Nejo ninye: “Eikurrukur Olaitoriani te Sion, neitayu oltoilo lenye te Yerusalem; eishir ndaat oo lairritak loo ntare, netoyu enchumata e Karmel.”" 
Amos1:3 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkitarruorrot uni e Dameski, o tiong'uan, maiwuang'ie nanu enkitamioto enye; Amu eironya ninche Gilead too nkironyeta e sekenkei." 
Amos1:4 Neaku kairriwaki nanu enkima shumata enkaji e Hasael, naa kemut ninye isempewueti le Benhadad." 
Amos1:5 Kagil nanu esekenkei e Dameski naiwuang'ie lelo oomanya aitung'uaa oerata le Afen, naiwuang'ie ilo oibung'ita eng'udi e nkitoo aitung'uaa Besedan; naa kepuo iltung'ana le Siria eyararoto te Kir, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Amos1:6 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkitarruorrot uni e Gasa, o tiong'uan, maiwuang'ie enkitamioto enye; amu ewaita ninche eyararoto olosho olulung'a pee eyaki ninche Edom." 
Amos1:7 Neaku kairriwaki nanu enkima shumata esuntai e Gasa, naa kenya isempewueti lenye." 
Amos1:8 Kaiwuang'ie nanu lelo oomanya Ashdod, o ilo oibung'ita eng'udi e nkitoo aitung'uaa Ashkelon; kaibelekeny nanu enkaina ai aarare Ekron ore ilo pisiai loo Lfilisti neidaaya.” Olaitoriani Enkai ojo." 
Amos1:9 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkitarruorrot uni e Turo, o tiong'uan, maiwuang'ie enkitamioto enye; Amu etokordutua eyakita ninche olosho olulung'a le Edom, neitu edamu osotua loo lalashera." 
Amos1:10 Neaku kairriwaki nanu enkima shumata esuntai e Turo, naa kenya isempewueti lenyena.”" 
Amos1:11 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkitarruorrot uni e Edom o tiong'uan, maiwuang'ie nanu enkitamioto enye; amu etimira ninye olalashe lenye to lalem, neiturraa olng'ur pooki, neibung ninye engoro anaake, neshum engoro napi ntarasi." 
Amos1:12 Neaku kairriwaa nanu enkima shumata Teman, naa kenya lelo sempewueti le Bosra.”" 
Amos1:13 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkitarruorrot uni oo Lamoni o tiong'uan, maiwuang'ie nanu enkitamioto enye; amu etadanya ninche inkoshuaa oo nkituaak e Gilead, pee etum ninche aaitalala olpolosie lenye." 
Amos1:14 Naa kainok nanu enkima te suntai e Raba, naa kenya isempewueti lenyena too mbuakunot e ina olong o larrabal to sina teina olong olemua te ilo arrabal oikununo anaa osiuo." 
Amos1:15 Ore olaiguanani lenye o lkituaak lenye nepuo eyararoto,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos2:1 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkitarruorrot uni e Moab, o tiong'uan, maiwuang'ie nanu enkitamioto enye, amu etapejo ninye aitaa nkuruon iloik lo laiguanani le Edom." 
Amos2:2 Neaku kairriwaa nanu enkima shumata Moab, naa kenya isempewueti le Keriot, naa keye Moab te mpolos e enkishirata te mpolos e mbuata o to ltoilo le ntarumpeta." 
Amos2:3 Kaiwuang'ie nanu olaiguanani te mpolos e Moab, naar metuata ilkituaak lenyena te nebo ninye Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Amos2:4 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkitarruorrot uni e Yuda, o tiong'uan, maiwuang'ie nanu enkitamioto enye, amu etanyaita ninche nena kitanapat o Laitoriani neitu eibung nkiguanat enyena kake eitapong'oiyie ninche elejare enye, naa ninye etusuja iloo menye." 
Amos2:5 Neaku kairriwaki nanu enkima shumata Yuda, naa kenya isempewueti le Yerusalem.”" 
Amos2:6 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkitarruorrot uni e Israel, o tiong'uan maiwuang'ie nanu enkitamioto enye; amu kemir ninche ilo asipani te nkosholai nemir ilo omena aainosie inamuka are." 
Amos2:7 Ninche lelo ooitunyoki endukuya o laisinani enterit e nkop, neibelekeny enkoitoi eilo oibookoki enkop nelo olayioni o menye ayiaya enkitok nabo, neidurukie ninche enkarna ai sinyati." 
Amos2:8 Neirrag ninche te mbata e pooki perere lo lasar too nkilani naalakieki isilen; naa ore tiatua enkaji e Nkai enye neok ninche enaisho e lelo ooitalaaki esile. 
Amos2:9 “Ore eyia aidaikie apa nanu Ilamori te dukuya ninche, ooba enkadoro enye anaa enkadoro oo ltarakua negol oleng anaa ilkeek sapuki; aidaikie nanu ilng'anayio lenyena te shumata, o ntona enyena te kop." 
Amos2:10 Ayaua sii nanu intae aitayu te nkop e Misiri, narik intae ilarin artam tiong'ota, pee ipuonunu aaya enkop oo Lamori." 
Amos2:11 Aitaa nanu embata oo layiok linyi iloibonok le Nkai ore embata oo lbarnot linyi Ilnasari, aimesipa ena, lo tung'ana le Israel?” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos2:12 “Kake intooko intae Ilnasari enaisho, nintanapinapa iloibonok le Nkai aajoki ‘Emimbonisho’." 
Amos2:13 “Ng'ura, karogonyaki nanu intae enkop te wueji inyi, anaa enarogony enkop engarri nabore lolan." 
Amos2:14 Keimin enkuetata te ilo oneneng, ore ilo ogol nemeitoki aata engolon enye; nemeitoki ilo magilani aidim aitajeu enkishui enye." 
Amos2:15 Ore ilo oibung enkawuo nemeitashe, ore ilo oneneng too nkejek nemeitajeu kewan, nemeitajeu ilo oked embarta enkishui enye;" 
Amos2:16 naa ore ilo ogol tau tialo lelo magil naa keyooki aisik ailanyisho meishopo te ina olong.” Olaitoriani ojo. 
Amos3:1 Entoning'o ele ororei laa ninye eiroro Olaitoriani tialo intae: lo tung'ana le Israel, tialo ilo marei pooki apa ailepunye nanu aitayu tiatua enkop e Misiri." 
Amos3:2 “Intae ake atayiolo nanu, too lmareita pooki le nkop; neaku kaitame nanu intae te ntorroni inyi pooki.”" 
Amos3:3 Amaa keiriamari iltung'ana oare te nebo te neitu ening'o? 
Amos3:4 Amaa, Keikurrukur olng'atuny te ntim eitu ninye eibung toki, Keikurrukur olkuoo lo lng'atuny te nkapune enye meeta ninye toki?" 
Amos3:5 Amaa kedoiki emotonyi orreshet te nkop eitu epikakini ninye orreshet? Kegamisho irresheta te nkop eitu eibung toki? 
Amos3:6 Amaa keoshi entarumpeta te nkanasa nemeirut iltung'ana? Kejing entorroni enkanasa te neme Olaitoriani oyaua? 
Amos3:7 Esipa meeta enaas Olaitoriani Enkai, eitu eibalunye enkisudoroto enye too sinkan lenyena, lelo oibonok lenyena." 
Amos3:8 “Eikurrukurro olng'atuny; ai ng'ae lemeureishoyu: Eiroro Olaitoriani Enkai; aing'ae lemeibonisho?” 
Amos3:9 Enosai too sempewueti te Asiria, o too sempewueti tiatua enkop e Misiri, nijojo, “Enturrurroto maate te nchumata oldoinyo le Samaria, eng'ura embuakunoto o lkiyioi tiatua ninye o enkitorogonyare tiatua ninye.”" 
Amos3:10 “Meyiolo ninche eneiko teneas esipata.” Olaitoriani ojo. “Kulo ooshum ilchumat le ntorroni e nkikonya too sempewueti lenye.” 
Amos3:11 Neaku nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Kelotu olmang'atinta airin enkop neibung imasaa nimitunyenye ate neraya intokitin naatii isempewueti linyi.” 
Amos3:12 Nji ejo Olaitoriani: “Ore anaa enasaru olchekut loo ntare nkejek are aashu endung'oti e nkiok te nkutuk olng'atuny, naatelekua olng'atuny neijia etiu iltung'ana le Israel oomanya Samaria ilkuti ake ooleku, eeta embelati o lorika o enchoto e rruat.”" 
Amos3:13 “Entoning naa, ninchakenokiki enkaji e Yakobo” Olaitoriani Enkai, Enkai oo lororani, ojo." 
Amos3:14 “Nchere te ina olong naitame nanu Israel te nkitarruorroto enye, naa kaitame nanu ilperereni loo lasarri le Betel, ore mouarak o lperere lo lasar nedung'ori nesulakini enkop." 
Amos3:15 Kagil nanu enkaji e nkata enkirobi o enkaji enkata enkirouaj; ore nkajijik naaikodo too lala loo lkanchaoni nerruoyo, ore nkajijik kituaak neidaaya,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos4:1 “Entoning ele rorei, ntae nkishu e Bashan, naatii oldoinyo le Samaria, nena naaibooki olaisinani enkop neitorogony olomena nena naajoki ilpayiani lenye, ‘Eyau pee kitum atook!’" 
Amos4:2 Einosa Olaitoriani olmumai te sinyatisho enye, nchere, ng'ura kepuonu nkolong'i shumata intae, peyie eyau intae too lala oo loolo o metabaiki iloobayie linyi too lala oo loolo loo sinkir." 
Amos4:3 Naa ipuopuo intae aaim esuntai nataaraki neitashe pooki ng'ae te dukuya ninye nepuoi aanang'aki intae Harmon,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos4:4 “Wou Betel, tigila nkitanapat, Wou Gilgal, toponai engilata oo nkitanapat; iyau ilasarri linono anaake tadekenya, o matuan inono e tomon te pooki olong e uni." 
Amos4:5 Intayu olasar le nashe; eina naisuijieki nimbalie inkishorunot e mpiris nilikioo ninche amu inyorrinyorro aaikuna neijia, lo tung'ana le Israel!” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos4:6 “Nanu oyaua olameyu atua nkanas inyi pooki o enkiishunoto oo mukateni too nkajijik inyi pooki, ore ake eyia neitu intae kishukokinono nanu,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos4:7 “Naa nanu sii oibooyie enchan meshaiki intae eton eng'or ilapaitin okuni le nkisampuare nairriwaki; nanu enchan shumata e nkanasa nabo napal enkae anasa atashaikia ewueji nebo ore ewueji neitu eshaiki netoyu; 
Amos4:8 neaku ore iloo nkanas are aashu uni nepuo enkanasa nabo pee eok enkare, nemeishunye ninche enkure; ore eyia neitu intae kirinyokinono nanu,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos4:9 “Ataara indaiki inyi te nkeeya naitomijoon inkurman inyi aitoi isabibu linyi; ore ilng'abolo o loirienito linyi neinos olmaati; ore eyia neitu kishukokinono nanu,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos4:10 “Airriwaka nanu atua intae olmeitai anaa apa enaikununo te Misiri; naar nanu ilbarnot linyi to lalem; naya nanu imbartan inji aiwuang'ie naya nanu olng'usil loo lng'oborri linyi apik nkumeishin inyi; ore eyia eitu intae kishukokinono nanu,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos4:11 “Aidakie nanu ilkulikae te ntae, anaa apa pee eidaikie Enkai Sodom o Gomora, nitiuu apa anaa olmishire oitayioki tiatua enkima nayupuyup; ore eyia eitu intae kishukokinono nanu,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos4:12 “Neaku ena nanu aaitaas, iyie Israel, ore enkaraki naa kaas nanu ena terretenayu pee itumore Enkai ino iyie Israel!”" 
Amos4:13 Amu ore ilo oitobira ildoinyo neitayu osiuo, neibalakinye iltung'ana enaikununo endamunoto enye; ilo oitomisimis enkakenya neroro ineeika enkop–Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani, ninye enkarna enye!" 
Amos5:1 Entoning ele rorei lajo nanu te nkishirata te nkaraki intae na aji e Israel: 
Amos5:2 “Etabatate nemeigil ae kata adumunye ina selenkei e Israel; eiturrayioki te nkop enye nemeetae olodumu ninye.” 
Amos5:3 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai: “Ore enkanasa napukunye iltung'ana enkalifu nabo iip ake ooleku, ore ina napukunye iltung'ana iip, tomon ake oolekaki enkaji e Israel.”" 
Amos5:4 Amu nji ejoki Olaitoriani enkaji e Israel: “Eng'oruaki nanu pee ipokipoko; 
Amos5:5 kake eming'oruru intae Betel, nimijing'ijing'i Gilgal aashu idung'udung'u aapuo Beer-sheba; amu meeta nchere melo Gilgal eyararoto, naa keaku Betel entoki nemeetae.”" 
Amos5:6 Eng'orutu Olaitoriani pee ipokipoko, pee melotu ake ninye anaa enkima ajing enkaji e Yosef, nenya ninye nemetii oloar ninye te Betel," 
Amos5:7 Intae kulo ooibelekeny esipata aaitaa esayiet, nenang'aki esipata enkop!" 
Amos5:8 Ore ilo oitobira Inkokua o Inkapiak uni neibelekeny enaimin nagut aitaa enkakenya neitomisimis endama aitaa enkewarie ilo oipotu nkariak e naiposha neitashaiki ninche shumata oriong e nkop, Olaitoriani ninye enkarna enye," 
Amos5:9 ilo oyau enkidaaroto anaa enkiwuang'ata egilunore ilo ogol neaku kelotu enkidaaroto shumata ine negol. 
Amos5:10 Eiba ninche ilo oisikong'isho te kishomi neinyal ilo oiro esipata. 
Amos5:11 Neaku ore enkaraki nimbookiki olaisinani enkop nioruru ninye enkano enye, itesheta intae nkajijik oo soito oogueta, kake mibikiekie intae ninche; ituno intae isabibu sidain, kake miokioko enaisho enye." 
Amos5:12 Amu ayiolo nanu eneba nkitarruorrot inyi o enaba esapuko oo ng'ok inyi, intae ilooibooki enkop olasipani, niyaya ntokitin e ropare, nimbelekenyenye ilo omena aarriny te kishomi." 
Amos5:13 Neaku ore ilo ng'en negira te nkata naikununo nji; amu enkata e ntorroni. 
Amos5:14 Eng'orutu isidain, mme ntorrok, pee ipokipoko; pee etum Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani ataa te nebo intae, anaa enitejo intae." 
Amos5:15 Embai entorroni, ninyorrurru esupatisho, nintubulaa esupatisho te kishomi; amu eidimayu to Laitoriani, Enkai oo lororani pee eipirisie Enkai olpisiaai le Yosef." 
Amos5:16 Nji naa ejo Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani, Olaitoriani: “Ore too nkoitoi pooki kituaak naa keaku enkishirata; ore too nkoitoi pooki nejo ninche, ‘Aha, aha!’ Naa keipotu ninche ilaturok le nkurma meetu aaishir, neyietu lelo arriyiak te nkishirata," 
Amos5:17 ore too wuejitin pooki oo sabibu naa keaku e nkishirata, amu kaim nanu atua empolos inyi.” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos5:18 Intae lelo oong'uar enkolong o Laitoriani! Kainyoo pee iyieuu intae enkolong o Laitoriani? Enaimin ninye neme ewang'an; 
Amos5:19 ketiu anaa oltung'ani okuet ailany olng'atuny nenang'are olng'arurumi, aashu elo atua aji neigaraki enkaina enye esuntai neony olasurai ninye." 
Amos5:20 Aime enaimin enkolong o Laitoriani neme ewang'an, o emisimisi nemewang?" 
Amos5:21 “Kaiba nanu namen isiruai linyi nemashipakino lelo turrurri linyi. 
Amos5:22 Ore hoo nikintaikiki nanu ilasarri linyi oopejori o lasarri le nkurma, mang'amaa nanu ninche, ore lelo asarri linyi le seriani loo nchoo inyi naapir, maning'ore nanu." 
Amos5:23 Ewaita entung'uayioki nanu enkilepilep oo sinkolioitin linyi; mainining nanu oltoilo loo nkinantani inyi. 
Amos5:24 Kake enchoo esipata erukunye anaa nkariak nerukunye esupatisho anaa enchorro nemetoyu ae kata. 
Amos5:25 Amaa eikiyakita apa intae ilasarri o nkishorot to lpurkel too lapa arin artam, naaji e Israel?" 
Amos5:26 Ewaita intae Sakuti olaiguanani linyi, o Kaiwana ina ai inyi o lakira o nkitanyaanyukot inyi apa nintobirakita ate;" 
Amos5:27 neaku kaya nanu intae enchom eyararoto te idia alo Dameski,” Olaitoriani ojo, laa ore enkarna enye naa Enkai oo Lororani." 
Amos6:1 “Oi lekua ooisikarra te Sion, o lekua oodol eserian to ldoinyo le Samaria, lelo tung'ana ning'ot le dukuya too loshon, laa ninche esaru olosho le Israel!" 
Amos6:2 Entalang enchom Kalne entodol; nidumunyenye te ine aapuo Hamat kitok; nintokiki aapuo Gat oo Lfilisti. Keikash ninche aalang kuna kitoriat pooki aashu aisapuk enkop enye alang enkop inyi. 
Amos6:3 Intalakuanana intae enkolong e ntorroni, niyauu aaitataanu entonata o larrabal?" 
Amos6:4 “Oi lekua ooirrag too ndapashi naaikodo too lala loo lkanchaoni, neitoriori too lorikan dapashi, nenya ilkuoo le kerra too luaat nenya ilasho to lale;" 
Amos6:5 lelo oorany isinkoliotin le pesho to ltoilo le nkinanta, neitobiraki ate ntokitin oo sinkolioitin anaa Daudi;" 
Amos6:6 ook enaisho too lbakulini neeyel ate te ilata sidai oleng, kake meisina ninche te nkidaata e Yosef!" 
Amos6:7 Neaku keaku taata ninche ile dukuya te lelo oopuo eyararoto, ore isiruai linyi o sikarri inyi neishunye.”" 
Amos6:8 Einosa Olaitoriani Enkai olmumai te kewan enye (Olaitoriani ojo, Enkai oo lororani): “Kaiba nanu olwuasa le Yakobo, naiba isempewueti lenye; naa kaishooyo nanu enkanasa o pooki natii atua.”" 
Amos6:9 Naa te neleku iltung'ana tomon te nkaji nabo neye ninche. 
Amos6:10 Naa ore oltung'ani opejoo olalashe lenye, te neitayu loik lenye tiatua aji, nejoki ilo otii atua aji, “Keton etii likae tung'ani te nebo iyie?” Nejo ninye “A-a nejo, tigirayu! Mikintoki iyiook aaipot enkarna o Laitoriani.”" 
Amos6:11 Amu ng'ura, eitayu Olaitoriani enkitanapata neari enkaji sapuk aaitaa mbelibelat, neitaae enkaji kiti irrarrat." 
Amos6:12 Amaa, kekuet mbartan te nchumata indapidapo Ketur oltung'ani enaiposha too lmong'i? Kake mbelekenya intae esipata aaitaa esayiet o lng'anayio le sipata nintaa olchani odua" 
Amos6:13 intae kulo oong'ida te Mpesho, oojo, “Keitu iyiook te ngolon ang maate kiya Karnaim?”" 
Amos6:14 “Amu ng'ura, kadumaki nanu intae olosho, lo tung'ana le Israel, Olaitoriani ojo, Enkai oo lororani; naa keibooki ninche intae enkop ebaiki enejing'ieki Hamat o metabaiki Ereyiet e Araba.”" 
Amos7:1 Ena nanu aaitoduaa Olaitoriani: ng'ura, eitobirita ninye olmaati te nkiterunoto embulunoto e ndaa natuunoki to loirujuruj, naa ng'ura embulunoto e are eidipa olaiguanani atudung'o." 
Amos7:2 Ore pee eidip ilo maati ainosa inkujit e ina kop, najo nanu, “Olaitoriani Enkai, tapalaki ninche, aatasayia iyie! Kaji naa eiko pee eitashe Yakobo? Eikiti ninye oleng!”" 
Amos7:3 Neirridu Olaitoriani ena bae; Meekure eaku, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos7:4 Ena nanu aaitoduaa Olaitoriani; ng'ura, eipotu Olaitoriani Enkai enkiguana e nkima, nenya ina kima ineegut oleng, neinosita sii enkop." 
Amos7:5 Naitoki nanu ajo, “Olaitoriani Enkai, tapala, aatasayia iyie! Kaji naa eiko pee eitashe Yakobo? Eikiti ninye oleng!”" 
Amos7:6 Neirridu Olaitoriani ena; “Meitoki sii ena atiu,” Olaitoriani Enkai ojo." 
Amos7:7 Aaitoduaa ninye: ng'ura, eitashe Olaitoriani te mbata e suntai nateshetaki te ntemet e nkitorioroto, eibung'ita entemet te nkaina enye." 
Amos7:8 Naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, “Amos, kainyoo iyie idolita?” Najoki nanu, “Entemet e nkitorioroto.” Neitoki Olaitoriani ajo. “Ng'ura, kapik nanu entemet e nkitorioroto empolos oo ltung'ana laainei Israel; maigil ae kata nanu agiroo ninche;" 
Amos7:9 ore iwuejitin neeika e Isaak naa keitomijooni ore iwuejitin e Israel neeseremishoreki neitomijooni, naa kadumakino nanu enkaji e Yeroboam to lalem.”" 
Amos7:10 Neitoki Amasia olapolosani le Betel airriwaki olkilikuai Yeroboam olaiguanani le Israel, ejoki, “Eitobirita Amos entorroni tialo iyie te mpolos e nkaji e Israel; meidimaa ena kop ilomon lenyena pooki." 
Amos7:11 Amu nji apa etejo Amos, ‘Keye Yeroboam to lalem nemeeta nchere pee melo Israel eyararoto aing'uaa enkop enye.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Nejoki Amasia Amos, “Iyie oladuaani shomo, isika shomo enkop e Yuda, inosa endaa te ine, nimbonisho te ine;" 
Amos7:13 kake mingil ae kata aibonisho te Betel, amu enkaji o laiguanani naseremishore naa enkaji e nkitoo naseremieki Enkai.”" 
Amos7:14 Neitoki Amos awaliki Amasia ejo, “Mara nanu oloiboni le Nkai nemara olayioni lo loiboni, kake kara olairritani o laitobirani loo lkeek oonyaanyukie ilng'abolo," 
Amos7:15 naaya apa nanu Olaitoriani aitung'uaa esujata oo ntare, naajoki nanu Olaitoriani, ‘Shomo, mbonoki iltung'ana laainei Israel.’" 
Amos7:16 “Ore naa taata toning'o ororei lo Laitoriani. Ijo iyie ‘Mimbonoki Israel niminosu ilomon le nkikoo tialo enkaji e Isaak?’ 
Amos7:17 Nji naa ejo Olaitoriani: ‘Keaku enkitok ino enaiborrie onyek tiatua ena anasa, ore ilayiok linono o ntoyie inono naa kebatata to lalem, ore olokeri lino naa kedung'i aaorrior to lgosoi, ore iyie makewan naa iye te nkop nemesinya, nemeeta nchere pee melo Israel eyararoto aing'uaa enkop enye.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Ena nanu aaitoduaa Olaitoriani: ng'ura, enkikapu nabore ilng'anayio le nkata e nkirowuaj." 
Amos8:2 Naajoki ninye, “Amos, kainyoo iyie idolita?” Najoki nanu, “Oljilchil obore ilng'anayio le nkata e nkirowuaj.” Naaitoki nanu Olaitoriani ajoki, “Etabaikia enkiting'oto iltung'ana laainei Israel; maigil ae kata nanu agiroo ninche." 
Amos8:3 Ore isinkolioitin le nkaji e Nkai naa keaku olkiyioi te ina olong,” Olaitoriani Enkai ojo; “Ore mpopoki oo ltung'ana ootuata naa keaku kumok, ore te pooki wueji naa kepuoi aaiturraa ninche egirae.”" 
Amos8:4 Entoning ena, intae ilooibooki iloomena enkop, niyauu lelo aisinak le nkop aaishie," 
Amos8:5 ijojo, “Kanu eishunye olapa ng'ejuk pee kitum aatimir enkurma. Keishunye sabato, pee kitum aatimir enkano, pee kitum aaterepeny entemet naji eta nikiponaa shekeli, nikilej iltung'ana too ntemat e lejare," 
Amos8:6 Pee kitum iyiook aainyang'u olaisinani te nkosholai ore olomena nikinyang'u too namuka are nikimir isuut e nkano?” 
Amos8:7 Einosa Olaitoriani olmumai te nkaraki olwuasa le Yakobo: “Esipa maarikino ae kata hoo nabo oo nkiasin enye. 
Amos8:8 Aimeikirikira enkop te nkaraki ena, Neishir to sina pooki ng'ae omanya atua ninye, nedumunye ninye pooki anaa olkeju le Nail neilugo neitoki aimis, anaa olkeju le Nail te Misiri?”" 
Amos8:9 “Naa ore akenya te ina olong.” Olaitoriani Enkai ojo, “Naitadoyio nanu enkolong tenkipirata enkolong, naitomisimis enkop dama." 
Amos8:10 Kaibelekeny nanu isiruai linyi aitaa osina, ore isinkolioitin linyi pooki neaku olkiyioi; karrotianaki nanu inkilani o lkuniyia pooki tung'ani napik enkurroto pooki lukunya, kaitotiu nanu anaa enkishirata naishirakini olayioni obo laa ninye ake eetae ore enkiting'oto enye netiu anaa enkolong nadua." 
Amos8:11 “Ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i,” Olaitoriani Enkai ojo, “Nairriwaki nanu enkop olameyu; mme olameyu le ndaa aashu olameyu le nkure e nkare, kake oloning'ieki ororei lo Laitoriani." 
Amos8:12 Kelimana ninche ebaiki enaiposha o metabaiki enaiposha, moikuape o metabaiki enkilepunoto e nkolong; kekuet ninche aapuo neitu, aaing'oru ororei lo Laitoriani, kake metum ninche." 
Amos8:13 “Ore akenya te ina olong isilan sidain o lbarnot naa keiterre te nkure. 
Amos8:14 Ore lelo oonya olmumai te Ashima e Samaria, nejo ‘Ore anaa enaishu enkai ino, Dan;’ naa ‘Ore anaa enaishu enkoitoi e Beer-sheba;’ kebatata ninche nemeigil ae kata aadumunye.”" 
Amos9:1 Atoduaa nanu Olaitoriani eitashe te mbata olperere lo lasar, nejo ninye: “Toosho lukuny oo ng'apeta, o meikirikirata ntonat oo ng'apeta, tebelibelaki ninche inchumat oo ilukuny oo ltung'ana pooki; ore ilooleku lenye naar nanu ninche to lalem; melo ninye obo lenye aisik nemeimisho ninye obo lenye." 
Amos9:2 “Ore hoo naaji ninye te netur enkop aapuo enemeneng'a, naa keitayu ake enkaina ai ninche te ine, ore hoo naaji ninye tenaa keilep aapuo shumata, naa kaitadou nanu ninche te ine." 
Amos9:3 Ore hoo naaji ninye tenaa keisudori te nchumata oldoinyo oji Karmel naa kaing'oru nanu ninche naitayu ninche; naa ore hoo naaji ninye tenaa keisudori too nkonyek aainei aapuo abori enaiposha naa kairriwaa nanu olasurai ine metoonyo ninche. 
Amos9:4 Naa ore naaji tenaa kepuo ninche eyararoto te dukuya ilmang'ati lenye, naitanap nanu olalem teine pee ear ninche naa kaing'or nanu ninche te ntorroni neme te sidai.”" 
Amos9:5 Ore Olaitoriani, Enkai oo lororani, ilo laa te neiseyie enkop neshola, ore lelo pooki oomanya atua neishir to sina nedumunye pooki anaa olkeju le Nail, neitoki adou, anaa olkeju le Nail te Misiri;" 
Amos9:6 ilo oshet enkaji enye e shumata te keper nepik olkitamanyunoto lenye shumata enkop ilo oipotu nkariak e naiposha nebukoki ninche shumata oriong e nkop Olaitoriani ninye enkarna enye. 
Amos9:7 “Aimitiuu intae anaa Olosho le Etiopia te nanu, intae lo tung'ana le Israel?” Olaitoriani ojo. “Keitu nanu aitayu ailepunye Israel aitung'uaa enkop e Misiri naitung'uaa Ilfilisti Kafta naitung'uaa Siria Kir?" 
Amos9:8 Ng'ura, etii nkonyek o Laitoriani Enkai shumata enkitoria oo ng'ok, naa kaidaikie nanu aitung'uaa oriong e nkop; Meteleku ake nchere maidaikie nanu tukul enkaji e Yakobo,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Amos9:9 “Amu ng'ura, kaitanapisho nanu, pee aipirripir asilu nanu enkaji e Israel tiatua loreren pooki anaa enasil oltung'ani te silet, kake meetae olantererai odoiki enkop." 
Amos9:10 Ore lelo aing'okok loo ltung'ana laainei pooki naa keye to lalem, lelo oojo, ‘Meinepu ae kata entorroni iyiook aashu etum iyiook.’" 
Amos9:11 “Ore akenya te ina olong naitasheiyie nanu enkaji e Daudi apa naturori naitobir nanu ineetarruoitie, nashumu nanu ineeturori, naitoki nanu ashet metotiuo anaa apa." 
Amos9:12 Pee etum ninche aawaita olpisiai le Edom o lelo oreren pooki ooipoti te nkarna ai,” Olaitoriani ilo oas ena, ojo nji." 
Amos9:13 “Ng'ura, kepuonu nkolong'i,” Olaitoriani ojo, “ore ilo oturisho neinepu ilo oisampisho ore ilo oirony ilng'anayio neinepu ilo ounisho; ore ildoinyo neitong'u enaisho namelok, neruko too ildoinyo pooki." 
Amos9:14 Kashuku nanu emunyani oo ltung'ana laainei Israel naa keshet ninche nkanas apa naaidaaitie nemany ninche; keun ninche isabibu neok enaisho enye; naa keitayu ninche nkurman neya ilng'anayio lenye. 
Amos9:15 Kaun nanu ninche te nkop enye, nemeigili ae kata aadotu ninche, aaitayu tiatua ina kop naishoo nanu ninche,” Olaitoriani Enkai ojo." 
Obadiah1:1 Enduaata e Obadia. Inji ejo Olaitoriani ti alo Edom: Kitoning'o iyiook ilomon supati ooing'uaa Olaitoriani, neirriwuaki olkilikuai atua iloreren. “Tudumunye! Matudumakinoto iyiook ninye to larrabal!”" 
Obadiah1:2 Ng'ura kaaitaa iyie kiti ti atua iloreren, eikipuoi aamenu iyie oleng." 
Obadiah1:3 Kiteleja iyie ilo wuasa lo ltau lino, iyie ilo omanya enchumata endapidapoi, laa keika oleng emanyisho enye, ilo ojo to ltau lino, “Kaing'ae laaitadou nanu ayau enkop!”" 
Obadiah1:4 Ore hoo nilepa alo shumata anaa olkurragos, ore hoo naa atua lakir etii enkaji ino, kaayau ake aitadou enkop, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Obadiah1:5 Amaa te nepuonu lapurrok enitii kewarie, kebaa enkidaata nikindakieki iyie! Aimepurroo ninche ina ake naidip ninche? Amaa te nepuonu lasotok loo sabibu aimeleku ninche embata?" 
Obadiah1:6 Kebaa elilituni Esau, neing'oruni ilchumat lenyena!" 
Obadiah1:7 Kiteleja lelo pooki lining'ore, kitimiraitie ninche aareu olpolosie; ore apa lelo liatayie eseriani nikitimira ninche; ore lelo shoreta linono lisilig netipika orreshet abori iyie embae nemeyiolounoyu ina." 
Obadiah1:8 Amaa kenya te ina olong, Olaitoriani ojo, aimaidaikie nanu lelo tung'ana ang'eni te Edom, o eyiolounoto to ldoinyo le Esau?" 
Obadiah1:9 Ore lelo tung'ana linono magil, Teman, neitukureti, o metaa ore pooki oing'uaa oldoinyo le Esau neiwuang'ieki aar metua." 
Obadiah1:10 Ore te nkaraki ina kinyalata nainyalaki olalashe lino Yakobo, eikimulumul iyie enkurruna, naa eikiwuang'ieki ntarasi." 
Obadiah1:11 Ore apa te ina olong nintasho aitirring'a, ore apa te ina olong nawaita iltung'ana leiking'a imasaa enyena, neimu ilmang'ati nchomito enyena, neoshoki enkukuo Yerusalem, nitotiwuo iyie anaa obo lenye." 
Obadiah1:12 Enyor apa neitu ishipakino ina olong o lalashe lino te ina olong apa natijing'a ninye olbuket; enyor apa neitu ing'idakino ina olong e lelo tung'ana le Yuda, te ina olong e nkidaata enye; enyor apa neitu iwuasayu te ina olong o sina." 
Obadiah1:13 Enyor apa neitu ijing kishomi oo ltung'ana laainei, te ina olong o sina lenye; enyor apa neitu ing'idakino ashil enkidaata enye, te nena olong'i e nkidaata enye; enyor apa neitu imbung imasaa enyena te ina olong e nkidaata enye." 
Obadiah1:14 Enyor apa neitu intashe te rishata oo nkoitoi pee imbung lelo ooisik; enyor apa neitu iyau ilo pisiai lenye te ina olong o sina. 
Obadiah1:15 Amu etataama ina olong o Laitoriani te shumata iloreren pooki. Ore anaa enitaasa, ina eyookini aitaas intae, keshukokino nkiaasin inyi shumata ilukuny inyi maate." 
Obadiah1:16 Amu ore anaa enitookishote intae te nchumata e ilo doinyo lai sinyati, keokisho sii ninche lelo oshon pooki oomanita ntae keokisho ninche neimisiloo, netiu ninche anaa keitu ae kata eng'as aaku." 
Obadiah1:17 Kake Oldoinyo le Sion epuo aatii lelo ooilanyisho, naa keaku sinyati ine; ore enkaji e Yakobo neya wuejitin enye." 
Obadiah1:18 Neaku enkaji e Yakobo enkima, ore enkaji e Yosef olang'at le nkima, neaku enkaji e Esau nkabobok; nepej ninche neishu ninche, nemetum hoo obo oleku te nkaji e Esau; amu Olaitoriani oiroro." 
Obadiah1:19 Ore lelo le Negeb naa keya oldoinyo le Esau, ore lelo le Shefela neya enkop oo Lfilisti; neya ninche ina kop e Efraim o enkop e Samaria neya Benchamen Gilead." 
Obadiah1:20 Ore lelo aisikak le Hala laa ilo lorere le Israel neya Foenike o metabaiki Serefait; ore lelo ooibung'aki le Yerusalem ootii atua Sefarad nepuo aaya nena anas e Negeb. 
Obadiah1:21 Keilep ilaitajeunok aapuo Oldoinyo le Sion aaitore Oldoinyo le Esau; neaku enkitoria eno Laitoriani. 
Jonah1:1 Eewuo apa ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Yona olayioni le Amitai, ejo," 
Jonah1:2 “Tudumunye, shomo Ninawi, ina anasa kitok, ninchiraki ninye; amu eilepua entorroni enye alotu dukuya nanu.”" 
Jonah1:3 Kake etudumunye Yona aisikaki Tarshishi ailany Olaitoriani. Nedoyio ninye alo Yopa netum emeli naloito Tarshishi; metaa etalaa entikit, neked ajing, pee elo te nebo ninche Tarshishi, enelakua ailany Olaitoriani." 
Jonah1:4 Kake eirriwua Olaitoriani olkutati sapuk shumata enaiposha, nejing enkilugo kitok enaiposha, o metaa kejo emeli pee egila." 
Jonah1:5 Neiputukuny to lkirutoto lelo ootii emeli, neishiraki ake oltung'ani enkai enye; nenang'aki ninche lelo olan apa ootii emeli atua enaiposha, pee eiteneneng. Kake eshomo apa Yona adoyio alo olgilata li abori emeli neirrag, neirura aitayu njo." 
Jonah1:6 Neaku eewuo olkitok le meli nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo iyie idamu, laairragani? Tuputunye, impoto enkai ino! Eidimayu pee edamu iyiook ina ai pee mikindaaya.”" 
Jonah1:7 Nejokino ninche maate, “Wootu, matoosh enkukuo, pee kitum aatayiolo nchere kaing'ae eimua ena torroni naewuo shumata iyiook.” Neosh ninche enkukuo, nedoiki enkukuo Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Neitoki ninche aajoki ninye, “Toliki iyiook, kaing'ae eimua ena torroni naewuo shumata iyiook? Kainyoo esiaai ino? Naa kaji ing'uaa? Kaa enkop inyi? Naa eira iyie oli alo orere?”" 
Jonah1:9 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Ara nanu Olheburaniai; naure nanu Olaitoriani, Enkai e shumata, laa ninye oitobira enaiposha o enkop natoyio.”" 
Jonah1:10 Neitoki lelo tung'ana aairut oleng, nejoki ninye, “Kainyoo ena nitaasa iyie!” Amu etayioloito iltung'ana nchere keisikita apa ninye ailany Olaitoriani, enkaraki natolikio ninye ninche." 
Jonah1:11 Neitoki ninche aajoki ninye, “Kaa iyiook kintaas iyie, pee etum enaiposha aitirring'ayu te iyiook?” Amu etoponari enaiposha ailugo oleng." 
Jonah1:12 Nejoki ninye ninche, “Entudumuaki nanu entanang'akaki atua enaiposha; pee etum enaiposha aitirring'ayu te intae; amu ayiolo ajo enkaraki nanu pee eewuo ele kutati kitok shumata intae.”" 
Jonah1:13 Ore ake eyia neijia netonyuaa lelo tung'ana aajo kireu emeli meeu enkop natoyio, kake etalaikinote amu etoponari enaiposha ailugo oleng oleng ti alo ninche." 
Jonah1:14 Neaku eishirakitia ninche Olaitoriani, ejo, “Kisai iyie, Olaitoriani, mincho iyiook kindak te nkaraki enkishui ele tung'ani, niminteleiki iyiook osarge le meeta entioto; amu itaasa iyie Olaitoriani anaa enikintiship iyie.”" 
Jonah1:15 Nedumu ninche Yona nenang'aki ninye atua enaiposha; neitirring'a enaiposha te nkilugoto enye. 
Jonah1:16 Neureyu lelo tung'ana Olaitoriani oleng, neitaiki ninche Olaitoriani olasar, neinos olmumai." 
Jonah1:17 Neirriu Olaitoriani osinkirri sapuk metoijoi Yona; netii apa Yona enkoshoke o sinkirri nkolong'i uni o nkewarieitin uni. 
Jonah2:1 Neomon Yona Olaitoriani Enkai enye ti atua enkoshoke e ilo sinkirri," 
Jonah2:2 ejo, “Aipoto nanu Olaitoriani, ti atua osina lai, naawaliki ninye nanu; ti atua enkoshoke e nemeneng'a aishira nanu, nitoning'o iyie oltoilo lai." 
Jonah2:3 “Amu kitanang'aka nanu atua enguton, atua enguton oo naaiposha, naaman nanu nkariak pooki wueji; ore lopir pooki o nang'arot oo nkariak neim shumata nanu." 
Jonah2:4 “Najo nanu, Aatanang'ayioki aaiturraa aaitung'uaa dukuya ino; kaji pasa nanu aiko pee aigil adol enkaji ino sinyati?" 
Jonah2:5 “Aaimulumulaitie nanu nkarriak, aatamana nanu enguton nkaloli pooki; neteene olairampai aman endukuya ai," 
Jonah2:6 “too ntonat oo ldoinyo. Nadoyio nanu alo ina kop naaikenorieki nanu ntarasi; ore ake eyia, niyaua iyie enkishui ai ailepunye ti atua engumoto, Iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ai." 
Jonah2:7 “Ore pee eiterre oltau lai ti atua nanu, nadamu nanu Olaitoriani; nelotu enkomono ai enitii atua enkaji ino sinyati." 
Jonah2:8 “Ore lelo ooyanyit nkitanyaanyukot oo nkaitin e pesho neituraa enkisiligata enye nasipa. 
Jonah2:9 “Kake ore nanu to ltoilo le nkishoroto e nashe naa kaapolosaki iyie olasar; ore ina nainosie olmumai kalak nanu. Eno Laitoriani enkordunoto!” 
Jonah2:10 Neirorie Olaitoriani osinkirri, nelopu Yona te nkop natoyio." 
Jonah3:1 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Yona enkata e are, ejo," 
Jonah3:2 “Tudumunye shomo Ninawi, idia anasa kitok, nimbalakinye ninye ilo kilikuai laaliki nanu iyie.”" 
Jonah3:3 Nedumunye Yona nelo Ninawi, te risioroto o rorei lo Laitoriani. Ore apa Ninawi naa enkanasa kitok oleng, elototo oo nkolong'i uni endapasho." 
Jonah3:4 Neiteru Yona alo atua ina anasa, nelo elototo e nkolong nabo. Neishir ninye ajo, “Nkolong'i artam ake naangor pee eidaikieki Ninawi!”" 
Jonah3:5 Neiruk iltung'ana le Ninawi Enkai; neibalie ninche eenata e ate e mpukoroto, neishop ilkuniyiani, ebaiki olkitok lenye o metabaiki oloti lenye." 
Jonah3:6 Nebaiki lelo omon olaiguanani le Ninawi, nedumunye ninye to lorika lenye le nkitoo, neitayu olkila lenye, neimulumul kewan too lkuniyiani, neton too nkuruon." 
Jonah3:7 Nedung'u ninye enkitanapata neitubulaa ti atua Ninawi pooki ejo, “Ore te nkitanapata o laiguanani o lkituaak lenyena: Mincho oltung'ani aashu eng'ues, o inchoo aashu nkerrai eishamisham hoo toki; inchoo ninche etoni medaa, aashu eok enkare," 
Jonah3:8 kake nchoo oltung'ani o eng'ues eimulumuli too lkuniyiani, naa nchoo ninche eishiraki oleng Enkai; ee nchoo pooki ng'ae eibelekenya aing'uaa enkoitoi enye torrono neing'uaa ina torroni nataasa too nkaik enyena." 
Jonah3:9 Kaing'ae nayiolo nchere eidim Enkai airridu neibelekenya te ina goro enye napi, pee mikindaaya iyiook?”" 
Jonah3:10 Ore ake pee edol Enkai ina nataasa ninche, ina naibelekenyate ninche aaing'uaa enkoitoi enye torrono, neirridu Enkai ina torroni apa natejo ninye aitaas ninche; neitu ninye eas ina." 
Jonah4:1 Kake eitu eitiship ena Yona tukul, etagore ninye oleng." 
Jonah4:2 Neomon ninye Olaitoriani nejo, “Aatoomono nanu iyie, Olaitoriani, aime ena apake nanu atejo eton atii enkop ang? Enkaraki ena apa pee aisarisara nanu aisikaki Tarshishi; amu atayiolo apa nanu nchere ira iyie Enkai o sotua naata olng'ur, nemegoro asioki, nikibore enyorrata nauno, nirridu entorroni." 
Jonah4:3 Ore naa taata, Olaitoriani, intayu enkishui ai intung'uayioki nanu, aatasayia iyie, amu enaikash te nanu te naye alang te naishu.”" 
Jonah4:4 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Amaa, itaasa iyie esidai itagore?”" 
Jonah4:5 Neitoki Yona aipang alo auluo enkanasa neton te nkalo e nkilepunoto e nkolong e ina anasa neitobiraki kewan olng'obor te ine. Neton ninye ti abori oloip o metaba anaa nedol enapukoki ina anasa. 
Jonah4:6 Negelu Olaitoriani Enkai enkaitubului neisho ninye metubulu te shumata Yona, pee etum ataa oloip te shumata endukuya enye, pee eitajeu ninye te nyamali e nkolong. Neng'idayu Yona oleng te nkaraki ina aitubului." 
Jonah4:7 Kake ore ake pee emanaa enkakenya te nkolong e are, negelu Enkai olkurto oinosa ina aitubului, neaku etoyio." 
Jonah4:8 Ore ake pee eilepu enkolong, neirriu Enkai olkutati oirowua oing'uaa nkilepunoto e nkolong, near enkolong endukuya e Yona o meiterria, neikilikuanu ninye pee eye, nejo, “Enaikash nanu te naye alang te naishu.”" 
Jonah4:9 Kake etiaaka Enkai Yona, “Itaasa iyie esidai ti nigorokino enkaitubului?” Nejo ninye, “Ataasa nanu esidai agoro, atagore ene keeya.”" 
Jonah4:10 Nejo Olaitoriani, “Ing'urrie iyie ina aitubului neitu iasaki esiaai, neitu iyie intubulu ninye, ina naaku kewarie neidaaya te nkewarie." 
Jonah4:11 Aimaing'urrie naa nanu Ninawi, idia anasa kitok, natii atua ninye ilkumok oogiroo inkalifuni iip o tikitam lemeyiolo ninche aaitirrisha enkaina enye e tatene o ene kedienye, netii sii nchoo kumok?”" 
Micah1:1 Ororei lo Laitoriani ele oewuo enetii Mika le Moreshet, too nkolong'i e Yotam, o Ahas, o Hesekia, lelo aiguanak le Yuda. Etoduaa apa ninye kuna baa naaipirta Samaria o Yerusalem." 
Micah1:2 Entoning intae, intae lo oreren pooki; toning'o na kop, o pooki naatii atua, naa nchoo Olaitoriani Enkai eaku olchakeni tialo intae, Olaitoriani oiro teina aji enye Sinyati." 
Micah1:3 Amu ng'ura, kelotu Olaitoriani aipang'u teine wueji enye, nedou alotu aituny iwuejitin neeika e nkop." 
Micah1:4 Neshola ildoinyo tiabori ninye, neaku ierat iwululuni, netiu anaa suut te dukuya enkima, netiu anaa nkariak naatubukokoki enegut." 
Micah1:5 Ore ena pooki naa te nkaraki enkitapong'oto e Yakobo, o ng'ok e nkaji e Israel. Kainyoo enkitapong'oto e Yakobo? Aime Samaria? Naa kainyoo eng'oki e nkaji e Yuda? Aime Yerusalem?" 
Micah1:6 Ore enkaraki ina kaitaa nanu Samaria osototi te nkop naisiaja, ewueji neunieki isabibu; naa kabukoki nanu isoito lenyena atua oearata, nanuk ilkitamanyunot lenyena." 
Micah1:7 Ore nena kitanyaanyukot enyena oo nkaitin neidong'i aaitaa mbelibelat, ore nena tokitin e marmalisho nepejori te nkima. Ore nena kitanyaanyukot enyena oo nkaitin neirrag te mijoonisho. Amu too mpisai e mulayoi etasotuo ninye ninche, naa nena pisai e mulayoi errinyokino ninye." 
Micah1:8 Ore te nkaraki ena kayietu nanu aishir; kalo nanu ara olmasipai maishopo; kaitayu nanu enkishirata anaa mbariak, naishir anaa isidan." 
Micah1:9 Amu meishiunoyu olbae lenye neewuo Yuda, etabawua kishomi oo ltung'ana laainei, eewuo Yerusalem." 
Micah1:10 Milimu ena te Gat minchir aitasim ore tiatua Betlefara mperiperayu te nterit. 
Micah1:11 Eima enkoitoi inyi iloomanya Shafir, te masipaisho o te nkurruna; mepuonu lelo oomanya Saanan emipuonu aaipang'u; Ore enkishirata e Betesel naa kaiwuang'ie te iyie enkitashoto enye." 
Micah1:12 Amu ore lelo oomanya Marot neanyisho te yieunoto oleng amu etoduaa entorroni eing'uaa Olaitoriani nelotu nchomito e Yerusalem. 
Micah1:13 Enteen ingarrin oo mbartan iloomanya Lakish; intae apa enkiterunoto oo ng'ok nirikokiki entito e Sion, amu tiatua iyie enotoki inkitarruorrot e Isirael." 
Micah1:14 Ore enkaraki ina ilo iyie aisho nkishorot ole sere Moreshetgat; ore nkajijik e Akisib naa keaku entoki nalejisho, too laiguanak le Israel." 
Micah1:15 Kaigil nanu ayau oloisulie shumata intae, iloomanya Maresha; ore enkitoo oo Siraeli nelotu Adulam." 
Micah1:16 Entukur ilukuny inyi nibarnibarna ilpapit linyi, te nkaraki nena kera e ng'ida inyi; nchoo esipayu ilukuny inyi, anaa ilkurragoso, amu kepuo nkera inyi eyararoto." 
Micah2:1 Woi ninche lelo ooipiru entorroni neas entorroni too rruatin enye! Ore ake pee ekenyu neas ina naiguanutua, amu engolon oo nkaik enye etii." 
Micah2:2 Eng'uar ninche nkurman neya ninche; neng'uar nkajijik neya ninche; eibooki ninche oltung'ani enkop o enkaji enye, o ltung'ani o enjung'ore enye." 
Micah2:3 Ore enkaraki ina nji ejo Olaitoriani: Ng'ura kagilunore nanu ele marei aipiru entorroni ometaa mindimidimi aaibelekenya imurto inyi. Nimintokiki aapuo te nkitokoos amu keaku enkata e ntorroni. 
Micah2:4 Ore teina olong nerany ninche osinkolio le nkitumusumuset te nkaraki iyie, neishir ninche te nkishirata e mion ejo, “Eidaikieki iyiook katukul, eibelekenya ninye erubata oo ltung'ana laainei; eiwuang'ie ninye te nanu! Tiatua lelo ootaraitie iyiook etooro ninye nkurman ang.”" 
Micah2:5 Ore enkaraki ina mintoki aata hoo obo onang'aa enkopito te oshoto e nkukuo, tiatua eumata o Laitoriani." 
Micah2:6 “Mintoki naa alimu irorei le naibon.” Ejo ninche elimu ilomon, “Meishiaakino nelimu oltung'ani ilomon le kuna baa; meinepu iyiook esulare.”" 
Micah2:7 Keimakini ena na aji e Yakobo? Aimeeta Enkiyang'et o Laitoriani eng'iriata? Ke nkiaasin enyena kuna? Aimeeta enaitaas irorei laainei ilo olo too sipat? 
Micah2:8 Kake itudumakine iyie iltung'ana laainei anaa olmang'atinta; nioru olkila ilo oata eseriani, lelo oopuo eisiligayu lelo lemeeta ndamunot o larrabal." 
Micah2:9 Ore nkituaak oo ltung'ana laainei, niaraa boo, aitung'uaa ninche nkajijik enye sidain, nintung'uaa ninche nkera enye kutiti, nintung'uaa enkitoo ai ntarasi." 
Micah2:10 Tudumunye shomo amu mme ewueji neyeng'iyeng'areki ene, te nkaraki olduruk omutisho, te nkidaaroto torrono." 
Micah2:11 Tenelo oltung'ani airo mbaa e nkijape o elejare, ejo, “Kaaliki nanu iyie ilomon le naisho oo sabibu o enaisho napi?” Neidim ninye ataa olalikioroni lele orere!" 
Micah2:12 Esipa kalo nanu aiturrur intae Yakobo, kaiturrur nanu ilo pisiai loo Siraeli kapik nanu ninche te nebo anaa eluaata nabo, anaa ntare te ndaata te nkilepilep olorora loo ltung'ana." 
Micah2:13 Ore ilo obol elusie, neituruk alo te dukuya ninche, nepuo ninche aaim kishomi, neipang auluo aaim ine. Olaiguanani lenye nelo dukuya ninche, Olaitoriani otii endukuya enye." 
Micah3:1 Atejo nanu: entoning intae ilukuny e Yakobo o larikok le nkaji e Israel! Aimeishiaakino intae niyiolouu esipata," 
Micah3:2 intae ilooiba esupatisho ninyorrinyorro entorroni, intae ilooyieng iltung'ana laainei, nirishushu nkiri enye too loik lenye" 
Micah3:3 intae ilooinos nkiri oo ltung'ana laainei, nenang'aa ilonito lenye aaidie ninche, nigiligili iloik lenye aaitaa ng'iligilat, nigiligil anaa iloik oopiki emoti, netiu anaa nkiri naatii emoti." 
Micah3:4 Neitoki ninche aaishiraki Olaitoriani, kake mewaliki ninye ninche; eisudoo ninye enkomom enye te ninche teina rishata, enkaraki naitaa ninche nkiaasin enye torrok." 
Micah3:5 Nji ejo Olaitoriani tialo lelo oibonok ooitapong'oo iltung'ana laainei. Lelo ooishir aajo, “Eseriani” ina kata eeta ninche endaa nainos, neitayu olarrabal te ilo lemeeta endaa naisho meinosa." 
Micah3:6 Ore enkaraki ina, kemutu te ntae nimintokiki aata nduaat nemisimisu te ntae nimintokiki aata nkitumusumusot. Kedoyio enkolong too loibonok, neman emisimisi ninche;" 
Micah3:7 ore lelo aduaak netusulaki, neitukurruni lelo aitumusumusok; kepuo pooki aaiken nkutukie enye, amu metii ewalata naing'uaa Enkai." 
Micah3:8 Kake ore nanu, aaiputa engolon, o enkiyang'et o Laitoriani, te sipata o te nkidimata, pee aibalakinye Yakobo enkitapong'oto enye, naibalekinye Israel eng'oki enye." 
Micah3:9 Entoning ena, intae ilarikok le nkaji e Israel, intae ooibooyo esipata, nimbelekenyenye enkiguana nasipa." 
Micah3:10 Ilo oshet Sion to sarge neshet Yerusalem te ntorroni. 
Micah3:11 Edung ilarikok lenye enkiguana te ropare, neiteng'enisho ilapolosak lenye te laakinoto, neibonisho iloibonok lenye too ropiyiani; eji neigarakino ake sii Olaitoriani ejo, “Aimetii Olaitoriani atua iyiook? Meetae entorroni nalotu shumata iyiook.”" 
Micah3:12 Ore naa te nkaraki iyie kepuoi aatur Sion anaa enkurma; keaku Yerusalem osototi le nkidaata; neaku ilo doinyo le nkaji entim. 
Micah4:1 Ore too nkolong'i e siadi, ore ilo doinyo le nkaji o Laitoriani neitasheyieki anaa oldoinyo ooado aisul neilepieki aaitulusoo too ldoinyo nepuo iltung'ana kumok ine." 
Micah4:2 Naa kepuonu iloshon kumok nejo: “Wootu mailepa aapuo oldoinyo lo Laitoriani, maape enkaji e Nkai e Yakobo; pee etum ninye aiteng'ena iyiook nkoitoi enyena, nikipuo iyiook too rrekiei lenyena.” Amu Sion epukunye enkitanapata, neing'uaa ororei lo Laitoriani Yerusalem." 
Micah4:3 Keiguanare ninye iloreren kumok nedung'oki enkiguana iloshon oogol oo lakua; neidong ninche ilalema lenye aaitaa ntokitin naaturishoreki neitaa iremeta enye ntokitin naasilieki enkurma; nemeitoki olosho adumaki olosho olalem, nemeigil aekata aaitamok ate olarrabal." 
Micah4:4 Kake kelo ake pooki tung'ani oton tiabori osabibu lenye o tiabori olng'aboli lenye, nemeetae oloiture ninche; amu enkutuk o Laitoriani loo lororani nairoro." 
Micah4:5 Amu epuoito iltung'ana pooki, oltung'ani ake te nkarna e Nkai enye. Kake eikipuo iyiook te nkarna o Laitoriani Enkai ang ntarasi o ntarasi." 
Micah4:6 Ore kenya teina olong Olaitoriani ojo, naa kalo nanu aiturrur ilmaiman, naiturrur lelo apa ootarayioki o lelo apa laaisilisilo." 
Micah4:7 Ore lelo maiman naitaa nanu olpisiai oleku; ore lelo apa ooiturrayioki, naitaa olorere ogol; nelo Olaitoriani aitore ninche to ldoinyo le Sion; ebaiki ena kata o ntarasi." 
Micah4:8 Naa ore iyie lo talet loo ntare, na doinyo e ntito e Sion iyie kenya epukunye, iyie epukunye enkitoria nalotu, ina kitoria e ntito e Yerusalem." 
Micah4:9 Kainyoo naa pee inchir abuaku? Aimetii olaiguanani atua iyie keidaa olautaroni lino, eji metaa kitijing'a emion anaa enkitok nasaisai?" 
Micah4:10 Temerregelayu ning'or aishir, na tito e Sion, anaa enkitok nasaisai; amu ore taata naa ilo aing'uaa ena anasa, nilo abik teina kop naisiaja ilo iyie Babilon. Naa teine kipuoi aakordu, teine kilo Olaitoriani alaku iyie aitung'uaa nkaik oo lmang'ati linono." 
Micah4:11 Eiturrurrote taata iloshon kumok, pee kigilunore iyie ejo, “Nchoo ninye eisarkionieki, naa nchoo nkonyek ang eing'or Sion.”" 
Micah4:12 Kake meyiolo ninche ndamunot o Laitoriani, mening'u ninche nkitobirat enyena nchere eiturrurro ninche anaa suut to lkurroto oidong'ishoreki." 
Micah4:13 Tudumunye ndong'o ninche na tito e Sion, amu kaitaa nanu emowuo ino esekenkei, naitaa iloisotok linono osuyai; iar iyie iloreren kumok aitaa mpurdat, ore imasaa enye nintisinyaki Olaitoriani. Ore enkarsisisho enye nintisinyaki Olaitoriani le nkop pooki." 
Micah5:1 Eitamanaki intae esuntai, etamanaki iyiook aamuat to ngudi etoosho ninche eseder o Laitoriani le Israel." 
Micah5:2 Kake ore iyie Betlehem Efrata, iyie ora kiti too lgilat le Yuda, iyie epukunye ilo olotu te nkaraki nanu, ilo olo aaku Olaitoriani loo Siraeli; ilo laa ore enkiterunoto enye naa e niopa, ebaiki nkolong'i e moitie." 
Micah5:3 Ore enkaraki ina, kepalaa ninye ninche ometabau ina kata, pee eiu ina nanuta ninye, netum taa ilalashera lenyena pooki aatorrinyokinoto iltung'ana le Israel." 
Micah5:4 Naa keitashe ninye aitoti nkerra enyena te ngolon o Laitoriani te nkitoo e nkarna o Laitoriani Enkai enye. 
Micah5:5 Naa kelo ninye ayau eseriani. Pee kitum iyiook aatudumakinoto ninye ilchekuti oopishana, o ltung'ana isiet kituaak loo ltung'ana." 
Micah5:6 Kepuo ninche aaitore enkop e Asiria to lalem, neitore enkop e Nimrod te nchutati o lalem; naa kepuo ninche aakordu iyiook too le Siria, tenepuonu ninche enkop ang nepuonu aaituny ilpolosien lang." 
Micah5:7 Netum taa ilo pisiai le Yakobo atijing'a empolos oo ltung'ana kumok, anaa enkoiliolio naing'uaa Olaitoriani, anaa enchan nashaiki nkujit nemeanyu iltung'ana anaa nkera e tung'ana." 
Micah5:8 Naa kelo ilo pisiai le Yakobo aaku tenebo iloshon, nejing empolos oo ltung'ana kumok netiu anaa olng'atuny otii atua ing'uesi e ntim, anaa olkuoo lo lng'atuny oti atua eluaata oo nkerra, naa teneimaa atua nenang'ie enkop; neitaa ndung'udung'ot, nemeetae olokordu." 
Micah5:9 Kepuoi aailepie enkaina ino te shumata ilmang'ati linono, ore ilmang'ati linono pooki naa keiwuang'ieki." 
Micah5:10 Ore kenya teina olong Olaitoriani ojo, naa kaiwuang'ie nanu mbartan inyi aitung'uaa intae, naidaikie ngarrin inyi oo mbartan;" 
Micah5:11 naa kaiwuang'ie nanu nena anas e nkop inyi nauroo lelo sempewueti linyi pooki; 
Micah5:12 naiwuang'ie nanu esakutore te nkop inyi, niming'iligili aekata aata esakutore." 
Micah5:13 Naa kaiwuang'ie nanu nkitanyaanyukot inyi, naiwuang'ie ng'apeta inyi te ntae, niming'iligili intae aairrugokino esiaai oo nkaik inyi;" 
Micah5:14 naa kadotu nanu Asherim inyi aiwuang'ie tiatua intae naidaikie nkanas inyi. 
Micah5:15 Naa ore te ngoro o te ngoro napi naitalaku elap, te lelo oshon leitu ening'isho." 
Micah6:1 Toning'o enajo Olaitoriani: “Tudumunye, tasaisho te dukuya ildoinyo, nincho ndoinyo metoning'o oltoilo lino." 
Micah6:2 Entoning intae lo doinyo, enchankar o Laitoriani, o ntae ilkitamanyunot oo bikoo te nkop; amu eeta Olaitoriani enchankar o ltung'ana lenyena, naa kelo ninye aitang'or Israel." 
Micah6:3 “Lo tung'ana laainei, kaa nanu aitaasa intae? Kainyoo nanu aitanaurie intae? Entawalikiaki nanu!" 
Micah6:4 Amu ayawua nanu intae ailepunye te nkop e Misiri, nalaku intae te nkaji e sinkaisho; nairriu nanu Musa meshomo te dukuya intae, o Aron, o Miriam." 
Micah6:5 Lo tung'ana laainei, entadamu ina apa naipirua Balak olaiguanani le Moab, o ina natawalikia Balaam olayioni le Boer ninye, o ina nataasa ebaiki Shitim o metabaiki Gilgal pee itumutumu aatayiolo iasat naaitajeusho o Laitoriani." 
Micah6:6 “Kainyoo nanu ayau dukuya Olaitoriani, nalotu airrugo te dukuya Enkai natii shumata aisul? Kalotu nanu dukuya ninye oo lasarri oopejori too lasho lo lari obo?" 
Micah6:7 Keitiship Olaitoriani ilmeregeshi enkalifu nabo, o lkejek enkalifu nabo le ilata? Kaishooyo nanu olkikau lai te nkaraki nkitarruorrot aainei, ilo ng'anayioi lo sesen lai te nkaraki eng'oki o ltau lai?”" 
Micah6:8 Kintoduaa ninye iyie lo tung'ani embae sidai o ina nayieu Olaitoriani te iyie, pee ias esipata ninyorru isupati nilo te mborron tenebo Enkai ino?" 
Micah6:9 Eishiraki oltoilo lo Laitoriani enkanasa naa eng'eno nagut teneurei enkarna enye: “Toning'o lo osho o eumata ena anasa. 
Micah6:10 Ilchumat le nkarrueisho tiatua enkaji o larruoni, o ina temet natii elejare naata oldeket?" 
Micah6:11 Kapalaa nanu oltung'ani oata entemet naineneng'ishoreki e lejare o lbene otii isoito ooineneng'ishoreki le lejare? 
Micah6:12 Eeta ilkarsisi linono olarrabal; neiro lelo le nkop ino elejare, neeta ilng'ejepa lenye elejare." 
Micah6:13 Ore enkaraki ina, aaiterua nanu aosh iyie, naitomijoon te nkaraki ing'ok inono."
