Micah6:14 Ilo iyie adaa nimiraposho naa kelo olameyu atii iwuejitin inono e atua. Inteng'el iyie kake mintagol, ore ina ninteng'el nemeaku. Ore ina nisudoo aiteng'el naisho nanu metara olalem." 
Micah6:15 “Iun iyie kake misampu; iramat iyie iloirienito kake mielare eilata enye; Irony iyie isabibu, kake miok enaisho enye." 
Micah6:16 Amu imbung'a iyie nkikoot e Omri, o siaaitin pooki e nkaji e Ahab; nimbung'a iyie nkikoot enye, pee aatum nanu aitaa iyie olmuaate naitaa emanyisho ino entoki naimakini; neaku inap iyie esukeny oo ltung'ana.”" 
Micah7:1 Woi nanu, amu atotiwuo anaa enkata naiturrurri ilng'anayio le nkata e nkirowuaj anaa enkata naisampuni isabibu, eitu eleku toki naidimi aainosa meetae nkimarrimarrat oo lng'abolo le nkiterata ooshipakino oltau lai." 
Micah7:2 Eidaayie oltung'ani le Nkai te nkop, nemeetae oltung'ani supat too ltung'ana eirragita pooki aanyu embukoroto o sarge, nerresh ake pooki tung'ani olalashe to rreshet." 
Micah7:3 Etii nkaik enye shumata entorroni, pee eas te nkarriyiano, eikilikuanu olkitok o ladung'oni le nkiguana eropare, ore oltung'ani kitok neimaiki ntorrok naang'uar oltau lenye; nena ninche eas tenebo." 
Micah7:4 Ore ilo supat aisul te ninche netiu anaa enkaitubului, ore ilo lenye oji olasipani netiu anaa olpaashe loo lkiku. Etabawua enkata oo larripok lenye le nkitamioto enye. Etataana taata olmilo lenye." 
Micah7:5 Mipik osiligi lino ole latia, niming'arakino olchore; torripo enkutuk ino teina nikilej etii olgoo lino;" 
Micah7:6 amu keitaas olayioni menye mbaa e sulare, nedumakino entito ng'otonye, nedumakino entito nayamaki enkaputani; ore ilmang'ati lo ltung'ani naa lelo le nkaji enye makewan." 
Micah7:7 Kake ore nanu, kaing'or Olaitoriani naanyu nanu Enkai e njeunoto ai; kaaning nanu Enkai ai." 
Micah7:8 Mikishipakino nanu, lo mang'atinta lai; tenabatata nanu naa kadumunye; tenaton nanu te naimin, neaku Olaitoriani ewang'an te nkaraki nanu." 
Micah7:9 Kang'iri nanu engoro o Laitoriani, amu ataasa nanu eng'oki tialo ninye, ometaba anaa naamitu ninye, naadung'oki ninye nanu enkiguana. Kaayau ninye nanu enetii ewang'an naa kaing'or nanu enkordunoto enye." 
Micah7:10 Nedol taa olmang'atinta lai, neiput enkurruna teina naatiaaka nanu, “Koree Olaitoriani Enkai ino?” Neing'or nkonyek aainei ninye; naa kepuoi aaitunyoki ninye enkop, anaa esarng'ab e nkoitoi." 
Micah7:11 Enkolong nashetieki isunta inono! Ore teina olong naa kepuoi aaitalala ilpolosien aaponaa. 
Micah7:12 Ore teina olong naa kepuonu enitii eing'uaa Asiria o metabaiki Misiri, o ebaiki enaiposha ometabaiki enaiposha, o ebaiki oldoinyo ometabaiki oldoinyo." 
Micah7:13 Kake keaku enkop mijooni te lelo oo manya, te nkaraki ilng'anayio loo nkiaasin enye." 
Micah7:14 Taramata iltung'ana linono te ng'udi ino, ina luaata e njung'ore ino. Oobik maate tiatua entim, te mpolos e nkurma eina kop. Nchoo ninche edaa te Bashan o te Gilead, anaa apa too nkolong'i e apa." 
Micah7:15 Anaa apa too napa olong'i nitupukunye te Misiri, kaitodol nanu ninche mbaa e nking'asia." 
Micah7:16 Kedol iloshon nekurru te nkidimata enye pooki; neibung ninche nkutukie enye too nkaik, neming'anu nkiyiaa enye;" 
Micah7:17 nemej ninche enterit anaa olasurai, anaa nkeenta e nkop; nepuonu ninche eikirikira eing'uaa isempewueti lenye; neibelekenyakino ninche to lkirutoto Olaitoriani Enkai ang, neureishoyu ninche te nkaraki iyie." 
Micah7:18 Kaa Ai natiu anaa iyie, apalaki ntorrok, negiroo nkitarruorrot te nkaraki olpisiai le njung'ore enye? Meibung ninye engoro enye ntarasi amu keshipakino ninye enyorrata nauno." 
Micah7:19 Keig'il ninye atum olng'ur te nkaraki iyiook, neitunyoo ninye ntorrok ang too nkejek enyena. Inturraa iyie ing'ok ang, anang'aki enguton e naiposha." 
Micah7:20 Intodolu iyie esupatisho o enkisiligata te Yakobo, nintodolu enyorrata nauno te Abraham anaa apa eninosa olmumai too loo papa ebaiki nkolong'i e moitie." 
Nahum1:1 Olkilikuai ele oipirta Ninawi. Embuku ena oo nduaat e Nahum le Elkosh. 
Nahum1:2 Ore Olaitoriani naa Enkai o lom neitalaku elap, eitalaku Olaitoriani elap neeta engoro napi, eitalaku Olaitoriani elap too lmang'ati lenyena, negorokino ilmang'ati lenyena." 
Nahum1:3 Mesioki Olaitoriani agoro neeta enkidimata kitok, nemeeta kata nemeitalaku Olaitoriani entorroni. Ore enkoitoi enye naa olkutati o siwuo, ore nkatampo naa enterit oo nkejek enyena." 
Nahum1:4 Eisikong ninye enaiposha neitoi, eitoi ninye ilkejek pooki neitoi Bashan o Karmel, ore ina kishiaa e sikar e Lebanon netoyu." 
Nahum1:5 Eikirikira ildoinyo te dukuya ninye, neshola ndoinyo; neirrag enkop eitomijoonoki te dukuya ninye, o enkop o pooki namanya atua ninye." 
Nahum1:6 Kaing'ae oidim aitasho te dukuya engoro enye? Kaing'ae oidim ating'iria enkirowuaj e ngoro enye? Etubukuoki engoro enye napi anaa enkima, netebelaki ndapidapo aaidapash te dukuya ninye." 
Nahum1:7 Aisupat Olaitoriani osempewuet ninye te nkolong e nyamali; eyiolo ninye lelo oosaru ninye. 
Nahum1:8 Kake to loirrag le nkare nadooyo eishie ninye tukul ilmang'ati lenyena, nemir ilmang'ati lenyena amiraki enaimin." 
Nahum1:9 Kainyoo iyie irreshie Olaitoriani? Eikindaikie ninye iyie, meetae hoo obo ogilunore ninye katitin are." 
Nahum1:10 Kemuti ninche anaa orrarrati loo lkiku, anaa olkujita otoyio." 
Nahum1:11 Keitu elotu obo oing'uaa atua iyie, oitobira entorroni tiaalo Olaitoriani, oiguanu mbaa torrok?" 
Nahum1:12 Nji ejo Olaitoriani, “Ore hoo negol ninche naa kumok keiwuang'ieki ninche neitarasari. Ore hoo naaisilisilo nanu iyie maaigil nanu aisilisil iyie." 
Nahum1:13 Kagil taata nanu enchata enye oo murto aiwuang'ie te iyie nadung inkeenta nikiteenieki iyie aidapash.” 
Nahum1:14 Eishorua Olaitoriani enkitanapata nikimpirta iyie: “Meigili aekata aadumu enkarna ino; kaiwuang'ie nanu te nkaji oo nkaitin inono, kitanyaanyukoto e nkai naguetuno oina nasholuno. Kaitobir nanu enkurare ino amu ira iyie arruoni.”" 
Nahum1:15 Ng'ura roruat enyena too ldoinyo, eilo oyau ilomon supati, ilo olimu eseriani! Imbung'a isiruai linono iyie, Yuda, intabai ilmuma linono, amu mikingil aekata olarruoni agilunore iyie, eiwuang'ieki ninye tukul." 
Nahum2:1 Kiewuo olainyalani arasaki iyie, intagolo iltimito, ing'ura enkoitoi terretena empolos ino; enturrurro engolon inyi pooki." 
Nahum2:2 (Amu kerrinyu Olaitoriani enkishiaa e nkitoo e Yakobo. Anaa enkishiaa e nkitoo e Israel, amu eibung'a apa ilainyalak ninche, neinyal ilngosil lenye.)" 
Nahum2:3 Ore ina long'o oo ltung'ana lenye magil naa kenyokie, neishopito isikarini lenye nkilani pilei neiwuang ngarrin enyena oo mbartan anaa olng'ejep le nkima, teneipotuni olarrabal neitureisho lelo ookuetu." 
Nahum2:4 Neruko ngarrin oo mbartan too nkoitoi e nkanasa nepuo idia alo neitu ena alo too wuejitin neetumoreki e nkanasa. Neiwuang'u te nkimerlel anaa sitimani, neimerlel anaa nkiwuang'at e nchan." 
Nahum2:5 Neipotuni lelo kituaak, nerrorro ninche epuoito, nekuetiki ninche esuntai, neidipaki aaitolok iloketa." 
Nahum2:6 Etaboloki nkishomin o lkeju neiputa enkaji e nkitoo enkuretisho. 
Nahum2:7 Ore ina aiguanani enye, etooruoki ilkilani, etanapaki aaya, neishirita nkaisiayak enyena neishir anaa nturkuluoni, neoshiosh ilgooitie lenye." 
Nahum2:8 Eikununo Ninawi anaa olchorro oruko enkare enye neishir ninche aajo, “Ntasho! Ntasho!” Kake meetae olorrinyunye." 
Nahum2:9 Ewaita enkosholai ewaita sahabu, meeta olchumati eneiting'ie anaa karsisisho e pooki toki e tipat." 
Nahum2:10 Olmuate! Emijoonisho o enkidaata! Etalepori iltauja, neikirikira nkejek, eiputa olkirutoto mpolosi enye pooki, neipusita nkomomi enye pooki!" 
Nahum2:11 Koree enkapune oo lng'atunyo ina apune oo lkuoo loo lng'atunyo ine neyau olng'atuny engues natara, ine netii nkiyioitin enyena nemeeta entoki naitanyamal?" 
Nahum2:12 Eibung'a olng'atuny engues nainos neyiataa ina ngues neyaki ilkuoo lenyena, negor ina meinosa iliponga enyena. Neiput enkapune enye inguesi naatara ninye neiput isanagi lenyena nkiri." 
Nahum2:13 Ng'ura kaagilunore nanu iyie, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, naa kapejoo ngarrin inono oo mbartan te mpuruo nemut olalem lelo ng'atunyo linono ooti; Kaiwuang'ie nanu nena ng'uesi inono te nkop. Nemeigili aekata aaning oltoilo loo lkiliku linono." 
Nahum3:1 Woi ena anasa o sarge ebore elejare o enkisima nemeiting aekata eyararoto enye. 
Nahum3:2 Entoning endarata e oshoto enkeene, o ltoilo loo nkejek oo ngarrin enkuetata oo mbartan o elototo oo ngarrin oo mbartan!" 
Nahum3:3 Ekuetu ilakedok loo mbartan, eimerlel ilalema neiwuang'u iremeta, olorora olo aye osototi loo mpopoki. Meeta eneiting'ie mpopoki enye nerrorro ninche te nena popoki enye!" 
Nahum3:4 Te nkaraki ina kibor oo nkonyek eina mulayoi, ina kitok nasakutisho naata esulare, ina nakaldaa iloshon enkibor enye oo nkonyek, nekaldaa iloreren too ntaleng'o enyena." 
Nahum3:5 Ng'ura kaagilunore nanu iyie, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, naa kadumu nanu olkila lino lirrotianita apik enkomom ino, naisho nanu iloshon metoduaa emasipaisho ino, nedol nkitoriat enkurruna ino." 
Nahum3:6 Kaairriwaki nanu iyie olduruk naaitaas iyie mbaa e sulare, naitaa entoki torrono naing'asiakinoi." 
Nahum3:7 Ore lelo pooki liking'or iyie, nikilam ejo, “Etumute Ninawi; kaing'ae naishiraki ninye? Kaji nanu atumie iltung'ana ooitagol ninye?”" 
Nahum3:8 Ira supat alang Tebes, apa natotona te mbata Nail, neman enkare ninye, anaa enaiposha esuntai olpaashe lenye?" 
Nahum3:9 Etiopia apa engolon enye o Misiri, nemeeta engolon enye enkiting'oto; Ilaretok lenyena apa ile Libia." 
Nahum3:10 Ore ake eyia etarayioki ninye neyae, eshomo ninye eyararoto, ore nkera enyena neitaaki ndung'udung'ot, te nkiterunoto e pooki oitoi kitok, amu etooshoki enkukuo oo ltung'ana lenyena ooyanyiti, ore iltung'ana lenyena pooki kituaak eteenaki too lpisia." 
Nahum3:11 Ilo sii iyie amera, ilo sii iyie aisudori, nilo aing'oru, enkisudoroto tenkaraki ilmang'ati." 
Nahum3:12 Ore isempewueti linono pooki, neikununo anaa ilng'abolo, ooto ilng'anayio le dukuya teneipiripiri, nerrarrunye, aadoiki enkutuk eilo oinos." 
Nahum3:13 Ng'ura ilturrurri linyi ajo nkituaak naatii empolos inyi. Ore nkishomin e nkop inyi naa kebolo aang'a too lmang'ati linyi, einosa enkima isekenke inyi." 
Nahum3:14 Entooku enkare enterreten emanata inyi, entagolo isempewueti linyi, enchom atua enterit entunyo esarng'ab, embung'a entobira enkitobirata oo lmatofali." 
Nahum3:15 Eikilo enkima ainos teine, eikilo olalem ashurtu eikimut iyie anaa olmaati. Entoponai ate anaa olmaati, entoponari anaa ntargeet!" 
Nahum3:16 Itoponaiyie ilamirak linono aitulusoo too lakir le shumata. Eisalaash olmaati inaipuko nepuo. 
Nahum3:17 Eikununo ilkituaak linono anaa ntargeeti neikununo ilaigerok linono pooki anaa emus o lmaati, neirragita too lpaashen te nkolong e nkirobi ore ake pee eilepu enkolong, nelaari aapuo; meetae oltung'ani oyiolo enetii ninche." 
Nahum3:18 Eirura ilairritak linono, lo aiguanani le Asiria; neimug iltung'ana linono kituaak. Eidapashate iltung'ana linono too ldoinyo, nemeetae oloiturrurr ninche." 
Nahum3:19 Meetae embaata too lbaa linono, aitorrono oleng olbae lino. Ore lelo pooki ooning mbaa inono, neosh nkaik tenkaraki iyie. Amu kaing'ae eitu ebaiki ina torroni ino nemeish aekata?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Olkilikuai lo Laitoriani ele otoduaa oloiboni le Nkai oji Habakuki. 
Habakkuk1:2 Iyie Olaitoriani ke nkata nabaa aishir nanu te nkaraki eretoto, nimining iyie? Aishir nanu ajo olarrabal! Neitu iyie kintajeu?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Kainyoo iyie pee kincho nanu matoduaa ntorrok, naing'or enyamali? Etii enkidaata o larrabal dukuya nanu; naatudumakine enyamali o enchankar." 
Habakkuk1:4 Etaa enkitanapata pesho nemeas aekata esipata esiaai amu etamuata iltorrok aaman lelo loo sipat, neaku keibelekenyi esipata." 
Habakkuk1:5 Ing'ura atua iloshon, pee idol; ning'asia nimputukuny. Amu aasita nanu esiaai too nkolong'i inyi, nimindimidimi intae aairuko tenelikini intae." 
Habakkuk1:6 Amu eng'ura, kailepunye nanu Ilkaldayo ilo osho odua neisosion, nelo aibulu enkop pooki, nepuonu aaya imanyishoritin neme nkunenye." 
Habakkuk1:7 Iltung'ana ooitureisho ninche; ore isipat enye o nkiguanat enye naa ninche maate epukunye. 
Habakkuk1:8 Eneneng mbartan enye aalang ilowuarak kerin, nepi aalang isuyian le nteipa; ore lakedok lenye loo mbartan nenyok oleng to lwuasa. Ee enelakua eing'uaa lakedok lenye loo mbartan, nepuo tiai anaa olkurragos oipirri alo ainos eng'ues." 
Habakkuk1:9 Eetuo pooki te nkaraki olarrabal; ore olkirutoto te nkaraki ninche nelo te dukuya ninche. Neiturrur ninche iyarunot anaa osinyai. 
Habakkuk1:10 Ore te dukuya ilaiguanak nesukenyisho ninche. Ore ilaitoriak neiguranie ninche. Ekueniyie ninche pooki sempewuet, amu kerup ninche enterit neya ine." 
Habakkuk1:11 Nepuo ninche neor, enkop epuo anaa olkutati, aapuo ninche eeta entioto, kulo tung'ana ooitaa engolon enye enkai enye." 
Habakkuk1:12 Aimira iyie oloo ntarasi, iyie Olaitoriani Enkai ai lo Sinyati lai? Mikiye iyiook, Olaitoriani itegelua iyie ninche aitaa iladung'ok le nkiguana; ore iyie na dapidapoi, nintasheyie ninche pee eitameisho." 
Habakkuk1:13 Iyie oloata nkonyek sidain nemeidim aaing'ura entorroni nemeidim aaing'ura enkarruoisho, kainyoo iyie pee ing'or iltung'ana lemeisiligayu, nintirring'a iyie eijoo ilarruok, lelo supati aalang ninche." 
Habakkuk1:14 Amu ntotiu iyie iltung'ana anaa sinkir le naiposha, anaa nena tokitin naaikurtutari nemeeta oloitore." 
Habakkuk1:15 Eyau ninye ninche pooki to ltarge, neyietu ninche pooki to rreshet neiturrur ninche to rreshet lenye sapuk; netum taa atishipayu neitokoos." 
Habakkuk1:16 Ore enkaraki ina eitayio ninye olasar te nkaraki orreshet lenye, nepej enkorropil te nkaraki orreshet lenye sapuk; amu te nkaraki ninche pee eishu ninye te sikar, nepir endaa enye." 
Habakkuk1:17 Keitayu ninye lelo ootii orreshet lenye, near ninye iloshon metuata nemeing'urrie ntarasi?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Kaitashe nanu te rishata ai arripisho. Naton nanu to ltalet orripishoreki naing'orisho nanu, pee adol ina naajoki ninye nanu, o ina nawalu nanu tialo enking'unyung'uny ai." 
Habakkuk2:2 Naawaliki nanu Olaitoriani ejo, “Ngero ena duaata; ngero mbalie too soito dapashi, pee etum akueta ilo oisum." 
Habakkuk2:3 Amu eton ake eanyu enduaata enkata enye; kesieku ninye alotu erishata enye - nemelejisho ninye. Tenelioo ninye aa yietut, taanyu ninye, esipa kelotu ninye, meimutie ninye." 
Habakkuk2:4 Ng'ura, ore ilo leme sidai oltau lenye, nemetum puan, kake ore ilo asipani eishu te nkirukoto.”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Ore ake sii enkalejani enaisho; mebikoo ilo tung'ani oitokoos nelala olorok lenye eba anaa enemeneng'a; etiu anaa keeya meraposho ae kata. Eiturrurroki ninye kewan iloshon pooki neiturrur iloreren pooki anaa iltung'ana lenyena makewan. 
Habakkuk2:6 Aimeibelekenyakino kulo pooki ninye, neitalaku elap, nesukeny ninye ejo, “Woi ninye ilo osot ntokitin neme nkunenyena - ae te nkata nabaa ilo asotoki kewan elaakinoto oo silen.”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Aimedumunye lelo lintalak isilen nabo kata, ore lelo oodumunye nikinkirikirie iyie? Nilo iyie aaku oloyaruno te ninche." 
Habakkuk2:8 Ore enkaraki nimbung'a araya iloshon kumok, eikimbung iyie aaraya ilo pisiai oleku loo ltung'ana te nkaraki osarge loo ltung'ana o larrabal te nkop, too nkanas e lelo pooki oomanya atua." 
Habakkuk2:9 Woi ninye ilo otum tumoto e ntorroni te nkaji enye, ilo oilepunye orreshet lenye, pee medoiki entorroni!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Mpiraka iyie enkaji ino enkurruna, ore teine niwuang'ie iloreren kumok ninturrayie enkishui ino makewan." 
Habakkuk2:11 Amu keishir osoit te suntai, neng'amaa iloom." 
Habakkuk2:12 Woi ninye ilo oshetu enkang to sarge, neitayu enkanasa te ntorroni." 
Habakkuk2:13 Ng'ura mme Olaitoriani loo lororani eing'uaa, nchere pee easisho iltung'ana te nkaraki enkima, neitanaur ilosho ate te mpesho?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Amu keyookini aaiput enkop, te ng'eno e nkitoo o Laitoriani, anaa enaibulua enkare enaiposha." 
Habakkuk2:15 Woi ninye ilo oitook ile latia enye, enkikompe e ngoro enye, neitemer ninche, pee etum atishila enkurruna enye!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Eikipuoi iyie aaishopoki esulare te rishata e nkitoo, tookisho iyie, niesiesari. Ore enkikompe natii enkaina e tatene o Laitoriani, naa keitamanuni aayau enitii, nelotu enkurruna shumata ekitoo ino!" 
Habakkuk2:17 Ore olarrabal oitayioki te Lebanon naa eikimisie iyie; Ore enkidaata oo ng'uesi naa eikirutie iyie, te nkaraki ilo sarge loo ltung'ana o larrabal te nkop, nejing'aki nkanas o lelo pooki oomanya atua." 
Habakkuk2:18 Kaa dupoto eeta enkitanyaanyukoto e nkai, teneidip olaitobirani lenye aitobiru, enkitanyaanyukoto e nkai e sekenkei, olaiteng'enani le lejare? Amu keisilig oloasisho ina kitobirunoto naitobirua ninye, nemeitobiru ninye nkitanyaanyukot nemeiro!" 
Habakkuk2:19 Woi ninye ilo ojoki enchata, inyo; nejoki osoit lemeiro, tudumunye! Ng'ura etumuraki ninye te sahabu o te nkosholai, kake metii enkiyang'et tukul atua ninye." 
Habakkuk2:20 Kake etii Olaitoriani atua enkaji enye Sinyati; nchoo enkop pooki eitirring'a te dukuya ninye. 
Habakkuk3:1 Enkomono ena e Habakuki oloiboni le Nkai, te risioroto e Shiginot." 
Habakkuk3:2 Iyie Olaitoriani, atoning'o nanu mbaa inono, ore esiaai ino, iyie Olaitoriani kaure nanu. Ore te mpolos oo larin intang'ejuko iyie ninye ore te mpolos oo larin nchoo metayiolouni; ore te ngoro, tadamu olng'ur." 
Habakkuk3:3 Na Ai wou te Teman, nelotu ilo obo Sinyati eing'uaa oldoinyo le Paran. Neiput enkitoo shumata, neiput enkop e nkisisa enye." 
Habakkuk3:4 Ore enkimerlel enye netiu anaa ewang'an, neng'orunye ewang'an te nkaina enye; ore teine neimulumul engolon enye." 
Habakkuk3:5 Nelo olbuket te dukuya ninye, nesuju olmeitai ninye etaaniki." 
Habakkuk3:6 Eitashe ninye netem endapasho e nkop; neing'orisho ninye neiposhiposh iloreren, neitokini aaidapash lelo doinyo ootii atua. Ore lelo doinyo loo ntarasi neidapasha ore nena doinyo oo ntarasi nedoyio aaimis. Ore nkoitoi enyena naa iniapa moitie." 
Habakkuk3:7 Atoduaa nanu ilng'oborri le Kushan tiatua emion ore iltung'ana le Midian neikirikira. 
Habakkuk3:8 Itagorokine apa iyie ilkejek iyie Olaitoriani? Itagorokine iyie ilkejek anaa ke naiposha igilunore. Pee itakedo iyie mbartan inono, nena bartan inono e nkishuroto." 
Habakkuk3:9 Itabolo iyie emootian ino, nipik mbaa empito e nkawuo. Imperra iyie enkop apik ilkejek." 
Habakkuk3:10 Kidol iyie ildoinyo neikirikira, nenang'ari nkariak aaruko, ore enguton neitayu oltoilo lenye, nedumu nkaik enyena ailepie." 
Habakkuk3:11 Neitashe enkolong o lapa too wuejitin enye, te wang'an e nkimerlel oo mbaa inono epuo etangoroyioki, o te nkimerlel e ina remet ino naimerlel." 
Habakkuk3:12 Ntunyoyie iyie aimaa enkop te mpushuna, ntunyoyie iyie iloshon te ngoro." 
Habakkuk3:13 Ishomo iyie te nkaraki enjeunoto oo ltung'ana linono, te nkaraki enjeunoto eilo litubukoko eilata aput. Itupurda iyie endukuya eilo arruoni, irragie ninye meishopo ebaiki enkupes o metabaiki emurt." 
Habakkuk3:14 Itangoro iyie too mbaa inono endukuya oo lmurran lenyena, ilo oewuo anaa olkutati aidapash iyiook, neng'ida ninye anaa oloidaikie olaisinani te nkisudoroto." 
Habakkuk3:15 Ntunyo iyie enaiposha too mbartan inono, ine wueji oo nkariak kumok." 
Habakkuk3:16 Atoning'o nanu naikirikira, naaonyo enkutuk, teilo toilo latoning'o. Neng'ueyu iloik laainei tiatua nanu, neikirikira nkejek aainei. Kaitirring'a nanu aanyu enkolong e nyamali, pee elotu shumata lelo oorasaki iyiook." 
Habakkuk3:17 Ore hoo nemeitapuku olng'aboli, nemeiu osabibu ilng'anayio, neimin ilng'anayio lo loirien, nemeiu nkurman endaa, neiwuang'ieki aaishie iluaat oo ntare nemeitoki aatii nchoo nkang'itie." 
Habakkuk3:18 Ore ake eyia, kashipakino nanu Olaitoriani, kang'idakino nanu Enkai e njeunoto ai." 
Habakkuk3:19 Enkai, Olaitoriani ninye engolon ai; neitotiu nkejek aainei anaa ine ntarakuet te neneng'i, naaidimie ninye maimai nchumat oo ldoinyo." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ele rorei lo Laitoriani oewuo enetii Sefania olayioni le Kushi, olayioni le Gedalia, olayioni le Amaria, olayioni le Hesekia, too nkolongi e Yosia ilo ayioni le Amon, olaiguanani le Yuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 “Kajutu nanu tukul pooki toki aiwuang'ie ti oriong enkop,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Zephaniah1:3 “Kajutu nanu tung'ani o eng'ues; kajutu nanu aiwuang'ie ntaritik o loing'ang'e o sinkir le naiposha. Kanang'aa nanu aiturraa lelo torrok; kaishie nanu iltung'ana, aiwuang'ie ti oriong e nkop,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Kaitorioo nanu enkaina ai aarare Yuda, naarare sii lelo pooki oomanya Yerusalem; naa kaishie nanu aiwuang'ie tene wueji ilo pisiai le Baal o ina arna e lelo apolosak ooserem nkitanyaanyukot;" 
Zephaniah1:5 lelo ooirrugokino too nchumat oo nkajijik olorora le shumata; lelo ooirrugo neinosie Olaitoriani olmumai neitoki ake sii aainos olmumai te nkarna e nkai naji Milkom; 
Zephaniah1:6 lelo ooibelekenyate ootapala esujata o Laitoriani, lelo lemeing'oru Olaitoriani anaa eikilikuanishore ninye.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Ntirring'ayu te dukuya olaitoriani Enkai! Amu etataana enkolong o Laitoriani; eitobira Olaitoriani olasar neitisinya ilomon lenyena. 
Zephaniah1:8 Naa ore te ina olong o lasar lo Laitoriani, “Kaitame nanu lelo kituaak o lelo ayiok lo laiguanani o lelo pooki ooishopote too nkilani oo loreren." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ore te ina olong naitame nanu lelo pooki ooseremisho anaa iltung'ana lemeyiolo Enkai lelo oopurrisho near iltung'ana metuata pee etumi aaiputa nkajijik o lkitok lenye iyarunot.” 
Zephaniah1:10 “Ore akenya te ina olong,” Olaitoriani ojo, “naa kening'i olkiyioi teina Kishomi o Sinkirri, eyietunoto e nkishirata naing'uaa Endung'oto e Are, esulunoto kitok too ldoinyo." 
Zephaniah1:11 Enteyietu enchira intae iloomanya Motar! Amu meekure eetae ilbiasharani; ore lelo pooki ooipim enkosholai nedungori aaiwuangie. 
Zephaniah1:12 “Ore akenya te ina olong naa kajur nanu Yerusalem too ltaai, naa kaitame nanu lelo tung'ana ooishiligate te okoto e naisho enye, oojo too ltauja lenye, ‘Meas Olaitoriani esidai nemeas entorrono.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Kerayae imasaa enye, neitomijooni nkajijik enye. Ore hoo neshet ninche nkajijik memany ninche; ore hoo neun ninche nkurman oo sabibu meok ninche enaisho enye.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Ore ina olong kitok o Laitoriani netinyikua, etinyikua naa kesieku; kedua oltoilo le ina olong o Laitoriani, keyietu aishir oltung'ani magilani te ine." 
Zephaniah1:15 Enkolong e ngoro napi ina olong, enkolong o sina o emion, enkolong e nkidaata o emutata, enkolong e naimin o enkimuntut, enkolong oo nkatampo o enaimin nagut," 
Zephaniah1:16 enkolong e oshoto e ntarumpeta o lkiyioi lo larrabal, egilunore nena anas naasheta isunta negilunore iltaleta lo larrabal." 
Zephaniah1:17 Kayau nanu osina shumata iltung'ana, o metaa kepuo ninche anaa ilmodook, enkaraki nataasa ninche eng'oki ti alo Olaitoriani; keibukori osarge lenye anaa enterit, neikoni inkiri oo seseni lenye anaa emodioi." 
Zephaniah1:18 Mekordu ninche enkosholai enye aashu sahabu enye te ina olong e ngoro o Laitoriani. Ore ti atua enkima e ina goro enye o lom, keinosi aamut enkop pooki; amu te nkiting'oto nara ee enkiting'oto naluamisho keiting'ie ninye asioki lelo pooki oomanya enkop." 
Zephaniah2:1 Wootu enturrurroto entuumata ele osho lemedol enkurruna," 
Zephaniah2:2 eton eitu kirewi anaa nguetat, eton eitu elotu shumata iyie engoro o Laitoriani napi, eton eitu elotu shumata iyie ina olong e ngoro o Laitoriani." 
Zephaniah2:3 Eng'oru Olaitoriani, intae pooki oobor lena kop, lelo ooas nkitanapat enyena; eng'oru esupatisho, eng'oru emborron; eidimayu neisudori intae te ina olong e ngoro o Laitoriani." 
Zephaniah2:4 Amu keing'uari Gasa, naa keaku Ashkelon mijooni; nearari iltung'ana le Ashdod enaipirie enkolong, nedotuni Ekron." 
Zephaniah2:5 Woi intae iloomanya olomanaa le naiposha, intae ilo osho le Kereti! Eipirare intae ororei lo Laitoriani, iyie Kanaan na kop oo Lfilisti; kaidurukie nanu intae o metaa meleku ninye obo." 
Zephaniah2:6 Ore iyie, Loomanaa le naiposha, naa iaku endaata oo ntare, ilokerin loo lchekuti o muatat oo luaat oo ntare." 
Zephaniah2:7 Keaku olomanaa le naiposha ewueji e ilo pisiai otelekua le nkaji e Yuda, naa ninye eirritishore ninche, ore ti atua nkajijik e Askelon neirragie ninche teipa. Amu ore Olaitoriani Enkai enye kedamu ninche neitopok ninche." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Atoning'o nanu imorot e Moab o esukeny oo le Amon, ina natusukenya ninche iltung'ana laainei nerup ate ti alo enkop enye." 
Zephaniah2:9 Neaku ore anaa enaishu nanu,” Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, Enkai e Israel, “Ketiu Moab anaa Sodom, ore ile Amon netiu anaa Gomora, enkop oo suut o ngumot e munyan, neaku olmuate ntarasi. Ore ilo pisiai otelekua loo ltung'ana laainei neraya ninche, ore ilo pisiai otelekua lo losho lai neya ninche.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Ena eitalakuni te ninche to lwuasa lenye, enkaraki natusukenya nerup ate ti alo iltung'ana lo Laitoriani loo lororani." 
Zephaniah2:11 Kegilunore Olaitoriani ninche; keishie ninye nkaitin pooki e nkop, neaku ninye eirrugokinoi, pooki ake te wueji enye, nkuapi pooki oo loreren." 
Zephaniah2:12 Ore sii intae, ile Etiopia, keari intae to lalem lai." 
Zephaniah2:13 Naa keitorioo ninye enkaina enye aarare moikuape, neidaikie Asiria; neitaa ninye Ninawi olmuate, ewueji netoyio anaa olpurkel." 
Zephaniah2:14 Keirrag iluaat te mpolos enye, ing'uesi pooki e ong'ata; ore olmotonyi o enjolis nemany ilpaashen lenyena; neishiraki emotonyi oo nkiyiaa ilusien enye neru olkurruk tembata e kishomi enye ore nkeek oo lpaashen lenye neitomijooni." 
Zephaniah2:15 Enkanasa naturupa kewan ena apa natobiko te seriani, apa najo ninye makewan, “Nanu ake nemeetae ae.” Ketaa ninye olmuate anaa nyoo, ewueji neirragie ing'uesi e ntim! Ore pooki ng'ae ogiroo ninye neiputukuny nenunuk enkaina enye aikirikirie." 
Zephaniah3:1 Woi ninye ina natogolong'ua neinosieki olminong ina anasa naitorogonyisho! 
Zephaniah3:2 Mening ninye hoo likae toilo, meng'amaa ninye ererioroto enkikoo. Meisilig ninye Olaitoriani, menyikaki ninye Enkai enye." 
Zephaniah3:3 Ore lelo kituaak lenyena ootii atua naa ilng'atunyo ooipur; ore ilarishak lenyena naa isuyian le nteipa lelo lemeing'uaa toki o mekenyu. 
Zephaniah3:4 Pesho iloibonok lenyena, iltung'ana lemeeta enkirukoto; ore ilapolosak lenyena neisarkionie ina sinyati, neinyala ninche nkitanapat." 
Zephaniah3:5 Ore Olaitoriani otii atua ninye naa kaasipani, meitarruoo ninye; ore anaake tadekenya neitodolu ninye esupatisho e nkiguana enye, ore anaake ekenyu melai; kake ore lelo torrok nemeyiolo aatodol enkurruna." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Aiwuang'ie nanu iloshon; eidaa nkanas enye; aitomijoono nanu nkoitoi enye e nkanasa o metaa melo hoo ng'ae aim ninche; eitaaki nkanas enye ilmuateni, nemetii oltung'ani, nemetii olomanya." 
Zephaniah3:7 Atejo nanu, ‘Esipa kaaureyu ninye, keng'amu ninye enkikoo; merikino ninye nena pooki naitanapa nanu ninye.’ Kake etoponari ninche aayieu neitarruoo nkiasin enye.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 “Metaa entaanyuaki nanu,” Olaitoriani ojo, “te ina olong nadumunye nanu ara olchakeni. Amu ore enatudung'o nanu naa pee aiturrur nkuapi, pee aum nkitoriat, nabukoki ninche engoro ai, ina kirowuaj pooki e ngoro ai; amu te ina kima e ngoro o lom lai emuti enkop pooki." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Ee, te ina kata kenya aibelekeny nanu nkirorot oo ltung'ana, aitaa nkirorot sidain, pee etum ninche pooki aaipoto enkarna o Laitoriani, neisiaai ninye to ltau obo." 
Zephaniah3:10 Ebaiki te idia alo ilkejek le Etiopia aayaki nanu lelo laasai nkishorot, ina tito oo looidapashari laainei." 
Zephaniah3:11 “Ore akenya te ina olong nimikintukurruni iyie te nkaraki nena kiasin nikitogolong'aka nanu; amu kaiwuang'ie nanu te ina kata te mpolos inyi lelo linyi oowuasa oorup ate, nimintoki iyie awuasa te ilo doinyo lai sinyati." 
Zephaniah3:12 Amu kaleku nanu ti atua iyie iltung'ana supati oobor. Naa keing'oru ninche enkisudoroto te nkarna o Laitoriani," 
Zephaniah3:13 ore lelo ootelekuaki te Israel; nemeas ninche entorroni nemeiro elejare, nemetumi too nkutukie enye olng'ejep le lejare. Amu kedaa ninche neirrag nemeetae oloiture ninche.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Tabuaku taranya, na tito e Sion; tabuaku Israel! Ting'idayu nishipayu to ltau lino pooki, na tito e Yerusalem!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Eiwuang'ie Olaitoriani nena dungokinot e nkiguana ti alo iyie, etaarayie ninye ilmang'ati linono. Ilo aiguanani le Israel, Olaitoriani ninye otii empolos inyi; mingil ae kata iyie aureyu entorroni." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ore akenya te ina olong naa keji te Yerusalem: “Miureshoyu iyie Sion; mincho nkaik inono elepori. 
Zephaniah3:17 Olaitoriani, Enkai ino, otii empolos ino, olmurrani oishoru enkishuroto; eikishipakino ninye iyie te nchipai, eikintang'ejuk ninye iyie te nyorrata enye kepik ninye shumata iyie embuakunoto o sinkolio" 
Zephaniah3:18 anaa te nkolong o sirua. Kaiwuang'ie nanu osina te iyie, pee mitum iyie esulare te ninye." 
Zephaniah3:19 Ng'ura, ore akenya te ina kata naa Kagilunore nanu lelo likintorogony pooki. Naa kaitajeu nanu lelo maiman naiturrurru lelo ooidapashari, naibelekeny nanu enkurruna enye metaa errepet neyiolouni ti atua enkop pooki." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ore akenya te ina kata naa kayau nanu intae ang, te ina kata naiturrur nanu intae te nebo; ee, kaisho nanu metayiolouni intae nerrepi ti atua iloreren pooki le nkop, te ina kata nalo nanu arrinyoki karsisisho inyi dukuya nkonyek inyi,” Olaitoriani ojo." 
Haggai1:1 Ore to lari li are le Darias ilo aiguanani, to lapa le ile, te nkolong e dukuya o lapa, eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani aimu Hagai ilo oiboni le Nkai, alotu enetii Serubabel olayioni le Shealtiel, olbalusui le Yuda, o Yoshua olayioni le Yehosadak, ilo apolosani kitok." 
Haggai1:2 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Ejo kulo tung'ana inchere eton eitu ebau enkata pee eigili aashet enkaji o Laitoriani.” 
Haggai1:3 Neitoki ororei lo Laitoriani alotu eimu Hagai ilo oiboni le Nkai, ejo," 
Haggai1:4 “Kenkata naishiaakino nitonini intae ti atua nena ajijik inyi naaikodo too mbaoi, eton etii ena aji enkidaaroto." 
Haggai1:5 Ore naa nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani; Entadamu eninkunariri intae. 
Haggai1:6 Ituunishote oleng, nisampumpu nkuti; idaa intae, kake miraposhosho; niokishosho, kake miishushu ae kata enkure; ninchopishopo ate, kake meetae oloirouaju; naa ore ilo ong'amu olmushaara, neng'amu olmushaara nepik embene naudo." 
Haggai1:7 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Entadamu eninkunariri intae. 
Haggai1:8 Elepa enchom ildoinyo niyauu ilkeek lishetietie ena aji, pee atum atishipakinoyu natum sii ataliooyu te nkitoo ai, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Haggai1:9 Isiligutua intae nkumok, naa ng'ura, etaa kuti; ore pee iyauu intae ang, nakutaa nanu. Aainyo? Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo. Te nkaraki ena aji ai nairragita te nkidaaroto amijoonu, intanyamaluoluo maate oltung'ani ake te nkaji enye makewan." 
Haggai1:10 Ore enkaraki ina, eibooyie keper natii shumata intae enkoiliolio, ore enkop neibooyo ilng'anayio lenyena." 
Haggai1:11 Naipotuo nanu olameyu meeu shumata enkop o ldoinyo, meeu shumata nkurman, o sabibu, o eilata, te nena pooki naabulu te nkop, too ltung'ana o nkishu, o too siaaitin enye pooki.”" 
Haggai1:12 Neiruk Serubabel olayioni le Shealtiel, o Yoshua olayioni le Yehosadak, ilo apolosani kitok, te nebo nena lekunot oo ltung'ana ilo pisiai pooki loo ltung'ana ororei lo Laitoriani Enkai enye, o rorei le Hagai ilo oiboni le Nkai anaa enairriwayie Olaitoriani Enkai enye ninye; neureishoyu iltung'ana te dukuya Olaitoriani." 
Haggai1:13 Neitoki Hagai, ilo kilikuai lo Laitoriani, airorie iltung'ana to lkilikuai lo Laitoriani, ejo, “Atii nanu te nebo intae, ejo Olaitoriani.”" 
Haggai1:14 Neputu Olaitoriani enkiyang'et e Serubabel le Shealtiel, ilo balusui le Yuda, o enkiyang'et e Yoshua olayioni le Yehosadak, ilo apolosani kitok, o enkiyang'et e lelo lekunot pooki loo ltung'ana; nepuonu ninche aas esiaai e ina aji o Laitoriani loo lororani Enkai enye," 
Haggai1:15 te nkolong e tikitam o ong'uan o lapa, to lapa le ile." 
Haggai2:1 Ore ti atua olari li are le nkitoria e Darias ilo aiguanani, to lapa li opishana, te nkolong e tikitam o obo o lapa, eeuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Hagai ilo oiboni le Nkai" 
Haggai2:2 ejo, “Irorie taata Serubabel olayioni le Shealtiel ilo balusui le Yuda, o Yoshua olayioni le Yehosadak, ilo apolosani kitok, o nena lekunot pooki oo ltung'ana, nijoki," 
Haggai2:3 ‘Kaing'ae etung'uayioki te intae, apa ootodua ena aji te nkishiaa e nkitoo enye? Aidolitata taata intae etiu aja? Ae me pesho taata too nkonyek inyi?" 
Haggai2:4 Ore etiu neijia entagoluoto, iyie Serubabel, Olaitoriani ojo, ntagoluoyu, iyie Yoshua, olayioni le Yehosadak, ele olapolosani kitok, intagoluoyu intae lo tung'ana pooki lena kop, Olaitoriani ojo; entaasisho, amu atii nanu te nebo intae; Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo," 
Haggai2:5 te risioroto oo nkisiligat apa naisiligie intae ipukuku te Misiri. Etii Enkiyang'et ai te nebo intae; emiureisho. 
Haggai2:6 Amu nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Ore ake sii, te nkiti rishata, naa kaikirikirie keper o enkop o enaiposha o enkop natoyio," 
Haggai2:7 naikirikirie nanu iloreren pooki, ore ilchumat lenye neyauni ene neiput enkaji e Nkai esikar, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Haggai2:8 Enaai enkosholai naa enaai sahabu, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Haggai2:9 Ore ina sikar nayooki alotu ena aji naa keaku kitok alang enapa, e dukuya Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, naa ti atua ene wueji aaishooyo nanu dupoto, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo.’ ”" 
Haggai2:10 Ore te nkolong e tikitam o ong'uan, o lapa li oudo to lari li are le nkitoria e Darias, eeuo ororei lo Laitoriani aimu Hagai ilo oiboni le Nkai, ejo," 
Haggai2:11 “Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Nkilikuana lelo apolosak metolimu ewalata ena kikilikuanata," 
Haggai2:12 ‘Amaa te nenap oltung'ani enkiring'o nasinya to lcholoi lo lkila lenye, neiseyie te ilo sholoi lenye emukate, aashu enkurma, aashu enaisho oo sabibu, aashu eilata, aashu ae pukunoto e ndaa, keaku ina sinyati?’ ” Newal ilapolosak aajo, “A-a.”" 
Haggai2:13 Neitoki Hagai ajo, “Amaa oltung'ani oiduruk te nkaraki olmeneng'ani te neiseyie nabo e kuna, keiduruku?” Newal ilapolosak, aajo “Keaku keiduruk.”" 
Haggai2:14 Neitoki Hagai ajo, “Neijia sii etiu kulo tung'ana, o kulo oshon ootii dukuya nanu ejo Olaitoriani; naa neijia sii etiu pooki siaai oo nkaik enye; ore ina kishorunoto naishoru ninche teine keiduruk naa." 
Haggai2:15 “Asai naa taata intae, entadamu ina nayooki aaku ebaiki ena olong neito idia alo. Amaa eton eitu eiteleikini osoit olikae soit ti atua enkaji o Laitoriani, kainyoo intae inotito?" 
Haggai2:16 Tenelotu oltung'ani orupati loo mboreitin tikitam, tomon ake etum; te nelotu oltung'ani olchumati le naisho oo sabibu, ajo aaoku mboreitin onom, tikitam ake naatii." 
Haggai2:17 Atoosho nanu intae o lng'anayio pooki le nkinyinyiret inyi to lasai o te mpurukunyi o te nchan oo soito, neitu ake kishukokinono nanu, ejo Olaitoriani." 
Haggai2:18 Entadamu ebaiki ena olong neito idia alo, ebaiki enkolong e tikitam o ong'uan o lapa li oudo. Ebaiki ina olong apa natipikaki olkitamanyunoto le nkaji o Laitoriani, entadamu:" 
Haggai2:19 Amaa keton etii olantererai hoo obo atua empeche, keton eiu osabibu, o lng'aboli, o kukumanka, o loirien hoo toki? Ore ebaiki ena olong neito idia alo, kaamayian nanu iyie.”" 
Haggai2:20 Enyaaka ororei lo Laitoriani alotu enetii Hagai enkata e are te nkolong e tikitam o ong'uan o lapa, ejo," 
Haggai2:21 “Irorie Serubabel, olbalusui le Yuda, tiaki, etaa enkiti kata pee aikirikirie nanu keper o enkop," 
Haggai2:22 naibelekeny ilorikan le nkitoo loo nkitoriat; etaa enkiti kata pee ainyal nanu engolon oo nkitoriat oo loreren, naibelekeny nena garrin oo mbartan o lakedok lenye; ore mbartan o lelo ookedito nedoyio, o ltung'ani ake to lalem lo likae." 
Haggai2:23 Ore akenya teina olong, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, naa kaaya nanu iyie, Serubabel osinka lai, olayioni le Shealtiel, ejo Olaitoriani naaitotiu nanu iyie anaa olgisoi oata olmishire; amu aategelua nanu iyie, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Ore to lapa le isiet tiatua olari liare le nkitoria e Darias, eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Sakaria olayioni le Berekia olayioni le Ido, ilo oiboni le Nkai ejoki," 
Zechariah1:2 “Etagore apa Olaitoriani oleng tenkaraki iloo papaai linyi. 
Zechariah1:3 Metaa tiaaki ninche, ena ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Entushukunye enatii, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, naa kashukokino sii nanu intae, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Zechariah1:4 Emitiuu anaa enaikununo apa iloo papaai linyi, laa ore apa lelo oibonok le Nkai le dukuya eishirakita ninche ejoki, Nji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, Entushukunye entung'uai nkoitoi inyi torrok o nkiasin inyi torrok! Kake eitu ninche aaning arashu aashilaa nanu, ejo Olaitoriani." 
Zechariah1:5 Amaa taata iloo papaai linyi koree taata ninche? O loibonok, kebikoo sii ninche intarasi?" 
Zechariah1:6 Kake ore irorei laainei o nkiguanat aainei, nena apa naitanapa isinkan laainei lelo oibonok le Nkai, keitu ninche egiroo iloo papaai linyi? Metaa eirridutua ninche ejo, Anaa enatumuta Olaitoriani loo lororani pee eitame iyiook tenkaraki inkoitoi ang o siaaitin ang, neaku ina eitaasa ninye iyiook.”" 
Zechariah1:7 Ore te nkolong e tikitam oo ng'uan o lapa le tomon oobo, olapa le Shebat to lari liare le nkitoria olaiguanani Darias, eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Sakaria olayioni le Berekia olayioni le Ido ilo oiboni le Nkai; nejo Sakaria," 
Zechariah1:8 “Atoduaa tena kewarie naa ing'ura, oltung'ani okedito embarta nanyokie! Negira duoo aitashe tiatua ilkeek oo nyori ooji mihadasi tiatua oyerata ore tesiadi ninye netii kulie bartan pilei, o naanyokie o naaibor." 
Zechariah1:9 Naitoki ajo, ‘Ainyoo doi kuna Olaitoriani lai?’ Ore ilo malaika laairorie nanu, aatiaaka, ‘Ekaaitodol aitayiolo ajo ainyoo ninche.’" 
Zechariah1:10 Metaa etawala ilo tung'ani oitashe tiatua lelo keek ooji mihadasi ajoki ‘ore kuna naa inaairriwua Olaitoriani meetu aaman enkop pooki. 
Zechariah1:11 Newaliki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani otii atua ilkeek ooji mihadasi ejo, Kishomo aarrip enkop pooki, naa ng'ura, nikitoduaa aajo eeta enkop pooki enkiyeng'iyengata!’" 
Zechariah1:12 “Neitoki ilo malaika lo Laitoriani ajoki, iyie Olaitoriani loo lororani, kerishata nabaa miata olng'ur tiatua Yerusalem o nkanas e Yuda, nena nitagorokine tiatua kulo arin intomoni naapishana?" 
Zechariah1:13 Newaliki Olaitoriani ilo malaika laairorie too rorei supati le nkitagoloto e oshoke.” 
Zechariah1:14 Metaa ore ilo malaika laairorie aatiaaka, Inchira tabuaku tejo, ena ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Aata olom sapuk tenkaraki Yerusalem o Sion." 
Zechariah1:15 Natagorokine oleng lelo oshon oodol ate anaa keserian. Amu ore apa pee agorokino ninche penyo, neitaa lelo oshon osina sapuk te ninche." 
Zechariah1:16 Metaa, ina ejo Olaitoriani, atushukokine Yerusalem to lng'ur sapuk; naa ekesheti enkaji ai tiatua ninye, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani nepiki enkopito e nkitorioroto shumata Yerusalem." 
Zechariah1:17 Nyaaki inchira tejo, nji Olaitoriani loo lororani; Ekeitoki inkanas aainei aatum dupoto nalus, naa keitoki Olaitoriani aitagol Sion oshoke neigil agelu Yerusalem." 
Zechariah1:18 Naraposhu inkonyek aainei aingorisho, naa ng'ura, imowuarak ong'uan!" 
Zechariah1:19 Najoki ilo malaika laairorie nanu, “Ainyoo doi kuna?” Naawaliki ninye ajoki, “Ore kuna mowuarak naa ninche naaidapasha Yuda, o Israel o Yerusalem.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Naaitoki Olaitoriani aitodol ilkunono oong'uan. 
Zechariah1:21 Najo nanu, “Kainyoo doi epuonu kulo aas?” Newal ajo, “Ore kuna naa imowuarak naa ninche naaidapasha Yuda metaa meetae oltung'ani oraposhu endukuya; neetuo kuna aaiture ninche, pee etum aitadou abori imowuarak oo loshon, lelo ootudumutua imowuarak enye aaitame ina kop e Yuda aaidapash ninye.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Naraposhu inkonyek aainei aing'orisho, naa ng'ura, oltung'ani oota enkopito natemishoreki te nkaina enye." 
Zechariah2:2 Naitoki nanu ajo, “Kaji doi iloito iyie?” Naajoki ninye nanu, “Kalo atem Yerusalem, pee ayiolou eneba endapasho enye o eneba enkadori enye.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Naa ng'ura, ore ilo malaika laairorie eewuo dukuya, nelotu likae malaika dukuya anang'are ninye, nejoki ninye," 
Zechariah2:4 “Kueta, shomo tiaaki lido barnoti, ekeaku Yerusalem enkanasa nemeeta isunta tenkaraki enkumoi o lorere o nkishu naatii atua." 
Zechariah2:5 Amu kaaku nanu te ninye esuntai enkima namanita ninye, Olaitoriani ojo, naaku sii enkisisa tiatua ninye!”" 
Zechariah2:6 Oi! Oi! Enkuet entung'uai ina kop e kopikop, Olaitoriani ojo; amu aidapasha intae aitalamaa anaa enatii inkaloli ong'uan enkijape e keper, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Zechariah2:7 Oi! Isikaki Sion, iyie ilo oboitare ina tito e Babilon." 
Zechariah2:8 Amu inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, te nkitoo enye laa ninye makewan laairriwaka lelo oreren ooidaikie intae, amu ore ilo likiseyie iyie, naa enerok enkong'u ai eiseyie:" 
Zechariah2:9 Ing'ura, ekaikirikirie enkaina ai te shumata ninche, naa keidaikie ninche lelo ooisiaai ninche. Nitum taa atayiolo nchere Olaitoriani loo lororani ninye lairriwua nanu." 
Zechariah2:10 Taranya nishipayu, iyie na tito e Sion; Amu ng'ura ajo, kalotu naa kabik tiatua intae, Olaitoriani ojo." 
Zechariah2:11 Naa keibung'are iloreren kumok Olaitoriani teina olong, naa keaku ninche iltung'ana laainei; naa katon nanu tiatua intae, niyiolouu aajo Olaitoriani loo lororani laairriwua nanu atua intae." 
Zechariah2:12 Naa kejung Olaitoriani Yuda anaa erubata enye tiatua ina kop enye sinyati, neitoki ake agelu Yerusalem!" 
Zechariah2:13 Entigirata, pooki toki naishu te dukuya Olaitoriani; amu etudumunye ninye tiatua ina manyisho enye sinyati." 
Zechariah3:1 Naaitoki ninye aitodol nanu Yoshua olapolosani kitok eitashe te dukuya ilo malaika lo Laitoriani, neitashe sii ninye shetani te nkaina e tatene aitangor ninye." 
Zechariah3:2 Nejoki Olaitoriani shetani, “Mikisikong'a iyie Olaitoriani, iyie shetani! Metaa ilo Aitoriani otegelua Yerusalem likisikong iyie! Amaa ele aime olchata oishu otawuapuaki te nkima.”" 
Zechariah3:3 Ore ina kata egira Yoshua aitashe te dukuya ilo Malaika, eishopokoki inkilani naaiduruk naang'u." 
Zechariah3:4 Nejoki olmalaika lelo ooitashe te dukuya ninye, “Entayu nena kilani naang'u naaiduruk naaishopito entung'uai ninye.” Nejoki ninye, ninye “Ing'ura, aiwuang'ie ing'ok inono te iyie naa kaaishopoki nanu iyie inkilani sidain.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Naitoki nanu ajo Enchoo ninche epik aaishopoki enkarasha sidai endukuya enye neishopokini ninye inkilani; ore olmalaika lo Laitoriani neitashe te mbata ninye. 
Zechariah3:6 Neitanap olmalaika lo Laitoriani Yoshua ejoki," 
Zechariah3:7 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: ‘Tinilo tiatua inkoitoi aainei nimbung enkitanapata ai, neaku iyaku oloitore enkaji ai nintore sii indung'orot aainei, naa kaaisho iyie esipata nijing'ie tenebo kulo ooitashe tene." 
Zechariah3:8 Toning'o naa taata, iyie Yoshua olapolosani kitok iyie tenebo ilchorueta linono ootoni te dukuya iyie, amu iltung'ana supati ninche ooitodolu imbaa naapuonu. Ng'ura, ekayaki osinka lai ilo oji Olng'osila." 
Zechariah3:9 Amu ng'ura, ore shumata eilo soit laitasheyie te dukuya Yoshua, enchumata osoit obo oota imatuan naapishana, naguetaki osirata, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, naa kaitayu ina kitarruorroto ena kop te nkolong nabo." 
Zechariah3:10 Ore teina olong ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, naa keitoomon pooki te intae olelatia enye meetu aatoni te ntonata o sabibu lenye o te ntonata olng'aboli lenye.’”" 
Zechariah4:1 Ore ilo malaika laairorie nanu, enyaaka arrinyunye, naainyoyie nanu, anaa oltung'ani otuputuoki too njo." 
Zechariah4:2 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Ainyoo idolita?” iyie. Najo nanu, “Adolita naa ng'ura, enkitashet oltaa naitobiruno pooki te sahabu, neeta olbakuli otii shumata ninye, o ltaai oopishana te nchumata ninye, o ltampii oopishana otii lelo taai otii shumata e ina kitashet." 
Zechariah4:3 Netii embata iloirienito aare, obo te nkalo e tatene ilo bakuli netii olikae kedienye enye.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Naajoki ilo malaika laairorie nanu, “Ainyoo doi kuna, olkitok lai?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Ina pee aawaliki nanu ilo malaika laairorie ejo, “Aimiyiolo doi ajo ainyoo kuna?” Najo, “A'a, olkitok lai.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Ina pee aajoki ninye nanu, “Ore ele naa ororei lo Laitoriani oirriwakaki Serubabel: Ime te nkidimata, neme te ngolon, kake te Nkiyang'et ai Sinyati, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Zechariah4:7 Koree iyie, iyie lo doinyo sapuk? Ore te dukuya Serubabel naa iyaku enkisiashata; naa keyau ninye dukuya ilo soit le shumata ebuakitae aajo, ‘Empiris, Empiris te ninye!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Ore ake sii eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enatii aajoki," 
Zechariah4:9 “Inkaik e Serubabel naaitasheyie olkitamanyunoto lena aji; naa inkaik enyena ake sii naaidip ninye. Ina pee iyiolouu aajo aairriwua nanu Olaitoriani loo lororani enitii. 
Zechariah4:10 Amu ore pooki ng'ae otemenayie ina olong oo ntokitin kutiti naa keshipa, naa kedol ina temet te nkaina e Serubabel. Ore kuna naapishana naa nena onyek o Laitoriani, nena naapuo tiatua enkop pooki." 
Zechariah4:11 Naitoki nanu ajoki ninye, Ainyoo eutu kulo oirienito aare ootii enkaina e tatene o enkaina e kedienye tene netii enkitashet oltaa?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Naitoki ajoki ninye eniare, “Ainyoo eutu kulo ng'osil pokira lo loirien, lelo ootii embata lelo goso ooitobiruno te sahabu oobukunyeki ina ilata aaitayu?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Aimiyiolo ajo ainyoo kulo?” Najo, “A'a olkitok lai.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Ina pee ejo, “Ore kulo naa lelo aare ootubukoki eilata aaput ooitashe te mbata Olaitoriani laa olopeny enkop pooki.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Naitoki ake araposhu inkonyek aainei aing'orisho, ng'ura olpiyayati le mbuku olo to loing'ang'e!" 
Zechariah5:2 Naajoki ninye nanu, “Ainyoo idolita?” Nawal ajo, “Adolita olpiyayati le mbuku nalo to loing'ang'e; naa ore enkadori enye naa intemat enkaina tikitam ore endapasho naa intemat e nkaina tomon.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Ina pee aajoki ninye nanu, “Ore ena naa oldeket olo oriong enkop pooki, amu ore ake ninye pooki opurrisho naa kedung'ori aaiwuang'ie ebaiki ena kata nelo dukuya te risioroto eina purrorre, anaa pooki ng'ae onya olmumai te lejare naa kedung'ori aaiwuang'ie te risioroto ele mumai." 
Zechariah5:4 Ekairriwaa nanu meshomo dukuya, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, naa kejing enkaji o lapurroni, nejing sii enkaji e ilo onya olmumai te lejare te enkarna ai; naa kebik te nkaji enye anya ninye, enya imbaoi tenebo isoito.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Ina pee elotu dukuya ilo malaika laairorie nanu naajoki, “Taraposhu inkonyek inono nidol ena toki nalotu?”" 
Zechariah5:6 Najo, “Ainyoo doi?” Nejo ninye, “Ore ena naa enkikapu, neitodolu ena kikapu ing'ok enkop pooki.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Naa ng'ura, etaboloki ninye aadumu enkikenet enye, netii atua enkitok natonita tiatua enkikapu." 
Zechariah5:8 Nejo ninye, “Ore ina kitok naa Entorroni eutu.” Nerrumoki ninye atua enkikapu nerrinyoki enkikenet enye aiken enkikapu." 
Zechariah5:9 Naraposhu inkonyek aainei aing'orisho, naa ng'ura, inkituaak are naapuonu dukuya! Etii osiwuo inaipuko enye; neeta inaipuko naatiu anaa inaipuko emotonyi nanyaanyukie entilagos, nedumu aailepie ina kikapu metaa etii erishata enkop o keper." 
Zechariah5:10 Ina pee ajoki ilo malaika laairorie nanu, “Kaji doi eyaita ina kikapu?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Naajoki nanu, “Enkop e Shimor, aa te ine epuo aashetaki ninye enkaji, naa ore pee eidip aitobira, nepik ina kikapu pee ebik teine.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Naitoki ake araposhu inkonyek aainei aing'orisho, naa ng'ura, ing'arrin ong'uan oo mbartan naatupukutuo te rishata oo ldoinyo aare, naa ore lelo doinyo naa ildoinyo lo suyai." 
Zechariah6:2 Ore engarri e dukuya neeta imbartan naanyokie, ore eniare neeta imbartan naarook," 
Zechariah6:3 ore ene uni neeta imbartan naaibor, ore eniong'uan neeta imbartan pusi naata iltipot." 
Zechariah6:4 Ina pee ajoki ilo malaika laairorie nanu, “Ainyoo doi kuna, olkitok lai?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Naawaliki nanu olmalaika ajoki, “Ore kuna naa inaapuo ilkutat oong'uan le nkijape e keper, eidipa aaitayu ate te dukuya Olaitoriani le nkop pooki." 
Zechariah6:6 Ore ngarrin oo imbartan naarook, naa enkop e moikuape epuo, ore ngarrin oo mbartan naaibor naa enkop oloontoluo epuo teneidip kunda aashom, ore ngarrin oo mbartan pusi naata iltipot naa enkop e kopikop epuo.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Ore pee epuku nena bartan naagol, neenyiyenyu eyieu nepuo aarrip enkop. Nejoki olmalaika ninche, “Enchom, entorrip enkop.” Metaa eshomo aarip enkop." 
Zechariah6:8 Ina pee aaishiraki ninye nanu ajoki, “Ng'ura ore nena naapuo ina kop e moikuape neitoborro Enkiyang'et ai te nkop e moikuape.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enatii ejo: 
Zechariah6:10 Iwa te lelo oararo, Heldai, o Tobiya, o Yedaia, laa ninche ootabautua eing'uaa Babilon nilo ina olong ake ina aji e Yosia olayioni le Sefania." 
Zechariah6:11 Iwa te ninche enkosholai o sahabu, nintobiru enkopiyia e nkitoo, nipik ninye endukuya e Yoshua, olayioni le Yehosadak olapolosani kitok;" 
Zechariah6:12 nijoki ninye, inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, “Ng'ura, ore ilo tung'ani oji enkarna enye Olng'osila: naa kebulaa ninye teine netii, naa keshetaki ninye Olaitoriani enkaji e Nkai." 
Zechariah6:13 Ninye oshetu ina aji o Laitoriani naa keishopokini ninye enkisisa o enkanyit, naa keton aitoreisho to lorika lenye le nkitoria. Naa keaku ketii olapolosani embata o lorika lenye le nkitoo. Nejing olning'o le seriani erishata enye pokira.”" 
Zechariah6:14 Naa kejing enkopiyia e nkitoo atua enkaji Olaitoriani metaa endamunoto te Heldai o Tobiya o Yedaia o Yosia olayioni le Sefania. 
Zechariah6:15 “Naa ore lelo oo lakua naa kepuonu aaretu aashet ina aji Olaitoriani, naa iyiolouu aajo ilo Aitoriani loo lororani ninye laairriwua nanu enetii. Naa kelotu ina bae abaya tininyorraa katukul aairuk ilo toilo lo Laitoriani Enkai inyi.”" 
Zechariah7:1 Ore to lari liong'uan le nkitoria o olaiguanani Darias, eewuo ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Sakaria te nkolong e ong'uan o lapa le naaudo laa ninye eji Kislef." 
Zechariah7:2 Ore ina kata eirriwaitie iltung'ana le Betel Sharese o Regemelek oltung'ana lenye pee epuo aomonu omom to Laitoriani. 
Zechariah7:3 Neikilikuan ilo apolosani le nkaji Olaitoriani loo lororani tenebo iloibonok le Nkai, ena kikilikuanata: “Amaa kaishir napukoo aaomon to lapa le imiet, anaa enataasa too larin kumok ooishari?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Ina pee elotu ororei lo Laitoriani loo lororani enatii aajoki: 
Zechariah7:5 Tiaaki iltung'ana pooki leina kop tenebo ilapolosak, “Amaa ina kata nipukoo pee iomon, ninchir sii to lapa le imiet, o to liopishana, te kulo arin intomoni naapishana, itupukoyie apa te nkaraki nanu kiomon?" 
Zechariah7:6 Amaa ina nidaa, niokishosho aimidaa tenkaraki nkorroki inyi, niokishosho tenkaraki nkorroki inyi?”" 
Zechariah7:7 Aeme irorei apa kulo ooiroro Olaitoriani too loibonok le Nkai te dukuya ina kata apa eton egol Yerusalem o nkanas naamanita, nebore iltung'ana atua ninche, atua o neemanita olkerenket le kopikop te nkalo oo ntonat oo ldoinyo lo loontoluo?" 
Zechariah7:8 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani enetii Sakaria ejoki," 
Zechariah7:9 “Ena etejo Olaitoriani loo lororani apa: ng'ura oleng metaasi esipata te nkiguana intodolu esupatisho olng'ur tiatua olalashe lino," 
Zechariah7:10 mimbooki enkop enkoliai anaa oltung'ani okishi anaa olomoni, midamu intorrok to ltau lino tenkaraki olalashe lino.”" 
Zechariah7:11 Kake etanyaita ninche ening, neuno aagolong'u neany ening, nenuk inkiyiaa enye pee mening." 
Zechariah7:12 Neitagol iltauja lenye anaa osoit pee mening, ake ina kitanapata o rorei oirriwua Olaitoriani loo lororani te Nkiyang'et enye aimunye lelo oibonok le Nkai le dukuya. Metaa eewuo engoro sapuk naing'uaa enetii Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Zechariah7:13 “Ore aipotisho nanu nemaaning ninche nanu, ore pee eipotisho sii ninche, nemaning sii nanu ninche” Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Zechariah7:14 “Naidapash ninche to siwuo torrono aidapashaki lelo oreren lemeyiolo ninche. Neaku ore ina kop natung'uaitie neaku mijooni metaa meetae oltung'ani ojing arashu opuku, neitaae ina kop sidai naitishipisho e mijooni.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani loo lororani enatii aajoki," 
Zechariah8:2 Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, ekaata olom sapuk oleng te nkaraki Sion, naata olom sapuk tenkaraki ninye te ngoro sapuk." 
Zechariah8:3 Inji ejo Olaitoriani: Kashukokino Sion, naa kalotu amany atua Yerusalem, naa keitokini aaipot Yerusalem aajo enkanasa naisiligayu, oldoinyo lo Laitoriani loo lororani, ilo doinyo sinyati." 
Zechariah8:4 Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Ore ilpayiani kituaak o ntasati moruak, ekeitoki aatoni too nkoitoi naalala e Yerusalem, pooki ng'ae eeta entirma te nkaina enye tenkaraki enkitoo." 
Zechariah8:5 Naa Ore inkoitoi naalala eina anasa, neiput inkayiok o ntoyie eiguran teine." 
Zechariah8:6 Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Amaa tenaa embae enking'asia te nduata e lelo lekunot tiatua lelo oreren ootung'uayioki te kuna olong'i, Keaku sii embae enking'asia too nkonyek aainei, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Zechariah8:7 Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Ng'ura, kaitajeu iltung'ana laainei te nkalo enkop oloosaen, o te nkalo enkop oloontoluo;" 
Zechariah8:8 naa kayau ninche metotoni tiatua Yerusalem; naa keaku ninche iltung'ana laainei naaku nanu Enkai enye, te dede o te sipata.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Enchoo inkaik inyi etum engolon, intae lelo te kuna olong'i ooning'ito kulo rorei oing'uaa enkutuk oo Loibonok le Nkai, eiteru ina olong apa nairragieki olkitamanyunoto le ina aji o Laitoriani loo lororani, nchere pee etumi aateshet enkaji e Nkai." 
Zechariah8:10 Amu ore apa eng'or nena olong'i, meetae apa oltung'ani oidim aigero oltung'ani arashu eng'ues meitaiki esiaai. Nemeetae sii oltung'ani oserian too lmang'ati lenyena te pooki ng'ae oipang'a arashu olotijing'ua. Amu eibelekanyaka aitaar pooki tung'ani olelatia enye." 
Zechariah8:11 Kake ore naa tena kata, meekure aitaas ilekunot le kulo tung'ana anaa enaikuna too nkolong'i naatulusoitie, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo." 
Zechariah8:12 Naa keun ninche nkurman enye te seriani; naa keiu o sabibu ilng'anayio lenyena naa keiu enkop te nkumoi enye naa keishoru keper enkoileelio enye. Naa kaisho kulo lekunot le kulo tung'ana meitaa kuna tokitin pooki inkunenye. 
Zechariah8:13 Ore apa anaa enira entoki naimakini aadiaare too loreren, Iyie na aji e Yuda o enkaji e Israel, kaitajeu nanu intae niakuku emanyianata. Emiureisho, kake enchoo egolu nkaik inyi.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Amu inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Anaa enatonyorra apa aitaas intae intorrok aitame ina kata pee aaitagor iloo papaai linyi te ng'oro sapuk, neitu arriny endamunoto ai, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani," 
Zechariah8:15 neaku ore te kuna olong'i atipika endamunoto peyie eitaas esidai Yerusalem o enkaji e Yuda; metaa emiureisho. 
Zechariah8:16 Kuna imbaa nayieu niasiasa: eroro esipata o likae o to likae, entayu too nkishomin inyi inkiguanat naasipa nintayuyu sii osotua." 
Zechariah8:17 Nimimpiru entorroni to ltau lino tenkaraki olikae. Niminyorru enkinosata olmumai le lejare, amu ore kuna tokitin pooki naa kaiba, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Nelotu ororei lo Laitoriani loo lororani enatii aajoki," 
Zechariah8:19 “Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Ore ina enata nintupukoo ate to lapa liong'uan o enata enkitupukoroto nintupukoo ate to lapa le imiet, o ina enata enkitupukoroto o lapa liopishana, o enata nintupukoo ate to lapa le tomon, keaku ninche te nkaji e Yuda irishat e ng'ida o enchipai o sirua lo lkerempe. Metaa entonyor esipata o eseriani.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: Ekelotu enkata naaku kepuonu olorere le kulie anas Yerusalem. 
Zechariah8:21 Keaku kepuo olorere le ae anasa enkae anasa aajoki, “Emaape nabo kata aaomonu omom to Olaitoriani, niking'oru Olaitoriani loo lororani; aloito nanu!" 
Zechariah8:22 Ore iloshon kumok o loreren oogol naa kepuonu aaserem Olaitoriani loo lororani te Yerusalem, neomonu omom to Laitoriani." 
Zechariah8:23 Inji ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani; ore te nena olong'i, keibung iltung'ana tomon ooing'uaa iloreren le pooki ng'ejep olkila lo Lyahudi, ejoki, ‘Maape tenebo aairiamari, amu kitoning'o aajo etii Enkai tenebo iyie.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Ore ele naa ororei lo Laitoriani ogilunore ina kop e Hadrak, tenebo ina anasa e Dameski. Amu ino Laitoriani inkanas e Aram anaa enatiu iloshon le Israel;" 
Zechariah9:2 neijia sii etiu Hamat natii olpolosie le Hadrak, tenebo Turo o Sidon tenebo enkarriyiano e ng'eno enye." 
Zechariah9:3 Eteshetaka Turo kewan esuntai nagol, netasoto ninye enkosholai naba anaa enterit, tenebo sahabu naba anaa enterit oo nkoitoi." 
Zechariah9:4 Kake ng'ura, ekeya Olaitoriani aiwuang'ie nena pooki naata ninye, nenang'aki enkarsisisho enye atua enaiposha naa kepejori ninye aamut te nkima." 
Zechariah9:5 Kedol Ashkelon ina neureishoyu; neijia sii etiu Gasa, nemerregela te mion sapuk, neijia sii etiu Ekron, amu keiting osiligi lenye. Ekeidaikieki olaiguanani le Gasa, nepuoi aaisik aaing'uaa Ashkelon memanya." 
Zechariah9:6 Kemany Ashdod iloreren ooshulushula, naa kaiting'ie nanu ilo wuasa le Filistia." 
Zechariah9:7 Meitoki aekata ninche aanya inkiri naatii osarge arashu kulie daiki naaiturujaki. Ore lelo lekunot naa keaku ile nchoto oo ltung'ana laainei, netiu anaa olgilata tiatua olosho le Yuda, neaku sii Ekron ile nchoto oo ltung'ana laainei anaa enataasa Ilyebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Ekamany nanu enkaji ai arrip, pee metii ololotu nelo; nemetii olaitorogonyani oitoki aitunyoo ninche. Amu ore taata, adolita too nkonyek aainei." 
Zechariah9:9 Iltung'ana le Sion! Entabuaku te nchipai sapuk, intae iltung'ana le Yerusalem! Eng'ura, elotu olaiguanani linyi atua intae, elotu eisula etimirishe, nelotu te mborron ekedito enkurrarru e sikiria." 
Zechariah9:10 Ejo Olaitoriani, “Ekaiwuang'ie ing'arrin oo mbartan e njore te Israel; naa kaiwuang'ie imbartan te Yerusalem; naa keinyali aaisho enkawuo olarrabal, naa keitobir olaiguanani lino osotua o iloreren; ore enkitoo enye neiteru te naiposha o metabaiki enaiposha neiteru to lkeju te Frati o metabaiki ineeiting'ie enkop.”" 
Zechariah9:11 Ejo Olaitoriani, Ore sii tialo iyie, Te nkaraki olning'o lo sotua o iyie, apa otimishiraki to sarge loo lasarri, kalaku nanu iltung'ana linyi ooena nepuku teina gumoto nemetii enkare." 
Zechariah9:12 Entorrinyokinoto isempewueti linyi, intae ilooena oota osiligi. Aibalunye nanu ena olong nchere karrinyoki intae eseriani." 
Zechariah9:13 Atoriwuo nanu Yuda aitaa enkawuo ai. Naitotiu Efraim anaa mbaa enyena. Naa kaasishore ilewa le Sion anaa olalem, pee earare ilayiok loo Lyunani." 
Zechariah9:14 Ekeliooyu Olaitoriani te shumata iltung'ana lenyena; naa kengoroo ninye imbaa enyena anaa enkiwuang'ata, Olaitoriani Enkai ninye oosh entarumpeta; naa kelotu te ngolon tiatua osiwuo ogol oing'uaa kopikop." 
Zechariah9:15 Olaitoriani loo lororani omitu ninche, naa kemut ninche neitunyoki enkop ilmang'ati lenye. Naa keok ninche osarge lenye anaa enaisho oo sabibu, neiputayu anaa olbakuli; nedooyo anaa too lpijat lo lperere lo lasar." 
Zechariah9:16 Ore tenebau ina olong, naa keitajeu Olaitoriani iltung'ana lenyena. Amu ore ninche naa intare oo ltung'ana lenyena. Naa kewang'u ninche te nkop enye anaa enawang isoito ooripakino enkopiyia." 
Zechariah9:17 Kebaa esidano natum ina kop! Ore lelo barnot naa kabul tenkaraki entapa enye tenebo enaisho o sabibu. 
Zechariah10:1 Entoomon Olaitoriani enchan te nkata oloirujuruj, Olaitoriani ninye oitobiru olkutati o nkatampo, naa ninye oisho iltung'ana enkirujuruj e nchan, neitonyorij pooki toki tiong'ota." 
Zechariah10:2 Eikilikuanishore iltung'ana nkitanyaanyukot o laitumusumusok kake ore iwalat naatum naa elejare o emodai. Eibelekeny kulikae nkidetidetat neitapong'oo intae. Enepesho enkikoo enye. Neaku kelimana iltung'ana anaa ntare naaimina. Etii ninche atua enyamali amu meeta olarikoni. 
Zechariah10:3 “Eirowuaja engoro ai tenkaraki lelo shekuti, naa kaitame nanu lelo arikok; amu kegolie Olaitoriani loo lororani eluata enye ina aji e Yuda. Eketiu ninche anaa imbartan aainei naagol o larrabal." 
Zechariah10:4 Atua ninche epukunye ilaitoriak, o larikok o lkituaak ooitore iltung'ana laainei." 
Zechariah10:5 Ore pooki tenebo naa keaku iltung'ana magil to larrabal, eitunyoki ilmang'ati lenye atua esarng'ab oo nkoitoi naalala; naa kearisho ninche amu etii Olaitoriani tenebo ninche, naa kemir ninche lelo akedok loo mbartan." 
Zechariah10:6 Ekaitagol iltung'ana le Yuda; naa kaitajeu enkaji e Yosef. Ekashuku ninche amu aata olng'ur te ninche, naa ketiu ninche anaa keitu aekata ang'as aany ninche: Amu are nanu Olaitoriani Enkai enye, naa kawaliki ninche." 
Zechariah10:7 Ketiu Efraim anaa olmorrani magilani, neshipa iltauja lenye anaa iltung'ana ootooko enaisho oo sabibu. Edol inkera enye ina naa keshipa, neshipakino ina mirata naishoo Olaitoriani ninche." 
Zechariah10:8 Kaipot iltung'ana laainei aiturrurr tenebo, amu atokordua nanu ninche, naa keaku ninche kumok anaa apa te moitie." 
Zechariah10:9 Ore hoo naidapashaka nanu ninche atua iloreren, kake ore too nkuapi naalakua naa kaadamu ninche, nanu, neaku ore ninche tenebo inkera enye naa kepok nerrinyunye ang tenebo." 
Zechariah10:10 Ayau ninche aitung'uaa Misiri o Asiria enkang enye nalotu aitamany ninche enkop enye. Ekaitamany sii ninche enkop e Gilead o Lebanon, o metaa meekure eeta enkop enemanyi te nkumoi o lorere." 
Zechariah10:11 Naa keeim ninche enaiposha e Misiri ore ilopir le naiposha naa kepuoi aaishie ore eng'uton pooki olkeju le Nail naa keitoi. Ore olwuasa le Asiria naa keitadoyiori aaitobor, ore engolon e Misiri nelo aing'uaa ninye." 
Zechariah10:12 Ekaitagol ninche tiatua Olaitoriani, naa kepuo ninche tiatua enkitoo e nkarna enye, Olaitoriani ojo.”" 
Zechariah11:1 Tabolo nchomito inono, iyie Lebanon, Pee etum enkima ainosa atumuta iltarakua linono!" 
Zechariah11:2 Teyietu inchira iyie lo shani onyaanyukie oltarakuai, amu eturori oltarakuai, ore lelo keek oota enkishiaa sidai einyalaki pooki. Enchira niyietutu lo keek oogol le Bashan; ore ina tim nasur too lkeek netumutaki aadung!" 
Zechariah11:3 Entoning olkiyioi le lelo shekuti; amu eiwuang'ieki aaoru enkitoo enye! Entoning, enkikurrukur e lelo ng'atunyo ore entim natii embata e Yordan, netumutaki aaidaikie." 
Zechariah11:4 Inji ejo Olaitoriani Enkai ai: “Taa olchekut le nena tare naapuoi aayieng. 
Zechariah11:5 Ore lelo ooinyang'u ninche neyieng ninche nepuo eitu eitamei ninche. Emir ninche inkiri nejo, ‘Meisisi Olaitoriani ataa nanu karsis.’ Ore ilchekuti lenye maate nemeatayie ninche olng'ur." 
Zechariah11:6 Amu maitoki nanu aing'urrie lelo oomanya ena kop, Olaitoriani ojo, ng'ura, kaisho nanu iltung'ana metabatatakinoyu, oltung'ani ake, inkaik olchekut lenye, oltung'ani ake nkaik o laiguanani lenye, naa kepuo ninche aarrarrakino enkop, nemakordu nanu hoo obo too nkaik enye.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Metaa ataa nanu olchekut le nena tare naaiguanareki pee eyiengi te lelo oomir intare, naya nanu ing'udisin are. Ore nabo naisho enkarna ajo “Empiris,” ore enkae naisho enkarna aajo, “Naboisho,” Nairrita nanu ntare." 
Zechariah11:8 Ore to lapa obo, naidaikie lelo shekuti okuni. Ataa nanu olemeeta eng'iriata te ninche, naaibayie sii." 
Zechariah11:9 Metaa atejo, “Maaku nanu olchekut linyi. Ore ilo oye inchoo eye; ore ina namuta inchoo emuta; ore lelo ootelekutua nchoo eidaikie iseseni loo lkulikae maate.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Nadumu eng'udi ai naji “Empiris,” nagil ninye pee atum atujuto ilo sotua apa oitayio Olaitoriani too loshon pooki." 
Zechariah11:11 Metaa etua apa ilo sotua ina olong. Ore lelo amirak o lainyang'ak le nena tare naagira aaing'or, neyiolou aajo ororei lo Laitoriani." 
Zechariah11:12 Ina pee ajoki ninche, “Tinidolidolo eishaakino too nkonyek inyi, enchooki olekoisiaayio lai naa tenemeishaakino, niminchoruru.” Metaa aatalaakita ninche nanu olekoisiaayio lai shekeli tomoni uni e nkosholai." 
Zechariah11:13 Ina pee aajoki Olaitoriani nanu, “Tipika ninche atua olbene le nkaji Enkai.” Ina laata sapuk natejo ninche ekaaishaakino. Meeta atudumua nena shekeli tomoni uni enkosholai napik atua olchumati otii atua enkaji o Laitoriani." 
Zechariah11:14 Naitoki agil eng'udi ai e are naji “Naboisho.” Neaku etaraki Naboisho oo lalashera, Yuda o Israel." 
Zechariah11:15 Ina pee aajoki Olaitoriani nanu, “Nyaaki ake iwa imasaa olchekut lemeeta tipat." 
Zechariah11:16 Amu ng'ura, ekadumu aitasheyie tena kop olchekut lemeret lelo ooye, arashu eing'oru nena naaidapashari, arashu eishiunye nena ng'ojiniaa, arashu eitoti nena naatelekutua, kake nenya nkiri e nena naapir nepolol o metabaiki iloisotok lenye." 
Zechariah11:17 Oi ele shekut lai lemeeta tipat, ilo olo aing'uaa intare! Metara olalem enkaina enye tenebo enkong'u enye e tatene! Inchoo enkaina enye eikaolo pooki, ore enkong'u enye e tatene nemodoku tukul!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Ele ninye ororei lo Laitoriani oipirta Israel. Nji ejo Olaitoriani, ilo oisalaasha keper neitobir enkop, neisho tung'ani enkishui natii atua ninye," 
Zechariah12:2 “Ng'ura, etaa nanu enajo pee aitotiu Yerusalem anaa enkikompe e naisho oo sabibu; ore lelo oshon oomanita ninye naa keok netiu epuo anaa oltung'ani otemere. Naa ore teneman Yerusalem, naa kemani sii nena anas e Yuda." 
Zechariah12:3 Ore teina olong naa kaitaa Yerusalem osoit oiroishi too loreren pooki le nkop tenetem ninche aadumu ninye, naa keitame ate oleng. Naa kedumakino ninye iloreren pooki le nkop aarare ninye." 
Zechariah12:4 Ore akenya teina olong Olaitoriani ojo, naa kaosh nanu pooki barta to lkirutoto, naosh olakedoni lenye to lmilo, kake ore tialo enkaji e Yuda, naa kamitu nanu ninche, ina kata aosh nanu pooki barta oo loreren te modoki." 
Zechariah12:5 Ina pee ejokino ilgilat le Yuda maate, ‘Ore lelo oomanya Yerusalem eeta engolon tiatua Olaitoriani loo lororani, Enkai enye.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Ore teina olong naa kaitotiu nanu ilgilat le Yuda anaa olmoti le nkima te mpolos entim, arashu enkima nayupuyup natii atua irridat le nkano; naa kemut ninche eiteru te tatene o metabaiki kedienye olorere pooki omanita ninche. Ore Yerusalem neton ake emanyae." 
Zechariah12:7 “Naa keng'as Olaitoriani aisho enkisulata lelo ng'oborri le Yuda, pee eaku ore enkitoo e nkaji e Daudi o enkitoo e lelo oomanya Yerusalem, nemelus te nkitoo Yuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Ore akenya teina olong, naa keitaman Olaitoriani elong'o lelo oomanya Yerusalem, metaa ore ninye oloshal aisul tiatua ninche teina olong netiu anaa Daudi. Ore enkaji e Daudi netiu anaa Enkai, netiu anaa olmalaika lo Laitoriani olo te dukuya ninche." 
Zechariah12:9 Naa ore teina olong, naa kaing'oru amut lelo oshon pooki oopuonu aarare Yerusalem." 
Zechariah12:10 “Naa kabukoki nanu enkaji e Daudi o lelo oomanya Yerusalem enkiyang'et o lng'ur o esayiare, metaa, tenelo neing'or aakurraki ilo otaremo ninche, naa keishiraki ninye, anaa oltung'ani oishiraki ina kerai nabo naa ninye ake eeta. Neishir te mion sapuk oleng te ninye anaa ilo oishiraki olkikau lenye otua." 
Zechariah12:11 Ore teina olong, naa ketiu olkiyioi te Yerusalem anaa olkiyoi le Hadadrimon te nkisiashata e Megido." 
Zechariah12:12 Ekeishir enkop pooki, neishir pooki marei openy; neishir ilo marei le Daudi openy, neishir inkituaak enye maate; neishir olmarei le Natan makewan, neishir inkituaak enye maate." 
Zechariah12:13 Neishir olmarei le nkaji e Lawi makewan, neishir inkituaak enye maate; neishir olmarei le Shemeit makewan, neishir inkituaak enye maate;" 
Zechariah12:14 ore lelo marei ootelekutua, neishir ake olmarei makewan, neishir inkituaak enye maate." 
Zechariah13:1 “Ore akenya teina olong, naa ketumi enkong'u enkare nabolo te nkaraki enkaji e Daudi o lelo oomanya Yerusalem pee eitukuoo ing'ok enye o pooki nemesinya." 
Zechariah13:2 Naa ore teina olong, Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo, ekajutoo aiwuang'ie nkarn oo nkitaanyaanyukot oo nkaitin teina kop, ometaa meigili aekata aadamu; naiwuang'ie sii iloibonok o nkiyang'eta torrok." 
Zechariah13:3 Naa teneitoki ake ninye oltung'ani alotu anaa oloiboni naa kejoki ninye menye otoiwuo tenebo ng'otonye, ‘Mintoki taa aishu, amu iroro elejare te nkarna o Laitoriani;’ ore menye o ng'otonye naatoiutuo ninye nengor ninche ninye meipang'a ina kata eibonisho." 
Zechariah13:4 Ore akenya teina olong naa kekurru pooki oiboni teneibonisho te nduata enye; meitoki aishop olkila oju pee etum atelejisho. 
Zechariah13:5 Ekeaku kejo, ‘Mara nanu oloiboni, ara olaturoni le nterit; amu ara apake olaturoni ebaiki lelero ai.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Naa teneikilikuan likae ajoki ninye, ‘Ainyoo doi kulo baa ootii enkoriong ino?’ Naa kejo, ‘Ilbaa laatipikaki tiatua enkaji oo lchoreta laainei.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 “Inyo lo alem tudumakinoyu olchekut lai, tigilunore ilo tung'ani oitashe te mbata nanu:” Olaitoriani loo lororani ojo. “Toosho ilo shekut, pee etum ntare aaidapashata; naa kaibelekeny, enkaina ai agilunore lelo ooti." 
Zechariah13:8 Ore tiatua enkop pooki, Olaitoriani ojo, ore ematua e are te uni tiatua iltung'ana naa kemuta, neaku ematua nabo te uni eing'uari eishu." 
Zechariah13:9 Naa kapik nanu ina matua nabo te uni atua enkima, naa kasil nanu ninche anaa olosil enkosholai naitoki atem ninche anaa enatemi sahabu. Naa keipot ninche enkarna ai, nawaliki nanu ninche. Naa kajo nanu, ‘Iltung'ana laainei ninche, Olaitoriani Enkai ang.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Ngura, elotu enkolong o Laitoriani, naa ore iyarunot naawaki aitung'uaa intae naa keori te dukuya inkonyek inyi." 
Zechariah14:2 Amu kaiturrurru iloreren pooki metudumakinoto Yerusalem to larrabal, naa keyai ina anasa, nepurri inkajijik, neikonyi inkituaak. Eyae ematua e nkanasa te yararoto. Ore ilkulikae tung'ana nemeyae ninche te nkanasa." 
Zechariah14:3 Ina pee elo Olaitoriani aarare lelo oshon, anaa enataarishe ninye te nkolong o larrabal." 
Zechariah14:4 Ore akenya teina olong naa keitashe nkejek enyena toldoinyo loo loirienito, ilo otii dukuya Yerusalem te nkalo o loosaen. Ore ilo doinyo loo loirienito naa keiperra kat are eiteru to loo saen o meshomo oloo ntoluo aaku eululu sapuk. Metaa ore ematua nabo oldoinyo nelo enkalo e moikuape ore enkae seshati oldoinyo nelo enkalo e kopikop." 
Zechariah14:5 Ore ina ululu oo ldoinyo laainei nemeitoki aponari agutu neaku keibung'are isunta pokira oldoinyo, nitumutumu aaisika anaa apa ina kata nisikisiki aailany olokirikiri too nkolong'i e Usia olaiguanani le Yuda. Ina pee elotu Olaitoriani Enkai inyi tenebo lelo pooki sinyat eboitare ninye." 
Zechariah14:6 Ore akenya teina olong, meetae hoo enkirobi arashu enkurriny e ndeem." 
Zechariah14:7 Naa keaku endama enaado oleng (Olaitoriani oyiolo ena), ime endama neme enkewarie, amu ore enoshi kata nikijo iyiook emuto, eton ake etii ewang'an." 
Zechariah14:8 Ore teina olong naa keruko inkariak e mpuaan naapuku aing'uaa Yerusalem. Ore ematua enye nabo nerukokino enaiposha enkalo oloo saen ore enkae matua nerukokino enaiposha e nkalo oloontoluo; naa keruko to lari pooki. 
Zechariah14:9 Naa keaku Olaitoriani Olaiguanani le nkop pooki, ore kenya te ina olong neaku Olaitoriani obo o enkarna enye nabo." 
Zechariah14:10 Ore enkop pooki naa keibelekenyi aitaa enkop naisiasha eiteru te Geba o metabaiki Rimon natii kopikop e Yerusalem. Ore Yerusalem neaku ketala etii shumata ina kop namanita ninye; ebaiki enkanasa e Yerusalem epuku te nkishomi e Benchamen o metabaiki ewueji e nkishomi musana, ine apa ebaiki oltalet le Hananel o meshomo ina aji naironyieki enaisho oo sabibu o laiguanani." 
Zechariah14:11 Naa kemany iltung'ana ninye amu meitokini aata oldeket, keton Yerusalem te seriani." 
Zechariah14:12 Naa ele olmeitai laa ninye emutie Olaitoriani iloreren pooki lelo oodumaki olarrabal Yerusalem. Ekeng'uoyu iseseni lenye eton eitashoo, naa keng'uoyu inkonyek enye etii atua ilukuny enye, naa keng'uoyu ilng'ejepa lenye tiatua inkutukie enye." 
Zechariah14:13 Naa ore akenya teina olong naa kedoiki ninche olkirutoto sapuk oing'uaa Olaitoriani, ometaa keibung ake oltung'ani enkaina o likae, ore nkaik enye, nedumakino olikae olikae aarare." 
Zechariah14:14 Ore sii iltung'ana le Yuda naa keara emitu Yerusalem. Naa kearu ninche enkarsisisho oo loshon pooki oomanita sahabu, o enkosholai tenebo inkilani te nkumoi." 
Zechariah14:15 Naa kedoiki olmeitai laaijo oloo mbartan, o nyumpui, o ntamesin, o sirkon o pooki ng'ues ake ninye natii atua lelo ng'oborri." 
Zechariah14:16 Ore taa pooki ng'ae oimisho te lelo oshon pooki ooetuo aadumakino Yerusalem, neaku keilepu too larin pooki aapuonu aaserem olaiguanani, ilo Aitoriani loo lororani, neibung osirua loo lng'oborri." 
Zechariah14:17 Naa tenetii olmare obo te nkop lemelo Yerusalem aserem Olaiguanani, Olaitoriani loo lororani, nemetum ninche enchan." 
Zechariah14:18 Naa tenemelo olmarei loo Lmisiri aapuo aaitarasaa ate, nedoiki ninche olmetai laa Olaitoriani ninye oosh lelo oshon lemeilep aapuo aaibung osirua loo lng'oborri." 
Zechariah14:19 Ena nalo aaku enkitamioto te Misiri o enkitamioto oo loshon pooki lemeilep aapuo aaibung osirua loo lng'oborri. 
Zechariah14:20 Naa ore akenya teina olong, naa keaku keetae iltualan loo mbartan nesirakino irorei oojo, “Sinyati to Laitoriani.” Ore imotioo naayierishoreki naatii atua enkaji Enkai naa keaku sinyat anaa ilbakulini otii dukuya olperere;" 
Zechariah14:21 neaku ore pooki moti natii atua Yerusalem o Yuda neaku pooki sinyati to Laitoriani loo lororani, metaa ore lelo pooki ooitayu olasar, nepuonu aaya ninche neitokitokie nena kiri o lasar tiatua ninche. Nemeitokini aata olamirani tiatua ina aji Olaitoriani loo lororani ina olong." 
Malachi1:1 Olkilikuai ele oishoo Olaitoriani Malaki metoliki Israeli. 
Malachi1:2 Ejo Olaitoriani: Atonyorra intae. Kake itejo intae “Kaji doi inkuna tininyorru iyiook?” “Amaa Esau aime olalashe le Yakobo?” Olaitoriani ojo. “Natonyorra nanu Yakobo 
Malachi1:3 naibayu Esau, naitomijoono nanu enkop enye oo ldoinyo, naing'ueiki enjung'ore enye imbariak o lpurkel.”" 
Malachi1:4 Tenejo Edom; “Etumutaki iyiook kake kintoki aashet ineeidaaitie”; ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani: “Eidim ninche aateshet, kake kasulaki nanu enkop ometaba anaa neipoti aajo enkop e ntorroni, iltung'ana ootagorokine Olaitoriani intarasi.”" 
Malachi1:5 Idolidolo ena too inkonyek inyi maate, nijojo ina kata; “Aikitok Olaitoriani negiroo enkitoo enye ilpolosien loo Siraeli!”" 
Malachi1:6 “Eyanyit olayioni menye, neyanyit osinka olkitok lenye. Amaa naa tenaa kara papaai linyi, koree enkanyit ai? Naa tenaa kara olkitok, koree euriata ai? Ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani. Lo apolosak kulo oomen enkarna ai. Ijojo intae, ‘Kaji doi kinkuna tinikimenu enkarna ino?’" 
Malachi1:7 Aliki intae ajoki; tinintayuyu endaa naiduruk aapik shumata olperere lo lasar lai. Nijojo sii; ‘Kaji doi kinkuna tinikindurukie ninye?’ Ajoki intae: Amaa enidamumu to lmena emisa o Laitoriani, nintemenimene sii ilkulikae meibayu." 
Malachi1:8 Amaa tinintayuyu ilasarri loo masaa modook, aime eng'oki ina sapuk? Amaa sii tinintayuyu ilasarri loo ntokitin ng'ojiniaa anaa inaamuoi, aime eng'oki ina? Entetem sii intae enchoo nena olkitok linyi, aijojo keshipakino intae anaa eisho intae omom? Ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi1:9 “Ajoki intae teina kata, engoru omom e Nkai peyie eidim aing'urrie iyiook. Amaa teina kishooroto naing'uaa inkaik inyi, aijojo keidim aing'urrie hoo obo linyi? Ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi1:10 Oi te naa ketii obo linyi oidim aikeno kutuk aji peyie mikintokiki aainuaaki enkima e pesho to lperere lo lasar! Mashipakino nanu intae, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, nemang'amaa sii olasar linyi too nkaik inyi." 
Malachi1:11 Amu ore eiteru te nkilepunoto enkolong o metabaiki endoyioroto, kitok enkarna ai too loreren pooki, ore te pooki wueji, neitayuni enkorropil te nkaraki enkarna ai, neitayuni sii ilasarri oosinya amu aikitok enkarna ai neyanyiti too loreren pooki, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi1:12 Kake isarkionie intae ninye pee ijojo eidurukieki emisa o Laitoriani, ore sii endaa enye nemenuni." 
Malachi1:13 Ijojo intae; eng'ura sii intae eneba enauri, nikidasakiki nkineji, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani. Kiyakiki sii intokitin naapurruno anaa ing'ojiniaa, o naamuoi, eji naa ninche kipuonunu aaitaikinye olasar! Aijojo kang'amaa ina too nkaik inyi? Ejo Olaitoriani." 
Malachi1:14 Metedeki olalejani pooki ooata olkuoo supat te luaata enye, neinos olmumai ejo ekaishoru eji neitoki apolosaki Olaitoriani ina naata eleyiata. Amu ara nanu olaiguanani kitok, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani naa keurei enkarna ai too loreren pooki." 
Malachi2:1 “Ore naa taata lo apolosak, eninyi ena kitanapata." 
Malachi2:2 Ti nimining'ining'i, tinimipikipiki atua iltauja ninchosho enkitoo enkarna ai, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, kaae nairriu oldeket shumata intae nadek sii imayianat inyi. Nesipa ajo aidipa nanu atediaa ninche, enkaraki mipikitata ntae ltauja linyi." 
Malachi2:3 Ng'ura, kaisikong nanu eishoi inyi, napik inkomomi inyi emodioi, nena modiok oo lasarri linyi, naitalamaa intae te dukuya nanu." 
Malachi2:4 Ore enkaraki ina, niyiolouu aajo airriwua nanu ena kitanapata atua intae, pee etum olning'o lai lo sotua o Lawi aitasho, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi2:5 “Ore apa olning'o lai lo sotua o ninye, naa olning'o lo osotua le nkishui o eseriani, naishoo apa nanu ninye kuna peyie etum ninye aturia; naaureyu ninye nanu, neitashe te nkanyit euriata e nkarna ai." 
Malachi2:6 Etii apa enkiteng'enata nasipa enkutuk enye, neitu etumi enkitapong'oto te enkutuk enye. Eshomo tenebo nanu te seriani o te nkitashoto nanare, neibelekenya ninye ilkumok metung'uai intorrok." 
Malachi2:7 Amu ore enkutuk olapolosani neishiaakino nerrip eng'eno, ore sii iltung'ana neishiaakino neing'oru enkiteng'enare te nkutuk enye, amu ore ninye naa olkilikuai lo Laitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi2:8 “Kake mbelekenye iyie apaash enkoitoi; nchoo ilkumok errorro too nkiteng'enat inono, indurukie iyie olning'o lo sotua le Lawi" 
Malachi2:9 naa kaisho nanu mikitemenuni nikintadouni te dukuya iltung'ana pooki, anaa ina neitu iyie imbung nkoitoi aainei, kake intodolua olkep too nkiteng'enat inono.”" 
Malachi2:10 Aimikiaata iyiook pooki papa obo? Aime Enkai nabo naitobira iyiook? Ainyoo naa peyie mikisiliga iyiook maate, nikisarkionie olning'o loo loo papa lang?" 
Malachi2:11 Etaa Yuda olemeisiligayu, netaasaki embae o lminong te Israel o tiatua Yerusalem, amu eisarkionie Yuda ewueji sinyati o Laitoriani, teina natonyorra neyam entito e nkai oo loreren." 
Malachi2:12 Metudung'oi Olaitoriani aiwuang'ie too lng'oborri le Yakobo tenebo oltung'ani oas ina, o loishakenoki, anaa olowal anaa oloyaki olasar Olaitoriani loo lororani!" 
Malachi2:13 Niaasita ake sii ena. Imulumul olperere lo lasar to Laitoriani too lkiyio, te nkishirata o too nkigorot eshipakino te nkaina ino." 
Malachi2:14 Ninkilikuanu ajo, “Ainyoo doi pee meng'amaa ninye?” Enkaraki nataa Olaitoriani shakeni lo lning'o te rishata eina kitok niyama te kitisho, itaa iyie olemeisiligayu te ninye hoo duoo naa enkitok ino te naboisho o to lning'o." 
Malachi2:15 Aime Enkai nabo naitaa neitopok enkiyang'et e nkishui te iyiook? Naa kainyoo ninye eyieu? Eyieu ninye eishoi naure Enkai. Metaa ng'ura entagolie ate emincho obo linyi eaku olemeisiligayu teina kitok e kitisho enye. 
Malachi2:16 “Amu kaiba nanu, eoro o lpayian o enkitok ejo Olaitoriani Enkai e Israel naiba enkimulumulata o lkila le nkarruoisho, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani. Metaa eng'ura ate, nimiakuku ilemeisiligayu.”" 
Malachi2:17 Intanaura intae Olaitoriani too rorei linyi. Nijojo ake sii: “Kaji doi kinkuna ti nikintanaur ninye?” Intanaura ninye te nijojo: “Aisupat pooki tung'ani oas ntorrok too nkonyek o Laitoriani, naa keshipakino ninye ninche.” Anaa inkilikuanunu ijojo, “Koree doi Enkai oo sipat?”" 
Malachi3:1 “Ng'ura, ekairriu nanu olkilikuai lai pee eitobir enkoitoi te dukuya nanu ore ilo Aitoriani ling'oruru, nelotu nabo kata atua enkaji enye. Ore olkilikuai leilo ning'o lishipakinono, ng'ura elotu ninye, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi3:2 “Kake aing'ae oidim ating'iria ina olong elotunoto enye? Naa aing'ae oidim aitasho tenelioyu ninye? Amu etiu ninye anaa enkima o lasikani, netiu sii anaa osabuni oishu oloirerio." 
Malachi3:3 Kelo ninye aton anaa olasilani osil enkosholai, naa kesil aitisidan ilayiok le Lawi neitisidan ninche anaa sahabu o enkosholai o metaba anaa neitarasaki Olaitoriani ilasarri ooishiaakino." 
Malachi3:4 Neaku ore olasar le Yuda o Yerusalem neitiship Olaitoriani anaa inkolong'i apa e moitie oo larin ootulusoitie. 
Malachi3:5 “Natum taa atinyikaki intae te nkiguana, aaku olchakeni osieku agilunore ilkuyandik, nagilunore iloololoito, nagilunore lelo oonya ilmuma le lejare, nagilunore lelo ooitorogonyisho too laakinot enye, tenebo inkolia o nkera okishin, nagilunore lelo ooinyal ilomon nemaaure ninche nanu; ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi3:6 “Ore nanu maibelekenya nanu Olaitoriani; ore naa intae, lo ayiok le Yakobo, neitu emuti intae." 
Malachi3:7 Ore ebaiki nkolong'i oo loo papaai linyi itapaasha nkiguanat aainei neitu imbung'ubung'u ninche. Entushukunye enatii, naa kashukokino sii nanu intae ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani. Kake ijojo ntae; ‘Kaji kinko tenikishukunye?’" 
Malachi3:8 Kepur oltung'ani Enkai? Eji nikipurritoto intae nanu. Nijojo ake sii, ‘Kaji doi kinkuna tinikipur iyie?’ Te matua inyi e tomon o too lasarri." 
Malachi3:9 Etediaaki intae to ldeket, amu kipurritoto intae nanu, intae olosho pooki." 
Malachi3:10 Eyau ematua e tomon pooki atua enkaji ai nashumishoreki pee eaku ketii endaa atua enkaji ai; entetemaki sii iyie, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani tenemaboloki intae ilusien e shumata, nabuku abori imayianat naadooyo." 
Malachi3:11 Kaisikong sii ilo maati omutisho te nkop peyie meitoki aainyal ilng'anayio le nkop ino. Ore osabibu otii enkurma nemeitoki aalau eishoi, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi3:12 Ore iloshon pooki nikimpot aajo olomayiana, amu iaku enkop nashipakinoi, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani." 
Malachi3:13 “Ore irorei linyi naaitame nanu katukul Olaitoriani ojo. Nijojo ake: ‘Kaji kinkuna tinikiro mbaa torrok tialo iyie? 
Malachi3:14 Itejo intae Pesho ti nikisiaai Enkai,’ ainyoo esidano ti nikimbung enkitanapata enye anaa tinikipuo anaa ilooata osina te dukuya Olaitoriani loo lororani?" 
Malachi3:15 Ore anaa enatiu iloo wuasa anaa kemayiana, ore ilarruok, neme kebul ake, kake tenetem ninche Enkai neimisho.”" 
Malachi3:16 Ore lelo ooure Olaitoriani, neiro maate, naa keirrugoki Olaitoriani ninche enkiok ainining ninche. Neigeri embuku nadamunyeki te dukuya ninye, o lelo pooki ooure Olaitoriani, neing'oru sii enkarna enye." 
Malachi3:17 “Keaku ninche iltung'ana laainei ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, intokitin aainei kiroteti teina olong naasisho nanu naa kaleku nanu ninche anaa oltung'ani opalaki enkerai enye naisiaaita." 
Malachi3:18 Nitum taa ina kata ategela ilo oitashe too sipat o laasani loo ng'ok, o ilo oisiaai Enkai o lemeisiaai ninye." 
Malachi4:1 “Amu ng'ura; elotu enkolong napejisho anaa olmoti le nkima, ina pee eaku ilooitokoos o laasak pooki loo ng'ok isuut; ore ina olong nalotu napejoo ninche, ejo Olaitoriani loo lororani, melekaki ninch entonai anaa olng'osila." 
Malachi4:2 Kake ore iyie oure enkarna ai, keilepaki intae enkolong e supatisho eetae enkishiunoto too naipuko enyena. Ipuopuo intae intigiranana anaa ilasho ooti ooitigiran epuku to lale." 
Malachi4:3 Naa intunyokiki enkop iltorrok. Amu keaku nkuruon tiabori ndapi oo nkejek inyi ina olong naas ina Olaitoriani loo lororani. 
Malachi4:4 “Entadamu inkiguanat o sinka lai Musa, o nkitanapat naitanapa ninye to ldoinyo le Horeb naaipirta Israel pooki." 
Malachi4:5 “Ng'ura, kairriwaki nanu intae Eliya oloiboni le Nkai eton eitu elotu ina olong torrono o Laitoriani." 
Malachi4:6 Naa keibelekenyaki ninye iltauja loo menye inkera enye, neibelekenyaki sii iltauja loo nkera iloo menye, malotu ake aosh enkop to ldeket.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Ore pee idolidolo ina torroni nabau e mutata natolimuo oloiboni le Nkai oji Daniel eitashe te wueji sinyati. (Inchoo ilo oisomita metayiolo.) 
Luke3:25 olayioni le Matatias, olayioni le Amos, olayioni le Nahum, olayioni le Elsi, olayioni le Nagai," 
Luke3:25 olayioni le Matatias, olayioni le Amos, olayioni le Nahum, olayioni le Elsi, olayioni le Nagai," 
Romans9:25 Nesipa etejo ninye te Hosea, “Iltung'ana apa leme laainei ayooki nanu aipot ajo, ‘ltung'ana laainei’, ore apa ina tinki nayooki nanu ajo, ‘Enkirotet ai.’ ”"
